Genesis1:1 EKUQALEKENI wadala utixo izulu nomhlaba. 
Genesis1:2 KEKALOKU umhlaba wabugxwayiba, wauzé kanjalo: kwabako nobumnyama ebusweni benzulu. Waye u‐Moya katixo wazamazama pezu kwobuso bamanzi." 
Genesis1:3 Wayesiti utixo: Makubeko ukukanya; kwaza kwabako ukukanya. 
Genesis1:4 Waye utixo wabona ukukanya ukuba kulungile; waza utixo wenza isahlulo pakati kwokukanya nobumnyama. 
Genesis1:5 Wati utixo ukutiya ukukanya, yimini; wati nokutiya ubumnyama, bubusuku. Kwaza ukuhlwa nokusa kwaba ngumhla wokuqala." 
Genesis1:6 Wayesiti utixo: Makubeko isibakabaka pakati kwamanzi, size sibe sisahlulo pakati kwamanzi namanzi." 
Genesis1:7 Waza utixo wasenza isibakabaka, wawahlula amanzi abengapantsi kwesibakabaka, kuwo amanzi abengapezu kwesibakabaka. Kwaye kunjalo ke." 
Genesis1:8 Wati utixo ukutiya isibakabaka, lizulu. Kwaza ukuhlwa nokusa kwaba ngumhla wesibini." 
Genesis1:9 Wayesiti utixo: Amanzi angapantsi kwezulu makahlanganiselwe endaweni inye, kuze kubonakale okwomileyo. Kwaye kunjalo ke." 
Genesis1:10 Wati utixo ukutiya okwomileyo, ngumhlaba; wati nokutiya ukuhlanganisana kwamanzi, zilwandle. Waye utixo wabona ukuba kulungile." 
Genesis1:11 Wayesiti utixo: Umhlaba mauvelise inca, n omfuno unika imbewu, n omti wokuqa̔ma, uhlanza isiqa̔mo ngemmilo yawo, ombewu ipakati kwawo, pezu kwomhlaba. Kwaye kunjalo ke." 
Genesis1:12 Umhlaba wavelisa inca, n omfuno unika imbewu ngemmilo yawo, nomti uhlanza isiqa̔mo, ombewu ipakati kwawo, ngemmilo yawo. Waye utixo wabona ukuba kulungile." 
Genesis1:13 Kwaza ukuhlwa nokusa kwaba ngumlhla wesitatu. 
Genesis1:14 Wayesiti utixo: Makubeko izikanyiso esibakabakeni sezulu, zize zisenze isahlulo pakati kwemini nobusuku; mazibe zizo ezemiqondiso, nezamaxesha amiselweyo, nezemihla, nezeminyaka:" 
Genesis1:15 maziti kanjalo zibe zizikanyiso esibakabakeni sezulu zokukanyisa pezu kwomhlaba. Kwaye kunjalo ke. 
Genesis1:16 Wazenza utixo zazibini izikanyiso ezikulu; eso sikulu isikanyiso ukuba sipate imini, neso sincinane isikanyiso ukuba sipate ubusuku; wazenza nenkwenkwezi." 
Genesis1:17 Wayezimisa utixo esibakabakeni sezulu, ukuba zikanyise pezu kwomhlaba," 
Genesis1:18 nokuba zipate pezu kwemini napezu kwobusuku, nokuba zisenze isahlulo pakati kwokukanya nobumnyama. Waye utixo wabona ukuba kulungile." 
Genesis1:19 Kwaza ukuhlwa nokusa kwaba ngumhla wesine. 
Genesis1:20 Wayesiti utixo: Amanzi makakolise ukuvelisa izilwana ezinokudliwa kwobomi; nentaka mazipapazele pezu kwomhlaba esibakabakeni sezulu. 
Genesis1:21 Wadala utixo iminenga emikulu, nazo zonke izinto ezinokudliwa kwobomi ezishukumayo, awati amanzi akolisa ukuzivelisa ngemmilo yazo; kwa nazo zonke intaka ezinamapiko ngemmilo yazo. Waye utixo wabona ukuba kulungile." 
Genesis1:22 Waza utixo wazitamsanqela, esiti: Cumani, nande, nizalise amanzi akuzo ilwandle; nentaka mazande emhlabeni." 
Genesis1:23 Kwaza ukuhlwa nokusa kwaba ngumhla wesihlanu. 
Genesis1:24 Wayesiti utixo: Umhlaba mawuvelise izinto ezinokudliwa kwobomi ngemmilo yazo, inkomo, nento ezinambuzelayo, nezilo zomhlaba, ngemmilo yazo. Kwaye kunjalo ke." 
Genesis1:25 Wenza utixo izilo zomhlaba ngemmilo yazo, nenkomo ngemmilo yazo, nazo zonke izinambuzane zomhlaba ngemmilo yazo. Waye utixo wabona ukuba kulungile." 
Genesis1:26 Wayesiti utixo: Masenze umntu ngomfanekiso wetu, njengemfuzo yetu; mababe nobukosi pezu kwentlanzi zolwandle, napezu kwentaka zezulu, napezu kwenkomo, napezu kwawo wonke umhlaba, napezu kwazo zonke izinambuzane ezinambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba." 
Genesis1:27 Waza utixo wadala umntu ngowake umfanekiso; wamdala ngomfanekiso katixo: wabadala indoda nomfazi. 
Genesis1:28 Waye utixo wabatamsanqela, wati utixo kubo: Cumani, nande, nizalise umhlaba, niwoyise; yibani nobukosi pezu kwentlanzi zolwandle, napezu kwentaka zezulu, napezu kwazo zonke izilo ezishukumayo pezu kwomhlaba." 
Genesis1:29 Wayesiti utixo: Bona ke, ndinipile yonke imifuno inika imbewu, epezu kwobuso bomhlaba wonke, nayo yonke imiti ekukuyo isiqa̔mo somti sinika imbewu: yoba yinto yokutya kuni." 
Genesis1:30 Nakuzo zonke izilo zomhlaba, nakuzo zonke intaka zezulu, nakuzo zonke izinto ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni, ekukuzo ubomi, ndipile yonke imifuno eluhlaza ibe kukutya. Kwaye kunjalo ke." 
Genesis1:31 Waye utixo wabona konke abekwenzile, kekaloku bona ke, kwakulungile kunene. Kwaza ukuhlwa nokusa kwaba ngumhla wesitandatu." 
Genesis2:1 Kwanjalo ke ukufezwa kwezulu nomhlaba, nawo wonke umkosi wazo." 
Genesis2:2 Waye utixo ebegqibile ngomhla wesixe̔nxe umsebenzi wake abewenzile; waza wapumla ngomhla wesixe̔nxe kuwo wonke umsebenzi wake abewenzile. 
Genesis2:3 Waza utixo watamsanqela owesixe̔nxe umhla, wawenza ngcwele; ngokokuba ebete ngawo wapumla kuwo wonke umsebenzi wake abewudalile utixo wawenza." 
Genesis2:4 NANKU ukuvela kwezulu nokwomhlaba ekudalweni kwazo, mhlana uyehova utixo wenzayo umhlaba nezulu," 
Genesis2:5 yonke imitana yasendle ingekabiko emhlabeni, nayo yonke imifuno yasendle ingekahlumi: ngokuba uyehova utixo ebengekanisi imvula pezu kwomhlaba, kwakungeko mntu kanjalo alime ihlabati." 
Genesis2:6 Koko bekunyuka inkungu emhlabeni, yanyela ubuso bonke behlabati." 
Genesis2:7 Kekaloku uyehova utixo wadala umntu ngotuli lwomhlaba, wapefumlela ezimpumlweni zake umpefumlo wobomi; waza umntu waba ngumpefumlo opilileyo." 
Genesis2:8 Waye uyehova utixo watyala umyezo e‐Hedeni, ngasempumalanga: wambeka kona umntu abemdalile." 
Genesis2:9 Waza uyehova utixo wahlumisa emhlabeni yonke imiti ekanukekayo ukubonwa nemnandi ukutyiwa; kwa nomti wobomi pakati emyezweni, nomti wokwaziwa kwokulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo." 
Genesis2:10 Kwaye kupuma e‐Hedeni umlambo, ukuze uwunyele umyezo lowo; owahluka kona, waba zizibaxa zazine." 
Genesis2:11 Igama lowokuqala umlambo yi‐Pishone: nguwo lo ojikelezelayo lonke ilizwe le‐Havila, apo ikona igolide." 
Genesis2:12 Kekaloku igolide yelozwe ilungile: iko kona ibedolaki nelitye leshohame. 
Genesis2:13 Igama lomlambo wesibini yi‐Gihone: nguwo lo ojikelezelayo lonke ilizwe lakwa‐Kushe. 
Genesis2:14 Igama lomlambo wesitatu yi‐Hidekele: nguwo lo osingayo ngasempumalanga ye‐Asiriya. Umlambo wesine ngum‐Ferate. 
Genesis2:15 Waza uyehova utixo watabata umntu, wambeka emyezweni wase‐Hedeni, ukuze alime wona, awugcine." 
Genesis2:16 Waye uyehova utixo waxela emntwini, esiti: Yonke imiti yomyezo ungakolisa ukutya kuyo;" 
Genesis2:17 kodwa umti wokwaziwa kwokulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo, akuyi kutya kuwo: ngokuba emhleni utyayo kuwo uya kufa ngokufa." 
Genesis2:18 Wayesiti uyehova utixo: Akulungile ukuba umntu abe yedwa; ndiya kumenzela umncedi olungelelene naye. 
Genesis2:19 Waebedalile uyehova utixo emhlabeni zonke izilo zasendle, nazo zonke intaka zezulu, wazizisa ku‐Adame ukuba abone woti nina ukuzibiza: kuze kwati, oko wazibiza ngako u‐Adame zonke izinto ezinokudliwa kwobomi, kwaba ligama lazo kona." 
Genesis2:20 Waye u‐Adame wazitiya amagama zonke inkomo, nentaka zezulu, nazo zonke izilo zasendle; kodwa u‐Adame, akwamfunyanelwa mncedi olungelelene naye." 
Genesis2:21 Wandula uyehova utixo wahlisa ubutongo obukulu pezu kwo‐Adame, wada walala; waza watabata lwalunye kuzo imbambo zake, wati vingci ngenyama endaweni yalo." 
Genesis2:22 Olobambo abelutabatile ku‐Adame, waka uyehova utixo ngalo umfazi, waza wamzisa ku‐Adame." 
Genesis2:23 Wayesiti u‐Adame: Lo kaloku ulitambo ematanjeni am, nenyama enyameni yam; kukona aya kubizwa ngokuti ngumfazi, ngokuba ebetatyatwa endodeni." 
Genesis2:24 Ngako oko indoda iya kushiya uyise nonina, inamatele emfazini wayo; baze bona babe yinyama nye." 
Genesis2:25 Kekaloku babezé bobabini, u‐Adame nomfazi wake, bengabanga nantloni noko." 
Genesis3:1 KEKALOKU inyoka ibinamaqokolo ngapezu kwazo zonke izilo zasendle, abezenzile uyehova utixo. Yada yati emfazini: Kanene utshilo na utixo ukuti: Aniyi kutya kuyo yonke imiti yalomyezo?" 
Genesis3:2 Waza wati umfazi enyokeni: Singatya kuso isiqa̔mo semiti yalomyezo; 
Genesis3:3 kanti isiqa̔mo somti opakati emyezweni, utshilo utixo ukuti: Ningatyi kuso, ningabi nakusicukumisa kanjalo, hleze nife." 
Genesis3:4 Yandula yati inyoka emfazini: Aniyi kufa ngokufa; 
Genesis3:5 ngokuba esazi utixo, okokuba noti, mhlana nitya kuso, nandule nigabuke amehlo enu, naniya kuba njengotixo, nikwazi nje okulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo." 
Genesis3:6 Wati akubona umfazi ukuba umti lowo umnandi ukutyiwa, nokuba utandeka emehlweni, kwa umti onokukanukwa ukulumkisa, wandula watabata kwisiqa̔mo sawo, watya ke; wanika nendoda yake kunye naye, eyatya nayo." 
Genesis3:7 Andula ukugatyulwa amehlo abo bobabini, baqonda ukuba bazé; bati ngoko batungelanisa amagqabi omkiwane, bazenzela imibinqo." 
Genesis3:8 Kwaye kute ekubeteni kwempepo, baliva ilizwi likayehova utixo, ehamba emyezweni: baza u‐Adame nomfazi wake bazimela ubuso bukayehova utixo, pakati kwemiti yomyezo." 
Genesis3:9 Waye uyehova utixo embiza u‐Adame, wati kuye: Upina?" 
Genesis3:10 Wati yena: Ilizwi lako ndaliva emyezweni, ndaza ndoyika, ngokuba ndizé; ndazimela ngoko." 
Genesis3:11 Wayesiti: Utyelwe ngubanina ukuba uzé? Utyile na kulomti endandikuyalela ngawo ukuba ungatyi kuwo? 
Genesis3:12 Wati u‐Adame: Umfazi, lo ubumnika abe nam, nguye owandinika kulomti, ndide ndatya." 
Genesis3:13 Waza uyehova utixo wati emfazini: Kuyinto nina oku ukwenzileyo? Wati umfazi: Inyoka yandikohlisa, ndaza ndatya." 
Genesis3:14 Wandul’ ukuti uyehova utixo enyokeni: Ngokokuba ukwenzile oku, uqalekisiwe wena pezu kwazo zonke inkomo, napezu kwazo zonke izilo zasendle; uya kuhamba ngesisu, utye utuli yonke imihla yokudla kwako ubomi:" 
Genesis3:15 ndandiya kumisa ubutshaba pakati kwako nomfazi, napakati kwenzalo yako nenzalo yake; iya kukutyumza intloko yona, uti wena uyityumze isitende." 
Genesis3:16 Wati kumfazi: Ndiya kwandisa kakulu usizi lwokumita kwako; uya kuzala abantwana ngosizi; kwoti ukukanuka kwako kube ngasendodeni yako, iti yona ikwongame." 
Genesis3:17 Wayesiti ku‐Adame: Ngokokuba ubupulapula ilizwi lomfazi wako, watya kulomti ndabendikuyalela ngawo, ndisiti: Ungatyi kuwo; uqalekisiwe umhlaba ngenxa yako; uya kutya okwawo ngosizi yonke imihla yokudla kwako ubomi." 
Genesis3:18 Kanjalo ameva namakakakaka uya kuwahlumisela kuwe; wauya kutya umfuno wasendle. 
Genesis3:19 Ngokubila kwobuso bako uya kutya isonka, ude ubuyele emhlabeni; ngokuba kwa kuwo ubucatshulwa: ngokuba ulutuli wena, wauya kubuyela elutulini kanjako." 
Genesis3:20 Waye u‐Adame wambiza umfazi wake ngegama elingu‐Eva; ngokuba yena ebengunina wabo bonke abapilileyo. 
Genesis3:21 Kanjalo uyehova utixo wenzela u‐Adame nomfazi wake ingubo zezintsu, wabambatisa." 
Genesis3:22 Wayesiti uyehova utixo: Bona ke, umntu ude waba njengomnye wakuti, ukwazi okulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo; nakaloku, ukuze angoluli isandla sake, atabate nakumti wobomi, atye nokutya, ade apile kude kube ngunapakade:—" 
Genesis3:23 ngako uyehova utixo wamkupa emyezweni wase‐Hedeni, ukuze alime umhlaba abecatshulwe kuwo." 
Genesis3:24 Waza wamgxotela pandle umntu; wazimisa ngasempumalanga yomyezo wase‐Hedeni ikerubime, nesiṙele esibulangatye esijikajikayo, kuze kugcinwe indlela yawo umti wobomi." 
Genesis4:1 WADA u‐Adame wazi u‐Eva umfazi wake, owakaulayo, wazala u‐Kayine, wati: Ndizuzile indoda kuyehova." 
Genesis4:2 Waza walekela ukuzala umninawe wake u‐Abele. Kekaloku u‐Abele waba ngumalusi wezimvu, koko u‐Kayine ebengumlimi womhlaba." 
Genesis4:3 Kwaye kute ekupeleni kwemihla etile, wawuzisa u‐Kayine kwisiqa̔mo somhlaba umnikelo kuyehova." 
Genesis4:4 No‐Abele, wazisa naye kwamazibulo ezimvu zake, nakwinqata lazo. Waye uyehova wabuka u‐Abele nomnikelo wake;" 
Genesis4:5 kanti u‐Kayine nomnikelo wake akambukanga. Waza u‐Kayine waqumba kunene, bati shwa nobuso bake." 
Genesis4:6 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Kayine: Uqumbele nina? bute shwa nganina nobuso bako? 
Genesis4:7 Nxa ulungisayo, akuyi kwamkelwa na? nanxa ungalungisiyo, isono silele ngaselucangweni: kwakuya kuba kuwe ukukanuka kwake, uti wena umongame." 
Genesis4:8 Wada u‐Kayine wati ku‐Abele umninawe wake: Masiye endle. Kwaye kute bakuba sendle, wandula u‐Kayine wasukela ngakuye u‐Abele umninawe wake, wambulala." 
Genesis4:9 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Kayine: Upina u‐Abele umninawe wako? Wayesiti: Andazi: ndingumgcini womninawe wam yinina? 
Genesis4:10 Waza wati: Yinto nina oyenzileyo? Ilizwi legazi lake umninawe wako lilila kum kwa semhlabeni. 
Genesis4:11 Kaloku uqalekisiwe wena emhlabeni, obuwakama umlomo wawo ukwamkela igazi lomninawe wako esandleni sako." 
Genesis4:12 Xeshekweni uwulima umhlaba, awuyi kubuya ukunikele amandla awo: woba lidungadunga nebadubadu emhlabeni." 
Genesis4:13 Waza u‐Kayine wati kuyehova: Ityala lam likulu, lide lingabi nakutwalwa." 
Genesis4:14 Bona ke, undigxotile namhla ebusweni bomhlaba, ndandiya kufihlelwa nobuso bako: ndoba lidungadunga nebadubadu emhlabeni; kwakuya kuti, osukuba endifumana wondibulala." 
Genesis4:15 Wandul’ ukuti uyehova kuye: Ngako oko osukuba ebulala u‐Kayine, kwopindezelwa kuye ngokusixe̔nxe. Waye uyehova wambekela u‐Kayine umqondiso, wokokuba ati osukuba emfumana angambulali." 
Genesis4:16 Waza wapuma u‐Kayine ebusweni bukayehova, waya wahlala elizweni le‐Node, ngasempumalanga ye‐Hedeni." 
Genesis4:17 Waye u‐Kayine wazi umfazi wake; wada wakaula, wazala u‐Enoki: waza waka isixeko, wabiza igama lesixeko eso ngegama lonyana wake, ngo‐Enoki." 
Genesis4:18 Kwaye kuzalelwa u‐Enoki, u‐Hirade; waza u‐Hirade wazala u‐Mehuyaheli; no‐Mehuyaheli wazala u‐Metushaheli; no‐Metushaheli wazala u‐Lameki." 
Genesis4:19 Wati u‐Lameki wazizekela abafazi babini: igama lomnye belingu‐Hada, igama lomnye belingu‐Tsila." 
Genesis4:20 Waye n‐Hada wazala u‐Yabali: nguye obenguyise wabahlala ezintenteni, nowabafuya inkomo." 
Genesis4:21 Igama lomninawe wake belingu‐Yubali: nguye obenguyise wabo bonke abapete iziculiso nezigwaliso. 
Genesis4:22 No‐Tsila, kwa naye wazala u‐Tubali‐kayine, umkandi wazo zonke impahla zobedu nesincete: udade ka‐Tubali‐kayine waengu‐Nahama." 
Genesis4:23 Wayesiti u‐Lameki kubafazi bake: Hada no‐Tsila! pulapulani ilizwi lam; nina bafazi baka‐Lameki! bekelani ukuteta kwam indlebe; ngokuba indoda ndiyibulele ngenxa yenxeba lam, nendodana ngenxa yomvimbo wam:" 
Genesis4:24 ukuba u‐Kayine wopindezelelwa ngokusixe̔nxe, kwoba ngokungamashumi asixe̔nxe anesixe̔nxe aya kupindezelelwa u‐Lameki." 
Genesis4:25 Wabuya wazi u‐Adame umfazi wake; waza wazala unyana, wambiza ngegama elingu‐Shete: ngokuba utixo, watsho, endimisele enye inzalo esikundleni sika‐Abele, ngokuba u‐Kayine embulele." 
Genesis4:26 Naku‐Shete, kwa nakuye kwazalwa unyana; negama lake walibiza ngo‐Enoshe. Kwaqalwa oko ukubiza ngegama likayehova." 
Genesis5:1 NASI isibalelwa sezizukulwana zika‐Adame. Emhleni utixo wamdala umntu, wamenza ngemfuzo katixo." 
Genesis5:2 Wabadala indoda nomfazi, wabatamsanqela, wababiza ngegama elingumntu, ngomhla wokudalwa kwabo." 
Genesis5:3 Wahlala u‐Adame iminyaka yalikulu elinamashumi matatu, waza wazala unyana ngemfuzo yake, njengomfanekiso wake, wambiza ngegama elingu‐Shete." 
Genesis5:4 Yaibe imihla ka‐Adame, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Shete, ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu asibozo; wayezala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis5:5 Yonke imihla ka‐Adame, abehleli ngayo, ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu alitoba anamashumi matatu; wada wafa." 
Genesis5:6 Wahlala u‐Shete iminyaka yalikulu elinesihlanu, waza wamzala u‐Enoshe." 
Genesis5:7 Waye u‐Shete wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Enoshe, iminyaka yamakulu esibozo anesixe̔nxe, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis5:8 Yonke imihla ka‐Shete ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu alitoba aneshumi linamibini; wada wafa. 
Genesis5:9 Wahlala u‐Enoshe iminyaka yangamashumi alitoba, waza wamzala u‐Kenane." 
Genesis5:10 Waye u‐Enoshe wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Kenane, iminyaka yamakulu asibozo aneshumi linesihlanu, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis5:11 Yonke imihla ka‐Enoshe ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu alitoba anamihlanu wada wafa. 
Genesis5:12 Wahlala u‐Kenane iminyaka yangamashumi asixe̔nxe, waza wamzala u‐Mahalalele." 
Genesis5:13 Waye u‐Kenane wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Mahalalele, iminyaka yamakulu asibozo anamashumi mane, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis5:14 Yonke imihla ka‐Kenane ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu alitoba aneshumi linye; wada wafa. 
Genesis5:15 Wahlala u‐Mahalalele iminyaka yangamashumi matandatu anesihlanu, waza wamzala u‐Yeredi." 
Genesis5:16 Waye u‐Mahalalele wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Yeredi, iminyaka yamakulu asibozo anamashumi matatu, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis5:17 Yonke imihla ka‐Mahalalele ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu asibozo anamashumi alitoba anesihlanu; wada wafa. 
Genesis5:18 Wahlala u‐Yeredi iminyaka yalikulu elinamashumi matandatu anesibini, waza wamzala u‐Enoki." 
Genesis5:19 Waye u‐Yeredi wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Enoki, iminyaka yamakulu asibozo, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis5:20 Yonke imihla ka‐Yeredi ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu alitoba anamashumi matandatu anesibini; wada wafa. 
Genesis5:21 Wahlala u‐Enoki iminyaka yangamashumi matandatu anamihlanu, waza wamzala u‐Metushela." 
Genesis5:22 Waye u‐Enoki wahamba notixo, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Metushela, iminyaka yamakulu matatu, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis5:23 Yonke imihla ka‐Enoki ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu matatu anamashumi matandatu anamihlanu. 
Genesis5:24 Waye u‐Enoki wahamba notixo; wada akabi sabiko, ngokuba utixo emsusile." 
Genesis5:25 Wahlala u‐Metushela iminyaka yalikulu elinamashumi asibozo anesixe̔nxe, waza wamzala u‐Lameki." 
Genesis5:26 Waye u‐Metushela wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Lameki, iminyaka yamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi asibozo enamibini, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis5:27 Yonke imihla ka‐Metushela ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu alitoba anamashumi matandatu anesitoba; wada wafa. 
Genesis5:28 Wahlala u‐Lameki iminyaka yalikulu elinamashumi asibozo enesibini, waza wazala unyana," 
Genesis5:29 wamtiya igama elingu‐Nowa, esiti: Lo uya kusonwabisa pezu kwomsebenzi wetu, napezu kwomzamo wezandla zetu, ngenxa yomhlaba owawuqalekisayo uyehova." 
Genesis5:30 Waye u‐Lameki wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Nowa, iminyaka yamakulu mahlanu anamashumi alitoba enamihlanu, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis5:31 Yonke imihla ka‐Lameki ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi asixe̔nxe enesixe̔nxe; wada wafa. 
Genesis5:32 Kekaloku u‐Nowa ebeyiminyaka yamakulu mahlanu ubudala bake; waza u‐Nowa wazala u‐Sheme, u‐Hame, no‐Jafete." 
Genesis6:1 KWAYE kute, bakuba abantu sebeqalile ukwanda pezu kwomhlaba, nokuba babezalelwe intombi," 
Genesis6:2 bandula onyana bakatixo babona intombi zabantu ukuba zintle, bazizekela abafazi kuzo zonke abaziqashayo." 
Genesis6:3 Waza wati uyehova: U‐Moya wam akayi kumana epikisana nomntu ngonapakade, kwa sekubeni eyinyama yena; kodwa imihla yake yoba yiminyaka ibe likulu elinamashumi mabini." 
Genesis6:4 Yabiko imindondosholo emhlabeni ngezontsuku; nakanjako emveni kwoko, xeshekweni onyana bakatixo bangena kuzo intombi zabantu, zaza zazala abantwana kubo: abati bona baba ngamaṙoti abengawakudala, amadoda adumileyo." 
Genesis6:5 Waye utixo wabona ukuba inkohlakalo yabantu inkulu emhlabeni, nokuba konke ukucinga kwenkumbulo zentliziyo zabo kukohlakele kodwa imihla yonke." 
Genesis6:6 Waza wanosizi uyehova ukuba ebenzile umntu emhlabeni, kwaye kububuhlungu kuye entliziyweni yake." 
Genesis6:7 Wandula wati uyehova: Umntu, lowo endimdalileyo, ndiya kumcita ebusweni bomhlaba; kwa umntu, nenkomo, nesinambuzane, nentaka zezulu; ngokuba kulusizi kum ukuba ndizenzile." 
Genesis6:8 Kuloko u‐Nowa wafumana ufefe emehlweni kayehova. 
Genesis6:9 EZI zizizizukulwana zika‐Nowa. U‐Nowa ebeyindoda elungileyo, efezekile ezizukulwaneni zake: wahamba notixo u‐Nowa lowo." 
Genesis6:10 Wayezala u‐Nowa onyana babatatu, u‐Sheme, u‐Hame, no‐Jafete." 
Genesis6:11 Waube umhlaba wonakele ebusweni bukatixo; wabuzele umhlaba bubudlwengu. 
Genesis6:12 Waza utixo wakangela umhlaba; bona ke, wawonakele; ngokuba uluntu lonke lube lwonakalisile indlela yalo pezu kwomhlaba." 
Genesis6:13 Ngako wati utixo ku‐Nowa: Ukupela kwoluntu lonke kufikile pambi kwam; ngokuba umhlaba uzele bubudlwengu ngalo: kanjalo, bona ke, ndiya kulutshabalalisa kunye nomhlaba." 
Genesis6:14 Zenzele wena inqanawa ngemiti yego?-?iere; izindlu uya kuzenza enqanaweni, uze uyiqabe pakati nangapandle ngetywina." 
Genesis6:15 Kungokunje uya kuyenza: Zoba zikubite ezingamakulu matatu ubude benqanawa, n ekubite ezingamashumi mahlanu ububanzi bayo, nekubite ezingamashumi matatu ubupakamo bayo." 
Genesis6:16 Ifenstile uya kuyenzela inqanawa leyo: kungekubite inye uya kuyigqiba pezulu; nocango lwenqanawa uya kulubeka ecaleni layo; uya kuyenza ineyasezantsi, neyesibini, neyesitatu indawo." 
Genesis6:17 Ngokuba mna, bona ke, ndiza kwa mna ukuzisa umsingakazi wamanzi pezu kwomhlaba, kuze kutshatyalaliswe inyama yonke, ekukuyo umpefumlo wobomi, kwa pantsi kwezulu; konke okusemhlabeni kuya kububa." 
Genesis6:18 Ndiya kumisa kodwa ucebano lwam nawe; wauya kungena enqanaweni wena, nonyana bako, nomfazi wako, nabafazi bonyana bako kunye nawe." 
Genesis6:19 Nakuzo zonke izinto ezinokudliwa kwobomi, kwinyama yonke, uya kungenisa ngambini kuzo zonke intlobo, zize zipiliswe kuwe: yoba yinkunzi nemazi." 
Genesis6:20 Kwintaka ngemmilo yazo, nakwinkomo ngemmilo yazo, nakuzo zonke izinambuzane zomhlaba ngemmilo yazo, kwoba zimbini kuzo zonke ngezinye eziya kungena kuwe, ukuba kupiliswe." 
Genesis6:21 Uze wena uzitabatele kuko konke ukutya okutyiwayo, ukubutele kuwe; kwakuya kuba kukutya kuwe nakuzo." 
Genesis6:22 Wenje njalo u‐Nowa; njengoko konke abemyalele ngako Utixo, wenza kwa ngokunjalo." 
Genesis7:1 Wada wati uyehova ku‐Nowa: Ngena wena nayo yonke indlu yako enqanaweni; ngokuba wena ndikubonile ulungile ebusweni bam kwesisizukulwana. 
Genesis7:2 Kuzo zonke izilo ezicocekileyo wotabatela kuwe ngesixe̔nxe ngesixe̔nxe, inkunzi nemazi yayo; kodwa kuzo izilo ezingacocekileyo wotabata ngazibini, inkunzi nemazi yayo." 
Genesis7:3 Nakwintaka zezulu wotabata ngesixe̔nxe ngesixe̔nxe, inkunzi nemazi yayo; kuze kupiliswe inzalo ebusweni bomhlaba wonke." 
Genesis7:4 Ngokuba kusentsuku zisixe̔nxe, ndandiya kunisa imvula pezu kwomhlaba, imini zibe mashumi mane, nobusuku bube mashumi mane; nako konke okuhleliyo, endandikwenzile, ndiya kukucita ebusweni bomhlaba wonke." 
Genesis7:5 Waza u‐Nowa wenza njengoko konke abemyalele ngako uyehova. 
Genesis7:6 Kekaloku u‐Nowa ebeyiminyaka yamakulu matandatu ubudala bake, wakubako umsingakazi wamanzi pezu kwomhlaba." 
Genesis7:7 Wandula wangena u‐Nowa, nonyana bake, nomfazi wake, nabafazi bonyana bake kunye naye, enqanaweni, ngenxa yamanzi awo umsingakazi." 
Genesis7:8 Kwizilo ezicocekileyo, nakwizilo ezingezizo ezicocekileyo, nakuzo intaka nazo zonke izinto ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni," 
Genesis7:9 kwangenwa ngambini ngambini ukuza ku‐Nowa enqanaweni, inkunzi nemazi yayo, kwa njengokuba utixo ebemyalele u‐Nowa." 
Genesis7:10 Kwaza kwati, emveni kwezontsuku zisixe̔nxe, abako amanzi omsingakazi pezu kwomhlaba." 
Genesis7:11 NGOMNYAKA wamakulu matandatu wokudla ubomi kuka‐Nowa, ngenyanga yesibini, ngoweshumi linesixe̔nxe umhla wenyanga, kwa ngomhla lowo yonke imitombo yayo inzulu enkulu yanqikwa, nezituba zezulu zavuleka." 
Genesis7:12 Yaibe imvula ibako emhlabeni imini zamashumi mane nobusuku bamashumi mane. 
Genesis7:13 Ngokwa nguwo lomhla wangena u‐Nowa, no‐Sheme, no‐Hame, no‐Jafete, onyana baka‐Nowa, nomfazi ka‐Nowa, nabafazi bobatatu bonyana bake kunye nabo, enqanaweni:" 
Genesis7:14 kwa bona, nazo zonke izilo ngemmilo yazo, nazo zonke inkomo ngemmilo yazo, nazo zonke izinambuzane ezinambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba ngemmilo yazo, nazo zonke intaka ngemmilo yazo, zonke intakana zamapiko onke." 
Genesis7:15 Zaye zingena ku‐Nowa enqanaweni ngambini ngambini, kwinyama yonke ekukuyo umoya wobomi." 
Genesis7:16 Zati ezo ezazingena, zangena ziyinkunzi nemazi kuyo yonke inyama, njengokuba utixo ebemyalele. Waza uyehova wamvalela." 
Genesis7:17 Kekaloku umsingakazi wayimihla yamashumi mane pezu kwomhlaba; ati ke amanzi anda, afunqula inqanawa, yada yapakamela pezulu pezu kwomhlaba." 
Genesis7:18 Aza amanzi eyisa, anda nokwanda kakulu pezu kwomhlaba; yaye inqanawa ihamba ebusweni bamanzi." 
Genesis7:19 Ada akolisa amanzi ukweyisa kunene, zaza zagujungelwa zonke intaba ezinde ezipantsi kwezulu lonke." 
Genesis7:20 Amanzi eyisela ngapezulu ikubite zalishumi linantlanu; zaye zigujungelwa nentaba. 
Genesis7:21 Yabuba yonke inyama ebishukuma emhlabeni, eyentaka, eyenkomo, eyezilo, neyazo zonke izinambuzane ezinambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba; nabo bonke abantu:" 
Genesis7:22 konke okumpumlo zazinokupefumla kwomoya wobomi, kuko konke okube ku semhlabeni owomileyo, kwafa." 
Genesis7:23 Kwaye kucitwa konke okuhleliyo, oko kube kusebusweni bomhlaba, kwa abantu, nenkomo, nezinambuzane, nentaka zezulu; zacitwa emhlabeni: kwaye kusala u‐Nowa yedwa, nabo babenaye enqanaweni." 
Genesis7:24 Ati amanzi eyisa pezu kwomhlaba, imihla yalikulu elinamashumi mahlanu." 
Genesis8:1 Waye utixo wamkumbula u‐Nowa, nazo zonke izilo, nazo zonke inkomo, ezibe zinaye enqanaweni; wada utixo wenza umoya udlule pezu kwomhlaba, aza adamba amanzi." 
Genesis8:2 Kwaye kuvingcwa imitombo yenzulu, nezituba zezulu; yabambeka nemvula ivela ezulwini;" 
Genesis8:3 kanjalo amanzi ahlala ebuya emhlabeni: ada ati, ekupeleni kwemihla ilikulu elinamashumi mahlanu, ancipeka amanzi." 
Genesis8:4 Yaza yapumla inqanawa, ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe, ngoweshumi linesixe̔nxe umhla wenyanga, pezu kwentaba zase‐Ararate." 
Genesis8:5 Ati amanzi amana ukuncipeka yada yayinyanga yeshumi: ngeyeshumi inyanga, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, zabonakala intloko zentaba." 
Genesis8:6 Kwaye kute, emveni kwemihla imashumi mane, wavula u‐Nowa ifenstile yenqanawa abeyenzile;" 
Genesis8:7 wakupa unomyai, owapuma yena wahlala ebuyabuya, ada atsha amanzi pezu kwomhlaba." 
Genesis8:8 Wati kanjalo wakupa ihobe lisuke kuye, kuze kubonwe ukuba amanzi apungulekile na ebusweni bomhlaba:" 
Genesis8:9 kanti ihobe belingenakufumanela umzantsi wenqina lalo ukupumla; laza labuyela kuye enqanaweni; ngokuba amanzi ebesebusweni bawo wonke umhlaba: wandula ukwolula isandla sake, walitabata, walingenisa kuye enqanaweni." 
Genesis8:10 Waye esalinda eminye imihla yasixe̔nxe; waza wapinda ukulikupa ihobe enqanaweni. 
Genesis8:11 Labuya ihobe leza kuye ngexesha lokuhlwa; kekaloku, nali emlonyeni walo igqabi lomnquma likiwe: wandula ukwazi u‐Nowa ukuba amanzi seepungulekile emhlabeni." 
Genesis8:12 Waye esalinda eminye imihla yasixe̔nxe; waza walikupa ihobe, elati lona alapinda ukubuyela kuye kanjako." 
Genesis8:13 KWAYE kute, ngomnyaka wamakulu matandatu anamnye, ngeyokuqala inyanga, kwa ngowokuqala umhla walonyanga, amanzi abomisiwe emhlabeni: waza u‐Nowa wasusa isigubungelo senqanawa, wakangela; kekaloku bona ke, umhlaba wawomile ubuso bawo." 
Genesis8:14 Nangenyanga yesibini, ngowamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe umhla wenyanga, wause utshile umhlaba." 
Genesis8:15 Waza wateta utixo ku‐Nowa, esiti:" 
Genesis8:16 Puma enqanaweni, wena, nomfazi wako, nonyana bako, nabafazi bonyana bako kunye nawe." 
Genesis8:17 Zonke izilo ezikuwe, ezenyama yonke, intaka, nenkomo, nazo zonke izinambuzane ezinambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba, zipumise kunye nawe; ukuze zikolise ukuzala emhlabeni, zicume, zande nokwanda pezu kwomhlaba." 
Genesis8:18 Waza wapuma u‐Nowa, nonyana bake, nomfazi wake, nabafazi bonyana bake kunye naye." 
Genesis8:19 Zonke izilo, zonke izinambuzane, nazo zonke intaka, zonke izinto ezishukumayo pezu kwomhlaba, ngentlobo zazo, zapuma enqanaweni." 
Genesis8:20 Wandula waka u‐Nowa isibingelo kuyehova: wayetabata kuzo zonke inkomo ezicocekileyo, nakuzo zonke intaka ezicocekileyo, wanikela amadini okutshiswa pezu kwesibingelo eso." 
Genesis8:21 Waye uyehova wasezela ivumba elimnandi: wandul’ ukuti uyehova entliziyweni yake: Andiyi kupinda ukuwuqalekisa kanjako umhlaba ngenxa yabantu, nangona ukucinga kwentliziyo yomntu kukohlakele kwa sebutsheni bake; ndandingayi kupinda ndibuye ndikubete konke okupilileyo, njengokuba ndenje njalo." 
Genesis8:22 Kwa yonke imihla useko ngayo umhlaba, akusayi kupela ixesha lokuhlwayela nelokuvuna, nengqele nobushushu, nehlobo nobusika, nemini nobusuku." 
Genesis9:1 Waye utixo etamsanqela u‐Nowa nonyana bake, wati kubo: Cumani, nande, nizalise umhlaba." 
Genesis9:2 Nokwoyikwa kwenu, nokunkwantywa kwenu, makube pezu kwazo zonke izilo zomhlaba, napezu kwazo zonke intaka zezulu; kuzo zonke izinto ezishukumayo emhlabeni, nakuzo zonke intlanzi zolwandle: sezinikelwe esandleni senu." 
Genesis9:3 Konke okushukumayo, oko kunokudliwa kwobomi, kwoba kukutya kuni; kwa njengomfuno oluhlaza ndinipile konke." 
Genesis9:4 Kodwa inyama isenabo ubomi bayo, oko kukuti, igazi layo, ningatyi yona." 
Genesis9:5 Ngokuba ngenyaniso igazi lenu, e lobomi benu, ndiya kulibuza; kwa sesandleni sezilo zonke ndiya kulibuza; nasesandleni sabantu, esandleni sabazalwana babo abanye ngabanye, ndiya kubuza ubomi babantu." 
Genesis9:6 Opalaza igazi labantu, elake igazi liya kupalazwa ngabantu; ngokuba bekungomfanekiso katixo wenzayo abantu." 
Genesis9:7 Kodwa nina, cumani, nande; kolisani ukuzala emhlabeni, nande kuwo." 
Genesis9:8 Wabuya wateta utixo ku‐Nowa, nakonyana bake kunye naye, esiti:" 
Genesis9:9 Mna, bona ke, ndiyamisa ucebano lwam kunye nani, nakunye nenzalo yenu emva kwenu;" 
Genesis9:10 kwa kunye nazo zonke izinto ezipilileyo ezikuni, intaka, nenkomo, nazo zonke izilo zomhlaba kunye nani; kuzo zonke ezipumileyo enqanaweni, kude kube kuzo zonke izilo zomhlaba." 
Genesis9:11 Ndandiya kumisa ucebano lwam nani, okokuba akusayi kunqanyulwa inyama yonke kanjako ngamanzi omsingakazi; nokuba akusayi kubuya kubeko umsingakazi wokutshabalalisa umhlaba." 
Genesis9:12 Wayesiti utixo: Lo ngumqondiso wocebano olo ndilwenzayo pakati kwam nani, nazo zonke izinto ezipilileyo ezikuni, kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana kude kube ngunapakade:" 
Genesis9:13 Umnyama wam ndiwubekile elifini; wona woba ngumqondiso wocebano pakati kwam nomhlaba. 
Genesis9:14 Kwakuya kuti, ndakulenza ilifu lisibekelele umhlaba, uze umnyama lowo ubonakale elifini;" 
Genesis9:15 ndiya kwandula ndikumbule ucebano lwam, olupakati kwam nani, nazo zonke izinto ezipilileyo, ezenyama yonke; ati amanzi angabuyi abe ngumsingakazi wokutshabalalisa umhlaba." 
Genesis9:16 Nxa lomnyama uya kubako elifini, ndiya kwandula ndikangele pezu kwawo, ukuba ndikumbule ucebano olungunapakade pakati kwake utixo nazo zonke izinto ezipilileyo, ezenyama yonke esemhlabeni." 
Genesis9:17 Waza utixo wati ku‐Nowa: Lo ngumqondiso wocebano endilumisileyo pakati kwam nayo yonke inyama esemhlabeni. 
Genesis9:18 KEKALOKU onyana baka‐Nowa, abo babepumile enqanaweni, bebengu‐Sheme, no‐Hame, no‐Jafete: waye u‐Hame enguyise ka‐Kanane." 
Genesis9:19 Aba batatu bebengonyana baka‐Nowa; ekungabo utelwe sa umhlaba wonke. 
Genesis9:20 Waza u‐Nowa waqala ukuba ngumlimi womhlaba, watyala isitiya semiti yeveyine." 
Genesis9:21 Wayesela kuyo iveyine, ude wanxila; waye ehlubulukile pakati kwentente yake." 
Genesis9:22 Waza u‐Hame, uyise ka‐Kanane, wabona ubuzé boyise, waya waxelela abakuluwe bake bobabini ngapandle." 
Genesis9:23 Bandula u‐Sheme no‐Jafete batabata ingubo, bayibeka emagxalabeni abo bobabini, baya ngomva, bagubungela ubuze boyise wabo; ubuso babo bebujika ngomva, baze bangaboni ubuzé boyise wabo." 
Genesis9:24 Ude wavuka u‐Nowa kokweveyine yake, wayesazi oko abekwenzile kuye unyana wake omncinane." 
Genesis9:25 Waza wati: Makaqalekiswe u‐Kanane; abe sisicaka sezicaka kubakuluwe bake. 
Genesis9:26 Wati kanjalo: Makabongwe uyehova, utixo ka‐Sheme; abe u‐Kanane esisicaka kuye." 
Genesis9:27 Utixo makandise u‐Jafete, aze ahlale ezintenteni zika‐Sheme; ati u‐Kanane abe sisicaka kuye." 
Genesis9:28 Waye u‐Nowa wahlala emveni kwomsingakazi iminyaka yamakulu matatu anamashumi mahlanu. 
Genesis9:29 Yonke imihla ka‐Nowa ibiyiminyaka ingamakulu alitoba anamashumi mahlanu; wada wafa. 
Genesis10:1 NAZI izizukulwana zabo onyana baka‐Nowa, u‐Sheme, u‐Hame, no‐Jafete: baye bona bezalelwe onyana emveni kwomsingakazi." 
Genesis10:2 Onyana baka‐Jafete: ngu‐Gomere, no‐Magoge, no‐Madai, no‐Javane, no‐Tubali, no‐Mesheki, no‐Tirase." 
Genesis10:3 Nonyana baka‐Gomere: ngu‐Shekenaze, no‐Rifate, no‐Togama." 
Genesis10:4 Nonyana baka‐Javane: ngu‐Elishai, no‐Tareshishe; ngama‐Kiti, nama‐Dodani." 
Genesis10:5 Bekungabo aba zahlulwayo iziqiti zentlanga emazweni azo; ezinye ngezinye ngokuteta kwazo, ngezizalwane zazo, ezizweni zazo." 
Genesis10:6 Nabo onyana baka‐Hame: ngu‐Kushe, no‐Mitsarime no‐Pute, no‐Kanane." 
Genesis10:7 Nonyana baka‐Kushe: ngu‐Seba, no‐Havila, no‐Sabeta, no‐Rahama no‐Sabeteka. Nonyana baka‐Rahama: ngu‐Sheba, no‐Dedane." 
Genesis10:8 Kekaloku u‐Kushe wazala u‐Nimrode; owaqala ukuba liṙoti emhlabeni. 
Genesis10:9 Yena wabeliṙoti ekuzingeleni pambi kwoyehova; kwakutshiwo ngoko ukuti: Njengaye u‐Nimrode oliṙoti ekuzingeleni pambi kwoyehova. 
Genesis10:10 Ukuqala kwobukumkani bake bekuyi‐Babele, ne‐Ereki, ne‐Akade, ne‐Kalene, elizweni le‐Shinare." 
Genesis10:11 Wapuma kwelozwe waya e‐Asiriya, waka i‐Nineve, ne‐Rehobote‐hire, ne‐Kalai," 
Genesis10:12 ne‐Resene, pakati kwe‐Nineve ne‐Kalai: esisixeko esikulu yona." 
Genesis10:13 Wati u‐Mitsarime wazala ama‐Ludi, nama‐Hanami, nama‐Lehabi, nama‐Nafetuhi," 
Genesis10:14 nama‐Faterusi, nama‐Kaseluhi, (ekwavela kona ama‐Filistiya,) nama‐Kafetori." 
Genesis10:15 No‐Kanane wazala u‐Tsidone unyana wake wamazibulo, no‐Hete;" 
Genesis10:16 kwa nom‐Yebusi, nom‐Amori, nom‐Giregashe," 
Genesis10:17 nom‐Hivi, nom‐Araki, nom‐Sini," 
Genesis10:18 nom‐Aravadi, nom‐Tsemari, nom‐Hamati: kwabekute kamva, zatiwa sa izizalwane zaba‐Kanane." 
Genesis10:19 Kekaloku umda waba‐Kanane ubuvela e‐Tsidone, njengokuba kuyiwa e‐Gerari, kude kube se‐Gaza; njengokuba kuyiwa e‐Sodome, nase‐Gomora, nase‐Adema, nase‐Tseboyime, kude kube se‐Lasha." 
Genesis10:20 Aba bangabo onyana baka‐Hame, ngezizalwane zabo na ngenteto zabo, emazweni abo na sezizweni zabo." 
Genesis10:21 Waye u‐Sheme wazalelwa onyana naye, okwa nguyise walo lonke usapo luka‐Hebere, engumninawe ka‐Jafete omkulu." 
Genesis10:22 Onyana baka‐Sheme: ngu‐Helami, no‐Ashure, no‐Rafatsade, no‐Lude, no‐Arame." 
Genesis10:23 Nonyana baka‐Arame: ngu‐Hutse, no‐Hule, no‐Getere, no‐Mashe." 
Genesis10:24 Wati u‐Rafatsade wazala u‐Sala, no‐Sala wazala u‐Hebere." 
Genesis10:25 No‐Hebere kwamzalelwa onyana bababini: igama lomnye lalingu‐Pelege, ngokuba bekusemihleni yake umhlaba wahlulwa; negama lomkuluwe wake lalingu‐Yoketane." 
Genesis10:26 Waye u‐Yoketane wazala u‐Lamodade, no‐Shelefe, no‐Hatsamavete, no‐Jera," 
Genesis10:27 no‐Hadorame, no‐Yuzale, no‐Dikala," 
Genesis10:28 no‐Hobali, no‐Abimale, no‐Sheba," 
Genesis10:29 no‐Ofire, no‐Havila, no‐Jobabe: bonke aba bangonyana baka‐Yoketane." 
Genesis10:29 no‐Ofire, no‐Havila, no‐Jobabe: bonke aba bangonyana baka‐Yoketane." 
Genesis10:30 Ukuhlala kwabo bekuvela e‐Mesha, njengokuba kuyiwa e‐Sefara, intaba yangasempumalanga." 
Genesis10:31 Aba bangonyana baka‐Sheme, ngezizalwane zabo na ngenteto zabo, emazweni abo, na ngezizwe zabo." 
Genesis10:32 Ezi ke zizizizalwane zabo onyana baka‐Nowa, ngezizukulwana zabo, ezizweni zabo: kwa ngabo aba zazisahlulwa izizwe pezu kwomhlaba emveni kwawo umsingakazi." 
Genesis11:1 KEKALOKU wonke umhlaba waunomlomo mnye nenteto nye. 
Genesis11:2 Kwaye kute, nxa babehamba ngasempumalanga, bafumana itafa ezweni le‐Shinare; baza bahlala kona." 
Genesis11:3 Bada bati omnye kwomnye: Yizani, senze izitene, sikolise ukuzigqwagqwa. Babenezitene endaweni yamatye, babenodaka endaweni yekalike." 
Genesis11:4 Baye besiti: Yizani, sizakele isixeko, kwa nenqaba engcopo ibe sezulwini; size sizenzele igama, hlezibe sipangalaliswe ebusweni bawo wonke umhlaba." 
Genesis11:5 Waza uyehova wehla ukuza kubona isixeko nenqaba, ababezaka onyana babantu." 
Genesis11:6 Wayesiti uyehova: Bona ke, abantu banye, banomlomo mnye bonke kanjalo; kukuqala kwokwenza kwabo oku; kaloku akuko nto eya kunqandeka kubo, abaqingileyo ukuyenza." 
Genesis11:7 Yizani, kesihle, sibidabide kona apo inteto yabo, ukuze bangevani omnye ukuteta kwomnye." 
Genesis11:8 Waza uyehova wabati sa kwa lapo ebusweni bawo wonke umhlaba; bandula bayeka ukwaka isixeko eso. 
Genesis11:9 Ngako oko besibizwa ngegama eliyi‐Babele; ngokuba bekukona uyehova wabidabida inteto yomhlaba wonke: kwakukona kanjalo wabati sa uyehova ebusweni bawo wonke umhlaba. 
Genesis11:10 EZI zizizizukulwana zika‐Sheme: u‐Sheme ebeyiminyaka yalikulu ubudala bake, waza wazala u‐Rafatsade, yaminyaka mibini emveni kwawo umsingakazi." 
Genesis11:11 Waye u‐Sheme wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Rafatsade, iminyaka yamakulu mahlanu, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis11:12 Wahlala u‐Rafatsade iminyaka yamashumi matatu anamihlanu, waza wazala u‐Sala." 
Genesis11:13 Waye u‐Rafatsade wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Sala, iminyaka yamakulu mane anamitatu, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis11:14 Wahlala u‐Sala iminyaka yamashumi matatu, waza wazala u‐Hebere." 
Genesis11:15 Waye u‐Sala wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Hebere, iminyaka yamakulu mane anamitatu, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis11:16 Wahlala u‐Hebere iminyaka yamashumi matatu anamine, waza wazala u‐Pelege." 
Genesis11:17 Waye u‐Hebere wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Pelege, iminyaka yamakulu mane anamashumi matatu, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis11:18 Wahlala u‐Pelege iminyaka yamashumi matatu, waza wazala u‐Rehu." 
Genesis11:19 Waye u‐Pelege wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Rehu, iminyaka yamakulu mabini anesitoba, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis11:20 Wahlala u‐Rehu iminyaka yamashumi matatu anesibini, waza wazala u‐Seruge." 
Genesis11:21 Waye u‐Rehu wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Seruge, iminyaka yamakulu mabini anesixe̔nxe, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis11:22 Wahlala u‐Seruge iminyaka yamashumi matatu, waza wazala u‐Nahore." 
Genesis11:23 Waye u‐Seruge wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Nahore, iminyaka yamakulu mabini, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis11:24 Wahlala u‐Nahore iminyaka yamashumi mabini anesitoba, waza wazala u‐Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Waye u‐Nahore wahlala, emveni kwokuzala kwake u‐Tera, iminyaka yalikulu linye elineshumi linesitoba, wazala onyana nentombi." 
Genesis11:26 Wahlala u‐Tera iminyaka yamashumi asixe̔nxe, waza wazala u‐Abrame, u‐Nahore, no‐Harane." 
Genesis11:27 Zizo ezi izizukulwana zika‐Tera: u‐Tera wazala u‐Abrame, u‐Nahore, no‐Harane; wati u‐Harane wazala u‐Lote." 
Genesis11:28 Waye u‐Harane wafa ebusweni buka‐Tera uyise, ezweni lokuzalwa kwake, e‐Ure yasema‐Kaledineni." 
Genesis11:29 Bati u‐Abrame no‐Nahore bazeka abafazi: igama lomfazi ka‐Abrame ngu‐Sarai: negama lomfazi ka‐Nahore ngu‐Mileka, intombi ka‐Harane, uyise ka‐Mileka, noyise ka‐Yisika." 
Genesis11:30 Waye u‐Sarai eludlolo, engabanga namntwana." 
Genesis11:31 Kekaloku u‐Tera watabata u‐Abrame unyana wake, no‐Lote unyana ka‐Harane, unyana wonyana wake, no‐Sarai umolokazana wake, umfazi ka‐Abrame unyana wake, abati bapuma nabo e‐Ure yasema‐Kaledineni, ukuya elizweni le‐Kanane; baza bafika e‐Karane, bahlala kona." 
Genesis11:32 Yaye imihla ka‐Tera iyiminyaka engamakulu mabini anamihlanu; wada wafa u‐Tera e‐Karane. 
Genesis12:1 KEKALOKU uyehova ebetshilo ku‐Abrame ukuti: Hamba, umke elizweni lakowenu, nasesalamaneni sako, nasendlwini kayihlo, uye elizweni endiya kukubonisa lona." 
Genesis12:2 Ndaye ndiya kukwenza ube sisizwe esikulu, ndikutamsanqele, ndilenze likulu igama lako; uze ube litamsanqa ke." 
Genesis12:3 Ndandiya kutamsanqela abo abatamsanqela wena, nalowo okuqalekisayo ndiya kuqalekisa yena; kanjalo ziya kutanyusanqelwa ngawe zonke izizalwane zomhlaba." 
Genesis12:4 Waza wemka u‐Abrame, njengokuba ebetetile kuye uyehova; wahamba naye no‐Lote: waeyiminyaka engamashumi asixe̔nxe anamihlanu u‐Abrame ubudala bake, akupuma e‐Karane." 
Genesis12:5 Waye u‐Abrame watabata u‐Sarai umfazi wake, no‐Lote unyana womkuluwe wake, nayo yonke impahla yabo ababeqwebe yona, nemipefumlo ababeyizuzile e‐Karane; baza bapuma ukuya elizweni le‐Kanane; bada batika elizweni le‐Kanane." 
Genesis12:6 Waye u‐Abrame wacanda kwelozwe kwada kwakuyo indawo ye‐Shekeme, kuyo iyeke ka‐More. Babeko aba‐Kanane oko elizweni elo." 
Genesis12:7 Waza uyehova wabonakala ku‐Abrame, wati: Kwinzalo yako ndiya kunika elilizwe. Wandu ukwakela kona isibingelo kuyehova, obebonakele kuye." 
Genesis12:8 Wafuduka kona waya entabeni engasempumalanga ye‐Betele, wamisa intente yake, i‐Betele ingasentshonalanga, ne‐Hahai ingasempumalanga: wayesaka nakona isibingelo kuyehova, wabiza egameni likayehova." 
Genesis12:9 Wasuka u‐Abrame wahamba, esahambela ngasesuyide." 
Genesis12:10 Kwaye bekuko indlala kwelozwe: waza wehla u‐Abrame ukuya e‐Jipete, aze ahlale mzuzu kona; ngokuba indlala ibinzima kwelozwe." 
Genesis12:11 Kwabekute, xeshekweni asondela ukungena e‐Jipete, wandula wati ku‐Sarai umfazi wake: Kekaloku bona ke, ndiyazi ukuba ungumfazi okubonakala kuhle." 
Genesis12:12 Kwoti ke ngoko, akuba ekubona ama‐Jipete, aya kuti: Ngumfazi wake lo; aze andibulale mna, kodwa wena akulondoloze uhleli." 
Genesis12:13 Yiti ke ngoko, ungudade wam; ukuze kulunge kum ngenxa yako, uti umpefumlo wam udle ubomi ngetuba lako." 
Genesis12:14 Kwaza kwati, akuba efikile u‐Abrame e‐Jipete, abona ama‐Jipete lomfazi ukuba ugqitisile ngokuba mhle." 
Genesis12:15 Zaye zimbona nenkosana zika‐Faro, zamncoma ebusweni buka‐Faro; waza wasiwa umfazi lowo endlwini ka‐Faro." 
Genesis12:16 Owenza ngokulungileyo ku‐Abrame ngenxa yake; ude wanazo izimvu, nenkabi, namaqwaṙashe, nezicaka, nezicakakazi, namaqwaṙashekazi, nenkamela." 
Genesis12:17 Kanti uyehova wabeta u‐Faro ngezibeto ezikulu, kwa nendlu yake, ngendawo ka‐Sarai umfazi ka‐Abrame." 
Genesis12:18 Waza u‐Faro wambiza u‐Abrame, wati: Yinina lento uyenzileyo kum? kunganina ukuba ubungandixeleli okokuba ungumfazi wako?" 
Genesis12:19 Wautsholo nina ukuti: Ungudade wam? bendingaba ndimzekile nje abe ngumfazi wam: kodwa kaloku, nanku umfazi wako; m tabate, uhambe ke." 
Genesis12:20 Waye u‐Faro wayalela amadoda ake ngaye, aza amndulula yena, nomfazi wake, nako konke abenako." 
Genesis13:1 WAZA u‐Abrame wenyuka e‐Jipete, yena, nomfazi wake, nako konke abenako, enaye no‐Lote, ukuya ngasesuyide." 
Genesis13:2 Wayetyebile kakulu u‐Abrame lowo, ngenkomo, na ngesilivere, nangegolide." 
Genesis13:3 Wahamba ngemfuduko zake, esuka esuyide, esiya kude kwase‐Betele, kuleyondawo apo yabiko intente yake kona ekuqaleni, pakati kwe‐Betele ne‐Hahai;" 
Genesis13:4 kwa sendaweni yesibingelo, eso wasenzela kona ngapambili; waye u‐Abrame wabiza apo egameni likayehova." 
Genesis13:5 No‐Lote, lo obehamba no‐Abrame, waenazo izimvu, nenkomo, nentente, naye." 
Genesis13:6 Kekaloku elozwe lalingenako ukubatwala, kuze kuhlalelwane ndawonye; ngokuba imfuyo yabo ibinkulu, kude bakohlwe kukuhlala ndawonye." 
Genesis13:7 Kwaye kusuka ipike pakati kwabalusi benkomo zika‐Abrame nabalusi benkomo zika‐Lote. Bahlala aba‐Kanane nama‐Perizi kwelozwe oko. 
Genesis13:8 Waza wati u‐Abrame ku‐Lote: Makekungabiko impikisano pakati kwam nawe, napakati kwabalusi bam nabalusi bako; ngokuba singabazalwana tina." 
Genesis13:9 Asi lilo ilizwe lonke elipambi kwako na? uze wahlukane nam: ukuba uya ngasekohlo, ndojikela ngasekunene; ukuba kanti uya ngasekunene, ndojikela ngasekohlo." 
Genesis13:10 Waza u‐Lote wapakamisa amehlo ake, wabona lonke itafa lase‐Yoredane, ukuba lilizwe elikolisa ukucenceshwa indawo zonke; elalite, engekatshabalalisi uyehova i‐Sodome ne‐Gomora, la njengomyezo kayehova, na njengelizwe le‐Jipete, kude kwaziwa e‐Tsohare." 
Genesis13:11 Wandula u‐Lote waziqashela lonke itafa lase‐Yoredane; wasuka u‐Lote wahambela ngasempumalanga: baza bahluka omnye kwomnye. 
Genesis13:12 Wahlala u‐Abrame elizweni le‐Kanane; wati u‐Lote wahlala ezixekweni zasetafeni, wamisa intente ngase‐Sodome." 
Genesis13:13 Kodwa abantu base‐Sodome bebengabakohlakeleyo, abagqitisa ukwona ngapambi kwake uyehova." 
Genesis13:14 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Abrame, emveni kwokuba u‐Lote ube wahlukene naye: Zuwapakamise amehlo ako, ukangele kwa kulondawo apo ukona, ngasenode, nangasesuyide, nangasempumalanga, nangasentshonalanga:" 
Genesis13:15 ngokuba lonke ilizwe ulibonayo, ndiya kulinika kuwe, nakwinzalo yako, kude kube ngunapakade." 
Genesis13:16 Ndandiya kuyenza inzalo yako njengotuli lwomhlaba; kwoda kuti, nxa angabala umntu utuli lwomhlaba, kwandule ukubalwa nenzalo yako." 
Genesis13:17 Suka, ucande ilizwe ebudeni balo nasebubanzini balo; ngokuba ndiya kukupa lona." 
Genesis13:18 Waza wafudusa intente u‐Abrame, weza wahlala ngasesiyekeni sika‐Mamre, esikufupi ne‐Hebrone, wakela kona isibingelo kuyehova." 
Genesis14:1 KWAYE kute emihleni ka‐Amrafele ukumkani we‐Shinare, n o‐Ariyoke ukumkani we‐Elasare, n o‐Fedorelahomere ukumkani we‐Helami, n o‐Tidali ukumkani wezizwe;" 
Genesis14:2 benza imfazwe bona ngakuye u‐Bera ukumkani we‐Sodome, nangakuye u‐Biresha ukumkani we‐Gomora, n o‐Shinabe ukumkani we‐Adema, no‐Shemebere ukumkani we‐Tseboyime, nokumkani we‐Bela, ekwa yiyo i‐Tsohare." 
Genesis14:3 Bonke aba bahlanganisana emhlanjeni we‐Sidime, olulo ulwandle olutyuwa." 
Genesis14:4 Babekonzile ku‐Kedorelahomere iminyaka yalishumi linamibini; kodwa ngoweshumi linesitatu umnyaka bavukela ngakuye. 
Genesis14:5 Kwaza kwati, ngomnyaka weshumi elinesine, weza u‐Kedorelahomere, kwa nokumkani ababenaye, babeta ama‐Rafa e‐Hashetarote‐kanayime, nama‐Zuzi e‐Hame, nama‐Eyime e‐Shave‐kiriyatayime," 
Genesis14:6 nama‐Hori entabeni yawo ye‐Sehire, kwada kwase‐Eliparane, engasentlango." 
Genesis14:7 Bandula babuya, beza kutika e‐Hene‐mishepati, ekwa yiyo i‐Kadeshe, babeta lonke ilizwe lama‐Amaleki, kwa naba‐Amori, abo bahlala e‐Hatsetsone‐tamare." 
Genesis14:8 Kwaza kwapuma ukumkani we‐Sodome, nokumkani we‐Gomora, nokumkani we‐Adema, nokumkani we‐Tseboyime, nokumkani we‐Bela, ekwa yiyo i‐Tsohare: baye belungisa ukulwa nabo emhlanjeni we‐Sidime;" 
Genesis14:9 kwa naye u‐Kedorelahomere ukumkani we‐Helami, no‐Tidali ukumkani wezizwe, no‐Amrafele ukumkani we‐Shinare, no‐Ariyoke ukumkani we‐Elasare; okumkani abahlanu besilwa nabane." 
Genesis14:10 Kekaloku umhlambo we‐Sidime ubuneminxuma ngeminxuma yodaka: kwesaba ukumkani we‐Sodome nowe‐Gomora, benzakala kona: bati abaseleyo besabela entabeni." 
Genesis14:11 Baza basusa yonke impahla yase‐Sodome ne‐Gomora, nako konke ukutya kwabo, bemka ke." 
Genesis14:12 Bamsusa no‐Lote, unyana womkuluwe ka‐Abrame, nempahla yake, baza bemka: ngokuba ebehlala yena e‐Sodome." 
Genesis14:13 Waza wafika osindileyo, washumayela ku‐Abrame um‐Hebere; ngokuba ebemi yena ngasesiyekeni sika‐Mamre um‐Amori, umkuluwe ka‐Shekole, nomkuluwe ka‐Hanere; aba bebengabatelelani baka‐Abrame." 
Genesis14:14 Wati akuba evile u‐Abrame okokuba umzalwana wake utinjiwe, wapuma n ezicaka zake eziqelisiweyo, zizelwe endlwini yake, zingamakulu matatu aneshumi linesibozo, wabaputuma kude kwase‐Dane." 
Genesis14:15 Waza wahlukahluka ngakubo ngobusuku, yena nezicaka zake, wababeta; waye ebaputuma kwada kwase‐Hoba, engasekohlo kwe‐Damakusi." 
Genesis14:16 Wabuyisa yonke impahla, no‐Lote umzalwana wake wambuyisa naye, nempahla yake, kwa nabafazi, nabantu." 
Genesis14:17 Wandula wapuma ukumkani we‐Sodome ukuya kumkaulela, emveni kwokubuya kwake ekubetweni kuka‐Kedorelahomere, nokwokumkani ababenaye, emhlanjeni we‐Shave, okwa nguwo umhlambo wokumkani." 
Genesis14:18 Wati no‐Makizedeki, ukumkani we‐Saleme, wapuma nesonka neveyine; waye yena ebengumperisite katixo opezu konke." 
Genesis14:19 Waza wamtamsanqela, wati: Makatanyusanqelwe u‐Abrame ngutixo opezu konke, ofuya izulu nomhlaba!" 
Genesis14:20 Makabongwe notixo opezu konke, oyekelele intshaba zako esandleni sako! Waza wamnika isishumi sako konke." 
Genesis14:21 Wayesiti ukumkani we‐Sodome kuye u‐Abrame: Ndinike mna iziqu, uze wena uzitabatele impahla." 
Genesis14:22 Wati kodwa u‐Abrame kukumkani we‐Sodome: Isandla sam ndisipakamisele kuyehova, kutixo opezu konke, ofuya izulu nomhlaba," 
Genesis14:23 okokuba andiyi kutabata kwa kulo usinga kude kube liṙwintsela lesihlangu, nokuba andiyi kutabata nanye into eyeyako, ukuze ungatsho ukuti: Ndim owamtyebisayo u‐Abrame." 
Genesis14:24 Okwam, makube koko bakutyileyo abafana kupela, nesahlulelwa salamadoda abehamba nam, u‐Hanere, u‐Shekole, no‐Mamre; mabatabate bona isahlulelwa sabo." 
Genesis15:1 EMVENI kwezizinto leza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Abrame ngomboniso, lisiti: Ungoyiki, Abrame! ndilikaka kuwe mna, ndingumvuzo wako omkulu kunene." 
Genesis15:2 Wati u‐Abrame: Nkosi, Yehova! yinto nina woyinika kum, ndihamba ndingenamntwana nje, negosa lendlu yam lingulom‐Damakusi u‐Eliyezeri?" 
Genesis15:3 Wayesiti u‐Abrame: Bona ke, mna akundinikanga nzalo; kanjalo, nanku ozelweyo endlwini yam eyindlalifa yam." 
Genesis15:4 Kekaloku bona ke, ilizwi likayehova leza kuye, lisiti: Asi nguye lo oya kuba yindlalifa yako; koko lowo oya kupuma kwawako amatumbu, nguye oya kuba yindlalifa yako." 
Genesis15:5 Waza wampumisela ngapandle, wati: Zubeke ngasezulwini, uzibale inkwenkwezi, ukuba ungabala zona; wayesiti kuye: Yoba njalo inzalo yako." 
Genesis15:6 Wandula wakolwa nguyehova; owambalela kona kube kukulunga. 
Genesis15:7 Wayesiti kuye: Mna ndi nguyehova owakuku̔payo e‐Ure yasema‐Kaledineni, ukuba ndikunike elilizwe, ukuze ulidle ilifa lalo." 
Genesis15:8 Waza wati: Nkosi, Tixo! sendiya kukwazi nganto nina okokuba ndiya kulidla ilifa lalo?" 
Genesis15:9 Wati kuye: Nditabatele itokazi eliminyaka mitatu, nemazi yebokwe eminyaka mitatu, nenkunzi yegusha eminyaka mitatu, nehobe, netole lezuba." 
Genesis15:10 Waza wazitabatela zonke ezi, wazicanda pakati, wazibeka iziqendu zilungelelene esinye nesinye; kodwa intakana akazicandanga." 
Genesis15:11 Zati zakuhlika intakakazi pezu kwazo izidumbu, wandula u‐Abrame wazisantsulisa." 
Genesis15:12 Kwaye kute, lakuza kutshona ilanga, u‐Abrame wawelwa bubutongo obunzima; kekaloku bona ke, isoyikiso sobumnyama obukulu sawa pezu kwake." 
Genesis15:13 Wayesiti ku‐Abrame: Yazi kunene ukuba inzalo yako yoba ngabasemzini elizweni elingelelayo, — yobakonza, bati bona bayibandezele, — iminyaka ibe ngamakulu mane." 
Genesis15:14 Kananjalo esosizwe iya kukonza kuso, ndiya kusigweba; yoti kamva ipume nendyebo enkulu." 
Genesis15:15 Kanti wena uya kuya koyihlo bako ngoxolo; woncw̔atywa ebudaleni obukolisileyo. 
Genesis15:16 Nesizukulwana sesine, bona bobuya beze apa; ngokuba ukukohlakala kwaba‐Amori akukazaliseki ngoku." 
Genesis15:17 Kwaza kwati, lakuba lise litshonile ilanga, kuse kumnyama nje, nasi isidlangalala esiqumayo nesibane somlilo, esidlula pakati kweziqendu ezo." 
Genesis15:18 Ngokwa ngumhla lowo wenza uyehova ucebano no‐Abrame, esiti: Kwinzalo yako ndilipile ilizwe eli, kwa kuwo umlambo wase‐Jipete kude kwakuwo umlambo omkulu, umlambo ongum‐Ferate:" 
Genesis15:19 ama‐Keni, nama‐Kenizi, nama‐Kademoni," 
Genesis15:20 nama‐Hete, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Rafa," 
Genesis15:21 naba‐Amori, naba‐Kanane, nama‐Giregashe, nama‐Yebusi." 
Genesis16:1 KEKALOKU u‐Sarai, umfazi ka‐Abrame, akamzalelanga abantwana: waenekobokakazi, um‐Jipetekazi, eligama lingu‐Hagare." 
Genesis16:2 Wayesiti u‐Sarai ku‐Abrame: Bona ke, uyehova undibambile ekuzaleni; uz’ uti ngoko ungene kwikobokakazi lam: ndinga ndiya kuzuza abantwana ngalo, wapulapula u‐Abrame elizwini lika‐Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Waza u‐Sarai, umfazi ka‐Abrame, wamtabata u‐Hagare um‐Jipetekazi, ikobokakazi lake, emvenikweni wabehleli u‐Abrame iminyaka yalishumi ezweni le‐Kanane, wamnika ku‐Abrame indoda yake, ukuba abe ngumfazi wake." 
Genesis16:4 Wandula wangena ku‐Hagare, owakaulayo. Kekaloku akubona ukuba ukaulile, inkosikazi yake yadeleka emehlweni ake." 
Genesis16:5 Waza u‐Sarai wati ku‐Abrame: Ukwoniwa kwam kube pezu kwako! ikobokakazi lam ndilinikile esifubeni sako; kekaloku lakubona ukuba likaulile, ndadeleka emehlweni alo; makagwebe uyehova pakati kwam nawe." 
Genesis16:6 Wayesiti u‐Abrame ku‐Sarai: Bona ke, ikobokakazi lako lisesandleni sako; yenza kulo ngokulungileyo emehlweni ako. Waza u‐Sarai walibandezela, lada lesaba ebusweni bake." 
Genesis16:7 Yalifumana ingelosi kayehova ngasemtonjeni wamanzi entlango, ngasemtonjeni osendleleni yase‐Shure." 
Genesis16:8 Eyati: Hagare, kobokakazi lika‐Sarai! uvela pina? woya ngapina kanjalo? Wati: Ndisabile ebusweni buka‐Sarai inkosikazi yam." 
Genesis16:9 Yaza yati ingelosi kayehova kuye: Buyela kwinkosikazi yako, uzitobise ngapantsi kwezandla zayo." 
Genesis16:10 Yati ingelosi kayehova kuye kanjako: Ndiya kwandisa inzalo yako ngokuyandisa kakulu, ide ingabi nakubalwa ngenxa yokuba ninzi kwayo." 
Genesis16:11 Yalekela ingelosi kayehova yati kuye: Bona ke, use umiti, wauya kuzala unyana, ubize igama lake ngo‐Shimayeli, ngokokuba evile uyehova imbandezelwa yako." 
Genesis16:12 Woba yena engumntu obuqwaṙaṙa; isandla sake soba ngakubo abantu bonke, nesandla sabantu bonke soba ngakuye; waeya kuma ngasebusweni babo bonke abazalwana bake." 
Genesis16:13 Waye elibiza igama likayehova owateta naye ngokuti: Wena Tixo wesibonakalo! ngokuba ebesiti: Ndisabona na kwa lapa emveni kwesibonakalo? 
Genesis16:14 Kukona bekubizwa eloqula ngokuti yi‐Bere‐lahairoi; nanguya pakati kwe‐Kadeshe ne‐Beredi. 
Genesis16:15 Waza u‐Hagare wamzalela u‐Abrame unyana; wati u‐Abrame wabiza igama lonyana wake, lo ubemzele u‐Hagare, ngo‐Shimayeli." 
Genesis16:16 Waye u‐Abrame wayiminyaka engamashumi asibozo enesitandatu ubudala bake, nxa u‐Hagare wamzalela u‐Abrame u‐Shimayeli lowo." 
Genesis17:1 KWAYE kute, akuba u‐Abrame eyiminyaka imashumi alitoba enesitoba ubudala bake, wabonakala uyehova ku‐Abrame, wati kuye: Mna ndi ngutixo onamandla onke; hamba ebusweni bam, ufezeke ukulunga." 
Genesis17:2 Ndandiya kubeka ucebano lwam pakati kwam nawe, ndikwandise nokukwandisa ngokukulu kakulu." 
Genesis17:3 Waza u‐Abrame wawa ngobuso bake; wayeteta utixo naye, esiti:" 
Genesis17:4 Mna, bona ke, ucebano lwam lunawe; woba wena unguyise wento eninzi yezizwe." 
Genesis17:5 Kanjalo igama lako aliyi kuba sabizwa ngo‐Abrame, koko igama lako loba ngu‐Abrahame; ngokuba ndikwenzile uyise wento eninzi yezizwe." 
Genesis17:6 Ndokucumisa ngokukulu kakulu, ndenze izizwe ngawe; baya kuvela nokumkani kuwe." 
Genesis17:7 Ndandiya kumisa ucebano lwam pakati kwam nawe, nenzalo yako emva kwako ngezizukulwana zabo, lube lucebano olungunapakade, lwokokuba ndibe ngutixo kuwe, kwa nakuyo inzalo yako emva kwako." 
Genesis17:8 Kanjalo ndiya kunika wena, nenzalo yako emva kwako, ilizwe lokupambukela kwako, kwa lonke ilizwe le‐Kanane, libe yimfuyo engunapakade; ndandiya kuba ngutixo wabo." 
Genesis17:9 Walekela utixo wati ku‐Abrahame: Woti wena ngoko ulubambe ucebano lwam, wena, nenzalo yako emva kwako ngezizukulwana zabo." 
Genesis17:10 Olu lucebano lwam, eniya kubamba lona, pakati kwam nani, nenzalo yako emva kwako: konke okubudoda kuya kwaluswa pakati kwenu." 
Genesis17:11 Niya kwalusa inyama yejwabu lenu; okuya kuba ngumqondiso oko wocebano olupakati kwam nani. 
Genesis17:12 Omihla isibozo uya kwaluswa pakati kwenu, konke okubudoda ngezizukulwana zenu, lowo ozelweyo endlwini, nalowo otengiweyo ngemali kosukuba engowasemzini, ongenguye owenzalo yako." 
Genesis17:13 Lowo ozelweyo endlwini yako, nalowo otengiweyo ngemali yako, uya kwaluswa ngenyaniso; lwoba ucebano lwam lusenyameni yenu lube lucebano olungunapakade." 
Genesis17:14 Nokungalukileyo okubudoda, lowo inyama yejwabu lake ingalukanga, lompefumlo uya kunqanyulwa ebantwini bawo; ulwapule ucebano lwam." 
Genesis17:15 Walekela utixo wati ku‐Abrahame: u‐Sarai, umfazi wako, akuyi kulibiza igama lake ngo‐Sarai, koko liya kuba ngu‐Sara igama lake." 
Genesis17:16 Ngokuba ndiya kumtamsanqela, ndikunike unyana ngaye; ewe, ndiya kumtamsanqela, waeya kuba ngu nina wezizwe; okumkani bezizwe bovela kuye." 
Genesis17:17 Waza u‐Abrahame wawa ngobuso bake, wahleka; wati entliziyweni yake: Ominyaka yobudala ilikulu uya kuzalelwa umntwana na? no‐Sara, ominyaka yobudala ingamashumi alitoba, uya kuzala na?" 
Genesis17:18 Wayesiti u‐Abrahame kutixo: Akwaba u‐Shimayeli ebengapilayo ebusweni bako! 
Genesis17:19 Wati utixo: Okwenene u‐Sara umfazi wako wokuzalela unyana, negama lake uya kulibiza ngo‐Yisake; ndandiya kumisa ucebano lwam naye, lube lucebano olungunapakade nenzalo yake emva kwake." 
Genesis17:20 No‐Shimayeli ndikuvile ngaye; bona ke, ndimtamsanqele, ndandiya kumcumisa, ndimandise nokumandisa ngokukulu kakulu; nya kuzala inkosana ezilishumi linambini, ndandiya kumenza isizwe esikulu." 
Genesis17:21 Kodwa ucebano lwam ndiya kumisa lona no‐Yisake, lo u‐Sara aya kumzalela wena malunga nelixesha ngomnyaka ozayo." 
Genesis17:22 Wada wayeka ukuteta naye; waye utixo wenyuka ku‐Abrahame. 
Genesis17:23 Waza u‐Abrahame watabata u‐Shimayeli unyana wake, nabo bonke ababezelwe endlwini yake, nabo bonke ababetengiwe ngemali yake, konke okubudoda pakati kwabantu bendlu ka‐Abrahame, wayalusa inyama yejwabu labo, kwa ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo, njengokuba ebetshilo kuye utixo." 
Genesis17:24 Kekaloku u‐Abrahame ebeyiminyaka yamashumi alitoba enesitoba ubudala bake, akwaluswa enyameni yejwabu lake." 
Genesis17:25 No‐Shimayeli unyana wake ebeyiminyaka yalishumi linesitatu ubudala bake, akwaluswa enyameni yejwabu lake." 
Genesis17:26 Ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo kwaluswa u‐Abrahame, no‐Shimayeli unyana wake." 
Genesis17:27 Nawo onke amadoda endlu yake, lawo azelweyo endlwini yake, nalawo atengiweyo ngemali kowasemzini, abesaluswa kunye naye." 
Genesis18:1 WABUYA wabonakala uyehova kuye ngasesiyekeni sika‐Mamre, nxa ahleli emnyango wentente yake ekufudumaleni kwemini." 
Genesis18:2 Owapakamisa amehlo ake wakangela, kekaloku nanga amadoda matatu emi ngakuye; wati akuwabona, wabaleka ukuya kuwakaulela esuka emnyango wentente, watoba ngasemhlabeni;" 
Genesis18:3 wati: Nkosi! ukuba sendifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, uze ungadluli umke kwisicaka sako." 
Genesis18:4 Makekuziswe intwana yamanzi, nize nihlambe inyawo zenu, niti butu ngapantsi kwalomti." 
Genesis18:5 Ndandiya kuzeka umtamo wesonka, ukuba nizixase intliziyo zenu; noda niti kamva, nigqite; ngokuba kwa kukona nidluleyo ukuza esicakeni senu. Aza ati: Yenza njengoko ukutetileyo." 
Genesis18:6 Wakauleza u‐Abrahame waya ententeni ku‐Sara, wati: Nxama ulungise izilinganiso zibe zitatu zomgubo ocolekileyo, wu buce, wenze izonkana." 
Genesis18:7 Waza wabaleka u‐Abrahame waya ezinkomeni, wazeka itole, lilelitambileyo nelilungileyo, walinika kumfana, owanxama ukulipeka." 
Genesis18:8 Wayetabata amafuta epehlwa, namasi, netole abelipekile, wabeka ngasebusweni bawo, wema ngakuwo pantsi kwomti lowo, aza atya ke." 
Genesis18:9 Aye esiti kuye: Upina u‐Sara umfazi wako? Wati: Nankuya ententeni. 
Genesis18:10 Waza wati: Ngokwenene ndobuya ndize kuwe ekutwaseni kwelixesha; kanjalo, bona ke, u‐Sara umfazi wako woba nonyana. Kwaviwa ngu‐Sara enmyango wentente, obusemva kwake." 
Genesis18:11 Kekaloku u‐Abrahame no‐Sara bebebadala, bekolisile ukuba nemihla; kwabekupeziwe ukuhla ku‐Sara njengesiko labafazi." 
Genesis18:12 Wati u‐Sara ngoko wahleka pakati kwake, esiti: Emveni kwokwalupala kwam sendiya kuba nobuyolo na, inkosi yam indala nje nayo?" 
Genesis18:13 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Abrahame: Wahleka nganina u‐Sara, esiti: Ndoka ndizale ngenyaniso na, sendimdala nje?" 
Genesis18:14 Kuko into engamnqabelayo uyehova na? Ngexesha elimisiweyo ndiya kubuya ndize kuwe, ekutwaseni kwexesha eli, waeya kuti u‐Sara abe nonyana." 
Genesis18:15 Waza wakanyela u‐Sara, esiti: Andihlekanga; ngokuba ebesoyika. Wayesiti: Hai, wahleka." 
Genesis18:16 Asuka apo amadoda la, abeka ngase‐Sodome; wahamba nawo no‐Abrahame, ukuba awapelekelele." 
Genesis18:17 Wayesiti uyehova: Ndiya kumfihlela u‐Abrahame na, oko ndikwenzayo;" 
Genesis18:18 nxa u‐Abrahame ngenyaniso aya kuba sisizwe esikulu nesinamandla, nanxa zonke izizwe zomhlaba ziya kutanyusanqeliswa ngaye?" 
Genesis18:19 Ngokuba sendimazi, okokuba uya kuyalela abantwana bake nabendlu yake emva kwake, ukuba bagcine indlela kayehova, benze okulungileyo nokufaneleyo; ukuze akuzise uyehova pezu kwo‐Abrahame oko akutetileyo ngaye." 
Genesis18:20 Waza wati uyehova: Ngokokuba isikalo se‐Sodome ne‐Gomora sikulu, nokuba isono sazo sinzima kunene;" 
Genesis18:21 ndoka ndihle ke, ukuya kubona ukuba kugqityelwe ukwenzwa na njengesikalo sazo esizileyo kum; sendiya kuti, ukuba akunjalo, ndikwazi ke." 
Genesis18:22 Aza amadoda la ajika kwa lapo, ahambela ngase‐Sodome; kanti u‐Abrahame ebesemi ebusweni bukayehova." 
Genesis18:23 Waye u‐Abrahame wasondela, wati: Kanene uya kububisa abalungileyo kunye nabakohlakeleyo na?" 
Genesis18:24 Kungabako umhlaumbi amashumi mahlanu abalungileyo pakati kwesixeko; wobubisa na, ungayeki indawo ngenxa yabamashumi mahlanu abalungileyo abakuso?" 
Genesis18:25 Makube lé kuwe ukwenza ngendawo enjalo, yokuba ubulale abalungileyo kunye nabakohlakeleyo! nokuba abalungileyo babe njengabakohlakeleyo, makube lé kuwe oko! umgwebi wawo wonke umhlaba akayi kwenza okufaneleyo yinina?" 
Genesis18:26 Wayesiti uyehova: Ukuba ndiyafumana e‐Sodome amashumi mahlanu abalungileyo pakati kwesixeko, ndiya kwandula ndiyeke yonke indawo ngenxa yabo." 
Genesis18:27 Wapendula u‐Abrahame, wati: Bona ke, sendiqalile ukuteta enkosini, ndilutuli notutu nje kodwa." 
Genesis18:28 Kungati umhlaumbi kusweleke abahlanu kuwo amashumi mahlanu abalungileyo; wositshabalalisa ngenxa yabo bahlanu na sonke isixeko? Yaza yati: Andiyi kusitshabalalisa, ukuba ndofumana kona amashumi mane anesihlanu." 
Genesis18:29 Wabuya walekela ukuteta kuyo, wati: Kungaba kwofunyanwa kona amashumi mane. Yati: Andiyi kukwenza nangenxa yamashumi mane." 
Genesis18:30 Waza wati: Makungaqumbiseki enkosini, ndize nditete! Kungaba kwofunyanwa kona amashumi matatu. Yati: Andiyi kukwenza, ukuba ndofumana kona amashumi matatu." 
Genesis18:31 Wayesiti: Bona ke, sendiqalile ukuteta enkosini. Kungaba kwofunyanwa kona amashumi mabini. Yati: Andiyi kusitshabalalisa nangenxa yamashumi mabini." 
Genesis18:32 Wabuya wati: Makungaqumbiseki enkosini, ndize nditete kube kaloku kupela! Kungaba kwofunyanwa kona ishumi linye. Yati: Andiyi kusitshabalalisa nangenxa yeshumi linye." 
Genesis18:33 Wasuka wemka uyehova, akuba egqibile ukuteta no‐Abrahame: wati u‐Abrahame wabuyela endaweni yake." 
Genesis19:1 ZEZA kufika ezongelosi zimbini e‐Sodome ngokuhlwa: waye u‐Lote wahlala esangweni le‐Sodome: wati u‐Lote akuzibona, wesuka ukuya kuzikaulela, watoba ngobuso ngasemhlabeni." 
Genesis19:2 Waza wati: Bona ke, zinkosi zam! kenipambukele endlwini yesicaka senu, nilalise kona, nihlambe inyawo zenu; naniya kuvuka kusasa, nihambe ngendlela yenu. Zati: Hai; koko siya kulalisa esitarateni." 
Genesis19:3 Waza waziqu̔ba kakulu, zada zapambukela kuye, zangena endlwini yake; waye ezenzela isidlo, woja izonkana ezingenagwele, zatya ke." 
Genesis19:4 Zingekalali, asuka amadoda asesixekweni, amadoda ase‐Sodome, angqonga leyondlu, kwa namadala namatsha, bonke abantu kuwo onke amacala." 
Genesis19:5 Baza babiza ku‐Lote, bati kuye: Apina lawomadoda abengena kuwe ngobubusuku? waku̔pele kuti, ukuze siwazi." 
Genesis19:6 Wandula wapuma u‐Lote waya kubo emnyango, wavala ucango emva kwake," 
Genesis19:7 wati: Bazalwana bam! zeningakwenzi okukohlakeleyo. 
Genesis19:8 Bona ke, ndinentombi zimbini ezingayazanga ndoda; makendiniku̔pele zona, nize nenze kuzo njengokulungileyo emehlweni enu; kodwa lamadoda ningawenzi nto, ngokuba kukona babengena ngapantsi kwomtunzi wentungo yam." 
Genesis19:9 Baza bati: Kwelela. Bati kanjalo: Lomfo nze ukuhlala apa njengowasemzini, ade afun’ ukwenza njengomgwebi: kaloku sesiya kupata kakubi wena ngapezu kwawo. Baye bexinga ngasendodeni leyo, ngaku‐Lote, kakulu, bada basondela ukugqoboza ucango." 
Genesis19:10 Andula amadoda lawo olula izandla zawo, amngenisa u‐Lote kwa kuwo endlwini, avala ucango." 
Genesis19:11 Nabantu ababengaselucangweni lwendlu ababeta ngobumfama, kwa nabancinane nabakulu, bada bazidinisa ukunga bangafumana ucango." 
Genesis19:12 Aza ati amadoda lawo ku‐Lote: Bangobanina usenabo apa? ongumyeni, onyana bako, nentombi zako, nako konke unako kwesisixeko, kuku̔pe kulendawo:" 
Genesis19:13 ngokuba siya kutshabalalisa lendawo, ngokokuba sikulu isikalo sabo ebusweni bukayehova; kukona uyehova asitumileyo ukuza kuyitshabalalisa." 
Genesis19:14 Wapuma u‐Lote, wateta nabo abangabayeni kuye, abebeya kuzeka intombi zake, watsho ukuti: Sukani, nipume kulendawo; ngokuba uyehova eya kutshabalalisa isixeko esi. Koko wanga ungohlekayo kubo abangabayeni kuye." 
Genesis19:15 Kwati kwakuti qip’ ukusa, zandula ingelosi zamnxamisa u‐Lote, zisiti: Suka, utabate umfazi wako, nentombi zako zombini ezikoyo apa, ukuze ungabujiswa ebubini besisixeko." 
Genesis19:16 Kodwa wazilazila; ngako amadoda lawo abamba isandla sake, nesandla somfazi wake, nesandla sentombi zake zombini, uyehova enobubele nje ngakuye, ampumisa endlwini, ambeka ngapandle kwesixeko." 
Genesis19:17 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni abebapumisele ngapandle kwesixeko, wati: Zisindise ngenxa yobomi bako; ungabeki ngasemva kwako, ungahlali nokuhlala kulo lonke itafa; sindela entabeni, ukuze ungabujiswa." 
Genesis19:18 Wati kuwo u‐Lote: Makekungabi njalo, Nkosi!" 
Genesis19:19 Bona ke, isicaka sako sifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, ude wabenza bukulu ububele bako, obo undipete ngabo ngokulondoloza umpefumlo wam ekudliweni kwobomi; kanti andingesindele entabeni, hleze ndifikelwe lilishwa, ndife ke." 
Genesis19:20 Bona ke, esisixeko sikufupi, ukuba kusabelwe kona; sesincinane kanjalo; makendisindele kona, (asi siso esincinane na?) uze umpefumlo wam udle ubomi." 
Genesis19:21 Wayesiti kuye: Bona ke, ndikubukile nangalento, yokuba andiyi kucita esosixeko utetile ngaso." 
Genesis19:22 Nxama, usindele kona; ngokuba ndikohliwe kukwenza into ude ufike kona. Ngako oko kwabizwa igama lesixeko eso nge‐Tsohare." 
Genesis19:23 Ilanga lakova ukupuma pezu kwomhlaba, akuba u‐Lote wangena e‐Tsohare." 
Genesis19:24 Wandula uyehova wanisa pezu kwe‐Sodome ne‐Gomora isufure nomlilo uvela kuyehova ezulwini; 
Genesis19:25 wacita ezozixeko kanjalo, nalo lonke itafa, nabo bonke abemi bezixeko ezo, nokuhluma kwomhlaba." 
Genesis19:26 Kodwa umfazi wake wabeka ngomva emva kwake, waza waba sisimo setyuwa." 
Genesis19:27 Kekaloku u‐Abrahame wavuka kusasa, waya endaweni apo abemi kona ebusweni bukayehova." 
Genesis19:28 Wayebeka ngase‐Sodome ne‐Gomora, nangakulo lonke ilizwe lasetafeni, wakangela, kekaloku bona ke, kwenyuka umsi welizwe njengomsi wesidlangalala." 
Genesis19:29 Kwaye kute, nxa utixo watshabalalisa izixeko zasetafeni, wandula utixo wakumbula u‐Abrahame, wamku̔pa u‐Lote kwa pakati kwokucitakala, ekucitweni kwezixeko abehleli kuzo u‐Lote." 
Genesis19:30 Waye u‐Lote wapuma e‐Tsohare, wahlala entabeni, nentombi zake zombini kunye naye; ngokuba ebesoyika ukuhlala e‐Tsohare: ngako wahlala emqolombeni, yena nentombi zake zombini." 
Genesis19:31 Yaza eyamazibulo yati kuyo encinane: Ubawo umdala; kanjalo akuko ndoda kwelilizwe yokungena kuti njengesiko lawo wonke umhlaba; 
Genesis19:32 yiza, size simseze ubawo iveyine, silale naye, ukuba silondoloze inzalo ngobawo." 
Genesis19:33 Zaye zimseza uyise iveyine ngobusuku obo: yaza eyamazibulo yangena, yalala noyise; owaengaqiqanga nxa ilala pantsi, nanxa isukayo." 
Genesis19:34 Kwati ngomnye umhla, eyamazibulo yati kuyo encinane: Bona ke, ndalala pezolo nobawo; makesimseze iveyine ngobubusuku nabo; uze ungene wena, ulale naye, ukuba silondoloze inzalo ngobawo." 
Genesis19:35 Zaza zamseza uyise iveyine ngobobusuku nabo; yesuka leyo incinane, yaya yalala naye; owaengaqiqanga nxa ilala pantsi, nanxa isukayo." 
Genesis19:36 Kwa njalo zamita intombi zika‐Lote zombini ngoyise. 
Genesis19:37 Yada eyamazibulo yazala unyana, yambiza ngegama elingu‐Mowabi: nguye lo uyise wama‐Mowabi kude kwanamhla." 
Genesis19:38 Nencinane, yazala unyana nayo, yambiza ngegama elingu‐Bene‐hami: nguye lo uyise walo usapo luka‐Hamoni kude kwanamhla." 
Genesis20:1 WEMKA apo u‐Abrahame waya ngasezweni lasesuyide, wema pakati kwe‐Kadeshe ne‐Shure; waza wapambukela e‐Gerari." 
Genesis20:2 Wabetshilo u‐Abrahame ngaye u‐Sara umfazi wake ukuti: Ngudade wam yena; ngako watuma u‐Abimeleki, ukumkani we‐Gerari, wamsusa u‐Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Kanti weza utixo ku‐Abimeleki ngepupa ebusuku, wati kuye: Bona ke, ungofileyo ngenxa yalomfazi umsusileyo, ngokuba yena selendile endodeni." 
Genesis20:4 Kodwa u‐Abimeleki ebengasondelanga kuye: waza wati: Nkosi! isizwe esilungileyo woka usibulale kusinina? 
Genesis20:5 Akatshongo na ukuti kum: Ngudade wam? naye, wabe kwa yena esiti: Ngumkuluwe wam: kungolungelelwano lwentliziyo yam nangobumsulwa bezandla zam endikwenzile oku." 
Genesis20:6 Waza utixo wati kuye epupeni: Nam ndiyakwazi ukuba kungolungelelwano lwentliziyo yako ukwenzile oku; ngokuba kanjalo ndikunqandile ekwoneni ngakum; kukona ndingakuvumelanga ukuba umcukumise. 
Genesis20:7 Uze uti kaloku ubuyise umfazi walendoda, ngokuba ingumprofite yona, yaiya kukutandazela, ukuze upile; kodwa ukuba akumbuyisi, yazi okokuba uya kufa ngokufa, kwa wena, nako konke unako." 
Genesis20:8 Wayevuka u‐Abimeleki kwa kusasa, wabiza zonke izicaka zake, wateta onke lamazwi ezindlebeni zazo. Ati amadoda lawo oyika kakulu." 
Genesis20:9 Waza u‐Abimeleki wambiza u‐Abrahame, wati kuye: Yinto nina uyenzileyo kuti? kanjalo yinto nina endikwonile ngayo, ukuba uzisile pezu kwam napezu kwobukumkani bam ityala elikulu kangaka? izenzo ezinga zingenziwe uzenzile kum." 
Genesis20:10 Walekela u‐Abimeleki ukuti ku‐Abrahame: Ububona nto nina, ukuba wayenza lento?" 
Genesis20:11 Waza wati u‐Abrahame: Bekungokuba bendisiti: Okunene akuko ukwoyikwa kukatixo kulendawo; sebeya kundibulala ngenxa yomfazi wam. 
Genesis20:12 Kanti unguye nodade wam ngenyaniso; uyintombi kabawo, kodwa akayiyo intombi kama̔; wada waba ngumfazi wam." 
Genesis20:13 Kwaza kwati, okuya utixo wandibangazisayo endlwini kabawo, kendati kuye: Obu bubububele uya kundenzela bona: kuzo zonke indawo esiya kufika kona, uti ngam: Ngumkuluwe wam yena." 
Genesis20:14 Wandula u‐Abimeleki watabata izimvu, nenkabi, nezicaka, nezicakakazi, wazinika ku‐Abrahame, wambuyisela kuye no‐Sara umfazi wake." 
Genesis20:15 Wayesiti u‐Abimeleki: Nangu umhlaba wam usebusweni bako; hlala apo kulungile emehlweni ako ukuba uhlale kona. 
Genesis20:16 Wati nakuye u‐Sara: Bona ke, ndimnikile umkuluwe wako iwaka leshekele zesilivere; bona ke, usisigubungelo samehlo kuwe, kubo bonke abakunye nawe, nakunye nabanye bonke: bekunjalo ukwohlwaywa kwake." 
Genesis20:17 Waza u‐Abrahame watandaza kutixo; waye utixo wapilisa u‐Abimeleki, nomfazi wake, nezicakakazi zake; bada bazala." 
Genesis20:18 Ngokuba uyehova ebegqibele ukuzivingca zonke izizalo zabendlu ka‐Abimeleki, ngenxa ka‐Sara umfazi ka‐Abrahame." 
Genesis21:1 WAYE uyehova wamkumbula u‐Sara njengokutsho kwake; kanjalo uyehova wenzela u‐Sara njengokuteta kwake. 
Genesis21:2 Wada wamita u‐Sara, wamzalela u‐Abrahame unyana ebudaleni bake, ngelimisiweyo ixesha abetetile ngalo kuye utixo." 
Genesis21:3 Waye u‐Abrahame wabiza igama lonyana wake obemzalelwe, lowo u‐Sara wamzalela yena, ngo‐Yisake." 
Genesis21:4 Waza u‐Abrahame walusa u‐Yisake unyana wake, eyimihla isibozo ubudala bake, njengokuba ebemyalele utixo." 
Genesis21:5 Wabe u‐Abrahame eyiminyaka ilikulu ubudala bake, akuzalelwa u‐Yisake unyana wake." 
Genesis21:6 Wayesiti u‐Sara: Utixo undenzele ukuhleka; bonke abevayo bohleka nam. 
Genesis21:7 Wabuya wati: Ngubanina obeya kutsho ku‐Abrahame ukuti: u‐Sara wanyisile abantwana? ngokuba ndizele unyana ebudaleni bake. 
Genesis21:8 Wakula umntwana, walunyulwa; waza u‐Abrahame wenza umtendeleko omkulu emhleni abelunyulwa ngawo u‐Yisake." 
Genesis21:9 Kekaloku u‐Sara wambona unyana ka‐Hagare um‐Jipetekazi, lowo wamzalela u‐Abrahame, ehleka." 
Genesis21:10 Wati ngoko ku‐Abrahame: Gxota elikobokakazi nonyana walo; ngokuba unyana welikobokakazi engayi kulidla ilifa kunye nonyana wam, kunye no‐Yisake." 
Genesis21:11 Kodwa lendawo ibimbi kakulu emehlweni ka‐Abrahame, ngenxa yonyana wake." 
Genesis21:12 Waza utixo wati ku‐Abrahame: Makungabi kubi emehlweni ako pezu kwomfana, napezu kwekobokakazi lako: konke akutshilo kuwe u‐Sara, lipulapule ilizwi lake ngako; ngokuba ku‐Yisake iya kubizwa inzalo yako." 
Genesis21:13 Kwa naye unyana wekobokakazi ndiya kumenza isizwe, ngokokuba eyinzalo yako." 
Genesis21:14 Waza wavuka u‐Abrahame kwa kusasa, watabata isonka, nentsuba yamanzi, wazinika ku‐Hagare, ezibeka egxalabeni lake; wamnika nomfana, wamndulula ke. Wasuka wemka, wabangazeka entlango yase‐Beresheba." 
Genesis21:15 Kwaza kwati, akuba epelile amanzi entsubeni, wamwisa umfana ngapantsi kwomnye wemitana." 
Genesis21:16 Waya yena wahlala pantsi elunge naye, kwamgama ongangokutolwa kwesipeta; ngokuba ebesiti: Mandingaboni ukufa kwomfana. Wahlala ke elunge naye, wapakamisa ilizwi lake, walila." 
Genesis21:17 Waye utixo weva ilizwi lomfana; yaza ingelosi katixo yabiza ku‐Hagare isezulwini, yati kuye: Unandawo nina, Hagare? ungoyiki; ngokuba utixo evile ilizwi lomfana apo akona." 
Genesis21:18 Suka, umfunqule umfana, umbambe ngesandla sako; ngokuba ndiya kumenza isizwe esikulu." 
Genesis21:19 Wandula utixo wavula amehlo ake, wada wabona iqula lamanzi; waza waya wazalisa intsuba ngamanzi, wamseza umfana." 
Genesis21:20 Waye utixo ebenaye umfana, owakulayo, wahlala entlango, waba ngumtoli." 
Genesis21:21 Wahlala entlango ye‐Parane; wati unina wamtabatela umfazi ezweni le‐Jipete. 
Genesis21:22 KWABEKUTE ngeloxesha ke, bateta u‐Abimeleki no‐Fikoli inkosi yempi yake ku‐Abrahame, besiti: Utixo unawe kuko konke ukwenzayo." 
Genesis21:23 Uze uti kaloku undifungele utixo apa, okokuba akuyi kundixokisa mna, kwa nonyana wam, nesalamane sam: njengobubele endenze ngabo kuwe, uya kwenza kwa ngabo kum, nakulo ilizwe upambukele kona." 
Genesis21:24 Wati u‐Abrahame: Ndiya kufunga. 
Genesis21:25 Koko u‐Abrahame wamohlwaya u‐Abimeleki ngenxa yequla lamanzi, ezazite izicaka zika‐Abimeleki zalipanga." 
Genesis21:26 Waza wati u‐Abimeleki: Bendingazi ungubanina owenzileyo lento: kanjako nawe akundixelelanga; andiyivanga nam kanjalo, kupela namhla nje." 
Genesis21:27 Waye u‐Abrahame watabata izimvu nenkabi, wazinikela u‐Abimeleki; baza balwenza ucebano bobabini." 
Genesis21:28 Kodwa u‐Abrahame wabeka zasixe̔nxe imvanakazi zasemhlambini zibe zodwa. 
Genesis21:29 Ngako u‐Abimeleki wati ku‐Abrahame: Ziti nina ezimvanakazi zosixe̔nxe uzibekileyo zodwa? 
Genesis21:30 Wayesiti: Okokuba ezi mvanakazi zosixe̔nxe uya kuzamkela esandleni sam, ukuze zibe linqi̔na kum lokuba ndilimbile iqula eli." 
Genesis21:31 Ngako oko kwabizwa londawo ngokuti yi‐Beresheba; ngokuba kulapo bebefunga bobabini. 
Genesis21:32 Benje njalo ke ukwenza ucebano e‐Beresheba. Wandula ukusuka u‐Abimeleki, no‐Fikoli inkosi yempi yake, babuyela ezweni lama‐Filistiya." 
Genesis21:33 Kekaloku u‐Abrahame watyala umti wetamariske e‐Beresheba, wabiza kona egameni likayehova, utixo ongunapakade." 
Genesis21:34 Waye u‐Abrahame wahlala njengowasemzini elizweni lama‐Filistiya imihla yamininzi. 
Genesis22:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwezizinto, utixo walinga u‐Abrahame, wati kuye: Abrahame! Wati yena: Nanku, ndi lapa." 
Genesis22:2 Wayesiti: Zutabate unyana wako, ukupela kwonyana wako, omtandayo, u‐Yisake, usuke uye elizweni le‐Moriya, umnikele kona abe lidini lokutshiswa, pezu kwenye yentaba endiya kukutyela yona." 
Genesis22:3 Waza u‐Abrahame wavuka kwa kusasa, wabopa iqwaṙashe lake, watabata amabini kwamadodana ake aye naye, no‐Yisake unyana wake, wacanda inkuni zedini lokutshiswa, wesuka, wahamba ukuya endaweni abemtyele yona utixo." 
Genesis22:4 Ngowesitatu umhla wandul’ ukupakamisa u‐Abrahame amehlo ake, wabona indawo leyo ikude." 
Genesis22:5 Waza wati u‐Abrahame kumadodana ake: Hlalani nina apa neqwaṙashe; mna kodwa nomfana siya kuhambela paya, sibedeshe, sibuye size kuni." 
Genesis22:6 Waye u‐Abrahame etabata inkuni zedini lokutshiswa wazibeka pezu kwo‐Yisake unyana wake; watabata esandleni sake umlilo nesitshetshe; baza bahamba bobabini kunye. 
Genesis22:7 Wada watsho u‐Yisake ku‐Abrahame uyise, wati: Bawo! Wati yena: Nanku, ndi lapa, nyana wam! Wayesiti: Nang’ umlilo nenkuni, kanti itakane lokwenza idini lokutshiswa lipina?" 
Genesis22:8 Wati u‐Abrahame: Utixo wozibonela itakane lokwenza idini lokutshiswa, nyana wam! Baza bahamba bobabini kunye." 
Genesis22:9 Bada bafika kulondawo ubemtyele yona utixo; wayesaka kona u‐Abrahame isibingelo, wacwangcisa inkuni, wanxiba u‐Yisake unyana wake, wambeka esibingelweni pezu kwenkuni." 
Genesis22:10 Waza u‐Abrahame wolula isandla sake, watabata isitshetshe ukuba abulale unyana wake." 
Genesis22:11 Yandula ukummemeza ingelosi kayehova isezulwini, yati: Abrahame, Abrahame! Wati yena: Nanku, ndi lapa." 
Genesis22:12 Yayisiti: Ungoluli isandla sako pezu kwomfana, ungenzi nto kuye kanjalo; ngokuba kaloku ndisazi ukuba uyamoyika utixo, ungabambanga nje unyana wako, ukupela kwonyana wako, kum." 
Genesis22:13 Waye u‐Abrahame wapakamisa amehlo ake, wakangela; kekaloku nantsiya inkunzi yegusha ngasemva ibanjisiwe eludadeni ngempondo zayo: wasuka waya u‐Abrahame watabata lonkunzi yegusha, wayinikela ibe lidini lokutshiswa esikundleni sonyana wake." 
Genesis22:14 Waza u‐Abrahame wabiza igama lalondawo ngokuti: Uyehova uya kubona! njengokuba kusitwa nanamhla: Entabeni kayehova kuya kubonwa! 
Genesis22:15 Yandula ingelosi kayehova yamemeza u‐Abrahame ngokwesibini isezulwini," 
Genesis22:16 yati: Ndizifungile, utsho uyehova, ngokokuba uyenzile lento, nokuba ungabambanga unyana wako, ukupela kwonyana wako;" 
Genesis22:17 ndiya kugqitisa ukukutamsanqela, ndikolise ukuyandisa nenzalo yako, njengenkwenkwezi zezulu, nanjengentlabati eselunxwemeni lwolwandle: yaiya kufuya inzalo yako isango lentshaba zayo;" 
Genesis22:18 kanjalo zoba netamsanqa ngenzalo yako zonke izizwe zomhlaba; ngenxa yokuba ulivile ilizwi lam. 
Genesis22:19 Wada u‐Abrahame wabuyela kumadodana ake; asuka ke, kwaza kwayiwa kunye e‐Beresheba; waye u‐Abrahame wahlala e‐Beresheba." 
Genesis22:20 KWAYE kute emveni kwezizinto, kwashunyayelwa ku‐Abrahame, ukuti: Bona ke, u‐Mileka uzele naye abantwana ku‐Nahore umkuluwe wako:" 
Genesis22:21 kwa u‐Hutse owamazibulo wake, no‐Buze umninawe wake, no‐Kemuweli uyise ka‐Arame," 
Genesis22:22 no‐Kesedi, no‐Hazo, no‐Piledashe, no‐Yidelafe, no‐Betuweli:" 
Genesis22:23 (wati u‐Betuweli wazala u‐Rebeka:) aba basibozo u‐Mileka wabazala ku‐Nahore, umkuluwe ka‐Abrahame." 
Genesis22:24 Neshweshwe lake, eligama lalingu‐Rewuma, lazala nalo u‐Teba, no‐Gahame, no‐Tahashe, no‐Mahaka." 
Genesis23:1 Kekaloku ukuhlala kuka‐Sara bekuyiminyaka ilikulu linamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe: yiyo iminyaka yokuhlala kwake u‐Sara. 
Genesis23:2 Wada wafa u‐Sara e‐Kiriyate‐areba, ekwa yiyo i‐Hebrone, elizweni le‐Kanane; waye u‐Abrahame weza ukwenzela u‐Sara isijwili, nokumlilela." 
Genesis23:3 Waza wesuka u‐Abrahame kwa sebusweni bofileyo wake, wateta kulo usapo luka‐Hete, esiti:" 
Genesis23:4 Ndingowasemzini nompambukeli kuni; ndinike imfuyo yendawo yokuncw̔abela kuni, ukuba ndincw̔abe ofileyo wam ebusweni bam." 
Genesis23:5 Lwapendula usapo luka‐Hete u‐Abrahame, lusiti kuye:" 
Genesis23:6 Sipulapule, nkosi yam! uyinkosi katixo wena pakati kwetu; kwelidluliseleyo emancw̔abeni etu mncw̔abe ofileyo wako; akuko namnye wakuti oya kubamba kuwe incw̔aba lake, ukuba ungamncw̔abi ofileyo wako." 
Genesis23:7 Waza wesuka u‐Abrahame, watoba pantsi pambi kwabantu belizwe, pambi kwosapo luka‐Hete;" 
Genesis23:8 wateta nabo, esiti: Ukuba ngumxe̔lo wenu, okokuba ndincw̔abe ofileyo wam ebusweni bam, ndipulapuleni, ninditetelele ku‐Hefrone unyana ka‐Tsohare," 
Genesis23:9 ukuba andinike umqolomba wase‐Makapela, lowo anawo, osencameni yentsimi yake; ngemali ezalisekileyo uya kunditengisa wona, ube yimfuyo yendawo yokuncw̔aba pakati kwenu." 
Genesis23:10 Kekaloku u‐Hefrone ubuhleli pakati kwosapo luka‐Hete; waza u‐Hefrone um‐Hete wampendula u‐Abrahame, ezindlebeni zalo usapo luka‐Hete, kwezabo bonke abezayo esangweni lesixeko sake, esiti:" 
Genesis23:11 Hai, nkosi yam! ndipulapule ke; intsimi ndiyayinika kuwe, nomqolomba opakati kwayo ndiyawunika kuwe; kwa semehlweni abo onyana babantu bam ndiyawunika kuwe; ncw̔aba ofileyo wako." 
Genesis23:12 Waza u‐Abrahame watoba pantsi ebusweni babantu belizwe; 
Genesis23:13 wateta ku‐Hefrone, ezindlebeni zabo abantu belizwe, esiti: Koko ukuba uya kutenga ngawo, uz’ unge ungandipulapula; ndokunikela intsimi imali; yitabate kum, ndandiya kuncw̔aba ofileyo wam kwa lapo." 
Genesis23:14 Waye u‐Hefrone wampendula u‐Abrahame, esiti kuye:" 
Genesis23:15 Nkosi yam! ndipulapule ke: umhlaba ulingana namakulu mane eshekele zesilivere; kuyinto nina oko pakati kwam nawe? ncw̔aba kambe ofileyo wako. 
Genesis23:16 Wapulapula ke u‐Abrahame ku‐Hefrone; waza u‐Abrahame wayilinganisela ku‐Hefrone isilivere, leyo ubetetile ngayo ezindlebeni zalo usapo luka‐Hete, imakulu mane eshekele zesilivere, isamkeleka kumtengi."
