Genesis23:17 Kwandu ukuqiniselwa intsimi ka‐Hefrone, ebise‐Makapela, ebingapambi kwe‐Mamre, kwa intsimi, nomqolomba obupakati kwayo, nayo yonke imiti ebisentsimini, ebikuyo yonke imida yangakona," 
Genesis23:18 ku‐Abrahame ibe yimfuyo, emehlweni alo usapo luka‐Hete, kwawabo bonke abezayo esangweni lesixeko sake." 
Genesis23:19 Wati u‐Abrahame emveni kwoku wamncw̔aba u‐Sara umfazi wake, emqolombeni wentsimi yase‐Makapela, ngapambi kwe‐Mamre, ekwa yiyo i‐Hebrone, elizweni le‐Kanane." 
Genesis23:20 Kwanjalo ke ukuqiniselwa kwentsimi leyo, nomqolomba obupakati kwayo, ku‐Abrahame, ibe yimfuyo yendawo yokuncw̔aba, lusapo luka‐Hete." 
Genesis24:1 KEKALOKU u‐Abrahame ebemdala, ekolisile ukuba nemihla; waye uyehova ebemtamsanqele u‐Abrahame ngento zonke." 
Genesis24:2 Waza wati u‐Abrahame kwisicaka sake, kwesidala sendlu yake, esibe sipata pezu kwako konke abenako: Kaubeke isandla sako ngapantsi kwetanga lam;" 
Genesis24:3 ndize ndikufungise uyehova, utixo wezulu, notixo womhlaba, okokuba akuyi kumtabatela unyana wam umfazi ezintombini zaba‐Kanane, endihleli mna pakati kwabo:" 
Genesis24:4 koko uya kuya elizweni lakowetu, nakuso isalamane sam, umtabatele unyana wam, u‐Yisake, umfazi." 
Genesis24:5 Sati isicaka kuye: Kungati inkazana ayiyi kuvuma ukundilandela ukuza kwelilizwe; kufanel’ ukuba ndibuyise na unyana wako aye kwelozwe wabupuma kulo? 
Genesis24:6 Wayesiti kuso u‐Abrahame: Lumka ke ukuba ungambuyiseli kona unyana wam. 
Genesis24:7 Uyehova, utixo wezulu, owandisusayo endlwini kabawo, nasezweni lesalamane sam, owateta nam, owandifungela nokundifungela ngokuti: Kwinzalo yako ndiya kunika elilizwe; kwa lowo uya kutuma ingelosi yake iye pambi kwako, uze umtabatele unyana wam umfazi kwa kona." 
Genesis24:8 Ukuba kodwa inkazana ayiyi kuvuma ukuba ikulandele, woba msulwa kuso esisifungiso sam; kupela ungabuyiseli kona unyana wam." 
Genesis24:9 Saza isicaka sabeka isandla saso ngapantsi kwalo itanga lika‐Abrahame inkosi yaso, safunga kuye pezu kwalomcimbi." 
Genesis24:10 Saya isicaka satabata inkamela zalishumi kuzo inkamela zenkosi yaso, semka ke; ngokuba yonke impahla yenkosi yaso ibisesandleni saso; sesuka semka ukuya e‐Mesopotami, esixekweni sika‐Nahore." 
Genesis24:11 Sada saziguqisa inkamela ngapandle kwesixeko, ngasequleni lamanzi, ngexesha lokuhlwa, ngexesha abakeleli bapuma ngalo." 
Genesis24:12 Saye sisiti: Yehova, Tixo wenkosi yam u‐Abrahame! wanga ungandifumanisa kwa namhla, wenzele inkosi yam u‐Abrahame ububele." 
Genesis24:13 Nanku mna ndimi ngasequleni lamanzi, nentombi zamadoda asesixekweni zipuma ukuka amanzi:" 
Genesis24:14 makekuti, intombi endiya kuti kuyo: Kautobe umpanda wako, ndisele; ize iti: Sela, nenkamela zako ndiya kuziseza nazo; maibe yiyo uyabeleyo isicaka sako u‐Yisake; sendiya kukwazi ngako ukuba wenzele inkosi yam ububele." 
Genesis24:15 Kwaye kute, singekagqibi ukuteta, nankuya u‐Rebeka selepumile, (obezelwe ku‐Betuweli, unyana ka‐Mileka, umfazi ka‐Nahore, umkuluwe ka‐Abrahame,) enompanda wake pezu kwegxalaba lake." 
Genesis24:16 Kekaloku intombi leyo, ukubonakala kwayo, ibintle kakulu, iyintombi ipela, kungeko ndoda ebiyazile, yaza yehlela equleni, yazalisa umpanda wayo, yabuya yenyuka." 
Genesis24:17 Sasuka isicaka sabaleka ukuya kuyikaulela, sati: Makendisele intwana yamanzi empandeni wako." 
Genesis24:18 Yaisiti: Sela, nkosi yam! yandul’ ukunxama, yahlisa umpanda wayo pezu kwesandla sayo, yasiseza ke." 
Genesis24:19 Kanjalo yakuba igqibile ukusiseza, yati: Ndiya kukela inkamela zako nazo, zide zigqibe ukusela." 
Genesis24:20 Yanxama ke, yagalela umpanda wayo emkombeni wokuseza, yabuya yabaleka yaya equleni ukuka amanzi, yada yakela zonke inkamela zaso." 
Genesis24:21 Yaza indoda leyo yayitela nqa isiti cwaka, ukunga ingaqonda ukuba uyehova utamsanqelekisile indlela yayo kusinina." 
Genesis24:22 Kwabekute, xeshekweni inkamela zigqibile ukusela, yandula londoda yatabata umsesane wempumlo wegolide, olingana nesiqingata seshekele ukuba nzima kwawo, nezacolo zizibini zibe pezu kwezandla zayo, ezilingana ne shekele zilishumi zegolide ukuba nzima kwazo;" 
Genesis24:23 yati: Uyintombi kabanina wena? ndixelele ke: iko na endlwini kayihlo indawo ukuba silalise kona? 
Genesis24:24 Yaisiti kuyo: Ndiyintombi ka‐Betuweli, unyana ka‐Mileka, lowo wamzalela u‐Nahore." 
Genesis24:25 Yalekela yati kuyo: Kuko nenca nokutya okuninzi kuti, kwa nendawo yokulalisa." 
Genesis24:26 Yaza londoda yatoba ngapantsi, yambedesha uyehova;" 
Genesis24:27 yati: Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wenkosi yam u‐Abrahame, ongashiyanga ububele bake nenyaniso yake ukuba zingabi nayo inkosi yam; mna ke, ndisendleleni nje, undikapile uyehova ukuza endlwini yabazalwana benkosi yam." 
Genesis24:28 Yasuka yabaleka intombi leyo, yashumayela endlwini yonina ezizinto." 
Genesis24:29 Wayenomkuluwe u‐Rebeka, ogama lingu‐Labane; waza wabaleka u‐Labane lowo, waya endodeni ngapandle, kwa semtonjeni." 
Genesis24:30 Kwaza kwati, nxa abonile umsesane wempumlo, nezacolo pezu kwezandla zodade wake, nanxa avile amazwi ka‐Rebeka udade wake, esiti: Kunjalo indoda yateta kum; wandula weza endodeni, eyati, bona ke, yema ngasezinkameleni, ngasemtonjeni." 
Genesis24:31 Wayesiti: Ngena, wena utanyusanqelweyo nguyehova! kunganina ukuba ume ngapandle? ngokuba ndise ndilungisile indlu, kwa nendawo yenkamela." 
Genesis24:32 Yandula yangena indoda leyo endlwini: waza wakulula inkamela zayo, wanika inca nokutya kwenkamela, namanzi okuhlamba inyawo zayo, nenyawo zamadoda abenayo." 
Genesis24:33 Kwaza kwabekwa pambi kwayo into yokudla; kuloko yati: Andiyi kutya, ndingekateti ilizwi lam. Wayesiti: Teta." 
Genesis24:34 Yaza yati: Ndisisicaka sika‐Abrahame mna. 
Genesis24:35 Kekaloku uyehova uyitamsanqele inkosi yam kakulu, ide yaba nkulu yona; uyinikile izimvu, nenkomo, nesilivere, negolide, nezicaka, nezicakakazi, nenkamela, namaqwaṙashe." 
Genesis24:36 Kanjalo u‐Sara, umfazi wenkosi yam, wazalela inkosi yam unyana emveni kwokwalupala kwake; lowo imnikile konke inako." 
Genesis24:37 Yada yandifungisa inkosi yam, isiti: Akuyi kumtabatela unyana wam umfazi ezintombini zaba‐Kanane, endihleli mna elizweni labo;" 
Genesis24:38 koko uya kuya endlwini kabawo nasesalamaneni sam, umtabatele unyana wam umfazi." 
Genesis24:39 Ndaza ndati enkosini yam: Kungati ayiyi kundilandela inkazana leyo. 
Genesis24:40 Yandul’ ukuti kum: Uyehova, endihambile ebusweni bake, wotuma ingelosi yake ukuya nawe, atamsanqelekise indlela yako; wauya kumtabatela unyana wam umfazi esalamaneni sam nasendlwini kabawo." 
Genesis24:41 Oko uya kuba msulwa kuso isifungiso sam, nxa uzayo kwisalamane sam; nokuba abaniki kuwe, woba msulwa kuso isifungiso sam." 
Genesis24:42 Kendeza namhla emtonjeni, ndati: Yehova, Tixo wenkosi yam u‐Abrahame! ukuba kaloku uya kutamsanqelekisa indlela yam endihamba ngayo;" 
Genesis24:43 nanku mna ndimi ngasemtonjeni wamanzi; makekuti, intombi eya kupuma ukuka amanzi, ndize nditi kuyo: Kaundipe intwana yamanzi empandeni wako, ndisele;" 
Genesis24:44 yandule iti kum: Sela wena, nenkamela zako ndozikela nazo; maibe yiyo engumfazi amabeleyo unyana wenkosi yam uyehova." 
Genesis24:45 Kekaloku ndingekagqibi ukuteta entliziyweni yam, nankuya u‐Rebeka selepumile enompanda wake pezu kwegxalaba lake; waya wehlela emtonjeni, waka amanzi; ndaza ndati kuye: Kaundipe ndisele." 
Genesis24:46 Wasuka wanxama, wahlisa umpanda wake kuye, wati: Sela, nenkamela zako ndiya kuziseza nazo; ndada ndasela, nenkamela waziseza nazo." 
Genesis24:47 Ndaza ndambuza, ndati: Uyintombi kabanina wena? Wayesiti: Ndiyintombi ka‐Betuweli, unyana ka‐Nahore, lowo u‐Mileka wamzalela yena. Ndaza ndafaka umsesane wempumlo empumlweni yake, nezacolo ezandleni zake." 
Genesis24:48 Ndaye nditoba ngapantsi, ndambedesha uyehova, ndambonga uyehova, utixo wenkosi yam u‐Abrahame, obendikapile ngendlela elungileyo ukuza kumtabatela unyana wake intombi yomkuluwe wenkosi yam." 
Genesis24:49 Ize niti ngoku, ukuba niya kwenzela inkosi yam ububele nenyaniso, nindixelele; nokuba aniyi kwenje njalo, ndixeleleni noko, ndize ndibeke ngasekunene, umhlaumbi ngasekohlo." 
Genesis24:50 Baza bapendula u‐Labane no‐Betuweli, bati: Ivela kuyehova indawo le; sikohliwe kukuteta kuwe okukohlakeleyo nokulungileyo." 
Genesis24:51 Nanku u‐Rebeka esebusweni bako; mtabate, uhambe; makabe ngumfazi wonyana wenkosi yako, njengoko akutetileyo uyehova." 
Genesis24:52 Kwaye kute, sakuva isicaka sika‐Abrahame amazwi abo, sandu ukuziqubuda ngasemhlabeni pambi kwoyehova." 
Genesis24:53 Saza isicaka sar̔ola impahla zesilivere, nempahla zegolide, nezivato, sazinika ku‐Rebeka; nezinto ezinqabileyo sazinika kumkuluwe wake nakunina." 
Genesis24:54 Baza batya basela nokusela, kwa yena namadoda abenaye, balalisa kona; kwasa bavuka, wati yena: Ndindululeni ndiye enkosini yam." 
Genesis24:55 Wayesiti umkuluwe wake, nonina: Maihlale intombi nati ibe yimihla etile, umhlaumbi ibe lishumi; yoti kamva ihambe." 
Genesis24:56 Wayesiti kubo: Ningandibambezeli, uyehova eyitamsanqelekisile nje indlela yam; nindindulule ndize ndiye enkosini yam." 
Genesis24:57 Bati bona: Siya kubiza intombi, sibuze umlomo wayo." 
Genesis24:58 Bandul’ ukubiza u‐Rebeka, bati kuye: Uya kuhamba na nalendoda? wati: Ndiya kuhamba." 
Genesis24:59 Baza bandulula u‐Rebeka udade wabo, nomondlikazi wake, nesicaka sika‐Abrahame, namadoda aso." 
Genesis24:60 Baye bemtamsanqela u‐Rebeka, bati kuye: Ungudade wetu wena; maube ngunina wamawaka amawakawaka, nenzalo yako maifuye isango labatiyi bayo!" 
Genesis24:61 Wesuka u‐Rebeka nomtinjana wake, bakwela ezinkameleni, bayilandela indoda; sati isicaka samtabata u‐Rebeka, semka ke." 
Genesis24:62 Kekaloku u‐Yisake weza ngendlela evela equleni le‐Lahai‐roi; ngokuba ebemi elizweni lasesuyide. 
Genesis24:63 Waye u‐Yisake epumile ukuya kutandaza endle kwakusondela ukuhlwa; waza wapakamisa amehlo ake, wakangela, kekaloku nanziya inkamela zisiza." 
Genesis24:64 Kanjalo no‐Rebeka wapakamisa amehlo ake, owati, akumbona u‐Yisake, wahlika kuyo inkamela." 
Genesis24:65 Wayesiti kwisicaka: Ngubanina londoda ihambayo endle ukuza kusikaulela? Sati isicaka: Yinkosi yam lo. Waza watabata isigqubutelo, wazinameka." 
Genesis24:66 Sandula isicaka sambalisela u‐Yisake zonke izinto esibe sizenzile. 
Genesis24:67 Wati u‐Yisake wamsa ententeni ka‐Sara unina; waza wamzeka u‐Rebeka, waye yena waba ngumfazi wake; wamtanda kanjalo. Wada watutuzeleka u‐Yisake emveni kwokufa kwonina." 
Genesis25:1 WAYE u‐Abrahame walekela ukuzeka umfazi, ogama lalingu‐Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Owamzalela u‐Zimrane, no‐Yokeshane, no‐Medane, no‐Midiyane, no‐Shebaki, no‐Shuha." 
Genesis25:3 Wati u‐Yokeshane wazala u‐Sheba no‐Dedane: nonyana baka‐Dedane bebengama‐Ashuri, nama‐Letushi, nama‐Lewumi." 
Genesis25:4 Nonyana baka‐Midiyane; ngu‐Hefa, no‐Heferi, no‐Hanoki, no‐Abida, no‐Ledaha. Bonke aba bangonyana baka‐Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Waye u‐Abrahame wamnika u‐Yisake konke abenako. 
Genesis25:6 Kanti onyana bamashweshwe, abenawo u‐Abrahame, wabanika u‐Abrahame amabaso, wabandulula kuye u‐Yisake unyana wake, nxa asahleli, ukuya ngapambili, ezweni langasecaleni lipuma ilanga." 
Genesis25:7 Yiyo le imihla yeminyaka yokuhlala kuka‐Abrahame wabehlala ngako, iminyaka ilikulu linamashumi asixe̔nxe anamihlanu." 
Genesis25:8 Wada wapuma umpefumlo u‐Abrahame, wafa enobudala obukolisileyo, elixego, ezele yimihla, wabutelwa ebantwini bake." 
Genesis25:9 Baza bamncw̔aba u‐Yisake no‐Shimayeli onyana bake, emqolombeni wase‐Makapela, entsimini ka‐Hefrone, unyana ka‐Tsohare, um‐Hete, engapambi kwe‐Mamre." 
Genesis25:10 Intsimi owayitenga u‐Abrahame elusatsheni luka‐Hete, kwa kona apo kwancw̔atywa u‐Abrahame, no‐Sara umfazi wake." 
Genesis25:11 Kwaza kwati, emveni kwokufa kuka‐Abrahame, wandula utixo wamtamsanqela u‐Yisake unyana wake; waye u‐Yisake wahlala ngasequleni le‐Lahai‐roi." 
Genesis25:12 Ezi ke zizizizukulwana zika‐Shimayeli, unyana ka‐Abrahame, lowo u‐Hagare um‐Jipetekazi, ikobokakazi lika‐Sara, wamzalela u‐Abrahame." 
Genesis25:13 Nanga amagama onyana baka‐Shimayeli, ngamagama abo njengokuzalwa kwabo: owamazibulo ka‐Shimayeli u‐Nebayoti, no‐Kedare, no‐Adebele, no‐Mibisame," 
Genesis25:14 no‐Mishama, no‐Duma, no‐Masa;" 
Genesis25:15 u‐Hadade, no‐Tema; u‐Jeture, u‐Nafishe, no‐Kedema." 
Genesis25:16 Aba bangonyana baka‐Shimayeli, angala̔ namagama abo, ngemizi yabo, nangelali zabo; inkosana ezilishumi linambini njengezizwe zazo." 
Genesis25:17 Yiyo le iminyaka yokuhlala kwake u‐Shimayeli, iminyaka elikulu linamashumi matatu anesixe̔nxe; waza wapuma umpefumlo, wafa, wabutelwa ebantwini bake." 
Genesis25:18 Bema kwa se‐Havila kude kwase‐Shure, engapambi kwe‐Jipete, njengokuba kuyiwa e‐Asiriya: wabubela ebusweni babo bonke abazalwana bake." 
Genesis25:19 EZI ke zizizizukulwana zika‐Yisake, unyana ka‐Abrahame: u‐Abrahame wazala u‐Yisake." 
Genesis25:20 Wabe u‐Yisake eyiminyaka imashumi mane ubudala bake, akumzeka u‐Rebeka, intombi ka‐Betuweli um‐Siriya wase‐Padane‐arame, udade ka‐Labane um‐Siriya, abe ngumfazi wake." 
Genesis25:21 Wamana u‐Yisake emkunga uyehova ngenxa yomfazi wake, ngokuba ebeludlolo; waza uyehova wakungeleka kuye, wada wamita u‐Rebeka umfazi wake." 
Genesis25:22 Kekaloku abantwana babambana embilini wake; waza wati: Nxa kunjalo, kunganina ukuba ndinje nje? Wasuka waya kubuza kuyehova." 
Genesis25:23 Wayesiti uyehova kuye: Zizibini izizwe ezisesizalweni sako; kanjalo zimbini intlobo zabantu abaya kwahluka ematunjini ako; olunye uhlobo lwabantu luya kugqitisa olunye uhlobo lwabantu ngamandla: woti omkulu akonze komncinane. 
Genesis25:24 Kekaloku yakuzaliseka imihla yake ukuba azale, nanga amawele esizalweni sake." 
Genesis25:25 Lapuma elokuqala libomvu, linjengengubo elixonti umzimba wonke; baza balibiza ngegama elingu‐Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Kamva wapuma umninawe walo, osandla sake sabamba isitende sika‐Esau; kwaza kwabizwa igama lake ngo‐Yakobi. Waye u‐Yisake ebeyiminyaka imashumi matandatu ubudala bake, akubazala." 
Genesis25:27 Ada akula amakwenkwe lawo; waza u‐Esau waba yindoda eyazana nokuzingela, indoda yasendle; kanti u‐Yakobi ebeyindoda efaneleyo, imi ezintenteni." 
Genesis25:28 Ute u‐Yisake wamtanda u‐Esau, ngokuba inyama yenyamakazi ibisemlonyeni wake; kodwa u‐Rebeka wamtanda u‐Yakobi." 
Genesis25:29 Kekaloku u‐Yakobi ebepekile umhluzi; wandula ukuza u‐Esau evela endle, waye ecubukile." 
Genesis25:30 Waza wati u‐Esau ku‐Yakobi: Kaundidlise kuko okubomvu, okubomvu oko, ngokuba ndicubukile: bekukona kwabizwa igama lake ngo‐Edome." 
Genesis25:31 Wati u‐Yakobi: Nditengise namhla nje ubuzibulo bako. 
Genesis25:32 Wati u‐Esau: Bona ke, ndiza mna kububa nje, kwondinceda nto nina obubuzibulo?" 
Genesis25:33 Wayesiti u‐Yakobi: Ndifungele namhla nje! Wasuka wamfungela; waza wamtengisa u‐Yakobi ubuzibulo bake. 
Genesis25:34 Wandula u‐Yakobi wamnika u‐Esau isonka nomhluzi welentile; owatya, wasela, wesuka, wemka ke: wenje njalo u‐Esau ukudela ubuzibulo." 
Genesis26:1 KWAYE kuko indlala kwelozwe, ngapandle kweyokuqala indlala, ebiko semihleni ka‐Abrahame. Ngako u‐Yisake waya ku‐Abimeleki, ukumkani wama‐Filistiya, e‐Gerari." 
Genesis26:2 Waza uyehova wabonakala kuye, wati: Ungehli ukuya e‐Jipete; hlala elizweni endiya kukuxelela lona." 
Genesis26:3 Hlala njengowasemzini kwelilizwe, ndize ndibe nawe, ndikutamsanqele: ngokuba kwa kuwe, nakwinzalo yako, ndiya kunika onke lamazwe; nesifungo endandifunga ngaso ku‐Abrahame uyihlo ndiya kusimisa." 
Genesis26:4 Ndandiya kwandisa inzalo yako njengenkwenkwezi zezulu, ndinike nokunika kwinzalo yako onke lamazwe: zoda zitanyusanqeliswe ngayo inzalo yako zonke izizwe zomhlaba;" 
Genesis26:5 ngenxa yokuba epulapule u‐Abrahame ilizwi lam, wagcina ingxelo yam, imiyalelo yam, imimiso yam, nemiteto yam." 
Genesis26:6 Kwa njalo wahlala u‐Yisake e‐Gerari. 
Genesis26:7 Aza amadoda alondawo ambuza ngomfazi wake; wayesiti: Ngudade wam yena; ngokuba ebesoyika ukuti: Ngumfazi wam; hleze ati amadoda alondawo, watsho, andibulale pezu kwo‐Rebeka; ngokuba yena ebemhle ukubonakala kwake." 
Genesis26:8 Kwabekute, nxa abesel elenzile ixesha elide kona, wakangela pandle u‐Abimeleki, ukumkani wama‐Filistiya, ngefenstile, wabona, kekaloku, nankuya u‐Yisake edlala no‐Rebeka umfazi wake." 
Genesis26:9 Waza u‐Abimeleki wambiza u‐Yisake, wati: Ngenyaniso, bona ke, ungumfazi wako yena! bekuyimna ngoko ukuba wabusitsho ukuti: Ngudade wam? Waye u‐Yisake esiti kuye: Ngokuba bendisiti: Hleze ndiya kufa ngenxa yake." 
Genesis26:10 Wati u‐Abimeleki: Yinto nina le uyenzileyo kuti? anga ebeke omnye ebantwini walala nomfazi wako, waza wena wasingenisa etyaleni." 
Genesis26:11 Wandula u‐Abimeleki wabayala abantu bonke, esiti: Ocukumisayo lendoda nomfazi wayo uya kubulawa ngenyaniso." 
Genesis26:12 Waza wahlwayela u‐Yisake elizweni elo, wazuza kwa ngalonyaka amanani angekulu; ngokuba uyehova ebemtamsanqela." 
Genesis26:13 Yaye indoda leyo yaba nkulu, yamana ukwanda ebukulwini, yada yaba nkulu kakulu." 
Genesis26:14 Ngokuba ibinayo imfuyo yezimvu, nemfuyo yenkomo, nento eninzi yezicaka; aza ama‐Filistiya aba nomona ngakuyo." 
Genesis26:15 Ngokuba onke amaqula ezibe ziwembile izicaka zoyise, emihleni ka‐Abrahame uyise, ama‐Filistiya awavingca, awadibelela ngomhlaba kanjalo." 
Genesis26:16 Waza u‐Abimeleki wati kuye u‐Yisake: Uz’ umke kuti: ngokuba usigqitisile ngamandla kakulu. 
Genesis26:17 Wandula u‐Yisake wemka apo, wamisa intente yake entilini yase‐Gerari, wahlala kona." 
Genesis26:18 Wabuya u‐Yisake wemba amaqula amanzi, ababewembile emihleni ka‐Abrahame uyise; ngokuba ama‐Filistiya ebewavingcile emveni kwokufa kuka‐Abrahame; wayebiza amagama awo ngamagama lawo ubewabizile ngawo uyise." 
Genesis26:19 Zaza izicaka zika‐Yisake zemba entilini leyo, zafumana kona iqula lamanzi apilileyo." 
Genesis26:20 Basuka abalusi base‐Gerari bapikisana nabo abalusi baka‐Yisake, besiti: Ngawetu lamanzi! ngako wabiza igama lequla elo nge‐Heseke, ngokokuba bebepikile naye." 
Genesis26:21 Baza balimba elinye iqula, bapikisana napezu kwelo; ngako wabiza igama lalo nge‐Sitena." 
Genesis26:22 Wada wafuduka kona, walimba elinye iqula; elo abapikisana pezu kwalo; ngako wabiza igama lalo nge‐Rehobote, wati: Ngokuba kaloku uyehova esenzele indawo, size sicume kwelilizwe." 
Genesis26:23 Wada wenyuka kona waya e‐Beresheba. 
Genesis26:24 Waye uyehova wabonakala kuye kwa ngobobusuku, wati: Mna ndi ngutixo ka‐Abrahame uyihlo wako; ungoyiki, ngokuba ndinawe; ndandiya kutamsanqela wena, ndiyandise nokuyandisa inzalo yako, ngenxa ka‐Abrahame isicaka sam." 
Genesis26:25 Waza waka apo isibingelo, wabiza egameni likayehova; wayemisa nentente yake kona: zati izicaka zika‐Yisake zalimba kona iqula." 
Genesis26:26 Wasuka u‐Abimeleki waya kuye evela e‐Gerari, kwa no‐Hazute umhlobo wake, no‐Fikoli inkosi yempi yake." 
Genesis26:27 Wayesiti kubo u‐Yisake: Nizele nina nisiza kum, nxa ninditiyileyo, nandindulula kuni?" 
Genesis26:28 Bati bona: Sabona okunene ukuba uyehova unawe: sasisiti ngoko: Makekubeko isifungo pakati kwetu, pakati kwetu nawe; size silwenze ucebano nawe;" 
Genesis26:29 lwokokuba akuyi kusenza into ekohlakeleyo, njengokuba nati singakupatanga kakubi, nanjengokuba sikwenzile wena oko kulungileyo kupela, sada sakundulula ngoxolo. Wena kaloku utanyusanqelwe nguyehova." 
Genesis26:30 Waza wabenzela isidlo, batya basela nokusela." 
Genesis26:31 Baye bevuka kusasa, bafungelana; wandula u‐Yisake wabandulula, baza bemka kuye ngoxolo." 
Genesis26:32 Kwati ke kwa ngalomini, zafika izicaka zika‐Yisake, zashumayela kuye ngendawo yequla ezibe zilimbile, zati kuye: Sifumene amanzi." 
Genesis26:33 Waza walibiza ngegama eliyi‐Sheba: ngako oko igama lesosixeko liyi‐Beresheba kude kwanamhla. 
Genesis26:34 Kekaloku u‐Esau ebeyiminyaka imashumi mane ubudala bake, waza wamzeka abe ngumfazi u‐Judite, intombi ka‐Beri um‐Hete, kwa no‐Basemate, intombi ka‐Eloni um‐Hete:" 
Genesis26:35 abati bona baba bubuṙaṙa bompefumlo ku‐Yisake naku‐Rebeka. 
Genesis27:1 KWAYE kute, nxa abesel’ emdala u‐Yisake, namehlo ake ebeluzizi nje, wada wakohlwa kubona, wandula wambiza u‐Esau, unyana wake omkulu, wati kuye: Nyana wam! Wayesiti kuye: Nanku, ndi lapa." 
Genesis27:2 Waza wati: Bona ke, sendimdala, ndingazi nje imini yokufa kwam." 
Genesis27:3 Uze uti kaloku, utabate izixo̔bo zako, umpongolo wako nesipeta sako, upumele endle, undizingelele inyama yenyamakazi;" 
Genesis27:4 wandule ukundenzela ukutya okumnandi, okunjengoko ndikutandayo, ukuzise kum, ukuba nditye; ukuze umpefumlo wam ukutamsanqele, ndingekati." 
Genesis27:5 Kekaloku u‐Rebeka wabesiva, akuteta u‐Yisake ku‐Esau unyana wake. Wasuka u‐Esau waya endle ukuba azingele inyama yenyamakazi, ayizise." 
Genesis27:6 Waza u‐Rebeka wateta ku‐Yakobi unyana wake, esiti: Bona ke, ndeva uyihlo wako eteta ku‐Esau umkuluwe wako, esiti:" 
Genesis27:7 Ndizisele inyama yenyamakazi, undenzele ukutya okumnandi, ukuba nditye, ndize ndikutamsanqele ebusweni bukayehova, ndingekafi." 
Genesis27:8 Uze uti kaloku, nyana wam! ulipulapule ilizwi lam ngoko ndikuyalela ngako." 
Genesis27:9 Kauhambe ke uye emhlambini, undizekele kwa kona abe mabini amatakane ebokwe alungileyo; ndandiya kwenzela uyihlo ngawo ukutya okumnandi, okunjengoko akutandayo:" 
Genesis27:10 wandule wena ukuzise kuye uyihlo, ukuba atye, ukuze akutamsanqele engekafi." 
Genesis27:11 Waza wati u‐Yakobi ku‐Rebeka unina: Bona ke, u‐Esau umkuluwe wam uyindoda elixonti, kanti mna ndiyindoda egudileyo:" 
Genesis27:12 angati ubawo wondicofa, ndandiya kuba semehlweni ake njengomkohlisi: ngendisandul’ ukuzisa pezu kwam isiqalekiso, ndinga zisi itamsanqeliso." 
Genesis27:13 Wayesiti unina kuye: Sibe pezu kwam isiqalekiswa sako, nyana wam! pulapula kodwa elizwini lam, uye undizekele wona." 
Genesis27:14 Waya ke, wawazeka, wawazisa kunina; waza unina wenza ukutya okumnandi, okunjengoko wakutandayo uyise." 
Genesis27:15 Wandula u‐Rebeka watabata ingubo zika‐Esau, unyana wake omkulu, ezo zinqabileyo, ezibe zikuye endlwini, wamvatisa u‐Yakobi, unyana wake omncinane, ngazo;" 
Genesis27:16 nezintsu zamatakane ebokwe wazifaka pezu kwezandla zake, napezu kwokuguda kwentamo yake:" 
Genesis27:17 waza wanika ukutya okumnandi, nesonka, ezonto abezenzile, esandleni sika‐Yakobi unyana wake." 
Genesis27:18 Wasuka weza kuyise, wati: Bawo! Wayesiti yena: Nanku, ndi lapa; ungubanina wena, nyana wam?" 
Genesis27:19 Wati u‐Yakobi kuyise: Ndingu‐Esau, owamazibulo wako; sendenzile njengoko ubundixelela kona; kauvuke, uhlale, utye kwinyama yam yenyamakazi, ukuze umpefumlo wako unditamsanqele." 
Genesis27:20 Waza wati u‐Yisake kunyana wake: Yinina lento, unxa̔mile kangaka nje ukuyifumana, nyana wam? Wayesiti: Kungokuba uyehova, utixo wako, eyifumananisene nam." 
Genesis27:21 Waza u‐Yisake wati ku‐Yakobi: Kausondele, ukuze ndikucofe, nyana wam! ukuba ukwa nguye unyana wam u‐Esau kusinina." 
Genesis27:22 Waya u‐Yakobi wasondela ku‐Yisake uyise, owamcofa, wati: Ilizwi lilizwi lika‐Yakobi, kanti izandla zizandla zika‐Esau." 
Genesis27:23 Waye engamnakani, ngokuba izandla zake zilixonti, njengezandla zika‐Esau umkuluwe wake; wada wamtamsanqela." 
Genesis27:24 Wayesiti: Ukwa nguye na unyana wam u‐Esau? Wati: Ndinguye. 
Genesis27:25 Waza wati: Yisondeze kum, ukuba nditye kwinyama yenyamakazi yonyana wam, ukuze umpefumlo wam ukutamsanqele. Waza wayisondeza kuye, watya ke; wamzisela neveyine, wasela ke." 
Genesis27:26 Waye u‐Yisake uyise wati kuye: Kausondele, uze undange, nyana wam!" 
Genesis27:27 Wasondela ke, wamanga: waza wasezela ivumba lengubo zake, wamtamsanqela, wati: Bona ke, ivumba lonyana wam linjengevumba lentsimi, ayitamsanqele uyehova;" 
Genesis27:28 wanga utixo akunike kuwo umbete wezulu, nakuko ukutyeba kwomhlaba, nento eninzi yenqolowa neveyine:" 
Genesis27:29 abantu mabakonze kuwe, nezizwe mazitobe pantsi pambi kwako: yiba yinkosi pezu kwabazalwana bako, nonyana bonyoko mabatobe pantsi kuwe: lowo okuqalekisayo, makaqalekiswe yena; nalowo okutamsanqelayo, makatanyusanqelwe naye!" 
Genesis27:30 Kwaye kute, okuya abegqibile u‐Yisake ukutamsanqela u‐Yakobi, cebetshu epumile nje u‐Yakobi ebusweni buka‐Yisake uyise, wandula ukufika u‐Esau, umkuluwe wake, evela ekuzingeleni kwake." 
Genesis27:31 Waye naye ekwenzile ukutya okumnandi, wakuzisa kuyise, wati kuye uyise: Makavuke ubawo, atye kwinyama yenyamakazi yonyana wake, ukuze umpefumlo wako unditamsanqele." 
Genesis27:32 Wati u‐Yisake uyise kuye: Ungubanina wena? Wati: Ndingunyana wako, owamazibulo wako, u‐Esau." 
Genesis27:33 Waza wangcangcazela u‐Yisake ngokungcangcazela okukulu kakulu, wati: Ngubanina ke lowo ozingeleyo inyama yenyamakazi, wayizisa kum, ndada ndatya kuko konke, ungekafiki wena, ndamtamsanqela ke? woba etanyusanqelwa kanjako." 
Genesis27:34 Akuba u‐Esau evile amazwi oyise, wandula ukukala kakulu ngesikulu nesiṙaṙa isikalo, wati kuyise: Nditamsanqele mna nam, bawo!" 
Genesis27:35 Wayesiti: Umninawe wako weza ngobuqokolo, waesusile itamsanqeliswa lako." 
Genesis27:36 Waza wati: Asi ngenene na ukuba kubiziwe igama lake ngo‐Yakobi, endilumkisile lamaxesha mabini nje? ubuzibulo bam wandihluta bona, nanku ke kaloku endihlutile itamsanqeliswa lam. Waza wati: Akundibambelanga nalinye itamsanqeliso na?" 
Genesis27:37 Wapendula u‐Yisake wati ku‐Esau: Bona ke, ndimmisele abe yinkosi kuwe, nabo bonke abazalwana bake ndibanikile kuye babe zizicaka; ndimxasile ngenqolowa nangeveyine kanjalo: yinto nina ke kaloku endiya kuyenzela wena, nyana wam?" 
Genesis27:38 Wayesiti u‐Esau kuyise: Litamsanqeliso linye kupela unalo na, bawo? nditamsanqele mna nam, bawo! Waza u‐Esau wapakamisa ilizwi lake, walila." 
Genesis27:39 Wabuya wapendula u‐Yisake uyise wati kuye: Bona ke, kwa sekutyebeni kwomhlaba kwoba yindawo yokuhlala kwako, nasembeteni wezulu uvela pezulu:" 
Genesis27:40 ngesiṙele sako uya kupila, nomninawe wako uya kumkonza; kanti kuya kuti, nxa unobukosi, uya kwandula ushunqule iyokwe yake entanyeni yako." 
Genesis27:41 KEKALOKU u‐Esau wamzonda u‐Yakobi ngenxa yetamsanqeliso abemtamsanqelisile ngalo uyise; wati ngoko u‐Esau entliziyweni yake: Iza kusondela imihla yokulilela ubawo, endiya kumbulala u‐Yakobi umninawe wam ngayo." 
Genesis27:42 Avakala ku‐Rebeka lamazwi ka‐Esau, unyana wake omkulu, waza watuma wambiza u‐Yakobi, unyana wake omncinane, wati kuye: Bona ke, u‐Esau umkuluwe wako uyazitutuzela pezu kwako, ukuba wokubulala." 
Genesis27:43 Uze uti kaloku, nyana wam! upulapule ilizwi lam, usuke usabele ku‐Labane umkuluwe wam e‐Karane;" 
Genesis27:44 uze uhlale naye ibe yimihla etile, bude bujike ubuṙalaṙume bomkuluwe wako;" 
Genesis27:45 ude umsindo womkuluwe wako upambuke kuwe, aze alibale oko ukwenzile kuye: ndandiya kwandula ukutuma, ndikutabate kona; kunganina ukuba ndinihlutwe nobabini ngemini nye?" 
Genesis27:46 Waza wati u‐Rebeka ku‐Yisake: Ndiyatiya ubomi bam ngenxa yentombi zakwa‐Hete. Ukuba u‐Yakobi uyazeka umfazi ezintombini zakwa‐Hete, kwezinjengezi, ezintombini zakwelilizwe, bondinceda nto nina ubomi bam?" 
Genesis28:1 Wandula u‐Yisake wambiza u‐Yakobi, wamtamsanqela, wamyalela, wati kuye: Uze ungazeki umfazi ezintombini zase‐Kanane." 
Genesis28:2 Suka, uye e‐Padane‐arame, endlwini ka‐Betuweli uyise kanyoko; ude uzeke kona apo umfazi ezintombini zika‐Labane umkuluwe wonyoko." 
Genesis28:3 Wanga utixo onamandla onke angakutamsanqela, akucumise, akwandise nokukwandisa, ukuba ube ngumhlambi wabantu:" 
Genesis28:4 ati kanjalo akunike itamsanqa lika‐Abrahame, kwa wena, nenzalo yako kunye nawe, ukuze ulidle ilifa lalo ilizwe lokupambukela kwako, elona walinika utixo ku‐Abrahame." 
Genesis28:5 Wenje njalo u‐Yisake ukumndulula u‐Yakobi; wasuka waya e‐Padane‐arame, ku‐Labane, unyana ka‐Betuweli um‐Siriya, umkuluwe ka‐Rebeka, oka‐Yakobi noka‐Esau unina." 
Genesis28:6 Kekaloku u‐Esau akubona okokuba u‐Yisake umtamsanqele u‐Yakobi, nokuba wamndulula ukuya e‐Padane‐arame, ukuze azeke kona umfazi; nokuba ute, ekumtamsanqeleni kwake, wamyalela ngokuti: Ungazeki umfazi ezintombini zase‐Kanane;" 
Genesis28:7 nokuba u‐Yakobi wapulapula uyise nonina, waya e‐Padane‐arame;" 
Genesis28:8 akubona u‐Esau kanjalo okokuba intombi zase‐Kanane azilungile emehlweni ka‐Yisake uyise; 
Genesis28:9 wandula waya u‐Esau ku‐Shimayeli, wazeka u‐Mahalate, intombi ka‐Shimayeli, unyana ka‐Abrahame, udade ka‐Nebayoti, ngapezu kwabafazi abesel’ enabo, abe ngumfazi wake." 
Genesis28:10 Wayepuma u‐Yakobi e‐Beresheba, waya ngase‐Karane." 
Genesis28:11 Wada wafika endaweni etile, walalisa kona, ilanga lise litshonile nje; waza watabata ematyeni alondawo, wabekela umqamelelo wake, walala ubutongo kwa kulondawo." 
Genesis28:12 Wapupa ke; kekaloku nantsiya into yokukwela imisiwe emhlabeni, encam yayo yafikelela ezulwini; nanziya nengelosi zikatixo zinyuka zisihla nokuhla ngayo." 
Genesis28:13 Kanjalo, bona ke, uyehova wema pezu kwayo, wati: Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo ka‐Abrahame uyihlo wako, notixo ka‐Yisake: elilizwe ulele ubutongo pezu kwalo, ndolinika kuwe, nakuyo inzalo yako;" 
Genesis28:14 iti inzalo yako ibe njengotuli lwomhlaba; wauya kwanda ngasentshonalanga, nangasempumalanga, nangasenode, nangasesuyide: zaziya kutanyusanqelwa ngawe zonke izizalwane zomhlaba, nangayo inzalo yako." 
Genesis28:15 Kanjalo, bona ke, ndinawe, ndandiya kukugcina apo usukuba usiya kona, ndize ndikubuyisele kwa kwelilizwe; ngokuba ndingayi kukushiya, ndingekakwenzanga oko ndikutetile kuwe." 
Genesis28:16 Waye u‐Yakobi evuka ebutongweni bake, wati: Okwenene uko uyehova kulendawo, ndingazanga nje mna." 
Genesis28:17 Wabesoyika, wati: Hai ukwoyikeka kwalendawo! Le asi nokuba yindlu katixo; kanjalo le lisango lezulu." 
Genesis28:18 Waza u‐Yakobi wavuka kusasa, watabata ilitye abelibekele umqamelelo wake, walimisa libe sisimo sokukumbuza, wagalela ioli pezu kwencam yalo." 
Genesis28:19 Wayebiza igama lalondawo nge‐Betele; kodwa beliyi‐Luze igama lesixeko eso ekuqaleni. 
Genesis28:20 Waza u‐Yakobi wasenza isibambiso, esiti: Nxa utixo aya kuba nam, andigcine kulendlela ndihamba ngayo, andinike isonka sokutya nengubo yokwambata;" 
Genesis28:21 ndide ndibuye ndize ngoxolo endlwini kabawo: uya kwandula uyehova abe ngutixo wam; 
Genesis28:22 nelitye eli, endilimisileyo libe sisimo sokukumbuza, loba yindlu katixo; nako konke uya kundipa kona, ndomana ndinika isishumi sako kuwe." 
Genesis29:1 WASUSA inyawo zake u‐Yakobi, wahambela elizweni labantu basempumalanga." 
Genesis29:2 Waza wakangela, kekaloku naliya iqula endle; kanjalo, nantsiya kona imihlambi emitatu yezimvu zite butu ngakulo; ngokuba kwa kulo iqula elo bekusezwa imihlambi; nelitye elikulu lalipezu kwomlomo wequla." 
Genesis29:3 Kwaye kuhlanganiselwa kona yonke imihlambi; kwaza kwaqengqwa ilitye emlonyeni wequla, kwasezwa izimvu; kwandul’ ukubuyiswa ilitye pezu kwomlomo endaweni yalo." 
Genesis29:4 Wayesiti u‐Yakobi kubo: Bazalwana bam! nivela pina? Bati bona: Sivela tina e‐Karane. 
Genesis29:5 Wati kubo kanjalo: Niyamazi na u‐Labane unyana ka‐Nahore? Bati: Siyamazi. 
Genesis29:6 Waza wati kubo: Upilile na? Bati: Upilile; kanjako nanku u‐Rakele intombi yake esiza nazo izimvu. 
Genesis29:7 Wayesiti: Bona ke, imini isenkulu; asi lixesha lokuhlanganiswa kwenkomo; zisezeni izimvu, nize niye ukwalusa." 
Genesis29:8 Baza bati: Sikohliwe kukwenje njalo, kude kuhlanganiswe yonke imihlambi, na kude kuqengqwe ilitye emlonyeni wequla; sandule siseze izimvu." 
Genesis29:9 Kwa esateta nabo, u‐Rakele weza nezimvu zoyise; ngokuba ebengumalusikazi yena." 
Genesis29:10 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni u‐Yakobi wambona u‐Rakele, intombi ka‐Labane umkuluwe wonina, nezimvu zika‐Labane umkuluwe wonina, wandula ukusondela u‐Yakobi, waqengqa ilitye emlonyeni wequla, waseza izimvu zika‐Labane umkuluwe wonina." 
Genesis29:11 Waye u‐Yakobi wamanga u‐Rakele, wapakamisa ilizwi lake, walila." 
Genesis29:12 Waza u‐Yakobi wamxelela u‐Rakele ukuba ungumalamane kayise, nokuba ungunyana ka‐Rebeka. Wagidima ke, waxela kuyise." 
Genesis29:13 Kwaye kute, akuba u‐Labane evile indaba zika‐Yakobi, unyana wodade wake, wandula wabaleka ukuya kumkaulela, wamsingata, wamanga, wamzisa endlwini yake. Waza wabalisela u‐Labane zonke ezizinto." 
Genesis29:14 Wayesiti u‐Labane kuye: Okwenyaniso ulitambo lam nenyama yam. Waza wahlala naye ixesha lenyanga nye. 
Genesis29:15 Wada wati u‐Labane ku‐Yakobi: Ukuba ungumalamane wam, unge undikonza ngoko na ngesisa? ndixelele, woba yinto nina umvuzo wako?" 
Genesis29:16 Kekaloku u‐Labane ebenentombi zimbini: igama lenkulu ngu‐Leya; igama lencinane ngu‐Rakele. 
Genesis29:17 U‐Leya amehlo ake abetambile; kanti u‐Rakele ubemhle isimilo sake, wamhle nokubonakala kwake kananjalo." 
Genesis29:18 Waye u‐Yakobi emtanda u‐Rakele; wati ngoko: Ndiya kukukonza iminyaka ibe sixe̔nxe, ngenxa ka‐Rakele intombi yako encinane." 
Genesis29:19 Waza wati u‐Labane: Kulungile ukuba ndimnike kuwe, pezu kwokuba ndimnike kwenye indoda; hlala nam." 
Genesis29:20 Wandula u‐Yakobi wakonza iminyaka yasixe̔nxe ngenxa ka‐Rakele; eyaba semehlweni ake njengemihla emincinane, ngokumtanda kwake." 
Genesis29:21 Waza u‐Yakobi wati ku‐Labane: Ndinike umfazi wam, ngokuba isel’ izalisekile imihla yam, ukuze ndingene kuye." 
Genesis29:22 Wandula u‐Labane ukuhlanganisa onke amadoda alondawo, wawenza umtshato." 
Genesis29:23 Kwaye kute ngokuhlwa, watabata u‐Leya intombi yake, wamzisa kuye; waza wangena kuye." 
Genesis29:24 Waye u‐Labane wanika kuye u‐Zilipa ikobokakazi lake, kwa kuye u‐Leya intombi yake, abe likobokakazi." 
Genesis29:25 Kwaza kwati, kwakusa, nanku u‐Leya. Wati ngoko ku‐Labane: Yinto nina le uyenzileyo kum? asi nguye u‐Rakele endibe ndikukonza ngenxa yake yinina? kunganina ke ukuba undibukuqile?" 
Genesis29:26 Wayesiti u‐Labane: Akwenzeki njalo kulendawo yakowetu, ukuba kwendiswe encinane pambili kweyamazibulo." 
Genesis29:27 Zalisekisa iveki yalé, sasiya kwandula sikunike yona nayo, ngokukonza uya kukonza ngako kum ibe iseyimbi iminyaka esixe̔nxe." 
Genesis29:28 Wenza u‐Yakobi kwa ngokunjalo, wazalisekisa iveki yalé. Waza wamnika no‐Rakele, intombi yake, abe ngumfazi wake." 
Genesis29:29 Waye u‐Labane wanika ku‐Rakele intombi yake u‐Bileha ikobokakazi lake, abe likobokakazi kuye." 
Genesis29:30 Wada wangena nakuye u‐Rakele, wamtanda u‐Rakele ngapezu kwake u‐Leya kanjalo; waza wakonza kuye yaiseyimbi iminyaka esixe̔nxe." 
Genesis29:31 Kekaloku akubona uyehova ukuba u‐Leya uyatiywa, wandula wavula isizalo sake; koko u‐Rakele ebeludlolo." 
Genesis29:32 Waza wamita u‐Leya, wazala unyana, wambiza ngegama elingu‐Rubene; ngokuba ebesiti: Ngenyaniso uyehova ukangele imbandezelwa yam; kukona kaloku iya kunditanda indoda yam." 
Genesis29:33 Wabuya wamita, wazala unyana; wati: Ngokokuba uyehova evile ukuba ndiyatiywa, undinikile ngoko ke naló; waza wambiza ngegama elingu‐Simone." 
Genesis29:34 Wabuya wamita, wazala unyana; wati: Kaloku nje indoda yam yozibandakanyela kum, ngokokuba ndimzalele onyana batatu; ngako wambiza ngegama elingu‐Levi." 
Genesis29:35 Wabuya wamita, wazala unyana; wati: Kaloku ndiya kudumisa uyehova; ngako wambiza ngegama elingu‐Juda. Waza wati nqumama ekuzaleni." 
Genesis30:1 Kekaloku akubona u‐Rakele ukuba akazali abantwana ku‐Yakobi, wandula u‐Rakele waba nomona ngakuye udade wake; wayesiti ku‐Yakobi: Ndinike abantwana; okanye ndiya kufa." 
Genesis30:2 Waza wavuta umsindo ka‐Yakobi ngakuye u‐Rakele, wati: Sendisesikundleni sikatixo na, osibambileyo kuwe isixakato sesizalo?" 
Genesis30:3 Wayesiti: Nali ikobokakazi lam u‐Bileha, ngena kuye; waeya kuzala pezu kwamadolo am, ndize ndizuze abantwana nam ngaye." 
Genesis30:4 Waza wamnika u‐Bileha ikobokakazi lake abe ngumfazi; waye u‐Yakobi wangena kuye. 
Genesis30:5 Wada wamita u‐Bileha, wazalela u‐Yakobi unyana." 
Genesis30:6 Waza wati u‐Rakele: Utixo undigwebele, ulivile ilizwi lam kanjalo, wandinika unyana; ngako oko wambiza ngegama elingu‐Dane." 
Genesis30:7 Wabuya wamita u‐Bileha, ikobokakazi lika‐Rakele, wamzalela u‐Yakobi unyana wesibini." 
Genesis30:8 Waza wati u‐Rakele: Ngokuzamana okukulu ndizamene nodade wam, ndeyisile kanjalo; ngako wambiza ngegama elingu‐Nefatali." 
Genesis30:9 Kekaloku akubona u‐Leya ukuba ute nqumama ekuzaleni, wandula watabata ikobokakazi lake u‐Zilipa, wamnika ku‐Yakobi abe ngumfazi." 
Genesis30:10 Wada u‐Zilipa, ikobokakazi lika‐Leya, wazalela u‐Yakobi unyana." 
Genesis30:11 Waza wati u‐Leya: Liyeza iqela! ngako wambiza ngegama elingu‐Gadi. 
Genesis30:12 Waye u‐Zilipa, ikobokakazi lika‐Leya, wamzalela u‐Yakobi unyana wesibini." 
Genesis30:13 Waza wati u‐Leya: Ndinetamsanqa! ngokuba intombi ziya kundibiza ngonetamsanqa; ngako wambiza ngegama elingu‐Ashere. 
Genesis30:14 Wabe u‐Rubene esiya emihleni yokuvunwa kwenqolowa, wafumana idudai endle, weza nazo ku‐Leya unina. Waza wati u‐Rakele ku‐Leya: Zundipe kuzo idudai zonyana wako." 
Genesis30:15 Wayesiti kuye: Kuyinto encinane na ukuyisusa kwako indoda yam, okokuba uya kususa idudai zonyana wam nazo? Wati u‐Rakele: Kukona iya kulala nawe ngobubusuku ngenxa yedudai zonyana wako." 
Genesis30:16 Wati akuza u‐Yakobi evela endle ngokuhlwa, wapuma u‐Leya ukuya kumkaulela, wati: Uya kungena kum; ngokuba ndise ndikuqeshile ngedudai zonyana wam. Waza walala naye ngobusuku obo." 
Genesis30:17 Waye utixo wapulapula ku‐Leya, owamita, wazalela u‐Yakobi unyana wesihlanu." 
Genesis30:18 Waza u‐Leya wati: Utixo undinikile umvuzo wam, ngenxa yokuba ndabendinika ikobokakazi lam endodeni yam; ngako wambiza ngegama elingu‐Yisakare." 
Genesis30:19 Wabuya wamita u‐Leya, wazalela u‐Yakobi unyana wesitandatu." 
Genesis30:20 Waza u‐Leya wati: Utixo undibasele ngebaso elilungileyo; kaloku indoda yam iya kuhlala nam, ngokuba ndimzalele onyana batandatu; ngako wambiza ngegama elingu‐Zebulone." 
Genesis30:21 Wati kamva, wazala intombi, wayibiza ngegama elingu‐Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Waye utixo wamkumbula no‐Rakele; ude utixo wapulapula kuye, wavula isizalo sake." 
Genesis30:23 Waza wamita, wazala unyana; wati: Utixo ukwelelisile udelwa lwam." 
Genesis30:24 Wambiza ngegama elingu‐Josefe, esiti: Uyehova uya kwongeza kum omnye unyana." 
Genesis30:25 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni u‐Rakele abemzele u‐Josefe, wati u‐Yakobi ku‐Labane: Ndindulule, ndize ndiye endaweni yakowetu, nasezweni lam." 
Genesis30:26 Nika abafazi bam, nabantwana bam, endikukonzile ngenxa yabo, ukuze ndimke; ngokuba uyazi wena inkonzo yam endikukonzile ngayo." 
Genesis30:27 Wati u‐Labane kuye: Ukuba kaloku ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, hlala; sendigqalile nje ukuba uyehova unditamsanqele ngetuba lako." 
Genesis30:28 Wayesiti: Ndibalulele umvuzo wako, ndandiya kunika ngako." 
Genesis30:29 Waza wati kuye: Uyazi wena ukuba ndite nina ukukukonza, nokuba zite nina ukubako nam inkomo zako." 
Genesis30:30 Ngokuba okuncinane waunako ndingek ezi, sekwandile kwaba kokuninzi; kanjalo uyehova ukutamsanqele ekuhambeni kwam; kodwa kaloku, kuninina endiya kusebenzela nendlu yam?" 
Genesis30:31 Wayesiti: Ndokunika nto nina? Wati u‐Yakobi: Akuyi kundinika nanye into; ukuba uya kundenzela lento, ndobuya ndiwaluse umhlambi wako ndi wu gcine:" 
Genesis30:32 ndiya kucanda kuwo wonke umhlambi wako namhla nje, ndahlukanise kwa kona onke amatakane enamabala nenamasanaṙa, nawo onke amatakane amfusa pakati kwegusha, nawo anamasanaṙa nanamabala pakati kwebokwe; oba ngumvuzo wam anjalo." 
Genesis30:33 Boda bundinqi̔nele ubulungisa bam ngexesha elisakubako, nxa uzayo pezu kwomvuzo wam, kwa sebusweni bako: zonke ezingenamabala nezingenamasanaṙa pakati kwebokwe, nezingemfusa pakati kwegusha, ezo zikum makutwe zibi̔we." 
Genesis30:34 Wati u‐Labane: Bona ke, kwanga kungaba njengelizwi lako!" 
Genesis30:35 Waza wahlukanisa kwa ngalomini zonke inkunzi zebokwe ezinala nezinamasanaṙa, nazo zonke imazi zebokwe ezinamabala nezinamasanaṙa, nazo zonke bebukuzo ubumhlope, nazo zonke ezimfusa pakati kwegusha, wazinikela esandleni sonyana bake." 
Genesis30:36 Wayemisa ihambo yemihla yamitatu pakati kwake no‐Yakobi: wati u‐Yakobi wayalusa imihlambi ka‐Labane eseleyo. 
Genesis30:37 Wandula u‐Yakobi wazitabatela intswazi zomti welibene oluhlaza, nezoweluze, nezoweharemone, waxwebula kuzo imigca emhlope, ehlubulula ubumhlope obusezintswazini ezo." 
Genesis30:38 Waya wabeka intswazi abezixwebule emijelweni na semikombeni yokuselwa kwamanzi, apo imihlambi yeza kona ukusela, ngapambi kwemihlambi, ukuze ikaule ekuzeni kwayo ukusela." 
Genesis30:39 Yaza yakaula imihlambi ebusweni bentswazi, yandula imihlambi yazala amatakane azinala, nanamabala, nanamasanaṙa." 
Genesis30:40 Namatakane lawo wawahlula u‐Yakobi, wabekisa ubuso bemihlambi ngakuwo azinala, nawo onke amfusa emhlambini ka‐Labane; waza wayibeka eyake imihlambi yodwa, engayibekanga kuwo umhlambi ka‐Labane." 
Genesis30:41 Kwaza kwati, nxa zisukuba zikaula ezomeleleyo emihlambini, wabeka u‐Yakobi intswazi pambi kwamehlo emihlambi emijelweni, ukuze zikaule pakati kwentswazi." 
Genesis30:42 Kodwa nxa zibutataka ezemihlambi, akazibeka; zaza ezibutataka zaba zezika‐Labane, nezomeleleyo zaba zezika‐Yakobi." 
Genesis30:43 Yada indoda leyo yakolisa ukwanda kakulu, yaba nemihlambi yamininzi, nezicaka, nezicakakazi, nenkamela, namaqwaṙashe." 
Genesis31:1 Aza avakala kuyo amazwi onyana baka‐Labane, esiti: Ususile u‐Yakobi konke ubawo wetu abenako; nakuko okube kukokukabawo wetu ubenzile bonke obubutyebi." 
Genesis31:2 Waye u‐Yakobi wabona ubuso buka‐Labane; kekaloku bona ke, babungengakuye njengasexesheni lapambili." 
Genesis31:3 WADA uyehova wati ku‐Yakobi: Buyela elizweni loyihlo bako, nakwisalamane sako; ndandiya kuba nawe." 
Genesis31:4 Waza watuma u‐Yakobi wabiza u‐Rakele no‐Leya beze endle emhlambini wake; 
Genesis31:5 wati kubo: Ndiyabona ubuso boyihlo wenu, ukuba abungakum njengasexesheni lapambili; kodwa utixo kabawo usand’ ukubako nam." 
Genesis31:6 Niyazi nani, ukuba kungawo onke amandla am endikonzile uyihlo wenu." 
Genesis31:7 Kanti uyihlo wenu undixokisile, nomvuzo wam uwuguqule ishumi lamaxesha; kodwa utixo akamvumelanga ukuba andenzele ububi." 
Genesis31:8 Nxa abesitsho ukuti: Lawo anamabala oba ngumvuzo wako; yandula yonke imihlambi ukuzala anamabala: nanxa abesitsho ukuti: Lawo azinala oba ngumvuzo wako; yandula yonke imihlambi ukuzala azinala. 
Genesis31:9 Kunjalo ke utixo ahlutileyo inkomo zoyihlo wenu, wazinika kum." 
Genesis31:10 Kwaye kute, ngexesha lokukaula kwemihlambi, ndapakamisa amehlo am, ndabona epupeni; kekaloku bona ke, inkunzi ezikwela pezu kwemazi zemihlambi zizezizinala, nezinamabala, nezingamaṙwexu." 
Genesis31:11 Yaza yati kum ingelosi katixo epupeni: Yakobi! Ndati mna: Nanku, ndi lapa." 
Genesis31:12 Yayisiti: Zupakamise amehlo ako, ubone; zonke inkunzi ezikwela pezu kwemazi zemihlambi zizezizinala, nezinamabala, nezingamaṙwexu: ngokuba ndikubonile konke u‐Labane akwenzele kona." 
Genesis31:13 Mna ndi ngutixo we‐Betele, apo ubutambisa kona isimo sokukumbuza, na lapo ubusenza kum isibambiso kona: uze kaloku usuke, upume kwelilizwe, ubuyele ezweni lesalamane sako." 
Genesis31:14 Baza bapendula u‐Rakele no‐Leya, bati kuye: Kuseko kuti na isabelwa nelifa endlwini kabawo wetu?" 
Genesis31:15 Asibalelwanga abasemzini nguye na? ngokuba etengisile ngati, nemali yetu ugqibele ukuyidla nayo." 
Genesis31:16 Ngokuba bonke ubutyebi abuhlutileyo utixo kubawo wetu, bubobetu bona, nobonyana betu: ngako kaloku, konke akutshilo utixo kuwe kwenze ke." 
Genesis31:17 Wandula wesuka u‐Yakobi, wakwelisa onyana bake nabafazi bake pezu kwenkamela;" 
Genesis31:18 wafudusa zonke inkomo zake, nayo yonke impahla yake abeyiqwebile, inkomo zokufuya kwake, abeziqwebile e‐Padane‐arame, ukuya ku‐Yisake uyise ezweni le‐Kanane." 
Genesis31:19 Kekaloku u‐Labane ebeyile ukuceba izimvu zake; waza u‐Rakele weba̔ iterati abenazo uyise. 
Genesis31:20 Waye u‐Yakobi wakohlisa intliziyo ka‐Labane um‐Siriya, ekubeni engamxelelanga ukuba uyesaba." 
Genesis31:21 Waya wesaba nako konke abenako; wesuka ke, wawela umlambo, wabeka ubuso bake ngasentabeni ye‐Gileyadi." 
Genesis31:22 Kwaye kuxelwa ku‐Labane ngowesitatu umhla, ukuba usabile u‐Yakobi." 
Genesis31:23 Waza watabata abazalwana bake naye, wamputuma ihambo yemihla esixe̔nxe; bada bamfumana entabeni ye‐Gileyadi." 
Genesis31:24 Koko wezayo utixo ku‐Labane um‐Siriya epupeni ngobusuku, wati kuye: Zilumkele, ukuze ungateti ku‐Yakobi nokulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo." 
Genesis31:25 Waza u‐Labane wamfumana u‐Yakobi. Kekaloku u‐Yakobi ebemisile intente yake entabeni; wati ke no‐Labane wamisa eyake ndawonye nabazalwana bake entabeni ye‐Gileyadi. 
Genesis31:26 Wayesiti u‐Labane ku‐Yakobi: Yinto nina uyenzileyo, ukuba ubukohlisa intliziyo yam, wafudusa intombi zam njengabatinjiweyo ngesiṙele?" 
Genesis31:27 Kunganina ukuba ubusaba ngasese, wandikohlisa; nokuba ubungandixeleli, ukuze ndibe ndikupelekelele ngemigcobo nangengoma, ngentambula nangohadi;" 
Genesis31:28 nokuba ubungandivumeli ukwanga onyana bam nentombi zam? Kaloku wenzile ngobudenge. 
Genesis31:29 Kusemandleni esandla sam ukunenza ububi; kodwa utixo kayihlo wenu wabesitsho kum pezolo ukuti: Zilumkele, ukuze ungateti ku‐Yakobi nokulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo." 
Genesis31:30 Pofu kaloku, unxamele ukumka nje, ngokokuba ubulangazelela indlu kayihlo kakulu, kunganina ukuba ubi̔le otixo bam?" 
Genesis31:31 Waza wapendula u‐Yakobi wati ku‐Labane: Kungokuba bendisoyika; ngokuba bendisiti: Hlezibe uya kuhlasela intombi zako kum. 
Genesis31:32 Lowo ufumana naye otixo bako, makangabi sapila. Kwa pambi kwabazalwana betu kunakane okwako okukum, uze ukutabatele kuwe. Ngokuba ebengazi u‐Yakobi ukuba u‐Rakele ubebi̔le." 
Genesis31:33 Waya u‐Labane wangena ententeni ka‐Yakobi, nasententeni ka‐Leya, nasezintenteni zamakobokakazi omabini, kanti akabafumananga: waza wapuma ententeni ka‐Leya, wangena ententeni ka‐Rakele." 
Genesis31:34 Kekaloku u‐Rakele ebetabatile iterafi, wazibeka pakati kwempahla yenkamela, wahlala pezu kwazo. Waza u‐Labane wabenca intente yonke, kanti akazifumananga." 
Genesis31:35 Wayesiti kuyise: Makungaqumbiseki emehlweni enkosi yam, ukuba ndikohliwe kukusuka ebusweni bako; ngokuba isiko labafazi lipezu kwam. Wafunisa ke, kanti akazifumananga iterafi." 
Genesis31:36 Waza waqumba u‐Yakobi, wapika naye u‐Labane. Wapendula u‐Yakobi wati ku‐Labane: Siyinto nina isigqito sam? siyinto nina isono sam, ukuba unxamele kangaka ukundiputuma?" 
Genesis31:37 Ekubeni uzibencile zonke impahla zam, kuyinto nina uyifumeneyo kuzo zonke impahla zendlu yako? Yibeke apa pambi kwabazalwana bam nabazalwana bako, ukuze balamle pakati kwetu sobabini." 
Genesis31:38 Leminyaka imashumi mabini ndibe ndinawe; igushakazi zako nebokwekazi zako azipunzile, nenkunzi zomhlambi wako andizidlanga." 
Genesis31:39 Leyo iqwengiweyo andiyizisanga kuwe; ndayihlaulela mna; kwa kuso isandla sam wabuyibanga, nokuba ibibi̔we ngemini, nokuba ibibi̔we ngobusuku." 
Genesis31:40 Bendi njalo ke; emini ndadliwa bubushushu, nasebusuku ndadliwa yingqele; kanjalo amehlo am emkelwa bubutongo." 
Genesis31:41 Kunje nje ndibe ndiyiminyaka imashumi mabini endlwini yako: ndakukonza iminyaka yalishumi linemine ngenxa yentombi zako zombini, neminyaka yamitandatu ngenxa yomhlambi wako; wauguqule umvuzo wam ishumi lamaxesha." 
Genesis31:42 Ukuba utixo kabawo wam, utixo ka‐Abrahame, nomoyikwa ka‐Yisake, ebengeko nam, ngenyaniso kaloku unge undindulule zé. Ubunzima bam nomzamo wezandla zam uwubonile utixo, wakwohlwaya pezolo." 
Genesis31:43 Waza wapendula u‐Labane wati ku‐Yakobi: Intombi ezi zintombi zam, nonyana aba bangonyana bam, nemihlambi le yimihlambi yam, nako konke ukubonayo kukokwam: kekaloku ndingenza nto nina kuzo ezintombi zam namhla nje, nakubo onyana bazo, abo zibazeleyo?" 
Genesis31:44 Kaloku kambe, yiza senze ucebano, kwa mna nawe, ukuba lube linqi̔na pakati kwam nawe." 
Genesis31:45 Waza u‐Yakobi watabata ilitye, walipakamisa libe sisimo sokukumbuza." 
Genesis31:46 Wayesiti u‐Yakobi kubazalwana bake: Butani amatye. Baza batabata amatye, benza imfumba; batya kona pezu kwemfumba leyo." 
Genesis31:47 Waye u‐Labane wayibiza ngokuti yi‐Yegare‐sahaduta; kanti u‐Yakobi wayibiza ngokuti yi‐Galedi. 
Genesis31:48 Waza wati u‐Labane: Lemfumba ilinqi̔na pakati kwam nawe namhla nje. Kukona yabizwa ngegama eliyi‐Galedi; 
Genesis31:49 neliyi‐Mitsipa; ngokuba ebesiti: Wanga uyehova angalinda pakati kwam nawe, nxa sifihlelene omnye kwomnye!" 
Genesis31:50 Ukuba uya kubandezela intombi zam, nokuba uya kuzeka abafazi ngapezu kwentombi zam, noko angeko mntu nati, gqala ke, utixo ulinqi̔na pakati kwam nawe." 
Genesis31:51 Walekela u‐Labane wati ku‐Yakobi: Nantsi lemfumba, nasi nesimo esi sokukumbuza, endisipakamisile pakati kwam nawe;" 
Genesis31:52 lemfumba ibe linqi̔na, nesimo esi sokukumbuza sibe linqi̔na, lokuba andiyi kugqita mna kulemfumba ukuza kuwe, nokuba akuyi kugqita wena kulemfumba nakwesisimo sokukumbuza ukuza kum, bube bububi." 
Genesis31:53 Utixo ka‐Abrahame, notixo ka‐Nahore, utixo woyise wabo agwebe pakati kwetu. Waye u‐Yakobi wafunga umoyikwa woyise u‐Yisake." 
Genesis31:54 Waza u‐Yakobi wabingelela umbingelelo entabeni, wabiza abazalwana bake baze batye isonka: baye besitya isonka, balalisa entabeni." 
Genesis31:55 Wavuka u‐Labane kusasa, wanga onyana bake nentombi zake, wabatamsanqela; wandul’ ukumka u‐Labane, wabuyela endaweni yake." 
Genesis32:1 WAHAMBA no‐Yakobi endleleni yake; zaza zahlangana naye ingelosi zikatixo. 
Genesis32:2 Wati u‐Yakobi, xeshekweni azibonileyo: Ngumkosi katixo lo! ngako wabiza igama lalondawo nge‐Mahanayime." 
Genesis32:3 Waza u‐Yakobi wasusa izigidimi zandulele kuye ukuya ku‐Esau umkuluwe wake, ezweni le‐Sehire, ezweni lama‐Edome." 
Genesis32:4 Waziyalela ngokuti: Kunje nje niya kuteta enkosini yam, ku‐Esau: Sitsho isicaka sako u‐Yakobi ukuti: Bendipambukele ku‐Labane, ndalibala kona kwada kwakaloku;" 
Genesis32:5 ndiba nenkabi, namaqwaṙashe, n ezimvu, nezicaka, nezicakakazi; ndanditumile ukushumayeza inkosi yam, ukuze ndifumane ufefe emehlweni ako." 
Genesis32:6 Zada zabuya izigidimi zeza ku‐Yakobi, zisiti: Sasesifika kumkuluwe wako, ku‐Esau; kanjalo uyahamba naye ukuza kukukaulela, enamadoda angamakulu mane kunye naye." 
Genesis32:7 Waza woyika u‐Yakobi kakulu, waxinezeka; waye eqingatisa abantu ababenaye, nezimvu, nenkomo, nenkamela, kube yimikosi mibini;" 
Genesis32:8 ngokuba ebesiti: Ukuba u‐Esau uya kuza kwomnye umkosi, awubete, uya kwandula umkosi oseleyo usinde." 
Genesis32:9 Waza u‐Yakobi wati: Tixo wobawo u‐Abrahame, notixo wobawo u‐Yisake, Yehova owabusiti kum: Buyela elizweni lakowenu, nasesalamaneni sako, ndandiya kukupata ngokulungileyo!" 
Genesis32:10 Ndimncinane mna kuzo zonke izibele, nakuyo yonke inyaniso, ozenzele isicaka sako; ngokuba bekunomsimelelo wam ndawela i‐Yoredane le, kanti kaloku sendiyimikosi mibini." 
Genesis32:11 Zundihlangule esandleni somkuluwe wam, esandleni sika‐Esau; ngokuba ndimoyika yena, hleze uya kuza andibete, kwa n onina kunye nabantwana." 
Genesis32:12 Wabusiti wena kanjalo: Ngenyaniso ndiya kukwenzela okulungileyo, ndenze nenzalo yako ibe njengentlabati yolwandle, engenakubalwa ngenxa yokuba ninzi kwayo." 
Genesis32:13 Waza walalisa kona ngobusuku obo; watabata kuko okwezayo esandleni sake, umnikelo wokunik ela u‐Esau umkuluwe wake:" 
Genesis32:14 imazi zebokwe zamakulu mabini, nenkunzi zebokwe zamashumi mabini; imazi zegusha zamakulu mabini, nenkunzi zegusha zamashumi mabini;" 
Genesis32:15 inkamelakazi ezanyisayo zamashumi matatu, nawo amatole azo; imazi zenkomo zamashumi mane, nenkunzi zenkomo zalishumi; amaqwaṙashekazi amashumi mabini, namaqwaṙashana alishumi." 
Genesis32:16 Waza wazinikela esandleni sezicaka zake, umhlambi ngomhlambi uwodwa; wati kuzo izicaka zake: Yandulelani kum ukuwela, nibeke umgama pakati kwomhlambi nomhlambi." 
Genesis32:17 Wayalela esokuqala ngokuti: Xeshekweni u‐Esau, umkuluwe wam, aya kuhlangana nawe, akubuze, esiti: Ungokabanina wena? uya ngapina? zezikabanina ezi zipambi kwako?" 
Genesis32:18 Wandule uti: Zezesicaka sako zika‐Yakobi, zingumnikelo otunyelweyo inkosi yam u‐Esau; kanjalo, nanku yena esemva kwetu naye." 
Genesis32:19 Wenje njalo ke ukuyalela esesibini, nesesitatu, kwa nabo bonke ababelandela imihlambi, esiti: Kunjengelizwi eli niya kuteta ku‐Esau, nxa nifumanana naye." 
Genesis32:20 Naniya kuti kanjako: Nasi isicaka sako u‐Yakobi sisemva kwetu. Ngokuba ebesiti: Ndiya kuxolisa ubuso bake ngalomnikelo ohambayo pambili kum, ndize nditi kamva, ndibone ubuso bake; kungati wobuka ubuso bam." 
Genesis32:21 Wandula wawela umnikelo lowo ngapambili kuye; kodwa yena walalisa ngobobusuku emnqubeni. 
Genesis32:22 Waza wesuka kwa ngobobusuku, watabata abafazi bake bobabini, namakobokakazi ake omabini, nonyana bake boshumi elinamnye, wawela izibuko le‐Yaboki." 
Genesis32:23 Wayetabata bona, wabaweza umlanjana lowo: waweza oko abenako kanjalo." 
Genesis32:24 Kanti u‐Yakobi wasala yedwa; kwaza kwazamana naye indoda side sapuma isifingo. 
Genesis32:25 Eyati, yakubona ukuba ayimeyisi, yacukumisa ilungu letanga lake; laza laṙuneka ilungu letanga lika‐Yakobi, nxa ibizamana naye." 
Genesis32:26 Yaisiti: Ndiyeke, ngokuba sise sipumile isifingo. Koko wati: Andiyi kukuyeka, kupela nxa unditamsanqeleyo." 
Genesis32:27 Yaza yati kuye: Ngubanina igama lako? Wati: Ngu‐Yakobi. 
Genesis32:28 Yandula yati: Asi ngo‐Yakobi eliya kubuya libizwe igama lako, koko liya kubizwa ngo‐Sirayeli: ngokuba wenzile ngobukosi ngakuye utixo nangakubo abantu, weyisa ke." 
Genesis32:29 Wayebuza u‐Yakobi, wati: Zuxele igama lako. Yaisiti: Kunganina ukuba ubuze igama lam? Yaza yamtamsanqela kona apo." 
Genesis32:30 Waye u‐Yakobi wabiza igama lalondawo nge‐Peniyeli: ngokuba, watsho, ndibonene notixo ubuso ngobuso, wasinda umpefumlo wam noko." 
Genesis32:31 Lakova ilanga ukupuma pezu kwake, xeshekweni abedlula kuyo i‐Penuweli; wabeqwalela etangeni lake." 
Genesis32:32 Ngako oko usapo luka‐Sirayeli alutyi umsipa owabufinyela, lowo upezu kwelungu letanga, kude kube yimini yanamhla; ngokokuba ibicukumisile ilungu letanga lika‐Yakobi emsipeni owafinyelayo." 
Genesis33:1 WAPAKAMISA u‐Yakobi amehlo ake, wakangela; kekaloku nanku u‐Esau esiza, enaye amadoda amakulu mane. Wandula ukwahlulela abantwana ku‐Leya, naku‐Rakele, nakuwo amakobokakazi omabini." 
Genesis33:2 Waza wabeka amakobokakazi nabantwana bawo pambili, no‐Leya nabantwana bake ngasemva, no‐Rakele no‐Josefe ngasemva ngakumbi." 
Genesis33:3 Wasuka yena wandulela kubo ukuwela, waziqubuda ngasemhlabeni amaxesha asixe̔nxe, wada wasondela kumkuluwe wake." 
Genesis33:4 Waza wabaleka u‐Esau ukuya kumkaulela, wamsingata, wawa pezu kwentamo yake, wamanga: balila ke." 
Genesis33:5 Wada wapakamisa amehlo ake, wabona abafazi nabantwana; wati: Bayinto nina aba kuwe? Wayesiti: Ngabantwana abanikileyo utixo ngofefe kwisicaka sako." 
Genesis33:6 Andula asondela amakobokakazi, kwa wona nabantwana bawo, baziqubuda." 
Genesis33:7 Wasondela no‐Leya, nabantwana bake, baziqubuda; nakamva kwasondela u‐Josefe no‐Rakele, baziqubuda nabo." 
Genesis33:8 Waza wati: Uyinto nina kuwe wonke lomkosi bendihlangene nawo? Wayesiti: Ngowokuba ndifumane ufefe emehlweni enkosi yam. 
Genesis33:9 Wati u‐Esau: Kuko kum okuninzi, mninawe wam! makube kokwako oko unako." 
Genesis33:10 Koko u‐Yakobi wati: Makekungabi njalo! ukuba kambe ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, uke uwamkele umnikelo wam esandleni sam; ngokuba kukona endibonileyo ubuso bako, njengokungati ndibonile ubuso bukatixo, waza wakoliswa ndim." 
Genesis33:11 Zulitabate itamsanqa lam eliziswa kuwe, ngokuba utixo endipete ngofefe, nangokuba ndinento zonke. Wamqu̔ba ke, wada walitabata." 
Genesis33:12 Wayesiti: Masinduluke, sihambe; ndandiya kuhamba pambi kwako." 
Genesis33:13 Koko wati kuye: Inkosi yam iyazi ukuba abantwana batambile, nokuba imazi zegusha nezenkomo ezikulelweyo zingakum; kekaloku zakuba ziya kuqu̔tywa kakulu ibe yimini nye, wonke umhlambi uya kufa." 
Genesis33:14 Makeiti inkosi yam idlule pambi kwesicaka sayo; nam ndiya kuhambisa kakuhle, njengokuhamba kwenkomo ezipambi kwam, nanjengokuhamba kwabantwana, ndide ndifike enkosini yam e‐Sehire." 
Genesis33:15 Wati u‐Esau: Makendisalise kuwe inxenye yabantu abanam. Wayesiti: Kwoba nganina oko? mandifumane ufefe emehlweni enkosi yam. 
Genesis33:16 Waza wabuya u‐Esau kwa ngalomini ukuya endleleni yake ngase‐Sehire. 
Genesis33:17 Wasuka u‐Yakobi wahambela e‐Sukote, wazakela indlu, wenzela nenkomo zake amapempe: ngako oko wabiza igama lalondawo nge‐Sukote." 
Genesis33:18 WADA wafika u‐Yakobi ngokunqaba esixekweni se‐Shekeme, esisezweni le‐Kanane, ekuveleni kwake e‐Padane‐arame; wayemisa intente ngapambi kwesixeko." 
Genesis33:19 Wandula watenga isiqendu sentsimi, apo abeyolule kona intente yake, esandleni sosapo luka‐Hamore, uyise ka‐Shekeme, ngekulu lamaqosha emali." 
Genesis33:20 Waza wamisa kona isibingelo, wasibiza ngokuti: Utixo ngutixo ka‐Sirayeli." 
Genesis34:1 Kekaloku wapuma u‐Dina, intombi ka‐Leya, leyo ubeyizalele u‐Yakobi, ukuya kubona intombi zakwelolizwe." 
Genesis34:2 Waza wambona u‐Shekeme, unyana ka‐Hamore um‐Hivi, inkosi yelizwe, owamtabata, walala naye, wamdlwengula." 
Genesis34:3 Kanjalo umpefumlo wake wanamatela kuye u‐Dina, intombi ka‐Yakobi, wayitanda intombi leyo, wateta entliziyweni yayo intombi leyo." 
Genesis34:4 Wada watsho u‐Shekeme ku‐Hamore uyise, esiti: Nditabatele lentombi ibe ngumfazi." 
Genesis34:5 Kwaye kuviwa ngu‐Yakobi ukuba ebemnco̔lisile u‐Dina intombi yake; koko onyana bake bebenenkomo zake ezindle; ngako wati cwaka u‐Yakobi, bada bafika bona." 
Genesis34:6 Wandula wapuma u‐Hamore, uyise ka‐Shekeme, waya ku‐Yakobi, ukuba atete naye." 
Genesis34:7 Bati onyana baka‐Yakobi bavela ezindle, kwakuvakala kubo; aza adandateka amadoda lawo, aqumba kakulu, ngokuba ebenzile okuhlazekileyo kwa‐Sirayeli ngokulala nayo intombi ka‐Yakobi, okunge kungenziwa oko." 
Genesis34:8 Waza u‐Hamore wateta nabo, esiti: u‐Shekeme unyana wam umpefumlo wake uyalangazelela intombi yakokwenu: kaniyinike kuye ibe ngumfazi;" 
Genesis34:9 nize nitshatiselane nati; intombi zenu nizendise kuti, nentombi zetu nizitabate kuni;" 
Genesis34:10 nihlalelane nati; wauya kuti umhlaba ube pambi kwenu; hlalani nitenge kona, nizuze imfuyo kuwo." 
Genesis34:11 Waza u‐Shekeme wati kuyise nakubakuluwe bayo: Mandifumane ufefe emehlweni enu; kwa oko niya kukutsho kum, ndiya kunika kona." 
Genesis34:12 Yandisani pezu kwam kakulu ikazi nebaso, ndandiya kunika njengokuba niya kutsho kum; niti kodwa nindinike intombi ibe ngumfazi." 
Genesis34:13 Bandula onyana baka‐Yakobi bapendula u‐Shekeme no‐Hamore uyise ngenkohliso, (babeteta njalo ngokuba ebemnco̔lisile u‐Dina udade wabo,)" 
Genesis34:14 bati kubo: Sikohliwe kukwenza lento, yokuba sendise udade wetu endodeni esekungalukini, ngokuba bekuya kuba lihlazo oko kuti." 
Genesis34:15 Kungoku kupela esiya kuvumelana nani: Ukuba noba njengati, okokuba kwaluke kuni konke okubudoda:" 
Genesis34:16 siya kwandula sendise intombi zetu kuni, nentombi zenu sizitabate kuti, sihlalelane nani, sibe ngabantu banye." 
Genesis34:17 Kodwa ukuba aniyi kupulapula kuti, okokuba naluke, soza sitabate intombi yakokwetu, simke ke." 
Genesis34:18 Kekaloku amazwi abo abelungile emehlweni ka‐Hamore, nasemehlweni ake u‐Shekeme, unyana ka‐Hamore." 
Genesis34:19 Yati indodana leyo ayalibala ukwenza lento, ngokuba ibikolisiwe yintombi ka‐Yakobi; kanjalo ibibekekile ngapezu kwayo yonke indlu kayise." 
Genesis34:20 Wandula weza u‐Hamore, no‐Shekeme unyana wake, esangweni lesixeko sabo, bateta namadoda asesixekweni sabo, besiti:" 
Genesis34:21 Lamadoda ayaxolana nati; makahlale ngoko elizweni, atenge kulo, nomhlaba (bona ke, ubanzi wona ngamacala onke) maube pambi kwawo: intombi zawo sozitabata kuti zibe ngabafazi, nentombi zetu siya kuzendisa kuwo." 
Genesis34:22 Kungoku kupela aya kuvumelana nati amadoda la, ukuba kuhlalelwane nati, ukuze sibe ngabantu banye: nxa kwalukile kuti konke okubudoda, njengokuba bengabalukileyo bona." 
Genesis34:23 Inkomo zawo, nempahla yawo, nazo zonke izilo zawo, aziyi kuba zezetu na zona? kupela sivumelane nawo, aeya kuhlalelana nati." 
Genesis34:24 Baza bapulapula ku‐Hamore, naku‐Shekeme unyana wake, bonke abapuma ngesango lesixeko sake; baye besaluswa bonke abangamadoda, kwa bonke abapuma ngesango lesixeko sake." 
Genesis34:25 Kwaza kwati ngeyesitatu imini, bakuba besekutyatyambeni, bandula ababini bonyana baka‐Yakobi, u‐Simone no‐Levi, abakuluwe baka‐Dina, batabata iziṙele zabo abanye ngabanye, basizuma isixeko ngobunganga, babulala bonke abangamadoda." 
Genesis34:26 No‐Hamore, no‐Shekeme unyana wake, babebabulala ngohlangoti lwesiṙele, bamsusa u‐Dina endlwini ka‐Shekeme, bapuma ke." 
Genesis34:27 Onyana baka‐Yakobi beza pezu kwababuleweyo, basipanga isixeko, ngenxa yokuba bebenco̔lisile udade wabo." 
Genesis34:28 Izimvu zabo, nenkabi zabo, namaqwaṙashe abo, noko okusesixekweni, noko okusendle, bakususa." 
Genesis34:29 Nabo bonke ubutyebi babo, nabo bonke abantwana babo, nabafazi babo, babatimba, babapanga, kwa nako konke okusendlwini." 
Genesis34:30 Waza u‐Yakobi wati ku‐Simone naku‐Levi: Nindikatazile ngokundinukisa pakati kwabemi belizwe, pakati kwaba‐Kanane, napakati kwama‐Perizi: mna ke ndilula ngabantu nje, baya kuhlanganisana ngakum, bandibulale; ndize nditshatyalaliswe mna nendlu yam." 
Genesis34:31 Bati bona: Nge‐esenza kudade wetu njengakwingnawokazi yinina? 
Genesis35:1 WADA wati utixo ku‐Yakobi: Suka, unyukele e‐Betele, uhlale kona; uze wenze kona isibingelo kutixo, lowo ubebonakala kuwe ekusabeni kwako ebusweni buka‐Esau umkuluwe wako." 
Genesis35:2 Waza u‐Yakobi wati kwabendlu yake, nakubo bonke ababenaye: Kwelelisani otixo basemzini abapakati kwenu, nizicokise, niguqule izivato zenu;" 
Genesis35:3 sisuke ke, sinyukele e‐Betele; ndandiya kusenza kona isibingelo kutixo, lowo ubendipendula ngomhla wobunzima bam, wayeko nam endleleni bendihamba ngayo." 
Genesis35:4 Baza banikela u‐Yakobi bonke otixo basemzini abasesandleni sabo, nawo amacici abekuzo indlebe zabo; owati u‐Yakobi waziselela ngapantsi kwawo umkoba okufupi ne‐Shekeme." 
Genesis35:5 Kwandul’ ukunduluka ke; saye sibako isoyikiso sikatixo pezu kwezixeko ezibangqongayo, baza abantu bazo abaputuma emva kwabo onyana baka‐Yakobi." 
Genesis35:6 Wada wafika u‐Yakobi e‐Luze, esezweni le‐Kanane, ekwa yiyo i‐Betele, yena nabo bonke abantu ababenaye." 
Genesis35:7 Waza waka kona isibingelo, wabiza indawo leyo ngokuti yi‐Ele‐betele; ngokuba bekukona utixo watyileka kuye, akusaba ebusweni bomkuluwe wake." 
Genesis35:8 Kuloko wabubayo u‐Debora, umondlikazi ka‐Rebeka, wancw̔atywa ngasezantsi kwe‐Betele, pantsi kwayo iyeke, egama walibizayo nge‐Alone‐bakute." 
Genesis35:9 Wabuya wabonakala utixo ku‐Yakobi, akuba ebevele e‐Padane‐arame, wamtamsanqela." 
Genesis35:10 Wayesiti utixo kuye: Igama lako ngu‐Yakobi; alisayi kuba sabizwa igama lako ngo‐Yakobi, koko loba ngu‐Sirayeli igama lako; waza wambiza ngegama elingu‐Sirayeli." 
Genesis35:11 Wati utixo kuye: Mna ndi ngutixo onamandla onke; cuma, wande nokwanda; isizwe, kwa nomhlambi wezizwe uya kuvela kuwe, nokumkani baya kupuma esinqeni sako;" 
Genesis35:12 nelilizwe endalinika ku‐Abrahame naku‐Yisake, ndolinika kuwe; nenzalo yako emva kwako ndiya kunika elilizwe nakuyo." 
Genesis35:13 Waza utixo wenyuka kuye, kwa kulondawo apo abetetile naye kona." 
Genesis35:14 Wandula u‐Yakobi wamisa isimo sokukumbuza endaweni apo abetetile naye kona, isimo sokukumbuza samatye; watulula pezu kwaso umnikelo wokusela, wagalela pezu kwaso neoli." 
Genesis35:15 Waye u‐Yakobi wabiza igama lalondawo, apo utixo ebetetile naye kona, nge‐Betele." 
Genesis35:16 Bada banduluka e‐Betele: kwaye kuseko indawana yomhlaba ukuba kufikwe e‐Eferata; wandula wazala u‐Rakele, okwakunzima kuye ekuzaleni kwake." 
Genesis35:17 Kwaza kwati, kwakuba kunzima kuye ekuzaleni kwake, umzalisikazi wati kuye: Ungoyiki, ngokuba nalonyana uya kuba naye." 
Genesis35:18 Kwaza kwati, ekupumeni kwompefumlo wake, (ngokuba wafayo,) wambiza ngegama elingu‐Benoni; kanti uyise wambiza ngegama elingu‐Benjamine." 
Genesis35:19 Wafa njalo u‐Rakele, wancw̔atywa endleleni yase‐Eferata, ekwa yiyo i‐Beteleheme." 
Genesis35:20 Waye u‐Yakobi wamisa isimo sokukumbuza pezu kwencw̔aba lake: eso sisimo sokukumbuza sencw̔aba lika‐Rakele kude kube yimini yanamhla. 
Genesis35:21 Wasuka wahamba u‐Sirayeli, wayolula intente yake ele kwe‐Migidale‐hedere." 
Genesis35:22 Kwaye kute, nxa u‐Sirayeli abehlala kwelozwe, waya u‐Rubene walala no‐Bileha, ishweshwe likayise: weva ke u‐Sirayeli. KEKALOKU onyana baka‐Yakobi bebelishumi elinababini." 
Genesis35:23 Onyana baka‐Leya; ngowamazibulo ka‐Yakobi u‐Rubene, no‐Simone, no‐Levi, no‐Juda, no‐Yisakare, no‐Zebulone." 
Genesis35:24 Onyana baka‐Rakele; ngu‐Josefe, no‐Benjamine." 
Genesis35:25 Nonyana baka‐Bileha, ikobokakazi lika‐Rakele; ngu‐Dane, no‐Nefatali." 
Genesis35:26 Nonyana baka‐Zilipa, ikobokakazi lika‐Leya; ngu‐Gadi, no‐Ashere. Aba bangonyana baka‐Yakobi, abebezelwe kuye e‐Padane‐arame." 
Genesis35:27 Wada u‐Yakobi weza ku‐Yisake uyise e‐Mamre, e‐Kiriyate‐areba, ekwa yiyo i‐Hebrone, apo babepambukele kona u‐Abrahame no‐Yisake." 
Genesis35:28 Kekaloku imihla ka‐Yisake ibiyelikulu linamashumi asibozo iminyaka. 
Genesis35:29 Wada wapuma umpefumlo u‐Yisake, wafa, wabutelwa ebantwini bake, emdala, ezele yimihla; baza onyana bake u‐Esau no‐Yakobi bamncw̔aba." 
Genesis36:1 EZI ke zizizizukulwana zika‐Esau, onguye u‐Edome." 
Genesis36:2 U‐Esau wazeka abafazi bake ezintombini zase‐Kanane: engu‐Hada, intombi ka‐Eloni um‐Hete; no‐Holibama, intombi ka‐Hana, intombi ka‐Tsibone um‐Hivi;" 
Genesis36:3 no‐Basemate, intombi ka‐Shimayeli, udade ka‐Nebayoti." 
Genesis36:4 Wati u‐Hada wamzalela u‐Esau u‐Elifazi; no‐Basemate wazala u‐Rehule; 
Genesis36:5 no‐Holibama wazala u‐Yehushe, no‐Yalame, no‐Kora. Aba bangonyana baka‐Esau, abebezelwe kuye elizweni le‐Kanane." 
Genesis36:6 Wada u‐Esau watabata abafazi bake, nonyana bake, nentombi zake, nabo bonke abantu bendlu yake, nenkomo zake, nazo zonke izilo zake, nayo yonke impahla yake abeyiqwebile elizweni le‐Kanane, waya kw elinye ilizwe ngenxa ka‐Yakobi umninawe wake." 
Genesis36:7 Ngokuba ubutyebi babo bebubukulu kukuba kuhlalwe ndawonye; laye ilizwe lokupambukela kwabo libe likohliwe kukubatwala, ngetuba lenkomo zabo." 
Genesis36:8 Wati ngoko u‐Esau wahlala entabeni ye‐Sehire. U‐Esau unguye u‐Edome. 
Genesis36:9 Kekaloku ezi zizizizukulwana zika‐Esau, uyise wama‐Edome entabeni ye‐Sehire." 
Genesis36:10 Ngawo la amagama onyana baka‐Esau: ngu‐Elifazi, unyana ka‐Hada, umfazi ka‐Esau; ngu‐Rehule, unyana ka‐Basemate, umfazi ka‐Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Onyana baka‐Elifazi bebengu‐Temani, u‐Womare, u‐Tsefo, no‐Gatame, no‐Kenazi." 
Genesis36:12 Wabe u‐Timna elishweshwe lika‐Elifazi, unyana ka‐Esau; owamzalela u‐Elifazi u‐Amaleki: aba bangonyana baka‐Hada, umfazi ka‐Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Ngaba nonyana baka‐Rehule; ngu‐Nahate, no‐Zera, n o‐Shama, no‐Miza: aba bebengonyana baka‐Basemate, umfazi ka‐Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Naba babengonyana baka‐Holibama, intombi ka‐Hana, intombi ka‐Tsibone, umfazi ka‐Esau; wamzalela u‐Esau u‐Yehushe, no‐Yalame, no‐Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Ezi ke zinkosana zivela konyana baka‐Esau: kubo onyana baka‐Elifazi, owamazibulo ka‐Esau; inkosana engu‐Temani, inkosana engu‐Womare, inkosana engu‐Tsefo, inkosana engu‐Kenazi," 
Genesis36:16 inkosana engu‐Kora, inkosana engu‐Gatame, inkosana engu‐Amaleki: aba bazinkosana zivela kuye u‐Elifazi elizweni le‐Edome; aba bangonyana baka‐Hada." 
Genesis36:17 Naba bangonyana baka‐Rehule, unyana ka‐Esau; inkosana engu‐Nahate, inkosana engu‐Zera, inkosana engu‐Shama, inkosana engu‐Miza: aba bazinkosana zivela kuye u‐Rehule elizweni le‐Edome; aba bangonyana baka‐Basemate, umfazi ka‐Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Naba bangonyana baka‐Holibama, umfazi ka‐Esau; inkosana engu‐Yehushe, inkosana engu‐Yalame, inkosana engu‐Kora: aba bazinkosana zivela kuye u‐Holibama, intombi ka‐Hana, umfazi ka‐Esau." 
Genesis36:19 Aba ke bangonyana baka‐Esau, naba bazinkosana zivela kubo: ngu‐Edome lowo." 
Genesis36:20 Aba bangonyana baka‐Sehire um‐Hori, abemayo elozwe; u‐Lotane, no‐Shobali, no‐Tsibone, no‐Hana," 
Genesis36:21 no‐Dishone, no‐Etsere, no‐Dishane: aba bazinkosana zama‐Hori, onyana baka‐Sehire, elizweni le‐Edome." 
Genesis36:22 Nonyana baka‐Lotane babengu‐Hori, no‐Hemame: nodade ka‐Lotane ngu‐Timna." 
Genesis36:23 Naba bangonyana baka‐Shobali; u‐Alevane, no‐Manahate, no‐Hebali, n o‐Shefo, no‐Oname." 
Genesis36:24 Naba bangonyana baka‐Tsibone; u‐Aya, no‐Hana: nguye u‐Hana lo owafumana imitombo eshushu entlango, nxa abesalusa amaqwaṙashe ka‐Tsibone uyise." 
Genesis36:25 Naba bangonyana baka‐Hana: u‐Dishone: no‐Holibama uyintombi ka‐Hana. 
Genesis36:26 Naba bangonyana baka‐Dishone; u‐Hemdane, no‐Shebane, no‐Yiterane, no‐Kerane." 
Genesis36:27 Ngaba onyana baka‐Etsere; u‐Bilehane, no‐Zavane, no‐Hakane." 
Genesis36:28 Ngaba onyana baka‐Dishane; u‐Hutse, no‐Arane." 
Genesis36:29 Ezi ke zinkosana zama‐Hori; inkosana engu‐Lotane, inkosana engu‐Shobali, inkosana engu‐Tsibone, inkosana engu‐Hana," 
Genesis36:30 inkosana engu‐Dishone, inkosana engu‐Etsere, inkosana engu‐Dishane: aba bazinkosana zama‐Hori, pakati kwenkosana zawo elizweni le‐Sehire." 
Genesis36:31 Naba bangokumkani abapata ubukosi elizweni le‐Edome, kungekabiko ukumkani opata ubukosi pezu kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Genesis36:32 Waba ngukumkani e‐Edome u‐Bela, unyana ka‐Behori; negama lesixeko sake laliyi‐Dinaba." 
Genesis36:33 Wada wafa u‐Bela, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Jobabe, unyana ka‐Zera, owase‐Botsera." 
Genesis36:33 Wada wafa u‐Bela, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Jobabe, unyana ka‐Zera, owase‐Botsera." 
Genesis36:34 Wafa u‐Jobabe, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Hushame, owasezweni lama‐Temani." 
Genesis36:34 Wafa u‐Jobabe, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Hushame, owasezweni lama‐Temani." 
Genesis36:35 Wafa u‐Hushame, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Hadade, unyana ka‐Bedade, owabeta ama‐Midiyane ezindleni zakwa‐Mowabi; negama lesixeko sake laliyi‐Haviti." 
Genesis36:36 Wafa u‐Hadade, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Samla, owase‐Masereka." 
Genesis36:37 Wafa u‐Samla, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Saule, owase‐Rehobote ngasemlanjeni." 
Genesis36:38 Wafa u‐Saule, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Balihanane, unyana ka‐Kabore." 
Genesis36:39 Wafa u‐Balihanane, unyana ka‐Kabore, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Hadare; negama lesixeko sake laliyi‐Pahu; negama lomfazi wake lalingu‐Mehetabele, intombi ka‐Materede, intombi ka‐Mezahabi." 
Genesis36:40 Ngawo la namagama enkosana zivela kuye u‐Esau, ngezizalwane zazo, ngendawo zazo, ngamagama azo; inkosana engu‐Timna, inkosana engu‐Aleva, inkosana engu‐Yetete," 
Genesis36:41 inkosana engu‐Holibama, inkosana engu‐Ela, inkosana engu‐Pinone," 
Genesis36:42 inkosana engu‐Kenazi, inkosana engu‐Temani, inkosana engu‐Mibitsare," 
Genesis36:43 inkosana engu‐Magidele, inkosana engu‐Hirame: aba bazinkosana zama‐Edome, ngendawo zabo zokuhlala elizweni lokufuya kwabo: ngu‐Esau lo, uyise wama‐Edome." 
Genesis37:1 KEKALOKU u‐Yakobi wahlala elizweni lokupambukela kwoyise, elizweni le‐Kanane." 
Genesis37:2 Ezi ke zizizizukulwana zika‐Yakobi. U‐Josefe, eyiminyaka ilishumi linesixe̔nxe ubudala bake, ebesalusa igusha kunye nabakuluwe bake; waye umfana lo wanabo onyana baka‐Bileha nonyana baka‐Zilipa, abafazi boyise: waza wazisa u‐Josefe amaṙeto amabi ngabo kuye uyise wabo." 
Genesis37:3 Waye u‐Sirayeli watanda u‐Josefe ngapezu kwabo bonke onyana bake, ngokuba ebengunyana wobuxego bake; wayemenzele ingubo yamabala ngamabala." 
Genesis37:4 Baza abakuluwe bake, bakubona ukuba uyise wabo uyamtanda ngapezu kwabo bonke abakuluwe bake, bamzonda, bakohlwa nakukuteta naye ngoxolo." 
Genesis37:5 Waye u‐Josefe wapupa ipupa, walixela kubakuluwe bake; baza bongezelela ukumzonda ngakumbi." 
Genesis37:6 Wayesiti kubo: Kanipulapule elipupa endilipupileyo. 
Genesis37:7 Kekaloku bona ke, sibe sibopa izitungu pakati kwentsimi; kanjalo bona ke, sesuka isitungu sam, sapakama nokupakama; kanjako bona ke, izitungu zenu zema ngokungqonga, zatoba pantsi pambi kwesitungu sam." 
Genesis37:8 Bati kuye abakuluwe bake: Uya kupata amandla pezu kwetu ngenene na? woba nobukosi pezu kwetu ngenene na? Baza bongezelela ukumzonda ngakumbi, ngenxa yamapupa ake, nangenxa yamazwi ake." 
Genesis37:9 Wabuya wapupa nelinye ipupa, wabalisa kwa lona kubakuluwe bake; wati: Bona ke, ndipupile ipupa kanjako; kekaloku bona ke, ilanga, nenyanga, nenkwenkwezi zilishumi elinanye, zatoba pantsi pambi kwam." 
Genesis37:10 Wati akuba ebalisele uyise nabakuluwe bake, wandula uyise wamkalimela, wati kuye: Yinto nina elipupa ulipupileyo? Size ngenyaniso na, mna, nonyoko, nabakuluwe bako, sitobe pantsi pambi kwako ngasemhlabeni?" 
Genesis37:11 Baye benomona ngakuye abakuluwe bake; kanti uyise wagqala isiteto eso. 
Genesis37:12 Basuka abakuluwe bake baya kwalusa igusha zoyise e‐Shekeme. 
Genesis37:13 Waza u‐Sirayeli wati ku‐Josefe: Abakuluwe bako abalusi e‐Shekeme na? Yiza, ndikutume kubo. Wayesiti: Nanku, ndi lapa." 
Genesis37:14 Wandul’ ukuti kuye: Zuye ukangele ukupila kwabakuluwe bako, nokupila kwegusha, ukuba kunjanina, ubuye uze kum nelizwi. Waza wamsusa emhlanjeni wase‐Hebrone, wada wafika e‐Shekeme." 
Genesis37:15 Yaza yafumanana naye indoda: ngokuba, bona ke, ebedungudela ezindle; yambuza indoda leyo ngokuti: Ufuna nto nina?" 
Genesis37:16 Wayesiti: Ndifuna abakuluwe bam; zundityele ke apo balusa kona. 
Genesis37:17 Yati indoda: Bandulukile apa; ngokuba kendeva besiti: Masiye e‐Dotane. Waza u‐Josefe waputuma abakuluwe bake, wabafumana e‐Dotane." 
Genesis37:18 Bati bakumbona esekude, kwa engekasondeli kubo, bamceba ukuba bamfise." 
Genesis37:19 Baye besiti omnye kwomnye: Nanku lompupi esiza! 
Genesis37:20 Yizani ke kaloku, size simbulale, simpose kwomnye waleminxuma; sasiya kuti: Udliwe liṙamncwa; sandule sibone ukuba oba yinto nina amapupa ake." 
Genesis37:21 Koko wevayo u‐Rubene, wamhlangula ezandleni zabo; wati: Masingambulali ubomi." 
Genesis37:22 Walekela u‐Rubene ukuti kubo: Ningapalazi igazi; mposeni kulomnxuma osentlango, ningabeki isandla pezu kwake. Watsho ngokunga angamhlangula ezandleni zabo, ukuze ambuyisele kuyise." 
Genesis37:23 Kwaza kwati, nxa abefikile u‐Josefe kubakuluwe bake, bandula bamhluba u‐Josefe ingubo yake, ingubo yamabala ngamabala ebikuye;" 
Genesis37:24 bamtabata, bamposa emnxunyeni: koko umnxuma ubuzé, engeko manzi kuwo." 
Genesis37:25 Baya bahlala pantsi ukutya isonka; baza bapakamisa amehlo abo, bakangela; kekaloku nali iqela lama‐Shimayeli livela e‐Gileyadi, nenkamela zawo zitwele inekote, netsori, nelote, ehamba ukuya kuzihlisela e‐Jipete." 
Genesis37:26 Waza u‐Juda wati kubazalwana bake: Kwonceda nto nina, ukuba sibulale umninawe wetu, sifihle negazi lake?" 
Genesis37:27 Yizani, size simtengise kuma‐Shimayeli, siti esetu isandla singabi pezu kwake; ngokuba engumninawe wetu, eyinyama yetu. Baye be m pulapula abazalwana bake." 
Genesis37:28 Kwandu ukudlula ama‐Midiyane, engabatengi; baza bar̔ola banyusa u‐Josefe emnxunyeni, bamtengisa u‐Josefe kuma‐Shimayeli lawo nge shekele zesilivere ezimashumi; mabini; ati wona amsa u‐Josefe e‐Jipete." 
Genesis37:29 Kekaloku akuba u‐Rubene ebuyele kuwo umnxuma, bona ke, wayengeko u‐Josefe emnxunyeni; waza waṙazula izivato zake." 
Genesis37:30 Wasuka wabuyela kubaninawe bake, wati: Umfana akako; nam ke, ndoya ngapina?" 
Genesis37:31 Baza batabata ingubo ka‐Josefe, baxe̔la itakane lebokwe, bayifaka ingubo egazini." 
Genesis37:32 Bandula ukutuma ingubo yamabala ngamabala, bayisa kuyise, bati: Le siyifumene; kaunakane ukuba iyingubo yonyana wako na, asi yiyo kusinina." 
Genesis37:33 Wayinakana, wati: Yingubo yonyana wam; udliwe liṙamncwa; ngenyaniso uqwengiwe u‐Josefe." 
Genesis37:34 Waza u‐Yakobi waṙazula izivato zake, wabeka intlakantlaka esinqeni sake, walilela unyana wake imihla yamininzi." 
Genesis37:35 Bandula besuka bonke onyana bake, nazo zonke intombi zake, ukuza kumku̔za; koko walayo ukuku̔zeka; wayesiti: Ngokuba ndiya kuhla ndilila nje ukuya kunyana wam encw̔abeni. Wamlilela njalo ke uyise." 
Genesis37:36 Ati ama‐Midiyane amsa e‐Jipete amtengisa ku‐Potifare, umbusi ka‐Faro, inkosi yomlisela." 
Genesis38:1 KWABEKUTE ngeloxesha, wehla u‐Juda kubazalwana bake, waya wapambukela endodeni engum‐Hadulame, egama lalingu‐Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Wayebona apo u‐Juda intombi yendoda engum‐Kanane, egama lalingu‐Shuha; waza wamzeka, wangena kuye." 
Genesis38:3 Wandula wamita, wazala unyana; waye u‐Juda wambiza ngegama elingu‐Here." 
Genesis38:4 Wabuya wamita, wazala unyana, wambiza ngegama elingu‐Onane." 
Genesis38:5 Wongezelela ukumita nakanjako, wazala unyana, wambiza ngegama elingu‐Shela: wayeko uyise e‐Kezibe akumzala." 
Genesis38:6 Wada u‐Juda wamtabatela u‐Here, owamazibulo wake, umfazi, ogama lalingu‐Tamare." 
Genesis38:7 Kodwa u‐Here, owamazibulo ka‐Juda, ebekohlakele emehlweni kayehova; ngako uyehova wambubisa." 
Genesis38:8 Waza u‐Juda wati ku‐Onane: Ngena emfazini womkuluwe wako, umzeke egameni lake, uze umvusele umkuluwe wako inzalo." 
Genesis38:9 Wayekwazi u‐Onane ukuba lenzalo ibingayi kuba yeyake; kwaza kwati, akuba engenile emfazini womkuluwe wake, wacitela ngasemhlabeni, ukuze anganiki inzalo kumkuluwe wake." 
Genesis38:10 Kodwa kwakubi emehlweni kayehova oko wakwenzayo; ngako wambubisa naye. 
Genesis38:11 Waza wati u‐Juda ku‐Tamare umolokazana wake: Hlala ungumhlolokazi endlwini kayihlo, ade akule u‐Shela unyana wam: ngokuba ebesiti: Hleze uya kububa naye, njengabakuluwe bake. Wandula wemka u‐Tamare, waya wahlala endlwini kayise." 
Genesis38:12 Kuse kuntsuku ninzi yafa intombi ka‐Shuha, umfazi ka‐Juda; wada watutuzeleka u‐Juda, wenyuka ukuya kubacebi begusha zake, kwa yena no‐Hira umhlobo wake um‐Hadulame, e‐Timna." 
Genesis38:13 Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Tamare ngokuti: Bona ke, usondoda wako uyanyuka ukuya e‐Timna, acebe igusha zake." 
Genesis38:14 Waza wasusa ingubo zobuhlolokazi bake kwa kuye, wazigubungela ngesigqubutelo, wazinameka, waya wahlala pantsi ngasesangweni le‐Henayime, ebingasendleleni yokuya e‐Timna; ngokuba ebebona ukuba usel’ ekulile u‐Shela, kanti akanikwanga kuye abe ngumfazi noko." 
Genesis38:15 Kekaloku u‐Juda, akumbona, waba uyingnawokazi, ngokokuba egubungele ubuso bake." 
Genesis38:16 Waza wajikela kuye ngasendleleni, wati: Kauze ke, ndingene kuwe; (ngokuba ebengazi ukuba ungumolokazana wake yena.) Wayesiti: Uya kundinika nto nina, ukuze ungene kum?" 
Genesis38:17 Wati: Ndiya kukupa itakane lebokwe emhlambini. Wayesiti: Wondinika isibambiselo na, ude utume ke?" 
Genesis38:18 Waza wati: Sesinina isibambiselo endiya kusinika kuwe? Wati: Ngumsesane wako, nentsontelo yako, nomsimelelo wako osesandleni sako. Wamnika ke, wangena kuye, waye yena wakaula ngaye." 
Genesis38:19 Wandula wesuka, wemka ke, wasusa isigqubutelo sake kwa kuye, wambata ingubo zobuhlolokazi bake." 
Genesis38:20 Wati u‐Juda watuma itakane lebokwe ngesandla somhlobo wake um‐Hadulame, ukuze asamkele isibambiselo eso esandleni somfazi: kodwa akamfumana." 
Genesis38:21 Waza wabuza abantu basendaweni yake, esiti: Upina umpinyiswa obese‐Henayime ngasendleleni? Bati: Akwabiko apa umpinyiswa." 
Genesis38:22 Wada wabuyela ku‐Juda, wati: Andingemfumane; kanjalo nabantu balondawo bati: Akwabiko apa umpinyiswa." 
Genesis38:23 Wayesiti u‐Juda: Makazitabatele sona, hleze sihlaziswe; bona ke, ndatuma elitakane, kanti wena akumfumananga." 
Genesis38:24 Kwaye kute, sekunyanga zanga zintatu, kwaxelwa ku‐Juda ngokuti: Wenzile umbulo u‐Tamare, umolokazana wako; nakanjako, bona ke, umiti ngombulo. Waza wati u‐Juda: Mvelise, atshiswe!" 
Genesis38:25 Kekaloku akuveliswa, wandula watuma kusondoda wake ukuti: Indoda ezizezayo ezi zinto, ndimitisiwe kwa yiyo; wati kanjalo: Uze unakane ungokabanina lomsesane, nalentsontelo, nalomsimelelo." 
Genesis38:26 Waye u‐Juda wazinakana, wati: Undigqitisile ngokulunga; ngenxa yokuba ndingamnikanga ku‐Shela unyana wam. Waye engasongezi ukumazi." 
Genesis38:27 Kwaye kute, ngexesha lokuba azale, nanga amawele esizalweni sake." 
Genesis38:28 Kwaza kwati, ekuzaleni kwake, elinye lapumisa isandla; wasitabata umzalisikazi, wabopa pezu kwesandla salo usinga olubomvu, esiti: Eli lapuma kuqala." 
Genesis38:29 Kwabekute kekaloku, nxa libuyisile isandla salo, bona ke, wapuma umninawe walo. Waza wati: Ute nina ukugqoboza? makube pezu kwako ukugqoboza oku! Ngako kwabizwa igama lake ngo‐Faretse." 
Genesis38:30 Kwati kamva, wapuma umkuluwe wake, lowo lube lupezu kwesandla sake usinga olubomvu: kwaye kubizwa igama lake ngo‐Zera." 
Genesis39:1 KEKALOKU u‐Josefe wabehliselwe e‐Jipete; waza u‐Potifare, umbusi ka‐Faro, inkosi yomlisela, indoda engum‐Jipete, wamtenga esandleni sama‐Shimayeli, abemhlisele kona." 
Genesis39:2 Waza uyehova wanaye u‐Josefe, wada waba yindoda enokutamsanqeleka; waye esendlwini yenkosi yake, yom‐Jipete." 
Genesis39:3 Yabona inkosi yake ukuba uyehova unaye, nokuba konke akwenzayo, uyehova uyatamsanqelekisa kona esandleni sake." 
Genesis39:4 Wandula u‐Josefe wafumana ufefe emehlweni ayo, wayikonza: kanjako yamongamisa pezu kwendlu yayo, nako konke ibinako yakunikela esandleni sake."
