Genesis39:5 Kwaza kwati kuseloko yabimongamisa pezu kwendlu yayo, napezu kwako konke inako, watamsanqela uyehova indlu yom‐Jipete ngenxa yake u‐Josefe; lide labako itamsanqeliso likayehova pezu kwako konke inako, endlwini nasendle." 
Genesis39:6 Yabishiya konke inako esandleni sika‐Josefe; yayingayazi nanto ebi kuye, kupela isonka eyasityayo. Kekaloku u‐Josefe ubemhle isimilo sake, wamhle nokubonakala kwake." 
Genesis39:7 Kwaye kute emveni kwezizinto, umfazi wenkosi yake wajolisa amehlo ake ngaku‐Josefe; wati: Uz’ undilale!" 
Genesis39:8 Koko walayo, wati emfazini wenkosi yake: Bona ke, inkosi yam ayikwazi oko kukum endlwini; nako konke inako ikunikele esandleni sam." 
Genesis39:9 Akuko mntu kulendlu omkulu kum; yayingabambanga nto kum, kupela wena, ngokokuba ungumfazi wayo; ndingati nina ke ukwenza obububi bukulu, ndone ngakuye utixo?" 
Genesis39:10 Kwaye kute, akuteta no‐Josefe imihla ngemihla, akampulapulanga noko ukuba alale ngakuye, nokuba abe ndawonye naye." 
Genesis39:11 Kwada kwati ngomhla otile, wangena u‐Josefe endlwini ukuze awenze umsebenzi wake; kwaye kungeko kona endlwini nanye emadodeni endlu." 
Genesis39:12 Waza wambamba ngengubo yake, esiti: Uz’ undilale! Koko washiya ingubo yake esandleni sake, wabaleka, wapuma ngapandle." 
Genesis39:13 Kwaza kwati, akubona ukuba ushiyile ingubo yake esandleni sake, nokuba ubalekele pandle," 
Genesis39:14 wabiza amadoda endlu yake, watsho kuwo esiti: Bonani ke, inkosi ingenisile kuti indoda engum‐Hebere, ukuba idlale ngati; yangena kum ukuza kulala nam, ndaza ndakala ngelizwi elikulu:" 
Genesis39:15 kwaza kwati, yakuva ukuba ndipakamisile ilizwi lam, ndakala, yaselishiya ingubo yayo ngakum, yabaleka, yapuma ngapandle." 
Genesis39:16 Waye ingubo yayo wayibekela ngakuye, ide yafika inkosi yayo ekaya." 
Genesis39:17 Wandula wateta nayo kwa njengalamazwi, esiti: Sangena kum isicaka esingum‐Hebere, eso wabusizisa kuti, ukuza kudlala ngam:" 
Genesis39:18 kwaza kwati, ndakupakamisa ilizwi lam, ndakala, sasesishiya ingubo yaso ngakum, sabalekela pandle." 
Genesis39:19 Kwaye kute, nxa ibivile inkosi yaso amazwi omfazi wayo, lawo wawateta kuyo, esiti: Kunjengalamazwi senzile kum isicaka sako; wandu ukuvuta umsindo wayo." 
Genesis39:20 Yaza inkosi ka‐Josefe yamtabata, yamfaka entolongweni, endaweni ababanjwa bokumkani babebanjelwe kuyo: wayekona ke entolongweni apo." 
Genesis39:21 Kuloko uyehova ebenaye u‐Josefe, wamjikisela ububele, wamnika ufefe emehlweni ake umpati wentolongo." 
Genesis39:22 Waza umpati wentolongo wanikela esandleni sika‐Josefe bonke ababanjwa ababesentolongweni: nako konke babekwenza kona, kwakusenzwa nguye." 
Genesis39:23 Umpati wentolongo ebengakangeli nanye into epantsi kwesandla sake, ngenxa yokuba uyehova ebenaye; nako konke abekwenza, uyehova wakutamsanqelekisa." 
Genesis40:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwezizinto, umncamli wokumkani we‐Jipete, naye umoji, bona ngakuyo inkosi yabo, ukumkani we‐Jipete." 
Genesis40:2 Waye u‐Faro waqumba ngakubo aba babusi bake ababini, ngakuye umpati wabancamli, nangakuye umpati waboji." 
Genesis40:3 Waza wabanikela ekugcinweni endlwini yenkosi yomlisela, entolongweni, endaweni u‐Josefe wayebanjelwe kona." 
Genesis40:4 Yati inkosi yomlisela yamongamisa u‐Josefe pezu kwabo, ukuba abakonze: kwakumzuzu babeko ekugcinweni apo." 
Genesis40:5 Bada bapupa ipupa bobabini, omnye nomnye ipupa lake ngobusuku bunye, omnye nomnye njengokutyilwa kwepupa lake, umncamli nomoji aba lunge kukumkani we‐Jipete, ababebanjelwe entolongweni." 
Genesis40:6 Wayengena kubo u‐Josefe kwakusa, wabakangela; kekaloku bena ke, babekedamile." 
Genesis40:7 Waza wabuza ababusi baka‐Faro, ababenaye ekugcinweni endlwini yenkosi yake, esiti: Kungetuba lanina ukuba ubuso benu buti kunubembe namhla nje?" 
Genesis40:8 Bati kuye: Sipupile ipupa, kanti akako olityilayo. Wayesiti kubo u‐Josefe: Izityilo azi ze zikatixo na? kanindibalisele wona." 
Genesis40:9 Waza umpati wabancamli wambalisela u‐Josefe ipupa lake, wati kuye: Epupeni lam, kekaloku nangu umti weveyine ebusweni bam;" 
Genesis40:10 nakuwo umti weveyine lowo amasebe matatu; wanga uqumbi ke; intyatyambo zawo zadubula; izipa zazo zahlanza idreyive ezivutiweyo. 
Genesis40:11 Kanjalo indebe ka‐Faro ibisesandleni sam; ndaza ndatabata idreyive ezo, ndazixafanga endebeni ka‐Faro, ndanikela indebe esandleni sika‐Faro." 
Genesis40:12 Wayesiti kuye u‐Josefe: Oku kukutyilwa kwalo: lawo amasebe matatu ayimihla ekwa mitatu. 
Genesis40:13 Pakati kwemihla isemitatu uya kupakamisa u‐Faro intloko yako, akubuyisele ebumeni bako: wauya kunikela indebe ka‐Faro esandleni sake, njengesiko lapambili okuya ubungumncamli wake." 
Genesis40:14 Zundikumbule kodwa, nxa kuya kulunga kuwe, uke undenzele ububele, undikankanye ku‐Faro, undipumise kulendlu:" 
Genesis40:15 ngokuba okunene ndibe ndipangwa elizweni lama‐Hebere; ndandite nalapa ndingenzanga nto yokuba bandibeke kwesisihogo. 
Genesis40:16 Kekaloku umpati waboji akubona ukuba ukutyilwa kulungile, wandula wati ku‐Josefe: Nam bendisepupeni lam: kekaloku nazi izitya zitatu zezimhlope izonka pezu kwentloko yam;" 
Genesis40:17 nasesityeni sapezulu intlobo zonke zokutya kuka‐Faro, umsebenzi womoji; zaza intaka zazidla kwa sesityeni esasipezu kwentloko yam." 
Genesis40:18 Wapendula u‐Josefe wati kuye: Oku kukutyilwa kwalo: ezozitya zitatu ziyimihla ekwa mitatu. 
Genesis40:19 Pakati kwemihla isemitatu uya kupakamisa u‐Faro intloko yako kwa kuwe, akuxo̔me pezu kwomti; zoti intaka ziyidle inyama yako kwa kuwe." 
Genesis40:20 Kwaye kute ngomhla wesitatu, ngomhla wokuzalwa kuka‐Faro, ukuba wenzela zonke izicaka zake umtendeleko; wandula wapakamisa intloko yompati wabancamli, nentloko yompati waboji, pakati kwezicaka zake." 
Genesis40:21 Waza wabuyiselela umpati wabancamli ubuncamli bake, owanikela indebe esandleni sika‐Faro;" 
Genesis40:22 kanti umpati waboji wamxo̔ma; njengokuba ebetyilile kubo u‐Josefe. 
Genesis40:23 Kodwa umpati wabancamli akamkumbulanga u‐Josefe, wamlibala." 
Genesis41:1 KWAYE kute ekupeleni kwexesha leminyaka mibini, wandula u‐Faro wapupa; kekaloku bona ke, wayemi ngasemlanjeni." 
Genesis41:2 Kanjalo bona ke, zenyuka emlanjeni imazi ezisixe̔nxe, zizintle ngokubonakala, zityebile ngenyama, ezazisitya enceni." 
Genesis41:3 Kwaza kwati, bona ke, kwenyuka emva kwazo emlanjeni apo ezinye imazi ezikwa sixe̔nxe, zizimbi ngokubonakala, zibityile ngenyama; zaya zema ngakuzo ezinye imazi elunxwemeni lwomlambo." 
Genesis41:4 Zasuka ezomazi ezimbi ngokubonakala, ezibityileyo ngenyama, zazidla imazi zosixe̔nxe ezintle ngokubonakala, ezityebileyo nokutyeba. Wandula ukuvuka u‐Faro." 
Genesis41:5 Wabuya walala, wapupa ngokwesibini: kekaloku, nazi izikwebu ezisixe̔nxe zipumile ezeleni linye, zityebile, zilungile nokulunga." 
Genesis41:6 Zaye zidubula emva kwazo izikwebu zikwa zisixe̔nxe ezinqinileyo, ezigugisiweyo ngumoya wasempumalanga." 
Genesis41:7 Zaza izikwebu zosixe̔nxe ezinqinileyo zaginya ezozikwebu zisixe̔nxe ezityebileyo, ezibonxileyo nokubonxa. Wandula ukuvuka u‐Faro; kekaloku bona ke, lipupa." 
Genesis41:8 Kwaye kute kwakusa, umoya wake wauxalile; watuma ke, wabiza zonke incibi zase‐Jipete, nazo zonke izilumko zakona; waza u‐Faro wazibalisela ipupa lake; kodwa akwabiko mntu obenokuwatyila ku‐Faro." 
Genesis41:9 Wandula wateta umpati wabancamli ku‐Faro, esiti: izono zam ndiyazikumbula namhla nje." 
Genesis41:10 U‐Faro ubequmbele izicaka zake, wandinikela ekugcinweni endlwini yenkosi yomlisela, kwa mna nompati waboji." 
Genesis41:11 Saza sapupa ipupa ngobusuku bunye, mna naye; sapupa ngabanye njengokutyilwa kwamapupa etu." 
Genesis41:12 Kwaye kuko apo nati indodana engum‐Hebere, isicaka senkosi yomlisela; saza saxela kuyo, eyasityilela amapupa etu; yatyilela omnye nomnye njengepupa lake." 
Genesis41:13 Kwaza kwati, njengoko yasityilelayo, kwaba njalo: mna yandibuyisela ebumeni bam, naye yamxo̔ma." 
Genesis41:14 Wandula watuma u‐Faro wabiza u‐Josefe; baya bamkupa ngobunxamo esihogweni; waza waguya, waguqula izivato zake, wangena ku‐Faro." 
Genesis41:15 Wayesiti u‐Faro ku‐Josefe: Ndipupile ipupa, kanti akuko mntu ongalityilayo: kendivile kodwa ngawe ukuti, uyaqonda ipupa ukulityila." 
Genesis41:16 Waza u‐Josefe wapendula ku‐Faro, esiti: Akuko kum oko. Utixo wopendula u‐Faro ngoxolo." 
Genesis41:17 Wandula wateta u‐Faro ku‐Josefe, wati: Epupeni lam, bona ke, ndema ngaselunxwemeni lwomlambo." 
Genesis41:18 Kekaloku bona ke, zenyuka emlanjeni imazi ezisixe̔nxe, zityebile ngenyama, zizintle ngesimilo, ezazisitya enceni." 
Genesis41:19 Kanjalo bona ke, ezinye imazi ezikwa sixe̔nxe zenyuka emva kwazo, zinqinile, zizimbi kakulu ngesimilo, zibityile ngenyama; endingazanga ndibone ezinjalo kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete ukuba zimbi kangaka." 
Genesis41:20 Zaza ezomazi zibityileyo ezimbi zazidla ezokuqala imazi zosixe̔nxe ezityebileyo; 
Genesis41:21 ezazite, noko zingenileyo esiswini sazo, akwaziwa ukuba zingenile esiswini sazo; ngokuba ukubonakala kwazo bekukubi njengasekuqaleni. Ndandula ukuvuka." 
Genesis41:22 Ndabuya ndabona epupeni lam, kekaloku, nazi ke izikwebu ezisixe̔nxe zipumile ezeleni linye, zibonxile, zilungile nokulunga." 
Genesis41:23 Kanjalo bona ke, izikwebu ezikwa zisixe̔nxe, ezishwenyileyo, ezinqinileyo, ezigugisiweyo ngumoya wasempumalanga, zazidubula emva kwazo." 
Genesis41:24 Zaza ezizikwebu zinqinileyo zaginya ezozikwebu zisixe̔nxe ezilungileyo. Kekaloku sendizixelele incibi, kodwa akuko mntu ongandicazelayo." 
Genesis41:25 Wandula wati u‐Josefe ku‐Faro: Ipupa lika‐Faro linye: oko utixo aza kukwenza, ukushumayele ku‐Faro." 
Genesis41:26 Ezomazi zisixe̔nxe ezilungileyo ziyiminyaka ekwa sixe̔nxe, nezozikwebu zisixe̔nxe ezilungileyo ziyiminyaka ekwa sixe̔nxe; ipupa linye." 
Genesis41:27 Kanjalo ezomazi zisixe̔nxe ezibityileyo ezimbi, ezibe zinyuka emva kwazo, ziyiminyaka esixe̔nxe nazo; nezozikwebu zisixe̔nxe eziputileyo, zigugisiwe ngumoya wasempumalanga, zoba yiminyaka esixe̔nxe yendlala." 
Genesis41:28 Eli lilizwi endilitetileyo ku‐Faro: Oko utixo aza kukwenza, umbonisile u‐Faro kona." 
Genesis41:29 Bona ke, kuza kufika iminyaka isixe̔nxe yobuninzi obukolisileyo kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Genesis41:30 Kwandule ukusuka iminyaka isixe̔nxe yendlala emva kwayo; bude bulityalwe bonke obobuninzi elizweni le‐Jipete; iti ke indlala igqibele ilizwe. 
Genesis41:31 Kanjalo abuyi kwaziwa ubuninzi obo elizweni, ngenxa yaleyondlala ibulandelayo; ngokuba iya kuba nzima kunene yona." 
Genesis41:32 Nokokuba ipupa lapindwa ku‐Faro kabini, kukuba iqinisiwe lendawo ngutixo, nokuba eya kunxama utixo ukuyenza." 
Genesis41:33 Makati kaloku u‐Faro afune indoda enokuqonda elumkileyo, ayimise pezu kwalo ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Genesis41:34 Makenje njalo u‐Faro, aze ongamise abongama pezu kwelizwe, atabate esesihlanu isahlulo sokwelizwe le‐Jipete ngayo iminyaka isixe̔nxe yobuninzi." 
Genesis41:35 Mababute bona konke ukutya kwaleminyaka ilungileyo ezayo, bayibekele inqolowa ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Faro, ibe kukutya ezixekweni, bayigcine." 
Genesis41:36 Okokutya makube yimbekelo yelizwe, ngenxa yayo iminyaka isixe̔nxe yendlala eya kubako ezweni le‐Jipete; lize ilizwe lingabubi ngendlala." 
Genesis41:37 Lalibe elozwi lilungile emehlweni ka‐Faro, nasemehlweni azo zonke izicaka zake." 
Genesis41:38 Waza wati u‐Faro ezicakeni zake: Singafumana onjengalo yinina, indoda u‐moya katixo ukuyo?" 
Genesis41:39 Waye u‐Faro wati ku‐Josefe: Ekubeni utixo ekwazisile konke oku, akuko mntu ongangawe ekuqondeni nasekulumkeni." 
Genesis41:40 Woba wena upezu kwendlu yam, nangelizwi lako baya kuzilungisa bonke abantu bam; kupela eteroneni ndiya kuba mkulu kuwe." 
Genesis41:41 Walekela u‐Faro wati ku‐Josefe: Kangela, ndikumisile pezu kwalo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Genesis41:42 Waza u‐Faro watula umsesane wake esandleni sake, wawufaka esandleni sika‐Josefe, wamambatisa izivato zeqiya eshiceneyo, wabeka isambalo segolide entanyeni yake;" 
Genesis41:43 wamkwelisa kweyesibini inqwelo abenayo; kwaza kwadandulukwa pambi kwake ngokuti: Guqa ngedolo! Wenje njalo ke ukummisa pezu kwalo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete. 
Genesis41:44 Wayesiti u‐Faro ku‐Josefe: Mna ke ndinguye u‐Faro; kodwa ngapandle kwako akuko mntu oya kupakamisa isandla sake nonyawo lwake kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete. 
Genesis41:45 Waza u‐Faro wabiza u‐Josefe ngegama elingu‐Tsafenate‐paneha, wamnika u‐Asenate, intombi ka‐Potifera, umperisite we‐One, abe ngumfazi. Waye u‐Josefe wapumela pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete." 
Genesis41:46 KEKALOKU u‐Josefe ebeyiminyaka imashumi matatu ubudala bake, akuma ebusweni buka‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete. Waza u‐Josefe wapuma ebusweni buka‐Faro, wacanda kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Genesis41:47 Ute umhlaba wakolisa kuyo iminyaka isixe̔nxe yobuninzi ukuvelisa kakulu. 
Genesis41:48 Waza wabuta konke ukutya kwa le minyaka isixe̔nxe, eyabiko elizweni le‐Jipete, wakubeka ukutya ezixekweni: ukutya kwamasimi esixeko, lawo asingqongayo, wakubeka pakati kwaso." 
Genesis41:49 Waye u‐Josefe wabekela inqolowa njengentlabati yolwandle, ngento eninzi kunene, wada wayeka ukubala; ngokuba ibingenako ukubalwa." 
Genesis41:50 Kwaye kuzalwa ku‐Josefe onyana bababini, ingekatiki iminyaka yendlala, abemzalela bona u‐Asenate, intombi ka‐Potifera, umperisite we‐One." 
Genesis41:51 Waza u‐Josefe wabiza igama lowamazibulo ngo‐Manase: Ngokuba utixo, watsho, endilibalisile lwonke usizi lwam, kwa nayo yonke indlu kabawo.." 
Genesis41:52 Negama lowesibini walibiza ngo‐Frayime: Ngokuba utixo, watsho, undicumisile elizweni lokubandezelwa kwam.." 
Genesis41:53 Yada yapela lo minyaka isixe̔nxe yobuninzi, obube buko elizweni le‐Jipete." 
Genesis41:54 Yandula yaqala eyendlala iminyaka esixe̔nxe ukufika, njengokuba ebetshilo u‐Josefe. Yaza yabako indlala kuwo onke amazwe; kanti kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete kwakuko isonka." 
Genesis41:55 Kekaloku lakulamba lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete, bandula abantu ukukalela isonka ku‐Faro: waza wati u‐Faro kuwo onke ama‐Jipete: Hambani niye ku‐Josefe; oko akutshoyo kuni, nikwenze." 
Genesis41:56 Yaye indlala ibako pezu kwobuso bonke bomhlaba. Waza u‐Josefe wavula zonke indawo ebekubekelwe kuzo, watengisa kuma‐Jipete; ngokuba indlala ibinamandla elizweni le‐Jipete." 
Genesis41:57 Asuka amazwe onke eza e‐Jipete, ku‐Josefe, ukuza kutenga; ngokuba indlala ibinamandla emazweni onke." 
Genesis42:1 KEKALOKU akubona u‐Yakobi ukuba kuko inqolowa e‐Jipete, wandula wati u‐Yakobi konyana bake: Yinina ukuba nikangelane?" 
Genesis42:2 Wayesiti: Bona ke, ndivile ukuba kuko inqolowa e‐Jipete; hambani nihlele kona, nisitengele kwa lapo, size sidle ubomi, singafi." 
Genesis42:3 Baza behla abakuluwe baka‐Josefe boshumi, ukuya kutenga inqolowa e‐Jipete." 
Genesis42:4 Kodwa u‐Benjamine, umninawe ka‐Josefe, akamtuma u‐Yakobi kunye nabakuluwe bake; ngokuba ebesiti: Hleze ahlelwe sisenzakalo." 
Genesis42:5 Basuka onyana baka‐Yakobi beza kutenga pakati kwabo babesiza; ngokuba indlala ibiko elizweni le‐Kanane. 
Genesis42:6 Waye u‐Josefe ebengumpati pezu kwelozwe; wanguye obetengisa kubo bonke abantu belizwe; bandula beza abakuluwe baka‐Josefe, baziqubuda pambi kwake, ubuso babo bungasemhlabeni." 
Genesis42:7 Waza u‐Josefe wabona abakuluwe bake, wabazi; kodwa wazenza owasemzini kubo, wateta nabo ngobulukuni, wati kubo: Nivela pina? Bati: Sivela ezweni le‐Kanane, ukuza kutenga ukutya." 
Genesis42:8 Kekaloku u‐Josefe ebebazi abakuluwe bake; kodwa bona bebengamazi yena. 
Genesis42:9 Waza u‐Josefe wakumbula amapupa abewapupile ngabo, wati kubo: Nizintlola; nize kubona ukuba zé kwelizwe." 
Genesis42:10 Bati kuye: Hai, nkosi yam! izicaka zako zize kutenga ukutya." 
Genesis42:11 Tina sonke singonyana bendoda nye; singabenyaniso tina; izicaka zako azizizo intlola. 
Genesis42:12 Koko wati kubo: Hai, nize kubona ukuba zé kwelizwe." 
Genesis42:13 Baza bati: Izicaka zako zingabazalwana abalishumi linababini, bengonyana bendoda nye yasezweni le‐Kanane; kekaloku bona ke, omncinane unobawo namhla, omnye kanti akaseko." 
Genesis42:14 Wandula wati u‐Josefe kubo: Kuko oko endandikuteta kuni, ndisiti: Nizintlola." 
Genesis42:15 Ngako oku niya kulingwa. Bomi bo‐Faro! aniyi kupuma kule ndawo, kupela ekuzeni kwomninawe wenu omncinane apa." 
Genesis42:16 Susani abe mnye wakuni, aye kutabata umninawe wenu; nina kodwa niya kubanjwa entolongweni; aze amazwi enu alingwe, ukuba kuko inene kuni kusinina: okanye, bomi bo‐Faro! ngenyaniso nizintlola." 
Genesis42:17 Waza wababeka bonke ndawonye ekugcinweni imihla yamitatu. 
Genesis42:18 Waye u‐Josefe ngomhla wesitatu wati kubo: Kwenzeni oku, nize nidle ubomi; utixo ndimoyika nje." 
Genesis42:19 Ukuba ningabenyaniso, makabanjwe omnye wabazalwana benu endlwini yokugcinwa kwenu; nize nihambe nina, nise inqolowa ngenxa yokulamba kwezindlu zenu." 
Genesis42:20 Kodwa umninawe wenu omncinane nimzise kum; aya kwandula anyaniswe amazwi enu, naningayi kufa. Benje njalo ke." 
Genesis42:21 Baza bati omnye kwomnye: Sinetyala ngenyaniso pezu kwomninawe wetu, ekubeni sibe sibona uxinezeko lwompefumlo wake akusitaṙuzisa, kanti sasingapulapuli noko; kukona obubunzima busihleleyo." 
Genesis42:22 Wabapendula u‐Rubene, esiti: Bendingatsho na kuni ukuti: Ningamoni umfana; naye ningeva ke? Ngako, bona ke, negazi lake liyabuzwa." 
Genesis42:23 Baye bengazi ukuba u‐Josefe uyeva; ngokuba bekuko ikumsha pakati kwabo. 
Genesis42:24 Waza wajika kubo, walila; wada wabuyela kubo, wateta nabo, wasusa kubo u‐Simone, wamnxiba pambi kwamehlo abo." 
Genesis42:25 Wandula waxela u‐Josefe ukuba makuzaliswe inxowa zabo ngenqolowa, nokuba kubuyiselwe imali zabo abanye ngabanye ezinxoweni zabo, nokuba bapiwe umpako wendlela; kwaye kusenziwa njalo kubo." 
Genesis42:26 Baza batwesa amaqwaṙashe abo ngenqolowa yabo, bemka apo." 
Genesis42:27 Ute omnye, akuvula inxowa yake, ukuba anike iqwaṙashe lake ukutya endaweni yokulalisa, wabona imali yake: ngokuba, bona ke, ibisemlonyeni wenxowa yake." 
Genesis42:28 Waza wati kubazalwana bake: Imali yam ibuyisiwe; kanjalo, nantsi ikwa senxoweni yam. Kwaza kwapuma intliziyo yabo, bajikelana ngokungcangcazela, besiti: Kuyinina oku utixo akwenzileyo kuti?" 
Genesis42:29 Bada beza ku‐Yakobi uyise ezweni le‐Kanane, bamshumayeza konke okubahleleyo, besiti:" 
Genesis42:30 Indoda, e yinkosi yelolizwe, yateta nati ngokulukuni, yasibala ngokuba zintlola zelizwe." 
Genesis42:31 Saye sisiti kuyo: Singabo abenyaniso; asizizo intlola: 
Genesis42:32 singabazalwana abalishumi linababini, onyana bobawo wetu; omnye akaseko, nomncinane ukwa nobawo namhla ezweni le‐Kanane." 
Genesis42:33 Yaza yati kuti londoda, inkosi yelizwe: Ngako oku ndiya kukwazi ukuba ningabenyaniso: mshiyeni kum abe mnye wabazalwana benu, nitabatele ukulamba kwezindlu zenu ukutya, nihambe ke." 
Genesis42:34 Nize nimzise umninawe wenu omncinane kum; ndandiya kukwazi ukuba anizizo intlola, koko ningabo abenyaniso: umzalwana wenu ndiya kumnikela kuni, naniya kutenga elizweni." 
Genesis42:35 Kwaye kute, besakukupa ezinxoweni zabo, nanga ke amabatu emali zabo abanye ngabanye esezinxoweni zabo: baza bati, bakubona amabatu emali, kwa bona noyise wabo, banokwoyika." 
Genesis42:36 Wayesiti kubo u‐Yakobi uyise wabo: Mna ke nindihlutile abantwana bam; u‐Josefe akaseko, no‐Simone akaseko, no‐Benjamine niya kumsusa: zonke ezizinto zi nzima pezu kwam." 
Genesis42:37 Waza watsho u‐Rubene kuyise ukuti: Onyana bam bobabini ubabulale, ukuba andimzisi kuwe; mnikele esandleni sam, ndandiya kumbuyisela kuwe." 
Genesis42:38 Wayesiti: Unyana wam akayi kuhla nani; ngokuba umkuluwe wake efile, waye yena esele yedwa: naxeshekweni ahlelwa sisenzakalo endleleni enihamba ngayo, niya kwandula nihlise izimvi zam ngosizi ngasencw̔abeni." 
Genesis43:1 KEKALOKU indlala ibinzima kwelozwe. 
Genesis43:2 Kwaza kwati, nxa babegqibele ukutya inqolowa abebevele nayo e‐Jipete, wati uyise kubo: Buyani, niye nisitengele intwana yokudla." 
Genesis43:3 Waza watsho u‐Juda kuye ukuti: Yanqi̔nisa kakulu kuti indoda leyo, isiti: Anisayi kubona ubuso bam, engeko nani umninawe wenu." 
Genesis43:4 Ukuba uya kutuma umninawe wetu nati, sohla ukuya kukutengela ukutya." 
Genesis43:5 Ukuba kodwa akuyi kumtuma, asiyi kuhla; ngokuba indoda leyo ibisiti kuti: Anisayi kubona ubuso bam, engeko nani umninawe wenu." 
Genesis43:6 Waza wati u‐Sirayeli: Ibiyinina ukuba nindipete kakubi kangakanana, nada natyela londoda ukuti kuseko kuni umninawe?" 
Genesis43:7 Bati: Yazingisa indoda leyo ukusibuza okwetu, nokwesalamane setu, isiti: Uyihlo usahleli na? kuseko kuni umninawe na? saza sayityela kwa ngokuteta kwalamazwi: saka sakwazi na ukuba woti: Yihlani nomninawe wenu?" 
Genesis43:8 Wandula wati u‐Juda ku‐Sirayeli uyise: Tuma umfana nam, sasiya kusuka sihambe; size sidle ubomi, singafi nokufa, kwa tina, nawe wena, nabantwana betu kanjalo." 
Genesis43:9 Ndoti mna ndimbambisele; kwa sesandleni sam uya kumbiza: ukuba andimzisi kuwe, ndimbeke pambi kwako, mandandule ukunikwa ityala nguwe yonke imihla yam." 
Genesis43:10 Ngokuba kekaloku ukuba sasingazilazilanga, ngesiba okunene kaloku nje sise sibuyile ngokwesibini." 
Genesis43:11 Waza wati kubo u‐Sirayeli uyise wabo: Ukuba kunje nje ke, kanenze oku: tabatani kwezinconyiweyo iziqa̔mo zelilizwe ezityeni zenu, nihlisele londoda ibaso, intwana yetsori, nentwana yencindi, inekote nelote, ibotene nezamonde." 
Genesis43:12 Tabatani nemali yokupindisa esandleni senu; nemali eyayibuyiswa emlonyeni wenxowa zenu, nibuye niyipate esandleni senu; kungati sisiposo." 
Genesis43:13 Tabatani nomninawe wenu, nisuke, nibuye niye endodeni leyo." 
Genesis43:14 Aze utixo onamandla onke ange anganinika ububele ebusweni bendoda, ukuba indulule nani umzalwana wenu omnye no‐Benjamine! Okwam, nxa ndihlutwa abantwana, ndiyahlutwa." 
Genesis43:15 Aza amadoda lawo atabata elobaso, nemali epindiweyo ayitabata esandleni sawo, kwa no‐Benjamine; esuka ke, ehlela e‐Jipete, ema ebusweni bake u‐Josefe." 
Genesis43:16 Wandula u‐Josefe, akumbona u‐Benjamine enawo, wati kopezu kwendlu yake: Ngenisa lamadoda endlwini, uxe̔le isixe̔lo, uze ulungise; ngokuba lamadoda eya kudlelana nam emini enkulu." 
Genesis43:17 Yenje njalo indoda leyo njengokuba ebetshilo u‐Josefe; yaye indoda yangenisa amadoda lawo endlwini ka‐Josefe. 
Genesis43:18 Andu ukwoyika amadoda lawo, ngokuba engenisiwe endlwini ka‐Josefe, ati: Kungenxa yemali ebibuyiswa ezinxoweni zetu ngokwokuqala, lento singenisiweyo, ukuze agaleleke pezu kwetu, asiwele, asibambe sibe ngamakoboka, kwa namaqwaṙashe etu." 
Genesis43:19 Aza asondela kulondoda ipezu kwendlu ka‐Josefe, ateta nayo ngasemnyango wendlu," 
Genesis43:20 ati: Au, nkosi! sasibe ngokwenene sisihla ngokwokuqala ukuza kutenga ukutya." 
Genesis43:21 Kwaza kwati, sakufika endaweni yokulalisa, savula inxowa zetu, kekaloku nantsi ke imali yabanye ngabanye isemlonyeni wenxowa zabo, imali yetu ngokulinganiswa kwayo; saye sibuyisile yona esandleni setu." 
Genesis43:22 Nemali yimbi siyihlisile esandleni setu, yokuba sitenge ukutya: asimazi ungubanina obefaka imali yetu ezinxoweni zetu." 
Genesis43:23 Yayisiti: Uxolo lube kuni, ningoyiki! Utixo wenu, notixo woyihlo, unipile indyebo ezinxoweni zenu; imali yenu yabisiza kum. Yaza yamkupela kuwo u‐Simone." 
Genesis43:24 Yandula indoda yangenisa amadoda lawo endlwini ka‐Josefe, ya wa bekela amanzi; aza ahlamba inyawo zawo; yanikela namaqwaṙashe awo into yokutya." 
Genesis43:25 Aza alungisa ibaso, engekafiki u‐Josefe emini enkulu; ngokuba ebevile kusitwa aya kutya isonka kona." 
Genesis43:26 Ati akuba efikile ekaya u‐Josefe, andula azisa kuye ibaso elisesandleni sawo endlwini, aziqubuda pambi kwake ngasemhlabeni." 
Genesis43:27 Waza wawabuza ukupila kwawo, wati: Uyihlo wenu upilile na, ixego enibe niteta ngalo? Usahleli na?" 
Genesis43:28 Ati: Sipilile isicaka sako ubawo wetu, usahleli yena. Aza atoba ngapantsi, aziqubuda." 
Genesis43:29 Wada wapakamisa amehlo ake, wambona u‐Benjamine umninawe wake, unyana wowake unina, wati: Ngulo̔ na umninawe wenu omncinane, enibe ninditetela ngaye? Waza wati: Wanga utixo angaba nofefe kuwe, nyana wam!" 
Genesis43:30 Waselenxama u‐Josefe; ngokuba umbilini wake wauvuta pezu kwomninawe wake: wada wafuna indawo yokulila; waya wangena enkambilini yapakati, walila apo ke." 
Genesis43:31 Wasuka wahlamba ubuso bake, wapuma, wazinyanzela, wati: Bekani isonka." 
Genesis43:32 Bandula ukubeka pambi kwake eyedwa, napambi kwawo ekwa wodwa, napambi kwama‐Jipete abesitya naye ewodwa nawo; ngokuba ekohliwe ama‐Jipete kukutya isonka nama‐Hebere, oko kuyintshontsho nje kuma‐Jipete." 
Genesis43:33 Aya ahlala pantsi ebusweni bake, eyamazibulo njengobuzibulo bayo, nentsha kwa njengobutsha bayo: ati amadoda lawo akangelana ngokuti nqa." 
Genesis43:34 Waza wawabela izabelwa zokutya zivela pambi kwake; kodwa isabelwa sika‐Benjamine sibe sikulu kwizabelwa zabanye bonke ngokuhlanu. Baye besela, bagcoba naye." 
Genesis44:1 Wada wamyalela opezu kwendlu yake, esiti: Zalisa inxowa zalamadoda ngokutya, njengoko anamandla okukutwala, uyifake imali yamanye ngamanye emlonyeni wenxowa zawo." 
Genesis44:2 Nebekile yam, eyesilivere ibekile, uyifake emlonyeni wenxowa yomncinane, kwa nemali yenqolowa yake. Waza wenza njengelizwi lika‐Josefe, elo wabetetile lona." 
Genesis44:3 Kwakuti qip’ ukusa, andululwa lomadoda, wona namaqwaṙashe awo." 
Genesis44:4 Xa abepumile esixekweni, engekabi kude, wati u‐Josefe kopezu kwendlu yake: Suka, uputume amadoda lawo; uze, wakuwafumana, uti kuwo: Yinina ukuba nipindezele okulungileyo ngokukohlakeleyo?" 
Genesis44:5 Asi yiyo na le, inkosi yam isela ngayo, inyanise nokulaula ngayo? Nikohlakalisile oko nikwenzileyo." 
Genesis44:6 Wada wawafumana, wateta kuwo kwa lamazwi." 
Genesis44:7 Aza ati kuye: Kunganina ukuba inkosi yam itete amazwi anjalo? Makube le ezicakeni zako, okokuba zenze njengalento." 
Genesis44:8 Bona ke, imali esasiyifumene emlonyeni wenxowa zetu, sayibuyisela kuwe sakubuya ezweni le‐Kanane: sabesiya kuti nina ke ukuba̔ endlwini yenkosi yako isilivere negolide?" 
Genesis44:9 Lowo ifunyanwa kuye pakati kwezicaka zako, makafe yena; kanjalo nati soba ngamakoboka enkosini yam." 
Genesis44:10 Wayesiti: Makube njalo ke, kwa njengamazwi enu: lowo ifunyanwa kuye woba likoboka lam; nina kodwa noba ningenatyala." 
Genesis44:11 Andula anxama azitulela emhlabeni amanye ngamanye inxowa zawo, avula amanye ngamanye inxowa zawo kanjako." 
Genesis44:12 Waza wafunisa ke, eqala ngomkulu, egqiba ngomncinane; yada ibekile leyo yafunyanwa enxoweni ka‐Benjamine." 
Genesis44:13 Basuka baṙazula izivato zabo, batwesa amaqwaṙashe abo abanye ngabanye, babuyela esixekweni." 
Genesis44:14 Wayesiza u‐Juda nabazalwana bake endlwini ka‐Josefe; ngokuba ebesekona yena; bawa pantsi ke ebusweni bake ngasemhlabeni. 
Genesis44:15 Waza wati kubo u‐Josefe: Sesinina isenzo esi, enisenzileyo? anazi na ukuba inganyanisa ukulaula indoda enjengam?" 
Genesis44:16 Wati u‐Juda: Siya kuti nina enkosini yam? siya kuteta nto nina? soti nina ukuzilungisa? Utixo nyifumene inkohlakalo yezicaka zako; bona ke, singamakoboka enkosi yam, kwa tina, nalowo yayifunyenwe ibekile esandleni sake." 
Genesis44:17 Wayesiti: Makube lé kum ukwenje njalo! indoda, ibekile ifunyenwe esandleni sayo, yiyo eya kuba likoboka lam; kodwa nina, nyukani ngoxolo niye kuyihlo." 
Genesis44:18 Waza u‐Juda wasondela kuye, wati: Ke, nkosi yam! makesitete isicaka sako ilizwi ezindlebeni zenkosi yam, ize ingavuti ingqumbo yako ngakuso isicaka sako; ngokuba ukwa ngango‐Faro wena." 
Genesis44:19 Inkosi yam yaka yabuza izicaka zayo, isiti: Kuko kuni uyihlo na, ninomninawe na?" 
Genesis44:20 Saza sati enkosini yam: Kuko kuti ubawo, olixego, kwa nomntwana wobuxego bake, omncinane; umkuluwe wake ufile, ukukupela kwoshiyiweyo ngunina yena, kanjalo uyise uyamtanda." 
Genesis44:21 Wandul, ukuti kwizicaka zako: Mhliseni eze kum, ukuba ndibeke amehlo am pezu kwake." 
Genesis44:22 Saza sati enkosini yam: Ukohliwe umfana lowo kukumshiya uyise; nxa ashiya uyise, anga uyise eya kufa." 
Genesis44:23 Waye ubusiti ezicakeni zako: Ukuba umninawe wenu omncinane akehli nani, anisayi kupinda ukubona ubuso bam." 
Genesis44:24 Kwaza kwati, nxa sibe sinyukele esicakeni sako ubawo, samtyela amazwi enkosi yam." 
Genesis44:25 Wada wati ubawo: Buyani niye kusitengela intwana yokutya. 
Genesis44:26 Saza sati: Sikohliwe kukuhla: ukuba umninawe wetu omncinane uko nati, siya kwandula sihle; ngokuba singebe nakubona ubuso bendoda leyo, nxa umninawe wetu omncinane angenati." 
Genesis44:27 Saye sisiti isicaka sako, ubawo, kuti: Niyazi nina okokuba umfazi wam wabazala kum onyana ababini." 
Genesis44:28 Waye omnye wapuma kum’; ndaza ndati: Okunene uqwengiwe kanye; ndaye ndingabuyanga ndimbone kwada kwakaloku. 
Genesis44:29 Ukuba niyamsusa naló kwa sebusweni bam, aze ahlelwe sisenzakalo, izimvi zam niya kuzihlisa ngosizi ngasencw̔abeni." 
Genesis44:30 Ngako oko ke, ndakufika kwisicaka sako ubawo, umfana engeko nati nje, (ngokuba umpefumlo wake ubotshelwa empefumlweni walowo,)" 
Genesis44:31 kuya kuti, akubona ukuba umfana akako, andule afe; zaye izicaka zako ziya kuhlisa izimvi zesicaka sako, ubawo wetu, ngosizi ngasencw̔abeni." 
Genesis44:32 Ngokuba isicaka sako sabambisela umfana lowo kubawo, ndisiti: Ukuba andimzisi kuwe, mandandule ukunikwa ityala ngubawo yonke imihla yam." 
Genesis44:33 Ngako oko ke, makesihlale isicaka sako esikundleni somfana sibe likoboka enkosini yam, aze umfana enyuke nabakuluwe bake." 
Genesis44:34 Ngokuba ndiya kuti nina ukunyuka ndiye kubawo, nxa umfana angenam? hlezibe ndibone ubunzima obuya kumhlela ubawo." 
Genesis45:1 Waza wakohlwa u‐Josefe kukuzinyanzela pambi kwabo bonke abebemi ngakuye, wadanduluka esiti: Yenzani bapume bonke abantu kum. Kwaye kungeko mntu emi ngakuye, ekuzaziseni kuka‐Josefe kubakuluwe bake." 
Genesis45:2 Wandula ukukupa ilizwi lake ngokulila; ada eva ama‐Jipete, yeva nendlu ka‐Faro." 
Genesis45:3 Waza u‐Josefe wati kubakuluwe bake: Mna ndingu‐Josefe; ubawo usahleli na? Koko abakuluwe bake bebekohlwa kukumpendula; ngokuba bebetuswa ebusweni bake. 
Genesis45:4 Waza u‐Josefe wati kubakuluwe bake: Kanisondele kum. Basondela ke. Waza wati: Mna ndingu‐Josefe, umninawe wenu, enanimtengisele e‐Jipete." 
Genesis45:5 Kodwa kaloku maningadandateki, makungaqumbiseki emehlweni enu kanjako, ukuba nibe ninditengisela apa: ngokuba utixo enditumile pambi kwenu, ndize kulondoloza ubomi." 
Genesis45:6 Ngokuba ngoku isel’ iyiminyaka mibini indlala ipakati kwelizwe; kanjalo iseko iminyaka mihlanu ekungayi kubako kulima nokuvuna ngayo. 
Genesis45:7 Waye utixo wandituma pambi kwenu, ukuba ndinigcinele isisalela emhlabeni, nokuba ndilondoloze ubomi benu ngosindiso olukulu." 
Genesis45:8 Ngako kaloku asi nini abanditumileyo ukuza apa, koko ngutixo; owayendenzile uyise ku‐Faro, nenkosi pezu kwayo yonke indlu yake, nompati kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Genesis45:9 Nxamani, ninyuke ukuya kubawo, niti kuye: Utsho unyana wako u‐Josefe ukuti: Utixo undenzile inkosi pezu kwayo yonke i‐Jipete; yihla uze kum, ungalibali:" 
Genesis45:10 wauya kuhlala ezweni le‐Goshene, ube kufupi kum, wena nonyana bako, nonyana bonyana bako, negusha zako, nenkomo zako, nako konke onako." 
Genesis45:11 Ndaye ndiya kukufunzela kwa lapo; ngokuba kusaya kubako emihlanu iminyaka yendlala; ukuze ungangeni ebuhlwentshini, wena nendlu yako, nako konke onako." 
Genesis45:12 Kangelani, amehlo enu ayabona, kwa namehlo omninawe wam u‐Benjamine, ukuba ngumlomo wam otetayo kuni." 
Genesis45:13 Naniya kumshumayeza ubawo bonke ubungcwalisa bam e‐Jipete, nako konke enikubonileyo; nize ninxame ukumhlisa ubawo eze apa." 
Genesis45:14 Waza wamwela umninawe wake u‐Benjamine entanyeni, walila; no‐Benjamine walila entanyeni yake." 
Genesis45:15 Wasuka wanga bonke abakuluwe bake, walila pezu kwabo; nasemveni kwoko abakuluwe bake bateta naye." 
Genesis45:16 Kwati kwakuvakala iṙeto endlwini ka‐Faro, lisiti: Bafikile abakuluwe baka‐Josefe; kwakulungile emehlweni ka‐Faro, nasemehlweni azo izicaka zake." 
Genesis45:17 Waza wati u‐Faro ku‐Josefe: Uti kubakuluwe bako: Kwenzeni oku; twesani amaqegu enu, nihambe, niye ezweni le‐Kanane;" 
Genesis45:18 nitabate uyihlo nabezindlu zenu, nize kum; ndiya kunipa ubumnandi belizwe le‐Jipete, naniya kutya ubunqata belilizwe." 
Genesis45:19 Kekaloku wena uyayalelwa: yenzani oku; zitabateleni kwa sezweni le‐Jipete inqwelo zibe zezabantwana benu, nezabafazi benu, nimtwale uyihlo, nize ke." 
Genesis45:20 Kanjalo ningakataleli impahla yenu; ngokuba ubumnandi balo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete bubobenu bona. 
Genesis45:21 Benje njalo ke onyana baka‐Sirayeli: waye u‐Josefe wabanika inqwelo ngezwi lika‐Faro; wabanika nompako wendlela. 
Genesis45:22 Bonke wabanika, abanye ngabanye, izivato zokuguqulelana; kodwa u‐Benjamine wamnika ishekele ezimakulu matatu zesilivere, nezivato zokuguqulelana ezihlanu." 
Genesis45:23 Noyise watuma kuye njengokunje; kwa ishumi lamaqwaṙashe etwele okwobumnandi base‐Jipete, neshumi lamaqwaṙashekazi etwele inqolowa, nesonka, nokutya kube kokwoyise endleleni." 
Genesis45:24 Waza wabandulula abakuluwe bake; basuka bemka; wayesiti kubo: Ningabi navuso endleleni. 
Genesis45:25 Baye benyuka e‐Jipete, beza ezweni le‐Kanane ku‐Yakobi uyise wabo;" 
Genesis45:26 bashumayela kuye, besiti: U‐Josefe usahleli, kanjalo nguye ongumpati pezu kwalo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete. Yaza intliziyo yake yawa, ngokuba engakolwanga ngabo." 
Genesis45:27 Kodwa bakuba bemtetele onke amazwi ka‐Josefe, abewatetile kubo, nokuba wabona inqwelo u‐Josefe wabezitumele ukumtwala, wandula umoyaka‐Yakobi uyise wabo wabuya wapila." 
Genesis45:28 Waza wati u‐Sirayeli: Kwanele; u‐Josefe unyana wam usahleli; ndoya ndimbone ndingekabubi. 
Genesis46:1 WAYE u‐Sirayeli wafuduka nako konke abenako, weza e‐Beresheba, wabingelela imibingelelo kuye utixo woyise u‐Yisake." 
Genesis46:2 Waza wateta utixo ku‐Sirayeli emibonisweni yobusuku, wati: Yakobi, Yakobi! Wati yena: Nanku, ndi lapa." 
Genesis46:3 Wayesiti: Mna ndi ngutixo, utixo woyihlo wako; ungoyiki ukuya kuhlela e‐Jipete; ngokuba isizwe esikulu ndiya kusenza ngawe apo." 
Genesis46:4 Ndiya kuhla nawe ukuya e‐Jipete; ndobuya ndikunyuse ngenyaniso: woti u‐Josefe abeke isandla sake pezu kwamehlo ako. 
Genesis46:5 Wandula u‐Yakobi wesuka e‐Beresheba; baza onyana baka‐Sirayeli bamtwala u‐Yakobi uyise wabo, nabantwana babo, nabafazi babo, ezinqwelweni abezitumile u‐Faro ukuza kumtwala." 
Genesis46:6 Batabata inkomo zabo, nempahla yabo ababeyiqwebile elizweni le‐Kanane, beza e‐Jipete, u‐Yakobi nayo yonke inzalo yake kunye naye:" 
Genesis46:7 onyana bake, nonyana bonyana bake kunye naye; intombi zake, nentombi zonyana bake; nayo yonke inzalo yake wayizisa naye e‐Jipete." 
Genesis46:8 Kekaloku ngawo la amagama onyana baka‐Sirayeli, abezayo e‐Jipete: u‐Yakobi nonyana bake. Owamazibulo ka‐Yakobi, ngu‐Rubene." 
Genesis46:9 Nonyana baka‐Rubene; ngu‐Hanoki, no‐Palu, no‐Hetserone, no‐Kami." 
Genesis46:10 Nonyana baka‐Simone; ngu‐Jemuweli, no‐Yamine, no‐Ohadi, no‐Yakine, no‐Tsohare, no‐Saule unyana wom‐Kananekazi." 
Genesis46:11 Nonyana baka‐Levi; ngu‐Gereshone, n o‐Kohati, no‐Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Nonyana baka‐Juda; ngu‐Here, no‐Onane, no‐Shela, no‐Faretse, no‐Zera; kodwa babuba u‐Here no‐Onane elizweni le‐Kanane: nonyana baka‐Faretse bebengu‐Hetserone no‐Hamule." 
Genesis46:13 Nonyana baka‐Yisakare; ngu‐Tola, no‐Puwa, no‐Jobi, no‐Shimrone." 
Genesis46:13 Nonyana baka‐Yisakare; ngu‐Tola, no‐Puwa, no‐Jobi, no‐Shimrone." 
Genesis46:14 Nonyana baka‐Zebulone; ngu‐Serede, no‐Eloni, no‐Yaheleli." 
Genesis46:15 Aba bangonyana baka‐Leya, abebazala ku‐Yakobi e‐Padane‐arame, kwa no‐Dina intombi yake: yonke imipefumlo yonyana bake neyentombi zake ibingamashumi matatu anesitatu." 
Genesis46:16 Nonyana baka‐Gadi; ngu‐Tsifiyone, no‐Hagi, n o‐Shuni, no‐Tseboni, n o‐Heri, no‐Arodi, no‐Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Nonyana baka‐Ashere; ngu‐Yimna, no‐Yisheva, no‐Yishevi, no‐Beriha, no‐Sera udade wabo: nonyana baka‐Beriha; ngu‐Kebere no‐Makiyeli." 
Genesis46:18 Aba bangonyana baka‐Zilipa, lowo u‐Labane wamnikayo ku‐Leya intombi yake; aba ke wabazala ku‐Yakobi, beyimipefumlo elishumi linesitandatu." 
Genesis46:19 Nonyana baka‐Rakele umfazi ka‐Yakobi; ngu‐Josefe no‐Benjamine. 
Genesis46:20 Kwaye kuzalwa ku‐Josefe elizweni le‐Jipete u‐Manase no‐Frayime, abete u‐Asenate, intombi ka‐Potifera, umperisite we‐One, wamzalela bona." 
Genesis46:21 Nonyana baka‐Benjamine; ngu‐Bela, no‐Bekere, no‐Ashebele, n o‐Gera, no‐Nahamane, n o‐Eki, no‐Roshe, n o‐Mupime, no‐Hupime, no‐Aredi." 
Genesis46:22 Aba bangonyana baka‐Rakele, ababemzalelwa u‐Yakobi; yonke imipefumlo ibilishumi elinesine." 
Genesis46:23 Nonyana baka‐Dane; ngu‐Hushime. 
Genesis46:24 Nonyana baka‐Nefatali; ngu‐Yatsiyeli, no‐Guni, no‐Yetsere, no‐Shileme." 
Genesis46:25 Aba bangonyana baka‐Bileha, lowo u‐Labane wamnikayo ku‐Rakele intombi yake; aba ke wabazala ku‐Yakobi: yonke imipefumlo ibisixe̔nxe." 
Genesis46:26 Yonke imipefumlo ebisiza no‐Yakobi e‐Jipete, eyabipumile esinqeni sake, ngapandle kwabo abafazi bonyana baka‐Yakobi, yonke imipefumlo ibingamashumi matandatu anesitandatu;" 
Genesis46:27 nonyana baka‐Josefe, ababezalwa kuye e‐Jipete, bebeyimipefumlo mibini: yonke imipefumlo yendlu ka‐Yakobi, ebisiza e‐Jipete, ibingamashumi asixe̔nxe." 
Genesis46:28 WAZA wamsusa u‐Juda andulele kuye ukuya ku‐Josefe, ukuze abalatise ubuso bake ngase‐Goshene; bada bafika ezweni le‐Goshene." 
Genesis46:29 Waye u‐Josefe wabopa inqwelo yake, wenyuka ukuya kumkaulela u‐Sirayeli uyise e‐Goshene, wazibonakalisa kuye, wamwela intamo, walila entanyeni yake kwa kade." 
Genesis46:30 Waza u‐Sirayeli wati ku‐Josefe: Makendibube kaloku, sendibubonile nje ubuso bako, ukuba usahleli." 
Genesis46:31 Wandula wati u‐Josefe kubakuluwe bake, nakwabendlu kayise: Ndonyuka ndiye kushumayela ku‐Faro, nditi kuye: Abakuluwe bam, nabendlu kabawo, ababesezweni le‐Kanane, bafikile kum;" 
Genesis46:32 kekaloku amadoda lawo angabalusi begusha, ngokuba engabafuyi benkomo; kanjalo azisile igusha zawo, nenkomo zawo, nako konke anako." 
Genesis46:33 Kwakuya kuti, xeshekweni aya kunibiza u‐Faro, ati: Yinto nina umsebenzi wenu?" 
Genesis46:34 nandule ukuti: Izicaka zako zingabafuyi benkomo kwa sebutsheni betu kwada kwakaloku, kwa tina nobawo betu nabo: ukuze nibe nokuhlala elizweni le‐Goshene; ngokuba beyintshontsho kuma‐Jipete bonke abalusi begusha." 
Genesis47:1 Wandula ukuza u‐Josefe washumayela ku‐Faro, wati: Bafikile ubawo nabakuluwe bam, negusha zabo, nenkomo zabo, nako konke abanako, bevela elizweni le‐Kanane; bona ke, basezweni le‐Goshene." 
Genesis47:2 Waya watabata kubo bonke abazalwana bake amadoda amahlanu, wawamisa ebusweni buka‐Faro." 
Genesis47:3 Waza u‐Faro wati kubazalwana bake: Yinto nina umsebenzi wenu? Bati ku‐Faro: Izicaka zako zingabalusi begusha, kwa tina, nobawo betu nabo." 
Genesis47:4 Babuya bati ku‐Faro: Size ukuza kupambukela kwelilizwe; ngokuba kungeko dlelo legusha ezinalo izicaka zako, indlala inzima nje elizweni le‐Kanane: maziti ke ngoko izicaka zako zihlale ezweni le‐Goshene." 
Genesis47:5 Wayesitsho u‐Faro ku‐Josefe ukuti: Uyihlo nabazalwana bako bafikile kuwe; 
Genesis47:6 ilizwe le‐Jipete lipambi kwako lona; kwelungileyo indawo yelizwe bahlalise uyihlo nabazalwana bako: mabahlale ezweni le‐Goshene: kanjalo ukuba uyazi okokuba kuko pakati kwabo amadoda omeleleyo, wandule uwenze abe ngabapati pezu kwenkomo zam." 
Genesis47:7 Waye u‐Josefe wamngenisa u‐Yakobi uyise, wammisa ebusweni buka‐Faro; waza u‐Yakobi wamtamsanqela u‐Faro." 
Genesis47:8 Wayesiti u‐Faro ku‐Yakobi: Mingapina imihla yeminyaka yokudla kwako ubomi? 
Genesis47:9 Wati u‐Yakobi ku‐Faro: Imihla yeminyaka yokupambukela kwam yiminyaka elikulu linamashumi matatu; ibe yemincinane nebububi imihla yeminyaka yokudla kwam ubomi, ndandingafikelelanga kuyo imihla yeminyaka yokudla ubomi kwobawo emihleni yokupambukela kwabo." 
Genesis47:10 Waza u‐Yakobi wamtamsanqela u‐Faro, wapuma ebusweni buka‐Faro." 
Genesis47:11 Waye u‐Josefe wahlalisa uyise nabazalwana bake, wabanika imfuyo yomhlaba elizweni le‐Jipete, kwelungileyo indawo yelizwe, elizweni le‐Ramesese, njengokuxela kuka‐Faro." 
Genesis47:12 Waza u‐Josefe wabafunzela uyise, nabazalwana bake, nabo bonke abendlu kayise, ngesonka esilingene nentsapo." 
Genesis47:13 KWAYE kungeko sonka kulo lonke ilizwe; ngokuba indlala ibinzima kakulu, lada lacubuka ilizwe le‐Jipete nelizwe le‐Kanane ngenxa yendlala." 
Genesis47:14 Waza u‐Josefe wabuta yonke imali ebifunyanwa elizweni le‐Jipete, naselizweni le‐Kanane, ngenxa yenqolowa abayitengayo; waye u‐Josefe wangenisa imali leyo endlwini ka‐Faro." 
Genesis47:15 Kekaloku yakugqibeka imali elizweni le‐Jipete, naselizweni le‐Kanane, andula eza onke ama‐Jipete ku‐Josefe, esiti: Sipe isonka; kunganina ke ukuba sibube ebusweni bako? ngokuba ipelile imali." 
Genesis47:16 Wayesiti u‐Josefe: Yipani inkomo zenu, ndandiya kuninika ngenxa yenkomo zenu, ukuba imali ipelile." 
Genesis47:17 Aza azisa inkomo zawo ku‐Josefe; wati u‐Josefe wawanika isonka ngenxa yamahashe, nangenxa yenkomo ezincinane, nangenxa yenkomo ezinkulu, nangenxa yamaqwaṙashe: wandula wawaxasa ngesonka ngenxa yazo zonke inkomo zawo ngalomnyaka." 
Genesis47:18 Kwati kwakugqitywa umnyaka lowo, abuya eza kuye ngowesibini umnyaka, ati kuye: Asiyi kukufihla enkosini yam, okokuba isel’ igqibekile imali; kanjalo imfuyo yetu yenkomo ibohlele enkosini yam: akuko nto eseleyo ebusweni benkosi yam, kupela yimizimba yetu, nemihlaba yetu:" 
Genesis47:19 kunganina ukuba sibube pambi kwamehlo ako, kwa tina nomhlaba wetu? sitenge tina nawo umhlaba wetu ngesonka; sasiya kuti tina, nomhlaba wetu, sibe zizicaka ku‐Faro; uze unike imbewu, ukuba sidle ubomi, singafi nokufa, nokuba umhlaba ungatshabalali." 
Genesis47:20 Waza u‐Josefe wamtengela u‐Faro wonke umhlaba wase‐Jipete: ngokuba ama‐Jipete ebetengisile ngamasimi awo amanye ngamanye, ngokokuba indlala ibinamandla pezu kwawo; wada umhlaba lowo waba ngoka‐Faro." 
Genesis47:21 Nabo abantu, wabafudusela ezixekweni, kwa kwenye incam yemida yase‐Jipete kwada kwakwenye incam yayo." 
Genesis47:22 Kupela umhlaba wabaperisite ebengawutengi: ngokuba abaperisite bebenesahlulelwa sivela ku‐Faro, abatyayo isahlulelwa sabo ababesipiwe ngu‐Faro; kukona babengatengisi ngomhlaba wabo." 
Genesis47:23 Wandula wati u‐Josefe ebantwini: Bona ke, senditengele u‐Faro namhla nje nina nomhlaba wenu: kekaloku nantsi imbewu kuni, ukuba nihlwayele umhlaba." 
Genesis47:24 Kwakuya kuti ekuveliseni, esesihlanu isahlulo niya kusinikela u‐Faro, nezahlulo zizine zoba zezenu, zibe zezembewu yentsimi, nezokutya kwenu, nezokwabo basezindlwini zenu, nezokutya kwentsapo zenu." 
Genesis47:25 Baye besiti: Ulondolozile ubomi betu; makesifumane ufefe emehlweni enkosi yam, sasiya kuba zizicaka ku‐Faro." 
Genesis47:26 Waza u‐Josefe wamisa oku kube ngumteto kwada kwanamhla pezu kwomhlaba wase‐Jipete, ukuba u‐Faro abe nesesihlanu isahlulo; kupela ngumhlaba wabaperisite bodwa obe ungengoka‐Faro." 
Genesis47:27 KWA njalo wahlala u‐Sirayeli elizweni le‐Jipete, elizweni le‐Goshene: bada bazuza imfuyo kulo, bacuma, banda nokwanda kakulu." 
Genesis47:28 Waye u‐Yakobi wahlala ezweni le‐Jipete iminyaka yalishumi linesixe̔nxe; yaza imihla ka‐Yakobi, iminyaka yokudla kwake ubomi, yaba likulu leminyaka linamashumi mane anesixe̔nxe." 
Genesis47:29 Yada yasondela imihla ka‐Sirayeli yokuba abube; waza wabiza unyana wake u‐Josefe, wati kuye: Ukuba ke sendifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, kaubeke isandla sako ngapantsi kwetanga lam, undenzele ububele nenyaniso: zungandincw̔abi e‐Jipete;" 
Genesis47:30 koko ndiya kulala nobawo bam, wauya kundisusa e‐Jipete, undincw̔abe encw̔abeni labo. Wayesiti: Ndiya kwenza njengelizwi lako." 
Genesis47:31 Waza wati: Ndifungele. Wamfungela ke. Waza u‐Sirayeli wazitoba pezu kwentloko yawo umandlalo. 
Genesis48:1 Kwaye kute emveni kwezizinto, kwatiwa ku‐Josefe: Bona ke, uyihlo uyafa. Wasuka watabata naye onyana bake bobabini, u‐Manase no‐Frayime." 
Genesis48:2 Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Yakobi, kwatiwa: Bona ke, unyana wako u‐Josefe uyeza kuwe. Waye u‐Sirayeli wazomeleza, wahlala pezu kwawo umandlalo." 
Genesis48:3 Wandula u‐Yakobi wati ku‐Josefe: Utixo onamandla onke wabonakala kum e‐Luze, elizweni le‐Kanane, wanditamsanqela," 
Genesis48:4 wati kum: Bona ke, ndokucumisa, ndikwandise, ndenze ngawe umhlambi wabantu; ndandiya kunika elilizwe kwinzalo yako emva kwako libe yimfuyo engunapakade." 
Genesis48:5 Nakaloku, onyana bako bobabini, abebezelwe kuwe ezweni le‐Jipete, ndingekafiki kuwe e‐Jipete, ngabam: u‐Frayime no‐Manase boba ngabam, njengo‐Rubene no‐Simone." 
Genesis48:6 Kodwa abantwana bako, oya kubazala emva kwabo, boba ngabako; baya kubizwa ngegama labazalwana babo elifeni labo." 
Genesis48:7 Mna ke, ekuveleni kwam e‐Padane, wabubela kum u‐Rakele ezweni le‐Kanane, endleleni, nxa ibiseko indawana yomhlaba ukuba kufikwe e‐Eferata; ndaye ndimncw̔aba kona endleleni yase‐Eferata, ekwa yiyo i‐Beteleheme." 
Genesis48:8 Waye u‐Sirayeli ebona onyana baka‐Josefe, wati: Bangobanina aba?" 
Genesis48:9 Wati u‐Josefe kuyise: Bangonyana bam, endibapiweyo ngutixo kule ndawo. Wayesiti: Zubazise kum, ukuba ndibatamsanqele." 
Genesis48:10 Koko amehlo ka‐Sirayeli ebenzima ngobudala, wada wakohlwa kukubona. Waza wabasondeza kuye; wandu ukubanga, wabasingata." 
Genesis48:11 Wayesiti u‐Sirayeli ku‐Josefe: Bendingabanga ndiya kubona ubuso bako; kanti, bona ke, utixo undibonisile nenzalo yako." 
Genesis48:12 Waza u‐Josefe wabapumisa emadolweni ake, waziqubuda ebusweni bake ngasemhlabeni." 
Genesis48:13 Waye u‐Josefe wabatabata bobabini, u‐Frayime ngesokunene isandla sake ngakuso esokohlo isandla sika‐Sirayeli, no‐Manase ngesokohlo isandla sake ngakuso esokunene isandla sika‐Sirayeli, wabasondeza kuye." 
Genesis48:14 Waza u‐Sirayeli wolula isandla sake sokunene, wasibeka pezu kwentloko ka‐Frayime, obenguye omncinane, nesandla sake sokohlo pezu kwentloko ka‐Manase, ezibeka izandla zake ngokutelekelela; ngokuba u‐Manase ebengowamazibulo." 
Genesis48:15 Wandula wamtamsanqela u‐Josefe, wati: Wanga angati utixo, lowo bahambile pambi kwake obawo bam, u‐Abrahame no‐Yisake, utixo ondidlisileyo kwa sekuzalweni kwam kwada kwanamhla," 
Genesis48:16 kwa ingelosi endikululeyo kubo bonke ububi, atamsanqele abafana aba; malibizwe pezu kwabo igama lam, negama lobawo bam, u‐Abrahame no‐Yisake; mabakolise ukwanda kakulu pakati kwelizwe!" 
Genesis48:17 Wati u‐Josefe akubona okokuba uyise ubekile isandla sake sokunene pezu kwentloko ka‐Frayime, kwakubi emehlweni ake; waza wabamba isandla sikayise, ukuba asikwelelise entlokweni ka‐Frayime asibeke pezu kwentloko ka‐Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Waye u‐Josefe esiti kuyise: Makungabi njalo, bawo! ngokuba nguló owamazibulo; beka isandla sako sokunene pezu kwentloko yake." 
Genesis48:19 Koko walayo uyise, wati: Ndiyakwazi, nyana wam! ndiyakwazi; yena naye woba ngabantu, yena naye woba mkulu; kodwa umninawe wake omncinane uya kumgqita ngobukulu noko, nenzalo yake yoba yinto eninzi yezizwe." 
Genesis48:20 Waza wabatamsanqela ngaleyomini, esiti: Kwa ngawe o‐Sirayeli baya kutamsanqela, besiti: Wanga utixo angakwenza njengo‐Frayime nanjengo‐Manase! Wayebeka u‐Frayime pambi kwo‐Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Wandula wati u‐Sirayeli ku‐Josefe: Bona ke, ndiyabuba; koko utixo eya kuba nani, anibuyisele elizweni loyihlo benu." 
Genesis48:22 Kanjalo ndikunikile isahlulo sinye ngapezu kwabazalwana bako, endasisusayo esandleni saba‐Amori ngesiṙele sam nangesipeta sam." 
Genesis49:1 WAYE u‐Yakobi ebiza onyana bake, wati: Zibuteni, ndandiya kunixelela oko niya kuhlelwa kuko emihleni yasemva." 
Genesis49:2 Zihlanganiseni, nipulapule, bonyana baka‐Yakobi! pulapulani ku‐Sirayeli uyihlo wenu." 
Genesis49:3 Rubene! ungowamazibulo wam wena, amandla am, nokuqala kwokwomelela kwam; indluliselo yobungangamsha, nendluliselo yobukulu;" 
Genesis49:4 upupuma nje njengamanzi, akuyi kudlulisela; ngokuba ubunyukela esililini soyihlo wako; wandula ukusinco̔lisa: wenyuka yena pezu kwomandlalo wam." 
Genesis49:5 U‐Simone no‐Levi ngabazalwana; zizixo̔bo zobudlwengu iziṙele zabo. 
Genesis49:6 Ungangeni esihlelweni sabo, mpefumlo wam! ungazibandakanyi entlanganisweni yabo, bungcwalisa bam! ngokuba engqunjeni yabo babulala amadoda, nangenkani yabo basika inkabi umbotshwa." 
Genesis49:7 Mauqalekiswe ingqumbo yabo, ngokuba ibujoṙa; kwa nomsindo wabo, ngokuba ulukuni: ndiya kubahlulahlula kwa‐Yakobi, ndibati sa kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Genesis49:8 Juda! wena abazalwana bako bokudumisa; isandla sako soba sentanyeni sentshaba zako; baya kuziqubuda pambi kwako onyana boyihlo. 
Genesis49:9 U‐Juda ulitole lengonyama; unyukile ekuqwengeni, nyana wam! Watoba, wati butu njengengonyama, nanjengengonyamakazi; ngubanina oya kumvusa?" 
Genesis49:10 Intonga yobukumkani ayiyi kumka ku‐Juda, nomnikamteto pakati kwenyawo zake, ade afike u‐Shilo: kwa yena izizwe ziya kumlulamela." 
Genesis49:11 Uyanxibelela emtini weveyine iqwaṙashana lake, nasemtini weveyine odumileyo itole leqwaṙashekazi lake; uyahlanza kuyo iveyine isivato sake, nasegazini ledreyive ingubo yake:" 
Genesis49:12 amehlo ake abomvu ngayo iveyine, namazinyo ake amhlope ngawo amasi." 
Genesis49:13 U‐Zebulone wohlala ngaselunxwemeni lwelwandle; woba ngaselunxwemeni lwasezinqanaweni: icala lake lofikelela e‐Tsidone. 
Genesis49:14 U‐Yisakare liqwaṙashe elomeleleyo, lite butu pakati kwezibaya." 
Genesis49:15 Waebona indawo yokupumla ukuba ilungile, nelizwe ukuba limnandi; wandula watoba igxalaba lake ekutwaleni, wanikela ngenkonzo." 
Genesis49:16 U‐Dane uya kugweba abantu bake, njengesinye sezizwe zakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Genesis49:17 U‐Dane woba yinyoka endleleni, iṙamba emendweni, elilumayo izitende zehashe, aze awe ngomva okwele kulo." 
Genesis49:18 Usindiso lwako ndilutembele, Yehova!" 
Genesis49:19 U‐Gadi iqela liya kumwela; kanti uya kuwela abasemva yena. 
Genesis49:20 Kwa‐Ashere isonka sake siya kutyeba; waeya kunika izimnandi zokumkani. 
Genesis49:21 U‐Nefatali libadikazi elindululweyo; uyanika amazwi amahle. 
Genesis49:22 U‐Josefe lisebe eliqa̔mileyo, lisebe eliqa̔mileyo ngasemtonjeni, eli magatya anabelayo pezu kwodonga." 
Genesis49:23 Abatoli bamcapukisile, batola, bamzonda;" 
Genesis49:24 koko isipeta sake sahlala sisebunqobeni, nengalo zezandla zake zazomelele. Kuzo izandla zosomandla ka‐Yakobi, kwa kona apo, kuye umalusi, ilitye lika‐Sirayeli," 
Genesis49:25 kutixo woyihlo wako, oya kukunceda, nakonamandla onke, oya kukutamsanqela, makuvele amatamsanqa asezulwini evela pezulu, namatamsanqa asenzulwini ilele ngapantsi, amatamsanqa amabele, nawesizalo." 
Genesis49:26 Amatamsanqa oyihlo wako anamandla pezu kwamatamsanqa omakulu bam, kude kube semdeni wenduli ezingunapakade: oba sentloko ka‐Josefe, naselukakayini lwalowo ube wahlukene nabazalwana bake." 
Genesis49:27 U‐Benjamine uya kuqwenga njeng encu̔ka: kusasa wodla okubanjiweyo, nangokuhlwa uya kwaba okutinjiweyo." 
Genesis49:28 Bonke aba bazizizwe zo‐Sirayeli zilishumi linazibini: kuko oku wabekuteta kubo uyise wabo, akubatamsanqela; abanye ngabanye wabatamsanqela njengawabo amatamsanqa." 
Genesis49:29 Waza wabayolela, wati kubo: Ndiza kubutelwa ebantwini bam; ndincw̔abeni nobawo bam emqolombeni osentsimini ka‐Hefrone um‐Hete;" 
Genesis49:30 emqolombeni osentsimini yase‐Makapela, epambi kwe‐Mamre, elizweni le‐Kanane, lowo wawutengayo u‐Abrahame kunye nentsimi ka‐Hefrone um‐Hete, ube yimfuyo yendawo yokuncw̔aba." 
Genesis49:31 Kwa lapo bamncw̔aba u‐Abrahame, no‐Sara umfazi wake: apo bamncw̔aba u‐Yisake, no‐Rebeka umfazi wake; nalapo ndamncw̔aba u‐Leya." 
Genesis49:32 Bekutengwa intsimi leyo, nomqolomba okuyo, elusatsheni luka‐Hete." 
Genesis49:33 Wandula u‐Yakobi, akuba egqibile ukuyolela onyana bake, wafinyeza inyawo zake emandlalweni, wapuma umpefumlo, wabutelwa ebantwini bake." 
Genesis50:1 Waza u‐Josefe wawela ubuso boyise, walila pezu kwake, wamanga." 
Genesis50:2 Wayeyalela u‐Josefe izicaka zake incibi zamayeza, ukuba zimnyange uyise; zaza incibi zamayeza zamnyanga u‐Sirayeli." 
Genesis50:3 Kwamzalisekiselwa imihla yamashumi mane; ngokuba bekunjalo ukuzalisekiswa kwemihla yabanyangwayo: aye ama‐Jipete amlilela imihla yamashumi asixe̔nxe. 
Genesis50:4 Kwati kwakuba kudlulile imihla yokulilelwa kwake, wandula wateta u‐Josefe kwabendlu ka‐Faro, esiti: Ukuba ndike ndafumana ufefe emehlweni enu, zenitete ezindlebeni zika‐Faro, nisiti:" 
Genesis50:5 Ubawo wandifungisa, esiti: Bona ke, ndiza kububa; encw̔abeni lam endizimbele lona elizweni le‐Kanane, kwa kona apo uya kundincw̔aba. Kaloku makendinyuke ukuya kumncw̔aba ubawo, ndandule ukubuya." 
Genesis50:6 Wati u‐Faro: Nyuka, uye umncw̔abe uyihlo, njengokukufungisa kwake." 
Genesis50:7 Waza wenyuka u‐Josefe ukuya kumncw̔aba uyise: kwenyuka naye zonke izicaka zika‐Faro, abadala bendlu yake, nabo bonke abadala belizwe le‐Jipete;" 
Genesis50:8 kwa nayo yonke indlu ka‐Josefe, nabazalwana bake, nendlu kayise: kupela intsatshana zabo, negusha zabo, nenkomo zabo, bazishiya elizweni le‐Goshene." 
Genesis50:9 Kwaye kunyuka naye nenqwelo nabakweli bamahashe; lalilibandla elikulu kakulu. 
Genesis50:10 Bada bafika esibayeni sokubula sika‐Atade, esipesheya kwe‐Yoredane; baza balila kona ngesililo esikulu nesinzima kunene; wayemenzela uyise isijwili imihla yasixe̔nxe." 
Genesis50:11 Bandula abemi belozwe, aba‐Kanane, bakubona isijwili eso esibayeni sika‐Atade, bati: Sisijwili esinzima esi kuma‐Jipete; ngako oko kwabizwa igama laso ngokuti, yi‐Abele‐mitsarime, epesheya kwe‐Yoredane." 
Genesis50:12 Benje njalo ke onyana bake kuye, njengokuba ebebayalele:" 
Genesis50:13 ngokuba onyana bake bamtwalela elizweni le‐Kanane, baza bamncw̔aba emqolombeni wentsimi yase‐Makapela, lowo u‐Abrahame wabewutengile kunye nentsimi, ube yimfuyo yendawo yokuncw̔aba, ku‐Hefrone um‐Hete, ngapambi kwe‐Mamre." 
Genesis50:14 Wandula u‐Josefe wabuyela e‐Jipete, kwa yena, nabazalwana bake, nabo bonke abebenyukile naye ukuya kumncw̔aba uyise, emveni kwokumncw̔aba kwake uyise." 
Genesis50:15 KEKALOKU bakubona abakuluwe baka‐Josefe ukuba ufile uyise wabo, bandula bati: Angaba u‐Josefe uya kusitiya, abuyekeze kuti ngokwenyaniso bonke ububi esasimenzela bona." 
Genesis50:16 Baza bayaleza ku‐Josefe, besiti: Uyihlo wayolela engekabubi ngokuti:" 
Genesis50:17 Niya kutsho ku‐Josefe ukuti: Uze uke uxolele isilandu sabakuluwe bako, nesono sabo; ngokuba bekwenzele inkohlakalo: ngako kaloku, uze uxolele isilandu sezicaka zake utixo woyihlo wako. Walila ke u‐Josefe kwakutetwa kuye." 
Genesis50:18 Basuka baya nabakuluwe bake, bawa pantsi ebusweni bake, bati: Nanku sizizicaka zako!" 
Genesis50:19 Waza wati u‐Josefe kubo: Ningoyiki; ngokuba ndisendaweni katixo yinina? 
Genesis50:20 Nina okunene nibe nicinga ngakum inkohlakalo; oko kodwa utixo wakucingela okulungileyo, kuze kuti, njengokuba kunjalo kwa namhla nje, kulondolozwe abantu abaninzi ebomini." 
Genesis50:21 Ngako kaloku, ningoyiki; ndonifunzela nina, kwa nentsapo zenu. Waza wabatutuzela, wateta ezintliziyweni zabo." 
Genesis50:22 Waye u‐Josefe wema e‐Jipete, yena nendlu kayise: wati u‐Josefe wahlala iminyaka yalikulu lineshumi nye." 
Genesis50:23 Wabona u‐Josefe abaka‐Frayime abantwana besesitatu isizukulwana; kanjalo abantwana baka‐Makire, unyana ka‐Manase, babezelwe pezu kwamadolo ka‐Josefe." 
Genesis50:24 Wandula wati u‐Josefe kubazalwana bake: Bona ke, ndiza kububa mna; koko utixo eya kunikumbula ngenyaniso, aninyuse kwelilizwe ukuya ezweni wabefunga ngalo ku‐Abrahame, ku‐Yisake, naku‐Yakobi." 
Genesis50:25 Waza u‐Josefe wafungisa usapo luka‐Sirayeli, esiti: Utixo wonikumbula ngenyaniso, naniya kunyusa amatambo am kule ndawo." 
Genesis50:26 Wada wabuba u‐Josefe, eyiminyaka ilikulu lineshumi nye ubudala bake: baye bemnyanga ke, waza wafakwa etyeyeni e‐Jipete." 
Exodus1:1 KEKALOKU ngawo la amagama abo onyana baka‐Sirayeli, abezayo e‐Jipete no‐Yakobi; abanye ngabanye beza nabendlu zabo:" 
Exodus1:2 u‐Rubene, u‐Simone, u‐Levi, no‐Juda;" 
Exodus1:3 u‐Yisakare, u‐Zebulone, no‐Benjamine;" 
Exodus1:4 u‐Dane no‐Nefatali, u‐Gadi no‐Ashere." 
Exodus1:5 Yonke imipefumlo eyabipumile esinqeni sika‐Yakobi ibiyimipefumlo imashumi asixe̔nxe: kodwa u‐Josefe ebesel’ eko e‐Jipete. 
Exodus1:6 Wada wafa u‐Josefe, kwa nabo bonke abazalwana bake, naso sonke isizukulwana eso." 
Exodus1:7 Lwandula lwacuma usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwakolisa ukwanda, lwaba luninzi, lwazuza amandla ngento enkulu kakulu; laza ilizwe lazaliswa lulo." 
Exodus1:8 Kwada kwavuka ukumkani omtsha pezu kwe‐Jipete, obengamazanga u‐Josefe." 
Exodus1:9 Wati yena ebantwini bake: Bona ke, abantu abalusapo luka‐Sirayeli basigqitile ngokuba baninzi nangokuba namandla." 
Exodus1:10 Yizani kesenze ngobuqinga kubo; hlezibe babe nokwanda, kude kuti, nxa sukuba isihla imfazwe, batelele kwintshaba zetu nabo, balwe nati, benyuke elizweni." 
Exodus1:11 Ngako bamisa pezu kwabo abapati benkonzo, ukuze bababandezele ngemitwalo yabo. Baye besakela u‐Faro izixeko zokubekela, i‐Pitome ne‐Ramesese." 
Exodus1:12 Kodwa njengoko bababandezelayo, kwa ngokunjalo baba baninzi, nangokunjalo babesanda; baba boyika kakulu ngenxa yosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus1:13 Aza ama‐Jipete akonzisa usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngobulukuni: 
Exodus1:14 nobomi balo abenza buṙaṙa ngenkonzo elukuni, eludongweni, naseziteneni, nakuzo zonke inkonzo zasendle: yonke inkonzo yalo, abelukonzisa ngayo, ibingobulukuni." 
Exodus1:15 Waye ukumkani we‐Jipete eteta kubo abazalisikazi bama‐Heberekazi, elalibe igama lomnye lingu‐Shifera, negama lomnye lingu‐Puha;" 
Exodus1:16 wati: Ekuzaliseni kwenu ama‐Heberekazi, niya kwandula nikangele ni pezu kwezitulo; ukuba ngunyana, niya kumbulala; ukuba kodwa yintombi, yona iya kudla ubomi." 
Exodus1:17 Koko abazalisikazi bamoyika utixo; ngako abenza njengokutetiweyo kubo ngukumkani we‐Jipete, kodwa balondoloza amakwenkwe ebomini." 
Exodus1:18 Waza ukumkani we‐Jipete wabiza abazalisikazi, wati kubo: Niyenzele nina lento, yokuba nilondolozile amakwenkwe ebomini?" 
Exodus1:19 Bati abazalisikazi ku‐Faro: Ngokuba ama‐Heberekazi engenjengabafazi abangama‐Jipetekazi: ngokuba omelele wona; kwa engekangeni kuwo umzalisikazi, asel’ ezele." 
Exodus1:20 Ngako utixo wenzela abazalisikazi okulungileyo; bati abantu abo baba baninzi, bazuza amandla ngento enkulu." 
Exodus1:21 Kwaye kute, ngokokuba abazalisikazi bamoyika utixo, waza wabenzela izindlu." 
Exodus1:22 Wandula u‐Faro wayalela bonke abantu bake, esiti: Bonke onyana abazelweyo niya kubaposa emlanjeni, kodwa zonke intombi niya kuzilondoloza ebomini." 
Exodus2:1 KWAYE kusuka indoda yendlu ka‐Levi, yaya yazeka intombi ka‐Levi." 
Exodus2:2 Waye umfazi lo wamita, wazala unyana; wati akumbona ukuba umhle, wamfihla inyanga zantatu." 
Exodus2:3 Koko xeshekweni ebengasenako ukumfihla, wamtabatela umkombe wengcongolo, wawusinda ngodaka nangetywina, waza wabeka umntwana kuwo, wabeka wona pakati kwemikanzi ngaselugudwini lwomlambo." 
Exodus2:4 Waya udade wake wazimisa ekude, ukuze azi into aya kwenziwa yona." 
Exodus2:5 Kekaloku yehla intombi ka‐Faro ukuya kuhlamba emlanjeni; wati umtinjana wayo wahamba ngasecaleni lomlambo; yaza yabona umkombe pakati kwemikanzi, yatuma isicakazana sayo siye siwuzeke." 
Exodus2:6 Yati yakuba ivulile, yambona umntwana lowo; kekaloku bona ke, yinkwenkwana ilila; yaza yabetwa lusizi pezu kwayo, yati: Ngowakubo abantwana bama‐Hebere lo." 
Exodus2:7 Wandul’ ukuti udade wake kwintombi ka‐Faro: Ndoka ndiye na ndikubizele umanyisikazi kuwo ama‐Heberekazi, aze akwanyisele umntwana lo?" 
Exodus2:8 Yaselisiti kuye intombi ka‐Faro: Hamba uye. Yasuka intombazana leyo yaya yabiza unina womntwana. 
Exodus2:9 Yaza intombi ka‐Faro yati kuye: Susa lomntwana, undanyisele yena, ndandiya kunika umvuzo wako. Waza umfazi lowo watabata umntwana, wamanyisa." 
Exodus2:10 Wandula wati, akuba mkulu umntwana, wamsa kwintombi ka‐Faro, waza waba ngunyana wayo; eyambiza ngegama elingu‐Mosesi, yati: Ngokuba ndimr̔olile emanzini." 
Exodus2:11 Kwaye kute ngezontsuku, nxa selekulile u‐Mosesi, wapuma waya kubo abazalwana bake, wabonela imitwalo yabo; wada wabona um‐Jipete ebeta um‐Hebere, owasebazalwaneni bake." 
Exodus2:12 Waza wabeka apa napaya, wati, akubona ukuba akuko mntu, wambulala um‐Jipete, wamselela entlabatini." 
Exodus2:13 Wabuya wapuma ngomhla wesibini, kekaloku nanga amadoda mabini engama‐Hebere engxolisana; waza wati kweyonileyo: Umbeta nganina ummelwane wako?" 
Exodus2:14 Yati yona: Umiselwe ngubanina ukuba ube yinkosi nomgwebi pezu kwetu? Unga ungandibulala na, njengokuba ubulele um‐Jipete? Wandu ukwoyika u‐Mosesi, wati: Ngenyaniso lento yazekile." 
Exodus2:15 Wati u‐Faro akuba evile lendawo, wafuna ukumbulala u‐Mosesi. Koko wesaba u‐Mosesi ebusweni buka‐Faro, waya wema elizweni le‐Midiyane: wada wahlala pantsi ngasequleni." 
Exodus2:16 Kekaloku umperisite wase‐Midiyane wanentombi zasixe̔nxe; ezezayo zaka amanzi, zazalisa imijelo, ukuze kusezwe izimvu zoyise." 
Exodus2:17 Bandula ukuza abalusi, bazigxota; koko wesuka u‐Mosesi wazisiza, waseza izimvu zazo." 
Exodus2:18 Nxa zibe zifika ku‐Rehule uyise, wati yena: Kunganina ukuba nikaulezile kangaka ukubuya namhla?" 
Exodus2:19 Zati zona: Indoda engum‐Jipete yasihlangula esandleni sabalusi; kanjako yakolisa ukusikelela, yaseza izimvu." 
Exodus2:20 Waza wati ezintombini zake: Ipina pofu? Iyinina lento niyishiyile indoda leyo? Yibizeni, ize itye isonka." 
Exodus2:21 Wabe u‐Mosesi evuma ukuhlala nalondoda: yaza yanika u‐Mosesi u‐Tsipora intombi yayo. 
Exodus2:22 Owazala unyana ke; waye u‐Mosesi ebiza igama lake ngo‐Gereshome; ngokuba ebesiti: Ndingowasemzini ezweni lasemzini. 
Exodus2:23 KWAYE kute pakati kwezontsuku zininzi, wafa ukumkani we‐Jipete; lwaye usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwagula ngenxa yenkonzo, lwakala nokukala; kwaza ukubongoza kwalo kwenyukela kutixo ngenxa yenkonzo." 
Exodus2:24 Weva utixo ukutswina kwalo, wayekumbula utixo ucebano lwake kunye no‐Abrahame, no‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi." 
Exodus2:25 Waza utixo wabona usapo luka‐Sirayeli, waye utixo enokulwazi." 
Exodus3:1 Kekaloku u‐Mosesi ebesalusa izimvu zika‐Yetero, usomfazi wake, umperisite wase‐Midiyane: wasuka waqu̔ba izimvu ngasele kwentlango, wada wafika entabeni katixo, e‐Horebe." 
Exodus3:2 Yandula yabonakala ingelosi kayehova kuye elangatyeni lomlilo pakati kwetyolo; waza wakangela, kekaloku nali ityolo lisitsha ngomlilo, lingenakugqityelwa noko." 
Exodus3:3 Wayesiti u‐Mosesi: Ndoka ndipambuke ndiye kubona esisibonakalo sikulu, kunganina ukuba lingatshisekanga ityolo." 
Exodus3:4 Wati akubona uyehova ukuba upambukile ukuza kubona, wandula utixo wabiza kuye kwa pakati kwetyolo, wati: Mosesi, Mosesi! Wati yena: Nanku, ndi lapa." 
Exodus3:5 Wayesiti: Ungasondeli apa; susa izihlangu zako ezinyaweni zako, ngokuba indawo umi kuyo ingumhlaba ongcwele." 
Exodus3:6 Wabuya wati: Mna ndi ngutixo woyihlo, utixo ka‐Abrahame, utixo ka‐Yisake, notixo ka‐Yakobi. Waza u‐Mosesi wagqubutela ubuso bake; ngokuba ebesoyika ukukangela ngakutixo." 
Exodus3:7 Wati kanjalo uyehova: Ndikolisile ukubona ubunzima babantu bam abase‐Jipete, nokukala kwabo ndikuvile ngenxa yenkosi zabo zomsebenzi; ngokuba intsizi zabo ndizazile." 
Exodus3:8 Ndihlile ngoko, ukuba ndibahlangule esandleni sama‐Jipete, nokuba ndibanyuse kwelilizwe baye ezweni elilungileyo nelibanzi, ezweni elela ubisi nobusi; endaweni yabo aba‐Kanane, nama‐Hete, naba‐Amori, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi." 
Exodus3:9 Nakaloku, nanku ukukala kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli kufikile kum; kanjako ndibonile imbandezelo ama‐Jipete alubandezela ngayo." 
Exodus3:10 Uze ke ngoku, ndandiya kukutuma ukuya ku‐Faro, ukuba upumise abantu bam, usapo luka‐Sirayeli, e‐Jipete." 
Exodus3:11 Waza wati u‐Mosesi kutixo: Ndingubanina mna, ukuba ndiye ku‐Faro, nokuba ndipumise usapo luka‐Sirayeli e‐Jipete?" 
Exodus3:12 Wayesiti: Ngenyaniso ndiya kubako nawe; kanjako oku kwoba ngumqondiso kuwe, wokuba ndikutumile mna: nxa ubakupileyo ababantu e‐Jipete, niya kumkonza utixo pezu kwalentaba." 
Exodus3:13 Wati u‐Mosesi kutixo: Bona ke, ndakuza kufika elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, nditi kulo: Utixo woyihlo benu unditumile kuni; lwandule luti kum: Ngubanina igama lake? ndoti nina kulo?" 
Exodus3:14 Waye utixo esiti ku‐Mosesi: Ndikoko endikuko. Wati kanjalo: Uya kutsho elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli ukuti: Undingokoyo unditumile kuni. 
Exodus3:15 Walekela wati utixo ku‐Mosesi: Uya kutsho elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli ukuti: Uyehova, utixo woyihlo benu, utixo ka‐Abrahame, utixo ka‐Yisake, notixo ka‐Yakobi, unditumile kuni; leli igama lam kude kube ngunapakade, sesi nesikumbuzo sam kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Exodus3:16 Hamba, uye uhlanganise abadala bo‐Sirayeli, uti kubo: Uyehova, utixo woyihlo benu, ubonakele kum, kwa utixo ka‐Abrahame, ka‐Yisake, noka‐Yakobi, esiti: Sendinikumbule ngokwenene, noko enenzelwe kona e‐Jipete." 
Exodus3:17 Ndite ngoko: Ndoninyusa ebunzimeni base‐Jipete niye elizweni laba‐Kanane, nama‐Hete, naba‐Amori, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi, elizweni elela ubisi nobusi." 
Exodus3:18 Bopulapula ke ilizwi lako; wauya kuza wena, kwa nabadala bo‐Sirayeli, kukumkani we‐Jipete, naniya kuti kuye: Uyehova, utixo wama‐Hebere, uhlangene nati; uz’ uti ke kaloku, makesiye ihambo yemihla ibe mitatu entlango, ukuya kubingela uyehova, utixo wetu." 
Exodus3:19 Sendikwazi kodwa, okokuba akayi kuvuma ukumkani we‐Jipete ukuba niye, kupela ngesandla esinamandla." 
Exodus3:20 Ngokuba ndiya kwolula isandla sam, ndibete i‐Jipete ngayo yonke imimangaliso yam, endiya kuyenza pakati kwayo; woti emveni kwoko anindulule." 
Exodus3:21 Ndandiya kunika ababantu ufefe emehlweni ama‐Jipete; kwakuya kuti, nakumka, aniyi kumka zé:" 
Exodus3:22 koko abafazi beya kubiza kwabamelwanekazi babo, nakwabapambukelikazi abasezindlwini zabo, impahla zesilivere, nempahla zegolide, nezivato: eniya kuzibeka pezu kwonyana benu, napezu kwentombi zenu; naniya kupanga ama‐Jipete." 
Exodus4:1 Wapendula u‐Mosesi wati: Kodwa, bona ke, abayi kukolwa ndim, abayi kupulapula ilizwi lam kanjalo: ngokuba beya kuti: Akabonakalanga kuwe uyehova." 
Exodus4:2 Waza wati uyehova kuye: Yinto nina leyo isesandleni sako? Wati: Yintonga. 
Exodus4:3 Wayesiti: Yipose emhlabeni. Wayiposa ke emhlabeni, yaza yaba yinyoka; wasuka u‐Mosesi wabaleka ebusweni bayo." 
Exodus4:4 Wandul’ ukuti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yolula isandla sako, uyinqakule ngomsila wayo. Waza wasolula isandla sake, wayibamba; yabuya yaba yintonga esandleni sake." 
Exodus4:5 Uya kwenje njalo ke, ukuze bakolwe ukuba ubonakele kuwe uyehova, utixo woyise babo, utixo ka‐Abrahame, utixo ka‐Yisake, notixo ka‐Yakobi." 
Exodus4:6 Wabuya wati uyehova kuye: Uze kaloku ufake isandla sako esifubeni sako. Waza wafaka isandla sake esifubeni sake; kekaloku akusikupa, nasi isandla sake sinesilepero simhlope njengengqweqwe." 
Exodus4:7 Wayesiti: Sibuyisele esifubeni sako isandla sako. Waza wabuyisela esifubeni sake isandla sake; kekaloku akusikupa esifubeni sake, nasi ke siguqulwe saba njengenyama yake enye." 
Exodus4:8 Kwakuya kuti, ukuba abakolwa nguwe, nokuba abapulapuli ilizwi lowokuqala umqondiso, bokolwa lilizwi lomqondiso wasemva." 
Exodus4:9 Kwoti kodwa, ukuba abakolwa yiyo nalemiqondiso yomibini, nokuba abapulapuli ilizwi lako, wandule ucapule emanzini omlambo, uwagalele emhlabeni; aeya kuti amanzi lawo uwacapula emlanjeni abe ligazi pezu kwomhlaba." 
Exodus4:10 Waza wati u‐Mosesi kuyehova: Ke, Nkosi! andinguye oliciko, kwa nexesha lapambili, nakuseloko utetileyo nesicaka sako; ngokuba ndingomlomo unzima, nolulwimi lukwa nzima." 
Exodus4:11 Waye uyehova esiti kuye: Ngubanina omenzele umntu umlomo? ngubanina owenza isidenge, nesitulu, nobonayo, nemfama? asi ndim Yehova yinina?" 
Exodus4:12 Ize uhambe ke, ndandiya kuba nawo umlomo wako, ndikufundise into uya kuteta yona." 
Exodus4:13 Koko wati: Ke, Nkosi! mauke utume ngesandla salowo uya kumtuma." 
Exodus4:14 Yaza yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakuye u‐Mosesi, wati: u‐Arone um‐Levi asi nguye umkuluwe wako na? Ndiyazi ukuba uyacikoza ukuteta yena. Kananjalo, bona ke, seleya kupuma ukuza kukukaulela; ati akukubona, avuye intliziyo yake." 
Exodus4:15 Wauya kuteta kuye, ubeke amazwi emlonyeni wake; ndoti mna ndibe kunye nomlomo wako, nakunye nomlomo wake, ndinifundise oko niya kwenza kona." 
Exodus4:16 Waye yena eya kukutetela ebantwini; kuze kuti ke, abe yena enjengomlomo kuwe, ube wena unjengo tixo kuye." 
Exodus4:17 Nalentonga uyitabate esandleni sako, oya kuyenza ngayo imiqondiso." 
Exodus4:18 Usuke wahamba u‐Mosesi, wabuyela ku‐Yetero usomfazi wake, wati kuye: Makendihambe ke, ndibuye ndiye kubazalwana bam abase‐Jipete, ndize ndibone ukuba basahleli na. Waza wati u‐Yetero ku‐Mosesi: Hamba ke ngoxolo." 
Exodus4:19 Wabuya wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi e‐Midiyane: Hamba, ubuyele e‐Jipete; ngokuba selefile onke lomadoda abefuna ubomi bako." 
Exodus4:20 Waza u‐Mosesi watabata umfazi wake, nonyana bake, wabakwelisa eqwaṙasheni, wabuyela ezweni le‐Jipete; wayitabata u‐Mosesi nentonga katixo esandleni sake." 
Exodus4:21 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Ekuhambeni kwako ukuya kubuyela e‐Jipete, lumka ke ukuba yonke imimangaliso endiyibekileyo esandleni sako uyenze ebusweni buka‐Faro; koko ndiya kugwenxisa intliziyo yake, ukuba akayi kubandulula abantu." 
Exodus4:22 Wauya kuti ku‐Faro: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Unyana wam, owamazibulo wam, ngu‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus4:23 Enditi kuwe: Mndulule unyana wam, ukuze andikonze: ukuba kanti uyala ukumndulula, bona ke, ndiya kubulala unyana wako, kwa owamazibulo wako." 
Exodus4:24 Kwaye kute endleleni, endaweni yokulalisa, uyehova wahlangana naye, wafuna ukumbubisa." 
Exodus4:25 Waza u‐Tsipora watabata ilitye elibukali, wasika ijwabu lonyana wake, waliposa ezinyaweni zake, wati: Ngenyaniso ungumyeni wegazi wena kum." 
Exodus4:26 Wandula ukumyeka. Oko wati: Umyeni wegazi unguwe! ngenxa yokwaluka. 
Exodus4:27 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Arone: Hamba, uye kukaulela u‐Mosesi entlango. Wasuka waya, wahlangana naye entabeni katixo, wamanga." 
Exodus4:28 Waye u‐Mosesi waxela ku‐Arone onke amazwi kayehova obemtumile, nayo yonke imiqondiso abemyalele ngayo." 
Exodus4:29 Waza wahamba u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, baya bahlanganisa bonke abadala bosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus4:30 Waye u‐Arone wateta onke amazwi abetetile wona uyehova ku‐Mosesi; wayenza nemiqondiso emehlweni abantu. 
Exodus4:31 Baza abantu bakolwa; abati bakuba bevile okokuba uyehova ukumbule usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nokuba ukangele ubunzima babo, bandula batoba ngapantsi babedesha." 
Exodus5:1 KWABEKUTE kamva, beza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, bati ku‐Faro: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bandulule abantu bam, baye bandenzele umtendeleko entlango." 
Exodus5:2 Koko wati u‐Faro: Ungubanina uyehova, okokuba ndipulapule ilizwi lake ukubandulula o‐Sirayeli? uyehova andimazi, no‐Sirayeli andiyi kubandulula." 
Exodus5:3 Baza bati: Utixo wama‐Hebere uhlangene nati; makesiye ngoko ihambo yemihla ibe mitatu entlango, ukuya kubingela uyehova, utixo wetu, hleze asiwele ngesifo esibubisayo, umhlaumbi ngesiṙele." 
Exodus5:4 Wandul’ ukuti kubo ukumkani we‐Jipete: Kunganina, Mosesi no‐Arone! ukuba nenze abantu bayeke imisebenzi yabo? hambani niye emitwalweni yenu." 
Exodus5:5 Walekela wati u‐Faro: Bona ke, abantu belizwe sebebaninzi nje, niya kubapumza na emitwalweni yabo?" 
Exodus5:6 Wati ngoko u‐Faro kwa ngalomini, wayalela inkosi zomsebenzi zabantu, namagosa abo, ngokuti:" 
Exodus5:7 Aniyi kupinda ukunika abantu inca yokwenza izitene, njengexesha lapambili; mabaye bona bazibutele inca." 
Exodus5:8 Kodwa inani lezitene, babefudula besenza lona pambili, niya kulibeka pezu kwabo noko; aniyi kuncipisa nto kulo: ngokuba benqena; kungoko bakalayo, besiti: Masihambe siye kubingela utixo wetu." 
Exodus5:9 Maibe inkonzo inzima pezu kwamadoda la, ukuze asebenze kuyo, angabekeli amazwi obuxoki." 
Exodus5:10 Kwaza kwapuma inkosi zomsebenzi zabantu, namagosa abo, bateta ebantwini, besiti: Utsho u‐Faro ukuti: Andisayi kuninika inca." 
Exodus5:11 Hambani nina, niye kuzitabatela inca apo ningayifumana kona; kodwa akuyi kuncitshiswa nento enkonzweni yenu." 
Exodus5:12 Baza abantu batiwa sa kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete, ukuya kubuta indiza endaweni yenca." 
Exodus5:13 Zasuka inkosi zomsebenzi zanxamisa, zisiti: Fezani imisebenzi yenu, into yemini ngemini yayo, njengokuya bekuko inca." 
Exodus5:14 Kwaye kubetwa amagosa osapo luka‐Sirayeli, lawo zibe ziwamisile pezu kwalo inkosi zomsebenzi zika‐Faro, kwatiwa: Kunganina ukuba ningafezanga umsebenzi eniwumiselweyo, ngokwenza izitene, kwa izolo nanamhla, njengexesha lapambili?" 
Exodus5:15 Andula amagosa osapo luka‐Sirayeli aya akala ku‐Faro, esiti: Yinina ukuba wenje nje ezicakeni zako?" 
Exodus5:16 Ayiko inca enikelwa izicaka zako; kodwa izitene, kutiwa kuti, nizenze noko: kanjalo, bona ke, izicaka zako zibetwa, kanti ngabantu bako abonayo." 
Exodus5:17 Kuloko wati: Niyanqena nina, niyanqena; kungoko nitshoyo ukuti: Masiye sibingele uyehova." 
Exodus5:18 Hambani ke kaloku, nisebenze; ngokuba ningayi kunikwa inca; kodwa inani lezitene niya kunikela lona noko." 
Exodus5:19 Aza abona amagosa osapo luka‐Sirayeli ukuba asebubini, kusitwa nje: Aniyi kuncipisa nto eziteneni zenu zomsebenzi wenu wemihla ngemihla." 
Exodus5:20 Aye ehlangana no‐Mosesi no‐Arone, abebemi malungana nawo, ekupumeni kwawo ku‐Faro," 
Exodus5:21 ati kubo: Makabone uyehova pezu kwenu, agwebe; ngokokuba ivumba letu nilinukisile emehlweni ka‐Faro, nasemehlweni ezicaka zake, kude kunikwe isiṙele esandleni sabo sokusibulala." 
Exodus5:22 Waza u‐Mosesi wabuyela kuyehova, wati: Nkosi! kunganina ukuba ubapete kakubi ababantu? kunganina lento unditumileyo?" 
Exodus5:23 Ngokuba kwa kuseloko ndafikayo ku‐Faro, ukuza kuteta egameni lako, ubapete kakubi yena ababantu; kanjalo akusindisanga abantu bako nakanye." 
Exodus6:1 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Kaloku uya kubona oko ndiya kukwenza ku‐Faro; ngokuba ngesandla esinamandla eya kubandulula, nangesandla esinamandla eya kubagxota elizweni lake." 
Exodus6:2 WABUYA wateta utixo ku‐Mosesi, wati kuye: Mna ndi nguyehova." 
Exodus6:3 Ndabonakala ku‐Abrahame, ku‐Yisake, naku‐Yakobi, ngokuba ngutixo onamandla onke; kodwa ngegama lam eli nguyehova, bendingazeki kubo." 
Exodus6:4 Kanjalo ndilumisile ucebano lwam nabo, lwokuba ndibape ilizwe le‐Kanane, ilizwe lokupambukela kwabo, elo babengabasemzini kulo." 
Exodus6:5 Nakanjalo ndikuvile ukugula kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, olukonzisiweyo ngama‐Jipete; nocebano lwam ndilukumbule." 
Exodus6:6 Yiti ke ngoko elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli: Mna ndi nguyehova; ndonipumisa kwa pantsi kwemitwalo yama‐Jipete, ndinihlangule nasebukonzini bawo; ndandiya kunikulula ngengalo eyolulweyo, nangemigwebo emikulu;" 
Exodus6:7 ndoti kanjalo ndinitabate nibe ngabantu kum, ndize mna ndibe ngutixo kuni; naniya kukwazi ukuba ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu, onipumisayo kwa pantsi kwemitwalo yama‐Jipete." 
Exodus6:8 Ndandiya kunizisa kwelozwe, endandipakamisa isandla sam ukuba ndilinike ku‐Abrahame, ku‐Yisake, naku‐Yakobi; lona ndolinika kuni libe lilifa: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Exodus6:9 Waza u‐Mosesi wateta ngokunjalo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli; kuloko belungampulapuli u‐Mosesi, ngenxa yokucapuka kwomoya, nangenxa yenkonzo elukuni." 
Exodus6:10 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus6:11 Yiya utete ku‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, ukuba andulule usapo luka‐Sirayeli ezweni lake." 
Exodus6:12 Koko u‐Mosesi wateta ebusweni bukayehova, esiti: Bona ke, usapo luka‐Sirayeli alundipulapulanga; woti nina ngoko ukundipulapula u‐Faro, ndingomlomo ungalukanga nje?" 
Exodus6:13 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, naku‐Arone, wabayalezela elusatsheni uka‐Sirayeli, naku‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, ukuba makupunyiswe usapo luka‐Sirayeli ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Exodus6:14 KEKALOKU aba ngabazintloko zendlu zoyise zalo: onyana baka‐Rubene, owamazibulo ka‐Sirayeli; u‐Hanoki no‐Palu, u‐Hetserone no‐Kami: zizo ezi izizalwane zika‐Rubene." 
Exodus6:15 Nonyana baka‐Simone; u‐Jemuweli, no‐Yamine, no‐Ohadi, no‐Yakine, no‐Tsohare, no‐Saule unyana wom‐Kananekazi: zizo ezi izizalwane zika‐Simone." 
Exodus6:16 Ngawo la amagama onyana baka‐Levi ngezizukulwana zabo; u‐Gereshone, no‐Kohati, no‐Merari: iminyaka yokuhlala kuka‐Levi ibiyiminyaka elikulu linamashumi matatu anesixe̔nxe." 
Exodus6:17 Onyana baka‐Gereshone; u‐Libeni no‐Shimehi, ngezizalwane zabo." 
Exodus6:18 Nonyana baka‐Kohati; u‐Hamerame, no‐Yitsare, no‐Hebrone, no‐Huziyeli: iminyaka yokuhlala kuka‐Kohati ibiyiminyaka elikulu linamashumi matatu anesitatu." 
Exodus6:19 Nonyana baka‐Merari; u‐Mahali no‐Mushi. Ezi zizizalwane zika‐Levi ngezizukulwana zazo. 
Exodus6:20 Waye u‐Hamerame wazeka u‐Yokebedi, udade woyise, abe ngumfazi wake; owamzalela u‐Mosesi no‐Arone: iminyaka yokuhlala kuka‐Hamerame ibiyiminyaka elikulu linamashumi matatu anesixe̔nxe." 
Exodus6:21 Nonyana baka‐Yitsare; u‐Kora, no‐Nefege, no‐Zikeri." 
Exodus6:22 Nonyana baka‐Huziyeli; u‐Mishayeli, no‐Elitsafane, no‐Siteri." 
Exodus6:23 Waye u‐Arone wazeka u‐Elisheba, intombi ka‐Haminadabi, udade ka‐Nahashone, abe ngumfazi wake; owamzalela u‐Nadabi, no‐Abihu, no‐ Elezari, no‐Yitamare." 
Exodus6:24 Nonyana baka‐Kora; u‐Asire, no‐Lekana, no‐Abiyasafa: zizo ezi izizalwane zama‐Kora." 
Exodus6:25 Waye u‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Arone, wazeka enye ezintombini zika‐Putiyeli ibe ngumfazi wake; eyamzalela u‐Finehasi. Aba ngabazintloko zendlu zoyise zaba‐Levi ngezizalwane zabo." 
Exodus6:26 Nguló u‐Arone no‐Mosesi wabesiti kubo uyehova: Pumisani usapo luka‐Sirayeli elizweni le‐Jipete ngemikosi yalo. 
Exodus6:27 Ngaba bona ababeteta ku‐Faro, ukumkani we‐Jipete, ukuba makupunyiswe usapo luka‐Sirayeli e‐Jipete: nguló u‐Mosesi no‐Arone." 
Exodus6:28 KWAYE kute, emhleni wateta uyehova no‐Mosesi ezweni le‐Jipete," 
Exodus6:29 wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti: Mna ndi nguyehova; teta ku‐Faro, ukumkani we‐Jipete, konke endikuteta kuwe." 
Exodus6:30 Koko u‐Mosesi wati ebusweni bukayehova: Bona ke, ndingomlomo ungalukanga nje, woti nina ukundipulapula u‐Faro?" 
Exodus7:1 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Kangela, ndikwenzile ube ngutixo ku‐Faro; no‐Arone, umkuluwe wako, woba ngumprofite wako." 
Exodus7:2 Uya kuteta wena konke endikuyalela ngako; andule u‐Arone, umkuluwe wako, atete ku‐Faro, ukuba andulule usapo luka‐Sirayeli elizweni lake." 
Exodus7:3 Nam ndiya kuyenza lukuni intliziyo ka‐Faro; ndandiya kwandisa imiqondiso yam nemimangaliso yam ezweni le‐Jipete. 
Exodus7:4 Koko u‐Faro engayi kunipulapula, ndandiya kubeka isandla sam pezu kwe‐Jipete, ndikupe imikosi yam, abantu bam abalusapo luka‐Sirayeli, elizweni le‐Jipete, ngemigwebo emikulu." 
Exodus7:5 Aeya kukwazi ama‐Jipete okokuba ndi nguyehova, ekwoluleni kwam isandla sam pezu kwe‐Jipete, nasekukupeni kwam usapo luka‐Sirayeli pakati kwawo." 
Exodus7:6 Baza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone benza njengoko uyehova wabeyalele ngako; benza ngokunjalo ke. 
Exodus7:7 Waye u‐Mosesi, ubudala bake, wayiminyaka imashumi asibozo, no‐Arone obake babuyiminyaka imashumi asibozo anemitatu, okuya bateta no‐Faro." 
Exodus7:8 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Exodus7:9 Xeshekweni u‐Faro aya kuteta nani, esiti: Zenzeleni ummangaliso; wandule uti ku‐Arone: Tabata intonga yako, uyipose pantsi ebusweni buka‐Faro; yoba yinyoka ke." 
Exodus7:10 Baya u‐Mosesi no‐Arone ku‐Faro, benje njalo ke, njengokuba uyehova ebeyalele: wati u‐Arone waposa pantsi intonga yake ebusweni buka‐Faro, nasebusweni bezicaka zake, yaza yaba yinyoka." 
Exodus7:11 Wandula u‐Faro wabiza izilumko nezanuse: zaza incibi zase‐Jipete zenje njalo nazo ngento zobugqi bazo. 
Exodus7:12 Ngokuba zibe ziposa pantsi ezinye ngezinye intonga zazo, zaza zaba zinyoka; koko isuke intonga ka‐Arone yaginya intonga zazo." 
Exodus7:13 Yaba gwenxa ke intliziyo ka‐Faro, waza akabapulapula, njengokuba ebetshilo uyehova." 
Exodus7:14 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Inzima intliziyo ka‐Faro: uyala ukubandulula abantu. 
Exodus7:15 Yiya ku‐Farokwakusa; bona ke, wopuma ukuya emanzini; wauya kuma malungana naye elunxwemeni lwomlambo; nentonga ebiguqulwa yaba yinyoka uya kuyipata esandleni sako." 
Exodus7:16 Wauya kuti kuye: Uyehova, utixo wama‐Hebere, unditumile kuwe, esiti: Bandulule abantu bam, ukuze bandikonze entlango; kodwa bona ke, akupulapulanga kwada kwakaloku nje." 
Exodus7:17 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngako oku uya kukwazi okokuba ndi nguyehova; bona ke, ndiya kubeta ngentonga esesandleni sam pezu kwamanzi asemlanjeni, aeya kuguqulwa abe ligazi." 
Exodus7:18 Kanjalo intlanzi ezisemlanjeni ziya kufa, ude unuke umlambo; oti nama‐Jipete adele ukusela amanzi omlambo." 
Exodus7:19 Waza wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yiti ku‐Arone: Tabata intonga yako, usolule isandla sako pezu kwamanzi ase‐Jipete, pezu kwemilanjana yabo, pezu kwemijelo yabo, napezu kwamacibi abo, napezu kwazo zonke indawo zabo zokuhlanganisana kwamanzi, abe ligazi; kuze kubeko igazi kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete, nakweyemiti nakweyamatye imipanda." 
Exodus7:20 Baye besenje njalo u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, njengokuba ebeyalele uyehova; wapakamisa intonga, wabeta amanzi asemlanjeni, pambi kwamehlo ka‐Faro, napambi kwamehlo ezicaka zake; aza aguqulwa onke amanzi asemlanjeni aba ligazi."
