Exodus7:21 Kanjalo intlanzi ezisemlanjeni zafa ke; wanuka nomlambo, ada ama‐Jipete akohlwa kusela amanzi omlambo; laye libako igazi kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus7:22 Zaza incibi zase‐Jipete zenje njalo ngento zobugqi bazo: yaba gwenxa ke intliziyo ka‐Faro, akabapulapula kanjako, njengokuba ebetshilo uyehova." 
Exodus7:23 Wasuka wajika u‐Faro, waya endlwini yake engayibekelanga nale n to intliziyo yake." 
Exodus7:24 Aza onke ama‐Jipete embela amanzi okusela ezindaweni ezingqongayo umlambo; ngokuba ebekohlwa ukusela amanzi omlambo. 
Exodus7:25 Zaye zizaliseka intsuku zasixe̔nxe, emveni kwokuba ebebetile umlambo uyehova." 
Exodus8:1 WABUYA wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yiya ku‐Faro, uti kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bandulule abantu bam, ukuze bandikonze." 
Exodus8:2 Naxeshekweni usala wena ukubandulula, bona ke, ndiya kubeta yonke imida yako ngamasele;" 
Exodus8:3 ude umlambo uvelise amasele kakulu; aeya kunyuka angene endlwini yako, nasenkambilini yako yokulala, napezu kwawo umandlalo wako, nasendlwini yezicaka zako, napezu kwabantu bako, nasemaziko ako, nasemikombeni yokubuca yako." 
Exodus8:4 Kanjalo amasele lawo okwela pezu kwako, napezu kwabantu bako, napezu kwazo zonke izicaka zako." 
Exodus8:5 Walekela wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yiti ku‐Arone: Yolula isandla sako ngentonga yako pezu kwemilanjana, na pezu kwemijelo, napezu kwamacibi, uwenze amasele enyuke pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus8:6 Waye u‐Arone wolula isandla sake pezu kwawo amanzi ase‐Jipete; aza enyuka amasele, agubungela ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus8:7 Zazisenje njalo nencibi ngento zobugqi bazo, zenyusa amasele pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus8:8 Wandula u‐Faro wabiza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, wati: Tandazani kuyehova ukuba asuse amasele kum, nasebantwini bam; ndandiya kubandulula abantu baye kubingela uyehova." 
Exodus8:9 Waza wati u‐Mosesi ku‐Faro: Ziqa̔yise pezu kwam! Kwoba ninina endiya kutandazela wena, nezicaka zako, nabantu bako, ukuba kutshatyalaliswe lamasele kuwe, nakuzo izindlu zako, asale emlanjeni wodwa?" 
Exodus8:10 Wati: Kube ngomso. Wayesiti: Makube njengelizwi lako, ukuze ukwazi okokuba akuko onjengaye uyehova, utixo wetu." 
Exodus8:11 Oti amasele emke kuwe, nasezindlwini zako, nasezicakeni zako, nasebantwini bako; osala emlanjeni wodwa." 
Exodus8:12 Bada bapuma u‐Mosesi no‐Arone ku‐Faro: waza u‐Mosesi wakala kuyehova ngendawo yamasele abewazisile pezu kwo‐Faro. 
Exodus8:13 Waye uyehova wenza ngelizwi lika‐Mosesi; afa ke amasele kwa sezindlwini, nasemabaleni, nasemasimini." 
Exodus8:14 Baza bafumbisa ngawo imfumba ngemfumba; wada wanuka umhlaba. 
Exodus8:15 Kodwa u‐Faro akubona ukuba kuko ixesha lokuti pefu, wayenza nzima intliziyo yake, engabapulapulanga, njengokuba ebetshilo uyehova." 
Exodus8:16 Wabuya wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yiti ku‐Arone: Yolula intonga yako, ubete utuli lwomhlaba luze lube zintwala kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus8:17 Baye besenje njalo ke: ngokuba u‐Arone wolula isandla sake ngentonga yake, wabeta utuli lwomhlaba, olwaba zintwala ebantwini nasezinkomeni: lwonke utuli lwomhlaba lwaba zintwala kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus8:18 Zenje njalo nencibi ngento zobugqi bazo, ukuba zivelise intwala; koko zakohlwayo: kwaza kwabako intwala pezu kwabantu napezu kwenkomo." 
Exodus8:19 Zaza zati incibi ku‐Faro: Ngumnwe katixo oku! Yaba gwenxa intliziyo ka‐Faro noko, akabapulapula kanjako, njengokuba ebetshilo uyehova." 
Exodus8:20 Wandula uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Vuka kusasa ngomso, uye uzimise ebusweni buka‐Faro; bona ke, wopuma ukuya emanzini; uti kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bandulule abantu bam, ukuze bandikonze." 
Exodus8:21 Ngokuba xeshekweni ungandululi abantu bam, bona ke, ndiya kutuma izibau zibe pezu kwako, napezu kwezicaka zako, napezu kwabantu bako, nasezindlwini zako; zide zizale izindlu zama‐Jipete zizibau, kwa nomhlaba apezu kwawo." 
Exodus8:22 Ndandiya kulahlula ngalomini ilizwe le‐Goshene, abemi kulo abantu bam, ukuba zingabiko kona izibau; ukuze ukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova pakati kwomhlaba." 
Exodus8:23 Ndandiya kubeka isahlulo pakati kwabantu bam nabantu bako. Ngomso wobako lomqondiso. 
Exodus8:24 Wenje njalo ke uyehova; kwaye kusiza amabukubuku ezibau endlwini ka‐Faro, nasezindlwini zezicaka zake, nakulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete; lonakaliswa ilizwe zizibau ezo." 
Exodus8:25 Waza u‐Faro wabiza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, wati: Hambani, niye nibingele utixo wenu kwelilizwe." 
Exodus8:26 Koko wati u‐Mosesi: Akufanelekile ukuba senje njalo; ngokuba siya kubingela uyehova, utixo wetu, okuyintshontsho kuma‐Jipete; bona ke, kesiya kubinga okuyintshontsho kuma‐Jipete pambi kwamehlo awo, aze angasigibiseli ngamatye na?" 
Exodus8:27 Soya ihambo yentsuku ntatu entlango, sibingele uyehova, utixo wetu, njengokuba eya kutsho kuti." 
Exodus8:28 Waza wati u‐Faro: Ndonindulula ke, ukuba niye kubingela uyehova, utixo wenu, entlango; kodwa musani ukuya kude kakulu: nditandazeleni ke." 
Exodus8:29 Wayesiti u‐Mosesi: Bona ke, ndipuma kuwe, ndandiya kutandaza kuyehova, ukuba izibau zimke ku‐Faro, na sezicakeni zake, nasebantwini bake, ngomso; kodwa makangapindi u‐Faro ukwenza ngenkohliso, ngokungandululi abantu baye kubingela uyehova." 
Exodus8:30 Wandul’ ukupuma u‐Mosesi ku‐Faro, waya watandaza kuyehova." 
Exodus8:31 Waye uyehova wenza ngelizwi lika‐Mosesi; wemkisa izibau ku‐Faro, na sezicakeni zake, nasebantwini bake; akwasala nasinye." 
Exodus8:32 Kanti u‐Faro wayenza nzima intliziyo yake nangelixesha; akandulula abantu kanjako. 
Exodus9:1 WAZA wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yiya ku‐Faro, utete naye, usiti: Utsho uyehova, utixo wama‐Hebere, ukuti: Bandulule abantu bam, ukuze bandikonze." 
Exodus9:2 Ngokuba xeshekweni usala ukubandulula, umana ubabamba nje," 
Exodus9:3 bona ke, isandla sikayehova soba pezu kwenkomo zako ezisendle, pezu kwamahashe, pezu kwamaqwaṙashe, pezu kwenkamela, pezu kwenkabi, napezu kwegusha: isifo esinzima kunene." 
Exodus9:4 Waye uyehova eya kwahlula pakati kwenkomo zama‐Sirayeli nenkomo zama‐Jipete; akuyi kufa nto kuzo zonke ezizezosapo luka‐Sirayeli. 
Exodus9:5 Waza uyehova wadala ixesha elitile, esiti: Ngomso uyehova uya kwenza lento kwelilizwe." 
Exodus9:6 Waye uyehova wayenza lento kwakusa, zati zonke inkomo zama‐Jipete zafa; kanti kwinkomo zosapo luka‐Sirayeli akufanga nanye." 
Exodus9:7 Waza watuma u‐Faro, kekaloku bona ke, akufanga kuzo inkomo zama‐Sirayeli kwa nanye. Wenza nzima u‐Faro intliziyo yake noko; akandulula abantu kanjako." 
Exodus9:8 Wandula uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone: Zitabateleni ngento ezalisa izandla ututu lwesidlangalala; ati u‐Mosesi alusasaze ngasezulwini pambi kwamehlo ka‐Faro. 
Exodus9:9 Lwaluya kuba njengotuli kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete, lube ngamatumba ejaduka ngamatyakuva, pezu kwabantu, napezu kwezilo, kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus9:10 Baza balutabata ututu lwesidlangalala, bema pambi kwo‐Faro; waye u‐Mosesi walusasaza ngasezulwini; lwaza lwaba ngamatumba ejaduka ngamatyakuva, pezu kwabantu, napezu kwezilo." 
Exodus9:11 Zati incibi zakohlwa kukuma ebusweni buka‐Mosesi ngenxa yamatumba; ngokuba bekuko amatumba pezu kwencibi, napezu kwama‐Jipete onke." 
Exodus9:12 Waye uyehova wagwenxisa intliziyo ka‐Faro, waza akabapulapula, njengokuba uyehova ebetshilo ku‐Mosesi." 
Exodus9:13 Wabuya wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Vuka kusasa ngomso, uye uzimise ebusweni buka‐Faro, uti kuye: Utsho uyehova, utixo wama‐Hebere, ukuti: Bandulule abantu bam, ukuze bandikonze." 
Exodus9:14 Ngokuba ngelixesha ndiya kutuma zonke izibulalo zam entliziyweni yako, napezu kwezicaka zako, napezu kwabantu bako; ukuze ukwazi okokuba akuko onjengam kuwo wonke umhlaba." 
Exodus9:15 Ngokuba kaloku bendingolulayo isandla sam, ndibete wena nabantu bako ngesifo esibubisayo; uze utshatyalaliswe emhlabeni." 
Exodus9:16 Kodwa okunene, ngenxa yoku ndikumisile, ngenxa yokuba ndikubonise amandla am, nokuba igama lam lishunyayelwe emhlabeni wonke." 
Exodus9:17 Usazipakamisa ngakubo abantu bam na, ukuba akuyi kubandulula?" 
Exodus9:18 Bona ke, malunga nelixesha langomso ndiya kunisa izicoto ezinzima kakulu, ekungazanga kubeko ezinjalo e‐Jipete, kwa semhleni wokusekwa kwayo kwada kwakaloku nje." 
Exodus9:19 Ngako kaloku tuma ke, ugoduse inkomo zako, nako konke onako ezindle; bonke abantu nezilo eziya kufunyanwa ezindle zingabutelwanga endlwini, zakuhla pezu kwazo izicoto, ziya kufa." 
Exodus9:20 Obesoyika ilizwi likayehova pakati kwezicaka zika‐Faro, izicaka zake nenkomo zake wazisabisela ezindlwini." 
Exodus9:21 Kodwa obengabekeli ilizwi likayehova intliziyo yake, wazishiya izicaka zake nenkomo zake ezindle." 
Exodus9:22 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yolula isandla sako ngasezulwini, kuze kubeko izicoto kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete, pezu kwabantu, napezu kwezilo, napezu kwayo yonke imifuno yasendle, kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus9:23 Wasuka u‐Mosesi wayolula intonga yake ngasezulwini; waza uyehova wakupa indudumo nezicoto, wati umlilo wabaleka pezu kwomhlaba; wanisa uyehova izicoto pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus9:24 Kwaye bekuko izicoto, nomlilo upitikeziwe ndawonye nezicoto; zazinzima kakulu, ekungazanga kubeko ezinjalo kulo lonke ilizwe lama‐Jipete, kuseloko aba sisizwe." 
Exodus9:25 Zaza izicoto zabeta kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete konke okusendle, kwa nabantu nezilo; zati izicoto kanjalo zabeta yonke imifuno yasendle, zapula yonke imiti yasendle nayo." 
Exodus9:26 Kupela ezweni le‐Goshene, apo lwalukona usapo luka‐Sirayeli, bekungeko zicoto." 
Exodus9:27 Waza watuma u‐Faro, wabiza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, wati kubo: Ndonile ngoku; uyehova ulungile, mna kodwa nabantu bam sikohlakele." 
Exodus9:28 Tandazani kuyehova, (ngokuba sekwanele,) kuze kungabi sabiko indudumo zikatixo nezicoto; ndose ndinindulula ke, naningayi kuba salibala." 
Exodus9:29 Waza u‐Mosesi wati kuye: Nxa ndipumileyo esixekweni, ndiya kutwabulula izandla zam ngakuyehova: indudumo ziya kupeza, nezicoto aziyi kuba sabiko; ukuze ukwazi okokuba umhlaba ungo kayehova." 
Exodus9:30 Wena kanti nezicaka zako, ndiyazi ukuba anikamoyiki uyehova utixo." 
Exodus9:31 Kekaloku kwakubetiwe umyaṙa neṙalasi; ngokuba iṙalasi ibisel’ idubule, nomyaṙa wausel’ utyatyambile." 
Exodus9:32 Kodwa inqolowa nespelete zazingabetwanga zona; ngokuba zibe zingekahlumi. 
Exodus9:33 Waye u‐Mosesi wapuma esixekweni ku‐Faro, watwabulula izandla zake ngakuyehova; kwandu ukupeza indudumo nezicoto, ayaba sagalelwa nemvula emhlabeni." 
Exodus9:34 Wati u‐Faro akubona ukuba kupelile imvula, nezicoto, nendudumo, wabuya wona, wayenza nzima intliziyo yake, kwa yena nezicaka zake." 
Exodus9:35 Yaba gwenxa ke intliziyo ka‐Faro, waza akandulula usapo luka‐Sirayeli, njengokuba ebetshilo uyehova ngaye u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus10:1 WANDULA uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Yiya ku‐Faro; ngokuba ndiyenze nzima intliziyo yake, nentliziyo yezicaka zake, ukuze ndibeke lemiqondiso yam pakati kwabo;" 
Exodus10:2 nokuze ubalise ezindlebeni zonyana wako, nezonyana wonyana wako, oko ndikwenzileyo e‐Jipete, nemiqondiso endiyimisileyo pakati kwabo; nize nazi nkuba ndi nguyehova." 
Exodus10:3 Baya u‐Mosesi no‐Arone ku‐Faro, bati kuye: Utsho uyehova, utixo wama‐Hebere, ukuti: Uya kwala kude kube ninina ukuzigoba ebusweni bam? bandulule abantu bam ukuba bandikonze." 
Exodus10:4 Ngokuba xeshekweni usala ukundulula abantu bam, bona ke, ndiya kuzisa ngomso inkumbi emideni yako;" 
Exodus10:5 eziya kugubungela ubuso bomhlaba, kude kukohlwe ukubona umhlaba; zaziya kutya iliva lokusindileyo, oko nisaliselwe kona zizicoto; nayo yonke imiti enimilelayo ezindle ziya kuyidla:" 
Exodus10:6 kanjalo zozalisa izindlu zako, nezindlu zazo zonke izicaka zako, nezindlu zawo onke ama‐Jipete; abangazanga bazibone ezinjalo oyihlo bako, noyise boyihlo bako, kwa semhleni babeko pezu kwomhlaba kwada kwanamhla nje. Wayejika ke, wapuma ku‐Faro." 
Exodus10:7 Zaza izicaka zika‐Faro zati kuye: Kwoba kade kangakananina lo engumgibe kuti? Zundulule amadoda lawo, aye kukonza uyehova, utixo wawo: akukazi na, ukuba i‐Jipete seitshabalele?" 
Exodus10:8 Kwaza kwabuyiswa u‐Mosesi no‐Arone ukuza ku‐Faro, owati kubo: Hambani, konzani uyehova, utixo wenu! kodwa ngubanina nobanina abaya kuhamba?" 
Exodus10:9 Wayesiti u‐Mosesi: Sohamba sinabatsha betu nabadala betu; sohamba sinonyana betu nentombi zetu, sinegusha zetu nenkomo zetu; ngokuba sinawo umtendeleko kayehova." 
Exodus10:10 Waza wati kubo: Makabe njalo uyehova ukuba nani, njengokuba ndiya kunindulula nina nabantwana benu! lumkani, ngokuba ububi bupambi kwenu." 
Exodus10:11 Kungabi njalo! hambani ke nina ningamadoda, niye kukonza uyehova; ngokuba oko nibe nikufuna. Baza bagxotwa ebusweni buka‐Faro." 
Exodus10:12 Wandula uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Yolula isandla sako pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete ngenxa yenkumbi, zize zinyukele pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete, zidle yonke imifuno yelizwe elo, kwa konke okusalisiwe zizicoto." 
Exodus10:13 Wasuka u‐Mosesi wolula intonga yake pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete, waza uyehova wazisa umoya wasempumalanga pezu kwelozwe, yonke leyomini nabo bonke obobusuku; kwati kwakusa, umoya wasempumalanga wazisa inkumbi." 
Exodus10:14 Zaza inkumbi zenyuka pezu kwalo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete, zapumla kuyo yonke imida yase‐Jipete, into enzima kunene; ngapambili kuzo bekungeko nkumbi ezingako zinjengazo ezo, nasemva kwazo akusayi kubako ezinjalo." 
Exodus10:15 Ngokuba zibe zigubungela ubuso balo lonke ilizwe, lada lenziwa mnyama elozwe; zaza zatya yonke imifuno yomhlaba, nazo zonke iziqa̔mo zemiti ezazishiyiwe zizicoto; kwada akwasala nanye into eluhlaza emitini, nasemifunweni yasendle, kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus10:16 Wandula wanxama u‐Faro ukubiza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone; waza wati: Ndonile ngakuye uyehova, utixo wenu, nangakuni." 
Exodus10:17 Uze uti ke ngoko undixolele isono sam kube kaloku kodwa; kanjalo tandazani kuyehova, utixo wenu, ukuba asuse kum okukufa kupela." 
Exodus10:18 Wapuma ke ku‐Faro, waya watandaza kuyehova." 
Exodus10:19 Waza uyehova wajika umoya wentshonalanga onamandla kakulu, owafunqula inkumbi, waziwisa elwandle olubomvu; akwasala nanye inkumbi kuyo yonke imida yase‐Jipete." 
Exodus10:20 Kodwa uyehova wagwenxisa intliziyoka‐Faro, waza akandulula usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus10:21 Wandula wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yolula isandla sako ngasezulwini, kuze kubeko ubumnyama pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete, kude kuveke ubumnyama." 
Exodus10:22 Wasuka u‐Mosesi wolula isandla sake ngasezulwini; kwaza kwabako ubumnyama obubungqingqwa kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete imihla yamitatu: 
Exodus10:23 ababonana, kanjako akasuka mntu endaweni yake, nga leyo mihla mitatu: kanti kulo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli bekuko ukukanya emakayeni alo." 
Exodus10:24 Waza u‐Faro wabiza u‐Mosesi, wati: Hambani, konzani uyehova; kupela igusha zenu nenkomo zenu mazisaliswe; kwa nabantwana benu mabahambe nani." 
Exodus10:25 Koko wati u‐Mosesi: Uya kunika kanjalo ezandleni zetu imibingo namadini okutshiswa, ukuba sinikele kuyehova, utixo wetu." 
Exodus10:26 Nakanjako inkomo zetu ziya kuhamba nati; akuyi kusala nopupu lunye: ngokuba siya kucapula kuzo ukukonza uyehova, utixo wetu; kodwa asiyazi tina into esiya kukonza uyehova ngayo, side sifike kona." 
Exodus10:27 Kodwa uyehova wagwenxisa intliziyo ka‐Faro, waza akavuma ukubandulula." 
Exodus10:28 Waza wati u‐Faro kuye: Suka kum, uzilumkele, ungapindi ukubona ubuso bam; ngokuba mhlana ubonayo ubuso bam, uya kufa." 
Exodus10:29 Wayesiti u‐Mosesi: Unyanisile ukutsho; andisayi kupinda ukubona ubuso bako. 
Exodus11:1 (Ngokuba ebete uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Kuseko isibeto sinye endiya kusizisa pezu kwo‐Faro napezu kwe‐Jipete; woti emveni kwoko anindulule kule ndawo: kekaloku akunindulula, uya kugqibela ukunigxota apa." 
Exodus11:2 Teta kaloku ezindlebeni zabantu, ukuba onke amadoda abize kubamelwane bawo, nabo bonke abafazi babize kubamelwanekazi babo, impahla zesilivere, nempahla zegolide." 
Exodus11:3 Waye uyehova wanika abantu ufefe emehlweni ama‐Jipete. Kanjako indoda engu‐Mosesi ibinkulu kakulu ezweni le‐Jipete, emehlweni ezicaka zika‐Faro, nasemehlweni abantu.)" 
Exodus11:4 Walekela u‐Mosesi wati: Utshilo uyehova ukuti: Ngapakati kwobusuku ndopuma ndiye pakati kwe‐Jipete; 
Exodus11:5 aeya kufa onke amazibulo asezweni le‐Jipete, kwa sezibulweni lika‐Faro ohleli eteroneni yake kude kube sezibulweni lesicakakazi esisemva kwelitye lokusila, kwa nawo onke amazibulo ezilo." 
Exodus11:6 Kwakuya kubako isikalo esikulu kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete, ekungazanga kubeko esinjalo, nekungayi kubuya kubeko esinjalo." 
Exodus11:7 Kodwa ngakulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli akuyi kubako nenja eya kubaza ulwimi lwayo, nangakuye umntu nangakuso isilo; ukuze nikwazi okokuba uyehova uyenza isahlulo pakati kwama‐Jipete nama‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus11:8 Ziya kwandula zihle zonke ezizicaka zako zize kum, zizitobe pambi kwam, zisiti: Puma wena, nabo bonke abantu abasezinyaweni zako; ndoti emveni kwoko ndipume ke. Waza wapuma ebusweni buka‐Faro ngobushushu bengqumbo." 
Exodus11:9 Kekaloku wabete uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Akayi kunipulapula u‐Faro, ize yenziwe mininzi imimangaliso yam ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Exodus11:10 Bati u‐Mosesi no‐Arone benza yonke lemimangaliso ebusweni buka‐Faro; waye uyehova wagwenxisa intliziyo ka‐Faro, waza akandulula usapo luka‐Sirayeli elizweni lake." 
Exodus12:1 WATSHO uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone ezweni le‐Jipete, esiti:" 
Exodus12:2 Inyanga le yoba sisiqalo senyanga kuni; yoba yeyokuqala inyanga yomnyaka kuni yona. 
Exodus12:3 Tetani kuyo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli, nisiti: Ngolweshumi usuku lwalenyanga mabazitabatele ixwana abanye ngabanye ngezindlu zoyise, libe linye ixwana kwindlu nye." 
Exodus12:4 Kodwa xeshekweni abendlu bancinane ukuba babe nexwana, andule alitabate umntu nommelwane wake okufupi nendlu yake, ngento engangenani lemipefumlo; nobalela ixwana abanye ngabanye ngokudla kwabo." 
Exodus12:5 Noba nexwana elimsulwa, liyinkunzana yomnyaka mnye; niya kulitabata ezigusheni umhlaumbi ezibokweni." 
Exodus12:6 Loba sekugcineni kwenu kude kube ngumhla weshumi linesine walenyanga; wonke umhlambi wentlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli uya kulixe̔la pakati kwokuhlwa. 
Exodus12:7 Babeya kucapula egazini, balibeke emigubasini yomibini, nasemqolweni, ezindlwini abaya kulidla kuzo." 
Exodus12:8 Nenyama baya kuyidla ngobobusuku, eyojiweyo ngomlilo, kwa nezonka ezingenagwele; boyidla kunye nemifuno eṙaṙa." 
Exodus12:9 Ningadli kuyo eṙwada, nepekiweyo ipekiwe ngamanzi, kodwa eyojiweyo ngomlilo; intloko yalo, kunye nentungo zalo nombilini walo." 
Exodus12:10 Aniyi kusalisa nto kulo kude kuse; okuseleyo kulo kude kwasa, niya kukutshisa ngomlilo." 
Exodus12:11 Nowenje njalo ukulidla: izinqe zenu ziya kubinqwa, izihlangu zenu zoba sezinyaweni zenu, nomsimelelo wenu woba sesandleni senu; niya kulidla ngobunxamo ke; yipasika kayehova lona." 
Exodus12:12 Ngokuba ndiya kucanda elizweni le‐Jipete kwa ngobubusuku, ndibete onke amazibulo asezwenile‐Jipete, nawabantu nawezilo; nabo bonke otixo base‐Jipete ndiya kuyenza imigwebo pezu kwabo, kwa mna Yehova." 
Exodus12:13 Laye igazi elo liya kuba ngumqondiso kuni pezu kwezindlu enikuzo; ndoti ndakubona igazi, ndigqite kuni, size singabiko pezu kwenu isibulalo sokutshabalalisa, xa ndilibetayo ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
Exodus12:14 Kanjalo lomhla woba yinkumbuzo kuni; niya kubamba wona ube ngowomtendeleko kuyehova; nowubamba ke ngezizukulwana zenu ube ngummiselwa ongunapakade. 
Exodus12:15 Nodla izonka ezingenagwele intsuku zibe sixe̔nxe; kwa ngosuku lwokuqala nolisusa igwele ezindlwini zenu: ngokuba osukuba esidla okubiliswayo, kowokuqala umhla kude kube ngowesixe̔nxe umhla, umpefumlo lowo uya kunqanyulwa ko‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus12:16 Ngomhla wokuqala kwobako intlanganisano engewele; nangomhla wesixe̔nxe noba nentlanganisano engewele; akuyi kwenziwa namnye umsebenzi ngawo, kupela into eya kutyiwa ngabantu bonke, ingenziwa nini yona yodwa." 
Exodus12:17 Naniya kugcina umtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele; ngokuba ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo ndikupile imikosi yenu elizweni le‐Jipete: kukona niya kugcina lomhla ngezizukulwana zenu ube ngummiselwa ongunapakade. 
Exodus12:18 Ngeyokuqala inyanga, ngosuku lweshumi linesine lwenyanga, ngokuhlwa, nodla izonka ezingenagwele, kude kube lusuku lwamashumi mabini anesinyelwenyanga, ngokuhlwa." 
Exodus12:19 Intsuku zoba sixe̔nxe ekungayi kufunyanwa gwele ezindlwini zenu: ngokuba osukuba esidla okunegwele, kwa lowompefumlo uya kunqanyulwa entlanganisweni yo‐Sirayeli, nokuba ungowasemzini, nokuba ungozelweyo elizweni." 
Exodus12:20 Aniyi kudla nto ibiliswayo: kuzo zonke indawo zokuhlala zenu niya kudla izonka ezingenagwele. 
Exodus12:21 Waza u‐Mosesi wabiza bonke abadala bo‐Sirayeli, wati kubo: Ṙolani nizitabatele amaxwana ngezizalwane zenu, nixe̔le ipasika." 
Exodus12:22 Nize nitabate isiqunyana sehisope, nisifake egazini elisesityeni, nibete emqolweni nasemigubasini yomibini ngegazi elisesityeni; kanjalo nina, makungapumi namnye umntu elucangweni lwendlu yake kude kuse." 
Exodus12:23 Ngokuba uyehova eya kucanda ukuza kubeta ama‐Jipete; woti akubona igazi pezu kwomqolo, napezu kwemigubasi yomibini, andule uyehova agqite kolocango, angavumi ukuba umtshabalalisi angene ezindlwini zenu ukuza kubeta." 
Exodus12:24 Niya kugcina lento, ibe ngummiselwa kuwe nakonyana bako, kude kube ngunapakade." 
Exodus12:25 Kwakuya kuti, nakufika kwelozwe aya kunipa lona uyehova, njengokuba etshilo, niya kugcina lenkonzo." 
Exodus12:26 Kwoti kanjalo, xeshekweni abantwana benu baya kuti kuni: Yinto nina lenkonzo kuni?" 
Exodus12:27 niya kwandula ukuti: Lidini lepasika kuyehova, owayegqita ezindlwini zosapo luka‐Sirayeli e‐Jipete, okuya wabebeta ama‐Jipete, wasindisa izindlu zetu. Baza abantu batoba ngapantsi, babedesha." 
Exodus12:28 Lwemka usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenza njengokuba uyehova ebeyalele u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, lwenje njalo ke." 
Exodus12:29 KWAZA kwati pakati kwobusuku, wandula uyehova wabeta onke amazibulo asezweni le‐Jipete, kwa sezibulweni lika‐Faro obehleli eteroneni yake, kwada kwasezibulweni lombanjwa obesentolongweni, kwa nawo onke amazibulo ezilo." 
Exodus12:30 Waza wavuka u‐Faro ebusuku, kwa yena nazo zonke izicaka zake, nawo onke ama‐Jipete; kwaye kuko nesikalo esikulu e‐Jipete; ngokuba bekungeko nanye indlu apo angeko kona ofileyo." 
Exodus12:31 Waselebiza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone ebusuku, wati: Sukani, nipume ebantwini bam, kwa nina nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, niye nikonze uyehova njengokutsho kwenu." 
Exodus12:32 Zitabateni negusha zenu, nenkomo zenu, njengokutsho kwenu, nimke; ize ninditamsanqelise kanjako." 
Exodus12:33 Ati nama‐Jipete anyanzela abantu, ngokunxamela ukubandulula kwelozwe, ngokuba ebesiti: Sonke singabafileyo!" 
Exodus12:34 Baza abantu batabata intlama yabo ingekabiliswa, imikombe yokubuca yabo ibotshiwe ezingutyeni zabo pezu kwamagxalaba abo." 
Exodus12:35 Lwaye usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenza ngelizwi lika‐Mosesi; lwabiza kuma‐Jipete impahla zesilivere, nempahla zegolide, nezivato." 
Exodus12:36 Waye uyehova wanika abantu ufefe emehlweni ama‐Jipete, ada abenzela ukucela kwabo: baza bapanga ama‐Jipete." 
Exodus12:37 Lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwanduluka e‐Ramesese lwaya ngase‐Sukote, lungati lungamawaka angamakulu matandatu amadoda ehamba ngenyawo, ngapandle kwabantwana." 
Exodus12:38 Kwenyuka nalo nento eninzi yabadityanisiweyo, negusha, nenkomo, imfuyo enkulu kunene." 
Exodus12:39 Lwaza lwoja izonkana ezingenagwele ngentlama belupumile nayo e‐Jipete, ngokuba yona ibingabiliswanga; ngokuba belugxotwe e‐Jipete, lwada lwakohlwa ukulibala; lube lungazilungiselanga umpako kanjalo." 
Exodus12:40 Kekaloku ukuhlala kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, olube luhleli ngako e‐Jipete, bekuyiminyaka imakulu mane, neminyaka imashumi matatu ngapandle." 
Exodus12:41 Kwaza kwati ekupeleni kweminyaka imakulu mane anamashumi matatu, kwandul’ ukuti ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo, kwapuma yonke imikosi kayehova ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Exodus12:42 Bubusuku obo bokugcinelwa uyehova, ngenxa yokuyipumisa kwake ezweni le‐Jipete: obu bobobusuku bokugcinelwa uyehova lulo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngezizukulwana zalo." 
Exodus12:43 Walekela wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone: Ngulo ummiselwa wayo ipasika: Osukuba engowasemzini akayi kutya kuyo: 
Exodus12:44 kodwa osukuba esisicaka somntu, otengiweyo ngemali, woti wakuba umalusile, andule atye kuyo." 
Exodus12:45 Oliṙanuka, nomqeshwa, akayi kudla kuyo." 
Exodus12:46 Iya kutyiwa endlwini nye; akuyi kupuma nento yenyama endlwini ukuya ngapandle; kanjalo aniyi kwapula nalinye itambo kuyo. 
Exodus12:47 Yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli iya kuyenza. 
Exodus12:48 Naxeshekweni kupambukele kuwe owasemzini, oya kuyenza ipasika kuyehova, makati onke amadoda anawo aluke, aze andule ukusondela, ayenze; waeya kuba njengozelweyo elizweni: kodwa osukuba engalukanga akasayi kutya kuyo." 
Exodus12:49 Umteto okwa mnye woba kozelweyo elizweni, nakowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwenu." 
Exodus12:50 Lwaye luyenza ke lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli; kwa njengokuba uyehova ebeyalele u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, lwenje njalo ke." 
Exodus12:51 Kwaza kwati ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo, wapumisa uyehova usapo luka‐Sirayeli elizweni le‐Jipete ngemikosi yalo." 
Exodus13:1 Wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus13:2 Wenze ngcwele kum onke amazibulo, kwa konke kuzityulwa ngako pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, okwabantu nokwezilo; kukokwam oko." 
Exodus13:3 Waye u‐Mosesi wati ebantwini: Wukumbuleni lomhla, enipumile ngawo e‐Jipete, endlwini yobukoboka; ngokuba ngokwomelela kwesandla uyehova wanikupa kule ndawo: ngako akuyi kutyiwa okunegwele." 
Exodus13:4 Namhla nje napuma ke, ngenyanga engu‐Abibe." 
Exodus13:5 Kwakuya kuti, xeshekweni uyehova akuzisile elizweni laba‐Kanane, nama‐Hete, naba‐Amori, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi, elo wabafungela oyihlo bako ukuba akupe lona, ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi, wandule uyenze lenkonzo ngalenyanga." 
Exodus13:6 Intsuku zoba sixe̔nxe uya kuzidla izonka ezingenagwele ngazo, nangolwesixe̔nxe usuku kwobako umtendeleko kuyehova." 
Exodus13:7 Izonka ezingenagwele zotyiwa intsuku ezo zosixe̔nxe: akuyi kubonwa ngakuwe okubiliswayo; kanjalo aliyi kubonwa ngakuwe igwele kuyo yonke imida yako. 
Exodus13:8 Wauya kushumayela kunyana wako ngomhla lowo, usiti: Oku kwenziwe ngenxa yoko uyehova wandenzelayo, ndakupuma e‐Jipete." 
Exodus13:9 Kanjalo kwoba ngumqondiso kuwe pezu kwesandla sako, nenkumbuzo pakati kwamehlo ako, uze umteto kayehova ube semlonyeni wako: ngokuba ngesandla esomeleleyo uyehova wakukupa e‐Jipete." 
Exodus13:10 Ngako uya kugcina lommiselwa ngexesha lawo, kwiminyaka ngeminyaka." 
Exodus13:11 Kwakuya kuti, xeshekweni uyehova aya kukuzisa ezweni laba‐Kanane, njengokuba ebefunga kuwe nakoyihlo bako, akupe lona;" 
Exodus13:12 uya kwandula wahlukanisele uyehova konke kuzityulwa ngako, nawo onke amazibulo avela kwizilo onazo; amaduna oba nga kayehova." 
Exodus13:13 Kodwa onke amazibulo eqwaṙashe uya kukulula wona ngexwana; ukuba kanti akuyi kuwakulula, wowapula intamo; kanjalo onke amazibulo abantu pakati kwonyana bako uya kuwakulula." 
Exodus13:14 Kwakuya kuti, xeshekweni unyana wako aya kukubuza ngexesha elizayo, esiti: Iyinina lento? wandule ukuti kuye: Ngokwomelela kwesandla wabesikupa uyehova e‐Jipete, endlwini yobukoboka:" 
Exodus13:15 ngokuba bekute, nxa u‐Faro wakwenza umgushanxa ukusindulula, wandula uyehova wabulala onke amazibulo ezweni le‐Jipete, kwa namazibulo abantu, namazibulo ezilo: kukona ndibingela uyehova konke kuzityulwa ngako, okuzinkunzi; kodwa onke amazibulo onyana bam ndiyawakulula." 
Exodus13:16 Kwakuya kuba ngumqondiso pezu kwesandla sako, nembasa pakati kwamehlo ako: ngokuba ngokwomelela kwesandla wabesikupa uyehova e‐Jipete." 
Exodus13:17 KWAYE kute, xeshekweni u‐Faro ebendulule abantu, waza utixo akabakapa ngendlela yasezweni lama‐Filistiya, nakuba leyo ibifutshane; ngokuba ebesiti utixo: Hleze abantu babe nosizi bakubona imfazwe, baze babuyele e‐Jipete." 
Exodus13:18 Kodwa utixo wabazekelelisa abantu ngendlela yasentlango yolwandle olubomvu. Lwati usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenyuka ezweni le‐Jipete luxo̔bile. 
Exodus13:19 Waye u‐Mosesi watabata naye amatambo ka‐Josefe; ngokuba yena ebekolisile ukulufungisa usapo luka‐Sirayeli, esiti: Utixo wonikumbula ngenyaniso; naniya kunyusa amatambo am kule ndawo kunye nani." 
Exodus13:20 Baye benduluka e‐Sukote, baya bati waca e‐Etame, ngasesipelweni sentlango." 
Exodus13:21 Waza uyehova wahamba pambi kwabo, emini entsikeni yelifu, ukuba abakokele endleleni, nasebusuku entsikeni yomlilo, ukuba abakanyisele, kuze kuhanjwe emini nasebusuku." 
Exodus13:22 Ayemka intsika yelifu emini, kwa nentsika yomlilo ebusuku, ebusweni babantu." 
Exodus14:1 Wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus14:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba lujike luti waca pambi kwe‐Pihahirote, pakati kwe‐Migidole nolwandle, malungana ne‐Bali‐tsefone: pambi kwayo niya kuti waca ngaselwandle." 
Exodus14:3 Waeya kuti u‐Faro ngalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli: Luxakekile elizweni; intlango iluvalele. 
Exodus14:4 Ndize ndigwenxise intliziyo ka‐Faro, ukuba woluputuma: ndandiya kubekwa ngaye u‐Faro, nangayo yonke impi yake, ukuze akwazi ama‐Jipete ukuba mna ndi nguyehova. Lwenje njalo ke." 
Exodus14:5 Kwati kwakuxelwa kukumkani we‐Jipete ukuba abantu besabile, yandula yaguqulwa intliziyo ka‐Faro, neyezicaka zake, ngakubo abantu, bati: Kunganina ukuba siyenze lento, yokokuba sibandulule o‐Sirayeli ekusikonzeni?" 
Exodus14:6 Waza waselebopa inqwelo yake yokulwa, watabata naye abantu bake." 
Exodus14:7 Watabata zazimakulu matandatu inqwelo zokulwa ezinyuliweyo, nazo zonke inqwelo zokulwa zase‐Jipete, nenjengele pezu kwazo zonke ngazinye." 
Exodus14:8 Ngokuba uyehova ebegwenxisile intliziyo ka‐Faro, yokumkani we‐Jipete, waza waputuma usapo luka‐Sirayeli; kodwa usapo luka‐Sirayeli beluse lupumile ngesandla esipakamileyo." 
Exodus14:9 Asuka ama‐Jipete aluputuma, alufumana lute waca ngaselwandle; (onke amahashe n enqwelo zokulwa zika‐Faro, nabakweli bake bamahashe, nempi yake;) kufupi ne‐Pihahirote, ngapambi kwe‐Bali‐tsefone." 
Exodus14:10 Kwati akusondela u‐Faro, lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwapakamisa amehlo alo, kekaloku nangaya ama‐Jipete ehamba emva kwalo; lwoyika kakulu ke; lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwakala kuyehova." 
Exodus14:11 Lwaye lusiti ku‐Mosesi: Kungokuba kube kungeko mancw̔aba e‐Jipete na, lento usifudusileyo sifele entlango? kunganina ukuba wenje njalo kuti, ukuba usikupile e‐Jipete?" 
Exodus14:12 Asi lilo na ilizwi esalitetayo kuwe e‐Jipete, sisiti: Siyeke, size siwakonze ama‐Jipete? Ngokuba kunge kusilungele okokuba sikonze ama‐Jipete, ngapezu kwokokuba sifele entlango." 
Exodus14:13 Koko wati u‐Mosesi ebantwini: Ningoyiki, yimani, nibone usindiso lukayehova, aya kunenzela namhla nje; ngokuba ama‐Jipete eniwabonileyo namhla nje, ningasayi kupinda ukuwabona kude kube ngunapakade." 
Exodus14:14 Uyehova uya kunilwela, noba niti tu nina." 
Exodus14:15 Waza wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yinina ukuba ukale kum? Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba lunduluke:" 
Exodus14:16 uze wena upakamise intonga yako, usolule isandla sako ngapezu kwolwandle, ulucande: lwoti usapo luka‐Sirayeli luye pakati kwolwandle pezu kwowomileyo umhlaba." 
Exodus14:17 Nam, bona ke, ndozigwenxisa intliziyo zama‐Jipete, aeya kuza emva kwalo; ndandiya kubekwa ugaye u‐Faro nangayo yonke impi yake, ngazo inqwelo zake zokulwa nangabo abakweli bake bamahashe." 
Exodus14:18 Aeya kukwazi ama‐Jipete ukuba mna ndi nguyehova, ndakubekwa ngo‐Faro, na ngenqwelo zake zokulwa, nangabakweli bake bamahashe." 
Exodus14:19 Yaza ingelosi katixo, ebihamba pambi kwomkosi wama‐Sirayeli, yesuka yaya ngasemva kwawo; yati nentsika yelifu yesuka ebusweni bawo, yema ngasemva kwawo." 
Exodus14:20 Yeza pakati kwomkosi wama‐Jipete nomkosi wama‐Sirayeli; laye liba lilifu lobumnyama kwabaya, kanti labukanyisa ubusuku kwaba; waza omnye umkosi awasondela komnye bonke ubusuku obo." 
Exodus14:21 Waye u‐Mosesi wolula isandla sake ngapezu kwolwandle; wandula uyehova wemkisa ulwandle ngomoya onamandla wasempumalanga bonke ubusuku obo, walwenza ulwandle lube ngumhlaba owomileyo, ati amanzi acandeka." 
Exodus14:22 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwaya pakati kwolwandle pezu kwowomileyo umhlaba; aza amanzi aba ludonga kulo ngesokunene salo nangesokohlo salo. 
Exodus14:23 Aputuma ke ama‐Jipete, angena emva kwalo, onke amahashe ka‐Faro, inqwelo zake zokulwa, nabakweli bake bamahashe, kwa pakati kwolwandle." 
Exodus14:24 Kwaza kwati ngelokusa ivaṙasho, wakangela uyehova ngasemkosini wama‐Jipete ngayo intsika yomlilo nelifu, wapitizelisa umkosi wama‐Jipete;" 
Exodus14:25 wahlangula nevili zenqwelo zawo zokulwa, wazihambisa ngokunzima; ada ati ama‐Jipete: Masisabe ebusweni bama‐Sirayeli, ngokuba uyehova elwela wona ngakuwo ama‐Jipete." 
Exodus14:26 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Yolula isandla sako ngapezu kwolwandle, aze amanzi abuyele pezu kwama‐Jipete, pezu kwenqwelo zawo zokulwa, napezu kwabakweli bawo bamahashe." 
Exodus14:27 Wasuka u‐Mosesi wolula isandla sake ngapezu kwolwandle; lwandula ulwandle lwabuyela ekweleni kwalo okufuti, kwakuza kusa; ati ama‐Jipete esaba ngakulo; waza uyehova wavutulula ama‐Jipete pakati kwolwandle." 
Exodus14:28 Ngokuba ebebuya amanzi lawo, aselela inqwelo zokulwa, nabakweli bamahashe, kunye nayo yonke impi ka‐Faro ebingene emva kwawo elwandle; akwasala kubo kwa namnye." 
Exodus14:29 Kodwa usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwahamba pezu kwowomileyo umhlaba pakati kwolwandle; ati amanzi aba ludonga kulo ngesokunene salo nangesokohlo salo. 
Exodus14:30 Kwa njalo ke uyehova wasindisa o‐Sirayeli ngalomhla esandleni sama‐Jipete; baza o‐Sirayeli babona ama‐Jipete efile ngaselunxwemeni lwolwandle. 
Exodus14:31 Kanjalo babona o‐Sirayeli lowomsebenzi umkulu, owayewenzile uyehova pezu kwama‐Jipete; baye abantu besoyika uyehova, bakolwa nguyehova nokukolwa, nangu‐Mosesi isicaka sake." 
Exodus15:1 WANDULA wavuma u‐Mosesi, kwa nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, lengoma kuyehova; baye besitsho nkuti: Ndovuma kuyehova, ngokuba epakanyisiwe ngento ebungcwalisa. Ihashe nomkweli walo ubaposele elwandle." 
Exodus15:2 Uyehova uludumiso lwam neculo lam; ude waba lusindiso kum: lo ungutixo wam, ndiya kumbonga; ngutixo kabawo, ndiya kumdumisekisa." 
Exodus15:3 Uyehova uliṙoti lemfazwe: nguyehova igama lake. 
Exodus15:4 Inqwelo zokulwa zika‐Faro nempi yake uzijulele elwandle; injengele zake ezidluliseleyo zintywilisiwe elwandle olubomvu. 
Exodus15:5 Inzulu zibagubungele; batshonele emazantsi njengelitye. 
Exodus15:6 Isandla sako sokunene, Yehova! sizukisiwe ngamandla; isandla sako sokunene, Yehova! silute gqobo utshaba." 
Exodus15:7 Ngobukulu besitomo sako ubacitile abo basukela ngakuwe; watuma umsindo wako, obubadla njengendiza." 
Exodus15:8 Ngomoya wempumlo yako afumbeka amanzi; imisinga yapakama njengemfumba; inzulu zajiyiswa embilini wolwandle. 
Exodus15:9 Lwati utshaba: Ndoputuma, ndofumana, ndowaba amaxo̔ba; umxe̔lo wam wozaliswa ngabo; ndiya kuṙola isiṙele sam: isandla sam sobagqogqa." 
Exodus15:10 Waqutisa ngomoya wako; ulwandle lwabagubungela; batshona njengelode emanzini amakulu. 
Exodus15:11 Ngubanina onjengawe pakati kwotixo, Yehova? Ngubanina onjengawe, uzukisekile ngobungcwele, usoyikeka ezindunyisweni, usenza okungummangaliso?" 
Exodus15:12 Wolula isandla sako sokunene; wabaginya ke umhlaba. 
Exodus15:13 Wakokela ngobubele bako ababantu ubakululeyo; wabakapela ngamandla ako ekaya lako elingcwele. 
Exodus15:14 Intlanga ziya kuva, zibe nevuso; ututumelo luya kubamba abemi base‐Filistiya." 
Exodus15:15 Ziya kwandula zituswe inkosana zase‐Edome; abakulu base‐Mowabi kwobabamba ukungcangcazela; baya kunyibilika bonke abemi base‐Kanane. 
Exodus15:16 Kwobawela ukwoyika nokunkwantya; ngobukulu bengalo yako boti cwaka njengelitye; bade bagqite abantu bako, Yehova! bade bagqite ababantu ubatengileyo." 
Exodus15:17 Uya kubangenisa, ubatyale entabeni yelifa lako, endaweni uyenzile ibe yeyokuhlala kwako, Yehova! kweyingcwele, Nkosi! ezite izandla zako zayiqinisa." 
Exodus15:18 Uyehova uya kupata ngobukumkani kude kube ngunapakade! 
Exodus15:19 Ngokuba bekungenile amahashe ka‐Faro, kunye nenqwelo zake zokulwa, nakunye nabakweli bake bamahashe, kulo ulwandle, waza uyehova wabuyisa amanzi olwandle pezu kwabo; kanti usapo luka‐Sirayeli beluhambile pezu kwowomileyo umhlaba pakati kwolwandle." 
Exodus15:20 Waye u‐Miriyame, umprofitekazi, udade ka‐Arone, watabata intambula esandleni sake: aza apuma onke amankazana emva kwake, enentambula nemidudo." 
Exodus15:21 Wandula u‐Miriyame wapendula kuwo amadoda, ngokuti: Vumani kuyehova, ngokuba epakanyisiwe ngento ebungcwalisa. Ihashe nomkweli walo ubaposele elwandle." 
Exodus15:22 Wada u‐Mosesi wandulula o‐Sirayeli elwandle olubomvu; baza bapumela ngasentlango ye‐Shure; bahamba intsuku zantatu entlango apo, bengafumananga manzi." 
Exodus15:23 Bati bakufika e‐Mara, bakohlwa kusela amanzi ase‐Mara, ngokuba ebeṙaṙa wona; ngako oko igama lalo ndawo labizwa ngokuti yi‐Mara." 
Exodus15:24 Baza abantu baṙoṙa ngaku‐Mosesi, besiti: Sosela nto nina?" 
Exodus15:25 Wakala ke kuyehova; waza uyehova wambonisa umti, owati akuwuposa emanzini, amanzi asel’ eba mnandi. Apo ke wabenzela ummiso nesiko; nalapo wabalinga;" 
Exodus15:26 wati: Xeshekweni uya kukutala ukupulapula ilizwi likayehova, lotixo wako, ukwenze okufaneleyo emehlweni ake, unikele imiyalelo yake indlebe, uyigcine yonke imimiso yake, andiyi kubeka pezu kwako nasinye kwezozifo ndizibekileyo pezu kwama‐Jipete: ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova okupilisayo." 
Exodus15:27 Baza bafika e‐Elime, apo kwakuko imitombo yamanzi ilishumi linamibini, nemiti yepalime imashumi asixe̔nxe: bati waca apo ke ngasemanzini." 
Exodus16:1 KWADA kwandulukwa e‐Elime; yaza yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli yafika entlango ye‐Sine, epakati kwe‐Elime ne‐Sinai, ngoweshumi linesihlanu umhla wenyanga yesibini yokupuma kwalo ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Exodus16:2 Yasuka yaṙoṙa yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli ngaku‐Mosesi nangaku‐Arone entlangoapo. 
Exodus16:3 Lwaye usapo luka‐Sirayeli lusiti kubo: Akwaba sabesifele ezweni le‐Jipete ngesandla sikayehova, nxa sibe sihleli ngasezimbizeni zenyama, na nxa sibe sisitya isonka kwada kwahlutwa! ngokuba nisipumisile ukuza kulentlango, ukuba nibubise wonke lomhlambi ngokulamba." 
Exodus16:4 Wandula uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Bona ke, ndiya kuninisela isonka ezulwini; babeya kupuma abantu, babute into yemini nye ngemini yayo; ukuze ndibalinge, ukuba bohamba emtetweni wam, abayi kuhamba kuwo, kusinina." 
Exodus16:5 Kwakuya kuti ngemini yesitandatu, bakulungisa oko bakungenisileyo, kwoba kokupindiweyo ngapezu kwoko bakubutayo imihla ngemihla." 
Exodus16:6 Baza bati u‐Mosesi no‐Arone kulo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli: Ngokuhlwa niya kwandula ukwazi ukuba nguyehova onikupileyo ezweni le‐Jipete; 
Exodus16:7 nangokusa niya kwandula ukubona ubungcwalisa bukayehova; ngokuba evile ukuṙoṙa kwenu ngakuyehova: kekaloku tina siyinto nina, okokuba niṙoṙa ngakuti?" 
Exodus16:8 Wati kanjalo u‐Mosesi: Nxa uyehova aya kunipa ngokuhlwa inyama ukuba nitye, ati kwakusa anipe isonka ukuba nihlute, kwoba ngokuba uyehova evile ukuṙoṙa kwenu eniṙoṙa ngako ngakuye: kekaloku tina siyinto nina? akungakuti ukuṙoṙa kwenu, kungakuye uyehova." 
Exodus16:9 Waza u‐Mosesi wati ku‐Arone: Yiti kuyo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli: Sondelani ebusweni bukayehova; ngokuba evile ukuṙoṙa kwenu. 
Exodus16:10 Kwaye kute, nxa asateta u‐Arone kuyo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, kwabekwa ngasentlango, kekaloku nabu ubungcwalisa bukayehova bubonakala efini." 
Exodus16:11 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus16:12 Ndikuvile ukuṙoṙa kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; teta kulo, usiti: Pakati kwokuhlwa niya kudla inyama, nangokusa niya kuhluta sisonka; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Exodus16:13 Kwaza kwati, ngokuhlwa zenyuka izagwityi, zagubungela umnquba; nangokusa umbete waulele ungqonga umnquba." 
Exodus16:14 Kwati kwakunyuka umbete obulele kona, nantsi ipezu kwobuso bentlango into encinanana equvileyo, encinanana njengengqele emhlope pezu kwomhlaba." 
Exodus16:15 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwakuyibona, lwati olunye kolunye: Yinto nina le? ngokuba lube lungazi iyinto nina. Wayesiti u‐Mosesi kulo: Le isisonka anipileyo uyehova sibe kukutya." 
Exodus16:16 Into ayiyaleleyo uyehova yile yokuti: Butani kuyo, abanye ngabanye ngento engangokutya kwabo, ibe yiomere kumntu mnye, njengenani leziqu zakokwenu; bonke mabatabatele abo basezintenteni zabo." 
Exodus16:17 Lwenje njalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwabuta ke, inxenye ngokuninzi, nenxenye ngokuncinane." 
Exodus16:18 Kodwa kwakulinganiswa ngeomere, obebute okuninzi akabanga nokupezulu, nobebute okuncinane akabanga nakuswela; babuta abanye ngabanye ngento engangokutya kwabo." 
Exodus16:19 Wayesiti u‐Mosesi kubo: Makungabiko mntu osalisa kuyo kude kuse. 
Exodus16:20 Abampulapula u‐Mosesi noko; kodwa inxenye babesalisa kuyo kwada kwasa, yaza yabola zimpetu, yanuka; wabaqumbela ke u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus16:21 Kekaloku bayibuta ngemiso ngemiso, abanye ngabanye ngento engangokutya kwabo; yati, lakubalela ilanga, yanyibilika." 
Exodus16:22 Kwaza kwati, ngemini yesitandatu babuta isonka esipindiweyo, zaziziomere zimbini kumntu mnye; zasuka zonke inkosana zentlanganiso zeza zaxela ku‐Mosesi." 
Exodus16:23 Wayesiti kuzo: Koku uyehova akutshilo: Ngomso lixesha lopumlo, isabata eyingcwele kuyehova; leyo niya kuyoja, yojeni, naleyo niya kuyipeka, yipekeni: nayo yonke eliliva nizibekelele yona ize igcinwe kude kuse." 
Exodus16:24 Baza bayibekela kwada kwasa, njengokuba ebeyalele u‐Mosesi; ayanuka ke, akwabako mpetu kuyo kanjalo." 
Exodus16:25 Wandula wati u‐Mosesi: Yityani leyo namhla nje, ngokuba namhla yisabata kuyehova; aniyi kuyifumana ezindle namhla." 
Exodus16:26 Noyibuta imihla ibe mitandatu; kodwa ngomhla wesixe̔nxe, ngowesabata, ayiyi kubako ngawo." 
Exodus16:27 Kwaza kwati ngomhla wesixe̔nxe, kwapuma inxenye yabantu ukuya kubuta, koko bengafumananga." 
Exodus16:28 Waza wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Niya kwala kude kube ninina ukugcina imiyalelo yam nemiteto yam? 
Exodus16:29 Niyabona ke, ngokokuba uyehova enipile isabata, kukona anipayo ngomhla wesitandatu isonka semihla mibini: hlalani, abanye ngabanye ezindaweni zabo, kungesuki namnye endaweni yake ngomhla wesixe̔nxe." 
Exodus16:30 Baza abantu bapumla ngomhla wesixe̔nxe. 
Exodus16:31 Kekaloku indlu ka‐Sirayeli yayibiza ngegama eliyimana: yabinjengembewu yekoriyande, imhlope; nesongo layo belinjengezonkana ezinobusi." 
Exodus16:32 Wati kanjalo u‐Mosesi: Into ayiyaleleyo uyehova yile yokuti: Zalisani iomere ngayo, ize igcinelwe izizukulwana zenu; ukuze babone isonka endinidlisile sona entlango, ndakunikupa elizweni le‐Jipete." 
Exodus16:33 Waza wati u‐Mosesi ku‐Arone: Tabata isitya sibe sinye, uyibeke kuso iomere izele yemana; uze uyibekele ngasebusweni bukayehova, ukuba igcinelwe izizukulwana zenu." 
Exodus16:34 Njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi, kwa njalo u‐Arone wayibekela ngasebusweni be tyeya ye sinqi̔no ukuba igcinwe." 
Exodus16:35 Lwaye usapo luka‐Sirayeli belusidla imana iminyaka yamashumi mane, lwada lwafika ezweni elimiweyo; lwadla imana lwada lwafika emideni yelizwe le‐Kanane." 
Exodus16:36 Kekaloku iomere iseseshumi isiqingata seyefa. 
Exodus17:1 YAZA yanduluka yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli entlango ye‐Sine, ngemfuduko zayo, njengokuxela kukayehova, yada yati waca e‐Refidime: kwaye kungeko manzi okuba basele abantu." 
Exodus17:2 Ngako abantu bapika no‐Mosesi, bati: Sipe amanzi, sisele. Wati kubo u‐Mosesi: Yinina ukuba nipike nam? Yinina ukuba nilinge uyehova?" 
Exodus17:3 Koko abantu bebenxanelwa amanzi kona; bandula abantu baṙoṙa ngaku‐Mosesi, bati: Yinina lento ukuba usinyusile e‐Jipete, ukuze usibubise tina, nabantwana betu, nenkomo zetu, ngenxanwa?" 
Exodus17:4 Waza u‐Mosesi wakala kuyehova, esiti: Ndoti nina kubo ababantu? bohla bandigibisele ngamatye!" 
Exodus17:5 Wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yandulela wena pambi kwabantu, utabate nawe kubadala bo‐Sirayeli; nentonga yako, obubeta ngayo umlambo, uyipate esandleni sako, uhambe." 
Exodus17:6 Bona ke, ndiya kuma ebusweni bako kona, pezu kwelityekazi lase‐Horebe; wauya kubeta ilityekazi, kuze kupume amanzi kulo, ukuba basele abantu. Wenje njalo ke u‐Mosesi emehlweni abadala bo‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus17:7 Wabiza igama lalondawo ngo‐Masa, nango‐Meriba, ngenxa yokupika kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nangenxa yokumlinga kwalo uyehova, lusiti: Uko na uyehova pakati kwetu, akako kusinina?" 
Exodus17:8 KWANDULA kweza o‐Amaleki, balwa no‐Sirayeli e‐Refidime." 
Exodus17:9 Waza wati u‐Mosesi ku‐Yoshuwa: Siketele amadoda, uze upume, ulwe no‐Amaleki; ngomso ndiya kuma engcopo yenduli, ndinentonga katixo esandleni sam." 
Exodus17:10 Waya u‐Yoshuwa wenza njengokuba ebetshilo kuye u‐Mosesi, walwa no‐Amaleki; koko u‐Mosesi, n o‐Arone, no‐Hure, benyukela engcotsheni yenduli." 
Exodus17:11 Kwaza kwati, akupakamisa isandla sake u‐Mosesi, kwandula kweyisa o‐Sirayeli; kanti akuhlisa isandla sake, kwandula kweyisa o‐Amaleki." 
Exodus17:12 Kodwa izandla zika‐Mosesi zaba nzima; ngako batabata ilitye, balibeka ngapantsi kwake, waza wahlala pezu kwalo: bati u‐Arone no‐Hure baxasa izandla zake, omnye engelinye icala, omnye engelinye; zaza izandla zake zati nqi lada latshona ilanga." 
Exodus17:13 Kwa njalo u‐Yoshuwa wacita o‐Amaleki nabantu bakowabo ngohlangoti lwesiṙele. 
Exodus17:14 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Ba̔la lento ibe yinkumbuzo encwadini, uyibeke ezindlebeni zika‐Yoshuwa; ngokuba ndiya kugqibela ukucima inkunjulwa ka‐Amaleki ngapantsi kwezulu." 
Exodus17:15 Wandula u‐Mosesi waka isibingelo, wasibiza ngegama lokuti: Uyehova yibanile yam!" 
Exodus17:16 ngokuba ebesiti: Ngokokuba isandla sabo sibe singakuyo iterone kayehova, kukona imfazwe kayehova iya kuba ngako‐Amaleki kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Exodus18:1 WATI u‐Yetero, umperisite wase‐Midiyane, usomfazi ka‐Mosesi, akuba evile konke utixo ebekwenzele u‐Mosesi no‐Sirayeli abantu bake, okokuba uyehova ebepumisile o‐Sirayeli e‐Jipete;" 
Exodus18:2 wandula u‐Yetero, usomfazi ka‐Mosesi, watabata u‐Tsipora, umfazi ka‐Mosesi, (emveni kwokuba ebemndulule,)" 
Exodus18:3 nonyana bake bobabini; elati igama lomnye lalingu‐Gereshome; ngokuba ebesiti: Ndingowasemzini elizweni lasemzini; 
Exodus18:4 negama lomnye lalingu‐Eliyezeri; ngokuba ebesiti: Utixo kabawo ebengumncedi wam, wandisindisa esiṙeleni sika‐Faro:" 
Exodus18:5 waza waya u‐Yetero, usomfazi ka‐Mosesi, nonyana bake, nomfazi wake, ku‐Mosesi entlango, apo abete waca kona ngasentabeni katixo." 
Exodus18:6 Wayesiti ku‐Mosesi: Mna somfazi wako u‐Yetero, ndiyeza kuwe, nomfazi wako, nonyana bake bobabini kunye naye." 
Exodus18:7 Waselepuma u‐Mosesi waya kukaulela usomfazi wake, wazitoba ke, wamanga: baza babuzana ngokupila kwabo; bada bangena ententeni." 
Exodus18:8 Waye u‐Mosesi wabalisela usomfazi wake konke uyehova wabekwenzile ku‐Faro, nakuma‐Jipete, ngenxa yo‐Sirayeli; nayo yonke inkatazo ebibahlile endleleni, nokuba uyehova ubebasindisile." 
Exodus18:9 Waza wavuya u‐Yetero pezu kwabo bonke ububele uyehova wabebenzele o‐Sirayeli, abebasindisile esandleni sama‐Jipete." 
Exodus18:10 Wayesiti u‐Yetero: Makabongwe uyehova onisindisileyo esandleni sama‐Jipete, nasesandleni sika‐Faro; obasindisileyo abantu kwa pantsi kwesandla sama‐Jipete!" 
Exodus18:11 Kaloku ndiyazi ukuba uyehova umkulu kubo bonke otixo; ngokuba entweni benza nger̔atshi ngayo, ebepezulu kubo." 
Exodus18:12 Waza u‐Yetero, usomfazi ka‐Mosesi, watabatela utixo idini lokutshiswa nemibingelelo: wayesiza u‐Arone, nabo bonke abadala bo‐Sirayeli, ukuza kutya isonka nosomfazi ka‐Mosesi ebusweni bukatixo." 
Exodus18:13 Kwaye kute ngomnye umhla, wahlala u‐Mosesi ukugweba ebantwini; bati abantu bema ngakuye u‐Mosesi kwa sekuseni kwada kwahlwa." 
Exodus18:14 Waza usomfazi ka‐Mosesi, akubona konke owakwenzayo ebantwini, wati: Yinto nina lento uyenzayo ebantwini? kunganina ukuba uhlale wena wedwa, nokuba bonke abantu beme ngakuwe kwa sekuseni kude kuhlwe?" 
Exodus18:15 Wati u‐Mosesi kusomfazi wake: Kungokuba abantu besiza kum ukuza kubuza kutixo. 
Exodus18:16 Xeshekweni banendawo, bayeza kum; nditi mna ndigwebe pakati kwomnye nomnye, ndibazise imimiso katixo nemiteto yake." 
Exodus18:17 Waza wati usomfazi ka‐Mosesi kuye: Ayilungile lonto uyenzayo wena. 
Exodus18:18 Uya kusinyeka ngenyaniso, kwa wena nababantu abanawe: ngokuba lendawo ikusinda; akungeyenze ngokwako wedwa." 
Exodus18:19 Kaupulapule ilizwi lam; ndokunika icebo, waye utixo eya kuba nawe. Yiba wena ngenxa yabantu pambi kwotixo, ukuba uzise indawo kutixo:" 
Exodus18:20 uze ubafundise imimiso nemiteto, ubazise indlela abaya kuhamba ngayo, nomsebenzi abaya kuwenza." 
Exodus18:21 Kanjako uya kufuna kubo bonke abantu amadoda omeleleyo, amoyikayo utixo, amadoda enyaniso, ayitiyayo inzuzo ekohlakeleyo; uwabeke pezu kwabo, abe ngabapati bamawaka, n abapati bamakulu, n abapati bamashumi mahlanu, nabapati bamashumi manye;" 
Exodus18:22 baze bagwebe ebantwini ngamaxesha onke; kwaye kuya kuti, zonke indawo ezinkulu bozizisa kuwe, kodwa zonke indawo ezincinane mabazigwebe bona; kuze kube lula kuwe, bakutwalise nabo." 
Exodus18:23 Ukuba lento uyayenza, nokuba utixo uyakuyalela njalo, woba nako ukunyamezela; kanjalo nababantu bonke boya endaweni yabo ngoxolo." 
Exodus18:24 Waye u‐Mosesi epulapula ilizwi losomfazi wake, wakwenza konke abetshilo kona." 
Exodus18:25 Waza u‐Mosesi wanyula amadoda omeleleyo kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli, wawenza intloko pezu kwabantu, abapati bamawaka, n abapati bamakulu, n abapati bamashumi mahlanu, nabapati bamashumi manye;" 
Exodus18:26 ababegweba ebantwini ngamaxesha onke; indawo ezinqabileyo bazizisa kuye u‐Mosesi, kodwa zonke indawo ezincinane bazigweba bona." 
Exodus18:27 Waza u‐Mosesi wandulula usomfazi wake; waya yena elizweni lakowabo. 
Exodus19:1 EKUTWASENI kwenyanga yesitatu emveni kwokupuma kwalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli elizweni le‐Jipete, kwa ngalomini lwafika entlango ye‐Sinai." 
Exodus19:2 Ngokuba belundulukile e‐Refidime, lwafika entlango ye‐Sinai, lwati waca entlango; kwa lapo ke bati waca o‐Sirayeli ngapambi kwentaba." 
Exodus19:3 Wasuka u‐Mosesi wenyukela kutixo; waza uyehova wambiza esentabeni, esiti: Uya kutsho kwindlu ka‐Yakobi, uxele elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ukuti:" 
Exodus19:4 Nibonile oko ndakwenzayo kuma‐Jipete, nokokuba ndanitwala emapikweni okozi, ndanizisa kwa kum." 
Exodus19:5 Ngako kaloku, ukuba niya kukutala ukuliva ilizwi lam, nilugcine ucebano lwam, noba yinto enqabileyo kum pezu kwazo zonke intlanga; ngokuba wonke umhlaba ungowam:" 
Exodus19:6 naniya kuba bubukumkani babaperisite kum, nesizwe esingcwele. Ngawo la amazwi oya kuteta wona elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus19:7 Waselesiza u‐Mosesi wabiza abadala babantu, wabeka ebusweni babo onke lamazwi wabemyalela wona uyehova." 
Exodus19:8 Bapendula bonke abantu kwa kunye, bati: Konke akutetileyo uyehova siya kukwenza. Waza u‐Mosesi wawabuyisela kuyehova amazwi abantu." 
Exodus19:9 Wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Bona ke, ndiyeza kuwe elifini elibungqingqwa, ngenxa yokuba abantu beve ndakuteta nawe, nokuba bakolwe nguwe kude kube ngunapakade. Waye u‐Mosesi waxela amazwi abantu kuyehova." 
Exodus19:10 Wati uyehova kanjalo ku‐Mosesi: Yiya ebantwini, ubangcwalise namhla nangomso; mabahlanze ingubo zabo kanjalo;" 
Exodus19:11 baze babe sebelungile ngemini yesitatu: ngokuba ngemini yesitatu eya kuhla uyehova pambi kwamehlo abantu bonke, pezu kwentaba ye‐Sinai." 
Exodus19:12 Wauya kumisela abantu imida ngokungqonga, usiti: Zilumkeleni, ize ningenyukeli entabeni, ningacukumisi nodini lwayo: osukuba ecukumisa intaba, uya kubujiswa ngenyaniso;" 
Exodus19:13 akuyi kuyicukumisa isandla, koko aya kugityiselwa ngamatye, umhlaumbi uya kuhlatywa; nokuba sisilo, nokuba yindoda, ayiyi kupila. Nxa ixilongo lihlokomayo, baya kunyuka beze entabeni." 
Exodus19:14 Waza u‐Mosesi wehla entabeni waya ebantwini, wabangcwalisa abantu; baza bahlanza ingubo zabo." 
Exodus19:15 Wayesiti ebantwini: Yibani nilungile ngemini yesitatu; ningasondeli emfazini. 
Exodus19:16 Kwaza kwati ngemini yesitatu, kwakusa, kwabako indudumo nemibane, nelifu elinzima pezu kwentaba, nentlokoma yexilongo inamandla kakulu; bada bangcangcazela bonke abantu ababesemnqubeni." 
Exodus19:17 Wandula u‐Mosesi wapuma nabantu emnqubeni, ukuya kuhlangana notixo; baya bema emazantsi entaba." 
Exodus19:18 Yaza intaba ye‐Sinai yaquma umsi yonke, ngokokuba uyehova ebesihla pezu kwayo emlilweni: kanjalo umsi wayo wenyuka njengomsi wesidlangalala, yangcangcazela kakulu intaba yonke." 
Exodus19:19 Kwati yakumana ukwanda ngamandla ngakumbi intlokoma yexilongo, kwateta u‐Mosesi; waye utixo wampendula ngelizwi." 
Exodus19:20 Wehla uyehova pezu kwentaba ye‐Sinai, kwa sengcopo yentaba: wandula uyehova wambiza u‐Mosesi enyukele engcopo yentaba; wenyuka ke u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus19:21 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Yihla, yala abantu, hleze batyobozele kuyehova ukuza kubonela, kwenzakale kubo into eninzi." 
Exodus19:22 Kanjalo nabaperisite, abasondelayo kuyehova, mabazingcwalise, hleze uyehova agaleleke pezu kwabo." 
Exodus19:23 Waza u‐Mosesi wati kuyehova: Abantu bakohliwe kukunyukela entabeni ye‐Sinai; ngokuba wena usiyalile, usiti: Misela intaba imida, uyingcwalise." 
Exodus19:24 Koko uyehova wati kuye: Hamba, uhle, ubuye unyuke, wena no‐Arone kunye nawe; kodwa abaperisite nabantu mabangatyobozeli ukuza kunyukela kuyehova, hleze agaleleke pezu kwabo." 
Exodus19:25 Wandul’ ukuhla u‐Mosesi waya ebantwini, watsho kubo." 
Exodus20:1 WAZA utixo wateta onke lamazwi, esiti:" 
Exodus20:2 Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wako, okukupileyo elizweni le‐Jipete, endlwini yobukoboka." 
Exodus20:3 Akuyi kuba nabo otixo bambi ngapandle kwam. 
Exodus20:4 Akuyi kuzenzela umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, nanye into efana nesezulwini pezulu, nesemhlabeni pantsi apa, nesemanzini pantsi kwomhlaba:" 
Exodus20:5 akuyi kutoba pambi kwazo; akuyi kuzikonza kanjalo: ngokuba mna Yehova, utixo wako, ndi ngutixo onekwele, ndiyohlwayela inkohlakalo yoyise pezu kwabantwana, pezu kwesesitatu napezu kwesesine isizukulwana sabanditiyayo;" 
Exodus20:6 ndiwenzela ububele amawaka abanditandayo nabayigcinayo imiyalelo yam. 
Exodus20:7 Akuyi kufumana ulibize igama likayehova, utixo wako: ngokuba uyehova engayi kumyeka angabi natyala lowo ufumana elibiza igama lake." 
Exodus20:8 Kumbula umhla we‐Sabata, ukuba uwenze ngcwele." 
Exodus20:9 Wosebenza imihla ibe mitandatu, uwenze wonke umsebenzi wako;" 
Exodus20:10 kodwa umhla wesixe̔nxe uyi‐Sabata kayehova, utixo wako; akuyi kwenza namnye umsebenzi ngawo, kwa wena, nonyana wako, nentombi yako, n esicaka sako, nesicakakazi sako, nenkomo zako, nowasemzini wako opakati kwamasango ako:" 
Exodus20:11 ngokuba ngemihla mitandatu wenza uyehova izulu nomhlaba, n olwandle, nako konke okukuzo, waza wapumla ngomhla wesixe̔nxe: ngoko wawutamsanqelisa uyehova umhla wesixe̔nxe, wawenza ngcwele." 
Exodus20:12 Beka uyihlo nonyoko, ukuze imihla yako yolulwe elizweni ulipiweyo nguyehova, utixo wako." 
Exodus20:13 Akuyi kubulala. 
Exodus20:14 Akuyi kuṙexeza. 
Exodus20:15 Akuyi kuba̔. 
Exodus20:16 Akuyi kunqi̔na ubunqi̔na’obubuxoki ngakuye ummelwane wako. 
Exodus20:17 Akuyi kunqwenela indlu yommelwane wako, akuyi kunqwenela umfazi wommelwane wako, nesicaka sake, nesicakakazi sake, nenkabi yake, neqwaṙashe lake, nanye into eyeyommelwane wako." 
Exodus20:18 BAYE abantu bonke babona indudumo, nemibane, nentlokoma yexilongo, nentaba iquma: baza abantu bakubona, bahlehla, bema kude;" 
Exodus20:19 bati ku‐Mosesi: Teta wena nati, sasiya kuva; kodwa makangateti nati utixo, hleze sife." 
Exodus20:20 Waza u‐Mosesi wati ebantwini: Ningoyiki; ngokuba uyehova eze ukuba anilinge, nokuba kubeko ukwoyikwa kwake ngasebusweni benu, ukuze ningoni." 
Exodus20:21 Kekaloku abantu bema kude; kodwa u‐Mosesi wasondela esitokotokweni, apo wayekona utixo." 
Exodus20:22 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Wotsho elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli ukuti: Nibonile ukuba ndibe nditeta nani ndisezulwini. 
Exodus20:23 Aniyi kwenza ndawonye nam otixo besilivere, kanjako aniyi kuzenzela otixo begolide." 
Exodus20:24 Uya kundenzela isibingelo somhlaba, uze ubinge pezu kwaso amadini ako okutshiswa, neminikelo yako yoxolo, igusha zako, nenkabi zako: kuzo zonke indawo endiya kulenza igama lam likankanywe kona, ndoza kuwe, ndikutamsanqele." 
Exodus20:25 Naxeshekweni uya kundenzela isibingelo samatye, akuyi kusaka ngalawo abaziweyo; nxa upakamisayo pezu kwaso intsimbi yako, seuya kusinco̔lisa." 
Exodus20:26 Kanjalo akuyi kukwela ngezinyukelo ngapezu kwesibingelo sam, ukuba kungatyileki ubuzé bako pezu kwaso." 
Exodus21:1 Kekaloku zizo ezi izigwebo oya kuzibeka pambi kwabo. 
Exodus21:2 Nxa utengayo isicaka esingum‐Hebere, siya kukonza iminyaka ibe mitandatu; kodwa ngowesixe̔nxe sopuma sikululekile ngesisa." 
Exodus21:3 Ukuba seza ngesiqu saso, sopuma ngesiqu saso; ukuba besiyindoda enomfazi, uya kupuma umfazi waso kwa naso." 
Exodus21:4 Ukuba inkosi yaso isinikile umfazi, osizalele onyana, umhlaumbi intombi, umfazi lowo nabantwana bake boba ngabenkosi yake, sipume sona ngesiqu saso." 
Exodus21:5 Kodwa ukuba isicaka eso soqinisa ukuti: Ndiyatanda inkosi yam, n omfazi wam, nabantwana bam, andiyi kupuma ndikululekile;" 
Exodus21:6 yoti inkosi yaso isisondeze kubagwebi; ibuye isisondeze naselucangweni, umhlaumbi emgubasini; ize inkosi yaso icumbuze indlebe yaso ngenyatyowa, sasiya kuyikonza kude kube ngunapakade." 
Exodus21:7 Naxeshekweni umntu atengisa ngayo intombi yake ibe sisicakakazi, asiyi kupuma sona njengokupuma kwezicaka ezingamadoda." 
Exodus21:8 Ukuba siba sibi emehlweni enkosi yaso, esixamele yona, iya kwandula isikululise: ayiyi kuba nagunya okusitengisa ebantwini basemzini, ngokuba isipete ngenkohliso." 
Exodus21:9 Nokuba isixamele unyana wayo, iya kusenzela njengesiko lentombi." 
Exodus21:10 Ukuba iyamtabatela omnye umfazi, ayiyi kuncipisa ukutya kwaso, nesivato saso, nebango laso lokutshata." 
Exodus21:11 Nokuba ayisenzeli ezi zinto zontatu, siya kupuma ngesisa, kungeko imali." 
Exodus21:12 Obetayo umntu, ade afe, uya kufiswa ngenyaniso." 
Exodus21:13 Kanti lowo ongamlalelanga, koko utixo emyekelele esandleni sake, ndokumisela indawo apo aya kusabela kona." 
Exodus21:14 Kodwa xeshekweni umntu enza ngenkani ngakuye ummelwane wake, ukuba ambulale ngobuqinga, uya kumsusa esibingelweni sam, aze afe." 
Exodus21:15 Nobetayo uyise, umhlaumbi unina, uya kufiswa ngenyaniso." 
Exodus21:16 Kanjalo oba̔yo umntu, nokuba uyatengisa ngaye, nokuba uyafunyanwa esandleni sake, uya kufiswa ngenyaniso." 
Exodus21:17 Notukayo uyise, umhlaumbi unina, uya kufiswa ngenyaniso." 
Exodus21:18 Naxeshekweni amadoda apikisana, ize enye ibete enye ngelitye, umhlaumbi ngesandla esifunjatiweyo, iti ke yona ingafi, koko ilele pezu kwomandlalo:" 
Exodus21:19 ukuba iyabuya ivuke, ihambe pandle ngomsimelelo wayo, ayiyi kuba natyala leyo eyayibetayo; kupela iya kuhlaulela ixesha lokupumla kwayo, yenze nokuba igqibele ukupoliswa." 
Exodus21:20 Nxa, kanjalo, umntu abeta isicaka sake, umhlaumbi isicakakazi sake, ngentonga, side sife ngapantsi kwesandla sake, kwopindezelwa ke ngenyaniso." 
Exodus21:21 Kodwa ukuba sisahlala umhla mnye, umhlaumbi imihla mibini, akuyi kupindezelwa; ngokuba siyimali yake sona." 
Exodus21:22 Xeshekweni amadoda angxolisana, asunduze umfazi omitiyo, size sipume isisu sake, koko kungeko kwenzakala, uya kuhlauliswa ngenyaniso owenje njalo, njengokuba iya kubeka pezu kwake indoda yalomfazi; uya kuhlaula pambi kwabagwebi." 
Exodus21:23 Kodwa ukuba kuko ukwenzakala, uya kwandul’ ukunika ubomi ngenxa yobomi," 
Exodus21:24 iliso ngenxa yeliso, izinyo ngenxa yezinyo, isandla ngenxa yesandla, unyawo ngenxa yonyawo," 
Exodus21:25 isitshiswa ngenxa yesitshiswa, inxeba ngenxa yenxeba, umvimbo ngenxa yomvimbo." 
Exodus21:26 Naxeshekweni umntu abeta iliso lesicaka sake, umhlaumbi iliso lesicakakazi sake, alitshabalalise, uya kusindulula sikululekile ngenxa yeliso laso." 
Exodus21:27 Kanjalo ukuba uyawisa izinyo lesicaka sake, umhlaumbi izinyo lesicakakazi sake, uya kusindulula sikululekile ngenxa yezinyo laso." 
Exodus21:28 Xeshekweni inkabi inqubayo indoda, umhlaumbi inkazana, ide ife, inkabi leyo yogityiselwa ngamatye ngenyaniso, nenyama yayo ayiyi kudliwa; kanti umnini wenkabi akayi kuba natyala." 
Exodus21:29 Kodwa ukuba inkabi ibiyenqubayo ngexesha lapambili, nokuba kunqi̔nelwe umniniyo, kanti akayigcinanga noko, yaza yafisa indoda, umhlaumbi inkazana, inkabi leyo yogityiselwa ngamatye, nomniniyo uya kufiswa naye." 
Exodus21:30 Ukuba ubekelwe intlaulo, uya kunikela inkululwa yobomi bake njengokubekiweyo pezu kwake." 
Exodus21:31 Nokuba inqubile unyana, nokuba inqubile intombi, kuya kwenziwa kuye njengalomgwebo." 
Exodus21:32 Ukuba inkabi iya kunquba isicaka, umhlaumbi isicakakazi, uya kunika inkosi yaso ishekele zesilivere zibe ngamashumi matatu, nenkabi iya kugityiselwa ngamatye." 
Exodus21:33 Kanjalo xeshekweni umntu aya kuvumbulula umnxuma, umhlaumbi xeshekweni umntu aya kumba umnxuma, kanti akawugubungeli, ize yeyele kona inkabi, umhlaumbi iqwaṙashe;" 
Exodus21:34 umnini womnxuma uya kubuyekeza, anike imali kumniniyo; kanti into efileyo yoba yeyake." 
Exodus21:35 Naxeshekweni inkabi yomnye umntu ihlabayo inkabi yomnye, ide ife, baya kutengisa ngayo inkabi epilileyo, baqingatise imali yayo; nefileyo baya kuqingatisa yona nayo." 
Exodus21:36 Ukuba kodwa kuyaziwa ukuba lonkabi ibiyenqubayo ngexesha lapambili, nokuba umniniyo akayigcinanga noko, uya kubuyekeza inkabi ngenxa yenkabi; kanti efileyo yoba yeyake." 
Exodus22:1 Xeshekweni umntu eba̔yo inkabi, umhlaumbi igusha, aze ayixe̔le, umhlaumbi atengise ngayo, uya kubuyekeza inkomo zibe ntlanu ngenxa yenkabi nye, negusha zibe ne ngenxa yegusha nye." 
Exodus22:2 Ukuba isela liyafunyanwa ekugqobozeni, lize libetwe lide life, akayi kuba natyala legazi obelibeta." 
Exodus22:3 Ukuba lipumile ilanga pezu kwalo, woba netyala legazi olibetayo; logqibela ukubuyekeza; ukuba alinanto, kwotengiswa ngalo ngenxa yokuba̔ kwalo." 
Exodus22:4 Ukuba iyafunyanwa ngenyaniso esandleni salo into ebi̔weyo ipilile, nokuba yinkabi, nokuba liqwaṙashe, nokuba yigusha, lobuyekeza ngokupindiweyo." 
Exodus22:5 Xeshekweni umntu aya kwenza intsimi idliwe, umhlaumbi sisitiya semiti yeveyine, aqu̔bele kona inkomo zake, zize zidle entsimini yomnye umntu; uya kubuyekeza kwa ngokulungileyo kweyake intsimi, nangokulungileyo kwesake isitiya semiti yeveyine." 
Exodus22:6 Xeshekweni upuma umlilo, ufumane ameva, kuze kugqityelwe izita zenqolowa, umhlaumbi yileyo isemiyo, umhlaumbi yintsimi; lowo upembileyo umlilo wobuyekeza ngenyaniso." 
Exodus22:7 Xeshekweni umntu anikela kummelwane wake imali, umhlaumbi impahla, ukuba igcinwe, ize ibi̔we endlwini yalomntu; ukuba liyafunyanwa isela, liya kubuyekeza ngokupindiweyo." 
Exodus22:8 Ukuba alifunyanwa isela, umnini walondlu uya kusondezwa kubagwebi, abuzwe ukuba akolulanga isandla sake ngakuyo impahla yommelwane wake kusinina." 
Exodus22:9 Pezu kwendawo zonke zokwona, pezu kwenkabi, pezu kweqwaṙashe, pezu kwegusha, pezu kwengubo, pezu kwako konke okulahlekileyo, atshoyo omnye ngako ukuba kokwake, indawo yabo bobabini yoza pambi kwabagwebi; ati lowo abagwebi baya kumgweba, abuyekeze ngokupindiweyo kummelwane wake." 
Exodus22:10 Xeshekweni umntu anikela kummelwane wake iqwaṙashe, umhlaumbi inkabi, umhlaumbi igusha, umhlaumbi esinye isilo, ukuba sigcinwe, size sife, umhlaumbi sapulwe, umhlaumbi sitinjwe, kungeko obonayo;" 
Exodus22:11 isifungo sikayehova soba pakati kwabo bobabini, sokuba akolulanga isandla sake ngakuyo impahla yommelwane wake; andule umniniso asamkele, angabuyekezi." 
Exodus22:12 Kanti ukuba sibi̔we kanye kuye, wobuyekeza kumniniso." 
Exodus22:13 Ukuba siqwengiwe kanye, makasizise sibe linqi̔na: akayi kubuyekezela okuqwengiweyo." 
Exodus22:14 Kanjalo xeshekweni umntu aboleka into kummelwane wake, ize yapulwe, umhlaumbi ife, umniniyo engeko nayo, wobuyekeza ngenyaniso." 
Exodus22:15 Ukuba umniniyo uko nayo, akayi kubuyekeza: ukuba iyinto eqeshiweyo, yeza ngenxa yomvuzo wayo." 
Exodus22:16 Nxa indoda ihendayo intombi engaxanyiweyo, ide ilale nayo, yosel’ iyilobolela ukuba ibe ngumfazi wayo." 
Exodus22:17 Ukuba uyise uyala kanye ukuyinika kuyo, yor̔ola imali njengekazi lentombi." 
Exodus22:18 Akuyi kuvuma isanusekazi sipile. 
Exodus22:19 Osukuba elala nesilo uya kufiswa ngenyaniso. 
Exodus22:20 Obingela otixo bambi, ngapandle kwake uyehova yedwa, wolahlelwa ekutshabalaleni." 
Exodus22:21 Akuyi kumkataza owasemzini, akuyi kumucinezela kanjako; ngokuba nibe ningabasemzini ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Exodus22:22 Aniyi kubandezela namnye umhlolokazi nenkedama. 
Exodus22:23 Ukuba uka ubabandezele, nokuba baka bakale kum, ndiya kukuva ngenyaniso ukukala kwabo;" 
Exodus22:24 yandule ivute ingqumbo yam, ndize ndinibulale nina ngesiṙele; bati abafazi benu babe ngabahlolokazi, nabantwana benu babe zinkedama." 
Exodus22:25 Ukuba uyaboleka omnye wabantu bam olihlwempu ngakuwe imali, akuyi kuba kuye njengomboleki obang’ inzuzo; akuyi kubeka pezu kwake inzuzo enkulu." 
Exodus22:26 Ukuba uka utabate ingubo yommelwane wako ibe ngumbambiso, woyibuyisela kuye lingekatshoni ilanga:" 
Exodus22:27 ngokuba yona isisigubungelo sake yodwa; iyingubo yake pezu kwentlonze yake: ebeya kulala nganto nina? kwakuya kuti, nxa akala kum, ndandule ukuva: ngokuba ndinofefe mna." 
Exodus22:28 Utixo akuyi kumtuka, nenkosi pezu kwabantu bako akuyi kuyiqalekisa." 
Exodus22:29 Ulibo lwenqolowa yako nolweveyine yako ungalibali ukunikela ngalo: owamazibulo konyana bako uya kumnika kum. 
Exodus22:30 Uya kwenje njalo ngenkomo zako na ngegusha zako; zoba nonina imihla ibe sixe̔nxe; ngomhla wesibozo uya kuzinika kum. 
Exodus22:31 Naniya kuba ngabantu abangcwele kum: kanjako inyama eqwengiweyo ezindle aniyi kuyidla; yona niya kuyiposa ezinjeni. 
Exodus23:1 Akuyi kutabata iṙeto elibuxoki: isandla sako ungasibekani nokohlakeleyo ukuba linqi̔na lobudlwengu. 
Exodus23:2 Akuyi kulandela abaninzi ng okwenza okubi; kanjalo akuyi kuteta elupikisweni ngokupambukela emva kwabaninzi ukutyekisa ugwebo: 
Exodus23:3 nolihlwempu akuyi kumbuka elupikisweni lwake. 
Exodus23:4 Nxa ufumanana nenkabi yotshaba lwako, umhlaumbi neqwaṙashe lalo lilahleka, wolibuyisela kulo ngenyaniso." 
Exodus23:5 Nxa ulibona iqwaṙashe lokutiyayo lilele ngapantsi kwomtwalo walo, uya kulandula ukumkululela na? wokulula ngenyaniso kunye naye." 
Exodus23:6 Akuyi kutyekisa ibango lehlwempu lako elupikisweni lwalo. 
Exodus23:7 Kwelela kude emcimbini wobuxoki; kanjalo ongenatyala nolungileyo ungababulali: ngokuba ndingayi kugwebela okohlakeleyo. 
Exodus23:8 Nebaso akuyi kulamkela; ngokuba ibaso limfamekisa abanokubona, lijikise amazwi abalungileyo." 
Exodus23:9 Nowasemzini akuyi kumncinezela; ngokuba nina niwazi umpefumlo wowasemzini, ekokubeni nibe ningabasemzini ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Exodus23:10 Yiminyaka mitandatu uya kuhlwayela umhlaba wako, ubute ukuvelisa kwawo;" 
Exodus23:11 kodwa ngowesixe̔nxe uya kuwupumza, uwuyeke; ukuba amahlwempu abantu bako adle, nokushiyiweyo ngawo zikudle izilo zasendle: uya kwenje njalo ngesitiya sako semiti yeveyine, na ngesitiya sako seminquma." 
Exodus23:12 Yimihla mitandatu uya kwenza umsebenzi wako, kodwa ngomhla wesixe̔nxe uya kupumla; ukuba kupumle inkabi yako neqwaṙashe lako, nokuba ati pefu unyana wesicakakazi sako, nowasemzini." 
Exodus23:13 Ngako konke endikutshilo kuni zilumkeleni: negama lotixo bambi ningalikankanyi; malingaviwa emlonyeni wako. 
Exodus23:14 Ngamaxesha matatu uya kundenzela umtendeleko emnyakeni mnye. 
Exodus23:15 Umtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele wowubamba: (wodla izonka ezingenagwele imihla ibe sixe̔nxe, njengokuba ndikuyalele, ngelimisiweyo ixesha lenyanga engu‐Abibe; ngokuba ngayo ubupuma e‐Jipete: kanjalo mabangabonakali pambi kwam bengenanto:)" 
Exodus23:16 nomtendeleko wokuvuna, wolibo lwokwemisebenzi yako, oko ukuhlwayeleyo entsimini: nomtendeleko wokubuta, ngasekupeleni kwomnyaka, nxa ubutileyo okwemisebenzi yako entsimini." 
Exodus23:17 Kwoba ngamaxesha matatu emnyakeni mnye onke amadoda ako aya kubonakala ebusweni benkosi uyehova. 
Exodus23:18 Akuyi kunikela igazi lombingo wam ndawonye n esonka esibiliswayo; kanjako inqata lombinge womtendeleko wam aliyi kuhlala kude kuse. 
Exodus23:19 Isiqalo selibo zomhlaba wako uya kusingenisa endlwini kayehova, utixo wako. Musa ukupeka itakane lebokwe elubisini lwonina." 
Exodus23:20 BONA ke, ndituma ingelosi pambi kwako, ukuya kukugcina endleleni nokukuzisa kulondawo endiyilungisileyo." 
Exodus23:21 Lumkela yona, ulive ilizwi layo, ungayicapukisi; ngokuba ingayi kuxolela izigqito zenu; ngokuba igama lam likuyo." 
Exodus23:22 Kodwa ukuba uya kukutala ukuliva ilizwi layo, wenze konke endikutetayo, ndiya kwandula ndibe lutshaba ezintshabeni zako, nomalane kubalane bako." 
Exodus23:23 Ngokuba ingelosi yam iya kuhamba ebusweni bako, ikungenise kuba‐Amori, nama‐Hete, nama‐Perizi, naba‐Kanane, n ama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi; ndandiya kubatshabalalisa." 
Exodus23:24 Musa ukutoba pambi kwotixo babo, ungabakonzi nokubakonza; kanjalo akuyi kwenza ngemisebenzi yabo: koko uya kubacita kanye, ugqibele ukuziqekeza izifanekiso zabo." 
Exodus23:25 Naniya kumkonza uyehova, utixo wenu, oya kutamsanqelisa isonka sako namanzi ako; ndandiya kususa isifo pakati kwenu." 
Exodus23:26 Akuyi kubako osisu sipumayo nodlolileyo ezweni lenu: inani lemihla yako ndolizalisa. 
Exodus23:27 Isoyikiso sam ndosituma pambi kwako, ndize ndipitizelise bonke abantu eniya kufika kubo; ndandiya kwenza zonke intshaba zako zikujikele umhlana." 
Exodus23:28 Kanjako ndiya kutuma onomeva pambi kwako, abaya kugxota ama‐Hivi, n aba‐Kanane, nama‐Hete, kwa sebusweni bako." 
Exodus23:29 Andiyi kubagxota pambi kwako emnyakeni mnye, hleze ilizwe libe bugxwayiba, namaṙamncwa asendle andiswe ngakuwe." 
Exodus23:30 Ngento encinane nangento encinane ndiya kubagxota ebusweni bako, ude ucume, ulifuye ilizwe." 
Exodus23:31 Ndandiya kubeka imida yako kwa selwandle olubomvu kude kube selwandle lwama‐Filistiya, nasentlango kude kube kuwo umlambo: ngokuba abemi belozwe ndiya kubanikela esandleni sako, uze ubagxote ebusweni bako." 
Exodus23:32 Akuyi kwenza ucebano kunye nabo, nakunye notixo babo." 
Exodus23:33 Abayi kuhlala elizweni lako, hleze bakwenze wone kum: ukuba uyakonza otixo babo, kwoba ngumgibe kuwe ngenyaniso." 
Exodus24:1 WAZA wati ku‐Mosesi: Nyukela kuyehova, wena no‐Arone, u‐Nadabi no‐Abihu, namashumi asixe̔nxe kubadala bo‐Sirayeli; nize nibedeshe nikude." 
Exodus24:2 Makasondele u‐Mosesi yedwa kuyehova; bona kanti mabangasondeli; nabantu mabangenyuki naye. 
Exodus24:3 Weza u‐Mosesi wabalisela abantu onke amazwi kayehova, nazo zonke izigwebo: baza bapendula bonke abantu ngelizwi linye, bati: Onke amazwi awatetileyo uyehova siya kuwenza." 
Exodus24:4 Waye u‐Mosesi waoa̔la onke amazwi kayehova, wavuka kwa kusasa, waka isibingelo ezantsi kwentaba, neshumi elinambini lentsika zamatye, njengezilishumi linazibini izizwe zo‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus24:5 Watuma amadodana aselusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, awanikelayo amadini okutshiswa, abingela uyehova nemibingo yoxolo ngenkatyana." 
Exodus24:6 Waza u‐Mosesi watabata esinye isiqingata segazi, walibeka ezityeni; n esinye isiqingata segazi, walitshiza pezu kwesibingelo." 
Exodus24:7 Watabata nencwadi yocebano, walesesha ezindlebeni zabantu; abati: Konke akutetileyo uyehova siya kukwenza, sive nokuva." 
Exodus24:8 Waza u‐Mosesi watabata igazi elo, walitshiza pezu kwabantu, wati: Nali igazi locebano uyehova alwenzileyo nani ngawo onke lamazwi." 
Exodus24:9 Bandula benyuka u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, u‐Nadabi no‐Abihu, namashumi asixe̔nxe kubadala bo‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus24:10 Baye bebona utixo wo‐Sirayeli: nangapantsi kwenyawo zake beku njengesetyenzwa lesafire ebengezelayo, nanjengesibili sezulu ngokukazimla." 
Exodus24:11 Koko engolulanga isandla sake ngakuwo amaduna osapo luka‐Sirayeli; kodwa abona utixo, adla asela nokusela." 
Exodus24:12 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Nyukela kum entabeni, ube kona apo; ndandiya kukunika amacwecwe amatye, nomteto, nemiyalelo endiyiba̔lileyo, ukuba bafundiswe." 
Exodus24:13 Wesuka ke u‐Mosesi, no‐Yoshuwa umkonzi wake; waza u‐Mosesi wenyukela entabeni katixo." 
Exodus24:14 Wayesiti kubadala: Silindeni apa, side sibuye size kuni: kanjalo naba u‐Arone no‐Hure benani; osukuba enendawo yokumangalela, makasondele kubo." 
Exodus24:15 Waza u‐Mosesi wenyukela entabeni, lati ilifu lagubungela intaba." 
Exodus24:16 Kanjalo ubungcwalisa bukayehova bahlala pezu kwentaba ye‐Sinai, nelifu layigubungela intsuku zantandatu; waza ngolwesixe̔nxe usuku wambiza u‐Mosesi kwa pakati kwelifu." 
Exodus24:17 (Kekaloku ukubonakala kwobungewalisa bukayehova kwakunjengomlilo odlayo, engcotsheni yentaba, emehlweni osapo luka‐Sirayeli.)" 
Exodus24:18 Wasuka u‐Mosesi wangena pakati kwelifu, wenyukela entabeni: waye u‐Mosesi wasentabeni imini zamashumi mane nobusuku bamashumi mane." 
Exodus25:1 WAZA uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi esiti: 
Exodus25:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba lunditabatele umnikelo: kubo bonke abantu abantliziyo zibaqu̔bayo, niya kuwamkela umnikelo wam." 
Exodus25:3 Nguwo lo umnikelo eniya kuwamkela kubo: igolide, nesilivere, nexina," 
Exodus25:4 nezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, neqiya eshiceneyo, n oboya bebokwe," 
Exodus25:5 nezintsu zenkunzi zegusha zenziwe bomvu, nezintsu zamacelesi, nemiti yeshitime;" 
Exodus25:6 ioli, ibe yeyesikanyiso; izimnandi, zibe zezeoli yokutambisa, nezesiqumiso esimnandi;" 
Exodus25:7 amatye eshohame, namatye okufakwa, aweyefodi nawembeka." 
Exodus25:8 Kanjalo mabandenzele indawo eyingcwele, ndize ndihlale pakati kwabo." 
Exodus25:9 Njengako konke ndikubonisa kona, njengawo umfanekiselo wetabanakele, nomfanekiselo wazo zonke impahla zayo, niya kuyenza kwa ngokunjalo." 
Exodus25:10 Babeya kuyenza ityeya ngemiti yeshitime: yoba zikubite zibe mbini nesiqingata sekubite ubude bayo, nekubite ibe nye nesiqingata sekubite ububanzi bayo, nekubite ibe nye nesiqingata sekubite ubupakamo bayo." 
Exodus25:11 Wauya kuyaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo, ngapakati nangapandle uya kuyaleka; uze wenze pezu kwayo isitsaba segolide ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus25:12 Woyityityishela yona imisesane yegolide ibe mine, uyibeke emagumbini ayo omane, ize ibeko imisesane mibini ngelinye icala layo, nemisesane ekwa mibini ngelinye icala layo." 
Exodus25:13 Wauya kuzenza izibonda ngemiti yeshitime, uzaleke ngegolide." 
Exodus25:14 Nezibonda ezo uya kuzingenisa kuyo imisesane esemacaleni etyeya, ize ityeya itwalwe ngazo." 
Exodus25:15 Zoba semisesaneni yetyeya ezozibonda; aziyi kususwa kuyo. 
Exodus25:16 Wauya kubeka etyeyeni isinqi̔no endiya kusinika kuwe. 
Exodus25:17 Kanjalo uya kusenza isihlalo sofefe ngegolide ecocekileyo: soba zikubite zibe mbini nesiqingata sekubite ubude baso, nekubite ibe nye nesiqingata sekubite ububanzi baso." 
Exodus25:18 Uya kuzenza nekerubime zibe mbini ngegolide; ngesetyenzwa elikandelweyo uya kuzenza, zipuma ezincameni zombini zesihlalo sofefe." 
Exodus25:19 Yenza ikerubime enye encameni yakweli icala, nekerubime enye encameni yakweliya icala; zipuma kuso isihlalo sofefe uya kuzenza ikerubime, ezincameni zaso zombini." 
Exodus25:20 Zoti ikerubime zitwabulule amapiko omabini ngapezulu, zisigubungela ngamapiko azo isihlalo sofefe; nobuso bazo obenye bobekana nobenye; boba ngakuso isihlalo sofefe ubuso bekerubime." 
Exodus25:21 Nesihlalo sofefe uya kusibeka pezulu pezu kwetyeya; nakuyo ityeya uya kubeka isinqi̔no endiya kusinika kuwe. 
Exodus25:22 Ndandiya kuhlangana nawe kona apo, nditete nawe ndipezu kwaso isihlalo sofefe, kwa pakati kwazo ikerubime zombini ezingapezu kwetyeya yesinqi̔no, ngako konke endokuyalezela kona elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus25:23 Kanjalo uya kuyenza itafile ngemiti yeshitime: yoba zikubite zibe mbini ubude bayo, nekubite ibe nye ububanzi bayo, nekubite ibe nye nesiqingata sekubite ubupakamo bayo." 
Exodus25:24 Wauya kuyaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo; uze uyenzele isitsaba segolide ngento engqongayo. 
Exodus25:25 Uya kuyenzela nodini, lungangobubanzi besandla, ngento engqongayo; uze wenzele udini lwayo isitsaba segolide ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus25:26 Wauya kuyenzela yona imisesane yegolide ibe mine, uyibeke imisesane emagumbini omane asezinyaweni zayo zone." 
Exodus25:27 Yoba malungana nodini imisesane leyo, ibe zindawo zezibonda zokuba kutwalwe itafile." 
Exodus25:28 Izibonda ezo uya kuzenza ngemiti yeshitime, uzaleke ngegolide, ize itafile itwalwe ngazo." 
Exodus25:29 Wauya kwenza izikotile zayo, nezitya zayo, nebekile zayo, nendebe zayo, ekuya kugalelwa ngazo: uya kuzenza ngegolide ecocekileyo." 
Exodus25:30 Napezu kwetafile leyo uya kubeka izonka zokubonakala ebusweni bam ngamaxesha onke. 
Exodus25:31 Kanjalo uya kuyenza ikandelare ngegolide ecocekileyo: ngesetyenzwa elikandelweyo iya kwenziwa lekandelare; isikondo sayo, nexokama layo, indetyana zayo, izikandana zayo, nentyatyambo zayo, zoba zezakuyo." 
Exodus25:32 Imbaxa ezintandatu ziya kupuma emacaleni ayo; kwopuma imbaxa ezintatu zekandelare kwelinye icala layo, nembaxa ezintatu zekandelare kwelinye icala layo." 
Exodus25:33 Indetyana ezintatu zifanisiwe nezamonde zoba kwenye imbaxa, kwa n esikandana nentyatyambo; nendetyana ezintatu zifanisiwe nezamonde zoba nakwenye imbaxa, kwa n esikandana nentyatyambo; zoba kwa njalo imbaxa zontandatu ezipuma ekandelareni." 
Exodus25:34 Nakuyo ikandelare kwobako indetyana ezine zifanisiwe nezamonde, kunye nezikandana zazo, nentyatyambo zazo." 
Exodus25:35 Kwobako esinye isikandana ngapantsi kwezimbini imbaxa zakuyo, n esinye isikandana ngapantsi kwezimbini imbaxa zakuyo, n esinye isikandana ngapantsi kwezimbini imbaxa zakuyo, njengazo imbaxa zontandatu ezipuma ekandelareni." 
Exodus25:36 Izikandana zazo nembaxa zazo zoba zezakuyo: loba linye isetyenzwa elikandelweyo legolide ecocekileyo lipela. 
Exodus25:37 Wauya kuyenzela izibane zibe sixe̔nxe; zaziya kumiswa izibane zayo, zize zikanyise ngapambi kwayo." 
Exodus25:38 Izicimo zayo, nezipatelo zayo, zoba yigolide ecocekileyo." 
Exodus25:39 Iya kwenziwa yona ngetalente yegolide ecocekileyo, kunye nazo zonke ezimpahla." 
Exodus25:40 Uze ulumke ukuba uzenze ngomfanekiselo wazo, obuwuboniswa entabeni." 
Exodus26:1 Kanjako itabanakele uya kuyenza ngeshumi lezikuselo zepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, nezuluṙa nesimnyama, nesibomvu; uya kuzenza zinekerubime, ngesetyenzwa lencibi yokuluka." 
Exodus26:2 Ubude baso isikuselo sinye boba zikubite zimashumi mabini anesibozo, nobubanzi baso isikuselo sinye boba zikubite zine; zonke ezizikuselo zoba nomlinganiswa mnye." 
Exodus26:3 Esinye isihlanu sezikuselo sobandakanyiswa esinye kwesinye; n esinye isihlanu sezikuselo sobandakanyiswa esinye kwesinye. 
Exodus26:4 Wauya kwenza amasango ezuluṙa ngasempetweni wesinye isikuselo, ngasencameni, esibandakanyelweni; uya kwenje njalo nasempetweni wapandle wesikuselo, ekubandakanyweni kwesesibini." 
Exodus26:5 Wowenza amasango abe ngamashumi mahlanu kwesinye isikuselo, namasango akwa ngamashumi mahlanu uya kuwenza encameni yesikuselo esisekubandakanyweni kwesesibini: lamasango olungelelana elinye nelinye." 
Exodus26:6 Wowenza namakonxo egolide abe ngamashumi mahlanu, uze ubandakanyise izikuselo, esinye kwesinye, ngamakonxo lawo, ize ibe yitabanakele inye." 
Exodus26:7 Kanjalo uya kuzenza izikuselo ngoboya bebokwe, zibe yintente pezu kwayo itabanakele: zizikuselo ezilishumi linasinye oya kuzenza." 
Exodus26:8 Ubude baso isikuselo sinye boba zikubite zimashumi matatu, nobubanzi baso isikuselo sinye boba zikubite zine: ezizikuselo zolishumi linasinye zoba nomlinganiswa mnye." 
Exodus26:9 Wauya kubandakanyisa izikuselo ezihlanu zizodwa, nezikuselo ezitandatu zizodwa nazo; nesesitandatu isikuselo wosipindisa ngasebusweni betabanakele." 
Exodus26:10 Wowenza namasango abe ngamashumi mahlanu ngasempetweni wesinye isikuselo, wesangapandle ekubandakanyweni, namasango akwa ngamashumi mahlanu ngasempetweni wesikuselo esibandakanyana nesesibini." 
Exodus26:11 Wowenza namakonxo exina abe ngamashumi mahlanu, uze ungenise amakonxo lawo emasangweni, uyibandakanyise intente, ibe inye." 
Exodus26:12 Neliva eliseleyo ezikuselweni zentente, isiqingata sesikuselo esiseleyo siya kulembelela pezu kwelasemva icala letabanakele." 
Exodus26:13 Yikubite ngelinye icala, nekubite kwa ngelinye, kokuseleyo ebudeni bezikuselo zentente, eya kulembelela pezu kwamacala ayo itabanakele, ngelinye icala nangelinye, ize igujungelwe." 
Exodus26:14 Kanjalo woyenzela intente isigubungelo ngezintsu zenkunzi zegusha zenziwe bomvu, nesigubungelo esinye ngapezulu ngezintsu zamacelesi." 
Exodus26:15 Kanjako woyenzela itabanakele iplanke ngemiti yeshitime, zipakama." 
Exodus26:16 Boba zikubite zilishumi ubude beplanke nye, nobubanzi bayo iplanke nye yoba yikubite nesiqingata sekubite." 
Exodus26:17 Iplanke nye yoba nezibambelo zizibini, zicwangcisiwe esinye silunge nesinye: uya kwenje njalo kuzo zonke iplanke zetabanakele." 
Exodus26:18 Wauya kuyenzela itabanakele iplanke, zibe mashumi mabini iplanke kwelasesuyide icala ngasesuyide."
