Exodus26:19 Wozenza neziseko zesilivere zingamashumi mane ngapantsi kwazo iplanke zomashumi mabini; zibe ziziseko ezibini ngapantsi kwenye iplanke kuzo izibambelo zayo zozibini, neziseko ezibini ngapantsi kwenye iplanke kuzo izibambelo zayo zozibini." 
Exodus26:20 Nakwelesibini icala letabanakele, kwelasenode icala, kwobako iplanke zimashumi mabini:" 
Exodus26:21 kwa neziseko zazo zesilivere ezimashumi mane; iziseko ezibini zingapantsi kwenye iplanke, neziseko ezibini zingapantsi kwenye iplanke." 
Exodus26:22 Necala lasemva letabanakele ngasentshonalanga wolenzela iplanke zibe ntandatu. 
Exodus26:23 Neplanke ezimbini uya kuzenzela amagumbi etabanakele, ecaleni lasemva." 
Exodus26:24 Zaziya kuhlanganiswa kunye ezantsi, kanjalo zohlanganiswa kunye napezulu, kuwo umsesane umnye: kwoba njalo ke kuzo zombini; zoba zezamagumbi omabini." 
Exodus26:25 Zoba ziplanke zisibozo, neziseko zazo zesilivere zoba ziziseko ezilishumi linesitandatu; iziseko ezibini zingapantsi kwenye iplanke, neziseko ezibini zingapantsi kwenye iplanke." 
Exodus26:26 Kanjako uya kuyenza imivalo ngemiti yeshitime; ibe mihlanu eziplankeni zelinye icala letabanakele," 
Exodus26:27 nemihlanu imivalo eziplankeni zelinye icala letabanakele, nemihlanu imivalo eziplankeni zecala letabanakele, zecala lasemva ngasentshonalanga." 
Exodus26:28 Nowapakati umvalo pakati kwazo iplanke, wona wodluliswa kwa kwenye incam kude kube kwenye incam." 
Exodus26:29 Neplanke ezo uya kuzaleka ngegolide, nemisesane yazo uya kuyenza ngegolide ibe zindawo zemivalo: kanjako uya kuyaleka imivalo ngegolide." 
Exodus26:30 Wauya kupakamisa itabanakele njengesimilo sayo obusiboniswa entabeni. 
Exodus26:31 Kanjalo uya kulenza ikuselo ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo; liya kwenziwa ngesetyenzwa lencibi yokuluka, linekerubime." 
Exodus26:32 Wauya kulixo̔ma pezu kwentsika zibe ne zemiti yeshitime, zalekiwe ngegolide; amagwegwe azo oba ngawegolide; zimi pezu kweziseko zesilivere zine." 
Exodus26:33 Wolixo̔ma ikuselo ezantsi kwamakonxo, uze ungenise kona pakati kwekuselo ityeya yesinqi̔no; elokuselo lonahlukanisela pakati kweyingcwele indawo neyingcwele yezingcwele." 
Exodus26:34 Wauya kubeka isihlalo sofefe pezu kwetyeya yesinqi̔no, kweyingcwele yezingcwele." 
Exodus26:35 Itafile woyimisa ibe ngapandle kwekuselo, nekandelare ibe malungana netafile ecaleni letabanakele ngasesuyide; kodwa itafile woyibeka ecaleni lasenode." 
Exodus26:36 Kanjalo uya kwenzela ucango lwentente ilengalenga, ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, isetyenzwa lomtungi wamabala ngamabala." 
Exodus26:37 Ilengalenga elo wolenzela intsika zibe ntlanu ngemiti yeshitime, uzaleke ngegolide; amagwegwe azo oba ngawegolide; wauya kuzityityishela iziseko zexina zibe zihlanu." 
Exodus27:1 Kanjako uya kusenza isibingelo ngemiti yeshitime, sizikubite ezintlanu ubude baso, nekubite ezintlanu ububanzi baso; soba namacala mane isibingelo eso; nobupakamo baso soba zikubite ezintatu." 
Exodus27:2 Impondo zaso uya kuzenza pezu kwamagumbi aso omane; zopuma kwa kuso impondo zaso; wauya kusaleka ngexina. 
Exodus27:3 Uya kuzenza nembiza zaso zokususa ututu lwaso, nezikotululo zaso, nezitya zaso zokufefela, neforoke zaso, nezipatamlilo zaso: zonke impahla zaso uya kuzenza ngexina." 
Exodus27:4 Wauya kusenzela iziko lesetyenzwa elilinqwanqwa ngexina; napezu kwalo inqwanqwa elo uya kuyenza imisesane emine yexina emancameni alo omane. 
Exodus27:5 Uze ulibeke ngapantsi kwesazinge sesibingelo ngasezantsi, ukuba inqwanqwa lifikele kwa pakati kwesibingelo." 
Exodus27:6 Uya kwenzela isibingelo nezibonda, izibonda zemiti yeshitime, uzaleke ngexina." 
Exodus27:7 Ziya kungeniswa izibonda zaso kuyo imisesane, ukuze izibonda ezo zibe semacaleni omabini esibingelo sakutwalwa." 
Exodus27:8 Siliholo ngeplanke uya kwenza sona: njengokuba ububoniswa entabeni, baya kwenje njalo." 
Exodus27:9 Kanjako wolenza ibala letabanakele: ngecala lasesuyide ngasesuyide, ibala loba namalengalenga epotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo; boba zikubite ezilikulu ubude becala linye." 
Exodus27:10 Intsika zalo ezimashumi mabini, neziseko zazo ezimashumi mabini, zoba zezexina; amagwegwe entsika nentonga zazo zoba zezesilivere." 
Exodus27:11 Kwa njalo ngecala lasenode, ebudeni, amalengalenga oba zikubite ezilikulu ubude bawo; intsika zalo ezimashumi mabini, neziseko zazo ezimashumi mabini, zoba zezexina; amagwegwe entsika nentonga zazo zoba zezesilivere." 
Exodus27:12 Nasebubanzini bebala, ngecala litshona ilanga, oba ngamalengalenga akubite zingamashumi mahlanu; intsika zawo zilishumi, neziseko zazo zikwa lishumi." 
Exodus27:13 Kwa njalo ububanzi bebala, ngecala lipuma ilanga ngasempumalanga, boba zikubite zingamashumi mahlanu." 
Exodus27:14 Amalengalenga elinye icala lesango oba zikubite zilishumi linesihlanu; intsika zawo zintatu, neziseko zazo zikwa zitatu." 
Exodus27:15 Nangelinye icala amalengalenga oba zikubite zilishumi linesihlanu; intsika zawo zintatu, neziseko zazo zikwa zitatu." 
Exodus27:16 Nesango lebala lona loba nelengalenga elikubite zingamashumi mabini, lezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, isetyenzwa lomtungi wamabala ngamabala; intsika zawo zine, nezizeko zazo zikwa zine." 
Exodus27:17 Zonke intsika ezingqongayo ibala zobandakanyiswa ngentonga zesilivere: amagwegwe azo oba ngawesilivere, kodwa iziseko zazo zoba zezexina." 
Exodus27:18 Ubude bebala boba zikubite ezilikulu, nobubanzi boba zezingamashumi mahlanu indawo zonke, nobupakamo boba zikubite ezintlanu zepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo; kodwa iziseko zazo zoba zezexina." 
Exodus27:19 Zonke impahla zetabanakele kuyo yonke inkonzo yayo, kwa zonke izikonkwane zayo, nazo zonke izikonkwane zebala, zoba zezexina." 
Exodus27:20 Kanjalo wena uya kuyalela usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba luyizise kuwe ioli engcwengileyo yamanquma anqushiweyo ibe yeyesikanyiso, kuze kumiswe izibane ngamaxesha onke." 
Exodus27:21 Kuyo intente yentlangano, ngapandle kwekuselo, elipambi kwesinqi̔no, baya kulungisa sona u‐Arone nonyana bake, kwa sekuhlweni kude kuse, ebusweni bukayehova: woba ngummiselwa ongunapakade kwizizukulwana zabo, ngenxa yosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus28:1 UZE usondeze kuwe u‐Arone umkuluwe wako, nonyana bake kunye naye, pakati kwalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba andikonze ngobuperisite; kwa u‐Arone, u‐Nadabi no‐Abihu, u‐Elezari no‐Yitamare, onyana baka‐Arone." 
Exodus28:2 Wauya kumenzela u‐Arone, umkuluwe wako, izivato ezingcwele, zibe zezobungcwalisa nezobuhle." 
Exodus28:3 Kanjalo uya kuteta kubo bonke abalumkileyo ngentliziyo, abo ndiwuzalisile umoya wabo ngobulumko, ukuba bazenze izivato zika‐Arone ukumngcwalisa, aze andikonze ngobuperisite." 
Exodus28:4 Zizo ezi izivato baya kuzenza: yimbeka, neyefodi, nengubo, nehempe epetiweyo, unkontsho noqwemesha; izivato ezingcwele bozenzela u‐Arone, umkuluwe wako, nonyana bake, ukuze andikonze ngobuperisite." 
Exodus28:5 Botabata igolide, nezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, neqiya eshiceneyo." 
Exodus28:6 Babeya kuyenza iyefodi ngegolide, ngezuluṙa nesimnyama, ngesibomvu nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, ngesetyenzwa lencibi yokuluka." 
Exodus28:7 Yoba nezibini iziziba zamagxalaba, zibandakanyiwe emancameni ayo omabini; yo wenzwa njalo ke ukubandakanyiswa." 
Exodus28:8 Nombinqo ocikiziweyo weyefodi yake, opezu kwayo, woba yinto yakuyo, njengesetyenzwa layo; ngegolide, ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo." 
Exodus28:9 Wauya kutabata amatye eshohame emabini, uwaqingqe pezu kwawo amagama onyana baka‐Sirayeli;" 
Exodus28:10 abe matandatu amagama abo pezu kwelinye ilitye, namagama amatandatu aseleyo pezu kwelinye ilitye, njengokuzalwa kwabo." 
Exodus28:11 Ngesetyenzwa lomqingqi wamatye, njeng eziqingqwa zaso isincamatiselo, wowaqingqa lamatye omabini, enamagama onyana baka‐Sirayeli: uya kuwenza evingcelwe ezigingqini zegolide." 
Exodus28:12 Woti lamatye omabini uwabeke pezu kwezamagxalaba iziziba zeyefodi, abe ngamatye okukumbuza elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli; waye u‐Arone eya kutwala amagama abo ebusweni bukayehova, pezu kwawo amagxalaba ake omabini, abe yinkumbuzo." 
Exodus28:13 Wauya kuzenza izigingqi zegolide; 
Exodus28:14 nemixokolelwane emibini yegolide ecocekileyo; ijijanisiwe uya kuyenza, njeng esetyenzwa elitsontelweyo; nalemixokolelwane etsontelweyo woyikonxa kuzo izigingqi." 
Exodus28:15 Kanjako uya kuyenza imbeka yokugweba ngesetyenzwa lencibi yokuluka; njengesetyenzwa leyefodi uya kuyenza; ngegolide, ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, uya kuyenza yona." 
Exodus28:16 Yoba namacala mane, ipindiwe; yoba sisoluko sesandla ubude bayo, nesoluko sesandla ububanzi bayo." 
Exodus28:17 Wauya kufaka kuyo imfakwa zamatye, kwa inṙozo zine zamatye: olunye uṙozo lwoba yirubi, ne topaze, nekabunukele: lulo olu uṙozo lwokuqala." 
Exodus28:18 Olwesibini uṙozo lwoba yisamagide, n esafire, neyahalome." 
Exodus28:19 Olwesitatu uṙozo lwoba yiyasinte, n eyagate, neyametisite." 
Exodus28:20 Olwesine uṙozo lwoba yikrusolite, nesadonutse, nejasipidi: oqiniswa ngegolide ezimfakweni zawo." 
Exodus28:21 Amatye la oba njengamagama onyana baka‐Sirayeli, elishumi linamabini, njengawo amagama abo, njeng eziqingqwa zaso isincamatiselo; elinye ngelinye linegama lalo, oba ngawezizwe ezilishumi linazibini." 
Exodus28:22 Wauya kuyenza pezu kwembeka imixokolelwane ejijanisiweyo, njeng esetyenzwa elitsontelweyo, ngegolide ecocekileyo." 
Exodus28:23 Uya kuyenza kanjalo pezu kwembeka imisesane yegolide ibi mibini: wauya kubeka lemisesane mibini pezu kwazo incam ezimbini zembeka. 
Exodus28:24 Uze uyifake lomibini imixokolelwane etsontelweyo yegolide kuleyomisesane mibini esezincameni zembeka. 
Exodus28:25 Kodwa ezinye incam ezimbini emixokolelwane mibini etsontelweyo wozikonxa kuzo izigingqi zibini; uze ubeke zona pezu kweziziba zamagxalaba zeyefodi empambili wayo. 
Exodus28:26 Wobuya uyenze imisesane mibini yegolide, uyimise ezincameni ezimbini zembeka, empetweni wayo osecaleni leyefodi ngapakati." 
Exodus28:27 Ne minye imisesane mibini yegolide uya kuyenza, ubeke yona pezu kweziziba zamagxalaba zozibini zeyefodi ngasezantsi, ngasempambili wayo, malungana nokubandakanywa kwayo, ngapezulu kwombinqo ocikiziweyo weyefodi." 
Exodus28:28 Babeya kuyinxibelela imbeka ngemisesane yayo kuyo imisesane yeyefodi ngosinga lwezuluṙa, ukuba ibe pezulu kwawo umbinqo ocikiziweyo weyefodi, nokuba imbeka ingashenxeki kuyo iyefodi." 
Exodus28:29 Waye u‐Arone eya kutwala amagama onyana baka‐Sirayeli embekeni yokugweba, pezu kwentliziyo yake, akungena kweyingcwele indawo, abe yinkumbuzo pambi kwoyehova futi." 
Exodus28:30 Uya kubeka kanjalo embekeni yokugweba i‐Urime ne‐Tumime, zize zibe pezu kwentliziyo ka‐Arone, akungena ebusweni bukayehova; woti u‐Arone amane akutwale okwokugweba kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli pezu kwentliziyo yake pambi kwoyehova futi." 
Exodus28:31 Kanjako ingubo yaseyefodini uya kuyenza ipela ngezuluṙa. 
Exodus28:32 Kwobako intunja yayo yentloko pakati kwayo; yoti l entunja yayo ibe nompeto wesetyenzwa lomluki ngento engqongayo; njengentunja yesigcinisifuba yoba nawo, ize ingaṙazuki." 
Exodus28:33 Wauya kuzenza pezu kwemiqukumbelo yayo igranate zezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, kwa pezu kwemiqukumbelo yayo ngento engqongayo; nezikencezelo zegolide pakati kwazo ngento engqongayo:" 
Exodus28:34 sibe sisikencezelo segolide negranate, sibe sisikencezelo segolide negranate, pezu kwemiqukumbelo yengubo leyo ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus28:35 Yoba pezu kwake u‐Arone ekukonzeni; ize ivakale intlokoma yayo, nxa angena kweyingcwele indawo ebusweni bukayehova, nanxa apumayo, ukuba angafi." 
Exodus28:36 Kanjalo uya kuyenza imbasa ngegolide ecocekileyo, uqingqe pezu kwayo, njeng eziqingqwa zesincamatiselo, ukuti: ubungcwele kuyehova!" 
Exodus28:37 Uya kubopa yona ngosinga lwezuluṙa, ibe pezu kwalo unkontsho; yoba kwelapambili icala lonkontsho." 
Exodus28:38 Yoba pezu kwebunzi lika‐Arone, ukuba u‐Arone abutwale ubono bezinto ezingcwele, ezo usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwozingcwalisa kuzo zonke izipo zalo ezingcwele; yomana ibako pezu kwebunzi lake ngamaxesha onke, ukuze lukoleke ebusweni bukayehova." 
Exodus28:39 Kanjako uya kuluka ihempe ngeqiya eshiceneyo; nonkontsho uya kulwenza ngeqiya eshiceneyo; noqwemesha uya kulwenza ngesetyenzwa lomtungi wamabala ngamabala. 
Exodus28:40 Nonyana baka‐Arone uya kwenzela bona ihempe, ubenzele nengqwemesha; neminqwazi uya kuyenzela bona, ibe yeyobungcwalisa neyobuhle." 
Exodus28:41 Wauya kwambatisa u‐Arone umkuluwe wako ezo nto, kwa nonyana bake kunye naye; uze ubatambise, uzalise izandla zabo, ubangcwalise nokubangcwalisa, ukuba bandikonze ngobuperisite." 
Exodus28:42 Uya kubenzela nebrukwe zeqiya, kugujungelwe ubuzé babo; zoba zivela esinqeni kude kube kuwo amatanga." 
Exodus28:43 Zoba pezu kwo‐Arone, napezu kwonyana bake, ekungeneni kwabo ententeni yentlangano, nasekusondeleni kwabo esibingelweni ukukonza kweyingcwele indawo; baze bangatwali ubono, bafe ke: woba ngummiselwa ongunapakade lo, kwa kuye, nakwinzalo yake emva kwake." 
Exodus29:1 Yiyo lento uya kuyenza kubo ukubangcwalisa, ukuba bandikonze ngobuperisite: Tabata inkunzana ibe nye elitole lenkomo, nenkunzi zegusha zibe mbini ezimsulwa," 
Exodus29:2 nesonka esingenagwele, nezonkana ezingenagwele zinyeliwe ngeoli, nezonkanyana ezingenagwele zitanjisiwe ngeoli: uya kuzenza ngomgubo ocolekileyo wenqolowa." 
Exodus29:3 Wauya kuzibeka esityeni sinye, uzisondeze zisesityeni, kwa nenkunzana yenkomo, nenkunzi zegusha zombini." 
Exodus29:4 Uze ubasondeze u‐Arone nonyana bake elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, ubahlambe ngamanzi." 
Exodus29:5 Wauya kutabata izivato, wambatise u‐Arone ihempe; nengubo yaseyefodini, neyefodi, nembeka; uze umbinqise umbinqo ocikiziweyo weyefodi." 
Exodus29:6 Kanjalo uya kubeka unkontsho entloko yake, nekrone engcwele uya kuyibeka pezu kwalo unkontsho." 
Exodus29:7 Wandule utabate ioli yokutambisa, uyigalele pezu kwentloko yake, umtambise." 
Exodus29:8 Nonyana bake uya kubasondeza, ubavatise ihempe." 
Exodus29:9 Uya kubabinqisa imibinqo, kwa u‐Arone nonyana bake, uyibope kubo iminqwazi; baze babe nabo ubuperisite ngommiselwa ongunapakade: wauya kuzalisa isandla sika‐Arone nesandla sonyana bake." 
Exodus29:10 Uze uyisondeze inkunzana ngapambi kwentente yentlangano; bati u‐Arone nonyana bake balalise izandla zabo pezu kwentloko yenkunzana. 
Exodus29:11 Wandule uyixe̔le inkunzana pambi kwoyehova, ngaselucangweni lwentente yentlangano." 
Exodus29:12 Uze ucapule egazini lenkunzana, ulibeke ezimpondweni zesibingelo ngomnwe wako; nalo lonke elinye igazi uya kuligalela ngasesekweni lesibingelo." 
Exodus29:13 Wauya kutabata lonke inqata eligubungela umbilini, nendawo ezizengezelayo pezu kwesibindi, nezintso zombini, nenqata elipezu kwazo, uzitshise esibingelweni." 
Exodus29:14 Kodwa inyama yenkunzana, nesikumba sayo, nomswane wayo, uya kuzitshisa ngomlilo ngapandle kwomnquba: lidini lesono yona." 
Exodus29:15 Kanjalo uya kutabata enye inkunzi yegusha; boti ke u‐Arone nonyana bake balalise izandla zabo pezu kwentloko yenkunzi yegusha. 
Exodus29:16 Wandule uyixe̔le inkunzi yegusha, ulitabate igazi layo, ulisasaze pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus29:17 Lenkunzi yegusha uya kuyicanda ezitweni zayo, uhlambe umbilini wayo, nentungo zayo, uzibeke pezu kwezito zayo napezu kwentloko yayo." 
Exodus29:18 Uze uyitshise inkunzi yegusha ipela pezu kwesibingelo: lidini lokutshiswa yona kuyehova; livumba elimnandi, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Exodus29:19 Wobuya uyitabate eyesibini inkunzi yegusha; boti ke u‐Arone nonyana bake balalise izandla zabo pezu kwentloko yenkunzi yegusha. 
Exodus29:20 Wandule uyixe̔le inkunzi yegusha, ucapule egazini layo, ulibeke pezu kwesitinzi seyokunene indlebe ka‐Arone, napezu kwesitinzi seyokunene indlebe yonyana bake, napezu kwesitupa sesokunene isandla sabo, napezu kwobontsi wolwokunene unyawo lwabo, ulisasaze igazi pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus29:21 Uze ucapule kulo igazi elipezu kwesibingelo, nakuyo ioli yokutambisa, uti fefe pezu kwo‐Arone, napezu kwezivato zake, napezu kwonyana bake, napezu kwezivato zonyana bake kunye naye; aze enzwe ngcwele yena, nezivato zake, nonyana bake, nezivato zonyana bake kunye naye." 
Exodus29:22 Wauya kutabata kuyo inkunzi yegusha inqata nomsila, nenqata eligubungela umbilini, nendawo ezizengezelayo zesibindi, nezintso zombini, nenqata elipezu kwazo, nowokunene umkono; ngokuba yona yinkunzi yegusha yedini lokuzalisa:" 
Exodus29:23 kwa nesimba linye lesonka, nesonkana sinye sesonka esineoli, nesonkanyana sinye sivela esityeni sezonka ezingenagwele, esipambi kwoyehova:" 
Exodus29:24 uze uzibeke zonke ezandleni zika‐Arone, nasezandleni zonyana bake; uti kanjalo uzishukushukumise zibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa pambi kwoyehova." 
Exodus29:25 Wandule uzitabate ezandleni zabo, uzitshise esibingelweni, pezu kwedini lokutshiswa, zibe livumba elimnandi pambi kwoyehova: ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Exodus29:26 Kanjalo uya kutabata isifuba senkunzi yegusha yedini lokuzalisa elilelika‐Arone, usishukushukumise sibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa pambi kwoyehova: soba sisabelwa sako sona." 
Exodus29:27 Wauya kungcwalisa isifuba somnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa, nomkono womnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa, oko kushukushukunyiswayo, noko kufunqufunqulwayo, kwinkunzi yegusha yedini lokuzalisa, kwa kokukokuka‐Arone, nakokukokwonyana bake:" 
Exodus29:28 kwoba kokuka‐Arone nokwonyana bake ngommiselwa ongunapakade, kuvela elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli; ngokuba ngumnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa: woba ngumnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa uvela elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, kwimibingo yoxolo yalo, kwa ngumnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa walo kuyehova." 
Exodus29:29 Nengubo ezingcwele ezizezika‐Arone zona ziya kuba zezonyana bake emva kwake, ukuba kutanjiswe kuzo, nokuba kuzaliswe izandla zabo kuzo." 
Exodus29:30 Wozambata imihla ibe sixe̔nxe ong umperisite esikundleni sake konyana bake, lowo ongenayo ententeni yentlangano ukuya kukonza kweyingcwele indawo." 
Exodus29:31 Nenkunzi yegusha yedini lokuzalisa woyitabata, uyipeke inyama yayo endaweni eyingcwele." 
Exodus29:32 Boti ke u‐Arone nonyana bake badle inyama yenkunzi yegusha, nesonka esisesityeni, ngaselucangweni lwentente yentlangano." 
Exodus29:33 Babeya kuzidla ezozinto kube kuxoliswa ngazo, ukuba kuzaliswe izandla zabo, n okuba bangcwaliswe; kodwa owasemzini akayi kuzidla, ngokuba zingcwele." 
Exodus29:34 Kanjalo ukuba kuya kusala into yenyama yedini lokuzalisa, nento yesonka, kude kuse, uya kwandula usitshise isisalela ngomlilo; asiyi kudliwa, ngokuba singcwele." 
Exodus29:35 Uya kwenje njalo ke ku‐Arone, nakonyana bake, kwa njengoko ndikuyalele ngako: kwoba yimihla isixe̔nxe uya kuzalisa izandla zabo." 
Exodus29:36 Wauya kunikela imihla ngemihla inkunzana yedini lesono, ngenxa yokuxolisa; uya kusihlanza isibingelo ngokusixolisela kwako: wositambisa kanjalo, ukuba singcwaliswe." 
Exodus29:37 Kwoba yimihla isixe̔nxe uya kuxolisela isibingelo, usingcwalise; soba sisibingelo esingcwelekazi: konke okucukumisayo isibingelo kwoba kungcwele." 
Exodus29:38 Kuko oku uya kunikela ngako pezu kwaso isibingelo: imvana zomnyaka mnye zibe mbini, imihla ngemihla futi." 
Exodus29:39 Enye imvana woyinikela ngokusa; neyesibini imvana woyinikela pakati kwokuhlwa. 
Exodus29:40 Nakunye nenye imvana uya kunikela eseshumi isiqingata seyeja yomgubo ocolekileyo, unyeliwe ngeoli enqushelweyo esisiqingata sesine sehine, nomnikelo wokusela usisiqingata sesine sehine yeveyine." 
Exodus29:41 Neyesibini imvana woyinikela pakati kwokuhlwa; wauya kwenzela yona njengomnikelo wokudla wokusa, nanjengomnikelo wokusela wawo, libe livumba elimnandi, kwa umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Exodus29:42 Loba lelifuti idini lokutshiswa ngezizukulwana zenu, elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, pambi kwoyehova: apo ndiya kuhlangana nani kona, ukuba nditete kuni kona." 
Exodus29:43 Kwa lapo ndohlangana nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ize yenziwe ngcwele ngobungcwalisa bam." 
Exodus29:44 Ndandiya kungcwalisa intente yentlangano, nesibingelo; kanjalo u‐Arone nonyana bake ndiya kubangcwalisa, ukuba bandikonze ngobuperisite." 
Exodus29:45 Ndandiya kuhlala pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ndize ndibe ngutixo walo." 
Exodus29:46 Luya kwandula lukwazi okokuba ndi nguyehova, utixo walo, olukupileyo elizweni le‐Jipete, ukuba ndihlale pakati kwalo: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo walo." 
Exodus30:1 KANJAKO uya kusenza isibingelo sokuqunyiselwa kwesiqumiso; uya kusenza ngemiti yeshitime. 
Exodus30:2 Soba yikubite nye ubude baso, nekubite nye ububanzi baso; soba namacala mane; nobupakamo baso soba zikubite zimbini: zopuma kwa kuso impondo zaso." 
Exodus30:3 Wauya kusaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo, ingcopo yaso namacala aso ngento engqongayo, kwa nempondo zaso; uya kusenzela nesitsaba segolide ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus30:4 Kanjalo uya kusenzela imisesane mibini yegolide ngapantsi kwesitsaba saso, emagumbini aso omabini; uya kuyenza pezu kwamacala aso omabini: yoba zindawo zezibonda zokuba sitwalwe ngazo." 
Exodus30:5 Izibonda zaso uya kuzenza ngemiti yeshitime, uze uzaleke ngegolide." 
Exodus30:6 Wauya kusibeka pambi kwekuselo elingakuyo ityeya yesinqi̔no, pambi kwesihlalo sofefe esipezu kwesinqi̔no, apo ndiya kuhlangana nawe kona." 
Exodus30:7 Woti u‐Arone aqumise pezu kwaso isiqumiso esimnandi; imiso ngemiso, akulungisa izibane, uya kusiqumisa." 
Exodus30:8 Naxeshekweni u‐Arone aya kumisa izibane pakati kwokuhlwa, wosiqumisa, sibe sisiqumiso esifuti pambi kwoyehova ngezizukulwana zenu." 
Exodus30:9 Aniyi kunikela pezu kwaso isiqumiso esisimbi, nedini lokutshiswa, nomnikelo wokutya; aniyi kugalela pezu kwaso umnikelo wokusela kanjalo." 
Exodus30:10 Waye u‐Arone eya kulwenza uxoliso pezu kwempondo zaso kube kanye emnyakeni mnye, ngegazi ledini lesono lokuxolisa; kwoba kanye emnyakeni mnye aya kulwenza uxoliso pezu kwaso ngezizukulwana zenu: yingcwelekazi ke kuyehova." 
Exodus30:11 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus30:12 Xeshekweni utabatayo inani labalusapo luka‐Sirayeli ngokubalwa kwabo, baya kwandula banike abanye ngabanye isizi semipefumlo yabo kuye uyehova, nxa ubabalayo; ukuze kungabiko pakati kwabo isibulalo, nxa ubabalayo." 
Exodus30:13 Oku bokunika, bonke abagqitela kwababalweyo, isiqingata seshekele, engangayo ishekele yeyingcwele indawo; (zigera ezimashumi mabini ishekele leyo;) isiqingata seshekele soba ngumnikelo kuyehova." 
Exodus30:14 Bonke abagqitela kwababalweyo, bengabaminyaka ingamashumi mabini nabapezulu, ubudala babo, bonika umnikelo kuyehova." 
Exodus30:15 Osityebi akayi kwandisa, nolihlwempu akayi kuncipisa isiqingata seshekele, ukunika umnikelo kuyehova, ukuba kwenzelwe imipefumlo yenu uxoliso." 
Exodus30:16 Wauya kutabata imali yokuxolisa kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, uyinike ngenxa yenkonzo yentente yentlangano; ukuze ibe yinkumbuzo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli pambi kwoyehova, ukuba kwenzelwe imipefumlo yenu uxoliso." 
Exodus30:17 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus30:18 Uya kwenza nesihlambelo ngexina, nesikondo saso ngexina kanjalo, kuze kuhlanjwe: wauya kusibeka pakati kwentente yentlangano nesibingelo, uwafake kona amanzi." 
Exodus30:19 Ngokuba u‐Arone nonyana bake beya kuhlamba kwa kuso izandla zabo nenyawo zabo: 
Exodus30:20 xeshekweni bangena ententeni yentlangano, baya kuhlamba ngamanzi, ukuba bangafi: naxeshekweni basondela esibingelweni ukukonza, ukuza kutshisa umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova;" 
Exodus30:21 baya kwandula bahlambe izandla zabo nenyawo zabo, ukuba bangafi: oku kwoba ngummiselwa ongunapakade kubo, kwa kuye nakwinzalo yake ngezizukulwana zabo." 
Exodus30:22 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus30:23 Uzitabatele wena izimnandi ezidumileyo, imore engcwengileyo ibe zishekele zimakulu mahlanu, nekinamone emnandi ibe sisiqingata selonani, kwa ishekele zimakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu, nekalame emnandi ibe zishekele zimakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu," 
Exodus30:24 nekasiya ibe zishekele zimakulu mahlanu, ezingangayo ishekele yeyingcwele indawo, neoli yamanquma ibe yihine nye;" 
Exodus30:25 uze wenze ngazo ioli yesitambiso esingcwele, amafuta amnandi amanyiweyo ngobuncibi bomenzi wezinukamnandi: yoba yioli yesitambiso esingcwele." 
Exodus30:26 Wauya kuti ngayo utambise intente yentlangano, netyeya yesinqi̔no;" 
Exodus30:27 netafile, nazo zonke impahla zayo; nekandelare, nempahla zayo; nesibingelo sokuqumisa;" 
Exodus30:28 nesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa, nazo zonke impahla zaso; nesihlambelo, nesikondo saso." 
Exodus30:29 Wauya kuzingcwalisa, ukuze zibe yingcwelekazi: konke okuzicukumisayo kwoba kungcwele." 
Exodus30:30 Kanjalo u‐Arone nonyana bake uya kubatambisa, ubangcwalise bona ukuba bandikonze ngobuperisite." 
Exodus30:31 Nakulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli uya kuteta ngokuti: Le yoba yioli yesitambiso esingcwele kum ngezizukulwana zenu. 
Exodus30:32 Ayiyi kugalelwa pezu kwenyama yomntu; kanjako aniyi kuyenza efana nayo, ngokulinganiswa kwayo: ingcwele yona, yoba ngcwele kuni." 
Exodus30:33 Osukuba eyimanya efana nayo, nosukuba ebeka kuyo pezu kwowasemzini, yena uya kunqanyulwa ebantwini bake." 
Exodus30:34 Wati uyehova kanjako ku‐Mosesi: Zitabatele izimnandi, isitakite, neyonika, negabano, ezi zimnandi nentlakamhlope engcwengileyo: enye yolingana nenye." 
Exodus30:35 Wauya kwenza ngazo isiqumiso, into emanyiweyo ngobuncibi bomenzi wezinukamnandi, imvumvuzelwe ngetyuwa, icocekile, ingcwele." 
Exodus30:36 Woti inxenye yaso uyityumze icoleke, ubeke kuyo pambi kwesinqi̔no ententeni yentlangano, apo ndiya kuhlangana nawe kona: yoba yingcwelekazi kuni." 
Exodus30:37 Nesisiqumiso oya kusenza, aniyi kuzenzela nina ngokulinganiswa kwaso: soba yingcwele kuwe ngenxa kayehova." 
Exodus30:38 Osukuba eya kusenza esifana naso, ukuze sisezelwe, lowo uya kunqanyulwa ebantwini bake." 
Exodus31:1 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus31:2 Uyabona ke, sendimbizile ngegama u‐Betsalele, unyana ka‐Uri, unyana ka‐Hure, owesizwe sika‐Juda." 
Exodus31:3 Yena ndimzalisile ngomoya katixo, ngobulumko, nangengqondo, nangokwazi, nangentlobo zonke zomsebenzi;" 
Exodus31:4 ukuze aqinge amasetyenzwa obuncibi, enze ngegolide, nangesilivere, nangexina," 
Exodus31:5 nangokuqingqa amatye, okuba kufakwe, nangokuqingqa imiti, yokuba kwenziwe ngentlobo zonke zomsebenzi." 
Exodus31:6 Kanjalo mna, bona ke, ndinikile kunye naye u‐Aholiyabi, unyana ka‐Ahisamaki, owesizwe sika‐Dane: nasezintliziyweni zabo bonke abantliziyo zilumkile ndibekile ubulumko, ukuba bakwenze konke endikuyalele ngako:" 
Exodus31:7 intente yentlangano, netyeya yesinqi̔no, nesihlalo sofefe esipezu kwayo, nazo zonke impahla zentente;" 
Exodus31:8 netafile, nempahla zayo: nekandelare ecocekileyo, nazo zonke impahla zayo; nesibingelo sokuqumisa:" 
Exodus31:9 nesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa, nazo zonke impahla zaso; nesihlambelo, nesikondo saso;" 
Exodus31:10 nezivato zobukonzo: kwa izivato ezingcwele zika‐Arone umperisite, nezivato zonyana bake, zokuba kukonzwe ngobuperisite:" 
Exodus31:11 neoli yokutambisa; nesiqumiso esimnandi sakweyingcwele indawo: njengako konke ndikuyalele ngako baya kwenza. 
Exodus31:12 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus31:13 Wena kanjalo teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Okwenene isabata zam niya kuzigcina; ngokuba oku kungumqondiso pakati kwam nani ngezizukulwana zenu; kuze kwaziwe ukuba ndi nguyehova oningcwalisayo." 
Exodus31:14 Ngako niya kugcina isabata; ngokuba ingcwele kuni: oyinco̔lisayo uya kufiswa ngenyaniso; ngokuba osukuba ewenza ngayo umsebenzi, umpefumlo lowo uya kunqanyulwa ebantwini bawo." 
Exodus31:15 Yimihla mitandatu ekuya kwenziwa umsebenzi; koko ngomhla wesixe̔nxe kuko isabata yopumlo, ibungcwele kuyehova: osukuba ewenza umsebenzi ngomhla wesabata, uya kufiswa ngenyaniso." 
Exodus31:16 Ngako usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwoyigcina isabata, ukuyibamba isabata ngezizukulwana zalo ngocebano olungunapakade." 
Exodus31:17 Ingumqondiso yona pakati kwam nosapo luka‐Sirayeli kude kube ngunapakade; ngokuba ngemihla mitandatu wenza uyehova izulu nomhlaba, waza wapumla ngomhla wesixe̔nxe, womelezwa." 
Exodus31:18 Wandula wanika ku‐Mosesi, akuba egqibile ukuteta naye entabeni ye‐Sinai, amabini amacwecwe esinqi̔no, amacwecwe amatye, eba̔lelwe ngomnwe katixo." 
Exodus32:1 KEKALOKU abantu bakubona ukuba u‐Mosesi uyalibala ukuhla entabeni, baza abantu bahlanganisana ngaku‐Arone, bati kuye: Suka, usenzele otixo, abaya kuhamba pambi kwetu; ngokuba u‐Mosesi lowo, londoda eyasinyusayo ezweni le‐Jipete, singamazi ukuba uhliwe yinto nina." 
Exodus32:2 Wati u‐Arone kubo: Kumlani amacici egolide asezindlebeni zabafazi benu, na kwezonyana benu, nakwezentombi zenu, niwazise kum." 
Exodus32:3 Baza bonke abantu bawakumla amacici egolide abesezindlebeni zabo, bawazisa ku‐Arone." 
Exodus32:4 Wayamkela ke esandleni sabo, wayiyila ngento yokuqoqa, wayenza itole elityityishiweyo. Baza bati: Aba bangotixo bako, Sirayeli! abakunyusileyo ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Exodus32:5 Wati u‐Arone akulibona, waka isibingelo ebusweni balo; waza wadanduluka u‐Arone, wati: Ngomso kuya kubako umtendeleko kuyehova." 
Exodus32:6 Baza bavuka kusasa ngomnye umhla, banikela amadini okutshiswa, basondeza neminikelo yoxolo; bahlala pantsi ke abantu badle basele nokusela, bandula ukusuka badlale." 
Exodus32:7 Wada wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, ngokuti: Hamba, uhle; ngokuba abantu bako, abo ububanyusa elizweni le‐Jipete, sebezonakalisile:" 
Exodus32:8 bapambukile kamsinya endleleni endibe ndibayalele yona; bazenzele itole elityityishiweyo, bazitobile pambi kwalo, balibingele, bati: Aba bangotixo bako, Sirayeli! abakunyusileyo ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Exodus32:9 Wati kanjako uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Ndibabonile abantu aba; kekaloku, bona ke, bangabantu abantamo ilukuni." 
Exodus32:10 Ngako kaloku ndiyeke, uze umsindo wam uvute ngakubo, ndide ndibagqibele: ndandiya kwenza wena ube sisizwe esikulu." 
Exodus32:11 Kodwa u‐Mosesi wambongoza uyehova, utixo wake, wati: Kunganina, Yehova! ukuba kuvute umsindo wako ngasebantwini bako, obakupileyo ezweni le‐Jipete, ngamandla amakulu, nangesandla esomeleleyo?" 
Exodus32:12 Kunganina ukuba ama‐Jipete atsho ukuti: Kungenxa yobubi abakupileyo, ukuba ababulale ezintabeni, nokuba abagqibele ebusweni bomhlaba? Buya ebushushwini bengqumbo yako, ube nosizi pezu kwobububi ngakubo abantu bako." 
Exodus32:13 Kumbula ngo‐Abrahame, ngo‐Yisake, nango‐Sirayeli, izicaka zako, owabubafungela ngokwako, wateta kubo ngokuti: Ndiya kwandisa inzalo yenu ibe njengenkwenkwezi zezulu, nalo lonke elilizwe enditetile ngalo, ndolinika kwinzalo yenu, ize ilidle ilifa lalo kude kube ngunapakade." 
Exodus32:14 Waza wanosizi uyehova pezu kwobububi wabete uya kubenza ebantwini bake. 
Exodus32:15 Wajika u‐Mosesi wehla entabeni, enawo amacwecwe amabini esinqi̔no esandleni sake; bekuba̔liwe emacwecweni ngamacala omabini; kwaba̔lwa kuwo ngelinye icala nangelinye." 
Exodus32:16 Lamacwecwe ebengumsebenzi katixo, nokuba̔la kwakukuba̔la kukatixo, kuqoqiwe emacwecweni." 
Exodus32:17 Xeshekweni u‐Yoshuwa weva ingxokozelo yabantu ekumemezeni kwabo, wati ku‐Mosesi: Kuko ingxokozelo yokulwa emnqubeni." 
Exodus32:18 Koko wati: Asi lilo ilizwi lesidanduluko sokweyisa, asi lilo nelizwi lesikalo sokucitwa; lilizwi lokucula endilivayo mna." 
Exodus32:19 Kwaza kwati, akusondela emnqubeni, wabona itole elo, nokududa; yandul’ ukuvuta ingqumbo ka‐Mosesi, owalahla amacwecwe ezandleni zake, wawaqekeza ezantzi kwentaba." 
Exodus32:20 Watabata netole ababelenzile, walitshisa emlilweni, walisila lada lacoleka, walivutululela emanzini, waza waseza usapo luka‐Sirayeli kuwo." 
Exodus32:21 Wandula wati u‐Mosesi ku‐Arone: Benze nto nina kuwe abantu aba, ukuba uzisile pezu kwabo isono esikulu kangaka?" 
Exodus32:22 Wati ke u‐Arone: Maingavuti ingqumbo yenkosi yam! uyabazi ababantu wena, ukuba banxam ele inkohlakalo." 
Exodus32:23 Baye besiti kum: Senzele otixo, abaya kuhamba pambi kwetu; ngokuba u‐Mosesi lowo, londoda eyasinyusayo ezweni le‐Jipete, singamazi ukuba uhliwe yinto nina." 
Exodus32:24 Ndaza ndati kubo: Osukuba enegolide, makayikumle, ayinike kum; yona ndayiposa emlilweni, kwada kwapuma itole eli." 
Exodus32:25 Wati u‐Mosesi akubona abantu ukuba bahlubulukile, (ngokuba u‐Arone ebebahlubisile babe nehlazo pakati kwabasukelayo,)" 
Exodus32:26 wandula wema u‐Mosesi esangweni lomnquba, wati: Olunge kuyehova, makeze kum! Baye bebutelana ngakuye bonke abalusapo luka‐Levi." 
Exodus32:27 Waza wati kubo: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Abanye ngabanye mabafake iziṙele zabc ngasematangeni abo, badlule, babuye kwelinye isango baye kwelinye isango lomnquba, basike omnye umzalwana wake, nomnye umhlobo wake, nomnye ummelwane wake." 
Exodus32:28 Lwaye usapo luka‐Levi lwenza ngelizwi lika‐Mosesi; kwawa ke ebantwini, ngalomini, ngati angamawaka matatu amadoda." 
Exodus32:29 Ngokuba u‐Mosesi ebesiti: Zalisani izandla zenu kuyehova namhla; ngokuba umntu’eya kuba ngakuye unyana wake, nangakuye umzalwana wake; ukuze namkeliswe namhla itamsanqa." 
Exodus32:30 Kwaye kute ngomnye umhla, wati u‐Mosesi ebantwini: Nina nonile ngesono esikulu; kodwa kaloku ndonyukela kuyehova, kungati umhlaumbi ndiya kwenzela isono senu uxoliso." 
Exodus32:31 Waza u‐Mosesi wabuyela kuyehova, wati: Au! ababantu bonile ngesono esikulu, bazenzele otixo begolide." 
Exodus32:32 Nakaloku, ukuba uya kubaxolela isono sabo —; ukuba kodwa akungebe njalo, uze undicime encwadini yako oyiba̔lileyo." 
Exodus32:33 Wandula uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Lowo osukuba onile ngakum, nguye endiya kumcima encwadini yam." 
Exodus32:34 Kodwa hamba kaloku, ukokele abantu kulo ndawo endanditeta ngayo kuwe: bona ke, ingelosi yam iya kuhamba pambi kwako; koko ngemini yokubuza kwam ndiya kusohlwayela isono sabo pezu kwabo." 
Exodus32:35 Waza uyehova wabeta abantu, ngenxa yokuba bebelenzile itole, elo walenzayo u‐Arone." 
Exodus33:1 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, wati: Hamba, unyuke kwa lapa, wena nabantu abo ubanyusileyo ezweni le‐Jipete, niye ezweni endandifunga ngalo ku‐Abrahame, ku‐Yisake, naku‐Yakobi, ndisiti: Kwinzalo yako ndiya kulipa:" 
Exodus33:2 ndandiya kutuma pambi kwako ingelosi, ndigxote nokugxota aba‐Kanane, naba‐Amori, nama‐Hete, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi:" 
Exodus33:3 kwa sezweni elela ubisi nobusi: ngokuba ndingayi kunyuka pakati kwako mna, ngenxa yokuba ungabantu abantamo ilukuni; hleze ndikugqibele endleleni." 
Exodus33:4 Baza abantu bakuva elilizwi libi, balila; kwaye kungabiko namntu owafaka izihombo zake kuye." 
Exodus33:5 Ngokuba uyehova ebete ku‐Mosesi: Yiti elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli: Nina ningabantu abantamo ilukuni; ngepanyazo linye bendinganyukelayo pakati kwako, ndikugqibele; kodwa kaloku, zitule izihombo zako kwa kuwe, ndize ndazi ke ukuba ndiya kukwenzela nto nina." 
Exodus33:6 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwazihluba izihombo zalo ngasentabeni ye‐Horebe. 
Exodus33:7 Waye u‐Mosesi watabata intente, wazolulela yona ngapandle kwomnquba, kwa kude nomnquba, wayibiza ngokuti yintente yentlangano. Kwaza kwati, bonke ababefuna uyehova bapuma baya ententeni yentlangano, ebingapandle kwomnquba." 
Exodus33:8 Kwaza kwati, Xeshekweni u‐Mosesi wapumayo ukuya ententeni, besuka bonke abantu, bema abanye ngabanye eminyango yentente zabo, bakangela ngaku‐Mosesi wada wangena ententeni." 
Exodus33:9 Kwaza kwati, nxa angenileyo u‐Mosesi ententeni, yehla intsika yelifu, yema emnyango wentente: waza u‐Yehova wateta no‐Mosesi." 
Exodus33:10 Bati bonke abantu bakubona intsika yelifu imi emnyango wentente, bandula besuka bonke abantu, batoba pantsi, abanye ngabanye eminyango yentente zabo." 
Exodus33:11 Waza uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi ubuso bungakubo ubuso, njengokuba umntu eteta nomhlobo wake. Wada wabuyela emnqubeni; kodwa umkonzi wake u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, isicaka, waengasukanga ententeni yena." 
Exodus33:12 Wandula wati u‐Mosesi kuyehova: Uya bona ke, uti wena kum: Nyusa ababantu! kanti akundazisanga oyena uya kumtuma nam; nangona ubusiti: Ndiyakwazi wena ngegama; nakanjalo: Ufumene ufefe emehlweni am." 
Exodus33:13 Ngako kaloku, ukuba ke ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, zundazise indlela yako, ukuba ndikwazi wena, ndize ndifumane ufefe emehlweni ako; kanjalo gqala ukuba singabantu bako esisizwe." 
Exodus33:14 Wayesiti: Isiqu sam siya kuhamba nawe, ndandiya kukunika ukupumla." 
Exodus33:15 Waza wati kuye: Ukuba isiqu sako asihambi nam, zungasinyusi kule ndawo." 
Exodus33:16 Ngokuba kuya kwaziwa nganto nina kaloku, ukuba ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, mna nabantu bako? asi ngako na ukuhamba kwako nati? kukona siya kwahlulwa, kwa mna nabantu bako, kubo bonke abantu abapezu kwobuso bomhlaba." 
Exodus33:17 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Kwa nalento uyitetileyo ndiya kuyenza; ngokokuba ufumene ufefe emehlweni am, nokuba ndikwazi ngegama." 
Exodus33:18 Wayesiti: Uz’ undibonise ubungcwalisa bako. 
Exodus33:19 Waza wati: Ndiya kudlulisa konke ukulunga kwam pambi kwako, ndishumayele negama likayehova ebusweni bako; ndandiya kumpata ngofefe lowo endiya kumpata ngofefe, ndoba netaṙu napezu kwalowo endiya kuba netaṙu ngakuye." 
Exodus33:20 Wati kanjalo: Akungebone ubuso bam; ngokuba kungeko mntu oya kundibona, apile nokupila." 
Exodus33:21 Walekela wati uyehova: Nantsi ke indawo ingakum; uya kuma kona pezu kwelityekazi. 
Exodus33:22 Kwoza kuti, ekudluleni kwobungcwalisa bam, ndokubeka emfanteni welityekazi, ndize ndikugubungele ngesandla sam nxa ndidlulayo." 
Exodus33:23 Ndandiya kususa isandla sam, uze ubone umva wam; kodwa ubuso bam abuyi kubonwa." 
Exodus34:1 WANDULA uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Zibazele amacwecwe amatye abe mabini enjengawokuqala; ndandiya kuba̔la pezu kwalamacwecwe amazwi abesemacwecweni okuqala, owauwaqekezile." 
Exodus34:2 Yiba selulungile kwakusa, uze unyukele kusasa entabeni ye‐Sinai, uzimise pambi kwam kona, engcopo yentaba." 
Exodus34:3 Kanti akuyi kunyuka mntu nawe; kanjalo makungabonwa mntu kuyo yonke intaba; kwa negusha nenkomo mazingadli pambi kwentaba leyo. 
Exodus34:4 Wasuka wabaza amabini amacwecwe amatye enjengawokuqala; waza wavuka u‐Mosesi kwa kusasa, wenyukela entabeni ye‐Sinai, njengokuba ebemyalele uyehova; watabata esandleni sake amacwecwe amatye omabini." 
Exodus34:5 Waye uyehova esihla efini, wema naye kona, washumayela igama likayehova." 
Exodus34:6 Waza wadlula uyehova pambi kwake, washumayela ngokuti: Uyehova, uyehova e ngutixo, enetaṙu, enofefe, equmba kade, emkulu ngobubele nenyaniso;" 
Exodus34:7 ogcinela amawaka ububele, oxolela inkohlakalo, nesigqito, nesono, ongayi kuka agwebele onetyala; eyohlwayela inkohlakalo yoyise pezu kwabantwana, napezu kwabantwana babantwana, pezu kwesesitatu napezu kwesesine isizukulwana." 
Exodus34:8 Wanxama ke u‐Mosesi, watoba pantsi ngasemhlabeni, wabedesha." 
Exodus34:9 Wati: Ukuba kaloku ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, Nkosi! maize ihambe inkosi pakati kwetu; nakuba bengabantu abantamo ilukuni aba; uze uxolele inkohlakalo yetu nesono setu, usamkele tina sibe lilifa lako." 
Exodus34:10 Waza wati: Bona ke, sendilwenza ucebano: pambi kwabo bonke abantu bako ndoyenza imimangaliso, ekungazanga kudalwe enjalo kuwo wonke umhlaba, nakuzo zonke izizwe; boti bonke abantu opakati kwabo babone umsebenzi kayehova; ngokuba iyinto eyoyikekayo leyo endiya kuyenza kuwe." 
Exodus34:11 Gcina wena oko ndikuyalela kona namhla nje: bona ke, ndiza kugxota ebusweni bako aba‐Amori, naba‐Kanane, nama‐Hete, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi." 
Exodus34:12 Zilumkele, ukuba ungalwenzi ucebano nabemi belozwe uya kulo, hleze lube ngumgibe pakati kwako." 
Exodus34:13 Koko izibingelo zabo niya kuzicita, nezifanekiso zabo niya kuziqekeza, ne‐Ashera zabo niya kuzigaula:" 
Exodus34:14 (ngokuba ungayi kubedesha utixo wumbi; ngokuba uyehova, ngu‐Bukwele igama lake, ngutixo enobukwele yena:)" 
Exodus34:15 hleze ulwenze ucebano nabemi belizwe, uti bakuṙexezela otixo babo, babingele nokubingela otixo babo, ati omnye akumeme, wandule utye kumbingo wake;" 
Exodus34:16 uti kanjalo utabatele onyana bako kwintombi zabo, ziti intombi zabo, zakuṙexezela otixo babo, zenze nonyana bako baṙexezele otixo babo." 
Exodus34:17 Akuyi kuzenzela otixo abatyityishiweyo. 
Exodus34:18 Umtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele uya kuwugcina: yoba yimihla isixe̔nxe uya kuzidla izonka ezingenagwele, njengokuba bendikuyalela, ngelimisiweyo ixesha lenyanga engu‐Abibe; ngokuba ngenyanga engu‐Abibe wabupuma e‐Jipete." 
Exodus34:19 Konke kuzityulwa ngako kukokwam; kwa zonke inkomo zako ezizalwa zingamaduna, amazibulo enkomo ezinkulu nezincinane." 
Exodus34:20 Kodwa izibulo leqwaṙashe uya kukulula lona ngexwana; ukuba kanti akuyi kulikulula, uze ulapule intamo. Bonke abangamazibulo onyana bako uya kubakulula. Mabangabonakali pambi kwam bengenanto." 
Exodus34:21 Yimihla mitandatu uya kusebenza, kodwa ngomhla wesixe̔nxe uya kupumla: ngexesha lokulima nangexesha lokuvuna uya kupumla." 
Exodus34:22 Kanjalo umtendeleko weveki uya kuwenza, owolibo lwokuvunwa kwenqolowa, kwa nomtendeleko wokubuta ngasekupeleni kwomnyaka." 
Exodus34:23 Kwoba ngamaxesha matatu emnyakeni mnye ekuya kubonakala onke amadoda ako ebusweni benkosi uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus34:24 Ngokuba ndiya kugqogqa intlanga pambi kwako, ndiyenze banzi nemida yako: kanjako aliyi kunqwenelwa mntu ilizwe lako, nxa unyukayo ukuya kubonakala ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wako, amaxesha matatu emnyakeni mnye." 
Exodus34:25 Akuyi kunikela igazi lombingo wam kunye nokubiliswayo; kanjalo akuyi kuhlala kude kuse umbingo womtendeleko wepasika. 
Exodus34:26 Isiqalo selibo zomhlaba wako uya kusingenisa endlwini kayehova, utixo wako. Musa ukupeka itakane lebokwe elubisini lwonina." 
Exodus34:27 Waza wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Ba̔la wena lamazwi; ngokuba kwa njengokutsho kwalamazwi ndilwenzile ucebano nawe no‐Sirayeli. 
Exodus34:28 Wayeko kona ndawonye no‐yehova imini zamashumi mane nobusuku bakwa mashumi mane; isonka akasidla, namanzi akawasela: wandula waba̔la pezu kwamacwecwe amazwi ocebano, amazwi olishumi." 
Exodus34:29 Kwaza kwati, akuhla u‐Mosesi entabeni ye‐Sinai, amacwecwe omabini esinqi̔no esesandleni sika‐Mosesi, ekuhleni kwake entabeni, waengazi u‐Mosesi ukuba intlonze yobuso bake ibikazimla akuteta naye." 
Exodus34:30 Wati u‐Arone, nalo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, bakubona u‐Mosesi, bona ke, intlonze yobuso bake yakazimla; ngako babesoyika ukusondela kuye." 
Exodus34:31 Waza u‐Mosesi wababiza; wasuka u‐Arone, nazo zonke inkosi zentlanganiso, babuya beza kuye: waye u‐Mosesi wateta nabo." 
Exodus34:32 Kwati kamva kwasondela lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli: waza waluyalela ngako konke uyehova wabekutetile kuye entabeni ye‐Sinai. 
Exodus34:33 Wati u‐Mosesi akuba egqibile ukuteta nabo, wabeka pezu kwobuso bake isigubungelo." 
Exodus34:34 Kodwa nxa u‐Mosesi wangenayo ebusweni bukayehova ukuya kuteta naye, wandula wasusa isigubungelo wada wapuma: wati akuba epumile, wateta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli oko wayeyalelwa kona." 
Exodus34:35 Lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabona ubuso buka‐Mosesi, ukuba intlonze yobuso buka‐Mosesi iyakazimla; waza u‐Mosesi wabuya wabeka isigubungelo pezu kwobuso bake, wada wangena ukuya kuteta naye." 
Exodus35:1 WAZA u‐Mosesi wahlanganisa yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, wati kulo: Ngala amazwi ayalele ngawo uyehova, ukuba niwenze." 
Exodus35:2 Yimihla mitandatu ekuya kwenziwa umsebenzi, kodwa ngomhla wesixe̔nxe kuya kubako kuni owobungcwele, isabata yopumlo kuyehova: osukuba ewenza umsebenzi ngawo, uya kufiswa." 
Exodus35:3 Aniyi kupemba mlilo kuzo zonke izindlu zenu ngomhla wesabata. 
Exodus35:4 Wayeteta u‐Mosesi kuyo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, esiti: Lilo eli ilizwi uyehova ayalele ngalo, ukuti:" 
Exodus35:5 Tabatani kokukuni umnikelo kuyehova; osukuba enentliziyo evumayo, makawuzise, umnikelo kayehova: igolide, nesilivere, nexina," 
Exodus35:6 nezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, neqiya eshiceneyo, n oboya bebokwe," 
Exodus35:7 nezintsu zenkunzi zegusha zenziwe bomvu, nezintsu zamacelesi, nemiti yeshitime," 
Exodus35:8 neoli ibe yeyesikanyiso, nezimnandi zibe zezeoli yokutambisa nezesiqumiso esimnandi," 
Exodus35:9 namatye eshohame, namatye okufakwa, aweyefodi nawembeka." 
Exodus35:10 Babeya kuza bonke abantliziyo zilumkile pakati kwenu, benze konke ayalele ngako uyehova:" 
Exodus35:11 itabanakele, intente yayo, nesigubungelo sayo, amakonxo ayo, neplanke zayo, imivalo yayo, intsika zayo, neziseko zayo;" 
Exodus35:12 ityeya, nezibonda zayo, isihlalo sofefe, nekuselo lelengalenga;" 
Exodus35:13 itafile, nezibonda zayo, nazo zonke impahla zayo, nezonka zokubonakala;" 
Exodus35:14 nekandelare yesikanyiso, nempahla zayo, nezibane zayo, neoli yesikanyiso;" 
Exodus35:15 nesibingelo sesiqumiso, nezibonda zaso, neoli yokutambisa, nesiqumiso esimnandi; nelengalenga locango emnyango wetabanakele;" 
Exodus35:16 isibingelo samadini okutshiswa, neziko lexina esiya kuba nalo, izibonda zaso, nazo zonke impahla zaso; isihlambelo, nesikondo saso;" 
Exodus35:17 amalengalenga ebala, intsika zalo, neziseko zazo; nelengalenga lesango lebala;" 
Exodus35:18 izikonkwane zetabanakele, nezikonkwane zebala, nentambo zazo;" 
Exodus35:19 izivato zobukonzo, zokuba kukonzwe kweyingcwele indawo, izivato ezingcwele zika‐Arone umperisite, nezivato zonyana bake, zokuba bakonze ngobuperisite." 
Exodus35:20 Yandula yapuma yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli ebusweni buka‐Mosesi. 
Exodus35:21 Baye besiza bonke ngabanye abantliziyo ibavusileyo, nabo bonke abamoya wabaqu̔bayo, bazisa umnikelo kayehova ngenxa yomsebenzi wentente yentlangano, nangenxa yenkonzo yayo, nangenxa yezivato ezingcwele." 
Exodus35:22 Baye besiza, kwa amadoda nabafazi, bonke abanentliziyo evumayo, bazisa izacolo, namacici, nemisesane, nezidanga, zizinto zegolide zonke; nabo bonke abanikela umnikelo wegolide kuyehova." 
Exodus35:23 Kanjalo bonke abantu bekufunyanwa kubo izuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, neqiya eshiceneyo, n oboya bebokwe, nezintsu zenkunzi zegusha zenziwe bomvu, nezintsu zamacelesi, bazizisa." 
Exodus35:24 Bonke abanikela umnikelo wesilivere nowexina, bawuzisa umnikelo kayehova; nabo bonke bekufunyanwa kubo imiti yeshitime, ngenxa yomnye umsebenzi wenkonzo, bayizisa." 
Exodus35:25 Nabo bonke abafazi, abantliziyo ilumkileyo, basonta ngezandla zabo; baza bazisa okusontiweyo, okwezuluṙa nesimnyama, okwesibomvu neqiya eshiceneyo." 
Exodus35:26 Nabo bonke abafazi abantliziyo yabavusayo ebulumkweni, basonta uboya bebokwe." 
Exodus35:27 Nenkosi zazisa zona amatye eshohame, namatye okufakwa, aweyefodi nawembeka;" 
Exodus35:28 nezimnandi, nezeoli yokutambisa, nezesiqumiso esimnandi, neoli yesikanyiso." 
Exodus35:29 Lwazisa lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli umnikelo wesisa kuyehova, onke amadoda nabo bonke abafazi, abantliziyo ibaqu̔bayo ukuzisela yonke imisebenzi, abeyalele uyehova ukuba yenziwe ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Exodus35:30 Waza u‐Mosesi wati elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli: Niyabona ke, uyehova umbizile ngegama u‐Betsalele, unyana ka‐Uri, unyana ka‐Hure, owesizwe sika‐Juda." 
Exodus35:31 Yena umzalisile ngomoya katixo, ngobulumko, nangengqondo, nangokwazi, nangentlobo zonke zomsebenzi;" 
Exodus35:32 ukuze aqinge amasetyenzwa obuncibi, enze ngegolide, nangesilivere, nangexina," 
Exodus35:33 nangokuqingqa amatye, okuba kufakwe nangokuqingqa imiti, yokuba kwenziwe ngemisebenzi yonke yobuncibi." 
Exodus35:34 Kanjalo ubekile entliziyweni yake ukuba afundise abanye, kwe yake na kwe ka‐Aholiyabi, unyana ka‐Ahisamaki, owesizwe sika‐Dane." 
Exodus35:35 Aba ubazalisile ngobulumko bentliziyo, ukuze kwenziwe yonke imisebenzi, eyomqingqi, neyencibi yokuluka, neyomtungi wamabala ngamabala, ngezuluṙa, nangesimnyama, nangesibomvu, nangeqiya eshiceneyo, neyomluki, n eyabenzi bemisebenzi yonke, neyabaqingi bamasetyenzwa obuncibi." 
Exodus36:1 BAZA basebenza u‐Betsalele no‐Aholiyabi, nawo onke amadoda anentliziyo elumkileyo, abete uyehova wanika ubulumko nengqondo kuwo, ukuba akwazi ukwenza yonke imisebenzi yenkonzo yeyingcwele indawo, njengako konke uyehova abeyalele kona." 
Exodus36:2 Ngokuba u‐Mosesi ebebizile u‐Betsalele no‐Aholiyabi, nawo onke amadoda anentliziyo elumkileyo, abebekile uyehova ubulumko ezintliziyweni zawo, kwa bonke abantliziyo yabavusayo ukusondela emsebenzini, ukuza kuwenza:" 
Exodus36:3 abawamkela ku‐Mosesi wonke umnikelo, usapo luka‐Sirayeli beluwuzisile ngenxa yomsebenzi wenkonzo yeyingcwele indawo, ukuba wenziwe. Koko babesazisa kuye iminikelo yesisa ngemiso ngemiso." 
Exodus36:4 Kweza ngoko onke amalumko abesenza wonke umsebenzi weyingcwele indawo, evela amanye ngamanye emsebenzini wawo awenzayo," 
Exodus36:5 atsho ku‐Mosesi, esiti: Abantu bayazisa ngokuninzi pezu kwokuyaneleyo inkonzo yomsebenzi, lo wo uyehova ayalele ngawo ukuba wenziwe." 
Exodus36:6 Waza waxela u‐Mosesi, ukuba makudluliswe ilizwi emnqubeni, lisiti: Indoda nomfazi mabangabi sawenza umsebenzi ngenxa yomnikelo weyingcwele indawo! Kwa njalo abantu bayeka ukuzisa." 
Exodus36:7 Ngokuba impahla ibibanele ngenxa yawo wonke umsebenzi, ukuba bawenze; ibiyegqitisayo kanjalo." 
Exodus36:8 Baza bonke abantliziyo ilumkileyo pakati kwabo bawenzayo umsebenzi benzela itabanakele izikuselo zalishumi ngepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, nezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu: wayezenza zinekerubime, ngesetyenzwa lencibi yokuluka." 
Exodus36:9 Ubude baso isikuselo sinye babuzikubite ezimashumi mabini anesibozo, nobubanzi baso isikuselo sinye babuzikubite ezine: zonke izikuselo ezi zazinomlinganiswa mnye." 
Exodus36:10 Esinye isihlanu sezikuselo wabandakanyisa esinye kwesinye; nesinye isihlanu sezikuselo wabandakanyisa esinye kwesinye. 
Exodus36:11 Wenza namasango ezuluṙa ngasempetweni wesinye isikuselo, ngasencameni, esibandakanyelweni; wenje njalo nasempetweni wapandle wesikuselo, ekubandakanyweni kwesesibini." 
Exodus36:12 Wayesenza amasango amashumi mahlanu kwesinye isikuselo, namasango akwa mashumi mahlanu wawenza encameni yesikuselo esisekubandakanyweni kwesesibini: lamasango alungelelana elinye nelinye." 
Exodus36:13 Wenza namakonxo egolide amashumi mahlanu, wabandakanyisa izikuselo, esinye kwesinye, ngamakonxo lawo; yaza yaba yitabanakele inye." 
Exodus36:14 Wayesenza izikuselo ngoboya bebokwe, zibe yintente pezu kwayo itabanakele: zazizikuselo ezilishumi linasinye wazenzayo." 
Exodus36:15 Ubude baso isikuselo sinye babuzikubite ezimashumi matatu, nobubanzi baso isikuselo sinye babuzikubite ezine: ezizikuselo zilishumi linasinye zazinomlinganiswa mnye." 
Exodus36:16 Wayebandakanyisa izikuselo zazihlanu zizodwa, nezikuselo zazitandatu zizodwa nazo." 
Exodus36:17 Wenza namasango amashumi mahlanu ngasempetweni wesikuselo, wesapandle ekubandakanyweni, namasango akwa ngamashumi mahlanu wawenza ngasempetweni wesikuselo esibandakanyana nesesibini." 
Exodus36:18 Wawenza namakonxo exina amashumi mahlanu, okuba kubandakanyiswe intente, ize ibe inye." 
Exodus36:19 Kanjalo wayenzela intente isigubungelo ngezintsu zenkunzi zegusha zenziwe bomvu, nesigubungelo esinye ngezintsu zamacelesi pezu kwaso eso." 
Exodus36:20 Waza wayenzela itabanakele iplanke ngemiti yeshitime, zipakama." 
Exodus36:21 Zazikubite ezilishumi ubude beplanke nye, nobubanzi bayo iplanke nye yayikubite nesiqingata sekubite." 
Exodus36:22 Iplanke nye ibinezibambelo zazibini, zicwangcisiwe esinye silunge nesinye; wenje njalo kuzo zonke iplanke zetabanakele." 
Exodus36:23 Wayenzela itabanakele iplanke, zazimashumi mabini iplanke kwelasesuyide icala, ngasesuyide:" 
Exodus36:24 neziseko zesilivere ezimashumi mane wazenza ngapantsi kwazo iplanke zomashumi mabini; zazibini iziseko ngapantsi kwenye iplanke kuzo izibambelo zayo zozibini, nezibini iziseko ngapantsi kwenye iplanke kuzo izibambelo zayo zozibini." 
Exodus36:25 Nakwelesibini icala letabanakele, kwelasenode icala, wazenza iplanke zamashumi mabini;" 
Exodus36:26 neziseko zazo zesilivere ezimashumi mane; zazibini iziseko ngapantsi kwenye iplanke, nezibini iziseko ngapantsi kwenye iplanke." 
Exodus36:27 Necala lasemva letabanakele, ngasentshonalanga, walenzela iplanke zantandatu." 
Exodus36:28 Wenzela namagumbi etabanakele, emacaleni omabini, iplanke zambini." 
Exodus36:29 Zazihlanganiswa kunye ezantsi, kanjalo zahlanganiswa kunye napezulu kuwo umsesane umnye: wenje njalo kuzo zombini, emagumbini omabini." 
Exodus36:30 Kwaye kuko iplanke ezisibozo, neziseko zazo zesilivere, iziseko ezilishumi linesitandatu; zazibini iziseko ngapantsi kweplanke ezinye ngezinye." 
Exodus36:31 Wayesenza imivalo ngemiti yeshitime; yamihlanu eziplankeni zelinye icala letabanakele," 
Exodus36:32 nemihlanu imivalo eziplankeni zelinye icala letabanakele, nemihlanu imivalo eziplankeni zetabanakele, zecala lasemva ngasentshonalanga." 
Exodus36:33 Nowapakati umvalo wawenza ukuba udlule pakati kweplauke, kwa kwenye incam kwada kwakwenye incam." 
Exodus36:34 Neplanke wazaleka ngegolide, nemisesane yazo wayenza ngegolide ibe zindawo zemivalo; kanjako wayaleka imivalo ngegolide." 
Exodus36:35 Wayesenza ikuselo ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo: ngesetyenzwa lencibi yokuluka walenza lona, linekerubime." 
Exodus36:36 Walenzela intsika zane ngemiti yeshitime, wazaleka ngegolide: amagwegwe azo ebengawegolide; wayezityityishela iziseko zesilivere zazine." 
Exodus36:37 Kanjalo walwenzela ucango lwentente ilengalenga, ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, isetyenzwa lomtungi wamabala ngamabala:" 
Exodus36:38 kwa nentsika zalo zontlanu, namagwegwe azo; wayezaleka intloko zazo nentonga zazo ngegolide; kodwa iziseko zazo zozihlanu zazizezexina." 
Exodus37:1 Wati kanjalo u‐Betsalele wayenza ityeya ngemiti yeshitime: yayizikubite mbini nesiqingata sekubite ubude bayo, nekubite nye nesiqingata sekubite ububanzi bayo, nekubite nye nesiqingata sekubite ubupakamo bayo." 
Exodus37:2 Waza wayaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo, pakati nangapandle; wayenzela isitsaba segolide ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus37:3 Wayetyityishela yona imisesane yegolide yamine, ngasemagumbini ayo, imisesane mibini ngelinye icala layo, nemisesane ekwa mibini ngelinye icala layo." 
Exodus37:4 Wazenza nezibonda ngemiti yeshitime, wazaleka ngegolide." 
Exodus37:5 Waye izibonda ezo wazingenisa kuyo imisesane esemacaleni etyeya, ize itwalwe ityeya." 
Exodus37:6 Kanjalo wasenza isihlalo sofefe ngegolide ecocekileyo: sasizikubite mbini nesiqingata sekubite ubude baso, nekubite nye nesiqingata sekubite ububanzi baso." 
Exodus37:7 Wazenza nekerubime zambini ngegolide; wazenza ngesetyenzwa elikandelweyo, zipuma ezincameni zombini zesihlalo sofefe;" 
Exodus37:8 enye ikerubime isencameni yakweli icala, nenye ikerubime isencameni yakweliya icala: zipuma esihlalweni sofefe wayezenza ikerubime, ezincameni zaso zombini." 
Exodus37:9 Zati ikerubime zatwabulula amapiko omabini ngapezulu, zisigubungela ngamapiko azo isihlalo sofefe; nobuso bazo obenye babubekana nobenye; babungakuso isihlalo sofefe ubuso bekerubime." 
Exodus37:10 Wayenza netafile ngemiti yeshitime; yayizikubite mbini ubude bayo, nekubite nye ububanzi bayo, nekubite nye nesiqingata sekubite ubupakamo bayo." 
Exodus37:11 Wayeyaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo, wayenzela isitsaba segolide ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus37:12 Wayenzela nodini, lungangobubanzi besandla, ngento engqongayo; waza walwenzela udini lwayo isitsaba segolide ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus37:13 Wayityityishela imisesane yegolide yamine, wayibeka imisesane emagumbini omane asezinyaweni zayo zone." 
Exodus37:14 Ibimalungana nodini imisesane leyo, ibe zindawo zezibonda zokuba kutwalwe itafile." 
Exodus37:15 Wazenza izibonda ezo ngemiti yeshitime, wazaleka ngegolide, ize itwalwe itafile." 
Exodus37:16 Wenza nempahla ezipezu kwetafile, izikotile zayo, nezitya zayo, nendebe zayo, nebekile zayo, ekwagalelwa ngazo, ngegolide ecocekileyo." 
Exodus37:17 Wayenza nekandelare ngegolide ecocekileyo: ngesetyenzwa elikandelweyo wayenza ikandelare; isikondo sayo, nexokama layo, indetyana zayo, izikandana zayo, nentyatyambo zayo, zibe zizezakuyo." 
Exodus37:18 Imbaxa ezintandatu zapuma emacaleni ayo; kwapuma imbaxa ezintatu zekandelare kwelinye icala layo, nembaxa ezintatu zekandelare kwelinye icala layo." 
Exodus37:19 Kwako indetyana ezintatu, zifanisiwe nezamonde, kwenye imbaxa, kwa n esikandana nentyatyambo; nendetyana ezintatu, zifanisiwe nezamonde, nakwenye imbaxa, kwa n esikandana nentyatyambo; kwakunjalo kuzo zonke imbaxa ezipuma ekandelareni." 
Exodus37:20 Nakuyo ikandelare zaziko indetyana ezine, zifanisiwe nezamonde, izikandana zayo, nentyatyambo zayo." 
Exodus37:21 Kwakuko esinye isikandana ngapantsi kwezimbini imbaxa zakuyo, n esinye isikandana ngapantsi kwezimbini imbaxa zakuyo, n esinye isikandana ngapantsi kwezimbini imbaxa zakuyo, njengazo imbaxa zontandatu ezipuma ekandelareni." 
Exodus37:22 Izikandana zazo nembaxa zazo zibe zizezakuyo; ibilinye isetyenzwa elikandelweyo legolide ecocekileyo ipela. 
Exodus37:23 Wazenza nezibane zayo zosixe̔nxe, nezicimo zayo, nezipatelo zayo, ngegolide ecocekileyo." 
Exodus37:24 Kwakungetalente yegolide ecocekileyo wenzayo yona, nazo zonke impahla zayo." 
Exodus37:25 Kanjalo wasenza isibingelo sokuqumisa ngemiti yeshitime: sasiyikubite nye ubude baso, nekubite nye ububanzi baso; sanamacala mane; nobupakamo baso sasizikubite mbini; zibe zipuma kwa kuso impondo zaso." 
Exodus37:26 Wayesaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo, ingcopo yaso, namacala aso ngento engqongayo, nempondo zaso; wasenzela nesitsaba segolide ngento engqongayo." 
Exodus37:27 Wasenzela kanjalo yamibini imisesane yegolide ngapantsi kwesitsaba saso, ngasemagumbini aso omabini, pezu kwamacala aso omabini, ibe zindawo zezibonda zokuba sitwalwe ngazo." 
Exodus37:28 Nezibonda zaso wazenza ngemiti yeshitime, wazaleka ngegolide." 
Exodus37:29 Wayenza neoli engcwele yokutambisa, nesiqumiso esingcwengileyo sezimnandi, ngomsebenzi womenzi wezinukamnandi." 
Exodus38:1 Kanjako wasenza isibingelo samadini okutshiswa ngemiti yeshitime: sasizikubite ezintlanu ubude baso, nekubite ezintlanu ububanzi baso; sanamacala mane; nobupakamo baso sasizikubite ezintatu." 
Exodus38:2 Wazenza nempondo zaso pezu kwamagumbi aso omane; zibe zipuma kwa kuso impondo zaso; wayesaleka ngexina. 
Exodus38:3 Wenza nazo zonke impahla zesibingelo eso, imbiza zaso, nezikotululo zaso, nezitya zaso zokufefela, n eforoke zaso, nezipatamlilo zaso: zonke impahla zaso wazenza ngexina." 
Exodus38:4 Wayesenzela isibingelo iziko lesetyenzwa elilinqwanqwa ngexina, ngapantsi kwesazinge saso, ngasezantsi kwada kwapakati kwaso." 
Exodus38:5 Wayetyityishela amancam omane eziko lexina imisesane yamine, ibe zindawo zezibonda." 
Exodus38:6 Wazenza izibonda ngemiti yeshitime, wazaleka ngexina." 
Exodus38:7 Waza wangenisa izibonda kuyo imisesane emacaleni esibingelo, ukuba sitwalwe ngazo: wenza sona siliholo ngeplanke." 
Exodus38:8 Wayesenza isihlambelo ngexina, nesikondo saso ngexina kanjalo, ngezikangeliselo zamakonzikazi akonzayo emnyango wentente yentlangano." 
Exodus38:9 Kanjako walenza ibala: ngecala lasesuyide ngasesuyide amalengalenga ebala ebengawepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, ikubite ezilikulu." 
Exodus38:10 Intsika zawo zazimashumi mabini, neziseko zazo zazimashumi mabini, zizezexina; amagwegwe entsika nentonga zazo bezizezesilivere." 
Exodus38:11 Nangecala lasenode amalengalenga ebezikubite ezilikulu; intsika zawo zimashumi mabini, neziseko zazo zikwa mashumi mabini, zizezexina; amagwegwe entsika nentonga zazo bezizezesilivere." 
Exodus38:12 Nangecala litshona ilanga amalengalenga ebezikubite ezingamashumi mahlanu; intsika zawo zilishumi, neziseko zazo zikwa lishumi; amagwegwe entsika nentonga zazo bezizezesilivere." 
Exodus38:13 Nangecala lipuma ilanga ngasempumalanga ikubite bezingamashumi mahlanu. 
Exodus38:14 Amalengalenga elinye icala lesango ebezikubite ezilishumi linesihlanu; intsika zawo zantatu, neziseko zazo zazikwa zitatu." 
Exodus38:15 Nangelinye icala lesango lebala, kwa lapa napaya, amalengalenga ebezikubite ezilishumi linesihlanu; intsika zawo zantatu, neziseko zazo zazikwa zitatu." 
Exodus38:16 Onke amalengalenga elingqongayo ibala ebengawepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo. 
Exodus38:17 Iziseko zentsika zibe zizezexina; amagwegwe entsika nentonga zazo bezizezesilivere; nesalekwa sentloko zazo besisesesilivere; zonke intsika zebala zabandakanyiswa ngentonga zesilivere. 
Exodus38:18 Ilengalenga lesango lebala lalilisetyenzwa lomtungi wamabala ngamabala, lezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo; lalizikubite ezingamashumi mabini ubude balo, nobupakamo balo, ebubanzini, lalizikubite ezintlanu, lilungelelene namalengalenga ebala." 
Exodus38:19 Intsika zawo zane, neziseko zazo zazine, zizezexina; amagwegwe azo ebengawesilivere, nesalekwa sentloko zazo nentonga zazo bezizezesilivere." 
Exodus38:20 Kanjalo zonke izikonkwane zetabanakele, nezebala elingqongayo, zazizezexina." 
Exodus38:21 Zezi izinto ezibalweyo zetabanakele, zetabanakele yesinqi̔no, ezibe zibalwa ngelizwi lika‐Mosesi, ngenkonzo yaba‐Levi, ngesandla sika‐Yitamare, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite." 
Exodus38:22 Waye u‐Betsalele unyana ka‐Uri, unyana ka‐Hure, owesizwe sika‐Juda, wenza konke uyehova abemyalele u‐Mosesi ngako." 
Exodus38:23 Nakunye naye wabengu‐Aholiyabi, unyana ka‐Ahisamaki, owesizwe sika‐Dane, obengumqingqi, nencibi yokuluka, nomtungi wamabala ngamabala, ngezuluṙa, nangesimnyama, nangesibomvu, nangepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo." 
Exodus38:24 Yonke igolide ekwenziwa ngayo umsebenzi, kuwo wonke umsebenzi weyingcwele indawo, kwa igolide yomnikelo, yabizitalente ezimashumi mabini anetoba, neshekele ezimakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi matatu, ezingangayo ishekele yeyingcwele indawo." 
Exodus38:25 Nesilivere yababalweyo bentlanganiso ibizitalente ezilikulu, ueshekele eziliwaka linamakulu asixe̔nxe enamashumi asixe̔nxe enantlanu, ezingangayo ishekele yeyingcwele indawo:" 
Exodus38:26 ibeka ngenxa yentloko ngentloko, oko kukuti, isiqingata seshekele, engangayo ishekele yeyingcwele indawo, ngenxa yabo bonke abagqitela kwababalweyo, bengabaminyaka ingamashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, ngenxa yabangamawaka angamakulu matandatu enamawaka matatu, anamakulu mahlanu enamashumi akwa mahlanu." 
Exodus38:27 Italente zesilivere ezilikulu, kwatyityishwa ngazo iziseko zeyingcwele indawo, neziseko zekuselo; ikulu leziseko ngekulu letalente, italente inye iyeyesiseko sinye." 
Exodus38:28 Neziliwaka linamakulu asixe̔nxe enamashumi asixe̔nxe enantlanu ishekele, wenza ngazo amagwegwe entsika, wazaleka intloko zazo, wazenzela intonga." 
Exodus38:29 Kanjalo ixina yomnikelo ibizitalente ezingamashumi asixe̔nxe, neshekele ezingamawaka mabini anamakulu mane." 
Exodus38:30 Wenza ngayo iziseko zocango lwentente yentlangano, nesibingelo sexina, neziko lexina esibe sinalo, nazo zonke impahla zeziko," 
Exodus38:31 neziseko zebala elingqongayo, neziseko zesango lebala, nazo zonke izikonkwane zetabanakele, nazo zonke izikonkwane zebala elingqongayo." 
Exodus39:1 Nangezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, bazenza izivato zobukonzo, zokuba kukonzwe kweyingcwele indawo; bazenza nezivato ezingcwele ezibe zezika‐Arone, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus39:2 Iyefodi wayenza ngegolide, ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo." 
Exodus39:3 Baye bekandela amaceba egolide, bancwela intsinga, kuze kusetyenzwe ngazo pakati kwezuluṙa, napakati kwesimnyama, napakati kwesibomvu, napakati kwayo epotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, ngesetyenzwa lencibi yokuluka." 
Exodus39:4 Bayenzela neziziba zamagxalaba ezibandakanyiweyo; kwa sezincameni zayo ezimbini yabandakanyiswa. 
Exodus39:5 Nombinqo ocikiziweyo weyefodi yake, opezu kwayo, wayinto yakuyo, njengesetyenzwa layo; ngegolide, ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eschiceneyo; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalale u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus39:6 Balungisa namatye eshohame evingcelwe ezingingqini zegolide, eqingqelwe njeng eziqingqwa zaso isincamatiselo, enamagama onyana baka‐Sirayeli." 
Exodus39:7 Wayebeka wona pezu kwezamagxalaba iziziba zeyefodi, abe ngamatye okukumbuza elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus39:8 Wayenza nembeka ngesetyenzwa lencibi yokuluka, njengesetyenzwa layo iyefodi; ngegolide, ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, nepotiweyo iqiya eshicenyo." 
Exodus39:9 Ibinamacala mane; ipindiwe bayenza imbeka: yaisisoluko sesandla ubude bayo, nesoluko sesandla ububanzi bayo, ipindiwe." 
Exodus39:10 Baye befaka kuyo inṙozo zane zamatye; olunye uṙozo lwaluyirubi, n etpoasze, nekabunukele: lwaluṙozo lwokuqala olu." 
Exodus39:11 Lwaye uṙozo lwesibini luyisamagide, n esafire, neyahalome." 
Exodus39:12 Lwaye uṙozo lwesitatu luyiyasinte, n eyagate, neyametisite." 
Exodus39:13 Lwaye uṙozo lwesine luyikrusolite, n esadonutse, nejasipidi: avingcelwa izigingqini zegolide ezimfakweni zawo." 
Exodus39:14 Amatye la ebenjengamagama onyana baka‐Sirayeli, elishumi linamabini, njengawo amagama abo, njeng eziqingqwa zaso isincamatiselo, elinye ngelinye linegama lalo, ngenxa yezizwe ezilishumi linesibini." 
Exodus39:15 Benza kanjalo pezu kwembeka imixokolelwane ejijanisiweyo, isetyenzwa elitsontelweyo, ngegolide ecocekileyo." 
Exodus39:16 Bazenza nezigingqi zazibini ngegolide, nemisesane yegolide yamibini; baza babeka imisesane leyo yomibini pezu kwazo incam ezimbini zembeka." 
Exodus39:17 Baye befaka lomibini imixokolelwane etsontelweyo yegolide kuyo imisesane mibini esezincameni zembeka. 
Exodus39:18 Kodwa ezinye incam ezimbini zemixokolelwane mibini etsontelweyo bazikonxa kuzo izigingqi zibini, bazibeka pezu kweziziba zamagxalaba zeyefodi, empambili, wayo." 
Exodus39:19 Babuya bayenza imisesane mibini yegolide, bayimisa ezincameni ezimbini zembeka, empetweni wayo osecaleni leyefodi ngapakati." 
Exodus39:20 Bayenza n eminye imisesane mibini yegolide, wayibeka pezu kweziziba zamagxalaba zozibini zeyefodi ngasezantsi, ngasempambili wayo, malungana nokubandakanywa kwayo, ngapezulu kwombinqo ocikiziweyo weyefodi." 
Exodus39:21 Baye benxibelela imbeka ngemisesane yayo kwa kuyo imisesane yeyefodi ngosinga lwezuluṙa, ukuba ibe pezulu kwawo umbinqo ocikiziweyo weyefodi, nokuba imbeka ingashenxeki kuyo iyefodi; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus39:22 Kanjako wayenza ingubo yaseyefodini ngesetyenzwa lomluki, ipela ngezuluṙa." 
Exodus39:23 Kwakuko intunja pakati kwayo ingubo, njengentunja yesigcinisifuba; ibinompeto le ntunja ngento engqongayo, ize ingaṙazuki." 
Exodus39:24 Bazenza pezu kwemiqukumbelo yengubo igranate zezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, neqiya epotiweyo." 
Exodus39:25 Bazenza nezikencezelo zegolide ecocekileyo, babeka izikencezelo ezo pakati kwazo ingranate pezu kwemiqukumbelo yengubo, kwa ngento engqongayo pakati kwegranate;" 
Exodus39:26 kuze kwabako isikencezelo negranate, isikencezelo negranate, pezu kwemiqukumbelo yengubo ngento engqongayo; ukuba kukonzwe, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus39:27 Baye besenza ihempe ngeqiya eshiceneyo, ngensetyenzwa lomluki, zibe zezika‐Arone nezonyana bake;" 
Exodus39:28 nonkontsho ngeqiya eshiceneyo, neminqwazi emihle ngeqiya eshiceneyo, nebrukwe zeqiya ngepotiweyo eqiya eshiceneyo;" 
Exodus39:29 noqwemesha ngepotiweyo iqiya eshiceneyo, nezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, ngesetyenzwa lomtungi wamabala ngamabala; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus39:30 Bayenza nembasa yekrone engcwele ngegolide ecocekileyo, baba̔la pezu kwayo isiba̔lo, njeng eziqingqwa zesincamatiselo, sokuti: ubungcwele kuyehova!" 
Exodus39:31 Baye bebopa kuyo usinga lwezuluṙa, ize ibekwe pezulu pezu kwalo unkontsho; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus39:32 Kwada kwagqitywa wonke umsebenzi wayo itabanakele yentente yentlangano: lwaye usapo luka‐Sirayeli lube lwenzile njengako konke uyehova abemyalele u‐Mosesi ngako, lwenje njalo ke." 
Exodus39:33 Baza bazisa itabanakele ku‐Mosesi, intente, nazo zonke impahla zayo, amakonxo ayo, ipanke zayo, imivalo yayo, nentsika zayo, neziseko zayo;" 
Exodus39:34 nesigubungelo sezintsu zenkunzi zegusha zenziwe bomvu, nesigubungelo sezintsu zamacelesi, nekuselo lelengalenga;" 
Exodus39:35 ityeya yesinqi̔no, nezibonda wayo, nesihlalo sofefe;" 
Exodus39:36 itafila, nazo zonke impahla zayo, nezokna zokubonakala;" 
Exodus39:37 ikandelare ecocekileyo, n ezibane zayo, izibane zokucwangciswa, nazo zonke impahla zayo, neoli yesikanyiso;" 
Exodus39:38 nesibingelo segolide, neoli yokutambisa, nesiqumiso esimnandi, nelengalenga locango lwetabanakele;" 
Exodus39:39 isibingelo sexina, neziko lexina esibe sinalo, izibonda zaso, nazo zonke impahla zaso; isihlambelo, nesikondo saso;" 
Exodus39:40 amalengalenga ebala, intsika zalo, neziseko zalo; nelengalenga lesango lebala, intambo zalo, nezikonkwane zalo, nazo zonke impahla zenkonzo yetabanakele, ezintente yentlangano;" 
Exodus39:41 izivato zobukonzo, zokuba kukonzwe kweyingcwele indawo; izivato ezingcwele zika‐Arone umperisite, nezivato zonyana bake, zokuba bakonze ngobuperisite." 
Exodus39:42 Njengako konke uyehova abemyalele u‐Mosesi ngako, lwenza kwa ngokunjalo usapo luke‐Sirayeli wonke umsebenzi." 
Exodus39:43 Waza u‐Mosesi wawukangela wonke umsebenzi, kekaloku bona ke, beluwenzile njengokuba uyehova ebeyalele; kwa ngokunjalo ke beluwenzile: wandula u‐Mosesi walutamsanqelisa." 
Exodus40:1 WAZA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Exodus40:2 Ngomhla wenyanga yokuqala, ngowokuqala wenyanga, uya kupakamisa itabanakele yentente yentlangano." 
Exodus40:3 Wauya kubeka kona ityeya yesinqi̔no; uze uyikusele ityeya ngekuselo. 
Exodus40:4 Wandule ungenise itafile, ucwangcise izinto zokucwangciswa pezu kwayo; uti kanjalo ungenise ikandelare, umise izibane zayo." 
Exodus40:5 Wauya kubeka isibingelo segolide sokuqumisela pambi kwayo ityeya yesinqi̔no; uze ulixo̔me ilengalenga locango etabanakeleni. 
Exodus40:6 Wauya kubeka isibingelo sedini lokutshiswa pambi kwocango lwetabanakele yentente yentlangano. 
Exodus40:7 Kanjako uya kubeka isihlambelo pakati kwentente yentlangano nesibingelo; uze ubeke kuso amanzi. 
Exodus40:8 Wandule ulimise ibala ngento engqongayo, ulixo̔me ilengalenga esangweni lebala." 
Exodus40:9 Wauya kutabata ioli yokutambisa, utambise itabanakele, nako konke okukuyo; uya kungcwalisa yona, nazo zonke impahla zayo, ize ibe yingcwele." 
Exodus40:10 Uya kutambisa kanjalo isibingelo sedini lokutshiswa, nazo zonke impahla zaso; uya kungcwalisa isibingelo, size sibe sisibingelo esiyingcwelekazi." 
Exodus40:11 Uya kutambisa nesihlambelo, naso isikondo saso, usingcwalise." 
Exodus40:12 Kanjalo u‐Arone nonyana bake uya kubasondeza elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, ubahlambe ngamanzi." 
Exodus40:13 Wauya kumambatisa u‐Arone izivato ezingcwele, uze umtambise, umngcwalise nokumngcwalisa, ukuba andikonze ngobuperisite." 
Exodus40:14 Nonyana bake wobasondeza, ubambatise ihempe:" 
Exodus40:15 wauya kutambisa bona, njengokutambisa kwako uyise wabo, ukuba bandikonze ngobuperisite: ngokuba okunene ukutanjiswa kwabo kwoba kokwobuperisite obungunapakade kubo ngezizukulwana zabo." 
Exodus40:16 Wenje njalo u‐Mosesi: njengako konke uyehova abemyalele kona, wenje njalo ke." 
Exodus40:17 Kwaza kwati ngenyanga yokuqala, ngomnyaka wesibini, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, kwapakanyiswa itabanakele." 
Exodus40:18 Waye u‐Mosesi wapakamisa itabanakele, wabeka iziseko zayo, wamisa iplanke zayo, wafaka imivalo yayo, wapakamisa intsika zayo." 
Exodus40:19 Waza watwabulula intente pezu kwetabanakele, wabeka isigubungelo sentente pezulu pezu kwayo; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus40:20 Wayetabata isinqi̔no wasifaka etyeyeni, wamisa izibonda pezu kwetyeya, wabeka isihlalo sofefe pezulu pezu kwetyeya." 
Exodus40:21 Waza wangenisa ityeya etabanakeleni, walixo̔ma ikuselo lelengalenga, wayikusela ityeya yesinqi̔no: njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus40:22 Wayebeka itafile ententeni yentlangano, ecaleni letabanakele ngasenode, ngapandle kwekuselo." 
Exodus40:23 Waza wacwangcisa pezu kwayo uṙozo lwezonka pambi kwoyehova; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi. 
Exodus40:24 Wayebeka nekandelare ententeni yentlangano, malungana nayo itafile, ecaleni letabanakele ngasesuyide." 
Exodus40:25 Waza wamisa izibane pambi kwoyehova; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi. 
Exodus40:26 Wayebeka nesibingelo segolide ententeni yentlangano, pambi kwekuselo;" 
Exodus40:27 waqumisa pezu kwaso isiqumiso esimnandi; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi. 
Exodus40:28 Waza walixo̔ma ilengalenga locango lwetabanakele. 
Exodus40:29 Kanjalo isibingelo sedini lokutshiswa wasibeka ngaselucangweni lwayo itabanakele yentente yentlangano; wanikela pezu kwaso idini lokutshiswa nomnikelo wokudla; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi. 
Exodus40:30 Wayemisa isihlambelo pakati kwentente yentlangano nesibingelo, wabeka kuso amanzi, ukuba kuhlanjwe." 
Exodus40:31 Baye behlamba kuso u‐Mosesi, no‐Arone, nonyana bake, izandla zabo nenyawo zabo:" 
Exodus40:32 bati ekungeneni kwabo ententeni yentlangano, nasekusondeleni kwabo esibingelweni, bahlamba; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Exodus40:33 Waza wapakamisa ibala ngento engqongayo itabanakele nesibingelo, walixo̔ma ilengalenga lesango lebala. Wada wagqiba u‐Mosesi umsebenzi." 
Exodus40:34 Landula ilifu lasibekela intente yentlangano, bati ubungcwalisa bukayehova bazalisa itabanakele." 
Exodus40:35 Waye u‐Mosesi wakohlwa kukungena ententeni yentlangano, ngokokuba ilifu lihleli pezu kwayo, nokuba ubungcwalisa bukayehova buzalisile itabanakele." 
Exodus40:36 Kwati kwakunyuswa ilifu kuyo itabanakele, lwaza lwahamba usapo luka‐Sirayeli kuzo zonke ihambo zalo:" 
Exodus40:37 kodwa xeshekweni ilifu linganyuswanga, lwaza alwahamba kwada kwayimini yokunyuswa kwalo." 
Exodus40:38 Ngokuba ilifu likayehova libe lipezu kwetabanakele ngemini, nomlilo ubupezu kwayo ngobusuku, emehlweni ayo yonke indlu yo‐Sirayeli, kuzo zonke ihambo zabo." 
Leviticus1:1 WAZA uyehova wabiza u‐Mosesi, wateta kuye esententeni yentlangano, esiti:" 
Leviticus1:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Nxa umntu wakuni aya kunikela umnikelo kuyehova, niya kunikela umnikelo wenu uvela ezinkomeni, kwezinkulu nakwezincinane." 
Leviticus1:3 Ukuba umnikelo wake ulidini lokutshiswa livela ezinkomeni ezinkulu, yoba yinkunzi emsulwa aya kunikela ngayo: ngaselucangweni lwentente yentlangano uya kunikela yona, ngenxa yokubukwa kwake pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus1:4 Waeya kulalisa isandla sake pezu kwentloko yedini lokutshiswa; eliya kubukwa ngenxa yake limxolisele. 
Leviticus1:5 Waeya kuxe̔la inkunzana leyo pambi kwoyehova; boti onyana baka‐Arone, abaperisite, balisondeze igazi, balisasaze igazi pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo, eso siselucangweni lwentente yentlangano:" 
Leviticus1:6 andule ahlinze idini lokutshiswa, alicande ezitweni zalo." 
Leviticus1:7 Baye onyana baka‐Arone umperisite beya kubeka umlilo pezu kwesibingelo, bazicwangcise inkuni pezu kwomlilo." 
Leviticus1:8 Boti kanjalo onyana baka‐Arone, abaperisite, bacwangcise izito, intloko, nenqata, pezu kwenkuni ezisemlilweni opezu kwesibingelo:" 
Leviticus1:9 kodwa umbilini walo nentungo zalo uya kuzihlanza ngamanzi: oko konke umperisite uya kukutshisa pezu kwesibingelo, kube lidini lokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Leviticus1:10 Ukuba kanjalo uvela ezinkomeni ezincinane umnikelo wake, ezigusheni, umhlaumbi ezibokweni, libe lidini lokutshiswa, yoba yinkunzi emsulwa aya kunikela ngayo." 
Leviticus1:11 Waeya kuxe̔la yona ecaleni lesibingelo, ngasenode, pambi kwoyehova: boti onyana baka‐Arone, abaperisite, balisasaze igazi layo pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo." 
Leviticus1:12 Waeya kuyicanda ezitweni zayo, kunye nentloko yayo nenqata layo; ati umperisite azicwangcise pezu kwenkuni ezisemlilweni opezu kwesibingelo:" 
Leviticus1:13 kodwa umbilini nentungo uya kuzihlanza ngamanzi: oko konke umperisite wokusondeza, akutshise pezu kwesibingelo: lidini lokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Leviticus1:14 Kanjako ukuba ulidini lokutshiswa livela ezintakeni umnikelo wake kuyehova, uya kwandula anikele umnikelo wake uvela emahobeni, umhlaumbi ematoleni ezuba." 
Leviticus1:15 Woti umperisite alisondeze esibingelweni, alinyikile intloko, atshise yona pezu kwesibingelo; laye igazi lalo liya kufocelwa ngasecaleni lesibingelo." 
Leviticus1:16 Nendlelo yalo kunye nomswane wayo uya kuyisusa, ayipose kufupi nesibingelo ngasempumalanga, endaweni yotutu." 
Leviticus1:17 Waeya kulicanda ngamapiko alo, angalahluki kanye kodwa; andule umperisite alitshise pezu kwesibingelo, pezu kwenkuni ezisemlilweni: lidini lokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Leviticus2:1 XESHEKWENI umntu aya kunikela ngomnikelo ongowokudla kuyehova, umnikelo wake woba ngowomgubo ocolekileyo: uya kugalela ioli pezu kwawo, nentlakamhlope uya kuyibeka pezu kwawo." 
Leviticus2:2 Waeya kuwuzisa konyana baka‐Arone, kubaperisite; ati omnye abambe kwa kona ngento ezalisa isandla sake kumgubo ocolekileyo wawo, nakwioli yawo, kunye nayo yonke intlakamhlope yawo; aze umperisite asitshise isikunjuzelwa sawo pezu kwesibingelo, sibe ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Leviticus2:3 Oko kuseleyo kumnikelo wokudla, kwoba kokuka‐Arone nokwonyana bake: uyinto eyingcwelekazi kuyo iminikelo eyenziwayo ngomlilo kayehova." 
Leviticus2:4 Naxeshekweni uya kunikela ngomnikelo ongowokudla, into eyojiweyo eziko, woba ngowezingenagwele izonkana zomgubo ocolekileyo zinyeliwe ngeoli, nezingenagwele izonkanyana zitanjisiwe ngeoli." 
Leviticus2:5 Nokuba umnikelo wako ungowokudla owojiwayo elukambeni, woba ngowomgubo ocolekileyo ongenagwele, unyeliwe ngeoli." 
Leviticus2:6 Uya kuwuqezula emaqezwini, uze ugalele ioli pezu kwawo: ngumnikelo wokudla wona." 
Leviticus2:7 Ukuba kanjalo ungowokudla opekwayo embizeni umnikelo wako, uya kwenziwa ngomgubo ocolekileyo uneoli." 
Leviticus2:8 Wauya kuzisa umnikelo wokudla owenziweyo ngezizinto kuyehova; andule ati umperisite, akunikelwa wona, awusondeze esibingelweni." 
Leviticus2:9 Waye umperisite eya kususa kumnikelo wokudla isikunjuzelwa sawo, asitshise pezu kwesibingelo: ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Leviticus2:10 Oko kuseleyo kumnikelo wokudla, kwoba kokuka‐Arone nokwonyana bake: uyinto eyingcwelekazi kuyo iminikelo eyenziwayo ngomlilo kayehova." 
Leviticus2:11 Akuko mnikelo wokudla, eniya kunikela ngawo kuyehova, oya kwenziwa ngegwele; ngokuba igwele nobusi ningayi kutshisa nanye into enazo ibe ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova:" 
Leviticus2:12 umnikelo wolibo niya kunikela wona unazo kuyehova; kodwa azisayi kunyukela esibingelweni libe livumba elimnandi. 
Leviticus2:13 Nayo yonke iminikelo yomnikelo wokudla wako uya kumvumvuzela yona ngetyuwa; kanjako akuyi kupelisa ityuwa yocebano lwotixo wako kuwo umnikelo wokudla wako: yonke iminikelo yako uya kuyinikela inetyuwa. 
Leviticus2:14 Naxeshekweni uya kunikela ngomnikelo wokudla welibo zako kuyehova, ngezikwebu eziluhlaza zenqolowa zojiwe ngomlilo, ngenqolowa ecutyiweyo ezikwebini ezibonxileyo, uya kunikela umnikelo wokudla welibo zako." 
Leviticus2:15 Wauya kubeka ioli pezu kwawo, nentlakamhlope uya kuyibeka pezu kwawo: ngumnikelo wokudla wona." 
Leviticus2:16 Waye umperisite eya kutshisa isikunjuzelwa sawo, inxenye yenqolowa ecutyiweyo yawo, nenxenye yeoli yawo, kunye nayo yonke intlakamhlope yawo: ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Leviticus3:1 KANJAKO ukuba ngumbingo woxolo umnikelo wake: ukuba uyanikela ngenkomo, nokuba yinkunzi, nokuba yimazi, woyinikela emsulwa ebusweni bukayehova." 
Leviticus3:2 Waeya kulalisa isandla sake pezu kwentloko yomnikelo wake, awuxe̔le ngaselucangweni lwentente yentlangano; boti onyana baka‐Arone, abaperisite, basasaze igazi pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo:" 
Leviticus3:3 andule awunikele uvela kulombingo woxolo umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova; inqata eligubungela umbilini, nalo lonke inqata elipezu kwombilini," 
Leviticus3:4 nezintso zombini, nenqata elipezu kwazo, elingasezintsendweni; nendawo ezizengezelayo pezu kwesibindi, kunye nezintso, wozisusa." 
Leviticus3:5 Baye onyana baka‐Arone beya kutshisa lona esibingelweni, pezu kwedini lokutshiswa, elipezu kwenkuni ezisemlilweni: ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Leviticus3:6 Ukuba kanjalo uvela ezinkomeni ezincinane umnikelo wake, ube ngumbingo woxolo kuyehova; nokuba yinkunzi, nokuba yimazi, woyinikela imsulwa." 
Leviticus3:7 Ukuba yimvana anikela ngayo umnikelo wake, makanikele yona ebusweni bukayehova." 
Leviticus3:8 Waeya kulalisa isandla sake pezu kwentloko yomnikelo wake, awuxe̔le pambi kwentente yentlangano; boti onyana baka‐Arone basasaze igazi lawo pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo:" 
Leviticus3:9 andule awunikele uvela kulombingo woxolo umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova; inqata lawo, umsila upela, aya kuwususa kufupi nomqolo, nenqata eligubungela umbilini, nalo lonke inqata elipezu kwombilini,"
