Leviticus3:10 nezintso zombini, nenqata elipezu kwazo, elingasezintsendweni; nendawo ezizengezelayo pezu kwesibindi, kunye nezintso, wozisusa." 
Leviticus3:11 Lona umperisite wolitshisa esibingelweni: kukutya kwomnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova. 
Leviticus3:12 Nokuba yibokwe umnikelo wake, makayinikele ebusweni bukayehova." 
Leviticus3:13 Waeya kulalisa isandla sake pezu kwentloko yayo, ayixe̔le pambi kwentente yentlangano; boti onyana baka‐Arone balisasaze igazi layo pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo:" 
Leviticus3:14 andule awunikele uvela kwa kuyo umnikelo wake, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova; inqata eligubungela umbilini, nalo lonke inqata elipezu kwombilini," 
Leviticus3:15 nezintso zombini, nenqata elipezu kwazo, elingasezintsendweni; nendawo ezizengezelayo pezu kwesibindi, kunye nezintso, woyisusa." 
Leviticus3:16 Lamanqata umperisite wowatshisa esibingelweni: kukutya kwomnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, libe livumba elimnandi; lonke inqata le— likayehova." 
Leviticus3:17 Kwoba ngummiselwa ongunapakade ezizukulwaneni zenu, kuzo zonke indawo zokuhlala zenu, okokuba ningadli nenqata negazi." 
Leviticus4:1 WALEKELA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus4:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Nxa onayo umntu ngesiposo ngakweminye imiyalelo kayehova, ngezinto ezinga zingenziwa, enze into ngakwomnye kuyo:" 
Leviticus4:3 ukuba umperisite otanjisiweyo uya kwona libe lityala labantu, makanikele ngenxa yesono sake onileyo ngaso, inkunzana elitole lenkomo emsulwa kuyehova, ibe lidini lesono." 
Leviticus4:4 Waeya kuzisa inkunzana leyo elucangweni lwentente yentlangano pambi kwoyehova; aze alalise isandla sake pezu kwentloko yenkunzana, ayixe̔le inkunzana pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus4:5 Andule ati umperisite otanjisiweyo acapule egazini lenkunzana, alizise ententeni yentlangano:" 
Leviticus4:6 ati umperisite kanjalo awufake umnwe wake egazini; aze ati fefe kwelogazi amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe ebusweni bukayehova, pambi kwekuselo leyingcwele indawo." 
Leviticus4:7 Waye umperisite eya kubeka inxenye yelogazi pezu kwempondo zesibingelo sesiqumiso esimnandi ebusweni bukayehova, esisententeni yentlangano; nalo lonke elinye igazi lenkunzana woligalela ngasesekweni lesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa, esisemnyango wentente yentlangano." 
Leviticus4:8 Kanjako lonke inqata lenkunzana yedini lesono uya kulisusa kuyo; inqata eligubungela umbilini, nalo lonke inqata elipezu kwombilini," 
Leviticus4:9 nezintso zombini, nenqata elipezu kwazo, elingasezintsendweni; nendawo ezizengezelayo pezu kwesibindi, kunye nezintso, wozisusa," 
Leviticus4:10 njengokuba zibe zisuswa kuyo inkomo yombingo woxolo: lamanqata umperisite wowatshisa pezu kwesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa. 
Leviticus4:11 Kodwa isikumba senkunzana, nayo yonke inyama yayo, kunye nentloko yayo, nakunye nentungo zayo, nombilini wayo, nomswane wayo," 
Leviticus4:12 kwa inkunzana leyo ipela woyikupela pandle kwomnquba, endaweni emhlope, apo ututu lugalelwa kona, ayitshise pezu kwenkuni ngomlilo: ngasekugalelweni kwotutu iya kutshiswa." 
Leviticus4:13 Ukuba kanjalo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli iya kuposisa, ize ifihlwe indawo emehlweni omhlambi, nxa benzile into ngakw omnye kuyo yonke imiyalelo kayehova, ngezinto ezinga zingenziwa, bada banetyala;" 
Leviticus4:14 kwoti ke, sakwazeka esosono bonile ngaso ngakuwo, wandule umhlambi unikele ngenkunzana elitole lenkomo, ibe lidini lesono, uyizise pambi kwentente yentlangano;" 
Leviticus4:15 baze abadala bentlanganiso balalise izandla zabo pezu kwentloko yenkunzana ebusweni bukayehova, iti inkunzana ixe̔lwe pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus4:16 Andule umperisite otanjisiweyo azise inxenye yegazi lenkunzana ententeni yentlangano. 
Leviticus4:17 Waye umperisite eya kufaka umnwe wake, acapule kwelogazi, ati fefe amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe ebusweni bukayehova, pambi kwekuselo." 
Leviticus4:18 Nakulo igazi elo uya kubeka inxenye pezu kwempondo zesibingelo esipambi kwoyehova, esisententeni yentlangano; aze agalele lonke elinye igazi ngasesekweni lesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa, esisemnyango wentente yentlangano." 
Leviticus4:19 Nalo lonke inqata layo wolisusa kuyo, alitshise pezu kwesibingelo." 
Leviticus4:20 Waeya kwenzela lenkunzana, njengokuba ebesenzela inkunzana yedini lesono; uya kwenzela le ngokunjalo: woti umperisite abaxolisele, baze baxolelwe." 
Leviticus4:21 Nenkunzana leyo woyikupela pandle kwomnquba, atshise yona njengokuba ebeyitshisa inkunzana yokuqala: lidini lesono lomhlambi yona." 
Leviticus4:22 Oko oyinkosi aya kwona, enze into ngakw omnye kuyo yonke imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wake, ngezinto ezinga zingenziwa, ngesiposo, ade abe netyala;" 
Leviticus4:23 ngati umhlaumbi kuyaziswa kuye isono sake onileyo ngaso; uya kwandula azisele umnikelo wake itakane lebokwe, liyinkunzi emsulwa." 
Leviticus4:24 Waeya kulalisa isandla sake pezu kwentloko yebokwe, ayixe̔le endaweni apo kuxe̔lwa kona idini lokutshiswa pambi kwoyehova: lidini lesono yona." 
Leviticus4:25 Andule umperisite acapule egazini ledini lesono ngomnwe wake, alibeke pezu kwempondo zaso isibingelo sedini lokutshiswa; n elinye igazi lalo uya kugalela lona ngasesekweni lesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa." 
Leviticus4:26 Nalo lonke inqata lalo wolitshisa pezu kwesibingelo, njengalo inqata lombingo woxolo; woti umperisite amenzele uxoliso ngenxa yesono sake, size simxolelwe." 
Leviticus4:27 Naxeshekweni omnye wasebantwini belizwe onayo ngesiposo, ngokwenza kwake into ngakw omnye kuyo imiyalelo kayehova, ngezinto ezinga zingenziwa, ade abe netyala;" 
Leviticus4:28 ngati umhlaumbi kuyaziswa kuye isono sake onileyo ngaso; uya kwandula azisele umnikelo wake itakane lebokwe, liyimazi emsulwa, ngenxa yesono sake onileyo ngaso." 
Leviticus4:29 Waeya kulalisa isandla sake pezu kwentloko yedini lesono, alixe̔le idini lesono endaweni yedini lokutshiswa." 
Leviticus4:30 Andule umperisite acapule egazini lalo ngomnwe wake, alibeke pezu kwempondo zaso isibingelo sedini lokutshiswa; nalo lonke elinye igazi lalo uya kugalela lona ngasesekweni lesibingelo eso." 
Leviticus4:31 Kanjako lonke inqata lalo wolisusa, njengokuba inqata lisuswa kuwo umbingo woxolo; waye umperisite eya kulitshisa pezu kwesibingelo, libe livumba elimnandi kuyehova: woti umperisite amenzele uxoliso, aze axolelwe." 
Leviticus4:32 Kodwa ukuba uyazisela umnikelo wake imvana ibe lidini lesono, yoba yimazi emsulwa aya kuyizisa." 
Leviticus4:33 Waeya kulalisa isandla sake pezu kwentloko yedini lesono, ayixe̔le imvanakazi ibe lidini lesono endaweni apo kuxe̔lwa kona idini lokutshiswa." 
Leviticus4:34 Andule umperisite acapule egazini ledini lesono ngomnwe wake, alibeke pezu kwempondo zaso isibingelo sedini lokutshiswa; nalo lonke elinye igazi lalo uya kugalela lona ngasesekweni lesibingelo eso." 
Leviticus4:35 Kanjako lonke inqata lalo wolisusa, njengokuba inqata lemvana lisuswa kuwo umbingo woxolo; waye umperisite eya kutshisa amanqata lawo esibingelweni, pezu kweminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova: woti umperisite amenzele uxoliso ngenxa yesono sake onileyo ngaso, size simxolelwe." 
Leviticus5:1 XESHEKWENI umntu onayo, ekubeni elivile ilizwi lesifungiso, elinqi̔na nje, nokuba ubonile, nokuba wazile; ukuba akaxeleli, uya kutwala inkohlakalo yake." 
Leviticus5:2 Naxeshekweni umntu acukumisayo enye into enco̔lileyo, nokuba sisidumbu sesilo esinco̔lileyo, nokuba sisidumbu senkomo enco̔lileyo, nokuba sisidumbu sesinambuzane esinco̔lileyo, kuze kumfihlelwe; unco̔lile naye, unetyala." 
Leviticus5:3 Naxeshekweni acukumisayo ukunco̔la kwomntu, noko ukunco̔la kwake kunjanina anco̔lisiwe ngako, kuze kumfihlelwe; woti akukwazi, abe netyala." 
Leviticus5:4 Naxeshekweni umntu afungayo, enxama ukuteta ngomlomo ukuba enze okubi, umhlaumbi ukuba enze okulungileyo, noko kuyinto enjanina umntu uya kunxama ukuyiteta ngesifungo, kuze kumfihlelwe; woti akukwazi, abe netyala ngenye yezi zinto." 
Leviticus5:5 Kwakuya kuti, nxa anetyala ngenye yezi zinto, uya kuxela ukuba wonile ngalo nto:" 
Leviticus5:6 waeya kuzisela ityala lake kuyehova, ngenxa yesono sake onileyo ngaso, imazi yasezinkomeni ezincinane, imvanakazi umhlaumbi itakanekazi lebokwe, ibe lidini lesono; ati umperisite amenzele uxoliso ngenxa yesono sake." 
Leviticus5:7 Kodwa ukuba isandla sake asinakufikela okwanele inkomo encinane, makazisele ityala lake, onileyo ngalo, amahobe abe mabini, umhlaumbi amatole ezuba abe mabini, kuyehova; elinye libe leledini lesono, elinye libe leledini lokutshiswa." 
Leviticus5:8 Uya kuzisa wona kumperisite, oya kunikela eledini lesono kuqala, alinyikile intloko ngasentanyeni, angalahluli kanye kodwa." 
Leviticus5:9 Waeya kufefa ngegazi ledini lesono pezu kwecala lesibingelo; koko isisalela segazi liya kufocelwa ngasesekweni lesibingelo: lidini lesono lona. 
Leviticus5:10 Nelesibini uya kulenza idini lokutshiswa, njengesiko; ati umperisite amenzele uxoliso ngenxa yesono sake onileyo ngaso, size simxolelwe." 
Leviticus5:11 Kodwa ukuba isandla sake asinakufikela amahobe amabini, umhlaumbi amatole ezuba amabini, makazisele umnikelo wake, lowo owonileyo, eseshumi isiqingata seyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo ube lidini lesono; akayi kubeka pezu kwawo ioli, akayi kubeka pezu kwawo intlakamhlope kanjalo: ngokuba wona ulidini lesono." 
Leviticus5:12 Andule awuzise kumperisite, ati umperisite abambe kuwo into ezalisa isandla sake, isikunjuzelwa sawo, asitshise pezu kwesibingelo, pezu kwayo iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova: ulidini lesono wona." 
Leviticus5:13 Waye umperisite eya kumenzela uxoliso ngenxa yesono sake onileyo ngaso ngenye yezi zinto, size simxolelwe; siti isisalela sibe sesomperisite, njengawo umnikelo wokudla." 
Leviticus5:14 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus5:15 Nxa agqita umntu ngesigqito, one nokwona ngesiposo, kwezingcwele izinto zikayehova; uya kwandula azisele ityala lake kuyehova inkunzi yegusha emsulwa ivela emhlambini, ngokulinganisa kwako neshekele zesilivere, ezingangeshekele yeyingcwele indawo, ibe lidini letyala." 
Leviticus5:16 Nalonto onileyo ngayo kweyingcwele into woyibuyekezela, nesesihlanu isiqingata sayo uya kusongeza pezu kwayo, ayinike kumperisite; woti umperisite amenzele uxoliso ngenkunzi yegusha yedini letyala, aze axolelwe." 
Leviticus5:17 Naxeshekweni umntu onayo, enze into ngakw omnye kuyo yonke imiyalelo kayehova, ngezinto ezinga zingenziwa; nakuba engayazi, unetyala noko; uya kutwala nenkohlakalo yake." 
Leviticus5:18 Waeya kuzisa inkunzi yegusha emsulwa ivela emhlambini, njengokulinganisa kwako, ibe lidini letyala, kumperisite; woti umperisite amenzele uxoliso ngenxa yesiposo sake aposisile ngaso, abengasazi; sasiya kumxolelwa." 
Leviticus5:19 Lidini letyala yona; unetyala ngenyaniso kuye uyehova. 
Leviticus6:1 Wateta uyehova kanjalo ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus6:2 Ukuba umntu uyona, agqite ngesigqito ngakuye uyehova, amxokise ummelwane wake ngento enikelwe ekugcineni kwake, umhlaumbi ngento ebekelwe kuye, umhlaumbi ngento epangiweyo; ati umhlaumbi amlumkise ummelwane wake," 
Leviticus6:3 umhlaumbi afumane into elahlekileyo, aze axoke ngayo, afunge ngobuxoki; kwenye yezizinto zonke azenzayo umntu, esona ngazo;" 
Leviticus6:4 kwoti ke, ngokuba onile, enetyala nje, wobuyisa lonto epangiweyo owayipangayo, umhlaumbi lonzuzo ingalungileyo walumkisa ngayo, umhlaumbi lonto yokugcinelwa ebinikelwa ekugcineni kwake, umhlaumbi lonto ilahlekileyo owayifumanayo," 
Leviticus6:5 umhlaumbi enye into kuko konke asukuba efungile pezu kwako ngobuxoki; wobuyekezela yona ngenani layo, nesesihlanu isiqingata salo wosongeza pezu kwalo; kulowo into iyeyake woyinika ngomhla wetyala lake." 
Leviticus6:6 Waeya kuzisela ityala lake kuyehova, inkunzi yegusha emsulwa ivela emhlambini, njengokulinganisa kwako, ibe lidini letyala, kumperisite;" 
Leviticus6:7 woti umperisite amenzele uxoliso ebusweni bukayehova, kwakuya kumxolelwa pezu kwenye into kuko konke asukuba ekwenzile anetyala ngayo." 
Leviticus6:8 WABUYA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus6:9 Yalela u‐Arone nonyana bake, ngokuti: Nguwo lo umteto wedini lokutshiswa: lidini lokutshiswa lona, ngenxa yokuvuta pezu kwesibingelo bonke ubusuku kude kuse, ngokuba umlilo wesibingelo uya kuhlala uvuta kuso." 
Leviticus6:10 Woti umperisite ayambate ingubo yake yeqiya, nebrukwe yeqiya ayambate pezu kwenyama yake, aze asuse ututu, oko umlilo seugqibele idini lokutshiswa pezu kwesibingelo, alubeke ngasecaleni lesibingelo." 
Leviticus6:11 Andule atule izivato zake, ambate izivato zimbi, apume notutu olo ukuya ngapandle kwomnquba, endaweni emhlope." 
Leviticus6:12 Waye umlilo esibingelweni uya kuhlala uvuta kuso; awusayi kucinywa; umperisite uya kupemba inkuni pezu kwawo imiso ngemiso, acwangcise nedini lokutshiswa pezu kwawo; waeya kutshisa pezu kwawo inqata leminikelo yoxolo." 
Leviticus6:13 Umlilo womana uvuta futi esibingelweni; awusayi kucinywa. 
Leviticus6:14 Kanjalo nguwo lo umteto womnikelo wokudla: wona omnye wonyana baka‐Arone wowunikela ebusweni bukayehova, ngapambi kwesibingelo." 
Leviticus6:15 Waeya kususa kuwo ngento ezalisa isandla sake, kwa kuwo umgubo ocolekileyo womnikelo wokudla, nakuyo ioli yawo, nayo yonke intlakamhlope epezu kwawo umnikelo wokudla; andule atshise pezu kwesibingelo, libe livumba elimnandi, isikunjuzelwa sawo, kuyehova." 
Leviticus6:16 Nokuseleyo kuwo baya kukudla u‐Arone nonyana bake: kwotyiwa kungenagwele endaweni eyingcwele; ebaleni lentente yentlangano baya kukudla. 
Leviticus6:17 Akuyi kwojwa kubilisiwe: kusisabelwa sabo endibanikile sona, kuyo iminikelo yam eyenziwa ngomlilo; kuyinto eyingcwelekazi, njengedini lesono, nanjengedini letyala." 
Leviticus6:18 Konke okubudoda pakati kwabantwana baka‐Arone kuya kukutya. Ngummiselwa ongunapakade ezizukulwaneni zenu ngayo iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova: konke okuyicukumisayo kwoba kungcwele. 
Leviticus6:19 Waye uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus6:20 Nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Arone nonyana bake, abaya kunikela ngawo kuyehova ngomhla wokutanjiswa kwake: eseshumi isiqingata seyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, ube ngumnikelo wokudla ofuti; esinye isiqingata sawo kwakusa, nesinye isiqingata sawo kwakuhlwa." 
Leviticus6:21 Pezu kwokamba uya kwenziwa ngeoli; unyakanyisiwe uya kuwuzisa; n amaqezu ojiweyo omnikelo wokudla uya kunikela wona abe livumba elimnandi kuyehova. 
Leviticus6:22 Umperisite otanjisiweyo esikundleni sake konyana bake wowunikela: ngummiselwa ongunapakade kuyehova; wogqityelwa ukutshiswa. 
Leviticus6:23 Ngokuba yonke iminikelo yokudla yomperisite iya kugqityelwa ukutshiswa; ayisayi kutyiwa. 
Leviticus6:24 Wati kanjalo uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus6:25 Teta ku‐Arone nakonyana bake, usiti: Nguwo lo umteto wedini lesono: endaweni apo kuxe̔lwayo idini lokutshiswa, liya kuxe̔lwa kona idini lesono ebusweni bukayehova: liyinto eyingcwelekazi lona." 
Leviticus6:26 Umperisite olinikelayo ngenxa yesono uya kulidla; kweyingcwele indawo liya kudliwa, ebaleni lentente yentlangano." 
Leviticus6:27 Konke okuyicukumisayo inyama yalo kwoba kungcwele: naxeshekweni kufefiwe ngegazi lalo pezu kwesivato, lonto kwafefwa pezu kwayo woyihlanza endaweni eyingcwele:" 
Leviticus6:28 kodwa into yodongwe lipekiwe kuyo iya kuqekezwa; ukuba kanti lipekiwe entweni yexina, iya kuhlanjululwa yona, iyalazwe ngamanzi." 
Leviticus6:29 Konke okubudoda pakati kwabaperisite kuya kulidla: liyinto eyingcwelekazi lona. 
Leviticus6:30 Kodwa onke amadini esono, ekuziswa inxenye yegazi lawo ententeni yentlangano, kuze kuxoliswe kweyingcwele indawo, wona akasayi kudliwa; aya kutshiswa ngomlilo." 
Leviticus7:1 Kanjalo nguwo lo umteto wedini letyala: liyinto eyingcwelekazi lona. 
Leviticus7:2 Endaweni apo kuxe̔lwayo idini lokutshiswa, liya kuxe̔lwa kona idini letyala; negazi lalo wolisasaza pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo." 
Leviticus7:3 Nakulo uya kunikela lonke inqata lalo, umsila, nenqata eligubungela umbilini," 
Leviticus7:4 nezintso zombini, nenqata elipezu kwazo, elingasezintsendweni; nendawo ezizengezelayo pezu kwesibindi, kunye nezintso, wozisusa." 
Leviticus7:5 Waye umperisite eya kutshisa amanqata lawo esibingelweni, abe ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova: lidini letyala." 
Leviticus7:6 Konke okubudoda pakati kwabaperisite kuya kulidla; endaweni eyingcwele liya kudliwa: liyinto eyingcwelekazi lona. 
Leviticus7:7 Njengedini lesono, likwa njalo idini letyala; anomteto umnye: umperisite owenzayo uxoliso ngalo, loba lelake." 
Leviticus7:8 Kanjako umperisite onikelayo idini lokutshiswa lomntu, isikumba sedini lokutshiswa anikele ngalo soba sesake lowamperisite." 
Leviticus7:9 Nako konke okwomnikelo wokudla okwojiweyo eziko, nako konke okwenziweyo embizeni napezu kwokamba, kwoba kokwomperisite owunikelayo." 
Leviticus7:10 Kodwa yonke iminikelo yokudla enyeliweyo ngeoli, neyomileyo, bonke onyana baka‐Arone boba nayo, omnye njengomnye." 
Leviticus7:11 Nguwo lo nomteto wombingo woxolo, aya kunikela wona kuyehova." 
Leviticus7:12 Ukuba uyawunikela ube ngumbulelo, makanikele kunye nombingo wombulelo izonkana ezingenagwele zinyeliwe ngeoli, nezonkanyana ezingenagwele zitanjisiwe ngeoli; nomgubo ocolekileyo unyakanyisiwe, izonkana zinyeliwe ngeoli." 
Leviticus7:13 Ngapandle kwezonkana ez o, uya kunikelela umnikelo wake isonka esibilisiweyo, kunye nombingo wombulelo weminikelo yoxolo yake." 
Leviticus7:14 Nakuso uya kunikela esinye kuwo wonke umnikelo sibe ngumnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa kuyehova; soba sesalomperisite otshizayo igazi leminikelo yoxolo. 
Leviticus7:15 Nenyama yombingo wombulelo weminikelo yoxolo yake, yona iya kutyiwa kwa ngomhla wokunikelwa kwayo; akuyi kushiywa nto kude kuse." 
Leviticus7:16 Kodwa ukuba sisibambiso, umhlaumbi ngumnikelo wesisa, umbingo wokunikela kwake, uya kutyiwa wona ngomhla aya kunikela umbingo wake ngawo; kwoti nangomnye umhla kudliwe okuseleyo kuwo:" 
Leviticus7:17 koko okuseleyo kwinyama yombingo ngowesitatu umhla kuya kutshiswa ngomlilo. 
Leviticus7:18 Nokuba kuka kudliwe enyameni yombingo woxolo wake ngowesitatu umhla, akayi kubukwa lowo oyinikelayo, ayiyi kumbalelwa, yoba yinto edlubukileyo; nomntu otyayo kuyo, yena uya kutwala inkohlakalo yake." 
Leviticus7:19 Kanjako inyama ecukumisayo enye into enco̔lileyo ayiyi kudliwa; iya kutshiswa ngomlilo; kanti inyama engenjalo, lonyama bonke abacocekileyo baya kutya yona." 
Leviticus7:20 Kodwa lowamntu odlayo inyama yombingo woxolo, ongo kayehova, enokunco̔la kwake pezu kwake, uya kunqanyulwa lowamntu ebantwini bake." 
Leviticus7:21 Naxeshekweni umntu acukumisayo enye into enco̔lileyo, ukunco̔la kwomntu, umhlaumbi isilo esinco̔lileyo, umhlaumbi enye intshontsho enco̔lileyo, aze atye kuyo inyama yombingo woxolo, ongo kayehova, uya kunqanyulwa lowamntu ebantwini bake." 
Leviticus7:22 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus7:23 Teta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Lonke inqata lenkomo, nelegusha, nelebokwe, aniyi kulidla." 
Leviticus7:24 Inqata lesidumbu, nenqata lento eqwengiweyo, lingapatwa emisebenzini yonke; kodwa anikuka nilidle nakanye." 
Leviticus7:25 Ngokuba osukuba esidla inqata lenkomo, ekunikelwe ngayo umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova, kwa lowamntu olidlayo wonqanyulwa ebantwini bake." 
Leviticus7:26 Kanjako lonke igazi aniyi kulidla kuzo zonke indawo zokuhlala zenu, elentaka nelenkomo." 
Leviticus7:27 Umntu osukuba esidla elinye igazi, uya kunqanyulwa lowamntu ebantwini bake." 
Leviticus7:28 Wateta uyehova kanjalo ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus7:29 Teta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Lowo onikelayo ngombingo woxolo wake kuyehova, makazise umnikelo wake kuyehova uvela kuwo umbingo woxolo wake." 
Leviticus7:30 Ezake izandla ziya kuzisa iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova; inqata pezu kwesifuba wolizisa kunye nesifuba eso, ukuba sishukushukunyiswe sona sibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa ebusweni bukayehova." 
Leviticus7:31 Waye umperisite eya kutshisa elonqata pezu kwesibingelo; kodwa isifuba soba sesika‐Arone nesonyana bake. 
Leviticus7:32 Nowokunene umkono niya kunika wona kumperisite ube ngumnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa, kuyo imibingo yoxolo yenu." 
Leviticus7:33 Lowo onikelayo igazi leminikelo yoxolo, nenqata, kubo onyana baka‐Arone, woba ngowake umkono wokunene ube sisahlulelwa sake." 
Leviticus7:34 Ngokuba isifuba sokushukushukunyiswa nomkono wokufunqufunqulwa ndizicapule elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, kuyo imibingo yoxolo yalo, ndazinika ku‐Arone umperisite, nakonyana bake, ngommiselo ongunapakade, zivela kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Leviticus7:35 Oku kukokwokutanjiswa kuka‐Arone, nokwokutanjiswa kwonyana bake, kuvela kuyo iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova, emhleni abebasondeza ukuza kukonza ngobuperisite kuyehova;" 
Leviticus7:36 oko uyehova waxela ukuba kunikwe kubo, emhleni wokubatambisa kwake, lusapo luka‐Sirayeli, ube ngummiselwa ongunapakade ngezizukulwana zalo." 
Leviticus7:37 Nguwo lo umteto wedini lokutshiswa, n owomnikelo wokudla, nowedini lesono, nowedini letyala, noweminikelo yokuzalisa, nowombingo woxolo;" 
Leviticus7:38 lowo uyehova wayalela u‐Mosesi ngawo entabeni ye‐Sinai, emhleni wayalelayo usapo luka‐Sirayeli ukuba lunikele iminikelo yalo kuyehova, entlango ye‐Sinai." 
Leviticus8:1 WALEKELA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus8:2 Tabata u‐Arone nonyana bake kunye naye, nezivato, neoli yokutambisa, nenkunzana yedini lesono, nenkunzi zegusha zimbini, nesitya sezonka ezingenagwele;" 
Leviticus8:3 uze ubutele yonke intlanganiso elucangweni lwentente yentlangano. 
Leviticus8:4 Wenza u‐Mosesi njengokuba wabemyalela uyehova; yaza yonke intlanganiso yabutelwa elucangweni lwentente yentlangano. 
Leviticus8:5 Wandula wati u‐Mosesi entlanganisweni: Yiyo le into uyehova ayalele ngayo ukuba yenziwe. 
Leviticus8:6 Waye u‐Mosesi wasondeza u‐Arone nonyana bake, wabahlamba ngamanzi." 
Leviticus8:7 Waza wamfaka ihempe, wambinqisa uqwemesha, wamambatisa ingubo; wamfaka neyefodi, wambinqisa nombinqo ocikiziweyo weyefodi, wayibopa kuye ngawo." 
Leviticus8:8 Wayebeka pezu kwake imbeka, wafaka embekeni i‐Urime ne‐Tumime." 
Leviticus8:9 Wabeka nonkontsho pezu kwentloko yake; napezu kwonkontsho, ngakubo ubuso bake, wabeka imbasa yegolide, ikrone engcwele; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus8:10 Waza u‐Mosesi watabata ioli yokutambisa, watambisa itabanakele nento zonke ezikuyo, wazingcwalisa." 
Leviticus8:11 Wayefefa ngayo pezu kwesibingelo amaxesha asixe̔nxe, watambisa isibingelo nazo zonke impahla zaso, kunye nesihlambelo nesikondo saso, zize zingcwaliswe." 
Leviticus8:12 Nenxenye yeoli yokutambisa wayigalela pezu kwentloko ka‐Arone, wamtambisa, ukuba amngcwalise." 
Leviticus8:13 Waza u‐Mosesi wabasondeza onyana baka‐Arone, wabavatisa ihempe, wababinqisa ingqwemesha, wabopa kubo iminqwazi; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus8:14 Wandula wayisondeza inkunzana yedini lesono; bati u‐Arone nonyana bake balalisa izandla zabo pezu kwentloko yenkunzana yedini lesono. 
Leviticus8:15 Kwaye kuxe̔lwa ke; waza u‐Mosesi watabata igazi, walibeka ezimpondweni zesibingelo ngento engqongayo ngomnwe wake, wasihlambulula isibingelo; wandula waligalela igazi ngasesekweni lesibingelo, wasingcwalisa, kuze kwenziwe uxoliso pezu kwaso." 
Leviticus8:16 Wayetabata lonke inqata elipezu kwombilini, nendawo ezizengezelayo zesibindi, nezintso zombini, nenqata lazo; waza u‐Mosesi walitshisa esibingelweni." 
Leviticus8:17 Kodwa inkunzana nesikumba sayo, inyama yayo nomswane wayo, wazitshisa ngomlilo ngapandle kwomnquba; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus8:18 Wandula wasondeza inkunzi yegusha yedini lokutshiswa; bati u‐Arone nonyana bake balalisa izandla zabo pezu kwentloko yenkunzi yegusha. 
Leviticus8:19 Kwaye kuxe̔lwa ke; waza u‐Mosesi walisasaza igazi pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo. 
Leviticus8:20 Nenkunzi yegusha wayicanda ezitweni zayo; waye u‐Mosesi watshisa intloko, nezito, nenqata;" 
Leviticus8:21 kodwa umbilini nentungo wazihlanza ngamanzi; waza u‐Mosesi watshisa lonkunzi yegusha ipela esibingelweni: ibilidini lokutshiswa libe livumba elimnandi, ibingumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus8:22 Wandula wayisondeza eyesibini inkunzi yegusha, inkunzi yegusha yokuzalisa; bati u‐Arone nonyana bake balalisa izandla zabo pezu kwentloko yenkunzi yegusha." 
Leviticus8:23 Kwaye kuxe̔lwa ke; waza u‐Mosesi wacapula kwigazi layo, walibeka pezu kwesitinzi seyokunene indlebe ka‐Arone, napezu kwesitupa sesokunene isandla sake, napezu kwobontsi wolwokunene unyawo lwake." 
Leviticus8:24 Wasondeza onyana baka‐Arone nabo; waye u‐Mosesi wabeka inxenye yegazi elo pezu kwesitinzi seyokunene indlebe yabo, napezu kwesitupa sesokunene isandla sabo, napezu kwobontsi wolwokunene unyawo lwabo: wati kanjalo u‐Mosesi wasasaza igazi pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo." 
Leviticus8:25 Waza watabata inqata, nomsila, nalo lonke inqata elipezu kwombilini, nendawo ezizengezelayo zesibindi, nezintso zombini, nenqata lazo, nowokunene umkono:" 
Leviticus8:26 nakuso isitya sezonka ezingenagwele, esipambi kwoyehova, watabata isonkana sinye esingenagwele, nesonkana sinye sesonka esineoli, nesonkanyana sikwa sinye, wazibeka pezu kwamanqata lawo, napezu kwowokunene umkono." 
Leviticus8:27 Ezo nto zonke wazinika ezandleni zika‐Arone, nasezandleni zonyana bake, wazishukushukumisa zibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus8:28 Waza u‐Mosesi wazitabata ezandleni zabo, wazitshisa esibingelweni, pezu kwedini lokutshiswa: zayiminikelo yokuzalisa libe livumba elimnandi; ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Leviticus8:29 Kanjako u‐Mosesi watabata isifuba, wasishukushukumisa sibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa pambi kwoyehova: sibe sisisabelwa sika‐Mosesi sivela kuyo inkunzi yegusha yokuzalisa; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus8:30 Wandula u‐Mosesi wacapula kuyo ioli yokutambisa, nakulo igazi elipezu kwesibingelo, wati fefe pezu kwo‐Arone, na pezu kwezivato zake, napezu kwonyana bake, napezu kwezivato zonyana bake kunye naye; wangcwalisa u‐Arone, n ezivato zake, nonyana bake, nezivato zonyana bake kunye naye." 
Leviticus8:31 Waza u‐Mosesi wati ku‐Arone nakonyana bake: Pekani lonyama elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, niyidle kona apo, kwa nesonka esikuso isitya seminikelo yokuzalisa, njengoko ndiyaleleyo, ndisiti: u‐Arone nonyana bake baya kuyidla." 
Leviticus8:32 Nokuseleyo kuyo inyama nakuso isonka niya kukutshisa ngomlilo. 
Leviticus8:33 Kanjalo aniyi kupuma elucangweni lwentente yentlangano imihla ibe sixe̔nxe, ude ubeko umhla wokuzalisekiswa kwayo imihla yeminikelo yokuzalisa yenu: ngokuba yimihla isixe̔nxe kuya kuzaliswa izandla zenu ngayo." 
Leviticus8:34 Njengokuba kwenziwe namhla nje, uyalele uyehova ukuba kwenjwe njalo, ukuze nenzelwe uxoliso." 
Leviticus8:35 Kukona niya kuhlala elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, imini nobusuku, imihla ibe sixe̔nxe, nisigcine isigcinelo sikayehova, ukuze ningafi: ngokuba kungokunjalo endiyalelweyo." 
Leviticus8:36 Bati u‐Arone nonyana bake benza zonke izinto abeziyalele uyehova ngesandla sika‐Mosesi. 
Leviticus9:1 Kwaye kute ngomhla wesibozo, u‐Mosesi wabiza u‐Arone, nonyana bake, nabadala bo‐Sirayeli;" 
Leviticus9:2 wati kuye u‐Arone: Zitabatele inkonyana, itole lenkomo, ibe lidini lesono, nenkunzi yegusha ibe lidini lokutshiswa, ezo zimsulwa, uzisondeze pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus9:3 Uze utete kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Tabatani itakane lebokwe libe lidini lesono, kwa nenkonyana nemvana, zizezomnyaka mnye, zimsulwa, zibe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Leviticus9:4 kwa nenkabi nenkunzi yegusha zibe zezeminikelo yoxolo, kuze kubingelwe ebusweni bukayehova; nomnikelo wokudla unyeliwe ngeoli; ngokuba namhla uyehova eya kubonakala kuni." 
Leviticus9:5 Baza batabata oko wakuyalelayo u‐Mosesi, bakuzisa pambi kwentente yentlangano; yati yonke intlanganiso yasondela, yema pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus9:6 Wayesiti u‐Mosesi: Yilento uyehova ayiyaleleyo ukuba maniyenze; kuze kubonakale kuni ubungcwalisa bukayehova. 
Leviticus9:7 Waye u‐Mosesi wati ku‐Arone: Sondela esibingelweni, ulenze elako idini lesono, nelako idini lokutshiswa; uze ulwenze uxoliso ngenxa yako, nangenxa yabantu; wandule unikele umnikelo wabantu, ubenzele uxoliso; njengokuba eyalele uyehova." 
Leviticus9:8 Waza wasondela u‐Arone esibingelweni, waxe̔la inkonyana yedini lesono, eyelake." 
Leviticus9:9 Basuka onyana baka‐Arone balizisa igazi kuye; waza wafaka umnwe wake egazini elo, walibeka ezimpondweni zesibingelo; wandula wagalela igazi ngasesekweni lesibingelo." 
Leviticus9:10 Kodwa inqata, nezintso, nendawo ezizengezelayo esibindini, kulo idini lesono, wazitshisa pezu kwesibingelo; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus9:11 Kanti inyama nesikumba wazitshisa ngomlilo ngapandle kwomnquba. 
Leviticus9:12 Waza waxe̔la idini lokutshiswa; basuka onyana baka‐Arone bamnikela igazi; owalitshizayo pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo. 
Leviticus9:13 Bamnikela nedini lokutshiswa ngezito zalo, nentloko; owalitshisayo esibingelweni." 
Leviticus9:14 Umbilini nentungo wazihlanza ngamanzi, wazitshisa pezu kwedini lokutshiswa, esibingelweni." 
Leviticus9:15 Waza wasondeza umnikelo wabantu, watabata ibokwe yedini lesono, eyelabantu, wayixe̔la, wayenza idini lesono, njengelokuqala." 
Leviticus9:16 Wasondeza nedini lokutshiswa, walenza njengesiko." 
Leviticus9:17 Wasondeza kanjalo umnikelo wokudla, wazalisa isandla sake kwa kuwo, watshisa oko pezu kwesibingelo, ngapandle kwelokusa idini lokutshiswa." 
Leviticus9:18 Wandula waxe̔la inkabi nenkunzi yegusha zibe ngumbingo woxolo, ongowabantu: basuka onyana baka‐Arone bamnikela igazi, owalitshizayo pezu kwesibingelo ngento engqongayo;" 
Leviticus9:19 kwa namanqata avela kwinkabi nakwinkunzi yegusha, umsila, nelo ligubungela umbilini, nezintso, nendawo ezizengezelayo zesibindi:" 
Leviticus9:20 baye bebeka lamanqata pezu kwazo izifuba; waza watshisa amanqata lawo esibingelweni. 
Leviticus9:21 Kodwa izifuba nowokunene umkono wazishukushukumisa u‐Arone zibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa pambi kwoyehova; njengokuba ebeyalele u‐Mosesi. 
Leviticus9:22 Waye u‐Arone wapakamisa isandla sake ngasebantwini, wabatamsanqelisa; waza wehla, akuba enzile idini lesono, nedini lokutshiswa, neminikelo yoxolo." 
Leviticus9:23 Wandula wangena u‐Mosesi no‐Arone ententeni yentlangano; bapuma ke, batamsanqelisa abantu: bati ubungcwalisa bukayehova babonakala kubo bonke abantu." 
Leviticus9:24 Kwaye kupuma umlilo ebusweni bukayehova, wagqibela pezu kwesibingelo idini lokutshiswa namanqata: bati bakubona bonke abantu, badanduluka ngovuyo, bawa ngobuso babo." 
Leviticus10:1 KEKALOKU onyana baka‐Arone, u‐Nadabi no‐Abihu, batabata omnye ngomnye isiqumelo sake, bafaka kuzo umlilo, babeka pezu kwawo isiqumiso, banikela ebusweni bukayehova umlilo wasemzini, owaengabayalelanga ngawo." 
Leviticus10:2 Kwaza kwapuma umlilo ebusweni bukayehova, wabagqibela; bafa ke pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus10:3 Wandula wati u‐Mosesi ku‐Arone: Koku akutetileyo uyehova, esiti: Ngabo basondela kum ndiya kungcwaliswa, nasebusweni babantu bonke ndiya kuzukiswa. Koko u‐Arone wati cwaka." 
Leviticus10:4 Waza u‐Mosesi wabiza u‐Mishayeli no‐Elitsafane, onyana baka‐Huziyeli, uyisekazi ka‐Arone, wati kubo: Sondelani, susani abazalwana benu pambi kweyingcwele indawo niye ngapandle kwomnquba." 
Leviticus10:5 Basondela ke, babasusa besezihempeni zabo baya ngapandle kwomnquba; njengokuba ebetshilo u‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus10:6 Waza wati u‐Mosesi ku‐Arone, naku‐Elezari, naku‐Yitamare, onyana bake: Intloko zenu ningazihlubululi, nezivato zenu ningaziṙazuli, ukuba ningafi, nokuba kungaqunjelwa yonke intlanganiso; kodwa abazalwana benu, kwa yonke indlu yo‐Sirayeli, mabalilele okukutsha uyehova akupembileyo." 
Leviticus10:7 Aniyi kupuma elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, hleze nife; ngokuba ioli yokutambisa kayehova ipezu kwenu. Baye besenza njengelizwi lika‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus10:8 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Leviticus10:9 Iveyine notywala akuyi kubusela, kwa wena nonyana bako kunye nawe, xeshekweni niya kungena ententeni yentlangano, ukuba ningafi: ngummiselwa ongunapakade ngezizukulwana zenu:" 
Leviticus10:10 nokuba nenze ukwahluka pakati kwokungcwele nokungengcwele, napakati kwokunco̔lileyo nokucocekileyo;" 
Leviticus10:11 nokuba nifundise usapo luka‐Sirayeli yonke imimiso ayitetileyo uyehova kulo ngesandla sika‐Mosesi. 
Leviticus10:12 Waye u‐Mosesi wateta ku‐Arone, naku‐Elezari, naku‐Yitamare, onyana bake abaseleyo, esiti: Tabatani umnikelo wokudla oseleyo kuyo iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova, niwutye ungenagwele kufupi nesibingelo; ngokuba uyinto eyingcwelekazi wona:" 
Leviticus10:13 naniya kuwutya endaweni eyingcwele, ngokokuba wona usisahlulelwa sako, nesahlulelwa sonyana bako, kuyo iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova: ngokuba kungokunjalo endiyalelweyo." 
Leviticus10:14 Kanjako isifuba sokushukushukunyiswa nomkono wokufunqufunqulwa niya kuzidla endaweni emhlope, kwa wena, nonyana bako, nentombi zako kunye nawe: ngokuba zisisahlulelwa sako, nesahlulelwa sonyana bako, eni zipiwe kwimibingo yoxolo yosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Leviticus10:15 Umkono wokufunqufunqulwa nesifuba sokushukushukunyiswa baya kuzizisa kunye neminikelo yamanqata eyenziwa ngomlilo, kuze kushukushukunyiswe umnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa ebusweni bukayehova: oya kuba ngowako, nowonyana bako kunye nawe, ngommiselwa ongunapakade: njengokuba eyalele uyehova." 
Leviticus10:16 Waza u‐Mosesi wafuna kunene ibokwe yedini lesono, kekaloku nantsi itshisiwe: waequmbile ngaku‐Elezari nangaku‐Yitamare, onyana baka‐Arone abaseleyo, esiti:" 
Leviticus10:17 Kunganina ukuba ningatyanga idini lesono endaweni engcwele? ngokuba liyinto eyingcwelekazi lona, nenilipiweyo ukuba nitwale inkohlakalo yentlanganiso, ize nenzele bona uxoliso ebusweni bukayehova." 
Leviticus10:18 Bona ke, akungeniswanga igazi lalo pakati kweyingcwele indawo; ninge nilidlile ngenyaniso kweyingcwele indawo, njengokuba ndiyalele." 
Leviticus10:19 Waza wateta u‐Arone ku‐Mosesi, wati: Bona ke, namhla nje banikele idini lesono labo nedini lokutshiswa labo pambi kwoyehova, nangona izinto ezinje zindihlile; ukuba bendityile idini lesono namhla nje, bekuya kuba kulungile na oko emehlweni kayehova?" 
Leviticus10:20 Wati u‐Mosesi akuva oku, kwakulungile emehlweni ake." 
Leviticus11:1 WANDULA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti kubo:" 
Leviticus11:2 Tetani nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nisiti: Nanzi izinto ezipilileyo eniya kuzidla pakati kwazo zonke izilo ezisemhlabeni." 
Leviticus11:3 Zonke ezilwahlula upupu, ezicanda upupu kubini, ezihlafuna umtyiso, pakati kwezilo, ezona niya kuzidla." 
Leviticus11:4 Ezi noko aniyi kuzidla kwezo zityisayo, nakwezo zilwahlulayo upupu: inkamela, ngokuba ihlafuna umtyiso, kodwa ayahluli upupu; inco̔lile yona kuni:" 
Leviticus11:5 nembila, ngokuba ihlafuna umtyiso, kodwa ayahluli upupu; inco̔lile yona kuni:" 
Leviticus11:6 nomvundla, ngokuba uhlafuna umtyiso, kodwa awahluli upupu; unco̔lile wona kuni:" 
Leviticus11:7 nehangu, ngokuba leyo ilwahlula upupu, icanda upupu kubini kanjalo, kodwa ayihlafuni umtyiso; inco̔lile yona kuni." 
Leviticus11:8 Kwinyama yazo aniyi kudla, nesidumbu sazo aniyi kusicukumisa; zinco̔lile zona kuni." 
Leviticus11:9 Ezi niya kuzidla kwezo zonke ezisemanzini: zonke ezinamapiko nenkwetu emanzini, kuzo ilwandle nakuyo imilambo, ezona niya kuzidla." 
Leviticus11:10 Kodwa zonke ezingenamapiko nenkwetu ezilwandleni nasemilanjeni, kuzo zonke izinambuzane zamanzi, nakuzo zonke izinto ezipilileyo ezisemanzini, zona ziyintshontsho kuni." 
Leviticus11:11 Ewe, zoba yintshontsho kuni; kwinyama yazo aniyi kudla, nezidumbu zazo niya kubala zona ngokuba yintshontsho." 
Leviticus11:12 Zonke izinto ezingenamapiko nenkwetu emanzini, zona zoba yintshontsho kuni." 
Leviticus11:13 Nezi ke niya kuzibala ngokuba yintshontsho pakati kwentaka; aziyi kudliwa, ziyintshontsho: ukozi, nengqanga, nonomakwezane," 
Leviticus11:14 nesanxa, nexalanga ngemmilo yalo;" 
Leviticus11:15 bonke onomyai ngemmilo yabo; 
Leviticus11:16 nenciniba, nondebeza, nogwidi, nontloyiya ngemmilo yake," 
Leviticus11:17 nesikova, nokwalimanzi, nentsikizi," 
Leviticus11:18 nelowe, nencwangube, nengqo," 
Leviticus11:19 neṙaside, uqimgqoshe ngemmilo yake, noboboyi, nelulwane." 
Leviticus11:20 Zonke izinambuzane ezinamapiko, ezihambayo ngamane amanqina, zoba yintshontsho kuni." 
Leviticus11:21 Ezi noko ningazidla kuzo zonke izinambuzane ezinamapiko, ezihambayo ngamane amanqina, ezinentungo ngapezu kwamanqina azo, kuze kutsitywe ngazo emhlabeni;" 
Leviticus11:22 ezi kuzo ningazidla: inkumbi ngemmilo yayo, nesiboto ngemmilo yaso, nomqikela ngemmilo yawo, nomcikwane ngemmilo yawo." 
Leviticus11:23 Kodwa zonke ezinye izinambuzane ezinamapiko ezinamanqina mane, zoba yintshontsho kuni." 
Leviticus11:24 Nezi niya kunco̔liswa ngazo; osukuba ecukumisa isidumbu sazo woba enco̔lile kude kuhlwe. 
Leviticus11:25 Kanjalo osukuba etwele into yesidumbu sazo, uya kuhlanza izivato zake, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:26 Zonke izilo ezahlulayo upupu, kanti azilucandi kubini, zingahlafuni umtyiso kanjako, izidumbu zazo zinco̔lile kuni: osukuba ezicukumisa woba enco̔lile." 
Leviticus11:27 Nazo zonke ezihambayo ngezandla zazo pakati kwazo zonke izinto ezipilileyo ezihambayo ngamane amanqina, ezo zinco̔lile kuni: osukuba ecukumisa isidumbu sazo woba enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:28 Notweleyo isidumbu sazo yena wohlanza izivato zake, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe; zinco̔lile zona kuni." 
Leviticus11:29 Ezi nazo zoba zinco̔lile kuni pakati kwezinambuzane ezinambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba: intuku, nempuku, noxami ngemmilo yake," 
Leviticus11:30 nequngequ, noxebeyi, necilitshe, noṙoqotyeni, nolovane." 
Leviticus11:31 Ezi ke zinco̔lile kuni pakati kwezinto zonke ezinambuzelayo: osukuba ezicukumisa, zakuba zifile, woba enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:32 Kanjako konke iya kuwa pezu kwako enye kuzo, yakuba ifile, kwoba kunco̔lile; nokuba yenye impahla yomti, umhlaumbi sisivato, umhlaumbi yintsuba, umhlaumbi yinxowa, umhlaumbi yenye impahla ekwenziwa umsebenzi ngayo, iya kungeniswa emanzini, ibe inco̔lile kude kuhlwe; yandule icokiseke." 
Leviticus11:33 Nazo zonke impahla zodongwe, iya kweyela pakati kwazo enye kuzo, konke okupakati kwazo kwoba kunco̔lile, nazo zona noziqekeza." 
Leviticus11:34 Kuko konke ukudla okudlekayo, oko aya kuza pezu kwako amanzi anjalo, kwoba kunco̔lile; nalo lwonke uselo oluselekayo kuzo zonke impahla ezinjalo lwoba lunco̔lile." 
Leviticus11:35 Kanjako konke iya kuwa pezu kwako into yesidumbu sazo, kwoba kunco̔lile; nokuba liziko, nokuba ngongxawo, baya kucitwa; banco̔lile, ngako boba benco̔lile kuni." 
Leviticus11:36 Noko umtombo, nomnxuma wokuhlanganisana kwamanzi, woba ucocekile; kodwa lowo ucukumisayo isidumbu sazo woba enco̔lile." 
Leviticus11:37 Naxeshekweni iwayo into yesidumbu sazo pezu kwembewu eyintlwayelelo, eza kuhlwayelwa, yona yoba icocekile." 
Leviticus11:38 Kodwa nxa kubekwa amanzi pezu kwembewu, yandule into yesidumbu sazo iwe pezu kwayo, yoba inco̔lile leyo kuni." 
Leviticus11:39 Nokuya kufayo esinye isilo esidlekayo kuni, ocukumisayo isidumbu saso woba enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:40 Kanjalo odlayo kwisidumbu saso wohlanza izivato zake, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe; nalowo otweleyo isidumbu saso wohlanza izivato zake, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus11:41 Zonke izinambuzane ezinambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba zoba yintshontsho nazo; aziyi kudliwa. 
Leviticus11:42 Konke okuhambayo ngesisu, nako konke okuhambayo ngamane amanqina, nako konke okumanqina maninzi, pakati kwazo zonke izinambuzane ezinambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba, aniyi kukudla; ngokuba kuyintshontsho." 
Leviticus11:43 Aniyi kudlubukisa imipefumlo yenu ngasinye isinambuzane esinambuzelayo; aniyi kuzinco̔lisa ngazo kanjako, ukuba nibe ninco̔lile ngazo." 
Leviticus11:44 Ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu: kukona niya kuzingcwalisa, nibe ngcwele, ngokuba ndingcwele mna; kanjalo aniyi kunco̔lisa imipefumlo yenu ngasinye isinambuzane esinambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba." 
Leviticus11:45 Ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova, oninyusayo ezweni le‐Jipete, ndize ndibe ngutixo wenu; kukona niya kuba ngcwele, ngokuba ndingcwele mna." 
Leviticus11:46 Nguwo lo umteto wezilo, nowentaka, nowazo zonke izinto ezinokudliwa kwobomi ezishukumayo emanzini, nowazo zonke izinambuzane ezinambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba;" 
Leviticus11:47 kuze kwenzwe ukwahluka pakati kwokunco̔lileyo nokucocekileyo, napakati kwesilo esidlekayo nesilo esingadlekiyo." 
Leviticus12:1 WABUYA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus12:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Umfazi nxa akaulileyo, wazala inkwenkwe, woba enco̔lile imihla ibe sixe̔nxe; njengasemihleni yokwahlukanela isifo sake woba enco̔lile." 
Leviticus12:3 Nangowesibozo umhla iya kwaluswa inyama yejwabu layo. 
Leviticus12:4 Uya kwandula ahlale egazini lokucokiswa kwake imihla ibe ngamashumi matatu anesitatu; konke okungcwele akayi kukucukumisa, neyingcwele indawo akayi kungena kuyo, kude kuzalisekiswe imihla yokucokiswa kwake." 
Leviticus12:5 Kodwa ukuba uzele inkazana woba enco̔lile iveki zibe mbini, njengasekwahlukaneni kwake; andule ahlale egazini lokucokiswa kwake imihla ibe ngamashumi matandatu anesitandatu." 
Leviticus12:6 Woti kwakuzalisekiswa imihla yokucokiswa kwake, ngenxa yonyana, umhlaumbi ngenxa yentombi, andule azise imvana yomnyaka mnye ibe lidini lokutshiswa, netole lezuba, umhlaumbi ihobe, libe lidini lesono, elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, kumperisite:" 
Leviticus12:7 oya kuyinikela ebusweni bukayehova, amenzele uxoliso; aze acokiswe etonjeni legazi lake. Nguwo lo umteto walowo uzeleyo inkwenkwe, umhlaumbi inkazana." 
Leviticus12:8 Kodwa ukuba isandla sake asifumani okwanele imvana, makatabate amahobe abe mabini, umhlaumbi amatole ezuba abe mabini, elinye libe leledini lokutshiswa, elinye libe leledini lesono; ati umperisite amenzele uxoliso, abe yena ecokisekile." 
Leviticus13:1 WALEKELA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Leviticus13:2 Umntu xeshekweni anokudumba, umhlaumbi sisilonda, umhlaumbi lityakuva elikazimlayo, entlonzeni yenyama yake, elifanel’ ukuba sisibulawa sesilepero entlonzeni yenyama yake, uya kwandula aziswe ku‐Arone umperisite, umhlaumbi komnye konyana bake abaperisite." 
Leviticus13:3 Waye umperisite eya kukangela isibulawa esisentlonzeni yenyama; kekaloku, nxa ziguqulwe inwele esibulaweni zaba mhlope, na nxa isibulawa sinzulu kuyo intlonze yenyama yake ukubonakala kwaso, sisisibulawa sesilepero sona: andule ati umperisite akumkangela, axele ukuba unco̔lile." 
Leviticus13:4 Kodwa ukuba ityakuva elikazimlayo limhlope entlonzeni yenyama yake, nokuba alinzulu kuyo intlonze ukubonakala kwalo, nokuba aziguqulwe inwele zalo zaba mhlope, woti umperisite amtshixele onesibulawa imihla ibe sixe̔nxe." 
Leviticus13:5 Waye umperisite eya kumkangela ngomhla wesixe̔nxe: ukuba, kekaloku, isibulawa site nqumama emehlweni ake, nokuba asitwabulukanga isibulawa entlonzeni, wobuya umperisite amtshixele imihla ibe sixe̔nxe ngokwesibini." 
Leviticus13:6 Woza umperisite amkangele ngomhla wesixe̔nxe ngokwesibini: ukuba, kekaloku, isibulawa simncumevu, nokuba asitwabulukanga isibulawa entlonzeni, umperisite uya kuxela ukuba ucocekile; sisilonda kodwa; waeya kuhlanza izivato zake, abe ecokisekile." 
Leviticus13:7 Kanti ukuba isilonda sesitwabulukile entlonzeni, emveni kwokubonakaliswa kwake kumperisite ngenxa yokucokiswa kwake, wobonakaliswa ngokwesibini kumperisite." 
Leviticus13:8 Ukuba umperisite uyabona ukuba nasi isilonda sitwabulukile entlonzeni, woti umperisite axele ukuba unco̔lile; sisilepero sona." 
Leviticus13:9 Xeshekweni isibulawa sesilepero sisemntwini, uya kwandula aziswe kumperisite." 
Leviticus13:10 Ukuba umperisite uya kubona ukuba nanku ukudumba okumhlope entlonzeni, okuguqule inwele zibe zimhlope, nokuba kuko ibala lenyama eṙwada ekudumbeni;" 
Leviticus13:11 sisilepero esidala sona entlonzeni yenyama yake; kukona umperisite aya kuxela ukuba unco̔lile: akayi kumtshixela, ngokuba enco̔lile yena." 
Leviticus13:12 Naxeshekweni kujadukayo kakulu isilepero entlonzeni, siti isilepero sigubungele yonke intlonze yonaso esosibulawa, kwa sentloko yake kude kube sezinyaweni zake, njengako konke ukubona kwamehlo omperisite;" 
Leviticus13:13 woti umperisite, akubona ukuba nasi isilepero sigubungele yonke inyama yake, andule axele ukuba ucocekile onesibulawa: siguqulwe saba simhlope sipela: ucocekile yena." 
Leviticus13:14 Kodwa mhlana ibonakalayo kuye inyama eṙwada, woba enco̔lile." 
Leviticus13:15 Woti umperisite akubona lonyama eṙwada, axele ukuba unco̔lile; leyonyama eṙwada inco̔lile; sisilepero sona." 
Leviticus13:16 Naxeshekweni kubuya kujike lonyama eiwada, ide iguqulwe ibe mhlope, uya kwandula eze kumperisite." 
Leviticus13:17 Woti umperisite akumbona, ukuba nasi isibulawa siguqulwe saba mhlope, andule axele umperisite ukuba ucocekile lowo onesibulawa: ucocekile yena." 
Leviticus13:18 Kanjalo inyama, ebekukuyo intlonze yayo itumba, elipolisiweyo;" 
Leviticus13:19 nekuya kubako kuyo endaweni yetumba ukudumba okumhlope, umhlaumbi ityakuva elikazimlayo, limhlope, libomvuṙa; yobonakaliswa yona kumperisite." 
Leviticus13:20 Ukuba umperisite uyabona ukuba nali linzulu kuyo intlonze ukubonakala kwalo, nokuba ziguqulwe inwele zalo zaba mhlope, uya kuxela umperisite ukuba unco̔lile: sisibulawa sesilepero, sijadukile ngetumba." 
Leviticus13:21 Kanti xeshekweni umperisite aya kulibona, ukuba kekaloku akuko kulo inwele ezimhlope, nokuba alinzulu kuyo intlonze, kodwa limncumevu, woti umperisite amtshixele imihla ibe sixe̔nxe." 
Leviticus13:22 Kwandul’ ukuti, ukuba liyatwabuluka kakulu entlonzeni, kuxele umperisite ukuba unco̔lile: sisibulawa." 
Leviticus13:23 Kodwa ukuba ityakuva elikazimlayo liti nqumama endaweni yalo, lingatwabuluki nje, lukoko lwetumba; waye umperisite eya kuxela ukuba ucocekile." 
Leviticus13:24 Nenyama nxa kukuyo intlonze yayo isitsha somlilo, na nxa ibala lesitsha eso lilityakuva elikazimlayo, limhlope, libomvuṙa, umhlaumbi limhlope kanye;" 
Leviticus13:25 woza umperisite ayikangele: ukuba kekaloku ziguqulwe inwele zaba mhlope kulo ityakuva elikazimlayo, nokuba linzulu kuyo intlonze ukubonakala kwalo, sisilepero, sijadukile ngesitsha; kukona umperisite aya kuxela ukuba unco̔lile: sisibulawa sesilepero." 
Leviticus13:26 Kanti xeshekweni umperisite aya kulibona, ukuba kekaloku akuko nwele ezimhlope kulo ityakuva elikazimlayo, nokuba alinzulu kuyo intlonze, kodwa limncumevu, woti umperisite amtshixele imihla ibe sixe̔nxe." 
Leviticus13:27 Uya kubuya umperisite amkangele ngomhla wesixe̔nxe: ukuba litwabulukile kakulu entlonzeni, uya kwandula umperisite axele ukuba unco̔lile: sisibulawa sesilepero." 
Leviticus13:28 Kodwa ukuba ityakuva elikazimlayo liti nqumama endaweni yalo, lingatwabuluki entlonzeni nje, kodwa limncumevu, kukudumba kwesitsha; kukona umperisite aya kuxela ukuba ucocekile; ngokuba lukoko lwesitsha." 
Leviticus13:29 Kanjako indoda, umhlaumbi umfazi, nxa kukuyo isibulawa pezu kwentloko, umhlaumbi pezu kwendevu;" 
Leviticus13:30 woza umperisite akangele isibulawa eso: ukuba kekaloku sinzulu kuyo intlonze ukubonakala kwaso, nokuba kuko pezu kwaso inwele ezilubelu ezincinane, woti umperisite axele ukuba inco̔lile: lukwekwe, sisilepero sentloko umhlaumbi sesodevu." 
Leviticus13:31 Kodwa xeshekweni umperisite abona isibulawa sokwekwe, ukuba kekaloku asinzulu kuyo intlonze ukubonakala kwaso, nokuba inwele ezimnyama aziko kuso, woti umperisite amtshixele onesibulawa sokwekwe imihla ibe sixe̔nxe." 
Leviticus13:32 Andule abuye umperisite akangele isibulawa eso ngomhla wesixe̔nxe: ukuba kekaloku alutwabuluki ukwekwe, nokuba aziko kulo inwele ezilubelu, nokuba ukwekwe alunzulu kuyo intlonze ukubonakala kwalo;" 
Leviticus13:33 uya kugugulwa yena, kanti ukwekwe akayi kulugugula; aze ati umperisite amtshixele onokwekwe imihla ibe sixe̔nxe ngokwesibini." 
Leviticus13:34 Andule abuye umperisite akangele ukwekwe ngomhla wesixe̔nxe: ukuba kekaloku ukwekwe alutwabuluki entlonzeni, nokuba alunzulu kuyo intlonze ukubonakala kwalo, woti umperisite axele ukuba ucocekile; waeya kuhlanza izivato zake, abe ecokisekile." 
Leviticus13:35 Kodwa ukuba ukwekwe luyatwabuluka kakulu entlonzeni, emveni kwokucokiswa kwake;" 
Leviticus13:36 wobuya umperisite amkangele: ukuba kekaloku ukwekwe lutwabulukile entlonzeni, umperisite akayi kugqalela inwele ezilubelu; selenco̔lile yena." 
Leviticus13:37 Kodwa ukuba emehlweni ake ukwekwe lute nqumama, nokuba inwele ezimnyama zikulile pezu kwalo; selupilisiwe ukwekwe olo, ucocekile yena: kukona umperisite aya kuxela ukuba ucocekile." 
Leviticus13:38 Kanjako indoda, umhlaumbi umfazi, nxa kukuyo intlonze yenyama yabo amatyakuva akazimlayo, kwa amatyakuva akazimlayo amhlope;" 
Leviticus13:39 woza umperisite akangele: ukuba kekaloku kuko entlonzeni yenyama yabo amatyakuva amhlopemncumevu; ligxuba elimhlope elijadukileyo entlonzeni; ucocekile onjalo. 
Leviticus13:40 Nendoda nxa intloko yayo igudile, yona iyinqai, icocekile noko." 
Leviticus13:41 Naxeshekweni kungasecaleni lobuso intloko yayo igudile, iyinqai ebunzini, icocekile noko." 
Leviticus13:42 Kodwa zeshekweni kuko ebunqayini bentloko, umhlaumbi ebunqayini bebunzi, isibulawa esimhlope‐bomvuṙa; sisilepero esijadukileyo ebunqayini bentloko yayo, umhlaumbi ebunqayini bebunzi layo." 
Leviticus13:43 Woza umperisite asikangele: ukuba kekaloku ukudumba kwesosibulawa kumhlope‐bomvuṙa ebunqayini bentloko yayo, umhlaumbi ebunqayini bebunzi layo, njengokubonakala kwaso isilepero sentlonze yenyama;" 
Leviticus13:44 iyindoda elileperi yona, inco̔lile: umperisite uya kuxela ukuba inco̔lile kanye; isibulawa sayo sisentloko yayo." 
Leviticus13:45 Neleperi ekukulo isibulawa eso, izivato zalo zoba ziṙazukile, nentloko yalo yoba ihlubulukile, nembovu yalo loyigubungela; laliya kudanduluka ngokuti: Ndinco̔lile, ndinco̔lile!" 
Leviticus13:46 Yonke imihla ekuya kubako kulo esisibulawa, loba linco̔lile; linco̔lile lona: liya kuhlala lodwa; kwoba ngapandle kwomnquba ukuhlala kwalo." 
Leviticus13:47 Kanjako isivato ekukuso isibulawa sesilepero, nokuba sisesivatweni soboya, nokuba sisesivatweni seqiya;" 
Leviticus13:48 nokuba sikokwoluliweyo, nokuba sikokunqanyulezisiweyo, ngeqiya umhlaumbi ngoboya; nokuba siseluswini, nokuba sikwelinye isetyenzwa lolusu;" 
Leviticus13:49 nxa isibulawa eso siluhlazaṙa, umhlaumbi sibomvuṙa, esivatweni, umhlaumbi eluswini, nokuba sikokwoluliweyo, nokuba sikokunqanyulezisiweyo, umhlaumbi kwenye into yolusu; sisibulawa sesilepero sona: ngako siya kubonakaliswa kumperisite." 
Leviticus13:50 Woti umperisite akangele isibulawa; andule akutshixele okunesibulawa imihla ibe sixe̔nxe. 
Leviticus13:51 Wobuya akangele isibulawa ngomhla wesixe̔nxe: ukuba isibulawa sitwabulukile esivatweni, nokuba sikokwoluliweyo, nokuba sikokunqanyulezisiweyo, umhlaumbi eluswini, umhlaumbi kwelinye isetyenzwa elenziweyo ngolusu; isibulawa eso sisilepero esidlayo; sinco̔lile." 
Leviticus13:52 Kukona aya kutshisa isivato eso, umhlaumbi oko kwoluliweyo, umhlaumbi oko kunqanyulezisiweyo, okwoboya umhlaumbi okweqiya, umhlaumbi enye into yolusu ekukuyo isibulawa eso: ngokuba sisilepero esidlayo; siya kutshiswa ngomlilo." 
Leviticus13:53 Kodwa xeshekweni umperisite aya kubona, ukuba kekaloku isibulawa asitwabulukanga esivatweni, nakoko kwoluliweyo, nakoko kunqanyulezisiweyo, umhlaumbi kwenye into yolusu;" 
Leviticus13:54 woti umperisite axele ukuba kuhlanzwe lo nto isibulawa sikuyo, andule ayitshixele imihla ibe sixe̔nxe ngokwesibini." 
Leviticus13:55 Nxa umperisite, emveni kwokuhlanzwa kwayo, aya kubona isibulawa, ukuba kekaloku isibulawa asiguqukanga ukubonakala kwaso, nokuba isibulawa asitwabulukanga; inco̔lile yona; uya kuyitshisa ngomlilo: idlekile pakati, nokuba icucekile kwelasemva icala, nokuba icucekile kwelapambili." 
Leviticus13:56 Naxeshekweni aya kubona umperisite, ukuba kekaloku isibulawa simncumevu emveni kwokuhlanzwa kwaso; uya kwandula asiṙazule esivatweni, umhlaumbi eluswini, umhlaumbi kokwoluliweyo, umhlaumbi kokunqanyulezisiweyo." 
Leviticus13:57 Ukuba kodwa sisabonakala esivatweni, nokuba sikokwoluliweyo, nokuba sikokunqanyulezisiweyo, umhlaumbi kwenye into yolusu; sisilepero esijadukayo; uya kutshisa oko isibulawa sikuko ngomlilo." 
Leviticus13:58 Kanti isivato, umhlaumbi okwoluliweyo, umhlaumbi okunqanyulezisiweyo, umhlaumbi enye into yolusu, kwa oko kusukuba uya kuhlanza kona, ukuba isibulawa simkile kuko, kwohlanzwa ngokwesibini, kuze kube kucokisekile." 
Leviticus13:59 Nguwo lo umteto wesibulawa sesilepero sesivato soboya, umhlaumbi seseqiya, umhlaumbi, sesokwoluliweyo, umhlaumbi sesokunqanyulezisiweyo, umhlaumbi senye into yolusu, wokuba kuxelwe ukuti sicocekile, umhlaumbi kuxelwe ukuti sinco̔lile." 
Leviticus14:1 Wateta kanjako uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus14:2 Nguwo lo oya kuba ngumteto weleperi ngomhla wokucokiswa kwalo: Lona liya kuziswa kumperisite: 
Leviticus14:3 waeya kupuma umperisite aye ngapandle kwomnquba; aze ati umperisite, akubona ukuba kekaloku isibulawa sesilepero sipilisiwe kulo ileperi," 
Leviticus14:4 andule axele umperisite, ukuba kutatyatelwe lowo oya kucokiswa intakana zibe mbini, ezipilileyo, ezicocekileyo, nomti wesedare, nesibomvu, nehisope;" 
Leviticus14:5 abuye axele umpersite, ukuba kuxe̔lwe enye intakana empandeni wodongwe pezu kwamanzi elayo." 
Leviticus14:6 Epilileyo intakana uya kutabata yona, nomti wesedare, nesibomvu, nehisope, aze azifake ezi zinto nentakana epilileyo egazini lentakana exe̔liweyo pezu kwamanzi elayo." 
Leviticus14:7 Waeya kuti fefe pezu kwalowo oya kucokiswa esilepereni amaxesha asixe̔nxe, axele ukuba ucokisekile, nentakana epilileyo woyindululela ngasendle." 
Leviticus14:8 Nalowo oya kucokiswa yena uya kuhlanza izivato zake, agugule zonke inwele zake, ahlambe emanzini, aze abe ecokisekile: woti emveni kwoko angene emnqubeni; kodwa uya kuhlala ngapandle kwentente yake imihla ibe sixe̔nxe." 
Leviticus14:9 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla wesixe̔nxe, uya kugugula zonke inwele zake, intloko yake, nodevu lwake, namashiyi ake; kwa zonke inwele zake uya kuzigugula: waeya kuhlanza izivato zake, ayihlambe inyama yake ngamanzi, aze abe ecokisekile." 
Leviticus14:10 Nangomhla wesibozo uya kutabata imvana ezimsulwa zibe mbini, nemvanakazi ibe nye yomnyaka mnye emsulwa, nezeshumi iziqingata zibe zitatu zeyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, unyeliwe ngeoli, neloge ibe nye yeoli." 
Leviticus14:11 Waeya kuti umperisite ocokisayo amise indoda eya kucokiswa, nezi zinto, pambi kwoyehova, elucangweni lwentente yentlangano." 
Leviticus14:12 Andule umperisite atabate enye imvana, ayinikele ibe lidini letyala, kunye nayo iloge yeoli; aze azishukushukumise zibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa ebusweni bukayehova." 
Leviticus14:13 Waeya kuxe̔la imvana leyo endaweni apo kuxe̔lwa kona idini lesono nedini lokutshiswa, endaweni eyingcwele: ngokuba njengedini lesono linjalo idini letyala, lelomperisite; liyinto eyingcwelekazi lona." 
Leviticus14:14 Waye umperisite eya kucapula egazini ledini letyala, aze umperisite alibeke pezu kwesitinzi seyokunene indlebe yalowo oya kucokiswa, napezu kwesitupa sesokunene isandla sake, napezu kwobontsi wolwokunene unyawo lwake." 
Leviticus14:15 Andule umperisite acapule kuyo iloge yeoli, ayigalele kwesokohlo isandla somperisite." 
Leviticus14:16 Aze umperisite afake owokunene umnwe wake kuyo ioli ekwesokohlo isandla sake, asasaze kuleoli ngomnwe wake amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus14:17 Nakulo iliva leoli esesandleni sake, umperisite wobeka pezu kwesitinzi seyokunene indlebe yalowo oya kucokiswa, napezu kwesitupa sesokunene isandla sake, napezu kwobontsi wolwokunene unyawo lwake, pezu kwegazi lalo idini letyala." 
Leviticus14:18 Neseleyo kuyo ioli esesandleni somperisite woyigalela pezu kwentloko yalowo oya kucokiswa; ade umperisite amenzele uxoliso ebusweni bukayehova. 
Leviticus14:19 Woti kanjalo umperisite anikele idini lesono, enze uxoliso ngenxa yalowo oya kucokiswa ekunco̔leni kwake; andule axe̔le nedini lokutshiswa." 
Leviticus14:20 Elodini lokutshiswa umperisite uya kunikela lona nomnikelo wokudla pezu kwesibingelo; waye umperisite eya kumenzela uxoliso, aze abe ecokisekile." 
Leviticus14:21 Ukuba kodwa ulihlwempu yena, isandla sake singenakufikela okungaka nje, makatabate imvana ibe nye ibe lidini letyala, kushukushukunyiswe, kuze kumenzelwe uxoliso; kwa neseshumi isiqingata sibe sinye seyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, neloge yeoli;" 
Leviticus14:22 namahobe abe mabini, umhlaumbi amatole ezuba abe mabini, lawo isandla sake sinokuwafikela; eliya kuti elinye libe lidini lesono, nelinye libe lidini lokutshiswa." 
Leviticus14:23 Waeya kuzisa ezo zinto ngowesibozo umhla wokucokiswa kwake kumperisite, elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus14:24 Woti umperisite atabate imvana yedini letyala, neloge yeoli; aze umperisite azishukushukumise zibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus14:25 Waeya kuxe̔la imvana yedini letyala; andule umperisite acapule egazini ledini letyala, alibeke pezu kwesitinzi seyokunene indlebe yalowo oya kucokiswa, napezu kwesitupa sesokunene isandla sake, napezu kwobontsi wolwokunene unyawo lwake." 
Leviticus14:26 Nenxenye yeoli leyo umperisite woyigalela kwesokohlo isandla somperisite. 
Leviticus14:27 Andule umperisite asasaze ngowokunene umnwe wake, kuyo ioli ekwesokohlo isandla sake, amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus14:28 Aze umperisite abeke kuyo ioli esesandleni sake pezu kwesitinzi seyokunene indlebe yalowo oya kucokiswa, napezu kwesitupa sesokunene isandla sake, napezu kwobontsi wolwokunene unyawo lwake, pezu kwendawo yegazi ledini letyala." 
Leviticus14:29 Neseleyo kuyo ioli esesandleni somperisite woyibeka pezu kwentloko yalowo oya kucokiswa, kuze kumenzelwe uxoliso pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus14:30 Waeya kunikela elinye kuwo amahobe, umhlaumbi kuwo amatole ezuba, kulawo isandla sake sinokuwafikela;" 
Leviticus14:31 kwa ku lawo isandla sake sinokuwafikela wonikela elinye libe lidini lesono, nelinye libe lidini lokutshiswa, kunye nomnikelo wokudla; aze umperisite enze uxoliso ngenxa yalowo oya kucokiswa pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus14:32 Nguwo lo umteto wokukuye isibulawa sesilepero, osandla sake singenakufikela okukulu ekucokisweni kwake." 
Leviticus14:33 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Leviticus14:34 Xeshekweni niya kufika elizweni le‐Kanane, endinipa lona libe yimfuyo, ndize ndibeke isibulawa sesilepero endlwini yaselizweni lemfuyo yenu;" 
Leviticus14:35 makeze lowo indlu iyeyake, ashumayele kumperisite, esiti: Kubonakala kum njengokungati sisibulawa endlwini." 
Leviticus14:36 Waye umperisite eya kuxela ukuba balungise leyondlu, engekangeni umperisite ukuza kukangela esosibulawa, ukuze kunganco̔liswa konke okusendlwini: woti umperisite emveni kwoko, angene ukuza kukangela leyondlu." 
Leviticus14:37 Nxa abonayo isibulawa, ukuba nasi isibulawa sisezindongeni zendlu, intlambo eziluhlazaṙa umhlaumbi ezibomvuṙa, ezibenileyo kulo udonga ukubonakala kwazo;" 
Leviticus14:38 woti umperisite apume endlwini aye elucangweni lwendlu, aze ayitshixe leyondlu imihla ibe sixe̔nxe." 
Leviticus14:39 Andule abuye umperisite ngomhla wesixe̔nxe, akangele: ukuba kekaloku isibulawa eso sitwabulukile ezindongeni zalondlu;" 
Leviticus14:40 umperisite uya kuxela ukuba kur̔olwe lamatye isibulawa sikuwo, nokuba kuposwe wona ngapandle kwesixeko, endaweni enco̔lileyo." 
Leviticus14:41 Nendlu leyo uya kwenza ukuba bayiṙwele pakati ngento engqongayo, notuli baluṙwelileyo bolugalela ngapandle kwesixeko, endaweni enco̔lileyo." 
Leviticus14:42 Bandule batabate amatye wambi, bawangenise esikundleni samatye lawo; kwotatyatwa nodaka lumbi, kutyatyekwe indlu leyo." 
Leviticus14:43 Kodwa ukuba siyabuya size isibulawa, sijaduke kulondlu, emveni kwokur̔olwa kwamatye, nasemveni kwokuṙwelwa kwendlu, nasemveni kwokutyatyekwa kwayo;" 
Leviticus14:44 woza umperisite akangele: ukuba kekaloku sesitwabulukile isibulawa endlwini, sisilepero esidlayo kulondlu; inco̔lile yona." 
Leviticus14:45 Kukona kuya kucitwa leyondlu, amatye ayo, nemiti yayo, nalo lwonke udaka lwendlu; yokutshelwa pandle kwesixeko, endaweni enco̔lileyo." 
Leviticus14:46 Kanjako ongenayo kulondlu ngayo yonke imihla yokutshixwa kwayo, woba enco̔lile yena kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus14:47 Nolele pantsi kulondlu yena uya kuhlanza izivato zake; nalowo utyayo kulondlu, wohlanza izivato zake naye." 
Leviticus14:48 Kodwa nxa abuya angene umperisite, abone ukuba kekaloku isibulawa asitwabulukanga endlwini, emveni kwokutyatyekwa kwayo; woti umperisite axele ukuba icocekile leyondlu, ngokuba sesipilisiwe isibulawa eso." 
Leviticus14:49 Andule atabatele ukuhlanjululwa kwalondlu intakana zibe mbini, kwa nomti wesedare, nesibomvu, nehisope." 
Leviticus14:50 Waeya kuxe̔la enye intakana empandeni wodongwe, pezu kwamanzi elayo." 
Leviticus14:51 Aze atabate lomti wesedare, nehisope, nesibomvu, nentaka epilileyo, azifake ezo nto egazini layo intaka exe̔liweyo, nasemanzini elayo, ayisasaze indlu amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe." 
Leviticus14:52 Waeya kuhlambulula leyondlu ngegazi lentakana, nangalamanzi elayo, nangentakana epilileyo, nangalomti wesedare, nangehisope, nangesibomvu:" 
Leviticus14:53 nentakana epilileyo uya kuyindululela pandle kwesixeko, ezindle: kwa njalo uya kwenzela leyondlu uxoliso, ize ibe icokisekile." 
Leviticus14:54 Nguwo lo umteto ngazo zonke izibulawa zesilepero, nezokwekwe;" 
Leviticus14:55 nangaso isilepero sesivato, nesendlu;" 
Leviticus14:56 nangokudumba, nangesilonda, nangetyakuva elikazimlayo;" 
Leviticus14:57 kuze kufundiswe nxa into inco̔lile, nanxa into icocekile. Lo ungumteto wesilepero." 
Leviticus15:1 WATETA kanjako uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Leviticus15:2 Tetani nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, niti kulo: Indoda esukuba inegqita lipuma enyameni yayo, inco̔lile yona ngenxa yegqita layo." 
Leviticus15:3 Oku kwoba kukunco̔la kwayo ngenxa yegqita layo: nokuba inyama yayo iyavuza igqita layo, nokuba inyama yayo ivingciwe ligqita layo, kukunco̔la kwayo oko." 
Leviticus15:4 Yonke imandlalo, alele pezu kwayo lowo unegqita, inco̔lile; nazo zonke izinto, ahleli pezu kwazo, zinco̔lile." 
Leviticus15:5 Kanjalo osukuba ecukumisa umandlalo wake, uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:6 Nalowo ohlala pezu kwento, ate lowo unegqita wahlala pezu kwayo, uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:7 Nalowo ocukumisa inyama yake onegqita, uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:8 Naxeshekweni lowo unegqita amtshicela ococekileyo, uya kwandula yena ahlanze izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:9 Kanjalo zonke izidwashu, akweleyo pezu kwazo lowo unegqita, zoba zinco̔lile." 
Leviticus15:10 Nosukuba ecukumisa enye into ebingapantsi kwake, woba enco̔lile kude kuhlwe; nalowo otwele ezo zinto, uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:11 Kanjalo lowo asukuba emcukumisile onegqita, engekayalazanga izandla zake ugamanzi, yena uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:12 Nompanda wodongwe, awucukumisileyo lowo unegqita, wona uya kuqekezwa; kanti yonke imipanda yemiti yoyalazwa ngamanzi." 
Leviticus15:13 Waeya kuti onegqita, nxa acokiswayo egqiteni lake, andule azibalele imihla isixe̔nxe ibe yeyokucokiswa kwake, aze ahlanze izivato zake, ahlambe inyama yake ngamanzi elayo, abe ecokisekile." 
Leviticus15:14 Nangomhla wesibozo wozitabatela amahobe emabini, umhlaumbi amatole ezuba emabini, eze nawo pambi kwoyehova ngaselucangweni lwentente yentlangano, awanike kumperisite." 
Leviticus15:15 Andule umperisite awanikele, elinye libe lidini lesono, nelinye libe lidini lokutshiswa; kwa njalo umperisite uya kumenzela uxoliso ebusweni bukayehova ngenxa yegqita lake." 
Leviticus15:16 Kanjako indoda, nxa kupuma kuyo imbewu yokulala, yosuka ihlambe yonke inyama yayo ngamanzi, ibe inco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:17 Kwa zonke izivato, nazo zonke izintsu, ekupezu kwazo imbewu yokulala, ziya kuhlanzwa ngamanzi, zibe zinco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:18 Nomfazi yakulala naye indoda inembewu yokulala, bohlamba emanzini bobabini, babe benco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:19 Kanjako umfazi, nxa anegqita, lilelegazi igqita lake enyameni yake, woba yimihla isixe̔nxe ekwahlukaneni kwake: osukuba emcukumisa woba enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:20 Konke alele pezu kwako ekwahlukaneni kwake, kwoba kunco̔lile; nako konke ahleli pezu kwako, kwoba kunco̔lile." 
Leviticus15:21 Osukuba ecukumisa umandlalo wake, uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:22 Nosukuba ecukumisa enye into abehleli pezu kwayo, uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:23 Nokuba lipezu kwomandlalo, nokuba lipezu kwento abehleli pezu kwayo, woti akulicukumisa, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:24 Ukuba kanjalo indoda ika ilale naye, kuze kube pezu kwayo ukunco̔la kwake, yona yoba inco̔lile imihla isixe̔nxe; nomandlalo isukuba ilele pezu kwawo, woba unco̔lile nawo." 
Leviticus15:25 Naxeshekweni umfazi anokupuma kwegqita legazi lake imihla emininzi, kwakungabiko ixesha lokwahlukana kwake, umhlaumbi nxa anegqita pezu kwelokwahlukana kwake; yonke imihla yegqita lokunco̔la kwake, njengasemihleni yokwahlukana kwake, woba enco̔lile." 
Leviticus15:26 Yonke imandlalo alala pezu kwayo ngayo yonke imihla yegqita lake, yoba kuye njengomandlalo wokwahlukana kwake; nento zonke ahlala pezu kwazo zoba zinco̔lile, njengokunco̔la kwokwahlukana kwake." 
Leviticus15:27 Osukuba ecukumisa ezo zinto, woba enco̔lile naye; kukona aya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Leviticus15:28 Kodwa ukuba ucokisiwe egqiteni lake, uya kwandula azibalele imihla ibe sixe̔nxe, ati kamva abe ecokisekile." 
Leviticus15:29 Nangomhla wesibozo uya kuzitabatela amahobe emabini, umhlaumbi amatole ezuba emabini, aze awazise kumperisite, ngaselucangweni lwentente yentlangano." 
Leviticus15:30 Waye umperisite eya kunikela elinye libe lidini lesono, nelinye libe lidini lokutshiswa; andule umperisite amenzele uxoliso ebusweni bukayehova, ngenxa yegqita lokunco̔la kwake." 
Leviticus15:31 Niya kwenje njalo ukwahlukanisa usapo luka‐Sirayeli ekunco̔leni kwalo; luze lungabubi ngokunco̔la kwalo, lwakunco̔lisa itabanakele yam epakati kwalo." 
Leviticus15:32 Lo ungumteto walowo unegqita, nowalowo kupuma kuye imbewu yokulala, ade anco̔liswe yiyo;" 
Leviticus15:33 kwa nowomfazi ofayo ekwahlukaneni kwake, nowalowo opuma igqita, owendoda nowomfazi; nowendoda eleleyo nomfazi onco̔lileyo." 
Leviticus16:1 WAYE uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi emveni kwokububa kwonyana baka‐Arone ababini, bakusondela ebusweni bukayehova, babuba ke;" 
Leviticus16:2 waza wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Teta kumkuluwe wako u‐Arone, ukuba makangangeni ngamaxesha onke kweyingcwele indawo, pakati kwekuselo, ngapambi kwesihlalo sofefe, esipezu kwayo ityeya, ukuze angafi; ngokuba ndiya kubonakala ngelifu esihlalweni sofefe." 
Leviticus16:3 Kwoba ngokunje u‐Arone aya kungena kweyingcwele indawo: enenkunzana elitole lenkomo ibe lidini lesono, nenkunzi yegusha ibe lidini lokutshiswa." 
Leviticus16:4 Uya kwambata eyingcwele ihempe yeqiya, nebrukwe yeqiya yoba pezu kwenyama yake, noqwemesha weqiya wobinqa ngalo, nonkontsho lweqiya woyisonga entloko: zizivato ezingcwele ezi; kukona aya kuhlamba ngamanzi inyama yake, akuzambata." 
Leviticus16:5 Nakuyo intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli uya kwamkela amaxwana ebokwe emabini, abe lidini lesono, nenkunzi yegusha inye, ibe lidini lokutshiswa." 
Leviticus16:6 Waye u‐Arone eya kunikela inkunzana yedini lesono, leyo iyeyake, alwenze uxoliso ngenxa yake nangenxa yendlu yake." 
Leviticus16:7 Andule atabate ibokwe zombini, azimise pambi kwoyehova, elucangweni lwentente yentlangano." 
Leviticus16:8 Waye u‐Arone eya kwenza pezu kwebokwe zombini amaqashiso; elinye iqashiso libe le likayehova, nelinye iqashiso libe lelebokwe yokumka." 
Leviticus16:9 Nebokwe ekuya kuwa pezu kwayo iqashiso lokuba ibe ye kayehova, makayisondeze u‐Arone, enze ngayo idini lesono." 
Leviticus16:10 Kodwa ibokwe, ekuya kuwa pezu kwayo iqashiso lokuba ibe yibokwe yokumka, iya kumiswa yona ipilile ebusweni bukayehova, ize yenzelwe uxoliso; ukuba indululwe ibe yibokwe yokumka ukuya entlango." 
Leviticus16:11 Waye u‐Arone eya kusondeza inkunzana yedini lesono, leyo iyeyake, alwenze uxoliso ngenxa yake nangenxa yendlu yake; aze ayixe̔le inkunzana yedini lesono, leyo iyeyake." 
Leviticus16:12 Andule atabate isiqumelo sizele ngamalahle omlilo evela esibingelweni, pambi kwoyehova, nesiqumiso esimnandi, sicolekisiwe ngokunqushwa, ngento ezalisa izandla zake, angenise ezonto pakati kwekuselo." 
Leviticus16:13 Nesiqumiso eso uya kusibeka pezu kwomlilo, pambi kwoyehova; ukuba ilifu lesiqumiso lisibekele isihlalo sofefe esipezu kwaso isinqi̔no, aze angafi." 
Leviticus16:14 Waeya kucapula egazini lenkunzana, alisasaze ngomnwe wake pezu kwesihlalo sofefe ngasempumalanga; nangapambi kwesihlalo sofefe uya kusasaza amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe kwelogazi ngomnwe wake." 
Leviticus16:15 Uya kwandula axe̔le ibokwe yedini lesono, leyo iyeyabantu, angenise igazi layo pakati kwekuselo; aze enze ngegazi elo, njengokuba enzile ngalo igazi lenkunzana, alisasaze pezu kwesihlalo sofefe, nangapambi kwesihlalo sofefe." 
Leviticus16:16 Kanjako uya kwenzela eyingcwele indawo uxoliso, ngenxa yokunco̔la kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nangenxa yezigqito zalo ngazo zonke izono zalo; uya kwenje njalo nakuyo intente yentlangano, ehleliyo kulo pakati kwokunco̔la kwalo." 
Leviticus16:17 Akuyi kubako namnye umntu ententeni yentlangano, akungena ukuza kulwenza uxoliso kweyingcwele indawo, ade apume: wolwenje njalo uxoliso ngenxa yake, nangenxa yendlu yake, nangenxa yawo wonke umhlambi wo‐Sirayeli." 
Leviticus16:18 Waeya kupuma aye esibingelweni, esipambi kwoyehova, asenzele uxoliso; ati kanjalo acapule egazini lenkunzana, nasegazini lebokwe, alibeke pezu kwempondo zesibingelo ngento engqongayo." 
Leviticus16:19 Andule asasaze pezu kwaso kwelogazi ngomnwe wake amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe, asicokise, asingcwalise ekunco̔leni kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Leviticus16:20 Woti akugqiba ukuxolisela eyingcwele indawo, nentente yentlangano, nesibingelo, ayisondeze ibokwe epilileyo." 
Leviticus16:21 Waye u‐Arone eya kulalisa izandla zake zozibini pezu kwentloko yebokwe epilileyo, axele pezu kwayo zonke inkohlakalo zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nazo zonke izigqito zalo ngazo zonke izono zalo, azibeke pezu kwentloko yebokwe, ayindulule yona ngesandla yendoda efanelekileyo ukuya entlango." 
Leviticus16:22 Yoti ibokwe leyo itwale pezu kwayo zonke inkohlakalo zalo, iye nazo elizweni elilubala: yaiya kuyindulula ibokwe leyo apo entlango." 
Leviticus16:23 Waeya kuza u‐Arone angene ententeni yentlangano, ahlube izivato zeqiya, ezo abezambete ekungeneni kwake kweyingcwele indawo, azishiye kwa kona." 
Leviticus16:24 Andule ahlambe inyama yake ngamanzi endaweni engcwele, azambate izivato zake, abuye apume, anikele elake idini lokutshiswa, nelabantu idini lokutshiswa, enze uxoliso ngenxa yake, nangenxa yabantu." 
Leviticus16:25 Nenqata ledini lesono uya kutshisa lona pezu kwesibingelo. 
Leviticus16:26 Kanjalo lowo obeyindulula ibokwe ibe yibokwe yokumka, uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe inyama yake ngamanzi, ati emveni kwokunjalo abuye eze emnqubeni." 
Leviticus16:27 Nenkunzana yedini lesono, nebokwe yedini lesono, elalite igazi lazo langeniswa kuze kwenziwe uxoliso kweyingcwele indawo, ziya kukutshelwa ngapandle kwomnquba; nezikumba zazo, nenyama yazo, nomswane wazo, ezonto bozitshisa ngomlilo." 
Leviticus16:28 Nosukuba ezitshisa yena uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe inyama yake ngamanzi, ati emveni kwokunjalo abuye eze emnqubeni." 
Leviticus16:29 Kwoba ngummiselwa ongunapakade kuni oku: ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe, ngoweshumi umhla wenyanga, niya kubandezela imipefumlo yenu, ningawenzi namnye umsebenzi, nokuba ngozelweyo elizweni, nokuba ngowasemzini opambukele pakati kwenu." 
Leviticus16:30 Ngokuba ngomhla lowo umperisite eya kunenzela uxoliso, ukuba nicokiswe, nize nibe nicokisekile kuzo zonke izono zenu ebusweni bukayehova." 
Leviticus16:31 Wona woba yisabata yopumlo kuni, ukuba nibandezele imipefumlo yenu: ngummiselwa ongunapakade." 
Leviticus16:32 Waye umperisite, lowo aya kumtambisa, kwa lowo aya kuzalisa izandla zake ukukonza ngobuperisite esikundleni soyise, eya kulwenza uxoliso: uya kuzambata izivato zeqiya, izivato ezingcwele," 
Leviticus16:33 axolisele indawo engcwele eyingcwele; waeya kuxolisela nentente yentlangano, nesibingelo; woxolisela nabaperisite, nabo bonke abantu bomhlambi, kanjalo." 
Leviticus16:34 Oku kwoba ngummiselwa ongunapakade kuni, ukuba kwenzelwe usapo luka‐Sirayeli uxoliso, ngenxa yazo zonke izono zalo, kube kanye emnyakeni mnye. Waza wenza njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus17:1 WALEKELA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus17:2 Teta ku‐Arone, nakonyana bake, nakubo bonke abalusapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kubo: Leli ilizwi aliyaleleyo uyehova, lokuti:" 
Leviticus17:3 Umntu osukuba engowendlu ka‐Sirayeli, oya kuxe̔la inkabi, umhlaumbi imvana, umhlaumbi ibokwe, emnqubeni; umhlaumbi oya kuyixe̔la ngapandle kwomnquba;" 
Leviticus17:4 kanti akayizisi elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, ukuba kunikelwe umnikelo kuyehova pambi kwayo itabanakele kayehova; igazi liya kubalelwa lowamntu; igazi ulipalazile; kanjalo uya kunqanyulwa lowamntu ebantwini bake;" 
Leviticus17:5 ukuze usapo luka‐Sirayeli luze nayo imibingo yalo, oluyibingayo ngasendle, luyizise kuyehova, elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, kumperisite, luyibinge ibe yimibingo yoxolo kuyehova." 
Leviticus17:6 Waye umperisite eya kusasaza igazi pezu kwesibingelo sikayehova, elucangweni lwentente yentlangano; nenqata wolitshisa libe livumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Leviticus17:7 Alusayi kubuya lubingele idemoni imibingo yalo, ezo luṙexezele emva kwazo. Oku kwoba ngummiselwa ongunapakade kulo ngezizukulwana zalo." 
Leviticus17:8 Wauya kuti kulo: Umntu osukuba engowendlu ka‐Sirayeli, nosukuba engowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwenu, oya kunikela ngedini lokutshiswa, umhlaumbi ngombingo;" 
Leviticus17:9 kanti akalizisi elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, ukuba lenzelwe uyehova; lowamntu wonqanyulwa ebantwini bake." 
Leviticus17:10 Nomntu osukuba engowendlu ka‐Sirayeli, nosukuba engowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwenu, oya kulidla elinye igazi; sendiya kubeka ubuso bam ngakuye lowamntu odlayo igazi, ndimnqamle ebantwini bake." 
Leviticus17:11 Ngokuba ubomi benyama busegazini; kukona ndininikile lona pezu kwesibingelo, kuze kwenzelwe imipefumlo yenu uxoliso: ngokuba lilo igazi eliwenzela umpefumlo uxoliso." 
Leviticus17:12 Ngako oko ndite elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli: Makungabiko namnye umntu wakuni oya kulidla igazi; kanjako owasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwenu akayi kulidla igazi. 
Leviticus17:13 Nomntu osukuba engowosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nosukuba engowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwenu, oya kubamba inyamakazi ekuzingeleni, umhlaumbi intaka edlekayo; lowo uya kupalaza igazi layo, aliselele ngotuli." 
Leviticus17:14 Ngokuba libubomi benyama yonke; igazi layo lingenxa yobomi bayo; ndati ngoko elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli: Igazi lenyama yonke aniyi kulidla; ngokuba ubomi benyama yonke ligazi layo; osukuba elidla, wonqanyulwa." 
Leviticus17:15 Nalomntu osukuba esidla into esisidumbu, umhlaumbi eqwengiweyo, nokuba ungozelweyo elizweni, nokuba ungowasemzini, yena uya kuhlanza izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe; andule abe ecokisekile." 
Leviticus17:16 Kodwa ukuba akazihlanzi, nokuba akahlambi inyama yake, uya kutwala inkohlakalo yake." 
Leviticus18:1 WALEKELA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus18:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus18:3 Njengokwenza kwelizwe le‐Jipete, enibe nimi kulo, aniyi kwenza; nanjengokwenza kwelizwe le‐Kanane, apo ndinizisa kona, aniyi kwenza; kanjako ngemimiso yabo aniyi kuhamba." 
Leviticus18:4 Izigwebo zam niya kuzenza, nemimiso yam niya kuyigcina, ukuba nihambe ngayo: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus18:5 Ngako niya kugcina imimiso yam, nezigwebo zam; aya kuti umntu, ukuba uyazenza, apile ngazo: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus18:6 Akuyi kusondela namnye umntu kosukuba esisalamane senyama yake, ukuza kutyila ubuzé bake: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus18:7 Ubuzé boyihlo, nobuzé bonyoko, akuyi kubutyila: ungunyoko yena; akuyi kutyila ubuzé bake." 
Leviticus18:8 Ubuzé bomfazi woyihlo akuyi kubutyila: bubuzé boyihlo bona. 
Leviticus18:9 Ubuzé bodade wako, intombi yoyihlo, umhlaumbi intombi yonyoko, nokuba uzelwe endlwini, nokuba uzelwe ngapandle, ubuzé bake akuyi kubutyila." 
Leviticus18:10 Ubuzé bentombi yonyana wako, umhlaumbi bentombi yentombi yako, ubuzé bazo akuyi kubutyila: ngokuba zibubuzé bako zona." 
Leviticus18:11 Ubuzé bentombi yomfazi woyihlo, ezelweyo nguyihlo, yona ingudade wako, ubuzé bayo akuyi kubutyila." 
Leviticus18:12 Ubuzé bodade woyihlo akuyi kubutyila: usisalamane soyihlo yena. 
Leviticus18:13 Ubuzé bodade wonyoko akuyi kubutyila: ngokuba yena esisalamane sonyoko. 
Leviticus18:14 Ubuzé bomninawe woyihlo akuyi kubutyila, akuyi kusondela emfazini wake: yena ngunyokokazi wako." 
Leviticus18:15 Ubuzé bomolokazana wako akuyi kubutyila: ngumfazi wonyana wako yena; akuyi kutyila ubuzé bake. 
Leviticus18:16 Ubuzé bomfazi womninawe wako akuyi kubutyila: bubuzé bomninawe wako bona. 
Leviticus18:17 Ubuzé bomfazi nobentombi yake akuyi kubutyila; intombi yonyana wake, umhlaumbi intombi yentombi yake, akuyi kuyizeka, ukutyila ubuzé bayo; zizalamane zake zona: bubutshinitshini oku." 
Leviticus18:18 Kanjako akuyi kuzeka umfazi pezu kwodade wake, uku m xinezela, ukutyila ubuzé bake, ngapandle kwalowo nxa asahleli." 
Leviticus18:19 Akuyi kusondela emfazini esekwahlukaneleni ukunco̔la kwake, ukutyila ubuzé bake." 
Leviticus18:20 Akuyi kulala nomfazi wommelwane wako ngokulalela inzalo, ukuba unco̔lelwe nguye." 
Leviticus18:21 Nakuyo inzalo yako akuyi kunika namnye ukuba adluliswe emlilweni pambi kwo‐Moleke; negama lotixo wako akuyi kulidyoba: mna ndi nguyehova. 
Leviticus18:22 Akuyi kulala nendoda njengokuba kulalwa nomfazi: yintshontsho oku. 
Leviticus18:23 Kanjalo akuyi kulala nasinye isilo, ukuba unco̔lelwe siso: nomfazi makangemi ebusweni besilo, kuze kulalwe pantsi kuso: yinto ebugeza le." 
Leviticus18:24 Ize ningazinco̔lisi nganye yezi zinto: ngokuba zinco̔lelwe zizo zonke ezi zinto izizwe endiza kuzigxota pambi kwenu. 
Leviticus18:25 Linco̔lile ilizwe nalo; ngako ndiyohlwayela inkohlakalo yalo pezu kwalo, nelizwe lona liyahlanza abemi balo." 
Leviticus18:26 Nina kodwa niya kugcina imimiso yam nezigwebo zam, ningenzi nanye kuzo zonke ezizinto zibuntshontsho; owelizwe lakowenu, nowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwenu:" 
Leviticus18:27 (ngokuba zonke ezizinto zibuntshontsho bezenzile abantu belozwe, ababepambili kuni; kukona ilizwe linco̔lile:)" 
Leviticus18:28 ukuze elozwe lingahlanzi nina, nakulinco̔lisa, njengokuba lihlanzile izizwe ezibe zipambili kuni." 
Leviticus18:29 Ngokuba bonke abaya kwenza enye kuzo zonke ezi zinto zibuntshontsho, kwa imipefumlo eyenza ngazo yonqanyulwa pakati kwabantu bayo." 
Leviticus18:30 Ngako niya kugcina umyalezelo wam, wokuba ningenzi nalinye kulamasiko abuntshontsho abesenziwa pambili kuni, nokuba ningazinco̔lisi ngawo: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:1 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus19:2 Teta nayo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Noba bangcwele; ngokuba ndingcwele mna Yehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:3 Unyoko noyihlo niya kuboyika nonke ngabanye; nesabata zam niya kuzigcina: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:4 Ningabeki ngakuwo amadalo, notixo abatyityishiweyo ningazenzeli bona: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:5 Kanjalo nxa nibingelela umbingo woxolo kuyehova, niya kubingelela wona ngokutanda kwenu." 
Leviticus19:6 Ngomhla wokubingelela kwenu uya kudliwa, nangomnye umhla; kodwa oko kuseleyo kwada kwangumhla wesitatu, kwotshiswa ngomlilo." 
Leviticus19:7 Ukuba kuka kudliwe ngomhla wesitatu, kwoba yinto edlubukileyo oko; akuyi kubukwa." 
Leviticus19:8 Nokudlayo yena uya kutwala inkohlakalo yake, ngokuba eyinco̔lisile eyingcwele into kayehova; ngako umpefumlo lowo uya kunqanyulwa ebantwini bawo." 
Leviticus19:9 Kanjalo nxa nivunayo ukuvunwa kwomhlaba wenu, akuyi kugqibela ukuvuna amagumbi entsimi yako; nokubutekayo kwokuvuna kwako akuyi kukubuta."
