Leviticus19:10 Nesitiya sako semiti yeveyine akuyi kubikica sona; nedreyive ezivutulukileyo zesitiya sako semiti yeveyine akuyi kuzibuta; wozishiyela ihlwempu nowasemzini ezo: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:11 Ningebi̔; ningateti ilwimi, ningenzi ngobuxoki, omnye kwomnye." 
Leviticus19:12 Kanjako aniyi kufunga igama lam ngendawo ebuxoki; uze ungalidyobi igama lotixo wako; mna ndi nguyehova. 
Leviticus19:13 Akuyi kulumkisa ummelwane wako, akuyi kumpanga kanjalo; umvuzo woqeshiweyo maungalalisi kuwe kude kuse." 
Leviticus19:14 Akuyi kutuka ositulu, nasebusweni bemfama akuyi kubeka isiku̔bekiso; kodwa uya kwoyika utixo wako: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus19:15 Aniyi kwenza ngobumenemene ekugwebeni; ubuso behlwempu akuyi kububuka, nobuso bomkulu akuyi kububeka; uya kugweba ummelwane wako ngobulungisa." 
Leviticus19:16 Akuyi kuhambahamba uhleba pakati kwabantu bako; akuyi kuma ngakulo igazi lommelwane wako kanjalo: mna ndi nguyehova. 
Leviticus19:17 Akuyi kumtiya umzalwana wako entliziyweni yako; uya kukutala ukumohlwaya ummelwane wako, uze ungatwali ngenxa yake isono." 
Leviticus19:18 Akuyi kupindezela, kanjalo akuyi kubamba ingqumbo ngakulo usapo lwabantu bako; koko uya kutanda ummelwane wako njengokuzitanda kwako: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus19:19 Imimiso yam niya kuyigcina. Izilo‐zako ungazenzi zizeke ezolulumbi uhlobo; intsimi yako akuyi kuyihlwayela ngembewu yentlobo ngentlobo; kanjalo isivato esilukiweyo ngentlobo ngentlobo zencawa asiyi kuza pezu kwako. 
Leviticus19:20 Nosukuba elala nenkazana ngokulalela inzalo, elikobokakazi yona, exanyelwe indoda, engakululwanga nakanye, engapiwanga inkululeko kanjalo; kwobetwa ke; abayi kufiswa, ngokuba ingengokululekileyo inkazana leyo." 
Leviticus19:21 Waeya kuzisa idini letyala lake kuyehova, elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, kwa inkunzi yegusha ibe lidini letyala." 
Leviticus19:22 Waye umperisite eya kumenzela uxoliso ngegusha yedini letyala pambi kwoyehova, ngenxa yesono sake onileyo ngaso; aze axolelwe isono sake onileyo ngaso." 
Leviticus19:23 Naxeshekweni ningenileyo kwelozwe, natyala zonke intlobo zemiti yokutyiwa, isiqa̔mo sayo niya kusibala ngokuba sesingalukileyo: yoba yiminyaka mitatu esiya kuba njengesingalukileyo kuni; asiyi kudliwa." 
Leviticus19:24 Kodwa ngomnyaka wesine sonke isiqa̔mo sayo soba yinto eyingcwele yokumdumisa uyehova. 
Leviticus19:25 Nangomnyaka wesihlanu niya kusidla isiqa̔mo sayo, ize yandiswe kuni imveliso yayo: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:26 Aniyi kudla nto inegazi; aniyi kulaula; aniyi kwenza ngobugqi. 
Leviticus19:27 Amancam entloko zenu aniyi kwenza izazinge ngawo; nencam zendevu zako akuyi kuzonakalisa. 
Leviticus19:28 Izigebu ngenxa yofileyo aniyi kuzenza enyameni yenu, nomba̔lo wezivambo aniyi kuwenza pezu kwenu: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus19:29 Akuyi kudyoba intombi yako ngokuyenza ingnawokazi; ukuba ilizwe lingenzi umbulo, lide ilizwe lizale bubutshinitshini." 
Leviticus19:30 Isabata zam niya kuzigcina, nendawo yam eyingcwele niya kuyihlonela: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus19:31 Ningajikeli kubo abenzelana nemishologu, nakumatola; ningabafuni, ukuba ninco̔lelwe ngabo: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:32 Uya kupakama ebusweni bezimvi, ububeke ubuso bexego, notixo wako umoyike: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus19:33 Naxeshekweni kupambukele kuwe owasemzini ukuhlala elizweni lenu, aniyi kumbandezela." 
Leviticus19:34 Woba njengozelweyo pakati kwenu kuni owasemzini opambukeleyo ukuhlala nani; uya kutanda yena njengokuzitanda kwako: ngokuba nibe ningabasemzini nina elizweni le‐Jipete: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus19:35 Aniyi kwenza ngobumenemene ekugwebeni, ekwoluleni, ekulinganiseni, nasekuzaliseni." 
Leviticus19:36 Noba nesilinganiselo esilungeleleneyo, namatye okulinganisa alungeleleneyo, neyefa elungeleleneyo, nehine elungeleleneyo: ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu, onipumisileyo elizweni le‐Jipete." 
Leviticus19:37 Kukona niya kugcina yonke imimiso yam, nazo zonke izigwebo zam, nizenze: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus20:1 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus20:2 Woti kanjalo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli: Umntu wakwabalusapo luka‐Sirayeli, nowakwabasemzini abapambukeleyo kwa‐Sirayeli, osukuba enika kwinzalo yake ku‐Moleke, uya kufiswa ngenyaniso; abantu belizwe baya kumgibisela ngamatye." 
Leviticus20:3 Nam ndiya kubeka ubuso bam ngakuye lowamntu, ndimnqamle pakati kwabantu bake; ngokuba enikile kwinzalo yake ku‐Moleke, ukuze anco̔lise indawo yam eyingcwele, negama lam elingcwele alidyobe." 
Leviticus20:4 Kanjalo ukuba abantu belizwe baka bamfihlele lowamntu amehlo abo, akunika kwinzalo yake ku‐Moleke, baze bangamfisi;" 
Leviticus20:5 sendiya kubeka ubuso bam ngakuye lowamntu, nangakuso isizalwane sake, ndize ndimnqamle yena, nabo bonke abaṙexezela emva kwake, ukuya kuṙexezela emva kwo‐Moleke, pakati kwabantu babo." 
Leviticus20:6 Nompefumlo ojikelayo kwabenzelana nemishologu, nakumatola, ukuya kuṙexezela emva kwabo, sendiya kubeka ubuso bam ngakuwo umpefumlo lowo, ndiwunqamle pakati kwabantu bawo." 
Leviticus20:7 Zingcwaliseni ngoko, nibe ngabangcwele: ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus20:8 Ize nigcine imimiso yam, niyenze: mna ndi nguyehova oningcwalisayo." 
Leviticus20:9 Nxa kuko umntu otukileyo uyise, umhlaumbi unina, uya kufiswa ngenyaniso: utukile uyise, umhlaumbi unina; igazi lake loba pezu kwake." 
Leviticus20:10 Nendoda eṙexezayo nomfazi w omnye umntu, eṙexezayo nomfazi wommelwane wayo, umṙexezi nomṙexezikazi baya kufiswa ngenyaniso." 
Leviticus20:11 Kanjalo indoda eleleyo nomfazi woyise, ubuzé boyise ibutyilile: baya kufiswa ngenyaniso bobabini; igazi labo loba pezu kwabo." 
Leviticus20:12 Naxeshekweni indoda iya kulala nomolokazana wayo, baya kufiswa ngenyaniso bobabini: benze into ebugeza; igazi labo loba pezu kwabo." 
Leviticus20:13 Naxeshekweni indoda iya kulala n enye indoda, njengokuba kulalwa nomfazi, wona ayenzile intshontsho omabini: aya kufiswa ngenyaniso; igazi lawo loba pezu kwawo." 
Leviticus20:14 Naxeshekweni indoda iya kuzeka umfazi nonina wake, bubutshinitshini oku: baya kutshiswa ngomlilo, kwa yona nabo bona; kuze kungabiko ubutshinitshini pakati kwenu." 
Leviticus20:15 Naxeshekweni indoda iya kulala nesilo, iya kufiswa ngenyaniso: nesilo niya kusibulala." 
Leviticus20:16 Kanjalo umfazi nxa aya kusondela kwesinye isilo ukuza kulala pantsi kuso, uya kubulala umfazi lowo nesilo eso: baya kufiswa ngenyaniso: igazi labo loba pezu kwabo." 
Leviticus20:17 Naxeshekweni indoda iya kuzeka udade wayo, intombi kayise, umhlaumbi intombi kanina, ibone ubuzé bake, ati yena abone ubuzé bayo, kulihlazo oko; ngako bonqanyulwa emehlweni osapo lwabantu babo: ibutyilile ubuzé bodade wayo; iya kutwala inkohlakalo yayo." 
Leviticus20:18 Naxeshekweni indoda iya kulala nomfazi onesifo sake, ibutyile ubuzé bake; itombo lake ilenze zé, naye ulityilile itombo legazi lake: ngako bonqanyulwa bobabini pakati kwabantu babo." 
Leviticus20:19 Kanjako ubuzé bodade kanyoko, nobodade kayihlo, akuyi kubutyila: ngokuba owenje njalo ehlubulule isalamane sake: baya kutwala inkohlakalo yabo." 
Leviticus20:20 Naxeshekweni indoda iya kulala noninakazi wayo, ubuzé boyisekazi wayo ibutyilile: baya kutwala isono sabo; baya kufa bengenabantwana." 
Leviticus20:21 Naxeshekweni indoda iya kuzeka umfazi womninawe wayo, kuyinto enco̔lileyo oko: ubuzé bomninawe wayo ibutyilile; boba bengenabantwana." 
Leviticus20:22 Gcinani ngoko yonke imimiso yam, nazo zonke izigwebo zam, nizenze; lize linganihlanzi elozwe, apo ndinizisa kona ukuba nihlale kulo." 
Leviticus20:23 Ize ningahambi ngamasiko esizwe, endisikupayo pambi kwenu: ngokuba zonke ezi zinto bezenzile bona; kungoko endibatiyileyo." 
Leviticus20:24 Nina kodwa ndite kuni: Niya kulidla ilifa lelizwe labo; ndolinika kuni kwa mna, ukuba nilidle ilifa lalo, ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu, onahlulileyo kw abanye abantu." 
Leviticus20:25 Kukona niya kukwenza ukwahluka pakati kwezilo ezicocekileyo nezinco̔lileyo, napakati kwentaka ezinco̔lileyo nezicocekileyo; aniyi kudlubukisa imipefumlo yenu ngesilo, nangentaka, nanganye into enambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba, endinahlulele zona ukuba nizibale ngokuba zinco̔lile." 
Leviticus20:26 Noba ngabangcwele kum, ngokuba ndingcwele mna Yehoya; kungoko endinahlulile kw abanye abantu, ukuze nibe ngabam." 
Leviticus20:27 Kanjako indoda, umhlaumbi umfazi, ekukubo ubushologu, umhlaumbi ubutola, baya kufiswa ngenyaniso: baya kugityiselwa ngamatye; igazi labo loba pezu kwabo." 
Leviticus21:1 WANDULA wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Teta kubaperisite, onyana baka‐Arone, uti kubo: Ngenxa yofileyo akayi kuzinco̔lisa umperisite pakati kwabantu bake:" 
Leviticus21:2 kupela ngenxa yesalamane sake esikufupi kuye, ngenxa yonina, nangenxa yoyise, nangenxa yonyana wake, nangenxa yentombi yake, nangenxa yomninawe wake;" 
Leviticus21:3 nangenxa yodade wake oyintombi ipela, okufupi kuye, ongekabi nandoda; ngenxa yaló uya kuzinco̔lisa." 
Leviticus21:4 Akayi kuzinco̔lisa nangenxa yoyinkosi pakati kwabantu bake, ukuba azidyobe." 
Leviticus21:5 Abayi kwenza ubunqai pezu kwentloko zabo, nezincam zendevu zabo abayi kuzigugula, nasenyameni yabo abayi kugebula izigebu." 
Leviticus21:6 Boba ngabangcwele kutixo wabo, negama lotixo wabo abayi kulidyoba: ngokuba bona benikela iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova, ukutya kwotixo wabo; ngako boba ngcwele." 
Leviticus21:7 Inkazana eyingnawokazi umhlaumbi edyojiweyo abayi kuyizeka, nomfazi olahliweyo yindoda yake abayi kumzeka kanjalo: ngokuba umperisite eyingcwele kutixo wake." 
Leviticus21:8 Ngako uya kumngcwalisa; ngokuba enikela ukutya kwotixo wako: woba ngcwele kuwe; ngokuba ndingcwele mna Yehova, oningcwalisayo." 
Leviticus21:9 Kanjako intombi yongumperisite, nxa izidyobayo ngokwenza umbulo, iyadyoba noyise wayo: iya kutshiswa ngomlilo." 
Leviticus21:10 Nalowo ongumperisite omkulu pakati kwabazalwana bake, obekugalelwa pezu kwentloko yake ioli yokutambisa, nozandla zake zizalisiwe ukwambata izivato, intloko yake akayi kuyihlubulula, nezivato zake akayi kuziṙazula." 
Leviticus21:11 Kanjalo akayi kuza ngakuwo namnye umzimba ofileyo; akayi kuzinco̔lisa ngenxa yoyise nangenxa yonina. 
Leviticus21:12 Akayi kupuma endaweni eyingcwele, aze angayidyobi eyingcwele indawo yotixo wake; ngokuba ikrone yeoli yokutambisa yotixo wake ipezu kwake: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus21:13 Uya kuzeka umfazi esebutonjini bake. 
Leviticus21:14 Umhlolokazi, nolahliweyo, nodyojiweyo, n oyingnawokazi, abanjalo akayi kubazeka; koko eya kuzeka intombi ipela yasebantwini bake ibe ngumfazi." 
Leviticus21:15 Kanjako akayi kudyoba inzalo yake pakati kwabantu bake: ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova omngcwalisayo. 
Leviticus21:16 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus21:17 Teta ku‐Arone, usiti: Umntu wakwinzalo yako, ngezizukulwana zabo, ekukuye isonakalo, akayi kusondela ukuza kunikela ukutya kwotixo wake." 
Leviticus21:18 Ngokuba engasayi kusondela namnye umntu ekukuye isonakalo: oyimfama, umhlaumbi osisiqwala, umhlaumbi ompumlo ibenileyo, umhlaumbi onendawo ekulelweyo," 
Leviticus21:19 umhlaumbi umntu ononyawo oluṙunekileyo, umhlaumbi onesandla esapukileyo," 
Leviticus21:20 umhlaumbi osisifombo, umhlaumbi oyingqeqe, umhlaumbi onomlanga elisweni lake, umhlaumbi onokubabeka, umhlaumbi onokwekwe, umhlaumbi omasende atyunyuzweyo:" 
Leviticus21:21 akayi kusondela namnye umntu, ekukuye isonakalo, kwinzalo ka‐Arone umperisite, ukuza kunikela iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova: isonakalo sikuye; ukutya kwotixo wake akayi kusondela ukunikela kona." 
Leviticus21:22 Ukutya kwotixo wake, okwezinto ezingcwelekazi, nokwezinto ezingcwele, angakudla;" 
Leviticus21:23 kodwa kulo ikuselo akayi kuza, nakuso isibingelo akayi kusondela, ngenxa yokuba isonakalo sikuye; ukuze angazidyobi indawo zam ezingcwele: ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova obangcwalisayo." 
Leviticus21:24 Waye u‐Mosesi wateta ezizinto ku‐Arone, nakonyana bake, nakulo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Leviticus22:1 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus22:2 Teta ku‐Arone nakonyana bake, ukuba bazile izinto ezingcwele zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nokuba bangadyobi igama lam elingcwele ngoko lundingcwalisele kona: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus22:3 Yiti kubo: Umntu wakuyo yonke inzalo yenu, pakati kwezizukulwana zenu, osukuba eya kusondela kwezingcwele izinto, ezo usapo luka‐Sirayeli luzingcwalisile kuyehova, nxa ukunco̔la kwake kupezu kwake, umpefumlo lowo wonqanyulwa kwa sebusweni bam: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus22:4 Owakuyo inzalo ka‐Arone osukuba elileperi, umhlaumbi engonegqita, yena akayi kuzidla izinto ezingcwele, ade abe ecokisekile. Kanjako ocukumisayo enye into enco̔lileyo ngomzimba ofileyo, umhlaumbi indoda ekupuma kuyo imbewu yokulala;" 
Leviticus22:5 umhlaumbi osukuba ecukumisa esinye isinambuzane anganco̔liswayo siso, umhlaumbi umntu anganco̔liswayo nguye, noko ukunco̔la kwake kukokunjanina;" 
Leviticus22:6 umntu ocukumisayo okunjalo, woba enco̔lile kude kuhlwe; akayi kudla kwezingcwele izinto, kupela nxa ahlambile inyama yake ngamanzi." 
Leviticus22:7 Woti lakutshona ilanga abe ecokisekile, ati kamva adle kwezingcwele izinto; ngokuba kukutya kwake oko." 
Leviticus22:8 Into esisidumbu, umhlaumbi eqwengiweyo, akayi kuyidla, ukuba azinco̔lise ngayo: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus22:9 Ngako baya kugcina umyalezelo wam, ukuba bangatwali isono ngenxa yawo, bafe nokufa ngawo, nxa bawudyobayo: mna ndi nguyehova obangcwalisayo." 
Leviticus22:10 Kanjalo akuyi kudla okuyingcwele namnye owasemzini; oliṙanuka lomperisite, noqeshiweyo, akayi kudla okuyingcwele." 
Leviticus22:11 Kodwa nxa umperisite aya kutenga umntu ngemali yake, lo uya kudla kuko, kwa nozelweyo endlwini yake: bona baya kudla ekutyeni kwake." 
Leviticus22:12 Nentombi yomperisite, nxa ingumfazi wendoda engowasemzini, yona ayiyi kudla kumnikelo wezinto ezingcwele." 
Leviticus22:13 Koko ukuba intombi yomperisite ingumhlolokazi, umhlaumbi ngolahliweyo, ekungeko kuyo inzalo, nebuyeleyo endlwini kayise njengasebutsheni bayo, iya kudla kuko ukutya kwoyise wayo: kodwa akuyi kudla kuko namnye owasemzini." 
Leviticus22:14 Kanjako ukuba umntu uya kudla into eyingcwele ngesiposo, uya kubeka esesihlanu isiqingata senani lako pezu kwako, andule asinike kumperisite kunye nalonto eyingcwele." 
Leviticus22:15 Abayi kuzidyoba izinto ezingcwele zosapo lu ka‐Sirayeli, ezo luzinikele kuyehova;" 
Leviticus22:16 baze balutwese inkohlakalo yetyala, lwakuzidla izinto zalo ezingcwele: ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova olungcwalisayo." 
Leviticus22:17 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus22:18 Teta ku‐Arone, nakonyana bake, nakulo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kubo: Umntu osukuba engowendlu ka‐Sirayeli, nowabasemzini abakwa‐Sirayeli, oya kunikela umnikelo wake, ngenxa yazo zonke izibambiso zabo, nangenxa yayo yonke iminikelo yabo yesisa, abaya kunikela ngayo kuyehova, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Leviticus22:19 makunikelwe ngentando yenu inkunzi emsulwa pakati kwenkomo, pakati kwegusha, umhlaumbi pakati kwebokwe." 
Leviticus22:20 Zonke ekukuzo isonakalo, aniyi kunikela ngazo; ngokuba zingayi kuba nakunibukelwa." 
Leviticus22:21 Nosukuba eya kunikela umbingo woxolo kuyehova, ukufeza isibambiso, umhlaumbi ukunika umnikelo wesisa, ngezinkulu umhlaumbi ngezincinane inkomo, wona woba msulwa ukuba ukoleleke; akuyi kubako nasinye isonakalo kuwo." 
Leviticus22:22 Into eyimfama, umhlaumbi eyapukileyo, umhlaumbi esisilima, umhlaumbi enesihlava, umhlaumbi enokubabeka, umhlaumbi enokwekwe, aniyi kunikela ngezinjalo kuyehova; nomnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo aniyi kuwenza ngazo pezu kwesibingelo kuyehova." 
Leviticus22:23 Kanti inkomo, umhlaumbi igusha, enendawo ekulelweyo umhlaumbi efinyeleyo, leyo ungawenza ngayo umnikelo wesisa; kodwa ukuba ibe sisibambiso ayiyi kukoleleka." 
Leviticus22:24 Aniyi kunikela kuyehova encinezelweyo, netyunyuziweyo, neṙuzulweyo, nesikelweyo; aniyi kwenje njalo elizweni lenu." 
Leviticus22:25 Kanjako aniyi kunikela ukutya kwotixo wenu ngenye yezi ezivela esandleni sowelinye ilizwe; ngokuba ukudlubuka kwazo kukuzo; isonakalo sikuzo; aziyi kunibukelwa. 
Leviticus22:26 Wateta uyehova kanjako ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus22:27 Inkomo, umhlaumbi igusha, umhlaumbi ibokwe, xeshekweni izelweyo, yoba yimihla isixe̔nxe ngapantsi kwonina; yoti ngomhla wesibozo nangexesha eliza kuza, ikoleleke ukuba ibe ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Leviticus22:28 Nokuba yinkomo, nokuba yigusha, aniyi kuxe̔la yona netole layo ngomhla mnye." 
Leviticus22:29 Naxeshekweni niya kubinga umbingo wombulelo kuyehova, niya kubinga ngokwentando yenu." 
Leviticus22:30 Kwa ngomhla lowo uya kudliwa; aniyi kusalisa nto kuwo kude kuse: mna ndi nguyehova. 
Leviticus22:31 Ngako niya kugcina imiyalelo yam, niyenze: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus22:32 Negama lam elingcwele aniyi kulidyoba, koko ndiya kungcwaliswa pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli: mna ndi nguyehova, oningcwalisayo;" 
Leviticus22:33 lowo onipumisileyo elizweni le‐Jipete, ndize ndibe ngutixo wenu: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus23:1 WALEKELA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus23:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Imitendeleko kayehova, eniya kuyishumayela ukuba zintlanganisano ezingcwele, yiyo le imitendeleko yam." 
Leviticus23:3 Yimihla mitandatu ekuya kwenziwa umsebenzi; kodwa ngomhla wesixe̔nxe yisabata yopumlo, intlanganisano engcwele; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi ngawo: yisabata kayehova kuwo onke amakaya enu." 
Leviticus23:4 Yiyo le imitendeleko kayehova, intlanganisano ezingcwele, eniya kuyishumayela ngamaxeska ayo amisiweyo." 
Leviticus23:5 Ngenyanga yokuqala, ngoweshumi linesine umhla, pakati kwokuhlwa, yipasika kayehova." 
Leviticus23:6 Nangomhla weshumi linesihlanu walenyanga, ngumtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele kuyehova: yimihla esixe̔nxe eniya kutya izonka ezingenagwele." 
Leviticus23:7 Ngowokuqala umhla noba nentlanganisano engcwele: aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo ngawo. 
Leviticus23:8 Koko niya kunikela umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova imihla ibe sixe̔nxe: ngomhla wesixe̔nxe yintlanganisano engcwele; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo ngawo. 
Leviticus23:9 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus23:10 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Xeshekweni nise nifikile kwelozwe endinipa lona, naza navuna ukuvunwa kwalo, niya kwandula nizise isitungu sesiqalo sokuvuna kwenu kumperisite;" 
Leviticus23:11 oya kushukushukumisa isitungu eso pambi kwoyehova, ngenxa yokubukwa kwenu: ngomhla wokusa emveni kwayo isabata umperisite wosishukushukumisa." 
Leviticus23:12 Naniya kunikela ngomhla wokushukushukumisa kwenu isitungu eso imvana emsulwa, eyomnyaka mnye, ibe lidini lokutshiswa kuyehova;" 
Leviticus23:13 kwa nomnikelo wokudla wayo, isibini sezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova, libe livumba elimnandi; nomnikelo wokusela wayo weveyine, isiqingata sesine sehine." 
Leviticus23:14 Isonka, namaqashu, nezikwebu eziluhlaza, aniyi kuzidla, kude kube ngokwa nguwo umhla eniya kuzisa ngawo umnikelo wotixo wenu: woba ngummiselwa ongunapakade ngezizukulwana zenu, kuwo onke amakaya enu." 
Leviticus23:15 Kanjalo niya kubala kuni nitabata komnye umhla emveni kwesabata, kwa semhleni wokuzisa kwenu isitungu sokushukushukunyiswa; zoba zisabata ezizalisekileyo zisixe̔nxe:" 
Leviticus23:16 kwa kude kube ngomnye umhla emveni kweyesixe̔nxe isabata niya kubala imihla imashumi mahlanu; nize ninikele umnikelo wokudla omtsha kuyehova. 
Leviticus23:17 Niya kuzisa zivela emakayeni enu izonka zokushukushukunyiswa zizibini; zoba zezezibini ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo; sezibilisiwe ziya kwojwa: lulibo kuyehova. 
Leviticus23:18 Naniya kunikela ndawonye nezonka ezo imvana ezimsulwa zibe sixe̔nxe, ezomnyaka mnye, kwa nenkunzana elitole lenkomo ibe nye, nenkunzi zegusha zibe mbini: zoba lidini lokutshiswa kuyehova, kunye nomnikelo wokudla wazo neminikelo yokusela yazo, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Leviticus23:19 Nandule nenze ixwana linye lebokwe libe lidini lesono, nemvana zimbini zomnyaka mnye zibe ngumbingo woxolo." 
Leviticus23:20 Waye umperisite eya kuzishukushukumisa ndawonye nezonka zolibo, zibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa, pambi kwoyehova, kunye nemvana zombini: zoba yingcwele kuyehova ngenxa yomperisite." 
Leviticus23:21 Naniya kushumayela ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo, ukuba makube yintlanganisano engcwele kuni: aniyi kwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo ngawo: kwoba ngummiselwa ongunapakade kuwo onke amakaya enu ngezizukulwana zenu." 
Leviticus23:22 Naxeshekweni nivunayo ukuvunwa kwomhlaba wenu, akuyi kugqibela amagumbi entsimi yako ekuvuneni kwako; nokubutekayo kwokuvuna kwako akuyi kukubuta; wokushiyela ihlwempu nowasemzini oko: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus23:23 Wateta uyehova kanjako ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus23:24 Teta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, noba nopumlo, inkumbuzo yokuhlokoma kwamaxilongo, intlanganisano engcwele." 
Leviticus23:25 Aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo; koko niya kunikela umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova. 
Leviticus23:26 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus23:27 Kanjalo ngoweshumi umhla walenyanga yesixe̔nxe, ngumhla wokuxolisa wona; noba nentlanganisano engcwele; naniya kubandezela imipefumlo yenu, ninikele umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Leviticus23:28 Nangokwa nguwo umhla lowo aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi: ngokuba ungumhla wokuxolisa wona, wokuba kunenzelwe uxoliso ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus23:29 Ngokuba yonke imipefumlo engabandezelwanga ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo, yona yonqanyulwa ebantwini bayo." 
Leviticus23:30 Nayo yonke imipefumlo eyenzayo omnye umsebenzi ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo, sendiya kutshabalalisa imipefumlo leyo pakati kwabantu bayo." 
Leviticus23:31 Aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi: ngummiselwa ongunapakade ngezizukulwana zenu kuwo onke amakaya enu. 
Leviticus23:32 Woba yisabata yopumlo kuni, eniya kubandezela imipefumlo yenu ngayo: ngowesitoba umhla wenyanga ngokuhlwa, kwa sekuhlweni kude kube sekuhlweni, niya kuyenza isabata yenu." 
Leviticus23:33 Wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus23:34 Teta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Ngoweshumi linesihlanu umhla walenyanga yesixe̔nxe, kwobako umtendeleko wamapempe imihla ibe sixe̔nxe kuyehova." 
Leviticus23:35 Ngomhla wokuqala kwobako intlanganisano engcwele: aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo ngawo. 
Leviticus23:36 Yoba yimihla esixe̔nxe eniya kunikela umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova; ngomhla wesibozo noba nentlanganisano engcwele, naniya kunikela umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova: yintlanganiso enkulu; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi." 
Leviticus23:37 Yiyo le imitendeleko kayehova, eniya kuyishumayela ukuba zintlanganisano ezingcwele, kuze kunikelwe umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova, idini lokutshiswa nomnikelo wokudla, umbingelelo neminikelo yokusela, into yemini ngemini yayo:" 
Leviticus23:38 ngapandle kwesabata zikayehova, nangapandle kwezipo zenu, nangapandle kwazo zonke izibambiso zenu, nangapandle kwayo yonke iminikelo yenu yesisa, eniyinikayo kuyehova." 
Leviticus23:39 Kodwa ngoweshumi linesihlanu umhla wenyanga yesixe̔nxe, nxa nibutileyo imveliso yomhlaba, niya kubamba umtendeleko kayehova imihla ibe sixe̔nxe: ngomhla wokuqala lwobako upumlo, nangomhla wesibozo lwobako upumlo." 
Leviticus23:40 Niya kutabatela kuni ngomhla wokuqala amasebe emiti emihle, amasebe emiti yepalime, namagatya emiti ebungqingqwa, nemincunuba yasemlanjaneni; naniya kugcoba pambi kwoyehova, utixo wenu, imihla ibe sixe̔nxe." 
Leviticus23:41 Lowo umtendeleko niya kuwubamba kuyehova imihla ibe sixe̔nxe emnyakeni mnye: ngummiselwa ongunapakade ezizukulwaneni zenu; ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe niya kuwubamba. 
Leviticus23:42 Niya kuhlala emapempeni imihla ibe sixe̔nxe; bonke abangama‐Sirayeli ngokuzalwa bohlala emapempeni; 
Leviticus23:43 ukuze zikwazi izizukulwana zenu okokuba bendihlalisa usapo luka‐Sirayeli emapempeni, ndakulupumisa elizweni le‐Jipete: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus23:44 Waye u‐Mosesi waxela imitendeleko kayehova elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli. 
Leviticus24:1 WABUYA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus24:2 Yalela usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba luyizise kuwe ioli engcwengileyo yamanquma anqushiweyo ibe yeyesikanyiso, kuze kumiswe izibane ngamaxesha onke." 
Leviticus24:3 Ngapandle kwekuselo lesinqi̔no, kuyo intente yentlangano, uya kulungisa sona u‐Arone, kwa sekuhlweni kude kuse, ebusweni bukayehova, ngamaxesha onke: ngummiselwa ongunapakade kwizizukulwana zenu." 
Leviticus24:4 Pezu kwekandelare ecocekileyo uya kulungisa izibane ebusweni bukayehova futi. 
Leviticus24:5 Kanjalo uya kutabata umgubo ocolekileyo, woje ngawo izonkana zibe lishumi elinazibini: zoba zezibini ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kwesinye isonkana." 
Leviticus24:6 Wauya kubeka zona ngenṙozo zimbini, zibe zitandatu eluṙozweni lunye, pezu kwayo itafile ecocekileyo, pambi kwoyehova." 
Leviticus24:7 Wandule ubeke pezu kwenṙozo zombini intlakamhlope engcwengileyo, ize ibe ngumnikelo wokukumbuza pezu kwesonka, kwa umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Leviticus24:8 Yonke imihla yesabata ngaminye wosilungisa pambi kwoyehova futi, sivela elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli ngocebano olungunapakade." 
Leviticus24:9 Soba sesika‐Arone nesonyana bake, abaya kusitya kweyingcwele indawo; ngokuba siyinto eyingcwelekazi kuye pakati kweminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova, ngommiselo ongunapakade." 
Leviticus24:10 KEKALOKU kwapuma unyana womfazi ongum‐Sirayelikazi, obengunyana wendoda engum‐Jipete, pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli: wasuka lo nyana wom‐Sirayelikazi wangxolisana nendoda engum‐Sirayeli emnqubeni." 
Leviticus24:11 Waza unyana wom‐Sirayelikazi waligxeka igama lika‐Yehova, watuka; ngako bamzisa ku‐Mosesi: laye igama lonina lingu‐Shelomiti, intombi ka‐Diberi, owesizwe sika‐Dane." 
Leviticus24:12 Baye bemfaka entolongweni, ukuda bashunyayezwe ngelizwe likayehova." 
Leviticus24:13 Wada wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus24:14 Umtuki lowo mkupele pandle kwomnquba, bati bonke ababesiva balalise izandla zabo pezu kwentloko yake; yandule yonke intlanganiso imgibisele ngamatye." 
Leviticus24:15 Nakulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli uya kuteta, usiti: Umntu osukuba etuka utixo wake, uya kutwala isono sake." 
Leviticus24:16 Nogxekayo igama likayehova, yena uya kufiswa ngenyaniso; yonke intlanganiso yomgibisela ngamatye ngenyaniso: owasemzini woba njengozelweyo elizweni; nxa agxekayo igama lika‐Yehova, uya kufiswa." 
Leviticus24:17 Nosukuba ebulala omnye umntu ubomi, uya kufiswa ngenyaniso." 
Leviticus24:18 Kanjalo obulalayo isilo ubomi, uya kusibuyekezela; isilo ngenxa yesilo." 
Leviticus24:19 Naxeshekweni umntu enzela ummelwane wake isonakalo; njengoko akwenzileyo, kuya kwenziwa njalo nakuye:" 
Leviticus24:20 isapuko ngenxa yesapuko, iliso ngenxa yeliso, izinyo ngenxa yezinyo: njengokuba enzele umntu isonakalo, uya kwenzelwa njalo naye." 
Leviticus24:21 Lowo obulalayo isilo, wosibuyekezela; kanti obulalayo umntu, uya kufiswa." 
Leviticus24:22 Noba nesiko linye; owasemzini woba njengozelweyo elizweni: ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus24:23 Waza u‐Mosesi wateta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba malumkupe umtuki lowo ngapandle kwomnquba, lumgibisele ngamatye. Lwati usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenza njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus25:1 WALEKELA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi ngasentabeni ye‐Sinai, esiti:" 
Leviticus25:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Xeshekweni nise nifikile kulomhlaba endinipa wona, uya kupumla umhlaba lowo isabata kuyehova." 
Leviticus25:3 Yiminyaka mitandatu uya kuhlwayela intsimi yako, neminyaka mitandatu uya kunqumla isitiya sako semiti yeveyine, nemveliso yaso uyibute." 
Leviticus25:4 Kodwa ngomnyaka wesixe̔nxe yobako isabata yopumlo emhlabeni, isabata kuyehova: intsimi yako akuyi kuyihlwayela, nesitiya sako semiti yeveyine akuyi kusinqumla." 
Leviticus25:5 Oko kuhlumileyo ngokwako kwokuvuna kwako akuyi kukuvuna, nedreyive zomti wako weveyine onganqunyulwanga akuyi kuzika: woba ngumnyaka wopumlo emhlabeni." 
Leviticus25:6 Isabata yomhlaba yoba kukutya kuni; kwa kuwe, nakwisicaka sako, nakwisicakakazi sako, nakumqeshwa wako, nakwiṙanuka lako lakwabapambukele kuwe," 
Leviticus25:7 nakwinkomo zako, nakwizilo eziselizweni lako, yonke imveliso yayo yoba kukutya." 
Leviticus25:8 Kanjako uya kubala kuwe isabata zeminyaka zibe sixe̔nxe, kwa izixe̔nxe zeminyaka ezisixe̔nxe; ize imihla yesabata zeminyaka zosixe̔nxe ibe yiminyaka ingamashumi mane anesitoba kuwe." 
Leviticus25:9 Uya kwandula uhlokomise ixilongo lokuvusa ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe, ngoweshumi umhla wenyanga; ngomhla wokuxolisa niya kuhlokomisa ixilongo kulo lonke ilizwe lenu." 
Leviticus25:10 Naniya kuwenza ngcwele lomnyaka wamashumi mahlanu, nishumayele inkululeko elizweni kubo bonke abemi balo: woba ngumnyaka womgcobo kuni wona; naniya kubuya nonke ngabanye niye emafeni enu, niti kanjalo nibuye nonke ngabanye niye kwizizalwane zenu." 
Leviticus25:11 Woba ngumnyaka womgcobo kuni lomnyaka wamashumi mahlanu: aniyi kuhlwayela, aniyi kuvuna nokuvuna oko kuhlumileyo ngokwako kuwo, n edreyive zawo zomti weveyine onganqunyulwanga aniyi kuzika." 
Leviticus25:12 Ngokuba ngumnyaka womgcobo wona; woba ngcwele kuni: niya kuyidla imveliso yawo emasimini. 
Leviticus25:13 Ngalomnyaka womgcobo niya kubuya nonke ngabanye niye emafeni enu. 
Leviticus25:14 Ngako xeshekweni nitengisa ummelwane wako into yokutengwa, umhlaumbi nitenge into esandleni sommelwane wako, aniyi kubandezelana:" 
Leviticus25:15 ngenani leminyaka emveni kwowomgcobo uya kutenga kummelwane wako, na ngenani leminyaka yokuvelisa uya kutengisa kuwe:" 
Leviticus25:16 njengobuninzi beminyaka uya kwandisa ixabiso layo, nanjengobuncinane beminyaka uya kuncipisa ixabiso layo; ngokuba kungenani leminyaka yokuvelisa atengisayo kuwe." 
Leviticus25:17 Ize ningabandezelani; kodwa moyike utixo wako: ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus25:18 Ngako niya kuyenza imimiso yam, nezigwebo zam niya kuzigcina, nizenze; naniya kuhlala elizweni ngokunqaba." 
Leviticus25:19 Kanjalo umhlaba wonika ukuqa̔ma kwawo, naniya kutya kude kuhlutwe, nihlale nokuhlala ngokunqaba kuwo." 
Leviticus25:20 Naxeshekweni niya kuti: Sotya nto nina ngomnyaka wesixe̔nxe? bona ke, asiyi kuhlwayela, asiyi kubuta inzuzo yetu kanjako;" 
Leviticus25:21 ndiya kwandula ndiyalele itamsanqa lam libe pezu kwenu ngomnyaka wesitandatu, oya kuvelisa inzuzo eyan ele iminyaka mitatu." 
Leviticus25:22 Noti umnyaka wesibozo nihlwayele, nitye nokutya kwendala inzuzo ude ube ngumnyaka wetoba; kude kufike imveliso yawo niya kutya endala." 
Leviticus25:23 Umhlaba awuyi kutengiselwa ixesha elingunapakade, umhlaba ungowam nje: ngokuba nina ningabasemzini namaṙanuka ngakum." 
Leviticus25:24 Ngako kuwo wonke umhlaba wokufuya kwenu, niya kuvumela umhlaba inkululwa." 
Leviticus25:25 Nxa umzalwana wako aya kuhlwempuza, aze atengise ngento yomhlaba wemfuyo yake, sekuya kuza umkululi, osisalamane kuye, akulule okutengisiweyo ngumzalwana wake." 
Leviticus25:26 Naxeshekweni umntu angenaye umkululi, kanti yena unamandla ngokwake ukufumana okwaneleyo inkululwa yako;" 
Leviticus25:27 makayibale iminyaka yokutengiswa kwako, ati okupezulu akubuyisele kulomntu waetengisile ngako kuye; aze abuyele emfuyweni yake." 
Leviticus25:28 Kodwa ukuba isandla sake asinakufumana okwaneleyo ukuba akubuyisele kuye, kwohlala okutengisiweyo nguye esandleni salowo okutengileyo, kude kube ngumnyaka womgcobo; koko ngo mnyaka womgcobo kuya kupuma, ati yena abuyele emfuyweni yake." 
Leviticus25:29 Naxeshekweni umntu atengisa ngendlu yokuhlala esixekweni esibiyelwe ludonga, angaba nokuyikulula ude ugqitywe umnyaka wokutengiswa kwayo: pakati kwomnyaka upela angaba nokuyikulula." 
Leviticus25:30 Kodwa ukuba ayikululwa pakati kwokuzaliswa kwomnyaka ofezekileyo, leyondlu esesixekweni esibiyelwe ludonga yoqiniswa kude kube ngunapakade kulowo oyitengileyo ngezizukulwana zake: ayiyi kupuma ngo mnyaka womgcobo." 
Leviticus25:31 Kanti izindlu zemizi ekungeko kuyo udonga olungqongayo, zobalwa ngokuba zizindle zelizwe: zoba nokukululwa; ziya kupuma ngo mnyaka womgcobo." 
Leviticus25:32 Kodwa izixeko zaba‐Levi, n ezindlu zezixeko zemfuyo yabo, aba‐Levi boba nokuzikulula ngamaxesha onke." 
Leviticus25:33 Naxeshekweni kukululwe ngowaba‐Levi, kuya kupuma indlu ebitengisiwe, nesixeko semfuyo yake, ngo mnyaka womgcobo: ngokuba izindlu zezixeko zaba‐Levi ziyimfuyo yabo pakati kwalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Leviticus25:34 Kodwa izindle zenqele zezixeko zabo azitengeki; ngokuba ziyimfuyo engunapakade kubo. 
Leviticus25:35 Kanjako nxa umzalwana wako aya kuhlwempuza, abohle ngamandla ake ngakuwe, yena uya kumxasa, nokuba ungowasemzini, nokuba uliṙanuka, ukuze abe nokupila ngakuwe." 
Leviticus25:36 Akuyi kutabata kuye inzuzo enkulu, nokwanda okuninzi; koko uya kwoyika utixo wako, ukuze abe nokupila ngakuwe umzalwana wako." 
Leviticus25:37 Imali yako akuyi kuyinika kuye ngenxa yenzuzo enkulu, nokutya kwako akuyi kumboleka kona ngenxa yokwanda okuninzi." 
Leviticus25:38 Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu, onipumisileyo ezweni le‐Jipete, ukuba ndininike ilizwe le‐Kanane, ndize ndibe ngutixo kuni." 
Leviticus25:39 Kananjalo nxa umzalwana wako ongakuwe aya kuhlwempuza, andule azitengise kuwe, akuyi kumkonzisa ngenkonzo yekoboka:" 
Leviticus25:40 njengomqeshwa, njengoliṙanuka wobako kuwe: kude kube ngumnyaka womgcobo uya kukonza kuwe;" 
Leviticus25:41 andule apume kuwe, yena nosapo lwake kunye naye, abuyele kwisizalwane sakowabo; wobuyela kwa kuyo imfuyo yoyise bake." 
Leviticus25:42 Ngokuba bezizicaka zam, endibapumisileyo elizweni le‐Jipete; abayi kutengelwa ngokutengiswa kwekoboka." 
Leviticus25:43 Akuyi kupata ubukosi pezu kwake ngobulukuni; koko uya kwoyika utixo wako. 
Leviticus25:44 Ikoboka lako nekobokakazi lako, lawo uya kuba nawo, wona oba ngawentlanga eziningqongayo; kwa kuzo niya kutenga ikoboka nekobokakazi." 
Leviticus25:45 Nakanjako usapo lwamaṙanuka apambukeleyo kuni, kwa kulo niya kuwatenga, nakuzo izizalwane zalo ezipakati kwenu, ezo luzizeleyo elizweni lenu: wona oba yimfuyo kuni." 
Leviticus25:46 Naniya kuwashiya abe lilifa kubantwana benu emva kwenu, ukuba bawabambe abe yimfuyo; wona niya kuwakonzisa kude kube ngunapakade; kodwa pezu kwabazalwana benu usapo luka‐Sirayeli, aniyi kupata ubukosi omnye pezu kwomnye ngobulukuni." 
Leviticus25:47 Naxeshekweni aya kutyeba owasemzini umhlaumbi oliṙanuka ngakuwe, ati umzalwana wako ngakuye ahlwempuze, ade azitengise kowasemzini umhlaumbi k oliṙanuka ngakuwe, umhlaumbi kowesipunzi sesizalwane sowasemzini:" 
Leviticus25:48 angati emveni kwokutengiswa kwake enzelwe inkululwa; omnye kwabazalwana bake angamkulula. 
Leviticus25:49 Umhlaumbi uyisekazi wake, umhlaumbi unyana woyisekazi wake, uya kumkulula; umhlaumbi osisalamane senyama yake kwisizalwane sake uya kumkulula; umhlaumbi ukuba kuyenzeka kuye, angazikulula yena." 
Leviticus25:50 Waeya kubalelana nalowo owamtengayo, kutabata emnyakeni wokutengiswa kwake kuye, kude kube ngumnyaka womgcobo: yoti imali yokutengiswa kwake ibe ngenani leminyaka; njengemihla yomqeshwa kwoba njalo kuye." 
Leviticus25:51 Ukuba isemininzi ke iminyaka, kwa ngokwaleyo uya kubuyisa ixabiso lenkululwa yake, kulomali watengwa ngayo." 
Leviticus25:52 Kanti ukuba kusala iminyaka emincinane kude kube ngumnyaka womgcobo, uya kubalelana naye; na ngokweminyaka yake wobuyisa ixabiso lenkululwa yake." 
Leviticus25:53 Njengomqeshwa womnyaka ngomnyaka wobako kuye; akayi kupata ubukosi pezu kwake ngobulukuni emehlweni ako. 
Leviticus25:54 Woti ukuba akakululwa pakati kwale minyaka, andule apume ngomnyaka womgcobo, yena nosapo lwake kunye naye." 
Leviticus25:55 Ngokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli luzizicaka kum; luzizicaka zam lona, endilupumisileyo elizweni le‐Jipete: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus26:1 ANIYI kuzenzela amadalo, nomfanekiso oqingqiweyo; aniyi kuzipakamisela isifanekiso esimiyo kanjalo; nelitye eliba̔liweyo aniyi kulimisa elizweni lenu, ukuba nitobe pantsi pambi kwalo: ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Leviticus26:2 Isabata zam niya kuzigcina, nendawo yam engcwele niya kuyihlonela: ndi nguyehova mna." 
Leviticus26:3 Ukuba niyahamba ngemimiso yam, nigcine nemiyalelo yam, niyenze nokuyenza;" 
Leviticus26:4 ndiya kwandula ndiyinise imvula yenu ngexesha layo; woti umhlaba unike ukuhluma kwawo, nemiti yasendle inike ukuqa̔ma kwayo;" 
Leviticus26:5 liti ixesha lokubula lifikele ukuvunwa kwedreyive, nokuvunwa kwedreyive kufikele ixesha lokuhlwayela; naniya kudla ukutya kwenu kude kuhlutwe, nihlale ngokunqaba elizweni lenu." 
Leviticus26:6 Kanjalo ndonika uxolo elizweni, nize, niti tyambalala, kungeko oya kunitusa: ndandiya kupelisa amaṙamncwa elizweni; kanjalo iṙele aliyi kudlula elizweni lenu." 
Leviticus26:7 Naniya kusukela intshaba zenu, eziya kuwa pambi kwenu ngeṙele." 
Leviticus26:8 Isihlanu sakuni sosukela iwaka, nekulu lakuni losukela ishumi lamawaka; ziti intshaba zenu ziwe pambi kwenu ngeṙele." 
Leviticus26:9 Ngokuba ndiya kubeka kuni, ndinicumise, ndinandise nokunandisa; nocebano lwam ndiya kulumisa nani." 
Leviticus26:10 Naniya kutya okudala, okwomileyo; kanjalo okudala nokukupa ngenxa yokutsha." 
Leviticus26:11 Ndandiya kubeka itabanakele yam pakati kwenu; waye umpefumlo wam ungayi kunidela. 
Leviticus26:12 Ndiya kuhamba pakati kwenu, ndibe ngutixo kuni, noti nina nibe ngabantu kum." 
Leviticus26:13 Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu, endinipumisileyo elizweni le‐Jipete, ukuze ningabi ngamakoboka kubo; ndandapule izibonda zeyokwe yenu, ndenza ukuba nihambe ngokupakama." 
Leviticus26:14 Kodwa ukuba aniyi kupulapula kum, nayo yonke lemiyalelo aniyi kuyenza;" 
Leviticus26:15 nokuba niya kulahla imimiso yam, nokuba umpefumlo wenu uya kudela izigwebo zam, nize ningayenzi yonke imiyalelo yam, nide nilwapule ucebano lwam:" 
Leviticus26:16 kanjalo nam ndiya kwenza oku kuni, okwokuba ndiya kubeka pezu kwenu isituso, nokungcungcuteka, necesine, ezonto eziya kugqibela amehlo, ziwucubukise nompefumlo; nembewu yenu nofumana niyihlwayele, ngokuba ziya kuyidla intshaba zenu." 
Leviticus26:17 Ndandiya kumisa ubuso bam ngakuni, ukuze noyiswe pambi kwentshaba zenu; baye abatiyi benu beya kunipata ngobukosi, naniya kusaba nina, nxa kungeko oniputumayo." 
Leviticus26:18 Nokuba aniyi kuti ngako oku nipulapule kum, sendiya kwongeza ukunohlwaya ngokusixe̔nxe ngenxa yezono zenu." 
Leviticus26:19 Ngokuba ndiya kwapula iṙatshi lokwomelela kwenu; ndandiya kwenza izulu lenu njengesincete, nomhlaba wenu njengobedu." 
Leviticus26:20 Kanjako kwofumana kupeliswe amandla enu; ngokuba umhlaba wenu ungayi kunika ukuhluma kwawo, nemiti yelizwe ingayi kunika ukuqa̔ma kwayo." 
Leviticus26:21 Nokuba niya kuhamba ngokucasana nam, nize ningavumi ukupulapula kum, sendiya kwongeza pezu kwenu izibeto ngokusixe̔nxe njengezono zenu." 
Leviticus26:22 Ndandiya kutuma pakati kwenu izilo zasendle, eziya kunihluta abantwana benu, zibubise nenkomo zenu, zenze nina nibe bancinane; zaye indlela zenu ziya kweneka." 
Leviticus26:23 Nokuba aniyi kuti ngezizinto nilulekwe ndim, koko niya kuhamba ngokucasana nam;" 
Leviticus26:24 sendiya kuhamba kwa nam ngokucasana nani, ndinibete kanjalo ngokusixe̔nxe ngenxa yezono zenu." 
Leviticus26:25 Ndandiya kuzisa pezu kwenu iṙele, eliya kupindezela impindezelo yocebano lwam: kanjalo nakubutelwa ezixekweni zenu, ndiya kwandula nditume isifo esibubisayo pakati kwenu; naniya kunikelwa esandleni sotshaba." 
Leviticus26:26 Kwoti xeshekweni ndinapulele umsimelelo wesonka, bandule abafazi abalishumi boje isonka senu eziko linye, babuyise isonka senu ngokulinganisa: notya ke, kanti aniyi kuhluta." 
Leviticus26:27 Nokuba aniyi kuti ngako oku nipulapule kum, koko niya kuhamba ngokucasana nam;" 
Leviticus26:28 sendiya kuhamba ngokucasana nani ngobuṙalaṙume, ndinohlwaye kanjalo ngokusixe̔nxe ngenxa yezono zenu." 
Leviticus26:29 Ngokuba niya kuyidla inyama yonyana benu, nenyama yentombi zenu niya kuyidla." 
Leviticus26:30 Ndandiya kuzicita indawo zenu ezipakamileyo, ndizigaule izifanekiselo zelanga zenu, nezidumbu zenu ndoziposa pezu kwezidumbu zezitixwana zenu; woti umpefumlo wam unidele." 
Leviticus26:31 Nezixeko zenu ndiya kuzenza bunxuwa, nendawo zenu ezingcwele ndozicitakalisa; kanjako andiyi kusezela ivumba elimnandi lenu." 
Leviticus26:32 Ewe, elozwe ndolicitakalisa; zide ziti nqa pezu kwalo intshaba zenu ezihlala kulo." 
Leviticus26:33 Nani nina ndoniti sa pakati kwabaheyideni, ndir̔ole nasemva kwenu iṙele: loti ilizwe lenu libe yingcitakalo, nezixeko zenu zibe bunxuwa." 
Leviticus26:34 Oko ilizwe liya kwenzelela isabata zalo, yonke imihla yokucitakala kwalo, neyokubako kwenu ezweni lentshaba zenu; kwa oko liya kupumla ilizwe, lenzelele isabata zalo." 
Leviticus26:35 Yonke imihla yokucitakala kwalo liya kupumla; ngokokuba lingapumlanga kuzo isabata zenu, nxa nibe nihleli pezu kwalo." 
Leviticus26:36 Nabaseleyo pakati kwenu ndiya kuzisa ubugwala ezintliziyweni zabo emazweni entshaba zabo; side isandi segqabi elipetshulweyo sibasabise: babeya kubaleka, njengokungati kubalekwa iṙele, bawe nokuwa, nxa kungeko oputumayo." 
Leviticus26:37 Baya kuwelana njengapambi kweṙele, nxa oputumayo angeko; kanjako aniyi kuba nako ukuma ebusweni bentshaba zenu." 
Leviticus26:38 Koko niya kububa pakati kwabaheyideni, nelizwe lentshaba zenu lonidla." 
Leviticus26:39 Boti abaseleyo pakati kwenu bangcungcuteke ngenkohlakalo yabo emazweni entshaba zenu; nakanjako ngenkohlakalo zoyise babo baya kungcungcuteka kunye nabo. 
Leviticus26:40 Ukuba baya kuxela inkohlakalo yabo, nenkohlakalo yoyise babo, ngesigqito bagqitile ngaso ngakum; nokokuba kanjalo bahambile ngokucasana nam;" 
Leviticus26:41 nokuba kanjalo ndihambile ngokucasana nabo, ndabazisa elizweni lentshaba zabo: ukuba oko zitobekile intliziyo zabo ezingalukileyo, nokuba oko bayavuma ukwohlwayelwa kwenkohlakalo yabo;" 
Leviticus26:42 ndiya kwandula ndikumbule ucebano lwam kunye no‐Yakobi; nalo nocebano lwam kunye no‐Yisake, nalo nocebano lwam kunye no‐Abrahame ndolukumbula; nelizwe ndolikumbula." 
Leviticus26:43 Kwa njalo ilizwe loshiyelwa ngabo, lenzelele isabata zalo, nxa licitakele ngenxa yabo, bade bavume bona ukwohlwayelwa kwenkohlakalo yabo; ngokuba, ewe ngokokuba belahlile izigwebo zam, nokuba umpefumlo wabo udelile imimiso yam." 
Leviticus26:44 Kodwa noko kunjalo, bakuba besemazweni entshaba zabo, andiyi kubalahla, andiyi kubadela kanjalo, ukuba ndibagqibele, no kuba ndilwapule ucebano lwam kunye nabo: ngokuba ndi nguyehova mna, utixo wabo." 
Leviticus26:45 Kodwa ndobakumbulela ucebano lwomakulu babo, endapumisa bona elizweni le‐Jipete emehlweni abaheyideni, ukuze ndibe ngutixo wabo: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Leviticus26:46 Yiyo le imimiso, nemigwebo, nemiteto, abeyenza uyehova pakati kwake nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, entabeni ye‐Sinai, ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Leviticus27:1 WALEKELA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Leviticus27:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, niti kulo: Xeshekweni umntu aya kwahlukanisa isibambiso, iziqu zoba ze zikayehova ngokulinganisa kwako." 
Leviticus27:3 Kwakuba ukulinganisa kwako kukokwendoda, eminyaka imashumi mabini ubudala bayo, kude kube yeminyaka imashumi matandatu ubudala bayo, makuti ukulinganisa kwako kube zishekele zesilivere ezimashumi mahlanu, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo." 
Leviticus27:4 Kodwa ukuba yinkazana, ukulinganisa kwako kwoba zishekele ezimashumi matatu." 
Leviticus27:5 Nokuba ngominyaka mihlanu, kude kube ngominyaka imashumi mabini, makuti ukulinganisa kwako indoda kube zishekele ezimashumi mabini, nangenxa yenkazana makube zishekele ezilishumi linye." 
Leviticus27:6 Nokuba ngowenyanga nye, kude kube ngominyaka mihlanu, makuti ukulinganisa kwako indoda kube zishekele zesilivere ezintlanu, nangenxa yenkazana ukulinganisa kwako kwoba zishekele zesilivere ezintatu." 
Leviticus27:7 Nokuba ngominyaka imashumi matandatu napezulu, ukuba yindoda, makuti ukulinganisa kwako kube zishekele ezilishumi linesihlanu, nangenxa yenkazana makube zishekele ezilishumi." 
Leviticus27:8 Kodwa ukuba ungohlwempuzileyo ngapantsi kwokulinganisa kwako, makazimise pambi kwomperisite, aze umperisite amlinganise: ngokwamandla ake obambisileyo umperisite uya kumlinganisa." 
Leviticus27:9 Nokuba sisilo, ekunganikelwa ngaso umnikelo kuyehova; zonke ekunikwa ngumntu kwezinjalo kuyehova zoba ngcwele." 
Leviticus27:10 Akayi kusiguqula, akayi kusanana kanjalo, esilungileyo ngesibi, umhlaumbi esibi ngesilungileyo; kodwa ukuba uka asanane isilo ngesilo noko, kwa sona neso kwananwa ngaso zoba ngcwele." 
Leviticus27:11 Nokuba sisesinye isilo esinco̔lileyo, ekungenikelwe ngaso umnikelo kuyehova, uya kwandula amise esosilo ebusweni bomperisite." 
Leviticus27:12 Waye umperisite eya kusilinganisa, ukuba silungile, ukuba sibi kusinina: njengokulinganisa kwako, mperisite! soba njalo." 
Leviticus27:13 Kodwa ukuba woka asikulule, uya kwandula asongeze esesihlanu isiqingata senani laso pezu kwokulinganisa kwako." 
Leviticus27:14 Naxeshekweni umntu aya kungcwalisa indlu ibe ngcwele kuyehova, woti umperisite ayilinganise, ukuba ilungile, ukuba imbi kusinina: njengokuba eyilinganisa umperisite, iya kuma njalo." 
Leviticus27:15 Nokuba lowo oyingcwalisileyo wokulula indlu yake, uya kusongeza esesihlanu isiqingata semali yokulinganisa kwako pezu kwayo, ize ibe yeyake." 
Leviticus27:16 Nokuba yindawana entsimini yemfuyo yake aya kuyingcwalisa umntu kuyehova, kwoba njengembewu yayo ukulinganisa kwako: indawana yehomere yembewu yeṙalasi yolingana neshekele zesilivere ezimashumi mahlanu." 
Leviticus27:17 Ukuba uyangcwalisa intsimi yake kuqala emnyakeni womgcobo, iya kuma kwa njengokulinganisa kwako." 
Leviticus27:18 Kodwa ukuba uyangcwalisa intsimi yake emveni kwomnyaka womgcobo, makati umperisite ambalele imali njengeminyaka esaseleyo, kwa kude kube ngumnyaka womgcobo, ize isuswe kweyokulinganisa kwako." 
Leviticus27:19 Nokuba woka akulule intsimi lowo oyingcwalisileyo, makongeze esesihlanu isiqingata semali yokulinganisa kwako pezu kwayo, ize iqiniswe kuye." 
Leviticus27:20 Nokuba akayi kukulula lontsimi, umhlaumbi ukuba utengisile lontsimi komnye umntu, ayisayi kubuya ikululwe." 
Leviticus27:21 Koko intsimi leyo, yakupuma ngomnyaka womgcobo, iya kuba ngcwele kuyehova, njengentsimi eyahlukanisiweyo; yoba yeyomperisite imfuyo yayo." 
Leviticus27:22 Kanjako ukuba yintsimi ayitengileyo umntu, engeyeyakuwo amasimi emfuyo yake, aya kuyingcwalisa kuyehova;" 
Leviticus27:23 woti umperisite ambalele inani lokulinganisa kwako kude kube ngumnyaka womgcobo; n emali yokulinganisa kwako woyinika ngomhla lowo, ibe yingcwele kuyehova." 
Leviticus27:24 Ngomnyaka womgcobo yobuya ize intsimi leyo kulowo wayitenga kuye, kwa kulowo imfuyo yomhlaba ibiyeyake." 
Leviticus27:25 Konke ukulinganisa kwako kwoba ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo: zigera ezimashumi mabini eziya kuba yishekele leyo. 
Leviticus27:26 Kodwa izibulo, ekuzityulwa ngalo kuyehova sisilo, akuyi kubako mntu oya kulingcwalisa; nokuba liyinkomo enkulu, nokuba liyinkomo encinane, le likayehova lona." 
Leviticus27:27 Nanxa lilelesilo esinco̔lileyo, uya kukulula lona ngokulinganisa kwako, ati kanjalo ongeze esesihlanu isiqingata sako pezu kwako; nanxa lingakululwa, liya kutengiswa ngokulinganisa kwako." 
Leviticus27:28 Kodwa into esukuba yahlukanisiwe, aya kuti umntu ayahlukanisele uyehova kuko konke anako, kubantu nakwizilo, nakwintsimi yemfuyo yake, ayisayi kutengiswa, ayisayi kukululwa kanjako: zonke izinto ezahlukanisiweyo, zizinto ezingcwelekazi kuyehova zona." 
Leviticus27:29 Konke okwahlukanisiweyo, okuya kwahlukaniswa pakati kwabantu, akuyi kukululwa; kwofiswa ngenyaniso." 
Leviticus27:30 Kananjalo zonke izishumi zomhlaba, ezembewu yomhlaba, ezesiqa̔mo semiti, zona ze zikayehova; zingcwele kuyehova." 
Leviticus27:31 Naxeshekweni umntu aya kuka akulule into kwizishumi zake, esesihlanu isiqingata sazo uya kusongeza pezu kwazo." 
Leviticus27:32 Nazo zonke izishumi zezinkulu nezezincinane inkomo, ezazo zonke ezidlula ngapantsi kwayo intonga, eyeshumi yoba yingcwele kuyehova." 
Leviticus27:33 Akayi kugqalela ukuba ilungile, ukuba imbi kusinina, akayi kuyanana kanjalo: kodwa ukuba woka ayanane noko, kwa yona naleyo kwananwa ngayo zoba ngcwele; ayisayi kukululwa." 
Leviticus27:34 Yiyo le imiyalelo uyehova wayiyalezela u‐Mosesi elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, entabeni ye‐Sinai." 
Numbers1:1 WAYE uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, entlango ye‐Sinai, ententeni yentlangano, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga yesibini, ngomnyaka wesibini emva kwokupuma kwabo elizweni le‐Jipete, esiti:" 
Numbers1:2 Tabatani inani layo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngezizalwane zalo, ngendlu zoyise zalo, ngombalo wamagama, onke amadoda ngamanye ngamanye;" 
Numbers1:3 engaminyaka imashumi mabini napezulu ubudala bawo, onke apumayo nomkosi kwa‐Sirayeli: lawo niya kuwabala ngemikosi yawo, wena no‐Arone." 
Numbers1:4 Nakunye nani kwobako indoda ibe nye kwisizwe ngesizwe, indoda eyintloko pezu kwendlu yoyise yayo." 
Numbers1:5 Ngawo la amagama awo amadoda aya kuma nani; eyesika‐Rubene, ngu‐Elitsure unyana ka‐Shedeyure;" 
Numbers1:6 eyesika‐Simone, ngu‐Shelumiyele unyana ka‐Tsurishadai;" 
Numbers1:7 eyesika‐Juda, ngu‐Nahashone unyana ka‐Haminadabi;" 
Numbers1:8 eyesika‐Yisakare, ngu‐Netaneli unyana ka‐Tsuhare;" 
Numbers1:9 eyesika‐Zebulone, ngu‐Eliyabe unyana ka‐Heloni;" 
Numbers1:10 eyosapo luka‐Josefe, — eyesika‐Frayime, ngu‐Elishama unyana ka‐Hamihude; eyesika‐Manase, ngu‐Gamaliyeli unyana ka‐Pedatsure;" 
Numbers1:11 eyesika‐Benjamine, ngu‐Abidane unyana ka‐Gideyoni;" 
Numbers1:12 eyesika‐Dane, ngu‐Ahihezere unyana ka‐Hamishadai;" 
Numbers1:13 eyesika‐Ashere, ngu‐Pagiyeli unyana ka‐Okerane;" 
Numbers1:14 eyesika‐Gadi, ngu‐Eliyasafa unyana ka‐Dehule;" 
Numbers1:15 eyesika‐Nefatali, ngu‐Ahira unyana ka‐Henani." 
Numbers1:16 Aba bebengabadumileyo bentlanganiso, inkosi zezizwe zoyise babo; bebezintloko zamawaka akwa‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers1:17 Baza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone batabata lamadoda abalulwayo ngamagama; 
Numbers1:18 bahlanganisela ndawonye yonke intlanganiso, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga yesibini, abati bona bashumayela ukuzalwa kwabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, bengabaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, ngabanye ngabanye." 
Numbers1:19 Njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi, kwa njalo wababala entlango ye‐Sinai." 
Numbers1:20 Kekaloku onyana baka‐Rubene, owamazibulo ka‐Sirayeli, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, ngabanye ngabanye, bonke abangamadoda aminyaka imashumi mabini napezulu ubudala bawo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:21 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Rubene, bebengamawaka angamashumi mane enesitandatu, anamakulu mahlanu." 
Numbers1:22 Abonyana baka‐Simone, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ababalweyo babo, ngombalo wamagama, ngabanye ngabanye, bonke abangamadoda aminyaka imashumi mabini napezulu ubudala bawo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:23 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Simone, bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enesitoba, anamakulu matatu." 
Numbers1:24 Abonyana baka‐Gadi, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:25 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Gadi, bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enesihlanu, anamakulu matandatu enamashumi mahlanu." 
Numbers1:26 Abonyana baka‐Juda, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:27 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Juda, bebengamawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe enesine, anamakulu matandatu." 
Numbers1:28 Abonyana baka‐Yisakare, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi:" 
Numbers1:29 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Yisakare, bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enesine, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers1:30 Abonyana baka‐Zebulone, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:31 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Zebulone, bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enesixe̔nxe, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers1:32 Abonyana baka‐Josefe:— Abonyana baka‐Frayime, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi:" 
Numbers1:33 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Frayime, bebengamawaka angamashumi mane, anamakulu mahlanu:" 
Numbers1:34 Abonyana baka‐Manase, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:35 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Manase, bebengamawaka angamashumi matatu enesibini, anamakulu mabini." 
Numbers1:36 Abonyana baka‐Benjamine, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:37 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Benjamine, bebengamawaka angamashumi matatu enesihlanu, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers1:38 Abonyana baka‐Dane, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:39 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Dane, bebengamawaka angamashumi matandatu enesibini, anamakulu asixe̔nxe." 
Numbers1:40 Abonyana baka‐Ashere, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:41 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Ashere, bebengamawaka angamashumi mane enalinye, anamakulu mahlanu." 
Numbers1:42 Onyana baka‐Nefatali, izizukulwana zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngombalo wamagama, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi;" 
Numbers1:43 ababalweyo babo, abesizwe sika‐Nefatali, bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enesitatu, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers1:44 Aba bangabo babalwayo, abo u‐Mosesi wababalayo, kwa no‐Arone, nenkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli, zingamadoda alishumi linamabini: ezinye ngezinye zazipezu kwendlu zoyise zazo." 
Numbers1:45 Baye bonke ababalweyo bonyana baka‐Sirayeli, ngendlu zoyise zabo, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi kwa‐Sirayeli," 
Numbers1:46 kwa bonke ababalweyo, bebengamawaka angamakulu matandatu enamawaka matatu, anamakulu mahlanu enamashumi akwa mahlanu." 
Numbers1:47 Kodwa aba‐Levi, ngesizwe soyise babo, bebengabalwa pakati kwabo." 
Numbers1:48 Ngokuba ebetetile uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers1:49 Kupela isizwe sika‐Levi akuyi kubala sona, nenani labo akuyi kulitabata pakati kwonyana baka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers1:50 Kodwa wena, bamise aba‐Levi pezu kwayo itabanakele yesinqi̔no, napezu kwazo zonke impahla zayo, napezu kwako konke okukokwayo: bona baya kutwala itabanakele, kwa nazo zonke impahla zayo; babeya kukonza kuyo, bati waca ngokungqonga itabanakele." 
Numbers1:51 Nasekundulukeni kwetabanakele, aba‐Levi boyihlisa; nasekumisweni kwetabanakele, aba‐Levi boyipakamisa; koko owasemzini osondelayo eya kufiswa." 
Numbers1:52 Lwaye usapo luka‐Sirayeli luya kuti waca, olunye ngolunye ngakulo ibandla lalo, nolunye ngolunye ngakuyo ibanile yalo, ngemikosi yalo." 
Numbers1:53 Kodwa aba‐Levi baya kuti waca ngokungqonga itabanakele yesinqi̔no, ukuze kungabiko msindo pezu kwentlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli: boti aba‐Levi kanjalo bagcine isigcinelo setabanakele yesinqi̔no." 
Numbers1:54 Lwenje njalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli; njengako konke uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi ngako, lwenje njalo ke." 
Numbers2:1 WAZA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Numbers2:2 Maluti waca usapo luka‐Sirayeli olunye ngolunye ngakuyo ibanile yalo, ngapantsi kwomqondiselo wendlu zoyise zalo; luya kuti waca lukude lungqonga intente yentlangano." 
Numbers2:3 Abo abaya kuti waca ngapambili, ngasekupumeni kwelanga, ngabebanile yebandla lika‐Juda, ngemikosi yabo: inkosi yonyana baka‐Juda yoba ngu‐Nahashone, unyana ka‐Haminadabi." 
Numbers2:4 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe enesine, anamakulu matandatu." 
Numbers2:5 Nabati waca ngakuye boba sisizwe sika‐Yisakare: inkosi yonyana baka‐Yisakare yoba ngu‐Netaneli, unyana ka‐Tsuhare." 
Numbers2:6 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enesine, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers2:7 Kuya kwongezwa isizwe sika‐Zebulone: inkosi yonyana baka‐Zebulone yoba ngu‐Eliyabe, unyana ka‐Heloni." 
Numbers2:8 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enesixe̔nxe, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers2:9 Bonke ababalweyo basebandleni lika‐Juda, bebengamawaka alikulu elinamashumi asibozo enesitandatu, anamakulu mane, ngemikosi yabo. Baya kunduluka kuqala aba." 
Numbers2:10 Ibanile yebandla lika‐Rubene yoba ngasesuyide, ngemikosi yabo: inkosi yonyana baka‐Rubene yoba ngu‐Elitsure, unyana ka‐Shedeyure." 
Numbers2:11 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mane enesitandatu, anamakulu mahlanu." 
Numbers2:12 Nabati waca ngakuye boba sisizwe sika‐Simone: inkosi yonyana baka‐Simone yoba ngu‐Shelumiyele, unyana ka‐Tsurishadai." 
Numbers2:13 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enesitoba, anamakulu matatu." 
Numbers2:14 Kuya kwongezwa nesizwe sika‐Gadi: inkosi yonyana baka‐Gadi yoba ngu‐Eliyasafa, unyana ka‐Rehule." 
Numbers2:15 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mane enesihlanu, anamakulu matandatu enamashumi mahlanu." 
Numbers2:16 Bonke ababalweyo basebandleni lika‐Rubene, bebengamawaka alikulu elinamashumi mahlanu enesinye, anamakulu mane enamashumi mahlanu, ngemikosi yabo. Baya kunduluka ngokwesibini aba." 
Numbers2:17 Kwandul’ ukunduluka intente yentlangano, inebandla laba‐Levi, pakati kwamabandla; njengokuti waca kwabo, kwoba njalo ukunduluka kwabo, bonke ngabanye besezindaweni zabo, ngasezibanileni zabo." 
Numbers2:18 Ibanile yebandla lika‐Frayime, ngemikosi yabo, yoba ngasentshonalanga: inkosi yonyana baka‐Frayime yoba ngu‐Elishama, unyana ka‐Hamihude." 
Numbers2:19 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mane, anamakulu mahlanu." 
Numbers2:20 Abangakuye boba sisizwe sika‐Manase: inkosi yonyana baka‐Manase yoba ngu‐Gamaliyeli, unyana ka‐Pedatsure." 
Numbers2:21 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi matatu enesibini, anamakulu mabini." 
Numbers2:22 Kuya kwongezwa nesizwe sika‐Benjamine: inkosi yonyana baka‐Benjamine yoba ngu‐Abidane, unyana ka‐Gideyoni." 
Numbers2:23 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi matatu enesihlanu, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers2:24 Bonke ababalweyo basebandleni lika‐Frayime, bebengamawaka alikulu enamawaka asibozo, anekulu linye ngapandle, ngemikosi yabo. Baya kunduluka ngokwesitatu aba." 
Numbers2:25 Ibanile yebandla lika‐Dane yoba ngasenode, ngemikosi yabo: inkosi yonyana baka‐Dane yoba ngu‐Ahihezere, unyana ka‐Hamishadai." 
Numbers2:26 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi matandatu enesibini, anamakulu asixe̔nxe." 
Numbers2:27 Nabati waca ngakuye boba sisizwe sika‐Ashere: inkosi yonyana baka‐Ashere yoba ngu‐Pagiyeli, unyana ka‐Okerane." 
Numbers2:28 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mane enesinye, anamakulu mahlanu." 
Numbers2:29 Kuya kwongezwa nesizwe sika‐Nefatali: inkosi yonyana baka‐Nefatali yoba ngu‐Ahira, unyana ka‐Henani." 
Numbers2:30 Umkosi wake, kwa ababalweyo bawo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enesitatu, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers2:31 Bonke ababalweyo basebandleni lika‐Dane, bebengamawaka alikulu elinamashumi mahlanu enesixe̔nxe, anamakulu matandatu. Baya kunduluka ngasemva aba, ngebanile zabo." 
Numbers2:32 Aba ke ngababalweyo bosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngendlu zoyise zalo: bonke ababalweyo basemabandleni, ngemikosi yabo, bebengamawaka angamakulu matandatu enamawaka matatu, anamakulu mahlanu enamashumi akwa mahlanu." 
Numbers2:33 Kodwa aba‐Levi bebengabalwanga pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi. 
Numbers2:34 Lwaye usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenza njengako konke uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi ngako: ngokunjalo lwati waca ngebanile zalo, nangokunjalo lwalunduluka, olunye ngolunye ngezizalwane zalo, ngendlu zoyise zalo." 
Numbers3:1 KANJALO ezi zizizizukulwana zika‐Arone no‐Mosesi, mhlana wabeteta uehova ku‐Mosesi entabeni ye‐Sinai." 
Numbers3:2 Ngawo la amagama abo onyana baka‐Arone: owamazibulo u‐Nadabi, no‐Abihu, n o‐Elezari, no‐Yitamare." 
Numbers3:3 Ngawo la amagama onyana baka‐Arone, abaperisite ababetanjiswe, abazandla bezizalisiwe ukukonza ngobuperisite." 
Numbers3:4 Kodwa u‐Nadabi no‐Abihu bafa ebusweni bukayehova, bakunikela umlilo wasemzini pambi kwoyehova, entlango ye‐Sinai, bengenabo abantwana; kanti u‐Elezari no‐Yitamare bakonza ngobuperisite ebusweni buka‐Arone uyise wabo." 
Numbers3:5 Waye uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers3:6 Sondeza isizwe sika‐Levi, usimise pambi kwo‐Arone umperisite, ukuba bakonze kuye;" 
Numbers3:7 nokuba bagcine isigcinelo sake, nesigcinelo sayo yonke intlanganiso, pambi kwentente yentlangano, baze bayenze inkonzo yetabanakele;" 
Numbers3:8 nokuba bagcine zonke impahla zentente yentlangano, nesigcinelo sosapo luka‐Sirayeli, baze bayenze inkonzo yetabanakele." 
Numbers3:9 Wauya kunika aba‐Levi ku‐Arone nakonyana bake; bayanikwa, bayanikwa bona kuye bevela elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers3:10 Kodwa u‐Arone nonyana bake uya kubamisela ukuba bagcine ubuperisite babo; nowasemzini osondelayo yena uya kufiswa. 
Numbers3:11 Waye uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers3:12 Mna, bona ke, ndibatabatile aba‐Levi kwa pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, esikundleni sawo onke amazibulo ekuzityulwa ngawo pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; ngako aba‐Levi boba ngabam:" 
Numbers3:13 ngokuba onke amazibulo engawam: umhla ndandibeta onke amazibulo ezweni le‐Jipete ngawo, ndawangcwalisa kum onke amazibulo kwa‐Sirayeli, awabantu nawezilo; oba ngawam: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Numbers3:14 Waye uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi entlango ye‐Sinai, esiti:" 
Numbers3:15 Bala onyana baka‐Levi ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngezizalwane zabo; onke amadoda abudala buyinyanga nye nobupezulu uya kubala wona." 
Numbers3:16 Waza u‐Mosesi wababala ngelizwi likayehova, njengokuyalelwa kwake." 
Numbers3:17 Aba ke bebengonyana baka‐Levi ngamagama abo: u‐Gereshone, no‐Kohati, no‐Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Ngawo la namagama abo onyana baka‐Gereshone, ngezizalwane zabo; u‐Libeni no‐Shimehi." 
Numbers3:19 Nonyana baka‐Kohati, ngezizalwane zabo; u‐Hamerame no‐Yitsare, u‐Hebrone no‐Huziyeli." 
Numbers3:20 Nonyana baka‐Merari, ngezizalwane zabo; u‐Mahali no‐Mushi. Zizo ezi izizalwane zaba‐Levi, ngendlu zoyise zabo." 
Numbers3:21 Ku‐Gereshone kwavela isizalwane sama‐Libeni, nesizalwane sama‐Shimehi: zizo ezi izizalwane zama‐Gereshone." 
Numbers3:22 Ababalweyo bawo, ngombalo wawo onke amadoda abudala buyinyanga nye nobupezulu, ababalweyo bawo bebengamawaka asixe̔nxe anamakulu mahlanu." 
Numbers3:23 Izizalwane zama‐Gereshone ziya kuti waca ngasemva kwetabanakele, ngasentshonalanga." 
Numbers3:24 Inkosi yayo indlu yoyise wama‐Gereshone yoba ngu‐Eliyasafa, unyana ka‐Layeli." 
Numbers3:25 Nesigcinelo sonyana baka‐Gereshone ententeni yentlangano, yitabanakele, nentente, n esigubungelo sayo, nelengalenga lalo ucango lwentente yentlangano," 
Numbers3:26 namalengalenga ebala, nelengalenga locango lwebala, elingakuyo itabanakele, nangakuso isibingelo ngento engqongayo; kwa nentambo zalo ngenxa yayo yonke inkonzo yalo." 
Numbers3:27 Naku‐Kohati kwavela isizalwane sama‐Hamerame, nesizalwane sama‐Yitsare, nesizalwane sama‐Hebrone, nesizalwane sama‐Huziyeli: zizo ezi izizalwane zama‐Kohati." 
Numbers3:28 Ngombalo wawo onke amadoda abudala buyinyanga nye nobupezulu, ebengamawaka asibozo anamakulu matandatu, egcina isigcinelo seyingcwele indawo." 
Numbers3:29 Izizalwane zonyana baka‐Kohati ziya kuti waca ecaleni letabanakele, ngasesuyide." 
Numbers3:30 Inkosi yayo indlu yoyise wezizalwane zama‐Kohati yoba ngu‐Elitsafane, unyana ka‐Huziyeli." 
Numbers3:31 Nesigcinelo sawo, yityeya, netafile, nekandelare, nezibingelo, nempahla zeyingcwele indawo akonzayo ngazo, nelengalenga, nako konke okwenkonzo yayo." 
Numbers3:32 Nenkosi yenkosi zaba‐Levi yoba ngu‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite, oya kuba ngumongama pezu kwabagcinayo isigcinelo seyingcwele indawo." 
Numbers3:33 Ku‐Merari kwavela isizalwane sama‐Mahali, nesizalwane sama‐Mushi: zizo ezi izizalwane zama‐Merari." 
Numbers3:34 Nababalweyo bawo, ngombalo wawo onke amadoda abudala buyinyanga nye nobupezulu, bebengamawaka matandatu anamakulu mabini." 
Numbers3:35 Inkosi yayo indlu yoyise wezizalwane zika‐Merari yoba ngu‐Tsuriyeli, unyana ka‐Abihayili: aba baya kuti waca ecaleni letabanakele, ngasenode." 
Numbers3:36 Nomsebenzi wesigcinelo sabo onyana baka‐Merari, ziplanke zetabanakele, nemivalo yayo, nentsika zayo, neziseko zayo, nazo zonke impahla zayo, nako konke okwenkonzo yayo," 
Numbers3:37 nentsika zebala ezilingqongayo, neziseko zazo, nezikonkwane zazo, nentambo zazo." 
Numbers3:38 Kanjalo abo abaya kuti waca pambi kwetabanakele ngasempumalanga, pambi kwentente yentlangano, ngasekupumeni kwelanga, ngu‐Mosesi, no‐Arone, nonyana bake, begcina isigcinelo seyingcwele indawo, ngenxa yesigcinelo salo usapo luka‐Sirayeli; nowasemzini osondelayo yena nya kufiswa." 
Numbers3:39 Bonke ababalweyo babo aba‐Levi, abo bababalayo u‐Mosesi no‐Arone ngelizwi likayehova, ngezizalwane zabo, onke amadoda abudala buyinyanga nye nobupezulu, bebengamawaka angamashumi mabini enesibini." 
Numbers3:40 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Bala onke amazibulo engamadoda pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, abudala buyinyanga nye nobupezulu, ulibale inani lamagama awo." 
Numbers3:41 Wauya kunditabatela mna Yehova aba‐Levi, esikundleni sawo onke amazibulo pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; kwa nenkomo zaba‐Levi, esikundleni sawo onke amazibulo pakati kwenkomo zosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers3:42 Wayebala u‐Mosesi, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele, onke amazibulo pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers3:43 Onke amazibulo engamadoda, ngombalo wamagama, abudala buyinyanga nye nobupezulu, abalweyo awo, ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini enesibini anamakulu mabini anamashumi asixe̔nxe enesitatu." 
Numbers3:44 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers3:45 Tabata aba‐Levi esikundleni sawo onke amazibulo pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nenkomo zaba‐Levi esikundleni senkomo zalo; ngokuba aba‐Levi beya kuba ngabam: mna ndi nguyehova." 
Numbers3:46 Nalawomakulu mabini anamashumi asixe̔nxe enesitatu aya kukululwa, agqitayo pezu kwaba‐Levi, kuwo amazibulo osapo luka‐Sirayeli;" 
Numbers3:47 uya kutabatela wona amanye ngamanye ishekele zibe ntlanu; ezingangayo ishekele yeyingcwele indawo wozitabata; zigera ezimashumi mabini ishekele leyo. 
Numbers3:48 Wauya kunika leyomali ku‐Arone nakonyana bake, ibe ye yokukululwa kwagqitayo pakati kwawo." 
Numbers3:49 Waye u‐Mosesi watabata imali yokukululwa kwawo agqitayo pezu kwakululwayo ngaba‐Levi: 
Numbers3:50 kwa kuwo amazibulo osapo luka‐Sirayeli wayitabata imali leyo; iliwaka elinamakulu matatu anamashumi matandatu anesihlanu leshekele, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo." 
Numbers3:51 Waza u‐Mosesi wayinika imali yawo akululweyo ku‐Arone nakonyana bake, ngelizwi likayehova, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Numbers4:1 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Numbers4:2 Tabata inani lonyana baka‐Kohati, pakati kwabo onyana baka‐Levi, ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo," 
Numbers4:3 abaminyaka ingamashumi matatu nabapezulu, kwa kude kube ngabaminyaka ingamashumi mahlanu, ubudala babo, bonke abangenayo kobubukonzo, ukuba bawenze umsebenzi ententeni yentlangano." 
Numbers4:4 Yoba yilé inkonzo yonyana baka‐Kohati ententeni yentlangano, kwe yingcwele yezingcwele:" 
Numbers4:5 Ekundulukeni kwomnquba, kwoza u‐Arone nonyana bake, batule ikuselo lelengalenga, bayigubungele ngalo ityeya yesinqi̔no:" 
Numbers4:6 bandule babeke pezu kwayo isigubungelo sezintsu zamacelesi, bayandlale kwa pezulu iqiya yezuluṙa lipela, bafake izibonda zayo." 
Numbers4:7 Napezu kwetafile yezonka zokubonakala baya kwandlala iqiya, babeke pezu kwayo izikotile, nezitya, nendebe, nebekile, ekuya kugalelwa ngazo; kanjalo isonka esifuti soba pezu kwayo;" 
Numbers4:8 bandule bandlale pezu kwazo iqiya yesibomvu, bagubungele yona ngesigubungelo sezintsu zamacelesi, bafake izibonda zayo." 
Numbers4:9 Babeya kutabata iqiya yezuluṙa, bagubungele ikandelare yesikanyiso, nezibane zayo, nezicimo zayo, nezipatelo zayo, nazo zonke izitya zeoli zayo, abakonzayo kuyo ngazo." 
Numbers4:10 Baya kubeka yona, nazo zonke impahla zayo, esigubungelweni sezintsu zamacelesi, baze bayibeke pezu kwesibonda sokutwala." 
Numbers4:11 Napezu kwesibingelo segolide baya kwandlala iqiya yezuluṙa, bagubungele yona ngesigubungelo sezintsu zamacelesi, bafake izibonda zaso." 
Numbers4:12 Kanjako bozitabata zonke impahla zenkonzo, abakonzayo ngazo kweyingcwele indawo, bazibeke eqiyeni yezuluṙa, bazigubungele ngesigubungelo sezintsu zamacelesi, bazibeke pezu kwesibonda sokutwala." 
Numbers4:13 Baya kwandula basuse ututu esibingelweni, bandlale pezu kwaso iqiya yesimnyama;" 
Numbers4:14 baze babeke pezu kwayo zonke impahla zaso, ezo bakonza kuso ngazo, izipatamlilo, n eforoke, nezikotululo, nezitya zokufefela, zonke impahla zaso isibingelo; bati kanjalo bandlale pezu kwaso isigubungelo sezintsu zamacelesi, bafake izibonda zaso." 
Numbers4:15 Boti bakuba begqibile u‐Arone nonyana bake ukugubungela eyingcwele indawo, nazo zonke impahla zeyingcwele indawo, ekundulukeni kwomnquba; emveni kwoko, baya kuza onyana baka‐Kohati ukuza kutwala: kodwa mabangayicukumisi leyo nto ingcwele, hleze bafe. Ezi zinto zingumtwalo wonyana baka‐Kohati ententeni yentlangano." 
Numbers4:16 Nokulinda kuka‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite, yioli yesikanyiso, nesiqumiso esimnandi, nomnikelo wokudla wemihla ngemihla, neoli yokutambisa; kwa ukulindwa kwayo yonke itabanakele, nokwako konke okukuyo, okweyingcwele indawo, nokwazo zonke impahla zayo." 
Numbers4:17 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Numbers4:18 Isizwe sezizalwane zama‐Kokati maningasinqamli pakati kwaba‐Levi; 
Numbers4:19 koko lento niya kuyenza kubo, ukuba bapile, bangafi nokufa, bakusondela kweyingcwele yezingcwele: u‐Arone nonyana bake baya kungena, babamise abanye ngabanye pezu kwenkonzo yabo nasekutwaleni kwabo." 
Numbers4:20 Kodwa abayi kungena ukuza kubona, nxa kugujungelwa okuyingcwele, hleze bafe." 
Numbers4:21 Wateta uyehova kanjako ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers4:22 Tabata inani lonyana baka‐Gereshone nabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngezizalwane zabo:" 
Numbers4:23 abaminyaka ingamashumi matatu nabapezulu, kwa kude kube ngabaminyaka ingamashumi mahlanu, nbudala babo, wobabala: bonke abangenayo ukwenza ubukonzo, ukuba basebenze umsebenzi ententeni yentlangano." 
Numbers4:24 Yoba yilé inkonzo yezizalwane zama‐Gereshone, ekusebenzeni nasekutwaleni." 
Numbers4:25 Baya kutwala izikuselo zetabanakele, nentente yentlangano, isigubungelo sayo, nesigubungelo sezintsu zamacelesi, esipezu kwaso ngapezulu, nelengalenga locango lwentente yentlangano;" 
Numbers4:26 namalengalenga ebala, nelengalenga locango lwesango lebala, elingakuyo itabanakele nangakuso isibingelo ngento engqongayo; nentambo zazo, nazo zonke impahla zenkonzo yazo, nako konke okuzenzelweyo, ukuba bakonze ngazo." 
Numbers4:27 Yoba ngelizwi lika‐Arone nonyana bake yonke inkonzo yonyana bama‐Gereshone, kuko konke ukutwala kwabo, nakuko konke ukusebenza kwabo; naniya kubamisela ukugcinwa kwayo yonke imitwalo yabo." 
Numbers4:28 Yilé inkonzo yezizalwane zonyana baka‐Gereshone ententeni yentlangano: nesigcinelo sabo, soba ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Yitamare, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite." 
Numbers4:29 Onyana baka‐Merari, uya kubala bona ngezizalwane zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo:" 
Numbers4:30 abaminyaka ingamashumi matatu nabapezulu, kwa kude kube ngabaminyaka ingamashumi mahlanu, ubudala babo, wobabala; bonke abangenayo kobubukonzo, ukuba basebenze umsebenzi wasententeni yentlangano." 
Numbers4:31 Nasi isigcinelo sokutwala kwabo, ngako konke ukukonza kwabo ententeni yentlangano: iplanke zetabanakele, nemivalo yayo, nentsika zayo, neziseko zayo," 
Numbers4:32 kwa nentsika zebala ezilingqongayo, neziseko zazo, nezikonkwane zazo, nentambo zazo, kunye nazo zonke impahla zazo, nako konke okwenkonzo yazo; naniya kuzibala ngamagama impahla zesigcinelo sokutwala kwabo." 
Numbers4:33 Yilé inkonzo yezizalwane zonyana baka‐Merari, ngako konke ukukonza kwabo ententeni yentlangano, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Yitamare, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite." 
Numbers4:34 Baza bati u‐Mosesi, no‐Arone, nenkosi zentlanganiso, babala onyana bama‐Kohati, ngezizalwane zabo, nangendlu zoyise zabo," 
Numbers4:35 abaminyaka ingamashumi matatu nabapezulu, kwa kude kube ngabaminyaka ingamashumi mahlanu, ubudala babo, bonke abangenayo kobubukonzo, ngenxa yomsebenzi ententeni yentlangano:" 
Numbers4:36 baye ababalweyo babo, ngezizalwane zabo, bengamawaka mabini anamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi mahlanu." 
Numbers4:37 Aba bangababalweyo bezizalwane zama‐Kohati, bonke abakonzayo ententeni yentlangano, abati u‐Mosesi no‐Arone bababala ngelizwi likayehova ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Numbers4:38 Kanjalo ababalweyo bonyana baka‐Gereshone, ngezizalwane zabo, nangendlu zoyise zabo," 
Numbers4:39 abaminyaka ingamashumi matatu nabapezulu, kwa kude kube ngabaminyaka ingamashumi mahlanu, ubudala babo, bonke abangenayo kobubukonzo, ngenxa yomsebenzi ententeni yentlangano," 
Numbers4:40 kwa ababalweyo babo, ngezizalwane zabo, na ngendlu zoyise zabo, bebengamawaka mabini anamakulu matandatu anamashumi matatu." 
Numbers4:41 Aba bangababalweyo bezizalwane zonyana baka‐Gereshone, bonke abakonzayo ententeni yentlangano, abati u‐Mosesi no‐Arone bababala ngelizwi likayehova." 
Numbers4:42 Nababalweyo bezizalwane zonyana baka‐Merari, ngezizalwane zabo, na ngendlu zoyise zabo," 
Numbers4:43 abaminyaka ingamashumi matatu nabapezulu, kwa kude kube ngabaminyaka ingamashumi mahlanu, ubudala babo, bonke abangenayo kobubukonzo, ngenxa yomsebenzi ententeni yentlangano," 
Numbers4:44 kwa ababalweyo babo, ngezizalwane zabo, bebengamawaka matatu anamakulu mabini." 
Numbers4:45 Aba bangababalweyo bezizalwane zonyana baka‐Merari, abati u‐Mosesi no‐Arone bababala ngelizwi likayehova ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Numbers4:46 Bonke ababalweyo, okuya u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, nenkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli, bababala aba‐Levi, ngezizalwane zabo, nangendlu zoyise zabo," 
Numbers4:47 abaminyaka ingamashumi matatu nabapezulu, kwa kude kube ngabaminyaka ingamashumi mahlanu, ubudala babo, bonke abangenayo ukuza kuwenza umsebenzi wobukonzo, nomsebenzi wokutwala, ententeni yentlangano," 
Numbers4:48 kwa ababalweyo babo, bebengamawaka asibozo anamakulu mahlanu anamashumi asibozo." 
Numbers4:49 Ngelizwi likayehova babebalwa, ngesandla sika‐Mosesi, abanye ngabanye ngokusebenza kwabo, nangokutwala kwabo: abo babalwayo nguye, bebengabo uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi ngabo." 
Numbers5:1 WABUYA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers5:2 Yalela usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba malundulule emnqubeni onke amaleperi, nabo bonke abanegqita, nosukuba enco̔lisiwe ngofileyo." 
Numbers5:3 Kwa namadoda namankazana nowandulula; niya kuwandululela ngapandle kwomnquba; ukuze angayinco̔hsi iminquba yawo, endihlala mna pakati kwayo." 
Numbers5:4 Lwenje njalo ke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwawandululela ngapandle kwomnquba: njengoko abetetile uyehova ku‐Mosesi, lwenza kwa ngokunjalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers5:5 Wateta kanjako uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers5:6 Teta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Indoda umhlaumbi umfazi xeshekweni baya kwenza ngaso esinye isono sabantu, begqita ngesigqito ngakuye uyehova, ade abe netyala umpefumlo lowo;" 
Numbers5:7 baya kwandula baxele isono sabo basenzileyo: waeya kubuyekezela ityala lake ngenani lalo, asongeze pezu kwalo esesihlanu isiqingata salo, anike kulowo unetyala kuye." 
Numbers5:8 Kodwa ukuba umntu lowo akanaye osisalamane, ukuze kubuyekezelwe ityala kuye, maliti elotyala libuyekezelwe kuyehova, kumperisite; ngapandle kwenkunzi yegusha yokuxolisa, ekuya kumxoliselwa ngayo." 
Numbers5:9 Kanjalo yonke iminikelo yokufunqufunqulwa yakuzo zonke izinto ezingcwele zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, oluyizisayo kumperisite, yoba yeyake." 
Numbers5:10 Olunye ngolunye izinto ezingcwele zalo zoba zezake: oko kusukuba kunikwa ngumntu kumperisite, kwoba kokwake." 
Numbers5:11 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers5:12 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Nxa aya kupambuka umfazi wendoda, enze ngakuyo ngobumenemene;" 
Numbers5:13 iti enye indoda ilale naye ngokulalela inzalo, kuze kufihlelwe amehlo eyake indoda, ati yena anco̔liswe ngasese, kungeko inqi̔na ngakuye, engatiwanga xafu kanjalo;" 
Numbers5:14 ukuba uyadlula pezu kwayo umoya wobukwele, ide ibe nobukwele pezu kwomfazi wayo, ngokuba enco̔lisiwe; umhlaumbi uyadlula pezu kwayo umoya wobukwele, ide ibe nobukwele pezu kwomfazi wayo, nakuba enganco̔liswanga:" 
Numbers5:15 iya kwandula indoda leyo imzise umfazi wayo kumperisite, iti kanjalo imzisele umnikelo wake, eseshumi isiqingata seyefa yomgubo weṙalasi; ayiyi kugalela pezu kwawo ioli, ayiyi kubeka pezu kwawo intlakamhlope kanjalo; ngokuba ungumnikelo wobukwele wona, umnikelo wenkumbuzo, okumbuzayo inkohlakalo." 
Numbers5:16 Waye umperisite eya kumsondeza, ammise pambi kwoyehova." 
Numbers5:17 Waye umperisite kanjalo eya kutabata amanzi angcwele empandeni wodongwe; nakulo utuli olusemhlabeni wetabanakele uya kutabata, alubeke emanzini lawo:" 
Numbers5:18 andule umperisite ammise umfazi ebusweni bukayehova, ayihlubulule intloko yomfazi, awubeke ezandleni zake umnikelo wenkumbuzo, onguwo umnikelo wobukwele; nasesandleni somperisite kwobako lamanzi aṙaṙa asenzayo isiqalekiso." 
Numbers5:19 Waye umperisite eya kumfungisa, ati emfazini: Ukuba akulalanga ndoda nawe, nokuba akupambukelanga ekunco̔leni upantsi kweyako indoda, yiba ukululeka kulamanzi aṙaṙa asenzayo isiqalekiso:" 
Numbers5:20 koko ukuba upambukile upantsi kweyako indoda, nokuba unco̔lisiwe, ekubeni kuleleyo indoda nawe, ngapandle kweyako indoda:" 
Numbers5:21 (uya kwandula umperisite amfungise lomfazi ngesifungo sokuqalekisa, aze umperisite ati emfazini:) Wanga uyehova angakwenza ube sisiqalekiswa nesifungelwa pakati kwabantu bako, akuba uyehova esenza itanga lako linqi̔ne, nesisu sako sidumbe;" 
Numbers5:22 ati lamanzi, asenzayo isiqalekiso, angene ematunjini ako, adumbise isisu sako, anqi̔nise netanga lako! Waeya kuti umfazi lowo: Amene, amene!" 
Numbers5:23 Wosuka umperisite aziba̔le eziziqalekiso encwadini, azisulele emanzini aṙaṙa:" 
Numbers5:24 aze amseze umfazi lowo lomanzi aṙaṙa, asenzayo isiqalekiso: aeya kungena kuye lamanzi asenzayo isiqalekiso abe buṙaṙa." 
Numbers5:25 Kanjalo umperisite uya kwamkela esandleni salomfazi umnikelo wobukwele, awushukushukumise umnikelo lowo pambi kwoyehova, awunikele pezu kwesibingelo:" 
Numbers5:26 andule umperisite abambe kuwo umnikelo ngento ezalisa isandla isikunjuzelwa sawo, asitshise pezu kwesibingelo; ati kamva amseze umfazi amanzi lawo." 
Numbers5:27 Akuba selemsezile amanzi lawo, kuya kuti, ukuba unco̔lisiwe, nokuba enzile ngobumenemene ngakuyo indoda yake, aya kwandula angene kuye lamanzi asenzayo isiqalekiso, abe buṙaṙa, siti isisu sake sidumbe, netanga lake linqi̔ne: waye lomfazi eya kuba sisiqalekiswa pakati kwabantu bake." 
Numbers5:28 Kodwa ukuba umfazi akanco̔lisiwe, koko ecocekile, woba ekululekile, akaule nokukaula inzalo." 
Numbers5:29 Nguwo lo umteto wobukwele, okuya umfazi apambuka upantsi kweyake indoda, anco̔liswe;" 
Numbers5:30 umhlaumbi okuya umoya wobukwele udlula pezu kwendoda, ide ibe nobukwele pezu kwomfazi wayo, ize immise umfazi lowo pambi kwoyehova, ati umperisite enze kuye ngawo wonke lomteto." 
Numbers5:31 Kwa njalo indoda yoba msulwa enkohlakalweni; kanti lomfazi wotwala inkohlakalo yake. 
Numbers6:1 WAYE uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers6:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Xeshekweni oyindoda umhlaumbi umfazi aya kwahlukanisa into yokubambisa ngesibambiso somnaziri, sokuba azahlulele kuyehova:" 
Numbers6:3 iveyine notywala wozizila; iyasine yeveyine, neyasine yotywala akayi kuyisela, namanzi edreyive akayi kuwasela namanye, nedreyive ezifumileyo nezomileyo akayi kuzidla."
