Numbers6:4 Yonke imihla yobunaziri bake akayi kutya nto eyenziweyo ngomti weveyine, kube kuzo intanga kude kube kulo ixolo." 
Numbers6:5 Yonke imihla yesibambiso sobunaziri bake akuyi kudlula pezu kwentloko yake isitshetshe sokugugula; kwa kude kuzalisekiswe imihla azahlulele kuyehova ngayo, woba ngewele, ekulisa izihlwita zenwele zentloko yake." 
Numbers6:6 Yonke imihla yokwahlulelwa kwake kuyehova, akayi kuza emzimbeni wofileyo." 
Numbers6:7 Uyise nonina, umninawe wake nodade wake, akayi kuzinco̔lisa ngenxa yabo, bakububa; ngokuba ubunaziri botixo wake bupezu kwentloko yake." 
Numbers6:8 Yonke imihla yobunaziri bake uyingcwele kuyehova. 
Numbers6:9 Naxeshekweni ofileyo wafayo ngakuye ngebaqo kamsinyane, waza wanco̔lisa intloko yobunaziri bake, uya kwandula agugule intloko yake ngomhla wokucokiswa kwake; ngowesixe̔nxe umhla woyigugula." 
Numbers6:10 Nangowesibozo umhla uya kuzisa amahobe abe mabini, umhlaumbi amatole ezuba abe mabini, kumperisite, elucangweni lwentente yentlangano:" 
Numbers6:11 waye umperisite eya kulenza elinye libe lidini lesono, nelinye libe lidini lokutshiswa, amenzele uxoliso, ngokokuba wonile ngawo umzimba ofileyo; waeya kuyingcwalisa intloko yake kwa ngomhla lowo." 
Numbers6:12 Kanjalo wobuya ayahlulele kuyehova imihla yobunaziri bake, azise imvana yomnyaka mnye ibe lidini letyala; kanti imihla yamatanci iya kumlahleka, ngokuba bunco̔lisiwe ubunaziri bake." 
Numbers6:13 Kanjalo nguwo lo umteto womnaziri: Ngomhla wokuzalisekiswa kwemihla yobunaziri bake, uya kuziswa elucangweni lwentente yentlangano." 
Numbers6:14 Waeya kunikela umnikelo wake kuyehova; imvana yomnyaka mnye emsulwa ibe nye, ibe lidini lokutshiswa; nemvanakazi ibe nye yomnyaka mnye emsulwa, ibe lidini lesono; nenkunzi yegusha ibe nye emsulwa, ibe ngumnikelo woxolo;" 
Numbers6:15 nesitya sezonka ezingenagwele, izonkana zomgubo ocolekileyo zinyeliwe ngeoli, nezonkanyana ezingenagwele zitanjisiwe ngeoli, kwa nomnikelo wokudla wazo, neminikelo yokusela yazo." 
Numbers6:16 Ezizinto umperisite wozisondeza ebusweni bukayehova, enze idini lesono lake, nedini lokutshiswa lake." 
Numbers6:17 Nenkunzi yegusha uya kuyenza umbingo woxolo kuyehova, kunye nesitya sezonka ezingenagwele; woti umperisite kanjalo enze umnikelo wokudla wake, nomnikelo wokusela wake." 
Numbers6:18 Waye umnaziri eya kugugula intloko yobunaziri bake elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, aze azitabate inwele zentloko yobunaziri bake, azibeke emlilweni ongapantsi kwawo umbingo woxolo." 
Numbers6:19 Waye umperisite eya kucapula umkono opekiweyo kwinkunzi yegusha, nesonkana esingenagwele sibe sinye esityeni, nesonkanyana esingenagwele sibe kwa sinye; azibeke ezandleni zomnaziri, akuba ezigugulele intloko yobunaziri bake:" 
Numbers6:20 andule umpeṙisite azishukushukumise ezi zinto zibe ngumnikelo wokushukushukunyiswa pambi kwoyehova: kuyinto eyingcwele oku kumperisite, kunye nesifuba sokushukushukunyiswa nomkono wokufunqufunqulwa: angaba kamva umnaziri esela iveyine." 
Numbers6:21 Nguwo lo umteto womnaziri obambisileyo, now omnikelo wake kuyehova ngenxa yobunaziri bake, ngapandle kwoko isandla sake siya kukufumana: njengesibambiso wabebambisa ngaso, uya kwenje njalo, njengawo umteto wobunaziri bake." 
Numbers6:22 WAYE uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers6:23 Teta ku‐Arone nakonyana bake, usiti: Niya kwenje njalo ukutamsanqelisa usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nisiti kulo:" 
Numbers6:24 Wanga uyehova angakutamsanqela, akugcine!" 
Numbers6:25 Uyehova makakanyise ubuso bake pezu kwako, abe nofefe kuwe!" 
Numbers6:26 Uyehova makapakamise ubuso bake pezu kwako, akunike uxolo!" 
Numbers6:27 Babeya kubeka igama lam pezu kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; ndandiya kulutamsanqela mna. 
Numbers7:1 KWAZA kwati, ngomhla wokuba ebegqibile u‐Mosesi ukupakamisa itabanakele, nokuba ebeyitambisile, wayingcwalisa, nazo zonke impahla zayo, nesibingelo, nazo zonke impahla zaso, wazitambisa, wazingcwalisa;" 
Numbers7:2 kwanikela inkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli, intloko zendlu zoyise zazo, ezibe zizinkosi zezizwe, ezongama pezu kwabo ababalweyo:" 
Numbers7:3 zaye zizisa umnikelo wazo pambi kwoyehova, inqwelo ezintandatu zinentente, nenkabi ezilishumi linambini: yanye inqwelo kwezimbini inkosi, yanye inkabi kwenye ngenye; zazisondeza pambi kwayo itabanakele." 
Numbers7:4 Waza uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers7:5 Zamkele kuzo, ukuba zibe zezokwenza inkonzo yentente yentlangano; wauya kunika zona kuba‐Levi, abanye ngabanye njengenkonzo yabo." 
Numbers7:6 Waza u‐Mosesi watabata ezonqwelo nezonkabi, wazinika kuba‐Levi." 
Numbers7:7 Inqwelo ezimbini, nenkabi ezine, wazinika konyana baka‐Gereshone, njengenkonzo yabo;" 
Numbers7:8 nenqwelo ezine, nenkabi ezisibozo, wazinika konyana baka‐Merari, njengenkonzo yabo; ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Yitamare, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite." 
Numbers7:9 Kanti onyana baka‐Kohati akanikanga kubo; ngokuba inkonzo yeyingcwele indawo ibipezu kwabo, a batyata yo ngegxalaba." 
Numbers7:10 Zaza inkosi zanikela umnikelo wokutwasiswa kwesibingelo, ngomhla wokutanjiswa kwaso; zaye inkosi zinikela umnikelo wazo pambi kwesibingelo." 
Numbers7:11 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Inye inkosi ngemini yayo, inye inkosi ngemini yayo, ziya kunikela umnikelo wazo ngenxa yokutwasiswa kwesibingelo." 
Numbers7:12 Kekaloku lowo obenikela umnikelo wake ngemini yokuqala wayengu‐Nahashone, unyana ka‐Haminadabi, owesizwe sika‐Juda." 
Numbers7:13 Waye umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:14 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:15 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:16 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:17 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Nahashone, unyana ka‐Haminadabi." 
Numbers7:18 Ngemini yesibini wanikela u‐Netaneli, unyana ka‐Tsuhare, inkosi yo‐Yisakare." 
Numbers7:19 Yena wanikela umnikelo wake, ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:20 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:21 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:22 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:23 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Netaneli, unyana ka‐Tsuhare." 
Numbers7:24 Ngemini yesitatu yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Zebulone, u‐Eliyabe, unyana ka‐Heloni." 
Numbers7:25 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:26 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:27 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:28 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:29 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Eliyabe, unyana ka‐Heloni." 
Numbers7:30 Ngemini yesine yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Rubene, u‐Elitsure, unyana ka‐Shedeyure." 
Numbers7:31 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:32 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:33 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:34 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:35 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka Elitsure, unyana ka‐Shedeyure." 
Numbers7:36 Ngemini yesihlanu yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Simone, u‐Shelumiyele, unyana ka‐Tsurishadai." 
Numbers7:37 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:38 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:39 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:40 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:41 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye; nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Shelumiyele, unyana ka‐Tsurishadai." 
Numbers7:42 Ngemini yesitandatu yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Gadi, u‐Eliyasafa, unyana ka‐Dehule." 
Numbers7:43 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sesilivere sokufefela esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo: ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:44 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso:" 
Numbers7:45 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:46 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:47 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Eliyasafa, unyana ka‐Dehule." 
Numbers7:48 Ngemini yesixe̔nxe yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Frayime, u‐Elishama, unyana ka‐Hamihude." 
Numbers7:49 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:50 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:51 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:52 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:53 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Elishama, unyana ka‐Hamihude." 
Numbers7:54 Ngemini yesibozo yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Manase, u‐Gamaliyeli, unyana ka‐Pedatsure." 
Numbers7:55 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:56 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:57 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:58 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:59 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Gamaliyeli, unyana ka‐Pedatsure." 
Numbers7:60 Ngemini yesitoba yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Benjamine, u‐Abidane, unyana ka‐Gideyoni." 
Numbers7:61 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:62 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:63 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:64 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:65 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Abidane, unyana ka‐Gideyoni." 
Numbers7:66 Ngemini yeshumi yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Dane, u‐Ahihezere, unyana ka‐Hamishadai." 
Numbers7:67 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:68 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso:" 
Numbers7:69 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:70 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:71 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Ahihezere, unyana ka‐Hamishadai." 
Numbers7:72 Ngemini yeshumi linesinye yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Ashere, u‐Pagiyeli, unyana ka‐Okerane." 
Numbers7:73 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:74 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:75 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:76 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:77 nangenxa yombingo, woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka Pagiyeli, unyana ka‐Okerane." 
Numbers7:78 Ngemini yeshumi linesibini yanikela inkosi yonyana baka‐Nefatali, u‐Ahira, unyana ka‐Henani." 
Numbers7:79 Umnikelo wake ubusinye isikotile sesilivere silikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ukuba nzima kwaso, sinye isitya sokufefela sesilivere esishekele zingamashumi asixe̔nxe, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo; ezi zozibini zazizele ngumgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli, ube ngumnikelo wokudla;" 
Numbers7:80 inye igxebeka yeshumi leshekele zegolide, izele sisiqumiso;" 
Numbers7:81 inye inkunzana elitole lenkomo, inye inkunzi yegusha, inye imvana yomnyaka mnye, libe lidini lokutshiswa;" 
Numbers7:82 linye itakane lebokwe, libe lidini lesono;" 
Numbers7:83 nangenxa yombingo woxolo, zimbini inkomo, zintlanu inkunzi zegusha, zintlanu ibokwe, zintlanu imvana zomnyaka mnye: nguwo lo umnikelo ka‐Ahira, unyana ka‐Henani." 
Numbers7:84 Oku kukokwokutwasiswa kwesibingelo, ngomhla wokutanjiswa kwaso, zinkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli; ishumi linesibini lezikotile zesilivere, ishumi linesibini lezitya zokufefela zesilivere, ishumi linesibini legxebeka zegolide," 
Numbers7:85 izikotile zesilivere zazilikulu linamashumi matatu leshekele ngazinye; izitya zokufefela zazingamashumi asixe̔nxe eshekele ngazinye: yonke isilivere yezimpahla yangamawaka mabini anamakulu mane eshekele, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo." 
Numbers7:86 Igxebeka zegolide ezilishumi linesibini, zizele sisiqumiso, ezinye ngezinye zazilishumi leshekele, ngeshekele yeyingcwele indawo: yonke igolide yazo igxebeka yalikulu linamashumi mabini leshekele." 
Numbers7:87 Zonke inkomo zedini lokutshiswa zazilishumi linambini lenkunzana, inkunzi zegusha zalishumi linambini, imvana zomnyaka mnye zalishumi linambini, kunye nomnikelo wokudla wazo; namatakane ebokwe alishumi linamabini, awedini lesono." 
Numbers7:88 Kanjalo zonke inkomo zombingo woxolo zazingamashumi mabini anane enkunzana, inkunzi zegusha zangamashumi matandatu, ibokwe zakwa ngamashumi matandatu, imvana zomnyaka mnye zangamashumi matandatu nazo. Oku kukokwokutwasiswa kwesibingelo, emveni kwokutanjiswa kwaso." 
Numbers7:89 Wati akungena u‐Mosesi ententeni yentlangano ukuza kuteta naye, wandula weva ilizwi liteta kuye, lipezulu pezu kwesihlalo sofefe esisetyeyeni yesinqino, kwa pakati kwazo ikerubime zombini: waza wateta kuye." 
Numbers8:1 WAYE uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers8:2 Teta no‐Arone, uti kuye: Nxa umisayo izibane, ziya kukanyisa malungana nekandelare izibane zosixe̔nxe." 
Numbers8:3 Wenje njalo ke u‐Arone; malungana nekandelare wamisa izibane zayo, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Numbers8:4 (Elisetyenzwa lekandelare belilelegolide ekandelweyo; kwa kuso isikondo sayo, kwada kwakuzo intyatyambo zayo, ibilisetyenzwa elikandelweyo; njengesimilo uyehova wambonisayo u‐Mosesi, wabeyenzile ikandelare kwa ngokunjalo.)" 
Numbers8:5 Waza uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi esiti: 
Numbers8:6 Tabata aba‐Levi pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ubacokise." 
Numbers8:7 Uya kwenje njalo kubo, ukubacokisa: Tshiza pezu kwabo amanzi okuhlambulula; bati bona badlulise isitshetshe sokuguya pezu kwayo yonke inyama yabo, bahlanze izivato zabo, bazicokise." 
Numbers8:8 Bandule batabate inkunzana elitole lenkomo, nomnikelo wokudla wayo, umgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli; nenye inkunzana elitole lenkomo uya kuyitabata ibe lidini lesono." 
Numbers8:9 Wauya kusondeza aba‐Levi pambi kwentente yentlangano; uze uhlanganisele ndawonye yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli. 
Numbers8:10 Wauya kusondeza aba‐Levi ebusweni bukayehova; luti usapo luka‐Sirayeli lulalise izandla zalo pezu kwaba‐Levi. 
Numbers8:11 Kanjalo u‐Arone wonikela aba‐Levi babe ngumnikelo ebusweni bukayehova uvela kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba babe ngabokwenza inkonzo kayehova." 
Numbers8:12 Baye aba‐Levi beya kulalisa izandla zabo pezu kwentloko zenkunzana ezo; uze wena wenze enye ibe lidini lesono, nenye ibe lidini lokutshiswa, kuyehova, ukuxolisela aba‐Levi." 
Numbers8:13 Wauya kumisa aba‐Levi ebusweni buka‐Arone, nasebusweni bonyana bake, ubanikele babe ngumnikelo kuyehova." 
Numbers8:14 Uya kubahlula njalo aba‐Levi pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba aba‐Levi babe ngabam." 
Numbers8:15 Nasemva kwoku baya kungena aba‐Levi ukuya kukonza ententeni yentlangano; wauya kubacokisa, ubanikele babe ngumnikelo." 
Numbers8:16 Ngokuba bona begqityelwe ukunikwa kum pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; esikundleni sabo bonke ekuzityulwa ngabo, samazibulo alo lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ndizitabatele bona." 
Numbers8:17 Ngokuba onke amazibulo pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli engawam, awabantu nawezilo: umhla ndandibeta onke amazibulo ezweni le‐Jipete ngawo, ndawenza ngcwele wona kum." 
Numbers8:18 Naba‐Levi ndibatabatile esikundleni sawo onke amazibulo pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli. 
Numbers8:19 Kanjalo ndibanikile aba‐Levi, abanikiweyo ku‐Arone nakonyana bake kwa pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuyenza inkonzo yosapo luka‐Sirayeli ententeni yentlangano, nokwenzela usapo luka‐Sirayeli uxoliso, ukuba kungabiko pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli isibulalo, lwakusondela usapo luka‐Sirayeli kweyingcwele indawo." 
Numbers8:20 Bati ke u‐Mosesi, no‐Arone, nayo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, benzela aba‐Levi njengako konke uyehova abemyalele u‐Mosesi pezu kwaba‐Levi, lwenje njalo ke kubo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers8:21 Baza aba‐Levi bazihlambulula, bahlanza izivato zabo; waye u‐Arone wabanikela babe ngumnikelo ebusweni bukayehova: wati kanjalo u‐Arone wabenzela uxoliso ukubacokisa." 
Numbers8:22 Nasemveni kwoku bangena aba‐Levi ukuya kuyenza inkonzo yabo ententeni yentlangano, ebusweni buka‐Arone, nasebusweni bonyana bake; njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi pezu kwaba‐Levi, benje njalo kubo." 
Numbers8:23 Waye uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers8:24 Oku kukokwaba‐Levi: Abaminyaka ingamashumi mabini anesihlanu nabapezulu, ubudala babo, baya kungena ukwenza ubukonzo, emsebenzini wentente yentlangano:" 
Numbers8:25 nominyaka ingamashumi mahlanu, ubudala bake, uya kupuma ebukonzweni balomsebenzi, aze angabuyi asebenze;" 
Numbers8:26 koko eya kukonza nabazalwana bake ententeni yentlangano, ukuba kugcinwe isigcinelo; kodwa umsebenzi abasayi kuwenza. Kunjengokunjalo uya kwenza kuba‐Levi ngako ukugcina kwabo." 
Numbers9:1 WAYE uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi entlango ye‐Sinai, ngowesibini umnyaka emva kwokupuma kwabo ezweni le‐Jipete, ngenyanga yokuqala, esiti:" 
Numbers9:2 Ipasika maluyibambe usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngexesha layo elimisiweyo. 
Numbers9:3 Ngomhla weshumi linesine kulenyanga, pakati kwokuhlwa, niya kuyibamba, ngexesha layo elimisiweyo: njengayo yonke imimiselo yayo, nanjengawo onke amasiko ayo, niya kubamba yona." 
Numbers9:4 Wandula wateta u‐Mosesi elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba maluyibambe ipasika." 
Numbers9:5 Lwaza lwayibamba ipasika ngoweshumi linesine umhla wenyanga yokuqala, pakati kwokuhlwa, entlango ye‐Sinai: njengako konke uyehova abemyalele u‐Mosesi ngako, lwenje njalo ke usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers9:6 Kekaloku kwaye kuko amadoda atile, abe enco̔lile ngenxa yomzimba ofileyo womntu, ukuba ebekohliwe ukubamba ipasika ngalomhla; ngako asondela ebusweni buka‐Mosesi, nasebusweni buka‐Arone, ngalomhla." 
Numbers9:7 Aza ati lamadoda kuye: Tina sinco̔lile ngenxa yomzimba ofileyo womntu; kunganina ukuba sinqandwe, side singabi nakunikela umnikelo kayehova ngexesha lawo elimisiweyo, pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli?" 
Numbers9:8 Wayesiti kuwo u‐Mosesi: Hlalani nimi, ndandiya kuva into uyehova woyiyalela ngani." 
Numbers9:9 Waza uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers9:10 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Xeshekweni umntu wakuni, umhlaumbi wakuzo izizukulwana zenu, anco̔lile ngenxa yomzimba ofileyo, umhlaumbi usekuhambeni okukude, uya kubamba ipasika noko kuyehova." 
Numbers9:11 Ngenyanga yesibini, ngoweshumi linesine umhla, pakati kwokuhlwa, baya kubamba yona; kunye nezonka ezingenagwele n emifuno eṙaṙa baya kuyidla." 
Numbers9:12 Abayi kusalisa nto kuyo kude kuse; abayi kwapula nalinye itambo kuyo kanjalo: njengayo yonke imimiselo yepasika baya kuyibamba. 
Numbers9:13 Nomntu ongococekileyo, engabi sekuhambeni, oya kuyeka ukubamba ipasika, uya kunqanyulwa umpefumlo lowc ebantwini bawo: ngenxa yokuba umnikelo kayehova engawunikelanga ngelimisiweyo ixesha lawo, uya kutwala isono sake lowamntu." 
Numbers9:14 Naxeshekweni kupambukele kuni owasemzini, oya kubamba ipasika kuyehova: njengommiselo wepasika, nanjengesiko layo, kwa njalo uya kuyibamba: ummiselo okwa mnye woba kuni, nakowasemzini nakozelweyo elizweni." 
Numbers9:15 KEKALOKU ngomhla wokupakanyiswa kwayo itabanakele, laza ilifu lasibekela itabanakele, kwa intente yesinqi̔no; elati ngokuhlwa lapezu kwetabanakele njengokubonakala kwomlilo, kwada kwasa." 
Numbers9:16 Kwaye kunjalo futi: ilifu layisibekela, nangobusuku kwakuko ukubonakala kwomlilo." 
Numbers9:17 Kwati kwakunyuswa ilifu ententeni, lwandula emveni kwoko lwanduluka usapo luka‐Sirayeli; nasendaweni apo lahlala kona ilifu, kwa kona lwati waca usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers9:18 Ngelizwi likayehova lwanduluka usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nangelizwi likayehova lwati waca: yonke imihla lahlalayo ilifu pezu kwetabanakele, lwati waca." 
Numbers9:19 Naxeshekweni ilifu belilibala pezu kwetabanakele imihla yamininzi, lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwasigcina isigcinelo sikayehova, lunganduluki nje." 
Numbers9:20 Kwaye kute, lakuba ilifu libe liyimihla emincinane pezu kwetabanakele; ngelizwi likayehova lwati waca, nangelizwi likayehova lwanduluka." 
Numbers9:21 Kwaye kute, lakuba ilifu beliko kwa sekuhlweni kwada kwasa, laza ilifu lenyuswa ngokusa, lwandula lwanduluka: nokuba bekusemini, nokuba bekusebusuku, kwenyuswayo ilifu, lwandula lwanduluka." 
Numbers9:22 Nokuba bekuyimihla mibini, nokuba bekuyinyanga, nokuba bekungumnyaka, kwalibalayo ilifu pezu kwetabanakele, lihleli pezu kwayo, lwati waca usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lunganduluki nje; koko lakunyuswa, lwanduluka ke." 
Numbers9:23 Ngelizwi likayehova lwati waca, nangelizwi likayehova lwanduluka: isigcinelo sikayehova lwasigcina, ngelizwi likayehova, ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Numbers10:1 WAZA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers10:2 Zenzele amaxilongo abe mabini ngesilivere; ngesetyenzwa elikandelweyo uya kuwenza: woba nawo ukuba kubizwe intlanganiso, nokuba kundululwe amabandla." 
Numbers10:3 Nxa bavutelayo ngawo, yonke intlanganiso yozihlanganisela kuwe ngaselucangweni lwentente yentlangano." 
Numbers10:4 Kanti nxa bavutelayo ngalinye, kuya kwandula kuhlanganiselwa ngakuwe inkosi, intloko zamawaka akwa‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers10:5 Nxa nihlokomisayo ivuso, seleya kunduluka amabandla ate waca ngasempumalanga:" 
Numbers10:6 nxa nihlokomisayo ivuso ngokwesibini, seleya kunduluka amabandla ate waca ngasesuyide: baya kuhlokomisa ivuso ngenxa yenduluko zawo." 
Numbers10:7 Kanti ekuhlanganisweni kwomhlambi, baya kuvutela, kodwa abayi kulenza ivuso." 
Numbers10:8 Boba ngonyana baka‐Arone, abaperi site, abaya kuvutela ngawo amaxilongo; babeya kuba ngummiselwa ongunapakade kuni ngezizukulwana zenu." 
Numbers10:9 Naxeshekweni niya ukulwa elizweni lenu ngakulo utshaba olunibandezelayo, niya kwandula nenze ivuso ngamaxilongo lawo; naniya kukunjulwa ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wenu, nisindiswe nokusindiswa ezintshabeni zenu." 
Numbers10:10 Kanjalo emhleni wovuyo lwenu, nasemitendelekweni yenu, nasekutwaseni kwenyanga zenu, niya kuvutela ngamaxilongo pezu kwamadini okutshiswa enu, napezu kwemibingo yoxolo yenu; ize ibe yinkunjulelwa kuni pambi kwotixo wenu: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Numbers10:11 KWAZA kwati, ngomnyaka wesibini, ngeyesibini inyanga, ngowamashumi mabini umhla walonyanga, kwenyuswa ilifu kuyo itabanakele yesinqi̔no." 
Numbers10:12 Lwandula lwanduluka usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngenduluko zalo, entlango ye‐Sinai; lati ilifu lahlala entlango ye‐Parane." 
Numbers10:13 Lwaye lunduluka ngokwokuqala, ngelizwi likayehova, ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Numbers10:14 Kwaza kwanduluka ibanile yebandla lonyana baka‐Juda kuqala, ngemikosi yabo; napezu kwomkosi wake ebengu‐Nahashone, unyana ka‐Haminadabi." 
Numbers10:15 Napezu kwomkosi wesizwe sonyana baka‐Yisakare ebengu‐Netaneli, unyana ka‐Tsuhare." 
Numbers10:16 Napezu kwomkosi wesizwe sonyana baka‐Zebulone ebengu‐Eliyabe, unyana ka‐Heloni." 
Numbers10:17 Kwaza kwahliswa itabanakele; bandul’ ukunduluka onyana baka‐Gereshone nonyana baka‐Merari, betwele itabanakele." 
Numbers10:18 Yaza yanduluka ibanile yebandla lika‐Rubene, ngemikosi yabo; napezu kwomkosi wake ebengu‐Elitsure, unyana ka‐Shedeyure." 
Numbers10:19 Napezu kwomkosi wesizwe sonyana baka‐Simone ebengu‐Shelumiyele, unyana ka‐Tsurishadai." 
Numbers10:20 Napezu kwomkosi wesizwe sonyana baka‐Gadi ebengu‐Eliyasafa, unyana ka‐Dehule." 
Numbers10:21 Kwandul’ ukunduluka ama‐Kohati, etwele eyingcwele indawo; bati abanye bapakamisa itabanakele kwada kwafikwa ngawo." 
Numbers10:22 Yaza yanduluka ibanile yebandla lonyana baka‐Frayime, ngemikosi yabo; napezu kwomkosi wake ebengu‐Elishama, unyana ka‐Hamihude." 
Numbers10:23 Napezu kwomkosi wesizwe sonyana baka‐Manase ebengu‐Gamaliyeli, unyana ka‐Pedatsure." 
Numbers10:24 Napezu kwomkosi wesizwe sonyana baka‐Benjamine ebengu‐Abidane, unyana ka‐Gideyoni." 
Numbers10:25 Yaza yanduluka ibanile yebandla lonyana baka‐Dane, ibuta ngasemva kwawo onke amabandla, ngemikosi yabo; napezu kwomkosi wake ebengu‐Ahihezere, unyana ka‐Hamishadai." 
Numbers10:26 Napezu kwomkosi wesizwe sonyana baka‐Ashere ebengu‐Pagiyeli, unyana ka‐Okerane." 
Numbers10:27 Napezu kwomkosi wesizwe sonyana baka‐Nefatali ebengu‐Ahira, unyana ka‐Henani." 
Numbers10:28 Ezi zizinduluko zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngemikosi yalo, lwakunduluka." 
Numbers10:29 Wabesiti u‐Mosesi ku‐Hobabe, unyana ka‐Rehule, um‐Midiyane, usomfazi ka‐Mosesi: Siyahamba tina ukuya kulondawo utshilo uyehova ngayo ukuti: Ndoninika yona; yiza nati, sasiya kukwenzela okulungileyo: ngokuba uyehova etetile okulungileyo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers10:30 Wayesiti kuye: Andiyi kuya; koko ndiya kuya elizweni lakowetu, nakubalamane bam." 
Numbers10:31 Waza wati: Uze ungasishiyi ke; ngokuba, ekubeni ukwaziyo ukuti waca kwetu entlango, uya kuba ngamehlo kuti." 
Numbers10:32 Kwakuya kuti, nxa uya kuhamba nati, ewe, kuya kuti, okokulunga uyehova aya kukwenza kuti, sokwenza nakuwe." 
Numbers10:33 Baza bemka entabeni kayehova ihambo yemihla yamitatu; yati ityeya yocebano lukayehova yahamba pambi kwabo leyo hambo yemihla mitatu, iye kubahlolela indawo yokupumla." 
Numbers10:34 Lalibe ilifu likayehova lipezu kwabo emini, ekundulukeni kwabo emnqubeni." 
Numbers10:35 Kwaye kute, yakunduluka ityeya, wati u‐Mosesi: Vuka, Yehova! intshaba zako mazicitwe, nabo bakutiyayo mababaleke ubuso bako!" 
Numbers10:36 Kanjako yakupumla, wati: Buyela, Yehova! kumawakawaka amawaka akwa‐Sirayeli!" 
Numbers11:1 KWABEKUTE, bakugungqa abantu, kwakubi ezindlebeni zikayehova: ngokuba uyehova ebesiva, yada yavuta ingqumbo yake; waza umlilo kayehova watshisa pakati kwabo, wagqibela inxenye ezipelweni zomnquba." 
Numbers11:2 Baza abantu bakala ku‐Mosesi; kwati kwakutandaza u‐Mosesi kuyehova, kwadamba umlilo." 
Numbers11:3 Ngako wabiza londawo ngegama eliyi‐Tabera; ngokuba bekutshisa pakati kwabo umlilo kayehova. 
Numbers11:4 Kanjalo abantu abadityanisiweyo abapakati kwabo babanjwa kukukanuka; lwada lwabuya lwalila nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwati: Ngubanina oya kusidlisa inyama?" 
Numbers11:5 Siyakumbula intlanzi esibe sizidla e‐Jipete ngesisa; ikomkomere, nevatala, nelike, neonyine, netswele:" 
Numbers11:6 kanti kaloku umpefumlo wetu utshile; akuko nanto, ngapandle kwemana le, emehlweni etu." 
Numbers11:7 (Yaibe imana leyo injengembewu yekoriyande, nokubonakala kwayo kunjengokubonakala kwebedolaki." 
Numbers11:8 Besukasuka abantu, bayibuta, bayisila ematyeni, umhlaumbi bayinqusha esinqushelweni, bayipeka embizeni, benza ngayo nezonkana: lati isongo layo lanjengesongo lesonkana esimnandi esenziwa ngeoli." 
Numbers11:9 Kwati kwakuhla umbete pezu kwomnquba ebusuku, kwehla imana pezu kwawo.)" 
Numbers11:10 Waye u‐Mosesi weva abantu belila ngezizalwane zabo, beseminyango yentente zabo abanye ngabanye: yada ingqumbo kayehova yavuta kakulu: kwakubi nasemehlweni ka‐Mosesi." 
Numbers11:11 Waza wati u‐Mosesi kuyehova: Kunganina ukuba wenzele isicaka sako ububi? kunganina nokuba ndingafumananga ufefe emehlweni ako, lento uwubeka umtwalo wababantu bonke pezu kwam?" 
Numbers11:12 Ndim na obakaulileyo bonke ababantu? ndim na nobazeleyo, ukuba uti kum: Batwale esifubeni sako, njengokuba umondli etwala umntwana owanyayo, uye kwelozwe ubufungela oyise babo ngalo?" 
Numbers11:13 Ndozuza pina inyama, yokuba ndipe bonke ababantu? ngokuba belila ngakum, besiti: Sipe inyama, ukuba sidle." 
Numbers11:14 Ndikohliwe ndindedwa kukutwala bonke ababantu; ngokuba kundisinda oko. 
Numbers11:15 Ukuba kungokunjalo undenzelayo, uke ugqibele ukundibulala, ukuba ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako; ndize ndingaboni ububi bam." 
Numbers11:16 Wandula wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Ndihlanganisele amadoda abe ngamashumi asixe̔nxe kubo abadala bo‐Sirayeli, lawo uwaziyo ukuba angabadala babantu, namagosa abo; uze uwazise ententeni yentlangano, eme kona ndawonye nawe." 
Numbers11:17 Ndoka ndihle ke, nditete nawe apo; ndandiya kucapula kulomoya opezu kwako, ndibeke pezu kwawo; neya kutwalelana nawe ekutwaleni ababantu, uze wena ungabatwali wedwa." 
Numbers11:18 Nasebantwini uya kuti: Zingewaliseleni imini yangomso, naniya kuyidla inyama: ngokuba nililile ezindlebeni zikayehova, nisiti: Ngubanina oya kusidlisa inyama? ngokuba bekumnandi kuti e‐Jipete. Ngako uyehova wonipa inyama, naniya kuyidla." 
Numbers11:19 Asi nguwo umhla umnye uya kuyidla, asi yiyo nemihla mibini, asi yiyo nemihla mihlanu, asi yiyo nemihla ilishumi, asi yiyo nemihla imashumi mabini;" 
Numbers11:20 yinyanga ipela noyidla, ide ipume ezimpumlweni zenu, ibe butyeketyeke kuni; ngenxa yokuba nilahlile uyehova opakati kwenu, nalila ebusweni bake, nisiti: Kunganina lento sapumayo e‐Jipete?" 
Numbers11:21 Wayesiti u‐Mosesi: Ngamawaka angamakulu matandatu abahamba ngenyawo, ababantu endipakati kwabo; ute noko: Ndobapa inyama, badle inyanga ipela." 
Numbers11:22 Igusha nenkomo ziya kubaxe̔lelwa na, ukuba kube kokubaneleyo? zonke intlanzi zolwandle ziya kubabutelwa kusinina, ukuba kube kokubaneleyo?" 
Numbers11:23 Koko wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Isandla sikayehova sifinyele na? uya kubona kaloku ukuba ilizwi lam liya kukuhlela, linga kuhleli kusinina." 
Numbers11:24 Wapuma ke u‐Mosesi, wawateta ebantwini amazwi kayehova: wandula wahlanganisa amadoda amashumi asixe̔nxe kubo abadala babantu, wawamisa ngento engqongayo intente." 
Numbers11:25 Waza wehla uyehova ngelifu, wateta kuye, wacapula kuiomoya opezu kwake, wabeka pezu kwawo amadoda asixe̔nxe, abadala abo: kwaza kwati, kwakupumla pezu kwabo umoya lowo, baprofitesha, bengapindanga kodwa." 
Numbers11:26 Koko bekusala amadoda amabini emnqubeni, eliti igama lomnye lingu‐Eledadi, negama lomnye lingu‐Medadi; waye umoya lowo wapumla pezu kwabo, (ngokuba bona bebepakati kwababa̔lelweyo, kanti bebengapumanga ukuya ententeni,) baprofitesha emnqubeni." 
Numbers11:27 Yasuka yagidima indodana, yaxela ku‐Mosesi, yati: u‐Eledadi no‐Medadi baprofitesha emnqubeni." 
Numbers11:28 Waza wapendula u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, umkonzi ka‐Mosesi, owamadodana ake, wati: Nkosi yam, Mosesi! baqokoqele." 
Numbers11:29 Wati kuye u‐Mosesi: Unekwele ngenxa yam na? Akwaba bonke abantu bakayehova babengabaprofite, ukuba uyehova abeke pezu kwabo umoya wake!" 
Numbers11:30 Waza u‐Mosesi wabutela emnqubeni, yena nabadala bo‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers11:31 Kwandul’ ukunduluka umoya kuyehova, wadlulisa izagwityi zivela olwandle, waziwisa ngasemnqubeni, ngoku ngati yihambo yemini nye ngelicala, nangokungati vihambo yemini nye ngeliya, ezindaweni ezingqongayo umnquba; zaye zingati zizikubite mbini pezu kwobuso bomhlaba." 
Numbers11:32 Besuka ke abantu yonke imini leyo, nabo bonke ubusuku, nayo yonke imini elandelayo, babuta izagwityi: owenza ngokuncinane wabuta zazilishumi ihomere: baye bezanekela ezindaweni ezingqongayo umnquba." 
Numbers11:33 Nxa inyama leyo isepakati kwamazinyo abo, ingekahlafunwa, yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakubo abantu, waza uyehova wabeta abantu ngesibeto esikulu kakulu." 
Numbers11:34 Ngako kwabizwa igama lalondawo ngokuti yi‐Kibrote‐hatava: ngokuba bekukona bancw̔abayo abantu ababekanukile. 
Numbers11:35 Banduluka abantu e‐Kibrote‐hatava baya e‐Hatserote; baza bako e‐Hatserote. 
Numbers12:1 KWANDULA kwateta u‐Miriyame no‐Arone ngakuye u‐Mosesi, ngetuba lomfazi, lom‐Kushekazi, owabemzekile: ngokuba ebemzekile umfazi ongum‐Kushekazi." 
Numbers12:2 Baye besiti: Kanene kungaye u‐Mosesi yedwa na uyehova atetileyo? akatetile nangati yinina? Weva ke uyehova. 
Numbers12:3 (Kekaloku indoda engu‐Mosesi ibilulamile kakulu, ngapezu kwabo bonke abantu ababesebusweni bomhlaba.)" 
Numbers12:4 Waza uyehova watsho ngesiqipu ku‐Mosesi, naku‐Arone, naku‐Miriyame, ukuti: Pumani nobatatu nize ententeni yentlangano. Baye bepuma ke bobatatu." 
Numbers12:5 Waye uyehova esihla ngentsika yelifu, wema emnyango wentente, wabiza u‐Arone no‐Miriyame: baza bapuma bobabini." 
Numbers12:6 Wayesiti: Yivani ke amazwi am: Ukuba kubako umprofite pakati kwenu, mna Yehova ndiya kuzazisa ngomboniso kuye, ngepupa ndiya kuteta naye." 
Numbers12:7 Asinjalo isicaka sam u‐Mosesi; onyanisekile kuyo yonke indlu yam; 
Numbers12:8 umlomo kumlomo ndiya kuteta naye, kwa sekuhleni, kungabi ngamazwi okuntsonkota: nomfanekiselo kayehova wowukangela: yinina ke ukuba nibe ningoyiki ukuteta ngakuso isicaka sam, ngaku‐Mosesi?" 
Numbers12:9 Yaza yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakubo, wada wemka ke." 
Numbers12:10 Kanjako ilifu lesuka kuyo intente; kekaloku, bona ke, u‐Miriyame ebenesilepero, emhlope njengengqweqwe: waye u‐Arone wabeka ngakuye u‐Miriyame, kekaloku, bona ke, waenesilepero." 
Numbers12:11 Waza wati u‐Arone ku‐Mosesi: Au, nkosi yam! zungabeki pezu kwetu isono, esenze ngobudenge ngaso, nesonileyo ngaso." 
Numbers12:12 Makangabi njengofileyo, oti ekupumeni kwake esizalweni sonina seidliwe inxenye yenyama yake." 
Numbers12:13 Wandul ukukala u‐Mosesi kuyehova, esiti: Tixo! zumpilise ke!" 
Numbers12:14 Wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Ukuba uyise ebeke wamtshicela ubuso, ange engadani na imihla isixe̔nxe? makatshixelwe imihla ibe sixe̔nxe ngapandle kwomnquba, ati kamva abuye amkelwe." 
Numbers12:15 Waza u‐Miriyame watshixelwa ngapandle kwomnquba imihla yasixe̔nxe: baye abantu benganduluki kwada kwamkelwa u‐Miriyame. 
Numbers12:16 Kodwa kamva, kwanduluka abantu e‐Hatserote, baya bati waca entlango ye‐Parane." 
Numbers13:1 WANDULA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers13:2 Susa amadoda, aye kupanda ilizwe le‐Kanane, endinika lona elusatsheniluka‐Sirayeli: inye indoda yesizwe soyise bayo, inye indoda yesizwe soyise bayo, uya kuyisusa, onke ezinkosi pakati kwalo." 
Numbers13:3 Waza u‐Mosesi wawasusa entlango ye‐Parane, ngelizwi likayehova: onke lamadoda ebezintloko zosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers13:4 Ngawo la amagama awo: eyesizwe sika‐Rubene, ibingu‐Shamuha unyana ka‐Zakure;" 
Numbers13:5 eyesizwe sika‐Simone, ibingu‐Shafate unyana ka‐Hori;" 
Numbers13:6 eyesizwe sika‐Juda, ibingu‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune;" 
Numbers13:7 eyesizwe sika‐Yisakare, ibingu‐Yigali unyana ka‐Josefe;" 
Numbers13:8 eyesizwe sika‐Frayime, ibingu‐Hosheha unyana ka‐Nune;" 
Numbers13:9 eyesizwe sika‐Benjamine, ibingu‐Paliti unyana ka‐Rafu;" 
Numbers13:10 eyesizwe sika‐Zebulone, ibingu‐Gadiyeli unyana ka‐Sodi;" 
Numbers13:11 eyesizwe sika‐Josefe, — eyesizwe sika‐Manase, ibingu‐Gadai unyana ka‐Susi;" 
Numbers13:12 eyesizwe sika‐Dane, ibingu‐Hamiyeli unyana ka‐Gemali;" 
Numbers13:13 eyesizwe sika‐Ashere, ibingu‐Seture unyana ka‐Mikaheli;" 
Numbers13:14 eyesizwe sika‐Nefatali, ibingu‐Nahibi unyana ka‐Vovosi;" 
Numbers13:15 eyesizwe sika‐Gadi, ibingu‐Gewuheli unyana ka‐Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Ngawo la amagama alomadoda, abewasusa u‐Mosesi ukuya kupanda elozwe: waye u‐Mosesi wambiza u‐Hosheha, unyana ka‐Nune, ngo‐Yoshuwa." 
Numbers13:17 Kwa njalo u‐Mosesi wawatuma ukuya kupanda ilizwe le‐Kanane, wati kuwo: Nyukela ngapa esuyide, nikwele entabeni;" 
Numbers13:18 nikangele ilizwe ukuba linjanina; nabantu abemiyo kulo, ukuba bomelele na, babutataka kusinina, ukuba bancinane na, baninzi kusinina;" 
Numbers13:19 nelizwe abemiyo kulo ukuba linjanina, ukuba lihle na, libi kusinina; nezixeko abahleli kuzo ukuba zinjanina; ukuba baseminqubeni na, basezinqatyeni kusinina;" 
Numbers13:20 nomhlaba ukuba unjanina, ukuba utyebile na, ubityile kusinina, ukuba iko na imiti kuwo, ayiko kusinina; nize nizomeleze, nitabate kuko ukuqa̔ma kwomhlaba. Kekaloku ezontsuku zazintsuku zolibo lwedreyive." 
Numbers13:21 Asuka enyuka ke, apanda ilizwe, kwa sentlango ye‐Tsine kwada kwase‐Rehobi, njengokuba kuyiwe e‐Hamati." 
Numbers13:22 Aza enyukela esuyide, afika e‐Hebrone; apo babe kona o‐Ahimane, o‐Sheshai, no‐Talemai, abenzalo ka‐Hanaki. (Kekaloku i‐Hebrone ibe yakiwe iminyaka yasixe̔nxe ingekakiwanga i‐Tsohane e‐Jipete.)" 
Numbers13:23 Andula afika entilini ye‐Shekole, anqumla kona apo isebe linesipa ledreyive sasinye, asitwala ngesibonda pakati kwamabini amadoda; atuta nakuzo igranate, nakuyo imikiwane." 
Numbers13:24 Leyondawo yabizwa ngokuti yintili ye‐Shekole, ngetuba lesosipa sedreyive olube lusinqumlile apo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers13:25 Ada abuya ekupandeni ilizwe, ekupeleni kwemihla imashumi mane." 
Numbers13:26 Aya eza ku‐Mosesi, naku‐Arone, nakuyo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, entlango ye‐Parane, e‐Kadeshe; ababuyisela ilizwi, nayo yonke intlanganiso, ababonisa isiqa̔mo selizwe." 
Numbers13:27 Aza ambalisela, ati: Saye sifika kwelozwe ubusituma kulo; eliti okunene lilizwe elela ubisi nobusi; nasi ke nesiqa̔mo salo." 
Numbers13:28 Kodwa noko abantu abemiyo kwelozwe banamandla, nezixeko zabo zinqatyisiwe, zikulu kakulu: nakanjako abenzalo ka‐Hanaki sasibabona apo." 
Numbers13:29 Ama‐Amaleki emi elizweni lasesuyide; nama‐Hete, nama‐Yebusi, naba‐Amori, bona bemi ezintabeni; kanjalo aba‐Kanane bemi ngaselwandle, nangasecaleni le‐Yoredane." 
Numbers13:30 Waza u‐Kalebi wabatutuzela abantu pambi kwo‐Mosesi, wati: Nyukani sinyuke, siye silibambe; ngokuba siya kugqibela ukuleyisa." 
Numbers13:31 Kodwa amadoda abenyuke naye ati: Sikohliwe kukunyuka ngakubo abobantu, ngokuba bona besigqitisile ngamandla." 
Numbers13:32 Kwa njalo avela nentlebo ngelozwe abepandile lona ukuza elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, esiti: Elozwe, esibe sicanda kulo silipande, lilizwe elidlayo abemi balo; kanjalo bonke abantu esasibabona pakati kwalo bangamadoda obude obukulu." 
Numbers13:33 Nalapo sasibona imindondosholo, usapo luka‐Hanaki, oluvela kuyo imindondosholo: saye sisemehlweni etu njengemicikwane, sakwa njalo nasemehlweni alo." 
Numbers14:1 Yasuka yakala yonke intlanganiso, yakupa ilizwi labo; bati abantu balila ngobusuku obo." 
Numbers14:2 Lwaza lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwaṙoṙa ngaku‐Mosesi nangaku‐Arone; kanjalo yonke intlanganiso yati kubo: Akwaba sabesifele ezweni le‐Jipete! umhlaumbi akwaba sabesifele kulentlango! 
Numbers14:3 Kunganina ke ukuba uyehova usizisile kwelilizwe, size siwe ngesiṙele, bati abafazi betu, nentsapo zetu, babe lixoba? Kanene akungesilungele ukubuyela e‐Jipete na?" 
Numbers14:4 Baza bati omnye kwomnye: Masidale intloko, sibuyele e‐Jipete." 
Numbers14:5 Bandul’ ukuwa u‐Mosesi no‐Arone ngobuso babo, pambi kwawo wonke umhlambi wentlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers14:6 Bati no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune, no‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune, bengabakubo ababepandile ilizwe, baṙazula izivato zabo;" 
Numbers14:7 bateta kuyo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, besiti: Elozwe, esibe sicanda kulo silipande, lilizwe elilungileyo kakulu kunene." 
Numbers14:8 Ukuba uyehova uyasitanda, uya kwandula asizise kwelolizwe, alinike kuti; ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi." 
Numbers14:9 Zeniti kodwa ningamvukeli uyehova, nabantu belozwe ningaboyiki; ngokuba besisonka setu; kumkile kubo umtunzi wabo, uyehova unati; ningaboyiki." 
Numbers14:10 Yati kodwa yonke intlanganiso: Mabagityiselwe ngamatye. Kwandul’ ukubonakala ubungcwalisa bukayehova ententeni yentlangano, pambi kwalo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers14:11 Waza wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Kude kube ninina ababantu bondidela? nakude kube ninina bangakolwa ndim, ngenxa yayo yonke imiqondiso endiyenzileyo pakati kwabo?" 
Numbers14:12 Ndiya kubabeta ngesifo esibubisayo, ndibagqogqe nokubagqogqa; ndandiya kukwenza wena ube luhlanga olukulu nolunamandla pezu kwabo." 
Numbers14:13 Kuloko u‐Mosesi wati kuyehova: Kwohla kuvakale kuma‐Jipete, (ngokuba ubanyusile ngamandla ako ababantu kwa pakati kwawo,)" 
Numbers14:14 ati wona axele kubo abemi belilizwe, a bavile ukuba wena, Yehova! upakati kwabo ababantu, ukuba wena, Yehova! uyabonwa iliso kwiliso, nokuba ilifu lako limi pezu kwabo, nokuba uyandulela kubo ngentsika yelifu emini, nangentsika yomlilo ebusuku." 
Numbers14:15 Nxa uya kububisa ababantu njengomntu mnye, ziya kwandula ukutsho intlanga ezivileyo udumo lwako, zisiti:" 
Numbers14:16 Ngenxa yokuba ebekohlwa uyehova kukuzisa ababantu kwelozwe wabefunga ngalo kubo, kukona ababulele entlango." 
Numbers14:17 Kaloku maaze amandla enkosi abe makulu, njengokuba ubuteta ngokuti:" 
Numbers14:18 Uyehova uqumba kade, emkulu ngobubele, exolela inkohlakalo nesigqito, engake agwebele onetyala, esohlwayela inkohlakalo yoyise pezu kwabantwana, pezu kwesesitatu napezu kwesesine isizukulwana." 
Numbers14:19 Uze uke uxolele inkohlakalo yababantu, njengobukulu bobubele bako, nanjengokuba ubaxolele ababantu kwa se‐Jipete kwada kwalapa." 
Numbers14:20 Waza wati uyehova: Ndibaxolele njengelizwi lako. 
Numbers14:21 Kodwa noko, ndihleli nje mna, kwozaliswa bubungcwalisa bukayehova umhlaba wonke." 
Numbers14:22 Ngokuba onke lomadoda abonileyo ubungcwalisa bam, nemiqondiso yam, endibe ndiyenza e‐Jipete nasentlango apa, endilingile elishumi lamaxesha, engapulapulanga ilizwi lam;" 
Numbers14:23 ngenyaniso akasayi kubona elozwe ndibafungele oyise bawo ngalo; kanjako bonke abandidelileyo abasayi kulibona. 
Numbers14:24 Kanti isicaka sam u‐Kalebi, ngokuba ebenomoya wumbi kuye, wakolisa ukundilandela, yena ndiya kumzisa kwelozwe apo wabesiya kona; kanjalo inzalo yake yolifuya." 
Numbers14:25 Kodwa ama‐Amaleki naba‐Kanane bahleli emhlanjeni; jikani ngomso, nihambele ngasentlango, ngendlela yaselwandle olubomvu." 
Numbers14:26 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Numbers14:27 Kwoda kube ninina endiya kunyamezela lentlanganiso ekohlakeleyo, eṙoṙayo ngakum? Ukuṙoṙa kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli olundiṙoṙelayo ngako ndikuvile." 
Numbers14:28 Yiti kulo: Ndihleli nje, utsho uyehova, njengokuba nitetile ezindlebeni zam, ndiya kwenje njalo kuni." 
Numbers14:29 Kwa kulentlango ziya kuwa izidumbu zenu; nabo bonke ababalweyo benu, ngalo lonke inani lenu, bengabaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, abaṙoṙileyo ngakum, —" 
Numbers14:30 nina okunene aniyi kungena kwelozwe, endandipakamisa isandla sam sokuba ndonihlalisa kulo, kupela ngu‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune." 
Numbers14:31 Kanti intsapo zenu, enibe nisiti zoba lixoba, zona ndiya kuzingenisa, zize zilazi ilizwe elilahliweyo nini." 
Numbers14:32 Kodwa nina, izidumbu zenu ziya kuwa kulentlango." 
Numbers14:33 Nabantwana benu bona bodungudela entlango le iminyaka imashumi mane, batwale imibulo yenu, kude kugqityelwe izidumbu zenu entlango apa." 
Numbers14:34 Njengenani lemihla enanipanda ilizwe ngalo, imihla emashumi mane, umhla mnye usendaweni yomnyaka mnye, niya kutwala inkohlakalo zenu, kwa iminyaka emashumi mane; naniya kukwazi ukwahlukana kwam." 
Numbers14:35 Mna Yehova nditetile; ngenyaniso lento ndiya kuyenza kuyo yonke lentlanganiso ekohlakeleyo, abazihlanganisele ngakum: kulentlango baya kugqibeka, nakona apo baya kububa." 
Numbers14:36 Kekaloku amadoda abewasusile u‐Mosesi ukuya kupanda ilizwe, aza abuya, aṙoṙisa ngakuye yonke intlanganiso, ngokuvelisa intlebo pezu kwelozwe," 
Numbers14:37 kwa lamadoda abevela nentlebo embi ngelolizwe, abuba ngesibulalo ebusweni bukayehova." 
Numbers14:38 Kodwa u‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune, no‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune, bona babesahleli kuwo amadoda lawo abeyile ukupanda ilizwe." 
Numbers14:39 Waye u‐Mosesi wateta lamazwi kulo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli: bati abantu balila kakulu. 
Numbers14:40 Baza bavuka kusasa, benyukela engcopo yentaba, besiti: Nanku silapa nje, sasiya kunyuka siye kulondawo atetileyo uyehova ngayo; ngokuba sonile." 
Numbers14:41 Koko u‐Mosesi wati: Kunganina lento niya kugqita ilizwi likayehova? ngokuba oko kungayi kutamsanqeleka. 
Numbers14:42 Maningenyuki, ngokuba uyehova engeko pakati kwenu; ukuze ningoyiswa pambi kwentshaba zenu." 
Numbers14:43 Ngokuba ama‐Amaleki naba‐Kanane sebekona pambi kwenu, naniya kuwa ngesiṙele: ngenxa yokuba nipambukile kuyehova, kukona uyehova angayi kubako nani." 
Numbers14:44 Balinga nger̔atshi noko ukunyukela engcopo yentaba; kodwa ityeya yocebano lukayehova ayisukanga pakati kwomnquba, no‐Mosesi kanjalo." 
Numbers14:45 Kwaza kwehla ke ama‐Amaleki naba‐Kanane abebehlala kulontaba, bababeta, babacita, kwada kwase‐Horema." 
Numbers15:1 WANDULA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi esiti: 
Numbers15:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Nxa niya kuza elizweni lamakaya enu, endinipa lona;" 
Numbers15:3 ukuba niya kuwenza umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova, idini lokutshiswa, umhlaumbi umbingo, ngokufeza isibambiso, umhlaumbi ngesisa, umhlaumbi emitendelekweni yenu, kuze kwenziwe ivumba elimnandi kuyehova, kwezinkulu umhlaumbi kwezincinane inkomo:" 
Numbers15:4 makati lowo onikelayo umnikelo wake kuyehova, asondeze umnikelo wokudla weseshumi isiqingata seyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, unyeliwe ngesesine isiqingata sehine yeoli;" 
Numbers15:5 neveyine yomnikelo wokusela, uya kulungisela idini lokutshiswa, umhlaumbi umbingo, isiqingata sesine sehine, ibe yeyemvana nye." 
Numbers15:6 Ukuba yinkunzi yegusha, uya kulungisela yona umnikelo wokudla wezeshumi iziqingata zibe zibini zeyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, unyeliwe ngesiqingata sesitatu sehine yeoli;" 
Numbers15:7 neveyine yomnikelo wokusela, uya kunikela isiqingata sesitatu sehine, libe livumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Numbers15:8 Naxeshekweni niya kuyenza inkunzana ibe lidini lokutshiswa, umhlaumbi umbingo wokufeza isibambiso, umhlaumbi owoxolo kuyehova;" 
Numbers15:9 makasondeze nenkunzana umnikelo wokudla wezeshumi iziqingata zibe zitatu zeyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, unyeliwe ngesiqingata sehine yeoli;" 
Numbers15:10 nomnikelo wokusela uya kusondezela wona isiqingata sehine yeveyine, ube ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Numbers15:11 Kuya kwenziwa njalo ngenkomo nye, umhlaumbi ngenkunzi nye yegusha, umhlaumbi ngemvana, umhlaumbi ngetakane lebokwe." 
Numbers15:12 Njengenani leniya kuzilungisa, niya kwenje njalo kwezinye ngezinye njengenani lazo." 
Numbers15:13 Bonke abazelwe elizweni bozenje njalo ezizinto, ukunikela umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Numbers15:14 Naxeshekweni kupambukele kuni owasemzini, umhlaumbi osukuba epakati kwenu, ngezizukulwana zenu, oya kuwenza umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova, njengokuba nisenza nina, uya kwenje njalo naye." 
Numbers15:15 Ummiso okwa mnye woba kuni bomhlambi, nakowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwenu, ube ngummiso ongunapakade ezizukulwaneni zenu: njengokuba ninjalo nina, woba njalo nowasemzini pambi kwoyehova." 
Numbers15:16 Umteto okwa mnye nesiko elikwa linye loba kuni, nakowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwenu." 
Numbers15:17 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers15:18 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Nxa niya kufika ezweni apo ndinizisayo kona," 
Numbers15:19 kwoti ke, nxa niya kutya kuso isonka somhlaba, niya kunikela umnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa kuyehova." 
Numbers15:20 Niya kunikela ngesonkana sesiqalo sentlama yenu, sibe ngumnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa: njengomnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa wesibaya sokubula niya kunikela naló." 
Numbers15:21 Kwisiqalo sentlama yenu niya kunika kuyehova umnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa, ngezizukulwana zenu." 
Numbers15:22 Kanjako nxa niposisile, ningenzanga ngayo yonke lemiyalelo, ayitetileyo uyehova ku‐Mosesi;" 
Numbers15:23 yonke uyehova aniyalele yona ngesandla sika‐Mosesi, kwa semhleni abemyalela uyehova, nakude kwakaloku, ngezizukulwana zenu;" 
Numbers15:24 kwoti ke, ukuba kwenziwe into ngesiposo, efihliweyo emehlweni entlanganiso, iya kwandula yonke intlanganiso inikele inkunzana elitole lenkomo ibe nye, ibe lidini lokutshiswa, libe livumba elimnandi kuyehova, kunye nomnikelo wokudla wayo nowokusela wayo, njengesiko, kwa netakane lebokwe libe linye, libe lidini lesono." 
Numbers15:25 Waye umperisite eya kwenzela yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli uxoliso, kuze kuluxolelwe: ngokuba sisiposo; lwaluya kuzisa umnikelo walo, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova, nedini lesono lalo, pambi, kwoyehova, ngenxa yesiposo salo:" 
Numbers15:26 kwandule kuxolelwe yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwalo; ngokuba bekuhl ela bonke abantu ngesiposo." 
Numbers15:27 Kanjako ukuba kuko umntu osukuba esona ngesiposo, lowo uya kuzisa ibokwe eyimazi yomnyaka mnye, ibe lidini lesono." 
Numbers15:28 Woti umperisite amenzele umntu oposisayo uxoliso, akwona ngesiposo ebusweni bukayehova, aze amxolisele; waeya kuxolelwa," 
Numbers15:29 ozelweyo pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwalo, noba nomteto okwa mnye kowenzayo ngesiposo." 
Numbers15:30 Kodwa lowamntu owenzayo ngesandla esipakamileyo, nokuba ungozelweyo elizweni, nokuba ungowasemzini, oyena uyagxeka uyehova; ngako umntu lowo wonqanyulwa pakati kwabantu bake." 
Numbers15:31 Ngokuba ilizwi likayehova elidelile, nomyalelo wake ewapule, kukona aya kugqityelwa ukunqanyulwa umntu lowo; inkohlakalo yake yoba pezu kwake." 
Numbers15:32 KEKALOKU usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwakuba sentlango, lwafumana indoda iteza inkuni ngemini yesabata." 
Numbers15:33 Bati abo bayifumeneyo iteza inkuni, bayizisa ku‐Mosesi, naku‐Arone, nakuyo yonke intlanganiso." 
Numbers15:34 Baye beyifaka entolongweni, ngokuba bekungashunyayezwa into iya kwenzelwa yona." 
Numbers15:35 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Iya kufiswa ngenyaniso indoda leyo; yonke intlanganiso yoyigibisela ngamatye ngapandle kwomnquba. 
Numbers15:36 Yaza yonke intlanganiso yayikupela ngapandle kwomnquba, yayigibisela ngamatye, yada yabuba; njengokuba uyehova wabemyalela u‐Mosesi." 
Numbers15:37 WABUYA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers15:38 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, niluxelele ukuba maluzenzele imiqukumbelo emasondweni engubo zalo, ngezizukulwana zalo; nokuba lubeke pezu kwemiqukumbelo yamasondo usinga lwezuluṙa;" 
Numbers15:39 eniya kuba nalo kuyo imiqukumbelo, ukuba nilukangele, nokuba niyikumbule yonke imiyalelo kayehova, niyenze; nokuba ningalandeli okweyenu intliziyo nokwawenu amehlo, enibe niṙexezela emva kwako;" 
Numbers15:40 ukuze niyikumbule niyenze yonke imiyalelo yam, nibe ngabangcwele kutixo wenu." 
Numbers15:41 Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu, onikupileyo ezweni le‐Jipete, ndize ndibe ngutixo kuni: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Numbers16:1 KEKALOKU u‐Kora, unyana ka‐Yitsare, unyana ka‐Kohati, unyana ka‐Levi, watabata kwa u‐Datane no‐Abirame, onyana baka‐Eliyabe, no‐One, unyana ka‐Pelete, onyana baka‐Rubene;" 
Numbers16:2 abasukayo pambi kwo‐Mosesi, benamadoda amakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, inkosi zentlanganiso, abadumileyo entlanganisweni, amadoda egama." 
Numbers16:3 Baye bebutelana ngakuye u‐Mosesi nangakuye u‐Arone, bati kubo: Kwanele nina! ngokuba yonke intlanganiso, bonke abayo bebangcwele, noyehova upakati kwabo: kunganina ke ukuba nizipakamisa pezu kwomhlambi kayehova?" 
Numbers16:4 Wati u‐Mosesi akuva oku, wandula ukuwa ngobuso bake." 
Numbers16:5 Waza wateta ku‐Kora, nakuyo yonke imbuto yake, esiti: Kwa kusasa uyehova uya kwazisa ongowake, noyingcwele, amsondeze kuye: kwa lowo umnyulileyo uya kumsondeza kuye." 
Numbers16:6 Yenzani oku: zitabateleni iziqumelo, u‐Kora nayo yonke imbuto yake;" 
Numbers16:7 niti kusasa nifake kuzo umlilo, nibeke kuzo nesiqumiso pambi kwoyehova; kwakuya kuti, londoda aya kuyinyula uyehova, yiyo eya kuba ngcwele: kwanele nina, bonyana baka‐Levi!" 
Numbers16:8 Wayesiti u‐Mosesi ku‐Kora: Ize nipulapule ke, bonyana baka‐Levi!" 
Numbers16:9 Kuyinto encinane na kuni, ukuba utixo wo‐Sirayeli unahlulile entlanganisweni yo‐Sirayeli, ukuba anisondeze kwa kuye, ukuza kuyenza inkonzo yetabanakele kayehova, nokuma pambi kwentlanganiso ukuba nibakonze?" 
Numbers16:10 Ekusondezile nje wena, nabo bonke abazalwana bako, usapo luka‐Levi, kunye nawe; nize nifune ubuperisite nabo na?" 
Numbers16:11 Kungoko wena, nayo yonke imbuto yako, nihlanganisene ngakuye uyehova; ngokuba u‐Arone, uyinto nina yena, ukuba niṙoṙa ngakuye?" 
Numbers16:12 Waza watuma u‐Mosesi ukuba kubizwe u‐Datane no‐Abirame, onyana baka‐Eliyabe; abati: Asiyi kunyuka." 
Numbers16:13 Kuyinto encinane na, okokuba usinyusile ezweni elela ubisi nobusi, ukusibubisa entlango, ukuba uya kuzenza nenkosi pezu kwetu?" 
Numbers16:14 Kanjako akusizisanga ezweni elela ubisi nobusi, nelifa lamasimi nezitiya zemiti yeveyine akusinikanga lona: amehlo alamadoda wowancotula yinina? asiyi kunyuka." 
Numbers16:15 Wabe u‐Mosesi equmbile kakulu, wati kuyehova: Ungabuki umnikelo wabo! andisusanga kubo nalinye iqwaṙashe, andenzelanga namnye kubo ububi." 
Numbers16:16 Waza u‐Mosesi wati ku‐Kora: Wena, nayo yonke imbuto yako, yibani sebusweni bukayehova, wena, nabo, no‐Arone, ngomso." 
Numbers16:17 Nize nitabate nonke ngabanye iziqumelo zenu, nifake kuzo isiqumiso, nisondeze pambi kwoyehova nonke ngabanye iziqumelo zenu; iziqumelo ezingamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu; nawe, no‐Arone, nizise iziqumelo zenu ngabanye." 
Numbers16:18 Baza batabata abanye ngabanye iziqumelo zabo, bafaka kuzo umlilo, babeka kuzo nesiqumiso, bemi elucangweni lwentente yentlangano ndawonye no‐Mosesi no‐Arone." 
Numbers16:19 Waye u‐Kora wabuta ngakubo yonke intlanganiso elucangweni lwentente yentlangano: bandul’ ukubonakala ubungcwalisa bukayehova kuyo yonke intlanganiso. 
Numbers16:20 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Numbers16:21 Zahluleni kwa pakati kwalentlanganiso, ndize ndibagqibele njengasepanyazweni." 
Numbers16:22 Koko bawayo ngobuso babo, bati: Tixo, ongutixo wayo imimoya yoluntu lwonke! yoba indoda inye yonile nje, uze uqumbele yonke intlanganiso na?" 
Numbers16:23 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers16:24 Teta kuyo intlanganiso, usiti: Nyukani kwindawo engqongayo intlalo ka‐Kora, n o‐Datane, no‐Abirame." 
Numbers16:25 Waselesuka u‐Mosesi waya ku‐Datane no‐Abirame; bati abadala bo‐Sirayeli bamlandela. 
Numbers16:26 Waza wateta kuyo intlanganiso, esiti: Mkani ke ezintenteni zalamadoda akohlakeleyo, ningacukumisi nanye into eyeyawo, hleze nibujiswe kuzo zonke izono zawo." 
Numbers16:27 Baza benyuka entlalweni ka‐Kora, n o‐Datane, no‐Abirame, ngamacala onke; koko u‐Datane no‐Abirame bapumayo, bema emnyango wentente zabo, kwa nabafazi babo, nonyana babo, nentsatshana zabo." 
Numbers16:28 Wayesiti u‐Mosesi: Kwa ngoku niya kukwazi ukuba uyehova unditumile ukuze ndiyenze yonke lemisebenzi; ngokuba ndinga yenzanga ngeyam intliziyo. 
Numbers16:29 Ukuba kunjengokufa kwabantu bonke kufayo aba, nokuba kungokwohlwaywa kwabantu bonke kwohlwaywa bona, uyehova akanditumanga." 
Numbers16:30 Kanti ukuba uyehova uyadala ummangaliso, uze umhlaba wakamise umlomo wawo, ubaginye bona, nako konke abanako, bade bahlele esihogweni behleli, niya kwandula nikwazi ukuba lamadoda adelile uyehova." 
Numbers16:31 Kwaza kwati, akuba egqibile ukuteta onke lamazwi, umhlaba opantsi kwawo wacandeka;" 
Numbers16:32 waza umhlaba wavula umlomo wawo, wawaginya wona, nendlu zawo, nabo bonke abantu aba lunge kuye u‐Kora, nayo yonke impahla." 
Numbers16:33 Baye behlela bona, nako konke abanako, behleli esihogweni; wati umhlaba wabaselela, baza batshabalala pakati kwomhlambi." 
Numbers16:34 Basuka o‐Sirayeli bonke ababebangqonga, babaleka ngesikalo sabo; ngokuba bebesiti: Hleze umhlaba usiginye nati." 
Numbers16:35 Kwaye kupuma umlilo kuyehova, wawagqibela lomadoda amakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu abenikela isiqumiso." 
Numbers16:36 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers16:37 Yitsho ku‐Elezari unyana ka‐Arone, umperisite, ukuba acole iziqumelo ekutsheni; uze umlilo uwucitele kude; ngokuba zingcwele." 
Numbers16:38 Iziqumelo zababoni ngakweyabo imipefumlo, makwenziwe ngazo amaceba akandelweyo abe sisalekwa sesibingelo: ngokuba bezisondezile ebusweni bukayehova, kukona zingcwele; zaziya kuba ngumqondiso elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers16:39 Wandula u‐Elezari, umperisite, watabata ezoziqumelo zexina, abebezisondezile abatshisiweyo, zaza zakandelwa zibe sisalekwa sesibingelo;" 
Numbers16:40 esiya kuba yinkumkuzo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba akusayi kusondela namntu ongowasemzini, ongenguye owenzalo ka‐Arone, ukuza kuqumisa isiqumiso pambi kwoyehova; ukuze angabi njengo‐Kora, nanjengembuto yake; njengokuba uyehova ebetshilo kuye ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Numbers16:41 Kwati kodwa ngomnye umhla, kwaṙoṙa yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli ngaku‐Mosesi nangaku‐Arone, isiti: Nina nibafisile abantu bakayehova." 
Numbers16:42 Kwaye kute, yakuba intlanganiso ibutelene ngakuye u‐Mosesi nangaku‐Arone, babeka ngasententeni yentlangano; kekaloku, bona ke, ilifu layisibekela; babonakala nobungcwalisa bukayehova." 
Numbers16:43 Basuka u‐Mosesi no‐Arone beza ngapambi kwentente yentlangano. 
Numbers16:44 Waza uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers16:45 Sukani pakati kwalentlanganiso, ndize ndibagqibele njengasepanyazweni. Bandula ukuwa ngobuso babo." 
Numbers16:46 Wati u‐Mosesi ku‐Arone: Tabata isiqumelo, ufake kuso umlilo uvela esibingelweni, ubeke nesiqumiso, uze unxame uye entlanganisweni, ubenzele uxoliso: ngokuba sekupumile umsindo ebusweni bukayehova; isibulalo sesiqaliwe." 
Numbers16:47 Waye u‐Arone watabata njengokuba ebetshilo u‐Mosesi, wabalekela pakati kwomhlambi; kekaloku, nasi isibulalo sesiqaliwe pakati kwabantu: waza wafaka isiqumiso, wenzela abantu uxoliso." 
Numbers16:48 Wema ke pakati kwabafileyo nabahleliyo: sada sanqamka isibulalo. 
Numbers16:49 Kekaloku abo babubayo ngesibulalo eso, bebengamawaka alishumi linesine, enamakulu asixe̔nxe, ngapandle kwabo abebebubile pezu kwawo umcimbi ka‐Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Wabuya u‐Arone waya ku‐Mosesi elucangweni lwentente yentlangano: saza isibulalo sanqamka. 
Numbers17:1 Wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers17:2 Teta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, uze wamkele kulo intonga ibe nye njengezindlu zoyise ezinye ngezinye, kwa kuzo zonke inkosi zalo ngendlu zoyise zazo, intonga ezilishumi linambini: ezinye ngezinye igama lazo uya kuliba̔la pezu kwentonga zazo." 
Numbers17:3 Negama lika‐Arone uya kuba̔la lona pezu kwentonga ka‐Levi: ngokuba intonga nye iya kuba koyintloko yezindlu zoyise zalo. 
Numbers17:4 Wauya kuzibekela ententeni yentlangano pambi kwesinqi̔no, apo ndiya kuhlangana nawe kona." 
Numbers17:5 Kwoti ke, Iondoda ndiyinyulileyo intonga yayo iya kuntsula; ndandiya kudambisa kum ukuṙoṙa kwalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, olwaṙoṙa ngako ngakuni." 
Numbers17:6 Waza u‐Mosesi wateta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli; zaye zonke inkosi zalo zanika kuye intonga, ezinye ngezinye intonga nye, ngendlu zoyise zazo, intonga ezilishumi linambini; yabiko nentonga ka‐Arone pakati kwentonga zazo." 
Numbers17:7 Waya u‐Mosesi wabekela intonga ezo pambi kwoyehova ententeni yesinqi̔no. 
Numbers17:8 Kwaye kute ngomnye umhla, akungena u‐Mosesi ententeni yesinqi̔no, kekaloku, nantsi intsulile intonga ka‐Arone, ngenxa yendlu ka‐Levi, yavelisa imiqumbi, yatyatyamba intyatyambo, yahlanza izamonde." 
Numbers17:9 Waza u‐Mosesi wapuma nazo zonke ezontonga ebusweni bukayehova, waya kulo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli: zakangela ke, zatabata enye ngenye intonga yayo." 
Numbers17:10 Wati uyehova kanjako ku‐Mosesi: Intonga ka‐Arone uyibuyisele pambi kwesinqi̔no, ize igcinelwe umqondiso ngakulo usapo lwokungeva; kwa njalo uya kupezisa ukuṙoṙa kwalo ngakum, ukuze lungafi." 
Numbers17:11 Wenje njalo u‐Mosesi: njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele, wenje njalo ke." 
Numbers17:12 Lwandula lwateta usapo luka‐Sirayeli ku‐Mosesi, lusiti: Bona ke, siyaqauka, siyabuba, tina sonke siyabuba." 
Numbers17:13 Osukuba eka asondele etabanakeleni kayehova uya kufa: kanene siya kugqityelwa ngokuqauka na? 
Numbers18:1 WAZA wati uyehova ku‐Arone: Wena, nonyana bako, nendlu kayihlo kunye nawe, niya kutwala inkohlakalo yeyingcwele indawo; kanjalo wena, nonyana bako kunye nawe, niya kutwala inkohlakalo yobuperisite benu." 
Numbers18:2 Nakanjako, abazalwana bako, isizwe sika‐Levi, isizwe soyihlo, ubasondeze nawe, ukuze babandakanyelwe kuwe, bakukonze: kodwa wena, nonyana bako kunye nawe, noba pambi kwentente yesinqi̔no." 
Numbers18:3 Babeya kugcina isigcinelo sako, nesigcinelo sentente yonke; koko bengayi kusondela kuzo impahla zeyingcwele indawo, nakuso isibingelo, ukuba bangafi, kwa bona, nani kanjalo." 
Numbers18:4 Bobandakanyelwa kuwe, bagcine isigcinelo sayo intente yentlangano, kuyo yonke inkonzo yentente: kanti owasemzini akayi kusondela kuni." 
Numbers18:5 Naniya kugcina isigcinelo seyingcwele indawo, nesigcinelo sesibingelo; kuze kungabuyi kubeko umsindo pezu kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers18:6 Ngokuba mna, bona ke, nditabatile abazalwana benu, aba‐Levi, kwa pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; basisipiwo kuni bepiwa uyehova, ukuba bayenze inkonzo yayo intente yentlangano." 
Numbers18:7 Kodwa wena, nonyana bako kunye nawe, niya kugcina ubuperisite benu kuzo zonke izinto zesibingelo, nakokwapakati kwekuselo; naniya kukonza: ubuperisite benu ndibunikile bube yinkonzo yokupiwa; nowasemzini osondelayo yena uya kufiswa." 
Numbers18:8 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Arone, esiti: Mna, bona ke, ndandikunikile ukugcinelwa kweminikelo yam yokufunqufunqulwa; eyazo zonke izinto ezingcwele zosapo luka‐Sirayeli ndiyinikile kuwe ngenxa yokutanjiswa, nakubo onyana bako, ngommiselo ongunapakade." 
Numbers18:9 Oku kwoba kokwako kwizinto ezingcwelekazi zivela emlilweni: yonke iminikelo yalo, kwa yonke iminikelo yokudla yalo, nawo onke amadini esono alo, nawo onke amadini etyala alo, oluya kuyinikela kum; kwoba yingcwelekazi kuwe oku, nakubo onyana bako." 
Numbers18:10 Kweyingcwele yezingcwele indawo uya kukudla; onke amadoda aya kukudla; kwoba yingcwele kuwe. 
Numbers18:11 Oku kokwako nako: umnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa wokupa kwalo, kunye nayo yonke iminikelo yokushukushukunyiswa yosapo luka‐Sirayeli; ndiyinikile kuwe, nakonyana bako, nakwintombi zako kunye nawe, ngommiselo ongunapakade; bonke abacocekileyo endlwini yako baya kutya oko." 
Numbers18:12 Bonke ubunqata beoli, nabo bonke ubunqata beveyine, nobenqolowa, iziqalo zazo, oluya kuzinika kuyehova, ndikunikile zona." 
Numbers18:13 Ulibo lwako konke okusemhlabeni walo, oluya kuluzisa kuyehova, lwoba lolwako; bonke abacocekileyo endlwini yako baya kuludla." 
Numbers18:14 Konke okwahlukanisiweyo kwa‐Sirayeli kwoba kokwako. 
Numbers18:15 Konke ekuzityulwa ngako pakati kwenyama yonke, abaya kukusondeza kuyehova, pakati kwabantu, napakati kwezilo, kwoba kokwako; kodwa amazibulo abantu uya kugqibela ukuwakulula, namazibulo ezilo ezinco̔lileyo uya kukulula wona." 
Numbers18:16 Nabo abaya kukululwa pakati kwabo, ababudala buyinyanga nye uya kubakulula, ngokulinganisa kwako, ngemali yeshekele ezintlanu, ezingangayo ishekele yeyingcwele indawo: zigera ezimashumi mabini yona." 
Numbers18:17 Kodwa izibulo lenkomo, umhlaumbi izibulo legusha, umhlaumbi izibulo lebokwe, akuyi kuwakulula; ayingcwele wona: igazi lawo uya kulisasaza pezu kwesibingelo, nenqata lawo uya kulitshisa libe ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Numbers18:18 Kanti inyama yawo yoba yeyako; njengesifuba sokushukushukunyiswa, nanjengowokunene umkono, yoba yeyako." 
Numbers18:19 Yonke iminikelo yokufunqufunqulwa yezinto ezingcwele, oluya kunikela ngayo usapo luka‐Sirayeli kuyehova, ndiyinikile kuwe, nakonyana bako, nakwintombi zako kunye nawe, ngommiselo ongunapakade: lucebano lwetyuwa olungunapakade, pambi kwoyehova, kwa kuwe nakwinzalo yako kunye nawe." 
Numbers18:20 Wati uyehova kanjalo ku‐Arone: Akuyi kulamkela ilifa elizweni lalo, akuyi kuba naso isabelwa pakati kwalo kanjako; mna ndisisabelwa sako nelifa lako pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers18:21 Nakubo onyana baka‐Levi, bona ke, ndinikile zonke izishumi kwa‐Sirayeli zibe lilifa, ngenxa yenkonzo yabo abakonza ngayo, kwa inkonzo yentente yentlangano." 
Numbers18:22 Kanjalo malungapindi usapo luka‐Sirayeli ukusondela ententeni yentlangano, hleze lutwale isono, lufe ke." 
Numbers18:23 Kodwa aba‐Levi bona baya kuyenza inkonzo yentente yentlangano, batwale nokutwala inkohlakalo yabo: kwoba ngummiselwa ongunapakade ngezizukulwana zenu, ukuba bangalamkeli ilifa pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers18:24 Ngokuba izishumi zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, oluya kunikela ngazo umnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa kuyehova, ndizinikile kuba‐Levi zibe lilifa; ngako oko ndite kubo: Pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli abayi kulamkela ilifa." 
Numbers18:25 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers18:26 Teta kanjalo kuba‐Levi, uti kubo: Noti nakuzamkela kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli izishumi, endizinikileyo kuni zivela kulo zibe lilifa lenu, nandule ninikele ngazo umnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa kuyehova, isishumi sezishumi ezo;" 
Numbers18:27 esiya kunibalelwa ukuba ngumnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa wenu, njengenqolowa ivela esibayeni sokubula, nanjengobuzala buvela esincinezelweni seveyine." 
Numbers18:28 Kwa njalo niya kunikela nani umnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa kuyehova kuzo zonke izishumi zenu, eniya kuzamkela kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli; naniya kunika kwa kuzo umnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa kayehova ku‐Arone umperisite." 
Numbers18:29 Kuzo zonke izipiwo zenu niya kunikela yonke iminikelo yokufunqufunqulwa kayehova; kubo bonke ubunqata bazo, kokuyingcwele yazo kwa kuzo." 
Numbers18:30 Ngako uya kuti kubo: Nxa ninikeleyo ubunqata bazo kwa kuzo, kuya kwandula ukubalelwa aba‐Levi njengenzuzo yesibaya sokubula, nanjengenzuzo yesincinezelo seveyine." 
Numbers18:31 Naniya kudla oko kuzo zonke indawo, nina nendlu yenu: ngokuba kungumvuzo kuni ngenxa yenkonzo yenu ententeni yentlangano." 
Numbers18:32 Aniyi kutwala isono pezu kwako, nakunikela ubunqata bako kwa kuko; kanjalo aniyi kudyoba izinto ezingcwele zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nize ningafi." 
Numbers19:1 WABUYA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, esiti:" 
Numbers19:2 Nguwo lo ummiselo womteto awuyaleleyo uyehova, esiti: Teta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba luzise kuwe itokazi elibomvukazi elimsulwa, ekungeko kulo isonakalo, nekunganyukanga pezu kwalo iyokwe." 
Numbers19:3 Naniya kulinika ku‐Elezari umperisite, oya kupuma nalo ngapandle kwomnquba, lize lixe̔lwe apo ebusweni bake." 
Numbers19:4 Woti u‐Elezari, umperisite, acapule egazini lalo ngomnwe wake, asasaze nqwa pambi kwentente yentlangano kwigazi lalo amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe." 
Numbers19:5 Kwandule kutshiswe itokazi elo emehlweni ake; isikumba salo, nenyama yalo, negazi lalo, kunye nomswane walo, ziya kutshiswa." 
Numbers19:6 Waye umperisite eya kutabata umti wesedare, nehisope, nesibomvu, azipose pakati kwokutsha kwetokazi elo." 
Numbers19:7 Andule umperisite ahlanze izivato zake, ahlambe inyama yake ngamanzi, abuye angene emnqubeni; ati umperisite abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:8 Nalowo ulitshisileyo makazihlanze izivato zake ngamanzi, ayihlambe inyama yake ngamanzi, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:9 Kanjalo umntu ococekileyo wobuta ututu lwetokazi elo, alubeke pantsi ngapandle kwomnquba endaweni emhlope, oluya kugcinelwa intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, lube lolwamanzi okuhlanzekisa: sisihlambululo ngenxa yesono." 
Numbers19:10 Woti lowo ulubutayo ututu lwetokazi elo, ahlanze izivato zake, abe enco̔lile kude kuhlwe. Oku kwoba ngummiselwa ongunapakade elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, nakowasemzini opambukeleyo pakati kwalo." 
Numbers19:11 Lowo ucukumisayo ofileyo, omnye umzimba ofileyo womntu, woba enco̔lile imihla isixe̔nxe." 
Numbers19:12 Uya kuzihlambulula ngawo ngowesitatu umhla, ati ngowesixe̔nxe umhla abe ecokisekile; kodwa ukuba akazihlambululi ngomhla wesitatu, akayi kuba ecokisekile ngomhla wesixe̔nxe." 
Numbers19:13 Osukuba ecukumisa ofileyo, umzimba ofileyo womntu osel’ efile, kanti akazihlambululi, uyanco̔lisa itabanakele kayehova; ngako lowampefumlo wonqanyulwa kwa‐Sirayeli: ngokokuba amanzi okuhlanzekisa ebengatshizwanga pezu kwake, woba enco̔lile; ukunco̔la kwake kuseko kuye." 
Numbers19:14 Nangu umteto, xeshekweni umntu aya kububa ententeni: bonke abangenayo kulontente, nabo bonke abapakati kwalontente, boba benco̔lile imihla isixe̔nxe." 
Numbers19:15 Nazo zonke izitya ezivulekileyo, ekungeko siciko sibotshiwe pezu kwazo, zinco̔lile zona." 
Numbers19:16 Nosukuba ecukumisa ohlatyiweyo ngesiṙele ezindle, umhlaumbi ofeleyo kona, umhlaumbi itambo lomntu, umhlaumbi incw̔aba, yena woba enco̔lile imihla isixe̔nxe." 
Numbers19:17 Kwaye kuya kumcatshulelwa lowo unco̔lileyo elutulini lwokutsha kwesihlambululo ngenxa yesono, kwandul’ ukubekwa pezu kwalo amanzi elayo esityeni:" 
Numbers19:18 woti umntu ococekileyo atabate ihisope, ayifake emanzini lawo, ati fefe pezu kwentente, napezu kwazo zonke izitya, napezu kwabantu ababeko kona, napezu kwobecukumisa itambo, umhlaumbi obehlatyiwe, umhlaumbi obefile, umhlaumbi incw̔aba." 
Numbers19:19 Kanjalo lowo ucocekileyo uya kuti fefe pezu kwonco̔lileyo ngomhla wesitatu, nangomhla wesixe̔nxe; waye ngowesixe̔nxe umhla eya kumhlambulula; woda ahlanze izivato zake, ahlambe emanzini, abe ecokisekile ngokuhlwa." 
Numbers19:20 Kodwa umntu oya kuba enco̔lile, kanti akayi kuzihlambulula, umpefumlo lowo wonqanyulwa pakati kwomhlambi: ngokuba eyinco̔lisile eyingcwele indawo kayehova; amanzi okuhlanzekisa akatshizwanga pezu kwake, unco̔lile yena." 
Numbers19:21 Kwoba ngummiselwa ongunapakade kubo, okokuba lowo otshizayo amanzi okuhlanzekisa uya kuhlanza izivato zake, nokuba lowo ocukumisayo amanzi okuhlanzekisa woba enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Numbers19:22 Konke kusukuba onco̔lileyo ekucukumisa, kwoba kunco̔lile; kanjalo umntu okucukumisayo woba enco̔lile kude kuhlwe." 
Numbers20:1 KWATI kwakufika usapo luka‐Sirayeli, intlanganiso yonke, entlango ye‐Tsine, ngenyanga yokuqala, bahlala abantu e‐Kadeshe: wati u‐Miriyame wafa kona, wancw̔atywa kona kanjalo." 
Numbers20:2 Kwaye kungeko manzi okuba kusele intlanganiso: basuka babutelana ngaku‐Mosesi nangaku‐Arone. 
Numbers20:3 Baza abantu bapika no‐Mosesi, batsho ukuti: Akwaba sabesiqauka umpefumlo, nxa abazalwana betu babeqauka umpefumlo ebusweni bukayehova!" 
Numbers20:4 Kunganina ke ukuba ningenisile umhlambi kayehova kulentlango, size sifele kona, tina nenkomo zetu?" 
Numbers20:5 kunganina nokuba nisinyusile e‐Jipete, ukuze nisizise kulendawo embi? asi yindawo yembewu, neyemikiwane, neyemiti yeveyine, neyegranate; akuko manzi okuselwa kanjako." 
Numbers20:6 Baye besuka u‐Mosesi no‐Arone ebusweni bomhlambi baya elucangweni lwentente yentlangano, bawa ngobuso babo: bati ubungcwalisa bukayehova babonakala kubo." 
Numbers20:7 Wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers20:8 Tabata intonga leyo, ubute intlanganiso, wena no‐Arone umkuluwe wako, nitete eweni pambi kwamehlo ayo, eliya kukupa amanzi alo; wauya kubapumisela amanzi eweni, uze useze intlanganiso nenkomo zayo." 
Numbers20:9 Waya u‐Mosesi watabata intonga leyo kwa sebusweni bukayehova, njengokuba ebemyalele." 
Numbers20:10 Baza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone babuta intlanganiso ngapambi kweliwa, wati u‐Mosesi kubo: Pulapulani ke, nina bangevayo! sinipumisele amanzi kweliliwa yinina?" 
Numbers20:11 Waza u‐Mosesi wapakamisa isandla sake, wabeta iliwa ngentonga yake ngamaxesha amabini; kwandul’ ukupuma amanzi amaninzi, yada yasela intlanganiso, nenkomo zayo." 
Numbers20:12 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone: Ngenxa yokuba beningakolwa ndim, ukuba nindingcwalise emehl weni osapo luka‐Sirayeli, kukona ningayi kungenisa lentlanganiso kwelozwe endilinikile kuyo." 
Numbers20:13 La ngamanzi e‐Meriba, ngokuba lwapikayo usapo luka‐Sirayeli noyehova; waza wangcwaliswa ngalo." 
Numbers20:14 WANDULA u‐Mosesi wasusa izigidimi e‐Kadeshe ukuya kukumkani we‐Edome, ukuti: Utsho umzalwana wako u‐Sirayeli ukuti: Uyazi wena yonke inkatazo esihlileyo;" 
Numbers20:15 okokuba obawo betu behlela e‐Jipete, nokuba sahlala e‐Jipete imihla yamininzi; nokokuba ama‐Jipete asipata kakubi tina nobawo betu." 
Numbers20:16 Sati sakukala kuyehova, weva ilizwi letu, watuma ingelosi, wasikupa e‐Jipete; kekaloku, nanku sise‐Kadeshe, isixeko somda wako wokugqibela." 
Numbers20:17 Makesicande elizweni lako: asiyi kucanda emasimini, nasezitiyeni zemiti yeveyine; asiyi kusela amanzi amaqula kanjako: siya kuhamba ngendlela yokumkani; asiyi kupambukela nangasekunene nangasekohlo, side sidlule imida yako." 
Numbers20:18 Koko u‐Edome wati kuye: Akuyi kucanda kum, hleze ndipumele ngakuwe ngeṙele." 
Numbers20:19 Lwati usapo luka‐Sirayeli kuye: Siya kunyuka ngomendo; naxeshekweni sisela kwamanzi ako, mna nenkomo zam, sendiya kunika ixabiso lawo; kupela ndiya kucanda ngenyawo zam, ndingenzi nto." 
Numbers20:20 Wayesiti: Akuyi kucanda. Waza u‐Edome wapumela ngakuye, ngento eninzi yabantu, nangesandla esomeleleyo." 
Numbers20:21 Wala njalo ke u‐Edome ukumvumela u‐Sirayeli acande emideni yake; ngako u‐Sirayeli wapambuka kuye. 
Numbers20:22 LWAZA lwanduluka e‐Kadeshe lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, intlanganiso yonke, lweza entabeni ye‐Hore." 
Numbers20:23 Kekaloku watsho uyehova ku‐Mosesi naku‐Arone, entabeni ye‐Hore, ngasemideni yelizwe le‐Edome, esiti:" 
Numbers20:24 u‐Arone wobutelwa ebantwini bake; ngokuba engayi kungena kwelozwe endilinikileyo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ngenxa yokuba nibe nivukela ilizwi lam ngasemanzini e‐Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Tabata u‐Arone, no‐Elezari unyana wake, ubanyusele entabeni ye‐Hore:" 
Numbers20:26 uze umhlube u‐Arone izivato zake, umvatise ngazo u‐Elezari unyana wake; ngokuba u‐Arone eya kubutelwa ebantwini bake, afe kona." 
Numbers20:27 Wenza u‐Mosesi njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele. Baye benyukela entabeni ye‐Hore emehlweni ayo yonke intlanganiso: 
Numbers20:28 waza u‐Mosesi wamhluba u‐Arone izivato zake, wamvatisa ngazo u‐Elezari unyana wake; wati u‐Arone wafa kona engcopo yentaba. Bandula behla u‐Mosesi no‐Elezari entabeni leyo." 
Numbers20:29 Yati yonke intlanganiso, yakubona ukuba u‐Arone uqaukile umpefumlo, yamlilela u‐Arone imihla yamashumi matatu, kwa yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers21:1 KEKALOKU kwakuvakala kum‐Kanane, kukumkani we‐Haradi, obehlala esuyide, ukuba kuyeza o‐Sirayeli ngendlela yase‐Atarime, wasuka walwa no‐Sirayeli, watimba kubo amatinjwa." 
Numbers21:2 Waza wabambisa u‐Sirayeli ngesibambiso kuyehova, wati: Ukuba uya kunika ababantu esandleni sam ngenyaniso, sendiya kuzilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni izixeko zabo." 
Numbers21:3 Wapulapula uyehova ilizwi lika‐Sirayeli, wanika aba‐Kanane; wada walahlela ekutshatyalalisweni bona nezixeko zabo; ngako igama lalondawo walibiza nge‐Horema." 
Numbers21:4 Kwaza kwandulukwa entabeni ye‐Hore ngendlela yaselwandle olubomvu, ukuya kuzekelela ilizwe le‐Edome: koko umpefumlo wabantu ubudanile ngenxa yendlela." 
Numbers21:5 Basuka bateta abantu ngakuye utixo nangakuye u‐Mosesi, bati: Kunganina lento nisinyusileyo e‐Jipete ukuza kufa kulentlango? ngokuba kungeko isonka, kungeko namanzi; uti umpefumlo wetu usitiye esisonka silikapukapu." 
Numbers21:6 Waza uyehova watuma inyoka ezibumliloṙa pakati kwabantu, ezibe ziluma abantu; bafa ke abantu abaninzi bakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers21:7 Ngako abantu beza ku‐Mosesi, bati: Sonile, ngokuba sitetile ngakuyehova nangakuwe; tandaza kuyehova, ukuba asuse kuti ezinyoka. Waza u‐Mosesi wabatandazela abantu." 
Numbers21:8 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Yenza inyoka ebumliloṙa, umise yona pezu kwesibonda eside; kwakuya kuti, osukuba elunyiwe, akuyibonela, wopila." 
Numbers21:9 Wandula u‐Mosesi wenza inyoka yexina, wayimisa pezu kwesibonda eside; kwaye kute, nxa inyoka ilumile umntu, waza wakangela enyokeni yexina, wapila ke." 
Numbers21:10 Lwabuya lwanduluka usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwaya lwati waca e‐Obote." 
Numbers21:11 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Obote, lwaya lwati waca e‐Hiyi‐habarime, entlango engapambi kwe‐Mowabi, ngasekupumeni kwelanga." 
Numbers21:12 Lwanduluka kona, lwaya lwati waca entilini ye‐Zerede." 
Numbers21:13 Lwanduluka kona, lwaya lwati waca nganeno kwe‐Arenone, esentlango, epumayo emdeni waba‐Amori: ngokuba i‐Arenone ingumda we‐Mowabi, pakati kwe‐Mowabi naba‐Amori." 
Numbers21:14 (Ngako oko kutshiwo encwadini yemfazwe zikayehova, ukuti: Ngase‐Vahebi e‐Sufa, nangasemilanjaneni ye‐Arenone," 
Numbers21:15 nasemfuleni wemilanjana, otambekela entlalweni ye‐Hari, wayame emdeni we‐Mowabi.)" 
Numbers21:16 Lwesuka nakona lwaya e‐Bere: liqula elo ekungalo wabesiti uyehova, ku‐Mosesi: Hlanganisa abantu, ndandiya kubanika amanzi." 
Numbers21:17 (Okuya bavuma o‐Sirayeli lengoma: Mpompoza, mtombo! vumani kuwo ngokuguqulelana!" 
Numbers21:18 Umtombo inkosana zawupandayo, amanene abantu awumba, ngomnikamteto, ngemisimelelo yawo.) Lwesuka nasentlango lwaya e‐Matana;" 
Numbers21:19 lwesuka nase‐Matana lwaya e‐Nahaliyeli; lwesuka nase‐Nahaliyeli lwaya e‐Bamote; 
Numbers21:20 lwesuka nase‐Bamote lwaya esihlanjeni, esisezindle zase‐Mowabi, engcotsheni ye‐Pisega, esibeka ngasebugxwayibeni." 
Numbers21:21 Waza u‐Sirayeli wasusa izigidimi ukuya ku‐Sihone, ukumkani waba‐Amori, ukuti:" 
Numbers21:22 Mandicande elizweni lako: asiyi kupambukela emasimini, nasezitiyeni zemiti yeveyine; asiyi̔ kusela amanzi amaqula kanjako: siya kuhamba ngendlela yokumkani, side sidlule imida yako." 
Numbers21:23 Kodwa u‐Sihone ebengavumeli u‐Sirayeli acande emideni yake; waza u‐Sihone wahlanganisa bonke abantu bake, wapumela ngakuye u‐Sirayeli, ngasentlango, wada wafika e‐Yahetsa, walwa no‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers21:24 Koko u‐Sirayeli wambeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, wabamba ilizwe lake kwa se‐Arenone kwada kwase‐Yaboki, kwada kwakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni: ngokuba umda wosapo luka‐Hamoni ubunqabile." 
Numbers21:25 Waye u‐Sirayeli watabata zonke ezizixeko: wandula u‐Sirayeli wahlala kuzo zonke izixeko zaba‐Amori, e‐Heshebone, nakuwo onke amagxamesi ayo."
