Numbers21:26 Ngokuba i‐Heshebone ibisisixeko sika‐Sihone, ukumkani waba‐Amori, obelwile nowapambili ukumkani wase‐Mowabi, waza watabata lonke ilizwe lake esandleni sake, kwada kwase‐Arenone." 
Numbers21:27 Ngako oko kutiwa ngabateta imizekeliso: Yizani e‐Heshebone; masakiwe siqiniswe isixeko sika‐Sihone! 
Numbers21:28 Ngokuba kupumile umlilo e‐Heshebone, ilangatye esixekweni sika‐Sihone; udlile i‐Hari yase‐Mowabi, n abanumzana basemantla ase‐Arenone." 
Numbers21:29 Kwoba nzima kuwe, Mowabi! nitshabalele, bantu baka‐Kemoshe! unikile onyana bake abasindileyo, nentombi zake, ekutinjweni, kukumkani waba‐Amori, ku‐Sihone." 
Numbers21:30 Sibatolele; i‐Heshebone itshabalele kwada kwase‐Dibone; sasicitakalisile kwada kwase‐Nofaki, e fik ela e‐Medeba." 
Numbers21:31 Kwa njalo o‐Sirayeli bahlala ezweni laba‐Amori. 
Numbers21:32 Wandula u‐Mosesi watuma ukuba kuhlolwe i‐Yahezere; basuka babamba amagxamesi ayo, bagqogqa aba‐Amori ababekona." 
Numbers21:33 Bada bajika benyuka ngendlela yase‐Bashane; waza u‐Hogi, ukumkani we‐Bashane, wapumela ngakubo, yena nabo bonke abantu bake, kuliwe e‐Edrehi." 
Numbers21:34 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Ungoyiki yena; ngokuba ndimnikile esandleni sako, nabo bonke abantu bake, nelizwe lake; wauya kwenza kuye, njengokuba ubusenza ku‐Sihone, ukumkani waba‐Amori, owahlala e‐Heshebone." 
Numbers21:35 Baza bambeta, kwa nonyana bake, nabo bonke abantu bake, kwada akwabi samshiyelwa namnye oseleyo: babamba ilizwe lake kanjalo." 
Numbers22:1 LWAZA lwanduluka usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwaya lwati waca ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, nganeno kwe‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Kekaloku u‐Balaki, unyana ka‐Tsipore, wabona konke abekwenzile u‐Sirayeli kuba‐Amori." 
Numbers22:3 Wandula u‐Mowabi woyika kakulu abantu abo, ngokuba bebaninzi bona; waye u‐Mowabi enesitukutezi ngenxa yalo usapo luka‐Sarayeli." 
Numbers22:4 Waza wati u‐Mowabi kubadala bama‐Midiyane: Kaloku lomhlambi uya kukotulula konke okusingqongayo, njengokuba inkabi ikotulula utyani basendle. Kekaloku u‐Balaki, unyana ka‐Tsipore, ebengukumkani wama‐Mowabi ngeloxesha ke." 
Numbers22:5 Wandula watuma izigidimi ukuya ku‐Bilame, unyana ka‐Behori, e‐Petore, engasemlanjeni, elizweni losapo lwabantu bakowabo, ukuba ambize, esiti: Bona ke, kuvelile abantu e‐Jipete; naba begubungele ubuso bomhlaba, behleli malungana nam." 
Numbers22:6 Kauze ke ngoko, undiqalekisele ababantu, ngokuba bona bendigqitisile ngamandla; kungati ndingaba namandla okuba sibabete, ndize ndibagxote elizweni: ngokuba ndisazi ukuba lowo umtamsanqelisayo uya kutanyusanqeliswa, nokuba lowo umqalekisayo uya kuqalekiswa." 
Numbers22:7 Baza besuka abadala bama‐Mowabi nabadala bama‐Midiyane, benemilandu yokulaula ezandleni zabo; bada bafika ku‐Bilame, bateta kuye amazwi ka‐Balaki." 
Numbers22:8 Wayesiti kubo: Lalisani apa obubusuku, ndandiya kuzisa impendulo kuni, njengokuba uyehova eya kunditetela. Zaza inkosana zase‐Mowabi zahlala no‐Bilame." 
Numbers22:9 Kekaloku weza utixo ku‐Bilame, wati: Ngawapina lamadoda akuwe?" 
Numbers22:10 Waza u‐Bilame wati kutixo: u‐Balaki, unyana ka‐Tsipore, ukumkani wama‐Mowabi, uwatumile kum, esiti:" 
Numbers22:11 Bona ke, kuvelile abantu e‐Jipete, abagubungele ubuso bomhlaba: kauze ke, undiqalekisele bona; kungati ndingaba namandla okulwa ngakubo, ndize ndibagxote." 
Numbers22:12 Waza utixo wati ku‐Bilame: Akuyi kuhamba nawo; akuyi kuqalekisa abobantu, ngokuba benetamsanqa bona." 
Numbers22:13 Wesuka u‐Bilame kusasa, wati kwinkosana zika‐Balaki: Hambani niye elizweni lenu, ngokuba esala uyehova ukundivumela ukuba ndiye nani." 
Numbers22:14 Zaza zesuka inkosana zase‐Mowabi, zaya ku‐Balaki, zati: Walile u‐Bilame ukuhamba nati." 
Numbers22:15 Wapinda nakanjako u‐Balaki watuma inkosana, ezininzi nezibekekileyo pezu kwazo ezo;" 
Numbers22:16 ezezayo ku‐Bilame, zati kuye: Utsho u‐Balaki, unyana ka‐Tsipore, ukuti: Zungabanjezelwa nto ukuba ungezi kum." 
Numbers22:17 Ngokuba ndiya kukubeka kakulu kunene, nako konke uya kundixelela kona ndiya kukwenza: uze ke ngoko, undiqalekisele abantu aba." 
Numbers22:18 Wapendula u‐Bilame wati kwizicaka zika‐Balaki: Nakuba u‐Balaki abeya kundinika indlu yake izele yisilivere negolide, andingegqite elizwini likayehova, utixo wam, ukuba ndenze okuncinane umhlaumbi okukulu." 
Numbers22:19 Ngako kaloku, kenihlale apa nani obubusuku, ukuze ndiyazi into aya kwongeza uyehova ukuyiteta kum." 
Numbers22:20 Waye utixo esiza ku‐Bilame ebusuku, wati kuye: Ukuba amadoda lawo eze kukubiza, suka, uhambe nawo; kodwa noko, lonto endiya kuyiteta kuwe, yiyo uya kuyenza." 
Numbers22:21 Waselesuka u‐Bilame kusasa, wabopa iqwaṙashekazi lake, wahamba nenkosana zase‐Mowabi." 
Numbers22:22 Yaza yavuta ingqumbo katixo, ngokuba ehambile: yasuka ingelosi kayehova yazimisa endleleni ibe ngumalane kuye. Kekaloku yena ebekwele pezu kweqwaṙashekazi lake, nabafana bake ababini benaye." 
Numbers22:23 Lati iqwaṙashekazi labona ingelosi kayehova imi endleleni, neṙele layo lir̔oliwe esandleni sayo; ngako iqwaṙashekazi lapambuka endleleni, laya ngasendle. Waza u‐Bilame wabeta iqwaṙashekazi, ukuba alisonge liye endleleni." 
Numbers22:24 Koko ingelosi kayehova ibimi endleleni yasezitiyeni zemiti yeveyine, udonga lungelicala, nodonga lungelocala." 
Numbers22:25 Lati iqwaṙashekazi, lakubona ingelosi kayehova, lazincinezela ngaseludongeni, laluncinezela unyawo luka‐Bilame ngaseludongeni kanjalo; ngako wapinda walibeta." 
Numbers22:26 Yaza ingelosi kayehova yabuya yagqita, yema endaweni exineneyo, apo ibingeko ndlela yokujika nangasekunene nangasekohlo." 
Numbers22:27 Lati iqwaṙashekazi, lakubona ingelosi kayehova, lati butu ngapantsi kwo‐Bilame; yaza yavuta ingqumbo ka‐Bilame, wada walibeta iqwaṙashekazi ngenduku." 
Numbers22:28 Wandula uyehova wawuvula umlomo weqwaṙashekazi, elati ku‐Bilame: Ndenze nto nina kuwe, ukuba undibetile lamaxesha omatatu?" 
Numbers22:29 Wayesiti u‐Bilame kwiqwaṙashekazi: Ngokokuba udlale ngam; akwaba bendineṙele esandleni sam! ngokuba kaloku ndinge ndikubulala. 
Numbers22:30 Lati iqwaṙashekazi ku‐Bilame: Andililo iqwaṙashekazi lako na, okweleyo pezu kwalo kuseloko ubuko kwada kwanamhla nje? ndike ndaqela ukwenje njalo na kuwe? Wayesiti: Hai." 
Numbers22:31 Waza uyehova watyila amehlo ka‐Bilame, wada wayibona ingelosi kayehova imi endleleni, neṙele layo lir̔oliwe esandleni sayo; wandula watoba ngapantsi, waqubuda ngobuso bake." 
Numbers22:32 Yati kuye ingelosi kayehova: Yinina ukuba ulibetile iqwaṙashekazi lako lamaxesha omatatu? bona ke, ndipumile ndibe ngumalane, ngokuba igwenxekile indlela yako pambi kwam." 
Numbers22:33 Kodwa iqwaṙashekazi lindibonile, lapambuka ebusweni bam lamaxesha omatatu; ukuba belingapambukanga kum, okunene kaloku ngendibe ndibulele wena, ndalondoloza lona lihleli." 
Numbers22:34 Waza u‐Bilame wati kuyo ingelosi kayehova: Ndonile, ngokuba bendingakwazi ukuba uzimisile ngakum endleleni; ngako kaloku, ukuba kubi emehlweni ako, sendiya kubuya." 
Numbers22:35 Koko ingelosi kayehova yati ku‐Bilame: Hamba nawo amadoda la; kodwa elozwi ndiya kuliteta kuwe, elona uya kuliteta kupela. Waza u‐Bilame wahamba nenkosana zika‐Balaki." 
Numbers22:36 Kekaloku u‐Balaki akuva ukuba uyeza u‐Bilame, wandula wapuma ukuya kumkaulela esixekweni sase‐Mowabi, esisemdeni wase‐Arenone, esemdeni wokugqibela." 
Numbers22:37 Waye u‐Balaki wati ku‐Bilame: Bendingatumi kuwe ngokunxama na, ukuba ndikubize? kunganina ukuba ubungezi kum? andingekubeke ngenyaniso na?" 
Numbers22:38 Wati u‐Bilame ku‐Balaki: Bona ke, ndize kuwe nje, ndingaka ndibe namandla okuteta into na? ilizwi alibekayo uyehova emlonyeni wam, lelo ndiya kuliteta." 
Numbers22:39 Wasuka u‐Bilame waya no‐Balaki; bada bafika e‐Kiriyate‐hutsote. 
Numbers22:40 Waza u‐Balaki wabinga inkabi negusha, waseletuma ku‐Bilame, nakwinkosana ezinaye." 
Numbers22:41 Kwaye kute kwakusa, u‐Balaki wamtabata u‐Bilame, wamnyusela ezindaweni ezipakamileyo zika‐Bali, ukuba ekona agqibele ukukangela abantu." 
Numbers23:1 Waza wati u‐Bilame ku‐Balaki: Ndakele apa izibingelo zibe sixe̔nxe, undilungisele nalapa isixe̔nxe senkunzana zenkomo, nesixe̔nxe senkunzi zegusha." 
Numbers23:2 Wenza u‐Balaki njengokuba ebetetile u‐Bilame; baza u‐Balaki no‐Bilame banikela inkunzana yenkomo nenkunzi yegusha ngesibingelo ngesibingelo. 
Numbers23:3 Wandula wati u‐Bilame ku‐Balaki: Hlala umi wena ngasedinini lokutshiswa lako, ndandiya kuhamba mna; kungati umhlaumbi uyehova woza ukundihlangabeza: nento asukuba eya kundibonisa yona, ndoyityela kuwe. Waza waya endulini." 
Numbers23:4 Waye utixo wamhlangabeza u‐Bilame; owati kuye: Izibingelo ezisixe̔nxe ndizilungisile, ndandinikele inkunzana yenkomo nenkunzi yegusha ngesibingelo ngesibingelo." 
Numbers23:5 Waza uyehova wabeka ilizwi emlonyeni ka‐Bilame, wati: Buya uye ku‐Balaki, utete ngokunjalo." 
Numbers23:6 Wasuka wabuya waya kuye; kekaloku nankuya emi ngasedinini lokutshiswa lake, yena, nazo zonke inkosana zase‐Mowabi." 
Numbers23:7 Wandula wapimisela umzekeliso wake, wati: Kwase‐Arame, undir̔olile u‐Balaki, ukumkani wama‐Mowabi, ezintabeni zasempumalanga, esiti: Yiza, undiqalekisele u‐Yakobi, uze ke, utuke u‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers23:8 Ndingati nina ukuqalekisa lowo angamqalekisanga utixo? ndingati nina nokutuka lowo angamtukanga uyehova? 
Numbers23:9 Ngokuba ndisengcopo yamawa ndimbona, ndisezindulini ndimkangela: bona ke, abantu abo baya kuhlala bodwa, abayi kuzibala pakati kwentlanga." 
Numbers23:10 Ngubanina ongabalayo utuli lwakwa‐Yakobi, nenani lesesine isiqingata sakwa‐Sirayeli? Mandife mna ngokufa kwabalungileyo, nokwasemva kwam makube njengokwake!" 
Numbers23:11 Waza u‐Balaki wati ku‐Bilame: Undenzele nto nina? Bendikutabata ukuba uziqalekise intshaba zam; kanti, bona ke, ugqibele ukuzitamsanqelisa." 
Numbers23:12 Wapendula wati: Oko uyehova akubekileyo emlonyeni wam, ndingalumki na ukuba nditete kona?" 
Numbers23:13 Wandula wati u‐Balaki kuye: Kauze ke nam ukuya kwenye indawo, apo uya kubabonela kona: uya kubona incam yabo kupela, akuyi kubabona bonke; uze undiqalekisele bona kwa lapo." 
Numbers23:14 Wasuka wamsa ezindle zabalindi, engcotsheni ye‐Pisega, waka kona izibingelo zasixe̔nxe, wanikela inkunzana yenkomo nenkunzi yegusha ngesibingelo ngesibingelo." 
Numbers23:15 Waza wati ku‐Balaki: Hlala umi apa wena ngasedinini lokutshiswa lako, ndandiya kuya ukuhlangabeza u‐Yehova paya." 
Numbers23:16 Waye uyehova wamhlangabeza u‐Bilame, wabeka ilizwi emlonyeni wake, wati: Buya uye ku‐Balaki, utete ngokunjalo." 
Numbers23:17 Wasuka weza kuye; kekaloku, nanku emi ngasedinini lokutshiswa lake, nenkosana zase‐Mowabi ndawonye naye. Waza u‐Balaki wati kuye: Kuyinto nina uyehova ayitetileyo?" 
Numbers23:18 Wandula wapimisela umzekeliso wake, wati: Suka ume, Balaki! upulapule ke; ndinikele indlebe, nyana ka‐Tsipore!" 
Numbers23:19 Utixo asi nguye umntu ukuba axoke; asi nguye nonyana womntu, ukuba aguquke: uya kutsho na, aze angakwenzi na? uya kuteta na, aze angakuqinisi na?" 
Numbers23:20 Bona ke, ndamkele ilizwi lokuba nditamsanqelise; useletamsanqele ke; andingekubuyise." 
Numbers23:21 Akakangeli inkohlakalo kwa‐Yakobi, kanjalo akaboni ububi kwa‐Sirayeli: uyehova utixo wake unaye, indanduluko yokumkani ipakati kwabo." 
Numbers23:22 Utixo wabapumisa e‐Jipete; unamendu njengawenyati. 
Numbers23:23 Okunene akuko kunyanga ngakwa‐Yakobi, akuko nokulaula ngakwa‐Sirayeli; kwa ngoku kuya kuxelwa ngo‐Yakobi, nango‐Sirayeli, into ayenzileyo utixo." 
Numbers23:24 Bona ke, abantu baya kusuka njengengonyamakazi, bazipakamise njengengonyama: abayi kulala pantsi bengekadli into eqwengiweyo, negazi labahlatyiweyo bengaliselanga." 
Numbers23:25 Waza wati u‐Balaki ku‐Bilame: Ungake ubaqalekise, ungake ubatamsanqelise kanjalo." 
Numbers23:26 Koko wapendula u‐Bilame wati ku‐Balaki: Bendingakuxeleli na, ndisiti: Konke aya kuteta kona uyehova, ndiya kukwenza?" 
Numbers23:27 Wandula wati u‐Balaki ku‐Bilame: Kauze ke, ndokusa kwenye indawo; kungati kwoba kufanele emehlweni katixo lowo, ukuba undiqalekisele bona ulapo." 
Numbers23:28 Waza u‐Balaki wamsa u‐Bilame engcopo ye‐Pehori, ebeka ngasebugxwayibeni." 
Numbers23:29 Wayesiti u‐Bilame ku‐Balaki: Ndakele apa izibingelo zibe sixe̔nxe, undilungisele nalapa isixe̔nxe senkunzana zenkomo nesixe̔nxe senkunzi zegusha." 
Numbers23:30 Wenza u‐Balaki njengokuba ebetshilo u‐Bilame, wanikela inkunzana yenkomo nenkunzi yegusha ngesibingelo ngesibingelo." 
Numbers24:1 Kekaloku u‐Bilame, akubona ukuba kulungile emehlweni kayehova ukutamsanqela u‐Sirayeli, wabengayi njengakuwo amanye amaxesha ukufuna ngezinto zokunyanga, koko wabekisa ngasentlango ubuso bake." 
Numbers24:2 Waye u‐Bilame epakamisa amehlo ake, wabona o‐Sirayeli bemi ngezizwe zabo; wandul’ ukumhlela umoya katixo." 
Numbers24:3 Waza wapimisela umzekeliso wake, wati: Utsho u‐Bilame, unyana ka‐Behori; itsho indoda egatyuliwe amehlo;" 
Numbers24:4 utsho lowo ovileyo amazwi katixo, owabona umboniso wosomandla, esiwa pantsi, kanti etyiliwe amehlo, ukuti:" 
Numbers24:5 Hai ukuba ntle kwazo intente zako, Yakobi! n entlalo zako, Sirayeli!" 
Numbers24:6 Njengentili zitwabulukile, njengezitiya ngasemlanjeni, njengemiti emnandi ayityalileyo uyehova, njengemiti yesedare ngasemanzini." 
Numbers24:7 Kuya kwela amanzi emipandeni yake, nembewu yake yoba ngasemanzini amaninzi; ukumkani wake woba mkulu pezu kwo‐Hagagi, nobukumkani bake buya kupakanyiswa." 
Numbers24:8 Utixo wampumisa e‐Jipete; unamendu njengawenyati; uya kuzidla intlanga, intshaba zake, awanqabe amatambo azo, azityumze ngentolo zake." 
Numbers24:9 Watoba, wati butu njengengonyama, nanjengengonyamakazi; ngubanina oya kumvusa? okutamsanqelisayo uya kutanyusanqelwa, nokuqalekisayo uya kuqalekiswa." 
Numbers24:10 Yandula yavuta ingqumbo ka‐Balaki ngakuye u‐Bilame, wenza intlombe ngezandla; waye u‐Balaki esiti ku‐Bilame: Bendikubiza ukuba uziqalekise intshaba zam, kanti, bona ke, ugqibele ukuzitamsanqelisa lamaxesha omatatu." 
Numbers24:11 Ngako kaloku, sabela endaweni yako: bendite ndiya kukwenzela imbeko enkulu; kodwa, bona ke, uyehova ukunqandile embekweni." 
Numbers24:12 Waza u‐Bilame wati ku‐Balaki: Bendingateti na nakuzo izigidimi zako, owabuzituma ukuza kum, ndisiti:" 
Numbers24:13 Nakuba u‐Balaki abeya kundinika indlu yake izele yisilivere negolide, andingegqite elizwini likayehova, ukuba ndenze okulungileyo umhlaumbi okukohlakeleyo ngokweyam intliziyo; oko aya kukuteta uyehova, ndiya kuteta kwa kona?" 
Numbers24:14 Nakaloku, bona ke, ndiya ebantwini bam: yiza, ndokushumayeza oko abantu aba baya kukwenza kubantu bako emihleni yasemva." 
Numbers24:15 Waza wapimisela umzekeliso wake, wati: Utsho u‐Bilame, unyana ka‐Behori; itsho indoda egatyuliwe amehlo;" 
Numbers24:16 utsho lowo ovileyo amazwi katixo, owaziyo ukwaziwa kwopezu konke; owabona umboniso wosomandla, esiwa pantsi, kanti etyiliwe amehlo, ukuti:" 
Numbers24:17 Ndiya kumbona, kungengoku kodwa; ndiya kumkangela, kungekufupi kodwa: kuya kuvela inkwenkwezi kwa‐Yakobi, kwovuka intonga kwa‐Sirayeli; eya kuwatyumza amacala omabini ase‐Mowabi, ilucite lwonke usapo lwembutumbutu." 
Numbers24:18 Kanjalo u‐Edome woba yimfuyo; u‐Sehire naye woba yimfuyo yentshaba zake; kanti u‐Sirayeli uya kwenza ngobuṙoti. 
Numbers24:19 Waeya kuba nobukosi ovela kwa‐Yakobi, atshabalalise abaseleyo esixekweni." 
Numbers24:20 Nxa abebona u‐Amaleki, wandula wapimisela umzekeliso wake, wati: Usisiqalo sentlanga u‐Amaleki, kodwa ukupela kwake woda atshabalale." 
Numbers24:21 Nxa abebona ama‐Keni, wandula wapimisela umzekeliso wake, wati: Intlalo yako inqabile, nendlu yako uyibekile eweni." 
Numbers24:22 Noko ke um‐Keni uya kucitakaliswa, ade u‐Ashure akutimbe." 
Numbers24:23 Walekela wapimisela umzekeliso wake, wati: Au! ngubanina oya kubudla ubomi, nxa utixo aya kukwenza oku!" 
Numbers24:24 Inqanawa zovela ecaleni lama‐Kiti, zibandezele u‐Ashure, zibandezele no‐Hebere; naye yena woda atshabalale." 
Numbers24:25 Waza wesuka u‐Bilame, waya wabuyela endaweni yake; wemka no‐Balaki ngendlela yake." 
Numbers25:1 KEKALOKU o‐Sirayeli bebehleli e‐Shitime; bada abantu baqala ukwenza umbulo nentombi zama‐Mowabi. 
Numbers25:2 Zaza zamema abantu beze emibingweni yotixo bazo: basuka abantu badla, bazitoba pambi kwotixo bazo." 
Numbers25:3 Kwa njalo o‐Sirayeli bazibandakanya no‐Bali‐pehori: yaza yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngako‐Sirayeli. 
Numbers25:4 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Tabata bonke abazintloko zabantu, ubaxo̔me pambi kwoyehova ngaselangeni, ukuze kubuyiswe ubushushu bengqumbo kayehova ko‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers25:5 Waza u‐Mosesi wati kubagwebi bo‐Sirayeli: Maniti omnye ngomnye abulale amadoda ake azibandakanyileyo no‐Bali‐pehori. 
Numbers25:6 Kekaloku, bona ke, omnye waselusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli weza wamsondeza kubazalwana bake um‐Midiyanekazi, emehlweni ka‐Mosesi, nasemehlweni ayo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nxa bebelila bona emnyango wentente yentlangano." 
Numbers25:7 Wandula wati u‐Finehasi, unyana ka‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite, akubona oko, wesuka pakati kwentlanganiso, watabata umkonto esandleni sake," 
Numbers25:8 walandela indoda engum‐Sirayeli ententeni, wahlaba bobabini, indoda engum‐Sirayeli, nenkazana leyo esiswini sayo. Sada sanqamka isibulalo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers25:9 Abo ke ababefile ngesibulalo bebengamawaka angamashumi mabini enamane. 
Numbers25:10 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers25:11 u‐Finehasi, unyana ka‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite, ubuyisile umsindo wam elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ekubeni abenekwele ngekwele lam pakati kwalo, ukuba ndandingagqibelanga usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngekwele lam." 
Numbers25:12 Yiti ngoko: Bona ke, ndimnika ucebano lwam lwoxolo:" 
Numbers25:13 lwobako kuye, nakwinzalo yake emva kwake, ucebano lwobuperisite obungunapakade; ngokokuba ebenekwele ngenxa yotixo wake, nokuba wenzela usapo luka‐Sirayeli uxoliso." 
Numbers25:14 Kekaloku igama lendoda engum‐Sirayeli ebuleweyo, eyabibulawa naye um‐Midiyanekazi, lingu‐Zimri, unyana ka‐Salu, inkosi yendlu yoyise pakati kwama‐Simone." 
Numbers25:15 Negama lenkazana ebuleweyo, lom‐Midiyanekazi, lingu‐Kozibi, intombi ka‐Tsure, obeyintloko yabantu bendlu yoyise e‐Midiyane." 
Numbers25:16 Wabuva wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, wati:" 
Numbers25:17 Wapate ama‐Midiyane ngobutshaba, uwabete:" 
Numbers25:18 ngokuba wona enzile ngobutshaba kuni ngamaqokolo awo, aniqokoleleyo ngawo emcimbini ka‐Pehori, nasemcimbini ka‐Kozibi, intombi yenkosi yase‐Midiyane, udade wawo, ebibulawa emhleni wesibulalo, pezu kwomcimbi ka‐Pehori." 
Numbers26:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwesibulalo eso, watsho uyehova ku‐Mosesi, naku‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite, esiti:" 
Numbers26:2 Tabatani inani layo yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, elabaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, bonke abapumayo nomkosi kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers26:3 Baza u‐Mosesi no‐Elezari umperisite bateta nabo ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, ngase‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko, besiti:" 
Numbers26:4 Tabatani inani labaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo; njengokuba uyehova ebeyalele u‐Mosesi, nosapo luka‐Sirayeli olwapumayo ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Numbers26:5 U‐Rubene, owamazibulo ka‐Sirayeli: onyana baka‐Rubene: k u‐Hanoki kwavela isizalwane sama‐Hanoki; ku‐Palu, isizalwane sama‐Palu;" 
Numbers26:6 ku‐Hetserone, isizalwane sama‐Hetserone; ku‐Kami, isizalwane sama‐Kami." 
Numbers26:7 Zezi izizalwane zama‐Rubene: nabalweyo awo ebengamawaka angamashumi mane enamatatu, anamakulu asixe̔nxe, anamashumi matatu." 
Numbers26:8 Nonyana baka‐Palu; ngu‐Eliyabe. 
Numbers26:9 Nonyana baka‐Eliyabe; ngu‐Nemuweli, no‐Datane, no‐Abirame, Ngulo‐Datane no‐Abirame, abadumileyo entlanganisweni, abebepika no‐Mosesi no‐Arone embutweni ka‐Kora, bakupika noyehova;" 
Numbers26:10 wada umhlaba wavula umlomo wawo, wabaginya bona no‐Kora, kwakububa imbuto leyo, okuya umlilo wadlayo amadoda angamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu, aza aba ngumqondiso." 
Numbers26:11 Kodwa onyana baka‐Kora bebengafi bona. 
Numbers26:12 Onyana baka‐Simone, ngezizalwane zabo: ku‐Nemuweli kwavela isizalwane sama‐Nemuweli; ku‐Yamine, isizalwane sama‐Yamine; ku‐Yakine, isizalwane sama‐Yakine;" 
Numbers26:13 ku‐Zera, isizalwane sama‐Zera; ku‐Saule, isizalwane sama‐Saule." 
Numbers26:14 Zezi izizalwane zama‐Simone: engamawaka angamashumi mabini enamabini, anamakulu mabini." 
Numbers26:15 Onyana baka‐Gadi, ngezizalwane zabo: ku‐Tsefone kwavela isizalwane sama‐Tsefone; ku‐Hagi, isizalwane sama‐Hagi; ku‐Shuni, isizalwane sama‐Shuni;" 
Numbers26:16 ku‐Ozeni, isizalwane sama‐Ozeni; ku‐Heri, isizalwane sama‐Heri;" 
Numbers26:17 ku‐Arodi, isizalwane sama‐Arodi; ku‐Areli, isizalwane sama‐Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Zezi izizalwane zama‐Gadi, ngabalweyo awo: engamawaka angamashumi mane, anamakulu mahlanu." 
Numbers26:19 Onyana baka‐Juda bebengu‐Here no‐Onane; kodwa babuba u‐Here no‐Onane elizweni le‐Kauane. 
Numbers26:20 Baye onyana baka‐Juda ngezizalwane zabo be ngaba: ku‐Shela kwavela isizalwane sama‐Shela; ku‐Faretse, isizalwane sama‐Faretse; ku‐Zera, isizalwane sama‐Zera." 
Numbers26:21 Nonyana baka‐Faretse bebe ngaba: ku‐Hetserone kwavela isizalwane sama‐Hetserone; ku‐Hamule, isizalwane sama‐Hamule." 
Numbers26:22 Zezi izizalwane zika‐Juda, ngababalweyo babo: bengamawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe enamatandatu, anamakulu mahlanu." 
Numbers26:23 Onyana baka‐Yisakare, ngezizalwane zabo: k u‐Tola kwavela isizalwane sama‐Tola: ku‐Puwa, isizalwane sama‐Puwa:" 
Numbers26:24 ku‐Yashube, isizalwane sama‐Yashube; ku‐Shimrone, isizalwane sama‐Shimrone." 
Numbers26:25 Zezi izizalwane zika‐Yisakare, ngababalweyo babo: bengamawaka angamashumi matandatu enamane, anamakulu matatu." 
Numbers26:26 Onyana baka‐Zebulone, ngezizalwane zabo: ku‐Serede kwavela isizalwane sama‐Serede; ku‐Eloni, isizalwane sama‐Eloni; ku‐Yaheleli, isizalwane sama‐Yaheleli." 
Numbers26:27 Zezi izizalwane zama‐Zebulone, ngabalweyo awo: engamawaka angamashumi matandatu, anamakulu mahlanu." 
Numbers26:28 Onyana baka‐Josefe, ngezizalwane zabo, bebengu‐Manase no‐Frayime." 
Numbers26:29 Onyana baka‐Manase: ku‐Makire kwavela isizalwane sama‐Makire: wati u‐Makire wazala u‐Gileyadi: ku‐Gileyadi kwavela isizalwane sama‐Gileyadi. 
Numbers26:30 Ngaba onyana baka‐Gileyadi: k u‐Yihezere kwavela isizalwane sama‐Yihezere; ku‐Heleki, isizalwane sama‐Heleki;" 
Numbers26:31 na k u‐Asiriyeli, isizalwane sama‐Asiriyeli; na k u‐Shekeme, isizalwane sama‐Shekeme;" 
Numbers26:32 na k u‐Shemida, isizalwane sama‐Shemida; na k u‐Hefere, isizalwane sama‐Hefere" 
Numbers26:33 Kodwa u‐Tselofehadi, unyana ka‐Hefere, ebengenabo onyana, wanentombi kupela; namagama entombi zika‐Tselofehadi, ngu‐Mahala, no‐Noha, n o‐Hogela, n o‐Mileka, no‐Tiretsa." 
Numbers26:34 Zezi izizalwane zika‐Manase: nababalweyo babo bebengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enamabini, anamakulu asixe̔nxe." 
Numbers26:35 Ngaba onyana baka‐Frayime, ngezizalwane zabo: ku‐Shutela kwavela isizalwane sama‐Shutela; ku‐Bekere, isizalwane sama‐Bekere; ku‐Tahane, isizalwane sama‐Tahane." 
Numbers26:36 Ngaba nonyana baka‐Shutela: ku‐Herani kwavela isizalwane sama‐Herani. 
Numbers26:37 Zezi izizalwane zonyana baka‐Frayime, ngababalweyo babo: bengamawaka angamashumi matatu enamabini, anamakulu mahlanu. Ngaba onyana baka‐Josefe, ngezizalwane zabo." 
Numbers26:38 Onyana baka‐Benjamine, ngezizalwane zabo: ku‐Bela kwavela isizalwane sama‐Bela; ku‐Ashebele, isizalwane sama‐Ashebele; ku‐Ahirame, isizalwane sama‐Ahirame;" 
Numbers26:39 ku‐Shufame, isizalwane sama‐Shufame; ku‐Hufame, isizalwane sama‐Hufame." 
Numbers26:40 Nonyana baka‐Bela bebengu‐Aredi no‐Nahamane: ku‐Aredi kwavela isizalwane sama‐Aredi; ku‐Nahamane, isizalwane sama‐Nahamane." 
Numbers26:41 Ngaba onyana baka‐Benjamine, ngezizalwane zabo: nababalweyo babo bebengamawaka angamashumi mane enamahlanu, anamakulu matandatu." 
Numbers26:42 Ngaba onyana baka‐Dane, ngezizalwane zabo: ku‐Shuhame kwavela isizalwane sama‐Shuhame. Zezi izizalwane zika‐Dane, ngezizalwane zabo." 
Numbers26:43 Zonke izizalwane zama‐Shuhame, ngabalweyo awo, ebengamawaka angamashumi matandatu enamane, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers26:44 Onyana baka‐Ashere, ngezizalwane zabo: ku‐Yimna kwavela isizalwane sama‐Yimna; ku‐Yishevi, isizalwane sama‐Yishevi; ku‐Beriha, isizalwane sama‐Beriha:" 
Numbers26:45 konyana baka‐Beriha; ku‐Kebere kwavela isizalwane sama‐Kebere; ku‐Makiyeli, isizalwane sama‐Makiyeli." 
Numbers26:46 Negama lentombi ka‐Ashere lalingu‐Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Zezi izizalwane zonyana baka‐Ashere, ngababalweyo babo: bengamawaka angamashumi mahlanu enamatatu, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers26:48 Onyana baka‐Nefatali, ngezizalwane zabo: ku‐Yatsiyeli kwavela isizalwane sama‐Yatsiyeli; ku‐Guni, isizalwane sama‐Guni;" 
Numbers26:49 ku‐Yetsere, isizalwane sama‐Yetsere; ku‐Shileme, isizalwane sama‐Shileme." 
Numbers26:50 Zezi izizalwane zika‐Nefatali, ngezizalwane zabo: nababalweyo babo bebengamawaka angamashumi mane enamahlanu, anamakulu mane." 
Numbers26:51 Ngaba ababalweyo bosapo luka‐Sirayeli: bengamawaka angamakulu matandatu enewaka linye ngapandle, anamakulu asixe̔nxe, anamashumi matatu." 
Numbers26:52 Waza uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers26:53 Kubo aba ilizwe liya kwabiwa libe lilifa, ngombalo wamagama." 
Numbers26:54 Abo baninzi uya kubandisela ilifa labo, nabo bancinane uya kubancipisela ilifa labo; ngento elingana nababalweyo babo baya kunikwa ilifa labo abanye ngabanye." 
Numbers26:55 Kodwa ilizwe liya kwabiwa ngeqashiso noko; ngamagama ezizwe zoyise babo baya kulidla ilifa. 
Numbers26:56 Njengokuti kweqashiso kuya kwabiwa ilifa lalo, pakati kwabaninzi nabancinane." 
Numbers26:57 Ngaba nababalweyo babo aba‐Levi, ngezizalwane zabo: ku‐Gereshone kwavela isizalwane sama‐Gereshone; ku‐Kohati, isizalwane sama‐Kohati; ku‐Merari, isizalwane sama‐Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Zizo ezi izizalwane zaba‐Levi: isizalwane sama‐Libeni, isizalwane sama‐Hebrone, isizalwane sama‐Mahali, isizalwane sama‐Mushi, isizalwane sama‐Kora. Wati u‐Kohati wazala u‐Hamerame." 
Numbers26:59 Nomfazi ka‐Hamerame igama lake lalingu‐Yokebedi, intombi ka‐Levi, owati unina wamzalela u‐Levi e‐Jipete; waye yena ezalela u‐Hamerame u‐Arone no‐Mosesi, no‐Miriyame udade wabo." 
Numbers26:60 No‐Arone kwazalelwa yena u‐Nadabi no‐Abihu, u‐Elezari no‐Yitamare." 
Numbers26:61 Kodwa babuba u‐Nadabi no‐Abihu, bakunikela umlilo wasemzini pambi kwoyehova." 
Numbers26:62 Baye ababalweyo babo bengamawaka angamashumi mabini enamatatu, bengawo onke amadoda abudala buyinyanga nye nobupezulu: ngokuba bona bebengabalwa pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngenxa yokuba bebenganikwa lifa pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers26:63 Aba bangabo babalwayo ngu‐Mosesi no‐Elezari umperisite, ababala usapo luka‐Sirayeli ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, ngase‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Kodwa pakati kwabo aba, bekungeko namnye wababebalwa ngu‐Mosesi no‐Arone umperisite, okuya babebala usapo luka‐Sirayeli entlango ye‐Sinai." 
Numbers26:65 Ngokuba uyehova ebete ngabo: Baya kufa ngenyaniso entlango. Kwada akwabiko oseleyo kubo namnye, kupela ngu‐Kalebi, unyana ka‐Jefune, no‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune." 
Numbers27:1 KWANDULA kwasondela intombi zika‐Tselofehadi, unyana ka‐Hefere, unyana ka‐Gileyadi, unyana ka‐Makire, unyana ka‐Manase, kuzo izizalwane zika‐Manase, unyana ka‐Josefe: namagama entombi zake ngawo la: ngu‐Mahala, n o‐Noha, no‐Hogela, no‐Mileka, no‐Tiretsa." 
Numbers27:2 Zaza zema ebusweni buka‐Mosesi, nasebusweni buka‐Elezari umperisite, nasebusweni bazo inkosi nayo yonke intlanganiso, ngasemnyango wentente yentlangano, zisiti:" 
Numbers27:3 Ubawo wafela entlango, waye yena engeko pakati kwembuto yabo ababezihlanganisela ngakuye uyehova embutweni ka‐Kora; kodwa wafa ngesake isono, engabanga nabo onyana ke." 
Numbers27:4 Kunganina ukuba kususwe igama lobawo pakati kwesizalwane sake, ngokuba kungeko kuye unyana? Sinike imfuyo pakati kwabazalwana bobawo wetu." 
Numbers27:5 Waye u‐Mosesi wasondeza ityala lazo pambi kwoyehova. 
Numbers27:6 Waza wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers27:7 Intombi zika‐Tselofehadi zilungisile ukuteta: uya kuzinika ngenyaniso imfuyo yelifa pakati kwabazalwana boyise wazo; wanya kwenza ilifa loyise lidlulele kuzo. 
Numbers27:8 Nakulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli uya kuteta, usiti: Nxa kufayo umntu, engenaye unyana, niya kulenza ilifa lake lidlulele kwintombi yake." 
Numbers27:9 Naxeshekweni angenayo intombi, niya kunika ilifa lake kubaninawe bake." 
Numbers27:10 Kodwa ukuba akanabo abaninawe, niya kunika ilifa lake kubaninawe boyise." 
Numbers27:11 Ukuba kanjalo uyise akanabaninawe, niya kunika ilifa lake kumlamane wake okufupi kuye pakati kwesizalwane sake, oya kudla lona. Oku kwoba ngummiselwa wesiko elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalela u‐Mosesi." 
Numbers27:12 WANDULA wati uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Nyukela kulentaba ye‐Habarime, uze ubone elozwe ndilinikileyo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers27:13 Nxa ulibonileyo, uya kwandula ubutelwe ebantwini bako nawe, njengokuba ebebutelwa u‐Arone umkuluwe wako:" 
Numbers27:14 ngokokuba nibe nivukela ilizwi lam entlango ye‐Tsine, ekupikeni kwentlanganiso, ukundingcwalisa ngasemanzini pambi kwamehlo abo. Lawo ngamanzi e‐Meriba yase‐Kadeshe entlango ye‐Tsine." 
Numbers27:15 Waza u‐Mosesi wateta kuyehova, esiti:" 
Numbers27:16 Makati uyehova, utixo wemimoya yoluntu lwonke, ongamise indoda pezu kwalentlanganiso," 
Numbers27:17 eya kupuma pambi kwabo, neya kungena pambi kwabo, eya kubapumisa kanjalo, neya kubangenisa; ukuze intlanganiso kayehova ingabi njengegusha ezingenamalusi." 
Numbers27:18 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Tabatela kuwe u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, indoda ekukuyo umoya, ulalise isandla sako pezu kwake;" 
Numbers27:19 uze ummise ebusweni buka‐Elezari umperisite, nasebusweni bayo yonke intlanganiso: umyalezele kwa semehlweni abo." 
Numbers27:20 Wauya kubeka kubungangamsha bako pezu kwake, ukuze beve ke, kwa yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers27:21 Waeya kuma pambi kwo‐Elezari umperisite, oya kumbuzela ngokugweba kwe‐Urime ebusweni bukayehova: ngelizwi lake baya kupuma, nangelizwi lake baya kungena, yena, nalo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli kunye naye, kwa yonke intlanganiso." 
Numbers27:22 Wenza u‐Mosesi njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele: wayetabata u‐Yoshuwa, wammisa ebusweni buka‐Elezari umperisite, nasebusweni bayo yonke intlanganiso;" 
Numbers27:23 waza walalisa izandla zake pezu kwake, wamyalezela; njengokuba uyehova ebetetile ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Numbers28:1 WABUYA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers28:2 Yalela usapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Umnikelo wam, ukutya kwam kweminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo, ivumba elimnandi lam, niya kulumka ukuba niwunikele kum ngexesha lawo elimiselweyo." 
Numbers28:3 Wauya kuti kulo: Nguwo lo umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo eniya kuwunikela kuyehova: zimbini imvana zomnyaka mnye ezimsulwa imini ngemini, libe lidini lokutshiswa elifuti." 
Numbers28:4 Enye imvana uya kuyinikela kwakusa, neyesibini imvana uya kuyinikela pakati kwokuhlwa;" 
Numbers28:5 kwa neseshumi isiqingata seyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, unyeliwe ngeoli enqushelweyo esesesine isiqingata sehine:" 
Numbers28:6 lidini lokutshiswa elifuti, elibe lidalelwa entabeni ye‐Sinai libe livumba elimnandi, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Numbers28:7 Nomnikelo wokusela wawo wona woba sesesine isiqingata sehine kwenye imvana: kweyingcwele indawo uya kutululela umnikelo woselo olunamandla kuyehova. 
Numbers28:8 Neyesibini imvana woyinikela pakati kwokuhlwa: njengomnikelo wokudla wokusa, nanjengomnikelo wokusela wawo, uya kunikela yona, ibe ngumnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova." 
Numbers28:9 Nangemini yesabata niya kunikela zibe mbini imvana zomnyaka mnye ezimsulwa, nezibini ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, unyeliwe ngeoli, nomnikelo wokusela wawo:" 
Numbers28:10 lidini lokutshiswa lesabata ngesabata eli, ngapezu kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, nomnikelo wokusela walo." 
Numbers28:11 Nasekutwaseni kwenyanga zenu niya kunikela idini lokutshiswa kuyehova: inkunzana zenkomo zibe mbini, nenkunzi yegusha ibe nye, n emvana zomnyaka mnye zibe sixe̔nxe, ezimsulwa;" 
Numbers28:12 nezitatu ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, unyeliwe ngeoli, kwinkunzana inye; nezibini ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, unyeliwe ngeoli, kwinkunzi yegusha inye;" 
Numbers28:13 neseshumi isiqingata seyefa yomgubo ocolekileyo, ube ngumnikelo wokudla, unyeliwe ngeoli, kwimvana ngemvana: lidini lokutshiswa libe livumba elimnandi, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Numbers28:14 Neminikelo yokusela yazo yoba sisiqingata sehine yeveyine kuyo inkunzana, nesesitatu isiqingata sehine kuyo inkunzi yegusha, nesesine isiqingata sehine kuyo imvana: leli idini lokutshiswa lenyanga ngenyanga pakati kwazo inyanga zomnyaka." 
Numbers28:15 Kanjako itakane lebokwe linye, libe lidini lesono kuyehova, ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, lonikelwa, kwa nomnikelo wokusela walo." 
Numbers28:16 Nangenyanga yokuqala, ngoweshumi linesine umhla wenyanga, yipasika kuyehova." 
Numbers28:17 Nangoweshumi linesihlanu umhla wenyanga leyo, ngumtendeleko: yimihla esixe̔nxe izonka ezingenagwele ziya kutyiwa." 
Numbers28:18 Ngomhla wokuqala kwoba yintlanganisano engcwele; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo: 
Numbers28:19 koko niya kunikela umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, libe lidini lokutshiswa, kuyehova: inkunzana zenkomo zibe mbini, nenkunzi yegusha ibe nye, nemvana zomnyaka mnye zibe sixe̔nxe: zezimsulwa eniya kuba nazo:" 
Numbers28:20 nomnikelo wokudla wazo wona woba ngowomgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli: zezitatu ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kuyo inkunzana, nezibini ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kuyo inkunzi yegusha, eniya kuzinikela;" 
Numbers28:21 n eseshumi isiqingata seyefa wosinikela sibe kwimvana ngemvana, kwezisixe̔nxe imvana ezinye ngezinye:" 
Numbers28:22 nebokwe ibe nye, ibe lidini lesono, nize nenzelwe uxoliso." 
Numbers28:23 Ezizinto niya kuzinikela ngapandle kwedini lokutshiswa lokusa, elileledini lokutshiswa elifuti." 
Numbers28:24 Kungokunjalo niya kunikela ngemini ngemini, imihla yosixe̔nxe, ukutya kwomnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova: ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa wonikelwa wona, kwa nomnikelo wokusela wawo." 
Numbers28:25 Nangomhla wesixe̔nxe noba nentlanganisano engcwele; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo. 
Numbers28:26 Kanjalo ngomhla welibo, nxa nisondezayo umnikelo wokudla omtsha kuyehova, emva kweveki zenu, noba nentlanganisano engcwele; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo:" 
Numbers28:27 koko niya kunikela idini lokutshiswa libe livumba elimnandi kuyehova: inkunzana zenkomo zibe mbini, nenkunzi yegusha ibe nye, n emvana zomnyaka mnye zibe sixe̔nxe:" 
Numbers28:28 nomnikelo wokudla wazo womgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli: ezitatu ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kwinkunzana inye, ezibini ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kwinkunzi yegusha inye;" 
Numbers28:29 n eseshumi isiqingata seyefa kwimvana ngemvana, kwezisixe̔nxe imvana ezinye ngezinye:" 
Numbers28:30 n etakane lobokwe libe linye, nize nenzelwe uxoliso." 
Numbers28:31 Ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, nomnikelo wokudla walo, niya kuzinikela, (zezimsulwa eniya kuba nazo,) kwa neminikelo yokusela yazo." 
Numbers29:1 Nangenyanga yesixe̔nxe, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, noba nentlanganisano engcwele; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo: woba ngumhla wokuhlokoma kwamaxilongo kuni." 
Numbers29:2 Naniya kulenza idini lokutshiswa libe livumba elimnandi kuyehova: inkunzana yenkomo ibe nye, inkunzi yegusha ibe nye, n emvana zomnyaka mnye zibe sixe̔nxe, ezimsulwa:" 
Numbers29:3 nomnikelo wokudla wazo womgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli: ezitatu ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kuyo inkunzana, ezibini ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kuyo inkunzi yegusha;" 
Numbers29:4 neseshumi isiqingata seyefa kwimvana ngemvana, kwezisixe̔nxe imvana ezinye ngezinye:" 
Numbers29:5 netakane lebokwe libe linye, eledini lesono, nize nenzelwe uxoliso:" 
Numbers29:6 ngapandle kwedini lokutshiswa lenyanga etwasileyo, nomnikelo wokudla walo, nedini lokutshiswa elifuti, nomnikelo wokudla walo, neminikelo yokusela yawo, njengesiko lawo, libe livumba elimnandi, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo kuyehova." 
Numbers29:7 Nangoweshumi umhla walenyanga yesixe̔nxe noba nentlanganisano engcwele; naniya kubandezela imipefumlo yenu; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo: 
Numbers29:8 koko niya kunikela idini lokutshiswa kuyehova, libe livumba elimnandi: inkunzana yenkomo ibe nye, inkunzi yegusha ibe nye, n emvana zomnyaka mnye zibe sixe̔nxe: zezimsulwa eniya kuba nazo:" 
Numbers29:9 nomnikelo wokudla wazo womgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli: ezitatu ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kuyo inkunzana, ezibini ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kwinkunzi yegusha inye;" 
Numbers29:10 n eseshumi isiqingata seyefa kwimvana ngemvana, kwezisixe̔nxe imvana ezinye ngezinye:" 
Numbers29:11 n etakane lebokwe libe linye, eledini lesono: ngapandle kwedini lesono lokuxolisa, nedini lokutshiswa elifuti, nomnikelo wokudla walo, neminikelo yokusela yawo." 
Numbers29:12 Nangoweshumi linesihlanu umhla wenyanga yesixe̔nxe noba nentlanganisano engcwele; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo: koko niya kubamba umtendeleko kuyehova isixe̔nxe semihla: 
Numbers29:13 naniya kunikela idini lokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, ivumba elimnandi kuyehova: inkunzana zenkomo zibe lishumi linantatu, inkunzi zegusha zibe mbini, imvana zomnyaka mnye zibe lishumi elinane: zoba zezimsulwa:" 
Numbers29:14 nomnikelo wokudla wazo womgubo ocolekileyo unyeliwe ngeoli: ezitatu ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kwinkunzana nye, kwezilishumi linantatu inkunzana ezinye ngezinye; ezibini ezeshumi iziqingata zeyefa kwinkunzi nye yegusha, kwezimbini inkunzi zegusha ezinye ngezinye;" 
Numbers29:15 neseshumi isiqingata seyefa kwimvana nye, kwezilishumi linane imvana ezinye ngezinye:" 
Numbers29:16 netakane lebokwe libe linye, eledini lesono: ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, n omnikelo wokudla walo, nowokusela walo." 
Numbers29:17 Nangomhla wesibini nonikela inkunzana zenkomo zibe lishumi linambini, inkunzi zegusha zibe mbini, imvana zomnyaka mnye zibe lishumi elinane, ezimsulwa;" 
Numbers29:18 nomnikelo wokudla wazo, neminikelo yokusela yazo, eyenkunzana, eyenkunzi zegusha, neyemvana, ngenani lazo, njengesiko:" 
Numbers29:19 netakane lebokwe libe linye, eledini lesono: ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, nomnikelo wokudla walo, neminikelo yokusela yazo." 
Numbers29:20 Nangomhla wesitatu nonikela inkunzana zenkomo zibe lishumi linanye, inkunzi zegusha zibe mbini, imvana zomnyaka mnye zibe lishumi elinane, ezimsulwa;" 
Numbers29:21 nomnikelo wokudla wazo, neminikelo yokusela yazo, eyenkunzana, eyenkunzi zegusha, neyemvana, ngenani lazo, njengesiko;" 
Numbers29:22 nebokwe yedini lesono ibe nye: ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, nomnikelo wokudla walo, nowokusela walo." 
Numbers29:23 Nangomhla wesine nonikela inkunzana zenkomo zibe lishumi, inkunzi zegusha zibe mbini, imvana zomnyaka mnye zibe lishumi elinane, ezimsulwa;" 
Numbers29:24 n omnikelo wokudla wazo, neminikelo yokusela yazo, eyenkunzana, eyenkunzi zegusha, neyemvana, ngenani lazo, njengesiko;" 
Numbers29:25 netakane lebokwe libe linye, eledini lesono: ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, n omnikelo wokudla walo, nowokusela walo." 
Numbers29:26 Nangomhla wesihlanu nonikela inkunzana zenkomo zibe litoba, inkunzi zegusha zibe mbini, imvana zomnyaka mnye zibe lishumi elinane, ezimsulwa;" 
Numbers29:27 nomnikelo wokudla wazo, neminikelo yokusela yazo, eyenkunzana, eyenkunzi zegusha, neyemvana, ngenani lazo, njengesiko;" 
Numbers29:28 nebokwe yedini lesono ibe nye: ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, nomnikelo wokudla walo, nowokusela walo." 
Numbers29:29 Nangomhla wesitandatu nonikela inkunzana zenkomo zibe sibozo, inkunzi zegusha zibe mbini, imvana zomnyaka mnye zibe lishumi elinane, ezimsulwa;" 
Numbers29:30 nomnikelo wokudla wazo, neminikelo yokusela yazo, eyenkunzana, eyenkunzi zegusha, neyemvana, ngenani lazo, njengesiko;" 
Numbers29:31 nebokwe yedini lesono ibe nye: ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, n omnikelo wokudla walo, nowokusela walo." 
Numbers29:32 Nangomhla wesixe̔nxe nonikela inkunzana zenkomo zibe sixe̔nxe, inkunzi zegusha zibe mbini, imvana zomnyaka mnye zibe lishumi elinane, ezimsulwa;" 
Numbers29:33 nomnikelo wokudla wazo, neminikelo yokusela yazo, eyenkunzana, eyenkunzi zegusha, neyemvana, ngenani lazo, njengesiko;" 
Numbers29:34 nebokwe yedini lesono ibe nye: ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, n omnikelo wokudla walo, nowokusela walo." 
Numbers29:35 Ngowesibozo umhla noba nentlanganiso enkulu; aniyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi wenkonzo: 
Numbers29:36 koko niya kunikela idini lokutshiswa, umnikelo owenziwa ngomlilo, wevumba elimnandi kuyehova: inkunzana yenkomo ibe nye, inkunzi yegusha ibe nye, imvana zomnyaka mnye zibe sixe̔nxe, ezimsulwa;" 
Numbers29:37 n omnikelo wokudla wazo, neminikelo yokusela yazo, eyenkunzana, eyenkunzi yegusha, neyemvana, ngenani lazo, njengesiko;" 
Numbers29:38 nebokwe yedini lesono ibe nye: ngapandle kwelifuti idini lokutshiswa, nomnikelo wokudla walo, nowokusela walo." 
Numbers29:39 Ezizinto niya kuzinikela kuyehova ngemitendeleko yenu emiselweyo, ngapandle kwezibambiso zenu, neminikelo yesisa yenu, ngenxa yamadini okutshiswa enu, nangenxa yeminikelo yokudla yenu, nangenxa yeminikelo yokusela yenu, nangenxa yeminikelo yoxolo yenu." 
Numbers29:40 Waxela ke u‐Mosesi elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, njengako konke uyehova abemyalele u‐Mosesi ngako." 
Numbers30:1 WAZA wateta u‐Mosesi kwabazintloko zezizwe ngalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, esiti: Nantsi indawo ayiyaleleyo uyehova." 
Numbers30:2 Xeshekweni indoda iya kubambisa ngesibambiso kuyehova, umhlaumbi iya kufunga ngesifungo sokunxiba umpefumlo wayo ngesinxibo, ilizwi layo ayiyi kulitshitshisa; njengako konke okupumileyo emlonyeni wayo, iya kwenje njalo." 
Numbers30:3 Nenkazana xeshekweni iya kubambisa ngesibambiso kuyehova, azinxibe ngesinxibo, isendlwini kayise ebutsheni bayo;" 
Numbers30:4 ati uyise eve isibambiso sayo, nesinxibo sayo iwunxibileyo umpefumlo wayo ngaso, aze ati cwaka uyise ngakuyo; ziya kwandul’ ukuma zonke izibambiso zayo, nazo zonke izinxibo iwunxibileyo umpefumlo wayo ngazo ziya kuma." 
Numbers30:5 Kodwa ukuba uyise walela yona emhleni wokuva kwake, zonke izibambiso zayo, nezinxibo zayo iwunxibileyo umpefumlo wayo ngazo, aziyi kuma; kodwa uyehova woyixolela, ngokuba uyise eyalele." 
Numbers30:6 Kanjalo ukuba ibika yanayo indoda, nxa izibambiso zayo zibe zipezu kwayo, umhlaumbi ukupimisela kwomlomo wayo, iwunxibileyo umpefumlo wayo ngako;" 
Numbers30:7 yaza yeva indoda yayo, kanti emhleni wokuva kwayo yati cwaka ngakuyo; ziya kwandul’ ukuma izibambiso zayo, nezinxibo zayo iwunxibileyo umpefumlo wayo ngazo ziya kuma." 
Numbers30:8 Kodwa ukuba emhleni wokuva kwayo indoda yayo yalela yona, iya kwandula itshabalalise isibambiso sayo esibe sipezu kwayo, nokupimisela kwomlomo wayo, iwunxibileyo umpefumlo wayo ngako; ati uyehova ayixolele." 
Numbers30:9 Kanjako isibambiso somhlolokazi, umhlaumbi solahliweyo, konke awunxibileyo umpefumlo wake ngako kuya kuma ngakuye." 
Numbers30:10 Ukuba wabambisa endlwini yendoda yake, umhlaumbi wanxiba umpefumlo wake ngesinxibo ngokufunga;" 
Numbers30:11 yaza yeva indoda yake, kanti yona yati cwaka ngakuye, ingamalelanga; ziya kwandul’ ukuma zonke izibambiso zake, nazo zonke izinxibo zake awunxibileyo umpefumlo wake ngazo ziya kuma." 
Numbers30:12 Kodwa ukuba indoda yake yagqibela ukuzitshabalalisa emhleni wokuva kwayo, konke okupumileyo emlonyeni wake ngezibambiso zake, nangokunxitywa kwompefumlo wake, akuyi kuma; indoda yake izitshabalalisile, waye uyehova eya kumxolela." 
Numbers30:13 Zonke izibambiso, nazo zonke izifungo zokunxiba, zokuba kubandezelwe umpefumlo, indoda yake ingazimisa, umhlaumbi indoda yake ingazitshabalalisa." 
Numbers30:14 Kodwa ukuba indoda yake iyagqibela ukuti cwaka ngakuye kwimihla ngemihla, iyandula imise zonke izibambiso zake, umhlaumbi zonke izinxibo zake, ezipezu kwake: imisile zona, ngokokuba yati cwaka ngakuye emhleni wokuva kwayo." 
Numbers30:15 Nokuba ika izitshabalalise emveni kwokuva kwayo, iya kwandula itwale inkohlakalo yake." 
Numbers30:16 Yiyo le imimiselo, ate uyehova wamyalela u‐Mosesi ngayo, pakati kwendoda nomfazi wayo, na pakati kwoyise nentombi yake, isebutsheni bayo endlwini kayise." 
Numbers31:1 WAYE uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers31:2 Pindezela impindezelo yosapo luka‐Sirayeli kuma‐Midiyane: woti kamva ubutelwe ebantwini bako. 
Numbers31:3 Waza u‐Mosesi wateta ebantwini, esiti: Manixo̔bele ukulwa inxenye kuni ningamadoda, aze aye ngakuwo ama‐Midiyane, enze impindezelo kayehova pezu kwama‐Midiyane." 
Numbers31:4 Iwaka ngesizwe ngesizwe, kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, niya kulituma ekulweni." 
Numbers31:5 Kwa njalo kwaketwa emawakeni akwa‐Sirayeli iwaka ngesizwe ngesizwe, amawaka alishumi linamabini exo̔bele ukulwa." 
Numbers31:6 Waza u‐Mosesi wawatuma, iwaka ngesizwe ngesizwe, ukuya ekulweni; wona, no‐Finehasi unyana ka‐Elezari umperisite, ukuya ekulweni, enempahla ezingcwele, kwa amaxilongo okwenza ivuso, esandleni sake." 
Numbers31:7 Asuka alwa nama‐Midiyane, njengokuba uyehova wabemyalela u‐Mosesi, abulala konke okubudoda." 
Numbers31:8 Nokumkani bama‐Midiyane ababulala kunye nabo babehlatyiwe ngawo, u‐Evi, no‐Rekeme, no‐Tsure, no‐Hure, no‐Reba, okumkani abahlanu bama‐Midiyane: no‐Bilame, unyana ka‐Behori, ambulala ngesiṙele." 
Numbers31:9 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwatimba abafazi bama‐Midiyane, nabantwana bawo; nazo zonke izilo zawo, nazo zonke inkomo zawo, nayo yonke indyebo yawo, lwazipanga." 
Numbers31:10 Kanjalo zonke izixeko zawo abehleli kuzo, nazo zonke ilali zawo, lwazitshisa ngomlilo." 
Numbers31:11 Lwaza lwatabata konke okupangiweyo, nawo onke amaxoba, awabantu nawezilo," 
Numbers31:12 lwandula lwazisa amatinjwa, namaxoba, nokupangiweyo, ku‐Mosesi, naku‐Elezari umperisite, nakuyo intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, emnqubeni, ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, angase‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Koko u‐Mosesi, no‐Elezari umperisite, nazo zonke inkosi zentlanganiso, bapuma ukuya kulukaulela ngapandle kwomnquba." 
Numbers31:14 Waza u‐Mosesi waqumbela abongama bempi, inkosi zamawaka nenkosi zamakulu, ababevelile ekulweni kwalomfazwe." 
Numbers31:15 Wayesiti kubo u‐Mosesi: Nibalondolozile behleli bonke abafazi yinina? 
Numbers31:16 Bona ke, aba baba lituba elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ngecebo lika‐Bilame, lokuvusa ubumenemene ngakuye uyehova emcimbini ka‐Pehori; kwaza kwabako esosibulalo pakati kwentlanganiso kayehova." 
Numbers31:17 Ngako kaloku bulalani konke okubudoda pakati kwabantwana, nabo bonke abafazi abayazileyo indoda ngokulala noyindoda babulaleni." 
Numbers31:18 Kodwa bonke abantwana ababunkazana, abangazanga ukulala noyindoda, zilondolozeleni bona behleli." 
Numbers31:19 Ize nina niti waca ngapandle kwomnquba imihla ibe sixe̔nxe: osukuba ebulele umntu, nosukuba ecukumisile ohlatyiweyo, manizihlambulule ngomhla wesitatu, nangomhla wesixe̔nxe, nina namatinjwa enu." 
Numbers31:20 Nazo zonke izivato, nazo zonke izinto zolusu, nawo onke amasetyenzwa oboya bebokwe, nazo zonke izinto zemiti, nizihlambulule." 
Numbers31:21 Waza u‐Elezari umperisite wati emadodeni omkosi abeyile kulomfazwe: Nguwo lo ummiselo womteto uyehova wamyalelayo u‐Mosesi: 
Numbers31:22 kupela igolide, nesilivere, n exina n esincete, n etine, nelode," 
Numbers31:23 zonke izinto ezingenekayo emlilweni, niya kuzidlulisa emlilweni, zize zibe zicokisekile; zaziya kuhlanjululwa ngamanzi okuhlanzekisa noko: kodwa konke okungangenekiyo emlilweni nokudlulisa emanzini." 
Numbers31:24 Kanjalo niya kuhlanza izivato zenu ngomhla wesixe̔nxe, nize nibe nicokisekile; naniya kuti kamva nibuye ningene emnqubeni." 
Numbers31:25 Wandula watsho uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers31:26 Tabata inani lamaxoba atinjiweyo, awabantu nawezilo; wena, no‐Elezari umperisite, nabo bazintloko zendlu zoyise zentlanganiso." 
Numbers31:27 Uze uqingatise amaxoba lawo, pakati kwabo ababesenza imfazwe, ababepumela ukulwa, napakati kwayo yonke intlanganiso." 
Numbers31:28 Wandule ur̔olele uyehova isitabataba emadodeni emfazwe abepumela ukulwa umpefumlo ube mnye emakulwini mahlanu; kubo abantu, nakuzo inkomo, nakuwo amaqwaṙashe, nakuzo igusha;" 
Numbers31:29 kuso isiqingata sawo wositabata, usinike ku‐Elezari umperisite sibe ngumnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa kayehova." 
Numbers31:30 Nakuso isiqingata sosapo luka‐Sirayeli wotabata isahlulo sibe sinye sicatshulwe emashumini mahlanu, kubo abantu, kuzo inkomo, kuwo amaqwaṙashe, nakuzo igusha, kuzo zonke izilo, uzinike kuba‐Levi, abagcinayo isigcinelo setabanakele kayehova." 
Numbers31:31 Baye besenza u‐Mosesi no‐Elezari umperisite, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Numbers31:32 Kekaloku amaxoba, isisalela sokupangiweyo, oko ababekupangile abantu bomkosi, ebezigusha ezingamawaka angamakulu matandatu, anamawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe, anamawaka mahlanu;" 
Numbers31:33 nenkomo ezingamawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe enamabini; 
Numbers31:34 namaqwaṙashe angamawaka angamashumi matandatu enalinye; 
Numbers31:35 nemipefumlo yabantu, kubo abafazi abebengazanga ukulala noyindoda, yonke imipefumlo ibingamawaka angamashumi matatu enamabini." 
Numbers31:36 Nesinye isiqingata, isabelwa sabo babepumele ukulwa, igusha zazizingamawaka angamakulu matatu, anamawaka angamashumi matatu enasixe̔nxe, anamakulu mahlanu, ukubalwa kwazo;" 
Numbers31:37 nesitabataba sikayehova kuzo igusha, zazingamakulu matandatu, anamashumi asixe̔nxe enantlanu." 
Numbers31:38 Inkomo zazingamawaka angamashumi matatu enamatandatu; nesitabataba sikayehova, zazingamashumi asixe̔nxe enambini." 
Numbers31:39 Amaqwaṙashe ebengamawaka angamashumi matatu, anamakulu mahlanu; nesitabataba sikayehova, ebengamashumi matandatu enesinye." 
Numbers31:40 Imipefumlo yabantu ibingamawaka alishumi linamatandatu; nesitabataba sikayehova, imipefumlo yabingamashumi matatu enamibini." 
Numbers31:41 Waza u‐Mosesi wanika isitabataba, umnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa kayehova, ku‐Elezari umperisite, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Numbers31:42 Nakuso isiqingata sosapo luka‐Sirayeli, abesahlule u‐Mosesi kwesamadoda abelwile:" 
Numbers31:43 (kekaloku esentlanganiso isiqingata sasizigusha ezingamawaka angamakulu matatu, anamawaka angamashumi matatu enasixe̔nxe, anamakulu mahlanu;" 
Numbers31:44 nenkomo ezingamawaka angamashumi matatu enamatandatu; 
Numbers31:45 namaqwaṙashe angamawaka angamashumi matatu, anamakulu mahlanu;" 
Numbers31:46 nemipefumlo yabantu engamawaka alishumi linamatandatu:) 
Numbers31:47 kwa kuso isiqingata sosapo luka‐Sirayeli, watabata u‐Mosesi isahlulo sasinye sicatshulwe emashumini mahlanu, kubo abantu nakuzo izilo, wazinika kuba‐Levi, abagcinayo isigcinelo setabanakele kayehova, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Numbers31:48 Baza basondela ku‐Mosesi abongama ababepezu kwamawaka omkosi, inkosi zamawaka, nenkosi zamakulu;" 
Numbers31:49 baye besiti ku‐Mosesi: Izicaka zako zitabatile inani lamadoda emfazwe apantsi kwezandla zetu, kekaloku akuko namnye kuti ongabonwayo." 
Numbers31:50 Ngako sizisele uyehova umnikelo, omnye ngomnye oko akuzuzileyo, impahla zegolide, iwatsha, nezacolo, imisesane, amacici, nezidanga, ukwenzela imipefumlo yetu uxoliso pambi kwoyehova." 
Numbers31:51 Baza u‐Mosesi no‐Elezari umperisite bamkela igolide leyo kubo, zonke impahla ezisetyenziweyo." 
Numbers31:52 Yonke igolide yomnikelo, ababewunikela kuyehova, ibizishekele ezingamawaka alishumi linamatandatu, anamakulu asixe̔nxe, anamashumi mahlanu, ivela kuzo inkosi zamawaka, nakuzo inkosi zamakulu." 
Numbers31:53 (Ngokuba amadoda omkosi ebezipangele amanye ngamanye.) 
Numbers31:54 Kwa njalo u‐Mosesi no‐Elezari umperisite bamkela igolide leyo kuzo inkosi zamawaka nezamakulu, bayingenisa ententeni yentlangano, ibe yinkumbuzo ngenxa yosapo luka‐Sirayeli ebusweni bukayehova." 
Numbers32:1 KEKALOKU usapo luka‐Rubene nosapo luka‐Gadi lwalunenkomo ezininzi, into eninzi kakulu: lwati lwakubona ilizwe lase‐Yahezere, nelizwe le‐Gileyadi, ukuba, bona ke, londawo iyindawo yenkomo;" 
Numbers32:2 lwandula lweza usapo luka‐Gadi nosapo luka‐Rubene, lwatsho ku‐Mosesi, naku‐Elezari umperisite, nakuzo inkosi zentlanganiso, ukuti:" 
Numbers32:3 i‐Hatarote, ne‐Dibone, ne‐Yahezere, ne‐Nimra, ne‐Heshebone, ne‐Elehale, ne‐Sebame, ne‐Nebo, ne‐Behoni;" 
Numbers32:4 elozwe owalibetayo uyehova pambi kwayo intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli, lilizwe lenkomo; kanjalo izicaka zako zinenkomo." 
Numbers32:5 Lwalekela lwati: Ukuba sifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, makunikwe elilizwe kwizicaka zako libe yimfuyo, uze ungasiwezi i‐Yoredane." 
Numbers32:6 Koko u‐Mosesi wati elusatsheni luka‐Gadi naselusatsheni luka‐Rubene: Kanene abazalwana benu boya emfazweni na, nihlale apa nina?" 
Numbers32:7 Yinina ukuba nindwebise intliziyo yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuze lungaweli ukuya kwelozwe uyehova ulupile lona?" 
Numbers32:8 Benje njalo ke oyihlo benu, okuya ndabasusayo e‐Kadeshe‐baneha ukuya kukangela ilizwe." 
Numbers32:9 Nxa bebenyukile kwada kwasentilini ye‐Shekole, balikangela elozwe, baza bandwebisa intliziyo yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuze lungayi kwelozwe abelupile lona uyehova." 
Numbers32:10 Yandula yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngomhla lowo, wayefunga ngokuti:" 
Numbers32:11 Ngenyaniso lamadoda abepuma e‐Jipete, aminyaka ingamashumi mabini napezulu ubudala bawo, akasayi kubona elozwe endifungile ngalo ku‐Abrahame, ku‐Yisake, naku‐Yakobi; ngokuba engakolisanga ukundilandela:" 
Numbers32:12 kupela ngu‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune um‐Kenazi, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune; ngokuba bekolisile bona ukulandela uyehova." 
Numbers32:13 Kwa njalo ingqumbo kayehova yavuta ngako‐Sirayeli, waza wabadungudelisa entlango iminyaka yamashumi mane, kwada kwagqityelwa sonke esosizukulwana esibe senzile okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova." 
Numbers32:14 Kekaloku nanku nina nivukile esikundleni soyihlo benu, isihlwele sabantu abonayo, ukuba kube kusandiswa ubushushu bengqumbo kayehova ngako‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers32:15 Xeshekweni nibuyayo emva kwake, uya kwandula apinde kanjako ukubasalisa entlango; naniya kutshabalalisa bonke abantu aba." 
Numbers32:16 Lwaza lwasondela kuye, lwati: Izibaya zegusha sozakela inkomo zetu, nezixeko sozak ela abantwana betu:" 
Numbers32:17 kodwa tina siya kukauleza ukuxo̔ba, siye pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, kude kube kokuya siluzisileyo endaweni yalo; kanti abantwana betu baya kuhlala ezixekweni ezinqatyisiweyo, ngenxa yabemi belizwe." 
Numbers32:18 Asiyi kubuyela ezindlwini zetu, lungekazamkelelanga usapo luka‐Sirayeli olunye ngolunye ilifa lalo." 
Numbers32:19 Ngokuba singayi kulamkela lifa tina ndawonye nalo pesheya kwe‐Yoredane, nangasele: ngokuba ilifa letu lize kuti nganeno kwe‐Yoredane ngasempumalanga." 
Numbers32:20 Wandula wati u‐Mosesi kulo: Ukuba niya kuyenza lento, — ukuba noya nixo̔bile pambi kwoyehova emfazweni," 
Numbers32:21 bati bonke abaxo̔bileyo pakati kwenu bawele i‐Yoredane pambi kwoyehova, ade agqogqe intshaba zake pambi kwake," 
Numbers32:22 liti nelizwe leyiswe pambi kwoyehova: noti kamva nibuye ke, nibe ningenatyala ebusweni bukayehova nasebusweni bo‐Sirayeli; nelilizwe lona loba yimfuyo kuni ebusweni bukayehova." 
Numbers32:23 Kanti ukuba aniyi kwenje njalo, bona ke, nonile ngakuye uyehova: kodwa yazini isono senu ukuba sonifumana." 
Numbers32:24 Zakeleni izixeko ngenxa yabantwana benu, nezibaya ngenxa yegusha zenu; nize nenze ngako okupumileyo emlonyeni wenu." 
Numbers32:25 Lwaza usapo luka‐Gadi nosapo luka‐Rubene lwateta ku‐Mosesi, lusiti: Izicaka zako ziya kwenza njengokuyalela kwenkosi yam." 
Numbers32:26 Abantwana betu, abafazi betu, inkomo zetu, nazo zonke izilo zetu, zoba kona apo ezixekweni zase‐Gileyadi;" 
Numbers32:27 kanti izicaka zako ziya kuwela, zonke zixo̔bele ukulwa, pambi kwoyehova ukuya emfazweni, njengokuba inkosi yam itshilo." 
Numbers32:28 Waza u‐Mosesi wayalela ngalo u‐Elezari umperisite, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune, nabazintloko zendlu zoyise zezizwe zalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli:" 
Numbers32:29 waye u‐Mosesi esiti kubo: Ukuba usapo luka‐Gadi nosapo luka‐Rubene luya kuwela nani i‐Yoredane, lwonke luxo̔bele imfazwe, pambi kwoyehova, nokuba liya kweyiswa ilizwe pambi kwenu; niya kwandula nilunike ilizwe le‐Gileyadi libe yimfuyo." 
Numbers32:30 Kodwa ukuba aluyi kuwela luxo̔bile nani, lwozuza imfuyo pakati kwenu elizweni le‐Kanane." 
Numbers32:31 Lwaza lwapendula usapo luka‐Gadi nosapo luka‐Rubene, lusiti: Oko uyehova akutetileyo ezicakeni zako, siya kwenza ngokunjalo." 
Numbers32:32 Siya kuwela tina, sixo̔bile, pambi kwoyehova, siye elizweni le‐Kanane; nemfuyo yelifa letu soba nayo nganeno kwe‐Yoredane." 
Numbers32:33 Wandula u‐Mosesi wanika kulo, kwa kulo usapo luka‐Gadi, nakulo usapo luka‐Rubene, nakuso isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase unyana ka‐Josefe, ubukumkani buka‐Sihone ukumkani waba‐Amori, nobukumkani buka‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane, ilizwe kunye nezixeko zalo emideni, izixeko zelizwe elingqongayo." 
Numbers32:34 Lwaye usapo luka‐Gadi lwaka i‐Dibone, ne‐Hatarote, ne‐Harohere," 
Numbers32:35 ne‐Hatarote‐shofane, ne‐Yahezere, ne‐Yogebeha," 
Numbers32:36 ne‐Bete‐nimra, ne‐Bete‐harane, izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo; lwaka nezibaya zegusha." 
Numbers32:37 Lwaye usapo luka‐Rubene lwaka i‐Heshebone, ne‐Elehale, ne‐Kiriyatayime," 
Numbers32:38 ne‐Nebo, ne‐Bali‐mehone, (ziguqulelwe igama,) ne‐Sibama; lwawabiza ngamagama wambi amagama ezozixeko lwazakayo." 
Numbers32:39 Lwasuka usapo luka‐Makire, unyana ka‐Manase, lwaya e‐Gileyadi, lwayibamba, lwagqogqa aba‐Amori ababekuyo." 
Numbers32:40 Waza u‐Mosesi wanika i‐Gileyadi ku‐Makire, unyana ka‐Manase; wada wahlala kuyo." 
Numbers32:41 Kanjalo u‐Yahire, unyana ka‐Manase, waya wabamba imizi yabo, wayibiza ngokuti yi‐Havote‐yahire." 
Numbers32:42 Waya no‐Nobaki wabamba i‐Kenate namagxamesi ayo, wayibiza nge‐Nobaki, ngegama lake." 
Numbers33:1 EZI zizimfuduko zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, olube lupuma ezweni le‐Jipete, ngemikosi yalo, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Mosesi no‐Arone." 
Numbers33:2 Waye u‐Mosesi waba̔la izipumo zalo, ngemfuduko zalo, ngelizwi likayehova: zezi ke imfuduko zalo, ngezipumo zalo." 
Numbers33:3 Lwaye lunduluka e‐Ramesese ngenyanga yokuqala, ngoweshumi linesihlanu umhla wenyanga yokuqala; ngomso emva kwepasika lwapuma usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngesandla esipakamileyo, pambi kwamehlo awo onke ama‐Jipete:" 
Numbers33:4 nxa ama‐Jipete ebencw̔aba abo abebabetile uyehova pakati kwawo, bonke abangamazibulo: napezu kwotixo bawo wabeyenzile uyehova imigwebo." 
Numbers33:5 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwanduluka e‐Ramesese, lwaya lwati waca e‐Sukote." 
Numbers33:6 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Sukote, lwaya lwati waca e‐Etame, esesipelweni sentlango." 
Numbers33:7 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Etame, lwajikela e‐Pihahirote, epambi kwe‐Bali‐tsefone, lwaya lwati waca pambi kwe‐Migidole." 
Numbers33:8 Lwaza lwanduluka pambi kwe‐Pihahirote, lwawela pakati kwolwandle ukuya entlango, lwahamba ihambo yentsuku ntatu entlango ye‐Etame, lwaya lwati waca e‐Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Mara, lwafika e‐Elime: kekaloku kwakuko e‐Elime imitombo yamanzi ilishumi linamibini, nemiti yepalime imashumi asixe̔nxe; lwati waca apo ke." 
Numbers33:10 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Elime, lwaya lwati waca ngaselwandle olubomvu." 
Numbers33:11 Lwaza lwanduluka elwandle olubomvu, lwaya lwati waca entlango ye‐Sine." 
Numbers33:12 Lwaza lwanduluka entlango ye‐Sine, lwaya lwati waca e‐Dofeka." 
Numbers33:13 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Dofeka, lwaya lwati waca e‐Alushe." 
Numbers33:14 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Alushe, lwaya lwati waca e‐Refidime; ekwaye kungeko amanzi kona okuba abantu basele." 
Numbers33:15 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Refidime, lwaya lwati waca entlango ye‐Sinai." 
Numbers33:16 Lwaza lwanduluka entlango ye‐Sinai, lwaya lwati waca e‐Kibrote‐hatava." 
Numbers33:17 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Kibrote‐hatava, lwati waca e‐Hatserote." 
Numbers33:18 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Hatserote, lwaya lwati waca e‐Ritema." 
Numbers33:19 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Ritema, lwaya lwati waca e‐Rimone‐paretse." 
Numbers33:20 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Rimone‐paretse, lwaya lwati waca e‐Libena." 
Numbers33:21 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Libena, lwaya lwati waca e‐Resa." 
Numbers33:22 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Resa, lwaya lwati waca e‐Kehelata." 
Numbers33:23 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Kehelata, lwaya lwati waca entabeni ye‐Shafere." 
Numbers33:24 Lwaza lwanduluka entabeni ye‐Shafere, lwaya lwati waca e‐Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Harada, lwaya lwati waca e‐Makelote." 
Numbers33:26 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Makelote, lwaya lwati waca e‐Tahate." 
Numbers33:27 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Tahate, lwaya lwati waca e‐Tara." 
Numbers33:28 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Tara, lwaya lwati waca e‐Miteka." 
Numbers33:29 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Miteka, lwaya lwati waca e‐Hashemona." 
Numbers33:30 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Hashemona, lwaya lwati waca e‐Moserote." 
Numbers33:31 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Moserote, lwaya lwati waca e‐Bene‐yahakane." 
Numbers33:32 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Bene‐yahakane, lwaya lwati waca e‐Hori‐gidegadi." 
Numbers33:33 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Hori‐gidegadi, lwaya lwati waca e‐Yotebata." 
Numbers33:34 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Yotebata, lwaya lwati waca e‐Habrona." 
Numbers33:35 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Habrona, lwaya lwati waca e‐Hetsiyone‐gebere." 
Numbers33:36 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Hetsiyone‐gebere, lwaya lwati waca entlango ye‐Tsine, eyeyase‐Kadeshe." 
Numbers33:37 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Kadeshe, lwaya lwati waca entabeni ye‐Hore, ngasesipelweni selizwe le‐Edome." 
Numbers33:38 Wandula u‐Arone umperisite wenyukela entabeni ye‐Hore, ngelizwi likayehova, wabuba kona, ngomnyaka wamashumi mane emveni kwokupuma kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli elizweni le‐Jepete, ngenyanga yesihlanu, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga." 
Numbers33:39 Waye u‐Arone eyiminyaka ilikulu linamashumi mabini anamitatu ubudala bake, akububa entabeni ye‐Hore." 
Numbers33:40 Kwaye kuvakala kum‐Kanane, kukumkani we‐Haradi, obehlala esuyide, ezweni le‐Kanane, ngokuza kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers33:41 Lwaza lwanduluka entabeni ye‐Hore, lwaya lwati waca e‐Tsalimona." 
Numbers33:42 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Tsalimona, lwaya lwati waca e‐Fumone." 
Numbers33:43 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Fumone, lwaya lwati waca e‐Obote." 
Numbers33:44 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Obote, lwaya lwati waca e‐Hiyi‐habarime, emdeni wase‐Mowabi." 
Numbers33:45 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Hiyi— habarime, lwaya lwati waca e‐Dibone‐gadi." 
Numbers33:46 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Dibone‐gadi, lwaya lwati waca e‐Halimone‐dibelatayime." 
Numbers33:47 Lwaza lwanduluka e‐Halimone‐dibelatayime, lwaya lwati waca ezintabeni ze‐Habarime, pambi kwe‐Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Lwaza lwanduluka ezintabeni ze‐Habarime, lwaya lwati waca ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, ngase‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Lwati waca ngase‐Yoredane apo, kwa se‐Bete‐yeshimote kwada kwase‐Abele‐shitime, ematafeni ase‐Mowabi." 
Numbers33:50 WAYE uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, ngase‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko, esiti:" 
Numbers33:51 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Xeshekweni niweleyo i‐Yoredane ukuya ezweni le‐Kanane," 
Numbers33:52 niya kwandula nigqogqe bonke abemi belizwe pambi kwenu, nitshabalalise yonke imifanekiso yabo eba̔liweyo; kanjalo zonke izifanekiso zabo ezityityishiweyo nozitshabalalisa, nazo zonke indawo zabo ezipakamileyo nozicitakalisa:" 
Numbers33:53 naniya kubamba ilizwe, nize nihlale kulo: ngokuba ndinipile elozwe ukuba nilifuye." 
Numbers33:54 Naniya kwamkela ilizwe libe lilifa ngeqashiso, ngezizalwane zenu: abo baninzi niya kubandisela ilifa labo, nabo bancinane niya kubancipisela ilifa labo; indawo apo kubapumela kona iqashiso, yoba yeyabo abanye ngabanye; ngezizwe zoyihlo benu niya kulamkela ilifa." 
Numbers33:55 Kanti ukuba aniyi kubagqogqa abemi belizwe pambi kwenu, kuya kwandula ukuti, abo nibasalisa kubo boba ngameva emehlweni enu, nezihlaba emacaleni enu; babeya kunipata ngobutshaba pezu kwomhlaba enihlala kuwo." 
Numbers33:56 Kwoti kanjako, njengokuba bendicinga ukwenza kubo, ndiya kwenza kuni." 
Numbers34:1 WALEKELA wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers34:2 Yalela usapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Xeshekweni ningenayo elizweni le‐Kanane: (eli lilizwe eliya kuwa kuni libe lilifa, ilizwe le‐Kanane kunye nemida yalo:)" 
Numbers34:3 Elasesuyide icala lenu loba sentlango ye‐Tsine, ngasemacaleni ase‐Edome; kanjalo owasesuyide umda wenu woba sesipelweni solwandle olutyuwa ngasempumalanga:" 
Numbers34:4 waye lomda wenu uya kujika apo esuyide uye eqineni lase‐Hakerabime, udlulele ngase‐Tsine; nokupuma kwawo kwoba sesuyide kude kube se‐Kadeshebaneha; wauya kupumela e‐Hatsare‐aradi, udlulele ngase‐Hatsemone;" 
Numbers34:5 wandule ujike umda lowo e‐Hatsemone uye emlanjeni wase‐Jipete; nokupela kwawo kwoba selwandle. 
Numbers34:6 Nomda wasentshonalanga, noba nolwandle olukulu, nomda wakona: nguwo lo oya kuba ngumda wenu wasentshonalanga." 
Numbers34:7 Kanjalo nguwo lo oya kuba ngumda wenu wasenode: niqala elwandle olukulu niya kuzibalulela intaba ye‐Hore; 
Numbers34:8 nitabata entabeni ye‐Hore niya kubalula kude kungenwe e‐Hamati; nokupumela kwalomda kwoba ngase‐Tsedade; 
Numbers34:9 kwandule kupume lomda uye e‐Ziperone; nokupela kwawo kwoba e‐Hatsare‐henani: nguwo lo oya kuba ngumda wenu wasenode. 
Numbers34:10 Naniya kuzibalulela umda wasempumalanga uqale e‐Hatsare‐henani uye e‐Shefame; 
Numbers34:11 waye umda lowo uya kuhla e‐Shefame uye e‐Ribela, ngasempumalanga ye‐Hayine; uya kuhla kanjalo lomda, ufikele ecaleni lolwandle lwase‐Kinerete ngasempumalanga;" 
Numbers34:12 wobuya uhle lomda uye ngase‐Yoredane; nokupela kwawo kwoba selwandle olutyuwa. Eli loba lilizwe lenu kunye nemida yalo engqongayo. 
Numbers34:13 Waza u‐Mosesi wayalela usapo luka‐Sirayeli, esiti: Leli ilizwe eniya kwamkela lona libe lilifa ngeqashiso, owaxela uyehova ukuba linikwe kuzo izizwe ezilitoba nesiqingata sesizwe:" 
Numbers34:14 ngokuba isizwe sosapo luka‐Rubene, ngendlu zoyise zalo, nesizwe sosapo luka‐Gadi, ngendlu zoyise zalo, sezamkele zona; kanjalo isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase sesamkele ilifa laso:" 
Numbers34:15 izizwe ezibini nesiqingata sesizwe zamkele ilifa lazo nganeno kwe‐Yoredane apa, malungana ne‐Jeriko ngapambili, ngasekupumeni kwelanga." 
Numbers34:16 Wabuya wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers34:17 Ngawo la amagama awo amadoda aya kwabela kuni ilizwe: ngu‐Elezari umperisite, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune." 
Numbers34:18 Naniya kutabata inkosi ibe nye ngesiswe ngesizwe, kuze kwabiwe ilizwe." 
Numbers34:19 Namagama alamadoda ngawo la: eyesizwe sika‐Juda, ngu‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune;" 
Numbers34:20 neyesizwe sosapo luka‐Simone, ngu‐Shemuweli unyana ka‐Hamihude;" 
Numbers34:21 neyesizwe sika‐Benjamine, ngu‐Elidade unyana ka‐Kiselone;" 
Numbers34:22 neyesizwe sosapo luka‐Dane, yinkosi u‐Buki, unyana ka‐Yogeli;" 
Numbers34:23 eyosapo luka‐Josefe, — eyesizwe sosapo luka‐Manase, yinkosi u‐Haniyeli, unyana ka‐Efode;" 
Numbers34:24 neyesizwe sosapo luka‐Frayime, yinkosi u‐Kemuweli, unyana ka‐Shifetane;" 
Numbers34:25 neyesizwe sosapo luka‐Zebulone, yinkosi u‐Elitsafane, unyana ka‐Panaki;" 
Numbers34:26 neyesizwe sosapo luka‐Yisakare, yinkosi u‐Palatiyeli, unyana ka‐Hazane;" 
Numbers34:27 neyesizwe sosapo luka‐Ashere, yinkosi u‐Ahihude, unyana ka‐Shelomi;" 
Numbers34:28 neyesizwe sosapo luka‐Nefatali, yinkosi u‐Pedaheli, unyana ka‐Hamihude." 
Numbers34:29 Ngaba abo uyehova wabayalela ukuba babele usapo luka‐Sirayeli ilifa, elizweni le‐Kanane." 
Numbers35:1 WAZA uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, ngase‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko, esiti:" 
Numbers35:2 Yalela usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba lubanike aba‐Levi, kulo ilifa lemfuyo yalo, izixeko zokuhlala; nobanika aba‐Levi nenqele ezixekweni ezizingqongayo." 
Numbers35:3 Boba nezixeko ezo ukuba bahlale kuzo; nenqele zazo zoba zezenkomo zabo, nezempahla yabo, nezazo zonke izilo zabo." 
Numbers35:4 Kanjalo inqele zezixeko, eniya kuzinika kuba‐Levi, zoqala eludongeni lwesixeko ziye nangapandle kude kube liwaka lekubite ngento engqongayo." 
Numbers35:5 Naniya kulinganisa ngapandle kwesixeko, ngecala lasempumalanga ikubite ezingamawaka mabini, nangecala lasesuyide ikubite ezingamawaka mabini, nangecala lasentshonalanga ikubite ezingamawaka mabini, nangecala lasenode ikubite ezingamawaka mabini, isixeko sipakati nje: zoba njalo kubo inqele zezixeko." 
Numbers35:6 Napakati kwezixeko eniya kuzinika kuba‐Levi kwobako izixeko zesipepelo ezitandatu, eniya kuzinika ukuba kusabele kona umbulali; napezu kwazo ezi niya kunika izixeko ezingamashumi mane enazibini." 
Numbers35:7 Zonke izixeko eniya kuzinika kuba‐Levi zoba zizixeko ezingamashumi mane anesibozo; kwa zona nenqele zazo. 
Numbers35:8 Nezixeko eniya kuzinika zivela kwimfuyo yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, abo banezininzi niya kutabata kubo ezininzi, nabo banezincinane niya kutabata kubo ezincinane; abanye ngabanye, ngokwelifa labo balidlayo, bonika ezixekweni zabo kuba‐Levi." 
Numbers35:9 Walekela wateta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Numbers35:10 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, uti kulo: Xeshekweni niweleyo i‐Yoredane ukuya elizweni le‐Kanane;" 
Numbers35:11 niya kwandula nizidalele izixeko ezifanelekileyo, e ziya kuba zizixeko zesipepelo kuni, ukuba kusabele kona umbulali, lowo obuleleyo umntu ngesiposo." 
Numbers35:12 Zoba zizixeko zesipepelo kuni ngenxa yompindezeli; ukuze umbulali angafi, engekemi ebusweni bentlanganiso ekugwebeni." 
Numbers35:13 Nezixeko ezo eniya kuzinika, zizixeko zesipepelo ezitandatu niya kuba nazo." 
Numbers35:14 Izixeko zitatu niya kuzinika nganeno kwe‐Yoredane, nezixeko zitatu niya kuzinika ezweni le‐Kanane, eziya kuba zizixeko zesipepelo." 
Numbers35:15 Ezizixeko zitandatu zoba yindawo yokupepela, kwa kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nakuye owasemzini nakuye oliṙanuka pakati kwalo; ukuze kusabele kona osukuba ebulele umntu ngesiposo." 
Numbers35:16 Kodwa ukuba umbetile ngento yesincete, wada wabuba, ungumbulali yena; uya kufiswa ngenyaniso lombulali." 
Numbers35:17 Nokuba umbetile ngokuposa ilitye, abengafayo ngalo, wada wabuba, ungumbulali yena; uya kufiswa ngenyaniso lombulali." 
Numbers35:18 Nokuba umbetile ngempahla yomti epetwe ngesandla, abengafayo ngayo, wada wabuba, ungumbulali yena; uya kufiswa ngenyaniso lombulali." 
Numbers35:19 Umpindezeli wegazi nguye oya kufisa umbulali: akufumanana naye, uya kumfisa." 
Numbers35:20 Ukuba kanjalo umsunduzile ngotiyo, umhlaumbi umjulele ngabomi, wada wabuba;" 
Numbers35:21 umhlaumbi umbetile ngesandla ngobutshaba, wada wabuba; uya kufiswa ngenyaniso umbeti lowo; ungumbulali yena: umpindezeli wegazi uya kumfisa lombulali, akufumanana naye." 
Numbers35:22 Kodwa ukuba umsunduzile ngebaqo kungeko butshaba, umhlaumbi umjulele ngenye impahla engenzi ngabomi," 
Numbers35:23 umhlaumbi ngelinye ilitye, abengafayo ngalo, engambonanga, waliwisa pezu kwake, wada wabuba, engabanga lutshaba kuye, engafunanga ukwenzakala kwake kanjako;" 
Numbers35:24 yoti intlanganiso igwebe pakati kwombulali lowo nompindezeli wegazi, njengezigwebo ezi." 
Numbers35:25 Yaye intlanganiso iya kuhlangula umbulali esandleni sompindezeli wegazi; kanjalo intlanganiso iya kumbuyisela esixekweni sesipepelo sake, apo abesabele kona; waeya kuhlala kuso kude kufe umperisite omkulu, lowo otanjisiweyo ngeoli eyingcwele." 
Numbers35:26 Kodwa ukuba umbulali lowo woka apume ngapandle kwomda wesixeko sesipepelo sake, apo abesabele kona;" 
Numbers35:27 ati umpindezeli wegazi amfumane pandle kwomda wesixeko sesipepelo sake; ukuba umpindezeli wegazi uya kumbulala umbulali lowo, akuyi kubako kuye ityala legazi:" 
Numbers35:28 ngokuba ange ehleli esixekweni sesipepelo sake, kwada kwafa umperisite omkulu. Kodwa emveni kwokufa kwomperisite omkulu umbulali angabuyela elizweni lemfuyo yake." 
Numbers35:29 Ezi zinto ke zoba ngummiselwa wesiko kuni, ngezizukulwana zenu, kuzo zonke intlalo zenu." 
Numbers35:30 Osukuba ebulala umntu, umbulali lowo uya kufiswa ngomlomo wamanqi̔na; kodwa inqi̔na linye aliyi kunqi̔na ngasemntwini, ukuba afe ngalo." 
Numbers35:31 Aniyi kwamkela isizi ngenxa yobomi bombulali, onetyala lokufa; koko aya kufiswa ngenyaniso." 
Numbers35:32 Aniyi kwamkela isizi ngenxa yalowo wesabeleyo esixekweni sesipepelo sake, sokuba abuye ukuya kuhlala elizweni, engekafi umperisite omkulu." 
Numbers35:33 Kwa njalo aniyi kudyoba ilizwe enikulo: ngokuba ligazi elidyoba ilizwe; kanjako akungexoliselwe ilizwe ngenxa yegazi elipaleleyo kulo, kupela ngegazi lalowo owalipalazayo." 
Numbers35:34 Ize ninganco̔lisi ilizwe eniya kuma kulo, endiya kuhlala mna pakati kwalo: ngokuba mna Yehova ndihleli pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Numbers36:1 KWAZA kwasondela intloko zendlu zoyise zesizalwane sosapo luka‐Gileyadi, unyana ka‐Makire, unyana ka‐Manase, kuzo izizalwane zosapo luka‐Josefe, zateta ebusweni buka‐Mosesi, nasebusweni benkosi, intloko zendlu zoyise zosapo luka‐Sirayeli," 
Numbers36:2 zati: Uyehova uyalele inkosi yam, ukuba makunikwe ilizwe libe lilifa ngeqashiso elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli; kanjalo inkosi yam ibiyalelwa nguyehova, ukuba makunikwe ilifa lika‐Tselofehadi umzalwana wetu ezintombini zake." 
Numbers36:3 Kekaloku zakuba ngabafazi kowonyana be‐ zinye izizwe zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ilifa lazo liya kususwa elifeni lobawo betu, longezelelwe elifeni lesosizwe eziya kuba pakati kwaso; kuze kususwe ke kwisabiwo selifa letu." 
Numbers36:4 Naxeshekweni kuya kubako umnyaka womgcobo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ilifa lazo liya kwongezelelwa elifeni lesosizwe eziya kuba pakati kwaso; kuze kususwe ke ilifa lazo elifeni lesizwe sobawo betu." 
Numbers36:5 Waza u‐Mosesi wayalela usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngelizwi likayehova, esiti: Isizwe sosapo luka‐Josefe silungisile ukuteta." 
Numbers36:6 Lilo eli ilizwi aliyaleleyo uyehova ngazo intombi zika‐Tselofehadi, lokuti: Mazibe ngabafazi kwabalungileyo emehlweni azo; kupela esizalwaneni sesizwe soyise wazo ziya kuba ngabafazi." 
Numbers36:7 Kwa njalo aliyi kujikiswa ilifa losapo luka‐Sirayeli kwisizwe ngesizwe: ngokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli olunye ngolunye luya kunamatela elifeni lesizwe soyise balo. 
Numbers36:8 Kanjalo intombi esukuba ilidla ilifa, kuzo izizwe zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, yoba ngumfazi kowesizalwane sesizwe soyise bayo, ukuze ke usapo luka‐Sirayeli olunye ngolunye lulidle ilifa loyise balo." 
Numbers36:9 Kwa njalo ilifa aliyi kujikiswa kwesinye isizwe ukuya kwesinye: ngokuba izizwe zosapo luka‐Sirayeli ezinye ngezinye ziya kunamatela kwawazo amafa. 
Numbers36:10 Njengokuba uyehova wabemyalela u‐Mosesi, zenje njalo ke intombi zika‐Tselofehadi:" 
Numbers36:11 ngokuba u‐Mahala, n o‐Tiretsa, no‐Hogela, no‐Mileka, no‐Noha, intombi zika‐Tselofehadi, baba ngabafazi konyana boyisekazi babo:" 
Numbers36:12 pakati kwezizalwane zosapo luka‐Manase, unyana ka‐Josefe, baba ngabafazi; kwaza kwahlala ilifa labo esizweni sesizalwane soyise." 
Numbers36:13 Yiyo le imiyalelo nemigwebo, owati uyehova wayiyalezela ngesandla sika‐Mosesi elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, ngase‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 NGAWO la amazwi abewateta u‐Mosesi kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli, nganeno kwe‐Yoredane, entlango, etafeni malungana ne‐Sufe, pakati kwe‐Parane, ne‐Tofeli, ne‐Labane, ne‐Hatserote, ne‐Dizahabi." 
Deuteronomy1:2 (Yihambo yemihla elishumi linesinye kusuka e‐Horebe ukuya ngendlela yentaba ye‐Sehire e‐Kadeshe‐baneha.) 
Deuteronomy1:3 Kwaye kute ngomnyaka wamashumi mane, ngenyanga yeshumi linesinye, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, wateta u‐Mosesi elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, njengako konke abemyalezela kona uyehova kulo:" 
Deuteronomy1:4 emvenikweni wabebulele u‐Sihone ukumkani waba‐Amori, owahlala e‐Heshebone, no‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane, owahlala e‐Hashetarote nas e‐Edrehi." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Nganeno kwe‐Yoredane, ezweni le‐Mowabi, waqala u‐Mosesi ukushumayela lomteto, esiti:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 Uyehova, utixo wetu, wateta kuti e‐Horebe, esiti: Kwanele ukuhlala kwenu kulentaba:" 
Deuteronomy1:7 jikani, nihambe ke, niye entabeni yaba‐Amori, nakubo bonke abamelwane babo, etafeni, ezintabeni, ezihlanjeni, nasesuyide, naselunxwemeni lwolwandle; ezweni laba‐Kanane, nase‐Lebanone, kude kube ngumlambo omkulu, umlambo ongum‐Ferate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Bona ke, ndilibekile pambi kwenu ilizwe elo: ngenani nifuye ilizwe owabefunga ngalo uyehova koyihlo benu, u‐Abrahame, u‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi, ukuba uya kulinika kubo, nakwinzalo yabo emva kwabo." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Ndaye ndibe nditeta kuni ngeloxesha, ndisiti: Ndikohliwe ndindedwa kukunitwala:" 
Deuteronomy1:10 uyehova, utixo wenu, unenze baninzi; kekaloku, nanku namhla nje ninjengenkwenkwezi zezulu ngobuninzi." 
Deuteronomy1:11 (Wanga uyehova, utixo woyihlo benu, anganandisa ngokuliwaka pezu kwokuba njalo kwenu, anitamsanqele, njengokuba etshilo kuni!)" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Ndingati nina ukutwala ndedwa indiniso yenu, nomtwalo wenu, nempikiswano yenu?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Kupani amadoda alumkileyo, anokuqonda, anokwazeka ezizweni zenu, ndize ndiwamise abe zintloko zenu." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Naye nindipendula, nati: Ilungile lonto uyitetileyo, ukuba yenziwe." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Ndaza ndatabata intloko zezizwe zenu, amadoda alumkileyo, anokwazeka, ndawenza intloko pezu kwenu, inkosi zamawaka, nenkosi zamakulu, nenkosi zamashumi mahlanu, nenkosi zamashumi manye, namagosa pakati kwezizwe zenu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Ndaye ndiyalela abagwebi benu ngeloxesha, ndisiti: Pulapulani amatyala akoyo pakati kwabazalwana benu, nilungise ukugweba pakati kwomntu nomzalwana wake, nowasemzini onaye." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Aniyi kugqalisela ubuso ekugwebeni; niya kupulapula abancinane njengokuba nipulapula abakulu; aniyi kwoyika ubuso bomntu; ngokuba umgwebo ungo katixo: nendawo eninqabelayo, yisondezeni kum, ndandiya kuyipulapula." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Kanjalo ndabendiyalela nina ngeloxesha zonke izinto eninge nizenza. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Sati sakunduluka e‐Horebe, sandula sacanda kuyo yonke leyontlango inkulu neyoyikekayo, enaniyibona endleleni yentaba yaba‐Amori, njengokuba ebesiyalele uyehova, utixo wetu; sada safika e‐Kadeshe‐baneha." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ndaza ndati kuni: Nifikile entabeni yaba‐Amori, esiyipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wetu." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Kangela ke, uyehova, utixo wako, ubekile elozwe pambi kwako; nyuka, libambe, njengokuba uyehova, utixo woyihlo bako, etshilo kuwe; ungoyiki, ungatuswa nokutuswa." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Naza nasondela kum nonke, nati: Siya kususa amadoda aye pambi kwetu, aya kusipandela ilizwe, asibuyisele ilizwi ngendlela esiya kunyuka ngayo, nangezixeko esiya kufika kuzo." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Kekaloku leyonto ibilungile emehlweni am; ndaza ndacapula kuni amadoda alishumi linamabini, indoda nye ngesizwe ngesizwe:" 
Deuteronomy1:24 ajika ke, enyukela ngasentabeni, aza kufika entilini ye‐Shekole, ayihlola ke." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ati kanjalo atabata kwisiqa̔mo selizwe ezandleni zawo, asihlisela kuti, asibuyisela ilizwi, ati: Lilungile elozwe asipayo uyehova, utixo wetu." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Noko naningavumi ukunyuka, kodwa nalivukela ilizwi likayehova, utixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy1:27 Naye nibe niseya ezintenteni zenu, nati: Ngokuba uyehova esitiyile, usipumisile elizweni le‐Jipete, ukuba asinikele ezandleni zaba‐Amori, ukusitshabalalisa." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Sesiya kunyuka ukuya pina? abazalwana betu banyibilikisile intliziyo zetu, besiti: Abantu ngabakulu nabade kuti; izixeko zezikulu nezinqatyiselweyo kwada kwasezulwini; kanjako nosapo lwama‐Hanaki sasilubona apo." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Ndaza ndati kuni: Ningankwantyi, ningaboyiki nokuboyika." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Uyehova, utixo wenu, ohambayo pambi kwenu, nguye oya kunilwela; njengako konke wanenzelayo e‐Jipete pambi kwamehlo enu," 
Deuteronomy1:31 nasentlango, apo nibonileyo okokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, unitwele, njengokuba umntu etwala unyana wake, kuyo yonke indlela benihamba ngayo, nada nafika kulendawo." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kodwa nangalento beningakolwa nguyehova, utixo wenu," 
Deuteronomy1:33 obehamba pambi kwenu endleleni, ukuya kunihlolela indawo yokuti waca kwenu, ngomlilo ebusuku, ukuba anibonise indlela eniya kuhamba ngayo, nangelifu emini." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Wati uyehova akuva ilizwi lamazwi enu, waqumba kunene, wafunga, esiti:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 Ngenyaniso akuyi kubako nanye kulamadoda esisizukulwana sikohlakeleyo, eya kubona elolizwe lilungileyo, endandifunga ngalo ukuba ndiya kulinika koyihlo benu," 
Deuteronomy1:36 ngapandle kwo‐Kalebi, unyana ka‐Jefune! yena wolibona, nakuye ndowunika umhlaba abenyatela pezu kwawo, nakubo abantwana bake, ngenxa yokuba ekolisile ukulandela uyehova." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Kanjalo nam wandiqumbela uyehova ngenxa yenu, esiti: Nawe akuyi kungena kona:" 
Deuteronomy1:38 u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, omiyo ebusweni bako, yena uya kungena kona; lowo momeleze ke: ngokuba eya kubamkelisa o‐Sirayeli ilifa lalo."
