Deuteronomy1:39 Nentsapo zenu, enanisiti: Zoba lixoba; nabantwana benu, abangakwaziyo namhla okulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo, aba baya kungena kona, nakubo bona ndiya kulinika, baye bona beya kulifuya." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Kodwa nina, jikani, nihambele ngasentlango, ngendlela yaselwandle olubomvu." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Naza napendula nati kum: Sonile ngakuye uyehova tina; sesiya kunyuka silwe, njengako konke asiyaleleyo uyehova, utixo wetu. Xeshikweni nise nibinqile abanye ngabanye ngempahla zabo zokulwa, ninxamile nje ukunyukela entabeni," 
Deuteronomy1:42 wandula wati uyehova kum: Yiti kubo: Ningenyuki, ningalwi kanjako, ngokuba ndingeko mna pakati kwenu; ukuze ningoyiswa pambi kwentshaba zenu." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Koko ndakuteta kuni, nibe ningapulapuli; kodwa navukelana nelizwi likayehova, nenza nger̔atshi, nenyukela entabeni." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Bandul’ ukupumela ngakuni aba‐Amori, abebehlala kulontaba, banisukela, njengokuba zisenje njalo inyosi, banicitela e‐Sehire, na kude kwase‐Horema." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Nada nabuya ke, nalila pambi kwoyehova: kanti uyehova akapulapula ilizwi lenu, akanibekela indlebe kanjako." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Kwa njalo nibe nihlala e‐Kadeshe imihla yamininzi, njengemihla enibe nihlala ngayo." 
Deuteronomy2:1 SANDULA sajika ke, sahambela ngasentlango ngendlela yaselwandle olubomvu, njengokuba uyehova ebetetile kum; saye sizekelela intaba ye‐Sehire imihla yamininzi." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Waza watsho uyehova kum, esiti:" 
Deuteronomy2:3 Kwanele ukuzekelela kwenu intaba le; jikelani ngasenode. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Nababantu ubayalele ngokuti: Niza kucanda emdeni wabazalwana benu, wosapo luka‐Esau, oluhleliyo e‐Sehire; oluya kunoyika ke: zilumkeleni kunene ngoko;" 
Deuteronomy2:5 nize ningalwi nalo; ngokuba ndingayi kunika kuni kwilizwe lalo, kwa nokunyatelwa kwomzantsi wonyawo: ngokuba ndimpile u‐Esau intaba ye‐Sehire ibe yimfuyo." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Ukudla niya kukutenga kulo ngemali, ukuze nitye; namanzi kanjalo niya kuwatenga kulo ngemali, ukuze nisele." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, ekutamsanqele kuyo yonke imisebenzi yesandla sako; uyakwazi yena ukuhamba kwako kulentlango enkulu; leminyaka imashumi mane uyehova, utixo wako, unawe; akuswelanga luto." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Sati sakugqita kubazalwana betu usapo luka‐Esau, olube luhleli e‐Sehire, ngendlela yasetafeni, nge‐Elate, nange‐Hetsiyone‐gebere, sajika ke, sadlula ngendlela yentlango yase‐Mowabi." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Waza uyehova wati kum: Ungapati ama‐Mowabi ngobutshaba, ungalwi nawo emfazweni kanjako: ngokuba ndingayi kunika kuwe kwilizwe lawo imfuyo; ngokuba ndilupile usapo luka‐Lote i‐Hari ibe yimfuyo:" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Ama‐Eyime ahlala kuyo ngokwapambili, abantu abakulu, abaninzi, abade, njengama‐Hanaki;" 
Deuteronomy2:11 abebalwa ngokuba ngama‐Rafa nawo, njengama‐Hanaki; kanti ama‐Mowabi awabiza ngokuti ngama‐Eyime." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Kwaye kuhlala nama‐Hori e‐Sehire ngokwapambili; kodwa usapo luka‐Esau lwawagqogqa, lwawatshabalalisa pambi kwalo, lwaza lwahlala esikundleni sawo; njengokuba o‐Sirayeli benje njalo nasezweni lemfuyo yabo, elo babelipiwe nguyehova.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Sukani kaloku, niwele umlanjana we‐Zerede. Saza sawela umlanjana we‐Zerede." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kekaloku imihla esibe sihamba ngayo sisuka e‐Kadeshe‐baneha, side sawela umlanjana we‐Zerede, yabiyiminyaka emashumi matatu anesibozo; kwada kwagqityelwa sonke isizukulwana samadoda okulwa pakati kwomkosi, njengokuba uyehova ewafungele." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ngokuba okunene isandla sikayehova besingakuwo, ukuba awabubise pakati kwomkosi, ade agqityelwe." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Kwaza kwati, xeshikweni abegqityelwe onke amadoda okulwa ngokufa pakati kwabantu," 
Deuteronomy2:17 wandula wateta uyehova kum, esiti:" 
Deuteronomy2:18 Uya kudlula namhla nje ngomda wase‐Mowabi, nge‐Hari;" 
Deuteronomy2:19 wauya kusondela pambi kwosapo luka‐Hamoni; ungalupati ngobutshaba, ungalwi nalo kanjako; ngokuba ndingayi kunika kuwe kwilizwe losapo luka‐Hamoni imfuyo: ngokuba ndilupile usapo luka‐Lote lona libe yimfuyo:" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Eli libe libalwa ngokuba lilizwe lama‐Rafa nalo; ama‐Rafa ebehleli kulo ngokwapambili, kanti aba‐Hamoni bawabiza ngokuti ngama‐Zamzumi;" 
Deuteronomy2:21 abantu abakulu, abaninzi, abade, njengama‐Hanaki; owati uyehova wawatshabalalisa pambi kwabo, bada bawagqogqa, bahlala esikundleni sawo;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 njengokuba ebesenzela usapo luka‐Esau, oluhleliyo e‐Sehire, akutshabalalisa ama‐Hori pambi kwalo, lwada lwawagqogqa, lwahlala esikundleni sawo kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Kanjalo ama‐Havi abehleli e‐Hatserime, na kude kwase‐Gaza, wona ama‐Kafetori, abevela e‐Kafetori, wawatshabalalisa, wahlala esikundleni sawo.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Sukani, nihambe ke, niwele umlambo we‐Arenone: bona ke, ndinikile esandleni sako u‐Sihone um‐Amori, ukumkani we‐Heshebone, nelizwe lake; qala ukubamba, ulwe naye emfazweni." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Namhla nje ndiya kuqala ukubeka ukunkwantywa kwako nokwoyikwa kwako pezu kwabantu abangapantsi kwalo lonke izulu, abaya kuva indaba ngawe, bangcangcazele, batutumele ngenxa yako." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ndaza ndasusa izigidimi entlango yase‐Kedemote ukuya ku‐Sihone, ukumkani we‐Heshebone, zinamazwi oxolo, ukuti:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 Mandicande elizweni lako; ndiya kuhamba ngendlela yodwa; andiyi kupambukela nasekunene nasekohlo. 
Deuteronomy2:28 Wonditengisa ukudla ngemali, ukuba nditye; wondinika namanzi ngemali, ukuba ndisele; kupela ndiya kucanda ngenyawo zam;" 
Deuteronomy2:29 (njengokuba lwandenzela usapo luka‐Esau, oluhleliyo e‐Sehire, nama‐Mowabi ahleliyo e‐Hari;) ndide ndiwele i‐Yoredane ukuya ezweni asipayo uyehova, utixo wetu." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Kodwa ebengavumi u‐Sihone, ukumkani we‐Heshebone, ukuba sidlule kuye: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, wenza lukuni umoya wake, nentliziyo yake wayigwenxisa, ukuze amnikele esandleni sako, njengokuba kunjalo kwa namhla." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Waye uyehova esiti kum: Bona ke, sendiqalile ukunika pambi kwako u‐Sihone nelizwe lake; qala ukubamba, ukuba ulifuye ilizwe lake." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Kwandula kwapumela ngakuti u‐Sihone, yena nabo bonke abantu bake, ukuza kulwa e‐Yahetsa." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Koko uyehova, utixo wetu, wamnika ebusweni betu; saza sambeta, kwa nonyana bake, nabo bonke abantu bake." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Saye sitimba zonke izixeko zake ngeloxesha, salahlela ekutshatyalalisweni amadoda ezixeko zonke, nabafazi, nentsapo; besingashiya namntu oseleyo:" 
Deuteronomy2:35 kupela sazipangela inkomo, namaxoba ezixeko esibe sizitimbile." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Kwa kuyo i‐Harohere, eselunxwemeni lwomlambo we‐Arenone, nesixeko esisentilini, kwada kwase‐Gileyadi, akwabiko nqili eyasinqabelayo; zonke uyehova, utixo wetu, wazinika pambi kwetu." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Kupela beningasondeli kulo ilizwe losapo luka‐Hamoni, na kwenye indawo yasemlanjeni we‐Yaboki, nasezixekweni zentaba, nakokusukuba ebesiyalile ngako uyehova, utixo wetu." 
Deuteronomy3:1 SANDULA sajika, senyuka ngendlela yase‐Bashane; waza wapumela ngakuti u‐Hogi, ukumkani we‐Bashane, yena nabo bonke abantu bake, ukuza kulwa e‐Edrehi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Waye uyehova esiti kum: Ungamoyiki; ngokuba ndiya kunika yena, nabo bonke abantu bake, nelizwe lake, esandleni sako; wauya kwenza kuye, njengokuba wenzile ku‐Sihone, ukumkani waba‐Amori, owahlala e‐Heshebone." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Kwa njalo uyehova, utixo wetu, wanika ezandleni zetu no‐Hogi, ukumkani we‐Bashane, nabo bonke abantu bake; saza sambeta, kwada akwamshiyelwa namnye oseleyo." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Saye sitimba zonke izixeko zake ngeloxesha; akwabiko nqili esasingayitimbanga kubo: izixeko ezingamashumi matandatu, sonke isahlulo se‐Ragobi, ubukumkani buka‐Hogi e‐Bashane." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Zonke ezizixeko zibe zinqatyisiwe ngendonga ezinde, ngamasango nangemivalo; ngapandle kwezixeko ezingenandonga into eninzi kakulu." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Ezona sazilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni, njengokuba sibe senje njalo ku‐Sihone, ukumkani we‐Heshebone, silahlela ekutshatyalalisweni amadoda ezixeko zonke, nabafazi, nentsapo." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Kodwa sazipangela zonke inkomo nawo onke amaxoba ezixeko ezo. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Kanjalo ngeloxesha salitabata ilizwe esandleni sokumkani baba‐Amori bobabini, elo linganeno kwe‐Yoredane, kwa kuwo umlambo we‐Arenone kwada kwasentabeni ye‐Heremone:" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (ama‐Tsidone ayibiza i‐Heremone ngokuti yi‐Siriyone, kanti aba‐Amori bayibiza ngokuti yi‐Shenire:)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 zonke izixeko zasetafeni, nayo yonke i‐Gileyadi, nayo yonke i‐Bashane, kwada kwase‐Saleka nase‐Edrehi, izixeko zobukumkani buka‐Hogi e‐Bashane." 
Deuteronomy3:11 Ngokuba u‐Hogi, ukumkani we‐Bashane, ebekupela kwoseleyo eliveni lama‐Rafa; bona ke, ikoye yake ibiyikoye yesincete; asi yiyo na ese‐Raba yosapo luka‐Hamoni? zikubite ezilitoba ubude bayo, nekubite ezine ububanzi bayo, ngekubite yomntu." 
Deuteronomy3:12 Nelilizwe e salibamba yo ngeloxesha, kwa kuyo i‐Harohere, esemlanjeni we‐Arenone, nesiqingata sentaba ye‐Gileyadi, nezixeko zakuyo, ndalinika kuma‐Rubene nakuma‐Gadi." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Neliva le‐Gileyadi, nayo yonke i‐Bashane, e yobukumkani buka‐Hogi, elozwe ndalinika kwisiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase; sonke isahlulo se‐Ragobi, kunye nayo yonke i‐Bashane, e‐bekutiwa lilizwe lama‐Rafa." 
Deuteronomy3:14 U‐Yahire, unyana ka‐Manase, watabata sonke isahlulo se‐Ragobi kwada kwakuwo umda wama‐Geshure nama‐Mahaka; wayebiza ezo ndawo ngegama lake, nge‐Bashane‐havote‐yahire, kwada kwanamhla." 
Deuteronomy3:15 No‐Makire ndamnika i‐Gileyadi. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Nakuma‐Rubene nakuma‐Gadi ndanika kutabata e‐Gileyadi kude kwakuwo umlambo we‐Arenone, pakati kwentili, nomda wakona; nakude kwakuwo umlambo we‐Yaboki, umda wosapo luka‐Hamoni;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 netafa, ne‐Yoredane, nomda wakona; kwa kuyo i‐Kinerete nakude kwakulo ulwandle lwasetafeni, ulwandle olutyuwa, ngapantsi kwemifula yase‐Pisega ngasempumalanga." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Ndaye ndiniyalela ngexesha elo, ndisiti: Uyehova, utixo wenu, unipile elilizwe ukuba nilifuye: niya kuwela nixo̔bile pambi kwabazalwana benu usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nonke eningamadoda obuṙoti;" 
Deuteronomy3:19 kodwa abafazi benu, nentsapo zenu, nenkomo zenu, (ndiyazi ukuba ninento eninzi yenkomo,) ziya kuhlala ezixekweni zenu endizinikileyo kuni;" 
Deuteronomy3:20 ade uyehova abapumze abazalwana benu, njengokuba enipumzile nina, baze nabo balifuye elozwe uyehova, utixo wenu, ubapile lona pesheya kwe‐Yoredane; nandule nibuye abanye ngabanye ukuza kwimfuyo zabo, endizinikileyo kuni." 
Deuteronomy3:21 No‐Yoshuwa bendimyalela ngeloxesha, ndisiti: Amehlo ako akubonile konke akwenzileyo uyehova, utixo wenu, kokumkani aba bobabini; uya kwenje njalo uyehova kubo bonke ubukumkani oya kudlula ngakona." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Aniyi kuboyika; ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, nguye oya kunilwela." 
Deuteronomy3:23 Kanjako ndamtaṙuzisa uyehova ngexesha elo, ndisiti:" 
Deuteronomy3:24 Nkosi, Yehova! uqalile ukubonisa isicaka sako ubukulu bako, nesandla sako esomeleleyo; ngokuba nguwupina utixo ezulwini nasemhlabeni, ongenzayo njengemisebenzi yako, nanjengezenzo zamandla zako?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Makendiwele, ndiye kubona elolizwe lilungileyo elipesheya kwe‐Yoredane, lontaba entle, ne‐Lebanone." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Kodwa uyehova ebequmbile ngakum ngenxa yenu, wabengandipulapuli; koko wabesiti uyehova kum: Makukwanele; ungabi sapinda ukuteta kum ngalendawo." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Nyukela engcopo ye‐Pisega, uze upakamise amehlo ako ngasentshonalanga, nangasenode, nangasesuyide, nangasempumalanga, ulibone ngamehlo ako: ngokuba ungayi kuwela i‐Yoredane le." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Kodwa yala u‐Yoshuwa, umomeleze, umkalipise: ngokuba yena eya kuwela pambi kwababantu, abamkelise ilifa lelozwe uya kulibona." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Kwa njalo sahlala esihlanjeni malungana ne‐Bete‐pehori. 
Deuteronomy4:1 UZE kaloku, Sirayeli! upulapule kwizimiselo nakwizigwebo endinifundisayo ukuba nizenze; ukuze nipile, niye ningene nilifuye elozwe ulinika kuni uyehova, utixo woyihlo benu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Aniyi kwongeza pezu kwelizwi endiniyalela ngalo, aniyi kususa kulo kanjalo; ukuze nigcine imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wenu, endiniyalela ngayo." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Amehlo enu abonile oko wabekwenza uyehova ngenxa yo‐Bali‐pehori: ngokuba onke lomadoda abelandela u‐Bali‐pehori, wona uyehova, utixo wako, uwatshabalalisile pakati kwenu." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Kanti nina enibe ninamatela kuye uyehova, utixo wenu, nipilile nonke namhla nje." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Kangela, ndinifundisile izimiselo nezigwebo, njengokuba ndiyalelwe nguyehova, utixo wam, ukuba nenze ngokunjalo pakati kwelizwe, apo niya kona ukulifuya." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Zigcineni ngoko, nizenze: ngokuba oku kuya kuba bubulumko benu nengqondo yenu emehlweni entlanga, eziya kuziva zonke ezizimiselo, ziti: Ngabantu abalumkileyo nabanengqondo oluhlanga lukulu kupela!" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Ngokuba lulupina uhlanga olukulu olunaye utixo ekufupi kulo, njengoyehova, utixo wetu, ngako konke esimbizelayo?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Kanjalo lulupina uhlanga olukulu olunazo izimiselo nezigwebo ezilungileyo kangaka, njengawo wonke lomteto endiwubeka pambi kwenu namhla nje?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Kodwa zilumkele ke, uwugcine umpefumlo wako kunene, ukuba ungalibali ezozinto amehlo ako azibonileyo, nokuba zingemki entliziyweni yako yonke imihla yokudla kwako ubomi: uze uzazise kubantwana bako, nakubantwana babantwana bako." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Umhla obumi ngawo ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wako, e‐Horebe, akuti uyehova kum: Bahlanganisele kum abantu aba, ndandiya kubavisa amazwi am, ukuba bafunde ukundoyika yonke imihla abaya kubudla ubomi ngayo pezu kwomhlaba, nokuba bafundise abantwana babo;" 
Deuteronomy4:11 naza nasondela nema ngapantsi kwentaba leyo; yati ke intaba yatsha ngomlilo kude kwapakati kwezulu, kunye nobumnyama, n amafu, nesitokotoko;" 
Deuteronomy4:12 wandula wateta uyehova kuni epakati kwomlilo: ilizwi lamazwi naliva, kanti isimilo naningasiboni; neva ilizwi kwapela." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Waza waxela kuni ucebano lwake, owaniyalelayo ukuba nilwenze, amazwi alishumi; wawaba̔la pezu kwamacwecwe amatye amabini." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Nam uyehova wandiyalela ngeloxesha, ukuba ndinifundise izimiselo nezigwebo; ukuze nizenze kwelozwe eniwelela kona ukuya kulifuya." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Zilumkeleni kunene ngoko: ngokuba beningasiboni nasinye isimilo ngomhla wabeteta uyehova kuni e‐Horebe epakati kwomlilo: 
Deuteronomy4:16 hleze nizonakalise, nizenzele into eqingqiweyo, isimilo somnye umfanekiso, imfano yendoda umhlaumbi yenkazana," 
Deuteronomy4:17 imfano yesinye isilo esisemhlabeni, imfano yenye intaka enamapiko epapazelayo ezulwini," 
Deuteronomy4:18 imfano yenye into enambuzelayo pezu kwomhlaba, imfano yenye intlanzi esemanzini ngapantsi kwomhlaba:" 
Deuteronomy4:19 hleze kanjalo upakamise amehlo ako ngasezulwini, uti, wakubona ilanga, nenyanga, nenkwenkwezi, wonke umkosi wasezulwini, ukukuliswe ukuba uqubude kuzo, nokuba uzikonze, ezo nto uyehova, utixo wako, uzabele kuzo zonke intlanga ezipantsi kwalo lonke izulu." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Kanti nina unitabatile uyehova, wanikupa kuso isidlangalala sesincete, kuyo i‐Jipete, ukuba nibe ngabantu belifa kuye, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Kanjako uyehova wabendiqumbela ngendawo yenu, wafunga ukuba andiyi kuwela i‐Yoredane, nokuba andiyi kungena kwelozwe lilungileyo, olipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, libe lilifa." 
Deuteronomy4:22 Ngokuba ndiya kufa mna kwelilizwe apa, ndingayi kuwela i‐Yoredane; kanti nina niya kuwela, nilifuye elolizwe lilungileyo." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Zilumkeleni ke, hleze nilibale ucebano lukayehova, utixo wenu, alwenzileyo nani, nize nizenzele umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, imfano yenye into akuyalile ngayo uyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, engumlilo odlayo, e ngutixo onekwele." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Xeshikweni uya kuzala abantwana, nabantwana babantwana, nide nihlale kade elizweni, nandule nizonakalise, nenze umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, imfano yenye into, nenze okubi emehlweni kayehova, utixo wako, ukumqumbisa;" 
Deuteronomy4:26 ndiyanqi̔nisa ngakuni namhla nje izulu nomhlaba, ukuba niya kugqibela ukububa kamsinyane emhlabeni, eniwelayo i‐Yoredane ukuya kona, ukuba niwufuye; aniyi kwolula imihla pezu kwawo, koko niya kutshatyalaliswa kanye." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Kanjalo uyehova woniti sa pakati kwentlanga; naniya kushiywa nibancinane inani lenu pakati kwabaheyideni, apo uyehova aya kuniqu̔bela kona." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Naniya kukonza apo otixo, umsebenzi wezandla zabantu, imiti namatye, abangaboniyo, abangevayo, abangadliyo, abangasezeliyo." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Kodwa wakufuna kwa kona uyehova, utixo wako, uya kwandula ukumfumana, nxa umbuzayo ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Nxa usebunzimeni, na nxa zonke ezizinto zikufumene, emihleni yasemva, ukuba uya kubuyela kuyehova, utixo wako, upulapule elizwini lake;" 
Deuteronomy4:31 (ngokuba e ngutixo onenceba, uyehova, utixo wako;) akasayi kukuyeka, akasayi kukububisa kanjako; nocebano lwoyihlo bako, owabebafungela ngalo, akasayi kululibala." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Ngokuba, uke ubuze kwimihla yamatanci, ebiko pambili kuwe, kuselokwalomhla wadalayo utixo abantu pezu kwomhlaba, nakwenye incam yezulu kude kube kwenye incam yezulu, ukuba kekwabako na okunjengayo into enkulu le, umhlaumbi ukuba kekwaviwa na okufana nayo?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Kuko abantu na abake baliva ilizwi likatixo, eteta pakati kwomlilo, njengokuba uvile wena, bapila ke?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Umhlaumbi kewalinga na utixo ukuya kuzitabatela uhlanga kwa pakati kwohlanga olunye, ngezilingelo, ngemiqondiso, nangemimangaliso, nangemfazwe, nangesandla esomeleleyo, nangengalo eyolulweyo, nangezoyikiso ezikulu, njengako konke abekwenzela nina uyehova, utixo wenu, e‐Jipete pambi kwamehlo enu?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Kwabonakaliswa kuwe ke, ukuze ukwazi okokuba uyehova unguye utixo; akuko namnye ngapandle kwake." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Kwa sezulwini wakuvisa ilizwi lake, ukuze akululeke; napezu kwomhlaba wakubonisa umlilo wake omkulu; namazwi ake waweva epakati kwomlilo." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Nangenxa yokuba ebetanda oyihlo bako, kukona waqashayo inzalo yabo emva kwabo, wakupumisa e‐Jipete pantsi kwobuso bake ngamandla ake amakulu;" 
Deuteronomy4:38 ukuya kugqogqa intlanga ezizezinkulu nezinamandla ngapezu kwako ebusweni bako, ukuba akungenise, akupe ilizwe lazo libe lilifa, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Yazi ke ngoko namhla nje, ukumbule entliziyweni yako, ukuba uyehova unguye utixo, ezulwini pezulu, nasemhlabeni ngapantsi; akuko wumbi." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Ngako uya kugcina imimiselo yake, nemiyalelo yake, endikuyalelayo namhla nje, ukuba kulunge kuwe nakubantwana bako emva kwako, nokuba wolule imihla pezu kwomhlaba, owupiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, kude kube ngunapakade." 
Deuteronomy4:41 WANDULA wahlula u‐Mosesi izixeko ezitatu, nganeno kwe‐Yoredane ngasekupumeni kwelanga;" 
Deuteronomy4:42 ukuba kusabele kona umbulali, obulalayo ummelwane wake engazi ke, kwa lowo angamtiyanga ngexesha lapambili; ukuze ati, esabela kwesinye sezixeko ezi, andule apile:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 i‐Betsere esentlango, ezweni elibutafa, ibe sesama‐Rubene; ne‐Ramote ese‐Gileyadi, ibe sesama‐Gadi; ne‐Golane ese‐Bashane, ibe sesama‐Manase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 KEKALOKU nguwo lo umteto owawubeka u‐Mosesi pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli: 
Deuteronomy4:45 zizo ezi izinqi̔nelo, nezimiselo, nezigwebo, owabeziteta u‐Mosesi elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, lwakuba lupumile e‐Jipete," 
Deuteronomy4:46 nganeno kwe‐Yoredane, esihlanjeni malungana ne‐Bete‐pehori, ezweni lika‐Sihone ukumkani waba‐Amori, owahlala e‐Heshebone, lowo owabetwayo ngu‐Mosesi nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwakuba lupumile e‐Jipete:" 
Deuteronomy4:47 olwabamba ilizwe lake nelizwe lika‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane, okumkani ababini baba‐Amori, abebenganeno kwe‐Yoredane ngasekupumeni kwelanga;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 kwa kuyo i‐Harohere, eselunxwemeni lwomlambo we‐Arenone, kude kwasentabeni ye‐Siyone, ekwa yiyo i‐Heremone;" 
Deuteronomy4:49 nalo lonke itafa nganeno kwe‐Yoredane ngasempumalanga, nakude kwaselwandle lwasetafeni, ngapantsi kwemifula yase‐Pisega." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Waza u‐Mosesi wabiza o‐Sirayeli bonke, wati kubo: Yivani, bo‐Sirayeli! izimiselo nezigwebo endizitetayo ezindlebeni zenu namhla, ukuba nizifunde, nilumkele ukuzenza." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Uyehova, utixo wetu, walwenza nati ucebano e‐Horebe." 
Deuteronomy5:3 Akalwenzanga nobawo betu ucebano olu; koko walwenza nati, tina esilapa namhla sonke sihleli." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Ubuso ngobuso wayeteta uyehova nani entabeni pakati kwomlilo," 
Deuteronomy5:5 (ndema mna pakati kwoyehova nani ngeloxesha, ukuba ndishumayele kuni ilizwi likayehova; ngokuba nibe nisoyika ngenxa yomlilo, ningenyukelanga ke kulontaba;) esiti:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wako, okukupileyo elizweni le‐Jipete, endlwini yobukoboka." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Akuyi kuba nabo otixo bambi ngapandle kwam. 
Deuteronomy5:8 Akuyi kuzenzela umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, na nye into efana nesezulwini pezulu, nesemhlabeni pantsi apa, nesemanzini pantsi kwomhlaba:" 
Deuteronomy5:9 akuyi kutoba pambi kwazo; akuyi kuzikonza kanjalo: ngokuba mna Yehova, utixo wako, ndi ngutixo onekwele, ndiyohlwayela inkohlakalo yoyise pezu kwabantwana, napezu kwesesitatu napezu kwesesine isizukulwana sabanditiyayo;" 
Deuteronomy5:10 ndiwenzela ububele amawaka abanditandayo nabayigcinayo imiyalelo yam. 
Deuteronomy5:11 Akuyi kufumana ulibize igama likayehova, utixo wako: ngokuba uyehova engayi kumyeka angabi natyala lowo ufumana elibiza igama lake." 
Deuteronomy5:12 Gcina umhla we‐Sabata, ukuba uwenze ngcwele; njengokuba ekuyalele uyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Wosebenza imihla ibe mitandatu, uwenze wonke umsebenzi wako;" 
Deuteronomy5:14 kodwa umhla wesixe̔nxe uyi‐Sabata kayehova, utixo wako; akuyi kwenza namnye umsebenzi ngawo, kwa wena, nonyana wako, nentombi yako, nesicaka sako, nesicakakazi sako, nenkabi yako, neqwaṙashe lako, nazo zonke inkomo zako, nowasemzini wako opakati kwamasango ako; ukuze kupumle isicaka sako nesicakakazi sako njengawe." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Uze ukumbule ukuba ubusisicaka elizweni le‐Jipete, nokuba uyehova, utixo wako, wakupumisa kona ngesandla esomeleleyo, nangengalo eyolulweyo: ngako oko ukuyalele uyehova, utixo wako, ukuba uwubambe umhla we‐Sabata." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Beka uyihlo nonyoko, njengokuba ekuyalele uyehova, utixo wako; ukuze kwolulwe imihla yako, nokuze kulunge kuwe, elizweni ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Akuyi kubulala. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Akuyi kuṙexeza. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Akuyi kuba̔. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Akuyi kunqi̔na ubunqi̔na obubuxoki ngakuye ummelwane wako. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Akuyi kunqwenela umfazi wommelwane wako; akuyi kukanuka indlu yommelwane wako, n entsimi yake, nesicaka sake, nesicakakazi sake, n enkabi yake, neqwaṙashe lake, nanye into eyeyommelwane wako." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Lamazwi wawateta uyehova kuwo wonke umhlambi wenu entabeni, epakati kwomlilo, n elifu, nesitokotoko, ngelizwi elikulu, engongezanga nto; waza wawaba̔la pezu kwamacwecwe amatye amabini, wawanika kum." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Kwaye kute, nxa nevayo ilizwi livela pakati kwobumnyama, (ngokuba intaba ibisitsha ngomlilo,) nandula nasondela kum, zonke intloko zezizwe zenu, nabadala benu;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 naye nisiti: Bona ke, uyehova, utixo wetu, usibonisile ubungcwalisa bake nobukulu bake, nelizwi lake silivile livela pakati kwomlilo: namhla nje sibonile ukuba uyehova uyateta nomntu, osapila noko." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Kodwa kaloku, kunganina ukuba sife? ngokuba sekuya kusigqibela lomlilo umkulu: ukuba siya kupinda ukuliva ilizwi likayehova, utixo wetu, kanjako, siya kwandula sife." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Ngokuba engubanina kuluntu lwonke oke weva ilizwi likatixo ohleliyo, eteta epakati kwomlilo, njengati, waza wapila ke?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Sondela wena, upulapule konke okuya kutetwa nguyehova, utixo wetu; uze utete kuti konke uyehova, utixo wetu, aya kuteta kona kuwe, sasiya kuva, senze nokwenza." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Waza uyehova weva ilizwi lamazwi enu, nakuteta kum; waye uyehova esiti kum: Sendivile ilizwi lamazwi abantu aba, abawatetileyo kuwe; balungisile ngako konke bakutetileyo." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Akwaba kwabekuko intliziyo enjalo kubo, yokuba bandoyike, nokuba bayigcine yonke imiyalelo yam imihla yonke; ukuze kulunge kubo nakubantwana babo kude kube ngunapakade!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Hamba, uti kubo: Buyani niye ezintenteni zenu." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kodwa wena, yima apa ngakum, ukuba nditete kuwe yonke imiyalelo, nemimiselo, nemigwebo, uya kubafundisa yona, ukuba bayenze elizweni endilinika kubo, ukuze balifuye." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Ngako niya kulumkela ukwenza njengokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, eniyalele: aniyi kupambukela nangasekunene nangasekohlo." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Niya kuhamba kuzo zonke indlela aniyalele ngazo uyehova, utixo wenu, ukuba nipile, nokuba kulunge kuni, nokuba niyolule imihla elizweni eniya kulifuya." 
Deuteronomy6:1 KEKALOKU yiyo le imiyalelo, n emimiselo, nemigwebo, owabeyalela uyehova, utixo wenu, ukuba niyifundiswe; ukuba niyenze elizweni apo niya kuwelela kona ukulifuya:" 
Deuteronomy6:2 ukuze umoyike uyehova, utixo wako, uyigcine yonke imimiselo yake nemiyalelo yake endikuyalelayo, wena, nomntwana wako, nomntwana womntwana wako, yonke imihla yokudla kwako ubomi; nokuze yolulwe imihla yako." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Pulapula ke, Sirayeli! ulumkele ukuyenza; ukuba kulunge kuwe, nokuba nande kakulu, (njengokuba etetile uyehova, utixo woyihlo bako, kuwe,) elizweni elela ubisi nobusi." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Pulapula, Sirayeli! uyehova, utixo wetu, nguyehova emnye:" 
Deuteronomy6:5 wauya kumtanda uyehova, utixo wako, ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako, nangawo onke amandla ako." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Kanjalo lamazwi, endikuyalela wona namhla, oba sentliziyweni yako:" 
Deuteronomy6:7 wauya kunyameka ukuwafundisa kubantwana bako, utete ngawo, ekuhlaleni kwako endlwini yako, nasekuhambeni kwako endleleni, nasekulaleni kwako, nasekuvukeni kwako." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Kanjako uya kuwabopa abe ngumqondiso pezu kwesandla sako, aeya kuba njengembasa pakati kwamehlo ako." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Wauya kuwaba̔la pezu kwemigubasi yendlu yako, nasemasangweni ako." 
Deuteronomy6:10 Kwaye kuya kuti, nxa uyehova, utixo wako, aya kukungenisa kwelozwe owabefungela oyihlo bako, u‐Abrahame, u‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi, ukuba alinike kuwe; izixeko ezikulu nezilungileyo ungazakanga," 
Deuteronomy6:11 nezindlu ezizele zindyebo zonke ungazizalisanga, namacibi embelweyo ungawembelanga izitiya zemiti yeveyine nezeminquma ungazityalanga; ude utye, uhlute nokuhluta:" 
Deuteronomy6:12 wandule ulumke, hleze ulibale uyehova, okukupileyo elizweni le‐Jipete, endlwini yobukoboka." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Uya kumoyika uyehova, utixo wako, umkonze yena; negama lake uya kulifunga." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Aniyi kulandela otixo bambi, abakubo otixo bentlanga eziningqongayo;" 
Deuteronomy6:15 (ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, e ngutixo onekwele pakati kwenu;) hleze ingqumbo kayehova, utixo wako, ivute ngakuwe, ikutshabalalise ebusweni bomhlaba." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Aniyi kumlinga uyehova, utixo wenu, njengokuba nibe nimlinga e‐Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Niya kukutala ukugcina imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wenu, kwa nezinqi̔nelo zake, nezimiselo zake, akuyaleleyo ngazo." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Wauya kukwenza oko kufaneleyo nokulungileyo emehlweni kayehova; ukuze kulunge kuwe, nokuba ungene ulifuye elozwe lilungileyo, owabefunga ngalo uyehova koyihlo bako," 
Deuteronomy6:19 ukuba azisantsulise zonke intshaba zako pambi kwako; njengokuba etshilo uyehova. 
Deuteronomy6:20 Xeshekweni akubuzayo unyana wako ngexesha elizayo, esiti: Ziti nina izinqi̔nelo, nezimiselo, nezigwebo, uyehova, utixo wetu, aniyaleleyo?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 uya kwandula uti kunyana wako: Sibe sizizicaka ku‐Faro e‐Jipete; kodwa uyehova wasipumisa e‐Jipete ngesandla esomeleleyo. 
Deuteronomy6:22 Waye uyehova esenza imiqondiso nemimangaliso, emikulu nemibi, pezu kwe‐Jipete, pezu kwo‐Faro, napezu kwayo yonke indlu yake, pambi kwamehlo etu;" 
Deuteronomy6:23 waza wasikupa kona, ukuze asingenise apa, ukuba asinike elozwe wabefungela obawo ngalo." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Wandula uyehova wasiyalela ukuba sizenze zonke izim selo ezi, simoyike uyehova, utixo wetu, kube kukuncedwa kwetu onke amaxesha, ukuba asilondoloze ebomini, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Kanjalo kwoba bubulungisa betu, nxa silumkela ukuyenza yonke lemiyalelo, ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wetu, njengokuba esiyalele." 
Deuteronomy7:1 XESHIKWENI uyehova, utixo wako, akungenisile kwelozwe apo uya kona ukulifuya; na xeshikweni agxotileyo intlanga ezininzi pambi kwako, ama‐Hete, nama‐Giregashe, naba‐Amori, naba‐Kanane, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi, intlanga zisixe̔nxe ezizezikulu nezinamandla ngapezu kwako;" 
Deuteronomy7:2 na xeshikweni uyehova, utixo wako, azinikileyo ebusweni bako, ukuba uzibete: uya kugqibela ukuzilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni; akuyi kulwenza nazo ucebano, akuyi kuzipata ngofefe." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Kanjako akuyi kutshatiselana nazo; intombi zako akuyi kuzendisa konyana bazo, nentombi zazo akuyi kuzitabatela onyana bako:" 
Deuteronomy7:4 ngokuba ziya kupambukisa onyana bako kum, ukuba bakonze otixo bambi; ize ivute ingqumbo kayehova ngakuni, ikutshabalalise kamsinya." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Kungokunje eniya kwenza kuzo: izibingelo zazo niya kuzicita, nezifanekiso ezimiyo zazo niya kuziqekeza, ne‐Ashera zazo niya kuzigaula, nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo yazo niya kuyitshisa ngomlilo." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Ngokuba ningabantu abangcwele nina kuyehova, utixo wenu: nina uniqashile uyehova, utixo wenu, ukuba nibe ngabantu abanqabileyo kuye, ngapezu kwabo bonke abantu abasebusweni bomhlaba." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Akungenxa yokuba baninzi kwenu ngapezu kwabo bonke abantu, anamatele kuni uyehova, waniqasha; ngokuba nibe ningabancinane kubo bonke abantu:" 
Deuteronomy7:8 kungenxa yokuba uyehova ebenitanda, nokuba ebeya kugcina isifungo owabefungele oyihlo benu ngaso, anipumisileyo uyehova ngesandla esomeleleyo, wanikulula endlwini yobukoboka, esandleni sika‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Yazi ke ngoko, ukuba uyehova, utixo wako, nguye ongutixo, lowo utixo unyanisekileyo, obagcinela ucebano nobubele abamtandayo nabayigcinayo imiyalelo yake, kude kube liwaka lezizukulwana;" 
Deuteronomy7:10 oti kanjalo apindezele kubo abamtiyayo ngasebusweni babo, ukuba ababubise; akayi kulibalela omtiyayo, wopindezela kuye ngasebusweni bake." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Ngako uya kugcina imiyalelo, nemimiselo, nemigwebo, endikuyalelayo namhla, ukuba uyenze." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Kwakuya kuti, ngokuba nipulapula lemigwebo, niyigcine, niyenze nokuyenza, kukona uyehova, utixo wako, aya kukugcinela ucebano nobubele wabefungela oyihlo bako ngabo:" 
Deuteronomy7:13 waeya kukutanda, akutamsanqele, akwandise: kanjalo uya kutamsanqela isixakato sesizalo sako, nesiqa̔mo somhlaba wako, inqolowa yako, neveyine yako, neoli yako, inzalo yemazi zako, nemihlambi yegusha zako, elizweni owabefungela oyihlo bako ukuba alinike kuwe." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Uya kutanyusanqelwa pezu kwabantu bonke; akuyi kubako pakati kwenu udlolo nodlolokazi, napakati kwenkomo zako." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Waye uyehova eya kukwelelisa kuwe zonke izikuhlane; nezifo zase‐Jipete ezibi, ezo uzaziyo, akayi kubeka nasinye pezu kwako, uya kuzibeka pezu kwabo bonke abakutiyayo." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Kanjalo uya kugqibela bonke abantu ubanikiweyo nguyehova, utixo wako; iliso lako aliyi kuba nosizi pezu kwabo; notixo babo akuyi kubakonza; ngokuba kuya kuba ngumgibe kuwe oko." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Nxa uya kuti entliziyweni yako: Zininzi ezintlanga ngapezu kwam; ndingati nina ukuzigqogqa? 
Deuteronomy7:18 akuyi kwoyika ngenxa yazo; kolisa ukukumbula oko wabekwenza uyehova, utixo wako, ku‐Faro nakuwo onke ama‐Jipete;" 
Deuteronomy7:19 ezozilingelo zikulu azibonileyo amehlo ako, nemiqondiso, nemimangaliso, nesandla esomeleleyo, nengalo eyolulweyo, owabenipumisa ngazo uyehova, utixo wako: uya kwenje njalo uyehova, utixo wako, kubo bonke abantu uboyikayo." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Kanjako uyehova, utixo wako, wotuma onomeva pakati kwabo, bade babube abo baseleyo, abafihlekileyo kuwe." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Akuyi kuba nokunkwantya pambi kwabo; ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, epakati kwenu, e ngutixo omkulu nowoyikekayo." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Waye uyehova, utixo wako, eya kugxota intlanga ezo pambi kwako ngento encinane nangento encinane: akuyi kunxama ukuzigqibela hleze ziya kwanda pezu kwako izilo zasendle." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Koko uyehova, utixo wako, eya kuzinika ebusweni bako, azipitizelise ngempitizeliso enkulu, zide zitshatyalaliswe." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Nokumkani bazo wobanika esandleni sako, wauya kububisa igama lazo pantsi kwezulu; akuko mntu oya kuma pambi kwako, ungekazitshabalalisanga." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yotixo bazo niya kuyitshisa ngomlilo; akuyi kunqwenela isilivere umhlaumbi igolide epezu kwayo, akuyi kuyitabatela kuwe kanjalo, hleze utiyelwe ngayo: ngokuba iyintshontsho kuyehova, utixo wako, yona." 
Deuteronomy7:26 Kanjako akuyi kungenisa into eyintshontsho endlwini yako, hleze ube yinto elahlelwe ekutshatyalalisweni njengayo: uya kugqibela ukuyitiya, uya kugqibela nokuyizonda: ngokuba iyinto elahlelwe ekutshatyalalisweni yona." 
Deuteronomy8:1 YONKE imiyalelo endikuyalelayo namhla niya kulumkela ukuyenza, ukuze nipile, nande, ningene, nilifuye ilizwe owabe uyehova efungela oyihlo benu ngalo." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Wauya kukumbula yonke indlela akuhambisile ngayo uyehova, utixo wako, leminyaka ingamashumi mane, entlango, ukuze akutobe, akulinge, aze akwazi okusentliziyweni yako, ukuba uya kugcina imiyalelo yake, unga yigcini kusinina." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Wakutoba ke, wakulambisa, waza wakudlisa imana, into ubungayazi, abebengayazi noyihlo bako; ukuze akwazise ukuba akungaso isonka sodwa apilayo umntu, koko kungako konke okupumayo emlonyeni kayehova apilayo umntu." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Izivato zako aziguganga pezu kwako, nonyawo lwako aludumbanga, leminyaka ingamashumi mane." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Uya kwazi kanjalo entliziyweni yako, ukuba, njengokuba umntu emohlwaya unyana wake, uyehova, utixo wako, uyohlwaya wena." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Ngako uya kugcina imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wako, ukuba uhambe ezindleleni zake, nokuba umoyike." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, ekuzisa elizweni elilungileyo, ilizwe lemilanjana yamanzi, lemitombo nenzulu, epumayo emihlanjeni nasezintabeni;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 ilizwe lenqolowa, neṙalasi, nemiti yeveyine, nemikiwane, negranate; ilizwe leminquma yeoli nobusi;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 ilizwe uya kusitya isonka kulo kungeko buhlwempu, apo ungayi kuswela luto kona; ilizwe elimatye asisincete, nelintaba uya kumbela ubedu kuzo." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Xeshikweni nityileyo nahluta nokuhluta, uya kumbonga uyehova, utixo wako, ngenxa yelolizwe lilungileyo ulipiwe nguye." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Lumka ke, ukuba ungalibali uyehova, utixo wako, ngokungagcini imiyalelo yake, nemigwebo yake, nemimiselo yake, endikuyalelayo namhla:" 
Deuteronomy8:12 hleze uti, nxa uya kutya uhlute nokuhluta, wake izindlu ezintle, uhlale kuzo," 
Deuteronomy8:13 ziti nenkomo zako negusha zako zibe zininzi, kwa nesilivere negolide ikwandele, nako konke unako kwande ke;" 
Deuteronomy8:14 yandule ipakame intliziyo yako, ukuba ulibale uyehova, utixo wako, okukupileyo elizweni le‐Jipete, endlwini yobukoboka;" 
Deuteronomy8:15 owakuhambisayo kulontlango inkulu eyoyikekayo, apo zikoyo inyoka ezibumliloṙa, nonomadudwane, nokwoma, apo kungeko amanzi kona; owakupumisela amanzi eweni lelitye elilukuni;" 
Deuteronomy8:16 owakudlisayo imana entlango, into bebengayazi oyihlo bako, ukuze akutobe, nokuze akulinge, ukuba akwenzele okulungileyo ekupeleni kwako;" 
Deuteronomy8:17 ude uti entliziyweni yako: Amandla am, nokwomelela kwesandla sam kundenzele ubutyebi obu." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Kodwa uya kukumbula uyehova, utixo wako, ukuba nguye okunikayo amandla okwenza ubutyebi; ukuze aluqinise ucebano lwake, abefungela oyihlo bako ngalo njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje" 
Deuteronomy8:19 Koko kuya kuti, nxa uka ulibale uyehova, utixo wako, uze ulandele otixo bambi, ubakonze, uziqubude pambi kwabo, ndiyanqi̔na ngakuni namhla, ukuba niya kububa ngenyaniso." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Njengentlanga azibubisayo uyehova pambi kwenu, niya kububa njalo; ngenxa yokuba beningayi kuliva ilizwi likayehova, utixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 PULAPULA, Sirayeli! uya kuwela namhla i‐Yoredane, ukuba uye ufuye okwentlanga ezizezikulu nezinamandla pezu kwako; izixeko ezikulu ezinqatyiselweyo ngasezulwini;" 
Deuteronomy9:2 abantu abakulu, abade, usapo lwama‐Hanaki, olo ulwaziyo, novileyo ngalo ukuti: Ngubanina ongemayo ebusweni bosapo luka‐Hanaki?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Yazi ke namhla, ukuba uyehova, utixo wako, unguye oya kuwela pambi kwako, ongumlilo odlayo; nguye oya kubatshabalalisa, nguye oya kubatobisa ebusweni bako; wauya kubagqogqa, ubabubise kamsinya, njengokuba etetile uyehova kuwe." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Ungatsho entliziyweni yako, nxa uyehova, utixo wako, abasantsulisile pambi kwako, usiti: Kungokulunga kwam andingenisile uyehova ukuza kulifuya elilizwe: ngokuba kungokukohlakala kwezintlanga uyehova azigqogqayo pambi kwako." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Akungokulunga kwako, nangolungelelwano lwentliziyo yako, uyayo ukulifuya ilizwe lazo: koko kungokukohlakala kwezintlanga uyehova, utixo wako, azigqogqayo pambi kwako, nangokuba eya kuliqinisa ilizwi, owabefunga ngalo uyehova koyihlo bako, ku‐Abrahame, ku‐Yisake, naku‐Yakobi." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Yazi ngoko, ukuba akungokulunga kwako uyehova, utixo wako, akupayo elilizwe lilungileyo ukulifuya: ngokuba ungabantu abantamo ilukuni." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Kumbula, ungalibali, okokuba ubuqumbisa uyehova, utixo wako, entlango: kwa kulowamhla nibe nipuma ngawo ezweni le‐Jipete, nide nafika kulendawo, nivukelene noyehova." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Nase‐Horebe nibe niqumbisa uyehova, wada wati uyehova waniqumbela ukunitshabalalisa." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Xeshekweni ndibe ndinyukele entabeni apo, ukuya kuwamkela amacwecwe amatye, amacwecwe ocebano owabelwenzile nani uyehova, ndandula ndahlala entabeni imini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane, isonka ndingasityanga, namanzi ndingawaselanga:" 
Deuteronomy9:10 waye uyehova wanika kum amacwecwe amatye amabini, eba̔lelwe ngomnwe katixo; napezu kwawo kwaba̔lwa njengawo onke amazwi, abewatetile uyehova kuni entabeni epakati kwomlilo, ngomhla wentlanganisano." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Kwaza kwati, ekupeleni kwemini ezimashumi mane nobusuku obumashumi mane, uyehova wanika kum lawo amacwecwe amatye amabini, amacwecwe ocebano." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Wayesiti uyehova kum: Suka, nxama uhle apa; ngokuba abantu bako, abo ubakupileyo e‐Jipete, sebezonakalisile; bapambukile kamsinya endleleni endibe ndibayalela ngayo; bazenzele umfanekiso otyityishiweyo." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Walekela wateta uyehova kum, esiti: Ndibabonile abantu aba; kekaloku, bona ke, bangabantu abantamo ilukuni:" 
Deuteronomy9:14 ndiyeke, ukuba ndibatshabalalise, ndicime igama labo pantsi kwezulu; ndandiya kukwenza wena ube luhlanga olunamandla nolukulu pezu kwabo." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Ndada ndajika, ndehla entabeni; yati intaba yatsha ngomlilo: aye lo macwecwe amabini ocebano ebesezandleni zam zozibini." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ndaza ndakangela, kekaloku bona ke, nibe nonile ngakuye uyehova, utixo wenu; nibe nizenzele itole elityityishiweyo; nibe nipambukile kamsinya endleleni abeniyalele ngayo uyehova." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ndaza ndabamba amacwecwe lawo omabini, ndawalahla ezandleni zam zozibini, ndawaqekeza emehlweni enu." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Ndandul’ ukuziwisa pambi kwoyehova, njengasekuqaleni, imini zamashumi mane nobusuku bakwa mashumi mane; isonka bendingasidli, namanzi bendingawaseli; ngenxa yazo zonke izono zenu enibe nonile ngazo, ngokwenza okubi emehlweni kayehova ukumqumbisa." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Ngokuba bendisoyikela ingqumbo nomsindo abequmbile ngawo uyehova pezu kwenu ukunitshabalalisa. Kodwa uyehova wabepulapula kum nangeloxesha. 
Deuteronomy9:20 Kanjako u‐Arone uyehova wabemqumbela kunene ukumtshabalalisa; koko ndabenditandazela no‐Arone ngexesha elo. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Nesono senu, itole enibe nilenzile, lona ndalitabata, ndalitshisa ngomlilo, ndalinqusha, ndikolisa ukulisila, lada lacoleka njengotuli; ndaza ndaluposa utuli lwalo emlanjaneni owehlayo entabeni." 
Deuteronomy9:22 (Kwa nase‐Tabera, nase‐Masa, nase‐Kibrote‐hatava, nibe nimqumbisa uyehova." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Kanjako nxa uyehova wanisusayo e‐Kadeshe‐baneha, esiti: Nyukani niye nilifuye elozwe nilipiwe ndim; nandula navukela umteto kayehova, utixo wenu, ningakolwanga nguye, ningapulapulanga nelizwi lake." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Nivukelene noyehova kuselokwalomhla bendinazi ngawo.) 
Deuteronomy9:25 Kwa njalo ndaziwisa pantsi ebusweni bukayehova, ezomini zimashumi mane nobusuku bukwa mashumi mane, njengoko bendiziwisile pantsi ekuqaleni; ngokuba ebete uyehova uya kunitshabalalisa." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ndaza ndatandaza kuyehova, ndati: Nkosi, Yehova! zungabubisi abantu bako nelifa lako, obakululeyo ngobukulu bako, obapumisileyo e‐Jipete ngesandla esomeleleyo." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Kumbulela izicaka zako, u‐Abrahame, u‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi; zungabeki kubo ubulukuni babantu aba, nakuyo inkohlakalo yabo, nakuso isono sabo;" 
Deuteronomy9:28 hleze liti elozwe ubusipumisa kulo: Ngenxa yokuba ebekohliwe uyehova ukubangenisa elizweni, owabetetile ngalo kubo, nokuba wabatiya, kukona abapumisileyo ukuba abafise entlango." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Noko bangabantu bako nelifa lako, owabubapumisa ngamandla ako amakulu nangengalo yako eyolulweyo." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Kwa ngeloxesha wati uyehova kum: Zibazele amacwecwe amatye abe mabini njengawokuqala, uze unyukele kum entabeni; uzenzele netyeya yemiti." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Ndandiya kuba̔la pezu kwalamacwecwe amazwi abesemacwecweni okuqala, owauwaqekezile; wona uya kuwabeka etyeyeni leyo." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Ndaza ndayenza ityeya ngemiti yeshitime, ndawabaza amacwecwe amatye amabini njengawokuqala: ndasuka ndenyukela entabeni, ndinamacwecwe lawo omabini esandleni sam." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Wandula waba̔la pezu kwalamacwecwe, njengokuba̔lwa kwokuqala, amazwi alishumi, owawatetayo uyehova kuni entabeni, epakati kwomlilo, ngomhla wentlanganisano: waye uyehova ewanika kum." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Ndajika ke, ndehla entabeni, ndawabeka amacwecwe lawo etyeyeni endibe ndiyenzile; ako kwa kona, njengokuba uyehova wabendiyalela." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Kekaloku usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwanduluka e‐Berote‐bene‐yahakane, lwaya e‐Mosera: apo wabuba u‐Arone, wancw̔atyelwa apo kanjalo; waza u‐Elezari unyana wake wakonza ngobuperisite esikundleni sake." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Lwanduluka kona, lwaya e‐Gudegoda; lwanduluka nase‐Gudegoda, lwaya e‐Yotebata, ilizwe lemilanjana yamanzi.)" 
Deuteronomy10:8 Wati uyehova ngexesha elo, wahlula isizwe sika‐Levi ukuba sitwale ityeya yocebano lukayehova, n okuba sime ebusweni bukayehova ukumkonza, nokuba sitamsanqelise ngegama lake, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ngako oko u‐Levi akanasabelwa nalifa kunye nabazalwana bake; nguyehova ilifa lake, njengokuba uyehova, utixo wako, etshilo kuye." 
Deuteronomy10:10 Kwa njalo ndahlala entabeni, njengasemihleni yapambili, imini zamashumi mane nobusuku bakwa mashumi mane; waye uyehova epulapula kum nangexesha elo, engavumi uyehova ukukububisa." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Koko wati uyehova kum: Suka, hamba ukuya kunduluka pambi kwabantu, ukuba bangene balifuye ilizwe, endifungele oyise babo ukuba ndibape lona." 
Deuteronomy10:12 NAKALOKU, Sirayeli! yinto nina uyehova, utixo wako, ayibiza kuwe, kupela ukuba umoyike uyehova, utixo wako, ukuba uhambe kuzo zonke indlela zake, nokuba umtande, nokuba umkonze uyehova, utixo wako, ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako," 
Deuteronomy10:13 ukuba ugcine imiyalelo kayehova, nemimiselo yake, endikuyalelayo namhla, kube kukulunga kwako?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 Bona ke, izulu le likayehova, utixo wako, nezulu lamazulu, umhlaba, nako konke okukuwo." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Kodwa uyehova wanamatela koyihlo bako ukuba abatande, wayeqasha nenzalo yabo emva kwabo, kwa nina, ngapezu kwabo bonke abantu, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Yalusani ngoko ijwabu lentliziyo yenu, nentamo yenu ningabuyi niyenze lukuni." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, e ngutixo wotixo, nenkosi yenkosi; lowo utixo omkulu, onamandla, owoyikekayo, ongabuki ubuso, ongamkeli nebaso;" 
Deuteronomy10:18 elungisa ityala lenkedama nomhlolokazi; etanda owasemzini, ukuba ampe isonka nezivato." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Ngako niya kumtanda owasemzini; ngokuba nibe ningabasemzini elizweni le‐Jipete. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Uyehova, utixo wako, uya kumoyika, umkonze yena; wonamatela kuye, negama lake ulifunge." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Nguye oyindumiso yako, nguye ongutixo wako; lowo okwenzele ezizinto zinkulu nezoyikekayo, ezona azibonileyo amehlo ako." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Oyihlo bako behlela e‐Jipete beyimipefumlo ingamashumi asixe̔nxe; kanti kaloku, uyehova, utixo wako, ukwenzile njengenkwenkwezi zezulu ukuba baninzi." 
Deuteronomy11:1 Kukona uya kutanda uyehova, utixo wako, ugcine umyalezelo wake, nezimiselo zake, nezigwebo zake, nemiyalelo yake, ngamaxesha onke." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Yazini ke namhla, ukuba andi teti nabantwana benu, abangazanga nabangabonanga isohlwayo sikayehova, utixo wenu; ubukulu bake, isandla sake esomeleleyo, nengalo yake eyolulweyo;" 
Deuteronomy11:3 nemiqondiso yake, nezenzo zake, abezenza pakati kwe‐Jipete, ku‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, nakulo lonke ilizwe lake;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 noko abekwenza empini yama‐Jipete, emahasheni awo, nasezinqwelweni zawo zokulwa, okokuba welisa amanzi olwandle olubomvu pezu kwawo, nxa aniputumayo, nokuba wawatshabalalisa kwada kwanamhla;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 noko abekwenza kuni entlango, nada nafika kulendawo;" 
Deuteronomy11:6 noko abekwenza ku‐Datane naku‐Abirame, onyana baka‐Eliyabe, unyana ka‐Rubene, okokuba umhlaba wakamisa umlomo wawo, wabaginya, kwa nabendlu zabo, nentente zabo, nako konke okuhleliyo okube kulunge kubo, pakati kwo‐Sirayeli bonke:" 
Deuteronomy11:7 ngokuba amehlo enu ewubonile wonke lomsebenzi omkulu kayehova abewenza. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Yigcineni ngoko yonke imiyalelo endiniyalelayo namhla; ukuze nibe nomelele, niye nilifuye ilizwe, eniwelela kona ukuba nilifuye;" 
Deuteronomy11:9 nokuze nolule imihla pezu kwalomhlaba, uyehova wafungela oyihlo benu ukuba wowunika kubo nakwinzalo yabo; ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ngokuba ilizwe, apo uya kona ukuba ulifuye, lingenjengelizwe le‐Jipete lona, apo navela kona, apo wahlwayelayo imbewu yako, wayinyela ngonyawo lwako, njengesitiya semifuno:" 
Deuteronomy11:11 kodwa ilizwe, eniwelela kona ukuba nilifuye, lilizwe lentaba nemihlambo; liyasela amanzi ngemvula yezulu:" 
Deuteronomy11:12 lilizwe uyehova, utixo wako, alikatalelayo: kufuti amehlo kayehova, utixo wako, apezu kwalo, kwa sekuqaleni kwomnyaka nakude kube sekupeleni kwomnyaka." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Kwakuya kuti, nxa niya kukutala ukupulapula imiteto yam endiniyalelayo namhla, yokuba nimtande uyehova, utixo wenu, nokuba nimkonze ngayo yonke intliziyo yenu nangawo wonke umpefumlo wenu;" 
Deuteronomy11:14 ndiya kwandula ndinike imvula yomhlaba wenu ngexesha layo, eyapambili imvula neyasemva imvula; ukuze ubute inqolowa yako, neveyine yako, neoli yako." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Ndandiya kunika inca ezindleni zako ibe yeyenkomo zako; wauya kutya uhlute nokuhluta. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Zilumkeleni, hleze intliziyo yenu ihendwe, nide nipambuke, nikonze otixo bambi, nitobe pambi kwabo;" 
Deuteronomy11:17 yandule ivute ingqumbo kayehova ngakuni, ade avingce izulu, ukuba ingabiko imvula, nokuba umhlaba unganiki ukuhluma kwawo; nize nibube kamsinya kwelolizwe lilungileyo enilipiwayo nguyehova." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Ngako lamazwi am uya kuwabeka entliziyweni yenu, nasempefumlweni wenu; nowabopa abe ngumqondiso pezu kwesandla senu, aeya kuba njengembasa pakati kwamehlo enu:" 
Deuteronomy11:19 naniya kuwafundisa kubantwana benu, nitete ngawo, ekuhlaleni kwako endlwini yako nasekuhambeni kwako endleleni, nasekulaleni kwako, nasekuvukeni kwako:" 
Deuteronomy11:20 kanjako uya kuwaba̔la pezu kwemigubasi yendlu yako, nasemasangweni ako:" 
Deuteronomy11:21 kuze kwolulwe imihla yenu, nemihla yabantwana benu, kwelolizwe wabefungela oyihlo benu uyehova ukuba alinike kubo, njengemihla yezulu pezu kwomhlaba." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Ngokuba xeshekweni nikutala ukugcina yonke lemiyalelo endiniyalelayo ukuba niyenze, yokuba nimtande uyehova, utixo wenu, nihambe kuzo zonke indlela zake, ninamatele nokunamatela kuye;" 
Deuteronomy11:23 woti uyehova agqogqe zonke ezintlanga kwa pambi kwenu, naniya kufuya okwentlanga ezizezinkulu nezinamandla pezu kwenu." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Zonke indawo, uya kunyatela kuzo umzantsi wenyawo zenu, zoba zezenu: kutabata entlango ne‐Lebanone, na kuwo umlambo, umlambo ongum‐Ferate, nakude kube lulwandle lwasemva, kwoba ngumda wenu." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Akuko mntu oya kuba nokuma pambi kwenu: ukunkwantywa kwenu nokwoyikwa kwenu wokubeka uyehova, utixo wenu, pezu kwawo wonke umhlaba eniya kunyatela kuwo, njengokuba etshilo kuni." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Bona ke, ndiyabeka ebusweni benu namhla nje itamsanqeliso nesiqalekiso:" 
Deuteronomy11:27 itamsanqeliso, nxa nivayo imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wenu, endiniyalelayo namhla;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 nesiqalekiso, ukuba aniyi kuva imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wenu, nipambuka endleleni endiniyalela ngayo namhla, ukuya kulandela otixo bambi, abo nibe ningabazi." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Kwakuya kuti, nxa uyehova, utixo wako, akungenisile elizweni apo uya kona ukulifuya, niya kwandula ninike itamsanqeliso pezu kwentaba ye‐Gerizime, nesiqalekiso pezu kwentaba ye‐Hebali." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Ezo ntaba azipesheya kwe‐Yoredane na, emva kwendlela ngasekutshoneni kwelanga, elizweni laba‐Kanane, abahleliyo etafeni, malungana ne‐Gilegale, kufupi neyeke zika‐More?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Ngokuba niya kuwela i‐Yoredane, ukuya kulifuya elozwe enilipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wenu; naniya kulifuya, nihlale nokuhlala kulo." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Lumkelani ngoko ukuzenza zonke izimiselo nezigwebo, endizibekayo pambi kwenu namhla nje." 
Deuteronomy12:1 ZIZO ezi izimiselo nezigwebo, eniya kulumkela ukuzenza kwelozwe enilipiwayo nguyehova, utixo woyihlo benu, ukuba nilifuye, yonke imihla eniya kubudla ubomi ngayo pezu kwomhlaba." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Niya kugqibela ukutshabalalisa zonke indawo, apo intlanga eniya kufuya okwazo zibe zikonza kona otixo bazo, pezu kwentaba ezinde, napezu kwenduli, nangapantsi kwayo yonke imiti eluhlaza:" 
Deuteronomy12:3 naniya kuzicita izibingelo zazo, niziqekeze izifanekiso ezimiyo zazo, ne‐Ashera zazo nizitshise ngomlilo, nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo yotixo bazo niyigaule, namagama abo niwatshabalalise kulondawo." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Aniyi kwenje njalo kuyehova, utixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Kodwa kwindawo aya kunyula yona uyehova, utixo wenu, kuzo zonke izizwe zenu, ukuba abeke igama lake kona, kwintlalo yake niya kufuna, niye kwa lapo ke." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Naniya kuzisa kona apo amadini okutshiswa enu, nemibingo yenu, nezishumi zenu, nomnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa wesandla senu, nezibambiso zenu, neminikelo yesisa yenu, namazibulo enkomo zenu nawegusha zenu." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Naniya kutya kona apo ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wenu, nivuye kuko konke enisolulele kona isandla senu, nina nendlu zenu, akutamsanqele ngako uyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Aniyi kwenza njengako konke sikwenzayo apa namhla; abanye ngabanye besenza okusukuba kufanele kwawabo amehlo. 
Deuteronomy12:9 Ngokuba kwada kwakaloku ningafikanga ekupumleni naselifeni, enilipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Kodwa niya kuwela i‐Yoredane, nihlale kwelozwe uyehova, utixo wenu, aya kunamkelisa ilifa lalo; waeya kunipumza kuzo zonke intshaba zenu ezingqongayo, nide nihlale ngokunqaba." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Oko kuya kubako indawo, aya kuyinyula uyehova, utixo wenu, ukuba alimise kona igama lake; kwa lapo niya kuzisa konke endiniyalela ngako: amadini okutshiswa enu, nemibingo yenu, izishumi zenu, nomnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa wesandla senu, nazo zonke izibambiso zenu ezidluliseleyo enibambisa ngazo kuyehova:" 
Deuteronomy12:12 naniya kuvuya ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wenu, nina, nonyana benu, nentombi zenu, nezicaka zenu, nezicakakazi zenu, nom‐Levi opakati kwamasango enu; ngokuba kungeko kuye isabelwa nelifa kunye nani." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Zilumkele, ukuba unganikeli amadini okutshiswa ako kuzo zonke indawo uya kuzibona:" 
Deuteronomy12:14 koko endaweni uyehova aya kunyula yona kwesinye sezizwe zakowenu, kwa lapo uya kunikela amadini okutshiswa ako, nalapo uya kukwenza konke endikuyalela ngako." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Kodwa ungabinga utye inyama ngako konke ukukanuka kwompefumlo wako, njengetamsanqa likayehova, utixo wako, ulipiweyo nguye, pakati kwawo onke amasango ako: onco̔lileyo nococekileyo bangayidla, njengebadi nanjengexama." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kupela igazi aniyi kulidla; lona noligalela pezu kwomhlaba njengamanzi. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Akungetye pakati kwamasango ako isishumi senqolowa yako, neseveyine yako, neseoli yako, nawo amazibulo enkomo zako nawegusha zako, nazo zonke izibambiso zako obambisileyo ngazo, neminikelo yesisa yako, nomnikelo wokufunqufunqulwa wesandla sako:" 
Deuteronomy12:18 koko kupambi kwoyehova, utixo wako, uya kuzidla, endaweni aya kunyula yona uyehova, utixo wako, wena, nonyana wako, nentombi yako, nesicaka sako, nesicakakazi sako, nom‐Levi opakati kwamasango ako: wauya kuvuya pambi kwoyehova, utixo wako, kuko konke usolulela kona isandla sako." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Zilumkele, ukuba ungamshiyi um‐Levi, yonke imihla yako emhlabeni wako." 
Deuteronomy12:20 Xeshekweni uyehova, utixo wako, aya kuwenza banzi umda wako, njengokuba etshilo kuwe, ude uti: Ndoyidla inyama; ngokuba umpefumlo wako ukanuka ukudla inyama; ngako konke ukukanuka kwompefumlo wako ungayidla inyama." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Nxa ikude kuwe londawo uyehova, utixo wako, ayinyulileyo ukuba alibeke igama lake kona, uya kwandula ubinge kwinkomo zako, nakwigusha zako, ozipiweyo nguyehova, njengokuba ndikuyalele; wauya kutya pakati kwamasango ako ngako konke ukukanuka kwompefumlo wako." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Kwa njengokuba kutyiwa ibadi nexama, kunjalo uya kutya zona: onco̔lileyo nococekileyo bofana ukuzitya kwabo." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kodwa qinisa ukuba ungalidli igazi; ngokuba igazi libubomi: nobomi akuyi kubudla kunye nenyama. 
Deuteronomy12:24 Akuyi kulidla; woligalela pezu kwomhlaba njengamanzi. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Akuyi kulidla; ukuze kulunge kuwe, nakubantwana bako emva kwako, nxa uya kukwenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Kodwa izinto ezingcwele zako oya kuba nazo, nezibambiso zako, wozitabata, uye kulondawo aya kunyula yona uyehova;" 
Deuteronomy12:27 wauya kunikela amadini okutshiswa ako, inyama negazi, pezu kwesibingelo sikayehova, utixo wako: loti igazi lemibingo yako ligalelwe pezu kwesibingelo sikayehova, utixo wako, nenyama uya kuyidla." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Lumka uwapulapule onke lamazwi endikuyalelayo, ukuze kulunge kuwe, nakubantwana bako emva kwako, kude kube ngunapakade, nxa uya kukwenza okulungileyo nokufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Nxa uyehova, utixo wako, aya kucita intlanga, apo uya kona ukufuya okwazo, pambi kwako; ude ukufuye esikundleni sazo, uhlale nokuhlala elizweni lazo;" 
Deuteronomy12:30 zilumkele, ukuba ungatiyelwa emva kwazo, emvenikweni zitshatyalalisiwe pambi kwako; nokuba ungabuzi ngotixo bazo, usiti: Zibe zisenje njanina ezintlanga ukukonza otixo bazo? sendiya kwenje njalo nam." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Akuyi kwenje njalo kuyehova, utixo wako: ngokuba konke okuyintshontsho kuyehova, oko akutiyayo, zikwenzele otixo bazo; ngokuba kwa nonyana bazo nentombi zazo zibatshisile emlilweni kotixo bazo." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Zonke izinto endiniyalela ngazo, niya kulumkela ukuzenza; akuyi kwongeza kuzo, akuyi kususa kuzo kanjako." 
Deuteronomy13:1 NXA kuvuka pakati kwenu umprofite, umhlaumbi umpupi wamapupa, okunikayo umqondiso, umhlaumbi ummangaliso;" 
Deuteronomy13:2 uze uhle lomqondiso, umhlaumbi lommangaliso, abeteta ngawo kuwe, esiti: Masilandele otixo bambi, abo ungabazanga, sibakonze;" 
Deuteronomy13:3 akuyi kupulapula kuwo amazwi alomprofite, umhlaumbi kuye lompupi wamapupa: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, enilinga, ukuze azi ukuba niyamtanda uyehova, utixo wenu, ngayo yonke intliziyo yenu, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wenu, kusinina." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Niya kumlandela uyehova, utixo wenu, nimoyike yena; nemiyalelo yake niya kuyigcina, nelizwi lake noliva; naniya kumkonza yena, ninamatele kuye." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Kanti lomprofite, umhlaumbi lompupi wamapupa, uya kufiswa: ngokuba etetile impambuko ngakuye uyehova, utixo wenu, obenikupa ezweni le‐Jipete, wanikulula endlwini yobukoboka; ukuze akukukulise endleleni akuyaleleyo uyehova, utixo wako, ukuba uhambe kuyo. Kwa njalo uya kukwelelisa inkohlakalo pakati kwenu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Nxa umninawe wako, unyana wonyoko, umhlaumbi unyana wako, umhlaumbi intombi yako, umhlaumbi umfazi wesifuba sako, umhlaumbi umhlobo wako, onjengowako umpefumlo, aya kukuhenda ngasese, esiti: Masiye sikonze otixo bambi, abo ungabazanga, wena noyihlo bako;" 
Deuteronomy13:7 abakubo otixo babantu abaningqongayo, abakufupi kuwe, umhlaumbi abakude nawe, kwa kwenye incam yomhlaba kude kube nakwenye incam yomhlaba;" 
Deuteronomy13:8 akuyi kuvumelana naye, akuyi kupulapula kuye kanjalo; iliso lako aliyi kuba nosizi pezu kwake, akuyi kuba nanceba kuye, akuyi kumzimeza;" 
Deuteronomy13:9 koko uya kumbulala ngenyaniso; esako isandla soba pezu kwake kuqala ukumfisa, nesandla sabantu bonke kamva." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Wauya kumgibisela ngamatye, ade afe: ngokuba ebefuna ukukukukulisa kuyehova, utixo wako, okukupileyo ezweni le‐Jipete, endlwini yobukoboka." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Baye o‐Sirayeli bonke beya kuva, boyike, bangapindi ukwenza njengalento ekohlakeleyo pakati kwenu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Nxa uya kuva kwesinye sezixeko zakowenu, ozipiweyo nguyehova, utixo wako, ukuba uhlale kona, kusitwa:" 
Deuteronomy13:13 Kupumile amadoda, usapo lwobunginingini, kuni, akukulisileyo abemi besixeko sawo, esiti: Masiye sikonze otixo bambi, abo eningabazanga;" 
Deuteronomy13:14 uya kwandula ukufuna, upengulule, ukolise ukubuza: kekaloku bona ke, ukuba kuyinene, nokuba kuyinto eqinileyo, okokuba kwenziwe leyonto ebuntshontsho pakati kwenu;" 
Deuteronomy13:15 uya kugqibela ukubabeta abemi besixeko eso ngohlangoti lweṙele, usilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni, nako konke okukuso, nenkomo zaso, ngohlangoti lweṙele." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Nalo lonke ixoba laso wolibutela pakati kwesitarate saso, ugqibele ukutshisa ngomlilo esosixeko nalo lonke ixoba laso, kuyehova, utixo wako: sasiya kuba yimfumba kude kube ngunapakade; asiyi kubuya sakiwe." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Kanjalo akuyi kunamatela nto esandleni sako koko kulahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni: ukuze aguquke uyehova ebushushwini bengqumbo yake, akwenzele izibele, akupate ngenceba, akwandise, njengokuba efungele oyihlo bako;" 
Deuteronomy13:18 nxa uya kupulapula ilizwi likayehova, utixo wako, lokuba ugcine yonke imiyalelo yake endikuyalelayo namhla, yokuba ukwenze okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy14:1 NINA nilusapo lukayehova, utixo wenu: aniyi kuziqapula, aniyi kwenza ubunqai pakati kwamehlo enu kanjako, ngenxa yofileyo." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Ngokuba ningabantu abangcwele nina kuyehova, utixo wenu; kanjalo nina uniqashile uyehova, utixo wenu, ukuba nibe ngabantu abanqabileyo kuye, ngapezu kwabo bonke abantu abasebusweni bomhlaba." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Akuyi kutya nanye into eyintshontsho. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Zizo ezi izilo eniya kuzidla: inkomo, igusha, nebokwe;" 
Deuteronomy14:5 ixama, nebadi, neliza, nentlangu, newula, nembabala, nempunzi." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Nazo zonke izilo ezilwahlula upupu, ezicanda upupu ezahlulweni zibini, ezihlafuna umtyiso, pakati kwezilo, ezona niya kuzidla." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ezi noko aniyi kuzidla kwezo zityisayo, nakwezo zilwahlulayo upupu olucandekileyo: inkamela, nomvundla, nembila; ngokuba ezi zihlafuna umtyiso, kodwa upupu azilwahluli; zinco̔lile zona kuni:" 
Deuteronomy14:8 nehangu, ngokuba leyo ilwahlula upupu, kodwa ayityisi; inco̔lile yona kuni: kwinyama yazo aniyi kudla, nesidumbu sazo aniyi kusicukumisa." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Ezi niya kuzidla kwezo zonke ezisemanzini: zonke ezinamapiko nenkwetu niya kuzidla. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Kodwa zonke ezingenamapiko nenkwetu aniyi kuzidla; zinco̔lile zona kuni. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Zonke intaka ezicocekileyo niya kuzidla. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Kodwa ezi zeningayi kudla kuzo: ukozi, nengqanga, nonomakwezane," 
Deuteronomy14:13 nesanxa, nexalanga limhlope, nexalanga limnyama ngemmilo yalo;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 nabo bonke onomyai ngemmilo yabo; 
Deuteronomy14:15 nenciniba, nondebeza, nogwidi, nontloyiya ngemmilo yake;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 nesikova, nentsikizi, nelowe," 
Deuteronomy14:17 nencwangube, nengqo, nokwalimanzi," 
Deuteronomy14:18 neṙaside, noqimgqoshe ngemmilo yake, noboboyi, nelulwane." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Kanjalo zonke izinambuzane ezinamapiko zoba yintshontsho kuni; aziyi kudliwa. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Zonke intaka ezicocekileyo ningazidla. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Aniyi kudla nasinye isidumbu: uya kusinika kowasemzini opakati kwamasango ako, ukuba asidle yena; umhlaumbi ungatengisa ngaso kowolunye uhlanga; ngokuba ningabantu abangcwele nina kuyehova, utixo wenu. Musa ukupeka itakane lebokwe elubisini lwonina." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Uya kunika ngenyaniso izishumi zako konke ukuvelisa kwembewu yako, epumayo entsimini umnyaka ngomnyaka." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Wauya kutya pambi kwoyehova, utixo wako, endaweni aya kuyinyula ukuba alimise igama lake kona, isishumi senqolowa yako, eseveyine yako, neseoli yako, namazibulo enkomo zako nawegusha zako; ukuze ufunde ukwoyika uyehova, utixo wako, imihla yonke." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Naxeshekweni indlela inde kuwe, ukuba ukohliwe kukusitwala, ngokuba ikude nawe indawo aya kuyinyula uyehova, utixo wako, ukuba alibeke igama lake kona; nxa akutamsanqeleyo uyehova, utixo wako:" 
Deuteronomy14:25 uya kwandula usanane ngemali, uyibope imali leyo esandleni sako, uye kulondawo, uyehova, utixo wako, aya kunyula yona;" 
Deuteronomy14:26 uze unike imali leyo ngenxa yako konke ukukanukayo umpefumlo wako, ngenxa yenkomo, nangenxa yegusha, nangenxa yeveyine, nangenxa yoselo olunamandla, nangenxa yako konke umpefumlo wako ukubiza kuwe; wauya kutya apo pambi kwoyehova, utixo wako, uvuye nokuvuya, wena nendlu yako:" 
Deuteronomy14:27 nom‐Levi opakati kwamasango ako akuyi kumshiya; ngokuba kungeko kuye isabelwa nelifa kunye nawe. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Ekupeleni kweminyaka mitatu uya kukupa sonke isishumi senzuzo yako, kwa ngomnyaka lowo, usibekele pakati kwamasango ako:" 
Deuteronomy14:29 ukuba makuze um‐Levi, (ngokuba kungeko kuye isabelwa nelifa kunye nawe,) nowasemzini, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi, abapakati kwamasango ako, badle bahlute nokuhluta; ukuze uyehova, utixo wako, akutamsanqele kuwo wonke umsebenzi wesandla sako owenzayo." 
Deuteronomy15:1 EKUPELENI kweminyaka esixe̔nxe uya kukwenza ukuyeka. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Yiyo le indawo yokuyeka: Osukuba engumboleki, obolekayo ummelwane wake into, makayiyeke; akayi kuyibanga kummelwane wake nakumzalwana wake, ngokuba kubizwa ngokuti kukuyeka ngenxa yoyehova." 
Deuteronomy15:3 Owolunye uhlanga unga y ibanga kuye: kanti oko unako kumzalwana wako, isandla sako sokuyeka;" 
Deuteronomy15:4 kungenjalo kupela, nxa kungayi kubako kuwe olihlwempu; ngokuba uyehova eya kukolisa ukukutamsanqela elizweni, ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, libe lilifa, ukuba ulifuye:" 
Deuteronomy15:5 ukuba kodwa uyakutala ukupulapula ilizwi likayehova, utixo wako, uze ulumkele ukuyenza yonke lemiyalelo endikuyalelayo namhla." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, eya kukutamsanqela, njengokuba etshilo kuwe: wauya kuboleka intlanga ezininzi, kanti akuyi kuboleka kuzo; kanjalo uya kupata ubukosi pezu kwentlanga ezininzi, kanti zona aziyi kupata ubukosi pezu kwako." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Xeshekweni kuya kubako kuwe olihlwempu, owakubo abazalwana bako, pakati kwamanye amasango ako, elizweni lako ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, akuyi kuyenza lukuni intliziyo yako, akuyi kufumbata isandla sako kanjalo, kumzalwana wako olihlwempu;" 
Deuteronomy15:8 koko uya kumvulela isandla sako ngokukolisa, unxamele ukumboleka okwanele ukuswela kwake okumsweleleyo." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Zilumkele, ukuba kungabiko entliziyweni yako ilizwi lobunginingini, lisiti: Kusondela umnyaka wesixe̔nxe, umnyaka wokuyeka; lize iliso lako libe libi ngakuye umzalwana wako olihlwempu, ude ungamniki nto; andule abize kuyehova pezu kwako, kubeko kuwe isono." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Uya kumnika ngenyaniso, iti intliziyo yako ingabi nabuhlungu wakumnika: ngokuba ngenxa yalendawo uyehova, utixo wako, eya kukutamsanqela kuyo yonke imisebenzi yako, nakuko konke usolulela kona isandla sako." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Ngokuba ihlwempu lingayi kupela pakati kwelizwe; ngako oko ndikuyalele ngokuti: Kolisa ukuvula isandla sako kumzalwana wako, kudwai lwako nakwihlwempu lako elizweni lako." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Xeshekweni kutengiswa kuwe umzalwana wako, um‐Hebere, umhlaumbi um‐Heberekazi, okukonza iminyaka emitandatu; uya kwandula ngomnyaka wesixe̔nxe umndulule ekululekile kuwe." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Naxeshekweni umndululayo ekululekile kuwe, akuyi kumndulula engenanto:" 
Deuteronomy15:14 uya kukolisa ukumtwesa emhlambini wako, nasesibayeni sako sokubula, nasesincinezelweni sako seveyine: kuko oko uyehova, utixo wako, akutamsanqele ngako, uya kumnika." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Wauya kukumbula ukuba ubusisicaka elizweni le‐Jipete, nokuba uyehova, utixo wako, wakukulula: ngako oko ndiyakuyalela lento namhla nje." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Kodwa kuya kuti, nxa atshoyo kuwe ukuti: Andiyi kupuma kuwe; ngenxa yokuba etanda wena nabendlu yako, ngokuba kulungile kuye enawe;" 
Deuteronomy15:17 uya kwandula utabate inyatyowa, uhlabe endlebeni yake naselucangweni, waeya kuba sisicaka sako kude kube ngunapakade. Kanjako isicakakazi sako uya kwenje njalo nakuso." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Akuyi kuba nzima emehlweni ako, wakumndulula ekululekile kuwe; ngokuba ngento elingana nokupindwa kwomvuzo womqeshwa ekukonzile iminyaka emitandatu: waeya kuti uyehova, utixo wako, akutamsanqele kuko konke ukwenzayo." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Onke amazibulo, lawo aya kuzalwa pakati kwenkomo zako napakati kwegusha zako, engamaduna, uya kuwenza ngcwele kuyehova, utixo wako; akuyi kusebenza ngezibulo lenkomo yako, akuyi kuceba izibulo legusha yako kanjako." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Uya kulidla pambi kwoyehova, utixo wako, umnyaka ngomnyaka, endaweni aya kuyinyula uyehova, wena nabendlu yako." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Koko ukuba kuko isonakalo kulo, ukuba sisiqwala umhlaumbi yimfama, ukuba linesinye isonakalo esibi, akuyi kubingelela lona kuyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Uya kulidla pakati kwamasango ako; onco̔lileyo nococekileyo bofana ukulidla kwabo, njengebadi nanjengexama." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kupela igazi lalo akuyi kulidla; uya kugalela lona pezu kwomhlaba njengamanzi. 
Deuteronomy16:1 YIGCINE inyanga engu‐Abibe, ubambe ipasika kuyehova, utixo wako: ngokuba ngenyanga engu‐Abibe uyehova, utixo wako, wakupumisa e‐Jipete, ebusuku." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Ngako uya kubingela ipasika kuyehova, utixo wako, igusha nenkomo, endaweni aya kuyinyula uyehova, ukuba amise igama lake kona." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Akuyi kudla kunye nayo okubiliswayo; zintsuku zisixe̔nxe uya kudla kunye nayo izonka ezingenagwele, isonka sobunzima; (ngokuba ubupuma elizweni le‐Jipete ngobunxamo;) ukuze uwukumbule umhla wokupuma kwako elizweni le‐Jipete, yonke imihla yokudla kwako ubomi." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Akuyi kubonwa kuwe igwele kuyo yonke imida yako intsuku zibe sixe̔nxe; kanjako akuyi kusala nto kwinyama uyibingayo ngokuhlwa, ngosuku lwokuqala, kude kuse." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Akungebingele ipasika pakati kwelinye lamasango ako, uya kuwapiwa nguyehova, utixo wako:" 
Deuteronomy16:6 koko kulondawo uya kuyinyula uyehova, utixo wako, ukuba amise igama lake kona, kwa lapo uya kubingela ipasika ngokuhlwa, lakutshona ilanga, ngexesha lokupuma kwako e‐Jipete." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Uya kwoja udle nokudla endaweni aya kunyula yona uyehova, utixo wako; uze ujike kusasa, uye ezintenteni zako." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Zintsuku ezintandatu uya kuzidla izonka ezingenagwele; nangolwesixe̔nxe usuku kwobako intlanganisano engcwele kuyehova, utixo wako; akuyi kuwenza namnye umsebenzi." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Iveki ezisixe̔nxe uya kuzibala kuwe; kwakuqalwa ngeṙenqa enqoloweni uya kuqala ukubala iveki zisixe̔nxe. 
Deuteronomy16:10 Wandule ubambe umtendeleko weveki kuyehova, utixo wako, ngowesisa umnikelo wesandla sako, oya kuwunika, njengokuba ekutamsanqele uyehova, utixo wako:" 
Deuteronomy16:11 wauya kuvuya pambi kwoyehova, utixo wako, wena, nonyana wako, nentombi yako, nesicaka sako, nesicakakazi sako, nom‐Levi opakati kwamasango ako, nowasemzini, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi, abapakati kwenu, endaweni aya kuyinyula uyehova, utixo wako, ukuba amise igama lake kona." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Wauya kukumbula ukuba ubusisicaka e‐Jipete; nezimiselo ezi uya kuzigcina uzenze. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Umtendeleko wamapempe uya kuwubamba imihla ibe sixe̔nxe, nxa ubutileyo okwesibaya sako sokubula nokwesincinezelo sako seveyine:" 
Deuteronomy16:14 wauya kuvuya emtendelekweni wako, wena, nonyana wako, nentombi yako, nesicaka sako, nesicakakazi sako, nom‐Levi, nowasemzini, nenkedama, nomhlolokazi, abapakati kwamasango ako." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Yimihla esixe̔nxe uya kubamba umtendeleko kuyehova, utixo wako, endaweni aya kunyula yona uyehova: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, eya kukutamsanqela kuyo yonke inzuzo yako, nakuwo wonke umsebenzi wezandla zako; kukona uya kuvuya kupela." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Kwoba ngamaxesha matatu emnyakeni mnye onke amadoda ako aya kubonakala ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wako, kulondawo aya kunyula yona: ngomtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele, nangomtendeleko weveki, nangomtendeleko wamapempe; kodwa akayi kubonakala ebusweni bukayehova engenanto:" 
Deuteronomy16:17 onika amanye ngamanye njengomnikelo wezandla zawo, njengetamsanqa likayehova, utixo wako, ulipiweyo nguye." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Uya kuzidalela abagwebi namagosa pakati kwawo onke amasango ako, lawo uya kupiwa nguyehova utixo wako, ngezizwe zako; abaya kugweba abantu ngogwebo lwobulungisa." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Akuyi kutyekisa ugwebo; akuyi kubuka ubuso; nebaso akuyi kulamkela; ngokuba ibaso limfamekisa amehlo abalumkileyo, lijikise amazwi abalungileyo." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Ubulungisa, ubulungisa uya kubuputuma; ukuze udle ubomi, ulifuye elozwe ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Akuyi kuzigxumekela i‐Ashera yolunye uhlobo lwemiti kufupi nesibingelo sikayehova, utixo wako, oya kuzenzela sona." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Kanjako akuyi kuzipakamisela isifanekiso esimiyo; into ayitiyayo uyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy17:1 AKUYI kubingela uyehova, utixo wako, inkabi, umhlaumbi igusha, ekukuyo isonakalo umhlaumbi enye into embi: ngokuba oko kuyintshontsho kuyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Xeshekweni kufunyanwa pakati kwenu, pakati kwelinye lamasango ako uwapiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, indoda, umhlaumbi umfazi, eyenzileyo inkohlakalo emehlweni kayehova, utixo wako, ngokugqita ucebano lwake;" 
Deuteronomy17:3 ukuba yaya yabakonza otixo bambi, yatoba pantsi kubo, umhlaumbi elangeni, umhlaumbi enyangeni, umhlaumbi kuwo wonke umkosi wezulu, into endingayalelanga yona;" 
Deuteronomy17:4 kwaza kwaxelwa kuwe, weva ke, wakolisa ukubuza, kekaloku bona ke, kuyinene, kuyinto eqinileyo, kwenziwe intshontsho enjalo kwa‐Sirayeli:" 
Deuteronomy17:5 uya kwandula ukupe indoda leyo umhlaumbi umfazi lowo, abayenzileyo lento ikohlakeleyo, baye emasangweni ako, kwa londoda umhlaumbi lomfazi; wauya kubagibisela ngamatye, bade bafe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Ngomlomo wamanqi̔na amabini, umhlaumbi wamanqi̔na amatatu, uya kufiswa lowo ofanele ukufa; akayi kufiswa ngomlomo wenqi̔na linye." 
Deuteronomy17:7 Isandla samanqi̔na soba pezu kwake kuqala, ukuba afiswe, nesandla sabantu bonke kamva Kwa njalo uya kukwelelisa inkohlakalo pakati kwenu." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Xeshekweni kuko into ekugwebeni ekunqabeleyo, pakati kwegazi negazi, pakati kwetyala netyala, pakati kwesibeto nesibeto, izinto zempikisano emasangweni ako; uya kwandula ukusuka unyukele endaweni, aya kunyula yona uyehova, utixo wako;" 
Deuteronomy17:9 wauya kuza kubaperisite abangaba‐Levi, nakumgwebi oya kubako ngalomihla, ubuze ke; abaya kuxela kuwe into yokugweba:" 
Deuteronomy17:10 wauya kwenza ngokuteta kwelizwi abaya kulixela kuwe, bekulondawo aya kuyinyula uyehova; ewe, uya kulumkela ukwenza ngako konke abaya kukufundisa kona:" 
Deuteronomy17:11 ngokuteta kwomteto abaya kukufundisa wona, nangokugweba abaya kukutsho kuwe, uya kwenza; akuyi kupambuka kwelozwi abaya kulixela kuwe, nangasekunene nangasekohlo." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Kanjako lowamntu oya kwenza nger̔atshi, ngokungapulapuli kumperisite omiyo ukukonza kona uyehova, utixo wako, umhlaumbi kumgwebi, kwa umntu lowo uya kufa: wauya kukwelelisa inkohlakalo kwa‐Sirayeli;" 
Deuteronomy17:13 bati bonke abantu bapulapule, boyike, bangabuyi benze nger̔atshi." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Xeshekweni uya kufika kwelozwe ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, ude ulifuye, uhlale nokuhlala kulo, uze uti: Ndiya kumisa ukumkani pezu kwam, njengazo zonke intlanga ezindingqongayo;" 
Deuteronomy17:15 uya kuqinisa ukummisa pezu kwako abe ngukumkani, lowo aya kunyula yena uyehova, utixo wako; owapakati kwabazalwana bako uya kummisa pezu kwako abe ngukumkani; akungebe nako ukubeka pezu kwako umntu wolunye uhlanga, lowo ungenguye umzalwana wako." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Kodwa akayi kuzandisela amahashe, nabantu akayi kubabuyisela e‐Jipete, ukuze kwandiswe amahashe; ngokuba uyehova etshilo kuni ukuti: Anisayi kupinda ukubuya ngalondlela." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Kanjako akayi kuzandisela abafazi, ize ingapambuki intliziyo yake; akayi kuzandisela kakulu isilivere negolide kananjalo." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Kwakuya kuti, akuhlala pezu kweterone yobukumkani bake, woziba̔lela isipindwa salomteto encwadini, sitatyatwa kwa ku leyo e pambi kwabaperisite abangaba‐Levi;" 
Deuteronomy17:19 esiya kuba naye, waeya kulesesha kuso yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi; ukuze afunde ukwoyika uyehova, utixo wake, agcine onke amazwi alomteto, nezimiselo ezi, azenze;" 
Deuteronomy17:20 ukuba ingapakami intliziyo yake pezu kwabazalwana bake, nokuba angapambuki kuwo umyalelo, nangasekunene nangasekohlo: ukuze ayolule imihla ebukumkanini bake, yena nonyana bake, pakati kwo‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy18:1 ABAPERISITE abangaba‐Levi, naso sonke isizwe sika‐Levi, abayi kuba nasabelwa nalifa kunye no‐Sirayeli: iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova baya kuyidla, nelifa lake." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Ngako abayi kuba nalifa pakati kwabazalwana babo: nguyehova olilifa labo, njengokuba etetile kubo." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Eli loba libango labaperisite livela ebantwini, kubo ababingayo umbingo, nokuba yinkabi, nokuba yigusha: mabanike umperisite umkono, nezidlele zozibini, necabanga." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Isiqalo senqolowa yako, eseveyine yako, neseoli yako, nesiqalo soboya obucetyiweyo begusha zako, uya kusinika kuye." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Ngokuba yena uyehova, utixo wako, emnyulile kuzo zonke izizwe zako, ukuba eme ukukonza egameni likayehova, yena nonyana bake, imihla yonke." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Kanjalo xeshekweni kuvela um‐Levi kwelinye lamasango ako, kuyo yonke i‐Sirayeli, apo wabehlala kona, eze ngayo yonke inkanuko yompefumlo wake, kulondawo aya kuyinyula uyehova;" 
Deuteronomy18:7 andule akonze egameni likayehova, utixo wake, njengabo bonke abazalwana bake aba‐Levi, abemiyo kona ebusweni bukayehova:" 
Deuteronomy18:8 ziya kufana izabelwa baya kuzidla, ngapandle kwokutengisa kwake ngokuvela koyise." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Xeshekweni ufikileyo kwelozwe ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, akuyi kufunda ukwenza ngezinto ezibuntshontsho zezontlanga." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Akuyi kufunyanwa pakati kwenu odlulisayo unyana wake, umhlaumbi intombi yake, emlilweni, n oyincibi yokulaula, n owenza ngobugqi, notakatayo, nosisanuse," 
Deuteronomy18:11 nowenza ngokunyanga, nocebisana nomshologu, nolitola, nobuzayo kubafileyo." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Ngokuba beyintshontsho kuyehova bonke abakwenje njalo: kungenxa yezizinto ezibuntshontsho uyehova, utixo wako, abagqogqayo pambi kwenu." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Wofezeka ukulunga ngakuye uyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy18:14 Ngokuba ezintlanga, oya kufuya okwazo, zipulapula kwabenzi bobugqi nakubalauli: kodwa wena, uyehova, utixo wako, akakuvumelanga okunjalo." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Uyehova, utixo wako, wokuvusela umprofite evela pakati kwako, kubazalwana bako, njengam: kwa kuye niya kupulapula." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Njengako konke wakucelayo kuyehova, utixo wako, e‐Horebe, ngomhla wentlanganisano, usiti: Mandingapindi ukuva ilizwi likayehova, utixo wam; nalomlilo omkulu mandingabuyi ndiwubone, ukuba ndingafi." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Waza uyehova wati kum: Balungisile ngoko bakutetileyo. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ndobavusela unprofite evela pakati kwabazalwana babo, njengawe; namazwi am ndowabeka emlonyeni wake; waeya kuteta kubo konke endiya kumyalela ngako." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Kwakuya kuti, lowamntu ongayi kupulapula amazwi am, aya kuteta wona egameni lam, ndiya kumbuza mna." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Kodwa lomprofite owenza nger̔atshi ukuteta ilizwi egameni lam, endingamyalelanga ukuliteta, nalowo oya kuteta egameni lotixo bambi, kwa umprofite lowo uya kufa." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Naxeshekweni uya kuti entliziyweni yako: Soti nina ukulazi ilizwi angalitetanga uyehova? 
Deuteronomy18:22 Okuya aya kuteta lomprofite egameni likayehova, landule lingabiko ilizwi, lingezi nokuza, lelo ilizwi uyehova angalitetanga; wateta lona nger̔atshi umprofite lowo: aniyi kwoyika ngenxa yake." 
Deuteronomy19:1 XESHEKWENI uyehova, utixo wako, aya kuzicita intlanga, ezilizwe uyehova, utixo wako, alinika kuwe, uze ulifuye esikundleni sazo, uhlale ezixekweni zazo nasezindlwini zazo;" 
Deuteronomy19:2 uya kuzahlulela izixeko zibe zitatu pakati kwelizwe lako, ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, ukuba ulifuye." 
Deuteronomy19:3 Uya kuzilungisela indlela, uwahlule umda welizwe lako, oya kwamkeliswa ilifa lalo nguyehova, utixo wako, ezahlulweni ezitatu: kwoba njalo ke, ukuba kusabele kona bonke ababulali." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Yiyo le indawo yombulali, oya kusabela kona, ukuba adle ubomi: osukuba ebulala ummelwane wake ngokungazi, lowo angamtiyanga ngamaxesha apambili;" 
Deuteronomy19:5 (njengokuya aya nommelwane wake ehlatini ukugaula imiti, sisuke isandla sake sibete ngezembe, ukuba anqumle umti, iti intsimbi ijube empinini, ihle pezu kwommelwane wake, ade afe;) oyena uya kusabela kwesinye sezixeko ezo, adle ubomi:" 
Deuteronomy19:6 hleze umpindezeli wegazi aputume umbulali, nxa ishushu intliziyo yake, amfumane, ngenxa yokuba indlela ikude, ambulale ubomi; kungeko kuye ityala lokufa nje, ekubeni abengamtiyi ngamaxesha apambili." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ngako oko ndiyakuyalela, ndisiti: Uya kuzahlulela izixeko zibe zitatu." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Kanjako ukuba uyehova, utixo wako, uya kuwenza banzi umda wako, njengokuba efungele oyihlo bako, akunike lonke ilizwe wabeteta ngalo ukuba alinike koyihlo bako;" 
Deuteronomy19:9 nxa uya kugcina wonke lomyalelo ukuba uwenze, lowo ndikuyalelayo namhla, wokuba utande uyehova, utixo wako, nokuba uhambe ezindleleni zake imihla yonke; uya kwandula usongeze izixeko ezitatu ngapezu kwezitatu ezo;" 
Deuteronomy19:10 ukuba kungapalazwa igazi longenatyala pakati kwelizwe lako, ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, libe lilifa, lize igazi libe pezu kwako." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Kodwa xeshekweni kuko umntu otiya ummelwane wake, amlalele, asukele ngakuye, ambulale ubomi, ade afe; andule asabele kwesinye sezixeko ezo;" 
Deuteronomy19:12 boti abadala besixeko sake batume ke, bamzeke kona, bamnikele esandleni sompindezeli wegazi, ukuba afe." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Iliso lako aliyi kuba nosizi pezu kwake, kodwa uya kukwelelisa igazi longenatyala kwa‐Sirayeli, ukuba kulunge kuwe." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Akuyi kushenxisa umda wommelwane wako, lowo abakudala bawumisa elifeni lako, oya kulamkela elizweni ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, ukuba ulifuye." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Inqi̔na linye aliyi kuvuka ngasemntwini ngenxa yenye inkohlakalo, nangenxa yesinye isono, kuzo zonke izono ona ngazo: ngomlomo wamanqi̔na amabini, umhlaumbi ngomlomo wamanqi̔na amatatu, indawo iya kuma." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Nxa livuka inqi̔na lobumenemene ngasemntwini, ukuba linqi̔ne ngakuye impambuko;" 
Deuteronomy19:17 baya kwandula abobantu bobabini, ekupakati kwabo ipike, beme pambi kwoyehova, pambi kwabaperisite nabagwebi, abaya kubako ngaleyomihla;" 
Deuteronomy19:18 bati abagwebi bakolise ukubuza: kekaloku bona ke, ukuba inqi̔na elo linqi̔na elibuxoki, nokuba linqi̔nile ubuxoki ngakuye umzalwana walo;"
