Deuteronomy19:19 seniya kwenza kulo, njengokuba libe licingile ukwenza kumzalwana walo: kwa njalo uya kukwelelisa inkohlakalo pakati kwenu;" 
Deuteronomy19:20 baze abaseleyo beve, boyike, bangabi sapinda ukwenza njengalendawo ekohlakeleyo pakati kwenu." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Kanjako iliso lako aliyi kuba nosizi; ubomi bonikwa ngenxa yobomi, iliso ngenxa yeliso, izinyo ngenxa yezinyo, isandla ngenxa yesandla, unyawo ngenxa yonyawo." 
Deuteronomy20:1 NXA upumela ukulwa ngakuzo intshaba zako, ubone amahashe, nenqwelo, n abantu abaninzi pezu kwako, aniyi kuboyika: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, enawe, owakunyusayo ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Kwakuya kuti, nakuza kufupi ekulweni, makasondele umperisite atete ebantwini," 
Deuteronomy20:3 ati kubo: Pulapula, Sirayeli! niyasondela namhla ukuza kulwa nentshaba zenu; maingabi butataka intliziyo yenu, ningoyiki, ningetuki, ningabi nakunkwantya pambi kwazo:" 
Deuteronomy20:4 ngokuba nguyehova, utixo wenu, ohamba nani, ukuya kunilwela ngakuzo intshaba zenu, ukuba anisindise." 
Deuteronomy20:5 Aya kwandula amagosa atete ebantwini, esiti: Nguwupina umntu owakileyo indlu entsha, kanti akayitwasisanga? makahambe abuyele endlwini yake, hleze afe yena ekulweni, aze omnye umntu ayitwasise." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Kanjako nguwupina umntu otyalileyo isitiya semiti yeveyine, kanti akakatyanga kwisiqa̔mo saso? makahambe abuyele endlwini yake, hleze afe yena ekulweni, aze omnye umntu ade atye kuso." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Kananjalo nguwupina umntu oxamileyo umfazi, kanti akamzekanga? makahambe abuyele endlwini yake, hleze afe yena ekulweni, aze omnye umntu amzeke." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Aya kupinda amagosa ukuteta ebantwini, ati: Nguwupina umntu owoyikayo nontliziyo ibutataka? makahambe abuyele endlwini yake, ukuba inganyibiliki intliziyo yabazalwana bake, njengeyake intliziyo." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Kwakuya kuti, nxa amagosa lawo agqibile ukuteta ebantwini, aya kudala inkosi zemikosi zikokele abantu." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Xeshekweni usondela esixekweni ukuza kulwa ngakuso, uya kwandula ushumayele kuso uxolo." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Kwakuya kuti, ukuba siyakupendula ngoxolo, nokuba siyakuvulela, kuya kwandul’ ukuti, bonke abantu abafunyanwayo kuso boba ngabanikeli kuwe, bakukonze." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Kanti ukuba asiyi kwenza uxolo nawe, koko siya kuyenza nawe imfazwe, uya kwandula usivingcele." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Waye uyehova, utixo wako, eya kusinikela esandleni sako; wauya kubeta konke okubudoda kuso ngohlangoti lweṙele:" 
Deuteronomy20:14 kodwa abafazi, nentsapo, nenkomo, nako konke okuya kubako esixekweni, lonke ixoba laso, uya kuzipangela ezonto; wauya kulidla ixoba lentshaba zenu, olipiweyo nguyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Uya kwenje njalo kuzo zonke izixeko ezikude kakulu kuwe, ezingezizo ezezixeko zentlanga ezi." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Kodwa ezezixeko zababantu, uzipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, zibe lilifa, akuyi kulondoloza ebomini namnye opefumlayo:" 
Deuteronomy20:17 koko uya kugqibela ukubalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni: ama‐Hete, naba‐Amori, naba‐Kanane, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi; njengokuba uyehova, utixo wako, ekuyalele:" 
Deuteronomy20:18 ukuze banganifundisi ukwenza ngazo zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho zabo, abazenzileyo kotixo babo, nize none ngakuye uyehova, utixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Xeshekweni uya kuvingcela isixeko imihla emininzi, ekulweni ngakuso ukuba usibambe, akuyi kutshabalalisa imiti yaso ngokubeta ngakuyo ngezembe: ngokuba uya kutya kuyo; ngako yona akuyi kuyinqumla, (ngokuba imiti yasendle ye yokudla kwomntu,) ukuba iye pambi kwako ekuvingceleni:" 
Deuteronomy20:20 kodwa imiti uyaziyo ukuba ayiyiyo imiti yokudliwa, yona woyitshabalalisa uyinqumle; wauya kwaka inqaba ngakuso isixeko esiyenzayo nawe imfazwe, side siwe." 
Deuteronomy21:1 XESHEKWENI kufunyanwa ohlatyiweyo emhlabeni, owupiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, ukuba uwufuye, elele endle, kungaziwa ubulewe ngubanina;" 
Deuteronomy21:2 baya kwandula ukupuma abadala bako nabagwebi bako, baye balinganisele ezixekweni ezingqongayo lowo uhlatyiweyo." 
Deuteronomy21:3 Kwakuya kuti, isixeko esikufupi kuye ohlatyiweyo, kwa abadala besixeko eso botabata itokazi lenkomo, ekungasetyenzwanga ngalo, elingar̔olanga ngeyokwe;" 
Deuteronomy21:4 basuke abadala besosixeko behle nalo itokazi elo, baye emlanjaneni owelayo futi, apo kungalinywanga ngakuwo, nekungahlwayelwanga kona, balapule itokazi intamo apo ngasemlanjaneni:" 
Deuteronomy21:5 bandule basondele abaperisite, onyana baka‐Levi: (ngokuba bona ebaqashile uyehova, utixo wako, ukukonza kuye, nokutamsanqelisa egameni likayehova; nangomlomo wabo kuya ku lungiswa konke ukupikisana nako konke ukubeta:)" 
Deuteronomy21:6 baye bonke abadala besixeko eso, abakufupi kuye ohlatyiweyo, beya kuhlamba izandla zabo pezu kwetokazi elapulweyo intamo emlanjaneni;" 
Deuteronomy21:7 batete bati: Izandla zetu azipalazanga eligazi, namehlo etu akalibonanga:" 
Deuteronomy21:8 baxolele abantu bako o‐Sirayeli, obakululeyo, Yehova! ungabeki igazi elingenatyala pakati kwabantu bako o‐Sirayeli. Baya kwandula ukuxolelwa igazi elo." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Kwa njalo uya kukwelelisa igazi elingenatyala pakati kwenu; nxa uya kukwenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova. 
Deuteronomy21:10 Xeshekweni uya kupuma ukuya kulwa ngakuzo intshaba zako, ati uyehova, utixo wako, azinikele esandleni sako, ude uzitimbe inxenye," 
Deuteronomy21:11 usuke ubone pakati kwamatinjwa inkazana eyinzwakazi, unamatele kuyo, ngokunga ungayizeka ibe ngumfazi wako;" 
Deuteronomy21:12 uya kwandula uyizise pakati kwendlu yako; eya kugugula intloko yayo, icwele inzipo zayo;" 
Deuteronomy21:13 nengubo yokutinjwa kwayo yoyisusa kuyo, ihlale endlwini yako, ililele uyise nonina inyanga ipela; woti emveni kwoko ungene kuyo, ube yindoda yayo, iti yona ibe ngumfazi wako." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Kwakuya kuti, ukuba akukoliswa yiyo, uya kuyindulula iye ngomxe̔lo wayo; kodwa akukuka uyitengise ngemali, akuyi kuyikonzisa kanjako, ngenxa yokuba uyitobile." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Xeshekweni umntu anabafazi ababini, omnye otandwayo, omnye otiywayo, abamzaleleyo onyana, kwa lowo utandwayo nalowo utiywayo; ukuba unyana wamazibulo uba ngowotiywayo;" 
Deuteronomy21:16 kwoti ke, mhlana abamkelisa onyana bake ilifa loko anako, akangebe nakumnika unyana wotandwayo ubuzibulo, ngapezu kwonyana wotiywayo, ongowamazibulo:" 
Deuteronomy21:17 koko owamazibulo, unyana wotiywayo, uya kumvuma, ngokumnika into epindiweyo kuko konke okuya kufunyanwa kuye: ngokuba yena esisiqalo sokwomelela kwake; ibango lobuzibulo lilelake." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Xeskekweni umntu anonyana onenkani, ongenakuva, ongapulapuliyo elizwini loyise, naselizwini lonina, oti, bakuba bemohlwayile, angapulapuli kubo noko;" 
Deuteronomy21:19 baya kwandula bambambe uyise nonina, bapume naye baye kubadala besixeko sake, nasesangweni lendawo yake;" 
Deuteronomy21:20 babeya kuti kubadala besixeko sake: Unyana wetu lo ungonenkani nongevayo, akapulapuli elizwini letu; ungozinxalayo nonxilayo." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Aye onke amadoda esixeko sake eya kumgibisela ngamatye, ukuba afe: kwa njalo uya kukwelelisa inkohlakalo pakati kwenu; baze o‐Sirayeli bonke beve ke, boyike." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Kanjalo xeshekweni kuko emntwini isono esifanelwe kukufa, ade afiswe, wandule umxo̔me emtini:" 
Deuteronomy21:23 isidumbu sake asiyi kulalisa emtini, koko uya kugqibela ukumncw̔aba ngalomini; (ngokuba esisiqalekiswa kutixo oxo̔nyiweyo;) ukuze unganco̔lisi ilizwe lako, ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, libe lilifa." 
Deuteronomy22:1 AKUYI kubona inkabi yomzalwana wako umhlaumbi igusha yake zigxotiwe, wandule uzifihle kuzo; uya kuzibuyisela kumzalwana wako ngenyaniso." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Kanjalo ukuba umzalwana wako akakufupi nawe, umhlaumbi akumazi, woyigodusa endlwini yako, ize ibeko kuwe ade umzalwana wako ayifune, wauya kuyibuyisela kuye." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Uya kwenje njalo nakulo iqwaṙashe lake; uya kwenje njalo nakuyo ingubo yake; uya kwenje njalo nakuko konke okulahlekileyo kwomzalwana wako, oko kulahlekileyo kuye, nokufumeneyo wena: akungezifihle." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Akuyi kubona iqwaṙashe lomzalwana wako umhlaumbi inkabi yake ziwile pantsi endleleni, wandule uzifihle kuzo; uya kuzisukisa kunye naye ngenyaniso." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Isivato sendoda asiyi kubako pezu kwomfazi, kanjalo indoda ayiyi kwambata ingubo yomfazi: ngokuba beyintshontsho kuyehova, utixo wako, bonke abenje njalo." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Xeshekweni ufumanana nendlu yentaka endleleni, komnye umti, umhlaumbi pezu kwomhlaba, inamatole umhlaumbi inamaqanda, nonina ehleli pezu kwamatole umhlaumbi pezu kwamaqanda, akuyi kususa unina kunye namatole." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Uya kugqibela ukundulula unina, kanti amatole ungawatabatela kuwe; ukuze kulunge kuwe, nemihla yako uyolule." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Xeshekweni uyakayo indlu entsha, uya kwenzela isifulelo sako intendelezo, ukuba ungamisi igazi pezu kwendlu yako, nxa owayo awa kuso." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Akuyi kuhlwayela isitiya sako ngembewu yentlobo ngentlobo; hleze kunco̔liswe inzuzo yembewu uyihlwayeleyo, nemveliso yesitiya sako." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Akuyi kupulusha ngenkabi nangeqwaṙashe ndawonye. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Akuyi kwambata isivato esilukiweyo ngentlobo ngentlobo zencawa ndawonye. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Uya kuzenzela imiqukumbelo emasondweni omane esigubungelo uzigubungela ngaso. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Xeshekweni indoda iya kuzeka umfazi, ingene kuye, yandule imtiye," 
Deuteronomy22:14 ibeke pezu kwake izenzo ngokuhleba, impumisele igama elibi, iti: Umfazi lo ndamzeka, kanti ndakungena kuye, andafumana kuye impau zobuntombi:" 
Deuteronomy22:15 uyise wenkazana nonina botabata impau zobuntombi benkazana leyo, bapume nazo baye kubadala besixeko esangweni:" 
Deuteronomy22:16 waye uyise wenkazana eya kuti kubadala: Intombi yam ndiyinikile kulendoda ibe ngumfazi, kodwa iyayitiya;" 
Deuteronomy22:17 kekaloku, bona ke, ibekile pezu kwayo izenzo ngokuhleba, isiti: Andifumananga kuyo intombi yako impau zobuntombi; noko nanzi impau zobuntombi bentombi yam. Baya kwandul’ ukwandlala iqiya ebusweni babo abadala besixeko." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Boti abadala besixeko eso bayitabate londoda, bayohlwaye," 
Deuteronomy22:19 bayihlaulise ikulu leshekele zesilivere, bazinike kuyise wenkazana, ngokokuba ipumisile igama elibi pezu kwentombi yakwa‐Sirayeli: yoba ngumfazi wayo, ayingeyindulule yonke imihla yayo." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Kodwa ukuba indawo le iyinene, yokuba impau zobuntombi azifunyanwanga kuyo inkazana;" 
Deuteronomy22:21 baya kwandula bakupe inkazana leyo iye emnyango wendlu yoyise, ati amadoda esixeko sayo ayigibisele ngamatye, ukuba ife, ngokokuba yenzile okuhlazekileyo kwa‐Sirayeli, ngokwenza umbulo endlwini kayise: kwa njalo uya kukwelelisa inkohlakalo pakati kwenu." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Xeshekweni kufunyanwa indoda ilala nomfazi otshatileyo, baya kufa bobabini, indoda eleleyo nomfazi lowo, naye umfazi: kwa njalo uya kukwelelisa inkohlakalo kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Xeshekweni kuya kubako inkazana eyintombi ipela, exanyiweyo yindoda, iti enye indoda iyifumane esixekweni, ilale nayo;" 
Deuteronomy22:24 nobakupela esangweni lesixeko eso bobabini, nibagibisele ngamatye, ukuba bafe; inkazana, ngendawo yokuba ayikalanga isesixekweni; nendoda, ngendawo yokuba itobile umfazi wommelwane wayo: kwa njalo uya kukwelelisa inkohlakalo pakati kwenu." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Kodwa ukuba indoda iyafumana inkazana exanyiweyo isendle, iti indoda iyidlwengule, ilale nayo; yoba yindoda eleleyo nayo eya kufa yodwa;" 
Deuteronomy22:26 kanti inkazana akuyi kuyenza nto; akuko kuyo inkazana isono sokufa: ngokuba njengokuya indoda isukela ummelwane wayo, imbulale ubomi, ikwa njalo lendawo:" 
Deuteronomy22:27 ngokuba ibiyifumana isendle; yakala ke inkazana exanyiweyo, koko bekungeko owayisindisayo." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Xeshekweni indoda ifumana inkazana eyintombi ipela, engeyiyo exanyiweyo, ize iyibambe, ilale nayo, bafunyanwe ke;" 
Deuteronomy22:29 yoti indoda eleleyo nayo inike uyise wenkazana ishekele zesilivere zibe ngamashumi mahlanu, iti yona ibe ngumfazi wayo, ngenxa yokuba iyitobile; ayingeyindulule yonke imihla yayo." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Indoda ayiyi kuzeka umfazi kayise, nesondo lengubo yoyise ayiyi kulityila." 
Deuteronomy23:1 OLINYAZIWE ngokutenwa, umhlaumbi onqanyulweyo isidoda, akayi kungena emhlambini kayehova." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Ongumntwana wesisu akayi kungena emhlambini kayehova; kwa eseshumi isizukulwana sake asiyi kungena emhlambini kayehova. 
Deuteronomy23:3 Um‐Hamoni, umhlaumbi um‐Mowabi, akayi kungena emhlambini kayehova; kwa eseshumi isizukulwana sabo asiyi kungena emhlambini kayehova kude kube ngunapakade:" 
Deuteronomy23:4 ngendawo yokuba bebengezi nesonka namanzi ukunikaulela endleleni, nakupuma e‐Jipete; nokuba bebemqesha ngakuni u‐Bilame, unyana ka‐Behori, owase‐Petore e‐Mesopotami, aze akuqalekise." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Noko ebengavumi uyehova, utixo wako, ukupulapula ku‐Bilame; kodwa uyehova, utixo wako, wakuguqulela isiqalekiso sibe litamsanqa, ngenxa yokuba uyehova, utixo wako, ebekutanda." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Akuyi kufuna uxolo lwabo nokulunga kwabo yonke imihla yako kude kube ngunapakade. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Akuyi kumzonda um‐Edome; ngokuba engumzalwana wako yena: akuyi kumzonda um‐Jipete; ngokuba ubungowasemzini elizweni lake. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Abantwana abazelweyo ngabo, abesesitatu isizukulwana baya kungena emhlambini kayehova." 
Deuteronomy23:9 Xeshekweni kupuma umkosi ngakuzo intshaba zako, zibambe ke kuzo zonke izinto ezikohlakeleyo." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Xeshekweni kuko pakati kwenu indoda, engacocekileyo ngenxa yokuyihlileyo ebusuku, yona iya kupuma iye ngapandle kwomnquba, ayiyi kungena pakati kwomnquba:" 
Deuteronomy23:11 koko kuya kuti, xa kuza kuhlwa, iya kuhlamba emanzini; naxeshekweni kutshonile ilanga, iya kungena pakati kwomnquba." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Kanjako uya kuba nendawo ngapandle kwomnquba, apo uya kupumela kona endle:" 
Deuteronomy23:13 wauya kuba nolugxa, ngapezu kwempahla yako; kwakuya kuti, wakuhlala pantsi endle, uya kupanda ngalo, uze ujike, uselele okupumayo kuwe:" 
Deuteronomy23:14 ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, ehamba pakati kwomnquba wako, ukuba akusindise, nokuba azinike intshaba zako ebusweni bako; ngako umnquba wako woba ngcwele, aze angaboni pakati kwako into ehlazekileyo, andul’ ukubuya kuwe." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Akuyi kunikela isicaka kwinkosi yaso, esisindileyo enkosini yaso ukuza kuwe:" 
Deuteronomy23:16 sohlala kuwe, pakati kwenu, kulondawo siya kuyinyula kwelinye lamasango ako, apo kusilungeleyo kona: akuyi kusibandezela." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Akuyi kubako ingnawokazi pakati kwentombi zakwa‐Sirayeli; kanjalo akuyi kubako ingnawo pakati kwonyana bakwa‐Sirayeli. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Akuyi kungenisa umvuzo wengnawokazi nexabiso lenja endlwini kayehova, utixo wako, ngenxa yaso nasinye isibambiso: ngokuba ziyintshontsho kuyehova, utixo wako, kwa zombini." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Akuyi kuboleka umzalwana wako ngenxa yayo inzuzo; inzuzo yemali, inzuzo yokutya, inzuzo yenye into kubolekwa ngayo ngenxa yenzuzo:" 
Deuteronomy23:20 owasemzini ungamboleka ngenxa yenzuzo, kodwa umzalwana wako akuyi kumboleka ngenxa yenzuzo; ukuze uyehova, utixo wako, akutamsanqele kuko konke usolulela kona isandla sako, elizweni apo uya kona ukulifuya." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Xeshekweni uya kubambisa ngesibambiso kuyehova, utixo wako, akuyi kulibala ukusihlaula: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, eya kusibiza kuwe ngenyaniso, kwandule kubeko kuwe isono." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Kanti nxa uyekayo ukubambisa, akuyi kubako kuwe isono." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Oko kupumayo emlonyeni wako, uya kubamba kona ukwenze; njengokuya ubambisile kuyehova, utixo wako, ngomnikelo wesisa, owutetileyo ngomlomo wako." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Xeshekweni uzayo esitiyeni sommelwane wako, ungazidla idreyive ngokwomxe̔lo wako, ude uhlute; kodwa akuyi kubeka esityeni sako." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Xeshekweni uzayo enqoloweni yommelwane wako, ungazika izikwebu ngesandla sako; kodwa musa kushukumisa iṙenqa ngakuyo inqolowa yommelwane wako." 
Deuteronomy24:1 XESHEKWENI indoda iya kuzeka umfazi, itshate naye; kuya kuti, ukuba akafumani ufefe emehlweni ayo, ngenxa yokuba ifumene kuye into ehlazekileyo, iya kwandula imba̔lele incwadi yokumlahla, iyinike esandleni sake, imndulule endlwini yayo." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Kekaloku akuba epumile endlwini yayo, angaya abe ngumfazi kwenye indoda." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Ukuba iyamtiya lendoda yasemva, imba̔lele incwadi yokumlahla nayo, iyinike esandleni sake, imndulule endlwini yayo; umhlaumbi nxa ifileyo lendoda yasemva, eyamzeka abe ngumfazi wayo;" 
Deuteronomy24:4 indoda yake yokuqala, eyamndululayo, ayingebuye imzeke abe ngumfazi wayo, emveni kwokuba unco̔lisiwe; ngokuba kuyintshontsho oko ebusweni bukayehova: kwa njalo akuyi kulenza ilizwe lone, elo ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, libe lilifa." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Xeshekweni indoda izekile umfazi omtsha, ayiyi kupuma nawo umkosi, kanjalo akuyi kubekwa pezu kwayo namnye umsebenzi; yoba ikululekile ekaya layo umnyaka ube mnye, imvuyise umfazi wayo imzekileyo." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Akuyi kwenziwa umbambiso ngelapantsi nangelapezulu ilitye lokusila: ngokuba kusenziwa umbambiso ngento kupilwa ngayo. 
Deuteronomy24:7 Xeshekweni kufunyanwa umntu esiba̔ omnye kubazalwana bake, kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, andule amkonzise, atengise ngaye; isela elo liya kufa; wauya kukwelelisa inkohlakalo pakati kwenu." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Zilumkele esibulaweni sesilepero, ukuba ulumke kunene wenze ngako konke baya kunifundisa kona abaperisite abangaba‐Levi; njengokuba ndiyalele bona, niya kulumkela ukwenje njalo." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Kumbula oko wabekwenza uyehova, utixo wako, ku‐Miriyame endleleni, emveni kwokupuma kwenu e‐Jipete." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Xeshekweni uya kuboleka ummelwane wako into, akuyi kungena endlwini yake ukuba utabate umbambiso wake:" 
Deuteronomy24:11 uya kuma ngapandle, ati umntu owaumbolekile, apume nawo umbambiso eze kuwe ngapandle." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Kodwa ukuba ulihlwempu umntu lowo, akuyi kulala unombambiso wake:" 
Deuteronomy24:13 wobuyisela kuye ngenyaniso lombambiso lakutshona ilanga, ukuba alale ngeyake ingubo, akutamsanqele; kuze kube bubulungisa kuwe pambi kwoyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Akuyi kubandezela umqeshwa olihlwempu nosweleyo, nokuba ungowabazalwana bako, nokuba ungowabasemzini bako abaselizweni lako pakati kwamasango ako:" 
Deuteronomy24:15 ngemini yake uya kunika umvuzo wake, kanjalo ilanga aliyi kutshona pezu kwawo; ngokuba elihlwempu yena, nompefumlo wake uwubekisele kuwo; ukuze angakali pezu kwako kuyehova, kwandule kubeko kuwe isono." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Oyise abayi kufiswa ngenxa yabantwana, kanjalo abantwana abayi kufiswa ngenxa yoyise: umntu wofiselwa esake isono." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Akuyi kutyekisa ibango lowasemzini n elenkedama; akuyi kutabata isivato somhlolokazi sibe ngumbambiso kanjako: 
Deuteronomy24:18 kodwa uya kukumbula ukuba ubusisicaka e‐Jipete, nokuba uyehova, utixo wako, wakukulula kwa kona: ngako oko ndiyakuyalela ukuba uyenze lento." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Xeshekweni uvunayo isivuno sako entsimini yako, ukuba ulibele isitungu entsimini, akuyi kubuya ukuya kusitabata: soba sesowasemzini, n esenkedama, nesomhlolokazi; ukuze uyehova, utixo wako, akutamsanqele kuwo wonke umsebenzi wezandla zako." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Xeshekweni uvutulula umnquma wako, akuyi kufuna kanjako emagatyeni emva kwako: kwoba kokwowasemzini, n okwenkedama, nokwomhlolokazi." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Xeshekweni ukayo idreyive zesitiya sako, akuyi kubikica emva kwako: kwoba kokwowasemzini, n okwenkedama, nokwomhlolokazi." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Wauya kukumbula ukuba ubusisicaka elizweni le‐Jipete: ngako oko ndiyakuyalela ukuba uyenze lento. 
Deuteronomy25:1 XESHEKWENI kuko ipike pakati kwabantu, bade basondele ematyaleni, ukuba abalungise, olungileyo aya kumgwebela, nokohlakeleyo aya kumgweba." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Kwakuya kuti, ukuba okohlakeleyo ufanelwe kukubetwa, woti umgwebi enze ukuba alale pantsi, nokuba abetwe pambi kwobuso bake, ngokulingana nenkohlakalo yake, ngenani." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Yimivimbo engamashumi mane angambetayo ngayo, angongezi; hleze kuti, akwongeza ukumbeta ngapezu kwayo le ngemivimbo emininzi, andule adeleke umzalwana wako emehlweni ako." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Inkabi akuyi kuyifaka umkala ekubuleni kwayo. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Xeshekweni abazalwana bahlala ndawonye, ade afe omnye kubo, engenamntwana, umfazi wofileyo akayi kwenda ngapandle, kowasemzini: umninawe wendoda yake uya kungena kuye, amzeke ukuba abe ngumfazi wake, enze imfaneleko yomninawe wendoda kuye." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Kwakuya kuti, owamazibulo amzalayo uya kuma egameni lomkuluwe wake, lofileyo, ukuze kungacinywa igama lake kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Kodwa ukuba londoda ayitandi ukumzeka umfazi womkuluwe wayo, makenyuke umfazi womkuluwe wayo aye esangweni kubadala, ati: Umninawe wendoda yam uyala ukuvusela umkuluwe wake igama kwa‐Sirayeli, akavumi ukwenza imfaneleko yomninawe wendoda kum." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Baya kwandula bambize abadala besixeko sake, batete naye. Ukuba uyamana ukutsho: Anditandi ukumzeka;" 
Deuteronomy25:9 makati umfazi womkuluwe wake asondele kuye emehlweni abadala abo, atule isihlangu sake elunyaweni lwake, atshice ebusweni bake, apendule ati: Kuya kwenziwa njengokunjalo kulondoda engayi kuyaka indlu yomkuluwe wayo." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Kanjako liya kubizwa igama layo kwa‐Sirayeli ngokuti: Indlu yosihlangu situliweyo. 
Deuteronomy25:11 Xeshekweni kungxolisana amadoda enye nenye, ati umfazi wenye asondele, ukuba ayikulule indoda yake esandleni saleyo iyibetileyo, asolule isandla sake, abubambe ubuhloni bayo;" 
Deuteronomy25:12 isandla sake wosinqumla, iliso lako aliyi kuba nalusizi." 
Deuteronomy25:13 Akuyi kubako kuwe enxoweni yako ilitye nelitye, elikulu nelincinane." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Akuyi kubako kuwe endlwini yako iyefa neyefa, enkulu nencinane." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Woba nelitye elizalisekileyo elilungeleleneyo; woba neyefa ezalisekileyo elungeleleneyo; ukuze kwolulwe imihla yako pezu kwomhlaba uwupiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Ngokuba beyintshontsho kuyehova, utixo wako, bonke abakwenza okunjalo, bonke abenzayo ngobumenemene." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Kumbula oko wausenzelwa kona ngu‐Amaleki endleleni, nakupuma e‐Jipete:" 
Deuteronomy25:18 okokuba wakukaulela endleleni, wababeta abasemva pakati kwenu, bonke ababutataka emva kwako, nxa ubucubukile wadinwa; akoyika ke utixo." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Kwoti ke ngoko, akuba uyehova, utixo wako, ekupumzile kuzo zonke intshaba zako ezingqongayo, elizweni ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, libe lilifa, ukuba ulifuye, inkunjulwa ka‐Amaleki uya kuyicima kwa pantsi kwezulu: ungalibali ke!" 
Deuteronomy26:1 KWAKUYA kuti, xeshekweni ufikileyo kwelozwe ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, libe lilifa, uze ulifuye, uhlale nokuhlala kulo;" 
Deuteronomy26:2 uya kutabata kwisiqalo sako konke ukuqa̔ma kwomhlaba, oya kuvela nako emhlabeni wako uwupiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, usibeke esityeni; usuke uye endaweni aya kuyinyula uyehova, utixo wako, ukuba alimise igama lake kona." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Wauya kuza kumperisite oya kubako ngalomihla, uti kuye: Ndiyaxela namhla kuyehova, utixo wako, okokuba ndifikile elizweni owabefungela obawo betu uyehova ukuba wolinika kuti." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Waye umperisite eya kutabata isitya esandleni sako, asibeke pantsi ngapambi kwesibingelo sikayehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Uya kwandula utete uti ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wako: Ebengum‐Siriya olahlekileyo ubawo, waza wehlela e‐Jipete, wahlala njengowasemzini kona enento encinane yabantu, wada wenziwa kona isizwe esikulu, esinamandla, nesi bantu baninzi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Koko ama‐Jipete asipata kakubi, asibandezela, abeka pezu kwetu inkonzo elukuni." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Sati sakukala kuyehova, utixo wobawo betu, weva uyehova ilizwi letu, wabona ubunzima betu, nodinwa lwetu, nembandezeko yetu." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Waye uyehova wasipumisa e‐Jipete ngesandla esomeleleyo, nangengalo eyolulweyo, nangesoyikiso esikulu, nangemiqondiso, nangemimangaliso:" 
Deuteronomy26:9 ude wasizisa kulendawo, wasinika ilizwe eli, ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Kaloku, bona ke, ndisizisile isiqalo sokuqa̔ma kwomhlaba, endiwupiweyo nguwe, Yehova! Kwa njalo uya kusibeka pantsi ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wako, ubedeshe pambi kwoyehova, utixo wako:" 
Deuteronomy26:11 wauya kuvuya pezu kwazo zonke izinto ezilungileyo azinikile kuwe uyehova, utixo wako, nakuyo indlu yako; wena, nom‐Levi, nowasemzini opakati kwenu." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Nxa ugqibile ukuhlaula zonke izishumi zenzuzo yako, ngomnyaka wesitatu, umnyaka wezishumi ezo; na nxa unikileyo kum‐Levi, kowasemzini, koyinkedama, nakumhlolokazi, ukuba badle pakati kwamasango ako, bahlute nokuhluta;" 
Deuteronomy26:13 uya kwandula ukutsho pambi kwoyehova, utixo wako, usiti: Ndisusile okuyingcwele endlwini yam, ndandikunikile kum‐Levi, nakowasemzini, koyinkedama, nakumhlolokazi, njengayo yonke imiyalelo yako undiyalele yona: andigqitanga emitetweni yako, andiyilibalanga kanjako:" 
Deuteronomy26:14 andityanga nto kuko elusizini lwam, andisusanga nto kuko ngenxa yoko kunco̔lileyo, andinikanga nto kuko kofileyo kanjalo; ndivile ilizwi likayehova, utixo wam, ndenzile ngako konke undiyalele kona." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Kangela pantsi usentlalweni yako engcwele, usezulwini, ubatamsanqele abantu bako o‐Sirayeli, nelizwe ulinikile kuti, njengokuba ubufungela obawo betu, ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Namhla nje uyehova, utixo wako, ukuyalele ukuba uzenze ezizimiselo nezigwebo: kukona uya kuzigcina uzenze ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Uyehova umvumile namhla ukuba ungutixo wako, nokuba uya kuhamba ezindleleni zake, ugcine izimiselo zake, nemiyalelo yake, nezigwebo zake, uve nokuva ilizwi lake." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Kanjalo uyehova uvumile wena namhla ukuba ungabantu bake abanqabileyo, njengokuba etshilo kuwe, nokuba uya kugcina yonke imiyalelo yake:" 
Deuteronomy26:19 ukuze akubeke pezulu pezu kwazo zonke intlanga azenzileyo, eludunyisweni, nasegameni, nasebungcwaliseni; nokuze ube ngabantu abangcwele kuyehova, utixo wako, njengokuba etshile." 
Deuteronomy27:1 WAZA u‐Mosesi, kwa nabadala bo‐Sirayeli, wayalela abantu, ngokuti: Yigcine yonke lemiyalelo endiniyalelayo namhla." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Kwakuya kuti, ngomhla eniwela i‐Yoredane ukuya elizweni enilipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, uya kuzipakamisela amatye amakulu, uwatyabeke ngekalike:" 
Deuteronomy27:3 wauya kuba̔la pezu kwawo onke amazwi alomteto, wakuba uwelile; ukuze ungene kwelozwe ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako, ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi, njengokuba uyehova, utixo woyihlo bako, etetile kuwe." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Ngako kuya kuti nxa niwelileyo i‐Yoredane, niya kupakamisa amatye la, endiyalela nina ngawo namhla, entabeni ye‐Hebali, uwatyabeke ngekalike." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Wauya kwakela kona isibingelo kuyehova, utixo wako, isibingelo samatye; akuyi kufunqula pezu kwawo into yesincete." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Ngamatye epela uya kusaka ngawo isibingelo sikayehova, utixo wako; wauya kunikela pezu kwaso amadini okutshiswa kuyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Kanjalo uya kubinga imibingo yoxolo, utye kona, uvuye nokuvuya ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Wauya kuba̔la pezu kwamatye lawo onke amazwi alomteto, ekolisile ukuqingqwa." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Wandula wateta u‐Mosesi, nabaperisite abangaba‐Levi, kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli, esiti: Yiti tu, upulapule, Sirayeli! namhla nje waba ngabantu bakayehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Ngako uya kuliva ilizwi likayehova, utixo wako, niyenze imiyalelo yake nemimiselo yake endikuyalelayo namhla." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Waza u‐Mosesi wabayala abantu ngalomini, esiti:" 
Deuteronomy27:12 Aba baya kuma ukutamsanqelisa abantu pezu kwentaba ye‐Gerizime, nakuba niwelile i‐Yoredane: u‐Simone, no‐Levi, no‐Juda, no‐Yisakare, no‐Josefe, no‐Benjamine." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Kanjalo aba baya kuma ngenxa yesiqalekiso entabeni ye‐Hebali: u‐Rubene, u‐Gadi, no‐Ashere, no‐Zebulone, u‐Dane, no‐Nefatali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Babeya kuteta aba‐Levi, bati kuwo onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ngelizwi elikulu:" 
Deuteronomy27:15 Makaqalekiswe lowamntu owenzayo umfanekiso oqingqiweyo umhlaumbi otyityishiweyo, into eyintshontsho kuyehova, umsebenzi wezandla zencibi, awubeke emfihlelweni! Babeya kupendula bonke abantu, bati: Amene." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Makaqalekiswe odelayo uyise umhlaumbi unina! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene. 
Deuteronomy27:17 Makaqalekiswe oshenxisayo umda wommelwane wake! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene. 
Deuteronomy27:18 Makaqalekiswe olahlekisa oyimfama endleleni! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene. 
Deuteronomy27:19 Makaqalekiswe otyekisayo ibango lowasemzini, ne lenkedama, nelomhlolokazi! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene." 
Deuteronomy27:20 Makaqalekiswe olala nomfazi kayise! ngokuba elityila isondo lengubo yoyise. Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene. 
Deuteronomy27:21 Makaqalekiswe olala nesinye isilo! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene. 
Deuteronomy27:22 Makaqalekiswe olala nodade wake, intombi kayise, umhlaumbi intombi kanina! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene." 
Deuteronomy27:23 Makaqalekiswe olala nomkwekazi wake! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene. 
Deuteronomy27:24 Makaqalekiswe ohlabayo ummelwane wake ngasese! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene. 
Deuteronomy27:25 Makaqalekiswe owamkela ibaso lokuba ambulale ubomi ongenatyala! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene. 
Deuteronomy27:26 Makaqalekiswe lowo ongayi kuqinisa onke amazwi alomteto ukuwenza! Babeya kuti bonke abantu: Amene. 
Deuteronomy28:1 KWAKUYA kuti, ukuba uya kukutala ukupulapula ilizwi likayehova, utixo wako, lokuba ulumkele ukuyenza yonke imiyalelo yake endikuyalelayo namhla, uya kwandula uyehova, utixo wako, akubeke pezulu pezu kwazo zonke intlanga zomhlaba." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Kanjalo onke lamatamsanqa oza pezu kwako, akufumane, xeshekweni upulapulayo ilizwi likayehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Wotanyusanqelwa esixekweni, wotanyusanqelwa nasentsimini." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Kwotanyusanqelwa isixakato sesizalo sako, nesiqa̔mo somhlaba wako, nesixakato sezilo zako, inzalo yemazi zako, nemihlambi yegusha zako." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Kwotanyusanqelwa isitya sako nomkombe wokubuca wako. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Wotanyusanqelwa ekungeneni kwako, wotanyusanqelwa nasekupumeni kwako." 
Deuteronomy28:7 Uyehova uya kuzenza intshaba zako ezivukayo ngakuwe zoyiswe pambi kwako: ngendlela inye ziya kupumela kuwe, nangendlela ezisixe̔nxe ziya kwesaba pambi kwako." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Uyehova woxela ukuba itamsanqa libe nawe ezinyangweni zako, nakuko konke usolulela kona isandla sako; waeya kukutamsanqela elizweni ulipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Uyehova wokumisa ube ngabantu abangcwele kuye, njengokuba ekufungele, xeshekweni uya kugcina imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wako, uhambe nokuhamba ezindleleni zake." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Baye bonke abantu bomhlaba beya kubona ukuba igama likayehova libiziwe pezu kwako; bandule boyike ngenxa yako. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Kanjalo uyehova wokutyebisa kube kokulungileyo, ngesixakato sesizalo sako, nangesixakato sezilo zako, nangesiqa̔mo somhlaba wako, emhlabeni uyehova wayefungela oyihlo bako ukuba awunike kuwe." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Uyehova wokuvulela imbekelo yake elungileyo, izulu, ukunisa imvula elizweni lako ngexesha layo, nokutamsanqela wonke umsebenzi wesandla sako; wauya kuboleka intlanga ezininzi, kanti wena akuyi kuboleka kuzo." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Kanjalo uyehova uya kukwenza ube yintloko, ungabi ngumsila; woba pezulu kupela, akuyi kuba pantsi; nxa nipulapula imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wako, endikuyalelayo namhla, ukuyigcina nokuyenza;" 
Deuteronomy28:14 uze ungapambuki kuwo onke amazwi endikuyalelayo namhla, nangasekunene nangasekohlo, ukuya kulandela otixo bambi ukuba ubakonze." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Kodwa kuya kuti, xa ungayi kupulapula ilizwi likayehova, utixo wako, lokuba ulumkele ukuyenza yonke imiyalelo yake nemimiselo yake, endikuyalelayo namhla; kuya kwandula kuze pezu kwako zonke iziqalekiso ezi, zikufumane." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Woqalekiswa esixekweni, woqalekiswa nasentsimini." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Kwoqalekiswa isitya sako nomkombe wokubuca wako. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Kwoqalekiswa isixakato sesizalo sako, nesiqa̔mo somhlaba wako, inzalo yemazi zako, nemihlambi yegusha zako." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Woqalekiswa ekungeneni kwako, woqalekiswa nasekupumeni kwako." 
Deuteronomy28:20 Uyehova uya kutuma pezu kwako isiqalekiso, impitizeliso, nesohlwayo, kuko konke usolulela kona isandla sako ukuba ukwenze; ude utshatyalaliswe, nakude ubube kamsinyane, ngenxa yenkohlakalo yezenzo zako, ondishiyileyo ngazo." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Uyehova uya kwenza isifo esibubisayo sinamatele kuwe, ade akugqibele pezu kwomhlaba, apo uya kona ukuwufuya." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Uyehova wokubeta ngokungcungcuteka, nangecesine, nangesitsha, nangobushushu obukulu, nangokwoma, nangembabala, nangesihumba, eziya kukuputuma ude ubube." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Izulu lako, elipezulu kwentloko yako, loba lubedu, nomhlaba wako, opantsi kwako, wona woba sisincete." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Uyehova uya kwenza imvula yelizwe lako ibe yintlabati notuli; yohla ezulwini pezu kwako, ude utshatyalaliswe." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Uyehova uya kukwenza woyiswe pambi kwentshaba zako; ngendlela inye wopumela kuzo, nangendlela zisixe̔nxe uya kwesaba pambi kwazo; wauya kuba yinto yokuzanyazanyiswa kubo bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Kanjalo isidumbu sako soba kukutya kuzo zonke intaka zezulu, nakuwo amaṙamncwa omhlaba, kungeko oya kuzoyikisa." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Uyehova wokubeta ngezilonda zase‐Jipete, nangamatumba, nangokwekwe, nangombabane, oya kukohlwa ukupiliswa kuzo." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Uyehova wokubeta ngobugeza, nangobumfama, nangesiduli sentliziyo;" 
Deuteronomy28:29 wauya kuputaputa emini, njengokuba imfama iputaputa ebumnyameni, nendlela zako akuyi kuzitamsanqelekisa; kodwa uya kubandezelwa upangwe nokupangwa kupela imihla yonke, kungeko oya kusindisa." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Uya kuxama umfazi, kanti indoda yimbi iya kulala naye; uya kuyaka indlu, kanti akuyi kuhlala kuyo; uya kutyala isitiya semiti yeveyine, kanti idreyive zaso akuyi kuzidla." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Inkabi yako iya kuxe̔lwa pambi kwamehlo ako, kanti akuyi kutya kuyo; iqwaṙashe lako liya kuhlaselwa kwa sebusweni bako, lingabuyi lize kuwe: igusha zako ziya kunikwa ezintshabeni zako, kungeko kuwe oya kusindisa." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Onyana bako nentombi zako baya kunikwa ebantwini bambi, aze amehlo ako akangele, apelele bona imini yonke; kanti akuyi kubako nto emandleni esandla sako." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Isiqa̔mo somhlaba wako, nayo yonke inzuzo yako, baya kuyidla abantu ongabaziyo; wauya kubandezelwa utyunyuzwe nokutyunyuzwa kupela imihla yonke;" 
Deuteronomy28:34 ude ugeze ngenxa yombono wamehlo ako oya kuwubona. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Uyehova wokubeta ngezilonda ezibi, emadolweni nasemilenzeni, oya kukohlwa ukupoliswa kuzo, kwa kuwo umzantsi wonyawo lwako kude kube selukakayini lwako." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Uyehova uya kukusa wena, nokumkani wako oya kummisa pezu kwako, eluhlangeni ongalwazanga wena noyihlo bako; apo uya kakonza kona otixo bambi, imiti namatye." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Wauya kuba sisimangaliswa, n ento yokuzekeliswa, nelizwi lokuhlekisa, pakati kwabo bonke abantu apo uyehova aya kukuqu̔bela kona." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Uya kupuma nembewu eninzi ukuya entsimini, kanti yinto encinane uya kuyivuna; ngokuba inkumbi ziya kuyigqibela." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Uya kutyala izitiya zemiti yeveyine, uzilime kanjalo, kanti iveyine akuyi kuyisela, n edreyive akuyi kuzibuta; ngokuba uṙuxeshe eya kuzidla." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Woba nemiti yeminquma kuyo yonke imida yako, kanti akuyi kuzitambisa ngeoli yayo; ngokuba iminquma yako iya kuvutuluka." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Onyana nentombi uya kubazala, kanti abayi kuba ngabako; ngokuba beya kuya ekutinjweni." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Yonke imiti yako neziqa̔mo zomhlaba wako inkumbi ziya kuzidla. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Owasemzini opakati kwako uya kunyuka pezu kwako ngokupezulu kakulu; kanti wena uya kuhla ngokupantsi kanye. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Yena wokuboleka, kanti akuyi kumboleka wena; yena woba yintloko, kanti wena woba ngumsila." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Kanjako zonke eziziqalekiso ziya kuza pezu kwako, zikuputume, zikufumane, ude utshatyalaliswe; ngokokuba ungapulapulanga ilizwi likayehova, utixo wako, lokuba ugcine imiyalelo yake nemimiselo yake akuyalele ngayo." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Zoba pezu kwako zibe ngumqondiso nommangaliso, napezu kwenzalo yako kude kube ngunapakade." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Ngenxa yokuba ungamkonzanga uyehova, utixo wako, ngovuyo, nangokucwayita kwentliziyo, ebuninzini bezinto zonke;" 
Deuteronomy28:48 kukona uya kukonza intshaba zako, aya kuzituma uyehova ngakuwe, ekulambeni, nasekunxanweni, nasebuzéni, nasekuswelekeni kwento zonke: waeya kubeka iyokwe yesincete pezu kwentamo yako, ade akutshabalalise." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Uyehova uya kuzisa ngakuwe uhlanga luvela kude, kwa sencameni yomhlaba, njengokuba lubaleka ukozi; uhlanga olunteto ungayi kuyiva;" 
Deuteronomy28:50 uhlanga olulukuni ngobuso, olungayi kubuka ubuso bomdala, nomtsha aluyi kumpata ngofefe;" 
Deuteronomy28:51 oluya kusidla isixakato sezilo zako, nesiqa̔mo somhlaba wako, ude utshatyalaliswe; olungayi kukushiyela inqolowa, n eveyine, neoli, n enzalo yemazi zako, nemihlambi yegusha zako, lude lukububise." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Lwaluya kukuvingcela kuwo onke amasango ako, zide ziwe pantsi indonga zako ezinde ezinqatyisiweyo, obutemba kuzo, kulo lonke ilizwe lako; ewe, lwokuvingcela kuwo onke amasango ako, kulo lonke ilizwe lako ulipiweyo nguyehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Wauya kutya isixakato sesizalo sako, inyama yonyana bako neyentombi zako, ubanikiweyo nguyehova, utixo wako, ekuvingcelweni, nasekuxinezelweni, eziya kukuxinezela ngako intshaba zako." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Londoda itambileyo pakati kwako, ebubetyebetye kakulu, iliso layo loba libi ngakuye umzalwana wayo, nangakuye umfazi wasesifubeni sayo, nangakuso isisalela sabantwana bayo iya kubasalisa;" 
Deuteronomy28:55 ide inganiki namnye kubo kwinyama yabantwana bayo iya kubatya, ngenxa yokuba kungeko nto emshiyelweyo; ekuvingcelweni, nasekuxinezelweni, eziya kukuxinezela ngako intshaba zako kuwo onke amasango ako." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Lomfazi otambileyo pakati kwako, obubetyebetye, obengayi kulinga ukuba abeke umzantsi wonyawo lwake emhlabeni, ngobubetyebetye nangokutamba, iliso lake loba libi ngakuyo indoda yasesifubeni sake, nangakuye unyana wake, nangakuyo intombi yake," 
Deuteronomy28:57 nangakuwo umkaya opumayo pakati kwenyawo zake, nangakubo abantwana bake aya kubazala; ngokuba eya kubatya ngasese, ngokusweleka kwento zonke, ekuvingcelweni, nasekuxinezelweni, eziya kukuxinezela ngako intshaba zako emasangweni ako." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Ukuba akuyi kulumkela ukwenza ngawo onke amazwi alomteto, aba̔liweyo kulencwadi, ukuze uloyike eligama libungcwalisa neloyikekayo, uyehova, utixo wako;" 
Deuteronomy28:59 uya kwandula uyehova enze izibetwa zako nezibetwa zenzalo yako zibe ngummangaliso; izibetwa ezikulu ezisisimakade, nemikuhlane emibi esisimakade." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Waeya kujikisa pezu kwako zonke izifo zase‐Jipete, ezo ubuzoyika, eziya kunamatela kuwe." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Kanjalo yonke imikuhlane, nazo zonke izibeto, ezingaba̔liweyo encwadini yalomteto, wozihlisa uyehova pezu kwako, ude utshatyalaliswe." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Naniya kushiywa ningabantu abancinane, endaweni yokuba nibe ninjengenkwenkwezi yezulu ukuba baninzi; ngokuba ungapulapulanga ilizwi likayehova, utixo wako." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Kwakuya kuti, njengokuba uyehova ebegcoba pezu kwenu ukunenzela okulungileyo nokunandisa, kwa njalo uyehova wogcoba pezu kwenu ukunibubisa nokunitshabalalisa; naniya kudonyulwa elizweni, apo uya kona ukuba ulifuye." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Kanjalo uyehova wokuti sa pakati kwentlanga zonke, kwa kwenye incam yomhlaba kude kube kwenye incam yomhlaba; wauya kukonza apo otixo bambi, abo ungabazanga wena noyihlo bako, imiti namatye." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Napakati kwabaheyideni abo akuyi kuba nakwonwaba; kanjako umzantsi wonyawo lwako awuyi kuba nakupumla: ngokuba uyehova eya kukunika apo intliziyo yokungcangcazela, nokupela kwamehlo, nokucubuka kwompefumlo." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Ubomi bako bojinga pambi kwako; uya kwoyika ebusuku nasemini, ungatembi ebomini bako nje." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ngokusa uya kuti: Akwaba bekukukuhlwa! nangokuhlwa woti: Akwaba bekukukusa! ngenxa yokwoyika kwentliziyo yako uya kwoyika ngako, nangenxa yombono wamehlo ako uya kuwubona." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Waye uyehova eya kukubuyisela e‐Jipete ngenqanawa, ngendlela endandisiti kuwe: Akusayi kupinda uyibone; naniya kutengiselwa apo ezintshabeni zenu nibe ngamakoboka namakobokakazi, kanti akuyi kubako o ni tengayo." 
Deuteronomy29:1 NGAWO la amazwi ocebano, olo uyehova wamyalela u‐Mosesi ukuba alwenze nosapo luka‐Sirayeli ezweni le‐Mowabi, ngapandle kwocebano wabelwenzile nalo e‐Horebe." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Waza u‐Mosesi wabiza o‐Sirayeli bonke, wati kubo: Nikubonile konke akwenzileyo uyehova pambi kwamehlo enu, elizweni le‐Jipete, ku‐Faro, nakuzo zonke izicaka zake, nakulo lonke ilizwe lake;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 ezozilingelo zikulu amehlo ako azibonileyo, imiqondiso, naleyo imimangaliso mikulu:" 
Deuteronomy29:4 kodwa uyehova akanipanga intliziyo yokuqiqa, namehlo okubona, nendlebe zokuva, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ndinihambisile iminyaka ingamashumi mane kulentlango: izivato zenu aziguganga pezu kwenu, nesihlangu sako asiguganga elunyaweni lwako." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Isonka anisidlanga, neveyine notywala aniziselanga; ukuze nikwazi ukuba ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Kekaloku sakufika kulendawo, kwapuma u‐Sihone, ukumkani we‐Heshebone, no‐Hogi, ukumkani we‐Bashane, ukuza kusikaulela ukuba kuliwe; saza sababeta:" 
Deuteronomy29:8 nelizwe labo salibamba, salinika libe lilifa kuma‐Rubene, nakuma‐Gadi, nakwisiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Wagcineni ngoko amazwi ocebano olu, nenze ngawo, ukuze nilungiseke kuko konke enikwenzayo." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Nimi namhla nonke ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wenu: intloko zenu zezizwe zenu, abadala benu, namagosa enu, onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli;" 
Deuteronomy29:11 intsapo zenu, abafazi benu, nowasemzini wako opakati kwomnquba wako, kwa kulowo ogaula inkuni yako kude kube kulowo oka amanzi ako:" 
Deuteronomy29:12 ukuba ungene elucebanweni lukayehova, utixo wako, nasesifungweni sake, olo uyehova, utixo wako, ulwenza nawe namhla;" 
Deuteronomy29:13 ukuze akumise namhla ube ngabantu kuye, nokuba yena abe ngutixo kuwe, njengokuba etshilo kuwe, nanjengokuba efungele oyihlo bako, u‐Abrahame, u‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Kanjako andilwenzi nani nodwa ucebano olu, nesifungo esi;" 
Deuteronomy29:15 koko ndilwenza nalowo okoyo apa nati, emi namhla ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wetu, kwa nalowo ongekoyo apa nati namhla:" 
Deuteronomy29:16 (ngokuba nikwazi nina okokuba sibe sihlala ezweni le‐Jipete, nokokuba sacanda pakati kwentlanga enanicanda kuzo:" 
Deuteronomy29:17 nezinto zazo ezizondekayo nizibonile, kwa izitixwana zazo, imiti namatye, isilivere negolide, ezibe zinazo:)" 
Deuteronomy29:18 hleze kubeko pakati kwenu indoda, umhlaumbi umfazi, umhlaumbi isizalwane, umhlaumbi isizwe, leyo intliziyo yayo ijika namhla kuyehova, utixo wetu, ukuya kukonza otixo bentlanga ezi; hleze kubeko pakati kwenu ingcambu ehlanzayo umfuno onobuhlungu nomhlonyane;" 
Deuteronomy29:19 kuze kuti ke, yakuva amazwi esifungo esi, izitamsanqele entliziyweni yayo, isiti: Ndoba noxolo, nakuba ndihambayo ngobulukuni bentliziyo yam, ukuze ndongeze ukunxila pezu kwokunxanwa." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Uyehova akayi kuvuma ukuyixolela, kodwa oko kuya kuquma ingqumbo kayehova nobukwele bake ngakuyo indoda leyo, nazo zonke iziqalekiso eziba̔liweyo kulencwadi ziya kulala pezu kwayo; waye uyehova eya kucima igama layo ngapantsi kwezulu." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Kanjalo uyehova uya kuyahlulela ebubini kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, njengazo zonke iziqalekiso zocebano oluba̔liweyo encwadini yalomteto." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Siya kwandula siti isizukulwana esilandelayo, abantwana benu abaya kuvuka emva kwenu, nowasemzini oya kuvela ezweni elikude, bakubona izibetwa zelizwe elo, nemikuhlane yalo uyehova alibuleleyo ngayo;" 
Deuteronomy29:23 wonke umhlaba walo uyisufure, netyuwa, n okutsha nje, ungahlwayelwa, ungahlumisi nokuhlumisa, ingapumi kuwo nanye inca, njengasekucitweni kwe‐Sodome ne‐Gomora, kwe‐Adema ne‐Tseboyime, owazicitayo uyehova ngengqumbo yake nangomsindo wake:" 
Deuteronomy29:24 ziya kuti kwa zonke intlanga: Kungenxa yanina enzileyo uyehova njengokunjalo kwelilizwe? buti nina ubushushu balengqumbo enkulu? 
Deuteronomy29:25 Kwakuya kutiwa: Kungenxa yokuba bashiyile ucebano lukayehova, utixo woyise babo, owabelwenza nabo akuba ebapumisile ezweni le‐Jipete:" 
Deuteronomy29:26 ngokuba beyile bakonza otixo bambi, batoba pambi kwabo, otixo ababengabazi n a bengababelanga kubo:" 
Deuteronomy29:27 ngako yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakulo elolizwe, kuze kuziswe pezu kwalo zonke iziqalekiso eziba̔liweyo kulencwadi:" 
Deuteronomy29:28 waza uyehova wabancotula emhlabeni wabo, ngengqumbo, nangomsindo, nangobuṙalaṙume obukulu, wabaposa elizweni limbi, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Izinto ezifihlakeleyo ze zikayehova, utixo wetu; kodwa ezo zityiliweyo zezetu, nezabantwana betu, kude kube ngunapakade, size siwenze onke amazwi alomteto." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Kwakuya kuti, xeshekweni zonke ezizinto ziya kuza pezu kwako, itamsanqeliso nesiqalekiso, endizibekileyo pambi kwako, wandule uzikumbulele entliziyweni yako pakati kwazo zonke intlanga, apo akugxotele kona uyehova, utixo wako," 
Deuteronomy30:2 ude uguqukele kuyehova, utixo wako, ulive ilizwi lake njengako konke endikuyalelayo namhla, wena nabantwana bako, ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 woti uyehova, utixo wako, abuyise ukutinjwa kwako, abe netaṙu pezu kwako, abuye akubute kuzo zonke intlanga, apo akute sa uyehova, utixo wako, kona." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Ukuba kwobako abagxotiweyo bako esipelweni sezulu, kwa kona apo uyehova, utixo wako, wokubuta, nakona apo wokutabata:" 
Deuteronomy30:5 waye uyehova, utixo wako, eya kukuzisa elizweni ababelifuya oyihlo bako, wauya kulifuya; kanjalo wokwenzela okulungileyo, akwandise ngapezu kwoyihlo bako." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Waye uyehova, utixo wako, eya kwalusa intliziyo yako, nentliziyo yenzalo yako, ukuba umtande uyehova, utixo wako, ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako, ukuze ubudle ubomi." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Kanjako uyehova, utixo wako, wobeka zonke iziqalekiso ezi pezu kwentshaba zako, napezu kwabatiyi bako, abakutshutshisayo." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Wauya kubuya wena upulapule ilizwi likayehova, uyenze yonke imiyalelo yake endikuyalelayo namhla." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Waye uyehova, utixo wako, eya kukutyebisa ngawo wonke umsebenzi wesandla sako, ngesixakato sesizalo sako, nangesixakato sezilo zako, nangesiqa̔mo somhlaba wako, kube kokulungileyo: ngokuba uyehova eya kubuya agcobe pezu kwako ukukwenz ela okulungileyo, njengokuba wabegcoba pezu kwoyihlo bako:" 
Deuteronomy30:10 nxa uya kupulapula ilizwi likayehova, utixo wako, lokuba uyigcine imiyalelo yake nemimiselo yake eba̔liweyo kulencwadi yomteto; nxa uya kuguqukela kuyehova, utixo wako, ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Ngokuba lomyalelo endikuyalela ngawo namhla, ungakunqabeli wona, ungekude wona kanjako." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Awusezulwini, ukuba utsho ukuti: Ngubanina oya kusinyukela aye ezulwini, asitabatele wona, ukuze siwuve, siwenze?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Awupesheya kwolwandle kanjalo, ukuba utsho ukuti: Ngubanina oya kusiwelela aye pesheya kwolwandle, asitabatele wona, ukuze siwuve, siwenze?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Koko ilizwi eli likufupi kuwe kakulu, kwa semlonyeni wako, nasentliziyweni yako, ukuba ulenze." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Kangela ke, ndibekile pambi kwako namhla, ubomi nokulungileyo, nokufa nokubi:" 
Deuteronomy30:16 ngokuba ndikuyala namhla ukuba umtande uyehova, utixo wako, n okuba uhambe ezindleleni zake, nokuba ugcine imiyalelo yake, nemimiselo yake, nezigwebo zake; ukuze ubudle ubomi, wande nokwanda, ati uyehova, utixo wako, akutamsanqele elizweni apo uya kona ukulifuya:" 
Deuteronomy30:17 kodwa ukuba intliziyo yako iyajika, ude ungeva, wandule ukukuliswe, utobe pambi kwabo otixo bambi, ubakonze;" 
Deuteronomy30:18 ndiyaxela kuni namhla, okokuba niya kububa ngenyaniso; aniyi kwolula imihla pezu kwelolizwe, apo uwela i‐Yoredane ukuya kungena kona, ukuba ulifuye." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Ndiyanqi̔nisa ngakuni namhla izulu nomhlaba, ukuba ndibekile pambi kwako ubomi nokufa, itamsanqeliso nesiqalekiso: ngako buqashe ubomi, ukuze ubudle ubomi, wena nenzalo yako;" 
Deuteronomy30:20 ukuba umtande uyehova, utixo wako, n okuba upulapule ilizwi lake, nokuba unamatele kuye: ngokuba yena ebubomi bako nobude bemihla yako: ukuba uhlale elizweni owafunga uyehova koyihlo bako, u‐Abrahame, u‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi, ukuba alinike kubo." 
Deuteronomy31:1 WAYA u‐Mosesi wawateta lamazwi kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli," 
Deuteronomy31:2 wati kubo: Ndiyiminyaka ilikulu linamashumi mabini, ubudala bam, namhla; andingebuye ndipume ndingene; ngokuba uyehova etshilo kum ukuti: Akuyi kuwela i‐Yoredane le." 
Deuteronomy31:3 Uyehova, utixo wako, nguye oya kuwela pambi kwako; yena uya kutshabalalisa intlanga ezi kwa sebusweni bako, uze ufuye okwazo: n o‐Yoshuwa, nguye oya kuwela pambi kwako, njengokuba etshilo uyehova." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Waye uyehova eya kwenza kuzo, njengokuba ebesenza ku‐Sihone naku‐Hogi, okumkani waba‐Amori, nakulo ilizwe labo, owabatshabalalisayo." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Kanjalo uyehova wozinika ebusweni benu, ukuba nenze kuzo njengayo yo nke imiyalelo endiniyaleleyo." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Yomelelani nikalipe, ningoyiki, ningankwantyi nokunkwantya pambi kwazo: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, nguye ohamba nawe; akayi kukuyeka, akayi kukushiya kanjalo." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Waza u‐Mosesi wabiza u‐Yoshuwa, wati kuye emehlweni abo bonke o‐Sirayeli: Yomelele ukalipe, ngokuba uya kungena nababantu elizweni, owayefungela oyise babo uyehova ukuba abape lona; wobamkelisa ilifa lalo wena." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Noyehova, nguye ohambayo pambi kwako; woba nawe yena; akayi kukuyeka, akayi kukushiya kanjako: ungoyiki, ungatuswa nokutuswa." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Waye u‐Mosesi waba̔la lomteto, wawunika kubaperisite, onyana baka‐Levi, abatwalayo ityeya yocebano lukayehova, nakubo bonke abadala bo‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Waza u‐Mosesi wabayalela ngokuti: Ekupeleni kweminyaka isixe̔nxe, ngexesha elimisiweyo lomnyaka wokuyeka, ngomtendeleko wamapempe," 
Deuteronomy31:11 bakuza bonke o‐Sirayeli ukuba babonakale ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wako, endaweni aya kunyula yona, uya kulesesha lomteto pambi kwo‐Sirayeli bonke ezindlebeni zabo." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Hlanganisa abantu, amadoda, nabafazi, nentsapo, nowasemzini wako opakati kwamasango ako, ukuze beve, nokuze bafunde, bamoyike uyehova, utixo wenu, balumkele ukwenza onke amazwi alomteto:" 
Deuteronomy31:13 n okuba abantwana babo, abangawazanga, beve, bafunde ukumoyika uyehova, utixo wenu: yonke imihla eniya kubudla ubomi pezu kwalomhlaba, apo niwela i‐Yoredane ukuya kona, ukuba niwufuye." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Wandula u‐Yehova wati ku‐Mosesi: Bona ke, iyasondela imihla yako yokufa; biza u‐Yoshuwa, nizimise ententeni yentlangano, ndize ndimyalezele. Baya u‐Mosesi no‐Yoshuwa, bazimisa ententeni yentlangano." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Waza wabonakala uyehova ententeni, entsikeni yelifu; yati intsika yelifu yema pezu kwocango lwentente." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Mosesi: Bona ke, uya kulala noyihlo bako; baye ababantu beya kusuka, baṙexezele emva kwotixo babasemzini belozwe, apo baya kona babe pakati kwabo, bandishiye, balwapule nocebano lwam endilwenzile nabo." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Iya kwandula ivute ingqumbo yam ngakubo ngomhla lowo, ndibashiye, ndibafihlele nobuso bam, babeya kudliwa, bafunyanwe bububi obuninzi nabubunzima; bade bati ngomhla lowo: Asi ngenxa yokuba kungeko utixo wetu pakati kwetu na, lento sifunyenwe bobububi?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Kwa ngalomhla ndogqibela ukufihla ubuso bam, ngenxa yayo yonke inkohlakalo abayenzileyo, ngokuba bejikele kotixo bambi." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Ngako kaloku, ziba̔leleni lengoma, uyifundise elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, yibeke emilonyeni yalo; ukuze lengoma ibe indinqi̔nela ngakulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Ngokuba ndiya kulungenisa elizweni endifungele oyise balo ngalo, elela ubisi nobusi, lwaluya kudla, luhlute, lutyebe nokutyeba; lwandule lujikele kotixo bambi, lukonze kubo, ludele mna, nocebano lwam lulwapule." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Kwakuya kuti, okuya lufunyenwe bububi obuninzi nabubunzima, yopendula ingoma le ebusweni balo ibe linqi̔na; ngokuba ingayi kulityalwa imke emlonyeni wenzalo yalo: ngokuba ndisazi ukucinga kwalo olukwenzayo lona namhla, ndingekalungenisi elizweni endifungile ngalo." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Waza u‐Mosesi wayiba̔la lengoma kwa ngalomini, wayifundisa elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Wandula wamyalezela u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, wati: Yomelela ukalipe; ngokuba wena uya kungenisa usapo luka‐Sirayeli elizweni endifungileyo ngalo kulo; ndandiya kubako nawe." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni u‐Mosesi ebegqibile ukuwaba̔la amazwi alomteto encwadini, ada apeliswa," 
Deuteronomy31:25 wandula u‐Mosesi wabayalela aba‐Levi, abatwala ityeya yocebano lukayehova, esiti:" 
Deuteronomy31:26 Yitabate lencwadi yomteto, niyibeke ecaleni letyeya yocebano lukayehova, utixo wenu; ukuba ibeko kona ibe linqi̔na ngakuwe:" 
Deuteronomy31:27 ngokuba ndisazi ukuvukela kwako, nentamo yako elukuni. Bona ke, nxa ndisahleli nani namhla, nivukele ngakuye uyehova; kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi emva kwokufa kwam!" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Hlanganiselani kum bonke abadala bezizwe zenu, namagosa enu, ukuba nditete lamazwi ezindlebeni zabo, ndinqi̔nise ngakubo izulu nomhlaba." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ngokuba ndisazi ukuba noti, emva kwokufa kwam, nigqibele ukuzonakalisa, nipambuke endleleni endiniyalele ngayo; nokuba ububi bonihlela emihleni yasemva, ekuya niyenza inkohlakalo emehlweni kayehova, ukumqumbisa ngomsebenzi wezandla zenu." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Waza u‐Mosesi wawateta ezindlebeni zayo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli amazwi alengoma, ada apeliswa." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Bekani indlebe, mazulu! ndandiya kuteta; upulapule, mhlaba! amazwi omlomo wam." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Imfundiso yam iya kucapaza njengemvula, inteto yam yotontsela njengombete, njengomvumbi pezu kwohlaza, nanjengezipango pezu kwenca." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ngokuba igama likayehova ndiya kulishumayela: nikani ubukulu kutixo wetu! 
Deuteronomy32:4 Nguye ilityekazi, ufezekile umsebenzi wake; ngokuba zonke indlela zake zibubulungisa: ungutixo wenyaniso, engenabumenemene; ulungile, ufanele yena." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Bazonakalisile ngakuye, asisesabantwana bake isipako sabo; basisizukulwana esigwenxa nesigoso." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Nobuyekezela uyehova ngokunjalo na, nina bantu abanyabileyo abangenabulumko? asi nguye na uyihlo okutengileyo, lowo ukwenzileyo okuqinisileyo?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Kumbula imihla yakudala, nakana iminyaka yesizukulwana ngesizukulwana: buza kuyihlo wako, wokwazisa ke; kubadala bako, bokuxelela ke." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Nxa opezu konke wazamkelisa intlanga ilifa, nxa wabahlukanisa onyana baka‐Adame, wamisa imida yabantu ngokwenani losapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Ngokuba isabelwa sikayehova singabantu bake; u‐Yakobi usisahlulelwa selifa lake. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Wamfumana elizweni lentlango nasebugxwayibeni bokulila obulubala; wamzekelelisa, wamqondisa, wamlondoloza njengokozo lweliso lake." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Njengokuba ukozi luvusa indlu yalo, ludidizela pezu kwamatole alo, lusolula amapiko alo, luwatabata, luwatwala pezu kwentsiba zalo;" 
Deuteronomy32:12 kwa njalo wamkapa uyehova yedwa, kungabangako naye utixo wasemzini." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Wamkwelisa pezu kwenduli zomhlaba, ukuba atye imifuno yezindle; wamanyisa ubusi buvela eweni, neoli ivela elityeni elilukuni;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 amafuta epehlwa enkomo, namasi egusha, kunye nenqata lemvana, nenkunzi zegusha ezizelwe e‐Bashane, nebokwe, kunye nenqata lezintso zenqolowa; negazi ledreyive wabulisela libe yiveyine yako." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Koko u‐Yeshurune watyeba, wakaba; (utyebile, uyingxukuma, ugujungelwe kukutyeba;) waza walahla utixo owamenzayo, wacekisa ilitye losindiswa lwake." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Bamvusele ikwele ngo tixo basemzini; ngezinto ezibuntshontsho bamqumbisile. 
Deuteronomy32:17 Babingele idemoni, benga bingelanga utixo; otixo ababengabazi; abatsha, abavela kufupi, abo oyihlo benu babengabankwantyi." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Ilitye elakuzalayo uliyekile; utixo owakudalayo umlibele. 
Deuteronomy32:19 Waza uyehova akubona, wabadela ngenxa yengcapukiso yonyana bake nentombi zake." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Wayesiti: Ndobafihlela ubuso bam; ndiya kubona ukupela kwabo ukuba kwoba yinto nina; ngokuba besisizukulwana sokujikajika, usapo ekungekulo inyaniseko." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bandivusele ikwele ngokungenguye utixo; bandiqumbisile ngezinto zabo ezingendawo: nam ndobavusela ikwele ngabangengabo abantu; ngohlanga olunyabileyo ndiya kubaqumbisa. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Ngokuba umlilo upenjiwe ngengqumbo yam, oya kutshisa kude kube sehadesi yasezantsi kanye; wauya kuwudla umhlaba nokuhluma kwawo, uwavutise amasekwa entaba." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndiya kufumbelela pezu kwabo amashwa; intolo zam ndiya kuzigqiba pezu kwabo. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Baya kucontiswa yindlala, badliwe sisifo esitshayo, nasisitshabalaliso esiṙaṙa: namazinyo amaṙamncwa ndowatuma pezu kwabo, kunye nobuhlungu benyoka." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Ngapandle isiṙele, nasezindaweni zapakati isoyikiso, siya kuhluta kwa umfana nentombi, owanyayo kunye nendoda yezimvi." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Ndati: Bendiya kubapepula njengomoya, bendiya kupelisa inkunjulwa yabo pakati kwabantu," 
Deuteronomy32:27 ukuba bendingoyiki ingcapukiso yotshaba; hleze abalane babo ba ndi kanyele; hleze bati: Sisandla setu esipakamileyo, asi nguye uyehova okwenzileyo konke oku." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Ngokuba beluhlanga olulahlekene nobucebo, nekungeko kubo ukuqonda." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Akwaba babelumkile, bagqala oku, banakana ukupela kwabo!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Ngeete nina omnye ukusukela iwaka, nababini ukusabisa ishumi lamawaka, ukuba ilitye labo belingatengisanga ngabo, nokuba uyehova ebengabayekelelanga?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Ngokuba ilitye labo lingenjengelitye letu, kwa intshaba zetu zingabagwebi." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Ngokuba umti weveyine wabo uvela emtini weveyine wase‐Sodome, nasezindleni zase‐Gomora; idreyive zabo zidreyive zobunyongoṙa, banezipa eziṙaṙa." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Iveyine yabo ibubuhlungu benamba, nobuhlungu obubudlwengu bamaṙamba." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Akubekelwanga kum na oku, kuncanyatiselwe pakati kwendyebo zam?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Kukokwam ukupindezela nokubuyekeza; ngexesha elifanelekileyo unyawo lwabo luya kutyibilika: ngokuba umhla welishwa labo ukufupi, nezinto eziza kubahlela zinokukauleza." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Ngokuba uyehova eya kutetelela abantu bake, abe nosizi pezu kwezicaka zake, xeshekweni abonayo ukuba kumkile amandla, nokuba akuko ovaliweyo nokululekileyo." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Waeya kuti: Bapina otixo babo, ilitye babetembela kulo," 
Deuteronomy32:38 ababelidla inqata lemibingo yabo, n eveyine yeminikelo yokusela yabo bayisela? Mabasuke banincede, babe yintsito kuni." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Bonani kaloku ukuba mna ndinguye; akuko utixo kunye nam: ndiyatisa, ndiyenza kudliwe ubomi kanjako; ndiyatyumza, ndiyapolisa kanjako; akuko namnye ongahlangulayo esandleni sam." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Ngokuba ndipakamisela ngasezulwini isandla sam, nditi: Ndihleli mna ndingunapakade." 
Deuteronomy32:41 Ukuba ndiyalola iṙele lam elibengezelayo, nokuba isandla sam siyabamba ugwebo, sendiya kubuyisa impindezelo pezu kwabalane bam, ndibuyekeze kubo abanditiyayo." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Ndonxilisa intolo zam ngegazi, neṙele lam liya kudla inyama; ngegazi labahlatyiweyo nelamatinjwa, kwintloko yabakokeli bentshaba." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Vuyani, zintlanga! kunye n abantu bake: ngokuba eya kupindezelela igazi lezicaka zake, abuyise impindezelo pezu kwabalane bake, axolele ilizwe lake n abantu bake." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Wayesiza u‐Mosesi wawateta onke amazwi alengoma ezindlebeni zabantu, yena, no‐Hosheha unyana ka‐Nune." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Wada wagqiba u‐Mosesi ukuteta onke lamazwi kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli. 
Deuteronomy32:46 Wandula wati kubo: Bekisani intliziyo zenu ngakuwo onke amazwi endiwanqi̔nisayo kuni namhla; eniya kubayalela abantwana benu ukuba balumkele ukuwenza, onke amazwi alomteto." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Ngokuba ingeyinto engendawo le kuni; koko ibubomi benu: nangalento niya kuyolula imihla emhlabeni, eniwela i‐Yoredane ukuya kona ukuba niwufuye." 
Deuteronomy32:48 WAZA uyehova wateta ku‐Mosesi, kwa ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo, esiti:" 
Deuteronomy32:49 Nyukela kulentaba ye‐Habarime, intaba ye‐Nebo, eselizweni le‐Mowabi, engapambi kwe‐Jeriko; ukangele ilizwe le‐Kanane, endilinikayo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli libe yimfuyo;" 
Deuteronomy32:50 ubube entabeni apo unyukela kona, ubutelwe ebantwini bako; njengokuba u‐Arone, umkuluwe wako, wabuba entabeni ye‐Hore, wabutelwa ebantwini bake:" 
Deuteronomy32:51 ngenxa yokuba nibe nigqita ngakum pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngasemanzini e‐Meriba yase‐Kadeshe, entlango ye‐Tsine; ngenxa yokuba nibe ningandingcwalisi pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Koko uya kubona elozwe ukude; kodwa akuyi kungena kona, elizweni endilinikayo kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy33:1 KEKALOKU eli litamsanqeliso, owati u‐Mosesi, indoda katixo, watamsanqelisa usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngalo, engekabubi." 
Deuteronomy33:2 Wayesiti: Uyehova wavela e‐Sinai, wapuma e‐Sehire pezu kwabo; wakazimla entabeni ye‐Parane, weza namawakawaka abangcwele; kwesokunene sake umlilo wabungumteto kubo." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Okunene wabetanda abantu! bonke abangcwele bake basesandleni sako; babehleli pantsi ezinyaweni zako, bamkela amazwi ako." 
Deuteronomy33:4 U‐Mosesi wasiyalela umteto, ilifa lomhlambi ka‐Yakobi." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Waba ngukumkani kwa‐Yeshurune, kwakuhlanganiswa intloko zabantu kunye nezizwe zo‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Makapile u‐Rubene, angafi; ati amadoda ake anga bi ngumbalwa." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Oku ke kokuka‐Juda. Wayesiti: Yiva, Yehova! ilizwi lika‐Juda, umzise ebantwini bake: izandla zake mazimanele, ube ngumncedi ngakuzo intshaba zake." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Nango‐Levi wati: i‐Tumime yako ne‐Urime yako mazibe noyingcwele yako, owabumlinga e‐Masa, owabupika naye ngasemanzini e‐Meriba:" 
Deuteronomy33:9 owabesiti ngoyise nangonina: Andimbonanga; nabazalwana bake akabavuma, nabantwana bake akabazi: ngokuba bewagcinile amazwi ako, nocebano lwako balubamba." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Baya kufundisa u‐Yakobi izigwebo zako, no‐Sirayeli umteto wako: baya kubeka isiqumiso pambi kwako, nedini elitshiswayo lipela pezu kwesibingelo sako." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Tamsanqela, Yehova! indyebo yake, nomsebenzi wezandla zake uwubuke; tyumza izinqe zabamsukelayo, nezabamtiyayo, bangabuyi besuke." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Ngo‐Benjamine wati: Umtandwa kayehova uya kuhlala ngokunqaba ngakuye; uya kumkusela imini yonke, napakati kwamagxalaba ake uya kuhlala." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Nango‐Josefe wati: Malitanyusanqelwe nguyehova ilizwe lake; ngezinto ezinqabileyo zezulu, ngombete, nangenzulu elele ngapantsi;" 
Deuteronomy33:14 nangezinto ezinqabileyo zokuvelisa kwelanga, nangezinto ezinqabileyo zokuhlumisa kwenyanga ngenyanga;" 
Deuteronomy33:15 nangezinto ezinkulu zentaba zakudala, nangezinto ezinqabileyo zenduli ezingunapakade;" 
Deuteronomy33:16 nangezinto ezinqabileyo zomhlaba nokuzala kwawo, na nge mbuko yalowo ubehlala etyolweni: elitamsanqa malize pezu kwentloko ka‐Josefe, napezu kwokakai lwalowo ube wahlukene nabazalwana bake." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Ubungcwalisa bake bu njenge zibulo lenkomo yake, nempondo zake zi njenge mpondo zenyati; kwa ngazo uya kunquba abantu kunye ezipelweni zelizwe: ezi zingamawakawaka akwa‐Frayime, ezi zingamawaka akwa‐Manase." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Nango‐Zebulone wati: Vuya, Zebulone! ekupumeni kwako; no‐Yisakare! ezintenteni zako." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Baya kubiza abantu beze entabeni; apo baya kubinga imibingo yobulungisa: ngokuba beya kwanya ubuninzi belwandle, nendyebo eziselelweyo entlabatini." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Nango‐Gadi wati: Makabongwe lowo owenzela u‐Gadi indawo! uhleli njengengonyama, uyaṙazula umkono, kwa nokakai." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Wazikangelela okwokuqala; ngokuba kona, esabelweni somnikamteto, ebehlaliswa ngokunqaba; wayesiza nentloko zabantu, wenza ubulungisa bukayehova, nemigwebo yake, kunye no‐Sirayeli." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Nango‐Dane wati: u‐Dane ulitole lengonyama, elitsibayo e‐Bashane." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Nango‐Nefatali wati: Nefatali, okolisiwe yimbuko, ozele litamsanqa likayehova! fuya ulwandle nesuyide." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Nango‐Ashere wati: Makatanyusanqelwe u‐Ashere ngabantwana; makabe ekoleka kubazalwana bake, antywilise unyawo lwake eolini." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Imivalo yako yoba sisincete nexina; nanjengemihla yako oba njalo amandla ako. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Akuko onjengaye utixo wo‐Yeshurune, okwelayo ezulwini ngokuncedwa kwako, nasesibakabakeni ngesitomo sake." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Utixo ongunapakade ulipepelo lako; ingalo ezingunapakade zingapantsi: waeya kugxota utshaba pambi kwako, ati: Tshabalalisa!" 
Deuteronomy33:28 Uya kwandula u‐Sirayeli ahlale yedwa ngokunqaba; umtombo ka‐Yakobi woba pezu kwomhlaba wenqolowa neveyine; ewe, izulu lake liya kutontsela umbete." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Hai inyweba yako, Sirayeli! ngubanina onjengawe? ungabantu abasindisiweyo nguyehova, ikaka loncedo lwako, noliṙele lesitomo sako! ngako intshaba zako ziya kuzenzisa kuwe, nendawo ezipakamileyo zazo wozinyatela wena." 
Deuteronomy34:1 WANDULA u‐Mosesi wenyuka ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, waya entabeni ye‐Nebo, engcopo ye‐Pisega, ngapambi kwe‐Jeriko. Waza uyehova wambonisa lonke elozwe, i‐Gileyadi kwada kwase‐Dane," 
Deuteronomy34:2 nalo lonke ilizwe lakwa‐Nefatali, nelizwe lakwa‐Frayime, nelakwa‐Manase, nalo lonke ilizwe lakwa‐Juda, kwada kwaselwandle lwasemva," 
Deuteronomy34:3 nelasesuyide, netafa lomhlambo wase‐Jeriko, isixeko semiti yepalime, kwada kwase‐Tsohare." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Waye uyehova esiti kuye: Eli lelozwe endandifungile ku‐Abrahame, ku‐Yisake, naku‐Yakobi, ngokuti: Ndolinika kwinzalo yako. Ndikubonisile lona ngamehlo ako, kanti akuyi kuwela ukuya kona." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Wada wafa kona u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, ezweni le‐Mowabi, ngelizwi likayehova." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Waza wamncw̔aba esihlanjeni, ezweni le‐Mowabi, malungana ne‐Betepehori; kodwa akuko mntu owaziyo incw̔aba lake kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Waye u‐Mosesi eyiminyaka ilikulu linamashumi mabini ubudala bake, akububa: iliso lake belingeluzizi, nokwomelela kwake bekungemkile." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwamlilela u‐Mosesi ematafeni ase‐Mowabi imihla yamashumi matatu: yada yagqitywa imihla yesililo n esijwili pezu kwo‐Mosesi. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Kekaloku u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, ebezele ngumoya wobulumko; ngokuba u‐Mosesi ebelalisile izandla zake pezu kwake: lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwampulapula, lwenza njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Kwaye kungabanga savuka umprofite kwa‐Sirayeli njengo‐Mosesi, owati uyehova wamazi ubuso ngobuso;" 
Deuteronomy34:11 ngayo yonke imiqondiso nemimangaliso, owabemtuma uyehova ukuya kuyenza ezweni le‐Jipete, ku‐Faro, nakuzo zonke izicaka zake, nakulo lonke ilizwe lake;" 
Deuteronomy34:12 nangaso sonke esosandla someleleyo, nangaso sonke esosoyikiso sikulu, owasenzayo u‐Mosesi emehlweni o‐Sirayeli bonke." 
Joshua1:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwokufa kuka‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune, umkonzi ka‐Mosesi, esiti:" 
Joshua1:2 u‐Mosesi isicaka sam ufile; uze usuke kaloku, uwele i‐Yoredane le, wena, nababantu bonke, ukuya elizweni endilinika kubo, kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua1:3 Zonke indawo uya kunyatela pezu kwazo umzantsi wonyawo lwenu, sendinipile zona, njengokuba ndabendisitsho ku‐Mosesi." 
Joshua1:4 Kwa sentlango nale‐Lebanone, nakude kube semlanjeni omkulu, emlanjeni ongum‐Ferate, lonke ilizwe lama‐Hete, nakude kube selwandle olukulu ngasekutshoneni kwelanga, woba ngumda wenu." 
Joshua1:5 Akuko mntu oya kuba nokuma pambi kwako yonke imihla yokudla kwako ubomi: njengokuba bendiko no‐Mosesi, ndiya kubako kwa nawe; andiyi kukuyeka, andiyi kukushiya kanjalo." 
Joshua1:6 Yomelela ukalipe: ngokuba wena uya kubamkelisa ababantu ilifa lelizwe, elo ndafunga ngalo koyise babo ukuba ndiya kubapa lona." 
Joshua1:7 Kodwa yomelela ukalipe kakulu, ukuba ulumkele ukwenza njengawo wonke umteto ubuyalelwa ngawo ngu‐Mosesi, isicaka sam: ungapambuki kuwo nangasekunene nangasekohlo, ukuze ulungiseke apo usukuba usiya kona." 
Joshua1:8 Incwadi yalomteto ayiyi kumka emlonyeni wako; kodwa uya kucinga yona emini nasebusuku, ukuze ulumkele ukwenza njengako konke okuba̔liweyo kuyo: ngokuba oko uya kutamsanqelekisa indlela yako, naloko uya kulungiseka." 
Joshua1:9 Andikuyalelanga na? Yomelela ukalipe; ungankwantyi, ungatuswa nokutuswa: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wako, enawe, apo usukuba usiya kona." 
Joshua1:10 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wawayalela amagosa abantu, ngokuti:" 
Joshua1:11 Candani pakati kwomnquba, nibayalele abantu, ngokuti: Zilungiseleni umpako; ngokuba pakati kwemihla isemitatu niya kuwela i‐Yoredane le, ukuya kufuya elozwe enilipiwayo nguyehova, utixo wenu, ukuba nilifuye." 
Joshua1:12 Nakuma‐Rubene, nakuma‐Gadi, nakuso isiqingata sesizwe sama‐Manase, watsho u‐Yoshuwa ukuti:" 
Joshua1:13 Kumbulani elozwi u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, wabeniyalela ngalo, esiti: Uyehova, utixo wenu, unipumzile, unipile ilizwe eli." 
Joshua1:14 Abafazi benu, intsapo zenu, nenkomo zenu, ziya kuhlala ezweni abelinika kuni u‐Mosesi nganeno kwe‐Yoredane; kodwa nina niya kuwela nixo̔bile pambi kwabazalwana benu, onke amagoṙa abuṙoti, nibancede bona;" 
Joshua1:15 ade uyehova abapumze abazalwana benu, njengokuba enipumzile nina, baze nabo balifuye elozwe uyehova, utixo wenu, ubapile lona; nandule nibuyele ezweni lemfuyo yenu, nilifuye, elo u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, ulinikile kuni nganeno kwe‐Yoredane ngasekupumeni kwelanga." 
Joshua1:16 Baza bampendula u‐Yoshuwa, besiti: Konke usiyaleleyo ngako, siya kukwenza, nalapo usukuba usitumela kona, siya kuya." 
Joshua1:17 Njengako konke sibe sipulapula ku‐Mosesi ngako, siya kupulapula njalo nakuwe: kodwa uyehova, utixo wako, wanga angako nawe, njengokuba ebeko no‐Mosesi!" 
Joshua1:18 Umntu osukuba evukela ngakumlomo wako, ongayi kupulapula amazwi ako kuko konke umyalela ngako, makafiswe: kodwa yomelela ukalipe." 
Joshua2:1 KEKALOKU u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, wasusa amadoda amabini e‐Shitime ukuya kuhlola ngasese, esiti: Hambani, niye kukangela ilizwe, ne‐Jeriko. Ahamba ke, aya angena endlwini yompinyiswa, ogama lingu‐Rakabi, alala kona." 
Joshua2:2 Kwaza kwabikwa kukumkani we‐Jeriko, kusitwa: Nanga amadoda efikile apa ngobusuku evela elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, ukuza kupanda ilizwe." 
Joshua2:3 Waza ukumkani we‐Jeriko watumela ku‐Rakabi, ukuti: Kupani amadoda afikileyo kuwe, angenileyo endlwini yako; ngokuba efikile ukuza kupanda lonke ilizwe." 
Joshua2:4 Yabe inkazana leyo itabatile lomadoda omabini, yawafihla; yaza yatsho ukuti: Kwafika amadoda kum, kodwa bendingawazi avela pina." 
Joshua2:5 Kwaza kwati, kwakuvalwa isango, nxa kuza kuba mnyama, andula amadoda lawo apuma; andiwazi aye ngapina lomadoda; waputumeni kamsinyane, ngokuba niya kuwafumana." 
Joshua2:6 Kanti ibiwenyusele pezu kwendlu, yawafihla ngapantsi kwamasebe omyaṙa, abecwangcisiwe yiyo pezu kwendlu." 
Joshua2:7 Asuka amadoda awaputuma ngendlela yase‐Yoredane, ngasemazibukweni: kwaza kwavalwa isango, emveni kwokuba sebepumile abo bawaputumayo." 
Joshua2:8 Engekalali wona, yenyuka yona yaya kuwo pezu kwendlu;" 
Joshua2:9 yayisiti emadodeni lawo: Ndiyazi ukuba uyehova unipile elilizwe, nokuba isoyikeko senu siwile pezu kwetu, nokuba bancamile bonke abemi belizwe ngenxa yenu." 
Joshua2:10 Ngokuba sivile okokuba uyehova wanitshisela amanzi olwandle olubomvu, ekupumeni kwenu e‐Jipete; noko enanikwenza kokumkani bobabini baba‐Amori, abebepesheya kwe‐Yoredane, ku‐Sihone naku‐Hogi, enabalahlela ekutshabalaleni." 
Joshua2:11 Sati sakuva, zanyibilika intliziyo zetu, kanjako akwabi sahlala ubugagu emntwini, ngenxa yenu: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, nguye o ngutixo ezulwini pezulu, nasemhlabeni pantsi." 
Joshua2:12 Ngako kaloku, kenindifungele uyehova, ukuba, njengokuba ndenzele nina ububele, nani niya kwenzela indlu kabawo ububele, nindinike umqondiso wenyaniso:" 
Joshua2:13 ukuba niya kulondoloza behleli ubawo, noma̔, nabazalwana bam, nodade bam, nabo bonke banabo; nokuba niya kusindisa ubomi betu ekufeni." 
Joshua2:14 Aza ati kuyo amadoda lawo: Ubomi betu mabube sendaweni yobenu ukufa! ukuba anixeli lendawo yetu: kuya kwandula ukuti, nxa uyehova asinikayo ilizwe, sokwenzela ububele nenyaniso." 
Joshua2:15 Yandula yawahlisa ngentsontelo ngefenstile: ngokuba indlu yayo ibipezu kwodonga lwesixeko, kanjalo yona yahlala pezu kwodonga." 
Joshua2:16 Yayisiti kuwo: Hambani niye entabeni, hleze bafumanane nani abaputumayo; nize nizimele apo intsuku zibe ntatu, bade babuye abaputumayo; niti kamva nihambe ngendlela yenu." 
Joshua2:17 Ati kuyo amadoda lawo: Soba msulwa kwesisifungiso sako usifungisile ngaso. 
Joshua2:18 Bona ke, sakufika elizweni, uya kubopa lentambo yentsinga ezibomvu efenstileni usihlisile ngayo; noyihlo, nonyoko, nabazalwana bako, nabo bonke abendlu kayihlo, nobabutela kuwe endlwini." 
Joshua2:19 Kuya kwandula ukuti, osukuba epuma ngengcango zendlu yako aye pandle, igazi lake malibe pezu kweyake intloko, siti tina singabi natyala; nosukuba enawe endlwini, igazi lake malibe pezu kwentloko yetu, ukuba isandla sipezu kwake." 
Joshua2:20 Kodwa ukuba uyaxela lendawo yetu, sesiya kuba msulwa kuso isifungiso sako usifungisile ngaso." 
Joshua2:21 Yati yona: Makube njalo njengamazwi enu. Yaza yawandulula, emka ke; kanjalo yabopa lontambo ibomvu efenstileni." 
Joshua2:22 Asuka emka, aya entabeni, ahlala kona intsuku zantatu, bada babuya abaputumayo: ngokuba abaputumayo bebewafunile endleleni yonke, kanti abawafumana." 
Joshua2:23 Ada abuya lomadoda omabini, ehla entabeni, awela ke, aza kufika ku‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, ambalisela zonke izinto ezibahlileyo." 
Joshua2:24 Ayesiti ku‐Yoshuwa: Okunene uyehova unikile ezandleni zetu ilizwe lonke; ngokuba kwa bonke abemi belizwe bencamile ngenxa yetu. 
Joshua3:1 WAVUKA kusasa u‐Yoshuwa ngomnye umhla; baza banduluka e‐Shitime, baya e‐Yoredane, yena nalo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli; balalisa kona, bengekaweli." 
Joshua3:2 Kwaye kute, ekupeleni kwemihla mitatu, andula amagosa acanda pakati kwomnquba," 
Joshua3:3 ayalela abantu ngokuti: Nxa nibonayo ityeya yocebano lukayehova, utixo wenu, nabaperisite abangaba‐Levi beyitwele, niya kwandula ninduluke endaweni yenu, niyilandele." 
Joshua3:4 Kwobako kodwa umgama pakati kwenu nayo, ube ungati ngamawaka mabini ekubite ngomlinganiso; ningasondeli kuyo, ukuze niyazi indlela eniya kuhamba ngayo: ngokuba ningadlulanga ngalendlela ixesha lapambili." 
Joshua3:5 Wayesiti u‐Yoshuwa ebantwini: Zingcwaliseni! ngokuba ngomso uyehova eya kuyenza imimangaliso pakati kwenu. 
Joshua3:6 Kanjalo wateta u‐Yoshuwa kubaperisite, esiti: Funqulani ityeya yocebano, niwele pambi kwabantu. Baza bayifunqula ityeya yocebano, bahamba pambi kwabantu." 
Joshua3:7 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa: Kwa namhla nje ndiya kuqala ukukwenza mkulu emehlweni o‐Sirayeli bonke, ukuze bakwazi ukuba ndiya kubako nawe, njengokuba ndibe ndiko no‐Mosesi." 
Joshua3:8 Ngako uya kubayalela abaperisite, abatwele ityeya yocebano, ngokuti: Xeshekweni nifika eludinini lwamanzi ayo i‐Yoredane, niya kuti nqumama e‐Yoredane." 
Joshua3:9 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wati kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli: Sondelani apa, nive amazwi ake uyehova, utixo wenu." 
Joshua3:10 Wayesiti u‐Yoshuwa: Kungoku eniya kwazi ukuba utixo ohleliyo upakati kwenu, nokuba uya kugqibela ukugqogqa pambi kwenu aba‐Kanane, nama‐Hete; nama‐Hivi, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Giregashe, naba‐Amori, nama‐Yebusi." 
Joshua3:11 Bona ke, ityeya yocebano, e yenkosi yomhlaba wonke, iyawela pambi kwenu e‐Yoredane." 
Joshua3:12 Ngako kaloku zicapuleleni amadoda abe lishumi linamabini kuzo izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, ibe yindoda inye ngesizwe ngesizwe." 
Joshua3:13 Kwakuya kuti, kwakupumla imizantsi yenyawo zabaperisite abatwele ityeya kayehova, inkosi yomhlaba wonke, emanzini e‐Yoredane, seleya kunqanyulwa amanzi ase‐Yoredane, amanzi ehlayo entla; aeya kuma emfumbeni nye." 
Joshua3:14 Kwaza kwati, bakunduluka abantu ezintenteni zabo ukuya kuwela i‐Yoredane, nabaperisite beyitwele ityeya yocebano pambi kwabantu;" 
Joshua3:15 naxeshekweni abo batwalayo ityeya base befike e‐Yoredane, nenyawo zabaperisite abatwalayo ityeya zibe zintywilisiwe eludinini lwamanzi; (ngokuba i‐Yoredane izalele pezu kwazo zonke indonga zayo kwa yonke imihla yokuvuna;)" 
Joshua3:16 andula ema amanzi ehlayo entla, apakama emfumbeni nye, kwa kude kakulu ne‐Adame, isixeko esingasecaleni le‐Tsaretane; ati ke lawo abehlela ngakulo ulwandle lwasetafeni, ulwandle olutyuwa, agqityelwa ukunqanyulwa: baza abantu bawela malungana ne‐Jeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Koko abaperisite, abebetwala ityeya yocebano lukayehova, baqinisa ukuma pezu kwowomileyo umhlaba pakati kwe‐Yoredane; baza o‐Sirayeli bonke bawela pezu kwowomileyo umhlaba, bada bagqiba bonke abantu ukuwela i‐Yoredane." 
Joshua4:1 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni bebegqibile bonke abantu ukuwela i‐Yoredane, wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa, esiti:" 
Joshua4:2 Zicapuleleni amadoda abe lishumi linamabini ebantwini, ibe yindoda inye ngesizwe ngesizwe," 
Joshua4:3 niwayalele ngokuti: Colani apa pakati kwe‐Yoredane, kulondawo inyawo zabaperisite zema ngokuqinileyo, amatye abe lishumi linamabini, niwaweze nani, niwabeke pantsi endaweni yokulalisa, apo niya kulalisa kona obubusuku." 
Joshua4:4 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wabiza lawomadoda alishumi linamabini, abewamisile ecatshulwe elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, indoda inye kwisizwe ngesizwe." 
Joshua4:5 Wayesiti kuwo u‐Yoshuwa: Welani pambi kwayo ityeya kayehova, utixo wenu, niye pakati kwe‐Yoredane, nizifunqulele nonke ngabanye ilitye libe linye pezu kwamagxalaba enu, ngenani lezizwe zalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli;" 
Joshua4:6 ukuze kube ngumqondiso oku pakati kwenu: xeshekweni abantwana benu baya kubuza ngexesha elizayo, besiti: Amatye la ayinto nina kuni?" 
Joshua4:7 niya kwandula ukuti kubo: Ngawokuti amanzi ase‐Yoredane ebenqanyulwa pambi kwayo ityeya yocebano lukayehova; yakuwela i‐Yoredane, amanzi ase‐Yoredane ebenqanyulwa: kwa njalo lamatye oba yinkumbuzo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli kude kube ngunapakade." 
Joshua4:8 Lwenje njalo ke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, njengokuyalela kuka‐Yoshuwa; lwaya lwacola amatye alishumi elinamabini pakati kwe‐Yoredane, njengokuba ebetshilo uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa, ngenani lezizwe zalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli; lwawaweza nalo ukuya endaweni yokulalisa, lwawabeka pantsi kona." 
Joshua4:9 Kanjako amatye alishumi elinamabini wawamisa u‐Yoshuwa pakati kwe‐Yoredane, kulondawo apo zemayo inyawo zabaperisite abebetwala ityeya yocebano: ako kona kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Joshua4:10 Kekaloku abaperisite, abebetwala ityeya, bema pakati kwe‐Yoredane, kwada kwafezwa zonke izinto, abete uyehova wamyalela u‐Yoshuwa ukuba azitete ebantwini, njengako konke u‐Mosesi abemyalele u‐Yoshuwa ngako: baza bakauleza abantu, bawela ke." 
Joshua4:11 Kwaza kwati, bakuba begqibile ukuwela abantu, yandula yawela ityeya kayehova, nabaperisite, ebusweni babantu." 
Joshua4:12 Kanjalo usapo luka‐Rubene, nosapo luka‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, lwawela luxo̔bile ebusweni bosapo luka‐Sirayeli, njengokuba ebetetile kulo u‐Mosesi." 
Joshua4:13 Anga angamawaka angamashumi mane amadoda esel’ exo̔bele ukulwa, awawelayo pambi kwoyehova ukuya emfazweni, ematafeni ase‐Jeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Ngalomhla uyehova wamenza mkulu u‐Yoshuwa emehlweni o‐Sirayeli bonke: baza bamoyika yena, njengokuba bebemoyikile u‐Mosesi, yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi." 
Joshua4:15 Waza watsho uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa, esiti:" 
Joshua4:16 Yalela abaperisite, abatweleyo ityeya yesinqi̔no, ukuba benyuke e‐Yoredane." 
Joshua4:17 Ngako u‐Yoshuwa wabayalela abaperisite, ngokuti: Nyukani e‐Yoredane." 
Joshua4:18 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni abaperisite, abebetwala ityeya yocebano lukayehova, bebenyukile pakati kwe‐Yoredane, naxeshekweni imizantsi yenyawo zabaperisite ibinyotukele kowomileyo umhlaba, andula amanzi ase‐Yoredane abuyela endaweni yawo, agqitela zonke indonga zayo, njengexesha lapambili."
