Joshua4:19 Kekaloku abantu benyuka e‐Yoredane ngoweshumi umhla wenyanga yokuqala, bati waca e‐Gilegale, ngecala lasempumalanga le‐Jeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Nalawomatye alishumi linamabini, ababewatabatile e‐Yoredane, wawamisa u‐Yoshuwa e‐Gilegale." 
Joshua4:21 Waza wateta elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, esiti: Okuya abantwana benu baya kubuza oyise babo ngexesha elizayo, besiti: Amatye la ayinto nina?" 
Joshua4:22 niya kwandula nibazise abantwana benu, nisiti: Pezu kwowomileyo umhlaba o‐Sirayeli bawela i‐Yoredane le." 
Joshua4:23 Ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, ebewatshisa amanzi ase‐Yoredane pambi kwenu, nada nawela; njengokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, ebesenzela ulwandle olubomvu, owabelutshisa pambi kwetu, sada sawela;" 
Joshua4:24 ukuze basazi bonke abantu bomhlaba isandla sikayehova, ukuba sinamandla sona; ukuze nimoyike uyehova, utixo wenu, imihla yonke." 
Joshua5:1 KWAZA kwati, kwakuviwa ngabo bonke okumkani baba‐Amori, abebenganeno kwe‐Yoredane ngasentshonalanga, nangabo bonke okumkani baba‐Kanane, abebengaselwandle, ukuba uyehova uwatshisile amanzi ayo i‐Yoredane pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, sada sawela, zandula zanyibilika intliziyo zabo, kanjako akwabi sabiko ubugagu kubo, ngenxa yosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua5:2 Ngeloxesha wati uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa: Zenzele izitshetshe zamatye abukali, ubuye waluse usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngokwesibini." 
Joshua5:3 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wazenzela izitshetshe zamatye abukali, walwalusa usapo luka‐Sirayeli e‐Gibeha‐haralote." 
Joshua5:4 Yiyo le indawo ekungenxa yayo u‐Yoshuwa walwalusa: Bonke abantu ababepumile e‐Jipete bengamadoda, onke amadoda okulwa, bebetile entlango endleleni, emva kwokupuma kwabo e‐Jipete." 
Joshua5:5 Ngokuba bonke abantu ababepumile kona bebengabalukileyo; kodwa bonke abantu ababezalelwe entlango endleleni, emva kwokupuma kwabo e‐Jipete, bona bebengabalusanga." 
Joshua5:6 Ngokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli beluhamba iminyaka yamashumi mane entlango, kwada kwagqityelwa bonke abantu bengamadoda okulwa, ababepumile e‐Jipete, ababengapulapulanga ilizwi likayehova; owati uyehova wabafungela ukuba akayi kubabonisa ilizwe, elo wafunga uyehova koyise babo ukuba wolinika kuti, ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi." 
Joshua5:7 Kodwa onyana babo o wabebavusa esikundleni sabo, bona u‐Yoshuwa wabalusa; ngokuba bebengabangalukileyo, ngenxa yokuba bebengabalusanga endleleni." 
Joshua5:8 Kwaza kwati, kwakugqitywa ukwalusa bonke abobantu, bahlala endaweni yabo emnqubeni bada bapila." 
Joshua5:9 Wandula wati uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa: Namhla nje ndisiqengqile isigxeko se‐Jipete sisuke kuni. Ngako kubizwa igama laleyo indawo ngokuti yi‐Gilegale, kude kube namhla nje." 
Joshua5:10 Nxa usapo luka‐Sirayeli belute waca e‐Gilegale, lwabamba ipasika ngosuku lweshumi linesine lwenyanga ngokuhlwa, ematafeni ase‐Jeriko." 
Joshua5:11 Lwaye lusidla kwintlumelo yomhlaba ngomnye umhla emva kwepasika, izonka ezingenagwele, namaqashu, kwa ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo." 
Joshua5:12 Yaza yapela imana ngomnye umhla emveni kwokuba beludlile kwintlumelo yomhlaba; kanjalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli alwabi senayo imana, koko lube lusidla kwimveliso yelizwe le‐Kanane kwa ngalomnyaka." 
Joshua5:13 KWAYE kute, akuba u‐Yoshuwa ebengase‐Jeriko, wapakamisa amehlo ake, wakangela, kekaloku, nantsi indoda imi malungana naye, ineṙele layo lir̔oliwe esandleni sayo. Wasuka u‐Yoshuwa waya kuyo, wati kuyo: Ungecala letu na, ungecala lentshaba zetu kusinina?" 
Joshua5:14 Yati: Hai, kungokuba ndiyinkosi yomkosi kayehova endizileyo kaloku. Waza u‐Yoshuwa wawa ngobuso ngasemhlabeni, waziqubuda, wati kuyo: Iti nina inkosi yam esicakeni sayo?" 
Joshua5:15 Yaza inkosi yomkosi kayehova yati ku‐Yoshuwa: Susa izihlangu zako ezinyaweni zako, ngokuba indawo umi pezu kwayo iyingewele. Wenje njalo ke u‐Yoshuwa." 
Joshua6:1 (Kekaloku i‐Jeriko yaiqinisiwe ukuvalwa ngenxa yosapo luka‐Sirayeli: bekungeko owapumayo, bekungeko nowangenayo.)" 
Joshua6:2 Wandula wati uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa: Bona ke, ndinikile esandleni sako i‐Jeriko, nokumkani wayo, n amagoṙa abuṙoti." 
Joshua6:3 Naniya kuṙaula isixeko, nonke eningamadoda okulwa, nisingqonga isixeko kube kanye. Uya kwenje njalo ngemini ezintandatu." 
Joshua6:4 Kanjako abaperisite abasixe̔nxe baya kupata amaxilongo asixe̔nxe okuvusa, baye pambi kwetyeya; nangemini yesixe̔nxe, niya kuṙaula isixeko kube kasixe̔nxe, bati abaperisite bavutele ngamaxilongo." 
Joshua6:5 Kwaye kuya kuti, kwakuhlokonyiswa ngopondo lwokuvusa, nxa nivayo intlo koma yexilongo, bomemeza abantu bonke ngesimemezo esikulu; lwandul’ ukuwa udonga lwesixeko endaweni yalo, bati abantu benyuke abanye ngabanye ngokuti ngqo pambi kwabo." 
Joshua6:6 Waza u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, wabiza abaperisite, wati kubo: Funqulani ityeya yocebano, nabaperisite abasixe̔nxe mabapate amaxilongo asixe̔nxe okuvusa, baye pambi kwetyeya kayehova." 
Joshua6:7 Wayesiti ebantwini: Dlulani, nisiṙaule isixeko, nabo baxo̔bileyo mabadlule pambi kwetyeya kayehova." 
Joshua6:8 Kwaza kwati, nxa u‐Yoshuwa abetshilo ebantwini, bandula abaperisite abasixe̔nxe, bepete amaxilongo asixe̔nxe okuvusa pambi kwoyehova, badlula, bavutela ngamaxilongo; yati ityeya yocebano lukayehova yabalandela." 
Joshua6:9 Baye abo baxo̔bileyo behamba pambi kwabaperisite abavutela ngamaxilongo, namabuto asemva elandela ityeya, abaperisite bemana bevutela ngamaxilongo." 
Joshua6:10 Kekaloku u‐Yoshuwa ebeyalele abantu ngokuti: Ningamemezi, ningavakalisi amazwi enu, makungapumi emilonyeni yenu nalinye ilizwi, ide ibe yimini endiya kuti kuni: Memezani! nandule ukumemeza." 
Joshua6:11 Yaza ityeya kayehova yaṙaula isixeko, isingqonga kwa kanye; babuya bangena emnqubeni, balalisa emnqubeni." 
Joshua6:12 Wavuka kusasa u‐Yoshuwa ngomnye umhla; basuka abaperisite bayifunqula ityeya kayehova. 
Joshua6:13 Baza abaperisite abasixe̔nxe, bepete amaxilongo asixe̔nxe okuvusa pambi kwetyeya kayehova, bamana bahamba, bavutela ngamaxilongo; baye abaxo̔bileyo behamba pambi kwabo, namabuto asemva elandela ityeya kayehova, abaperisite bemana bevutela ngamaxilongo." 
Joshua6:14 Baza basiṙaula isixeko ngemini yesibini kwa kanye; bandula babuyela emnqubeni. Benje njalo ke ngemini zantandatu. 
Joshua6:15 Kwaye kute ngemini yesixe̔nxe, bavuka kusasa, nxa kusapuma isifingo, baya basiṙaula isixeko njengesiko elinjalo amaxesha asixe̔nxe: kodwa ngalomini basiṙaula isixeko amaxesha asixe̔nxe." 
Joshua6:16 Kwaza kwati ngexesha lesixe̔nxe, nxa abaperisite bebevutela ngamaxilongo, wati u‐Yoshuwa ebantwini: Memezani! ngokuba uyehova eninikile isixeko." 
Joshua6:17 Soba yinto elahlelwe ekutshatyalalisweni esisixeko, kwa sona nako konke okukuso, kuyehova: kupela u‐Rakabi, umpinyiswa, uya kudla ubomi, yena nabo bonke abanaye endlwini, ngokuba ebezifihla izigidimi esazitumayo." 
Joshua6:18 Kanjalo nani, qinisani ukuzibamba kuleyonto ilahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni, hleze nizenze okulahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni, nxa nitabatayo kuleyonto ilahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni, niwenze nomkosi wama‐Sirayeli ube yinto elahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni, niwukataze." 
Joshua6:19 Kodwa yonke isilivere, negolide, nempahla zobedu nezesincete, zona ziyingcwele kuyehova; ziya kungena endaweni yendyebo kayehova." 
Joshua6:20 Baza abantu bamemeza, bakuvutela abaperisite ngamaxilongo: kwabekute, nxa abantu babevile intlokoma yexilongo, na nxa abantu bamemeza ngesimemezo esikulu, kwandul’ ukuwa udonga endaweni yalo, bada abantu benyukela esixekweni, bonke besiti ngqo pambi kwabo, batimba isixeko." 
Joshua6:21 Baza balahlela ekutshatyalalisweni kwa namadoda nabafazi, abatsha nabadala, inkomo, negusha, namaqwaṙashe, ngohlangoti lwesiṙele." 
Joshua6:22 Koko ebetshilo u‐Yoshuwa kulawomadoda mabini abehlolile ilizwe, ukuti: Ngenani endlwini yompinyiswa lowo, nipumise kona inkazana leyo, nabo bonke inabo, njengokuyifungela kwenu." 
Joshua6:23 Asuka amadodana abezintlola angena, apumisa u‐Rakabi, noyise, nonina, nabazalwana bake, nabo bonke abenabo; nabo bonke abalamane bake abapumisa; abashiya ngapandle kwomnquba wama‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua6:24 Kekaloku isixeko basitshisa ngomlilo, nako konke okupakati kwaso; kupela isilivere, negolide, nempahla zobedu nezesincete, bazifaka endaweni yendyebo yendlu kayehova." 
Joshua6:25 Kanti u‐Rakabi, umpinyiswa, u‐Yoshuwa wamlondoloza ebomini, nabendlu kayise, nabo bonke abenabo; osahleli pakati kwo‐Sirayeli kude kwanamhla nje; ngokokuba wazifihla izigidimi, abezitumile u‐Yoshuwa ukuya kuhlola i‐Jeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wabafungisa ngeloxesha, ngokuti: Makaqalekiswe pambi kwoyehova lowamntu oya kusuka ake esisixeko i‐Jeriko; wosiseka ngowamazibulo wake, nengcango zaso wozimisa ngomncinane wake." 
Joshua6:27 Kwa njalo uyehova ubenaye u‐Yoshuwa, lwaye udumo lwake lu vakala kulo lonke ilizwe." 
Joshua7:1 KODWA usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenza isigqito ngento elahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni: ngokuba u‐Hakane, unyana ka‐Kami, unyana ka‐Zabedi, unyana ka‐Zera, owesizwe sika‐Juda, watabata kulonto ilahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni. Ngako yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua7:2 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wasusa amadoda e‐Jeriko aye e‐Hahai, ekufupi ne‐Betavene, ngecala lasempumalanga le‐Betele, watsho kuwo ukuti: Nyukani niye kuhlola ilizwe. Anyuka ke amadoda lawo ayihlola i‐Hahai." 
Joshua7:3 Andula abuyela ku‐Yoshuwa, ati kuye: Mabangenyuki bonke abantu; makenyuke amadoda angati angamawaka mabini, umhlaumbi amadoda angati angamawaka matatu, aye abete i‐Hahai; ungadinisi apo bonke abantu, ngokuba bebancinane abo bakona." 
Joshua7:4 Kwa njalo kwenyuka ebantwini ukuya kona, amadoda angati angamawaka matatu; asuka abaleka pambi kwamadoda ase‐Hahai." 
Joshua7:5 Aza amadoda ase‐Hahai abulala kuwo, ngati ngamadoda angamashumi matatu anamatandatu; ngokuba ebewasukela pambi kwesango kwada kwase‐Shebarime, awabulala etambekeni: zandula ukunyibilika intliziyo zabantu, zaba njengamanzi." 
Joshua7:6 Waza u‐Yoshuwa waṙazula izivato zake, wawa ngobuso ngasemhlabeni, pambi kwetyeya kayehova, kwada kwahlwa, yena nabadala bo‐Sirayeli; baposa utuli pezu kwentloko zabo kanjalo." 
Joshua7:7 Wayesiti u‐Yoshuwa: Au, Nkosi, Yehova! kunganina ukuba ubuka waweza ababantu i‐Yoredane, ukusinikela esandleni saba‐Amori, ukusibubisa? Akwaba sabesikoliwe, sahlala pesheya kwe‐Yoredane!" 
Joshua7:8 Ke, Nkosi! sendiya kuti nina, emva kwokuba o‐Sirayeli bajikele intshaba zabo umhlana?" 
Joshua7:9 Boti bakuva aba‐Kanane nabo bonke abemi belizwe basiṙaule, negama letu baliti nqam emhlabeni: uze wenze nto nina ke ngegama lako elikulu?" 
Joshua7:10 Waza wati uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa: Suka ume; yinina lento uleleyo ngobuso bako? 
Joshua7:11 O‐Sirayeli bonile; kanjako balugqitile ucebano lwam, endabayalela ngalo: kanjako batabatile kulonto ilahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni, ewe bebi̔le, bahanahanisile kanjalo, ewe bayibekile pakati kweyabo impahla." 
Joshua7:12 Kukona usapo Iuka‐Sirayeli lwalukohlwa kukuma ebusweni bentshaba zalo, lwanikela intshaba zalo umhlana, ngokuba lwaba yinto elahlelwe ekutshatyalalisweni: andisayi kubuya ndibe nani, ukuba anitshabalalisi lonto ilahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni kwa pakati kwenu." 
Joshua7:13 Suka, ungcwalise abantu, uti: Zingcwaliseleni imini yangomso; ngokuba esitsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Kuko into elahlelwe ekutshatyalalisweni pakati kwako, Sirayeli! akungebe nako ukuma pambi kwentshaba zako, ningekakwelelisi lonto ilahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni kwa pakati kwenu." 
Joshua7:14 Niya kusondezwa ngoko ngomso ngezizwe zenu: kwakuya kuti, isizwe esiqashwa nguyehova siya kusondela ngezizalwane; nesizalwane esiqashwa nguyehova siya kusondela ngezindlu; nendlu eqashwa nguyehova iya kusondela ngendoda ngendoda." 
Joshua7:15 Kwoti ke, lowo oqashwayo enalonto ilahlelweyo ekutshatyalalisweni uya kutshiswa ngomlilo, yena nako konke anako; ngokuba egqitile ucebano lukayehova, nangokuba enzile okuhlazekileyo kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua7:16 Waza wavuka kusasa u‐Yoshuwa ngomnye umhla, wasondeza o‐Sirayeli ngezizwe zabo; kwaye kuqashwa isizwe sika‐Juda:" 
Joshua7:17 waza wasondeza isizalwane sika‐Juda; waqasha isizalwane sama‐Zera: waza wasondeza isizalwane sama‐Zera, ngendoda ngendoda; kwaye kuqashwa u‐Zabedi:" 
Joshua7:18 waza wasondeza indlu yake, ngendoda ngendoda; kwaye kuqashwa u‐Hakane, unyana ka‐Kami, unyana ka‐Zabedi, unyana ka‐Zera, owesizwe sika‐Juda." 
Joshua7:19 Wandula wati u‐Yoshuwa ku‐Hakane: Nyana wam! zunike ubungcwalisa kuyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, wenze kuye imvume; uze undixelele ke into uyenzileyo, ungandifihleli." 
Joshua7:20 Waza u‐Hakane wampendula u‐Yoshuwa, wati: Okunene ndonile ngakuye uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli; kungokunje nangokunje endenzileyo." 
Joshua7:21 Ndati ndakubona pakati kwamaxoba ingubo entle yase‐Babilone, namakulu mabini eshekele zesilivere, nesiqendu segolide esizishekele ezingamashumi mahlanu ukuba nzima kwaso, ndazinqwenela, ndazitabata; kekaloku nanziya ziselelwe emhlabeni pakati kwentente yam, nesilivere ipantsi kwayo." 
Joshua7:22 Wandula u‐Yoshuwa watuma izigidimi, ezagidimela ententeni; kekaloku nantsi iselelwe ententeni, nesilivere ipantsi kwayo." 
Joshua7:23 Zaza zazisusa pakati kwentente, zazizisa ku‐Yoshuwa, nakulo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, zazibeka pantsi pambi kwoyehova." 
Joshua7:24 Wasuka u‐Yoshuwa, bonke o‐Sirayeli bekunye naye, watabata u‐Hakane unyana ka‐Zera, nesilivere, nalongubo, nesiqendu segolide, nonyana bake, nentombi zake, nenkomo zake, namaqwaṙashe ake, negusha zake, nentente yake, nako konke anako; baye bezinyusela emhlanjeni we‐Hakore." 
Joshua7:25 Wayesiti u‐Yoshuwa: Yinina ukuba usikatazile? uyehova wokataza wena namhla nje! Baza o‐Sirayeli bonke bamgibisela ngamatye, bazitshisa ngomlilo, bakuba beziposele ngamatye." 
Joshua7:26 Bandula baqokelela pezu kwake imfumba enkulu yamatye, ekoyo kwa namhla. Waza uyehova waguquka ebushushwini bengqumbo yake. Ngako oko kwabizwa igama lalondawo ngokuti: Ngumhlambo we‐Hakore, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Joshua8:1 WAZA wati uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa: Ungoyiki, ungatuswa nokutuswa; tabata nawe bonke abantu bokulwa, usuke, uye e‐Hahai; bona ke, ndinikile esandleni sako ukumkani we‐Hahai, nabantu bake, nesixeko sake, nelizwe lake:" 
Joshua8:2 wauya kwenzela i‐Hahai nokumkani wayo, njengokuba ubusenzela i‐Jeriko nokumkani wayo: kodwa amaxoba ayo, nenkomo zayo, niya kuzipangela zona: beka abalaleli ngakuso isixeko, ngasemva kwaso." 
Joshua8:3 Wesuka u‐Yoshuwa, nabo bonke abantu bokulwa, ukuya kunyukela ngase‐Hahai. Waza u‐Yoshuwa wanyula amadoda amawaka angamashumi matatu, engamagoṙa abuṙoti, wawasusa inxenye ebusuku," 
Joshua8:4 wawayalela ngokuti: Kangelani, nina nolalela ngakuso isixeko, ngasemva kwesixeko; ningabi kude kakulu esixekweni, kodwa nibe nonke senilungile." 
Joshua8:5 Mna ke, nabo bonke abantu abanam, siya kusondela ngasesixekweni: kwakuya kuti, nxa bapumelayo ngakuti, njengasekuqaleni, sesiya kubaleka pambi kwabo," 
Joshua8:6 (ngokuba beya kupumela emva kwetu,) side sibar̔ole esixekweni: ngokuba beya kuti: Bayabaleka pambi kwetu, njengasekuqaleni: ngako siya kubaleka pambi kwabo." 
Joshua8:7 Niya kwandula nina ukusuka ekulaleleni, nisibambe isixeko: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, eya kusinika esandleni senu." 
Joshua8:8 Kwakuya kuti, nakuba nisibambile isixeko, niya kusitshisa ngomlilo; ngalo ilizwi likayehova niya kwenza. Kangelani, sendiniyalele." 
Joshua8:9 Waza wawatuma u‐Yoshuwa; asuka aya endaweni yokulalela, ahlala pakati kwe‐Betele ne‐Hahai, ngecala lasentshonalanga le‐Hahai; kanti u‐Yoshuwa walalisa ngobobusuku pakati kwabantu." 
Joshua8:10 Wavuka kusasa u‐Yoshuwa ngomnye umhla, wabala abantu; wenyuka ke, yena nabadala bo‐Sirayeli, pambi kwabantu, ukuya e‐Hahai." 
Joshua8:11 Baye benyuka bonke abantu bokulwa ababenaye, basondela, beza ngapambi kwesixeko, bati waca ngecala lasenode le‐Hahai; ekwaye kuko isihlambo pakati kwabo ne‐Hahai." 
Joshua8:12 Kanjako watabata amadoda anga angamawaka mahlanu, wawabeka abe ngabalaleli pakati kwe‐Betele ne‐Hahai, ngecala lasentshonalanga lesixeko." 
Joshua8:13 Kwati kwakumiswa abantu, umkosi wonke obungecala lasenode lesixeko, nabalaleli babo ngecala lasentshonalanga lesixeko, waya u‐Yoshuwa ngobobusuku pakati kwomhlambo." 
Joshua8:14 Kwaza kwati, akubona ukumkani we‐Hahai, banxama ke bavuka kusasa, ati amadoda esixeko apumela ngako‐Sirayeli ukuba kuliwe, yena nabantu bake bonke, ngexesha elimisiweyo, pambi kwetafa: ngokuba ebengazi ukuba kuko abalaleli ngakuye, ngasemva kwesixeko." 
Joshua8:15 Kwaye kusoyiseka u‐Yoshuwa no‐Sirayeli bonke pambi kwabo; bada babaleka ngendlela yasentlango. 
Joshua8:16 Kwandula kwabizwa bonke abantu abasesixekweni ukuya kubasukela; kwa njalo bamsukela u‐Yoshuwa, bada bar̔olwa kuso isixeko." 
Joshua8:17 Kwaza akwasala nanye indoda e‐Hahai nase‐Betele, engapumelanga o‐Sirayeli; basishiya isixeko sivulekile, babasukela o‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua8:18 Wandul’ ukuti uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa: Yolula umkonto osesandleni sako ngase‐Hahai; ngokuba ndiya kuyinikela esandleni sako. Wawolula ke u‐Yoshuwa umkonto obusesandleni sake ngasesixekweni. 
Joshua8:19 Baza besuka abalaleli ngokunxama endaweni yabo, bagidima, akuba esolule isandla sake, bangena esixekweni, basitimba, banxama ke, basitshisa isixeko ngomlilo." 
Joshua8:20 Ati amadoda ase‐Hahai akubeka ngasemva kwawo, abona ukuba nanguya umsi wesixeko unyukela ezulwini; kwaza akwabiko ndawo kuwo yokuba abaleke nalapa napaya: ngokuba abantu, abebebalekela entlango, bajikela pezu kwabasukelayo." 
Joshua8:21 Kanjalo u‐Yoshuwa no‐Sirayeli bonke, bakubona ukuba abalaleli sebetimbile isixeko, nokuba umsi wesixeko uyanyuka, babuya ke, babulala amadoda ase‐Hahai." 
Joshua8:22 Baye nabaya bepuma esixekweni ukuza ngakuwo, ada aba pakati kwo‐Sirayeli, inxenye ngelinye icala, nenxenye ngelinye; baza bawabulala, bengashiyanga nanye kuwo eseleyo nesindileyo." 
Joshua8:23 Kodwa ukumkani we‐Hahai bambamba ehleli, bamzisa ku‐Yoshuwa." 
Joshua8:24 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni o‐Sirayeli sebegqibile ukubulala bonke abemi base‐Hahai ababesendle, entlango abebebagxotele kuyo, na xeshekweni babewile bonke ngohlangoti lwesiṙele, bada bagqityelwa, bandula bonke o‐Sirayeli babuyela e‐Hahai, bayibeta ngohlangoti lwesiṙele." 
Joshua8:25 Kwaye kute, bonke ababewile ngaleyomini, kwa namadoda nabafazi, bebengamawaka alishumi linamabini, bonke abantu base‐Hahai." 
Joshua8:26 Ngokuba u‐Yoshuwa ebengabuyisi isandla sake, abewolule umkonto ngaso, engekalahlelanga ekutshatyalalisweni bonke abemi base‐Hahai." 
Joshua8:27 Kodwa inkomo namaxoba esixeko eso o‐Sirayeli bazipangela zona, njengelizwi likayehova owabemyalele u‐Yoshuwa ngalo." 
Joshua8:28 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wayitshisa i‐Hahai, wayenza imfumba engunapakade, e yingcitakalo kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Joshua8:29 Nokumkani we‐Hahai wamxo̔ma pezu kwomti kwada kwalixesha lokuhlwa: naxeshekweni sekutshonile ilanga, waxela u‐Yoshuwa ukuba mabatule isidumbu sake emtini, basipose ngasemnyango wesango lesixeko, baqokelele imfumba enkulu yamatye pezu kwaso, ekoyo kwa namhla." 
Joshua8:30 OKO u‐Yoshuwa wakela uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, isibingelo, entabeni ye‐Hebali," 
Joshua8:31 njengokuba u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, ebeyalele usapo luka‐Sirayeli, njengokuba̔liweyo encwadini yomteto ka‐Mosesi, isibingelo samatye epela, ekungafunqulwanga pezu kwawo intsimbi: baza banikela pezu kwaso amadini okutshiswa kuyehova, babingelela iminikelo yoxolo." 
Joshua8:32 Waba̔la nakona pezu kwamatye isipindwa somteto ka‐Mosesi, owasiba̔layo ebusweni bosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua8:33 Baye bonke o‐Sirayeli, nabadala babo, namagosa, nabagwebi babo, bebemi ngelinye icala letyeya nangelinye pambi kwabaperisite abangaba‐Levi, abo bayitwalayo ityeya yocebano lukayehova, kwa nowasemzini nozelweyo elizweni, esinye isiqingata sabo simalungana nentaba ye‐Gerizime, nesinye isiqingata sabo simalungana nentaba ye‐Hebali; njengokuba ebeyalele u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, ngapambili, ukuba batamsanqelise abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua8:34 Nasemva kwoko walesesha onke amazwi omteto, amatamsanqeliso neziqalekiso, njengako konke okuba̔liweyo encwadini yomteto." 
Joshua8:35 Bekungeko nalinye ilizwi kuko konke abeyalele kona u‐Mosesi, owaengalileseshanga u‐Yoshuwa pambi kwawo wonke umhlambi wo‐Sirayeli, nabafazi, nentsapo, nabasemzini ababehamba pakati kwabo." 
Joshua9:1 KWAYE kute, bakuva oku bonke okumkani abanganeno kwe‐Yoredane, ezintabeni, nasezihlanjeni, nakulo lwonke unxweme lwolwandle olukulu malungana ne‐Lebanone, ama‐Hete, naba‐Amori, n aba‐Kanane, n ama‐Perizi, n ama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi," 
Joshua9:2 bandula bahlanganisana ndawonye, ukuze kuliwe no‐Yoshuwa no‐Sirayeli, ngentliziyo nye." 
Joshua9:3 Kodwa abemi base‐Gibeyone, bakuva oko okwenziweyo ngu‐Yoshuwa e‐Jeriko nase‐Hahai," 
Joshua9:4 bati ke bona benza ngobuqokolo, baya bahamba njengabatunywa, batabata inxowa ezindala emaqwaṙasheni abo, nentsuba zeveyine, ezindala, eziṙazukileyo, ezibotshiweyo;" 
Joshua9:5 nezihlangu ezidala, ezineziziba, ezinyaweni zabo, nezivato ezidala pezu kwabo; kanjalo sonke isonka sompako wabo sasomile, sasingundile." 
Joshua9:6 Bahamba baya ku‐Yoshuwa emnqubeni e‐Gilegale, bati kuye nakumadoda akwa‐Sirayeli: Sivela elizweni elikude; keniti kaloku nenze ucebano nati." 
Joshua9:7 Aza amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ati kuma‐Hivi lawo: Ngati umhlaumbi nihleli pakati kwetu; sesiya kuti nina ke ukwenza ucebano nani? 
Joshua9:8 Aye esiti ku‐Yoshuwa: Sizizicaka zako. Wati u‐Yoshuwa kuwo: Ningobanina? nivela pina? 
Joshua9:9 Aza ati kuye: Kusezweni elikude kakulu izicaka zako zivelayo, ngenxa yegama likayehova, utixo wako: ngokuba udumo lwake siluvile, nako konke abekwenza e‐Jipete," 
Joshua9:10 nako konke akwenzileyo kokumkani bobabini baba‐Amori, abebepesheya kwe‐Yoredane, ku‐Sihone ukumkani we‐Heshebone, naku‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane, obe hleli e‐Hashetarote." 
Joshua9:11 Ngako babesitsho kuti abadala betu, nabo bonke abemi belizwe letu, ukuti: Tabatani ezandleni zenu umpako wendlela, nihambe niye kubakaulela, niti kubo: Sizizicaka zenu; keniti kaloku nenze ucebano nati." 
Joshua9:12 Esi isonka setu sasitabatela umpako wetu sishushu ezindlwini zetu, ngemini sapumayo ukuya kuni; kanti kaloku, nasi sesomile, sasingundile kanjako:" 
Joshua9:13 nentsuba ezi zeveyine, esazizalisayo, zazintsha; kanti ke, nanzi seziṙazukile; nezi izivato zetu nezihlangu zetu sezidala ngenxa yokuba kude kakulu kwendlela." 
Joshua9:14 Aza amadoda atabata kumpako wawo, engabuzanga emlonyeni kayehova." 
Joshua9:15 Wandula u‐Yoshuwa wenza nawo uxolo, wati kanjalo wenza nawo ucebano lwokuba awalondoloze ebomini: zaye ziwafungela nenkosi zentlanganiso." 
Joshua9:16 Kwabekute ekupeleni kwemihla mitatu emveni kwokuba babelwenzile ucebano nawo, kwavakala kubo ukuba angabamelwane babo, nokuba ahlala pakati kwabo." 
Joshua9:17 Lwaza lwanduluka usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwafika ezixekweni zawo ngomhla wesitatu. Kekaloku izixeko zawo zaziyi‐Gibeyone, ne‐Kefira, ne‐Berote, ne‐Kiriyate‐yarime." 
Joshua9:18 Kodwa usapo luka‐Sirayeli alwawabeta, ngokuba inkosi zentlanganiso ziwafungele uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli: ngako yaṙoṙa yonke intlanganiso ngakuzo inkosi ezo." 
Joshua9:19 Zandula zati zonke inkosi kuyo yonke intlanganiso: Sesiwafungele uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli; kukona sikohlwayo ukuwacukumisa." 
Joshua9:20 Oku siya kukwenza kuwo, siwalondoloze kwa sebomini, ukuba kungabiko umsindo pezu kwetu, ngenxa yesifungo esasiwafungela ngaso." 
Joshua9:21 Zaye zisiti kubo inkosi: Makahlale ekudliweni kwobomi; — aza aba ngabagauli benkuni nabakeleli bamanzi kuyo yonke intlanganiso, njengokuba inkosi zibe zitshilo kuwo." 
Joshua9:22 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wawabiza, wateta kuwo, esiti: Yinina ukuba nisibukuqile ngokuti: Sikude kakulu kuni, nxa nihleliyo pakati kwetu?" 
Joshua9:23 Ngako kaloku niqalekisiwe; ngokuba kungayi kunqamka kuni izicaka, nabagauli benkuni, nabakeleli bamanzi, ngenxa yayo indlu katixo wam." 
Joshua9:24 Ampendula u‐Yoshuwa ati: Ngokuba bekuqiniswa ukuxelwa ezicakeni zako, okokuba uyehova, utixo wako, umyalele u‐Mosesi, isicaka sake, ukuba aninike lonke elilizwe, nokuba abatshabalalise bonke abemi belizwe kwa pambi kwenu, kukona sabesiboyikela ubomi betu kakulu, sada sayenza lento." 
Joshua9:25 Kodwa kaloku, nanku sisesandleni sako; yenza ke, njengokulungileyo nanjengokufaneleyo emehlweni ako ukwenza kuti." 
Joshua9:26 Wenje njalo ke kuwo, wawasindisa esandleni sosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuba alwawabulala." 
Joshua9:27 Waza u‐Yoshuwa kwa ngalomini wawenza abagauli benkuni nabakeleli bamanzi entlanganisweni, nasesibingelweni sikayehova, kwada kwanamhla nje, kulondawo eya kunyulwa nguye." 
Joshua10:1 KWAYE kute, xeshekweni bekuviwe ngu‐Adoni‐tsedeki ukumkani we‐Yerusaleme, okokuba u‐Yoshuwa seletimbile i‐Hahai, nokuba uyilahlele ekutshatyalalisweni; enzele njalo nje i‐Hahai nokumkani wayo, njengokuba ebenzele i‐Jeriko nokumkani wayo; nokokuba abemi base‐Gibeyone benzile uxolo no‐Sirayeli, nokuba bako pakati kwabo;" 
Joshua10:2 bandula boyika kakulu, ngokuba i‐Gibeyone ibisisixeko esikulu, njengesinye sezixeko zobukumkani, nangokuba ibinkulu pezu kwe‐Hahai, nokuba onke amadoda ayo ebengamagoṙa." 
Joshua10:3 Ngako watuma u‐Adoni‐tsedeki ukumkani we‐Yerusaleme, ku‐Hohame ukumkani we‐Hebrone, naku‐Pirame ukumkani we‐Yaremute, naku‐Yafiya ukumkani we‐Lakishe, naku‐Debire ukumkani we‐Heglone, esiti:" 
Joshua10:4 Nyukani nize kum, nindincede, ukuba sibete i‐Gibeyone; ngokuba ilwenzile uxolo no‐Yoshuwa nosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua10:5 Ngako bahlanganisana okumkani baba‐Amori bebahlanu, ukumkani we‐Yerusaleme, ukumkani we‐Hebrone, ukumkani we‐Yaremute, ukumkani we‐Lakishe, n okumkani we‐Heglone, kwa bona nayo yonke imikosi yabo, benyuka ke, baya bayiṙaula i‐Gibeyone, balwa ngakuyo." 
Joshua10:6 Aza amadoda ase‐Gibeyone atuma ku‐Yoshuwa emnqubeni e‐Gilegale, esiti: Ungabambi isandla sako ezicakeni zako; kauleza ukunyukela kuti, usisindise, usincede: ngokuba bebutelene ngakuti bonke okumkani baba‐Amori abahleliyo ezintabeni." 
Joshua10:7 Wandula wenyuka u‐Yoshuwa e‐Gilegale, yena nabo bonke abantu bokulwa kunye naye, kwa onke amagoṙa abuṙoti." 
Joshua10:8 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa: Ungaboyiki, ngokuba ndibanikile esandleni sako; akuyi kuma namnye kubo pambi kwako." 
Joshua10:9 Waya u‐Yoshuwa wabazuma, enyukile nje e‐Gilegale ubusuku bonke." 
Joshua10:10 Waza uyehova wabapitizelisa pambi kwo‐Sirayeli, abababulala ngesibulalo esikulu ngase‐Gibeyone, babasukela ngendlela yeqina lase‐Bete‐horone, bababeta kude kwase‐Hazeka, nakude kwase‐Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Kwaza kwati, ekusabeni kwabo ebusweni bo‐Sirayeli, besetambekeni lase‐Bete‐horone, wandula uyehova waposa pezu kwabo amatye amakulu ezulwini, kwada kwase‐Hazeka, bada bafa: babebaninzi abo bafileyo ngezico̔to, pezu kwabo babuleweyo lusapo luka‐Sirayeli ngesiṙele." 
Joshua10:12 Oko wateta u‐Yoshuwa kuyehova, ngomhla uyehova wabanikela aba‐Amori ebusweni bosapo luka‐Sirayeli, wati pambi kwamehlo abo o‐Sirayeli: Langa, uti nqumama pezu kwe‐Gibeyone; nawe, nyanga, pezu kwomhlambo wase‐Ajalone!" 
Joshua10:13 Laza lenqumama ilanga, yahlala nenyanga, bada abantu bazipindezelela kwintshaba zabo. Akuba̔lwanga na oku encwadini ka‐Yashere? Kwa njalo ilanga lati nqumama ngasekuhlanganeni kwezulu, linganxamanga ukutshona nje wanga ngumhla upela." 
Joshua10:14 Awabiko onjengawo umhla lowo, napambi kwawo nasemva kwawo, ukuba wapulapula uyehova ilizwi lomntu: ngokuba uyehova ebelwela o‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua10:15 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wabuyela emnqubeni e‐Gilegale, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye." 
Joshua10:16 Kodwa okumkani abo bobahlanu besaba, baya bazimela emqolombeni e‐Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Yoshuwa, kusitwa: Bafunyenwe okumkani abo bobahlanu, bezimele emqolombeni e‐Makeda." 
Joshua10:18 Wayesiti u‐Yoshuwa: Qengqani amatye amakulu ngasemlonyeni womqolomba, niwamise amadoda ngakuwo ukuba abalinde:" 
Joshua10:19 kanti ningahlali nina, ziputumeni intshaba zenu, nibabete abasemva bazo: ningazivumeli ukuba zingene ezixekweni zazo; ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, ezinikele esandleni senu." 
Joshua10:20 Kwaza kwati, nxa asel’ egqibile u‐Yoshuwa, nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuzibulala ngesibulalo esikulu kunene, zada zagqityelwa; nokuba abaseleyo, a bebesele kuzo, bebengenile ezixekweni ezinqatyisiweyo;" 
Joshua10:21 bandula bonke abantu babuyela emnqubeni ku‐Yoshuwa, e‐Makeda, ngoxolo: bekungeko namntu owabaza ulwimi lwake ngakulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua10:22 Waza wati u‐Yoshuwa: Nqikani umlomo womqolomba, nindikupele okumkani abo bobahlanu emqolombeni." 
Joshua10:23 Benje njalo ke, bamkupela okumkani abo bobahlanu emqolombeni: ukumkani we‐Yerusaleme, ukumkani we‐Hebrone, ukumkani we‐Yaremute, ukumkani we‐Lakishe, n okumkani we‐Heglone." 
Joshua10:24 Kwaza kwati, bakuba bekupele ku‐Yoshuwa okumkani abo, wandula u‐Yoshuwa wabiza onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, wati kubapati bamadoda okulwa, abebehambile naye: Sondelani, nibeke inyawo zenu pezu kwentamo zokumkani aba. Basondela ke, bazibeka inyawo zabo pezu kwentamo zabo." 
Joshua10:25 Waye u‐Yoshuwa esiti kubo: Ningoyiki, ningatuswa nokutuswa; yomelelani, nikalipe: ngokuba kungokunjalo aya kwenza uyehova kuzo zonke intshaba zenu, eniya kulwa nazo." 
Joshua10:26 Wati u‐Yoshuwa emva kwoko, wababeta, wabafisa, waza wabaxo̔ma pezu kwemiti yamihlanu; baye bexo̔meka pezu kwemiti leyo kwada kwahlwa." 
Joshua10:27 Kwaye kute ngexesha lokutshona kwelanga, waxela u‐Yoshuwa ukuba mabatulwe emitini; baza babaposa emqolombeni, apo babezimele kona, bawabeka amatye amakulu emlonyeni womqolomba, akoyo kwa namhla nje." 
Joshua10:28 Waye u‐Yoshuwa kwa ngalomini wayitimba i‐Makeda, wayibeta ngohlangoti lweṙele; nokumkani wayo wamlahlela ekutshatyalalisweni, bona, nayo yonke imipefumlo ebikuyo: akashiya namnye oseleyo: wenza nakukumkani we‐Makeda, njengokuba ebenze kukumkani we‐Jeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Wasuka u‐Yoshuwa, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye, wagqita e‐Makeda waya e‐Libena, walwa ngase‐Libena." 
Joshua10:30 Waza uyehova wayinikela nayo, nokumkani wayo, esandleni so‐Sirayeli; wayibeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, nayo yonke imipefumlo ebikuyo; akashiya kuyo namnye oseleyo; wenza nakukumkani wayo, njengokuba ebenze kukumkani we‐Jeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Wasuka u‐Yoshuwa, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye, wagqita e‐Libena waya e‐Lakishe, wayiṙaula, walwa ngakuyo." 
Joshua10:32 Waza uyehova wanikela i‐Lakishe esandleni so‐Sirayeli; wayitimba ngemini yesibini, wayibeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, nayo yonke imipefumlo ebikuyo, njengako konke abekwenzele i‐Libena." 
Joshua10:33 Oko wenyuka u‐Horame, ukumkani we‐Gezere, ukuza kunceda i‐Lakishe; kodwa u‐Yoshuwa wabeta yena nabantu bake, ada akamshiyela namnye oseleyo." 
Joshua10:34 Wasuka u‐Yoshuwa, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye, wagqita e‐Lakishe waya e‐Heglone; baza bayiṙaula, balwa ngakuyo." 
Joshua10:35 Bayitimba ke kwa ngalomini, bayibeta ngohlangoti lweṙele; nayo yonke imipefumlo ebikuyo wayilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni ngemini leyo, njengako konke abekwenzele i‐Lakishe." 
Joshua10:36 Wasuka u‐Yoshuwa, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye, wenyuka e‐Heglone waya e‐Hebrone; baza balwa ngakuyo." 
Joshua10:37 Bayitimba ke, bayibeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, nokumkani wayo, nazo zonke izixeko zayo, nayo yonke imipefumlo ebikuyo; akashiya namnye oseleyo, njengako konke abekwenzele i‐Heglone; wayilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni, nayo yonke imipefumlo ebikuyo." 
Joshua10:38 Waza wabuya u‐Yoshuwa, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye, waya e‐Debire, walwa ngakuyo." 
Joshua10:39 Wayitimba ke, nokumkani wayo, nazo zonke izixeko zayo; baza bababeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, bayilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni yonke imipefumlo ebikuyo: akashiya namnye oseleyo; njengokuba ebenze kuyo i‐Hebrone, wenje njalo kuyo i‐Debire nakukumkani wayo, nanjengokuba ebenze kuyo i‐Libena nakukumkani wayo." 
Joshua10:40 Kwa njalo u‐Yoshuwa wabeta lonke ilizwe lasezintabeni, nelasesuyide, nelezihlambo, nelemifula, nabo bonke okumkani babo; akashiya namnye oseleyo; kwa bonke abapefumlayo wabalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni, njengokuba wabeyalela uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua10:41 Waye u‐Yoshuwa wababeta kuqaliwe e‐Kadeshebaneha kude kwafikwa e‐Gaza, nalo lonke ilizwe lase‐Goshene, nakude kwase‐Gibeyone." 
Joshua10:42 Bonke okumkani aba, nelizwe labo, wabatimba u‐Yoshuwa ngexesha linye: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ebebalwela o‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua10:43 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wabuyela emnqubeni e‐Gilegale, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye." 
Joshua11:1 KWAYE kute, xeshekweni u‐Yabine, ukumkani we‐Hatsore, abevile oku, wandula watuma ku‐Jobabe ukumkani we‐Madone, nakukumkani we‐Shimrone, nakukumkani we‐Kashafe," 
Joshua11:1 KWAYE kute, xeshekweni u‐Yabine, ukumkani we‐Hatsore, abevile oku, wandula watuma ku‐Jobabe ukumkani we‐Madone, nakukumkani we‐Shimrone, nakukumkani we‐Kashafe," 
Joshua11:2 nakokumkani abangasenode ezintabeni, nasetafeni ngecala lasesuyide le‐Kinerete, nasezihlanjeni, nasezindulini zase‐Dore ngaselwandle," 
Joshua11:3 nakubo aba‐Kanane ngasempumalanga nangasentshonalanga, naba‐Amori, nama‐Hete, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Yebusi ezintabeni, nama‐Hivi ngapantsi kwe‐Heremone elizweni le‐Mitsipe." 
Joshua11:4 Bapuma ke, bona nayo yonke imikosi yabo kunye nabo, into eninzi yabantu, njengentlabati eselunxwemeni lwolwandle ukuba baninzi, kwa namahashe nenqwelo zokulwa ngento eninzi kakulu." 
Joshua11:5 Bati bakuba behlanganisene bonke okumkani aba, beza bati waca ndawonye ngasemanzini e‐Merome, ukuba kuliwe no‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua11:6 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Yoshuwa: Ungoyiki ngenxa yabo; ngokuba ngomso malunga nelixesha ndiya kubanikela bonke bengababuleweyo ebusweni bo‐Sirayeli: amahashe abo uya kuwasika umbotshwa, nenqwelo zabo wozitshisa ngomlilo." 
Joshua11:7 Waya u‐Yoshuwa, nabo bonke abantu bokulwa kunye naye, wabazuma ngasemanzini e‐Merome; baza babawela ke." 
Joshua11:8 Wandula uyehova wabanikela esandleni so‐Sirayeli, abababeta, babasukela kude kwase‐Tsidone enkulu, nakude kwase‐Miserefote‐mayime, nakude kwasemhlanjeni we‐Mitsipe ngasempumalanga; baye bebabeta, bada ababashiyela namnye oseleyo." 
Joshua11:9 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wenza kubo njengokuba ebemxelele uyehova: amahashe abo wawasika umbotshwa, nenqwelo zabo wazitshisa ngomlilo." 
Joshua11:10 Wayebuya u‐Yoshuwa ngexesha elo, wayitimba i‐Hatsore; nokumkani wayo wambeta ngeṙele: ngokuba i‐Hatsore ngapambili ibiyintloko yabo bonke ubukumkani obo." 
Joshua11:11 Baye bebeta yonke imipefumlo ebikuyo ngohlangoti lweṙele, beyilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni: akwasala namnye opefumlayo: ne‐Hatsore wayitshisa ngomlilo." 
Joshua11:12 Zonke izixeko zokumkani abo, nabo bonke okumkani bazo, wabatimba u‐Yoshuwa, wababeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, ebalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni, njengokuba wabeyalela u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova." 
Joshua11:13 Kodwa zonke izixeko ezibe zimi emimangweni yazo o‐Sirayeli abazitshisa; kupela yi‐Hatsore yodwa wayitshisa u‐Yoshuwa. 
Joshua11:14 Nawo onke amaxoba ezizixeko, nenkomo, lwazipangela zona usapo luka‐Sirayeli: kodwa bonke abantu lwababeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, lwada lwabatshabalalisa; alwashiya namnye opefumlayo." 
Joshua11:15 Njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi, isicaka sake, kwa njalo u‐Mosesi wamyalela u‐Yoshuwa; waye u‐Yoshuwa esenje njalo ke; akabeka nxamnye nanye into kuko konke uyehova abemyalele u‐Mosesi ngako." 
Joshua11:16 Kwa njalo u‐Yoshuwa watabata lonke elozwe, elasezintabeni, nalo lonke elasesuyide, nalo lonke ilizwe le‐Goshene, nelezihlambo, neletafa, nentaba yakwa‐Sirayeli, nesihlambo sakuyo;" 
Joshua11:17 kwa sentabeni ye‐Halaki, enyukayo ngase‐Sehire, nakude kwase‐Bali‐gadi emhlanjeni we‐Lebanone, ngapantsi kwayo intaba ye‐Heremone: nabo bonke okumkani babo wababamba, wababeta, wabafisa." 
Joshua11:18 Yabi‐yimihla emininzi wenza u‐Yoshuwa imfazwe ngakubo bonke okumkani aba. 
Joshua11:19 Kwaye kungeko isixeko esenza uxolo nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngapandle kwama‐Hivi, abemi base‐Gideyone: zonke lwazitimba ngokulwa." 
Joshua11:20 Ngokuba bekuvela kuyehova ukugwenxisa intliziyo zabo, ukuba bapumele o‐Sirayeli ukulwa, ukuze babalahlele ekutshatyalalisweni, ukuba kungabiko kubo ufefe, kodwa ukuze babatshabalalise, njengokuba uyehova wabemyalela u‐Mosesi." 
Joshua11:21 Kweza u‐Yoshuwa ngexesha elo, wacita ama‐Hanaki ezintabeni, e‐Hebrone, e‐Debire, e‐Hanabi, nakuzo zonke intaba zakwa‐Juda, nakuzo zonke intaba zakwa‐Sirayeli: u‐Yoshuwa wawalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni kunye nezixeko zawo." 
Joshua11:22 Akwabi sashiywa ama‐Hanaki elizweni losapo luka‐Sirayeli: kupela e‐Gaza nase‐ Gate, nase‐Ashedode, kwako aseleyo." 
Joshua11:23 Kwa njalo u‐Yoshuwa watabata lonke elozwe, njengako konke abekutetile uyehova ku‐Mosesi; waye u‐Yoshuwa walinika libe lilifa ko‐Sirayeli, njengezahlulo zabo ngezizwe zabo. Laza ilizwe lapumla emfazweni." 
Joshua12:1 KEKALOKU aba ngokumkani belizwe, olwati usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwababeta, lwaza lwalifuya ilizwe labo pesheya kwe‐Yoredane ngasekupumeni kwelanga; kwa kuwo umlambo we‐Arenone kwada kwakuyo intaba ye‐Heremone, nalo lonke itafa ngasempumalanga:" 
Joshua12:2 u‐Sihone ukumkani waba‐Amori, owahlala e‐Heshebone, epete ubukosi kwa kuyo i‐Harohere eselunxwemeni lwomlambo we‐Arenone, napakati kwentili, na kuso isiqingata se‐Gileyadi, kude kwakuwo umlambo we‐Yaboki, umda wosapo luka‐Hamoni;" 
Joshua12:3 na kulo itafa kude kwakulo ulwandle lwase‐Kinerete ngasempumalanga, nakude kwakulo ulwandle lwasetafeni, ulwandle olutyuwa, ngasempumalanga, endleleni yase‐Bete‐yeshimote; nangasesuyide pantsi kwemifula yase‐Pisega:" 
Joshua12:4 nomda ka‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane, oweliva lama‐Rafa, owahlala e‐Hashetarote nase‐Edrehi," 
Joshua12:5 obepete ubukosi entabeni ye‐Heremone, nase‐Saleka, nakuyo yonke i‐Bashane, kude kwakuwo umda wama‐Geshure nama‐Mahaka, nesiqingata se‐Gileyadi, umda ka‐Sihone, ukumkani we‐Heshebone." 
Joshua12:6 Aba u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, bababeta: waza u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, walinika elozwe libe yimfuyo kuwo ama‐Rubene, nakuwo ama‐Gadi, nakuso isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase." 
Joshua12:7 Kanjalo aba ngokumkani belizwe, owababetayo u‐Yoshuwa, nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nganeno kwe‐Yoredane ngasentshonalanga, kwa kuyo i‐Bali‐gadi emhlanjeni we‐Lebanone, nakude kwasentabeni we‐Halaki, enyukayo ngase‐Sehire; owati u‐Yoshuwa walinika ezizweni zo‐Sirayeli libe yimfuyo njengezahlulo zabo;" 
Joshua12:8 ezintabeni, nasezihlanjeni, nasetafeni, nasemifuleni, nasentlango, nasesuyide: ama‐Hete, aba‐Amori, naba‐Kanane, ama‐Perizi, ama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi:" 
Joshua12:9 ukumkani we‐Jeriko, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Hahai, engecala le‐Betele, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:10 ukumkani we‐Yerusaleme, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Hebrone, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:11 ukumkani we‐Yaremute, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Lakishe, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:12 ukumkani we‐Heglone, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Gezere, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:13 ukumkani we‐Debire, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Gedere, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:14 ukumkani we‐Horema, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Haradi, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:15 ukumkani we‐Libena, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Hadulame, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:16 ukumkani we‐Makeda, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Betele, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:17 ukumkani we‐Tapuwa, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Hefere, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:18 ukumkani we‐Afeki, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Lasharone, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:19 ukumkani we‐Madone, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Hatsore, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:20 ukumkani we‐Shimrone‐merone, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Kashafe, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:21 ukumkani we‐Tahanaki, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Megido, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:22 ukumkani we‐Kedeshe, wamnye; ukumkani we‐Yokename, e‐Karamele, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:23 ukumkani we‐Dore ezindulini zase‐Dore, wamnye; ukumkani wezizwe e‐Gilegale, wamnye;" 
Joshua12:24 ukumkani we‐Tiretsa, wamnye: bonke okumkani bebengamashumi matatu anamnye." 
Joshua13:1 KEKALOKU u‐Yoshuwa ebemdala, ekolisile ukuba nemihla; waza uyehova wati kuye: Wena umdala, ukolisile ukuba nemihla, kanti lininzi kakulu ilizwe eliseleyo ukuba libanjwe." 
Joshua13:2 Eli lilizwe eliseleyo: yonke imida yama‐Filistiya, nayo yonke i‐Geshure," 
Joshua13:3 kutabata e‐Shihore, epambi kwe‐Jipete, kude kube semdeni wase‐Hekrone ngasenode, ilizwe elalibalelwa aba‐Kanane; inkosi ezintlanu zama‐Filistiya, ama‐Gaza, nama‐Ashedode, ama‐Ashekelone, ama‐Gate, nama‐Hekrone; kwa nama‐Havi:" 
Joshua13:4 ngasesuyide, lonke ilizwe laba‐Kanane, ne‐Mehara, eyama‐Tsidone, kude kube se‐Afeki, kude kube semdeni waba‐Amori:" 
Joshua13:5 nelizwe lama‐Gebali, nayo yonke i‐Lebanone ngasekupumeni kwelanga, kutabata e‐Bali‐gadi ngapantsi kwentaba ye‐Heremone, kude kube sekungenweni kwe‐Hamati." 
Joshua13:6 Bonke abemi bentaba, kutabata e‐Lebanone kude kube se‐Miserefote‐mayime, onke ama‐Tsidone, ndiya kubagqogqa mna pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli: kupela ulabe ngeqashiso ko‐Sirayeli libe lilifa, njengokuba ndikuyalele." 
Joshua13:7 Ngako kaloku yaba elilizwe libe lilifa kwizizwe ezilitoba, nakwisiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase." 
Joshua13:8 Kunye naso esinye isiqingata ama‐Rubene nama‐Gadi alamkele ilifa lawo, elo wawanikayo u‐Mosesi pesheya kwe‐Yoredane ngasempumalanga, njengokuba u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, wawanika:" 
Joshua13:9 kwa kuyo i‐Harohere, eselunxwemeni lwomlambo we‐Arenone, nesixeko esipakati kwentili, nalo lonke itafa lase‐Medeba kude kwase‐Dibone;" 
Joshua13:10 nazo zonke izixeko zika‐Sihone, ukumkani waba‐Amori, obepete ubukumkani e‐Heshebone, kude kwakuwo umda wosapo luka‐Hamoni;" 
Joshua13:11 ne‐Gileyadi, nomda wama‐Geshure nama‐Mahaka, nayo yonke intaba ye‐Heremone, nayo yonke i‐Bashane kude kwase‐Saleka;" 
Joshua13:12 bonke ubukumkani buka‐Hogi e‐Bashane, obepete ubukumkani e‐Hashetarote nase‐Edrehi: ngulowo obesele eliveni lama‐Rafa, owati u‐Mosesi wawabeta, wawagqogqa." 
Joshua13:13 Kodwa ama‐Geshure nama‐Mahaka usapo luka‐Sirayeli alugqogqanga wona; koko ama‐Geshure nama‐Mahaka ahleli pakati kwo‐Sirayeli kwada kwanamhla nje. 
Joshua13:14 Kupela isizwe sika‐Levi akasinikanga ilifa: iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo kayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, yona ililifa laso, njengokuba etshilo kuso." 
Joshua13:15 Wanika u‐Mosesi kwisizwe sosapo luka‐Rubene ilifa, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua13:16 Waye umda walo ubuse‐Harohere, eselunxwemeni lwomlambo we‐Arenone, nesixeko esipakati kwentili, nalo lonke itafa langase‐Medeba;" 
Joshua13:17 i‐Heshebone, nazo zonke izixeko zayo ezisetafeni; i‐Dibone, ne‐Bamote‐bali, ne‐Bete‐bali‐mehone," 
Joshua13:18 ne‐Yahetsa, ne‐Kedemote, ne‐Mefahate," 
Joshua13:19 ne‐Kiriyatayime, ne‐Sibama, ne‐Tserete‐shahare entabeni yasemhlanjeni," 
Joshua13:20 ne‐Bete‐pehori, nemifula yase‐Pisega, ne‐Bete‐yeshimote," 
Joshua13:21 nazo zonke izixeko zasetafeni, nabo bonke ubukumkani buka‐Sihone, ukumkani waba‐Amori, obepete ubukumkani e‐Heshebone, lowo u‐Mosesi wambetayo kunye nenkosi zama‐Midiyane, u‐Evi, no‐Rekeme, no‐Tsure, no‐Hure, no‐Re‐ba, ababezinkosana zika‐Sihone, zihleli kwelozwe." 
Joshua13:22 No‐Bilame, unyana ka‐Behori, umlauli, lwambulala usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngesiṙele pakati kwabahlatyiweyo lulo." 
Joshua13:23 Kwa njalo umda wosapo luka‐Rubene ubuyi‐Yoredane, kwa nomda wakona. Lilo eli ilifa losapo luka‐Rubene ngezizalwane zalo, izixeko nemizi yazo." 
Joshua13:24 Wanika u‐Mosesi kwisizwe sika‐Gadi, kulo usapo luka Gadi, ilifa, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua13:25 Waye umda walo ubuyi‐Yahezere, nazo zonke izixeko zase‐Gileyadi, nesiqingata selizwe losapo luka‐Hamoni, kude kwase‐Harohere engapambi kwe‐Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 nakuyo i‐Heshebone kude kwase‐Rama‐mitsipe nase‐Betonime; nakuyo i‐Mahanayime kude kwakuwo umda we‐Debire; 
Joshua13:27 nasemhlanjeni, i‐Bete‐harame, ne‐Bete‐nimra, ne‐Sukote, ne‐Tsafone, isisalela sobukumkani buka‐Sihone ukumkani we‐Heshebone; i‐Yoredane, nomda wakona, kude kwasesipelweni solwandle lwase‐Kinerete pesheya kwe‐Yoredane ngasempumalanga." 
Joshua13:28 Lilo eli ilifa losapo luka‐Gadi ngezizalwane zalo, izixeko nemizi yazo." 
Joshua13:29 Wanika u‐Mosesi kwisiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase ilifa; elibe lelesiqingata sesizwe sosapo luka‐Manase, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua13:30 Waye umda walo ubuse‐Mahanayime, yonke i‐Bashane, bonke ubukumkani buka‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane, nayo yonke imizi ka‐Yahire, ese‐Bashane, izixeko ezingamashumi matandatu." 
Joshua13:31 Kwanikwa nesiqingata se‐Gileyadi, ne‐Hashetarote, ne‐Edrehi, izixeko zasebukumkanini buka‐Hogi e‐Bashane, elusatsheni luka‐Makire unyana ka‐Manase, kwisiqingata sosapo luka‐Makire, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua13:32 Ngawo la amafa owawabayo u‐Mosesi, ematafeni ase‐Mowabi, pesheya kwe‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko, ngasempumalanga." 
Joshua13:33 Kodwa isizwe sika‐Levi u‐Mosesi akasinikanga ilifa: uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, nguye olilifa labo, njengokuba etshilo kubo." 
Joshua14:1 KANJAKO ngawo la amafa usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwawamkela elizweni le‐Kanane, abalwabela wona u‐Elezari umperisite, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune, nabazintloko zendlu zoyise zezizwe zosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua14:2 Kwabiwa ngeqashiso ilifa lalo, njengokuba uyehova ebeyalele ngesandla sika‐Mosesi, elezizwe ezilitoba nesiqingata sesizwe:" 
Joshua14:3 ngokuba u‐Mosesi ebenikile ilifa lezizwe ezibini nesiqingata sesizwe pesheya kwe‐Yoredane: kodwa aba‐Levi akabanikanga ilifa pakati kwalo. 
Joshua14:4 Ngokuba usapo luka‐Josefe beluzizizwe zibini, esika‐Manase nesika‐Frayime: Ngako bebenganiki isabelwa kuba‐Levi elizweni, kupela izixeko zokuhlala, nenqele zazo zibe zezenkomo zabo nezempahla yabo." 
Joshua14:5 Njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele u‐Mosesi, lwenje njalo ke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwalaba ilizwe." 
Joshua14:6 Lwandula lwasondela usapo luka‐Juda ku‐Yoshuwa e‐Gilegale; waza u‐Kalebi, unyana ka‐Jefune um‐Kenazi, wati kuye: Uyayazi wena into wabeyiteta uyehova ku‐Mosesi, indoda katixo, ngokwam nangokwako e‐Kadeshebaneha." 
Joshua14:7 Bendingominyaka imashumi mane ubudala bam, nxa u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, wandisusayo e‐Kadeshebaneha ukuya kuhlola ilizwe; ndada ndamzisela impendulo, njengokuba kube kunjalo entliziyweni yam." 
Joshua14:8 Kanti abazalwana bam, ababenyuke nam, banyibilikisa intliziyo zabantu: mna kodwa ndakolisa ukulandela uyehova, utixo wam." 
Joshua14:9 Wayefunga u‐Mosesi ngomhla lowo, esiti: Ngenyaniso lomhlaba inyawo zako zinyatele pezu kwawo, woba lilifa lako nelabantwana bako kude kube ngunapakade! ngokuba ukolisile ukulandela uyehova, utixo wam." 
Joshua14:10 Kekaloku bona ke, uyehova undilondolozile ebomini, njengokuba etshilo, leminyaka imashumi mane anamihlanu, kwa kuseloko uyehova wabeteta elilizwi ku‐Mosesi, okuya o‐Sirayeli bebehamba entlango: nakaloku, nanku namhla ndingominyaka ingamashumi asibozo anamihlanu ubudala bam." 
Joshua14:11 Ndisomelele namhla nje, njengokuba bendinjalo emhleni wanditumayo u‐Mosesi; njengokuba amandla am ebenjalo oko, akwa njalo amandla am kaloku, ngokulwa, nangokupuma, nangokungena." 
Joshua14:12 Ngako kaloku ndipe lentaba, owati uyehova wateta ngayo ngomhla lowo: ngokuba ubusiva wena ngomhla lowo, okokuba ama‐Hanaki akona, nezixeko ezikulu ezinqatyisiweyo: kungati uyehova woba nam, ukuba ndiwagqogqe, njengokuba etshilo uyehova." 
Joshua14:13 Wandula u‐Yoshuwa wamtamsanqelisa, wayinika i‐Hebrone ku‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune ibe lilifa lake." 
Joshua14:14 Ngako oko i‐Hebrone yaba lilifa lika‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune um‐Kenazi kwada kwanamhla nje; ngenxa yokuba wakolisa ukulandela uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua14:15 Igama le‐Hebrone ngapambili laliyi‐Kiriyate‐areba; obengumntu omkulu pakati kwama‐Hanaki u‐Areba lowo. Laye ilizwe lapumla emfazweni. 
Joshua15:1 Kekaloku iqashiswa lesizwe sosapo luka‐Juda, ngezizalwane zalo, belisemdeni we‐Edome, intlango ye‐Tsine ngasesuyide, ngasesipelweni sesuyide." 
Joshua15:2 Waye umda walo wasesuyide wavela esipelweni solwandle olutyuwa, ecwebeni elibeka ngasesuyide;" 
Joshua15:3 waza wapumela ecaleni lasesuyide leqina lase‐Hakerabime, wadlulela e‐Tsine, wenyuka esuyide waya e‐Kadeshe‐baneha, wadlulela e‐Hetserone, wenyukela e‐Adari, wajikela e‐Karaka;" 
Joshua15:4 waza wadlulela e‐Hatsemone, wapumela emlanjeni wase‐Jipete; nokupela kwawo umda lowo kwakuselwandle: nguwo lo oya kuba ngumda wenu wasesuyide." 
Joshua15:5 Kanjalo umda wasempumalanga waululwandle olutyuwa, kude kwasesipelweni se‐Yoredane. Nomda ongecala lasenode wona wavela ecwebeni lolwandle, esipelweni se‐Yoredane:" 
Joshua15:6 waza umda lowo wenyukela e‐Bete‐hogela, wadlula ngecala lasenode le‐Bete‐haraba; wabuya wenyuka umda lowo waya elityeni lika‐Bohane unyana ka‐Rubene:" 
Joshua15:7 wenyuka kanjalo umda lowo waya ngase‐Debire uvela emhlanjeni we‐Hakore, wasinga ngasenode, ubeka ngase‐Gilegale, emalungana neqina lase‐Adumime, engecala lasesuyide lomlambo: wadlula ke umda lowo waya ngasemanzini ase‐Hene‐shemeshe, nokupela kwawo kwakuse‐Hene‐Rogele:" 
Joshua15:8 waza wenyuka umda lowo ngesihlambo sonyana ka‐Hinome waya ecaleni lasesuyide le‐Yebusi, ekwa yiyo i‐Yerusaleme: wabuya wenyuka umda lowo waya engcotsheni yentaba epambi kwesihlambo sika‐Hinome ngasentshonalanga, esisesipelweni somhlambo wama‐Rafa ngasenode:" 
Joshua15:9 waza umda lowo woluka engcotsheni yentaba waya emtonjeni wamanzi ase‐Nefetowa, wada wapumela ezixekweni zasentabeni ye‐Hefrone: wabuya woluka umda lowo waya e‐Bahala, ekwa yiyo i‐Kiriyate‐yarime:" 
Joshua15:10 waza wajika umda lowo e‐Bahala ngasentshonalanga waya entabeni ye‐Sehire, wadlulela ecaleni le‐Hari‐yarime ngasenode, ekwa yiyo i‐Kesalone, wehlela e‐Bete‐shemeshe, wadlulela e‐Timna:" 
Joshua15:11 waza umda lowo wapumela ecaleni le‐Hekrone ngasenode; wandula umda lowo wolukela ngase‐Shikrone, wadlulela entabeni ye‐Bahala, wapumela e‐Yabinele; nokupela kwomda lowo kwakuselwandle." 
Joshua15:12 Kanjalo umda wasentshonalanga waululwandle olukulu, nomda wakona. Nguwo lo umda wosapo luka‐Juda ngento engqongayo, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua15:13 No‐Kalebi, unyana ka‐Jefune, wamnika isabelwa pakati kwosapo luka‐Juda, ngelizwi likayehova ku‐Yoshuwa, isixeko sika‐Areba uyise ka‐Hanaki, esiyiyo i‐Hebrone." 
Joshua15:14 Waye u‐Kalebi wagqogqa apo onyana bobatatu baka‐Hanaki, o‐Sheshai, no‐Ahimane, no‐Talemai, abenzalo ka‐Hanaki." 
Joshua15:15 Waza wenyuka kona waya kubo abemi base‐Debire; kekaloku igama le‐Debire ngapambili laliyi‐Kiriyate‐sefere. 
Joshua15:16 Wayesiti u‐Kalebi: Lowo obetayo i‐Kiriyate‐sefere, ayitimbe ke, sendiya kumnika u‐Hakesa, intombi yam, abe ngumfazi." 
Joshua15:17 Wasuka u‐Hotineli unyana ka‐Kenazi, umzalwana ka‐Kalebi, wayitimba: waza wamnika u‐Hakesa, intombi yake, abe ngumfazi." 
Joshua15:18 Kwaye kute, ekuzeni kwake endodeni, wayivusa ukuba icele kuyise intsimi; wandul’ ukuhlika eqwaṙasheni; waza u‐Kalebi wati kuye: Ufuna nto nina?" 
Joshua15:19 Wayesiti: Ndipe itamsanqa; ngokuba undipile ilizwe lasesuyide; ndipe kanjalo imitombo yamanzi. Waza wampa imitombo yasentla nemitombo yasezantsi. 
Joshua15:20 Lilo eli ilifa lesizwe sosapo luka‐Juda, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua15:21 Kekaloku nazi izixeko ezisesipelweni sesizwe sosapo luka‐Juda ngasemdeni we‐Edome esuyide: i‐Kabetsele, ne‐Hedere, ne‐Yagure," 
Joshua15:22 ne‐Kina, ne‐Dimona, ne‐Hadada," 
Joshua15:23 ne‐Kedeshe, ne‐Hatsore, ne‐Yitenane," 
Joshua15:24 i‐Zifi, ne‐Teleme, ne‐Behalote," 
Joshua15:25 ne‐Hatsore‐hadata, ne‐Keriyote, i‐Hetserone, ekwa yiyo i‐Hatsore," 
Joshua15:26 i‐Amame, ne‐Shema, ne‐Molada," 
Joshua15:27 ne‐Hatsare‐gada, ne‐Heshemone, ne‐Bete‐palete," 
Joshua15:28 ne‐Hatsare‐shuhali, ne‐Beresheba, ne‐Biziyoteya," 
Joshua15:29 i‐Bahala, ne‐Hiyime, ne‐Hatseme," 
Joshua15:30 ne‐Letoladi, ne‐Kesile, ne‐Horema," 
Joshua15:31 ne‐Tsikilage, ne‐Mademana, ne‐Santsana," 
Joshua15:32 ne‐Lebawote, ne‐Shilime, ne‐Hayine, ne‐Rimone: zonke izixeko zingamashumi mabini anetoba, nemizi yazo." 
Joshua15:33 Ezi sezihlanjeni, yi‐Shetawoli, ne‐Tsoreha, ne‐Ashena," 
Joshua15:34 ne‐Zanoha, ne‐Hene‐ganime, i‐Tapuwa, ne‐Hename," 
Joshua15:35 i‐Yaremute, ne‐Hadulame, i‐Soko, ne‐Hazeka," 
Joshua15:36 ne‐Sharayime, ne‐Haditayime, ne‐Gedera, ne‐Gederotayime; izixeko ezilishumi linazine, nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua15:37 i‐Tsenane, ne‐Hadasha, ne‐Migidale‐gadi," 
Joshua15:38 ne‐Dilane, ne‐Mitsipe, ne‐Yokitele," 
Joshua15:39 i‐Lakishe, ne‐Botsekate, ne‐Heglone," 
Joshua15:40 ne‐Kabone, ne‐Lahemasi, ne‐Kitilishe," 
Joshua15:41 ne‐Gederote, i‐Bete‐dagone, ne‐Nahama, ne‐Makeda; izixeko ezilishumi linazitandatu, nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua15:42 i‐Libena, ne‐Hetere, ne‐Hashane," 
Joshua15:43 ne‐Yifeta, ne‐Ashena, ne‐Netsibe," 
Joshua15:44 ne‐Kehila, ne‐Kazibe, ne‐Maresha; izixeko ezilitoba, nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua15:45 i‐Hekrone, namagxamesi ayo, nemizi yayo;" 
Joshua15:46 kutatyatwa e‐Hekrone kude kube selwandle, zonke ezingasecaleni le‐Ashedode, nemizi yazo;" 
Joshua15:47 i‐Ashedode, amagxamesi ayo nemizi yayo; i‐Gaza, amagxamesi ayo nemizi yayo, kude kube kuwo umlambo wase‐Jipete, nolwandle olukulu, nomda wakona." 
Joshua15:48 N ezi sezintabeni, yi‐Shamire, ne‐Yatire, ne‐Soko," 
Joshua15:49 ne‐Dana, ne‐Kiriyate‐sana, ekwa yiyo i‐Debire," 
Joshua15:50 ne‐Hanabi, ne‐Shetemo, ne‐Hanime," 
Joshua15:51 ne‐Goshene, ne‐Holone, ne‐Gilo; izixeko ezilishumi linesinye, nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua15:52 i‐Arabe, ne‐Duma, ne‐Shehane," 
Joshua15:53 ne‐Yanume, ne‐Bete‐tapuwa, ne‐Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 ne‐Humeta, ne‐Kiriyate‐areba, ekwa yiyo i‐Hebrone, ne‐Tsihore; izixeko ezilitoba, nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua15:55 i‐Mahone, i‐Karamele, ne‐Zifi, ne‐Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 ne‐Yezerele, ne‐Yokedame, ne‐Zanoha," 
Joshua15:57 i‐Kayine, i‐Gibeha, ne‐Timna; izixeko ezilishumi, nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua15:58 i‐Halehule, i‐Bete‐tsure, ne‐Gedore," 
Joshua15:59 ne‐Maharate, ne‐Bete‐hanote, ne‐Letekone; izixeko ezitandatu, nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua15:60 i‐Kiriyate‐bali, ekwa yiyo i‐Kiriyate‐yarime, ne‐Raba; izixeko ezibini, nemizi yazo." 
Joshua15:61 Ezi sentlango, yi‐Bete‐haraba, i‐Midine, ne‐Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 ne‐Nibeshane, nesixeko se‐Tyuwa, ne‐Hene‐gedi: izixeko ezitandatu, nemizi yazo." 
Joshua15:63 Kodwa ama‐Yebusi, abemi base‐Yerusaleme, usapo luka‐Juda lwakohlwa ukuwagqogqa: ngako ama‐Yebusi ahleli nosapo luka‐Juda e‐Yerusaleme, kude kwanamhla nje." 
Joshua16:1 KWAYE kupuma iqashiswa losapo luka‐Josefe e‐Yoredane, malungana ne‐Jeriko, laya emanzini ase‐Jeriko ngasempumalanga, entlango enyukayo e‐Yoredane ngentaba yase‐Betele;" 
Joshua16:2 laza lapuma e‐Betele laya e‐Luze, ladlulela emdeni wama‐Areki e‐Hatarote;" 
Joshua16:3 landula lehla ngasentshonalanga laya emdeni we‐Yafeleti, kude kwasemdeni we‐Bete‐horone yasezantsi, nase‐Gezere: nokupela kwalo kwakuselwandle." 
Joshua16:4 Kwa njalo onyana baka‐Josefe, u‐Manase no‐Frayime, bamkela ilifa labo." 
Joshua16:5 Kekaloku nangu umda wosapo luka‐Frayime, ngezizalwane zalo: umda welifa lalo ngasempumalanga ubuyi‐Hatarote‐adari kude kwase‐Bete‐horone yasentla;" 
Joshua16:6 waza umda lowo wapumela ngaselwandle e‐Mikemetate ngecala lasenode, wajika apo umda lowo waya ngasempumalanga e‐Tahanate‐shilo, wadlula kona ngecala lasempumalanga waya e‐Yanoha;" 
Joshua16:7 wehla e‐Yanoha waya e‐Hatarote, nase‐Naharate, wafikela e‐Jeriko, wapela e‐Yoredane." 
Joshua16:8 Uvela e‐Tapuwa waya umda lowo ngasentshonalanga emlanjeni we‐Kana; nokupela kwawo kwakuselwandle. Lilo eli ilifa lesizwe sosapo luka‐Frayime ngezizalwane zalo: 
Joshua16:9 kunye nezixeko ezahlulelwa usapo luka‐Frayime pakati kwelifa losapo luka‐Manase; zonke izixeko ezo nemizi yazo. 
Joshua16:10 Kodwa alwagqogqa aba‐Kanane abebemi e‐Gezere; koko aba‐Kanane behleli pakati kwama‐Frayime kude kwanamhla nje, benikela ngenkonzo." 
Joshua17:1 Kwaye kuko iqashiswa nakwisizwe sika‐Manase; ngokuba yena ebengowamazibulo ka‐Josefe: ku‐Makire, owamazibulo ka‐Manase, uyise ka‐Gileyadi, ngokuba ebeyindoda yokulwa, kukona kwanikwa kuye i‐Gileyadi ne‐Bashane." 
Joshua17:2 Kwaye kuko nakubantwana baka‐Manase abaseleyo iqashiswa, ngezizalwane zabo: kulo usapo luka‐Abihezere, nakulo usapo luka‐Heleki, nakulo usapo luka‐Asiriyeli, nakulo usapo luka‐Shekeme, nakulo usapo luka‐Hefere, nakulo usapo luka‐Shemida: aba ngabantwana baka‐Manase unyana ka‐Josefe ababudoda, ngezizalwane zabo." 
Joshua17:3 Kodwa u‐Tselofehadi, unyana ka‐Hefere, unyana ka‐Gileyadi, unyana ka‐Makire, unyana ka‐Manase, ebengenabo onyana, wanentombi kupela: ngawo la amagama entombi zake: ngu‐Mahala, no‐Noha, n o‐Hogela, n o‐Mileka, no‐Tiretsa." 
Joshua17:4 Baye bona besondela ebusweni buka‐Elezari umperisite, nasebusweni buka‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune, nasebusweni benkosi, besiti: Uyehova wamyalela u‐Mosesi ukuba sinikwe ilifa pakati kwabazalwana betu. Waza wabanika, ngelizwi likayehova, ilifa pakati kwabazalwana boyise." 
Joshua17:5 Kwa njalo kwawa izahlulo ezilishumi ku‐Manase, ngapandle kwelizwe le‐Gileyadi ne‐Bashane, elipesheya kwe‐Yoredane;" 
Joshua17:6 ngokuba intombi zika‐Manase zamkela ilifa pakati kwonyana bake: nelizwe le‐Gileyadi lona onyana baka‐Manase abaseleyo bebenalo. 
Joshua17:7 Kekaloku umda ka‐Manase wavela e‐Ashere waya e‐Mikemetate, engapambi kwe‐Shekeme; wasuka umda lowo waya ngasekunene, kubo abemi base‐Hene‐tapuwa." 
Joshua17:8 U‐Manase ebenalo ilizwe lase‐Tapuwa, kodwa i‐Tapuwa, esemdeni ka‐Manase, yona usapo luka‐Frayime belunayo." 
Joshua17:9 Waza umda lowo wehlela emlanjeni we‐Kana, ngasecaleni lasesuyide lomlambo: ezizixeko zibe zizezika‐Frayime, pakati kwezixeko zika‐Manase. Kanjalo umda ka‐Manase ubusecaleni lasenode lomlambo, nokupela kwawo kwakuselwandle:" 
Joshua17:10 ngasesuyide libe lilelika‐Frayime, nangasenode libe lilelika‐Manase, nolwandle lwalungumda wake; baye befikela kwa‐Ashere ngasenode, nakwa‐Yisakare ngasempumalanga." 
Joshua17:11 Ngokuba kwa‐Yisakare nakwa‐Ashere u‐Manase ebene‐Bete‐shane namagxamesi ayo, ne‐Yibelame namagxamesi ayo, nabemi base‐Dore namagxamesi ayo, nabemi base‐Hene‐dore namagxamesi ayo, nabemi base‐Tahanaki namagxamesi ayo, nabemi base‐Megido namagxamesi ayo, amazwe amatatu." 
Joshua17:12 Kodwa usapo luka Manase belukohlwa kukubagqogqa abemi bezozixeko; koko aba‐Kanane bebetanda ukuhlala kwelozwe. 
Joshua17:13 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni luse lwomelele usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwabenza aba‐Kanane babe ngabanikeli; kodwa alwabagqogqa ngokugqibela." 
Joshua17:14 Lwandula lwateta usapo luka‐Josefe ku‐Yoshuwa, lusiti: Yinina ukuba undinikile libe lilifa iqashiswa linye nesahlulo sinye kupela, ndingabantu abaninzi nje, njengokuba uyehova enditamsanqele kwada kwakaloku?" 
Joshua17:15 Waza wati kulo u‐Yoshuwa: Ungabantu abaninzi nje, nyuka uye ehlatini, uzihlahlele kwa lapo elizweni lama‐Perizi nelama‐Rafa, ukuba ixinene kuwe intaba yakwa‐Frayime." 
Joshua17:16 Lwabuya usapo luka‐Josefe lwati: Intaba leyo ayisanele; kanjalo kuko inqwelo zesincete pakati kwabo bonke aba‐Kanane abemiyo elizweni lasemhlanjeni, kwabase‐Bete‐shane namagxamesi ayo, nakwabasemhlanjeni wase‐Yezerele." 
Joshua17:17 Waza watsho u‐Yoshuwa kwindlu ka‐Josefe, ko‐Frayime nako‐Manase, ukuti: Ungabantu abaninzi, unamandla amakulu; akuyi kuba nalo iqashiswa linye kupela:" 
Joshua17:18 koko intaba iya kuba yeyako: ngokuba ilihlati, wauya kulihlahla, ziti izipumo zalo zibe zezako: ngokuba uya kubagqogqa aba‐Kanane, nakuba banenqwelo zesincete, nakuba bomelele kanjako." 
Joshua18:1 YAZA yahlanganisana yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli e‐Shilo, yamisa kona intente yentlangano. Lati ilizwe leyiswa pambi kwalo." 
Joshua18:2 Kwaye kusala pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli izizwe zazisixe̔nxe, ezingekabelwanga ilifa lazo." 
Joshua18:3 Ngako u‐Yoshuwa wati elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli: Kwoda kube ninina eniya kunqena ukuya kufuya ilizwe, enilipiweyo nguyehova, utixo woyihlo benu?" 
Joshua18:4 Kupani amadoda abe matatu ngesizwe ngesizwe, endiya kuwatuma, ukuba esuke acande elizweni, alibalise ngokwelifa lawo, abuye eze kum." 
Joshua18:5 Aeya kuzabela lona ngezabiwo ezisixe̔nxe: u‐Juda uya kuhlala pezu kwomda wake ngasesuyide, nendlu ka‐Josefe bona bohlala pezu kwomda wabo ngasenode." 
Joshua18:6 Nina ngoko niya kubalisa ilizwe ngezabiwo ezisixe̔nxe, nize nizise imbaliso kum kulendawo, ukuba ndinenzele amaqashiso apa pambi kwoyehova, utixo wetu." 
Joshua18:7 Ngokuba aba‐Levi bengenaso isabelwa pakati kwenu; koko ubuperisite bukayehova bulilifa labo: kanjako u‐Gadi, no‐Rubene, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, sebelamkele ilifa labo pesheya kwe‐Yoredane ngasempumalanga, abalinikiweyo ngu‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova." 
Joshua18:8 Aza esuka amadoda lawo, emka ke. Waye u‐Yoshuwa eyalele abo bemkayo ukuya kubalisa ilizwe, ngokuti: Hambani nicande elizweni, nilibalise; nize nibuyele kum, ukuba ndinenzele apa amaqashiso pambi kwoyehova e‐Shilo." 
Joshua18:9 Emka ke amadoda lawo, adlula pakati kwelizwe, alibalisa ngezixeko zalo ngezabiwo ezisixe̔nxe encwadini, abuya eza ku‐Yoshuwa emnqubeni e‐Shilo." 
Joshua18:10 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wawenzela amaqashiso e‐Shilo pambi kwoyehova: waye u‐Yoshuwa kanjalo wabela kona ilizwe elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, njengezahlulo zalo." 
Joshua18:11 Kwaye kunyuka iqashiso lesizwe sosapo luka‐Benjamine, ngezizalwane zalo: wapuma umda weqashiswa lalo pakati kwosapo luka‐Juda nosapo luka‐Josefe." 
Joshua18:12 Wabuvela umda walo, ngecala lasenode, e‐Yoredane; waza wenyuka umda lowo waya ecaleni le‐Jeriko ngasenode, wabuya wenyuka ngentaba ngasentshonalanga, nokupela kwawo kwakusentlango yase‐Betavene." 
Joshua18:13 Wagqita kona umda lowo waya ngase‐Luze, ecaleni le‐Luze, ekwa yiyo i‐Betele, ngasesuyide; waza umda lowo wehlela e‐Hatarote‐adari, ngasentabeni esecaleni lasesuyide le‐Bete‐horone yasezantsi." 
Joshua18:14 Woluka umda lowo, wajikela ecaleni lolwandle ngasesuyide, uvela entabeni epambi kwayo i‐Bete‐horone ngasesuyide; nokupela kwawo kwakuse‐Kiriyate‐bali, ekwa yiyo i‐Kiriyate‐yarime, isixeko sosapo luka‐Juda: eli licala lasentshonalanga." 
Joshua18:15 Lavela icala lasesuyide esipelweni se‐Kiriyate‐yarime; wapuma umda lowo waya ngasentshonalanga, wapumela emtonjeni wamanzi ase‐Nefetowa:" 
Joshua18:16 waza umda lowo wehlela esipelweni sentaba epambi kwaso isihlambo sonyana ka‐Hinome, esisemhlanjeni wama‐Rafa ngasenode; wandula wehlela esihlanjeni sika‐Hinome, ecaleni le‐Yebusi ngasesuyide, wehla kanjalo waya e‐Hene‐rogela;" 
Joshua18:17 waza woluka enode, wapumela e‐Hene‐shemeshe; wapuma kona waya e‐Gelilote, emalungana neqina lase‐Adumime, wehlela elityeni lika‐Bohane unyana ka‐Rubene," 
Joshua18:18 wadlulela ecaleni elimalungana ne‐Haraba ngasenode, waza wehlela e‐Haraba:" 
Joshua18:19 wadlula ke umda lowo waya ecaleni le‐Bete‐hogela ngasenode: nokupela kwawo umda lowo kwakusecwebeni lasenode lolwandle olutyuwa, esipelweni sasesuyide se‐Yoredane: nguwo lo umda wasesuyide." 
Joshua18:20 Kanjalo i‐Yoredane ibingumda walo ngecala lasempumalanga. Eli lilifa losapo luka‐Benjamine, ngemida yalo engqongayo, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua18:21 Kekaloku nazi izixeko zesizwe sosapo luka‐Benjamine, ngezizalwane zalo: i‐Jeriko, ne‐Bete‐hogela, nomhlambo we‐Ketsitse," 
Joshua18:22 ne‐Bete‐haraba, ne‐Tsemarayime, ne‐Betele," 
Joshua18:23 ne‐Havime, ne‐Para, ne‐Hofera," 
Joshua18:24 ne‐Kefari‐hamonai, ne‐Hofeni, ne‐Gaba; izixeko ezilishumi linazibini nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua18:25 i‐Gibeyone, ne‐Rama, ne‐Berote," 
Joshua18:26 ne‐Mitsipe, ne‐Kefira, ne‐Motsa," 
Joshua18:27 ne‐Rekeme, ne‐Yiripele, ne‐Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 ne‐Tsela, n e‐Elefe, ne‐Yebusi, ekwa yiyo i‐Yerusaleme, n e‐Gibehate, n e‐Kiriyate; izixeko ezilishumi linazine, nemizi yazo. Eli lilifa losapo luka‐Benjamine, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua19:1 Laza iqashiso lesibini lapumela u‐Simone, kwa isizwe sosapo luka‐Simone, ngezizalwane zalo: laye ilifa lalo lipakati kwelifa losapo luka‐Juda." 
Joshua19:2 Naselifeni lalo lwalune‐Beresheba, ne‐Sheba, ne‐Molada," 
Joshua19:3 ne‐Hatsare‐shuhali, ne‐Bala, ne‐Hatseme," 
Joshua19:4 ne‐Letoladi, ne‐Betule, ne‐Horema," 
Joshua19:5 ne‐Tsikilage, ne‐Bete‐marakabote, ne‐Hatsare‐susa," 
Joshua19:6 ne‐Bete‐lebawote, ne‐Sharuhene; izixeko ezilishumi linazitatu, nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua19:7 i‐Hayine, n e‐Rimone, ne‐Hetere, ne‐Hashane; izixeko ezine, nemizi yazo:" 
Joshua19:8 nayo yonke imizi ebingqongayo izixeko ezo, kwada kwase‐Bahalate‐bere, e‐Rama yasesuyide. Eli lilifa lesizwe sosapo luka‐Simone, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua19:9 La catshulwa esahlulweni sosapo luka‐Juda ilifa losapo luka‐Simone: ngokuba isabelwa sosapo luka‐Juda besisikulu kulo; ngako usapo luka‐Simone lwamkela ilifa pakati kwelifa lalo. 
Joshua19:10 Laza iqashiso lesitatu lenyukela usapo luka‐Zebulone, ngezizalwane zalo. Waya umda welifa lalo kwada kwase‐Saride:" 
Joshua19:11 waza umda walo wenyukela ngasentshonalanga ne‐Marala, wafikela e‐Dabashete, wafikela nasemlanjeni opambi kwayo i‐Yokename;" 
Joshua19:12 waza wabuya e‐Saride ngapambili, ngasekupumeni kwelanga, waya emdeni wase‐Kiselote‐tabore, wapumela e‐Daberate, wenyukela e‐Yafiya;" 
Joshua19:13 wadlula kona ngapambili, ngasempumalanga, waya e‐Gate‐hefere, nas e‐Hete‐katsine, wapumela e‐Rimone, wolukela e‐Neha;" 
Joshua19:14 waza umda lowo wajika kona ngasenode waya e‐Hanatone; nokupela kwawo kwakusesihlanjeni se‐Yifeta‐ele: 
Joshua19:15 ne‐Katate, ne‐Nahalali, ne‐Shimrone, ne‐Yidala, ne‐Beteleheme; izixeko ezilishumi linazibini, nemizi yazo." 
Joshua19:16 Eli lilifa losapo luka‐Zebulone, ngezizalwane zalo, izixeko ezi nemizi yazo." 
Joshua19:17 Iqashiso lesine lapumela u‐Yisakare, kwa usapo luka‐Yisakare, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua19:18 Waya umda walo ngase‐Yezerele, ne‐Kesulote, ne‐Shuneme," 
Joshua19:19 ne‐Hafarayime, ne‐Shiyone, ne‐Anaharate," 
Joshua19:20 ne‐Rabiti, ne‐Kishiyone, ne‐Abetse," 
Joshua19:21 ne‐Remete, ne‐Hene‐ganime, ne‐Hene‐hada, ne‐Bete‐patsetse;" 
Joshua19:22 waza umda lowo wafikela e‐Tabore, ne‐Shahatsima, ne‐Bete‐shemeshe; nokupela kwawo umda walo kwakuse‐Yoredane: izixeko ezilishumi linazitandatu, nemizi yazo." 
Joshua19:23 Leli ilifa lesizwe sosapo luka‐Yisakare, ngezizalwane zalo, izixeko nemizi yazo." 
Joshua19:24 Laza iqashiso lesihlanu lapumela isizwe sosapo luka‐Ashere, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua19:25 Waye umda walo ubuyi‐Helekate, ne‐Hali, ne‐Betene, ne‐Kashafe," 
Joshua19:26 ne‐Alameleki, ne‐Hamehadi, ne‐Mishali; waya wafikela e‐Karamele ngasentshonalanga, nase‐Shihore‐libenate;" 
Joshua19:27 waza wabuya kona ngasekupumeni kwelanga waya e‐Bete‐dagone, wafikela kwa‐Zebulone nasesihlanjeni se‐Yifeta‐ele, ngecala lasenode le‐Bete‐hemeki ne‐Nehiyele, wapumela e‐Kabule ngasekohlo;" 
Joshua19:28 ne‐Hebrone, ne‐Rehobi, ne‐Hamone, ne‐Kana, kude kwase‐Tsidone enkulu;" 
Joshua19:29 waza wabuya umda lowo waya e‐Rama, nakude kwasesixekweni esinqatyisiweyo esiyi‐Tire; wabuya kanjako waya e‐Hosa; nokupela kwawo kwakuselwandle, emhlabeni ngase‐Kazibe;" 
Joshua19:30 ne‐Huma, ne‐Afeki, ne‐Rehobi: izixeko ezingamashumi mabini anazibini, nemizi yazo." 
Joshua19:31 Leli ilifa lesizwe sosapo luka‐Ashere, ngezizalwane zalo, izixeko ezi nemizi yazo." 
Joshua19:32 Iqashiso lesitandatu lapumela usapo luka‐Nefatali, kwa usapo luka‐Nefatali ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua19:33 Wavela umda walo e‐Helefe, eyekeni e‐Tsahananime, ne‐Adami, n e‐Nekebi, ne‐Yabinele, waya kude kwase‐Lakume; nokupela kwawo kwakuse‐Yoredane:" 
Joshua19:34 wandula wabuya umda lowo waya ngasentshonalanga e‐Azenote‐tabore, wapuma kona waya e‐Hukoke, wafikela kwa‐Zebulone ngecala lasesuyide, wafikela nakwa‐Ashere ngecala lasentshonalanga, nakwa‐Juda e‐Yoredane ngasekupumeni kwelanga." 
Joshua19:35 Nezixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, yi‐Tsidime, n e‐Tsere, ne‐Hammate, n e‐Rakate, ne‐Kinerete," 
Joshua19:36 ne‐Adama, ne‐Rama, ne‐Hatsore," 
Joshua19:37 ne‐Kedeshe, ne‐Edrehi, ne‐Henehatsore," 
Joshua19:38 ne‐Yirone, ne‐Migidale‐ele, n e‐Horeme, ne‐Bete‐hanate, ne‐Bete‐shemeshe; izixeko ezilishumi linetoba, nemizi yazo." 
Joshua19:39 Leli ilifa lesizwe sosapo luka‐Nefatali, ngezizalwane zalo, ezizixeko nemizi yazo." 
Joshua19:40 Iqashiso lesixe̔nxe lapumela isizwe sosapo luka‐Dane, ngezizalwane zalo." 
Joshua19:41 Waye umda welifa lalo ubuyi‐Tsoreha, ne‐Shetawoli, ne‐Hire‐shemeshe," 
Joshua19:42 ne‐Shahalabine, ne‐Ajalone, ne‐Yitela," 
Joshua19:43 ne‐Eloni, ne‐Timnata, ne‐Hekrone," 
Joshua19:44 ne‐Leteke, ne‐Gibetone, ne‐Bahalate," 
Joshua19:45 ne‐Yehude, ne‐Bene‐beraki, ne‐Gate‐rimone," 
Joshua19:46 ne‐Me‐yarekone, ne‐Rakone, kunye nomda omalungana ne Jafo." 
Joshua19:47 Waye umda wosapo luka‐Dane wapuma kulo: ngokuba usapo luka‐Dane lwenyuka ukuya kulwa ne‐Lesheme, lwayitimba, lwayibeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, lwayibamba, lwahlala kuyo, lwayibiza i‐Lesheme ngokuti yi‐Dane, njengegama lika‐Dane uyise walo." 
Joshua19:48 Leli ilifa lesizwe sosapo luka‐Dane, ngezizalwane zalo, izixeko ezi nemizi yazo." 
Joshua19:49 Kwati kwakugqitywa ukwaba ilizwe libe lilifa, ngemida yalo, lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwamnika u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, ilifa pakati kwalo:" 
Joshua19:50 ngelizwi likayehova lwamnika isixeko owasicelayo, i‐Timnate‐sera entabeni yakwa‐Frayime: waza wasaka isixeko eso, wahlala kuso." 
Joshua19:51 Ngawo la amafa, abawabayo u‐Elezari umperisite, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune, nabazintloko zendlu zoyise zezizwe zalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngeqashiso e‐Shilo, pambi kwoyehova, ngasemnyango wentente yentlangano. Kwa njalo bagqiba ukwaba ilizwe." 
Joshua20:1 WABUYA wateta uyehova ku‐Yoshuwa, esiti:" 
Joshua20:2 Teta nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, usiti: Zinikeleni izixeko zesipepelo, endanditeta ngazo kuni ngesandla sika‐Mosesi:" 
Joshua20:3 ukuba kusabele kona umbulali ombulele umntu ubomi ngesiposo, kungengokwazi; zoba yindawo yokupepela kuni ngenxa yompindezeli wegazi." 
Joshua20:4 Waeya kusabela kwesinye ezixekweni ezo, eme emnyango wesango lesixeko, atete amazwi ake ezindlebeni zabadala besosixeko, abaya kumamkela esixekweni kubo, bamnike indawo, ukuba ahlale nabo." 
Joshua20:5 Naxeshekweni umpindezeli wegazi amputumayo, abayi kunikela umbulali lowo esandleni sake; ngokuba engambetanga ummelwane wake ngokwazi, engamtiyanga ngamaxesha apambili kanjako." 
Joshua20:6 Waeya kuhlala kwesosixeko, ade eme ebusweni bentlanganiso ukuba kugwetywe, umhlaumbi kude kufe umperisite omkulu oya kubako ngezontsuku; andule abuye umbulali lowo, eze esixekweni sakowabo, nasendlwini yake, esixekweni apo abesaba kona." 
Joshua20:7 Lwaza lwahlula i‐Kedeshe yase‐Galili entabeni yakwa‐Nefatali, ne‐Shekeme entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, ne‐Kiriyate‐areba, ekwa yiyo i‐Hebrone, entabeni yakwa‐Juda." 
Joshua20:8 Napesheya kwe‐Yoredane malungana ne‐Jeriko ngasempumalanga, lwanika i‐Betsere esentlango, ezweni elibutafa, kwisizwe sika‐Rubene; ne‐Ramote ese‐Gileyadi, kwisizwe sika‐Gadi; ne‐Golane ese‐Bashane, kwisizwe sika‐Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Zizo ezi izixeko ezibe zimiselwa lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nowasemzini obepambukele pakati kwalo, ukuba asabele kona osukuba ebulala umntu ngesiposo; aze angafi ngesandla sompindezeli wegazi, engekemi ebusweni bentlanganiso." 
Joshua21:1 BANDULA basondela abazintloko zendlu zoyise zaba‐Levi ku‐Elezari umperisite, naku‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune, nakwabazintloko zendlu zoyise zazo izizwe zosapo luka‐Sirayeli," 
Joshua21:2 bateta kubo e‐Shilo elizweni le‐Kanane, besiti: Uyehova wabeyalela ngesandla sika‐Mosesi ukuba sinikwe izixeko zokuhlala, nenqele zazo zibe zezenkomo zetu." 
Joshua21:3 Ngako usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabanika aba‐Levi, elifeni lalo, ngelizwi likayehova, izixeko ezi nenqele zazo." 
Joshua21:4 Laza iqashiso lapumela izizalwane zama‐Kohati: kwaye kuko elusatsheni luka‐Arone umperisite, olwakubo aba‐Levi, zicatshulwe esizweni sika‐Juda, nasesizweni sika‐Simone, nasesizweni sika‐Benjamine, ngeqashiso, izixeko ezilishumi linazitatu;" 
Joshua21:5 naselusatsheni luka‐Kohati oluseleyo, zicatshulwe kuzo izizalwane zesizwe sika‐Frayime, nakuso isizwe sika‐Dane, nakuso isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, ngeqashiso, izixeko ezilishumi;" 
Joshua21:6 naselusatsheni luka‐Gereshone, zicatshulwe kuzo izizalwane zesizwe sika‐Yisakare, nakuso isizwe sika‐Ashere, nakuso isizwe sika‐Nefatali, nakuso isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase e‐Bashane, ngeqashiso, izixeko ezilishumi linazitatu;" 
Joshua21:7 nas elusatsheni luka‐Merari, ngezizalwane zalo, zicatshulwe esizweni sika‐Rubene, nasesizweni sika‐Gadi, nasesizweni sika‐Zebulone, izixeko ezilishumi linazibini." 
Joshua21:8 Kwa njalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabanika aba‐Levi ezizixeko nenqele zazo ngeqashiso, njengokuba uyehova ebeyalele ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Joshua21:9 Lwaye lunika zicatshulwe esizweni sosapo luka‐Juda, nasesizweni sosapo luka‐Simone, ezizixeko ezibizwayo ngegama;" 
Joshua21:10 olwati usapo luka‐Arone, olwakuzo izizalwane zama‐Kohati, olwakulo usapo luka‐Levi, lwaba nazo: ngokuba iqashiso lokuqala libe lilelalo." 
Joshua21:11 Lwaza lwalunika isixeko sika‐Areba uyise ka‐Hanaki, esiyiyo i‐Hebrone, entabeni yakwa‐Juda, nenqele zaso ezisingqongayo." 
Joshua21:12 Kodwa izindle zasesixekweni, nemizi yaso, lwazinika ku‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune zibe yimfuyo yake." 
Joshua21:13 Kwa njalo lwalunika usapo luka‐Arone umperisite, i‐Hebrone, isixeko sokupepela kwombulali, nenqele zayo, ne‐Libena nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:14 ne‐Yatire nenqele zayo, ne‐Shetemoha nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:15 ne‐Holone nenqele zayo, ne‐Debire nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:16 ne‐Hayine nenqele zayo, ne‐Yuta nenqele zayo, n e‐Bete‐shemeshe nenqele zayo; izixeko ezilitoba zicatshulwe kwezozizwe zibini." 
Joshua21:17 Nakuso isizwe sika‐Benjamine kwacatshulwa i‐Gibeyone nenqele zayo, i‐Geba nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:18 i‐Hanatote nenqele zayo, ne‐Halemone nenqele zayo; izixeko ezine." 
Joshua21:19 Zonke izixeko zosapo luka‐Arone, abaperisite, zizixeko ezilishumi linazitatu nenqele zazo." 
Joshua21:20 Nezizalwane zosapo luka‐Kohati, aba‐Levi abaseleyo elusatsheni luka‐Kohati, zona zazinezixeko zeqashiswa lazo zicatshulwe esizweni sika‐Frayime." 
Joshua21:21 Ngokuba beluzinika i‐Shekeme, isixeko sokupepela kwombulali, nenqele zayo, entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, ne‐Gezere nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:22 ne‐Kibetsayime nenqele zayo, ne‐Bete‐horone nenqele zayo; izixeko ezine." 
Joshua21:23 Kwacatshulwa nasesizweni sika‐Dane, i‐Leteke nenqele zayo, i‐Gibetone nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:24 i‐Ajalone nenqele zayo, i‐Gate‐rimone nenqele zayo; izixeko ezine:" 
Joshua21:25 nakuso isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, i‐Tahanaki nenqele zayo, ne‐Gate‐rimone nenqele zayo: izixeko ezibini." 
Joshua21:26 Zonke izixeko zezizalwane zosapo luka‐Kohati oluseleyo, zizixeko ezilishumi nenqele zazo." 
Joshua21:27 Nosapo luka‐Gereshone, olwakuzo izizalwane zaba‐Levi, kwacatshul elwa lona kw esinye isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, i‐Golane yase‐Bashane, isixeko sokupepela kwombulali, nenqele zayo, ne‐Beheshe‐tera nenqele zayo; izixeko ezibini:" 
Joshua21:28 nasesizweni sika‐Yisakare, i‐Kishone nenqele zayo, i‐Daberate nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:29 i‐Yaremute nenqele zayo, i‐Hene‐ganime nenqele zayo; izixeko ezine:" 
Joshua21:30 nasesizweni sika‐Ashere, i‐Mishale nenqele zayo, i‐Habedoni nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:31 i‐Helekate nenqele zayo, ne‐Rehobi nenqele zayo; izixeko ezine:" 
Joshua21:32 nasesizweni sika‐Nefatali, i‐Kedeshe yase‐Galili, isixeko sokupepela kwombulali, nenqele zayo, ne‐Hammote‐dore nenqele zayo, ne‐Karetane nenqele zayo; izixeko ezitatu." 
Joshua21:33 Zonke izixeko zama‐Gereshone, ngezizalwane zawo, zizixeko ezilishumi linazitatu nenqele zazo." 
Joshua21:34 Nezizalwane zosapo luka‐Merari, ezaba‐Levi abaseleyo, kwacatshul elwa zona esizweni sika‐Zebulone, i‐Yokename nenqele zayo, ne‐Kareta nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:35 i‐Dimna nenqele zayo, i‐Nahalali nenqele zayo; izixeko ezine:" 
Joshua21:36 nasesizweni sika‐Rubene, i‐Betsere nenqele zayo, ne‐Yahetsa nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:37 i‐Kedemote nenqele zayo, ne‐Mefahate nenqele zayo; izixeko ezine:" 
Joshua21:38 nasesizweni sika‐Gadi, i‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi, isixeko sokupepela kwombulali, nenqele zayo, ne‐Mahanayime nenqele zayo," 
Joshua21:39 i‐Heshebone nenqele zayo, i‐Yahezere nenqele zayo: zonke izixeko zazine." 
Joshua21:40 Zonke izixeko zosapo luka‐Merari, ngezizalwane zalo, oluseleyo ezizalwaneni zaba‐Levi, iqashiswa lalo lazizixeko ezilishumi linazibini." 
Joshua21:41 Zonke izixeko zaba‐Levi, ezipakati kwemfuyo yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, zazizixeko ezingamashumi mane anesibozo nenqele zazo." 
Joshua21:42 Izixeko ezi zibe zinenqele zazo ezizingqongayo, ezinye ngezinye: zibe zinjalo zonke ezizixeko." 
Joshua21:43 KWA njalo uyehova wanika ko‐Sirayeli lonke ilizwe, abefungile ukuba alinike koyise babo; bada balifuya, bahlala kulo." 
Joshua21:44 Waye uyehova kanjalo ebanikile ukupumla ngamacala onke, njengako konke abefungile ngako koyise babo: akwabiko namnye umntu kuzo zonke intshaba zabo obenokuma pambi kwabo; zonke intshaba zabo wazinikela uyehova esandleni sabo." 
Joshua21:45 Akutshitshanga nanye into kuzo zonke izinto ezilungileyo, abezitetile uyehova kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli: konke kweza kubako." 
Joshua22:1 Wandula u‐Yoshuwa wabiza ama‐Rubene, nama‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase," 
Joshua22:2 wati kuwo: Nikugcinile konke wabeniyalela kona u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova; kanjalo nipulapule ilizwi lam ngako konke endiniyaleleyo." 
Joshua22:3 Anishiyanga abazalwana benu lemihla mininzi kude kwanamhla nje; koko nikugcinile ukugcinwa kwomyalelo kayehova, utixo wenu." 
Joshua22:4 Kaloku ke, uyehova, utixo wenu, ubapumzile abazalwana benu, njengokuba wabesitsho kubo: ngako kaloku buyani, niye ezintenteni zenu, elizweni lemfuyo yenu, elo u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, walinika kuni pesheya kwe‐Yoredane." 
Joshua22:5 Kodwa lumkani kakulu ukuba niwenze umyalelo nomteto, owabeniyalela u‐Mosesi, isicaka sikayehova, ukuba nimtande uyehova, utixo wenu, nokuba nihambe kuzo zonke indlela zake, nokuba niyigcine imiyalelo yake, nokuba ninamatele kuye, nokuba nimkonze ngayo yonke intliziyo yenu nangawo wonke umpefumlo wenu." 
Joshua22:6 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wawatamsanqelisa, wawandulula; asuka aya ezintenteni zawo." 
Joshua22:7 Kekaloku esinye isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase u‐Mosesi ebesinikile ilifa e‐Bashane; kodwa esinye isiqingata saso wasinika u‐Yoshuwa pakati kwabazalwana babo, nganeno kwe‐Yoredane ngasentshonalanga. Nabo bona, nxa u‐Yoshuwa wabandululayo ukuya ezintenteni zabo, wandula wabatamsanqelisa;" 
Joshua22:8 wayesitsho kubo ukuti: Buyelani ezintenteni zenu ninendyebo ezininzi, nento eninzi kakulu yenkomo, nesilivere, negolide, nobedu, nesincete, nento eninzi kakulu yezivato: yabelanani nabazalwana benu amaxoba entshaba zenu." 
Joshua22:9 Lwandula ukubuya usapo luka‐Rubene, nosapo luka‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, lwemka kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, e‐Shilo, eselizweni le‐Kanane, ukuya ezweni le‐Gileyadi, ezweni lemfuyo yalo, olwalulizuzile ngelizwi likayehova ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Joshua22:10 Lwati lwakufika emideni yase‐Yoredane, eselizweni le‐Kanane, lwandula usapo Iuka‐Rubene, nosapo luka‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, lwaka kona isibingelo ngase‐Yoredane, isibingelo esikulu ukubonakala kwaso." 
Joshua22:11 Kwaza kwaviwa lusapo luka‐Sirayeli kusitwa: Bona ke, usapo luka‐Rubene, nosapo luka‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, lwakile isibingelo ngapambi kwelizwe le‐Kanane, emideni yase‐Yoredane, ngecala langapesheya losapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua22:12 Lwati usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwakuva oku, yasuka yahlanganisana yonke intlanganiso yosapo luka‐Sirayeli e‐Shilo, ukuba kunyukwe ukuya kulwa nalo." 
Joshua22:13 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwatuma ukuya elusatsheni luka‐Rubene, naselusatsheni luka‐Gadi, nakwisiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, elizweni le‐Gileyadi, u‐Finehasi unyana ka‐Elezari umperisite," 
Joshua22:14 nenkosi ezilishumi kunye naye, inkosi yanye ngezindlu ngezindlu zoyise pakati kwazo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli; zaye ezinye ngezinye ziyintloko yezindlu zoyise zazo pakati kwamawaka akwa‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua22:15 Bati bakufika elusatsheni luka‐Rubene, naselusatsheni luka‐Gadi, nakwisiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, elizweni le‐Gileyadi, baza bateta nalo, besiti:" 
Joshua22:16 Itsho yonke intlanganiso kayehova ukuti: Sisigqito sinina esi, enigqitile ngaso ngakuye utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngokubuya namhla ekumlandeleni uyehova, ekubeni nizakele isibingelo, ukuze nivukele namhla ngakuye uyehova?" 
Joshua22:17 Kuncinane na kuti ukukohlakala kwase‐Pehori, (esingekahlanjululwa kuko nanamhla nje, nakuba bekuko isibulalo pakati kwentlanganiso kayehova,)" 
Joshua22:18 ukuba niya kubuya namhla ekumlandeleni uyehova? kwakuya kuti, nxa nivukela namhla ngakuye uyehova, uya kwandula ngomso aqumbele yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua22:19 Koko ukuba ilizwe lemfuyo yenu linco̔lile, welelani kuti elizweni lemfuyo kayehova, apo imi kona itabanakele kayehova, nize nizuze indawo pakati kwetu: kodwa ningavukeli ngakuye uyehova, ningavukeli nangakuti, ngokuzakela kwenu isibingelo, ngapandle kwesibingelo sikayehova, utixo wetu." 
Joshua22:20 Kanene u‐Hakane, unyana ka‐Zera, akagqitanga na ngesigqito entweni elahlelwe ekutshatyalalisweni, waza umsindo wawela yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli? kanjalo indoda leyo ayabuba yodwa ngenkohlakalo yayo." 
Joshua22:21 Lwaza lwapendula usapo luka‐Rubene, nosapo luka‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, lwateta nabazintloko zamawaka akwa‐Sirayeli, lusiti:" 
Joshua22:22 Utixo wotixo, uyehova, utixo wotixo, uyehova, uyakwazi yena, no‐Sirayeli baya kukwazi nabo; ukuba kungokuvukela, nokuba kungokugqita ngakuye uyehova, (uze ungasindisi namhla nje!)"
