Joshua22:23 ukuba sizakele isibingelo, ukubuya ekulandeleni uyehova; nokuba kungokunga singanikela pezu kwaso idini lokutshiswa nomnikelo wokudla, nokuba kungokunga singenza pezu kwaso imibingo yoxolo; (uyehova yena makabuze!)" 
Joshua22:24 nokuba akungenxa yokuxalela le nto na esikwenzileyo oku, sisiti: Ngexesha elizayo bangatsho abantwana benu kubantwana betu ukuti: Uyinto nina kuni uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli?" 
Joshua22:25 ngokuba uyehova ewubekile umda pakati kwetu nani, i‐Yoredane, nina lusapo luka‐Rubene nosapo luka‐Gadi! akuko kuni isabelwa kuyehova: bade abantwana benu benze abantwana betu bayeke ukwoyika uyehova." 
Joshua22:26 Saye sisiti ngoko: Makesilungise ukuba sake isibingelo, singabi sesedini lokutshiswa, singabi sesombingo kanjalo;" 
Joshua22:27 koko sibe linqi̔na pakati kwetu nani, napakati kwezizukulwana zetu emva kwetu, lokuba singenza inkonzo kayehova pambi kwake, ngamadini okutshiswa etu, nangemibingo yetu, nangeminikelo yoxolo yetu; nokuba bangabi abantwana benu ngexesha elizayo nokuti kubantwana betu: Akuko kuni isabelwa kuyehova." 
Joshua22:28 Kukona sibe sisiti: Kwakuya kuti, nxa baya kutsho kuti nakuzo izizukulwana zetu ngexesha elizayo, siya kwandula siti: Kangelani imfano yesibingelo sikayehova, abayenzayo obawo betu, ingabi yeyedini lokutshiswa, ingabi yeyombingo kanjalo; koko ibe linqi̔na pakati kwetu nani." 
Joshua22:29 Makube lé kuti okokuba sivukele ngakuye uyehova, nokuba sibuye namhla ekumlandeleni uyehova, ngokwaka isibingelo sibe sesedini lokutshiswa, nesomnikelo wokudla, nesombingo, ngapandle kwesibingelo sikayehova, utixo wetu, esipambi kwayo itabanakele yake." 
Joshua22:30 Nxa u‐Finehasi umperisite, nenkosi zentlanganiso, nentloko zamawaka akwa‐Sirayeli, ezibe zinaye, babevile amazwi olwawatetayo usapo luka‐Rubene, nosapo luka‐Gadi, nosapo luka‐Manase, bekulungile emehlweni abo." 
Joshua22:31 Waza u‐Finehasi unyana ka‐Elezari umperisite wati kulo usapo luka‐Rubene, nakulo usapo luka‐Gadi, nakulo usapo luka‐Manase: Namhla siyazi ukuba uyehova upakati kwetu, ngokokuba ningagqitanga ngakuye uyehova ngesigqito esi: ngoku niluhlangule usapo luka‐Sirayeli esandleni sikayehova." 
Joshua22:32 Wandula wabuya u‐Finehasi unyana ka‐Elezari umperisite, nenkosi, elusatsheni luka‐Rubene, naselusatsheni luka‐Gadi, ezweni le‐Gileyadi, ukuya ezweni le‐Kanane, kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, baluzisela impendulo." 
Joshua22:33 Kekaloku impendulo leyo yailungile emehlweni alo usapo luka‐Sirayeli; lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwambonga utixo, lungabanga senakuteta ngokunyukela ngakulo kuliwe, ukuba lucitakalise ilizwe usapo luka‐Rubene nosapo luka‐Gadi lube luhleli kulo." 
Joshua22:34 Lwaza usapo luka‐Rubene nosapo luka‐Gadi lwasibiza isibingelo ngokuti: Linqi̔na pakati kwetu lokuba uyehova unguye utixo. 
Joshua23:1 KWAYE kute, kwakuba ntsuku ninzi emva kwokuba uyehova ebebapumzile o‐Sirayeli kuzo zonke intshaba zabo ezingqongayo, nxa u‐Yoshuwa wabemdala, ekolisile ukuba nemihla;" 
Joshua23:2 wandula u‐Yoshuwa wabiza bonke o‐Sirayeli, abadala babo, nentloko zabo, nabagwebi babo, namagosa abo, wati kubo: Mna, sendimdala, ndikolisile ukuba nemihla;" 
Joshua23:3 nani, nikubonile konke akwenzileyo uyehova, utixo wenu, kuzo zonke ezintlanga ngenxa yenu: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, nguye onilweleyo." 
Joshua23:4 Kangelani, sendinabele ngeqashiso ezintlanga eziseleyo, zibe lilifa ezizweni zenu, kutabata e‐Yoredane, nazo zonke intlanga endizinqamlileyo, kude kube selwandle olukulu ngasekutshoneni kwelanga." 
Joshua23:5 Noyehova, utixo wenu, yena uya kuzisantsulisa ebusweni benu, azigqogqe kwa pambi kwenu; naniya kufuya ilizwe lazo, njengokuba etshilo uyehova, utixo wenu, kuni." 
Joshua23:6 Ize nomelele kakulu, ukuba nikugcine nikwenze konke okuba̔liweyo encwadini yomteto ka‐Mosesi, ukuze ningapambuki kuyo nangasekunene nangasekohlo;" 
Joshua23:7 ukuze ningangeni kwezintlanga, ezi ziseleyo nani: kanjako igama lotixo bazo ningalikankanyi, ningafungisi ngabo, ningabakonzi, ningatobi nokutoba pambi kwabo;" 
Joshua23:8 kodwa namatelani kuyehova, utixo wenu, njengokuba nenzile kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Joshua23:9 Ngokuba uyehova egqogqile pambi kwenu intlanga ezinkulu nezinamandla; kodwa nina, akemanga namnye umntu ebusweni benu kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Joshua23:10 Indoda ibe nye kuni iya kusukela iwaka: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, nguye onilwelayo, njengokuba etshilo kuni." 
Joshua23:11 Zilumkeleni kunene ngoko, ukuba nimtande uyehova, utixo wenu." 
Joshua23:12 Ngokuba nxa nika nibuye, nize ninamatele kwisisalela sezintlanga, ezi ziseleyo nani, nitshatiselane nazo, ningene kuzo, nazo zingene kuni;" 
Joshua23:13 qinisani ukwazi ukuba uyehova, utixo wenu, akasayi kupinda ukuzigqogqa ezintlanga pambi kwenu; kodwa ziya kuba zizisinga nemigibe kuni, nentswazi emacaleni enu, nezihlaba emehlweni enu, nide nibube kwelilizwe lilungileyo, enilipiweyo nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Joshua23:14 Kanjalo bona ke, ndihamba namhla ngendlela yomhlaba wonke; naniya kwazi ngayo yonke intliziyo yenu, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wenu, ukuba akutshitshanga nanye into kuzo zonke izinto ezilungileyo, azitetileyo uyehova, utixo wenu, ngani; zonke zize kubako kuni, akutshitshanga nto kuzo noko inye." 
Joshua23:15 Ngako kuya kuti, njengokuba kuze pezu kwenu zonke izinto ezilungileyo, abeziteta uyehova, utixo wenu, kuni; kwa njalo uyehova uya kuzisa pezu kwenu zonke izinto ezimbi, ade anitshabalalise kwelilizwe lilungileyo, enilipiweyo nguyehova, utixo wenu," 
Joshua23:16 nxa nigqitayo ucebano lukayehova, utixo wenu, aniyaleleyo ngalo, niye nikonze otixo bambi, nitobe pambi kwabo; kanjako yovuta ngakuni ingqumbo kayehova, naniya kububa kamsinyane kwelolizwe lilungileyo enilipiweyo nguye." 
Joshua24:1 WANDULA wahlanganisa u‐Yoshuwa zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, e‐Shekeme, wabiza abadala bo‐Sirayeli, nentloko zabo, nabagwebi babo, namagosa abo; baye bezimisa ebusweni bukatixo." 
Joshua24:2 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wati kubo bonke abantu: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Oyihlo benu babehleli pesheya kwomlambo kudala, u‐Tera, uyise ka‐Abrahame, noyise ka‐Nahore; baye bekonza otixo bambi." 
Joshua24:3 Ndaza ndamtabata uyihlo wenu u‐Abrahame pesheya kwomlambo, ndamhambisa kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Kanane, ndayandisa inzalo yake, ndamnika u‐Yisake." 
Joshua24:4 No‐Yisake ndamnika u‐Yakobi no‐Esau: ndaza ndamnika u‐Esau intaba ye‐Sehire, ukuba ayifuye; kodwa u‐Yakobi nosapo lwake behla baya e‐Jipete." 
Joshua24:5 Ndaza ndatuma u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, ndabeta ama‐Jipete, njengoko bendikwenza pakati kwawo: ndati kamva ndanipumisa kona." 
Joshua24:6 Ndapumisa oyihlo benu e‐Jipete, naza nafika elwandle; ati ama‐Jipete aputuma oyihlo benu ngenqwelo nangabakweli bamahashe, kude kwaselwandle olubomvu." 
Joshua24:7 Bati bakukala kuyehova, wabeka ubumnyama pakati kwenu nama‐Jipete, wazisa ulwandle pezu kwawo, wawaselela; kanjalo amehlo enu abonile oko bendikwenza e‐Jipete: nandula nahlala entlango imihla yamininzi." 
Joshua24:8 Ndaza ndanizisa elizweni laba‐Amori, abebehleli pesheya kwe‐Yoredane; basuka balwa nani; kanti ndabanikela esandleni senu, ukuze nilifuye ilizwe labo; ndada ndabatshabalalisa pambi kwenu." 
Joshua24:9 Wandula wesuka u‐Balaki, unyana ka‐Tsipore, ukumkani wama‐Mowabi, walwa no‐Sirayeli, watuma wabiza u‐Bilame, unyana ka‐Behori, aze aniqalekise." 
Joshua24:10 Kodwa bendingavumi ukupulapula ku‐Bilame; ngako wazingisa ukunitamsanqelisa, ndada ndanihlangula esandleni sake." 
Joshua24:11 Nandula nawela i‐Yoredane, neza kufika e‐Jeriko; basuka abemi base‐Jeriko balwa nani, n aba‐Amori, nama‐Perizi, naba‐Kanane, nama‐Hete, nama‐Giregashe, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi; kanti ndabanikela esandleni senu." 
Joshua24:12 Ndaza ndatuma onomeva pambi kwenu, ababagxotayo ebusweni benu, n okumkani bobabini baba‐Amori; kwakungengesiṙele sako, kwakungengesipeta sako kanjako." 
Joshua24:13 Kwa njalo ke ndinipile ilizwe eningazidiniselanga lona, nezixeko eningazakanga, enihleli kuzo: izitiya zemiti yeveyine nezeminquma eningazityalanga niyatya okwazo." 
Joshua24:14 Ngako kaloku yoyikani uyehova, nimkonze yena ngolungelelano nangenyaniso: kanjalo kwelelisani otixo ababekonza bona oyihlo benu pesheya kwomlambo, nase‐Jipete; nize nimkonze uyehova." 
Joshua24:15 Kodwa ukuba kubi emehlweni enu ukumkonza uyehova, ziqasheleni namhla oyena niya kumkonza; nokuba ngotixo ababekonza bona oyihlo benu, ababepesheya kwomlambo, nokuba ngotixo baba‐Amori, enimiyo elizweni labo: mna kodwa, nendlu yam, siya kumkonza uyehova." 
Joshua24:16 Baza bapendula abantu, bati: Makube lé kuti okokuba simshiye uyehova, ukuya kukonza otixo bambi:" 
Joshua24:17 ngokuba uyehova ngutixo wetu; nguye obesinyusa tina nobawo betu elizweni le‐Jipete, endlwini yobukoboka, nowenzayo emehlweni etu leyo imiqondiso mikulu, wasilondoloza kuyo yonke indlela sibe sihamba ngayo, napakati kwabo bonke abantu sacanda kubo:" 
Joshua24:18 waye uyehova kanjalo wabagxota bonke abantu abo, kwa aba‐Amori, abemi belozwe, pambi kwetu: tina nati siya kumkonza uyehova; ngokuba nguye o ngutixo wetu." 
Joshua24:19 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wati ebantwini: Aningemkonze uyehova; ngokuba e ngutixo oyingcwele yena; u ngutixo onobukwele; akayi kuxolela ukugqita kwenu nezono zenu. 
Joshua24:20 Nxa nimshiya uyehova, niye nibakonze otixo basemzini, uya kwandula aguquke, anenzele okubi, anigqibele, emveni kwokuba unenzele okulungileyo." 
Joshua24:21 Baza abantu bati ku‐Yoshuwa: Hai; sesiya kumkonza uyehova. 
Joshua24:22 Wandula ukuti u‐Yoshuwa ebantwini: Nina ningamanqi̔na ngakuni okuba niziqashele uyehova, ukuze nimkonze. Bati ke: Singamanqi̔na." 
Joshua24:23 Ngako kaloku kwelelisani otixo basemzini abapakati kwenu, nitobele intliziyo yenu ngakuyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua24:24 Baye abantu besiti ku‐Yoshuwa: Uyehova, utixo wetu, siya kumkonza, nelizwi lake siya kuliva." 
Joshua24:25 Wandula u‐Yoshuwa wenza ucebano nabantu kwa ngalomini, wabamisela ummiso nesiko e‐Shekeme." 
Joshua24:26 Waza u‐Yoshuwa wawaba̔la lamazwi encwadini yomteto katixo, watabata ilitye elikulu, walipakamisela kona ngapantsi kweyeke, esendaweni engcwele kayehova." 
Joshua24:27 Wabuya wati u‐Yoshuwa kubo bonke abantu: Bona ke, ilitye eli loba linqi̔na ngakuti; ngokuba livile onke amazwi kayehova abewateta kuti: loba linqi̔na ngakuni ngoko, hleze nimkanyele utixo wenu." 
Joshua24:28 Wada u‐Yoshuwa wabandulula abantu, baye abanye ngabanye emafeni abo." 
Joshua24:29 KWAYE kute emveni kwezizinto, wafa u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, isicaka sikayehova, eyiminyaka elikulu lineshumi ubudala bake." 
Joshua24:30 Baza bamncw̔abela emdeni welifa lake e‐Timnate‐sera, esentabeni yakwa‐Frayime, ngecala lasenode lentaba ye‐Gahashe." 
Joshua24:31 Kekaloku o‐Sirayeli babekonza uyehova yonke imihla ka‐Yoshuwa, nayo yonke imihla yabadala ababesidla ubomi kade emva kwo‐Yoshuwa, nababesazi wonke umsebenzi kayehova, abewenzele o‐Sirayeli." 
Joshua24:32 Kanjalo amatambo ka‐Josefe, olwalute usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenyuka nawo e‐Jipete, bawancw̔abela e‐Shekeme, esiqendwini sentsimi, owabesitengile u‐Yakobi elusatsheni luka‐Hamore, uyise ka‐Shekeme, ngekulu lamaqosha emali: zandula ezondawo zaba lilifa losapo luka‐Josefe." 
Joshua24:33 Wafa no‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Arone; baza bamncw̔aba pezu kwenduli ka‐Finehasi, unyana wake, ebinikiwe kuye entabeni yakwa‐Frayime." 
Judges1:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwokufa kuka‐Yoshuwa, lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabuza kuyehova, lusiti: Ngubanina oya kusinyukela ngakubo aba‐Kanane ngokuqala, ukuya kulwa nabo?" 
Judges1:2 Wayesiti uyehova: u‐Juda uya kunyuka; bona ke, ndinikele ilizwe esandleni sake." 
Judges1:3 Waza u‐Juda wati ku‐Simone umzalwana wake: Nyuka nam ukuya eqashisweni lam, silwe naba‐Kanane, ndandiya kuya nawe eqashisweni lako. Wasuka u‐Simone waya naye." 
Judges1:4 Wenyuka ke u‐Juda; wandula uyehova wanikela aba‐Kanane nama‐Perizi esandleni sabo: babulala kubo e‐Bezeke amadoda angamawaka alishumi. 
Judges1:5 Baza bamfumana u‐Adoni‐bezeke e‐Bezeke, balwa naye; babulala aba‐Kanane nama‐Perizi." 
Judges1:6 Kodwa u‐Adoni‐bezeke wesaba; basuka bamputuma, bambamba, banqumla izitupa zake nobontsi bake." 
Judges1:7 Wandula u‐Adoni‐bezeke wati: Okumkani abamashumi asixe̔nxe, abanqunyuliweyo izitupa zabo nobontsi babo, babebuta imvutuluka pantsi kwetafile yam; njengoko ndikwenzile mna, utixo upindezele kum ngokunjalo. Baza bamzisa e‐Yerusaleme, apo wabuba kona." 
Judges1:8 Kekaloku usapo luka‐Juda lwalwa ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, lwayitimba, lwayibeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, lwasilahlela emlilweni isixeko eso." 
Judges1:9 Nasemva kwoko lwehla usapo luka‐Juda ukuya kulwa naba‐Kanane, ababehleli ezintabeni, nasesuyide, nasezihlanjeni." 
Judges1:10 Wasuka u‐Juda waya ngakubo aba‐Kanane ababehleli e‐Hebrone; (kodwa igama le‐Hebrone beliyi‐Kiriyate‐areba ngapambili;) baza babulala o‐Sheshai, no‐Ahimane, no‐Talemai." 
Judges1:11 Wemka kona waya ngakubo abemi base‐Debire: (kodwa igama le‐Debire ngapambili beliyi‐Kiriyate‐sefere.) 
Judges1:12 Wayesiti u‐Kalebi: Lowo obetayo i‐Kiriyate‐sefere, ayitimbe ke, sendiya kumnika u‐Hakesa, intombi yam, abe ngumfazi." 
Judges1:13 Wasuka u‐Hotineli unyana ka‐Kenazi, umninawe ka‐Kalebi, wayitimba: waza wamnika u‐Hakesa, intombi yake, abe ngumfazi." 
Judges1:14 Kwaye kute, ekuzeni kwake endodeni, wayivusa ukuba icele kuyise intsimi; wandul’ ukuhlika eqwaṙasheni; waza u‐Kalebi wati kuye: Ufuna nto nina?" 
Judges1:15 Wayesiti kuye: Ndipe itamsanqa; ngokuba undipile ilizwe lasesuyide; ndipe Kanjalo imitombo yamanzi. Waza u‐Kalebi wampa imitombo yasentla nemitombo yasezantsi. 
Judges1:16 Kanjako usapo lwom‐Keni, usomfazi ka‐Mosesi, lwenyuka esixekweni semiti yepalime nosapo luka‐Juda ukuya entlango yakwa‐Juda, engasesuyide ye‐Haradi; lwaya lwahlala nabobantu." 
Judges1:17 Wasuka u‐Juda waya no‐Simone umzalwana wake; baza babulala aba‐Kanane ababehleli e‐Tsefate, bayilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni: ngako kwabizwa igama lesixeko eso nge‐Horema." 
Judges1:18 Wandula u‐Juda watimba i‐Gaza nomda wayo, ne‐Ashekelone nomda wayo, ne‐Hekrone nomda wayo." 
Judges1:19 Waye uyehova ebeno‐Juda; waza wagqogqa abemi bentaba; kodwa ebekohlwa ukugqogqa abemi bomhlambo, ngokuba bebenenqwelo zesincete." 
Judges1:20 Baye benika i‐Hebrone ku‐Kalebi, njengokuba u‐Mosesi ebetshilo; waza wagqogqa apo onyana bobatatu baka‐Hanaki." 
Judges1:21 Kodwa ama‐Yebusi, abehleli e‐Yerusaleme, usapo luka‐Benjamine alwawagqogqa; koko ama‐Yebusi ahleli nosapo luka‐Benjamine e‐Yerusaleme kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Judges1:22 Kekaloku indlu ka‐Josefe, benyuka nabo baya ngakuyo i‐Betele: waye uyehova ebenabo." 
Judges1:23 Yatuma indlu ka‐Josefe kuhlolwe i‐Betele: (kodwa igama lesosixeko beliyi‐Luze ngapambili.) 
Judges1:24 Zaza intlola zambona indoda ipuma esixekweni, zati kuyo: Sibonise ke indawo yokungena yesixeko, sasiya kwenza kuwe ububele." 
Judges1:25 Zati, yakubonisa kuzo indawo yokungena yesixeko, zabeta isixeko ngohlangoti lweṙele; kodwa zayindulula indoda leyo nesizalwane sayo sonke." 
Judges1:26 Yahamba londoda yaya ezweni lama‐Hiti, yaka isixeko, yabiza igama laso nge‐Luze; likwa ligama laso kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Judges1:27 Kanjako u‐Manase akagqogqa abemi base‐Bete‐shane namagxamesi ayo, nabase‐Tahanaki namagxamesi ayo, nabemi base‐Doṙe namagxamesi ayo, nabemi base‐Yibelame namagxamesi ayo, nabemi base‐Megido namagxamesi ayo; kodwa aba‐Kanane bebetanda ukuhlala kwelozwe." 
Judges1:28 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni u‐Sirayeli ase womelele, wabenza aba‐Kanane babe ngabanikeli; kodwa akabagqogqa ngokugqibela." 
Judges1:29 Kanjako u‐Frayime akabagqogqa aba‐Kanane abahlala e‐Gezere; kodwa aba‐Kanane bahlala pakati kwabo e‐Gezere. 
Judges1:30 U‐Zebulone akabagqogqa abemi base‐Kitrone, nabemi base‐Nahaloli; kodwa aba‐Kanane bahlala pakati kwabo, baba ngabanikeli." 
Judges1:31 U‐Ashere akabagqogqa abemi base‐Hako, nabemi base‐Tsidone, nabase‐Halabi, nabase‐Kazibe, nabase‐Heleba, nabase‐Afeki, nabase‐Rehobi:" 
Judges1:32 kodwa ama‐Ashere ahlala pakati kwaba‐Kanane, abemi belozwe; ngokuba ebengabagqogqanga." 
Judges1:33 U‐Nefatali akabagqogqa abemi base‐Bete‐shemeshe, nabemi base‐Bete‐hanate; kodwa wahlala pakati kwaba‐Kanane, abemi belozwe: noko abemi base‐Bete‐shemeshe nabase‐Bete‐hanate baba ngabanikeli kubo." 
Judges1:34 Nosapo luka‐Dane aba‐Amori balunyanzelela entabeni: ngokuba bebengaluvumeli ukuba luhlele emhlanjeni; 
Judges1:35 kodwa aba‐Amori bebetanda ukuhlala entabeni ye‐Heresi, e‐Ajalone, nase‐Shahalabime: noko isandla sendlu ka‐Josefe besinzima pezu kwabo, baza baba ngabanikeli." 
Judges1:36 Kekaloku umda waba‐Amori ubuvela eqineni lase‐Hakerabime, nas e‐Sela, waya ngasentla." 
Judges2:1 KWAZA kwenyuka ingelosi kayehova e‐Gilegale, yaya e‐Bokime, yati: Ndininyusile e‐Jipete, ndanizisa ezweni endibe ndifunga ngalo koyihlo benu, ndati: Andiyi kulwapula ucebano lwam nani kude kube ngunapakade;" 
Judges2:2 kanjalo nina aniyi kulwenza ucebano nabemi belilizwe; izibingelo zabo nozicita. Kodwa anipulapulanga ilizwi lam: yinina ukuba nikwenzile oku? 
Judges2:3 Ngako ndibuye ndati: Andiyi kubagxota ebusweni benu; kodwa boba njengameva emacaleni enu, notixo babo boba ngumgibe kuni." 
Judges2:4 Kwaye kute, nxa ingelosi kayehova ibitetile lamazwi kulo lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, bandula abantu bapakamisa ilizwi labo, balila." 
Judges2:5 Baza babiza igama lalondawo nge‐Bokime, babingela kuyehova." 
Judges2:6 KEKALOKU akuba u‐Yoshuwa ebendulule abantu, lwaya usapo luka‐Sirayeli olunye ngolunye elifeni lalo, ukuya kufuya ilizwe." 
Judges2:7 Baza abantu bamkonza uyehova yonke imihla ka‐Yoshuwa, nayo yonke imihla yabadala ababesidla ubomi kade emva kwo‐Yoshuwa, ababebonile wonke umsebenzi omkulu kayehova, abewenzele o‐Sirayeli." 
Judges2:8 Wada wafa u‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Nune, isicaka sikayehova, eyiminyaka ilikulu lineshumi ubudala bake." 
Judges2:9 Baza bamncw̔abela emdeni welifa lake e‐Timnate‐heresi, entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, ngecala lasenode lentaba ye‐Gahashe." 
Judges2:10 Sada sonke esosizukulwana naso sabutelwa kubo oyise baso. Kwaye kuvuka isizukulwana simbi emva kwabo, esibe singamazi uyehova, kwa nomsebenzi abewenzele o‐Sirayeli." 
Judges2:11 Lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, lwakonza o‐Bali:" 
Judges2:12 lwamshiya uyehova, utixo woyise balo, owalupumisa elizweni le‐Jipete, lwalandela otixo bambi, abakubo otixo babantu abalungqongayo, lwazitoba pambi kwabo, lwamqumbisa uyehova." 
Judges2:13 Lwamshiya ke uyehova, lwakonza u‐Bali no‐Hashetorete." 
Judges2:14 Yaza yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakubo o‐Sirayeli, owabanikela esandleni sabatimbi ababatimbayo, wabatengisa esandleni sentshaba zabo ezingqongayo, bada ababi senakuma ebusweni bentshaba zabo." 
Judges2:15 Apo kusukuba bebepumela kona, isandla sikayehova besingakubo bube bububi, njengokuba uyehova ebetshilo, nanjengokuba uyehova ebefungile kubo; bada baxinezeka kakulu." 
Judges2:16 Waza uyehova wavusa abagwebi, ababasindisayo esandleni sabatimbi babo." 
Judges2:17 Kodwa abapulapula abagwebi babo noko, koko baṙexezela emva kwotixo bambi, bazitoba pambi kwabo: bapambuka kamsinya endleleni ababehamba ngayo oyise babo, bepulapula imiyalelo kayehova; kanti abenje njalo bona." 
Judges2:18 Naxeshekweni uyehova wabavuselayo abagwebi, wandula uyehova wanaye umgwebi, wabasindisa esandleni sentshaba zabo yonke imihla yomgwebi: ngokuba uyehova ebenosizi ngako ukutswina kwabo ngenxa yabancinezeli babo nababandezeli babo." 
Judges2:19 Kwaza kwati, akufa umgwebi, babuya bazonakalisa ngapezu kwoyise babo, ngokulandela otixo bambi, ukubakonza, nokuzitoba pambi kwabo; bebengayeki ezabo izenzo neyabo indlela elukuni." 
Judges2:20 Ngako ingqumbo kayehova yavuta ngakubo o‐Sirayeli; wayesiti: Ngokokuba ababantu belugqitile ucebano lwam endabayalela oyise babo ngalo, nokuba bengapulapulanga ilizwi lam;" 
Judges2:21 kwa nam andiyi kwalekela ukugqogqa namnye umntu ebusweni babo, kwezontlanga wabezishiya u‐Yoshuwa nxa wabubayo:" 
Judges2:22 ukuze ndibalinge ngazo o‐Sirayeli, ukuba baya kugcina indlela kayehova ukuhamba ngayo, njengokuba oyise babo bebeyigcina, nokuba abayi kuyigcina kusinina." 
Judges2:23 Ngako uyehova wasalisa intlanga ezi, engazigqogqi kamsinya; wabengazinikelanga esandleni sika‐Yoshuwa kanjako." 
Judges3:1 Zizo ezi intlanga wabezisalisa uyehova, ukuba abalinge ngazo o‐Sirayeli: (kwa bonke ababengazanga zonke imfazwe zase‐Kanane;" 
Judges3:2 kupela ukuze zizazi izizukulwana zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, lufundiswe imfazwe; ngokukodwa olo olube lungazazi ngapambili:)" 
Judges3:3 inkosi ezintlanu zama‐Filistiya, nabo bonke aba‐Kanane, nama‐Tsidone, nama‐Hivi abehleli entabeni ye‐Lebanone, kutabata entabeni ye‐Bali‐heremone kude kwasekungenweni kwe‐Hamati." 
Judges3:4 Zaziko ukuba kulingwe ngazo o‐Sirayeli, ukuze kwaziwe ukuba baya kupulapula imiyalelo kayehova kusinina, leyo abebayalele oyise babo ngayo, ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
Judges3:5 LWAZA usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwahlala pakati kwabo aba‐Kanane, ama‐Hete, naba‐Amori, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi:" 
Judges3:6 lwazizekela intombi zabo zibe ngabafazi, lwazendisa intombi zalo konyana babo, lwakonza otixo babo." 
Judges3:7 Lwaye usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, lwamlibala uyehova, utixo walo, lwabakonza o‐Bali no‐Ashera." 
Judges3:8 Yandula ingqumbo kayehova yavuta ngakubo o‐Sirayeli, wabatengisa esandleni sika‐Kushane‐rishatayime, ukumkani we‐Mesopotami; lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwamkonza u‐Kushane‐rishatayime iminyaka yasibozo." 
Judges3:9 Lwati lwakukala usapo luka‐Sirayeli kuyehova, wandula uyehova wavusela usapo luka‐Sirayeli umsindisi, owalusindisayo, u‐Hotineli unyana ka‐Kenazi, umninawe ka‐Kalebi." 
Judges3:10 Waye umoya kayehova ebepezu kwake, waza wagweba o‐Sirayeli, wapuma ukuya kulwa: wati uyehova wamnikela esandleni sake u‐Kushane‐rishatayime, ukumkani we‐Mesopotami, ukuba isandla sake saba namandla pezu kwo‐Kushane‐rishatayime." 
Judges3:11 Landula ilizwe lapumla iminyaka yamashumi mane. Wada wafa u‐Hotineli, unyana ka‐Kenazi." 
Judges3:12 LWAZA usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwapinda ukwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; ngako uyehova wamomeleza u‐Heglone, ukumkani wama‐Mowabi, ngakubo o‐Sirayeli, ngenxa yokuba benzile okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova." 
Judges3:13 Wasuka wabutela kuye usapo luka‐Hamoni nama‐Amaleki, waya wabeta o‐Sirayeli, basibamba isixeko semiti yepalime." 
Judges3:14 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwamkonza u‐Heglone, ukumkani wama‐Mowabi, iminyaka yalishumi linesibozo." 
Judges3:15 Lwati lwakukala usapo luka‐Sirayeli kuyehova, wandula uyehova waluvusela umsindisi, u‐Ehudi unyana ka‐Gera, um‐Benjamine, indoda elinxele: olwati usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwalituma ngesandla sake ibaso ku‐Heglone, ukumkani wama‐Mowabi." 
Judges3:16 Waye u‐Ehudi wazenzela iṙele elinentlangoti zimbini, eliyikubite inye ubude balo, walibinqa pantsi kwengubo yake esinqeni sake sokunene." 
Judges3:17 Waza walizisa ibaso elo ku‐Heglone, ukumkani wama‐Mowabi: kekaloku u‐Heglone ebengumntu otyebileyo kakulu." 
Judges3:18 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni abegqibile ukunikela ibaso, wapelekelela abantu abebelitwele ibaso." 
Judges3:19 Kodwa yena wabuya endaweni yemifanekiso eqingqiweyo ebingase‐Gilegale, wati: Ndinelizwi elifihlakeleyo ndilixele kuwe, kumkani! owati: Yiti tu! Bada bapuma kuye bonke ababemi ngakuye." 
Judges3:20 Waza u‐Ehudi wangena kuye; waye yena ehleli enkambilini yangapezulu yokupolisa, ebiyeyake yedwa. Wayesiti u‐Ehudi: Ndinelizwi likatixo kuwe! Wesuka ke esihlalweni." 
Judges3:21 Wandula u‐Ehudi wasolula isandla sake sokohlo, watabata iṙele esinqeni sake sokunene, wahlaba ngalo esiswini sake:" 
Judges3:22 saza sangena nesipato emva kwentsimbi; kanjalo inqata lavingcela intsimbi, (ngokuba ebengar̔olanga iṙele esiswini sake,) eyapuma pakati kwemilenze." 
Judges3:23 Wapuma ke u‐Ehudi waya entendelezweni, wavala ingcango zenkambili yangapezulu emva kwake, wazitshixa." 
Judges3:24 Nxa abepumile yena, zeza izicaka zake, zabona ukuba nanzi ingcango zenkambili yangapezulu zitshixiwe; zaye zisiti: Okunene uyagubungela inyawo zake enkambilini yokupolisa." 
Judges3:25 Zaza zalinda zada zadana; kekaloku bona ke, akavula ingcango zenkambili yangapezulu; ngako zatabata isitshixo, zavula ke: kekaloku nantsi inkosi yazo ilele emhlabeni ifile." 
Judges3:26 Waye u‐Ehudi wasinda, nxa zisazilazila; wayedlula endaweni yemifanekiso eqingqiweyo, wasindela e‐Sehira." 
Judges3:27 Kwaye kute, akufika, wavutela ngexilongo entabeni yakwa‐Frayime; lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwehla naye entabeni, esiya yena pambi kwalo." 
Judges3:28 Wayesiti kulo: Landelani emva kwam; ngokuba uyehova enikele intshaba zenu, ama‐Mowabi, esandleni senu. Lwasuka lwehla emva kwake, lwabamba amazibuko ase‐Yoredane ngase‐Mowabi, lungavumeli mntu awele." 
Judges3:29 Lwaye lubulala ama‐Mowabi ngeloxesha ngati angamawaka alishumi amadoda, onke omelele, onke engamaṙoti kanjalo; akasinda ke namnye umntu." 
Judges3:30 Kwa njalo ama‐Mowabi atotyiswa ngalomini pantsi kwesandla so‐Sirayeli. Laza ilizwe lapumla iminyaka yamashumi asibozo. 
Judges3:31 Nasemva kwake wabeko u‐Shamgare, unyana ka‐Hanate, owabulala ama‐Filistiya, amakulu matandatu amadoda, ngentonga yenkabi: kwa njalo naye wasindisa o‐Sirayeli." 
Judges4:1 LWAPINDA usapo luka‐Sirayeli ukwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, xeshekweni u‐Ehudi abefile." 
Judges4:2 Waza uyehova walutengisa esandleni sika‐Yabine, ukumkani wase‐Kanane, obepete ubukumkani e‐Hatsore; onkosi yempi yake ibingu‐Sisera, owahlala e‐Haroshete yabaheyideni." 
Judges4:3 Lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwakala kuyehova: ngokuba ebenenqwelo zesincete ezingamakulu alitoba; kanjako waluncinezela usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngamandla iminyaka yamashumi mabini. 
Judges4:4 Kekaloku u‐Debora, umprofitekazi, umfazi ka‐Lapidote, yena wagweba o‐Sirayeli ngeloxesha." 
Judges4:5 Wayehleli ngapantsi kwomti wepalime ka‐Debora, pakati kwe‐Rama ne‐Betele, entabeni yakwa‐Frayime: lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenyukela kuye ekugwebeni." 
Judges4:6 Watuma ke wambiza u‐Baraki, unyana ka‐Abinowami wase‐Kedeshe‐nefatali, wati kuye: Uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, akayalelanga na, esiti: Hamba usinge entabeni ye‐Tabore, utabate nawe amadoda angamawaka alishumi elusatsheni luka‐Nefatali naselusatsheni luka‐Zebulone." 
Judges4:7 Ndaye ndiya kumr̔olela kuwe emlanjeni we‐Kishone u‐Sisera, inkosi yempi ka‐Yabine, nenqwelo zake, nesihlwele sake, ndimnikele esandleni sako." 
Judges4:8 Waza u‐Baraki wati kuye: Ukuba uya kuhamba nam, ndose ndihamba; kodwa ukuba akuyi kuhamba nam, andiyi kuhamba." 
Judges4:9 Wayesiti: Ndiya kuhamba nawe ngenyaniso; kodwa noko ubungewalisa abuyi kuba bobako endleleni uhamba ngayo; ngokuba uyehova eya kumtengisa u‐Sisera esandleni somfazi. Wesuka u‐Debora, waya no‐Baraki e‐Kedeshe." 
Judges4:10 Wandula u‐Baraki wabiza o‐Zebulone no‐Nefatali beze e‐Kedeshe; wenyuka ke enamadoda angamawaka alishumi ezinyaweni zake; waye u‐Debora enyuka naye. 
Judges4:11 Kekaloku u‐Kebere, um‐Keni, owosapo luka‐Hobabe, usomfazi ka‐Mosesi, ebahlukene nama‐Keni, wada wamisa intente yake ngaseyekeni e‐Tsahananime engase‐Kedeshe." 
Judges4:12 Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Sisera ukuba u‐Baraki, unyana ka‐Abinowami, unyukile intaba ye‐Tabore." 
Judges4:13 Wandula u‐Sisera wabizela ndawonye zonke inqwelo zake, inqwelo zesincete ezingamakulu alitoba, nabo bonke abantu abanaye, bevela e‐Haroshete yabaheyideni, ngasemlanjeni we‐Kishone." 
Judges4:14 Waza u‐Debora wati ku‐Baraki: Suka, ngokuba yiyo le imini uyehova unikele ngayo u‐Sisera esandleni sako: uyehova akapumanga pambi kwako na? Wasuka u‐Baraki wehla entabeni ye‐Tabore, namadoda angamawaka alishumi emva kwake." 
Judges4:15 Waye uyehova wapitizelisa u‐Sisera nazo zonke inqwelo zake, nomkosi wonke, ngohlangoti lweṙele, pambi kwo‐Baraki; wada u‐Sisera wehla enqwelweni yake, wesaba ngenyawo zake." 
Judges4:16 Kodwa u‐Baraki wasukela inqwelo, nomkosi, kwada kwakuyo e‐Haroshete yabaheyideni: wati wonke umkosi ka‐Sisera wawa ngohlangoti lweṙele; akwasala mntu kwa namnye." 
Judges4:17 Kekaloku u‐Sisera wesaba ngenyawo zake waya ententeni ka‐Yayeli, umfazi ka‐Kebere um‐Keni: ngokuba beluko uxolo pakati kwo‐Yabine, ukumkani we‐Hatsore, nendlu ka‐Kebere um‐Keni." 
Judges4:18 Wapuma u‐Yayeli ukuya kumkaulela u‐Sisera, wati kuye: Pambukela, nkosi yam! pambukela kum; ungoyiki. Waza wapambukela kuye ententeni, owamgubungela ngengubo." 
Judges4:19 Wayesiti kuye: Kaundiseze intwana yamanzi, ngokuba ndinxaniwe. Waza wavula intsuba yobisi, wamseza, wamgubungela." 
Judges4:20 Wati kanjalo kuye: Yima emnyango wentente; kwakuya kuti, nxa ezayo umntu, abuze kuwe, ati: Kuko apa umntu na? woti: Akuko mntu." 
Judges4:21 Wandula u‐Yayeli, umfazi ka‐Kebere, watabata isikonkwane sentente, wapata isando esandleni sake, waya kuye kakuhle, wabetela isikonkwane entlafunweni yake, sada sangena emhlabeni: ngokuba yena wawelwa bubutongo, wacubuka. Wafa njalo ke." 
Judges4:22 Bona ke, xeshekweni u‐Baraki ebeputuma u‐Sisera, wapuma u‐Yayeli ukuya kumkaulela, wati kuye: Yiza, ndiya kubonisa lomntu omfunayo. Kekaloku akungena kuye, nanku u‐Sisera elele efile, nesikonkwane sisentlafunweni yake." 
Judges4:23 Kwa njalo utixo wamtobisa ngalomini u‐Yabine, ukumkani wase‐Kanane, pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Judges4:24 Saza isandla sosapo luka‐Sirayeli samana ukwanda ukuba nzima pezu kwo‐Yabine, ukumkani wase‐Kanane, lwada lwamcita u‐Yabine, ukumkani wase‐Kanane." 
Judges5:1 WANDULA wavuma u‐Debora, no‐Baraki unyana ka‐Abinowami, ngalomini, ngokuti:" 
Judges5:2 Ngenxa yokukokela kwabakokeli kwa‐Sirayeli, ngenxa yokuzinikela kwabantu ngokutumekelela, bongani uyehova!" 
Judges5:3 Yivani, nina bokumkani, nikani indlebe, nina zinkosi! mna, kuyehova ndovuma mna; ndiya kucula kuyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Judges5:4 Yehova! ekupumeni kwako e‐Sehire, ekusukeni kwako ezweni le‐Edome, umhlaba wangcangcazela, nezulu latontsela, amafu nawo atontsela amanzi." 
Judges5:5 Intaba zazamazama ebusweni bukayehova, le‐Sinai ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Judges5:6 Emihleni ka‐Shamgare unyana ka‐Hanate, emihleni ka‐Yayeli, zapumla indlela; bati abahambi baya ngendlela ezigoso." 
Judges5:7 Bapela abapati kwa‐Sirayeli, bapela; ndada ndavuka mna Debora, ndada ndavuka ndingunina kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Judges5:8 Kwanyulwa otixo abatsha; kwandula kwabako imfazwe emasangweni: kanene bekubonwa ikaka na nomkonto pakati kwamawaka angamashumi mane kwa‐Sirayeli? 
Judges5:9 Intliziyo yam ikubo abongama bakwa‐Sirayeli, abazinikelayo ngokutumekelela pakati kwabantu. Bongani uyehova!" 
Judges5:10 Nina bakweleyo pezu kwamaqwaṙashekazi amhlope, nina bahlalayo ematyaleni, nani bahambayo endleleni, yumani!" 
Judges5:11 ngenxa yelizwi labawabayo amaxoba pakati kwendawo zokukelela; kwa lapo baya kudumisa izenzo ezilungileyo zikayehova, izenzo ezilungileyo zokupata kwake kwa‐Sirayeli: baya kwandula ukuhla abantu bakayehova baye emasangweni." 
Judges5:12 Vuka, vuka, Debora! vuka, vuka, utete ingoma: suka, Baraki! timba amatinjwa ako, nyana ka‐Abinowami!" 
Judges5:13 Kwandula kwehla abaseleyo pakati kwemiduna; abantu bakayehova behlela kum ngakuwo amagoṙa: 
Judges5:14 kwa‐Frayime, abakuhlala kusema‐Amalekini; emva kwako, u‐Benjamine pakati kwabantu bako; kwa‐Makire behla abongama, nakwa‐Zebulone abapete intonga yomba̔li." 
Judges5:15 Inkosi zakwa‐Yisakare nazo bezino‐Debora; na nje ngo‐Yisakare, wanjalo u‐Baraki; watunywa emhlanjeni ezinyaweni zake. Pakati kwemijelo yakwa‐Rubene bekuko amaqinga entliziyo amakulu." 
Judges5:16 Yinina ukuba ubuhleli pakati kwezibaya, ukuva ukulila kwemihlambi? Pakati kwemijelo yakwa‐Rubene bekuko izifuniselo zentliziyo ezikulu." 
Judges5:17 U‐Gileyadi wema pesheya kwe‐Yoredane: no‐Dane, yinina ukuba wahlala ngasezinqanaweni? U‐Ashere ebehleli elunxwemeni lwolwandle, wahlala ngasemacwebeni ake." 
Judges5:18 U‐Zebulone, abantu abo balahlela ekufeni ubomi babo, kwa no‐Nefatali, pezu kwendawo ezinde zelizwe." 
Judges5:19 Kweza okumkani, balwa; bandula balwa okumkani base‐Kanane e‐Tahanaki ngasemanzini ase‐Megido: inzuzo yemali abayitabatanga." 
Judges5:20 Kwaliwa kwa sezulwini; inkwenkwezi ezindleleni zazo zalwa no‐Sisera. 
Judges5:21 Umlambo we‐Kishone wabakukulisa, umlambo omdala, umlambo we‐Kishone. Mpefumlo wam! unyatele amandla." 
Judges5:22 Zandula impupu zamahashe zabeta, ngokuti bukuqu, ngokuti bukuqu kwamaṙoti abo." 
Judges5:23 Qalekisani i‐Meroze, yatsho ingelosi kayehova, qalekisani kakulu abemi bayo; ngokuba bengezanga ukumnceda uyehova, ukumnceda uyehova ngakuwo amagoṙa." 
Judges5:24 Makatanyusanqelwe ngapezu kwabafazi u‐Yayeli, umfazi ka‐Kebere um‐Keni; makatanyusanqelwe ngapezu kwabafazi ententeni." 
Judges5:25 Wacela amanzi, wanika ubisi; endebeni yenkosi wasondeza amasi." 
Judges5:26 Isandla sake wasolulela kwisikonkwane, nesokunene sake kwisando sabasebenzi; wambeta u‐Sisera, watyumza intloko yake, wahlaba wabadluza intlafuno yake." 
Judges5:27 Pakati kwenyawo zake watoba, wawa, walala pantsi; pakati kwenyawo zake watoba, wawa; apo watobayo, kwa kona wawa ebulewe." 
Judges5:28 Unina ka‐Sisera wakangela ngefenstile, wamemeza ngesituba, wati: Kunganina ukuba inqwelo yake iyalibala ukuza? kunganina ukuba amanyatela enqwelo zake ayazilazila?" 
Judges5:29 Inkosikazi zake ezilumkileyo zapendula, ewe, wazipendulela ngokwake, ukuti:" 
Judges5:30 Abafumananga na? abawabelanga na amaxoba? intombi, intombi mbini kwindoda ngendoda; amaxoba engubo ezinamabala ngamabala kuye u‐Sisera, amaxoba engubo ezinamabala ngamabala zitungiwe, ingubo ezinamabala ngamabala zitungiwe amacala omabini, ezifanele intamo zabatimbi?" 
Judges5:31 Makube njalo ukutshatyalaliswa kwazo zonke intshaba zako, Yehova! kodwa abo bamtandayo, mababe njengokupuma kwelanga emandleni alo. Laza ilizwe lapumla iminyaka yamashumi mane." 
Judges6:1 KEKALOKU usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; waza uyehova walunikela esandleni sama‐Midiyane iminyaka yasixe̔nxe. 
Judges6:2 Sati isandla sama‐Midiyane sanamandla pezu kwo‐Sirayeli: bekungenxa yama‐Midiyane usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwazenzela amaṙoba asezintabeni, nemiqolomba, nenqaba." 
Judges6:3 Kwaye kute, nxa bahlwayeleyo o‐Sirayeli, andula enyuka ama‐Midiyane, nama‐Amaleki, namadoda asempumalanga enyuka nawo ngakubo;" 
Judges6:4 aza abaṙaula, akwonakalisa ukuhluma kwomhlaba, kude kwaziwa e‐Gaza; akasalisa ke impiliso kwa‐Sirayeli, negusha, nenkabi, neqwaṙashe." 
Judges6:5 Ngokuba ebenyuka nenkomo zawo nentente zawo, eza njengenkumbi ngobuninzi, kwada akwabi nakubalwa wona nenkamela zawo; eza elizweni ukulonakalisa." 
Judges6:6 Kwa njalo o‐Sirayeli bahlwentshuziswa kakulu ngenxa yama‐Midiyane. Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwakala kuyehova. 
Judges6:7 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwakala kuyehova ngenxa yama‐Midiyane," 
Judges6:8 wandula uyehova watuma umprofite kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, owati kulo: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Mna ndininyusile e‐Jipete, ndinikupile endlwini yobukoboka;" 
Judges6:9 ndanihlangula esandleni sama‐Jipete, nasesandleni sabo bonke ababandezeli benu, ndabagxota ebusweni benu, ndaninika ilizwe labo:" 
Judges6:10 ndaza ndati kuni: Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu; ningoyiki otixo baba‐Amori, enihleli elizweni labo. Kodwa anipulapulanga ilizwi lam." 
Judges6:11 Kwaye kusiza ingelosi kayehova, yahlala ngapantsi kwomkoba ose‐Hofera, oka‐Yohashe, um‐Abihezere; waye u‐Gideyone unyana wake ebula inqolowa ngasesincinezelweni seveyine, ukuba ayizimeze kuma‐Midiyane." 
Judges6:12 Yaza ingelosi kayehova yabonakala kuye, yati kuye: Uyehova unawe, wena goṙa elinobuṙoti!" 
Judges6:13 Waza u‐Gideyone wati kuyo: Ke, nkosi yam! ukuba uyehova unati, kunganina ukuba konke oku kusihlile? kanjako ipina yonke imimangaliso yake esiyibaliselwe ngobawo betu, besiti: Uyehova akesinyusanga na e‐Jipete? kodwa ngoku uyehova usilahlile, usinikele esandleni sama‐Midiyane." 
Judges6:14 Wandula uyehova wabeka kuye, wati: Hamba ngalamandla ako, wauya kusindisa o‐Sirayeli esandleni sama‐Midiyane: andikutumanga na?" 
Judges6:15 Waza wati kuye: Ke, Nkosi! ndiya kusindisa o‐Sirayeli nganto nina? bona ke, iwaka lam lelibuhlwempu kwa‐Manase, nam ndingomncinane endlwini kabawo." 
Judges6:16 Wayesiti uyehova kuye: Ngenyaniso ndoba nawe; wauya kubeta ama‐Midiyane njengomntu mnye. 
Judges6:17 Waza wati kuye: Ukuba kaloku ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, uz’ undenzele umqondiso wokuba unguwe oteta nam." 
Judges6:18 Ungemki ke apa, ndide ndize kuwe, ndikupe umnikelo wam, ndiwubeke pantsi pambi kwako. Wayesiti: Ndiya kuhlala ude ubuye." 
Judges6:19 Wasuka u‐Gideyone wangena, walungisa itakane lebokwe, nezonkana ezingenagwele zeyefa yomgubo: inyama wayibeka esityeni, nomhluzi wawubeka embizeni, wakupela kuye ngapantsi kwomkoba, wasondeza." 
Judges6:20 Yaza ingelosi kayehova yati kuye: Tabata lenyama nezonkana ezingenagwele, uzibeke pantsi elulwalweni olu, nomhluzi uwutulule. Wenje njalo ke." 
Judges6:21 Yandula ingelosi kayehova yolula incam yentonga ebisesandleni sayo, yacukumisa inyama nezonkana ezingenagwele; kwaza kwenyuka umlilo elulwalweni, owadla inyama nezonkana ezingenagwele. Yandula ingelosi kayehova yemka emehlweni ake." 
Judges6:22 Kekaloku nxa u‐Gideyone abebona ukuba iyingelosi kayehova, waza u‐Gideyone wati: Au, Nkosi, Yehova! ngokokuba ndibonile ingelosi kayehova ubuso ngakubo ubuso." 
Judges6:23 Koko uyehova wati kuye: Uxolo malube kuwe; ungoyiki; akuyi kufa. 
Judges6:24 Wandula u‐Gideyone wakela kona isibingelo kuyehova, wasibiza ngokuti yi‐Yehova‐shalome: siseko nanamhla e‐Hofera yama‐Abihezere." 
Judges6:25 Kwabekute kwa ngobobusuku, waye uyehova esiti kuye: Tabata inkatyana, eyekayihlo, kwa inkatyana yesibini, eminyaka isixe̔nxe, usicite isibingelo sika‐Bali, eso uyihlo anaso, uyigaule i‐Ashera engakuso:" 
Judges6:26 uze usake isibingelo kuyehova, utixo wako, pezu kwengcopo yalenqaba, ngokucwangcisa; uze utabate inkatyana yesibini, unikele idini lokutshiswa ngenkuni ze‐Ashera oya kuyigaula." 
Judges6:27 Wandula u‐Gideyone watabata amadoda alishumi ezicakeni zake, wenza njengokuba uyehova ebetshilo kuye: kodwa bekute, ngokokuba ebesoyika indlu yoyise namadoda esosixeko, ukuba wakohlwa ukwenza oku emini, ngako wakwenza ebusuku." 
Judges6:28 Kekaloku akuvuka amadoda esosixeko kusasa, nasi ke isibingelo sika‐Bali sicitiwe, ne‐Ashera ebingakuso igauliwe, nenkatyana yesibini inikelwe pezu kwesibingelo esibe sakiwe." 
Judges6:29 Aza ati enye kwenye: Ngubanina owenze lento? Naxeshekweni abuza afuna nokufuna, kwatiwa: Ngu‐Gideyone, unyana ka‐Yohashe, owenze lento." 
Judges6:30 Asuka amadoda esosixeko ati ku‐Yohashe: Kupa unyana wako, ukuba afe; ngokuba ewisile isibingelo sika‐Bali, nangokuba egaulile i‐Ashera ebingakuso." 
Judges6:31 Waza u‐Yohashe wati kubo bonke ababemi ngakuye: Niya kupikela u‐Bali na? niya kusindisa yena na? Lowa oya kumpikela, makafiswe engekasi: ukuba unguye utixo, makazipikele ngokwake, ngenxa yokuba kuwisiwe isibingelo sake." 
Judges6:32 Ngako wabizwa ngalomini ngo‐Yerubebali, kusitwa: u‐Bali makapike naye, ngenxa yokuba ewisile isibingelo sake." 
Judges6:33 Kekaloku onke ama‐Midiyane, nama‐Amaleki, namadoda asempumalanga, abebutelwe ndawonye, awela, aya ati waca emhlanjeni we‐Yezerele." 
Judges6:34 Wandula umoya kayehova wangena ku‐Gideyone, owavutela ngexilongo; aza ama‐Abihezere ahlanganisana emva kwake." 
Judges6:35 Kanjalo watuma izigidimi pakati kwawo onke ama‐Manase; aza nawo ahlanganisana emva kwake: watuma nezigidimi pakati kwama‐Ashere, napakati kwama‐Zebulone, napakati kwama‐Nefatali; abenyuka ukuya kuhlangana nawo." 
Judges6:36 Waza u‐Gideyone wati kutixo: Ukuba uya kusindisa o‐Sirayeli ngesandla sam, njengokuba utshilo," 
Judges6:37 bona ke, ndiya kubeka uboya obucetyiweyo esibayeni sokubula: ukuba kuya kubako umbete pezu kwoboya bodwa, nokwoma pezu kwomhlaba wonke, sendiya kukwazi ukuba uya kusindisa o‐Sirayeli ngesandla sam, njengokuba utshilo." 
Judges6:38 Kwaye kunjalo ke: ngokuba wavuka kusasa ngomnye umhla, wakamanga uboya, wafoca umbete eboyeni, indebe izele ngamanzi." 
Judges6:39 Waza u‐Gideyone wati kutixo: Makungavuti ingqumbo yako ngakum, ndandiya kuteta kube kaloku kodwa: mandilinge ke ngoboya kube kaloku kupela; makubeko ukwoma eboyeni bodwa ke, napezu kwomhlaba wonke makubeko umbete." 
Judges6:40 Waye utixo wenje njalo ngobobusuku: ngokuba bekuko ukwoma eboyeni bodwa, napezu kwomhlaba wonke bekuko umbete." 
Judges7:1 WAZA wavuka kusasa u‐Yerubebali, ongu‐Gideyone, nabo bonke abantu abanaye; baya bati waca ngasemtonjeni we‐Harodi: waye umkosi wama‐Midiyane ubungecala labo lasenode, ngasendulini ka‐More, emhlanjeni." 
Judges7:2 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Gideyone: Baninzi abantu abanawe ukuba ndinikele ama‐Midiyane esandleni sabo, hlezibe u‐Sirayeli aqayise ngakum, esiti: Isandla sam sindisindisile!" 
Judges7:3 Ngako kaloku danduluka ke ezindlebeni zabantu, ngokuti: Osukuba esoyika engcangcazela, makabuye, emke entabeni ye‐Gileyadi. Kwaza kwabuya kubo abantu amawaka angamashumi mabini anamabini; ada asala amawaka alishumi." 
Judges7:4 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Gideyone: Abantu basebaninzi; bahlisele ngasemanzini, ndokulingela bona apo: kwakuya kuti, lowo endiya kutsho ngaye kuwe: Lo uya kuhamba nawe, yena wohamba nawe; nosukuba ndiya kutsho ngaye kuwe: Lo akayi kuhamba nawe, yena akayi kuhamba." 
Judges7:5 Wandula wahlisela abantu ngasemanzini. Waza uyehova wati ku‐Gideyone: Bonke abaxapa amanzi ngolwimi lwabo, njengokuba ixapa inja, ubabeke bodwa; kwa nabo bonke abaguqa ngamadolo abo ukuba kuselwe." 
Judges7:6 Laye inani labo baxapayo ngokubeka isandla sabo emlonyeni wabo belingamadoda angamakulu matatu: kodwa bonke abanye abantu baguqa ngamadolo abo ukuba basele amanzi. 
Judges7:7 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Gideyone: Ngalamakulu matatu amadoda abexapa ndiya kunisindisa, ndinikele ama‐Midiyane esandleni sako; nabo bonke abanye abantu mabahambe baye abanye ngabanye ezindaweni zabo." 
Judges7:8 Basuka abantu bapata umpako esandleni sabo, namaxilongo abo; kanti amanye amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli wawatuma aye amanye ngamanye ezintenteni zawo, wabambelela kuwo lomadoda amakulu matatu. Waye umkosi wama‐Midiyane ubusezantsi kwake emhlanjeni." 
Judges7:9 Kwaye kute pakati kwobusuku obo, wati uyehova kuye: Suka, yihla uye kuwo umkosi; ngokuba ndiwunikele esandleni sako." 
Judges7:10 Kodwa ukuba uyoyika ukuhla, yihla wena, no‐Fura isicaka sako, uye emnqubeni:" 
Judges7:11 wauya kuva oko kutetwayo; nakamva isandla sako siya kwomelezwa, ukuba uhle uye kuwo umkosi. Waza wehla yena, no‐Fura isicaka sake, waya encameni yabaxo̔bileyo ababesemnqubeni." 
Judges7:12 Kekaloku ama‐Midiyane, nama‐Amaleki, nawo onke amadoda asempumalanga, ebelele pantsi emhlanjeni njengenkumbi ngobuninzi; kanjalo inkamela zawo bezingenakubalwa, zinjengentlabati eselunxwemeni lwolwandle ukuba zininzi." 
Judges7:13 Wati akufika u‐Gideyone, nantsi indoda ibalisa ipupa kumlingane wayo, eyati: Bona ke, ndipupile ipupa, kekaloku bona ke, isimba lesonka seṙalasi laziqengqela emnqubeni wama‐Midiyane, latikelela ententeni, layibeta ukuba yawa, layipetula kanye, yada yalala pantsi intente leyo." 
Judges7:14 Waza umlingane wayo wapendula wati: Akuko nto oku kupela liṙele lika‐Gideyone, unyana ka‐Yohashe, indoda yakwa‐Sirayeli: utixo unikele esandleni sake ama‐Midiyane, nomkosi wonke." 
Judges7:15 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni u‐Gideyone ebevile ukubaliswa kwepupa elo nokutyilwa kwalo, wandul’ ukubedesha; wasuka wabuyela emkosini wama‐Sirayeli, wati: Sukani; ngokuba uyehova enikele umkosi wama‐Midiyane esandleni senu." 
Judges7:16 Waza wahlula lomadoda amakulu matatu abe ngamaqela amatatu, wanika amaxilongo ezandleni zawo onke, nemipanda ezé, nezibane pakati kwemipanda." 
Judges7:17 Wayesiti kuwo: Kangelani kum, nize nenje njalo: kekaloku bona ke, ndakufika encameni yomnquba, njengokuba ndisenza mna, niya kwenje njalo nina." 
Judges7:18 Nxa ndivutelayo ngexilongo, nabo bonke abanam, nandule nivutele ngamaxilongo nani ngento engqongayo wonke umnquba, niti: Ṙele likayehova nelika‐Gideyone!" 
Judges7:19 Wada wafika u‐Gideyone, nekulu lamadoda elinaye, encameni yomnquba, ekuqaleni kwelipakati ivaṙasho lobusuku, cebetshu kumisiwe abalindi: bandula bavutela ngamaxilongo, baqekeza imipanda ebisezandleni zabo." 
Judges7:20 Aza amaqela omatatu avutela ngamaxilongo, aqekeza imipanda, abamba izibane ngezandla zawo zokohlo, namaxilongo ngezandla zawo zokunene, kuze kuvutelwe ngawo; adanduluka, esiti: Ṙele likayehova nelika‐Gideyone!" 
Judges7:21 Bema ke bonke ngabanye ezindaweni zabo, bengqonga umnquba. Wada wonke umkosi wabaleka, wakala, wesaba." 
Judges7:22 Kekaloku akuvutela lomadoda amakulu matatu ngamaxilongo, wandula uyehova wabeka iṙele lomnye ngakuye omnye, pakati kwomnquba wonke; waza umkosi wesabela kude kwase‐Bete‐shita ngase‐Tserera, na kude kwasemdeni we‐Abele‐mehola ngase‐Tabate." 
Judges7:23 Kwaza kwabizelwa ndawonye amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, awakwa‐Nefatali, nawakwa‐Ashere, nawo onke awakwa‐Manase, asukela ama‐Midiyane." 
Judges7:24 Kanjalo u‐Gideyone watuma izigidimi kuyo yonke intaba yakwa‐Frayime, ukuti: Yihlani ngakuwo ama‐Midiyane, niwapangele ukubamba amanzi kude kube se‐Betebara, ne‐Yoredane. Andula onke amadoda akwa‐Frayime abizelwa ndawonye, abamba amanzi kude kwase‐Betebara, ne‐Yoredane." 
Judges7:25 Abamba nenkosi ezimbini zama‐Midiyane, u‐Worebe no‐Zibe; abulala u‐Worebe eweni lika‐Worebe, no‐Zibe ambulala esincinezelweni seveyine sika‐Zibe, awasukela ama‐Midiyane; aza azisa intloko ka‐Worebe neka‐Zibe ku‐Gideyone pesheya kwe‐Yoredane." 
Judges8:1 Asuka amadoda akwa‐Frayime ati kuye: Yinto nina le uyenzileyo kuti, ungasibizanga nje oko wabusiya ukulwa nama‐Midiyane? Aza apika naye ngamandla." 
Judges8:2 Kodwa wati kuwo: Yinto nina endiyenzileyo kaloku, njengani? Imbikico zama‐Frayime azilungile na pezu kwesivuno sama‐Abihe‐zere?" 
Judges8:3 Kwezenu izandla utixo unikele inkosi zama‐Midiyane, u‐Worebe no‐Zibe: yinto nina ke endibe ndingayenzayo njengani? Wandula umsindo wawo wamdambela, akuba etetile elozwi." 
Judges8:4 Kekaloku u‐Gideyone weza e‐Yoredane, wawela, yena nalomadoda amakulu matatu abenaye, ediniwe, eputuma noko" 
Judges8:5 Waza wati kubo abantu base‐Sukote: Nikani ke amasimba esonka kubo abantu abandilandelayo, ngokuba bediniwe; kanjalo ndiyaputuma u‐Zeba no‐Tsalemuna, okumkani bama‐Midiyane." 
Judges8:6 Kodwa inkosi zase‐Sukote zati: Isandla sika‐Zeba nesika‐Tsalemuna sezisesandleni sako na, ukuba sinike impi yako isonka?" 
Judges8:7 Waza u‐Gideyone wati: Ngako oko, akuba uyehova enikele u‐Zeba no‐Tsalemuna esandleni sam, ndiya kwandula ndibule inyama yenu kunye nameva asentlango namazinyo esincete." 
Judges8:8 Wenyuka kona waya e‐Penuweli, wateta kubo ngokunjalo; kodwa abantu base‐Penuweli bampendula njengokupendula kwabantu base‐Sukote." 
Judges8:9 Wateta nakubo abantu base‐Penuweli, esiti: Nxa ndibuya ngoxolo, ndiya kucita lenqaba." 
Judges8:10 Kekaloku u‐Zeba no‐Tsalemuna bebese‐Karekore, nemikosi yabo kunye nabo, ngati angamawaka alishumi elinamahlanu amadoda, onke abesele kuwo wonke umkosi wamadoda asempumalanga: ngokuba bekuwile amadoda angamawaka alikulu elinamashumi mabini aber̔ola iṙele." 
Judges8:11 Waza u‐Gideyone wenyuka ngendlela yabahlala ezintenteni, ngecala lasempumalanga le‐Nobaki ne‐Yogebeba, wabeta umkosi; ngokuba umkosi ubusekunqabeni." 
Judges8:12 Basuka besaba u‐Zeba no‐Tsalemuna; kodwa wabaputuma, wabamba okumkani bobabini bama‐Midiyane, u‐Zeba no‐Tsalemuna, nawo wonke umkosi wawutusa." 
Judges8:13 Wati akubuya u‐Gideyone, unyana ka‐Yohashe, ekulweni, lingekapumi ilanga," 
Judges8:14 wabamba indodana yakubo abantu base‐Sukote, wayibuza: eyambalisela inkosi zase‐Sukote, nabadala bayo, amadoda angamashumi asixe̔nxe anesixe̔nxe." 
Judges8:15 Wandula weza kubo abantu base‐Sukote, wati: Naba u‐Zeba no‐Tsalemuna, enibe nindigxeka ngabo, nisiti: Isandla sika‐Zeba nesika‐Tsalemuna sezisesandleni sako na, ukuba sinike amadoda ako adiniweyo isonka?" 
Judges8:16 Waza watabata abadala besixeko, nameva asentlango, namazinyo esincete, wabazisa ngawo abantu base‐Sukote." 
Judges8:17 Nenqaba yase‐Penuweli wayicita, nabantu besixeko wababulala." 
Judges8:18 Wandula wati ku‐Zeba no‐Tsalemuna: Ebenjanina amadoda enawabulalayo e‐Tabore? Baza bati: Njengokuba unjalo wena, ebenjalo wona, amanye ngamanye efana nonyana bokumkani." 
Judges8:19 Wayesiti: Ebengabazalwana bam, onyana bakama̔: njengokuba uyehova ehleli, ukuba benilondolozile bona behleli, ngandingabulali nina." 
Judges8:20 Waza wati ku‐Yetere, owamazibulo wake: Suka, babulale. Kodwa indodana leyo ayar̔ola iṙele layo; ngokuba ibisoyika, iseyindodana nje." 
Judges8:21 Bandula u‐Zeba no‐Tsalemuna bati: Suka wena, usiwele; ngokuba njengokuba injalo indoda, akwa njalo amandla ayo. Waselesuka u‐Gideyone, wabulala u‐Zeba no‐Tsalemuna, wasusa inyangaṙa ezibe zisezintanyeni zenkamela zabo." 
Judges8:22 Andula amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ati ku‐Gideyone: Pata ubukosi pezu kwetu, kwa wena, nonyana wako, nonyana wonyana wako; ngokuba usisindisile esandleni sama‐Midiyane." 
Judges8:23 Kodwa u‐Gideyone wati kuwo: Mna andiyi kupata ubukosi pezu kwenu, naye unyana wam akayi kupata ubukosi pezu kwenu; nguyehova oya kupata ubukosi pezu kwenu." 
Judges8:24 Waza u‐Gideyone wati kuwo: Makendicele isicelo kuni, sokuba nindinike abanye ngabanye imisesane yempango yabo. (Ngokuba ebenemisesane yegolide, engama‐Shimayeli nje.)" 
Judges8:25 Ati ke: Sonxamela ukunika. Aza ayaneka ingubo, ayiposela kona amanye ngamanye imisesane yempango yawo." 
Judges8:26 Nokuba nzima kwayo imisesane yegolide ayicelileyo, bekuliwaka linamakulu asixe̔nxe leshekele zegolide; ngapandle kwenyangara, namajikazi, nengubo ezibomvu, ezibe zipezu kwabo okumkani bama‐Midiyane, nangapandle kwemixokolelwane ebisezintanyeni zenkamela zabo." 
Judges8:27 Waye u‐Gideyone wenza ngayo iyefodi, wayimisa esixekweni sake, e‐Hofera: basuka bonke o‐Sirayeli baṙexezela emva kwayo kona; eyaba ngumgibe ku‐Gideyone nakwindlu yake." 
Judges8:28 Kwa njalo ama‐Midiyane atotyiswa pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; akabuya apakamise intloko zawo. Lati ilizwe lapumla iminyaka yamashumi mane emihleni ka‐Gideyone. 
Judges8:29 Waza u‐Yerubebali, unyana ka‐Yohashe, waya wahlala endlwini yake." 
Judges8:30 Waye u‐Gideyone enonyana abangamashumi asixe̔nxe, ababepumile esinqeni sake: ngokuba ebenabafazi abaninzi." 
Judges8:31 Neshweshwe lake elise‐Shekeme, kwa lona lamzalela unyana; negama lake walibiza ngo‐Abimeleki." 
Judges8:32 Wada u‐Gideyone, unyana ka‐Yohashe, wafa ebudaleni obukolisileyo, wancw̔atywa encw̔abeni lika‐Yohashe uyise wake, e‐Hofera yama‐Abihezere." 
Judges8:33 KWAYE kute, akuba u‐Gideyone efile, lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabuya lwarexezela emva kwabo o‐Bali, lwazenzela u‐Bali‐berite abe ngutixo walo." 
Judges8:34 Kwa njalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli alwakumbula uyehova, utixo walo, owabeluhlangule esandleni sentshaba zalo ezingqongayo." 
Judges8:35 Kanjako alwenza ububele kwindlu ka‐Yerubebali, ka‐Gideyone, njengako konke okulungileyo abekwenzile ko‐Sirayeli." 
Judges9:1 Waza u‐Abimeleki, unyana ka‐Yerubebali, waya e‐Shekeme, kubazalwana bonina, wateta kubo, nakuso sonke isizalwane sendlu yoyise kanina, esiti:" 
Judges9:2 Tetani ke ezindlebeni zabo bonke abemi base‐Shekeme, niti: Yiyipina into enilungeleyo, eyokuba amadoda emashumi asixe̔nxe, bonke onyana baka‐Yerubebali, apate ubukosi pezu kwenu, eyokuba indoda inye ipate ubukosi pezu kwenu, kusinina? kumbulani kanjalo, ukuba ndilitambo lenu nenyama yenu mna." 
Judges9:3 Bandula abazalwana bonina bateta ngaye ezindlebeni zabo bonke abemi base‐Shekeme kwa lamazwi onke; zaza intliziyo zabo zatobela emva kwo‐Abimeleki; ngokuba bebesiti: Ungumzalwana wetu. 
Judges9:4 Baza bamnika amaqosha esilivere angamashumi asixe̔nxe evela kuyo indlu ka‐Bali‐berite; owati ngawo u‐Abimeleki waqasha amadoda angendawo abubedengu, abemlandela." 
Judges9:5 Wasuka waya endlwini kayise e‐Hofera, wabulala abazalwana bake, onyana baka‐Yerubebali, amadoda angamashumi asixe̔nxe, pezu kwelitye linye; kodwa kwasala u‐Yotame, unyana omncinane ka‐Yerubebali, ngokuba ebezimele." 
Judges9:6 Baza bahlanganisana bonke abemi base‐Shekeme, nabo bonke abendlu ye‐Milo, baya bamenza u‐Abimeleki ukumkani, ngaseyekeni yentsika yokukumbuza ese‐Shekeme." 
Judges9:7 Wati akuxelelwa u‐Yotame, wandula waya wema engcotsheni yentaba ye‐Gerizime, wapakamisa ilizwi lake, wadanduluka, wati kubo: Pulapulani kum, nina bemi base‐Shekeme! ukuba utixo apulapule kuni." 
Judges9:8 Imiti yaka yahamba iye kutambisa ukumkani pezu kwayo; yayisiti kumnquma: Yiba ngukumkani pezu kwetu. 
Judges9:9 Kodwa umnquma wati kuyo: Ngendiyeka ubutyebi bam na, okungabo kubekwa utixo nabantu ngam, ukuba ndiye ukujingajinga pezu kwemiti?" 
Judges9:10 Yandula imiti yati kuwo umkiwane: Yiza wena, ube ngukumkani pezu kwetu." 
Judges9:11 Kodwa umkiwane wati kuyo: Ngendiyeka ubumnandi bam na, nesiqa̔mo sam esilungileyo, ukuba ndiye ukujingajinga pezu kwemiti?" 
Judges9:12 Yaza imiti yati kuwo umti weveyine: Yiza wena, ube ngukumkani pezu kwetu." 
Judges9:13 Kodwa umti weveyine wati kuyo: Ngendiyeka iveyine yam na, evuyisa utixo nabantu, ukuba ndiye ukujingajinga pezu kwemiti?" 
Judges9:14 Yandula yonke imiti yati kuwo umtolo: Yiza wena, ube ngukumkani pezu kwetu." 
Judges9:15 Kodwa umtolo wati kuyo imiti: Ukuba kungenyaniso ninditambisayo ndibe ngukumkani pezu kwenu, yizani, nitembele esitunzini sam; kodwa ukuba akunjalo, maupume umlilo emtolweni, udle isedare ze‐Lebanone." 
Judges9:16 Ngako kaloku, ukuba nenzile ngenyaniso nangolungelelano ngokumenza u‐Abimeleki ukumkani, nokuba nenzile okulungileyo ku‐Yerubebali nakwindlu yake, nokuba nenzile kuye njengemfanelo yezandla zake; —" 
Judges9:17 (ngokuba ubawo ebenilwela, walahla kude ubomi bake, wanihlangula esandleni sama‐Midiyane;" 
Judges9:18 kanti nina nivukile namhla ngakuyo indlu kabawo, nonyana bake nibabulele, amadoda amashumi asixe̔nxe, pezu kwelitye linye, no‐Abimeleki, unyana wesicakakazi sake, nimenzile ukumkani pezu kwabemi base‐Shekeme, ngokuba engumzalwana wenu;)" 
Judges9:19 ngako ukuba nenzile ngenyaniso nangolungelelano ku‐Yerubebali nakwindlu yake namhla nje, vuyani ngaye u‐Abimeleki, naye makavuye ngani:" 
Judges9:20 kodwa ukuba akunjalo, maupume umlilo kuye u‐Abimeleki, udle abemi base‐Shekeme nabendlu ye‐Milo; kanjako maupume umlilo kubo abemi base‐Shekeme nakubo abendlu ye‐Milo, udle u‐Abimeleki." 
Judges9:21 Wasuka u‐Yotame wabaleka, wesaba, waya e‐Bere, wahlala kona ngenxa ka‐Abimeleki umzalwana wake." 
Judges9:22 Nxa u‐Abimeleki abepete ubukosi pezu kwo‐Sirayeli iminyaka yamitatu," 
Judges9:23 wandula utixo watuma umoya ombi pakati kwo‐Abimeleki nabemi base‐Shekeme; baza abemi base‐Shekeme benza ngenkohliso ngaku‐Abimeleki: 
Judges9:24 ukuba kufike ubudlwengu obusenziwa ngakubo onyana abangamashumi asixe̔nxe baka‐Yerubebali, nokuba kubekwe igazi labo pezu kwo‐Abimeleki umzalwana wabo, owabebabulele, napezu kwabemi base‐Shekeme, ababe bomelezile izandla zake ukubulala abazalwana bake." 
Judges9:25 Baye abemi base‐Shekeme bambekela abalaleli pezu kwengcocoyi zentaba, abapanga bonke ababedlula kubo endleleni: kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Abimeleki." 
Judges9:26 Kekaloku u‐Gale, unyana ka‐Hebedi, weza nabazalwana bake, badlulela e‐Shekeme; bati abemi base‐Shekeme batembela kuye." 
Judges9:27 Baza bapuma baya emasimini, baka idreyive zezitiya zabo, bazixovula, benza imigcobo, baya endlwini yotixo wabo, badla, basela, batuka u‐Abimeleki." 
Judges9:28 Wayesiti u‐Gale, unyana ka‐Hebedi: Ungubanina u‐Abimeleki, angobanina ama‐Shekeme, ukuba sikonze kuye? asi ngunyana ka‐Yerubebali na? no‐Zebule asi ngumlindi wake na? konzani amadoda ka‐Hamore uyise ka‐Shekeme; ngokuba kunganina ukuba sikonze kuye tina?" 
Judges9:29 Akwaba ababantu babesesandleni sam! ngendisandul’ ukumshenxisa u‐Abimeleki. Waza wati ku‐Abimeleki: Yandisa impi yako, upume." 
Judges9:30 Xeshekweni u‐Zebule, umpati wesixeko, ebevile amazwi ka‐Gale, unyana ka‐Hebedi, yandu ukuvuta ingqumbo yake." 
Judges9:31 Waza watuma izigidimi ku‐Abimeleki ngobuqokolo, ukuti: Bona ke, u‐Gale, unyana ka‐Hebedi, nabazalwana bake, bafikile e‐Shekeme; kanjalo bona ke, bayavuselela isixeko ngakuwe." 
Judges9:32 Ngako kaloku suka ebusuku, wena nabantu abanawe, ulalele ezindle:" 
Judges9:33 kwakuya kuti ngomso, lakukova ilanga ukupuma, uvuke kusasa, ugaleleke pezu kwesixeko; kanjalo bona ke, nxa bapumela kuwe, yena nabantu abanaye, uya kwenza kuye, njengokufumana kwesandla sako." 
Judges9:34 Wandula wesuka u‐Abimeleki, nabantu bonke ababenaye, ebusuku, baya balalela ngakuyo i‐Shekeme ngamaqela mane." 
Judges9:35 Waza wapuma u‐Gale, unyana ka‐Hebedi, wema emnyango wesango lesixeko; wesuka no‐Abimeleki, nabantu ababenaye, endaweni yokulalela." 
Judges9:36 Xeshekweni u‐Gale abebona abantu, wati ku‐Zebule: Naba abantu besihla ezingcocoyini zentaba. Kodwa u‐Zebule wati kuye: Uyabona isitunzi sentaba njengokungati singamadoda." 
Judges9:37 Walekela u‐Gale ukuteta, wati: Naba abantu besihla enkalweni yelizwe, nelinye iqela lisiza ngendlela yeyeke ye‐Mehonenime." 
Judges9:38 Wandula u‐Zebule wati kuye: Upina ke umlomo wako, owabusitsho ngawo ukuti: Ungubanina u‐Abimeleki, ukuba sikonze kuye? Asi ngaba na abobantu ubadelileyo? Puma ke kaloku, ulwe nabo." 
Judges9:39 Wasuka u‐Gale wapuma pambi kwabemi base‐Shekeme, walwa no‐Abimeleki." 
Judges9:40 Wati u‐Abimeleki wamsukela, wada wabaleka ebusweni bake: kwaza kwawa abahlatyiweyo abaninzi kude kwasemnyango wesango." 
Judges9:41 Waya u‐Abimeleki wahlala e‐Aruma: kanjalo u‐Zebule wamgxota u‐Gale nabazalwana bake, ukuze bangahlali e‐Shekeme." 
Judges9:42 Kwabekute ngomnye umhla, bapuma abantu baya ezindle; kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Abimeleki." 
Judges9:43 Waye etabatile abantu, wabahlula babe ngamaqela matatu, walalela ezindle; wati akukangela, naba abantu bepuma esixekweni; waza wesuka ngakubo, wababeta." 
Judges9:44 Ngokuba u‐Abimeleki nabeqela elinaye bati bukuqu, baza bema emnyango wesango lesixeko; n amanye amaqela omabini wona ati bukuqu pezu kwabo bonke abasezindle, ababeta." 
Judges9:45 Waza u‐Abimeleki walwa ngakuso isixeko ngalomini yonke, watimba isixeko, nabo bonke abantu abakuso wababulala; kanjalo wasicita isixeko, wahlwayela ityuwa pezu kwaso." 
Judges9:46 Bati bakuva oku bonke abemi benqaba yase‐Shekeme, bandula bangena enqatyeni yendlu yotixo u‐ Bali‐ berite." 
Judges9:47 Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Abimeleki, ukuba bonke abemi benqaba yase‐Shekeme bahlanganisene." 
Judges9:48 Wasuka u‐Abimeleki wenyuka intaba ye‐Tsalimone, yena nabantu bonke ababenaye; waza u‐Abimeleki watabata izembe esandleni sake, wagaula isebe lasemitini, walicola, walibeka pezu kwegxalaba lake, wati kubo abantu ababenaye: Oko enibonileyo ukuba ndikwenzile, nxamani nenze njengam." 
Judges9:49 Baza bonke abantu bagaula nabo abanye ngabanye amasebe abo, bamlandela u‐Abimeleki, bawabeka ngasenqatyeni, bayitshisa pezu kwabo inqaba leyo ngomlilo, bada bafa bonke abantu benqaba yase‐Shekeme nabo, ngati liwaka lamadoda nabafazi." 
Judges9:50 Wandula u‐Abimeleki waya e‐Tebetse, wayiṙaula i‐Tebetse, wayitimba." 
Judges9:51 Kodwa bekuko inqaba enamandla pakati kwesixeko eso; baza babalekela kona onke amadoda nabafazi, kwa bonke abemi besixeko, bazivalela, benyuka pezu kwentungo yenqaba." 
Judges9:52 Wada u‐Abimeleki wafika enqatyeni, walwa ngakuyo, wasondela nakude kwasemnyango wenqaba, ukuze ayitshise ngomlilo." 
Judges9:53 Kodwa umfazi otile waposa ilitye lapezulu lokusila pezu kwentloko ka‐Abimeleki, waqekeza ukakai lwake." 
Judges9:54 Waza wabiza ngobunxamo indodana yake ebitwala izixo̔bo zake, wati kuyo: Ṙola iṙele lako, undifise, hlezibe kutiwe ngam: Umfazi wambulala. Yaza indodana yake yamhlaba, wada wafa." 
Judges9:55 Ati akubona amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ukuba u‐Abimeleki ufile, aya amanye ngamanye ezindaweni zawo." 
Judges9:56 Kwa njalo utixo wabuyisa ububi buka‐Abimeleki, obo wabebenzile kuyise, ngokubulala abazalwana bake abangamashumi asixe̔nxe:" 
Judges9:57 nabo bonke ububi babantu base‐Shekeme utixo wabubuyisa pezu kwentloko zabo; kwada kweza pezu kwabo isiqalekiso sika‐Yotame, unyana ka‐Yerubebali." 
Judges10:1 KWAZA kwavuka emva kwo‐Abimeleki, ukusindisa o‐Sirayeli, u‐Tola unyana ka‐Puwa, unyana ka‐Dodo, indoda yakwa‐Yisakare; waye yena ehleli e‐Shamire, entabeni yakwa‐Frayime." 
Judges10:2 Wagweba o‐Sirayeli iminyaka yamashumi mabini anamitatu; wada wafa, wancw̔atywa e‐Shamire." 
Judges10:3 Kwavuka emva kwake u‐Yahire, um‐Gileyadi, owagweba o‐Sirayeli iminyaka yamashumi mabini anamibini." 
Judges10:4 Wabenonyana abamashumi matatu, abakwela pezu kwamatole amaqwaṙashe amashumi matatu, ababenezixeko ezimashumi matatu, ezibiziweyo ngokuti yi‐Havote‐yahire kwada kwanamhla nje, ezisezweni le‐Gileyadi." 
Judges10:5 Wada wafa u‐Yahire, wancw̔atywa e‐Kamone." 
Judges10:6 Kekaloku usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabuya lwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, lwakonza o‐Bali, no‐Hashetorete, notixo base‐Siriya, notixo base‐Tsidone, notixo base‐Mowabi, notixo bosapo luka‐Hamoni, notixo bama‐Filistiya, bamshiya uyehova, bengamkonzi." 
Judges10:7 Yaza yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakubo o‐Sirayeli, wabatengisa esandleni sama‐Filistiya, nasesandleni sosapo luka‐Hamoni." 
Judges10:8 Balwapula baluncinezela usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngalomnyaka: iminyaka ilishumi elinesibozo beluncinezelwa lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli olupesheya kwe‐Yoredane elizweni laba‐Amori, elise‐Gileyadi." 
Judges10:9 Kanjako usapo luka‐Hamoni lwawela i‐Yoredane ukuya kulwa kwa ngakubo o‐Juda, nangakubo o‐Benjamine, nangakuyo indlu ka‐Frayime; baza o‐Sirayeli baxinezeka kakulu." 
Judges10:10 Lwada usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwakala kuyehova, lusiti: Sonile kuwe, nangokokuba simshiyile utixo wetu, nokuba sibakonzile o‐Bali." 
Judges10:11 Waza uyehova wati kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli: Andi nisindisanga na kuwo ama‐Jipete, nakubo aba‐Amori, nakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, nakuwo ama‐Filistiya?" 
Judges10:12 Kanjalo ama‐Tsidone, nama‐Amaleki, nama‐Mahone, ebenibandezela; ndaza ndati, nakukala kum, ndanisindisa esandleni sawo." 
Judges10:13 Nindishiyile noko, nabakonza otixo bambi; ngako andiyi kupinda ukunisindisa." 
Judges10:14 Hambani nikale kubo otixo enibanyulileyo; mabanincede bona ngexesha loxinezeko lwenu. 
Judges10:15 Koko usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwati kuyehova: Sonile; yenza wena kuti njengako konke okulungileyo emehlweni ako; kodwa sisindise ke namhla nje. 
Judges10:16 Lwaza lwakwelelisa otixo basemzini kwa pakati kwalo, lwamkonza uyehova: wada umpefumlo wake wadana pezu kwosizi lwo‐Sirayeli." 
Judges10:17 Lwandula usapo luka‐Hamoni lwabizelwa ndawonye, lwaya lwati waca e‐Gileyadi. Kanjako usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwahlanganiswa, lwaya lwati waca e‐Mitsipa." 
Judges10:18 Baza abantu, inkosi zase‐Gileyadi, bati omnye kwomnye: Ngubanina leyondoda eya kuqala ukulwa ngakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni? yona yoba yintloko pezu kwabo bonke abemi base‐Gileyadi." 
Judges11:1 KEKALOKU u‐Jefeta, um‐Gileyadi, wabeligoṙa elibuṙoti; kodwa ebengunyana wedikazi. Waye u‐Gileyadi wazala u‐Jefeta." 
Judges11:2 Kanjalo umfazi ka‐Gileyadi wamzalela onyana; bada onyana bomfazi wake bakula, bamgxota u‐Jefeta, bati kuye: Akuyi kulidla ilifa endlwini kabawo wetu; ngokuba wena ungunyana womfazi wumbi." 
Judges11:3 Wandula u‐Jefeta wesaba ebusweni babazalwana bake, wahlala ezweni le‐Tobe: kwaza kwabutelwa kuye u‐Jefeta amadoda angendawo, apuma naye." 
Judges11:4 Kwaye kute emva kwemihla etile, ukuba usapo luka‐Hamoni lwalwa no‐Sirayeli." 
Judges11:5 Kwaza kwati, nxa usapo luka‐Hamoni belusilwa no‐Sirayeli, bandula abadala base‐Gileyadi baya ukumzeka u‐Jefeta ezweni le‐Tobe:" 
Judges11:6 baye besiti ku‐Jefeta: Yiza, ube ngumpati wetu, ukuze silwe nosapo luka‐Hamoni." 
Judges11:7 Kodwa u‐Jefeta wati kubo abadala base‐Gileyadi: Aninditiyanga na nina, nandigxota endlwini kabawo? yinina ke ukuba nize kum kaloku, nxa nisebunzimeni?" 
Judges11:8 Baza abadala base‐Gileyadi bati ku‐Jefeta: Ngako oko kaloku sibuyele kuwe, ukuze uhambe nati, ulwe ngakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, ube yintloko yetu pezu kwabo bonke abemi base‐Gileyadi." 
Judges11:9 Wati u‐Jefeta kubo abadala base‐Gileyadi: Ukuba niyandibuyisa, ndize ndilwe ngakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, nokuba uyehova uya kulunika ebusweni bam, ndoba yintloko yenu na?" 
Judges11:10 Bati abadala base‐Gileyadi kuye u‐Jefeta: Uyehova makabe ngumpulapuli pakati kwetu, ukuba asenje njalo njengamazwi ako." 
Judges11:11 Wandula u‐Jefeta wahamba nabadala base‐Gileyadi; bati abantu bamenza intloko nompati pezu kwabo: waye u‐Jefeta wateta onke amazwi ake ebusweni bukayehova e‐Mitsipa. 
Judges11:12 Waza u‐Jefeta watuma izigidimi kukumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni, ukuti: Uyinto nina kum, ukuba uze ngakum ukulwa ezweni lam?" 
Judges11:13 Wayesiti ukumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni kuzo izigidimi zika‐Jefeta: Ngokuba u‐Sirayeli, ekunyukeni kwake e‐Jipete, etabatile ilizwe lam, kwa se‐Arenone kude kwase‐Yaboki, nakude kwase‐Yoredane: ngako kaloku libuyisele elo ngoxolo." 
Judges11:14 Walekela kanjako u‐Jefeta watuma izigidimi kukumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni; 
Judges11:15 wati kuye: Utsho u‐Jefeta ukuti: u‐Sirayeli akatabatanga ilizwe le‐Mowabi, nelizwe losapo luka‐Hamoni;" 
Judges11:16 ngokuba, bakunyuka e‐Jipete, nxa u‐Sirayeli wahamba entlango kude kwaselwandle olubomvu, wada wafika e‐Kadeshe;" 
Judges11:17 wandula u‐Sirayeli watuma izigidimi kukumkani we‐Edome, ukuti: Makendicande elizweni lako; kodwa ukumkani we‐Edome ebengenakupulapula: kanjako watuma nakuye ukumkani we‐Mowabi, kodwa ebengavumi: kwa njalo u‐Sirayeli wahlala e‐Kadeshe." 
Judges11:18 Waza wahamba entlango, wazekelela ilizwe le‐Edome, nelizwe le‐Mowabi, wafika ngecala lasempumalanga lelizwe le‐Mowabi, wati waca pesheya kwe‐Arenone; kodwa babengezi pakati kwomda we‐Mowabi, ngokuba i‐Arenone ibingumda we‐Mowabi." 
Judges11:19 Waza u‐Sirayeli watuma izigidimi ku‐Sihone ukumkani waba‐Amori, ukumkani we‐Heshebone; waye u‐Sirayeli esiti kuye: Makesicande elizweni lako, kude kube sendaweni yam." 
Judges11:20 Kodwa u‐Sihone ebengatembi u‐Sirayeli, ukuba acande emdeni wake; koko u‐Sihone wahlanganisa bonke abantu bake, baya bati waca e‐Yahetsa; waza walwa no‐Sirayeli." 
Judges11:21 Wandula uyehova utixo wo‐Sirayeli, wanikela u‐Sihone nabo bonke abantu bake esandleni so‐Sirayeli: baza bababeta: kwa njalo ke u‐Sirayeli wabamba lonke ilizwe laba‐Amori, abemi belozwe." 
Judges11:22 Babamba yonke imida yaba‐Amori, kwa se‐Arenone kwada kwase‐Yaboki, nasentlango kwada kwase‐Yoredane." 
Judges11:23 Ngako kaloku uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ugqogqile aba‐Amori pambi kwabantu bake o‐Sirayeli; kekaloku wena uya kubamba ilizwe labo na?" 
Judges11:24 Akuyi kubamba na ela lowo ulinikwayo ngu‐Kemoshe, utixo wako, ukuba ulibambe? Kwa njalo lowo usukuba egqogqiwe nguyehova, utixo wetu, pambi kwetu, siya kubamba ilizwe lake." 
Judges11:25 Nakaloku uka umgqitise ngokulunga na u‐Balaki, unyana ka‐Tsipore, ukumkani wama‐Mowabi? waka wapika no‐Sirayeli na, waka walwa nabo na," 
Judges11:26 nxa o‐Sirayeli bahlala e‐Heshebone nakuwo amagxamesi ayo, nase‐Harohere nakuwo amagxamesi ayo, nakuzo zonke izixeko ezisemacaleni ase‐Arenone, iminyaka imakulu matatu? kunganina ke ukuba ningazihlangulanga pakati kweloxesha?" 
Judges11:27 Ngako mna andikwonanga wena, nguwe ke owenza kum okukohlakeleyo, ngokunga ungalwa nam. Uyehova, umgwebi, makagwebe namhla pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli nosapo luka‐Hamoni." 
Judges11:28 Kodwa ukumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni akapulapula amazwi ka‐Jefeta abewatumile kuye. 
Judges11:29 Wandula umoya kayehova weza pezu kwo‐Jefeta, waza wacanda e‐Gileyadi nase‐Manase; wacanda nase‐Mitsipe yase‐Gileyadi, wesuka e‐Mitsipe yase‐Gileyadi, wadlulela kulo usapo luka‐Hamoni." 
Judges11:30 Waye u‐Jefeta wabambisa ngesibambiso kuye uyehova, wati: Ukuba uya kugqibela ukunikela usapo luka‐Hamoni esandleni sam;" 
Judges11:31 kuya kwandula ukuti, oko kusukuba kupuma elucangweni lwendlu yam ukuza kundikaulela, ndakubuya ngoxolo kulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, kwoba ko kukayehova, ndandiya kukunikela kube lidini lokutshiswa." 
Judges11:32 Kwa njalo u‐Jefeta wadlulela kulo usapo luka‐Hamoni ukulwa nalo; waza uyehova walunikela esandleni sake. 
Judges11:33 Walubeta ke kwa se‐Harohere kude kwafikwa e‐Minite, izixeko ezimashumi mabini, nakude kwase‐Abele‐keramime, ngesibulalo esikulu kunene. Lwaza lwatotyiswa usapo luka‐Hamoni pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Judges11:34 Wada u‐Jefeta weza e‐Mitsipa endlwini yake; kekaloku bona ke, intombi yake yapuma ukuza kumkaulela inentambula nemidudo; yona ibikupela kwomntwana wake; kwaye kungeko kuye omnye evela kuye, unyana nantombi." 
Judges11:35 Kwabe kute, akuyibona, waṙazula ingubo zake, wati: Au, ntombi yam! unditobisile kakulu; ungowapakati kwabo bandikatazayo: ngokuba ndivulile umlomo wam kuye uyehova, ndikohlwa kukubuya." 
Judges11:36 Yaza yati kuye: Bawo! ukuba uvulile umlomo wako kuye uyehova, yenza kum njengoko kupumileyo emlonyeni wako; emveni kwokuba uyehova ukwenzele impindezelo ezintshabeni zako, elusatsheni luka‐Hamoni." 
Judges11:37 Yati kanjalo kuyise: Makundenzelwe lendawo: ndiyeke inyanga zibe mbini, ukuba ndiye ndihlele ezintabeni, ndililele ubuntombi bam, mna nabalinganekazi bam." 
Judges11:38 Wayesiti: Yiya. Waza wayindulula iye inyanga zibe mbini. Yasuka yaya nabalinganekazi bayo, yalilela ubuntombi bayo ezintabeni." 
Judges11:39 Kwaye kute ekupeleni kwenyanga ezimbini, yandula yabuyela kuyise, owenza kuyo isibambiso abebambisile ngaso; yaingayazi ke indoda. Kwaza kwaba lisiko kwa‐Sirayeli," 
Judges11:40 ukuba intombi zakwa‐Sirayeli zaya iminyaka ngeminyaka ukudumisa intombi ka‐Jefeta um‐Gileyadi, imihla yamine emnyakeni mnye." 
Judges12:1 Kekaloku amadoda akwa‐Frayime ebebizelwa ndawonye, awela aya ngasenode, ati ku‐Jefeta: Yinina ukuba wadlula ukuya kulwa ngakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, ungasibizanga tina siye nawe? indlu yako soyitshisa pezu kwako ngomlilo." 
Judges12:2 Wayesiti u‐Jefeta kuwo: Mna nabantu bam sibe sinempikiso enkulu nosapo luka‐Hamoni; ndaza ndabiza nina, kodwa anandisindisa esandleni salo." 
Judges12:3 Ndati ndakubona ukuba anandisindisa, ndabeka umpefumlo wam esandleni sam, ndadlula ndaya kulo usapo luka‐Hamoni; waza uyehova walunika esandleni sam: ngako kunganina ukuba ninyukele kum namhla nje, ukuza kulwa nam?" 
Judges12:4 Wandula u‐Jefeta wahlanganisa onke amadoda ase‐Gileyadi, walwa nama‐Frayime: aza amadoda ase‐Gileyadi abeta ama‐Frayime, ngokuba ebesiti: Nina ningabasindileyo bama‐Frayime; ama‐Gileyadi epakati kwe‐Frayime ne‐Manase nje." 
Judges12:5 Kekaloku ama‐Gileyadi apangela ama‐Frayime ukubamba amazibuko ase‐Yoredane: kwaza kwati, nxa abasindileyo bama‐Frayime bati: Mandiwele; andula amadoda ase‐Gileyadi ati kuye: Ungum‐Frayime na? Ukuba wati: Hai;" 
Judges12:6 andula ati kuye: Yiti ke i‐Shibolete; kodwa wati i‐Sibolete; ngokuba ebengenakulungisa ukuteta njalo. Aza ambamba ambulala ngasemazibukweni ase‐Yoredane. Kwawa ke ngeloxesha kuwo ama‐Frayime amawaka angamashumi mane anamabini. 
Judges12:7 Waye u‐Jefeta wagweba o‐Sirayeli iminyaka yamitandatu. Wada wafa u‐Jefeta um‐Gileyadi, wancwatywa ezixekweni zase‐Gileyadi." 
Judges12:8 EMVA kwake, u‐Bitsane wase‐Beteleheme wagweba o‐Sirayeli." 
Judges12:9 Wayenonyana abamashumi matatu, nentombi ezimashumi matatu, o wazendisayo ngapandle, nentombi ezimashumi matatu wazingenisela onyana bake zivela ngapandle. Wayegweba o‐Sirayeli iminyaka yasixe̔nxe." 
Judges12:10 Wada wafa u‐Bitsane, wancw̔atywa e‐Beteleheme." 
Judges12:11 Emva kwake, u‐Eloni, um‐Zebulone, wagweba o‐Sirayeli; wayegweba o‐Sirayeli iminyaka yalishumi." 
Judges12:12 Wada u‐Eloni, um‐Zebulone, wafa, wancw̔atywa e‐Ajalone, elizweni lakwa‐Zebulone." 
Judges12:13 Emva kwake, u‐Habedoni, unyana ka‐Hilele, um‐Piratone, wagweba o‐Sirayeli." 
Judges12:14 Wayenonyana abamashumi mane, nonyana bonyana abamashumi matatu, abakwela pezu kwamatole amaqwaṙashe angamashumi asixe̔nxe: wayegweba o‐Sirayeli iminyaka yasibozo." 
Judges12:15 Wada wafa u‐Habedoni, unyana ka‐Hilele, um‐Piratone, wancw̔atywa e‐Piratone, ezweni lakwa‐Frayime, entabeni yama‐Amaleki." 
Judges13:1 LWAPINDA kanjalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli ukwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; waza uyehova walunikela esandleni sama‐Filistiya iminyaka imashumi mane. 
Judges13:2 Kwabekuko indoda etile yase‐Tsoreha, eyesizalwane sama‐Dane, egama belingu‐Manoha; waye umfazi wayo eludlolo, ebengazali." 
Judges13:3 Yaza ingelosi kayehova yabonakala kuye umfazi lowo, yati kuye: Bona ke, wena uludlolo, akuzali nokuzala; kodwa uya kumita, uzale unyana." 
Judges13:4 Ngako kaloku zigcine ke, ungaseli neveyine notywala, ungadli nanye into enco̔lileyo:" 
Judges13:5 ngokuba, bona ke, uya kumita, uzale unyana; kanjalo isitshetshe sokugugula asiyi kunyuka pezu kwentloko yake: ngokuba umntwana lowo eya kuba ngumnaziri katixo kwa sesizalweni; waye yena eya kuqala ukusindisa o‐Sirayeli esandleni sama‐Filistiya." 
Judges13:6 Waza wangena umfazi lowo, watsho kuyo indoda yake ukuti: Kweza indoda katixo kum, ekubonakala bekunjengokubonakala kwengelosi katixo, okwoyikekayo kunene; kodwa andiyibuzanga ibivela pina, negama layo ayilixelanga kum." 
Judges13:7 Kodwa yati kum: Bona ke, uya kumita, uzale unyana; ngako kaloku ungaseli iveyine notywala, ungadli nanye into enco̔lileyo: ngokuba umntwana lowo eya kuba ngumnaziri katixo kwa sesizalweni kude kube ngumhla wokufa kwake." 
Judges13:8 Wandula u‐Manoha watandaza kuyehova, wati: Ke, Nkosi! indoda katixo owabuyituma makeize kanjako kuti, isifundise ukuba siya kwenza nto nina kulomntwana oya kuzalwa." 
Judges13:9 Waza utixo wapulapula ilizwi lika‐Manoha; yati ingelosi kayehova yeza kanjako kumfazi, akuhlala entsimini; kodwa u‐Manoha, indoda yake, ebengenaye." 
Judges13:10 Wandula umfazi lowo wanxama, wagidima, wayixelela indoda yake, wati kuyo: Bona ke, indoda ibonakele kum, eyezayo ngomhla lowa kum." 
Judges13:11 Waselesuka u‐Manoha, wahamba emva kwomfazi wake, weza kulondoda, wati kuyo: Wena uyindoda leyo na ebiteta nomfazi? Yaza yati: Ndiyiyo." 
Judges13:12 Waza u‐Manoha wati: Kaloku makuze kubako amazwi ako. Loba linina isiko lalomntwana nomsebenzi wake? 
Judges13:13 Yayisiti ingelosi kayehova ku‐Manoha: Konke endibe nditeta ngako kuye umfazi makazibambe kuko. 
Judges13:14 Akayi kutya kuyo nanye into evela emtini weveyine; makangaseli iveyine notywala; makangadli nanye into enco̔lileyo: konke endibe ndimyalela ngako makakugcine. 
Judges13:15 Wandula u‐Manoha wati kuyo ingelosi kayehova: Makesikubambezele ke, side sikulungisele itakane lebokwe." 
Judges13:16 Kodwa ingelosi kayehova yati ku‐Manoha: Ukuba uyandibambezela, andiyi kutya kukudla kwako; nokuba uya kwenza idini lokutshiswa, wolinikela kuyehova. Ngokuba u‐Manoha ebengazi ukuba iyiyo ingelosi kayehova." 
Judges13:17 Waza u‐Manoha wati kuyo ingelosi kayehova: Ngubanina igama lako, ukuze sikubeke, lakuza kubako ilizwi lako." 
Judges13:18 Yati ingelosi kayehova kuye: Ubuzela nina igama lam, lingummangaliso nje?" 
Judges13:19 Wandula u‐Manoha watabata itakane lebokwe nomnikelo wokudla, wanikela kuyehova pezu kwolwalwa. Yaza yenza ngokuti nqa, nxa u‐Manoha nomfazi wake babebonela:" 
Judges13:20 ngokuba bekute, xeshekweni ilangatye lenyuka kuso isibingelo ngasezulwini, yandula ingelosi kayehova yenyuka elangatyeni lesibingelo. Bati u‐Manoha nomfazi wake, bakubona oko, bawa ngobuso babo ngasemhlabeni." 
Judges13:21 Kodwa ingelosi kayehova ayapinda, kanjako ukubonakala ku‐Manoha nomfazi wake. Wandula wazi u‐Manoha ukuba ibiyiyo ingelosi kayehova." 
Judges13:22 Wayesiti u‐Manoha kumfazi wake: Siya kufa ngenyaniso, ngokuba simbonile utixo." 
Judges13:23 Kodwa umfazi wake wati kuye: Ukuba uyehova ebetanda ukusifisa, ngaengalamkelanga ezandleni zetu idini lokutshiswa nomnikelo wokudla; kanjalo ngaengasibonisanga zonke ezizinto, nangelixesha ngaengasivisanga izinto ezinjengezi." 
Judges13:24 Wada umfazi lowo wazala unyana, wabiza igama lake ngo‐Samsone: wakula ke umntwana, wati uyehova wamtamsanqela." 
Judges13:25 Waza umoya kayehova waqala ukumzamazamisa e‐Mahane‐dane, pakati kwe‐Tsoreha ne‐Shetawoli." 
Judges14:1 KEKALOKU u‐Samsone wehla waya e‐Timnate, wabona inkazana e‐Timnate ezintombini zama‐Filistiya." 
Judges14:2 Wenyuka ke, waxelela uyise nonina, wati: Ndibonile inkazana e‐Timnate ezintombini zama‐Filistiya; ngako kaloku nditabateleni yona ibe ngumfazi." 
Judges14:3 Baza nyise nonina bati kuye: Akuko na inkazana pakati kwentombi zabazalwana bako, napakati kwabo bonke abantu bam, ukuba uye kuzeka umfazi kuwo ama‐Filistiya angalukileyo? Wayesiti u‐Samsone kuyise: Nditabatele yona, ngokuba ifanele emehlweni am." 
Judges14:4 Kodwa uyise nonina bebengazi ukuba oku bekuvela kuyehova, ukuba wafuna ituba ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya: ngokuba ama‐Filistiya ebepata ubukosi pezu kwo‐Sirayeli ngeloxesha." 
Judges14:5 Wandula u‐Samsone wehla noyise nonina ukuya e‐Timnate: bati bakufika ngasezitiyeni zemiti yeveyine zase‐Timnate, kekaloku bona ke, ingonyama entsha yakonya ngakuye." 
Judges14:6 Waza umoya kayehova wamqubula, ukuba wayiṙazula njengokuba kuṙazulwa itakane, kungabanga nto esandleni sake: kodwa ebengaxeleli uyise nonina oko abekwenzile." 
Judges14:7 Wasuka wehla, wateta nenkazana leyo; yabifanele emehlweni ka‐Samsone." 
Judges14:8 Wati emva kwemihla etile wabuya ukuba ayizeke; waza wapambuka ukuya kubona isidumbu sengonyama; kekaloku nali ibubu lenyosi nobusi esidunjwini sengonyama. 
Judges14:9 Wandula wabupakulela ezandleni zake, wahamba emana esidla, waya kuyise nonina, wabanika, badla nabo; kodwa ebengabaxeleli ukuba ebepakule obobusi esidunjwini sengonyama." 
Judges14:10 Wayesihla uyise waya kwinkazana leyo: kanjalo u‐Samsone wenza kona isidlo, ngokuba amadodana ebenokwenje njalo." 
Judges14:11 Kwabekute, bakumbona, bazisa abalingane abamashumi matatu, ukuze babe naye." 
Judges14:12 Waza u‐Samsone wati kubo: Ndoninikela isintsonkotelo ke: ukuba niya kundityilela sona ngenyaniso, nisifumane, pakati kwemihla yosixe̔nxe yesisidlo, sendiya kunika kuni ihempe ezimashumi matatu, nezivato zokuguqulelana ezimashumi matatu:" 
Judges14:13 kodwa ukuba nikohliwe kukundityilela, niya kwandula nina ninike kum ihempe ezimashumi matatu, nezivato zokuguqulelana ezimashumi matatu. Baza bati kuye: Nikela isintsonkotelo sako, sisive." 
Judges14:14 Wayesiti kubo: Koko kudlayo kwapuma ukudla, nakoko kukalipileyo kwapuma ubumnandi. Bakohlwa ukutyila esosintsonkotelo pakati kwemihla mitatu." 
Judges14:15 Kwaye kute ngomhla wesixe̔nxe, bandula bati kumfazi ka‐Samsone: Zinga indoda yako, ukuba ityile kuti esosintsonkotelo, hleze sitshise wena nendlu yoyihlo ngomlilo: nisimemile na ukuba nisidle? akunjalo na?" 
Judges14:16 Waza walila umfazi ka‐Samsone pambi kwake, wati: Uyanditiya kodwa, akunditandi; unikele onyana babantu bam isintsonkotelo, kanti akusityilanga kum. Wayesiti kuye: Bona ke, andisityilanga kubawo nakuma̔, ngendisityila kuwe na?" 
Judges14:17 Walila ke pambi kwake lomihla isixe̔nxe babenesidlo ngayo: kwada kwati ngomhla wesixe̔nxe, wamtyilela, ngokuba wamjokayo: waza wabatyilela onyana babantu bake isintsonkotelo eso." 
Judges14:18 Andula amadoda esixeko ngomhla wesixe̔nxe, lingekatshoni ilanga, ati kuye: Kuyinto nina okumnandi pezu kwobusi? kuyinto nina okukalipileyo pezu kwengonyama? Wayesiti kuwo: Ukuba beningapulushanga ngetokazi lam, ngeningasifumananga isintsonkotelo sam." 
Judges14:19 Waza umoya kayehova wamqubula, wasuka wehla waya e‐Ashekelone, wabulala kubo abantu amadoda angamashumi matatu, watabata ingubo zawo ezihlutyiweyo, wanika izivato zokuguqulelana kwabo babetyilile isintsonkotelo. Yaza yavuta ingqumbo yake, wenyuka waya kuyo indlu yoyise." 
Judges14:20 Kodwa umfazi ka‐Samsone waba ngowomlingane wake, lowo obengumhlobo kuye." 
Judges15:1 Kwaye kute emva kwemihla etile, ngemihla yokuvunwa kwenqolowa, wandula u‐Samsone watyelela kumfazi wake ngetakane lebokwe, wati: Ndiya kungena kumfazi wam enkambilini. Kodwa uyise ebengamvumeli ukuba angene." 
Judges15:2 Waza uyise wati: Bendisiba ngenyaniso umtiyile kanye; ngako ndamnika kumlingane wako: udade wake omncinane akamdluli na ngokuba mhle? mtabate keesikundleni sake. 
Judges15:3 Wandula u‐Samsone wati ngabo: Andinatyala ngoku ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya, nakuba ndiwenzela ububi." 
Judges15:4 Wasuka u‐Samsone waya wabamba amakulu matatu empungutye, watabata izikuni, waguqula umsila ngakuwo umsila, wabeka isikuni sinye pakati kwemisila mibini." 
Judges15:5 Wati akupemba umlilo ezikunini, wazindulula pakati kwenqolowa esemiyo yama‐Filistiya, watshisa nezita zenqolowa, nenqolowa esemiyo, nezitiya zeminquma." 
Judges15:6 Andula ama‐Filistiya ati: Ngubanina owenze oku? Kwatwa: Ngu‐Samsone, umyeni wom‐Timnate, ngokuba ebetabata umfazi wake, wamnika kumlingane wake. Enyuka ke ama‐Filistiya, atshisa yena noyise ngomlilo." 
Judges15:7 Kodwa u‐Samsone wati kuwo: Nakuba nenze ngokunjalo, ndiya kuzipindezelela kuni noko; ndoti ke kamva ndiyeke." 
Judges15:8 Waza wawabeta umlenze netanga, ngesibulalo esikulu. Wasuka wehla, wahlala emweweni weliwa le‐Hetame."
