Judges15:9 Andula ama‐Filistiya enyuka, ati waca kwa‐Juda, azitwabulula e‐Lehi." 
Judges15:10 Aza amadoda akwa‐Juda ati: Yinina ukuba ninyukile ngakuti? Ati ke: Sinyukile ukuze simnxibe u‐Samsone, senze kuye njengokuba enze kuti." 
Judges15:11 Asuka ehla amawaka matatu amadoda akwa‐Juda, aya emweweni weliwa le‐Hetame, ati ku‐Samsone: Akwazi na, ukuba ama‐Filistiya apata ubukosi pezu kwetu? yinto nina le uyenzileyo ngakuti? Wayesiti kuwo: Njengokuba ebesenza kum, ndenje njalo kuwo." 
Judges15:12 Ati kuye: Sihlile ukuza kukunxiba, sikunikele esandleni sama‐Filistiya. Waza u‐Samsone wati kuwo: Ndifungeleni ukuba aniyi kundiwela ngokwenu." 
Judges15:13 Atsho kuye esiti: Hai; koko siya kuqinisa ukukunxiba, sikunikele esandleni sawo; kodwa ngenyaniso asiyi kukufisa. Aza amnxiba ngentambo ezintsha zambini, amnyusa eweni." 
Judges15:14 Wati akufika e‐Lehi, ama‐Filistiya amemeza ngakuye ngovuyo. Wandula umoya kayehova wamqubula, zati intambo ezisezingalweni zake zaba njengefelase etshisiweyo ngomlilo, nezinxibo zake zacumbuluka ezandleni zake." 
Judges15:15 Waza wafumana umhlati omtsha weqwaṙashe, wasolula isandla sake wawutabata, wabulala ngawo amadoda aliwaka." 
Judges15:16 Wayesiti u‐Samsone: Ngomhlati weqwaṙashe ndibulele imfumba pezu kwemfumba, ngomhlati weqwaṙashe ndibulele amadoda aliwaka." 
Judges15:17 Kwabekute, akuba egqibile ukuteta, walahla umhlati esandleni sake, wabiza londawo nge‐Ramate‐lehi." 
Judges15:18 Wada wanxanwa kakulu, wabiza kuyehova, wati: Wena unikile olusindiso olukulu esandleni sesicaka sako nje, ndiya kufa kaloku ngenxanwa na, ndiwe esandleni saba bangalukileyo?" 
Judges15:19 Waye utixo wacandela isigingqi esise‐Lehi, aza apuma kuso amanzi; wati akuba eselile, umoya wake wabuya, wada wapila. Ngako oko wabiza igama lawo ngokuti: Ngumtombo wowabizayo, ose‐Lehi nanamhla nje." 
Judges15:20 Wayegweba o‐Sirayeli emihleni yama‐Filistiya iminyaka yamashumi mabini. 
Judges16:1 WANDULA u‐Samsone waya e‐Gaza, wabona apo inkazana eyingnawokazi, wangena kuyo." 
Judges16:2 Kwaxelelwa ama‐Gaza, kusitwa: u‐Samsone ufikile apa. Aza amṙaula, amlalela bonke ubusuku ngasesangweni lesixeko; kodwa ati cwaka bonke ubusuku, esiti: Ekukanyeni kwokusa siya kumbulala." 
Judges16:3 Waye u‐Samsone walala kwada kwaba pakati kwobusuku; waza wesuka pakati kwobusuku, wabamba ingcango zesango lesixeko, nemigubasi yomibini, wazincotula kunye nomvalo, wazibeka pezu kwamagxalaba ake, wazinyusela engcotsheni yentaba engapambi kwe‐Hebrone." 
Judges16:4 Kwaye kute kamva, watanda inkazana entilini ye‐Soreki, egama layo belingu‐Delila." 
Judges16:5 Zaza inkosi zama‐Filistiya zenyuka zaya kuyo, zati kuyo: Mzinge, ubone ukuba akwinto nina amandla ake amakulu, nokuba kunganto nina esingameyisayo, ukuze simnxibe, simbandezele; sasiya kukunika sonke ngabanye amaqosha esilivere aliwaka linekulu." 
Judges16:6 Waza u‐Delila wati ku‐Samsone: Ndixelele ke, akwinto nina amandla ako amakulu? kanjalo unganxitywa nganto nina, ukuba ubandezelwe?" 
Judges16:7 Wati u‐Samsone kuye: Ukuba bayandinxiba ngentsontelo ezintsha ezisixe̔nxe, ezingekomile, ndiya kuba butataka, ndibe njengomnye umntu." 
Judges16:8 Zandula inkosi zama‐Filistiya zenyusela kuye intsontelo ezisixe̔nxe ezintsha, ezingekomile, waza wamnxiba ngazo." 
Judges16:9 Kekaloku abalaleli bamhlalela enkambilini yapakati. Waza wati kuye: ama‐Filistiya apezu kwako, Samsone! Wada waqaula intsontelo ezo, njengokuba kuqaulwa umsonto wefelase, wakuva umlilo. Kwaye kungaziwa amandla ake." 
Judges16:10 Wati u‐Delila kanjalo ku‐Samsone: Bona ke, undikohlisile, uzitetile kum ilwimi; kaloku ndixelele ke, unganxitywa nganto nina?" 
Judges16:11 Waza wati kuye: Ukuba bayaqinisa ukundinxiba ngentambo ezintsha, ekungenziwanga umsebenzi ngazo, ndiya kuba butataka, ndibe njengomnye umntu." 
Judges16:12 Wandula u‐Delila watabata intambo ezintsha, wamnxiba ngazo, wati kuye: ama‐Filistiya apezu kwako, Samsone! Bati abalaleli bahlala enkambilini yapakati. Waza waziqaula ezingalweni zake njengomsonto." 
Judges16:13 Wati u‐Delila kanjalo ku‐Samsone: Bona ke, kwada kwakaloku undikohlisile, wateta kum ilwimi: ndixelele, unganxitywa nganto nina? Waza wati kuye: Ukuba uyaluka izihlwita zosixe̔nxe zentloko yam ngemisonto yokuluka." 
Judges16:14 Waza wazibetela ngesikonkwane, wati kuye: ama‐Filistiya apezu kwako, Samsone! Wandula wavuka ebutongweni bake, wancotula isikonkwane somti wokuluka kunye nemisonto yawo." 
Judges16:15 Wati kanjalo kuye: Ungati nina ukuti: Ndiyakutanda; nxa intliziyo yako ingenam? undikohlisile lamaxesha matatu, ungekandixelelanga ukuba amandla ako amakulu akwinto nina." 
Judges16:16 Kwaye kute, nxa abemjoka ngamazwi ake imihla yonke, emqu̔ba, ukuba umpefumlo wake wadana kwada kwaza kufa;" 
Judges16:17 wandula wamxelela yonke intliziyo yake, wati kuye: Bekunganyukanga isitshetshe sokugugula pezu kwentloko yam; ngokuba ndingumnaziri katixo kwa sesizalweni sikama̔: ukuba ndiyagugulwa, seleya kumka kum amandla am, ndandiya kuba butataka, ndibe njengabantu bonke." 
Judges16:18 Wati u‐Delila akubona ukuba umxelele yonke intliziyo yake, wandula watuma wabiza inkosi zama‐Filistiya, esiti: Nyukani kaloku nje, ngokuba endixelele yonke intliziyo yake. Zandula zenyukela kuye inkosi zama‐Filistiya, zazisa isilivere leyo ezandleni zazo." 
Judges16:19 Waza wamlalisa ubutongo pezu kwamadolo ake, wabiza indoda ize igugule izihlwita zosixe̔nxe zentloko yake, waqala ukumbandezela, ada emka amandla ake kuye." 
Judges16:20 Waza wati: ama‐Filistiya apezu kwako, Samsone! Waselevuka ebutongweni bake, wati: Ndiya kupuma ngoku njengamanye amaxesha, ndizivutulule; ngokuba ebengazi ukuba uyehova emkile kuye." 
Judges16:21 Andula ama‐Filistiya ambamba, ancotula amehlo ake, amhlisela e‐Gaza, amnxiba ngamakamandela obedu; waza wasila entolongweni." 
Judges16:22 Kodwa inwele zentloko yake zaqala ukukula kanjako, emva kwokugugulwa kwake." 
Judges16:23 Zada inkosi zama‐Filistiya zahlanganiselwa ukubingela u‐Dagone, utixo wawo, umbingo omkulu, nokugcoba; zaye zisiti: Utixo wetu umnikele esandleni setu u‐Samsone, utshaba lwetu." 
Judges16:24 Bati bakumbona abantu, badumisa utixo wabo; ngokuba bebesiti: Utixo wetu unikele esandleni setu utshaba lwetu nomcitakalisi welizwe letu, owandisa ababuleweyo betu." 
Judges16:25 Kwaye kute, nxa intliziyo zabo sezicwayitile, bandula bati: Bizani u‐Samsone, asidlalele. Basuka bambiza u‐Samsone avele entolongweni; waza wadlala ebusweni babo; bammisa ke pakati kwentsika." 
Judges16:26 Wayesiti u‐Samsone kumfana obembamba ngesandla: Ndiyeke ukuba ndipate intsika ekupezu kwazo indlu imisiwe, ukuze ndayame ngazo." 
Judges16:27 Kekaloku indlu ibizele ngamadoda nabafazi; kanjalo zonke inkosi zama‐Filistiya bezikona; napezu kwendlu bekuko ngati angamawaka matatu amadoda nabafazi, ababebonela ukudlala kuka‐Samsone." 
Judges16:28 Wandula wabiza u‐Samsone kuyehova, wati: Nkosi, Yehova! zundikumbule, undomeleze ke kube kaloku nje kupela, Tixo! ukuba ndipindezele ngempindezelo inye amehlo am omabini kuwo ama‐Filistiya." 
Judges16:29 Waza u‐Samsone wabamba intsika zapakati zombini, ekupezu kwazo indlu ibimisiwe, nekupezu kwazo ibisekelwe, enye ngesandla sake sokunene, nenye ngesandla sake sokohlo." 
Judges16:30 Wayesiti u‐Samsone: Umpefumlo wam maufe kunye nama‐Filistiya! Waza wazigoba ngamandla: yati indlu yawa pezu kwazo inkosi, napezu kwabo bonke abantu abebekuyo. Kwa njalo abafileyo owabafisayo ekufeni kwake, bebebaninzi pezu kwabo abebafisile ekudleni kwake ubomi." 
Judges16:31 Bandula behla abazalwana bake, nayo yonke indlu yoyise, bamsusa, benyuka naye, bamncw̔aba pakati kwe‐Tsoreha ne‐Shetawoli, encw̔abeni lika‐Manoha uyise. Wayegweba o‐Sirayeli iminyaka yamashumi mabini." 
Judges17:1 KWABEKUKO indoda yasentabeni yakwa‐Frayime, egama belingu‐Mika." 
Judges17:2 Yayisiti kunina: Ishekele zesilivere eziliwaka linekulu, ezibe zitatyatwa kuwe, obuqalekisa ngazo, nobuteta ngazo nasezindlebeni zam, nantsi ke isilivere leyo inam; mna ndiyitabatile. Waza unina wati: Mautanyusanqelwe nguyehova, nyana wam!" 
Judges17:3 Yandula yabuyisela kunina ezo zishekele zesilivere ziliwaka linekulu. Koko wati unina: Bendigqibele ukuyingcwalisa isilivere leyo kuyehova ivela esandleni sam, ibe yeyonyana wam, ukuba kwenzwe umfanekiso oqingqiweyo nomfanekiso otyityishiweyo; ngako kaloku ndoyibuyisela kuwe." 
Judges17:4 Kodwa yabuyisela isilivere leyo kunina. Waza unina watabata ishekele zesilivere ezimakulu mabini, wazinika kwincibi, eyenza ngazo umfanekiso oqingqiweyo nomfanekiso otyityishiweyo; owabuko endlwini ka‐Mika." 
Judges17:5 Kekaloku indoda leyo u‐Mika ibinendlu katixo, yenza iyefodi neterafi, yazalisa isandla somnye konyana bayo, owaba ngumperisite wayo." 
Judges17:6 Ngalomihla bekungeko ukumkani kwa‐Sirayeli; abanye ngabanye bakwenza okufaneleyo emehlweni abo. 
Judges17:7 Kwaye kuko indodana yase‐Beteleheme‐juda, eyesizalwane sika‐Juda, ebingum‐Levi, ebipambukele kona." 
Judges17:8 Yati indoda le yemka esixekweni eso, e‐Beteleheme‐juda, ukuya kupambukela apo iya kufumana indawo kona: yada yafika entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, endlwini ka‐Mika, ukwenza ihambo yayo." 
Judges17:9 Waza u Mika wati kuyo: Uvela pina? Yayisiti kuye: Ndingum‐Levi wase‐Beteleheme‐juda; ndiyahamba ukuya kupambukela apo ndiya kufumana indawo kona. 
Judges17:10 Wandula u‐Mika wati kuye: Hlala nam, ube ngubawo nomperisite kum, ndandiya kukunika ishumi leshekele zesilivere ngomnyaka ngomnyaka, nezivato ezifanelekileyo, nokutya kwako. Waza um‐Levi waya naye." 
Judges17:11 Kwa njalo um‐Levi wavuma ukuhlala nalondoda; yaza indodana leyo yaba njengomnye wonyana bayo kuyo. 
Judges17:12 Waye u‐Mika wazalisa isandla som‐Levi, yati indodana le yaba ngumperisite wake, yabiko endlwini ka‐Mika." 
Judges17:13 Waza wati u‐Mika: Kaloku ndiyazi ukuba uyehova uya kundenzela okulungileyo, ngokuba ndinom‐Levi abe ngumperisite wam." 
Judges18:1 Ngalomihla bekungeko ukumkani kwa‐Sirayeli. Kekaloku ngalomihla isizwe sama‐Dane sazifunela ilifa lokuhlala; ngokuba kwada kwangumhla lowo belingawanga kuso pakati kwezizwe zo‐Sirayeli ilifa elisaneleyo. 
Judges18:2 Ngako usapo luka‐Dane lwasusa kwisizalwane salo amadoda amahlanu emideni yalo, amadoda angamaṙoti, e‐Tsoreha nase‐Shetawoli, ukuya kuhlola ilizwe, nokulipengulula, lwati kuwo: Hambani, nipengulule ilizwe. Ada afika entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, endlwini ka‐Mika, alalisa kona." 
Judges18:3 Ati akuba ngasendlwini ka‐Mika, alazi ilizwi lendodana engum‐Levi; asuka apambukela kona, ati kuyo: Ngubanina okuzisileyo apa? wenza nto nina kule ndawo? unanto nina apa?" 
Judges18:4 Yayisiti kuwo: Ngokunje nangokunje wandenzela u‐Mika, wandiqasha, ndaza ndaba ngumperisite wake." 
Judges18:5 Andula ati kuyo: Kaubuze kutixo, ukuze sazi ukuba indlela yetu esihamba ngayo iya kutamsanqeleka na." 
Judges18:6 Wati kuwo umperisite lowo: Hambani ngoxolo; ipambi kwoyehova indlela yenu enihamba ngayo. 
Judges18:7 Andula ahamba lomadoda mahlanu, aza kufika e‐Layishe, abona abantu abapakati kwayo, ukuba bahlala ngokunqaba, njengesiko lama‐Tsidone, bonwabile, benqabile; kwaye kungeko umpati wamandla elizweni o ba danisayo nganto; babekude kuma‐Tsidone, bengenamsebenzi n abanye abantu." 
Judges18:8 Ada afika kubazalwana bawo e‐Tsoreha nase‐Shetawoli. Baza abazalwana bawo bati kuwo: Ni ti nina? 
Judges18:9 Ayesiti: Sukani, sinyukele ngakubo; ngokuba sibonile elozwe, kekaloku bona ke, lilungile kunene: nina kanti niti tu nje! ninganqeni ukuhamba, ningene, nibambe elozwe." 
Judges18:10 Nxa nihambayo, niya kuza ebantwini abasekunqabeni, naselizweni elibanzi kakulu: ngokuba utixo elinikele esandleni senu: indawo apo kungeko kona ukusweleka kwenye into esemhlabeni." 
Judges18:11 Andula anduluka kona kwisizalwane sama‐Dane, e‐Tsoreha nase‐Shetawoli, amadoda angamakulu matandatu abinqiweyo ngezixo̔bo zokulwa." 
Judges18:12 Enyuka ke, ati waca e‐Kiriyate‐yarime, kwa‐Juda: ngako oko kwabizwa londawo ngokuti yi‐Mahane‐dane kwada kwanamhla nje; bona ke, ingasemva kwe‐Kiriyate‐yarime." 
Judges18:13 Aza agqita kona aya entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, ada afika endlwini ka‐Mika." 
Judges18:14 Andula ateta lomadoda mahlanu abehambile ukuhlola ilizwe lase‐Layishe, ati kubo abazalwana bawo: Niyazi na ukuba kuko ezindlwini ezi iyefodi, neterafi, nomfanekiso oqingqiweyo, nomfanekiso otyityishiweyo; ngako yazini kaloku, niya kwenza nto nina?" 
Judges18:15 Asuka apambukela kona, eza kuyo indlu yendodana engum‐Levi, indlu ka‐Mika, ayibuza ukupila kwayo." 
Judges18:16 Ati lomadoda angamakulu matandatu abinqiweyo ngezixo̔bo zokulwa, abengabosapo luka‐Dane, ema emnyango wesango." 
Judges18:17 Kodwa lomadoda mahlanu abehambile ukuhlola ilizwe enyuka, angena kona, atabata umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, neyefodi, neterafi, nomfanekiso otyityishiweyo: waye umperisite wema emnyango wesango kunye nalomadoda angamakulu matandatu abinqiweyo ngezixo̔bo zokulwa." 
Judges18:18 Kwa njalo la madoda angena endlwini ka‐Mika, atabata umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, neyefodi, neterafi, nomfanekiso otyityitshiweyo. Wandula umperisite wati kuwo: Nenza nto nina?" 
Judges18:19 Aza ati kuye: Yiti tu, beka isandla sako pezu kwomlomo wako, uhambe nati, ube ngubawo nomperisite kuti: kulungile na ukuba ube ngumperisite kwindlu yendoda inye, umhlaumbi ukuba ube ngumperisite kwisizwe nakwisizalwane kwa‐Sirayeli kusinina?" 
Judges18:20 Yaza yacwayita intliziyo yalomperisite; watabata iyefodi, neterafi, nomfanekiso oqingqiweyo, wangena pakati kwabantu." 
Judges18:21 Andula ajika emka, abeka intsapo, nenkomo, nendyebo, pambi kwawo." 
Judges18:22 Xeshekweni abekude wona kuyo indlu ka‐Mika, andula abizelwa ndawonye amadoda abesezindlwini ezibe zikufupi nendlu ka‐Mika, ati nama ukuputuma usapo luka‐Dane." 
Judges18:23 Aza amemeza kulo usapo luka‐Dane; olwajikisa ubuso balo, lwati ku‐Mika: Unanina, ukuba nibizelwe ndawonye?" 
Judges18:24 Wayesiti: Nitabatile otixo bam endibenzileyo, nomperisite, nemka ke; yinto nina ke endisenayo? yinto nina nalento nitshoyo ukuti: Unanina?" 
Judges18:25 Lwaza usapo luka‐Dane lwati kuye: Ilizwi lako malingaviwa pakati kwetu, hleze amadoda ampefumlo uṙaṙa aniwele, bususwe ubomi bako, nobomi babendlu yako." 
Judges18:26 Lwasuka lwahamba usapo luka‐Dane ngendlela yalo: wati u‐Mika, akubona ukuba lunamandla amakulu kwawake, wajika wabuyela endlwini yake." 
Judges18:27 Lwandula lwatabata oko abekwenzile u‐Mika, nomperisite abenaye, lweza e‐Layishe, kubo abantu abasekwonwabeni nasekunqabeni, lwababeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, lwatshisa isixeko ngomlilo." 
Judges18:28 Kwaye kungeko umsindisi, ngokuba besikude ne‐Tsidone, bebengenamsebenzi n abanye abantu kanjako; sasisemhlanjeni ongase‐Bete‐rehobi. Lwaza lwaka isixeko, lwahlala kuso." 
Judges18:29 Lwaye lubiza igama lesixeko ngokuti yi‐Dane, ngegama lika‐Dane uyise walo, obezelwe ku‐Sirayeli; kodwa beliyi‐Layishe igama lesixeko eso ngapambili." 
Judges18:30 Lwandula usapo luka‐Dane lwazipakamisela umfanekiso lowo oqingqiweyo; no‐Jonatane, unyana ka‐Gereshome, unyana ka‐Manase, yena nonyana bake baba ngabaperisite kwisizwe sama‐Dane kwada kwangumhla wokutinjwa kwelizwe." 
Judges18:31 Lwazimisela umfanekiso oqingqiweyo ka‐Mika, lowo abewenzile, yonke imihla yokubako kwendlu katixo e‐Shilo." 
Judges19:1 KWABEKUTE ngalomihla, nxa bekungeko ukumkani kwa‐Sirayeli, kwaye kuko indoda engum‐Levi ihlala njengowasemzini emacaleni entaba yakwa‐Frayime, eyazeka umfazi olishweshwe e‐Beteleheme‐juda." 
Judges19:2 Lada ishweshwe layo lahlukana nayo ngombulo, lemka kuyo laya endlwini yoyise walo, e‐Beteleheme‐juda, apo laliko kona ixesha elizinyanga ezine." 
Judges19:3 Yandula yesuka indoda yalo, yaliputuma, ize itete entliziyweni yalo, ilibuyise, inomfana wayo kunye nayo, nesibini samaqwaṙashe: laza layingenisa endlwini yoyise walo: wati uyise wenkazana akuyibona, wavuya ukuhlangana nayo." 
Judges19:4 Waza usomfazi wayo, uyise wenkazana, wayibambezela; yandula yahlala naye imihla yamitatu: badla, basela, balalisa kona." 
Judges19:5 Kwaye kute ngomhla wesine, bakuvuka kusasa, yaselisuka ukuba ihambe; koko wati uyise wenkazana kumyeni wake: Xasa intliziyo yako ngomtamo wesonka, niti kamva nihambe." 
Judges19:6 Bahlala pantsi ke, badla bobabini ndawonye, basela nokusela. Wandula wati uyise wenkazana endodeni: Kauvume ke, ulalise, iti intliziyo yako icwayite." 
Judges19:7 Kodwa yesuka indoda ukuba ihambe: waza usomfazi wayo wayiqu̔ba; ngako yabuya yalalisa kona. 
Judges19:8 Yati yakusuka kusasa ngomhla wesihlanu ukuba ihambe, wandula uyise wenkazana wati: Zuxase ke intliziyo yako. Baza bazilazila kwada kwakukumka kwemini, badla bobabini ndawonye." 
Judges19:9 Yandula yesuka indoda ukuba ihambe, yona, neshweshwe layo, nomfana wayo; koko usomfazi wayo, uyise wenkazana, wati kuyo: Bona ke, imini iza kufa, kuza kuhlwa nje, kaulalise; bona ke, imini selisangana, lalisa apa, iti intliziyo yako icwayite; nize nivuke kusasa ngomso ukuya ngendlela yenu, uhambele ententeni yako." 
Judges19:10 Kodwa indoda ibingavumi ukulalisa apo, koko yesuka yemka, yaya kwada kwamalungana ne‐Yebusi, eyi‐Yerusaleme: sasinayo isibini samaqwaṙashe enezidwashu; ishweshwe layo nalo belinayo." 
Judges19:11 Xeshekweni bebengase‐Yebusi, imini ibisangene kakulu; waza wati umfana kuyo inkosi yake: Zuhambe ke, sipambukele kwesisixeko sama‐Yebusi, silalise kuso." 
Judges19:12 Kodwa inkosi yake yati kuye: Asiyi kupambukela apa, kwisixeko solunye uhlanga, esingesesosapo luka‐Sirayeli; sesiya kudlula siye e‐Gibeha." 
Judges19:13 Yalekela yati kuye umfana wayo: Hamba, sisondele kwenye yezindawo, silalise e‐Gibeha, umhlaumbi e‐Rama." 
Judges19:14 Badlula ke, bahamba; lati ilanga labatshonela ngase‐Gibeha, eyakwa‐Benjamine." 
Judges19:15 Baza bapambukela kona, ukuba bangene balalise e‐Gibeha: yati yakungena, yahlala pantsi esitarateni sesixeko; ngokuba bekungeko umntu owabamkela endlwini yake, kulaliswe." 
Judges19:16 Kekaloku bona ke, yafika indoda endala ivela emsebenzini wayo entsimini ngokuhlwa, ebiyindoda yasentabeni yakwa‐Frayime nayo, ebihlala njengowasemzini e‐Gibeha; kodwa amadoda alomzi ebengama‐Benjamine." 
Judges19:17 Yati yakupakamisa amehlo ayo, yabona londoda ingumhambi esitarateni sesixeko; yaza yati indoda endala: Uhambela ngapina? uvela pina?" 
Judges19:18 Yayisiti kuyo: Siyadlula tina sivela e‐Beteleheme‐juda ukuya emacaleni entaba yakwa‐Frayime, endivela kona; kendahambela e‐Beteleheme‐juda; kodwa ngoku ndihambela kuyo indlu kayehova; kanti akuko mntu ondamkelayo endlwini." 
Judges19:19 Noko kuko nenca nokutya emaqwaṙasheni etu; kuko kanjalo isonka neveyine nakum, nakuso isicakakazi sako, nakuye umfana okunye nezicaka zako: akuko ukusweleka kwenye into." 
Judges19:20 Yandula indoda endala yati kuyo: Uxolo malube kuwe! kodwa konke ukuswela kwako makube pezu kwam; kupela ungalalisi esitarateni. 
Judges19:21 Yaza yayingenisa endlwini yayo, yanika amaqwaṙashe ukutya: baza bahlamba inyawo zabo, badla basela nokusela." 
Judges19:22 Nza babecwayitisa intliziyo zabo, bona ke, amadoda esosixeko, amadoda alusapo lwobunginingini, aṙaula londlu, aqongqota elucangweni, atsho kuyo indoda endala, inkosi yalondlu, ukuti: Yipumise londoda ebingenile endlwini yako, ukuze siyazi." 
Judges19:23 Yaza londoda, inkosi yalondlu, yapumela kuwo, yati kuwo: Hai, bazalwana bam! keningenzi ngokukohlakeleyo; emveni kwokuba lendoda ingenile endlwini yam, ningenzi lento ehlazekileyo." 
Judges19:24 Nantsi ke intombi yam, eyintombi ipela, neshweshwe layo; mandikupe ke bona, nize nibatobe, nenze kubo oko kulungileyo emehlweni enu; kodwa lendoda ningenzi kuyo into ehlazekileyo kangaka." 
Judges19:25 Kodwa amadoda lawo ebengavumi ukupulapula kuyo: yasuka indoda yabamba ishweshwe layo, yalikupela kuwo pandle; aza alazi, alona bonke ubusuku kwada kwasa, aliyeka ekupumeni kwesifingo." 
Judges19:26 Wandula weza umfazi lowo kwakuza kusa, wawa pantsi emnyango wendlu yalondoda, apo inkosi yake ibikona, kwada kwakanya." 
Judges19:27 Yati inkosi yake yesuka kusasa, yavula ingcango zendlu, yapuma ukuya kuhamba ngendlela yayo: kekaloku nanku umfazi, ishweshwe layo, elele pantsi emnyango wendlu, nezandla zake zipezu kwombundu." 
Judges19:28 Yayisiti kuye: Suka, sihambe. Kodwa bekungeko opendulayo. Yaza yamtabata, yambeka pezu kweqwaṙashe; yaselisuka londoda yahambela endaweni yayo." 
Judges19:29 Yati yakufika endlwini yayo, yatabata isitshetshe, yabamba ishweshwe layo, yalihlahla kunye namatambo alo libe ziziqendu ezilishumi linezibini, yalituma kuyo yonke imida yakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Judges19:30 Kwaye kute, bonke ababebona, bati: Akungabangako, akungabonwanga kanjako, okunjalo, kwa semhleni wokunyuka kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli ezweni le‐Jipete, kwada kwanamhla nje; kubekeleni intliziyo zenu, nikani icebo, nitete!" 
Judges20:1 Lwandula lwapuma lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, yati intlanganiso yahlanganiswa njengomntu mnye, ivela e‐Dane nakude kwase‐Beresheba, na kulo ilizwe le‐Gileyadi, pambi kwoyehova e‐Mitsipa." 
Judges20:2 Kanjalo inkosi zabantu bonke, e zezizwe zonke zo‐Sirayeli, zazimisa emhlambini wabantu bakatixo; amadoda ahamba ngenyawo engamawaka amakulu mane ar̔ola iṙele." 
Judges20:3 (Kekaloku usapo luka‐Benjamine lweva ukuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli lunyukele e‐Mitsipa.) Lwaza lwati usapo luka‐Sirayeli: Sixeleleni, yati nina ukubako lento ekohlakeleyo?" 
Judges20:4 Yapendula indoda engum‐Levi, indoda yomfazi obebulewe, yati: Ndafika e‐Gibeha, eyakwa‐Benjamine, mna neshweshwe lam, kuze kulaliswe." 
Judges20:5 Bandula abemi base‐Gibeha basukela ngakum, bandiṙaula endlwini ebusuku; mna bacinga ukundibulala, neshweshwe lam balitoba, lada lafa." 
Judges20:6 Ndaza ndabamba ishweshwe lam, ndalihlahla, ndalituma kulo lonke ilizwe lelifa lakwa‐Sirayeli; ngokuba benzile ubutshinitshini nokuhlazekileyo kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Judges20:7 Nanku nina nonke nilusapo luka‐Sirayeli; nikani apa ilizwi necebo! 
Judges20:8 Baza bonke abantu besuka njengomntu mnye, besiti: Asiyi kuya noko amnye ententeni yake, asiyi kupambuka noko amnye ukuya endlwini yake kanjako:" 
Judges20:9 kodwa kaloku yiyo le into esiya kuyenza ngakuyo i‐Gibeha; sonyuka ngakuyo ngeqashiso: 
Judges20:10 kanjalo socapula ishumi lamadoda ekulwini, kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, nekulu ewakeni, newaka emawakeni alishumi, ukuya kutabatela abantu ukutya, ukuba bati, bakufika e‐Gibeha yakwa‐Benjamine, benze ngako konke okuhlazekileyo ababekwenzile kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Judges20:11 Kwa njalo onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli abutelwa ngakwesosixeko, ebandakanyiwe njengomntu mnye." 
Judges20:12 Zaza izizwe zo‐Sirayeli zatuma amadoda kuso sonke isizwe sika‐Benjamine, ukuti: Yinkohlakalo enina le eyenziweyo pakati kwenu?" 
Judges20:13 Ngako kaloku kupani lomadoda, usapo lwobunginingini, ase‐Gibeha, ukuze siwafise, sikwelelise inkohlakalo kwa‐Sirayeli. Koko usapo luka‐Benjamine belungavumi ukupulapula ilizwi labazalwana balo usapo luka‐Sirayeli:" 
Judges20:14 kodwa usapo luka‐Benjamine lwabutwa ezixekweni zonke lwaya e‐Gibeha, ukuze lupumele ukulwa nosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Judges20:15 Lwaza lwabalwa usapo luka‐Benjamine ngomhla lowo luvela ezixekweni, lungamadoda angamawaka amashumi mabini anamatandatu ar̔ola iṙele, ngapandle kwabemi base‐Gibeha, ababebalwa bengamadoda anyuliweyo angamakulu asixe̔nxe." 
Judges20:16 Pakati kwababantu bonke bekuko amadoda anyuliweyo angamakulu asixe̔nxe engamanxele; onke la madoda ebenokusaula ngamatye kude kwakulo unwele, engaposi ke." 
Judges20:17 Kanjalo amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, ngapandle kwama‐Benjamine, abalwa engamadoda angamawaka amakulu mane ar̔ola iṙele; onke la ebengamadoda emfazwe." 
Judges20:18 Lwaza lwesuka usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenyuka lwaya endlwini katixo, lwabuza kutixo, lwati: Ngubanina oya kusinyukela ngokuqala, ukuya kulwa nosapo luka‐Benjamine. Wayesiti uyehova: u‐Juda wonyuka ngokuqala." 
Judges20:19 Lwaselusuka usapo luka‐Sirayeli kusasa, lwayiṙaula i‐Gibeha." 
Judges20:20 Aza amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli apumela ukulwa nama‐Benjamine; ati kanjalo amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli azicwangcisa ukulwa nawo ngase‐Gibeha. 
Judges20:21 Lwandula usapo luka‐Benjamine lwapuma e‐Gibeha, lwatshabalalisa ngasemhlabeni kuwo ama‐Sirayeli ngalomini, amadoda angamawaka amashumi mabini anamabini." 
Judges20:22 Kodwa abantu, amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, bazomeleza, babuya bazicwangcisa ukulwa endaweni apo babezicwangcisile kona ngemini yokuqala." 
Judges20:23 (Lwaye lunyuka usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lwalila pambi kwoyehova kwada kwahlwa, lwabuza kuyehova, lusiti: Ndiya kupinda na ukusondela ukulwa nosapo luka‐Benjamine umzalwana wam? Wati uyehova: Nyukani ngakuye.)" 
Judges20:24 Lwasuka usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwasondela kulo usapo luka‐Benjamine ngemini yesibini. 
Judges20:25 Aza ama‐Benjamine apuma e‐Gibeha ngakulo ngemini yesibini, atshabalalisa kanjako ngasemhlabeni kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, amadoda angamawaka alishumi linesibozo; onke la madoda ar̔ola iṙele." 
Judges20:26 Lwandula lwenyuka lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nabo bonke abantu, lwaya endlwini katixo, lwalila, lwahlala kona pambi kwoyehova, lwazila ukutya ngalomini kwada kwahlwa, lwanikela amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yoxolo pambi kwoyehova." 
Judges20:27 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabuza kuyehova, (ngokuba ibilapo ityeya yocebano lukatixo ngalomihla," 
Judges20:28 no‐Finehasi, unyana ka‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Arone, wema pambi kwayo ngalomihla,) lusiti: Ndiya kupinda kanjako ukupuma ukuya kulwa nosapo luka‐Benjamine umzalwana wam, ndiyeke kusinina? Wayesiti uyehova: Nyukani; ngokuba ngomso ndiya kumnikela esandleni sako." 
Judges20:29 Aza ama‐Sirayeli abeka abalaleli ngento engqongayo i‐Gibeha. 
Judges20:30 Lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwenyuka ngemini yesitatu ngakulo usapo luka‐Benjamine, lwazicwangcisa ngakuyo i‐Gibeha, njengakuwo amanye amaxesha." 
Judges20:31 Lwaza usapo luka‐Benjamine lwapumela ngakubo abantu, lwar̔olwa esixekweni; lwasuka lwaqala ukubeta nokubulala ebantwini, njengakuwo amanye amaxesha, emendweni, owati omnye wenyuka waya endlwini katixo, wati omnye waya e‐Gibeha ezindle, anga angamashumi matatu amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli." 
Judges20:32 Lwaye lusiti usapo luka‐Benjamine: Boyisiwe ebusweni betu njengapambili. Kodwa usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwati: Masibaleke silur̔ole esixekweni luye emendweni. 
Judges20:33 Andula onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli esuka endaweni yawo, azicwangcisa e‐Bali‐tamare: kanjalo abalaleli bama‐Sirayeli batyoboza endaweni yabo, etafeni lase‐Gibeha." 
Judges20:34 Kwaye kusiza ngakuyo i‐Gibeha amawaka alishumi amadoda anyuliweyo kuwo onke ama‐Sirayeli; kwaza ukulwa kwaba nzima: kodwa ama‐Benjamine ebengazi ukuba ububi buwafikele. 
Judges20:35 Wandula uyehova woyisa ama‐Benjamine pambi kwama‐Sirayeli; lwaye usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwatshabalalisa pakati kwama‐Benjamine ngalomini amadoda angamawaka amashumi mabini anamahlanu, anekulu ngapandle: lawo onke ar̔ola iṙele." 
Judges20:36 Kwa njalo usapo luka‐Benjamine lwabona ukuba lwoyisiwe: ngokuba amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ebenike indawo kuma‐Benjamine, ngokokuba ebetembela kubalaleli abebabekile ngakuyo i‐Gibeha." 
Judges20:37 Baza banxama abalaleli, bagaleleka pezu kwe‐Gibeha; bati abalaleli kanjalo bazitwabulula, babeta sonke isixeko ngohlangoti lweṙele." 
Judges20:38 Kekaloku bekuko ixesha elimisiweyo pakati kwamadoda akwa‐Sirayeli nabalaleli, lokuba bakwenze isiqumo esikulu somsi sinyuke esixekweni." 
Judges20:39 Ati akujika amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ekulweni, aqala ama‐Benjamine ukubeta nokubulala pakati kwamadoda akwa‐Sirayeli anga angamadoda amashumi matatu; ngokuba ebesiti: Ngenyaniso oyisiwe ebusweni betu njengasekulweni kwapambili." 
Judges20:40 Saza isiqumo saqala ukunyuka esixekweni ngentsika yomsi; ati ama‐Benjamine abeka ngasemva kwawo, kekaloku bona ke, isixeko sipela senyuka ngomsi ngasezulwini." 
Judges20:41 Ati akujika amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, andula etuswa amadoda akwa‐Benjamine; ngokuba ebebona ukuba ububi buwafikele." 
Judges20:42 Ngako ajika pambi kwamadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ngasendleleni yentlango; kodwa ukulwa kwawafumana; kanjalo lawo a wapumayo ezixekweni awatshabalalisa pakati kwawo. 
Judges20:43 Awaṙaula ama‐Benjamine, awasukela, awanyatela kamsinyane kwada kwamalungana ne‐Gibeha ngasekupumeni kwelanga." 
Judges20:44 Kwaza kwawa kuwo ama‐Benjamine amadoda angamawaka alishumi linesibozo; lawo onke ebengamadoda obuṙoti. 
Judges20:45 Ajika ke, abalekela entlango, eweni le‐Rimone: kodwa abikica kuwo emendweni amadoda angamawaka mahlanu; aza ati nama ukuwaputuma kude kwase‐Gidome, awabulala kuwo amadoda angamawaka mabini." 
Judges20:46 Kwa njalo onke abewile ngalomini kuwo ama‐Benjamine ebengamadoda angamawaka amashumi mabini anamahlanu ar̔ola iṙele; lawo onke ebengamadoda obuṙoti. 
Judges20:47 Kodwa ajika amadoda angamakulu matandatu, abalekela entlango, eweni le‐Rimone, ahlala eweni le‐Rimone inyanga zane." 
Judges20:48 Aza amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli abuyela pezu kwosapo luka‐Benjamine, alubeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, kwa namadoda asesixekweni, nenkomo, nako konke obekufunyanwa kona: kanjako zonke izixeko ezibe zifunyanwa azilahlela emlilweni." 
Judges21:1 Kekaloku amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ebefungile e‐Mitsipa, ngokuti: Akuko mntu wakuti oya kunika intombi yake ku‐Benjamine ibe ngumfazi." 
Judges21:2 Baza abantu beza endlwini katixo, bahlala kona kwada kwahlwa ebusweni bukatixo, bapakamisa ilizwi labo, balila ngokulila okukulu, bati:" 
Judges21:3 Kunganina, Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! ukuba oku kuhlile kwa‐Sirayeli, okokuba isizwe sinye singabiko namhla kwa‐Sirayeli?" 
Judges21:4 Kwaye kute ngomnye umhla, bavuka abantu kusasa, baka kona isibingelo, banikela amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yoxolo." 
Judges21:5 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwati: Ngubanina onganyukanga pakati kwomhlambi, kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, ukuza kuyehova? Ngokuba bekwenziwe isifungo esikulu ngalowo onganyukeli kuyehova e‐Mitsipa, kusitwa: Uya kufiswa ngenyaniso." 
Judges21:6 Lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwanosizi pezu kwo‐Benjamine umzalwana walo, lwati: Kunqunyulwe namhla isizwe sinye kwa‐Sirayeli:" 
Judges21:7 siya kubenzela nto nina ukuba abaseleyo babe nabafazi? ngokuba tina sifungile uyehova, ukuba singabaniki intombi zetu zibe ngabafazi." 
Judges21:8 Lwaza lwati: Sisipina kuzo izizwe zo‐Sirayeli esinganyukelanga kuyehova e‐Mitsipa? Kekaloku bona ke, bekungezanga mntu emnqubeni evela e‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi ukuza emhlambini." 
Judges21:9 Ngokuba abantu bebebalwa, kekaloku bona ke, bekungeko kona namnye wabemi base‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi." 
Judges21:10 Yandula intlanganiso yatumela kona amadoda angamawaka alishumi linamabini, kuwo amadoda obuṙoti, yawayalela ngokuti: Hambani, nibabete abemi base‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi ngohlangoti lweṙele, kwa nabafazi nabantwana." 
Judges21:11 Yiyo le indawo eniya kuyenza: onke amadoda, nabo bonke abafazi abakwazileyo ukulala nendoda, nobalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni." 
Judges21:12 Aza afumana pakati kwabemi base‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi intomb ezimakulu mane, ezazizintombi zipela, ezazingayazanga indoda ngokulala noyindoda; asuka azizisa emnqubeni e‐Shilo, esezweni le‐Kanane." 
Judges21:13 Yandula yatuma yonke intlanganiso, yateta kulo usapo luka‐Benjamine olube luseweni le‐Rimone, yashumayela kulo uxolo." 
Judges21:14 Aza ama‐Benjamine abuya ngeloxesha; baye bewanika abafazi, ababebalondolozile ebomini kuwo amankazana ase‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi; kodwa nangokunjalo bebengawaneli." 
Judges21:15 Bandula abantu banosizi pezu kwo‐Benjamine, ngokuba uyehova enzile utanda ezizweni zo‐Sirayeli." 
Judges21:16 Baza abadala bentlanganiso bati: Siya kwenza nto nina ukuba abaseleyo babe nabafazi? ngokuba amankazana etshatyalalisiwe kwa‐Benjamine. 
Judges21:17 Babuya bati: Ilifa malibe lelabasindileyo bakwa‐Benjamine, ukuze kungacitwa isizwe kwa‐Sirayeli:" 
Judges21:18 kodwa tina asingenike kubo abafazi kwintombi zetu; ngokuba lufungile usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngokuti: Makaqalekiswe onikayo umfazi ku‐Benjamine!" 
Judges21:19 Bandula bati: Bona ke, kuko umtendeleko kayehova e‐Shilo, iminyaka ngeminyaka, endaweni engasenode ye‐Betele, ngasecaleni lipuma ilanga lomendo onyukayo e‐Betele ukuya e‐Shekeme, nangasesuyide ye‐Lebona." 
Judges21:20 Baza bayalela usapo luka‐Benjamine, besiti: Hambani niye nilalele ezitiyeni zemiti yeveyine:" 
Judges21:21 nize nikangele, niti, bona ke, ukuba intombi zase‐Shilo ziyapuma ukududa ngemidudo, nandule nipume ezitiyeni zemiti yeveyine, nizibambele abanye ngabanye umfazi wabo kwintombi zase‐Shilo; nize nihambe niye ezweni lakwa‐Benjamine." 
Judges21:22 Kwakuya kuti, nxa oyise bazo, umhlaumbi abazalwana bazo, baya kuza ukumangala kuti, siya kwandula siti kubo: Sipate ngofefe ngabo; ngokuba singatabatelanga abanye ngabanye umfazi wabo ekulweni: ngokuba kungenini enibanikileyo, ukuba ngelixesha nibe netyala." 
Judges21:23 Lwati usapo luka‐Benjamine lwenje njalo, lwatabata abafazi, ngenani lalo, kwababeduda, abo lwabapangayo: lwaza lwahamba, lwabuyela elifeni lalo, lwaka izixeko, lwahlala kuzo." 
Judges21:24 Lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwemka kona ngeloxesha, lwaya olunye ngolunye kwisizwe salo nakwisizalwane salo; lwaye lupuma kona lwaya olunye ngolunye elifeni lalo." 
Judges21:25 Ngalomihla bekungeko ukumkani kwa‐Sirayeli: abanye ngabanye bakwenza okufaneleyo emehlweni abo. 
Ruth1:1 KWAYE kute emihleni bagwebayo abagwebi, kwabekuko indlala elizweni. Yaza yahamba indoda yase‐Beteleheme‐juda ukuya kupambukela ezweni le‐Mowabi, yona, nomfazi wayo, nonyana bayo bobabini." 
Ruth1:2 Igama lalondoda belingu‐Elimeleki, negama lomfazi wayo ngu‐Nahomi, namagama onyana bayo bobabini ngu‐Mahalone no‐Kiliyone, ama‐Eferata ase‐Beteleheme‐juda. Bada bafika ezweni le‐Mowabi, bahlala kona." 
Ruth1:3 Kekaloku wafa u‐Elimeleki indoda ka‐Nahomi; washiywa ke nonyana bake bobabini. 
Ruth1:4 Baza bazeka abafazi abangama‐Mowabikazi; igama lomnye ngu‐Oripa, negama lomnye ngu‐Rute: bahlala kona langa lalishumi leminyaka." 
Ruth1:5 Bada bafa u‐Mahalone no‐Kiliyone nabo bobabini; waza umfazi lowo washiywa ngonyana bake bobabini nayindoda yake. 
Ruth1:6 Wandula wesuka nomolokazana bake, ukuba abuye ezweni le‐Mowabi: ngokuba ebevile ezweni le‐Mowabi okokuba utixo ukumbule abantu bake ngokubanika ukutya." 
Ruth1:7 Ngako wapuma endaweni apo abehleli kona, nomolokazana bake bobabini kunye naye. Baza bahamba endleleni ukuya kubuyela ezweni lakwa‐Juda." 
Ruth1:8 Wandula wati u‐Nahomi kubo omolokazana bake bobabini: Hambani, nibuye niye omnye ngomnye endlwini kanyoko: wanga uyehova anganenzela ububele, njengokuba nenzele abafileyo nam:" 
Ruth1:9 wanga uyehova anganipa okokuba nifumane ukupumla, omnye ngomnye endlwini yendoda yake! Waza wabanga; koko bapakamisa ilizwi labo, balila," 
Ruth1:10 bati kuye: Ngenyaniso siya kubuya nawe ukuya ebantwini bako. 
Ruth1:11 Waza wati u‐Nahomi: Buyani, zintombi zam! kunganina ukuba niya kuhamba nam? baseko na onyana esizalweni sam, ukuba babe ngamadoda enu?" 
Ruth1:12 Buyani, zintombi zam! nihambe; ngokuba ndimdala kukuba ndibe nendoda. Nakuba bendiya kuti: Ndinetemba; nakuba bendinendoda obubusuku, ndazala onyana kanjako," 
Ruth1:13 ngenibalinda na bade bakule? ngenitintelwa ngabo na ukuze ningabi namadoda? hai, zintombi zam! ngokuba kubuṙaṙa kum kakulu ngenxa yenu, ukuba isandla sikayehova sipumele ngakum." 
Ruth1:14 Baza bapakamisa ilizwi labo balila kanjako: wati u‐Oripa wamanga unondoda wake; kodwa u‐Rute wati nama kuye. 
Ruth1:15 Wandula wati: Bona ke, umkuluwekazi wako ubuyele ebantwini bake, nakotixo bake; buya wena uye emva kwomkuluwekazi wako." 
Ruth1:16 Waza wati u‐Rute: Ungandikungi ukuba ndikushiye, ukuba ndibuye ekukulandeleni; ngokuba apo uya kona, ndiya kuya mna; nalapo ulalisa kona, ndiya kulalisa mna; abantu bako boba ngabantu bam, notixo wako woba ngutixo wam;" 
Ruth1:17 apo uya kufa kona, kwa lapo ndiya kufa mna, nalapo ndiya kuncw̔atywa: uyehova makenje njalo kum, alekele ukwenje njalo, ukuba akukukufa okuya kundahlukanisa nawe kupela!" 
Ruth1:18 Wati akubona ukuba uzomelezele ukuhamba naye, wayeka ukuteta kuye." 
Ruth1:19 Baza bahamba bobabini, bada bafika e‐Beteleheme. Kwaye kute, xeshekweni sebefikile e‐Beteleheme, sazanyazanyiswa isixeko sonke pezu kwabo, bati abantu: Nguye na u‐Nahomi lo?" 
Ruth1:20 Wayesiti kubo: Ningandibizi ngo‐Nahomi, ndibizeni ngo‐Mara: ngokuba usomandla enzile ngobuṙaṙa kum kakulu:" 
Ruth1:21 ndemka ndizele, kodwa uyehova undibuyisile ndizé: kunganina ukuba nindibiza ngo‐Nahomi, uyehova enqi̔nele ngakum nje, usomandla endenzele nje ububi?" 
Ruth1:22 Kwa njalo wabuya u‐Nahomi, no‐Rute um‐Mowabikazi, umolokazana wake, kunye naye, owabuya ezweni le‐Mowabi: baza bafika e‐Beteleheme ekuqalekeni kwokuvunwa kweṙalasi." 
Ruth2:1 KEKALOKU u‐Nahomi ebenomlamane wendoda yake, umntu omkulu ngobutyebi, owesizalwane sika‐Elimeleki; negama lake ngu‐Bohazi." 
Ruth2:2 Waza u‐Rute um‐Mowabikazi wati ku‐Nahomi: Makendiye entsimini, ndibikice pakati kwezikwebu emva kwalowo endiya kufumana ufefe emehlweni ake. Wayesiti kuye: Yiya, ntombi yam!" 
Ruth2:3 Waya ke, weza, wabikica entsimini emva kwabavuni: wati ukuhla kwake wahla wafika esahlulweni sentsimi esise sika‐Bohazi, obengowesizalwane sika‐Elimeleki." 
Ruth2:4 Kekaloku bona ke, u‐Bohazi wavela e‐Beteleheme, wati kubo abavuni: Uyehova makabe nani! Bati nakuye: Uyehova makatamsanqele wena!" 
Ruth2:5 Waza wati u‐Bohazi kwisicaka sake esasimisiwe pezu kwabavuni: Yekabanina inkazana le? 
Ruth2:6 Sapendula isicaka esasimisiwe pezu kwabavuni, sati: Yinkazana engum‐Mowabikazi, eyabuyayo no‐Nahomi ezweni le‐Mowabi;" 
Ruth2:7 yaka yati: Makendibikice ndibute pakati kwezitungu emva kwabavuni; yaselisiza ke, yamana ukubako kuseloko kwasayo kwada kwakaloku nje, wahlala endlwini umzuzwana kwapela." 
Ruth2:8 Wandula wati u‐Bohazi kuye u‐Rute: Akuvanga na, ntombi yam? Ungayi ukubikica kwenye intsimi, kanjako ungesuki ku lendawo, uti unamatele apa ndawonye nezicakazana zam:" 
Ruth2:9 amehlo ako makabe sentsimini evunwa zizo, uzilandele: andibayalelanga abafana na ukuba mabangakucukumisi? nxa unxaniweyo, yiya emipandeni, usele koko bakele kona abafana." 
Ruth2:10 Waza wawa ngobuso, waziqubuda ngasemhlabeni, wati kuye: Kunganina ukuba ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, ukuze ube nokundazi, ndingowasemzini nje?" 
Ruth2:11 Wapendula u‐Bohazi wati kuye: Kukolisile ukushunyayelwa kum konke ukwenzileyo kunondoda wako emveni kwokufa kwendoda yako; nokokuba wabushiya uyihlo nonyoko, nelizwe lokuzalwa kwako, waya ebantwini wafudula ungabazanga:" 
Ruth2:12 wanga uyehova angakuvuza ukwenza kwako! maunikwe umvuzo ozalisekileyo nguyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, lowo uze kutemba ngapantsi kwamapiko ake." 
Ruth2:13 Waza wati: Mandifumane ufefe emehlweni ako, nkosi yam! ngenxa yokuba unditutuzele, nangenxa yokuba utetile kwintliziyo yesicakakazi sako, nangona ndingenjengaso esinye sezicakakazi zako." 
Ruth2:14 Wati kanjalo u‐Bohazi kuye: Ngexesha lokudla, sondela apa, udle kwisonka, uncinde umtanyana wako kuyo iyasine. Waza wahlala pantsi ngasecaleni labavuni; wamnikela amaqashu; wadla, wahluta, wasalisa nokusalisa." 
Ruth2:15 Wati akusuka ukuya kubikica, wandula u‐Bohazi wabayalela abafana bake, esiti: Makabikice kwa pakati kwezitungu, ningamdanisi:" 
Ruth2:16 nakanjako nike nimwisele intwana yokubanjwayo zizandla, niyishiye, ayicole ke, nize ningamkalimeli." 
Ruth2:17 Kwa njalo wabikica entsimini kwada kwahlwa, wayibula into abeyicolile, yanga yayiyefa yeṙalasi." 
Ruth2:18 Wandula wayitabata, wangena esixekweni; waye unondoda wake wayibona into ebicoliwe nguye: waza wakupa, wanika kuye oko abekusalisile emva kwokuhluta kwake." 
Ruth2:19 Wayesiti unondoda wake kuye: Wabikica pina namhla? ubusebenza pina? makatanyusanqelwe lowo obenokukwazi! Waza wamshumayeza unondoda wake lowo ubesebenza naye, wati: Igama lendoda bendisebenza nayo namhla ngu‐Bohazi." 
Ruth2:20 Wandula u‐Nahomi wati kumolokazana wake: Makatanyusanqelwe yena nguyehova, ongayekanga ububele bake kubo abapilileyo nakubo abafileyo! Walekela u‐Nahomi wati kuye: Lendoda iyalamana nati, ingowabakululi betu." 
Ruth2:21 Waza wati u‐Rute um‐Mowabikazi: Kanjako, wati kum: Uya kuti nama kwizicaka zam, zide zigqibe sonke isivuno sam." 
Ruth2:22 Waza wati u‐Nahomi kuye u‐Rute umolokazana wake: Kulungile, ntombi yam! ukuba upume nezicakazana zake, baze bangahlangani nawe kwenye intsimi." 
Ruth2:23 Kwa njalo wanamatela kuzo izicakazana zika‐Bohazi, ukuba abikice, kwada kwagqitywa ukuvunwa kweṙalasi nokuvunwa kwenqolowa; wahlala ke nonondoda wake." 
Ruth3:1 WANDULA u‐Nahomi unondoda wake wati kuye: Ntombi yam! andiyi kufunela wena ukupumla na, ukuba kulunge kuwe?" 
Ruth3:2 Kekaloku u‐Bohazi, ozicakazana zake ubunazo, akanguye umlamane wetu na? Bona ke, uya kwela iṙalasi esibayeni sokubula obubusuku." 
Ruth3:3 Uti ngoko uzihlambe, uzitambise, ufake izivato zako kuwe, uhlele esibayeni eso; kodwa ungazazisi kuyo indoda leyo, ingekagqibanga ukutya nokusela." 
Ruth3:4 Kwakuya kuti, nxa ilala pantsi, uze ugqale indawo apo iya kulala kona; uze ungene, uzihlube inyawo zayo, ulale pantsi; yaiya kukutyela into uya kuyenza." 
Ruth3:5 Wayesiti kuye: Konke okutetileyo ndiya kukwenza. 
Ruth3:6 Wasuka wehla waya esibayeni sokubula, wenza ngako konke abeyalelwe ngunondoda wake." 
Ruth3:7 Kekaloku u‐Bohazi watya wasela nokusela, wati yakucwayita intliziyo yake, waya kulala pantsi esipelweni somlu: waza wangena kakuhle, wazihluba inyawo zake, walala pantsi." 
Ruth3:8 Kwaye kute ebusuku obukulu, yetuka indoda leyo, yazijikisa: kekaloku nanku umfazi elele pantsi ezinyaweni zayo." 
Ruth3:9 Yasuka yati: Ungubanina wena? Wayesiti: Ndingu‐Rute isicakakazi sako; uze wandlale isondo lengubo yako pezu kwesicakakazi sako, ngokuba wena unguye umkululi." 
Ruth3:10 Yaza yati kuye: Mautanyusanqelwe nguyehova, ntombi yam! ububele bako bokupela ubulungisile pezu kwobokuqala, ekubeni ungawalandelanga amadodana, nokuba angamahlwempu nokuba azityebi." 
Ruth3:11 Ngako kaloku, ntombi yam! ungoyiki; konke okutshoyo ndiya kukwenzela kona: ngokuba sonke isixeko sabantu bam sisazi ukuba ungumfazi otembekileyo wena." 
Ruth3:12 Nakaloku, kuyinyaniso ukuba ndingumkululi: kodwa noko kuko umkululi okufupi pezu kwam." 
Ruth3:13 Lalisa apa obubusuku, kwakuya kuti kusasa, ukuba yena wokwenzela ngesiko lomkululi, kulungile; makenze ngesiko lomkululi: kodwa ukuba akatandi ukukwenzela ngesiko lomkululi, sendiya kukwenzela ngesiko lomkululi mna, njengokuba ehleli uyehova: lala pantsi kude kuse." 
Ruth3:14 Waza walala pantsi ezinyaweni zayo kwada kwasa; wabuya wesuka, omnye engekabi nakumazi omnye. Yaza yati: Makungaziwa ukuba kuke kweza umfazi esibayeni sokubula." 
Ruth3:15 Yati kanjalo: Ete ingubo yapezulu epezu kwako, uyibambe. Wayibamba ke: yaza yazilinganisa izilinganiso ezitandatu zeṙalasi, yazibeka pezu kwake; yasuka yaya esixekweni." 
Ruth3:16 Kekaloku akufika kunondoda wake, wati yena: Ungubanina, ntombi yam? Waza wamxelela konke ibimenzele kona londoda." 
Ruth3:17 Wati kanjalo: Ezi izilinganiso zitandatu zeṙalasi yazinika kum; ngokuba ibisiti kum: Ungayi ungenanto kunondoda wako. 
Ruth3:18 Waza wati: Hlala, ntombi yam! ude wazi ukuba yoti nina ukupela lendawo: ngokuba ingasayi kupumla indoda leyo, ingekagqibanga lendawo namhla." 
Ruth4:1 WAZA u‐Bohazi wenyuka waya esangweni, wahlala pantsi apo: kekaloku bona ke, wadlula umkululi lowo u‐Bohazi ubetetile ngaye; waza wati kuye: Wa Nantsi! pambuka, uhlale pantsi apa. Wapambuka, wahlala pantsi ke." 
Ruth4:2 Wandula watabata amadoda alishumi kwabadala besixeko, wati: Hlalani pantsi apa. Ahlala pantsi ke." 
Ruth4:3 Waza wati kumkululi lowo: Isahlulo somhlaba esibe sesika‐Elimeleki umzalwana wetu, utengisile ngaso u‐Nahomi, owabuyayo ezweni le‐Mowabi:" 
Ruth4:4 ndandisiti mna: Ndiya kutyila ezindlebeni zako, ukuti: Sitenge pambi kwabemi besixeko, napambi kwabadala babantu bam: ukuba uya kusikulula, sikulule; kodwa ukuba akuyi kusikulula, ndixelele ke, ukuba ndikwazi: ngokuba kungeko mntu oya kusikulula ngapandle kwako; nam ndisemva kwako. Wayesiti: Ndiya kusikulula." 
Ruth4:5 Waza wati u‐Bohazi: Ngomhla wokutenga kwako umhlaba lowo esandleni sika‐Nahomi, wowutenga nakuye u‐Rute um‐Mowabikazi, umfazi wofileyo, ukuvusa igama lofileyo pezu kwelifa lake." 
Ruth4:6 Wandula wati umkululi lowo: Andingezikululele mna, hleze ndilonakalise ilifa lam: zikululele wena inkululo yam; ngokuba ndikohlwa ukukulula mna." 
Ruth4:7 Kekaloku eli libe li lisiko kudala, kwa‐Sirayeli, ngako ukukulula nokwanana, kuze kuqiniswe zonke izinto, lokuba war̔ola umntu isihlangu sake, wasinika kummelwane wake: bekusisinqi̔nelo kwa‐Sirayeli oku." 
Ruth4:8 Wati ngoko lomkululi ku‐Bohazi: Zuzitengele; wandula wasirola isihlangu sake. 
Ruth4:9 Waza u‐Bohazi wati kubo abadala nabo bonke abantu: Ningamanqi̔na nina namhla, okuba nditengile konke okube kukokuka‐Elimeleki, nako konke okube kukokuka‐Kiliyone nokuka‐Mahalone, esandleni sika‐Nahomi." 
Ruth4:10 Nakanjako u‐Rute um‐Mowabikazi, umfazi ka‐Mahalone, ndimtengile abe ngumfazi wam, ukuvusa igama lofileyo pezu kwelifa lake, ukuze igama lofileyo linganqanyulwa kubo abazalwana bake, nasesangweni lomzi wake: ningamanqi̔na nina namhla." 
Ruth4:11 Baza bati bonke abantu abebesesangweni, nabadala: Singamanqi̔na. Uyehova makenze lomfazi, ongenileyo endlwini yako, njengo‐Rakele nanjengo‐Leya, abati bobabini bayaka indlu ka‐Sirayeli: mauti wena wenze ubutyebi e‐Eferata, uzuze igama e‐Beteleheme:" 
Ruth4:12 nendlu yako maibe njengendlu ka‐Faretse, owazalelwa u‐Juda ngu‐Tamare, ngenzalo uyehova aya kuyinika kuwe ngomtshakazi lowo." 
Ruth4:13 Kwa njalo u‐Bohazi wamzeka u‐Rute, owaba ngumfazi wake: wati akungena kuye, uyehova wamnika ukukaula, wada wazala unyana." 
Ruth4:14 Baza abafazi bati ku‐Nahomi: Makabongwe uyehova, ongakuyekanga ungabi namkululi namhla, ukuba igama lake lidunyiswe kwa‐Sirayeli:" 
Ruth4:15 waeya kuba ngumbuyisi wobomi kuwe, nomfunzeli wobudala bako: ngokuba umolokazana wako, okutandayo, emzele, lowo olungile kuwe ngapezu kwonyana abasixe̔nxe." 
Ruth4:16 Waza u‐Nahomi watabata umntwana lowo, wambeka esifubeni sake, waba ngumondlikazi wake." 
Ruth4:17 Bati abamelwanekazi bake bamtiya igama, besiti: Kuzelwe unyana ku‐Nahomi; baye bembiza ngegama elingu‐Obedi: yena nguyise ka‐Jese, uyise ka‐Davide." 
Ruth4:18 Kekaloku ezi zizizizukulwana zika‐Faretse: u‐Faretse wazala u‐Hetserone," 
Ruth4:19 no‐Hetserone wazala u‐Rame, no‐Rame wazala u‐Haminadabi," 
Ruth4:20 no‐Haminadabi wazala u‐Nahashone, no‐Nahashone wazala u‐Salimone," 
Ruth4:21 no‐Salimone wazala u‐Bohazi, no‐Bohazi wazala u‐Obedi," 
Ruth4:22 no‐Obedi wazala u‐Jese, no‐Jese wazala u‐Davide." 
1Samuel1:1 KWABEKUKO indoda etile yase‐Ramatayime‐tsofime, yasentabeni yakwa‐Frayime, egama belingu‐Lekana, unyana ka‐Yerohame, unyana ka‐Elihu, unyana ka‐Tohu, unyana ka Tsufi, um‐Eferata:" 
1Samuel1:2 yabinabafazi ababini; igama lomnye belingu‐Hana, negama lowesibini belingu‐Penina; waye u‐Penina wayenabantwana, kodwa u‐Hana wayengenabantwana." 
1Samuel1:3 Kekaloku lendoda yenyuka esixekweni sayo, iminyaka ngeminyaka, ukuya kubedesha nokubingela uyehova wemikosi e‐Shilo: babekona onyana bobabini baka‐Heli, u‐Hofeni no‐Finehasi, abaperisite bakayehova." 
1Samuel1:4 Kwaye kute ngomhla u‐Lekana wabinga ngawo, wanika ku‐Penina umfazi wake, nakubo bonke onyana bake nentombi zake, izabelo:" 
1Samuel1:5 kanti wanika ku‐Hana isabelo esipindiweyo; ngokuba ebemtanda u‐Hana: kodwa uyehova ebevalile isizalo sake. 
1Samuel1:6 Kanjako umalanekazi wake wamcapukisa kakulu, ukuze amqumbise, ngokuba uyehova evalile isizalo sake." 
1Samuel1:7 Wenje njalo ke u‐Lekana iminyaka ngeminyaka; wati u‐Hana nxa sukuba ebenyuka ukuya endlwini kayehova, kwa njalo u‐Penina wamcapukisa; ngako walila, engadli nto." 
1Samuel1:8 Wada wati u‐Lekana, indoda yake, kuye: Hana! yinina ukuba ulile? yinina ukuba ungadli? yinina ukuba intliziyo yako inosizi? andilungile na kuwe ngapezu kwonyana abalishumi?" 
1Samuel1:9 Wandula u‐Hana wesuka, emveni kwokudliwa e‐Shilo, nasemveni kwokuselwa: (kekaloku u‐Heli, umperisite, wahlala pezu kwesihlalo ngasemgubasini wetempile kayehova:)" 
1Samuel1:10 waye u‐Hana enobuṙaṙa bompefumlo, watandaza kuyehova, walila kakulu;" 
1Samuel1:11 wabambisa ngesibambiso, wati: Yehova wemikosi! ukuba woka ukangele imbandezelwa yesicakakazi sako, undikumbule, ungalibali isicakakazi sako, uze usinike isicakakazi sako umntwana wobudoda, sendiya kumnika kuyehova ngayo yonke imihla yobomi bake; kanjalo isitshetshe sokugugula asiyi kunyuka pezu kwentloko yake." 
1Samuel1:12 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni abezingisa ukutandaza ebusweni bukayehova, wati u‐Heli wagqala umlomo wake." 
1Samuel1:13 Ngokuba u‐Hana ebeteta entliziyweni yake; umlomo wake ubushukuma kupela, ilizwi lake belingaviwa; ngako u‐Heli waba ungumnxilikazi." 
1Samuel1:14 Waza u‐Heli wati kuye: Kwoda kube ninina uya kwenza njengomnxilikazi? kwelelisa iveyine yako kuwe. 
1Samuel1:15 Kodwa wapendula u‐Hana, wati: Hai, nkosi yam! ndingumfazi ompefumlo unzima; andiselanga neveyine notywala; kodwa nditulule umpefumlo wam pambi kwoyehova." 
1Samuel1:16 Ungabali isicakakazi sako ukuba yintombi yobunginingini; ngokuba kungobuninzi besikalazo sam nokatazo lwam enditetileyo kwada kwakaloku. 
1Samuel1:17 Wandula wapendula u‐Heli, wati: Hamba ngoxolo: wanga utixo wo‐Sirayeli angakunika isicelo sako, osicelileyo kuye." 
1Samuel1:18 Wayesiti: Isicakakazi sako masifumane ufefe emehlweni ako! Waza wahamba umfazi lowo ngendlela yake, wadla ke; kanjalo ubuso bake bebungasenjalo kuye." 
1Samuel1:19 Baza bavuka kwa kusasa, babedesha ebusweni bukayehova, babuya, beza endlwini yabo e‐Rama. Waye u‐Lekana wamazi u‐Hana umfazi wake; wati uyehova wamkumbula." 
1Samuel1:20 Kwabekute ekupeleni kwemihla etile, wandula u‐Hana wakaula, wazala unyana, wabiza igama lake ngo‐Samyali: ngokuba, wabesitsho, ndimcelile kuyehova." 
1Samuel1:21 Yaza yenyuka indoda leyo, u‐Lekana, nayo yonke indlu yayo, ukuya kubingela uyehova umbingo womnyaka ngomnyaka, nesibambiso sake." 
1Samuel1:22 Kodwa u‐Hana ebengenyuki; ngokuba ebesiti kuyo indoda yake: Ndohlala ade umntwana alunyulwe, ndandiya kwandula ndimzise, aze abonakale ebusweni bukayehova, ahlale kona kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Samuel1:23 Waza u‐Lekana, indoda yake, wati kuye: Yenza okulungileyo emehlweni ako; hlala ude umlumle; kodwa uyehova makaliqinise ilizwi lake. Kwa njalo wahlala umfazi lowo, wanyisa unyana wake, wada wamlumla." 
1Samuel1:24 Wati akuba emlumlile, wamnyusa kunye naye, enenkatyana zintatu, neyefa inye yomgubo, nentsuba yeveyine, wamzisa endlwini kayehova e‐Shilo: waye umntwana ebesemtsha." 
1Samuel1:25 Baza baxe̔la inkatyana, bamzisa umntwana ku‐Heli." 
1Samuel1:26 Wayesiti: Ke, nkosi yam! bomi bompefumlo wako, nkosi yam! ndingulamfazi owemayo ngakuwe apa, etandaza kuyehova." 
1Samuel1:27 Ndatandazela umntwana lo, wati uyehova wandinika isicelo sam ebendisicela kuye." 
1Samuel1:28 Ngako nam ndimbolekile uyehova; ngayo yonke imihla uya kubako ngayo wobolekwa uyehova. Waza umntwana wambedesha kona uyehova. 
1Samuel2:1 Wandula u‐Hana watandaza, wati: Intliziyo yam iyagcoba ngoyehova; upondo lwam lupakanyisiwe ngoyehova: umlomo wam uvulekile kakulu pezu kwentshaba zam; ngokuba ndivuya ngako ukusindisa kwako." 
1Samuel2:2 Akuko oyingcwele njengoyehova; ngokuba kungeko namnye ngapandle kwako; akuko olilityekazi njengotixo wetu. 
1Samuel2:3 Ningandisi ukuteta okulir̔atshi kakulu; makungapumi okulukuni emlonyeni wenu: ngokuba uyehova e ngutixo wokwazi; ziti izenzo zilinganiswe nguye. 
1Samuel2:4 Isipeta samagoṙa siqekekile; nabo baku̔bekayo babinqiwe ngamandla. 
1Samuel2:5 Ababehluti baziqashisele isonka, nabo balambayo bapelile; kwada kwazala udlolo abasixe̔nxe, nobenabantwana abaninzi wabuna." 
1Samuel2:6 Uyehova uyafisa, uyenza kudliwe ubomi kanjalo; uyahlisela esihogweni, nyanyusa kanjako." 
1Samuel2:7 Uyehova uyahlwempuzisa, uyatyebisa kanjalo; uyatobisa, uyapakamisa kanjako." 
1Samuel2:8 Uyasukisa olihlwempu elutulini, uyapakamisa osweleyo enkunkumeni, abahlalise nenkosi, enze babe zindlalifa zesihlalo sobungcwalisa; ngokuba intsika zomhlaba zize zikayehova, ubekile umhlaba pezu kwazo." 
1Samuel2:9 Uya kugcina inyawo zabangcwele bake, kanti abakohlakeleyo baya kuti cwaka ebumnyameni; ngokuba umntu engayi kweyisa ngamandla." 
1Samuel2:10 Abapikayo noyehova baya kuqekezwa; kwa sezulwini uya kududumisa pezu kwabo; uyehova uya kugweba izipelo zomhlaba, anike ukumkani wake amandla, apakamise upondo lwomtanjiswa wake." 
1Samuel2:11 Wasuka u‐Lekana waya e‐Rama, endlwini yake: kodwa umntwana ebekonza uyehova ebusweni buka‐Heli umperisite." 
1Samuel2:12 KEKALOKU onyana baka‐Heli bebelusapo lwobunginingini; babengamazi uyehova. 
1Samuel2:13 Kanjalo isiko labaperisite ngakubo abantu, kwati kwakubinga umntu umbingo, sandula isicaka somperisite, nxa inyama ibisapekwa, seza neforoke inamazinyo amatatu esandleni saso," 
1Samuel2:14 sahlaba ngaso elukambeni, umhlaumbi eketileni, umhlaumbi engxaweni, umhlaumbi embizeni; konke ibikunyusa iforoke, watabata umperisite oko kube kokwake. Benje njalo ke e‐Shilo kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli abezayo kona." 
1Samuel2:15 Kanjako kungekatshiswa inqata, seza isicaka somperisite, sati kulamntu owabingayo: Nika inyama, yojelwe umperisite; ngokuba engayi kwamkela kuwe inyama epekiweyo, kodwa eṙwada." 
1Samuel2:16 Ukuba lowamntu wati kuso: Mabagqibele ukutshisa inqata kaloku nje, wandule uzitabatele njengokukanuka kwompefumlo wako; sandula sati kuye: Hai, uya kunika ngoku; nokuba akuyi kwenje njalo, ndoyisusa ngamandla." 
1Samuel2:17 Kwa njalo isono salomadodana besikulu kakulu ebusweni bukayehova; ngokuba abantu bebedela umnikelo wokudla kayehova. 
1Samuel2:18 Waye u‐Samyali wakonza pambi kwoyehova, esengumntwana, ebinqiwe ngeyefodi yeqiya." 
1Samuel2:19 Waye nonina wamenzela ingubo encinane, wayizisa kuye iminyaka ngeminyaka, akunyuka nendoda yake ukuza kubinga umbingo womnyaka ngomnyaka." 
1Samuel2:20 Waza u‐Heli watamsanqelisa u‐Lekana nomfazi wake, wati: Uyehova makakunike inzalo ngalomfazi esikundleni salombolekwa ebolekwayo uyehova. Basuka baya emzini wake." 
1Samuel2:21 Wandula uyehova wakumbula u‐Hana, ukuba wakaula, wada wazala onyana abatatu nentombi ezimbini. Wati umntwana, u‐Samyali, wakula ngapambi kwoyehova." 
1Samuel2:22 Kekaloku u‐Heli ebemdala kakulu; waza weva konke onyana bake ababekwenza kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli; nokokuba balala namankazana abekonza emnyango wentente yentlangano. 
1Samuel2:23 Wayesiti kubo: Yinina ukuba nenze izinto ezinjalo? ngokuba ndisiva imikwa yenu ekohlakeleyo ngabo bonke ababantu. 
1Samuel2:24 Hai, bonyana bam! ngokuba zingezizo indaba ezilungileyo endizivayo; niyenza ukuba abantu bakayehova bagqite." 
1Samuel2:25 Ukuba omnye umntu uyona ngakuye omnye, abagwebi baya kumgweba; kodwa ukuba umntu uyona ngakuye uyehova, ngubanina oya kumtandazela? Abapulapula ilizwi loyise wabo noko; ngokuba uyehova ebetanda ukubafisa." 
1Samuel2:26 Waye umntwana, u‐Samyali, wamana ekula, wabukwa nanguye uyehova, nangabo abantu." 
1Samuel2:27 Kwaza kwafika indoda katixo ku‐Heli, yati kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Kanene ndibe ndibonakala ekuhleni kuyo indlu yoyihlo na, nxa babeko e‐Jipete, endlwini ka‐Faro?" 
1Samuel2:28 ndabendimnyula na kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli abe ngumperisite wam, aze anikele pezu kwesibingelo sam, aqumise isiqumiso, ambate iyefodi ebusweni bam? kanjalo bendinika na indlu yoyihlo yonke iminikelo eyenziwa ngomlilo yosapo luka‐Sirayeli?" 
1Samuel2:29 kunganina ukuba nikabe ngakuwo umbingo wam nangakuwo umnikelo wokudla wam, endiwuyaleleyo entlalweni yam; nokuba ubeke onyana bako pezu kwam, nize nizityebise ngezinqabileyo izinto zayo yonke iminikelo yokudla yabantu bam o‐Sirayeli?" 
1Samuel2:30 Ngako oko uti uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli: Bendisitsho ngenyaniso, ukuba indlu yako, nendlu yoyihlo, iya kuhamba ebusweni bam kude kube ngunapakade; kodwa ngoku uyehova uti: Makube le kum oko! ngokuba abo bandibekayo ndiya kubabeka, nabo bandicekisayo baya kudelwa." 
1Samuel2:31 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, ukuba ndiya kunqumla ingalo yako, nengalo yayo indlu yoyihlo, ukuze kungabiko indoda endala kuyo indlu yako." 
1Samuel2:32 Wauya kubona imbandezeko yentlalo ka‐Tixo, endaweni yako konke okulungileyo abeya kukwenza ko‐Sirayeli; kwaye kungayi kubako indoda endala kuyo indlu yako napakade." 
1Samuel2:33 Kodwa indoda, endingayi kukunqamlela yona esibingelweni sam, yoba yeyokugqibela amehlo ako, neyokuxalisa umpefumlo wako; kanjalo konke ukwanda kwendlu yako, baya kufa besengamadoda." 
1Samuel2:34 Oku kwoba ngumqondiso kuwe, okuya kuza pezu kwonyana bako ababini, u‐Hofeni no‐Finehasi: emhleni mnye baya kufa bobabini." 
1Samuel2:35 Ndandiya kuzivusela umperisite onyanisekileyo, o ya kwenza njengoko kusentliziyweni yam nasempefumlweni wam: yena ndiya kumakela indlu eqinileyo: waeya kuhamba pambi kwomtanjiswa wam imihla yonke." 
1Samuel2:36 Kwakuya kuti, osukuba esele kuyo indlu yako, uya kuza aziqubude pambi kwake ngenxa yeqosha lesilivere nesimba lesonka, ati: Kaundibeke komnye wemisebenzi yabaperisite, ukuba ndidle umtamo wesonka." 
1Samuel3:1 KEKALOKU umfana, u‐Samyali, wamkonza uyehova ebusweni buka‐Heli. Laye ilizwi likayehova linqabile ngezontsuku; bekungeko umboniso wasekuhleni." 
1Samuel3:2 Kwaye kute ngeloxesha, nxa u‐Heli ebelele pantsi endaweni yake, akuqala amehlo ake ukuba luzizi, ukuba wakohlwa kukubona," 
1Samuel3:3 kungekacinywa isibane sikatixo, na nxa u‐Samyali abelele pantsi etempileni kayehova, apo ityeya katixo ibikona," 
1Samuel3:4 wandula uyehova wambiza u‐Samyali; owabesiti: Nanku ndi lapa. 
1Samuel3:5 Waza wagidimela ku‐Heli, wati: Nanku ndi lapa: ngokuba undibizile. Kodwa wati: Andibizanga; buya ulale pantsi. Waya walala pantsi ke." 
1Samuel3:6 Walekela uyehova wabiza u‐Samyali kanjako. Wesuka u‐Samyali waya ku‐Heli, wati: Nanku ndi lapa; ngokuba undibizile. Waza wati: Andibizanga, nyana wam! buya ulale pantsi." 
1Samuel3:7 Kekaloku u‐Samyali ebengekamazi uyehova; kanjako ilizwi likayehova belingekatyilwa kuye. 
1Samuel3:8 Wabuya uyehova wabiza u‐Samyali ngokwesitatu. Wesuka waya ku‐Heli, wati: Nanku ndi lapa; ngokuba undibizile. Waza u‐Heli waqonda ukuba uyehova umbizile umfana." 
1Samuel3:9 Ngako u‐Heli wati ku‐Samyali: Yiya ulale pantsi; kwakuya kuti, nxa akubizayo, uya kwandul’ ukuti: Teta, Yehova! ngokuba isicaka sako sisiva. Waya u‐Samyali walala pantsi endaweni yake." 
1Samuel3:10 Wandula weza uyehova, wema, wabiza njengakuwo amanye amaxesha, esiti: Samyali, Samyali! Waza wati u‐Samyali: Teta; ngokuba isicaka sako sisiva." 
1Samuel3:11 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Samyali: Bona ke, ndiya kuyenza into kwa‐Sirayeli, abaya kuti bonke abayivayo, indlebe zabo zombini ziya kukenceza." 
1Samuel3:12 Ngomhla lowo ndiya kuvusa ngakuye u‐Heli konke endikutetileyo ngayo indlu yake; ndoti ndakuqala, ndigqibe." 
1Samuel3:13 Sendixele kuye, ukuba ndiya kugweba indlu yake kude kube ngunapakade, ngenxa yenkohlakalo abeyazi; ngokuba onyana bake bazenza abaqalekisiweyo, kanti ebengabandwebisi noko." 
1Samuel3:14 Ngako oko ke ndifungile ngayo indlu ka‐Heli, ukuba inkohlakalo yendlu ka‐Heli ayisayi kuxoliselwa ngombingo nangomnikelo wokudla kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Samuel3:15 Kekaloku u‐Samyali walala kwada kwasa, waza wavula ingcango zendlu kayehova. Kodwa u‐Samyali ebesoyika ukuxela umboniso ku‐Heli." 
1Samuel3:16 Wandula u‐Heli wambiza u‐Samyali, wati: Samyali, nyana wam! Wayesiti: Nanku ndi lapa." 
1Samuel3:17 Waza wati: Lilizwi linina, alitetileyo kuwe? zungandifihleli ke; utixo makenje njalo kuwe, alekele ukwenje njalo, ukuba uyandifihlela ilizwi kuwo onke amazwi abewateta kuwe." 
1Samuel3:18 Waza u‐Samyali wamxelela onke amazwi lawo, akamfihlela nto. Wayesiti: Nguyehova; makenze okulungileyo emehlweni ake." 
1Samuel3:19 Wakula ke u‐Samyali; waye uyehova ebenaye; akawisa nalinye kuwo onke amazwi ake ngasemhlabeni. 
1Samuel3:20 Baza bonke o‐Sirayeli, kwa se‐Dane kude kwase‐Beresheba, bakwazi ukuba u‐Samyali uqiniselwe ukuba ngumprofite kayehova." 
1Samuel3:21 Walekela uyehova wabonakala e‐Shilo: ngokuba uyehova ebezityila ku‐Samyali e‐Shilo ngelizwi likayehova. 
1Samuel4:1 Laye ilizwi lika‐Samyali leza kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli. KEKALOKU o‐Sirayeli bapumela ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya kuliwe, baya bati waca ngase‐Ebenezere; kanjalo ama‐Filistiya ati waca e‐Afeki." 
1Samuel4:2 Asuka ama‐Filistiya azicwangcisa ngakubo o‐Sirayeli: kwati kwakuba ukulwa bekutwabulukile, o‐Sirayeli bebebetwa pambi kwama‐Filistiya: aza abulala ebandleni ezindle ngati angamawaka mane amadoda." 
1Samuel4:3 Bandula bakufika abantu emnqubeni, bati abadala bakwa‐Sirayeli: Kunganina ukuba uyehova usibetile namhla pambi kwama‐Filistiya? Masizizekele e‐Shilo ityeya yocebano lukayehova, ize pakati kwetu, isisindise esandleni sentshaba zetu." 
1Samuel4:4 Baza abantu batumela e‐Shilo, basusa kona ityeya yocebano lukayehova wemikosi, ohleli pakati kwekerubime: baye bekona onyana bobabini baka‐Heli, u‐Hofeni no‐Finehasi, ndawonye netyeya yocebano lukatixo." 
1Samuel4:5 Kwaye kute, yakufika ityeya yocebano lukayehova emnqubeni, bonke o‐Sirayeli bamemeza ngesimemezo esikulu, wada umhlaba wazanyazanyiswa." 
1Samuel4:6 Xeshekweni ama‐Filistiya evayo intlokoma yesimemezo eso, ati: Iti nina intlokoma yesisimemezo esikulu emnqubeni wama‐Hebere? Ada aqonda ukuba ityeya kayehova ifikile emnqubeni." 
1Samuel4:7 Aza ama‐Filistiya oyika, ngokuba ebesiti: Utixo ufikile emnqubeni. Ayesiti: Au tina! ngokuba kungezanga kubeko okunjalo ngexesha lapambili:" 
1Samuel4:8 au tina! ngubanina oya kusihlangula esandleni sotixo aba abanamandla? ngabo aba otixo ababeta ama‐Jipete ngazo zonke izibeto entlango. 
1Samuel4:9 Yomelelani, nenze njengamadoda, ma‐Filistiya! ukuze ningakonzi kuma‐Hebere, njengokuba ekonzile kuni: ngako yenzani njengamadoda, nilwe ke." 
1Samuel4:10 Asuka ama‐Filistiya alwa; baza o‐Sirayeli babetwa, besaba baya abanye ngabanye ezintenteni zabo: kwabako isibulalo esikulu kunene; bada bawa kubo o‐Sirayeli amawaka angamashumi matatu abahamba ngenyawo." 
1Samuel4:11 Kanjako ityeya katixo yasuswa; nonyana bobabini baka‐Heli, u‐Hofeni no‐Finehasi, babuba." 
1Samuel4:12 Yandula yabaleka indoda yakwa‐Benjamine ebandleni, yeza e‐Shilo ngalomini, inengubo zayo ziṙazukile, nomhlaba pezu kwentloko yayo." 
1Samuel4:13 Kekaloku, yakufika, bona ke, u‐Heli wahlala pezu kwesihlalo ngasecaleni lendlela, elinda nje; ngokuba intliziyo yake ibingcangcazela ngenxa yetyeya katixo. Yati yakufika indoda leyo, ukuza kuxela esixekweni, sand’ ukukala sonke isixeko." 
1Samuel4:14 Xeshekweni u‐Heli wevayo intlokoma yokukala, wati: Iti nina intlokoma yalempitimpiti? Yaza indoda yangena ngokunxama, yamxelela u‐Heli." 
1Samuel4:15 Kekaloku u‐Heli wabeminyaka emashumi alitoba anesibozo ubudala bake; kanjalo amehlo ake ebete nqi, ukuba wakohlwa kukubona." 
1Samuel4:16 Yayisiti indoda ku‐Heli: Ndinguye ovele ebandleni, ndisabile ebandleni namhla. Waza wati: Yinto nina ehlileyo, nyana wam?" 
1Samuel4:17 Wapendula obeshumayela, wati: o‐Sirayeli besabile pambi kwama‐Filistiya; kanjako bekuko nesibulalo esikulu pakati kwabantu; nonyana bako bobabini, u‐Hofeni no‐Finehasi, babubile nabo; netyeya Katixo yona isusiwe." 
1Samuel4:18 Kwabekute, nxa abekankanya ityeya katixo, wandula wawa esihlalweni ngomva, ngasecaleni lesango, yati intamo yake yapuka, wada wafa; ngokuba ebelixego, wayenzima kanjalo. Wayegweba o‐Sirayeli iminyaka yamashumi mane." 
1Samuel4:19 Kekaloku umolokazana wake, umfazi ka‐Finehasi, wabemiti, waza kuzala; wati akuva indaba zokuba ityeya katixo isusiwe, nokuba ufile usondoda wake, nendoda yake, wandula watoba, wazala, ngokuba inimba zake bezijikajika pakati kwake." 
1Samuel4:20 Kute ngexesha lokufa kwake, bateta abafazi abebemi ngakuye, besiti: Ungoyiki, ngokuba uzele unyana. Kodwa ebengapenduli, ebengabekeli intliziyo yake kanjako." 
1Samuel4:21 Wambiza umntwana ngo‐Yikabode, esiti: Ubungcwalisa bufudusiwe kwa‐Sirayeli; ngenxa yokususwa kwetyeya katixo, nangenxa yosondoda wake nendoda yake." 
1Samuel4:22 Wayesiti: Ubungcwalisa bufudusiwe kwa‐Sirayeli; ngokuba ityeya katixo isusiwe. 
1Samuel5:1 AZA ama‐Filistiya atabata ityeya katixo, esuka nayo e‐Ebenezere eza e‐Ashedode." 
1Samuel5:2 Ati ama‐Filistiya akususa ityeya katixo, ayizisa endlwini ka‐Dagone, ayimisa ngakuye u‐Dagone." 
1Samuel5:3 Kute xeshekweni ama‐Ashedode avuka kusasa ngomnye umhla, nanku u‐Dagone ewile ebusweni bake ngasemhlabeni, pambi kwetyeya Kayehova. Aza amtabata u‐Dagone, ambuyisela endaweni yake." 
1Samuel5:4 Ati akuvuka kusasa ngomso womhla olandelayo, nanku u‐Dagone ewile ebusweni bake ngasemhlabeni, pambi kwetyeya kayehova, nentloko ka‐Dagone, nentende zezandla zake zombini zinqumkile, zisemnyango; kupela sisikondo sika‐Dagone esamshiyelwa." 
1Samuel5:5 Ngako oko abaperisite baka‐Dagone, nabo bonke abangenayo endlwini ka‐Dagone, abanyatelanga pezu kwomnyango ka‐Dagone e‐Ashedode kwada kwanamhla nje." 
1Samuel5:6 Koko isandla sikayehova besinzima pezu kwama‐Ashedode, wawatshabalalisa, wawabeta ngamatumba, i‐Ashedode nemida yayo." 
1Samuel5:7 Xeshekweni amadoda ase‐Ashedode abona ukuba kunje ke, ati: Ityeya katixo wo‐Sirayeli maingahlali nati, ngokuba isandla sake silukuni pezu kwetu, napezu kwo‐Dagone utixo wetu." 
1Samuel5:8 Ngako atuma ahlanganisela kuwo zonke inkosi zama‐Filistiya, ati: Siya kwenza nto nina ngetyeya katixo wo‐Sirayeli? Zaye zisiti: Ityeya katixo wo‐Sirayeli maijikele e‐Gate. Asuka ayijikisela kona ityeya katixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
1Samuel5:9 Kwaye kute, emveni kwokuba ayijikisele kona, isandla sikayehova besingakuso isixeko eso ngesipitipiti esikulu kunene; ngokuba wabeta abantu besosixeko, kwa nabancinane nabakulu, aza ajaduka kubo amatumba." 
1Samuel5:10 Kwaza kwatunywa ityeya katixo ukuya e‐Hekrone. Kwabekute, yakufika ityeya katixo e‐Hekrone, akala ama‐Hekrone, esiti: Kujikiselwe kum ityeya katixo wo‐Sirayeli, ize ibulale mna nabantu bam." 
1Samuel5:11 Andula atuma ahlanganisa zonke inkosi zama‐Filistiya, ati: Yindululeni ityeya katixo wo‐Sirayeli, ibuyele endaweni yayo, ukuze ingabulali mna nabantu bam: ngokuba bekuko isipitipiti esibulalayo esixekweni sonke; isandla sikatixo besinzima kakulu kona." 
1Samuel5:12 Bati abantu abebengafi, babetwa ngamatumba: sada isikalo sesixeko eso senyuka ngasezulwini." 
1Samuel6:1 Yabiko ityeya kayehova ezweni lama‐Filistiya inyanga zasixe̔nxe. 
1Samuel6:2 Andula ama‐Filistiya abiza abaperisite bawo nabalauli bawo, esiti: Siya kwenza nto nina ngetyeya kayehova? nisazise kunganto nina esiya kuyindulula iye endaweni yayo?" 
1Samuel6:3 Baye besiti: Ukuba niyayindulula ityeya katixo wo‐Sirayeli, ningandululi yona ize; seniya kuqinisa ukubuyisela kuye idini letyala; oko niya kupiliswa, naniya kwaziswa ukuba kunganina isandla sake singashenxi kuni." 
1Samuel6:4 Aza ati: Lilipina idini letyala esiya kulibuyisela kuye? Baye besiti: Ngamatumba amahlanu egolide, nempuku ezintlanu zegolide, ngenani lenkosi zama‐Filistiya: ngokuba sisibeto sinye esasipezu kwenu nonke, napezu kwenkosi zenu." 
1Samuel6:5 Ngako yenzani imifanekiso yamatumba enu, nemifanekiso yempuku zenu ezilonakalisayo ilizwe, ninike ubungcwalisa kutixo wo‐Sirayeli: kungaba uya kwenza isandla sake sibe lula pezu kwenu, napezu kwotixo wenu, napezu kwelizwe lenu." 
1Samuel6:6 Yinina ke ukuba nizenza nzima intliziyo zenu, njengokuba ama‐Jipete no‐Faro bazenza nzima intliziyo zabo? Kanene okuya abenzile ngokungummangaliso pakati kwabo, babengabandululi na, bada bemka?" 
1Samuel6:7 Ngako kaloku, yenzani inqwelo entsha ibe nye, nitabate imazana zibe mbini ezanyisayo, ekunganyukanga pezu kwazo iyokwe, nibope imazana enqwelweni, nibuyise amatole azo emva kwazo ziye ekaya:" 
1Samuel6:8 nandule nitabate ityeya kayehova, niyibeke enqwelweni; nempahla zegolide, enizibuyisela kuye zibe lidini letyala, nizifake ekesteni ngasecaleni layo; nize niyindulule, imke:" 
1Samuel6:9 naniya kubona ke; ukuba iyanyuka ngendlela yomda wayo ukuya e‐Bete‐shemeshe, nguye osenzele elilishwa elikulu; kodwa ukuba aku njalo, sesiya kwazi ukuba asi sisandla sake esisibetileyo; sisihlo esibe sihlelwa siso." 
1Samuel6:10 Kekaloku amadoda lawo enje njalo: atabata imazana zambini ezanyisayo, azibopa enqwelweni, namatole azo awavalela ekaya;" 
1Samuel6:11 aza abeka ityeya kayehova enqwelweni, nekeste, nempuku zegolide, nemifanekiso yamatumba awo." 
1Samuel6:12 Zasuka imazana zaya ngokuti ngqo endleleni, ngasendleleni esinga e‐Bete‐shemeshe, zahamba ngomendo umnye zimana zilila, zingapambukeli ngasekunene nangasekohlo; zati inkosi zama‐Filistiya zahamba emva kwazo kude kwakuwo umda wase‐Bete‐shemeshe." 
1Samuel6:13 Kekaloku abantu base‐Bete‐shemeshe bebevuna ukuvunwa kwenqolowa emhlanjeni; baza bapakamisa amehlo abo, babona ityeya, bavuya bakuyibona." 
1Samuel6:14 Yada inqwelo yeza entsimini ka‐Yoshuwa, um‐Bete‐shemeshe, yema kona, apo beliko ilitye elikulu; baza bacanda imiti yenqwelo, nemazana bazinikela zibe lidini lokutshiswa kuyehova." 
1Samuel6:15 Ngokuba aba‐Levi batula ityeya kayehova, nekeste ebinayo, leyo impahla zegolide bezikuyo, bazibeka pezu kwelolitye likulu: andula amadoda ase‐Bete‐shemeshe anikela amadini okutshiswa abinga nemibingo ngalomini kuyehova." 
1Samuel6:16 Zati zakuba inkosi ezintlanu zama‐Filistiya zibonile oku, zabuyela e‐Hekrone ngalomini." 
1Samuel6:17 Ngawo la amatumba egolide, ama‐Filistiya abewabuyisa abe lidini letyala Kuyehova: ele‐Ashedode linye, ele‐Gaza linye, ele‐Ashekelone linye, ele‐Gate linye, ele‐Hekrone linye;" 
1Samuel6:18 nempuku zegolide ngenani lazo zonke izixeko zama‐Filistiya, ezenkosi ezintlanu, kwa nezixeko ezinqatyisiweyo nemizana yapandle, nakude kwakulo ilitye elikulu, elo bahlalisa ityeya kayehova pezu kwalo, elikoyo nanamhla nje entsimini ka‐Yoshuwa um‐Bete‐shemeshe." 
1Samuel6:19 Waza wabeta amadoda ase‐Bete‐shemeshe, ngokokuba ebekangele etyeyeni kayehova; wabeta ke pakati kwabantu amadoda angamashumi asixe̔nxe, n amadoda angamawaka angamashumi mahlanu. Basuka abantu balila, ngokuba uyehova ebetile pakati kwabantu ngesibulalo esikulu." 
1Samuel6:20 Andula ati amadoda ase‐Bete‐shemeshe: Ngubanina onamandla ukuma ebusweni bukayehova, lotixo oyingcwele? kanjako uya kunyukela kubanina ukunyuka kuti." 
1Samuel6:21 Aza atuma izigidimi kubo abemi base‐Kiriyate‐yarime, ukuti: ama‐Filistiya abuyisile ityeya kayehova; yihlani, niyinyusele kuni." 
1Samuel7:1 Asuka eza amadoda ase‐Kiriyate‐yarime, enyuka nayo ityeya kayehova, ayingenisa endlwini ka‐Abinadabi e‐Gibeha; no‐Elezari, unyana wake, amngcwalisa ukuba agcine ityeya kayehova." 
1Samuel7:2 KWAYE kute, nxa ityeya yabisahlala e‐Kiriyate‐yarime, yakuba imihla isel’ imininzi; ngokuba ibiyiminyaka ingamashumi mabini; yandula yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli yalila emva kwoyehova." 
1Samuel7:3 Waza u‐Samyali wateta kuyo yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli, esiti: Ukuba niyabuyela kuyehova ngayo yonke intliziyo yenu, kwelelisani otixo basemzini pakati kwenu, no‐Hashetorete, nibekise intliziyo yenu kuyehova, nimkonze yena yedwa; waeya kunihlangula esandleni sama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel7:4 Lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwakwelelisa o‐Bali no‐Hashetorete, lwamkonza uyehova yedwa." 
1Samuel7:5 Wati u‐Samyali kanjalo: Bahlanganiseni o‐Sirayeli bonke beze e‐Mitsipa, ndandiya kunitandazela kuyehova." 
1Samuel7:6 Baza bahlanganiselwa e‐Mitsipa, baka amanzi, bawatulula pambi kwoyehova, bazila ukutya ngalomini, bati kona: Sonile ngakuye uyehova. Waye u‐Samyali wagweba usapo luka‐Sirayeli e‐Mitsipa." 
1Samuel7:7 Ati akuva ama‐Filistiya ukuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli luhlanganiselwe e‐Mitsipa, zandula inkosi zama‐Filistiya zenyuka ngakubo o‐Sirayeli, Nxa usapo luka‐Sirayeli luvile oku, lwanokwoyika ngenxa yama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel7:8 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwati ku‐Samyali: Ungayeki ukusikalela kuyehova, utixo wetu, ukuze asisindise esandleni sama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel7:9 Wandula u‐Samyali watabata imvana nye eyanyayo, wayinikela ipela ibe lidini lokutshiswa kuyehova: waye u‐Samyali wakalela o‐Sirayeli kuyehova; wati uyehova wampulapula." 
1Samuel7:10 Kwaye kute, akuba u‐Samyali ebenikela elodini lokutshiswa, ama‐Filistiya asondela ukulwa no‐Sirayeli: kodwa uyehova wadudumisa ngodudumo olukulu ngalomini pezu kwama‐Filistiya, wawapitizelisa; ada oyiswa pambi kwo‐Sirayeli." 
1Samuel7:11 Aza amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli apuma e‐Mitsipa, awaputuma ama‐Filistiya, awabeta kude kwasezantsi kwe‐Bete‐kare." 
1Samuel7:12 Wandula u‐Samyali watabata ilitye linye, walimisa pakati kwe‐Mitsipa ne‐Shene, walibiza ngegama eliyi‐Ebenezere, esiti: Kude kwalapa Uyehova usincedile." 
1Samuel7:13 Kwa njalo ama‐Filistiya atotyiswa; akasapinda ukuza emdeni wakwa‐Sirayeli: ngokuba isandla sikayehova besingakuwo ama‐Filistiya yonke imihla ka‐Samyali. 
1Samuel7:14 Kwaza kwabuyiselwa ko‐Sirayeli izixeko ezibe zitinjiwe ngama‐Filistiya ko‐Sirayeli, kwa kuyo i‐Hekrone kude kwakuyo i‐Gate; nemida yazo bayihlangula o‐Sirayeli esandleni sama‐Filistiya. Kanjako bekuko uxolo pakati kwo‐Sirayeli naba‐Amori." 
1Samuel7:15 Kekaloku u‐Samyali wagweba o‐Sirayeli ngayo yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi. 
1Samuel7:16 Waya ngomnyaka ngomnyaka wazungulezela e‐Betele, ne‐Gilegale, ne‐Mitsipa, wabagweba o‐Sirayeli kwezondawo zonke." 
1Samuel7:17 Waza wabuyela e‐Rama; ngokuba ibikona indlu yake; nakona wagweba o‐Sirayeli; waka nakona isibingelo kuyehova kanjalo. 
1Samuel8:1 KWAYE kute nxa u‐Samyali ebemdala, wabamisa onyana bake babe ngabagwebi pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
1Samuel8:2 Laye igama lonyana wake wamazibulo lingu‐Joweli, negama lowesibini wake lingu‐Abiya: bebengabagwebi e‐Beresheba." 
1Samuel8:3 Kodwa onyana bake abahamba endleleni zake, batyekela emva kwenzuzo ekohlakeleyo, bawamkela amabaso, batyekisa ugwebo." 
1Samuel8:4 Bandula bahlanganisana bonke abadala bo‐Sirayeli, beza ku‐Samyali e‐Rama," 
1Samuel8:5 bati kuye: Bona ke, wena umdala, nonyana bako abahambi ezindleleni zako; uz’ uti kaloku usimisele ukumkani ukusigweba, njengentlanga zonke." 
1Samuel8:6 Kodwa elozwi belilibi emehlweni ka‐Samyali, nxa bebesiti: Sinike ukumkani ukusigweba. Waza u‐Samyali watandaza kuyehova." 
1Samuel8:7 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Samyali: Pulapula ilizwi labantu ngako konke abakutetayo kuwe: ngokuba bengalahlanga wena, koko belahlile mna, ukuze ndingabi ngukumkani pezu kwabo." 
1Samuel8:8 Njengazo zonke izenzo abazenzileyo, kwa semhleni ndabendibanyusa ngawo e‐Jipete kwada kwanamhla nje, abandishiya ngazo, bakonza otixo bambi, benje njalo nangakuwe." 
1Samuel8:9 Ngako kaloku pulapula ilizwi labo; kodwa qinisa ukunqi̔nela ngakubo, ubashumayeze isiko lokumkani oya kupata ubukumkani pezu kwabo." 
1Samuel8:10 Waza u‐Samyali waxela onke amazwi kayehova kwabobantu abebecele kuye ukumkani. 
1Samuel8:11 Wayesiti: Eli loba lisiko lokumkani oya kupata ubukumkani pezu kwenu: Onyana benu uya kubatabata, abamisele ukuba babe ngabantu benqwelo zake, nabakweli bake bamahashe; nokuba babaleke pambi kwenqwelo zake." 
1Samuel8:12 Wobamisela ukuba babe zinkosi zamawaka, nenkosi zamashumi mahlanu; nokuba balime ukulima kwake, bavune ukuvuna kwake, benze impahla zake zokulwa, nempahla zenqwelo zake." 
1Samuel8:13 Nentombi zenu wozitabata zibe ngabenzi bezimnandi, nabapekikazi, nabojikazi." 
1Samuel8:14 Uya kutabata amasimi enu, nezitiya zenu zemiti yeveyine, nezitiya zenu zeminquma, ezo zilungileyo, azinike kuzo izicaka zake." 
1Samuel8:15 Uya kutabata isishumi sembewu yenu, nesezitiya zenu zemiti yeveyine, asinike kubabusi bake, nakwizicaka zake." 
1Samuel8:16 Uya kutabata izicaka zenu, nezicakakazi zenu, namadodana enu amahle, namaqwaṙashe enu, azenze zibe semsebenzini wake." 
1Samuel8:17 Uya kutabata isishumi segusha zenu: nani ke noba zizicaka zake. 
1Samuel8:18 Naniya kukala ngomhla lowo ngenxa yokumkani wenu, eniya kuba nizinyulele yena; kanti uyehova akayi kuniva ngomhla lowo." 
1Samuel8:19 Kodwa abantu bala ukupulapula ilizwi lika‐Samyali, bati: Hai; ngukumkani oya kuba pezu kwetu;" 
1Samuel8:20 ukuba nati sibe njengentlanga zonke; nokuba ukumkani wetu asigwebe, apume pambi kwetu, alwe ukulwa kwetu." 
1Samuel8:21 Weva u‐Samyali onke amazwi abantu, wawateta ezindlebeni zikayehova." 
1Samuel8:22 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Samyali: Pulapula ilizwi labo, ubenzele ukumkani. Waza u‐Samyali wati kuwo amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli: Hambani niye nonke ngabanye ezixekweni zenu." 
1Samuel9:1 KWABEKUKO indoda yakwa‐Benjamine, egama lalingu‐Kishe, unyana ka‐Abiyeli, unyana ka‐Tserore, unyana ka‐Bekorate, unyana ka‐Afiya, um‐Benjamine, igoṙa elibuṙoti." 
1Samuel9:2 Yabinonyana ke, ogama lalingu‐Saule, oyintlahla, omhle: kwaye kungeko indoda pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli ebimgqitisile ngobuhle: kwa kuwo amagxalaba ake nangapezulu wadlula bonke abantu ngobude." 
1Samuel9:3 Kekaloku amaqwaṙashekazi ka‐Kishe, uyise ka‐Saule, ebelahlekile. Waza u‐Kishe wati ku‐Saule unyana wake: Kautabate nawe esinye sezicaka, usuke, uye kufuna amaqwaṙashekazi." 
1Samuel9:4 Wasuka wacanda entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, wacanda naselizweni le‐Shalisha, kodwa abawafumana; baza bacanda elizweni le‐Shahalime, kodwa ebengeko kona; wacanda nasezweni lakwa‐Benjamine, kodwa abawafumana." 
1Samuel9:5 Bada bafika ezweni lakwa‐Tsufi; wandula u‐Saule wati kwisicaka sake esibe sinaye: Hamba, sibuye; hleze ubawo awancame amaqwaṙashekazi, axalele tina." 
1Samuel9:6 Saza sati kuye: Bona ke, kuko indoda katixo kwesisixeko, eyindoda ebekekileyo; konke ikutetayo kuza kuhla ngenyaniso: kaloku masiye kona; kungaba iya kusixelela indlela yetu, esinge sihamba kuyo." 
1Samuel9:7 Wandula u‐Saule wati kwisicaka sake: Pofu, bona ke, sisiya nje, yinto nina esiya kuyizisa kulondoda? ngokuba isonka sigqibekile ezityeni zetu; aliko nebaso lokuba silizise kwindoda katixo: yinto nina esinayo?" 
1Samuel9:8 Salekela isicaka ukupendula u‐Saule, sati: Bona ke, kuko esandleni sam isiqingata sesine seshekele yesilivere; eso ndiya kusinika kuyo indoda katixo, ukuze isixelele indlela yetu." 
1Samuel9:9 (Ngapambili kwa‐Sirayeli, umntu akuhamba ukuya kubuza kutixo, watsho ukuti: Hambani, sihambe siye kumboni; ngokuba lowo obizwayo namhla ngokuba ngumprofite, ebebizwa ngapambili ngokuba ngumboni.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Waza u‐Saule wati kwisicaka sake: Ilizwi lako lilungile; hamba, sihambe. Bahamba baya esixekweni apo indoda katixo ibikona." 
1Samuel9:11 Xeshekweni bebenyuka ngeqina lesixeko, bafumana intombi zipuma ukuka amanzi, bati kuzo: Uko apa na umboni?" 
1Samuel9:12 Zabapendula, zati: Uko; nanku epambi kwenu: nxama kaloku, ngokuba efikile namhla esixekweni; ngokuba kuko namhla umbingo wabantu endaweni epakamileyo:" 
1Samuel9:13 nxa ningene esixekweni, seniya kumfumana, engekanyukeli endaweni epakamileyo ukuya kutya: ngokuba abantu bengayi kutya ade afike yena; ngokuba nguye otamsanqelayo umbingo; emveni kwoko bayatya abamenyiweyo: ngako kaloku nyukani, ngokuba malunga nelixesha niya kumfumana." 
1Samuel9:14 Baza benyukela esixekweni: bati bakufika pakati kwesixeko, nanku u‐Samyali ebapumele, ukuya kunyukela endaweni epakamileyo." 
1Samuel9:15 Kekaloku uyehova wabetyilile endlebeni ka‐Samyali, umhla mnye engekafiki u‐Saule, ukuti:" 
1Samuel9:16 Malunga nelixesha langomso ndiya kutuma kuwe indoda yasezweni lakwa‐Benjamine, oya kuyitambisa ibe yinkosi pezu kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli, ukuze isindise abantu bam esandleni sama‐Filistiya: ngokuba ndibonile abantu bam; ngokuba ukukala kwabo kufikile kum." 
1Samuel9:17 Nxa u‐Samyali wambonayo u‐Saule, wandula uyehova wapendula, wati: Nantsi indoda endite kuwe ngayo: Le iya kupata ubukosi pezu kwabantu bam." 
1Samuel9:18 Wandula u‐Saule wasondela ku‐Samyali pakati kwesango, wati: Kaundixelele, ipina ke indlu yomboni?" 
1Samuel9:19 Waza u‐Samyali wampendula u‐Saule, wati: Mna ndingumboni; nyuka pambi kwam ukuya endaweni epakamileyo; ngokuba niya kutya nam namhla, ndandiya kukundulula kusasa, ndikuxelele konke okusentliziyweni yako:" 
1Samuel9:20 namaqwaṙashekazi, lawo akulahlekileyo kuse kuyimihla mitatu, ungabekeli wona intliziyo yako, ngokuba selefunyenwe: kanjalo lukubanina lwonke unqwenelo lwo‐Sirayeli? alukuwe na nakuyo yonke indlu yoyihlo?" 
1Samuel9:21 Wapendula u‐Saule wati: Andingum‐Benjamine na, owesincinane sezizwe zo‐Sirayeli? nesizalwane sam asisesincinane na ngapezu kwazo zonke izizalwane zesizwe sika‐Benjamine? kunganina ke ukuba utete kum ilizwi elinjalo?" 
1Samuel9:22 Waza u‐Samyali watabata u‐Saule nesicaka sake, wabangenisa enkambilini, wabanika indawo engapezulu pakati kwabamenyiweyo, abangati bangamadoda amashumi matatu." 
1Samuel9:23 Wayesiti u‐Samyali kuye umpeki: Nikela isabelwa endandisinika kuwe; endandisiti kuwe ngaso: Sibeke ngakuwe. 
1Samuel9:24 Waza umpeki wakupa umkono nako okupezu kwawo, wabeka pambi kwo‐Saule. Wayesiti: Nanku okuseleyo: kubeke pambi kwako, utye; ngokuba ngexesha elimisiweyo bekugcinelwa wena, nxa ndibe ndisiti: Ndimemile abantu. Kwa njalo u‐Saule watya no‐Samyali ngalomini." 
1Samuel9:25 Bada behla endaweni epakamileyo baya esixekweni: waza wateta no‐Saule pezu kwendlu. 
1Samuel9:26 Bavuka ke kusasa: kwaye kute ngasekupumeni kwesitingo, wandula u‐Samyali wambiza u‐Saule eze pezu kwendlu esiti: Suka, ukuba ndikundulule. Wesuka ke u‐Saule; baza bapuma bobabini, yena no‐Samyali, baya ngapandle."
