1Samuel9:27 Nxa babehlela esipelweni sesixeko, wati u‐Samyali ku‐Saule: Xelela isicaka sako ukuba sidlule pambi kwetu, (sadlula ke,) kodwa wena yima kaloku, ukuze ndikuvise ilizwi likatixo." 
1Samuel10:1 Wandula u‐Samyali watabata igutyana leoli, wayigalela pezu kwentloko yake, wamanga, wati: Aku njalo na, ukuba uyehova ukutambisile ube yinkosi pezu kwelifa lake?" 
1Samuel10:2 Nxa umkile namhla kum, wosel’ ufumana amadoda emabini ngasencw̔abeni lika‐Rakele, emdeni wakwa‐Benjamine, e‐Tseletsa; wona aya kuti kuwe: Amaqwaṙashekazi, owaya ukuwafuna, afunyenwe; bona ke, uyihlo ulahlile indawo yamaqwaṙashekazi, exalele nina, esiti: Ndiya kwenzela nto nina unyana wam?" 
1Samuel10:3 Woti wakugqita kona, nasele, woza kufika ngasesiyekeni se‐Tabore, apo uya kufumana amadoda ematatu enyukela kutixo e‐Betele, enye itwele amatakane matatu ebokwe, nenye itwele amasimba matatu esonka, nenye itwele intsuba yeveyine:" 
1Samuel10:4 ayeya kubuza ukupila kwako, akunike izonka zibini: ezo wozitabata ezandleni zawo." 
1Samuel10:5 Emveni kwoko uya kufika endulini katixo, apo ilali yama‐Filistiya ikona; kwakuya kuti, akufika kona esixekweni, uya kuhlangana neqela labaprofite besihla endaweni epakamileyo, benenebele, nentambula, nomlozi, nohadi, pambi kwabo; abaya kuprofitesha ke:" 
1Samuel10:6 waye umoya kayehova eya kuqubula wena, wauya kuprofitesha nabo, uguqulwe ube ngumntu wumbi." 
1Samuel10:7 Makuti, nxa lemiqondiso ize kuwe, yenza ngokufumana kwesandla sako: ngokuba utixo enawe." 
1Samuel10:8 Wauya kwandulela kum ukuhlela e‐Gilegale; ngokuba bona ke, ndiya kuhlela kuwe, ndinikele amadini okutshiswa, ndibingelele imibingo yoxolo; yimihla esixe̔nxe uya kulinda, ndide ndize kuwe, ndikwazise oko uya kukwenza." 
1Samuel10:9 Kwaye kute, akuba ejikile umhlana wake ukumka ku‐Samyali, wandula utixo wamguqulela intliziyo ibe yimbi: kanjako yonke lemiqondiso yeza kubako ngalomini." 
1Samuel10:10 Bati bakufika kona ngasendulini, nali iqela labaprofite bemkaulela; waye umoya katixo wamqubula, waza waprofitesha pakati kwabo." 
1Samuel10:11 Kwabekute, bakubona bonke ababemazi ngexesha lapambili, ukuba, bona ke, uyaprofitesha pakati kwabaprofite, bandula abantu bati omnye kwomnye: Yinto nina le unyana ka‐Kishe uhlelwe yiyo? Kanene u‐Saule upakati kwabaprofite naye na?" 
1Samuel10:12 Waza wapendula umntu wakona, wati: Ngubanina pofu uyise wabo? Kukona kwenziwa umzekeliso wokuti: Kanene u‐Saule upakati kwabaprofite naye na?" 
1Samuel10:13 Wati akuba egqibile ukuprofitesha, wafika endaweni epakamileyo." 
1Samuel10:14 Kekaloku uyisekazi ka‐Saule wati kuye nakuso isicaka sake: Nibe nisiya ngapina? Wayesiti: Saya kufuna amaqwaṙashekazi; nanxa besibona ukuba akako, saya seza ku‐Samyali." 
1Samuel10:15 Waza wati uyisekazi ka‐Saule: Ndixelele ke, ibiyinto nina u‐Samyali abeyiteta kuni?" 
1Samuel10:16 Wayesiti u‐Saule kuyisekazi wake: Wasixelela ekuhleni ukuba amaqwaṙashekazi selefunyenwe. Kodwa indawo yobukumkani, abetetile ngayo u‐Samyali, akayixela kuye." 
1Samuel10:17 WAZA u‐Samyali wabiza abantu ndawonye ukuza kuyehova e‐Mitsipa. 
1Samuel10:18 Wayesiti kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ndibanyusile o‐Sirayeli e‐Jipete, ndanihlangula esandleni sama‐Jipete, nasesandleni sokumkani bonke ababenibandezela:" 
1Samuel10:19 kodwa namhla nimlahlile utixo wenu, obenisindisa ngokwake kubo bonke ububi benu nobunzima benu; nide nati kuye: Beka ukumkani pezu kwetu! Ngako kaloku zimiseni ebusweni bukayehova ngezizwe zenu, nangamawaka enu." 
1Samuel10:20 Kwati, akuba u‐Samyali ebesondeze zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, kwaqashwa isizwe sika‐Benjamine." 
1Samuel10:21 Nxa abesondeze isizwe sika‐Benjamine ngezizalwane zaso, kwaqashwa isizalwane sika‐Materi, waza u‐Saule, unyana ka‐Kishe, waqashwa: basuka bamfuna, kodwa ebengabonakali." 
1Samuel10:22 Babuya babuza kuyehova, besiti: Londoda isaza kuza apa na? Waza uyehova wati: Nantsi izimele pakati kwempahla." 
1Samuel10:23 Babaleka bamsusa kona: kekaloku nxa ibimi pakati kwabantu, wadlula bonke abantu ngobude kwa semagxalabeni ake nangapezulu." 
1Samuel10:24 Waza u‐Samyali wati kubo bonke abantu: Niyabona na lowo unyuliweyo nguyehova, ukuba akuko ofana naye pakati kwabo bonke abantu? Basuka bamemeza bonke abantu, bati: Makapile ukumkani!" 
1Samuel10:25 Wandula u‐Samyali waxelela abantu isiko lobukumkani, waliba̔la encwadini, wayibekela pambi kwoyehova. Wada u‐Samyali wabandulula bonke abantu, ukuya abanye ngabanye ezindlwini zabo." 
1Samuel10:26 Kanjalo no‐Saule waya endlwini yake e‐Gibeha; kwahamba naye amadoda omkosi, antliziyo zicukunyisiweyo ngutixo." 
1Samuel10:27 Koko usapo lwobunginingini lwati: Lendoda yoti nina ukusisindisa? Lwaza lwamdela, lungamziseli ibaso. Kodwa wanga usisitulu." 
1Samuel11:1 WANDULA wenyuka u‐Nahashe um‐Hamoni, waṙaula i‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi: aza onke amadoda ase‐Yabeshe ati ku‐Nahashe: Yenza ucebano nati, sasiya kukukonza." 
1Samuel11:2 Wayesiti kuwo u‐Nahashe um‐Hamoni: Ngako oku ndiya kulwenza ucebano nani, ukuba ndiwancotule onke amehlo enu okunene, nokuba ndikubeke oko kube lihlazo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke." 
1Samuel11:3 Baza abadala base‐Yabeshe bati kuye: Siyeke imihla ibe sixe̔nxe, ukuze situme izigidimi kuyo yonke imida yakwa‐Sirayeli: ukuba ke akuko osisindisayo, sesiya kupumela kuwe." 
1Samuel11:4 Zandula izigidimi zeza e‐Gibeha ka‐Saule, zateta lamazwi ezindlebeni zabantu; bati bonke abantu bapakamisa ilizwi labo, balila." 
1Samuel11:5 Kekaloku bona ke, u‐Saule weza emva kwenkabi, evela ezindle; wayesiti u‐Saule: Abantu bananina ukuba balile? Baza bambalisela amazwi amadoda ase‐Yabeshe." 
1Samuel11:6 Wandula umoya katixo wamqubula u‐Saule, akuva lamazwi, yati ingqumbo yake yavuta kunene." 
1Samuel11:7 Watabata isibini senkabi, wazihlahla, wazituma kuyo yonke imida yakwa‐Sirayeli ngezandla zezigidimi, kusitwa: Osukuba engapumi emva kwo‐Saule nasemva kwo‐Samyali, kuya kwenziwa njalo kuzo inkabi zake. Lwaza ’ulwoyiko lukatixo lwawa pezu kwabantu, bada bapuma njengomntu mnye." 
1Samuel11:8 Kekaloku akubabala e‐Bezeke, usapo luka‐Sirayeli belungamawaka angamakulu matatu, namadoda akwa‐Juda ebengamawaka angamashumi matatu." 
1Samuel11:9 Baza bati kuzo izigidimi ezezayo: Niya kutsho kuwo amadoda ase‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi ukuti: Ngomso, nxa ilanga libalelayo, niya kuba nosindiso. Zasuka izigidimi zeza zawaxelela amadoda ase‐Yabeshe; avuya ke." 
1Samuel11:10 Aza amadoda ase‐Yabeshe ati: Ngomso siya kupumela kuni, naniya kwenza kuti ngako konke okulungileyo emehlweni enu." 
1Samuel11:11 Kwaye kute ngomnye umhla, ukuba u‐Saule wamisa abantu babe ngamaqela matatu; basuka beza pakati kwomnquba ngevaṙasho lokusa, babulala aba‐Hamoni kwada kwasekufudumaleni kwemini: kwaza kwati, abo baseleyo bacitwa, bada abasala pakati kwabo ababini endaweni nye." 
1Samuel11:12 Baza abantu bati ku‐Samyali: Ngubanina obesiti: u‐Saule uya kupata ubukumkani pezu kwetu na? kupani amadoda lawo, siwafise." 
1Samuel11:13 Wayesiti u‐Saule: Akayi kufiswa mntu namhla nje; ngokuba namhla uyehova elwenzile usindiso kwa‐Sirayeli. 
1Samuel11:14 Wandula u‐Samyali wati ebantwini: Hambani, sihambe siye e‐Gilegale, sitwasise kona ubukumkani." 
1Samuel11:15 Baza bonke abantu baya e‐Gilegale, bamenza u‐Saule ukumkani kona pambi kwoyehova e‐Gilegale; babingelela nakona imibingo yoxolo pambi kwoyehova: waye u‐Saule wavuya kona, nawo onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, kakulu." 
1Samuel12:1 WAZA u‐Samyali wati kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli: Bona ke, ndipulapulile ilizwi lenu ngako konke enikutetileyo kum; ndenzile ukumkani pezu kwenu." 
1Samuel12:2 Nakaloku, nanku ukumkani ehamba pambi kwenu: mna ke, ndimdala, ndinezimvi; nonyana bam, naba benani: kanjalo mna ndihambile ebusweni benu kwa sebutsheni bam kude kwanamhla." 
1Samuel12:3 Nanku ndilapa nje, nqi̔nelani ngakum pambi kwotixo, napambi kwomtanjiswa wake: yekabanina inkabi endiyihlutileyo? lelikabanina iqwaṙashe endilihlutileyo? ngubanina endimlumkisileyo? ngubanina endimbandezeleyo? ndisamkele isizi kwesikabanina isandla, ukuba ndimfamekise amehlo am ngaso? ndandiya kubuyisela kuni." 
1Samuel12:4 Baye besiti: Akusilumkisanga, akusibandezelanga, akwamkelanga nto esandleni samntu." 
1Samuel12:5 Waza wati kubo: Uyehova ulinqi̔na ngakuni, nomtanjiswa wake ulinqi̔na namhla nje, lokuba anifumananga nto esandleni sam. Bati: Ulinqi̔na." 
1Samuel12:6 Walekela u‐Samyali wati ebantwini: Nguyehova owenza u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, nowenyusayo oyihlo benu elizweni le‐Jipete." 
1Samuel12:7 Ngako kaloku yimani, ukuze ndipikisane nani ebusweni bukayehova ngazo zonke izenzo ezilungileyo zikayehova, azenzileyo kuni nakoyihlo benu." 
1Samuel12:8 Xeshekweni abefikile u‐Yakobi e‐Jipete, bada bakala oyihlo benu kuyehova, wandula uyehova watuma u‐Mosesi no‐Arone, abapumisayo oyihlo benu e‐Jipete, babahlalisa kulendawo." 
1Samuel12:9 Kodwa bamlibala uyehova, utixo wabo; waza wabatengisa esandleni sika‐Sisera, inkosi yempi yase‐Hatsore, nasesandleni sama‐Filistiya, nasesandleni sokumkani wama‐Mowabi, abalwayo ngakubo." 
1Samuel12:10 Bada bakala kuyehova, bati: Sonile, ngokuba sishiyile uyehova, sakonza o‐Bali no‐Hashetorete; kodwa kaloku sisindise esandleni sentshaba zetu, sasiya kukonza wena." 
1Samuel12:11 Wandula uyehova watuma u‐Yerubebali, no‐Bedane, no‐Jefeta, no‐Samyali, wanisindisa esandleni sentshaba zenu ezingqongayo, nada nahlala ngokunqaba." 
1Samuel12:12 Kodwa nakubona ukuba u‐Nahashe, ukumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni, weza ngakuni, nati kum: Hai; ngukumkani oya kupata ubukosi pezu kwetu; nxa uyehova, utixo wenu, ebengukumkani wenu." 
1Samuel12:13 Ngako kaloku nanku ukumkani enimnyulileyo, lowo nimcelileyo! bona ke, uyehova umisile ukumkani pezu kwenu." 
1Samuel12:14 Ukuba niya kumoyika uyehova, nimkonze, nipulapule ilizwi lake, ningavukeli ngakuwo umlomo kayehova, niya kwandul’ ukuti, kwa nani nokumkani opata ubukosi pezu kwenu, nimlandele uyehova, utixo wenu:" 
1Samuel12:15 kanti ukuba aniyi kupulapula ilizwi likayehova, koko nivukela ngakuwo umlomo kayehova, sesiya kuti isandla sikayehova sibe ngakuni, njengokuba besingakubo oyihlo benu." 
1Samuel12:16 Ngako kaloku yimani, nibone lento enkulu, aya kuyenza uyehova pambi kwamehlo enu." 
1Samuel12:17 Asi kuko na ukuvunwa kwenqolowa namhla? Ndiya kubiza kuyehova: waeya kunika indudumo nemvula, ukuze nazi, nibone, ukuba kukulu ukukohlakala kwenu, enikwenzileyo emehlweni kayehova, ngokuzicelela ukumkani." 
1Samuel12:18 Wandula u‐Samyali wabiza kuyehova; waza uyehova wanika indudumo nemvula ngalomini; bati bonke abantu boyika kakulu uyehova no‐Samyali. 
1Samuel12:19 Kanjalo bonke abantu bati ku‐Samyali: Tandazela izicaka zako kuyehova, utixo wako, ukuze singafi; ngokuba songezile kuzo zonke izono zetu lenkohlakalo yokuzicelela ukumkani." 
1Samuel12:20 Waza u‐Samyali wati ebantwini: Ningoyiki; niyenzile kambe yonke lenkohlakalo; noko ke ningapambuki ekumlandeleni uyehova, kodwa konzani uyehova ngayo yonke intliziyo yenu:" 
1Samuel12:21 ize ningapambuki; ngokuba beniya ku landela izinto ezingendawo, ezingenakunceda, ezingenakusindisa nokusindisa; ngokuba zingendawo." 
1Samuel12:22 Ngokuba uyehova engayi kulahla abantu bake, ngenxa yegama lake elikulu; ngokuba uyehova ebetanda ukunenza abantu bake." 
1Samuel12:23 Kanjako mna, makube lé kum ukuba ndone ngakuye uyehova, ngokuyeka ukunitandazela; koko ndiya kunifundisa indlela elungileyo nefanelekileyo:" 
1Samuel12:24 kodwa yoyikani uyehova, nimkonze yena ngenyaniso ngayo yonke intliziyo yenu; ngokuba gqalani izinto ezingakanana azenzileyo kuni." 
1Samuel12:25 Kodwa ukuba nimana ukwenza inkohlakalo, niya kubujiswa, kwa nina nokumkani wenu." 
1Samuel13:1 U‐SAULE waselengumnyaka mnye ekupateni kwake ubukumkani: nxa abepete ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli iminyaka yamibini," 
1Samuel13:2 wandula u‐Saule wazinyulela amawaka matatu amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli; amawaka mabini ebeko no‐Saule e‐Mikimashe nasentabeni yase‐Betele, newaka linye ebeno‐Jonatane e‐Gibeha yakwa‐Benjamine; nabantu abaseleyo wabandulula baye abanye ngabanye ezintenteni zabo." 
1Samuel13:3 Waza u‐Jonatane wabeta ilali yama‐Filistiya ebise‐Geba; kwaviwa ke ngama‐Filistiya. Ngako u‐Saule wavutela ngexilongo elizweni lonke, esiti: Makeve ama‐Hebere." 
1Samuel13:4 Baza bonke o‐Sirayeli beva kusitwa: u‐Saule ubetile ilali yama‐Filistiya: nakanjalo, o‐Sirayeli banukele ama‐Filistiya. Bandula abantu babizelwa ndawonye emva kwo‐Saule e‐Gilegale." 
1Samuel13:5 Kanjako ama‐Filistiya ahlanganiswa ukuza kulwa no‐Sirayeli, inqwelo ezimawaka amashumi matatu, nabakweli bamahashe abamawaka matandatu, nabantu abanjengentlabati ebiselunxwemeni lwolwandle ngobuninzi: enyuka ke, ati waca e‐Mikimashe, ngasempumalanga ye‐Betavene." 
1Samuel13:6 Ati amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli akubona ukuba asesixakeni, (ngokuba abantu bebekatazekile,) bandula abantu bazimela emiqolombeni, nasezindadeni, nasemaweni, nasezinqatyeni, naseminxunyeni." 
1Samuel13:7 Kanjalo ama‐Hebere awela i‐Yoredane ukuya elizweni lakwa‐Gadi nele‐Gileyadi. Kodwa u‐Saule ebeseko yena e‐Gilegale, bati bonke abantu bamlandela ngokungcangcazela." 
1Samuel13:8 Waza walinda imihla yasixe̔nxe, ixesha elimisiweyo ngu‐Samyali; kodwa u‐Samyali ebengekafiki e‐Gilegale; kanjalo abantu baciteka kuye." 
1Samuel13:9 Wandula u‐Saule wati: Sondezani kum idini lokutshiswa, neminikelo yoxolo. Waza wanikela idini lokutshiswa." 
1Samuel13:10 Kwaye kute, akuba egqibile ukunikela idini lokutshiswa, nanku u‐Samyali esiza. Wapuma ke u‐Saule ukuya kumkaulela, aze ambulise." 
1Samuel13:11 Waza wati u‐Samyali: Wenze nto nina? Wayesiti u‐Saule: Ngokuba bendibona ukuba abantu bacitekile kum, nokuba wena akufikanga ngemihla emisiweyo, nokuba ama‐Filistiya ahlanganiselwe e‐Mikimashe;" 
1Samuel13:12 ngako ndati: Kaloku ama‐Filistiya aya kuhlela kum e‐Gilegale, nxa ubuso bukayehova ndingabukungelanga; ndaza ndazinyanzela, ndanikela idini lokutshiswa." 
1Samuel13:13 Wandula u‐Samyali wati ku‐Saule: Wenze ngobudenge; akugcinanga umyalelo kayehova, utixo wako, lowo akuyaleleyo: ngokuba kaloku uyehova ngeeqinisile ubukumkani bako pezu kwo‐Sirayeli kude kube ngunapakade:" 
1Samuel13:14 kodwa ngoku ubukumkani bako abuyi kuma: uyehova uzifunele indoda enjengentliziyo yake; kanjalo uyehova uyimisele ibe yinkosi pezu kwabantu bake; ngokuba ungagcinanga oko akuyaleleyo uyehova. 
1Samuel13:15 Waselesuka u‐Samyali, wenyuka e‐Gilegale waya e‐Gibeha yakwa‐Benjamine. Waye u‐Saule wabala abantu abakoyo naye, banga bangamakulu matandatu amadoda." 
1Samuel13:16 Kanjalo u‐Saule, no‐Jonatane unyana wake, nabantu abakoyo nabo, bahlala e‐Geba yakwa‐Benjamine. Kodwa ama‐Filistiya ati waca e‐Mikimashe." 
1Samuel13:17 Baza bapuma abafaci emnqubeni wama‐Filistiya ngamaqela amatatu: elinye iqela lajika ngasendleleni esinga e‐Hofera, ngaselizweni le‐Shuhali;" 
1Samuel13:18 nelinye iqela lajika ngasendleleni esinga e‐Bete‐horone; nelinye iqela lajika ngasendleleni yomda obekayo esihlanjeni se‐Tsebohime ngasentlango. 
1Samuel13:19 Kekaloku bekungafunyanwa umkandi kulo lonke ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli; ngokuba ama‐Filistiya ebete: Hleze ama‐Hebere enze iṙele umhlaumbi intshuntshe; 
1Samuel13:20 ngako o‐Sirayeli bonke behlela kuwo ama‐Filistiya, ukuba balole abanye ngabanye iskare zabo, namakuba abo, namazembe abo, nezitshetshe zepuluwa zabo." 
1Samuel13:21 Kodwa bekuko intsimbi enamazinyo ukwenza intlangoti kuzo izitshetshe zepuluwa, nakuwo amakuba, nakuzo iforoke, nakuwo amazembe, nokubaza izinto zokuhlaba." 
1Samuel13:22 Kwaza kwati ngomhla wokulwa, akwafunyanwa iṙele nentshuntshe ezandleni zabo bonke abantu ababeno‐Saule no‐Jonatane; kodwa bekufunyanwa ku‐Saule naku‐Jonatane unyana wake." 
1Samuel13:23 Bada bapuma abelali yama‐Filistiya baya engxingweni yase‐Mikimashe. 
1Samuel14:1 KWAYE kute ngomhla otile, wati u‐Jonatane unyana ka‐Saule kumfana otwele izixo̔bo zake: Hamba, sigqite siye elalini yama‐Filistiya ekwelinye icala. Kodwa akamxelela uyise." 
1Samuel14:2 Kekaloku u‐Saule wahlala encameni ye‐Gibeha, ngapantsi kwomti wegranate obuse‐Migrone; nabantu ababenaye, benga bangamakulu matandatu amadoda;" 
1Samuel14:3 no‐Ahiya, unyana ka‐Ahitube, umzalwana ka‐Yikabode, unyana ka‐Finehasi, unyana ka‐Heli, umperisite kayehova e‐Shilo, evete iyefodi. Baye abantu bengazi ukuba u‐Jonatane wemkile." 
1Samuel14:4 Pakati kwengxingwa, apo u‐Jonatane wafuna ukugqita kona ukuya elalini yama‐Filistiya, bekuko itsolo leliwa ngelicala, netsolo leliwa ngeliya icala: igama lelinye beliyi‐Botsetse, negama lelinye beliyi‐Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Elinye itsolo lema ngasenode limalungana ne‐Mikimashe, nelinye ngasesuyide limalungana ne‐Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Waye u‐Jonatane wati kumfana otwele izixo̔bo zake: Hamba, sigqite siye elalini yaba bangalukileyo; kungaba uyehova wosisebenzela; ngokuba kungeko isitintelo kuyehova ukuba asindise ngabaninzi umhlaumbi ngabancinane." 
1Samuel14:7 Waza umtwali wezixo̔bo zake wati kuye: Yenza konke okusentliziyweni yako; jikela ke; nanku ndinawe ndinjengentliziyo yako. 
1Samuel14:8 Wandula u‐Jonatane wati: Bona ke, siya kugqita ukuya kulamadoda, sizibonakalise kuwo." 
1Samuel14:9 Ukuba aya kutsho kuti ukuti: Niti nqumama, side sisondele kuni; sesiya kuhlala simi endaweni yetu, singanyukeli kuwo:" 
1Samuel14:10 kodwa ukuba aya kutsho ukuti: Nyukelani kuti: sesiya kunyuka; ngokuba uyehova ewanikele esandleni setu: kwa lento yoba ngumqondiso kuti. 
1Samuel14:11 Basuka bobabini bazibonakalisa elalini yama‐Filistiya: aza ati ama‐Filistiya: Nanga ama‐Hebere epumile emiweweni apo abezimele kona. 
1Samuel14:12 Andula amadoda aselalini apendula u‐Jonatane nomtwali wezixo̔bo zake, ati: Nyukelani kuti, sasiya kunazisa into. Waselesiti u‐Jonatane kumtwali wezixo̔bo zake: Nyuka emva kwam; ngokuba uyehova ewanikele esandleni so‐Sirayeli." 
1Samuel14:13 Waza u‐Jonatane wenyuka ngezandla zake nangenyawo zake, nomtwali wezixo̔bo zake emva kwake: awa ke pambi kwo‐Jonatane; kanjalo umtwali wezixo̔bo zake wabulala emva kwake." 
1Samuel14:14 Kekaloku esosibulalo sokuqala, esibe senziwa ngu‐Jonatane nomtwali wezixo̔bo zake, saye singa singamadoda angamashumi mabini, endaweni engati isisiqingata somqela wendima yentsimi." 
1Samuel14:15 Kwasuka kwabako ukungcangcazela emkosini, nasezindle, nasebantwini bonke; abelali, nabafaci, bangcangcazela nabo; ewe, umhlaba wazamazama; ngokuba bekuko ukungcangcazela kuvela kutixo." 
1Samuel14:16 Baza abalindi baka‐Saule e‐Gibeha yakwa‐Benjamine bakangela; kekaloku nasi isihlwele sinyibilika, simana siciteka." 
1Samuel14:17 Wandula u‐Saule wati kubantu abanaye: Balani ke, nibone, ngubanina owemkileyo kuti. Bakuba bebalile, bona ke, u‐Jonatane nomtwali wezixo̔bo zake bebengeko." 
1Samuel14:18 Waza u‐Saule wati ku‐Ahiya: Sondeza ityeya katixo. Ngokuba ityeya katixo ibiko ngeloxesha nosapo luka‐Sirayeli. 
1Samuel14:19 Kwaye kute, nxa asateta u‐Saule kumperisite, yati impitimpiti ebisemkosini wama‐Filistiya yamana ukwanda ngakumbi. Ngako u‐Saule wati kumperisite: Susa isandla sako." 
1Samuel14:20 Kwaza kwahlanganisana u‐Saule nabantu bonke abanaye, beza ekulweni; kekaloku bona ke, iṙele lomnye belingakuye omnye, isipitipiti esikulu kunene." 
1Samuel14:21 Kanjako bekuko ama‐Hebere kunye nama‐Filistiya njengapambili, abenyukile ezweni elingqongayo ukuya nawo emnqubeni; kwa nawo atelelana no‐Sirayeli ababeno‐Saule no‐Jonatane." 
1Samuel14:22 Nawo onke amadoda abezimele entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, akuva ukuba ama‐Filistiya ebesaba, kwa wona ati nama ukuwalandela ekulweni." 
1Samuel14:23 Kwa njalo uyehova wabasindisa ngalomini o‐Sirayeli; kwaza ukulwa kwadlulela e‐Betavene. 
1Samuel14:24 Kekaloku amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ebediniwe ngalomini; ngokuba u‐Saule ebefungisile abantu, esiti: Makuqalekiswe osukuba esidla ukudla kude kuhlwe, ukuze ndipindezelwe ezintshabeni zam. Ngako bonke abantu abeva ukudla." 
1Samuel14:25 Laza lonke ilizwe leza ehlatini; kekaloku bekuko ubusi pezu kwobuso bomhlaba. 
1Samuel14:26 Bati bakufika abantu ehlatini, nangu umsinga wobusi; kodwa bekungeko mntu owabeka isandla sake emlonyeni wake, ngokuba abantu bebesoyika isifungo." 
1Samuel14:27 Kodwa u‐Jonatane ebengevanga, nxa uyise abefungisa abantu; ngako wayolula incam yentonga ebisesandleni sake, wayifaka encindini yobusi, wasibuyisela emlonyeni wake isandla sake; ati amehlo ake akanya." 
1Samuel14:28 Waza omnye wasebantwini wapendula wati: Uyihlo waqinisa ukufungisa abantu ngokuti: Makaqalekiswe osukuba esidla ukudla namhla. Kekaloku abantu bebecubukile. 
1Samuel14:29 Wandula u‐Jonatane wati: Ubawo ukatazile ilizwe; bonani ke ukukanya kwamehlo am, ngokuba ndivile intwana yobubusi:" 
1Samuel14:30 kangakananina ke ngakumbi, ukuba abantu bebekolisile ukutya namhla kumaxoba entshaba zabo abawafumanayo! ngokuba kaloku isibulalo singabanga sikulu pakati kwama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel14:31 Kekaloku bawabeta ama‐Filistiya ngalomini kwa se‐Mikimashe kude kwase‐Ajalone: baye abantu becubukile kakulu. 
1Samuel14:32 Basuka abantu bagaleleka pezu kwamaxoba, batabata igusha, nenkabi, namatole, bazixe̔la ngasemhlabeni; bati abantu bazidla zinegazi." 
1Samuel14:33 Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Saule, kusitwa: Naba abantu besona ngakuye uyehova ngokudla kunye negazi. Wayesiti: Nenzile ngobumenemene; qengqelani kum namhla ilitye elikulu." 
1Samuel14:34 Wati kanjalo u‐Saule: Yitini sa pakati kwabantu, niti kubo: Sondezani kum, abanye ngabanye inkabi zabo, nabanye ngabanye igusha zabo, nizixe̔le apa, nidle; nize ningoni ngakuye uyehova ngokudla kunye negazi. Baza bonke abantu basondeza nabo abanye ngabanye inkabi zabo ngobusuku obo, bazixe̔la kona." 
1Samuel14:35 Wandula u‐Saule waka isibingelo kuyehova: waqala ngaso ukwaka isibingelo kuyehova. 
1Samuel14:36 Wayesiti u‐Saule: Masihle emva kwama‐Filistiya ngobusuku, siwapange kude kukanye ukusa, singasalisi nanye indoda pakati kwawo kanjalo. Bati abantu: Yenza konke okulungileyo emehlweni ako. Wati kodwa umperisite: Masisondele apa kutixo." 
1Samuel14:37 Waza u‐Saule wabuza kuyehova, esiti: Ndiya kuhla na emva kwama‐Filistiya? wowanikela na esandleni so‐Sirayeli? Kodwa akampendula ngalomhla." 
1Samuel14:38 Wandula wati u‐Saule: Sondelani apa, nonke zinkosi zabantu, nazi, nibone, ukuba sibe sikwinto nina esisono namhla?" 
1Samuel14:39 Ngokuba, ehleli nje uyehova, osindisa o‐Sirayeli, nakuba besiko ku‐Jonatane unyana wam, uya kufa ngenyaniso. Kodwa bekungeko namnye owampendulayo ebantwini bonke." 
1Samuel14:40 Wandula wati kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli: Yibani nina kwelinye icala, nam no‐Jonatane unyana wam soba kwelinye icala. Bati ke abantu ku‐Saule: Yenza okulungileyo emehlweni ako." 
1Samuel14:41 Waza u‐Saule wati kuyehova, utixo ka‐Sirayeli: Nika iqashiso eliyinyaniso! Kwaye kuqashwa u‐Jonatane no‐Saule; kodwa abantu basinda." 
1Samuel14:42 Wayesiti u‐Saule: Qashisani pakati kwam no‐Jonatane unyana wam. Wayeqashwa u‐Jonatane. 
1Samuel14:43 Wandula u‐Saule wati ku‐Jonatane: Ndixelele ke into uyenzileyo. Waza u‐Jonatane wamxelela, wati: Ndaka ndeva intwana yobusi ngencam yentonga ebisesandleni sam; bona ke, ndiya kufa." 
1Samuel14:44 Waza u‐Saule wati: Utixo makenje njalo, alekele ukwenje njalo; ngokuba uya kufa ngenyaniso, Jonatane!" 
1Samuel14:45 Koko abantu bati ku‐Saule: Uya kufa na u‐Jonatane, olwenzileyo olusindiso olukulu kwa‐Sirayeli? Makube lé oko! ehleli nje uyehova, akuyi kuwa nalunye lwenwele zentloko yake ngasemhlabeni; ngokuba esebenzile notixo namhla nje. Kwa njalo abantu bamkulula u‐Jonatane, akafa nokufa." 
1Samuel14:46 Wandula u‐Saule wenyuka ekulandeleni ama‐Filistiya; ati ama‐Filistiya aya endaweni yawo. 
1Samuel14:47 KWA njalo u‐Saule wabamba ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, walwa ngakuzo zonke intshaba zake ezingqongayo, ngakuwo ama‐Mowabi, nangakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, nangakuwo ama‐Edome, nangakubo okumkani be‐Tsoba, nangakuwo ama‐Filistiya; nalapo kusukuba ebebeka kona, wazeyisa." 
1Samuel14:48 Wayesenza ngobuṙoti, wabeta ama‐Amaleki, wabahlangula o‐Sirayeli esandleni sabatimbi babo." 
1Samuel14:49 Kekaloku onyana baka‐Saule bebengu‐Jonatane, no‐Yishevi, no‐Maleki‐shuha; namagama entombi zake zombini, igama leyamazibulo belingu‐Merabi, negama lencinane belingu‐Mikali;" 
1Samuel14:50 negama lomfazi ka‐Saule belingu‐Ahinohame, intombi ka‐Himahatse; negama lenkosi yomkosi wake belingu‐Abenere, unyana ka‐Nere, uyisekazi ka‐Saule." 
1Samuel14:51 U‐Kishe ebenguyise ka‐Saule; no‐Nere, uyise ka‐Abenere, ebengunyana ka‐Abiyeli." 
1Samuel14:52 Kwaye kuko ukulwa okunzima ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya ngayo yonke imihla ka‐Saule; ngako, onke amagoṙa, nawo onke amadoda obuṙoti, akuwabona u‐Saule, wawabutela kuye." 
1Samuel15:1 WANDULA u‐Samyali wati ku‐Saule: Uyehova wandituma ukuba ndikutambise ube ngukumkani pezu kwabantu bake, pezu kwo‐Sirayeli; ngako kaloku yiva ilizwi lamazwi kayehova." 
1Samuel15:2 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Ndikumbule oko u‐Amaleki akwenzileyo ku‐Sirayeli, okokuba wammela endleleni, ekunyukeni kwake e‐Jipete." 
1Samuel15:3 Hamba kaloku, ubete u‐Amaleki, nikulahlele ekutshatyalalisweni konke anako, ungabi nanceba pezu kwake; uze ubulale kwa amadoda nabafazi, intsapo nentsana, inkabi negusha, inkamela namaqwaṙashe." 
1Samuel15:4 Waza u‐Saule wabiza abantu, wababala e‐Telayime, amawaka angamakulu mabini abahamba ngenyawo, namawaka alishumi amadoda akwa‐Juda." 
1Samuel15:5 Wasuka u‐Saule weza esixekweni sama‐Amaleki, wabeka abalaleli entilini." 
1Samuel15:6 Kekaloku u‐Saule wati kuma‐Keni: Hambani, nimke, nihle pakati kwama‐Amaleki, hleze ndinicite nawo; ngokuba nina nenzele lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli ububele, ekunyukeni kwalo e‐Jipete. Andula ama‐Keni emka pakati kwama‐Amaleki." 
1Samuel15:7 Waza u‐Saule wabeta ama‐Amaleki kwa se‐Havila kude kwaziwa e‐Shure, engapambi kwe‐Jipete." 
1Samuel15:8 No‐Hagagi, ukumkani wama‐Amaleki, wambamba ehleli; nabo bonke abantu wabalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni ngohlangoti lweṙele." 
1Samuel15:9 Koko u‐Saule nabantu bebenenceba pezu kwo‐Hagagi, napezu kwezilungileyo kakulu pakati kwegusha, nenkabi, nenkomo ezilungileyo ngasemva, napezu kwemvana, napezu kwako konke okulungileyo, bengavumanga ukuzilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni; kodwa zonke izinto ezidelekayo nezibityileyo, zona bazilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni." 
1Samuel15:10 Kwandul’ ukuza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Samyali, lisiti:" 
1Samuel15:11 Kulusizi kum ukuba ndimenzile u‐Saule ukumkani; ngokuba ebuyile emva kwam, namazwi am engawafezanga. Waza waqumba u‐Samyali, wakala kuyehova ubusuku bonke." 
1Samuel15:12 Kwati kwakuvuka kusasa u‐Samyali ukuya kumkaulela u‐Saule ngexesha lokusa, kwaxelelwa u‐Samyali ukuti: Weza u‐Saule e‐Karamele, kekaloku bona ke, wazimisela inkumbuzelo, wajika, wadlula, wehla waya e‐Gilegale." 
1Samuel15:13 Wasuka u‐Samyali weza ku‐Saule; waza wati u‐Saule kuye: Mautanyusanqelwe nguyehova! ndifezile ilizwi likayehova. 
1Samuel15:14 Wati ke u‐Samyali: Liyinto nina pofu elozwi legusha ezindlebeni zam, nelizwi lenkabi endilivayo?" 
1Samuel15:15 Wayesiti u‐Saule: Babevela nazo kuma‐Amaleki; ngokuba abantu bebenenceba pezu kwezilungileyo kakulu pakati kwegusha nenkabi, ukuze babingele uyehova, utixo wako; kodwa eziseleyo sizilahlele ekutshatyalalisweni." 
1Samuel15:16 Wandula u‐Samyali wati ku‐Saule: Kauyeke, ndandiya kukuxelela oko akutetileyo kum uyehova ngobubusuku. Wayesiti kuye: Teta ke." 
1Samuel15:17 Waza u‐Samyali wati: Nxa ubumncinane emehlweni ako, aku njalo na ukuba waba yintloko yezizwe zo‐Sirayeli, nokuba uyehova wakutambisa ube ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli?" 
1Samuel15:18 Wada uyehova wakutuma ukuya endleleni, esiti: Hamba ulahlele ekutshatyalalisweni aboni abo, ama‐Amaleki, ulwe ngakubo ude ubagqibele." 
1Samuel15:19 Kunganina ke ukuba ungevanga ilizwi likayehova, koko wagaleleka pezu kwamaxoba, wakwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova?" 
1Samuel15:20 Waza u‐Saule wati ku‐Samyali: Ewe, ndilivile ilizwi likayehova, ndihambile endleleni uyehova wandituma ngayo, ndimzisile u‐Hagagi ukumkani wama‐Amaleki, nama‐Amaleki ndiwalahlele ekutshatyalalisweni:" 
1Samuel15:21 kodwa abantu bacapula kuwo amaxoba, igusha nenkabi, oko kunqabileyo pakati kwokulahlelwe ekutshatyalalisweni, ukuze babingele uyehova, utixo wako, e‐Gilegale." 
1Samuel15:22 Waza u‐Samyali wati: Uyehova uyakoliswa ngamadini okutshiswa nemibingo na, njengokuba ekoliswa kukuva ilizwi likayehova? Bona ke, ukuva kulungile ngapezu kwombingo, n okupulapula ngapezu kwenqata lenkunzi zegusha." 
1Samuel15:23 Ngokuba ukungeva kusisono sokulaula, nenkani ikukukonza amadalo neterafi. Ngenxa yokuba ulahlile ilizwi likayehova, naye ulahlile wena ungabi ngukumkani." 
1Samuel15:24 Wandula u‐Saule wati ku‐Samyali: Ndonile; ngokuba ndigqitile umteto kayehova namazwi ako; ngokuba bendiboyika abantu, ndeva ilizwi labo:" 
1Samuel15:25 ngako kaloku, ndixolele ke isono sam, uze ubuye nam, ukuba ndimbedeshe uyehova." 
1Samuel15:26 Waza u‐Samyali wati ku‐Saule: Andiyi kubuya nawe: ngokokuba ulahlile ilizwi likayehova, kukona uyehova alahlile wena, ukuze ungabi ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
1Samuel15:27 Wati akujika u‐Samyali ukuba emke, wabamba isondo lengubo yake, lada laṙazuka." 
1Samuel15:28 Wayesiti u‐Samyali kuye: Uyehova uṙazulile kuwe ubukumkani bakwa‐Sirayeli namhla, wabunika kummelwane wako, okugqitisileyo ngokulunga:" 
1Samuel15:29 kanjako oyinyaniso ka‐Sirayeli akaxoki, akaguquki nokuguquka; ngokuba engengumntu, ukuba aguquke." 
1Samuel15:30 Waza wati: Ndonile; noko kaloku kaundibeke pambi kwabadala babantu bam, napambi kwo‐Sirayeli, uze ubuye nam, ukuba ndimbedeshe uyehova, utixo wako." 
1Samuel15:31 Wandula wabuya u‐Samyali waya emva kwo‐Saule; wati u‐Saule wambedesha uyehova. 
1Samuel15:32 Waza wati u‐Samyali: Sondezani kum u‐Hagagi ukumkani wama‐Amaleki. Kekaloku u‐Hagagi waya kuye ngokucwayita. Wati ke u‐Hagagi: Ngenyaniso ubuṙaṙa bokufa bumkile! 
1Samuel15:33 Wayesiti u‐Samyali: Njengokuba iṙele lako libahlutile abafazi abantwana babo, kwa njalo unyoko uya kuhlutwa abantwana pakati kwabafazi. Waza u‐Samyali wamhlahla u‐Hagagi pambi kwoyehova e‐Gilegale." 
1Samuel15:34 Wandula u‐Samyali waya e‐Rama; wenyuka u‐Saule waya endlwini yake e‐Gibeha ka‐Saule. 
1Samuel15:35 Akapinda ke u‐Samyali ukumbona u‐Saule, kwada kwangumhla wokufa kwake: kodwa u‐Samyali wamlilela u‐Saule noko. Kanjako kwalusizi kuyehova ukuba ebemenzile u‐Saule ukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
1Samuel16:1 WADA uyehova wati ku‐Samyali: Kude kube ninina uya kumlilela u‐Saule, ndimlahlile nje mna ukuba angabi ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli? zalisa upondo lwako ngeoli, uhambe; ndokutuma ku‐Jese um‐Beteleheme; ngokuba ndizibonele ukumkani pakati kwonyana bake." 
1Samuel16:2 Waza u‐Samyali wati: Ndoti nina ukuhamba? akuva u‐Saule, wondibulala. Wayesiti uyehova: Tabata nawe itokazi lenkomo, uti: Ndize ukubingela uyehova." 
1Samuel16:3 Wandule umeme u‐Jese eze embingweni; ndandiya kukwazisa oko uya kukwenza; wauya kunditambisela lowo endimxela kuwe. 
1Samuel16:4 Wasuka wenza u‐Samyali oko akutetileyo uyehova, weza e‐Beteleheme. Baza abadala besixeko bamkaulela ngokungcangcazela, bati: Uyeza ngoxolo na?" 
1Samuel16:5 Wayesiti: Ngoxolo; ndize ukubingela uyehova: zingcwaliseni, nize nam embingweni. Waza wabangcwalisa u‐Jese nonyana bake, wabamemela embingweni." 
1Samuel16:6 Kwaye kute, bakungena, wambona u‐Eliyabe, wati: Okunene umtanjiswa wake upambi kwoyehova!" 
1Samuel16:7 Kodwa uyehova wati ku‐Samyali: Ungakangeli ukubonakala kwake, nobupakamo bobude bake, ngokuba ndimlahlile: ngokuba kungenjengokuba kubonwa ngumntu; ngokuba umntu ebona okupambi kwamehlo, kodwa uyehova ebona okusentliziyweni." 
1Samuel16:8 Wandula u‐Jese wambiza u‐Abinadabi, wamdlulisa pambi kwo‐Samyali. Wayesiti: Uyehova akamnyulanga nalowo." 
1Samuel16:9 Wandula u‐Jese wamdlulisa u‐Shama. Wayesiti: Uyehova akamnyulanga nalowo. 
1Samuel16:10 Kwa njalo u‐Jese wadlulisa isixe̔nxe sonyana bake pambi kwo‐Samyali. Wayesiti u‐Samyali ku‐Jese: Uyehova akanyulanga aba. 
1Samuel16:11 Walekela u‐Samyali wati ku‐Jese: Kukupela kwabantwana bako aba na? Wayesiti: Kusasele omncinane; kekaloku bona ke, uyalusa igusha. Waza u‐Samyali wati ku‐Jese: Tuma, umtabate; ngokuba singayi kuhlala ngokungqonga, ade afike apa." 
1Samuel16:12 Watuma ke, wamngenisa. Waye yena ebomvuṙa, enobuhle bamehlo nesoya sokubonakala. Wayesiti uyehova: Suka, umtambise; ngokuba lo enguye." 
1Samuel16:13 Wandula u‐Samyali watabata upondo oluneoli, wamtambisa pakati kwabakuluwe bake: wati umoya kayehova wehla pezu kwo‐Davide kwa semhleni lowo nangasemva. Wesuka ke u‐Samyali, waya e‐Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 KODWA umoya kayehova wemka ku‐Saule; waye umoya okohlakeleyo evela kuyehova wamzuma. 
1Samuel16:15 Zaza izicaka zika‐Saule zati kuye: Bona ke, umoya okohlakeleyo katixo uyakuzuma:" 
1Samuel16:16 maiti ke inkosi yetu ixelele izicaka zako ezisebusweni bako, ukuba zifune indoda eyaziyo ukubeta uhadi; kwakuya kuti, nxa umoya okohlakeleyo katixo apezu kwako, iya kwandula ibete ngesandla sayo, wauya kulunga." 
1Samuel16:17 Waza u‐Saule wati kuzo izicaka zake: Kanindikangelele indoda elungisayo ukubeta, niyizise kum." 
1Samuel16:18 Sapendula esinye sezicaka, sati: Bona ke, ndibonile unyana ka‐Jese um‐Beteleheme, owaziyo ukubeta, oligoṙa elibuṙoti, nendoda yokulwa, neciko lokuteta, nendoda enewonga; kanjalo uyehova unaye." 
1Samuel16:19 Ngako u‐Saule watuma izigidimi ku‐Jese, wati: Tuma kum u‐Davide unyana wako, osezigusheni." 
1Samuel16:20 Wandula u‐Jese watabata iqwaṙashe linesonka, nentsuba yeveyine, netakane lebokwe, wazituma ngesandla sika‐Davide, unyana wake, ku‐Saule." 
1Samuel16:21 Wasuka u‐Davide weza ku‐Saule, wema pambi kwake; waza watandwa nguye kakulu, waba ngumtwali wake wezixo̔bo." 
1Samuel16:22 Wabuya u‐Saule watuma ku‐Jese, esiti: Makati ke u‐Davide eme pambi kwam; ngokuba efumene ufefe emehlweni am." 
1Samuel16:23 Kwaye kute, akuba umoya okohlakeleyo katixo ebepezu kwo‐Saule, wandula u‐Davide watabata uhadi, walubeta ngesandla sake; wada u‐Saule womelela, walunga nokulunga, wati umoya okohlakeleyo wemka kuye." 
1Samuel17:1 KEKALOKU ama‐Filistiya ahlanganisa imikosi yawo kuliwe, ahlanganisana e‐Soko yakwa‐Juda, aya ati waca pakati kwe‐Soko ne‐Hazeka, e‐Epese‐damime." 
1Samuel17:2 Kanjako kwahlanganisana u‐Saule namadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, baya bati waca emhlanjeni wemikoba, bazicwangcisa ukulwa ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel17:3 Ati ama‐Filistiya ema ngasentabeni ngelicala, nama‐Sirayeli ema ngasentabeni ngeliya icala, isihlambo sipakati kwawo." 
1Samuel17:4 Kwaza kwapuma emnqubeni wama‐Filistiya indoda engumlamli, ebingu‐Goliyate igama layo, eyase‐Gate, ebude bayo bebuzikubite ezintandatu zinesoluko sesandla." 
1Samuel17:5 Yabinomnqwazi wobedu pezu kwentloko yayo, ivatisiwe ngehempe yentsimbi ebukwetuṙa; nokuba nzima kwayo ihempe yentsimbi, ibizishekele zobedu ezimawaka mahlanu." 
1Samuel17:6 Yabinebrukwe yobedu emilenzeni yayo, nomkonto wobedu pakati kwamagxalaba ayo." 
1Samuel17:7 Uluti lwentshuntshe yayo belunjengomti wabaluki; nentsimbi yentshuntshe yayo ibiyeyeshekele ezingamakulu matandatu zesincete; waye umtwali wekaka ehamba pambi kwayo. 
1Samuel17:8 Yati ke yona yema yabiza emabandleni ama‐Sirayeli, yati kuwo: Kunganina ukuba nipumile ukuza kuzicwangcisa ukulwa? andinguye na um‐Filistiya, nani anizizicaka zika‐Saule na? zinyuleleni indoda, ize ihlele kum." 
1Samuel17:9 Ukuba ingalwa nam, indibulale, sesiya kuba zizicaka zenu; kodwa ukuba ndiyoyisa yona, ndiyibulale, seniya kuba zizicaka zetu, nisikonze." 
1Samuel17:10 Waza wati um‐Filistiya lowo: Ndiyagxeka namhla nje amabandla ama‐Sirayeli; ndinikeni indoda, ukuze silwane." 
1Samuel17:11 Bati bakuva u‐Saule nawo onke ama‐Sirayeli lamazwi om‐Filistiya, bandula betuswa, boyika kakulu." 
1Samuel17:12 Kekaloku u‐Davide ebengunyana walom‐Eferata wase‐Beteleheme‐juda, ogama belingu‐Jese; owabenonyana abasibozo: kanjalo indoda leyo, emihleni ka‐Saule, yahlala ilixego pakati kwabantu." 
1Samuel17:13 Baya onyana abatatu baka‐Jese abakulu, bamlandela u‐Saule ukuya ekulweni: namagama onyana bake abatatu ababesiya ekulweni, ngu‐Eliyabe owamazibulo, nowesibini wake u‐Abinadabi, nowesitatu u‐Shama:" 
1Samuel17:14 waye u‐Davide wayengomncinane: bati abakulu abo abatatu bamlandela u‐Saule. 
1Samuel17:15 Kodwa u‐Davide wemka wabuya ku‐Saule, ukuya kuzalusa igusha zoyise e‐Beteleheme." 
1Samuel17:16 Wati um‐Filistiya lowo wasondela kusasa nangokuhlwa, wazimisa kona imihla yamashumi mane." 
1Samuel17:17 Waza u‐Jese wati ku‐Davide unyana wake: Batabatele ke abakuluwe bako iyefa yalamaqashu, nezizonka ezilishumi, ugidime uye emnqubeni kubakuluwe bako;" 
1Samuel17:18 nezizonka zamasi ezilishumi uzise kuyo inkosi yewaka, nabakuluwe bako uye kubabona ukuba kunjanina ukupila kwabo, nombambiso wabo uwutabate." 
1Samuel17:19 Kekaloku u‐Saule, nabo bona, nawo onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, bebesemhlanjeni wemikoba, besilwa nama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel17:20 Wandula u‐Davide wavuka kusasa, wazishiya igusha kumlindi, watabata, wahamba, njengokuba u‐Jese ebemyalele; wada wafika eludongeni lwenqwelo, nxa impi ibipuma ngamabandla, nanxa kwamemezelwa ukulwa:" 
1Samuel17:21 ngokuba ama‐Sirayeli nama‐Filistiya ebecwangcisile ibandla ngakulo ibandla. 
1Samuel17:22 Wasuka u‐Davide washiya impahla ezikuye ezandleni zomlindi wempahla, wagidimela ngasemabandleni, weza wabuza abakuluwe bake ukupila kwabo." 
1Samuel17:23 Nxa abeteta nabo, nantsi indoda engumlamli inyuka, egama belingu‐Goliyate, um‐Filistiya wase‐Gate, ivela emabandleni ama‐Filistiya, eyateta njengalamazwi: weva ke u‐Davide." 
1Samuel17:24 Aza onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, akubona londoda, abaleka ebusweni bayo, oyika kakulu." 
1Samuel17:25 Kanjalo amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ati: Niyibonile na lendoda enyukileyo? ngokuba inyukile ukuza kugxeka o‐Sirayeli: kwakuya kuti, leyondoda eyibulalayo, ukumkani uya kuyityebisa ngobutyebi obukulu, ayinike intombi yake, ayenze indlu yoyise ibe ikululekile." 
1Samuel17:26 Waza u‐Davide wateta kumadoda abemi ngakuye, esiti: Kuya kwenzwa nto nina kulondoda ebulalayo lom‐Filistiya, nesusayo ihlazo kwa‐Sirayeli? ngokuba engubanina lom‐Filistiya ongalukileyo, ukuba agxeke amabandla katixo ohleliyo?" 
1Samuel17:27 Batsho abantu kuye njengelozwi, besiti: Kuya kwenziwa njalo kulondoda embulalayo." 
1Samuel17:28 Waza u‐Eliyabe, umkuluwe wake omkulu, weva akuteta kulomadoda; yandula yavuta ingqumbo ka‐Eliyabe ngakuye u‐Davide, wati: Yinina ukuba uhlele apa? kanjalo uzishiyile kubanina ezogusha zincinane entlango? ndiyazi mna ir̔atshi lako, nenkohlakalo yentliziyo yako; ngokuba uhlile, ukuze ubone ukulwa." 
1Samuel17:29 Wayesiti u‐Davide: Yinto nina endiyenzileyo kaloku? ilizwi belingenjalo na? 
1Samuel17:30 Waza washenxa kuye wabeka komnye, wateta njengelozwi; bati abantu babuya bampendula njengelizwi lokuqala." 
1Samuel17:31 Kwati kwakuviwa amazwi abewateta u‐Davide, andula axelwa ebusweni buka‐Saule, o watuma wamtabata." 
1Samuel17:32 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Saule: Makungawi intliziyo yomntu ngenxa yake; isicaka sako siya kuya silwe nalom‐Filistiya. 
1Samuel17:33 Koko u‐Saule wati ku‐Davide: Akungeye ngakuye lom‐Filistiya ukulwa naye; ngokuba wena ungumfana, kodwa yena uyindoda yokulwa kwa sebutsheni bake." 
1Samuel17:34 Wandula u‐Davide wati ku‐Saule: Isicaka sako besisalusa igusha zoyise waso; kwaye kufika ingonyama, nebere, ebisusa igusha emhlambini;" 
1Samuel17:35 ndaza ndapuma emva kwayo, ndayibeta, ndayisindisa emlonyeni wayo; nanxa ibisukela ngakum, ndayibamba ngodevu lwayo, ndayibeta, ndayibulala." 
1Samuel17:36 Isicaka sako sabeta nengonyama nebere; nalom‐Filistiya angalukileyo yena uya kuba njengenye kwezo; ngokuba egxekile amabandla katixo ohleliyo. 
1Samuel17:37 Wati kanjalo u‐Davide: Uyehova, owandisindisa enqineni lengonyama nasenqineni lebere, kwa yena wondisindisa esandleni salom‐Filistiya. Waza u‐Saule wati ku‐Davide: Yiya, wanga uyehova angako nawe!" 
1Samuel17:38 Waye u‐Saule wamvatisa u‐Davide ngezivato zake, wabeka umnqwazi wobedu entlokweni yake; wamvatisa ngehempe yentsimbi kanjalo." 
1Samuel17:39 Waza u‐Davide wabinqa iṙele lake pezu kwezivato zake, wafuna ukuhamba, ngokuba ebengalilinganga. Wandula u‐Davide wati ku‐Saule: Andingeye nezizinto, ngokuba ndingazilinganga. Ngako u‐Davide wazisusa kuye." 
1Samuel17:40 Waza watabata induku yake esandleni sake, wazinyulela amatye abutelezi amahlanu emlanjaneni, wawabeka enxoweni yabalusi abenayo, kwa sesidleni; kanjako isisaulo sake besisesandleni sake: waya wasondela kum‐Filistiya lowo." 
1Samuel17:41 Wasuka wahamba um‐Filistiya, wamana esondela ku‐Davide; yati indoda etwele ikaka yahamba pambi kwake." 
1Samuel17:42 Wati um‐Filistiya akukangela, wambona u‐Davide, wamdela: ngokuba ebengumfana, ebomvuṙa, emhle ukubonakala kwake." 
1Samuel17:43 Waza um‐Filistiya wati ku‐Davide: Ndiyinja na mna, ukuba wena uyeza kum ngenduku? Waye um‐Filistiya wamqalekisa u‐Davide ngotixo bake." 
1Samuel17:44 Wati um‐Filistiya kanjako ku‐Davide: Yiza kum, ndandiya kunika inyama yako kuzo intaka zezulu, nakuzo izilo zasendle." 
1Samuel17:45 Wandula u‐Davide wati kum‐Filistiya: Wena uyeza kum ngeṙele, nangentshuntshe, nangekaka; kodwa mna ndiyeza kuwe egameni likayehova wemikosi, utixo wamabandla ama‐Sirayeli, lowo umgxekileyo:" 
1Samuel17:46 namhla nje uyehova wokunikela esandleni sam; ndandiya kukubeta, ndisuse intloko yako kuwe, ndinike izidumbu zomkosi wama‐Filistiya namhla nje kuzo intaka zezulu, nakuwo amaṙamncwa omhlaba; ukuze umhlaba wonke wazi ukuba uko utixo kwa‐Sirayeli:" 
1Samuel17:47 kanjalo wonke lomhlambi wokwazi ukuba uyehova akasindisi ngeṙele nangentshuntshe; ngokuba ukulwa kuko kukayehova, oya kuninikela esandleni setu." 
1Samuel17:48 Kwaza kwati, wesuka um‐Filistiya, wahamba, wasondela ukumkaulela u‐Davide; wandula u‐Davide wanxama, wagidimela ngasemabandleni ukuya kumkaulela um‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel17:49 Waye u‐Davide wafaka isandla sake enxoweni, wasusa kona ilitye, walisaula, wabeta um‐Filistiya ebunzini lake; lati ilitye latshona ebunzini lake, wawa yena ebusweni bake ngasemhlabeni." 
1Samuel17:50 Kwa njalo u‐Davide wameyisa um‐Filistiya ngesisaulo nangelitye, wambeta um‐Filistiya, wambulala; kodwa bekungeko iṙele esandleni sika‐Davide." 
1Samuel17:51 Waza u‐Davide wagidima, wema pezu kwom‐Filistiya, watabata iṙele lake, walir̔ola esinxobeni salo, wambulala, wanqumla ngalo intloko yake. Kekaloku akubona ama‐Filistiya ukuba igoṙa lawo lifile, abaleka." 
1Samuel17:52 Andula esuka amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli nawakwa‐Juda, amemeza, aputuma ama‐Filistiya, kude kwafikwa esihlanjeni, nakude kwasemasangweni ase‐Hekrone. Zati inxweleṙa zama‐Filistiya zawa endleleni yase‐Sharayime, kwa kude kwase‐Gate, nakude kwase‐Hekrone." 
1Samuel17:53 Lwada usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabuya ekugxotiseni ama‐Filistiya, lwapanga iminquba yawo." 
1Samuel17:54 Waza u‐Davide watabata intloko yom‐Filistiya, wayizisa e‐Yerusaleme; kodwa izixo̔bo zake wazibeka ententeni yake." 
1Samuel17:55 Nxa ke u‐Saule abembona u‐Davide epumela ngakuye um‐Filistiya, wati ku‐Abenere, inkosi yomkosi: Ungunyana kabanina lomfana, Abenere? Wayesiti u‐Abenere: Bomi bompefumlo wako, kumkani! andimazi." 
1Samuel17:56 Waza wati ukumkani: Buza wena ingunyana kabanina indodana le. 
1Samuel17:57 Wati akuba u‐Davide ebebuya ekubulaleni um‐Filistiya, u‐Abenere wamtabata, wamzisa ebusweni buka‐Saule, enentloko yom‐Filistiya esandleni sake." 
1Samuel17:58 Waza u‐Saule wati kuye: Ungunyana kabanina, mfanandini? Wayesiti u‐Davide: Ndingunyana wesicaka sako u‐Jese um‐Beteleheme." 
1Samuel18:1 Kwaye kute, akuba egqibile ukuteta ku‐Saule, wandula umpefumlo ka‐Jonatane wanxityelelwa empefumlweni ka‐Davide; waye u‐Jonatane wamtanda njengompefumlo wake." 
1Samuel18:2 Waza u‐Saule wamtabata ngomhla lowo, engamvumeli ukuba abuyele endlwini yoyise." 
1Samuel18:3 Wandula u‐Jonatane wenza ucebano no‐Davide, ngokuba ebemtanda njengompefumlo wake:" 
1Samuel18:4 wati kanjalo u‐Jonatane wazihluba ingubo ebikuye, wayinika ku‐Davide, nezivato zake, kwa neṙele lake, nesipeta sake, noqwemesha lwake." 
1Samuel18:5 Waye u‐Davide wapumela apo asukuba u‐Saule ebemtumela kona, wenza ngobulumko; waza u‐Saule wambeka pezu kwamadoda okulwa; waekolekile emehlweni abantu bonke, nasemehlweni ezicaka zika‐Saule kanjako." 
1Samuel18:6 Kwaye kute ekutikeni kwabo, nxa u‐Davide abebuya ekubulaleni um‐Filistiya, kwapuma abafazi kuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Sirayeli, ngokuvuma nangemidudo, ukuya kumkaulela u‐Saule ukumkani, ngentambula, na ngovuyo, nangeziculiso." 
1Samuel18:7 Baza abafazi bapendulana ekudlaleni kwabo, bati: u‐Saule ubulele amawaka ake, kodwa u‐Davide amawaka ake alishumi." 
1Samuel18:8 Wandula u‐Saule waqumba kunene, ngokuba belibi emehlweni ake ilizwi elo; wayesiti: Banikile ku‐Davide amawaka alishumi, kanti kum banikile amawaka odwa; kuseko ukunikwa kuye ubukumkani kupela." 
1Samuel18:9 Waye u‐Saule enomona ngakuye u‐Davide, kwa semhleni lowo nangasemva kwawo." 
1Samuel18:10 KWABEKUTE ngomhla olandelayo, ukuba umoya okohlakeleyo katixo wamzuma u‐Saule, wada waprofitesha pakati kwendlu; waza u‐Davide wabeta uhadi ngesandla sake, njengakweminye imihla: kekaloku bekuko intshuntshe esandleni sika‐Saule." 
1Samuel18:11 Wasuka u‐Saule wabinza ngentshuntshe, wati: Ndiya kumbetela u‐Davide kwa seludongeni; kodwa u‐Davide wapepa ebusweni bake kabini." 
1Samuel18:12 Wandula u‐Saule wamoyika u‐Davide, ngokuba uyehova enaye, kanti ebemkile ku‐Saule." 
1Samuel18:13 Ngako u‐Saule wamshenxisa kuye, wammisa abe yinkosi yake yewaka; waza wapuma wangena pambi kwabantu." 
1Samuel18:14 Kekaloku u‐Davide wenza ngobulumko kuzo zonke indlela zake; waye uyehova enaye. 
1Samuel18:15 Wati u‐Saule akubona ukuba u‐Davide wenza ngokulumkileyo kakulu, wamoyika." 
1Samuel18:16 Kodwa bonke o‐Sirayeli no‐Juda bamtanda u‐Davide, ngokuba wapuma wangena ebusweni babo." 
1Samuel18:17 Waza u‐Saule wati ku‐Davide: Nanku u‐Merabi, intombi yam enkulu, endiya kumnika kuwe abe ngumfazi; kupela ube ngunyana wobuṙoti kum, ulwe imfazwe zikayehova. Ngokuba u‐Saule ebesiti: Masingabi ngakuye isandla sam, masibe ngakuye isandla sama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel18:18 Koko u‐Davide wati ku‐Saule: Ndingubanina mna? buyinto nina nobomi bam? siyinto nina isizalwane sobawo kwa‐Sirayeli, ukuba ndibe ngumyeni kukumkani?" 
1Samuel18:19 Kwaye kute kodwa ngexesha abeya kunikwa u‐Merabi, intombi ka‐Saule, ku‐Davide, wanikwa yena ku‐Hadriyeli, um‐Mehola, abe ngumfazi." 
1Samuel18:20 Waza u‐Mikali, intombi ka‐Saule, wamtanda u‐Davide; kwati kwakuxelwa ku‐Saule, yabifanele londawo emehlweni ake." 
1Samuel18:21 Wayesiti u‐Saule: Ndiya kumnika yena, ukuba abe ngumgibe kuye, nokuba isandla sama‐Filistiya sibe ngakuye. Ngako u‐Saule wati ku‐Davide: Uya kuba ngumyeni kum namhla ngowesibini." 
1Samuel18:22 Waye u‐Saule wayalela izicaka zake, wati: Tetani ku‐Davide ngasese, nisiti: Bona ke, ukumkani ukolisiwe nguwe, nazo zonke izicaka zake ziyakutanda; ngako kaloku yiba ngumyeni kuye ukumkani." 
1Samuel18:23 Zaza izicaka zika‐Saule zateta lamazwi ezindlebeni zika‐Davide. Wayesiti u‐Davide: Kuyinto elula emehlweni enu na ukuba ngumyeni kukumkani, ndiyindoda elihlwempu nedelekileyo nje?" 
1Samuel18:24 Zaza izicaka zika‐Saule zamxelela, zisiti: Njengalamazwi wateta u‐Davide." 
1Samuel18:25 Wandula u‐Saule wati: Niya kutsho ku‐Davide ukuti: Ukumkani akanyamekeli ikazi, kodwa ikulu lamajwabu ama‐Filistiya, ukuze kupindezelwe ezintshabeni zokumkani. Kanti u‐Saule wacinga ukumwisa u‐Davide ngesandla sama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel18:26 Zaza izicaka zake zamxelela u‐Davide lamazwi; kekaloku londawo ibifanele emehlweni ka‐Davide, yokuba abe ngumyeni kukumkani: kodwa imihla ibingekazalisekile:" 
1Samuel18:27 ngako wesuka u‐Davide waya, yena namadoda ake, wabulala amadoda angamakulu mabini pakati kwama‐Filistiya; wati u‐Davide wazisa amajwabu awo, baza bawanika ngelonani lonke kukumkani, ukuba abe ngumyeni kuye ukumkani. Wandula u‐Saule wamnika u‐Mikali, intombi yake, abe ngumfazi." 
1Samuel18:28 Waye u‐Saule wabona, wakwazi, ukuba uyehova uno‐Davide; kanjalo u‐Mikali, intombi ka‐Saule, wamtanda u‐Davide." 
1Samuel18:29 Waza walekela u‐Saule ukumoyika u‐Davide ngakumbi; wati u‐Saule waba lutshaba luka‐Davide imihla yonke. 
1Samuel18:30 Zandula zapuma inkosi zama‐Filistiya: kwaye kute, nxa sukuba zipumile, u‐Davide wenza ngobulumko pezu kwazo zonke izicaka zika‐Saule, lada igama lake lanconywa kakulu." 
1Samuel19:1 WADA u‐Saule wateta ku‐Jonatane unyana wake, nakuzo zonke izicaka zake, ukuba bamfise u‐Davide. Kodwa u‐Jonatane, unyana ka‐Saule, wakoliswa ngu‐Davide kakulu:" 
1Samuel19:2 waza u‐Jonatane wamxelela u‐Davide, esiti: u‐Saule, ubawo, uyafuna ukukufisa; ngako kaloku zilumkele ke kwakusa, uhlale endaweni efihlakeleyo, uzimele:" 
1Samuel19:3 sendiya kupuma mna, ndime ngasesandleni sobawo endle, apo wena ukona; ndandiya kuteta kubawo ngawe; nento endiyibonayo, ndoyixela kuwe." 
1Samuel19:4 Waye u‐Jonatane wateta okulungileyo ngaye u‐Davide ku‐Saule uyise, wati kuye: Makangoni ukumkani ngakuso isicaka sake, ngakuye u‐Davide; ngokuba engonanga ngakuwe, nangokuba izenzo zake kuwe zilungile kakulu:" 
1Samuel19:5 ngokuba ebebeka ubomi bake esandleni sake, wambulala um‐Filistiya lowo, wati uyehova wenzela o‐Sirayeli bonke usindiso olukulu: ubulubona wena, wavuya nokuvuya: yinina ngoko ukuba uya kwona ngakulo igazi elingenatyala, ngokumfisa u‐Davide kungeko nto?" 
1Samuel19:6 Waza u‐Saule wapulapula ilizwi lika‐Jonatane; kanjalo wafunga u‐Saule ngokuti: Njengokuba uyehova ehleli, akayi kufiswa!" 
1Samuel19:7 Wasuka u‐Jonatane wambiza u‐Davide; wati u‐Jonatane wamxelela lamazwi onke. Waza u‐Jonatane wamzisa u‐Davide ku‐Saule, owabako ebusweni bake njengapambili." 
1Samuel19:8 Kwabuya kwabako imfazwe: wandula wapuma u‐Davide walwa nama‐Filistiya, wawabulala ngesibulalo esikulu; ada abaleka ebusweni bake." 
1Samuel19:9 Kekaloku umoya okohlakeleyo kayehova waba pezu kwo‐Saule, nxa abehleli endlwini yake, enentshuntshe yake esandleni sake; waye u‐Davide wabeta uhadi ngesandla." 
1Samuel19:10 Waza u‐Saule wafuna ukumbetela u‐Davide ngentshuntshe kwa seludongeni; kodwa wanyebeleza ebusweni buka‐Saule, owabetela intshuntshe eludongeni; wati u‐Davide wabaleka, wasinda ngobobusuku." 
1Samuel19:11 Wandula u‐Saule watuma izigidimi ukuya endlwini ka‐Davide, zimlinde, zimfise kwakusa: koko u‐Mikali, umfazi wake, wamxelela u‐Davide, esiti: Ukuba akusindisi ubomi bako ngobubusuku, ngomso uya kufiswa." 
1Samuel19:12 Waza u‐Mikali wamhlisa u‐Davide ngefenstile; wahamba ke, wesaba, wasinda." 
1Samuel19:13 Wandula u‐Mikali watabata iterafi, wayibeka emandlalweni, wabeka umqamelelo woboya bebokwe ngasentlokweni yayo, wayigubungela ngengubo." 
1Samuel19:14 Kekaloku akutuma u‐Saule izigidimi, zize zimtabate u‐Davide, wati: Uyafa yena." 
1Samuel19:15 Wabuya u‐Saule watuma izigidimi ukuba zimbone u‐Davide, esiti: Nimnyusele kum emandlalweni, ndimfise." 
1Samuel19:16 Kwati kwakungena izigidimi, nantsi ke iterafi emandlalweni, nomqamelelo woboya bebokwe ngasentlokweni yayo." 
1Samuel19:17 Waza u‐Saule wati ku‐Mikali: Yinina ukuba wenje njalo ukundibukuqa, undulule nje utshaba lwam, lusinde? Wayesiti u‐Mikali ku‐Saule: Yena wati kum: Ndindulule; yinina ukuba ndikufise?" 
1Samuel19:18 Kwa njalo u‐Davide wesaba, wasinda, weza ku‐Samyali e‐Rama, wamxelela konke abekwenzelwe ngu‐Saule. Wahamba yena no‐Samyali, baya bahlala e‐Nayote." 
1Samuel19:19 Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Saule, kusitwa: Nankuya u‐Davide, e‐Nayote ngase‐Rama." 
1Samuel19:20 Wandula u‐Saule watuma izigidimi ukuya kumtabata u‐Davide: kwati kwakubonwa umhlambi wabaprofite beprofitesha, no‐Samyali emi, emisiwe pezu kwabo, kwabako umoya katixo pezu kwezigidimi zika‐Saule, zaye ziprofitesha nazo." 
1Samuel19:21 Kwakuxelwa ku‐Saule, watuma ezinye izigidimi, zaye ziprofitesha nazo. Walekela u‐Saule watuma izigidimi ngokwesitatu, zaye ziprofitesha nazo." 
1Samuel19:22 Wandula waya naye e‐Rama, weza equleni elikulu elise‐Seku, wabuza, wati: Bapina u‐Samyali no‐Davide? Kwatiwa: Nabaya, e‐Nayote ngase‐Rama." 
1Samuel19:23 Waza waya kona e‐Nayote ngase‐Rama; wati umoya katixo wabako napezu kwake, wahamba, wamana eprofitesha, wada wafika e‐Nayote ngase‐Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 Wati naye wahluba ingubo zake, waprofitesha naye ebusweni buka‐Samyali, walala pantsi eba zé ngalomini yonke nangobobusuku bonke. Ngako oko kwatiwa: Kanene u‐Saule upakati kwabaprofite naye na?" 
1Samuel20:1 WANDULA u‐Davide wesaba e‐Nayote ngase‐Rama, weza wati ebusweni buka‐Jonatane: Iyinto nina endiyenzileyo? liyinina ityala lam? siyinina nesono sam ebusweni boyihlo, ukuba uyafuna ubomi bam?" 
1Samuel20:2 Wayesiti kuye: Makube lé oko! akuyi kufa. Bona ke, ubawo akenzi into enkulu umhlaumbi into encinane, angayityiliyo endlebeni yam; kunganina ke ukuba ubawo andifihlele lento? akunjalo." 
1Samuel20:3 Walekela wafunga u‐Davide, wati: Uyihlo uyazi ngenyaniso ukuba ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako; ngako ute: Makangazi oku u‐Jonatane, hleze adandateke; kodwa noko, njengokuba uyehova ehleli, na njengokuba umpefumlo wako uhleli, kuko inyatela linye kupela pakati kwam nokufa!" 
1Samuel20:4 Wandula u‐Jonatane wati ku‐Davide: Into uyitetayo umpefumlo wako, ndiya kukwenzela yona." 
1Samuel20:5 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Jonatane: Bona ke, inyanga iya kutwasa ngomso, nxa ndifanele ukuhlala nokumkani ngasekudleni; kodwa ndindulule, ukuba ndizifihle ezindle, kude kuhlwe ngomhla wesitatu." 
1Samuel20:6 Ukuba uyihlo uka abone ukungabiko kwam, yandula uti: Wazingisa u‐Davide ukucela kum, ukuba agidimele e‐Beteleheme, isixeko sakowabo; ngokuba kuko apo umbingo womnyaka ngomnyaka, owenz elwa isizalwane sonke." 
1Samuel20:7 Ukuba utsho ukuti: Kulungile; sesiya kuba noxolo isicaka sako: kodwa ukuba unokuqumba kakulu, yazi ke ukuba ububi bugqityiwe nguye." 
1Samuel20:8 Ngako yenza ngobubele kwisicaka sako; ngokuba ungenisile isicaka sako elucebanweni lukayehova kunye nawe: noko, ukuba kuko ityala kum, ndifise ngokwako, ngokuba kunganina ukuba undizise kuyihlo?" 
1Samuel20:9 Waza u‐Jonatane wati: Makube lé kuwe, okokuba, nxa bendisazi ngenyaniso ukuba ububi bugqityiwe ngubawo buze pezu kwako, bendingayi kuxela bona kuwe." 
1Samuel20:10 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Jonatane: Ngubanina oya kundixelela, ukuba uyihlo uka akupendule into ngobulukuni?" 
1Samuel20:11 Wandula u‐Jonatane wati ku‐Davide: Hamba, sipume siye ezindle. Bapuma baya ezindle bobabini." 
1Samuel20:12 Waza u‐Jonatane wati ku‐Davide: Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! nxa ndimṙoṙonya ubawo ngelixesha ngomso, umhlaumbi ngomso mnye, kuze kuti, bona ke, kulungele u‐Davide, ndize ndinganduli nditume kuwe, ndityile endlebeni yako," 
1Samuel20:13 makenje njalo uyehova ku‐Jonatane, alekele ukwenje njalo! kodwa ukuba kuyakolisa ubawo ukuzisa ububi pezu kwako, ndiya kwandula ndiyityile endlebeni yako, ndikundulule, ukuba uhambe ngoxolo: wanga uyehova angako nawe, njengokuba ebeko nobawo." 
1Samuel20:14 Kanjalo akuyi kundenzela ububele bukayehova nxa ndisahleli kupela, ukuze ndingafi;" 
1Samuel20:15 kodwa akuyi kunqamla ububele bako kuyo indlu yam kude kube ngunapakade; hai, nanxa uyehova anqamlile intshaba zika‐Davide zonke ebusweni bomhlaba." 
1Samuel20:16 Waza u‐Jonatane wenza ucebano nendlu ka‐Davide, esiti: Makabize uyehova esandleni sentshaba zika‐Davide!" 
1Samuel20:17 Walekela u‐Jonatane ukumfungisa u‐Davide, ngenxa yokumtanda kwake; ngokuba ebemtanda ngokutanda kwompefumlo wake." 
1Samuel20:18 Wandula u‐Jonatane wati ku‐Davide: Ngomso inyanga iya kutwasa; kwakuya kubonwa ukuba akuko, ngokuba isihlalo sako soba zé." 
1Samuel20:19 Ngako ngomhla wesitatu uya kuhla kamsinyane, uye kulondawo apo wazifihla kona ngomhla walomsebenzi, uhlale ngaselityeni le‐Ezele." 
1Samuel20:20 Nam, ndiya kutola intolo ezintatu ngasecaleni, njengokungati ndibe nditola emlinganisweni." 
1Samuel20:21 Kekaloku bona ke, ndiya kutuma umfana, ndisiti: Hamba, uzifune intolo. Ukuba nditi ekuhleni kumfana: Nanzi intolo zinganeno kwako, zitabate; wandule uze, ngokuba kuko uxolo kuwe, kungeko nto, njengokuba uyehova ehleli." 
1Samuel20:22 Kodwa ukuba nditsho kwindodana ukuti: Nanziya intolo ngasele kwako; hamba ke, ngokuba uyehova ekundulule." 
1Samuel20:23 Nalonto esibe siteta mna nawe ngayo, bona ke, uyehova makabe pakati kwam nawe kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Samuel20:24 Waya u‐Davide wazifihla ezindle: kwati kwakutwasa inyanga, wandula ukumkani wahlala ngasekudleni ukuba atye." 
1Samuel20:25 Wati ukumkani wahlala esihlalweni sake, njengakuwo amanye amaxesha, esihlalweni saseludongeni; wesuka ke u‐Jonatane, waza u‐Abenere wahlala ngasecaleni lika‐Saule, kodwa indawo ka‐Davide ibifunyanwa zé." 
1Samuel20:26 Kekaloku u‐Saule akateta nanye into ngomhla lowo; ngokuba ebesiti: Uhlelwe yinto; akacocekile, ngenyaniso akacocekile." 
1Samuel20:27 Kwaye kute ngomnye umhla, ngowesibini wenyanga etwasileyo, kwakufunyanwa zé indawo ka‐Davide, wandula wati u‐Saule ku‐Jonatane unyana wake: Kunganina ukuba unyana ka‐Jese akezanga ekudleni nezolo nanamhla?" 
1Samuel20:28 Waza u‐Jonatane wampendula u‐Saule, wati: Wazingisa u‐Davide ukucela kum ukuba aye e‐Beteleheme;" 
1Samuel20:29 wayesiti: Ndindulule ke, ngokuba isizalwane setu sinombingo esixekweni; kanjalo umkuluwe wam undiyalele ngokwake: ngako kaloku, ukuba ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, makendisuke ke, ndiye kubona abakuluwe bam. Kukona ke angezanga etafileni yokumkani." 
1Samuel20:30 Yandula yavuta ingqumbo ka‐Saule ngakuye u‐Jonatane, wati kuye: Wena nyana womfazi ogwenxa ongevayo! andazi na ukuba umnyulile unyana ka‐Jese libe lihlazo lako, nehlazo lobuzé bonyoko?" 
1Samuel20:31 ngokuba yonke imihla unyana ka‐Jese aya kudla ubomi ngayo emhlabeni, ungayi kuqiniswa wena, nobukumkani bako: ngako kaloku, tuma ke, umtabate eze kum, ngokuba emelwe kukufa yena." 
1Samuel20:32 Wandula u‐Jonatane wampendula u‐Saule uyise, wati kuye: Kunganina ukuba afiswe? yinto nina ayenzileyo?" 
1Samuel20:33 Wasuka u‐Saule wambinza ngentshuntshe, ukuba ambete: ngako u‐Jonatane wazi ukuba bekugqityiwe nguyise ukumbulala u‐Davide." 
1Samuel20:34 Waza u‐Jonatane wesuka etafileni ngobushushu bengqumbo; waye engadli isonka ngomhla wesibini wenyanga etwasileyo, ngokuba ebedandateka ngaye u‐Davide, ngokuba uyise ebemhlazisile." 
1Samuel20:35 Kwaye kute kwakusa, wapuma u‐Jonatane waya endle endaweni yokuhlangana no‐Davide, umfana omncinane enaye." 
1Samuel20:36 Waza wati kumfana wake: Baleka, uzifune ke intolo endizitolayo. Nxa umfana abebaleka, watola utolo ukuba alugqitise kuye." 
1Samuel20:37 Akufika umfana endaweni yotolo abelutolile u‐Jonatane, wandula u‐Jonatane wabiza emva kwomfana, wati: Utolo alungasele kwako na?" 
1Samuel20:38 Wabuya u‐Jonatane wabiza emva kwomfana, esiti: Nxama, kauleza, ungemi. Waza umfana ka‐Jonatane wabuta intolo, weza enkosini yake." 
1Samuel20:39 Kodwa umfana ebengazi nto: ngu‐Jonatane no‐Davide abebesazi londawo kupela. 
1Samuel20:40 Waza u‐Jonatane wanika izixo̔bo zake kumfana obenaye, wati kuye: Hamba, uzise esixekweni." 
1Samuel20:41 Nxa umfana abemkile, wesuka u‐Davide ecaleni lesuyide, wawa ngobuso bake ngasemhlabeni, wazitoba katatu: baza bangana, balilana omnye nomnye, ade u‐Davide enze kakulu." 
1Samuel20:42 Wayesiti u‐Jonatane ku‐Davide: Hamba ngoxolo: ngokokuba sifungile sobabini egameni likayehova, sisiti: Uyehova makabe pakati kwam nawe, napakati kwenzalo yam nenzalo yako, kude kube ngunapakade! Waselesuka wemka; wati u‐Jonatane wangena esixekweni." 
1Samuel21:1 WANDULA weza u‐Davide e‐Nobe ku‐Ahimeleki umperisite: waye u‐Ahimeleki wamkaulela u‐Davide ngokungcangcazela, wati kuye: Yinina ukuba uwedwa, ingeko indoda nawe nje?" 
1Samuel21:2 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Ahimeleki umperisite: Ukumkani undiyalele umcimbi, wati kum: Makungaziwa mntu nanye into yalomcimbi endikutumileyo ngawo, nendikuyalele wona; kanjalo amadodana ndiwanqopisele indawo etile." 
1Samuel21:3 Ngako kaloku, yinto nina epantsi kwesandla sako? nikela izonka ezihlanu esandleni sam, umhlaumbi oko kusukuba kuko." 
1Samuel21:4 Waza umperisite wampendula u‐Davide, wati: Akuko isonka esingengcwele pantsi kwesandla sam, kuko kodwa isonka esingcwele, ukuba amadodana azigcinile ebafazini kupela." 
1Samuel21:5 Waza u‐Davide wampendula umperisite, wati kuye: Ngenyaniso abafazi babanjiwe kuti izolo nezolo elinye, nxa ndapumayo; kanjalo izitya zamadodana zingcwele; neso sesingati sisonka esingengcwele, nangokukodwa nxa siya kungcwaliswa namhla esinye esityeni." 
1Samuel21:6 Waza umperisite wamnika isonka esingcwele; ngokuba bekungeko kona isonka ngapandle kwezonka zokubonakala, ezibe zisuswa pambi kwoyehova, ukuze kubekwe isonka esifudumeleyo ngomhla wokususwa kwazo." 
1Samuel21:7 (Kwaye kuko kona indoda ezicakeni zika‐Saule ngalomhla, ebibanjezelwa pambi kwoyehova, egama belingu‐Dowegi, um‐Edome, inkosi yabalusi aba lunge ku‐Saule.)" 
1Samuel21:8 Wati u‐Davide kanjako ku‐Ahimeleki: Kanene akuko apa na pantsi kwesandla sako intshuntshe umhlaumbi iṙele? ngokuba ndingatabatanga esandleni sam kwa neṙele lam nezixo̔bo zam, ngokuba umcimbi wokumkani ubunxamile." 
1Samuel21:9 Waza wati umperisite: Iṙele lika‐Goliyate um‐Filistiya, obumbulala emhlanjeni wemikoba, nali lilapa, lisongiwe engutyeni emva kweyefodi: ukuba uya kuzitabatela lona, litabate; ngokuba lingeko limbi ngapandle kwalo. Wayesiti u‐Davide: Akuko elinjengelo; linike kum." 
1Samuel21:10 Wesuka ke u‐Davide, wesaba ngalomhla ebusweni buka‐Saule, waya ku‐Akishe ukumkani we‐Gate." 
1Samuel21:11 Zaza izicaka zika‐Akishe zati kuye: Lo asi nguye na u‐Davide, ukumkani welizwe? abavumanga ngaye na emidudweni, besiti: u‐Saule ubulele amawaka ake, kodwa u‐Davide amawaka ake alishumi?" 
1Samuel21:12 Waye u‐Davide wabekela lamazwi entliziyweni yake, woyika kakulu ngenxa ka‐Akishe ukumkani we‐Gate." 
1Samuel21:13 Ngako wayenza yimbi ingqondo yake emehlweni abo, wazenzisa igeza ezandleni zabo, waṙwela pezu kwengcango zesango, wahlisela amate ake eludevini lwake." 
1Samuel21:14 Waza u‐Akishe wati kuzo izicaka zake: Kangelani, niyabona lendoda ukuba iyageza: yinina ukuba niyizisile kum?" 
1Samuel21:15 ndinokuswela abagezayo na, ukuba nimzisile lo ageze pambi kwam? uya kuza lo endlwini yam yinina?" 
1Samuel22:1 Wandula u‐Davide wemka kona, wasindela emqolombeni we‐Hadulame: bati bakuva oko abakuluwe bake nayo yonke indlu yoyise, behlela kuye apo." 
1Samuel22:2 Kanjalo kwazihlanganisela kuye onke amadoda abeseluxinezelweni, nawo onke amadoda abenetyala, nawo onke amadoda ampefumlo uṙaṙa; waza waba yinkosi pezu kwawo: kwaye kuko naye anga angamakulu mane amadoda." 
1Samuel22:3 Wasuka u‐Davide wemka kona waya e‐Mitsipe yase‐Mowabi; wayesiti kukumkani we‐Mowabi: Mabapume ke ubawo noma̔ babe nani, ndide ndazi into endiya kwenzelwa yona ngutixo." 
1Samuel22:4 Waza wabakapela ebusweni bokumkani we‐Mowabi: baza bahlala naye yonke imihla u‐Davide abesenqatyeni. 
1Samuel22:5 Koko umprofite u‐Gadi wati ku‐Davide: Ungahlali enqatyeni; hamba, uye ezweni lakwa‐Juda. Wahamba u‐Davide waya ehlatini le‐Harete." 
1Samuel22:6 KEKALOKU akuva u‐Saule ukuba u‐Davide wazekile, namadoda abenaye, (waye u‐Saule ehleli e‐Gibeha pantsi kwomti wetamariske e‐Rama, enentshuntshe esandleni sake, nazo zonke izicaka zake zimi ngakuye,)" 
1Samuel22:7 wandula wati u‐Saule kuzo izicaka zake ezibe zimi ngakuye: Yivani ke, nina ma‐Benjamine! unyana ka‐Jese woninika nina nonke na amasimi nezitiya zemiti yeveyine? wonenza nina nonke na inkosi zamawaka nenkosi zamakulu," 
1Samuel22:8 ukuba nina nonke nicebile ngakum, nokuba akuko namnye otyilayo endlebeni yam ukuba unyana wam wenzile ucebano nonyana ka‐Jese, nokuba akuko namnye kuni obuhlungu ngenxa yam, notyilayo endlebeni yam ukuba unyana wam uvusile isicaka sam ngakum sibe ngumlaleli, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje?" 
1Samuel22:9 Wandula wapendula u‐Dowegi um‐Edome, obemisiwe pezu kwezicaka zika‐Saule, wati: Ndabona unyana ka‐Jese esiza e‐Nobe, ku‐Ahimeleki unyana ka‐Ahitube;" 
1Samuel22:10 owambuzela kuyehova, wamnika umpako; neṙele lika‐Goliyate um‐Filistiya walinika kuye." 
1Samuel22:11 Wandula ukumkani watuma ukumbiza u‐Ahimeleki, unyana ka‐Ahitube, umperisite, nayo yonke indlu yoyise, abaperisite ababese‐Nobe; basuka beza bonke kukumkani." 
1Samuel22:12 Waza u‐Saule wati: Yiva ke, nyana ka‐Ahitube! Wayesiti: Nanku ndi lapa, nkosi yam!" 
1Samuel22:13 Waza u‐Saule wati kuye: Yinina ukuba nicebile ngakum, wena nonyana ka‐Jese, ekokubeni umnikile isonka neṙele, wambuzela kutixo, ukuze avukele ukundilalela, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje?" 
1Samuel22:14 Wandula u‐Ahimeleki wampendula ukumkani, wati: Ngubanina pakati kwazo zonke izicaka zako onyanisekileyo njengo‐Davide, ongumyeni kukumkani, ongenayo ekuveni kwako, obekekileyo endlwini yako?" 
1Samuel22:15 Kunamhla nje na endiqalileyo ukumbuzela kutixo? makube le oko kum! makangati ukumkani abeke ityala pezu kwesicaka sake, na pezu kwayo yonke indlu kabawo; ngokuba isicaka sako besingazani nako konke oku, nokuba yinto encinane, nokuba yenkulu." 
1Samuel22:16 Kodwa wati ukumkani: Uya kufa ngenyaniso, Ahimeleki! wena, nayo yonke indlu kayihlo." 
1Samuel22:17 Waza ukumkani wati kumlisela obumi ngakuye: Sondelani, nibulale abaperisite bakayehova; ngokuba nesandla sabo sino‐Davide, nangokuba bebesazi ukuba uyasaba yena, kanti akatyilanga oko endlebeni yam. Kodwa izicaka zokumkani bezingavumi ukwolula isandla sazo ukuba ziwele abaperisite bakayehova." 
1Samuel22:18 Ngako ukumkani wati ku‐Dowegi: Sondela wena, ubawele abaperisite. Wasondela ke u‐Dowegi um‐Edome, wabawela abaperisite, wabulala ngalomini amadoda angamashumi asibozo anamahlanu abevete iyefodi yeqiya:" 
1Samuel22:19 ne‐Nobe, isixeko sabaperisite, wayibeta ngohlangoti lweṙele, kwa amadoda nabafazi, intsapo nentsana; nenkabi, namaqwaṙashe, negusha, wazibeta ngohlangoti lweṙele." 
1Samuel22:20 Kodwa wasinda unyana wamnye ka‐Ahimeleki unyana ka‐Ahitube, ogama belingu‐Abiyatare, wesabela emva kwo‐Davide." 
1Samuel22:21 Waza u‐Abiyatare, wamxelela u‐Davide ukuba u‐Saule ubabulele abaperisite bakayehova." 
1Samuel22:22 Wandula u‐Davide wati ku‐Abiyatare: Bendikwazi ngalomini, oko u‐Dowegi um‐Edome abekona, ukuba uya kumxelela u‐Saule ngenyaniso: ndim ozuzisele yonke imipefumlo yendlu kayihlo ukufa." 
1Samuel22:23 Hlala nam, ungoyiki; ngokuba ofuna ubomi bam efuna ubomi bako; kodwa woba sekugcinweni unam." 
1Samuel23:1 KWAZA kwaxelwa ku‐Davide, kusitwa: Nanga ama‐Filistiya esilwa ngakuyo i‐Kehila, epanga izibaya zokubula." 
1Samuel23:2 Ngako u‐Davide wabuza kuyehova, esiti: Ndiya kuya na ndibete lama‐Filistiya? Waza uyehova wati ku‐Davide: Yiya ubete ama‐Filistiya, usindise i‐Kehila." 
1Samuel23:3 Kodwa amadoda ka‐Davide ati kuye: Bona ke, silapa nje kwa‐Juda siyoyika; kangakananina ngakumbi ke, nxa siya kuya e‐Kehila ngakuwo amabandla ama‐Filistiya?" 
1Samuel23:4 Wapinda kanjako u‐Davide ukubuza kuyehova. Waye uyehova wampendula, wati: Suka, yihla uye e‐Kehila; ngokuba ndiya kunikela ama‐Filistiya esandleni sako." 
1Samuel23:5 Waza waya u‐Davide namadoda ake e‐Kehila, walwa ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya, watimba inkomo zawo, wawabeta ngesibulalo esikulu. Kwa njalo u‐Davide wasindisa abemi base‐Kehila." 
1Samuel23:6 Kwaye kute, akusaba u‐Abiyatare unyana ka‐Ahimeleki ukuya ku‐Davide e‐Kehila, wehla neyefodi esandleni sake." 
1Samuel23:7 Kwada kwaxelwa ku‐Saule ukuba u‐Davide utikile e‐Kehila. Wayesiti u‐Saule: Utixo umlahlele esandleni sam; ngokuba evalelwe, ngokungena esixekweni esinengcango nemivalo." 
1Samuel23:8 Waza u‐Saule wababiza bonke abantu emfazweni, ukuya kuhlela e‐Kehila, ukuvingcela u‐Davide namadoda ake." 
1Samuel23:9 Kekaloku akwazi u‐Davide ukuba u‐Saule ebeqinga ububi ngakuye, waza wati ku‐Abiyatare umperisite: Sondeza iyefodi." 
1Samuel23:10 Wandula wati u‐Davide: Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! isicaka sako sivile ngenyaniso ukuba u‐Saule uyafuna ukuza e‐Kehila, ukusitshabalalisa isixeko ngenxa yam." 
1Samuel23:11 Baya kundinikela na abemi base‐Kehila esandleni sake? uya kuhla na u‐Saule, njengokuba isicaka sako sivile? Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! zusixelele ke isicaka sako. Wayesiti uyehova: Uya kuhla." 
1Samuel23:12 Waza wati u‐Davide: Abemi base‐Kehila baya kunikela na mna namadoda am esandleni sika‐Saule? Wayesiti uyehova: Baya ku ku nikela. 
1Samuel23:13 Wandula wesuka u‐Davide, namadoda ake, anga angamakulu matandatu, bapuma e‐Kehila, bahamba apo babenokuhamba kona. Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Saule ukuba u‐Davide usindile e‐Kehila; ngako wayeka ukupuma." 
1Samuel23:14 Waza u‐Davide wahlala entlango ezinqatyeni, wahlala entabeni esentlango ye‐Zifi. Waye u‐Saule wamfuna imihla yonke; kodwa uyehova akamnika esandleni sake." 
1Samuel23:15 Wati u‐Davide wabona ukuba u‐Saule upumile ukufuna ubomi bake: waye u‐Davide esentlango ye‐Zifi, ehlatini." 
1Samuel23:16 Kekaloku wesuka u‐Jonatane unyana ka‐Saule, waya ku‐Davide ehlatini, wasomeleza isandla sake kutixo." 
1Samuel23:17 Wayesiti kuye: Ungoyiki; ngokuba isandla sika‐Saule ubawo singayi kukufumana; koko wena uya kuba ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, nam ndiya kuba ngosemva kwako; kanjako no‐Saule ubawo uyazi njalo." 
1Samuel23:18 Baza bobabini benza ucebano ebusweni bukayehova: wati u‐Davide wahlala ehlatini, kodwa u‐Jonatane waya endlwini yake." 
1Samuel23:19 Bandula benyuka aba‐Zifi baya ku‐Saule e‐Gibeha, besiti: u‐Davide akazifihlanga nati na ezinqatyeni ehlatini, endulini ye‐Hakila, engasesuyide yobala?" 
1Samuel23:20 Ngako kaloku, kumkani! yihla, ngako konke ukukanuka kwompefumlo wako ukuhla; nokwetu, siya kumnikela esandleni sokumkani." 
1Samuel23:21 Waza u‐Saule wati: Manitanyusanqelwe nina nguyehova; ngokuba ninenceba pezu kwam. 
1Samuel23:22 Kanihambe ke, nibe nisalungisa, nazi nibone indawo yake, apo unyawo lwake lukona, nokuba ngubanina ombonileyo kona; ngokuba kutshiwo kum ukuba uyenza ngobuqinga futi." 
1Samuel23:23 Ngako bonani, nazane nendawo zokuzimela apo azimela kona, nize nibuyele kum ninenyaniso, ndandiya kuhamba nani; kwakuya kuti, ukuba uko elizweni, sendiya kumfunisela pakati kwawo onke amawaka akwa‐Juda." 
1Samuel23:24 Baza besuka, bandulela ku‐Saule ukuya e‐Zifi. Kodwa u‐Davide namadoda ake bebesentlango yase‐Mahone, etafeni, ngasesuyide yobala." 
1Samuel23:25 Waya no‐Saule namadoda ake ukufuna. Kwada kwaxelwa ku‐Davide; ngako wehla eliweni, wahlala entlango yase‐Mahone. Wati u‐Saule akuva oko, wamputuma u‐Davide entlango yase‐Mahone." 
1Samuel23:26 Waye u‐Saule ehamba ngelicala lentaba, no‐Davide namadoda ake ngeliya icala lentaba: waza u‐Davide wanxama ukumka ngenxa ka‐Saule; ngokuba u‐Saule namadoda ake bebemṙaula u‐Davide namadoda ake, ukuze bababambe." 
1Samuel23:27 Koko bekufika isigidimi ku‐Saule, sisiti: Nxama uze; ngokuba ama‐Filistiya egalelekile pezu kwelizwe." 
1Samuel23:28 Wandula wabuya u‐Saule ekumputumeni u‐Davide, waya ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya: kukona londawo ibibizwa ngokuti yi‐Sela‐mahelekote." 
1Samuel23:29 Waza u‐Davide wenyuka apo, waya wahlala ezinqatyeni zase‐Hene‐gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 KWAYE kute, akuba u‐Saule ebuyile ekulandeleni ama‐Filistiya, kwaxelwa kuye ngokuti: Nanku u‐Davide entlango yase‐Hene‐gedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Wandula u‐Saule watabata amadoda anyuliweyo angamawaka matatu kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli, waya ukumfuna u‐Davide namadoda ake pezu kwelwalwa zamagogo." 
1Samuel24:3 Wada wafika ezibayeni zegusha ngasendleleni, apo ubukona umqolomba; waza wangena u‐Saule ukugubungela inyawo zake. Kekaloku u‐Davide namadoda ake bahlala emacaleni omqolomba." 
1Samuel24:4 Aza amadoda ka‐Davide ati kuye: Nangu umhla uyehova wati ngawo kuwe: Bona ke, ndiya kunikela utshaba lwako esandleni sako, uze wenze kulo njengokulungileyo emehlweni ako. Wesuka u‐Davide, watsheca kakuhle isondo lengubo ka‐Saule." 
1Samuel24:5 Kwaye kute emveni kwoko, ukuba intliziyo ka‐Davide yambeta, ngenxa yokuba ebetshecile isondo lengubo ka‐Saule." 
1Samuel24:6 Wayesiti kumadoda ake: Ubunzima mabube kum buvela kuyehova, ukuba ndiyenza lento kwinkosi yam, kumtanjiswa kayehova, yokuba ndisolule isandla sam ngakuye! ngokuba engumtanjiswa kayehova yena." 
1Samuel24:7 Kwa njalo u‐Davide wakalimela amadoda ake ngamazwi lawo, engawavumelanga ukuba asukele ngakuye u‐Saule. Wada u‐Saule wesuka emqolombeni, wahamba endleleni." 
1Samuel24:8 Wesuka no‐Davide emveni kwoko, wapuma emqolombeni, wamemeza emva kwo‐Saule, esiti: Nkosi yam, kumkani! Wati akukangela u‐Saule emva kwake, watoba u‐Davide ngobuso ngasemhlabeni, waziqubuda." 
1Samuel24:9 Wayesiti u‐Davide ku‐Saule: Yinina ukuba upulapule amazwi abantu, besiti: Nanku u‐Davide efuna ilishwa lako?" 
1Samuel24:10 Bona ke, kwa namhla nje amehlo ako abonile okokuba uyehova wakunikela namhla esandleni sam emqolombeni; kwaye kutiwa mandikubulale; kodwa iliso lam belinosizi pezu kwako; ndandisiti: Andiyi kusolula isandla sam ngakuyo inkosi yam; ngokuba ingumtanjiswa kayehova." 
1Samuel24:11 Kanjalo, bawo! kangela, ewe, kangela isondo lengubo yako esandleni sam; ngokuba ngokutsheca kwam isondo lengubo yako, ndingakubulalanga nje, yazi ubone ukuba akuko esandleni sam inkohlakalo nesilandu, nokuba andonanga ngakuwe; noko wena uyazingela umpefumlo wam, ukuba uwususe." 
1Samuel24:12 Uyehova uya kugweba pakati kwam nawe, ewe uyehova uya kundipindezelela kuwe; kodwa isandla sam asiyi kuba ngakuwe;" 
1Samuel24:13 njengokuba usiti umzekeliso wabakudala: Inkohlakalo iyapuma kubakohlakeleyo; kodwa isandla sam asiyi kuba ngakuwe. 
1Samuel24:14 Upumile emva kwobanina ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli? uyaputuma wena emva kwobanina? emva kwenja efileyo! emva kwentakumba inye! 
1Samuel24:15 Ngako uyehova makabe ngumgwebi, agwebe pakati kwam nawe, abone, apikise upikiso lwam, andikulule esandleni sako." 
1Samuel24:16 Kwaye kute, nxa u‐Davide abegqibile ukuteta lamazwi ku‐Saule, wandula u‐Saule wati: Lilizwi lako na eli, nyana wam Davide? Waza u‐Saule wapakamisa ilizwi lake, walila." 
1Samuel24:17 Wayesiti ku‐Davide: Wena undigqitisile ngobulungisa; ngokuba wena undivuzile ngokulungileyo, kanti mna ndikuvuzile ngokukohlakeleyo." 
1Samuel24:18 Kanjako wena uxelile namhla okokuba undenzele okulungileyo; ekubeni uyehova ebendiyekelele esandleni sako, kodwa akundibulalanga." 
1Samuel24:19 Ngokuba nxa indoda ilufumeneyo utshaba lwayo, iya kulundulula ngendlela elungileyo na? Ngako uyehova makabuyekeze kuwe okulungileyo ngenxa yoko ukwenzileyo kum namhla nje." 
1Samuel24:20 Nakaloku, bona ke, ndiyazi ngenyaniso ukuba woba ngukumkani, nokuba ubukumkani bakwa‐Sirayeli buya kuma esandleni sako." 
1Samuel24:21 Ngako kaloku ndifungele uyehova ukuba akuyi kunqamla inzalo yam emva kwam, nokuba akuyi kutshabalalisa igama lam kuyo indlu kabawo." 
1Samuel24:22 Wandula u‐Davide wafungela u‐Saule. Wasuka u‐Saule wagoduka; kodwa u‐Davide namadoda ake benyukela enqatyeni. 
1Samuel25:1 WADA wafa u‐Samyali; baza bahlanganiswa o‐Sirayeli bonke, bamlilela, bamncw̔aba endlwini yake e‐Rama. Wemka u‐Davide, wehla waya entlango ye‐Parane." 
1Samuel25:2 Kwabekuko indoda e‐Mahone, emfuyo yayo yabise‐Karamele; kanjalo indoda leyo ibinkulu kunene; ibinegusha ezingamawaka matatu, nebokwe eziliwaka linye: yabisekucebeni igusha zayo e‐Karamele." 
1Samuel25:3 Igama lalondoda lalingu‐Nabali; negama lomfazi wayo lalingu‐Abigali; yena ebengumfazi ongqondo ilungileyo, nosimilo sihle; kodwa indoda ibilukuni, ibikohlakele ngezenzo kanjako; yabingum‐Kalebi yona." 
1Samuel25:4 Kekaloku u‐Davide weva entlango ukuba u‐Nabali uyaceba igusha zake. 
1Samuel25:5 Waza u‐Davide watuma abafana abalishumi; wayesiti u‐Davide kubafana abo: Nyukelani e‐Karamele, niye ku‐Nabali, nibuze egameni lam ukupila kwake:" 
1Samuel25:6 nize nitsho kohleli kamnandi ukuti: Uxolo malube kuwe, uxolo malube nakwindlu yako, uxolo malube nakuko konke unako!" 
1Samuel25:7 Sendivile ke ukuba unabacebi: kekaloku abalusi bako bebeko nati, asibonanga; kanjako bekungeko nanye into ebalahlekileyo, yonke imihla abebeko e‐Karamele." 
1Samuel25:8 Buza abafana bako, bokuxelela ke. Ngako mabati abafana aba bafumane ufefe emehlweni ako; ngokuba sisiza ngomhla olungileyo: kaunike oko kusukuba sikufumana isandla sako kwizicaka zako, nakunyana wako, ku‐Davide." 
1Samuel25:9 Bati bakufika abafana baka‐Davide, bateta ku‐Nabali njengalomazwi onke egameni lika‐Davide, bada bati cwaka." 
1Samuel25:10 Waza u‐Nabali wapendula izicaka zika‐Davide, wati: Ngubanina u‐Davide? ngubanina ke unyana ka‐Jese? kuko namhla izicaka ezininzi eziqweshayo ezinye ngezinye ezinkosini zazo:" 
1Samuel25:11 sendiya kutabata na isonka sam, namanzi am, nesixe̔lo sam endisixe̔leleyo abacebi bam, ndinike kumadoda endingawazi ukuba angawapina?" 
1Samuel25:12 Bandula abafana baka‐Davide bajikela endleleni yabo, babuya, beza bamxelela njengalomazwi onke." 
1Samuel25:13 Wayesiti u‐Davide kumadoda ake: Binqani nonke amaṙele enu. Abinqa ke amanye ngamanye amaṙele awo; no‐Davide wabinqa iṙele lake naye. Aza enyuka emva kwo‐Davide amadoda anga angamakulu mane; aye amakulu mabini ehleli ngasempahleni. 
1Samuel25:14 Koko umfana emnye ebafaneni wamxelela u‐Abigali, umfazi ka‐Nabali, esiti: Bona ke, u‐Davide wasusa izigidimi entlango ukuza kubulisa inkosi yetu; yaza yazituka." 
1Samuel25:15 Kodwa amadoda lawo ebelungile kakulu kuti: besingoniwa, besingalahleki nanye into kanjako, ngayo yonke imihla besihambana nawo, sakubako ezindle:" 
1Samuel25:16 ebeludonga kuti nasebusuku nasemini, ngayo yonke imihla sibe sindawonye nawo sizalusa igusha." 
1Samuel25:17 Ngako kaloku, yazi ubone into uya kuyenza; ngokuba ububi sebugqityiwe ngakuyo inkosi yetu, nangakuyo yonke indlu yayo: ngokuba yona ingunyana wobunginingini, kude kungabi nakutetwa kuyo." 
1Samuel25:18 Wandula wanxama u‐Abigali, watabata izonka ezimakulu mabini, nentsuba zeveyine ezimbini, negusha ezilungisiweyo ezintlanu, nezilinganiso zamaqashu ezihlanu, nekulu lezipa zedreyive ezishwenyileyo, namakulu mabini amasimba amakiwane, wazibeka pezu kwamaqwaṙashe." 
1Samuel25:19 Wayesiti kuzo izicaka zake: Dlulani pambi kwam; nanku mna ndisiza emva kwenu. Kodwa akayixelela indoda yake u‐Nabali. 
1Samuel25:20 Kwabekute, esakwele pezu kweqwaṙashe, esihla ngendawo efihlakeleyo yentaba, bona ke, u‐Davide namadoda ake bebesihla besiza kumkaulela; waza wahlangana nabo." 
1Samuel25:21 Kekaloku u‐Davide ebete: Ngenyaniso ndifumane ndagcina konke anako lo entlango, kwada akwamlahleka nanye into kuko konke anako: kanjako ubuyekezile kum okukohlakeleyo esikundleni sokulungileyo." 
1Samuel25:22 Utixo makenje njalo ezintshabeni zika‐Davide, alekele ukwenje njalo, ukuba ndiyashiya kubo bonke anabo kude kukanye ukusa lowo onobudoda!" 
1Samuel25:23 Wati u‐Abigali akubona u‐Davide, wanxama, wahlika eqwaṙasheni, wawa ebusweni bake pambi kwo‐Davide, wazitoba ngasemhlabeni," 
1Samuel25:24 wawa ngasezinyaweni zake, wati: Malibe pezu kwam, nkosi yam! ityala elo: kanjalo makesitete isicakakazi sako ezindlebeni zako, uve amazwi esicakakazi sako." 
1Samuel25:25 Inkosi yam maingabeki intliziyo yayo kulendoda yobunginingini, kuye u‐Nabali; ngokuba njengegama lake enjalo yena; ngu‐Nabali igama lake, nobubedengu bukuye: kodwa mna sicakakazi sako, andibonanga abafana benkosi yam, abo ububatumile." 
1Samuel25:26 Ngako kaloku, nkosi yam! njengokuba ehleli uyehova, nanjengokuba uhleli nompefumlo wako, unguye uyehova okunqandileyo ekuzeni ngegazi, ukuba uzipindezelele ngesako isandla: ngako kaloku, mababe njengo‐Nabali abazintshaba zako, nabafunela inkosi yam ububi." 
1Samuel25:27 Nakaloku, elitamsanqa elizisiweyo sisicakakazi sako enkosini yam, makelinikwe kubo abafana abahambayo ezinyaweni zenkosi yam." 
1Samuel25:28 Sixolele ke isilandu sesicakakazi sako: ngokuba uyehova eya kuyenzela inkosi yam ngenyaniso indlu eqinileyo; ngokokuba inkosi yam isilwa ukulwa kukayehova, nokuba inkohlakalo ingafunyanwanga kuwe ngemihla yako." 
1Samuel25:29 Noko kuvukile umntu ukukuputuma, nokufuna umpefumlo wako: kodwa umpefumlo wenkosi yam wobotshelwa esiqunyeni sobomi kuyehova, utixo wako; nompefumlo wentshaba zako uya kuwusaula pakati kwesigingqi sesisaulo." 
1Samuel25:30 Kwakuya kuti, nxa uyehova aya kwenzela inkosi yam njengako konke okulungileyo akutetile ngawe, na nxa aya kukumisela ube yinkosi pezu kwo‐Sirayeli;" 
1Samuel25:31 oku akuyi kwandula kube sisigexiso kuwe, nesiku̔bekiso sentliziyo kuyo inkosi yam, okokuba upalazile igazi kungeko tuba, nokokuba inkosi yam izipindezelele ngokwayo: kodwa nxa uyehova aya kwenzela inkosi yam okulungileyo, wandul’ ukukumbula isicakakazi sako." 
1Samuel25:32 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Abigali: Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, okutumileyo namhla nje ukuza kundikaulela." 
1Samuel25:33 Kanjako maitanyusanqeliswe intelekelelo yako, mautanyusanqeliswe nawe, ondibambileyo namhla nje ekuzeni ngegazi, ukuba ndizipindezelele ngesam isandla." 
1Samuel25:34 Ngokuba okunene, njengokuba uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ehleli, ondinqandileyo ekukwenzeleni ububi, ukuba ubunganxamanga ukuza kundikaulela, ngenyaniso bekungayi kusaliselwa u‐Nabali kude kukanye ukusa namnye onobudoda!" 
1Samuel25:35 Wandula u‐Davide wamkela esandleni sake oko abemzisele kona, wati kuye: Nyuka uye ngoxolo endlwini yako; kangela, ndipulapulile ilizwi lako, ndibukile ubuso bako."
