1Samuel25:36 Wasuka u‐Abigali weza ku‐Nabali; kekaloku bona ke, ebenesidlo endlwini yake njengesidlo sokumkani; yati intliziyo ka‐Nabali yacwayita pakati kwake, ngokuba enxilile kakulu; ngako akamxelela nto, encinane nenkulu, kwada kwakanya ukusa." 
1Samuel25:37 Kwabekute kusasa, yakuba iveyine ipumile ku‐Nabali, wandula umfazi wake wamxelela ezizinto: yaza intliziyo yake yafa pakati kwake, wada waba njeng elitye." 
1Samuel25:38 Kwaye kute emva kwemihla yanga ilishumi, uyehova wambeta u‐Nabali, wada wafa." 
1Samuel25:39 Waza u‐Davide, akuva ukuba u‐Nabali ufile, wati: Makabongwe uyehova, opikisile impikiso yesigxekwa sam esandleni sika‐Nabali, nesicaka sake wasisonga enkohlakalweni; ngokuba inkohlakalo ka‐Nabali uyehova eyibuyisile pezu kweyake intloko. Wandula watuma u‐Davide, wateta no‐Abigali, ukuba amtabatele kuye abe ngumfazi." 
1Samuel25:40 Zati zakufika izicaka zika‐Davide ku‐Abigali e‐Karamele, zateta kuye, zisiti: u‐Davide usitumile kuwe, ukuba akutabatele kuye ube ngumfazi." 
1Samuel25:41 Waza wesuka, watoba ngobuso ngasemhlabeni, wati: Nasi isicakakazi sako sibe ngumkonzikazi ukuhlamba inyawo zezicaka zenkosi yam." 
1Samuel25:42 Wanxama ke wesuka u‐Abigali, wakwela eqwaṙasheni, enesihlanu sentombi zake ezihamba ezinyaweni zake; waza walandela izigidimi zika‐Davide, waba ngumfazi wake." 
1Samuel25:43 Kanjako u‐Davide wamzeka u‐Ahinohame wase‐Yezerele: baba ngabafazi bake nabo bobabini. 
1Samuel25:44 Kodwa u‐Saule ebenikile u‐Mikali intombi yake, umfazi ka‐Davide, ku‐Faliti unyana ka‐Layishe, obengowase‐Galime." 
1Samuel26:1 KEKALOKU aba‐Zifi beza ku‐Saule e‐Gibeha, besiti: u‐Davide akazimeli na endulini ye‐Hakila, ngapambi kwobala?" 
1Samuel26:2 Waselesuka u‐Saule, wehla waya entlango yase‐Zifi, enaye amadoda anyuliweyo akwa‐Sirayeli angamawaka matatu, ukumfuna u‐Davide entlango yase‐Zifi." 
1Samuel26:3 Waza u‐Saule wati waca endulini ye‐Hakila, engapambi kwobala, ngasendleleni: kodwa u‐Davide wahlala entlango, wabona ukuba u‐Saule uze emva kwake ngasentlango." 
1Samuel26:4 Ngako u‐Davide watuma intlola, wazi ukuba u‐Saule selezile ngenyaniso." 
1Samuel26:5 Wesuka ke u‐Davide, weza kulondawo apo u‐Saule abete waca kona: waza u‐Davide wabona indawo apo u‐Saule ebelele kona, no‐Abenere unyana ka‐Nere, inkosi yomkosi wake: kekaloku u‐Saule ebelele pakati kwodonga lwenqwelo, bati abantu bati waca ngokumngqonga." 
1Samuel26:6 Wandula wateta u‐Davide, wati ku‐Ahimeleki um‐Hete, naku‐Abishai unyana ka‐Tseruya, umninawe ka‐Jowabi, esiti: Ngubanina oya kuhla nam ukuya ku‐Saule emnqubeni? Waza u‐Abishai wati: Mna ndiya kuhla nawe." 
1Samuel26:7 Kwa njalo u‐Davide no‐Abishai beza ebantwini ebusuku; kekaloku nanku u‐Saule elele ubutongo pakati kwodonga lwenqwelo, nentshuntshe yake igxunyekiwe emhlabeni ngasentlokweni yake; kodwa u‐Abenere nabantu bebelele ngokumngqonga." 
1Samuel26:8 Wandula u‐Abishai wati ku‐Davide: Utixo uluyekelele namhla utshaba lwako esandleni sako; ngako kaloku, makendimbetele ngentshuntshe emhlabeni kube kanye, ndandingayi kumpindela." 
1Samuel26:9 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Abishai: Ungamtshabalalisi: ngokuba ngubanina ongolulayo isandla sake ngakuye umtanjiswa kayehova, aze angabi natyala?" 
1Samuel26:10 Wabuya wati u‐Davide: Njengokuba uyehova ehleli, nguyehova oya kumbeta; umhlaumbi umhla wake uya kuza ukuba afe, umhlaumbi uya kuhlela ekulweni, andule abube:" 
1Samuel26:11 ubunzima mabube kum buvela kuyehova, ukuba ndiyasolula isandla sam ngakuye umtanjiswa kayehova! Kodwa ngoku kaususe intshuntshe engasentlokweni yake, negubu lamanzi, sihambe ke." 
1Samuel26:12 Waye u‐Davide wasusa intshuntshe negubu lamanzi endaweni yentloko ka‐Saule; baza bemka ke: kwaye kungeko namnye obebona, nobesazi, nobevuka; ngokuba bona bonke bebelele butongo, ngokuba ubutongo obukulu bukayehova bebuwile pezu kwabo." 
1Samuel26:13 Wandula u‐Davide wawela waya pesheya, wema pezu kwococoyi lwentaba, ekude; umgama omkulu upakati kwabo." 
1Samuel26:14 Waza u‐Davide wabiza kubo abantu, nakuye u‐Abenere unyana ka‐Nere, esiti: Akupenduli na, Abenere? Wasuka wapendula u‐Abenere, wati: Ungubanina wena obizayo kukumkani?" 
1Samuel26:15 Wayesiti u‐Davide ku‐Abenere: Akuyindoda na? ngubanina nofana nawe kwa‐Sirayeli? yinina ke ukuba akuyilindanga inkosi yako ukumkani? ngokuba bekungena omnye wabantu ukuza kutshabalalisa ukumkani inkosi yako. 
1Samuel26:16 Ayilungile lento uyenzileyo. Ehleli nje uyehova, nifanelwe kukufa, ngokokuba ningayilindanga inkosi yenu, umtanjiswa kayehova. Nakaloku, kangela ipina intshuntshe yokumkani, negubu lamanzi elibe lingasentlokweni yake." 
1Samuel26:17 Waza u‐Saule walazi ilizwi lika‐Davide, wati: Eli lilizwi lako na, nyana wam Davide? Wayesiti u‐Davide: Lilizwi lam, nkosi yam, kumkani!" 
1Samuel26:18 Wati kanjalo: Kunganina ukuba inkosi yam yenje nje ukuputuma isicaka sayo? ngokuba iyinto nina endiyenzileyo? yiyipina inkohlakalo esesandleni sam? 
1Samuel26:19 Ngako kaloku maiti inkosi yam ukumkani ike ive amazwi esicaka sayo. Ukuba nguyehova okuvusileyo ngakum, makasezele irumba lomnikelo wokudla: kodwa ukuba ngabo onyana babantu, mabaqalekiswe bona pambi kwoyehova; ngokuba bendigxotile namhla ukuba ndingazibandakanyeli kwilifa likayehova, besiti: Hamba, ukonze otixo bambi." 
1Samuel26:20 Ngako kaloku, malingawi igazi lam ngasemhlabeni pambi kwobuso bukayehova: ngokuba ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli epumile ukufuna intakumba inye, njengokuba kuzingelwa isikwatsha ezintabeni." 
1Samuel26:21 Wandula wati u‐Saule: Ndonile; buya, nyana wam Davide! ngokuba ndingasayi kukupata kakubi, ngenxa yokuba umpefumlo wam ubunqabile emehlweni ako namhla nje: bona ke, ndenzile ngobudenge, ndiposisile ngokuninzi kakulu." 
1Samuel26:22 Waza u‐Davide wapendula wati: Nantsi intshuntshe yokumkani: makake omnye wabafana awele, ayitabate." 
1Samuel26:23 Wanga uyehova angabuyisela kubo bonke ngabanye ubulungisa babo nenyaniso yabo: ngokuba uyehova ebekunikele namhla esandleni sam, kodwa bendingavumi ukwolula isandla sam ngakuye umtanjiswa kayehova." 
1Samuel26:24 Kanjako bona ke, njengokuba umpefumlo wako ubusenziwa mkulu namhla nje emehlweni am, kwa njalo mawenziwe mkulu umpefumlo wam emehlweni kayehova, ade andisindise kubo bonke ubunzima." 
1Samuel26:25 Wandula u‐Saule wati ku‐Davide: Mautanyusanqelwe wena, nyana wam Davide! uya kukwenza kakulu ke, uya kumana ukweyisa kanjalo. Waza u‐Davide wahamba ngendlela yake, no‐Saule wabuyela endaweni yake." 
1Samuel27:1 WADA u‐Davide wati entliziyweni yake: Kaloku ndiya kububa omnye umhla ngesandla sika‐Saule; akuko nto endilungeleyo, kupela ndinxame ndisindele elizweni lama‐Filistiya, ati u‐Saule ancame ngam, ayeke ukundifuna kanjako kuyo yonke imida yakwa‐Sirayeli; kwa njalo ndiya kusinda esandleni sake." 
1Samuel27:2 Wandula wesuka u‐Davide, wagqita, yena namadoda angamakulu matandatu abenaye, waya ku‐Akishe, unyana ka‐Mahoke, ukumkani we‐Gate." 
1Samuel27:3 Waye u‐Davide wahlala no‐Akishe e‐Gate, yena namadoda ake, abanye ngabanye benabendlu yabo; u‐Davide enabafazi bake bobabini, u‐Ahinohame um‐Yezerelekazi, no‐Abigali um‐Karamelekazi, umfazi ka‐Nabali." 
1Samuel27:4 Kwaza kwaxelelwa u‐Saule ukuba u‐Davide usabele e‐Gate; ngako akasapinda ukumfuna. 
1Samuel27:5 Wayesiti u‐Davide ku‐Akishe: Ukuba ke ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, makunikwe kum indawo kwesinye sezixeko zangapandle, ukuba ndihlale kona; ngokuba kunganina ukuba isicaka sako sihlale esixekweni sobukumkani ndawonye nawe?" 
1Samuel27:6 Wandula u‐Akishe wamnika ngalomhla i‐Tsikilage; kukona i‐Tsikilage ilunge kubo okumkani bo‐Juda kude kwanamhla nje. 
1Samuel27:7 Laye inani lemihla u‐Davide ebehlala ngayo ezweni lama‐Filistiya lingumnyaka mnye nenyanga zine. 
1Samuel27:8 Kekaloku wenyuka u‐Davide, namadoda ake, baya bagaleleka pezu kwama‐Geshure, nama‐Gezere, nama‐Amaleki; ngokuba wona ebengabemi belozwe kudala, njengokuba kuyiwa e‐Shure, nakude kube kulo ilizwe le‐Jipete." 
1Samuel27:9 Waza u‐Davide wabeta ilizwe elo, akalondoloza ebomini nendoda nomfazi; kanjako watabata igusha, nenkomo, namaqwaṙashe, nenkamela, nezivato, wada wabuya, weza ku‐Akishe." 
1Samuel27:10 Wandula wati u‐Akishe: Nigalelekile ngapina namhla? Wati ke u‐Davide: Ngasesuyide yakwa‐Juda, nangasesuyide yama‐Jeramele, nangasesuyide yama‐Keni." 
1Samuel27:11 Waye u‐Davide engalondolozanga ebomini nendoda nomfazi, ukubazisa e‐Gate, esiti: Hleze baxele ngati ukuti: Wenje njalo u‐Davide. Laye linjalo isiko lake yonke imihla abehlala elizweni lama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel27:12 Waza u‐Akishe wakolwa ngu‐Davide, esiti: Ugqibele ukuzinukisa pakati kwabantu bake, pakati kwo‐Sirayeli; ngako woba sisicaka sam ngamaxa onke." 
1Samuel28:1 KWAYE kute ngalomihla, ukuba ama‐Filistiya ahlanganisa imikosi yawo ukwenza imfazwe, kuze kuliwe ngakubo o‐Sirayeli. Wandula u‐Akishe wati ku‐Davide: Yazi ngenyaniso ukuba uya kupuma nomkosi kunye nam, wena namadoda ako." 
1Samuel28:2 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Akishe: Ngokunjalo uya kukwazi oko isicaka sako siya kukwenza. Wayesiti u‐Akishe ku‐Davide: Ngako oko ndiya kukumisa ube ngumgcini wentloko yam imihla yonke. 
1Samuel28:3 Kekaloku u‐Samyali ebefile; kanjalo bonke o‐Sirayeli bebemlilele, bamncw̔aba e‐Rama, kwa sesixekweni sake. Waye u‐Saule ebekwelelisile abenzelana nemishilogu, namatola, elizweni." 
1Samuel28:4 Aza ama‐Filistiya ahlanganiswa, eza ati waca e‐Shuneme: kanjako u‐Saule wahlanganisa onke ama‐Sirayeli, aya ati waca e‐Giliboha." 
1Samuel28:5 Wati u‐Saule akubona umkosi wama‐Filistiya, wasuka woyika, nentliziyo yake yangcangcazela kakulu." 
1Samuel28:6 Waza wabuza u‐Saule kuyehova, kodwa uyehova akampendula, nangamapupa, nange‐Urime, nangabaprofite." 
1Samuel28:7 Wandula u‐Saule wati kuzo izicaka zake: Ndifuneleni umfazi onobushologu, ndize ndiye kulowo, ndibuze kuye. Zaye zisiti izicaka zake kuye: Nankuya umfazi onobushologu e‐Hene‐dore." 
1Samuel28:8 Waza u‐Saule wazenza ngakumbi, wambata ingubo zimbi, wahamba yena, namadoda mabini kunye naye, beza kumfazi lowo ebusuku; wayesiti: Zundilaulele ngomshologu, undinyusele lowo endiya kumxela kuwe." 
1Samuel28:9 Wayesiti umfazi kuye: Bona ke, uyakwazi oko akwenzileyo u‐Saule, okokuba unqamlile abenzelana nemishologu, namatola, elizweni; yinina ngoko ukuba uyatiyela umpefumlo wam ukundifisa?" 
1Samuel28:10 Waza u‐Saule wamfungela uyehova, esiti: Ehleli nje uyehova, akuyi kuhlelwa lityala ngenxa yalento!" 
1Samuel28:11 Wandula umfazi wati: Ngubanina lowo ndiya kumnyusela kuwe? Wayesiti: Ndinyusele u‐Samyali. 
1Samuel28:12 Wati umfazi lowo akumbona u‐Samyali, wakala ngelizwi elikulu; wayesitsho umfazi lowo ku‐Saule, esiti: Yinina ukuba undikohlisile, wena ungu‐Saule nje?" 
1Samuel28:13 Waza ukumkani wati kuye: Ungoyiki; ngokuba iyinto nina uyibonileyo? Wati umfazi ku‐Saule: Ndabona otixo benyuka emhlabeni. 
1Samuel28:14 Wayesiti kuye: Isimilo sake sinjanina? Wati yena: Yindoda elixego enyukayo, eyambete ingubo ende. Wandula u‐Saule wazi ukuba nguye u‐Samyali, watoba ngobuso ngasemhlabeni, waziqubuda." 
1Samuel28:15 Waza u‐Samyali wati ku‐Saule: Yinina ukuba undixalisile ngokundinyusa? Wayesiti u‐Saule: Ndixinezekile kakulu; ngokokuba ama‐Filistiya esilwa ngakum, nokuba utixo wemkile kum, engasandipenduli nangabaprofite nangamapupa; ngako ndibizile wena, ukuba undazise oko endiya kukwenza." 
1Samuel28:16 Wandula wati u‐Samyali: Kunganina ukuba ubuze mna, nxa uyehova emkile kuwe, esel’ elutshaba lwako nje?" 
1Samuel28:17 Ngokuba uyehova ezenzele njengokuba ebeteta ngam; ngokuba uyehova eṙazulile ubukumkani esandleni sako, ebunikile kummelwane wako, ku‐Davide:" 
1Samuel28:18 ngokokuba ungalivanga ilizwi likayehova, nokuba ungenzanga ngobushushu bomsindo wake ngakuwo ama‐Amaleki, kukona uyehova ekwenzele lento namhla nje." 
1Samuel28:19 Kanjako uyehova uya kunikela ama‐Sirayeli kunye nawe esandleni sama‐Filistiya: nangomso wena nonyana bako noba nam; nomkosi wama‐Sirayeli uyehova wowunikela esandleni sama‐Filistiya. 
1Samuel28:20 Wandula wawa ngobunxamo u‐Saule ubude bake bonke ngasemhlabeni, woyika kakulu ngenxa yamazwi ka‐Samyali: kwaye kungeko amandla kuye; ngokuba engadlanga isonka yonke imini nabo bonke ubusuku." 
1Samuel28:21 Waza umfazi lowo weza ku‐Saule, wabona ukuba uyetuswa kakulu, wati kuye: Bona ke, isicakakazi sako sivile ilizwi lako, nompefumlo wam ndiwubekile esandleni sam, namazwi ako obuwateta kum ndiwapulapule:" 
1Samuel28:22 ngako kaloku kaupulapule nawe ilizwi lesicakakazi sako, ukuba mandibeke umtamo wesonka ebusweni bako, uze udle; wauya kuba namandla, nxa uhamba ngendlela yako." 
1Samuel28:23 Koko walayo, wati: Andiyi kudla. Kodwa zamqu̔ba izicaka zake, kwa nomfazi lowo kanjalo; wada wapulapula ilizwi labo. Waza wesuka emhlabeni, wahlala emandlalweni." 
1Samuel28:24 Waye umfazi ebenetole elityetyisiweyo endlwini; wanxama ke walixe̔la; watabata nomgubo, wawubuca, woja izonka ezingenagwele ngawo:" 
1Samuel28:25 waza wazisondeza ebusweni buka‐Saule, nasebusweni bezicaka zake; badla ke. Bandula besuka, bemka ngobobusuku." 
1Samuel29:1 KEKALOKU ama‐Filistiya ebehlanganisile yonke imikosi yawo e‐Afeki; nama‐Sirayeli wona abete waca ngasemtonjeni ose‐Yezerele. 
1Samuel29:2 Zaza inkosi zama‐Filistiya zadlula ngamakulu nangamawaka; kodwa u‐Davide namadoda ake badlula ngasemva kunye no‐Akishe. 
1Samuel29:3 Zandula inkosi zama‐Filistiya zati: Afuna nto nina ama‐Hebere la? Wayesiti u‐Akishe kuzo inkosi zama‐Filistiya: Lo asi nguye na u‐Davide, isicaka sika‐Saule ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, obeko nam ngalemihla, umhlaumbi ngaleminyaka? ndandingafumananga nto kuye, kwa semhleni wokupongoma kwake kwada kwanamhla nje." 
1Samuel29:4 Koko inkosi zama‐Filistiya zaqumba ngakuye; zaza inkosi zama‐Filistiya zati kuye: Buyisa londoda, iye ibuyele endaweni yayo, apo uyimisele kona, ukuba ingehli nati ukuya ekulweni, ize ingabi ngumalane kuti ekulweni; ngokuba kunganto nina aya kuzikolekisa lo enkosini yake? akungazo intloko zalamadoda na?" 
1Samuel29:5 Lo asi nguye na u‐Davide, ababevuma ngaye emidudweni, besiti: u‐Saule ubulele amawaka ake, kodwa u‐Davide amawaka ake alishumi?" 
1Samuel29:6 Wandula u‐Akishe wambiza u‐Davide, wati kuye: Ehleli nje uyehova, ulungelelene wena; kanjalo ukupuma kwako nokungena kwako kunye nam emkosini kulungile emehlweni am; ngokuba ndingafumananga inkohlakalo kuwe, kwa semhleni wokuza kwako kum kude kwanamhla nje: noko emehlweni azo inkosi akulungile wena." 
1Samuel29:7 Ngako kaloku buya, uhambe ngoxolo, ukuba ungenzi okubi emehlweni enkosi zama‐Filistiya." 
1Samuel29:8 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Akishe: Yinto nina pofu endiyenzileyo? yinto nina kanjalo uyifumeneyo kwisicaka sako, kwa semhleni bendisebusweni bako ngawo kude kwanamhla nje, ukuba ndingayi ndilwe ngakuzo intshaba zenkosi yam ukumkani?" 
1Samuel29:9 Wapendula u‐Akishe wati ku‐Davide: Ndiyazi ukuba ulungile wena emehlweni am, njengengelosi katixo: kodwa inkosi zama‐Filistiya zite: Akayi kunyuka nati ukuya ekulweni." 
1Samuel29:10 Ngako kaloku, vuka kusasa ngomso, nezicaka zenkosi yako ezibe zisiza nawe; niti nakuba nivukile kusasa ngomso, nxa kunikanyeleyo, nandule nimke." 
1Samuel29:11 Waza u‐Davide wavuka kusasa, yena namadoda ake, ukuba bemke kusasa ukuya kubuyela ezweni lama‐Filistiya. Ati ama‐Filistiya enyuka aya e‐Yezerele." 
1Samuel30:1 KWAYE kute, akufika u‐Davide namadoda ake e‐Tsikilage ngomhla wesitatu, kekaloku ama‐Amaleki ebegalelekile pezu kwesuyide, napezu kwe‐Tsikilage, abeta i‐Tsikilage, ayitshisa ngomlilo;" 
1Samuel30:2 nabafazi abebekuyo ebebatimbile, engabulalanga nje namnye umntu kodwa, kwa nomncinane nomkulu; koko abebafudusile, ahamba ngendlela yawo." 
1Samuel30:3 Kwa njalo akufika u‐Davide namadoda ake esixekweni, nasi sitshisiwe ngomlilo; nabafazi babo, nonyana babo, nentombi zabo, bona bebetinjiwe." 
1Samuel30:4 Bandula u‐Davide nabantu abanaye bapakamisa ilizwi labo, balila, kwada akwabi sabiko kubo amandla okulila." 
1Samuel30:5 Baye betinjiwe abafazi baka‐Davide bobabini, u‐Ahinohame um‐Yezerelekazi, no‐Abigali umfazi ka‐Nabali um‐Karamele." 
1Samuel30:6 Waye u‐Davide waxinezeka kakulu; ngokuba abantu bebeteta ngokumgibisela ngamatye, ngokuba umpefumlo wabantu bonke ubunobuṙaṙa, abanye ngabanye pezu kwonyana babo, napezu kwentombi zabo; kodwa u‐Davide wazomeleza kuye uyehova, utixo wake." 
1Samuel30:7 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Abiyatare umperisite, unyana ka‐Ahimeleki: Kausondeze kum iyefodi. Wayisondeza u‐Abiyatare iyefodi ku‐Davide." 
1Samuel30:8 Wandula u‐Davide wabuza kuyehova ngokuti: Ndiya kuputuma elibandla na? ndiya kulifumana na? Wayesiti kuye: Putuma; ngokuba uya kufumana ngenyaniso, uya kugqibela ukuhlangula kanjako." 
1Samuel30:9 Wasuka wahamba u‐Davide, yena namadoda angamakulu matandatu abenaye, baza kufika emlanjaneni we‐Besore, apo abo basalayo bahlala kona." 
1Samuel30:10 Kodwa u‐Davide waputuma, yena namadoda angamakulu mane: ngokuba bekuhlala amadoda angamakulu mabini, abecubukile kangaka, ukuba ebengenako ukuwela umlanjana we‐Besore." 
1Samuel30:11 Baza bafumana indoda engum‐Jipete ezindle, bayizisa ku‐Davide; bayinika isonka, yada yatya; bayiseza amanzi;" 
1Samuel30:12 bayinika kanjalo iqezu lesimba lamakiwane, nezipa zibini zedreyive ezishwenyileyo: yati yakuba idlile, umoya wayo wabuya weza kuyo; ngokuba isonka ibingasityanga, namanzi ibingawaselanga, imini zantatu nobusuku butatu." 
1Samuel30:13 Waza u‐Davide wati kuyo: Ungokabanina? uvela pina? Yayisiti: Ndiyindodana yase‐Jipete, isicaka som‐Amaleki; yandishiya inkosi yam, ngokuba bendihliwa sisifo kuse kuntsuku ntatu." 
1Samuel30:14 Tina sabesigaleleka pezu kwelasesuyide ilizwe lama‐Keriti, napezu kwelakwa‐Juda, napezu kwelasesuyide lakwa‐Kalebi, satshisa i‐Tsikilage ngomlilo." 
1Samuel30:15 Waza u‐Davide wati kuyo: Ungaka undihlisele kwelibandla na? Yayisiti: Ndifungele utixo, ukuba akuyi kundibulala, nokuba akuyi kundinikela esandleni senkosi yam, ndandiya kukuhlisela kwelibandla." 
1Samuel30:16 Kekaloku yakuba imhlisile, naba ke betwabulukile pezu kwobuso bomhlaba wonke, besidla, besela, beduda nokududa, ngenxa yalo lonke ixoba elikulu, ababelisusile ezweni lama‐Filistiya, nasezweni lakwa‐Juda." 
1Samuel30:17 Waza u‐Davide wababeta kwa kuso isifingo sokusa kwada kwakukuhlwa kwomnye umhla; kwaye kungasindanga namnye umntu pakati kwabo, ngapandle kwamadodana angamakulu mane, abekwele pezu kwenkamela, esaba ke." 
1Samuel30:18 Waye u‐Davide wahlangula konke ama‐Amaleki abekususile; nabafazi bake bobabini u‐Davide wabahlangula. 
1Samuel30:19 Kwaye kungasweleki kubo, kwa nomncinane nomkulu, kwa nonyana nentombi, kwa nexoba nako konke ababekutabatele kubo; konke u‐Davide wakubuyisa." 
1Samuel30:20 Waza u‐Davide watabata zonke igusha nenkomo; baziqu̔ba pambi kw ezinye inkomo ezo, bati: Lixoba lika‐Davide eli." 
1Samuel30:21 Kekaloku akuza u‐Davide kulawomadoda angamakulu mabini abecubukile kangaka ukuba ebengenako ukumlandela u‐Davide, nababewahlalisile emlanjaneni we‐Besore, apuma wona ukuya kumkaulela u‐Davide, nokubakaulela abantu ababenaye; waza u‐Davide wasondela ebantwini, wababulisa." 
1Samuel30:22 Andula apendula onke amadoda akohlakeleyo nawobunginingini, pakati kwamadoda abehamba no‐Davide, ati: Ngenxa yokuba ebengahambanga nati, asiyi kuwanika nto kwixoba esilihlanguleyo, kupela kwindoda ngendoda umfazi wayo nabantwana bayo; makakape bona, emke." 
1Samuel30:23 Koko wati u‐Davide: Aniyi kwenje njalo, bazalwana bam! ngoko uyehova akunikileyo kuti, osigcinileyo tina, nebandla elezayo ngakuti ulinikele esandleni setu." 
1Samuel30:24 Ngubanina ke oya kunipulapula ngalento? ngokuba njengesabelwa sabo bahlela ekulweni, siya kuba njalo isabelwa sabo bahlala ngasempahleni; kwolingana ukwabelwa kwabo." 
1Samuel30:25 Kwabekute kwa semhleni lowo nangasemva, ukuba wakumisa oku kube ngumteto nesiko kwa‐Sirayeli kwada kwanamhla." 
1Samuel30:26 Wati akufika u‐Davide e‐Tsikilage, watuma inxenye yexoba kubo abadala bo‐Juda, kubo abahlobo bake, esiti: Nali itamsanqa kuni, kwixoba lentshaba zikayehova;" 
1Samuel30:27 kwa kubo abase‐Betele, nakubo abase‐Ramote yasesuyide, nakubo abase‐Yatire," 
1Samuel30:28 nakubo abase‐Harohere, nakubo abase‐Sifimote, nakubo abase‐Shetemoha," 
1Samuel30:29 nakubo abase‐Rakale, nakubo abasezixekweni zama‐Jeramele, nakubo abasezixekweni zama‐Keni," 
1Samuel30:30 nakubo abase‐Horema, nakubo abase‐Kore‐hashane, nakubo abase‐Hatake," 
1Samuel30:31 nakubo abase‐Hebrone, nakuzo zonke indawo, apo u‐Davide ebehambile kona, yena namadoda ake." 
1Samuel31:1 KEKALOKU ama‐Filistiya alwa no‐Sirayeli; aza amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli esaba pambi kwama‐Filistiya, awa ehlatyiwe entabeni ye‐Giliboha." 
1Samuel31:2 Asuka ama‐Filistiya ati nama ukulandela u‐Saule nonyana bake; ada ama‐Filistiya abulala u‐Jonatane, no‐Abinadabi, no‐Maleki‐shuha, onyana baka‐Saule." 
1Samuel31:3 Kwabekunzima ke ukulwa ngakuye u‐Saule, ati amadoda abetola ngesipeta amcana; waza watutumela kakulu ngenxa yabatoli." 
1Samuel31:4 Wandula u‐Saule wati kumtwali wezixo̔bo zake: Ṙola iṙele lako, undihlabe ngalo; hleze aba bangalukileyo beze, bandihlabe, badlale ngam. Kodwa umtwali wezixo̔bo zake ebengavumi; ngokuba ebesoyika kakulu. Waza u‐Saule watabata iṙele, wawa pezu kwalo." 
1Samuel31:5 Wati umtwali wezixo̔bo zake, akubona ukuba u‐Saule ufile, wawa naye pezu kweṙele lake, wafa kunye naye." 
1Samuel31:6 Kwa njalo wabuba u‐Saule, nonyana bake bobatatu, nomtwali wezixo̔bo zake, nawo onke amadoda ake, ngalomini kwa kunye." 
1Samuel31:7 Ati akubona amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli abenganeno kwomhlambo, nabenganeno kwe‐Yoredane, ukuba amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli esabile, nokuba u‐Saule nonyana bake bafile, andula ashiya izixeko, esaba; ati ama‐Filistiya eza ahlala kuzo." 
1Samuel31:8 Kwaye kute ngomnye umhla, akufika ama‐Filistiya ukuhluba abahlatyiweyo, afumana u‐Saule nonyana bake bobatatu belele entabeni ye‐Giliboha." 
1Samuel31:9 Aza anqumla intloko yake, ahluba izixo̔bo zake, atumela ezweni lama‐Filistiya elingqongayo, ukushumayela endlwini yezitixo zawo nasebantwini." 
1Samuel31:10 Kekaloku izixo̔bo zake azibeka endlwini ka‐Hashetorete, nesidumbu sake asibetela eludongeni lwase‐Bete‐shane." 
1Samuel31:11 Bati bakuva abemi base‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi oko akwenzileyo ama‐Filistiya ku‐Saule," 
1Samuel31:12 bandul’ ukusuka bonke abangamaṙoti, bahamba bonke ubusuku, batula isidumbu sika‐Saule, nezidumbu zonyana bake, eludongeni lwase‐Bete‐shane, beza e‐Yabeshe, bazitshisa kona." 
1Samuel31:13 Baza batabata amatambo abo, bawancw̔aba ngapantsi kwomti wetamariske e‐Yabeshe, bazila ukutya intsuku zasixe̔nxe." 
2Samuel1:1 KWAYE kute emva kwokufa kuka‐Saule, nxa u‐Davide abebuyile ekubulaweni kwama‐Amaleki, na nxa u‐Davide abehleli imihla mibini e‐Tsiki lage;" 
2Samuel1:2 kwaye kute kwa ngomhla wesitatu, ukuba, bona ke, indoda yavela emkosini ku‐Saule, inengubo zayo ziṙazukile, nomhlaba pezu kwentloko yayo: kwati ke, ekuzeni kwayo ku‐Davide, yawa ngasemhlabeni, yaziqubuda." 
2Samuel1:3 Waza u‐Davide wati kuyo: Uvela pina? Yati kuye: Ndisindile emkosini wama‐Sirayeli. 
2Samuel1:4 Wati u‐Davide kuyo: Kwehla nto nina? ndixeleleke. Yayisiti: Abantu besabile ekulweni; kanjako kuwile abaninzi kubo abantu, batile; no‐Saule, no‐Jonatane unyana wake, bafile nabo." 
2Samuel1:5 Walekela u‐Davide wati kuyo indodana ebimxelele: Wazi nganina, ukuba u‐Saule ufile, no‐Jonatane unyana wake?" 
2Samuel1:6 Yaza indodana ebimxelele yati: Ndahla ndafika entabeni ye‐Giliboha; kekaloku nanku u‐Saule esimelele ngentshuntshe yake; kanjalo, bona ke, inqwelo nabakweli bamahashe bebemputuma ngokuti nama;" 
2Samuel1:7 wati akubeka ngasemva kwake, wandibona, wandibiza; ndaza ndati: Nanku ndi lapa." 
2Samuel1:8 Waza wati kum: Ungubanina? Ndati kuye: Ndingum‐Amaleki. 
2Samuel1:9 Wati kum kanjalo: Yima ke pezu kwam, undifise, ngokuba isizunguzane sindibambile; ngokuba ubomi bam busebonke pakati kwam." 
2Samuel1:10 Ndaza ndema pezu kwake, ndamfisa, ngokuba bendisazi ukuba akayi kupila emva kwokuwa kwake; ndaye nditabata ikrone ebisentlokweni yake, nesacolo esibe sisengalweni yake, endizizisileyo enkosini yam apa." 
2Samuel1:11 Wandula u‐Davide wabamba ingubo zake, waziṙazula; kwa nawo onke amadoda abenaye;" 
2Samuel1:12 baza benza isijwili, balila, bazila ukutya kwada kwahlwa, ngenxa ka‐Saule, nangenxa ka‐Jonatane unyana wake, nangenxa yabantu bakayehova, nangenxa yendlu ka‐Sirayeli, ngokuba bebewile ngeṙele." 
2Samuel1:13 Wabuya u‐Davide wati kuyo indodana ebimxelele: Uvela pina? Yati: Ndingunyana womntu wasemzini, um‐Amaleki." 
2Samuel1:14 Waza u‐Davide wati kuyo: Yinina ukuba ubungoyiki ukwolula isandla sako ukumbulala umtanjiswa kayehova? 
2Samuel1:15 Wandula u‐Davide wayibiza enye kumadodana, wati: Sondela, yiwele. Yaza yayibeta, yada yafa." 
2Samuel1:16 Waye u‐Davide esiti kuyo: Igazi lako malibe pezu kweyako intloko; ngokuba umlomo wako unqi̔nile ngakuwe, usiti: Mna ndimfisile umtanjiswa kayehova." 
2Samuel1:17 Kekaloku u‐Davide wenza isililo esi pezu kwo‐Saule, napezu kwo‐Jonatane unyana wake:" 
2Samuel1:18 (wayexela ukuba usapo luka‐Juda malufundiswe isi‐Peta; bona ke, siba̔liwe encwadini ka‐Yashere:)" 
2Samuel1:19 Buhle buka‐Sirayeli, buhlatyiwe pezu kwenduli zako! hai ukuwa kwamaṙoti!" 
2Samuel1:20 Ningaxeleli e‐Gate, ningashumayeli ezitarateni ze‐Ashekelone; hleze zivuye intombi zama‐Filistiya, hleze zigcobe intombi zabangalukileyo." 
2Samuel1:21 Nina zintaba zase‐Giliboha? makungabiko umbete, makungabiko nemvula pezu kwenu, kwa namasimi eminikelo: ngokuba kona apo bekulahlwa ikaka lamaṙoti, ikaka lika‐Saule, njengokungati ebengenguye otanjisiweyo ngeoli." 
2Samuel1:22 Isipeta sika‐Jonatane asihlehlanga ngomva, neṙele lika‐Saule alibuyanga zé, kulo igazi labahlatyiweyo, kulo inqata lamaṙoti." 
2Samuel1:23 U‐Saule no‐Jonatane bebengabatandekayo nabamnandi ekudleni kwabo ubomi, nasekufeni kwabo bebengahlukene: bebenamendu ngapezu kwenkozi, bebenamandla ngapezu kwengonyama." 
2Samuel1:24 Zintombi zakwa Sirayeli! lilelani u‐Saule, obenivatisa ngesibomvu kunye neziyoliso, owafaka izihombo zegolide pezu kwokuvata kwenu." 
2Samuel1:25 Hai ukuwa kwamaṙoti pakati kwokulwa! Jonatane, uhlatyiwe pezu kwenduli zako." 
2Samuel1:26 Kubuhlungu kum ngenxa yako, mzalwana wam Jonatane! ubumnandi kum kakulu; utando lwako lube lungummangaliso kum, lupezu kwotando lwabafazi!" 
2Samuel1:27 Hai ukuwa kwamaṙoti, nokutshabalala kwezixo̔bo zemfazwe!" 
2Samuel2:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwoku, ukuba u‐Davide wabuza kuyehova, esiti: Ndiya kunyuka na ndiye kwesinye sezixeko zakwa‐Juda? Wayesiti uyehova kuye: Nyuka. Waza u‐Davide wati: Ndiya kunyukela pina? Wati: e‐Hebrone." 
2Samuel2:2 Wasuka u‐Davide wenyukela kona, kwa nabafazi bake bobabini, u‐Ahinohame um‐Yezerelekazi, no‐Abigali umfazi ka‐Nabali um‐Karamele." 
2Samuel2:3 Namadoda ake abenaye wawenyusa u‐Davide, amanye ngamanye enabendlu zawo: baza bahlala ezixekweni zase‐Hebrone." 
2Samuel2:4 Andula eza amadoda akwa‐Juda, amtambisa kona u‐Davide abe ngukumkani pezu kwendlu ka‐Juda. Kwaye kuxelwa ku‐Davide, kusitwa: Amadoda ase‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi angabo abamncw̔abileyo u‐Saule." 
2Samuel2:5 Waza u‐Davide watuma izigidimi kuwo amadoda ase‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi, wati kuwo: Manitanyusanqelwe nina nguyehova, ngokokuba nenzile obububele enkosini yenu, ku‐Saule, nimncw̔abile nje." 
2Samuel2:6 Nakaloku makenze uyehova kuni ububele nenyaniso; kanjalo nam ndiya kubuyekeza kuni ukulunga oku, ngokokuba nenzile lento." 
2Samuel2:7 Ngako kaloku, mazomelele izandla zenu, nibe ngamadoda obuṙoti; ngokuba ifile inkosi yenu, u‐Saule; kanjalo nam indlu ka‐Juda inditambisile ndibe ngukumkani pezu kwabo." 
2Samuel2:8 Koko u‐Abenere, unyana ka‐Nere, inkosi yomkosi obungoka‐Saule, watabata u‐Shiboshete unyana ka‐Saule, wamweza ukuya e‐Mahanayime;" 
2Samuel2:9 wamenza ukumkani pezu kwe‐Gileyadi, napezu kwama‐Ashuri, napezu kwe‐Yezerele, napezu kwo‐Frayime, napezu kwo‐Benjamine, napezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke." 
2Samuel2:10 Ebengominyaka imashumi mane u‐Shiboshete unyana ka‐Saule ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli; wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamibini. Kodwa indlu ka‐Juda ibimlandela u‐Davide." 
2Samuel2:11 Laye inani lemihla u‐Davide ebengukumkani ngayo e‐Hebrone, pezu kwendlu ka‐Juda, liyiminyaka isixe̔nxe nenyanga zintandatu." 
2Samuel2:12 Kekaloku u‐Abenere unyana ka‐Nere, nezicaka zika‐Shiboshete unyana ka‐Saule, bapuma e‐Mahanayime baya e‐Gibeyone:" 
2Samuel2:13 kanjalo u‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya, nezicaka zika‐Davide, bapuma, bahlangana nabo ngasecibini lase‐Gibeyone: baza bahlala pantsi, aba ngelinye icala lecibi, nabo ngelinye icala lecibi." 
2Samuel2:14 Wandula u‐Abenere wati ku‐Jowabi: Makasuke ke amadodana, adlale ebusweni betu. Wati u‐Jowabi: Makasuke." 
2Samuel2:15 Aza esuka, adlula ngenani; ishumi linamabini amadodana akwa‐Benjamine, abengaka‐Shiboshete unyana ka‐Saule, neshumi linamabini ezicakeni zika‐Davide." 
2Samuel2:16 Asuka abambana ngentloko, ahlaba enye ngeṙele layo ecaleni lenye, awa kwa kunye; ngako londawo ibibizwa ngokuti yi‐Helekate‐hatsurime, ese‐Gibeyone." 
2Samuel2:17 Kwabekuko ukulwa okunzima kakulu ngalomhla: waza woyiswa u‐Abenere, namadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, ebusweni bezicaka zika‐Davide." 
2Samuel2:18 Kwaye kuko kona onyana abatatu baka‐Tseruya, u‐Jowabi, no‐Abishai, no‐Hasaheli; waye u‐Hasaheli ebenamendu ngenyawo zake, njengelinye lamabadi asendle." 
2Samuel2:19 Waza u‐Hasaheli wamsukela u‐Abenere; ebengashenxi ukuya ngasekunene nangasekohlo ekumlandeleni u‐Abenere. 
2Samuel2:20 Wandula u‐Abenere wabeka ngasemva kwake, wati: Unguwe na, Hasaheli? Wati: Ndim." 
2Samuel2:21 Waza u‐Abenere wati kuye: Shenxela ngasekunene kwako, umhlaumbi ngasekohlo kwako, uyibambe enye yamadodana, utabate izixo̔bo zayo. Kodwa u‐Hasaheli ebengavumi ukupambuka ekumlandeleni." 
2Samuel2:22 Wapinda kanjako u‐Abenere ukuti ku‐Hasaheli: Pambuka ekundilandeleni; yinina ukuba ndikubete ngasemhlabeni? ngendisiti nina ke ukupakamisa ubuso bam ku‐Jowabi umkuluwe wako? 
2Samuel2:23 Kodwa wala ukupambuka: ngako u‐Abenere wambeta ngencam yasemva yentshuntshe esiswini, yada intshuntshe yapumela emva kwake; waza wawa kona, wafa endaweni yake: kwaza kwati, bonke abezayo kulondawo, apo wawayo u‐Hasaheli wafa kona, bati uqumama." 
2Samuel2:24 Kanjalo u‐Jowabi no‐Abishai bamsukela u‐Abenere: lati ilanga latshona bakufika endulini ye‐Ama, epambi kwe‐Giya, ngasendleleni yentlango yase‐Gibeyone." 
2Samuel2:25 Lwaza usapo luka‐Benjamine lwazihlanganisa emva kwo‐Abenere, lwaba liqela linye, lwema pezu kwococoyi lwenduli." 
2Samuel2:26 Wandula u‐Abenere wabiza ku‐Jowabi, wati: Iṙele liya kudla kude kube ngunapakade na? akwazi na ukuba kwobako ubuṙaṙa ekupeleni? kwoda kube ninina ke ungayi kuxelela abantu, ukuba mababuye ekulandeleni abazalwana babo?" 
2Samuel2:27 Waza wati u‐Jowabi: Ehleli nje uyehova, ukuba ubungatetanga, ngenyaniso oko kwa kusasa bange benyukile abantu abanye ngabanye ekulandeleni abazalwana babo!" 
2Samuel2:28 Wandula u‐Jowabi wavutela ngexilongo; baza bonke abantu bati nqumama; ababuya basukele o‐Sirayeli; ababi sapinda ukulwa kanjako. 
2Samuel2:29 Kekaloku u‐Abenere namadoda ake bahamba bonke ubusuku obo etafeni, bawela i‐Yoredane, bacanda kuyo yonke i‐Biterone, bada bafika e‐Mahanayime." 
2Samuel2:30 Wati no‐Jowabi wabuya ekumlandeleni u‐Abenere, wahlanganisa bonke abantu: kwaza kwasweleka ezicakeni zika‐Davide amadoda alishumi elinesitoba, no‐Hasaheli:" 
2Samuel2:31 kodwa izicaka zika‐Davide bezibetile ku madoda akwa‐Benjamine, napakati kwamadoda ka‐Abenere, ukuba amadoda angamakulu matatu anamashumi matandatu abefile." 
2Samuel2:32 Baza bamsusa u‐Hasaheli, bamncw̔aba encw̔abeni loyise, elibe lise‐Beteleheme. Basuka bahamba u‐Jowabi namadoda ake bonke ubusuku, kwada kwabakanyela e‐Hebrone." 
2Samuel3:1 KEKALOKU kwabekuko ukulwa okude pakati kwendlu ka‐Saule nendlu ka‐Davide: kodwa u‐Davide wamana ukwomelela, kanti indlu ka‐Saule bona bamana ukuba butataka." 
2Samuel3:2 Kwaye kumzalelwa u‐Davide onyana e‐Hebrone: owamazibulo wake ebengu‐Amnone, ngo‐Ahinohame um‐Yezerelekazi;" 
2Samuel3:3 nowesibini wake ebengu‐Kileyabi, ngo‐Abigali umfazi ka‐Nabali um‐Karamele; nowesitatu ebengu‐Abasalome, unyana ka‐Mahaka intombi ka‐Talemai ukumkani we‐Geshure;" 
2Samuel3:4 nowesine ebengu‐Adonija, unyana ka‐Hagiti; nowesihlanu ebengu‐Shefatiya, unyana ka‐Abitale;" 
2Samuel3:5 nowesitandatu ebengu‐Yiterame, ngo‐Hegela umfazi ka‐Davide. Aba bebemzalelwa u‐Davide e‐Hebrone." 
2Samuel3:6 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni bekuko ukulwa pakati kwendlu ka‐Saule nendlu ka‐Davide, ukuba u‐Abenere wazomelezela indlu ka‐Saule." 
2Samuel3:7 Kekaloku u‐Saule ebeneshweshwe, eligama belingu‐Ritsepa, intombi ka‐Aya. Wayesiti u‐Shiboshete ku‐Abenere: Yinina ukuba ubungena kulo ishweshwe likabawo?" 
2Samuel3:8 Wandula u‐Abenere waqumba kakulu ngenxa yamazwi ka‐Shiboshete, wati: Ndiyintloko yenja na mna, enditi ngakubo o‐Juda, ndenze ububele namhla kuyo indlu ka‐Saule uyihlo, kubo abazalwana bake, nakubo abahlobo bake, ndingakunikelanga esandleni sika‐Davide, ukuba uyabeka pezu kwam ityala lalomfazi namhla?" 
2Samuel3:9 Utixo makenje njalo ku‐Abenere, alekele ukwenje njalo kuye, ukuba anditi, njengokuba uyehova efungile ku‐Davide, ndenze kwa njalo kuye:" 
2Samuel3:10 ukufudusa ubukumkani kuyo indlu ka‐Saule, nokumisa iterone ka‐Davide pezu kwo‐Sirayeli napezu kwo‐Juda, kwa se‐Dane kude kube se‐Beresheba." 
2Samuel3:11 Waza wakohlwa ukumpendula u‐Abenere kanjako nalinye ilizwi, ngokuba ebemoyika." 
2Samuel3:12 Wandula u‐Abenere watuma izigidimi ku‐Davide ngenxa yokwake, ukuti: Lelikabanina ilizwe? n okuti: Yenza ucebano lwako nam; bona ke, isandla sam sesiya kuba nawe, ukuguqulela kuwe o‐Sirayeli bonke." 
2Samuel3:13 Waza wati: Kulungile, ndiya kulwenza nawe ucebano; inye into kodwa ndiyibiza kuwe, yokuti: Akuyi kubona ubuso bam, ukuba akumzisi kuqala u‐Mikali intombi ka‐Saule, wakuza ukubona ubuso bam." 
2Samuel3:14 Kanjalo u‐Davide watuma izigidimi ku‐Shiboshete unyana ka‐Saule, esiti: Kupa umfazi wam u‐Mikali, endimxamele mna ngekulu lamajwabu ama‐Filistiya." 
2Samuel3:15 Watuma ke u‐Shiboshete, wamsusa endodeni, ku‐Falitiyeli unyana ka‐Layishe." 
2Samuel3:16 Yaza indoda yake yahamba naye, yamana ilila emva kwake kude kwase‐Bahurime. Wandula u‐Abenere wati kuyo: Hamba, buya. Yaza yabuya." 
2Samuel3:17 Kekaloku u‐Abenere ebenamazwi kunye nabadala bo‐Sirayeli, esiti: Ngamaxesha apambili benimfuna u‐Davide ukuba abe ngukumkani pezu kwenu;" 
2Samuel3:18 ngako kaloku yenzani; ngokuba uyehova etetile ngo‐Davide, esiti: Ngesandla sika‐Davide isicaka sam ndiya kusindisa abantu bam o‐Sirayeli esandleni sama‐Filistiya, nasesandleni sentshaba zabo zonke." 
2Samuel3:19 Wateta u‐Abenere kanjalo ezindlebeni zo‐Benjamine: waya u‐Abenere kanjako ukuteta ezindlebeni zika‐Davide e‐Hebrone, konke okube kulungile emehlweni o‐Sirayeli, nasemehlweni ayo yonke indlu ka‐Benjamine." 
2Samuel3:20 Kwa njalo u‐Abenere weza ku‐Davide e‐Hebrone, enaye amadoda angamashumi mabini. Waza u‐Davide wenzela u‐Abenere namadoda abenaye isidlo." 
2Samuel3:21 Wandula u‐Abenere wati ku‐Davide: Ndiya kusuka ndihambe, ndiye kuhlanganisela enkosini yam ukumkani bonke o‐Sirayeli, ukuba benze ucebano nawe, uze upate ubukumkani pezu kwako konke okukanukwayo ngumpefumlo wako. Wada u‐Davide wamndulula u‐Abenere; wasuka wahamba ngoxolo." 
2Samuel3:22 Kekaloku bona ke, izicaka zika‐Davide no‐Jowabi bavela ebandleni, bazisa nabo amaxoba amaninzi: kodwa u‐Abenere ebengenaye u‐Davide e‐Hebrone, ngokuba ebemndulule, waza wemka ngoxolo." 
2Samuel3:23 Kwati kwakufika u‐Jowabi nomkosi wonke obunaye, kwaxelwa ku‐Jowabi ngokuti: u‐Abenere, unyana ka‐Nere, weza kukumkani, owamndulula, wada wemka ngoxolo." 
2Samuel3:24 Wandula u‐Jowabi wangena kukumkani, wati: Wenze nto nina; bona ke, u‐Abenere weza kuwe; yinina lento umndululeyo, wada wemka kanye?" 
2Samuel3:25 Uyamazi u‐Abenere, unyana ka‐Nere, ukuba weza ukukukohlisa, nokukwazi ukupuma kwako nokungena kwako, nokukwazi konke okwenzayo wena." 
2Samuel3:26 Waza u‐Jowabi wapuma ku‐Davide, watuma izigidimi emva kwo‐Abenere, ezambuyisayo equleni le‐Sira. Kodwa u‐Davide wayengazi oku." 
2Samuel3:27 Nxa u‐Abenere abebuyele e‐Hebrone, waza u‐Jowabi wamshenxisela pakati esangweni, ukuze atete naye ngasese, wambeta kona esiswini, wada wafa, ngenxa yegazi lika‐Hasaheli umninawe wake." 
2Samuel3:28 Kwakuviwa ngu‐Davide kamva, wandula wati: Mna nobukumkani bam asinatyala pambi kwoyehova kude kube ngunapakade ngenxa yegazi lika‐Abenere unyana ka‐Nere:" 
2Samuel3:29 malibekwe pezu kwentloko ka‐Jowabi, napezu kwayo yonke indlu yoyise; kanjalo makunganqamki kwindlu ka‐Jowabi lowo unegqita, nolileperi, nowayama ngomsimelelo, nowayo ngeṙele, noswele isonka." 
2Samuel3:30 Kwa njalo u‐Jowabi no‐Abishai umninawe wake bambulala u‐Abenere, ngenxa yokuba ebemfisile u‐Hasaheli umninawe wabo e‐Gibeyone ekulweni." 
2Samuel3:31 Wandula u‐Davide wati ku‐Jowabi, nakubo bonke abantu ababenaye: Ṙazulani ingubo zenu, nibinqe intlakantlaka, nimlilele u‐Abenere. Wasuka ukumkani u‐Davide wahamba emva kwetala." 
2Samuel3:32 Baza bamncw̔aba u‐Abenere e‐Hebrone: waye ukumkani wapakamisa ilizwi lake, walila ngasencw̔abeni lika‐Abenere; balila bonke abantu nabo." 
2Samuel3:33 Kekaloku ukumkani wenzela u‐Abenere isililo, wati: Wafa na u‐Abenere, njengokuba kusifa ibedengu?" 
2Samuel3:34 Izandla zako bezingabotshwanga, nenyawo zako bezingafakwanga emakamandeleni obedu: njengowayo pambi kwonyana bobumenemene, wawa wena. Baza bonke abantu bandisa ukulila pezu kwake." 
2Samuel3:35 Bandula beza bonke abantu ukumdlisa u‐Davide isonka, nxa kuseko imini: kodwa wafunga u‐Davide, esiti: Utixo makenje njalo kum, alekele ukwenje njalo, ukuba nditi, lingekatshoni ilanga, ndive isonka umhlaumbi enye into yimbi." 
2Samuel3:36 Bati bonke abantu bakunakana oko, bekulungile emehlweni abo; njengokuba konke abekwenza ukumkani bekulungile emehlweni abantu bonke." 
2Samuel3:37 Baza bonke abantu, kwa bonke o‐Sirayeli, bazi ngalomhla, ukuba bekungavelanga kukumkani ukumnsa u‐Abenere unyana ka‐Nere." 
2Samuel3:38 Wati ukumkani kanjalo kwizicaka zake: Anazi na ukuba iwile inkosi nendoda enkulu namhla nje kwa‐Sirayeli? 
2Samuel3:39 Nam ke, namhla ndibutataka, noko ndingukumkani otanjisiweyo; nalamadoda, onyana baka‐Tseruya, alukuni kum: uyehova uya kumvuza umenzi wenkohlakalo njengenkohlakalo yake." 
2Samuel4:1 WATI akuva unyana ka‐Saule ukuba u‐Abenere utile e‐Hebrone, zandula izandla zake zapolelwa, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli betuswa." 
2Samuel4:2 Waye unyana ka‐Saule ebenamadoda mabini, inkosi zamabandla; igama lenye lalingu‐Bahana, negama lenye lalingu‐Rekabe, onyana baka‐Rimone um‐Berote, owosapo luka‐Benjamine: (ngokuba ne‐Berote ibibalelwa o‐Benjamine:" 
2Samuel4:3 kanjalo ama‐Berote ebesabele e‐Gitayime, aba ngabasemzini kona kude kwanamhla nje.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Waye u‐Jonatane, unyana ka‐Saule, ebenonyana oqwalela ngenyawo: wabeyiminyaka mihlanu ubudala bake, nxa zibe zivela indaba ngaye u‐Saule no‐Jonatane e‐Yezerele; waza umondlikazi wake wamtabata, wesaba: kwaza kwati, akunxama ukusaba, wawa, waba sisiqwala. Laye igama lake lingu‐Mefiboshete." 
2Samuel4:5 Basuka bahamba onyana baka‐Rimone um‐Berote, u‐Rekabe no‐Bahana, beza endlwini ka‐Shiboshete yakufudumala imini: waye yena elele emandlalweni emini enkulu." 
2Samuel4:6 Baza bangena kona kude kwapakati kwendlu, njengokungati bebezeka inqolowa, bambeta esiswini: bati u‐Rekale no‐Bahana umzalwana wake basinda." 
2Samuel4:7 Ngokuba, bakungena endlwini, ebelele yena pezu kwomandlalo wake enkambilini yake yokulala; bandula bambeta, bambulala, bamnqumla intloko, batabata intloko yake, bahamba ngendlela yetafa bonke ubusuku." 
2Samuel4:8 Baza bazisa intloko ka‐Shiboshete ku‐Davide e‐Hebrone, bati kukumkani: Nantsi intloko ka‐Shiboshete, unyana ka‐Saule, utshaba lwako, obefuna ubomi bako; kwa njalo uyehova wenzele inkosi yam ukumkani impindezelo namhla nje kuye u‐Saule nakuyo inzalo yake." 
2Samuel4:9 Koko u‐Davide wapendula u‐Rekabe no‐Bahana umzalwana wake, onyana baka‐Rimone um‐Berote, wati kubo: Ehleli nje uyehova, okululeyo umpefumlo wam kubo bonke ubunzima;" 
2Samuel4:10 xeshekweni lowo owandixelela ngokuti: Bona ke, u‐Saule ufile; obenjengozisayo indaba ezilungileyo kwawake amehlo; ndambamba ke, ndambulala e‐Tsikilage; o beba ndiya kumnika umvuzo wendaba:" 
2Samuel4:11 kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi, nxa amadoda akohlakeleyo abulele indoda elungileyo endlwini yayo pezu kwomandlalo wayo? ngako kaloku, andiyi kubiza na igazi layo ezandleni zenu, ndisuse nina emhlabeni?" 
2Samuel4:12 Waza u‐Davide wayalela amadodana ake, aza ababulala, anqumla izandla zabo nenyawo zabo, abaxo̔ma ngasecibini e‐Hebrone: kodwa intloko ka‐Shiboshete ayitabata, ayincw̔aba encw̔abeni lika‐Abenere e‐Hebrone." 
2Samuel5:1 ZANDULA zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli zeza ku‐Davide e‐Hebrone, zatsho zisiti: Bona ke, silitambo lako nenyama yako tina." 
2Samuel5:2 Kanjako kwa ngapambili, xeshekweni u‐Saule abengukumkani pezu kwetu, ebenguwe owapumisa nowangenisa o‐Sirayeli; kanjalo uyehova wati kuwe: Wena uya kwalusa abantu bam o‐Sirayeli, wauya kuba yinkosi pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
2Samuel5:3 Ngako bonke abadala bo‐Sirayeli beza kukumkani e‐Hebrone; waye ukumkani u‐Davide wenza ucebano nabo e‐Hebrone ebusweni bukayehova; baza bamtambisa u‐Davide abe ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli. 
2Samuel5:4 Waye u‐Davide ebeyiminyaka imashumi matatu ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani; wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mane." 
2Samuel5:5 E‐Hebrone wapata ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Juda iminyaka isixe̔nxe nenyanga zintandatu; nase‐Yerusaleme wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi matatu anamitatu pezu kwabo bonke o‐Sirayeli no‐Juda. 
2Samuel5:6 Waza waya ukumkani namadoda ake e‐Yerusaleme kuwo ama‐Yebusi, abemi belozwe: atsho ke ku‐Davide esiti: Akuyi kungena apa, ungekazikwelelisanga imfama neziqwala; oko kukuti: u‐Davide akayi kungena apa." 
2Samuel5:7 Wati u‐Davide noko wati̔mba inqaba ye‐Ziyone, ekwa siso isixeko sika‐Davide." 
2Samuel5:8 Wayesiti u‐Davide ngalomhla: Osukuba ebeta ama‐Yebusi, afikelele emjelweni, abete nemfama neziqwala ezitiywayo ngumpefumlo ka‐Davide, kwa yena uya kuba yintloko nenkosi. Ngako oko bekutiwa: Oyimfama nosisiqwala akayi kungena endlwini." 
2Samuel5:9 Wandula u‐Davide wahlala enqatyeni, wayibiza ngokuti sisixeko sika‐Davide. Waza u‐Davide waka ngokungqonga, kutabata e‐Milo nangapakati." 
2Samuel5:10 Waye u‐Davide wamana ehambisa, waba mkulu; ngokuba uyehova, utixo wemikosi, ebenaye." 
2Samuel5:11 Kanjalo u‐Hirame, ukumkani we‐Tire, watuma izigidimi ku‐Davide, nemiti yesedare, nencibi zemiti, nencibi zamatye zodonga; zaye zimakela u‐Davide indlu." 
2Samuel5:12 Waza wanakana u‐Davide ukuba uyehova ebemqinisile ukuba ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, nokuba ebepakamisile ubukumkani bake ngenxa yabantu bake o‐Sirayeli." 
2Samuel5:13 Walekela u‐Davide ukuzeka amashweshwe nabafazi e‐Yerusaleme, emveni kwokuvela kwake e‐Hebrone; kwaza kwamzalelwa u‐Davide kanjako onyana nentombi." 
2Samuel5:14 Nanga amagama abo ababemzalelwa e‐Yerusaleme: u‐Shamuha, no‐Shobabe, no‐Natane, no‐Solomone," 
2Samuel5:15 no‐Yibare, no‐Elishuba, no‐Nefege, no‐Yafiha," 
2Samuel5:16 no‐Elishama, no‐Eliyada, no‐Elifelete." 
2Samuel5:17 Kwati kwakuviwa ngama‐Filistiya ukuba bamtambisile u‐Davide abe ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, andula enyuka onke ama‐Filistiya ukuya kumfuna u‐Davide. Waza u‐Davide, akuva oko, wehla waya enqatyeni." 
2Samuel5:18 Ada eza ama‐Filistiya, azitwabulula emhlanjeni wama‐Rafa." 
2Samuel5:19 Waza u‐Davide wabuza kuyehova, esiti: Ndiya kunyuka na ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya? wowanikela esandleni sam na? Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Davide: Nyuka; ngokuba ngenyaniso ndiya kunikela ama‐Filistiya esandleni sako." 
2Samuel5:20 Wandula u‐Davide weza e‐Bali‐peratsime; wawabeta kona u‐Davide, wati: Uyehova utyobozele ezintshabeni zam ebusweni bam njengesityobozelo samanzi. Ngako oko kwabizwa igama lalondawo ngokuti yi‐Bali‐peratsime." 
2Samuel5:21 Ayeshiya kona amadalo awo; baza u‐Davide namadoda ake bawasusa. 
2Samuel5:22 Apinda kanjako ama‐Filistiya ukunyuka, azitwabulula emhlanjeni wama‐Rafa." 
2Samuel5:23 Waza u‐Davide wabuza kuyehova, owati: Akuyi kunyuka; kodwa zekelela ukuya ngasemva kwawo, uwafikele malungana nemiti yebaka." 
2Samuel5:24 Kwakuya kuti, nxa uvayo isandi sokuhanjwa ezincameni zemiti yebaka, wandule unxame; ngokuba oko uyehova esel’ epumile pambi kwako, ukubeta umkosi wama‐Filistiya." 
2Samuel5:25 Wenje njalo u‐Davide, njengokuba uyehova ebemyalele; wabeta ama‐Filistiya kwa se‐Geba kude kwafikwa e‐Gezere." 
2Samuel6:1 WABUYA wahlanganisa u‐Davide bonke abanyuliweyo bakwa‐Sirayeli, bengamawaka amashumi matatu." 
2Samuel6:2 Wayesuka u‐Davide, wemka nabantu bonke ababenaye e‐Bahale‐juda, uku nyusa kwa kona ityeya katixo, ekupezu kwayo igama libizwayo, igama likayehova wemikosi, ohlala pakati kwekerubime." 
2Samuel6:3 Baza bakwelisa ityeya katixo enqwelweni entsha, bayisusa endlwini ka‐Abinadabi, ebise‐Gibeha: bati u‐Huza no‐Ahiyo, onyana baka‐Abinadabi, babexesha lonqwelo entsha." 
2Samuel6:4 Kekaloku bakuyisusa endlwini ka‐Abinadabi, ebise‐Gibeha, kunye netyeya katixo, waza u‐Ahiyo wahamba pambi kwetyeya." 
2Samuel6:5 Bandula u‐Davide nayo yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli badlala ebusweni bukayehova, ngezinto zonke zokuculisa ezenziweyo ngemiti yeberoshe, kwa ngehadi, nangenebele, nangentambula, nangezikencezelo, nangesimbali." 
2Samuel6:6 Kwati kwakufikwa esibayeni sokubula sika‐Nakone, waza u‐Huza wasolula isandla sake ngakuyo ityeya katixo, wayibamba; ngokuba inkabi beziku̔beka." 
2Samuel6:7 Yandula ingqumbo kayehova yavuta ngakuye u‐Huza; waye utixo wambeta kona ngenxa yesiposo eso; waza wafa kwa kona ngasetyeyeni katixo. 
2Samuel6:8 Wasuka waqumba u‐Davide ngenxa yokuba uyehova ebenzile isityobozelo pezu kwo‐Huza; ngako wayibiza londawo ngokuti yi‐Peretse‐huza, kude kwanamhla nje." 
2Samuel6:9 Waza u‐Davide wamoyika uyehova ngalomini, wayesiti: Yotiwa nina ukuza kum ityeya kayehova?" 
2Samuel6:10 Ngako u‐Davide ebengavumi ukuba ityeya kayehova ipanjukiselwe kuye esixekweni sika‐Davide; kodwa u‐Davide wayishenxisela endlwini ka‐Obedi‐edome um‐Gate. 
2Samuel6:11 Yaye ityeya kayehova ihleli endlwini ka‐Obedi‐edome um‐Gate inyangazantatu: waza uyehova watamsanqela u‐Obedi‐edome, nayo yonke indlu yake." 
2Samuel6:12 Kwaza kwaxelwa kukumkani u‐Davide, kusitwa: Uyehova utamsanqele indlu ka‐Obedi‐edome, nako konke anako, ngenxa yetyeya katixo. Waza u‐Davide waya wenyusa ityeya katixo endlwini ka‐Obedi‐edome, wayizisa esixekweni sika‐Davide ngovuyo." 
2Samuel6:13 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni abo batwala ityeya kayehova bebehambile amanyatela amatandatu, wandula wabingelela inkabi nenkomo ezityetyisiweyo." 
2Samuel6:14 Waye u‐Davide waduda ngawo onke amandla ake ebusweni bukayehova: kanjako u‐Davide wabinqwa ngeyefodi yeqiya. 
2Samuel6:15 Kwa njalo u‐Davide nayo yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli benyusa ityeya kayehova, ngokumemeza, nangentlokoma yexilongo." 
2Samuel6:16 Kwaza kwati, yakufika ityeya kayehova esixekweni sika Davide, u‐Mikali, intombi ka‐Saule, wakangela ngefenstile, wabona ukumkani u‐Davide exu̔ma eduda nokududa ebusweni bukayehova; wandula wamdela entliziyweni yake." 
2Samuel6:17 Baza bangenisa ityeya kayehova, bayimisa endaweni yayo, pakati kwentente ebe yolulelwe yona ngu‐Davide: wati u‐Davide wanikela amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yoxolo ebusweni bukayehova." 
2Samuel6:18 Xeshekweni u‐Davide abegqibile ukunikela amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yoxolo, wandula wabatamsanqelisa abantu egameni likayehova wemikosi." 
2Samuel6:19 Kanjalo wabela kubo bonke abantu, kuso sonke isihlwele sama‐Sirayeli, kwa kuwo amadoda nakubo abafazi, kwabanye ngabanye isimbana lesonka, nesiqendu senyama, negubu leveyine. Bada bemka bonke abantu baya abanye ngabanye ezindlwini zabo." 
2Samuel6:20 Wandula wabuya u‐Davide ukuya kutamsanqelisa indlu yake. Waza wapuma u‐Mikali, intombi ka‐Saule, ukuza kumkaulela u‐Davide, wati: Hai ukubekeka kwokumkani wo‐Sirayeli namhla, obezihluba namhla emehlweni ezicakakazi zezicaka zake, njengokuba omnye wabantu abangendawo ezihluba ekuhleni!" 
2Samuel6:21 Kodwa u‐Davide wati ku‐Mikali: Ebusweni bukayehova, ondinyulileyo pezu kwoyihlo, napezu kwayo yonke indlu yake, ukundimisa inkosi pezu kwabantu bakayehova, pezu kwo‐Sirayeli; ewe, ebusweni bukayehova ndiya kudlala:" 
2Samuel6:22 ndandiya kudeleka ngakumbi pezu kwoku, ndibe yinto etobekileyo emehlweni am; napakati kwezicakakazi obuteta ngazo, pakati kwazo ndiya kubekeka." 
2Samuel6:23 Ngako u‐Mikali, intombi ka‐Saule, wayengenamntwana kwada kwakuwo umhla wokufa kwake." 
2Samuel7:1 KWABEKUTE, nxa ukumkani abehleli endlwini yake, akuba uyehova ebemnikile ukupumla ngento engqongayo kuzo zonke intshaba zake;" 
2Samuel7:2 wandula ukumkani wati ku‐Natane umprofite: Kangela ke, mna ndihleli endlwini yesedare, kodwa ityeya kayehova ihleli pakati kwezikuselo." 
2Samuel7:3 Waza u‐Natane wati kukumkani: Hamba, ukwenze konke okusentliziyweni yako; ngokuba uyehova enawe." 
2Samuel7:4 Kwaye kute ngobobusuku, kweza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Natane, lisiti:" 
2Samuel7:5 Hamba uti kuso isicaka sam, ku‐Davide: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Kanene wena uya kundakela indlu yokuhlala kwam na?" 
2Samuel7:6 Ngokuba ndingahlalanga endlwini, kwa semhleni ndabendinyusa usapo luka‐Sirayeli e‐Jipete, kwada kwanamhla nje, koko ndihambile ententeni nasetabanakeleni." 
2Samuel7:7 Kuzo zonke indawo apo ndihambile kona pakati kwalo lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, ndike ndateta ilizwi na kwesinye sezizwe zo‐Sirayeli, endibe ndiziyalele ukwalusa abantu bam o‐Sirayeli, ndisiti: Yinina ukuba anindakeli indlu yesedare?" 
2Samuel7:8 Ngako kaloku, uya kutsho kwisicaka sam, ku‐Davide, ukuti: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Mna ndakutabata esibayeni, kwa sekulandeleni igusha, ukuba ube yinkosi pezu kwabantu bam, pezu kwo‐Sirayeli:" 
2Samuel7:9 ndabendiko nawe kuzo zonke indawo apo ubuhamba kona, nazo zonke intshaba zako ndizinqamlile ebusweni bako; kanjalo ndikwenzele igama elikulu, njengegama labakulu abasemhlabeni:" 
2Samuel7:10 ndandiya kumisela abantu bam o‐Sirayeli indawo, ndibatyale, baze beme endaweni yabo, bangabi sazanyazanyiswa; kanjalo usapo lwobumenemene aluyi kubuya lubabandezele, njengasekuqaleni," 
2Samuel7:11 nakuselokwalomhla ndabendimisa abagwebi pezu kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli; nawe ndikupumzile kuzo zonke intshaba zako. Kanjako uyehova uyashumayela kuwe, okokuba uyehova uya kukwenzela indlu." 
2Samuel7:12 Xeshekweni imihla yako izalisekile, yokuba uya kulala noyihlo bako, ndiya kwandula ndivuse owenzalo yako emva kwako, oya kuvela ematunjini ako, ndiqinise ubukumkani bake." 
2Samuel7:13 Nguye oya kulakela igama lam indlu, ndandiya kuqinisa iterone yake kude kube ngunapakade." 
2Samuel7:14 Mna ndiya kuba nguyise kuye, naye woba ngunyana kum. Ukuba uyenza ngobugwenxa, ndiya kumohlwaya ngoswazi lwabantu, nangezibeto zonyana babantu:" 
2Samuel7:15 kodwa ububele bam abuyi kumka kuye, njengokuba bendibususa ku‐Saule, lowo bendimsusa kwa pambi kwako." 
2Samuel7:16 Kwoba kunqabile indlu yako nobukumkani bako kude kube ngunapakade pambi kwako: iterone yako iya kuqiniswa kude kube ngunapakade. 
2Samuel7:17 Ngawo onke lamazwi, nangawo wonke lomboniso, wateta u‐Natane ngokunjalo ku‐Davide." 
2Samuel7:18 Wandula ukumkani u‐Davide wangena wahlala ebusweni bukayehova, wati: Ndingubanina mna, Nkosi, Yehova? iyinto nina nendlu yam, ukuba undizisile kude kwalapa?" 
2Samuel7:19 Oku bekusencinane noko emehlweni ako, Nkosi, Yehova! ngokuba utetile kanjalo ngayo indlu yesicaka sako kude kube kude. Eli ke lisiko labantu na, Nkosi, Yehova?" 
2Samuel7:20 Yinto nina angasalekela u‐Davide ukuyiteta kuwe? ngokuba wena, Nkosi, Yehova! usazi isicaka sako." 
2Samuel7:21 Ngenxa yelizwi lako, nangokweyako intliziyo, wenzile zonke ezizinto ezinkulu, ukuba uzazise kuso isicaka sako." 
2Samuel7:22 Ngako oko wena umkulu, Yehova, Tixo! ngokuba kungeko onjengawe, kanjako akuko utixo ngapandle kwako, njengako konke esikuvileyo ngendlebe zetu." 
2Samuel7:23 Kanjalo sisipina isizwe sinye emhlabeni esinjengabantu bako, njengo‐Sirayeli; owati utixo waya ukubakulula babe ngabantu kuye, nokuzimisela igama, nokunenzela nina izinto ezinkulu nezoyikekayo elizweni lako, pambi kwabantu bako, obuzikululela bona e‐Jipete, ebagxota abaheyideni notixo babo?" 
2Samuel7:24 Wabuziqinisela abantu bako o‐Sirayeli ukuba ngabantu bako kude kube ngunapakade; nawe, Yehova! waba ngutixo wabo." 
2Samuel7:25 Ngako kaloku, Yehova, Tixo! elolizwi ulitetileyo ngaso isicaka sako, nangayo indlu yaso, ulimise kude kube ngunapakade, wenze njengokuba utetile." 
2Samuel7:26 Malenziwe likulu igama lako kude kube ngunapakade, kuze kutiwe: Uyehova wemikosi u ngutixo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli; nendlu yesicaka sako u‐Davide, maiqiniswe ebusweni bako." 
2Samuel7:27 Ngokuba wena, Yehova wemikosi, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! utyilele indlebe yesicaka sako, usiti: Ndiya kukwakela indlu; ngako oko isicaka sako sifumene entliziyweni yaso ukutandaza lomtandazo kuwe." 
2Samuel7:28 Nakaloku, Nkosi, Yehova! wena unguye utixo, namazwi ako ayinyaniso; nezizinto ezilungileyo uzitetile ngaso isicaka sako:" 
2Samuel7:29 ngako kaloku makukoleke kuwe ukutamsanqela indlu yesicaka sako, ukuba ibeko ebusweni bako kude kube ngunapakade; ngokuba wena, Nkosi, Yehova! utetile; nangetamsanqeliso lako iya kutanyusanqelwa indlu yesicaka sako kude kube ngunapakade." 
2Samuel8:1 KWABEKUTE emveni kwoku, ukuba u‐Davide wabeta ama‐Filistiya, wawatobisa; waza u‐Davide watabata i‐Metege‐ama esandleni sama‐Filistiya." 
2Samuel8:2 Wabeta nama‐Mowabi, wawalinganisa ngentambo, ewalalisa ngasemhlabeni; walinganisa ngentambo ezimbini zokuba kufiswe, nangentambo ezeleyo yokuba kulondolozwe ebomini: aza ama‐Mowabi aba ngabakonzi ku‐Davide, asa iminikelo." 
2Samuel8:3 Waza u‐Davide wabeta u‐Hadadezere, unyana ka‐Rebobi, ukumkani we‐Tsoba, ekuhambeni kwake ukuya kubuyisa amandla ake ngasemlanjeni wom‐Ferate." 
2Samuel8:4 Waye u‐Davide watimba kuye iwaka lenqwelwana, namakulu asixe̔nxe abakweli bamahashe, namawaka angamashumi mabini abahamba ngenyawo; waza u‐Davide wawasika umbotshwa onke amahashe enqwelwana; kodwa wasalisa kuwo a wenqwelwana zalikulu." 
2Samuel8:5 Kekaloku ama‐Siriya ase Damakusi eza ukumnceda u‐Hadadezere ukumkani we‐Tsoba; waza u‐Davide wabulala kuwo ama‐Siriya amadoda angamawaka angamashumi mabini anamabini. 
2Samuel8:6 Wandula u‐Davide wazibeka ilali e‐Siriya yase‐Damakusi; ati ama‐Siriya aba ngabakonzi ku‐Davide, asa iminikelo. Kwa njalo uyehova wamnceda u‐Davide apo kusukuba ebesiya kona." 
2Samuel8:7 Wayetabata u‐Davide amakaka egolide abekuzo izicaka zika‐Hadadezere, wawazisa e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Samuel8:8 Waye ukumkani u‐Davide kanjalo wayisusa e‐Beta, nase‐Berotai, izixeko zika‐Hadadezere, ixina, into eninzi kakulu." 
2Samuel8:9 Kekaloku kwakuviwa ngu‐Tohi ukumkani we‐Hamati, ukuba u‐Davide ubetile wonke umkosi ka‐Hadadezere," 
2Samuel8:10 wandula u‐Tohi watuma u‐Yorame unyana wake ukuya kukumkani u‐Davide, ukumbulisa, nokumtamsanqelisa, ngenxa yokuba ebelwile ngakuye u‐Hadadezere wambeta; (ngokuba u‐Tohi ebenzile imfazwe no‐Hadadezere;) nasesandleni sake beziko impahla zesilivere, nempahla zegolide, nempahla zexina." 
2Samuel8:11 Ezi nazo ukumkani u‐Davide wazenza ngcwele kuyehova, kunye nesilivere negolide abezenze ngcwele zivela kuzo zonke intlanga ezibe zoyisiwe nguye:" 
2Samuel8:12 kuwo ama‐Siriya, nakuwo ama‐Mowabi, nakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, nakuwo ama‐Filistiya, nakuwo ama‐Amaleki, nakuwo amaxoba ka‐Hadadezere, unyana ka‐Rehobi, ukumkani we‐Tsoba." 
2Samuel8:13 Wandula u‐Davide wazenzela igama, akubuya ekuwabulaleni ama‐Siriya emhlanjeni we‐Tyuwa, amawaka alishumi elinesibozo." 
2Samuel8:14 Waza wazibeka ilali e‐Edome; kuyo yonke i‐Edome wazibeka ilali; ada onke ama‐Edome aba ngabakonzi ku‐Davide. Kwa njalo uyehova wamnceda u‐Davide apo kusukuba ebesiya kona. 
2Samuel8:15 Waye u‐Davide wapata ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke; kanjako u‐Davide wenzela bonke abantu bake ubugwebo nobulungisa. 
2Samuel8:16 Kekaloku u‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya wabepezu kwomkosi; no‐Yehoshafate unyana ka‐Ahilude ebengumkumbuzi: 
2Samuel8:17 kanjako u‐Tsadoki unyana ka‐Ahitube, no‐Ahimeleki unyana ka‐Abiyatare, bebengabaperisite; no‐Seraya ebengumba̔li;" 
2Samuel8:18 no‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada wabepezu kwaba‐Kereti naba‐Peleti; nonyana baka‐Davide bebengamanene. 
2Samuel9:1 WAYESITI u‐Davide: Kuseko na oseleyo kwindlu ka‐Saule, ukuze ndimenzele ububele ngenxa ka‐Jonatane?" 
2Samuel9:2 Kwabekuko isicaka sendlu ka‐Saule, esigama belingu‐Tsiba; baza bambiza eze ku‐Davide. Wandula ukumkani wati kuye: Wena ungu‐Tsiba na? Wayesiti: Isicaka sako singuye." 
2Samuel9:3 Waza ukumkani wati: Akuseko na umntu wendlu ka‐Saule, ukuba ndimenzele ububele bukatixo? Wati u‐Tsiba kukumkani: Kuseko unyana ka‐Jonatane, oqwalelayo ngenyawo." 
2Samuel9:4 Waza ukumkani wati kuye: Upina yena? Wati u‐Tsiba kukumkani: Bona ke, usendlwini ka‐Makire, unyana ka Hamiyeli, e‐Lo‐debare." 
2Samuel9:5 Wandula watuma ukumkani u‐Davide, wamtabata endlwini ka‐Makire, unyana ka‐Hamiyeli, e‐Lo‐debare." 
2Samuel9:6 Wati akufika u‐Mefiboshete, unyana ka‐Jonatane, unyana ka‐Saule, ku‐Davide, wandula wawa ebusweni bake, waziqubuda. Wayesiti u‐Davide: Mefiboshete! Wati yena: Nasi isicaka sako!" 
2Samuel9:7 Waza u‐Davide wati kuye: Ungoyiki; ngokuba ndiya kukwenzela ububele ngenyaniso, ngenxa ka‐Jonatane uyihlo, ndibuyisele kuwe onke amasimi ka‐Saule uyihlo; nawe uya kumana ukudla isonka ngasetafileni yam." 
2Samuel9:8 Wasuka wazitoba, wati: Isicaka sako siyinto nina, ukuba ubeke kuyo inja efileyo enjengam?" 
2Samuel9:9 Wandula ukumkani wambiza u‐Tsiba, isicaka sika‐Saule, wati kuye: Konke okube kukokuka‐Saule, nokwayo yonke indlu yake, ndikunikile kunyana wenkosi yako." 
2Samuel9:10 Ngako uya kumlimela umhlaba, wena nonyana bako, nezicaka zako, ungenise iziqa̔mo, ukuze unyana wenkosi yako abe nesonka, ukuba adle; kodwa u‐Mefiboshete, unyana wenkosi yako, womana ukudla isonka ngasetafileni yam. Kekaloku u‐Tsiba ebenonyana balishumi elinabahlanu, nezicaka zamashumi mabini." 
2Samuel9:11 Waza u‐Tsiba wati kukumkani: Njengako konke inkosi yam ukumkani isiyalele isicaka sayo, siya kwenje njalo isicaka sako. Kanjalo u‐Mefiboshete, watsho ukumkani, esidla ngasetafileni yam, woba njengomnye wonyana bokumkani." 
2Samuel9:12 Waye u‐Mefiboshete enonyana omncinane, ogama belingu‐Mika. Kanjako bonke ababehlala endlwini ka‐Tsiba, bebezizicaka kuye u‐Mefiboshete." 
2Samuel9:13 Kwa njalo u‐Mefiboshete wahlala e‐Yerusaleme; ngokuba ebemana ukudla ngasetafileni yokumkani: wayesisiqwala ngenyawo zake zombini. 
2Samuel10:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwoku, ukuba ukumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni wabuba; waza u‐Hanune unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Samuel10:2 Wandula u‐Davide wati: Ndiya kwenza ububele ku‐Hanune unyana ka‐Nahashe, njengokuba uyise ebebenza ububele kum. Waza u‐Davide watuma ngesandla sezicaka zake ukumku̔za ngaye uyise. Zada izicaka zika‐Davide zafika ezweni losapo luka‐Hamoni." 
2Samuel10:3 Koko inkosana zosapo luka‐Hamoni zati ku Hanune inkosi yazo: u‐Davide uyambeka na uyihlo emehlweni ako, ngokuba ebatumele kuwe abaku̔zi? akungenxa yokuba apengulule isixeko esi, asihlole, asicite, ukuba u‐Davide uzitumile izicaka zake kuwe kusinina?" 
2Samuel10:4 Ngako u‐Hanune watabata izicaka zika‐Davide, waguya isiqingata sendevu zazo, watsheca izivato zazo ngokuziqingatisa ezinyongeni zazo, wazindulula." 
2Samuel10:5 Kwati kwakuxelelwa u‐Davide, watuma ukuzikaulela; ngokuba amadoda lawo ebehlazisiwe kakulu. Wayesiti ukumkani: Hlalani e‐Jeriko, zide zikule indevu zenu, nandule nibuye." 
2Samuel10:6 Kekaloku lwakubona usapo luka‐Hamoni ukuba lunukele u‐Davide, lwandula lwatuma usapo luka‐Hamoni lwaqesha kuma‐Siriya ase‐Bete‐rehobi, nakuma‐Siriya ase‐Tsoba, amawaka angamashumi mabini abahamba ngenyawo, nakuye ukumkani we‐Mahaka iwaka lamadoda, nakuwo amadoda ase‐Tobe amawaka alishumi linamabini amadoda." 
2Samuel10:7 Wati u‐Davide akuva oku, watuma u‐Jowabi nawo wonke umkosi wamagoṙa." 
2Samuel10:8 Lwaza lwapuma usapo luka‐Hamoni, lwacwangcisela ukulwa ngasemnyango wesango; kodwa ama‐Siriya ase‐Tsoba nawase‐Rehobi, namadoda ase‐Tobe nawase‐Mahaka, ebewodwa ngasendle." 
2Samuel10:9 Wati u‐Jowabi, akubona ukuba ubuso bokulwa bungakuye, ngapambili nangasemva, wanyula abantu kubo bonke abanyuliweyo bakwa‐Sirayeli, wabacwangcisa ngakuwo ama‐Siriya:" 
2Samuel10:10 nesisalela sabantu wabanikela esandleni sika‐Abishai umninawe wake, owabacwangcisa ngakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni." 
2Samuel10:11 Wayesiti: Ukuba ama‐Siriya anamandla pezu kwam, woza ukunceda mna; kodwa ukuba usapo luka‐Hamoni lunamandla pezu kwako, ndoya ukunceda wena." 
2Samuel10:12 Yomelela, sizomelezele abantu betu nezixeko zotixo wetu; noyehova makenze okulungileyo emehlweni ake." 
2Samuel10:13 Waza wasondela u‐Jowabi, nabantu ababenaye, kuze kuliwe ngakuwo ama‐Siriya; ada esaba pambi kwake." 
2Samuel10:14 Lwati lwakubona usapo luka‐Hamoni ukuba ama‐Siriya esabile, lwandula lwesaba nalo pambi kwo‐Abishai, lwangena esixekweni. Waza u‐Jowabi wabuya kulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, waya e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Samuel10:15 Xeshekweni ama‐Siriya abebona ukuba oyisiwe pambi kwama‐Sirayeli, andula azihlanganisa ndawonye." 
2Samuel10:16 Waza watuma u‐Hadarezere, wapumisa ama‐Siriya abepesheya kwomlambo; asuka eza e‐Helame; wati u‐Shovaki, inkosi yempi ka‐Hadarezere, waya pambi kwawo." 
2Samuel10:17 Kwati kwakuxelelwa u‐Davide, wahlanganisa onke ama‐Sirayeli, wawela i‐Yoredane, weza e‐Helame. Aza ama‐Siriya azicwangcisa ngakuye u‐Davide, alwa naye." 
2Samuel10:18 Kodwa ama‐Siriya esaba pambi kwama‐Sirayeli; waza u‐Davide wabulala kuwo ama‐Siriya amadoda enqwelwana ezingamakulu asixe̔nxe, nabakweli bamahashe abangamawaka angamashumi mane; wambeta no‐Shovaki, inkosi yempi yawo, owafa kona." 
2Samuel10:19 Bati bakubona bonke okumkani abazizicaka zika‐Hadarezere, ukuba boyisiwe pambi kwama‐Sirayeli, bandula benza uxolo nama‐Sirayeli, bawakonza. Ngako ama‐Siriya ebesoyika ukulunceda kanjako usapo laka‐Hamoni." 
2Samuel11:1 KWABEKUTE ekutwaseni kwomnyaka, ngexesha lokupuma kwabo okumkani, wandula u‐Davide watuma u‐Jowabi, nezicaka zake kunye naye, nawo onke ama‐Sirayeli, ukuya kutshabalalisa usapo luka‐Hamoni, nokuvingcela i‐Raba. Kodwa u‐Davide wasala e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Samuel11:2 Kwaza kwati ngexesha lokuhlwa, wesuka u‐Davide emandlalweni wake, wahamba pezu kwesifulelwa sendlu yokumkani; wati esesifulelweni wabona umfazi ezihlamba: kekaloku umfazi lowo ebemhle kakulu ukubonakala kwake." 
2Samuel11:3 Waza watuma u‐Davide, wabuza ngalomfazi. Kwaye kusitwa: Lo asi nguye na u‐Batesheba, intombi ka‐Elihame, umfazi ka‐Huriya um‐Hete?" 
2Samuel11:4 Wandula u‐Davide watuma izigidimi, wamtabata; wati akungena kuye, walala naye; ngokuba ebezihlambulule ekunco̔leni kwake: wada wabuyela endlwini yake." 
2Samuel11:5 Waza wakaula umfazi lowo, watuma wamxelela u‐Davide, wati: Mna ndikaulile." 
2Samuel11:6 Wandula u‐Davide watuma ku‐Jowabi, esiti: Tuma kum u‐Huriya um‐Hete. Waza u‐Jowabi wamtuma u‐Huriya ku‐Davide." 
2Samuel11:7 Wati akutika u‐Huriya kuye, wabuza u‐Davide ngokupila kuka‐Jowabi, nangokupila kwabantu, nangokuhambiseka kwokulwa." 
2Samuel11:8 Waza wati u‐Davide ku‐Huriya: Yihla uye endlwini yako, uhlambe inyawo zako. Kwati kwakupuma u‐Huriya endlwini yokumkani, kwapuma emva kwake isabelwa sokutya kukumkani." 
2Samuel11:9 Kodwa u‐Huriya walala ngasemnyango wendlu yokumkani, ndawonye nazo zonke izicaka zenkosi yake; akehlela endlwini yake." 
2Samuel11:10 Kwati kwakuxelwa ku‐Davide, kusitwa: u‐Huriya akehlelanga endlwini yake; wati u‐Davide ku‐Huriya: Ubungaveli ekuhambeni na? yinina ukuba akuhlelanga endlwini yako?" 
2Samuel11:11 Wayesiti u‐Huriya ku‐Davide: Ityeya, no‐Sirayeli, no‐Juda, bahleli ezintenteni; kanjalo inkosi yam u‐Jowabi, nezicaka zenkosi yam, zite waca ezindle; kanene mna ndiya kungena endlwini yam na, ndidle, ndisele, ndilale nomfazi wam? Njengokuba uhleli wena, na njengokuba uhleli umpefumlo wako, andiyi kuyenza lento." 
2Samuel11:12 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Huriya: Hlala apa nanamhla, ndandiya kukundulula ngomso. Kwa njalo wahlala u‐Huriya e‐Yerusaleme ngomhla lowo, nangomhla olandelayo." 
2Samuel11:13 Wati akuba u‐Davide ebemmemile, wadla ebusweni bake, wasela nokusela; wada wamnxilisa: waza wapuma ngokuhlwa ukuya kulala emandlalweni wake ndawonye nezicaka zenkosi yake; kodwa akehlela endlwini yake." 
2Samuel11:14 Kwaye kute kusasa, waba̔la u‐Davide incwadi ku‐Jowabi, wayituma ngesandla sika‐Huriya." 
2Samuel11:15 Waba̔la encwadini leyo, esiti: Beka u‐Huriya ngasebusweni bokulwa okunamandla, nize nibuye emva kwake, ukuba abetwe, afe nokufa." 
2Samuel11:16 Kwabekute, xeshekweni u‐Jowabi abegqalile isixeko, wammisa u‐Huriya kulondawo apo abesazi ukuba amadoda obuṙoti akona." 
2Samuel11:17 Asuka apuma amadoda esixeko, alwa no‐Jowabi; kwaza kwawa inxenye yabantu ezicakeni zika‐Davide; wafa u‐Huriya um‐Hete naye." 
2Samuel11:18 Wandula watuma u‐Jowabi, washumayela ku‐Davide zonke indawo zokulwa;" 
2Samuel11:19 wayalela isigidimi ngokuti: Nxa ugqibile ukuteta zonke indawo zokulwa kuye ukumkani," 
2Samuel11:20 kwoti ke, ukuba umsindo wokumkani uya kuvuka, aze ati kuwe: Yinina ukuba nasondela esixekweni ukulwa? anazi na ukuba baya kutola beseludongeni?" 
2Samuel11:21 ngubanina owambeta u‐Abimeleki unyana ka‐Yerubeshete? ebengengumfazi na owaposa pezu kwake ilitye lapezulu lokusila kwa seludongeni, wada wafa e‐Tebetse? bekunganina ukuba nasondela kulo udonga? wandule uti: Kanjako isicaka sako, u‐Huriya um‐Hete, sifile." 
2Samuel11:22 Sahamba ke isigidimi eso, seza samshumayeza u‐Davide konke u‐Jowabi abesitumile ngako." 
2Samuel11:23 Saye sisiti isigidimi ku‐Davide: Ngenyaniso amadoda lawo ebenamandla pezu kwetu, apumela kuti ezindle; saye sipezu kwawo kwada kwasemnyango wesango:" 
2Samuel11:24 bati abatoli batola ngakuzo izicaka zako beseludongeni; yaza yafa inxenye yezicaka zokumkani; kanjako isicaka sako, u‐Huriya um‐Hete, sifile naso." 
2Samuel11:25 Wandula u‐Davide wati kuso isigidimi: Uya kutsho ku‐Jowabi ukuti: Lendawo maingabi ikohlakele emehlweni ako, ngokuba iṙele lisidla naló kwa njengalowo; yomeleza ukulwa kwako ngakuso isixeko, usicite: uti wena umomeleze." 
2Samuel11:26 Wati akuva umfazi ka‐Huriya ukuba u‐Huriya, indoda yake, ufile, wandula wayililela inkosi yake." 
2Samuel11:27 Naxeshekweni isililo sidlulileyo, watuma u‐Davide, wamamkela endlwini yake; waza waba ngumfazi wake, wamzalela unyana. Kodwa lendawo, abeyenzile u‐Davide, ibikohlakele emehlweni kayehova." 
2Samuel12:1 Wandula uyehova wamtuma u‐Natane ku‐Davide. Waza wangena kuye, wati kuye: Kwabekuko amadoda amabini esixekweni sinye, enye ibisisityebi, enye ibilihlwempu." 
2Samuel12:2 Esisityebi ibinegusha nenkomo, into eninzi kakulu:" 
2Samuel12:3 kodwa elihlwempu ibingenanto, kupela yanetakanekazi legusha linye elincinane, ebilitengile, nebilipilisile, lada laba likulu kuyo nakubo abantwana bayo kunye; ladla kumtamo wayo, lasela kwindebe yayo, lalala esifubeni sayo, laba njengentombi kuyo." 
2Samuel12:4 Kwaza kwafika umhambi kuyo indoda esisityebi, eyayeka ukutabata kwigusha zayo nakwinkomo zayo, ukuba ipekele umhambi obefikile kuyo, kodwa yatabata itakanekazi lendoda elihlwempu, yalipekela indoda ebifikile kuyo." 
2Samuel12:5 Yaza yavuta ingqumbo ka‐Davide ngakuyo indoda leyo kakulu; wayesiti ku‐Natane: Ehleli nje uyehova, indoda eyenzileyo lento imelwe kukufa!" 
2Samuel12:6 netakanekazi elo yolibuyekeza ngokukane, ngenxa yokuba iyenzile lento, nangenxa yokuba ibingenanceba." 
2Samuel12:7 Wandula u‐Natane wati ku‐Davide: Nguwe indoda leyo. Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ndikutambisile ube ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, ndakuhlangula esandleni sika‐Saule;" 
2Samuel12:8 kanjalo ndikunikile indlu yenkosi yako, nabafazi benkosi yako esifubeni sako; ewe ndikunikile indlu ka‐Sirayeli neka‐Juda; nokuba kube kuncinane oko, ngendizongezelele kuwe izinto ezinjengezi nezinjengeziya." 
2Samuel12:9 Yinina ukuba udelile ilizwi likayehova, ngokwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni ake? u‐Huriya um‐Hete umbetile ngeṙele, nomfazi wake umtabatile abe ngumfazi wako; ewe yena umbulele ngeṙele losapo luka‐Hamoni." 
2Samuel12:10 Ngako kaloku, iṙele aliyi kupambuka endlwini yako kude kube ngunapakade; ngenxa yokuba undidelile mna, nokuba umtabatile umfazi ka‐Huriya um‐Hete abe ngumfazi wako." 
2Samuel12:11 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuvusa ngakuwe ububi buvela endlwini yako, ndandiya kutabata abafazi bako pambi kwamehlo ako, ndibanike kummelwane wako, oya kulala nabafazi bako pambi kwamehlo elanga eli." 
2Samuel12:12 Ngokuba wena ubusenza oko ngasese; kodwa mna ndiya kuyenza lento pambi kwabo bonke o‐Sirayeli, napambi kwelanga." 
2Samuel12:13 Wandula u‐Davide wati ku‐Natane: Ndonile ngakuye uyehova. Waza u‐Natane wati ku‐Davide: Kanjako uyehova ususile isono sako; akuyi kufa. 
2Samuel12:14 Kodwa, ngenxa yokuba uzenzile intshaba zikayehova zigxeke kakulu ngalento, kanjalo unyana ozelweyo kuwe uya kufa ngenyaniso." 
2Samuel12:15 Wemka u‐Natane waya endlwini yake. Waza uyehova wambeta umntwana obezalelwe u‐Davide ngumfazi ka‐Huriya, ukuba wabesifa kakulu." 
2Samuel12:16 Ngako u‐Davide wamfuna utixo ngenxa yomntwana lowo; waza u‐Davide wenza inzilo, wangena, walala ubusuku bonke emhlabeni." 
2Samuel12:17 Bandula besuka abadala bendlu yake, baya kuye, ukuze bamsukise emhlabeni; kodwa ebengavumi, ebengadli isonka nabo kanjako." 
2Samuel12:18 Kwaye kute ngomhla wesixe̔nxe ukuba umntwana wabuba. Zaza izicaka zika‐Davide zoyika ukumxelela ukuba umntwana ufile; ngokuba bezisiti: Bona ke, nxa umntwana asahleli, sateta naye, kodwa ebengapulapuli ilizwi letu; soti nina ke ukuti kuye: Umntwana ufile? ngokuba eya kuzenzakalisa." 
2Samuel12:19 Kodwa akubona u‐Davide ukuba izicaka zake bezisebezelana, wandula u‐Davide waqonda ukuba umntwana ufile; ngako u‐Davide wati kuzo izicaka zake: Ufile na umntwana? Zati: Ufile." 
2Samuel12:20 Waza u‐Davide wesuka emhlabeni, wazihlamba, wazitambisa, waguqula izivato zake, wangena endlwini kayehova, wabedesha: wandula wangena endlwini yake; wati akucela, wabekelwa isonka, wadla ke." 
2Samuel12:21 Zaza izicaka zake zati kuye: Yinina lento oyenzileyo? ngenxa yomntwana ehleli nje ubuzila ukutya, walila nokulila; kodwa akuba umntwana efile, ubusuka wadla isonka." 
2Samuel12:22 Wayesiti: Nxa umntwana asahleli, ndazila ukutya, ndalila nokulila, ngokuba ndibe ndisiti: Ngubanina owaziyo? angati uyehova abe nofefe kum, ukuba umntwana apile." 
2Samuel12:23 Kodwa ngoku efile nje, sendiya kuzilela nina? ndingaba nokumbuyisa kanjako na? ndiya kuya kuye, kodwa yena akayi kubuyela kum." 
2Samuel12:24 Wandula u‐Davide wamtutuzela u‐Batesheba umfazi wake, wangena kuye, walala naye; wazala unyana ke; waza wabiza igama lake ngo‐Solomone: wati uyehova wamtanda;" 
2Samuel12:25 watuma ngesandla sika‐Natane umprofite, owabiza igama lake ngo‐Yedidiya, ngenxa kayehova." 
2Samuel12:26 Kekaloku u‐Jowabi walwa ngakuyo i‐Raba yosapo luka‐Hamoni, wasitimba isixeko sobukumkani." 
2Samuel12:27 Waza u‐Jowabi watuma izigidimi ku‐Davide, wati: Ndilwile ngakuyo i‐Raba, kanjako ndisitimbile isixeko samanzi:" 
2Samuel12:28 ngako kaloku, hlanganisa isisalela sabantu, usiṙaule isixeko, usitimbe; hleze ndiya kusitimba isixeko mna, lize igama lam libizwe pezu kwaso." 
2Samuel12:29 Wandula u‐Davide wahlanganisa bonke abantu, waya e‐Raba, walwa ngakuyo, wayitimba." 
2Samuel12:30 Wayesusa isitsaba sokumkani walo entlokweni yake, esibe siyitalente yegolide ukuba nzima kwaso, sinamatye anqabileyo; saye si bekwa pezu kwentloko ka‐Davide: namaxoba esixeko wawapumisa ngento eninzi kakulu:" 
2Samuel12:31 nabantu ababekuso wabapumisa, wababeka pantsi kwesaṙa, napantsi kwezibulo zesincete, napantsi kwezixenxe zesincete, wabadlulisa endaweni yokugqwagqwa izitene: wenje njalo ke kuzo zonke izixeko zosapo luka‐Hamoni. Waza u‐Davide wabuyela e‐Yerusaleme, nabo bonke abantu." 
2Samuel13:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwoku, ukuba u‐Abasalome unyana ka‐Davide ebenodade eyinzwakazi, ogama belingu‐Tamare; waye u‐Amnone unyana ka‐Davide wamtanda." 
2Samuel13:2 Kwaza kwabuhlungu ku‐Amnone kangaka, wada wazenzela isifo ngenxa ka‐Tamare udade wake; ngokuba ebeyintombi ipela; ngako bekunqabile emehlweni ka‐Amnone ukwenza into kuye." 
2Samuel13:3 Kodwa u‐Amnone ebenomhlobo, ogama belingu‐Yonadabi, unyana ka‐Shimeha umzalwana ka‐Davide; kanjalo u‐Yonadabi ebeyindoda elumkileyo kakulu." 
2Samuel13:4 Wayesiti kuye: Yinina ukuba wena, ungunyana wokumkani nje, unqinile kangaka ngemiso ngemiso? akuyi kundixelela na? Wandula u‐Amnone wati kuye: Ndiyamtanda u‐Tamare, udade ka‐Abasalome umzalwana wam." 
2Samuel13:5 Waza u‐Yonadabi wati kuye: Lala pezu kwomandlalo wako, uzenzise uyafa; nanxa uyihlo aya kuza ukuba akubone, yiti kuye: Makeze ke u‐Tamare udade wam, andidlise isonka, alungise ukutya pambi kwamehlo am, ukuze ndibonele, ndidle kwa sesandleni sake." 
2Samuel13:6 Walala ke u‐Amnone, wazenzisa uyafa: kekaloku akuba ukumkani ebeze ukumbona, wati u‐Amnone kukumkani: Makeze ke u‐Tamare udade wam, enze izonkana zibe zibini pambi kwamehlo am, ndize ndidle kwa sesandleni sake." 
2Samuel13:7 Wandula u‐Davide watumela ku‐Tamare endlwini, esiti: Kauhambe ke uye endlwini ka‐Amnone umzalwana wako, uze umlungisele ukutya." 
2Samuel13:8 Wahamba u‐Tamare waya endlwini ka‐Amnone umzalwana wake: waye yena elele. Waza watabata intlama, wayibuca, wenza izonkana pambi kwamehlo ake, wazoja izonkana ezo kanjalo." 
2Samuel13:9 Waza watabata ukamba, wagalela pambi kwake; kodwa wala ukudla. Wayesiti u‐Amnone: Pumisani onke amadoda kum; aza onke amadoda apuma kuye." 
2Samuel13:10 Wandula u‐Amnone wati ku‐Tamare: Zisa ukutya enkambilini apa, ndidle kwa sesandleni sako. Waza u‐Tamare watabata izonkana abezenzile, weza nazo ku‐Amnone umzalwana wake enkambilini." 
2Samuel13:11 Kekaloku akuzisondeza kuye ukuba adle, wambamba, wati kuye: Yiza, lala nam, dade wam!" 
2Samuel13:12 Koko wati kuye: Hai, mzalwana wam! ungandidlwenguli; ngokuba kunge kungenziwa okunjalo kwa‐Sirayeli: zungenzi lento ehlazekileyo:" 
2Samuel13:13 ngokuba mna, ndiya kuya ngapina nehlazo lam? nawe, uya kuba njengelinye lamabedengu kwa‐Sirayeli: ngako kaloku, kautete nokumkani; ngokuba engayi kundibamba kuwe." 
2Samuel13:14 Kodwa akavuma ukupulapula ilizwi lake; wati, enamandla pezu kwake nje, wamdlwengula, walala naye." 
2Samuel13:15 Wandula u‐Amnone wamtiya ngentiyo enkulu kakulu; ngokuba intiyo abemtiya ngayo, ibinkulu pezu kwotando abemtandile ngalo. Wati u‐Amnone kuye: Suka, umke." 
2Samuel13:16 Wayesiti kuye: Akuko ndawo; lenkohlakalo yokundindulula inkulu pezu kwenye ubuyenza kum. Kodwa akavuma ukumpulapula. 
2Samuel13:17 Waza wabiza isicaka sake esimkonzayo, wati: Ku̔pani ke lo kum aye pandle, utshixe ucango emva kwake." 
2Samuel13:18 Kekaloku ingubo yamabala ngamabala ibipezu kwake: ngokuba intombi zokumkani, ezibe zizintombi zipela, bezivatiswa ngengubo ezinjalo. Waza umkonzi wake wampumisela pandle, watshixa ucango emva kwake." 
2Samuel13:19 Wandula u‐Tamare wabeka ututu pezu kwentloko yake, waṙazula ingubo yamabala ngamabala ebipezu kwake, wabeka isandla sake pezu kwentloko yake, wahamba wamana ekala." 
2Samuel13:20 Waza wati u‐Abasalome umzalwana wake kuye: u‐Amnone, umzalwana wako, wabeko nawe na? kodwa kaloku, dade wam! yiti cwaka, engumzalwana wako nje; ungabeki intliziyo yako kulento. Waye u‐Tamare wahlala eyedwa endlwini ka‐Abasalome umzalwana wake." 
2Samuel13:21 Wati akuva ukumkani u‐Davide zonke ezizinto, waqumba kakulu." 
2Samuel13:22 Kodwa u‐Abasalome ebengateti no‐Amnone, kwa nokukohlakeleyo nokulungileyo; ngokuba u‐Abasalome ebemtiya u‐Amnone, ngendawo yokuba ebedlwengule u‐Tamare udade wake." 
2Samuel13:23 Kwaye kute emva kweminyaka mibini, ukuba u‐Abasalome wabenabacebi e‐Bali‐hatsore, engakwa‐Frayime; wandula u‐Abasalome wamema bonke onyana bokumkani." 
2Samuel13:24 Kanjalo u‐Abasalome weza kukumkani, wati: Bona ke, isicaka sako sinabacebi; makaye ke ukumkani nezicaka zake kunye nesicaka sako." 
2Samuel13:25 Kodwa ukumkani wati ku‐Abasalome: Hai, nyana wam! masingayi ke tina sonke, ukuze singabi nzima pezu kwako. Waza wamqu̔ba; koko ebengavumi ukuya, kodwa wamtamsanqela." 
2Samuel13:26 Wandula u‐Abasalome wati: Ukuba akungebe njalo, makaye ke nati u‐Amnone umzalwana wam. Waza ukumkani wati kuye: Kunganina ukuba aye nawe?" 
2Samuel13:27 Kodwa u‐Abasalome wamqu̔ba, wada watuma naye u‐Amnone nabo bonke onyana bokumkani." 
2Samuel13:28 Kekaloku u‐Abasalome wayalela izicaka zake, esiti: Gqalani ke nxa intliziyo ka‐Amnone icwayitile ngeveyine, nanxa nditi kuni: Mbeteni u‐Amnone; nandule nimfise, ningoyiki; asi ndim na oniyaleleyo? yomelelani, nibe ngamadoda obuṙoti." 
2Samuel13:29 Zaza izicaka zika‐Abasalome zenza kuye u‐Amnone, njengokuba u‐Abasalome ebeziyalele. Bandula besuka bonke onyana bokumkani, bakwela abanye ngabanye pezu kwamaqwaṙaṙa abo, babaleka." 
2Samuel13:30 Kwaye kute, nxa basendleleni, zafika indaba ku‐Davide zokuti: u‐Abasalome ubabulele bonke onyana bokumkani, akuko namnye kubo oseleyo." 
2Samuel13:31 Waselesuka ukumkani, waṙazula izivato zake, walala emhlabeni; kanjalo zonke izicaka zake zema kona zinengubo eziṙazukileyo." 
2Samuel13:32 Waza u‐Yonadabi, unyana ka‐Shimeha umzalwana ka‐Davide, wapendula wati: Maingati inkosi yam kufisiwe onke amadodana, onyana bokumkani; ngokuba u‐Amnone yedwa efile: ngokuba ngelizwi lika‐Abasalome kumiselwe oku, kuselokwalomhla wamdlwengulayo u‐Tamare udade wake." 
2Samuel13:33 Ngako kaloku, inkosi yam ukumkani maingabekeli lento intliziyo yayo, ukuti bonke onyana bokumkani bafile; ngu‐Amnone yedwa ofileyo." 
2Samuel13:34 Kodwa u‐Abasalome wesaba. Yati indodana ebingumlindi yapakamisa amehlo ayo, yakangela, kekaloku naba abantu abaninzi besiza endleleni emva kwayo ngasecaleni lentaba." 
2Samuel13:35 Waza u‐Yonadabi wati kukumkani: Naba onyana bokumkani besiza; njengalo ilizwi lesicaka sako, kwenziwe njalo ke." 
2Samuel13:36 Kwabekute, akuba egqibile ukuteta, bona ke, onyana bokumkani bafika, bapakamisa ilizwi labo, balila; kanjalo nokumkani, nazo zonke izicaka zake, balila ngokulila okukulu kunene." 
2Samuel13:37 Kodwa u‐Abasalome wesaba, waya ku‐Talemai, unyana ka‐Hamihude, ukumkani we‐Geshure. Wati u‐Davide walilela unyana wake imihla yonke." 
2Samuel13:38 Kwa njalo u‐Abasalome wesaba, waya e‐Geshure, wayekona iminyaka yamitatu." 
2Samuel13:39 Waza umpefumlo ka‐Davide ukumkani wagqibela ukupuma ngakuye u‐Abasalome; ngokuba ebetutuzelekile ngaye u‐Amnone, ngokuba ebefile." 
2Samuel14:1 XESHEKWENI u‐Jowabi, unyana ka‐Tseruya, ebesazi ukuba intliziyo yokumkani ibingaku‐Abasalome," 
2Samuel14:2 wandula u‐Jowabi watumela e‐Tekoha, watabata kona umfazi olumkileyo, wati kuye: Kauzenze olilayo, wambate ke izivato zokulilela, ungazitambisi ngeoli, ube njengomfazi olilele ofileyo imihla esel’ imininzi;" 
2Samuel14:3 uze kukumkani, utete kuye njengalendawo. Waza u‐Jowabi wabeka amazwi emlonyeni wake." 
2Samuel14:4 Wati akuteta um‐Tekohakazi lowo kukumkani, wawa ebusweni bake ngasemhlabeni, waziqubuda, wati: Nceda, kumkani!" 
2Samuel14:5 Waza ukumkani wati kuye: Unanina? Wayesiti: Okunene ndingumhlolokazi mna, nendoda yam ifile." 
2Samuel14:6 Sasibe isicakakazi sako sinonyana ababini, baye bona bengxolisana bobabini ngasendle, kwakungeko owabahlukisa, kodwa omnye wabeta omnye, wambulala." 
2Samuel14:7 Kekaloku bona ke, sonke isizalwane sivukele ngakuso isicakakazi sako, sati: Nikela lo owabeta umzalwana wake, ukuba simfise ngenxa yobomi bomzalwana wake ambuleleyo, size sibubise indlalifa nayo: kwa njalo baya kucima ilahle lam eliseleyo, bangayishiyeli indoda yam negama nesisalela pezu kwomhlaba." 
2Samuel14:8 Wayesiti ukumkani kulomfazi: Yiya endlwini yako, ndandiya kuyalela ngawe." 
2Samuel14:9 Waza um‐Tekohakazi lowo wati kukumkani: Ityala malibe pezu kwam, nkosi yam, kumkani! napezu kwendlu kabawo; kodwa ukumkani makabe msulwa, neterone yake." 
2Samuel14:10 Wayesiti ukumkani: Osukuba eteta ngakuwe, mzise kum, waengayi kubuya akucukumise kanjako." 
2Samuel14:11 Wandula wati: Makake ukumkani amkumbule uyehova, utixo wako, ukuze abapindezeli begazi bangandisi ukutshabalalisa, baze bangabubisi unyana wam. Wayesiti: Ehleli nje uyehova, akuyi kuwa nalunye unwele lwonyana wako ngasemhlabeni." 
2Samuel14:12 Waza wati umfazi lowo: Makesitete ilizwi isicakakazi sako kuyo inkosi yam ukumkani. Wayesiti: Teta. 
2Samuel14:13 Waza wati umfazi lowo: Kunganina ke ukuba ucingile okunjalo ngakubo abantu bakatixo? ngokuba ukumkani eteta lendawo njengonetyala, ekubeni ukumkani engabuyisi igxotwa lake." 
2Samuel14:14 Ngokuba siya kufa ngenyaniso, sibe njengamanzi apaleleyo emhlabeni, angenakubutwa: kodwa utixo akasusi ubomi, uyaqinga amaqinga okuba angamgxoti kuye ogxotiweyo." 
2Samuel14:15 Ngako kaloku, ukuba ndize ukuteta kuye ukumkani inkosi yam lendawo, kungokuba abantu bendoyikisile; saza sati isicakakazi sako: Ndoka nditete kukumkani; angaba ukumkani uya kwenza ilizwi lesicakakazi sake."
