2Samuel14:16 Ngokuba ukumkani eya kuva, ukuba asindise isicakakazi sake esandleni sendoda efuna ukutshabalalisa mna nonyana wam kwa kunye elifeni likatixo." 
2Samuel14:17 Sati kanjalo isicakakazi sako: Ilizwi lenkosi yam ukumkani loba lelokwonwabisa ke; ngokuba njengengelosi katixo, injalo inkosi yam ukumkani, ukuqonda okulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo; ngako uyehova, utixo wako, woba nawe." 
2Samuel14:18 Wandula wapendula ukumkani wati kulomfazi: Ungandifihleli ke into endiya kukubuza yona. Wayesiti umfazi: Mayitete ke inkosi yam ukumkani. 
2Samuel14:19 Waza ukumkani wati: Isandla sika‐Jowabi asi nawe na kuko konke oku? Wapendula umfazi wati: Bomi bompefumlo wako, nkosi yam, kumkani! akuko ongashenxa nangasekunene nangasekohlo kuko konke okutetiweyo yinkosi yam ukumkani; ngokuba isicaka sako u‐Jowabi singuye ondiyaleleyo, nowabeka onke lamazwi emlonyeni wesicakakazi sako:" 
2Samuel14:20 ukuze kuguqulwe isimilo senteto, isicaka sako u‐Jowabi senzile lento; kodwa inkosi yam ilumkile ngabo ubulumko bengelosi katixo, ukwazi konke okusemhlabeni." 
2Samuel14:21 Wandula ukumkani wati ku‐Jowabi: Bona ke, ndiyenzile lento; hamba ke, buyisa indodana leyo, u‐Abasalome." 
2Samuel14:22 Waza u‐Jowabi wawa ngobuso bake ngasemhlabeni, wazitoba, wambulela ukumkani; wayesiti u‐Jowabi: Namhla isicaka sako siyazi ukuba ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, nkosi yam, kumkani! ngokokuba ukumkani enzile ilizwi lesicaka sake." 
2Samuel14:23 Waselesuka u‐Jowabi, waya e‐Geshure, wamzisa u‐Abasalome e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Samuel14:24 Wayesiti ukumkani: Makajikele endlwini yake, angaboni ubuso bam. Kwa njalo u‐Abasalome wajikela endlwini yake, nobuso bokumkani akabubona." 
2Samuel14:25 Kekaloku bekungeko indoda eyinzwana njengo‐Abasalome pakati kwabo bonke o‐Sirayeli ukudunyiswa kakulu kangaka; kwa kuwo umzantsi wonyawo lwake kude kwaselukakayini lwake, bekungeko bala kuye." 
2Samuel14:26 Naxeshekweni wagugulayo intloko yake, (kwakusekupeleni kweminyaka ngeminyaka ukuba wayigugula; ngokuba ibinzima pezu kwake, ngako wayigugula,) walinganisa inwele zentloko yake ngamakulu mabini eshekele ngesilinganiso sokumkani." 
2Samuel14:27 Kwaye kumzalelwe u‐Abasalome onyana abatatu, nentombi inye, egama belingu‐Tamare; yena ebeyinzwakazi ukubonakala kwake." 
2Samuel14:28 Kekaloku u‐Abasalome wahlala e‐Yerusaleme iminyaka yamibini, engabonanga ubuso bokumkani." 
2Samuel14:29 Waza u‐Abasalome watumela u‐Jowabi, ukuba amtume kukumkani; kodwa ebengavumi ukuza kuye: wabuya watuma nangokwesibini, kodwa ebengavumi ukuza." 
2Samuel14:30 Ngako wati kuzo izicaka zake: Kangelani, intsimi ka‐Jowabi isecaleni leyam, kanjalo uneṙalasi kona; hambani, niyitshise ngomlilo. Zaza izicaka zika‐Abasalome zatshisa intsimi leyo ngomlilo." 
2Samuel14:31 Wandula wesuka u‐Jowabi, weza ku‐Abasalome endlwini, wati kuye: Yinina ukuba izicaka zako ziyitshisile intsimi yam ngomlilo?" 
2Samuel14:32 Wayesiti u‐Abasalome ku‐Jowabi: Bona ke, ndatumela wena, ndisiti: Yiza apa, ukuba ndikutume kukumkani, ukuti: Ndizele nina ndivela e‐Geshure? ngokuba kulungile kum ukuba bendiseko kona: ngako kaloku mandibone ubuso bokumkani; nokuba kuko ityala kum, makandifise." 
2Samuel14:33 Wandula u‐Jowabi weza kukumkani, wamxelela: waza wambiza u‐Abasalome, owangena kukumkani, wazitoba kuye ebusweni bake ngasemhlabeni pambi kwokumkani: wati ukumkani wamanga u‐Abasalome." 
2Samuel15:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwoku, ukuba u‐Abasalome wazilungisela inqwelo namahashe, namadoda angamashumi mahlanu abaleke pambi kwake." 
2Samuel15:2 Wavuka kusasa u‐Abasalome, wema ngasecaleni lendlela yesango: kwaza kwati, umntu osukuba enempikiso yokuba eze kukumkani ekugwebeni, wabiza u‐Abasalome kuye, wati: Uvela kwisipina isixeko? Wayesiti: Isicaka sako sivela kwesinye sezizwe zo‐Sirayeli." 
2Samuel15:3 Waza u‐Abasalome wati kuye: Kangela, indawo zako zilungile, zifanelekile; kodwa akuko umpulapuli kuwe evela kukumkani." 
2Samuel15:4 Wati kanjalo u‐Abasalome: Akwaba ndamiswa umgwebi elizweni, ukuba eze kum umntu osukuba enempikiso nesimangalo, ukuze ndimlungise!" 
2Samuel15:5 Kwaza kwati, akusondela umntu ukuza kutoba pambi kwake, wandula wasolula isandla sake, wambamba, wamanga." 
2Samuel15:6 Wenza ke u‐Abasalome ngendawo enjalo kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli abezayo kukumkani ekugwebeni: wada u‐Abasalome weba̔ intliziyo zamadoda akwa‐Sirayeli. 
2Samuel15:7 Kwabekute ekupeleni kweminyaka yamashumi mane, wandula u‐Abasalome wati kukumkani: Mandihambe ke, ndiye ndisifeze isibambiso sam, endibambisileyo ngaso kuyehova, e‐Hebrone:" 
2Samuel15:8 ngokuba isicaka sako besibambisa ngesibambiso, ndakuhlala e‐Geshure e‐Siriya, sisiti: Ukuba uyehova uya kundibuyisela e‐Yerusaleme ngenyaniso, ndiya kwandula ndimkonze uyehova." 
2Samuel15:9 Waza ukumkani wati kuye: Hamba ngoxolo. Wesuka ke, waya e‐Hebrone." 
2Samuel15:10 Kekaloku u‐Abasalome watuma abahloli pakati kwazo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, esiti: Xeshekweni niya kuva ilizwi lexilongo, nandul’ ukuti: u‐Abasalome ungukumkani e‐Hebrone." 
2Samuel15:11 Kwaye kumka no‐Abasalome e‐Yerusaleme amadoda angamakulu mabini, engamenyiweyo; aya ngolungelelwano lwawo, engazi luto." 
2Samuel15:12 Kanjalo u‐Abasalome watumela u‐Ahitofele um‐Gilo, umpakati ka‐Davide, avele esixekweni sake, e‐Gilo, nxa ebebingelela imibingo. Yati ingcebiswano yaba namandla; ngokuba abantu bebemana besandela u‐Abasalome." 
2Samuel15:13 Wada weza umbiki ku‐Davide, esiti: Intliziyo zamadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ziyalandela u‐Abasalome." 
2Samuel15:14 Wandula wati u‐Davide kuzo zonke izicaka zake ezibe zinaye e‐Yerusaleme: Sukani, sisabe; ngokuba kungayi kubako kuti ukusinda ebusweni buka‐Abasalome: nxamani ukumka, hleze asifumane kamsinyane, ahlise pezu kwetu ilishwa, abete isixeko ngohlangoti lweṙele." 
2Samuel15:15 Zaza izicaka zokumkani zati kukumkani: Njengako konke iya kukunyula inkosi yam ukumkani, nazi izicaka zako ukwenje njalo!" 
2Samuel15:16 Waza wapuma ukumkani, nabo bonke abendlu yake ngasezinyaweni zake: kodwa ukumkani washiya ishumi labafazi abangamashweshwe, ukuba balinde indlu." 
2Samuel15:17 Kwa njalo wapuma ukumkani, nabo bonke abantu ngasezinyaweni zake; baya bahlala e‐Bete‐meraki." 
2Samuel15:18 Zaza zonke izicaka zake zadlula ngasecaleni lake; nabo bonke aba‐Kereti, nabo bonke aba‐Peleti, nawo onke ama‐Gate, amadoda angamakulu matandatu abevele e‐Gate ngasezinyaweni zake, badlula pambi kwokumkani." 
2Samuel15:19 Wandula ukumkani wati ku‐Yitai um‐Gate: Kunganina ukuba nawe uhambe nati? buya, uhlale nokumkani; ngokuba wena ungowasemzini, nofudukileyo ukuza endaweni yako kanjako:" 
2Samuel15:20 ufikile izolo nje, sendiya kukudungudelisa na namhla ngokuhamba nati? mna kambe ndiya kuhamba apo ndingahambela kona; buya wena, ubuyise abazalwana bako: ububele nenyaniso maibe nawe." 
2Samuel15:21 Koko u‐Yitai wampendula ukumkani, wati: Njengokuba ehleli uyehova, na njengokuba ihleli inkosi yam ukumkani, endaweni apo iya kubako kona inkosi yam ukumkani, nokuba kube kukufa, nokuba kube kukudliwa kwobomi, kwa lapo siya kubako isicaka sako!" 
2Samuel15:22 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Yitai: Hamba, uwele. Wasuka wawela u‐Yitai um‐Gate, nawo onke amadoda ake, nabo bonke abantwana ababenaye." 
2Samuel15:23 Lati ilizwe lonke lalila ngelizwi elikulu, bakuwela bonke abantu: kanjalo ukumkani wawela umlanjana we‐Kidrone, baza bawela nabantu bonke, ngasendleleni yentlango." 
2Samuel15:24 Kwaye kuko, bona ke, no‐Tsadoki, nabo bonke aba‐Levi kunye naye, betwele ityeya yocebano lukatixo; bayibeka pantsi ke ityeya katixo; waza wenyuka u‐Abiyatare, bada bagqiba bonke abantu ukudlula bevela esixekweni." 
2Samuel15:25 Wayesiti ukumkani ku‐Tsadoki: Yibuyisele ityeya katixo esixekweni: ukuba ndiya kufumana ufefe emehlweni kayehova, uya kundibuyisa, andibonise yona nekaya lake;" 
2Samuel15:26 kodwa ukuba utsho ukuti: Andikoliswa nguwe; nanku mna, makenze kum njengo kuba kulungile emehlweni ake." 
2Samuel15:27 Walekela ukumkani wati ku‐Tsadoki umperisite: Wena aku ngumboni na? buyela esixekweni ngoxolo, nonyana bako bobabini kunye nawe, u‐Himahatse unyana wako, no‐Jonatane unyana ka‐Abiyatare." 
2Samuel15:28 Kangelani, ndiya kulibala ematafeni entlango, kude kuvele ilizwi kuni lokundibika." 
2Samuel15:29 Ngako u‐Tsadoki no‐Abiyatare babuyisela ityeya katixo e‐Yerusaleme, baza bahlala kona." 
2Samuel15:30 Kekaloku u‐Davide wenyuka ngeqina lentaba yeminquma, elila ekunyukeni kwake, enentloko yake igqujutelwe, wahamba ngenyawo zingenazihlangu: kanjalo bonke abantu ababenaye bagqubutela abanye ngabanye intloko zabo, benyuka, belila ekunyukeni kwabo." 
2Samuel15:31 Kwada kwaxelelwa u‐Davide, ukuti: u‐Ahitofele upakati kwabacebiswene no Abasalome. Waza wati u‐Davide: Zumatise ke icebo lika‐Ahitofele, Yehova!" 
2Samuel15:32 Kwabekute, akufika u‐Davide emmangweni, apo wambedesha kona utixo, nanku u‐Hushai um‐Areki esiza kumkaulela, enengubo yake iṙazukile, nomhlaba pezu kwentloko yake." 
2Samuel15:33 Wayesiti u‐Davide kuye: Ukuba uyadlula nam, uya kwandula ube ngumtwalo kum;" 
2Samuel15:34 kodwa ukuba uya kubuyela esixekweni, uti ku‐Abasalome: Mna ndoba sisicaka sako, kumkani! bendisisicaka soyihlo ngapambili, kodwa kaloku ndoba sisicaka sako; uya kwandula unditshitshisele icebo lika‐Ahitofele." 
2Samuel15:35 Abako na nawe kona u‐Tsadoki no‐Abiyatare abaperisite? ngako kuya kuti, zonke indawo uya kuziva zivela endlwini yokumkani, wozixela ku‐Tsadoki naku‐Abiyatare abaperisite." 
2Samuel15:36 Bako nabo kona onyana babo bobabini, u‐Himahatse oka‐Tsadoki, no‐Jonatane oka‐Abiyatare; ngezandla zabo niya kutuma kum zonke indawo eniya kuziva." 
2Samuel15:37 Waza u‐Hushai, umhlobo ka‐Davide, weza esixekweni; wati no‐Abasalome weza e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Samuel16:1 Kekaloku akuba u‐Davide egqitile kancinane emmangweni, bona ke, u‐Tsiba isicaka sika‐Mefiboshete wamkaulela, enesibini samaqwaṙashe enezidwashu, zipezu kwawo izonka ezimakulu mabini, nekulu lezipa zedreyive ezishwenyileyo, nekulu lamasimba eziqa̔mo zehlobo, nentsuba yeveyine." 
2Samuel16:2 Waza ukumkani wati ku‐Tsiba: Uti nina ngezizinto? Wayesiti u‐Tsiba: Amaqwaṙashe ngawabendlu yokumkani kukwelwe; izonka neziqa̔mo zehlobo zezokuba amadodana adle; neveyine yeyokuba abadiniweyo entlango basele. 
2Samuel16:3 Wayesiti ukumkani: Upina kodwa unyana wenkosi yako? Waza u‐Tsiba wati kukumkani: Bona ke, uhleli e‐Yerusaleme; ngokuba ebesiti: Namhla indlu ka‐Sirayeli iya kubuyisela kum ubukumkani bobawo." 
2Samuel16:4 Wandula ukumkani wati ku‐Tsiba: Bona ke, konke okukokuka‐Mefiboshete kukokwako. Wayesiti u‐Tsiba: Ndiyatoba pantsi; mandifumane ufefe emehlweni ako, nkosi yam, kumkani!" 
2Samuel16:5 Kekaloku, akuza ukumkani u‐Davide ngase‐Bahurime, bona ke, kwapuma kona indoda yakwisizalwane sendlu ka‐Saule, egama belingu‐Shimehi, unyana ka‐Gera: wapuma, eqalekisa ekupumeni kwake." 
2Samuel16:6 Wasuka wagibisela ngamatye u‐Davide, nazo zonke izicaka zokumkani u‐Davide; baye bonke abantu nawo onke amagoṙa bengasekunene kwake nangasekohlo kwake." 
2Samuel16:7 Wayesitsho u‐Shimehi ekuqalekiseni kwake ukuti: Puma, puma, ndoda yegazi, ndoda yobunginingini!" 
2Samuel16:8 uyehova ubuyisile pezu kwako lonke igazi lendlu ka‐Saule, lowo obupata ubukumkani esikundleni sake; kanjako uyehova unikele ubukumkani esandleni sika‐Abasalome unyana wako; kanti nanku wena usengozini yako, ngokuba uyindoda yegazi." 
2Samuel16:9 Wandula u‐Abishai unyana ka‐Tseruya wati kukumkani: Yinina ukuba lenja efileyo iqalekise inkosi yam ukumkani? mandidlule ke, ndiye ndisuse intloko yake." 
2Samuel16:10 Koko ukumkani wati: Ndiyinto nina kuni, bonyana baka‐Tseruya? makaqalekise bo, ngokuba uyehova ete kuye: Mqalekise u‐Davide; ngubanina ke oya kuti: Yinina ukuba wenje njalo?" 
2Samuel16:11 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Abishai nakuzo zonke izicaka zake: Bona ke, unyana wam owapuma ematunjini am, uyafuna ubomi bam; kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi kaloku enje njalo lom‐Benjamine? myekeni, makaqalekise; ngokuba uyehova emxelele:" 
2Samuel16:12 kungaba uyehova uya kukangela pezu kwelishwa lam, aze uyehova abuyekeze kum okulungileyo esikundleni sokuqalekisa kwake namhla nje." 
2Samuel16:13 Wahamba ke u‐Davide namadoda ake endleleni; wati u‐Shimehi wahamba ecaleni lentaba malungana naye, waqalekisa ekuhambeni kwake, wagibisela ngamatye ngakuye, waposa utuli." 
2Samuel16:14 Wada wafika ukumkani, nabantu bonke ababenaye, bediniwe nje, bati pefu kona." 
2Samuel16:15 KEKALOKU u‐Abasalome, nabo bonke abantu, amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, beza e‐Yerusaleme, no‐Ahitofele kunye naye." 
2Samuel16:16 Kwaye kute, okuya u‐Hushai um‐Areki, umhlobo ka‐Davide, wezayo ku‐Abasalome, wandula u‐Hushai wati ku‐Abasalome: Makapile ukumkani, makapile ukumkani!" 
2Samuel16:17 Waza u‐Abasalome wati ku‐Hushai: Bubo obu na ububele bako kumhlobo wako? yinina ukuba akuyanga nomhlobo wako? 
2Samuel16:18 Wayesiti u‐Hushai ku‐Abasalome: Hai; ngulowo unyuliweyo nguyehova, nangababantu, nangamadoda onke akwa‐Sirayeli, endiya kuba ngowake, nendiya kuhlala naye:" 
2Samuel16:19 nakanjako, ngendimkonza banina? ngekungabi sebusweni bonyana wake na? njengokuba ndikonzile ebusweni boyihlo, ndoba njalo ebusweni bako." 
2Samuel16:20 Wandula u‐Abasalome wati ku‐Ahitofele: Nikani icebo! siya kwenza nto nina? 
2Samuel16:21 Waza u‐Ahitofele wati ku‐Abasalome: Ngena kuwo amashweshwe kayihlo, awashiyileyo ukulinda indlu; baye o‐Sirayeli bonke beya kuva ukuba unukele uyihlo; kwa njalo ziya kwomelela izandla zabo bonke abanawe." 
2Samuel16:22 Ngako bamolulela u‐Abasalome intente pezu kwendlu; waza u‐Abasalome wangena kuwo amashweshwe oyise pambi kwamehlo o‐Sirayeli bonke. 
2Samuel16:23 Kekaloku icebo lika‐Ahitofele, elo wacebisa ngalo ngalomihla, belinjengokungati kwabuzwa elizwini likatixo: belinjalo lonke icebo lika‐Ahitofele nakuye u‐Davide nakuye u‐Abasalome." 
2Samuel17:1 Walekela u‐Ahitofele wati ku‐Abasalome: Makendinyule ke amadoda angamawaka alishumi linamabini, ukuze ndisuke, ndiputume u‐Davide ngobubusuku:" 
2Samuel17:2 ndandiya kuza pezu kwake ediniwe, epolelwe izandla, ndimnkwantyise; baye bonke abantu abanaye beya kusaba: ndiya kwandula ndimbete ukumkani yedwa;" 
2Samuel17:3 nabo bonke abantu ndobabuyisela kuwe: londoda uyifunayo injengokubuya kwabo bonke: kwa njalo abantu bonke boba seluxolweni. 
2Samuel17:4 Lalibe elozwi lifanele emehlweni ka‐Abasalome nasemehlweni abo bonke abadala bo‐Sirayeli. 
2Samuel17:5 Kodwa u‐Abasalome wati: Kaubize no‐Hushai um‐Areki, ukuba sive woti nina naye." 
2Samuel17:6 Wati akufika u‐Hushai ku‐Abasalome, watsho u‐Abasalome kuye, esiti: u‐Ahitofele utetile ngendawo enje nje; siya kulenza izwi lake na? ukuba asiyi kulenza, teta wena." 
2Samuel17:7 Waza wati u‐Hushai ku‐Abasalome: Alilungile icebo acebisile ngalo u‐Ahitofele ngelixesha. 
2Samuel17:8 Wahambisa u‐Hushai wati: Wena uyamazi uyihlo namadoda ake, ukuba bangamagoṙa, nabampefumlo uṙaṙa, njengebere ehlutiweyo amatole ayo ngasendle; kanjako uyihlo uyindoda yokulwa, akayi kulalisa nabantu." 
2Samuel17:9 Bona ke, ngoku uzimele kwomnye weminxuma, umhlaumbi kwenye yezondawo: kwaye kuya kuti, nxa kuviwa pakati kwabo ekuqaleni, osukuba esiva woti: Kuko isibulalo pakati kwabantu abamlandelayo u‐Abasalome;" 
2Samuel17:10 andule kwa lowo oyindoda yobuṙoti, ontliziyo injengentliziyo yengonyama, agqibele ukunyibilika; ngokuba bonke o‐Sirayeli besazi ukuba uyihlo uligoṙa, nokuba bangamadoda obuṙoti abo banaye." 
2Samuel17:11 Ngako ndiyanika icebo lokuba bonke o‐Sirayeli babutelwe kuwe kamsinyane, bevela e‐Dane nakude kube se‐Beresheba, njengentlabati engaselwandle ngobuninzi, nokuba uye isiqu sako ekulweni." 
2Samuel17:12 Siya kwandul’ ukuza kuye kwenye yezondawo apo aya kufunyanwa kona, si we pezu kwake njengokuba umbete usiwa pezu kwomhlaba: kwaye kungayi kusala mntu kuye nakuwo onke amadoda anaye noko amnye." 
2Samuel17:13 Kanjako ukuba wamkelwe esixekweni, sebeya kuti o‐Sirayeli bonke bafake esosixeko intambo, ukuze sisir̔olele emlanjeni, kude kungafunyanwa kona nalinye ilityana." 
2Samuel17:14 Waza wati u‐Abasalome, nawo onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli: Icebo lika‐Hushai um‐Areki lilungile pezu kwecebo lika‐Ahitofele. Ngokuba uyehova ebemisele icebo elilungileyo lika‐Ahitofele ukuba litshitshiswe, ukuze uyehova azise pezu kwo‐Abasalome ilishwa." 
2Samuel17:15 Wandula u‐Hushai wati ku‐Tsadoki naku‐Abiyatare abaperisite: Njengokunje nanjengokunje wanika icebo u‐Ahitofele ku‐Abasalome, nakubadala bo‐Sirayeli; kanjalo njengokunje nanjengokunje ndanika icebo mna:" 
2Samuel17:16 ngako kaloku tumani ngokunxama, nishumayele ku‐Davide, ukuti: Ungalalisi ngobubusuku ematafeni entlango; nokuti: Kauleza ukuwela; hleze ukumkani acitwe, nabantu bonke abanaye." 
2Samuel17:17 Kekaloku u‐Jonatane no‐Himahatse bebehlala ngasemtonjeni we‐Rogele; saza isicakazana saya sabaxelela; (ngokuba bebekohlwa ukubonakala ngokungena esixekweni;) bati bona baya bamxelela ukumkani u‐Davide. 
2Samuel17:18 Kodwa umfana wababona, wamxelela u‐Abasalome: basuka baya bobabini ngokunxama, beza endlwini yendoda e‐Bahurime, ebinequla ebaleni layo; baye behlela kona." 
2Samuel17:19 Wandula umfazi watabata isigubungelo, wasandlala pezu kwomlomo wequla, wayaneka inqolowa enqushiweyo pezu kwaso; kwaza akwaziwa lonto." 
2Samuel17:20 Zada zafika izicaka zika‐Abasalome kumfazi lowo endlwini, zati: Bapina u‐Himahatse no‐Jonatane? Wayesiti umfazi kuzo: Bawelile umlanjana wamanzi. Zati zakuba zifunile, zingafumananga nje, zabuyela e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Samuel17:21 Kwaye kute emveni kwokumka kwazo, bandula benyuka equleni, baya bamxelela ukumkani u‐Davide, bati ku‐Davide: Sukani, niwele amanzi ngokunxama: ngokuba kunje nje u‐Ahitofele anikile icebo ngakuni." 
2Samuel17:22 Waza wesuka u‐Davide, nabantu bonke ababenaye, bawela i‐Yoredane; kwati kwakukanya ukusa, akwasweleka kwa namnye ongawelanga i‐Yoredane." 
2Samuel17:23 Kekaloku akubona u‐Ahitofele ukuba icebo lake belingenzwanga, wabopa iqwaṙashe, wesuka, waya endlwini yake, esixekweni sake, wayolela indlu yake, wazixo̔ma; waza wafa, wancw̔atywa encw̔abeni loyise." 
2Samuel17:24 WANDULA u‐Davide weza e‐Mahanayime. Kanjalo u‐Abasalome wawela i‐Yoredane, yena nawo onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli kunye naye." 
2Samuel17:25 Waye u‐Abasalome ebebekile u‐Hamasa pezu kwomkosi esikundleni sika‐Jowabi: u‐Hamasa lowo ebengunyana wendoda egama belingu‐Yitera, um‐Sirayeli, eyangena ku‐Abigali intombi ka‐Nahashe, udade ka‐Tseruya unina ka‐Jowabi." 
2Samuel17:26 Kwa njalo o‐Sirayeli no‐Abasalome bati waca ezweni le‐Gileyadi. 
2Samuel17:27 Kwaye kute, akuba u‐Davide efikile e‐Mahanayime, wandula u‐Shobi unyana ka‐Nahashe wase‐Raba yosapo luka‐Hamoni, no‐Makire unyana ka‐Hamiyeli wase‐Lo‐debare, no‐Barezilai um‐Gileyadi wase‐Rogelime," 
2Samuel17:28 bazisa imandlalo, nezitya, nemipanda yombumbi, nenqolowa, neṙalasi, nomgubo, namaqashu, namabontye, nelentile, nenkozo ezojiweyo," 
2Samuel17:29 nobusi, namasi, negusha, nezonka zamasi enkomo, banik ela u‐Davide nabantu ababenaye, ukuze badle; ngokuba bebesiti: Abantu balambile, badiniwe, banxaniwe, entlango apo." 
2Samuel18:1 Wada u‐Davide wabala abantu ababenaye, wabeka pezu kwabo inkosi zamawaka nenkosi zamakulu." 
2Samuel18:2 Waza u‐Davide watuma abantu, esinye isiqingata sesitatu ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Jowabi, nesinye isiqingata sesitatu ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Abishai, unyana ka‐Tseruya, umninawe ka‐Jowabi, nesinye isiqingata sesitatu ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Yitai um‐Gate. Wayesiti ukumkani ebantwini: Ndiya kupuma nani ngenyaniso nam." 
2Samuel18:3 Koko abantu bati: Akuyi kupuma; ngokuba nxa sika sibaleke, abayi kubekela tina intliziyo; nanxa esinye isiqingata sabetu sibubayo, abayi kubekela tina intliziyo; kodwa ngoku u njengamawaka alishumi abakuti; ngako kaloku kulungile ukuba ube usinceda usesixekweni." 
2Samuel18:4 Wandula ukumkani wati kubo: Oko kulungileyo emehlweni enu ndiya kukwenza. Wasuka ukumkani wema ngasecaleni lesango, bati bonke abantu bapuma ngamakulu nangamawaka." 
2Samuel18:5 Waza ukumkani wayalela u‐Jowabi, no‐Abishai, no‐Yitai, ngokuti: Patani kakuhle indodana leyo, u‐Abasalome, ngenxa yam. Baye bonke abantu besiva, akuba ukumkani ebeyalela zonke inkosi ezo ngayo indawo ka‐Abasalome." 
2Samuel18:6 Kwa njalo abantu bapumela ezindle ngakuwo ama‐Sirayeli: kwaza kwabako ukulwa ehlatini le‐Frayime; 
2Samuel18:7 bati abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli babulawa kona ebusweni bezicaka zika‐Davide; kwaye kuko kona isibulawa esikulu ngalomhla, amawaka amashumi mabini amadoda:" 
2Samuel18:8 ngokuba ukulwa kwatiwa sa pezu kwobuso belizwe lonke; lada ihlati ladla ebantwini ngento eninzi kubo ababedliwa liṙele ngalomhla. 
2Samuel18:9 Wahla u‐Abasalome wahlangana nezicaka zika‐Davide: kekaloku u‐Abasalome wakwela pezu kweqwaṙaṙa; lati lakufika iqwaṙaṙa pantsi kwamasebe apingeleleneyo omkoba omkulu, yandula intloko yake yabambeka emkobeni, wabekwa pakati kwezulu nomhlaba; laye iqwaṙaṙa elipantsi kwake ladlula." 
2Samuel18:10 Yaza indoda etile yabona oko, yamxelela u‐Jowabi, yati: Bona ke, ndibonile u‐Abasalome exo̔mekile emkobeni." 
2Samuel18:11 Wayesiti u‐Jowabi kuyo indoda ebimxelele: Bona ke, ubonile nje, kuyinina ukuba ubungambeti kona ngasemhlabeni! ndandinge ndikunikile ishumi leshekele zesilivere noqwemesha lunye." 
2Samuel18:12 Koko indoda leyo yati ku‐Jowabi: Nakuba bendiya kulinganisa pezu kwesandla sam iwaka leshekele zesilivere, ngandingoluli isandla sam ngakuye unyana wokumkani; ngokuba ukumkani ebeyalela wena, no‐Abishai, no‐Yitai, ekuveni kwetu, esiti: Gcinani nonke ngabanye indodana u‐Abasalome." 
2Samuel18:13 Ukuba kodwa bendenzile ubuxoki ngakubo ubomi bam; (ngokuba kungeko nto efihlelweyo ukumkani;) ngeuba nawe umele ngaku m. 
2Samuel18:14 Wandula wati u‐Jowabi: Andiyi kulibala ngokunjalo ebusweni bako. Waza watabata izikali ezitatu esandleni sake, wazihlaba entliziyweni ka‐Abasalome, nxa asahleli pakati kwomkoba." 
2Samuel18:15 Aza asondela amadodana alishumi, abatwali bezixo̔bo zika‐Jowabi, ambeta u‐Abasalome, amfisa." 
2Samuel18:16 Wandula u‐Jowabi wavutela ngexilongo, bati abantu babuya ekusukeleni ama‐Sirayeli; ngokuba u‐Jowabi wababamba abantu." 
2Samuel18:17 Baza bamtabata u‐Abasalome, bamposa ehlatini emnxunyeni omkulu, bamisa pezu kwake imfumba yamatye enkulu kakulu: asuka onke ama‐Sirayeli esaba aya amanye ngamanye ezintenteni zawo." 
2Samuel18:18 Kekaloku u‐Abasalome, nxa abesadla ubomi, watabata wazimisela intsika, esemhlanjeni wokumkani; ngokuba ebesiti: Andinanyana, ukuze kukunjuzwe igama lam; wayibiza intsika leyo ngegama lake: ngako yabizwa kwada kwanamhla nje ngokuti yinkumbuzelo ka‐Abasalome." 
2Samuel18:19 Wandula wati u‐Himahatse unyana ka‐Tsadoki: Makendigidime, ndishumayele kukumkani indaba zokuba uyehova umkulule esandleni sentshaba zake." 
2Samuel18:20 Koko u‐Jowabi wati kuye: Akuyi kuba ngumshumayeli wendaba namhla nje, kodwa uya kushumayela indaba ngomhla wumbi; kodwa namhla nje akuyi kushumayela indaba, ngenxa yokuba unyana wokumkani efile." 
2Samuel18:21 Waza u‐Jowabi wati ku‐Kushi: Hamba, umxelele ukumkani oko ukubonileyo. Watoba ke u‐Kushi pambi kwo‐Jowabi, wagidima." 
2Samuel18:22 Wapinda kanjako u‐Himahatse unyana ka‐Tsadoki wati ku‐Jowabi: Kodwa noko, makendigidime nam emva kwo‐Kushi. Wayesiti u‐Jowabi: Kunganina ukuba ugidime wena, nyana wam! ungenandaba ezikolekileyo nje?" 
2Samuel18:23 Kodwa noko, watsho, makendigidime. Waza wati kuye: Gidima. Wasuka u‐Himahatse wagidima ngendlela yetafa, wagqita ku‐Kushi." 
2Samuel18:24 Kekaloku u‐Davide wahlala pakati kwamasango amabini; wati umlindi wahamba pezu kwesifulelwa sesango, pezu kwodonga, wapakamisa amehlo ake, wakangela; kekaloku nantsiya indoda igidima iyodwa." 
2Samuel18:25 Waza wabiza umlindi, wamxelela ukumkani. Wayesiti ukumkani: Ukuba iyodwa, kuko indaba emlonyeni wayo. Yakaulezisa ukuhamba ke, yasondela." 
2Samuel18:26 Wabuya umlindi wabona enye indoda igidima; waza umlindi wabiza kumgcini wesango, wati: Nantsi enye indoda igidima iyodwa. Wayesiti ukumkani: Nalé ingumshumayeli wendaba." 
2Samuel18:27 Wati umlindi kanjalo: Ndiyabona ukugidima kweyokuqala njengokugidima kuka‐Himahatse unyana ka‐Tsadoki. Wayesiti ukumkani: Uyindoda elungileyo lowo, uyeza nendaba ezilungileyo." 
2Samuel18:28 Waza wabiza u‐Himahatse, wati kukumkani: Luxolo! Watoba ngobuso bake ngasemhlabeni pambi kwokumkani, wati: Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wako, owanikeleyo amadoda abepakamisa isandla sawo ngakuyo inkosi yam ukumkani." 
2Samuel18:29 Wandula ukumkani wati: Ipilile na indodana u‐Abasalome? Wati u‐Himahatse: Kendabona impitimpiti enkulu, nxa u‐Jowabi abetuma isicaka sokumkani, na m isicaka sako, kodwa bendingayazi iyinto nina." 
2Samuel18:30 Wati ukumkani: Sondela, zimise apa; waza wasondela, wema." 
2Samuel18:31 Wada wafika, bona ke, u‐Kushi; wayesiti u‐Kushi: Maishunyayezwe inkosi yam ukumkani, okokuba uyehova ukukulule namhla esandleni sabo bonke ababesukela ngakuwe." 
2Samuel18:32 Waza ukumkani wati ku‐Kushi: Ipilile na indodana u‐Abasalome? Wayesiti u‐Kushi: Intshaba zenkosi yam ukumkani, nabo bonke abavukela ububi bako, mababe njengendodana leyo!" 
2Samuel18:33 Wandula ukumkani wabetwa lusizi, wenyuka waya enkambilini epezulu kwesango, walila; wayesitsho ekuyeni kwake ukuti: Nyana wam Abasalome, nyana wam, nyana wam Abasalome! akwaba ndabendifile esikundleni sako, Abasalome, nyana wam, nyana wam!" 
2Samuel19:1 Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Jowabi ukuti: Nanku ukumkani elila esenza isijwili pezu kwo‐Abasalome. 
2Samuel19:2 Lwati usindiso ngalomhla lwaba lulilo kubo bonke abantu; ngokuba abantu bebesiva ngalomhla kusitwa: Ukumkani udandatekile pezu kwonyana wake. 
2Samuel19:3 Baza abantu banyebeleza ngalomhla ukungena esixekweni, njengokuba benyebeleza abantu abavisiweyo ihlazo, bakubaleka ekulweni." 
2Samuel19:4 Kodwa ukumkani wagqubutela ubuso bake, wakala ukumkani ngelizwi elikulu, esiti: Nyana wam Abasalome! Abasalome, nyana wam, nyana wam!" 
2Samuel19:5 Wandula u‐Jowabi weza kukumkani endlwini, wati: Udanisile namhla ubuso bazo zonke izicaka zako, ezisindisileyo namhla ubomi bako, nobomi bonyana bako nobentombi zako, nobomi babafazi bako, nobomi bamashweshwe ako," 
2Samuel19:6 ngokubatanda abakutiyayo nangokubatiya abakutandayo: ngokuba uxele namhla, ukuba azinto kuwe inkosi nezicaka; ngokuba ndinakana namhla, ukuba u‐Abasalome ebesahleli, nokuba tina sonke sibe sifile namhla, oko ngekuba kulungile emehlweni ako." 
2Samuel19:7 Ngako kaloku suka, upume, utete kwintliziyo zezicaka zako: ngokuba ndifunga uyehova, ungapumi nje, akuyi kulalisa mntu nawe obubusuku: oku ke kwoba kubi kuwe, ngapezu kwabo bonke ububi ubuhlelwa bubo kwa sebutsheni bako kude kwangoku." 
2Samuel19:8 Wandula ukumkani wesuka, wahlala esangweni. Kwaza kwaxelwa kubo bonke abantu ukuti: Nanku ukumkani ehleli esangweni. Basuka bonke abantu beza ebusweni bokumkani; kodwa ama‐Sirayeli ebesabele amanye ngamanye ezintenteni zawo." 
2Samuel19:9 BAZA bapikisana bonke abantu, pakati kwezizwe zonke zama‐Sirayeli, besiti: Ukumkani wasihlangula esandleni sentshaba zetu, wasisindisa esandleni sama‐Filistiya; kodwa ngoku wesabile elizweni ngenxa ka‐Abasalome;" 
2Samuel19:10 no‐Abasalome, esibe simtambisa pezu kwetu, ufile ekulweni: ngako kaloku, kunganina ukuba niti cwaka ngokumbuyisa ukumkani?" 
2Samuel19:11 Kekaloku ukumkani u‐Davide watuma ku‐Tsadoki naku‐Abiyatare abaperisite, ukuti: Tetani kubo abadala bo‐Juda, nisiti: Yinina ukuba ningabokugqibela ukumbuyisela ukumkani endlwini yake? (ngokuba ukuteta kwama‐Sirayeli onke bekufikile kukumkani, endlwini yake:)" 
2Samuel19:12 nina ningabazalwana bam; nilitambo lam nenyama yam: yinina ukuba ningabokugqibela ukumbuyisa ukumkani? 
2Samuel19:13 Nize niti ku‐Hamasa: Akulitambo lam nenyama yam na wena? utixo makenje njalo kum, alekele ukwenje njalo kum, ukuba akuyi kuba yinkosi yomkosi pambi kwam imihla yonke esikundleni sika‐Jowabi!" 
2Samuel19:14 Waza watobela intliziyo yawo onke amadoda akwa‐Juda njengeyendoda inye; ada atuma kukumkani, esiti: Buya wena, nezicaka zako zonke." 
2Samuel19:15 Wandula wabuya ukumkani, weza e‐Yoredane: basuka o‐Juda beza e‐Gilegale, ukuya kumkaulela ukumkani, ukuba bamwelise ukumkani i‐Yoredane." 
2Samuel19:16 Waza wanxama u‐Shimehi unyana ka‐Gera, um‐Benjamine, owase‐Bahurime, wehlela pakati kwamadoda akwa‐Juda, ukuya kumkaulela ukumkani u‐Davide." 
2Samuel19:17 Kwaye kuko naye iwaka lamadoda akwa‐Benjamine; kwa no‐Tsiba isicaka sendlu ka‐Saule, nonyana bake abalishumi linabahlanu, nezicaka zake ezimashumi mabini, kunye naye: baza bawela i‐Yoredane pambi kwokumkani." 
2Samuel19:18 Kwaye kuwela umtantatu wokuweza abendlu yokumkani, nowokwenza okulungileyo emehlweni ake. Wandula u‐Shimehi unyana ka‐Gera wawa pambi kwokumkani, akuba ewelile i‐Yoredane," 
2Samuel19:19 wati kukumkani: Maingati inkosi yam ibalele kum ityala; kanjalo ungakumbuleli oko isicaka sako sibe sikwenza ngobugwenxa, ngomhla yabipuma ngawo inkosi yam ukumkani e‐Yerusaleme, ukuba ukumkani akubekele intliziyo yake." 
2Samuel19:20 Ngokuba isicaka sako sisazi ukuba ndonile; ngako, bona ke, ndizile namhla ndingowokuqala kuyo yonke indlu ka‐Josefe ukuba ndihle ukuya kukaulela inkosi yam ukumkani." 
2Samuel19:21 Waza wapendula u‐Abishai unyana ka‐Tseruya, wati: Akayi kufiswa na u‐Shimehi ngenxa yoku, ukuba emqalekisile umtanjiswa kayehova?" 
2Samuel19:22 Koko u‐Davide wati: Ndiyinto nina kuni, bonyana baka‐Tseruya! ukuba nibe namhla ningabalane kum? kwofiswa namhla na umntu kwa‐Sirayeli? ngokuba ndingazi na ukuba ndingukumkani namhla pezu kwo‐Sirayeli?" 
2Samuel19:23 Ngako ukumkani wati ku‐Shimehi: Akuyi kufa. Waza ukumkani wamfungela. 
2Samuel19:24 Wehla no‐Mefiboshete unyana ka‐Saule, ukuza kumkaulela ukumkani, engahlambanga inyawo zake, engacazanga udevu lwake, engahlanzanga ingubo zake, kwa semhleni wokumka kwokumkani kude kwangumhla lowo wabuya wafika ngoxolo." 
2Samuel19:25 Kwaye kute, akuba efikile e‐Yerusaleme ukuza kumkaulela ukumkani, wati ukumkani kuye: Yinina ukuba ubungayanga nam, Mefiboshete?" 
2Samuel19:26 Wayesiti: Nkosi yam, kumkani! isicaka sam sandikohlisa; ngokuba isicaka sako sibe sisiti: Ndiya kuzibopela iqwaṙashe, ndikwele pezu kwalo, ndiye kukumkani; ngokuba isicaka sako sisisiqwala." 
2Samuel19:27 Sasihleba isicaka sako kuyo inkosi yam ukumkani; kodwa inkosi yam ukumkani injengengelosi katixo: ngako yenza okulungileyo emehlweni ako. 
2Samuel19:28 Ngokuba bonke abendlu kabawo bebengamadoda okufa kupela pambi kwenkosi yam ukumkani: noko umisile isicaka sako pakati kwabo abadlayo ngasetafileni yako. Ndisenegunya lanina, ukuba ndikale kanjako kuye ukumkani?" 
2Samuel19:29 Waza ukumkani wati kuye: Kunganina ukuba uyateta kanjako ngendawo zako? Ndite: Wena no‐Tsiba yahlulelanani umhlaba lowo. 
2Samuel19:30 Wayesiti u‐Mefiboshete kukumkani: Makatabate kwa wonke, emveni kwokuba inkosi yam ukumkani ifikile ngoxolo endlwini yayo." 
2Samuel19:31 Kanjalo u‐Barezilai um‐Gileyadi wehla e‐Rogelime, wawela i‐Yoredane nokumkani, ukumpelekelela e‐Yoredane." 
2Samuel19:32 Waye u‐Barezilai ebemdala kakulu, engominyaka imashumi asibozo: yena ebemfunzele ukumkani nxa abehlala e‐Mahanayime; ngokuba ebeyindoda enkulu kunene." 
2Samuel19:33 Wayesiti ukumkani ku‐Barezilai: Wela nam, ndandiya kukufunzela kum e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Samuel19:34 Kodwa u‐Barezilai wati kukumkani: Yoba mingapina imihla yeminyaka yokudla kwam ubomi, ukuba ndinyuke nokumkani ukuya e‐Yerusaleme?" 
2Samuel19:35 Ndingominyaka imashumi asibozo ubudala bam namhla: ndinokuqiqa na pakati kwokumnandi nokubi? isicaka sako sinokuva na oko endikudlayo nendikuselayo? ndisenako na ukupulapula ilizwi labaculi nelabaculikazi? kunganina ke ukuba isicaka sako sibe sisengumtwalo kuyo inkosi yam ukumkani? 
2Samuel19:36 Isicaka sako siya kuwela i‐Yoredane nokumkani ukuya umganyana wodwa: kunganina ke ukuba ukumkani andivuze ngomvuzo onjalo? 
2Samuel19:37 Makesibuye isicaka sako, ukuba ndibubele esixekweni sam, ngasencw̔abeni lobawo noma̔. Kodwa nasi isicaka sako u‐Kimuhame; masiwele nenkosi yam ukumkani; uze usenzele oko kulungileyo emehlweni ako." 
2Samuel19:38 Waza wati ukumkani: u‐Kimuhame uya kuwela nam, ndandiya kumenzela oko kulungileyo emehlweni ako; nako konke uya kukufuna kum, ndiya kukwenzela kona." 
2Samuel19:39 Bada bonke abantu bawela i‐Yoredane; wawela nokumkani: wandula ukumkani wamanga u‐Barezilai, wamtamsanqelisa; owabuya waya endaweni yake." 
2Samuel19:40 Waza ukumkani wadlulela e‐Gilegale, no‐Kimuhame wadlula naye: bati bonke abantu bakwa‐Juda bamwelisa ukumkani, kwa nesinye isiqingata sabantu bakwa‐Sirayeli." 
2Samuel19:41 KEKALOKU bona ke, onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli eza kukumkani, ati kukumkani: Yinina ukuba abazalwana betu, amadoda akwa‐Juda, bakubi̔le, nokuba bawezile ukumkani nabendlu yake i‐Yoredane, nawo onke amadoda ka‐Davide kunye naye?" 
2Samuel19:42 Andula onke amadoda akwa‐Juda apendula ngakuwo amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli, ati: Ngokuba ukumkani esalamana nati; kunganina ke ukuba niqumbile pezu kwalendawo? sike sadla na okuvela kukumkani? uke wasibasela ngebaso na?" 
2Samuel19:43 Aza amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli apendula amadoda akwa‐Juda, ati: Tina sinezahlulo ezilishumi kuye ukumkani, kwa nakuye u‐Davide, ngapezu kwenu; kunganina ke ukuba nisidelile? besingenalo ilizwi letu kuqala ke na, lokuba kubuyiswe ukumkani wetu? Kodwa ilizwi lamadoda akwa‐Juda belilukuni ngapezu kwelizwi lamadoda akwa‐Sirayeli." 
2Samuel20:1 Kwahla kwabako kona indoda yobunginingini, egama belingu‐Sheba, unyana ka‐Bikeri, um‐Benjamine: yona yavutela ngexilongo, yati: Asinasabiwo ku‐Davide, asinalifa kuye unyana ka‐Jese; abanye ngabanye ezintenteni zabo, bo‐Sirayeli!" 
2Samuel20:2 Andula onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli enyuka ekulandeleni u‐Davide, alandela u‐Sheba unyana ka‐Bikeri: kodwa amadoda akwa‐Juda anamatela kukumkani wawo, kutabata e‐Yoredane kude kwakuyo i‐Yerusaleme." 
2Samuel20:3 Wayesiza u‐Davide endlwini yake e‐Yerusaleme; waza ukumkani watabata abafazi abangamashweshwe bolishumi, abo wabashiya ukulinda indlu, wabafaka endlwini yokugcinela, wabafunzela, kodwa akangena kubo: kwa njalo bavalelwa kwada kwangumhla wokufa kwabo, behleli ngobuhlolokazi." 
2Samuel20:4 Waza ukumkani wati ku‐Hamasa: Ndibizele ndawonye amadoda akwa‐Juda pakati kwemihla mitatu, ube lapa nawe umi." 
2Samuel20:5 Wasuka u‐Hamasa waya ukubiza ndawonye amadoda akwa‐Juda; kodwa walibala ngapezu kwexesha elimisiweyo, elo wabemmisele lona." 
2Samuel20:6 Ngako u‐Davide wati ku‐Abishai: Kaloku u‐Sheba, unyana ka‐Bikeri, uya kusenzela okubi ngapezu kwo‐Abasalome; tabata wena izicaka zenkosi yako, umputume, hleze azifumanele izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, asinde emehlweni etu." 
2Samuel20:7 Andula apuma emva kwake amadoda ka‐Jowabi, naba‐Kereti, naba‐Peleti, nawo onke amagoṙa: bapuma ke e‐Yerusaleme, ukuya kumputuma u‐Sheba unyana ka‐Bikeri." 
2Samuel20:8 Bati bakuba ngasetyeni elikulu elise‐Gibeyone, wandula u‐Hamasa waya pambi kwabo. Waye u‐Jowabi ebinqiwe ngengubo yake abeyambete, upezu kwayo umbinqo o neṙele libotshiwe pezu kwesinqe sake esinxobeni salo; elati akupuma lawa." 
2Samuel20:9 Wayesiti u‐Jowabi ku‐Hamasa: Upilile na, mzalwana wam? Wandula u‐Jowabi walubamba ngesandla sokunene udevu luka‐Hamasa, ukuza kumanga:" 
2Samuel20:10 kodwa u‐Hamasa ebengalumkeli iṙele elibe lisesandleni sika‐Jowabi: waza wambeta ngalo esiswini, wapalaza amatumbu ake ngasemhlabeni, engampindelanga ke: wada wafa. Basuka u‐Jowabi no‐Abishai umzalwana wake bamputuma u‐Sheba unyana ka‐Bikeri." 
2Samuel20:11 Yaza indoda ezicakeni zika‐Jowabi yema ngakuye, yati: Osukuba ekolela u‐Jowabi, nosukuba engecala lika‐Davide, makamlandele u‐Jowabi." 
2Samuel20:12 Kekaloku u‐Hamasa waqikaqikeka egazini pakati kwomendo. Yati yakubona indoda leyo ukuba abantu bonke bema, yamsusa u‐Hamasa emendweni yambeka ngasendle, yaposa ingubo pezu kwake, ngokokuba ebebona bonke ababesiza ngakuye ukuba bema." 
2Samuel20:13 Okuya ebesusiwe emendweni, badlula bonke abantu emva kwo‐Jowabi, ukuya kumputuma u‐Sheba unyana ka‐Bikeri." 
2Samuel20:14 Waza wacanda kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli kude kwakuyo i‐Abele, ne‐Bete‐mahaka, nayo yonke i‐Berime: baza bahlanganiselwa ndawonye, baya nabo emva kwake." 
2Samuel20:15 Basuka beza bamvingcela e‐Abele‐bete‐mahaka, baposela indulana ngakuso isixeko, eyemayo ngakulo udonga lwapandle: baza bonke abantu ababeno‐Jowabi balwonakalisa udonga, ukuze baluwise." 
2Samuel20:16 Wandula wabiza umfazi olumkileyo esesixekweni, esiti: Yivani! yivani! niti ke ku‐Jowabi: Sondela kwa lapa, ukuba nditete nawe." 
2Samuel20:17 Akuba esondele kuye, wati umfazi: Ungu‐Jowabi na? Wayesiti: Ndinguye. Waza wati kuye: Yiva amazwi esicakakazi sako. Wayesiti: Ndiyeva mna." 
2Samuel20:18 Wandula watsho ukuti: Kwatetwa ekuhleni ngapambili, kusitwa: Baya kubuza ngenyaniso e‐Abele, bagqibe njalo ke." 
2Samuel20:19 Mna ndingowabaxolileyo, ndingowabanyanisekileyo kwa‐Sirayeli: wena uyafuna ukububisa isixeko nonina kwa‐Sirayeli; kunganina ukuba uya kucita ilifa likayehova?" 
2Samuel20:20 Wapendula u‐Jowabi, wati: Makube le̔, makube le̔ kum, ukuba ndicite nokuba ndonakalise!" 
2Samuel20:21 Lendawo ayinjalo; koko indoda yasentabeni yakwa‐Frayime, ngu‐Sheba, unyana ka‐Bikeri, igama layo, ipakamisile isandla sayo ngakuye ukumkani, ngakuye u‐Davide; yinikeleni yona yodwa, ndandiya kumka esixekweni. Wayesiti umfazi ku‐Jowabi: Bona ke, intloko yayo iya kuposwa kuwe pezu kwodonga." 
2Samuel20:22 Wandula umfazi waya kubo bonke abantu ngobulumko bake. Baza banqumla intloko ka‐Sheba unyana ka‐Bikeri, bayiposa ku‐Jowabi. Wasuka wavutela ngexilongo, bada baciteka esixekweni, besiya abanye ngabanye ezintenteni zabo. Waza u‐Jowabi wabuyela e‐Yerusaleme kukumkani." 
2Samuel20:23 Kekaloku u‐Jowabi ebepezu kwawo wonke umkosi wo‐Sirayeli; no‐Benaya, unyana ka‐Yoyada, ebepezu kwaba‐Kereti napezu kwaba‐Peleti;" 
2Samuel20:24 no‐Adorame ebepezu kwabesitabataba; no‐Yehoshafate, unyana ka‐Ahilude, ebengumkumbuzi;" 
2Samuel20:25 kanjalo u‐Sheva ebengumba̔li; u‐Tsadoki no‐Abiyatare bebengabaperisite; 
2Samuel20:26 no‐Hira, um‐Yahire, yena ebelinene lika‐Davide." 
2Samuel21:1 KWAZA kwabako indlala emihleni ka‐Davide iminyaka yamitatu, ngomnyaka ngomnyaka; waza u‐Davide wafuna ubuso bukayehova. Wayesiti uyehova: Ingenxa ka‐Saule nangenxa yendlu yamagazi, ngokokuba wabulala aba‐Gibeyone." 
2Samuel21:2 Waza ukumkani wababiza aba‐Gibeyone, wati kubo: (kekaloku aba‐Gibeyone bebengengabosapo luka‐Sirayeli, koko bebengabesisalela saba‐Amori; lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabafungela; kodwa u‐Saule wafuna ukubabulala ebukweleni bake ngenxa yosapo luka‐Sirayeli no‐Juda:)" 
2Samuel21:3 ngako u‐Davide wati kuba‐Gibeyone: Ndiya kunenzela nto nina? kanjalo ndiya kulwenza uxoliso nganto nina, ukuba nitamsanqelise ilifa likayehova?" 
2Samuel21:4 Bandula aba‐Gibeyone bati kuye: Asi kokwetu ukubiza isilivere negolide ku‐Saule, nakuyo indlu yake; kanjako asi kokwetu ukufisa umntu kwa‐Sirayeli. Wayesiti: Into eniya kuyiteta, ndiya kunenzela yona." 
2Samuel21:5 Baza bati kukumkani: Indoda ebisigqibela, nebicinga ngakuti ukuba sitshatyalaliswe side singabi nakuma kweminye imida yakwa‐Sirayeli," 
2Samuel21:6 makunikwe kuti amadoda asixe̔nxe kubo onyana bayo, size siwaxo̔mele uyehova e‐Gibeha ka‐Saule, umqashwa kayehova. Wayesiti ukumkani: Ndiya kuwanika." 
2Samuel21:7 Kodwa ukumkani wanenceba pezu kwo‐Mefiboshete, unyana ka‐Jonatane unyana ka‐Saule, ngenxa yesifungo sikayehova, esibe sipakati kwabo, pakati kwo‐Davide no‐Jonatane unyana ka‐Saule." 
2Samuel21:8 Koko ukumkani watabata onyana bobabini baka‐Ritsepa intombi ka‐Aya, owabazalela u‐Saule, u‐Aremoni no‐Mefiboshete; nonyana bobahlanu bodade bo‐Mikali intombi ka‐Saule, owabazalela u‐Hadriyeli unyana ka‐Barezilai um‐Mehola;" 
2Samuel21:9 wabanika esandleni saba‐Gibeyone, ababaxo̔ma entabeni pambi kwoyehova: bawa bosixe̔nxe kwa kunye, bafiswa emihleni yokuvuna, kweyokuqala imihla, ekuqaleni kwokuvunwa kweṙalasi." 
2Samuel21:10 Kekaloku u‐Ritsepa intombi ka‐Aya watabata intlakantlaka, wazolulela yona elulwalweni, kwa sekuqaleni kwokuvuna kwada kwatululwa amanzi pezu kwabo ezulwini, engavumelanga ukuba intaka zezulu zipumle pezu kwabo emini, nezilo zasendle ebusuku." 
2Samuel21:11 Kwaza kwaxelelwa u‐Davide oko akwenzileyo u‐Ritsepa intombi ka‐Aya, ishweshwe lika‐Saule." 
2Samuel21:12 Wandula waya u‐Davide, wasusa amatambo ka‐Saule, namatambo ka‐Jonatane unyana wake, kubo abemi base‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi, abebewebi̔le enkundleni yase‐Bete‐shane, apo ama‐Filistiya ebebaxo̔mile kona, nxa ama‐Filistiya abembulele u‐Saule e‐Giliboha;" 
2Samuel21:13 waza wenyusa kona amatambo ka‐Saule, namatambo ka‐Jonatane unyana wake; kanjalo amatambo abaxo̔nyiweyo bawabuta." 
2Samuel21:14 Baza bawancw̔aba amatambo ka‐Saule naka‐Jonatane unyana wake, elizweni lakwa‐Benjamine e‐Tsela, encw̔abeni lika‐Kishe uyise. Bakwenza konke abeyalele ngako ukumkani. Wada utixo wakungeleka ngenxa yelizwe emveni kwoko." 
2Samuel21:15 KEKALOKU ama‐Filistiya ebenokulwa kanjako ngakubo o‐Sirayeli: wehla u‐Davide, nezicaka zake kunye naye, balwa nama‐Filistiya; wada u‐Davide wacubuka." 
2Samuel21:16 Waza u‐Shibibenobe, obengowenzalo ka‐Rafa, ontshuntshe ibi zishekele zobedu ezimakulu matatu ukuba nzima kwayo, obebinqiwe ng eṙele elitsha, waba uya kumbulala u‐Davide." 
2Samuel21:17 Kodwa u‐Abishai unyana ka‐Tseruya wamsiza, wambeta um‐Filistiya lowo, wamfisa. Andula amadoda ka‐Davide amfungela esiti: Akusayi kubuya upume nati ukuya ekulweni, uze ungacimi isibane so‐Sirayeli." 
2Samuel21:18 Kwaye kute emveni kwoko, kwabuya kwabako ukulwa e‐Gobe ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya: okuya u‐Sibekai, um‐Husha, wambulala u‐Safe, obengowenzalo ka‐Rafa." 
2Samuel21:19 Kwabuya kwabako ukulwa e‐Gobe ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya: waza u‐Lehanane, unyana ka‐Yare‐oregime, um‐Beteleheme, wambulala umzalwana ka‐Goliyate um‐Gate, oluti lwentshuntshe belunjengomti wabaluki." 
2Samuel21:20 Kwabuya kwabako ukulwa e‐Gate: kwaye kuko kona indoda ende, ebineminwe emitandatu ezandleni zayo namazwane amatandatu ezinyaweni zayo, amashumi mabini anesine ngenani; kwa yona ibizalelwe kuma‐Rafa nayo." 
2Samuel21:21 Xeshekweni ibigxeka o‐Sirayeli, wandula u‐Jonatane, unyana ka‐Shimeha umzalwana ka‐Davide, wayibulala." 
2Samuel21:22 Aba bane bazalelwa kuma‐Rafa e‐Gate, bawa ngesandla sika‐Davide, nangesandla sezicaka zake." 
2Samuel22:1 WAZA u‐Davide wawateta kuyehova amazwi eliculo, ngomhla uyehova wamsindisayo esandleni sazo zonke intshaba zake, nasesandleni sika‐Saule:" 
2Samuel22:2 wayesiti: Uyehova uliliwa lam, nenqaba yam, nomkululi wam;" 
2Samuel22:3 utixo wam, ilityekazi lam; ndiya kutembela kuye: ikaka lam, nopondo lwosindiswa lwam, ihlati lam, nendawo yokupepela yam, umsindisi wam; uyandisindisa wena ebudlwengwini." 
2Samuel22:4 Ndobiza kuyehova, odumisekayo; ndandiya kusindiswa ezintshabeni zam." 
2Samuel22:5 Ngokuba amaza okufa ebendiṙaula; imisinga yobunginingini yandoyikisa: 
2Samuel22:6 intambo zehadesi zandingqonga; imigibe yokufa yandipangela; 
2Samuel22:7 ebunzimeni bam ndabiza kuyehova, ndabiza kutixo wam; waza weva ilizwi lam esetempileni yake, nokukala kwam kweza ezindlebeni zake." 
2Samuel22:8 Wandula umhlaba wazamazama, wangcangcazela; amasekwa ezulu ashukuma, azamazama, ngokuba ebequmbile." 
2Samuel22:9 Kwenyuka umsi ezimpumlweni zake, nomlilo uvela emlonyeni wake wadla; amalahle avuta ngawo." 
2Samuel22:10 Wagoba izulu, wehla; sasitokotoko pantsi kwenyawo zake." 
2Samuel22:11 Wakwela pezu kwekerubime, wapapazela; wabonakala pezu kwamapiko omoya." 
2Samuel22:12 Ubumnyama wabenza intente ngento emngqongayo, intlanganiso yamanzi, amafu abungqingwa ezulu." 
2Samuel22:13 Ngenkazimlo epambi kwake avuta amalahle omlilo. 
2Samuel22:14 Uyehova wadudumisa ezulwini; opezu konke wanika ilizwi lake. 
2Samuel22:15 Watuma intolo, wabacita; n emibane, wabapitizelisa." 
2Samuel22:16 Kwandula kwabonakala amazantsi olwandle, atyileka amasekwa omhlaba, ngokutetisa kukayehova, ngokuquta kwomoya wempumlo zake." 
2Samuel22:17 Wasusa pezulu, wanditabata; wandir̔ola emanzini amaninzi;" 
2Samuel22:18 wandisindisa elutshabeni lwam olunamandla; na kwabo banditiyayo, ngokuba bebendidlula ngamandla." 
2Samuel22:19 Bandipangela ngomhla wengozi yam; kodwa uyehova ebesisixaso kum. 
2Samuel22:20 Wandipumisela endaweni ebanzi, wandikulula, ngokuba ebekoliswa ndim." 
2Samuel22:21 Uyehova wandivuza njengobulungisa bam; njengobumhlope bezandla zam wandibuyekezela. 
2Samuel22:22 Ngokuba ndizigcinile indlela zikayehova, ndandingemkanga ngenkohlakalo kutixo wam." 
2Samuel22:23 Ngokuba zonke izigwebo zake zibe zipambi kwam; nemimiso yake andipambukanga kuyo. 
2Samuel22:24 Bendilungisekile pambi kwake, ndandizibamba enkohlakalweni yam:" 
2Samuel22:25 ngako uyehova undibuyekezele njengobulungisa bam, njengobumhlope bam pambi kwamehlo ake." 
2Samuel22:26 Konobubele uyazibonakalisa unobubele; kwindoda elungisekile uyazibonakalisa ulungisekile; 
2Samuel22:27 komsulwa uyazibonakalisa umsulwa; nakogwenxa uyazibonakalisa ugwenxa. 
2Samuel22:28 Kanjalo abantu ababandezelweyo uyabasindisa; kodwa amehlo ako angakubo abaner̔atshi, ukuba ubatobise." 
2Samuel22:29 Ngokuba wena usisibane sam, Yehova! uyehova uyakanyisa ubumnyama bam." 
2Samuel22:30 Ngokuba ngawe ndiliwele ibandla; ngotixo wam ndigqitile eludongeni. 
2Samuel22:31 Utixo indlela yake ifezekile ukulunga; ilizwi likayehova licocekile: ulikaka yena kubo bonke abatembela kuye. 
2Samuel22:32 Ngokuba ngubanina ongutixo ngapandle kwoyehova? ngubanina olilityekazi ngapandle kwotixo wetu? 
2Samuel22:33 Utixo uyinqaba yam yamandla; uyamalatisa olungisekileyo indlela yake. 
2Samuel22:34 Uyenza inyawo zam zibe njengezamaxamakazi; uyandimisa ezinyangweni zam. 
2Samuel22:35 Uyafundisa izandla zam ukulwa, side sityedwe isipeta sexina ngengalo zam." 
2Samuel22:36 Undipile ikaka losindiso lwako; ukululama kwako kundenze mkulu. 
2Samuel22:37 Wabusenza banzi ukunyatela kwam pantsi kwam; ati amaqata am akahexa. 
2Samuel22:38 Ndaputuma intshaba zam, ndazitshabalalisa; andabuya ndada ndazigqibela." 
2Samuel22:39 Ndazigqibela, ndazityumza, azabuya zivuke; zawa pantsi kwenyawo zam." 
2Samuel22:40 Ngokuba ubundibinqela ukulwa ngamandla; ubatobisile pantsi kwam abo babevuka ngakum: 
2Samuel22:41 wandinika umhlana wentshaba zam, ndize ndibapelise abanditiyayo." 
2Samuel22:42 Bakangela, kodwa bekungeko osindisayo; kwa kuyehova, kodwa akabapendula." 
2Samuel22:43 Ndaza ndabacolekisa njengotuli lwomhlaba; ndabanqusha njengenkunkuma yesitarate, ndabangqisha." 
2Samuel22:44 Kanjalo undikulule emapikeni abantu bam, wandigcina ndibe yintloko yentlanga; abantu endingabazanga bayandikonza." 
2Samuel22:45 Abasemzini bayazenzisa kum; ngokuva kwendlebe bayapulapula kum. 
2Samuel22:46 Abasemzini bayasinya, bayabinqa bapume ezinqatyeni zabo." 
2Samuel22:47 Uyehova uhleli; malibongwe ilityekazi lam; makadunyiswe utixo wam, ilityekazi losindiswa lwam." 
2Samuel22:48 Ngutixo ondenzela impindezelo, oweyelisa abantu pantsi kwam," 
2Samuel22:49 ondipumisa ezintshabeni zam: wena undipakamisele ngapezulu kwabo bavuka ngakum; undikulule emntwini wobudlwengu. 
2Samuel22:50 Ngako oko ndobulela kuwe, Yehova! pakati kwabaheyideni, ndicule egameni lako:" 
2Samuel22:51 owandisa intsindiswa zokumkani wake; owenza ububele kumtanjiswa wake, ku‐Davide, nakuyo inzalo yake kude kube ngunapakade." 
2Samuel23:1 NANGA amazwi okugqibela ka‐Davide: watsho u‐Davide unyana ka‐Jese, yatsho indoda ebipakanyiswa pezulu, umtanjiswa wotixo ka‐Yakobi, nomculi omnandi wakwa‐Sirayeli, ukuti:" 
2Samuel23:2 Umoya kayehova wateta ngam, nelizwi lake belipezu kwolwimi lwam." 
2Samuel23:3 Wati utixo wo‐Sirayeli, — olilityekazi lo‐Sirayeli wateta kum, esiti: Kwobako umpati pezu kwabantu olungileyo, umpati emoyika utixo;" 
2Samuel23:4 oya kuba njengokukanya kwokusa, lakupuma ilanga, njeng okwokusa okungenamafu, njeng enca eluhlaza ipuma emhlabeni ngokukazimla emva kwemvula." 
2Samuel23:5 Nakuba indlu yam ingenjalo kutixo, undimisele ucebano olungunapakade noko, olulungiselelweyo ngento zonke, oluqinisiweyo; ngokuba engayi kuluhlumisa ngenyaniso na lwonke usindiswa lwam, nalo lwonke unqwenelo lwam?" 
2Samuel23:6 Kodwa abalusapo lwobunginingini bona bonke boba njengameva asunduzwayo, ngokuba engenako ukutatyatwa ngezandla;" 
2Samuel23:7 nosukuba eya kuwapata, wonqatyiswa ngentsimbi nangoluti lwentshuntshe; aeya kutshiswa kanye ngomlilo endaweni yawo." 
2Samuel23:8 NANGA amagama amagoṙa u‐Davide abenawo: u‐Yoshebe‐bashebete um‐Tahakemoni, intloko yenjengele; nguye u‐Hadino um‐Hetsene: yena wavivinya intshuntshe yake ngakuwo amakulu asibozo abahlatyiweyo nguye ngexesha linye." 
2Samuel23:9 Kwaye kuko emva kwake u‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Dodo, unyana wom‐Ahoha; ebepakati kwawo amagoṙa amatatu ndawonye no‐Davide, akuba ebegxeka ama‐Filistiya abebutene kona ukulwa, nxa amadoda akwa Sirayeli abenyukile:" 
2Samuel23:10 wesuka yena, wabulala ama‐Filistiya sada sadinwa isandla sake, sati nama isandla sake eṙeleni: waza uyehova wenza usindiso olukulu ngalomhla; bati abantu babuyela emva kwake ngenxa yokupanga kupela." 
2Samuel23:11 Kwaye kuko emva kwake u‐Shama, unyana ka‐Age, um‐Harari. Kekaloku ama‐Filistiya ebebutene abe libandla, apo bekuko kona isahlulo somhlaba sizele zilentile; baza abantu besaba ebusweni bama‐Filistiya." 
2Samuel23:12 Kodwa wazimisa pakati kwentsimi leyo, wayilondoloza, wawabulala ama‐Filistiya: waza uyehova wenza usindiso olukulu." 
2Samuel23:13 Kwaye kusihla abatatu bakubo abamashumi matatu abazintloko, beza ku‐Davide ngexesha lokuvuna emqolombeni we‐Hadulame; lati ibandla lama‐Filistiya lati waca emhlanjeni wama‐Rafa." 
2Samuel23:14 Waye u‐Davide oko ebesenqatyeni, nelali yama‐Filistiya ibiko oko e‐Beteleheme." 
2Samuel23:15 Waza u‐Davide walangazelela, wati: Akwaba bendinokusezwa amanzi equleni lase‐Beteleheme, elisesangweni!" 
2Samuel23:16 Asuka lamagoṙa matatu atyoboza emkosini wama‐Filistiya, aka amanzi equleni lase‐Beteleheme, elisesangweni, awatwala, awazisa ku‐Davide: koko u‐Davide ebengavumi ukuwasela, kodwa wawatululela kuyehova," 
2Samuel23:17 wati: Makube lé kum, Yehova! ukuba ndiyenze lento; ndiya kusela igazi lalamadoda na, abehamba ngokubuncama ubomi bawo? ngako ebengavumi ukuwasela. Ezizinto azenza lawomagoṙa matatu." 
2Samuel23:18 Kanjalo u‐Abishai, umninawe ka‐Jowabi, unyana ka‐Tseruya, ebeyintloko yabatatu: yena wavivinya intshuntshe yake ngakuwo amakulu matatu abahlatyiweyo nguye, waza wanegama pakati kwabatatu abo." 
2Samuel23:19 Kubo abatatu abo asi nguye na obekekileyo? ngako waba yinkosi yabo; kodwa akafikelela kwabatatu bokuqala. 
2Samuel23:20 No‐Benaya, unyana ka‐Yoyada, unyana wendoda ebuṙoti, obemkulu ngezenzo, owase‐Kabetsele, yena wabulala amadoda mabini abungonyamaṙa ase‐Mowabi: kanjako wehla wabulala ingonyama pakati kwomnxuma ngomhla wengqele:" 
2Samuel23:21 wabulala nendoda engum‐Jipete, indoda enomkita; nasesandleni som‐Jipete lowo ibiko intshuntshe; koko wehlela kuye ngentonga, wayityutula intshuntshe esandleni som‐Jipete, wambulala ngeyake intshuntshe." 
2Samuel23:22 Ezizinto wazenza u‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, waza wanegama pakati kwalawomagoṙa matatu." 
2Samuel23:23 Pakati kwabo abamashumi matatu ebebekekile; kodwa akafikelela kwabatatu bokuqala. Wati u‐Davide wammisa pezu kwomlisela wake. 
2Samuel23:24 U‐Hasaheli umninawe ka‐Jowabi ebepakati kwabo abamashumi matatu; u‐Lehanane unyana ka‐Dodo, um‐Beteleheme;" 
2Samuel23:25 u‐Shama, um‐Harodi; u‐Elika, um‐Harodi;" 
2Samuel23:26 u‐Heletse, um‐Paliti; u‐Hira unyana ka‐Hikeshe, um‐Tekoha;" 
2Samuel23:27 u‐Abihezere, um‐Hanatote; u‐Mebunai, um‐Husha;" 
2Samuel23:28 u‐Tsalimone, um‐Ahoha; u‐Maharai, um‐Netofati;" 
2Samuel23:29 u‐Helebe unyana ka‐Bahana, um‐Netofati; u‐Yitai unyana ka‐Ribai, owase‐Gibeha yosapo luka‐Benjamine;" 
2Samuel23:30 u‐Benaya, um‐Piratone; u‐Hidai, owasezintilini zase‐Gahashe;" 
2Samuel23:31 u‐Abi‐halibone, um‐Haraba; u‐Hazamaveti, um‐Bahurime;" 
2Samuel23:32 u‐Eliyaba, um‐Shahalaboni; kubo onyana baka‐Yashene, u‐Jonatane;" 
2Samuel23:33 u‐Shama, um‐Harari; u‐Ahiyame unyana ka‐Sharare, um‐Harari;" 
2Samuel23:34 u‐Elifelete unyana ka‐Ahasebai, unyana wom‐Mahaka; u‐Eliyame unyana ka‐Ahitofele, um‐Gilo;" 
2Samuel23:35 u‐Hetserai, um‐Karamele; u‐Parai, um‐Areba;" 
2Samuel23:36 u‐Yigali unyana ka‐Natane, owase‐Tsoba; u‐Bani, um‐Gadi;" 
2Samuel23:37 u‐Tseleki, um‐Hamoni; u‐Naharai, um‐Berote, umtwali wezixo̔bo ku‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya;" 
2Samuel23:38 u‐Hira, um‐Yetere; u‐Garebi, um‐Yetere;" 
2Samuel23:39 u‐Huriya, um‐Hete: bonke bangamashumi matatu anesixe̔nxe." 
2Samuel24:1 YABUYA yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakubo o‐Sirayeli; waza wamvusa u‐Davide ngakubo, esiti: Hamba, ubale o‐Sirayeli no‐Juda." 
2Samuel24:2 Wayesiti ukumkani ku‐Jowabi, inkosi yempi ebinaye: Kaucande kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, kwa se‐Dane kude kube se‐Beresheba, nibale abantu, ukuba ndilazi inani labantu." 
2Samuel24:3 Waza wati u‐Jowabi kukumkani: Makongeze uyehova, utixo wako, ebantwini, inani elinjengokuba bengaka, nelinjengokuba bengaka kube ngamaxesha alikulu, aze amehlo enkosi yam ukumkani abone oko: kunganina pofu ukuba inkosi yam ukumkani inyamekela lento?" 
2Samuel24:4 Kodwa ilizwi lokumkani belinamandla pezu kwelika‐Jowabi, napezu kwelenkosi zempi. Waza wapuma u‐Jowabi nenkosi zempi ebusweni bokumkani ukuya kubala abantu, o‐Sirayeli." 
2Samuel24:5 Basuka bawela i‐Yoredane, bati waca e‐Harohere, ngasesuyide yesixeko esipakati kwentili ka‐Gadi, nangase‐Yahezere:" 
2Samuel24:6 bandula beza e‐Gileyadi, nasezweni lase‐Tahetime‐hodeshi; beza nase‐Dane‐yahane, na seziceni elingqongayo i‐Tsidone;" 
2Samuel24:7 beza nasenqatyeni yase‐Tire, nakuzo izixeko zama‐Hivi nezaba‐Kanane; bada bapumela ngasesuyide yakwa‐Juda, e‐Beresheba." 
2Samuel24:8 Bati bakuba becandile kulo lonke ilizwe, bafika e‐Yerusaleme ekupeleni kwenyanga ezilitoba nentsuku ezimashumi mabini." 
2Samuel24:9 Waza u‐Jowabi wanika inani lokubalwa kwabantu kukumkani: kekaloku kwabako kwa‐Sirayeli amawaka angamakulu asibozo amadoda abuṙoti, aber̔ola iṙele; namadoda akwa‐Juda, ebengamadoda angamawaka angamakulu mahlanu." 
2Samuel24:10 Yandula intliziyo ka‐Davide yambeta, emveni kwokuba ebebalile abantu. Waza wati u‐Davide kuyehova: Ndonile kakulu ngoko endikwenzileyo: kodwa kaloku, Yehova! zukwelelise inkohlakalo yesicaka sako, ngokuba ndenze ngobudenge kakulu." 
2Samuel24:11 Kwati kwakuvuka u‐Davide kusasa, kweza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Gadi umprofite, umboni ka‐Davide, lisiti:" 
2Samuel24:12 Hamba, uye utete ku‐Davide, usiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Izinto ezintatu ndiyazibeka pambi kwako; zinyulele ibe nye kuzo, ukuba ndiyenze kuwe." 
2Samuel24:13 Wasuka u‐Gadi weza ku‐Davide, wamxelela, wati kuye: Kuya kuza kuwe iminyaka esixe̔nxe yendlala na elizweni lako? umhlaumbi uya kwesaba na inyanga ezintatu pambi kwentshaba zako, nxa zikuputumayo? umhlaumbi iya kubako imihla emitatu yesifo esibubisayo elizweni lako kusinina? telekelela kaloku, ugqale lelinina ilizwi endiya kulibuyisela konditumileyo." 
2Samuel24:14 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Gadi: Ndixakekile kakulu; makesiwe esandleni sikayehova, ngokuba izibele zake zininzi; mandingawi esandleni sabantu." 
2Samuel24:15 Ngako uyehova watuma isifo esibubisayo kwa‐Sirayeli, kwa kuwo umso lowo kude kwakulo ixesha elimisiweyo: aza afa kubantu, kwa se‐Dane kude kwase‐Beresheba, amadoda angamawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe." 
2Samuel24:16 Yati yakwolula ingelosi isandla sayo pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme ukuyitshabalalisa, wandula uyehova waba nosizi pezu kwobubi obo, wati kuyo ingelosi ebitshabalalisa ebantwini: Kwanele; yekisa kaloku isandla sako. Kekaloku ingelosi kayehova ibingasesibayeni sokubula sika‐Arauna um‐Yebusi." 
2Samuel24:17 Waza wateta u‐Davide kuyehova, akuyibona ingelosi ebibeta ebantwini, wati: Bona ke, ndim ondonileyo, kanjalo ndim ondenze ngobugwenxa; kodwa igusha ezi, yinto nina ziyenzileyo? isandla sako masibe ngakum, nangakuyo indlu kabawo." 
2Samuel24:18 Kanjalo u‐Gadi weza ku‐Davide ngalomhla, wati kuye: Nyuka, ummisele uyehova isibingelo esibayeni sokubula sika‐Arauna um‐Yebusi." 
2Samuel24:19 Waye u‐Davide wenyuka ngelizwi lika‐Gadi, njengokuba uyehova ebeyalele." 
2Samuel24:20 Wati u‐Arauna wakangela, wabona ukumkani nezicaka zake bedlula besiza ngakuye; waza wapuma u‐Arauna, wazitoba pambi kwokumkani ngobuso bake ngasemhlabeni." 
2Samuel24:21 Waza wati u‐Arauna: Kunganina ukuba inkosi yam ukumkani ize esicakeni sayo? Wayesiti u‐Davide: Ukuba nditenge kuwe isibaya sokubula, ukuze ndimakele uyehova isibingelo, ukuba isibulalo sinqamke ebantwini." 
2Samuel24:22 Wandula u‐Arauna wati ku‐Davide: Maiti inkosi yam ukumkani itabate inikele konke okulungileyo emehlweni ayo; kangela, nanzi inkabi zibe lidini lokutshiswa, nenqwelwana zokubula nempahla zenkabi zibe zinkuni." 
2Samuel24:23 Ezizinto zonke wazinika u‐Arauna kuye ukumkani. Wati kanjalo u‐Arauna kukumkani: Uyehova, utixo wako, makakubuke." 
2Samuel24:24 Kodwa ukumkani wati ku‐Arauna: Hai; koko ndiya kusitenga ngenyaniso kuwe ngenani: ngokuba ndingayi kunikela kuyehova, utixo wam, amadini okutshiswa angamelwanga nto. Kwa njalo u‐Davide watenga isibaya sokubula nenkabi ngeshekele zesilivere ezimashumi mahlanu." 
2Samuel24:25 Waza u‐Davide wakela kona kuyehova isibingelo, wanikela amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yoxolo. Ngako uyehova wakungeleka ngenxa yelizwe, sada sanqamka isibulalo kwa‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings1:1 KEKALOKU ukumkani u‐Davide ebemdala, ekolisile ukuba nemihla; baye bemgubungela ngengubo, kodwa bekungeko kufudumala kuye." 
1Kings1:2 Zaza izicaka zake zati kuye: Makufunelwe inkosi yam ukumkani intombi, intombi ipela, eya kuma ebusweni bokumkani, ibe likolwanekazi lake; mailale esifubeni sako, ize ifudumale inkosi yam ukumkani." 
1Kings1:3 Basuka bafuna intombi entle kuyo yonke imida yakwa‐Sirayeli, bamfumana u‐Abishage um‐Shunemekazi, bamzisa kukumkani." 
1Kings1:4 Yaye intombi leyo ibintle kunene, yaba likolwanekazi lokumkani, yamonga; kodwa ukumkani wabengayazi." 
1Kings1:5 Wandula u‐Adonija unyana ka‐Hagiti wazipakamisa, esiti: Mna ndoba ngukumkani; waza wazilungisela inqwelo nabakweli bamahashe, namadoda angamashumi mahlanu abaleke pambi kwake." 
1Kings1:6 Kekaloku uyise ebengambindisanga emihleni yake ngokuti: Yinina ukuba wenje njalo? Yena naye ebemhle kakulu isimilo sake, wati unina wamzala emva kwo‐Abasalome." 
1Kings1:7 Waza wacebisana no‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya, no‐Abiyatare umperisite; ababenceda, belandela u‐Adonija." 
1Kings1:8 Kodwa u‐Tsadoki umperisite, no‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, no‐Natane umprofite, no‐Shimehi, no‐Rehi, namagoṙa abengaka‐Davide, bebengeko no‐Adonija." 
1Kings1:9 Waza u‐Adonija wabinga igusha, nenkabi, nenkomo ezityetyisiweyo, ngasetyeni le‐Zohelete, elingasemtonjeni we‐Rogele, wamema bonke abazalwana bake, onyana bokumkani, nawo onke amadoda akwa‐Juda, izicaka zokumkani:" 
1Kings1:10 kodwa u‐Natane umprofite, no‐Benaya, namagoṙa, no‐Solomone umzalwana wake, akabamema." 
1Kings1:11 Wandula wateta u‐Natane ku‐Batesheba unina ka‐Solomone, esiti: Akuvile na okokuba u‐Adonija unyana ka‐Hagiti ungukumkani, inkosi yetu u‐Davide ingakwazi nje?" 
1Kings1:12 Ngako kaloku yiza ke, makendikunike icebo, ukuba usindise ubomi bako, nobomi bonyana wako u‐Solomone." 
1Kings1:13 Hamba uye ungene kukumkani u‐Davide, uti kuye: Akufunganga na wena, nkosi yam, kumkani! kwisicakakazi sako, ngokuti: Ngenyaniso u‐Solomone unyana wako woba ngukumkani emva kwam, waeya kuhlala yena pezu kweterone yam? kunganina ngoko ukuba u‐Adonija ungukumkani?" 
1Kings1:14 Bona ke, nxa usateta kona nokumkani, sendiya kungena mna emva kwako, ndiwaqinise amazwi ako." 
1Kings1:15 Waza u‐Batesheba wangena kukumkani enkambilini: kekaloku ukumkani ebemdala kakulu; wati u‐Abishage um‐Shunemekazi wamonga ukumkani. 
1Kings1:16 Watoba pantsi u‐Batesheba, waziqubuda pambi kwokumkani. Waza wati ukumkani: Ufuna nto nina?" 
1Kings1:17 Wayesiti kuye: Nkosi yam! wena wamfunga uyehova, utixo wako, kwisicakakazi sako, ngokuti: Ngenyaniso u‐Solomone unyana wako woba ngukumkani emva kwam, waeya kuhlala yena pezu kweterone yam!" 
1Kings1:18 Kanti kaloku, nanku u‐Adonija engukumkani; kanti kaloku, nkosi yam, kumkani! akukwazi:" 
1Kings1:19 kanjalo ubingile inkabi, nenkomo ezityetyisiweyo, negusha ngento eninzi, wamema bonke onyana bokumkani, no‐Abiyatare umperisite, no‐Jowabi inkosi yomkosi; kodwa u‐Solomone isicaka sako akammemanga." 
1Kings1:20 Nawe, nkosi yam, kumkani! amehlo o‐Sirayeli bonke angakuwe, ukuba ubaxelele ungubanina oya kuhlala pezu kweterone yenkosi yam ukumkani emva kwayo." 
1Kings1:21 Okanye kuya kuti, nxa inkosi yam ukumkani iya kulala noyise bayo, mna nonyana wam u‐Solomone soba ngaboni." 
1Kings1:22 Kekaloku bona ke, nxa asateta nokumkani, wangena no‐Natane umprofite." 
1Kings1:23 Kwaxelwa ke kukumkani, kusitwa: Nanku u‐Natane umprofite. Waza wangena ebusweni bokumkani, wazitoba pambi kwokumkani ngobuso bake ngasemhlabeni." 
1Kings1:24 Wayesiti u‐Natane: Nkosi yam, kumkani! utshilo na wena ukuti: u‐Adonija woba ngukumkani emva kwam, waeya kuhlala yena pezu kweterone yam?" 
1Kings1:25 Ngokuba ehlile namhla, waya wabinga inkabi, nenkomo ezityetyisiweyo, negusha ngento eninzi, wamema bonke onyana bokumkani, nenkosi zomkosi, no‐Abiyatare umperisite: kanjalo, bona ke, bayadla bayasela nokusela pambi kwake, bati: Makapile ukumkani u‐Adonija!" 
1Kings1:26 Kodwa mna, mna sicaka sako, no‐Tsadoki umperisite, no‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, no‐Solomone isicaka sako, akasimemanga." 
1Kings1:27 Kanene lento yenziwe yinkosi yam ukumkani na, ungasazisanga ke isicaka sako ungubanina oya kuhlala pezu kweterone yenkosi yam ukumkani emva kwayo?" 
1Kings1:28 Wapendula ukumkani u‐Davide, wati: Ndibizele u‐Batesheba. Waza wangena ebusweni bokumkani, wema pambi kwokumkani." 
1Kings1:29 Wandula wafunga ukumkani, wati: Ehleli nje uyehova, okululeyo umpefumlo wam kulo lwonke uxinezeko;" 
1Kings1:30 ngenyaniso, njengokuba bendikufungela uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ndisiti: Ngenyaniso u‐Solomone unyana wako woba ngukumkani emva kwam, waeya kuhlala yena pezu kweterone yam esikundleni sam; ngenyaniso ndiya kwenje njalo namhla nje." 
1Kings1:31 Waza u‐Batesheba watoba ngobuso ngasemhlabeni, waziqubuda pambi kwokumkani, wati: Maipile inkosi yam ukumkani u‐Davide kude kube ngunapakade!" 
1Kings1:32 Wayesiti ukumkani u‐Davide: Ndibizele u‐Tsadoki umperisite, no‐Natane umprofite, no‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada. Baza bangena ebusweni bokumkani." 
1Kings1:33 Waza ukumkani wati kubo: Zitabateni nani izicaka zenkosi yenu, nikwelise u‐Solomone unyana wam pezu kweqwaṙaṙa elilelam, nihle naye ngase‐Gihone;" 
1Kings1:34 mabati u‐Tsadoki umperisite, no‐Natane umprofite, bamtambise kona abe ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli; nize nivutele ngexilongo, niti: Makapile ukumkani u‐Solomone!" 
1Kings1:35 Niya kwandula ninyuke emva kwake, ukuba eze ahlale pezu kweterone yam; ngokuba yena eya kuba ngukumkani esikundleni sam; kanjalo yena ndimmisele ukuba abe yinkosi pezu kwo‐Sirayeli napezu kwo‐Juda." 
1Kings1:36 Waza u‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada wapendula ukumkani, wati: Amene; wanga angatsho njalo uyehova, utixo wenkosi yam ukumkani!" 
1Kings1:37 Njengokuba uyehova ebeko nenkosi yam ukumkani, kwa njalo makabeko no‐Solomone; neterone yake ayenze nkulu pezu kweterone yenkosi yam ukumkani u‐Davide." 
1Kings1:38 Wandula wehla u‐Tsadoki umperisite, no‐Natane umprofite, no‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, naba‐Kereti, naba‐Peleti, bamkwelisa u‐Solomone pezu kwalo iqwaṙaṙa lokumkani u‐Davide, bamkokela ngase‐Gihone." 
1Kings1:39 Waye u‐Tsadoki umperisite watabata upondo lweoli ententeni, wamtambisa u‐Solomone. Baza bavutela ngexilongo, bati bonke abantu: Makapile ukumkani u‐Solomone!" 
1Kings1:40 Basuka bonke abantu benyuka emva kwake, bati abantu kanjalo baloza ngemilozi, bavuya ngovuyo olukulu, wada waṙazuka umhlaba ngentlokoma yabo." 
1Kings1:41 Kekaloku weva u‐Adonija, nabo bonke abamenywa ababenaye, nxa bebegqibile ukudla. Weva no‐Jowabi intlokoma yexilongo, wati: Inganina le ngxokozelo yesixeko sinempitimpiti?" 
1Kings1:42 Nxa asateta, bona ke, u‐Jonatane, unyana ka‐Abiyatare umperisite, wafika; waza wati u‐Adonija: Ngena, ngokuba wena uyindoda etembekileyo, uya kushumayela indaba ezilungileyo." 
1Kings1:43 Wapendula u‐Jonatane wati ku‐Adonija: Okunene inkosi yetu, ukumkani u‐Davide, imenzile u‐Solomone abe ngukumkani;" 
1Kings1:44 waye ukumkani etumile naye, u‐Tsadoki umperisite, no‐Natane umprofite, no‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, naba‐Kereti, naba‐Peleti, abamkwelisile pezu kwalo iqwaṙaṙa lokumkani;" 
1Kings1:45 kanjalo u‐Tsadoki umperisite, no‐Natane umprofite, bamtambisile abe ngukumkani e‐Gihone; benyukile kwa kona bevuya, sada sazanyazanyiswa isixeko: yiyo ingxokozelo eniyivileyo:" 
1Kings1:46 nakanjako u‐Solomone uhleli pezu kweterone yobukumkani. 
1Kings1:47 Ewe kanjako zeza izicaka zokumkani ukutamsanqelisa inkosi yetu, ukumkani u‐Davide, zisiti: Igama lika‐Solomone makalenze utixo lilungile pezu kwegama lako, neterone yake ayenze nkulu pezu kweterone yako. Waza ukumkani wazitoba pezu kwomandlalo." 
1Kings1:48 Kananjalo watsho ukumkani ukuti: Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ondinikileyo namhla ohleliyo pezu kweterone yam, amehlo am ebonile nje!" 
1Kings1:49 Baza bankwantya bonke abamenywa ababekuye u‐Adonija, besuka, bahamba abanye ngabanye ngendlela yabo." 
1Kings1:50 Woyika no‐Adonija ngenxa ka‐Solomone, wesuka, wahamba, waya wabambelela ezimpondweni zesibingelo." 
1Kings1:51 Kwaza kwashunyayelwa ku‐Solomone, kusitwa: Nankuya u‐Adonija esoyika ukumkani u‐Solomone; ngokuba, bona ke, selebambile impondo zesibingelo, esiti: Makandifungele namhla nje ukumkani u‐Solomone, ukuba akayi kufisa isicaka sake ngeṙele." 
1Kings1:52 Wayesiti u‐Solomone: Ukuba uya kwenza njengendoda etembekileyo, akuyi kuwa nalunye lwenwele zake ngasemhlabeni; kodwa ukuba inkohlakalo iya kufunyanwa kuye, uya kwandula afe." 
1Kings1:53 Watuma ke u‐Solomone, baza bamhlisa esibingelweni. Wasuka weza, wazitoba pambi kwokumkani u‐Solomone. Wati u‐Solomone kuye: Yiya endlwini yako." 
1Kings2:1 KWADA kwasondela imihla ka‐Davide yokuba afe; waza wamyolela u‐Solomone unyana wake, esiti:" 
1Kings2:2 Mna ndiyahamba ngendlela yomhlaba wonke: uze womelele, wenze njengendoda;" 
1Kings2:3 uwugcine umyalezelo kayehova, utixo wako, ukuhamba ezindleleni zake, ukugcina imimiso yake, n emiyalelo yake, nezigwebo zake, nezinqi̔nelo zake, njengokuba̔liweyo emtetweni ka‐Mosesi: ukuze ulungiseke kuko konke okwenzayo, nalapo usukuba usinga kona;" 
1Kings2:4 ukuze uyehova aliqinise ilizwi owalitetayo ngam, esiti: Ukuba onyana bako baya kulumkela indlela yabo, ukuhamba ebusweni bam ngenyaniso, ngayo yonke intliziyo yabo, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wabo, akuyi kukunqamkela indoda (wabesitsho) pezu kweterone yakwa‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings2:5 Kanjako wena uyakwazi oko wakwenzayo kum u‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya, oko wakwenzayo kwinkosi ezimbini zemikosi yo‐Sirayeli, ku‐Abenere unyana ka‐Nere, naku‐Hamasa unyana ka‐Yetere, owababulalayo, wapalaza igazi lemfazwe ekuxoleni, wabeka igazi lemfazwe pezu kwombinqo wake obusesinqeni sake, napezu kwezihlangu zake ebezisezinyaweni zake:" 
1Kings2:6 yenza ngoko ngobulumko bako, uze ungazihliseli encw̔abeni izimvi zake ngoxolo." 
1Kings2:7 Kodwa onyana baka‐Barezilai um‐Gileyadi, benzele bona ububele; mababe pakati kwabo abadlayo etafileni yako: ngokuba kwa ngokunjalo bebesondela kum, ndakusaba ebusweni buka‐Abasalome umzalwana wako." 
1Kings2:8 Kanjalo, bona ke, kuko nawe u‐Shimehi unyana ka‐Gera, um‐Benjamine wase‐Bahurime, owandiqalekisayo ngesiqalekiso esinzima, emhleni ndabendisiya e‐Mahanayime: kodwa wehla ukuza kundikaulela e‐Yoredane, ndaza ndamfungela uyehova, ndisiti: Andiyi kukufisa ngeṙele." 
1Kings2:9 Ngako kaloku, ungamyeki angabi natyala, ngokuba wena uyindoda elumkileyo; wauya kukwazi oko unga ukwenza kuye, ukuba uzihlisele encw̔abeni izimvi zake ngegazi." 
1Kings2:10 Wada walala u‐Davide noyise bake, wancw̔atywa esixekweni sika‐Davide." 
1Kings2:11 Kekaloku imihla u‐Davide ebepete ubukumkani ngayo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, ibiyiminyaka engamashumi mane: e‐Hebrone wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yasixe̔nxe, nase‐Yerusaleme wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi matatu anamitatu." 
1Kings2:12 WAZA u‐Solomone wahlala pezu kweterone ka‐Davide uyise; bati ubukumkani bake baqiniswa kakulu. 
1Kings2:13 Wandula weza u‐Adonija unyana ka‐Hagiti ku‐Batesheba unina ka‐Solomone; owati: Luxolo na ukuza kwako? Wayesiti: Luxolo. 
1Kings2:14 Walekela wati: Ndinelizwi kuwe. Wayesiti: Teta. 
1Kings2:15 Waza wati: Uyazi wena ukuba ubukumkani ububobam, nokuba bonke o‐Sirayeli bebebekile ubuso babo pezu kwam, ukuba ndibe ngukumkani; kodwa buguqukile ubukumkani, baba bobomzalwana wam; ngokuba bebubobake buvela kuyehova." 
1Kings2:16 Nakaloku, ndiyacela isicelo sinye kuwe, ungasongi ubuso bam. Wayesiti kaye: Teta." 
1Kings2:17 Waza wati: Zutete ku‐Solomone ukumkani, (ngokuba engayi kusonga ubuso bako,) ukuba andinike u‐Abishage um‐Shunemekazi abe ngumfazi." 
1Kings2:18 Wayesiti u‐Batesheba: Kulungile; ndokutetela kukumkani. 
1Kings2:19 Waza waya u‐Batesheba kukumkani u‐Solomone, ukuba atete kuye ngenxa ka‐Adonija. Wesuka ke ukumkani ukuya kumkaulela, watoba kuye; wandula wahlala eteroneni yake, wambekela unina wokumkani isihlalo; waya wahlala ngasekunene kwake." 
1Kings2:20 Waza wati: Ndiyacela kuwe isicelo sinye esincinane, ungasongi ubuso bam. Wati ukumkani kuye: Cela, ma̔! ngokuba ndingayi kusonga ubuso bako." 
1Kings2:21 Wayesiti: Makanikwe u‐Abishage um‐Shunemekazi ku‐Adonija umzalwana wako abe ngumfazi. 
1Kings2:22 Wapendula ukumkani u‐Solomone, wati kuye unina: Kunganina pofu ukuba umcelele u‐Adonija u‐Abishage um‐Shunemekazi? mcelele ubukumkani nabo; ngokuba engumkuluwe wam yena; ewe cel ela yena, no‐Abiyatare umperisite, no‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya." 
1Kings2:23 Waza ukumkani u‐Solomone wafunga uyehova, esiti: Utixo makenje njalo kum, alekele ukwenje njalo, ukuba u‐Adonija akalitetanga elilizwi ngakubo ubomi bake!" 
1Kings2:24 Ngako kaloku, ehleli nje uyehova, ondiqinisileyo, wandihlalisa pezu kweterone ka‐Davide ubawo, nondenzeleyo indlu, njengoko abekutetile, ngenyaniso namhla uya kufiswa u‐Adonija!" 
1Kings2:25 Wandula watuma ukumkani u‐Solomone ngesandla sika‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada; owamwelayo wada wafa. 
1Kings2:26 Nakuye u‐Abiyatare umperisite wati ukumkani: Hamba uye e‐Hanatote, emasimini ako; ngokuba wena ufanelwe kukufa: kodwa ngelixesha andiyi kukufisa, ngokuba ubuyitwala ityeya yenkosi e nguyehova pambi kwo‐Davide ubawo, nangokuba ububandezelwa kuko konke wabebandezelwa ngako ubawo." 
1Kings2:27 Waza u‐Solomone wamgxota u‐Abiyatare, ukuba angabi ngumperisite kuyehova; kuze kuzalisekiswe ilizwi likayehova, abelitetile pezu kwendlu ka‐Heli e‐Shilo." 
1Kings2:28 Zada zafika indaba ku‐Jowabi; ngokuba u‐Jowabi ebepambukele emva kwo‐Adonija, nangona abengapambukelanga emva kwo‐Abasalome. Wandula u‐Jowabi wesabela ententeni kayehova, wabambelela ezimpondweni zesibingelo." 
1Kings2:29 Kwaza kwashunyayelwa kukumkani u‐Solomone, okokuba u‐Jowabi wesabele ententeni kayehova, nokuba nankuya ngasesibingelweni. Wandula u‐Solomone watuma u‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, esiti: Hamba, uye umwele." 
1Kings2:30 Wasuka u‐Benaya weza ententeni kayehova, wati kuye: Utsho ukumkani ukuti: Puma. Wayesiti: Hai; koko ndiya kufa kwa lapa. Wabuya u‐Benaya wazisa impendulo kukumkani, esiti: Kungokunje watetayo u‐Jowabi, nangokunje wandipendula." 
1Kings2:31 Wati ukumkani kuye: Yenza njengoko akutetileyo, umwele, umncw̔abe; ukuze ususe igazi elingenatyala, elo walipalazayo u‐Jowabi, kwa kum, nakuyo indlu kabawo." 
1Kings2:32 Waye uyehova eya kubuyisa igazi lake pezu kweyake intloko, owawela amadoda amabini abemgqita ngobulungisa nangokulunga, wawabulala ngeṙele, ubawo u‐Davide engazi nje; kwa u‐Abenere unyana ka‐Nere, inkosi yomkosi wo‐Sirayeli, no‐Hamasa unyana ka‐Yetere, inkosi yomkosi wo‐Juda." 
1Kings2:33 Kwa njalo igazi labo liya kubuya pezu kwentloko ka‐Jowabi, napezu kwentloko yenzalo yake kude kube ngunapakade; kodwa ku‐Davide, nakuyo inzalo yake, nakuyo indlu yake, nakuyo iterone yake, kwobako uxolo kude kube ngunapakade luvela kuyehova." 
1Kings2:34 Wasuka wenyuka u‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, wamwela, wamfisa; waza wancw̔atywa endlwini yake entlango." 
1Kings2:35 Wandula ukumkani wammisa u‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada esikundleni sake pezu kwomkosi; no‐Tsadoki umperisite, ukumkani wammisa esikundleni sika‐Abiyatare." 
1Kings2:36 Waza watuma ukumkani wambiza u‐Shimehi, wati kuye: Zakele indlu e‐Yerusaleme, uhlale apo, uze ungapumi kona ukuya nalapa napaya:" 
1Kings2:37 ngokuba kuya kuti ngomhla wokupuma kwako, nxa uya kuwela umlanjana we‐Kidrone, woqinisa ukwazi ukuba uya kufa ngenyaniso; igazi lako loba pezu kweyako intloko." 
1Kings2:38 Wayesiti u‐Shimehi kukumkani: Lilungile ilizwi elo; njengoko ikutetileyo inkosi yam ukumkani, siya kwenje njalo isicaka sako. Waza u‐Shimehi wahlala e‐Yerusaleme imihla yamininzi." 
1Kings2:39 Kwaye kute ekupeleni kweminyaka mitatu, zaqwesha izicaka zibini zika‐Shimehi zaya ku‐Akishe unyana ka‐Mahaka, ukumkani we‐Gate. Kwaza kwaxelwa ku‐Shimehi, kusitwa: Naziya izicaka zako e‐Gate." 
1Kings2:40 Wandula wesuka u‐Shimehi, wabopa iqwaṙashe lake, wahambela e‐Gate ku‐Akishe ukufuna izicaka zake; wahamba ke u‐Shimehi, wabuyisa izicaka zake e‐Gate." 
1Kings2:41 Kwada kwashunyayelwa ku‐Solomone, okokuba u‐Shimehi ebemkile e‐Yerusaleme waya e‐Gate, nokuba ebebuyile." 
1Kings2:42 Waza watuma ukumkani wambiza u‐Shimehi, wati kuye: Andikufungisanga uyehova na, ndanqi̔nisa kuwe, ndisiti: Ngomhla wokupuma kwako, nxa uya kuhamba nalapa napaya, qinisa ukwazi ukuba uya kufa ngenyaniso? waza wati kum: Lilungile ilizwi endilivileyo." 
1Kings2:43 Kunganina ngoko ukuba akugcinanga isifungo sikayehova, nomyalelo endikuyaleleyo ngawo?" 
1Kings2:44 Walekela wati ukumkani ku‐Shimehi: Uyazi wena yonke inkohlakalo, leyo iyaziyo intliziyo yako, obuyenza ku‐Davide ubawo; ngako uyehova uya kubuyisa inkohlakalo yako pezu kweyako intloko;" 
1Kings2:45 kodwa ukumkani u‐Solomone uya kutanyusanqelwa, neterone ka‐Davide yona yoqiniswa pambi kwoyehova kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Kings2:46 Waza ukumkani wamyalela u‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, owapuma ke, wamwela, wada wafa. Kwa njalo ubukumkani bebuqiniswa esandleni sake u‐Solomone." 
1Kings3:1 WAZA u‐Solomone watshatiselana no‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, wayizeka intombi ka‐Faro, wayizisa esixekweni sika‐Davide, wada wagqiba ukwaka indlu yake, nendlu kayehova, nodonga lwe‐Yerusaleme ngento engqongayo." 
1Kings3:2 Kodwa abantu babingela ezindaweni ezipakamileyo, ngokuba bekungeko indlu eyakelwa igama likayehova, kwada kwayimihla leyo." 
1Kings3:3 Waye u‐Solomone emtanda uyehova, ehamba emimisweni ka‐Davide uyise: kodwa wabinga waqumisa ezindaweni ezipakamileyo." 
1Kings3:4 Waza ukumkani waya e‐Gibeyone ukubingela kona; ngokuba leyo ibiyindawo epakamileyo enkulu: iwaka lamadini okutshiswa walinikela u‐Solomone pezu kwesibingelo eso," 
1Kings3:5 e‐Gibeyone wabonakala uyehova ku‐Solomone ngepupa ebusuku; waza utixo wati: Cela into endiya kuyinika kuwe. 
1Kings3:6 Wayesiti u‐Solomone: Usenzele isicaka sako u‐Davide ubawo ububele obukulu, njengokuba ebehamba pambi kwako ngenyaniso, nangobulungisa, nangolungelelwano lwentliziyo kunye nawe; kanjalo umgcinele obububele bukulu, bokuba umnikile unyana ohleli pezu kweterone yake, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje." 
1Kings3:7 Nakaloku, Yehova, Tixo wam! usenzile isicaka sako ukumkani esikundleni sika‐Davide ubawo; kanti mna ndingumntwana omncinane, andikwazi ukupuma nokungena." 
1Kings3:8 Kanjako isicaka sako sipakati kwabantu bako obanyulileyo, abantu abakulu, abangenako ukulinganiswa nokubalwa ngokuba baninzi." 
1Kings3:9 Ngako sinike isicaka sako intliziyo eqondayo, ukuba ndigwebe abantu bako, ukuba ndiqiqe pakati kwokulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo; ngokuba engubanina ongagwebayo aba abantu bako bakulu?" 
1Kings3:10 Kekaloku elozwi belilungile emehlweni kayehova, lokuba u‐Solomone ebecelile lento." 
1Kings3:11 Waza utixo wati kuye: Ngenxa yokuba ucelile lento, ungazicelelanga imihla emininzi, ungazicelelanga nobutyebi, ungacelanga nobomi bentshaba zako, koko uzicelele ingqiqo ukuba uqonde ukugweba;" 
1Kings3:12 bona ke, ndenzile njengamazwi ako; bona ke, ndikupile intliziyo enobulumko nobuqiqo, ekungabangako onjengawe pambili kuwe, nasemva kwako akuyi kuvuka onjengawe." 
1Kings3:13 Nakanjako oko ubungakuceli ndikupile kuwe, kwa ubutyebi nobungcwalisa; ekungayi kubako namnye pakati kwabo okumkani onjengawe yonke imihla yako." 
1Kings3:14 Nanxa uya kuhamba ezindleleni zam, ngokugcina imimiso yam nemiyalelo yam, njengokuba ebehamba u‐Davide uyihlo wako, ndiya kwandula ndolule imihla yako." 
1Kings3:15 Waza wavuka u‐Solomone; kekaloku bona ke, lipupa. Wasuka weza e‐Yerusaleme, wema pambi kwetyeya yocebano lukayehova, wanikela amadini okutshiswa, wenza iminikelo yoxolo, wazenzela zonke izicaka zake isidlo." 
1Kings3:16 OKUYA beza abafazi babini abangamadikazi kukumkani, bema ebusweni bake." 
1Kings3:17 Wati ke omnye umfazi: Ke, nkosi yam! mna nomfazi lo sihleli endlwini nye; ndaza ndazala ndinaye endlwini." 
1Kings3:18 Kwaye kute ngolwesitatu usuku emva kwokuzala kwam, wandula wazala nalomfazi; sabesindawonye tina, kungeko owasemzini nati endlwini, kupela siti sobabini abebesendlwini." 
1Kings3:19 Waza unyana walomfazi wafa ebusuku, ngokuba ebelele pezu kwake." 
1Kings3:20 Wesuka ke pakati kwobusuku, watabata unyana wam engakum, nxa isicakakazi sako sibe silele ubutongo, wamlalisa esifubeni sake, nonyana wake ofileyo wamlalisa esifubeni sam." 
1Kings3:21 Kekaloku ndakuvuka kusasa, ukuba ndanyise unyana wam, nanku efile; kodwa ndakumnakana kusasa, bona ke, ebengenguye unyana wam, lowo ndamzalayo." 
1Kings3:22 Waza wati omnye umfazi: Hai: ohleliyo ngunyana wam, nofileyo ngunyana wako. Wati nalowo: Hai; ofileyo ngunyana wako, nohleliyo ngunyana wam. Bateta njalo ke ebusweni bokumkani." 
1Kings3:23 Wandula wati ukumkani: Omnye uti: Lo ngunyana wam ohleliyo, nonyana wako ngofileyo; kanjalo omnye nti: Hai; ofileyo ngunyana wako, nohleliyo ngunyana wam." 
1Kings3:24 Walekela wati ukumkani: Ndizekele iṙele. Baza bazisa iṙele ebusweni bokumkani. 
1Kings3:25 Wayesiti ukumkani: Nqumlani umntwana ohleliyo kubini, ninike esinye isiqingata kwomnye, nesinye isiqingata kwomnye." 
1Kings3:26 Waza wateta umfazi, abengowake umntwana ohleliyo, kukumkani, ngokuba umbilini wake ubuvuta pezu kwonyana wake, wayesiti: Ke, nkosi yam! mnikeni yena umntwana ohleliyo, nize ningake nimbulale. Kodwa omnye wati: Makangabi ngowam, makangabi ngowako kanjalo; nqumlani." 
1Kings3:27 Wandula wapendula ukumkani, wati: Mnikeni lowo umntwana ohleliyo, nize ningake nimbulale; nguye unina wake." 
1Kings3:28 Baye o‐Sirayeli bonke beva umgwebo abegwebile ngawo ukumkani; baza bamoyika ukumkani: ngokuba bebebona ukuba ubulumko bukatixo bukuye, ukwenza ukugweba." 
1Kings4:1 KWA njalo ukumkani u‐Solomone ebengukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke. 
1Kings4:2 Aba ke bazinkosana abenazo: u‐Hazariya, unyana ka‐Tsadoki, ebelinene;" 
1Kings4:3 u‐Elihorefe no‐Ahiya, onyana baka‐Shisha, bebengababa̔li; u‐Yehoshafate, unyana ka‐Ahilude, ebengumkumbuzi;" 
1Kings4:4 no‐Benaya, unyana ka‐Yoyada, ebepezu kwomkosi; u‐Tsadoki no‐Abiyatare bebengabaperisite;" 
1Kings4:5 no‐Hazariya, unyana ka‐Natane, ebepezu kwabo abongama; no‐Zabude, unyana ka‐Natane, ebelinene, umhlobo wokumkani;" 
1Kings4:6 no‐Ahishare ebepezu kwendlu; no‐Adonirame, unyana ka‐Abeda, ebepezu kwabesitabataba." 
1Kings4:7 Kanjalo u‐Solomone ebenabongama abalishumi linababini pezu kwe‐Sirayeli yonke, abafunzelayo ukumkani nabendlu yake; bebenenyanga nye abanye ngabanye emnyakeni mnye ukuba kufunzelwe." 
1Kings4:8 Ngawo la amagama abo: unyana ka‐Hure, entabeni yakwa‐Frayime:" 
1Kings4:9 unyana ka‐Dekere, e‐Makatse, nase‐Shahalabime, nase‐Bete‐shemeshe, nase‐Elonibete‐hanane:" 
1Kings4:10 unyana ka‐Hesede, e‐Arubote; ebene‐Soko nalo lonke ilizwe lase‐Hefere:" 
1Kings4:11 unyana ka‐Abinadabi, kuzo zonke induli zase‐Dore; u‐Tafate, intombi ka‐Solomone, ebengumfazi wake:" 
1Kings4:12 u‐Bahana, unyana ka‐Ahilude, ebe ne‐Tahanaki ne‐Megido, nayo yonke i‐Bete‐shane, engase‐Tsaretana ezantsi kwe‐Yezerele, kutabata e‐Bete‐shane kude kwase‐Abele‐mehola, kude kwasele kwe‐Yokemame:" 
1Kings4:13 unyana ka‐Gebere, e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi; ebenemizi ka‐Yahire unyana ka‐Manase, ese‐Gileyadi; ebenesahlulo se‐Ragobi, esise‐Bashane, izixeko ezikulu zingamashumi matandatu, zinendonga nemivalo yexina:" 
1Kings4:14 u‐Ahinadabi, unyana ka‐Hido, ebe ne‐Mahanayime:" 
1Kings4:15 u‐Himahatse ebekwa‐Nefatali; kanjalo yena wazeka u‐Basemate, intombi ka‐Solomone, abe ngumfazi:" 
1Kings4:16 u‐Bahana, unyana ka‐Hushai, ebekwa‐Ashere nase‐Halote:" 
1Kings4:17 u‐Yehoshafate, unyana ka‐Paruha, ebekwa‐Yisakare:" 
1Kings4:18 u‐Shimehi, unyana ka‐Ela, ebekwa‐Benjamine:" 
1Kings4:19 u‐Gebere, unyana ka‐Uri, ebeselizweni le‐Gileyadi, ilizwe lika‐Sihone ukumkani waba‐Amori, nelika‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane; yena ebekupela kwomongama obekulo ilizwe elo."
