1Kings4:20 O‐Juda no‐Sirayeli bebebaninzi, njengentlabati engaselwandle ngobuninzi, besidla, besela, bevuya nokuvuya." 
1Kings4:21 Wati u‐Solomone wapata ubukosi pezu kwabo bonke ubukumkani, kwa kuwo umlambo kude kwasezweni lama‐Filistiya, nakude kwasemdeni we‐Jipete: bayisa iminikelo, bamkonza u‐Solomone yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi." 
1Kings4:22 Kekaloku ukutya kuka‐Solomone, okwemini nye, bekuzikore zomgubo ocolekileyo ezingamashumi matatu, nekore zomgubo ezingamashumi matandatu;" 
1Kings4:23 nenkabi ezityetyisiweyo ezilishumi, nenkabi zamadlelo ezimashumi mabini, negusha ezilikulu; ngapandle kwamaxama, namabadi, namaza, nenkuku ezityetyisiweyo." 
1Kings4:24 Ngokuba ebenobukosi pezu kwalo lonke ilizwe elinganeno kwomlambo, kwa kuyo i‐Tipesahi kude kwase‐Gaza, pezu kwabo bonke okumkani nganeno kwomlambo; waye enoxolo ngawo onke amacala ake ngokungqonga." 
1Kings4:25 Bati o‐Juda no‐Sirayeli bahlala ngokunqaba, abanye ngabanye ngapantsi kwomti weveyine wabo nangapantsi kwomkiwane wabo, kwa se‐Dane kude kwase‐Beresheba, yonke imihla ka‐Solomone." 
1Kings4:26 Kanjalo u‐Solomone ebenezitale zamahashe enqwelwana zake ezingamawaka angamashumi mane, namahashe okukwelwa angamawaka alishumi linesibini." 
1Kings4:27 Kekaloku abongama abo babefunzela ukumkani u‐Solomone, nabo bouke abasondelayo etafileni yokumkani u‐Solomone, abanye ngabanye ngenyanga yabo; abaswelekisa nto:" 
1Kings4:28 neṙalasi nenca bazizisela amahashe lawo namahashe azimbaleki kulondawo, apo baye beko kona, abanye ngabanye njengesiko labo." 
1Kings4:29 Kanjako utixo wampa u‐Solomone ubulumko, nengqondo eninzi kakulu, nobubanzi bentliziyo, njengentlabati eselunxwemeni lwolwandle." 
1Kings4:30 Babubukulu ubulumko buka‐Solomone pezu kwobulumko bawo onke amadoda asempumalanga, napezu kwabo bonke ubulumko bama‐Jipete:" 
1Kings4:31 ewe ebelumkile pezu kwabantu bonke; pezu kwo‐Etane um‐Ezera, no‐Hemani, no‐Kalikoli, no‐Dareda, onyana baka‐Mahole: lwati udumo lwake lwabako kuzo zonke izizwe ezingqongayo." 
1Kings4:32 Wayeteta imizekeliso engamawaka matatu; nengoma zake zibe ziliwaka elinantlanu. 
1Kings4:33 Wateta nangemiti, kwa kuyo isedare ese‐Lebanone kwada kwakuyo ihisope epumayo eludongeni; wateta nangezilo, nangentaka, nangezinambuzane, nangentlanzi." 
1Kings4:34 Kwaza kwavela kubo bonke abantu ukuva ubulumko buka‐Solomone, kubo bonke okumkani bomhlaba, ababevile ngobulumko bake." 
1Kings5:1 KEKALOKU u‐Hirame, ukumkani we‐Tire, wasusa izicaka zake ukuya ku‐Solomone; ngokuba ebevile okokuba bamtambisile yena abe ngukumkani esikundleni soyise: ngokuba u‐Hirame ebemtandile u‐Davide ngamaxesha onke." 
1Kings5:2 Wandula watuma u‐Solomone ku‐Hirame ukuti: 
1Kings5:3 Wena uyamazi u‐Davide ubawo ukuba ebekohliwe kukwaka indlu egameni likayehova, utixo wake, ngenxa yemfazwe ezibe zimngqonga, wada uyehova wazibeka ngapantsi kwemizantsi yenyawo zake." 
1Kings5:4 Kodwa ngoku uyehova, utixo wam, undipumzile ngamacala onke, kungeko umalane, kungeko nebaqo elibi." 
1Kings5:5 Kekaloku bona ke, ndiyacinga ukwaka indlu egameni likayehova, utixo wam, njengokuba ebeteta uyehova ku‐Davide ubawo, esiti: Unyana wako, lowo endiya kummisa esikundleni sako pezu kweterone yako, nguye oya kwaka indlu egameni lam." 
1Kings5:6 Ngako kaloku xela ukuba kundigaulelwe imiti yesedare e‐Lebanone; zaye izicaka zam ziya kuba nezako, nomvuzo wezicaka zako ndowunika kuwe, njengako konke uya kukutsho: ngokuba usazi wena ukuba akuko pakati kwetu namnye okwaziyo ukugaula imiti njengama‐Tsidone." 
1Kings5:7 Kwabekute, akuva u‐Hirame amazwi ka‐Solomone, wandula wavuya kakulu, wati: Makabongwe uyehova namhla nje, onike ku‐Davide unyana olumkileyo pezu kwababantu bakulu." 
1Kings5:8 Waza watuma u‐Hirame ku‐Solomone ukuti: Ndivile oko utumile kum ngako; ndiya kuyenza yonke intando yako ngemiti yesedare, nangemiti yeberoshe:" 
1Kings5:9 izicaka zam ziya kuhla nayo e‐Lebanone ziyise elwandle; ndandiya kuyisa ngemitantatu pezu kwolwandle kulondawo uya kunditumela ilizwi ngayo, ndize ndiyicite kona, wandule wena uyisuse: kanjako wena uya kufeza intando yam, ngokunika abendlu yam ukudla." 
1Kings5:10 Kwa njalo ke u‐Hirame wanika u‐Solomone imiti yesedare nemiti yeberoshe, njengayo yonke intando yake." 
1Kings5:11 Waza u‐Solomone wanika u‐Hirame ikore ezingamawaka angamashumi mabini zenqolowa, ibe kukudla kwabendlu yake, nekore ezimashumi mabini zeoli enqushelweyo: wenje njalo u‐Solomone ukunika u‐Hirame ngomnyaka ngomnyaka." 
1Kings5:12 Kekaloku uyehova wampa u‐Solomone ubulumko, njengokuba ebetetile kuye: kwaye kuko uxolo pakati kwo‐Hirame no‐Solomone, balwenza ucebano bobabini." 
1Kings5:13 Waye ukumkani u‐Solomone wenyusa isitabataba kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli; isitabataba eso besingamawaka angamashumi matatu amadoda. 
1Kings5:14 Waza wawatuma e‐Lebanone, amawaka alishumi ngenyanga ngenyanga ngokuguqulelana: inyanga inye ebese‐Lebanone, inyanga zimbini ebesekaya: waye u‐Adonirame epezu kwesitabataba eso." 
1Kings5:15 Kanjako u‐Solomone wabenamawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe abetwala imitwalo, namawaka angamashumi asibozo ababazi ezintabeni;" 
1Kings5:16 ngapandle kwenkosi zabongama baka‐Solomone ababepezu kwomsebenzi, amawaka matatu anamakulu matatu, ezibe zinobukosi pezu kwabantu abawenza umsebenzi." 
1Kings5:17 Waxela ukumkani, baza banqikela amatye amakulu, amatye anqabileyo, kuze kusekwe indlu leyo ngamatye aqandulweyo." 
1Kings5:18 Bati abaki baka‐Solomone nabaki baka‐Hirame bawaqandula, kwa nama‐Gebali: kwa njalo ke balungisa imiti namatye ukuba kwakiwe indlu leyo." 
1Kings6:1 KWAZA kwati, ngowamakulu mane anamashumi asibozo umnyaka emva kwokupuma kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli elizweni le‐Jipete, ngomnyaka wesine wobukumkani buka‐Solomone pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, ngenyanga yo‐Zive: eyiyo inyanga yesibini, waqala ukwaka indlu kayehova." 
1Kings6:2 Nalondlu ukumkani u‐Solomone wayakela uyehova, bebuzikubite ezingamashumi matandatu ubude bayo, n ekubite ezingamashumi mabini ububanzi bayo, nekubite ezingamashumi matatu ubupakamo bayo." 
1Kings6:3 Nentendelezo ngapambi kwetempile yendlu, bebuzikubite ezingamashumi mabini ubude bayo ngapambi kwobubanzi bendlu; bebuzikubite ezilishumi ububanzi bayo ngapambi kwendlu." 
1Kings6:4 Wayenzela indlu ifenstile ezivaliweyo ngamanqwanqwa. 
1Kings6:5 Wayesaka ngaseludongeni lwendlu inkambili ngokungqonga, ngasezindongeni zendlu ngokungqonga, ezetempile nezendawo yokupendula: wazenza inkambili zasecaleni ngento engqongayo:" 
1Kings6:6 inkambili yasezantsi ibizikubite ezintlanu ububanzi bayo, neyapakati ibizikubite ezintandatu ububanzi bayo, neyesitatu ibizikubite ezisixe̔nxe ububanzi bayo; ngokuba ebeyenzele indlu izifinyelo ngento engqongayo ngapandle, ukuze zingabambeki ezindongeni zendlu." 
1Kings6:7 Kekaloku indlu le, ekwakiweni kwayo, yakiwa ngamatye asel’ elungisiwe engekasiwa; ukuba bekungavakali izando, nezembe, n enye impahla yesincete kulondlu, ekwakiweni kwayo." 
1Kings6:8 Ucango lweyapakati inkambili yasecaleni belungelokunene icala lendlu; kwaza kwenyukwa ngezinyukelo ezijikelelayo ukuya kweyapakati, n okunyuka kweyapakati ukuya kweyesitatu." 
1Kings6:9 Kwa njalo wayaka indlu, wayigqiba; waza wayifulela indlu ngemiqadi nangeplanke zemiti yesedare." 
1Kings6:10 Wayesaka inkambili ngakuyo yonke indlu, buzikubite ezintlanu ubupakamo bazo: zabambelela endlwini ngemiti yesedare." 
1Kings6:11 Landula leza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Solomone, lisiti:" 
1Kings6:12 Indlu le, oyakayo wena, ukuba uya kuhamba ngemimiselo yam, uzenze izigwebo zam, uyigcine yonke imiyalelo yam ngokuhamba ngayo, ndiya kwandula ndiliqinise ilizwi lam nawe, endandiliteta ku‐Davide uyihlo wako:" 
1Kings6:13 ndandiya kuhlala pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; ewe andiyi kushiya abantu bam o‐Sirayeli. 
1Kings6:14 Kwa njalo u‐Solomone wayaka indlu leyo, wayigqiba." 
1Kings6:15 Wayesaka indonga zendlu pakati ngeplanke zemiti yesedare; kwa kuwo umzantsi wendlu kude kwakuzo indonga zesifulelwa, waleka ngemiti pakati; nomzantsi wendlu wawaleka ngeplanke zemiti yeberoshe." 
1Kings6:16 Wayesaka ikubite ezimashumi mabini ecaleni lasemva lendlu ngeplanke zemiti yesedare, kwa kuwo umzantsi kude kwakuzo indonga: wazakela yona pakati, zibe yindawo yokupendula, eyingcwele yezingcwele." 
1Kings6:17 Ibizikubite ezimashumi mane indlu leyo, kwa itempile engapambili." 
1Kings6:18 Nesedare pezu kwendlu pakati yona ibilisetyenzwa eliqingqiweyo lekomkomereṙa nentyatyambo ezibenqekileyo; konke bekuyisedare, kungeko nalitye elibonakalayo." 
1Kings6:19 Nendawo yokupendula wayilungisa endlwini pakati, ukuba kubekwe kona ityeya yocebano lukayehova." 
1Kings6:20 Kanjako indawo yokupendula ngapambili ibizikubite ezimashumi mabini ubude bayo, nekubite ezimashumi mabini ububanzi bayo, nekubite ezimashumi mabini ubupakamo bayo; wayaleka ngegolide enqabileyo: wasaleka nesibingelo ngesedare." 
1Kings6:21 Kwa njalo u‐Solomone wayaleka indlu leyo pakati ngegolide enqabileyo: wayedlulisa isikuselo ngemixokolelwane yegolide pambi kwendawo yokupendula, wasaleka ngegolide." 
1Kings6:22 Nayo yonke indlu wayaleka ngegolide, ide yagqitywa yonke indlu; nesibingelo sipela, esibe sipambi kwendawo yokupendula, wasaleka ngegolide." 
1Kings6:23 Napakati kwendawo yokupendula wazenza ikerubime zambini ngemiti yeoli: zibe zizikubite zilishumi ubupakamo benye. 
1Kings6:24 Lazikubite zintlanu elinye ipiko lekerubime, nekubite zintlanu elinye ipiko lekerubime: kwa sencameni yelinye ipiko layo, kude kwasencameni yelinye ipiko layo, ikubite zazilishumi." 
1Kings6:25 Yabizikubite ezilishumi nekerubime yesibini: zaye zinomlinganiswa mnye nesimilo sinye ikerubime ezo zombini. 
1Kings6:26 Ubupakamo benye ikerubime bebuzikubite ezilishumi; ibinjalo nekerubime yesibini. 
1Kings6:27 Wayebeka ikerubime ezo endlwini yapakati: kwaye kutwabululwa amapiko ekerubime, ukuba ipiko lenye lafikela olunye udonga, nepiko lenye ikerubime lafikela olunye udonga; kanjako amapiko azo afikelana pakati kwendlu." 
1Kings6:28 Ezokerubime wazaleka ngegolide. 
1Kings6:29 Nazo zonke indonga zendlu ngento engqongayo waziqingqela iziba̔lo eziqingqiweyo zekerubime, nemiti yepalime, nentyatyambo ezibenqekileyo, pakati nangapandle." 
1Kings6:30 Nomzantsi wendlu wawaleka ngegolide, pakati nangapandle." 
1Kings6:31 Nocango lwendawo yokupendula walwenzela amapepa ngemiti yeoli: umqolo n emigubasi ibisisiqingata sesihlanu sodonga. 
1Kings6:32 Amapepa lawo omabini ebengemiti yeoli; napezu kwawo waqingqa iziqingqwa zekerubime, nemiti yepalime, nentyatyambo ezibenqekileyo, wazaleka ngegolide; wafaka igolide pezu kwekerubime napezu kwemiti yepalime kanjako." 
1Kings6:33 Nangokunjalo walwenzela ucango lwetempile imigubasi ngemiti yeoli, isisiqingata sesine sodonga." 
1Kings6:34 Namapepa omabini wona ebengawemiti yeberoshe: amapepa omabini olunye ucango ebengajingayo, namapepa omabini olunye ucango ebengajingayo." 
1Kings6:35 Wayeqingqa pezu kwawo ikerubime, nemiti yepalime, nentyatyambo ezibenqekileyo, wazaleka ngegolide ilungisiwe pezu kwokuqingqiweyo." 
1Kings6:36 Waza waka ibala lapakati, linenṙozo zintatu zamatye aqandulweyo, noṙozo lunye lwemiqadi yesedare." 
1Kings6:37 Ngomnyaka wesine ibisekwa indlu kayehova, ngenyanga yo‐Zive;" 
1Kings6:38 nangomnyaka weshumi linesinye, ngenyanga yo‐Bule, eyinyanga yesibozo, ibigqitywa leyondlu, ngazo zonke indawo zayo, nangaso sonke isimilo sayo. Kwa njalo ebeyaka iminyaka yasixe̔nxe." 
1Kings7:1 KODWA indlu yake u‐Solomone wabeyaka iminyaka yalishumi linesitatu; wada wayigqiba yonke indlu yake. 
1Kings7:2 Wayaka indlu yehlati le‐Lebanone, ilikulu lekubite ubude bayo, namashumi mahlanu ekubite ububanzi bayo, namashumi matatu ekubite ubupakamo bayo, pezu kwenṙozo ezine zentsika zesedare, nemiqadi yesedare pezu kwazo intsika." 
1Kings7:3 Yabifulelwa ngesedare pezulu pezu kweplanke, ezibe zipezu kwentsika ezimashumi mane anesihlanu, zilishumi linesihlanu ngoṙozo." 
1Kings7:4 Kwaye kuko izituba, inṙozo ezintatu, ifenstile ingapezu kwefenstile amaxesha matatu." 
1Kings7:5 Zonke ingcango nemigubasi zibe zinamacala mane, kwa n ezituba; kanjalo ifentsile ibimalungana nefenstile amaxesha matatu." 
1Kings7:6 Wayesenza intendelezo ngentsika, izikubite ezimashumi mahlanu ubude bayo, nekubite ezimashumi matatu ububanzi bayo; nentendelezo pambi kwazo; nentsika nendawo yeplanke pambi kwazo." 
1Kings7:7 Waza wenzela iterone intendelezo, apo wagwebayo kona, intendelezo yokugweba; ibe yalekiwe ngesedare, kwa kuwo umzantsi emhlabeni kude kwakuwo umzantsi pezulu." 
1Kings7:8 Nendlu yake, apo wahlala kona kwelinye ibala ngapakati kuyo intendelezo, ibinjengesetyenzwa elinjalo. Kanjako wayenzela indlu intombi ka‐Faro, leyo abeyizekile u‐Solomone, njengayo intendelezo leyo." 
1Kings7:9 Zonke ezi zibe zingamatye anqabileyo, njengemilinganiswa yamatye aqandulweyo, esikiwe ngesaṙa, pakati nangapandle, kwa kulo isekwa kude kwakulo ulundi, nangapandle ngasebaleni elikulu." 
1Kings7:10 Kwaye kusekwa ngamatye anqabileyo, amatye amakulu, amatye ekubite zilishumi, namatye ekubite zisibozo." 
1Kings7:11 Napezulu bekuko amatye anqabileyo, njengemilinganiswa yamatye aqandulweyo, nesedare." 
1Kings7:12 Kanjalo ibala elikulu ngento engqongayo libe linenṙozo zintatu zamatye aqandulweyo, noṙozo lunye lwemiqadi yesedare; njengakwelapakati ibala lendlu kayehova, nakuyo intendelezo yendlu." 
1Kings7:13 WAZA watuma ukumkani u‐Solomone, wamtabata u‐Hirame e‐Tire." 
1Kings7:14 Ebengunyana womhlolokazi yena, kwisizwe sika‐Nefatali, oyise ebeyindoda yase‐Tire, incibi yexina; wabezele bubulumko, nengqondo, nokwazi, ukwenza yonke imisebenzi ngexina. Wayesiza kukumkani u‐Solomone, wawenza wonke umsebenzi wake." 
1Kings7:15 Ngokuba wadala intsika zambini ngexina, buzikubite ezilishumi linesibozo ubupakamo benye intsika; kanjalo usinga lwekubite ezilishumi linambini belungqonga enye intsika." 
1Kings7:16 Wenza nentloko zambini ngexina etyityishiweyo, zokubeka ezincameni zentsika; ubupakamo benye intloko bebuzikubite ezintlanu, nobupakamo benye intloko bebuzikubite ezintlanu." 
1Kings7:17 Kwaye kuko iminata yesetyenzwa elipanjanisiweyo, n ezitsaba zesetyenzwa lemixokelelwane, kuzo intloko ezibe zisezincameni zentsika; isixe̔nxe kwenye intloko, nesixe̔nxe kwenye intloko." 
1Kings7:18 Wayesenza intsika ezo, nenṙozo zambini ngento engqongayo pezu kwomnata umnye, kuze kugujungelwe intloko ezibe zisencameni, ngegranate; wenje njalo nakwenye intloko." 
1Kings7:19 Kekaloku intloko, ezibe zisencameni yentsika, zazingesetyenzwa eliyinyibibaṙa entendelezweni, ikubite zane." 
1Kings7:20 Kanjalo intloko pezu kwentsika ezo zombini zibe zinegranate nangapezulu, malungana nendawo epumayo ebingakuwo umnata: kwaye kuko negranate ezimakulu mabini ngenṙozo ngokungqonga pezu kwenye intloko." 
1Kings7:21 Waza wazimisa intsika ezo entendelezweni yetempile: wayimisa intsika yasekunene, wayibiza ngegama elingu‐Yakine; wayimisa intsika yasekohlo, wayibiza ngegama elingu‐Bohazi." 
1Kings7:22 Napezu kwencam yentsika bekuko isetyenzwa eliyinyibibaṙa: kwa njalo kwafezwa umsebenzi wentsika. 
1Kings7:23 Walwenza nolwandle olutyityishiweyo; lwaluzikubite ezilishumi kwa kuwo omnye umpeto kwada kwakuwo omnye umpeto, luyinqukuva ngokungqonga, luzikubite ezintlanu ubupakamo balo; lwalujikelezwa ngentambo yekubite ezimashumi matatu ngento engqongayo." 
1Kings7:24 Nangapantsi kwompeto walo ngokungqonga bekuko ikomkomereṙa zilungqonga, zilishumi ekubiteni nye, zilujikelezela ulwandle ngokungqonga: zatyityishwa ikomkomereṙa ezo ngenṙozo zambini, lwakutyityishwa lona." 
1Kings7:25 Lwema pezu kwenkabi ezilishumi linambini, ezintatu zibeka ngasenode, nezintatu zibeka ngasentshonalanga, nezintatu zibeka ngasesuyide, nezintatu zibeka ngasempumalanga; lwalupezulu ulwandle pezu kwazo, yonke imiva yazo ingapakati." 
1Kings7:26 Isibili salo besibububanzi besandla, nompeto walo ubunjengesetyenzwa lompeto wendebe, njeng entyatyambo zenyibiba: lwabamba ibate ezingamawaka mabini." 
1Kings7:27 Wenza nezikondo ezilishumi ngexina; zazikubite ezine ubude besikondo sinye, nekubite ezine ububanzi baso, nekubite ezintatu ubupakamo baso." 
1Kings7:28 Lilo eli isetyenzwa lazo izikondo: zibe zinendini, kanjalo indini ezo zibe zipakati kwembombo:" 
1Kings7:29 napezu kwendini, ezibe zipakati kwembombo, bekuko ingonyama, nenkabi, nekerubime; napezu kwembombo bekuko isikondo ngapezulu; nangapantsi kwazo ingonyama nenkabi bekuko izinto ezibandakanyiweyo zesetyenzwa elikandelweyo." 
1Kings7:30 Kwaye kuko ivili zexina zazine kwisikondo sinye, namaceba exina; amagumbi aso omane ebenamagxalaba; ngapantsi kwaso isihlambelo ebeko amagxalaba atyityishiweyo, ngecala lezinto ezibandakanyiweyo ezinye ngezinye." 
1Kings7:31 Umlomo waso pakati kwentloko nangapezulu ubuyikubite nye; kanjalo umlomo waso ubuquvile njeng esetyenzwa lesikondo, ikubite nesiqingata sekubite; nakanjako pezu kwomlomo waso bekuko iziqingqwa; kodwa indini zazo bezinamacala mane, zingezeziquvileyo." 
1Kings7:32 Kekaloku ivili zone zibe zingapantsi kwendini, nease zevili zona zibe zikuso isikondo; nobupakamo bayo ivili ibiyikubite nesiqingata sekubite." 
1Kings7:33 Nesetyenzwa lazo ivili libe linjengesetyenzwa levili yenqwelo: iase zazo, nenafe zazo, nefelenge zazo, nespeke zazo, zonke zatyityishwa." 
1Kings7:34 Kwaye kuko amagxalaba mane kuwo amagumbi mane esikondo sinye: amagxalaba aso ebe puma kwa kuso isikondo. 
1Kings7:35 Napezu kwengcopo yesikondo bekuko into equvileyo ngokungqonga, isiqingata sekubite ubupakamo bayo; napezu kwengcopo yesikondo izipumelo zaso nendini zaso zibe zi puma kwa kuso." 
1Kings7:36 Wayeziqingqa pezu kwamacwecwe ezipumelo zaso napezu kwendini zaso ikerubime, nengonyama, nemiti yepalime, njengendawo yezinye ngezinye, nezinto ezibandakanyiweyo ngokungqonga." 
1Kings7:37 Njengokunje wazenza izikondo zolishumi: bekuko ukutyityishwa kunye, umlinganiswa umnye, isimilo sinye, kuzo zonke." 
1Kings7:38 Wazenza nezihlambelo ezilishumi ngexina; isihlambelo sinye sabamba ibate zamashumi mane; isihlambelo sinye sibe sizikubite zine; pezu kwazo izikondo zolishumi ezinye ngezinye bekuko isihlambelo sinye. 
1Kings7:39 Waza wazibeka izikondo ezihlanu ngelokunene icala lendlu, nezihlanu ngelokohlo icala lendlu; nolwandle walubeka ngelokunene icala lendlu, ngasempumalanga, malungana nesuyide." 
1Kings7:40 Kanjalo u‐Hirame wazenza imbiza, nezikotululo, nezitya zokufefela. Wada u‐Hirame wagqiba ukuwenza wonke umsebenzi, owawenzela ukumkani u‐Solomone ngenxa yendlu kayehova:" 
1Kings7:41 intsika zimbini, nezikanda zentloko ezibe zisencameni yentsika zombini; neminata mibini yokugubungela izikanda zozibini zentloko ezibe zisencameni yazo intsika;" 
1Kings7:42 negranate ezingamakulu mane zeminata yomibini, inṙozo zimbini zegranate kuwo umnata mnye, kuze kugujungelwe izikanda zozibini zentloko ezibe zisencameni yazo intsika;" 
1Kings7:43 kwa nezikondo zilishumi, nezihlambelo zilishumi pezu kwazo;" 
1Kings7:44 nolwandle lunye, nenkabi ezilishumi linambini ngapantsi kwolwandle olo;" 
1Kings7:45 nembiza, nezikotululo, nezitya zokufefela: nazo zonke ezimpahla, owati u‐Hirame wazenzela ukumkani u‐Solomone ngenxa yendlu kayehova, wazenza ngexina egudisiweyo." 
1Kings7:46 Etafeni lase‐Yoredane wazityityisha ukumkani, emhlabeni oludongwe pakati kwe‐Sukote ne‐Tsaretane." 
1Kings7:47 Zonke ezimpahla waziyeka u‐Solomone zingalinganiswa, ngenxa yobuninzi obukulu kakulu bazo; bekungenakupengululwa ukuba nzima kwexina." 
1Kings7:48 Wayezenza u‐Solomone zonke impahla ezizezendlu kayehova: isibingelo segolide; netafile, ekube kupezu kwayo izonka zokubonakala, ngegolide;" 
1Kings7:49 nekandelare, isihlanu ngasekunene nesihlanu ngasekohlo, pambi kwendawo yokupendula, ngegolide enqabileyo; nentyatyambo, nezibane, nezitabatelo, ngegolide;" 
1Kings7:50 nezikotile, nezicimo, nezitya zokufefela, negxebeka, neziqumelo, ngegolide enqabileyo; nehinje zengcango zeyapakati indlu, zeyingcwele yezingcwele indawo, ne zengcango zendlu, zetempile, ngegolide." 
1Kings7:51 Kwada kwafezwa wonke umsebenzi, owati ukumkani u‐Solomone wawenzela indlu kayehova. Waza u‐Solomone wazingenisa izinto ezingcwele zika‐Davide uyise, isilivere, negolide, nempahla, wazibeka pakati kwendyebo zendlu kayehova." 
1Kings8:1 WANDULA u‐Solomone wabahlanganisa abadala bo‐Sirayeli, nabo bonke abazintloko zezizwe, inkosi zendlu zoyise zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ukuza kukumkani u‐Solomone e‐Yerusaleme, ukuba bayinyuse ityeya yocebano lukayehova esixekweni sika‐Davide, esiyiyo i‐Ziyone." 
1Kings8:2 Aza onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ahlanganiselwa kukumkani u‐Solomone, ngenyanga yo‐Etanime, emtendelekweni; yona yinyanga yesixe̔nxe." 
1Kings8:3 Beza ke bonke abadala bo‐Sirayeli; bati abaperisite bayifunqula ityeya. 
1Kings8:4 Baza benyusa ityeya kayehova, nentente yentlangano, nazo zonke impahla ezingcwele ezibe zikuyo intente leyo; ezi zinto bazinyusa abaperisite naba‐Levi." 
1Kings8:5 Kanjalo ukumkani u‐Solomone, nayo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli abebehlanganisene ngakuye, a bebenaye pambi kwetyeya, bebebinga igusha nenkabi, ezazingenakubalwa nokulinganiswa ngokuba zininzi." 
1Kings8:6 Baza abaperisite bayingenisa ityeya yocebano lukayehova endaweni yayo, endaweni yokupendula yendlu, kweyingcwele yezingcwele, ngapantsi kwamapiko ekerubime." 
1Kings8:7 Ngokuba ikerubime zatwabulula amapiko omabini ngapezu kwendawo yetyeya; kanjalo ikerubime zagubungela ityeya nezibonda zayo pezulu. 
1Kings8:8 Kwandula kwar̔olwa izibonda, ukuba zabonakala incam zezibonda kweyingcwele indawo pambi kwendawo yokupendula, kanti bezingabonakali ngapandle; ziko nakona kude kube namhla nje." 
1Kings8:9 Bekungeko nto etyeyeni, kupela ngamacwecwe amatye omabini, abe ebekwa kona ngu‐Mosesi e‐Horebe, okuya uyehova walwenza ucebano nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ekupumeni kwalo elizweni le‐Jipete." 
1Kings8:10 Kwaza kwati, bakupuma abaperisite kweyingcwele indawo, landula ilifu layizalisa indlu kayehova;" 
1Kings8:11 bada bakohlwa abaperisite kukuma ukukonza ngenxa yelifu elo; ngokuba ubungcwalisa bukayehova bebuzalisile indlu kayehova. 
1Kings8:12 Waza wati u‐Solomone: Uyehova ute uya kuhlala esitokotokweni. 
1Kings8:13 Sendikwakele ngenyaniso indlu yokuhlala, indawo yokuhlala kwako kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Kings8:14 Wandula ukumkani waguqula ubuso bake, watamsanqelisa yonke intlanganiso yo Sirayeli; (yati yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli yema;)" 
1Kings8:15 wayesiti: Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, owateta ngomlomo wake ku‐Davide ubawo, waza wazalisekisa ngesandla sake, esiti:" 
1Kings8:16 Kuselokwalomhla endapumisayo abantu bam o‐Sirayeli e‐Jipete, andinyulanga nasinye isixeko kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, ukuba kwakiwe indlu, lize igama lam libe kona; koko ndimnyulile u‐Davide ukuba abe pezu kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings8:17 Kwaye kusentliziyweni ka‐Davide ubawo, ukwakela igama likayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, indlu." 
1Kings8:18 Kodwa uyehova wati ku‐Davide ubawo: Okokuba bekusentliziyweni yako ukwakela igama lam indlu, ulungisile ukuba bekusentliziyweni yako." 
1Kings8:19 Noko indlu leyo akuyi kuyaka wena; kodwa unyana wako oya kupuma esinqeni sako, nguye oya kwakela igama lam indlu leyo." 
1Kings8:20 Kwa njalo uyehova uqinisile ilizwi lake abelitetile; ngokuba ndivukile esikundleni sika‐Davide ubawo, ndihleli nje pezu kweterone yakwa‐Sirayeli, njengokuba etetile uyehova; ndandakele igama likayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, indlu." 
1Kings8:21 Kanjalo ndimisele kona indawo yetyeya, apo lukona ucebano lukayehova, olo walwenzayo nobawo betu, nxa wabapumisayo elizweni le‐Jipete." 
1Kings8:22 Waza u‐Solomone wema pambi kwesibingelo sikayehova, ebusweni bayo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli, wazolula izandla zake ngasezulwini," 
1Kings8:23 wati: Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! akuko tixo njengawe, ezulwini pezulu, napezu kwomhlaba ezantsi, ogcinela izicaka zako, ezihambayo pambi kwako ngayo yonke intliziyo yazo, ucebano nobubele:" 
1Kings8:24 ogcinele isicaka sako u‐Davide, ubawo wam, oko wakuteta kuye: ngokuba utetile ngomlomo wako, nangesandla sako uzalisekisile, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje." 
1Kings8:25 Ngako kaloku, Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! gcinela isicaka sako u‐Davide, ubawo wam, oko ukutetileyo kuye, usiti: Akuyi kukunqamkela indoda ebusweni bam, ihleli pezu kweterone yakwa‐Sirayeli; kupela ukuba onyana bako baya kulumkela indlela yabo, bahambe pambi kwam, njengokuba wena uhambile pambi kwam." 
1Kings8:26 Nakaloku, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! malinyaniswe ke ilizwi lako, elo ulitetileyo kwisicaka sako u‐Davide, ubawo wam." 
1Kings8:27 Kodwa utixo uya kuhlala ngenyaniso na emhlabeni? bona ke, izulu, nezulu lamazulu, alingekubambe: kancinane kangakananina ngakumbi ke lendlu endiyakileyo?" 
1Kings8:28 Uze ubeke noko kuwo umtandazo wesicaka sako, nakuso isitaṙuziso saso, Yehova, Tixo wam! upulapule isikalo nomtandazo sitandaza ngawo isicaka sako ebusweni bako namhla:" 
1Kings8:29 ukuba amehlo ako abe evulekile pezu kwalendlu emini nasebusuku, pezu kwendawo ute ngayo: Lobako igama lam kona: ukuba upulapule umtandazo siya kutandaza ngawo isicaka sako kulendawo." 
1Kings8:30 Uze upulapule isitaṙuziso sesicaka sako, nesabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, oko baya kutandaza kulendawo; uve wena endaweni yokuhlala kwako, ezulwini, uti wakuva uxolele." 
1Kings8:31 Okuya kwonayo umntu ngakuye ummelwane wake, aze abeke pezu kwake isifungo sokumfungisa, siti isifungo size pambi kwesibingelo sako kulendlu;" 
1Kings8:32 wandule wena uve ezulwini, wenze, ulungise izicaka zako, umgwebe okohlakeleyo, ngokunika indlela yake pezu kwentloko yake, umgwebele olungileyo, ngokumnika njengobulungisa bake." 
1Kings8:33 Xeshekweni abantu bako o‐Sirayeli babetwa pambi kwotshaba, ngokuba bonile ngakuwe; baze babuyele kuwe, badumise igama lako, batandaze, bakutaṙuzise kulendlu;" 
1Kings8:34 wandule wena uve ezulwini, uxolele isono sabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, ubabuyisele emhlabeni owabuwunika koyise babo." 
1Kings8:35 Xeshekweni livingcekile izulu, kungeko imvula, ngokuba bonile ngakuwe; ukuba bayatandaza kulendawo, badumise igama lako, baguquke esonweni sabo, oko ubabandezelayo;" 
1Kings8:36 wandule wena uve ezulwini, uxolele isono sezicaka zako, nesabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, oko ubafundisayo indlela yako elungileyo abaya kuhamba ngayo; uze unise imvula pezu kwelizwe lako, elo ulinikileyo ebantwini bako libe lilifa." 
1Kings8:37 Nxa kubako indlala elizweni, nxa kubako isifo esibubisayo, nxa kubako imbabala, isihumba, inkumbi, uṙuxeshe; nxa intshaba zabo zibavingcela elizweni lezixeko zabo; nxa kubako isibulawa esinjanina, nesifo esinjanina:" 
1Kings8:38 konke ukutandaza, konke ukutaṙuzisa, okuya kwenziwa ngumntu otile, umhlaumbi ngabo bonke abantu bako o‐Sirayeli, oko baya kwazi abanye ngabanye isibulawa sezabo intliziyo, bazolule izandla zabo kulendlu;" 
1Kings8:39 wandule wena uve ezulwini, uxolele, wenze, ubanike abanye ngabanye njengazo zonke indlela zabo, abantliziyo uzaziyo; (ngokuba nguwe wedwa ozaziyo intliziyo zabo bonke onyana babantu;)" 
1Kings8:40 ukuze bakwoyike yonke imihla abaya kubudla ubomi ngayo pezu kwobuso bomhlaba, owabuwunika kobawo betu." 
1Kings8:41 Nakanjako ngaye owolunye uhlanga, ongenguye owabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, kodwa uvele elizweni elikude ngenxa yegama lako;" 
1Kings8:42 (ngokuba beya kuva igama lako elikulu, nesandla sako esomeleleyo, nengalo yako eyolulweyo;) nxa aya kuza, atandaze kulendlu;" 
1Kings8:43 yiva wena ezulwini, endaweni yokuhlala kwako, wenze ngako konke aya kubiza kuwe ngako owolunye uhlanga lowo; ukuze bonke abantu bomhlaba balazi igama lako, boyike wena, njengabantu bako o‐Sirayeli; bazi kanjalo ukuba igama lako libiziwe pezu kwendlu le endiyakileyo." 
1Kings8:44 Nxa abantu bako bapumayo ukuya kulwa ngakuzo intshaba zabo, ngendlela uya kubatuma ngayo, baze batandaze kuyehova, ngakuso esisixeko usinyulileyo, na ngakuyo lendlu endiyakileyo ngenxa yegama lako;" 
1Kings8:45 wandule uve ezulwini ukutandaza kwabo nokutaṙuzisa kwabo, ulenze ibango labo." 
1Kings8:46 Nxa bonayo ngakuwe, (ngokuba kungeko umntu ongoniyo,) uti wena ubaqumbele, ubanikele ebusweni botshaba, bade abatimbi babo babatimbele elizweni lotshaba, elikude umhlaumbi elikufupi;" 
1Kings8:47 ukuba bayakumbuza intliziyo zabo elizweni apo batinjelwe kona, baguquke, bakutaṙuzise elizweni labatimbi babo, besiti: Sonile, senzile ngobugwenxa, senza okukohlakeleyo;" 
1Kings8:48 bade babuyele kuwe ngayo yonke intliziyo yabo, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wabo, elizweni lentshaba zabo ezibatimbileyo, batandaze kuwe ngakulo ilizwe labo, elo wabulinika koyise babo, ngakuso esisixeko usinyulileyo, na ngakuyo lendlu endiyakileyo ngenxa yegama lako;" 
1Kings8:49 wandule uve ezulwini, endaweni yokuhlala kwako, ukutandaza kwabo nokutaṙuzisa kwabo, ulenze ibango labo," 
1Kings8:50 ubaxolele abantu bako abonileyo ngakuwe, nazo zonke izigqito zabo abagqitileyo ngakuwe ngazo, ubanike izibele ebusweni babo babatimbileyo, baze babe nobubele ngakubo:" 
1Kings8:51 ngokuba bona bengabantu bako, nelifa lako, owabaku̔payo elizweni le‐Jipete, pakati kwesidlangalala sesincete:" 
1Kings8:52 ukuze amehlo ako abe evulekile ekutaṙuziseni kwesicaka sako, nasekutaṙuziseni kwabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, ukuba ubapulapule kuko konke ukubiza kwabo kuwe." 
1Kings8:53 Ngokuba wena ubahlulile kubo bonke abantu bomhlaba, babe lilifa lako, njengokuba utetile ngesandla sika‐Mosesi isicaka sako, wakupumisa obawo betu e‐Jipete, Nkosi, Yehova!" 
1Kings8:54 Kwaza kwati, nxa agqibileyo u‐Solomone ukutandaza kuyehova wonke lomtandazo nesitaṙuziso, wesuka ebusweni besibingelo sikayehova, ekuguqeni emadolweni ake, enezandla zake zoluliwe ngasezulwini." 
1Kings8:55 Waza wema, watamsanqelisa yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli ngelizwi elikulu, esiti:" 
1Kings8:56 Makabongwe uyehova, obanikileyo abantu bake o‐Sirayeli ukupumla, njengoko konke akutetileyo: akutshitshanga nanye indawo kulo lonke ilizwi lake elilungileyo, abeliteta ngesandla sika‐Mosesi isicaka sake." 
1Kings8:57 Wanga uyehova, utixo wetu, angaba nati, njengokuba ebenobawo betu; angasishiyi, angasilahli nokusilahla;" 
1Kings8:58 atobele intliziyo zetu ngakuye, ukuba sihambe kuzo zonke indlela zake, nokuba sigcine imiyalelo yake, nezimiselo zake, nezigwebo zake, abeyalela obawo betu ngazo." 
1Kings8:59 Nalamazwi am, enditaṙuzisile ngawo pambi kwoyehova, makabe kufupi noyehova, utixo wetu, emini nasebusuku, ukuba alenze ibango lesicaka sake, nebango labantu bake o‐Sirayeli, indawo yemihla ngemihla ngomhla wayo:" 
1Kings8:60 ukuze bakwazi bonke abantu bomhlaba ukuba uyehova unguye utixo, kungeko wumbi." 
1Kings8:61 Maibe ngoko intliziyo yenu ikolisekile ngakuyehova, utixo wetu, ukuhamba ngezimiselo zake, nokugcina imiyalelo yake, njengokuba kunjalo namhla." 
1Kings8:62 Kwaza kwabinga ukumkani, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye, umbingo pambi kwoyehova." 
1Kings8:63 Waye u‐Solomone wabinga umbingo weminikelo yoxolo, owawubingela uyehova, inkabi ezingamawaka angamashumi mabini anamabini, negusha ezingamawaka alikulu linamashumi mabini. Benje njalo ukutwasisa indlu kayehova ukumkani nalo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings8:64 Wati ukumkani ngomhla lowo wenza ngcwele umpakati webala elipambi kwayo indlu kayehova; ngokuba wabelungisa kona amadini okutshiswa, neminikelo yokudla, nenqata leminikelo yoxolo; ngenxa yokuba isibingelo sexina, esipambi kwoyehova, sibe sincinane kokokuba samkele amadini okutshiswa, neminikelo yokudla, nenqata leminikelo yoxolo." 
1Kings8:65 Wayesenza u‐Solomone ngeloxesha umtendeleko, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye, intlanganiso enkulu, ivela kwa sekungenweni kwe‐Hamati kwada kwasemlanjeni wase‐Jipete, pambi kwoyehova, utixo wetu, imihla esixe̔nxe nemihla esixe̔nxe, imihla elishumi linamine." 
1Kings8:66 Ngomhla wesibozo wabandulula abantu; abatamsanqelisayo ukumkani, bahambela ezintenteni zabo, bevuya, becwayitile ngentliziyo, pezu kwako konke okulungileyo abekwenzile uyehova ku‐Davide isicaka sake, nako‐Sirayeli abantu bake." 
1Kings9:1 KWAYE kute, nxa u‐Solomone abegqibile ukwaka indlu kayehova, nendlu yokumkani, nako konke ukunqwenela kuka‐Solomone owabetanda ukukwenza," 
1Kings9:2 wandula wabonakala uyehova ku‐Solomone ngokwesibini, njengokuba ebebonakele kuye e‐Gibeyone." 
1Kings9:3 Wayesiti uyehova kuye: Ndivile umtandazo wako, nesitaṙuziso sako utaṙuzisile ngaso ebusweni bam; ndenzile ngcwele indlu le oyakileyo, ukuba ndibeke igama lam kona kude kube ngunapakade; kwakuya kubako kona amehlo am nentliziyo yam imihla yonke." 
1Kings9:4 Kanjalo wena ukuba uya kuhamba pambi kwam, njengokuba ebehamba u‐Davide uyihlo wako, ngolungelelwano lwentliziyo, nangokulungisa, ukwenza ngako konke endikuyaleleyo; nokuba uya kugcina izimiselo zam nezigwebo zam:" 
1Kings9:5 ndiya kwandula ndiqinise Iterone yobukumkani bako pezu kwo‐Sirayeli kude kube ngunapakade; njengokuba benditeta ku‐Davide uyihlo wako, ndisiti: Akuyi kukunqamkela indoda pezu kweterone yakwa‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings9:6 Kanti ukuba niya kuka nibuye ekundilandeleni, nina nabantwana benu, nize ningagcini imiyalelo yam, n ezimiselo zam endizibekileyo pambi kwenu, kodwa niye nikonze otixo bambi, nitobe pambi kwabo:" 
1Kings9:7 ndiya kwandula ndinqamle o‐Sirayeli emhlabeni, endiwunikileyo kubo; nalendlu, endiyingcwalisele igama lam, ndoyilahla ebusweni bam; waye u‐Sirayeli eya kuba yinto yokuzekeliswa nelizwi lokuhlekisa pakati kwabantu bonke:" 
1Kings9:8 nendlu le, e pezulu, osukuba edlula ngakuyo woti nqa, enze amakwelo; kwakuya kutiwa: Kungenxa yanina enzileyo uyehova njengokunjalo kwelilizwe nakulendlu?" 
1Kings9:9 kwakuya kutiwa: Ngenxa yokuba bamshiya uyehova, utixo wabo, owabapumisayo oyise babo elizweni le‐Jipete, nokuba babambelela kotixo bambi, batoba pambi kwabo, babakonza: kungoko uyehova azisileyo pezu kwabo bonke obububi." 
1Kings9:10 KWAZA kwati ekupeleni kweminyaka emashumi mabini, okuya u‐Solomone abezakile izindlu ezo zombini, indlu kayehova, nendlu yokumkani," 
1Kings9:11 (u‐Hirame, ukumkani we‐Tire, ebencedile u‐Solomone ngemiti yesedare, nangemiti yeberoshe, nangegolide, ngako konke ukutanda kwake,) wandula ukumkani u‐Solomone wampa u‐Hirame izixeko ezimashumi mabini elizweni le‐Galili." 
1Kings9:12 Waza wapuma u‐Hirame e‐Tire ukuya kubona izixeko abezipiwe ngu‐Solomone; kodwa bezingafanele emehlweni ake. 
1Kings9:13 Wati ngoko: Zezinina izixeko ezi uzipile kum, mzalwana wam? Wayezibiza ngokuti lilizwe le‐Kabule kwada kwanamhla nje." 
1Kings9:14 Kekaloku u‐Hirame wabezitumile kukumkani italente zegolide zalikulu linamashumi mabini. 
1Kings9:15 Nantsi indawo yesitabataba sabantu, abesinyusile ukumkani u‐Solomone, ukuba kwakiwe indlu kayehova, nendlu yake, ne‐Milo, nodonga lwe‐Yerusaleme, ne‐Hatsore, ne‐Megido, ne‐Gezere:" 
1Kings9:16 (Wayenyukile u‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, wayibamba i‐Gezere, wayitshisa ngomlilo, naba‐Kanane ababehlala esixekweni wababulala, nayo yona wayinika ibe libaso kwintombi yake umfazi ka‐Solomone:" 
1Kings9:17 waza u‐Solomone wayaka i‐Gezere, ne‐Bete‐horone yasezantsi," 
1Kings9:18 ne‐Bahalate, ne‐Tademore entlango, kwelolizwe," 
1Kings9:19 nazo zonke izixeko zokubekela abenazo u‐Solomone, nezixeko zenqwelo, nezixeko zamahashe okukwelwa, noko asukuba ebenqwenela u‐Solomone ukukwaka e‐Yerusaleme, nase‐Lebanone, nakulo lonke ilizwe lobukosi bake:)" 
1Kings9:20 Bonke abantu ababesele kubo aba‐Amori, ama‐Hete, ama‐Perizi, ama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi, abebengengabo abosapo luka‐Sirayeli," 
1Kings9:21 abantwana babo ababesele emva kwabo elizweni, abo usapo luka‐Sirayeli belukohliwe ukubalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni, kwa pezu kwabo wabeka u‐Solomone ukunikela ngenkonzo kwada kwanamhla nje." 
1Kings9:22 Kanti kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli u‐Solomone akenza nalinye ikonza; kodwa lona belungamadoda okulwa, nezicaka zake, nenkosana zake, nenjengele zake, nabapati benqwelo zake, nabakweli bake bamahashe." 
1Kings9:23 Kulo olu beziko inkosi zabongama ababepezu kwomsebenzi ka‐Solomone, amakulu mahlanu anamashumi mahlanu, ezibe zinobukosi pezu kwabantu abenzayo emsebenzini." 
1Kings9:24 Koko intombi ka‐Faro yenyuka esixekweni sika‐Davide ukuya endlwini yayo, abeyakele yona u‐Solomone: oko wayaka i‐Milo." 
1Kings9:25 Waye u‐Solomone amaxesha matatu emnyakeni mnye enikela amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yoxolo, pezu kwesibingelo abesakele uyehova, waqumisa pezu kwaso isibingelo esibe sipambi kwoyehova: kwa njalo wayigqiba indlu." 
1Kings9:26 Kanjako ukumkani u‐Solomone wazenza inqanawa e‐Hetsiyone‐gebere, engase‐Elote, elunxwemeni lwolwandle olubomvu, elizweni le‐Edome." 
1Kings9:27 Waza u‐Hirame watuma ezinqanaweni ezo izicaka zake, amadoda enqanawa abelwazi ulwandle, kunye nezicaka zika‐Solomone." 
1Kings9:28 Zaye zisiya e‐Ofire, zatabata kona igolide, italente ezingamakulu mane anamashumi mabini, zayizisa kukumkani u‐Solomone." 
1Kings10:1 WATI ukumkanikazi we‐Sheba, akuva udumo luka‐Solomone ngokwegama likayehova, weza ukumlinga ngezintsonkotelo." 
1Kings10:2 Wayesiza e‐Yerusaleme nomkosi omkulu kunene, inkamela zitwele izimnandi, nento eninzi yegolide, namatye anqabileyo: wati akuza ku‐Solomone, wateta naye konke okusentliziyweni yake." 
1Kings10:3 Waza u‐Solomone wamtyilela onke amazwi ake: akwabiko nento ebimfihlelwa ukumkani, abengamtyileli yona." 
1Kings10:4 Kekaloku nxa ukumkanikazi we‐Sheba wabona bonke ubulumko buka‐Solomone, nendlu abeyakile," 
1Kings10:5 nokutya kwesitebe sake, nokuhlala kwezicaka zake, nokuma kwabakonzi bake, nezivato zabo, nabancamli bake, nesinyukelo sake, owenyuka ngaso ukuya endlwini kayehova, akwabi sabiko umoya kuye." 
1Kings10:6 Wayesiti kukumkani: Beliyinene ilizwi elo bendiliva elizweni lam, ngemicimbi yako nangobulumko bako." 
1Kings10:7 Kodwa bendingakolwa ngamazwi lawo, ndide ndafika, aza abona amehlo am: kekaloku bona ke, andixelelwanga nesiqingata; ugqitisile ngobulumko nangobutamsanqa iṙeto endalivayo." 
1Kings10:8 Anenyweba amadoda ako, zinenyweba ezizicaka zako, ezimiyo futi ebusweni bako, ezivayo ubulumko bako." 
1Kings10:9 Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wako, owakukolelayo, ukuba akubeke pezu kweterone yakwa‐Sirayeli. Ngokuba uyehova ebatandile o‐Sirayeli ngonapakade, kukona akumiseleyo ube ngukumkani, ukwenza ubugwebo nobulungisa." 
1Kings10:10 Waza wamnika ukumkani italente zegolide zalikulu elinamashumi mabini, nento eninzi yezimnandi, namatye anqabileyo: bekungasiza izimnandi kanjako ngokuba zininzi njengezo ukumkanikazi we‐Sheba wazinika kukumkani u‐Solomone." 
1Kings10:11 Nakanjalo inqanawa zika‐Hirame, ezatuta igolide e‐Ofire, zavela e‐Ofire nemiti yelamuge emininzi kakulu, namatye anqabileyo." 
1Kings10:12 Waye ukumkani ngemiti yelamuge leyo wenzela indlu kayehova nendlu yokumkani izixaso, wenz ela abaculi ikinore nenebele kanjalo: bekungasiza imiti yelamuge enjalo, bekungabonwa enjalo kanjako, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
1Kings10:13 Waza ukumkani u‐Solomone wamnika ukumkanikazi we‐Sheba konke ukutanda kwake, oko wakucelayo, ngapandle kwoko wamnikayo ngokwesisa sokumkani u‐Solomone. Wada wabuya, wahambela kwelake ilizwe, yena nezicaka zake." 
1Kings10:14 Kekaloku ukulinganiswa kwayo igolide ebisiza ku‐Solomone emnyakeni mnye, bezizitalente zegolide ezingamakulu matandatu anamashumi matandatu enesitandatu;" 
1Kings10:15 ngapandle kwebisiza ngabaṙatyazi, nokutenga kwabatengisi, nabo bonke okumkani base‐Arabi, nenkosi zelizwe." 
1Kings10:16 Waza ukumkani u‐Solomone wenza amakaka angamakulu mabini ngegolide ekandelweyo; kwafakwa amakulu matandatu eshekele zegolide pezu kwekaka linye: 
1Kings10:17 wazenza nengweletshetshe ezingamakulu matatu ngegolide ekandelweyo; kwafakwa imina zegolide zantatu pezu kwengweletshetshe inye: waza ukumkani wazibeka endlwini yehlati le‐Lebanone. 
1Kings10:18 Waye ukumkani kanjako wayenza iterone enkulu yopondo lwendlovu, wayaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo." 
1Kings10:19 Iterone leyo ibinezinyukelo zitandatu, nentloko yeterone ibiyinqukuva ngasemva; bekuko nezayamelo ngelicala nangeliya ngasendaweni yokuhlala, nengonyama zimbini zimi kufupi nezayamelo ezo:" 
1Kings10:20 zema kona nengonyama zilishumi linambini ngelicala nangeliya pezu kwazo izinyukelo zitandatu: akwenziwanga enjalo kobunye ubukumkani. 
1Kings10:21 Kanjako zonke impahla zokusela zokumkani u‐Solomone zibe zizezegolide, nazo zonke impahla zendlu yehlati le‐Lebanone zibe zizezegolide enqabileyo: bekungeko e zesilivere; ibingabalelwa luto yona emihleni ka‐Solomone." 
1Kings10:22 Ngokuba ukumkani ebenenqanawa zase‐Tareshishe pezu kwolwandle, kunye nenqanawa zika‐Hirame: kwakanye eminyakeni mitatu zafika inqanawa zase‐Tareshishe, zizisa igolide, nesilivere, n empondo zendlovu, nenkau, namaseme." 
1Kings10:23 Kwa njalo ukumkani u‐Solomone wayemkulu pezu kwabo bonke okumkani bomhlaba, ngobutyebi nangobulumko." 
1Kings10:24 Kanjako umhlaba wonke wabufuna ubuso buka‐Solomone, ukuze babuve ubulumko bake, obo wabubeka utixo entliziyweni yake." 
1Kings10:25 Baye besiza abanye ngabanye nebaso labo, impahla zesilivere, nempahla zegolide, nengubo, nezixo̔bo, nezimnandi, n amahashe, namaqwaṙaṙa; into yomnyaka ngomnyaka." 
1Kings10:26 Waye u‐Solomone kanjalo wabuta inqwelo namahashe okukwelwa; wabenenqwelo zaliwaka linamakulu mane, namahashe okukwelwa angamawaka alishumi linesibini; owazibeka ezixekweni zenqwelo, nakuye ukumkani e‐Yerusaleme." 
1Kings10:27 Kanjako ukumkani wayenza isilivere e‐Yerusaleme njengamatye, nemiti yesedare wayenza njengemikiwane esezihlanjeni, ngokuba mininzi." 
1Kings10:28 Nokuvela kwamahashe ka‐Solomone e‐Jipete, wati umhlambi wabatengi bokumkani wamkela umhlambi wamahashe ngenani elitile." 
1Kings10:29 Kwaye kunyuka kwapuma inqwelo e‐Jipete nge shekele zesilivere ezingamakulu matandatu, nehashe ngezilikulu linamashumi mahlanu: kwaye kunjalo bekuku̔tshelwa bonke okumkani bama‐Hete, nokumkani be‐Siriya, ngesandla sabo." 
1Kings11:1 KODWA ukumkani u‐Solomone watanda abafazi bezinye intlanga abaninzi, ngapandle kwentombi ka‐Faro, ama‐Mowabikazi, aba‐Hamonikazi, ama‐Edomekazi, ama‐Tsidonekazi, n ama‐Hetekazi;" 
1Kings11:2 abentlanga abete uyehova elusatsheni luka̔‐Sirayeli: Aniyi kungena kuzo, kanjalo zona aziyi kungena kuni; ngenyaniso, ziya kupambukisa intliziyo yenu ukuya emva kwotixo bazo: kwa kubo aba wanamatela u‐Solomone ngotando." 
1Kings11:3 Wayenabafazi abangamakulu asixe̔nxe, bengamakosikazi, namashweshwe angamakulu matatu: bada abafazi bake bapambukisa intliziyo yake." 
1Kings11:4 Ngokuba bekute ngexesha lobudala buka‐Solomone, abafazi bake bapambukisa intliziyo yake ukuya emva kwotixo bambi; yaye intliziyo yake yayingakolisekile ngakuyehova, utixo wake, njengentliziyo ka‐Davide uyise." 
1Kings11:5 Ngokuba u‐Solomone ebelandela u‐Hashetorete utixokazi wama‐Tsidone, no‐Milikome intshontsho yaba‐Hamoni." 
1Kings11:6 Waye u‐Solomone kanjalo ekwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, engakolisi ukulandela uyehova, njengo‐Davide uyise." 
1Kings11:7 Oko wayaka u‐Solomone indawo epakamileyo ku‐Kemoshe intshontsho yama‐Mowabi, entabeni epambi kwe‐Yerusaleme, naku‐Moleke intshontsho yosapo luka‐Hamoni." 
1Kings11:8 Wayesenzela bonke abafazi bake bezinye intlanga kwa ngokunjalo, abaqumisayo babingelela kotixo babo." 
1Kings11:9 Waza waqumba uyehova ngakuye u‐Solomone, ngokuba intliziyo yake ipambukile kuyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, obebonakele kuye kabini," 
1Kings11:10 wamyalela ngalendawo, ukuba makangalandeli otixo bambi: kodwa akagcina oko wamyalelayo uyehova." 
1Kings11:11 Ngako wati uyehova ku‐Solomone: Ngenxa yokuba iko lento kuwe, ukuba akugcinanga ucebano lwam nezimiselo zam endikuyaleleyo ngazo, ndiya kuṙazula ngenyaniso ubukumkani obu kuwe, ndibunike kwisicaka sako." 
1Kings11:12 Andiyi kukwenza oku noko emihleni yako, ngenxa ka‐Davide uyihlo wako; ndobuṙazula esandleni sonyana wako." 
1Kings11:13 Kodwa andiyi kuṙazula ubukumkani bonke; isizwe sinye ndosinika kunyana wako, ngenxa ka‐Davide isicaka sam, nangenxa ye‐Yerusaleme endiyinyulileyo." 
1Kings11:14 Waza uyehova wamvusela u‐Solomone umalane, u‐Hadade um‐Edome: yena ebengowenzalo yokumkani e‐Edome." 
1Kings11:15 Ngokuba bekute, akuba u‐Davide ebese‐Edome, nxa u‐Jowabi inkosi yomkosi ebenyukile ukuya kuncw̔aba abahlatyiweyo, seebulele nje bonke ababudoda e‐Edome;" 
1Kings11:16 (ngokuba u‐Jowabi ebesala kona inyanga zantandatu, no‐Sirayeli bonke, wada wanqamla bonke ababudoda e‐Edome;)" 
1Kings11:17 wandula wesaba u‐Hadade, yena namadoda atile angama‐Edome ezicakeni zoyise kunye naye, ukuya e‐Jipete; waye u‐Hadade engumfana omncinane." 
1Kings11:18 Baye besuka e‐Midiyane, beza e‐Parane; batabata amadoda nabo e‐Parane, bada bafika e‐Jipete, ku‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete; owamnika indlu, wamabela ukudla, wamnika nomhlaba." 
1Kings11:19 Waza u‐Hadade wafumana ufefe olukulu emehlweni ka‐Faro, wada wamnika abe ngumfazi udade womfazi wake, udade ka‐Tapenesi ukumkanikazi." 
1Kings11:20 Wati udade ka‐Tapenesi wamzalela u‐Genubate, unyana wake, obelunyulwa ngu‐Tapenesi endlwini ka‐Faro; waza u‐Genubate wasendlwini ka‐Faro pakati kwonyana baka‐Faro." 
1Kings11:21 Kekaloku akuva u‐Hadade e‐Jipete, ukuba u‐Davide walala noyise bake, nokuba u‐Jowabi inkosi yomkosi ufile, wati u‐Hadade ku‐Faro: Ndindulule, ukuba ndiye elizweni lam." 
1Kings11:22 Wandula wati u‐Faro kuye: Pofu uswele nto nina kum, ukuba, bona ke, ufuna ukuya elizweni lako? Wayesiti: Akuko nto; kodwa kaundindulule noko." 
1Kings11:23 Kanjako utixo wamvusela omnye umalane, u‐Rezone unyana ka‐Eliyada, owesaba ku‐Hadadezere ukumkani we‐Tsoba inkosi yake." 
1Kings11:24 Wada wahlanganisela kuye amadoda, waba yinkosi yebandla, okuya u‐Davide wababulala abase‐Tsoba: basuka baya e‐Damakusi, bahlala kona, bapata ubukumkani e‐Damakusi." 
1Kings11:25 Wayengumalane yena ko‐Sirayeli yonke imihla ka‐Solomone, ngapandle kwobubi a bebenza u‐Hadade: wayetiya o‐Sirayeli, wapata ubukumkani pezu kwe‐Siriya." 
1Kings11:26 No‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, um‐Eferata wase‐Tsereda, isicaka sika‐Solomone, onina ebenegama elingu‐Tseruha, umhlolokazi, kwa naye wapakamisa isandla ngakuye u‐Solomone." 
1Kings11:27 Nantsi indawo wapakamisa isandla ngakuye ukumkani ngayo: u‐Solomone waka i‐Milo, wavingca intanda zesixeko sika‐Davide uyise." 
1Kings11:28 Kekaloku indoda leyo, u‐Jerobome, ibiliṙoti elikalipileyo: waza u‐Solomone, akubona indodana leyo ukuba yawenza umsebenzi, wayongamisa pezu kwawo wonke umtwalo wendlu ka‐Josefe." 
1Kings11:29 Kwaza kwati ngeloxesha, akuba u‐Jerobome epumile e‐Yerusaleme, wandula u‐Ahiya um‐Shilo, umprofite, wamfumana endleleni; waye yena ezinamekile ngengubo entsha; babebodwa bobabini endle:" 
1Kings11:30 waza u‐Ahiya wabamba ingubo entsha ebikuye, wayiṙazula ibe ziziziba zilishumi linazibini;" 
1Kings11:31 wayesiti ku‐Jerobome: Zitabatele iziziba zibe lishumi; ngokuba esitsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuṙazula ubukumkani esandleni sika‐Solomone, ndinike wena izizwe ezilishumi:" 
1Kings11:32 (kodwa isizwe sinye soba sesake, ngenxa yesicaka sam u‐Davide, nangenxa ye‐Yerusaleme, isixeko endisinyulileyo kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli:)" 
1Kings11:33 ngenxa yokuba bandishiyile, nokuba batobile pambi kwo‐Hashetorete utixokazi wama‐Tsidone, n o‐Kemoshe utixo wama‐Mowabi, no‐Milikome utixo wosapo luka‐Hamoni, bengahambanga nje ezindleleni zam, ukwenza okufaneleyo emehlweni am, kwa izimiselo zam nezigwebo zam, njengo‐Davide uyise." 
1Kings11:34 Kodwa andiyi kususa ubukumkani bonke esandleni sake; koko ndiya kumenza abe yinkosi yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi, ngenxa ka‐Davide isicaka sam, endamnyulayo, ngokuba wabegcina imiyalelo yam nezimiselo zam:" 
1Kings11:35 kodwa ndiya kususa ubukumkani esandleni sonyana wake, ndibunike kuwe, kwa izizwe ezilishumi." 
1Kings11:36 Nakunyana wake ndiya kunika isizwe sinye, ukuze u‐Davide isicaka sam abe nesibane ngamaxesha onke ebusweni bam e‐Yerusaleme, isixeko endisinyulele mna, ukuba ndibeke igama lam kona." 
1Kings11:37 Kanjalo wena ndokutabata, wauya kupata ubukumkani pezu kwako konke okukanukwayo ngumpefumlo wako, ube ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings11:38 Kwakuya kuti, ukuba uya kupulapula konke endikuyalelayo ngako, uhambe ezindleleni zam, wenze okufaneleyo emehlweni am, ukugcina imimiselo yam nemiyalelo yam, njengokuba wenje njalo u‐Davide isicaka sam, ndiya kwandula ndibe nawe, ndikwakele indlu eqinileyo, njengokuba ndimakele u‐Davide, ndikunike o‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings11:39 Ndandiya kubandezela inzalo ka‐Davide ngenxa yoku; kodwa akuyi kuba njalo amaxesha onke. 
1Kings11:40 Ngako u‐Solomone wafuna ukumfisa u‐Jerobome. Wandula wesuka u‐Jerobome, wesabela e‐Jipete, ku‐Shishaki ukumkani we‐Jipete, wabeko e‐Jipete kwada kwafa u‐Solomone." 
1Kings11:41 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Solomone, nako konke wakwenzayo, nobulumko bake, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi ka‐Solomone?" 
1Kings11:42 Nexesha u‐Solomone wabepata ubukumkani ngalo e‐Yerusaleme pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke, ibiyiminyaka engamashumi mane." 
1Kings11:43 Wada u‐Solomone walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa esixekweni sika‐Davide uyise; waza u‐Rehobome unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings12:1 WASUKA u‐Rehobome waya e‐Shekeme: ngokuba bebeze e‐Shekeme o‐Sirayeli bonke, ukuze bamenze ukumkani." 
1Kings12:2 Kwaye kute, kwakuviwa ngu‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, (kekaloku yena ebeseko e‐Jipete, ngokuba ebesabile ebusweni buka‐Solomone ukumkani; waza u‐Jerobome wahlala e‐Jipete:" 
1Kings12:3 bada batuma bambiza;) kwandul’ ukuza u‐Jerobome nayo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli, bateta ku‐Rehobome, besiti:" 
1Kings12:4 Uyihlo wako wayenza lukuni iyokwe yetu; uz’ uti wena kaloku wenze lula ubukonzo boyihlo obulukuni, neyokwe enzima abeyibeka pezu kwetu, sasiya kukukonza." 
1Kings12:5 Wayesiti kubo: Mkani kanjako intsuku zibe ntatu, nandule nibuye nize kum. Bemka ke abantu." 
1Kings12:6 Waza ukumkani u‐Rehobome wacebisana namaxego, abemi ebusweni buka‐Solomone uyise, nxa abesahleli, wati: Niti nina uku ndi cebisa nina, kuze kupendulwe ababantu?" 
1Kings12:7 Ateta kuye, esiti: Ukuba uya kuba sisicaka kwababantu namhla, ubakonze, ubapendule, utete kubo amazwi alungileyo, baya kwandula babe zizicaka zako imihla yonke." 
1Kings12:8 Kodwa washiya icebo lamaxego, elo abemcebisile ngalo, waya wacebisana namadodana abekulile kunye naye, abemi ebusweni bake." 
1Kings12:9 Wayesiti kuwo: Lelinina icebo nilinikayo nina, ukuba sipendule ababantu, abatetileyo kum, besiti: Yenza lula iyokwe ayibekileyo pezu kwetu uyihlo wako?" 
1Kings12:10 Aza ateta kuye amadodana abekulile kunye naye, esiti: Uya kutsho kwababantu abatetileyo kuwe, besiti: Uyihlo wako wayenza nzima iyokwe yetu, kodwa wena yenze lula pezu kwetu: uya kutsho kubo ukuti: Ucikicane wam woba mkulu kuso isinqe sobawo isibili sake." 
1Kings12:11 Ukuba kaloku ubawo unitwesile ngeyokwe enzima, mna ke ndiya kwongeza kuyo iyokwe yenu: ubawo unohlwayile ngezwiniya, kodwa mna ndonohlwaya ngonomadudwane." 
1Kings12:12 Kwa njalo kweza u‐Jerobome nabo bonke abantu ku‐Rehobome ngosuku lwesitatu, njengokuba ebetetile ukumkani, esiti: Buyani nize kum ngosuku lwesitatu." 
1Kings12:13 Waza ukumkani wapendula abantu ngokulukuni, walishiya icebo lamaxego, elo amcebisa ngalo," 
1Kings12:14 wateta kubo njengecebo lamadodana, esiti: Ubawo wenza nzima iyokwe yenu, kodwa mna ndiya kwongeza kuyo iyokwe yenu; ubawo wanohlwaya ngezwiniya, kodwa mna ndiya kunohlwaya ngonomadudwane." 
1Kings12:15 Akapulapula ke ukumkani ebantwini; ngokuba belulujiko luvela kuyehova, ukuze aliqinise ilizwi lake, elo walitetayo uyehova ngaye u‐Ahiya um‐Shilo ku‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati." 
1Kings12:16 Bati bakubona bonke o‐Sirayeli ukuba ukumkani akapulapuli kubo, bapendula abantu kukumkani, besiti: Sisipina isabiwo esinaso ku‐Davide? akuko kuti nelifa kunyana ka‐Jese: ezintenteni zenu, bo‐Sirayeli! kaloku kangela kweyako indlu, Davide! Basuka baya o‐Sirayeli ezintenteni zabo." 
1Kings12:17 Kodwa usapo luka‐Sirayeli olube luhleli ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, wapata ubukumkani pezu kwalo u‐Rehobome." 
1Kings12:18 Wandula ukumkani u‐Rehobome watuma u‐Adorame, obepezu kwabesitabataba; baza bonke o‐Sirayeli bamgibisela ngamatye, wada wafa. Ngako ukumkani u‐Rehobome wanxama ukukwela enqwelweni, ukuba asabele e‐Yerusaleme." 
1Kings12:19 Kwa njalo o‐Sirayeli baqipukelana nendlu ka‐Davide, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
1Kings12:20 Kwaye kute, kwakuviwa ngo‐Sirayeli bonke ukuba ubuyile u‐Jerobome, bandula batuma bambizela entlanganisweni, bamenza ukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke: akwabiko namnye owalandela indlu ka‐Davide, ngapandle kwesizwe sika‐Juda sodwa." 
1Kings12:21 Wati u‐Rehobome akufika e‐Yerusaleme, wahlanganisa yonke indlu ka‐Juda, nesizwe sika‐Benjamine, amawaka alikulu linamashumi asibozo amadodana eqelene nokulwa, ukuba kuliwe nendlu ka‐Sirayeli, buze ubukumkani bubuyiselwe ku‐Rehobome unyana ka‐Solomone." 
1Kings12:22 Kodwa ilizwi likatixo leza ku‐Shemaya indoda katixo, lisiti:" 
1Kings12:23 Yitsho ku‐Rehobome unyana ka‐Solomone ukumkani wo‐Juda, nakuyo yonke indlu ka‐Juda no‐Benjamine, nakwisisalela sabantu, usiti:" 
1Kings12:24 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Aniyi kunyuka, aniyi kulwa nabazalwana benu usapo luka‐Sirayeli kanjalo; buyani abanye ngabanye ukuya endlwini yabo; ngokuba lento yenzekile ngam. Baza bapulapula ilizwi likayehova, babuya ukumka, njengelizwi likayehova." 
1Kings12:25 WANDULA u‐Jerobome waka i‐Shekeme entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, wahlala kuyo; wayepuma kona, waya waka i‐Penuweli." 
1Kings12:26 Waza u‐Jerobome wati entliziyweni yake: Kaloku ubukumkani bobuyela kwindlu ka‐Davide: 
1Kings12:27 xeshekweni baya kunyuka ababantu ukuya kuwenza amadini endlwini kayehova e‐Yerusaleme, iya kwandula intliziyo yababantu ibuyele enkosini yabo, ku‐Rehobome ukumkani wo‐Juda; babeya kubulala mna, babuyele ku‐Rehobome ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
1Kings12:28 Ngako ukumkani wafuna icebo, wenza amatole amabini egolide, wati kubo: Kunzima pezu kwenu ukuba ninyukele e‐Yerusaleme; naba otixo bako, Sirayeli! abakunyusayo elizweni le‐Jipete." 
1Kings12:29 Waza wabeka elinye e‐Betele, nelinye walimisa e‐Dane." 
1Kings12:30 Lento kodwa yaba sisono: ngokuba abantu bebesiya pambi kwelinye, kwada kwase‐Dane." 
1Kings12:31 Kanjako wayenza indlu yendawo ezipakamileyo; wenza nabaperisite ebantwini bonke, abebengengabo abonyana baka‐Levi." 
1Kings12:32 Waye u‐Jerobome kanjalo wawenza umtendeleko ngenyanga yesibozo, ngoweshumi linesihlanu umhla wenyanga, njengomtendeleko obukwa‐Juda, wanikela pezu kwesibingelo. Wenje njalo e‐Betele, ebingela amatole abewenzile: wayemisa e‐Betele abaperisite bendawo ezipakamileyo abezenzile." 
1Kings12:33 Kwa njalo wanikela pezu kwesibingelo abesenzile e‐Betele, ngoweshumi linesihlanu umhla wenyanga yesibozo, ngenyanga abeyiqingile ngeyake intliziyo; waza wenzela usapo luka‐Sirayeli umtendeleko, wanikela pezu kwesibingelo eso, waqumisa." 
1Kings13:1 Kekaloku bona ke, indoda katixo yavela kwa‐Juda, ngelizwi likayehova, yeza e‐Betele: waye u‐Jerobome wayemi esibingelweni, waqumisa." 
1Kings13:2 Yaza yabiza ngakuso isibingelo ngelizwi likayehova, yati: Sibingelo! sibingelo! utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, umntwana uya kuzalelwa kwindlu ka‐Davide, ngu‐Josiya igama lake, oya kubinga pezu kwako abaperisite bendawo ezipakamileyo, abo baqumisayo pezu kwako, namatambo abantu bowatshisa pezu kwako." 
1Kings13:3 Yaza yanika kwa ngalomini umqondiso, isiti: Nguwo lo umqondiso wokuba utetile uyehova: bona ke, isibingelo siya kuṙazuka, luti ututu olupezu kwaso lupalake." 
1Kings13:4 Kwaye kute, nxa ukumkani alivile ilizwi lendoda katixo, ebibizile ngakuso isibingelo esise‐Betele, wandula u‐Jerobome wolula isandla sake esesibingelweni, esiti: Yibambeni! Koko isandla sake abesolule ngakuyo sashwabana, wada wakohlwa kukusibuyisela kuye." 
1Kings13:5 Kanjalo isibingelo saṙazuka, lwati ututu lwapalaka esibingelweni, njengomqondiso obunikiwe yindoda katixo ngelizwi likayehova." 
1Kings13:6 Wandula wapendula ukumkani wati kwindoda katixo: Zubongoze ubuso bukayehova, utixo wako, unditandazele, ukuba isandla sam sibuyele kum. Yaza indoda katixo yabongoza ubuso bukayehova; sada isandla sokumkani sabuyela kuye, saba njengapambili." 
1Kings13:7 Waza ukumkani wateta kwindoda katixo, esiti: Yiza nam ekaya, uzomeleze, ndandiya kukupa ibaso." 
1Kings13:8 Kodwa indoda katixo yati kukumkani: Nakuba ubuya kundipa isiqingata sokwendlu yako, andiyi kuya nawe; kanjako isonka andiyi kusidla, namanzi andiyi kuwasela, kulendawo:" 
1Kings13:9 ngokuba kungokunjalo bekundiyalelwa ngelizwi likayehova, kusitwa: Akuyi kudla isonka, akuyi kusela namanzi, akuyi kubuya nokubuya ngalondlela ubuhamba ngayo." 
1Kings13:10 Ngako yahamba ngendlela yimbi, ayabuya ngalondlela ibisiza ngayo ukuza e‐Betele." 
1Kings13:11 Kekaloku bekuhlala e‐Betele umprofite omdala; wayesiza unyana wake, wambalisela konke ukwenza okube kwenziwe yindoda katixo ngalomini e‐Betele: amazwi ibiwatetile kukumkani, lawo bawabalisa kuyise wabo nawo." 
1Kings13:12 Waza wateta kubo uyise wabo, esiti: Ihambile ngeyipina indlela? Ngokuba onyana bake bebebonile indlela eyabihamba ngayo indoda katixo, eyavela kwa‐Juda." 
1Kings13:13 Wayesiti konyana bake: Ndibopele iqwaṙashe. Baza bambopela iqwaṙashe, wakwela pezu kwalo," 
1Kings13:14 wahamba emva kwayo indoda katixo, wayifumana ihleli ngapantsi kwomkoba: wayesiti kuyo: Nguwe na indoda katixo ebivela kwa‐Juda? Yati: Ndim." 
1Kings13:15 Waza wati kuyo: Yiya nam ekaya, usidle isonka." 
1Kings13:16 Yati: Ndikohliwe ukubuya nawe, nokungena nawe; kanjako isonka andiyi kusidla, namanzi andiyi kuwasela nawe, kulendawo:" 
1Kings13:17 ngokuba ilizwi leza kum ngelizwi likayehova, lisiti: Akuyi kudla isonka, akuyi kusela kona namanzi; akuyi kubuya ngokuhamba ngalondlela ubuhamba ngayo." 
1Kings13:18 Waza wati kuyo: Nam ndingumprofite, njengawe; kekaloku ingelosi yateta kum ngelizwi likayehova, isiti: Yibuyise nawe iye endlwini yako, ukuba isidle isonka, isele namanzi. Kodwa waxoka kuyo." 
1Kings13:19 Yandula yabuya naye, yadla isonka endlwini yake, yasela namanzi." 
1Kings13:20 Kwaza kwati, besahleli bona ngasesitebeni, leza ilizwi likayehova, kumprofite obeyibuyisile;" 
1Kings13:21 owabiza ngakuyo indoda katixo eyavela kwa‐Juda, esiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba uvukele umlomo kayehova, nokuba ungagcinanga umyalelo abekuyalele wona uyehova, utixo wako," 
1Kings13:22 koko ubuyile, udlile isonka, uselile namanzi, endaweni abete kuwe ngayo: Ungadli isonka, ungaseli namanzi; isidumbu sako asiyi kuza encw̔abeni loyihlo bako." 
1Kings13:23 Kwaye kute, emveni kwokuba ibidlile isonka, nasemveni kwokuba ibiselile, wandula wabopa iqwaṙashe, ebop ela umprofite owabembuyisile." 
1Kings13:24 Yasuka yahamba, yaza ingonyama yafumanana nayo endleleni, yayibulala: saye isidumbu sayo siposiwe pantsi endleleni, lati iqwaṙashe lema ngakuso, nengonyama yema ngasesidunjini." 
1Kings13:25 Kekaloku bona ke, amadoda ebedlula, abona isidumbu siposiwe pantsi endleleni, nengonyama imi ngasesidunjini; ayesiza axelela esixekweni, apo umprofite omdala ebehlala kona." 
1Kings13:26 Akuva umprofite owayibuyisayo endleleni, wati: Yindoda katixo, eyavukela umlomo kayehova; ngako uyehova uyinikele engonyameni, eyapuleyo, yayibulala, njengelizwi likayehova, elo walitetayo kuyo." 
1Kings13:27 Waza wateta konyana bake, esiti: Ndibopele iqwaṙashe. Babopa ke." 
1Kings13:28 Wasuka wahamba, wafumana isidumbu sayo siposiwe pantsi endleleni, kwa neqwaṙashe nengonyama zimi ngasesidunjini: ingonyama ibingadlanga isidumbu, ibingalapulanga iqwaṙashe kanjalo." 
1Kings13:29 Wandula umprofite wafunqula isidumbu sendoda katixo, wasilalisa eqwaṙasheni, wabuya naso: waye umprofite omdala esiza esixekweni, ukwenza isijwili, nokuyincw̔aba." 
1Kings13:30 Wayelalisa isidumbu sayo kwelake incw̔aba; baza benza isijwili pezu kwayo, besiti: Au, mzalwana wam!" 
1Kings13:31 Kwabekute, emvenikweni abeyincw̔abile, watsho konyana bake, esiti: Nxa ndibubile, nandule nindincw̔abe encw̔abeni elo indoda katixo incw̔atyiwe kulo; lalisa amatambo am ngakuwo amatambo ayo:" 
1Kings13:32 ngokuba liya kubako ngenyaniso ilizwi yalibizayo, ngelizwi likayehova, ngakuso isibingelo esise‐Betele, nangakuzo zonke izindlu zendawo ezipakamileyo ezisezixekweni zase‐Samariya." 
1Kings13:33 Emveni kwalendawo akaguquka uJerobome endleleni yake ekohlakeleyo, kodwa wabuya wabenza ebantwini bonke abaperisite bendawo ezipakamileyo; lowo ubetanda wamtwasisa, waza waba ngomnye wabaperisite bendawo ezipakamileyo." 
1Kings13:34 Kanjalo lento yaba sisono kwindlu ka‐Jerobome, kwa ukuyicita nokuyitshabalalisa ebusweni bomhlaba." 
1Kings14:1 NGELOXESHA u‐Abiya, unyana ka‐Jerobome, wabesifa." 
1Kings14:2 Waza wati u‐Jerobome kumfazi wake: Kausuke, uzenze ngakumbi, ukuze kungaziwa ukuba ungumfazi ka‐Jerobome, uhambele e‐Shilo; nankuya kona u‐Ahiya umprofite, lowo watetayo ngam ukuba ndibe ngukumkani pezu kwababantu." 
1Kings14:3 Uze utabate esandleni sako izonka zibe lishumi, nemiqatane, negubu lobusi, uye kuye: yena wokuxelela into eyakuhla umfana." 
1Kings14:4 Wenje njalo ke umfazi ka‐Jerobome, wayesuka, wahambela e‐Shilo, weza endlwini ka‐Ahiya. Kekaloku u‐Ahiya wakohlwa kukubona; ngokuba ebete nqi amehlo ake ngenxa yobudala bake." 
1Kings14:5 Koko uyehova wati ku‐Ahiya: Bona ke, umfazi ka‐Jerobome uyeza ukubuza into kuwe ngaye unyana wake, ngokuba esifa yena: ngokunje nangokunje uya kuteta kuye; ngokuba kuya kuti, nxa ezayo, uya kuzenzisa wumbi." 
1Kings14:6 Kwaza kwati, akuva u‐Ahiya intlokoma yenyawo zake, nxa abengena ngocango, wandula wati: Ngena, mfazi ka‐Jerobome! kunganina lento uzenzisa wumbi? ngokuba nditunyiwe kuwe nendaba ezinzima." 
1Kings14:7 Hamba, uti ku‐Jerobome: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba bendikupakamisa pakati kwabantu, ndaza ndakwenza inkosi pezu kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli," 
1Kings14:8 ndaṙazula ubukumkani kuyo indlu ka‐Davide, ndabunika kuwe; nokuba ungabanga njengesicaka sam u‐Davide, owagcinayo imiyalelo yam, nowandilandelayo ngayo yonke intliziyo yake, ukwenza oko kufaneleyo emehlweni am kodwa;" 
1Kings14:9 koko ukwenzile okukohlakeleyo ngapezu kwabo bonke ababepambili kuwe: ngokuba uye wakwenzela otixo bambi, nemifanekiso etyityishiweyo, ukundiqumbisa, nam undilahlile emva kwomhlana wako:" 
1Kings14:10 ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kuzisa ububi pezu kwendlu ka‐Jerobome, ndinqamlele u‐Jerobome lowo unobudoda, ovaliweyo nokululekileyo kwa‐Sirayeli; ndandiya kukukulisa indlu ka‐Jerobome, njengokuba kukukuliswa umgquba, ide igqityelwe." 
1Kings14:11 Lowo ka‐Jerobome obubayo esixekweni, izinja ziya kumdla; nalowo ububayo endle, intaka zezulu ziya kumdla; ngokuba uyehova etshilo." 
1Kings14:12 Suka wena ngoko, uye endlwini yako; zisakungena inyawo zako esixekweni, uya kububa umfana lowo." 
1Kings14:13 Baye o‐Sirayeli bonke beya kumlilela, bamncw̔abe: ngokuba nguye yedwa engoka‐Jerobome oya kuza encw̔abeni, ngenxa yokuba kufunyanwa kuye into elungileyo ngakuye uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, pakati kwendlu ka‐Jerobome." 
1Kings14:14 Kanjako uyehova wozivusela ukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, oya kunqamla indlu ka‐Jerobome ngalomhla: kodwa yinto nina? kuya kubako kwa ngoku." 
1Kings14:15 Ngokuba uyehova eya kubeta o‐Sirayeli, njengokuba ingcongolo izanyazanyiswa emanzini, abancotule o‐Sirayeli kulomhlaba olungileyo wawunikayo koyise babo, abati sa pesheya kwomlambo; ngenxa yokuba bazenzile i‐Ashera zabo, bequmbisa uyehova nje." 
1Kings14:16 Waeya kuyekelela o‐Sirayeli ngenxa yezono zika‐Jerobome, owonileyo yena, nowenzeyo o‐Sirayeli bone nabo." 
1Kings14:17 Wandula wesuka umfazi ka‐Jerobome, wemka, waya e‐Tiretsa: esakuza pezu kwombundu wendlu, umfana wabuba;" 
1Kings14:18 baza bamncw̔aba: bati o‐Sirayeli bonke bamlilela; njengelizwi likayehova, abelitetile ngesandla sesicaka sake u‐Ahiya umprofite." 
1Kings14:19 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Jerobome, ukuba wati nina ukulwa, nokuba wati nina ukupata ubukumkani, bona ke, iba̔liwe yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings14:20 Nemihla owabepata ubukumkani ngayo u‐Jerobome, Ibiyiminyaka engamashumi mabini enesibini: wada walala noyise bake, waza u‐Nadabi unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings14:21 KEKALOKU u‐Rehobome unyana ka‐Solomone wapata ubukumkani kwa‐Juda: ebeyiminyaka engamashumi mane enamnye ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani u‐Rehobome, waza wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinesixe̔nxe e‐Yerusaleme, isixeko abesinyulile uyehova kuzo zonke izizwe ze‐Sirayeli, ukuba alibeke igama lake kona. Igama lonina belingu‐Nahama, um‐Hamonikazi." 
1Kings14:22 Baye o‐Juda besenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, bamvusela ikwele, ngapezu kwako konke bebekwenze oyise babo, ngezono zabo abonayo ngazo." 
1Kings14:23 Ngokuba nabo bebezakela indawo ezipakamileyo, nentsika zamatye, ne‐Ashera, pezu kwazo zonke induli ezinde, nangapantsi kwayo yonke imiti eluhlaza." 
1Kings14:24 Kwaye kubako nengnawo elizweni: benza njengazo zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho zentlanga ezibe zigqogqiwe nguyehova ebusweni bosapo luka‐Sirayeli. 
1Kings14:25 Kwaye kute ngowesihlanu umnyaka wokumkani u‐Rehobome, wenyuka u‐Shishaki ukumkani we‐Jipete ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme:" 
1Kings14:26 wayesusa indyebo zendlu kayehova, nendyebo zendlu yokumkani; kwa zonke wazisusa: wayesusa onke amakaka egolide abewenzile u‐Solomone kanjalo." 
1Kings14:27 Waza ukumkani u‐Rehobome wawenza endaweni yawo amakaka exina, wawanikela esandleni senkosi zomlisela, obugcina umnyango wendlu yokumkani." 
1Kings14:28 Kwati ke, nxa asukuba ebesiya ukumkani endlwini kayehova, umlisela wawatwala, wabuya weza nawo enkambilini yomlisela." 
1Kings14:29 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Rehobome, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
1Kings14:30 Kwaye kuko imfazwe pakati kwo‐Rehobome no‐Jerobome yonke imihla yabo. 
1Kings14:31 Wada walala u‐Rehobome noyise bake, wancw̔atywa noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide. Igama lonina belingu‐Nahama, um‐Hamonikazi. Waza u‐Abiyame unyana wake wapata ubukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings15:1 Ngoweshumi linesibozo umnyaka wokumkani u‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, waba ngukumkani u‐Abiyame pezu kwo‐Juda." 
1Kings15:2 Ibiyiminyaka mitatu wabepata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Mahaka, intombi ka‐Abishalome." 
1Kings15:3 Waza wahamba kuzo zonke izono zoyise, abezenzile yena pambili kuye; kanjalo intliziyo yake ibingakolisekile ngakuyehova, utixo wake, njengentliziyo ka‐Davide uyise." 
1Kings15:4 Noko ngenxa ka‐Davide, uyehova, utixo wake, wamnika isibane e‐Yerusaleme, ngokuvusa unyana wake emva kwake, nangokumisa i‐Yerusaleme:" 
1Kings15:5 ngokokuba u‐Davide ebekwenzile okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, engapambukanga nje kuko konke abemyalele ngako, yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi, kupela ngomcimbi ka‐Huriya um‐Hete." 
1Kings15:6 Kwabekuko imfazwe pakati kwo‐Rehobome no‐Jerobome, yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi." 
1Kings15:7 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Abiyame, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda? Kwako imfazwe kanjalo pakati kwo‐Abiyame no‐Jerobome." 
1Kings15:8 Wada walala u‐Abiyame noyise bake, wancw̔atywa esixekweni sika‐Davide; waza u‐Asa unyana wake wapata ubukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings15:9 Ngowamashumi mabini umnyaka ka‐Jerobome ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, waba ngukumkani u‐Asa pezu kwo‐Juda." 
1Kings15:10 Yabiyiminyaka engamashumi mane anamnye wabepata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Mahaka, intombi ka‐Abishalome." 
1Kings15:11 Waye u‐Asa esenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengo‐Davide uyise." 
1Kings15:12 Wazikwelelisa ingnawo elizweni, wasusa zonke izitixwana ababezenzile oyise bake." 
1Kings15:13 Kanjalo no‐Mahaka unina, kwa yena wamshenxisa ukuba angabi ngukumkanikazi, ngokokuba ebelenzile idalo ku‐Ashera; waza u‐Asa wagaula idalo lake, walitshisa ngasemlanjaneni we‐Kidrone." 
1Kings15:14 Kodwa indawo ezipakamileyo bezingasuswa: noko intliziyo ka‐Asa ibikolisekile ngakuyehova yonke imihla yake. 
1Kings15:15 Wayezingenisa izinto ezingcwele zoyise, nezake izinto ezingcwele, endlwini kayehova, isilivere, negolide, nempahla." 
1Kings15:16 Kwabekuko imfazwe pakati kwo‐Asa no‐Bahasha ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli yonke imihla yabo. 
1Kings15:17 Waza wenyuka u‐Bahasha ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli ngakwa‐Juda, wayaka i‐Rama, ukuze angavumeli namnye ukupuma nokungena ku‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
1Kings15:18 Wandula u‐Asa watabata yonke isilivere, negolide, ezibe zisele pakati kwendyebo zendlu kayehova nendyebo zendlu yokumkani, wazinikela esandleni sezicaka zake; waza ukumkani u‐Asa wazituma ku‐Bene‐hadadi, unyana ka‐Tabrimone, unyana ka‐Heziyone, ukumkani we‐Siriya, obehlala e‐Damakusi, esiti:" 
1Kings15:19 Kuko ucebano pakati kwam nawe, na pakati kwobawo wam noyihlo wako: bona ke, nditumile kuwe ibaso, isilivere negolide; hamba, wapule ucebano lwako no‐Bahasha ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ukuba enyuke kum." 
1Kings15:20 Wapulapula ke u‐Bene‐hadadi kukumkani u‐Asa, watuma inkosi zezimpi abenazo ngakuzo izixeko zakwa‐Sirayeli, wabeta i‐Hiyone, ne‐Dane, ne‐Abele‐betemahaka, nayo yonke i‐Kinerete, kunye nelizwe lonke lakwa‐Nefatali." 
1Kings15:21 Kwaza kwati, nxa abevile oku u‐Bahasha, wayeka ukwaka i‐Rama, waya wahlala e‐Tiretsa." 
1Kings15:22 Wandula ukumkani u‐Asa wabiza o‐Juda bonke, (bekungeko okululekileyo,) ukuba basuse amatye e‐Rama, nemiti yayo, abe akile ngazo u‐Bahasha; waza ukumkani u‐Asa waka ngazo i‐Geba yakwa‐Benjamine, ne‐Mitsipa." 
1Kings15:23 Nesisalela sayo yonke imicimbi ka‐Asa, nawo onke amandla ake, nako konke abekwenza, nezixeko abezaka, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda? Kodwa ngexesha lobudala bake wabenesifo ezinyaweni zake." 
1Kings15:24 Wada u‐Asa walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide uyise: waza u‐Yehoshafate unyana wake wapata ubukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings15:25 KEKALOKU u‐Nadabi unyana ka‐Jerobome waba ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, ngowesibini umnyaka ka‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda, wapata ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli iminyaka yamibini." 
1Kings15:26 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, wahamba ngendlela yoyise, nangesono sake abebenzile o‐Sirayeli bone ngaso." 
1Kings15:27 Waza u‐Bahasha unyana ka‐Ahiya, owendlu ka‐Yisakare, waceba ngakuye; wasuka u‐Bahasha wambeta e‐Gibetone, eyeyama‐Filistiya, nxa u‐Nadabi no‐Sirayeli bonke bebevingcela i‐Gibetone." 
1Kings15:28 Kwa njalo u‐Bahasha wambulala, ngomnyaka wesitatu ka‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda, wapata ubukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings15:29 Kwaza kwati, akuba ngukumkani, wabeta yonke indlu ka‐Jerobome; akasalisa nento epefumlayo ku‐Jerobome, wada wamtshabalalisa, njengelizwi likayehova, elo wabelitetile ngesicaka sake u‐Ahiya um‐Shilo:" 
1Kings15:30 ngenxa yezono zika‐Jerobome, owonayo yena, nowenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone nabo, ngengcapukiso yake owamcapukisa ngayo uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings15:31 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Nadabi, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
1Kings15:32 Kwabekuko imfazwe pakati kwo‐Asa no‐Bahasha ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli yonke imihla yabo. 
1Kings15:33 Ngomnyaka wesitatu ka‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Bahasha unyana ka‐Ahiya pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke e‐Tiretsa, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mabini anamine." 
1Kings15:34 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, wahamba ngendlela ka‐Jerobome, nangesono sake abebenzile o‐Sirayeli bone ngaso." 
1Kings16:1 Landula leza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Jehu unyana ka‐Hanani ngakuye u‐Bahasha, lisiti:" 
1Kings16:2 Ngokokuba ndikupakamisile elutulini, ndakwenza inkosi pezu kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli: kanti uhambile ngendlela ka‐Jerobome, wabenza abantu bam o‐Sirayeli bone, ukundiqumbisa ngezono zabo;" 
1Kings16:3 bona ke, ndiya kukukulisa u‐Bahasha, nendlu yake: ndandiya kuyenza indlu yako njengayo indlu ka‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati." 
1Kings16:4 Lowo ka‐Bahasha obubayo esixekweni, izinja ziya kumdla: nowake obubayo endle, intaka zezulu ziya kumdla." 
1Kings16:5 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Bahasha, noko wakwenzayo, namandla ake, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
1Kings16:6 Wada walala u‐Bahasha noyise bake, wancw̔atywa e‐Tiretsa: waza u‐Ela unyana wake wapata ubukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings16:7 Nakanjako leza ilizwi likayehova ngesandla sika‐Jehu unyana ka‐Hanani umprofite, ngakuye u‐Bahasha, nangakuyo indlu yake, kwa ngenxa yako konke ukukohlakala abekwenzile emehlweni kayehova, ngokumqumbisa ngomsebenzi wezandla zake, ngokuba njengendlu ka‐Jerobome, nangenxa yokuba ebembulele." 
1Kings16:8 Ngomnyaka wamashumi mabini anesitandatu ka‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Ela unyana ka‐Bahasha pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Tiretsa, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamibini." 
1Kings16:9 Saza saceba ngakuye isicaka sake u‐Zimri, inkosi yesiqingata senqwelwana zake, nxa abese‐Tiretsa, ezinxilisa ngokusela endlwini ka‐Aretsa, obepezu kwendlu yake e‐Tiretsa." 
1Kings16:10 Wangena u‐Zimri wambeta, wambulala, ngomnyaka wamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe ka‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda, wapata ubukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings16:11 Kwaye kute, akuba ngukumkani, nxa abehleli pezu kweterone yake, wabeta yonke indlu ka‐Bahasha; akamsalisela namnye onobudoda, nowezalamane zake nowezihlobo zake." 
1Kings16:12 Kwa njalo u‐Zimri watshabalalisa yonke indlu ka‐Bahasha, njengelizwi likayehova, elo wabelitetile ngakuye u‐Bahasha ngesandla sika‐Jehu umprofite," 
1Kings16:13 ngenxa yazo zonke izono zika‐Bahasha, nezono zika‐Ela unyana wake, abonayo ngazo, nababenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone ngazo nabo, ukumqumbisa uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngezinto zabo ezingendawo." 
1Kings16:14 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Ela, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
1Kings16:15 Ngomnyaka wamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe ka‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda, wapata u‐Zimri ubukumkani imihla yasixe̔nxe e‐Tiretsa. Baye abantu beṙaula i‐Gibetone, eyeyama‐Filistiya." 
1Kings16:16 Kwaza kwaviwa ngabantu ababeṙaula lomzi, kusitwa: u‐Zimri ucebile, ewe umbulele ukumkani kanjalo; ngako bonke o‐Sirayeli benza u‐Omri, inkosi yomkosi, ukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli ngaleyomini emnqubeni apo." 
1Kings16:17 Waza wenyuka u‐Omri e‐Gibetone, no‐Sirayeli bonke kunye naye, baya bavingcela i‐Tiretsa." 
1Kings16:18 Kwaye kute, akubona u‐Zimri ukuba sitinjiwe isixeko, wandula wangena enqatyeni yendlu yokumkani, wayitshisa pezu kwake indlu yokumkani ngomlilo, wabuba," 
1Kings16:19 ngenxa yezono zake abe onile ngazo, ngokwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, ngokuhamba ngendlela ka‐Jerobome, nangesono sake wona ngaso, ngokwenza o‐Sirayeli bone nabo." 
1Kings16:20 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Zimri, nokuceba kwake owaceba ngako, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
1Kings16:21 Oko bahluka abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli kwezibini iziqingata: esinye isiqingata sabantu samlandela u‐Tibeni unyana ka‐Ginate, simenze ukumkani; nesinye isiqingata samlandela u‐Omri." 
1Kings16:22 Kodwa abantu ababemlandela u‐Omri babeyisa abantu ababemlandela u‐Tibeni unyana ka‐Ginate: wada wafa u‐Tibeni, wapata ubukumkani u‐Omri." 
1Kings16:23 Ngomnyaka wamashumi matatu anesinye ka‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Omri pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi linamibini: e‐Tiretsa wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamitandatu." 
1Kings16:24 Waza watenga intaba ye‐Samariya ku‐Shemere ngetalente zimbini zesilivere, waka entabeni leyo, walibiza igama lesixeko wasakayo, ngegama lika‐Shemere, umnini wentaba, ngokuti yi‐Samariya." 
1Kings16:25 Waye u‐Omri esenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; ewe wenza okukohlakeleyo ngapezu kwabo bonke abebepambili kuye. 
1Kings16:26 Ngokuba ebehamba ngayo yonke indlela ka‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, nangesono sake abebenzile o‐Sirayeli bone ngaso, ukumqumbisa uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngezinto zabo ezingendawo." 
1Kings16:27 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Omri, oko wakwenzayo, namandla ake owenza ngawo, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
1Kings16:28 Wada u‐Omri walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa e‐Samariya: waza u‐Ahabi unyana wake wapata ubukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings16:29 Kekaloku u‐Ahabi unyana ka‐Omri waba ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, ngomnyaka wamashumi matatu anesibozo ka‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda; wapata ubukumkani u‐Ahabi unyana ka‐Omri pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Samariya, iminyaka yamashumi mabini anamibini." 
1Kings16:30 Waye u‐Ahabi unyana ka‐Omri wenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, ngapezu kwabo bonke abebepambili kuye." 
1Kings16:31 Kwaza kwati, (bekuyinto encinane na ukuhamba kwake ezonweni zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati?) ukuba wamzeka abe ngumfazi u‐Jezebele, intombi ka‐Etebali ukumkani wama‐Tsidone, waya wakonza u‐Bali, watoba pambi kwake." 
1Kings16:32 Waza wamisela u‐Bali isibingelo endlwini ka‐Bali, leyo abeyakile e‐Samariya:" 
1Kings16:33 wawenza u‐Ahabi kanjako umfanekiso ka‐Ashera: kwa njalo u‐Ahabi wandisa ukwenza kwake ukuqumbisa uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngapezu kwabo bonke okumkani bo‐Sirayeli abebepambili kuye." 
1Kings16:34 Ngemihla yake u‐Hiyeli, um‐Betele, wayaka i‐Jeriko: ngo‐Abirame owamazibulo wake wayiseka, nango‐Segube omncinane wake wamisa ingcango zayo, njengelizwi likayehova, owalitetayo ngo‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune." 
1Kings17:1 WAZA u‐Elija um‐Tishebi, owabemi base‐Gileyadi, wati kuye u‐Ahabi: Ehleli nje uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, endimi pambi kwake, akuyi kubako umbete nemvula leminyaka, kupela ngelizwi lam!" 
1Kings17:2 Landula leza ilizwi likayehova kuye, lisiti:" 
1Kings17:3 Mka apa, usinge ngasempumalanga, uye uzimele ngasemlanjaneni we‐Kerite, opambi kwayo i‐Yoredane." 
1Kings17:4 Kwakuya kuti, uya kusela kumlanjana lowo; kanjalo ndibayalele onomyai ukuba bakufunzele kona." 
1Kings17:5 Wandula wemka, wenza ngelizwi likayehova: ngokuba wemka waya wahlala ngasemlanjaneni we‐Kerite, opambi kwayo i‐Yoredane." 
1Kings17:6 Baza onomyai bazisa kuye isonka nenyama ngokusa, nesonka nenyama ngokuhlwa; wasela ke kumlanjana." 
1Kings17:7 Kwaye kute ekupeleni kwemihla etile, umlanjana watsha, ngokuba bekungabangako imvula elizweni." 
1Kings17:8 Landula leza ilizwi likayehova kuye, lisiti:" 
1Kings17:9 Suka, hamba uye e‐Tsarefate, eyeyase‐Tsidone, uhlale kona; bona ke, ndimyalele kona umfazi ongumhlolokazi ukuba akufunzele." 
1Kings17:10 Wesuka ke, wahambela e‐Tsarefate. Wati akufika esangweni lesixeko, bona ke, wayekona umhlolokazi eteza inkuni; waza wabiza kuye, wati: Kaundizekele intwana yamanzi esityeni, ndisele." 
1Kings17:11 Esakuya ukuzeka, wabiza kuye, wati: Kaundizisele neqezu lesonka esandleni sako." 
1Kings17:12 Wayesiti: Ehleli nje uyehova, utixo wako, akuko kum nasonkana, kuko iqobana lomgubo efatyeni, nentwana yeoli egutyini, kupela! kekaloku bona ke, nditeza inkuni zimbini, ukuba ndiye ndiwulungisele mna nonyana wam, ukuze siwudle, sife nokufa." 
1Kings17:13 Waza u‐Elija wati kuye: Ungoyiki; yiya, yenza ngelizwi lako; kodwa ndenzele kuwo isonkana esincinane kuqala, usizise kum, wandule wenzele wena nonyana wako kamva." 
1Kings17:14 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ifatye yomgubo ayiyi kupela, negubu leoli aliyi kusweleka, kude kube yimini aya kunisa imvula uyehova pezu kwobuso bomhlaba." 
1Kings17:15 Waza wahamba, wenza ngelizwi lika‐Elija: watya yena, naye u‐Elija, nabendlu yake, imihla mininzi." 
1Kings17:16 Ifatye yomgubo ayapela, negubu leoli alasweleka, njengelizwi likayehova, owalitetayo ngo‐Elija." 
1Kings17:17 Kwaye kute emva kwezizinto, unyana walomfazi, womnikazi wendlu, wabesifa; kelaloku isifo sake saba nzima kangaka, kwada akwasala kuye umoya." 
1Kings17:18 Waza wati ku‐Elija: Ndiyinto nina kuwe, wena ndoda katixo? uze kum na, ukundikumbuza ubono bam, nokumfisa unyana wam?" 
1Kings17:19 Wayesiti kuye: Nika kum unyana wako. Waza wamsusa esifubeni sake, wamnyusela enkambilini yapezulu, apo wahlala kona, wamlalisa pezu kwowake umandlalo." 
1Kings17:20 Waza wabizela kuyehova, wati: Yehova, Tixo wam! kanene lomhlolokazi, endipambukele kuye, umenzele ububi na, ngokumfisa unyana wake?" 
1Kings17:21 Wandula wazolula pezu kwomntwana lowo amaxesha matatu, wabizela kuyehova, wati: Yehova, Tixo wam! mauti ke umpefumlo walomntwana ubuye ungene kuye." 
1Kings17:22 Waye uyehova epulapula ilizwi lika‐Elija: waza umpefumlo womntwana wabuya wangena kuye, wapila ke." 
1Kings17:23 Wandula u‐Elija wamtabata umntwana, wehla naye enkambilini yapezulu waya endlwini, wamnikela kunina; wayesiti u‐Elija: Kangela, unyana wako uhleli." 
1Kings17:24 Wayesiti umfazi ku‐Elija: Kaloku ke ndiyazi ukuba uyindoda katixo wena, nokuba ilizwi likayehova emlonyeni wako liyinyaniso." 
1Kings18:1 KWAYE kute emra kwemihla emininzi, landula ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Elija ngomnyaka wesitatu, lisiti: Hamba, uzibonakalise ku‐Ahabi; ngokuba ndiya kunisa imvula pezu kwobuso bomhlaba." 
1Kings18:2 Wasuka wahamba u‐Elija ukuya kuzibonakalisa ku‐Ahabi. Kekaloku indlala ibinzima e‐Samariya.
