1Kings18:3 Wada u‐Ahabi wambiza u‐Hobadiya, obepezu kwendlu yake. (Wati u‐Hobadiya wamoyika uyehova kakulu:" 
1Kings18:4 ngokuba bekute, akuba u‐Jezebele ebenqamla abaprofite bakayehova, wandula u‐Hobadiya watabata abaprofite balikulu, wabafihla ngamashumi mahlanu emqolombeni, wabafunzela ngesonka nangamanzi.)" 
1Kings18:5 Wayesiti u‐Ahabi ku‐Hobadiya: Hamba elizweni, uye kuyo yonke imitombo yamanzi, nakuyo yonke imilambo; kungati siya kufumana inca, ukuba silondoloze amahashe namaqwaṙaṙa ehleli, singanqamkeIwa zizilo." 
1Kings18:6 Baza balaba ilizwe pakati kwabo, ukuba bacande kulo: u‐Ahabi wahamba ngenye indlela eyedwa, no‐Hobadiya wahamba ngenye indlela eyedwa." 
1Kings18:7 Kekaloku nxa u‐Hobadiya abesendleleni, bona ke, u‐Elija wahlangana naye; waza wamazi, wawa ebusweni bake, wati: Nguwe na le inkosi yam u‐Elija?" 
1Kings18:8 Wayesiti kuye: Ndim; hamba, uti kwinkosi yako: Nanku u‐Elija." 
1Kings18:9 Kodwa wati: Ndonile nganto nina, ukuba uya kunikela isicaka sako esandleni sika‐Ahabi, ukundibulala?" 
1Kings18:10 Ehleli nje uyehova, utixo wako, akuko isizwe nobukumkani, apo inkosi yam ingatumelanga kona, ukuba akufune! naxeshekweni kwatiwa: Akako apa; wandula wafungisa obobukumkani nesosizwe, ukuba abakufumananga." 
1Kings18:11 Nakaloku uti wena: Hamba, uti kwinkosi yako: Nanku u‐Elija." 
1Kings18:12 Kwakuya kuti, nxa ndimkile kuwe, umoya kayehova wokutwalela apo endingaziyo: naxeshekweni ndizayo ukumxelela u‐Ahabi, kanti akangekufumane, uya kwandula andibulale: kodwa mna sicaka sako, ndimoyikile uyehova kwa sebutsheni bam." 
1Kings18:13 Akuxelelwanga inkosi yam na, oko ndakwenzayo nxa u‐Jezebele wabulala abaprofite bakayehova, ukuba ndawafihla amadoda alikulu kubaprofite bakayehova ngamashumi mahlanu emqolombeni, ndawafunzela ngesonka nangamanzi?" 
1Kings18:14 Nakaloku uti wena: Hamba, uti kwinkosi yako: Nanku u‐Elija; waeya kundibulala." 
1Kings18:15 Waza wati u‐Elija: Ehleli nje uyehova wemikosi, endimi pambi kwake, ngenyaniso ndiya kuzibonakalisa namhla kuye!" 
1Kings18:16 Wasuka wahamba u‐Hobadiya ukuya kumkaulela u‐Ahabi, wamxelela: waza u‐Ahabi waya ukumkaulela u‐Elija." 
1Kings18:17 Kwabekute, nxa u‐Ahabi abembona u‐Elija, wandula u‐Ahabi wati kuye: Nguwe na lo okatazayo o‐Sirayeli?" 
1Kings18:18 Wayesiti: Andikatazile o‐Sirayeli mna; nguwe, nendlu kayihlo, ngokokuba niyishiyile imiyalelo kayehova, nokuba ulandele o‐Bali." 
1Kings18:19 Ngako kaloku, tuma, uhlanganisele kum o‐Sirayeli bonke entabeni ye‐Karamele, nabaprofite baka‐Bali bengamakulu mane anamashumi mahlanu, nabaprofite baka‐Ashera bengamakulu mane, abadlayo esitebeni sika‐Jezebele." 
1Kings18:20 Waza watuma u‐Ahabi pakati kwalo lonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, wabahlanganisa abaprofite abo entabeni ye‐Karamele." 
1Kings18:21 Wandula u‐Elija wasondela kubo bonke abantu, wati: Kwoda kube ninina nipala pakati kwezizindlo zibini? ukuba nguyehova ongutixo, mlandeleni yena; kodwa ukuba ngu‐Bali, mlandeleni yena. Koko abantu bebengampenduli nazwi nye." 
1Kings18:22 Walekela u‐Elija wati ebantwini: Ndisele mna umprofite kayehova ndedwa; kanti abaprofite baka‐Bali bangamadoda angamakulu mane anamashumi mahlanu. 
1Kings18:23 Makekunikwe kuti inkunzana zibe mbini; mabati bona bazinyulele inkunzana ibe nye, bayihlahle, bayibeke pezu kwenkuni, kodwa umlilo mabangawufaki; nam ndiya kulungisa enye inkunzana, ndiyibeke pezu kwenkuni, kodwa umlilo andiyi kuwufaka:" 
1Kings18:24 nize nibize ngegama lotixo wenu, ndandiya kubiza mna ngegama likayehova; notixo lowo oya kupendula ngomlilo, makabe nguye ongutixo. Bapendula bonke abantu, bati: Lilungile ilizwi elo." 
1Kings18:25 Waza wati u‐Elija kubaprofite baka‐Bali: Zinyuleleni inkunzana ibe nye, niyilungise ukuqala, ngokuba nina nibaninzi; nize nibize ngegama lotixo wenu, kodwa umlilo ningawufaki." 
1Kings18:26 Baza batabata inkunzana ebinikwa kubo, bayilungisa, babiza ngegama lika‐Bali kwa sekuseni kwada kwasemini enkulu, besiti: Bali, sipendule! Kodwa bekungeko ilizwi, bekungeko nopendulayo. Bati kanjalo baxantsa ngasesibingelweni esibe senziwe." 
1Kings18:27 Kwaye kute emini enkulu, wandula u‐Elija wabahleka, wati: Bizani ngelizwi elikulu; ngokuba engutixo yena: kungaba uyancokola, umhlaumbi uye ngasese, umhlaumbi useluhambeni; ngati ulele ubutongo, ufanel’ ukuvuswa." 
1Kings18:28 Baza babiza ngelizwi elikulu, baziqapula njengesiko labo ngamaṙele nangentshuntshe, kwada kwapalaka igazi pezu kwabo." 
1Kings18:29 Kwabekute, nxa imini enkulu seidlulile, baprofitesha kwada kwaza kunikelwa ngomnikelo wokudla; kodwa bekungeko ilizwi, bekungeko nompenduli, bekungeko nokupulapula." 
1Kings18:30 Wandula wati u‐Elija kubo bonke abantu: Sondelani kum. Basuka bonke abantu basondela kuye. Waza walungisa isibingelo sikayehova esibe sicitekile. 
1Kings18:31 Watabata u‐Elija amatye alishumi linamabini njengenani lezizwe zonyana baka‐Yakobi, lowo ilizwi likayehova leza kuye, lisiti: Igama lako loba ngu‐Sirayeli;" 
1Kings18:32 wasaka ngamatye lawo isibingelo egameni likayehova; nangokungqonga isibingelo wawenza umsele, obulingana nendawo yezilinganiso zibini zembewu." 
1Kings18:33 Waza wazicwangcisa inkuni, wayihlahla inkunzana, wayibeka pezu kwenkuni," 
1Kings18:34 wati: Zalisani imipanda ibe mine ngamanzi, niwagalele pezu kwedini lokutshiswa, napezu kwenkuni. Wati kanjako: Yenza ngokwesibini. Baye besenza ngokwesibini ke. Walekela wati: Yenza ngokwesitatu. Baye besenza nangokwesitatu." 
1Kings18:35 Aza amanzi abaleka ngokungqonga isibingelo; kanjalo nomsele wawuzalisa ngamanzi. 
1Kings18:36 Kwaye kute, nxa kunikelwa ngomnikelo wokudla, wandula wasondela u‐Elija umprofite, wati: Yehova, Tixo ka‐Abrahame, ka‐Yisake, noka‐Sirayeli! makwaziwe namhla ukuba wena ungutixo kwa‐Sirayeli, nokuba mna ndisisicaka sako, nokuba ndizenzile zonke ezizinto ngelizwi lako." 
1Kings18:37 Ndipendule, Yehova! ndipendule, baze bakwazi abantu aba okokuba wena Yehova unguye utixo, nokuba usongile intliziyo yabo ngomva." 
1Kings18:38 Wandul’ ukuwa umlilo kayehova, wadla idini lokutshiswa, nenkuni, namatye, notuli; namanzi abesemseleni wawakotulula." 
1Kings18:39 Bati bakubona bonke abantu, bawa ngobuso babo; baye besiti: Nguyehova ongutixo! nguyehova ongutixo!" 
1Kings18:40 Waza wati u‐Elija kubo: Bambani abaprofite baka‐Bali; makangasindi namnye kubo. Bababamba ke: waza u‐Elija wabahlisela emlanjeni we‐Kishone, wababulala kona apo." 
1Kings18:41 Wandula wati u‐Elija ku‐Ahabi: Nyuka, yidla usele nokusela; ngokuba kuko isandi sengxokolo yemvula." 
1Kings18:42 Waselenyuka u‐Ahabi ukuya ukudla nokusela; kodwa u‐Elija wenyukela engcopo ye‐Karamele, wazitoba pantsi ngasemhlabeni, wabeka ubuso bake pakati kwamadolo ake," 
1Kings18:43 wati kwisicaka sake: Zunyuke, ukangele ngaselwandle. Senyuka ke, sakangela, sati: Akuko nto. Waza wati: Buya uye amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe." 
1Kings18:44 Kwaye kute ngelesixe̔nxe ixesha, sati: Nali ilifu elincinane, njengesandla somntu, liti tyi elwandle. Wayesiti: Nyuka, uti ku‐Ahabi: Bopa, uhle ke, ukuba imvula ingakutinti." 
1Kings18:45 Kwabekute pakati kwoko, izulu laba mnyama ngamafu nangumoya, yaza yabako imvula enkulu. Wakwela ke u‐Ahabi, waya e‐Yezerele." 
1Kings18:46 Saye isandla sikayehova sibe sipezu kwo‐Elija, owabinqa isinqe sake, wabaleka pambi kwo‐Ahabi, kwada kwangenwa e‐Yezerele." 
1Kings19:1 WAZA u‐Ahabi wamxelela u‐Jezebele konke abekwenzile u‐Elija, nabo bonke abebabulele, bonke abaprofite abo, ngeṙele." 
1Kings19:2 Wandula u‐Jezebele watuma isigidimi ku‐Elija, esiti: Mabenje njalo otixo kum, balekele ukwenje njalo, ukuba andenzi ubomi bako njengobomi bomnye kubo malunga nelixesha langomso!" 
1Kings19:3 Wati akubona oko, wesuka, wahambela ubomi bake, weza e‐Beresheba, eyeyakwa‐Juda, wasishiya isicaka sake kona." 
1Kings19:4 Kodwa wahamba yena entlango ihambo yamini nye, weza wahlala ngapantsi kwomti weroteme; waza wazicelela ukuba makafe, wati: Kwanele; kaloku, Yehova! susa ubomi bam; ngokuba ndingalungile mna pezu kwobawo bam." 
1Kings19:5 Wati akuba ebete butu, elele ubutongo ngapantsi kwawo umti weroteme, bona ke, yandula yampata ingelosi, yati kuye. Vuka, utye." 
1Kings19:6 Waza wakangela, kekaloku nasi ngasentlokweni yake isonkana sojiwe pezu kwamatye ashushu, negubu lamanzi: watya ke, wasela nokusela, wabuya walala pantsi." 
1Kings19:7 Yabuya ke ingelosi kayehova ngokwesibini, yampata, yati: Vuka, utye; ngokuba ihambo inkulu kuwe." 
1Kings19:8 Waza wavuka, wadla wasela nokusela, wahamba ngamandla okokutya, imini zamashumi mane nobusuku bamashumi mane, ukuya entabeni katixo, e‐Horebe." 
1Kings19:9 Wada wafika kona emqolombeni, walalisa apo; kekaloku bona ke, ilizwi likayehova leza kuye, lati kuye: Wenza nto nina apa, Elija?" 
1Kings19:10 Wayesiti: Bendinekwele kakulu ngenxa kayehova, utixo wemikosi; ngokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli lushiyile ucebano lwako, izibingelo zako luzicitile, nabaprofite bako lubabulele ngeṙele; sendisele mna ndedwa, nobomi bam luyabufuna, ukuba lubususe." 
1Kings19:11 Wati ke: Puma, ume entabeni pambi kwoyehova. Kekaloku bona ke, uyehova wadlula, wati umoya omkulu onamandla wazirazula intaba, waqekeza namawa, pambi kwoyehova; ebengeko emoyeni uyehova: nasemva kwomoya bekuko isingcangcazelo somhlaba; ebengeko esingcangcazelweni somhlaba uyehova:" 
1Kings19:12 nasemva kwesingcangcazelo somhlaba bekuko umlilo: ebengeko emlilweni uyehova: nasemva kwomlilo bekuko ilizwi elizolileyo elincinane. 
1Kings19:13 Kwaza kwati, akuva lona u‐Elija, wagqubutela ubuso bake ngengubo yake, wapuma, wema emnyango womqolomba. Kekaloku bona ke, kweza kuye ilizwi, elati: Wenza nto nina apa, Elija?" 
1Kings19:14 Wayesiti: Bendinekwele kakulu ngenxa kayehova, utixo wemikosi: ngokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli lushiyile ucebano lwako, izibingelo zako luzicitile, nabaprofite bako lubabulele ngeṙele: sendisele mna ndedwa, nobomi bam luyabufuna, ukuba lubususe." 
1Kings19:15 Wati uyehova kuye: Hamba, buya ngendlela yako ukuya entlango yase‐Damakusi: uti wakufika, utambise u‐Hazayeli abe ngukumkani pezu kwe‐Siriya;" 
1Kings19:16 no‐Jehu unyana ka‐Nimshi uya kumtambisa abe ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli: no‐Elisha unyana ka‐Shafate, owase‐Abele‐mehola, uya kumtambisa abe ngumprofite esikundleni sako." 
1Kings19:17 Kwaye kuya kuti, osindayo eṙeleni lika‐Hazayeli, lowo u‐Jehu uya kumfisa: nosindayo eṙeleni lika‐Jehu, lowo u‐Elisha uya kumfisa." 
1Kings19:18 Noko ndisalisile kwa‐Sirayeli amawaka asixe̔nxe, onke amadolo angaguqileyo ku‐Bali, nayo yonke imilomo engamanganga." 
1Kings19:19 Wasuka wemka apo, wamfumana u‐Elisha unyana ka‐Shafate, obepulusha ngezibini zenkabi zilishumi linesibini pambi kwake, waye yena eneseshumi linesibini: waza u‐Elija wamdlula, waposa ingubo yake pezu kwake." 
1Kings19:20 Waseleshiya inkabi, wabaleka emva kwo‐Elija, wati: Makendange ubawo noma, ndandule ukulandela wena. Wayesiti kuye: Hamba, buya; ngokuba kuyinto nina endiyenzileyo kuwe?" 
1Kings19:21 Waza wabuya kuye, watabata isibini senkabi, wazibinga, wapeka inyama yazo ngempahla zenkabi, wanika ebantwini, baza badla. Wandula wesuka, wamlandela u‐Elija, wamkonza." 
1Kings20:1 KEKALOKU u‐Bene‐hadadi ukumkani we‐Siriya wahlanganisa yonke impi yake: kwaye kuko naye okumkani bangamashumi matatu anababini, namahashe, nenqwelwana; wenyuka ke, wavingcela i‐Samariya, walwa ngakuyo." 
1Kings20:2 Waza watuma izigidimi ku‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, esixekweni," 
1Kings20:3 wati kuye: Utsho u‐Bene‐hadadi ukuti: Isilivere yako negolide yako yeyam: kanjalo abafazi bako nabantwana bako, abo bahle, bona bangabam." 
1Kings20:4 Wapendula ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, wati: Njengelizwi lako, nkosi yam, kumkani! ndingowako, kwa nako konke endinako." 
1Kings20:5 Zaye zisiza kanjako izigidimi, zati: Utsho u‐Bene‐hadadi, esiti: Nakuba nditumile kuwe, ukuti: Uya kundinika isilivere yako, negolide yako, nabafazi bako, nabantwana bako;" 
1Kings20:6 ndoti noko malunga nelixesha langomso nditume izicaka zam kuwe, ukuba zipande indlu yako, nezindlu zezicaka zako: kwakuya kuti, konke okunqwenelekileyo emehlweni ako zokubeka ezandleni zazo, zikususe." 
1Kings20:7 Wandula ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wabiza bonke abadala belizwe, wati: Gqalani ke, nibone ukuba lo uyafuna ububi; ngokuba ebetuma kum, etum ela abafazi bam, nabantwana bam, nesilivere yam, negolide yam, ndaye ndingamalanga." 
1Kings20:8 Baza bonke abadala nabo bonke abantu bati kuye: Ungapulapuli, ungavumi nokuvuma." 
1Kings20:9 Ngako wati kuzo izigidimi zika‐Bene‐hadadi: Yitini kuyo inkosi yam ukumkani: Konke ubukutumela kwisicaka sako ekuqaleni ndiya kukwenza: kodwa lento andingeyenze. Zaselezimka izigidimi, zabuya zeza kuye nempendulo." 
1Kings20:10 Wayetuma u‐Bene‐hadadi kuye, wati: Mabenje njalo kum otixo, balekele ukwenje njalo, ukuba utuli lwase‐Samariya luya kwanela bonke abantu abasezinyaweni zam babe nezandla zizele lulo!" 
1Kings20:11 Wapendula ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, wati: Tetani, nisiti: Makangaziqa̔yisi obinqayo njengotukululayo." 
1Kings20:12 Kwaye kute, akuva ilizwi eli, nxa abesela, yena nokumkani abo, ezintenteni, wandul’ ukuti kwizicaka zake: Lungani! Zaza zalunga ngakuso isixeko." 
1Kings20:13 Kekaloku bona ke, umprofite otile wasondela ku‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, wati: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ubonile na sonke esisihlwele sikulu? bona ke, ndiya kusinikela esandleni sako namhla; wauya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
1Kings20:14 Wati u‐Ahabi: Ngobanina? Wayesiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngabafana benkosi zamazwana. Waza wati: Ngubanina oya kuqala ukulwa? Wayesiti: Nguwe. 
1Kings20:15 Wandula wabala abafana benkosi zamazwana, ababengamakulu mabini anamashumi matatu anababini: nasemva kwabo wabala bonke abantu, lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli, amawaka asixe̔nxe." 
1Kings20:16 Baye bepuma emini enkulu. Koko u‐Bene‐hadadi ebezinxilisa ngokusela ezintenteni, yena nokumkani abo, okumkani abamashumi matatu anababini abamncedayo." 
1Kings20:17 Baye bepuma abafana benkosi zamazwana ukuqala; waza u‐Bene‐hadadi watuma abantu, abashumayela kuye ngokuti: Amadoda apumile e‐Samariya." 
1Kings20:18 Wayesiti: Nokuba apumele uxolo, wabambeni ehleli; nokuba apumele ukulwa, wabambeni ehleli." 
1Kings20:19 Kwa njalo aba bapuma esixekweni, abafana benkosi zamazwana, nempi ebibalandela." 
1Kings20:20 Basuka babulala abanye ngabanye indoda yabo; aza ama‐Siriya esaba, bati o‐Sirayeli bawaputuma: kodwa wasinda u‐Bene‐hadadi ukumkani we‐Siriya pezu kwehashe, kunye n abanye abakweli bamahashe." 
1Kings20:21 Waza wapuma ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, wabeta amahashe nenqwelwana, wabulala ama‐Siriya ngesibulalo esikulu." 
1Kings20:22 Wandula umprofite lowo wasondela kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, wati kuye: Hamba, uzomeleze; nze ugqale, ubone oko uya kukwenza: ngokuba ekutwaseni kwomnyaka ukumkani we‐Siriya eya kunyuka ngakuwe." 
1Kings20:23 Zaza izicaka zokumkani we‐Siriya zati kuye: Ngotixo bentaba otixo babo; kungoko bebenamandla pezu kwetu; kodwa ukuba silwa nabo etafeni, ngenyaniso siya kuba namandla pezu kwabo." 
1Kings20:24 Ngako yenza lento: Basuse okumkani, abanye ngabanye endaweni yabo, uzibeke inkosi ezikundleni zabo:" 
1Kings20:25 uti kanjalo uzibalele impi enjengempi ekulahlekileyo, namahashe njengamahashe ayo, nenqwelwana njengenqwelwana zayo, sasiya kulwa nabo etafeni; ngenyaniso siya kuba namandla pezu kwabo. Waza wapulapula elizwini lazo, wenje njalo ke." 
1Kings20:26 Kwaye kute ekutwaseni kwomnyaka, wandula u‐Bene‐hadadi wabala ama‐Siriya, wenyukela e‐Afeki, ukuya kulwa no‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings20:27 Lwabalwa usapo luka‐Sirayeli nalo, lwamkeliswa umpako, lwaya ngakuwo: lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwati waca pambi kwawo, njengemihlambi mibini emincinane yebokwe; kanti ama‐Siriya alizalisa ilizwe." 
1Kings20:28 Kwandula kwasondela indoda katixo, yateta kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, yati: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngokokuba ama‐Siriya ete: Uyehova ungutixo wentaba, kodwa aka ngutixo wemihlambo; ngako ndiya kunikela sonke esisihlwele sikulu esandleni sako, naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
1Kings20:29 Kekaloku bati waca aba malungana nabaya intsuku zasixe̔nxe. Kwaye kute ngosuku lwesixe̔nxe, kwahlanganiswa ukulwa; lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabulala kuma‐Siriya ikulu lamawaka amadoda ahamba ngenyawo ngamini nye." 
1Kings20:30 Ati aseleyo esabela e‐Afeki, esixekweni; kwaza kwawa udonga pezu kwamawaka angamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe amadoda aseleyo. Wesaba u‐Bene‐hadadi naye, wangena esixekweni, enkambilini yapakati." 
1Kings20:31 Zandula zati izicaka zake kuye: Bona ke, sivile ukuba okumkani bendlu ka‐Sirayeli bangokumkani bobubele: makesibeke intlakantlaka ezinqeni zetu, nentambo ezintlokweni zetu, sipumele kuye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli; kungaba uya kulondoloza ubomi bako." 
1Kings20:32 Zaza zabinqa ngentlakantlaka ezinqeni zazo, zafaka nentambo ezintlokweni zazo, zeza kuye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, zati: Siti isicaka sako u‐Bene‐hadadi: Makendibudle ubomi ke. Wayesiti: Usahleli na? ngumzalwana wam yena." 
1Kings20:33 Kekaloku amadoda lawo agqala lomazwi, anxama ukuwaqinisa, ukuba avela kuye na, ati: Umzalwana wako u‐Bene‐hadadi. Waza wati: Yiyani, mziseni. Wandula u‐Bene‐hadadi wapumela kuye; waza wamkwelisa enqwelwaneni." 
1Kings20:34 Wayesiti u‐Bene‐hadadi kuye: Izixeko, ezo ubawo wam wazisusa kuyihlo wako, ndozibuyisa, wauya kuzenzela izitarate e‐Damakusi, njengokuba ubawo wenje njalo e‐Samariya. Nam, watsho u‐Ahabi, ndiya kukundulula ngocebano olo. Waza walwenza ucebano naye, wamndulula." 
1Kings20:35 Kekaloku indoda etile kubo onyana babaprofite yati kummelwane wayo, ngelizwi likayehova: Zundibete. Kodwa indoda leyo yala ukuyibeta." 
1Kings20:36 Yaza yati kuyo: Ngenxa yokuba ungapulapulanga ilizwi likayehova, bona ke, nxa umkile kum, ingonyama yokubulala. Yati yakuba imkile kuyo, ingonyama yafumanana nayo, yayibulala." 
1Kings20:37 Yandula yayifumana enye indoda, yati: Zundibete. Yayibeta ke indoda leyo, yayenzela inxeba ekubeteni kwayo." 
1Kings20:38 Waza wemka umprofite lowo, wamlinda ukumkani endleleni, wazenza ngakumbi ngesiqoqa pezu kwamehlo ake." 
1Kings20:39 Kwaye kute, akudlula ukumkani, wandula wakala kukumkani wati: Isicaka sako sapumela pakati kwokulwa; kekaloku bona ke, indoda yapambuka, yayizisa kum enye indoda, yati: Gcina indoda le; ukuba ika ibe ingabiko, buya kwandula ubomi bako bube sesikundleni sobomi bayo, umhlaumbi uya kuku̔pa italente yesilivere." 
1Kings20:40 Kwaza kwati, nxa isicaka sako sibe sisebenza apa napaya, kekaloku ibingeko. Waye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli esiti kuye: Kwoba njalo ukugwetywa kwako; wabile ngokwako." 
1Kings20:41 Wandul ukunxama ke, wasusa isiqoqa emehlweni ake; waza ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wamnakana ukuba ungowabaprofite." 
1Kings20:42 Wayesiti kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngokokuba uyindulule indoda endayilahlela ekutshatyalalisweni esandleni sako, ngako ubomi bako boba sesikundleni sobomi bayo, nabantu bako boba sesikundleni sabantu bayo." 
1Kings20:43 Wasuka ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli waya endlwini yake, ete shwa, equmbile nokuqumba, weza e‐Samariya." 
1Kings21:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwezizinto, u‐Nabote um‐Yezerele wabenomyezo, obuse‐Yezerele, kufupi noxande luka‐Ahabi ukumkani we‐Samariya." 
1Kings21:2 Wandula wateta u‐Ahabi ku‐Nabote, esiti: Ndinike umyezo wako, ukuba ube sisitiya sam semifuno, ngokuba wona ukufupi nendlu yam: ndandiya kunika wena esikundleni sawo umyezo olungileyo pezu kwawo: okanye, ukuba kulungile emehlweni ako, ndokunika imali yexabiso lawo." 
1Kings21:3 Kodwa u‐Nabote wati ku‐Ahabi: Ubunzima mabube kum buvela kuyehova, ukuba ndiyanika ilifa lobawo bam kuwe!" 
1Kings21:4 Waza u‐Ahabi wangena endlwini yake, ete shwa, equmbile nokuqumba, ngenxa yelizwi abelitetile kuye u‐Nabote um‐Yezerele; ngokuba ebete: Andiyi kunika kuwe ilifa lobawo bam. Waya walala pantsi pezu kwomandlalo wake, wasonga ubuso bake, engadlanga isonka." 
1Kings21:5 Wandula weza kuye u‐Jezebele umfazi wake, wateta kuye, esiti: Kunganina lento umoya wako ulusizi, nokuba ungadlanga isonka?" 
1Kings21:6 Wayeteta kuye, esiti: Ngokokuba benditeta ku‐Nabote um‐Yezerele, ndati kuye: Ndinike umyezo wako ngemali; okanye, ukuba uyatanda, ndokunika omnye umyezo esikundleni sawo: koko wati: Andiyi kunika kuwe umyezo wam." 
1Kings21:7 Waza u‐Jezebele umfazi wake wati kuye: Kanene wena uyapata kaloku ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli na? vuka, yidla isonka, iti intliziyo yako icwayite; mna ndiya kunika kuwe umyezo ka‐Nabote um‐Yezerele." 
1Kings21:8 Wandula waba̔la incwadi egameni lika‐Ahabi, wazincamatisela ngesincamatiselo sake, wazituma incwadi kubadala nakumaduna ababesesixekweni sake, behlala no‐Nabote." 
1Kings21:9 Wayeba̔la ezincwadini ezo, esiti: Shumayelani inzilo, ummise u‐Nabote pezulu pambi kwabantu;" 
1Kings21:10 nize nimise amadoda abe mabini, usapo lwobunginingini, emalungana naye, ukuba anqi̔ne ngakuye, esiti: Ugxekile utixo nokumkani; nandule nipume naye, nimgibisele ngamatye, ade afe." 
1Kings21:11 Aza enza amadoda esixeko sake, abadala namaduna ababehlala esixekweni sake, njengokuba u‐Jezebele ebetumile kuwo; njengokuba bekuba̔liwe ezincwadini abezitumile kuwo." 
1Kings21:12 Ashumayela inzilo, ammisa u‐Nabote pezulu pambi kwabantu." 
1Kings21:13 Kwaye kusiza amadoda amabini, usapo lwobunginingini, ahlala malungana naye; aza anqi̔na ngakuye lomadoda obunginingini, ngakuye u‐Nabote, ebusweni babantu, esiti: u‐Nabote ugxekile utixo nokumkani. Baza bampumisela ngapandle kwesixeko, bamgibisela ngamatye, wada wafa." 
1Kings21:14 Baza batuma ku‐Jezebele, besiti: u‐Nabote ugityiselwe ngamatye, ufile nokufa." 
1Kings21:15 Kwaye kute, akuva u‐Jezebele okokuba u‐Nabote ugityiselwe ngamatye, nokuba ufile, wandula wati u‐Jezebele ku‐Ahabi: Suka, bamba umyezo ka‐Nabote um‐Yezerele, lowo walayo ukuwunika kuwe ngemali; ngokuba u‐Nabote engasahleli, seefile." 
1Kings21:16 Kwaza kwati, akuva u‐Ahabi ukuba u‐Nabote ufile, wesuka u‐Ahabi ukuya kuhlela emyezweni ka‐Nabote um‐Yezerele, ukuwubamba." 
1Kings21:17 Kwandul’ ukuza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Elija um‐Tishebi, lisiti:" 
1Kings21:18 Suka, yihla ukuya kumkaulela u‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ose‐Samariya; nankuya emyezweni ka‐Nabote, apo ahlele kona ukuwubamba." 
1Kings21:19 Wauya kuteta kuye, usiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ubulele na, waubambile kanjalo na? Wauya kuteta kuye, usiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Endaweni apo izinja zibe zikota igazi lika‐Nabote kona, izinja ziya kukota igazi lako, ewe elako." 
1Kings21:20 Waza u‐Ahabi wati ku‐Elija: Undifumene na, lutshaba lwam? Wayesiti: Ndi ku fumene! ngenxa yokuba uzitengisele ukwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova." 
1Kings21:21 Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa ububi pezu kwako, ndikukukulise; ndandiya kunqamlela u‐Ahabi lowo unobudoda, nalowo uvaliweyo nalowo ukululekileyo, kwa‐Sirayeli;" 
1Kings21:22 nendlu yako ndiya kuyenza njengendlu ka‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, nanjengendlu ka‐Bahasha unyana ka‐Ahiya, ngenxa yengcapukiso u ndi capukisile ngayo, nokuba ubenzile o‐Sirayeli bone." 
1Kings21:23 Kanjalo nango‐Jezebele wateta uyehova, esiti: Izinja ziya kudla u‐Jezebele ngaseludongeni lwapandle lwe‐Yezerele." 
1Kings21:24 Lowo ka‐Ahabi obubayo esixekweni izinja ziya kumdla; nalowo obubayo endle intaka zezulu ziya kumdla. 
1Kings21:25 (Kodwa bekungeko namnye njengo‐Ahabi, obezitengisele ukwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, owati u‐Jezebele umfazi wake wamtelekisa." 
1Kings21:26 Wayesenza kakubi kakulu ngokulandela izitixwana, njengako konke ababekwenzile aba‐Amori, abo uyehova wabagqogqa pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli.)" 
1Kings21:27 Kwaza kwati, akuva u‐Ahabi lamazwi, waṙazula izivato zake, wafaka intlakantlaka enyameni yake, wazila ukutya, walala ngentlakantlaka, wahamba kakuhle." 
1Kings21:28 Landula leza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Elija um‐Tishebi, lisiti:" 
1Kings21:29 Uyabona na ukuba u‐Ahabi uyazigoba pambi kwam? ngokokuba uyazigoba pambi kwam, andiyi kuzisa ububi obo emihleni yake; emihleni yonyana wake ndiya kuzisa ububi obo pezu kwendlu yake." 
1Kings22:1 KWAYE kuhleliwe iminyaka mitatu, kungeko imfazwe pakati kwama‐Siriya no‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings22:2 Kwaza kwati ngomnyaka wesitatu, wehla u‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda ukuya kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings22:3 Wada wati ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli ezicakeni zake: Anazi na ukuba i‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi yeyetu? kanti tina siti tu, singayibambi esandleni sokumkani we‐Siriya." 
1Kings22:4 Wati nakuye u‐Yehoshafate: Uya kuhamba na nam ukulwa e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi? Waye u‐Yehoshafate esiti kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: Njengokuba unjalo wena, ndinjalo mna; njengokuba benjalo abantu bako, banjalo abantu bam; njengokuba enjalo amahashe ako, anjalo amahashe am." 
1Kings22:5 Walekela u‐Yehoshafate wati kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: Kaubuze ke namhla elizwini likayehova. 
1Kings22:6 Wandula ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wahlanganisa abaprofite, ngati ngamadoda amakulu mane, wati kubo: Ndiya kuya ngase‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi ukulwa, ndiya kuyeka, kusinina? Bati: Nyuka; ngokuba inkosi iya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani." 
1Kings22:7 Wati kodwa u‐Yehoshafate: Akuseko na apa umprofite kayehova, ukuba sibuze ngaye?" 
1Kings22:8 Waza ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wati ku‐Yehoshafate: Kuseko indoda inye, ekungabuzwayo kuyehova ngayo, kodwa ndiyayitiya, ngokuba ingaprofiteshi ngam okulungileyo, koko iprofitesha okubi; ngu‐Mikaya unyana ka‐Yimla. Wayesiti u‐Yehoshafate: Makangatsho njalo ukumkani!" 
1Kings22:9 Wandula ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wambiza umbusi, wati: Nxama umzise u‐Mikaya unyana ka‐Yimla." 
1Kings22:10 Kekaloku ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, no‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda, bahlala omnye nomnye pezu kweterone yake, bevatisiwe ngezivato zobukumkani, enkundleni ngasemnyango wesango le‐Samariya; bati abaprofite bonke baprofitesha ebusweni babo." 
1Kings22:11 Kanjalo u‐Zedekiya unyana ka‐Kenana ebezenzele impondo zesincete; waza wati: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngazo ezi uya kunquba ama‐Siriya ude uwagqibele. 
1Kings22:12 Benje njalo nabaprofite bonke ukuprofitesha, besiti: Nyuka uye e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi, utamsanqeleke; ngokuba uyehova eya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani." 
1Kings22:13 Kekaloku isigidimi esibe siye ukumbiza u‐Mikaya sateta kuye, sisiti: Bona ke, amazwi abaprofite ngomlomo mnye ateta okulungileyo kukumkani; makeliti ke ilizwi lako libe njengelizwi lomnye kubo, uz’ utete okulungileyo." 
1Kings22:14 Wati kodwa u‐Mikaya: Ehleli nje uyehova, oko akutshoyo uyehova kum, ndiya kuteta kwa kona." 
1Kings22:15 Wasuka weza kukumkani. Waza wati ukumkani kuye: Mikaya! siya kuya e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi ukulwa, siya kuyeka, kusinina? Wayesiti kuye: Nyuka, utamsanqeleke; ngokuba uyehova eya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani." 
1Kings22:16 Waza wati ukumkani kuye: Kwoda kube ngamaxesha mangapina ndiya kukufungisa, ukuba ungateti nto kum, kupela ibe yinyaniso, egameni likayehova?" 
1Kings22:17 Wayesiti: Ndabona o‐Sirayeli bonke bete sa pezu kwentaba, njengegusha ezingenaye umalusi; wati ke uyehova: Akuko inkosi kubo aba; mababuye abanye ngabanye baye ezindlwini zabo ngoxolo." 
1Kings22:18 Waza ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wati ku‐Yehoshafate: Andite kuwe na, akayi kuprofitesha ngam okulungileyo, koko eya kuprofitesha okubi?" 
1Kings22:19 Wayesiti: Ngako oko yiva ilizwi likayehova: Ndabona uyehova ehleli pezu kweterone yake, nawo wonke umkosi wasezulwini umi ngakuye, ngasekunene kwake nangasekohlo kwake." 
1Kings22:20 Waza wati uyehova: Ngubanina oya kuhenda u‐Ahabi, ukuba enyuke, enzakale e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi? Wati omnye ngokuti, wati nomnye ngokuti." 
1Kings22:21 Wada wapuma umoya, wema pambi kwoyehova, wati: Ndiya kumhenda mna." 
1Kings22:22 Wati uyehova kuye: Nganina? Wayesiti: Ndiya kupuma, ndize ndibe ngumoya wobuxoki emlonyeni wabo bonke abaprofite bake. Wati: Uya kuhenda, wauya kweyisa kanjalo: puma, wenje njalo ke." 
1Kings22:23 Ngako kaloku, bona ke, uyehova ubekile umoya wobuxoki emlonyeni wabo bonke ababaprofite bako; kanjalo uyehova utetile ngawe okubi." 
1Kings22:24 Wandula wasondela u‐Zedekiya unyana ka‐Kenana, wambeta u‐Mikaya esidleleni, wati: Wadlula ngayipina indlela umoya kayehova evela kum ukuya kuteta nawe?" 
1Kings22:25 Wayesiti u‐Mikaya: Bona ke, uya kubona ngalomini uya kungena ngayo enkambilini yapakati, ukuba uzimele." 
1Kings22:26 Waza wati ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: Tabata u‐Mikaya, umbuyisele ku‐Amoni inkosi yesixeko, naku‐Yohashe unyana wokumkani," 
1Kings22:27 uti: Utsho ukumkani ukuti: Fakani lo entolongweni, nimdlise isonka sembandezelo namanzi embandezelo, ndide ndize ngoxolo." 
1Kings22:28 Waza wati u‐Mikaya: Ukuba uka ubuye ngoxolo, uyehova akatetanga ngam. Walekela wati: Pulapulani, bantu, nina nonke!" 
1Kings22:29 Wandula wenyuka ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, no‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda, ukuya e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi." 
1Kings22:30 Waza ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wati ku‐Yehoshafate: Ndiya kuzenza ngakumbi, ndingene pakati kwokulwa; kodwa wena, yambata izivato zako zobukumkani. Kwa njalo ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wazenza ngakumbi, wangena pakati kwokulwa." 
1Kings22:31 Kekaloku ukumkani we‐Siriya ebeyalele inkosi zenqwelwana abenazo, zingamashumi matatu anambini, ngokuti: Aniyi kulwa kwa nabancinane nabakulu, kupela niya kulwa nokumkani wo‐Sirayeli yedwa." 
1Kings22:32 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni inkosi zenqwelwana zambonayo u‐Yehoshafate, zasezisiti: Okunene ngukumkani wo‐Sirayeli lowo. Zaza zapambuka ukuya kulwa ngakuye; kodwa u‐Yehoshafate wakala." 
1Kings22:33 Kwaza kwati, zakubona inkosi zenqwelwana ukuba asi nguye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, zabuya ekumlandeleni." 
1Kings22:34 Yandula indoda etile yatyeda isipeta ekungazini kwayo, yambeta ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli pakati kwamakonxo nehempe yentsimbi. Ngako wati kumbexeshi wake: Songa isandla sako, upume nam emkosini; ngokuba ndenziwe inxeba." 
1Kings22:35 Kwaye kusanda ukulwa ngalomini; waza ukumkani waxaswa enqwelwaneni malungana nama‐Siriya: kodwa wafa ngokuhlwa, lati igazi lenxeba lapalalela esifubeni senqwelwana." 
1Kings22:36 Kwandula kwahamba indanduluko pakati kwomkosi lakutshona ilanga, isiti: Mabaye abanye ngabanye esixekweni sabo, nabanye ngabanye elizweni labo!" 
1Kings22:37 Kwa njalo wafa ukumkani, waziswa e‐Samariya; baye bemncw̔aba ukumkani e‐Samariya." 
1Kings22:38 Kwati kwakuyalazwa inqwelwana ngasecibini lase‐Samariya, izinja zakota igazi lake, nxa ingnawokazi zahlambayo, njengelizwi likayehova abelitetile." 
1Kings22:39 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Ahabi, nako konke wakwenzayo, nendlu yopondo lwendlovu owayakayo, nazo zonke izixeko abezakile, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani wo‐Sirayeli?" 
1Kings22:40 Wada walala u‐Ahabi noyise bake; waza u‐Ahaziya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake. 
1Kings22:41 KEKALOKU u‐Yehoshafate unyana ka‐Asa waba ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Juda, ngomnyaka wesine ka‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli," 
1Kings22:42 u‐Yehoshafate ebeyiminyaka imashumi matatu anesihlanu ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani; wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mabini anamihlanu e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Hazuba, intombi ka‐Shilihi." 
1Kings22:43 Waye ehamba ngayo yonke indlela ka‐Asa uyise, akapambuka kuyo, esenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova: kodwa indawo ezipakamileyo bezingasuswa; abantu basabinga baqumisa ezindaweni ezipakamileyo." 
1Kings22:44 Kanjalo u‐Yehoshafate walwenza uxolo nokumkani wo‐Sirayeli. 
1Kings22:45 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Yehoshafate, namandla ake abesenza ngawo, nokuba wati nina ukulwa, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
1Kings22:46 Nengnawo eziseleyo, ezibe zisele emihleni ka‐Asa uyise, wazisusa elizweni." 
1Kings22:47 Oko bekungeko ukumkani e‐Edome; umongama ebengukumkani. 
1Kings22:48 U‐Yehoshafate wazenza inqanawa zase‐Tareshishe ukuba ziye e‐Ofire ngenxa yegolide: kodwa zibe zingayi, ngokuba inqanawa zapukayo e‐Hetsiyone‐gebere." 
1Kings22:49 Wandula wati u‐Ahaziya unyana ka‐Ahabi ku‐Yehoshafate: Maziye izicaka zam kunye nezicaka zako ezinqanaweni; koko u‐Yehoshafate ebengavumi. 
1Kings22:50 Wada u‐Yehoshafate walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide uyise; waza u‐Yehorame unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Kings22:51 U‐AHAZIYA unyana ka‐Ahabi waba ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Samariya, ngomnyaka weshumi linesixe̔nxe ka‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamibini pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
1Kings22:52 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, wahamba endleleni yoyise, nasendleleni yonina, nasendleleni ka‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owabenza o‐Sirayeli bone:" 
1Kings22:53 ngokuba wabekonza u‐Bali, watoba pambi kwake, wamqumbisa uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, njengako konke abekwenzile uyise wake." 
2Kings1:1 ANDULA ama‐Mowabi avukela ngakubo o‐Sirayeli emveni kwokufa kuka‐Ahabi. 
2Kings1:2 Kekaloku u‐Ahaziya weyela ngesetyenzwa elipanjanisiweyo enkambilini yake yapezulu ebise‐Samariya, wabesifa; waza watuma izigidimi, wati kuzo: Hambani, nibuze ku‐Bali‐zebube utixo we‐Hekrone, ukuba ndiya kupila kwesisifo kusinina." 
2Kings1:3 Kodwa ingelosi kayehova yateta ku‐Elija um‐Tishebi, isiti: Suka, unyuke ukuya kukaulela izigidimi zokumkani we‐Samariya, uti kuzo: Kungokuba kungeko utixo kwa‐Sirayeli na, nihamba ukuya kubuza ku‐Bali‐zebube utixo we‐Hekrone?" 
2Kings1:4 Ngako oko ke utsho uyehova ukuti: Umandlalo apo ukwele kona, akuyi kuhla kuwo, koko uya kufa ngenyaniso. Waza wemka u‐Elija." 
2Kings1:5 Xeshekweni izigidimi zazibuyele kuye, wati kuzo: Yinina lento nibuyileyo?" 
2Kings1:6 Zaye zisiti kuye: Indoda yenyuka ukuza kusikaulela, yati kuti: Hambani, nibuyele kukumkani onitunileyo, niti kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Kungokuba kungeko utixo kwa‐Sirayeli na, utuma ukuya kubuza ku‐Bali‐zebube utixo we‐Hekrone? ngako oko, umandlalo apo ukwele kona, akuyi kuhla kuwo, koko uya kufa ngenyaniso." 
2Kings1:7 Waza wati kuzo: Sibe sinina isimilo salondoda eyenyukayo ukuza kunikaulela, yateta kuni lamazwi?" 
2Kings1:8 Zaye zisiti kuye: Ibiyindoda inengubo yoboya, ibinqiwe ngombinqo wolusu esinqeni sayo. Wayesiti: Ngu‐Elija um‐Tishebi." 
2Kings1:9 Wandula ukumkani watuma kuye inkosi yamashumi mahlanu inamashumi mahlanu ayo. Yaza yenyukela kuye; ngokuba, bona ke, ebehleli pezu kwengcopo yentaba; yateta kuye, esiti: Wena ndoda katixo! uti ukumkani: Yihla." 
2Kings1:10 Kodwa wapendula u‐Elija, wati kuyo inkosi yamashumi mahlanu: Ukuba ke ndiyindoda katixo mna, mauhle umlilo ezulwini, udle wena namashumi mahlanu ako. Waza wehla umlilo ezulwini, wadla yona namashumi mahlanu ayo." 
2Kings1:11 Waza wabuya watuma enye inkosi yamashumi mahlanu inamashumi mahlanu ayo. Yateta yona yati kuye: Wena ndoda katixo! utsho ukumkani ukuti: Nxama uhle. 
2Kings1:12 Wapendula u‐Elija wati kubo: Ukuba ndiyindoda katixo mna, mauhle umlilo ezulwini, udle wena namashumi mahlanu ako. Wandula wehla umlilo ezulwini, wadla yona namashumi mahlanu ayo." 
2Kings1:13 Wabuya watuma kanjalo inkosi yawesitatu amashumi mahlanu inamashumi mahlanu ayo. Yayinyuka eyesitatu inkosi yamashumi mahlanu, yeza yaguqa ngamadolo ayo pambi kwo‐Elija, yamtaṙuzisa, yati kuye: Wena ndoda katixo! makebube ubomi bam, nobomi bezicaka zako, balamashumi mahlanu, bunqabile emehlweni ako." 
2Kings1:14 Bona ke, kwehla umlilo ezulwini, wadla inkosi zombini zamashumi mahlanu okuqala, kunye namashumi mahlanu azo; kodwa kaloku, mabube ubomi bam bunqabile emehlweni ako." 
2Kings1:15 Yaza yateta ingelosi kayehova ku‐Elija, isiti: Yihla nayo, ungayoyiki. Wesuka, wehla nayo waya kukumkani." 
2Kings1:16 Wayesiti kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Okokuba utumile izigidimi ukuya kubuza ku‐Bali‐zebube utixo we‐Hekrone, kungokuba kungeko utixo kwa‐Sirayeli na, kuze kubuzwe elizwini lake? ngako oko, umandlalo apo ukwele kona, akuyi kuhla kuwo, koko uya kufa ngenyaniso." 
2Kings1:17 Wada wafa, njengelizwi likayehova, elo wabelitetile u‐Elija: waza u‐Yehorame waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake, ngomnyaka wesibini ka‐Yehorame unyana ka‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda; ngokuba yena ebengenaye unyana." 
2Kings1:18 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Ahaziya, leyo wayenzayo, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
2Kings2:1 KWAYE kute, nxa uyehova abeza kunyusa u‐Elija ngesaqwiti aye ezulwini, wandula wemka u‐Elija no‐Elisha e‐Gilegale." 
2Kings2:2 Waza u‐Elija wati ku‐Elisha: Kauhlale apa; ngokuba uyehova enditumile ukuya e‐Betele. Kodwa wati u‐Elisha: Ehleli nje uyehova, uhleli nje nompefumlo wako, andiyi kukushiya! Baye behlela e‐Betele." 
2Kings2:3 Bandula onyana babaprofite abebese‐Betele bapumela ku‐Elisha, bati kuye: Uyakwazi na ukuba uyehova uya kususa inkosi yako namhla entlokweni yako? Wayesiti: Ewe, ndiyakwazi; yitini cwaka." 
2Kings2:4 Waza wati u‐Elija kuye: Elisha! kauhlale apa; ngokuba uyehova enditumile ukuya e‐Jeriko. Kodwa wati: Ehleli nje uyehova, uhleli nje nompefumlo wako, andiyi kukushiya! Baye besiza e‐Jeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Bandula basondela onyana babaprofite abebese‐Jeriko ku‐Elisha, bati kuye: Uyakwazi na ukuba uyehova uya kususa inkosi yako namhla entlokweni yako? Wayesiti: Ewe, ndiyakwazi; yitini cwaka." 
2Kings2:6 Waza wati u‐Elija kuye: Kauhlale apa; ngokuba uyehova enditumile ukuya e‐Yoredane. Kodwa wati: Ehleli nje uyehova, uhleli nje nompefumlo wako, andiyi kukushiya! Basuka bahamba bobabini." 
2Kings2:7 Andula amadoda angamashumi mahlanu kubo onyana babaprofite aya ema malungana nabo ekude; bati bona bobabini bema ngase Yoredane. 
2Kings2:8 Waza u‐Elija watabata ingubo yake, wayisonga, wawabeta amanzi, ahluka wona nalapa napaya; bada bona bobabini bawela pezu kwowomileyo umhlaba." 
2Kings2:9 Kwabekute, bakuba bewelile, wandula wati u‐Elija ku‐Elisha: Cela into endiya kukwenzela yona, ndingekasuswa kuwe. Wayesiti u‐Elisha: Makekubeko isabiwo esipindiweyo somoya wako pezu kwam." 
2Kings2:10 Waza wati: Ucelile into enqabileyo: noko, ukuba uyandibona ndakususwa kuwe, kwoba njalo kuwe; kodwa ukuba aku ndiboni, akuyi kuba njalo." 
2Kings2:11 Kwaye kute ke, nxa bahambayo bemana beteta, nantsi inqwelo yomlilo inamahashe omlilo, eyasenza isahlulo pakati kwabo bobabini; waza u‐Elija wenyukela ezulwini ngesaqwiti." 
2Kings2:12 Wabona ke u‐Elisha, wadanduluka, esiti: Bawo wam, bawo wam! inqwelo yo‐Sirayeli, nabakweli babo! Wada akabi sambona; waza wabamba izivato zake, waziṙazula zaba ziziziba zibini." 
2Kings2:13 Wayicola nengubo ka‐Elija ebiwile kuye, wabuya, waya wema ngaselugudwini lwe‐Yoredane." 
2Kings2:14 Waza watabata ingubo ka‐Elija ebiwile kuye, wawabeta amanzi, wati: Upina uyehova, utixo ka‐Elija? Kwa yena akuwabeta amanzi, ahluka wona nalapa napaya; wada wawela u‐Elisha." 
2Kings2:15 Kekaloku onyana babaprofite abebese‐Jeriko bakumbona bekude, bati: Umoya ka‐Elija uyapumla pezu kwo‐Elisha. Bandula beza ukumkaulela, bazitoba kuye ngasemhlabeni." 
2Kings2:16 Baye besiti kuye: Bona ke, kuko nezicaka zako amashumi mahlanu amadoda akalipileyo; makaye ke, afune inkosi yako; hleze kube kukuba umoya kayehova umfunqulile, wamkahlela pezu kwenye yentaba, umhlaumbi kwesinye sezihlambo. Wayesiti: Aniyi kutuma." 
2Kings2:17 Kodwa bakumqu̔ba wada wadana, wandula wati: Tumani. Baza batuma amadoda amashumi mahlanu, abefuna imihla mitatu, engamfumananga ke." 
2Kings2:18 Nxa babuyeleyo kuye, (ngokuba ebesahlala e‐Jeriko,) wandula wati kubo: Bendingati kuni na: Ningayi?" 
2Kings2:19 Aza amadoda esixeko ati ku‐Elisha: Bona ke, intlalo yesisixeko ilungile, njengokuba inkosi yam ibona; kodwa amanzi mabi, nomhlaba uputile." 
2Kings2:20 Wayesiti: Ndiziseleni isikotile esitsha, nifake kona ityuwa. Baza basizisa kuye." 
2Kings2:21 Wandula wapumela etendeni lamanzi, wayiposela kona ityuwa, wati: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ndiwapilisile amanzi la; akuyi kubuya kuvele kona ukufa nokuputa." 
2Kings2:22 Kwa njalo kwapiliswa amanzi lawo kwada kwanamhla nje, njengelizwi lika‐Elisha owabelitetile." 
2Kings2:23 Wasuka wenyuka kona ukuya e‐Betele. Kekaloku nxa abenyuka ngendlela, kwapuma esixekweni abafana abancinane, abahlekisa ngaye, bati kuye: Nyuka, qaindini! nyuka, qaindini!" 
2Kings2:24 Waza wabeka ngomva, wabakangela, wabaqalekisa egameni likayehova. Kwandul’ ukupuma ibere zimbini ehlatini, zaqwenga kubo abantwana abangamashumi mane anababini." 
2Kings2:25 Wemka kona waya entabeni ye‐Karamele; wesuka nakona wabuyela e‐Samariya. 
2Kings3:1 KEKALOKU u‐Yehorame unyana ka‐Ahabi waba ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Samariya, ngomnyaka weshumi linesibozo ka‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi linamibini." 
2Kings3:2 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova: kodwa kwakungenjengoyise nanjengonina; ngokuba wasusa isifanekiso sika‐Bali, owabesenzile uyise." 
2Kings3:3 Wayenamatela noko ezonweni zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owabenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone; akapambuka kuzo." 
2Kings3:4 Kekaloku u‐Mesha ukumkani wama‐Mowabi ebengumfuyi wegusha, wanikela kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli ikulu lamawaka emvana, nekulu lamawaka enkunzi zegusha uboya bazo." 
2Kings3:5 Kodwa bekute, nxa u‐Ahabi abefile, wandula ukumkani wama‐Mowabi wavukela ngakuye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings3:6 Waza wapuma ukumkani u‐Yehorame ngeloxesha e‐Samariya, wabala o‐Sirayeli bonke." 
2Kings3:7 Waya watuma ku‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda, ukuti: Ukumkani wama‐Mowabi uvukele ngakum; uya kuhamba na nam ukuya ngakuwo ama‐Mowabi ekulweni? Wayesiti: Ndiya kunyuka: njengokuba unjalo wena, ndinjalo mna; njengokuba benjalo abantu bako, banjalo abantu bam; njengokuba enjalo amahashe ako, anjalo amahashe am." 
2Kings3:8 Waza wati: Siya kunyuka ngayipina indlela? Wayesiti: Ngendlela yentlango yase‐Edome. 
2Kings3:9 Kwa njalo wahamba ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, nokumkani wo‐Juda, nokumkani we‐Edome: baye bezekelela ngendlela yemihla isixe̔nxe: kwaza akwabiko amanzi kuwo umkosi, nakuzo izilo ezibe zibalandela." 
2Kings3:10 Wandula wati ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: Au, lento ababizileyo uyehova okumkani aba bobatatu, ukuze abanikele esandleni sama‐Mowabi!" 
2Kings3:11 Kodwa u‐Yehoshafate wati: Akuko na apa umprofite kayehova, sibuze kuyehova ngaye? Sapendula esinye ezicakeni zokumkani wo‐Sirayeli, sati: Kuko apa u‐Elisha unyana ka‐Shafate, owagalela amanzi pezu kwezandla zika‐Elija." 
2Kings3:12 Wayesiti u‐Yehoshafate: Liko naye ilizwi likayehova. Bandula behla baya kuye, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, no‐Yehoshafate, nokumkani we Edome." 
2Kings3:13 Kodwa u‐Elisha wati kuye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: Uyinto nina kum? hamba uye kubaprofite boyihlo, nakubaprofite bonyoko. Koko ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wati kuye: Unga tsho ke; ngokuba uyehova ebabizile okumkani aba bobatatu, ukuba abanikele esandleni sama‐Mowabi." 
2Kings3:14 Wayesiti u‐Elisha: Ehleli nje uyehova wemikosi, endimi pambi kwake, ngenyaniso, ukuba ndibe ndingabeki ubuso buka‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda, ngendingakangeli ngakuwe, ngendingakuboni kanjalo!" 
2Kings3:15 Kodwa kaloku ndiziseleni umculisi. Kwaye kute, akuculisa umculisi, sandula isandla sikayehova seza pezu kwake;" 
2Kings3:16 wayesiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Yenza lentili ibe ngamacibi ngamacibi; 
2Kings3:17 ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Aniyi kubona umoya, aniyi kubona nemvula; noko ke intili leyo iya kuzaliswa ngamanzi, naniya kusela nina, nenkomo zenu, nezilo zenu." 
2Kings3:18 Yinto elula kodwa le emehlweni kayehova; uya kunikela ama‐Mowabi esandleni senu kanjako. 
2Kings3:19 Naniya kubeta zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, nazo zonke izixeko ezidlulisileyo; nayo yonke imiti elungileyo niya kuyiwisa, nayo yonke imitombo yamanzi niya kuyivingca, nawo onke amasimi alungileyo niya kuwonakalisa ngamatye." 
2Kings3:20 Kwaza kwati kusasa, nxa kunikelwa ngomnikelo wokudla, bona ke, kwavela amanzi ngendlela yase‐Edome, lada ilizwe lazaliswa ngamanzi." 
2Kings3:21 Kekaloku kwakuviwa ngawo onke ama‐Mowabi, ukuba okumkani abo benyukile ukuza kulwa ngakuwo, kwabizelwa ndawonye bonke ababinqa ngombinqo nabapezulu, bema ngasemdeni." 
2Kings3:22 Ati akuvuka kusasa, selipumile ilanga pezu kwamanzi, andula ama‐Mowabi abona malungana nawo amanzi ebomvu njengegazi;" 
2Kings3:23 ayesiti: Ligazi eli; batshabalele okumkani abo ngokwenene, babulalene; ngako kaloku emaxobeni, ma‐Mowabi!" 
2Kings3:24 Kodwa akufika emnqubeni wo‐Sirayeli, besuka o‐Sirayeli bawabeta ama‐Mowabi, ada esaba pambi kwabo: kanjalo bangena kulo ilizwe lawo, babeta ama‐Mowabi." 
2Kings3:25 Nezixeko bazicita, napezu kwawo onke amasimi alungileyo baposa abanye ngabanye ilitye labo, bawazalisa; nayo yonke imitombo yamanzi bayivingca, nayo yonke imiti elungileyo bayiwisa; kwada kwasaliswa amatye ayo e‐Kire‐haresete yodwa: kodwa abasauli bayingqonga, bayibeta." 
2Kings3:26 Waza ukumkani wama‐Mowabi, akubona ukuba ukulwa kunamandla pezu kwake, watabata naye amadoda angamakulu asixe̔nxe ar̔olayo iṙele, ukuba atyobozele kuye ukumkani we‐Edome; kodwa ebekohliwe." 
2Kings3:27 Wandula wamtabata unyana wake wamazibulo, lowo ubeya kuba ngukumkani esikundleni sake, wamnikela abe lidini lokutshiswa pezu kwodonga. Kwaza kwabako umsindo omkulu ngakubo o‐Sirayeli: ngako bemka kuye, babuyela elizweni labo." 
2Kings4:1 KEKALOKU umfazi otile ebafazini bonyana babaprofite wakala ku‐Elisha, esiti: Isicaka sako, indoda yam, sifile; nawe uyazi ukuba isicaka sako besimoyika uyehova: usel’ efikile lowo ibinetyala kuye, ukuza kuzitabatela onyana bam bobabini babe ngamakoboka." 
2Kings4:2 Waye u‐Elisha esiti kuye: Ndiya kukwenzela nto nina? ndixelele ke, unanto nina endlwini? Wati yena: Isicakakazi sako asinanto endlwini, kupela liselwa leoli." 
2Kings4:3 Waza wati: Hamba, uboleke izitya ngapandle, kubo bonke abamelwane bako, izitya ezizé; ungakwenzi kuncinane ukuboleka kwako:" 
2Kings4:4 wandule ungene, uvale ucango pezu kwako napezu kwonyana bako, ute̔ kuzo zonke ezozitya, neso site ciki usibeke ecaleni." 
2Kings4:5 Waza wemka kuye, waya wavala ucango pezu kwake napezu kwonyana bake; bona babesondeza kuye, naye wabesita̔." 
2Kings4:6 Kwati kwakuba izitya bezite ciki, wayesiti kunyana wake: Sisondeze kum kanjako isitya; kodwa wati kuye: Akuseko isitya. Yaza ioli yanqamka." 
2Kings4:7 Wandula weza, wayixelela indoda katixo; eyati: Hamba, utengise ngeoli leyo, uhlaule lowo unetyala kuye; uze upile wena nonyana bako ngeseleyo." 
2Kings4:8 Kwaye kute ngemini etile, wadlula u‐Elisha waya e‐Shuneme, apo wabekona umfazi omkulu, owamnyanzela ukuba atye isonka. Kwaza kwati, nxa asukuba ebedlula, wapambukela kona, ukuba atye isonka." 
2Kings4:9 Wada wati kwindoda yake: Bona ke, sendinakana ukuba uyindoda engcwele katixo lo, odlula ngakuti futi;" 
2Kings4:10 masenze ke inkambili yapezulu encinane ngaseludongeni, simbekele kona umandlalo, netafile, nesitulo, nekandelare; kwaye kuya kuti, akuza kuti, wopambukela kona." 
2Kings4:11 Kwabekute ngemini etile, weza kona, wapambukela kuyo inkambili yapezulu leyo, walala apo ke." 
2Kings4:12 Waza wati ku‐Gehazi isicaka sake: Mbize lom‐Shunemekazi. Xeshekweni abembizile, wema yena ebusweni bake." 
2Kings4:13 Kekaloku wabete kuye: Yiti ke kuye: Bona ke, usikatalele ngayo yonke lenkatalo nje, yinto nina eya kwenzelwa wena? kuko na into uya kutetelelwa ngayo kukumkani, umhlaumbi kwinkosi yomkosi? Wayete yena: Ndihleli pakati kwabantu bam." 
2Kings4:14 Wandula wati: Sekuya kumenzelwa nto nina ke? Wati u‐Gehazi: Okunene akananyana, nendoda yake isel’ indala." 
2Kings4:15 Waza wati: Mbize. Xeshekweni abembizile, wema yena emnyango." 
2Kings4:16 Wayesiti: Ngelixesha elimisiweyo, wakuba utwasile umnyaka, uya kusingata unyana. Waza wati: Hai, nkosi yam, ndoda katixo! ungaxokisi isicakakazi sako." 
2Kings4:17 Wada wamita umfazi lowo, wazala unyana ngeloxesha elimisiweyo, wakuba utwasile umnyaka, elo u‐Elisha wabetetile ngalo kuye." 
2Kings4:18 Nxa asel’ ekulile umntwana, kwabekute ngemini etile, wapuma waya kuyise, kubavuni." 
2Kings4:19 Wayesiti kuyise: Intloko yam, intloko yam! Wati uyise kumfana: Mtwalele kunina." 
2Kings4:20 Wamtwala ke, wamzisa kunina. Waza wahlala pezu kwamadolo ake kwada kwasemini enkulu, wand’ ukububa." 
2Kings4:21 Wenyuka unina, wamlalisa pezu kwomandlalo wendoda katixo, wamvalela, wapuma ke." 
2Kings4:22 Waza wabiza indoda yake, wati: Nditumele ke omnye kwabafana, nelinye kwamaqwaṙashekazi, ndibaleke ndiye endodeni katixo, ndibuyelele." 
2Kings4:23 Yayisiti: Kunganina ukuba woya kuyo namhla? asi yiyo inyanga etwasileyo, asi yiyo nesabata. Wati: Kwoba kulungile." 
2Kings4:24 Waza wabopa iqwaṙashekazi, wati kumfana wake: Qu̔ba, uhambe; ungandibambezeleli ukuhambisa kwako, kupela nxa nditshoyo kuwe." 
2Kings4:25 Wasuka wahamba, weza kuyo indoda katixo entabeni ye‐Karamele. Kwaye kute, yakumbona indoda katixo ekude, yaza yati ku‐Gehazi isicaka sayo: Nankuya lom‐Shunemekazi." 
2Kings4:26 Kaloku gitshima ke, uye kumhlangabeza, uti kuye: Kulungile na kuwe? kulungile na kwindoda yako? kulungile na kumntwana? Wayesiti: Kulungile." 
2Kings4:27 Wati akufika kwindoda katixo entabeni, wabamba inyawo zayo. Wasuka wasondela u‐Gehazi, ukuba amtya̔le. Kodwa yati indoda katixo: Myeke; ngokuba umpefumlo wake uṙaṙa pakati kwake; kanti uyehova undifihlele lento, engandixelelanga." 
2Kings4:28 Waza wati: Ndike ndacela na unyana enkosini yam? bendingati na: Ungandikohlisi? 
2Kings4:29 Yandula yati ku‐Gehazi: Binqa isinqe sako, upate umsimelelo wam esandleni sako, uhambe; ukuba uyafumanana nomntu, ungambulisi; kanjako ukuba umntu uyabulisa wena, ungasabeli kuye; uye uwubeke umsimelelo wam pezu kwobuso bomntwana." 
2Kings4:30 Koko unina womntwana wati: Ehleli nje uyehova, uhleli nje nompefumlo wako, andiyi kukushiya! Yaselisuka, yamlandela." 
2Kings4:31 Waza u‐Gehazi wadlula pambi kwabo, waya wabeka umsimelelo pezu kwobuso bomntwana; kodwa bekungeko ilizwi, bekungeko nokupulapula. Ngako wabuya ukuya kuyihlangabeza, wayixelela, esiti: Akavukanga umntwana." 
2Kings4:32 Kekaloku akuba u‐Elisha engene endlwini, nankuya umntwana efile, elele pezu kwomandlalo wake." 
2Kings4:33 Wangena ke, wabavalela bona bobabini ucango, watandaza kuyehova." 
2Kings4:34 Waza wakwela, walala pezu kwomntwana, wabeka umlomo wake pezu kwowake umlomo, namehlo ake pezu kwawake amehlo, nezandla zake pezu kwezake izandla, wazitoba pantsi pezu kwake: yada inyama yomntwana yafudumala." 
2Kings4:35 Wandula wabuya, wahamba endlwini kwa kanye apa nakanye paya; waza wakwela kanjako, wazitoba pantsi pezu kwake; wada watimla umntwana kwada kwangamaxesha asixe̔nxe, waza umntwana wavula amehlo ake." 
2Kings4:36 Wasuka wambiza u‐Gehazi, wati: Mbize lom‐Shunemekazi. Wambiza ke. Nxa abezile kuye, wati: Tabata unyana wako." 
2Kings4:37 Waza wangena, wawa ngasezinyaweni zake, wazitoba ngasemhlabeni, watabata unyana wake, wapuma ke." 
2Kings4:38 Wabuya u‐Elisha weza e‐Gilegale: kwaye kuko indlala elizweni; baza onyana babaprofite bahlala pambi kwake: wayesiti kwisicaka sake: Beka imbiza enkulu, upekele onyana babaprofite umhluzi." 
2Kings4:39 Wandula omnye wapumela endle ayike imifuno, wafumana ivatala yasendle, waka kuyo ikomkomere zasendle ingubo yake izele, weza wazixabela embizeni yomhluzi; ngokuba bebengazazi." 
2Kings4:40 Bada bapakela amadoda ukuba adle. Kwaza kwati, nxa ebesidla kuwo umhluzi, akala, ati: Ukufa kusembizeni, ndoda katixo! Akohlwa ke ukutya." 
2Kings4:41 Koko yati: Zisani ke umgubo. Yaza yawuposela embizeni; yayisiti: Pakela abantu ukuba badle. Kwaza akwabiko into embi embizeni. 
2Kings4:42 Kwaye kuvela indoda e‐Bali‐shalisha, yazisa endodeni katixo izonka zelibo, izonka zeṙalasi ezimashumi mabini, nezikwebu ezibonxileyo emakaseni azo. Yaza yati: Nikela abantu ukuba badle." 
2Kings4:43 Kodwa umkonzi wayo wati: Into ni? ndibeke oku pambi kwekulu lamadoda na? Yabuya yati: Nikela abantu ukuba badle; ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Baya kudla, bosalisa kanjalo." 
2Kings4:44 Wandula wabeka pambi kwabo, baza badla, basalisa nokusalisa, njengelizwi likayehova." 
2Kings5:1 KEKALOKU u‐Nahamane, inkosi yomkosi wokumkani we‐Siriya, ebeyindoda enkulu ebusweni benkosi yake, nebekekileyo, ngokuba uyehova wabenikile ngaye ulwoyiso kuma‐Siriya; wayeyindoda eligoṙa elikalipileyo kanjalo, kodwa ebelileperi." 
2Kings5:2 Aye ama‐Siriya ebepumile ngamabandla, atimba elizweni lakwa‐Sirayeli intombazana encinane, ebikonza umfazi ka‐Nahamane." 
2Kings5:3 Yayisiti kuyo inkosikazi yayo: Ayaba inkosi yam yabisebusweni bomprofite ose‐Samariya! oko ebeya kuyipilisa kuso isilepero sayo. 
2Kings5:4 Wandula wangena, wayixelela inkosi yake, esiti: Ngokunje nangokunje itetile intombazana ebivela ezweni lakwa‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings5:5 Waza wati ukumkani we‐Siriya: Hamba, uye, ndandiya kutuma incwadi kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli. Wasuka wahamba, watabata esandleni sake ishumi letalente zesilivere, namawaka matandatu amaqosha egolide, neshumi lezivato zokuguqulelana." 
2Kings5:6 Wada wayizisa incwadi leyo kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, isiti: Kekaloku yakufika lencwadi kuwe, bona ke, senditumile kuwe isicaka sam u‐Nahamane, ukuze umpilise kuso isilepero sake." 
2Kings5:7 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli abeleseshile incwadi, wandula waṙazula izivato zake, wati: Ndinguye utixo na ukufisa nokudlisa ubomi, ukuba lo utumile kum, ukuze ndipilise indoda kuso isilepero sayo? ngako oko gqalani ke, nibone okokuba uyafuna ituba ngakum." 
2Kings5:8 Kwabekute, akuba evile u‐Elisha, indoda katixo, ukuba ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli uṙazule izivato zake, waza watuma kukumkani, ukuti: Kunganina ukuba uziṙazulile izivato zako? makeze ke kum, waeya kukwazi ukuba kuko umprofite kwa‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings5:9 Wandula u‐Nahamane weza namahashe ake nenqwelo yake, wema ngaselucangweni lwendlu ka‐Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Waza u‐Elisha watuma isigidimi kuye, esiti: Hamba uhlambe amaxesha abe sixe̔nxe e‐Yoredane, yaiya kubuya inyama yako ize kuwe, wauya kuhlambuluka." 
2Kings5:11 Kodwa waqumba u‐Nahamane, wemka, wati: Bona ke, bendisiti pakati kwam, woka apumele kum, eme, abize ngegama likayehova, lotixo wake, ashukumise isandla sake pezu kwendawo, apilise ileperi:" 
2Kings5:12 i‐Abana ne‐Farepare, imilambo yase‐Damakusi, ayilungile na yona kuwo onke amanzi akwa‐Sirayeli? andingehlambe kuyo na, ndihlambuluke? Wajika ke, wemka ngomsindo." 
2Kings5:13 Zaza zasondela izicaka zake, zateta kuye, zati: Bawo! ukuba umprofite ebetetile kuwe into enkulu, ubungayi kuyenza na? kangakananina ngakumbi ke nxa ate kuwe: Hlamba, uhlambuluke." 
2Kings5:14 Wandula wehla, wazintywilisa e‐Yoredane amaxesha asixe̔nxe, njengelizwi lendoda katixo: yaza yabuya inyama yake, yaba njengenyama yomntwana omncinane, wahlambuluka ke." 
2Kings5:15 Wasuka wabuyela endodeni katixo, yena nawo wonke umkosi wake, weza, wema pambi kwayo, wati: Bona ke, kaloku ndiyazi ukuba akuko utixo kuwo wonke umhlaba, kupela kwa‐Sirayeli: ngako kaloku, zulamkele itamsanqa esicakeni sako." 
2Kings5:16 Kodwa yati: Ehleli nje uyehova, endimi pambi kwake, andiyi kwamkela nalinye! Waza wayiqu̔ba ukuba ilamkele; koko yalayo." 
2Kings5:17 Wandula wati u‐Nahamane: Sekungayi kunikwa ke na kwisicaka sako umtwalo womhlaba olingana nowesibini samaqwaṙaṙa? ngokuba isicaka sako singayi kubuya senze idini lokutshiswa nombingelelo kotixo bambi, siya kwenza kuyehova kupela:" 
2Kings5:18 wanga uyehova angasixolela isicaka sako lento: xeshekweni inkosi yam iya kungena endlwini ka‐Rimone ukuzitoba kona, ize yayame pezu kwesandla sam, ndandule ndizitobe nam endlwini ka‐Rimone; xeshekweni ndiya kuzitoba endlwini ka‐Rimone, wanga uyehova angasixolela isicaka sako ngalento." 
2Kings5:19 Yayisiti kuye: Hamba ngoxolo. Waya wemka kuyo umgama omncinane. 
2Kings5:20 Waza wati u‐Gehazi, isicaka sika‐Elisha indoda katixo: Bona ke, inkosi yam imyekile u‐Nahamane, lom‐Siriya, ukuba ingamkelanga esandleni sake oko wabesiza nako; kodwa, ehleli nje uyehova, ndiya kubaleka emva kwake, ndamkele intwana kuye." 
2Kings5:21 Kwa njalo u‐Gehazi wamputuma u‐Nahamane. Waza u‐Nahamane, akumbona ebaleka emva kwake, wahlika enqwelweni ukuya kumkaulela, wati: Kulungile na?" 
2Kings5:22 Wayesiti: Kulungile; inkosi yam inditumile ukuti: Bona ke, kwa kaloku nje bafikile kum amadodana amabini evela entabeni yakwa‐Frayime kubo onyana babaprofite; kaunike kuwo italente yesilivere ibe nye, nezivato zokuguqulelana zibe zibini." 
2Kings5:23 Waza wati u‐Nahamane: Vuma, tabata italente zibe mbini. Wamqu̔ba ke, wabopa italente zesilivere zambini ezidleni zibini, nezivato zokuguqulelana zazibini, wazibeka pezu kwesibini sezicaka zake, ezatwala pambi kwake." 
2Kings5:24 Wati akufika endulini, wazitabata ezandleni zazo, wazibekela endlwini; waza wawandulula amadoda, emka ke." 
2Kings5:25 Kodwa yena wangena, wema pambi kwenkosi yake. Waza u‐Elisha wati kuye: Uvela pina, Gehazi? Wayesiti: Isicaka sako besingayanga nalapa napaya." 
2Kings5:26 Koko wati kuye: Ibingayi nawe na intliziyo yam, xeshekweni indoda leyo yajika enqwelweni yayo ukuza kukukaulela? lixesha na lokwamkela isilivere, nelokwamkela izivato, nemiyezo yeminquma, nezitiya zemiti yeveyine, negusha, nenkabi, nezicaka, nezicakakazi?" 
2Kings5:27 Ngako isilepero sika‐Nahamane sonamatela kuwe, nakuyo inzalo yako kude kube ngunapakade. Waza wapuma ebusweni bake elileperi, emhlope njengengqweqwe." 
2Kings6:1 BAYE onyana babaprofite besiti ku‐Elisha: Bona ke, indawo apo sihlala kona ebusweni bako ixinene kuti:" 
2Kings6:2 makesiye e‐Yoredane, sitabate kona abanye ngabanye umqadi, size sizenzele apo indawo yokuhlala kuyo. Wayesiti: Yiyani." 
2Kings6:3 Kwati ke omnye: Zuvume ke, uye nezicaka zako. Wati: Ndiya kuya." 
2Kings6:4 Waza waya nabo. Bati bakufika e‐Yoredane, bagaula imiti." 
2Kings6:5 Kekaloku xeshekweni omnye abewisa umqadi, yati intsimbi yeyela emanzini; waza wakala, wati: Au, nkosi! ngokuba ibibolekiwe." 
2Kings6:6 Yati indoda katixo: Yeyele pina? Waza wayibonisa indawo. Yandula yanqumla uluti, yaluposela kona; yadada ke intsimbi." 
2Kings6:7 Yaza yati: Yicole kuwe. Wayesolula isandla sake, wayitabata." 
2Kings6:8 WAYE ukumkani we‐Siriya wayenza imfazwe ngakubo o‐Sirayeli, wacebisana nezicaka zake, esiti: Umnquba wam woba sendaweni etile." 
2Kings6:9 Kodwa indoda katixo yatuma kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Lumka ukuba ungadluleli kulondawo; ngokuba ama‐Siriya ehlele kona." 
2Kings6:10 Ngako ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli watumela endaweni eyabimxelele indoda katixo yamyala ngayo, wazilondoloza kona, bekungekanye, bekungekabini kanjako." 
2Kings6:11 Yaza intliziyo yokumkani we‐Siriya yaxaliswa pezu kwalento; ngako wabiza izicaka zake, wati kuzo: Aniyi kundityelela na ungubanina kwabetu ongecala lokumkani wo‐Sirayeli?" 
2Kings6:12 Saza sati esinye ezicakeni zake: Hai, nkosi yam, kumkani! ngu‐Elisha, umprofite okwa‐Sirayeli, owatyelayo kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli amazwi uwatetayo enkambilini yako yokulala." 
2Kings6:13 Wayesiti: Hambani, nibone apo akona, ukuze nditume ndimtabate. Kwaza kwaxelwa kuye, kusitwa: Nankuya e‐Dotane." 
2Kings6:14 Ngako watumela kona amahashe, nenqwelwana, nempi enkulu: ezibe zifika ngobusuku, zasiṙaula isixeko." 
2Kings6:15 Waza wavuka kusasa umkonzi wendoda katixo, wapuma ke; kekaloku nantsiya impi isingqonga isixeko, kwa namahashe nenqwelwana. Wandula umfana wayo wati kuyo: Au, nkosi yam! sesiya kuti nina ke?" 
2Kings6:16 Yayisiti: Ungoyiki; ngokuba bebaninzi abanati pezu kwabanabo. 
2Kings6:17 Waza watandaza u‐Elisha, wati: Yehova! zugabule amehlo ake, ukuze abone. Wandula uyehova wagabula amehlo omfana lowo, wada wabona; kekaloku, bona ke, intaba ibizele ngamahashe nenqwelwana zomlilo zimgqonga u‐Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Xeshekweni babehlele kuye, watandaza u‐Elisha kuyehova, wati: Zubabete ababantu ngobumfama. Waza wababeta ngobumfama, njengelizwi lika‐Elisha." 
2Kings6:19 Wandula wati u‐Elisha kubo: Asi yiyo le indlela, asi siso esi nesixeko; ndilandeleni mna, ndandiya kunikapela endodeni eniyifunayo. Waza wabakapela e‐Samariya." 
2Kings6:20 Kwaye kute, bakufika e‐Samariya, wandula wati u‐Elisha: Yehova! vula amehlo aba bantu, ukuze babone. Waza uyehova wavula amehlo abo, bada babona; kekaloku naba ke pakati kwe‐Samariya." 
2Kings6:21 Wayesiti ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli ku‐Elisha, akubabona: Ndibabete na, ndibabete na, bawo wam?" 
2Kings6:22 Kodwa wati: Akuyi kubabeta: unga ubeta na abo ubatimbileyo ngeṙele lako nangesipeta sako? beka isonka namanzi pambi kwabo, ukuba badle basele nokusela, baye enkosini yabo." 
2Kings6:23 Waza wabenzela umtendeleko omkulu: badla basela nokusela; wandula wabandulula, bemka, bona baya enkosini yabo. Ngako amabandla ama‐Siriya akabi sapinda ukuza elizweni lakwa‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings6:24 KODWA bekute emva kwoko, ukuba u‐Bene‐hadadi ukumkani we‐Siriya wahlanganisa wonke umkosi wake, wenyuka, wavingcela i‐Samariya." 
2Kings6:25 Kwaza kwabako indlala enkulu e‐Samariya; ngokuba, bona ke, bayivingcela, kwada kwa tengiswa intloko yeqwaṙashe ngamashumi asibozo amaqosha esilivere, nesiqingata sesine sekabe yelindle lamahobe ngesihlanu s amaqosha esilivere." 
2Kings6:26 Kwaza kwati, nxa ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli abedlula pezu kwodonga, wakala umfazi kuye, esiti: Siza, nkosi yam, kumkani!" 
2Kings6:27 Wayesiti: Engakusizi nje uyehova, kwovela pina ukusiza kwam? esibayeni sokubula, esincinezelweni seveyine, kusinina?" 
2Kings6:28 Walekela wati ukumkani kuye: Unandawo nina? Wayesiti: Umfazi lo wati kum: Nika unyana wako, ukuba sitye yena namhla, nonyana wam siya kumtya ngomso." 
2Kings6:29 Kwa njalo sampeka unyana wam, samtya ke: ndaza ndati kuye ngomnye umhla: Nika unyana wako, ukuba simtye; kodwa waselezimeza unyana wake." 
2Kings6:30 Kwaye kute, akuva ukumkani amazwi alomfazi, waṙazula izivato zake, nxa abedlula pezu kwodonga; baza babona abantu ukuba nantsi intlakantlaka ipezu kwenyama yake kwa pakati." 
2Kings6:31 Wayesiti: Makenje njalo kum utixo, alekele ukwenje njalo, ukuba intloko ka‐Elisha unyana ka‐Shafate iya kuma pezu kwake namhla!" 
2Kings6:32 Kekaloku u‐Elisha wahlala endlwini yake, nabadala bebehleli naye; waza ukumkani wasusa indoda ebusweni bake; kodwa singekafiki isigidimi kuye, wati kubadala: Niyabona na okokuba lonyana wombulali utumele ukunqumla intloko yam? kangelani, nxa sifika isigidimi, valani ucango, nisitya̔lele pandle elucangweni; isandi senyawo zenkosi yaso asisemva kwaso na?" 
2Kings6:33 Esateta nabo, bona ke, isigidimi sehlela kuye: — wayesiti ukumkani: Bona ke, ububi obu buvela kuyehova; yinina ukuba ndibe ndisatembela kuyehova?" 
2Kings7:1 Wandula wati u‐Elisha: Yivani ilizwi likayehova: utsho uyehova ukuti: Malunga nelixesha langomso kwotengiswa isilinganiso somgubo ocolekileyo ngeshekele, nezilinganiso zibini zeṙalasi ngeshekele, esangweni le‐Samariya." 
2Kings7:2 Laza iduna, owayama ukumkani pezu kwesandla salo, lapendula indoda katixo, lati: Bona ke, uyehova esenza izituba ezulwini nje, ibingabako lento na? Yayisiti: Bona ke, uya kuyibona ngamehlo ako, kodwa akuyi kutya kokwayo." 
2Kings7:3 Kekaloku bekuko amadoda amane engamaleperi ngasemnyango wesango: ati ke wona enye kwenye: Sihlalela nina apa, side sife?" 
2Kings7:4 ukuba siti: Siya kungena esixekweni, indlala isesixekweni ke, sasiya kufa kona; nokuba sihlala apa, siya kufa kanjalo: ngako kaloku, hambani, sipongomele emkosini wama‐Siriya; ukuba ayasilondoloza ebomini, siya kubudla ubomi; nokuba ayasifisa, siya kufa kodwa." 
2Kings7:5 Aza esuka pakati kwoncwalazi ukuya emnqubeni wama‐Siriya: xeshekweni abefikile esipelweni somnquba wama‐Siriya, bona ke, kwakungeko kona namntu." 
2Kings7:6 Ngokuba inkosi ibivisile umkosi wama‐Siriya intlokoma yenqwelo, nentlokoma yamahashe, intlokoma yempi enkulu; andula ati omnye kwomnye: Bona ke, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli ubaqeshile ngakuti okumkani bama‐Hete, nokumkani bama‐Jipete, ukusizuma." 
2Kings7:7 Abesukile ngako, esaba pakati kwoncwalazi, ashiya intente zawo, namahashe awo, namaqwaṙashe awo, umuquba njengokuba ubunjalo, esabela ubomi bawo." 
2Kings7:8 Kwa njalo amaleperi la eza esipelweni somnquba, angena ententeni, atya asela nokusela, asusa kona isilivere, negolide, nezivato, aya azifihla; aza abuya eza, angena kwenye intente, asusa nakona, aya afihla kanjalo." 
2Kings7:9 Andula ati elinye kwelinye: Asenzi tina ngokufaneleyo; umhla lo ngumhla wendaba ezilungileyo, kanti tina siti cwaka: ukuba siyalinda kude kukanye ukusa, sesiya kuzuza ityala; ngako kaloku hambani, siye sixelele indlu yokumkani." 
2Kings7:10 Asuka eza, abiza kumgcinisango wesixeko, ashumayela kubo, esiti: Kaseza emnqubeni wama‐Siriya, kekaloku bona ke, bekungeko kona namntu, nelizwi labantu, kodwa amahashe ebotshelelwe, namaqwaṙashe ebotshelelwe, nentente njengokuba zibe zinjalo." 
2Kings7:11 Waza wabiza abagcinisango, abaxelelayo indlu yokumkani pakati." 
2Kings7:12 Wandula wesuka ukumkani ebusuku, wati kuzo izicaka zake: Ndonixelela kambe into ayenzileyo kuti ama‐Siriya. Ayakwazi ukuba silambile; ngako apumile emnqubeni ukuya kuzimela endle, esiti: Nxa bapumileyo esixekweni, sobabamba behleli, singene esixekweni ke." 
2Kings7:13 Waza wapendula owasezicakeni zake, wati: Makutatyatwe ke amahlanu kuwo amahashe aseleyo, lawo aseleyo pakati kwalapa; (bona ke, oba njengaso sonke isihlwele so‐Sirayeli abaseleyo pakati kwalapa; bona ke, oba njengaso sonke isihlwele so‐Sirayeli abagqityelweyo;) size situme sibone." 
2Kings7:14 Kwaye kutatyatwa amahashe enqwelo ezimbini; waza watuma ukumkani emva kwomkosi wama‐Siriya, esiti: Hambani nibone." 
2Kings7:15 Basuka bawalandela kwada kwakuyo i‐Yoredane: kekaloku, bona ke, yonke indlela ibizele zizivato nempahla, abezilahlile ama‐Siriya ekunxameni kwawo. Zandula zabuya izigidimi, zashumayela kukumkani." 
2Kings7:16 Basuka bapuma abantu, bapanga umnquba wama‐Siriya. Kwaza kwa tengiswa isilinganiso somgubo ocolekileyo ngeshekele, nezilinganiso zibini zeṙalasi ngeshekele, njengelizwi likayehova." 
2Kings7:17 Wati ukumkani walipatisa iduna, elo wayama pezu kwesandla salo, pezu kwesango; baza abantu balinyatela esangweni, lada lafa, njengokuba ibitetile indoda katixo, eyatetayo nxa ukumkani wehlela kuyo." 
2Kings7:18 Kwaye kute ke njengokuba indoda katixo ibitetile kukumkani, isiti: Kuya ku tengiswa izilinganiso zibini zeṙalasi ngeshekele, nesilinganiso somgubo ocolekileyo ngeshekele, malunga nelixesha langomso, esangweni le‐Samariya." 
2Kings7:19 Laye iduna elo beliyipendula indoda katixo, lati: Bona ke, uyehova esenza izituba ezulwini nje, ibingabako lento na? Yaza yati: Bona ke, uya kuyibona ngamehlo ako, kodwa akuyi kutya kokwayo." 
2Kings7:20 Kwalihlela njalo ke; ngokuba abantu bebelinyatela esangweni, lada lafa." 
2Kings8:1 KEKALOKU u‐Elisha ebetetile kumfazi lowo unyana wake abembuyisele ekudliweni kwobomi, esiti: Suka, uhambe wena nendlu yako, uye upambukele apo ungapambukela kona: ngokuba uyehova ebizile indlala; kanjako iya kuza elizweni iminyaka esixe̔nxe." 
2Kings8:2 Wayesukile umfazi lowo, wenza ngalo ilizwi lendoda katixo: wahamba yena nendlu yake, waya wapambukela elizweni lama‐Filistiya iminyaka yasixe̔nxe." 
2Kings8:3 Kwaye kute, ekupeleni kweminyaka isixe̔nxe, waselebuya umfazi lowo elizweni lama‐Filistiya; waza wapuma ukuya kukala kukumkani ngenxa yendlu yake, nangenxa yomhlaba wake." 
2Kings8:4 Kekaloku ukumkani wateta no‐Gehazi, isicaka sendoda katixo, esiti: Zundixoxele zonke izinto ezinkulu azenzileyo u‐Elisha." 
2Kings8:5 Kwaza kwati, nxa abemxoxela ukumkani okokuba ebebuyisele ekudliweni kwobomi umntu ofileyo, bona ke, lomfazi, onyana wake abembuyisele ekudliweni kwobomi, wakala kukumkani ngenxa yendlu yake, nangenxa yomhlaba wake. Wandula wati u‐Gehazi: Nkosi yam, kumkani! nguye lo umfazi, nguye lo nonyana wake owabuyiselwa ekudliweni kwobomi ngu‐Elisha." 
2Kings8:6 Waza ukumkani wambuza umfazi, wati yena wamxoxela. Wandula ukumkani wammisela umbusi, esiti: Buyisa konke okube kukokwake, nazo zonke imveliso zomhlaba, kwa semhleni wabeshiya ilizwe kwada kwakaloku." 
2Kings8:7 Waya u‐Elisha weza e‐Damakusi, nxa u‐Bene‐hadadi ukumkani we‐Siriya ebesifa; kwaza kwaxelwa kuye, kusitwa: Indoda katixo ifikile apa." 
2Kings8:8 Waza wati ukumkani ku‐Hazayeli: Tabata ibaso esandleni sako, uhambe, uye kukaulela indoda katixo, ubuze kuyehova ngayo, usiti: Ndiya kupila na kwesisifo?" 
2Kings8:9 Wahamba u‐Hazayeli waya kuyikaulela, watabata ibaso esandleni sake, kwa zonke izinto ezilungileyo zase‐Damakusi, umtwalo wenkamela ezimashumi mane; wayesiza wema ebusweni bayo, wati: Unyana wako u‐Bene‐hadadi, ukumkani we‐Siriya, unditumile kuwe ukuti: Ndiya kupila na kwesisifo?" 
2Kings8:10 Waza u‐Elisha wati kuye: Hamba, uti kuye: Ungapila kambe. Kodwa uyehova undibonisile ukuba uya kufa yena ngenyaniso." 
2Kings8:11 Wandula wabekisa ubuso bake ngokuti nqi, wada wadana; yati indoda katixo yalila." 
2Kings8:12 Wayesiti u‐Hazayeli: Ililela nina inkosi yam? Yati ke: Ngokuba ndibazi ububi oya kubenza elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli: inqaba zalo wozilahlela emlilweni, namadodana alo wowabulala ngesiṙele, nentsatshana zalo wozityumza, nabamitiyo balo wobaqangqulula." 
2Kings8:13 Wayesiti u‐Hazayeli: Kodwa siyinto nina isicaka sako, siyinja na, ukuba siyenze lento inkulu? Wati u‐Elisha: Uyehova undibonisile ukuba wena woba ngukumkani pezu kwe‐Siriya." 
2Kings8:14 Wandula wemka ku‐Elisha, weza enkosini yake, eyati kuye: Wati nina kuwe u‐Elisha? Wayesiti: Ute kum: Uya kupila ngenyaniso." 
2Kings8:15 Kwaye kute ngomnye umhla, watabata incawe entlakantlaka, wayifaka emanzini, wayandlala ebusweni bayo, yada yafa: waza u‐Hazayeli waba ngukumkani esikundleni sayo." 
2Kings8:16 KEKALOKU ngomnyaka wesihlanu ka‐Yorame unyana ka‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, nxa u‐Yehoshafate ebengukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Yehorame unyana ka‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Kings8:17 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi matatu anamibini ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme iminyaka yasibozo." 
2Kings8:18 Wayehamba endleleni yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli, njengokuba benje njalo indlu ka‐Ahabi: ngokuba intombi ka‐Ahabi ibingumfazi wake; wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova." 
2Kings8:19 Kodwa uyehova ebengavumi ukutshabalalisa o‐Juda, ngenxa ka‐Davide isicaka sake: njengokuba ebetshilo kuye, ukuba uya kunika isibane kuye, na konyana bake, amaxesha onke." 
2Kings8:20 Emihleni yake ama‐Edome apongoma pantsi kwesandla so‐Juda, enza ukumkani pezu kwawo." 
2Kings8:21 Waza u‐Yorame wagqitela e‐Tsahire, nazo zonke inqwelwana kunye naye; waselesuka ebusuku, wabeta ama‐Edome abengqonga, nenkosi zenqwelwana; baye abantu besabela ezintenteni zabo." 
2Kings8:22 Noko ama‐Edome apongoma pantsi kwesandla so‐Juda kwada kwanamhla nje. Kwandula kwapongoma i‐Libena kwa ngeloxesha ke. 
2Kings8:23 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Yorame, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings8:24 Wada u‐Yorame walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide; waza u‐Ahaziya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings8:25 Ngomnyaka weshumi linesibini ka‐Yorame unyana ka‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, waba ngukumkani u‐Ahaziya unyana ka‐Yehorame ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Kings8:26 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamibini u‐Ahaziya ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani; ubungumnyaka mnye wapata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina lalingu‐Hataliya, intombi ka‐Omri ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings8:27 Wayehamba endleleni yendlu ka‐Ahabi, wenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengendlu ka‐Ahabi: ngokuba ebengumyeni kwindlu ka‐Ahabi." 
2Kings8:28 Waya no‐Yorame unyana ka‐Ahabi, ukulwa ngakuye u‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya, e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi; aza ama‐Siriya ambeta u‐Yorame." 
2Kings8:29 Ngako wabuya u‐Yorame ukumkani ukuya kupoliswa e‐Yezerele emanxebeni abewenzelwe ngama‐Siriya e‐Rama, ekulweni kwake no‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya. Waza wehla u‐Ahaziya unyana ka‐Yehorame ukumkani wo‐Juda, ukuya kubona u‐Yorame unyana ka‐Ahabi e‐Yezerele, ngokuba ebesifa." 
2Kings9:1 WANDULA u‐Elisha umprofite wabiza omnye konyana babaprofite, wati kuye: Binqa isinqe sako, utabate eligutyana leoli esandleni sako, uye e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi:" 
2Kings9:2 uti wakufika kona, umkangelele apo u‐Jehu, unyana ka‐Yehoshafate, unyana ka‐Nimshi, ungene, umenze asuke pakati kwabazalwana bake, umzise enkambilini yapakati;" 
2Kings9:3 uze utabate igutyana leoli, uyigalele pezu kwentloko yake, uti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ndikutambisile ube ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli. Wandule uvule ucango, usabe, ungalibali." 
2Kings9:4 Yasuka indodana leyo, indodana engumprofite, yaya e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi." 
2Kings9:5 Kekaloku yakufika, bona ke, inkosi zempi zibe zihleli kona; yaza yati: Ndinelizwi kuwe, nkosi! Wati u‐Jehu: Kuwupina kuti sonke? Yayisiti: Kuwe, nkosi!" 
2Kings9:6 Wesuka ke, wangena endlwini; yaza yayigalela ioli pezu kwentloko yake, yati kuye: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ndikutambisile ube ngukumkani pezu kwabantu bakayehova, pezu kwo‐Sirayeli:" 
2Kings9:7 wauya kubeta indlu ka‐Ahabi inkosi yako, ukuba ndipindezele igazi lezicaka zam abaprofite, negazi lazo zonke izicaka zikayehova, esandleni sika‐Jezebele:" 
2Kings9:8 ngokuba yonke indlu ka‐Ahabi iya kutshabalala; ndandiya kunqamlela u‐Ahabi lowo unobudoda, nalowo uvaliweyo nalowo ukululekileyo, kwa‐Sirayeli;" 
2Kings9:9 ndenze indlu ka‐Ahabi njengayo indlu ka‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, nanjengayo indlu ka‐Bahasha unyana ka‐Ahiya:" 
2Kings9:10 no‐Jezebele izinja ziya kumdla enqeleni yase‐Yezerele, kungayi kubako namnye ukumncw̔aba. Yaza yavula ucango, yabaleka." 
2Kings9:11 Wandula u‐Jehu wapumela kuzo izicaka zenkosi yake; kwaza kwatiwa kuye: Kulungile na? ebezela nina kuwe elogeza? Wayesiti kuzo: Niyayazi indoda leyo, nokuteta kwayo." 
2Kings9:12 Koko zati: Uyaxoka; sixelele kambe. Wayesiti: Njengokunje nanjengokunje yateta kum, isiti: Utsho uyehova ukati: Ndikutambisile ube ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings9:13 Zaza zanxama ke, zatabata ezinye ngezinye ingubo yazo, zayibeka ngapantsi kwake kwa pezu kwezinyukelo, zavutela ngexilongo, zati: Uba ngukumkani u‐Jehu!" 
2Kings9:14 Wandula u‐Jehu, unyana ka‐Yehoshafate, unyana ka‐Nimshi, wenza ingcebiswano ngakuye u‐Yorame. (Kekaloku u‐Yorame wabegcina i‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi, yena no‐Sirayeli bonke, ngenxa ka‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya;" 
2Kings9:15 kodwa ebebuyile u‐Yorame ukumkani ukuya kupoliswa e‐Yezerele emanxebeni abewenzelwe ngama‐Siriya ekulweni kwake no‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya.) Wayesiti u‐Jehu: Ukuba kungumxe̔lo wenu, makangapumi osindileyo esixekweni ukuya kushumayela oku e‐Yezerele." 
2Kings9:16 Waza wakwela u‐Jehu enqwelwaneni, wahambela e‐Yezerele; ngokuba u‐Yorame ebelele kona. Kanjalo u‐Ahaziya ukumkani wo‐Juda ebehlile ukuza kumbona u‐Yorame." 
2Kings9:17 Kekaloku umlindi ebemi pezu kwenqaba e‐Yezerele, owabona isihlwele sika‐Jehu ekuzeni kwake, wati: Ndiyabona isihlwele mna. Waza wati u‐Yorame: Tabata umkweli, umtume ukuya kubakaulela, aze ati: Luxolo na?" 
2Kings9:18 Wasuka waya umkweli wehashe ukumkaulela, wati: Utsho ukumkani ukuti: Luxolo na? Wayesiti u‐Jehu: Uxolo luyinto nina kuwe? jikela ngasemva kwam. Waxela umlindi, esiti: isigidimi seza kubo, kodwa asibuyi." 
2Kings9:19 Waza watuma umkweli wehashe ngokwesibini, owafika kubo, wati: Utsho ukumkani ukuti: Luxolo na? Wayesiti u‐Jehu: Uxolo luyinto nina kuwe? jikela ngasemva kwam." 
2Kings9:20 Waxela ke umlindi, esiti: Weza kubo, kodwa akabuyi; kanjako ukuqu̔ba kunjengokuqu̔ba kuka Jehu unyana ka‐Nimshi, ngokuba equ̔ba ngobugeza." 
2Kings9:21 Wandula wati u‐Yorame: Bopa. Kwaza kwabotshwa inqwelwana yake. Wasuka wapuma u‐Yorame ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, no‐Ahaziya ukumkani wo‐Juda, omnye nomnye enqwelwaneni yake; baye bepuma ukuya kukaulela u‐Jehu, bahlangana naye esahlulweni somhlaba sika‐Nabote um‐Yezerele." 
2Kings9:22 Kwaye kute, nxa u‐Yorame wambona u‐Jehu, waza wati: Luxolo na, Jehu? Wayesiti: Luxolo olunina nxa imibulo ka‐Jezebele unyoko wako, nezenzo zobugqi zake, ziseninzi kangaka?" 
2Kings9:23 Waza u‐Yorame wasonga izandla zake, wesaba, wati ku‐Ahaziya: Kuko inkohliso, Ahaziya!" 
2Kings9:24 Kuloko u‐Jehu wabamba isipeta ngesandla sake, wambeta u‐Yorame pakati kwemikono yake, ukuba utolo lwapuma entliziyweni yake, waza watoba pantsi enqwelwaneni yake." 
2Kings9:25 Wandula wati u‐Jehu ku‐Bidekare injengele yake: Funqula, umpose kwesosahlulo somhlaba sika‐Nabote um‐Yezerele: ngokuba kumbula, nxa sanxulumana mna nawe ukukwela emva kwo‐Ahabi uyise, okokuba uyehova wabeka pezu kwake lomgwebo wokuti:" 
2Kings9:26 Ngenyaniso igazi lika‐Nabote, negazi lonyana bake, ndilibonile izolo, utsho uyehova; ndandiya kupindezela kuwe kwesisahlulo somhlaba, utsho uyehova! Ngako kaloku, funqula, umpose kwesosahlulo somhlaba, njengalo ilizwi likayehova." 
2Kings9:27 Kodwa u‐Ahaziya ukumkani wo‐Juda, akubona oku, wesaba ngendlela yendlu yomyezo. Wasuka u‐Jehu wamputuma, wati: Mbeteni naye enqwelwaneni. Benje njalo ke eqineni le‐Gure, elingase‐Yibelame; wandula wesabela e‐Megido, wafa kona." 
2Kings9:28 Zaza izicaka zake zamsa ngenqwelwana e‐Yerusaleme, zamncw̔aba encw̔abeni lake ndawonye noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide." 
2Kings9:29 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye ka‐Yorame unyana ka‐Ahabi, waba ngukumkani u‐Ahaziya pezu kwo‐Juda." 
2Kings9:30 Wada watika u‐Jehu e‐Yezerele. Wati akuva u‐Jezebele, wafaka amehlo ake iqabo, wayenza ntle intloko yake, wakangela pandle ngefenstile." 
2Kings9:31 Nxa u‐Jehu abengena esangweni, wandula wati: Bekuko uxolo na ku‐Zimri, owabulalayo inkosi yake?" 
2Kings9:32 Waza wapakamisa ubuso bake ngasefenstileni, wati: Ngubanina ongecala lam? ngubanina? Kwaza kwakangela pandle ngakuye abatenwa babini umhlaumbi batatu." 
2Kings9:33 Wayesiti: Mkahleleni pantsi. Bamkahlela pantsi ke; kwaza kwasasazwa kwigazi lake pezu kwodonga, napezu kwamahashe; wamnyatela kanjalo." 
2Kings9:34 Waza wangena, wadla wasela nokusela, wati: Yiyani nikangele lomfazi oqalekisiweyo, nimncw̔abe, ngokuba eyintombi yokumkani." 
2Kings9:35 Basuka baya ukumncw̔aba; kodwa abafumana nto kuye, kupela lukakai, nenyawo, nentende zezandla." 
2Kings9:36 Ngako babuya beza, bamxelela. Wayesiti: Le nto lilizwi likayehova, elo walitetayo ngesicaka sake u‐Elija um‐Tishebi, lisiti: Enqeleni yase‐Yezerele izinja ziya kuyidla inyama ka‐Jezebele:" 
2Kings9:37 saye isidumbu sika‐Jezebele siya kuba njengomgquba pezu kwobuso bomhlaba, enqeleni yase‐Yezerele; ukuba akuyi kutiwa: Lo‐ungu‐Jezebele." 
2Kings10:1 WAYE u‐Ahabi ebenonyana abangamashumi asixe̔nxe e‐Samariya. Waza u‐Jehu waba̔la incwadi, watumela e‐Samariya, kwinkosana zase‐Yezerele, kwabadala, nakwabondli babantwana baka‐Ahabi, esiti:" 
2Kings10:2 Kekaloku yakufika lencwadi kuni, benani onyana benkosi yenu nje, zinani kanjalo inqwelwana namahashe, nesixeko esinqatyisiweyo, nezixo̔bo;" 
2Kings10:3 kangelelani lowo ulungileyo nofaneleyo konyana benkosi yenu, nimbeke pezu kweterone yoyise; nize nilwele indlu yenkosi yenu." 
2Kings10:4 Kodwa bebesoyika kakulu kunene, bati: Bona ke, okumkani bebabini abema pambi kwake; sesiya kuti nina ukuma tina?" 
2Kings10:5 Baza obepezu kwendlu, nobepezu kwesixeko, nabadala, nabondli, batuma ku‐Jehu, ukuti: Sizizicaka zako tina, nako konke uya kusixelela kona siya kukwenza; asiyi kumenza namnye umntu ukumkani; yenza oko kulungileyo emehlweni ako." 
2Kings10:6 Wandula waba̔la incwadi kubo ngokwesibini, esiti: Ukuba ningabam, nokuba niya kupulapula ilizwi lam, zitabateni intloko zamadoda, zonyana benkosi yenu, nize kum e‐Yezerele malunga nelixesha langomso. Kekaloku onyana bokumkani, bengamadoda angamashumi asixe̔nxe, bebenabakulu besixeko abebebakulisile." 
2Kings10:7 Kwaza kwati, yakufika incwadi leyo kubo, batabata onyana bokumkani, babulala amadoda angamashumi asixe̔nxe, babeka intloko zawo ezingobozini, bazitumela kuye e‐Yezerele." 
2Kings10:8 Kwaye kusiza isigidimi, esashumayela kuye, sisiti: Bazisile intloko zonyana bokumkani. Wayesiti: Zibekeni ngemfumba zimbini emnyango wesango kude kuse." 
2Kings10:9 Kwabekute kwakusa, wapuma, wema, wati kubo bonke abantu: Nina nilungile; bona ke, ndaceba ngakuyo inkosi yam, ndayibulala; kodwa ngubanina obabuleleyo bonke aba?" 
2Kings10:10 yazini kambe, ukuba akuyi kuwa nento yelizwi likayehova ngasemhlabeni, owalitetayo uyehova pezu kwendlu ka‐Ahabi: ngokuba uyehova ekwenzile oko wakutetayo ngesicaka sake u‐Elija." 
2Kings10:11 Wandula u‐Jehu wabulala bonke abaseleyo kwindlu ka‐Ahabi e‐Yezerele, nabo bonke abakulu bake, nabazane bake, nabaperisite bake, wada akamshiyela namnye oseleyo." 
2Kings10:12 Wada wesuka, wemka, waya e‐Samariya. Nxa abese‐Bete‐hekede yabalusi, endleleni," 
2Kings10:13 u‐Jehu wafumanana nabazalwana baka‐Ahaziya ukumkani wo‐Juda, wati: Ningobanina? Baye besiti: Tina singabazalwana baka‐Ahaziya; sasihlile ukuza kubulisa onyana bokumkani nonyana bokumkanikazi." 
2Kings10:14 Wand’ ukuti: Babambeni behleli. Baza bababamba behleli, bababulala ngasemnxunyeni wase‐Bete‐hekede, bengamadoda angamashumi mane anesibini; akasalisa namnye kubo." 
2Kings10:15 Nxa abemkile kona, wafumanana no‐Yehonadabi, unyana ka‐Rekabe, esiza ukumkaulela; waza wambulisa, wati kuye: Intliziyo yako ilungelelene na, njengokuba intliziyo yam ilungelelene nentliziyo yako? Wayesiti u‐Yehonadabi: Injalo. Ukuba injalo, ndinike isandla sako. Wanika ke isandla sake; waza wamnyukisela kuye enqwelwaneni." 
2Kings10:16 Wayesiti: Hamba nam, ubone ikwele lam ngenxa kayehova. Kwa njalo bamkwelisa enqwelwaneni yake."
