2Kings10:17 Wati akufika e‐Samariya, wabulala bonke abaseleyo ku‐Ahabi e‐Samariya, wada wamtshabalalisa; njengelizwi likayehova, elo wabelitetile ku‐Elija." 
2Kings10:18 Wandula u‐Jehu wabahlanganisa bonke abantu, wati kubo: u‐Ahabi wakonza u‐Bali ngokuncinane; u‐Jehu uya kumkonza ngokukulu." 
2Kings10:19 Ngako kaloku, bizani bonke abaprofite baka‐Bali, zonke izicaka zake, nabo bonke abaperisite bake, beze kum; makungabiko namnye ongekoyo: ngokuba ndinombingo omkulu wokwenze lwa u‐Bali; osukuba eya kuba engeko, akayi kudla ubomi. Kodwa u‐Jehu wenza ngobuqinga, ukuze ababubise abakonzi baka‐Bali." 
2Kings10:20 Walekela wati u‐Jehu: Miselani u‐Bali intlanganiso enkulu. Baza bashumayela ke. 
2Kings10:21 Waye u‐Jehu kanjalo watuma pakati kwe‐Sirayeli yonke; bandula beza bonke abakonzi baka‐Bali, kwada akwasala namnye obengezi: baye besiza endlwini ka‐Bali, ukuba indlu ka‐Bali ibizele kwa kwenye incam kwada kwakwenye." 
2Kings10:22 Wandula wati kulowo ubepezu kwendlu yezivato: Kupela bonke abakonzi baka‐Bali izivato. Wabakupela izivato ke. 
2Kings10:23 Waza wangena u‐Jehu, no‐Yehonadabi unyana ka‐Rekabe, endlwini ka‐Bali, wati kubo abakonzi baka‐Bali: Pengululani, nibone ukuba kungabiko apa nani namnye wabakonzi bakayehova, kubeko abakonzi baka‐Bali bodwa." 
2Kings10:24 Kekaloku bakungena ukwenza imibingelelo namadini okutshiswa, wandula u‐Jehu wawamisa ngapandle amadoda angamashumi asibozo, wati: Lowamntu, kuwo onke amadoda endiwazisileyo ezandleni zenu, osindayo, ubomi bake omsindisayo boba sesikundleni sobomi bake." 
2Kings10:25 Kwaye kute, nxa abegqibile ukwenza idini lokutshiswa, wati u‐Jehu kumlisela nakuzo injengele: Ngenani, babeteni, makungapumi namnye. Baza bababeta ngohlangoti lweṙele; kanjalo umlisela nenjengele babaposa pandle, baya esixekweni sendlu ka‐Bali." 
2Kings10:26 Bandula bakupa izifanekiso endlwini ka‐Bali, bazitshisa." 
2Kings10:27 Kanjako basicita isifanekiso sika‐Bali; bayicita nendlu ka‐Bali, bayenza ibe yindlu yelindle kude kwanamhla." 
2Kings10:28 Kwa njalo u‐Jehu watshabalalisa u‐Bali kwa‐Sirayeli. 
2Kings10:29 Kodwa izono zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone, akapambuka u‐Jehu ekuzilandeleni, kwa amatole egolide abese‐Betele nabese‐Dane." 
2Kings10:30 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Jehu: Ngenxa yokuba ulungisile ukwenza okufaneleyo emehlweni am, ukuba wenzile kwindlu ka‐Ahabi njengako konke obekusentliziyweni yam, onyana bako besesine isizukulwana baya kuhlala pezu kweterone yakwa‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings10:31 Kodwa u‐Jehu akalumkela ukuhamba emtetweni kayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngayo yonke intliziyo yake; akapambuka kuzo izono zika‐Jerobome, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone." 
2Kings10:32 Ngaleyomihla waqala uyehova ukunqamla kwa‐Sirayeli: ngokuba u‐Hazayeli wababeta kuyo yonke imida yakwa‐Sirayeli; 
2Kings10:33 kutabata e‐Yoredane ngasekupumeni kwelanga, lonke ilizwe le‐Gileyadi, elama‐Gadi, nelama‐Rubene, nelama‐Manase; kuyo i‐Harohere, engasemlanjeni we‐Arenone, ne‐Gileyadi, ne‐Bashane." 
2Kings10:34 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Jehu, nako konke abekwenza, nawo onke amandla ake, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
2Kings10:35 Wada walala u‐Jehu noyise bake, wancw̔atywa e‐Samariya; waza u‐Yehowahazi unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings10:36 Nemihla abepata ubukumkani u‐Jehu pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, ibiyiminyaka engamashumi mabini anesibozo." 
2Kings11:1 KEKALOKU u‐Hataliya, unina ka‐Ahaziya, akubona ukuba unyana wake ufile, wandula wesuka wabubisa yonke inzalo yobukumkani." 
2Kings11:2 Kodwa u‐Yehosheba, intombi yokumkani u‐Yorame, udade ka‐Ahaziya, wamtabata u‐Yohashe unyana ka‐Ahaziya, wamba̔ pakati kwonyana bokumkani ababebulewe, wambeka yena nomanyisikazi wake enkambilini yemandlalo: kwa njalo bamfihla ku‐Hataliya, ukuba wabengabulawa." 
2Kings11:3 Wayeko naye endlwini kayehova ezimele kona iminyaka yamitandatu. Waza u‐Hataliya wapata ubukumkani pezu kwelizwe. 
2Kings11:4 Kodwa ngomnyaka wesixe̔nxe watuma u‐Yoyada, watabata inkosi zamakulu, ezamadindili nezomlisela, wazingenisa kuye endlwini kayehova, walwenza ucebano nazo, wazifungisa endlwini kayehova, wazibonisa unyana wokumkani." 
2Kings11:5 Waza waziyalela ngokuti: Nantsi indawo eniya kuyenza: esinye isiqingata sesitatu kuni eningenayo ngesabata, bona boba ngabagcini bokugcinwa kwendlu yokumkani;" 
2Kings11:6 nesinye isiqingata sesitatu, boba sesangweni le‐Sure; nesinye isiqingata sesitatu, boba sesangweni emva kwomlisela: kwa njalo niya kugcina ukugcinwa kwendlu, kuze kukweleliswe." 
2Kings11:7 Kanjako izahlulo zibini pakati kwenu nonke enipumayo ngesabata, bona baya kugcina ukugcinwa kwendlu kayehova ngakuye ukumkani." 
2Kings11:8 Naniya kujikelezela ukumkani ngokungqonga, abanye ngabanye benezixo̔bo zabo ezandleni zabo; nalowo ungenayo pakati kwamahlukahluka, makafiswe: nize nibeko nokumkani ekupumeni kwake nasekungeneni kwake." 
2Kings11:9 Zaye zisenza inkosi zamakulu njengako konke abeyalele ngako u‐Yoyada umperisite, zatabata ezinye ngezinye amadoda azo, lawo abeya kungena ngesabata, kunye nalawo abeya kupuma ngesabata, zeza ku‐Yoyada umperisite." 
2Kings11:10 Waza umperisite wanika kuzo inkosi zamakulu izikali namakaka, ezo ezibe zizezokumkani u‐Davide, ezibe zisendlwini kayehova." 
2Kings11:11 Ati amadoda omlisela ema amanye ngamanye enezixo̔bo zawo ezandleni zawo, kwa kulo elokunene icala lendlu kwada kwakulo elokohlo icala lendlu, ngasesibingelweni nangasendlwini, kufupi nokumkani ngokungqonga." 
2Kings11:12 Wandula wamkupa unyana wokumkani, wayibeka ikrone pezu kwentloko yake, wamnika nesinqi̔no; baza bamenza ukumkani, bamtambisa; kanjalo babambata izandla, bati: Makapile ukumkani!" 
2Kings11:13 Wati akuva u‐Hataliya intlokoma yomlisela ne yabantu, wasuka weza ebantwini endlwini kayehova." 
2Kings11:14 Waza wakangela, kekaloku nankuya ukumkani emi pezu kwendawo epezulu, njengokuba isiko belinjalo, nenkosi nabanamaxilongo ngakuye ukumkani; bati bonke abantu belizwe bavuya, bavutela ngamaxilongo. Wandula u‐Hataliya waṙazula izivato zake, wabiza ngokuti: Yingcebiswano, yingcebiswano!" 
2Kings11:15 Koko u‐Yoyada umperisite wayalelayo inkosi zamakulu, abongama bempi, wati kuzo: Mkupeleni pandle kwamahlukahluka; nalowo umlandelayo nimfise ngeṙele. Ngokuba ebete umperisite: Makangafiswa endlwini kayehova." 
2Kings11:16 Kwaza kwamkwelelwa amacala omabini; waya ngendlela yokungena kwamahashe ukuza endlwini yokumkani; wafiswa apo ke. 
2Kings11:17 Wandula u‐Yoyada walwenza ucebano pakati kwoyehova nokumkani nabantu, ukuba babe ngabantu bakayehova; napakati kwokumkani nabantu." 
2Kings11:18 Baza bangena bonke abantu belizwe endlwini ka‐Bali, bayicita: izibingelo zake nemifanekiso yake bakolisa ukuziqekeza, no‐Matane umperisite ka‐Bali bambulala pambi kwezibingelo. Wati umperisite kanjalo wamisa abalindi endlwini kayehova." 
2Kings11:19 Wandula watabata inkosi zamakulu, namadindili, nomlisela, nabo bonke abantu belizwe, abehlayo nokumkani kuyo indlu kayehova, beza ngendlela yesango lomlisela endlwini yokumkani. Waza wahlala pezu kweterone yabo okumkani." 
2Kings11:20 Baye bevuya bonke abantu belizwe, sati isixeko sanokwonwaba; no‐Hataliya bebemfisile ngeṙele ngasendlwini yokumkani." 
2Kings12:1 EBEYIMINYAKA isixe̔nxe u‐Yehohashe ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani. Ngomnyaka wesixe̔nxe ka‐Jehu waba ngukumkani u‐Yehohashe, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mane e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Tsibiya, owase‐Beresheba." 
2Kings12:2 Waye u‐Yehohashe esenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova yonke imihla yake, leyo wabemfundisa ngayo u‐Yoyada umperisite." 
2Kings12:3 Kodwa indawo ezipakamileyo bezingasuswa: abantu basabinga baqumisa ezindaweni ezipakamileyo. 
2Kings12:4 Wada wati u‐Yehohashe kubaperisite: Yonke imali yezinto ezingcwele eziswayo endlwini kayehova, imali yalowo ugqitela kwababalweyo, n emali yeziqu esinye ngesinye njeng okulinganiswa kwaso, nayo yonke imali ekungena entliziyweni yomntu ukuyizisa endlwini kayehova," 
2Kings12:5 mabati abaperisite bayitabatele kubo, besamkela abanye ngabanye kubazane babo; bandule balungise intanda zendlu, apo kusukuba kuya kufunyanwa kona intanda." 
2Kings12:6 Kodwa kwakute ngomnyaka wamashumi mabini anesitatu wokumkani u‐Yehohashe, abaperisite bebengalungisanga intanda zendlu." 
2Kings12:7 Wandula ukumkani u‐Yehohashe wabiza u‐Yoyada umperisite, n abanye abaperisite, wati kubo: Kunganina ukuba ningazilungisi intanda zendlu? ngako kaloku ningabi ni s amkela imali kubazane benu, koko yinikeleni intanda zendlu." 
2Kings12:8 Bavuma ke abaperisite ukuba bangabi be s amkela imali ebantwini, nokuba bangalungisi intanda zendlu." 
2Kings12:9 Kodwa u‐Yoyada umperisite watabata ityeya, wajigija intunja esicikweni sayo, wayibeka ngasesibingelweni, ngecala lasekunene ekungeneni kwomntu endlwini kayehova; baza abaperisite abagcinayo umnyango bafaka kona yonke imali ebiziswa kuyo indlu kayehova." 
2Kings12:10 Kwabekute, xeshekweni babona ukuba imali etyeyeni ininzi, kwenyuka umba̔li wokumkani nomperisite omkulu, bayibopa, bayibala imali ebifunyanwa endlwini kayehova." 
2Kings12:11 Baza bayinika imali seilinganisiwe ezandleni zabawenzayo umsebenzi, ababe bonganyisiwe pezu kwendlu kayehova; bati bona bayikupela kwincibi zemiti nakubaki, ababesebenza endlwini kayehova," 
2Kings12:12 nakubenzi bendonga, nakubabazi bamatye, nokuba kutengwe imiti namatye aqandulweyo, kuze kulungiswe intanda zayo indlu kayehova, nangenxa yako konke okube kukutshelwa indlu ukuyilungisa." 
2Kings12:13 Kodwa bekungenzelwa indlu kayehova izikotile zesilivere, izicimo, izitya zokufefela, amaxilongo, enye impahla yegolide, nenye impahla yesilivere, ngemali ebiziswa kuyo indlu kayehova:" 
2Kings12:14 koko banikayo yona kwabo bawenzayo umsebenzi; baye belungisa ngayo indlu kayehova. 
2Kings12:15 Kanjako ababuza amadoda, abayinikayo imali leyo ezandleni zawo, ukuba anike kwabenzayo umsebenzi; ngokuba wona ebesenza ngenyaniso." 
2Kings12:16 Imali yetyala, nemali yezono, yona ibingaziswa endlwini kayehova; ibiyeyabaperisite." 
2Kings12:17 Okuya wenyuka u‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya, walwa ngakuyo i‐Gate, wayitimba: wandula u‐Hazayeli wabeka ubuso bake ukuya kunyuka ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme." 
2Kings12:18 Koko u‐Yehohashe ukumkani wo‐Juda watabata zonke izinto ezingcwele ababezingcwalisile u‐Yehoshafate, no‐Yehorame, no‐Ahaziya, oyise bake, okumkani bo‐Juda, nezake izinto ezingcwele, nayo yonke igolide ebifunyanwa pakati kwendyebo zendlu kayehova nezendlu yokumkani, wazituma ku‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya: waza wenyuka engayi e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Kings12:19 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Yohashe, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings12:20 Zaye zisuka izicaka zake, zenza ingcebiswano, zambulala u‐Yohashe endlwini ye‐Milo, eyehlayo ngase‐Sila:" 
2Kings12:21 ngokuba u‐Yozakare unyana ka‐Shimehate, no‐Yehozabadi unyana ka‐Shomere, izicaka zake, bambeta, wada wafa; baza bamncw̔aba noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide: wati u‐Amatsiya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings13:1 NGOMNYAKA wamashumi mabini anesitatu ka‐Yohashe unyana ka‐Ahaziya ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Yehowahazi unyana ka‐Jehu pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Samariya, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinesixe̔nxe." 
2Kings13:2 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, walandela izono zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone; akapambuka kuzo." 
2Kings13:3 Ngako yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakubo o‐Sirayeli; waza wabanikela esandleni sika‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya, nasesandleni sika‐Bene‐hadadi unyana ka‐Hazayeli, yonke imihla leyo." 
2Kings13:4 Wada u‐Yehowahazi wabongoza ubuso bukayehova; wati uyehova wapulapula kuye: ngokuba ebebona ukubandezelwa kwo‐Sirayeli, ukuba ukumkani we‐Siriya wababandezela." 
2Kings13:5 (Wayenika uyehova ko‐Sirayeli umsindisi, bada bapuma pantsi kwesandla sama‐Siriya; lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwahlala ezintenteni zalo, njengapambili." 
2Kings13:6 Noko belungapambuki kuzo izono zendlu ka‐Jerobome, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone; beluhamba kuzo: kanjalo u‐Ashera ebesemi e‐Samariya.)" 
2Kings13:7 Ngokuba ebengabasalisanga ku‐Yehowahazi abantu, kupela amashumi mahlanu abakweli bamahashe, neshumi lenqwelwana, neshumi lamawaka abahamba ngenyawo: ngokuba ukumkani we‐Siriya ebebatshabalalisile, wabenza njengotuli ngokubula." 
2Kings13:8 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Yehowahazi, nako konke abekwenza, namandla ake, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
2Kings13:9 Wada u‐Yehowahazi walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa e‐Samariya: waza u‐Yohashe unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings13:10 Ngomnyaka wamashumi matatu anesixe̔nxe ka‐Yohashe ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Yehohashe unyana ka‐Yehowahazi pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Samariya, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinesitandatu." 
2Kings13:11 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; akapambuka kuzo zonke izono zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone; wahamba kuzo." 
2Kings13:12 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Yohashe, nako konke abekwenza, namandla ake owabesilwa ngawo ngakuye u‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
2Kings13:13 Wada walala u‐Yohashe noyise bake; waza u‐Jerobome wahlala pezu kweterone yake: waye u‐Yohashe ebencw̔atywa e‐Samariya ndawonye nokumkani bo‐Sirayeli. 
2Kings13:14 Kekaloku u‐Elisha wabesifa sisifo sake owabuba ngaso. Wandula u‐Yohashe ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wehlela kuye, walila pezu kwobuso bake, wati: Bawo wam, bawo wam! inqwelo yo‐Sirayeli, nabakweli babo!" 
2Kings13:15 Wayesiti u‐Elisha kuye: Tabata isipeta nentolo. Waza watabatela kuye isipeta nentolo. 
2Kings13:16 Walekela wati kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: Beka isandla sako pezu kwaso isipeta. Wabeka ke isandla sake: wati u‐Elisha wabeka izandla zake pezu kwezandla zokumkani. 
2Kings13:17 Wayesiti: Vula ifenstile ngasempumalanga. Wavula ke. Waza u‐Elisha wati: Tola. Watola ke. Wayesiti: Utolo lwosindiso lukayehova, notolo lwosindiso ngakuwo ama‐Siriya; ngokuba uya kubeta ama‐Siriya e‐Afeki, ude uwagqibele." 
2Kings13:18 Wabuya wati: Zitabate intolo. Watabata ke. Waza wati kukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: Beta ngasemhlabeni. Wabeta ke amaxesha amatatu, wand’ ukuti nqumama." 
2Kings13:19 Yaza indoda katixo yamqumbela kunene, yati: Unga ubetile amaxesha amahlanu umhlaumbi amatandatu; oko ubuya kubeta ama‐Siriya wada wawagqibela; kanti kaloku, uya kuwabeta amaxesha matatu kupela." 
2Kings13:20 Wada wafa u‐Elisha, wancw̔atywa. Aza amabandla ama‐Mowabi afika elizweni ekutwaseni kwomnyaka." 
2Kings13:21 Kwaye kute, nxa babencw̔aba indoda, bona ke, babona ibandla; baza bayiposa indoda leyo encw̔abeni lika‐Elisha; yati yakungena yacukumisa amatambo ka‐Elisha, yabuya yapila, yapakama pezu kwenyawo zayo." 
2Kings13:22 Kekaloku u‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya wabandezela o‐Sirayeli yonke imihla ka‐Yehowahazi. 
2Kings13:23 Kodwa uyehova wabenofefe ngakubo, wabapata ngenceba, wababuka, ngenxa yocebano lwake no‐Abrahame, n o‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi; engavumanga ukubatshabalalisa, engabagxotanga ebusweni bake kanjalo, kwada kwakaloku." 
2Kings13:24 Wada wafa u‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya; wati u‐Bene‐hadadi unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake. 
2Kings13:25 Waza u‐Yehohashe unyana ka‐Yehowahazi, wabuya wazibamba esandleni sika‐Bene‐hadadi unyana ka‐Hazayeli izixeko ezo wabezibambile yena esandleni sika‐Yehowahazi uyise ngokulwa: ngamaxesha matatu u‐Yohashe wambetayo, wabuyisa izixeko zakwa‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings14:1 NGOMNYAKA wesibini ka‐Yohashe unyana ka‐Yehowahazi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, waba ngukumkani u‐Amatsiya unyana ka‐Yohashe ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Kings14:2 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme iminyaka yamashumi mabini anesitoba. Igama lonina belingu‐Yehohadane, owase‐Yerusaleme." 
2Kings14:3 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, kodwa bekungenjengo‐Davide uyise; wenza ngako konke abekwenzile u‐Yohashe uyise." 
2Kings14:4 Noko indawo ezipakamileyo bezingasuswa; abantu basabinga baqumisa ezindaweni ezipakamileyo. 
2Kings14:5 Kwaza kwati, okuya ubukumkani bebuqinile esandleni sake, wabulala izicaka zake ezibe zimbulele ukumkani uyise." 
2Kings14:6 Kanti abantwana bababulali akabafisa; njengako okuba̔liweyo encwadini yomteto ka‐Mosesi, apo uyehova ayaleleyo ngokuti: Oyise abayi kufiswa ngenxa yabantwana, nabantwana abayi kufiswa ngenxa yoyise; koko bonke ngabanye baya kufiselwa esabo isono." 
2Kings14:7 Wabulala ama‐Edome emhlanjeni we‐Tyuwa, ishumi lamawaka, wayibamba i‐Sela ngokulwa, walibiza igama layo ngokuti yi‐Yokitele, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
2Kings14:8 Oko watuma u‐Amatsiya isigidimi ukuya ku‐Yehohashe, unyana ka‐Yehowahazi unyana ka‐Jehu, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Yiza, sibonane ngobuso." 
2Kings14:9 Koko u‐Yehohashe ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli watumela ku‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, ukuti: Umtolo obuse‐Lebanone watuma kuyo isedare ebise‐Lebanone, usiti: Nika intombi yako kunyana wam ibe ngumfazi: saza sadlula isilo sasendle esibe sise‐Lebanone, sawunyatela umtolo lowo." 
2Kings14:10 Uwabetile okunene ama‐Edome, ngako intliziyo yako ikupakamisile: qa̔yisela oku, uhlale ekaya; ngokuba kunganina ukuba uya kulwa nelishwa, ukuze uwe, kwa wena no‐Juda kunye nawe?" 
2Kings14:11 Kodwa u‐Amatsiya ebengapulapuli. Ngako wenyuka u‐Yehohashe ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli; baza babonana ngobuso, yena no‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, e‐Bete‐shemeshe ekwa‐Juda." 
2Kings14:12 Bati o‐Juda boyiswa pambi kwo‐Sirayeli; basuka besaba baya abanye ngabanye ezintenteni zabo. 
2Kings14:13 No‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, unyana ka‐Yehohashe, unyana ka‐Ahaziya, u‐Yehohashe ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wambamba e‐Bete‐shemeshe, weza e‐Yerusaleme, walucita udonga lwe‐Yerusaleme, kwa kulo isango lika‐Frayime kwada kwakulo isango legumbi, ikubite zingamakulu mane." 
2Kings14:14 Wayetabata yonke igolide nesilivere, nazo zonke impahla ezazifunyanwa endlwini kayehova, napakati kwendyebo zendlu yokumkani, nababambiseli, wabuyela e‐Samariya." 
2Kings14:15 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Yehohashe, oko wakwenzayo, namandla ake, nokuba wati nina ukulwa no‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
2Kings14:16 Wada u‐Yehohashe walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa e‐Samariya ndawonye nokumkani bo‐Sirayeli; waza u‐Jerobome unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings14:17 Wati u‐Amatsiya unyana ka‐Yohashe, ukumkani wo‐Juda, wahlala emveni kwokufa kuka‐Yehohashe unyana ka‐Yehowahazi, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, iminyaka yalishumi elinamihlanu." 
2Kings14:18 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Amatsiya, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings14:19 Baye besenza ngakuye ingcebiswano e‐Yerusaleme; wesaba waya e‐Lakishe; kodwa batumela emva kwake e‐Lakishe, bambulala kona." 
2Kings14:20 Baza bamsa pezu kwamahashe: wancw̔atywa e‐Yerusaleme ndawonye noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide. 
2Kings14:21 Bandula bonke abantu bakwa‐Juda batabata u‐Hazariya, obeyiminyaka yalishumi elinesitandatu ubudala bake, bamenza ukumkani esikundleni soyise u‐Amatsiya." 
2Kings14:22 Yena wayaka i‐Elate, wayibuyisela ko‐Juda, emveni kwokuba ukumkani ebelele noyise bake." 
2Kings14:23 NGOMNYAKA weshumi linesihlanu ka‐Amatsiya unyana ka‐Yohashe ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Yohashe ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli e‐Samariya, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mane anamnye." 
2Kings14:24 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; akapambuka kuzo zonke izono zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone." 
2Kings14:25 Yena wabuyisa umda wakwa‐Sirayeli, kwa sekungenweni kwe‐Hamati kwada kwakulo ulwandle lwasetafeni, njengelizwi likayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, owabelitetile ngesandla sesicaka sake u‐Jona unyana ka‐Amitai, umprofite, obengowase‐Gate‐hefere." 
2Kings14:26 Ngokuba uyehova ebebona ubunzima bo‐Sirayeli ukuba buṙaṙa kakulu; ngokuba bekungeko ovaliweyo, bekungeko nokululekileyo, bekungeko namncedi kanjalo ko‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings14:27 Waye uyehova engatshongo ukuba wolicima igama lo‐Sirayeli kwa pantsi kwezulu; kodwa wabasindisa ngesandla sika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Yohashe. 
2Kings14:28 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Jerobome, nako konke abekwenza, namandla ake, ukuba wati nina ukulwa, nokuba wati nina ukubuyisela ko‐Sirayeli i‐Damakusi ne‐Hamati yakwa‐Juda, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
2Kings14:29 Wada u‐Jerobome walala noyise bake, ndawonye nokumkani bo‐Sirayeli; waza u‐Zekariya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings15:1 NGOMNYAKA wamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe ka‐Jerobome ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, waba ngukumkani u‐Hazariya unyana ka‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Kings15:2 Ebeyiminyaka ilishumi linesitandatu ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme iminyaka yamashumi mahlanu anamibini. Igama lonina belingu‐Yekoliya, owase‐Yerusaleme." 
2Kings15:3 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke abekwenzile u‐Amatsiya uyise." 
2Kings15:4 Kodwa indawo ezipakamileyo bezingasuswa; abantu basabinga baqumisa ezindaweni ezipakamileyo. 
2Kings15:5 Wati uyehova wambeta ukumkani, ukuba waba lileperi kwada kwayimini yokufa kwake, wahlala endlwini eyahlukileyo. Waye u‐Yotame unyana wokumkani ebepezu kwendlu, egweba abantu belizwe." 
2Kings15:6 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Hazariya, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings15:7 Wada u‐Hazariya walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide; waza u‐Yotame unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings15:8 NGOMNYAKA wamashumi matatu anesibozo ka‐Hazariya ukumkani wo‐Juda, wapata ubukumkani u‐Zekariya unyana ka‐Jerobome pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Samariya inyanga zantandatu." 
2Kings15:9 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengokuba bebenje njalo oyise bake; akapambuka kuzo izono zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone." 
2Kings15:10 Waza u‐Shalume unyana ka‐Yabeshe waceba ngakuye, wambeta pambi kwabantu, wambulala, waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings15:11 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Zekariya, bona ke, iba̔liwe yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings15:12 Eli libe lilizwi likayehova owabelitetile ku‐Jehu, lisiti: Onyana bako besesine isizukulwana baya kuhlala pezu kweterone yakwa‐Sirayeli. Kwaye kuba njalo ke." 
2Kings15:13 U‐Shalume unyana ka‐Yabeshe waba ngukumkani ngomnyaka wamashumi matatu anesitoba ka‐Huziya ukumkani wo‐Juda; wayepata ubukumkani inyanga ipela e‐Samariya. 
2Kings15:14 Waza u‐Menaheme unyana ka‐Gadi wenyuka e‐Tiretsa, weza e‐Samariya, wambeta u‐Shalume unyana ka‐Yabeshe e‐Samariya, wambulala, waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings15:15 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Shalume, nokuceba kwake owaceba ngako, bona ke, iba̔liwe yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings15:16 Oko u‐Menaheme wayibeta i‐Tipesahi, nabo bonke abakuyo, nemida yayo, esuka e‐Tiretsa; ngokokuba bekungamvulelwanga, kukona wayibetayo; bonke abamitiyo bayo wabaqangqulula." 
2Kings15:17 Ngomnyaka wamashumi matatu anesitoba ka‐Hazariya ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Menaheme unyana ka‐Gadi pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi e‐Samariya." 
2Kings15:18 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; akapambuka kuzo izono zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone, yonke imihla yake." 
2Kings15:19 Kwandula kweza u‐Pule ukumkani we‐Asiriya ngakulo ilizwe; waza u‐Menaheme wamnika u‐Pule iwaka letalente zesilivere, ukuze isandla sake sibe naye ukuqinisa ubukumkani esandleni sake." 
2Kings15:20 Nemali leyo wayibiza u‐Menaheme ko‐Sirayeli, kubo bonke abakulu ngobutyebi, ize inikwe kuye ukumkani we‐Asiriya, ishekele zesilivere ezingamashumi mahlanu kubo bonke ngabanye. Waza wabuya ukumkani we‐Asiriya, engahlali kona elizweni apo." 
2Kings15:21 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Menaheme, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli?" 
2Kings15:22 Wada walala u‐Menaheme noyise bake; waza u‐Pekahiya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake. 
2Kings15:23 Ngomnyaka wamashumi mahlanu ka‐Hazariya ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Pekahiya unyana ka‐Menaheme pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Samariya, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamibini." 
2Kings15:24 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; akapambuka kuzo izono zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone." 
2Kings15:25 Koko u‐Pekahi unyana ka‐Remaliya, injengele yake, waceba ngakuye, wambeta e‐Samariya, enqatyeni yendlu yokumkani, kunye no‐Ragobi no‐Ariye, namadoda amashumi mahlanu elusatsheni lwama‐Gileyadi ndawonye naye: wambulala ke, waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings15:26 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Pekahiya, nako konke abekwenza, bona ke, iba̔liwe yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings15:27 Ngomnyaka wamashumi mahlanu anesibini ka‐Hazariya ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Pekahi unyana ka‐Remaliya pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Samariya, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mabini." 
2Kings15:28 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; akapambuka kuzo izono zika‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone." 
2Kings15:29 Emihleni ka‐Pekahi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, weza u‐Tigilate‐pilesere ukumkani we‐Asiriya, wabamba i‐Hiyone, ne‐Abele‐bete‐mahaka, ne‐Yanoha, ne‐Kedeshe, ne‐Hatsore, ne‐Gileyadi, ne‐Galili, lonke ilizwe lakwa‐Nefatali, n abantu wabafudusela e‐Asiriya." 
2Kings15:30 Waza u‐Hosheha unyana ka‐Ela wenza ingcebiswano ngakuye u‐Pekahi unyana ka‐Remaliya, wambeta, wambulala, waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake, ngomnyaka wamashumi mabini ka‐Yotame unyana ka‐Huziya." 
2Kings15:31 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Pekahi, nako konke abekwenza, bona ke, iba̔liwe yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings15:32 NGOMNYAKA wesibini ka‐Pekahi unyana ka‐Remaliya ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, waba ngukumkani u‐Yotame unyana ka‐Huziya ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Kings15:33 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinesitandatu e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Yerusha, intombi ka‐Tsadoki." 
2Kings15:34 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova; njengako konke abekwenzile u‐Huziya uyise, wenje njalo." 
2Kings15:35 Kodwa indawo ezipakamileyo bezingasuswa; abantu basabinga baqumisa ezindaweni ezipakamileyo. Yena walaka isango lasentla lendlu kayehova. 
2Kings15:36 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Yotame, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings15:37 Ngaleyomihla waqala uyehova ukutuma ngakwo‐Juda, u‐Retsine ukumkani we‐Siriya, no‐Pekahi unyana ka‐Remaliya." 
2Kings15:38 Wada walala u‐Yotame noyise bake, wancw̔atywa noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide uyise; waza u‐Ahazi unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings16:1 Ngomnyaka weshumi linesixe̔nxe ka‐Pekahi unyana ka‐Remaliya, waba ngukumkani u‐Ahazi unyana ka‐Yotame ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Kings16:2 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini u‐Ahazi ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinesitandatu e‐Yerusaleme; waye engenzi okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, utixo wake, njengaye u‐Davide uyise." 
2Kings16:3 Ngokuba ebehamba endleleni yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli; ewe, nonyana wake wamdlulisa emlilweni, njengento ezibuntshontsho zabaheyideni, abo wabagqogqayo uyehova pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings16:4 Wabinga waqumisa ezindaweni ezipakamileyo, napezu kwenduli, nangapantsi kwayo yonke imiti eluhlaza." 
2Kings16:5 Oko wenyuka u‐Retsine ukumkani we‐Siriya, no‐Pekahi unyana ka‐Remaliya ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ukuya e‐Yerusaleme, kuze kuliwe: baza bamvingcela u‐Ahazi, kodwa bakohlwa kukwoyisa." 
2Kings16:6 Ngeloxesha u‐Retsine ukumkani we‐Siriya wabuyisela i‐Elate kuma‐Siriya, wawagxota ama‐Juda e‐Elate; andula ama‐Siriya eza e‐Elate, ahlala kona kude kwanamhla nje." 
2Kings16:7 Waza u‐Ahazi watuma izigidimi ukuya ku‐Tigilate‐pilesere ukumkani we‐Asiriya, esiti: Mna ndingumkonzi wako nonyana wako; nyuka, uze undisindise esandleni sokumkani we‐Siriya, nasesandleni sokumkani wo‐Sirayeli, abasukelayo ngakum." 
2Kings16:8 Kanjako watabata u‐Ahazi isilivere negolide ebifunyanwa endlwini kayehova, napakati kwendyebo zendlu yokumkani, watumela ukumkani we‐Asiriya ibaso." 
2Kings16:9 Waza ukumkani we‐Asiriya wapulapula kuye: wenyuka ke ukumkani we‐Asiriya ngakuyo i‐Damakusi, wayibamba, n abantu wabafudusela e‐Kire, no‐Retsine wambulala." 
2Kings16:10 Wasuka ukumkani u‐Ahazi waya ukumkaulela u‐Tiligate‐pilesere ukumkani we‐Asiriya e‐Damakusi, wabona isibingelo esibe sise‐Damakusi; wandul’ ukutuma ukumkani u‐Ahazi ku‐Huriya umperisite isimilo sesibingelo eso, nomfanekiselo waso, njengalo lonke isetyenzwa laso." 
2Kings16:11 Waza u‐Huriya umperisite waka isibingelo, njengako konke abekususile ukumkani u‐Ahazi e‐Damakusi: wenje njalo u‐Huriya umperisite, engekaveli ukumkani u‐Ahazi e‐Damakusi." 
2Kings16:12 Wati akuvela ukumkani e‐Damakusi, wandula ukumkani wasibona isibingelo; waza ukumkani wasondela kuso isibingelo, wanikela pezu kwaso." 
2Kings16:13 Watshisa idini lokutshiswa lake, nomnikelo wokudla wake, watulula umnikelo wokusela wake, wasasaza igazi leminikelo yoxolo yake, pezu kwesibingelo eso." 
2Kings16:14 Nesibingelo sexina, esibe sipambi kwoyehova, wasikwelelisa kuwo umpambili wendlu, kwa pakati kwesibingelo nendlu kayehova, wasibeka ngasecaleni lesibingelo ngasenode." 
2Kings16:15 Wandula ukumkani u‐Ahazi wamyalela u‐Huriya umperisite, ngokuti: Pezu kwesibingelo esikulu tshisa idini lokutshiswa lokusa, nomnikelo wokudla wokuhlwa, nedini lokutshiswa lokumkani, nomnikelo wokudla wake, nedini lokutshiswa labo bonke abantu belizwe, nomnikelo wokudla wabo, neminikelo yokusela yabo; nalo lonke igazi ledini lokutshiswa, nalo lonke igazi lombingo, lisasaze pezu kwaso: nesibingelo sexina ndiya kuzindla ngaso." 
2Kings16:16 Waza u‐Huriya umperisite wenza ngako konke abemyalele kona ukumkani u‐Ahazi. 
2Kings16:17 Kanjako ukumkani u‐Ahazi wazinqumla indini zezikondo, wasisusa isihlambelo kwa pezu kwazo; nolwandle walutula ezinkabini zexina ezibe zipantsi kwalo, walubeka pezu kwesicwangciswa samatye." 
2Kings16:18 Nentendelezo efulelweyo yesabata, abebeyakile ngasendlwini, nendawo yokungena yokumkani engapandle, wazishenxisa kuyo indlu kayehova ngenxa yokumkani we‐Asiriya." 
2Kings16:19 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Ahazi, oko wakwenzayo, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings16:20 Wada walala u‐Ahazi noyise bake, wancw̔atywa noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide; waza u‐Hezekiya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings17:1 NGOMNYAKA weshumi linesibini ka‐Ahazi ukumkani wo‐Juda, waba ngukumkani u‐Hosheha unyana ka‐Ela e‐Samariya pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalitoba." 
2Kings17:2 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova; kodwa bekungenjengabo okumkani bo‐Sirayeli abebeko pambili kuye. 
2Kings17:3 Kwenyuka ngakuye u‐Shalemanesere ukumkani we‐Asiriya; waza u‐Hosheha waba ngumkonzi wake, wanikela kuye umnikelo." 
2Kings17:4 Kodwa ukumkani we‐Asiriya wafumana ingcebo ku‐Hosheha, ekubeni wabetumile izigidimi ku‐Soe ukumkani we‐Jipete, nokuba engasanga umnikelo kukumkani we‐Asiriya, njengokuba ebenje njalo ngomnyaka ngomnyaka; ngako ukumkani we‐Asiriya wamvalela, wamnxiba entolongweni." 
2Kings17:5 Waza wenyuka ukumkani we‐Asiriya waya kulo lonke ilizwe; wenyukela nase‐Samariya, wayivingcela iminyaka yamitatu." 
2Kings17:6 Ngomnyaka wesitoba ka‐Hosheha wayibamba ukumkani we‐Asiriya i‐Samariya, wabafudusela o‐Sirayeli e‐Asiriya, wabahlalisa e‐Halahi, nase‐Habore, ngasemlanjeni we‐Gozane, nasezixekweni zama‐Medi." 
2Kings17:7 Ngokuba kube kute, ukuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli lube lwonile ngakuye uyehova, utixo walo, owabelunyusile elizweni le‐Jipete, kwa pantsi kwesandla sika‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, nokuba beluboyikile otixo bambi," 
2Kings17:8 lwahamba emimisweni yabaheyideni, abete uyehova wabagqogqa pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, nakweyokumkani bo‐Sirayeli, leyo bebeyenzile." 
2Kings17:9 Lwati usapo luka‐Sirayeli kanjalo lwenza ngasese izinto ezingafanelekileyo ngakuye uyehova, utixo walo, lwazakela indawo ezipakamileyo kuzo zonke izixeko zalo, kwa kuyo inqaba yabalindi kude kwakuso isixeko esinqatyisiweyo." 
2Kings17:10 Lwazimisela intsika zamatye, ne‐Ashera, pezu kwazo zonke induli ezinde, nangapantsi kwayo yonke imiti eluhlaza." 
2Kings17:11 Lwaqumisa kwa kona kuzo zonke indawo ezipakamileyo, njengabaheyideni abebafudusile uyehova ebusweni balo; lwenza nezinto ezikohlakeleyo ukumqumbisa uyehova:" 
2Kings17:12 ngokuba belukonza izitixwana, abete uyehova kulo ngazo: Aniyi kuyenza lento." 
2Kings17:13 Waye uyehova ebenqi̔nile ngako‐Sirayeli, nangako‐Juda, ngabo bonke abaprofite, nabo bonke ababoni, esiti: Guqukani kuzo indlela zenu ezikohlakeleyo, nigcine imiyalelo yam n emimiso yam, njengawo wonke umteto endibayaleleyo oyihlo benu, nendiwutumileyo kuni ngesandla sezicaka zam abaprofite." 
2Kings17:14 Abapulapula noko, kodwa benza lukuni intamo yabo, njengentamo yoyise babo, abebengakolwa nguyehova, utixo wabo." 
2Kings17:15 Balahla nemimiso yake, nocebano lwake owabelwenzile noyise babo, nezinqi̔no zake abezinqi̔nile ngakubo, bahamba emva kwokungendawo, bada baba ngabangendawo, nasemva kwabaheyideni ababangqongayo, abo uyehova ebebayalele ukuba mabangenzi njengabo." 
2Kings17:16 Baye beshiya yonke imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wabo, bazenzela imifanekiso etyityishiweyo, amatole amabini; bazenza i‐Ashera, bazitoba kuwo wonke umkosi wezulu, bamkonza u‐Bali." 
2Kings17:17 Kanjako badlulisa onyana babo nentombi zabo emlilweni, benza ngokulaula nangobugqi, bazitengisela ukwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, ukumqumbisa." 
2Kings17:18 Ngako uyehova wabequmbile kakulu ngako‐Sirayeli, wabasusa ebusweni bake; bekungeko oseleyo, kupela isizwe sika‐Juda sodwa," 
2Kings17:19 no‐Juda abayigcina bona imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wabo; kodwa bahamba emimisweni yo‐Sirayeli, leyo bebeyenzile." 
2Kings17:20 Waza uyehova wayilahla yonke inzalo ka‐Sirayeli, wababandezela, wabanikela esandleni sabatimbi, wada wabagxota ebusweni bake." 
2Kings17:21 Ngokuba wabaṙazula o‐Sirayeli kuyo indlu ka‐Davide; bati bona bamenza u‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati ukumkani: waza u‐Jerobome wabakukulisa o‐Sirayeli ekumlandeleni uyehova, wabenza bone isono esikulu." 
2Kings17:22 Lwandula usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwahamba ngazo zonke izono zika‐Jerobome owabezenzile; alwapambuka kuzo; 
2Kings17:23 wada uyehova wabasusa o‐Sirayeli ebusweni bake, njengokuba ebetetile ngazo zonke izicaka zake abaprofite. Kwa njalo o‐Sirayeli bebefuduswa emhlabeni wabo bafudus elwa e‐Asiriya, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
2Kings17:24 KEKALOKU ukumkani we‐Asiriya wavelisa abantu e‐Babilone, nase‐Kuta, nase‐Hava, nase‐Hamati, nase‐Sefarevayime, wabahlalisa ezixekweni zase‐Samariya esikundleni salo usapo luka‐Sirayeli; baza bafuya i‐Samariya, bahlala ezixekweni zayo." 
2Kings17:25 Kwabekute ekuqaleni kwokuhlala kwabo kona, babe bengamoyiki uyehova; waza uyehova watuma pakati kwabo ingonyama, ezababulalayo inxenye." 
2Kings17:26 Ngako bateta kukumkani we‐Asiriya, besiti: Izizwe ozifudusileyo, nozihlalisileyo ezixekweni zase‐Samariya, azilazi isiko lake utixo welizwe; ngako utumile ingonyama pakati kwazo, kanjalo bona ke, zizibulala, ngokokuba zingalazi isiko lake utixo welizwe." 
2Kings17:27 Waza waxela ukumkani we‐Asiriya, esiti: Mseni apo omnye kubaperisite enibe nibafudusa kwa kona; mabaye bahlale kona: andule azifundise isiko lake utixo welizwe." 
2Kings17:28 Wandula weza omnye kubaperisite abebebafudusile e‐Samariya, wahlala e‐Betele, wazifundisa ukuba ngazisiti nina ukumoyika uyehova." 
2Kings17:29 Noko zibe zisenza isizwe ngesizwe otixo bazo, zababeka ezindlwini zendawo ezipakamileyo, ezibe zenziwe ngama‐Samariya, isizwe ngesizwe ezixekweni zazo, ezo zahlala kuzo." 
2Kings17:30 Amadoda ase‐Babilone enza u‐Sukote‐benote, namadoda ase‐Kuta enza u‐Neregali, namadoda ase‐Hamati enza u‐Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 nama‐Hava enza u‐Nibehazi no‐Tiretaki, nama‐Sefarevayime wona atshisa abantwana bawo emlilweni ku‐Adrameleki no‐Hanameleki, otixo base‐Sefarevayime." 
2Kings17:32 Bamoyika uyehova kanjalo, bazenzela abaperisite bendawo ezipakamileyo kulo lonke inani labo, ababenzelayo amadini ezindlwini zendawo ezipakamileyo." 
2Kings17:33 Uyehova bamoyika, notixo babo babakonza, njengesiko lezizwe ababe befudusiwe kuzo." 
2Kings17:34 Kude kube namhla nje bayenza ngamasiko apambili: abamoyiki uyehova, abenzi ngezimiselo zabo, nangezigwebo zabo, nangomteto, nangomyalelo, owona uyehova waluyalelayo usapo luka‐Yakobi, lowo wamtiyayo igama elingu‐Sirayeli:" 
2Kings17:35 abete uyehova wenza ucebano nalo, waluyalela, esiti: Aniyi kwoyika otixo bambi, aniyi kutoba pambi kwabo, aniyi kubakonza, aniyi kubingelela kubo;" 
2Kings17:36 kodwa uyehova, obeninyusa elizweni le‐Jipete ngamandla amakulu nangengalo eyolulweyo, nguye eniya kumoyika, napambi kwake niya kutoba, nakuye niya kubingelela." 
2Kings17:37 Nezimiselo, nezigwebo, nomteto, nomyalelo, aniba̔lele zona, niya kulumkela ukuzenza imihla yonke; aniyi kuboyika otixo bambi." 
2Kings17:38 Nocebano endilwenzileyo nani aniyi kulibala lona; aniyi kuboyika otixo bambi. 
2Kings17:39 Koko uyehova, utixo wenu, niya kumoyika: waye yena eya kunihlangula esandleni sazo zonke intshaba zenu." 
2Kings17:40 Abapulapula noko, kodwa benza ngalo isiko labo lapambili." 
2Kings17:41 Kwa njalo ezizizwe zamoyika uyehova, nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo yazo zayikonza; kanjako abantwana bazo, nabantwana babantwana bazo, njengokuba bebesenza oyise babo, bayenza bona kude kube namhla nje." 
2Kings18:1 KWAZA kwati ngomnyaka wesitatu ka‐Hosheha unyana ka‐Ela ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, waba ngukumkani u‐Hezekiya unyana ka‐Ahazi ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Kings18:2 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme iminyaka yamashumi mabini anesitoba. Igama lonina belingu‐Abi, intombi ka‐Zekariya." 
2Kings18:3 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke abekwenzile u‐Davide uyise." 
2Kings18:4 Indawo ezipakamileyo wazisusa, nentsika zamatye waziqekeza, ne‐Ashera wazigaula, nenyoka yexina, owabeyenzile u‐Mosesi, wayikanda; ngokuba kwada kwayiyo imihla leyo usapo luka‐Sirayeli beluqumisile kuyo; wayibiza ngokuti yi‐Nehushetane." 
2Kings18:5 Watembela kuye uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli; kwaye kungeko emva kwake onjengaye pakati kwabo bonke okumkani bo‐Juda, na pakati kwabo abebeko pambili kuye." 
2Kings18:6 Ngokuba ebenamatela kuyehova; akapambuka ekumlandeleni; wayigcina imiyalelo yake, leyo uyehova wamyalelayo u‐Mosesi." 
2Kings18:7 Waye uyehova ebenaye; apo wapumela kona watamsanqeleka: kanjalo wavukela ngakuye ukumkani we‐Asiriya, waza akamkonza." 
2Kings18:8 Wabeta ama‐Filistiya kwada kwase‐Gaza, nemida yayo, kwa kuyo inqaba yabalindi kude kwakuso isixeko esinqatyisiweyo." 
2Kings18:9 Kwaza kwati ngomnyaka wesine wokumkani u‐Hezekiya, obungumnyaka wesixe̔nxe ka‐Hosheha unyana ka‐Ela ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, wenyuka u‐Shalemanesere ukumkani we‐Asiriya ngakuyo i‐Samariya, wayivingcela." 
2Kings18:10 Baza bayitimba ekupeleni kweminyaka mitatu; ngomnyaka wesitandatu ka‐Hezekiya, obungumnyaka wesitoba ka‐Hosheha ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, yatinjwa i‐Samariya." 
2Kings18:11 Wandula ukumkani we‐Asiriya wafudusela o‐Sirayeli e‐Asiriya, wababeka e‐Halahi, nase‐Habore, ngasemlanjeni we‐Gozane, nasezixekweni zama‐Medi:" 
2Kings18:12 ngenxa yokuba bebengapulapulanga ilizwi likayehova, utixo wabo, koko bagqitayo ucebano lwake, konke abeyalele ngako u‐Mosesi isicaka sikayehova; abeva, abenza nokwenza." 
2Kings18:13 Kekaloku ngoweshumi linesine umnyaka wokumkani u‐Hezekiya, wenyuka u‐Senakeribe ukumkani we‐Asiriya ngakuzo zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwa‐Juda, wazibamba." 
2Kings18:14 Waza u‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda watumela kuye ukumkani we‐Asiriya e‐Lakishe, ukuti: Ndonile; buya kum; oko uya kukubeka pezu kwam ndokutwala. Wandula ukumkani we‐Asiriya wambekela u‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda amakulu matatu etalente zesilivere, namashumi matatu etalente zegolide." 
2Kings18:15 Waza u‐Hezekiya wanika yonke isilivere ebifunyanwa endlwini kayehova, napakati kwendyebo zendlu yokumkani." 
2Kings18:16 Ngexesha elo u‐Hezekiya wazinqumla ingcango zetempile kayehova, nentsika abezalekile u‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, igolide yazo, wayinika kuye ukumkani we‐Asiriya." 
2Kings18:17 Kodwa ukumkani we‐Asiriya wasusa u‐Taretane, no‐Rabesarise, no‐Rabeshake, e‐Lakishe, ukuya nempi enkulu kukumkani u‐Hezekiya e‐Yerusaleme. Benyuka ke beza e‐Yerusaleme. Bati bakuba benyukile, beza bema ngakuwo umjelo wecibi lasentla, elingasemendweni wentsimi yomsuki." 
2Kings18:18 Naxeshekweni babebizile ukumkani, kwapumela kubo u‐Eliyakime unyana ka‐Hilikiya, obepezu kwendlu, no‐Shibena umba̔li, no‐Jowahi unyana ka‐Safa umkumbuzi." 
2Kings18:19 Waza u‐Rabeshake wati kubo: Ize niti ke ku‐Hezekiya: Utsho ukumkani omkulu, ukumkani we‐Asiriya, ukuti: Litemba elinina eli utemba ngalo?" 
2Kings18:20 Uti, (kanti lilizwi lomlomo wodwa), kuko icebo namandla ukulwa. Kaloku utemba kubanina, ukuba uvukele ngakum?" 
2Kings18:21 Kaloku bona ke, uyatemba kulomsimelelo wengcongolo etyumzekileyo, kwi‐Jipete; eti ukuba umntu uyayama ngayo, yandule ingene esandleni sake, isihlabe: unjalo u‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete kubo bonke abatembayo kuye." 
2Kings18:22 Kodwa ukuba niti kum: Siyatemba kuyehova, utixo wetu; asi nguye na, ondawo zake ezipakamileyo nezibingelo zake u‐Hezekiya uzisusile, wati ko‐Juda nakwi‐Yerusaleme: Pambi kwaso isibingelo esi niya kutoba e‐Yerusaleme?" 
2Kings18:23 Ngako kaloku, uke ungene ekulweni nenkosi yam ukumkani we‐Asiriya, ndandiya kukunika amahashe angamawaka mabini, ukuba ungati ngecala lako unike abakweli pezu kwawo." 
2Kings18:24 Woti nina pofu ukunqanda ubuso benkosana inye ezicakeni zenkosi yam ezincinane? Noko uyatemba kwi‐Jipete ngenxa yenqwelo nangenxa yabakweli bamahashe. 
2Kings18:25 Kaloku, kungapandle kwoyehova na endinyukile ngakuyo lendawo, ndize ndiyitshabalalise? Uyehova ute kum: Nyuka ngakulo elilizwe, ulitshabalalise." 
2Kings18:26 Wandula wati u‐Eliyakime unyana ka‐Hilikiya, no‐Shibena, no‐Jowahi, kuye u‐Rabeshake: Kautete kwizicaka zako ngesi‐Siriya, ngokuba sisiva tina; zungateti nati ngesi‐Juda, ezindlebeni zabantu abapezu kwodonga." 
2Kings18:27 Koko u‐Rabeshake wati kubo: Kusenkosini yako na, nakuwe, inditumileyo inkosi yam ukuza kuteta lamazwi? asi kulamadoda na ahleliyo pezu kwodonga, ukuba atye elawo ilindle, nokuba asele owawo umtundo, kunye nani?" 
2Kings18:28 Waza wema u‐Rabeshake, wadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu ngesi‐Juda, wateta, wati: Yivani amazwi ake ukumkani omkulu, ukumkani we‐Asiriya!" 
2Kings18:29 Utsho ukumkani ukuti: Maningakohliswa ngu‐Hezekiya; ngokuba eya kukohlwa kukunisindisa esandleni sake. 
2Kings18:30 Kanjako makangati u‐Hezekiya anitembise kuyehova, ngokuti: Uyehova wosisindisa ngenyaniso; na ngokuti: Esisixeko asisayi kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani we‐Asiriya." 
2Kings18:31 Ningapulapuli ku‐Hezekiya; ngokuba esitsho ukumkani we‐Asiriya ukuti: Yenzani uxolo nam, nipumele kum, nitye abanye ngabanye kumti weveyine wabo, nabanye ngabanye kumkiwane wabo, nisele abanye ngabanye amanzi equla labo;" 
2Kings18:32 ndide ndize ndinise elizweni elinjengelizwe lenu, ilizwe lenqolowa neveyine, ilizwe lesonka nemiyezo yemiti yeveyine, ilizwe leoli yamanquma nobusi; ukuba nidle ubomi, ningafi nokufa: nize ningapulapuli ku‐Hezekiya, nxa anihendayo, esiti: Uyehova wosisindisa." 
2Kings18:33 Otixo bentlanga bake balisindisa na abanye ngabanye ilizwe labo esandleni sokumkani we‐Asiriya? 
2Kings18:34 bapina otixo base‐Hamati nabase‐Arapadi? bapina otixo base‐Sefarevayime, ne‐Hena, ne‐Hiva? kanene bayisindisile i‐Samariya esandleni sam na?" 
2Kings18:35 Ngobanina pakati kwabo bonke otixo bamazwe lawo, abalisindisileyo ilizwe labo esandleni sam, ukuba uyehova ayisindise i‐Yerusaleme esandleni sam?" 
2Kings18:36 Koko abantu bati cwaka, bengampendulanga nangazwi: ngokuba umyalelo wokumkani ubungowokuti: Aniyi kumpendula." 
2Kings18:37 Kwandula kweza u‐Eliyakime unyana ka‐Hilikiya, obepezu kwendlu, no‐Shibena umba̔li, no‐Jowahi unyana ka‐Safa umkumbuzi, ku‐Hezekiya, benezivato eziṙazukileyo, bamshumayeza amazwi ka‐Rabeshake." 
2Kings19:1 Kwaye kute, akuva u‐Hezekiya, wandula waṙazula izivato zake, wazigubungela ngentlakantlaka, wangena endlwini kayehova." 
2Kings19:2 Waza watuma u‐Eliyakime, obepezu kwendlu, no‐Shibena umba̔li, nabadala bakubaperisite, begujungelwe ngentlakantlaka, ukuya ku‐Yisaya umprofite, unyana ka‐Amotse." 
2Kings19:3 Baye besiti kuye: Utsho u‐Hezekiya ukuti: Namhla ngumhla wobunzima, nesohlwayo, nogxeko; ngokuba abantwana beze endaweni yokutyoboza, kanti akuko amandla ukuzala." 
2Kings19:4 Kungaba uyehova, utixo wako, uya kuva onke amazwi ka‐Rabeshake, otunyiweyo ngukumkani we‐Asiriya, inkosi yake, ukuza kutuka utixo opilileyo, amohlwayele amazwi awavileyo uyehova, utixo wako; ngako pakamisa umtandazo ngenxa yesisalela esikoyo." 
2Kings19:5 Kwa njalo izicaka zokumkani u‐Hezekiya zeza ku‐Yisaya. 
2Kings19:6 Waza u‐Yisaya wati kuzo: Niya kutsho enkosini yenu nisiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ungoyiki ngenxa yamazwi uwavileyo, lawo abafana bokumkani we‐Asiriya bandigxekile ngawo." 
2Kings19:7 Bona ke, ndiya kubeka umoya kuye, waeya kuva iṙeto, abuyele elizweni lake; ndandiya kumenza awe ngesiṙele elizweni lake." 
2Kings19:8 Wada wabuya u‐Rabeshake, wamfumana ukumkani we‐Asiriya esilwa ngakuyo i‐Libena: ngokuba ebevile ukuba undulukile e‐Lakishe." 
2Kings19:9 Wati akuva ngaye u‐Tiraka ukumkani we‐Tiyopiya, kusitwa: Bona ke, upumile ukuza kulwa nawe; wandula wabuya watuma izigidimi ku‐Hezekiya, esiti:" 
2Kings19:10 Niya kutsho ku‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, nisiti: Maungakohliswa ngutixo wako, lowo utemba kuye, esiti: i‐Yerusaleme ayiyi kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani we‐Asiriya." 
2Kings19:11 Bona ke, ukuvile oko bakwenzileyo okumkani be‐Asiriya kuwo onke amazwe, ngokuwalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni; kekaloku wena uya kusindiswa ke na?" 
2Kings19:12 Otixo bentlanga, ezo bazitshabalalisile obawo, kebazisindisa na; i‐Gozane, ne‐Karane, ne‐Retsefe, nosapo lwase‐Hedeni, oluse‐Telasare?" 
2Kings19:13 Upina ke ukumkani we‐Hamati, nokumkani we‐Arapadi, nokumkani wesixeko se‐Sefarevayime, n e‐Hena, ne‐Hiva?" 
2Kings19:14 Waye u‐Hezekiya eyamkela incwadi leyo esandleni sezigidimi, wayilesesha, wenyuka waya endlwini kayehova; waza u‐Hezekiya wayaneka ebusweni bukayehova." 
2Kings19:15 Watandaza u‐Hezekiya ebusweni bukayehova, wati: Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli, ohleli pakati kwazo ikerubime! unguwe wedwa o ngutixo wabo bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba; wenzile wena izulu nomhlaba." 
2Kings19:16 Tobela, Yehova! indlebe yako, uve; vula, Yehova! amehlo ako, ubone; uze uweve amazwi ka‐Senakeribe, omtumileyo ukuza kutuka utixo opilileyo." 
2Kings19:17 Ngenyaniso, Yehova! okumkani be‐Asiriya bacitakalisile intlanga namazwe azo:" 
2Kings19:18 notixo bazo babalahlele emlilweni: ngokuba bengengabo otixo bona, koko bengumsebenzi wezandla zabantu, imiti namatye; ngako babatshabalalisile." 
2Kings19:19 Ngako kaloku, Yehova, Tixo wetu! zusisindise esandleni sake, ukuze bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba bazi ukuba wena u nguyehova, utixo, wena wedwa." 
2Kings19:20 Waza u‐Yisaya unyana ka‐Amotse watuma ku‐Hezekiya, esiti: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Oko ukutandazile kum ngaye u‐Senakeribe, ukumkani we‐Asiriya, ndikuvile." 
2Kings19:21 Lilo eli ilizwi alitetileyo uyehova pezu kwake: Intombi ipela, intombi ye‐Ziyone, iyakudela, iyakuhleka: intombi ye‐Yerusaleme iyahlunguzela intloko ngakuwe." 
2Kings19:22 Ngubanina omtukileyo, nomgxekileyo? kungakubanina ulipakamisile ilizwi, namehlo ako uwanyusile ngapezulu? ngakuye oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings19:23 Ngazo izigidimi zako uyitukile inkosi, wati: Ngobuninzi benqwelo zam ndiqolile indawo ezipezulu zentaba, amatambeka e‐Lebanone; sendiya kugaula isedare zayo ezinde, nemiberoshe yayo edlulisileyo; ndofikela eyokupela indawo yayo yokulalisa, ihlati layo elicumileyo." 
2Kings19:24 Ndimbele ndasela amanzi asemzini ke; nangomzantsi wenyawo zam ndiyomisile yonke imilambo yase‐Jipete. 
2Kings19:25 Akuvanga na, ukuba kudala ndikwenzile oku, ukuba emihleni yamatanci ndakuqinga? kaloku ndikuzisile kubako, ukuba kucitakaliswe izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zibe zimfumba ezitshabaleleyo." 
2Kings19:26 Ngako abemi bazo bebenamandla amancinane; babete qege, badana nokudana; babe njeng enca yasendle, na njeng otyani obuluhlaza, njeng esikota pezu kwezindlu, na njeng emkungekadutyulwa." 
2Kings19:27 Kodwa ukuhlala kwako, nokupuma kwako, nokungena kwako, ndiyakwazi, kwa nokujala kwako ngakum." 
2Kings19:28 Ngenxa yokuba ukujala kwako ngakum, nokur̔atsha kwako, kunyukele ezindlebeni zam, ndiya kufaka igwegwe lam empumlweni yako, nomkala wam emlonyeni wako, ndize ndikubuyise ngalondlela ubusiza ngayo." 
2Kings19:29 Kanjalo oku kwoba ngumqondiso kuwe: Kuya kutyiwa lomnyaka okuhlumayo ngokwako; nangomnyaka wesibini okupumayo ngokunjalo; nangomnyaka wesitatu hlwayelani, nivune nokuvuna, tyalani nemiyezo, nesiqa̔mo sayo nisidle." 
2Kings19:30 Boti abasindileyo bendlu ka‐Juda, abo baseleyo, babuye bendelise ingcambo ngapantsi, bahlanze isiqa̔mo ngapezulu." 
2Kings19:31 Ngokuba kuya kupuma e‐Yerusaleme isisalela, nasentabeni ye‐Ziyone abo basindileyo: ubukwele bukayehova wemikosi bokwenza oku." 
2Kings19:32 Ngako oko, utsho uyehova ngaye ukumkani we‐Asiriya ukuti: Akayi kungena kwesisixeko, akayi kulutolela kona utolo kanjako; akayi kuza pambi kwaso nekaka, akayi kuyiposela indulana ngakuso kananjalo." 
2Kings19:33 Londlela ubesiza ngayo, uya kubuya kwa ngayo, nakuso esisixeko akayi kungena, utsho uyehova." 
2Kings19:34 Ngokuba ndiya kukusela isixeko esi, ndisisindise, ngenxa yokwam, nangenxa ka‐Davide isicaka sam." 
2Kings19:35 Kwaza kwati ngobobusuku, yapuma ingelosi kayehova, yabulala emnqubeni wama‐Asiriya ikulu linamashumi asibozo enesihlanu lamawaka: kwati kwakuvukwa kusasa ngomnye umhla, nanga onke eyimizimba efileyo." 
2Kings19:36 Wandula u‐Senakeribe ukumkani we‐Asiriya wanduluka, wahamba, wabuya, waya wahlala e‐Nineve." 
2Kings19:37 Kwada kwati, nxa abezitoba endlwini ka‐Niseroki utixo wake, basuka u‐Adrameleki no‐Sharetsere onyana bake bambulala ngesiṙele: bati bona basindela ezweni le‐Ararate: waza u‐Esare‐hadoni unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings20:1 NGALOMIHLA wabesifa u‐Hezekiya wada waza kububa. Wandula weza kuye u‐Yisaya unyana ka‐Amotse, umprofite, wati kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Yolela indlu yako; ngokuba uya kububa wena, akuyi kupila." 
2Kings20:2 Waza wasonga ubuso bake ngaseludongeni, watandaza kuyehova, esiti:" 
2Kings20:3 Ke, Yehova! uze ukumbulele okokuba ndihambile ebusweni bako ngenyaniso nangentliziyo ekolisekileyo, nokuba ndikwenzile okulungileyo emehlweni ako. Waza u‐Hezekiya walila ngokulila okukulu." 
2Kings20:4 Kwaye kute, nxa u‐Yisaya ebengekapumanga kwesapakati isixeko, kweza ilizwi likayehova kuye, lisiti:" 
2Kings20:5 Buya, uye uti ku‐Hezekiya inkosi yabantu bam: Utsho uyehova, utixo ka‐Davide uyihlo wako, ukuti: Ndivile umtandazo wako, ndibonile inyembezi zako; bona ke, ndiya kukupilisa: ngomhla wesitatu uya kunyuka uye endlwini kayehova:" 
2Kings20:6 ndandiya kwongeza emihleni yako iminyaka ilishumi linesihlanu; ndiya kusindisa wena, nesixeko esi, esandleni sokumkani we‐Asiriya; ewe ndosikusela esisixeko ngenxa yokwam, nangenxa ka‐Davide isicaka sam." 
2Kings20:7 Wandula wati u‐Yisaya: Tabatani isimba lamakiwane. Baza balitabata, balibeka pezu kwetumba, wapila ke." 
2Kings20:8 Kekaloku u‐Hezekiya ebete ku‐Yisaya: Umqondiso uyinto nina wokuba uyehova wondipilisa, nokuba ndiya kunyuka ndiye endlwini kayehova ngomhla wesitatu?" 
2Kings20:9 Waza wati u‐Yisaya: Oku kwoba ngumqondiso kuwe uvela kuyehova, wokuba uyehova uya kwenza lento ayitetileyo: Isitunzi siya kuhamba izinyuko ezilishumi, siya kubuya izinyuko ezilishumi, kusinina?" 
2Kings20:10 Wayesiti u‐Hezekiya: Kuyinto elula yokuba isitunzi sihle izinyuko ezilishumi; hai, kambe, masibuye isitunzi ngomva izinyuko ezilishumi." 
2Kings20:11 Waza wabiza u‐Yisaya umprofite kuyehova; owabuyisa isitunzi ngomva izinyuko zalishumi, ngezinyuko esibe sihlile ngazo pezu kwelitye lokuxela ixesha lika‐Ahazi." 
2Kings20:12 Ngeloxesha watuma u‐Berodaki?-?baladane, unyana ka‐Baladane, ukumkani we‐Babilone, incwadi nebaso ku‐Hezekiya: ngokuba ebevile ukuba u‐Hezekiya ubesifa." 
2Kings20:13 Waye u‐Hezekiya epulapula kubo, wababonisa yonke indlu yake yokubekela, isilivere, negolide, nezimnandi, neoli enqabileyo, nayo yonke indlu yezixo̔bo zake, nako konke okube kufunyanwa pakati kwendyebo zake: akwabiko nto endlwini yake, nakubo bonke ubukosi bake, abebengaboniswa yona ngu‐Hezekiya." 
2Kings20:14 Wandula weza u‐Yisaya umprofite kukumkani u‐Hezekiya, wati kuye: Ate nina lamadoda? avela pina ukuza kuwe? Wati u‐Hezekiya: Avele elizweni elikude, e‐Babilone." 
2Kings20:15 Waza wati: Yinto nina ayibonileyo endlwini yako? Wayesiti u‐Hezekiya: Konke okusendlwini yam akubonile; akuko nto pakati kwendyebo zam endingawabonisanga yona. 
2Kings20:16 Wandula wati u‐Yisaya ku‐Hezekiya: Yiva ilizwi likayehova. 
2Kings20:17 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, kwakuba konke okusendlwini yako, noko bakubekeleyo oyihlo bako kwada kwanamhla nje, kuya kusiwa e‐Babilone; akuyi kusala nento, utsho uyehova." 
2Kings20:18 Nakubo onyana bako abaya kupuma kuwe, abo uya kubazala, baya kususa inxenye; babeya kuba ngababusi eluxandeni lwokumkani we‐Babilone." 
2Kings20:19 Waza wati u‐Hezekiya ku‐Yisaya: Lilungile ilizwi likayehova, elo ulitetileyo. Wati kanjako: Alinjalo na, nxa kuya kubako uxolo nenyaniso emihleni yam?" 
2Kings20:20 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Hezekiya, nawo onke amandla ake, nokuba wati nina ukwenza icibi, nomjelo, nokungenisa amanzi esixekweni, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings20:21 Wada u‐Hezekiya walala noyise bake; waza u‐Manase unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake. 
2Kings21:1 EBEYIMINYAKA ilishumi linesibini u‐Manase ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mahlanu anamihlanu e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Hefetsiba." 
2Kings21:2 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengento ezibuntshontsho zabaheyideni, ababegqogqiwe nguyehova pambi kwalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings21:3 Ngokuba wabuya wazaka indawo ezipakamileyo, ezo u‐Hezekiya uyise wake ubezitshabalalisile; wamisela u‐Bali izibingelo, wenza umfanekiso ka‐Ashera, njengokuba ebenje njalo u‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, wazitoba kuwo wonke umkosi wezulu, wawukonza." 
2Kings21:4 Waka izibingelo nasendlwini kayehova, owabesiti uyehova ngayo: e‐Yerusaleme ndiya kubeka igama lam." 
2Kings21:5 Wakela nawo wonke umkosi wezulu izibingelo, emabaleni omabini endlu kayehova." 
2Kings21:6 Wayedlulisa unyana wake emlilweni, wenza ngobugqi, walaula, wenzelana nemishologu namatola: wandisa ukwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, ukumqumbisa." 
2Kings21:7 Kanjako wabeka umfanekiso oqingqiweyo ka‐Ashera abewenzile endlwini, owabesiti uyehova ngayo ku‐Davide naku‐Solomone unyana wake: Kulendlu, nakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, endiyinyulileyo kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, ndiya kubeka igama lam kude kube ngunapakade:" 
2Kings21:8 ndandingayi kupinda ukushukumisa inyawo zo‐Sirayeli emhlabeni, endiwunikileyo koyise babo; kupela ukuba baya kulumkela ukwenza ngako konke endibayaleleyo, nangawo wonke umteto sibe sibayalela wona isicaka sam u‐Mosesi." 
2Kings21:9 Abapulapula noko: ngokuba u‐Manase wabadungudelisa, bada bakwenza okukohlakeleyo ngapezu kwabaheyideni, abo wabatshabalalisayo uyehova pambi kwalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
2Kings21:10 Waza wateta uyehova ngezicaka zake abaprofite, esiti:" 
2Kings21:11 Ngenxa yokuba u‐Manase ukumkani wo‐Juda ezenzile ezizinto zibuntshontsho, esenza ngokukohlakeleyo nje ngapezu kwako konke ababekwenza aba‐Amori, abebepambili kuye, nokuba ebenzile no‐Juda bone ngezitixwana zake;" 
2Kings21:12 ngako oko, utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa ilishwa pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme no‐Juda, aya kuti osukuba eliva, indlebe zake zombini ziyakukenceza." 
2Kings21:13 Ngokuba ndiya kwolula pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme intambo ye‐Samariya, nesilinganiso sendlu ka‐Ahabi; ndandiya kusula i‐Yerusaleme njengokuba umntu esula isikotile; o sisulayo, andul’ ukusipetula pezu kwobuso baso." 
2Kings21:14 Kanjalo ndiya kulahla abaseleyo belifa lam, ndibanikele esandleni sentshaba zabo; boba yinto yokupangwa neyokutinjwa kuzo zonke intshaba zabo;" 
2Kings21:15 ngenxa yokuba bekwenzile okukohlakeleyo emehlweni am, nokuba bendiqumbisile, kwa semhleni ababepuma oyise babo e‐Jipete, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
2Kings21:16 Nakanjako igazi elingenatyala walipalaza u‐Manase ngento eninzi kakulu, wada wazalisa i‐Yerusaleme kwa kwenye incam kude kwakwenye; ngapandle kwesono sake owabenza o‐Juda bone ngaso, ngokwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova." 
2Kings21:17 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Manase, nako konke abekwenza, nesono sake wona ngaso, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings21:18 Wada u‐Manase walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa emyezweni wendlu yake, emyezweni ka‐Huza; waza u‐Amoni unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Kings21:19 EBEYIMINYAKA imashumi mabini anesibini u‐Amoni ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamibini e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Meshulemete, intombi ka‐Harutse, owase‐Yoteba." 
2Kings21:20 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengokuba ebenje njalo u‐Manase uyise." 
2Kings21:21 Ngokuba ebehamba kuyo yonke indlela owahamba ngayo uyise; wakonza izitixwana abezikonzile uyise, watoba pambi kwazo:" 
2Kings21:22 wamshiya uyehova, utixo woyise bake; akahamba endleleni kayehova." 
2Kings21:23 Zaza izicaka zika‐Amoni zaceba ngakuye, zamfisa ukumkani kweyake indlu." 
2Kings21:24 Kodwa abantu belizwe babulala bonke abebecebile ngakuye ukumkani u‐Amoni: bandula abantu belizwe bamenza u‐Josiya unyana wake ukumkani esikundleni sake. 
2Kings21:25 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Amoni, oko wakwenzayo, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings21:26 Waza wancw̔atywa encw̔abeni lake emyezweni ka‐Huza; wati u‐Josiya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake. 
2Kings22:1 EBEYIMINYAKA asibozo u‐Josiya ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi matatu anamnye e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Yedida, intombi ka‐Hadaya, owase‐Botsekate." 
2Kings22:2 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, wahamba kuyo yonke indlela ka‐Davide uyise, engapambukelanga nangasekunene nangasekohlo." 
2Kings22:3 Kwaye kute ngoweshumi linesibozo umnyaka wokumkani u‐Josiya, watuma ukumkani u‐Shafane, unyana ka‐Atsaliya, unyana ka‐Meshulame, umba̔li, ukuya endlwini kayehova, esiti:" 
2Kings22:4 Nyuka uye ku‐Hilikiya umperisite omkulu, ukuze abale imali ezisiweyo endlwini kayehova, leyo abagcini bomnyango bayibutile ebantwini;" 
2Kings22:5 bandule bayinike esandleni sabo bawenza umsebenzi, sabo bonganyisiweyo pezu kwendlu kayehova; bati ke bona bayinike kubo abawenza umsebenzi osendlwini kayehova, ukuze kulungiswe intanda zendlu," 
2Kings22:6 kwincibi zemiti nakubaki, nakubenzi bendonga, nokuba kutengwe imiti, namatye aqandulweyo, ukuze kulungiswe indlu." 
2Kings22:7 Kodwa ababuzwa ngemali ebinikwa esandleni sabo, ngokuba bebesenza bona ngenyaniso." 
2Kings22:8 Waza u‐Hilikiya umperisite omkulu wati kuye u‐Shafane umba̔li: Incwadi yomteto ndiyifumene endlwini kayehova. Wandula u‐Hilikiya wayinika incwadi leyo ku‐Shafane, owayileseshayo." 
2Kings22:9 Wasuka u‐Shafane, umba̔li weza kukumkani, wamzisela ukumkani impendulo, wati: Izicaka zako zikupile imali ebifunyanwa endlwini, zayinika esandleni sabo bawenza umsebenzi, sabo bonganyisiweyo pezu kwendlu kayehova." 
2Kings22:10 Waye kanjalo u‐Shafane umba̔li wayeshumayela kukumkani, esiti: Ndinikiwe incwadi ngu‐Hilikiya umperisite. Waza u‐Shafane wayilesesha ebusweni bokumkani." 
2Kings22:11 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni ukumkani wevayo amazwi omteto, waṙazula izivato zake." 
2Kings22:12 Wandula ukumkani wayalela u‐Hilikiya umperisite, no‐Ahikame unyana ka‐Shafane, no‐Hakebore unyana ka‐Mikaya, no‐Shafane umba̔li, no‐Hasaya isicaka sokumkani, ngokuti:" 
2Kings22:13 Hambani, niye nibuze kuyehova ngenxa yam, nangenxa yabantu, nangenxa yo‐Juda bonke, pezu kwamazwi alencwadi ifunyenweyo: ngokuba umkulu umsindo kayehova ovutayo ngakuti, ngokokuba obawo betu bengapulapulanga kuwo amazwi alencwadi, ukwenza ngako konke okuba̔liweyo ngati." 
2Kings22:14 Wayehamba u‐Hilikiya umperisite, no‐Ahikame, no‐Hakebore, no‐Shafane, no‐Hasaya, ukuya ku‐Hulida umprofitekazi, umfazi ka‐Shalume, unyana ka‐Tikeva, unyana ka‐Harehase, umgcini wezivato; (waye yena ehlala e‐Yerusaleme, kwesesibini isahlulo sayo;) baza bateta naye." 
2Kings22:15 Wayesiti kubo: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Yitini kwindoda enitumileyo ukuza kum:" 
2Kings22:16 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa ilishwa pezu kwalendawo, napezu kwabemi bayo, onke amazwi encwadi ayileseshileyo ukumkani wo‐Juda:" 
2Kings22:17 ngenxa yokuba bendishiyile, nokuba bequmisile kotixo bambi, ukuze bandiqumbise ngako konke ukwenza kwezandla zabo; ngako umsindo wam uya kuvuta ngakuyo lendawo, ungacinywa ke." 
2Kings22:18 Kodwa kukumkani wo‐Juda, onitumileyo ukuza kubuza kuyehova, niya kutsho kuye ngokuti: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Amazwi uwavileyo, —" 
2Kings22:19 ngokokuba intliziyo yako ibitambile, nokuba wazigoba pambi kwoyehova, wakukuva oko enditetile kona pezu kwalendawo, napezu kwabemi bayo, ukuba babe yingcitakalo nesiqalekiswa, waṙazula izivato zako, walila nokulila ebusweni bam; kanjalo nam ndikuvile wena, utsho uyehova." 
2Kings22:20 Ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kukubutela koyihlo bako, wauya kubutelwa encw̔abeni lako ngoxolo; namehlo ako wona akayi kubona lonke ilishwa endiya kulizisa pezu kwalendawo. Baza bamzisela ukumkani impendulo." 
2Kings23:1 Wandula watuma ukumkani; baza bahlanganisela kuye bonke abadala bo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme. 
2Kings23:2 Wayenyuka ukumkani waya endlwini kayehova, nawo onke amadoda akwa‐Juda, nabo bonke abemi base‐Yerusaleme, kunye naye, nabaperisite, nabaprofite, nabo bonke abantu, kwa nabancinane nabakulu; waza walesesha ezindlebeni zabo onke amazwi encwadi yocebano, ebifunyenwe endlwini kayehova." 
2Kings23:3 Wema ukumkani pezu kwendawo epezulu, wenza ucebano pambi kwoyehova, lwokuba kulandelwe uyehova, nokuba kugcinwe imiyalelo yake, nezinqi̔nelo zake, nezimiselo zake, ngayo yonke intliziyo, nangawo wonke umpefumlo, kufezwe amazwi olucebano aba̔liweyo kulencwadi. Bati bonke abantu bema kulo ucebano olo." 
2Kings23:4 Waza ukumkani wayalela u‐Hilikiya umperisite omkulu, nabaperisite besesibini isaci, nabagcini bomnyango, ukuba bakupe etempileni kayehova zonke impahla ezibe zenzelwe u‐Bali, no‐Ashera, nawo wonke umkosi wezulu; wandula wazitshisa ngapandle kwe‐Yerusaleme ezindleni zase‐Kidrone, wasa ututu lwazo e‐Betele." 
2Kings23:5 Kanjalo wabasusa ababingeli, abo okumkani bo‐Juda bebebamisele ukuba baqumise pezu kwendawo ezipakamileyo ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, nasezindaweni ezingqongayo i‐Yerusaleme: kwa nabo baqumisayo ku‐Bali, na kulo ilanga, nakuyo inyanga, nakuzo izikwenkwezi zendlela yelanga, nakuwo wonke umkosi wezulu." 
2Kings23:6 Nomfanekiso ka‐Ashera wawukupa endlwini kayehova, ngapandle kwe‐Yerusaleme, ngasemlanjaneni we‐Kidrone, wawutshisa emlanjaneni we‐Kidrone, wawukanda wada walutuli, waluposa utuli lwawo pezu kwamancw̔aba osapo lwabantu." 
2Kings23:7 Wayezicita izindlu zengnawo, ezibe zingasendlwini kayehova, apo amankazana alukela u‐Ashera intente kona." 
2Kings23:8 Waza wabavelisa bonke abaperisite ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, wazinco̔lisa indawo ezipakamileyo, apo abaperisite bebequmisile kona, kutabata e‐Geba kude kwase‐Beresheba, wazicita indawo ezipakamileyo zasemasangweni, naleyo ebisemnyango wesango lika‐Yoshuwa inkosi yesixeko, ngasekohlo kwomntu esangweni lesixeko." 
2Kings23:9 Kodwa abaperisite bendawo ezipakamileyo bebengenyuki ukuza esibingelweni sikayehova e‐Yerusaleme; koko bebesidla izonka ezingenagwele pakati kwabazalwana babo. 
2Kings23:10 Wanco̔lisa ne‐Tofete, esesihlanjeni sonyana baka‐Hinome, ukuze kungabiko umntu odlulisayo unyana wake nentombi yake emlilweni pambi kwo‐Moleke." 
2Kings23:11 Kanjalo wawasusa amahashe, lawo okumkani bo‐Juda bebewanikile elangeni, ekungenweni kwendlu kayehova, wawabeka enkambilini ka‐Natane‐meleke umbusi, ebisezindaweni zangapandle; nenqwelo zelanga wazitshisa ngomlilo." 
2Kings23:12 Nezibingelo ezibe zipezu kwesifulelwa senkambili yapezulu ka‐Ahazi, ezibe zenziwe ngokumkani bo‐Juda, nezibingelo ezibe zenziwe ngu‐Manase emabaleni omabini endlu kayehova, waziwisa ukumkani, wazicita kwa kona, waluposa utuli lwazo emlanjaneni we‐Kidrone." 
2Kings23:13 Nendawo ezipakamileyo ezibe zipambi kwe‐Yerusaleme, ezibe zingasekunene kwentaba yolwonakaliso, ezo u‐Solomone ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli ubezakele u‐Hashetorete, intshontsho yama‐Tsidone, no‐Kemoshe, intshontsho yama‐Mowabi, no‐Milikome, intshontsho yosapo luka‐Hamoni, wazinco̔lisa ukumkani." 
2Kings23:14 Waziqekeza intsika zamatye, wazigaula i‐Ashera, wazalisa indawo zazo ngamatambo abantu." 
2Kings23:15 Nakanjako isibingelo esibe sise‐Betele, n endawo epakamileyo ebe yenziwe ngu‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, owenzayo o‐Sirayeli bone, kwa nesibingelo eso nendawo epakamileyo leyo wazicita; waza wayitshisa indawo epakamileyo, wayikanda yada yalutuli, wawutshisa nomfanekiso ka‐Ashera." 
2Kings23:16 Wati akubekabeka u‐Josiya, wabona amancw̔aba abekona entabeni apo, watuma ke, wasusa amatambo emancw̔abeni lawo, wawatshisa pezu kwesibingelo, wasinco̔lisa, njengelizwi likayehova elibe lishunyayelwe yindoda katixo, eyashumayelayo ezizinto." 
2Kings23:17 Wandula wati: Yintsika nina le endiyibonayo? Aza ati kuye amadoda esixeko: Lincw̔aba lendoda katixo, eyavela kwa‐Juda, yashumayela ezizinto uzenzileyo ngakuso isibingelo sase‐Betele." 
2Kings23:18 Wayesiti: Yiyekeni, makungashukunyiswa mntu amatambo ayo. Kwa njalo basindisa amatambo ayo, kunye namatambo omprofite owavela e‐Samariya." 
2Kings23:19 Kanjako nazo zonke izindlu zendawo ezipakamileyo ezibe zisezixekweni zase‐Samariya, ezo okumkani bo‐Sirayeli bebezenzile ukumqumbisa u‐Yehova, wazisusa u‐Josiya, wenza kuzo njengazo zonke izenzo abezenzile e‐Betele." 
2Kings23:20 Waza wababinga bonke abaperisite bendawo ezipakamileyo, ababekona, pezu kwezibingelo, watshisa amatambo abantu pezu kwazo; wada wabuyela e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Kings23:21 Wandula ukumkani wabayalela bonke abantu, ngokuti: Bambani ipasika kuyehova, utixo wenu, njengokuba̔liweyo encwadini yocebano olu." 
2Kings23:22 Ngenyaniso bekungabanjwanga ipasika enjengalé, kuselokwemihla yabagwebi abagwebayo o‐Sirayeli, nakuyo yonke imihla yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli, neyokumkani bo‐Juda;" 
2Kings23:23 kupela ngoweshumi linesibozo umnyaka wokumkani u‐Josiya, ekukuwo kwabanjwa lepasika kuyehova e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Kings23:24 Kananjalo abenzelana nemishologu, namatola, neterafi, nezitixwana, nazo zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho ezibe zibonakala elizweni lakwa‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme, wazisusa u‐Josiya; ukuze awafeze amazwi omteto abeba̔liwe encwadini, ebifunyenwe ngu‐Hilikiya umperisite endlwini kayehova." 
2Kings23:25 Nanjengaye bekungeko ukumkani pambili kuye, owaguqukela kuyehova ngayo yonke intliziyo yake, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wake, nangawo onke amandla ake, njengawo wonke umteto ka‐Mosesi; nasemva kwake bekungavuki onjengaye." 
2Kings23:26 Noko uyehova akaguquka ebushushwini bengqumbo yake enkulu, ebekungabo yavuta ingqumbo yake ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, ngenxa yazo zonke ingcapukiso abemcapukisile ngazo u‐Manase." 
2Kings23:27 Wada wati uyehova: Kwa no‐Juda ndobakwelelisa ebusweni bam, njengokuba ndibakwelelisile o‐Sirayeli; ndandiya kulahla isixeko esi, i‐Yerusaleme endiyinyulileyo, nendlu endite ngayo: Igama lam loba kona." 
2Kings23:28 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Josiya, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings23:29 Emihleni yake kwenyuka u‐Faro Neko ukumkani we‐Jipete, ukuya ngakuye ukumkani we‐Asiriya, ngasemlanjeni wom‐Ferate: waye ukumkani u‐Josiya wahamba ukuya kumkaulela; waza wambulala e‐Megido, nxa abembonile." 
2Kings23:30 Zasuka izicaka zake zamkwelisa efile enqwelweni e‐Megido, zamzisa e‐Yerusaleme, zamncw̔aba kwelake incw̔aba. Bandula abantu belizwe batabata u‐Yehowahazi unyana ka‐Josiya, bamtambisa, bamenza ukumkani esikundleni soyise." 
2Kings23:31 EBEYIMINYAKA imashumi mabini anesitatu u‐Yehowahazi ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani inyanga zantatu e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Hamutali, intombi ka‐Jeremiya, owase‐Libena." 
2Kings23:32 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke ababekwenzile oyise bake." 
2Kings23:33 Koko u‐Faro Neko wamnxibayo e‐Ribela elizweni le‐Hamati, ukuze angabi ngukumkani e‐Yerusaleme; wati kanjalo wabeka pezu kwelizwe intlaulo yekulu letalente zesilivere, netalente inye yegolide." 
2Kings23:34 Waza u‐Faro Neko wamenza u‐Eliyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani esikundleni sika‐Josiya uyise, waguqula igama lake libe ngu‐Yoyakime; no‐Yehowahazi wamtabata, owezayo e‐Jipete wafela kona." 
2Kings23:35 Kekaloku isilivere leyo negolide leyo wayinika u‐Yoyakime ku‐Faro; kodwa walinganisa ilizwe, ukuba anike imali leyo ngomteto ka‐Faro; wayibanga isilivere negolide kubo abantu belizwe, abanye ngabanye njengokulinganiswa kwabo, ukuba ayinike ku‐Faro Neko." 
2Kings23:36 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu u‐Yoyakime ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinamnye e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Zebuda, intombi ka‐Pedaya, owase‐Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke ababekwenzile oyise bake." 
2Kings24:1 Emihleni yake kwenyuka u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, waza u‐Yoyakime waba ngumkonzi kuye iminyaka yamitatu: wandula wajika, wavukela ngakuye." 
2Kings24:2 Waza uyehova watuma ngakuye amabandla ama‐Kaledine, namabandla ama‐Siriya, namabandla ama‐Mowabi, namabandla osapo luka‐Hamoni, wawatuma ngakubo o‐Juda ukubatshabalalisa, njengelizwi likayehova, owalitetayo ngezicaka zake abaprofite." 
2Kings24:3 Ngenyaniso bekungomteto kayehova kwehlayo lento pezu kwo‐Juda, ukuba abakwelelise ebusweni bake, ngenxa yezono zika‐Manase, njenjako konke abekwenzile;" 
2Kings24:4 nangenxa yegazi elingenatyala owabelipalazile: ngokuba ebezalisile i‐Yerusaleme ngegazi elingenatyala: ngako ebengavumi uyehova ukuxolela. 
2Kings24:5 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Yoyakime, nako konke abekwenza, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani bo‐Juda?" 
2Kings24:6 Wada walala u‐Yoyakime noyise bake; waza u‐Yoyakine unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake. 
2Kings24:7 Waye ukumkani we‐Jipete engasapindi ukupuma elizweni lake; ngokuba ukumkani we‐Babilone ebetabatile ilizwe, kwa kuwo umlambo wase‐Jipete kude kwakuwo umlambo wom‐Ferate, lonke elibe lilelokumkani we‐Jipete." 
2Kings24:8 EBEYIMINYAKA ilishumi elinesibozo u‐Yoyakine ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani inyanga zantatu e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Nehusheta, intombi ka‐Elinatane, owase‐Yerusaleme." 
2Kings24:9 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke abekwenzile uyise." 
2Kings24:10 Ngeloxesha kwenyuka izicaka zika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme; saza isixeko sangena ekuvingcelekeni. 
2Kings24:11 Weza no‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ngakuso isixeko, nxa izicaka zake bezisivingcela." 
2Kings24:12 Wada u‐Yoyakine ukumkani wo‐Juda wapumela kuye ukumkani we‐Babilone, yena, nonina, nezicaka zake, nenkosana zake, nababusi bake: waye ukumkani we‐Babilone wambamba ngomnyaka wesibozo wobukumkani bake." 
2Kings24:13 Wandula wazipumisa kona zonke indyebo zendlu kayehova, nendyebo zendlu yokumkani, wazihlahla zonke impahla zegolide ezibe zenziwe ngu‐Solomone ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli etempileni kayehova, njengokuba uyehova ebetshilo." 
2Kings24:14 Waza wafudusa yonke i‐Yerusaleme, nazo zonke inkosana, nawo onke amagoṙa abuṙoti, ishumi lamawaka amatinjwa, nazo zonke incibi nabakandi; akwasala mntu, ngapandle kwawo amahlwempu abantu belizwe." 
2Kings24:15 Kwa njalo wamfudusela u‐Yoyakine e‐Babilone; nonina wokumkani, nabafazi bokumkani, nababusi bake, nabakulu belizwe, wabemkisa e‐Yerusaleme ukuya ekutinjweni e‐Babilone:" 
2Kings24:16 nawo onke amadoda obuṙoti, amawaka asixe̔nxe, nencibi nabakandi, iwaka linye, bonke abangamagoṙa eqelene nokulwa, kwa naba wabazisa ukumkani we‐Babilone ekutinjweni e‐Babilone:" 
2Kings24:17 waza ukumkani we‐Babilone wamenza u‐Mataniya, uyisekazi wake, ukumkani esikundleni sake, waguqula igama lake libe ngu‐Zedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 EBEYIMINYAKA imashumi mabini anamnye u‐Zedekiya ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinamnye e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Hamutali, intombi ka‐Jeremiya, owase‐Libena." 
2Kings24:19 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke abekwenzile u‐Yoyakime." 
2Kings24:20 Ngokuba ngayo ingqumbo kayehova kweza oku pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme napezu kwo‐Juda, wada wabalahla ebusweni bake, ukuba u‐Zedekiya wavukela ngakuye ukumkani we‐Babilone." 
2Kings25:1 Kwaye kute ngomnyaka wesitoba wobukumkani bake, ngenyanga yeshumi, ngoweshumi umhla wenyanga, weza u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, yena nayo yonke impi yake, ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, wayiṙaula; baza baka inqaba zokulinda ngakuyo ngento engqongayo." 
2Kings25:2 Saye isixeko sisekuvingcelekeni kwada kwangumnyaka weshumi elinamnye wokumkani u‐Zedikiya. 
2Kings25:3 Ngowesitoba umhla wenyanga yesine, isuke indlala yaba namandla esixekweni, kwada akwabiko isonka ebantwini belizwe." 
2Kings25:4 Sandula isixeko sagqojozelwa, ati onke amadoda okulwa esaba ngobusuku ngendlela yesango pakati kwendonga zimbini, elingasemyezweni wokumkani; ngokuba ama‐Kaledine ebengakuso isixeko ngokungqonga: wati ukumkani wahamba ngendlela yetafa." 
2Kings25:5 Kodwa impi yama‐Kaledine yamputuma ukumkani, yamfumana ematafeni ase‐Jeriko, nayo yonke impi yake icitiwe kuye." 
2Kings25:6 Baza bambamba ukumkani, bamnyusela kuye ukumkani we‐Babilone, e‐Ribela, bateta umgwebo pezu kwake." 
2Kings25:7 Baza babulala onyana baka‐Zedekiya pambi kwamehlo ake; bandula bamfamekisa amehlo ka‐Zedekiya, bamnxiba ngamakamandela obedu, bamsa e‐Babilone." 
2Kings25:8 Nangenyanga yesihlanu, ngowesixe̔nxe umhla wenyanga, ya lomnyaka obungoweshumi linesitoba umnyaka wokumkani u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, weza u‐Nebuzaradane, inkosi yomlisela, isicaka sokumkani we‐Babilone, e‐Yerusaleme," 
2Kings25:9 watshisa indlu kayehova, nendlu yokumkani; nazo zonke izindlu zase‐Yerusaleme, kwa zonke izindlu zabakulu, wazitshisa ngomlilo." 
2Kings25:10 Nendonga ze‐Yerusaleme ezingqongayo, yonke impi yama‐Kaledine, ebinayo inkosi yomlisela, yazicita." 
2Kings25:11 Nesisalela sabantu ababesele esixekweni, nabapongomi ababepongomele kuye ukumkani we‐Babilone, nesisalela sesihlwele, wabafudusa u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela." 
2Kings25:12 Kodwa amahlwempu elizwe wawasalisa inxenye u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela, abe ngabalimi bemiti yeveyine, nabaku̔beli." 
2Kings25:13 Kanjako intsika zexina ezibe zikuyo indlu kayehova, nezikondo, nolwandle lwexina olube lukuyo indlu kayehova, ama‐Kaledine aziqekeza, nexina yazo ayitutela e‐Babilone." 
2Kings25:14 Nembiza, nezikotululo, nezicimo, negxebeka, nazo zonke impahla zexina ekube kukonzwa ngazo, azisusa." 
2Kings25:15 Nezipatamlilo, nezitya zokufefela, igolide yezo zegolide, nesilivere yezo zesilivere, yazisusa inkosi yomlisela." 
2Kings25:16 Intsika zombini, ulwandle lunye, nezikondo, abete u‐Solomone wazenzela indlu kayehova, ibingenakulinganiswa ixina yazo zonke ezimpahla." 
2Kings25:17 Ubupakamo benye intsika bebuzikubite ezilishumi linesibozo; nentloko pezu kwayo, yona ibiyixina; nobupakamo bentloko leyo, ibizikubite ezintatu, inesetyenzwa elipanjanisiweyo, negranate pezu kwentloko ngokungqonga, zonke ziyixina: kanjalo eyesibini intsika ibinezinjengazo ezi, kunye nesetyenzwa elipanjanisiweyo." 
2Kings25:18 Yandula inkosi yomlisela yatabata u‐Seraya umperisite omkulu, no‐Tsefaniya umperisite wesibini, nabagcini bomnyango bobatatu:" 
2Kings25:19 nakuso isixeko yatabata umbusi, lowo obeligosa pezu kwamadoda okulwa; namadoda amahlanu kwabo babebona ubuso bokumkani, abefunyanwa esixekweni; nomba̔li wenkosi yomkosi, owahlanganisa abantu belizwe emfazweni; namadoda angamashumi matandatu kubo abantu belizwe, abefunyanwa esixekweni:" 
2Kings25:20 aba wabatabata u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela, wabazisa kuye ukumkani we‐Babilone e‐Ribela:" 
2Kings25:21 waza ukumkani we‐Babilone wababeta, wababulala e‐Ribela elizweni le‐Hamati. Kwa njalo o‐Juda bafuduswa emhlabeni wabo." 
2Kings25:22 KEKALOKU abantu ababesele elizweni lakwa‐Juda, abo u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ebebasalisile, wamongamisa pezu kwabo u‐Gedaliya, unyana ka‐Ahikame, unyana ka‐Shafane." 
2Kings25:23 Zati zakuva zonke inkosi zezimpi, zona namadoda azo, ukuba ukumkani we‐Babilone wenzile u‐Gedaliya umongama, zandula zeza ku‐Gedaliya e‐Mitsipa: kwa u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya, no‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, no‐Seraya unyana ka‐Tanehumete, um‐Netofati, no‐Yazaniya unyana wom‐Mahaka, bona namadoda abo." 
2Kings25:24 Waza u‐Gedaliya wafunga kubo, nakumadoda abo, wati kubo: Ningoyiki ukuba ngabakonzi bama‐Kaledine; hlalani elizweni, nimkonze ukumkani we‐Babilone, kwakuya kulunga kuni." 
2Kings25:25 Kodwa bekute ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe, kweza u‐Shimayeli, unyana ka‐Netaniya, unyana ka‐Elishama, owenzalo yobukumkani, namadoda alishumi enaye; baza bambeta u‐Gedaliya, ukuba wafa, kwa nama‐Juda nama‐Kaledine abeko naye e‐Mitsipa." 
2Kings25:26 Bandula besuka bonke abantu, kwa nabancinane nabakulu, nenkosi zezimpi, baya e‐Jipete; ngokuba bebesoyika ngenxa yama‐Kaledine." 
2Kings25:27 KWAYE kute ngowamashumi matatu anesixe̔nxe umnyaka wokutinjwa kwake u‐Yoyakine ukumkani wo‐Juda, ngenyanga yeshumi elinesibini, ngowamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe umhla wenyanga, wati u‐Evili‐merodaki ukumkani we‐Babilone, ngomnyaka wokuba ngukumkani kwake, wapakamisa intloko ka‐Yoyakine ukumkani wo‐Juda, wamkupa entolongweni," 
2Kings25:28 wateta naye ngobuhlobo, wamisa isihlalo sake ngapezu kwesihlalo sokumkani ababenaye e‐Babilone." 
2Kings25:29 Waza waguqula izivato zake zentolongo, wamana ukutya isonka ebusweni bake yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi." 
2Kings25:30 Nesabelwa sake sokutya, kwanikwa kuye isabelwa sokutya esifuti sivela kukumkani, into yemini ngemini yayo, yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi." 
1Chronicles1:1 U‐ADAME, u‐Shete, u‐Enoshe," 
1Chronicles1:2 u‐Kenane, u‐Mahalalele, u‐Yeredi," 
1Chronicles1:3 u‐Enoki, u‐Metushela, u‐Lameki," 
1Chronicles1:4 u‐Nowa, u‐Sheme, u‐Hame, no‐Jafete." 
1Chronicles1:5 Onyana baka‐Jafete: ngu‐Gomere, no‐Magoge, no‐Madai, no‐Javane, no‐Tubali, no‐Mesheki, no‐Tirase." 
1Chronicles1:6 Nonyana baka‐Gomere: ngu‐Shekenaze, no‐Rifate, no‐Togama." 
1Chronicles1:7 Nonyana baka‐Javane: ngu‐Elishai, no‐Tareshishe; ngama‐Kiti, nama‐Dodani." 
1Chronicles1:8 Onyana baka‐Hame: ngu‐Kushe, no‐Mitsarime, n o‐Pute, no‐Kanane." 
1Chronicles1:9 Nonyana baka‐Kushe: ngu‐Seba, no‐Havila, no‐Sabeta, no‐Rahama, no‐Sabeteka. Nonyana baka‐Rahama: ngu‐Sheba, no‐Dedane." 
1Chronicles1:10 Kekaloku u‐Kushe wazala u‐Nimrode; yena waqala ukuba ligoṙa emhlabeni. 
1Chronicles1:11 Wati u‐Mitsarime wazala ama‐Ludi, nama‐Hanami, nama‐Lehabi, nama‐Nafetuhi," 
1Chronicles1:12 nama‐Faterusi, nama‐Kaseluhi, (ekwavela kona ama‐Filistiya), nama‐Kafetori." 
1Chronicles1:13 No‐Kanane wazala u‐Tsidone owamazibulo wake, no‐Hete," 
1Chronicles1:14 kwa nom‐Yebusi, nom‐Amori, nom‐Giregashe," 
1Chronicles1:15 nom‐Hivi, nom‐Araki, nom‐Sini," 
1Chronicles1:16 nom‐Aravadi, nom‐Tsemari, nom‐Hamati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Onyana baka‐Sheme: ngu‐Helami, no‐Ashure, no‐Rafatsade, no‐Lude, no‐Arame, no‐Hutse, no‐Hule, no‐Getere, no‐Mesheki." 
1Chronicles1:18 Wati u‐Rafatsade wazala u‐Sala, no‐Sala wazala u‐Hebere." 
1Chronicles1:19 No‐Hebere kwamzalelwa onyana bababini: igama lomnye lalingu‐Pelege: ngokuba bekusemihleni yake umhlaba wahlulwa; negama lomkuluwe wake lalingu‐Yoketane.
