1Chronicles1:20 Waye u‐Yoketane wazala u‐Lamodade, no‐Shelefe, no‐Hatsamavete, no‐Jera," 
1Chronicles1:21 no‐Hadorame, no‐Yuzale, no‐Dikala," 
1Chronicles1:22 no‐Hebali, no‐Abimale, no‐Sheba," 
1Chronicles1:23 no‐Ofire, no‐Havila, no‐Jobabe: bonke aba bangonyana baka‐Yoketane." 
1Chronicles1:23 no‐Ofire, no‐Havila, no‐Jobabe: bonke aba bangonyana baka‐Yoketane." 
1Chronicles1:24 U‐Sheme, u‐Rafatsade, u‐Sala," 
1Chronicles1:25 u‐Hebere, u‐Pelege, u‐Rehu," 
1Chronicles1:26 u‐Seruge, u‐Nahore, u‐Tera," 
1Chronicles1:27 u‐Abrame, okwa nguye u‐Abrahame." 
1Chronicles1:28 ONYANA baka‐Abrahame: ngu‐Yisake, no‐Shimayeli." 
1Chronicles1:29 Ezi zizizizukulwana zabo: owamazibulo ka‐Shimayeli u‐Nebayoti, no‐Kedare, no‐Adebele, no‐Mibisame:" 
1Chronicles1:30 u‐Mishama, no‐Duma; u‐Masa, u‐Hadade, no‐Tema;" 
1Chronicles1:31 u‐Jeture, u‐Nafishe, no‐Kedema. Aba bangonyana baka‐Shimayeli." 
1Chronicles1:32 Nonyana baka‐Ketura, ishweshwe lika‐Abrahame: yena wazala u‐Zimrane, no‐Yokeshane, no‐Medane, no‐Midiyane, no‐Shebaki, no‐Shuha. Nonyana baka‐Yokeshane: ngu‐Sheba, no‐Dedane." 
1Chronicles1:33 Nonyana baka‐Midiyane: ngu‐Hefa, no‐Heferi, no‐Hanoki, no‐Abida, no‐Ledaha. Bonke aba bangonyana baka‐Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Waye u‐Abrahame wazala u‐Yisake. Onyana baka‐Yisake: ngu‐Esau, no‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles1:35 Onyana baka‐Esau: ngu‐Elifazi, n o‐Rehule, no‐Yehushe, no‐Yalame, no‐Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Onyana baka‐Elifazi: ngu‐Temani, no‐Womare, n o‐Tsefi, n o‐Gatame, no‐Kenazi, no‐Timna, no‐Amaleki." 
1Chronicles1:37 Onyana baka‐Rehule: ngu‐Nahate, n o‐Zera, n o‐Shama, no‐Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Nonyana baka‐Sehire: ngu‐Lotane, no‐Shobali, no‐Tsibone, no‐Hana, no‐Dishone, no‐Etsere, no‐Dishane." 
1Chronicles1:39 Nonyana baka‐Lotane: ngu‐Hori, no‐Homame: nodade ka‐Lotane wayengu‐Timna." 
1Chronicles1:40 Onyana baka‐Shobali: ngu‐Aliyane, no‐Manahate, no‐Hebali, n o‐Shefi, no‐Oname. Nonyana baka‐Tsibone: ngu‐Aya, no‐Hana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Onyana baka‐Hana: ngu‐Dishone. Nonyana baka‐Dishone: ngu‐Hamerane, no‐Shebane, no‐Yiterane, no‐Kerane." 
1Chronicles1:42 Onyana baka‐Etsere: ngu‐Bilehane, no‐Zavane, n o‐Yahakane. Onyana baka‐Dishane: ngu‐Hutse, no‐Arane." 
1Chronicles1:43 Naba bangokumkani abapata ubukosi elizweni le‐Edome, kungekabiko ukumkani opata ubukosi pezu kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli: u‐Bela, unyana ka‐Behori; negama lesixeko sake laliyi‐Dinaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Wada wafa u‐Bela, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Jobabe, unyana ka‐Zera, owase‐Botsera." 
1Chronicles1:44 Wada wafa u‐Bela, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Jobabe, unyana ka‐Zera, owase‐Botsera." 
1Chronicles1:45 Wafa u‐Jobabe, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Hushame, owasezweni lama‐Temani." 
1Chronicles1:45 Wafa u‐Jobabe, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Hushame, owasezweni lama‐Temani." 
1Chronicles1:46 Wafa u‐Hushame, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Hadade, unyana ka‐Bedade, owabeta ama‐Midiyane ezindleni zase‐Mowabi; negama lesixeko sake laliyi‐Haviti." 
1Chronicles1:47 Wafa u‐Hadade, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Samla, owase‐Masereka." 
1Chronicles1:48 Wafa u‐Samla, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Saule, owase‐Rehobote ngasemlanjeni." 
1Chronicles1:49 Wafa u‐Saule, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Balihanane, unyana ka‐Kabore." 
1Chronicles1:50 Wafa u‐Balihanane, waza waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake u‐Hadade; negama lesixeko sake laliyi‐Pahi; negama lomfazi wake lalingu‐Mehetabele, intombi ka‐Materede, intombi ka‐Mezahabi." 
1Chronicles1:51 Wafa u‐Hadade: zaza zabako inkosana zama‐Edome: inkosana engu‐Timna, inkosana engu‐Aliya, inkosana engu‐Yetete," 
1Chronicles1:52 inkosana engu‐Holibama, inkosana engu‐Ela, inkosana engu‐Pinone," 
1Chronicles1:53 inkosana engu‐Kenazi, inkosana engu‐Temani, inkosana engu‐Mibitsare," 
1Chronicles1:54 inkosana engu‐Magidele, inkosana engu‐Hirame: aba bazinkosana zama‐Edome." 
1Chronicles2:1 Aba bangonyana baka‐Sirayeli: u‐Rubene, u‐Simone, u‐Levi, no‐Juda, u‐Yisakare, no‐Zebulone," 
1Chronicles2:2 u‐Dane, u‐Josefe, no‐Benjamine, u‐Nefatali, u‐Gadi, no‐Ashere." 
1Chronicles2:3 ONYANA baka‐Juda: ngu‐Here, no‐Onane, no‐Shela: aba batatu bamzalelwa yintombi ka‐Shuha, um‐Kananekazi. Kekaloku u‐Here, owamazibulo ka‐Juda, ebekohlakele emehlweni kayehova; waza wambubisa." 
1Chronicles2:4 Wati no‐Tamare, umolokazana wake, wamzalela u‐Faretse no‐Zera. Bonke onyana baka‐Juda bangabahlanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Onyana baka‐Faretse: ngu‐Hetserone, no‐Hamule." 
1Chronicles2:6 Nonyana baka‐Zera: ngu‐Zimri, no‐Etane, no‐Hemani, no‐Kalikoli, no‐Dara: aba bonke bangabahlanu." 
1Chronicles2:7 Nonyana baka‐Kami: ngu‐Hakare, umkatazi wo‐Sirayeli, owenza ngobumenemene ngento ebilahlelwe ekutshatyalalisweni." 
1Chronicles2:8 Nonyana baka‐Etane: ngu‐Hazariya. 
1Chronicles2:9 Nonyana baka‐Hetserone, ababemzalelwe; ngu‐Jeramele, no‐Rame, no‐Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Wati u‐Rame wazala u‐Haminadabi; no‐Haminadabi wazala u‐Nahashone, inkosi yosapo luka‐Juda;" 
1Chronicles2:11 no‐Nahashone wazala u‐Salimone; no‐Salimone wazala u‐Bohazi; 
1Chronicles2:12 no‐Bohazi wazala u‐Obedi; no‐Obedi wazala u‐Jese: 
1Chronicles2:13 no‐Jese wazala u‐Eliyabe owamazibulo wake, no‐Abinadabi owesibini, no‐Shima owesitatu," 
1Chronicles2:14 no‐Netaneli owesine, no‐Radai owesihlanu," 
1Chronicles2:15 no‐Otseme owesitandatu, no‐Davide owesixe̔nxe." 
1Chronicles2:16 Odade babo bebengu‐Tseruya no‐Abigali: onyana baka‐Tseruya bebengu‐Abishai, no‐Jowabi, no‐Hasaheli, abatatu:" 
1Chronicles2:17 wati u‐Abigali wazala u‐Hamasa; noyise ka‐Hamasa ebengu‐Yetere, um‐Shimayeli." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kekaloku u‐Kalebi, unyana ka‐Hetserone, wazala abantwana ngo‐Hazuba umfazi wake, nango‐Yeriyote: ngaba onyana bake; u‐Yeshere, no‐Shobabe, no‐Radone." 
1Chronicles2:19 Wafa u‐Hazuba, waza u‐Kalebi wazizekela u‐Eferata, owamzalela u‐Hure." 
1Chronicles2:20 Wati u‐Hure wazala u‐Uri, no‐Uri wazala u‐Betsalele." 
1Chronicles2:21 Emveni kwoko wangena u‐Hetserone kwintombi ka‐Makire uyise ka‐Gileyadi, owayizekayo akuba yiminyaka imashumi matandatu ubudala bake; yati yona yamzalela u‐Segube." 
1Chronicles2:22 Waza u‐Segube wazala u‐Yahire, obenezixeko zimashumi mabini anesitatu elizweni le‐Gileyadi." 
1Chronicles2:23 Wati yena wasusa i‐Geshure ne‐Arame, kunye nemizi ka‐Yahire, kwa kubo, kunye ne‐Kenate namagxamesi ayo, izixeko ezimashumi matandatu. Zonke ezi zibe zizez onyana baka‐Makire uyise ka‐Gileyadi." 
1Chronicles2:24 Nasemveni kwokufa kuka‐Hetserone e‐Kalebi‐eferata, wati umfazi ka‐Hetserone, u‐Abiya, wamzalela no‐Ashure uyise we‐Tekoha." 
1Chronicles2:25 Onyana baka‐Jeramele, owamazibulo ka‐Hetserone, bebe ngaba: u‐Rame owamazibulo, no‐Buna, no‐Orene, no‐Otseme, n o‐Ahiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Wayenomnye umfazi u‐Jeramele, ogama lingu‐Hatara; ebengunina ka‐Oname yena." 
1Chronicles2:27 Nonyana baka‐Rame owamazibulo ka‐Jeramele, bebengu‐Mahatse, no‐Yamine, no‐Hekere." 
1Chronicles2:28 Nonyana baka‐Oname bebengu‐Shamai no‐Yada: nonyana baka‐Shamai; ngu‐Nadabi, no‐Abishure." 
1Chronicles2:29 Laye igama lomfazi ka‐Abishure lingu‐Abihayili, owamzalelayo u‐Habane no‐Molidi." 
1Chronicles2:30 Nonyana baka‐Nadabi; ngu‐Selede, no‐Payime; kodwa u‐Selede wafa engenabantwana." 
1Chronicles2:31 Nonyana baka‐Payime; ngu‐Yishi: nonyana baka‐Yishi; ngu‐Sheshane: nabantwana baka‐Sheshane; ngu‐Halai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Nonyana baka‐Yada umninawe ka‐Shamai; ngu‐Yetere, no‐Jonatane: wafa kodwa u‐Yetere engenabantwana." 
1Chronicles2:33 Nonyana baka‐Jonatane; ngu‐Pelete, no‐Zaza. Aba bebengonyana baka‐Jeramele." 
1Chronicles2:34 Kekaloku u‐Sheshane ebengenanyana, wanentombi kupela. Wayenaso isicaka u‐Sheshane lowo, esingum‐Jipete, esigama lingu‐Yareha." 
1Chronicles2:35 Waza u‐Sheshane wayinika intombi yake ku‐Yareha isicaka sake ibe ngumfazi; yati yona yamzalela u‐Hatai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Waza u‐Hatai wazala u‐Natane, no‐Natane wazala u‐Zabadi," 
1Chronicles2:37 no‐Zabadi wazala u‐Felali, no‐Felali wazala u‐Obedi," 
1Chronicles2:38 no‐Obedi wazala u‐Jehu, no‐Jehu wazala u‐Hazariya," 
1Chronicles2:39 no‐Hazariya wazala u‐Heletse, no‐Heletse wazala u‐Elehasa," 
1Chronicles2:40 no‐Elehasa wazala u‐Sisemai, no‐Sisemai wazala u‐Shalume," 
1Chronicles2:41 no‐Shalume wazala u‐Yekamiya, no‐Yekamiya wazala u‐Elishama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Nonyana baka‐Kalebi umninawe ka‐Jeramele: ngu‐Mesha owamazibulo wake, (lo unguyise ka‐Zifi,) nonyana baka‐Maresha uyise ka‐Hebrone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Nonyana baka‐Hebrone; ngu‐Kora, no‐Tapuha, no‐Rekeme, no‐Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Wati u‐Shema wazala u‐Rahame uyise we‐Yorekame; no‐Rekeme wazala u‐Shamai. 
1Chronicles2:45 Nonyana ka‐Shamai ebengu‐Mahone; waye u‐Mahone ebenguyise we‐Bete‐tsure. 
1Chronicles2:46 No‐Hefa, ishweshwe lika‐Kalebi, wazala u‐Harane, no‐Motsa, no‐Gazezi; waye u‐Harane wazala u‐Gazezi." 
1Chronicles2:47 Nonyana baka‐Yadai; ngu‐Regeme, no‐Yotame, no‐Geshame, no‐Pelete, no‐Hefa, no‐Shahafi." 
1Chronicles2:48 Lati ishweshwe lika‐Kalebi, u‐Mahaka, lazala u‐Shebere, no‐Tirana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Lazala no‐Shahafi uyise we‐Mademane, n o‐Sheva uyise we‐Makebena, noyise we‐Gibeya: nentombi ka‐Kalebi yona ibingu‐Hakesa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Aba bebengonyana baka‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Hure, owamazibulo ka‐Eferata: u‐Shobali uyise we‐Kiriyate‐yarime," 
1Chronicles2:51 u‐Salema uyise we‐Beteleheme, u‐Harefe uyise we‐Bete‐gadere." 
1Chronicles2:52 Wayenonyana u‐Shobali uyise waba‐Kiriyate‐yarime; ngu‐Harowe, n o‐Hatsi‐hamenuhote." 
1Chronicles2:53 Nezizalwane zaba‐Kiriyate‐yarime; ngama‐Yitera, nama‐Puha, nama‐Shuma, nama‐Mishera; kuwo la kwavela ama‐Tsoreha, nama‐Shetawoli." 
1Chronicles2:54 Onyana baka‐Salema; ngaba‐Beteleheme, naba‐Netofati, n aba‐Hatarote‐bete‐jowabi, naba‐Hatsi‐hamenuhote, n ama‐Tsoreha." 
1Chronicles2:55 Nezizalwane zababa̔li abemayo e‐Yabetse; ngama‐Tireha, n ama‐Shimeha, nama‐Suka: ngama‐Keni la abevele ku‐Hammate uyise wendlu ka‐Rekabe." 
1Chronicles3:1 ABA bangonyana baka‐Davide, ababemzalelwa e‐Hebrone: owamazibulo ngu‐Amnone, ngo‐Ahinohame um‐Yezerelekazi; owesibini ngu‐Danyeli, ngo‐Abigali um‐Karamelekazi;" 
1Chronicles3:2 owesitatu ngu‐Abasalome, unyana ka‐Mahaka intombi ka‐Talemai ukumkani we‐Geshure; owesine ngu‐Adonija, unyana ka‐Hagiti;" 
1Chronicles3:3 owesihlanu ngu‐Shefatiya, ngo‐Abitale: owesitandatu ngu‐Yiterame, ngo‐Hegela umfazi wake." 
1Chronicles3:4 Aba batandatu bebemzalelwe e‐Hebrone: wapata ubukumkani kona iminyaka isixe̔nxe nenyanga zintandatu; wapata ubukumkani iminyaka imashumi matatu anamitatu nase‐Yerusaleme. 
1Chronicles3:5 Aba babemzalelwa e‐Yerusaleme; u‐Shimeha, no‐Shobabe, no‐Natane, no‐Solomone, abane, ngo‐Bateshuha intombi ka‐Hamiyeli;" 
1Chronicles3:6 kwa no‐Yibare, no‐Elishama, no‐Elifelete," 
1Chronicles3:7 no‐Noga, no‐Nefege, no‐Yafiya," 
1Chronicles3:8 no‐Elishama, no‐Eliyada, no‐Elifelete, abalitoba." 
1Chronicles3:9 Aba bonke bangonyana baka‐Davide, ngapandle kwabo onyana bamashweshwe, no‐Tamare udade wabo." 
1Chronicles3:10 Unyana ka‐Solomone ngu‐Rehobome; unyana wake ngu‐Abiya; unyana wake ngu‐Asa; unyana wake ngu‐Yehoshafate; 
1Chronicles3:11 unyana wake ngu‐Yorame; unyana wake ngu‐Ahaziya; unyana wake ngu‐Yohashe; 
1Chronicles3:12 unyana wake ngu‐Amatsiya; unyana wake ngu‐Hazariya; unyana wake ngu‐Yotame; 
1Chronicles3:13 unyana wake ngu‐Ahazi; unyana wake ngu‐Hezekiya; unyana wake ngu‐Manase; 
1Chronicles3:14 unyana wake ngu‐Amoni; unyana wake ngu‐Josiya. 
1Chronicles3:15 Nonyana baka‐Josiya: owamazibulo ngu‐Johanane; owesibini ngu‐Yoyakime; owesitatu ngu‐Zedekiya; owesine ngu‐Shalume. 
1Chronicles3:16 Nonyana baka‐Yoyakime; ngu‐Yekoniya unyana wake, n o‐Zedekiya unyana wake." 
1Chronicles3:17 Nonyana baka‐Yekoniya; ngu‐Asire, n o‐Shalatiyeli unyana wake," 
1Chronicles3:18 no‐Malekirame, no‐Pedaya, no‐Shenatsare, n o‐Yekamiya, n o‐Hoshama, no‐Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Nonyana baka‐Pedaya; ngu‐Zerubabeli, no‐Shimehi: nonyana baka‐Zerubabeli; ngu‐Meshulame, no‐Hananiya: no‐Shelomiti ebengudade wabo:" 
1Chronicles3:20 no‐Hashuba, no‐Wohele, no‐Berekiya, no‐Hasadiya, n o‐Yushabi‐hesede, abahlanu." 
1Chronicles3:21 Nonyana baka‐Hananiya; ngu‐Pelatiya, no‐Yesaya: onyana baka‐Refaya, onyana baka‐Ranane, onyana baka‐Hobadiya, onyana baka‐Shekaniya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Nonyana baka‐Shekaniya; ngu‐Shemaya: nonyana baka‐Shemaya; ngu‐Hatushe, no‐Yigali, no‐Bariha, no‐Nehariya, no‐Shafate, abatandatu." 
1Chronicles3:23 Nonyana baka‐Nehariya; ngu‐Eliwenai, no‐Hezekiya, no‐Hazerikame, abatatu." 
1Chronicles3:24 Nonyana baka‐Eliwenai; ngu‐Hodaviya, no‐Eliyashibe, no‐Pelaya, no‐Hakube, no‐Johanane, no‐Delaya, no‐Anani, abasixe̔nxe." 
1Chronicles4:1 ONYANA baka‐Juda: ngu‐Faretse, n o‐Hetserone, no‐Kami, no‐Hure, no‐Shobali." 
1Chronicles4:2 Waza u‐Raya, unyana ka‐Shobali, wazala u‐Yahati; wati u‐Yahati wazala u‐Ahumai, no‐Lahadi. Ezi zizizalwane zama‐Tsoreha." 
1Chronicles4:3 Aba ke bavela kuyise we‐Hetame; u‐Yezerele, no‐Yishema, no‐Dibashe: laye igama lodade wabo lingu‐Hatseleliponi:" 
1Chronicles4:4 no‐Penuweli, uyise ka‐Gedore; no‐Hezere, uyise ka‐Husha: aba bangonyana baka‐Hure, owamazibulo ka‐Eferata, uyise we‐Beteleheme." 
1Chronicles4:5 Waye u‐Ashure, uyise we‐Tekoha, ebenabafazi babini; ngu‐Hela no‐Nahara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Wati u‐Nahara wamzalela u‐Ahuzame, no‐Hefere, no‐Temeni, no‐Hahashatari: aba bangonyana baka‐Nahara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Nonyana baka‐Hela; ngu‐Tserete, n o‐Yetsohare, no‐Etenane." 
1Chronicles4:8 Waye u‐Kotse wazala u‐Hanube, no‐Tsobeba, nezizalwane zika‐Harahele unyana ka‐Harume." 
1Chronicles4:9 Kekaloku u‐Yabetse ebebekekile ngapezu kwabazalwana bake: wati unina wambiza ngegama elingu‐Yabetse, esiti: Ngokuba ndimzele ngobuhlungu." 
1Chronicles4:10 Waza wabiza u‐Yabetse kutixo wo‐Sirayeli, esiti: Wanga ungakolisa ukunditamsanqela, uwandise umda wam, siti isandla sako sibe kunye nam, uze u ndi nqande ebubini, ukuze bungandenzi buhlungu! Wati utixo wamamkelisa oko wakucelayo." 
1Chronicles4:11 Waye u‐Kelube, umninawe ka‐Shuha, wazala u‐Mehire; lo unguyise ka‐Shetone." 
1Chronicles4:12 Wati u‐Shetone wazala u‐Bete‐rafa, no‐Paseha, no‐Tehina uyise we‐Hire‐nahashe; aba bangamadoda ase‐Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Nonyana baka‐Kenazi; ngu‐Hotineli, no‐Seraya: nonyana baka‐Hotineli; ngu‐Hatati." 
1Chronicles4:14 Waye u‐Mehonotai wazala u‐Hofera: no‐Seraya wazala u‐Jowabi, uyise waba semhlanjeni wencibi; ngokuba bona bebezincibi." 
1Chronicles4:15 Nonyana baka‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune; ngu‐Hiru, n o‐Ela, no‐Nahame: nonyana baka‐Ela; ngu‐Kenazi." 
1Chronicles4:16 Nonyana baka‐Yehaleleli; ngu‐Zifi, no‐Zifa, n o‐Tiriya, no‐Asarele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Nonyana baka‐Ezera; ngu‐Yetere, no‐Meredi, no‐Heferi, no‐Yalone. Waye u‐Bitiya wazala u‐Miriyame, no‐Shamai, no‐Yisheba uyise we‐Shetemoha:" 
1Chronicles4:18 wati nomfazi wake ongum‐Judakazi wazala u‐Yeredi uyise we‐Gedore, no‐Kebere uyise we‐Soko, no‐Yekutile uyise we‐Zanoha: aba ke bangonyana baka‐Bitiya intombi ka‐Faro, owazekwayo ngu‐Meredi." 
1Chronicles4:19 Nonyana bomfazi ongu‐Hodiya udade ka‐Nahame; nguyise ka‐Kehila um‐Garemi, no‐Shetemoha um‐Mahaka." 
1Chronicles4:20 Nonyana baka‐Shimone; ngu‐Amnone, no‐Rinai, n o‐Benehanane, no‐Tilone. Nonyana baka‐Yishi; ngu‐Zohete, no‐Bene‐zohete." 
1Chronicles4:21 Onyana baka‐Shela unyana ka‐Juda: ngu‐Here uyise we‐Leka, no‐Lahada uyise we‐Maresha, nezizalwane zendlu yabasebenzayo ngeqiya eshiceneyo, abendlu ka‐Shabeha," 
1Chronicles4:22 no‐Yokime, namadoda ase‐Kozeba, no‐Yohashe, no‐Sarafi, ababenobukosi e‐Mowabi, no‐Yashubi‐leheme: kodwa zezakudala izinto ezi." 
1Chronicles4:23 Aba bangababumbi, nabahlalayo pakati kwezityalwa nendonga: bahlala kona kunye nokumkani ngenxa yomsebenzi wake." 
1Chronicles4:24 ONYANA baka‐Simone: ngu‐Nemuweli, no‐Yamine, no‐Yaribe, n o‐Zera, n o‐Saule:" 
1Chronicles4:25 u‐Shalume ngunyana wake; u‐Mibisame ngunyana wake; u‐Mishema ngunyana wake. 
1Chronicles4:26 Nonyana baka‐Mishema: u‐Hamuweli ngunyana wake; u‐Zakure ngunyana wake; u‐Shimehi ngunyana wake. 
1Chronicles4:27 Kekaloku u‐Shimehi wabenonyana abalishumi linesitandatu, nentombi ezintandatu; kodwa abaninawe bake bebengenabantwana abaninzi; kanjalo sonke isizalwane sakowabo besingenakwanda njengokwosapo luka‐Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Bahlala e‐Beresheba, nase‐Molada, nase‐Hatsare‐shuhali," 
1Chronicles4:29 nase‐Bileha, nase‐Hetseme, nase‐Toladi," 
1Chronicles4:30 nase‐Betuweli, nase‐Horema, nase‐Tsikilage," 
1Chronicles4:31 nase‐Betemarakaboti, nase‐Hatsare‐susime, nase‐Bete‐biri, nase‐Sharayime: ezi bezizizixeko zabo kwada kwaba ngukumkani u‐Davide." 
1Chronicles4:32 Imizi yabo ibiyi‐Hetame, ne‐Hayine, n e‐Rimone, ne‐Tokene, ne‐Hashane, izixeko ezihlanu;" 
1Chronicles4:33 nayo yonke imizi yabo ebingqonga izixeko ezo kwada kwase‐Bali. Ezi zindawo zabo zokuhlala, nokuba̔lelwa kwabo ngokuzalwa." 
1Chronicles4:34 No‐Meshobabe, no‐Yamleki, no‐Yoshai unyana ka‐Amatsiya," 
1Chronicles4:35 no‐Joweli, no‐Jehu, unyana ka‐Yoshibiya, unyana ka‐Seraya, unyana ka‐Hasiyeli," 
1Chronicles4:36 no‐Eliwenai, no‐Yahakoba, no‐Yeshohaya, no‐Hasaya, no‐Hadiyeli, no‐Yesimile, no‐Benaya," 
1Chronicles4:37 no‐Ziza, unyana ka‐Shifi, unyana ka‐Alone, unyana ka‐Yedaya, unyana ka‐Shimri, unyana ka‐Shemaya:" 
1Chronicles4:38 aba ababaliweyo ngamagama bebezinkosi ezizalwaneni zabo; kanjalo indlu yoyise yabo yanda kakulu. 
1Chronicles4:39 Bahamba baya ngasekungenweni kwe‐Gedore, ngasempumalanga yesihlambo, ukuba bafunele izimvu zabo idlelo." 
1Chronicles4:40 Bafumana idlelo elityebileyo elihle, nelizwe elibanzi, elonwabileyo, elixolileyo: ngokuba abaka‐Hame bebemi kona ngapambili." 
1Chronicles4:41 Baye besiza aba ababa̔liweyo ngamagama emihleni ka‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, bacita intente zabo, nama‐Mahone abefunyanwa kona, babalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni kwada kwanamhla nje, bahlala ezikundleni zabo; ngokuba idlelo elilungele izimvu zabo beliko kona." 
1Chronicles4:42 Kwapuma kubo, kwa kubo abalusapo luka‐Simone, ukuya entabeni ye‐Sehire, amadoda amakulu mahlanu: u‐Pelatiya, no‐Nehariya, no‐Refaya, no‐Huziyeli, onyana baka‐Yishi, bebezintloko zawo." 
1Chronicles4:43 Aza abeta isisalela sabasindileyo pakati kwama‐Amaleki, ahlala kona kwada kwanamhla nje." 
1Chronicles5:1 KEKALOKU onyana baka‐Rubene owamazibulo ka‐Sirayeli: (ngokuba nguye obengowamazibulo; kodwa, ngokukuba wanco̔lisa isilili soyise, kwanikwa ubuzibulo bake konyana baka‐Josefe unyana ka‐Sirayeli; koko bekungaba̔lelwa njengobuzibulo;" 
1Chronicles5:2 ngokuba u‐Juda ebenguye omkulu pakati kwabazalwana bake, nokuvela kuye inkosi; kodwa ubuzibulo bebubobuka‐Josefe:)" 
1Chronicles5:3 onyana baka‐Rubene owamazibulo ka‐Sirayeli: ngu‐Hanoki, no‐Palu, n o‐Hetserone, no‐Kami." 
1Chronicles5:4 Onyana baka‐Joweli: u‐Shemaya ngunyana wake; u‐Goge ngunyana wake; u‐Shimehi ngunyana wake; 
1Chronicles5:5 u‐Mika ngunyana wake; u‐Raya ngunyana wake; u‐Bali ngunyana wake; 
1Chronicles5:6 u‐Bera ngunyana wake, owati u‐Tiligate‐pinesere ukumkani we‐Asiriya wamfudusa: nguye obeyinkosi yama‐Rubene." 
1Chronicles5:7 Nabazalwana bake, ngezizalwane zabo, nxa kwaba̔lelwayo ngokuzalwa kwabo, ngu‐Yeyeli oyintloko, no‐Zekariya," 
1Chronicles5:8 no‐Bela, unyana ka‐Azazi, unyana ka‐Shema, unyana ka‐Joweli, owahlala e‐Harohere, kwada kwase‐Nebo ne‐Bali‐mehone:" 
1Chronicles5:9 nangasempumalanga wahlala kwada kwasekungenweni kwentlango kuvela emlanjeni wom‐Ferate: ngokuba inkomo zabo bezandisiwe ezweni le‐Gileyadi. 
1Chronicles5:10 Nasemihleni ka‐Saule babesenza imfazwe nama‐Hagare, awa wona ngesandla sabo; baza bahlala ezintenteni zawo kulo lonke icala lasempumalanga le‐Gileyadi." 
1Chronicles5:11 Kekaloku onyana baka‐Gadi bahlala malungana nabo, elizweni le‐Bashane, kwada kwase‐Saleka:" 
1Chronicles5:12 u‐Joweli oyintloko, no‐Shafame owesibini, no‐Yahanai, no‐Shafate, e‐Bashane." 
1Chronicles5:13 Nabazalwana babo bendlu yoyise yabo, ngu‐Mikayeli, no‐Meshulame, no‐Sheba, no‐Yorai, no‐Yakane, no‐Ziha, no‐Hebere, abasixe̔nxe." 
1Chronicles5:14 Aba bangonyana baka‐Abihayili, unyana ka‐Huri, unyana ka‐Yaroha, unyana ka‐Gileyadi, unyana ka‐Mikayeli, unyana ka‐Yeshishai, unyana ka‐Yado, unyana ka‐Buze:" 
1Chronicles5:15 u‐Ahi, unyana ka‐Habideli, unyana ka‐Guni, ebeyintloko yendlu yoyise yabo." 
1Chronicles5:16 Bahlala e‐Gileyadi, e‐Bashane, nasemizini yayo, nakuzo zonke inqele zaseSharone, pezu kwemida yabo." 
1Chronicles5:17 Bonke aba baba̔lelwa ngokuzalwa kwabo emihleni ka‐Yotame ukumkani wo‐Juda, nasemihleni ka‐Jorobome ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles5:18 Onyana baka‐Rubene, nama‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, kuwo amadoda obuṙoti, amadoda epete ikaka nesiṙele, etyeda isipeta, eqelene nokulwa, ngamawaka angamashumi mane anesine, anamakulu asixe̔nxe, anamashumi matandatu, abepuma nomkosi." 
1Chronicles5:19 Basuka benza imfazwe nama‐Hagare, no‐Jeture, no‐Nafishe, no‐Nodabi." 
1Chronicles5:20 Baza bancedwa ngakubo, ada ama‐Hagare anikelwa esandleni sabo, nabo bonke abebenawo: ngokuba bakalayo kutixo ekulweni, waza wukungeleka kubo, ngenxa yokuba betembele kuye." 
1Chronicles5:21 Batimba nenkomo zabo; inkamela zabo ezingamawaka amashumi mahlanu, nezimvu ezingamawaka angamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu, namaqwaṙashe angamawaka mabini, neziqu zabantu ezingamawaka alikulu." 
1Chronicles5:22 Ngokuba bebesiwa abaninzi abahlatyiweyo, ivela kutixo nje imfazwe leyo. Baza bahlala ezikundleni zabo kwada kwabako imfuduswa." 
1Chronicles5:23 Kekaloku onyana besiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase bahlala elizweni: banda kwa se‐Bashane kwada kwase‐Bali‐heremone, nase‐Senire, nasentabeni ye‐Heremone." 
1Chronicles5:24 Aba bebezintloko zendlu zoyise zabo: u‐Heferi, no‐Yishi, no‐Eliyeli, no‐Zariyeli, no‐Jeremiya, no‐Hodaviya, no‐Yadiyeli, amadoda angamaṙoti akalipileyo, amadoda adumileyo, intloko zendlu zoyise zabo." 
1Chronicles5:25 Kanti bagqita ngakuye utixo woyise babo, baṙexezela emva kwotixo babantu belozwe, owabete utixo wabatshabalalisa kwa pambi kwabo." 
1Chronicles5:26 Waza utixo wo‐Sirayeli wawuvusa umoya ka‐Pule ukumkani we‐Asiriya, nomoya ka‐Tiligate‐pinesere ukumkani we‐Asiriya, owabafudusayo, kwa ama‐Rubene, nama‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, wabazisa e‐Halahi, nase‐Habore, nase‐Hara, nasemlanjeni we‐Gozane, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
1Chronicles6:1 ONYANA baka‐Levi: ngu‐Gereshone, n o‐Kohati, no‐Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Nonyana baka‐Kohati: ngu‐Hamerame, n o‐Yitsare, no‐Hebrone, no‐Huziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:3 Nabantwana baka‐Hamerame: ngu‐Arone, no‐Mosesi, no‐Miriyame. Nonyana baka‐Arone: ngu‐Nadabi, no‐Abihu, n o‐Elezari, no‐Yitamare." 
1Chronicles6:4 Wati u‐Elezari wazala u‐Finehasi; u‐Finehasi wazala u‐Abishuha," 
1Chronicles6:5 no‐Abishuha wazala u‐Buki, no‐Buki wazala u‐Huzi," 
1Chronicles6:6 no‐Huzi wazala u‐Zerahiya, no‐Zerahiya wazala u‐Merayoti;" 
1Chronicles6:7 u‐Merayoti wazala u‐Amariya, no‐Amariya wazala u‐Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:8 no‐Ahitube wazala u‐Tsadoki, no‐Tsadoki wazala u‐Himahatse," 
1Chronicles6:9 no‐Himahatse wazala u‐Hazariya, no‐Hazariya wazala u‐Johanane," 
1Chronicles6:10 no‐Johanane wazala u‐Hazariya, (nguye lo owapata ubuperisite endlwini abeyakile u‐Solomone e‐Yerusaleme,)" 
1Chronicles6:11 no‐Hazariya wazala u‐Amariya, no‐Amariya wazala u‐Ahitube," 
1Chronicles6:12 no‐Ahitube wazala u‐Tsadoki, no‐Tsadoki wazala u‐Shalume," 
1Chronicles6:13 no‐Shalume wazala u‐Hilikiya, no‐Hilikiya wazala u‐Hazariya," 
1Chronicles6:14 no‐Hazariya wazala u‐Seraya, no‐Seraya wazala u‐Yehotsadaki," 
1Chronicles6:15 no‐Yehotsadaki wemka nabatinjwa, xeshekweni uyehova wafudusayo o‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme ngesandla sika‐Nebukanetsare." 
1Chronicles6:16 Onyana baka‐Levi: ngu‐Gereshome, n o‐Kohati, no‐Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Amagama onyana baka‐Gereshome ngala: ngu‐Libeni, no‐Shimehi." 
1Chronicles6:18 Nonyana baka‐Kohati: ngu‐Hamerame, no‐Yitsare, no‐Hebrone, no‐Huziyeli." 
1Chronicles6:19 Onyana baka‐Merari: ngu‐Mahali, no‐Mushi. Ezi zizizalwane zaba‐Levi, ngoyise babo." 
1Chronicles6:20 Esika‐Gereshome: u‐Libeni ebengunyana wake; u‐Yahati ebengunyana wake; u‐Zima ebengunyana wake; 
1Chronicles6:21 u‐Jowahi ebengunyana wake; u‐Hido ebengunyana wake; u‐Zera ebengunyana wake; u‐Yaterai ebengunyana wake. 
1Chronicles6:22 Onyana baka‐Kohati: u‐Haminadabi ebengunyana wake; u‐Kora ebengunyana wake; u‐Asire ebengunyana wake; 
1Chronicles6:23 u‐Lekana ebengunyana wake; no‐Abiyasafa ebengunyana wake; no‐Asire ebengunyana wake; 
1Chronicles6:24 u‐Tahati ebengunyana wake; u‐Wuriyeli ebengunyana wake; u‐Huziya ebengunyana wake; no‐Saule ebengunyana wake. 
1Chronicles6:25 Nonyana baka‐Lekana: ngu‐Hamasai, no‐Ahimote." 
1Chronicles6:26 Kekaloku u‐Lekana: onyana baka‐Lekana bebengaba: u‐Tsofai ebengunyana wake; no‐Nahate ebengunyana wake; 
1Chronicles6:27 u‐Eliyabe ebengunyana wake; u‐Yerohame ebengunyana wake; u‐Lekana ebengunyana wake. 
1Chronicles6:28 Nonyana baka‐Samyali: ngu‐Vashini owamazibulo, no‐Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:29 Onyana baka‐Merari: ngu‐Mahali; u‐Libeni ebengunyana wake; u‐Shimehi ebengunyana wake; u‐Huza ebengunyana wake; 
1Chronicles6:30 u‐Shimehi ebengunyana wake: u‐Hagiya ebengunyana wake; u‐Hasaya ebengunyana wake. 
1Chronicles6:31 NGABA owati u‐Davide wabamisa pezu kwenkonzo yokucula endlwini kayehova, emvenikweni ibinendawo yokupumla ityeya." 
1Chronicles6:32 Baye bekonza pambi kwentlalo yayo intente yentlangano ngokucula, wada u‐Solomone wayaka indlu kayehova e‐Yerusaleme: bandula bema kona enkonzweni yabo njengesiko labo." 
1Chronicles6:33 Aba bangabemayo kona nonyana babo. Kubo onyana bama‐Kohati: u‐Hemani umculi, unyana ka‐Joweli, unyana ka‐Samyali," 
1Chronicles6:34 unyana ka‐Lekana, unyana ka‐Yerohame, unyana ka‐Eliyeli, unyana ka‐Toha," 
1Chronicles6:35 unyana ka‐Tsufi, unyana ka‐Lekana, unyana ka‐Mahate, unyana ka‐Hamasai," 
1Chronicles6:36 unyana ka‐Lekana, unyana ka‐Joweli, unyana ka‐Hazariya, unyana ka‐Tsefaniya," 
1Chronicles6:37 unyana ka‐Tahati, unyana ka‐Asire, unyana ka‐Abiyasafa, unyana ka‐Kora," 
1Chronicles6:38 unyana ka‐Yitsare, unyana ka‐Kohati, unyana ka‐Levi, unyana ka‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles6:39 Nomzalwana wake u‐Safa, owema ngasekunene kwake: u‐Safa, unyana ka‐Berakiya, unyana ka‐Shimeha," 
1Chronicles6:40 unyana ka‐Mikaheli, unyana ka‐Bahaseya, unyana ka‐Malekiya," 
1Chronicles6:41 unyana ka‐Eteni, unyana ka‐Zera, unyana ka‐Hadaya," 
1Chronicles6:42 unyana ka‐Etane, unyana ka‐Zima, unyana ka‐Shimehi," 
1Chronicles6:43 unyana ka‐Yahati, unyana ka‐Gereshome, unyana ka‐Levi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Nabazalwana babo, onyana baka‐Merari, abema ngasekohlo: u‐Etane, unyana ka‐Kishi, unyana ka‐Habedi, unyana ka‐Maluke," 
1Chronicles6:45 unyana ka‐Hashabiya, unyana ka‐Amatsiya, unyana ka‐Hilikiya," 
1Chronicles6:46 unyana ka‐Ametsi, unyana ka‐Bani, unyana ka‐Shemere," 
1Chronicles6:47 unyana ka‐Mahali, unyana ka‐Mushi, unyana ka‐Merari, unyana ka‐Levi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Kanjalo abazalwana babo, aba‐Levi, bamiselwa yonke inkonzo yetabanakele yendlu katixo." 
1Chronicles6:49 KEKALOKU u‐Arone nonyana bake baqumisa pezu kwesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa, napezu kwesibingelo sesiqumiso, bemis elwe wonke umsebenzi w endawo eyingcwele yezingcwele, nokwenzela o‐Sirayeli uxoliso, njengako konke abeyalele ngako u‐Mosesi isicaka sikatixo." 
1Chronicles6:50 Aba bangonyana baka‐Arone: u‐Elezari ebengunyana wake; u‐Finehasi ebengunyana wake; u‐Abishuha ebengunyana wake; 
1Chronicles6:51 u‐Buki ebengunyana wake; u‐Huzi ebengunyana wake; u‐Zerahiya ebengunyana wake; 
1Chronicles6:52 u‐Merayoti ebengunyana wake; u‐Amariya ebengunyana wake; u‐Ahitube ebengunyana wake; 
1Chronicles6:53 u‐Tsadoki ebengunyana wake; u‐Himahatse ebengunyana wake. 
1Chronicles6:54 Ezi ke zindawo zabo zokuhlala ngelali zabo, emideni yabo, ezonyana baka‐Arone, ezezizalwane zama‐Kohati: ngokuba iqashiso lokuqala belilelawo." 
1Chronicles6:55 Kwaye kunikwa kuwo i‐Hebrone, elizweni lakwa‐Juda, nenqele zayo ezingqongayo." 
1Chronicles6:56 Kodwa kwanikwa izindle zasesixekweni, nemizi yaso, ku‐Kalebi unyana ka‐Jefune." 
1Chronicles6:57 Kwaza kwanikwa onyana baka‐Arone izixeko zakwa‐Juda; i‐Hebrone, isixeko sokupepela, ne‐Libena nenqele zayo, ne‐Yatire, ne‐Shetemoha nenqele zayo," 
1Chronicles6:58 ne‐Hilene nenqele zayo, ne‐Debire nenqele zayo," 
1Chronicles6:59 ne‐Hashane, nenqele zayo, ne‐Bete‐shemeshe nenqele zayo:" 
1Chronicles6:60 nakuso isizwe sika‐Benjamine kwacatshulwa i‐Geba nenqele zayo, ne‐Halemete nenqele zayo, ne‐Hanatote nenqele zayo. Zonke izixeko zabo, ngezizalwane zabo, zizixeko ezilishumi linazitatu." 
1Chronicles6:61 Kodwa onyana baka‐Kohati, abo baseleyo kwisizalwane sesosizwe, kwacatshul elwa bona esiqingateni sesizwe, kwa esiqingateni sesizwe sika‐Manase, ngeqashiso, izixeko ezilishumi." 
1Chronicles6:62 Nonyana baka‐Gereshome, ngezizalwane zabo, kwacatshul elwa bona esizweni sika‐Yisakare, nasesizweni sika‐Ashere, nasesizweni sika‐Nefatali, nasesizweni sika‐Manase e‐Bashane, izixeko ezilishumi linazitatu." 
1Chronicles6:63 Onyana baka‐Merari kwacatshule lwa bona ngeqashiso, ngezizalwane zabo, esizweni sika‐Rubene, nasesizweni sika‐Gadi, nasesizweni sika‐Zebulone, izixeko ezilishumi linazibini." 
1Chronicles6:64 Kwa njalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabanika aba‐Levi izixeko ezo nenqele zazo. 
1Chronicles6:65 Lwabanika ngeqashiso, zicatshulwe esizweni sosapo luka‐Juda, nasesizweni sosapo luka‐Simone, nasesizweni sosapo luka‐Benjamine, ezizixeko, ezona zibiziweyo ngamagama." 
1Chronicles6:66 N abaseleyo ezizalwaneni zonyana baka‐Kohati, babenezixeko zasemideni yabo zicatshulwe esizweni sika‐Frayime." 
1Chronicles6:67 Baye bebanika, kuzo izixeko zokupepela, i‐Shekeme nenqele zayo, entabeni yakwa‐Frayime; ne‐Gezere nenqele zayo," 
1Chronicles6:68 ne‐Yokemame nenqele zayo, ne‐Bete‐horone nenqele zayo," 
1Chronicles6:69 ne‐Ajalone nenqele zayo, ne‐Gate‐rimone nenqele zayo:" 
1Chronicles6:70 kwacatshulwa nakuso isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, i‐Hanere nenqele zayo, ne‐Bilehame nenqele zayo, zibe zezesizalwane sonyana baka‐Kohati abaseleyo." 
1Chronicles6:71 Onyana baka‐Gereshome kwacatshul elwa bona esizalwaneni sesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, i‐Golane yase‐Bashane nenqele zayo, ne‐Hashetarote nenqele zayo;" 
1Chronicles6:72 nasesizweni sika‐Yisakare, i‐Kedeshe nenqele zayo, i‐Daberate nenqele zayo," 
1Chronicles6:73 ne‐Ramote nenqele zayo, ne‐Haneme nenqele zayo;" 
1Chronicles6:74 nasesizweni sika‐Ashere, i‐Mashali nenqele zayo, ne‐Habedoni nenqele zayo," 
1Chronicles6:75 ne‐Hukoke nenqele zayo, ne‐Rehobi nenqele zayo;" 
1Chronicles6:76 nasesizweni sika‐Nefatali, i‐Kedeshe yase‐Galili nenqele zayo, ne‐Hamone nenqele zayo, ne‐Kiriyatayime nenqele zayo." 
1Chronicles6:77 Nonyana baka‐Merari abaseleyo kwacatshul elwa bona esizweni sika‐Zebulone, i‐Rimone nenqele zayo, i‐Tabore nenqele zayo:" 
1Chronicles6:78 napesheya kwe‐Yoredane ngase‐Jeriko, ngecala lasempumalanga le‐Yoredane, kwacatshulwa esizweni sika‐Rubene, i‐Betsere yasentlango nenqele zayo, ne‐Yahetsa nenqele zayo," 
1Chronicles6:79 ne‐Kedemote nenqele zayo, ne‐Mefahate nenqele zayo;" 
1Chronicles6:80 nasesizweni sika‐Gadi, i‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi nenqele zayo, ne‐Mahanayime nenqele zayo," 
1Chronicles6:81 ne‐Heshebone nenqele zayo, ne‐Yahezere nenqele zayo." 
1Chronicles7:1 KEKALOKU onyana baka‐Yisakare: ngu‐Tola, no‐Puwa, n o‐Yashube, no‐Shimrone, abane." 
1Chronicles7:2 Nonyana baka‐Tola: ngu‐Huzi, no‐Refaya, no‐Jeriyeli, no‐Jamai, no‐Yibesame, no‐Shemuweli, intloko zendlu yoyise yabo, zeka‐Tola: bebengamaṙoti akalipileyo ezizukulwaneni zabo: bebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anesibini, anamakulu matandatu, inani labo emihleni ka‐Davide." 
1Chronicles7:3 Nonyana baka‐Huzi; ngu‐Yizeraya: nonyana baka‐Yizeraya: ngu‐Mikaheli, no‐Hobadiya, no‐Joweli, n o‐Yishiya, abahlanu, bezintloko bonke." 
1Chronicles7:4 Kanjako kunye nabo, ngezizukulwana zabo, ngendlu zoyise zabo, bekuko amabandla omkosi wokulwa, amadoda angamawaka angamashumi matatu anesitandatu: ngokuba bebenabo abafazi nabantwana abaninzi." 
1Chronicles7:5 Nabazalwana babo, kuzo zonke izizalwane zika‐Yisakare, amaṙoti akalipileyo, bebengamawaka angamashumi asibozo enesixe̔nxe ukuba̔lelwa kwabo bonke." 
1Chronicles7:6 Onyana baka‐Benjamine: ngu‐Bela, no‐Bekere, no‐Yedaheli, abatatu." 
1Chronicles7:7 Nonyana baka‐Bela: ngu‐Tseboni, no‐Huzi, no‐Huziyeli, no‐Jerimote, no‐Hiri, abahlanu, intloko zendlu zoyise, amaṙoti akalipileyo; nokuba̔lelwa kwabo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anesibini, anamashumi matatu anesine." 
1Chronicles7:8 Nonyana baka‐Bekere: ngu‐Zemira, no‐Yohashe, no‐Eliyezeri, no‐Eliwenai, no‐Omri, no‐Jeremote, no‐Abiya, no‐Hanatote, no‐Halamete: bonke aba bebengonyana baka‐Bekere." 
1Chronicles7:9 Nokuba̔lelwa kwabo, ngezizukulwana zabo, intloko zendlu zoyise zabo, amaṙoti akalipileyo, bebengamawaka angamashumi mabini, anamakulu ekwa mabini." 
1Chronicles7:10 Nonyana baka‐Yedaheli: ngu‐Bilehane; nonyana baka‐Bilehane: ngu‐Yehushe, no‐Benjamine, no‐Ehudi, no‐Kenana, no‐Zetane, no‐Tareshishe, no‐Ahishahare:" 
1Chronicles7:11 bonke aba bebengonyana baka‐Yedaheli, intloko zendlu zoyise, amaṙoti akalipileyo, bengamawaka alishumi linesixe̔nxe, anamakulu mabini, abapuma nomkosi ekulweni." 
1Chronicles7:12 Kanjalo u‐Shupime no‐Hupime, onyana baka‐Hire; u‐Hushime, onyana baka‐Ahere." 
1Chronicles7:13 Onyana baka‐Nefatali: ngu‐Yatsiyeli, no‐Guni, no‐Yetsere, no‐Shalume, onyana baka‐Bileha." 
1Chronicles7:14 Onyana baka‐Manase: ngu‐Asiriyeli, owati umfazi wamzala; (kodwa ishweshwe lake, um‐Siriyakazi, lamzala u‐Makire uyise ka‐Gileyadi;" 
1Chronicles7:15 no‐Makire wamzeka udade ka‐Hupime no‐Shupime abe ngumfazi, ogama lingu‐Mahaka;) negama lowesibini belingu‐Tselofehadi: kekaloku u‐Tselofehadi ebenazo intombi." 
1Chronicles7:16 Wati u‐Mahaka umfazi ka‐Makire wazala unyana, wambiza ngegama elingu‐Pereshe; negama lomninawe wake belingu‐Shereshe; nonyana bake bebengu‐Wulame no‐Rakeme." 
1Chronicles7:17 Nonyana baka‐Wulame: ngu‐Bedane. Aba ke bangonyana baka‐Gileyadi, unyana ka‐Makire, unyana ka‐Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Nodade wake, u‐Hamolekete, wamzala u‐Yishehodi, no‐Abihezere, no‐Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Kanjalo onyana baka‐Shemida bebe ngaba; u‐Ahiyane, no‐Shekeme, no‐Likehi, no‐Anihame." 
1Chronicles7:20 Nonyana baka‐Frayime: ngu‐Shutela, no‐Beredi unyana wake, no‐Tahate unyana wake, no‐Elehada unyana wake, no‐Tahate unyana wake," 
1Chronicles7:21 no‐Zabadi unyana wake, no‐Shutela unyana wake, no‐Hezere, no‐Elehadi. Kekaloku amadoda ase‐Gate, abezelwe elizweni elo, ababulala, ngokuba bebehlile ukuza kutimba inkomo zawo." 
1Chronicles7:22 Waza u‐Frayime uyise wabo walila imihla yamininzi; bati abazalwana bake beza ukumku̔za. 
1Chronicles7:23 Wada wangena kumfazi wake, owakaulayo, wazala unyana, waza wambiza ngegama elingu‐Beriha, ngokuba ilishwa belihlile indlu yake." 
1Chronicles7:24 (Kanjalo intombi yake ibingu‐Shera, owaka i‐Bete‐horone yasezantsi, neyasentla, ne‐Uzene‐shera)." 
1Chronicles7:25 U‐Refa ebengunyana wake; no‐Reshefe; no‐Tela ebengunyana wake; no‐Tahane ebengunyana wake; 
1Chronicles7:26 u Lahadane ebengunyana wake; u‐Hamihude ebengunyana wake; u‐Elishama ebengunyana wake: 
1Chronicles7:27 u‐Nune ebengunyana wake; u‐Yoshuwa ebengunyana wake. 
1Chronicles7:28 Kekaloku imfuyo zabo nendawo zabo zokuhlala zizezi: i‐Betele namagxamesi ayo; nangasempumalanga, i‐Naharane; nangasentshonalanga, i‐Gezere namagxamesi ayo; kwa ne‐Shekeme namagxamesi ayo, kwada kwase‐Gaza namagxamesi ayo;" 
1Chronicles7:29 nangasemideni yosapo luka‐Manase, i‐Bete shane namagxamesi ayo: i‐Tahanaki namagxamesi ayo; i‐Megido namagxamesi ayo; i‐Dore namagxamesi ayo. Kuzo ezi ndawo lwahlala usapo luka‐Josefe unyana ka‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles7:30 Onyana baka‐Ashere: ngu‐Yimna, no‐Yisheva, no‐Yishevi, no‐Beriha, no‐Sera udade wabo." 
1Chronicles7:31 Nonyana baka‐Beriha: ngu‐Kebere, no‐Makiyeli, onguye uyise ka‐Birezaviti." 
1Chronicles7:32 Waye u‐Kebere wazala u‐Yafelete, no‐Shomere, no‐Hotame, no‐Shuha udade wabo." 
1Chronicles7:33 Nonyana baka‐Yafelete: ngu‐Pasaki, no‐Bimehali, no‐Hashevate: aba bangonyana baka‐Yafelete." 
1Chronicles7:34 Nonyana baka‐Shemere: ngu‐Ahi, no‐Roga, n o‐Yehuba, no‐Arame." 
1Chronicles7:35 Nonyana baka‐Heleme umninawe wake: ngu‐Tsofa, no‐Yimna, no‐Sheleshe, no‐Hamali." 
1Chronicles7:36 Onyana baka‐Tsofa: ngu‐Suha, no‐Hanafere, no‐Shuhali, no‐Beri, no‐Yimra," 
1Chronicles7:37 no‐Betsere, no‐Hodi, no‐Shama, no‐Shilisha, no‐Yiterane, no‐Bera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Nonyana baka‐Yetere: ngu‐Jefune, no‐Pisepa, no‐Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Nonyana baka‐Hula: ngu‐Arahi, no‐Haniyeli, no‐Retsiya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Bonke aba bebengonyana baka‐Ashere, intloko zendlu zoyise, abaketiweyo, amaṙoti akalipileyo, inkosi ezinkulu: nokuba̔lelwa kwabo bapumayo nomkosi ekulweni, bebengamadoda angamawaka amashumi mabini anesitandatu inani labo." 
1Chronicles8:1 KEKALOKU u‐Benjamine wazala u‐Bela owamazibulo wake, u‐Ashebele owesibini, no‐Ahara owesitatu," 
1Chronicles8:2 u‐Noha owesine, no‐Rafa owesihlanu." 
1Chronicles8:3 Nonyana baka‐Bela bebe ngaba: u‐Adari, no‐Gera, no‐Abihude," 
1Chronicles8:4 no‐Abishuha, no‐Nahamane, no‐Ahoha," 
1Chronicles8:5 no‐Gera, no‐Shefufane, no‐Hurame." 
1Chronicles8:6 Naba bangonyana baka‐Ehudi: aba bazintloko zendlu zoyise zabemi base‐Geba, ababefuduselwa e‐Manahate:" 
1Chronicles8:7 kwa u‐Nahamane, no‐Ahiya, no‐Gera, wabafudusa yena; waza wazala u‐Huza, no‐Ahihude." 
1Chronicles8:8 Kanjalo u‐Shaharayime wazala abantwana elizweni le‐Mowabi, emvenikweni abebandulule, ngo‐Hushime no‐Bahara abafazi bake." 
1Chronicles8:9 Wayezala ngo‐Hodeshe umfazi wake, u‐Jobabe, no‐Tsibiya, no‐Mesha, no‐Malekame," 
1Chronicles8:9 Wayezala ngo‐Hodeshe umfazi wake, u‐Jobabe, no‐Tsibiya, no‐Mesha, no‐Malekame," 
1Chronicles8:10 no‐Yehutse, no‐Shakiya, no‐Mirema: aba bebengonyana bake, intloko zendlu zoyise." 
1Chronicles8:11 Nango‐Hushime wazala u‐Abitube, no‐Lepali." 
1Chronicles8:12 Onyana baka‐Lepali: ngu‐Hebere, no‐Mishame, no‐Shamedi, owakayo i‐Ono, ne‐Lodi namagxamesi ayo;" 
1Chronicles8:13 kwa no‐Beriha, no‐Shema, abebezintloko zendlu zoyise zabemi base‐Ajalone, abagxotayo abemi base‐Gate." 
1Chronicles8:14 Kanjako u‐Ahiyo, u‐Shashaki, no‐Jeremote," 
1Chronicles8:15 no‐Zebadiya, no‐Haradi, no‐Hadere," 
1Chronicles8:16 no‐Mikaheli, no‐Yisepa, no‐Yoha, bebengonyana baka‐Beriha:" 
1Chronicles8:17 u‐Zebadiya, no‐Meshulame, no‐Hezeki, no‐Hebere," 
1Chronicles8:18 no‐Shimerai, no‐Yezeliya, no‐Jobabe, bebengonyana baka‐Lepali:" 
1Chronicles8:18 no‐Shimerai, no‐Yezeliya, no‐Jobabe, bebengonyana baka‐Lepali:" 
1Chronicles8:19 u‐Yakime, no‐Zikeri, no‐Zabedi," 
1Chronicles8:20 no‐Elihenai, no‐Tsiletai, no‐Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:21 no‐Hadaya, no‐Beraya, no‐Shimrate, bebengonyana baka‐Shimehi:" 
1Chronicles8:22 u‐Shipane, no‐Hebere, no‐Eliyeli," 
1Chronicles8:23 no‐Habedoni, no‐Zikeri, no‐Hanane," 
1Chronicles8:24 no‐Hananiya, no‐Helami, no‐Hanatotiya," 
1Chronicles8:25 no‐Fideya, no‐Penuweli, bebengonyana baka‐Shashaki:" 
1Chronicles8:26 u‐Shamsherai, no‐Shehariya, no‐Hataliya," 
1Chronicles8:27 no‐Yareshiya, no‐Eliya, no‐Zikeri, bebengonyana baka‐Yerohame." 
1Chronicles8:28 Aba bebezintloko zendlu zoyise, ngezizukulwana zabo, inkosi. Aba bahlala e‐Yerusaleme." 
1Chronicles8:29 Nase‐Gibeyone wahlala uyise we‐Gibeyone: igama lomfazi wake lalingu‐Mahaka: 
1Chronicles8:30 nonyana wake wamazibulo, ngu‐Habedoni; n abanye, ngu‐Tsure, no‐Kishe, no‐Bali, no‐Nadabi," 
1Chronicles8:31 no‐Gedore, no‐Ahiyo, no‐Zakere." 
1Chronicles8:32 Waye u‐Mikelote wazala u‐Shimeha. Bati ke naba bahlala nabazalwana babo e‐Yerusaleme, malungana nabazalwana babo." 
1Chronicles8:33 Kekaloku u‐Nere wazala u‐Kishe; no‐Kishe wazala u‐Saule; no‐Saule wazala u‐Jonatane, no‐Maleki‐shuha, no‐Abinadabi, no‐Shebali." 
1Chronicles8:34 Nonyana ka‐Jonatane ebengu‐Meribi‐bali; waza u‐Meribi‐bali wazala u‐Mika: 
1Chronicles8:35 nonyana baka‐Mika bebengaba: u‐Pitone, no‐Meleke, no‐Tareha, no‐Ahazi." 
1Chronicles8:36 Waye u‐Ahazi wazala u‐Yohada; no‐Yohada wazala u‐Halemete, no‐Hazamaveti, no‐Zimri; wati u‐Zimri wazala u‐Motsa;" 
1Chronicles8:37 no‐Motsa wazala u‐Bineha; u‐Rafa ebengunyana wake; u‐Elehasa ebengunyana wake; u‐Atsele ebengunyana wake. 
1Chronicles8:38 Kekaloku u‐Atsele ebenonyana batandatu, abamagama angala: u‐Zarikame, u‐Bokeru, no‐Shimayeli, no‐Shehariya, no‐Hobadiya, no‐Hanane: bonke aba bangonyana baka‐Atsele." 
1Chronicles8:39 Nonyana baka‐Hesheki umninawe wake, ngu‐Wulame owamazibulo wake, no‐Yehushe owesibini, no‐Elifelete owesitatu." 
1Chronicles8:40 Baye onyana baka‐Wulame bebengamadoda angamaṙoti akalipileyo, abatyeda isipeta; bebenabo onyana abaninzi, nonyana bonyana, ikulu linamashumi mahlanu. Bonke aba bangabonyana baka‐Benjamine." 
1Chronicles9:1 Kwa njalo o‐Sirayeli bonke baba̔lelwa ngokuzalwa: bona ke, baba̔lwa encwadini yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli no‐Juda, ababefuduselwa e‐Babilone ngenxa yokugqita kwabo." 
1Chronicles9:2 KEKALOKU abemi bokuqala, abo bezayo ezimfuyweni zabo, ezixekweni zakowabo, bebengaba‐Sirayeli, abaperisite, aba‐Levi, naba‐Netini." 
1Chronicles9:3 Nase‐Yerusaleme bahlala abosapo luka‐Juda, nabosapo luka‐Benjamine, nabosapo luka‐Frayime no‐Manase." 
1Chronicles9:4 Ngu‐Hutai, unyana ka‐Hamihude, unyana ka‐Omri, unyana ka‐Yimri, unyana ka‐Bani, kulo usapo luka‐Faretse unyana ka‐Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Nakuwo ama‐Shilo: ngu‐Hasaya owamazibulo, nonyana bake." 
1Chronicles9:6 Nakonyana baka‐Zera: ngu‐Yeyuli, nabazalwana babo, amakulu matandatu anamashumi asitoba." 
1Chronicles9:7 Nakubo onyana baka‐Benjamine: ngu‐Salu, unyana ka‐Meshulame, unyana ka‐Hodaviya, unyana ka‐Hasenuwa;" 
1Chronicles9:8 no‐Bineya, unyana ka‐Yerohame; no‐Ela, unyana ka‐Huzi, unyana ka‐Mikeri; no‐Meshulame, unyana ka‐Shefatiya, unyana ka‐Rehule, unyana ka‐Biniya;" 
1Chronicles9:9 nabazalwana babo, ngezizukulwana zabo, amakulu alitoba anamashumi mahlanu anesitandatu. Lamadoda onke ebezintloko zendlu zoyise kwindlu zoyise zawo." 
1Chronicles9:10 Nakubo abaperisite: ngu‐Yedaya, no‐Yoyaribe, no‐Yakine," 
1Chronicles9:11 no‐Hazariya, unyana ka‐Hilikiya, unyana ka‐Meshulame, unyana ka‐Tsadoki, unyana ka‐Merayoti, unyana ka‐Ahitube, umpati wendlu katixo;" 
1Chronicles9:12 no‐Hadaya, unyana ka‐Yerohame, unyana ka‐Pashure, unyana ka‐Malekiya; no‐Mahasai, unyana ka‐Hadiyeli, unyana ka‐Yazera, unyana ka‐Meshulame, unyana ka‐Meshilemiti, unyana ka‐Yimeri;" 
1Chronicles9:13 nabazalwana babo, intloko zendlu zoyise zabo, iwaka linye elinamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi matandatu; amadoda akalipileyo emsebenzini wenkonzo yayo indlu katixo." 
1Chronicles9:14 Nakubo aba‐Levi: ngu‐Shemaya, unyana ka‐Hashube, unyana ka‐Zarikame, unyana ka‐Hashabiya, kubo onyana baka‐Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 no‐Bakebakari, no‐ Hereshe, no‐Galali, no‐Mataniya, unyana ka‐Mika, unyana ka‐Zikeri, unyana ka‐Safa;" 
1Chronicles9:16 no‐Hobadiya, unyana ka‐Shemaya, unyana ka‐Galali, unyana ka‐Jedutune; no‐Berekiya, unyana ka‐Asa, unyana ka‐Lekana, owahlala emizini yama‐Netofati." 
1Chronicles9:17 Nabalindimnyango; ngu‐Shalume, no‐Hakube, no‐Talimone, no‐Ahimane, nabazalwana babo: u‐Shalume ebenguye omkulu." 
1Chronicles9:18 Kwada kwakaloku, esangweni lokumkani ngasempumalanga, aba bebengabalindimnyango emikosini yosapo luka‐Levi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Kanjalo u‐Shalume, unyana ka‐Kore, unyana ka‐Abiyasafa, unyana ka‐Kora, nabazalwana bake bendlu kayise, ama‐Kora, bebepezu kwomsebenzi benkonzo, bengabagcini beminyango yetabanakele: njengokuba oyise babo bebepezu kwomnquba kayehova, bengabagcini bendawo yokungena," 
1Chronicles9:20 akuba u‐Finehasi unyana ka‐Elezari ebeyinkosi pezu kwabo ngapambili, uyehova enaye." 
1Chronicles9:21 U‐Zekariya, unyana ka‐Meshelemiya, ebengumlindimnyango elucangweni lwentente yentlangano." 
1Chronicles9:22 Bonke abo baketwayo babe ngabalindi eminyangweni, bebengamakulu mabini aneshumi linesibini. Aba baba̔lelwa ngemizi yabo, owati u‐Davide, no‐Samyali umboni, wabamisa ebusebenzini babo." 
1Chronicles9:23 Baye bona nonyana babo bebepezu kwamasango ayo indlu kayehova, indlu yentente, ngemivaṙasho." 
1Chronicles9:24 Ngasemacaleni omane bebeko abalindimnyango abo, ngasempumalanga, ngasentshonalanga, ngasenode, nangasesuyide." 
1Chronicles9:25 Nabazalwana babo, ababe‐ semizini yabo, bamiselwa ukuza emva kwemihla esixe̔nxe, ngamaxesha ngamaxesha, babe nabo ekukonzeni." 
1Chronicles9:26 Ngokuba ebusebenzini obo bebengabane abalindimnyango abakulu, abebengaba‐Levi; bona bapezu kwenkambili napezu kwendyebo zendlu katixo." 
1Chronicles9:27 Baye belalisa ngokungqonga indlu katixo, ngokuba bekugcinwa ngabo, bekukokwabo nokuvula ngemiso ngemiso." 
1Chronicles9:28 Bati inxenye yabo bapezu kwezinto zenkonzo, ukuba bazingenise ngenani, nokuba bazipumise ngenani kanjako." 
1Chronicles9:29 Nenxenye yabo bamiswa pezu kwempahla, kwa pezu kwempahla zonke zeyingcwele indawo, napezu kwomgubo ocolekileyo, neveyine, neoli, nentlakamhlope, nezimnandi." 
1Chronicles9:30 Nakonyana babaperisite abanye bamanya amafuta ezimnandi. 
1Chronicles9:31 No‐Matitiya, owakubo aba‐Levi, obengowamazibulo ka‐Shalume um‐Kora, ebesebusebenzini pezu kwomsebenzi wezinto ezojiweyo." 
1Chronicles9:32 Nakonyana bama‐Kohati, kubo abazalwana babo, abanye babepezu kwezonka zokuṙozwa, ukuba zilungiswe ngesabata ngesabata." 
1Chronicles9:33 Nakubo aba abanye bebengabaculi, intloko zendlu zoyise pakati kwaba‐Levi, ezinkambilini, bekululekile; ngokuba bebebangwa ngumsebenzi lowo, imini nobusuku." 
1Chronicles9:34 Aba bebezintloko zendlu zoyise pakati kwaba‐Levi, ngezizukulwana zabo, inkosi. Aba bahlala e‐Yerusaleme." 
1Chronicles9:35 NASE‐GIBEYONE wahlala uyise we‐Gibeyone, u‐Yeyeli: igama lomfazi wake lalingu‐Mahaka:" 
1Chronicles9:36 nonyana wake wamazibulo, ngu‐Habedoni; n abanye, ngu‐Tsure, no‐Kishe, no‐Bali, no‐Nere, no‐Nadabi," 
1Chronicles9:37 no‐Gedore, no‐Ahiyo, no‐Zekariya, no‐Mikelote." 
1Chronicles9:38 Waye u‐Mikelote wazala u‐Shimame. Bati ke naba bahlala nabazalwana babo e‐Yerusaleme, malungana nabazalwana babo." 
1Chronicles9:39 Kekaloku u‐Nere wazala u‐Kishe; no‐Kishe wazala u‐Saule: no‐Saule wazala u‐Jonatane, no‐Maleki‐shuha, no‐Abinadabi, no‐Shebali." 
1Chronicles9:40 Nonyana ka‐Jonatane ebengu‐Meribi‐bali; waza u‐Meribi‐bali wazala u‐Mika: 
1Chronicles9:41 nonyana baka‐Mika bebengaba: u‐Pitone, no‐Meleke, no‐Tareha." 
1Chronicles9:42 Waye u‐Ahazi wazala u‐Yara; no‐Yara wazala u‐Halemete, no‐Hazamaveti, no‐Zimri; wati u‐Zimri wazala u‐Motsa;" 
1Chronicles9:43 no‐Motsa wazala u‐Bineha: u‐Refaya ebengunyana wake; u‐Elehasa ebengunyana wake; u‐Atsele ebengunyana wake. 
1Chronicles9:44 Kekaloku u‐Atsele ebenonyana batandatu, abamagama angala: u‐Zarikame, u‐Bokeru, no‐Shimayeli, no‐Shehariya, no‐Hobadiya, no‐Hanane. Aba bangonyana baka‐Atsele." 
1Chronicles10:1 KEKALOKU ama‐Filistiya alwa no‐Sirayeli; aza amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli esaba pambi kwama‐Filistiya, awa ehlatyiwe entabeni ye‐Giliboha." 
1Chronicles10:2 Asuka ama‐Filistiya ati nama ukulandela u‐Saule nonyana bake; ada ama‐Filistiya abulala u‐Jonatane, no‐Abinadabi, no‐Maleki‐shuha, onyana baka‐Saule." 
1Chronicles10:3 Kwabekunzima ke ukulwa pezu kwo‐Saule, bati abo batola ngesipeta bamcana; waza watutumela ngenxa yabatoli." 
1Chronicles10:4 Wandula u‐Saule wati kumtwali wezixo̔bo zake: Ṙo̔la iṙele lako, undihlabe ngalo; hleze aba bangalukileyo beze, badlale ngam. Kodwa umtwali wezixo̔bo zake ebengavumi; ngokuba ebesoyika kakulu. Waza u‐Saule watabata iṙele, wawa pezu kwalo." 
1Chronicles10:5 Wati umtwali wezixo̔bo zake, akubona ukuba u‐Saule ufile, wawa naye pezu kweṙele, wafa ke." 
1Chronicles10:6 Kwa njalo wabuba u‐Saule, nonyana bake bobatatu, nayo yonke indlu yake kwa kunye babuba." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ati akubona onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli abesemhlanjeni, ukuba esabile, nokuba u‐Saule nonyana bake bafile, andula ashiya izixeko zawo, esaba nawo; ati ama‐Filistiya eza ahlala kuzo." 
1Chronicles10:8 Kwaye kute ngomnye umhla, akufika ama‐Filistiya ukuhluba abahlatyiweyo, afumana u‐Saule nonyana bake belele entabeni ye‐Giliboha." 
1Chronicles10:9 Aza amhluba ke, atabata intloko yake, nezixo̔bo zake, atumela elizweni lama‐Filistiya elingqongayo, ukushumayela kwizitixo zawo nasebantwini." 
1Chronicles10:10 Kekaloku izixo̔bo zake azibeka endlwini yotixo wawo, nentloko yake ayibetela endlwini ka‐Dagone." 
1Chronicles10:11 Bati bakuva bonke abase‐Yabeshe‐gileyadi oko konke akwenzileyo ama‐Filistiya ku‐Saule," 
1Chronicles10:12 bandul’ ukusuka bonke abangamaṙoti, basusa isidumbu sika‐Saule, nezidumbu zonyana bake, bazizisa e‐Yabeshe: baza bawancw̔aba amatambo abo ngapantsi kwomkoba e‐Yabeshe, bazila ukutya intsuku zasixe̔nxe." 
1Chronicles10:13 Kwa njalo wabuba u‐Saule ngesigqito sake wagqita ngaso ngakuye uyehova, ngakulo ilizwi likayehova, elo abengaligcinanga; nangokuba wacebisana nomshologu, kuze kubuzwe kuwo;" 
1Chronicles10:14 engabuzanga nje kuyehova: wati ke ngoko wamfisa, nobukumkani wabuguqulela ku‐Davide unyana ka‐Jese." 
1Chronicles11:1 BANDULA o‐Sirayeli bonke bazihlanganisela ku‐Davide e‐Hebrone, besiti: Bona ke, silitambo lako nenyama yako tina." 
1Chronicles11:2 Kanjako kwa ngapambili, xeshekweni u‐Saule abesengukumkani, ebenguwe owapumisa nowangenisa o‐Sirayeli; kanjalo uyehova, utixo wako, wati kuwe: Wena uya kwalusa abantu bam o‐Sirayeli, wauya kuba yinkosi pezu kwabo abantu bam o‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles11:3 Ngako bonke abadala bo‐Sirayeli beza kukumkani e‐Hebrone; waye u‐Davide walwenza ucebano nabo e‐Hebrone ebusweni bukayehova; baza bamtambisa u‐Davide abe ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli, njengalo ilizwi likayehova, ngo‐Samyali." 
1Chronicles11:4 Waza waya u‐Davide, no‐Sirayeli bonke, e‐Yerusaleme, eyi‐Yebusi; ngokuba ama‐Yebusi, abemi belozwe, ebekona." 
1Chronicles11:5 Baza abemi base‐Yebusi bati ku‐Davide: Akuyi kungena apa. Wati u‐Davide noko wayitimba inqaba ye‐Ziyone, ekwa siso isixeko sika‐Davide." 
1Chronicles11:6 Wayesiti u‐Davide: Osukuba ebeta ama‐Yebusi ukuqala, uya kuba yintloko nenkosi. Waza u‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya wenyuka ukuqala, waba yintloko." 
1Chronicles11:7 Wandula u‐Davide wahlala enqatyeni; ngako oko bayibiza ngokuti sisixeko sika‐Davide. 
1Chronicles11:8 Waza waka isixeko eso ngokungqonga, kutabata e‐Milo kwada kwakuyo indawo engqongayo; nesisalela sesixeko wasihlaziya u‐Jowabi." 
1Chronicles11:9 Waye u‐Davide wamana ehambisa, waba mkulu; ngokuba uyehova wemikosi ebenaye." 
1Chronicles11:10 ZIZO ezi intloko zamagoṙa abenawo u‐Davide, abezomelezela yena ebukumkanini bake, kunye no‐Sirayeli bonke, ukumenza ukumkani, njengelizwi likayehova pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles11:11 Nangu umbalwa wamagoṙa abenawo u‐Davide: u‐Yashobame unyana ka‐Hakemoni, intloko yenjengele; yena wavivinya intshuntshe yake ngakuwo amakulu matatu abahlatyiweyo nguye ngexesha linye." 
1Chronicles11:12 Kwaye kuko emva kwake u‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Dodo, um‐Ahoha, obepakati kwawo amagoṙa amatatu." 
1Chronicles11:13 Yena wabeko no‐Davide e‐Pase‐damime, akuhlanganiselwa kona ama‐Filistiya ukulwa, apo bekuko kona isahlulo somhlaba sizele yiṙalasi; baza abantu besaba pambi kwama‐Filistiya." 
1Chronicles11:14 Kodwa bazimisa pakati kwentsimi leyo, bayilondoloza, bawabulala ama‐Filistiya; waza uyehova wabasindisa ngosindiso olukulu." 
1Chronicles11:15 Kwaye kusihla abatatu bakubo abamashumi matatu abazintloko ngaseweni ukuya ku‐Davide emqolombeni we‐Hadulame: wati umkosi wama‐Filistiya wati waca emhlanjeni wama‐Rafa. 
1Chronicles11:16 Waye u‐Davide oko ebesenqatyeni, nelali yama‐Filistiya ibiko oko e‐Beteleheme." 
1Chronicles11:17 Waza u‐Davide walangazelela, wati: Akwaba bendinokusezwa amanzi equleni lase‐Beteleheme, elisesangweni!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Basuka abatatu abo batyoboza emkosini wama‐Filistiya, baka amanzi equleni lase‐Beteleheme, elisesangweni, bawatwala, bawazisa ku‐Davide: koko u‐Davide ebengavumi ukuwasela, kodwa wawatululela kuyehova," 
1Chronicles11:19 wati: Ubunzima mabube kum buvela kutixo wam, ukuba ndiyenza lento! igazi lalamadoda ndiya kuwasela na, abehamba ngokuncama ubomi bawo? ngokuba ngokuncama ubomi bawo ewazisile: ngako ebengavumi ukuwasela. Ezizinto azenza lawomagoṙa matatu." 
1Chronicles11:20 Kanjalo u‐Abishai, umninawe ka‐Jowabi, ebeyintloko yabatatu: yena wavivinya intshuntshe yake ngakuwo amakulu matatu abahlatyiweyo nguye, waza wanegama pakati kwabatatu abo." 
1Chronicles11:21 Kubo abatatu abo, ebebekekile ngapezu kwababini, waba yinkosi yabo; kodwa akafikelela kwabatatu bokuqala." 
1Chronicles11:22 U‐Benaya, unyana ka‐Yoyada, unyana wendoda ebuṙoti, obemkulu, ngezenzo, owase‐Kabetsele, yena wabulala amadoda mabini abungonyamaṙa ase‐Mowabi: kanjako wehla wabulala ingonyama pakati kwomnxuma ngomhla wengqele:" 
1Chronicles11:23 wabulala nendoda engum‐Jipete, indoda yobude obukulu, yekubite ezintlanu; nasesandleni som‐Jipete lowo ibiko intshuntshe njengomti wabaluki; koko wehlela kuye ngentonga, wayityutula intshuntshe esandleni som‐Jipete, wambulala ngeyake intshuntshe." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ezizinto wazenza u‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, waza wanegama pakati kwalawomagoṙa matatu." 
1Chronicles11:25 Pakati kwabo abamashumi matatu, bona ke, ebebekekile; kodwa akafikelela kwabatatu bokuqala. Wati u‐Davide wammisa pezu kwomlisela wake." 
1Chronicles11:26 Kanjako amagoṙa asezimpini ebengaba: u‐Hasaheli umninawe ka‐Jowabi; u‐Lehanane unyana ka‐Dodo, um‐Beteleheme;" 
1Chronicles11:27 u‐Shamote, um‐Harori: u‐Heletse, um‐Peloni;" 
1Chronicles11:28 u‐Hira unyana ka‐Hikeshe, um‐Tekoha; u‐Abihezere, um‐Hanatote;" 
1Chronicles11:29 u‐Sibekai, um‐Husha; u‐Hilai, um‐Ahoha;" 
1Chronicles11:30 u‐Maharai, um‐Netofati; u‐Helede unyana ka‐Bahana, um‐Netofati;" 
1Chronicles11:31 u‐Yitai unyana ka‐Rabai, owase‐Gibeha yosapo luka‐Benjamine; u‐Benaya, um‐Piratone;" 
1Chronicles11:32 u‐Hurai, owasezintilini zase‐Gahashe; u‐Abiyeli, um‐Haraba;" 
1Chronicles11:33 u‐Hazamaveti, um‐Bahurime; u‐Eliyaba, um‐Shahalaboni:" 
1Chronicles11:34 kubo onyana baka‐Hashame, um‐Gizo, u‐Jonatane unyana ka‐Shage, um‐Harari;" 
1Chronicles11:35 u‐Ahiyame unyana ka‐Sakare, um‐Harari; u‐Elifali unyana ka‐Ure;" 
1Chronicles11:36 u‐Hefere, um‐Mekera; u‐Ahiya, um‐Peloni;" 
1Chronicles11:37 u‐Hetsero, um‐Karamele; u‐Narai unyana ka‐Zebai;" 
1Chronicles11:38 u‐Joweli umninawe ka‐Natane; u‐Mibihare unyana wom‐Hagare; 
1Chronicles11:39 u‐Tseleki, um‐Hamoni: u‐Naharai, um‐Berote, umtwali wezixo̔bo ku‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya:" 
1Chronicles11:40 u‐Hira, um‐Yetere; u‐Garebi, um‐Yetere;" 
1Chronicles11:41 u‐Huriya, um‐Hete; u‐Zabadi unyana ka‐Halai;" 
1Chronicles11:42 u‐Hadina unyana ka‐Shiza, um‐Rubene, intloko yama‐Rubene, ekunye naye amashumi matatu;" 
1Chronicles11:43 u‐Hanane unyana ka‐Mahaka; no‐Yoshafate, um‐Miteni;" 
1Chronicles11:44 u‐Huziya, um‐Hashetarote: u‐Shama, no‐Yeyeli, onyana baka‐Hotame, um‐Harohere;" 
1Chronicles11:45 u‐Yedaheli unyana ka‐Shimri; no‐Yoha umzalwana wake, um‐Titse;" 
1Chronicles11:46 u‐Eliyeli, um‐Mahavi; no‐Yeribai, no‐Yoshariya, onyana baka‐Lenahame: no‐Yitema, um‐Mowabi;" 
1Chronicles11:47 u‐Eliyeli; no‐Obedi; no‐Yahasiyeli, um‐Metsobaya." 
1Chronicles12:1 KEKALOKU ngaba abezayo ku‐Davide, e‐Tsikilage, nxa abesavalelwa ngenxa ka‐Saule unyana ka‐Kishe: bebepakati kwamagoṙa nabo, bengabancedi emfazweni;" 
1Chronicles12:2 benokutyeda isipeta, besenza nangesokunene nangesokohlo isandla ukusaula ngamatye n okutola ngentolo ngesipeta: bebengabakubo abazalwana baka‐Saule, kuma‐Benjamine:" 
1Chronicles12:3 oyintloko u‐Ahihezere, no‐Yohashe, onyana baka‐Shemaha, um‐Gibeha; no‐Yeziyeli, no‐Pelete, onyana baka‐Hazamaveti; no‐Beraka; no‐Jehu, um‐Hanatote;" 
1Chronicles12:4 no‐Yishemaya, um‐Gibeyone, obeligoṙa pakati kwabamashumi matatu, obepezu kwabamashumi matatu kanjako; no‐Jeremiya; no‐Yahaziyeli; no‐Johanane; no‐Yozabadi, um‐Gedera;" 
1Chronicles12:5 u‐Eluzai; no‐Jerimote; no‐Behaliya; no‐Shemariya; no‐Shefatiya, um‐Harufe:" 
1Chronicles12:6 u‐Lekana, no‐Yishiya, no‐Hazareli, no‐Yohezere, no‐Yashobame, ama‐Kora;" 
1Chronicles12:7 no‐Johela, no‐Zebadiya, onyana baka‐Yerohame, owase‐Gedore." 
1Chronicles12:8 Nakuma‐Gadi kwazahlula ukuya ku‐Davide enqatyeni ngasentlango amagoṙa abuṙoti, amadoda omkosi eqelene nokulwa, exo̔be ikaka nomkonto; ubuso bawo bu njeng obuso bengonyama, enjengamabadi pezu kwentaba ngokuba namendu:" 
1Chronicles12:9 u‐Hezere ebengowokuqala; u‐Hobadiya ebengowesibini: u‐Eliyabe ebengowesitatu; 
1Chronicles12:10 u‐Mishemana ebengowesine; u‐Jeremiya ebengowesihlanu; 
1Chronicles12:11 u‐Hatai ebengowesitandatu; u‐Eliyeli ebengowesixe̔nxe; 
1Chronicles12:12 u‐Johanane ebengowesibozo; u‐Lezabadi ebengowesitoba: 
1Chronicles12:13 u‐Jeremiya ebengoweshumi; u‐Makebanai ebengoweshumi elinesinye. 
1Chronicles12:14 Aba ke bebengabonyana baka‐Gadi, intloko zomkosi: lowo obengomncinane wapezu kwekulu, nalowo obengomkulu wapezu kwewaka" 
1Chronicles12:15 Ngabo aba abawela i‐Yoredane ngenyanga yokuqala, yakuba ibizalele pezu kwazo zonke indonga zayo; baza basabisa bonke abasemihlanjeni, ngasekupumeni nangasekutshoneni kwelanga." 
1Chronicles12:16 Kwaye kusiza enqatyeni ku‐Davide inxenye kubo onyana baka‐Benjamine no‐Juda. 
1Chronicles12:17 Waza u‐Davide wapumela pambi kwabo, wateta, wati kubo: Ukuba nize ngoxolo kum, ukuze nindincede, intliziyo yam yoba nye neyenu; kodwa ukuba nize ukundikila ezintshabeni zam, kungeko ubudlwengu nje esandleni sam, makabone utixo wobawo betu, ohlwaye ke!" 
1Chronicles12:18 Waza umoya wangena ku‐Hamasai, intloko yenjengele, owati: Singabako. Davide! sikunye nawe, nyana ka‐Jese! uxolo, uxolo malube kuwe, uxolo malube nakubancedi bako; ngokuba utixo wako ekunceda. Wandula u‐Davide wabamkela, wababeka pakati kwentloko zebandla." 
1Chronicles12:19 Nakubo o‐Manase kwapongomela ku‐Davide inxenye, nxa abesiza nama‐Filistiya ukulwa ngaku‐Saule: kanti abawanceda: ngokuba inkosi zama‐Filistiya bezite ngecebo zamndulula, zisiti: Uya kupongomela enkosini yake u‐Saule, azise ingozi pezu kwentloko zetu." 
1Chronicles12:20 Nxa abesiya e‐Tsikilage, kwapongomela kuye, kubo o‐Manase, u‐Hadena, no‐Yozabadi, no‐Yedaheli, no‐Mikaheli, no‐Yozabadi, no‐Elihu, no‐Tsiletai, intloko zamawaka akwa‐Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Aba bamnceda u‐Davide ngakulo ibandla, ngokuba bebengamagoṙa abuṙoti bonke: baba zinkosi emkosini kanjako." 
1Chronicles12:22 Ngokuba ngexesha elo, imihla ngemihla, bekuziwa ku‐Davide ukumnceda, kwada kwabako umkosi omkulu, njengomkosi katixo." 
1Chronicles12:23 OKU kukubalwa kwamaqela abaxo̔bele ukulwa, a bezayo ku‐Davide e‐Hebrone, ukuba kuguqulelwe kuye ubukumkani buka‐Saule, njengelizwi likayehova." 
1Chronicles12:24 Onyana baka‐Juda, abapete ikaka nomkonto, bebengamawaka matandatu anamakulu asibozo, bexo̔bele ukulwa." 
1Chronicles12:25 Kubo onyana baka‐Simone, amagoṙa abuṙoti ekulweni, ngamawaka asixe̔nxe anekulu linye." 
1Chronicles12:26 Kubo onyana baka‐Levi, ngamawaka mane anamakulu matandatu." 
1Chronicles12:27 Kekaloku u‐Yoyada ebeyinkosi yama‐Arone, enaye amawaka matatu anamakulu asixe̔nxe:" 
1Chronicles12:28 no‐Tsadoki, indodana ebiligoṙa elibuṙoti; nendlu kayise, inkosi zayo bezingamashumi mabini anesibini" 
1Chronicles12:29 Nakubo onyana baka‐Benjamine, abazalwana baka‐Saule, ngamawaka matatu: ngokuba kwada kwakaloku into eninzi yabo yabambelela kwindlu ka‐Saule." 
1Chronicles12:30 Nakubo onyana baka‐Frayime, ngamawaka angamashumi mabini anamakulu asibozo, amagoṙa abuṙoti, amadoda adumileyo kwindlu zoyise zawo." 
1Chronicles12:31 Nakuso isiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, ngamawaka alishumi linesibozo, abebalulwe ngamagama, ukuba eze kumenza u‐Davide ukumkani." 
1Chronicles12:32 Nakubo onyana baka‐Yisakare, abo bakwaziyo ukuqiqa amaxesha, ukuba bayiqonde into bange beyenza o‐Sirayeli, abazintloko zabo bebengamakulu mabini; bati bonke abazalwana babo benza ngelizwi labo." 
1Chronicles12:33 Nakubo o‐Zebulone, abo bapumayo nomkosi, becwangciselwe, ukulwa, benempahla zonke zemfazwe, ngamawaka angamashumi mahlanu; baye behlanganisana ke, bengenantliziyo mbini." 
1Chronicles12:34 Nakubo o‐Nefatali, inkosi zaliwaka, nakunye nazo, benekaka nentshuntshe, ngamawaka angamashumi matatu enesixe̔nxe." 
1Chronicles12:35 Nakuma‐Dane, ecwangciselwe ukulwa, ngamawaka angamashumi mabini enesibozo anamakulu matandatu." 
1Chronicles12:36 Nakubo o‐Ashere, abo bapumayo nomkosi, becwangciselwe ukulwa, ngamawaka angamashumi mane." 
1Chronicles12:37 Napesheya kwe‐Yoredane, kwa kuwo ama‐Rubene, nama‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, enempahla zonke zomkosi wokulwa, ngamawaka alikulu elinamashumi mabini." 
1Chronicles12:38 Ati onke lamadoda okulwa, ehlanganisene ngamabandla, eza ngentliziyo ekolisekileyo e‐Hebrone, ukuba amenze u‐Davide ukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke: kanjalo sonke isisalela so‐Sirayeli sasiyintliziyo nye naso ukwenza u‐Davide ukumkani." 
1Chronicles12:39 Abeko kona ndawonye no‐Davide intsuku zantatu, esidla esela nokusela: ngokuba ebelungiselwe ukutya ngabazalwana bawo." 
1Chronicles12:40 Kanjako abo abebekufupi nawo, kwada kwase‐Yisakare, ne‐Zebulone, ne‐Nefatali, bazisa isonka pezu kwamaqwaṙashe, napezu kwenkamela, napezu kwamaqwaṙaṙa, napezu kwenkabi, ukutya kwomgubo, amasimba amakiwane, nezipa zedreyive ezishwenyileyo, neveyine, neoli, nenkabi, negusha ngento eninzi: ngokuba bekuko uvuyo kwa‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles13:1 WAZA u‐Davide wacebisana nenkosi zamawaka nezamakulu, kunye nenkosi zonke." 
1Chronicles13:2 Wayesiti u‐Davide kuyo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli: Ukuba kunga kulungile kuni, nokuba kuvela kuyehova, utixo wetu, masitume ngamacala onke kubazalwana betu abaseleyo kulo lonke ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli, nakunye nabo ku baperisite naba‐Levi abasezixekweni zenqele zabo, ukuba bazihlanganisele kuti;" 
1Chronicles13:3 netyeya katixo wetu masiyijikisele kuti: ngokuba singabuzanga kuyo emihleni ka‐Saule. 
1Chronicles13:4 Yaza yonke intlanganiso yati iya kwenje njalo: ngokuba londawo ibifanele emehlweni abantu bonke. 
1Chronicles13:5 Wandula u‐Davide wahlanganisa o‐Sirayeli bonke, kwa se‐Shihore yase‐Jipete kwada kwasekungenweni kwe‐Hamati, ukuba kubuyiswe ityeya katixo e‐Kiriyate‐yarime." 
1Chronicles13:6 Wenyuka u‐Davide, no‐Sirayeli bonke, ukuya e‐Bahala, e‐Kiriyate‐yarime, eyakwa‐Juda, ukunyusa kwa kona ityeya katixo onguyehova, ohlalayo pakati kwekerubime, ogama libizwayo pezu kwayo." 
1Chronicles13:7 Baza bakwelisa ityeya katixo enqwelweni entsha, besuka nayo endlwini ka‐Abinadabi: bati u‐Huza no‐Ahiyo babexesha inqwelo." 
1Chronicles13:8 Bandula u‐Davide no‐Sirayeli bonke badlala ebusweni bukatixo ngamandla onke, nangamaculo, nangehadi, nangenebele, nangentambula, nangesimbali, nangamaxilongo." 
1Chronicles13:9 Kwati kwakufikwa esibayeni sokubula sika‐Kidone, waza u‐Huza wolula isandla sake ukuba abambe ityeya; ngokuba inkabi beziku̔beka." 
1Chronicles13:10 Yandula yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakuye u‐Huza, wambeta ke, ngenxa yokuba ebesolule isandla sake ngasetyeyeni; waza wafa kona ebusweni bukatixo." 
1Chronicles13:11 Wasuka waqumba u‐Davide ngokokuba uyehova ebenzile isityobozelo pezu kwo‐Huza; ngako wayibiza londawo ngokuti yi‐Peretse‐huza, kude kwanamhla nje." 
1Chronicles13:12 Waza u‐Davide wamoyika utixo ngalomini, esiti: Ndoti nina ukuyizisa kum ityeya katixo?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Ngako u‐Davide akapambukisa ityeya leyo iye kuye esixekweni sika‐Davide, kodwa wayishenxisela endlwini ka‐Obedi‐edome um‐Gate." 
1Chronicles13:14 Yaye ityeya katixo ihleli nabendlu ka‐Obedi‐edome, endlwini yake, inyanga zantatu: waza uyehova watamsanqela indlu ka‐Obedi‐edome, nako konke abenako." 
1Chronicles14:1 KEKALOKU u‐Hirame, ukumkani we‐Tire, watuma izigidimi ukuya ku‐Davide, nemiti yesedare, nencibi zendonga, nencibi zemiti, ukuze akelwe indlu." 
1Chronicles14:2 Waza wanakana u‐Davide ukuba uyehova ebemqinisile ukuba ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli; ngokuba ubukumkani bake bebupakanyiselwa pezulu, ngenxa yabantu bake o‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles14:3 Walekela u‐Davide ukuzeka abafazi e‐Yerusaleme; walekela u‐Davide nokuzala onyana nentombi. 
1Chronicles14:4 Ngawo la amagama abo abantwana abenabo e‐Yerusaleme: u‐Shamuha, no‐Shobabe, n o‐Natane, no‐Solomone," 
1Chronicles14:5 no‐Yibare, no‐Elishuha, no‐Elifelete," 
1Chronicles14:6 no‐Noga, no‐Nefege, no‐Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 no‐Elishama, no‐Beliyada, no‐Elifelete." 
1Chronicles14:8 KWATI kwakuviwa ngama‐Filistiya ukuba u‐Davide utanjisiwe abe ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke, andula enyuka onke ama‐Filistiya ukuya kumfuna u‐Davide. Waza u‐Davide, akuva oko, wapuma ngakuwo." 
1Chronicles14:9 Ada eza ama‐Filistiya, azitwabulula emhlanjeni wama‐Rafa." 
1Chronicles14:10 Waza u‐Davide wabuza kutixo, esiti: Ndiya kunyuka na ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya? wowanikela esandleni sam na? Wayesiti uyehova kuye: Nyuka; ngokuba ndiya kuwanikela esandleni sako." 
1Chronicles14:11 Kwati kwakunyukelwa e‐Bali‐peratsime, wawabeta kona u‐Davide. Wandula wati u‐Davide: Utixo utyobozele ezintshabeni zam ngesandla sam njengesityobozelo samanzi. Ngako oko kwabizwa igama lalondawo ngokuti yi‐Bali‐peratsime." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ayeshiya kona otixo bawo; waza waxela u‐Davide, batshiswa ngomlilo." 
1Chronicles14:13 Apinda kanjako ama‐Filistiya azitwabulula emhlanjeni lowo. 
1Chronicles14:14 Ngako u‐Davide wabuya wabuza kutixo; waye utixo esiti kuye: Ungenyuki emva kwawo; jika umke kuwo, uye uwafikele malungana nemiti yebaka." 
1Chronicles14:15 Kwakuya kuti, nxa uvayo isandi sokuhanjwa ezincameni zemiti yebaka, wandule ukupuma ukulwa; ngokuba selepumile utixo pambi kwako, ukubeta umkosi wama‐Filistiya." 
1Chronicles14:16 Wenje njalo u‐Davide, njengokuba utixo ebemyalele: kwaza kwabetwa umkosi wama‐Filistiya kwa se‐Gibeyone kude kwase‐Gezere." 
1Chronicles14:17 Lwandula udumo luka‐Davide lwapumela emazweni onke; wati uyehova wabeka ukwoyikwa kwake pezu kwezizwe zonke. 
1Chronicles15:1 KEKALOKU u‐Davide wazenzela izindlu esixekweni sika‐Davide, wayilungisela ityeya katixo indawo, wayolulela intente." 
1Chronicles15:2 Wandula wati u‐Davide: Akuko mntu ongayitwalayo ityeya katixo, kupela ngaba‐Levi; ngokuba bona ebanyulile uyehova ukuba batwale ityeya katixo, nokuba bamkonze kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Chronicles15:3 Waza u‐Davide wabahlanganisela e‐Yerusaleme o‐Sirayeli bonke, ukuze ityeya kayehova inyuselwe endaweni yayo, leyo ebeyilungisele yona." 
1Chronicles15:4 Kanjalo wababuta u‐Davide onyana baka‐Arone naba‐Levi: 
1Chronicles15:5 konyana baka‐Kohati, u‐Wuriyeli oyinkosi, nabazalwana bake abalikulu linamashumi mabini;" 
1Chronicles15:6 konyana baka‐Merari, u‐Hasaya oyinkosi, nabazalwana bake abangamakulu mabini anamashumi ekwa mabini;" 
1Chronicles15:7 konyana baka‐Gereshome, u‐Joweli oyinkosi, nabazalwana bake abalikulu linamashumi matatu;" 
1Chronicles15:8 konyana baka‐Elitsafane, u‐Shemaya oyinkosi, nabazalwana bake abangamakulu mabini:" 
1Chronicles15:9 konyana baka‐Hebrone, u‐Eliyeli oyinkosi, nabazalwana bake abangamashumi asibozo;" 
1Chronicles15:10 konyana baka‐Huziyeli, u‐Haminadabi oyinkosi, nabazalwana bake abalikulu elineshumi linababini." 
1Chronicles15:11 Waza u‐Davide wabiza u‐Tsadoki no‐Abiyatare abaperisite, naba‐Levi, u‐Wuriyeli, n o‐Hasaya, no‐Joweli, n o‐Shemaya, no‐Eliyeli, no‐Haminadabi," 
1Chronicles15:12 wati kubo: Nina nizintloko zendlu zoyise zaba‐Levi; zingcwaliseni, nina nabazalwana benu, ukuba niyinyuse ityeya kayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ize endaweni ndiyilungisele yona." 
1Chronicles15:13 Ngokokuba bekungenini abenje njalo ekuqaleni, watyobozela pezu kwetu uyehova, utixo wetu, ngokuba singamfunanga njengesiko." 
1Chronicles15:14 Bandula abaperisite naba‐Levi bazingcwalisa, ukuze benyuse ityeya kayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles15:15 Lwaza usapo lwaba‐Levi lwayityata ityeya katixo emagxalabeni alo, ngezibonda ezipezu kwayo, njengokuba ebeyalele u‐Mosesi ngelizwi likayehova." 
1Chronicles15:16 Wateta u‐Davide kwinkosi zaba‐Levi, ukuba zimise abazalwana bazo abaculi, benento zokuculisa, inebele, nehadi, nesimbali, bevakalisa ngokupakamisa ilizwi ngovuyo." 
1Chronicles15:17 Baza aba‐Levi bamisa u‐Hemani unyana ka‐Joweli; nakubazalwana bake, u‐Safa unyana ka‐Berekiya; nakonyana baka‐Merari abazalwana babo, u‐Etane unyana ka‐Kushaya:" 
1Chronicles15:18 nakunye nabo, abazalwana babo besaci sesibini, u‐Zekariya, u‐Bene, no‐Yaziyeli, no‐Shemiramote, no‐Yehili, no‐Huni, n o‐Eliyabe, no‐Benaya, no‐Mahaseya, no‐Matitiya, no‐Elifele, no‐Mikineya, no‐Obedi‐edome, no‐Yeyeli, abalindimnyango." 
1Chronicles15:19 Baza abaculi, u‐Hemani, n o‐Safa, no‐Etane, bavakalisa ngesimbali zexina;" 
1Chronicles15:20 no‐Zekariya, no‐Aziyeli, no‐Shemiramote, no‐Yehili, no‐Huni, no‐Eliyabe, no‐Mahaseya, no‐Benaya, ngenebele ngokwehalamote;" 
1Chronicles15:21 no‐Matitiya, no‐Elifele, no‐Mikineya, no‐Obedi‐edome, no‐Yeyeli, no‐Hazaziya, ngehadi ngokwesheminiti, ukuhlabelisa." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kekaloku u‐Kenaniya ebengumpati waba‐Levi ngokuvuma: waluleka ngokuvuma, ngokuba ebenokuqonda." 
1Chronicles15:23 U‐Berekiya no‐Lekana bebengabalindimnyango betyeya. 
1Chronicles15:24 U‐Shebaniya, no‐Yoshafate, no‐Netaneli, no‐Hamasai, no‐Zekariya, no‐Benaya, no‐Eliyezeri, abaperisite, bahlokomisa amaxilongo pambi kwetyeya katixo: u‐Obedi‐edome no‐Yehiya bebengabalindimnyango betyeya." 
1Chronicles15:25 Kwaye kute, u‐Davide, nabadala bo‐Sirayeli, nenkosi zamawaka, baya ukunyusa ityeya yocebano lukayehova endlwini ka‐Obedi‐edome ngovuyo." 
1Chronicles15:26 Kwaza kwati, ngokokuba utixo wabanceda aba‐Levi abatwala ityeya yocebano lukayehova, babingelela inkunzana zenkomo ezisixe̔nxe, nenkunzi zegusha ezikwa sixe̔nxe." 
1Chronicles15:27 Kekaloku u‐Davide wavatiswa ngengubo yeqiya eshiceneyo, kwa nabo bonke aba‐Levi abatwala ityeya, nabaculi, no‐Kenaniya umpati wokuvuma kwabaculi: kanjalo u‐Davide ebeneyefodi yeqiya pezu kwake." 
1Chronicles15:28 Kwa njalo o‐Sirayeli bonke benyusa ityeya yocebano lukayehova, ngokumemeza, nangentlokoma yopondo, nangamaxilongo, nangesimbali, bevakalisa ngenebele nangehadi." 
1Chronicles15:29 Kwaza kwati, yakufika ityeya yocebano lukayehova esixekweni sika‐Davide, u‐Mikali, intombi ka‐Saule, wakangela ngefentsile, wambona ukumkani u‐Davide eduda, edlala nokudlala: wandula wamdela entliziyweni yake." 
1Chronicles16:1 Baza bangenisa ityeya katixo, bayimisa pakati kwentente ebe yolulelwe yona ngu‐Davide; baye benikela amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yoxolo pambi kwotixo." 
1Chronicles16:2 Xeshekweni u‐Davide abegqibile ukunikela amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yoxolo, wandula wabatamsanqelisa abantu egameni likayehova." 
1Chronicles16:3 Kanjalo wabela kubo bonke abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli, kuwo amadoda nakubo abafazi, kwabanye ngabanye, isimba lesonka, nesiqendu senyama, negubu leveyine." 
1Chronicles16:4 WAZA wamisela pambi kwetyeya kayehova abatile kuba‐Levi babe ngabakonzi, nokuba bakankanye, babulele, badumise uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli:" 
1Chronicles16:5 u‐Safa oyintloko, no‐Zekariya osemva kwake; u‐Yeyeli, no‐Shemiramote, no‐Yehili, no‐Matitiya, no‐Eliyabe, no‐Benaya, no‐Obedi‐edome; wati u‐Yeyeli wavakalisa ngenebele nangehadi, kodwa u‐Safa wavakalisa ngesimbali;" 
1Chronicles16:6 no‐Benaya, no‐Yahaziyeli, abaperisite, ngamaxilongo futi pambi kwetyeya yocebano lukatixo." 
1Chronicles16:7 Oko, kwa ngalomini, wanika u‐Davide kuqala cliculo lokumdumisa uyehova esandleni sika‐Safa nabazalwana bake, lokuti:" 
1Chronicles16:8 Bulelani kuyehova, shumayelani igama lake, yazisani izenzo zake pakati kwabantu." 
1Chronicles16:9 Vumani kuye, culani amaculo kuye, tetani ngayo yonke imimangaliso yake." 
1Chronicles16:10 Qa̔yisani ngegama lake eliyingcwele: maivuye intliziyo yabamfunayo uyehova. 
1Chronicles16:11 Buzani uyehova namandla ake: funani ubuso bake futi. 
1Chronicles16:12 Kumbulani imimangaliso yake ayenzileyo, imiqondiso yake, nezigwebo zomlomo wake;" 
1Chronicles16:13 nina nzalo ka‐Sirayeli isicaka sake, bonyana baka‐Yakobi, abaqashwa bake!" 
1Chronicles16:14 Nguyehova, utixo wetu, yena; imigwebo yake ikuwo wonke umhlaba," 
1Chronicles16:15 Kumbulani ucebano lwake kude kube ngunapakade; ilizwi wabelixela kwiwaka lezizukulwana; 
1Chronicles16:16 ucebano owalwenzayo no‐Abrahame, nesifungo sake ku‐Yisake;" 
1Chronicles16:17 walumisela ku‐Yakobi lube ngumteto, ku‐Sirayeli lube lucebano olungunapakade," 
1Chronicles16:18 esiti: Ndokunika ilizwe le‐Kanane, isabiwo selifa lenu;" 
1Chronicles16:19 okuya nibe ningabantu abalula, kwa into encinanana nabasemzini kulo." 
1Chronicles16:20 Bati bakuya kwisizwe ngesizwe, bevela kw obunye ubukumkani besiya ebantwini bambi:" 
1Chronicles16:21 akavumelanga mntu ukuba ababandezele; wabohlwaya nokumkani ngenxa yabo," 
1Chronicles16:22 esiti: Ningacukumisi abatanjiswa bam, nabaprofite bam ningabapati kakubi." 
1Chronicles16:23 Vumani kuyehova, mhlaba wonke! shumayelani usindiso lwake ngemihla ngemihla." 
1Chronicles16:24 Balisani ubungcwalisa bake pakati kwabaheyideni, imimangaliso yake pakati kwezizwe zonke." 
1Chronicles16:25 Ngokuba uyehova emkulu, ulungel’ ukudunyiswa kakulu; ulungel’ ukwoyikwa napezu kwotixo bonke." 
1Chronicles16:26 Ngokuba bonke otixo bezizwe bengamadalo; kanti uyehova walenza izulu. 
1Chronicles16:27 Ebusweni bake kuko isitomo nobungangamsha: endaweni yake kuko amandla nomgcobo. 
1Chronicles16:28 Nikelani kuyehova, zizukulwana zabantu! nikelani kuyehova ubungcwalisa namandla." 
1Chronicles16:29 Nikelani kuyehova ubungcwalisa begama lake: zisani umnikelo, ningene ebusweni bake: bedeshani uyehova ebuhleni bobungcwele." 
1Chronicles16:30 Tutumelani pambi kwake, mhlaba wonke! Ilizwe nalo liya kuqiniswa, lize lingabi nakushukunyiswa." 
1Chronicles16:31 Malivuye izulu, ugcobe umhlaba; makutiwe pakati kwezizwe: Uyehova upete ngobukumkani." 
1Chronicles16:32 Malugqume ulwandle, nokuzala kwalo; mazivuyelele izindle, nako konke okupakati kwazo." 
1Chronicles16:33 Oko iya kugcoba yonke imiti yehlati ebusweni bukayehova: ngokuba esiza agwebe umhlaba. 
1Chronicles16:34 Bulelani kuyehova, ngokuba elungile: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade." 
1Chronicles16:35 Yitini: Sisindise. Tixo wosindiswa lwetu! sihlanganise, usihlangule kubaheyideni, size sibulele egameni lako elingcwele, siqa̔yise eludunyisweni lwako." 
1Chronicles16:36 Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, kwa kunapakade kude kube ngunapakade! Baza bati bonke abantu: Amene! bamdumisa uyehova." 
1Chronicles16:37 Kwa njalo washiyela kona, ebusweni betyeya yocebano lukayehova, u‐Safa nabazalwana bake, ukuba bakonze pambi kwetyeya futi, njengendawo yemihla ngemihla;" 
1Chronicles16:38 no‐Obedi‐edome, nabazalwana babo, amashumi matandatu anesibozo; no‐Obedi‐edome unyana ka‐Jedutune, no‐Hosa, babe ngabalindimnyango;" 
1Chronicles16:39 no‐Tsadoki umperisite, nabazalwana bake abaperisite, pambi kwetabanakele kayehova endaweni epakamileyo ese‐Gibeyone," 
1Chronicles16:40 ukuba banikele amadini okutshiswa kuyehova, pezu kwesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa futi, ngokusa nangokuhlwa, benze nangako konke okuba̔liweyo emtetweni kayehova owabewuxele ko‐Sirayeli;" 
1Chronicles16:41 nakunye nabo u‐Hemani no‐Jedutune, nesisalela sabanyuliweyo, abebebalulwe ngamagama, ukuba babulele kuyehova, ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade;" 
1Chronicles16:42 nakunye nabo u‐Hemani no‐Jedutune, benamaxilongo nesimbali zibe zezabavakalisayo, nezinto zokuculisa zikatixo. Bati onyana baka‐Jedutune balinda esangweni." 
1Chronicles16:43 Bada bemka bonke abantu baya abanye ngabanye ezindlwini zabo; waza wabuya u‐Davide ukuya kutamsanqelisa indlu yake. 
1Chronicles17:1 KWABEKUTE nxa u‐Davide abehleli endlwini yake, wandula wati u‐Davide ku‐Natane umprofite: Bona ke, mna ndihleli endlwini yesedare, kodwa ityeya yocebano lukayehova ihleli ngapantsi kwezikuselo." 
1Chronicles17:2 Waza u‐Natane wati ku‐Davide: Yenza konke okusentliziyweni yako; ngokuba utixo enawe. 
1Chronicles17:3 Kwaye kute ngobobusuku, kweza ilizwi likatixo ku‐Natane, lisiti:" 
1Chronicles17:4 Hamba uti ku‐Davide isicaka sam: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Akuyi kundakela indlu yokuhlala wena. 
1Chronicles17:5 Ngokuba ndingahlalanga endlwini, kwa semhleni ndabendinyusa o‐Sirayeli kwada kwanamhla nje; koko ndisukile kwenye intente ukuya kwenye, nakwenye itabanakele ukuya kwenye." 
1Chronicles17:6 Apo kusukuba ndihambile kona kunye no‐Sirayeli bonke, ndike ndateta ilizwi na kwomnye wabagwebi bo‐Sirayeli, endibe ndibayalele ukwalusa abantu bam, ndisiti: Yinina ukuba anindakeli indlu yesedare?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Ngako kaloku, uya kutsho kwisicaka sam, ku‐Davide, ukuti: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Mna ndakutabata esibayeni, kwa sekulandeleni igusha, ukuba ube yinkosi pezu kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli:" 
1Chronicles17:8 ndabendiko nawe apo kusukuba ubuhamba kona, nazo zonke intshaba zako ndizinqamlile ebusweni bako; kanjalo ndikwenzele igama elinjengegama labakulu abasemhlabeni:" 
1Chronicles17:9 ndandiya kumisela abantu bam o‐Sirayeli indawo, ndibatyale, baze beme endaweni yabo, bangabi sazanyazanyiswa; kanjalo usapo lwobumenemene aluyi kubuya lubasinyise, njengasekuqaleni," 
1Chronicles17:10 nakuselokwemihla ndabendimisa abagwebi pezu kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli: nazo zonke intshaba zako ndizitobisile. Kanjako ndiyashumayela kuwe ukuba uyehova wokwakela indlu. 
1Chronicles17:11 Kwakuya kuti, xeshekweni izalisekile imihla yako yokuba woya kulala noyihlo bako, ndiya kwandula ndivuse owenzalo yako emva kwako, oya kuba ngowonyana bako, ndibuqinise ubukumkani bake." 
1Chronicles17:12 Nguye oya kundakela indlu, ndandiya kuqinisa iterone yake kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Chronicles17:13 Mna ndiya kuba nguyise kuye, naye woba ngunyana kum; nobubele bam andiyi kubususa kuye, njengokuba ndabususa kulowo obepambili kuwe:" 
1Chronicles17:14 kodwa ndiya kummisa endlwini yam nasebukumkanini bam kude kube ngunapakade; neterone yake iya kuqiniswa kude kube ngunapakade. 
1Chronicles17:15 Ngawo onke lamazwi, nangawo wonke lomboniso, wateta u‐Natane kwa ngokunjalo ku‐Davide." 
1Chronicles17:16 Wandula ukumkani u‐Davide wangena wahlala ebusweni bukayehova, wati: Ndingubanina mna, Yehova, Tixo! iyinto nina nendlu yam, ukuba undizisile kude kwalapa?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Oku bekuncinane noko emehlweni ako, Tixo! ngokuba utetile ngendlu yesicaka sako kude kube kude, wandibona njengesiko labantu kwa pezulu, Yehova, Tixo!" 
1Chronicles17:18 Yinto nina angasalekela u‐Davide ukuyiteta kuwe, ngokubekwa kwesicaka sako? ngokuba wena usazi isicaka sako." 
1Chronicles17:19 Yehova! ngenxa yesicaka sako, nanjengeyako intliziyo, wenzile bonke obubukulu, kuze kwaziswe zonke ezizinto zinkulu." 
1Chronicles17:20 Yehova! akuko onjengawe, kanjako akuko utixo ngapandle kwako, njengako konke esikuvileyo ngendlebe zetu." 
1Chronicles17:21 Kanjalo sisipina isizwe sinye emhlabeni esinjengabo abantu bako o‐Sirayeli, owati utixo waya ukubakulula babe ngabantu bake, uze uzenzele igama lobukulu nolwoyikeko, ngokugxota abaheyideni pambi kwabantu bako, owaukulule bona e‐Jipete?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Waubenzile abantu bako o‐Sirayeli ukuba babe ngabantu bako kude kube ngunapakade; nawe, Yehova! waba ngutixo wabo." 
1Chronicles17:23 Ngako kaloku, Yehova! ilizwi ulitetileyo ngaso isicaka sako, nangayo indlu yaso, malinyaniswe kude kube ngunapakade, wenze njengokuba utetile." 
1Chronicles17:24 Ewe malinyaniswe, negama lako malenziwe likulu kude kube ngunapakade, kuze kutiwe: Uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, u ngutixo ko‐Sirayeli; nendlu ka‐Davide isicaka sako, maiqiniswe pambi kwako." 
1Chronicles17:25 Ngokuba wena, Tixo wam! utyilele indlebe yesicaka sako okokuba uya kusakela indlu; ngako oko isicaka sako sifumene entliziyweni yake ukutandaza ebusweni bako." 
1Chronicles17:26 Nakaloku, Yehova! wena unguye utixo, nezizinto ezilungileyo uzitetile ngaso isicaka sako:" 
1Chronicles17:27 ngako kaloku makukoleke kuwe ukutamsanqela indlu yesicaka sako, ukuba ibeko pambi kwako kude kube ngunapakade; ngokuba wena, Yehova! uyitamsanqele, yaiya kutanyusanqelwa kude kube ngunapakade" 
1Chronicles18:1 KWABEKUTE emveni kwoku, ukuba u‐Davide wabeta ama‐Filistiya, wawatobisa; waza watabata i‐Gate namagxamesi ayo esandleni sama‐Filistiya." 
1Chronicles18:2 Wabeta nama‐Mowabi; aza ama‐Mowabi aba ngabakonzi ku‐Davide, asa iminikelo." 
1Chronicles18:3 Waza u‐Davide wabeta u‐Hadarezere, ukumkani we‐Tsoba, kwada kwase‐Hamati, ekuhambeni kwake ukuya kumisa amandla ake ngasemlanjeni wom‐Ferate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Waye u‐Davide watimba kuye iwaka lenqwelwana, namawaka asixe̔nxe abakweli bamahashe, namawaka angamashumi mabini abahamba ngenyawo: waza u‐Davide wawasika umbotshwa onke amahashe enqwelwana; kodwa wasalisa kuwo a wenqwelwana zalikulu." 
1Chronicles18:5 Kekaloku ama‐Siriya ase‐Damakusi eza ukumnceda u‐Hadarezere ukumkani we‐Tsoba; waza u‐Davide wabulala kuwo ama‐Siriya amadoda angamawaka angamashumi mabini anamabini. 
1Chronicles18:6 Wandula u‐Davide wazibeka ilali e‐Siriya yase‐Damakusi; ati ama‐Siriya aba ngabakonzi ku‐Davide, asa iminikelo. Kwa njalo uyehova wamnceda u‐Davide apo kusukuba ebesiya kona."
