1Chronicles18:7 Wayetabata u‐Davide amakaka egolide abepezu kwezicaka zika‐Hadarezere, wawazisa e‐Yerusaleme." 
1Chronicles18:8 Waye u‐Davide kanjalo wayisusa e‐Tibehati, nase‐Kune, izixeko zika‐Hadarezere, ixina, into eninzi kakulu, owati u‐Solomone wenza ngayo ulwandle lwexina, nentsika, nempahla zexina." 
1Chronicles18:9 Kekaloku kwakuviwa ngu‐Tohu ukumkani we‐Hamati, ukuba u‐Davide ubetile wonke umkosi ka‐Hadarezere ukumkani we‐Tsoba," 
1Chronicles18:10 wandula wamtuma u‐Hadorame unyana wake ukuya kukumkani u‐Davide, ukumbulisa, nokumtamsanqelisa, ngenxa yokuba ebelwile ngakuye u‐Hadarezere wambeta; (ngokuba u‐Hadarezere ebenzile imfazwe no‐Tohu;) watuma nempahla zonke zegolide, nezesilivere, nezexina." 
1Chronicles18:11 Ezi nazo ukumkani u‐Davide wazenza ngcwele kuyehova, kunye nesilivere negolide abezisusile kuzo zonke intlanga: kuwo ama‐Edome, nakuwo ama‐Mowabi, nakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, nakuwo ama‐Filistiya, nakuwo ama‐Amaleki." 
1Chronicles18:12 Kanjako u‐Abishai unyana ka‐Tseruya wabulala ama‐Edome emhlanjeni we‐Tyuwa, amawaka alishumi elinesibozo." 
1Chronicles18:13 Waza wazibeka ilali e‐Edome; ada onke ama‐Edome aba ngabakonzi ku‐Davide. Kwa njalo uyehova wamnceda u‐Davide apo kusukuba ebesiya kona. 
1Chronicles18:14 Waye u‐Davide wapata ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke, wenzela bonke abantu bake ubugwebo nobulungisa." 
1Chronicles18:15 Kekaloku u‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya ebepezu kwomkosi; no‐Yehoshafate unyana ka‐Ahilude ebengumkumbuzi; 
1Chronicles18:16 kanjako u‐Tsadoki unyana ka‐Ahitube, no‐Abimeleki unyana ka‐Abiyatare, bebengabaperisite; no‐Shavisha ebengumba̔li;" 
1Chronicles18:17 no‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada ebepezu kwaba‐Kereti naba‐Peleti; nonyana baka‐Davide bebengabokuqala ngasesandleni sokumkani. 
1Chronicles19:1 KWAYE kute emveni kwoku, ukuba u‐Nahashe ukumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni wabuba; waza unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Chronicles19:2 Wandula wati u‐Davide: Ndiya kwenza ububele ku‐Hanune unyana ka‐Nahashe, ngokuba uyise ebesenza ububele kum. Waza u‐Davide wasusa izigidimi ukuya kumku̔za ngaye uyise wake. Zada zafika izicaka zika‐Davide elizweni losapo luka‐Hamoni ku‐Hanune, ukuza kumku̔za." 
1Chronicles19:3 Koko inkosana zosapo luka‐Hamoni zati ku‐Hanune: u‐Davide uyambeka na uyihlo emehlweni ako, ngokuba ebatumele kuwe abaku̔zi? akungenxa yokuba kupengululwe, kucitwe, kuhlolwe ilizwe, ukuba izicaka zake zifikile kuwe kusinina?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Ngako u‐Hanune watabata izicaka zika‐Davide, waziguya, wazitsheca izivato zazo ngokuziqingatisa ematangeni, wazindulula." 
1Chronicles19:5 Baza baya abatile bamxelela u‐Davide ngalamadoda. Wandula watuma ukuwakaulela: ngokuba amadoda lawo ebehlazisiwe kakulu. Wayesiti ukumkani: Hlalani e‐Jeriko, zide zikule indevu zenu, nandule nibuye." 
1Chronicles19:6 Kekaloku lwakubona usapo luka‐Hamoni ukuba lunukele u‐Davide, wandula watuma u‐Hanune nosapo luka‐Hamoni iwaka letalente zesilivere, kuze kubaqeshelwe inqwelwana nabakweli bamahashe e‐Mesopotami, nase‐Siriya‐mahaka, nase‐Tsoba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Baza baziqeshela inqwelwana zamawaka angama‐shumi matatu anamabini, nokumkani we‐Mahaka nabantu bake, abezayo bati waca pambi kwe‐Medeba: kanjalo usapo luka‐Hamoni lwazihlanganisa luvela ezixekweni zalo, lweza ukulwa." 
1Chronicles19:8 Wati u‐Davide akuva oku, watuma u‐Jowabi nawo wonke umkosi wamagoṙa." 
1Chronicles19:9 Lwaza lwapuma usapo luka‐Hamoni lwacwangcisela ukulwa ngasesangweni lesixeko; kodwa okumkani abebezile bebebodwa ngasendle. 
1Chronicles19:10 Wati u‐Jowabi, akubona ukuba ubuso bokulwa bungakuye, ngapambili nangasemva, wanyula abantu kubo bonke abanyuliweyo bakwa‐Sirayeli, wabacwangcisa ngakuwo ama‐Siriya:" 
1Chronicles19:11 nesisalela sabantu wabanikela esandleni sika‐Abishai umninawe wake, ababecwangciswa ngakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni." 
1Chronicles19:12 Wayesiti: Ukuba ama‐Siriya anamandla pezu kwam, woza ukunceda mna; kodwa ukuba usapo luka‐Hamoni lunamandla pezu kwako, sendiya kunceda wena." 
1Chronicles19:13 Yomelela, sizomelezele abantu betu nezixeko zotixo wetu; noyehova makenze okulungileyo emehlweni ake." 
1Chronicles19:14 Waza wasondela u‐Jowabi, nabantu abebenaye, ebusweni bama‐Siriya, kuze kuliwe; ada esaba pambi kwake." 
1Chronicles19:15 Lwati lwakubona usapo luka‐Hamoni ukuba ama‐Siriya esabile, lwesaba nalo pambi kwo‐Abishai umninawe wake, lwangena esixekweni. Wandula u‐Jowabi weza e‐Yerusaleme." 
1Chronicles19:16 Xeshekweni ama‐Siriya abebona ukuba oyisiwe pambi kwama‐Sirayeli, andula atuma izigidimi, apumisa ama‐Siriya abepesheya kwomlambo; wati u‐Shofaki, inkosi yempi ka‐Hadarezere, waya pambi kwawo." 
1Chronicles19:17 Kwati kwakuxelwa ku‐Davide, wahlanganisa onke ama‐Sirayeli, wawela i‐Yoredane, weza pezu kwawo, wacwangcisa ngakuwo. Xeshekweni u‐Davide abecwangcisile ngakuwo ama‐Siriya, aza alwa naye." 
1Chronicles19:18 Kodwa ama‐Siriya esaba pambi kwama‐Sirayeli; waza u‐Davide wabulala kuwo ama‐Siriya amadoda enqwelwana ezingamawaka asixe̔nxe, namadoda ahambayo ngenyawo angamawaka amashumi mane; wamfisa no‐Shofaki inkosi yempi." 
1Chronicles19:19 Zati zakubona izicaka zika‐Hadarezere ukuba zoyisiwe pambi kwama‐Sirayeli, zenza uxolo no‐Davide, zamkonza: aye ama‐Siriya ebengavumi ukunceda usapo luka‐Hamoni kanjako." 
1Chronicles20:1 KWABEKUTE ekutwaseni kwomnyaka, ngexesha lokupuma kwabo okumkani, wandula u‐Jowabi wapuma nempi yokulwa, watshabalalisa ilizwe losapo luka‐Hamoni, weza wavingcela i‐Raba. Kodwa u‐Davide wasala e‐Yerusaleme. Waza u‐Jowabi wabeta i‐Raba, wayicita." 
1Chronicles20:2 Waye u‐Davide wasusa isitsaba sokumkani walo entlokweni yake, wasifumana siyitalente yegolide ukuba nzima kwaso, sinamatye anqabileyo kuso; saye sibekwa pezu kwentloko ka‐Davide: namaxoba esixeko wawapumisa ngento eninzi kakulu:" 
1Chronicles20:3 nabantu abebekuso wabapumisa, wabasika ngesaṙa, nangezibulo zesincete, nangamazembe: wenje njalo ke u‐Davide kuzo zonke izixeko zosapo luka‐Hamoni. Waza u‐Davide wabuyela e‐Yerusaleme, nabo bonke abantu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Kwaye kute emveni kwoko, kwesuka ukulwa e‐Gezere ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya: okuya u‐Sibekai, um‐Husha, wambulala u‐Sipai, owenzalo ka‐Rafa; aza atotyiswa ke." 
1Chronicles20:5 Kwabuya kwabako ukulwa nama‐Filistiya: waza u‐Lehanane, unyana ka‐Yahire, wambulala u‐Lami umzalwana ka‐Goliyate um‐Gate, oluti lwentshuntshe belunjengomti wabaluki." 
1Chronicles20:6 Kwabuya kwabako ukulwa e‐Gate: kwaye kuko kona indoda ende, ineminwe namazwane ayo ngesitandatu nangesitandatu, amashumi mabini anesine; kwa yona ibizalelwe kuma‐Rafa nayo." 
1Chronicles20:7 Xeshekweni ibigxeka o‐Sirayeli, wandula u‐Jonatane, unyana ka‐Shimeha umzalwana ka‐Davide, wayibulala." 
1Chronicles20:8 Aba bazalelwa kuma‐Rafa e‐Gate, bawa ngesandla sika‐Davide, nangesandla sezicaka zake." 
1Chronicles21:1 WAZA wapakama u‐Satane ngakubo o‐Sirayeli, wamvusa u‐Davide ukuba abale abantu." 
1Chronicles21:2 Wayesiti u‐Davide ku‐Jowabi, nakwinkosi zabantu: Hambani, niye nibale o‐Sirayeli, kwa se‐Beresheba kude kube se‐Dane, nilizise inani labo kum, ukuba ndilazi." 
1Chronicles21:3 Waza wati u‐Jowabi: Makongeze uyehova ebantwini bake, inani elinjengokuba bengaka kube ngamaxesha alikulu! pofu, nkosi yam, kumkani! asi ngabo abazizicaka zenkosi yam bonke na? kunganina ukuba ifuna lento inkosi yam? kunganina ukuba ibenzele o‐Sirayeli ityala?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kodwa ilizwi lokumkani belinamandla pezu kwelika‐Jowabi. Ngako wapuma u‐Jowabi, wacanda kuyo yonke i‐Sirayeli, wada weza e‐Yerusaleme." 
1Chronicles21:5 Waza u‐Jowabi wanika inani lokubalwa kwabantu ku‐Davide: kekaloku o‐Sirayeli bonke bebengamadoda angamawaka aliwaka, anamawaka alikulu ngapandle, aber̔ola iṙele; no‐Juda bebengamadoda angamawaka angamakulu mane anamashumi asixe̔nxe, aber̔ola iṙele." 
1Chronicles21:6 Kodwa o‐Levi no‐Benjamine akababala pakati kwabo: ngokuba ilizwi lokumkani belitiyeka ku‐Jowabi. 
1Chronicles21:7 Lendawo ibikohlakele emehlweni katixo; ngako wabeta o‐Sirayeli. 
1Chronicles21:8 Waza wati u‐Davide kutixo: Ndonile kakulu, ukuba ndiyenzile lento; kodwa kaloku, zukwelelise inkohlakalo yesicaka sako, ngokuba ndenzile ngobudenge kakulu." 
1Chronicles21:9 Wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Gadi, umboni ka‐Davide, esiti:" 
1Chronicles21:10 Hamba, uye utete ku‐Davide, usiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Izinto ezintatu ndiyazaneka pambi kwako; zinyulele ibe nye kuzo, ukuba ndiyenze kuwe." 
1Chronicles21:11 Wasuka weza u‐Gadi ku‐Davide, wati kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ziqashele ke:" 
1Chronicles21:12 ibe yiminyaka mitatu yendlala na? umhlaumbi zibe zinyanga ezintatu zokubujiswa na pambi kwentshaba zako, nxa iṙele lentshaba zako likufumanayo? umhlaumbi ibe yimihla mitatu ekuya kubako iṙele likayehova, kwa isifo esibubisayo, elizweni, nengelosi kayehova itshabalalisa kuyo yonke imida yakwa‐Sirayeli kusinina? Ngako kaloku, gqala lelinina ilizwi endiya kulibuyisela konditumileyo." 
1Chronicles21:13 Waza u‐Davide wati ku‐Gadi: Ndixakekile kakulu; makendiwe esandleni sikayehova, ngokuba izibele zake zininzi kakulu; mandingawi esandleni sabantu." 
1Chronicles21:14 Ngako uyehova watuma isifo esibubisayo kwa‐Sirayeli; aza awa ko‐Sirayeli amadoda angamawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe. 
1Chronicles21:15 Waye utixo wasusa ingelosi ukuya e‐Yerusaleme ukuba iyitshabalalise: kekaloku nxa ibisatshabalalisa yona, wakangela uyehova, waba nosizi pezu kwobubi obo, wati kuyo ingelosi ebitshabalalisa: Kwanele: yekisa kaloku isandla sako. Yati ingelosi kayehova yema ngasesibayeni sokubula sika‐Orenane um‐Yebusi." 
1Chronicles21:16 Waza u‐Davide wapakamisa amehlo ake, wabona ingelosi kayehova imi pakati kwomhlaba nezulu, inalo iṙele elir̔oliweyo esandleni sayo lolukile pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme. Kwandula kwawa u‐Davide, nabadala begujungelwe ngentlakantlaka, ngobuso babo." 
1Chronicles21:17 Wayesiti u‐Davide kutixo: Asi ndim na owati makubalwe abantu? ndim onguye owonileyo nowenzi̔leyo ngokukohlakeleyo kakulu; kodwa igusha ezi, yinto nina ziyenzileyo? Yehova, Tixo wam! isandla sako makesibe ngakum, nangakuyo indlu kabawo, singabi ngakubo abantu bako sibe sisibulalo." 
1Chronicles21:18 Yandula ingelosi kayehova yamxelela u‐Gadi ukuti ku‐Davide, ukuba enyuke u‐Davide, amisele uyehova isibingelo esibayeni sokubula sika‐Orenane um‐Yebusi." 
1Chronicles21:19 Waza wenyuka u‐Davide ngelizwi lika‐Gadi, owabelitetile egameni likayehova." 
1Chronicles21:20 Wati akujika u‐Orenane, wabona ingelosi; bati onyana bake bobane, abebenaye, bazimela: kekaloku u‐Orenane ebebula inqolowa." 
1Chronicles21:21 Nxa u‐Davide abesiza ku‐Orenane, wakangela u‐Orenane wambona u‐Davide, wapuma esibayeni sokubula, wazitoba pambi kwo‐Davide ngobuso ngasemhlabeni." 
1Chronicles21:22 Wayesiti u‐Davide ku‐Orenane: Ndinike indawo yesibaya sokubula, ukuba ndakele uyehova isibingelo kuyo; ngenxa yemali ezalisekileyo woyinika kum; ukuze kunqamke esisibulalo ebantwini." 
1Chronicles21:23 Waza wati u‐Orenane ku‐Davide: Yitabatele kuwe, ize yenze inkosi yam ukumkani okulungileyo emehlweni ayo: kangela, ndiyanika inkabi zibe ngamadini okutshiswa, nenqwelwana zokubula zibe zinkuni, nenqolowa ibe ngumnikelo wokutya; konke ndiyakunika." 
1Chronicles21:24 Kodwa ukumkani u‐Davide wati ku‐Orenane: Hai; koko ndiya kuyitenga ngenyaniso ngemali ezalisekileyo: ngokuba ndingayi kutabatela uyehova okukokwako, ndiwanikele amadini okutshiswa angamelwanga nto." 
1Chronicles21:25 Kwa njalo u‐Davide wamnika u‐Orenane ngenxa yalondawo ishekele zegolide zamakulu matandatu ngesilinganiswa. 
1Chronicles21:26 Waza u‐Davide wakela kona isibingelo kuyehova, wanikela amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yoxolo, wabiza kuyehova, owampendula ngomlilo uvela ezulwini pezu kwesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa." 
1Chronicles21:27 Waye uyehova kanjalo waxelela ingelosi, yaza yabuya yafaka iṙele layo esinxobeni salo." 
1Chronicles21:28 Kwa ngeloxesha, akubona u‐Davide ukuba uyehova ebempendule esibayeni sokubula sika‐Orenane um‐Yebusi, wandula wabingelela kona." 
1Chronicles21:29 Ngokuba itabanakele kayehova, owayenzayo u‐Mosesi entlango, nesibingelo sedini lokutshiswa, ngexesha elo, bezisendaweni epakamileyo e‐Gibeyone." 
1Chronicles21:30 Kodwa wakohlwa u‐Davide ukuya pambi kwayo, ukuze afune utixo; ngokuba ebenokwoyika ngenxa yeṙele lengelosi kayehova." 
1Chronicles22:1 Waza wati u‐Davide: Yiyo le indlu kayehova ongutixo, siso esi isibingelo sedini lokutshiswa ko‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles22:2 KEKALOKU waxela u‐Davide ukuba kuhlanganiswe bonke abasemzini abaselizweni lakwa‐Sirayeli; waza wamisa ababazi ukuba babaze amatye aqandulweyo, kuze kwakiwe indlu katixo." 
1Chronicles22:3 Walungisa u‐Davide nesincete, ngento eninzi, sibe sesezikonkwane zengcango zamasango, nesezibandakanyiso; nexina, ngento eninzi, engenakulinganiswa;" 
1Chronicles22:4 nemiti yesedare engenakubalwa: ngokuba ama‐Tsidone nama‐Tire ebezisile into eninzi yemiti yesedare ku‐Davide. 
1Chronicles22:5 Wayesiti u‐Davide: u‐Solomone unyana wam ungumfana, utambile; kanti indlu eya kwakelwa uyehova iya kwenziwa nkulu ngento egqitiseleyo, ibe nodumo nobungcwalisa kuwo onke amazwe; ndiya kumlungisela ke. Kwa njalo u‐Davide walungisa ngento eninzi engekafi." 
1Chronicles22:6 Waza wambiza u‐Solomone unyana wake, wamyalela ukuba akele uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, indlu." 
1Chronicles22:7 Wayesiti u‐Davide ku‐Solomone: Nyana wam! mna ke, bekusentliziyweni yam ukwakela igama likayehova, utixo wam, indlu:" 
1Chronicles22:8 kodwa ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti: Igazi ulipalazile ngokuninzi, nemfazwe ezinkulu uzenzile; akuyi kwakela igama lam indlu, ngokuba igazi elininzi ulipalazile emhlabeni ebusweni bam." 
1Chronicles22:9 Bona ke, uya kuzalelwa unyana, oya kuba yindoda yokupumla; ndandiya kumnika ukupumla kuzo zonke intshaba zake ezingqongayo: ngokuba igama lake liya kuba ngu‐Solomone, ndandiya kunika uxolo nokwonwaba ko‐Sirayeli emihleni yake." 
1Chronicles22:10 Nguye oya kwakela igama lam indlu; yena woba ngunyana kum, nam ndoba nguyise kuye; ndandiya kuqinisa iterone yobukumkani bake pezu kwo‐Sirayeli kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Chronicles22:11 Kaloku, nyana wam! wanga uyehova angaba nawe; uze utamsanqeleke, wake indlu kayehova, utixo wako, njengoko akutetileyo ngawe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Makati kodwa uyehova akunike ubulumko nokuqonda, akumise pezu kwo‐Sirayeli; uze uwugcine umteto kayehova, utixo wako." 
1Chronicles22:13 Oko uya kutamsanqeleka, nxa ulumkela ukwenza izimiselo nezigwebo, owati uyehova wamyalela u‐Mosesi ngazo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli: yomelela, ukalipe; ungoyiki, ungatuswa nokutuswa." 
1Chronicles22:14 Bona ke, ebunzimeni bam, ndilungisele indlu kayehova italente zegolide ezingamawaka alikulu, netalente zesilivere ezingamawaka aliwaka; nexina nesincete ngento engenakulinganiswa, ngokuba zizonke ezonto: ndilungisile nemiti namatye; ungati wena wongezelele kuzo." 
1Chronicles22:15 Kanjako bako nawe abasebenzi ngobuninzi, ababazi, nencibi zamatye, nezemiti, nabo bonke abalumkileyo emisebenzini yonke." 
1Chronicles22:16 Igolide, isilivere, nexina, nesincete, azinakubalwa: suka, wenze, aze ange angaba nawe uyehova." 
1Chronicles22:17 Kanjako u‐Davide wayalela zonke inkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli ukuba zimncede u‐Solomone unyana wake, esiti:" 
1Chronicles22:18 Uyehova, utixo wenu, akanani na? akanipumzanga ngamacala onke na? ngokuba abemi belizwe ebanikile esandleni sam; kanjalo ilizwe loyisiwe pambi kwoyehova, napambi kwabantu bake." 
1Chronicles22:19 Kaloku bekisani intliziyo yenu nompefumlo wenu ukumfuna uyehova, utixo wenu, nize nisuke, niyake indawo eyingcwele kayehova ongutixo, kuze kuziswe ityeya yocebano lukayehova, nempahla ezingcwele zikatixo, kulondlu eya kwakelwa igama likayehova." 
1Chronicles23:1 WATI u‐Davide, nxa abemdala, ekolisile ukuba nemihla, wamenza u‐Solomone unyana wake ukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles23:2 WAZA wahlanganisa zonke inkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli, nabaperisite, naba‐Levi." 
1Chronicles23:3 Kekaloku aba‐Levi bebebalwa abaminyaka imashumi matatu nabapezulu ubudala babo; nenani labo, ngabanye ngabanye, ngamadoda ngamadoda, belingamawaka angamashumi matatu anesibozo." 
1Chronicles23:4 Kubo aba, amawaka angamashumi mabini anamane ongama umsebenzi wendlu kayehova; namawaka matandatu ebengamagosa nabagwebi:" 
1Chronicles23:5 kanjalo amawaka mane ebengabalindimnyango; namawaka akwa mane amdumisa uyehova ngeziculiso endizenzileyo, watsho u‐Davide, kuze kudunyiswe." 
1Chronicles23:6 Kanjalo u‐Davide wabahlulahlula ezahlulweni, ngabo onyana baka‐Levi, u‐Gereshone, n o‐Kohati, no‐Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Abama‐Gereshone: ngu‐Lahadane, no‐Shimehi." 
1Chronicles23:8 Onyana baka‐Lahadane: ngu‐Yehili owokuqala, no‐Zetame, no‐Joweli, abatatu." 
1Chronicles23:9 Onyana baka‐Shimehi: ngu‐Shelomiti, no‐Haziyeli, no‐Harane, abatatu. Aba bebezintloko zendlu zoyise zika‐Lahadane." 
1Chronicles23:10 Nonyana baka‐Shimehi: ngu‐Yahati, no‐Zina, no‐Yehushe, no‐Beriha: aba bebengonyana baka‐Shimehi, abane," 
1Chronicles23:11 u‐Yahati ebengowokuqala, no‐Ziza ebengowesibini: kodwa u‐Yehushe no‐Beriha bebengenonyana abaninzi bona; ngako bebeyindlu yoyise ngokubalwa kunye." 
1Chronicles23:12 Onyana baka‐Kohati: ngu‐Hamerame, n o‐Yitsare, n o‐Hebrone, no‐Huziyeli, abane." 
1Chronicles23:13 Onyana baka‐Hamerame: ngu‐Arone, no‐Mosesi. Waye u‐Arone ebesahlulelwa ukungcwalisa izinto ezingcwele kakulu, yena nonyana bake, kude kube ngunapakade, ukuqumisa pambi kwoyehova, ukumkonza, nokutamsanqelisa ngegama lake, kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Chronicles23:14 No‐Mosesi, indoda katixo, onyana bake bebebizwa pakati kwesizwe sika‐Levi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Onyana baka‐Mosesi: ngu‐Gereshome, no‐Eliyezeri." 
1Chronicles23:16 Onyana baka‐Gereshome: u‐Shebuweli ebengoyintloko. 
1Chronicles23:17 Onyana baka‐Eliyezeri bebe ngaba: u‐Rehabiya ebengoyintloko. Wayengenabanye onyana u‐Eleyezeri; kodwa onyana baka‐Rehabiya baba baninzi kunene. 
1Chronicles23:18 Onyana baka‐Yitsare: u‐Shelomiti ebengoyintloko. 
1Chronicles23:19 Onyana baka‐Hebrone: u‐Jeriya ebengowokuqala, u‐Amariya ebengowesibini, u‐Yahaziyeli ebengowesitatu, no‐Yekamame ebengowesine." 
1Chronicles23:20 Onyana baka‐Huziyeli: u‐Mika ebengowokuqala, no‐Yishiya ebengowesibini." 
1Chronicles23:21 Onyana baka‐Merari: ngu‐Mahali, no‐Mushi. Onyana baka‐Mahali: ngu‐Elezari, no‐Kishe." 
1Chronicles23:22 Wafa u‐Elezari, obengenabo onyana, wanazo intombi kupela; baza onyana baka‐Kishe, abazalwana bazo, bazizeka." 
1Chronicles23:23 Onyana baka‐Mushi: ngu‐Mahali, no‐Hedere, no‐Jeremote, abatatu." 
1Chronicles23:24 Aba bangonyana baka‐Levi, ngendlu zoyise zabo; abazintloko zendlu zoyise, ngokubalwa kwabo enanini lamagama ngabanye ngabanye, abawenzayo umsebenzi wenkonzo yayo indlu kayehova, beyiminyaka imashumi mabini napezulu ubudala babo." 
1Chronicles23:25 Ngokuba ebete u‐Davide: Uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ubapumzile abantu bake, waeya kuhlala e‐Yerusaleme kude kube ngunapakade:" 
1Chronicles23:26 nakanjako ngaba‐Levi: Mabangabi senokutwala itabanakele, nazo zonke impahla zayo ezizezenkonzo yayo." 
1Chronicles23:27 Ngokuba ngawokupela amazwi ka‐Davide bebebalwa aba‐Levi, abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo:" 
1Chronicles23:28 ngokuba indawo yokuma yabo ibingasesandleni sonyana baka‐Arone enkonzweni yendlu kayehova, babe pezu kwawo amabala, napezu kwazo inkambili, napezu kwokuhlanjululwa kwezinto zonke ezingcwele, nomsebenzi wenkonzo yayo indlu katixo;" 
1Chronicles23:29 kwa owezonka zokuṙozwa, nowomgubo ocolekileyo womnikelo wokudla, nowezonkana ezingenagwele, n owokwojiwayo elukambeni, nowokunyakanyisiweyo ngeoli, nowako konke ukulinganisa nangobuninzi nangobude;" 
1Chronicles23:30 nokuba beme imiso ngemiso ukumbulela nokumdumisa uyehova, nangokuhlwa kanjako;" 
1Chronicles23:31 nokuba banikele kuyehova onke amadini okutshiswa, ngemihla yesabata, ngenyanga ezitwasileyo, nangemitendeleko emisiweyo, ngenani, njengesiko elipezu kwabo, futi pambi kwake uyehova;" 
1Chronicles23:32 nokuba bagcine isigcinelo sentente yentlangano, nesigcinelo seyingcwele indawo, nesigcinelo sonyana baka‐Arone abazalwana babo, enkonzweni yendlu kayehova." 
1Chronicles24:1 NANGABO onyana baka‐Arone, izahlulo zabo. Onyana baka‐Arone: ngu‐Nadabi, no‐Abihu, n o‐Elezari, no‐Yitamare." 
1Chronicles24:2 Wafa kodwa u‐Nadabi, no‐Abihu, ngapambili kuyise wabo; baye bengenabo abantwana: ngako u‐Elezari no‐Yitamare bakonza ngobuperisite." 
1Chronicles24:3 Wabahlulahlula u‐Davide, no‐Tsadoki konyana baka‐Elezari, no‐Ahimeleki konyana baka‐Yitamare, ngobongama babo enkonzweni yabo." 
1Chronicles24:4 Kekaloku onyana baka‐Elezari bebefunyanwa benamadoda azintloko amaninzi kwawonyana baka‐Yitamare, nxa babahlulayo: pakati kwonyana baka‐Elezari bebelishumi elinesitandatu abazintloko zerdlu zoyise, napakati kwonyana baka‐Yitamare, ngendlu zoyise zabo, bebesibozo." 
1Chronicles24:5 Baza bahlulwa ngamaqashiso, aba kunye nabaya: ngokuba abapati beyingcwele indawo, nabapati bendlu katixo, bebengabonyana baka‐Elezari nabonyana baka‐Yitamare." 
1Chronicles24:6 Waye u‐Shemaya unyana ka‐Netaneli umba̔li, owaba‐Levi, wababa̔la pambi kwokumkani, nenkosi, no‐Tsadoki umperisite, no‐Ahimeleki unyana ka‐Abiyatare, nabazintloko zendlu zoyise pakati kwabaperisite napakati kwaba‐Levi: enye indlu yoyise yacatshulelwa u‐Elezari, nenye yacatshulelwa u‐Yitamare." 
1Chronicles24:7 Elokuqala iqashiso lapumela ku‐Yoyaribe, elesibini ku‐Yedaya," 
1Chronicles24:8 elesitatu ku‐Harime, elesine ku‐Sehorime," 
1Chronicles24:9 elesihlanu ku‐Malekiya, elesitandatu ku‐Miyamine," 
1Chronicles24:10 elesixe̔nxe ku‐Hakotse, elesibozo ku‐Abiya," 
1Chronicles24:11 elesitoba ku‐Yoshuwa, eleshumi ku‐Shekaniya," 
1Chronicles24:12 eleshumi linesinye ku‐Eliyashibe, eleshumi linesibini ku‐Yakime," 
1Chronicles24:13 eleshumi linesitatu ku‐Hupa, eleshumi linesine ku‐Yeshebabi," 
1Chronicles24:14 eleshumi linesihlanu ku‐Bilega, eleshumi linesitandatu ku‐Yimeri," 
1Chronicles24:15 eleshumi linesixe̔nxe ku‐Hezire, eleshumi linesibozo ku‐Hapitsetse," 
1Chronicles24:16 eleshumi linetoba ku‐Petahiya, elamashumi mabini ku‐Hezekile," 
1Chronicles24:17 elamashumi mabini enesinye ku‐Yakine, elamashumi mabini enesibini ku‐Gamule," 
1Chronicles24:18 elamashumi mabini enesitatu ku‐Delaya, elamashumi mabini enesine ku‐Mahaziya." 
1Chronicles24:19 Aba ubongama babo enkonzweni yabo bebubobokuba beze endlwini kayehova njengesiko labo, ngesimiselo sika‐Arone uyise wabo, njengokuba ebemyalele uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles24:20 Nabonyana baka‐Levi abaseleyo: abonyana baka‐Hamerame; ngu‐Shubaweli: abonyana baka‐Shubaweli; ngu‐Jedeya. 
1Chronicles24:21 Abaka‐Rehabiya: abonyana baka‐Rehabiya; oyintloko ngu‐Yishiya. 
1Chronicles24:22 Abama‐Yitsare; ngu‐Shelomote: abonyana baka‐Shelomote; ngu‐Yahati. 
1Chronicles24:23 Nonyana baka‐Hebrone: u‐Jeriya ebengowokuqala, u‐Amariya ebengowesibini, u‐Yahaziyeli ebengowesitatu, u‐Yekamame ebengowesine." 
1Chronicles24:24 Onyana baka‐Huziyeli; ngu‐Mika; abonyana baka‐Mika; ngu‐Shamire. 
1Chronicles24:25 Umninawe ka‐Mika ebengu‐Yishiya: abonyana baka‐Yishiya; ngu‐Zekariya. 
1Chronicles24:26 Onyana baka‐Merari; ngu‐Mahali, no‐Mushi. Onyana baka‐Yaziya; ngu‐Beno." 
1Chronicles24:27 Onyana baka‐Merari ngo‐Yaziya; ngu‐Beno, no‐Shohame, no‐Zakure, no‐Hiberi." 
1Chronicles24:28 Oka‐Mahali ebengu‐Elezari, obengenabo onyana." 
1Chronicles24:29 Abaka‐Kishe: onyana baka‐Kishe; ngu‐Jeramele. 
1Chronicles24:30 Nonyana baka‐Mushi: ngu‐Mahali, no‐Hedere, no‐Jerimote. Aba bebengonyana baba‐Levi, ngendlu zoyise zabo." 
1Chronicles24:31 Bawawisa amaqashiso nabo, kwa njengabo nabazalwana babo onyana baka‐Arone, ebusweni buka‐Davide ukumkani, no‐Tsadoki, no‐Ahimeleki, nabazintloko zendlu zoyise pakati kwabaperisite napakati kwaba‐Levi, abazintloko zendlu zoyise kwa kunye nabaninawe babo." 
1Chronicles25:1 KANJAKO u‐Davide nenkosi zomkosi babahlulela enkonzweni onyana baka‐Safa, nabaka‐Hemani, nabaka‐Jedutune, abaya kuprofitesha ngehadi, na ngenebele, nangesimbali: nali inani lawo amadoda omsebenzi lowo ngenkonzo yawo:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Abonyana baka‐Safa: ngu‐Zakure, no‐Josefe, no‐Netaniya, no‐Asharela, onyana baka‐Safa, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Safa, owaprofiteshayo ngapantsi kwezandla zokumkani." 
1Chronicles25:3 Abaka‐Jedutune: onyana baka‐Jedutune; ngu‐Gedaliya, no‐Tseri, no‐Yisaya, no‐Shimehi, n o‐Hashabiya, no‐Matitiya, abatandatu, ngapantsi kwezandla zoyise wabo u‐Jedutune, owaprofitesha ngohadi ekumbuleleni nasekumdumiseni uyehova." 
1Chronicles25:4 Abaka‐Hemani: abonyana baka‐Hemani; ngu‐Bukiya, n o‐Mataniya, n o‐Huziyeli, n o‐Shebuweli, no‐Jerimote, n o‐Hananiya, n o‐Hanani, n o‐Eliyata, n o‐Gidelati, no‐Romamti‐hezere, n o‐Yoshebekasha n o‐Maloti, n o‐Hotire, n o‐Mahaziyote:" 
1Chronicles25:5 bonke aba bebengonyana baka‐Hemani, umboni wokumkani emazwini katixo, ukupakamisa ilizwi lopondo. Waye utixo ebemnikile u‐Hemani onyana balishumi linesine, nentombi zantatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Bonke aba bebengapantsi kwezandla zoyise babo ekuculeni endlwini kayehova, ngazo isimbali, n enebele, nehadi, ngenxa yenkonzo yendlu katixo, ngapantsi kwezandla zokumkani, n o‐Safa, no‐Jedutune, no‐Hemani." 
1Chronicles25:7 Nenani labo, kunye nabazalwana babo abebefundisiwe amaculo kayehova, bonke abebenokuqonda, belingamakulu mabini anamashumi asibozo anesibozo ngapandle." 
1Chronicles25:8 Kananjalo bawisa amaqashiso, umvaṙasho malungana nomvaṙasho, kwa nabancinane nabakulu, onokuqonda kunye nomfundi." 
1Chronicles25:9 Elokuqala iqashiso lapumela ku‐Safa, ku‐Josefe: elesibini ku‐Gedaliya; yena, nabazalwana bake, nonyana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:10 elesitatu ku‐Zakure; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:11 elesine ku‐Yitseri; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:12 elesihlanu ku‐Netaniya; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:13 elesitandatu ku‐Bukiya; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:14 elesixe̔nxe ku‐Yesharela; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:15 elesibozo ku‐Yisaya; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:16 elesitoba ku‐Mataniya; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:17 eleshumi ku‐Shimehi; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:18 eleshumi linesinye ku‐Hazareli; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:19 eleshumi linesibini ku‐Hashabiya; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:20 eleshumi linesitatu ku‐Shubaweli; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:21 eleshumi linesine ku‐Matitiya; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:22 eleshumi linesihlanu ku‐Jeremote; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:23 eleshumi linesitandatu ku‐Hananiya; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:24 eleshumi linesixe̔nxe ku‐Yoshebekasha; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:25 eleshumi linesibozo ku‐Hanani; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:26 eleshumi linetoba ku‐Maloti; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:27 elamashumi mabini ku‐Eliyata; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:28 elamashumi mabini anesinye ku‐Hotire; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:29 elamashumi mabini anesibini ku‐Gidelati; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:30 elamashumi mabini anesitatu ku‐Mahaziyote; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini:" 
1Chronicles25:31 elamashumi mabini anesine ku‐Romamti‐hezere; yena, n onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, bebelishumi elinesibini." 
1Chronicles26:1 NGAZO izahlulo zabalindimnyango: ngawo ama‐Kora: u‐Meshelemiya, unyana ka‐Kore, owakubo onyana baka‐Safa." 
1Chronicles26:2 Waye u‐Meshelemiya ebenabo onyana: u‐Zekariya ebengowamazibulo; u‐Yedaheli ebengowesibini; u‐Zebadiya ebengowesitatu; u‐Yateneli ebengowesine; 
1Chronicles26:3 u‐Helami ebengowesihlanu; u‐Jehohanane ebengowesitandatu; u‐Eliwenai ebengowesixe̔nxe. 
1Chronicles26:4 Kanjalo u‐Obedi‐edome ebenonyana: u‐Shemaya ebengowamazibulo; u‐Yehozabadi ebengowesibini; u‐Jowahi ebengowesitatu; no‐Sakare ebengowesine; no‐Netaneli ebengowesihlanu; 
1Chronicles26:5 u‐Hamiyeli ebengowesitandatu; u‐Yisakare ebengowesixe̔nxe; u‐Pehuletai ebengowesibozo: ngokuba utixo ebemtamsanqele. 
1Chronicles26:6 No‐Shemaya unyana wake bekumzalelwe onyana, abebenobukosi kwindlu yoyise wabo, ngokuba bebengamaṙoti akalipileyo bona." 
1Chronicles26:7 Onyana baka‐Shemaya: ngu‐Hoteni, no‐Refali, no‐Obedi, n o‐Lezabadi, obazalwana bebengamadoda akalipileyo, u‐Elihu, no‐Semakiya." 
1Chronicles26:8 Aba bonke bebengabakubo onyana baka‐Obedi‐edome; bona, nonyana babo, nabazalwana babo, amadoda akalipileyo enamandla enkonzweni; bebengamashumi matandatu anesibini abaka‐Obedi‐edome." 
1Chronicles26:9 Kekaloku u‐Meshelemiya ebenonyana nabazalwana, amadoda akalipileyo, ishumi elinesibozo." 
1Chronicles26:10 No‐Hosa, owakubo onyana baka‐Merari, ebenabo onyana: ngu‐Shimri oyintloko; (nakuba ebengenguye owamazibulo, uyise wammisela noko ukuba abe ngoyintloko;)" 
1Chronicles26:11 ngu‐Hilikiya owesibini; ngu‐Tebaliya owesitatu; ngu‐Zekariya owesine: bonke onyana nabazalwana baka‐Hosa bebelishumi elinesitatu. 
1Chronicles26:12 Zizo ezi izahlulo zabalindimnyango, amadoda azintloko, abalindi kwa kunye nabazalwana babo, kuze kukonzwe endlwini kayehova." 
1Chronicles26:13 Baye bewisa amaqashiso, kwa nabancinane nabakulu, ngendlu zoyise zabo, ngesango ngesango." 
1Chronicles26:14 Lati iqashiso lasempumalanga lawa ku‐Shelemiya. Kanjalo u‐Zekariya unyana wake, umcebisi olumkileyo, bamwisela amaqashiso; laza lapuma iqashiso lake ngasenode." 
1Chronicles26:15 Elika‐Obedi‐edome lapuma ngasesuyide; elonyana bake lapumela indlu ye‐Apusime. 
1Chronicles26:16 U‐Shupime no‐Hosa labapumela ngasentshonalanga, kunye nesango le‐Shalekete, ngasendleleni epakamileyo yokunyuka, umvaṙasho malungana nomvaṙasho." 
1Chronicles26:17 Ngasempumalanga bekuko aba‐Levi abatandatu; ngasenode bebebane imihla ngemihla; ngasesuyide bebebane imihla ngemihla; nangase‐Asupime bebengababini ngababini. 
1Chronicles26:18 E‐Pabari ngasentshonalanga, bebebane ngasendleleni epakamileyo, n ababini e‐Pabari." 
1Chronicles26:19 Zezi izahlulo zabalindimnyango pakati kwonyana bama‐Kora napakati kwonyana baka‐Merari. 
1Chronicles26:20 Kekaloku aba‐Levi: u‐Ahiya ebepezu kwendyebo zendlu katixo napezu kwendyebo zezinto ezingcwele. 
1Chronicles26:21 Onyana baka‐Lahadane, onyana bom‐Gereshone, abaka‐Lahadane, intloko zendlu zoyise zika‐Ladane um‐Gereshone: u‐Yehili." 
1Chronicles26:22 Onyana baka‐Yehili: ngu‐Zetame, no‐Joweli umninawe wake; aba bebepezu kwendyebo zendlu kayehova." 
1Chronicles26:23 Kekaloku ama‐Hamerame, ama‐Yitsare, ama‐Hebrone, n ama‐Huziyeli:" 
1Chronicles26:24 u‐Shebuweli, unyana ka‐Gereshome, unyana ka‐Mosesi, ebengumpati pezu kwendyebo." 
1Chronicles26:25 Nabazalwana bake ngo‐Eliyezeri: u‐Rehabiya ebengunyana wake; u‐Yisaya ebengunyana wake; u‐Yorame ebengunyana wake; u‐Zikeri ebengunyana wake; u‐Shelomiti ebengunyana wake. 
1Chronicles26:26 U‐Shelomiti lowo nabazalwana bake bebepezu kwazo zonke indyebo zezinto ezingcwele, ezibe zenziwe ngcwele ngu‐Davide ukumkani, nabazintloko zendlu zoyise, nenkosi zamawaka nezamakulu, nenkosi zomkosi." 
1Chronicles26:27 (Kokwemfazwe nakokwamaxoba bekwenziwe ngcwele ngabo ukulungisa indlu kayehova.) 
1Chronicles26:28 Kanjalo konke wakwenza ngcwele u‐Samyali umboni, no‐Saule unyana ka‐Kishe, no‐Abenere unyana ka‐Nere, no‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya; konke okube kwenziwe ngcwele, bekupantsi kwesandla sika‐Shelomiti nabazalwana bake." 
1Chronicles26:29 Pakati kwama‐Yitsare, u‐Kenaniya nonyana bake bebepezu kwomsebenzi wapandle kwa‐Sirayeli, ukuba ngamagosa nabagwebi." 
1Chronicles26:30 Pakati kwama‐Hebrone, u‐Hashabiya nabazalwana bake, amadoda akalipileyo, iwaka linamakulu asixe̔nxe, bebepezu kwobongama bakwa‐Sirayeli nganeno kwe‐Yoredane ngasentshonalanga, ngawo wonke umsebenzi kayehova, nangayo inkonzo yokumkani." 
1Chronicles26:31 Pakati kwama‐Hebrone u‐Jeriya ebengoyintloko; (kekaloku ama‐Hebrone, ngezizukulwana zawo, ng endlu zoyise, ngomnyaka wamashumi mane wobukumkani buka‐Davide, afunwa ke, kwaza kwafunyanwa pakati kwawo, amaṙoti akalipileyo e‐Yahezere yase‐Gileyadi;)" 
1Chronicles26:32 nabazalwana bake, amadoda akalipileyo, bebengamawaka mabini anamakulu asixe̔nxe abazintloko zendlu zoyise; owati u‐Davide ukumkani wabenza abongama pezu kwama‐Rubene, nama‐Gadi, nesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase, ngazo zonke indawo zikatixo, nangendawo zokumkani." 
1Chronicles27:1 KEKALOKU usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngenani lalo, intloko zendlu zoyise, nenkosi zamawaka nezamakulu, namagosa alo abemkonza ukumkani ngazo zonke indawo zezahlulo, ezangena zapuma nokupuma inyanga ngenyanga, ngazo zonke inyanga zomnyaka: ezizahlulo amadoda esinye ngesinye ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:2 Pezu kwesahlulo sokuqala, ngenyanga yokuqala, ebengu‐Yashobame unyana ka‐Zabideli; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane:" 
1Chronicles27:3 yena ebengo wosapo luka‐Faretse, eyintloko pezu kwazo zonke inkosi zemikosi ngeyokuqala inyanga." 
1Chronicles27:4 Napezu kwesahlulo senyanga yesibini, ebengu‐Dodai um‐Ahoha; na pezu kwesahlulo sake wabengumpati no‐Mikelote; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:5 Eyesitatu inkosi yomkosi, ngenyanga yesitatu, ibingu‐Benaya unyana ka‐Yoyada, inene elikulu; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane:" 
1Chronicles27:6 u‐Benaya lo ebeligoṙa pakati kwabamashumi matatu, epezu kwabamashumi matatu kanjako; na pezu kwesahlulo sake wabengu‐Hamizabadi unyana wake." 
1Chronicles27:7 Eyesine, ngenyanga yesine, ibingu‐Hasaheli umninawe ka‐Jowabi, no‐Zebadiya unyana wake emva kwake; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:8 Eyesihlanu inkosi, ngenyanga yesihlanu, ibingu‐Shamehute um‐Yizera; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:9 Eyesitandatu, ngenyanga yesitandatu, ibingu‐Hira unyana ka‐Hikeshe, um‐Tekoha; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:10 Eyesixe̔nxe, ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe, ibingu‐Heletse um‐Peloni, owosapo luka‐Frayime; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:11 Eyesibozo, ngenyanga yesibozo, ibingu‐Sibekai um‐Husha, owama‐Zera; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:12 Eyesitoba, ngenyanga yesitoba, ibingu‐Abihezere um‐Hanatote, owama‐Benjamine; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:13 Eyeshumi, ngenyanga yeshumi, ibingu‐Maharai um‐Netofati, owama‐Zera; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:14 Eyeshumi linesinye, ngeyeshumi linesinye inyanga, ibingu‐Benaya um‐Piratone, owosapo luka‐Frayime; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:15 Eyeshumi linesibini, ngeyeshumi linesibini inyanga, ibingu‐Heledai um‐Netofati, owama‐Hotineli; nakuso isahlulo sake ebengamawaka angamashumi mabini anamane." 
1Chronicles27:16 Kanjalo pezu kwezizwe zo‐Sirayeli bebengaba: umpati wama‐Rubene ebengu‐Eliyezeri, unyana ka‐Zikeri; owama‐Simone ebengu‐Shefatiya, unyana ka‐Mahaka;" 
1Chronicles27:17 owaba‐Levi ebengu‐Hashabiya, unyana ka‐Kemuweli; owama‐Arone ebengu‐Tsadoki;" 
1Chronicles27:18 owama‐Juda ebengu‐Elihu, owabakuluwe baka‐Davide; owama‐Yisakare ebengu‐Omri, unyana ka‐Mikaheli;" 
1Chronicles27:19 owama‐Zebulone ebengu‐Yishemaya, unyana ka‐Hobadiya; owama‐Nefatali ebengu‐Jerimote, unyana ka‐Zariyeli;" 
1Chronicles27:20 owosapo luka‐Frayime ebengu‐Hosheha, unyana ka‐Hazaziya; owesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase ebengu‐Joweli, unyana ka‐Pedaya;" 
1Chronicles27:21 owesiqingata sesizwe sika‐Manase e‐Gileyadi ebengu‐Hido, unyana ka‐Zekariya: owama‐Benjamine ebengu‐Yahasiyeli, unyana ka‐Abenere;" 
1Chronicles27:22 owama‐Dane ebengu‐Hazareli, unyana ka‐Yerohame: aba ke bebezinkosi zezizwe zo‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles27:23 Kodwa inani labo abaminyaka imashumi mabini nangapantsi ubudala babo, akalibala u‐Davide: ngokuba ebete uyehova uya kwandisa o‐Sirayeli babe njengenkwenkwezi zezulu." 
1Chronicles27:24 U‐Jowabi unyana ka‐Tseruya waqala ukubala, kodwa akagqiba, ngokuba ngenxa yoku bekuko umsindo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli: ngako inani elo belingabekwa embalisweni yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani u‐Davide." 
1Chronicles27:25 Kekaloku pezu kwendyebo zokumkani, ebengu‐Hazamaveti unyana ka‐Hadiyeli; napezu kwendyebo ezisezindleni, nas ezixekweni, nasemizini, nasezinqatyeni, ebengu‐Jonatane unyana ka‐Huziya;" 
1Chronicles27:26 napezu kwabo basebenzayo emasimini ekulinyweni kwomhlaba, ebengu‐Hezeri unyana ka‐Kelube;" 
1Chronicles27:27 napezu kwemiyezo yemiti yeveyine, ebengu‐Shimehi um‐Rama; napezu kwokusemiyezweni yemiti yeveyine ngenxa yokubekelwa kweveyine, ebengu‐Zabedi um‐Shefame;" 
1Chronicles27:28 napezu kweminquma nemikiwane ebisezihlanjeni, ebengu‐Balihanane um‐Gedere; napezu kweoli ebekelweyo, ebengu‐Yohashe;" 
1Chronicles27:29 napezu kwenkomo ezadlayo e‐Sharone, ebengu‐Shiterai um‐Sharone; napezu kwenkomo ezibe zisemihlanjeni, ebengu‐Shafate unyana ka‐Hadelai:" 
1Chronicles27:30 napezu kwenkamela, ebengu‐Obili um‐Shimayeli; napezu kwamaqwaṙashe, ebengu‐Jedeya um‐Meronote;" 
1Chronicles27:31 napezu kwenkomo ezincinane, ebengu‐Yazizi um‐Hagare: bonke aba bebengabapati pezu kwempahla abenayo ukumkani u‐Davide." 
1Chronicles27:32 Kekaloku u‐Jonatane uyisekazi ka‐Davide ebengumpakati, obeyindoda enokuqonda nomba̔li; u‐Yehili unyana ka‐Hakemoni ebendawonye nonyana bokumkani;" 
1Chronicles27:33 u‐Ahitofele ebengumpakati wokumkani; u‐Hushai um‐Areki ebelikolwane lokumkani; 
1Chronicles27:34 nasemva kwo‐Ahitofele, ngu‐Yoyada unyana ka‐Benaya, no‐Abiyatare; nenkosi yomkosi kakumkani ebengu‐Jowabi." 
1Chronicles28:1 WANDULA u‐Davide wazihlanganisela e‐Yerusaleme zonke inkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli, inkosi zezizwe, nenkosi zezahlulo ezamkonzayo ukumkani, nenkosi zamawaka, nenkosi zamakulu, nabapati pezu kwayo yonke impahla nemfuyo yokumkani neyonyana bake, kunye nababusi, namagoṙa, nawo onke amadoda akalipileyo." 
1Chronicles28:2 Waza u‐Davide ukumkani wapakama pezu kwenyawo zake, wati: Ndipulapuleni, bazalwana bam, nabantu bam! Mna bekusentliziyweni yam ukwakela ityeya yocebano lukayehova, nesitulo senyawo zotixo wetu, indlu yokupumla, ndaye ndise ndilungisele ukwaka;" 
1Chronicles28:3 kodwa utixo wati kum: Akuyi kwakela igama lam indlu, ngokuba wena uyindoda yemfazwe, negazi ulipalazile." 
1Chronicles28:4 Noko, uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, wandinyula kuyo yonke indlu kabawo, ukuba ndibe ngukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli kude kube ngunapakade: ngokuba ebenyule u‐Juda abe yinkosi; napakati kwendlu ka‐Juda, wanyula indlu kabawo; napakati kwonyana bakabawo, wanditanda mna ukuba andenze ukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke;" 
1Chronicles28:5 nakubo bonke onyana bam, (ngokuba uyehova endipile onyana abaninzi,) umnyulile u‐Solomone unyana wam, ukuba ahlale pezu kweterone yobukumkani bukayehova pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles28:6 Wayesiti kum: u‐Solomone unyana wako, nguye oya kwaka indlu yam namabala am: ngokuba ndimnyulile yena abe ngunyana kum, nam ndiya kuba nguyise kuye:" 
1Chronicles28:7 kanjako ndobuqinisa ubukumkani bake kude kube ngunapakade; ukuba uya kwomelelela ukwenza imiyalelo yam nezigwebo zam njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje. 
1Chronicles28:8 Ngako kaloku, emehlweni o‐Sirayeli bonke, intlanganiso kayehova, nasezindlebeni zotixo wetu, gcinani nifune nokufuna yonke imiyalelo kayehova, utixo wenu; ukuze nilifuye elilizwe lilungileyo, nilishiyele abantwana benu emva kwenu libe lilifa kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Chronicles28:9 Nawe, Solomone, nyana wam! yazi ke utixo kayihlo, umkonze ngentliziyo ekolisekileyo, nangompefumlo ovumayo: ngokuba uyehova ebuza intliziyo zonke, nako konke ukucinga kwenkumbulo nyakuqonda: ukuba uyamfuna, wofunyanwa nguwe; kanti ukuba uyamshiya, wokulahla kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Chronicles28:10 Lumka kaloku; ngokuba uyehova ekunyulile ukuba uyake indlu ibe yindawo eyingcwele: yomelela, wenze ke." 
1Chronicles28:11 Waza u‐Davide wamnika u‐Solomone unyana wake umfanekiselo wentendelezo, nowezindlu zayo, nowendawo zokubekela zayo, nowenkambili zayo zapezulu, nowenkambili zayo zapakati, nowendawo yesihlalo sofefe;" 
1Chronicles28:12 nomfanekiselo wako konke abenako ngomoya, owamabala endlu kayehova, nowazo zonke inkambili ezingqongayo, owendawo zendyebo zendlu katixo, nowendawo zokubekela zezinto ezingcwele;" 
1Chronicles28:13 nowezahlulo zabaperisite nezaba‐Levi, nowawo wonke umsebenzi wenkonzo yayo indlu kayehova, nowazo zonke impahla zenkonzo yayo indlu kayehova." 
1Chronicles28:14 Wamnika igolide ngesilinganiswa ibe ye yezinto zegolide, ibe yeyempahla zonke zenkonzo ngenkonzo; nesilivere ibe yeyempahla zonke zesilivere ngesilinganiswa; ibe yeyempahla zonke zenkonzo ngenkonzo:" 
1Chronicles28:15 nesilinganiswa sekandelare zegolide nezibane zegolide zazo, ngesilinganiswa sekandelare ngekandelare nezibane zayo; nesekandelare zesilivere, ngesilinganiswa sekandelare nezibane zayo, njengenkonzo yekandelare ngekandelare:" 
1Chronicles28:16 negolide ngesilinganiswa ibe yeyetafile zezonka zokuṙozwa itafile ngetafile; nesilivere ibe yeyetafile zesilivere; 
1Chronicles28:17 negolide ecocekileyo ibe yeyeforoke, neyezitya zokufefela, neyendebe; n egolide ibe yeyebekile zegolide, ngesilinganiswa sebekile ngebekile; n esilivere ibe yeyebekile zesilivere, ngesilinganiswa sebekile ngebekile;" 
1Chronicles28:18 negolide ecokisiweyo ngesilinganiswa ibe yeyesibingelo sesiqumiso; negolide ibe yeyomfanekiselo wenqwelo yekerubime ezitwabululayo amapiko azo, zigubungela ityeya yocebano lukayehova." 
1Chronicles28:19 Oku konke, watsho u‐Davide, u ndi qondisile ngesiba̔lo sivela esandleni sikayehova pezu kwam, kwa yonke imisebenzi yalomfanekiselo." 
1Chronicles28:20 Wati u‐Davide kanjalo ku‐Solomone unyana wake: Yomelela, ukalipe, wenze ke; ungoyiki, ungatuswa nokutuswa: ngokuba uyehova ongutixo, utixo wam, enawe; akayi kukuncama, akayi kukushiya, ude ugqibe wonke umsebenzi wenkonzo yayo indlu kayehova." 
1Chronicles28:21 Bona ke, kuko izahlulo zabaperisite nezaba‐Levi, ngenxa yayo yonke inkonzo yendlu katixo; nakunye nawe, kuyo yonke imisebenzi, kuko bonke abalungile ngobulumko, ngenxa yentlobo zonke zenkonzo: kanjako inkosi nabo bonke abantu bopulapula onke amazwi ako." 
1Chronicles29:1 Walekela wati u‐Davide ukumkani kuyo yonke intlanganiso: u‐Solomone unyana wam, okupela kwonyuliweyo ngutixo, ungumfana, utambile; kanti umsebenzi umkulu: ngokuba itempile le asi yeyabantu, ye kayehova ongutixo." 
1Chronicles29:2 Mna ke, ngawo onke amandla am, sendilungisele indlu katixo wam igolide ibe yeyokwegolide, nesilivere ibe yeyokwesilivere, nexina ibe yeyokwexina, isincete sibe sesokwesincete, nemiti ibe yeyokwemiti; amatye esadonutse, n amatye okufakwa, amatye abengezelayo, nawamabala ngamabala, namatye onke anqabileyo, namatye amhlope ngento eninzi." 
1Chronicles29:3 Nakanjako, ngokutanda kwam indlu katixo wam, kuko kum indyebo, igolide nesilivere, e ndiyinikele indlu katixo wam, ngapezu nangapandle kwako konke ndikulungisele indlu eyingcwele:" 
1Chronicles29:4 amawaka matatu etalente zegolide, kwigolide yase‐Ofire, namawaka asixe̔nxe etalente zesilivere ecokisiweyo, ukuze kwalekwe indonga zezindlu;" 
1Chronicles29:5 igolide ibe yeyokwegolide, nesilivere ibe yeyokwesilivere, neyemisebenzi yonke eya kwenziwa ngezandla zencibi. Ngubanina ke ovumayo ukuzalisa isandla sake namhla kuye uyehova?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Zaza zanika ngokuvuma inkosi zendlu zoyise, nenkosi zezizwe zo‐Sirayeli, nenkosi zamawaka nezamakulu, kwa nenkosi zomsebenzi wokumkani;" 
1Chronicles29:7 zaye zinikela inkonzo yendlu katixo italente zegolide ezimawaka mahlanu, nedarike ezimawaka alishumi ngapandle, netalente zesilivere ezimawaka alishumi, netalente zexina ezimawaka alishumi linesibozo, netalente zesincete ezimawaka alikulu." 
1Chronicles29:8 Kanjalo abo bekufunyanwa kubo amatye anqabileyo, bawanika endyetyeni yendlu kayehova, ngesandla sika‐Yehili um‐Gereshone." 
1Chronicles29:9 Baza bavuya abantu pezu kwokunika kwabo ngokuvuma, ngokuba bekungentliziyo ekolisekileyo bebenikile ngokuvuma kuyehova; no‐Davide ukumkani wavuya naye ngovuyo olukulu." 
1Chronicles29:10 Ngako u‐Davide wambonga uyehova emehlweni ayo yonke intlanganiso; wayesiti u‐Davide: Maubongwe wena, Yehova, Tixo wobawo wetu u‐Sirayeli, kude kube ngunapakade!" 
1Chronicles29:11 Bobako, Yehova! ubukulu, namandla, nobungcwalisa, nolwoyiso, nobungangamsha; ngokuba kukokwako konke okusezulwini nokusemhlabeni; bobako, Yehova! ubukumkani, opakamileyo uyintloko pezu kwonke." 
1Chronicles29:12 Ubutyebi nodumo luvela kuwe; wena uyapata ubukosi pezu kwonke; esandleni sako kuko ukwomelela namandla; kusesandleni sako ukukwenza kukulu nokukwomeleza konke. 
1Chronicles29:13 Siti ke kaloku, Tixo wetu! sibulele kuwe, sidumise igama lako elibungcwalisa." 
1Chronicles29:14 Kodwa mna ndingubanina, nabantu bam bangobanina, ukuba sibe namandla okunika ngokuvuma njengoku? ngokuba zivela kuwe izinto zonke, na ko kwesako isandla sinikile kuwe." 
1Chronicles29:15 Ngokuba singabasemzini ebusweni bako, namaṙanuka, njengobawo betu bonke; inga isisitunzi imihla yetu emhlabeni apa, akuko itemba." 
1Chronicles29:16 Yehova, Tixo wetu! bonke ubutyebi obu esibulungisileyo, ukuba sikwakele indlu ngenxa yegama lako elingcwele, buvela bona esandleni sako, bubobako bonke." 
1Chronicles29:17 Ndiyazi kanjako, Tixo wam! ukuba uyalinga intliziyo, nokuba uyatanda okulungeleleneyo. Mna, ngolungelelwano lwentliziyo yam, ndizinikile zonke ezizinto ngokuvuma; nakaloku, abantu bako, abakoyo apa, ndibabonile ngovuyo ukuba banike ngokuvuma kuwe." 
1Chronicles29:18 Yehova, Tixo ka‐Abrahame, ka‐Yisake, noka‐Sirayeli, obawo betu! kugcine oku ekucingeni kwenkumbulo zentliziyo zabantu bako kude kube ngunapakade, ubekise intliziyo zabo ngakuwe:" 
1Chronicles29:19 no‐Solomone unyana wam umpe intliziyo ekolisekileyo, yokuba abambe imiyalelo yako, n ezinqi̔nelo zako, nezimiselo zako, akwenze oku konke, ayake letempile endilungisele yona." 
1Chronicles29:20 Waza wati u‐Davide kuyo yonke intlanganiso: Bongani ke uyehova, utixo wenu! Yandula yonke intlanganiso yambonga uyehova, utixo woyise babo, batoba ngapantsi, baziqubuda pambi kwoyehova, napambi kwokumkani." 
1Chronicles29:21 Bati kwakusa umhla olandelayo, babingela uyehova imibingo, banikela amadini okutshiswa kuyehova, iwaka lenkunzana zenkomo, n ewaka lenkunzi zegusha, n ewaka lemvana, kunye neminikelo yokusela yazo, nento eninzi yemibingelelo ngenxa yo‐Sirayeli bonke:" 
1Chronicles29:22 badla basela nokusela ebusweni bukayehova ngalomhla ngomgcobo omkulu. BAZA bamenza u‐Solomone unyana ka‐Davide ukumkani ngokwesibini, batambisa yena pambi kwoyehova ukuba yinkosi, no‐Tsadoki ukuba ngumperisite." 
1Chronicles29:23 Wandula u‐Solomone wahlala pezu kweterone kayehova, engukumkani esikundleni sika‐Davide uyise, wahambiseka; bati o‐Sirayeli bonke bampulapula." 
1Chronicles29:24 Kanjalo zonke inkosi, namagoṙa, kwa nabo bonke onyana bokumkani u‐Davide, banika isandla sokuba babe ngapantsi kwo‐Solomone ukumkani." 
1Chronicles29:25 Waza uyehova wamenza mkulu u‐Solomone ngento egqitiseleyo emehlweni o‐Sirayeli bonke, wabeka pezu kwake ubungangamsha bobukumkani, obekungabangako obunjalo pezu kwomnye ukumkani obepambili kuye kwa‐Sirayeli." 
1Chronicles29:26 Kwa njalo u‐Davide unyana ka‐Jese wapata ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke. 
1Chronicles29:27 Ixesha wabepata ubukumkani ngalo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli beliyiminyaka imashumi mane: e‐Hebrone wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yasixenxe; nase‐Yerusaleme wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi matatu anamitatu. 
1Chronicles29:28 Wada wabuba enobudala obukolisileyo, ezele yimihla, n obutyebi, nodumo; waza u‐Solomone unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
1Chronicles29:29 Kekaloku imicimbi ka‐Davide ukumkani, eyokuqala neyokupela, bona ke, iba̔liwe yona emazwini ka‐Samyali umboni, nasemazwini ka‐Natane umprofite, nasemazwini ka‐Gadi umboni," 
1Chronicles29:30 kunye nako konke okwobukumkani bake namandla ake, nokwamaxesha abedlule pezu kwake, napezu kwo‐Sirayeli, napezu kwabo bonke ubukumkani bamazwe." 
2Chronicles1:1 KEKALOKU u‐Solomone unyana ka‐Davide waqiniswa ebukumkanini bake; kanjalo uyehova, utixo wake, ebenaye, wamenza mkulu ngento egqitiseleyo." 
2Chronicles1:2 Waza u‐Solomone wateta kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli, kwinkosi zamawaka nezamakulu, nakubagwebi, nakuzo zonke inkosi pakati kwo‐Sirayeli bonke, intloko zendlu zoyise." 
2Chronicles1:3 Wandula waya u‐Solomone, nayo yonke intlanganiso kunye naye, endaweni epakamileyo ebise‐Gibeyone; ngokuba ibiko kona intente yentlangano katixo, leyo u‐Mosesi isicaka sikayehova ubeyenzile entlango." 
2Chronicles1:4 Kodwa ityeya katixo u‐Davide ebeyinyusile e‐Kiriyateyarime ukuza endaweni abeyilungisele yona u‐Davide: ngokuba ebeyolulele intente e‐Yerusaleme. 
2Chronicles1:5 Kanti isibingelo sexina, abesenzile u‐Betsalele, unyana ka‐Uri, unyana ka‐Hure, sibe silapo pambi kwetabanakele kayehova; baye befuna sona u‐Solomone nentlanganiso leyo." 
2Chronicles1:6 Wayenikela apo u‐Solomone, pambi kwoyehova, pezu kwesibingelo sexina esibe singasententeni yentlangano: wayenikela pezu kwaso iwaka lamadini okutshiswa." 
2Chronicles1:7 Kwa ngobobusuku wabonakala utixo ku‐Solomone, wati kuye: Cela into endiya kuyinika kuwe." 
2Chronicles1:8 Wayesiti u‐Solomone kutixo: Umenzele u‐Davide ubawo wam ububele obukulu, nam undenzile ukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles1:9 Kaloku, Yehova, Tixo! malinyaniswe ilizwi lako ku‐Davide ubawo wam; ngokuba undenzile ukumkani pezu kwabantu abanjengotuli lwomhlaba ukuba baninzi." 
2Chronicles1:10 Ndipe kaloku ubulumko nokwazi, ndize ndipume ndingene nokungena ebusweni bababantu: ngokuba engubanina onako ukugweba aba abantu bako bakulu?" 
2Chronicles1:11 Waza utixo wati ku‐Solomone: Ngenxa yokuba lento ibisentliziyweni yako, ungacelanga ubutyebi, n endyebo, nodumo, nobomi bentshaba zako, ungacelanga kanjalo imihla emininzi: koko uzicelele ubulumko nokwazi, ukuze ubagwebe abantu bam endikwenzile ukumkani pezu kwabo;" 
2Chronicles1:12 upiwe ubulumko nokwazi; ndandiya kukunika nobutyebi, nendyebo, nodumo, ekungabangako onokunjalo pakati kwokumkani abebeko pambili kuwe, nasemva kwako akuyi kubako onokunjalo." 
2Chronicles1:13 Waza wabuya u‐Solomone endaweni epakamileyo ebise‐Gibeyone, weza e‐Yerusaleme, evela kwa pambi kwentente yentlangano, wapata ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles1:14 WAYE u‐Solomone wabuta inqwelo namahashe okukwelwa; wabenenqwelo zaliwaka linamakulu mane, namahashe okukwelwa angamawaka alishumi linesibini; owazibeka ezixekweni zenqwelo, nakuye ukumkani e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles1:15 Kanjako ukumkani wenza isilivere negolide e‐Yerusaleme njengamatye, nemiti yesedare wayenza njengemikiwane esezihlanjeni ngokuba mininzi." 
2Chronicles1:16 Nokuvela kwamahashe ka‐Solomone e‐Jipete, wati umhlambi wabatengi bokumkani wamkela umhlambi wamahashe ngenani elitile." 
2Chronicles1:17 Baye benyusa bakupa e‐Jipete inqwelo nge shekele zesilivere ezingamakulu matandatu, nehashe ngezilikulu elinamashumi mahlanu: kwaye kunjalo bekukutshelwa bonke okumkani bama‐Hete, nokumkani be‐Siriya, ngesandla sabo." 
2Chronicles2:1 WACINGA u‐Solomone ukwaka indlu ibe yeyegama likayehova, nendlu ibe yeyobukumkani bake." 
2Chronicles2:2 Waza wabala u‐Solomone amawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe amadoda abe ngabatwali, namawaka angamashumi asibozo amadoda abe ngababazi ezintabeni, namawaka matatu anamakulu matandatu abongama pezu kwawo." 
2Chronicles2:3 Kekaloku u‐Solomone watuma ku‐Hurame ukumkani we‐Tire, ukuti: Njengokuba ubusenza ku‐Davide ubawo, waza wamtumela imiti yesedare, ukuze akelwe indlu ukuba ahlale kuyo, yenje njalo nakum." 
2Chronicles2:4 Bona ke, ndiyaka indlu egameni likayehova, utixo wam, ize yenzwe ngcwele kuye, ukuba kuqunyiswe ebusweni bake isiqumiso esimnandi, nokuba ibe ye yezonka zokuṙozwa futi, n e yamadini okutshiswa ngokusa nangokuhlwa, ngemihla yesabata, nangenyanga ezitwasileyo, nangemitendeleko emisiweyo kayehova, utixo wetu: yinto engunapakade le ko‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles2:5 Kanjalo indlu endiyakayo, yoba nkulu: ngokuba emkulu utixo wetu pezu kwotixo bonke." 
2Chronicles2:6 Ngubanina kodwa onamandla okuba amakele indlu, izulu, kwa nezulu lamazulu, lingenako ukumbamba nje? ndingubanina nam, ukuba ndimakele indlu, kupela kuqunyiswe isiqumiso ebusweni bake?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Ngako kaloku, nditumele indoda elumkileyo, isebenze ngegolide, nangesilivere, nangexina, nangesincete, nangesimnyama, nesibomvu, nezuluṙa, ekwaziyo nokuqingqa iziqingqwa, ibe ndawonye namalumko endinawo kwa‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme, owati u‐Davide ubawo walungisa wona." 
2Chronicles2:8 Nditumele nemiti yesedare, n eyeberoshe, neyelagume, ivela e‐Lebanone; ngokuba ndisazi mna, okokuba izicaka zako ziyazi ukugaula imiti yase‐Lebanone; kanjalo, bona ke, izicaka zam zoba nezicaka zako:" 
2Chronicles2:9 kuze kundilungiselwe imiti ngento eninzi: ngokuba londlu endiza kuyaka, yoba nkulu ngento engummangaliso." 
2Chronicles2:10 Kanjalo, bona ke, ndiya kunika izicaka zako, abagauli abagaula imiti, ikore zenqolowa ebuliweyo ezingamawaka angamashumi mabini, nekore zeṙalasi ezingamawaka angamashumi mabini, nebate zeveyine ezingamawaka angamashumi mabini, nebate zeoli ezingamawaka angamashumi mabini." 
2Chronicles2:11 Waza wapendula u‐Hurame ukumkani we‐Tire ngencwadi, wayituma ku‐Solomone, wati: Ngokuba uyehova ebatandile abantu bake, umisile wena ukumkani pezu kwabo." 
2Chronicles2:12 Wati kanjalo u‐Hurame: Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, owenzayo izulu nomhlaba, onikileyo ku‐Davide ukumkani unyana olumkileyo, ekwazi ukutelekelela nokuqonda, ongayakayo indlu ibe ye kayehova, nendlu ibe yeyobukumkani bake!" 
2Chronicles2:13 Ngako kaloku, nditumile indoda elumkileyo, ikwazi ukuqonda, kwa u‐Hurame, ubawo wam," 
2Chronicles2:14 unyana womfazi ezintombini zakwa‐Dane, oyise uyindoda yase‐Tire, owaziyo ukusebenza ngegolide, nangesilivere, ngexina, ngesincete, ngamatye, nangemiti, ngesimnyama, ngezuluṙa, nangeqiya eshiceneyo, nangesibomvu, nokuqingqa iziqingqwa zonke, nokuqinga onke amasetyenzwa obuncibi aya kunikwa kuye, abe ndawonye namalumko ako, namalumko enkosi yam u‐Davide uyihlo wako." 
2Chronicles2:15 Ngako kaloku, inqolowa, neṙalasi, n eoli, neveyine, inkosi yam itetile ngazo, maizitume kwizicaka zake;" 
2Chronicles2:16 nati siya kugaula imiti e‐Lebanone, njengako konke ukuswela kwako, siyizise kuwe ngemitantatu pezu kwolwandle e‐Jopa; uze wena uyinyusele e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles2:17 Wabala u‐Solomone onke amadoda asemzini abeko elizweni lakwa‐Sirayeli, ngokubala abewabalile ngako u‐Davide uyise wake; aza afunyanwa engamawaka alikulu linamashumi mahlanu, namawaka matatu anamakulu matandatu ngapandle." 
2Chronicles2:18 Waza wenza kuwo amawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe abe ngabatwali, namawaka angamashumi asibozo abe ngababazi ezintabeni, namawaka matatu anamakulu matandatu abe ngabongama ukusebenzisa abantu." 
2Chronicles3:1 WADA waqala u‐Solomone ukwaka indlu kayehova e‐Yerusaleme, entabeni ye‐Moriya, apo u‐Yehova wabonakala kona ku‐Davide uyise, endaweni abeyilungisile u‐Davide esibayeni sokubula sika‐Orenane um‐Yebusi." 
2Chronicles3:2 Waqala ukwaka ngowesibini umhla wenyanga yesibini, ngowesine umnyaka wobukumkani bake." 
2Chronicles3:3 Nanku ukusekwa waseka ngako u‐Solomone, ukuba ayake indlu katixo. Ubude, ngekubite zomlinganiso wokuqala, bebuzikubite ezingamashumi matandatu, nobubanzi bebuzikubite ezingamashumi mabini." 
2Chronicles3:4 Nentendelezo ebingapambili, ubude pambi kwobubanzi bendlu bebuzikubite ezingamashumi mabini, nobupakamo bebuzezilikulu linamashumi mabini. Wayaleka ngapakati ngegolide ecocekileyo." 
2Chronicles3:5 Nendlu enkulu wayaleka ngemiti yeberoshe, waza wayaleka yona ngegolide entle, wafaka pezu kwayo imiti yepalime nemixokolelwane." 
2Chronicles3:6 Waza wayaleka indlu ngamatye anqabileyo kuhonjwe: kekaloku igolide leyo ibiyigolide yase‐Pavayime. 
2Chronicles3:7 Kanjalo waleka indlu, imiqadi, imigubasi, nendonga zayo, nengcango zayo, ngegolide; waziqingqa nekerubime pezu kwendonga." 
2Chronicles3:8 Wayenza nendlu eyingcwele yezingcwele, ebude pambi kwobubanzi bendlu bebuzikubite ezimashumi mabini, nobubanzi bayo bebuzikubite ezimashumi mabini: yona nayo wayaleka ngegolide entle, ide yaba zitalente ezingamakulu matandatu." 
2Chronicles3:9 Nokuba nzima kwazo izikonkwane, zibe zizishekele ezimashumi mahlanu zegolide, nenkambili zapezulu wazaleka ngegolide." 
2Chronicles3:10 Wayesenza endlwini eyingcwele yezingcwele ikerubime zambini ngesetyenzwa eliqingqiweyo, wazaleka ngegolide." 
2Chronicles3:11 Namapiko ekerubime ubude bawo bebuzikubite ezimashumi mabini: elinye ipiko belizikubite zintlanu, lifikela eludongeni lwendlu; nelinye ipiko lalizikubite zintlanu, lifikela epikweni lenye ikerubime." 
2Chronicles3:12 Kanjalo elinye ipiko lenye ikerubime belizikubite zintlanu, lifikela eludongeni lwendlu; nelinye ipiko lalizikubite zintlanu, linamatela epikweni lenye ikerubime." 
2Chronicles3:13 Amapiko ekerubime ezo atwabuluka ikubite zamashumi mabini; zati zona zema pezu kwenyawo zazo, ubuso bazo bungasendlwini." 
2Chronicles3:14 Walenza nekuselo ngezuluṙa, nesimnyama, nesibomvu, neqiya eshiceneyo, wafaka pezu kwalo ikerubime." 
2Chronicles3:15 Kanjako wazenza pambi kwendlu intsika zambini, zizikubite ezimashumi matatu anantlanu ubude bazo; nentloko ebisencameni yenye intsika ibizikubite ezintlanu." 
2Chronicles3:16 Wayenza nemixokolelwane, njenga sendaweni yokupendula, wayibeka ezincameni zentsika; wenza nekulu legranate, wazibeka emixokolelwaneni." 
2Chronicles3:17 Waza wazimisa intsika ezo ngapambi kwetempile, enye ngasekunene, nenye ngasekohlo: eyokunene wayibiza ngegama elingu‐Yakine, neyokohlo ngegama elingu‐Bohazi." 
2Chronicles4:1 Kanjako wasenza isibingelo sexina, ikubite ezimashumi mabini ubude baso, nekubite ezimashumi mabini ububanzi baso, nekubite ezilishumi ubupakamo baso." 
2Chronicles4:2 Walwenza nolwandle olutyityishiweyo; lwaluzikubite ezilishumi kwa kuwo omnye umpeto kwada kwakuwo omnye umpeto, luyinqukuva ngokungqonga, luzikubite ezintlanu ubupakamo balo; lwalujikelezwa ngentambo yekubite ezimashumi matatu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Kwaye kuko ngapantsi kwalo umfanekiso wenkabi zilungqonga ngamacala onke, zilishumi ekubiteni nye, zijikelezela ulwandle ngokungqonga: zambini inṙozo zenkabi ezibe zityityishwa, lwakutyityishwa lona." 
2Chronicles4:4 Lwema pezu kwenkabi ezilishumi linambini, ezintatu zibeka ngasenode, nezintatu zibeka ngasentshonalanga, nezintatu zibeka ngasesuyide, nezintatu zibeka ngasempumalanga; lwalupezulu ulwandle lupezu kwazo, yonke imiva yazo ingapakati." 
2Chronicles4:5 Isibili salo besibububanzi besandla, nompeto walo ubunjengesetyenzwa lompeto wendebe, njeng entyatyambo yenyibiba; ukubamba kwalo lwabamba ibate ezingamawaka matatu." 
2Chronicles4:6 Wazenza nezihlambelo ezilishumi, wamisa esinye isihlanu ngasekunene, nesinye isihlanu ngasekohlo, ukuze kuhlanjwe kuzo: okwomsebenzi wedini lokutshiswa kwahlanzwa kuzo; kodwa ulwandle belulolwabaperisite ukuba bahlambe kulo." 
2Chronicles4:7 Wazenza nekandelare zegolide ezilishumi, njengesimilo sazo, wazimisa etempileni, esinye isihlanu ngasekunene, nesinye isihlanu ngasekohlo." 
2Chronicles4:8 Wazenza netafile ezilishumi, wazibeka etempileni, esinye isihlanu ngasekunene, nesinye isihlanu ngasekohlo. Wenza nekulu lezitya zokufefela zegolide." 
2Chronicles4:9 Walenza ibala labaperisite, nebala elikulu, nengcango zebala, wazaleka ingcango zawo ngexina." 
2Chronicles4:10 Nolwandle walumisa ngelokunene icala, ngasempumalanga, malungana nesuyide." 
2Chronicles4:11 Kanjalo u‐Hurame wazenza imbiza, nezikotululo, nezitya zokufefela. Wada wagqiba u‐Hurame ukuwenza umsebenzi owawenzela ukumkani u‐Solomone ngenxa yendlu katixo:" 
2Chronicles4:12 intsika zimbini, nezikanda, nentloko ezibe zisencameni yentsika zombini; neminata mibini yokugubungela izikanda zozibini zentloko ezibe zisencameni yentsika zombini;" 
2Chronicles4:13 negranate ezingamakulu mane zeminata yomibini, inṙozo zimbini zegranate kuwo umnata mnye, kuze kugujungelwe izikanda zozibini zentloko ezibe zipezulu pezu kwentsika;" 
2Chronicles4:14 wazenza nezikondo; nezihlambelo wazenza pezu kwezikondo ezo; 
2Chronicles4:15 n olwandle lunye, nenkabi ezilishumi linambini ngapantsi kwalo;" 
2Chronicles4:16 nembiza, nezikotululo, neforoke: nazo zonke impahla zazo, u‐Hurame, uyise wake, wazenzela ukumkani u‐Solomone, ngenxa yendlu kayehova, ngexina egudisiweyo." 
2Chronicles4:17 Etafeni lase‐Yoredane wazityityisha ukumkani, emhlabeni oludongwe pakati kwe‐Sukote ne‐Tseredata." 
2Chronicles4:18 Waye u‐Solomone wazenza zonke ezimpahla ngobuninzi obukulu; ngokuba bekungenakupengululwa ukuba nzima kwexina. 
2Chronicles4:19 Kanjalo wazenza u‐Solomone zonke impahla ezizezendlu katixo: kwa isibingelo segolide; netafile ekube kupezu kwazo izonka zokubonakala; 
2Chronicles4:20 nekandelare kunye nezibane zazo, ukuze zivute njengesiko pambi kwendawo yokupendula, ngegolide enqabileyo;" 
2Chronicles4:21 nentyatyambo, nezibane, nezitabatelo, ngegolide; yona ibiyigolide enqabileyo kakulu;" 
2Chronicles4:22 nezicimo, nezitya zokufefela, negxebeka, neziqumelo, ngegolide enqabileyo: kanjako umnyango wendlu, ingcango zawo zapakati, zeyingcwele yezingcwele indawo, nengcango zendlu, zetempile, zenziwa ngegolide." 
2Chronicles5:1 Kwada kwafezwa wonke umsebenzi, owati u‐Solomone wawenzela indlu kayehova. Waza u‐Solomone wangenisa izinto ezingcwele zika‐Davide uyise, nesilivere, negolide, nazo zonke impahla, wazibeka pakati kwendyebo zendlu katixo." 
2Chronicles5:2 WANDULA u‐Solomone wabahlanganisela e‐Yerusaleme abadala bo‐Sirayeli, nabo bonke abazintloko zezizwe, inkosi zendlu zoyise zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, baze bayinyuse ityeya yocebano lukayehova esixekweni sika‐Davide, esiyiyo i‐Ziyone." 
2Chronicles5:3 Aza onke amadoda akwa‐Sirayeli ahlanganiselwa kukumkani emtendelekweni, lowo wenyanga yesixe̔nxe." 
2Chronicles5:4 Beza ke bonke abadala bo‐Sirayeli; bati aba‐Levi bayifunqula ityeya. 
2Chronicles5:5 Baza benyusa ityeya, nentente yentlangano, nazo zonke impahla ezingcwele ezibe zikuyo intente leyo; ezi zinto bazinyusa abaperisite n aba‐Levi." 
2Chronicles5:6 Kanjalo ukumkani u‐Solomone, nayo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli abebehlanganisene ngakuye pambi kwetyeya, bebebinga igusha nenkabi, ezazingenakubalwa nokulinganiswa ngokuba zininzi." 
2Chronicles5:7 Baza abaperisite bayingenisa ityeya yocebano lukayehova endaweni yayo, endaweni yokupendula yendlu, kweyingcwele yezingcwele, ngapantsi kwamapiko ekerubime." 
2Chronicles5:8 Ngokuba ikerubime zatwabulula amapiko azo ngapezu kwendawo yetyeya; kanjalo ikerubime zagubungela ityeya nezibonda zayo pezulu. 
2Chronicles5:9 Kwandula kwar̔olwa izibonda, ukuba zabonakala incam zezibonda zipuma etyeyeni pambi kwendawo yokupendula, kanti bezingabonakali ngapandle; ziko nakona kude kube namhla nje." 
2Chronicles5:10 Bekungeko nto etyeyeni, kupela ngalomacwecwe mabini abewafakile u‐Mosesi e‐Horebe, okuya uyehova walwenza ucebano nosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ekupumeni kwalo e‐Jipete." 
2Chronicles5:11 Kwaza kwati, bakupuma abaperisite kweyingcwele indawo: (ngokuba bonke abaperisite abebeko bebezingcwalisile, bengalindi oko ngezahlulo:" 
2Chronicles5:12 kanjalo aba‐Levi abebengabaculi pakati kwabo bonke, abaka‐Safa, abaka‐Hemani, abaka‐Jedutune, nabonyana babo, nababazalwana babo, bevatisiwe ngeqiya eshiceneyo, benesimbali, nenebele, nehadi, bema ngasecaleni lasempumalanga lesibingelo, nakunye nabo abaperisite abalikulu linamashumi mabini behlokomisa amaxilongo:)" 
2Chronicles5:13 kwaza kwati, xeshekweni abahlokomisi nabaculi benza kunye, kuze kuvakaliswe ilizwi linye ekumdumiseni nasekumbuleleni uyehova; naxeshekweni bapakamisayo ilizwi ngamaxilongo, nangesimbali, nangezinto zokuculisa, nangokumdumisa uyehova, besiti: Ngokuba elungile; ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: yandula indlu yazaliswa ngelifu, indlu kayehova;" 
2Chronicles5:14 bada bakohlwa abaperisite kukuma ukukonza ngenxa yelifu elo; ngokuba ubungcwalisa bukayehova bebuzalisile indlu katixo. 
2Chronicles6:1 Waza wati u‐Solomone: Uyehova ute uya kuhlala esitokotokweni. 
2Chronicles6:2 Mna kodwa ndikwakele indlu yokuhlala, kwa indawo yokuhlala kwako kude kube ngunapakade." 
2Chronicles6:3 Wandula ukumkani waguqula ubuso bake, watamsanqelisa yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli; (yati yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli yema;)" 
2Chronicles6:4 wayesiti: Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, owateta ngomlomo wake ku‐Davide ubawo, waza wazalisekisa ngezandla zake, esiti:" 
2Chronicles6:5 Kuselokwalomhla endapumisayo abantu bam elizweni le‐Jipete, andinyulanga nasinye isixeko kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, ukuba kwakiwe indlu, lize igama lam libe kona; kanjako andinyulanga nanye indoda ibe yinkosi pezu kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli:" 
2Chronicles6:6 koko ndinyulile i‐Yerusaleme, ukuba igama lam libe kona; no‐Davide ndimnyulile ukuba abe pezu kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles6:7 Kwaye kusentliziyweni ka‐Davide ubawo, ukwakela igama likayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, indlu." 
2Chronicles6:8 Kodwa uyehova wati ku‐Davide ubawo: Okokuba bekusentliziyweni yako ukwakela igama lam indlu, ulungisile ukuba bekusentliziyweni yako." 
2Chronicles6:9 Noko indlu leyo akuyi kuyaka wena; kodwa unyana wako oya kupuma esinqeni sako, nguye oya kuyakela igama lam indlu leyo." 
2Chronicles6:10 Kwa njalo uyehova uqinisile ilizwi lake abelitetile; ngokuba ndivukile esikundleni sika‐Davide ubawo, ndihleli nje pezu kweterone yakwa‐Sirayeli, njengokuba etetile uyehova; ndandakele igama likayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, indlu." 
2Chronicles6:11 Kanjalo ndibekile kona ityeya, apo lukona ucebano lukayehova, olo walwenzayo nosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles6:12 Waza wema pambi kwesibingelo sikayehova, ebusweni bayo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli, wazolula izandla zake:" 
2Chronicles6:13 ngokuba u‐Solomone ebesenzile isitulo sexina, wasibeka pakati kwebala, sizikubite zintlanu ubude baso, nekubite zintlanu ububanzi baso, nekubite zintatu ubupakamo baso: wema ke pezu kwaso, waguqa ngamadolo ake ebusweni bayo yonke intlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli, wazolula izandla zake ngasezulwini," 
2Chronicles6:14 wati: Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! akuko tixo njengawe, nasezulwini nasemhlabeni, ogcinela izicaka zako, ezihambayo pambi kwako ngayo yonke intliziyo yazo, ucebano nobubele:" 
2Chronicles6:15 ogcinele isicaka sako u‐Davide, ubawo wam, oko wakuteta kuye: ngokuba utetile ngomlomo wako, nangesandla sako uzalisekisile, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ngako kaloku, Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! gcinela isicaka sako u‐Davide, ubawo wam, oko ukutetileyo kuye, usiti: Akuyi kukunqamkela indoda ebusweni bam, ihleli pezu kweterone yakwa‐Sirayeli; kupela ukuba onyana bako baya kulumkela indlela yabo, bahambe ngawo umteto wam, njengokuba wena uhambile pambi kwam." 
2Chronicles6:17 Nakaloku, Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! malinyaniswe ke ilizwi lako, elo ulitetileyo kwisicaka sako, ku‐Davide." 
2Chronicles6:18 Kodwa utixo uya kuhlala nabantu emhlabeni ngenyaniso na? bona ke, izulu, nezulu lamazulu, alingekubambe; kancinane kangakananina ngakumbi ke lendlu endiyakileyo!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Uze ubeke noko kuwo umtandazo wesicaka sako, nakuso isitaṙuziso saso, Yehova, Tixo wam! upulapule isikalo nomtandazo sitandaza ngawo isicaka sako ebusweni bako:" 
2Chronicles6:20 ukuba amehlo ako abe evulekile pezu kwalendlu emini nasebusuku, pezu kwendawo ute ngayo uya kubeka igama lako kona: ukuba upulapule umtandazo siya kutandaza ngawo isicaka sako kulendawo." 
2Chronicles6:21 Uze upulapule izitaṙuziso zesicaka sako, nezabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, oko baya kutandaza kulendawo; uve wena endaweni yokuhlala kwako, ezulwini, uti wakuva uxolele." 
2Chronicles6:22 Okuya kwonayo umntu ngakuye ummelwane wake, aze abeke pezu kwake isifungo sokumfungisa, siti isifungo size pambi kwesibingelo sako kulendlu;" 
2Chronicles6:23 wandule wena uve ezulwini, wenze, ulungise izicaka zako, upindezele kokohlakeleyo, ngokunika indlela yake pezu kwentloko yake, umgwebele olungileyo, ngokumnika njengobulungisa bake." 
2Chronicles6:24 Naxeshekweni abantu bako o‐Sirayeli babetwa pambi kwotshaba, ngokuba bonile ngakuwe; baze babuye, badumise igama lako, batandaze, bataṙuzise ebusweni bako kulendlu;" 
2Chronicles6:25 wandule wena uve ezulwini, uxolele isono sabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, ubabuyisele emhlabeni owabuwunika kubo nakoyise babo." 
2Chronicles6:26 Xeshekweni livingcekile izulu, kungeko imvula, ngokuba bonile ngakuwe; ukuba bayatandaza kulendawo, badumise igama lako, baguquke esonweni sabo, oko ubabandezelayo;" 
2Chronicles6:27 wandule wena uve ezulwini, uxolele isono sezicaka zako, nesabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, oko ubafundisayo indlela elungileyo abaya kuhamba ngayo: uze unise imvula pezu kwelizwe lako, elo ulinikileyo ebantwini bako libe lilifa." 
2Chronicles6:28 Nxa kubako indlala elizweni, nxa kubako isifo esibubisayo, nxa kubako imbabala, nesihumba, inkumbi, noṙuxeshe; nxa intshaba zabo zibavingcela elizweni lezixeko zabo; nxa kubako isibulawa esinjanina, nesifo esinjanina;" 
2Chronicles6:29 konke ukutandaza, konke ukutaṙuzisa, okuya kwenziwa ngumntu otile, umhlaumbi ngabo bonke abantu bako o‐Sirayeli, oko baya kwazi abanye ngabanye isibulawa sabo, nobuhlungu babo, bazolule izandla zabo kulendlu;" 
2Chronicles6:30 wandule wena uve ezulwini, endaweni yokuhlala kwako, uxolele, ubanike abanye ngabanye njengazo zonke indlela zabo, abantliziyo uzaziyo; (ngokuba nguwe wedwa ozaziyo intliziyo zonyana babantu;)" 
2Chronicles6:31 ukuze bakwoyike, bahambe ngendlela zako, yonke imihla abaya kubudla ubomi ngayo pezu kwobuso bomhlaba, owabuwunika kobawo betu." 
2Chronicles6:32 Nakanjako ngaye owolunye uhlanga, ongenguye owabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, kodwa uvele ezweni elikude ngenxa yegama lako elikulu, nesandla sako esomeleleyo, nengalo yako eyolulweyo; nxa baya kuza, batandaze kulendlu;" 
2Chronicles6:33 wandule wena uve ezulwini, endaweni yokuhlala kwako, wenze ngako konke aya kubiza kuwe ngako owolunye uhlanga lowo; ukuze bonke abantu bomhlaba balazi igama lako, boyike wena, njengabantu bako o‐Sirayeli; bazi kanjalo ukuba igama lako libiziwe pezu kwendlu le endiyakileyo." 
2Chronicles6:34 Nxa abantu bako bapumayo ukuya kulwa ngakuzo intshaba zabo, ngendlela uya kubatuma ngayo, baze batandaze kuwe, ngakuso esisixeko usinyulileyo, na ngakuyo lendlu endiyakileyo ngenxa yegama lako;" 
2Chronicles6:35 wandule uve ezulwini ukutandaza kwabo nokutaṙuzisa kwabo, ulenze ibango labo." 
2Chronicles6:36 Nxa bonayo ngakuwe, (ngokuba kungeko umntu ongoniyo,) uti wena ubaqumbele, ubanikele ebusweni botshaba, bade abatimbi babo babatimbele elizweni elikude umhlaumbi elikufupi;" 
2Chronicles6:37 ukuba bayakumbuza intliziyo zabo elizweni apo batinjelwe kona, baguquke, bakutaṙuzise elizweni lokutinjelwa kwabo, besiti: Sonile, senzile ngobugwenxa, senza okukohlakeleyo;" 
2Chronicles6:38 bade babuyele kuwe ngayo yonke intliziyo yabo, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wabo, elizweni lokutinjelwa kwabo, apo batinjelwe kona, batandaze ngakulo ilizwe labo, elo wabulinika koyise babo, na ngakuso esisixeko usinyulileyo, nangakuyo lendlu endiyakileyo ngenxa yegama lako:" 
2Chronicles6:39 wandule uve ezulwini, endaweni yokuhlala kwako, ukutandaza kwabo nokutaṙuzisa kwabo, ulenze ibango labo, ubaxolele abantu bako abonileyo ngakuwe." 
2Chronicles6:40 Kaloku, Tixo wam! makati amehlo ako avuleke, nendlebe zako zipulapuleke, kuwo umtandazo walendawo." 
2Chronicles6:41 Nakaloku pakama, Yehova, Tixo! uze ekupumleni kwako, wena netyeya yamandla ako: abaperisite bako, Yehova, Tixo! mabambate usindiso, nabangcwele bako mabavuye kokulungileyo." 
2Chronicles6:42 Yehova, Tixo! zungasongi ubuso bomtanjiswa wako: kumbula izibele zika‐Davide isicaka sako." 
2Chronicles7:1 Kekaloku nxa agqibileyo u‐Solomone ukutandaza, kwandula kwehla umlilo ezulwini, wadla idini lokutshiswa nemibingo; bati ubungcwalisa bukayehova bayizalisa indlu." 
2Chronicles7:2 Baza bakohlwa abaperisite ukungena endlwini kayehova, ngokuba ubungcwalisa bukayehova bebuzalisile indlu kayehova." 
2Chronicles7:3 Lwati lwakubona lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli ukuhla kwomlilo, nobungcwalisa bukayehova pezu kwendlu, lwatoba ngobuso ngasemhlabeni pezu kwesandlalwa samatye, lwabedesha, lwamdumisa uyehova, lusiti: Ngokuba elungile; ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade." 
2Chronicles7:4 Kwaza kwabinga ukumkani nabo bonke abantu umbingo pambi kwoyehova. 
2Chronicles7:5 Waye ukumkani u‐Solomone wabinga umbingo wenkabi ezingamawaka angamashumi mabini anamabini, negusha ezingamawaka alikulu linamashumi mabini. Benje njalo ukutwasisa indlu katixo ukumkani nabo bonke abantu." 
2Chronicles7:6 Bati abaperisite bema ngezigcinelo zabo, naba‐Levi benezinto zokuculisa zikayehova, abezenzile u‐Davide ukumkani, ukuba kubulelwe kuyehova, ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade, nxa u‐Davide abedumisa ngesandla sabo: baza abaperisite bahlokomisa amaxilongo pambi kwabo, bati bonke o‐Sirayeli bema." 
2Chronicles7:7 Kanjako u‐Solomone wawenza ngcwele umpakati webala elipambi kwayo indlu kayehova; ngokuba wabelungisa kona amadini okutshiswa, namanqata eminikelo yoxolo: ngokuba isibingelo sexina, abesenzile u‐Solomone, besingenako ukwamkela amadini okutshiswa, neminikelo yokudla, namanqata lawo." 
2Chronicles7:8 Wayesenza u‐Solomone umtendeleko ngexesha elo imihla yasixe̔nxe, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli kunye naye, intlanganiso enkulu kunene, ivela kwa sekungenweni kwe‐Hamati kwada kwasemlanjeni wase‐Jipete." 
2Chronicles7:9 Baye besenza ngomhla wesibozo intlanganisano engcwele: ngokuba bebekwenza ukutwasiswa kwesibingelo imihla esixenxe, nomtendeleko imihla ekwa sixe̔nxe." 
2Chronicles7:10 Nangowamashumi mabini anesitatu umhla wenyanga yesixe̔nxe, wabandulula abantu ukuya ezintenteni zabo, bevuya, becwayitile ngentliziyo, ngenxa yokulungileyo abekwenzile uyehova ku‐Davide, naku‐Solomone, nako‐Sirayeli abantu bake." 
2Chronicles7:11 Wada u‐Solomone wagqiba indlu kayehova, nendlu yokumkani: nako konke okube kungenile entliziyweni ka‐Solomone, ukuba akwenze endlwini kayehova nasendlwini yake, wakufeza ngokutamsanqelekileyo." 
2Chronicles7:12 WANDULA uyehova wabonakala ku‐Solomone ebusuku, wati kuye: Ndivile umtandazo wako, ndandizinyulele lendawo ibe yindlu yemibingo." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ukuba ndiyavingca izulu, kuze kungabiko imvula, umhlaumbi ukuba ndiyayalela inkumbi zigqibe ilizwe, umhlaumbi ukuba ndiyatuma isifo esibubisayo pakati kwabantu bam;" 
2Chronicles7:14 baze bati abantu bam, ekupezu kwabo kubizwa igama lam, bazigobe, batandaze, bafune ubuso bam, baguquke emikweni yabo ekohlakeleyo; ndiya kwandula ndive mna kwa sezulwini, ndixolele isono sabo, ndipilise nelizwe labo." 
2Chronicles7:15 Kaloku amehlo am ovuleka, nendlebe zam zopulapuleka, kuwo umtandazo walendawo." 
2Chronicles7:16 Ngokuba kaloku ndiyinyulile ndayenza ngcwele indlu le, ukuba igama lam libeko kona kude kube ngunapakade; kwakuya kubako kona amehlo am nentliziyo yam imihla yonke." 
2Chronicles7:17 Kanjalo wena ukuba uya kuhamba pambi kwam, njengokuba ebehamba u‐Davide uyihlo wako, wenze ngako konke endikuyaleleyo, ugcine izimiselo zam nezigwebo zam;" 
2Chronicles7:18 ndiya kwandula ndiqinise iterone yobukumkani bako, njengokuba ndenzile ucebano no‐Davide uyihlo wako, ndisiti: Akuyi kukunqamkela indoda inobukosi kwa‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles7:19 Kanti ukuba niyapambuka nina, niyishiye imimiselo yam nemiyalelo yam, endiyibekileyo pambi kwenu, nize niye nikonze otixo bambi, nitobe pambi kwabo;" 
2Chronicles7:20 ndiya kwandula ndibancotule emhlabeni wam, endiwunikileyo kubo; nalendlu, endiyingcwalisele igama lam, ndoyilahla ebusweni bam, ndiyenze ibe yinto yokuzekeliswa nelizwi lokuhlekisa pakati kwabantu bonke." 
2Chronicles7:21 Nendlu le, epezulu, osukuba edlula ngakuyo woti nqa, ati: Kunganina ukuba wenzile uyehova njengokunjalo kwelilizwe nakulendlu?" 
2Chronicles7:22 kwakuya kutiwa: Ngenxa yokuba bamshiya uyehova, utixo woyise babo, owabapumisayo elizweni le‐Jipete, nokuba babambelela kotixo bambi, batoba pambi kwabo, babakonza: kungoko azisileyo pezu kwabo bonke obububi." 
2Chronicles8:1 KWAYE kute ekupeleni kweminyaka imashumi mabini, okuya u‐Solomone abeyakile indlu kayehova, nendlu yake," 
2Chronicles8:2 ukuba izixeko owabezinikile u‐Hurame ku‐Solomone, waka zona u‐Solomone, wahlalisa kona usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles8:3 Wandula waya u‐Solomone e‐Hamatitsoba, wayeyisa." 
2Chronicles8:4 Waza waka ne‐Tademore entlango, nazo zonke izixeko zokubekela, ezo wazakayo e‐Hamati." 
2Chronicles8:5 Waka ne‐Bete‐horone yasentla, ne‐Bete‐horone yasezantsi, izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, zinendonga, n amasango, nemivalo;" 
2Chronicles8:6 ne‐Bahalate, nazo zonke izixeko zokubekela abe nazo u‐Solomone, nazo zonke izixeko zenqwelo, nezixeko zamahashe okukwelwa, nako konke asukuba ebenqwenela ukukwaka e‐Yerusaleme, nase‐Lebanone, nakulo lonke ilizwe lobukosi bake." 
2Chronicles8:7 Bonke abantu ababesele kuwo ama‐Hete, naba‐Amori, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Hivi, nama‐Yebusi, abebengengabo a bosapo luka‐Sirayeli," 
2Chronicles8:8 abakubo abantwana babo ababesele emva kwabo elizweni, abo usapo luka‐Sirayeli belungabagqibelanga, kwa pezu kwabo wabeka u‐Solomone ukunikela ngenkonzo kwada kwanamhla nje." 
2Chronicles8:9 Kanti kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, olo ungalwenzanga u‐Solomone lube ngamakonza emsebenzini wake, (ngokuba lona belungamadoda okulwa, nenkosi zenjengele zake, nabapati benqwelo zake, nabakweli bake bamahashe,)" 
2Chronicles8:10 kwa kulo olu beziko inkosi zabongama abenabo ukumkani u‐Solomone, amakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu, ezibe zinobukosi pezu kwabantu." 
2Chronicles8:11 Kekaloku intombi ka‐Faro wayinyusa u‐Solomone esixekweni sika‐Davide iye endlwini abeyakele yona; ngokuba ebesiti: Umfazi wam akayi kuhlala endlwini ka‐Davide ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ngokuba zingcwele ezo ndawo ingenileyo kuzo ityeya kayehova." 
2Chronicles8:12 Oko u‐Solomone wanikela amadini okutshiswa kuyehova, pezu kwesibingelo sikayehova, eso ubesakile pambi kwentendelezo," 
2Chronicles8:13 kwa ngokubanga kwemihla ngemihla, enikela, njengomyalelo ka‐Mosesi, ngesabata, nangenyanga ezitwasileyo, nangemitendeleko emisiweyo, amaxesha matatu emnyakeni mnye, ngomtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele, nangomtendeleko weveki, nangomtendeleko wamapempe." 
2Chronicles8:14 Wayemisa, njengesiko lika‐Davide uyise, izahlulo zabaperisite pezu kwenkonzo yabo; naba‐Levi pezu kwezigcinelo zabo, ukuba badumise, bakonze pambi kwabaperisite, ngokubanga kwemihla ngemihla; nabalindimnyango, ngezahlulo zabo, ngesango ngesango: ngokuba ubunjalo umyalelo ka‐Davide indoda katixo." 
2Chronicles8:15 Baye bengapambuki kuwo umyalelo wokumkani kubo abaperisite naba‐Levi, ngazo zonke izinto, nangazo indyebo." 
2Chronicles8:16 Waye wonke umsebenzi ka‐Solomone ubulungiswa kude kwangumhla wokusekwa kwendlu kayehova, nakude kwakukugqitywa kwayo. Yada yafezwa indlu kayehova." 
2Chronicles8:17 Oko waya u‐Solomone e‐Hetsiyone‐gebere, nase‐Elote, elunxwemeni lwolwandle, elizweni le‐Edome." 
2Chronicles8:18 Waza u‐Hurame watuma kuye ngezandla zezicaka zake inqanawa, nezicaka ezibe zilwazi ulwandle, ezaya kunye nezicaka zika‐Solomone e‐Ofire, zatabata kona italente zegolide zamakulu mane anamashumi mahlanu, zazizisa kukumkani u‐Solomone." 
2Chronicles9:1 WATI ukumkanikazi we‐Sheba, akuva udumo luka‐Solomone, weza ukumlinga u‐Solomone ngezintsonkotelo e‐Yerusaleme, kunye nomkosi omkulu kunene, nenkamela zitwele izimnandi, nento eninzi yegolide, namatye anqabileyo: wati akuza ku‐Solomone, wateta naye konke okusentliziyweni yake." 
2Chronicles9:2 Waza u‐Solomone wamtyilela onke amazwi ake: akwafihlwa nto ku‐Solomone, abengamtyileli yona." 
2Chronicles9:3 Kekaloku nxa ukumkanikazi we‐Sheba wabona ubulumko buka‐Solomone, nendlu abeyakile," 
2Chronicles9:4 nokutya kwesitebe sake, nokuhlala kwezicaka zake, nokuma kwabakonzi bake, nezivato zabo, nabancamli bake, nezivato zabo, nesinyukelo sake, owenyuka ngaso ukuya endlwini kayehova, akwabi sabiko umoya kuye."
