2Chronicles9:5 Wayesiti kukumkani: Beliyinene ilizwi elo bendiliva elizweni lam, ngemicimbi yako nangobulumko bako." 
2Chronicles9:6 Kodwa bendingakolwa ngamazwi abo, ndide ndatika, aza abona amehlo am: kekaloku bona ke, andixelelwanga nesiqingata sobukulu bobulumko bako: ugqitisile iṙeto endalivayo." 
2Chronicles9:7 Anenyweba amadoda ako, zinenyweba ezizicaka zako, ezimiyo futi ebusweni bako, ezivayo ubulumko bako." 
2Chronicles9:8 Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wako, owakukolelayo, ukuba akubeke pezu kweterone yake, ube ngukumkani ngenxa kayehova, utixo wako! Ngokuba utixo wako ebatandile o‐Sirayeli, ukuba abamise kude kube ngunapakade, kukona akumiseleyo ube ngukumkani pezu kwabo, ukwenza ubugwebo nobulungisa." 
2Chronicles9:9 Waza wamnika ukumkani italente zegolide zalikulu elinamashumi mabini, nento eninzi yezimnandi, namatye anqabileyo: kwaye kungeko izimnandi ezinjengezo ukumkanikazi we‐Sheba wazinika kukumkani u‐Solomone." 
2Chronicles9:10 Nakanjako izicaka zika‐Hurame, nezicaka zika‐Solomone, ezavela negolide e‐Ofire, zazisa nemiti yelagume, namatye anqabileyo." 
2Chronicles9:11 Waye ukumkani ngemiti yelagume leyo wenzela indlu kayehova nendlu yokumkani indawo zokunyukela, wenz ela abaculi ikinore nenebele kanjalo: bekungabonwa enjalo ngapambili elizweni lakwa‐Juda." 
2Chronicles9:12 Waza ukumkani u‐Solomone wamnika ukumkanikazi we‐Sheba konke ukutanda kwake, oko wakucelayo, ngapandle kwoko abekuzisile kukumkani. Wada wajika, wahambela kwelake ilizwe, yena nezicaka zake." 
2Chronicles9:13 Kekaloku ukulinganiswa kwayo igolide ebisiza ku‐Solomone emnyakeni mnye, bezizitalente zegolide ezingamakulu matandatu anamashumi matandatu enesitandatu;" 
2Chronicles9:14 ngapandle kwebiziswa ngabaṙatyazi nabatengi: kanjalo bonke okumkani base‐Arabi, nenkosi zelizwe, bazisa igolide nesilivere ku‐Solomone." 
2Chronicles9:15 Waza ukumkani u‐Solomone wenza amakaka angamakulu mabini ngegolide ekandelweyo; kwafakwa amakulu matandatu eshekele zegolide ekandelweyo pezu kwekaka linye: 
2Chronicles9:16 wazenza nengweletshetshe ezingamakulu matatu ngegolide akandelweyo; kwafakwa amakulu matatu eshekele zegolide pezu kwengweletshetshe inye: waza ukumkani wazibeka endlwini yehlati le‐Lebanone. 
2Chronicles9:17 Waye ukumkani kanjako wayenza iterone enkulu yopondo lwendlovu, wayaleka ngegolide ecocekileyo." 
2Chronicles9:18 Kwaye kuko izinyukelo zitandatu kuyo iterone leyo, nesitulo senyawo segolide, ziqiniselwe eteroneni, nezayamelo ngelicala nangeliya ngasendaweni yokuhlala, nengonyama zimbini zimi kufupi nezayamelo ezo:" 
2Chronicles9:19 zema kona nengonyama zilishumi linambini ngelicala nangeliya pezu kwazo izinyukelo zitandatu: akwenziwanga enjalo kobunye ubukumkani. 
2Chronicles9:20 Kanjako zonke impahla zokusela zokumkani u‐Solomone zibe zizezegolide, nazo zonke impahla zendlu yehlati le‐Lebanone zibe zizezegolide enqabileyo; bekungeko e zesilivere: ibingabalelwa luto yona emihleni ka‐Solomone." 
2Chronicles9:21 Ngokuba inqanawa zokumkani bezisiya e‐Tareshishe kunye nezicaka zika‐Hurame: kwakanye eminyakeni mitatu zafika inqanawa zase‐Tareshishe, zizisa igolide, nesilivere, n empondo zendlovu, nenkau, namaseme." 
2Chronicles9:22 Kwa njalo ukumkani u‐Solomone wayemkulu pezu kwabo bonke okumkani bomhlaba, ngobutyebi nangobulumko." 
2Chronicles9:23 Kanjako bonke okumkani bomhlaba babefuna ubuso buka‐Solomone, ukuze babuve ubulumko bake, obo wabubeka utixo entliziyweni yake." 
2Chronicles9:24 Baye besiza abanye ngabanye nebaso labo, impahla zesilivere, nempahla zegolide, nengubo, n ezixo̔bo, nezimnandi, n amahashe, namaqwa aṙa; into yomnyaka ngomnyaka." 
2Chronicles9:25 Waye u‐Solomone kanjalo enezitale zamahashe ezingamawaka mane, nenqwelo, namahashe okukwelwa angamawaka alishumi linesibini; owawabeka ezixekweni zenqwelo, nakuye ukumkani e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles9:26 Wayepata ubukosi pezu kwabo bonke okumkani, kwa kuwo umlambo kude kwasezweni lama‐Filistiya, nakude kwasemdeni wase‐Jipete." 
2Chronicles9:27 Kanjako ukumkani wayenza isilivere e‐Yerusaleme njengamatye, nemiti yesedare wayenza njengemikiwane esezihlanjeni, ngokuba mininzi." 
2Chronicles9:28 Kwaye kukutshelwa u‐Solomone amahashe evela e‐Jipete, nasemazweni onke." 
2Chronicles9:29 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Solomone, eyokuqala neyokupela, ayiba̔lwanga na yona emazwini ka‐Natane umprofite, nasesiprofiteshweni sika‐Ahiya um‐Shilo, nasemibonisweni ka‐Hido umboni ngaye u‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Waye u‐Solomone ebepata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme, pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke, iminyaka engamashumi mane." 
2Chronicles9:31 Wada walala u‐Solomone noyise bake, wancw̔atywa esixekweni sika‐Davide uyise; waza u‐Rehobome unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles10:1 WASUKA u‐Rehobome waya e‐Shekeme; ngokuba bebeze e‐Shekeme o‐Sirayeli bonke, ukuze bamenze ukumkani." 
2Chronicles10:2 Kwaye kute, kwakuviwa ngu‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, (kekaloku yena ebese‐Jipete, ngokuba ebesabile ebusweni buka‐Solomone ukumkani; wada u‐Jerobome wabuya e‐Jipete;" 
2Chronicles10:3 baza batuma bambiza;) kwandul’ ukuza u‐Jerobome no‐Sirayeli bonke, bateta ku‐Rehobome, besiti:" 
2Chronicles10:4 Uyihlo wako wayenza lukuni iyokwe yetu; uz’ uti wena kaloku wenze lula ubukonzo boyihlo obulukuni, neyokwe yake enzima abeyibeka pezu kwetu, sasiya kukukonza." 
2Chronicles10:5 Wayesiti kubo: Mkani kanjako intsuku zibe ntatu, nandule nibuye nize kum. Bemka ke abantu." 
2Chronicles10:6 Waza ukumkani u‐Rehobome wacebisana namaxego, abemi ebusweni buka‐Solomone uyise, nxa abesahleli, esiti: Niti nina uku ndi cebisa nina, kuze kupendulwe ababantu?" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ateta kuye, esiti: Ukuba uya kwenza ngobubele kwababantu, ubabuke, utete kubo amazwi alungileyo, baya kwandula babe zizicaka zako imihla yonke." 
2Chronicles10:8 Kodwa walishiya icebo lamaxego, elo abemcebisile ngalo, waya wacebisana namadodana abekulile kunye naye, abemi ebusweni bake." 
2Chronicles10:9 Wayesiti kuwo: Lelinina icebo nilinikayo nina, ukuba sipendule ababantu, abatetileyo kum, besiti: Yenza lula iyokwe ayibekileyo pezu kwetu uyihlo wako?" 
2Chronicles10:10 Aza ateta kuye amadodana abekulile kunye naye, esiti: Uya kutsho kwababantu abatetileyo kuwe, besiti: Uyihlo wako wayenza nzima iyokwe yetu, kodwa wena yenze lula pezu kwetu; uya kutsho kubo ukuti: Ucikicane wam woba mkulu kuso isinqe sobawo isibili sake." 
2Chronicles10:11 Ukuba kaloku ubawo unitwesile ngeyokwe enzima, mna ke ndiya kwongeza kuyo iyokwe yenu; ubawo unohlwayile ngezwiniya, kodwa mna ndonohlwaya ngonomadudwane." 
2Chronicles10:12 Kwa njalo kweza u‐Jerobome nabo bonke abantu ku‐Rehobome ngosuku lwesitatu, njengokuba ebetetile ukumkani, esiti: Buyani nize kum ngosuku lwesitatu." 
2Chronicles10:13 Waza ukumkani wabapendula ngokulukuni; ngokuba ukumkani u‐Rehobome walishiya icebo lamaxego," 
2Chronicles10:14 wateta kubo njengecebo lamadodana, esiti: Ubawo wayenza nzima iyokwe yenu, kodwa mna ndiya kwongeza kuyo; ubawo wanohlwaya ngezwiniya, kodwa mna ndonohlwaya ngonomadudwane." 
2Chronicles10:15 Akapulapula ke ukumkani ebantwini; ngokuba belulujiko luvela kutixo, ukuze uyehova aliqinise ilizwi lake, elo walitetayo ngaye u‐Ahiya um‐Shilo ku‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati." 
2Chronicles10:16 Bati bakubona bonke o‐Sirayeli ukuba ukumkani akapulapuli kubo, bapendula abantu kukumkani, besiti: Sisipina isabiwo esinaso ku‐Davide? akuko kuti nelifa kunyana ka‐Jese: abanye ngabanye ezintenteni zenu, bo‐Sirayeli! kaloku kangela kweyako indlu, Davide! Basuka baya o‐Sirayeli bonke ezintenteni zabo." 
2Chronicles10:17 Kodwa usapo luka‐Sirayeli olube luhleli ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, wapata ubukumkani pezu kwalo u‐Rehobome." 
2Chronicles10:18 Wandula ukumkani u‐Rehobome watuma u‐Hadorame, obepezu kwabesitabataba; lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwamgibisela ngamatye, wada wafa. Ngako ukumkani u‐Rehobome wanxama ukukwela enqwelweni, ukuba asabele e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles10:19 Kwa njalo o‐Sirayeli baqipukelana nendlu ka‐Davide, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
2Chronicles11:1 Wati u‐Rehobome akufika e‐Yerusaleme, wahlanganisa indlu ka‐Juda no‐Benjamine, amawaka alikulu linamashumi asibozo amadodana eqelene nokulwa, ukuba kuliwe no‐Sirayeli, kuze kubuyiselwe ubukumkani ku‐Rehobome." 
2Chronicles11:2 Kodwa ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Shemaya indoda katixo, lisiti:" 
2Chronicles11:3 Yitsho ku‐Rehobome unyana ka‐Solomone ukumkani wo‐Juda, nakubo bonke o‐Sirayeli abakwa‐Juda nakwa‐Benjamine, usiti:" 
2Chronicles11:4 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Aniyi kunyuka, aniyi kulwa nabazalwana benu kanjalo: buyani abanye ngabanye ukuya endlwini yabo: ngokuba lento yenzekile ngam. Bandula bapulapula amazwi kayehova, babuya ekuyeni kwabo ngaku‐Jerobome." 
2Chronicles11:5 Waza u‐Rehobome wahlala e‐Yerusaleme; wayesaka izixeko zibe zinqaba kwa‐Juda. 
2Chronicles11:6 Wayesaka i‐Beteleheme, ne‐Hetame, ne‐Tekoha," 
2Chronicles11:7 ne‐Bete‐tsure, ne‐Soko, ne‐Hadulame," 
2Chronicles11:8 ne‐Gate, ne‐Maresha, ne‐Zifi," 
2Chronicles11:9 ne‐Adorayime, ne‐Lakishe, ne‐Hazeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 ne‐Tsoreha, ne‐Ajalone, ne‐Hebrone, ezikwa‐Juda nakwa‐Benjamine, izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo." 
2Chronicles11:11 Wayenqabisa inqaba ezo, wabeka kuzo inkosi, nembekelo zokutya, neoli, neveyine:" 
2Chronicles11:12 nakuzo zonke izixeko ngezinye wabeka amakaka nemikonto, wakolisa ukuzinqabisa kakulu: baye o‐Juda no‐Benjamine bebengabake." 
2Chronicles11:13 Kanjalo abaperisite naba‐Levi, ababekuyo yonke i‐Sirayeli, batelela kuye bevela kuyo yonke imida yabo." 
2Chronicles11:14 Ngokuba aba‐Levi bebeshiya inqele zabo, nemfuyo yabo, baya kwa‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme: (ngokuba u‐Jerobome nonyana bake bebebalahlile ukuba bangakonzi ngobuperisite kuyehova:" 
2Chronicles11:15 wayezimisele ngokwake abaperisite, babe ngabendawo ezipakamileyo, nabedemoni, nabamatole abewenzile.)" 
2Chronicles11:16 Nasemva kwabo, bevela kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, abo babekisayo intliziyo zabo ukumfuna uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, beza e‐Yerusaleme, ukuba babingelele kuyehova, utixo woyise babo." 
2Chronicles11:17 Baza babuqinisa ubukumkani bakwa‐Juda, bamomeleza u‐Rehobome unyana ka‐Solomone, iminyaka yamitatu; ngokuba bebehamba ngendlela ka‐Davide no‐Solomone iminyaka yamitatu." 
2Chronicles11:18 Kekaloku u‐Rehobome wamzeka u‐Mahalate, intombi ka‐Jerimote unyana ka‐Davide, abe ngumfazi; no‐ Abihayili, intombi ka‐Eliyabe unyana ka‐Jese," 
2Chronicles11:19 owamzalela abantwana, u‐Yehushe, no‐Shemariya, no‐Zahame." 
2Chronicles11:20 Nasemva kwake wamzeka u‐Mahaka intombi ka‐Abasalome, owamzalela u‐Abiya, no‐Hatai, no‐Ziza, no‐Shelomiti." 
2Chronicles11:21 Waza u‐Rehobome watanda u‐Mahaka intombi ka‐Abasalome, ngapezu kwabo bonke abafazi bake namashweshwe ake: (ngokuba ebezekile abafazi abalishumi linesibozo, namashweshwe amashumi matandatu; wazala onyana abamashumi mabini enesibozo, nentombi ezimashumi matandatu.)" 
2Chronicles11:22 Kanjako wammisela intloko u‐Abiya unyana ka‐Mahaka, ukuba abe yinkosi pakati kwabazalwana bake: ngokuba ebecinga ukumenza ukumkani." 
2Chronicles11:23 Wayesenza ngokulumkileyo, wacita kubo bonke onyana bake pakati kwawo onke amazwe akwa‐Juda nawakwa‐Benjamine, kuzo zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, wabanika ukutya ngento eninzi; wa ba funela isininzi sabafazi kanjalo." 
2Chronicles12:1 KWAYE kute, nxa u‐Rehobome abeqinisile ubukumkani, nanxa womelelayo, washiya umteto kayehova, no‐Sirayeli bonke kunye naye." 
2Chronicles12:2 Kwaza kwati, ngowesihlanu umnyaka wokumkani u‐Rehobome, wenyuka u‐Shishaki ukumkani we‐Jipete ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, ngokuba bebenze ngobumenemene ngakuye uyehova," 
2Chronicles12:3 enenqwelo ezimakulu alishumi linesibini, nabakweli bamahashe abangamawaka angamashumi matandatu: baye bengenakubalwa abantu abavela naye e‐Jipete, ama‐Libiya, nama‐Sukime, nama‐Tiyopiya." 
2Chronicles12:4 Waza watimba izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo ezizezakwa‐Juda, weza kufika nase‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles12:5 Wandula u‐Shemaya umprofite weza ku‐Rehobome, nakwinkosi zakwa‐Juda ezazibutele e‐Yerusaleme ngenxa ka‐Shishaki, wayesiti kubo: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Nina nindishiyile mna, ngako nam ndinishiyile nina esandleni sika‐Shishaki." 
2Chronicles12:6 Zaza zazigoba inkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli, nokumkani; baye besiti: Ulungile uyehova." 
2Chronicles12:7 Akubona uyehova ukuba bazigobile, kweza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Shemaya, lisiti: Bazigobile, andiyi kubatshabalalisa; koko ndiya kubanika ukusinda ngomzuzwana, uze umsindo wam ungatululwa pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme ngesandla sika‐Shishaki." 
2Chronicles12:8 Noko, boba ngabakonzi kuye; ukuze bayazi inkonzo yam, nenkonzo yabo ubukumkani bamazwe." 
2Chronicles12:9 Wenyuka ke u‐Shishaki ukumkani we‐Jipete ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, wasusa indyebo zendlu kayehova, nendyebo zendlu yokumkani; kwa zonke wazisusa: wasusa namakaka egolide abewenzile u‐Solomone." 
2Chronicles12:10 Waza ukumkani u‐Rehobome wawenza endaweni yawo amakaka exina, wawanikela esandleni senkosi zomlisela, obugcina umnyango wendlu yokumkani." 
2Chronicles12:11 Kwaye kute, nxa asukuba ebesiya ukumkani endlwini kayehova, weza umlisela wawatwala, wabuya weza nawo enkambilini yomlisela." 
2Chronicles12:12 Kekaloku ekuzigobeni kwake, kwaguquka kuye ingqumbo kayehova, ukuze angagqibeli uku m tshabalalisa: kanjako nakwa‐Juda beziseko into ezilungileyo." 
2Chronicles12:13 Kwa njalo ukumkani u‐Rehobome wazomeleza e‐Yerusaleme, wapata ubukumkani: ngokuba u‐Rehobome ebeyiminyaka engamashumi mane anamnye ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, waza wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinesixe̔nxe e‐Yerusaleme, isixeko abesinyulile uyehova kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, ukuba alibeke igama lake kona. Igama lonina lalingu‐Nahama, um‐Hamonikazi." 
2Chronicles12:14 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo, ekubeni ebengabekisanga intliziyo yake ukumfuna uyehova." 
2Chronicles12:15 Nemicimbi ka‐Rehobome, eyokuqala neyokupela, ayiba̔lwanga na yona emazwini ka‐Shemaya umprofite, no‐Hido umboni, esiba̔lelweni sokuzalwa? Kwaye kuko imfazwe pakati kwo‐Rehobome no‐Jerobome yonke imihla yabo." 
2Chronicles12:16 Wada walala u‐Rehobome noyise bake, wancw̔atywa esixekweni sika‐Davide; waza u‐Abiya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles13:1 NGOWESHUMI linesibozo umnyaka wokumkani u‐Jerobome, waba ngukumkani u‐Abiya pezu kwo‐Juda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Ibiyiminyaka mitatu wabepata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina lalingu‐Mikaya, intombi ka‐Wuriyeli, owase‐Gibeha. Kwabekuko imfazwe pakati kwo‐Abiya no‐Jerobome." 
2Chronicles13:3 Waza u‐Abiya wahlanganisa ukulwa ngempi yamagoṙa okulwa, yamawaka angamakulu mane amadoda anyuliweyo: wati no‐Jerobome wacwangcisela ukulwa ngakuye, enamawaka angamakulu asibozo amadoda anyuliweyo, amagoṙa abuṙoti." 
2Chronicles13:4 Wasuka wema u‐Abiya pezu kwentaba ye‐Tsemarayime, esentabeni yakwa‐Frayime, wati: Ndipulapuleni, wena Jerobome, no‐Sirayeli bonke!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Ninga ningakwazi na ukuba uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, wanika ubukumkani ku‐Davide pezu kwo‐Sirayeli kude kube ngunapakade, kwa kuye nakonyana bake, ngocebano lwetyuwa?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Kanti upakamile u‐Jerobome unyana ka‐Nebati, isicaka sika‐Solomone unyana ka‐Davide, wavukela ngasenkosini yake." 
2Chronicles13:7 Kuhlanganisene kuye namadoda angendawo, usapo lwobunginingini, abezikalipisa ngakuye u‐Rehobome unyana ka‐Solomone, nxa u‐Rehobome ebengumfana, etambile ngentliziyo, ukuba ebengenako ukuzomeleza ngakuwo." 
2Chronicles13:8 Nakaloku niti niya kuzomeleza ngakubo ubukumkani bukayehova, obu sesandleni sonyana baka‐Davide: kanjalo nina nisisihlwele esikulu, nakunye nani kuko amatole egolide, lawo u‐Jerobome abenenzela abe ngotixo." 
2Chronicles13:9 Anibagxotanga na abaperisite bakayehova, onyana baka‐Arone, naba‐Levi, nazenzela abaperisite njengabantu bamazwe? ade ati osukuba esiza ukuzitwasisa ngenkunzana elitole lenkomo nangenkunzi zegusha ezisixe̔nxe, abe ngumperisite wabangengotixo." 
2Chronicles13:10 Kodwa tina, uyehova ngutixo wetu, asimshiyanga: kanjako abaperisite, abakonzayo kuyehova, bangonyana baka‐Arone: naba‐Levi basemsebenzini wabo:" 
2Chronicles13:11 bayatshisa kuyehova amadini okutshiswa ngokusa ngokusa nangokuhlwa ngokuhlwa, nesiqumiso esimnandi: bayalungisa ukuṙozwa kwezonka pezu kwetafile ecocekileyo; nekandelare yegolide nezibane zayo, ukuvutisa ngokuhlwa ngokuhlwa; ngokuba tina siwugcina isigcinelo sikayehova, utixo wetu; nina kanti nimshiyile." 
2Chronicles13:12 Kanjalo, bona ke, kuko nati utixo ngokuba yintloko, nabaperisite benamaxilongo okuvusa, ukuba bahlokomise ivuso ngakuni. Lusapo luka‐Sirayeli! ningalwi ngakuye uyehova, utixo woyihlo benu; ngokuba ningayi kuhambiseka." 
2Chronicles13:13 Kodwa u‐Jerobome wazekelelisa abalaleli ukuza ngasemva kwabo: baza bako abanye ngapambi kwo‐Juda, nabalaleli ngasemva kwabo." 
2Chronicles13:14 Bati bakubekabeka o‐Juda, bona ke, banokulwa ngapambili nangasemva; bandula bakala kuyehova, nabaperisite bahlokomisa amaxilongo." 
2Chronicles13:15 Aza amadoda akwa‐Juda amemeza: kwaza kwati, akumemeza amadoda akwa‐Juda, wandula utixo wabeta u‐Jerobome no‐Sirayeli bonke pambi kwo‐Abiya no‐Juda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Lwasuka usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwesaba pambi kwo‐Juda; waza utixo walunikela esandleni sabo. 
2Chronicles13:17 Kekaloku u‐Abiya nabantu bake balubulala ngokubulala okukulu; ada awa ehlatyiwe ko‐Sirayeli amadoda anyuliweyo angamawaka angamakulu mahlanu. 
2Chronicles13:18 Lwaye lutotyiswa ke usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngexesha elo; kodwa usapo luka‐Juda lwaba namandla, ngokuba belusayama kuye uyehova, utixo woyise balo." 
2Chronicles13:19 Waza u‐Abiya wamputuma u‐Jerobome, wazitimba kuye izixeko, i Betele namagxamesi ayo, ne‐Yeshana namagxamesi ayo, ne‐Hefrone namagxamesi ayo." 
2Chronicles13:20 Waye u‐Jerobome engabi sabamba amandla emihleni ka‐Abiya: wati uyehova wambeta, wada wabuba." 
2Chronicles13:21 Koko u‐Abiya womelelayo; wazizekela abafazi abalishumi linesine, wazala onyana abangamashumi mabini anesibini, nentombi ezilishumi linesitandatu." 
2Chronicles13:22 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Abiya, nemikwa yake, namazwi ake, iba̔liwe yona embalisweni yomprofite u‐Hido." 
2Chronicles14:1 WADA u‐Abiya walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa esixekweni sika‐Davide; waza u‐Asa unyana wake wapata ubukumkani esikundleni sake. Kweyake imihla ilizwe lalonwabile iminyaka yalishumi." 
2Chronicles14:2 Waye u‐Asa esenza okulungileyo nokufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, utixo wake:" 
2Chronicles14:3 ngokuba ebesusa izibingelo zotixo basemzini, nendawo ezipakamileyo; waqekeza intsika zamatye, ne‐Ashera wazigaula;" 
2Chronicles14:4 kanjalo waxelela o‐Juda ukuba bafune uyehova, utixo woyise babo, nokuba benze ngomteto nangomyalelo." 
2Chronicles14:5 Waza wazisusa kuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda indawo ezipakamileyo nezifanekiselo zelanga: baye ubukumkani bonwabile pambi kwake. 
2Chronicles14:6 Wayesaka izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo kwa‐Juda: ngokuba ilizwe belonwabile, kungabangako imfazwe kuye ngalominyaka nje; ngokuba ebempumzile uyehova." 
2Chronicles14:7 Ngako wabete ko‐Juda: Makesizake izixeko ezi, sizenze indonga ngokungqonga, nenqaba, ingcango, nemivalo, nxa ilizwe lisepambi kwetu: ngokuba simfunile uyehova, utixo wetu; sa m funa ke, wasipumza ngamacala onke. Baza baka ke, bahambiseka." 
2Chronicles14:8 Kekaloku u‐Asa wabenempi yamawaka angamakulu matatu abakwa‐Juda, betwele amakaka nemikonto, namawaka angamakulu mabini anamashumi asibozo abakwa‐Benjamine, abatwali bengweletshetshe nabatyedi bezipeta: bonke aba bebengamagoṙa abuṙoti." 
2Chronicles14:9 Kwaye kupuma ngakubo u‐Zera um‐Tiyopiya, enempi y amadoda angamawaka aliwaka, nenqwelo ezingamakulu matatu; wayesiza kude kwase‐Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:10 Wandula u‐Asa wapuma ngakuye; baza bacwangcisela ukulwa esihlanjeni se‐Tsefata ngase‐Maresha. 
2Chronicles14:11 Waye u‐Asa wabiza kuyehova, utixo wake, wati: Yehova! asi nto kuwe ukunceda, nokuba ngabanamandla, nokuba ngabaswele amandla: sincede, Yehova, Tixo wetu! ngokuba sisayama kuwe, nangegama lako sizile ngakuso esisihlwele. Yehova! u ngutixo wetu wena; maingakwoyisi into engumntu." 
2Chronicles14:12 Waza uyehova wabeta ama‐Tiyopiya pambi kwo‐Asa napambi kwo‐Juda; ati ama‐Tiyopiya esaba. 
2Chronicles14:13 Koko u‐Asa nabantu abebenaye bawaputuma kwada kwase‐Gerari; andula awa kuwo ama‐Tiyopiya, kwada akwabiko ukugcinwa kwobomi kuwo; ngokuba ebecitwa pambi kwoyehova, napambi kwomkosi wake: bada bemka namaxoba amaninzi kakulu." 
2Chronicles14:14 Kanjalo babeta zonke izixeko ezingqongayo i‐Gerari; ngokuba ulwoyiko lukayehova belubako pezu kwazo: baza bazipanga zonke izixeko ezo; ngokuba impango eninzi ibipakati kwazo. 
2Chronicles14:15 Babeta nentente yenkomo, batimba igusha ngento eninzi, nenkamela, babuyela e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles15:1 KWAYE kusiza pezu kwo‐Hazariya unyana ka‐Hodedi umoya katixo: 
2Chronicles15:2 waza wapuma ukuya kuhlangabeza u‐Asa, wati kuye: Ndipulapuleni, Asa, nabo bonke o‐Juda no‐Benjamine! uyehova woba nani, nxa niman’ ukuba naye; kanjalo ukuba niyamfuna, uya kufunyanwa nini; kanti ukuba niyamshiya, uya kushiya nina." 
2Chronicles15:3 Kekaloku kwasekuntsuku ezininzi o‐Sirayeli bebengenaye utixo wenyaniso, nomperisite wokufundisa, nomteto." 
2Chronicles15:4 Kodwa bakuguqukela kuyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ekuxinezekeni kwabo, bamfuna ke, waselefunyanwa ngabo." 
2Chronicles15:5 Kanjako, ngamaxesha lawo, bekungeko uxolo kulowo upumayo, nakulowo ungenayo; koko izipitipiti ezikulu bezipezu kwabo bonke abemi bamazwe;" 
2Chronicles15:6 bada batyunyuzwa, isizwe ngakuso isizwe, nesixeko ngakuso isixeko: ngokuba utixo wabapitizelisa ngentlobo zonke zobunzima." 
2Chronicles15:7 Ngako nina yomelelani; mazingapolelwa izandla zenu: ngokuba kuko umvuzo emsebenzini wenu. 
2Chronicles15:8 Wati akuva u‐Asa lamazwi, nesiprofitesho sika‐Hodedi umprofite, wazomeleza, wakwelelisa izinto ezibuntshontsho kulo lonke ilizwe lakwa‐Juda nelakwa‐Benjamine, nakuzo izixeko wabezitimbile entabeni yakwa‐Frayime, wahlaziya isibingelo sikayehova, esibe sipambi kwentendelezo kayehova." 
2Chronicles15:9 Waza wahlanganisa bonke o‐Juda no‐Benjamine, nabasemzini kunye nabo, bevela kwa‐Frayime, na kwa‐Manase, nakwa‐Simone: ngokuba bebepongomela kuye ko‐Sirayeli ngento eninzi, bakubona ukuba uyehova, utixo wake, unaye." 
2Chronicles15:10 Baya bazihlanganisela e‐Yerusaleme, ngenyanga yesitatu, ngoweshumi linesihlanu umnyaka wobukumkani buka‐Asa." 
2Chronicles15:11 Baza babingela uyehova ngomhla lowo, kuwo amaxoba babewazisile, inkabi ezingamakulu asixe̔nxe, negusha ezingamawaka asixe̔nxe." 
2Chronicles15:12 Baye bengena elucebanweni, ukuba bamfune uyehova, utixo woyise babo, ngayo yonke intliziyo yabo, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wabo;" 
2Chronicles15:13 nokuba osukuba engayi kumfuna uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, afiswe, nokuba umncinane, nokuba umkulu, nokuba uyindoda, nokuba ungumfazi." 
2Chronicles15:14 Baye befunga kuyehova ngelizwi elikulu, nangokumemeza, nangamaxilongo, nangempondo." 
2Chronicles15:15 Bati o‐Juda bonke bavuya pezu kwesifungo eso: ngokuba ngayo yonke intliziyo yabo bebefungile, nangayo yonke intando yabo bebemfunile: wada wafunyanwa ngabo, waza uyehova wabanika ukupumla ngokungqonga." 
2Chronicles15:16 Kanjako no‐Mahaka, unina ka‐Asa ukumkani, wamshenxisa ukuba angabi ngukumkanikazi, ngokokuba ebelenzile idalo ku‐Ashera; waza u‐Asa wagaula idalo lake, walikanda, walitshisa ngasemlanjaneni we‐Kidrone." 
2Chronicles15:17 Kodwa indawo ezipakamileyo bezingasuswa kwa‐Sirayeli: noko intliziyo ka‐Asa ibikolisekile yonke imihla yake. 
2Chronicles15:18 Wayezingenisa izinto ezingcwele zoyise, nezake izinto ezingcwele, endlwini katixo, isilivere, negolide, nempahla." 
2Chronicles15:19 Kwaza akwabiko imfazwe kwada kwangumnyaka wamashumi matatu anesihlanu wobukumkani buka‐Asa. 
2Chronicles16:1 KEKALOKU ngomnyaka wamashumi matatu anesitandatu wobukumkani buka‐Asa, kwenyuka u‐Bahasha ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli ngakwa‐Juda, wayaka i‐Rama, ukuze angavumeli namnye ukupuma nokungena ku‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Wandula u‐Asa wakupa isilivere negolide ezindyetyweni zendlu kayehova nendlu yokumkani, watuma ku‐Bene‐hadadi, ukumkani we‐Siriya, obehlala e‐Damakusi, esiti:" 
2Chronicles16:3 Kuko ucebano pakati kwam nawe, napakati kwobawo wam noyihlo wako: bona ke, nditumile kuwe isilivere negolide; hamba, wapule ucebano lwako no‐Bahasha ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ukuba enyuke kum." 
2Chronicles16:4 Wapulapula ke u‐Bene‐hadadi kukumkani u‐Asa, watuma inkosi zezimpi abenazo ngakuzo izixeko zakwa‐Sirayeli; zaza zabeta i‐Hiyone, ne‐Dane, ne‐Abele‐mayime, nazo zonke izixeko zokubekela zakwa‐Nefatali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Kwaza kwati, nxa abevile oku u‐Bahasha, wayeka ukwaka i‐Rama, wapelisa umsebenzi wake." 
2Chronicles16:6 Wandula u‐Asa ukumkani watabata o‐Juda bonke, abasusa amatye e‐Rama, nemiti yayo, abe akile ngazo u‐Bahasha: waza waka ngazo i‐Geba ne‐Mitsipa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Kwa ngeloxesha ke, kweza u‐Hanani umboni ku‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda, wati kuye: Ngenxa yokuba wayamile kukumkani we‐Siriya, ungayamanga nje kuyehova, utixo wako, ngako oko isindile impi yokumkani we‐Siriya esandleni sako." 
2Chronicles16:8 Ama‐Tiyopiya nama‐Libiya ebengeyiyo impi enkulu na, enento eninzi kakulu yenqwelo nabakweli bamahashe? Kodwa, wakwayama kuyehova, wawanikela esandleni sako." 
2Chronicles16:9 Ngokuba uyehova, amehlo ake ayasingasinga kuwo wonke umhlaba, ukuba azomelezele abantliziyo ikolisekile ngakuye. Wenzile ngobudenge ngalento; ngokuba kaloku kuya kumana kubako imfazwe kuwe." 
2Chronicles16:10 Waza u‐Asa waqumbela umboni, wamfaka entolongweni; ngokuba ebenomsindo ngakuye pezu kwalento. Waye u‐Asa kanjalo encinezela abantu ngexesha elo inxenye." 
2Chronicles16:11 Kekaloku, bona ke, imicimbi ka‐Asa, eyokuqala neyokupela, bona ke, iba̔liwe yona encwadini yokumkani bo‐Juda no‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles16:12 Kodwa ngowamashumi matatu anesitoba umnyaka wobukumkani bake, wabenesifo u‐Asa ezinyaweni zake, sada isifo sake saba sikulu kunene: kanti nasesifeni sake akafuna uyehova, koko wafuna incibi zamayeza." 
2Chronicles16:13 Wada u‐Asa walala noyise bake; wabuba ngomnyaka wamashumi mane anesinye wokupata kwake ubukumkani. 
2Chronicles16:14 Baza bamncw̔aba encw̔abeni lake, elo wabezimbele esixekweni sika‐Davide, bamlalisa esililini abelizalisile ngezimnandi, kwa intlobo ngentlobo, zimanyiwe ngobuncibi bomenzi wezinukamnandi; bamtshisela isitshiselwa esikulu kakulu kanjalo." 
2Chronicles17:1 WAZA u‐Yehoshafate unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake, wazomeleza ngako‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles17:2 Wayebeka izimpi kuzo zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwa‐Juda, wazimisa ilali elizweni lakwa‐Juda, nasezixekweni zakwa‐Frayime, ezo wabezitimbile u‐Asa uyise." 
2Chronicles17:3 Kanjalo uyehova ebenaye u‐Yehoshafate, ngokuba wahambayo ngezokuqala indlela zika‐Davide uyise, akafuna ke o‐Bali;" 
2Chronicles17:4 koko wamfuna utixo woyise, wahamba ngemiyalelo yake, aka hamba ngokwenza kwo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles17:5 Ngako uyehova wabuqinisa ubukumkani esandleni sake; bati o‐Juda bonke banika amabaso ku‐Yehoshafate; wada wanobutyebi nodumo ngento eninzi. 
2Chronicles17:6 Yaza intliziyo yake yapakama ezindleleni zikayehova: nakanjako wasusa indawo ezipakamileyo nemifanekiso ka‐Ashera kwa‐Juda. 
2Chronicles17:7 Kekaloku ngowesitatu umnyaka wokupata kwake ubukumkani watumela kwinkosi zake, ku‐Bene‐hayili, naku‐Hobadiya, naku‐Zekariya, naku‐Netaneli, naku‐Mikaya, ukuba kufundiswe ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda." 
2Chronicles17:8 Nakunye nabo watuma aba‐Levi, u‐Shemaya, no‐Netaniya, no‐Zebadiya, no‐Hasaheli, no‐Shemiramote, no‐Jonatane, no‐Adonija, no‐Tobiya, no‐Tobe‐adonija, aba‐Levi; nakunye nabo u‐Elis ama, no‐Yerohame, abaperisite." 
2Chronicles17:9 Baza bafundisa kwa‐Juda, benayo incwadi yomteto kayehova, bacanda kuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda, bafundisa pakati kwabantu." 
2Chronicles17:10 Kwaye kubako ulwoyiko lukayehova pezu kwabo bonke ubukumkani bamazwe angqongayo i‐Juda, ukuba abenza imfazwe ngakuye u‐Yehoshafate." 
2Chronicles17:11 Kanjalo inxenye yama Filistiya yamzisela u‐Yehoshafate amabaso, nesilivere yokunikela; nama‐Arabi amzisela inkomo ezincinane, inkunzi zegusha ezingamawaka asixe̔nxe anamakulu asixe̔nxe, nenkunzi zebokwe ezingamawaka asixe̔nxe anamakulu asixe̔nxe." 
2Chronicles17:12 Waye u‐Yehoshafate emana ukuba mkulu ngento egqitiseleyo; waza waka kwa‐Juda inqaba nezixeko zokubekela. 
2Chronicles17:13 Wayenemisebenzi emininzi ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda: kanjako amadoda okulwa, amagoṙa obuṙoti, ebese‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles17:14 Nanku ukubalwa kwawo njengendlu zoyise zawo. Awakwa‐Juda, inkosi zamawaka: ngu‐Hadena oyinkosi, nakunye naye amagoṙa obuṙoti angamawaka angamakulu matatu:" 
2Chronicles17:15 nasemva kwake ngu‐Jehohanane oyinkosi, nakunye naye amawaka angamakulu mabini enamashumi asibozo:" 
2Chronicles17:16 nasemva kwake ngu‐Hamasiya unyana ka‐Zikeri, owazinikela kuyehova ngokutumekelela, nakunye naye amawaka angamakulu mabini amagoṙa obuṙoti." 
2Chronicles17:17 Nakubo o‐Benjamine: ngu‐Eliyada, igoṙa lobuṙoti, nakunye naye amawaka angamakulu mabini epete isipeta nekakana:" 
2Chronicles17:18 nasemva kwake ngu‐Yehozabadi, nakunye naye amawaka alikulu linamashumi asibozo exo̔bele ukulwa." 
2Chronicles17:19 La madoda akonza ukumkani, ngapandle kwabewabekile ukumkani ezixekweni ezinqatyisiweyo kuyo yonke i‐Juda." 
2Chronicles18:1 KEKALOKU u‐Yehoshafate ebenobutyebi nodumo ngento eninzi; watshatiselana no‐Ahabi kanjalo. 
2Chronicles18:2 Wayesihla ekupeleni kweminyaka etile waya ku‐Ahabi e‐Samariya. Waza u‐Ahabi waxe̔lela yena nabantu ababenaye igusha nenkabi, into eninzi, wamcenga ukuba enyuke naye ukuya e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ngokuba ebesiti u‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli kuye u‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda: Uya kuhamba na nam ukuya e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi? Wayesiti kuye: Ndinjalo mna, njengokuba unjalo wena, nanjengokuba benjalo abantu bako, banjalo abantu bam; sasiya kuba nawe kulemfazwe." 
2Chronicles18:4 Walekela u‐Yehoshafate wati kuye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: Kaubuze ke namhla elizwini likayehova. 
2Chronicles18:5 Wandula ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wahlanganisa abaprofite, amadoda angamakulu mane, wati kubo: Siya kuya e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi ukulwa, ndiya kuyeka, kusinina? Bati: Nyuka; ngokuba utixo eya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani." 
2Chronicles18:6 Wati kodwa u‐Yehoshafate: Akuseko na apa umprofite kayehova, ukuba sibuze ngaye?" 
2Chronicles18:7 Waza ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wati ku‐Yehoshafate: Kuseko indoda inye, ekungabuzwayo kuyehova ngayo, kodwa ndiyayitiya, ngokuba ingaprofiteshi ngam okulungileyo, koko iprofitesha okubi ngamaxesha onke; nguye u‐Mikaya unyana ka‐Yimla. Wayesiti u‐Yehoshafate: Makangatsho njalo ukumkani!" 
2Chronicles18:8 Wandula ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wambiza umbusi, wati: Nxama umzise u‐Mikaya unyana ka‐Yimla." 
2Chronicles18:9 Kekaloku ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, no‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda, bahlala omnye nomnye pezu kweterone yake, bevatisiwe ngezivato zobukumkani, behleli enkundleni ngasemnyango wesango le‐Samariya; bati abaprofite bonke baprofitesha ebusweni babo." 
2Chronicles18:10 Kanjalo u‐Zedekiya unyana ka‐Kenana ebezenzele impondo zesincete; waza wati: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngazo ezi uya kunquba ama‐Siriya ude uwagqibele. 
2Chronicles18:11 Benje njalo nabaprofite bonke ukuprofitesha, besiti: Nyuka uye e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi, utamsanqeleke; ngokuba uyehova eya kuyinikela esandleni sokumkani." 
2Chronicles18:12 Kekaloku isigidimi esibe siye ukumbiza u‐Mikaya sateta kuye, sisiti: Bona ke, amazwi abaprofite ngomlomo mnye ateta okulungileyo kukumkani; makeliti ke ilizwi lako libe njengelomnye kubo, uz’ utete okulungileyo." 
2Chronicles18:13 Wati kodwa u‐Mikaya: Ehleli nje uyehova, oko akutshoyo utixo wam, ndiya kuteta kwa kona." 
2Chronicles18:14 Wasuka weza kukumkani. Waza wati ukumkani kuye: Mikaya! siya kuya e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi ukulwa, ndiya kuyeka, kusinina? Wayesiti: Nyukani, nitamsanqeleke; ngokuba beya kunikelwa esandleni senu." 
2Chronicles18:15 Waza wati ukumkani kuye: Kwoda kube ngamaxesha mangapina ndiya kukufungisa, ukuba ungateti nto kum, kupela ibe yinyaniso, egameni likayehova?" 
2Chronicles18:16 Wayesiti: Ndabona o‐Sirayeli bonke bete sa pezu kwentaba, njengegusha ezingenaye umalusi; wati ke uyehova: Akuko inkosi kubo aba; mababuye abanye ngabanye baye ezindlwini zabo ngoxolo." 
2Chronicles18:17 Waza ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wati ku‐Yehoshafate: Andite kuwe na, akayi kuprofitesha ngam okulungileyo, koko eya kuprofitesha okubi?" 
2Chronicles18:18 Wayesiti: Ngako oko yivani ilizwi likayehova: Ndabona uyehova ehleli pezu kweterone yake, nawo wonke umkosi wasezulwini umi ngasekunene kwake nangasekohlo kwake." 
2Chronicles18:19 Waza wati uyehova: Ngubanina oya kuhenda u‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ukuba enyuke, enzakale e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi? Wati omnye esiti ngokuti, nomnye esiti ngokuti." 
2Chronicles18:20 Wada wapuma umoya, wema pambi kwoyehova, wati: Ndiya kumhenda mna. Wati uyehova kuye: Nganina?" 
2Chronicles18:21 Wayesiti: Ndiya kupuma, ndize ndibe ngumoya wobuxoki emlonyeni wabo bonke abaprofite bake. Wati: Uya kuhenda, wauya kweyisa kanjalo; puma, wenje njalo ke." 
2Chronicles18:22 Ngako kaloku, bona ke, uyehova ubekile umoya wobuxoki emlonyeni wabo ababaprofite bako; kanjalo uyehova utetile ngawe okubi." 
2Chronicles18:23 Wandula wasondela u‐Zedekiya unyana ka‐Kenana, wambeta u‐Mikaya esidleleni, wati: Wadlula ngayipina indlela umoya kayehova evela kum ukuya kuteta nawe?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Wayesiti u‐Mikaya: Bona ke, uya kubona ngalomini uya kungena ngayo enkambilini yapakati, ukuba uzimele." 
2Chronicles18:25 Waza wati ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: Tabatani u‐Mikaya, nimbuyisele ku‐Amoni inkosi yesixeko, naku‐Yohashe unyana wokumkani," 
2Chronicles18:26 niti: Utsho ukumkani ukuti: Fakani lo entolongweni, nimdlise isonka sembandezelo namanzi embandezelo, ndide ndibuye ngoxolo." 
2Chronicles18:27 Waza wati u‐Mikaya: Ukuba uka ubuye ngoxolo, uyehova akatetanga ngam. Walekela wati: Pulapulani, bantu, nina nonke!" 
2Chronicles18:28 Wandula wenyuka ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, no‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda, ukuya e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi" 
2Chronicles18:29 Waza ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wati ku‐Yehoshafate: Ndiya kuzenza ngakumbi, ndingene pakati kwokulwa; kodwa wena, yambata izivato zako zobukumkani. Kwa njalo ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wazenza ngakumbi; baza bangena pakati kwokulwa." 
2Chronicles18:30 Kekaloku ukumkani we‐Siriya ebeyalele inkosi zenqwelwana abenazo, ngokuti: Aniyi kulwa kwa nabancinane nabakulu, kupela niya kulwa nokumkani wo‐Sirayeli yedwa." 
2Chronicles18:31 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni inkosi zenqwelwana zambonayo u‐Yehoshafate, zasezisiti: Ngukumkani wo‐Sirayeli lowo. Zaza zamṙaula kuliwe; kodwa u‐Yehoshafate wakala, wati uyehova wamsiza: wada utixo wazinqanda kuye." 
2Chronicles18:32 Ngokuba bekute, zakubona inkosi zenqwelwana ukuba asi nguye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, zabuya ekumlandeleni." 
2Chronicles18:33 Yandula indoda etile yatyeda isipeta ekungazini kwayo, yambeta ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli pakati kwamakonxo nehempe yentsimbi. Ngako wati kumbexeshi: Songa isandla sako, upume nam emkosini; ngokuba ndenziwe inxeba." 
2Chronicles18:34 Kwaye kusanda ukulwa ngalomini; waza ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wazixasa enqwelwaneni malangana nama‐Siriya kwada kwahlwa; wada wafa ngexesha lokutshona kwelanga. 
2Chronicles19:1 Wasuka u‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda wabuyela endlwini yake ngoxolo, e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles19:2 Waza wapuma u‐Jehu unyana ka‐Hanani, umboni, ukuya kumhlangabeza, wati kukumkani u‐Yehoshafate: Unga unceda na okohlakeleyo, nabo bamtiyayo uyehova ubatande na? ngako ngenxa yoku kupezu kwako umsindo uvela ebusweni bukayehova." 
2Chronicles19:3 Noko ke izinto ezilungileyo zifunyenwe kuwe, ukuba uyisusile imifanekiso ka‐Ashera elizweni, nokuba uyibekisile intliziyo yako ukumfuna utixo." 
2Chronicles19:4 KEKALOKU u‐Yehoshafate wahlala e‐Yerusaleme: wada wabuya wapuma pakati kwabantu, kwa kuyo i‐Beresheba kwada kwakuyo intaba yakwa‐Frayime, wababuyisela kuyehova, utixo woyise babo." 
2Chronicles19:5 Waza wamisa abagwebi elizweni, kuzo zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwa‐Juda, isixeko ngesixeko," 
2Chronicles19:6 wati kubagwebi: Gqalani oko nikwenzayo; ngokuba kungengenxa yabantu enigwebayo, koko kungenxa kayehova, okunye nani entweni yokugweba." 
2Chronicles19:7 Ngako kaloku ulwoyiko lukayehova malube pezu kwenu: lumkani neuze ke; ngokuba kungeko noyehova, utixo wetu, ubumenemene, nokubuka ubuso, nokwamkela amabaso." 
2Chronicles19:8 Nakanjako e‐Yerusaleme wamisa u‐Yehoshafate inxenye yaba‐Levi nabaperisite, nenxenye yabazintloko zendlu zoyise zo‐Sirayeli, ngenxa yokugweba kukayehova, nangenxa yamapike; bakubuyela e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles19:9 Waza wabayalela ngokuti: Niya kwenje njalo ngokwoyika uyehova, ngenyaniso, nangentliziyo ekolisekileyo." 
2Chronicles19:10 Nawo onke amapike aya kuza kuni, evela kubo abazalwana benu abahleli ezixekweni zabo, pakati kwegazi negazi, pakati kwomteto nomyalelo, nezimiselo, nezigwebo, niya kwandula nibayale ukuba mabangabi natyala ngakuye uyehova, ude uhle umsindo pezu kwenu, napezu kwabazalwana benu: yenzani njalo ke, naningayi kuba natyala." 
2Chronicles19:11 Kanjako, bona ke, u‐Amariya, umperisite omkulu, upezu kwenu ngenxa yayo yonke imicimbi kayehova; no‐Zebadiya unyana ka‐Shimayeli, inkosi yendlu ka‐Juda, ngenxa yayo yonke imicimbi yokumkani; boti naba‐Levi babe ngamagosa ebusweni benu: yomelelani nenze ke, waye uyehova eya kuba nalowo ulungileyo." 
2Chronicles20:1 KWABEKUTE emveni kwoku, kweza usapo luka‐Mowabi, nosapo luka‐Hamoni, nakunye nalo abanye ngapandle kwaba‐Hamoni, ngakuye u‐Yehoshafate ukuba kuliwe." 
2Chronicles20:2 Baza bafika abatile bamxelela u‐Yehoshafate, besiti: Kuyeza ngakuwe isihlwele esikulu sivela pesheya kwolwandle, e‐Siriya; nabaya e‐Hatsetsone‐tamare, eyi‐Hene‐gedi." 
2Chronicles20:3 Waza woyika u‐Yehoshafate, wabeka ubuso bake ukumfuna uyehova, washumayela inzilo kuyo yonke i‐Juda." 
2Chronicles20:4 Bazihlanganisa o‐Juda kanjalo, ukuba bafune uncedo kuyehova: bavela kwa kuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda ukuza kumfuna uyehova." 
2Chronicles20:5 Waza wema u‐Yehoshafate entlanganisweni yo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme, endlwini kayehova, ngapambi kwebala elitsha," 
2Chronicles20:6 wati: Yehova, Tixo wobawo betu! akunguye na wena ongutixo ezulwini? akupati ubukosi na wena pezu kwabo bonke ubukumkani babaheyideni? nasesandleni sako akuko na ukwomelela namandla, kungeko ongamelana nawe?" 
2Chronicles20:7 Akunguwe na, utixo wetu, owagqogqayo abemi belilizwe pambi kwabantu bako o‐Sirayeli, waza walinika kuyo inzalo ka‐Abrahame umhlobo wako kude kube ngunapakade?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Bada bahlala kulo, bakwakela kulo indawo eyingcwele ngenxa yegama lako, besiti:" 
2Chronicles20:9 Xeshekweni ilishwa lizayo pezu kwetu, isiṙele, umgwebo, nesifo esibubisayo, nendlala, siya kuma pambi kwalendlu, napambi kwako, (ngokuba igama lako likuyo indlu le,) sikale kuwe ebunzimeni betu, wauya kwandula ukuva nokusiza." 
2Chronicles20:10 Nakaloku, bona ke, usapo luka‐Hamoni, noluka‐Mowabi, nolwasentabeni ye‐Sehire, olo ubungavumeli o‐Sirayeli ukuba bangene pakati kwalo, ekuveleni kwabo elizweni le‐Jipete, koko bapambukayo kulo, bengalutshabalalisanga;" 
2Chronicles20:11 kekaloku, bona ke, luyasivuza ngokuza ukusigxota elifeni lako, osinikileyo ukulidla." 
2Chronicles20:12 Tixo wetu! akuyi kulugweba na? ngokuba kungeko amandla kuti ebusweni besisihlwele sikulu esizayo ngakuti; kanjako asazi tina into esiya kuyenza: kodwa amehlo etu angakuwe. 
2Chronicles20:13 Baye o‐Juda bonke bemi pambi kwoyehova, kwa nosapo lwabo, abafazi babo nabantwana babo." 
2Chronicles20:14 Kwandula kweza pezu kwake u‐Yahaziyeli, unyana ka‐Zekariya, unyana ka‐Benaya, unyana ka‐Yeyeli, unyana ka‐Mataniya, um‐Levi, owonyana baka‐Safa, umoya kayehova, pakati kwentlanganiso;" 
2Chronicles20:15 waza wati: Pulapulani, bo‐Juda bonke, nabemi base‐Yerusaleme, nokumkani Yehoshafate! utsho uyehova kuni ukuti: Ningoyiki, ningatuswa kanjalo, ngenxa yesisihlwele sikulu; ngokuba kungekokwenu ukulwa oku, kuko kukatixo." 
2Chronicles20:16 Ngomso yihlani niye ngakulo: bonani, luyanyuka ngeqina le‐Tsitse: naniya kulufumana encameni yentili, pambi kwentlango ye‐Yeruweli." 
2Chronicles20:17 Asi kokwenu ukulwa koku kulwa: zimiseni, yimani nibone usindiso lukayehova onani, bo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme! ningoyiki, ningatuswa kanjalo; ngomso pumelani ngakulo; ngokuba uyehova enani." 
2Chronicles20:18 Waza u‐Yehoshafate watoba pantsi ngobuso ngasemhlabeni; bati o‐Juda bonke nabemi base‐Yerusaleme bawa pambi kwoyehova, bembedesha uyehova." 
2Chronicles20:19 Basuka bema aba‐Levi, kulo usapo lwama‐Kohati, nakulo usapo lwama‐Kora, ukumdumisa uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngelizwi elikulu ngokupezulu." 
2Chronicles20:20 Baza bavuka kusasa ngomnye umhla, bapuma ukuya entlango yase‐Tekoha; nasekupumeni kwabo wema u‐Yehoshafate, wati: Ndipulapuleni, bo‐Juda, nabemi base‐Yerusaleme! kolwani kuyehova, utixo wenu, naniya kuqiniswa; kolwani kubaprofite bake, naniya kutamsanqeleka," 
2Chronicles20:21 Wandula wacebisana nabantu, wammisela uyehova abaculi, abaya kudumisa ebuhleni bobungcwele, bakupuma pambi kwabaxo̔bileyo, besiti: Bulelani kuyehova; ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade." 
2Chronicles20:22 Kekaloku ngexesha baqalayo ukuvuma nokudumisa, wandula uyehova wamisa abalaleli ngakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, no luka‐Mowabi, nolwasentabeni ye‐Sehire, olube luzile ngakubo o‐Juda; lwaza lwabetwa ke." 
2Chronicles20:23 Ngokuba usapo luka‐Hamoni noluka‐Mowabi belusukela ngakubo abemi bentaba ye‐Sehire, ukuze lugqibele ukubabulala nokubatshabalalisa; naxeshekweni belupelisile abemi bentaba ye‐Sehire, lwanceda olunye ukububisa olunye." 
2Chronicles20:24 Bati bakufika o‐Juda ngasenqatyeni yokulinda entlango, babeka ngasesihlweleni; kekaloku nasiya siyimizimba efileyo iwile pantsi emhlabeni, kungasindanga mntu." 
2Chronicles20:25 Kwandula ukuza u‐Yehoshafate nabantu bake ukupanga amaxoba abo, bafumana pakati kwabo ngobuninzi, kwa impahla, nemizimba efileyo, nezinto ezinqwenelekileyo, bazihlubela kwada kwakohlwa kutwalwa: baye bentsuku ntatu bepanga amaxoba lawo, ngokuba ebemaninzi wona." 
2Chronicles20:26 Nangolwesine usuku, bazihlanganisela emhlanjeni we‐Beraka; ngokuba apo bambonga uyehova: ngako oko kwabizwa igama lalondawo ngokuti ngumhlambo we‐Beraka kwada kwanamhla." 
2Chronicles20:27 Ada abuya onke amadoda akwa‐Juda nawase‐Yerusaleme, no‐Yehoshafate epambi kwawo, ukuya kubuyela e‐Yerusaleme ngovuyo; ngokuba uyehova ebewavuyisile pezu kwentshaba zawo." 
2Chronicles20:28 Aye esiza e‐Yerusaleme, enenebele, nehadi, namaxilongo, endlwini kayehova." 
2Chronicles20:29 Kwasuka kwabako ulwoyiko lukatixo pezu kwabo bonke ubukumkani balomazwe, bakuva okokuba kwaliwa nguyehova ngakuzo intshaba zo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles20:30 Baza ubukumkani buka‐Yehoshafate bonwaba; ngokuba utixo wake wamnika ukupumla ngokungqonga. 
2Chronicles20:31 Kwa njalo u‐Yehoshafate wapata ubukumkani pezu kwo‐Juda: ebeyiminyaka imashumi matatu anesihlanu ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani: wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mabini anamihlanu e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Hazuba, intombi ka‐Shilihi." 
2Chronicles20:32 Waye ehamba ngendlela yoyise u‐Asa, akapambuka kuyo, esenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova:" 
2Chronicles20:33 kodwa indawo ezipakamileyo bezingasuswa; ngokuba abantu bengekabekisanga intliziyo zabo kuye utixo woyise babo. 
2Chronicles20:34 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Yehoshafate, eyokuqala neyokupela, bona ke, iba̔liwe yona emazwini ka‐Jehu unyana ka‐Hanani, abefakwa encwadini yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles20:35 Nasemva kwoko, u‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Juda watelelana no‐Ahaziya ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, owakohlakalisa ukwenza kwake:" 
2Chronicles20:36 wayetelelana naye ukuba kwenziwe inqanawa ukuya e‐Tareshishe: baza bazenza inqanawa e‐Hetsiyone‐gebere. 
2Chronicles20:37 Wandula u‐Eliyezeri, unyana ka‐Dodava, owase‐Maresha, waprofitesha ngakuye u‐Yehoshafate, esiti: Ngokokuba utelelene no‐Ahaziya, uyehova uyicitile imisebenzi yako. Kwa njalo inqanawa zapuka, zaza zakohlwa ukuya e‐Tareshishe." 
2Chronicles21:1 WADA u‐Yehoshafate walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa noyise bake esixekweni sika‐Davide; waza u‐Yehorame unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles21:2 Wayenabaninawe, onyana baka‐Yehoshafate, u‐Hazariya, no‐Yehili, no‐Zekariya, no‐Hazariya, no‐Mikaheli, no‐Shefatiya: bonke aba bebengonyana baka‐Yehoshafate ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles21:3 Wati uyise wabo wabapa amabaso amaninzi, awesilivere, nawegolide, nawezinto ezinqabileyo, kunye nezixeko ezinqatyisiweyo kwa‐Juda; kodwa ubukumkani wabunika ku‐Yehorame; ngokuba ebengowamazibulo yena." 
2Chronicles21:4 Kekaloku xeshekweni abevukile u‐Yehorame pezu kwobukumkani boyise, wandula wazomeleza, wabulala bonke abaninawe bake ngesiṙele, kwa nenxenye yenkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles21:5 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi matatu anamibini u‐Yehorame ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme iminyaka yasibozo." 
2Chronicles21:6 Wayehamba endleleni yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli, njengokuba benje njalo indlu ka‐Ahabi; ngokuba intombi ka‐Ahabi ibingumfazi wake; wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova." 
2Chronicles21:7 Kodwa uyehova ebengavumi ukutshabalalisa indlu ka‐Davide, ngenxa yocebano abelwenzile no‐Davide; nanjengokuba ebete uya kunika isibane kuye, nakonyana bake, amaxesha onke." 
2Chronicles21:8 Emihleni yake ama‐Edome apongoma pantsi kwesandla so‐Juda, enza ukumkani pezu kwawo." 
2Chronicles21:9 Waza wagqita u‐Yehorame kunye nenkosi zake, nazo zonke inqwelwana kunye naye; waselesuka ebusuku, wabeta ama‐Edome abemngqonga, nenkosi zenqwelwana." 
2Chronicles21:10 Noko ama‐Edome apongoma pantsi kwesandla so‐Juda kwada kwanamhla nje. Kwandula kwapongoma i‐Libena kwa ngeloxesha ke pantsi kwesandla sake; ngokuba ebemshiyile uyehova, utixo woyise bake." 
2Chronicles21:11 Kanjako wazenza indawo ezipakamileyo ezintabeni zakwa‐Juda, wenza abemi base‐Yerusaleme bawenze umbulo, wabakukulisa no‐Juda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Kwaza kwafika kuye isiba̔lo, sivela ku‐Elija umprofite, sisiti: Utsho uyehova, utixo ka‐Davide uyihlo wako, ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba ungahambanga ezindleleni zika‐Yehoshafate uyihlo wako, nasezindleleni zika‐Asa ukumkani wo‐Juda," 
2Chronicles21:13 kodwa uhambile endleleni yabo okumkani bo‐Sirayeli, wenza o‐Juda nabemi base‐Yerusaleme bawenze umbulo, njengemibulo yendlu ka‐Ahabi; nokuba kanjalo ubabulele abaninawe bako bendlu kayihlo, abebelungile ngapezu kwako;" 
2Chronicles21:14 bona ke, uyehova uya kubeta ngesibeto esikulu abantu bako, nabantwana bako, nabafazi bako, nayo yonke impahla yako:" 
2Chronicles21:15 nawe uya kuba sezifeni ezininzi, ngaso isifo samatumbu ako, ade apume amatumbu ako ngenxa yesifo eso imihla ngemihla." 
2Chronicles21:16 Kwa njalo uyehova wawuvusa ngakuye u‐Yehorame umoya wama‐Filistiya, nowama‐Arabi, lawo asecaleni lama‐Kushe." 
2Chronicles21:17 Aza enyuka pakati kwe‐Juda, ayoyisa, atimba yonke impahla ebifunyanwa endlwini yokumkani, kwa nonyana bake, nabafazi bake; kwada akwamshiyelwa unyana, kupela u‐Yehowahazi, omncinane wonyana bake." 
2Chronicles21:18 Nasemva kwako konke oku, uyehova wambeta ematunjini ake ngesifo esingenakupiliswa." 
2Chronicles21:19 Kwaza kwati emva kwemihla emininzi, kwa ngexesha lokufika kwesipelo seminyaka mibini, apuma amatumbu ake ngenxa yesosifo; wada wabuba zizifo ezibi: baye abantu bake bengamenzeli isitshiselwa, njengesitshiselwa soyise bake." 
2Chronicles21:20 Ebe yiminyaka imashumi matatu anamibini ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme iminyaka yasibozo: wandula wemka engenakukanukwa, wancw̔atywa esixekweni sika‐Davide, kodwa bekungesemancw̔abeni abo okumkani." 
2Chronicles22:1 BAZA abemi base‐Yerusaleme bamenza u‐Ahaziya, unyana wake omncinane, ukumkani esikundleni sake: ngokuba bonke abakulu ibandla elibe lizile nama‐Arabi emnqubeni belibabulele. Kwa njalo wapata ubukumkani u‐Ahaziya unyana ka‐Yehorame ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mane anamibini u‐Ahaziya ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme umnyaka wamnye. Igama lonina lalingu‐Hataliya, intombi ka‐Omri." 
2Chronicles22:3 Wahamba naye ezindleleni zendlu ka‐Ahabi: ngokuba unina ebengumcebisi wake ukwenza ngobuncwangu. 
2Chronicles22:4 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengendlu ka‐Ahabi: ngokuba bebengabacebisi bake bona, emveni kwokufa kwoyise, kube kukubujiswa kwake." 
2Chronicles22:5 Kanjako wahamba ngecebo labo, waya no‐Yehorame unyana ka‐Ahabi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ukulwa ngakuye u‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya, e‐Ramote yase‐Gileyadi; aza ama‐Siriya ambeta u‐Yorame." 
2Chronicles22:6 Ngako wabuya ukuya kupoliswa e‐Yezerele, ngenxa yamanxeba abewenzelwe e‐Rama, ekulweni kwake no‐Hazayeli ukumkani we‐Siriya. Waza wehla u‐Hazariya unyana ka‐Yehorame ukumkani wo‐Juda, ukuya kubona u‐Yehorame unyana ka‐Ahabi e‐Yezerele, ngokuba ebesifa." 
2Chronicles22:7 Kwaye kuvela kutixo ukutshatyalaliswa kuka‐Ahaziya ngokuza ku‐Yehorame: ngokuba emva kwokufika kwake, wapuma no‐Yehorame ngakuye u‐Jehu unyana ka‐Nimshi, lowo uyehova ubemtambisele ukunqamla indlu ka‐Ahabi." 
2Chronicles22:8 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni u‐Jehu abesenza umgwebo pezu kwendlu ka‐Ahabi, wafumana inkosi zakwa‐Juda, nonyana babakuluwe baka Ahaziya, ababekonza kuye u‐Ahaziya, wababulala." 
2Chronicles22:9 Wandula wamfuna u‐Ahaziya; bada bambamba, (ngokuba ebezimele e‐Samariya,) bamsa ku‐Jehu; baza bamfisa, bamncw̔aba; ngokuba bebesiti: Ungunyana ka‐Yehoshafate, owafuna uyehova ngayo yonke intliziyo yake. Yaye indlu ka‐Ahaziya yayingaserako ukubamba amandla ebukumkanini." 
2Chronicles22:10 KEKALOKU u‐Hataliya, unina ka‐Ahaziya, akubona ukuba unyana wake ufile, wandula wesuka wabubisa yonke inzalo yobukumkani yendlu ka‐Juda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Kodwa u‐Yehoshebate, intombi yokumkani, wamtabata u‐Yohashe unyana ka‐Ahaziya, wamba̔ pakati kwonyana bokumkani ababebulewe, wambeka yena nomanyisikazi wake enkambilini yemandlalo: kwa njalo u‐Yehoshebate, intombi yokumkani u‐Yehorame, umfazi ka‐Yoyada umperisite, (ngokuba yena ebengudade ka‐Ahaziya,) wamfihla ku‐Hataliya, ukuba akambulala." 
2Chronicles22:12 Wayeko nabo endlwini katixo ezimele kona iminyaka yamitandatu. Waza u‐Hataliya wapata ubukumkani pezu kwelizwe. 
2Chronicles23:1 Kodwa ngomnyaka wesixe̔nxe u‐Yoyada wazomeleza, watabata inkosi zamakulu, u‐Hazariya unyana ka‐Yerohame, no‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Jehohanane, no‐Hazariya unyana ka‐Obedi, no‐Mahaseya unyana ka‐Hadaya, no‐Elishafate unyana ka‐Zikeri, babe naye elucebanweni." 
2Chronicles23:2 Basuka bajikajikela ilizwe lakwa‐Juda, bahlanganisa aba‐Levi kuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda, nabazintloko zendlu zoyise zo‐Sirayeli, bada bafika e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles23:3 Yandula yonke intlanganiso yalwenza endlwini katixo ucebano nokumkani. Waza wati kubo: Bona ke, unyana wokumkani wobupata ubukumkani, njengokuba etshilo uyehova ngabo onyana baka‐Davide." 
2Chronicles23:4 Nantsi indawo eniya kuyenza: esinye isiqingata sesitatu kuni eningenayo ngesabata, kubo abaperisite nakubo aba‐Levi, bona boba ngabagcini beminyango;" 
2Chronicles23:5 nesinye isiqingata sesitatu, boba ngasendlwini yokumkani; nesinye isiqingata sesitatu, boba sesangweni lesiseko: kanjako bonke abantu boba semabaleni ayo indlu kayehova." 
2Chronicles23:6 Kodwa makungangeni mntu endlwini kayehova, kupela ngabaperisite, nabo bakonzayo pakati kwaba‐Levi; aba baya kungena, ngokuba beyingcwele bona: kodwa bonke abantu baya kugcina isigcinelo sikayehova." 
2Chronicles23:7 Baye aba‐Levi beya kujikelezela ukumkani ngokungqonga, abanye ngabanye benezixo̔bo zabo ezandleni zabo; nalowo ungenayo endlwini makafiswe: nize nibeko nokumkani ekungeneni kwake nasekupumeni kwake." 
2Chronicles23:8 Bati aba‐Levi no‐Juda bonke benza njengako konke abeyalele ngako u‐Yoyada umperisite, batabata abanye ngabanye amadoda abo, lawo abeya kungena ngesabata, kunye nalawo abeya kupuma ngesabata: ngokuba u‐Yoyada umperisite ebengandululanga izahlulo." 
2Chronicles23:9 Waza u‐Yoyada umperisite wanika kuzo inkosi zamakulu izikali, nengweletshetshe, namakaka, ezo ezibe zizezokumkani u‐Davide, ezibe zisendlwini katixo." 
2Chronicles23:10 Wayemisa bonke abantu, abanye ngabanye benezixo̔bo zabo ezandleni zabo, kwa kulo elokunene icala lendlu kwada kwakulo elokohlo icala lendlu, ngasesibingelweni nangasendlwini, kufupi nokumkani ngokungqonga." 
2Chronicles23:11 Bandula bamkupa unyana wokumkani, bayibeka pezu kwake ikrone, bamnika nesinqi̔no, bamenza ukumkani; kanjalo u‐Yoyada nonyana bake bamtambisa, bati: Makapile ukumkani!" 
2Chronicles23:12 Wati akuva u‐Hataliya intlokoma yabantu bebaleka bedumisa nokudumisa ukumkani, wasuka weza ebantwini endlwini kayehova." 
2Chronicles23:13 Waza wakangela, kekaloku nankuya ukumkani emi pezu kwendawo yake epezulu, endaweni yokungena, nenkosi nabanamaxilongo kufupi nokumkani: bati bonke abantu belizwe bavuya, bavutela ngamaxilongo; babeko nabaculi benezinto zokuculisa, nabo abafundisayo ukudumisa. Wandula u‐Hataliya waṙazula izivato zake, wati: Yingcebiswano, yingcebiswano!" 
2Chronicles23:14 Koko u‐Yoyada umperisite wapumisayo inkosi zamakulu, abongama bempi, wati kuzo: Mkupeleni pandle kwamahlukahluka; nalowo umlandelayo makafiswe ngeṙele. Ngokuba ebete umperisite: Ningamfisi endlwini kayehova." 
2Chronicles23:15 Baza bamkwelela amacala omabini: waya ngasendaweni yokungena yesango lamahashe, ngasendlwini yokumkani: bamfisa apo ke." 
2Chronicles23:16 Wandula u‐Yoyada walwenza ucebano pakati kwake nabo bonke abantu nokumkani, ukuba babe ngabantu bakayehova." 
2Chronicles23:17 Baza bangena bonke abantu endlwini ka‐Bali, bayicita; nezibingelo zake, nemifanekiso yake, baziqekeza; no‐Matane umperisite ka‐Bali bambulala pambi kwezibingelo." 
2Chronicles23:18 Wati u‐Yoyada kanjalo wamisa abalindi bendlu kayehova pantsi kwesandla sabaperisite abangaba‐Levi, abo u‐Davide wabahlula babe sendlwini kayehova, ukuba banikele amadini okutshiswa kayehova, njengokuba kuba̔liwe emtetweni ka‐Mosesi, ngokugcoba nangokuvuma, njengesimiselo sika‐Davide." 
2Chronicles23:19 Wayemisa abalindimnyango ngasemasangweni endlu kayehova, kuze kungangeni onco̔lileyo nganye into." 
2Chronicles23:20 Wandula watabata inkosi zamakulu, nemiduna, nabapati babantu, nabo bonke abantu belizwe, wehla nokumkani kuyo indlu kayehova; bandula beza ngesango elide endlwini yokumkani, bahlalisa ukumkani pezu kweterone yobukumkani." 
2Chronicles23:21 Baye bevuya bonke abantu belizwe, sati isixeko sanokwonwaba; no‐Hataliya bebemfisile ngeṙele." 
2Chronicles24:1 EBEYIMINYAKA isixe̔nxe u‐Yohashe ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mane e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Tsibiya, owase‐Beresheba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Waye u‐Yohashe esenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, yonke imihla ka‐Yoyada umperisite." 
2Chronicles24:3 Kanjako u‐Yoyada wamtabatela abafazi ababini; waza wazala onyana nentombi. 
2Chronicles24:4 Kwabekute emveni kwoko, bekusentliziyweni ka‐Yohashe ukuhlaziya indlu kayehova." 
2Chronicles24:5 Waza wahlanganisa abaperisite naba‐Levi, wati kubo: Pumani niye ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, niyibute kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli imali yokulungisa indlu katixo wenu, kwiminyaka ngeminyaka; nani ke, yinxamiseni lendawo. Kodwa abayinxamisa aba‐Levi abo." 
2Chronicles24:6 Wandula ukumkani wambiza u‐Yoyada umperisite omkulu, wati kuye: Yinina ukuba ungabuzanga aba‐Levi, ukuze bavelise kwa‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme isitabataba sika‐Mosesi isicaka sikayehova, nesentlanganiso yo‐Sirayeli, ngenxa yayo intente yesinqi̔no?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Ngokuba u‐Hataliya, loncwangukazi, onyana bake bagqoboza indlu katixo, nazo zonke izinto ezingcwele zendlu kayehova bazinikela o‐Bali." 
2Chronicles24:8 Wayexela ukumkani, baza bayenza ityeya, bayibeka esangweni lendlu kayehova ngapandle." 
2Chronicles24:9 Baza banika ilizwi kwa‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme lokuba makungeniswe kuyehova isitabataba sika‐Mosesi isicaka sikatixo, eso sabekwayo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli entlango." 
2Chronicles24:10 Kwandula kwavuya zonke inkosi nabo bonke abantu, bangenisa ke, baposela etyeyeni, kude kwagqitywa." 
2Chronicles24:11 Kwaye kute, ngexesha bekuziswa ityeya leyo kubongama bokumkani ngesandla saba‐Levi, naxeshekweni babona ukuba imali ininzi, kwandula kweza umba̔li wokumkani, negosa lomperisite omkulu, bakupa imali etyeyeni, bayitabata yona, bayibuyisela endaweni yayo. Benje njalo ke imihla ngemihla, babuta imali ngobuninzi." 
2Chronicles24:12 Baza ukumkani no‐Yoyada bayinika kwabawenzayo umsebenzi wenkonzo yayo indlu kayehova, baqesha ababazi bamatye nencibi zemiti, ukuba kuhlaziywe indlu kayehova, kwa nencibi zesincete nezexina, kuze kulungiswe indlu kayehova." 
2Chronicles24:13 Benza ke abenzi bomsebenzi, ukuba kwahanjiswa ukulungiswa kwomsebenzi ngesandla sabo, bayimisa indlu katixo ngomlinganiswa wayo, bayiqinisa." 
2Chronicles24:14 Bati bakuba begqibile, bazisa isisalela semali pambi kwokumkani no‐Yoyada, ekwenzelwa indlu kayehova impahla ngayo, impahla zokukonza nezokunikela, negxebeka, nempahla zegolide nezesilivere. Baye benikela amadini okutshiswa futi endlwini kayehova yonke imihla ka‐Yoyada." 
2Chronicles24:15 Wada waba mdala u‐Yoyada, wakoliswa yimihla, wafa ke: ebelikulu linamashumi matatu leminyaka ubudala bake, ekufeni kwake." 
2Chronicles24:16 Baza bamncw̔aba esixekweni sika‐Davide ndawonye nabo okumkani, ngokuba ebekwenzile okulungileyo kwa‐Sirayeli, nangakuye utixo, nangakuyo indlu yake." 
2Chronicles24:17 Kekaloku emveni kwokufa kuka‐Yoyada kweza inkosi zakwa‐Juda, zazitoba kukumkani: wandula ukumkani wapulapula kuzo." 
2Chronicles24:18 Basuka bashiya indlu kayehova, utixo woyise babo, bakonza o‐Ashera namadalo: kwaza kwabako umsindo pezu kwo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme, ngenxa yelityala labo." 
2Chronicles24:19 Wayetuma noko abaprofite pakati kwabo, ukuya kubabuyisela kuyehova: banqi̔na ke ngakubo, kodwa abanikela indlebe." 
2Chronicles24:20 Waza umoya katixo wangena ku‐Zekariya unyana ka‐Yoyada umperisite, owemayo pezulu ebantwini, wati kubo: Utsho utixo ukuti: Kunganina ukuba niyagqita imiyalelo kayehova, nize ningatamsanqeleki? ngokokuba nimshiyile uyehova, kukona aya kushiya nina." 
2Chronicles24:21 Baza baceba ngakuye, bamgibisela ngamatye ngomyalelo wokumkani, ebaleni lendlu kayehova." 
2Chronicles24:22 Kwa njalo u‐Yohashe ukumkani wayengakumbuli ububele abenzelwe bona ngu‐Yoyada uyise, kodwa wambulala unyana wake; owati, ekufeni kwake: Makabone uyehova, abuze ke!" 
2Chronicles24:23 Kwaye kute ekupeleni kwomnyaka, kwenyuka ngakuye impi yama‐Siriya; aye esiza kwa‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme, abubisa zonke inkosi zabantu ebantwini; nawo onke amaxoba azo awatuma kuye ukumkani we‐Damakusi." 
2Chronicles24:24 Nakuba impi yama‐Siriya ibizile neqelana lamadoda, uyehova wanikela ezandleni zawo impi enkulu kunene noko, ngokuba bebemshiyile uyehova, utixo woyise babo. Kwa njalo amenzela u‐Yohashe imigwebo." 
2Chronicles24:25 Naxeshekweni emkile kuye, (ngokuba ebemshiyile enezifo ezininzi,) izicaka zake zenza ingcebiswano ngakuye, ngenxa yegazi lonyana baka‐Yoyada umperisite, zambulala pezu kwomandlalo wake, wada wafa; baza bamncw̔aba esixekweni sika‐Davide, kodwa abamncw̔aba emancw̔abeni abo okumkani." 
2Chronicles24:26 Ngabo aba abayenzayo ingcebiswano ngakuye: u‐Zabadi, unyana ka‐Shimehate um‐Hamonikazi, no‐Yehozabadi, unyana ka‐Shimerite um‐Mowabikazi." 
2Chronicles24:27 Kekaloku okwonyana bake, nokwobuninzi bemitwalo ebipezu kwake, nokwokusekwa kwendlu katixo, bona ke, kuba̔liwe embalisweni yencwadi yabo okumkani. Waza u‐Amatsiya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles25:1 WABA ngukumkani u‐Amatsiya, eyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ubudala bake, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mabini anesitoba e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Yehohadane, owase‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles25:2 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, kodwa bekungengayo intliziyo ekolisekileyo." 
2Chronicles25:3 Kwaza kwati, okuya ubukumkani bebuqinile kuye, wabulala izicaka zake ezibe zimbulele ukumkani uyise." 
2Chronicles25:4 Kanti abantwana bazo akabafisa, koko wenzayo njengokuba̔liweyo emtetweni, encwadini ka‐Mosesi, apo ayaleleyo uyehova ngokuti: Oyise abayi kufela abantwana, nabantwana abayi kufela oyise, koko bonke ngabanye baya kufela esabo isono." 
2Chronicles25:5 Kanjako u‐Amatsiya wahlanganisa o‐Juda, wabamisa ngendlu zoyise, ngenkosi zamawaka nangenkosi zamakulu, kwa bonke o‐Juda no‐Benjamine; waza wababala abaminyaka imashumi mabini nabapezulu ubudala babo, wabafumana bengamawaka angamakulu matatu amadoda anyuliweyo, apuma nomkosi, apete umkonto nekaka." 
2Chronicles25:6 Wayeqesha nakwa‐Sirayeli ikulu lamawaka amagoṙa abuṙoti, ngekulu letalente zesilivere." 
2Chronicles25:7 Kuloko bekusiza kuye indoda katixo, isiti: Kumkani! makungayi nawe umkosi wo‐Sirayeli; ngokuba uyehova engenabo o‐Sirayeli, kwa nabo bonke abalusapo luka‐Frayime." 
2Chronicles25:8 Kodwa ukuba uya kuya wena, yenje njalo, yomelelela ukulwa; utixo wokuwisa pambi kwotshaba: ngokuba kuko amandla kutixo ukunceda nokuwisa." 
2Chronicles25:9 Waza wati u‐Amatsiya kwindoda katixo: Kuya kwenziwa nto nina pofu ngekulu letalente endizinikileyo emabandleni o‐Sirayeli? Yayisiti indoda katixo: Uyehova angakunika okuninzi pezu kwoku. 
2Chronicles25:10 Wandula u‐Amatsiya wawahlula, kwa amabandla abezile kuye evela kwa‐Frayime, ukuba aye endaweni yawo: ngako yavuta ingqumbo yawo kakulu ngakubo o‐Juda, abuyela endaweni yawo ngobushushu bengqumbo." 
2Chronicles25:11 Waza u‐Amatsiya wazomeleza, wapuma nabantu bake, waya emhlanjeni we‐Tyuwa, wabulala usapo luka‐Sehire, ishumi lamawaka." 
2Chronicles25:12 Neshumi lamawaka oluhleliyo lwalutimba usapo luka‐Juda, lwaluzisa engcotsheni yeliwa, lwaluwisa pantsi kuyo ingcopo yeliwa, ukuba lwacandeka lwonke." 
2Chronicles25:13 Kodwa amadoda amabandla abewabuyisile u‐Amatsiya, ukuze angayi naye ekulweni, agaleleka ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, kwa se‐Samariya kwada kwase‐Betehorone, abulala kubo abantu amawaka matatu, apanga impango enkulu." 
2Chronicles25:14 Kwaya kute, emvenikweni u‐Amatsiya ebebuyile ekubulaweni kwama‐Edome, wandula wabazisa otixo bosapo luka‐Sehire, wabamisa babe ngotixo bake, watoba pambi kwabo, wabaqumisela." 
2Chronicles25:15 Ngako yavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakuye u‐Amatsiya; waza watuma kuye umprofite, owati kuye: Yinina ukuba ufunile otixo babantu abangahlangulanga ababo abantu esandleni sako?" 
2Chronicles25:16 Kwabekute, nxa abeteta naye, wati kuye: Sikwenzile umcebisi kukumkani na? yeka; yinina ukuba ubetwe? Wandul’ ukuyeka umprofite lowo, wati: Ndiyazi ukuba utixo ucebile ukububisa wena, ngenxa yokuba wenzile oku, nokuba ungapulapulanga icebo lam." 
2Chronicles25:17 Waza u‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda wafuna icebo, watumela ku‐Yohashe, unyana ka‐Yehowahazi unyana ka‐Jehu, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Yiza, sibonane ngobuso." 
2Chronicles25:18 Koko u‐Yohashe ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli watumela ku‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda ukuti: Umtolo obuse‐Lebanone watuma kuyo isedare ebise‐Lebanone, usiti: Nika intombi yako kunyana wam ibe ngumfazi; saza sadlula isilo sasendle esibe sise‐Lebanone, sawunyatela umtolo lowo." 
2Chronicles25:19 Uti: bona ke, uwabetile ama‐Edome; ngako intliziyo yako ikupakamisile ukuba uqa̔yise: hlala kaloku ekaya; kunganina ukuba uya kulwa nelishwa, ukuze uwe, kwa wena no‐Juda kunye nawe?" 
2Chronicles25:20 Kodwa u‐Amatsiya ebengapulapuli; ngokuba bekuvela kutixo, ukuze abanikele esandleni sabo, ngenxa yokuba bafuna otixo base‐Edome." 
2Chronicles25:21 Ngako wenyuka u‐Yohashe ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli; baza babonana ngobuso, yena no‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, e‐Bete‐shemeshe ekwa‐Juda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Bati o‐Juda boyiswa pambi kwo‐Sirayeli; basuka besaba baya abanye ngabanye ezintenteni zabo. 
2Chronicles25:23 No‐Amatsiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, unyana ka‐Yohashe, unyana ka‐Yehowahazi, u‐Yohashe ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli wambamba e‐Bete‐shemeshe, wamzisa e‐Yerusaleme, walucita udonga lwe‐Yerusaleme, kwa kulo isango lika‐Frayime kwada kwakulo isango legumbi, ikubite zingamakulu mane." 
2Chronicles25:24 Kanjalo watabata yonke igolide nesilivere, nazo zonke impahla ezazifunyanwa endlwini katixo kunye no‐Obedi‐edome, nendyebo zendlu yokumkani, nababambiseli, wabuyela e‐Samariya." 
2Chronicles25:25 Wati u‐Amatsiya unyana ka‐Yohashe, ukumkani wo‐Juda, wahlala emveni kwokufa kuka‐Yohashe unyana ka‐Yehowahazi, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, iminyaka yalishumi elinamihlanu." 
2Chronicles25:26 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Amatsiya, eyokuqala neyokupela, bona ke, ayiba̔lwanga na yona encwadini yabo okumkani bo‐Juda no‐Sirayeli?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Kekaloku emveni kweloxesha wapambuka ngalo u‐Amatsiya ekumlandeleni uyehova, bayenza ingcebiswano ngakuye e‐Yerusaleme; wesaba waya e‐Lakishe: kodwa batumela emva kwake e‐Lakishe, bambulala kona." 
2Chronicles25:28 Baza bamsa pezu kwamahashe, bamncw̔aba ndawonye noyise bake esixekweni so‐Juda." 
2Chronicles26:1 BANDULA bonke abantu bakwa‐Juda batabata u‐Huziya, obeyiminyaka yalishumi elinesitandatu ubudala bake, bamenza ukumkani esikundleni soyise u‐Amatsiya." 
2Chronicles26:2 Yena wayaka i‐Elote, wayibuyisela ko‐Juda, emveni kwokuba ukumkani ebelele noyise bake." 
2Chronicles26:3 Ebeyiminyaka ilishumi linesitandatu u‐Huziya ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani e‐Yerusaleme iminyaka yamashumi mahlanu anamibini. Igama lonina belingu‐Yekoliya, owase‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles26:4 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke abekwenzile u‐Amatsiya uyise." 
2Chronicles26:5 Wazibekela ukufuna utixo emihleni ka‐Zekariya, obenokuqonda emibonisweni katixo: kanjalo emihleni wokumfuna kwake uyehova, utixo wamtamsanqelekisa." 
2Chronicles26:6 Wandula wapuma walwa nama‐Filistiya, wacita udonga lwe‐Gate, nodonga lwe‐Yabene, nodonga lwe‐Ashedode; waza waka izixeko elizweni lase‐Ashe dode, napakati kwama‐Filistiya." 
2Chronicles26:7 Waye utixo emnceda ngakuwo ama‐Filistiya, nangakuwo ama‐Arabi abehleli e‐Gure‐bali, na ngakuwo ama‐Mahone." 
2Chronicles26:8 Bati aba‐Hamoni banika iminikelo ku‐Huziya: lwada udumo lwake lwaya kwada kwasekungenweni kwe‐Jipete; ngokuba womelelayo ngento egqitiseleyo. 
2Chronicles26:9 Waye u‐Huziya kanjalo wazaka inqaba e‐Yerusaleme, ngasesangweni legumbi, nangasesangweni lesihlambo, nangasekujikeni kwodonga, wazinqabisa." 
2Chronicles26:10 Wazaka nenqaba entlango, wemba amacibi amaninzi; ngokuba ebenento eninzi yenkomo, nasezihlanjeni nasematafeni; kwa n abalimi bomhlaba nabalimi bemiti yeveyine ezintabeni nasezindaweni ezicumileyo: ngokuba ebetanda ukulinywa kwomhlaba." 
2Chronicles26:11 Kanjako u‐Huziya ebenempi yabaqelene nokulwa, abapuma nomkosi ngamabandla, njengenani lokubalwa kwabo ngesandla sika‐Yehili umba̔li no‐Mahaseya igosa, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Hananiya, owenkosi zokumkani." 
2Chronicles26:12 Inani lonke labazintloko zendlu zoyise, lamagoṙa obuṙoti, lalingamawaka mabini anamakulu matandatu." 
2Chronicles26:13 Napantsi kwesandla sabo bekuko impi yokulwa, amadoda angamawaka angamakulu matatu anamawaka asixe̔nxe anamakulu mahlanu, abesenza imfazwe ngamandla akalipileyo, kuze kuncedwe ukumkani ngakulo utshaba." 
2Chronicles26:14 Waza u‐Huziya wawalungisela, kwa umkosi wonke, amakaka, nezikali, neminqwazi, nehempe zentsimbi, nezipeta, namatye okusaula." 
2Chronicles26:15 Wayesenza e‐Yerusaleme iziqingelwa zokulwa, isetyenzwa lencibi ezilumkileyo, ukuba zibe pezu kwenqaba napezu kwamagumbi odonga, kuze kutolwe ngentolo nangamatye amakulu. Kwaza kwapumela kude ndumo lwake; ngokuba ebencedwa ngento engummangaliso, wada womelela." 
2Chronicles26:16 Kodwa nxa omeleleyo, yabir̔atsha intliziyo yake kude kwakukubujiswa kwake; ngokuba ebegqita ngakuye uyehova, utixo wake, wangena etempileni kayehova ukuba aqumise pezu kwesibingelo sesiqumiso." 
2Chronicles26:17 Waza wangena emva kwake u‐Hazariya umperisite, nakunye naye abaperisite bakayehova, amashumi asibozo amadoda akalipileyo." 
2Chronicles26:18 Basuka bammela u Huziya ukumkani, bati kuye: Asi kokwako, Huziya! ukuqumisela uyehova, koko kukokwabo abaperisite, onyana baka‐Arone, abangcwaliselweyo ukuqumisa: puma endaweni eyingcwele, ngokuba ugqitile; kanjalo lento ayiyi kuba yeyokubekwa kwako pambi kwoyehova ongutixo." 
2Chronicles26:19 Wandula waqumba u‐Huziya, enesiqumelo esandleni sake ukuba aqumise: kwati nxa abequmba ngakubo abaperisite, kwapuma isilepero ebunzini lake ngapambi kwabaperisite, endlwini kayehova, ngecala lesibingelo sesiqumiso." 
2Chronicles26:20 Waza u‐Hazariya umperisite omkulu wakangela ngakuye, kwa nabo bonke abaperisite; kekaloku bona ke, ebenesilepero ebunzini lake; baza bamgxota kona ngobunxamo; ewe naye wanxamela ukupuma ngokwake, ngenxa yokuba uyehova ebembetile." 
2Chronicles26:21 Wayelileperi u‐Huziya ukumkani kwada kwayimini yokufa kwake; wati, elileperi nje, wahlala endlwini eyahlukileyo, ngokuba ebenqanyulwa endlwini kayehova: waye u‐Yotame unyana wake ebepezu kwendlu yokumkani, egweba abantu belizwe." 
2Chronicles26:22 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Huziya, eyokuqala neyokupela, uyiba̔lile yona u‐Yisaya unyana ka‐Amotse, umprofite." 
2Chronicles26:23 Wada u‐Huziya walala noyise bake; baza bamncw̔aba ndawonye noyise bake, entsimini yokuncw̔aba ebiyeyabo okumkani; ngokuba bebesiti: Ulileperi yena. Wandula u‐Yotame unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles27:1 EBEYIMINYAKA imashumi mabini anamihlanu u‐Yotame ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinesitandatu e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Yerusha, intombi ka‐Tsadoki." 
2Chronicles27:2 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke abekwenzile u‐Huziya uyise; kodwa akangena etempileni kayehova. Bati abantu basakwonakalisa ukwenza kwabo." 
2Chronicles27:3 Yena walaka isango lasentla lendlu kayehova; Lapezu kwodonga lwe‐Hofeli waka ngobuninzi. 
2Chronicles27:4 Waka nezixeko ezintabeni zakwa‐Juda; nasemahlatini waka ingxande ezinqatyisiweyo nenqaba. 
2Chronicles27:5 Kanjako walwa nokumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni, walweyisa: lwaza usapo luka‐Hamoni lwanika kuye ngalomnyaka ikulu letalente zesilivere, neshumi lamawaka ekore zenqolowa, neshumi lamawaka ezeṙalasi: lwabuya lwamnika okunjalo usapo luka‐Hamoni nangowesibini umnyaka, nangowesitatu." 
2Chronicles27:6 Kwa njalo u‐Yotame wazomeleza; ngokuba ebelungisa indlela zake pambi kwoyehova, utixo wake." 
2Chronicles27:7 Nesisalela semicimbi ka‐Yotame, nazo zonke imfazwe zake, nendlela zake, bona ke, iba̔liwe yona encwadini yabo okumkani bo‐Sirayeli no‐Juda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinesitandatu e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles27:9 Wada u‐Yotame walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa esixekweni sika‐Davide; waza u‐Ahazi unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles28:1 EBEYIMINYAKA imashumi mabini u‐Ahazi ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinesitandatu e‐Yerusaleme; waye engenzi okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengaye u‐Davide uyise." 
2Chronicles28:2 Ngokuba ebehamba ezindleleni zokumkani bo‐Sirayeli: nakanjako wenzela o‐Bali imifanekiso etyityishiweyo. 
2Chronicles28:3 Ewe, waqumisa esihlanjeni sonyana ka‐Hinome, watshisa onyana bake emlilweni, njengento ezibuntshontsho zabaheyideni, abo wabagqogqayo uyehova pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles28:4 Wabinga waqumisa ezindaweni ezipakamileyo, napezu kwenduli, nangapantsi kwayo yonke imiti eluhlaza." 
2Chronicles28:5 Ngako uyehova, utixo wake, wamnikela esandleni sokumkani we‐Siriya; baza babeta abake, batimba kuye into enkulu yamatinjwa, bawazisa e‐Damakusi. Kanjako wanikelwa nasesandleni sokumkani wo‐Sirayeli, owambeta ngesibulalo esikulu." 
2Chronicles28:6 Ngokuba u‐Pekahi, unyana ka‐Remaliya, wabulala kwa‐Juda amawaka alikulu linamashumi mabini emini nye, onke engamadoda akalipileyo; ngenxa yokuba ebemshiyile uyehova, utixo woyise bawo." 
2Chronicles28:7 Kanjalo u‐Zikeri, igoṙa lakwa‐Frayime, wambulala u‐Mahaseya unyana wokumkani, no‐Zarikame umpati wendlu, no‐Lekana owasemva kwokumkani." 
2Chronicles28:8 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwatimba kubazalwana balo amawaka angamakulu mabini, abafazi, onyana, nentombi, lwapanga kubo nento eninzi yamaxoba, lwawazisa amaxoba lawo e‐Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:9 Kwaye kuko kona umprofite kayehova, ogama lingu‐Hodedi, owapuma ukuya kuhlangabeza umkosi obusiza e‐Samariya, wati kubo: Bona ke, ngomsindo kayehova, utixo woyihlo benu, ngakubo o‐Juda, ubanikele esandleni senu, nanibulele bona ngobuṙalaṙume obufikelela kwa sezulwini." 
2Chronicles28:10 Nakaloku niyacinga ukululamisa usapo luka‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme lube ngamakoboka namakobokakazi kuni: kodwa nina, akuko na kwa nani izilandu ngakuye uyehova, utixo wenu?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Ndipulapuleni ngoko, nibuyise amatinjwa, lawo niwatimbileyo kubazalwana benu; ngokuba ubushushu bengqumbo kayehova bupezu kwenu." 
2Chronicles28:12 Baza abatile kwabazintloko zosapo luka‐Frayime, u‐Hazariya unyana ka‐Johanane, u‐Berekiya unyana ka‐Meshilemote, no‐Yehizekiya unyana ka‐Shalume, no‐Hamasa unyana ka‐Hadelai, besuka ngakubo abebevele emfazweni," 
2Chronicles28:13 bati kubo: Aniyi kungenisa lamatinjwa apa: ngokuba, ukuze ityala ngakuye uyehova libe pezu kwetu, nicinga nina ukwongeza ezonweni zetu nasetyaleni letu: ngokuba likulu ityala esinalo: kanjako ubushushu bengqumbo bupezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles28:14 Aza amadoda axo̔bileyo ashiya amatinjwa namaxoba pambi kwenkosi nayo yonke intlanganiso. 
2Chronicles28:15 Andula esuka lomadoda abalulweyo ngamagama, abamba amatinjwa, nabo bonke abebeze pakati kwawo abavatisa emaxobeni lawo; ewe abavatisa, abafaka izihlangu, abanika ukutya, abaseza, abatambisa, abakapa pezu kwamaqwaṙashe bonke ababutataka, abazisa e‐Jeriko, esixekweni semiti yepalime, kufupi nabazalwana babo: aza abuya wona ukuya e‐Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:16 Ngexesha elo watuma ukumkani u‐Ahazi kubo okumkani be‐Asiriya, ukuze bamncede." 
2Chronicles28:17 Ngokuba ebezile kanjako ama‐Edome, abeta kwa‐Juda, atimba namatinjwa." 
2Chronicles28:18 Nama‐Filistiya wona ebegalelekile ezixekweni zasezihlanjeni, nasesuyide yakwa‐Juda, atimba i‐Bete‐shemeshe, ne‐Ajalone, ne‐Gederote, ne‐Soko namagxamesi ayo, ne‐Timna namagxamesi ayo, ne‐Gimzo namagxamesi ayo: aza ahlala kona." 
2Chronicles28:19 Ngokuba uyehova ebetobisile o‐Juda, ngenxa yake u‐Ahazi ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli; ngokuba ebebenzile o‐Juda abangevayo, wenza ngobumenemene kakulu ngakuye uyehova." 
2Chronicles28:20 Wati u‐Tiligate‐pinesere ukumkani we‐Asiriya weza kuye; kodwa wamxinezela, akamomeleza." 
2Chronicles28:21 Ngokuba u‐Ahazi wapanga indlu kayehova, nendlu yokumkani nenkosi, wanika kukumkani we‐Asiriya: akamnceda noko." 
2Chronicles28:22 Kanjalo ngexesha lokuxinezelwa kwake, wandisa ukwenza ngobumenemene ngakuye uyehova: nguye lo ukumkani u‐Ahazi." 
2Chronicles28:23 Wasuka wabingela otixo base‐Damakusi, ababembetile, wati: Ngokuba otixo bokumkani be‐Siriya benceda bona, ndiya kubabingela, ukuze bancede mna. Kodwa baba sisiwiso kuye, nako‐Sirayeli bonke." 
2Chronicles28:24 Waza u‐Ahazi wabuta impahla zendlu katixo, wazihlahla impahla zendlu katixo, wazitshixa ingcango zendlu kayehova, wazenzela izibingelo kuwo onke amagumbi e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles28:25 Nakuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda ngazinye, wazenza indawo ezipakamileyo zokuqumisela otixo bambi, wamqumbisa uyehova, utixo woyise bake." 
2Chronicles28:26 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi yake, nazo zonke indlela zake, ezokuqala nezokupela, bona ke, ziba̔liwe encwadini yokumkani bo‐Juda no‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles28:27 Wada u‐Ahazi walala noyise bake; baza bamncw̔aba esixekweni, e‐Yerusaleme: kodwa abamzisa emancw̔abeni okumkani bo‐Sirayeli. Wandula u‐Hezekiya unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles29:1 WABA ngukumkani u‐Hezekiya, eyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu ubudala bake, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mabini anesitoba e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Abiya, intombi ka‐Zekariya." 
2Chronicles29:2 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke abekwenzile u‐Davide uyise." 
2Chronicles29:3 Wati yena, ngowokuqala umnyaka wokupata kwake ubukumkani, ngenyanga yokuqala, wavula ingcango zendlu kayehova, wazilungisa." 
2Chronicles29:4 Waza wangenisa abaperisite naba‐Levi, wabahlanganisela enkundleni engasempumalanga," 
2Chronicles29:5 wati kubo: Ndipulapuleni, nina ba‐Levi! zingewaliseni kaloku, yingcwaliseni nendlu kayehova, utixo woyihlo benu, nipumise into enco̔lileyo kweyingcwele indawo." 
2Chronicles29:6 Ngokuba obawo betu begqitile, benze okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, utixo wetu, bamshiyile, basongile ubuso babo entlalweni kayehova, banikele umhlana." 
2Chronicles29:7 Kanjako batshixile ingcango zentendelezo, nezibane bazicimile, nesiqumiso abasiqumisanga, namadini okutshiswa abawenzanga endaweni eyingewele kuye utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles29:8 Kwaza kwabako umsindo kayehova pezu kwo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme, wabanikela babe yinto yokuzanyazanyiswa, neyokutelwa nqa, neyokwenzelwa amakwelo, njengokuba nibona ngamehlo enu." 
2Chronicles29:9 Ngokuba, bona ke, obawo betu bewile ngesiṙele; nonyana betu, nentombi zetu, nabafazi betu, basekutinjweni ngenxa yoku." 
2Chronicles29:10 Kaloku kusentliziyweni yam ukwenza ucebano no‐yehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuze bubuye kuti ubushushu bengqumbo yake." 
2Chronicles29:11 Bonyana bam! kaloku zeninganqeneki; ngokuba uyehova eninyulile ukuba nime ebusweni bake ukumkonza, nokuba nibe ngabakonzi nabaqumisi kuye." 
2Chronicles29:12 Bandula besuka aba‐Levi, u‐Mahate unyana ka‐Hamasai, no‐Joweli unyana ka‐Hazariya, kubo onyana bama‐Kohati; nakubo onyana baka‐Merari, u‐Kishi unyana ka‐Habedi, no‐Hazariya unyana ka‐Yehaleleli; nakuwo ama‐Gereshone, u‐Jowahi unyana ka‐Zima, no‐Hedeni unyana ka‐Jowahi;" 
2Chronicles29:13 nakubo onyana baka‐Elitsafane, u‐Shimri, no‐Yeyeli; nakubo onyana baka‐Safa, u‐Zekariya, no‐Mataniya;" 
2Chronicles29:14 nakubo onyana baka‐Hemani, u‐Yehili, no Shimehi; nakubo onyana baka‐Jedutune, u‐Shemaya, no‐Huziyeli." 
2Chronicles29:15 Baye behlanganisa abazalwana babo, bazingcwalisa, beza ngomyalelo wokumkani, ngamazwi kayehova, ukucokisa indlu kayehova." 
2Chronicles29:16 Baza abaperisite bangena pakati endlwini kayehova, ukuza kucokisa, bakupela ebaleni lendlu kayehova konke okunco̔lileyo ababekufumana etempileni kayehova; bati aba‐Levi bakutabata, kuze kukutshelwe endle ngasemlanjaneni we‐Kidrone." 
2Chronicles29:17 Baqala ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga yokuqala ukungcwalisa, nangowesibozo umhla wenyanga bafika entendelezweni kayehova; kwa njalo bayingcwalisa indlu kayehova ngemihla esibozo; nangoweshumi linesitandatu umhla wenyanga yokuqala bagqiba ke." 
2Chronicles29:18 Bandula bangena pakati ku‐Hezekiya ukumkani, bati: Sesicokisile yonke indlu kayehova, nesibingelo samadini okutshiswa, nazo zonke impahla zaso, netatile yezonka zokuṙozwa, nazo zonke impahla zayo." 
2Chronicles29:19 Kanjalo zonke impahla ezibe zilahliwe ngukumkani u‐Ahazi, ekupateni kwake ubukumkani, ngobumenemene bake, zona sizilungisile, sazingcwalisa; kekaloku nanziya pambi kwesibingelo sikayehova." 
2Chronicles29:20 Waza u‐Hezekiya ukumkani wavuka kusasa, wahlanganisa inkosi zesixeko, wenyuka waya endlwini kayehova." 
2Chronicles29:21 Baye bezisa inkunzana zenkomo ezisixe̔nxe, nenkunzi zegusha ezisixe̔nxe, nemvana ezisixe̔nxe, nenkunzi zebokwe ezisixe̔nxe, zibe lidini lesono ngenxa yobukumkani, nangenxa yendawo eyingcwele, nangenxa yo‐Juda. Waza wabaxelela onyana baka‐Arone, abaperisite, ukuba banikele ngazo pezu kwesibingelo sikayehova." 
2Chronicles29:22 Basuka bazixe̔la inkunzana zenkomo, bati abaperisite balamkela igazi, balisasaza pezu kwesibingelo; bazixe̔la nenkunzi zegusha, basasaza igazi pezu kwesibingelo; bazixe̔la nemvana, basasaza igazi pezu kwesibingelo." 
2Chronicles29:23 Bandula basondeza inkunzi zebokwe, ezedini lesono, pambi kwokumkani nentlanganiso; balalisa izandla zabo pezu kwazo." 
2Chronicles29:24 Baza abaperisite bazixe̔la, basihlambulula ngegazi lazo isibingelo, kuze kwenzelwe o‐Sirayeli bonke uxoliso: ngokuba ebexele ukumkani ukuba makwenz elwe o‐Sirayeli bonke elodini lokutshiswa nelodini lesono." 
2Chronicles29:25 Wandula wabamisa aba‐Levi endlwini kayehova, benesimbali, nenebele, nehadi, njengawo umyalelo ka‐Davide, noka‐Gadi umboni wokumkani, noka‐Natane umprofite: ngokuba ubu ngoyehova lomyalelo, ngabaprofite bake." 
2Chronicles29:26 Baza aba‐Levi bema beneziculiso zika‐Davide, nabaperisite benamaxilongo." 
2Chronicles29:27 Wandula waxela u‐Hezekiya ukuba kunikelwe ngedini lokutshiswa pezu kwesibingelo. Kwati ngexesha lokuqalwa kwedini lokutshiswa, kwandul’ ukuqalwa amaculo kayehova, namaxilongo, kwa kunye neziculiso zika‐Davide ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli."
