2Chronicles29:28 Yaza yonke intlanganiso yaziqubuda, bati abaculi bacula, nabanamaxilongo bahlokomisa: kwenziwa oku konke kwada kwagqitywa idini lokutshiswa." 
2Chronicles29:29 Kekaloku kwakugqitywa ukunikela, waguqa ukumkani, nabo bonke abebeko naye, baziqubuda." 
2Chronicles29:30 Wandula waxela u‐Hezekiya ukumkani, nenkosi, kubo aba‐Levi, ukuba mabadumise uyehova ngamazwi ka‐Davide, nangaka‐Safa umboni: baza badumisa ngovuyo, batoba ngapantsi, baziqubuda." 
2Chronicles29:31 Walekela wateta u‐Hezekiya wati: Kaloku nizizalisile nje izandla zenu kuyehova, sondelani, nizise imibingo neminikelo yokubulela endlwini kayehova. Yaza intlanganiso yazisa imibingo neminikelo yokubulela; nabo bonke abanentliziyo evumayo bazisa amadini okutshiswa." 
2Chronicles29:32 Inani lamadini okutshiswa, lawo abeziswa yintlanganiso, lalingamashumi asixe̔nxe enkabi, n ekulu lenkunzi zegusha, n amakulu mabini emvana: zonke ezi zibe zizezedini lokutshiswa kuyehova." 
2Chronicles29:33 Nezinto ezingcwele, inkabi zazingamakulu matandatu, negusha zazingamawaka matatu." 
2Chronicles29:34 Kodwa abaperisite bebelula, bada bakohlwa kukuhlinza onke amadini okutshiswa; ngako babencedwa ngabazalwana babo aba‐Levi, kude kwagqitywa lomsebenzi, nakude kwazingcwalisa abanye abaperisite; ngokuba aba‐Levi bebelungile ngentliziyo, ukuba bazingcwalise, ngapezu kwabaperisite." 
2Chronicles29:35 Kanjako amadini okutshiswa ebemaninzi, kwa namanqata eminikelo yoxolo, neminikelo yokusela yamadini okutshiswa. Kwa njalo kwalungiswa inkonzo yayo indlu kayehova." 
2Chronicles29:36 Waza wavuya u‐Hezekiya, nabo bonke abantu, ngokokuba utixo ebelungisile abantu; ngokuba ibisenzeka lento ngokuqupa." 
2Chronicles30:1 WANDULA watuma u‐Hezekiya kubo bonke o‐Sirayeli no‐Juda, waba̔la incwadi ko‐Frayime no‐Manase kanjalo, ukuba beze endlwini kayehova e‐Yerusaleme, ukubamba ipasika kuyehova, utixo wo Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles30:2 Ngokuba ukumkani ebecebisene nenkosi zake nayo yonke intlanganiso e‐Yerusaleme, ukuba kubanjwe ipasika ngenyanga yesibini." 
2Chronicles30:3 Ngokuba bebekohlwa kuyibamba ngexesha elo, ngenxa yokuba abaperisite bebengazingcwalisanga ngenani elaneleyo, nokuba abantu bebengazihlanganiselanga e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles30:4 Yabifanelekile lendawo emehlweni okumkani, nasemehlweni ayo yonke intlanganiso." 
2Chronicles30:5 Baza bamisa umteto wokuba kudluliswe ilizwi kuyo yonke i‐Sirayeli, kwa se‐Beresheba kwada kwase‐Dane, lokokuba makuziwe ukubamba ipasika kuyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, e‐Yerusaleme: ngokuba bekukade bebengawubambanga njengokuba̔liweyo." 
2Chronicles30:6 Zaza izigidimi zemka nencwadi zivela kukumkani nenkosi zake, ukuya kuyo yonke i‐Sirayeli ne‐Juda, nokuti, ngomyalelo wokumkani: Lusapo luka‐Sirayeli! buyelani kuyehova, utixo ka‐Abrahame, ka‐Yisake, noka‐Sirayeli, waeya kubuyela kwabasindileyo esandleni sokumkani be‐Asiriya, abaseleyo pakati kwenu." 
2Chronicles30:7 Nize ningabi njengoyihlo benu, nanjengabo abazalwana benu, abenza ngobumenemene ngakuye uyehova, utixo woyise babo; owabanikela ekucitakaleni, njengokuba nibona nina." 
2Chronicles30:8 Kaloku ningenzi lukuni intamo zenu, njengoyihlo benu; nikani isandla kuyehova, ningene kweyingcwele indawo yake, leyo uyingcwalisile kude kube ngunapakade, nimkonze uyehova, utixo wenu, buze bubuye kuni ubushushu bengqumbo yake." 
2Chronicles30:9 Ngokuba, xeshekweni nibuyela kuyehova, abazalwana benu nabantwana benu baya kufumana ububele ebusweni babo babatimbileyo, bade babuye beze kwelilizwe: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wenu, enofefe, enobubele, ongayi kunqanda ubuso kuni, nakubuyela kuye." 
2Chronicles30:10 Zaza zadlula izigidimi, kwisixeko ngesixeko, ezweni lakwa‐Frayime nelakwa‐Manase, kwada kwa sezweni la kwa‐Zebulone; koko bazihlekayo, bazigculela." 
2Chronicles30:11 Babeko noko abatile bakwa‐Ashere, nabakwa‐Manase, nabakwa‐Zebulone, abazigobayo, beza e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles30:12 Kanjalo kwa‐Juda bekuko isandla sikatixo ukubanika intliziyo nye, yokuba bawenze umyalelo wokumkani nenkosi, ngalo ilizwi likayehova." 
2Chronicles30:13 Kwaza kwahlanganisana e‐Yerusaleme abantu abaninzi, ukuze babambe umtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele, ngenyanga yesibini, intlanganiso enkulu kunene." 
2Chronicles30:14 Baye besuka basusa izibingelo ezise‐Yerusaleme; nazo zonke izibingelo zesiqumiso bazisusa, baziposa emlanjaneni we‐Kidrone." 
2Chronicles30:15 Bandula baxe̔la ipasika ngoweshumi linesine umhla wenyanga yesibini: baye abaperisite naba‐Levi bebedanile, bazingewalisa, bangenisa amadini okutshiswa endlwini kayehova." 
2Chronicles30:16 Baza bema endaweni yokuma yabo, njengesiko labo, njengomteto ka‐Mosesi indoda katixo: bati abaperisite basasaza igazi, belamkela esandleni saba‐Levi." 
2Chronicles30:17 Ngokuba bebebaninzi entlanganisweni abangazingcwalisanga: ngako aba‐Levi babepezu kwokuxe̔lwa kwazo ipasika, ngenxa yabo bonke abebengacocekile, ukwenza ngcwele kuyehova." 
2Chronicles30:18 Ngokuba isininzi sabantu, kwa abaninzi bevela kwa‐Frayime, nakwa‐Manase, na kwa‐Yisakare, nakwa‐Zebulone, bebengazicokisile, koko batyayo ipasika ngokungenjengokuba̔liweyo. Kodwa u‐Hezekiya wabatandazela, esiti: Wanga uyehova, lowo ulungileyo, angaxolela" 
2Chronicles30:19 bonke ababekisayo intliziyo zabo ukufuna utixo onguyehova, utixo woyise babo, nakuba kungenjengokucokisa kweyingcwele indawo." 
2Chronicles30:20 Waye uyehova epulapula ku‐Hezekiya, wapilisa abantu." 
2Chronicles30:21 Kwa njalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, obeluko e‐Yerusaleme, lwabamba umtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele imihla yasixe̔nxe ngomgcobo omkulu: bati aba‐Levi nabaperisite badumisa uyehova imihla ngemihla, ngeziculiso zendumiso kuyehova." 
2Chronicles30:22 Waza u‐Hezekiya wateta entliziyweni yabo bonke aba‐Levi, ababenokuqonda ingqondo elungileyo yo kukayehova: baye besitya okwomtendeleko imihla yasixe̔nxe, bebinga imibingo yoxolo, besenza imibulelo kuyehova, utixo woyise babo." 
2Chronicles30:23 Yandula yonke intlanganiso yacebisana ukubamba esinye isixe̔nxe semihla: babamba ke isixe̔nxe semihla ngomgcobo. 
2Chronicles30:24 Ngokuba u‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda war̔olela intlanganiso inkunzana eziliwaka, negusha ezingamawaka asixe̔nxe; nenkosi zar̔olela intlanganiso inkunzana eziliwaka, negusha ezingamawaka alishumi: kanjako abaperisite bebezingcwalisile ngento eninzi." 
2Chronicles30:25 Yaza yavuya yonke intlanganiso yo‐Juda, nabaperisite, naba‐Levi, nayo yonke intlanganiso eyabivela kwa‐Sirayeli, nabasemzini abebevele elizweni lakwa‐Sirayeli, abebehlala kwa‐Juda." 
2Chronicles30:26 Kwaye kuko uvuyo olukulu e‐Yerusaleme: ngokuba kuselokwemihla ka‐Solomone, unyana ka‐Davide, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, bekungekokunjalo e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles30:27 Bandula besuka abaperisite abangaba‐Levi, batamsanqelisa abantu: kwaye kuviwa ilizwi labo, wati umtandazo wabo wangena ekayeni lake eliyingcwele, ezulwini." 
2Chronicles31:1 Kwati kwakugqitywa konke oku, kwapuma bonke o‐Sirayeli abebeko baya ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, baziqekeza intsika zamatye, bazigaula i‐Ashera, bacita indawo ezipakamileyo nezibingelo kuyo yonke i‐Juda ne‐Benjamine, nakuyo i‐Frayime ne‐Manase, kwada kwagqityelwa. Lwandula lwonke usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwabuya olunye ngolunye ukuya emfuyweni yalo, ezixekweni zakowalo." 
2Chronicles31:2 WAZA u‐Hezekiya wamisa izahlulo zabaperisite nezaba‐Levi, ngezahlulo zabo, abanye ngabanye njengenkonzo yabo, abaperisite naba‐Levi, ngenxa yamadini okutshiswa nangenxa yeminikelo yoxolo, ukuba bakonze, babulele, badumise nokudumisa emasangweni ayo iminquba kayehova:" 
2Chronicles31:3 kwa nesabelo sokumkani kwimfuyo yake ngenxa yamadini okutshiswa, awokusa nawokuhlwa amadini okutshiswa, nawenyanga ezitwasileyo, nawemitendeleko emisiweyo, njengokuba̔liweyo emtetweni kayehova." 
2Chronicles31:4 Waza waxelela abantu, abemi base‐Yerusaleme, ukuba mabanike isabelwa sabaperisite naba‐Levi, ukuze babambelele emtetweni kayehova." 
2Chronicles31:5 Kekaloku lakugqabuka ilizwi elo, lwakolisa usapo luka‐Sirayeli ukuzisa ulibo lwenqolowa, n eveyine, neoli, nobusi, nolwako konke ukuvelisa kwentsimi: lwaluzisa nesishumi sezinto zonke ngobuninzi." 
2Chronicles31:6 Kanjalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli noluka‐Juda, olube luhlala ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, lwazisa nalo isishumi senkabi negusha, nesishumi sezinto ezingcwele ezibe zingcwalisiwe kuyehova, utixo walo, lwazibeka ngemfumba ngemfumba." 
2Chronicles31:7 Ngenyanga yesitatu lwaqala ukuseka imfumba ezo, lwagqiba ke ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe." 
2Chronicles31:8 Bati bakuza u‐Hezekiya nenkosi babona imfumba ezo, babonga uyehova, nabantu bake o‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles31:9 Wandula u‐Hezekiya wabuza abaperisite naba‐Levi ngazo imfumba ezo. 
2Chronicles31:10 Waza u‐Hazariya umperisite omkulu, owendlu ka‐Tsadoki, wateta kuye, wati: Kuseloko kwaqalwayo ukungenisa iminikelo endlwini kayehova, sidlile sahluta, ewe sisalisile ngento eninzi; ngokuba uyehova ebatamsanqele abantu bake, kwada kwasala ingxokolo le." 
2Chronicles31:11 Wandula waxela u‐Hezekiya ukuba kulungiswe inkambili endlwini kayehova: bazilungisa ke," 
2Chronicles31:12 bangenisa iminikelo, nezishumi, nezinto ezingcwele, ngenyaniso; waye u‐Kononiya um‐Levi ebengumpati pezu kwazo, no‐Shimehi umninawe wake ebengowasemva." 
2Chronicles31:13 Kanjalo u‐Yehili, no‐Hazaziya, no‐Nahate, no‐Hasaheli, no‐Jerimote, no‐Yozabadi, no‐Eliyeli, no‐Simakiya, no‐Mahate, no‐Benaya, bebengamagosa ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Kononiya no‐Shimehi umninawe wake, ngommiselo ka‐Hezekiya ukumkani, no‐Hazariya umpati wendlu katixo." 
2Chronicles31:14 No‐Kore unyana ka‐Yimna um‐Levi, umlindimnyango ngasempumalanga, yena ebepezu kweminikelo yesisa katixo, ukuba abe iminikelo kayehova, nezinto ezingcwele kakulu." 
2Chronicles31:15 Nangapantsi kwake, u‐Hedeni, no‐Minyamine, no‐Yoshuwa, no‐Shemaya, n o‐Amariya, no‐Shekaniya, bebesezixekweni zabaperisite, ebusebenzini babo, ukuba babele abazalwana babo ezahlulweni, kwa nabakulu nabancinane:" 
2Chronicles31:16 ngapandle kwababudoda babo ababa̔lelweyo ngokuzalwa, abaminyaka yobudala mitatu napezulu, bonke abangenayo endlwini kayehova, ngenxa yokubanga kwemihla ngemihla, ngenxa yenkonzo yabo, ngezigcinelo zabo, ngezahlulo zabo:" 
2Chronicles31:17 kwa nabaperisite ababa̔lelweyo ngendlu zoyise zabo, naba‐Levi abaminyaka yobudala imashumi mabini napezulu, ngezigcinelo zabo, ngezahlulo zabo;" 
2Chronicles31:18 nababa̔lelweyo ngokuzalwa pakati kwazo zonke intsapo zabo, abafazi babo, nonyana babo, nentombi zabo, kuyo yonke intlanganiso: ngokuba ebusebenzini babo bazingcwalisa ebungcweleni." 
2Chronicles31:19 Kanjalo onyana baka‐Arone abaperisite, ezindleni zenqele zezixeko zabo, kuzo zonke izixeko ngazinye, bebenamadoda abalulweyo ngamagama, ukuba anike izabelwa kubo bonke ababudoda pakati kwabaperisite, nakubo bonke ababa̔lelweyo ngokuzalwa pakati kwaba‐Levi." 
2Chronicles31:20 Wenza ngokunjalo u‐Hezekiya kuyo yonke i‐Juda; wayesenza okulungileyo, nokufaneleyo, nokuyinyaniso, ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wake." 
2Chronicles31:21 Nakuwo wonke umsebenzi owawuqalayo enkonzweni yendlu katixo, nakuwo umteto, nakuwo umyalelo, ukuba afune utixo wake, wenza ngayo yonke intliziyo yake, watamsanqeleka." 
2Chronicles32:1 EMVENI kwezizinto, nokuqiniswa kwazo, kweza u‐Senakeribe, ukumkani we‐Asiriya, wangena pakati kwe‐Juda, waṙaula izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, waba uya kuzoyisa kuye." 
2Chronicles32:2 Wati akubona u‐Hezekiya ukuba u‐Senakeribe ufikile, nokuba ubuso bake bubekwa ukulwa ne‐Yerusaleme," 
2Chronicles32:3 wacebisana nenkosi zake namagoṙa ake, ukuba kuvingcwe amanzi emitombo engapandle kwesixeko: baza bamnceda ke." 
2Chronicles32:4 Ngokuba bekuhlanganiswa abantu abaninzi, abavingcayo yonke imitombo, nomlanjana okukulayo pakati kwelozwe, besiti: Yinina ukuba okumkani be‐Asiriya beze apa, bafumane amanzi amaninzi?" 
2Chronicles32:5 Waza wazomeleza, walwaka lwonke udonga olube lucitiwe, walunyusa kwada kwasezinqatyeni; waka nolunye udonga ngapandle, wanqabisa i‐Milo esixekweni sika‐Davide, wenza izikali namakaka ngobuninzi." 
2Chronicles32:6 Kanjalo wamisa inkosi zokulwa pezu kwabantu, wazihlanganisela kuye enkundleni yasesangweni lesixeko, wateta entliziyweni yazo, esiti:" 
2Chronicles32:7 Yomelelani nikalipe, ningoyiki, ningatuswa nokutuswa, ngenxa yokumkani we‐Asiriya, nangenxa yaso sonke isihlwele esinaye: ngokuba bebaninzi abanati pezu kwabanaye:" 
2Chronicles32:8 yingalo yenyama enaye, kodwa nguyehova, utixo wetu, onati, ukuba asincede, nokuba alwe ukulwa kwetu. Bati abantu bayamela emazwini ka‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Emveni kwoku u‐Senakeribe ukumkani we‐Asiriya watuma izicaka zake ukuya e‐Yerusaleme, (kodwa yena ebepambi kwe‐Lakishe, nabo bonke abobukosi bake kunye naye,) ku‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, nakubo bonke o‐Juda ababese‐Yerusaleme, esiti:" 
2Chronicles32:10 Utsho u‐Senakeribe ukumkani we‐Asiriya ukuti: Kuyinto nina enitembela kuyo, ukuba nihleli ekuvingcelekeni e‐Yerusaleme?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Akanihendi na u‐Hezekiya, ukuba aninikele ukububa ngendlala nangenxanwa, esiti: Uyehova, utixo wetu, uya kusisindisa esandleni sokumkani we‐Asiriya?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Asi nguye na u‐Hezekiya ozisusileyo indawo ezipakamileyo zake nezibingelo zake, watsho ko‐Juda nakwi‐Yerusaleme, esiti: Pambi kwesibingelo sinye niya kutoba, napezu kwaso niya kuqumisa?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Anikwazi na oko endikwenzileyo mna, kwa nobawo bam, kubo bonke abantu bamanye amazwe? Otixo bentlanga zalomazwe bebeka banamandla okusindisa amazwe abo esandleni sam na?" 
2Chronicles32:14 Nguwupina kubo bonke otixo bentlanga eze obawo bam bazilahlele ekutshatyalalisweni, obenamandla okusindisa abantu bake esandleni sam, ukuba utixo wenu abe namandla okusindisa nina esandleni sam?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Ngako kaloku maningakohliswa ngu‐Hezekiya, maningahendwa nokuhendwa nguye ngokunjalo, maningakolwa nguye kanjako: ngokuba kungeko namnye utixo wolunye uhlanga no wobunye ubukumkani, obenamandla okusindisa abantu bake esandleni sam, nasesandleni sobawo bam; kukancinane kangakananina ngakumbi ke, ukuba utixo wenu wosindisa nina esandleni sam?" 
2Chronicles32:16 Zasalekela izicaka zake ukuteta ngakuye uyehova ongutixo, nangakuye u‐Hezekiya isicaka sake." 
2Chronicles32:17 Kanjako waziba̔la incwadi ukutuka uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, nokuteta ngakuye, esiti: Njengokuba otixo bentlanga zamanye amazwe bengasindisanga abantu babo esandleni sam, kwa njalo utixo ka‐Hezekiya akayi kusindisa abantu bake esandleni sam." 
2Chronicles32:18 Zaza zadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, ngesi‐Juda, ngasebantwini base‐Yerusaleme abebepezu kwodonga, ukuboyikisa nokubatusa; ukuze zitimbe isixeko." 
2Chronicles32:19 Zaye ziteta ngakuye utixo we‐Yerusaleme, njengakubo otixo bezizwe zomhlaba, umsebenzi wezandla zabantu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Wasuka watandaza u‐Hezekiya ukumkani, no‐Yisaya unyana ka‐Amotse umprofite, pezu kwoku, bakala ngasezulwini." 
2Chronicles32:21 Waza uyehova watuma ingelosi, eyati shwaqe onke amagoṙa obuṙoti, nabakokeli, nenkosi, emkosini wokumkani we‐Asiriya. Wada wabuya ngedano lobuso ukuya kwelake ilizwe. Wati akuba engenile endlwini yotixo wake, bandula abo abebepumile kowake umbilini bamwisa kona ngeṙele." 
2Chronicles32:22 Wenje njalo uyehova ukusindisa u‐Hezekiya nabemi base‐Yerusaleme esandleni sika‐Senakeribe ukumkani we‐Asiriya, nasesandleni sa banye bonke, wabakapa ngamacala onke." 
2Chronicles32:23 Kwaye kuziswa ngabaninzi iminikelo kuyehova e‐Yerusaleme, nezinto ezinqabileyo ku‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda; waza wapakanyiswa emehlweni entlanga zonke emveni kwoko." 
2Chronicles32:24 NGALOMIHLA wabesifa u‐Hezekiya wada waza kububa: wandula watandaza kuyehova, owateta kuye, wamnika umqondiso." 
2Chronicles32:25 Kodwa u‐Hezekiya akabuyekeza ngokunjengokusizwa kwake; ngokuba intliziyo yake ibir̔atshile: ngako bekuko umsindo pezu kwake, napezu kwo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles32:26 Koko u‐Hezekiya wazigobayo ngenxa yokur̔atsha kwentliziyo yake, yena nabemi base‐Yerusaleme; waza umsindo kayehova aweza pezu kwabo emihleni ka‐Hezekiya." 
2Chronicles32:27 Waye u‐Hezekiya ebenobutyebi nodumo olukulu kunene: wayezenzela inkambili zokubekela zibe zezesilivere, nezegolide, nezamatye anqabileyo, nezezimnandi, nezamakaka, nezazo zonke izinto ezinqwenelekileyo;" 
2Chronicles32:28 kwa nezindlu zokubekela zokwanda kwenqolowa, neveyine, neoli; nezitale zentlobo zonke zezilo, nezibaya zemihlambi." 
2Chronicles32:29 Kanjako wazenzela izixeko, nemfuyo yegusha nenkomo ngobuninzi; ngokuba utixo ebemnikile impahla eninzi kunene." 
2Chronicles32:30 Ukwa nguye u‐Hezekiya owavingca elasentla itende lamanzi ase‐Gihone, wawondisa ngapantsi ecaleni lasentshonalanga isixeko sika‐Davide. Kwa njalo u‐Hezekiya watamsanqeleka kuyo yonke imisebenzi yake." 
2Chronicles32:31 Kwaye kunjalo kodwa, ekufikeni kwezitunywa zenkosi zase‐Babilone, ezibe zitumile kuye ukuba kubuzwe ngommangaliso obe wenzekile elizweni, utixo wamshiya, ukuba amlinge, ukuze akwazi konke okusentliziyweni yake." 
2Chronicles32:32 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Hezekiya, nezibele zake, bona ke, ziba̔liwe emibonisweni ka‐Yisaya unyana ka‐Amotse, umprofite, nas encwadini yokumkani bo‐Juda no‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles32:33 Wada u‐Hezekiya walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa kwelapezulu lamancw̔aba onyana baka‐Davide: bati bonke o‐Juda nabase‐Yerusaleme bamenzela udumo ekufeni kwake. Waza u‐Manase unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles33:1 EBEYIMINYAKA ilishumi linamibini u‐Manase ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi mahlanu anamihlanu e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles33:2 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengento ezibuntshontsho zabaheyideni, ababegqogqiwe nguyehova pambi kwalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:3 Ngokuba wabuya wazaka indawo ezipakamileyo, ezo u‐Hezekiya uyise wake ubezicitile; wamisela o‐Bali izibingelo, wenza imifanekiso ka‐Ashera, wazitoba kuwo wonke umkosi wezulu, wawukonza." 
2Chronicles33:4 Waka izibingelo nasendlwini kayehova, owabesiti uyehova ngayo: e‐Yerusaleme liya kubako igama lam kude kube ngunapakade." 
2Chronicles33:5 Wakela nawo wonke umkosi wezulu izibingelo, emabaleni omabini endlu kayehova." 
2Chronicles33:6 Waye yena kanjalo edlulisa abantwana bake emlilweni, esihlanjeni sonyana ka‐Hinome, wenza ngobugqi, walaula, wenza ngobanuse, wenzelana nemishologu namatola: wandisa ukwenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, ukumqumbisa." 
2Chronicles33:7 Kanjako wabeka umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, idalo abelenzile, endlwini katixo, owabesiti utixo ngayo ku‐Davide naku‐Solomone unyana wake: Kulendlu, nakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, endiyinyulileyo kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli, ndiya kubeka igama lam kude kube ngunapakade:" 
2Chronicles33:8 ndandingayi kupinda ukukwelelisa unyawo luka‐Sirayeli emhlabeni, endiwumisele oyihlo benu; kupela ukuba baya kulumkela ukwenza konke endibayaleleyo ngako, ngawo wonke umteto, nezimiselo, nezigwebo, ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
2Chronicles33:9 Wenje njalo u‐Manase ukudungudelisa o‐Juda nabemi base‐Yerusaleme, bada bakwenza okukohlakeleyo ngapezu kwabaheyideni, abo wabatshabalalisayo uyehova pambi kwalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:10 Wandula wateta uyehova ku‐Manase, nasebantwini bake: abapulapula noko." 
2Chronicles33:11 Ngako uyehova wazisa pezu kwabo inkosi zomkosi wokumkani we‐Asiriya, ezambamba u‐Manase emitolweni, zamnxiba ngamakamandela obedu, zamsa e‐Babilone." 
2Chronicles33:12 Kodwa ekuxinezelweni kwake wabongoza ubuso bukayehova, utixo wake, wazigoba kakulu pambi kwotixo woyise bake," 
2Chronicles33:13 watandaza kuye: waza wakungeleka kuye, weva isitaṙuziso sake, wambuyisela e‐Yerusaleme ebukumkanini bake. Wandula wazi u‐Manase ukuba uyehova unguye utixo." 
2Chronicles33:14 Nasemveni kwoku waka udonga ngapandle kwesixeko sika‐Davide, ngasecaleni lasentshonalanga le‐Gihone emfuleni, nakude kwasekungenweni ngesango lentlanzi, wabiyela i‐Hofeli, walupakamisa kakulu, wabeka inkosi zokulwa kuzo zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwa‐Juda." 
2Chronicles33:15 Wayesusa otixo basemzini nelodalo endlwini kayehova, nazo zonke izibingelo abezakile entabeni yendlu kayehova, nase‐Yerusaleme, waziposa ngapandle kwesixeko." 
2Chronicles33:16 Waza walungisa isibingelo sikayehova, wabinga pezu kwaso imibingo yoxolo neminikelo yokubulela, waxelela o‐Juda ukuba bakonze uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:17 Kodwa abantu basabinga imibingo ezindaweni ezipakamileyo, bebing ela uyehova, utixo wabo, kupela." 
2Chronicles33:18 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Manase, nomtandazo wake kuye utixo wake, namazwi abo ababoni abateta kuye egameni likayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, bona ke, zisemba̔lini yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles33:19 Kanjalo umtandazo wake, nokokuba u‐Tixo wakungeleka kuye, nazo zonke izono zake, nobumenemene bake, nendawo owati kuzo waka indawo ezipakamileyo, wazimisa i‐Ashera nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo, engekazigobanga, bona ke, ziba̔liwe emazwini ababoni." 
2Chronicles33:20 Wada u‐Manase walala noyise bake, wancw̔atywa endlwini yake; waza u‐Amoni unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles33:21 EBEYIMINYAKA imashumi mabini anesibini u‐Amoni ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamibini e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles33:22 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengokuba ebenje njalo u‐Manase uyise: ngokuba u‐Amoni wayibingela yonke imifanekiso eqingqiweyo abeyenzile uyise, wayikonza;" 
2Chronicles33:23 akazigoba pambi kwoyehova, njengokuba ebezigobile u‐Manase uyise; koko u‐Amoni lowo wandisayo ityala." 
2Chronicles33:24 Zaza izicaka zake zaceba ngakuye, zamfisa kweyake indlu." 
2Chronicles33:25 Kodwa abantu belizwe babulala bonke abebecebile ngakuye ukumkani u‐Amoni: bandula abantu belizwe benza u‐Josiya unyana wake ukumkani esikundleni sake. 
2Chronicles34:1 EBEYIMINYAKA yasibozo u‐Josiya ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yamashumi matatu anamnye e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles34:2 Wayesenza okufaneleyo emehlweni kayehova, wahamba ezindleleni zika‐Davide uyise, engapambukelanga nangasekunene nangasekohlo." 
2Chronicles34:3 Ngokuba ngowesibozo umnyaka wokupata kwake ubukumkani, nxa abesengumfana, waqala ukufuna utixo ka‐Davide uyise; nangomnyaka weshumi linesibini, waqala ukucokisa i‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme kuzo indawo ezipakamileyo, ne‐Ashera, nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo, naleyo ityityishiweyo." 
2Chronicles34:4 Baye becita izibingelo zo‐Bali ebusweni bake; nezifanekiselo zelanga ezibe zipezulu pezu kwazo, wazigaula; ne‐Ashera, nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo, naleyo ityityishiweyo, wayiqekeza, wenza utuli ngayo, walutshiza pezu kwamancw̔aba abo abebebingelele kuyo." 
2Chronicles34:5 Namatambo abaperisite wawatshisa pezu kwezibingelo zabo; wacokisa i‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme. 
2Chronicles34:6 Nakuzo izixeko zakwa‐Manase, nezakwa‐Frayime, nezakwa‐Simone, kwada kwakuzo ezakwa‐Nefatali, emanxuweni abo azingqongayo," 
2Chronicles34:7 wazicita izibingelo ne‐Ashera, wayikanda imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yada yaba lutuli, wagaula izifanekiselo zelanga kulo lonke ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli: waza wabuya waya e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles34:8 Kekaloku ngoweshumi linesibozo umnyaka wokupata kwake ubukumkani, akuba ebesel’ ecokisile ilizwe, nendlu, watuma u‐Shafane unyana ka‐Atsaliya, no‐Mahaseya inkosi yesixeko, no‐Jowahi unyana ka‐Yowahazi, umkumbuzi, ukuya kulungisa indlu kayehova, utixo wake." 
2Chronicles34:9 Bati bakuza ku‐Hilikiya umperisite omkulu, bayinika imali ebizisiwe endlwini katixo, leyo aba‐Levi abagcinayo umnyango bayibuta esandleni so‐Manase no‐Frayime, nakuso sonke isisalela so‐Sirayeli, nakubo bonke o‐Juda no‐Benjamine; bandula babuyela e‐Yerusaleme:" 
2Chronicles34:10 bayinika ke esandleni sabo bawenza umsebenzi, sabo bonganyisiweyo pezu kwendlu kayehova; bati bona bayinika kubo abawenza umsebenzi, abasebenzayo endlwini kayehova, ukulungisa nokuqinisa indlu leyo;" 
2Chronicles34:11 bayinika kwincibi zemiti nakubaki, kuze kutengwe amatye aqandulweyo, nemiti yokubandakanyisa, neyokupahla izindlu ezibe zicitiwe ngokumkani bo‐Juda." 
2Chronicles34:12 Aza amadoda lawo enza ngenyaniso kulomsebenzi: nabo ababe bonganyisiwe pezu kwawo, ngu‐Yahati, no‐Hobadiya, aba‐Levi kubo onyana baka‐Merari; no‐Zekariya, no‐Meshulame, kubo onyana bama‐Kohati; ukuba bongame: naba‐Levi aba, bonke bebenokuqonda ngezinto zokuculisa." 
2Chronicles34:13 Babepezu kwabatwali bemitwalo kanjalo, bengabongama pezu kwabo bonke abawenza umsebenzi ngenkonzo ngenkonzo: nakubo aba‐Levi bebeko ababa̔li, namagosa, nabalindimnyango." 
2Chronicles34:14 Kwati kwakukutshwa imali ebizisiwe endlwini kayehova, wayifumana u‐Hilikiya umperisite incwadi yomteto kayehova obunikiwe ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
2Chronicles34:15 Waza wateta u‐Hilikiya wati ku‐Shafane umba̔li: Incwadi yomteto ndiyifumene endlwini kayehova. Wandula u‐Hilikiya wanika incwadi leyo ku‐Shafane. 
2Chronicles34:16 Wasuka u‐Shafane weza nencwadi leyo kukumkani, wamzisela ukumkani kanjako impendulo, esiti: Konke obekunikelwa ezandleni zezicaka zako, ziyakwenza." 
2Chronicles34:17 Sezikupile imali ebifunyanwa endlwini kayehova, zayinika esandleni sabongama, nasesandleni sabo bawenza umsebenzi." 
2Chronicles34:18 Waye kanjalo u‐Shafane umba̔li wayeshumayela kukumkani, esiti: Ndinikiwe incwadi ngu‐Hilikiya umperisite. Waza u‐Shafane walesesha kuyoebusweni bokumkani." 
2Chronicles34:19 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni ukumkani wevayo amazwi omteto, waṙazula izivato zake." 
2Chronicles34:20 Wandula ukumkani wayalela u‐Hilikiya, no‐Ahikame unyana ka‐Shafane, no‐Habedoni unyana ka‐Mika, no‐Shafane umba̔li, no‐Hasaya isicaka sokumkani, ngokuti:" 
2Chronicles34:21 Hambani, niye nibuze kuyehova ngenxa yam, nangenxa yabaseleyo kwa‐Sirayeli nakwa‐Juda, pezu kwamazwi alencwadi ifunyenweyo: ngokuba umkulu umsindo kayehova otululweyo pezu kwetu, ngokokuba obawo betu bengaligcinanga ilizwi likayehova, ukwenza ngako konke okuba̔liweyo kulencwadi." 
2Chronicles34:22 Wayehamba u‐Hilikiya, nabokumkani, ukuya ku‐Hulida umprofitekazi, umfazi ka‐Shalume, unyana ka‐Tokate, unyana ka‐Hasera, umgcini wezivato; (waye yena ehlala e‐Yerusaleme, kwesesibini isahlulo sayo;) baza bateta kuye ngokunjalo." 
2Chronicles34:23 Wayesiti kubo: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Yitini kulondoda initumileyo ukuza kum:" 
2Chronicles34:24 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa ilishwa pezu kwalendawo, napezu kwabemi bayo, zonke iziqalekiso eziba̔liweyo encwadini abayileseshileyo ebusweni bake ukumkani wo‐Juda:" 
2Chronicles34:25 ngenxa yokuba bendishiyile, nokuba bequmisile kotixo bambi, ukuze bandiqumbise ngayo yonke imisebenzi yezandla zabo; ngako umsindo wam wotululwa pezu kwalendawo, ungacinywa ke." 
2Chronicles34:26 Kodwa kukumkani wo‐Juda, onitumileyo ukuza kubuza kuyehova, niya kutsho kuye ngokuti: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Amazwi uwavileyo, —" 
2Chronicles34:27 ngokokuba intliziyo yako ibitambile, nokuba wazigoba pambi kwotixo, ekuveni kwako amazwi ake ngakuyo lendawo, nangakubo abemi bayo, wazigoba pambi kwam, waṙazula nezivato zako, walila nokulila ebusweni bam; kanjalo nam ndi ku vile wena, utsho uyehova." 
2Chronicles34:28 Bona ke, ndiya kukubutela koyihlo bako, wauya kubutelwa encw̔abeni lako ngoxolo; namehlo ako wona akayi kubona lonke ilishwa endiya kulizisa pezu kwalendawo, napezu kwabemi bayo. Baza bamzisela ukumkani impendulo." 
2Chronicles34:29 Wandula watuma ukumkani, wahlanganisa bonke abadala bo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles34:30 Wayenyuka ukumkani waya endlwini kayehova, nawo onke aadoda akwa‐Juda, nabemi base‐Yerusaleme, nabaperisite, naba‐Levi, nabo bonke abantu, kwa nabakulu nabancinane; waza walesesha ezindlebeni zabo onke amazwi encwadi yocebano, ebifunyenwe endlwini kayehova." 
2Chronicles34:31 Wema ukumkani endaweni yokuma yake, wenza ucebano pambi kwoyehova, lwokuba kulandelwe uyehova, nokuba kugcinwe imiyalelo yake, nezinqi̔nelo zake, nezimiselo zake, ngayo yonke intliziyo yake, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wake, kufezwe amazwi ocebano aba̔liweyo kulencwadi." 
2Chronicles34:32 Wenza bonke abebeko e‐Yerusaleme nakwa‐Benjamine beme kulo nabo. Kwa njalo abemi base‐Yerusaleme benza ngalo ucebano lukatixo, utixo woyise babo." 
2Chronicles34:33 Waza wasusa u‐Josiya zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho kuwo onke amazwe abengawosapo luka‐Sirayeli, wabakonzisa bonke abebeko kwa‐Sirayeli, ukuba bakonze uyehova, utixo wabo: yonke imihla yake bebengapambuki ekulandeleni uyehova, utixo woyise babo." 
2Chronicles35:1 WANDULA u‐Josiya wabamba ipasika kuyehova e‐Yerusaleme: baye bexe̔la ipasika ngoweshumi linesine umhla wenyanga yokuqala. 
2Chronicles35:2 Waza wabamisa abaperisite pezu kwezigcinelo zabo, wabomelezela inkonzo yayo indlu kayehova;" 
2Chronicles35:3 wati kuba‐Levi, abafundisayo o‐Sirayeli bonke, abebengabangcwele kuyehova: Bekani ityeya eyingcwele endlwini ebisakiwa ngu‐Solomone unyana ka‐Davide ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli; aniyi kuba namtwalo pezu kwamagxalaba; kaloku konzani uyehova, utixo wenu, nabantu bake o‐Sirayeli," 
2Chronicles35:4 nizilungise ngezindlu zoyise zenu, njengezahlulo zenu, ngesiba̔lo sika‐Davide ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, nangesiba̔lo sika‐Solomone unyana wake;" 
2Chronicles35:5 nime kweyingcwele indawo, ngezahlukaniso zezindlu zoyise zabazalwana benu usapo lwabantu, na ngo kwahlulwa kwezindlu zoyise zaba‐Levi;" 
2Chronicles35:6 nixe̔le ipasika, nizingcwalise, nilungisele abazalwana benu, ukuba benze ngalo ilizwi likayehova ngesandla sika‐Mosesi." 
2Chronicles35:7 Waye u‐Josiya er̔olela usapo lwabantu ezinkomeni ezincinane, amatakane egusha nawebokwe, abe ngaweminikelo yepasika onke, ngenxa yabo bonke abebeko, angamawaka angamashumi matatu inani lawo, nenkabi ezingamawaka matatu: ezi bezizezemfuyo yokumkani." 
2Chronicles35:8 Nenkosi zake zona zar̔olela abantu, n abaperisite, naba‐Levi, ngokuvuma: u‐Hilikiya, no‐Zekariya, no‐Yehili, abapati bendlu katixo, banikela abaperisite, zibe yiminikelo yepasika, inkomo ezincinane ezingamawaka mabini anamakulu matandatu, nenkabi ezingamakulu matatu." 
2Chronicles35:9 Kanjalo u‐Konaniya, no‐Shemaya, no‐Netaneli, abazalwana bake, no‐Hashabiya, no‐Yeyeli, no‐Yozabadi, inkosi zaba‐Levi, bar̔olela aba‐Levi, zibe yiminikelo yepasika, inkomo ezincinane ezingamawaka mahlanu, nenkabi ezingamakulu mahlanu." 
2Chronicles35:10 Kwada kwalungiswa inkonzo: baza abaperisite bema endaweni yokuma yabo, naba‐Levi ezahlulweni zabo, njengomyalelo wokumkani." 
2Chronicles35:11 Baza baxe̔la ipasika; bati abaperisite bafefa ngegazi, belamkela ezandleni zabo, naba‐Levi bahlinza." 
2Chronicles35:12 Bandula basusa okwamadini okutshiswa, ukuba bakunike ngezahlulo zendlu zoyise elusatsheni lwabantu, ukuze lunikele kuyehova, njengokuba̔liweyo encwadini ka‐Mosesi: benje njalo ngenkabi nazo." 
2Chronicles35:13 Baye besoja ipasika ngomlilo, njengesiko: kodwa izinto ezingcwele bazipeka ezimbizeni, nakongxawo, nasezikotileni, baza bababela bonke abantu ngobunxamo." 
2Chronicles35:14 Nakamva balungisela bona, nabaperisite: ngokuba abaperisite, onyana baka‐Arone, bebesekunikeleni amadini okutshiswa namanqata kwada kwasebusuku; ngako aba‐Levi balungisela bona, nabaperisite onyana baka‐Arone." 
2Chronicles35:15 Kanjalo abaculi, onyana baka‐Safa, bebesendaweni yokuma yabo, njengomyalelo ka‐Davide, no‐Safa, no‐Hemani, no‐Jedutune umboni wokumkani; nabalindimnyango ngesango ngesango; bebengabangwa bona ukumka enkonzweni yabo, ngokuba abazalwana babo, aba‐Levi, babalungisela." 
2Chronicles35:16 Kwa njalo kwalungiswa yonke inkonzo kayehova ngaleyomini, ukuba kubanjwe ipasika, nokuba kunikelwe amadini okutshiswa pezu kwesibingelo sikayehova, njengomyalelo wokumkani u‐Josiya." 
2Chronicles35:17 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli obeluko lwabamba ipasika ngexesha elo, nomtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele imihla esixe̔nxe." 
2Chronicles35:18 Kwaye kungabanjwanga ipasika enjalo, kuselokwemihla ka‐Samyali umprofite; kanjako akwabiko namnye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli owabamba ipasika enjengaleyo wayibambayo u‐Josiya, nabaperisite, naba‐Levi, nabo bonke o‐Juda no‐Sirayeli abebeko, nabemi base‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles35:19 Ngoweshumi linesibozo umnyaka wobukumkani buka‐Josiya kwabanjwa ipasika le. 
2Chronicles35:20 Emveni kwako konke oku, akuba u‐Josiya ebesel elungisile indlu, kwenyuka u‐Neko ukumkani we‐Jipete ukulwa ngakuyo i‐Karakemishe, ngasem‐Ferate: waza u‐Josiya wapumela ngakuye." 
2Chronicles35:21 Wandula watuma izigidimi ukuya kuye, esiti: Ndiyinto nina kuwe, kumkani wo‐Juda? andi zi ngakuwe wena namhla, ndiza ngakuyo indlu elwayo nam; ngokuba utixo ete uya kundikaulezisa: yeka wena utixo, okunye nam, ukuze angakububisi." 
2Chronicles35:22 Kodwa u‐Josiya akasonga ubuso bake kuye, koko wazenza ngakumbi ukuba alwe naye; akapulapula kuwo amazwi ka‐Neko evela emlonyeni katixo, kodwa weza ukulwa emhlanjeni wase‐Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Bati abatoli bamtolela ukumkani u‐Josiya; waza wati ukumkani kwizicaka zake: Nimke nam, ngokuba ndenziwe inxeba kakulu." 
2Chronicles35:24 Zandula izicaka zake zamsusa enqwelweni leyo, zamkwelisa kweyesibini inqwelo abenayo, zamsa e‐Yerusaleme; wada wafa, wancw̔atywa emancw̔abeni oyise bake: baza bonke o‐Juda nabase‐Yerusaleme bamlilela u‐Josiya." 
2Chronicles35:25 Kanjako u‐Jeremiya wenza isililo pezu kwo‐Josiya; nabo bonke abaculi nabaculikazi bateta ngo‐Josiya ezililweni zabo kwada kwanamhla, bazenza zibe ngummiso kwa‐Sirayeli: bona ke, ziba̔liwe ezililweni." 
2Chronicles35:26 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Josiya, nezibele zake, njengoko kuba̔liweyo emtetweni kayehova," 
2Chronicles35:27 nezenzo zake, ezokuqala nezokupela, bona ke, ziba̔liwe encwadini yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli no‐Juda." 
2Chronicles36:1 BANDULA abantu belizwe batabata u‐Yehowahazi unyana ka‐Josiya, bamenza ukumkani esikundleni soyise e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles36:2 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini anesitatu u‐Yehowahazi ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani inyanga zantatu e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles36:3 Koko ukumkani we‐Jipete wamshenxisayo angabi ngukumkani e‐Yerusaleme, wahlaulisa ilizwe ikulu letalente zesilivere, netalente inye yegolide." 
2Chronicles36:4 Waza ukumkani we‐Jipete wamenza u‐Eliyakime umkuluwe wake ukumkani pezu kwo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme, waguqula igama lake libe ngu‐Yoyakime; no‐Yehowahazi umninawe wake, wamtabata u‐Neko, wamzisa e‐Jipete." 
2Chronicles36:5 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamihlanu u‐Yoyakime ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinamnye e‐Yerusaleme: wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, utixo wake." 
2Chronicles36:6 Kwenyuka ngakuye u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, wamnxiba ngamakamandela obedu, ukuba amse e‐Babilone." 
2Chronicles36:7 Nempahla zendlu kayehova wazizisa u‐Nebukanetsare inxenye e‐Babilone, wazibeka etempileni yake e‐Babilone." 
2Chronicles36:8 Kekaloku isisalela semicimbi ka‐Yoyakime, nento ezibuntshontsho zake owazenzayo, noko obekufunyanwa kuye, bona ke, ziba̔liwe encwadini yokumkani bo‐Sirayeli no‐Juda: waza u‐Yoyakine unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
2Chronicles36:9 Ebeyiminyaka yasibozo u‐Yoyakine ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani inyanga zantatu nemihla yalishumi e‐Yerusaleme: wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova." 
2Chronicles36:10 Nasekutwaseni kwomnyaka, watuma ukumkani u‐Nebukanetsare, wamzisa e‐Babilone, kunye nezinto ezinq wenelekileyo zendlu kayehova, wamenza u‐Zedekiya umzalwana wake ukumkani pezu kwo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles36:11 Ebeyiminyaka imashumi mabini anamnye u‐Zedekiya ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinamnye e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles36:12 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, utixo wake; akazigoba pambi kwo‐Jeremiya umprofite, eteta okuvela emlonyeni kayehova." 
2Chronicles36:13 Nakanjako wavukela ngakuye ukumkani u‐Nebukanetsare, obemfungisile utixo; intamo yake wayenza lukuni, nentliziyo yake wayigwenxisa, ukuba angaguqukeli kuyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
2Chronicles36:14 Kanjalo zonke inkosi zabaperisite, nabantu, bandisa ukwenza ngobumenemene kakulu, njengazo zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho zabaheyideni; banco̔lisa indlu kayehova, leyo abeyingcwalisile e‐Yerusaleme." 
2Chronicles36:15 Waza uyehova, utixo woyise babo, watuma kubo ngesandla sezitunywa zake, evuka kusasa, e zi tuma: ngokuba ebenenceba pezu kwabantu bake napezu kwekaya lake:" 
2Chronicles36:16 kodwa babehleka izitunywa zikatixo, bawadela amazwi ake, nabaprofite bake babagculela; ude wavuka umsindo kayehova ngakubo abantu bake, kwada akwabiko umciza." 
2Chronicles36:17 Ngako wenyusela pezu kwabo ukumkani wama‐Kaledine, owabulala amadodana abo ngeṙele endlwini yeyingcwele indawo yabo, engabanga nanceba pezu kwomfana nentombi, pezu kwexego noyingwevu: bonke wabanika esandleni sake." 
2Chronicles36:18 Nazo zonke impahla zendlu katixo, ezinkulu nezincinane, nendyebo zendlu kayehova, nendyebo zokumkani, nezenkosi zake; ezi zonke wazizisa e‐Babilone." 
2Chronicles36:19 Baye betshisa indlu katixo, bacita nodonga lwe‐Yerusaleme, nazo zonke inqaba zayo bazitshisa ngomlilo, nazo zonke izinto ezinqwenelekileyo zayo bazonakalisa." 
2Chronicles36:20 Nabasindileyo eṙeleni wabafudusela e‐Babilone; baza baba zizicaka kuye nakonyana bake kwada kwakukupatwa kwobukumkani be‐Peresiya: 
2Chronicles36:21 kuze kuzalisekiswe ilizwi likayehova ngomlomo ka‐Jeremiya, lada ilizwe lenzelela isabata zalo: yonke imihla yokucitakala kwalo libe linokupumla, ize izalisekiswe iminyaka emashumi asixe̔nxe." 
2Chronicles36:22 KEKALOKU ngowokuqala umnyaka ka‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya, ukuze kufezwe ilizwi likayehova ngomlomo ka‐Jeremiya, wawuvusa uyehova umoya ka‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya, ukuba walidlulisa ilizwi kubo bonke ubukumkani bake, esenje njalo nangesiba̔lo kanjako, esiti:" 
2Chronicles36:23 Utsho u‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya ukuti: Bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba ndibunikiwe nguyehova, utixo wezulu: kanjalo yena undiyalezele ukumakela indlu e‐Yerusaleme, ekwa‐Juda. Ngubanina pakati kwenu ovumayo kubo bonke abantu bake? uyehova, utixo wake, makabe naye, enyuke ke." 
Ezra1:1 KEKALOKU ngowokuqala umnyaka ka‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya, ukuze kufezwe ilizwi likayehova ngomlomo ka‐Jeremiya, wawuvusa uyehova umoya ka‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya, ukuba walidlulisa ilizwi kubo bonke ubukumkani bake, esenje njalo nangesiba̔lo kanjako, esiti:" 
Ezra1:2 Utsho u‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya ukuti: Bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba ndibunikiwe nguyehova, utixo wezulu; kanjalo yena undiyalezele ukumakela indlu e‐Yerusaleme, ekwa‐Juda." 
Ezra1:3 Ngubanina pakati kwenu ovumayo kubo bonke abantu bake? utixo wake makabe naye, enyuke aye e‐Yerusaleme, ekwa‐Juda, ayake indlu kayehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, (nguye lo utixo,) ese‐Yerusaleme." 
Ezra1:4 Nosukuba esele komnye umzi apo apambukele kona, makati amadoda omzi wake amncede ngesilivere, nangegolide, nangempahla, nangezilo, kunye nomnikelo wesisa ngenxa yayo indlu katixo ese‐Yerusaleme." 
Ezra1:5 Bandula besuka abazintloko zendlu zoyise zo‐Juda no‐Benjamine, nabaperisite, naba‐Levi, kunye nabo bonke abevusile utixo umoya wabo, ukuba benyuke baye ukuyaka indlu kayehova ese‐Yerusaleme." 
Ezra1:6 Baza bonke ababangqongayo, bazomeleza izandla zabo ngezinto zesilivere, ngegolide, ngempahla, nangezilo, nangezinto ezinqabileyo, ngapandle kwako konke obekunikwa ngesisa." 
Ezra1:7 Kanjalo ukumkani u‐Koreshe wazikupa impahla zendlu kayehova, ezo u‐Nebukanetsare ubezipumisile e‐Yerusaleme, wazibeka endlwini yotixo bake;" 
Ezra1:8 kwa zona u‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya wazikupa, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Mitredati umgcinindyebo, owazibalela ku‐Sheshebatsare, inkosi yo‐Juda." 
Ezra1:9 Lilo eli inani lazo: izitya zegolide ezimashumi matatu, izitya zesilivere eziliwaka, izitshetshe ezimashumi mabini anetoba," 
Ezra1:10 ibekile zegolide ezimashumi matatu, ibekile zesilivere zohlobo lumbi ezimakulu mane aneshumi linye, ezinye impahla eziliwaka:" 
Ezra1:11 zonke impahla zegolide nezesilivere zibe zingamawaka mahlanu anamakulu mane. Ezi zonke u‐Sheshebatsare wazinyusa nabatinjwa abebenyuswa e‐Babilone ukuya e‐Yerusaleme. 
Ezra2:1 LULO olu usapo lwaselizwaneni olwanyukayo kubo abatinjwa abebefudusiwe, abo u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ebebafudusele e‐Babilone, lwabuya lweza e‐Yerusaleme nakwa‐Juda, olunye ngolunye esixekweni sakowalo;" 
Ezra2:2 olwezayo no‐Zerubabeli: U‐Yoshuwa, u‐Nehemiya, u‐Seraya, u‐Rehelaya, u‐Modekai, u‐Bilishane, u‐Misipare, u‐Bigivai, u‐Rehumi, u‐Bahana. Inani lamadoda abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli:" 
Ezra2:3 Usapo luka‐Paroshe, ngamawaka mabini anekulu linye elinamashumi asixe̔nxe anesibini." 
Ezra2:4 Usapo luka‐Shefatiya, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi asixe̔nxe anesibini." 
Ezra2:5 Usapo luka‐Arahi, ngamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi asixe̔nxe anesihlanu." 
Ezra2:6 Usapo luka‐Pahati‐mowabi, olwosapo luka‐Yoshuwa n o‐Jowabi, ngamawaka mabini anamakulu asibozo aneshumi linesibini." 
Ezra2:7 Usapo luka‐Helami, liwaka linye elinamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu anesine." 
Ezra2:8 Usapo luka‐Zatu, ngamakulu alitoba anamashumi mane anesihlanu." 
Ezra2:9 Usapo luka‐Zakai, ngamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi matandatu." 
Ezra2:10 Usapo luka‐Bani, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mane anesibini." 
Ezra2:11 Usapo luka‐Bebai, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mabini anesitatu." 
Ezra2:12 Usapo luka‐Hazegadi, liwaka linye elinamakulu mabini anamashumi mabini anesibini." 
Ezra2:13 Usapo luka‐Adonikame, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi matandatu anesitandatu." 
Ezra2:14 Usapo luka‐Bigivai, ngamawaka mabini anamashumi mahlanu anesitandatu." 
Ezra2:15 Usapo luka‐Hadine, ngamakulu mane anamashumi mahlanu anesine." 
Ezra2:16 Usapo luka‐Atere, oluka‐Hezekiya, ngamashumi alitoba anesibozo." 
Ezra2:17 Usapo luka‐Betsai, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi mabini anesitatu." 
Ezra2:18 Usapo luka‐Yora, likulu linye elineshumi linesibini." 
Ezra2:19 Usapo luka‐Hashumi, ngamakulu mabini anamashumi mabini anesitatu." 
Ezra2:20 Usapo lwase‐Gibari, ngamashumi alitoba anesihlanu." 
Ezra2:21 Usapo lwase‐Beteleheme, likulu linye elinamashumi mabini anesitatu." 
Ezra2:22 Amadoda ase‐Netofati, ngamashumi mahlanu anesitandatu." 
Ezra2:23 Amadoda ase‐Hanatote, likulu linye elinamashumi mabini anesibozo." 
Ezra2:24 Usapo lwase‐Hazamaveti, ngamashumi mane anesibini." 
Ezra2:25 Usapo lwase‐Kiriyate‐yarime, n e‐Kefira, ne‐Berote, ngamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi mane anesitatu." 
Ezra2:26 Usapo lwase‐Rama ne‐Gaba, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mabini anesinye." 
Ezra2:27 Amadoda ase‐Mikimasi, likulu linye elinamashumi mabini anesibini." 
Ezra2:28 Amadoda ase‐Betele ne‐Hahai, ngamakulu mabini anamashumi mabini anesitatu." 
Ezra2:29 Usapo lwase‐Nebo, ngamashumi mahlanu anesibini." 
Ezra2:30 Usapo lwase‐Magebisha, likulu linye elinamashumi mahlanu anesitandatu." 
Ezra2:31 Usapo luka‐Helami wumbi, liwaka linye elinamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu anesine." 
Ezra2:32 Usapo luka‐Harime, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mabini." 
Ezra2:33 Usapo lwase‐Lodi, n e‐Hadidi, ne‐Ono, ngamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi mabini anesihlanu." 
Ezra2:34 Usapo lwase‐Jeriko, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi mane anesihlanu." 
Ezra2:35 Usapo lwase‐Senaha, ngamawaka matatu anamakulu matandatu anamashumi matatu." 
Ezra2:36 Abaperisite: usapo luka‐Yedaya, olwendla ka‐Yoshuwa, ngamakulu alitoba anamashumi asixe̔nxe anesitatu." 
Ezra2:37 Usapo luka‐Yimeri, liwaka linye elinamashumi mahlanu anesibini." 
Ezra2:38 Usapo luka‐Pashure, liwaka linye elinamakulu mabini anamashumi mane anesixe̔nxe." 
Ezra2:39 Usapo luka‐Harime, liwaka linye elineshumi linesixe̔nxe." 
Ezra2:40 Aba‐Levi: usapo luka‐Yoshuwa no‐Kadimele, olwosapo luka‐Hodaviya, ngamashumi asixe̔nxe anesine." 
Ezra2:41 Abaculi: usapo luka‐Safa, likulu linye elinamashumi mabini anesibozo." 
Ezra2:42 Usapo lwabalindimnyango: usapo luka‐Shalume, usapo luka‐Atere, usapo luka‐Talimone, usapo luka‐Hakube, usapo luka‐Hatita, usapo luka‐Shobai: olu lwonke, likulu linye elinamashumi matatu anetoba." 
Ezra2:43 Aba‐Netini: usapo luka‐Tsiha, usapo luka‐Hasufa, usapo luka‐Tabahoti," 
Ezra2:44 usapo luka‐Kerosi, usapo luka‐Siha, usapo luka‐Padoni," 
Ezra2:45 usapo luka‐Lebana, usapo luka‐Hagaba, usapo luka‐Hakube," 
Ezra2:46 usapo luka‐Hagabi, usapo luka‐Shalemai, usapo luka‐Hanane," 
Ezra2:47 usapo luka‐Gidele, usapo luka‐Gahari, usapo luka‐Rehaya," 
Ezra2:48 usapo luka‐Retsine, usapo luka‐Nekoda, usapo luka‐Gazame," 
Ezra2:49 usapo luka‐Huza, usapo luka‐Paseha, usapo luka‐Besai," 
Ezra2:50 usapo luka‐Asena, usapo luka‐Mehunime, usapo luka‐Nefusime," 
Ezra2:51 usapo luka‐Bakebuke, usapo luka‐Hakufa, usapo luka‐Harehure," 
Ezra2:52 usapo luka‐Batseluti, usapo luka‐Mehida, usapo luka‐Haresha," 
Ezra2:53 usapo luka‐Barekosi, usapo luka‐Sisera, usapo luka‐Tama," 
Ezra2:54 usapo luka‐Netsiha, usapo luka‐Hatifa." 
Ezra2:55 Usapo lwezicaka zika‐Solomone: usapo luka‐Sotai, usapo luka‐Soferete, usapo luka‐Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 usapo luka‐Yahala, usapo luka‐Darekone, usapo luka‐Gidele," 
Ezra2:57 usapo luka‐Shefatiya, usapo luka‐Hatili, usapo luka‐Pokerete‐tsebayime, usapo luka‐Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Bonke aba‐Netini, nosapo lwezicaka zika‐Solomone, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi alitoba anesibini." 
Ezra2:59 Kanjalo aba ngabanyukayo e‐Tele‐mela, nase e‐Tele‐haresha: u‐Kerube, u‐Adoni, u‐Yimeri: kodwa bakohlwa kuxela indlu yoyise yabo, nesizalwane sabo, ukuba bangabakwa‐Sirayeli na." 
Ezra2:60 Usapo luka‐Delaya, usapo luka‐Tobiya, usapo luka‐Nekoda, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mahlanu anesibini." 
Ezra2:61 Nakulo usapo lwabaperisite: onyana baka‐Habaya, onyana baka‐Kotse, onyana baka‐Barezilai, owazeka umfazi kwintombi zika‐Barezilai um‐Gileyadi, wabizwa ngegama lazo:" 
Ezra2:62 aba bafuna ukuba̔lelwa kwabo pakati kwababa̔lelweyo ngokuzalwa, kodwa abafunyanwa: ngako bashenxiswa kubo ubuperisite njengabanco̔lileyo." 
Ezra2:63 Yayisiti kubo inkosi enkulu, ukuba mabangatyi kwizinto ezingcwele kakulu, kude kusuke umperisite ene‐Urime ne‐Tumime." 
Ezra2:64 Yonke intlanganiso kwa kunye ibingamawaka amashumi mane enesibini anamakulu matatu anamashumi matandatu," 
Ezra2:65 ngapandle kwezicaka zabo nezicakakazi zabo, ezibe zingamawaka asixe̔nxe anamakulu matatu anamashumi matatu anesixe̔nxe: bebenabaculi nabaculikazi abangamakulu mabini kanjako." 
Ezra2:66 Amahashe abo ebengamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi matatu anesitandatu; amaqwaṙaṙa abo ebengamakulu mabini anamashumi mane anesihlanu; 
Ezra2:67 inkamela zabo bezingamakulu mane anamashumi matatu anesihlanu; amaqwaṙashe abo ebengamawaka matandatu anamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi mabini. 
Ezra2:68 Bati abazintloko zendlu zoyise inxenye, bakufika endlwini kayehova ese‐Yerusaleme, banikela indlu katixo ngokuvuma, ukuba imiswe endaweni yayo:" 
Ezra2:69 banika ngamandla abo endyetyeni yomsebenzi, idarike zegolide zaliwaka linye elinamashumi matandatu, nemina zesilivere zamawaka mahlanu, nengubo zabaperisite zalikulu linye." 
Ezra2:70 Bada abaperisite, naba‐Levi, nenxenye yabantu, nabaculi, nabalindimnyango, naba‐Netini, bahlala ezixekweni zakowabo; no‐Sirayeli bonke ezixekweni zabo." 
Ezra3:1 KWATI kwakufika inyanga yesixe̔nxe, nxa usapo luka‐Sirayeli belusezixekweni, bandula abantu bazihlanganisela e‐Yerusaleme njengomntu mnye." 
Ezra3:2 Waza wesuka u‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, nabazalwana bake abaperisite, no‐Zerubabeli unyana ka‐Shalatiyeli, nabazalwana bake, baye besaka isibingelo sotixo wo‐Sirayeli, kuze kunikelwe amadini okutshiswa pezu kwaso, njengokuba̔liweyo emtetweni ka‐Mosesi indoda katixo." 
Ezra3:3 Baza bamisa isibingelo pezu kwamasekelo aso; ngokuba ukwoyika bekupezu kwabo ngenxa yabantu balomazwe: banikela pezu kwaso amadini okutshiswa kuyehova, amadini okutshiswa okusa nawokuhlwa." 
Ezra3:4 Benza umtendeleko wamapempe kanjalo, njengokuba̔liweyo; namadini okutshiswa emihla ngemihla ngenani, njengalo isiko, into yemini ngemini yayo;" 
Ezra3:5 nasemva kwoko, idini lokutshiswa elifuti, nelenyanga ezitwasileyo, nelayo yonke imitendeleko emisiweyo kayehova ebingcwalisiwe, nelabo bonke abanikela ngokuvuma kuyehova umnikelo wesisa." 
Ezra3:6 Kwa kuwo owokuqala umhla wenyanga yesixe̔nxe, baqala ukunikela amadini okutshiswa kuyehova. Kodwa itempile kayehova ibingekasekwa." 
Ezra3:7 Kanjako banika imali kwincibi zamatye, nakwincibi zemiti; nokudla, nento yokusela, neoli, kwabase‐Tsidone, nakwabase‐Tire, ukuba basuse imiti yesedare e‐Lebanone bayise elwandle lwase‐Jopa, njengokuvunyelwa kwabo ngu‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya." 
Ezra3:8 Kekaloku ngowesibini umnyaka emva kwokufika kwabo endlwini katixo e‐Yerusaleme, ngenyanga yesibini, baqala u‐Zerubabeli unyana ka‐Shalatiyeli, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, nesisalela sabazalwana babo, abaperisite naba‐Levi, nabo bonke abebevele ekutinjweni ukuza e‐Yerusaleme; bamisela aba‐Levi, abaminyaka yebudala imashumi mabini napezulu, ukwongama umsebenzi wayo indlu kayehova." 
Ezra3:9 Kwandula ukusuka u‐Yoshuwa, onyana bake, nabazalwana bake, u‐Kadimele, nonyana bake, usapo luka‐Juda, kwa kunye, ukuba bongame abawenzayo umsebenzi endlwini katixo: onyana baka‐Henadade, onyana babo, nabazalwana babo, aba‐Levi." 
Ezra3:10 Kwati kwakusekwa itempile kayehova ngabaki, bamisa abaperisite, bevatisiwe, benamaxilongo, naba‐Levi, onyana baka‐Safa, benesimbali, ukuba bamdumise uyehova, ngesimiselo sika‐Davide ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli." 
Ezra3:11 Baza bahlabelelana ekumdumiseni nasekumbuleleni uyehova, besiti: Ngokuba elungile; ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade pezu kwo‐Sirayeli. Bati abantu bonke bamemeza ngesimemezo esikulu, ekumdumiseni uyehova, ngenxa yokusekwa kwayo indlu kayehova." 
Ezra3:12 Kodwa abaninzi kubo abaperisite, naba‐Levi, nabazintloko zendlu zoyise, abo badala, abebebonile indlu yokuqala, kwakusekwa le indlu pambi kwamehlo abo, balila ngelizwi elikulu; kanjalo abaninzi bapakamisa ilizwi ngokumemeza ngovuyo;" 
Ezra3:13 ukuba abantu bebengenakuqiqa ilizwi lesimemezo sovuyo, ngenxa yelizwi lokulila kwabantu: ngokuba abantu bamemeza ngesimemezo esikulu, yada intlokoma yavakala kwa kude." 
Ezra4:1 ZATI zakuva intshaba zo‐Juda no‐Benjamine, ukuba usapo lwasekutinjweni belusakela uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, itempile," 
Ezra4:2 zandula zasondela ku‐Zerubabeli, nakwabazintloko zendlu zoyise, zati kubo: Masake kunye nani; ngokuba sifuna utixo wenu, njengani; sasibingele yena kuselokwemihla ka‐Esare‐hadoni ukumkani we‐Asiriya, owasinyusela apa." 
Ezra4:3 Kodwa u‐Zerubabeli, no‐Yoshuwa, nabanye abazintloko zendlu zoyise zo‐Sirayeli, bati kuzo: Aninto kuti nina ukuba niyake indlu kutixo wetu; sesiya kwakela uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, tina sodwa, njengokuba esiyalele ukumkani u‐Koreshe, ukumkani we‐Peresiya." 
Ezra4:4 Bandula abantu belozwe banqenisa izandla zabantu bakwa‐Juda, babaxaka ekwakeni," 
Ezra4:5 baqesha ngakubo abacebisi, ukuba batshitshise iqinga labo, yonke imihla ka‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya, kwada kwabako ubukumkani buka‐Dariyusi ukumkani we‐Peresiya." 
Ezra4:6 Nasebukumkanini buka‐Hasheveroshe, ekuqaleni kwobukumkani bake, baba̔la isiba̔lo sokunceteza ngabemi bakwa‐Juda nabase‐Yerusaleme." 
Ezra4:7 Nasemihleni ka‐Aretashasheta kwaba̔la u‐Bishilame, u‐Mitredati, u‐Tabele, nabanye abalingane babo, kuye u‐Aretashasheta ukumkani we‐Peresiya; nokuba̔lwa kwencwadi, yaba̔lwa ngesi‐Siriya, yakunyushwa ngesi‐Siriya kanjalo." 
Ezra4:8 U‐Rehumi igosa lamapakati, no‐Shimshai umba̔li, baba̔la incwadi yokumangala i‐Yerusaleme, ku‐Aretashasheta ukumkani, ngokunje:" 
Ezra4:9 U‐Rehumi igosa lamapakati, no‐Shimshai umba̔li, nabanye abalingane babo, ama‐Dine, ama‐Afaresateki, ama‐Tarapele, ama‐Afaresa, ama‐Ereki, ama‐Babilone, ama‐Shushane, ama‐Dehavi, ama‐Helami," 
Ezra4:10 nezinye intlanga owazifudusayo u‐Asenapare omkulu odumileyo, wazihlalisa ezixekweni zase‐Samariya, nabanye banganeno kwomlambo, — nokunjalo." 
Ezra4:11 Isiba̔lo sencwadi bayituma kuye, ku‐Aretashasheta ukumkani, siso esi sokuti: Izicaka zako, amadoda anganeno kwomlambo, — nokunjalo." 
Ezra4:12 Makwazeke kukumkani, okokuba ama‐Juda abenyuke kuwe ukuza kuti afikile e‐Yerusaleme; isixeko esivukelayo esikohlakeleyo ayasaka, indonga azifezile, namasekwa awahlanganisile." 
Ezra4:13 Makwazeke kaloku kukumkani, ukuba, nxa esisixeko siya kwakiwa, na nxa indonga ziya kufezwa, akasayi kunika umnikelo, n okuqo̔la, nesitabataba, woti wena ude ubenzele okumkani ukwonakala." 
Ezra4:14 Kaloku ngenxa yokuba sidlile ityuwa yendlu yokumkani, nokuba kungafanelekile kuti ukubona ukubohliswa kwokumkani, ngako oko situmile sazisa ukumkani," 
Ezra4:15 ukuze kufunwe encwadini yezikumbuzelo zoyihlo bako: uya kwandul’ ukufumana kuloncwadi yezikumbuzelo, wazi, ukuba esisixeko sisixeko esivukelayo, esenzela okumkani namazwana ukwonakala, nokuba kwenziwe imvukelo pakati kwaso kwa kudala: kukona ke kwacitakaliswa esisixeko." 
Ezra4:16 Siyamazisa ukumkani tina, ukuba, nxa esisixeko siya kubuya sakiwe, na nxa indonga zaso ziya kufezwa, wosel’ uti ngelituba ke ungabi nandawo ngelicala lomlambo." 
Ezra4:17 Wandula ukumkani watuma impendulo kuye u‐Rehumi igosa lamapakati, no‐Shimshai umba̔li, nabanye abalingane babo abahlalayo e‐Samariya, nabanye bangapesheya kwomlambo, esiti: Uxolo, — nokunjalo." 
Ezra4:18 Leyoncwadi nayitumayo kuti ibileseshwa pambi kwam ekuhleni. 
Ezra4:19 Ndaza ndakupa umteto, kwafunwa ke, kwafunyanwa ukuba esisixeko kwa kudala sizipakamisile ngakubo okumkani, nokuba kwenziwe impambuko nemvukelo pakati kwaso." 
Ezra4:20 Kanjalo kwabekuko okumkani abanamandla pezu kwayo i‐Yerusaleme, abapata ubukosi pezu kwawo onke amazwe pesheya kwomlambo; kwaye kunikelwa kubo umnikelo, n okuqo̔la, nesitabataba." 
Ezra4:21 Kupani kaloku umteto wokuyekisa lamadoda, ukuba esisixeko singakiwa, lide ilizwi linikwe ndim." 
Ezra4:22 Lumkani ke ukuba ningalibali ukukwenza oku: kunganina ukuba sikule isenzakalo ukwenzela okumkani ukwonakala? 
Ezra4:23 Kwati kwakuba kuleseshiwe isiba̔lo sencwadi yokumkani u‐Aretashasheta pambi kwo‐Rehumi, no‐Shimshai umba̔li, nabalingane babo, basuka baya ngobunxamo e‐Yerusaleme kuma‐Juda, bawayekisa ngonyanzelo nangamandla." 
Ezra4:24 Kwandul’ ukupela umsebenzi wendlu katixo ese‐Yerusaleme: kwapela kwada kwakuwo owesibini umnyaka wobukumkani bake u‐Dariyusi ukumkani we‐Peresiya. 
Ezra5:1 BAZA abaprofite, u‐Hagai umprofite, no‐Zekariya unyana ka‐Hido, baprofitesha kuma‐Juda abekwa‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme, egameni lotixo wo‐Sirayeli, kwa kuwo wona." 
Ezra5:2 Oko kwesuka u‐Zerubabeli unyana ka‐Shalatiyeli, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, baqala ukuyaka indlu katixo ese‐Yerusaleme: kwabako nabo abaprofite bakatixo bebanceda." 
Ezra5:3 Ngeloxesha kweza kubo u‐Tatenai, inkosi yelicala lomlambo, no‐Shetari‐bozenai, nabalingane babo, batsho kubo ukuti: Ninikwe umteto ngubanina ukwaka indlu le nokufeza oludonga?" 
Ezra5:4 Sandula sabaxelela ngokunjalo, angobanina amagama awo amadoda asakayo esisakiwo." 
Ezra5:5 Kodwa iliso lotixo wabo libe lipezu kwabadala bama‐Juda, ukuba ababayekisa, kwada kwaya umcimbi lowo ku‐Dariyusi: bati oko bapendula ngencwadi ngale ndawo." 
Ezra5:6 Isiba̔lo sencwadi, leyo u‐Tatenai, inkosi yelicala lomlambo, no‐Shetari‐bozenai, nabalingane bake, ama‐Afareseki, abanganeno kwomlambo, bayituma ku‐Dariyusi ukumkani:" 
Ezra5:7 batama incwadi kuye, ekwaba̔lwa kuyo ngokuti: Ku‐Dariyusi ukumkani, malubeko uxolo lwonke." 
Ezra5:8 Makwazeke kukumkani, ukuba saya elizwaneni le‐Judeya, endlwini yake utixo omkulu, eyakiwa ngamatye amakulu, esel’ ifakiwe nemiti ezindongeni; kanjalo lomsebenzi uyenzwa ngokunxama, uhambiseka ezandleni zabo." 
Ezra5:9 Sandula sabuza abadala abo, satsho kubo ukuti: Ninikwe umteto ngubanina ukwaka indlu le, nokufeza ezindonga?" 
Ezra5:10 Sababuza namagama abo, ukuba sikwazise wena; ukuba siwaba̔le amagama amadoda azintloko zabo." 
Ezra5:11 Benje nje ukusipendula kwabo, besiti: Sizizicaka zake utixo wezulu nomhlaba, siyayaka leyondlu ibe yakiwe kuse kuyiminyaka mininzi, owati ukumkani omkulu wo‐Sirayeli wayaka wayifeza." 
Ezra5:12 Kuloko emvenikweni obawo betu bebemqumbisile utixo wezulu, wabanikela esandleni sika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, um‐Kaledine, owacita leyondlu, nabantu wabafudusela e‐Babilone." 
Ezra5:13 Kodwa ngowokuqala umnyaka ka‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Babilone, wanika umteto ukumkani u‐Koreshe, ukuba makwakiwe lendlu katixo." 
Ezra5:14 Kanjalo impahla zendlu katixo, ezegolide nezesilivere, ezo u‐Nebukanetsare wazikupa etempileni ebise‐Yerusaleme, wazizisa etempileni ese‐Babilone, kwa zona u‐Koreshe ukumkani wazikupa etempileni ese‐Babilone, zaza zanikelwa kogama lingu‐Sheshebatsare, lowo abemmisile inkosi;" 
Ezra5:15 wayesiti kuye: Tabata ezimpahla, uye uzise etempileni ese‐Yerusaleme; nendlu katixo mayakiwe endaweni yayo." 
Ezra5:16 Wandula wafika u‐Sheshebatsare lowo, wabeka amasekwa ayo indlu katixo ese‐Yerusaleme: ibisakiwa kuselokweloxesha kwada kwakaloku, kanti ayikagqitywanga." 
Ezra5:17 Ngako oko, ukuba kunga kulungile kukumkani, makufunwe endlwini yendyebo yokumkani, ese‐Babilone apo, ukuba kunjalo na okokuba kwanikwa umteto ngu‐Koreshe ukumkani, wokuba makwakiwe lendlu katixo e‐Yerusaleme; nentando yokumkani makayitume kuti ngale ndawo." 
Ezra6:1 Wandula u‐Dariyusi wanika umteto, kwafunwa ke endlwini yencwadi, apo kwabekelwa kona indyebo e‐Babilone." 
Ezra6:2 Kwaza kwafunyanwa e‐Akemeta, enqatyeni eselizwaneni le‐Medi, umqulu, okwaba̔lwa kuwo isikumbuzelo sokuti:" 
Ezra6:3 Ngowokuqala umnyaka ka‐Koreshe ukumkani, wanika umteto u‐Koreshe ukumkani ngayo indlu katixo e‐Yerusaleme, wokuti: Makwakiwe londlu, indawo apo kwabingwayo imibingo, namasekwa ayo makamiswe: maibe zikubite ezimashumi matandatu ubude bayo, n ekubite ezimashumi matandatu ububanzi bayo;" 
Ezra6:4 makube zinṙozo ezintatu zamatye amakulu, noṙozo lunye lwemiti emitsha: nenani iya kumelwa lilo malinikwe livela endlwini yokumkani:" 
Ezra6:5 kanjalo nempahla zendlu katixo, ezegolide nezesilivere, ezo u‐Nebukanetsare wazikupa etempileni ebise‐Yerusaleme, wazizisa e‐Babilone, mazibuyiswe, ziye etempileni ese‐Yerusaleme, ezindaweni zazo ngazinye, zibekelwe endlwini katixo." 
Ezra6:6 Kaloku, Tatenai, inkosi yapesheya kwomlambo, Shetari‐bozenai, nabalingane benu, ama‐Afareseki, abapesheya kwomlambo, yibani kude nalapo!" 
Ezra6:7 niyeke umsebenzi walendlu katixo: inkosi yama‐Juda nabadala bama‐Juda mabayake lendlu katixo endaweni yayo. 
Ezra6:8 Kanjako ndiwenzile umteto ngoko eniya kukwenza kubo abadala balama‐Juda, kuze kwakiwe lendlu katixo; ukuba makuhle kunikwe kulamadoda inani iya kumelwa lilo, kwimpahla yokumkani, eyomnikelo wapesheya kwomlambo, ukuze angatintelwa:" 
Ezra6:9 noko okufunekayo, kwa inkunzana zenkomo, nenkunzi zegusha, nemvana, zibe zezamadini okutshiswa kutixo wezulu, inqolowa, ityuwa, iveyine, neoli, ngengxelo yabaperisite abase‐Yerusaleme, makunikwe kuwo imini ngemini kungenakulityalwa:" 
Ezra6:10 ukuze anikele amavumba amnandi kuye utixo wezulu, atandazele ubomi bokumkani, nobonyana bake." 
Ezra6:11 Kanjalo ndiwenzile umteto, wokuba umntu osukuba eya kuliguqula elilizwi, maunyotulwe umti endlwini yake, umiswe ke, ati yena axo̔nywe pezu kwawo; nendlu yake mayenzwe imfumba yenkunkuma ngenxa yoku." 
Ezra6:12 Wanga utixo lowo ulenzileyo igama lake lihlale kona, angawisa pantsi bonke okumkani nabantu abaya kwolulela izandla zabo ukuyiguqula n okuyicita lendlu katixo ese‐Yerusaleme. Mna, Dariyusi, ndikupile umteto; makwenziwe ngawo ngokunxama ke." 
Ezra6:13 Oko u‐Tatenai, inkosi yelicala lomlambo, n o‐Shetari‐bozenai, nabalingane babo, kwa njengoko u‐Dariyusi abetumile ngako, benje njalo ngokunxama." 
Ezra6:14 Baza baka abadala bama‐Juda, bahambiseka, ngokuprofitesha kuka‐Hagai umprofite no‐Zekariya unyana ka‐Hido. Baka ke, bafeza, ngomteto katixo wo‐Sirayeli, nangomteto ka‐Koreshe, noka‐Dariyusi, noka‐Aretashasheta ukumkani we‐Peresiya." 
Ezra6:15 Yada yagqitywa indlu le ngowesitatu umhla wenyanga yo‐Adari; obungowesitatu umnyaka wona wobukumkani bake u‐Dariyusi ukumkani. 
Ezra6:16 Lwaza usapo luka‐Sirayeli, abaperisite, naba‐Levi, nabanye abalusapo lwasekutinjweni, lwenza ukutwasiswa kwalendlu katixo ngovuyo," 
Ezra6:17 lwanikela ekutwasisweni kwalendlu katixo inkomo ezilikulu linye, inkunzi zegusha ezimakulu mabini, imvana ezimakulu mane; nenkunzi zebokwe, zibe lidini lesono ngenxa yo‐Sirayeli bonke, ezilishumi linambini, ngenani lezizwe zo‐Sirayeli." 
Ezra6:18 Lwaza lwamisa abaperisite ngezahlukaniso zabo, naba‐Levi ngezahlulo zabo, pezu kwenkonzo katixo, ese‐Yerusaleme; njengokuba̔liweyo encwadini ka‐Mosesi." 
Ezra6:19 Kanjalo usapo lwasekutinjweni lwabamba ipasika, ngoweshumi linesine umhla wenyanga yokuqala." 
Ezra6:20 Ngokuba abaperisite naba‐Levi bebezicokisile kwa kunye, bonke bebecocekile, baxe̔la ipasika ngenxa yalo lwonke usapo lwasekutinjweni, nangenxa yabazalwana balo abaperisite nangenxa yabo bona." 
Ezra6:21 Lwaza lwatya usapo luka‐Sirayeli olube lubuyile ekutinjweni, nabo bonke abebezahlulele kulo ekunco̔leni kwabaheyideni belozwe, ukuba bamfune uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli," 
Ezra6:22 lwabamba umtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele imihla esixe̔nxe ngovuyo: ngokuba uyehova ebeluvuyisile, wayisonga intliziyo yokumkani we‐Asiriya ngakulo, kuze kwomelezwe izandla zalo emsebenzini wendlu katixo, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Ezra7:1 EMVENI kwezizinto, ebukumkanini buka‐Aretashasheta ukumkani we‐Peresiya, u‐Ezera, unyana ka‐Seraya, unyana ka‐Hazariya, unyana ka‐Hilikiya," 
Ezra7:2 unyana ka‐Shalume, unyana ka‐Tsadoki, unyana ka‐Ahitube," 
Ezra7:3 unyana ka‐Amariya, unyana ka‐Hazariya, unyana ka‐Merayoti," 
Ezra7:4 unyana ka‐Zerahiya, unyana ka‐Huzi, unyana ka‐Buki," 
Ezra7:5 unyana ka‐Abishuha, unyana ka‐Finehasi, unyana ka‐Elezari, unyana ka‐Arone umperisite omkulu:" 
Ezra7:6 u‐Ezera lo wenyuka e‐Babilone; waye yena engumba̔li okuteleyo emtetweni ka‐Mosesi, lowo wawunikayo uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli: wati ukumkani wampa sonke isikungo sake, njengokuba isandla sikayehova, utixo wake, sibe sipezu kwake." 
Ezra7:7 Kwenyuka naye inxenye kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nakubo abaperisite, naba‐Levi, nabaculi, nabalindimnyango, naba‐Netini, ukuya e‐Yerusaleme, ngowesixe̔nxe umnyaka ka‐Aretashasheta ukumkani." 
Ezra7:8 Wafika e‐Yerusaleme ngenyanga yesihlanu; ubungowesixenxe umnyaka wokumkani wona. 
Ezra7:9 Ngokuba ngowesinye umhla wenyanga yokuqala, bekuqalwa ukunyuka e‐Babilone, nangowesinye umhla wenyanga yesihlanu, wafika e‐Yerusaleme, njengokuba isandla esilungileyo sotixo wake sibe sipezu kwake." 
Ezra7:10 Ngokuba u‐Ezera ebebekisile intliziyo yake ukufuna umteto kayehova, nokuwenza, nokufundisa izimiselo nezigwebo kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Ezra7:11 Siso esi isiba̔lo sencwadi owati ukumkani u‐Aretashasheta wayinika ku‐Ezera umperisite, umba̔li; umba̔li wamazwi emiyalelo kayehova, nowezimiselo zake ko‐Sirayeli:" 
Ezra7:12 U‐Aretashasheta, kumkani kakumkani, kuye u‐Ezera umperisite, umba̔li womteto katixo wezulu, ofezekileyo ngokwazi, — nokunjalo." 
Ezra7:13 Ndiyenza umteto, wokuba bonke abavumayo ebukumkanini bam, kubo abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli, nabaperisite babo, naba‐Levi, ukuya e‐Yerusaleme, bahambe nawe." 
Ezra7:14 Ngokokuba ususiwe ebusweni bokumkani namapakati ake asixe̔nxe, ukuya kubuza ngo‐Juda nange‐Yerusaleme, ngawo umteto katixo wako osesandleni sako;" 
Ezra7:15 nokuyisa isilivere negolide, leyo ukumkani namapakati ake bayinikile ngokuvuma kuye utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ondawo yokuhlala ise‐Yerusaleme," 
Ezra7:16 nayo yonke isilivere negolide ongayifumanayo kulo lonke ilizwana le‐Babilone, kunye nomnikelo wesisa wabantu, nowabaperisite, abanikayo ngokuvuma ngenxa yendlu katixo wabo, ese‐Yerusaleme;" 
Ezra7:17 ukuze uhle utenge ngalemali, inkomo, n enkunzi zegusha, n emvana, neminikelo yokudla yazo, neminikelo yokusela yazo, uzinikele pezu kwaso isibingelo sendlu katixo wenu, ese‐Yerusaleme." 
Ezra7:18 Noko okunga kulungile kuwe, nakubo abazalwana bako, ukwenza ngesisalela sesilivere negolide, nikwenze njengentando katixo wenu." 
Ezra7:19 Nempahla uzinikiweyo ngenxa yenkonzo yendlu katixo wako, zibuyisele pambi kwake utixo we‐Yerusaleme." 
Ezra7:20 Nokukumbi ikusweleyo indlu katixo wako, okuya kuwa kuwe ukukunika, kupa kona endlwini yendyebo yokumkani." 
Ezra7:21 Nam, mna Aretashasheta ukumkani, ndiyanika umteto kubo bonke abagcinindyebo abapesheya kwomlambo, wokuba konke okuya kubizwa kuni ngu‐Ezera umperisite, umba̔li womteto wake utixo wezulu, makwenziwe kona kamsinyane," 
Ezra7:22 kude kube likulu letalente zesilivere, nekulu lekore zenqolowa, nekulu lebate zeveyine, nekulu lebate zeoli, netyuwa ingenakubaliswa." 
Ezra7:23 Konke okuxelwayo ngutixo wezulu, makwenzelwe indlu katixo wezulu ngokukutala: ngokuba kunganina ukuba kubeko umsindo ngakubo ubukumkani bokumkani nonyana bake?" 
Ezra7:24 Kanjalo siyanazisa nina, ukuba, bonke abaperisite naba‐Levi, abaculi, abalindimnyango, aba‐Netini, nabakonzi balendlu katixo, akuvunyelwa ukubeka pezu kwabo umnikelo, n okuqo̔la, nesitabataba." 
Ezra7:25 Nawe, Ezera! ngobulumko botixo wako, obusesandleni sako, misa amagosa nabagwebi, abangagwebayo bonke abantu abapesheya kwomlambo, bonke abayaziyo imiteto katixo wako; nabo bangayaziyo nibafundise." 
Ezra7:26 Nosukuba engayi kwenza ngomteto katixo wako, nangomteto wokumkani, makenzelwe ukugwetywa kamsinyane, nokuba kukokwokufa, nokuba kukokwokugxotwa, nokuba kukokwokuhlauliswa impahla, nokuba kukokwemibambo." 
Ezra7:27 Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wobawo betu, oyibekileyo into enje entliziyweni yokumkani, yokuba ayihombise indlu kayehova ese‐Yerusaleme;" 
Ezra7:28 notobeleyo pezu kwam ububele pambi kwokumkani namapakati ake, napambi kwazo zonke inkosi zokumkani ezinamandla! Ndaza ndazomeleza, njengokuba isandla sikayehova, utixo wam, sibe sipezu kwam, ndahlanganisa abazintloko ko‐Sirayeli, ukuba benyuke nam." 
Ezra8:1 Ngaba aba abazintloko zendlu zoyise zabo, nokuba̔lelwa kwabo ngokuzalwa, abanyukayo nam e‐Babilone, ebukumkanini buka‐Aretashasheta ukumkani." 
Ezra8:2 Kubo onyana baka‐Finehasi; u‐Gereshome: kubo onyana baka‐Yitamare; u‐Danyeli: kubo onyana baka‐Davide; u‐Hatushe: 
Ezra8:3 kubo onyana baka‐Shekaniya, kubo onyana baka‐Paroshe; u‐Zekariya: nakunye naye amadoda aba̔lelweyo ngokuzalwa alikulu linamashumi mahlanu." 
Ezra8:4 Kubo onyana baka‐Pahati‐mowabi: u‐Eliwenai unyana ka‐Zerahiya: nakunye naye amadoda angamakulu mabini. 
Ezra8:5 Kubo onyana baka‐Shekaniya; unyana ka‐Yahaziyeli: nakunye naye amadoda angamakulu matatu. 
Ezra8:6 Nakubo onyana baka‐Hadine; u‐Hebedi unyana ka‐Jonatane: nakunye naye amadoda angamashumi mahlanu. 
Ezra8:7 Nakubo onyana baka‐Helami; u‐Yesaya unyana ka‐Hataliya: nakunye naye amadoda angamashumi asixe̔nxe. 
Ezra8:8 Nakubo onyana baka‐Shefatiya; u‐Zebadiya unyana ka‐Mikaheli: nakunye naye amadoda angamashumi asibozo. 
Ezra8:9 Kubo onyana baka‐Jowabi; u‐Hobadiya unyana ka‐Yehili: nakunye naye amadoda angamakulu mabini aneshumi linesibozo. 
Ezra8:10 Nakubo onyana baka‐Shelomiti; unyana ka‐Yositiya: nakunye naye amadoda alikulu linamashumi matandatu. 
Ezra8:11 Nakubo onyana baka‐Bebai; u‐Zekariya unyana ka‐Bebai: nakunye naye amadoda angamashumi mabini anesibozo. 
Ezra8:12 Nakubo onyana baka‐Hazegadi; u‐Johanane unyana ka‐Hakatane: nakunye naye amadoda alikulu lineshumi. 
Ezra8:13 Nakubo abokupela onyana baka‐Adonikame, abamagama angala: u‐Elifelete, u‐Yeyeli, no‐Shemaya: nakunye nabo amadoda angamashumi matandatu." 
Ezra8:14 Nakubo onyana baka‐Bigivai; u‐Hutai no‐Zabude: nakunye nabo amadoda angamashumi asixe̔nxe. 
Ezra8:15 Ndaza ndabahlanganisela emlanjeni oya e‐Ahava; sazimisa intente kona imihla yamitatu: ndaza ndabona abantu, nabaperisite, kodwa andafumana kona namnye konyana baka‐Levi." 
Ezra8:16 Ndandula ndatumela u‐Eliyezeri, n o‐Ariyeli, n o‐Shemaya, no‐Elinatane, no‐Yaribe, no‐Elinatane, no‐Natane, no‐Zekariya, no‐Meshulame, abazintloko; no‐Yoyaribe, no‐Elinatane, abazingqondi." 
Ezra8:17 Ndabayalezela ku‐Hido, oyintloko endaweni eyi‐Kasifiya; ndabeka amazwi emilonyweni yabo, ukuba batete ku‐Hido, nakubo abazalwana bake aba‐Netini, endaweni eyi‐Kasifiya, ukuba bazise kuti abakonzi ngenxa yendlu katixo wetu." 
Ezra8:18 Bada bazisa kuti, njengokuba isandla esilungileyo sotixo wetu sibe sipezu kwetu, indoda eqondayo, eyakubo onyana baka‐Mahali, unyana ka‐Levi, unyana ka‐Sirayeli; no‐Sherebiya, nonyana bake, nabazalwana bake, ishumi elinesibozo;" 
Ezra8:19 no‐Hashabiya, nakunye naye u‐Yesaya, owakubo onyana baka‐Merari, n abazalwana bake, nonyana babo, amashumi mabini;" 
Ezra8:20 nabakubo aba‐Netini, abo u‐Davide nenkosi babanika ukukonza aba‐Levi, aba‐Netini abangamakulu mabini anamashumi mabini: bona bonke babalulwa ngamagama." 
Ezra8:21 Ndaza ndashumayela inzilo apo, emlanjeni we‐Ahava, ukuba sizibandezele ebusweni botixo wetu, sifune kuye indlela elungele tina, nentsapo zetu, nayo yonke impahla yetu." 
Ezra8:22 Ngokuba bendidanele ukucela kukumkani umkosi nabakweli bamahashe, ukuya kusinceda ngakuzo intshaba endleleni; ngokokuba sibe sitshilo kuye ukumkani, sisiti: Isandla sotixo wetu sipezu kwabo bonke abamfunayo kube kokulungileyo; kodwa amandla ake nomsindo wake upezu kwabo bonke abamshiyayo." 
Ezra8:23 Kwa njalo sazila ukutya, sabuza kutixo wetu ngenxa yoku; wayekungeleka kuti." 
Ezra8:24 Ndaza ndahlula ezinkosini zabaperisite ishumi elinababini, kwa u‐Sherebiya, n o‐Hashabiya, neshumi labazalwana babo kunye nabo," 
Ezra8:25 ndalinganisela kubo isilivere, negolide, nempahla, umnikelo wendlu katixo wetu, lowo ukumkani, namapakati ake, nenkosi zake, nabo bonke o‐Sirayeli abebeko, bawunikelayo:" 
Ezra8:26 ndalinganisela ke esandleni sabo italente zesilivere ezimakulu matandatu anamashumi mahlanu, nempahla zesilivere ezilikulu letalente, nekulu letalente zegolide:" 
Ezra8:27 nebekile zegolide ezimashumi mabini, ziliwaka ledarike; nempahla zobedu olukazimlayo oluhle ezimbini, zinqwenelekile njengegolide." 
Ezra8:28 Ndandisiti kubo: Nina niyingcwele kuyehova; impahla ziyingcwele nazo; kanjalo isilivere negolide zingumnikelo wesisa kuyehova, utixo woyihlo benu:" 
Ezra8:29 lindani, nizigcine, nide nizilinganise pambi kwenkosi zabaperisite, naba‐Levi, nenkosi zendlu zoyise zo‐Sirayeli, e‐Yerusaleme, ezinkambilini zendlu kayehova." 
Ezra8:30 Bandula abaperisite naba‐Levi batabata ukulinganiswa kwesilivere, negolide, nempahla, ukuba kuziswe e‐Yerusaleme, endlwini katixo wetu." 
Ezra8:31 Saza sanduluka emlanjeni we‐Ahava ngoweshumi linesibini umhla wenyanga yokuqala, ukuya e‐Yerusaleme: sati isandla sotixo wetu sapezu kwetu, wasisindisa esandleni sentshaba, nakwesabo ba si lalelayo endleleni." 
Ezra8:32 Sada safika e‐Yerusaleme, sahlala kona imihla yamitatu." 
Ezra8:33 Nangowesine umhla, kwalinganiswa isilivere, negolide, nempahla, endlwini katixo wetu, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Meremote unyana ka‐Huriya umperisite, ekunye naye u‐Elezari unyana ka‐Finehasi; kwaye kuko nabo u‐Yozabadi unyana ka‐Yoshuwa, no‐Nohadiya unyana ka‐Binuwi, aba‐Levi;" 
Ezra8:34 ngenani na ngokuba nzima kwezi zinto zonke: kwaba̔lwa konke ukulinganiswa kwazo ngeloxesha. 
Ezra8:35 Lwati usapo lwasekutinjweni, olo olube luvele ekutinjweni, lwanikela kuye utixo wo‐Sirayeli amadini okutshiswa, inkatyana ezilishumi linambini ngenxa yo‐Sirayeli bonke, n enkunzi zegusha ezimashumi alitoba anantandatu, nemvana ezimashumi asixe̔nxe anesixe̔nxe, n enkunzi zebokwe zedini lesono ezilishumi linambini: ezi zonke zalidini lokutshiswa kuyehova." 
Ezra8:36 Lwaza lwanika imiteto yokumkani kuzo inkosi ezinkulu zokumkani, nakuzo inkosi zelicala lomlambo: zati zona zanceda abantu, nendlu katixo." 
Ezra9:1 KEKALOKU kwakugqitywa ezizinto, zasondela kum inkosi, zisiti: Abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli, nabaperisite, naba‐Levi, abazahlulanga kubo abantu balamazwe; bayenza ngazo izinto ezibuntshontsho zabo, ezaba‐Kanane, ama‐Hete, ama‐Perizi, ama‐Yebusi, aba‐Hamoni, ama‐Mowabi, ama‐Jipete, naba‐Amori." 
Ezra9:2 Ngokuba bezekele bona nonyana babo abafazi kwintombi zabo: kukona inzalo eyingcwele idibanisene nabantu balamazwe: kanjalo isandla senkosi namagosa sisesokuqala kobubumenemene. 
Ezra9:3 Ndati ndakuva lendawo, ndaṙazula isivato sam nengubo yam, ndancotula inwele zentloko yam nezodevu lwam, ndahlala pantsi ndinokuti nqa." 
Ezra9:4 Kwandul’ ukubutela kum bonke abanokungcangcazela ngamazwi katixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngenxa yobumenemene babatinjwa: ndahlala pantsi ndinokuti nqa kwada kwa lixesha lomnikelo wokuhlwa." 
Ezra9:5 Kekaloku nge xesha lomnikelo wokuhlwa ndesuka ekuzibandezeleni kwam: ndati, nxa ndiṙazule isivato sam nengubo yam, ndaguqa ngamadolo am, ndatwabulula izandla zam ngakuye uyehova, utixo wam," 
Ezra9:6 ndati: Tixo wam! ndinentloni ndidanile ukuba ndipakamisele kuwe ubuso bam, Tixo wam! ngokuba inkohlakalo zetu zandele pezulu kwentloko zetu, netyala letu likulele emazulwini." 
Ezra9:7 Kuselokwemihla yobawo betu besisetyaleni elikulu kwada kwanamhla nje; nangenxa yenkohlakalo zetu sasinikelwa tina, n okumkani betu, n abaperisite betu, esandleni sokumkani bamazwe, esiṙeleni, nasekutinjweni, nasekupangweni, nasekudaneni kwobuso, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje." 
Ezra9:8 Kodwa kaloku ngexanyana elincinanana ufefe luvele kuyehova, utixo wetu, ukuba sishiyelwe abasindileyo, nokuba sinikwe isikonkwane endaweni yake eyingcwele, ukuze utixo wetu akanyise amehlo etu, asinike impiliso encinane ebukonzini betu." 
Ezra9:9 Ngokuba singabakonzi tina; kodwa ebukonzini betu utixo wetu akasishiyanga; utobele pezu kwetu ububele ebusweni bokumkani be‐Peresiya, ukuba asinike impiliso, siyipakamise indlu katixo wetu, sizimise ingcitakalo zayo, nokuba asinike utango kwa‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme." 
Ezra9:10 Sesiya kuti nina kaloku, Tixo wetu! emveni kwoku? ngokuba siyishiyile imiyalelo yako," 
Ezra9:11 leyo ubuyiyalela ngezicaka zako abaprofite, usiti: Ilizwe, eniya kulo ukulifuya, lilizwe elinco̔lileyo, ngokunco̔la kwabantu bamazwe, ngento ezibuntshontsho zabo, ekungazo balizalisile kwa kwenye incam kwada kwakwenye ngokunco̔la kwabo." 
Ezra9:12 Ngako kaloku, intombi zenu ningazendisi konyana babo, nentombi zabo ningazitabateli onyana benu, ningafuni uxolo lwabo nobutamsanqa babo kude kube ngunapakade: ukuze nomelele, nidle ubumnandi belizwe, nilishiye libe lilifa labantwana benu kude kube ngunapakade." 
Ezra9:13 Nasemva kwako konke okusihleleyo, ngenxa yezenzo zetu ezikohlakeleyo, nangenxa yetyala letu elikulu: noko wena. Tixo wetu! usohlwayile ngento engapantsi kwenkohlakalo yetu, wasinika ukusinda okungaka;" 
Ezra9:14 siya kubuya siyapule imiyalelo yako na, sitshatiselane nabantu bezizinto zibuntshontsho? akuyi kusiqumbela kude kugqityelwe na, kuze kungabiko isisalela nokusinda?" 
Ezra9:15 Yehova, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! ulungile wena; ngokuba sisele sisindile, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje: bona ke, sipambi kwako etyaleni letu; ngokuba singenakuma pambi kwako ngenxa yoku." 
Ezra10:1 Kekaloku xeshekweni ebetandazile u‐Ezera, naxeshekweni ebexele oku, elila eziwisa pantsi ngapambi kwayo indlu katixo, kwandul’ ukubutelana ngakuye ko‐Sirayeli intlanganiso enkulu kunene, amadoda, nabafazi, nabantwana: ngokuba abantu balila ngokulila okukulu." 
Ezra10:2 Waza wapendula u‐Shekaniya unyana ka‐Yehili, owonyana baka‐Helami, wati ku‐Ezera: Tina senze ngobumenemene ngakuye utixo wetu, sasizekile abafazi bezinye intlanga kubo abantu belizwe: kodwa kaloku liseko itemba ko‐Sirayeli ngalento." 
Ezra10:3 Ngako kaloku masenze ucebano notixo wetu, lwokuba kwahlukaniswe bonke abafazi abo, nabo bazelweyo ngabo, ngalo icebo lenkosi yam, nelabangcangcazelayo ngenxa yomyalelo katixo wetu; makwenziwe ke ngomteto." 
Ezra10:4 Suka wena, ngokuba ipezu kwako lento; kanjalo tina soba nawe; yomelela, wenze ke." 
Ezra10:5 Waza wesuka u‐Ezera, wafungisa inkosi zabaperisite, n aba‐Levi, no‐Sirayeli bonke, ukuba baya kwenza ngalo elilizwi. Bafunga ke." 
Ezra10:6 Wandula u‐Ezera wesuka kwa pambi kwayo indlu katixo, waya enkambilini ka‐Johanane unyana ka‐Eliyashibe: wati akufika kona, akasidla isonka, akawasela amanzi; ngokuba ebelilela ubumenemene babatinjwa." 
Ezra10:7 Kwaza kwadluliswa ilizwi kwa‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme, kulo lwonke usapo lwasekutinjweni, lokuba lubutele e‐Yerusaleme;" 
Ezra10:8 nokuba lowa mntu osukuba engezi pakati kwemihla mitatu, njengecebo lenkosi nabadala, kwodliwa yonke impahla yake, ati yena ahlulwe entlanganisweni yabatinjwa." 
Ezra10:9 Andula abutela e‐Yerusaleme onke amadoda akwa‐Juda nawakwa‐Benjamine pakati kwemihla mitatu. Ibiyinyanga yesitoba, ngowamashumi mabini umhla wenyanga; bati bonke abantu bahlala enkundleni yendlu katixo, bengcangcazela pezu kwalonto, nangenxa yezipango zemvula." 
Ezra10:10 Wasuka wema u‐Ezera umperisite, wati kubo: Nina nenze ngobumenemene, nanizekile abafazi bezinye intlanga, kuze kwandiswe ityala lo‐Sirayeli." 
Ezra10:11 Ngako kaloku yenzani ingxelo kuyehova, utixo woyihlo benu, nenze intando yake: nize nizahlule kubo abantu belizwe, nakubo abafazi bezinye intlanga." 
Ezra10:12 Yaza yapendula yonke intlanganiso yati ngelizwi elikulu: Kufanelekile kuti ukwenza ngamazwi ako: 
Ezra10:13 kodwa abantu baninzi, lixesha lezipango zemvula, akuko amandla okuma ngapandle; kananjalo lomsebenzi asingowemini nye, asingowemini mbini: ngokuba sigqitile ngento eninzi kulento." 
Ezra10:14 Mazime inkosi zetu zentlanganiso yonke, bandul’ ukuti bonke abazekileyo abafazi bezinye intlanga ezixekweni zakowetu beze ngamaxesha amiselweyo, nakunye nabo abadala besixeko ngesixeko nabagwebi baso, kude kunqandwe kuti ubushushu bengqumbo katixo wetu ngenxa yalento." 
Ezra10:15 Ngu‐Jonatane unyana ka‐Hasaheli, no‐Yahaziya unyana ka‐Tikeva, abamela oku kwapela: kodwa u‐Meshulame, no‐Shabetai um‐Levi, babanceda." 
Ezra10:16 Lwaye lusenje njalo usapo lwasekutinjweni. Kwaza kwahlulwa u‐Ezera umperisite, n abatile abazintloko zendlu zoyise, ngendlu zoyise zabo, bonke bebalulwe ngamagama, abahlala pantsi ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga leshumi ukuba kubuzwe lendawo." 
Ezra10:17 Bagqiba ngawo onke amadoda abebezekile abafazi bezinye intlanga ngowesinye umhla wenyanga yokuqala. 
Ezra10:18 Kwafunyanwa kubo onyana babaperisite abebezekile abafazi bezinye intlanga: kubo onyana baka‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, nabazalwana bake; u‐Mahaseya, no‐Eliyezeri, no‐Yaribe, no‐Gedaliya." 
Ezra10:19 Baza banika izandla zabo ukuba bahlukane nabafazi babo; bati benetyala nje, banikela inkunzi yegusha yasemhlambini ngenxa yetyala labo." 
Ezra10:20 Nakubo onyana baka‐Yimeri; u‐Hanani, no‐Zebadiya." 
Ezra10:21 Nakubo onyana baka‐Harime; u‐Mahaseya, no‐Elija, no‐Shemaya, no‐Yehili, no‐Huziya." 
Ezra10:22 Nakubo onyana baka‐Pashure; u‐Eliwenai, u‐Mahaseya, u‐Shimayeli, u‐Netaneli, u‐Yozabadi, no‐Elehasa." 
Ezra10:23 Nakubo aba‐Levi; u‐Yozabadi, no‐Shimehi, no‐Kelaya, okwa nguye u‐Kelita, n o‐Petahiya, n o‐Juda, no‐Eliyezeri." 
Ezra10:24 Nakubo abaculi; u‐Eliyashibe: nakubo abalindimnyango; u‐Shalume, no‐Teleme, no‐Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Nakubo o‐Sirayeli: kubo onyana baka‐Paroshe; u‐Ramiya, no‐Yiziha, no‐Malekiya, no‐Miyamine, no‐Elezari, no‐Malekiya, no‐Benaya." 
Ezra10:26 Nakubo onyana baka‐Helami; u‐Mataniya, u‐Zekariya, u‐Yehili, no‐Habedi, no‐Jeremote, no‐Elija." 
Ezra10:27 Nakubo onyana baka‐Zatu; u‐Eliwenai, u‐Eliyashibe, u‐Mataniya, u‐Jeremote, no‐Zabadi, no‐Haziza." 
Ezra10:28 Nakubo onyana baka‐Bebai; u‐Jehohanane, u‐Hananiya, u‐Zabai, n o‐Hatelai." 
Ezra10:29 Yakubo onyana baka‐Bani; u‐Meshulame, u‐Maluke, no‐Hadaya, u‐Yashube, no‐Shali, no‐Ramote." 
Ezra10:30 Nakubo onyana baka‐Pahati‐mowabi; u‐Hadena, no‐Kelali, u‐Benaya, u‐Mahaseya, u‐Mataniya, u‐Betsalele, no‐Binuwi, no‐Manase." 
Ezra10:31 Na ku bo onyana baka‐Harime; u‐Eliyezeri, u‐Yishiya, u‐Malekiya, u‐Shemaya, u‐Simone," 
Ezra10:32 u‐Benjamine, u‐Maluke, n o‐Shemariya." 
Ezra10:33 Na kubo onyana baka‐Hashume: u‐Matenai, u‐Matata, u‐Zabadi, u‐Elifelete, u‐Yeremai, u‐Manase, n o‐Shimehi." 
Ezra10:34 Na kubo onyana baka‐Bani; u‐Mahadai, u‐Hamerame, no‐Weli," 
Ezra10:35 u‐Benaya, u‐Bedeya, u‐Keluhi," 
Ezra10:36 u‐Vaniya, u‐Meremote, u‐Eliyashibe," 
Ezra10:37 u‐Mataniya, u‐Matenai, no‐Yahasau," 
Ezra10:38 no‐Bani, no‐Binuwi, u‐Shimehi," 
Ezra10:39 no‐Shelemiya, no‐Natane, no‐Hadaya," 
Ezra10:40 u‐Makenadebai, u‐Shashai, u‐Sharai," 
Ezra10:41 u‐Hazareli, no‐Shelemiya, u‐Shemariya," 
Ezra10:42 u‐Shalume, u‐Amariya, n o‐Josefe." 
Ezra10:43 Na kubo onyana baka‐Nebo; u‐Yeyeli, u‐Matitiya, u‐Zabadi, u‐Zebina, u‐Yadau, no‐Joweli, n o‐Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Aba bonke bebezekile abafazi bezinye intlanga: kwaye kuko pakati kwabo abanabafazi abebezalelwe abantwana ngabo. 
Nehemiah1:1 AMAZWI ka‐Nehemiya unyana ka‐Hakaliya. Kwaye kute ngenyanga yo‐Kisilevu, ngomnyaka wamashumi mabini, nxa bendiko e‐Shushane kwomkulu," 
Nehemiah1:2 kwafika u‐Hanani, omnye kubazalwana bam, yena namadoda atile akwa‐Juda; ndaza ndababuza ngama‐Juda abesindile, lawo abesele kubatinjwa, nange‐Yerusaleme." 
Nehemiah1:3 Baye besiti kum: Abaseleyo, abo basele kubatinjwa kona elizwaneni, baselishweni elikulu nasekudelekeni: kanjalo udonga lwe‐Yerusaleme lucitiwe, namasango ayo atshisiwe ngomlilo."
