Nehemiah1:4 Kwaza kwati, ndakuva lamazwi, ndahlala pantsi, ndalila, ndalusizi imihla etile, ndazila ukutya, ndatandaza pambi kwotixo wezulu," 
Nehemiah1:5 ndati: Ndiyakukunga, Yehova, Tixo wezulu, utixo omkulu owoyikekayo, obagcinela ucebano nobubele abamtandayo nabayigcinayo imiyalelo yake!" 
Nehemiah1:6 maike indlebe yako ipulapuleke, namehlo ako avuleke, ukuba uyive intandazo yesicaka sako, endiyitandazayo ebusweni bako namhla, imini nobusuku, ngenxa yosapo luka‐Sirayeli izicaka zako, ndizixela izono zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, esonileyo ngakuwe ngazo: sonile nati, mna nendlu kabawo." 
Nehemiah1:7 Senzile ngokwonakeleyo kakulu ngakuwe, singagcinanga imiyalelo, nezimiselo, nezigwebo, obumyalela u‐Mosesi isicaka sako ngazo." 
Nehemiah1:8 Kumbula ke ilizwi owamyalelayo u‐Mosesi isicaka sako, usiti: Nxa nisenza ngobumenemene, ndoniti sa pakati kwentlanga;" 
Nehemiah1:9 Kodwa nxa niguqukela kum, nigcine imiyalelo yam, niyenze, ukuba kwobako abagxotiweyo benu esipelweni sezulu, ndobabuta kwa lapo, ndibazise kulondawo ndiyinyulileyo ukuba ndimise igama lam kona." 
Nehemiah1:10 Kekaloku aba bazizicaka zako nabantu bako, abo ubakululeyo ngamandla ako amakulu, nangesandla sako esomeleleyo." 
Nehemiah1:11 Ndiyakukunga, Nkosi! maike indlebe yako ipulapuleke kuyo intandazo yesicaka sako, nakuyo intandazo yezicaka zako, ezinqwenayo ukwoyika igama lako: uke usitamsanqelekise isicaka sako namhla, usinike ububele ebusweni balendoda. Ngokuba bendingumncamli kukumkani." 
Nehemiah2:1 KWAYE kute ngenyanga yo‐Nisane, ngowamashumi mabini umnyaka ka‐Aretashasheta ukumkani, iveyine ibipambi kwake: ndaza ndatabata iveyine leyo, ndanika kukumkani. Kekaloku bendifudula ndingabi lusizi ebusweni bake." 
Nehemiah2:2 Ngako wati kum ukumkani: Kunganina ukuba ubuso bako bulusizi, ungenasifo nje? lento ilusizi lwentliziyo kupela. Ndaza ndoyika kakulu kunene," 
Nehemiah2:3 ndati kuye ukumkani: Makapile ukumkani kude kube ngunapakade! kunganina ukuba ubuso bam bungabi lusizi, oko isixeko, indawo yamancw̔aba obawo, sicitakele, namasango aso agqityelwe ngumlilo?" 
Nehemiah2:4 Wayesiti ukumkani kum: Yinto nina uyifunayo? Ndandul’ ukutandaza kuye utixo wezulu. 
Nehemiah2:5 Ndandisiti kukumkani: Ukuba kunga kulungile kukumkani, nokuba isicaka sako sifumene ufefe ebusweni bako, ndinga ungandituma ukuya kwa‐Juda, esixekweni samancw̔aba obawo, ukuze ndisake." 
Nehemiah2:6 Waza ukumkani wati kum, (ukumkanikazi ehleli ngakuye:) Ihambo yako yoba yeyexesha elingakananina? wobuya ninina? Kwada kwanga kulungile kukumkani ukundituma: ndaza ndammisela umzuzu." 
Nehemiah2:7 Ndalekela ndati kukumkani: Ukuba kunga kulungile kukumkani, mandipiwe incwadi kwinkosi ezipesheya kwomlambo, zokuba zindidlulise ndide ndifike kwa‐Juda;" 
Nehemiah2:8 nencwadi ku‐Safa umgcini wehlati lokumkani, yokuba andipe imiti yokuhlanganisa amasango enqaba engakuyo indlu, neyodonga lwesixeko, neyendlu endiya kungena kuyo. Ndapiwa ke ngukumkani, njengokuba isandla esilungileyo sotixo wam sibe sipezu kwam." 
Nehemiah2:9 Ndandula ndeza kuzo inkosi ezipesheya kwomlambo, ndazinika incwadi zokumkani. Waye ukumkani ebetumile kunye nam inkosi zempi nabakweli bamahashe." 
Nehemiah2:10 Kwati kwakuviwa ngu‐Sanebalati um‐Horonayime, no‐Tobiya isicaka, um‐Hamoni, kwabuhlungu kubo ngobuhlungu obukulu ukuba bekufikile umntu ukuza kufuna ubutamsanqa bosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Nehemiah2:11 Ndada ndatika e‐Yerusaleme, ndabendiko kona intsuku zantatu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Ndaza ndesuka ebusuku, mna namadoda angemaninzi kunye nam; kodwa andaxelela mntu into utixo wam abeyingenisile entliziyweni yam ukuyenza e‐Yerusaleme; kanjalo akwabiko nam nasilo, kupela esosilo ndakwela kuso." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ndapuma ke ebusuku ndaya ngesango lesihlambo, nangapambi kwomtombo wenamba, nasesangweni lenkunkuma, ndabonela indonga ze‐Yerusaleme, ezibe zicitiwe, namasango ayo abegqityelwe ngumlilo." 
Nehemiah2:14 Ndadlula ndaya esangweni lomtombo, nasecibini lokumkani: kodwa akwabiko ndawo yokuba sidlule isilo esipantsi kwam." 
Nehemiah2:15 Ndaza ndenyuka ebusuku ndaya ngasemlanjaneni, ndabonela udonga, ndabuya, ndangena ngesango lesihlambo, ndabuyelela ke." 
Nehemiah2:16 Kekaloku amagosa akazi apo bendiye kona, nento ndayenzayo; kanjako bendingaxelelanga ama‐Juda, nabaperisite, nemiduna, namagosa, nabanye abawenzayo umsebenzi, kwada kwakaloku." 
Nehemiah2:17 Ndaza ndati kubo: Niyabona ilishwa esikulo tina, lokuba i‐Yerusaleme icitakele, nokuba amasango ayo atshisiwe ngomlilo; yizani, masake udonga lwe‐Yerusaleme, ukuze singabi sesisigxekwa." 
Nehemiah2:18 Ndaza ndabashumayeza isandla sotixo wam esibe silungile pezu kwam; kwa namazwi kakumkani abewatetile kum. Bati ke: Masisuke sake. Baza bazomelezela lomsebenzi olungileyo izandla zabo. 
Nehemiah2:19 Kodwa kwakuviwa ngu‐Sanebalati um‐Horonayime, no‐Tobiya isicaka, um‐Hamoni, no‐Gesheme um‐Arabi, bahlekisa ngati, basidela, bati: Yinto nina le niyenzayo? niya kuvukelana nokumkani nje na?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Ndaza ndabapendula, ndati kubo: Utixo wezulu, nguye oya kusitamsanqelekisa; ngako tina, izicaka zake, siya kusuka sake: kodwa nina aninasabiwo, nagunya, nasikumbuzelo, e‐Yerusaleme." 
Nehemiah3:1 KWANDULA kwesuka u‐Eliyashibe umperisite omkulu, nabazalwana bake abaperisite, balaka isango legusha; balenza ngcwele, bamisa ingcango zalo; baye belenza ngcwele kwada kwakuyo inqaba ye‐Meha, kwada kwakuyo inqaba ye‐Hananele." 
Nehemiah3:2 Nakufupi naye kwaka amadoda ase‐Jeriko. Nakufupi nawo kwaka u‐Zakure unyana ka‐Yimri. 
Nehemiah3:3 Nesango lentlanzi lwalaka usapo lwase‐Senaha; lwalihlanganisa, lwamisa ingcango zalo, n ezitshixelo zalo, nemivalo yalo." 
Nehemiah3:4 Nakufupi nalo kwalungiswa ngu‐Meremote, unyana ka‐Huriya, unyana ka‐Kotse. Nakufupi nabo kwalungiswa ngu‐Meshulame, unyana ka‐Berekiya, unyana ka‐Meshezabele. Nakufupi nabo kwalungiswa ngu‐Tsadoki, unyana ka‐Bahana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Nakufupi nabo kwalungiswa ngaba‐Tekoha; kodwa imiduna yabo ayangenisa intamo zayo emsebenzini wenkosi yayo. 
Nehemiah3:6 Nesango elidala balilungisa u‐Yoyada unyana ka‐Paseha, no‐Meshulame unyana ka‐Besodiya; balihlanganisa, bamisa ingcango zalo, nezitshixelo zalo, nemivalo yalo." 
Nehemiah3:7 Nakufupi nabo kwalungiswa ngu‐Melatiya um‐Gibeyone, no‐Yadoni um‐Meronote, n amadoda ase‐Gibeyone, nawase‐Mitsipa, kwada kwakuyo iterone yenkosi yelicala lomlambo." 
Nehemiah3:8 Kufupi naye kwalungiswa ngu‐Huziyeli unyana ka‐Harehaya, owencibi zegolide. Nakufupi naye kwalungiswa ngu‐Hananiya unyana wo wabenzi bezimnandi; bayinqabisa i‐Yerusaleme kwada kwaseludongeni olubanzi." 
Nehemiah3:9 Nakufupi nabo kwalungiswa ngu‐Refaya unyana ka‐Hure, inkosi yesiqingata sesahlulo sase‐Yerusaleme." 
Nehemiah3:10 Nakufupi nabo kwalungiswa ngu‐Yedaya unyana ka‐Harumafi, kwa malungana nendlu yake. Nakufupi naye kwalungiswa ngu‐Hatushe unyana ka‐Hashabiniya." 
Nehemiah3:11 Enye indawana elinganisiweyo, nenqaba yamaziko, wazilungisa u‐Malekiya unyana ka‐Harime, no‐Hashube unyana ka‐Pahati‐mowabi." 
Nehemiah3:12 Nakufupi naye walungisa u‐Shalume unyana ka‐Haloheshe, inkosi y esinye isiqingata sesahlulo sase‐Yerusaleme, yena nentombi zake." 
Nehemiah3:13 Isango lesihlambo walilungisa u‐Hanune, nabemi base‐Zanoha; balaka, bazimisa ingcango zalo, n ezitshixelo zalo, nemivalo yalo, newaka lekubite zodonga kwada kwakulo isango lenkunkuma." 
Nehemiah3:14 Nesango lenkunkuma walilungisa u‐Malekiya unyana ka‐Rekabe, inkosi yesahlulo sase‐Bete‐kereme; walaka, wazimisa ingcango zalo, n ezitshixelo zalo, nemivalo yalo." 
Nehemiah3:15 Nesango lomtombo walilungisa u‐Shalune unyana ka‐Kole‐hoze, inkosi yesahlulo sase‐Mitsipa; walaka, waligubungela, wazimisa ingcango zalo, n ezitshixelo zalo, nemivalo yalo; walungisa nodonga lwecibi le‐Siloha ngasentsimini yokumkani, nakude kwakuzo izinyukelo ezihlayo esixekweni sika‐Davide." 
Nehemiah3:16 Emva kwake kwalungiswa ngu‐Nehemiya unyana ka‐Hazebuke, inkosi yesiqingata sesahlulo sase‐Bete‐tsure, kwada kwamalungana namancw̔aba ka‐Davide, nakude kwakulo icibi elibe lenziwe, nakude kwakuyo indlu yamagoṙa." 
Nehemiah3:17 Emva kwake kwalungisa aba‐Levi, u‐Rehumi unyana ka‐Bani. Kufupi naye kwalungiswa ngu‐Hashabiya, inkosi yesiqingata sesahlulo sase‐Kehila, esahlulweni sake." 
Nehemiah3:18 Emva kwake kwalungisa abazalwana babo, u‐Bavai unyana ka‐Henadade, inkosi y esinye isiqingata sesahlulo sase‐Kehila." 
Nehemiah3:19 Nakufupi naye walungisa u‐Hezere unyana ka‐Yoshuwa, inkosi ye‐Mitsipa, enye indawana elinganisiweyo, malungana nendawo enyukayo ngasendlwini yezixo̔bo, ekujikeni kwodonga." 
Nehemiah3:20 Emva kwake wanyameka ukulungisa u‐Baruke unyana ka‐Zabai enye indawana elinganisiweyo, kwa sekujikeni kwodonga kwada kwaselucangweni lwendlu ka‐Eliyashibe umperisite omkulu." 
Nehemiah3:21 Emva kwake kwalungisa u‐Meremote, unyana ka‐Huriya, unyana ka‐Kotse, enye indawana elinganisiweyo, kwa selucangweni lwendlu ka‐Eliyashibe kwada kwasencameni yendlu ka‐Eliyashibe." 
Nehemiah3:22 Nasemva kwake kwalungisa abaperisite, amadoda asetafeni." 
Nehemiah3:23 Emva kwake kwalungisa u‐Benjamine no‐Hashube malungana nendlu yabo. Emva kwake kwalungiswa ngu‐Hazariya, unyana ka‐Mahaseya, unyana ka‐Hananiya, ngasendlwini yake." 
Nehemiah3:24 Emva kwake kwalungisa u‐Binuwi unyana ka‐Henadade enye indawana elinganisiweyo, kwa sendlwini ka‐Hazariya kwada kwasekujikeni kwodonga, nakude kwakulo igumbi." 
Nehemiah3:25 U‐Palale unyana ka‐Uzai walungisa malungana nokujika kwodonga, nenqaba epuma ngapandle kwendlu ende yokumkani, ebikufupi nenkundla yentolongo. Emva kwake kwalungisa u‐Pedaya unyana ka‐Paroshe." 
Nehemiah3:26 Kanjalo aba‐Netini, a bebehlala e‐Hofeli, balungisa kwada kwamalungana nesango lamanzi ngasempumalanga, nenqaba epumayo." 
Nehemiah3:27 Emva kwabo kwalungisa aba‐Tekoha enye indawana elinganisiweyo, malungana nenqaba enkulu epumayo, kwada kwaseludongeni lwe‐Hofeli." 
Nehemiah3:28 Entla kwesango lamahashe kwalungisa abaperisite, abanye ngabanye malungana nezindlu zabo." 
Nehemiah3:29 Emva kwabo kwalungisa u‐Tsadoki unyana ka‐Yimeri malungana nendlu yake. Nasemva kwake kwalungiswa ngu‐Shemaya unyana ka‐Shekaniya, umgcini wesango lasempumalanga." 
Nehemiah3:30 Emva kwake kwalungisa u‐Hananiya unyana ka‐Shelemiya, no‐Hanune owesitandatu unyana ka‐Tsalafe, enye indawana elinganisiweyo. Emva kwake kwalungisa u‐Meshulame unyana ka‐Berekiya malungana nenkambili yake." 
Nehemiah3:31 Emva kwake kwalungiswa ngu‐Malekiya unyana wencibi yegolide, kwada kwakuyo indawo yaba‐Netini, neyabatengi, malungana nesango le‐Mifekade, nakude kwakuyo inkambili yapezulu yegumbi." 
Nehemiah3:32 Napakati kwenkambili yapezulu yegumbi nesango legusha, kwalungisa incibi zegolide nabatengi." 
Nehemiah4:1 KWAYE kute, kwakuviwa ngu‐Sanebalati ukuba siyaka udonga, kwavuta umsindo wake, waqumba kakulu; waza wahlekisa ngama‐Juda," 
Nehemiah4:2 wateta ebusweni babazalwana bake nempi yase‐Samariya, wati: Yinto nina ayenzayo lama‐Juda abutataka? onqabisa ngokwawo na? owenza amadini na? ogqiba emhleni mnye na? opilisa amatye ezimfumbeni zenkunkuma na, noko zitshisiweyo?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Kekaloku u‐Tobiya um‐Hamoni ebengakuye, wati: Kwa oko akwakayo, ukuba kwonyuka impungutye, yosel’ icita udonga lwamatye lwawo." 
Nehemiah4:4 Yiva, Tixo wetu! ngokuba sidelwayo; uze ubuyise ukugxeka kwabo pezu kweyabo intloko, ubanikele ekupangweni elizweni lokutinjwa:" 
Nehemiah4:5 ungaseleli ityala labo; nesono sabo masingacinywa pambi kwako: ngokuba be ku qumbisile, bemela abaki." 
Nehemiah4:6 Saza salwaka udonga; kwaye kubandakanywa udonga lwonke kwada kwasisiqingata sobude balo: ngokuba abantu bebenentliziyo yokusebenza. 
Nehemiah4:7 Kwaye kute, kwakuviwa ngu‐Sanebalati, no‐Tobiya, nama‐Arabi, naba‐Hamoni, nama‐Ashedode, ukuba kwahanjiswa ukulungiswa kwendonga ze‐Yerusaleme, n okuba intanda zaqala ukuvingcwa, kwandul’ ukuvuta umsindo wabo kakulu," 
Nehemiah4:8 bacebana bonke kwa kunye ukuza ukulwa ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, nokuyixaka." 
Nehemiah4:9 Kodwa satandaza kutixo wetu, samisa abalindi ngakubo, imini nobusuku, ngenxa yabo." 
Nehemiah4:10 Baza bati o‐Juda: Amandla abatwali bemitwalo ayapela, kanti inkunkuma iseninzi; kukona sikohlwayo kulwaka udonga." 
Nehemiah4:11 Zaye zisiti intshaba zetu: Abayi kwazi, abayi kubona kanjako, side singene pakati kwabo, sibabulale, siwupelise umsebenzi." 
Nehemiah4:12 Kwaye kute, kwakufika ama‐Juda abehlala ngakuzo, ati kuti ishumi lamaxesha: Zovela kuzo zonke indawo eningabuyelayo kuti ngazo, ziniṙaule." 
Nehemiah4:13 Ngako ndamisa ezindaweni zasezantsi ngasemva kwodonga, kwezitshileyo, ndamisa abantu, ngezizalwane zabo, beneziṙele zabo, n entshuntshe zabo, nezipeta zabo." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ndaza ndakangela, ndesuka, ndati kwimiduna, nakumagosa, nakwabanye abantu: Ningazoyiki; kumbulani inkosi, leyo inkulu eyoyikekayo, nibalwele abazalwana benu, n onyana benu, nentombi zenu, n abafazi benu, nezindlu zenu." 
Nehemiah4:15 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni bezivile intshaha zetu ukuba kwaziwe siti, nokuba utixo utshitshisile icebo lazo, sasesisiti tina sonke sabuyela eludongeni, abanye ngabanye besiya emsebenzini wabo." 
Nehemiah4:16 Kwaza kwati emva kweloxesha, esinye isiqingata sezicaka zam zasebenza emsebenzini, nesinye isiqingata sazo zabamba intshuntshe, n amakaka, nezipeta, nehempe zentsimbi: kanjalo inkosi bezisemva kwayo yonke indlu ka‐Juda." 
Nehemiah4:17 Abo bakayo eludongeni, nabo batwala imitwalo, n abatwesayo, ngesinye isandla sabo basebenza, nangesinye babamba isikali, abanye ngabanye:" 
Nehemiah4:18 ngokuba abaki, bonke ngabanye bebenamaṙele abo ebinqiwe ezinqeni zabo, baka ke. Kodwa lowo owavutelayo ngexilongo ebengakum." 
Nehemiah4:19 Ndati ke kwimiduna, nakumagosa, nakwabanye abantu: Umsebenzi umkulu, ubanzi; kanti tina sahlukene pezu kwodonga, omnye ekude nomnye:" 
Nehemiah4:20 kulondawo apo niyivayo intlokoma yexilongo, butelani kona kuti; utixo wetu wosilwela." 
Nehemiah4:21 Saza sasebenza emsebenzini; bati esinye isiqingata sabo babamba intshuntshe kwa sekupumeni kwokusa kwada kwasekuveleni kwenkwenkwezi. 
Nehemiah4:22 Kanjalo ngeloxesha ndati ebantwini: Mabalalise bonke nezicaka zabo pakati kwe‐Yerusaleme, ukuze babe ngabalindi kuti ebusuku, bati emini basebenze." 
Nehemiah4:23 Saye singasusi izivato zetu, kwa mna, nabazalwana bam, nezicaka zam, nabalindi abandilandelayo; bonke baya nezikali zabo emanzini." 
Nehemiah5:1 KWAZA kwabako isikalo esikulu sabantu nabafazi babo, ngakubo abazalwana babo ama‐Juda." 
Nehemiah5:2 Ngokuba bekuko abati: Tina, onyana betu, nentombi zetu, sibaninzi; ngako sitengile inqolowa, ukuba sidle, sipile nokupila." 
Nehemiah5:3 Kwabako nabati: Amasimi etu, nezitiya zetu zemiti yeveyine, nezindlu zetu, sibambisile ngazo, ukuba sitenge inqolowa ngenxa yendlala." 
Nehemiah5:4 Kwabako nabati: Sibolekile imali ibe yeyomnikelo wokumkani, sibambisile nje ng amasimi etu nezitiya zetu zemiti yeveyine." 
Nehemiah5:5 Kodwa kaloku inyama yetu injengenyama yabazalwana betu, n abantwana betu banjengabantwana babo: kanjako, bona ke, siyakonzisa onyana betu nentombi zetu babe ngamakoboka; ewe, sezikonzisiwe intombi zetu inxenye, kungeko nto emandleni ezandla zetu; ngokuba abanye abantu benamasimi etu nezitiya zetu zemiti yeveyine." 
Nehemiah5:6 Kwandul’ ukuvuta ingqumbo yam kakulu, nxa ndevayo isikalo sabo nalamazwi." 
Nehemiah5:7 Ndasuka ndacebisana nentliziyo yam, ndapikisana nemiduna namagosa, ndati kubo: Niyabanga inzuzo, abanye ngabanye kubazalwana babo. Ndaza ndabeka ngakubo intlanganiso enkulu." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ndandisiti kubo: Tina, ngamandla etu, sibakulule abazalwana betu ama‐Juda, abebetengisiwe kubo abaheyideni; kanene nina, seniya kutengisa ngabazalwana benu na? baya kutengiswa kuti ke na? Baza bati cwaka, bengafumani nto yokupendula." 
Nehemiah5:9 Ndati kanjalo: Akulungile oko nikwenzayo: ngeningahambi na ekumoyikeni utixo wetu, ngenxa yesigxeko sabaheyideni intshaba zetu?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Kwa nam, n abazalwana bam, nezicaka zam, besingabangayo kubo imali nenqolowa: masiyeke ke inzuzo le." 
Nehemiah5:11 Kenibuyisele kubo kwa namhla nje amasimi abo, n ezitiya zabo zemiti yeveyine, n emiyezo yabo yeminquma, nezindlu zabo, nesekulu isahlulo semali, nenqolowa, n eveyine, neoli, enizibangayo kubo." 
Nehemiah5:12 Bandula bati: Sobuyisa ke, singabizi nto kubo; siya kwenje njalo, njengokuba utshilo wena. Ndaza ndabiza abaperisite, ndabafungisela ukuba baya kwenza ngalo elilizwi." 
Nehemiah5:13 Kanjako ndavutulula ingubo yam, ndati: Makenje njalo utixo ukuvutulula bonke abasukuba bengafezi elilizwi, ezindlwini zabo, nasekuqwebeni kwabo; mabavutululwe kwa ngokunjalo, babe zé. Yati ke yonke intlanganiso: Amene! yamdumisa uyehova. Baza abantu benza ngalo elilizwi." 
Nehemiah5:14 Kanjako kuseloko bendimiselwa ukuba yinkosi yabo elizweni lakwa‐Juda, kwa kuwo owamashumi mabini umnyaka kwada kwakuwo owamashumi matatu anesibini umnyaka ka‐Aretashasheta ukumkani, iyiminyaka ilishumi elinamibini, isonka senkosi asisidlanga mna nabazalwana bam." 
Nehemiah5:15 Kodwa inkosi zokuqala, ezibe zipambili kum, zayenza nzima iyokwe pezu kwabantu, zatabata kubo isonka neveyine, ngapandle kwazo ishekele zesilivere ezimashumi mane; ewe izicaka zazo zapata abantu ngobukosi: kanti bendingenje njalo mna, ngenxa yokwoyikwa kukatixo." 
Nehemiah5:16 Kananjalo emsebenzini woludonga ndazingisa ke; asatenga nanye intsimi: nazo zonke izicaka zam zazihlanganiselwa kona kulomsebenzi. 
Nehemiah5:17 Kwaye kuko ngasesitebeni sam ikulu elinamashumi mahlanu lama‐Juda namagosa, ngapandle kwabo ababesiza kuti bevela kubaheyideni abasingqongayo." 
Nehemiah5:18 Kekaloku oko obekulungiselwa imini nye, bekuyinkabi inye n egusha zintandatu eziketiweyo; kwandilungiselwa nentaka; napakati kwemihla elishumi zonke intlobo zeveyine ngokuninzi: noko ke isonka senkosi andisibizanga, ngenxa yokuba inkonzo ibinzima pezu kwababantu." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ndikumbulele, Tixo wam! kube kokulungileyo, konke endikwenzileyo kwababantu." 
Nehemiah6:1 KWAYE kute, kwakuviwa ngu‐Sanebalati, no‐Tobiya, no‐Gesheme um‐Arabi, nabanye abazintshaba zetu, ukuba bendilwakile udonga, nokuba akwasala kulo nalunye utanda; (nakuba ngeloxesha bendingamisanga ingcango emasangweni;)" 
Nehemiah6:2 bandula u‐Sanebalati no‐Gesheme batuma kum, ukuti: Yiza, masihlangane ndawonye emizini emhlanjeni wase‐Ono. Kodwa babecinga ukundenza ububi." 
Nehemiah6:3 Ndaza ndatuma izigidimi kubo, ukuti: Ndiwenza umsebenzi omkulu, ndikohliwe kukuhla ke; yinina ukuba kunqamke umsebenzi, nxa ndiwuyekayo, ndihle ukuza kuni?" 
Nehemiah6:4 Baye betuma kum kwa ngokunjalo amaxesha amane; ndaza ndabapendula kwa ngokunjalo. 
Nehemiah6:5 Wandula u‐Sanebalati watuma kum kwa ngokunjalo ixesha lesihlanu isicaka sake, sinencwadi evulekileyo esandleni saso;" 
Nehemiah6:6 ekwaba̔lwa kuyo, kusitwa: Kuvakele pakati kwentlanga, utsho ke u‐Gashemu, ukuba wena nama‐Juda niyacinga ukwenza imvukelo; ngako oko uyalwaka udonga; nokuba wena woba ngukumkani wawo, njengalamazwi:" 
Nehemiah6:7 nakanjako, ubamisile abaprofite ukuba bashumayele ngawe e‐Yerusaleme, besiti: Ungukumkani kwa‐Juda. Nakaloku kwoviwa ngukumkani njengalamazwi: ngako kaloku yiza, masicebisane ndawonye." 
Nehemiah6:8 Ndaza ndatuma kuye, ukuti: Akwenzekanga njengezonto uteta ngazo, koko uziqingayo ngeyako intliziyo." 
Nehemiah6:9 Ngokuba bona bonke bebesoyikisa, besiti: Izandla zabo zoyeka umsebenzi, ude ungenzwa ke. Ngako kaloku, Tixo! yomeleza izandla zam." 
Nehemiah6:10 Ndandula ndangena endlwini ka‐Shemaya, unyana ka‐Delaya, unyana ka‐Mehetabele, obevalelwa; wayesiti yena: Masihlangane endlwini katixo, ngapakati kwetempile, sivale ingcango zetempile; ngokuba beya kuza ukukubulala; ewe ebusuku boza ukukubulala." 
Nehemiah6:11 Ndati ke: Indoda enjengam iya kusaba na? ngubanina ke, enjengam, oya kungena etempileni ukuba ahlale ebomini? Andiyi kungena." 
Nehemiah6:12 Ndaza ndaqiqa, kekaloku bona ke, utixo ebengamtumanga; koko wasitetayo esisiprofitesho ngakum, ngokuba ebeqeshiwe ngu‐Tobiya no‐Sanebalati." 
Nehemiah6:13 Kukona abeqeshiwe, ukuze ndoyike, ndenje njalo, ndone; ukuba babe nento yokwenza udumo olubi, ukuze bandigxeke." 
Nehemiah6:14 Kumbula, Tixo wam! u‐Tobiya no‐Sanebalati njengazo ezizenzo zabo; kwa naye u‐Nohadiya umprofitekazi, nabanye abaprofite, abandoyikisileyo." 
Nehemiah6:15 Kwada kwafezwa udonga ngowamashumi mabini anesihlanu umhla wenyanga yo‐Elule, kuyo imihla imashumi mahlanu anamibini." 
Nehemiah6:16 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni bekuviwa ngabo bonke abazintshaba zetu, na xeshekweni bekubonwa ngabo bonke abaheyideni abasingqongayo, bandula bawa kakulu kwawabo amehlo: ngokuba bebesazi ukuba lomsebenzi ube wenziwe ngutixo wetu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Kanjako, ngalomihla, imiduna yakwa‐Juda yatuma incwadi ezininzi ku‐Tobiya; nezika‐Tobiya bezisiza kuyo." 
Nehemiah6:18 Ngokuba abaninzi kwa‐Juda bebefungile kuye, ngenxa yokuba ebengumyeni ku‐Shekaniya unyana ka‐Arahi; no‐Jehohanane unyana wake yena ebezekile intombi ka‐Meshulame unyana ka‐Berekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Kanjalo izenzo zake ezilungileyo bazixela ebusweni bam, namazwi am bawakupela kuye. Waye u‐Tobiya ezituma incwadi ukundoyikisa." 
Nehemiah7:1 KWAYE kute, emveni kwokuba udonga lwaselwakiwe, nokuba bendizimisile ingcango, nokuba bebepatisiwe abalindimnyango, nabaculi, naba‐Levi," 
Nehemiah7:2 ndandula ndamisa u‐Hanani umzalwana wam, no‐Hananiya inkosi yenqaba, pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme: ngokuba ebeyindoda yenyaniso, wamoyika utixo ngapezu kwabaninzi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ndandisiti kubo: Amasango e‐Yerusaleme makangavulwa lide libalele ilanga; naxeshekweni basemiyo ngaku wo, mabavale ingcango, bafake imivalo: kanjalo makumiswe abalindi, abemi base‐Yerusaleme, bonke ngabanye ekulindeni kwabo, nabanye ngabanye malungana nezindlu zabo." 
Nehemiah7:4 Kekaloku isixeko sasibanzi indawo yaso, sasikulu; kodwa abantu bebelula pakati kwaso: kanjako izindlu bezingekakiwe." 
Nehemiah7:5 Wandula utixo wam wabeka entliziyweni yam ukuba ndihlanganise imiduna, namagosa, nabantu, baze baba̔lelwe ngokuzalwa. Ndaza ndafumana isiba̔lelo sokuzalwa sababenyuke ekuqaleni, ndafumana kuba̔liwe kuso, kusitwa:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Lulo olu usapo lwaselizwaneni olwanyukayo kubo abatinjwa abebefudusiwe, abo u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ebebafudusile, lwabuya lweza e‐Yerusaleme nakwa‐Juda, olunye ngolunye esixekweni sakowalo;" 
Nehemiah7:7 olwezayo no‐Zerubabeli: U‐Yoshuwa, u‐Nehemiya, u‐Hazariya, u‐Rahamiya, u‐Nahamani, u‐Modekai, u‐Bilishane, u‐Miseperete, u‐Bigivai, u‐Nehumi, u‐Bahana. Inani lamadoda abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Usapo luka‐Paroshe, ngamawaka mabini anekulu linye elinamashumi asixe̔nxe anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:9 Usapo luka‐Shefatiya, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi asixe̔nxe anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:10 Usapo luka‐Arahi, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mahlanu anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:11 Usapo luka‐Pahati‐mowabi, olwosapo luka‐Yoshuwa no‐Jowabi, ngamawaka mabini anamakulu asibozo aneshumi linesibozo." 
Nehemiah7:12 Usapo luka‐Helami, liwaka linye elinamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu anesine." 
Nehemiah7:13 Usapo luka‐Zatu, ngamakulu asibozo anamashumi mane anesihlanu." 
Nehemiah7:14 Usapo luka‐Zakai, ngamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi matandatu." 
Nehemiah7:15 Usapo luka‐Binuwi, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mane anesibozo." 
Nehemiah7:16 Usapo luka‐Bebai, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mabini anesibozo." 
Nehemiah7:17 Usapo luka‐Hazegadi, ngamawaka mabini anamakulu matatu anamashumi mabini anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:18 Usapo luka‐Adonikame, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi matandatu anesixe̔nxe." 
Nehemiah7:19 Usapo luka‐Bigivai, ngamawaka mabini anamashumi matandatu anesixe̔nxe." 
Nehemiah7:20 Usapo luka‐Hadine, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mahlanu anesihlanu." 
Nehemiah7:21 Usapo luka‐Atere, oluka‐Hezekiya, ngamashumi alitoba anesibozo." 
Nehemiah7:22 Usapo luka‐Hashumi, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi mabini anesibozo." 
Nehemiah7:23 Usapo luka‐Betsai, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi mabini anesine." 
Nehemiah7:24 Usapo luka‐Harife, likulu linye elineshumi linesibini." 
Nehemiah7:25 Usapo lwase‐Gibeyone, ngamashumi alitoba anesihlanu." 
Nehemiah7:26 Amadoda ase‐Bete‐leheme ne‐Netofati, likulu linye elinamashumi asibozo anesibozo." 
Nehemiah7:27 Amadoda ase‐Hanatote, likulu linye elinamashumi mabini anesibozo." 
Nehemiah7:28 Amadoda ase‐Bete‐hazamaveti, ngamashumi mane anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:29 Amadoda ase‐Kiriyate‐yarime, n e‐Kefira, ne‐Berote, ngamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi mane anesitatu." 
Nehemiah7:30 Amadoda ase‐Rama ne‐Gaba, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mabini ananye." 
Nehemiah7:31 Amadoda ase‐Mikimasi, likulu linye elinamashumi mabini anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:32 Amadoda ase‐Betele ne‐Hahai, likulu linye elinamashumi mabini anesitatu." 
Nehemiah7:33 Amadoda ase‐Nebo yimbi, ngamashumi mahlanu anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:34 Usapo luka‐Helami wumbi, liwaka linye elinamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu anesine." 
Nehemiah7:35 Usapo luka‐Harime, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi mabini." 
Nehemiah7:36 Usapo lwase‐Jeriko, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi mane anesihlanu." 
Nehemiah7:37 Usapo lwase‐Lodi, n e‐Hadidi, ne‐Ono, ngamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi mabini anesinye." 
Nehemiah7:38 Usapo lwase‐Senaha, ngamawaka matatu anamakulu alitoba anamashumi matatu." 
Nehemiah7:39 Abaperisite: usapo luka‐Yedaya, olwendlu ka‐Yoshuwa, ngamakulu alitoba anamashumi asixe̔nxe anesitatu." 
Nehemiah7:40 Usapo luka‐Yimeri, liwaka linye elinamashumi mahlanu anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:41 Usapo luka‐Pashure, liwaka linye elinamakulu mabini anamashumi mane anesixe̔nxe." 
Nehemiah7:42 Usapo luka‐Harime, liwaka linye elineshumi linesixe̔nxe." 
Nehemiah7:43 Aba‐Levi: usapo luka‐Yoshuwa n o‐Kadimele, olwosapo luka‐Hodeva, ngamashumi asixe̔nxe anesine." 
Nehemiah7:44 Abaculi: usapo luka‐Safa, likulu linye elinamashumi mane anesibozo." 
Nehemiah7:45 Abalindimnyango: usapo luka‐Shalume, usapo luka‐Atere, usapo luka‐Talimone, usapo luka‐Hakube, usapo luka‐Hatita, usapo luka‐Shobai, likulu linye elinamashumi matatu anesibozo." 
Nehemiah7:46 Aba‐Netini: usapo luka‐Tsiha, usapo luka‐Hasufa, usapo luka‐Tabahoti," 
Nehemiah7:47 usapo luka‐Kerosi, usapo luka‐Siha, usapo luka‐Padoni," 
Nehemiah7:48 usapo luka‐Lebana, usapo luka‐Hagaba, usapo luka‐Shalemai," 
Nehemiah7:49 usapo luka‐Hanane, usapo luka‐Gidele, usapo luka‐Gahari," 
Nehemiah7:50 usapo luka‐Rehaya, usapo luka‐Retsine, usapo luka‐Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 usapo luka‐Gazame, usapo luka‐Huza, usapo luka‐Paseha," 
Nehemiah7:52 usapo luka‐Besai, usapo luka‐Mehunime, usapo luka‐Nefishesime," 
Nehemiah7:53 usapo luka‐Bakebuke, usapo luka‐Hakufa, usapo luka‐Harehure," 
Nehemiah7:54 usapo luka‐Batseliti, usapo luka‐Mehida, usapo luka‐Haresha," 
Nehemiah7:55 usapo luka‐Barekosi, usapo luka‐Sisera, usapo luka‐Tama," 
Nehemiah7:56 usapo luka‐Netsiha, usapo luka‐Hatifa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Usapo lwezicaka zika‐Solomone: usapo luka‐Sotai, usapo luka‐Soferete, usapo luka‐Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 usapo luka‐Yahala, usapo luka‐Darekone, usapo luka‐Gidele," 
Nehemiah7:59 usapo luka‐Shefatiya, usapo luka‐Hatili, usapo luka‐Pokerete‐tsebayime, usapo luka‐Amoni." 
Nehemiah7:60 Bonke aba‐Netini, nosapo lwezicaka zika‐Solomone, ngamakulu matatu anamashumi alitoba anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:61 Kanjalo aba ngabanyukayo e‐Tele‐mela, nas e‐Tele‐haresha: u‐Kerube, u‐Adoni, no‐Yimeri: kodwa bakohlwa kuxela indlu yoyise yabo, nesizalwane sabo, ukuba bangabakwa‐Sirayeli na." 
Nehemiah7:62 Usapo luka‐Delaya, usapo luka‐Tobiya, usapo luka‐Nekoda, ngamakulu matandatu anamashumi mane anesibini." 
Nehemiah7:63 Nakubo abaperisite: onyana baka‐Habaya, onyana baka‐Kotse, onyana baka‐Barezilai, owazeka umfazi kwintombi zika‐Barezilai um‐Gileyadi, wabizwa ngegama lazo:" 
Nehemiah7:64 aba bafuna ukuba̔lelwa kwabo pakati kwababa̔lelweyo ngokuzalwa, kodwa akwafunyanwa: ngako bashenxiswa kubo ubuperisite njengabanco̔lileyo." 
Nehemiah7:65 Yayisiti kubo inkosi enkulu, ukuba mabangatyi kwizinto ezingcwele kakulu, kude kusuke umperisite ene‐Urime ne‐Tumime." 
Nehemiah7:66 Yonke intlanganiso kwa kunye ibingamawaka amashumi mane enesibini anamakulu matatu anamashumi matandatu," 
Nehemiah7:67 ngapandle kwezicaka zabo nezicakakazi zabo, ezibe zingamawaka asixe̔nxe anamakulu matatu anamashumi matatu anesixe̔nxe: bebenabaculi nabaculikazi abangamakulu mabini anamashumi mane anesihlanu kanjako." 
Nehemiah7:68 Amahashe abo ebengamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi matatu anesitandatu; amaqwaṙaṙa abo ebengamakulu mabini anamashumi mane anesihlanu; 
Nehemiah7:69 inkamela zabo bezingamakulu mane anamashumi matatu anesihlanu; amaqwaṙashe abo ebengamawaka matandatu anamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi mabini. 
Nehemiah7:70 Bati inxenye kubo bonke abazintloko zendlu zoyise, banika emsebenzini. Inkosi enkulu yanika endyetyeni, idarike zegolide zaliwaka linye, n ezitya zokufefela zamashumi mahlanu, n engubo zabaperisite zamakulu mahlanu anamashumi matatu." 
Nehemiah7:71 Nabazintloko zendlu zoyise inxenye banika endyetyeni yomsebenzi, idarike zegolide zamawaka angamashumi mabini, nemina zesilivere zamawaka mabini anamakulu mabini." 
Nehemiah7:72 Okwanikwayo ngabanye abantu bekuzidarike zegolide ezimawaka amashumi mabini, nemina zesilivere ezimawaka mabini, nengubo zabaperisite ezimashumi matandatu anesixe̔nxe." 
Nehemiah7:73 Bada abaperisite, naba‐Levi, nabalindimnyango, nabaculi, nenxenye yabantu, naba‐Netini, no‐Sirayeli bonke, bahlala ezixekweni zakowabo: kwati kwakufika inyanga yesixe̔nxe, usapo luka‐Sirayeli belusezixekweni zalo." 
Nehemiah8:1 BANDULA bonke abantu bazihlanganisela enkundleni engapambi kwesango lamanzi njengomntu mnye; bati ku‐Ezera umba̔li, ukuba makayizise incwadi yomteto ka‐Mosesi, lowo uyehova ubewumisele o‐Sirayeli." 
Nehemiah8:2 Waza u‐Ezera umperisite wawuzisa umteto ebusweni bentlanganiso, kwa namadoda nabafazi, nabo bonke abebeqonda ukuva, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga yesixe̔nxe." 
Nehemiah8:3 Walesesha kuwo pambi kwenkundla engapambi kwesango lamanzi, kwa sekukanyeni kwokusa kwada kwasemini enkulu, ngapambi kwamadoda nabafazi, nabanokuqonda; zati indlebe zabantu bonke zabekwa encwadini yomteto." 
Nehemiah8:4 Wema u‐Ezera umba̔li pezu kwesitulo semiti eside, abebesenzile ngenxa yalondawo: kwema ngakuye u‐Matitiya, no‐Shema, no‐Hanaya, no‐Huriya, no‐Hilikiya, no‐Mahaseya, ngesokunene sake; nangesokohlo sake, u‐Pedaya, no‐Mishayeli, no‐Malekiya, no‐Hashume, no‐Hashebadana, n o‐Zekariya, n o‐Meshulame." 
Nehemiah8:5 Waza u‐Ezera wavula incwadi pambi kwamehlo abantu bonke; (ngokuba ebepezulu kubo bonke abantu;) nxa ayivulileyo, bema abantu bonke." 
Nehemiah8:6 Wandula u‐Ezera wambonga uyehova, utixo omkulu. Bapendula bonke abantu, besiti: Amene, Amene! bepakamisa izandla zabo: baza batoba ngapantsi, bambedesha uyehova, ubuso bungasemhlabeni." 
Nehemiah8:7 Kekaloku u‐Yoshuwa, no‐Bani, no‐Sherebiya, n o‐Yamine, n o‐Hakube, n o‐Shabetai, n o‐Hodiya, n o‐Mahaseya, n o‐Kelita, n o‐Hazariya, n o‐Yozabadi, n o‐Hanane, n o‐Pelaya, naba‐Levi, babafundisa abantu umteto: bati abantu bema endaweni yabo." 
Nehemiah8:8 Baza balesesha encwadini, emtetweni katixo, kwa sekuhleni, bawuca̔zela, baqondisa ekulesesheni." 
Nehemiah8:9 Wayesiti u‐Nehemiya, oyinkosi enkulu, no‐Ezera umperisite, umba̔li, naba‐Levi abafundisayo abantu, kubo bonke abantu: Lemini ingcwele kuyehova, utixo wenu; ningabi lusizi, ningalili nokulila. Ngokuba bonke abantu bebelila, nxa bevayo amazwi omteto." 
Nehemiah8:10 Walekela wati kubo: Hambani, yityani okutyebileyo, nisele okumnandi, nizitume izabelwa kwabangalungiselwanga nto: ngokuba lemini ingcwele kwinkosi yetu: niti kanjako ningadandateki; ngokuba uvuyo lwoyehova, lulo amandla enu." 
Nehemiah8:11 Kanjalo aba‐Levi batutuzela abantu bonke, besiti: Tutuni, ngokuba imini le ingcwele; ngako ningadandateki." 
Nehemiah8:12 Bandula bahamba bonke abantu baya ukutya, nokusela, nokutuma izabelwa, nokuwenza umgcobo omkulu, ngenxa yokuba bebeqondile amazwi abeshunyayelwe kubo." 
Nehemiah8:13 Nangowesibini umhla, kwahlanganiswa abazintloko zendlu zoyise zabantu bonke, n abaperisite, naba‐Levi, beza ku‐Ezera umba̔li, ukuze banakane amazwi omteto." 
Nehemiah8:14 Baza bafumana kuba̔liwe emtetweni, ukuba uyehova ebeyalele ngo‐Mosesi, okokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli luya kuhlala emapempeni ngomtendeleko wenyanga yesixe̔nxe;" 
Nehemiah8:15 nokokuba luvakalise ludlulise nokudlulisa ilizwi kuzo zonke izixeko zalo, nase‐Yerusaleme, lokuti: Pumani niye ezintabeni, nizise amasebe eminquma, namasebe emiti yeoli, namasebe emiti yemutele, namasebe emiti yepalime, namasebe emiti ebungqingqwa, kuze kwenziwe amapempe, njengokuba̔liweyo." 
Nehemiah8:16 Basuka bapuma abantu, bawazisa, bazenzela amapempe, abanye ngabanye pezu kwezindlu zabo, nasemabaleni abo, nasemabaleni endlu katixo, nasenkundleni yesango lamanzi, nasenkundleni yesango lika‐Frayime." 
Nehemiah8:17 Yaza yonke intlanganiso yababuyileyo ekutinjweni yawenza amapempe, yahlala emapempeni lawo: ngokuba belungenzanga usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngokunjalo, kuselokwemihla ka‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Nune kwada kwangumhla lowo. Kwaza kwabako umgcobo omkulu." 
Nehemiah8:18 Kwaye kuleseshwa encwadini yomteto katixo, imini ngemini, kweyokuqala imini kwada kwayimini yokupela. Babamba umtendeleko imihla esixe̔nxe; nangowesibozo umhla kwabako intlanganisano engcwele, njengesiko." 
Nehemiah9:1 KEKALOKU ngomhla wamashumi mabini anesine walenyanga, kwahlanganisana usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lunenzilo, nengubo ezintlakantlaka, nomhlaba pezu kwalo." 
Nehemiah9:2 Yaza inzalo ka‐Sirayeli yazahlula kubo bonke abezinye intlanga, yema yaxela izono zayo, nenkohlakalo zoyise bayo." 
Nehemiah9:3 Bapakama endaweni yokuma yabo, balesesha encwadini yomteto kayehova, utixo wabo, esesine isahluko semini; n esinye isahluko sesine, baxela, bambedesha uyehova, utixo wabo." 
Nehemiah9:4 Basuka bema pezu kwendawo epezulu yaba‐Levi, u‐Yoshuwa, no‐Bani, u‐Kadimele, u‐Shebaniya, u‐Buni, u‐Sherebiya, u‐Bani, n o‐Kenani, bakala ngelizwi elikulu kuyehova, utixo wabo." 
Nehemiah9:5 Bandula bati aba‐Levi, u‐Yoshuwa, no‐Kadimele, u‐Bani, u‐Hashabiniya, u‐Sherebiya, u‐Hodiya, u‐Shebaniya, n o‐Petahiya: Pakamani, bongani uyehova, utixo wenu, kwa kunapakade kude kube ngunapakade: malibongwe igama lako elibungcwalisa, elipakanyiselweyo ngapezu konke ukubongwa nokudunyiswa." 
Nehemiah9:6 Wena unguye uyehova wedwa; nguwe owenzileyo izulu, izulu lamazulu, nawo wonke umkosi walo: umhlaba, nako konke okupezu kwawo; ilwandle, nako konke okukuzo: nguwe ezilondolozayo zonke ezo nto: umkosi wezulu uyabedesha wena." 
Nehemiah9:7 Wena unguye uyehova o ngutixo, owamqashayo u‐Abrame, wamkupa e‐Ure yama‐Kaledine, wamtiya igama elingu‐Abrahame;" 
Nehemiah9:8 wayifumana intliziyo yake inyanisekile pambi kwako, walwenza naye ucebano, ukuba ulinike ilizwe laba‐Kanane, n ama‐Hete, n aba‐Amori, nama‐Perizi, nama‐Yebusi, nama‐Giregashe, ukuba ulinike kuyo inzalo yake: waza waqinisa amazwi ako: ngokuba ulungile wena:" 
Nehemiah9:9 kanjalo wabona ukubandezelwa kwobawo betu e‐Jipete, nokukala kwabo wakuva ngaselwandle olubomvu;" 
Nehemiah9:10 wakupa imiqondiso nemimangaliso pezu kwake u‐Faro, napezu kwazo zonke izicaka zake, napezu kwabo bonke abantu belizwe lake: ngokuba ubusazi ukuba benza nger̔atshi ngakubo: waza wazenzela igama, njengokuba kunjalo kwa namhla:" 
Nehemiah9:11 nolwandle wabulucanda pambi kwabo, bada badlula pakati kwolwandle pezu kw omhlaba owomileyo; nabatshutshisi babo wabubaposela ezinzulwini, njengelitye emanzini anamandla:" 
Nehemiah9:12 wabubakapa emini ngentsika yelifu; nasebusuku ngentsika yomlilo, baze bakanyiselwe endleleni abaya kuhamba ngayo." 
Nehemiah9:13 Kanjako wabusihla pezu kwentaba ye‐Sinai, wateta nabo usezulwini, wabanika izigwebo ezifaneleyo, nemiteto eyinene, imimiselo nemiyalelo elungileyo:" 
Nehemiah9:14 nesabata yako engcwele wayazisa kubo; nemiyalelo, nemimiselo, nomteto, wayixela kubo ngo‐Mosesi isicaka sako:" 
Nehemiah9:15 nesonka sivela ezulwini wabusinika kubo ngenxa yokulamba kwabo, wabapumisela amanzi eweni ngenxa yokunxanwa kwabo, wabaxelela ukuba bangene ukufuya ilizwe obupakamisile isandla sako sokuba ulinike kubo." 
Nehemiah9:16 Kodwa bona nobawo betu benza nger̔atshi, bazenza lukuni intamo zabo, abapulapula imiyalelo yako," 
Nehemiah9:17 bala ukuva, abakumbulela imimangaliso yako obuyenzile pakati kwabo; bazenza lukuni intamo zabo, bati ngenkani yabo badala intloko, ukuba babuyele ebukobokeni babo: kodwa wena ungutixo wezixolelo, onofefe, onetaṙu, oqumba kade, onobubele obukulu; ngako ubungabashiyanga." 
Nehemiah9:18 Ewe, naxeshekweni bebezenzele itole elityityishiweyo, bati: Eli lingutixo wako owakunyusayo e‐Jipete; baza benza izigxeko ezikulu;" 
Nehemiah9:19 wati wena noko, ngezibele zako ezininzi, akwabashiya entlango: intsika yelifu ibingemki kubo emini, ize ibakokele endleleni; kwa nentsika yomlilo ebusuku, ize ibakanyisele, nendlela abaya kuhamba ngayo." 
Nehemiah9:20 Kanjalo wanika umoya wako olungileyo ukubafundisa; akwabamba imana yako emlonyeni wabo, wabapa amanzi ngenxa yokunxanwa kwabo;" 
Nehemiah9:21 wabanqaka entlango iminyaka yamashumi mane, abaswela luto; izivato zabo bezingenakuguga, nenyawo zabo azadumba." 
Nehemiah9:22 Kanjako wabubanika ubukumkani nentlanga, wabahlulahlula kwindawo ngendawo: bada bafuya ilizwe lika‐Sihone, kwa ilizwe lokumkani we‐Heshebone, nelizwe lika‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane." 
Nehemiah9:23 Nabantwana babo wabubandisa njengenkwenkwezi zezulu, wabangenisa kwelolizwe ubuxelele oyise babo ukuba bongena ukulifuya." 
Nehemiah9:24 Kwa njalo abantwana abo bangena balifuya ilizwe, wati wena wabatobisa pambi kwabo abemi belizwe, aba‐Kanane, wabanikela ezandleni zabo, nokumkani babo, nabantu belizwe, ukuze benze kubo njengokutanda kwabo." 
Nehemiah9:25 Baza babamba izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, nomhlaba otyebileyo, bafuya izindlu zizele zindyebo zonke, amacibi embelweyo, izitiya zemiti yeveyine, nezeminquma, nemiti yokutya, ngobuninzi: badla ke, bahluta, batyeba, baziyolisa ekulungeni kwako obukulu." 
Nehemiah9:26 Kodwa benza ngenkani, bavukela ngakuwe, baposa umteto wako emva kwomhlana wabo, babulala abaprofite bako, abo banqi̔nayo ngakubo, ukuba bababuyisele kuwe, bazenza izigxeko ezikulu." 
Nehemiah9:27 Ngako wabubanikela esandleni sentshaba zabo, ezababandezelayo; kodwa ngexesha lokubandezelwa kwabo, bakukala kuwe, wabusiva ezulwini, wabanika abasindisi, ngezibele zako ezininzi, ababasindisayo esandleni sentshaba zabo." 
Nehemiah9:28 Kanti xeshekweni babenokupumla, babuya bakwenza okukohlakeleyo pambi kwako: ngako wena wabashiya esandleni sentshaba zabo, ukuba zaba nobukosi pezu kwabo; kodwa bakubuya bakala kuwe, wabusiva ezulwini, wabahlangula, ngazo izibele zako, amaxesha amaninzi;" 
Nehemiah9:29 wanqi̔nayo ngakubo, ukuba ubabuyisele emtetweni wako: benza nger̔atshi noko, abapulapula imiyalelo yako, koko bonayo ngakuzo izigwebo zako, (aya kuti umntu, ukuba uyazenza, apile ngazo,) bapepisa igxalaba, bayenza lukuni intamo yabo, abapulapula ke." 
Nehemiah9:30 Kodwa wabubeka kade pezu kwabo iminyaka yamininzi, wanqi̔na ngakubo ngomoya wako ngabo abaprofite bako: ababekela ndlebe noko: ngako wabanikela esandleni sabantu bamazwe." 
Nehemiah9:31 Kodwa, ngezibele zako ezininzi, akwenza ukugqityelwa kwabo, akwabashiya kanjako; ngokuba wena u ngutixo onofefe onetaṙu." 
Nehemiah9:32 Ngako kaloku, Tixo wetu! utixo omkulu, onamandla, owoyikekayo, ogcinayo ucebano nobubele, mayingabi yinto encinane ebusweni bako yonke inkatazo esihlileyo tina, okumkani betu, inkosi zetu, nabaperisite betu, nabaprofite betu, nobawo betu, nabo bonke abantu bako, kuselokwexesha lokumkani be‐Asiriya kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Nehemiah9:33 Kodwa ulungile wena ngako konke esifikelwe kuko; ngokuba ubusenza ngenyaniso, kodwa tina senzile ngokukohlakeleyo:" 
Nehemiah9:34 ababambanga umteto wako okumkani beta, n enkosi zetu, n abaperisite betu, nobawo betu; abapulapulanga imiyalelo yako, nezinqi̔nelo zako, owabunqi̔na ngakubo ngazo." 
Nehemiah9:35 Ngokuba bengakonzanga wena ebukumkanini babo nasekulungeni kwako okukulu owakunika kubo, naselizweni elibanzi elityebileyo owalinikayo pambi kwabo; kanjako abaguquka kuzo izenzo zabo ezikohlakeleyo." 
Nehemiah9:36 Bona ke, namhla singabakonzi, nelizwe owabulinika kobawo betu ukuba batye ukuxakata kwalo nokuba mnandi kwalo, nanku singabakonzi kulo:" 
Nehemiah9:37 nokuvelisa kwalo liyakwandisela okumkani obabekileyo pezu kwetu ngenxa yezono zetu: kanjalo banobukosi pezu kwemizimba yetu, napezu kwenkomo zetu, njengokutanda kwabo; sisebunzimeni obukulu tina." 
Nehemiah9:38 Nangenxa kwako konke oku siyalwenza ucebano, siluba̔le; ziti inkosi zetu, n aba‐Levi betu, n abaperisite betu, baluncamatisele." 
Nehemiah10:1 Kekaloku abo bancamatiselayo: ngu‐Nehemiya, inkosi enkulu, unyana ka‐Hakaliya, no‐Zedekiya," 
Nehemiah10:2 u‐Seraya, u‐Hazariya, u‐Jeremiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 u‐Pashure, u‐Amariya, u‐Malekiya," 
Nehemiah10:4 u‐Hatushe, u‐Shebaniya, u‐Maluke," 
Nehemiah10:5 u‐Harime, u‐Meremote, u‐Hobadiya," 
Nehemiah10:6 u‐Danyeli, u‐Ginetoni, u‐Baruke," 
Nehemiah10:7 u‐Meshulame, u‐Abiya, u‐Miyamine," 
Nehemiah10:8 u‐Mahaziya, u‐Biligai, n o‐Shemaya: aba ngabaperisite." 
Nehemiah10:9 Naba‐Levi: ngu‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Azaniya, u‐Binuwi, konyana baka‐Henadade, u‐Kadimele;" 
Nehemiah10:10 nabazalwana babo, u‐Shebaniya, u‐Hodiya, u‐Kelita, u‐Pelaya, u‐Hanane," 
Nehemiah10:11 u‐Mika, u‐Rehobi, u‐Hashabiya," 
Nehemiah10:12 u‐Zakure, u‐Sherebiya, u‐Shebaniya," 
Nehemiah10:13 u‐Hodiya, u‐Bani, n o‐Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Abazintloko zabantu: ngu‐Paroshe, u‐Pahati‐mowabi, u‐Helami, u‐Zatu, u‐Bani," 
Nehemiah10:15 u‐Buni, u‐Hazegadi, u‐Bebai," 
Nehemiah10:16 u‐Adonija, u‐Bigivai, u‐Hadine," 
Nehemiah10:17 u‐Atere, u‐Hezekiya, u‐Hazure," 
Nehemiah10:18 u‐Hodiya, u‐Hashume, u‐Betsai," 
Nehemiah10:19 u‐Harife, u‐Hanatote, u‐Nebai," 
Nehemiah10:20 u‐Magipashe, u‐Meshulame, u‐Hezire," 
Nehemiah10:21 u‐Meshezabele, u‐Tsadoki, u‐Yaduwa," 
Nehemiah10:22 u‐Pelatiya, u‐Hanane, u‐Hanaya," 
Nehemiah10:23 u‐Hosheha, u‐Hananiya, u‐Hashube," 
Nehemiah10:24 u‐Haloheshe, u‐Pileha, u‐Shobeke," 
Nehemiah10:25 u‐Rehumi, u‐Hashabena, u‐Mahaseya," 
Nehemiah10:26 no‐Ahiya, u‐Hanane, u‐Anane," 
Nehemiah10:27 u‐Maluke, u‐Harime, n o‐Bahana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Nesisalela sabantu, abaperisite, aba‐Levi, abalindimnyango, abaculi, aba‐Netini, nabo bonke abebezahlule kubo abantu bamazwe ngenxa yomteto katixo, abafazi babo, onyana babo, nentombi zabo, bonke abebenokwazi n okuqonda," 
Nehemiah10:29 babambelela kubo abazalwana babo, imiduna yabo, bangena esiqalekisweni, nasesifungweni, sokuba bahambe ngomteto katixo, obunikwe ngo‐Mosesi isicaka sikatixo, nokuba bayigcine bayenze yonke imiyalelo kayehova, inkosi yetu, nezigwebo zake, nezimiselo zake;" 
Nehemiah10:30 nokuba singendisi intombi zetu kubo abantu belizwe, nentombi zabo singazitabateli onyana betu;" 
Nehemiah10:31 nokuba abantu belizwe bakuzisa impahla nento zonke zokutya ngomhla wesabata kutengiswe, singatengi kubo ngesabata, nangomhla oyingcwele; nokuba siwuyeke umnyaka wesixe̔nxe, nawo onke amatyala." 
Nehemiah10:32 Kanjako sazimisela imimiso, yokuba kubekwe pezu kwetu esesitatu isiqingata seshekele, ngomnyaka ngomnyaka, ngenxa yenkonzo yayo indlu katixo wetu:" 
Nehemiah10:33 ngenxa yezonka zokuṙozwa, nomnikelo wokudla ofuti, nangenxa yedini lokutshiswa elifuti, n elesabata, n elenyanga ezitwasileyo, ngenxa yemitendeleko emisiweyo, nangenxa yezinto ezingcwele, nangenxa yedini lesono lokwenzela o‐Sirayeli uxoliso, na ngenxa yawo wonke umsebenzi wendlu katixo wetu." 
Nehemiah10:34 Saza sawenzela umnikelo wenkuni amaqashiso, abaperisite, n aba‐Levi, nabantu, ukuba kuziswe endlwini katixo wetu, ngendlu zoyise zetu, ngamaxesha amiselweyo, umnyaka ngomnyaka, kuze kutshiswe pezu kwesibingelo sikayehova, utixo wetu, njengokuba̔liweyo emtetweni:" 
Nehemiah10:35 ukuba kanjalo kuziswe ilibo zomhlaba wetu, nelibo zako konke ukuqa̔ma kwemiti yonke, umnyaka ngomnyaka, endlwini kayehova;" 
Nehemiah10:36 nokuba amazibulo konyana betu, nakwizilo zetu, njengokuba̔liweyo emtetweni, namazibulo enkomo zetu nawegusha zetu, siwazise endlwini katixo wetu, kubaperisite abakonzayo endlwini katixo wetu;" 
Nehemiah10:37 nokuba isiqalo sentlama yetu, neminikelo yetu, nesiqa̔mo semiti yonke, iveyine entsha, neoli, sizizise kubaperisite, ezinkambilini zendlu katixo wetu, nezishumi zomhlaba wetu kuba‐Levi; ngokuba bona aba‐Levi benikwa izishumi, kuzo zonke izixeko zokulima kwetu." 
Nehemiah10:38 Waye umperisite, unyana ka‐Arone, eya kubako naba‐Levi, nxa kunikwa aba‐Levi izishumi; baze aba‐Levi basinyusele isishumi lezishumi ezo endlwini katixo wetu, ezinkambilini zayo indlu yendyebo:" 
Nehemiah10:39 ngokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nosapo luka‐Levi, luya kuzisa umnikelo wenqolowa, n eveyine entsha, neoli, ezinkambilini, apo zikoyo impahla zendawo eyingcwele, nabaperisite abakonzayo, nabalindimnyango, nabaculi: nendlu katixo wetu asisayi kuyishiya." 
Nehemiah11:1 ZATI inkosi zabantu zahlala e‐Yerusaleme: nesisalela sabantu, bawenza amaqashiso okuba kuziswe abe mnye kwabalishumi ahlale e‐Yerusaleme, isixeko esiyingcwele, nokuba abanye abalitoba bahlale kw ezinye izixeko." 
Nehemiah11:2 Baye abantu betamsanqelisa onke lomadoda azinikelayo ngokuvuma ukuza kuhlala e‐Yerusaleme. 
Nehemiah11:3 Zizo ezi intloko zaselizwaneni ezahlala e‐Yerusaleme: (kekaloku ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, kwahlala abanye ngabanye ezimfuyweni zabo, ezixekweni zakowabo, o‐Sirayeli, abaperisite, naba‐Levi, naba‐Netini, nosapo lwezicaka zika‐Solomone:" 
Nehemiah11:4 nase‐Yerusaleme kwahlala inxenye kulo usapo luka‐Juda, nakulo usapo luka‐Benjamine.) Kulo usapo luka‐Juda: u‐Hataya, unyana ka‐Huziya, unyana ka‐Zekariya, unyana ka‐Amariya, unyana ka‐Shefatiya, unyana ka‐Mahalalele, kulo usapo luka‐Faretse;" 
Nehemiah11:5 no‐Mahaseya, unyana ka‐Baruke, unyana ka‐Kolehoze, unyana ka‐Hazaya, unyana ka‐Hadaya, unyana ka‐Yoyaribe, unyana ka‐Zekariya, unyana ka‐Shilo." 
Nehemiah11:6 Lwonke usapo luka‐Faretse olwahlala e‐Yerusaleme, ngamakulu mane anamashumi matandatu anesibozo amadoda akalipileyo." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ngaba abalusapo luka‐Benjamine: u‐Salu, unyana ka‐Meshulame, unyana ka‐Yohedi, unyana ka‐Pedaya, unyana ka‐Kolaya, unyana ka‐Mahaseya, unyana ka‐Yitiyeli, unyana ka‐Yesaya;" 
Nehemiah11:8 nasemva kwake, u‐Gabai, u‐Salai; amakulu alitoba anamashumi mabini anesibozo:" 
Nehemiah11:9 u‐Joweli, unyana ka‐Zikeri, ebengumongama wabo: no‐Juda, unyana ka‐Hasenuwa, ebepezu kwesixeko esesibini isahlulo." 
Nehemiah11:10 Kubo abaperisite: u‐Yedaya unyana ka‐Yoyaribe, u‐Yakine," 
Nehemiah11:11 u‐Seraya, unyana ka‐Hilikiya, unyana ka‐Meshulame, unyana ka‐Tsadoki, unyana ka‐Merayoti, unyana ka‐Ahitube, umpati wendlu katixo;" 
Nehemiah11:12 nabazalwana babo, abawenza umsebenzi wendlu, amakulu asibozo anamashumi mabini anesibini; no‐Hadaya, unyana ka‐Yerohame, unyana ka‐Pelaliya, unyana ka‐Ametsi, unyana ka‐Zekariya, unyana ka‐Pashure, unyana ka‐Malekiya;" 
Nehemiah11:13 nabazalwana bake, intloko zendlu zoyise, amakulu mabini anamashumi mane anesibini; no‐Hamashesai, unyana ka‐Hazareli, unyana ka‐Ahezai, unyana ka‐Meshilemote, unyana ka‐Yimeri;" 
Nehemiah11:14 nabazalwana babo, amaṙoti akalipileyo, ikulu elinamashumi mabini anesibozo: umongama wabo ebengu‐Zabideli, unyana wo wabakulu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Nakubo aba‐Levi: u‐Shemaya, unyana ka‐Hashube, unyana ka‐Zarikame, unyana ka‐Hashabiya, unyana ka‐Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 no‐Shabetai, no‐Yozabadi, abapezu kwomsebenzi wapandle wendlu katixo, kubo abazintloko zaba‐Levi;" 
Nehemiah11:17 no‐Mataniya, unyana ka‐Mika, unyana ka‐Zabedi, unyana ka‐Safa, intloko eyaqala ukubulela ekutandazeni; no‐Bakebukiya, owesibini pakati kwabazalwana bake; no‐Abeda, unyana ka‐Shamuha, unyana ka‐Galali, unyana ka‐Jedutune." 
Nehemiah11:18 Bonke aba‐Levi esixekweni esiyingcwele bebengamakulu mabini anamashumi asibozo anabane. 
Nehemiah11:19 Nabalindimnyango: u‐Hakube, u‐Talimone, nabazalwana babo abagcinayo amasango, ikulu elinamashumi asixe̔nxe anesibini." 
Nehemiah11:20 Nesisalela so‐Sirayeli, abaperisite, n aba‐Levi, bebekuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda, abanye ngabanye emafeni abo." 
Nehemiah11:21 Bati aba‐Netini bahlala e‐Hofeli: u‐Tsiha no‐Gishepa bebepezu kwaba‐Netini. 
Nehemiah11:22 Kanjalo umongama waba‐Levi e‐Yerusaleme ebengu‐Huzi, unyana ka‐Bani, unyana ka‐Hashabiya, unyana ka‐Mataniya, unyana ka‐Mika. Kulo usapo luka‐Safa, abaculi bebepezu kwomsebenzi wendlu katixo." 
Nehemiah11:23 Ngokuba umyalelo wokumkani ngabo, ubungowokuba abaculi babe nesabelwa esitile, into yemini ngemini yayo." 
Nehemiah11:24 No‐Petahiya unyana ka‐Meshezabele, kulo usapo luka‐Zera unyana ka‐Juda, yena ebengecala lokumkani, ngento zonke zabantu." 
Nehemiah11:25 Nasemizini, kunye nezindle zayo, kwahlala inxenye yosapo luka‐Juda e‐Kiriyate‐areba namagxamesi ayo, nase‐Dibone namagxamesi ayo, nase‐Yekabetsele nemizi yayo," 
Nehemiah11:26 nase‐Yeshuha, nase‐Molada, nase‐Bete‐pelete," 
Nehemiah11:27 nase‐Hatsareshuhali, nase‐Beresheba namagxamesi ayo," 
Nehemiah11:28 nase‐Tsikilage, nase‐Mekona, nakuwo amagxamesi ayo," 
Nehemiah11:29 nase‐Henerimone, nase‐Tsoreha, nase‐Yaremute," 
Nehemiah11:30 e‐Zanoha, e‐Hadulame, na kuyo imizi yazo, e‐Lakishe nezindle zayo, e‐Hazeka namagxamesi ayo. Kwamiwa kwa se‐Beresheba kwada kwasesihlanjeni sika‐Hinome." 
Nehemiah11:31 Kwahlala nosapo luka‐Benjamine lwase‐Geba e‐Mikimashe, nase‐Haya, nase‐Betele namagxamesi ayo," 
Nehemiah11:32 e‐Hanatote, e‐Nobe, e‐Hananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 e‐Hatsore, e‐Rama, e‐Gitayime," 
Nehemiah11:34 e‐Hadidi, e‐Tsebohime, e‐Nebalate," 
Nehemiah11:35 e‐Lodi, nase‐Ono, emhlanjeni wencibi." 
Nehemiah11:36 Nakubo aba‐Levi kwahlala inxenye ezahlulweni zakwa‐Juda, ne zakwa‐Benjamine." 
Nehemiah12:1 ABA ngabaperisite naba‐Levi abanyukayo kunye no‐Zerubabeli unyana ka‐Shalatiyeli, no‐Yoshuwa: u‐Seraya, u‐Jeremiya, u‐Ezera," 
Nehemiah12:2 u‐Amariya, u‐Maluke, u‐Hatushe," 
Nehemiah12:3 u‐Shekaniya, u‐Rehumi, u‐Meremote," 
Nehemiah12:4 u‐Hido, u‐Ginetoi, u‐Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 u‐Miyamine, u‐Mahadiya, u‐Bilega," 
Nehemiah12:6 u‐Shemaya, no‐Yoyaribe, u‐Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 u‐Salu, u‐Hamoke, u‐Hilikiya, n o‐Yedaya. Aba bebezintloko zabaperisite, nabazalwana babo, emihleni ka‐Yoshuwa." 
Nehemiah12:8 Naba‐Levi: u‐Yoshuwa, u‐Binuwi, u‐Kadimele, u‐Sherebiya, u‐Juda, n o‐Mataniya: ebepezu kwemibulelo, yena nabazalwana bake." 
Nehemiah12:9 Kanjalo u‐Bakebukiya no‐Huni, abazalwana babo, bebelunge nabo ekulindeni." 
Nehemiah12:10 Kekaloku u‐Yoshuwa wazala u‐Yoyakime, no‐Yoyakime wazala u‐Eliyashibe, no‐Eliyashibe wazala u‐Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 no‐Yoyada wazala u‐Jonatane, no‐Jonatane wazala u‐Yaduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Nasemihleni ka‐Yoyakime bebeko abaperisite, intloko zendlu zoyise: oka‐Seraya, ngu‐Meraya; oka‐Jeremiya, ngu‐Hananiya;" 
Nehemiah12:13 oka‐Ezera, ngu‐Meshulame; oka‐Amariya, ngu‐Jehohanane;" 
Nehemiah12:14 oka‐Meliku, ngu‐Jonatane; oka‐Shebaniya, ngu‐Josefe;" 
Nehemiah12:15 oka‐Harime, ngu‐Hadena; oka‐Merayoti, ngu‐Helekai;" 
Nehemiah12:16 oka‐Hido, ngu‐Zekariya; oka‐Ginetoni, ngu‐Meshulame;" 
Nehemiah12:17 oka‐Abiya, ngu‐Zikeri; oka‐Minyamine, oka‐Mohadiya, ngu‐Piletai;" 
Nehemiah12:18 oka‐Bilega, ngu‐Shamuha; oka‐Shemaya, ngu‐Jonatane;" 
Nehemiah12:19 noka‐Yoyaribe, ngu‐Matenai; oka‐Yedaya, ngu‐Huzi;" 
Nehemiah12:20 oka‐Salai, ngu‐Kalai; oka‐Hamoke, ngu‐Hebere;" 
Nehemiah12:21 oka‐Hilikiya, ngu‐Hashabiya; oka‐Yedaya, ngu‐Netaneli." 
Nehemiah12:22 Aba‐Levi emihleni ka‐Eliyashibe, n o‐Yoyada, no‐Johanane, no‐Yaduwa, baba̔lwa ngokuba zintloko zendlu zoyise; kwa nabaperisite, kwada kwako ubukumkani buka‐Dariyusi um‐Peresiya." 
Nehemiah12:23 Onyana baka‐Levi, intloko zendlu zoyise, bebeba̔lelwa encwadini yezikronike, kwada kwasemihleni ka‐Johanane unyana ka‐Eliyashibe." 
Nehemiah12:24 Nentloko zaba‐Levi, u‐Hashabiya, u‐Sherebiya, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Kadimele, nabazalwana babo malungana nabo, badumisa babulela, ngomyalelo ka‐Davide indoda katixo, uluhlu malungana noluhlu." 
Nehemiah12:25 U‐Mataniya, no‐Bakebukiya, u‐Hobadiya, u‐Meshulame, u‐Talimone, n o‐Hakube, bebengabalindimnyango begcina isigcino ezinkambilini zokubekela zamasango." 
Nehemiah12:26 Aba bebeko emihleni ka‐Yoyakime, unyana ka‐Yoshuwa, unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, nasemihleni ka‐Nehemiya inkosi, no‐Ezera umperisite, umba̔li." 
Nehemiah12:27 KEKALOKU ekutwasisweni kwodonga lwe‐Yerusaleme, kwafunwa aba‐Levi, kuzo zonke indawo zabo, ukuba baziswe e‐Yerusaleme, kuze kwenziwe ukutwasiswa ngokugcoba, nangokubulela, nangokuvuma, ngesimbali, na ngamaculo, nangehadi." 
Nehemiah12:28 Kwahlanganiswa nonyana babaculi, kwa nasezweni elibutafa elingqongayo i‐Yerusaleme, nasemizini yama‐Netofati," 
Nehemiah12:29 nase‐Bete‐gilegale, nasezindleni zase‐Geba ne‐Hazamaveti: ngokuba abaculi bebezakele imizi ngokungqonga i‐Yerusaleme." 
Nehemiah12:30 Bati abaperisite naba‐Levi bazicokisa; bandula bacokisa abantu, namasango, nodonga." 
Nehemiah12:31 Ndaza ndenyusa inkosi zakwa‐Juda pezu kwodonga, ndamisa amaqela mabini amakulu abayenza imibulelo nabahamba ngokuqoqoza, elati elinye laya ngasekunene pezu kwodonga ngasesangweni lenkunkuma:" 
Nehemiah12:32 nasemva kwabo kwahamba u‐Hoshaya, nesinye isiqingata senkosi zakwa‐Juda," 
Nehemiah12:33 no‐Hazariya, u‐Ezera, no‐Meshulame," 
Nehemiah12:34 u‐Juda, no‐Benjamine, no‐Shemaya, no‐Jeremiya;" 
Nehemiah12:35 nakubo onyana babaperisite benamaxilongo: u‐Zekariya, unyana ka‐Jonatane, unyana ka‐Shemaya, unyana ka‐Mataniya, unyana ka‐Mikaya, unyana ka‐Zakure, unyana ka‐Safa;" 
Nehemiah12:36 nabazalwana bake, u‐Shemaya, u‐Hazareli, u‐Milalai, u‐Gilalai, u‐Mahai, u‐Netaneli, no‐Juda, n o‐Hanani, benezinto zokuculisa zika‐Davide indoda katixo, u‐Ezera umba̔li epambi kwabo." 
Nehemiah12:37 Nangasesangweni lomtombo, namalungana nabo, benyuka ngezinyukelo zesixeko sika‐Davide, apo kunyukayo ukuya eludongeni, ngasentla kwendlu ka‐Davide, baya esangweni lamanzi ngasempumalanga." 
Nehemiah12:38 Nelesibini iqela labayenza imibulelo, elahamba malungana nelinye, kwahamba mna emva kwalo, nesinye isiqingata sabantu, pezu kwodonga, kwa sentla kwenqaba yamaziko kwada kwaseludongeni olubanzi;" 
Nehemiah12:39 nasentla kwesango lika‐Frayime, nasentla kwesango elidala, nasentla kwesango lentlanzi, nenqaba ye‐Hananele, nenqaba ye‐Meha, kwada kwalisango legusha: bada bema esangweni lentolongo." 
Nehemiah12:40 Aza ema amaqela omabini abayenza imibulelo endlwini katixo, nam, nesinye isiqingata samagosa kunye nam;" 
Nehemiah12:41 nabaperisite, u‐Eliyakime, u‐Mahaseya, u‐Minyamine, u‐Mikaya, u‐Eliwenai, u‐Zekariya, n o‐Hananiya, benamaxilongo;" 
Nehemiah12:42 no‐Mahaseya, no‐Shemaya, no‐Elezari, no‐Huzi, no‐Jehohanane, no‐Malekiya, no‐Helami, no‐Hezere. Baye abaculi bevakalisa, no‐Yizeraya umongama." 
Nehemiah12:43 Kanjalo ngalomini babinga imibingo emikulu, bagcoba; ngokuba utixo ebebagcobisile ngomgcobo omkulu: abafazi nabantwana bagcoba nabo: kwaza kwavakala umgcobo we‐Yerusaleme kwada kwakude." 
Nehemiah12:44 KWAYE kupatiswa ngeloxesha abatile pezu kwenkambili, ezendyebo, ezeminikelo, ezelibo, nezezishumi, kuze kuqokelelwe kuzo okwamasimi asezixekweni, izabelwa ezimiselwe abaperisite naba‐Levi ngumteto: ngokuba o‐Juda bebevuya pezu kwabaperisite napezu kwaba‐Levi abakonzayo." 
Nehemiah12:45 Bati nabaculi nabalindimnyango bagcina isigcinelo sotixo wabo, nesigcinelo sokucokisa, njengomyalelo ka‐Davide, no ka‐Solomone unyana wake:" 
Nehemiah12:46 ngokuba emihleni ka‐Davide no Safa, kwa kudala, bekuko intloko zabaculi, nengoma zendumiso nemibulelo kutixo." 
Nehemiah12:47 No‐Sirayeli bonke, emihleni ka‐Zerubabeli, nasemihleni ka‐Nehemiya, banika izabelwa zabaculi nabalindimnyango, into yemini ngemini yayo: kanjako bangcwalisela aba‐Levi, naba‐Levi bangcwalisela usapo luka‐Arone." 
Nehemiah13:1 NGEXESHA elo kwaleseshwa encwadini ka‐Mosesi ezindlebeni zabantu: kwaza kwafunyanwa kuba̔liwe kuyo, okokuba um‐Hamoni, umhlaumbi um‐Mowabi, akayi kungena emhlambini katixo kude kube ngunapakade;" 
Nehemiah13:2 ngenxa yokuba bebengezi nesonka namanzi ukukaulela usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nokuba bebemqesha ngakulo u‐Bilame, aze aluqalekise: kodwa utixo wetu waguqula isiqalekiso sibe litamsanqa." 
Nehemiah13:3 Kwaza kwati, nxa bebevile umteto, babahlula bonke abantu abadityanisiweyo ko‐Sirayeli." 
Nehemiah13:4 Kekaloku kungekabiko oku, u‐Eliyashibe umperisite, obemisiwe pezu kwenkambili yendlu katixo wetu, waba ngumhlobo ku‐Tobiya," 
Nehemiah13:5 wamenzela inkambili enkulu, apo bekufuda kubekelwa kona iminikelo yokudla, ne ntlakamhlope, nempahla, nezishumi zenqolowa, n ezeveyine entsha, nezeoli, ezibe zimiselwe aba‐Levi, nabaculi, nabalindimnyango; neminikelo yabaperisite." 
Nehemiah13:6 Kodwa ngalo lonke eli xesha, ndibe ndingeko e‐Yerusaleme: ngokuba ngomnyaka wamashumi matatu anesibini ka‐Aretashasheta ukumkani we‐Babilone, bendizile kukumkani; nasekupeleni kwemihla etile ndacela kukumkani ukuba ndibuye." 
Nehemiah13:7 Ndada ndafika e‐Yerusaleme, ndaqonda ngenkohlakalo ayenzileyo u‐Eliyashibe ngenxa yake u‐Tobiya, ngokumenzela inkambili emabaleni endlu katixo." 
Nehemiah13:8 Kwaza kwakubi kum kakulu: ngako ndakupa zonke impahla zendlu zika‐Tobiya ngapandle enkambilini. 
Nehemiah13:9 Ndaxela ke, bazicokisa inkambili: ndaza ndabuyisela kona impahla zendlu katixo, kunye nomnikelo wokudla, nentlakamhlope." 
Nehemiah13:10 Kanjako ndabona ukuba bekunganikwanga izabelwa zaba‐Levi: ngokuba aba‐Levi nabaculi, abawenza umsebenzi, bebesabele abanye ngabanye emasimini abo." 
Nehemiah13:11 Ndasuka ndapika namagosa, ndati: Yinina ukuba indlu katixo ishiyiwe? Ndaza ndabahlanganisa, ndabamisa endaweni yokuma yabo." 
Nehemiah13:12 Bandula o‐Juda bonke bazisa isishumi senqolowa, neseveyine entsha, neseoli, ezindaweni zendyebo." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ndaza ndenza abapati pezu kwendawo zendyebo, u‐Shelemiya umperisite, no‐Tsadoki umba̔li, no‐Pedaya kubo aba‐Levi; nasemva kwabo u‐Hanane, unyana ka‐Zakure, unyana ka‐Mataniya: ngokuba bebebalwa ngokuba nenyaniso, ekwaye kupezu kwabo ukwabela abazalwana babo." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ndikumbule, Tixo wam! ngako oku, uz’ ungacimi izenzo zam ezilungileyo endizenzeleyo indlu katixo wam, nezigcinelo zayo." 
Nehemiah13:15 Ngalomihla ndabona kwa‐Juda abaxovulayo isincinezelo seveyine ngesabata, nabangenisayo izitungu, nabatwesayo amaqwaṙashe; kwa neveyine, nedreyive, namakiwane, nemitwalo yonke, abati bayizisa e‐Yerusaleme ngomhla wesabata: ndaza ndanqi̔na ngakubo ngomhla batengisa ukutya ngawo." 
Nehemiah13:16 Kwahlala kona nabase‐Tire, abazisa intlanzi, nento zonke zokutengwa, batengisa elusatsheni luka‐Juda, nase‐Yerusaleme, ngesabata." 
Nehemiah13:17 Ndaza ndapika nemiduna yakwa‐Juda, ndati kuyo: Yinto nina lento ikohlakeleyo niyenzayo, ninco̔lisa nje umhla wesabata?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Abenje njalo na oyihlo benu, waza utixo wabuzisa pezu kwetu bonke obububi, napezu kwesisixeko? nani ke niyawandisa umsindo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli ngokunco̔lisa isabata." 
Nehemiah13:19 Kwaza kwati, nxa amasango e‐Yerusaleme atelwa ncwalazi ingekafiki icawa, ndaxela ke, kwavalwa ingcango; ndabuya ndaxela ukuba mazingavulwa kude kupele isabata; nakwizicaka zam ndamisa inxenye ngasemasangweni, ukuze kungangeniswa namnye umtwalo ngomhla wesabata." 
Nehemiah13:20 Bandula abatengi nabatengisi bezinto zonke zokutengwa balalisa ngapandle kwe‐Yerusaleme, kwakanye umhlaumbi kabini." 
Nehemiah13:21 Ngako ndanqi̔na ngakubo, ndati kubo: Yinina ukuba nilalise pambi kwodonga? nxa nipinda ukwenje njalo, ndobeka izandla pezu kwenu. Kuselokwexesha elo bebengezi ngesabata." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ndaza ndaxelela aba‐Levi ukuba bazicokise, beze bagcine amasango, kuze kwenziwe ngcwele umhla wesabata. Ndikumbulele oku nako, Tixo wam! ube nenceba kum ngabo ubuninzi bobubele bako." 
Nehemiah13:23 Kanjako ngalomihla ndabona ama‐Juda abezekile abafazi abangama‐Ashedodekazi, n aba‐Hamonikazi, nama‐Mowabikazi:" 
Nehemiah13:24 bati abantwana bawo inxenye bateta ngesi‐Ashedode, bengenakwazi ukuteta ngesi‐Juda; bateta ngenteto yabantu ngabantu." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ndaza ndapika nawo, ndawatuka, ndabeta amadoda atile kuwo, ndancotula inwele zawo, ndawafungisa utixo, ngokuti: Intombi zenu aniyi kuzendisa konyana babo, nentombi zabo aniyi kuzitabatela onyana benu, aniyi kuzizeka nani." 
Nehemiah13:26 Bekungengezizinto na wonayo u‐Solomone ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli? noko pakati kwezizwe ezininzi akwabiko ukumkani njengaye, owatandwa ngutixo wake, wada utixo wammisa ukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli bonke: kwa yena lowo abafazi bezinye intlanga bamenza one." 
Nehemiah13:27 Sesiya kupulapula kuni ke na, ukwenza konke okukukohlakala okukulu, senze ngobumenemene ngakuye utixo wetu ngokuzeka abafazi bezinye intlanga?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Kekaloku omnye konyana baka‐Yoyada, unyana ka‐Eliyashibe umperisite omkulu, ebengumyeni ku‐Sanebalati um‐Horonayime: ngako ndamgxota kum." 
Nehemiah13:29 Kumbula ngabo, Tixo wam! ngenxa yokuba benco̔lisile ubuperisite, nocebano lwobuperisite, nolwaba‐Levi." 
Nehemiah13:30 Kwa njalo ndabacokisa kubo bonke abezinye intlanga, ndamisa ukulinda kwabaperisite nokwaba‐Levi, abanye ngabanye emsebenzini wabo," 
Nehemiah13:31 nokunikelwa kwenkuni ngamaxesha amiselweyo, nokwelibo. Ndikumbule, Tixo wam! kube kokulungileyo." 
Esther1:1 KWAYE kute emihleni ka‐Hasheveroshe, (nguyena Hasheveroshe owapata ubukumkani kwa se‐Yindiya kwada kwase‐Tiyopiya, amazwana alikulu linamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe:)" 
Esther1:2 emihleni leyo, nxa ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe abehleli eteroneni yobukumkani bake, ebise‐Shushane komkulu," 
Esther1:3 ngowesitatu umnyaka wokupata kwake, wenzela zonke inkosi zake nezicaka zake isidlo: abamandla base‐Peresiya ne‐Medi, inkosi ezinkulu, nenkosi zamazwana, bebepambi kwake," 
Esther1:4 akubonakalisa ubutyebi bobungewalisa bobukumkani bake, nenkazimlo yobungangamsha bobukulu bake, imihla emininzi, imihla elikulu linamashumi asibozo." 
Esther1:5 Kekaloku kwakuzaliseka imihla leyo, wandula ukumkani wabenzela isidlo bonke abantu ababeko e‐Shushane komkulu, kwa nabakulu nabancinane, imihla yasixe̔nxe, ebaleni lomyezo woxande lwokumkani:" 
Esther1:6 amalengalenga alo ebengaweqiya emhlope, n eluhlaza, nezuluṙa, ebotshelelwe ngentambo zeqiya eshiceneyo nesibomvu kuyo imisesane yesilivere nakuzo intsika zamatye amhlope: izihlalo bezizezegolide nezesilivere, pezu kwesandlalwa samatye abomvu, namhlope, nalubelu, namnyama." 
Esther1:7 Kwaye kusezwa ngempahla zegolide, zingafani impahla enye nenye; kwabako neveyine eninzi yobukumkani, ngokwesisa sokumkani." 
Esther1:8 Nokusela bekungawo umteto; akwanyanzelwa mntu: ngokuba bekunjalo ukumkani ebemisele bonke abakulu bendlu yake, ukuba makwenziwe ngentando yabanye ngabanye." 
Esther1:9 Kanjako u‐Vashiti ukumkanikazi wenzela abafazi isidlo, endlwini yobukumkani abenayo ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe." 
Esther1:10 Ngowesixe̔nxe umhla, nxa intliziyo yokumkani ibicwayitile ngeveyine, waxelela u‐Mehumane, u‐Bizeta, u‐Harebona, u‐Bigeta, no‐Abageta, u‐Zetari, no‐Karekase, ababusi bosixe̔nxe abakonzayo ebusweni bokumkani u‐Hasheveroshe," 
Esther1:11 ukuba bamzise u‐Vashiti ukumkanikazi pambi kwokumkani, enesitsaba sobukumkani, aze abonise abantu nenkosi ubunzwakazi bake: ngokuba ebemhle ukubonakala kwake." 
Esther1:12 Kodwa ukumkanikazi u‐Vashiti wala ukuza ngelizwi lokumkani o walitumayo ngababusi abo: waza ukumkani waqumba kakulu, nomsindo wake wausitsha pakati kwake." 
Esther1:13 Wandula ukumkani wati kwizilumko, ezibe ziwazi amaxesha: (ngokuba belinjalo isiko lokumkani ebusweni babo bonke ababesazi umteto nokugweba:" 
Esther1:14 nabakufupi kuye, ngu‐Kareshena, u‐Shetari, u‐Ademata, u‐Tareshishe, u‐Meresi, u‐Maresena, n o‐Memukane, inkosi zosixe̔nxe zase‐Peresiya ne‐Medi ezibe zibona ubuso bokumkani, ezahlala zizezokuqala ebukumkanini:)" 
Esther1:15 Kuya kwenziwa nto nina kuye ukumkanikazi u‐Vashiti ngawo umteto, ngenxa yokuba engenzanga ingxelo yokumkani u‐Hasheveroshe ngababusi?" 
Esther1:16 Waza u‐Memukane wati ebusweni bokumkani nenkosi: u‐Vashiti ukumkanikazi akonelanga ukumkani yedwa, koko oneleyo zonke inkosi, nabo bonke abantu abakoyo kuwo onke amazwana okumkani u‐Hasheveroshe." 
Esther1:17 Ngokuba le ndawo yokumkanikazi iya kupumela kubo bonke abafazi, bade badele amadoda abo emehlweni abo, kwakutiwa: Ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe waxela ukuba makuziswe pambi kwake u‐Vashiti ukumkanikazi, kanti akeza." 
Esther1:18 Aya kutsho kwa namhla nje amakosikazi ase‐Peresiya ne‐Medi, avileyo indawo yokumkanikazi, kuzo zonke inkosi zokumkani; kwandul’ ukubako ubuninzi bokudela nomsindo." 
Esther1:19 Ukuba kunga kulungile kukumkani, makupume ilizwi lobukumkani kwa sebusweni bake, maliba̔lwe pakati kwemiteto yama‐Peresiya nama‐Medi, lize lingatshitshi, lokokuba u‐Vashiti angez’ angene ebusweni bokumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, nobukumkanikazi bake makabunike ukumkani kummelwanekazi wake omdlulayo ngokulunga." 
Esther1:20 Kwoti kwakuvakala umteto wokumkani aya kuwenza kubo bonke ubukumkani bake, (ngokuba bukulu bona,) bonke abafazi bowanika imbeko amadoda abo, kwa namakulu namancinane." 
Esther1:21 Laye ilizwi elo lilungile emehlweni okumkani nenkosi; waza ukumkani wenza ngalo ilizwi lika‐Memukane: 
Esther1:22 ngokuba wazituma incwadi kuwo onke amazwana okumkani, kwizwana ngezwana ngokuba̔la kwalo, nakwabantu ngabantu ngenteto yabo, zokuba onke amadoda abe nobukosi ezindlwini zawo, atete ngenteto yabantu bakowawo." 
Esther2:1 EMVENI kwezizinto, kwakudamba umsindo wokumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, wakumbula u‐Vashiti, noko abekwenzile, noko bekugwetyiwe ngaye." 
Esther2:2 Zaza izicaka zokumkani ezamkonzayo zati kuye: Makufunelwe ukumkani intombi zipela, ezintle ukubonakala kwazo:" 
Esther2:3 makamise ukumkani amagosa kuwo onke amazwana obukumkani bake, ukuba ahlanganisele e‐Shushane komkulu zonke intombi zipela ezintle ukubonakala kwazo, endlwini yamankazana, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Hegai umbusi wokumkani, umgcini wamankazana; kanjalo makunikwe izinto zokuhlanjululwa kwazo:" 
Esther2:4 iti intombi elungileyo emehlweni okumkani ibe ngukumkanikazi esikundleni sika‐Vashiti. Yabilungile londawo emehlweni okumkani: wenje njalo ke. 
Esther2:5 Kwaye kuko e‐Shushane komkulu indoda engum‐Juda, egama lingu‐Modekai, unyana ka‐Yahire, unyana kaShimehi, unyana ka‐Kishe, um‐Benjamine;" 
Esther2:6 ebifudusiwe e‐Yerusaleme kunye nabatinjwa abebefudusiwe no‐Yekoniya ukumkani wo‐Juda, lowo u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani wase‐Babilone wamfudusayo." 
Esther2:7 Yati ke yona yamondla u‐Hadasa, (okwa nguye u‐Esetere, intombi yoyisekazi wayo,) ngokuba ebengenayise nonina: intombi leyo ibintle nangesimilo nangokubonakala, owati u‐Modekai, xeshekweni bebefile uyise nonina, wayitabata ibe yintombi yake." 
Esther2:8 Kwaza kwati, nxa bekuvakele ilizwi lokumkani nomteto wake, nanxa intombi ezininzi bezihlanganiselwe e‐Shushane komkulu, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Hegai, kwasiwa no‐Esetere endlwini yokumkani, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Hegai umgcini wamankazana." 
Esther2:9 Yaye intombi leyo ibilungile emehlweni ake, yazuza ububele pambi kwake; ngako wanxama ukuyinika izinto zokuhlanjululwa kwayo, nezabelwa zayo, nentombi zisixe̔nxe ezazifunwa ukuba zinikwe kuyo zivela endlwini yokumkani: waza wabeka yona nentombi zayo kwelungileyo indawo yendlu yamankazana." 
Esther2:10 Ebengaxelanga u‐Esetere abantu bake nokwalamana kwake: ngokuba u‐Modekai ebemyalele ukuba angaxeli. 
Esther2:11 Kekaloku u‐Modekai wahamba imihla yonke pambi kwebala lendlu yamankazana, ukuze akwazi ukupila kuka‐Esetere, nento aya kwenzelwa yona." 
Esther2:12 Kwati kwakufika ixesha lentombi ngentombi lokuba ingene kukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, emveni kwokuba ibe ifezile inyanga ezilishumi linambini, njengesiko lamankazana; (ngokuba bekunjalo ukuzalisekiswa kwemihla yokuhlanjululwa kwazo, esinye isitandatu senyanga kwenziwa ngamafuta emore, nesinye isitandatu senyanga ngezimnandi, nange zinye izinto zokuhlanjululwa kwamankazana:)" 
Esther2:13 yandula oko intombi leyo yangena kukumkani: konke ebikucela yanikwa kuyo, kupume nayo endlwini yamankazana kuye endlwini yokumkani." 
Esther2:14 Ngokuhlwa yangena, nangokusa yabuyela kweyesibini indlu yamankazana, ngapantsi kwesandla sika‐Shahashegaze umbusi wokumkani, umgcini wamashweshwe: akangena kanjako kukumkani, kupela nxa ukumkani wayikolelayo, na nxa ibibizwa ngegama." 
Esther2:15 Kekaloku kwakufika ixesha lika‐Esetere, intombi ka‐Abihayili, uyisekazi ka‐Modekai, obemtabatile abe yintombi yake, lokuba angene kukumkani, akafuna nto, kupela oko u‐Hegai umbusi wokumkani, umgcini wamankazana, wamxelelayo. Waye u‐Esetere wafumana ufefe emehlweni abo bonke abambonayo." 
Esther2:16 Kwa njalo u‐Esetere wasiwa kukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, endlwini yake yobukumkani, ngenyanga yeshumi, eyinyanga yo‐Tebete, ngowesixe̔nxe umnyaka wobukumkani bake." 
Esther2:17 Waza ukumkani wamtanda u‐Esetere pezu kwawo onke amankazana; wayefumana ufefe nobubele ebusweni bake ngapezu kwazo zonke intombi; wada wabeka isitsaba sobukumkani entlokweni yake, wamenza ukumkanikazi esikundleni sika‐Vashiti." 
Esther2:18 Wandula ukumkani wenzela zonke inkosi zake nezicaka zake isidlo esikulu, isidlo sika‐Esetere; kanjalo wenzela amazwana ukupumla, wapa amabaso, ngokwesisa sokumkani." 
Esther2:19 Kwati kwakuhlanganiswa intombi ngokwesibini, wandula wahlala u‐Modekai esangweni lokumkani." 
Esther2:20 U‐Esetere ebengaxelanga ukwalamana kwake nabantu bake, njengokuba ebemyalele u‐Modekai: ngokuba u‐Esetere ebesenza ingxelo ka‐Modekai, njengokuya abesondliwa nguye." 
Esther2:21 NGALEYOMIHLA, nxa u‐Modekai ebehlala esangweni lokumkani, baqumba u‐Bigitana no‐Tereshe, ababusi ababini bokumkani, kubo abagcini bomnyango, bafuna ukwolula isandla ngakuye ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe." 
Esther2:22 Yada yazeka lonto ku‐Modekai, owayishumayela ku‐Esetere ukumkanikazi; wati u‐Esetere wamxelela ukumkani egameni lika‐Modekai." 
Esther2:23 Kwati kwakubuzwa indawo leyo, yafunyanwa njalo ke; ngako baxo̔nywa bobabini emtini: yaza yaba̔lwa encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla ebusweni bokumkani." 
Esther3:1 EMVENI kwezizinto ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe wamenza mkulu u‐Hamani, unyana ka‐Medata, um‐Hagagi, wampakamisa, wamisa isihlalo sake ngapezu kw es azo zonke inkosi ezibe zinaye." 
Esther3:2 Kekaloku zonke izicaka zokumkani, ezibe zisesangweni lokumkani, zaguqa zaziqubuda pambi kwoHamani: ngokuba ukumkani ebeyalele njalo ngaye. Kodwa u‐Modekai akaguqa, akaziqubuda kanjako." 
Esther3:3 Zaza izicaka zokumkani, ezibe zisesangweni lokumkani, zati ku‐Modekai: Yinina ukuba uwugqite umyalelo wokumkani?" 
Esther3:4 Kwaye kute, nxa zateta naye imihla ngemihla, kanti akapulapula kuzo, zandula zamxelela u‐Hamani, ukuze zibone ukuba amazwi ka‐Modekai aya kuma kusinina: ngokuba ebezixelele ukuba ungum‐Juda." 
Esther3:5 Wati akubona u‐Hamani ukuba u‐Modekai akaguqa, nokuba akaziqubuda pambi kwake, wandula u‐Hamani wazala ngumsindo." 
Esther3:6 Kodwa kwadeleka emehlweni ake ukwolula isandla ngakuye u‐Modekai yedwa: ngokuba bebexele kuye abantu baka‐Modekai: ngako wafuna u‐Hamani ukutshabalalisa onke ama‐Juda abekubo bonke ubukumkani buka‐Hasheveroshe, abantu baka‐Modekai." 
Esther3:7 Ngenyanga yokuqala, ekwa yinyanga yo‐Nisane, ngoweshumi linesibini umnyaka wokumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, kwawiswa i‐Puri, oko kukuti, iqashiso, ebusweni buka‐Hamani, kwimini ngemini, nakwinyanga ngenyanga, kwada kwakuyo eyeshumi linesibini inyanga, ekwa yinyanga yo‐Adari." 
Esther3:8 Waza u‐Hamani wati kuye ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe: Kuko abantu abatile betiwe sa bahlukene pakati kwezizwe, kuwo onke amazwana obukumkani bako; imiteto yabo yahlukile kw ey abantu bonke; nemiteto yokumkani abayenzi: ngako akufanelekile kukumkani ukuba abavume." 
Esther3:9 Ukuba kunga kulungile kukumkani, makuba̔lwe ukuba babujiswe: ndandiya kuzilinganisela ezandleni zabo bawenza umsebenzi, italente zesilivere ezingamawaka alishumi, ukuba ziziswe ezindyetyeni zokumkani." 
Esther3:10 Waza ukumkani watula umsesane wake esandleni sake, wawunika ku‐Hamani, unyana ka‐Medata, um‐Hagagi, utshaba lwama‐Juda." 
Esther3:11 Wayesiti ukumkani ku‐Hamani: Upiwe isilivere leyo, nabantu abo, uze wenze ngabo njengokulungileyo emehlweni ako." 
Esther3:12 Kwandula kwabizwa ababa̔li bokumkani, ngoweshumi linesitatu umhla wenyanga yokuqala, kwaba̔lwa ke, njengako konke abeyalela ngako u‐Hamani, kuzo inkosi ezinkulu zokumkani, nakuzo inkosi ezibe zipezu kwezwana ngezwana, nakubo abapati babantu ngabantu, izwana ngezwana njengokuba̔la kwalo, nabantu ngabantu njengenteto yabo: kwaye kuba̔lwa egameni lokumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, kwancanyatiselwa ngomsesane wokumkani kanjalo." 
Esther3:13 Kwaza kwatunywa incwadi ngezigidimi kuwo onke amazwana okumkani, zokuba kutshatyalaliswe, kubulawe, kubujiswe bonke abangama‐Juda, kwa nabatsha nabadala, intsapo nabafazi, emhleni mnye, koweshumi linesitatu umhla wenyanga yeshumi linesibini, eyinyanga yo‐Adari, nokuba kupangwe amaxoba abo." 
Esther3:14 Isitsho sesiba̔lo besisesokuba kunikwe umteto kuwo onke amazwana ngamanye, utyileka kubo bonke abantu, ukuba babe belungile ngomhla lowo," 
Esther3:15 izigidimi zapuma ke, zinxanyisiwe lilizwi lokumkani; wati umteto lowo wanikwa nase‐Shushane komkulu. Baza ukumkani no‐Hamani bahlala pantsi ukusela; kodwa isixeko se‐Shushane besixakekile." 
Esther4:1 WATI u‐Modekai akukwazi konke okube kwenziwe, wandula u‐Modekai waṙazula izivato zake, wambata intlakantlaka notutu, wapuma waya pakati kwesixeko, wakala ngesikalo esikulu esiṙaṙa;" 
Esther4:2 weza kude kwapambi kwesango lokumkani: ngokuba bekungengenwe mntu esangweni lokumkani eyambete intlakantlaka. 
Esther4:3 Nakuwo onke amazwana ngamanye, apo kwafika kona ilizwi lokumkani nomteto wake, bekuko usizi olukulu pakati kwama‐Juda, nokuzila ukutya, nokulila, nesijwili; bati abaninzi balala pezu kwentlakantlaka notutu." 
Esther4:4 Zandula zeza izicakazana zika‐Esetere nababusi bake, bamxelela. Waza ukumkanikazi waba buhlungu kakulu; watuma izivato ukuba kuvatiswe u‐Modekai, nokuba kususwe kuye intlakantlaka yake: kodwa akazamkela." 
Esther4:5 Wandula u‐Esetere wambiza u‐Hataki, owababusi bokumkam, lowo abemmisele ukukonza kuye, wamyalezela ku‐Modekai, kuze kwaziwe lento ukuba iyinto nina, nokuba inganina." 
Esther4:6 Wapuma u‐Hataki waya ku‐Modekai, enkundleni yesixeko ebipambi kwesango lokumkani." 
Esther4:7 Waza u‐Modekai wamxelela konke obekumhlile, nesishumayelo sesilivere abete u‐Hamani uya kuyilinganisela ezindyetyeni zokumkani ngenxa yama‐Juda, ukuze abujiswe." 
Esther4:8 Nesitsho sesiba̔lo somteto esibe sinikwe e‐Shushane, sokuba atshatyalaliswe, wasinika kuye, ukuze ambonise u‐Esetere, amshumayeze, amyalele ukuba angene kukumkani ukutaṙuzisa kuye, nokubongozela abantu bake ebusweni bake." 
Esther4:9 Wasuka weza u‐Hataki wamxelela u‐Esetere amazwi ka‐Modekai. 
Esther4:10 Wabuya wateta u‐Esetere ku‐Hataki, wamyalezela ku‐Modekai, esiti:" 
Esther4:11 Ziyazi zonke izicaka zokumkani, nabantu bamazwana okumkani, ukuba umntu, nokuba uyindoda nokuba uyinkazana, osukuba engena kukumkani ekusini lapakati, ongabizwanga, ngumteto wake umnye ukuba afiswe, ngapandle kwalowo aya kuti ukumkani olulele kuye intonga yegolide, aze apile: kodwa mna, andibizwanga ukuba ndingene kukumkani kuse kuntsuku ezimashumi matatu." 
Esther4:12 Bamxelela ke u‐Modekai amazwi ka‐Esetere. 
Esther4:13 Waza u‐Modekai wati ukupendula ku‐Esetere: Ningabi pakati kwako uya kusinda wena endlwini yokumkani, ngapezu kwawo onke ama‐Juda." 
Esther4:14 Ngokuba nxa ugqibela ukuti cwaka ngelixesha, kwopakamela ama‐Juda umciza nosindiso luvela kwiyimbi indawo; kodwa wena nendlu kayihlo niya kububa: ngubanina ke owaziyo, ukuba akufikelanga na ebukumkanini ngenxa yexesha elinjengeli?" 
Esther4:15 Waza u‐Esetere wati ukupendula ku‐Modekai: 
Esther4:16 Hamba, hlanganisa onke ama‐Juda akoyo e‐Shushane, nenze inzilo ngenxa yam, nize ningadli ningaseli nokusela imihla ibe mitatu, ebusuku nasemini: kanjalo nam, nezicakazana zam, siya kuyenza inzilo enjalo; ndandule ukungena ngokunjalo kukumkani, okungalungelene nomteto: ukuba ke ndiyabuba, ndiyabuba." 
Esther4:17 Waza wemka u‐Modekai, wenza ngako konke u‐Esetere wabemyalela ngako." 
Esther5:1 Kwaye kute ngowesitatu umhla, wandula wambata u‐Esetere izivato zobukumkani, wema kwelapakati ikusi lendlu yokumkani, malungana nendlu yokumkani: waye ukumkani ehleli esihlalweni sake sobukumkani, ngasendlwini yobukumkani, malungana nocango lwendlu." 
Esther5:2 Kwaza kwati, nxa ukumkani wambona u‐Esetere ukumkanikazi emi ekusini, waselezuza ufefe emehlweni ake: wasuka ukumkani wayolulela ku‐Esetere intonga yegolide ebisesandleni sake; waza wasondela u‐Esetere wapata incam yentonga." 
Esther5:3 Wayesiti ukumkani kuye: Ufuna nto nina, kumkanikazi Esetere? siyinto nina isikungo sako? sonikwa kuwe nakude kube sisiqingata sobukumkani." 
Esther5:4 Wayesiti u‐Esetere: Ukuba kunga kulungile kukumkani, makeze ukumkani no‐Hamani namhla esidlweni endimlungisele sona." 
Esther5:5 Wandula wati ukumkani: Nxamisani u‐Hamani, ukuba enze ngalo ilizwi lika‐Esetere. Kwa njalo ukumkani no‐Hamani beza esidlweni abesilungisile u‐Esetere." 
Esther5:6 Waza ukumkani wati ku‐Esetere, esidlweni seveyine: Siyinto nina isicelo sako? sesiya kunikwa kuwe; siyinto nina nesikungo sako? siya kufezwa nakude kube sisiqingata sobukumkani." 
Esther5:7 Wapendula u‐Esetere, wati: Isicelo sam nesikungo sam sesokuti:" 
Esther5:8 Ukuba ndifumene ufefe emehlweni okumkani, nokuba kunga kulungile kukumkani ukunika isicelo sam, nokufeza isikungo sam, makeze ukumkani no‐Hamani esidlweni endiya kubalungisela sona, ndandiya kuti ngomso ndenze ngalo ilizwi lokumkani." 
Esther5:9 WAZA u‐Hamani wapuma ngalomini evuya, enentliziyo ecwayitileyo: kodwa xeshekweni u‐Hamani wambona u‐Modekai esangweni lokumkani, ukuba akasuki, nokuba akashukumi ngenxa yake, waselezala ngumsindo u‐Hamani ngakuye u‐Modekai." 
Esther5:10 Wazinyanzela u‐Hamani noko, weza endlwini yake: waza watuma wabiza izihlobo zake, no‐Zereshe umfazi wake." 
Esther5:11 Wandula u‐Hamani wababalisela ubungcwalisa bobutyebi bake, nobuninzi babantwana bake, nako konke ukumkani abemenze mkulu ngako, nokokuba ebempakamisile ngapezu kwenkosi nezicaka zokumkani." 
Esther5:12 Walekela wati u‐Hamani: Ewe, u‐Esetere ukumkanikazi akangenisa mntu kunye nokumkani esidlweni abesilungisile, kupela mna; kanjalo nangomso ndimenyelwe kuye kunye nokumkani." 
Esther5:13 Kodwa konke oku akundincedi luto, nxa ndisabona u‐Modekai um‐Juda ehleli esangweni lokumkani." 
Esther5:14 Waza wati kuye u‐Zereshe umfazi wake, nazo zonke izihlobo zake: Makulungiswe umti ube zikubite ezimashumi mahlanu ubude bawo, uti kwakusa utete kukumkani ukuba u‐Modekai makaxo̔nywe pezu kwawo; wandule ungene nokumkani esidlweni unokuvuya. Yabilungile lento ku‐Hamani, wawulungisa umti." 
Esther6:1 Ngobobusuku ukumkani wemkelwa bubutongo; waza waxela ukuba kuziswe incwadi yezikumbuzelo, e yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla, eyabileseshwa ebusweni bokumkani." 
Esther6:2 Kwafunyanwa kuba̔liwe okokuba u‐Modekai ebeshumayele ngo‐Bigitana no‐Tereshe, ababusi ababini bokumkani, kubo abagcini bomnyango, abafuna ukwolula isandla ngakuye ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe." 
Esther6:3 Wayesiti ukumkani: Yiyipina imbeko nobukulu obenziweyo ku‐Modekai ngenxa yoku? Zaza izicaka zokumkani, ezakonza kuye, zati: Akwenziwanga nto kuye." 
Esther6:4 Wayesiti ukumkani: Ngubanina osebaleni? (Kekaloku u‐Hamani ebefikile ebaleni langapandle lendlu yokumkani, ukuza kuteta naye ukuba amxo̔me u‐Modekai pezu kwomti abemlungisele wona.)" 
Esther6:5 Zaza izicaka zokumkani zati kuye: Nankuya u‐Hamani emi ebaleni. Wayesiti ukumkani: Makangene. 
Esther6:6 Waza u‐Hamani wangena. Wayesiti ukumkani kuye: Kuya kwenziwa nto nina kulondoda ukumkani ayitandayo imbeko yayo? Wandula u‐Hamani wati entliziyweni yake: Ngubanina atanda ukumkani ukumenzela imbeko ngapandle kwam? 
Esther6:7 Ngako u‐Hamani wati kukumkani: Indoda, ayitandayo ukumkani imbeko yayo," 
Esther6:8 makuyiziselwe isivato sobukumkani avata ngaso ukumkani, nehashe akwela ukumkani pezu kwalo; nesitsaba sobukumkani masibekwe entloko yayo:" 
Esther6:9 kuze kunikwe esosivato nelohashe esandleni senye kuzo inkosi ezinkulu zokumkani, kuvatiswe indoda leyo ukumkani ayitandayo imbeko yayo, kwenzwe ukuba ikwele pezu kwehashe ihambe esitarateni sesixeko, kudandulukwe pambi kwayo ngokuti: Kuya kwenjwa njalo kwindoda leyo ukumkani ayitandayo imbeko yayo." 
Esther6:10 Waza ukumkani wati ku‐Hamani: Nxama, utabate isivato eso nehashe elo, njengokuba utshilo, uze wenje njalo ku‐Modekai um‐Juda, ohleliyo esangweni lokumkani: mayingatshitshi nanye into kuko konke ukutetileyo." 
Esther6:11 Wandula u‐Hamani watabata esosivato nelohashe, wamvatisa u‐Modekai, wamkwelisa ahambe esitarateni sesixeko, wadanduluka pambi kwake ngokuti: Kuya kwenjwa njalo kwindoda leyo ukumkani ayitandayo imbeko yayo." 
Esther6:12 Wabuya u‐Modekai waya esangweni lokumkani. Kodwa u‐Hamani wanxamela ukuya endlwini yake, elusizi, egqubutele intloko."
