Esther6:13 Waza u‐Hamani wambalisela u‐Zereshe umfazi wake, nazo zonke izihlobo zake, konke obekumhlile. Ayesiti kuye amalumko ake, no‐Zereshe umfazi wake: Ukuba u‐Modekai ungowenzalo yama‐Juda, osel’ uqalile ukuwa pambi kwake, akusayi kumeyisa, koko uya kuwa ngenyaniso pambi kwake." 
Esther6:14 NXA basateta naye, kwafika ababusi bokumkani, banxama ukumzisa u‐Hamani esidlweni abesilungisile u‐Esetere." 
Esther7:1 Wandula wangena ukumkani no‐Hamani ukusela no‐Esetere ukumkanikazi. 
Esther7:2 Wayesiti ukumkani ku‐Esetere, nangomhla wesibini, esidlweni seveyine: Siyinto nina isicelo sako, kumkanikazi Esetere? sesiya kunikwa kuwe; siyinto nina nesikungo sako? siya kufezwa nakude kube sisiqingata sobukumkani." 
Esther7:3 Wandula wapendula u‐Esetere ukumkanikazi, wati: Ukuba ndifumene ufefe emehlweni ako, kumkani! nokuba kunga kulungile kukumkani, mandinikwe ubomi bam ngesicelo sam, nabantu bam ngesikungo sam:" 
Esther7:4 ngokuba sitengelwe, mna nabantu bam, ukutshatyalaliswa, ukubulawa, nokubujiswa. Ukuba kodwa sibe sitengelwe ukuba ngamakonza namakonzakazi, bendiya kuti cwaka, nangona utshaba lungenako ukwenzelelela ukwonakala kwokumkani." 
Esther7:5 Waza wapendula ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, wati ku‐Esetere ukumkanikazi: Ngubanina lo, upina lo, ontliziyo imkalipisile ukwenje njalo?" 
Esther7:6 Wayesiti u‐Esetere: Utshaba nempi ngu‐Hamani lo okohlakeleyo. Wandula woyika u‐Hamani ebusweni bokumkani nokumkanikazi. 
Esther7:7 Wesuka ukumkani ngomsindo wake esidlweni seveyine, waya emyezweni woxande: wema no‐Hamani, ukuba abongozele ubomi bake ku‐Esetere ukumkanikazi; ngokuba ebebona ukuba ububi bugqityiwe ngakuye ngukumkani." 
Esther7:8 Wati akubuya ukumkani emyezweni woxande ukuza endlwini yesidlo seveyine, kekaloku u‐Hamani ebewile pezu kwomandlalo u‐Esetere abepezu kwawo. Wandula wati ukumkani: Kanene uya kumdlwengula ukumkanikazi na enam endlwini? Lisapuma ilizwi emlonyeni wokumkani, bagubungela ubuso buka‐Hamani." 
Esther7:9 Wayesiti u‐Harebona, omnye kubo ababusi, ebusweni bokumkani: Kanjako bona ke, lomti u‐Hamani wawenzela u‐Modekai, obetetele ukumkani okulungileyo, umi endlwini ka‐Hamani, uzikubite ezimashumi mahlanu ubude bawo. Wati ke ukumkani: Mxo̔meni pezu kwawo." 
Esther7:10 Baza bamxo̔ma u‐Hamani emtini abewulungisele u‐Modekai. Kwand’ ukudamba umsindo wokumkani. 
Esther8:1 Ngalomini ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe wamnika u‐Esetere ukumkanikazi indlu ka‐Hamani, utshaha lwama‐Juda: no‐Modekai yena weza ebusweni bokumkani; ngokuba u‐Esetere ebexele into uyiyo kuye." 
Esther8:2 Waza ukumkani watula umsesane wake abewususile ku‐Hamani, wawunika ku‐Modekai. Kanjalo u‐Esetere wambeka u‐Modekai pezu kwendlu ka‐Hamani." 
Esther8:3 WALEKELA u‐Esetere wateta ebusweni bokumkani, wawa ngasezinyaweni zake, walila inyembezi, wataṙuzisa kuye ukuba akwelelise ububi buka‐Hamani um‐Hagagi, neqinga lake waliqingayo ngakuwo ama‐Juda." 
Esther8:4 Wandula ukumkani wayolulela ku‐Esetere intonga yegolide. Waselesuka u‐Esetere, wema pambi kwokumkani," 
Esther8:5 wati: Ukuba kunga kulungile kukumkani, nokuba ndifumene ufefe ebusweni bake, nokuba ifanelekile lento pambi kwokumkani, nokuba ndikolekile mna emehlweni ake, makuba̔lwe ukuba kubuyiswe incwadi n eqinga lika‐Hamani unyana ka‐Medata, um‐Hagagi, owaba̔layo ukuba kubujiswe ama‐Juda akuwo onke amazwana okumkani." 
Esther8:6 Ngokuba ndingati nina ukuba namandla okuba ndibone ububi obuya kuhlela abantu bam? ndingati nina kanjalo ukuba namandla okuba ndibone imbujiswa yezalamane zam? 
Esther8:7 Waza wati ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe kuye u‐Esetere ukumkanikazi, nakuye u‐Modekai um‐Juda: Bona ke, indlu ka‐Hamani ndiyinikile ku‐Esetere, naye yena bamxo̔mile emtini, ngenxa yokuba wolula isandla sake ngakuwo ama‐Juda." 
Esther8:8 Ba̔lelani ama‐Juda nani, njengoko kulungileyo emehlweni enu, egameni lokumkani, nincamatisele ngomsesane wokumkani: ngokuba isiba̔lo, esiba̔liweyo egameni lokumkani, nesincanyatiselweyo ngomsesane wokumkani, kungeko mntu ongasibuyisayo." 
Esther8:9 Kwandula kwabizwa ababa̔li bokumkani ngexesha elo, ngenyanga yesitatu, ekwa yinyanga yo‐Sivane, ngowamashumi mabini anesitatu umhla wayo; kwaza kwaba̔lwa ngako konke wakuyalelayo u‐Modekai, kuma‐Juda, nakuzo inkosi ezinkulu, nenkosi nabapati bamazwana, a tabata e‐Yindiya kude kwase‐Tiyopiya, amazwana alikulu linamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe, izwana ngezwana njengokuba̔la kwalo, nabantu ngabantu njengenteto yabo; nakuwo ama‐Juda, njengokuba̔la kwawo, nanjengenteto yawo." 
Esther8:10 Kwaye kuba̔lwa ke egameni lokumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, kwancanyatiselwa ngomsesane wokumkani kanjalo; kwaza kwatunywa incwadi ngesandla sezigidimi pezu kwamahashe, zikwele emahasheni anamendu, nas emaqwaṙaṙeni, amatole amahashekazi:" 
Esther8:11 zokuba ukumkani wavumela ama‐Juda, akuzo zonke izixeko ngazinye, ukuzihlanganisa, nokupakamela ubomi bawo, ukutshabalalisa, ukubulala, nokububisa, onke amandla abantu nezwana, abaya kuwapata ngobutshaba, intsapo nabafazi, nokupanga amaxoba abo," 
Esther8:12 emhleni mnye, kuwo onke amazwana okumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, koweshumi linesitatu umhla wenyanga yeshumi linesibini, ekwa yinyanga yo‐Adari." 
Esther8:13 Isitsho sesiba̔lo besisesokuba kunikwe umteto kuwo onke amazwana ngamanye, utyileka kubo bonke abantu; nokuba ama‐Juda abe elungile ngomhla lowo, ukuze azipindezelele ezintshabeni zawo." 
Esther8:14 Kekaloku izigidimi, zikwele emahasheni anamendu nas emaqwaṙaṙeni, zapuma zikaulezisiwe zinxanyisiwe nokunxanyiswa lilizwi lokumkani. Kwanikwa lomteto e‐Shushane komkulu." 
Esther8:15 Waza u‐Modekai wapuma ebusweni bokumkani, enesivato sobukumkani seqiya ezuluṙa nemhlope, nesitsaba esikulu segolide, nengubo yeqiya eshiceneyo nebomvu: sati isixeko se‐Shushane sagcoba, savuya." 
Esther8:16 Ama‐Juda ebenokukanya, novuyo, nomgcobo, nembeko." 
Esther8:17 Nakuwo onke amazwana ngamanye, nakuzo zonke izixeko ngazinye, apo lisukuba lafikela kona ilizwi lokumkani nomteto wake, ama‐Juda ebenovuyo nomgcobo, ebenesidlo nomhla omnandi. Baza abaninzi ebantwini belizwe baba ngama‐Juda; ngokuba ukwoyikwa kwama‐Juda bekuwile pezu kwabo." 
Esther9:1 KEKALOKU ngenyanga yeshumi linesibini, ekwa yinyanga yo‐Adari, ngoweshumi elinesitatu umhla wayo, okuya bekuza kufika ukwenziwa kwelizwi lokumkani nomteto wake, ngomhla ezati intshaba zama‐Juda zatembela ukuba zibe namandla pezu kwawo, (kodwa kwaguqulwa oko, ngokuba ama‐Juda wona ebenamandla pezu kwabatiyi bawo,)" 
Esther9:2 ahlanganisana ama‐Juda ezixekweni zawo, kuwo onke amazwana okumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, ukuze abeke isandla pezu kwabo bakufunayo ukwenzakala kwawo: akwabiko mntu obenako ukuma ebusweni bawo; ngokuba ukwoyikwa kwawo bekuwile pezu kwabobantu bonke." 
Esther9:3 Kanjalo abapati bamazwana, nenkosi ezinkulu, nenkosi, nabo bawenza umsebenzi wokumkani, bawanceda ama‐Juda; ngokuba ukwoyikwa kuka‐Modekai bekuwile pezu kwabo:" 
Esther9:4 ngokuba ebemkulu u‐Modekai endlwini yokumkani, nodumo lwake lwapumela kuwo onke amazwana: ngokuba lendoda, u‐Modekai, yamana yaba nkulu." 
Esther9:5 Aza ama‐Juda abeta zonke intshaba zawo ngokubeta kweṙele, nangesibulalo, nangembubiso, enza ngokutanda kwawo kubo abatiyi bawo," 
Esther9:6 nase‐Shushane komkulu ama‐Juda abulala abubisa amadoda amakulu mahlanu. 
Esther9:7 No‐Pareshandata, no‐Dalifone, no‐Asepata," 
Esther9:8 no‐Porata, no‐Adaliya, no‐Aridata," 
Esther9:9 no‐Paremasheta, no‐Arisai, no‐Aridai, no‐Vayezata," 
Esther9:10 onyana boshumi baka‐Hamani unyana ka‐Medata, utshaba lwama‐Juda, ababulala; kodwa impango akabeka izandla zawo pezu kwayo." 
Esther9:11 Ngalomini kwaziswa pambi kwokumkani inani lababuleweyo e‐Shushane komkulu. 
Esther9:12 Waza ukumkani wati ku‐Esetere ukumkanikazi: e‐Shushane komkulu ama‐Juda abulele abubisa amadoda amakulu mahlanu, nonyana boshumi baka‐Hamani; enze nto nina kuwo amanye amazwana okumkani? kekaloku siyinto nina isicelo sako? sesiya kunikwa kuwe: siseyinto nina isikungo sako? siya kwenzwa ke." 
Esther9:13 Wandula wati u‐Esetere: Ukuba kunga kulungile kukumkani, makuvunyelwe ama‐Juda ase‐Shushane nangomso, ukuba enze ngawo umteto wanamhla, nonyana boshumi baka‐Hamani mabaxo̔nywe emtini." 
Esther9:14 Waxela ukumkani ukuba makwenjwe njalo: kwaza kwanikwa umteto e‐Shushane, kwaxo̔nywa onyana boshumi baka‐Hamani." 
Esther9:15 Ahlanganisana ke ama‐Juda ase‐Shushane nangoweshumi linesine umhla wenyanga yo‐Adari, abulala amadoda amakulu matatu e‐Shushane; kodwa impango akabeka izandla zawo pezu kwayo." 
Esther9:16 Kanjalo amanye ama‐Juda abesemazwaneni okumkani ahlanganisana, apakamela ubomi bawo, apumla ezintshabeni zawo, abulala kubatiyi bawo amawaka angamashumi asixe̔nxe enesihlanu, (kodwa impango akabeka izandla zawo pezu kwayo,)" 
Esther9:17 ngoweshumi linesitatu umhla wenyanga yo‐Adari; nangoweshumi elinesine umhla wayo apumla ke, awenza wona umhla wesidlo novuyo." 
Esther9:18 Kodwa ama‐Juda abese‐Shushane ahlanganisana ngoweshumi linesitatu umhla wayo, nangoweshumi linesine umhla wayo; apumla ke ngoweshumi linesihlanu umhla wayo, awenza wona umhla wesidlo novuyo." 
Esther9:19 Ngako oko ama‐Juda asemizini, lawo ahlala ezixekweni zapandle, awenza oweshumi linesine umhla wenyanga yo‐Adari owovuyo nesidlo, nomhla omnandi, nowokutumelana izabelwa." 
Esther9:20 WAZA u‐Modekai waba̔la ezizinto, wazituma incwadi kuwo onke ama‐Juda abekuwo onke amazwana okumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, lawo akufupi nalawo akude," 
Esther9:21 ukuze kuqiniswe pezu kwawo, ukuba abambe oweshumi linesine umhla wenyanga yo‐Adari, noweshumi linesihlanu umhla wayo, kuyo yonke iminyaka ngaminye," 
Esther9:22 njengokuba iyimihla apumla ngayo ama‐Juda ezintshabeni zawo, nenyanga ebekuwaguqulelwa usizi lwaba luvuyo, nolilo lwaba ngumhla omnandi: ukuba ayenze yona imihla yesidlo novuyo, neyokutuma izabelwa omnye komnye, namabaso kumahlwempu." 
Esther9:23 Aza ama‐Juda avuma ukwenza njengokuqala kwawo, nanjengokuba u‐Modekai ebeba̔lile kuwo;" 
Esther9:24 ngenxa yokuba u‐Hamani unyana ka‐Medata, um‐Hagagi, utshaba lwawo onke ama‐Juda, ebeqingile ngakuwo ama‐Juda ukuwabubisa, nokuba ebewisile i‐Puri, oko kukuti, iqashiso, ukuwatshabalalisa, nokuwabubisa;" 
Esther9:25 kodwa akungena u‐Esetere ebusweni bokumkani, waxela ngencwadi, ukuba iqinga lake elikohlakeleyo, owaliqingayo ngakuwo ama‐Juda, libuyele pezu kweyake intloko, nokuba kuxo̔nywe yena nonyana bake emtini." 
Esther9:26 Kukona ke kwabizwa imihla le ngokuti yi‐Purime, ngegama le‐Puri. Ngako oko, ngenxa yawo onke amazwi alencwadi, na ngenxa yoko abekubonile ngalondawo, noko obekuwahlele," 
Esther9:27 aqinisa atabata ama‐Juda pezu kwawo, napezu kwenzalo yawo, napezu kwabo bonke abaya kuzibandakanyela kubo, kuze kungatshitshi, ukuba oyibamba lemihla yomibini, ngokuba̔lwa kwayo, nangomzuzu wayo, kuyo yonke iminyaka ngaminye;" 
Esther9:28 nokuba lemihla ikunjulwe igcinwe kuzo zonke izizukulwana ngazinye, isizalwane ngesizalwane, izwana ngezwana, isixeko ngesixeko; nokuba lemihla ye‐Purime ingatshitshi pakati kwama‐Juda, nenkunjulwa yayo ingapeli kwinzalo yawo." 
Esther9:29 Wandula waba̔la u‐Esetere ukumkanikazi, intombi ka‐Abihayili, no‐Modekai um‐Juda, ngegunya lonke, ukuqinisa lencwadi yesibini ye‐Purime." 
Esther9:30 Wazituma ke incwadi kuwo onke ama‐Juda, kuwo amazwana alikulu linamashumi mabini anesixe̔nxe obukumkani buka‐Hasheveroshe, amazwi oxolo nenyaniso:" 
Esther9:31 ukuze kuqiniswe lemihla ye‐Purime ngemizuzu yayo, njengokuba ebeqinisile pezu kwawo u‐Modekai um‐Juda, no‐Esetere ukumkanikazi, nanjengokuba ebeqinisile pezu kwawo wona napezu kwenzalo yawo, indawo zokuzila ukutya nezokukala kwawo." 
Esther9:32 Ezindawo ze‐Purime ingxelo ka‐Esetere yaziqinisa; yaba̔lwa nasencwadini. 
Esther10:1 KEKALOKU ukumkani u‐Hasheveroshe wabeka pezu kwelizwe, na pezu kweziqiti zolwandle, ukunikela." 
Esther10:2 Nazo zonke izenzo zegunya lake nezamandla ake, nesishumayelo sobukulu buka‐Modekai, obo ukumkani wamenza mkulu ngabo, aziba̔lwanga na zona encwadini yemicimbi yemihla ngemihla yokumkani be‐Medi ne‐Peresiya?" 
Esther10:3 Ngokuba u‐Modekai um‐Juda ebengowasemva kwokumkani u‐Hasheveroshe, emkulu pakati kwama‐Juda, ebukekile kwisininzi sabazalwana bake, efuna ubutamsanqa babantu bake, eteta uxolo kuyo yonke inzalo yake." 
Job1:1 KWAYE kuko indoda elizweni le‐Hutse, igama layo ngu‐Jobi. Indoda leyo ibiyefezekileyo, nelungisayo, neyoyikayo utixo, nepambukayo enkohlakalweni." 
Job1:2 Kwaye kuzalelwe yona onyana abasixe̔nxe nentombi ezintatu: 
Job1:3 nemfuyo yayo ibizigusha ezingamawaka asixe̔nxe, nenkamela ezingamawaka matatu, nezibini zenkabi ezingamakulu mahlanu, namaqwaṙashekazi angamakulu mahlanu, nento eninzi kakulu yezicaka: kanjalo indoda leyo ibinkulu kuwo onke amadoda asempumalanga." 
Job1:4 Kekaloku onyana bayo bahlala besenza izidlo ezindlwini zabanye ngabanye ngemihla yabo; baza batuma bamema odade babo bobatatu, ukuba beze ukutya nokusela nabo." 
Job1:5 Kwaye kute kwakuba kuzungulezisiwe imihla yezidlo ezo, wandula watuma u‐Jobi wabangcwalisa, wavuka kusasa, wanikela amadini okutshiswa ngenani labo bonke; ngokuba ebesiti u‐Jobi: Kungati onyana bam bonile, bamgxeka utixo ezintliziyweni zabo. Wenje njalo u‐Jobi onke amaxesha lawo." 
Job1:6 Kwaye kute ngomhla otile, nxa bezayo onyana bakatixo ukuzimisa pambi kwoyehova, weza no‐Satane pakati kwabo." 
Job1:7 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Satane: Uvela pina? Wapendula u‐Satane kuyehova, wati: Ekusukasukeni emhlabeni, nasekuhambahambeni kuwo." 
Job1:8 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Satane: Ugqalile na isicaka sam u‐Jobi, ukuba akuko onjengaye emhlabeni, indoda efezekileyo, elungisayo, eyoyikayo utixo, epambukayo enkohlakalweni?" 
Job1:9 Wapendula u‐Satane kuyehova, wati: Ufumana emoyika utixo na u‐Jobi?" 
Job1:10 Akubiyanga na ngokumngqonga, nangokungqonga indlu yake, nangokungqonga konke anako, ngamacala onke? Umsebenzi wezandla zake uwutamsanqele, nemfuyo yake yandile emhlabeni." 
Job1:11 Uz’ uti ke kodwa wolule isandla sako, upate konke anako, waeya kukugxeka ngasebusweni bako." 
Job1:12 Waza uyehova wati kuye u‐Satane: Bona ke, konke anako kusesandleni sako; kupela ungoluli isandla sako pezu kwake. Wasuka wapuma u‐Satane ebusweni bukayehova." 
Job1:13 Kwaye kute ngomhla otile, nxa onyana bake nentombi zake babe besitya, besela nokusela iveyine, endlwini yomkuluwe wabo, yowamazibulo," 
Job1:14 safika isigidimi ku‐Jobi, sati: Inkabi bezipulusha, namaqwaṙashekazi ebesidla ngecala lazo;" 
Job1:15 aza ama‐Sheba aziwela, azitimba; nezicaka azibulele ngohlangoti lweṙele; ndikupela mna ndedwa kwosindileyo ukuza kukuxelela." 
Job1:16 Sisateta esi, safika nesinye, sati: Umlilo katixo uwile ezulwini, watshisa igusha nezicaka, wazigqibela; ndikupela mna ndedwa kwosindileyo ukuza kukuxelela." 
Job1:17 Sisateta esi, safika nesinye, sati: Ama‐Kaledine enza amaqela amatatu, agaleleka pezu kwenkamela, azitimba; nezicaka azibulele ngohlangoti lweṙele; ndikupela mna ndedwa kwosindileyo ukuza kukuxelela." 
Job1:18 Sisateta esi, safika nesinye, sati: Onyana bako nentombi zako babe besitya, besela nokusela iveyine, endlwini yomkuluwe wabo, yowamazibulo;" 
Job1:19 kekaloku bona ke, umoya omkulu wavela pesheya kwentlango, wabeta imbombo zone zendlu, eyawa pezu kwabatsha abo, bada babuba; ndikupela mna ndedwa kwosindileyo ukuza kukuxelela." 
Job1:20 Wandula wesuka u‐Jobi, waṙazula ingubo yake, wagugula intloko yake, wawa ngasemhlabeni, wabedesha," 
Job1:21 wati: Ndizé ndapuma esizalweni sikama̔, ndizé ndobuyela kona kanjalo: nguyehova obenika, nguyehova ohlutileyo: igama likayehova malibongwe!" 
Job1:22 Kuko konke oku akona u‐Jobi; akamnika utixo ubudenge kanjalo. 
Job2:1 Kwabuya kwati ngomhla otile, nxa bezayo onyana bakatixo ukuzimisa pambi kwoyehova, weza no‐Satane pakati kwabo ukuzimisa pambi kwoyehova." 
Job2:2 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Satane: Uvela pina? Wapendula u‐Satane kuyehova, wati: Ekusukasukeni emhlabeni, nasekuhambahambeni kuwo." 
Job2:3 Waza uyehova wati ku‐Satane: Ugqalile na isicaka sam u‐Jobi, ukuba akuko onjengaye emhlabeni, indoda efezekileyo, elungisayo, eyoyikayo utixo, epambukayo enkohlakalweni? osabamba ubunene bake, nangona ubundivusa ngakuye, ukuba ndimtshabalalise kungeko tuba." 
Job2:4 Wapendula u‐Satane kuyehova, wati: Intlonze ngenxa yentlonze, ewe, konke umntu anako wokunika ngenxa yobomi bake." 
Job2:5 Uz’ uti ke kodwa wolule isandla sako, upate amatambo ake nenyama yake, waeya kukugxeka ngasebusweni bako." 
Job2:6 Waza uyehova wati kuye u‐Satane: Bona ke, usesandleni sako; kodwa ubomi bake ubugcine." 
Job2:7 Wandul’ ukupuma u‐Satane ebusweni bukayehova, wambeta u‐Jobi ngamatumba amabi, kwa kuwo umzantsi wonyawo lwake kwada kwaselukakayini lwake." 
Job2:8 Waza watabata icepe, ukuba aziṙwele ngalo; wabehleli pantsi ke pakati kwotutu." 
Job2:9 Wandula umfazi wake wati kuye: Usabamba na ubunene bako? gxeka utixo, ufe ke." 
Job2:10 Wayesiti kuye: Uyateta njengelinye lamagezakazi lisenje njalo ukuteta. Kanene, okulungileyo siya kukwamkela kutixo na, nokubi singakwamkeli yinina? Kuko konke oku akona u‐Jobi ngomlomo wake." 
Job2:11 Kekaloku abahlobo abatatu baka‐Jobi beva bonke obububi abehlelwe bubo, bavela abanye ngabanye ezindaweni zabo, — u‐Elifazi um‐Temani, no‐Biledadi um‐Shuha, no‐Tsofare um‐Nahama; ngokuba bebevumelene ukuza kumku̔za nokumtutuzela." 
Job2:12 Bati bakupakamisa amehlo abo bekude, abamazi; baza bapakamisa ilizwi labo, balila; basuka baṙazula abanye ngabanye ingubo zabo, batshiza utuli pezu kwentloko zabo ngasezulwini." 
Job2:13 Bahlala pantsi ke ndawonye naye emhlabeni imini zasixe̔nxe nobusuku basixe̔nxe, kungeko namnye owateta ilizwi kuye; ngokuba bebebona ubuhlungu bake ukuba bukulu kakulu." 
Job3:1 EMVENI kwoku wavula u‐Jobi umlomo wake, wawuqalekisa umhla wake." 
Job3:2 Waza wapendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job3:3 Maibube imini bendizalelwa kuyo, nobobusuku kwatiwa: Kumitiwe umntwana oyindoda." 
Job3:4 Imini leyo, maibe bubumnyama: maangayikataleli utixo kwa pezulu; nobumhlope mabungakanyi pezu kwayo." 
Job3:5 Makuyibange ubumnyama nesitunzi sokufa; makupumle pezu kwayo amafu; intsito zemini maziyoyikise. 
Job3:6 Ubusuku obo, isitokotoko masibubambe: mabungabandakanywa nemihla yomnyaka; mabungangeni enanini lazo inyanga." 
Job3:7 Bona ke, ubusuku obo, mabube budlolo; ilizwi lokuvuya malingezi kubo." 
Job3:8 Mababunywebelele abaqalekisi bemini, abo baqele ukuvusa ileviyatane." 
Job3:9 Mazibe mnyama inkwenkwezi zoncwalazi lwabo; mabulinde ukukanya, kungabiko ke; mabungakangeli nenkope zomso:" 
Job3:10 ngenxa yokuba bungavingcanga ingcango zesizalo esandizalayo, nokuba bungafihlanga lusizi emehlweni am." 
Job3:11 Kunganina ukuba bendingafanga kwa sezizalweni, umhlaumbi bendingaqaukanga umxe̔lo ndakupuma esiswini?" 
Job3:12 Kunganina ukuba andipangela amadolo? kunganina ukuba enje njalo namabele, ukuba ndanye?" 
Job3:13 Ngokuba ngoku, ngendiba ndilele pantsi, ndonwaba ke; ngendiba ndilele ubutongo, ndandula ukuba nokupumla;" 
Job3:14 ndawonye nokumkani namapakati omhlaba, ababezakela indawo ezicitakeleyo;" 
Job3:15 umhlaumbi ndawonye nenkosi ezibe zinegolide, ezazizalisa izindlu zazo ngesilivere:" 
Job3:16 umhlaumbi, njengesisu sipumayo esiselelweyo, ngendingabi ndiko; njengentsana e zingazanga zibone ukukanya." 
Job3:17 Apo, abakohlakeleyo bayayeka ukuxalisa; nalapo, bayapumla abadiniweyo ngamandla:" 
Job3:18 ababanjwa bayapumla kunye; abasaliva ilizwi lombandezeli. 
Job3:19 Abancinane nabakulu bakona; nekonza likululekile enkosini yalo. 
Job3:20 Kunganina ukuba kunikwe ukukanya konosizi; nobomi kwabanobuṙaṙa bompefumlo; 
Job3:21 abalangazelela ukufa, kanti akuko; abakumbelayo ngapezu kwendyebo eziselelweyo;" 
Job3:22 abavuya kude kuvuyelelwe, bagcobe, nxa bafumeneyo incw̔aba?" 
Job3:23 Kunganina kwindoda endlela ifihliweyo, leyo utixo ayibiyeleyo ngokungqonga?" 
Job3:24 Ngokuba, ebusweni bokutya kwam, kusiza ukugula kwam; zitululwa njengamanzi nembombolozo zam." 
Job3:25 Ngokuba bendisoyika ububi, baza bandihlela: noko ndandinkwantya kona, kuze kum." 
Job3:26 Bendingenakunqaba, bendingenakwonwaba, bendingenakupumla, saza safika isitukutezi." 
Job4:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Elifazi um‐Temani, wati:" 
Job4:2 Silinga ukuteta nawe, uya kudinwa na? ngubanina pofu ongawabambayo amazwi?" 
Job4:3 Bona ke, ubalulekile abaninzi, nezandla ezibutataka uzomelezile." 
Job4:4 Obeku̔beka amazwi ako ampakamisile, namadolo atobayo uwaqinisile." 
Job4:5 Koko kaloku kuze pezu kwako, seucubukile; kufikele kuwe, selutusiwe." 
Job4:6 Asi kukwoyika kwako na okuyingqiniso yako, nobunene bemikwa yako obulitemba lako?" 
Job4:7 Kaukumbule, ngubanina obengenatyala owabubayo? kupina ke babetshatyalaliswa abalungisayo?" 
Job4:8 Njengoko ndikubonileyo, abalimayo inkohlakalo, nabahlwayela ububi, bayavuna kona." 
Job4:9 Ngokupefumla kukatixo bayabuba, nangomoya wempumlo yake bagqityelwe." 
Job4:10 Ukukonya kwengonyama, nelizwi lengonyama enomsindo, namazinyo engonyama ezintsha ayapulwa." 
Job4:11 Ingonyama enamandla iyabuba ngokuswela into yokuqwenga, namatole engonyamakazi atiwa sa." 
Job4:12 Kekaloku ilizwi laziswa kum ngokwalama, yaka yabamba indlebe yam intsebezo kulo." 
Job4:13 Pakati kwezicingo zivela emibonisweni yobusuku, kwakuba kusiwa ubutongo obukulu pezu kwabantu," 
Job4:14 isoyiko sandihlela, nesingcangcazelo, esadidizisa onke amatambo am." 
Job4:15 Wandula ukugqita pambi kwobuso bam umoya; zisuke inwele zenyama yam zapakama: 
Job4:16 wema, kodwa bendingaqiqi isimilo sake; umfanekiselo ubungapambi kwamehlo am; nelizwi elizolileyo ndaliva, lisiti:" 
Job4:17 Into engumntu yoba ilungile pambi kwotixo na? indoda iya kuba ngcwele pambi kwomdali wayo na? 
Job4:18 Bona ke, kuzo izicaka zake akatembi; napezu kwengelosi zake uyabeka ubudenge:" 
Job4:19 kangakananina ngakumbi ke pezu kw abemi bezindlu zodongwe, ezikusekwa kuselutulini! bayancinezelwa njengenundu;" 
Job4:20 kwa sekuseni kude kube sekuhlweni bacitiwe; bayagqibela ukububa, kungeko ogqalayo." 
Job4:21 Ayinduluki na indluliselo yabo ekubo? bayafa, bengesebulumkweni." 
Job5:1 Kaubize ke, ukuba kuko oya kusabela kuwe; nakuwupina kwabazingcwele uya kubeka?" 
Job5:2 Ngokuba olihilihili ingqumbo imbulala, noliyilo umona uyamfisa." 
Job5:3 Ndibonile mna ihilihili lisendelisa ingcambo; kodwa ndahla ndaqalekisa ikaya lalo. 
Job5:4 Abantwana balo bakude ekwonwabeni; boncinezelwa esangweni, kungeko umhlanguli:" 
Job5:5 elisivuno olambileyo uya kusidla, esisusa nasemaveni; nobutyebi babo umtiyeli ubunxamele." 
Job5:6 Nakuba ububi bungaveli elutulini, nobunzima bungahlumi emhlabeni;" 
Job5:7 koko uluntu luzalelwayo ubunzima, njengokuba intlantsi zibalekela pezulu;" 
Job5:8 ngendifuna kutixo mna noko, nakuye utixo ngendibekela indawo yam:" 
Job5:9 ozenzayo izinto ezinkulu, ezingenakupengululwa; izinto ezimangalisayo, ezingenakubalwa;" 
Job5:10 onisa imvula pezu kwomhlaba, okupa amanzi pezu kwezindle:" 
Job5:11 ukuba abeke pezulu abatotyiweyo; bati abalilayo bapakanyiselwe ekwonwabeni. 
Job5:12 Uyatshitshisa amaqinga abanamaqokolo, zide izandla zabo zingafezi nanto bayenzayo." 
Job5:13 Uyabamba amalumko ngobawo ubuqokolo; necebo labajikayo linxamile. 
Job5:14 Emini bayafumanana nobumnyama; nanjengasebusuku, bayaputaputa emini enkulu." 
Job5:15 Kodwa uyamsindisa eṙeleni, emlonyeni wabo, nasesandleni sowomeleleyo, osweleyo." 
Job5:16 Ngako kuko itemba kwihlwempu, iti inkohlakalo ivingce umlomo wayo." 
Job5:17 Bona ke, unetamsanqa umntu owohlwaywa ngutixo; ngako ukubeta kwosomandla ungakudeli." 
Job5:18 Ngokuba etutumbisa, abuye abope; uyalimaza, ziti izandla zake zipolise." 
Job5:19 Ezimbandezelweni zintandatu uya kukusindisa; nakwezisixe̔nxe ububi abuyi kukupata. 
Job5:20 Ekulambeni uya kukukulula ekufeni; nasemfazweni wokukulula emandleni eṙele. 
Job5:21 Esibetweni solwimi uya kuzimela; akuyi kwoyika ingcitakaliso yakutika. 
Job5:22 Ingcitakaliso nendlala wohleka ngazo; namaṙamncwa omhlaba akuyi kwoyika wona: 
Job5:23 ngokuba luya kuba namatye asendle ucebano lwako; nezilo zasendle ziya kuxolana nawe. 
Job5:24 Kanjalo uya kukwazi ukuba iseluxolweni intente yako; wauya kubonela kwiṙiwa lako, ungalahleki nto." 
Job5:25 Uya kukwazi kanjako ukuba inzalo yako yoba ninzi, nabazukulwana bako njengenca yomhlaba." 
Job5:26 Woza unobudala obuzeleyo encw̔abeni, njengokubutwa kwesita senqolowa ngexesha laso." 
Job5:27 Bona ke oku, sikupengulule, kunje nje; kuve ke, uzazele wena." 
Job6:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job6:2 Ayaba inkatazo yam yalinganiswa ipela, nelishwa lam lafunqulelwa ezintweni zokulinganisela kwa kunye!" 
Job6:3 Ngokuba kaloku inge inzima pezu kwentlabati yolwandle: ngako oko amazwi am atetiwe ngokunxama. 
Job6:4 Ngokuba intolo zosomandla zipakati kwam, ezibuhlungu bazo bufincayo umoya wam; izoyikiso zikatixo ziyazicwangcisa ngakum." 
Job6:5 Iqwaṙa liyakonya na eluhlazeni? Inkabi iyalila na pezu kwokutya kwayo? 
Job6:6 Kuyadleka na okungenasongo ingeko ityuwa? kuko ukuvakala na ebumhlotsheni beqanda? 
Job6:7 Ezizinto umpefumlo wam walile ukuzipata; zinjengokutya kwam okutyeketyeke. 
Job6:8 Sanga singeza isicelo sam, ati utixo anike isilangazelelo sam:" 
Job6:9 ukuba avume utixo ukundityumza, asombulule isandla sake, anditi nqam!" 
Job6:10 Oko bekusaya kubako isonwabiso sam; ngendivuyelela ebuhlungwini, nakuba abengenanceba: ngokuba ndingasitelisanga amazwi oyingcwele." 
Job6:11 Ayinto nina amandla am, ukuba ndibe netemba? siyinto nina nesipelo sam, ukuba ndolule ubomi bam?" 
Job6:12 Amandla am angamandla amatye na? inyama yam iyixina na? 
Job6:13 Asi kukuba aluko na uncedo lwam pakati kwam, nokuba usizo lugxotiwe kum?" 
Job6:14 Onosizi ubang’ ububele kumhlobo wake; kanti ukwoyikwa kwosomandla uyakushiya. 
Job6:15 Abazalwana bam benze ngenkohliso njengomlanjana; njengomsinga wemilanjana bayadlula; 
Job6:16 ebutukutuku ngetuba leliqwa, ekukuyo iyazifihla ingqweqwe:" 
Job6:17 ngexesha lokutsha kwayo inqamkile; ekufudumaleni kwayo icimekile ezindaweni zayo. 
Job6:18 Bayapambuka abahambi bendlela yayo; bayanyukela ebugxwayibeni, babube ke." 
Job6:19 Abahambi bakwa‐Tema baqolosela; abaṙatyazi bakwa‐Sheba bayilangazelela. 
Job6:20 Badana, ngokuba bebetembile; beza kufika kona, bamatiswa ke." 
Job6:21 Ngokuba kaloku niba yinto engento; niyabona isituso, nize noyike." 
Job6:22 Kanene kendatsho na ukuti: Ndipeni? nokuti: Ndikupeleni amabaso ebutyebini benu? 
Job6:23 nokuti: Ndisindiseni esandleni sotshaba? nokuti: Ndikululeni esandleni sababandezeli? 
Job6:24 Ndifundiseni, ndandiya kuti cwaka; nento ndiposisile ngayo ndiqondiseni." 
Job6:25 Hai ukuba namandla kweziteto ezifanelekileyo! kodwa kungati nina ukwohlwaya, ukwohlwaya okuvela kuni?" 
Job6:26 Niyacinga ukwohlwaya amazwi na, zinjengomoya nje iziteto zoncamileyo?" 
Job6:27 Ewe, niyeyelisa inkedama, nimbele isihlobo senu isihogo." 
Job6:28 Kodwa kaloku vumani nibeke ngakum; ngokuba ebusweni benu ndingayi kuxoka. 
Job6:29 Buyani ke, makungabiko inkohlakalo; he, buyani kanjako, ubulungisa bam bukona." 
Job6:30 Kuko elulwimini lwam na inkohlakalo? ikuhlangubo lam alingeqiqe na ubumenemene? 
Job7:1 Akuko na ukulwa emntwini pezu kwomhlaba? nemihla yake ayinjengemihla yomqashwa na? 
Job7:2 Njengokuba ikoboka linxamela amatunzi, nanjengokuba umqashwa elinda umvuzo wake;" 
Job7:3 kwa njalo ndabelwe inyanga zobubi, ndimiselwe ubusuku bendiniso." 
Job7:4 Nxa ndilele pantsi, sendisiti: Ndiya kuvuka ninina, bumke ubusuku? kanjalo ndincanyiswa kukuzamazama kude kuse." 
Job7:5 Inyama yam yambatiswe impetu namagada otuli; intlonze yam ishwabene, iyanyibilika." 
Job7:6 Imihla yam igqitisile ngokubaleka isilukiso somluki; iyapeliswa lingeko itemba. 
Job7:7 Kumbula ukuba ubomi bam bungumoya; alisayi kubuya iliso lam libone ukulunga. 
Job7:8 Iliso lalowo undikangeleyo alisayi kundibona; awako amehlo oba pezu kwam, koko ndingayi kubako." 
Job7:9 Ilifu liyapela, liti shwaka; kwa njalo lowo ohlelayo ehadesi akayi kunyuka kona." 
Job7:10 Akasayi kubuyela kanjako endlwini yake; nendawo yake ayisayi kubuya yazane naye. 
Job7:11 Noko andiyi kubamba umlomo wam; ndiya kuteta eluxinezekweni lwomoya wam; ndokalaza ebuṙaṙeni bompefumlo wam. 
Job7:12 Ndilulwandle, ndingumnenga kusinina, lento ubekileyo pezu kwam umlindo?" 
Job7:13 Ndakuti: Kwonditutuzela isilili sam, wosidambisa isikalazo sam umandlalo wam;" 
Job7:14 wandule ukunditusa ngamapupa, nokundoyikisa ngemiboniso:" 
Job7:15 ude umpefumlo wam uqashe ukuṙwishwa, ewe ukufa ngapezu kwamatambo am." 
Job7:16 Ndiwadelile; andiyi kudla ubomi ngonapakade; ndiyeke, ngokuba imihla yam iyinto engendawo." 
Job7:17 Uyinto nina umntu, ukuba umenze mkulu, nokuba umbekele intliziyo yako?" 
Job7:18 ukuba umohlwaye imiso yonke, umlinge amaxanyana onke?" 
Job7:19 Kwoba kade kangakananina ukuba akuyi kujika kum, nokuba akuyi kundiyeka ndide ndiginye amate am?" 
Job7:20 Ndonile; ndiyenza nto nina kuwe noko, wena mlindi wabantu? kunganina ukuba undibekile ndibe yinto yokuwelwa kuwe, ndide ndibe ngumtwalo kwa kum?" 
Job7:21 Kunganina kanjalo ukuba ungaxoleli isigqito sam, uyisuse inkohlakalo yam? ngokuba kaloku ndiya kulala elutulini; wondifuna kusasa, koko ndingayi kubako." 
Job8:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Biledadi um‐Shuha, wati:" 
Job8:2 Kwoda kube ninina uya kuteta ezi zinto, ati amazwi omlomo wako abe ngumoya onamandla?" 
Job8:3 Utixo wopambukisa ugwebo na? kanjalo usomandla wopambukisa ubulungisa na? 
Job8:4 Ukuba abantwana bako bonile ngakuye, waza wabagxota ngako ukugqita kwabo:" 
Job8:5 ukuba ubufuna ngokutalo kutixo, wataṙuzisa kuye usomandla;" 
Job8:6 ukuba ubungongcwengekileyo nolungisayo; ngenyaniso kaloku ebeya kuvuka ngenxa yako, atamsanqelekise ikaya lokulunga kwako." 
Job8:7 Nakuba ukuqala kwako bekukuncinane, okwasemva kwako bekuya kuba kukulu kunene." 
Job8:8 Kodwa kaubuze isizukulwana sapambili, uzibekise ekufuniselweni kwoyise baso:" 
Job8:9 (ngokuba singabezolo tina, singazi nje; ngokuba isisitunzi imihla yetu emhlabeni:)" 
Job8:10 abayi kukufundisa bona na, bakutetele, bapumise entliziyweni yabo amazwi? — okuti:" 
Job8:11 Ingcongolo ingazipakamisa na lungeko udaka? umkanzi ungakula na engeko amanzi? 
Job8:12 Nxa usenabo ubuhlaza bawo, ungekasikwa, uyapangela inca zonke ngokubuna." 
Job8:13 Zikwa njalo indlela zabo bonke abamlibalayo utixo; netemba lomginwa lona liya kububa: 
Job8:14 okukangela kuya kunqanyulwa, nokutembela kwake kwoba yindlu yesigcawo." 
Job8:15 Uya kwayama kwindlu yake, kanti ayiyi kuma; uya kubambelela kuyo, kanti ayiyi kuhlala iqinile." 
Job8:16 Ucumile ebusweni belanga, nehlumelo lake liyapumela pezu kwesitiya sake." 
Job8:17 Pezu kwemfumba ingcambo zake zijijene; indawo yamatye uyayibona. 
Job8:18 Nxa atshatyalaliswayo endaweni yake, yoza imkanyele, isiti: Andikubonanga." 
Job8:19 Bona ke, olu luvuyo lwendlela yake; bati abanye bahlume elutulini." 
Job8:20 Bona ke, utixo akayi kumlahla ofezekileyo; akayi kubamba abenzi bokubi ngesandla kanjalo." 
Job8:21 Nxa asazalisa ikuhlangubo lako ngohleko, nomlomo wako ngomemezo lwomgcobo," 
Job8:22 abatiyi bako baya kwambatiswa idano: kanti intente yabakohlakeleyo ayiyi kuba iseko. 
Job9:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job9:2 Ngenyaniso ndiyakwazi ukuba kunjalo: kodwa angati nina umntu ukuba nokulunga pambi kwotixo? 
Job9:3 Ukuba ebetanda ukupika naye, akangempendulele nto noko inye kweziliwaka." 
Job9:4 Ulumkile ngentliziyo, womelele ngamandla: ngubanina oke wazenza lukuni ngakuye, waza watamsanqeleka?" 
Job9:5 Okwelelisayo intaba, zingazi zona; ozipenulayo ngomsindo wake;" 
Job9:6 ongcangcazelisa umhlaba usuke endaweni yawo, ziti intsika zawo zididize;" 
Job9:7 otetayo elangeni, lingapumi ke; ozincamatisela nenkwenkwezi;" 
Job9:8 otwabululayo amazulu yena yedwa, anyatele pezu kwamapezulu olwandle;" 
Job9:9 owenzayo u‐Bere, n o‐Oriyone, nesilimela, nenkambili zasesuyide;" 
Job9:10 owenzayo izinto ezinkulu, ezingenakupengululwa; nemimangaliso, engenakubalwa." 
Job9:11 Bona ke, uyadlula ngakum, kanti andimboni; uyagqita nokugqita, kanti andimqiqi." 
Job9:12 Bona ke, uti ṙintyi; ngubanina ongamnqandayo? ngubanina oya kutsho kuye ukuti: Wenza nto nina?" 
Job9:13 Utixo akayi kusonga ingqumbo yake; bayatoba ngapantsi kwayo abancedi abaner̔atshi. 
Job9:14 Kukancinane kangakananina ngakumbi endiya kumpendula mna, ndikete amazwi am ngakuye?" 
Job9:15 Lowo, nakuba bendilungileyo, ngendingampenduli; kuye umgwebi wam ngenditaṙuzisa." 
Job9:16 Ukuba bendibizile, waza wandipendula, ngendingakolwa ukuba wolibekela indlebe ilizwi lam:" 
Job9:17 ngokuba endityumza ngoqwitela, ewandisa amanxeba am kungeko tuba." 
Job9:18 Akandivumeli ndipinde ukupefumla kwam, koko endihlutisa ngezinto eziṙaṙa." 
Job9:19 Ukuba kutetwa ngamandla, bona ke, unamandla yena; ukuba kutetwa ngokumema, ngubanina oya kundimisela ixesha?" 
Job9:20 Ukuba nditi ndilungile, owam umlomo wondigweba; ukuba nditi ndifezekile, wobonisa ukuba ndinobugwenxa." 
Job9:21 Nakuba bendifezekile, ngendingawazi umpefumlo wam; ngendidela ubomi bam." 
Job9:22 Inye into le, kungoko enditshilo: ofezekileyo nokohlakeleyo uyabapelisa." 
Job9:23 Nxa isibeto sibaqa ukubulala, uyahleka ilingwa labangenatyala." 
Job9:24 Umhlaba uyanikwa esandleni sokohlakeleyo; ubuso babagwebi bawo uyabugqubutela; ukuba akunjalo, ungubanina pofu?" 
Job9:25 Imihla yam igqitisile isigidimi ngokubaleka: isabile; ayibonanga ubutamsanqa: 
Job9:26 igqitile njengemikombe yengcongolo; njengokozi lubalekela kwinto yokutya. 
Job9:27 Ukuba nditi: Ndiya kulibala isikalazo sam, ndoshiya usizi lwam, ndizomeleze;" 
Job9:28 ndiyoyika zonke intlungu zam: ndiyazi ukuba akuyi kundigwebela: 
Job9:29 ndoba netyala: kunganina ke ukuba ndifumane ndizama? 
Job9:30 Ukuba bendizihlambile ngamanzi engqweqwe, ndenza mhlope izandla zam ngesepe;" 
Job9:31 oko ubuya kundintywilisa emnxunyeni; ziti izivato zam zinditiye. 
Job9:32 Ngokuba engenguye umntu, njengam, endingampendulayo, singene kunye ekugwebeni." 
Job9:33 Akuko mlamli pakati kwetu, ukuba abeke isandla sake pezu kwetu sobabini." 
Job9:34 Makasuse kum intonga yake, nesoyikeko sake masinganditusi:" 
Job9:35 ngenditeta, ndingamoyiki: ngokuba ndingenjalo mna pakati kwam." 
Job10:1 Umpefumlo wam udiniwe bubomi bam: ndozilahlela ekukalazeni kwam; ndoteta ebuṙaṙeni bompefumlo wam. 
Job10:2 Ndiya kuti kutixo: Ungandigwebi; zundazise ukuba upikela nina nam. 
Job10:3 Kulungile kuwe na ukuba ubandezele, ukuba udele isetyenzwa lezandla zako, n okuba pezu kwecebo labakohlakeleyo ukanyile?" 
Job10:4 Unamehlo enyama na? uyabona njengokubona kwomntu na? 
Job10:5 Injengemihla yomntu imihla yako na; neminyaka yako injengemihla yendoda na; 
Job10:6 ukuba ufunisele inkohlakalo yam, ubuzele nesono sam;" 
Job10:7 usazi nje ukuba andinatyala, nokuba akuko ongahlangulayo esandleni sako?" 
Job10:8 Izandla zako zindidalile, zandenza, ngamacala onke kunye; noko uyanditshabalalisa." 
Job10:9 Zukumbule ke, ukuba undenzile njengodongwe; woza undibuyisele elutulini na?" 
Job10:10 Akunditululanga na njengamasi, wandikama njengenqaka?" 
Job10:11 Undivatisile intlonze nenyama, wandibiya ngamatambo nemisipa." 
Job10:12 Undenzele ubomi nobubele; ukunonelela kwako kulondolozile umoya wam. 
Job10:13 Kanti ezi zinto uzibekele entliziyweni yako; ndiyazi ukuba oku bekukuwe. 
Job10:14 Ukuba ndiyona, seuya kundigqala, nakuyo inkohlakalo yam akuyi kundikulula." 
Job10:15 Ukuba ndinetyala, kwoba nzima kum! nokuba ndilungile, andingepakamise intloko yam: ndincanyisiwe lihlazo, nakukubona ubunzima bam." 
Job10:16 Nakuba ibizipakamisa, njengengonyama enomsindo ubuya kundizingela, uze ubuye wenze ngokumangalisa ngakum." 
Job10:17 Ubuya kutwasisa amanqi̔na ako pambi kwam, wandise ingqumbo yako ngakum: imikosi ibiya kuba ngakum ngokupanjaniselwana." 
Job10:18 Kunganina ngoko ukuba wandipumisa esizalweni? Bendingaba ndiqaukile umxe̔lo, kungabangako liso elindibonileyo;" 
Job10:19 bendingaba ndinjengokungati ndibe ndingeko; bendingaba ndisusiwe esizalweni ndasiwa encw̔abeni. 
Job10:20 Ayiyinto encinane na imihla yam? yeka ke, ukwebuke kum, ukuze ndizomeleze kancinane," 
Job10:21 ndingekayi apo ndingayi kubuya kona, elizweni lobumnyama nelesitunzi sokufa," 
Job10:22 elizweni lobumnyama obukulu, njengesitokotoko, elesitunzi sokufa, kungeko iziguqulelano, elikukanya kunjengesitokotoko." 
Job11:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Tsofare um‐Nahama, wati:" 
Job11:2 Ubuninzi bamazwi abuyi kupendulwa na? nomntu olibelebele uya kugwetyelwa na? 
Job11:3 Ilwimi zako ziya kuwati cwaka amadoda na? wauya kuhleka na, aze angabiko okudanisayo?" 
Job11:4 Ngokuba ubusiti: Imfundiso yam imhlope, ndiyingcwele emehlweni ako." 
Job11:5 Kodwa wanga angateta utixo, avule umlomo wake ngakuwe;" 
Job11:6 aze akwazise imfihlakalo zobulumko, ukuba zezipindiweyo kokukoyo! Yazi ngoko, ukuba utixo ukwenzele kulityalwe inxenye yenkohlakalo yako." 
Job11:7 Ungati ngokupengulula na ufumane utixo? ungafumana usomandla na kude kube yimfezeko? 
Job11:8 Ipakamile njengezulu nje, yinto nina ungayenzayo? inzulu kwihadesi nje, yinto nina ungayaziyo?" 
Job11:9 Ukulinganiswa kwayo kugqitisile umhlaba ngobude; kugqitisile ulwandle ngobubanzi. 
Job11:10 Ukuba uti xafu, avalele, abize intlanganiso, ngubanina ongamnqandayo?" 
Job11:11 Ngokuba abantu bokungendawo ebazi yena; nenkohlakalo uyayibona, nakuba kungagqalwayo." 
Job11:12 Ngokuba umntu oliholoholo eswele ukuqonda; ewe umntu uyazalwa enjeng etole leqwaṙa lasendle. 
Job11:13 Ukuba uti wena ubekise intliziyo yako, utwabulule izandla zako, ngakuye:" 
Job11:14 ukuba inkohlakalo isesandleni sako, yikwelelise kude; nobumenemene ungabuhlalisi ezintenteni zako:" 
Job11:15 ngenyaniso oko uya kupakamisa ubuso bako bungenasipako; wauya kwomelela, ungoyiki nokwoyika:" 
Job11:16 ngokuba ubunzima uya kubulibala; kwoba njengamanzi adlulileyo ukubukumbula kwako. 
Job11:17 Ewe, ixesha lako liya kupuma linokukanya ngapezu kwemini enkulu; nakuba usongiwe ebumnyameni, uya kuba njengokusa." 
Job11:18 Wauya kunqaba, ngokuba kuya kubako itemba; noko udanileyo, uya kulala ngokunqaba." 
Job11:19 He, woti tyambalala, kungeko namnye oya kukutusa; abaninzi baya kukubungezela." 
Job11:20 Kodwa amehlo abakohlakeleyo aya kupela; bobujelwa yindawo yokupepela; nokutemba kwabo kwoba njengo kuqauka kwompefumlo. 
Job12:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job12:2 Asi nokuba ningabantu ke nina! ubulumko bofa nani kambe! 
Job12:3 Kodwa nam ndinokuqonda njengani; andiwi mna pantsi kwenu; he, ngubanina ongenazo izinto ezinjalo?" 
Job12:4 Ndinguye osisihlekiso esihlotyeni sake, obizayo kutixo, oti ampendule: usisihlekiso lowo ulungisayo, ofezekileyo." 
Job12:5 Isibane, esinokudelwa ekuzindleni kwonwabileyo, siyalungiselwa abanyawo zityibilikayo." 
Job12:6 Intente zabafaci zinqabile; nabo bamqumbisayo utixo banokupumla; ati utixo azise kubo ngesandla sake. 
Job12:7 Kodwa kaubuze izilo, zokufundisa ke; kwa nentaka zezulu, zokutyela ke;" 
Job12:8 yiti umhlaumbi utete kumhlaba, wauya kukwazisa; zoti nentlanzi zolwandle zikubalisele." 
Job12:9 Ngubanina ongakwazanga ngezi zonke, ukuba isandla sikayehova senzile oku;" 
Job12:10 okusesandleni sake umpefumlo wako konke okupilileyo, nomoya walo uluntu lwonke?" 
Job12:11 Indlebe ayilingi amazwi na, njengokuba ikuhlangubo lisiva ukutya?" 
Job12:12 Kuwo amaxego kuko ubulumko, nasebudeni bemihla kuko ukuqonda." 
Job12:13 Kuko naye ubulumko namandla; unecebo nokuqonda. 
Job12:14 Bona ke, uyacita yena, kungabuyi kwakiwa; uyamvalela umntu, kungavulwa ke." 
Job12:15 Bona ke, uyabamba amanzi, atshe ke; uyabuya awandulule, asuke apenule umhlaba." 
Job12:16 Kuko naye ubomelelo nobucebo: ngabake olahlekayo nolahlekisayo. 
Job12:17 Uyawemkisa amapakati ehlubulukile, nabagwebi uyabamatisa." 
Job12:18 Umbambo wokumkani uyawutukulula, nezinqe zabo uyazinxiba ngombinqo." 
Job12:19 Uyemkisa abaperisite behlubulukile, nabasemandleni uyabeyelisa." 
Job12:20 Uyabahluta abanyanisekileyo umlomo, nengqiqo yabadala uyayisusa." 
Job12:21 Uyapalaza udelo pezu kwazo inkosi, noqwemesha lwabanamandla uyaluxengaxengisa." 
Job12:22 Uyatyila izinto ezinzulu ezirelisa ebumnyameni, asiti gqi emhlotsheni isitunzi sokufa." 
Job12:23 Uyakulisa izizwe, andule azibubise; uyazitwabulula izizwe, andule azifuduse." 
Job12:24 Uyabahluta abazintloko zelizwe intliziyo, abadungudelise ebugxwayibeni obungenandlela." 
Job12:25 Bayaputaputa ebumnyameni, kungeko ukukanya; uyabagexisa njengenxila." 
Job13:1 Bona ke, oku konke likubonile iliso lam; ikuvile indlebe yam, yayiqonda." 
Job13:2 Into eniyaziyo nina, ndiyayazi nam; andiwi mna pantsi kwenu." 
Job13:3 Kodwa mna ndiya kuteta kusomandhla; ndinga ndingatetelela kutixo. 
Job13:4 Kanti ke nina ningabaqingi bobuxoki; ningabapolisi bokungento nina nonke. 
Job13:5 Akwaba nabenigqibela ukuti cwaka! ngekuba bubulumko benu oko. 
Job13:6 Kenive ke ukutetelela kwam, nipulapule ukupikisa kwomlomo wam." 
Job13:7 Niya kutetela utixo ngobumenemene na? nomtetela ngenkohliso na? 
Job13:8 Niya kubuka ubuso bake na? nompikela utixo na? 
Job13:9 Ngekulungile na ukuba anipengulule? niya kumhanahanisa na, njengokuba kuhanahaniswa umntu?" 
Job13:10 Woqinisa ukunohlwaya, xeshekweni nibuka ubuso ngasese." 
Job13:11 Ubungangamsha bake abunitusi na, nesoyikeko sake asiniweli na?" 
Job13:12 Izikumbuzo zenu ziyimizekeliso yotutu; indulana zenu zindulana zodaka. 
Job13:13 Yitini cwaka nindiyeke, ndandiya kuteta mna, nangona kuya kuhla pezu kwam okunjanina." 
Job13:14 Kunganina ukuba nditabate inyama yam ngamazinyo am, nobomi bam ndibubeke esandleni sam?" 
Job13:15 Ukuba uya kundibulala, ndotembela kuye noko; kodwa indlela zam ndiya kuzitetelela pambi kwake." 
Job13:16 Kanjalo yena woba lusindiso lwam; ngokuba umginwa engezi ebusweni bake. 
Job13:17 Kutalani ukupulapula isiteto sam, nokuxela kwam ezindlebeni zenu." 
Job13:18 Bona ke, sendilungiselele ityala; ndiyazi ukuba ndiya kugwetyelwa." 
Job13:19 Ngubanina lowo oya kupika nam? ukuba kaloku bendiya kuti cwaka, ngendiqauka umpefumlo." 
Job13:20 Kupela izinto ezimbini ungandenzeli zona: oko andiyi kuzimela ebusweni bako. 
Job13:21 Isandla sako sikwelelise kude kum; nesoyikeko sako masinganditusi. 
Job13:22 Wandule ukubiza wena, ndipendule mna; okanye nditete mna, undipendule wena." 
Job13:23 Zingapina izikohlakalo nezono endinazo? zundazise ukugqita kwam nokwona kwam. 
Job13:24 Kunganina ukuba undifihlela ubuso bako, nokuba undibala ngokuba lutshaba kuwe?" 
Job13:25 Igqabi elipetshetwayo uya kulingcangcazelisa na? umququ owomileyo wowusukela na? 
Job13:26 Ngokuba uziba̔la ngakum into eziṙaṙa; nezikohlakalo zobutsha bam undenza ndilidle ilifa lazo. 
Job13:27 Uyazifaka inyawo zam amakamandela, nazo zonke indlela zam uyazihlola; pezu kwengcambo zenyawo zam uyasika impau." 
Job13:28 Yena lowo, njengento ebolileyo, uyalupala; njengengubo edliweyo linundu." 
Job14:1 Umntu, ozalwa ngumfazi, ungomihla mifutshane, nokolisile ukuba nesitukutezi." 
Job14:2 Uyavela njengembali, andul’ ukunqanyulwa; uyabaleka njengesitunzi, angahlali ke." 
Job14:3 Noko ke pezu kwonjalo uyavula amehlo ako; nam uyandingenisa ekugwebeni kwa nawe. 
Job14:4 Ngubanina ongavelisa okucocekileyo kokunco̔lileyo? akuko namnye. 
Job14:5 Ukuba imihla yake yabiwe, ukuba inani lenyanga zake likuwe, ukuba ummisele umda angenako ukuwugqita," 
Job14:6 jika kuye, ukuze apumle, ade afeze njengomqeshwa umhla wake." 
Job14:7 Ngokuba kuko itemba pezu kwomti, lokuba woti, nxa ugauliweyo, ubuye uhlume, nokuba ihlumelo lawo aliyi kupela." 
Job14:8 Ukuba iba ndala emhlabeni ingcambo yawo, nokuba siyafa isipunzi sawo ehlabatini;" 
Job14:9 uya kuti noko, ngalo ivumba lamanzi, ubuye untsule, wenze amasebe njengesityalo esitsha." 
Job14:10 Kodwa indoda iyafa, ingcungcuteke; ewe, umntu uyaqauka umxe̔lo, — upina ke?" 
Job14:11 Amanzi ayanqamka elwandle, nomsinga uyatsha, wome ke;" 
Job14:12 kwa njalo umntu uyalala pantsi, angesuki: kude kungabi sabiko amazulu, abayi kuvuka; abayi kuvuswa ebutongweni babo kanjalo." 
Job14:13 Akwaba ubuya kundizimeza encw̔abeni, undifihle, kude kubuye ingqumbo yako, undinqopisele ixesha elimisiweyo, undikumbule!" 
Job14:14 Ukuba indoda iya kufa, yo buya ipile na? yonke imihla yokulwa kwam ndiya kulinda, kude kufike ukuguqulwa kwam." 
Job14:15 Uya kubiza, ndisabele kuwe mna; uya kunxamela umsebenzi wezandla zako." 
Job14:16 Ngokuba kaloku uwabala amanyatela am; — akulindi na pezu kwesono sam? 
Job14:17 Kuncanyatiselwe enxoweni isigqito sam; uyatungelanisa inkohlakalo yam. 
Job14:18 Okunene intaba isiwa iyonakala, neliwa iyakweleliswa endaweni yalo;" 
Job14:19 amanzi ayasinyisa amatye; uyakukulisa okumilayo elutulini lwomhlaba: kwa njalo itemba lomntu uyalibubisa. 
Job14:20 Uyameyisa amaxesha onke, andule emke; uyenza ngakumbi ubuso bake, wandule umndulule." 
Job14:21 Onyana bake bayabekwa, kodwa akazi yena; bayatotywa, kodwa akaboneli kubo." 
Job14:22 Kupela inyama yake isepezu kwake iba nobuhlungu, nompefumlo wake usepakati kwake uba nosizi." 
Job15:1 WABUYA wapendula u‐Elifazi um‐Temani, wati:" 
Job15:2 Umntu olumkileyo uya kupendula na ngokwazi okungumoya: nombilini wake wowuzalisa na ngomoya wasempumalanga; 
Job15:3 etetelela nje ngamazwi angenakunceda, nangeziteto angezuze nto ngazo?" 
Job15:4 Wena kambe uyatshitshisa ulwoyiko; uyabandeza ububedesho pambi kwotixo. 
Job15:5 Ngokuba umlomo wako u si fundisa inkohlakalo yako, nakuba uqasha ulwimi lwabanamaqokolo." 
Job15:6 Ngumlomo wako okugwebayo, asi ndim; ewe, owako umlomo uyanqi̔na ngakuwe." 
Job15:7 Ubuzalwa ungumntu wokuqala na? ubuveliswa zingekabiko induli na? 
Job15:8 Wabupulapula esihlelweni sikatixo na? uzibambele wena ubulumko na? 
Job15:9 Yinto nina uyaziyo, esingayazi tina? yinto nina uyiqondayo, engenati yona?" 
Job15:10 Kuko kwa lowo oyingwevu nalowo olixego pakati kwetu, egqitisile uyihlo ngobudala nje." 
Job15:11 Zincinane na kuwe izonwabiso zikatixo, nelizwi elitetwayo kakuhle ngakuwe?" 
Job15:12 Yinina ukuba intliziyo yako iyakukukulisa? namehlo ako ayapanyazela nina; 
Job15:13 ukuba uwusonga umoya wako ngakuye utixo, n okuba uwapumisa amazwi anjalo emlonyeni wako?" 
Job15:14 Yinto nina umntu, ukuba abe ehlambulukile? nozelweyo ngumfazi, ukuba abe elungile?" 
Job15:15 Bona ke, akatembi kubo abangcwele bake; nawo amazulu akamhlope emehlweni ake." 
Job15:16 Kancinane kangakananina ngakumbi ke oko kuzondekileyo nokudlubukileyo, — umntu oselayo inkohlakalo njengamanzi?" 
Job15:17 Ndokutyela: pulapula kum; oko ndikubonileyo, ndiya kubalisa kona;" 
Job15:18 abate abalumkileyo bakushumayela, abakusitelisa, kuvela koyise babo:" 
Job15:19 obekunikwa kubo bodwa ilizwe, nxa kungadlulanga owasemzini pakati kwabo." 
Job15:20 Yonke imihla okohlakeleyo uyabulawa bubuhlungu, nenani leminyaka limfihlelwe umbandezeli." 
Job15:21 Intlokoma yezoyikiso isezindlebeni zake: eluxolweni umtimbi uya kumzuma. 
Job15:22 Akakolwa ukuba wobuya ebumnyameni, koko ukuba ulindelwe iṙele." 
Job15:23 Uyapalapalela isonka, esiti: Sipina? uyazi ukuba umhla wobumnyama seulungisiwe ngasesandleni sake." 
Job15:24 Ubunzima noxinezeko ziyamtusa; ziyameyisa njengokumkani olungele ukulwa. 
Job15:25 Ngokuba ebesolula isandla sake ngakuye utixo, wazikalipisa ngakuye usomandla:" 
Job15:26 ebembalekela ngentamo, ngembumbulo ezibukubuku zamakaka ake." 
Job15:27 Nakuba abegubungela ubuso bake ngokutyeba kwake, wenza nengxeba zamanqata esinqeni sake:" 
Job15:28 uya kuma noko ezixekweni ezitshatyalalisiweyo, ezindlwini ekungeko ohlala kuzo, ezilungele ukufunjiswa." 
Job15:29 Akayi kuba sisityebi, kanjalo ayiyi kumana ibako indyebo yake; imfuyo yabo ayiyi kutwabulukela pezu kwomhlaba." 
Job15:30 Akayi kumka ebumnyameni; ihlumelo lake ilangatye liya kulomisa; woda emke ngomoya womlomo wake. 
Job15:31 Makangatembi kokungendawo ulukuhliwe ngako: ngokuba okungendawo kuya kuba ngumvuzo wake: 
Job15:32 ungekafiki umhla wake kwozalisekiswa; nesebe lake aliyi kuba luhlaza. 
Job15:33 Uya kuvutulula idreyive emuncu yake, njengomti weveyine; nentyatyambo yake uya kuyiwisa, njengomnquma." 
Job15:34 Ngokuba umhlambi womginwa woba budhlolo; nentente zesincwancwaniso umlilo uya kuzigqiba. 
Job15:35 Bayamita ububi, bazale inkohlakalo; umbilini wabo uyalungisa inkohliso." 
Job16:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job16:2 Zininzi izinto ezinjalo endizivileyo; ningabatutuzeli abayinkatazo nina nonke. 
Job16:3 Kuko ukupela na emazwini omoya? okunye utelekiswa yinto nina ukuba upendule? 
Job16:4 Bendingatetayo nam njengani, ukuba umpefumlo wenu ubusesikundleni sompefumlo wam; bendingawafumbelelayo amazwi ngakuni, ndinihlunguzele intloko yam." 
Job16:5 Kodwa ngendinomeleza ngomlomo wam, nokushukuma kwodebe lwam ngekudambisa." 
Job16:6 Ukuba bendiya kuteta, akuyi kudanjiswa ubuhlungu bam; nokuba bendiya kuyeka, ndiya kumkelwa yinto nina?" 
Job16:7 Okunene kaloku undidinisile: ucitakalisile wena wonke umhlambi wam; 
Job16:8 waye undibambile mna, kwaba linqi̔na oko; lwaluvuka ngakum ubityo lwam, luyanqi̔na ngasebusweni bam," 
Job16:9 ingqumbo yake iqwengile, uyandizonda; unditshixizele ngamazinyo ake: utshaba lwam luwabazile amehlo alo ngakum." 
Job16:10 Bandakamele ngomlomo wabo; bandibetile esidleleni ngokucekisa; bayandiṙaula kunye. 
Job16:11 Utixo undinikele kolimenemene, wandeyelisela ezandleni zabakohlakeleyo." 
Job16:12 Bendisekwonwabeni, kodwa wandingcangcazelisa: undibambile ngentamo, wanditi viti; wandimisa ndibe ngumlinganiso kuye." 
Job16:13 Abatoli bake bayandingqonga; uyacanda izintso zam, engenanceba nje; uyapalazela emhlabeni inyongo yam." 
Job16:14 Uyandityobozela ngesityobozelo pezu kwesityobozelo, uyandibalekela njengegoṙa." 
Job16:15 Nditungile intlakantlaka pezu kwentlonze yam; ndingenisile upondo lwam elutulini. 
Job16:16 Ubuso bam budumbile kukulila; isitunzi sokufa sipezu kwenkope zam: 
Job16:17 nokokuba akuko budlwengu ezandleni zam, nokuba umtandazo wam ungcwele." 
Job16:18 Mhlaba! ungaseleli igazi lam; makungabi nandawo nokubiza kwam. 
Job16:19 Ewe, kaloku nje, naliya inqi̔na lam ezulwini, nomboneli wam ezinyangweni." 
Job16:20 Abo bandigculelayo ngabahlobo bam; koko iliso lam litontsela kutixo. 
Job16:21 Akwaba bekungatetelelwayo indoda pambi kwotixo, njengokuba unyana woluntu etetelela umlingane wake!" 
Job16:22 Ngokuba yiminyaka emincinane eya kuza, ndandiya kuhamba indlela e ndingayi kubuya ngayo." 
Job17:1 Umoya wam wonakele, imihla yam inqamkile, amancw̔aba andi hlal ele." 
Job17:2 Asi ngabahleki abanam na? nasekucapukiseni kwabo alihlali iliso lam na? 
Job17:3 Kaubeke pantsi ke, ube ngumbambiseli wam pambi kwako; ngubanina lowo oya kubambana nam izandla?" 
Job17:4 Ngokuba intliziyo yabo uyifihlile engqondweni; ngako oko akuyi kubapakamisa. 
Job17:5 Okilayo izihlobo zipangwe, kwa namehlo abantwana bake aya kupela." 
Job17:6 Kanti undimisile ndibe lilizwi lokuhlekisa pakati kwabantu; ndide ndaba ngotshicelwa ebusweni. 
Job17:7 Liluzizi iliso lam ngenxa yenkatazo, namalungu am anjengesitunzi wona onke." 
Job17:8 Boti nqa abalungisayo pezu kwoku; nongenatyala uya kuvuka ngakuye umginwa. 
Job17:9 Woti olungileyo abambe indlela yake, nozandla zimhlope andise amandla." 
Job17:10 Kodwa nina nonke, manibuye nize ke: ngokuba ndingafumani pakati kwenu olumkileyo." 
Job17:11 Imihla yam idlulile, amaqinga am akumkile, — izazelelelo zentliziyo yam." 
Job17:12 Bayabeka ubusuku esikundleni semini; ukukanya kukufupi, kuvela ebumnyameni." 
Job17:13 Ukuba ndiya kutemba, incw̔aba liyindlu yam; ndandlele uku̔ko lwam ebumnyameni." 
Job17:14 Ndibizile ekuboleni ngokuti: Ungubawo wena; nasempetwini ngokuti: Unguma̔ nodade wam. 
Job17:15 Lipina pofu kaloku itemba lam? he, itemba lam liya kubonwa ngubanina?" 
Job17:16 Liya kuhlela emivalweni yencw̔aba, nxa kupunyulwa kunye elutulini." 
Job18:1 WABUYA wapendula u‐Biledadi um‐Shuha, wati:" 
Job18:2 Kwoda kube ninina niya kwenzela amazwi isipelo? telekelelani, size sandule ukuteta." 
Job18:3 Yinina ukuba sibalwe ngokungati sizizilo, nokuba sibe ngabanco̔lileyo emehlweni enu?" 
Job18:4 Wena, lowo uziṙuzulayo ngengqumbo yake! kwoshiywa umhlaba ngenxa yako na? kwokweleliswa iliwa endaweni yalo na?" 
Job18:5 Ewe, ukukanya kwabakohlakeleyo kuya kucinywa; ilangatye lomlilo wake aliyi kukazimla." 
Job18:6 Ukukanya kwoba bumnyama ententeni yake; nesibane sake pezulu kwake siya kucinywa. 
Job18:7 Amanyatela amandla ake aya kuxinwa; elake icebo lomeyelisa. 
Job18:8 Ngokuba eya kuwiselwa elutanjeni ngenyawo zake; wohamba ngokwake pezu kwesisinga. 
Job18:9 Isibata somti ṙintyi ngesitende; umgibe uya kumbamba. 
Job18:10 Intambo yawo ifihlelwe emhlabeni, nenqambu yawo pezu kwendlela." 
Job18:11 Izoyikiso ziya kumtusa ngamacala onke, zimsabise ngenyawo zake." 
Job18:12 Amandla ake olanjiswa; nentshabalaliso yoba ilungile ngecala lake. 
Job18:13 Yodla imisipa yentlonze yake; owamazibulo wokufa wodla izito zake. 
Job18:14 Itemba lake liya kuncotulwa ententeni yake; waeya kuhanjiselwa kukumkani wezoyikiso. 
Job18:15 Zohlala ententeni yake, ize ingabi yeyake; isufure iya kutshizwa pezu kwekaya lake." 
Job18:16 Ngapantsi ingcambo zake ziya kwoma; ngapezulu amasebe ake onqanyulwa. 
Job18:17 Inkunjulwa yake iya kububa elizweni; akayi kuba negama nangapandle kwalo. 
Job18:18 Baya kumcita ekukanyeni aye ebumnyameni, bamgxote emhlabeni omiwayo." 
Job18:19 Akuyi kubako nyana kuye nesalamane pakati kwabantu bake; akuyi kubako noseleyo emizini yake. 
Job18:20 Abasemva bati nqa pezu kwomhla wake, nabapambili babanjwa kukuhlatyuzela." 
Job18:21 Okunene zinjalo intlalo zolimenemene; injalo ke indawo yake ongamaziyo utixo. 
Job19:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job19:2 Kwoda kube ninina niya kubindisa umpefumlo wam, nindityumze ngamazwi?" 
Job19:3 Lamaxesha alishumi nindihlazisile: anidanile ukuba nindipata kakubi. 
Job19:4 Kodwa okunene noko ndiposisileyo, isiposo sam sihleli nam." 
Job19:5 Ukuba okunene niya kuzenza bakulu ngakum, nipikise ngakum isigxekwa sam:" 
Job19:6 yazini kaloku ukuba ngutixo ondipenuleyo, wandipahla ngotambo lwake." 
Job19:7 Bona ke, ndiyabiza ngobudlwengu, kanti andamkeli impendulo; ndiyakala, kanti aluko ugwebo." 
Job19:8 Umendo wam uwubiyile, ize ndingadluli; nasezindleleni zam ububekile ubumnyama." 
Job19:9 Undihlubile ubungcwalisa bam; nesitsaba sentloko yam usisusile. 
Job19:10 Undicitile ngamacala onke, ndimke ke; netemba lam ulinyotule njengomti." 
Job19:11 Uvutisile ngakum ingqumbo yake; uyandibala ngokuba njengentshaba zake kuye. 
Job19:12 Ayeza kunye amabandla ake, apakamise ngakum indlela yawo, ati waca ngokungqonga intente yam." 
Job19:13 Abazalwana bam ubafudusile kude kum; nabandaziyo baqipukelene kanye nam. 
Job19:14 Abalamane bam bancamile; nabazane bam bandilibele. 
Job19:15 Abo bapambukele endlwini yam, nezicakakazi zam, bayandibala ngokuba ngowasemzini; ndingowelinye ilizwe emehlweni abo." 
Job19:16 Ndabiza isicaka sam, kanti asisabelanga; ndataṙuzisa kuso ngomlomo wam." 
Job19:17 Umoya wam usisimangaliso kumfazi wam, nokubongoza kwam kubantwana besizalo esandizalayo." 
Job19:18 Kwa nentsatshana zindidelile: ziti ndakusuka, zandul’ ukuteta ngakum." 
Job19:19 Onke amakolwane am andizondile; nabo ndabatandayo bajikile ngakum. 
Job19:20 Amatambo am ate nama entlonzeni yam nasenyameni yam; kendasinda ngentlonze yamazinyo am. 
Job19:21 Taṙu, taṙu, nina zihlobo zam! ngokuba isandla sikatixo sindibetile." 
Job19:22 Yinina ukuba ninditshutshisa njengotixo, nokuba ningancanyiswa yinyama yam?" 
Job19:23 Akwaba amazwi am abe kwa kaloku eba̔lwa ke! akwaba abeqingqelwa encwadini! 
Job19:24 ngesiqingqiso sesincete kunye nelode, aqoqelwe eweni ngonapakade!" 
Job19:25 Ngokuba ndisazi mna ukuba umkululi wam uhleli, nokuba ekupeleni wosuka eme pezu kwomhlaba:" 
Job19:26 nokuba okuya emveni kwentlonze yam kubujisiwe umzimba lo, ndoti noko kwa senyameni yam ndibone utixo;" 
Job19:27 endiya kumbona mna ngokwam, namehlo am aya kumkangela, engenguye owasemzini: ziyapelela oku izintso zam pakati kwam." 
Job19:28 Ngokuba ninge nisiti: Siyamtshutshisela nina? ingcambo yendawo ifunyenwe kum nje. 
Job19:29 Zoyikeleni ngenxa yeṙele; ngokuba umsindo ubang’ ukwohlwaya kweṙele; ukuze nazi ukuba kuko ukugweba. 
Job20:1 WABUYA wapendula u‐Tsofare um‐Nahama, wati:" 
Job20:2 Ngako oko izicingo zam ziyandipendulisa, nangenxa yokunxama kwam okukum." 
Job20:3 Ukukalimela okundihlazisayo ndikuvile; ngako umoya wengqondo yam wondipendulela. 
Job20:4 Oku ak ukwazi na, kwa kudala nje, kuseloko kwabekwayo umntu pezu kwomhlaba," 
Job20:5 ukuba ukuvuyelela kwabakohlakeleyo kufutshane, nokuba ukugcoba kwomginwa kokwepanyazo?" 
Job20:6 Nakuba ukupakama kwake kunyukela ezulwini, nentloko yake ifikelela emafini;" 
Job20:7 uya kububa noko njengelake ilindle kude kube ngunapakade: abo bambonileyo boti: Upina? 
Job20:8 Uya kubaleka njengepupa, angafunyanwa ke; waeya kugxotwa njengomboniso wobusuku." 
Job20:9 Iliso elamkangelayo aliyi kupinda ukumkangela; nendawo yake yona ayiyi kubuya imbone. 
Job20:10 Abantwana bake bonxenxezela amahlwempu; ewe ezake izandla ziya kubuyisa ubutyebi bake. 
Job20:11 Amatambo ake azele sisono sobufana bake, esiya kulala pantsi naye elutulini." 
Job20:12 Nakuba inkohlakalo imnandi emlonyeni wake, ayifihle ngapantsi kwolwimi lwake," 
Job20:13 ayilondoloze, angayiyeki nokuyiyeka, koko ayibambe isepakati kwekuhlangubo lake," 
Job20:14 ukutya kwake kwoguqulelwa ematunjini ake, kwoba yinyongo yamaṙamba embilini wake." 
Job20:15 Ubutyebi ubuginyile, kanti wobuya abuhlanze; utixo wobukupa esiswini sake." 
Job20:16 Ubuhlungu bamaṙamba uya kubumungunya; ulwimi lwenyushu luya kumbulala. 
Job20:17 Akayi kubonela imijelo, — imisinga yemilanjana yobusi namasi." 
Job20:18 Inzuzo yake woyibuyisa, angayiginyi; kwobuyekezwa ngokwobutyebi bake, angagcobi ke." 
Job20:19 Ngokuba encinezele walahla amahlwempu, indlu ayipangileyo akayi kuyaka." 
Job20:20 Ngokuba ebengakwazi ukwonwaba embilini wake, akayi kusindisa nto yokunqwenela kwake." 
Job20:21 Bekungeko naliva ekutyeni kwake; ngako oko abuyi kuqina ubutamsanqa bake. 
Job20:22 Ekuzaleni kwobuninzi bake woba seluxinezelweni; izandla zabalusizi bonke zoza pezu kwake. 
Job20:23 Kwobako into yokuzalisa isisu sake; u‐Tixo uya kutuma pezu kwake ubushushu bomsindo wake, a bu nise pezu kwake ekudleni kwake." 
Job20:24 Uya kusaba isikali sesincete; siya kumbadluza isipeta sexina. 
Job20:25 Utolo luyar̔olwa, luyapuma emzimbeni, neṙele elibengezelayo enyongweni yake; uyemka, izituso zipezu kwake." 
Job20:26 Ubumnyama bonke bubekelelwa izinto zake ezibekelweyo; uya kumgqiba umlilo ongavutelwanga; woza elishweni lowo useleyo ententeni yake. 
Job20:27 Izulu liya kutyila inkohlakalo yake, nomhlaba wopakama ngakuye." 
Job20:28 Indyebo zendlu yake ziya kumka, — zikukuliswa emhleni womsindo wake." 
Job20:29 Oku kusisabelwa somutu okohlakeleyo sivela kutixo, nelifa lokumiselwa kwake ngutixo." 
Job21:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job21:2 Kutalani ukupulapula isiteto sam; makuti oku kube zizonwabiso zenu. 
Job21:3 Ndinyamezeleni, ndandiya kuteta; uti emveni kwokuteta kwam uhleke." 
Job21:4 Okwam, ukukalaza kwam kusemntwini na? nokuba bekunjalo, kunganina ukuba umoya wam ungabi nakucapuka?" 
Job21:5 Kangelani kum, niti nqa, nibeke isandla pezu kwomlomo." 
Job21:6 Kwa ndisakumbula ndinokunkwantya; inyama yam iyabanjwa kukungcangcazela. 
Job21:7 Kunganina ukuba abakohlakeleyo badle ubomi, bakule ebudaleni, ewe bande ebutyebini?" 
Job21:8 Inzalo yabo iyamiswa ebusweni babo kunye nabo, nabazukulwana babo pambi kwamehlo abo." 
Job21:9 Izindlu zabo zonwabile kungeko kwoyika; kanjalo intonga katixo ayipezu kwabo. 
Job21:10 Inkunzi yabo iyazeka, ingali ke; imazi yabo iyazala, ingapunzi ke." 
Job21:11 Intsatshana zabo bayazikupa njengomhlambi, nabantwana babo bayadloba." 
Job21:12 Bayapakamisa ilizwi ngentambula nohadi, bagcobela intlokoma yomlozi." 
Job21:13 Bayagqiba imihla yabo ebutamsanqeni, bade bati gqwe ukuhlela encw̔abeni." 
Job21:14 Bati noko kutixo: Pambuka kuti; ngokuba ukwazi indlela zako singakutandi. 
Job21:15 Uyinina usomandla, ukuba simkonze? kanjalo siya kuncedwa nto nina, ukuba sitandaze kuye?" 
Job21:16 Bona ke, ubutamsanqa babo abusesandleni sabo. Iqinga labakohlakeleyo malibe kude kum!" 
Job21:17 Kufuti kangakananina ukuba isibane sabakohlakeleyo siyacinywa, nokuba intshabalalo yabo iyabafikela? u‐Tixo uya b abela intlungu ngengqumbo yake." 
Job21:18 Banjengenca pambi kwomoya, nanjengomququ okukuliswayo sisaqwiti." 
Job21:19 Utixo uyabekelela abantwana bake inkohlakalo yake; uyabuyekeza kuye, uti yena akwazi." 
Job21:20 Awake amehlo ayabona ingozi yake; uyasela emsindweni wosomandla. 
Job21:21 Ngokuba enenyamekelo yanina kwindlu yake emveni kwake, lakuba lise linqanyulwa inani lenyanga zake?" 
Job21:22 Kwofundiswa utixo ukwazi na, lowo ogweba abapezulu nje?" 
Job21:23 Omnye uyabuba enywebeni enkulu, onwabile kanye, enqabile." 
Job21:24 Amacala ake azele linqata, nommongo wamatambo ake unyakamile." 
Job21:25 Omnye uyabuba ebuṙaṙeni bompefumlo, engezanga abudle ubutamsanqa." 
Job21:26 Bayafana ukulala kwabo elutulini; impetu ziyabagubungela bobabini. 
Job21:27 Bona ke, ndiyazi izicamango zenu, namaqinga enindibandezela ngawo." 
Job21:28 Ngokuba nisiti: Ipina indlu yenkosi? zipina intente zokuhlala kwabakohlakeleyo? 
Job21:29 Anizanga nibuze na abo badlula endleleni? nempau zabo anizazi na; — 
Job21:30 ukuba okohlakeleyo ulindiselwa imini yentshabalalo; ukuba bayatwalelwa emini yomsindo? 
Job21:31 Ngubanina oya kuxela ngasebusweni bake indlela yake? akuyenza into, ngubanina oya kupindezela kuye?" 
Job21:32 Kwa yena uyatwalelwa emancw̔abeni; napezu kwemfumba kuyalindwa. 
Job21:33 Amnandi kuye amagada entili; bonke abantu botsalela emva kwake, njengapambili kuye, bengenakubalwa." 
Job21:34 Yinina ngoko ukuba nifumana ninditutuzela, kusele ubumenemene nje ezimpendulweni zenu?" 
Job22:1 WANDULA wapendula u‐Elifazi um‐Temani, wati:" 
Job22:2 Indoda ingamnceda utixo na, njengokuba olumkileyo ezinceda?" 
Job22:3 Kungumhlali kusomandla na ukuba ulungile? kuyinzuzo kusinina, ukuba uzenze indlela zako zifezekile?" 
Job22:4 Kungenxa yokukwoyika aya kupika nawe na? wongena nawe ekugwebeni na? 
Job22:5 Asi yenkulu na inkohlakalo yako? nezono zako asi zezingenasipelo na? 
Job22:6 Ngokuba utabatile umbambiso kubazalwana benu kungeko tuba, nabazé ubahlubileyo izivato zabo." 
Job22:7 Ocubukileyo akumsezanga ngamanzi, nolambileyo umvimbile isonka." 
Job22:8 Kanti indoda yamandla umhlaba ubungowayo; nomntu obukiweyo wahlala kuwo. 
Job22:9 Abahlolokazi ubandulule zé, nenkedama ingalo zazo zityunyuzwe." 
Job22:10 Ngako oko uṙauliwe yimigibe; siti isoyiko sikutuse ngokubaqa: 
Job22:11 umhlaumbi bubumnyama, ude ungaboni, ize ingxokolo yamanzi ikugubungele." 
Job22:12 Utixo akasenyangweni yezulu na? kaukangele ukuba pezulu kwenkwenkwezi, ukupakama kwazo!" 
Job22:13 Kanti ute: Angati nina utixo ukwazi? Angagweba emva kwesitokotoko na? 
Job22:14 Amafu abungqingqwa ayintsiteliso kuye, ukuba akaboni; uyahamba pezu kwesazinge sezulu." 
Job22:15 Uke wagqala na indlela yakudala, leyo bayinyatelayo abantu abakohlakeleyo?" 
Job22:16 ababebanjiwe lingekabiko ixesha nje; umsinga ubugalelwa pezu kwesisekelo sabo: 
Job22:17 ababesiti kutixo: Pambuka kuti: nakanjako: Angenza nto nina usomandla kuti? 
Job22:18 nangona ebenguye owazalisayo izindlu zabo ngobutyebi. Kodwa, iqinga labakohlakeleyo malibe kude kum!" 
Job22:19 Bayabona abalungileyo, bavuye ke; omsulwa uyabahleka, esiti:" 
Job22:20 Ngenyaniso abasisukeleyo batshatyalalisiwe; nesisalela sabo umlilo usidlile. 
Job22:21 Uz’ uti ke wazane naye, ube noxolo; ngezi zinto kuya kuza kuwe okulungileyo." 
Job22:22 Zuwamkele umteto emlonyeni wake, uwabekele amazwi ake entliziyweni yako." 
Job22:23 Nxa ubuyelayo kusomandla, uya kwakiwa; inkohlakalo uya kuyikwelelisa kude ezintenteni zako." 
Job22:24 Uze ubeke igolide pezu kwotuli, neyase‐Ofire pakati kwembokoto zemilanjana:" 
Job22:25 waye usomandla eya kuba zigolide zako, nemfumba zesilivere kuwe." 
Job22:26 Ngokuba oko uya kuziyolisa kusomandla, upakamisele kutixo ubuso bako." 
Job22:27 Uya kutandaza kuye, wokuva ke; nezibambiso zako uya kuzifeza." 
Job22:28 Ewe, uya kwahlula into, yaiya kuqiniswa kuwe; napezu kwendlela zako kwokazimla ukukanya." 
Job22:29 Nxa batotyelwa pantsi, woza uti: Kuko ukupakama; waeya kumsindisa okedamileyo." 
Job22:30 Uya kumsindisa ongemsulwa; oya kusindiswa ngobumhlope bezandla zako. 
Job23:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job23:2 Kwa namhla nje isikalazo sam sibuṙaṙa; isibetwa sam sinzima ngapezu kwokugula kwam. 
Job23:3 Andabi ndibe ndisazi apo ndingamfumana kona! ndinge ndisiza kwa sesihlalweni sake. 
Job23:4 Ngendilungiselela ityala lam pambi kwake; nomlomo wam ngendiwuzalisa ngezizatu. 
Job23:5 Ngendiwazi amazwi aya kundipendula ngawo; ndiqonde into aya kuyiteta kum. 
Job23:6 Kungobukulu bamandla na uya kupika nam? Hai ke; uya kubeka amandla kum. 
Job23:7 Apo ke olungisayo angapikisana naye; ngako ngendigqibela ukusinda emgwebini wam. 
Job23:8 Bona ke, ndiya ngasempumalanga, kodwa akako kona; nangasentshonalanga, kodwa andingemqiqe;" 
Job23:9 ngasenode, apo asebenzela kona, kodwa andinge m kangele: uyazisibekelisa ngasesuyide, ukuba andinge m bone." 
Job23:10 Kodwa uyazi indlela endinayo; akuba endilingile, ndiya kuvela njengegolide." 
Job23:11 Unyawo lwam lubambile umkondo wake; indlela yake ndiyigcinile, andipambukanga ke." 
Job23:12 Umyalelo womlomo wake andimkanga na kuwo; ngapezu kwowam ummiso ndizibekele iziteto zomlomo wake. 
Job23:13 Kodwa uyedwa yena, ngubanina ke ongamnqandayo? oko umpefumlo wake ukukanukayo, uya kukwenza kona." 
Job23:14 Ngokuba eya kufeza okundimiselweyo: zinaye nezininzi izinto ezinjalo. 
Job23:15 Ngako oko ndinevuso pambi kwobuso bake; ndakugqala, ndiyamoyika." 
Job23:16 Ngokuba utixo eyenza butataka intliziyo yam; usomandla uyanditusa: 
Job23:17 ngenxa yokuba bendinganqanyulwa bungekabiko ubumnyama, nokuba engagubungelanga isitokotoko ebusweni bam." 
Job24:1 Kunganina pofu, amaxesha engamfihlelwe usomandla nje, ukuba abamaziyo bangaboni imihla yake?" 
Job24:2 Kuko a bashenxisa imida; bayapanga umhlambi, bawaluse." 
Job24:3 Iqwaṙashe lenkedama bayalitimba, nenkabi yomhlolokazi bayayitabata ibe ngumbambiso." 
Job24:4 Bayasonga abasweleyo endleleni; amahlwempu elizwe enzwa azimele ndawonye. 
Job24:5 Bona ke, njeng amaqwaṙa entlango, bayapumela emsebenzini wabo, befuna kusasa into yokutya; ubala lusisonka sabantwana kubo." 
Job24:6 Bayavuna amazimba abo emasimini abanye, babute esitiyeni semiti yeveyine sokohlakeleyo." 
Job24:7 Bayalalisa zé, bengenangubo; abanasigubungelo engqeleni." 
Job24:8 Ngesipango sentaba banetile; nangokuswela indawo yokupepela bayasingata iliwa. 
Job24:9 Abanye bayamtyutula kwa sebeleni ofelwe nguyise, napezu kwehlwempu bayabeka umbambiso." 
Job24:10 Bayahamba zé bengenangubo; belambile bayatwala izitungu; 
Job24:11 bayenza ioli pakati kwendonga zabo; bayaxovula izincinezelo zeveyine, benxaniwe noko." 
Job24:12 Esixekweni amadoda ayagula, nompefumlo wabazinxweleṙa uyakala; kanti utixo akabeki ityala." 
Job24:13 Kuko abavukelana nokukanya; abazazi indlela zako, abahlali nasemizileni yako." 
Job24:14 Kungekasi kuvuka umbulali; uyasika olihlwempu nosweleyo; nasebusuku unjengesela. 
Job24:15 Kanjako iliso lomṙexezi liyalinda uncwalazi, esiti: Akuko liso eliya kundibona; uyafaka ubuso isigqubutelo." 
Job24:16 Ebumnyameni bayagqoboza ezindlwini; emini bayazivalela; abazani nokukanya. 
Job24:17 Ngokuba kubo ukusa kufana nesitunzi sokufa; nxa baziwayo, izituso zesitunzi sokufa zibahlela." 
Job24:18 Lowo unamendu pezu kwobuso bamanzi; siqalekisiwe isabelwa sabo basemhlabeni; akabeki ngasendleleni yemiyezo. 
Job24:19 Ukwoma nobushushu buyakukulisa amanzi engqweqwe; kwa njalo incw̔aba liyasusa abo abonileyo. 
Job24:20 Isizalo siya kumlibala; woba kukutya okumnandi kwimpetu: akasayi kubuya akunjulwe; iti inkohlakalo yapulwe njengomti. 
Job24:21 Uyapata kakubi oludlolo, ongazaliyo; nomhlolokazi akamenzeli okulungileyo." 
Job24:22 Uyasusa abomeleleyo ngamandla ake; akupakama, akuko namnye otembayo ebomini." 
Job24:23 Uyanikwa ukuba abe sekunqabeni, ayamele kona: kodwa amehlo ake apezu kwendlela zabo." 
Job24:24 Bayapakanyiswa kube ngumzuzwana, kodwa bahla bangabiko; bayatotywa pantsi; njenga banye bonke bayabutwa; nanjengezikwebu zapezulu bayanqanyulwa." 
Job24:25 Ukuba akunjalo ke, ngubanina oya kundenza ixoki, nesiteto sam asenze into engento?" 
Job25:1 WANDULA wapendula u‐Biledadi um‐Shuha, wati:" 
Job25:2 Ubukosi nolwoyikeko lunaye; uyalwenza uxolo ezinyangweni zake. 
Job25:3 Kungabalwa na imikosi yake? kanjalo kupezu kwobanina kungapumiyo ukukanya kwake? 
Job25:4 Angati nina ke umntu ukuba nokulunga pambi kwotixo? angati nina ke ukuba nokuhlambuluka ozelweyo ngumfazi? 
Job25:5 Bona ke, kwa inyanga, ayikanyi ke; nenkwenkwezi, azimhlope emehlweni ake." 
Job25:6 Kancinane kangakananina ngakumbi ke umntu — into eyimpetu! nonyana woluntu — into engumsundu! 
Job26:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job26:2 Ute nina ukumnceda lowo ongenamandla, nokuyisiza ingalo engenakwomelela!" 
Job26:3 Ute nina ukumcebisa ongenabulumko, nokwazisa ukuba njalo kwendawo ngokukolisa!" 
Job26:4 Uwaxele ngobanina amazwi lawo? ngumoya kabanina owapuma kuwe? 
Job26:5 Abafileyo bayangcangcazela, — indawo ezipantsi kwamanzi, nabemi bazo." 
Job26:6 Ihadesi izé pambi kwake; nentshabalalelo ayinaso isigubungelo. 
Job26:7 Uyolula inode pezu kwokungendawo; uyaxo̔ma umhlaba pezu kwokungento. 
Job26:8 Uyabopa amanzi emafini ake abungqingqwa; alicandeki noko ilifu ngapantsi kwawo. 
Job26:9 Uti vingci ubuso beterone; uyatwabulula ilifu lake pezu kwayo. 
Job26:10 Umda ojikelezayo uwenzile pezu kwobuso bamanzi, kude kupele ukukanya ebumnyameni." 
Job26:11 Intsika zezulu ziyadidiza; ziti nqa ngokukalimela kwake. 
Job26:12 Ngamandla ake uyazolisa ulwandle; nangayo ingqondo yake uliti kahla ir̔atshi. 
Job26:13 Ngomoya wake uwakazimlisile amazulu; isandla sake sadala inyoka ebalekayo. 
Job26:14 Bona ke, le yimida yendlela yake; kanjalo yintsebezo engakanana yelizwi esiyivile ngaye! kodwa ududumo lwamandla ake ngubanina ongaluqiqayo?" 
Job27:1 WALEKELA u‐Jobi wahambisa isiteto sake, wati:" 
Job27:2 Ehleli nje utixo, osusileyo ibango lam, nosomandla, owenze ṙaṙa umxe̔lo wam;" 
Job27:3 kwa lonke ixesha umpefumlo wam ukum, nomoya katixo usempumlweni yam;" 
Job27:4 awusayi kuteta umlomo wam ubumenemene, nolwimi lwam aluyi kuxela inkohliso." 
Job27:5 Makube kude kum ukuba nditi niyalungisa: kwa kude ndibube andisayi kushenxisa kum ubunene bam. 
Job27:6 Ubulungisa bam ndiyabubamba; andiyi kubuyekelela: intliziyo yam ayi ndi tukeli namnye wemihla yam. 
Job27:7 Olutshaba lwam makabe njengokohlakeleyo, nondisukelayo njengolimenemene." 
Job27:8 Ngokuba liyinto nina itemba lomginwa, nakuba aqwebayo, okuya utixo aya kuhluta umpefumlo wake?" 
Job27:9 Ukukala kwake wokuva na utixo, akufikelwa bubunzima?" 
Job27:10 Woziyolisa kusomandla na? uya kubiza kutixo ngamaxesha onke na? 
Job27:11 Ndonifundisa ngokwesandla sikatixo; oko kukuye usomandla andiyi kukusitelisa. 
Job27:12 Bona ke, nina nonke nikubonile ngokwenu: kunganina ngoko ukuba nibidize kangaka?" 
Job27:13 Oku kusisabelwa somntu okohlakeleyo kutixo, nelifa lababandezeli abalamkelayo kusomandla." 
Job27:14 Ukuba baya kwanda abantwana bake, baya kwand ela iṙele; nabazukulwana bake abayi kuhluta sisonka." 
Job27:15 Abo bamsaleleyo boncw̔atyelwa ekufeni, nabahlolokazi bake abayi kulila." 
Job27:16 Ukuba uya kufumbelela isilivere njengotuli, alungise nezivato njengodongwe;" 
Job27:17 angazilungisa ke, kodwa olungileyo wozambata, nesilivere ongenatyala uya kuyaba." 
Job27:18 Indlu yake uyakile njengenundu, nanjengepempe ayenzayo umlindi." 
Job27:19 Osityebi wolala pantsi, kanti akayi kubutelwa; uyavula amehlo ake, akaseko," 
Job27:20 izituso ziya kumfumana njengamanzi; isaqwiti siyamtimba ebusuku. 
Job27:21 Umoya wasempumalanga uyamsusa, emke ke; ewe uyamkukulisa endaweni yake ngoqwitela." 
Job27:22 Ngokuba u‐Tixo eya kuposa pezu kwake, engenanceba nje; wonga angasaba esandleni sake." 
Job27:23 Abantu baya kwenza intlombe ngezandla zabo pezu kwake, bamenzele namakwelo apume endaweni yake." 
Job28:1 Okunene kuko isipumelo kwisilivere, nendawo kwigolide a bayicokisayo." 
Job28:2 Isincete siyasuswa ehlabatini, nelitye liyanyibilikiselwa ubedu." 
Job28:3 Uyabekela ubumnyama incam; kwa kude kupele kanye uyapanda amatye esitokotoko nesitunzi sokufa. 
Job28:4 Uyanqikela ituba kude nalapo kumiwayo; belityelwe lunyawo, bayalengalenga; bekude nabantu, bayajingajinga." 
Job28:5 Umhlaba, kupuma kuwo isonka, nangapantsi kwawo, kupenulwa okungati ngumlilo." 
Job28:6 Yindawo yesafire amatye awo; namagada egolide akuyo. 
Job28:7 Indlela, akuko ntakakazi eyaziyo yona; neliso lexalanga alike liyikangele;" 
Job28:8 aziyinyatelanga izilo ezir̔atshileyo; ayidlulanga pezu kwayo ingonyama enomsindo. 
Job28:9 Uyolula isandla sake pezu kwelitye elilukuni; uyapenula intaba kwa sezingcanjeni zazo. 
Job28:10 Pakati kwelwalwa uyacandela imijelo; nako konke okunqabileyo liyakubona iliso lake. 
Job28:11 Uyavingca izelo, zingacapazi; nokufihlakeleyo uyakukupela ekukanyeni." 
Job28:12 Kodwa ubulumko, kupina buya kufunyanwa? ipina ke indawo yengqondo?" 
Job28:13 Akwaziwa ngumntu inani labo; abufunyanwa elizweni labahleliyo kanjalo. 
Job28:14 Inzulu iti: Abuko kum; nolwandle luti: Abuko nam. 
Job28:15 Igolide enqabileyo ayiyi kunikwa esikundleni sabo; nesilivere ayiyi kulinganiselwa ixabiso labo. 
Job28:16 Abungelinganiswe negolide yase‐Ofire, nesadonutse enqabileyo, nesafire." 
Job28:17 Igolide nekrisitale aziyi kufaniswa nabo; nokwanana kwabo akuyi kuba ngempahla zegolide ecokisiweyo. 
Job28:18 Akuyi kukankanywa ikorali neperule; nokuzuzwa kwobulumko kupezu kwokwerubi. 
Job28:19 Itopaze yakwa‐Kushe ayiyi kufaniswa nabo; abuyi kulinganiswa negolide entle. 
Job28:20 Kodwa ubulumko, buvela pina? nendawo yengqondo ipina ke?" 
Job28:21 bufihlakele nje emehlweni abo bonke abahleliyo, busitele nasezintakeni zezulu." 
Job28:22 Intshabalalelo nokufa kuti: Udumo lwayo siluvile ngendlebe zetu. 
Job28:23 Utixo uyaqonda indlela yabo, uyayazi yena indawo yabo." 
Job28:24 Ngokuba ekangela ngasezincameni zomhlaba; uyabona ngapantsi kwezulu lonke. 
Job28:25 Akuba ebewenzela umoya ubunzima, namanzi wawacwangcisa ngomlinganiso;" 
Job28:26 nxa wenzelayo imvula ummiso, nombane wendudumo indlela;" 
Job28:27 wandula wabubona, wabushumayela; wabuqinisa, ewe, wabupengulula." 
Job28:28 Wayesiti kuye umntu: Bona ke, ukwoyika inkosi, oko kububulumko; nokumka enkohlakalweni kuyingqondo." 
Job29:1 WALEKELA u‐Jobi wahambisa isiteto sake, wati:" 
Job29:2 Akwaba kwakunjalo kum njengasezinyangeni zapambili, njengasemihleni wandigcinayo utixo;" 
Job29:3 sakukazimla isibane sake pezu kwentloko yam, ndakuba ngokukanya kwake ndacanda ubumnyama:" 
Job29:4 njengokuba bendinjalo emihleni yokucuma kwam, nxa inkolelo katixo ibipezu kwentente yam;" 
Job29:5 nxa usomandla abeseko nam, bandingqonga abafana bam;" 
Job29:6 nxa ndabendihlanza izihambo zam ngamasi, lati iliwa latulula ngakum imilanjana yeoli!" 
Job29:7 Ndati ndakupumela esangweni ngasesixekweni, n esihlalo sam ndasimisa enkundleni;" 
Job29:8 amadodana andibona, azimela; namaxego esuka, ema." 
Job29:9 Inkosana zawabamba amazwi, zabeka isandla pezu kwomlomo wazo." 
Job29:10 Amanene ilizwi lawo latiwa cwaka, nolwimi lwawo lwanamatela ekuhlangutyeni lawo." 
Job29:11 Yaku ndi va indlebe, yandul’ ukunditamsanqelisa; laku ndi bona iliso, landul’ ukundinqi̔nela:" 
Job29:12 ngokuba ndabendisindisa ihlwempu elakalayo, kwa nenkedama, nongenamncedi." 
Job29:13 Isitamsanqeliso sobebuba seza pezu kwam; nentliziyo yomhlolokazi ndayenza ivume ngovuyo. 
Job29:14 Ndambata ubulungisa; bona bazivatisa ngam; lwalunjengengubo nonkontsho ugwebo lwam. 
Job29:15 Bendingamehlo kwimfama, nenyawo kwisiqwala." 
Job29:16 Bendinguyise kwabasweleyo; netyala lalowo bendingamazi ndalifunisela. 
Job29:17 Ndawapula amabamba olimenemene, nasemazinyweni ake ndayiti kahla impango." 
Job29:18 Ndaza ndati: Okunene ndobubela endlwini yam, ndiya kwandisa imihla njengentlabati:" 
Job29:19 ingcambo yam ivulekele emanzini, uti umbete ulalise esebeni lam:" 
Job29:20 ubungcwalisa bam buyatwasa kum, nesipeta sam siyahlaziywa esandleni sam." 
Job29:21 Bandibekela indlebe, balinda ke; bati tu ngenxa yecebo lam." 
Job29:22 Emveni kwelizwi lam ababuya batete; kwatontsela pezu kwabo isiteto sam. 
Job29:23 Babendilindela njengokuba kulindelwa imvula; bayakamisa imilomo yabo njengokuba kusakanyis elwa imvula yasemva. 
Job29:24 Ndakubancumela, babengenakukolwa; nokukanya kwobuso bam babengakuwisi." 
Job29:25 Ndanyula indlela yabo, ndahlala ndiyinkosi; ndema njengokumkani ebandleni, njengotutuzelayo abalusizi." 
Job30:1 Kodwa kaloku, bayandihleka abamihla mincinane kweyam, abayise ngendicekisile ukubabeka ndawonye nezinja zomhlambi wam." 
Job30:2 Kwa amandla ezandla zabo, ayinto nina kum, abo babujelweyo bubudala obuzeleyo?" 
Job30:3 ngentswelo nangokulamba becontile! abasabela ezweni elomileyo, ebumnyameni bokucitakala nokutshabalala;" 
Job30:4 abaqaula umfuno otyuwaṙa ngasetyolweni; nabakutya kuzingcambo zemiti yeroteme. 
Job30:5 Bagxotwa pakati kwabantu, (a bamemeza ngakubo njengakulo isela,)" 
Job30:6 ukuya kuhlala emifuleni eyoyikekileyo, eminxunyeni yomhlaba namawa." 
Job30:7 Bayakonya pakati kwamatyolo; bayafumbalala ngapantsi kwamaṙau. 
Job30:8 Abantwana bobubedengu, ewe, abantwana bokungenagama! bagqogqwa elizweni." 
Job30:9 Kanti kaloku, ndiba yingoma yabo; ewe, ndiba ngumzekeliso kubo." 
Job30:10 Bayandizonda; bayashenxa kude kum; ababambi namate ebusweni bam. 
Job30:11 Ngokuba ecumbulule intambo yake, wandibandezela, nabo bawulahlile umkala pambi kwam." 
Job30:12 Ngasekunene bayasuka abafana; bayasunduza inyawo zam; bayaposela ngakum indlela zabo zokutshabalalisa. 
Job30:13 Bayacita umendo wam; bayahambisa ilishwa lam; akuko mncedi kubo. 
Job30:14 Njengaselutandeni olubanzi bayangena; ngapantsi kwengcitakalo bayaziqengqa. 
Job30:15 Izituso zijikile ngakum; ziyasukela ubukosi bam njengomoya; nanjengelifu idlulile inyweba yam. 
Job30:16 Nakaloku, umpefumlo wam upalele pezu kwam; imihla yembandezelo indibambile." 
Job30:17 Ebusuku amatambo am ayahlatywa kum; nemisipa yam ayinakulala. 
Job30:18 Ngobukulu bamandla esifo sam kwenziwe ngakumbi isivato sam; siyandibinqa njengebenqo lehempe yam. 
Job30:19 Undikahlele eludakeni, ndide ndafana notuli notutu." 
Job30:20 Ndiyabizela kuwe, kanti akundipenduli; ndiyasuka ndime, kanti akundigqali." 
Job30:21 Uzenze bunqola kum; ngamandla esandla sako uyandizonda. 
Job30:22 Uyandifunqulela emoyeni; uyandikwelisa pezu kwawo, ugqibele ukundinyibilikisa." 
Job30:23 Ngokuba ndikwazi ukuba uya kundizisa ekufeni, nasendlwini emiselwe bonke abahleliyo." 
Job30:24 Ewe, akuko kutandaza, akwolula isandla sake, nakuba ekububiseni kwake bakalayo." 
Job30:25 Andililanga na pezu kwomihla inzima? ubungenabuhlungu umpefumlo wam na pezu kwosweleyo? 
Job30:26 Ndakukangela ubutamsanqa, kwandul’ ukufika ububi; ndakulinda ukukanya, kweza ubumnyama." 
Job30:27 Amatumbu am abilisiwe, engabanga nakuzola; imihla yembandezelo indibaqile." 
Job30:28 Ndihambile ndimdaka, kungengalo ilanga; ndipakamile entlanganisweni, ndakala ke." 
Job30:29 Ndiba ngumzalwana kwimpungutye, nomlingane kwincinibakazi." 
Job30:30 Intlonze yam iba mnyama yobuke kum; namatambo am atshile bubushushu. 
Job30:31 Kanjalo uhadi lwam luguqulwe lwaba lusizi, nomlozi wam waba lilizwi labalilayo." 
Job31:1 Ndenze ucebano namehlo am; ngendisiti nina ngoko ukukumbulela intombi? 
Job31:2 Ngokuba siyinina isabelo sikatixo sivela pezulu, nelifa losomandla livela ezinyangweni?" 
Job31:3 Intshabalalo asi yeyake olimenemene na? nelishwa asi lelabo abasebenzi benkohlakalo na? 
Job31:4 Akaziboni na yena indlela zam? nawo onke amanyatela am akazibali na? 
Job31:5 Ukuba ndihambile nobuxoki; ukuba unyawo lwam lukaulezele enkohlisweni: 
Job31:6 mandilinganiswe esilinganisweni esilungeleleneyo, ukuze abazi utixo ubunene bam." 
Job31:7 Ukuba kutyekile endleleni ukuhamba kwam, ukuba intliziyo yam ilandele amehlo am, ukuba kunamatele ezandleni zam isidyobo;" 
Job31:8 mandihlwayele mna, adle omnye; nezityalo zam mazinyotulwe." 
Job31:9 Ukuba intliziyo yam ihendelwe emfazini, ukuba ndilalele ngaselucangweni lwommelwane wam;" 
Job31:10 makasilele omnye umfazi wam, napezu kwake mabatobe pantsi abanye." 
Job31:11 Ngokuba oko kuyinto ebuncwangu; ewe, oko kusisono esibang’ abagwebi." 
Job31:12 Ngokuba kungumlilo kona; bekuya kudla kude kubujiswe; nako konke ukwanda kwam bekuya kukunyotula. 
Job31:13 Ukuba ndidelile ityala lesicaka sam, nelesicakakazi sam, zakupika nam;" 
Job31:14 sendiya kwenza nto nina, nxa utixo avukayo? naxeshekweni abuzayo, kuyinto nina ndiya kuyipendula kuye?" 
Job31:15 Lowo owandenzayo mna embilini, akasenzanga na sona naso? asi nguye omnye osidalileyo esizalweni na?" 
Job31:16 Ukuba ndibandezile ukunqwenela kwamahlwempu, ukuba ndipelisile amehlo omhlolokazi," 
Job31:17 ukuba ndityile ndedwa umtamo wam, nxa ingatyanga inkedama kuwo;" 
Job31:18 (ngokuba kwa sebutsheni bam ibisondliwa ndim njengoyise, nomhlolokazi kwa sesizalweni sikama̔ ndimkapile:)"
