Job31:19 ukuba ndibonile umntu ebuba ngokuswela into yokwambata, nolihlwempu engenasigubungelo;" 
Job31:20 ukuba isinqe sake asinditamsanqelisanga, nokuba akazifudumalisanga ngoboya bezimvu zam:" 
Job31:21 ukuba ndivivinyile isandla sam ngakuyo inkedama, nxa bendibona esangweni uncedo lwam:" 
Job31:22 mawuti umkono wam ukumke egxalabeni, nengalo yam yapuke enqwiniba." 
Job31:23 Ngokuba intshabalaliso katixo ibisisituso kum; napambi kwobungangamsha bake bendikohliwe. 
Job31:24 Ukuba ndenzile igolide ingqiniso yam; ukuba ndite kwigolide entle: Ulitemba lam: 
Job31:25 ukuba ndandigcoba ngokuba buninzi ubutyebi bam, nangokuba sifumene inzuzo enkulu isandla sam:" 
Job31:26 ukuba ndibonele ilanga lakukanya, nenyanga yakuhamba ekukazimleni;" 
Job31:27 yaza intliziyo yam yahendwa ngasese, sada isandla sam sangana nomlomo wam:" 
Job31:28 oku nako bekuya kuba sisono esibang’ abagwebi; ngokuba ngendiba ndikanyele utixo opezulu. 
Job31:29 Ukuba ndigcobile engozini yobenditiya, ndaza ndavuyelela kwakumfumana ububi;" 
Job31:30 (kanti umlomo wam andiwuvumanga wone, ngokunywebelela umpefumlo wake:)" 
Job31:31 ukuba abantu bentente yam abatshongo ukuti: Ngubanina ongaxelayo umntu ongahlutiswanga yinyama yake? 
Job31:32 (akalalisa ngapandle owasemzini; ingcango zam ndazivulela umhambi:) 
Job31:33 ukuba ndite njengo‐Adame ndagubungela isigqito sam, ngokufihla inkohlakalo yam esifubeni sam:" 
Job31:34 oko, mandinkwantye isihlwele esikulu, nokudela kwezizalwane makundimatise; ewe, manditi cwaka, ndingapumi elucangweni." 
Job31:35 Akwaba bendinoya kundiva! Nalu upau lwam! usomandla makandipendule; nommangeleli wam makaba̔le incwadi. 
Job31:36 Ngenyaniso ndinga ndiyitwala pezu kwegxalaba lam; ngendiyibopa njengesitsaba kum. 
Job31:37 Ngendimxelela inani lamanyatela am; njengenkosi ngendisondela kuye. 
Job31:38 Ukuba umhlaba wam uyakala ngakumi, nemisele yawo iyalila kunye;" 
Job31:39 ukuba ndizidlile iziqa̔mo zawo kungeko imali, nabalimi bawo ndibaqaukisile umpefumlo:" 
Job31:40 makupume inkanga esikundleni senqolowa, nokula esikundleni seṙalasi. Amazwi ka‐Jobi apelile." 
Job32:1 KWA njalo banqamka ababantu bobatatu ekumpenduleni u‐Jobi, ngokuba ebelungile kwawake amehlo." 
Job32:2 Kwandul’ ukuvuta ingqumbo ka‐Elihu unyana ka‐Barakeli um‐Buze, owesizalwane sika‐Rame: ngakuye u‐Jobi yavutu ingqumbo yake, ngenxa yokuba wazigwebela ngapezu kwotixo:" 
Job32:3 nangakubo abahlobo bake abatatu kwavuta ingqumbo yake, ngenxa yokuba bebengafumananga impendulo, bamgweba u‐Jobi noko." 
Job32:4 Kodwa u‐Elihu ebelindisele u‐Jobi amazwi ake, ngokuba bona bebebadala kuye imihla yabo." 
Job32:5 Ngako akubona u‐Elihu ukuba akuko mpendulo emlonyeni walomadoda omatatu, yandul’ ukuvuta ingqumbo yake." 
Job32:6 Waza wapendula u‐Elihu unyana ka‐Barakeli um‐Buze, wati: Mna ke imihla yam mincinane, kodwa nina ningamaxego; ngako oko bendindweba, ndoyika ukunityela isicamango sam." 
Job32:7 Ndati: Imihla inge iteta, nobuninzi beminyaka bunge busazisa ubulumko." 
Job32:8 Kodwa kuko umoya emntwini; nokupefumla kwosomandla kuyabanika ingqondo. 
Job32:9 Asi ngabo abakulu abalumkileyo; asi ngabo abadala abaqonda okufaneleyo. 
Job32:10 Ndite ngoko: Pulapula kum; ndiya kutyela isicamango sam kwa mna. 
Job32:11 Bona ke, ndilindile amazwi enu; ndabekela izizatu zenu indlebe, nxa nibe nifunisela into yokuteta." 
Job32:12 Ewe, ndanyameka kuni; kanti bona ke, akuko namnye owanyeleyo u‐Jobi, akuko namnye kuni owaguqula iziteto zake:" 
Job32:13 hleze nitsho ukuti: Sibufumene ubulumko: utixo uyamcita, asi ngumntu." 
Job32:14 Ukuba engabekisanga ngakum amazwi ake, ngako andiyi kumpendula ngeziteto zenu." 
Job32:15 Babematisiwe, ababuya bapendule; bemkelwa ngamazwi." 
Job32:16 Bendihlala ke, ngokuba bengateti; ngokuba bete nqumama, bengabuyanga bapendule." 
Job32:17 Sendiya kupendula nam isahlulo sam; ndiya kutyela isicamango sam kwa mna. 
Job32:18 Ngokuba ndizele ngamazwi; umoya pakati kwam uyandinyanzela. 
Job32:19 Bona ke, umbilini wam unjengeveyine engavulelwanga; njengentsuba ezintsha uza kugqoboka." 
Job32:20 Ndiya kuteta, ndize ndibe nokupefumla; ndovula umlomo wam, ndipendule ke." 
Job32:21 Mandingake ndibuke ubuso bendoda; kanjalo umntu andiyi kumbonga. 
Job32:22 Ngokuba ndingakwazi ukubonga: ngeehla andisuse umenzi wam! 
Job33:1 Kodwa noko, pulapula ke, Jobi! ukuteta kwam, nawo onke amazwi am uwabekele indlebe." 
Job33:2 Bona ke, sendivulile umlomo wam; kutetile ulwimi lwam pakati kwekuhlangubo lam." 
Job33:3 Amazwi am ovela ekulungeni kwentliziyo yam; umlomo wam woteta ukwazi ngokungcwele. 
Job33:4 Umoya katixo undenzile; nokupefumla kwosomandla kuyandinika ubomi. 
Job33:5 Ukuba ungenje njalo, ndipendule; lungiselela pambi kwam, uzimise." 
Job33:6 Bona ke, ndingo katixo mna, njengokuba unjalo wena; ndabendiqezulwa eludongweni nam." 
Job33:7 Isoyikeko sam asiyi kukutusa, nesandla sam asiyi kuba nzima pezu kwako." 
Job33:8 Okunene utshilo ezindlebeni zam, nentlokoma yamazwi ndayiva, usiti:" 
Job33:9 Ndihlambulukile, kungeko isigqito; ndihlanzekile, ndingenatyala." 
Job33:10 Bona ke, uyafuna iziqipukelaniso ngakum; uyandibala ngokuba lutshaba lwake." 
Job33:11 Uyazifaka amakamandela inyawo zam; uyazihlola zonke indlela zam. 
Job33:12 Bona ke, akulungisi ngalento; ndokupendula: ngokuba utixo emkulu kuye umntu." 
Job33:13 Kunganina ukuba uyapika naye? ngokuba engayi kupendulela namnye wemicimbi yake. 
Job33:14 Ngokuba utixo eteta kanye, ewe kabini, kodwa akugqalelwa." 
Job33:15 Ngepupa, ngomboniso wobusuku, kwakuba kusiwa ubutongo obukulu pezu kwabantu, ekwozeleni pezu kwomandlalo:" 
Job33:16 oko uyatyila indlebe zabantu, nokululekwa kwabo uyakuncamatisela;" 
Job33:17 ukuze apambukise umntu ekwenzeni kwake, alifihle ir̔atshi koyindoda;" 
Job33:18 abambe umpefumlo wake emnxunyeni, nobomi bake ekububeni ngomkonto." 
Job33:19 Kanjako, uyohlwaywa ngobuhlungu pezu kwomandlalo wake; nepike lamatambo ake liyinto efuti:" 
Job33:20 ude umxe̔lo wake utiye isonka, nompefumlo wake ukutya okumnandi." 
Job33:21 Inyama yake iyonakala ekubonweni; aze amatambo ake, a be engenakubonwa." 
Job33:22 Wandule umpefumlo wake usondele emnxunyeni, nobomi bake kubabubisi." 
Job33:23 Ukuba kuko ngakuye umtunywa, umca̔zeli, emnye pakati kwewaka, kuze kushunyayelwe emntwini imfaneleko yake;" 
Job33:24 uya kwandula ukumpata ngofefe, ati: Mkulule angehli ukuya emnxunyeni; ndifumene isizi." 
Job33:25 Inyama yake iya kutyeba ngapezu kweyobuntwana; uya kubuyela emihleni yobufana bake. 
Job33:26 Wotandaza kutixo, oya kumbuka; waeya kubona ubuso bake ngomgcobo; ngokuba eya kubuyekeza emntwini ubulungisa bake." 
Job33:27 Wokangela ebantwini, ati: Ndonile, ndatyekisa okulungileyo, kanti akwandinceda luto." 
Job33:28 Ukulule umpefumlo wam ukuba ungehli ukuya emnxunyeni, nobomi bam ukuba bubone ukukanya." 
Job33:29 Bona ke, zonke ezi zinto uyazenza utixo, kabini, umhlaumbi katatu, ngasemntwini;" 
Job33:30 ukuba abuyise umpefumlo wake emnxunyeni, aze akanyiswe ngokukanya kwabahleliyo." 
Job33:31 Beka indlebe, Jobi! pulapula kum; yiba uti tu, ndandiya kuteta mna." 
Job33:32 Ukuba kuko amazwi, ndipendule ke; teta, ngokuba ndifuna ukukugwebela:" 
Job33:33 ukuba akako, zupulapule kum; yiba uti tu, ndandiya kukufundisa ubulumko." 
Job34:1 WABUYA wapendula u‐Elihu, wati:" 
Job34:2 Pulapulani, nina zilumko! amazwi am; nani zazi! ndinikeleni indlebe." 
Job34:3 Ngokuba indlebe ilinga amazwi, njengokuba ikuhlangubo lisiva ukutya." 
Job34:4 Masizinyulele tina okufaneleyo; masazi pakati kwetu into elungileyo. 
Job34:5 Ngokuba ebesiti u‐Jobi: Ndilungile; utixo ususile ibango lam. 
Job34:6 Ndiya kuxoka ngakulo ibango lam na? inxeba lam lelingenakupoliswa, kungeko isigqito." 
Job34:7 Yiyipina indoda enjengaye u‐Jobi, osela ugxeko njengamanzi," 
Job34:8 ohambayo ngokukolana nabasebenzi benkohlakalo, nangokupeleka abantu bobumenemene?" 
Job34:9 Ngokuba ebesiti: Umntu akancedwa, nxa avumelana notixo." 
Job34:10 Ngako oko, madoda okuqonda! pulapulani kum: Makube lé ubumenemene kutixo, nobono kusomandla!" 
Job34:11 Ngokuba umsebenzi wabantu eya kuwubuyekezela kubo, enze ukuba bonke ngabanye bafumane njengokwemikwa yabo." 
Job34:12 Ewe, ngenyaniso, utixo akayi kwenza ngobumenemene, nosomandla akayi kutyekisa okufaneleyo." 
Job34:13 Ngubanina owampatisayo umhlaba? ngubanina omisileyo okumiwayo kona konke? 
Job34:14 Ukuba ebeya kumbekela intliziyo yake, afinyelisele kuye umoya wake nompefumlo wake;" 
Job34:15 ngeluqauka uluntu lwonke kwa kunye, bati abantu babuyele elutulini," 
Job34:16 ngako ukuba kuko ukuqonda, kupulapule oku; nika indlebe elizwini lamazwi am." 
Job34:17 Kanene lowo otiya okufaneleyo angapata ubukosi na? nolungileyo, omkulu, uya kumgweba na?" 
Job34:18 Kwotiwa kukumkani na: Ulinginingini? na kwinkosi na: Ningamamenemene? 
Job34:19 kancinane kangakananina ngakumbi ku lowo ungabukiyo ubuso benkosi, nongaziyo isityebi ngapezu kwehlwempu? ngokuba bengumsebenzi wezandla zake bona bonke." 
Job34:20 Ekupanyazeni kweliso bayafa; kwa pakati kwobusuku abantu bayatutumela, badlule ke; kuyasuswa nonamandla, kungengesandla." 
Job34:21 Ngokuba amehlo ake epezu kwendlela zomntu; nawo onke amanyatela ake uyawabona. 
Job34:22 Akuko bumnyama, akuko nasitunzi sokufa, apo bangazimela kona abasebenzi benkohlakalo." 
Job34:23 Ngokuba engabuyi abeke inkumbulo pezu kwomntu, ukuze aye kutixo ekugwebeni." 
Job34:24 Uyabapula abakulu kungeko sifuniselo, nabanye uyabamisa esikundleni sabo." 
Job34:25 Ngako oko uyayazi imisebenzi yabo; uyabapenula ebusuku, batyunyuzwe ke." 
Job34:26 Ekubeni bengabakohlakeleyo uyababeta, endaweni yababoneli:" 
Job34:27 ngenxa yokuba bapambuka ekumlandeleni, nokuba abanakana nanye yendlela zake;" 
Job34:28 ukuze bakwenze ukukala kwehlwempu kuze kuye, nokukala kwababandezelweyo akuve." 
Job34:29 Akupumza yena, ngubanina ongapitizelisayo? akufihlela ubuso, ngubanina ongamkangelayo? nokuba sisizwe, nokuba ngumntu, kuyafana:" 
Job34:30 kuze kungapati ubukosi umntu ongumginwa, kungabiko imigibe yabantu." 
Job34:31 Okunene ngekutshiwo kutixo ukuti: Senditwele ukwohlwaywa, andiyi kubuya ndenze ngokwonakeleyo:" 
Job34:32 okungapandle kwokubona kwam ndifundise kona wena; ukuba ndenzile ngobumenemene, andiyi kupinda ukwenje njalo." 
Job34:33 Kunjengokuti kwako na aya kupindezela, ukuba uyala, — ukuba uya kunyula wena, ndinga nyuli mna? ngako into uyaziyo yitete ke." 
Job34:34 Abantu bokuqonda baya kuti kum, nendoda enobulumko epulapula kum:" 
Job34:35 u‐Jobi uyateta ngokungenakwazi; namazwi ake akanabuciko. 
Job34:36 Ndinga angalingwa u‐Jobi kude kube sekupeleni, ngenxa yempendulo zake ngesiko labantu abakohlakeleyo." 
Job34:37 Ngokuba esongeza esonweni sake imvukelo; uyenza intlombe pakati kwetu; uyandisa amazwi ake ngakuye utixo kanjalo. 
Job35:1 WABUYA wapendula u‐Elihu, wati:" 
Job35:2 Oku ke uyabala ngokuba kokufaneleyo na, ukuba ute: Ubulungisa bam bupezu kwo bukatixo?" 
Job35:3 Ngokuba ubusiti: Bondinceda nto nina? ndiya kuzuza nto nina ngapezu kwe ndizuza ngesono sam? 
Job35:4 Ndiya kukunika impendulo, nabahlobo bako kunye nawe." 
Job35:5 Beka ngasezulwini, ubone ke; uze ukangele amafu a pezulu kuwe." 
Job35:6 Ukuba wonile, uyenza nto nina ngakuye? nxa izigqito zako zininzi, umenzela nto nina?" 
Job35:7 Ukuba ulungile, kuyinto nina uyinika kuye? okanye, uyamkela nto nina esandleni sako?" 
Job35:8 Ubumenemene bako bungona umntu onjengawe, nobulungisa bako bunganceda unyana woluntu." 
Job35:9 Ngenxa yobuninzi bembandezelo abantu bayakala; bayamemeza ngenxa yengalo yabakulu. 
Job35:10 Kanti akuko oti: Upina utixo umenzi wam, onikayo amaculo ebusuku;" 
Job35:11 osifundisileyo ngapezu kwezilo zomhlaba, wasenza sigqite intaka zezulu ngobulumko?" 
Job35:12 Apo ke bayakala, kodwa akapenduli, ngenxa yer̔atshi labakohlakeleyo." 
Job35:13 Okunene okungendawo utixo akayi kukuva, nosomandla akayi kukubona." 
Job35:14 Kancinane kangakanana ngakumbi nxa uti akuyi kumbona! ityala lipambi kwake; ngako mlinde yena. 
Job35:15 Kodwa kaloku, ngokuba ingqumbo yake ingohlwayi, nokuba engagqali isigqito kakulu;" 
Job35:16 ngako u‐Jobi ufumana avule umlomo wake; amazwi uyawandisa ngokungenakwazi. 
Job36:1 WALEKELA u‐Elihu wati: 
Job36:2 Ndihlalele kancinane, ndandiya kukutyela; ngokuba kuseko amazwi ngenxa katixo." 
Job36:3 Ndiya kuzeka ukwazi kwam kwa kude; nakuye umenzi wam ndiya kunika ubulungisa. 
Job36:4 Ngokuba ngenyaniso amazwi am akabuxoki: ofezekileyo ngokwazi unawe. 
Job36:5 Bona ke, utixo umkulu, kanti akadeli; umkulu ngamandla engqondo." 
Job36:6 Akayi kupilisa okohlakeleyo; nebango lababandezelweyo wolinika. 
Job36:7 Akawasusi kwabalungileyo amehlo ake; nakunye nokumkani eteroneni, uyabahlalisa ngonapakade, bapakanyiswe ke." 
Job36:8 Naxeshekweni benxityiwe ngemixokolelwane, babanjwa ngentambo zembandezelo;" 
Job36:9 uyandula abazise isenzo sabo, nezigqito zabo, ukuba benze nger̔atshi;" 
Job36:10 nendlebe zabo uyazityilela ululeko, axele ukuba mababuye enkohlakalweni." 
Job36:11 Ukuba bayeva, bakonze nokukonza, bogqiba imihla yabo ebutamsanqeni, neminyaka yabo eziyolweni." 
Job36:12 Kanti ukuba abeva, baya kububa ngomkonto, baqauke bengenakwazi." 
Job36:13 Kwa njalo abaginwa ngentliziyo bayabekela ingqumbo; abakali akuba ebanxiba. 
Job36:14 Kwofa umpefumlo wabo ebutsheni, nobomi babo pakati kwabanco̔lileyo." 
Job36:15 Uyahlangula olusizi ngosizi lwake, nendlebe zabo uyazityila ngembandezelo." 
Job36:16 Nawe ke ebeya kukur̔ola esixingweni, ukuya endaweni ebanzi ekungeko kuxinana kuyo; nento ebekwa esitebeni sako ibiya kuzala bunqata." 
Job36:17 Kodwa uzalisile ityala lokohlakeleyo: ityala nomgwebo ziya ku bamba. 
Job36:18 Ngokuba kuko umsindo, lumka hleze akususe ngesibeto: oko isizi esikulu asiyi kukusindisa." 
Job36:19 Wobuka indyebo yako na? Nakanye; aka buki igolide, nawo onke amandla obutyebi." 
Job36:20 Unganxameli ubusuku, apo abantu babutelwa endaweni yabo." 
Job36:21 Lumka, ungabeki enkohlakalweni; ngokuba le uyinyulile pezu kwobunzima." 
Job36:22 Bona ke, utixo uyazipakamisa emandleni ake: ngubanina ofundisayo njengaye?" 
Job36:23 Ngubanina ompatisileyo indlela yake? ngubanina notshilo ukuti: Ubenzile ubumenemene? 
Job36:24 Kumbula ukuba uwuzukise umsebenzi wake, lowo abantu bawubencabencayo." 
Job36:25 Uluntu lwonke luyawubonela; umntu uyakangela ekude. 
Job36:26 Bona ke, utixo umkulu, asimazi; inani leminyaka yake, lona alinakupengululwa." 
Job36:27 Ngokuba ewanyusa amatontsi amanzi; ayagalela imvula ngenkungu yake; 
Job36:28 leyo amazulu ayicintsayo; ayatontsela pezu kwabantu ngento eninzi. 
Job36:29 Kanjako kuko na ongaqondayo ukutwabuluka kwelifu, ukudywaba kwentente yake?" 
Job36:30 Bona ke, uyatwabulula ukukanya kwake pezu kwalo, namazantsi olwandle uyawagubungela." 
Job36:31 Ngokuba ngazo ezizinto egweba izizwe, enika ukutya ngokuninzi." 
Job36:32 Izandla zake uyazigubungela ngombane, awuyalezele apo aya kuwela kona." 
Job36:33 Ududumo lwake luyaxela ngaye; kwinkomo luyaxela kwa ngako okunyukayo. 
Job37:1 Okunene pezu kwoku iyangcangcazela intliziyo yam, iyantontoza isuke endaweni yayo." 
Job37:2 Pulapulani kakulu ukudandata kwelizwi lake, nokudumzela okupumayo emlonyeni wake!" 
Job37:3 Ngapantsi kwezulu lonke uyalondisa, nemibane yalo ngasezincameni zomhlaba." 
Job37:4 Emva kwayo kugquma ilizwi; uyaduduma ngelizwi lesitomo sake; akayilibazisi nxa livakeleyo ilizwi lake. 
Job37:5 Utixo uyaduduma ngelizwi lake ngokungummangaliso; izinto ezinkulu uyazenza, esingenakuzazi." 
Job37:6 Ngokuba esitsho kwingqweqwe ukuti: Yibako emhlabeni; utsho nakuwo, umvumbi wemvula, kwa umvumbi wemvula ezinkulu zake." 
Job37:7 Isandla soluntu lwonke uyasincamatisela, ukuba babe nokwazi bonke abantu abenzileyo." 
Job37:8 Ziti izilo zingene ezindaweni zokulala, zihlale eminxunyeni yazo." 
Job37:9 Kuvela isaqwiti ezinkambilini zasesuyide, nengqele enode." 
Job37:10 Ngokupefumla kukatixo kunikwa iliqwa, buti ububanzi bamanzi buxinane." 
Job37:11 Kanjalo ngokunyakama uyadinisa ilifu elibungqingqwa; uyapangalalisa ilifu lokubaneka lake; 
Job37:12 lona liyajikajika ngamacala onke ngokukapa kwake; ukuze enze konke awayalela ngako, pezu kwobuso bendawo ezimiweyo zomhlaba;" 
Job37:13 nokuba kungenxa yokubeta, nokuba kungenxa yelizwe lake, nokuba kungenxa yobubele, alifikisayo." 
Job37:14 Nikela oku indlebe, Jobi! yima, ugqale imimangaliso katixo." 
Job37:15 Uyazi na nxa utixo abeka inkumbulo pezu kwazo ezizinto, na nxa akazimlisa ukukanya kwelifu lake?" 
Job37:16 Uyaqonda na ukujingiswa kwamafu; imimangaliso yalowo ufezekileyo ngokwazi? 
Job37:17 Uyaqonda na ziti nina ingubo zako ukufudumala, akuzolisa umhlaba ngomoya wasesuyide?" 
Job37:18 Ulitwabulule na kunye naye izulu, elomeleleyo njengesikangeliselo esityityishiweyo?" 
Job37:19 Sazise into siya kuyiteta kuye; ngokuba singeyilungiselele tina ngenxa yobumnyama. 
Job37:20 Kuya kumtyelwa na ukuba ndiya kuteta? ukuba bekuya kutsho umntu, ngenyaniso ngeeginywa." 
Job37:21 Ngokuba kaloku kungebonelwe ukukanya, kwakukazimla ezulwini, nxa udlulileyo umoya, walenza lisile." 
Job37:22 Enode kuvela igolide; ngakuye utixo kuko ubungangamsha oboyikekayo. 
Job37:23 Usomandla, asingemfumane! emkulu ngamandla nangobugwebo, nangobuninzi bobulungisa; akayi kubandezela." 
Job37:24 Ngako oko abantu bayamoyika: akaboni abalumkileyo ngentliziyo noko amnye. 
Job38:1 WANDULA uyehova wampendula u‐Jobi eluqwiteleni, wati:" 
Job38:2 Ngubanina lo ositayo icebo ngamazwi angenakwazi? 
Job38:3 Sibinqe ke, njengendoda, isinqe sako; ndandiya kubuza kuwe, uze undazise." 
Job38:4 Ubuko pina ndakuseka umhlaba? xela, ukuba uyazana nokuqonda." 
Job38:5 Ngubanina obemisa imilinganiswa yawo, ukuba uyazi? umhlaumbi ngubanina owolulayo intambo pezu kwawo?" 
Job38:6 Kupezu kwento nina izisekelo zawo zatshoniswayo? umhlaumbi ngubanina owabeka ilitye legumbi lawo; 
Job38:7 zakucula kunye inkwenkwezi zokusa, bati bonke onyana bakatixo badanduluka ngovuyo," 
Job38:8 waza wabiyela ulwandle ngengcango, lwakutyoboza, njengokungati lwapuma esizalweni;" 
Job38:9 ndakulenza ilifu libe sisivato salo, nesitokotoko sibe sisiqoqo salo;" 
Job38:10 ndakulwabela umda wam, ndabeka imivalo nengcango," 
Job38:11 ndati: Woza kude kube lapa, koko ungayi kugqita; kulapa kuya kuhlaliswa ukukukumala kwamaza ako?" 
Job38:12 Uwuyalele umso na, kuselokwemihla yako? usazisile isifingo indawo yaso na," 
Job38:13 ukuba sizibambe incam zomhlaba, bati abakohlakeleyo bavutululwe kuwo?" 
Job38:14 Uyaguqulwa njengodongwe lwesincamatiselo; ziti gqi izinto zawo njengesivato. 
Job38:15 Kuyabanjwa kwabakohlakeleyo ukukanya kwabo; nengalo epakamileyo iyapulwa. 
Job38:16 Ungenile na ematendeni olwandle? uhambile na ezindaweni zapakati zenzulu? 
Job38:17 Uwatyilelwe amasango okufa na? nengcango zesitunzi sokufa uzibonile na? 
Job38:18 Ugqalele ububanzi bomhlaba na? xela, ukuba konke oku uyakwazi." 
Job38:19 Ipina ke indlela apo kuhlala ukukanya? nobumnyama, ipina indawo yabo," 
Job38:20 ukuba ubuse emdeni wabo, nokuba wazane nendlela zisiya endlwini yabo?" 
Job38:21 Uyazi na, ngokokuba ubusel’ uzelwe oko, nokuba imihla yako mininzi inani layo?" 
Job38:22 Ungenile na ezimbekelweni zengqweqwe? nembekelo zesico̔to uzibonile na," 
Job38:23 endisigcineleyo ixesha lobunzima, imini yokulwa neyemfazwe?" 
Job38:24 Ipina ke indlela apo kwabiwa ukukanya, nalapo kupangalala umoya wasempumalanga pezu kwomhlaba?" 
Job38:25 Ngubanina ocandele ingxokolo yamanzi imijelo, nokubaneka kwodudumo indlela;" 
Job38:26 ukuba kuniswe imvula pezu kwelizwe elingenamntu, pezu kwobugxwayiba ekungeko bantu kubo;" 
Job38:27 ukuba kukoliswe indawo ezicitakeleyo nezitshabaleleyo; nokuba kumiliswe utyani obupumayo? 
Job38:28 Imvula inoyise na? okunye azelwe ngubanina amatontsi ombete? 
Job38:29 Lapuma esizalweni sobanina iliqwa? nengqele emhlope yezulu, ngubanina ozeleyo yona?" 
Job38:30 Njengasetyeni amanzi afihlekile, nobuso benzulu bubambene." 
Job38:31 Unganxiba na imbopelelo zesilimela? nemibambo yo‐Oriyone ungayicumbulula na? 
Job38:32 Ungavelisa na izikwenkwezi zendlela yelanga ngexesha lazo? no‐Bere kunye nabantwana bake ungakapa bona na? 
Job38:33 Uyayazi na imimiso yezulu? uyadala ukupata kwalo emhlabeni na? 
Job38:34 Ungapakamisela emafini na ilizwi lako, yandule ingxokolo yamanzi ikugubungele?" 
Job38:35 Ungandulula imibane na, ize ihambe ke, iti nokuti kuwe: Nanku, si lapa?" 
Job38:36 Ngubanina obubekileyo embilini ubulumko? okunye ngubanina owanika entliziyweni ingqondo? 
Job38:37 Ngubanina obalayo amafu ngobulumko? nentsuba zezulu ngubanina ozitambekisayo," 
Job38:38 nxa lwelayo utuli lube yinto enyibilikileyo, ati amagada anamatelane?" 
Job38:39 Ungazingelela ingonyamakazi na into yokuqwenga? nenkanuko yengonyama ezintsha ungayincamisa na; 
Job38:40 nxa zincatamela eminxunyeni, umhlaumbi zihlala eludadeni ngokulalela?" 
Job38:41 Ngubanina olungisela unomyai ukudla, okuya amatole ake alilayo kutixo, ati badubadu ngokuswela into yokutya?" 
Job39:1 Uyalazi na ixesha lokuzala kwamagogo eliwa? uyagqala na akuza kuzala amaxamakazi? 
Job39:2 Uyabala na inyanga azifezayo? uyalazi na ixesha lokuzala kwawo? 
Job39:3 Ayazigoba, apumise amatole awo, apose inimba zawo." 
Job39:4 Ati amatole awo abonxe, akule ezindle; ayapuma ke, angabi sabuyela kuwo." 
Job39:5 Ngubanina olindululeyo iqwaṙa likululukile; nezinxibo zeqwaṙa ngubanina ozicumbululeyo; 
Job39:6 endenzayo intlango ibe likaya lalo, nendawo ezityuwa zibe zezokuhlala kwalo?" 
Job39:7 Liyahleka isipitipiti sesixeko; izimemezo zomqu̔bi aliziva. 
Job39:8 Ukuhanjwa kwentaba kulidlelo lalo; nako konke okuluhlaza liyakufuna. 
Job39:9 Iya kuvuma inyati na ukuba ikonze kuwe, ilalise esibayeni sako?" 
Job39:10 Ungayibopa inyati emseleni ngentambo yayo na? yoqwakanisa imihlambo emva kwako na? 
Job39:11 Uya kutemba yona na, ngokuba amandla ayo emakulu? wowushiyela kuyo umsebenzi wako na?" 
Job39:12 Uya kukolwa yiyo na, ukuba yoyigodusa imbewu yako, iyibutele esibayeni sako sokubula?" 
Job39:13 Ipiko lazo inciniba liyawambuzela ngovuyo: intsiba noboya zezeṙaside na? 
Job39:14 Ngokuba incinibakazi ishiyela amaqanda ayo emhlabeni, iwafudumalise elutulini;" 
Job39:15 ilibala nje ukuba angancinezelwa lunyawo, nokuba anganyatelwa sisilo sasendle." 
Job39:16 Iyazenza lukuni ngakuwo amatole ayo, njengokungati akangawayo; ufumana uko umzamo wayo, ingenakwoyika nje." 
Job39:17 Ngokuba utixo eyilibalisile ubulumko, engayabelanga ingqondo kanjalo." 
Job39:18 Ngexesha izibetayo ngapezulu, iyahleka ihashe nokweleyo kulo." 
Job39:19 Uyalinika ihashe ubuṙoti na? uyavatisa intamo yalo ngodudumo na? 
Job39:20 Uyalitsibisa njengenkumbi na? Ubungangamsha bokutimla kwalo buyinto eyoyikekayo. 
Job39:21 Liyabeta ngempupu emhlanjeni, liyavuyelela ngamandla; liyapuma ukuya kukaulela izikali." 
Job39:22 Liyahleka ukwoyika, alinakutuswa; alibuyi napambi kweṙele." 
Job39:23 Umpongolo uyalikencezela, intshuntshe ebengezelayo, nomkonto." 
Job39:24 Ngobabamo nangobuṙalaṙume liyaginya umhlaba; alikolwa kukuba yintlokoma yexilongo. 
Job39:25 Nxa sukuba ixilongo lililiswayo, liti: He ke! liyasezela ukulwa kwa kude, ududumo lwenkosi, nokumemeza." 
Job39:26 Kungobulumko bako na apapazela untloyiya, atwabulula amapiko ake ngasesuyide?" 
Job39:27 Kungelizwi lako na ixalanga libalekayo pezulu, liyenze pezulu indlu yalo?" 
Job39:28 Liyahlala eweni, lilalisa kona; pezu kwetsolo leliwa, nendawo eyinqaba." 
Job39:29 Kwa lapo liyahlolela ukudla; amehlo alo ayakangela kude. 
Job39:30 Amatole alo ayafunxa igazi; nalapo bakoyo abahlatyiweyo, likwa kona lona." 
Job40:1 WAZA uyehova wampendula u‐Jobi, wati:" 
Job40:2 Lowo upikayo nosomandla uya kumluleka na? omohlwaya utixo, makapendule ngako." 
Job40:3 Waza u‐Jobi wampendula uyehova, wati:" 
Job40:4 Bona ke, ndiyinto engento; ndokupendula nto nina? isandla sam ndiyasibeka pezu kwomlomo wam." 
Job40:5 Nditetile kanye; kodwa andiyi kupendula: kwa kabini; kodwa andiyi kupinda. 
Job40:6 WANDULA uyehova wampendula u‐Jobi eluqwiteleni, wati:" 
Job40:7 Sibinqe ke, njengendoda, isinqe sako; ndiya kubuza kuwe, uze undazise." 
Job40:8 Woka utshitshise kwa igunya lam na? uya kugweba mna na, ukuze wena ugwetyelwe?" 
Job40:9 Kanene unengalo njenge katixo na? ungaduduma ngelizwi njengelake na? 
Job40:10 Zihombise ke ngesitomo nobungangamsha; uzivatise ngobungcwalisa nenkazimlo. 
Job40:11 Zipangalalise ingxokolo zomsindo wako, ukangele konke okupakamileyo, ukutobise." 
Job40:12 Kangela konke okupakamileyo, ukugobe; nabakohlakeleyo ubanyatele pantsi endaweni yabo." 
Job40:13 Bafihlele elutulini ndawonye; bopa ubuso babo emfihlekweni. 
Job40:14 Ndiya kwandul’ ukuxela kuwe, okokuba esako isandla sokunene singakusindisa." 
Job40:15 Bona ke ibehemote, endiyenzileyo kunye nawe; iyadla utyani njengenkabi." 
Job40:16 Bona ke amandla ayo esinqeni sayo, nokwomelela kwayo emisipeni yombilini wayo." 
Job40:17 Iyagobisa umsila wayo njengomti wesedare; imisipa yamatanga ayo ijijene. 
Job40:18 Amatambo ayo ngamabobo obedu; amatambo ayo anjengemivalo yesincete. 
Job40:19 Yona yinto enkulu yemisebenzi katixo: owayenzayo wanikela iṙele layo. 
Job40:20 Ngokuba intaba ziyivelisela ukutya, apo zidlala kona zonke izilo zasendle." 
Job40:21 Iti butu ngapantsi kwemiti yelotu, esigubungelweni sengcongolo, nasendaweni elibikibiki." 
Job40:22 Imiti yelotu iyayikusela ngomtunzi wayo; iminculuba yasemlanjaneni iyayipahla. 
Job40:23 Ukuba umlambo uyafukuka, ayinxami; inqabile, noko i‐Yoredane ityobozela emlonyeni wayo:" 
Job40:24 ngasemehlweni ayo iyayamkela; imigibe iyiti badlu ngempumlo. 
Job41:1 Ungar̔ola na ileviyatane ngegwegwe, nolwimi lwayo ngentambo uyitshonisayo?" 
Job41:2 Ungafaka intsontelo empumlweni yayo na? ungajigija umhlati wayo ngeqeṙu kusinina? 
Job41:3 Iya kuzenza imbongozo ezininzi kuwe na? iya kuteta kuwe izinto ezitambileyo na? 
Job41:4 Iya kulwenza nawe na ucebano? woyitabata ibe sisicaka ngonapakade na? 
Job41:5 Uya kudlala nayo na ngokungati yintaka? woyibopela intombazana zako kusinina? 
Job41:6 Amakolwane aya kuyimbela isihogo na? aya kuyahlula pakati kwabatengi na? 
Job41:7 Uya kuzalisa na ulusu lwayo ngenyembe, nentloko yayo ngengcola zentlanzi?" 
Job41:8 Beka isandla sako pezu kwayo! akuyi kubuya ukumbule ngokulwa. 
Job41:9 Bona ke, itemba lake lenziwa buxoki: akawiswa pantsi ke na kwa sekubonakaleni kwayo?" 
Job41:10 Akuko onobugagu bokuba ayivuse: ngubanina ke lowo ongemayo ebusweni bam? 
Job41:11 Ngubanina ondipangeleyo, ukuba ndibuyekeze? okupantsi kwezulu lonke kukokwam nje!" 
Job41:12 Andiyi kuti cwaka pezu kwamalungu ayo, nendawo yamandla ayo nesoya sokuxo̔tyiswa kwayo." 
Job41:13 Ngubanina ohlubileyo ubuso besivato sayo? ngubanina oya kungena pakati kwemihlati epindiweyo yayo? 
Job41:14 Ingcango zobuso bayo ngubanina ozivulileyo? inṙozo zamazinyo ayo ziyinto eyoyikekayo. 
Job41:15 Amakaka anamandla alir̔atshi layo; evaliwe ngesincamatiselo esiti shinyi. 
Job41:16 Elinye liyasondelana nelinye, ukuba umoya awunakungena pakati kwawo." 
Job41:17 Ayanamatela amanye kwamanye; ayabambana, akakumleki." 
Job41:18 Ukutimla kwayo kukazimlisa ukukanya; namehlo ayo anjengenkope zomso. 
Job41:19 Ziyasuka izibane emlonyeni wayo; intlantsi zomlilo ziyabaleka. 
Job41:20 Uyaquma umsi ezintunjeni zempumlo yayo, njengongxawo ovutelweyo ezingcongolweni." 
Job41:21 Umpefumlo wayo uyavutisa amalahle; nasemlonyeni wayo liyapuma ilangatye. 
Job41:22 Entanyeni yayo kuhleli amandla; nasebusweni bayo ulwoyiko luyatsiba. 
Job41:23 Indawo ezilizengezenge zenyama zayo ziyanamatelana; iqinile pezu kwayo, ingenakushukuma." 
Job41:24 Intliziyo yayo yomelele njengelitye; ewe, yomelele njengelitye langapantsi lokusila." 
Job41:25 Nxa izipakamisayo ayoyika amaṙoti; ngenxa yamavuso akohliwe. 
Job41:26 Lakuyifikela iṙele, alinakuma; kwa n entshuntshe, n engcola, nentsimbi." 
Job41:27 Iyabala isincete ukuba yinca, nexina ukuba ngumti obolileyo." 
Job41:28 Utolo alungeyenze isabe; amatye esisaulo ayaguqulwa abe ngumququ kuyo. 
Job41:29 Umvinqikazi uyabalwa ngokuba ludiza; iyahleka ukuvivinya kwomkonto. 
Job41:30 Ngapantsi kwayo ngamacepe abukali; iyandlala intsimbi zokubula pezu kwodaka. 
Job41:31 Inzulu iyayibilisa njengembiza; ulwandle iyalwenza njengenqai yamafuta. 
Job41:32 Emva kwayo iyenza umzila obengezelayo; ngekubiwa inzulu ingwevu. 
Job41:33 Akuko pezu kwomhlaba ifane layo; eyenziweyo ingenakunkwantya. 
Job41:34 Konke okupakamileyo iyakubona; ingukumkani yona pezu kwazo zonke izilo ezir̔atshileyo. 
Job42:1 WAZA u‐Jobi wampendula uyehova, wati:" 
Job42:2 Ndiyazi ukuba ungazenza zonke izinto, nokuba akuko qinga elinqandeka kuwe." 
Job42:3 Ngubanina lo ositelisa icebo ngokungenakwazi? Kungoko ndikuxeleyo oko ndingakuqondi; izinto ezindinqabeleyo, endingazazi." 
Job42:4 Pulapula ke, ndandiya kuteta; ndiya kubuza kuwe, uze undazise." 
Job42:5 Bendivile ngawe ngokuva kwendlebe; kodwa kaloku iliso lam liyakubona. 
Job42:6 Kukona ndi zi delayo, ndigqoboke ndiselutulini naselututwini." 
Job42:7 KWAYE kute, akuba ebetetile uyehova lamazwi ku‐Jobi, wandula uyehova wati ku‐Elifazi um‐Temani: ingqumbo yam iyavuta ngakuwe, nangakuzo izihlobo zako zozibini; ngokuba ningatetanga ngam okufanelekileyo, njengesicaka sam u‐Jobi." 
Job42:8 Ngako kaloku, zitabateleni inkabi zibe zisixe̔nxe nenkunzi zegusha zibe zisixe̔nxe, niye kwisicaka sam u‐Jobi, ninikele idini lokutshiswa ngenxa yenu; waeya kuti u‐Jobi, isicaka sam, anitandazele: ngokuba yena ndiya kumbuka, ukuze ndingenzi kuni ngobudenge benu; ngokuba ningatetanga ngam okufanelekileyo, njengesicaka sam u‐Jobi." 
Job42:9 Kwa njalo u‐Elifazi um‐Temani, no‐Biledadi um‐Shuha, n o‐Tsofare um‐Nahama, baya benje njengokuba ebetshilo kubo uyehova; waye uyehova wambuka u‐Jobi." 
Job42:10 Waza uyehova wabuyisa ukutinjwa kuka‐Jobi, akuba ebetandazele abahlobo bake: wayesongeza uyehova kuko konke abe enako u‐Jobi, kude kwapindwa." 
Job42:11 Kwaye kusiza kuye bonke abaninawe bake, nabo bonke odade bake, nabo bonke abebefudula besazana naye, badla isonka naye endlwini yake, bamku̔za, bamtutuzela ngenxa yabo bonke ububi abebuzisile uyehova pezu kwake: bampa abanye ngabanye iqosha lemali, nabanye ngabanye umsesane wegolide." 
Job42:12 Waye uyehova ekutamsanqelisa ukupela kuka‐Jobi ngapezu kwokuqala kwake: ngokuba ebenegusha ezingamawaka alishumi linesine, nenkamela ezingamawaka matandatu, nezibini zenkabi eziliwaka, namaqwaṙashekazi ekwa liwaka." 
Job42:13 Ebenonyana basixe̔nxe nentombi zantatu kanjalo. 
Job42:14 Wayebiza igama leyokuqala ngo‐Jemima, negama leyesibini ngo‐Ketsiya, negama leyesitatu ngo‐Kerene‐hapuke." 
Job42:15 Kwaye kungafunyanwa amankazana emahle njengentombi zika‐Jobi, kulo lonke ilizwe: wati uyise wazinika ilifa pakati kwabazalwana bazo." 
Job42:16 Wahlala u‐Jobi emveni kwoku iminyaka yalikulu elinamashumi mane, wabona onyana bake, nonyana bonyana bake, izizukulwana ezine." 
Job42:17 Wada wafa u‐Jobi, emdala, ekolisile ukuba nemihla." 
Psalms1:1 HAI itamsanqa lalomntu ongahambiyo eqingeni labakohlakeleyo, ongemi endleleni yaboni, ongahlali esihlalweni sabagxeki;" 
Psalms1:2 koko ukunyamekela kwake kusemtetweni kayehova, ecinga nokucinga umteto wake emini nasebusuku!" 
Psalms1:3 Uya kuba njengomti utyelwe ngasemijelweni yamanzi ke, ovelisa isiqa̔mo sawo ngexesha lawo, nogqabi lingayi kubuna; nako konke akwenzayo kwolungiseka." 
Psalms1:4 Abanjalo abakohlakeleyo; banjengomququ bona opetshetwayo ngumoya. 
Psalms1:5 Ngako oko abayi kuma abakohlakeleyo ekugwebeni, naboni entlanganisweni yabalungileyo." 
Psalms1:6 Ngokuba uyehova eyazi indlela yabalungileyo; kanti indlela yabakohlakeleyo iya kutshabalala. 
Psalms2:1 YININA ukuba abaheyideni benze imbutumbutu? Yinina ukuba intlanga zicinge okungendawo? 
Psalms2:2 Okumkani bomhlaba bayazimisa, nenkosi ziyacebana ndawonye, ngakuye uyehova, nangakuye umtanjiswa wake, besiti:" 
Psalms2:3 Masiziqaule izinxibo zabo; masizilahle kuti intambo zabo. 
Psalms2:4 Ohleliyo ezulwini uya kubahleka: inkosi iya kubadela: 
Psalms2:5 yandule ukuteta kubo ngengqumbo yayo, ibatuse ngomsindo wayo oshushu." 
Psalms2:6 Ukumkani wam ndimtambisile noko pezu kwe‐Ziyone, kwentaba yam eyingcwele." 
Psalms2:7 Ndoshumayela ummiso ke. Wati uyehova kum: Ungunyana wam wena, ndikuzele namhla nje." 
Psalms2:8 Cela kum, ndandiya kunika abaheyideni babe lilifa lako, nezipelo zomhlaba zibe yimfuyo yako." 
Psalms2:9 Uya kubapula ngentonga yesincete, ubaqe̔keze njengembiza yombumbi." 
Psalms2:10 Ngako kaloku, bokumkani! yenzani ngokuqonda; yalekani, bagwebi bomhlaba!" 
Psalms2:11 Konzani uyehova ngokwoyika, nivuye ngengcangcazelo." 
Psalms2:12 Yangani unyana, hleze aqumbe, nibube endleleni; ngokuba iya kuhla ivute ingqumbo yake. Banetamsanqa bonke abatemba yena!" 
Psalms3:1 YEHOVA! asi nokuba bandile abazintshaba zam! baninzi abapakamayo ngakum. 
Psalms3:2 Baninzi abati ngompefumlo wam: Akuko ukusizwa kwake kutixo. Sela. 
Psalms3:3 Kodwa wena, Yehova! ulikaka kum; ububungcwalisa bam, nompakamisi wentloko yam." 
Psalms3:4 Ndabiza kuyehova ngelizwi lam; wandipendula ke entabeni yake eyingcwele. Sela. 
Psalms3:5 Ndalala pantsi, ndazuza ubutongo; ndavuka; ngokuba uyehova ebendisekele." 
Psalms3:6 Andiyi kwoyika amashumi amawaka abantu, abase belunga ngakum bendiṙaula." 
Psalms3:7 Pakama, Yehova! ndisindise, Tixo wam! ngokuba intshaba zam uzibetile zonke esidleleni; uwapule amazinyo abakohlakeleyo." 
Psalms3:8 Usindiso lolu kayehova. Ukutamsanqelisa kwako kupezu kwabantu bako. Sela. 
Psalms4:1 NDIPENDULE ekubizeni kwam, Tixo wobulungisa bam! wandivulela ebunzimeni; ndipate ngofefe, uve umtandazo wam." 
Psalms4:2 Bonyanandini babantu! kwoba kade kangakananina ubungcwalisa bam buyindano? kwoba kade kangakananina nitanda okungendawo, nifuna ubuxoki? Sela." 
Psalms4:3 Yazini kodwa ukuba uyehova uzahlulele obedeshayo: uyehova uya kuva, ndakubiza kuye." 
Psalms4:4 Ngcangcazelani, ningoni; tetani nentliziyo yenu eluku̔kweni lwenu, niti cwaka. Sela." 
Psalms4:5 Bingani imibingo yobulungisa, nitembele kuye uyehova." 
Psalms4:6 Baninzi abati: Ngubanina oya kusibonisa ukulunga? Yehova! pakamisela pezu kwetu ukukanya kwobuso bako. 
Psalms4:7 Ufakile uvuyo entliziyweni yam, lugqitisa kolwexesha lokwanda kwenqolowa yabo neveyine yabo." 
Psalms4:8 Kwa kunye, ndiya kulala pantsi, ndilale ubutongo, ngokwonwaba: ngokuba enguwe wedwa, Yehova! ondihlalisayo ekunqabeni." 
Psalms5:1 YEHOVA! wanikele indlebe amazwi am, ugqale ukucinga kwam." 
Psalms5:2 Pulapula ilizwi lokubongoza kwam, Kumkani wam, notixo wam! ngokuba ndiya kutandaza kuwe." 
Psalms5:3 Ilizwi lam uya kuliva kusasa, Yehova! kwa kusasa ndolibekisa kuwe, ndikangele pezulu." 
Psalms5:4 Ngokuba ungenguye utixo otanda inkohlakalo; ububi abuyi kupambukela kuwe. 
Psalms5:5 Abagezayo abayi kuma ebusweni bako; uyabatiya bonke abenzi benkohlakalo. 
Psalms5:6 Uya kubu̔bi̔sa abo bateta ubuxoki; uyehova uya kuzonda umntu wegazi nenkohliso. 
Psalms5:7 Kodwa mna ndongena endlwini yako ngobuninzi bezibele zako; ndotobela ngasetempileni yako eyingcwele ngokwoyika wena. 
Psalms5:8 Yehova! ndikokele ebulungiseni bako, ngenxa yabandihlolayo; yenza indlela yako ilunge ebusweni bam." 
Psalms5:9 Ngokuba kungeko okuyinyaniso emlonyeni wabo; umbilini wabo ububumenemene; umqala wabo ulincw̔aba elivulekileyo; ilwimi zabo bazigudisile. 
Psalms5:10 Bagwebe, Tixo! mabawe ngamacebo abo; bagxote ngenxa yobuninzi bezigqito zabo; ngokuba bevukele ngakuwe." 
Psalms5:11 Kodwa mabavuye bonke abatemba kuwe; mabadanduluke ngovuyo kude kube ngunapakade, ngokuba ubakusela: nabatanda igama lako mabagcobe kuwe." 
Psalms5:12 Ngokuba wena, Yehova! uya kutamsanqelisa olungileyo; uya kumpahla ngembuko ibe njengekaka." 
Psalms6:1 YEHOVA! zungandohlwayi ngengqumbo yako, zungandibeti ngomsindo wako." 
Psalms6:2 Yehova! ndipate ngofefe; ngokuba ndicubukile: ndipilise, Yehova! ngokuba amatambo am enokutuswa;" 
Psalms6:3 kwa nompefumlo wam unokutuswa kakulu: kodwa wena, Yehova! kwoba kade kangakananina?" 
Psalms6:4 Buya, Yehova! kulula umpefumlo wam: ndisindise ngenxa yezibele zako." 
Psalms6:5 Ngokuba ekufeni kungeko ukukumbula wena: ngubanina oya kubulela kuwe encw̔abeni? 
Psalms6:6 Ndidiniwe kukugula kwam; bonke ubusuku ndiyadadisa umandlalo wam; ndiyanyela ikoye yam ngenyembezi zam. 
Psalms6:7 Iliso lam selonakele yinkatazo; liyalupala ngenxa yabo bonke abalane bam. 
Psalms6:8 Mkani kum, nonke nina benzi benkohlakalo! ngokuba uyehova evile ilizwi lokulila kwam." 
Psalms6:9 Uyehova uvile isikungo sam; uyehova uya kwamkela intandazo yam. 
Psalms6:10 Zonke intshaba zam zodaniswa, zituswe kakulu; zobuya zidaniswe ngesiqupe." 
Psalms7:1 YEHOVA, Tixo wam! ndiyatemba wena; ndisindise kubo bonke abandisukelayo, undikulule:" 
Psalms7:2 hleze aqwenge umpefumlo wam njengengonyama; eṙazula, kungeko okululayo." 
Psalms7:3 Yehova, Tixo wam! ukuba ndike ndenza lento; ukuba kuko inkohlakalo ezandleni zam;" 
Psalms7:4 ukuba ndimvuzile obexolene nam ngobubi; ukuba ndimpangile owalana nam kungeko tuba; 
Psalms7:5 maluti utshaba lusukele umpefumlo wam, luwufumane; ewe, malunyatele ubomi bam kwa semhlabeni, nobungcwalisa bam malubulalise kwa selutulini. Sela." 
Psalms7:6 Vuka, Yehova! ngengqumbo yako; zipakamise ngenxa yobuṙalaṙume babo balana nam; zundivukele wenze ukugweba ukumiseleyo." 
Psalms7:7 Maiti intlanganiso yentlanga ikupahle; uze ngenxa yayo ubuyele pezulu ke. 
Psalms7:8 Uyehova uya kugweba izizwe: ndigwebele, Yehova! njengokwobulungisa bam, nanjengokwobunene bam obukum." 
Psalms7:9 Yanga ingapela inkohlakalo yabakohlakeleyo; uze olungileyo umqinise: ngokuba ulinga intliziyo nezintso, Tixo olungileyo!" 
Psalms7:10 Ikaka lam likutixo, osindisayo abantliziyo zilungile." 
Psalms7:11 Utixo uyagwebela olungileyo, kanti okohlakeleyo utixo uyamqumbela ngemihla yonke." 
Psalms7:12 Nxa angaguqukiyo, wolola iṙele lake; usel’ etyedile isipeta sake, wasilungisa." 
Psalms7:13 Kanjalo umlungisele izixo̔bo zokufa; intolo zake uyazidalela abatshutshisi. 
Psalms7:14 Bona ke, umiti yinkohlakalo; ukaulile ububi, uzele ubuxoki." 
Psalms7:15 Wemba isigingqi, wasingxoka; weyela esihogweni owasenzayo." 
Psalms7:16 Ububi bake bobuyela pezu kweyake intloko; nobudlwengu bake bohlela elukakayini lwake. 
Psalms7:17 Ndiya kudumisa uyehova ngokufanele ubulungisa bake; ndoculela igama likayehova opezu kwonke. 
Psalms8:1 YEHOVA, Nkosi yetu! hai ubungcwalisa begama lako emhlabeni wonke! wena ububekileyo pezu kwezulu ubukulu bako." 
Psalms8:2 Kwa semlonyeni wentsana nabanyayo umsile udumiso, ngenxa yabalane bako, ukuze upezise utshaba nopindezelayo." 
Psalms8:3 Ndindakukangela izulu lako, umsebenzi weminwe yako, inyanga nenkwenkwezi ozilungisileyo;" 
Psalms8:4 uyinina umntu, lento umkumbulayo? kwa nonyana woluntu, lento umnonelelayo?" 
Psalms8:5 Ngokuba umenzile abe ngapantsi kancinane kuzo ingelosi; umpahlile ngobungcwalisa nangodumo. 
Psalms8:6 Umpatisile ubukosi pezu kwemisebenzi yezandla zako; zonke izinto uzibekile pantsi kwenyawo zake: 
Psalms8:7 igusha nenkabi zonke; kwa nezilo zezindle; 
Psalms8:8 intaka zezulu, nentlanzi zolwandle; nento edlulayo ezindleleni zolwandle." 
Psalms8:9 Yehova, Nkosi yetu! hai ubungcwalisa begama lako emhlabeni wonke!" 
Psalms9:1 NDODUMISA uyehova ngentliziyo yam yonke; ndoshumayela yonke imimangaliso yako. 
Psalms9:2 Ndovuya ndigcobe kuwe: ndoculela igama lako, wena upezu kwonke!" 
Psalms9:3 Intshaba zam ekubuyeni kwazo ngomva, zoku̔beka zibube ngenxa yako." 
Psalms9:4 Ngokuba ulungisile ibango lam netyala lam; wauhleli esihlalweni sobukumkani ugweba ngobulungisa. 
Psalms9:5 Ubakalimele abaheyideni, utshabalalisile okohlakeleyo, ucimile igama labo kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms9:6 Wena lutshaba! indawo ezicitakeleyo zipelile kanye: izixeko uzicitile; isikumbuzo sazo zona site tshabalala. 
Psalms9:7 Kodwa uyehova wohlala kude kube ngunapakade: isihlalo sake sobukumkani usimisele ukugweba: 
Psalms9:8 waye yena eya kugweba ilizwe ngobulungisa; uya kwenzela intlanga umgwebo ngokufanelekileyo. 
Psalms9:9 Uyehova woba yinyango kubo abancinezelweyo, kwa yinyango ngamaxesha obunzima." 
Psalms9:10 Abalaziyo igama lako botembela kuwe; ngokuba wena. Yehova! ungabalahlanga abakufunayo. 
Psalms9:11 Culani kuyehova, ohleli e‐Ziyone: xelani pakati kwezizwe izenzo zake." 
Psalms9:12 Nxa abuza igazi, uyakumbula zona: akalibali ukukala kwababandezelweyo." 
Psalms9:13 Ndipate ngofefe, Yehova! kangela ukubandezelwa kwam ngabandizondayo, wena undipakamisayo emasangweni okufa!" 
Psalms9:14 ukuze ndishumayele lonke udumo lwako emasangweni entombi ka‐Ziyone, ndigcobe kulo usindiso lwako." 
Psalms9:15 Abaheyideni batshonele emnxunyeni babewenzile; elutanjeni abalufihlileyo lubanjiwe olwabo unyawo. 
Psalms9:16 Uyehova uyaziwa ngomgwebo a wenzileyo; ngomsebenzi wezake izandla okohlakeleyo utiyelwe. Sela. Higayone. 
Psalms9:17 Abakohlakeleyo bobuyela esihogweni; kwa zonke izizwe ezilibala utixo. 
Psalms9:18 Ngokuba osweleyo engayi kuhlala elityalwa; itemba lamahlwempu aliyi kuba ngunapakade litshabalala. 
Psalms9:19 Pakama, Yehova! mayingeyisi into engumntu; izizwe mazigwetywe pambi kwobuso bako." 
Psalms9:20 Beka ukwoyika pezu kwazo, Yehova! zizazi izizwe ukuba zingabantu kodwa. Sela." 
Psalms10:1 KUNGANINA, Yehova! ukuba ume kude? kunganina ukuba uzimele ngamaxesha obunzima?" 
Psalms10:2 Okohlakeleyo nger̔atshi uyatshutshisa ihlwempu. Mababanjwe kwa ngamaqinga abawaqingileyo. 
Psalms10:3 Ngokuba okohlakeleyo eqa̔yisa ngenkanuko yompefumlo wake; ubonga obawela inzuzo, edela uyehova." 
Psalms10:4 Okohlakeleyo, ngokuqanqalaza kwake, akayi kufuna u‐Tixo; onke amaqinga ake ati akuko tixo." 
Psalms10:5 Indlela zake ziqinile ngamaxesha onke; imigwebo yako ipezulu kude kuye; intshaba zake zonke uyazicekisa. 
Psalms10:6 Ute entliziyweni yake: Andiyi kushukunyiswa kwa napakade; ngokuba ndingeselishweni. 
Psalms10:7 Umlomo wake uzele kukutuka, nayinkohliso, nabubuqinga: pantsi kwolwimi lwake kuko ububi nenkohlakalo." 
Psalms10:8 Uhleli ezindaweni zokulalela zemizi; ezindaweni zangasese uyabulala ongenatyala; amehlo ake ayazifihlela olusizi. 
Psalms10:9 Uyalalela ngasese, njengengonyama eludadeni; uyalalela ukubamba ihlwempu; uyabamba ihlwempu akulir̔olela elutanjeni lwake." 
Psalms10:10 Uyazigoba, uyancatama, ukuba abalusizi bawe ngento zake zamandla." 
Psalms10:11 Ute entliziyweni yake: Utixo ulibele; ubufihlile ubuso bake; akasayi kuza abone. 
Psalms10:12 Vuka, Yehova! Tixo, pakamisa isandla sako! ungalibali ababandezelweyo." 
Psalms10:13 Yinina ukuba okohlakeleyo adele utixo? Ute entliziyweni yake: Akuyi kubuza. 
Psalms10:14 Ubonile noko; ngokuba wena ugqala ubunzima nenkatazo, ukuze upindezele ngesandla sako; olusizi uyazilahlela kuwe; ungumncedi wenkedama wena." 
Psalms10:15 Yapula ingalo yokohlakeleyo nongalungileyo: buza inkohlakalo yake ude ungabi sayifumana. 
Psalms10:16 Uyehova ungukumkani kude kube ngunapakade: abaheyideni batshabalele elizweni lake. 
Psalms10:17 Inkanuko yabalulamileyo uyivile, Yehova! uya kulungisa intliziyo yabo; uya kubeka indlebe yako;" 
Psalms10:18 ukuba ugwebele inkedama noncinezelweyo, aze umntu wasemhlabeni angabi sabatusa." 
Psalms11:1 NDITEMBELE kuyehova mna; niti nina ukuti kumpefumlo wam: Pepela entabeni yakowenu njengentaka? 
Psalms11:2 Ngokuba, kangela, abakohlakeleyo bayatyeda isipeta; bayalungisa utolo lwabo entanjeni, ukuze batole ngasese ngakuye olungileyo ngentliziyo." 
Psalms11:3 Nxa zicitiwe izisekelo, angati nina olungileyo?" 
Psalms11:4 Uyehova usetempileni yake eyingcwele; isihlalo sobukumkani sikayehova sisezulwini; amehlo ake ayakangela, inkope zake ziyalinga, onyana babantu." 
Psalms11:5 Uyehova uyalinga olungileyo; kuloko umpefumlo wake uzonda okohlakeleyo notanda ubudlwengu. 
Psalms11:6 Uya kunisa pezu kwabakohlakeleyo imigibe, — umlilo, nesufure, nomoya wolwopu: isabelwa sendebe yabo soba njalo ke." 
Psalms11:7 Ngokuba uyehova olungileyo etanda ubulungisa; ubuso bake buyakangela olungisayo. 
Psalms12:1 SIZA, Yehova! ngokuba ababedeshayo bepela: ngokuba abenyaniso bencipeka pakati kwonyana babantu." 
Psalms12:2 Bayateta ubuxoki umntu kummelwane wake; bayateta ngomlomo obutelezi, na ngentliziyo mbini." 
Psalms12:3 Uyehova uya kunqamla yonke imilomo ebutelezi, nolwimi oluteta izinto ezinkulu:" 
Psalms12:4 abate: Siya kweyisa ngelwimi zetu; imilomo yeyetu; ngubanina oyinkosi pezu kwetu? 
Psalms12:5 Ngenxa yokubandezelwa kwamahlwempu, ngenxa yokugula kwabasweleyo, kaloku ndiya kuvuka, utsho uyehova: ndiya kumbeka ekugcinekeni lowo amcekisayo." 
Psalms12:6 Amazwi kayehova ngamazwi amhlope; njeng esilivere ilingiwe esinyibilikisweni somhlaba, ecokisiweyo kasixe̔nxe." 
Psalms12:7 Wena, Yehova! uya kubagcina, wobalondoloza kwesisizukulwana kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms12:8 Abakohlakeleyo bayahambahamba ngamacala onke, nxa kupakanyiswa ubuncwangu bonyana babantu." 
Psalms13:1 UYA kundilibala kude kube ninina, Yehova? kude kube ngunapakade na? Wondifihlela ubuso bako kude kube ninina?" 
Psalms13:2 Kwoda kube ninina ndibeka amaqinga empefumlweni wam, n osizi entliziyweni yam imihla ngemihla? kwoda kube ninina utshaba lwam lupakanyiswa pezu kwam?" 
Psalms13:3 Zukangele, undipendule, Yehova, Tixo wam! kanyisa amehlo am, hleze ndilale ubutongo bokufa;" 
Psalms13:4 hleze luti utshaba lwam: Ndimeyisile; n abo balana nam bavuye ndakushukunyiswa. 
Psalms13:5 Kodwa mna nditembile ebubeleni bako; intliziyo yam yovuya elusindisweni lwako. 
Psalms13:6 Ndovuma kuyehova, ngokuba endenzele okulungileyo." 
Psalms14:1 IGEZA liti entliziyweni yalo: Akuko tixo. Bonakele, benze izenzo ezizondekileyo; akuko owenza okulungileyo." 
Psalms14:2 Uyehova esezulwini wakangela pantsi pezu kwonyana babantu, ukubona ukuba kuko na oqondayo, ofuna utixo." 
Psalms14:3 Bapambukile bonke, badlubukile kunye; akuko owenza okulungileyo, noko amnye." 
Psalms14:4 Bonke abenzi benkohlakalo abanakwazi na? abadla abantu bam njengokungati babesidla isonka: ababizanga kuye uyehova. 
Psalms14:5 Bebesoyika isoyikiso kona apo: ngokuba utixo esesizukulwaneni sabalungileyo. 
Psalms14:6 Nidanisile icebo lolihlwempu; ngokuba uyehova eyindawo yake yokupepela. 
Psalms14:7 Alwaba usindiswa lwo‐Sirayeli lwabeluvele e‐Ziyone! Nxa uyehova aya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwabantu bake, uya kugcoba u‐Yakobi, uya kuvuya u‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms15:1 YEHOVA! ngubanina oya kuhlala ententeni yako? ngubanina oya kuma entabeni yako eyingcwele? 
Psalms15:2 Ohambayo ngokulungileyo, esenza ngokulungisa, eteta inyaniso ngentliziyo yake;" 
Psalms15:3 ongahlebiyo ngolwimi lwake, engenzi okubi kummelwane wake, engatabati isituko ngakumhlobo wake;" 
Psalms15:4 oti okohlakeleyo uba nokudelwa emehlweni ake, kodwa abo boyika uyehova uyababeka; ofungele okubi, engaguquki noko;" 
Psalms15:5 ongaboleki imali yake ngenxa yenzuzo enkulu, nebaso akalamkeli ngakuye ongenatyala. Owenza ezizinto akayi kushukunyiswa kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms16:1 NDILONDOLOZE, Tixo! ngokuba nditembela kuwe." 
Psalms16:2 Mpefumlo wam! utshilo kuyehova ukuti: Uyinkosi yam; ukulunga kwam aku fikeleli kuwe," 
Psalms16:3 kufikelela kubo abangcwele abasemhlabeni, nakubadumileyo ekukubo konke ukunyamekela kwam." 
Psalms16:4 Ziya kwandiswa intlungu zabanxamele utixo wumbi: andiyi kunikela ngeminikelo yabo yegazi; namagama abo andiyi kuwatabatela emlonyeni wam. 
Psalms16:5 Uyehova usisabelwa sesahlulo sam, nesendebe yam: wena uyagcina iqashiswa lam." 
Psalms16:6 Intambo zokulinganisa ziwe kum ezindaweni ezimnandi; ewe, lilifa elihle elilelam." 
Psalms16:7 Ndiya kumbonga uyehova, ondinika icebo: kanjalo izintso zam ziyandiluleka ngamaxesha asebusuku." 
Psalms16:8 Uyehova ndimbekile pambi kwam futi: engasekunene kum nje, andisayi kushukunyiswa." 
Psalms16:9 Ngako oko intliziyo yam iyavuya, nengcwalisa yam iyagcoba: kanjalo inyama yam iya kupumla ngetemba." 
Psalms16:10 Ngokuba ungayi kushiya umpefumlo wam ehadesi; kanjako akuyi kuyekelela oyingcwele yako eve ukubola. 
Psalms16:11 Uya kundazisa indlela yobomi: ebusweni bako kuko ubuninzi bovuyo; ngesokunene isandla sako kuko iziyolo ezingunapakade. 
Psalms17:1 YEHOVA! yiva okulungileyo, pulapula ukumemeza kwam; nika indlebe emtandazweni wam, onga pumi emlonyeni wenkohliso." 
Psalms17:2 Ukugwetyelwa kwam makuvele ebusweni bako; amehlo ako makakangele okufanelekileyo. 
Psalms17:3 Uyilingile intliziyo yam; undibonile ebusuku: undicokisile, akuyi kufumana nto; ndicingile, umlomo wam awuyi kugqita." 
Psalms17:4 Ngokwemisebenzi yabantu, ngelizwi lomlomo wako ndizilumkile indlela zesidlwengu." 
Psalms17:5 Sekela ukuhamba kwam emikondweni yako, kuze ukunyatela kwam kungatyibiliki." 
Psalms17:6 Ndibizile kuwe, ngokuba uya kundipendula, Tixo! tobela kum indlebe yako, uve ukuteta kwam." 
Psalms17:7 Yenza izibele zako zibe ngummangaliso, wena ubasindisayo abatembela kuwe kwabo bavukayo ngakwesandla sako sokunene!" 
Psalms17:8 Ndigcine njengokozo lweliso, ndifihle pantsi kwesitunzi samapiko ako," 
Psalms17:9 kubo abakohlakeleyo abandicitayo, kuzo intshaba zobomi bam e zindiṙaulayo." 
Psalms17:10 Bazivingcele ekutyebeni kwabo: bayateta ngeṙatshi ngomlomo wabo. 
Psalms17:11 Basingqongile kaloku ekuhambeni kwetu: babekile amehlo abo ukutobela emhlabeni. 
Psalms17:12 Ukuxelisa kwabo kunjengokwengonyama enxamele ukuqwenga; nanjengokwengonyama entsha ihleli ezindaweni ezingasese. 
Psalms17:13 Vuka, Yehova! mpangele, mwise pantsi: sindisa umpefumlo wam kokohlakeleyo, oliṙele lako;" 
Psalms17:14 kubo abantu, abasisandla sako, Yehova! kubo abantu belizwe elikoyo, abasabelwa sikwokukudliwa kwobomi, nabasisu usizalisayo ngendyebo yako: bakoliwe ngabantwana; nesisalela sabo bayasishiyela intsapo zabo." 
Psalms17:15 Mna, ndobona ubuso bako ebulungiseni: ndoba ndikoliwe ngumfanekiselo wako ndakuvuka." 
Psalms18:1 NDOKUTANDA, Yehova, Mandla am!" 
Psalms18:2 Uyehova uliliwa lam, nenqaba yam, nomkululi wam; utixo wam, ilityekazi lam; ndiya kutembela kuye: ikaka lam, nopondo lwosindiswa lwam, n enyango yam." 
Psalms18:3 Ndobiza kuyehova, odumisekayo; ndandiya kusindiswa ezintshabeni zam." 
Psalms18:4 Intambo zokufa zandiṙaula, nemisinga yobunginingini yandoyikisa;" 
Psalms18:5 intambo zehadesi zandingqonga; imigibe yokufa yandipangela. 
Psalms18:6 Ebunzimeni bam ndabiza kuyehova, ndakala kutixo wam: weva ilizwi lam esetempileni yake; nokukala kwam ebusweni bake kweza ezindlebeni zake." 
Psalms18:7 Wandula umhlaba wazamazama, wangcangcazela; namasekwa entaba ashukuma, azamazama, ngokuba ebequmbile." 
Psalms18:8 Kwenyuka umsi empumlweni yake; nomlilo uvela emlonyeni wake wadla; amalahle avuta ngawo. 
Psalms18:9 Wagoba izulu, wehla: sasitokotoko pantsi kwenyawo zake." 
Psalms18:10 Wakwela pezu kwekerubime, wapapazela; wabaleka pezu kwamapiko omoya." 
Psalms18:11 Ubumnyama wabenza imfihlelo yake; intente yake yampahla, amanzi amnyama, amafu abungqingqwa ezulu." 
Psalms18:12 Ngenkazimlo epambi kwake kwadlula amafu ake, izico̔to, namalahle omlilo." 
Psalms18:13 Uyehova wadudumisa ezulwini; opezu kwonke wanika ilizwi lake, izico̔to, namalahle omlilo." 
Psalms18:14 Watuma intolo zake, wabaci̔ta; wongezelela ngemibane, wabapitizelisa." 
Psalms18:15 Kwandula kwabonakala amazantsi amanzi, atyileka namasekwa omhlaba, ngokutetisa kwako, Yehova! ngokuquta kwomoya wempumlo yako." 
Psalms18:16 Wasusa pezulu, wanditabata; wandir̔ola emanzini amaninzi;" 
Psalms18:17 wandisindisa elutshabeni lwam olunamandla; nakwabo banditiyayo; ngokuba bebendidlula ngamandla. 
Psalms18:18 Bandipangela ngomhla wengozi yam; kodwa uyehova ebesisixaso kum. 
Psalms18:19 Wandipumisela endaweni ebanzi, wandikulula, ngokuba ebekoliswa ndim." 
Psalms18:20 Uyehova wandivuza njengokwobulungisa bam; njengokwobumhlope bezandla zam wandibuyekezela. 
Psalms18:21 Ngokuba ndizibambile indlela zikayehova, ndandingemkanga ngenkohlakalo kutixo wam." 
Psalms18:22 Ngokuba zonke izigwebo zake zibe zipambi kwam; nemimiso yake andiyipambukisanga kum. 
Psalms18:23 Bendilungisekile pambi kwake, ndandizibamba enkohlakalweni yam:" 
Psalms18:24 ngako uyehova undibuyekezele njengokwobulungisa bam, njengokwobumhlope bezandla zam pambi kwamehlo ake." 
Psalms18:25 Konobubele uyazibonakalisa unobubele; kumntu olungisekile uyazibonakalisa ulungisekile; 
Psalms18:26 komsulwa uyazibonakalisa umsulwa; nakogwenxa uyazibonakalisa ugwenxa. 
Psalms18:27 Ngokuba abantu ababandezelweyo ubasindisa wena; kodwa amehlo eratshi uyawatobisa. 
Psalms18:28 Ngokuba wena ubaneka isibane sam: uyehova, utixo wam, uyakanyisa ubumnyama bam." 
Psalms18:29 Ngokuba ngawe ndiliwele ibandla; kwa ngaye utixo wam ndigqitile eludongeni. 
Psalms18:30 Utixo indlela yake ifezekile ukulunga; ilizwi likayehova licocekile: ulikaka yena kubo bonke abatembela kuye. 
Psalms18:31 Ngokuba ngubanina o ngutixo ngapandle kwoyehova? ngubanina olilityekazi ngapandle kwotixo wetu? 
Psalms18:32 Ngutixo ondibinqayo ngamandla; owenza nendlela yam ilungiseke. 
Psalms18:33 Uyenza inyawo zam zibe njengezamaxamakazi; uyandimisa ezinyangweni zam. 
Psalms18:34 Uyafundisa izandla zam ukulwa, side sityedwe isipeta sexina ngengalo zam." 
Psalms18:35 Undipile ikaka losindiso lwako; isandla sako sokunene sindisekele; ukululama kwako kundenze mkulu. 
Psalms18:36 Wabusenza banzi ukunyatela kwam pantsi kwam; ati amaqata am akahexa. 
Psalms18:37 Ndaputuma intshaba zam, ndazifumana; andabuya ndada ndazigqibela." 
Psalms18:38 Ndazityumza, zaza zakohlwa kuvuka; zawa pantsi kwenyawo zam." 
Psalms18:39 Ngokuba ubundibinqela ukulwa ngamandla; ubatobisile pantsi kwam abo babesukela ngakum: 
Psalms18:40 wandinika umhlana wentshaba zam; ndize nditshabalalise abo banditiyayo. 
Psalms18:41 Bakala, kodwa bekungeko osindisayo; kwa kuyehova, kodwa akabapendula." 
Psalms18:42 Ndaza ndabaguba njengotuli ngapambi kwomoya; ndabalahla njengenkunkuma yezitarate. 
Psalms18:43 Undikulule emapikeni abantu; undimisele ndibe yintloko yezizwe; abantu endingabazanga bayandikonza. 
Psalms18:44 Ngokuva kwendlebe bayapulapula kum; abasemzini bayazenzisa kum. 
Psalms18:45 Abasemzini bayasinya; bayankwantya bepuma ezinqatyeni zabo. 
Psalms18:46 Uyehova uhleli; malibongwe ilityekazi lam; makadunyiswe utixo wosindiswa lwam. 
Psalms18:47 Ngutixo ondenzela impindezelo, oweyisa izizwe pantsi kwam," 
Psalms18:48 ondisindisa ezintshabeni zam: ewe, wena undipakamisele ngapezulu kwabo basukela ngakum; undikulule emntwini wobudlwengu." 
Psalms18:49 Ngako oko ndobulela kuwe, Yehova! pakati kwabaheyideni, ndicule egameni lako:" 
Psalms18:50 owandisa intsindiswa zokumkani wake; owenza ububele kumtanjiswa wake, ku‐Davide, nakuyo inzalo yake kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms19:1 AMAZULU ayashumayela ubungcwalisa bukatixo; isibakabaka siyaxela umsebenzi wezandla zake. 
Psalms19:2 Imini iyampompoza ukuteta kwimini; ubusuku buyatyela ukwazi kubusuku. 
Psalms19:3 Akuko nteto, akuko mazwi; lelingenakuvakala ilizwi lawo." 
Psalms19:4 Intlokoma yawo ipumele kuwo wonke umhlaba, neziteto zawo kwa sekupeleni kwelizwe. Kuwo wona umisele ilanga intente;" 
Psalms19:5 elinjengomyeni epuma esililini sake; e livuya njengeṙoti ukukaulezela indlela. 
Psalms19:6 Ukupuma kwalo livela ekupeleni kwezulu; ukuzekelela kwalo kungasezincameni zalo: akuko nto ifihlakeleyo ekubaleleni kwalo. 
Psalms19:7 Umteto kayehova ufezekile, ubuyisa umpefumlo; isinqi̔no sikayehova sinyanisekile, silumkisa isidenge;" 
Psalms19:8 ingxelo zikayehova zifanelekile, zivuyisa intliziyo; umyalelo kayehova ungcwele, ukanyisela amehlo;" 
Psalms19:9 ulwoyiko lukayehova lumhlope, lumi ngonapakade; izigwebo zikayehova ziyinyaniso, zilungile kunye." 
Psalms19:10 Zinokunqweneleka pezu kwegolide, ewe, pezu kwobuninzi begolide ecokisiweyo; zinokuyola pezu kwobusi nencindi yobusi." 
Psalms19:11 Kanjalo isicaka sako siyaliwe ngazo; ekuzigcineni kuko umvuzo omkulu. 
Psalms19:12 Iziposo ngubanina ongaziqondayo? ndihlambulule kwezifihlakeleyo: 
Psalms19:13 nqanda isicaka sako nakwezer̔atshi; mazingabi nabukosi pezu kwam: kukona ndiya kuba ndifezekile, ndoba msulwa esigqitweni esikulu." 
Psalms19:14 Iziteto zomlomo wam, nezicamango zentliziyo yam, mazitandeke ebusweni bako, Yehova, Liwa lam nomkululi wam!" 
Psalms20:1 WANGA uyehova angakupendula ngemini yobunzima: langa igama lotixo ka‐Yakobi lingakubeka enyangweni: 
Psalms20:2 akutumele uncedo luvela endaweni eyingcwele, akuxase ngokuvela e‐Ziyone;" 
Psalms20:3 akumbule yonke iminikelo yako, nedini lokutshiswa lako alamkele; Sela:" 
Psalms20:4 akunike njengokusentliziyweni yako, nalo lonke icebo lako alizalisekise!" 
Psalms20:5 Sovuyelela ngalo usindiso lwako; somisa ibanile ngegama lotixo wetu. Maaze uyehova azalisekise konke ukucela kwako. 
Psalms20:6 Kaloku ndiyazi ukuba uyehova uyasindisa umtanjiswa wake; uya kumpendula ezulwini lake eliyingcwele, amncede ngamandla osindiso lwesandla sake sokunene." 
Psalms20:7 Abanye bancoma inqwelo zokulwa, nabanye amahashe; kodwa tina siya kuncoma igama likayehova, lotixo wetu." 
Psalms20:8 Bona batobile, bawa; kanti tina sisukile, sapakama." 
Psalms20:9 Sindisa, Yehova! ukumkani makasipendule, mhlana sibizayo." 
Psalms21:1 YEHOVA! ukumkani wovuya ngamandla ako; ukugcoba kwake ngosindiso lwako ukuba kukulu ke! 
Psalms21:2 Umpile inkanuko yentliziyo yake; isicelo somlomo wake akusibandezanga. Sela. 
Psalms21:3 Ngokuba umpangela ngamatamsanqa okulunga; uyabeka isitsaba segolide ecokisiweyo entloko yake. 
Psalms21:4 Ebecela ubomi kuwe, wamnika ke; kwa ubude bemihla kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms21:5 Ubungewalisa bake bukulu ngalo usindiso lwako; uyabeka udumo nobukulu pezu kwake. 
Psalms21:6 Ngokuba uya kumfaka amatamsanqa kude kube ngunapakade; uya kumvuyisa ngovuyo ebusweni bako. 
Psalms21:7 Ngokuba ukumkani etembela kuyehova: nangabo ububele bopezu konke akayi kushukunyiswa. 
Psalms21:8 Isandla sako sofumana zonke intshaba zako; esokunene sako sofumana abatiyi bako. 
Psalms21:9 Uya kubenza babe njengeziko lomlilo ngexesha lobuko bako: uyehova uya kubaginya ngomsindo wake; umlilo uya kubadla. 
Psalms21:10 Isixakato sabo uya kusitshabalalisa wena kwa semhlabeni, nenzalo yabo kwa kubo onyana babantu." 
Psalms21:11 Ngokuba becebile ububi ngakuwe; bacingile iqinga elikohlakeleyo, koko bengenakweyisa:" 
Psalms21:12 ngokuba uya kubajikisa umhlana; ezintanjeni zako uya kubekisa intolo ngakubo. 
Psalms21:13 Zipakamise, Yehova! ebukulwini bako; sasiya kuvuma sidumise amandla ako." 
Psalms22:1 TIXO wam, Tixo wam! undishiyile nganina? ukude nganina ekusizweni kwam, na semazwini okukala kwam?" 
Psalms22:2 Tixo wam! ndiyabiza emini, kanti akupenduli; nasebusuku, kanti akuko ukuti cwaka kum." 
Psalms22:3 Kodwa wena uyingcwele, uhleli ezindunyisweni zo‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms22:4 Obawo betu batembela kuwe; batemba, wabakulula ke." 
Psalms22:5 Balilela kuwe, basindiswa ke; batembela kuwe, abadaniswa ke." 
Psalms22:6 Kuloko mna ndingumsundu, andinguye umntu; ndiyinto yokugxekwa eluntwini, neyokudelwa ngabantu." 
Psalms22:7 Bonke abandibonayo bayandihleka; bawakamisa umlomo, bahlunguzela intloko, besiti:" 
Psalms22:8 Wayama uyehova, makamsindise; makamkulule, ngokuba ekoliswa nguye." 
Psalms22:9 Kodwa wena ungobendiku̔pa esiswini; wanditembisa ndisemabeleni kama̔. 
Psalms22:10 Bendilahlelwe kuwe kwa sesizalweni; ungutixo wam kwa sesiswini sikama̔. 
Psalms22:11 Zungabi kude nam, ngokuba ubunzima bukufupi, kungeko noncedayo." 
Psalms22:12 Inkunzi ezininzi zindingqongile; inkunzi ezinamandla zase‐Bashane zindiṙaulile. 
Psalms22:13 Zandakamela ngemilomo yazo, njeng engonyama eqwengayo nekonyayo." 
Psalms22:14 Ndipalaziwe njengamanzi; amatambo am onke aṙunekile: intliziyo yam injengomtwebeba; inyibilikile pakati kwamatumbu am. 
Psalms22:15 Ukwomelela kwam kwomile njengecepe lompanda; ulwimi lwam lunamatele ekuhlangutyeni lam; undibekile elutulini lwokufa. 
Psalms22:16 Ngokuba izinja zindingqongile; intlanganiso yabenzi bokungalungileyo indipahlile; bahlaba izandla zam nenyawo zam. 
Psalms22:17 Ndingabala onke amatambo am: bona bayakangela, bayandibonela." 
Psalms22:18 Bayabelana izivato zam; napezu kwengubo yam bayenza amaqashiso. 
Psalms22:19 Kodwa wena, Yehova! zungabi kude nam: Mandla am! kauleza ukuza kundisiza." 
Psalms22:20 Hlangula eṙeleni umpefumlo wam, nas emandleni enja udwa lwam." 
Psalms22:21 Ndisindise emlonyeni wengonyama: undivile wandisindisa ezimpondweni zenyati. 
Psalms22:22 Ndoshumayela igama lako kubazalwana bam; pakati kwentlanganiso ndokubonga. 
Psalms22:23 Nina nimoyika uyehova, mbongeni; nonke nina nzalo ka‐Yakobi, mdumiseni; nimhlonele, nonke nina nzalo ka‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms22:24 Ngokuba ubuhlwempu behlwempu engabudelanga, engabuzondanga kanjalo; akalifihlelanga nobuso bake; wati, lakulilela kuye, waliva." 
Psalms22:25 Kwoba ngawe ukubonga kwam entlanganisweni enkulu; izibambiso zam ndozifeza ebusweni babamoyikayo. 
Psalms22:26 Abalulamileyo botya bahlutiswe; baya kubonga uyehova abo bamfunayo: intliziyo yenu iya kupila kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms22:27 Zonke izipelo zomhlaba zokumbula zibuyele kuyehova: zonke izizalwane zezizwe zobedesha ebusweni bako. 
Psalms22:28 Ngokuba ubukumkani bo bukayehova: nguye umpatibukosi pakati kwezizwe. 
Psalms22:29 Zonke izityebi zomhlaba zotya zibedeshe; bonke abahlela elutulini bogoba pambi kwake; nalowo ongenakupilisa umpefumlo wake. 
Psalms22:30 Kwobako inzalo emkonzayo: kwobaliswa ngenkosi esizukulwaneni. 
Psalms22:31 Baya kuza, bashumayele ubulungisa bake ebantwini a baya kuzalwa, ukuba wenzile oku." 
Psalms23:1 UYEHOVA ungumalusi wam: andiyi kuswela luto. 
Psalms23:2 Uyandilalisa emaṙiweni aluhlaza; uyandikapela ngasemanzini azolileyo. 
Psalms23:3 Uyabuyisa umpefumlo wam; uyandikokela ezindleleni zobulungisa ngenxa yegama lake. 
Psalms23:4 Nakuba ndihamba emfuleni wesitunzi sokufa, andiyi kwoyika bubi, ngokuba wena unam; intonga yako nomsimelelo wako zona ziyandonwabisa." 
Psalms23:5 Uyandilungisela isitebe pambi kwentshaba zam; uyitambisile ngeoli intloko yam; indebe yam iyapupuma. 
Psalms23:6 Ngenyaniso ndiya kulandelwa kukulunga nabububele yonke imihla yokudla kwam ubomi; nokuhlala kwam kwoba sendlwini kayehova ngonapakade. 
Psalms24:1 UMHLABA ngo kayehova, nokuzala kwawo; ilizwe, nabahleli kulo." 
Psalms24:2 Ngokuba ewusekele pezu kwelwandle; wawuqinisela pezu kwemilambo. 
Psalms24:3 Ngubanina oya kunyukela entabeni kayehova? ngubanina oya kuma endaweni yake eyingcwele? 
Psalms24:4 Ozandla zimhlope, nontliziyo ingcwele; oti umpefumlo wake ungawupakamiselanga kokungendawo, nongafunganga ngenkohliso." 
Psalms24:5 Yena uya kwamkela itamsanqa kuyehova, nobulungisa kutixo wosindiswa lwake." 
Psalms24:6 Esi sisizukulwana sabo bambuzelayo; sabo bafuna ubuso bako, Tixo ka‐Yakobi! Sela." 
Psalms24:7 Pakamisani intloko zenu, masango! nibe nokupakanyiswa, zingcango ezingunapakade! waeya kungena ukumkani wobungcwalisa." 
Psalms24:8 Ngubanina lokumkani wobungcwalisa? nguyehova onamandla nobuṙoti, nguyehova onobuṙoti emfazweni." 
Psalms24:9 Pakamisani intloko zenu, masango! nipakame, zingcango ezingunapakade! waeya kungena ukumkani wobungcwalisa." 
Psalms24:10 Ngubanina yena lokumkani wobungcwalisa? nguyehova wemikosi: nguye ukumkani wobungcwalisa. Sela. 
Psalms25:1 YEHOVA! ndiyawupakamisela kuwe umpefumlo wam. 
Psalms25:2 Tixo wam! ndiyatembela kuwe, mandingadaniswa: intshaba zam mazingandivuyeleli." 
Psalms25:3 Kanjalo makungabiko odaniswayo kwabakangela kuwe: makudaniswe abo benzayo ngobuxoki kungeko tuba. 
Psalms25:4 Yehova! ndazise indlela zako, ndifundise imikwa yako." 
Psalms25:5 Ndikokele enyanisweni yako, undifundise: ngokuba wena ungutixo wosindiswa lwam; ndikangela kuwe imini yonke." 
Psalms25:6 Kumbula, Yehova! inceba zako, nezibele zako, ngokuba kungunapakade zikoyo." 
Psalms25:7 Izono zobutsha bam, nezigqito zam, ungazikumbuli: njengokwofefe lwako ndikumbulele wena, ngenxa yobubele bako, Yehova!" 
Psalms25:8 Ulungile uyehova, unokulungisa; ngako oko uya kubonisa aboni ngendlela." 
Psalms25:9 Uya kukokela abalulamileyo esikweni; uya kufundisa abalulamileyo indlela yake. 
Psalms25:10 Zonke indlela zikayehova zibububele, ziyinyaniso, kwabo babambayo ucebano lwake nezinqi̔nelo zake." 
Psalms25:11 Ngenxa yegama lako, Yehova! xolela inkohlakalo yam, ngokuba inkulu yona." 
Psalms25:12 Lowamntu umoyikayo uyehova nguwupina? uya kumbonisa ngendlela aya kuyiqasha. 
Psalms25:13 Umpefumlo wake uya kuhlala ekulungeni; umhlaba woba lilifa lenzalo yake. 
Psalms25:14 Ubuncoko bukayehova bunabo bamoyikayo; nocebano lwake lona luyabazisa. 
Psalms25:15 Amehlo am amele uyehova futi; ngokuba eya kuku̔pa inyawo zam elutanjeni. 
Psalms25:16 Beka kum, ube nofefe kum; ngokuba ndiligantuntu nolusizi mna." 
Psalms25:17 Imbandezelwa zentliziyo yam zandisiwe; ndiku̔pe ebunzimeni bam. 
Psalms25:18 Bona usizi lwam, nokwapuka kwam, uxolele zonke izono zam." 
Psalms25:19 Kangela intshaba zam, ngokuba zininzi; ziyanditiya ngokutiya kwobudlwengu." 
Psalms25:20 Gcina umpefumlo wam, undihlangule; mandingadaniswa, ngokuba nditemba wena." 
Psalms25:21 Mandilondolozwe kukunyanisa nokulungisa; ngokuba ndikangela kuwe. 
Psalms25:22 Kulula u‐Sirayeli, Tixo! kuzo zonke imbandezelwa zake." 
Psalms26:1 NDIGWEBELE, Yehova! ngokuba ndihambile ngokunyanisa kwam: nditembele kuyehova, andiyi kutyibilika." 
Psalms26:2 Ndilinge, Yehova! undivavanye; cokisa izintso zam nentliziyo yam." 
Psalms26:3 Ngokuba ububele bako bupambi kwamehlo am: ndihambile nokuhamba enyanisweni yako. 
Psalms26:4 Andihlalanga nabantu abangendawo; andiyi kungena nabo bahanahanisayo. 
Psalms26:5 Nditiyile intlanganiso yabenzi bokungalungileyo; andiyi kuhlala nabakohlakeleyo. 
Psalms26:6 Ndohlamba izandla zam kokungenatyala; kukona ndiya kupahla isibingelo sako, Yehova!" 
Psalms26:7 ndize ndivakalise ngelizwi lokubulela, ndishumayele yonke imimangaliso yako." 
Psalms26:8 Yehova! nditandile intlalo yendlu yako, nendawo yokuhlala kwobungcwalisa bako." 
Psalms26:9 Ungabuti umpefumlo wam ndawonye naboni, nobomi bam ndawonye nabantu begazi;" 
Psalms26:10 ekuko ubumenemene ezandleni zabo, nesokunene sabo sizele ngesincwancwaniso." 
Psalms26:11 Kodwa mna ndohamba ngokunyanisa kwam: ndikulule, ube nofefe kum." 
Psalms26:12 Unyawo lwam lumi endaweni elungeleleneyo: ndobonga uyehova ezintlanganisweni. 
Psalms27:1 UYEHOVA ulukanyo lwam nosindiso lwam, ndiya kwoyika banina? uyehova ungamandla obomi bam, ndiya kungcangcazela ngobanina?" 
Psalms27:2 Bati abenzi bokungalungileyo bakusondela ngakum, ukuza kudla inyama yam, kwa abayimpi kum, nabazintshaba zam, baku̔beka bawa." 
Psalms27:3 Nakuba umkosi ubuya kundivimbela, intliziyo yam ayisayi kwoyika; nakuba imfazwe ibiya kundivukela, senditembela koku." 
Psalms27:4 Inye into endicelileyo kuyehova, eyona ndiya kuyifuna: ukuba mandihlale endlwini kayehova yonke imihla yokudla kwam ubomi; ndize ndikangele ubuhle bukayehova, ndibuze nokubuza etempileni yake." 
Psalms27:5 Ngokuba eya kundizimeza etabanakeleni yake ngomhla welishwa: wondifihlela endaweni efihlakeleyo yentente yake: wondimisa pezulu eweni. 
Psalms27:6 Kanjalo kaloku intloko yam yopakanyiswa pezulu pezu kwentshaba zam ezindingqongayo: ngako ndiya kubinga imibingo yomgcobo ententeni yake; ndovuma, ndocula nokucula, kuyehova." 
Psalms27:7 Yiva ilizwi lam, ndakubiza, Yehova! ube nofefe kum, undipendule." 
Psalms27:8 Nxa ubusiti: Funani ubuso bam; intliziyo yam yati: Ubuso bako, Yehova! ndobufuna." 
Psalms27:9 Zungandifihleli ubuso bako; zungabebeti isicaka sako ngengqumbo: ubunguye umncedi wam; zungandilahli, zungandishiyi nokundishiya, Tixo wosindiswa lwam!" 
Psalms27:10 Ngokuba ndishiyiwe ngubawo nanguma̔; kodwa uyehova wondamkela. 
Psalms27:11 Ndifundise indlela yako, Yehova! undikokele ngendlela elungeleleneyo, ngenxa yabandihlolayo." 
Psalms27:12 Zungandinikeli ekukanukeni kwentshaba zam; ngokuba kuvuke ngakum amanqi̔na abuxoki, kwa nopefumla ubudlwengu." 
Psalms27:13 Ngendiba ndibubile, ukuba bendingakolwanga ukubona ukulunga kukatixo emhlabeni wabahleliyo." 
Psalms27:14 Kangela kuyehova, ukalipe, waeya kuyomeleza intliziyo yako; ewe, kangela kuyehova." 
Psalms28:1 NDOBIZA kuwe, Yehova! olilityekazi lam; zungati cwaka kum; hleze nditi, wakuti cwaka kum, ndifane nabahlele esihogweni." 
Psalms28:2 Yiva ilizwi lezikungo zam, ndakulilela kuwe, nxa ndipakamisa izandla zam ngasendaweni yako eyingcwele yokupendula." 
Psalms28:3 Zungandikukulisi nabakohlakeleyo, nabenzi bokungendawo, abatetayo uxolo kubamelwane babo, kanti bububi obusezintliziyweni zabo." 
Psalms28:4 Banike njengokwemisebenzi yabo, nanjengokwobubi bezenzo zabo: banike njengokwokwenza kwezandla zabo; buyekeza kubo ngokubafaneleyo." 
Psalms28:5 Ngenxa yokuba bengagqali imisebenzi kayehova, nokwenza kwezandla zake, uya kubacita, akayi kubaka." 
Psalms28:6 Makabongwe uyehova; ngokuba evile ilizwi lezikungo zam. 
Psalms28:7 Uyehova ungamandla am, nekaka lam; intliziyo yam yatembela kuye, ndancedwa ke: iti ngoko intliziyo yam ivuye kakulu; ndandiya kumdumisa ngeculo lam." 
Psalms28:8 Uyehova ungamandla abo; uyinqaba yosindiso yomtanjiswa wake yena. 
Psalms28:9 Sindisa abantu bako, utamsanqelise ilifa lako; bapate, ubapakamise kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms29:1 NIKELANI kuyehova, nina bakulu! nikelani kuyehova ubungcwalisa namandla." 
Psalms29:2 Nikelani kuyehova ubungcwalisa begama lake; bedeshani uyehova ebuhleni bobungcwele. 
Psalms29:3 Ilizwi likayehova lipezu kwamanzi; utixo wobungcwalisa uyadudumisa; uyehova upezu kwamanzi amaninzi. 
Psalms29:4 Ilizwi likayehova linamandla; ilizwi likayehova linobungangamsha. 
Psalms29:5 Ilizwi likayehova liyapula isedare; ewe, uyehova uziti viti isedare zase‐Lebanone." 
Psalms29:6 Uyazitsibisa njengetole; kwa i‐Lebanone ne‐Siriyone njengetole lenyati. 
Psalms29:7 Ilizwi likayehova liyanqika amalangatye omlilo. 
Psalms29:8 Ilizwi likayehova liyangcangcazelisa intlango; uyehova uyangcangcazelisa intlango yase‐Kadeshe. 
Psalms29:9 Ilizwi likayehova liyapunzisa amaxamakazi, liyawahluba namahlati: kanjalo etempileni yake bonke bakona bayateta ngobungcwalisa bake." 
Psalms29:10 Uyehova waehleli pezu kwomsinga wamanzi; ewe, uyehova uhleli engukumkani kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms29:11 Uyehova uya kunika abantu bake amandla; uyehova uya kutamsanqelisa abantu bake ngoxolo. 
Psalms30:1 NDOKUPAKAMISA, Yehova! ngokuba undinyusele pezulu, nentshaba zam ungazivuyisanga ngam." 
Psalms30:2 Yehova, Tixo wam! ndalilela kuwe, waza wandipilisa ke." 
Psalms30:3 Yehova! unyusile umpefumlo wam encw̔abeni; undigcinile ndihleli, ndize ndingehli ndiye esihogweni." 
Psalms30:4 Culani kuyehova, nina bangcwele bake! nibulele ngenkumbuzo yobungcwele bake." 
Psalms30:5 Ngokuba engumzuzwanyana kodwa engqunjeni yake; kuko ukudliwa kwobomi embukweni yake: ngokuhlwa kungalalisa ukulila, kodwa kwakusa kufika ukugcoba." 
Psalms30:6 Ndati mna ebutamsanqeni bam: Andisayi kuza ndishukunyiswe napakade. 
Psalms30:7 Wena, Yehova! ngembuko yako, umisile intaba yam ibe namandla; wafihla ubuso bako, ndasendituswa ke." 
Psalms30:8 Ndabizela kuwe, Yehova! kwa kuye uyehova ndataṙuzisa." 
Psalms30:9 Kuko uncedo lwanina egazini lam, ndakuhlela emnxunyeni? utuli lwokudumisa na? lwoshumayela inyaniso yako na?" 
Psalms30:10 Yiva, Yehova! ube nofefe ngakum; Yehova! yiba ngondincedayo." 
Psalms30:11 Undiguqulele ukulila kwam kwaba kududa; uyicumbulule intlakantlaka yam, wandibinqisa uvuyo;" 
Psalms30:12 ukuze ingcwalisa yam icule kuwe, ingati tu. Yehova, Tixo wam! ndiya kubulela kuwe kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms31:1 YEHOVA! nditembile kuwe; mandingezi ndidaniswe: ndikulule ngobulungisa bako. 
Psalms31:2 Nditobele indlebe yako; ndihlangule kamsinya: yiba lilitye lamandla kum; ube yindlu yenqaba yokundisindisa. 
Psalms31:3 Ngokuba uliliwa lam nenqaba yam; zuti ngoko, ngenxa yegama lako, undikape, undikokele." 
Psalms31:4 Ndiku̔pe elutanjeni abandifihlele lona; ngokuba ungamandla am wena. 
Psalms31:5 Ndiyabekela esandleni sako umoya wam: undikulule, Yehova, Tixo wenyaniso!" 
Psalms31:6 Ndibatiyile abo babeka izinto ezingendawo zobuxoki; kodwa mna ndiyatembela kuyehova. 
Psalms31:7 Ndiya kuvuya ndigcobe ngobubele bako: ngokuba ububonileyo ubunzima bam; uzazile imbandezelwa zompefumlo wam; 
Psalms31:8 akundinikelanga esandleni sotshaba: uzimisile inyawo zam endaweni ebanzi. 
Psalms31:9 Yiba nofefe ngakum, Yehova! ngokuba ndisebunzimeni: iliso lam lonakele ngenkatazo, kwa n omxe̔lo wam nombilini wam." 
Psalms31:10 Ngokuba ubomi bam bugqityelwe lusizi, neminyaka yam kukugula; amandla am ayapela ngenxa yobubi bam; amatambo am onakele." 
Psalms31:11 Ngenxa yentshaba zam zonke ndibe ndisigxekwa, nakakulu ke kubamelwane bam, nesoyikeko kwabo bandaziyo: abo bandibonayo pandle bandibaleka." 
Psalms31:12 Ndilityelwe njengofileyo ongenakukunjulwa; ndinjengesitya esitshabaleleyo. 
Psalms31:13 Ngokuba ndivile ukuhleba kwabaninzi; ukwoyika bekungamacala onke; nxa bebecebana ngakum, benza ngeqinga lokundihluta ubomi bam." 
Psalms31:14 Kodwa ndatembela kuwe, Yehova! ndati: Ungutixo wam wena." 
Psalms31:15 Amaxesha am asesandleni sako; ndikulule esandleni sentshaba zam, nakwabo banditshutshisayo." 
Psalms31:16 Kanyisa ubuso bako ngasesicakeni sako; ndisindise ngobubele bako. 
Psalms31:17 Mandingadaniswa, Yehova! ngokuba ndibizele kuwe: mabadaniswe abakohlakeleyo, mabati tu encw̔abeni bona." 
Psalms31:18 Maitiwe cwaka imilomo exokayo, eteta into elukuni ngakuye olungileyo nger̔atshi nangokudela." 
Psalms31:19 Hai ubukulu bobubele bako! obo ububekelele abakwoyikayo, obo ubenzele abo batemba kuwe pambi kwonyana boluntu." 
Psalms31:20 Uya kubafihla endaweni efihlakeleyo yobuko bako kuzo ingcebano zabantu; uya kubazimeza ententeni kuko ukupika kwelwimi. 
Psalms31:21 Makabongwe uyehova; ngokuba endenzele ububele bake into engummangaliso, njengokungati bendi sesixekweni esiyinqaba." 
Psalms31:22 Ngokuba ndibe ndite ekunxameni kwam: Ndinqanyulwe ebusweni bamehlo ako; kanti ubusiva ilizwi lezikungo zam, ndakulilela kuwe." 
Psalms31:23 Tandani uyehova, nonke nina bangcwele bake! uyehova elondoloza abanyanisayo nje, epindezela ngokukolisekileyo kowenza nger̔atshi." 
Psalms31:24 Kalipani, waeya kwomeleza intliziyo yenu, nonke nina nitembela kuyehova!" 
Psalms32:1 HAI itamsanqa lozigqito zixolelweyo, losono siselelweyo!" 
Psalms32:2 Hai itamsanqa lomntu uyehova angabaleli kuye inkohlakalo, nokungeko emoyeni wake inkohliso!" 
Psalms32:3 Ndindakuti cwaka, amatambo am aba madala ngokubomboloza kwam imini yonke." 
Psalms32:4 Ngokuba nasemini nasebusuku isandla sako besinzima pezu kwam: ukunyakama kwam kwaguquka kwaba kukwoma kwehlobo. Sela. 
Psalms32:5 Ndasazisa kuwe isono sam, nenkohlakalo yam andiyigubungelanga. Ndati: Ndiya kuxela izigqito zam kuyehova; waza wena waxolela ityala lesono sam. Sela." 
Psalms32:6 Ngenxa yoku kwotandaza kuwe bonke ababedeshayo, ngexesha ongafunyanwa ngalo: ngahlekana emsingeni wamanzi amaninzi akayi kusondela kubo." 
Psalms32:7 Uyindawo yam yokupepela wena; uya kundilondoloza ebunzimeni; uya kundipahla ngemigcobo yenkululo. Sela. 
Psalms32:8 Ndokufundisa, ndikubonise ngendlela oya kuhamba ngayo: ndo ku nika icebo, ndibeke iliso lam pezu kwako." 
Psalms32:9 Maningabi njengehashe, umhlaumbi njengeqwaṙaṙa, into engenakuqonda, umlomo wayo ulungele ukubanjwa ngentsimbi nangomkala, hleze isondele kuwe." 
Psalms32:10 Intlungu ezininzi zobako kokohlakeleyo; kodwa otembela kuyehova, ububele buya kumpahla." 
Psalms32:11 Vuyani kuyehova, nigcobe, nina balungileyo! nivuyelele, nonke nina bantliziyo zilungisekile!" 
Psalms33:1 VUYELELANI kuye uyehova, nina balungileyo! indumiso ifanelekile kwabalungisekileyo." 
Psalms33:2 Dumisani uyehova ngekinore; culani kuye ngenebele ezintambo zilishumi. 
Psalms33:3 Mvumeleni iculo elitsha; lungisani ukubeta ngentsholo enkulu. 
Psalms33:4 Ngokuba ilizwi likayehova lilungile; nawo wonke umsebenzi wake ngowenyaniso. 
Psalms33:5 Uyatanda ubulungisa nobugwebo: umhlaba uzele bububele bukayehova. 
Psalms33:6 Ngelizwi likayehova kwenziwa izulu, nangomoya womlomo wake wonke umkosi walo." 
Psalms33:7 Uyabuta amanzi olwandle njengemfumba; uyabeka inzulu ezindaweni zokubekela. 
Psalms33:8 Wonke umhlaba mawoyike pambi kwoyehova; bonke abemi belizwe mabahlonele yena. 
Psalms33:9 Ngokuba eke wateta, kwabako ke; waxela, kwema kwenqi ke." 
Psalms33:10 Uyehova utshabalalisile icebo labaheyideni; utshitshisile amaqinga entlanga. 
Psalms33:11 Icebo likayehova lima limi kude kube ngunapakade, n amaqinga entliziyo yake kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Psalms33:12 Hai itamsanqa lesizwe esi tixo u nguyehova; ne labantu abaqashileyo babe lilifa lake! 
Psalms33:13 Uyehova uyakangela esezulwini; uyabona bonke onyana boluntu. 
Psalms33:14 Kwa sendaweni yokuhlala kwake uyabonela bonke abemi bomhlaba. 
Psalms33:15 Uyadala zonke intliziyo zabo kunye; uyagqala zonke izenzo zabo. 
Psalms33:16 Akuko kumkani usindiswayo bubuninzi bomkosi; iṙoti alihlangulwa bubukulu bamandla. 
Psalms33:17 Ihashe libuxoki ekusindiseni; aliyi kusindisa nangobukulu bamandla alo. 
Psalms33:18 Bona ke, iliso likayehova lingakubo abamoyikayo; lingakubo abatembela ebubeleni bake;" 
Psalms33:19 ukuhlangula umpefumlo wabo ekufeni, nokubapilisa ngexesha lendlala." 
Psalms33:20 Umpefumlo wetu uyalinda uyehova; uncedo lwetu nekaka letu nguye. 
Psalms33:21 Ngokuba intliziyo yetu iya kuvuya ngaye; ngokuba sitembele egameni lake elingcwele. 
Psalms33:22 Ububele bako, Yehova! mabube pezu kwetu, njengokuba sitemba kuwe." 
Psalms34:1 NDIYA kumbonga uyehova ngamaxesha onke; udumo lwake luya kuba semlonyeni wam futi. 
Psalms34:2 Umpefumlo wam uya kuqa̔yisa ngoyehova; abalulamileyo bova bavuye. 
Psalms34:3 Yenzani nam ukumenza mkulu uyehova; masipakamise kunye igama lake. 
Psalms34:4 Ndafuna uyehova, wandipendula ke, wandikulula kuzo zonke izoyiko zam." 
Psalms34:5 Bakangela kuye, bakanyiswa ke; ubuso babo bebungenakudana." 
Psalms34:6 Elihlwempu labiza, wati uyehova weva, walisindisa kuzo zonke imbandezelwa zalo." 
Psalms34:7 Ingelosi kayehova iyamela abo bamoyikayo ngokungqonga, ibakulule." 
Psalms34:8 Yivani nibone ukuba uyehova ulungile; unetamsanqa lomntu umtembayo. 
Psalms34:9 Yoyikani uyehova, nina bangcwele bake! ngokuba kungeko kuswela kwabo bamoyikayo." 
Psalms34:10 Ingonyamana ziyaswela, zive ukulamba; kodwa abafuni bakayehova abayi kuswela nto ilungileyo." 
Psalms34:11 Yizani, lusapo! nipulapule kum; ndiya kunifundisa ukwoyika uyehova." 
Psalms34:12 Nguwupina lomntu okanuka ukudliwa kwobomi, otanda imihla, ukuze abone ukulunga?" 
Psalms34:13 Bamba ulwimi lwako lungayi enkohlakalweni, nomlomo wako ungateti inkohliso." 
Psalms34:14 Suka enkohlakalweni, wenze okulungileyo; funa uxolo, uluputume ke." 
Psalms34:15 Amehlo kayehova angakubo abalungileyo, nendlebe zake zingakuko ukukala kwabo." 
Psalms34:16 Ubuso bukayehova bungakubo abenzi benkohlakalo, ukuze kunqanyulwe ukukunjulwa kwabo emhlabeni." 
Psalms34:17 Bayakala abalungileyo, uyeva ke uyehova; nakuzo zonke imbandezelwa zabo uyabahlangula." 
Psalms34:18 Uyehova ukufupi nabo banentliziyo eyapukileyo; uyasindisa abo banomoya ogqobokileyo. 
Psalms34:19 Zininzi intsizi zolungileyo, kodwa kuzo zona zonke uyehova uyamkulula." 
Psalms34:20 Uyagcina amatambo ake onke; akuko nalinye kuwo elapulwayo. 
Psalms34:21 Ububi buya kubulala okohlakeleyo; nabo batiya olungileyo bomiselwa ityala. 
Psalms34:22 Uyehova uyakulula imipefumlo yezicaka zake: nabatemba yena akuko namnye oya kumiselwa ityala. 
Psalms35:1 PIKA wena, Yehova! nabo bapika nam; yilwa wena nabo balwayo nam." 
Psalms35:2 Bamba ikakana nekaka, upakamele ukundinceda." 
Psalms35:3 Ṙo̔la intshuntshe, uti vingci indlela ngakubo abandiputumayo: yiti kumpefumlo wam: Ndilusindiso lwako." 
Psalms35:4 Mabadaniswe, baviswe ihlazo, abo bafuna ubomi bam: mabanqandelwe ngomva, bamatiswe, abo baqingela ukwenzakala kwam." 
Psalms35:5 Mababe njengomququ pambi kwomoya, iti ingelosi kayehova i ba qu̔be." 
Psalms35:6 Indlela yabo mayibe bumnyama nobutelezi, iti ingelosi kayehova ibaputume." 
Psalms35:7 Ngokuba bendifihlele utambo lwabo emnxunyeni kungeko nto; babewumbele umpefumlo wam kungekwa nto ke. 
Psalms35:8 Wohlelwa yintshabalaliso engazi; utambo alufihlileyo luya kubamba yena, uya kuwa entshabalalisweni kwa kuyo yona." 
Psalms35:9 Kodwa owam umpefumlo wovuyelela kuyehova; uya kugcoba kulo usindiso lwake. 
Psalms35:10 Amatambo am onke oti: Yehova! ngubanina onjengawe? wena ukululayo olihlwempu komandla makulu kwawake, ewe, olihlwempu nosweleyo kulowo umpangayo." 
Psalms35:11 Kuyavuka amanqi̔na abuxoki; ayandibuza oko endingakwazanga. 
Psalms35:12 Ayandivuza ngokukohlakeleyo esikundleni sokulungileyo, efuna ukuhlutwa kwompefumlo wam." 
Psalms35:13 Kanti mna, nxa abesifa, ingubo yam yayintlakantlaka; ndabandezela umpefumlo wam ngokuzila ukutya; wati umtandazo wam wabuyela kwa sesifubeni sam." 
Psalms35:14 Ndaman’ ukwenza njengokungati ungumhlobo nomzalwana kum; ndazitoba ndilila, njengokulila kwonina." 
Psalms35:15 Kodwa bona bavuya ndakuqwalela, bahlanganisana; abajindi bahlanganisana ngakum, ndingazi; baqwenga, bengayeki:" 
Psalms35:16 ndawonye nabahleki ababuginwa emitendelekweni, banditshixizela ngamazinyo."
