Psalms35:17 Nkosi! uya kubonela kude kube ninina? Buyisa umpefumlo wam kuzo intshabalaliso zabo, udwa lwam kuzo ingonyamana." 
Psalms35:18 Ndobulela kuwe entlanganisweni enkulu; ndokudumisa pakati kwabantu abaninzi. 
Psalms35:19 Abo bazintshaba zam ngobuxoki mabangandivuyeleli; abo banditiyayo kungeko nto mabangapanyazi ngeliso. 
Psalms35:20 Ngokuba bengateti uxolo; bayaqinga indawo zenkohliso ngakubo abazolileyo bomhlaba. 
Psalms35:21 Ewe, bawakamisa umlomo wabo pezu kwam; bati: He ke! he ke! iliso letu libonile." 
Psalms35:22 Ubonile, Yehova! ungati cwaka: Nkosi! ungabi kude nam." 
Psalms35:23 Zivuse, uvukele ukulungiswa kwam, kwa ityala lam, Tixo wam nenkosi yam!" 
Psalms35:24 Ndilungise njengokwobulungisa bako, Yehova, Tixo wam! mabangandivuyeleli bona." 
Psalms35:25 Mabangati ezintliziyweni zabo: Tshotsho, mpefumlo wetu! mabangati: Simginyile." 
Psalms35:26 Mabadaniswe, bamatiswe kunye, abo bavuyayo ngelishwa lam: mabavatiswe ngedano nangehlazo, abo bazenza bakulu ngakum." 
Psalms35:27 Mabadanduluke ngovuyo, bagcobe, abo bakolela ubulungisa bam; ewe, mabaman’ ukuti: uyehova makenziwe mkulu, okolela itamsanqa lesicaka sake." 
Psalms35:28 Ulwimi lwam luya kuteta ngobulungisa bako, na ngodumo lwako imini yonke." 
Psalms36:1 UKUGQITA kwokohlakeleyo kuti entliziyweni yam: akuko ukwoyika u tixo pambi kwamehlo ake. 
Psalms36:2 Ngokuba ezibonga emehlweni ake, ngokufunyanwa kwenkohlakalo yake na ngokutiywa kwayo." 
Psalms36:3 Amazwi omlomo wake ayinto engendawo nenkohliso: usel’ eyekile ukulumka nokulungisa. 
Psalms36:4 Uyaqinga ububi eluku̔kweni lwake; uyazimisa endleleni engalungileyo; akalahli okukohlakeleyo. 
Psalms36:5 Yehova! ububele bako bufikelela ezulwini, n enyaniso yako kude kube semafini." 
Psalms36:6 Ubulungisa bako bunjengentaba zikatixo; izigwebo zako ziyinzulu enkulu: uyalondoloza abantu nenkomo, Yehova!" 
Psalms36:7 Hai ukunqaba kwobubele bako, Tixo! ngako onyana babantu bopepela esitunzini samapiko ako." 
Psalms36:8 Baya kukoliswa kukutyeba kwendlu yako; wauya kubaseza kuwo umlambo weziyoliso zako. 
Psalms36:9 Ngokuba unawe umtombo wokudliwa kwobomi; sobona ukukanya kwa sekukanyeni kwako. 
Psalms36:10 Yolula ububele bako ngakubo abakwaziyo, nobulungisa bako ngakubo abalungileyo ngentliziyo." 
Psalms36:11 Malungezi kum unyawo lwer̔atshi, nesandla sabakohlakeleyo masingandishukumisi." 
Psalms36:12 Bawile apo abenzi benkohlakalo; bakahlelwe pantsi, bekohlwa kuvuka." 
Psalms37:1 UNGAZIQUMBISI ngenxa yabo bakwenza okungalungileyo; ungabi namona ngakubo abenzi bobumenemene. 
Psalms37:2 Ngokuba beya kuhla banqanyulwe njengenca; bobuna njengomfuno oluhlaza. 
Psalms37:3 Tembela kuyehova, wenze okulungileyo; yima umhlaba, udle ngokukolwa." 
Psalms37:4 Ziyolise nokuziyolisa kuyehova; wokunika izicelo zentliziyo yako. 
Psalms37:5 Qengqela pezu kwoyehova indlela yako; tembela kuye nokutemba, kwakuya kwenziwa nguye." 
Psalms37:6 Wovelisa ubulungisa bako njengokukanya, nokugwetyelwa kwako njengemini enkulu." 
Psalms37:7 Yiti cwaka pambi kwoyehova, uhlale ulinda yena. Ungaziqumbisi ngenxa yonokutamsanqeleka endleleni yake, ngenxa yomntu owafezayo amaqinga akohlakeleyo." 
Psalms37:8 Yeka ingqumbo, ushiye umsindo; ungaziqumbisi, kukwenza okungalungileyo kupela." 
Psalms37:9 Ngokuba abenzi bokungalungileyo beya kunyotulwa; kanti abakangela kuyehova, bona bowufuya umhlaba." 
Psalms37:10 Kwoba ngumzuzwana aze angabiko okohlakeleyo; wogqala indawo yake wena, kanti akaseko." 
Psalms37:11 Kodwa abalulamileyo bowufuya umhlaba; boziyolisa ebuninzini boxolo. 
Psalms37:12 Okohlakeleyo uyaqinga ngakuye olungileyo; uyatshixiza ngakuye ngamazinyo ake. 
Psalms37:13 Inkosi yona iya kumhleka; ngokuba ibona ukuba imini yake iyeza. 
Psalms37:14 Abakohlakeleyo bar̔olile iṙele, batyedile isipeta sabo, ukuze bawise ihlwempu nosweleyo, babulale abandlela ilungileyo." 
Psalms37:15 Iṙele labo liya kungena kweyabo intliziyo, nezipeta zabo ziya kwapulwa." 
Psalms37:16 Intwana encinane yolungileyo ibudlule ngokulunga ubutyebi babakohlakeleyo abaninzi. 
Psalms37:17 Ngokuba ingalo zabakohlakeleyo ziya kwapulwa; kanti uyehova uyabasekela abalungileyo. 
Psalms37:18 Uyehova uyayazi imihla yabayinene; ilifa labo liya kuhlala kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms37:19 Abayi kudana ngexesha lobubi; nasemihleni yendlala bohlutiswa. 
Psalms37:20 Kodwa abakohlakeleyo botshabalala; nentshaba zikayehova njengamanqata emvana ziya kupela; njengomsi ziya kupela. 
Psalms37:21 Okohlakeleyo uyaboleka kwabanye, angabuyi ahlaule; kanti olungileyo uba nofefe, uyapa." 
Psalms37:22 Ngenyaniso abatamsanqeliswa nguye bowufuya umhlaba; kanti abaqalekiswa nguye bonqanyulwa. 
Psalms37:23 Amanyatela omntu olungileyo ayaqiniswa nguyehova; uyatanda indlela yake. 
Psalms37:24 Nakuba esiwa, akayi kuwiswa kupele; ngokuba uyehova esekela ngesandla sake." 
Psalms37:25 Ndibe ndimtsha, kaloku sendimdala; kodwa andizanga ndibone olungileyo eshiyiwe, nenzalo yake ifuna ukutya." 
Psalms37:26 Uba nofefe imihla yonke, aboleke; inzalo yake yeyokutamsanqelisa." 
Psalms37:27 Suka enkohlakalweni, wenze okulungileyo, uhlale uhleli kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms37:28 Ngokuba uyehova etanda okufaneleyo; akashiyi abangcwele bake; bayagcinwa kude kube ngunapakade bona, kodwa inzalo yabakohlakeleyo iyanqanyulwa." 
Psalms37:29 Abalungileyo bowufuya umhlaba, bahlale ngonapakade pezu kwawo." 
Psalms37:30 Umlomo wolungileyo uyaxela ubulumko; ulwimi lwake luyateta okufaneleyo. 
Psalms37:31 Umteto wotixo wake usentliziyweni yake; akuyi kubako elityibilikayo kwamanyatela ake. 
Psalms37:32 Okohlakeleyo uyalalela olungileyo, efuna ukumbulala." 
Psalms37:33 Uyehova akayi kumshiya esandleni sake; akayi kumgweba nxa ityala lake litetwayo. 
Psalms37:34 Kangela kuyehova, ubambe indlela yake; wokupakamisa uze ufuye umhlaba: nxa banqanyulwayo abakohlakeleyo, wobonela." 
Psalms37:35 Kendabona okohlakeleyo, umbandezeli, etwabululeka njengomti oluhlaza:" 
Psalms37:36 kodwa wadlula, bona ke, akaseko; ewe ndamfuna, kanti akafumaneki." 
Psalms37:37 Gqala ofezekileyo, ukangele olungisayo; ngokuba isipelo somntu onje siluxolo." 
Psalms37:38 Kanti abagqiti bayatshatyalaliswa kunye; isipelo sabakohlakeleyo siyanqanyulwa. 
Psalms37:39 Kodwa usindiswa lwabalungileyo luvela kuyehova; ungamandla abo ngexesha lobunzima. 
Psalms37:40 Uyehova wobanceda, abakulule; uya kubakulula kubo abakohlakeleyo, abasindise; ngokuba betembile kuye." 
Psalms38:1 YEHOVA! zungandohlwayi ngengqumbo yako; zungandibeti ngomsindo wako. 
Psalms38:2 Ngokuba intolo zako zindihlabile; isandla sako sihlele pezu kwam. 
Psalms38:3 Akuko kupila enyameni yam, ngenxa yomsindo wako; akuko luxolo ematanjeni am, ngenxa yesono sam." 
Psalms38:4 Ngokuba inkohlakalo zam zidlule pezu kwentloko yam; njengomtwalo onzima ziyandisinda. 
Psalms38:5 Izilonda zam ziyanuka, zibolile, ngenxa yobugeza bam." 
Psalms38:6 Ndigotyiwe, nditotyiwe kakulu, ndihamba ndilila imini yonke." 
Psalms38:7 Ngokuba isinqe sam sizele kukutsha; akuko kupila enyameni yam. 
Psalms38:8 Ndicubukile, ndapukile kanye; ndiyabomboloza ngenxa yexala lentliziyo yam." 
Psalms38:9 Nkosi! inkanuko yam yonke isebusweni bako; nokugula kwam akukufihlelwanga. 
Psalms38:10 Intliziyo yam iyabetabeta, ndishiyiwe ngamandla am; nokukanya kwamehlo am, kwa wona akaseko nam." 
Psalms38:11 Abatandi bam nabahlobo bam bayagwegweda esibetweni sam: nabalamane bam bemi kude. 
Psalms38:12 Kanjalo abo bafuna ubomi bam baya ndi tiyela; nabo bafuna ukwenzakala kwam bayateta izinto zobumenemene; bayacinga inkohliso imini yonke. 
Psalms38:13 Kodwa mna bendinjengesitulu, andeva; nanjengesidenge e singavuli umlomo waso." 
Psalms38:14 Ndandinjengomntu ongeva nto, nokungeko zohlwayo emlonyeni wake." 
Psalms38:15 Ngokuba, Yehova! nditembela kuwe; uya kupendula wena, Nkosi, Tixo wam!" 
Psalms38:16 Ngokuba ndite: Ndipendule, hleze bandivuyelele. Nxa lutyibilikayo unyawo lwam, bayazenza bakulu ngakum." 
Psalms38:17 Ngokuba ndihlalel’ ukuqwalela, nobuhlungu bam busebusweni bam futi." 
Psalms38:18 Ngokuba ndiya kushumayela inkohlakalo yam; ndiya kuba novalo ngenxa yesono sam. 
Psalms38:19 Kodwa intshaba zam zipilile, zomelele; nabo banditiyayo kungeko ndawo bayandiswa." 
Psalms38:20 Kanjalo abo bavuzayo ngobubi endaweni yokulunga, bayimpi kum ngokuba ndiputuma okulungileyo." 
Psalms38:21 Zungandishiyi, Yehova! Tixo wam, zungabi kude nam!" 
Psalms38:22 Kauleza ukuza kundisiza, Nkosi, usindiso lwam!" 
Psalms39:1 NDITE: Ndiya kulumkela indlela zam, ndize ndingoni ngolwimi lwam: ndogcina umlomo wam ngomkala, nxa okohlakeleyo asebusweni bam." 
Psalms39:2 Ndasidenge ngokuti cwaka, ndati tu nakoko kulungileyo; lwaza usizi lwam lwavuswa." 
Psalms39:3 Intliziyo yam yaba shushu pakati kwam; ndisacinga watsha umlilo; ndateta ngolwimi lwam. 
Psalms39:4 Yehova! ndazise isipelo sam, nomlinganiswa wemihla yam, ukuba ungakananina; ndize ndazi ukunqamka kwam." 
Psalms39:5 Bona ke, imihla yam nyenze njengobubanzi besandla: nexesha lam linjengokungento pambi kwako: ngenyaniso bakokungendawo kupela bonke abantu bemi nje. Sela." 
Psalms39:6 Ngenyaniso umntu uyahamba njengesitunzi: ngenyaniso bafumana benesitukutezi: uyafumbela indyebo, kanti akamazi oya kuzamkela." 
Psalms39:7 Kaloku, Nkosi! ndikangela nto nina? Itemba lam likuwe." 
Psalms39:8 Ndikulule kuzo zonke izigqito zam: ungandenzi isigxekwa segeza. 
Psalms39:9 Ndibe ndisidenge, andavula umlomo wam; ngokuba kube kusenziwa nguwe." 
Psalms39:10 Susa isibeto sako kum: ndigqityiwe kukulwa kwesandla sako. 
Psalms39:11 Nxa uti, ngenxa yenkohlakalo, umluleke umntu ngezohlwayo, uyonakalisa ubuhle bake njengenundu: ngenyaniso bonke abantu bakokungendawo. Sela." 
Psalms39:12 Yiva umtandazo wam, Yehova! unike indlebe ekukaleni kwam; zungati cwaka ezinyembezini zam; ngokuba ndingowasemzini ndikuwe nje, ndingumpambukeli njengobawo bonke." 
Psalms39:13 Zundiyeke, ndize ndizomeleze, ndingekemki ukuze ndingabi sabiko." 
Psalms40:1 NDAHLALA ndikangela kuyehova; waza watobela kum, weva ukukala kwam." 
Psalms40:2 Wandinyusa emnxunyeni wentshabalalo, naseludongweni olubudaka, wamisa inyawo zam elulwalweni, waqinisa ukuhamba kwam." 
Psalms40:3 Wafaka iculo elitsha emlonyeni wam, kwa indumiso kuye utixo wetu: kwobonwa ngabaninzi, boyike, batembele kuye uyehova." 
Psalms40:4 Hai itamsanqa lalomntu omisa uyehova abe litemba lake; ongabeki abaner̔atshi, nabajikele elulwimini!" 
Psalms40:5 Zininzi izinto ozenzileyo, Yehova, Tixo wam! kwa imimangaliso yako namaqinga ako ngakuti: akuko nto enokulinganiswa nawe: ukuba ndiya kuxela nditete ngazo, sezikohla ngokungenakubalwa." 
Psalms40:6 Umbingo nomnikelo ubungawutandi; indlebe zam uzinqikile: idini elitshiswayo nelesono akulibizanga. 
Psalms40:7 Ndandul’ ukuti: Nanku sekusiza mna: emqulwini wencwadi kuba̔liwe ngam: 
Psalms40:8 Ndiyatanda mna, Tixo wam! ukuyenza intando yako; umteto wako usembilini wam pakati." 
Psalms40:9 Ndishumayele ubulungisa entlanganisweni enkulu; bona ke, umlomo wam andiwubambanga; uyazi wena, Yehova!" 
Psalms40:10 Ubulungisa bako andibufihlanga pakati kweyam intliziyo; ndityele inyaniseko yako nosindiso lwako; andisitelisanga nbubele bako nenyaniso yako entlanganisweni enkulu. 
Psalms40:11 Wena, Yehova! ungabambi kum inceba zako; mandihlale ndigcinwa bubele bako nayinyaniso yako." 
Psalms40:12 Ngokuba ndiṙauliwe bububi bude bungabi nakubalwa; inkohlakalo zam zindibambile, ndide ndikohlwe kubona; zidlule inwele zentloko yam ngokuba zininzi: sendishiyiwe yintliziyo yam." 
Psalms40:13 Yehova! mautande ukundikulula: Yehova! kauleza ukuza kundisiza. 
Psalms40:14 Mabadaniswe, bamatiswe kunye, abo bafuna ubomi bam ukuba babububise: mabanqandelwe ngomva, baviswe ihlazo, abo batanda ukwenzakala kwam." 
Psalms40:15 Mabasaliswe bodwa, ube ngumvuzo wehlazo labo, abo bati kum: Tshotsho! Tshotsho!" 
Psalms40:16 Mabati bonke abo bafuna wena bagcobe bavuye ngawe: mabati abo batanda usindiso lwako bahlale besiti: Makenziwe mkulu uyehova. 
Psalms40:17 Kodwa mna ndilihlwempu, ndingosweleyo; inkosi yondikumbulela noko: wena ungumncedi wam nomkululi wam; zungalibali, Tixo wam!" 
Psalms41:1 HAI itamsanqa lalowo unonelela olihlwempu! uyehova uya kumsindisa ngemini yobubi. 
Psalms41:2 Uyehova uya kumlondoloza, amgcine ehleli; uya kuba netamsanqa emhlabeni: kanjalo wena akuyi kumnikela enkanukweni yentshaba zake." 
Psalms41:3 Uyehova uya kumxasa pezu kwekoye yobulwelwe: wowuguqula wena wonke umandlalo wake esifeni sake. 
Psalms41:4 Ndati: Yehova! yiba nofefe kum; pilisa umpefumlo wam; ngokuba ndonile ngakuwe. 
Psalms41:5 Intshaba zam ziyateta kakubi ngam: Wofa ninina, lize libube igama lake?" 
Psalms41:6 Nanxa utshaba luza ku ndi bona, luteta ubuxoki; intliziyo yalo iyazibutela inkohlakalo; luti lwakupuma ngapandle lu yi tete ke." 
Psalms41:7 Bonke abanditiyayo bayasebezelana ngakum; ngakum ke bayaqingela ububi. 
Psalms41:8 Bati: Into yobunginingini iti nama kuye; elele nje, akayi kubuya avuke." 
Psalms41:9 Ewe, umntu obelikolwane lam, endibe nditemba yena, obesidla isonka sam, upakamisile isitende sake ngakum." 
Psalms41:10 Kodwa wena, Yehova! yiba nofefe kum, undimise, ndandiya kupindezela kubo." 
Psalms41:11 Ndiyazi ngoku ukuba uyanditanda, ngokuba utshaba lwam lungenakundivuyelela." 
Psalms41:12 Kanjalo okwam, uyandisekela ekunyaniseni kwam; uyandimisa ebusweni bako ngonapakade." 
Psalms41:13 Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, kwa kunapakade kude kube ngunapakade. Amene, ewe Amene." 
Psalms42:1 NJENGOKUBA ixama lilangazelela imilanjana yamanzi, kwa njalo umpefumlo wam ulangazelela wena, Tixo!" 
Psalms42:2 Umpefumlo wam unxanelwe utixo, kwa utixo ohleliyo: ndoza ninina ndibonakale ebusweni botixo?" 
Psalms42:3 Inyembezi zam bezikukutya kwam emini nasebusuku, nxa bati kum imihla yonke: Upina utixo wako?" 
Psalms42:4 Ndizikumbula nje ezi zinto ndiyapalaza umpefumlo wam pakati kwam: ngokuba ndibe ndidlule nesihlwele; ndahamba kakuhle naso endlwini katixo, ngelizwi lomgcobo nelombulelo, kwa nesihlwele sisenza umtendeleko." 
Psalms42:5 Kunganina ukuba utobeke, mpefumlo wam? kunganina nokuba ube nesitukutezi pakati kwam? Tembela kutixo; ngokuba ndisaza kubulela kuye, ngenxa yoncedo lwobuso bake." 
Psalms42:6 Tixo wam! umpefumlo wam utobekile pakati kwam; ngako oko ndokukumbula ndisezweni lase‐Yoredane, nakwelama‐Heremone, entabeni ye‐Mitsare." 
Psalms42:7 Inzulu imemeza inzulu ekungxoleni kwengxangxasi zako; onke amaza ako nemisinga yako idlule pezu kwam. 
Psalms42:8 Emini uyehova woxela kubeko ububele bake, nasebusuku iculo lake liya kuba nam, kwa ukutandaza kutixo wobomi bam." 
Psalms42:9 Ndoti kutixo: Liwa lam, kunganina ukuba undilibele? kunganina ukuba ndihambe ndilila ngenxa yokubandezela kwotshaba?" 
Psalms42:10 Ngento yokubulala ematanjeni am bayandigxeka abo balana nam, nxa bati kum imihla yonke: Utixo wako upina?" 
Psalms42:11 Kunganina ukuba utobeke, mpefumlo wam? kunganina nokuba ube nesitukutezi pakati kwam? Tembela kutixo; ngokuba ndisaza kubulela kuye, uncedo lwobuso bam, notixo wam." 
Psalms43:1 NDIGWEBELE, Tixo! upikise upikiso lwam, ngakuso isizwe esingenabubele: maundikulule endodeni yenkohliso nenkohlakalo." 
Psalms43:2 Ngokuba enguwe utixo wamandla am: yinina ukuba undilahlile? yinina ukuba ndihambe ndilila ngenxa yokubandezela kwotshaba? 
Psalms43:3 Mautume ukanyiso lwako nenyaniso yako: mazindikokele zona; mazindizise entabeni yako eyingcwele nasezitabanakeleni zako. 
Psalms43:4 Kukona ndiya kuza kwisibingelo sikatixo, kutixo oluvuyo lwam olukulukazi; ewe, ndokudumisa ngekinore, Tixo, Tixo wam!" 
Psalms43:5 Kunganina ukuba utobeke, mpefumlo wam? kunganina nokuba ube nesitukutezi pakati kwam? Tembela kutixo; ngokuba ndisaza kubulela kuye, uncedo lwobuso bam, notixo wam." 
Psalms44:1 SIVILE ngendlebe zetu, Tixo! obawo betu basixelele, isenzo owasenzayo ngemihla yabo, ngamaxesha akudala." 
Psalms44:2 Wagxota abaheyideni ngesandla sako, wabatyala obawo; wazicita intlanga, watwabulula bona." 
Psalms44:3 Ngokuba bengazuzanga ilizwe ngelabo iṙele, neyabo ingalo ayibasindisanga; besisisandla sako sokunene, nengalo yako, nokukanya kwobuso bako, ngokuba ububakolela." 
Psalms44:4 Unguwe ukumkani wam, Tixo! xela zibeko intsindiswa zo‐Yakobi." 
Psalms44:5 Ngawe siya kusunduzela pantsi intshaba zetu; ngegama lako siya kunyatela pantsi abo basukela ngakuti. 
Psalms44:6 Ngokuba ndingayi kutemba isipeta sam, neṙele lam aliyi kundisindisa." 
Psalms44:7 Nguwe osisindisileyo ezintshabeni zetu; nguwe obadanisileyo abo basitiyayo. 
Psalms44:8 Simdumisile utixo imini yonke; sasiya kubulela egameni lako kude kube ngunapakade. Sela. 
Psalms44:9 Ulahlile noko, wasidanisa; akuhambi nemikosi yetu." 
Psalms44:10 Uyasibuyisa ngomva elutshabeni; abo basitiyayo bayasipanga. 
Psalms44:11 Usinikele sibe njengegusha sokutyiwa; wasiti sa pakati kwabaheyideni. 
Psalms44:12 Uyatengisa ngabantu bako kungeko ndyebo; kanti akwandisi indyebo yako ngexabiso labo. 
Psalms44:13 Uyasenza sibe sisigxekwa kubamelwane betu, sibe sisihlekwa nesigculelwa kwabo basingqongayo." 
Psalms44:14 Uyasenza sibe lilizwi lokuzekelisa pakati kwabaheyideni, nesihlunguzelo sentloko pakati kwentlanga." 
Psalms44:15 Ihlazo lam lipambi kwam imini yonke; ukudana kwobuso bam kundigubungele; 
Psalms44:16 ngenxa yelizwi lomtuki nomgxeki; ngenxa yotshaba nopindezelayo. 
Psalms44:17 Konke oku kufikile pezu kwetu; kanti asikulibalanga, asixokanga elucebanweni lwako kanjako." 
Psalms44:18 Intliziyo yetu ayihlehlanga ngomva; nezihambo zetu azishenxanga endleleni yako; 
Psalms44:19 nakuba usapule kakulu endaweni yenamba, wasigubungela ngesitunzi sokufa." 
Psalms44:20 Ukuba silibele igama lotixo wetu, nokuba solule izandla zetu kutixo wasemzini;" 
Psalms44:21 utixo akayi kukupanda na oku? ngokuba ezazi yena izifihlakalo zentliziyo. 
Psalms44:22 Ngokuba ngenxa yako sibulawa imini yonke, sibalwa ngokungati sizigusha zokuxe̔lwa." 
Psalms44:23 Vuka. Nkosi! ulala nganina? vuka, unga si lahli kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms44:24 Yinina ukuba ufihle ubuso bako, ulibale ubunzima betu nokubandezelwa kwetu?" 
Psalms44:25 Ngokuba umpefumlo wetu utotyelwe elutulini; isisu setu site nama emhlabeni. 
Psalms44:26 Pakama ube luncedo lwetu, usikulule ngenxa yobubele bako." 
Psalms45:1 INTLIZIYO yam iyampompoza umcimbi olungileyo; ndiyateta imisebenzi yam ngaye ukumkani; ulwimi lwam lulusiba lwomba̔li okuteleyo. 
Psalms45:2 Udlule onyana babantu ngokuba mhle; kugalelwe ufefe emlonyeni wako: utixo ngoko ukutamsanqelisile kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms45:3 Binqa iṙele lako esinqeni. Somandla! udumo lwako nobungcwalisa bako. 
Psalms45:4 Uti kwa ngobungcwalisa bako ukwele weyise, ngenxa yenyaniso nolulamo n obulungisa; sasiya kuti isandla sako sokunene sikufundise izinto ezoyikekayo." 
Psalms45:5 Intolo zako zibukali entliziyweni yentshaba zokumkani; izizwe zowa pantsi kwako. 
Psalms45:6 Isihlalo sako sobukumkani. Tixo! singunapakade kanapakade; intonga yobukumkani bako yintonga yokulunga. 
Psalms45:7 Uyatanda ubulungisa, uyatiya inkohlakalo; ngako oko utixo, kwa utixo wako, ukutambisile ngeoli yovuyo ngapezu kwabalingane bako." 
Psalms45:8 Zinemore nekala n ekasiya ingubo zako zonke, zivela ezindlwini zopondo lwendlovu apo uvuyiselwe kona." 
Psalms45:9 Bekuko intombi zokumkani emankazaneni ako adumileyo; kwesokunene isandla sako kwema ukumkanikazi ngegolide yase‐Ofire. 
Psalms45:10 Pulapula, Ntombi! uqonde, utobe indlebe yako: libala ke abantu bakowenu, nendlu kayihlo;" 
Psalms45:11 kukona ukumkani aya kunqwenela ubuhle bako kakulu; ngokuba eyinkosi yako; uze umbedeshe ke. 
Psalms45:12 Nentombi yase‐Tire, abazityebi pakati kwabantu, bobongoza ubuso bako ngomnikelo." 
Psalms45:13 Intombi yokumkani ibungcwalisa kanye ngapakati; isivato sayo sesesetyenzwa elilukiweyo legolide. 
Psalms45:14 Iya kukatshelwa kukumkani ngengubo ezitungiweyo ngamabala: intombi eziyilandelayo, ezingabalinganekazi bayo, ziya kuziswa kuwe." 
Psalms45:15 Zokatshwa ngemivuyo nangomgcobo; ziya kungena endlwini yokumkani. 
Psalms45:16 Endaweni yabo oyihlo kuya kubako onyana bako, ongati wena ubenze inkosi emhlabeni wonke." 
Psalms45:17 Ndiya kwenza igama lako likunjulwe kuzo zonke izizukulwana: zoti ngoko izizwe zibulele kuwe kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. 
Psalms46:1 UTIXO uyindawo yokupepela namandla kuti: ungumncedi okoyo kakulu ezimbandezelweni. 
Psalms46:2 Soti ngoko singoyiki ekuguqulweni kwomhlaba, nasekushukunyisweni kwentaba pakati kwolwandle;" 
Psalms46:3 nxa agquma amanzi alo, alwe; nxa intaba zingcangcazela ngokukukumala kwalo. Sela." 
Psalms46:4 Kuko umlambo, imijelo yawo iya kuvuyisa isixeko sikatixo, indawo eyingcwele yetabanakele zopezu konke." 
Psalms46:5 Utixo upakati kwaso; asiyi kushukunyiswa: utixo uya kusinceda kwa kusaza kusa. 
Psalms46:6 Izizwe zenza impitimpiti, izikumkani zashukunyiswa; wapuma ilizwi lake, umhlaba wanyibilika." 
Psalms46:7 Uyehova wemikosi unati; utixo ka‐Yakobi uyinyango kuti. Sela. 
Psalms46:8 Yizani nikangele imisebenzi kayehova, ozenzileyo intshabalaliso emhlabeni." 
Psalms46:9 Uyapelisa imfazwe kude kube sencameni yomhlaba; uyapula isipeta, anqamle intshuntshe; inqwelo zokulwa uyazitshisa emlilweni." 
Psalms46:10 Yekani, nazi ke ukuba ndi ngutixo mna: ndiya kupakanyiswa ezizweni, ndiya kupakanyiswa emhlabeni." 
Psalms46:11 Uyehova wemikosi unati; utixo ka‐Yakobi uyinyango kuti. Sela. 
Psalms47:1 YOMBELANI ngezandla, nonke nina zizwe! dandulukani kutixo ngelizwi lovuyelelo." 
Psalms47:2 Ngokuba uyehova opezu kwonke engowoyikekayo; ungukumkani omkulu pezu kwawo wonke umhlaba. 
Psalms47:3 Uya kweyisa izizwe pantsi kwetu, nentlanga pantsi kwenyawo zetu." 
Psalms47:4 Uya kusiqashela ilifa letu, kwa ubungcwalisa buka‐Yakobi amtandileyo. Sela." 
Psalms47:5 Utixo unyukile nesidanduluko, kwa uyehova nelizwi lexilongo." 
Psalms47:6 Culani kutixo, culani; culani kukumkani wetu, culani." 
Psalms47:7 Ngokuba utixo engukumkani womhlaba wonke; culani ngokuqondisayo. 
Psalms47:8 Utixo upete ngobukumkani pezu kwabaheyideni; utixo uhleli esihlalweni sake sobukumkani esiyingcwele. 
Psalms47:9 Inkosi zezizwe zihlanganisene n abantu botixo ka‐Abrahame; ngokuba amakaka omhlaba elunge kutixo; upakamile kakulu yena. 
Psalms48:1 UYEHOVA umkulu, ulungele ukudunyiswa kakulu esixekweni sotixo wetu, entabeni yake eyingcwele." 
Psalms48:2 Intle ngobude, iluvuyiso lwomhlaba wonke, intaba ye‐Ziyone; sisemacaleni asenode isixeko sokumkani omkulu." 
Psalms48:3 Utixo uyaziwa ezindlwini zaso zobukosi ukuba uyinyango. 
Psalms48:4 Ngokuba, kangela, okumkani bebehlanganisene, badlula kunye." 
Psalms48:5 Babona, bandul’ ukuti nqa; betuswa, bemka ngobunxamo." 
Psalms48:6 Ingcangcazelo yababamba kona, n entlungu njengeyomfazi ozalayo." 
Psalms48:7 Uyapula inqanawa zase‐Tareshishe ngomoya wasempumalanga. 
Psalms48:8 Njengokuba sivile, sibonile kwa njalo esixekweni sikayehova wemikosi, esixekweni sotixo wetu; utixo uya kusiqinisa kude kube ngunapakade. Sela." 
Psalms48:9 Sibucingile ububele bako, Tixo! pakati kwetempile yako." 
Psalms48:10 Kwa njengegama lako, Tixo! lunjalo udunyiswa lwako kwada kwasezincameni zomhlaba. Isandla sako sokunene sizele bubulungisa." 
Psalms48:11 Intaba ye‐Ziyone mayivuye, intombi zakwa‐Juda mazigcobe, ngenxa yezigwebo zako." 
Psalms48:12 Pahlani i‐Ziyone, niyiṙaule; balani inqaba zayo:" 
Psalms48:13 bekelani udonga lwapandle lwayo intliziyo yenu; gqalani izindlu zayo zobukosi; nize nibalise kwisizukulwana esiza mva. 
Psalms48:14 Ngokuba lotixo e ngutixo wetu ngonapakade kanapakade; wosikokela kude kube sekufeni. 
Psalms49:1 PULAPULANI oku, nonke nina zizwe! bekani indlebe, nonke nina bemi belizwe elikoyo!" 
Psalms49:2 kwa abapantsi nabapezulu, abazityebi nabangamahlwempu, kunye." 
Psalms49:3 Umlomo wam uya kuteta ubulumko; nokucamanga kwentliziyo yam kwoba kokwokuqonda. 
Psalms49:4 Indlebe yam ndoyitobela ngasemzekelisweni: ndosivulela isintsonkotelo sam ngekinore. 
Psalms49:5 Ngendisoyika nganina emihleni yobubi, nxa inkohlakalo yabalaleli bam indingqongayo?" 
Psalms49:6 Abo batemba ubutyebi babo, nabaqa̔yisa ngobuninzi bendyebo zabo," 
Psalms49:7 akuko namnye ongaka akulule umzalwana wake; akangenike kutixo isikululiso sake; 
Psalms49:8 (inkululwa yompefumlo wabo inqabile nje, ipela nokupela kude kube ngunapakade;)" 
Psalms49:9 ukuba abe esadla ubomi futi, angaboni kubola." 
Psalms49:10 Ngokuba ebona abalumkileyo ukuba banokufa, befana nosidenge nodolileyo ukububa kwabo, bashiyele abanye ubutyebi babo." 
Psalms49:11 Umbilini wabo uti izindlu zabo zohlala kude kube ngunapakade, n emizi yabo kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana; imihlaba yabo bayibizile ngawabo amagama." 
Psalms49:12 Kanti umntu oseludunyweni akahlali noko; uyafana nenkomo ezitshabalalayo. 
Psalms49:13 Lendlela yabo ibubudenge babo; kanti abezayo emva kwabo bayakolwa kukuteta kwabo. Sela. 
Psalms49:14 Babekiwe encw̔abeni njengegusha; ukufa kuya kubadla; baye abalungileyo beya kuba nobukosi pezu kwabo kwakusa; nobuhle babo incw̔aba liya kubonakalisa, indawo yokuhlala kwabo." 
Psalms49:15 Kodwa utixo uya kukulula umpefumlo wam emandleni encw̔aba; ngokuba eya kundamkela. Sela. 
Psalms49:16 Ungoyiki nxa umntu wenziwa isityebi; nxa bunokwandiswa ubungcwalisa bendlu yake: 
Psalms49:17 ngokuba engayi kumka nanto akufa; ubungcwalisa bake abuyi kuhla emva kwake. 
Psalms49:18 Nakuba ati, nxa asadla ubomi, awutamsanqelise umpefumlo wake, bati abantu bakudumise, oko wenzayo ngokuzikolisa;" 
Psalms49:19 woya noko esizukulwaneni soyise bake: abasayi kuza babone ukukanya napakade. 
Psalms49:20 Umntu oseludunyweni, engaqondi, uyafana nenkomo ezitshabalalayo." 
Psalms50:1 UTIXO wotixo, uyehova, utetile, wamema umhlaba kwa sekupumeni kwelanga kude kube sekutshoneni kwalo." 
Psalms50:2 Kuyo i‐Ziyone, ikupela kwobuhle, utixo ukazimlile." 
Psalms50:3 Utixo wetu uya kuza, angati cwaka: umlilo wodla ebusweni bake; uqwitela olukulu luya kumngqonga." 
Psalms50:4 Uya kubiza izulu kwa pezulu, nomhlaba, ukuze agwebe abantu bake." 
Psalms50:5 Butelani kum abangcwele bam, abo balwenzileyo ucebano nam ngombingo." 
Psalms50:6 Laye izulu liya kushumayela ubulungisa bake; ngokuba utixo engumgwebi ngokwake. Sela. 
Psalms50:7 Yivani, bantu bam! ndandiya kuteta; yiva, Sirayeli! ndandiya kunqi̔na ngakuwe: ndi ngutixo, kwa utixo wako." 
Psalms50:8 Andiyi kukwohlwaya ngenxa yemibingo yako, namadini okutshiswa ako, esebusweni bam futi nje." 
Psalms50:9 Andiyi kutabata nkabi endlwini yako, n enkunzi zebokwe esibayeni sako:" 
Psalms50:10 ngokuba zonke izilo zehlati zizezam, n enkomo ezisezintabeni eziliwaka." 
Psalms50:11 Ndiyazazi zonke intaka zentaba; nenyamakazi zezindle zizezam. 
Psalms50:12 Ukuba bendilambile, ngendingatsho kuwe; ngokuba ilizwe lilelam, nokuzala kwalo." 
Psalms50:13 Ndiya kudla inyama yenkunzi na? ndiya kusela igazi lebokwe na? 
Psalms50:14 Nikela kutixo umbulelo; ufeze izibambiso zako kopezu kwonke; 
Psalms50:15 ubize kum emhleni wobunzima; ndokukulula, wauya kundidumisa." 
Psalms50:16 Kodwa kokohlakeleyo uti utixo: Kuyinto nina kuwe, ukushumayela izimiselo zam, nokuba ucebano lwam ulucole ngomlomo wako?" 
Psalms50:17 ulutiyile nje ululeko, namazwi am uwaposile emva kwako nje." 
Psalms50:18 Ute wakubona isela, waseluvumelana nalo; bukunye nabaṙexezi ubukolwane bako." 
Psalms50:19 Umlomo wako uwuyekele enkohlakalweni, nolwimi lwako luyadala inkohliso." 
Psalms50:20 Uyahlala uteta ngakuye umninawe wako; uyahleba unyana wonyoko. 
Psalms50:21 Ezizinto uzenzile, ndati cwaka mna; waba ndingonjengawe kanye: kodwa ndokwohlwaya, ndicwangcise emehlweni ako." 
Psalms50:22 Gqalani ke oku, nina nilibala utixo! hleze ndiqwenge, kungabiko okululayo." 
Psalms50:23 Osukuba enikela umbulelo uyandidumisa; nolungisa indlela yake ndombonisa usindiso lukatixo. 
Psalms51:1 YIBA nofefe kum, Tixo! kwa njengabo ububele bako: njengobuninzi benceba zako, cima izigqito zam." 
Psalms51:2 Ndihlanze kunene enkohlakalweni yam, undihlambulule esonweni sam." 
Psalms51:3 Ngokuba izigqito zam ndizazi; isono sam sisebusweni bam futi. 
Psalms51:4 Kungakuwe, ngakuwe wedwa endonileyo, ndenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni ako: kukona ulungile ekuteteni kwako, ungcwele ekugwebeni kwako." 
Psalms51:5 Kangela, bendizalelwe enkohlakalweni; uma̔ wandimitela esonweni." 
Psalms51:6 Kangela, uyatanda inyaniso embilini; nasemfihlekweni uya kundazisa ubulumko." 
Psalms51:7 Ndihlambulule ngehisope, ndandiya kuba yingcwele; ndihlanze, ndandiya kugqitisa ingqweqwe ngokuba mhlope." 
Psalms51:8 Ndivise uvuyo nomgcobo; aze avuyelele amatambo o watyumzileyo. 
Psalms51:9 Fihla ubuso bako ezonweni zam, ucime zonke izikohlakalo zam." 
Psalms51:10 Ndidalele intliziyo eyingcwele, Tixo! uwuhlaziye umoya olungileyo pakati kwam." 
Psalms51:11 Zungandilahli ebusweni bako; no‐Moya wako oyi‐Ngcwele ungamsusi kum. 
Psalms51:12 Buyisela kum uvuyo lwosindiso lwako; umoya ovumayo maundixase. 
Psalms51:13 Kukona ndiya kufundisa abagqiti indlela zako, naboni baya kuguqukela kuwe." 
Psalms51:14 Ndikulule etyaleni legazi, Tixo, Tixo wosindiswa lwam! ulwimi lwam luya kudumisa ubulungisa bako ngovuyo." 
Psalms51:15 Nkosi! vula umlomo wam; kukona umlomo wam uya kushumayela udumo lwako. 
Psalms51:16 Ngokuba ungatandi umbingo, ukuba ndinikele ngawo; akukoliswa lidini lokutshiswa." 
Psalms51:17 Amadini katixo angumoya owapukileyo; intliziyo eyapukileyo negqobokileyo akuyi kuyidela, Tixo!" 
Psalms51:18 Yenzela i‐Ziyone okulungileyo ngenkolelo yako; yaka indonga ze‐Yerusaleme. 
Psalms51:19 Oko uya kutanda imibingo yobulungisa, idini elitshiswayo, nedini elitshiswayo lipela: oko baya kunikela ngenkabi pezu kwesibingelo sako." 
Psalms52:1 YININA ukuba uziqa̔yisele ngenkohlakalo, ṙotindini? ububele bukatixo buko imihla yonke." 
Psalms52:2 Uyaqinga izinto zobumenemene ngolwimi lwako, njengesitshetshe sokuguya esibukali, usenza ngenkohliso." 
Psalms52:3 Uyatanda okukohlakeleyo ngapezu kwokulungileyo; n okuxoka ngapezu kwokuteta ubulungisa. Sela. 
Psalms52:4 Uyatanda onke amazwi entshabalaliso, wena lwimi lwenkohliso." 
Psalms52:5 Kanjalo utixo wokucita kude kube ngunapakade; wokubamba, akuncotule ententeni yako, akudonyule emhlabeni wabahleliyo. Sela." 
Psalms52:6 Baye abalungileyo beya kubona, boyike, bahleke pezu kwake, besiti:" 
Psalms52:7 Nanku umntu ongamenzanga amandla ake utixo, kodwa watemba ubuninzi bezake indyebo; wazomeleza ebumenemeneni bake." 
Psalms52:8 Kodwa mna ndinjengomnquma oluhlaza endlwini katixo: ndiyatembela ebubeleni bukatixo ngonapakade kanapakade. 
Psalms52:9 Ndokudumisa kude kube ngunapakade, ngokuba ukwenzile oku; ndolinda nokulinda igama lako; ngokuba kulungile ebusweni babangcwele bako." 
Psalms53:1 IGEZA liti entliziyweni yalo: Akuko tixo. Bonakele, benze inkohlakalo ezondekileyo; akuko owenza okulungileyo." 
Psalms53:2 Utixo esezulwini wakangela pantsi pezu kwonyana babantu, ukubona ukuba kuko na oqondayo, ofuna utixo." 
Psalms53:3 Bahlehlile bonke, badlubukile kunye; akuko owenza okulungileyo, noko amnye." 
Psalms53:4 Abenzi benkohlakalo abanakwazi na? abadla abantu bam njengokungati babesidla isonka: ababizanga kuye utixo. 
Psalms53:5 Apo bebesoyika isoyikiso, apo bekungeko soyikiso kona: ngokuba utixo ecitile amatambo alowo ubemela ngakuwe: u ba danisile; ngokuba utixo ebalahlile." 
Psalms53:6 Azaba intsindiswa zo‐Sirayeli zabezivele e‐Ziyone! Nxa utixo aya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwabantu bake, uya kugcoba u‐Yakobi, uya kuvuya u‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms54:1 NDISINDISE, Tixo! ngegama lako; undigwebele ngamandla ako." 
Psalms54:2 Pulapula umtandazo wam, Tixo! beka indlebe emazwini omlomo wam." 
Psalms54:3 Ngokuba abasemzini bendisukele, nababandezeli befunile umpefumlo wam: abambekanga utixo pambi kwabo. Sela." 
Psalms54:4 Bona ke, utixo ungondincedayo: inkosi inabo bawusekelayo umpefumlo wam:" 
Psalms54:5 yoti ububi ibubuyisele pezu kwabo bandihlolayo. Banqamle ngokwenyaniso yako. 
Psalms54:6 Ndobingela kuwe ngokuvuma: ndodumisa igama lako, Yehova! ngokuba lilungile." 
Psalms54:7 Ngokuba endikulule kubo bonke ubunzima; neliso lam likangele pezu kwentshaba zam. 
Psalms55:1 BEKELA umtandazo wam indlebe, Tixo! ungazifihli ekukungeni kwam." 
Psalms55:2 Ndipulapule, undipendule: ndiyapalapala ekukalazeni kwam, ndenze impitimpiti;" 
Psalms55:3 ngenxa yelizwi lotshaba, ngenxa yokubandezela kwokohlakeleyo: ngokuba beposa ububi pezu kwam, bendizonda ngomsindo." 
Psalms55:4 Intliziyo yam inokututumela pakati kwam; izoyikeko zokufa zindiwele. 
Psalms55:5 Kufike ukwoyika nokunkwantya pezu kwam; ingcangcazelo indigubungele. 
Psalms55:6 Ndaza ndati: Andaba ndapiwa amapiko njengehobe! bendiya kubaleka, ndipumle." 
Psalms55:7 Kangela, bendiya kusabela kude, ndihlale entlango. Sela." 
Psalms55:8 Bendiya kukaulezisa ukusinda kwam emoyeni oqutayo nas eluqwiteleni. 
Psalms55:9 Tshabalalisa, Nkosi! yahlula ulwimi lwabo; ngokuba ndibonile ubudlwengu nenkani esixekweni." 
Psalms55:10 Emini nasebusuku ziyasiṙaula pezu kwendonga zaso; kuko inkohlakalo nobubi pakati kwaso. 
Psalms55:11 Ubumenemene bupakati kwaso; akumki ubuqinga nenkohliso enkundleni yaso. 
Psalms55:12 Ngokuba, asi lulo utshaba lo undigxekileyo; ngendinyamezele oko: asi ngonditiyileyo lo uzenze mkulu ngakum; ngendimzimele yena:" 
Psalms55:13 koko enguwe, wena mntu ulingana nam, umkokeli wam, nomazane wam:" 
Psalms55:14 esibe sinikana icebo ngokumnandi, sahambela endlwini katixo ngesipitipiti sovuyo." 
Psalms55:15 Ukufa makubaqubule, mabehlele ehadesi behleli; ngokuba kuko izinto ezikohlakeleyo emzini wabo, na pakati kwabo." 
Psalms55:16 Ndiya kubiza kutixo mna; waeya kundisindisa uyehova. 
Psalms55:17 Ngokuhlwa, nakusasa, nasemini enkulu, ndiya kuteta, ndigule; waeya kuva ilizwi lam." 
Psalms55:18 Ukulule umpefumlo wam wawubeka eluxolweni kuyo imfazwe ebingakum; ngokuba bebengakum ngobuninzi. 
Psalms55:19 Utixo uya kuva, ababandezele, kwa yena uhleliyo kwa kudala. Sela. Ngenxa yokuba kungeko ziguquguquko kubo, abamoyiki ngoku utixo." 
Psalms55:20 Uzolule izandla zake ngakwabo babexolene naye: utshitshisile ucebano lwake. 
Psalms55:21 Umlomo wake waubutelezi ngapezu kwamafuta esibozi; kanti imfazwe ibisentliziyweni yake: amazwi ake ebegqitisile ioli ngokutamba; kanti ebengamaṙele ar̔oliweyo noko. 
Psalms55:22 Lahlela kuyehova umtwalo wako; wokuxasa ke yena: akasayi kuza avume ukuba olungileyo ashukunyiswe. 
Psalms55:23 Kodwa wena, Tixo! uya kubahlisela emnxunyeni wentshabalalo; abantu begazi nabenkohliso abayi kuqingatisa imihla yabo: kodwa mna ndiya kutembela kuwe." 
Psalms56:1 YIBA nofefe kum, Tixo! ndinxanyelwe ngumntu; esilwa imihla yonke nje, uyandincinezela." 
Psalms56:2 Abandihlolayo bandinxamele imihla yonke: ngokuba bebaninzi abalwayo nam ngoqanqalazo. 
Psalms56:3 Mhlana ndoyikayo, ndiya kutembela kuwe." 
Psalms56:4 Kutixo ndiya kudumisa ilizwi lake; nditembele kutixo, andiyi kwoyika; inyama ingenza nto nina kum?" 
Psalms56:5 Imihla yonke bayawajika amazwi am: onke amaqinga abo angawobubi ngakum. 
Psalms56:6 Bayabutelana, bayazifihla, bayahlola imikondo yam, ekubeni balinda ubomi bam." 
Psalms56:7 Baya kusinda ngenkohlakalo na? kahlela abantu ngengqumbo, Tixo!" 
Psalms56:8 Imbadulo zam uzibalile wena: faka inyembezi zam entsubeni yako; aziko encwadini yako na? 
Psalms56:9 Mhlana ndibizayo, oko intshaba zam ziya kubuya ngomva: oku ndiya kwazi; ngokuba utixo engecala lam." 
Psalms56:10 Kutixo ndiya kudumisa ilizwi lake; kuyehova ndiya kudumisa ilizwi lake. 
Psalms56:11 Nditembele kutixo, andiyi kwoyika; umntu angenza nto nina kum?" 
Psalms56:12 Izibambiso zako zipezu kwam, Tixo! ndiya kuhlaula kuwe ngemibulelo." 
Psalms56:13 Ngokuba uhlangule umpefumlo wam ekufeni: akuyi kuhlangula inyawo zam ekuweni na, ndize ndihambe ebusweni botixo ekukanyeni kwabahleliyo?" 
Psalms57:1 YIBA nofefe kum, Tixo! yiba nofefe kum; ngokuba umpefumlo wam utembele kuwe: ndandiya kupepela esitunzini samapiko ako, zide ingozi zidlule." 
Psalms57:2 Ndiya kubizela kutixo opezu kwonke, kwa kutixo oya kundifezela." 
Psalms57:3 Uya kutuma ezulwini, andisindise kuko ukugxeka kwondinxameleyo. Sela. Utixo uya kutuma ububele bake nenyaniso yake." 
Psalms57:4 Umpefumlo wam upakati kwengonyama; ndiyalala pantsi n abavutiweyo, onyana babantu, abamazinyo ayimigwazo nentolo, nolwimi lwabo luliṙele elibukali." 
Psalms57:5 Yiba upakamile pezu kwezulu, Tixo! n obungcwalisa bako pezu kwomhlaba wonke." 
Psalms57:6 Balungisile utambo emanyateleni am; umpefumlo wam utotyiwe; bambele isihogo ebusweni bam, beyele kuso bona. Sela." 
Psalms57:7 Intliziyo yam iqinisiwe, Tixo! intliziyo yam iqinisiwe: ndiya kuvuma, ndicule nokucula." 
Psalms57:8 Vuka, ngcwalisa yam! vuka, nebele nekinore! ndiya kuvuka kusasa mna." 
Psalms57:9 Ndokudumisa, Nkosi! pakati kwezizwe; ndocula kuwe pakati kwentlanga." 
Psalms57:10 Ngokuba ububele bako bukulu kude kube sezulwini, nenyaniso yako kude kube semafini." 
Psalms57:11 Yiba upakamile pezu kwezulu, Tixo! n obungcwalisa bako pezu kwomhlaba wonke." 
Psalms58:1 NIYATETA okulungileyo ngenyaniso na, ntlanganiso? niyagweba ngokufanelekileyo na, bonyana babantu?" 
Psalms58:2 okunene entliziyweni niyaqinga izikohlakalo; nasemhlabeni niyalinganisa ubudlwengu bezandla zenu. 
Psalms58:3 Abakohlakeleyo banobusemzini besavela esizalweni; bayalahleka besapuma esiswini, beteta ubuxoki." 
Psalms58:4 Banobuhlungu obunjengobuhlungu benyoka; banjengeṙamba elisitulu, e livingca indlebe yalo;" 
Psalms58:5 elingayi kuva ilizwi labanyangayo, kwa ela lowo owenza ngokunyanga ngokulumkileyo." 
Psalms58:6 Yapula amazinyo abo, Tixo! emlonyeni wabo: ncotula imbamba zengonyamana, Yehova!" 
Psalms58:7 Mabanyibilike njengamanzi abalekayo; nxa abekisa omnye nomnye intolo zake, mazibe njengokungati zinqunyulelwe." 
Psalms58:8 Mababe njengenkumba eyemkayo ngokunyibilika; njengesisu sipumayo somfazi mabangaboni ilanga. 
Psalms58:9 Kwa zingekeva imitolo imbiza zenu, nokuba iluhlaza, nokuba itshile, uqwitela lwoyikukulisa." 
Psalms58:10 Olungileyo uya kuvuya akubona impindezelo; uya kuhlanza inyawo zake ngegazi lokohlakeleyo. 
Psalms58:11 Baye abantu beya kuti: Ngenyaniso kuko umvuzo kuye olungileyo; ngenyaniso kuko utixo egweba emhlabeni. 
Psalms59:1 NDIHLANGULE ezintshabeni zam, Tixo wam! ndibeke pezulu kubo abandisukelayo." 
Psalms59:2 Ndihlangule kubo abenzi benkohlakalo; undisindise emadodeni egazi. 
Psalms59:3 Ngokuba, kangela, balalele umpefumlo wam; abanamandla babutelene ngakum; kungeko isigqito sam, kungeko nesono sam, Yehova!" 
Psalms59:4 Bayagidima bazilungise kungeko tyala kum: vuka ukuza kundikaulela, ubone ke." 
Psalms59:5 Kwa wena, Yehova, Tixo wemikosi, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! vuka ukuza kubohlwaya abaheyideni bonke; ungabi nalufefe kubo bonke abenzayo ngobuxoki kakulu. Sela." 
Psalms59:6 Bayabuya ngokuhlwa, bayavungama njengenja, baṙaule isixeko." 
Psalms59:7 Kangela, bayapimisela ngomlomo wabo; kuko amaṙele emilonyeni yabo; ngokuba, batsho, ngubanina ovayo?" 
Psalms59:8 Kodwa wena, Yehova! uya kubahleka; uya kudela abaheyideni bonke." 
Psalms59:9 Ngenxa yamandla ake ndiya kukangela kuwe; ngokuba utixo eyinyango yam. 
Psalms59:10 Utixo wobubele bam uya kundandulela; utixo uya kundikangelisa pezu kwabandihlolayo. 
Psalms59:11 Ungababulali, hleze abantu bam balibale: badungudelise ngamandla ako, ubahlisele pantsi, Nkosi, kaka letu!" 
Psalms59:12 Ngenxa yesono somlomo wabo, n amazwi emilomo yabo, mababanjwe ngoko er̔atshini labo, nangenxa yokutuka nokuxoka a bakutetayo." 
Psalms59:13 Ba gqibele ngengqumbo, ba gqibele, ize bangabiko; mabazi ke ukuba kupatwa ngutixo kwa‐Yakobi, na kude kube sezincameni zomhlaba. Sela." 
Psalms59:14 Mababuye ngokuhlwa, mabavungame njengenja, baṙaule isixeko." 
Psalms59:15 Mababadule ngokufuna ukutya; ukuba abahluti, mabalalise njalo." 
Psalms59:16 Kodwa mna ndiya kuvuma ngawo amandla ako; ewe, ndiya kudumisa ububele bako ngovuyo kwa kusasa: ngokuba ubuyinyango nendawo yokupepela kum, ngemini yokubandezelwa kwam." 
Psalms59:17 Ndiya kuculela wena, mandla am! ngokuba utixo eyinyango yam, utixo wobubele bam." 
Psalms60:1 TIXO! usilahlile, usicitile, ubuqumbile; zubuye ubuyele kuti." 
Psalms60:2 Uwungcangcazelisile umhlaba; uwucandile: pilisa intanda zawo, uzamazama nje." 
Psalms60:3 Ubonisile abantu bako into ezilukuni; usisezile iveyine yesizunguzane. 
Psalms60:4 Ubanikile abo bakwoyikayo ibanile, ukuze ipakanyiswe ngenxa yenyaniso. Sela." 
Psalms60:5 Ukuze abatandwa bako bakululwe, sindisa ngesokunene sako, undipendule." 
Psalms60:6 Utixo utetile ebungcweleni bake; ndiya kugcoba: ndiya kwaba i‐Shekeme, ndilinganise umhlambo we‐Sukote:" 
Psalms60:7 u‐Gileyadi ungowam; u‐Manase ukwa ngowam; u‐Frayime naye ungamandla entloko yam; u‐Juda ungumnikamteto wam: 
Psalms60:8 i‐Mowabi isisitya sam sokuhlambela; pezu kwe‐Edome ndoposa isihlangu sam; danduluka ngovuyo ngenxa yam, Filistiya!" 
Psalms60:9 Ngubanina oya kundikokela esixekweni esiyinqaba? ngubanina oya kundikapela e‐Edome? 
Psalms60:10 Asi nguwe na, Tixo! o wabusilahlile? akuyi kupuma na, Tixo! nemikosi yetu?" 
Psalms60:11 Sinike uncedo ekubandezelweni; ngokuba usizo lwabantu lungendawo. 
Psalms60:12 Ngaye utixo siya kwenza ngobuṙoti; ngokuba enguye oya kunyatela pantsi ababandezeli betu. 
Psalms61:1 YIVA, Tixo! isikalo sam; pulapula umtandazo wam." 
Psalms61:2 Kwa sekupeleni kwomhlaba ndiya kubizela kuwe, xeshekweni intliziyo yam icubukile: ndikapele eweni elingapezulu kum." 
Psalms61:3 Ngokuba ubulihlati kum, kwa inqaba enamandla ebusweni botshaba." 
Psalms61:4 Ndiya kuhlala ententeni yako kude kube ngunapakade; ndiya kupepela esigubungelweni samapiko ako. Sela. 
Psalms61:5 Ngokuba wena, Tixo! uzivile izibambiso zam; undipile ilifa labo boyika igama lako." 
Psalms61:6 Uya kwongeza imihla emihleni yokumkani; iminyaka yake yoba njengezizukulwana ezininzi. 
Psalms61:7 Uya kuhlala ebusweni bukatixo kude kube ngunapakade: maumisele ububele nenyaniso, ukuba zimgcine." 
Psalms61:8 Kukona ndiya kucula egameni lako kude kube ngunapakade, ndize ndifeze izibambiso zam imihla ngemihla." 
Psalms62:1 NGENYANISO umpefumlo wam uyalinda utixo: luvela kuye usindiswa lwam. 
Psalms62:2 Ngenyaniso nguye ilityekazi lam nosindiso lwam; nguye inyango yam, andiyi kushukunyiswa kakulu." 
Psalms62:3 Nomana ukuqinga ububi ngasemntwini kude kube ninina? niya kubulawa nonke; niya kuba njengodonga olutambekayo n otango oluwayo. 
Psalms62:4 Bayacebana kupela ukuba bamwise ebukulwini bake; bayatanda ubuxoki; bayatamsanqelisa ngomlomo wabo, kanti ngombilini wabo bayaqalekisa. Sela." 
Psalms62:5 Kodwa wena, mpefumlo wam! yiti cwaka pambi kwotixo; ngokuba ukukangela kwam kuvela kuye." 
Psalms62:6 Ngenyaniso nguye ilityekazi lam nosindiso lwam; nguye inyango yam, andiyi kushukunyiswa." 
Psalms62:7 Usindiswa lwam lu kutixo, kwa nobungcwalisa bam; ilityekazi lamandla am, n endawo yam yokupepela, zikutixo." 
Psalms62:8 Tembani yena futi, bantu! palazani intliziyo yenu ebusweni bake: utixo uyindawo yokupepela kuti. Sela." 
Psalms62:9 Ngenyaniso abantu abamnyama abandawo; abantu abakulu babuxoki: esilinganisweni bayanyuka, belula kokungendawo kwa kunye." 
Psalms62:10 Musani ukutemba ekubandezeleni; musani ukuqa̔yisa ekubadeni: nxa ubutyebi bandayo, musani ukumisa intliziyo." 
Psalms62:11 Utixo wateta kwa kanye; kukabini endikuvileyo oku; ukuba amandla alunge kutixo. 
Psalms62:12 Kanjako kuwe, Nkosi! kulunge ububele; ngokuba uvuza abanye ngabanye njengokwemisebenzi yabo." 
Psalms63:1 TIXO! ungutixo wam; ndokufuna kusasa; umpefumlo wam unxanelwe wena, inyama yam ikulangazelele ezweni elomileyo nelidiniweyo, apo kungeko manzi;" 
Psalms63:2 ndize ndibone amandla ako nobungcwalisa bako, njengokuba ndikubonile endaweni eyingcwele." 
Psalms63:3 Ngokuba ububele bako bulungile pezu kwokudliwa kwobomi, umlomo wam wokuncoma." 
Psalms63:4 Ndiya kukubonga ngokunjalo nxa ndisadla ubomi; ndiya kupakamisa izandla zam egameni lako. 
Psalms63:5 Uya kukoliswa umpefumlo wam njengokungati kungomongo namanqata; nomlomo wam wokudumisa ngenteto yemigcobo; 
Psalms63:6 nxa ndikumbula wena esililini sam, nxa ndicinga wena emavaṙashweni asebusuku." 
Psalms63:7 Ubungumncedi wam nje, ndovuya ngoko emtunzini wamapiko ako." 
Psalms63:8 Umpefumlo wam uti nama ukulandela wena; isandla sako sokunene siyandixasa. 
Psalms63:9 Kodwa abo bafuna ubomi bam babang’ ukutshatyalaliswa; baya kungena emazantsi omhlaba. 
Psalms63:10 Baya kweyeliselwa ngamandla eṙele; boba sisabelwa sempungutye. 
Psalms63:11 Kodwa ukumkani uya kuvuya kutixo; abo bonke bamfungayo boqa̔yisa; kodwa umlomo wabo bateta ubuxoki wovingcelwa. 
Psalms64:1 YIVA ilizwi lam, Tixo! ekukalazeni kwam: gcina ubomi bam ekwoyikiseni kwotshaba." 
Psalms64:2 Ndifihle ekucebeni kwabakohlakeleyo; nasempitimpitini yabenzi bokungendawo; 
Psalms64:3 abalulolayo njengeṙele ulwimi lwabo; babekisa intolo zabo, kwa amazwi abuṙaṙa;" 
Psalms64:4 ukuze bamtole ngasese ofezekileyo: bayamtola ngokuqubula, bengoyiki." 
Psalms64:5 Bayazomeleza emcimbini ongalungileyo; bayateta ngokufihla imigibe; bati: Baya kubonwa ngubanina? 
Psalms64:6 Bayapanda izikohlakalo; bafezile ukupanda okukuteleyo; kwa nombilini wabanye ngabanye nentliziyo zendele. 
Psalms64:7 Kodwa utixo uya kubatola ngentolo; boqutyulwa ngokulinyazwa. 
Psalms64:8 Kwa njalo ulwimi lwabo baya kuluwisa kwa pezu kwabo: bonke abababonayo bobaleka. 
Psalms64:9 Baye bonke abantu beya kwoyika, bashumayele umsebenzi katixo, banakane isenzo sake ngokuqonda." 
Psalms64:10 Olungileyo uya kuvuya ngoyehova, atembele kuye: bonke abantliziyo zilungisekile boqa̔yisa." 
Psalms65:1 INDUMISO iyakulinda, Tixo! e‐Ziyone; nakuwe isibambiso siya kufezwa." 
Psalms65:2 Wena uvayo umtandazo! uluntu lwonke lwoza kuwe. 
Psalms65:3 Indawo zenkohlakalo ziyandoyisa; izigqito zetu uya kuzixolela wena. 
Psalms65:4 Hai itamsanqa loqashwayo nguwe, nomsondezayo ukuba ahlale emakusini ako! siya kukoliswa kukulunga kwendlu yako, kwetempile yako engcwele." 
Psalms65:5 Uya kusipendula ngezinto ezoyikekileyo ngobulungisa, Tixo wosindiswa lwetu! wena ulitemba lazo zonke incam zomhlaba, nelabakude elwandle:" 
Psalms65:6 oqinisayo intaba ngamandla ake, ebinqiwe ngobomelelo;" 
Psalms65:7 otutuzelayo ukugquma kwelwandle, kwa ukugquma kwamaza azo, nempitimpiti yabantu." 
Psalms65:8 Kanjalo abo bahleli ezindaweni zokupela bayoyika ngenxa yemiqondiso yako. Uyagcobisa imvelo zokusa nezokuhlwa. 
Psalms65:9 Utyelele emhlabeni wawucencesha; uyawutyebisa kakulu ngomlambo katixo, ozele ngamanzi; uyalungisa inqolowa yabo, oko ulungisile wona ngokunjalo." 
Psalms65:10 Uyanyela kakulu imisele yawo; uyahlisa imiqela yawo; uyawutambisa ngezipango; uyatamsanqelisa ukuhluma kwawo. 
Psalms65:11 Uhombisile umnyaka ngobubele bako; ziti indlela zako zitontsele ubunqata. 
Psalms65:12 Ziyatontsela emaṙiweni asentlango; nenduli zibinqiwe ngomgcobo. 
Psalms65:13 Amadlelo ambatiswe imihlambi; izihlambo nazo zigujungelwe ngenqolowa; ziyadanduluka ngovuyo, ziyavuma kanjako." 
Psalms66:1 DANDULUKANI ngovuyo, mhlaba wonke!" 
Psalms66:2 Culelani ubungcwalisa begama lake; yenzani bungcwalisa udunyiswa lwake. 
Psalms66:3 Yitini kutixo: Hai ukwoyikeka kwemisebenzi yako! ngenxa yobukulu bamandla ako, intshaba zako zozenzisa kuwe." 
Psalms66:4 Wonke umhlaba uya kubedesha wena, bacule kuwe; boculela igama lako. Sela." 
Psalms66:5 Yizani nibone imisebenzi katixo: woyikekile ngokwenza kwake ngakubo onyana babantu. 
Psalms66:6 Waguqula ulwandle lube ngumhlaba owomileyo, ukuba bawele umlambo ngenyawo: kona apo siya kuvuya ngaye." 
Psalms66:7 Upete ngamandla ake ngonapakade; amehlo ake ayagqala abaheyideni: abanenkani mabangazipakamisi. Sela. 
Psalms66:8 Bongani utixo wetu, nina bantu! vakalisani ilizwi lokudunyiswa kwake:" 
Psalms66:9 omisa umpefumlo wetu ekudliwenikwobomi, engavumi ukuba inyawo zetu zishukunyiswe." 
Psalms66:10 Ngokuba wena, Tixo! usilingile; usicokisile njengokuba kucokiswa isilivere." 
Psalms66:11 Wasingenisa elutanjeni; wabeka ubunzima esinqeni setu. 
Psalms66:12 Wenza ukuba kukwele abantu pezu kwentloko zetu; sangena emlilweni nasemanzini; kodwa wasiku̔pela endaweni yobuninzi. 
Psalms66:13 Ndiya kungena endlwini yako namadini okutshiswa; ndiya kufeza kuwe izibambiso zam," 
Psalms66:14 owabuzivulela umlomo wam, waziteta kwa umlomo wam, nxa bendisekubandezelweni." 
Psalms66:15 Ndiya kunikela kuwe amadini okutshiswa atyebileyo, kunye nesiqumiso senkunzi zegusha; ndiya kunikela inkomo kunye nebokwe. Sela." 
Psalms66:16 Yizani nipulapule, nonke nina nimoyikayo utixo! ndandiya kushumayela oko akwenzele umpefumlo wam." 
Psalms66:17 Ndabizela kuye ngomlomo wam, wapakanyiswa ngolwimi lwam." 
Psalms66:18 Ukuba ndibe ndibonile inkohlakalo entliziyweni yam, inkosi inga inga ndi vanga:" 
Psalms66:19 kanti utixo uvile ngenyaniso; upulapule ilizwi lomtandazo wam. 
Psalms66:20 Makabongwe utixo ongapambukisanga umtandazo wam, kwa nobubele bake kum." 
Psalms67:1 WANGA utixo angasipata ngofefe, asitamsanqelise, enze ubuso bake bukanye ngakuti. Sela." 
Psalms67:2 Ize indlela yako yaziwe emhlabeni, nosindiso lwako pakati kwezizwe zonke." 
Psalms67:3 Abantu mabakudumise, Tixo! bonke abantu mabakudumise." 
Psalms67:4 Intlanga mazivuye zigcobe nokugcoba; ngokuba uya kugweba abantu ngokulungileyo, ukokele intlanga ezisemhlabeni. Sela." 
Psalms67:5 Abantu mabakudumise, Tixo! bonke abantu mabakudumise." 
Psalms67:6 Umhlaba uvelisile ukucu̔ma kwawo; utixo, kwa owetu utixo, uya kusitamsanqelisa." 
Psalms67:7 Utixo uya kusitamsanqelisa; zaziya kuti zonke incam zomhlaba zimoyike. 
Psalms68:1 MAKAVUKE utixo, mazicitwe intshaba zake; nabo bamtiyayo mababaleke ubuso bake." 
Psalms68:2 Ba qu̔be, njengokuba kuqu̔tywa umsi: njengokunyibilika kwamakambe emlilweni, mabatshabalale njalo abakohlakeleyo ebusweni bukatixo." 
Psalms68:3 Kodwa abalungileyo mabavuye bona; mabagcobe pambi kwo tixo; ewe, mabavuye ngovuyo olukulu." 
Psalms68:4 Vumani kutixo, culani egameni lake; bongani okwelayo emazulwini ngegama lake eli nguyehova, nigcobe ebusweni bake." 
Psalms68:5 Unguyise wenkedama, nomgwebeli wabahlolokazi, utixo ekayeni lake eliyingcwele." 
Psalms68:6 Utixo uyahlalisa amagantuntu endlwini; ababanjiweyo uyabaku̔pela ebutamsanqeni; kodwa abanenkani bahleli endaweni eyomileyo. 
Psalms68:7 Tixo! wakupumela pambi kwabantu bako, wakuhamba ebugxwayibeni; Sela:" 
Psalms68:8 umhlaba wangcangcazela, nezulu latontsela ebusweni bukatixo; kwa le‐Sinai ebusweni botixo, botixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms68:9 Wena, Tixo! waunisa imvula enkulu; wamisa ilifa lako lakudinwa." 
Psalms68:10 Umhlambi wako uhleli kulo; wena, Tixo! ulungisele amahlwempu ngobubele bako." 
Psalms68:11 Inkosi yanika ilizwi; abafazi abashumayelayo indaba bangumkosi omkulu. 
Psalms68:12 Okumkani bemikosi babaleka ngokubaleka; waza umfazi owasala ekaya waba amaxoba. 
Psalms68:13 Nxa niya kulala pantsi pakati kwezibaya, niya kuba njeng amapiko ehobe eligujungelwe ngesilivere, nentsiba zalo ngegolide elubelu." 
Psalms68:14 Nxa onamandla onke wabacita okumkani kulo, laba mhlope njengengqweqwe e‐Tsalimone." 
Psalms68:15 Yintaba katixo intaba ye‐Bashane, yintaba ende intaba ye‐Bashane." 
Psalms68:16 Ninomona nganina, zintaba ezinde? Nantsi intaba utixo atanda ukuhlala kuyo: ewe, uyehova uya kuma kona kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms68:17 Inqwelo zokulwa zikatixo zimawaka amashumi mabini, kwa amawaka apindapindiweyo: inkosi ipakati kwawo njenga se‐Sinai, endaweni eyingcwele." 
Psalms68:18 Unyukele enyangweni wena; amatinjwa uwatimbile; wamkelele abantu izipiwo, ewe, nabanenkani, ize uyehova utixo ahlale pakati kwabo." 
Psalms68:19 Maibongwe inkosi imihla ngemihla: nakuba ibeka umtwalo pezu kwetu, i ngutixo wosindiswa lwetu noko. Sela." 
Psalms68:20 Utixo wetu ngutixo wosindiso; nakuye uyehova oyinkosi kulunge izipumelo ekufeni. 
Psalms68:21 Ngenyaniso utixo uya kulimaza intloko yentshaba zake, n okakai olunenwele lwomana ehamba etyaleni lake." 
Psalms68:22 Yati inkosi: Ndiya kubuyisa e‐Bashane; ndiya kubuyisa ezinzulwini zolwandle; 
Psalms68:23 ukuze ulushukumise unyawo lwako egazini lentshaba, n olwimi lwezinja zako kwelezinye ngezinye." 
Psalms68:24 Babonile izihambo zako, Tixo! kwa izihambo zotixo wam, zokumkani wam, endaweni eyingcwele." 
Psalms68:25 Abavumi bahamba pambili; ababeti beziculiso bebengasemva; ngapakati bekuko intombi zibeta intambula. 
Psalms68:26 Bongani utixo ezintlanganisweni, kwa inkosi, nina ningabomtombo ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Psalms68:27 Kuko um‐Benjamine omncinane n ompati wabo, inkosi zakwa‐Juda n amapakati azo, inkosi zakwa‐Zebulone, n enkosi zakwa‐Nefatali." 
Psalms68:28 Utixo wako umisele amandla ako; yomeleza, Tixo! oko okwenzele tina." 
Psalms68:29 Ngenxa yetempile yako e‐Yerusaleme, okumkani bozisa iminikelo kuwe." 
Psalms68:30 Tetisa isilo sasezingcongolweni, intlanganiso yenkunzi, kunye namatole ezizwe, nabo bazitobayo ngeziqingata zesilivere: uzicitile yena izizwe ezitanda imfazwe." 
Psalms68:31 Kwovela amanene e‐Jipete; u‐Kushe wokauleza ukwolulela kutixo izandla zake. 
Psalms68:32 Vumani kutixo, zikumkani zomhlaba! culani kuyo inkosi; Sela;" 
Psalms68:33 kulowo ukwela emazulwini amazulu kwa kudala: bona ke, uyaku̔pa ilizwi lake, ilizwi elinamandla." 
Psalms68:34 Nikelani kutixo udumo; o bungcwalisa bake bupezu kwo‐Sirayeli, namandla ake asesibakabakeni." 
Psalms68:35 Uyoyikeka, Tixo! usezindaweni zako ezingcwele; utixo wo‐Sirayeli nguye onika abantu amandla nobomelelo. Makabongwe utixo." 
Psalms69:1 NDISINDISE, Tixo! ngokuba amanzi engene empefumlweni." 
Psalms69:2 Nditshonile eludakeni olunzulu, kungeko ndawo yokuma: ndingene ezinzulwini zamanzi, apo umsinga undikukulisayo." 
Psalms69:3 Ndidiniwe kukubiza kwam; umqala wam utshile; amehlo am ayapela, nxa ndilinda utixo wam." 
Psalms69:4 Bagqitisile inwele zentloko yam ngokuba baninzi abanditiyayo kungeko tuba; bayinto enkulu abanga banganditshabalalisa, abazintshaba zam kungeko ndawo: oko ndingakupanganga ndiya kwandula ndikubuyise." 
Psalms69:5 Tixo! uyazi wena ngobugeza bam; nezilandu zam azikufihlelwanga. 
Psalms69:6 Abo bakangela kuwe, Nkosi, Yehova wemikosi! mabangadaniswa ngam: abo bakufunayo, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli! mabangaviswa ihlazo ngam." 
Psalms69:7 Ngokuba ngenxa yako nditwele isituko; ihlazo ligubungele ubuso bam. 
Psalms69:8 Sendingowasemzini kubazalwana bam, nongaziwayo kubantwana bakama̔." 
Psalms69:9 Ngokuba ubukwele bendlu yako bundidlile; izituko zabakutukileyo ziwile pezu kwam. 
Psalms69:10 Ndaye ndilila ndagqiba umpefumlo wam ekuzileni; kanti oko kwaba yinto yokutukwa kwam. 
Psalms69:11 Kanjalo ndenza ingubo yam ngentlakantlaka; ndaza ndaba yinto yokuzekeliswa kubo. 
Psalms69:12 Abo bahleli esangweni bayateta ngakum; ndiba yingoma yabasela utyalwa. 
Psalms69:13 Kodwa mna, ukutandaza kwam kukuwe, Yehova! ngexesha elikolekileyo: Tixo! ngobuninzi bobubele bako ndipendule, ngenyaniso yosindiso lwako." 
Psalms69:14 Ndihlangule eludakeni, mandingatshoni: mandihlangulwe kwabanditiyayo, nasezinzulwini zamanzi." 
Psalms69:15 Umsinga wamanzi maungandikukulisi, inzulu maingandiginyi, umnxuma maungavingci umlomo wawo pezu kwam." 
Psalms69:16 Ndive, Yehova! ngokuba ububele bako bulungile; beka kum ngabo ubuninzi benceba zako." 
Psalms69:17 Zungafihleli isicaka sako ubuso bako; ngokuba ndisekubandezelweni; ndipendule kamsinya. 
Psalms69:18 Sondela empefumlweni wam, uwukulule; ngenxa yentshaba zam ndisindise." 
Psalms69:19 Wena wazile ukutukwa kwam, nokudana kwam, nokuhlaziswa kwam: abo bayimpi kum bonke bapambi kwako." 
Psalms69:20 Ukutukwa kuqekezile intliziyo yam; ndiyafa kakulu: ndakangela ukuku̔zwa, kanti bekungeko; nabatutuzeli, kanti andibafumananga." 
Psalms69:21 Bandinika inyongo ibe kukudla kwam; nasekunxanweni kwam bandiseza iyasine. 
Psalms69:22 Isitebe sabo masibe sisibata ebusweni babo; ewe, masibe ngumgibe kubo besekwonwabeni." 
Psalms69:23 Amehlo abo makenziwe mnyama, baze bangaboni; nezinqe zabo uzenze zingcangcazele futi." 
Psalms69:24 Galela ingqumbo yako pezu kwabo, buti ubushushu bomsindo wako bubabambe." 
Psalms69:25 Maibe indlu yabo icitakele; makungabiko namnye ohlala ezintenteni zabo. 
Psalms69:26 Ngokuba betshutshisa lowo umbetileyo wena, beteta ngobuhlungu benxweleṙa zako." 
Psalms69:27 Beka inkohlakalo pezu kwenkohlakalo yabo; mabangangeni ebulungiseni bako. 
Psalms69:28 Mabacinywe encwadini yabahleliyo; mabangaba̔lwa ndawonye nabalungileyo. 
Psalms69:29 Kodwa mna ndibuhlwempu, ndilusizi: usindiso lwako, Tixo! malundibeke enyangweni." 
Psalms69:30 Ndiya kudumisa igama likatixo ngeculo, ndimenze mkulu ngombulelo." 
Psalms69:31 Oku kuya kukolisa uyehova pezu kwenkabi, napezu kwenkunzana enempondo eyahluka impupu." 
Psalms69:32 Abalulamileyo bobona bavuye; yaiya kupila intliziyo yenu, nina nimfunayo utixo!" 
Psalms69:33 Ngokuba uyehova esiva amahlwempu, engadeli nababanjwa bake." 
Psalms69:34 Mazimdumise izulu nomhlaba, ilwandle nento zonke ezishukumayo kuzo." 
Psalms69:35 Ngokuba utixo eya kusindisa i‐Ziyone, ake izixeko zakwa‐Juda; ize bahlale kona, bayifuye." 
Psalms69:36 Inzalo yezicaka zake nayo iya kudla ilifa layo; nabo batanda igama lake bohlala kuyo. 
Psalms70:1 KAULEZA, Tixo! ukuza kundikulula; kauleza, Yehova! ukuza kundisiza." 
Psalms70:2 Mabadaniswe bamatiswe abo bafuna ubomi bam: mabanqandelwe ngomva, baviswe ihlazo, abo batanda ukwenzakala kwam." 
Psalms70:3 Mababuye, ube ngumvuzo wehlazo labo, abo bati: Tshotsho! Tshotsho!" 
Psalms70:4 Mabati bonke abo bafuna wena bagcobe bavuye ngawe; mabati abo batanda usindiso lwako bahlale besiti: Makenziwe mkulu utixo. 
Psalms70:5 Kodwa mna ndilihlwempu, ndingosweleyo; yiza kum kamsinya, Tixo! wena ungumncedi wam nomkululi wam; zungalibali, Yehova!" 
Psalms71:1 YEHOVA! nditembile kuwe; mandingezi ndidaniswe. 
Psalms71:2 Ndihlangule ngobulungisa bako, undikulule; tobela kum indlebe yako, undisindise." 
Psalms71:3 Yiba liliwa lokuhlala kum, endiya kuza kulo futi: usel’ uyalele ukuba ndisindiswe; ngokuba ulilityekazi lam nenqaba yam." 
Psalms71:4 Tixo wam! ndikulule esandleni sokohlakeleyo, kwa sesandleni solimenemene nosijoṙa." 
Psalms71:5 Ngokuba nguwe ukukangela kwam, Nkosi, Yehova! ulitemba lam kwa sebutsheni bam." 
Psalms71:6 Ndisekelwe nguwe kwa sesizalweni; nguwe owandiku̔payo esiswini sikama̔; indumiso yam yoba ngawe futi. 
Psalms71:7 Ndaba njengommangaliso kwabaninzi: kodwa nguwe isipepelo sam esinamandla. 
Psalms71:8 Umlomo wam uya kuzaliswa ngodumo lwako, na ngobungcwalisa bako imini yonke." 
Psalms71:9 Zungandilahli ngexesha lobudala; zungandishiyi kwakupela amandla am. 
Psalms71:10 Ngokuba abazintshaba zam beteta ngam, nabahlolayo umpefumlo wam bayacebisana," 
Psalms71:11 besiti: Utixo umshiyile; putumani nimbambe, kungeko okululayo nje." 
Psalms71:12 Tixo! zungabi kude nam: Tixo wam! kauleza ukuza kundinceda. 
Psalms71:13 Baya kudaniswa bagqityelwe, abo bayimpi kumpefumlo wam; baya kwambatiswa ugxekwa nehlazo, abo bafuna ukwenzakala kwam." 
Psalms71:14 Kodwa mna ndiya kutemba futi; ndandiya kuman’ ukwongezelela ukukudumisa. 
Psalms71:15 Umlomo wam uya kubalisa ubulungisa bako, n osindiso lwako imini yonke; nakuba ndingazi amanani." 
Psalms71:16 Ndiya kuhamba ngamandla enkosi e nguyehova; ndiya kukankanya obako ubulungisa, obako bodwa." 
Psalms71:17 Tixo! undifundisile kuselokwa sebutsheni bam; nakwada kwakaloku ndiyishumayele imimangaliso yako. 
Psalms71:18 Ngako kanjalo, nxa kukoyo ubudala nezimvi, zungandishiyi, Tixo! ndide ndishumayele ingalo yako kwisizukulwana esikoyo, namandla ako kuzo zonke ezisakuza." 
Psalms71:19 Ubulungisa bako nabo, Tixo! bufikela pezulu, wena uzenzileyo izinto ezinkulu: Tixo! ngubanina onjengawe?" 
Psalms71:20 Wena undibonisileyo intsizi ezininzi nezimbi, uya kubuya undipilise; uya kubuya undinyuse ezinzulwini zomhlaba." 
Psalms71:21 Uya kwandisa ubukulu bam, undonwabise ngamacala onke." 
Psalms71:22 Nam ndokudumisa ngenebele, kwa inyaniso yako, Tixo wam! ndokuculela ngekinore, wena ngcwele ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Psalms71:23 Umlomo wam uya kuvuya kakulu, nxa ndikuculelayo; nompefumlo wam, owukululeyo." 
Psalms71:24 Kanjako ulwimi lwam luya kuteta ngobulungisa bako imini yonke; ngokuba bedanisiwe bamatiswa abo bafuna ukwenzakala kwam. 
Psalms72:1 TIXO! nika izigwebo zako kukumkani, nobulungisa bako kunyana wokumkani." 
Psalms72:2 Uya kupata abantu bako ngobulungisa, namahlwempu ako ngobugwebo." 
Psalms72:3 Intaba ziya kuvelisela abantu uxolo, kwa nenduli, ngenxa yobulungisa." 
Psalms72:4 Uya kugwebela amahlwempu abantu; uya kusindisa onyana babasweleyo; uya kutyumza umbandezeli. 
Psalms72:5 Baya kukwoyika kunye nokuhlala kwelanga nenyanga, izizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Psalms72:6 Wohla njengemvula pezu kwenca esikiweyo, njengezipango ezinyelayo umhlaba kakulu." 
Psalms72:7 Emihleni yake olungileyo uya kuhluma, nobuninzi boxolo ide inyanga ingabi sabiko." 
Psalms72:8 Waeya kupata ngobukosi kwa selwandle kude kube selwandle, nasemlambo kude kube sezincanyeni zomhlaba." 
Psalms72:9 Abemi bentlango baya kuguqa pambi kwake, nentshaba zake ziya kukota utuli." 
Psalms72:10 Okumkani base‐Tareshishe nabeziqiti bozisa umnikelo; okumkani base‐Sheba nabase‐Seba bosondeza amabaso. 
Psalms72:11 Ewe, okumkani bonke baya kutoba pantsi kuye; izizwe zonke ziya kumkonza." 
Psalms72:12 Ngokuba eya kukulula osweleyo akukala; nolusizi okungeko mncedi kuye. 
Psalms72:13 Uya kuba nenceba kolihlwempu nosweleyo; nemipefumlo yabasweleyo woyisindisa. 
Psalms72:14 Uya kukulula umpefumlo wabo ebuqingeni nasebudlwengwini; negazi labo loba yinto enqabileyo emehlweni ake. 
Psalms72:15 Waeya kuhlala epilile, kunikwe kuye kwigolide yase‐Sheba; kwakuya kutandazelwa yena futi, abongwe imihla yonke." 
Psalms72:16 Kuya kubako intwana yenqolowa emhlabeni pezu kwengcopo yentaba; isixakato sayo siya kuṙatshaza njenge‐Lebanone: nabasesixekweni baya kutyatyamba njengenca yomhlaba. 
Psalms72:17 Igama lake liya kubako kude kube ngunapakade; igama lake lohlala kunye nokuhlala kwelanga; abantu botanyusanqelwa ngaye; zonke izizwe zombiza ngonetamsanqa. 
Psalms72:18 Makabongwe uyehova utixo, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, owenza yedwa imimangaliso." 
Psalms72:19 Malibongwe negama lake eliyingcwalisa kude kube ngunapakade; uti umhlaba wonke uzaliswe bubungcwalisa bake. Amene, ewe Amene." 
Psalms72:20 Imitandazo ka‐Davide unyana ka‐Jese ipelile. 
Psalms73:1 NGENYANISO utixo uyenza ngokulungileyo ko‐Sirayeli, kwa kubo abantliziyo zingcwele." 
Psalms73:2 Kodwa mna, inyawo zam zapantsi kupambuka; amanyatela am apantsi kutyibilika." 
Psalms73:3 Ngokuba ndibe ndinomona ngakubo abagezayo, ndakubona ukwonwaba kwabakohlakeleyo." 
Psalms73:4 Ngokuba kungeko zibambo ekufeni kwabo; amandla abo omelele. 
Psalms73:5 Abasebunzimeni boluntu; ababulawa njeng abanye abantu. 
Psalms73:6 Ngako ir̔atshi liyabapahla njengomxokolelwane womqala; ubudlwengu buyabavatisa njeng engubo. 
Psalms73:7 Amehlo abo ayapuma ngokutyeba; bagqitisile nokucinga kwentliziyo. 
Psalms73:8 Bayahleka, bayateta ngokubi ngembandezelo; bayateta ngoqanqalazo." 
Psalms73:9 Umlomo wabo bayawubekisa ngakulo izulu, nolwimi lwabo luyahamba emhlabeni." 
Psalms73:10 Ngako abantu bake baya kubuyela apa, namanzi endebe izele ayahluzelwa kubo." 
Psalms73:11 Bati ke: Uti nina ukwazi utixo? kuko ukwazi na kopezu kwonke? 
Psalms73:12 Kangela, aba ngabakohlakeleyo; abanokwonwaba okufuti, bayandisa ubutyebi." 
Psalms73:13 Ngenyaniso ndifumane ndacokisa intliziyo yam; ndifumane ndahlamba izandla zam kokungenatyala. 
Psalms73:14 Ngokuba ndibulawa imini yonke, nokwohlwaywa kwam kungemiso ngemiso." 
Psalms73:15 Ukuba bendiya kuti: Ndiya kuteta njalo; bona ke, ndinga ndisenza ngenkohliso kwisizukulwana sonyana bako." 
Psalms73:16 Ndindakucinga ukuba ndikwazi oku, kwaba yinkohla emehlweni am;" 
Psalms73:17 ndada ndangena endaweni eyingcwele katixo; ndaza ndaqonda isipelo sabo. 
Psalms73:18 Ngenyaniso uyababeka emityibilizweni, uyabawisela ezintshabalalweni." 
Psalms73:19 Hai ukucitakaliswa kwabo kamsinya ke! bagqityelwe kanye zizoyikiso. 
Psalms73:20 Njengepupa nxa kuvukwayo, woti, Nkosi! wakuvuka, udele isanga sabo." 
Psalms73:21 Kwa nje ke intliziyo yam yakatazeka, ndahlatywa ezintsweni zam." 
Psalms73:22 Bendidolile ngoko, ndingenakwazi; ndaba njengenkomo pambi kwako." 
Psalms73:23 Sendinawe futi noko; u ndi bambile ngesandla sam sokunene. 
Psalms73:24 Uya kundikokela ngecebo lako, uti kamva undamkele ebungcwaliseni." 
Psalms73:25 Ndinabanina ezulwini? nasemhlabeni andinqweneli luto ngapandle kwako. 
Psalms73:26 Kuyapela inyama yam nentliziyo yam: kodwa utixo uliliwa lentliziyo yam, nesabelwa sam kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms73:27 Ngokuba, bona ke, abo bakude nawe baya kububa; uyabatshabalalisa bonke abo bemkayo kuwe ngombulo." 
Psalms73:28 Kodwa mna, ukuba kufupi notixo kulungile kum; itemba lam ndilibekile enkosini e nguyehova, ndize ndishumayele yonke imisebenzi yako." 
Psalms74:1 TIXO! kunganina ukuba usilahlile ngonapakade? kunganina ukuba ingqumbo yako iqu̔me ngakuzo izimvu zesidlelo sako? 
Psalms74:2 Kumbula intlanganiso yako wabuyitenga kwa kudala, intonga yelifa lako wabuyikulula, kwa lentaba ye‐Ziyone wabuhleli kuyo." 
Psalms74:3 Pakamisela inyawo zako kuzo intshabalalo ezingunapakade, kwa konke olukucitileyo utshaba endaweni eyingcwele." 
Psalms74:4 Intshaba zako ziyakonya pakati kwezindlu zokuhlangana zako; ziyamisa imiqondiso yazo ibe yimiqondiso. 
Psalms74:5 Ku yaziwa njengonyusayo amazembe eludadeni lwemiti. 
Psalms74:6 Ngokuba kaloku zikanda iziqingqwa zayo ngezixenxe nangezando kwa kunye. 
Psalms74:7 Indawo yako eyingcwele ziyilahlele emlilweni; intlalo yegama lako ziyinco̔lisile kude kube semhlabeni. 
Psalms74:8 Zite ezintliziyweni zazo: Masibabulale kwa kunye. Zonke izindlu zokuhlangana zikatixo kulomhlaba zizitshisile. 
Psalms74:9 Imiqondiso yetu asiyiboni; akuseko mprofite; kanjalo akuseko kuti okwaziyo ukuba kwoba kade kangakananina. 
Psalms74:10 Tixo! umbandezeli wotuka kude kube ninina? utshaba lwogxeka igama lako kude kube ngunapakade na? 
Psalms74:11 Yinina ukuba ubuyisele isandla sako, kwa esokunene sako? sir̔ole esifubeni sako, ugqibele." 
Psalms74:12 Ngokuba utixo engukumkani wam kwa kudala, esebenza intsindiso pakati kwomhlaba." 
Psalms74:13 Wena wahlula ulwandle ngamandla ako; waqekeza intloko zengwenya emanzini. 
Psalms74:14 Watyumza intloko zeleviyatane, wayinika ibe kukudla kwabantu basentlango." 
Psalms74:15 Wacanda umtombo nomsinga wena; womisa imilambo emikulu wena. 
Psalms74:16 Imini yeyako, ubusuku nabo bobako; ulungisile ukukanya nelanga." 
Psalms74:17 Umisile yonke imida yomhlaba; udalile ihlobo nobusika. 
Psalms74:18 Kumbula oku: utshaba lutukile, Yehova! nabantu abagezayo bagxekile igama lako." 
Psalms74:19 Zunganikeli eṙamncweni ubomi behobe lako; umhlambi wamahlwempu ako zungawulibali ngonapakade. 
Psalms74:20 Gqala ucebano; ngokuba indawo ezimnyama zomhlaba zizele zizindlu zobudlwengu. 
Psalms74:21 Oncinezelweyo makangabuyi edanile; olihlwempu nosweleyo mabadumise igama lako. 
Psalms74:22 Pakama, Tixo! upikele ityala lako: kumbula ukutukwa kwako ligeza imihla yonke." 
Psalms74:23 Zungalibali ilizwi lentshaba zako: impitimpiti yabasukela ngakuwe ihlala isanda. 
Psalms75:1 SIYABULELA kuwe, Tixo! siyabulela: ngokuba kushunyayelwa yimimangaliso yako ukuba igama lako likufupi." 
Psalms75:2 Nxa ndizuza ixesha elimisiweyo, ndiya kugweba ngokufanelekileyo." 
Psalms75:3 Umhlaba nabemi bawo bonke banyibilikile; ndiyaqinisa intsika zawo. Sela. 
Psalms75:4 Ndati kwabagezayo: Musani ukugeza; nakwabakohlakeleyo: Musani ukupakamisa upondo. 
Psalms75:5 Musani ukupakamisela pezulu upondo lwenu, ningateti ngentamo elukuni." 
Psalms75:6 Ngokuba upakanyiswa lungaveli apo lipuma ilanga, nalapo litshona kona, lungaveli nasentlango." 
Psalms75:7 Ngutixo ongumgwebi: omnye uyamwisa, nomnye uyampakamisa." 
Psalms75:8 Ngokuba kuko indebe esandleni sikayehova; iveyine ibomvu: izele yinto epitikeziweyo; uyatulula kwa kuyo: koko intlenga zayo bonke abakohlakeleyo bomhlaba baya kuzihluza, bazisele." 
Psalms75:9 Kodwa mna ndiya kushumayela kude kube ngunapakade; ndiya kucula kuye utixo ka‐Yakobi. 
Psalms75:10 Kanjalo zonke impondo zabakohlakeleyo ndiya kuzinqumla; kodwa impondo zolungileyo ziya kupakanyiswa. 
Psalms76:1 UTIXO wazekile kwa‐Juda; igama lake likulu kwa‐Sirayeli. 
Psalms76:2 Kanjalo itabanakele yake ise‐Saleme, nekaya lake lise‐Ziyone." 
Psalms76:3 Wapula apo intolo zesipeta, ikaka, neṙele, n ezixo̔bo zokulwa. Sela." 
Psalms76:4 Uyingcwalisa wena! udumile ngapezu kwentaba zamaxoba. 
Psalms76:5 Abantliziyo zinamandla bapangiwe, balele ubutongo babo; akuko nanye kumadoda obuṙoti efumene izandla zayo." 
Psalms76:6 Ngenxa yokutetisa kwako, Tixo ka‐Yakobi! kuwelwe bubutongo obukulu inqwelo nehashe." 
Psalms76:7 Wena, kwa wena ungowoyikekayo; ngubanina ongema ebusweni bako emvenikweni uqumbileyo?" 
Psalms76:8 Wavakalisa umgwebo kwa sezulwini; umhlaba woyika, wati cwaka," 
Psalms76:9 nxa utixo wavukela ekugwebeni, ukuza kusindisa bonke abalulamileyo bomhlaba. Sela." 
Psalms76:10 Ngenyaniso umsindo woluntu wodumisa wena; iliva lomsindo uya kulibamba. 
Psalms76:11 Yenzani isibambiso, nisifeze kuyehova utixo wenu: bonke abamngqongayo mabazise umnikelo kowoyikekayo." 
Psalms76:12 Uya kunqamla umoya wazo inkosi: woyikekile kubo okumkani bomhlaba. 
Psalms77:1 NDAKALA kutixo ngelizwi lam, kwa kutixo ngelizwi lam, wandinika indlebe ke." 
Psalms77:2 Ngemini yobunzima bam ndafuna inkosi; isandla sam solulwa ebusuku, asayeka; umpefumlo wam wala ukututuzelwa." 
Psalms77:3 Ndakumbula utixo, ndaba nesitukutezi; ndacamanga, waza wacubuka umoya wam. Sela." 
Psalms77:4 Ububamba inkope zamehlo am; bendixalile, andateta ke." 
Psalms77:5 Ndakumbulela imihla yapambili, iminyaka yakudala." 
Psalms77:6 Ndakumbula ukucula kwam ebusuku; ndacamanga pakati kwentliziyo yam; wati umoya wam wapengulula. 
Psalms77:7 Inkosi iya kulahla kude kube ngunapakade na? ayisayi kubuya ibe nokubuka na? 
Psalms77:8 Ububele bake bunqamkile ngonapakade na? ilizwi lake lipelile kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana na? 
Psalms77:9 Utixo ulibele ukuba nofefe na? uyivalele inceba yake ngomsindo na? Sela. 
Psalms77:10 Ndaza ndati: Bubulwelwe bam oku! iminyaka yesandla sokunene sopezu kwonke," 
Psalms77:11 izenzo zikayehova ndozikumbula; ngenyaniso ndokumbula imimangaliso yako yakudala. 
Psalms77:12 Ndandiya kucinga konke ukwenza kwako, nditete ngemisebenzi yako." 
Psalms77:13 Indlela yako, Tixo! isendaweni eyingcwele: ngubanina o ngutixo omkulu njengaye utixo?" 
Psalms77:14 Wena ungutixo owenza okungummangaliso; ubonakalisile amandla ako pakati kwezizwe. 
Psalms77:15 Ubakulule abantu bako ngengalo yako, onyana baka‐Yakobi nabaka‐Josefe. Sela." 
Psalms77:16 Amanzi ebekubona, Tixo! amanzi ebekubona, ankwantya ke: ewe, inzulu zazamazama." 
Psalms77:17 Amafu agalela amanzi; isibakabaka saku̔pa ilizwi; intolo zako nazo zapumela. 
Psalms77:18 Ilizwi lokududuma kwako belisezulwini; imibane yabaneka ilizwe; umhlaba wazamazama wangcangcazela. 
Psalms77:19 Umendo wako ubuselwandle; indlela yako ibisemanzini amakulu; imikondo yako ayaziwa. 
Psalms77:20 Wakokela abantu bako njengegusha, ngesandla sika‐Mosesi nesika‐Arone." 
Psalms78:1 BEKANI indlebe, bantu bam! emtetweni wam: tobani indlebe zenu emazwini omlomo wam." 
Psalms78:2 Ndiya kuvula umlomo wam ngomzekeliso; ndiya kuxela izintsonkotelo zakudala: 
Psalms78:3 esizivileyo sazazi, nesizityelweyo ngobawo betu." 
Psalms78:4 Asiyi kuzisitelisa kubantwana babo, sishumayela kwisizukulwana sasemva indumiso zikayehova, namandla ake, nemimangaliso yake ayenzileyo." 
Psalms78:5 Ngokuba wamisa isinqi̔no kwa‐Yakobi, wadala umteto kwa‐Sirayeli, owabayalela obawo betu ukuba bazazise kubantwana babo;" 
Psalms78:6 ukuze sizazi isizukulwana sasemva, abantwana abaza kuzalwa; bavuke bazishumayele na kubantwana babo:" 
Psalms78:7 ukuba babeke pezu kwotixo itemba labo, bangazilibali izenzo zikatixo, kodwa imiyalelo yake bayibambe;" 
Psalms78:8 bangabi njengoyise babo, isizukulwana esinenkani esingevayo; isizukulwana esingalungisanga intliziyo yaso, nesimoya ungatanga nqi kutixo." 
Psalms78:9 Onyana baka‐Frayime, betyeda betola ngezipeta, bajika ngomva ngemini yokulwa." 
Psalms78:10 Abagcina ucebano lukatixo, bala nokuhamba emtetweni wake;" 
Psalms78:11 balibala nemisebenzi yake, nemimangaliso yake abebabonisile yona." 
Psalms78:12 Wenza okungummangaliso pambi kwoyise babo, elizweni le‐Jipete, ezindle zase‐Tsohane." 
Psalms78:13 Wacanda ulwandle, wabaweza ke; wawamisa amanzi njengemfumba." 
Psalms78:14 Emini wabakokela ngelifu, nasebusuku bonke ngokukanya kwomlilo." 
Psalms78:15 Wacanda amatyekazi entlango, wabaseza njengasezinzulwini ngokukolisa." 
Psalms78:16 Wavelisa izelo eweni, wahlisela pantsi amanzi njengemilambo." 
Psalms78:17 Kanti bongeza kanjako ukwona ngakuye, ngokuvukela opezu kwonke ebugxwayibeni." 
Psalms78:18 Balinga utixo entliziyweni yabo, ngokucelela umxe̔lo wabo ukudla." 
Psalms78:19 Ewe, bateta ngakuye utixo; bati: Utixo angalungisa isitebe entlango na?" 
Psalms78:20 Kangela, wabeta ilityekazi, aza ampompoza amanzi, yati imisinga yakukula; anganika nesonka na? angabekela abantu bake inyama na?" 
Psalms78:21 Wati ngoko uyehova weva, waqumba: waza umlilo wapenjelwa ngakuye u‐Yakobi, nomsindo wavuka ngaku‐Sirayeli," 
Psalms78:22 ngokokuba bengakolwanga kutixo, nokuba bengatembanga ekusindiseni kwake;" 
Psalms78:23 nangona wayalela amafu pezulu, wavula ingcango zezulu," 
Psalms78:24 wanisa imana pezu kwabo badle, wabanika inqolowa yezulu." 
Psalms78:25 Badla abanye ngabanye ukutya kwabazinkosi; wabatumela ukutya kwada kwahlutiswa. 
Psalms78:26 Wapumisela ezulwini umoya wasempumalanga, wazisa ngamandla ake umoya wasesuyide." 
Psalms78:27 Wanisa nenyama pezu kwabo njengotuli, nentaka ezinamapiko njengentlabati yolwandle;" 
Psalms78:28 wayiwisa pakati kwomnquba wabo, ngento engqongayo intente zabo." 
Psalms78:29 Baza badla, bahluta kanye; ngokuba wabanika inkanuko yabo." 
Psalms78:30 Bebengekahlukani nenkanuko yabo, ukutya kwabo bekusesemlonyeni wabo," 
Psalms78:31 nxa umsindo katixo wavuka ngakubo, wabulala pakati kwabatyebileyo babo, wawisa pantsi abanyuliweyo bakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms78:32 Kanti bamana ukwona noko; abakolwanga nayimimangaliso yake. 
Psalms78:33 Ngako wapelisa imihla yabo kokungendawo, neminyaka yabo ekutusweni." 
Psalms78:34 Bati akubabulala, bandula ukumfuna; babuya babuza utixo ngokukuteleyo." 
Psalms78:35 Bakumbula ukuba utixo ulilityekazi labo, nokuba utixo opezu kwonke ungumkululi wabo." 
Psalms78:36 Bamhanahanisa ngomlomo wabo noko, bamxokisa ngelwimi zabo." 
Psalms78:37 Ngokuba intliziyo yabo ibingalunganga ngakuye, babengaqinanga nokuqina kulo ucebano lwake." 
Psalms78:38 Kodwa yena, enenceba nje, waxolela inkohlakalo yabo, aka ba tshabalalisa: kwa futi wabuyisa ingqumbo yake, engavusanga wonke umsindo wake kanjalo." 
Psalms78:39 Ngokuba ebekumbula ukuba bayinyama; umoya omkayo, ungabuyi uze." 
Psalms78:40 Bekufuti kangakanana bamvukelayo entlango, bamcapukisa ebugxwayibeni!" 
Psalms78:41 Ewe, babuya balinga utixo; bammisela oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli umda." 
Psalms78:42 Abakumbula isandla sake, umhla okuya wabakululayo elutshabeni:" 
Psalms78:43 okuya wamisa imiqondiso yake e‐Jipete, nemimangaliso yake ezindle zase‐Tsohane," 
Psalms78:44 waguqula imilambo yabo ibe ligazi, nezelo zabo, bada bakohlwa kusela." 
Psalms78:45 Watuma izibau pakati kwabo, ezazibadla; namasele, abebatshabalalisa." 
Psalms78:46 Wanika ukucu̔ma kwabo kuṙuxeshe, nenzuzo yabo kwinkumbi." 
Psalms78:47 Wabulala imiti yeveyine yabo ngesico̔to, nemikiwane yabo ngengqele." 
Psalms78:48 Wanikela esico̔tweni inkomo zabo, nemihlambi yabo emibaneni." 
Psalms78:49 Waposa pezu kwabo ubushushu bengqumbo yake, umsindo, nobuṙala, nobunzima, ngokutuma izitunywa zobubi." 
Psalms78:50 Walungisela ingqumbo yake indlela; akabamba umpefumlo wabo ekufeni, wanikela embujisweni ubomi babo." 
Psalms78:51 Wabeta bonke abamazibulo e‐Jipete, abakuqala kwamandla ezintenteni zakwa‐Hame." 
Psalms78:52 Kodwa abantu bake wabapumisela njengegusha, wabakokela entlango njengomhlambi." 
Psalms78:53 Wabakapa ngokugcinekayo, bengoyikanga; kanti intshaba zabo ulwandle lwazigubungela." 
Psalms78:54 Wabazisa emdeni wake oyingcwele, kulentaba e yabizuzwa sisandla sake sokunene." 
Psalms78:55 Waza wagxota abaheyideni pambi kwabo, wababela ilifa ngentambo, wahlalisa izizwe zo‐Sirayeli ezintenteni zazo." 
Psalms78:56 Kanti balinga bavukela utixo opezu kwonke, bengagcinanga izinqi̔nelo zake;" 
Psalms78:57 bahlehla, benza ngobuxoki njengoyise babo: bajikajika njengesipeta esikohlisayo." 
Psalms78:58 Bamqumbisa ngendawo zabo ezipakamileyo, bamvusela ikwele ngemifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo." 
Psalms78:59 Wati utixo akuva, waqumba, wadela o‐Sirayeli kakulu;" 
Psalms78:60 wada walahla itabanakele yase‐Shilo, intente wabeyimisa pakati kwabantu;" 
Psalms78:61 wanika amandla ake ekutinjweni, nobungcwalisa bake esandleni sotshaba." 
Psalms78:62 Wabanikela esiṙeleni abantu bake, waqumbela ilifa lake." 
Psalms78:63 Umlilo wadla amadodana abo; nentombi zabo bezingadunyiswa emitshatweni. 
Psalms78:64 Abaperisite babo bawa ngesiṙele; nabahlolokazi babo bebengalili. 
Psalms78:65 Yaza inkosi yavuka njengobelele ubutongo, njengeṙoti elidandulukayo ngenxa yeveyine." 
Psalms78:66 Yabetela ngomva intshaba zayo; yazenza isigxekwa esingunapakade. 
Psalms78:67 Kanjako yala intente ka‐Josefe; nesizwe sika‐Frayime ayasiqasha; 
Psalms78:68 yaqasha isizwe sika‐Juda, intaba ye‐Ziyone eyayitandayo." 
Psalms78:69 Yaka indawo yayo eyingcwele njengendawo ezinde, njengomhlaba iwusekeleyo kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms78:70 Yaqasha no‐Davide isicaka sayo, yamsusa ezibayeni zegusha;" 
Psalms78:71 yamvelisa ekulandeleni igushakazi ezanyisayo, aze apate o‐Yakobi abantu bayo, no‐Sirayeli ilifa layo." 
Psalms78:72 Waza wabapata ngobunene bentliziyo yake, wabakapa ngobulumko bezandla zake." 
Psalms79:1 TIXO! abaheyideni bangene elifeni lako; itempile yako eyingcwele bayinco̔lisile; benze i‐Yerusaleme ibe zimfumba. 
Psalms79:2 Izidumbu zezicaka zako bazinikile zibe kukudla kwintaka zezulu, inyama yabangcwele bako kwizilo zomhlaba." 
Psalms79:3 Igazi labo balipalazile njengamanzi ngento engqongayo i‐Yerusaleme, kungabangako oncw̔abayo." 
Psalms79:4 Sesisisigxekwa tina kubo abamelwane betu, isihlekwa nesigculelwa kubo abasingqongayo." 
Psalms79:5 Kude kube ninina, Yehova? uya kuqumba kude kube ngunapakade na? ubukwele bako buya kutsha njengomlilo na?" 
Psalms79:6 Galela umsindo wako pezu kwabaheyideni abangakwazanga, napezu kwobukumkani obungabizanga egameni lako:" 
Psalms79:7 ngokuba bemdlile u‐Yakobi, nekaya lake belicitakalisile." 
Psalms79:8 Zungakumbuli ngakuti inkohlakalo zangapambili; inceba zako mazisipangele kamsinya; ngokuba sitotyelwe pantsi kakulu. 
Psalms79:9 Sincede, Tixo wosindiswa lwetu! ngenxa yobungcwalisa begama lako: uze usikulule, uxolele izono zetu, ngenxa yegama lako." 
Psalms79:10 Kunganina ukuba abaheyideni bati: Utixo wabo upina? Makwaziwe pakati kwabaheyideni emehlweni etu ukupindezelelwa kwegazi lezicaka zako elipalaziweyo. 
Psalms79:11 Ukugula kwombanjwa makuze ebusweni bako: njengokwobukulu bamandla ako balondoloze abo bamiselwe ukufa; 
Psalms79:12 ubuyisele kubamelwane betu kasixe̔nxe esifubeni sabo isigxeko sabo, eso bakugxekile ngaso, Nkosi!" 
Psalms79:13 Kukona tina bantu bako nezimvu zesidlelo sako siya kubulela kuwe kude kube ngunapakade: soshumayela udumo lwako kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana. 
Psalms80:1 NIKA indlebe, Malusi wo‐Sirayeli! wena ukokelayo o‐Josefe njengegusha; wena uhleliyo pakati kwekerubime, kazimla." 
Psalms80:2 Pambi kwo‐Frayime no‐Benjamine no‐Manase vusa amandla ako, uze kusisindisa." 
Psalms80:3 Sibuyise, Tixo! ukanyise ubuso bako; kukona siya kusindiswa." 
Psalms80:4 Yehova, Tixo wemikosi! uya kuqumba kude kube ninina ngakuwo umtandazo wabantu bako?" 
Psalms80:5 Uyabadlisa isonka senyembezi; uyabaseza inyembezi ngobuninzi. 
Psalms80:6 Uyasenza impikisano kubo abamelwane betu; intshaba zetu ziyahleka pakati kwazo. 
Psalms80:7 Sibuyise, Tixo wemikosi! ukanyise ubuso bako; kukona siya kusindiswa." 
Psalms80:8 Wabufudusa umti weveyine e‐Jipete; wagxota abaheyideni, wawutyala:" 
Psalms80:9 walungiselela pambi kwawo, wawendelisa ingcambo zawo, wada wazalisa umhlaba." 
Psalms80:10 Intaba zagujungelwa ngomtunzi wawo, nesedare zikatixo ngamasebe awo." 
Psalms80:11 Wanabisa amagatya awo kwada kwaselwandle, namahlumelo awo kwada kwasemlanjeni." 
Psalms80:12 Kunganina ukuba uzicitile intango zawo, bade bawuke bonke abadlula ngendlela?" 
Psalms80:13 Ingulube yasehlatini iyawubuqa, nesilo sasendle siyawudla." 
Psalms80:14 Tixo wemikosi! mauke ubuye; kangela pantsi ezulwini, ubone, unonelele lomti weveyine;" 
Psalms80:15 nesityalo esasityalwa sisandla sako sokunene, nesebe wabuzomelezela lona." 
Psalms80:16 Utshisiwe ngomlilo, ugauliwe: bayatshabalala ngokutetisa kwobuso bako." 
Psalms80:17 Isandla sako masibe pezu kwendoda yesokunene sako, pezu kwonyana woluntu wabuzomelezela yena." 
Psalms80:18 Kukona singayi kuhlehla kuwe: sipilise, sasiya kubiza egameni lako." 
Psalms80:19 Sibuyise, Yehova, Tixo wemikosi! kanyisa ubuso bako; kukona siya kusindiswa."
