Psalms81:1 GCOBANI kutixo amandla etu: dandulukani ngovuyo kutixo ka‐Yakobi. 
Psalms81:2 Pakamisani ngeculo, betani intambula, ikinore emnandi kunye nenebele." 
Psalms81:3 Vutelani ngexilongo ekutwaseni kwenyanga; na sekuhlangananeni kwayo, ngemini yomtendeleko wetu." 
Psalms81:4 Ngokuba lo ungummiso ku‐Sirayeli, isiko lotixo ka‐Yakobi." 
Psalms81:5 Wawumisela kwa‐Josefe ube sisinqi̔nelo, okuya wapumela pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete; apo ndeva inteto endingayiqondanga." 
Psalms81:6 Ndasusa igxalaba lake emtwalweni; zemka izandla zake ezimbizeni. 
Psalms81:7 Wakala ebunzimeni, ndakukulula ke; ndakupendula emfihlelweni yodudumo; ndakulinga ngasemanzini e‐Meriba. Sela." 
Psalms81:8 Yivani, bantu bam! ndoninqi̔nela: Sirayeli! ukuba uya kundipulapula" 
Psalms81:9 akuyi kubako tixo wasemzini kuwe; kanjalo wena akuyi kutoba pambi kwotixo ongaziwayo. 
Psalms81:10 Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wako, obekunyusa ezweni le‐Jipete; yakamisa umlomo wako, ndowuzalisa." 
Psalms81:11 Kuloko abantu bam bengevanga ilizwi lam; u‐Sirayeli akandivumanga. 
Psalms81:12 Ndaza ndabayekelela ebulukunini bentliziyo zabo; bahamba ngawabo amacebo. 
Psalms81:13 Akwaba abantu bam babendipulapula, wati u‐Sirayeli wahamba ngezam indlela!" 
Psalms81:14 Ngendiba nditobisile intshaba zabo kamsinyane, ndabuyisela pezu kwabayimpi kubo isandla sam." 
Psalms81:15 Abo batiya uyehova ngebese bezenzisile kuye: kanti elabo ixesha beliya kubako kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms81:16 Ebeya kubadlisa kwinqolowa etyebileyo; nangobusi buvela eweni bendiya kukukolisa. 
Psalms82:1 UTIXO umi entlanganisweni katixo; uyagweba pakati kwabo otixo. 
Psalms82:2 Kwoba kade kangakananina niya kugweba ngobumenemene, nobuso babakohlakeleyo nibubuke? Sela." 
Psalms82:3 Lungisani ihlwempu nenkedama; gwebelani obandezelweyo nosweleyo. 
Psalms82:4 Kululani ihlwempu nosweleyo; ba hlanguleni esandleni sabakohlakeleyo. 
Psalms82:5 Abazi, kanjalo abayi kuqonda; bayahamba ebumnyameni: zonke izisekelo zomhlaba ziyazamazama." 
Psalms82:6 Ndite: Ningotixo; nonke nilusapo lwopezu kwonke. 
Psalms82:7 Kodwa niya kufa njengabantu; nowa njengenye yasezinkosini. 
Psalms82:8 Vuka, Tixo! gweba umhlaba; ngokuba wena ufuya zonke izizwe." 
Psalms83:1 TIXO! zungabi nakupumla: zungati cwaka, zungati tu, Tixo!" 
Psalms83:2 Ngokuba, kangela, intshaba zako zisenza impitimpiti; nabakutiyayo bepakamisile intloko." 
Psalms83:3 Bacebisene ngobuqinga ngakubo abantu bako, baqingene ngakubo abafihliweyo bako." 
Psalms83:4 Bate: Yizani sibati shwaqe bangabi sisizwe; lize igama lo‐Sirayeli lingabi sakunjulwa. 
Psalms83:5 Ngokuba becebisene ngentliziyo nye; benzile ucebano ngakuwe: 
Psalms83:6 intente zase‐Edome, nama‐Shimayeli; ama‐Mowabi, nama‐Hagare;" 
Psalms83:7 aba‐Gebale, naba‐Hamoni, nama‐Amaleki; ama‐Filistiya, kunye nabemi base‐Tire:" 
Psalms83:8 ama‐Asiriya nawo azibandakanyile nabo; aba yingalo kulo usapo luka‐Lote. Sela. 
Psalms83:9 Yenza kubo njengokwama‐Midiyane; njengokuka‐Sisera, njengokuka‐Yabine, emlanjeni we‐Kishone:" 
Psalms83:10 a babujiswa e‐Hene‐dore, baba njengomgquba womhlaba." 
Psalms83:11 Yenza inkosi zabo njengo‐Worebe nanjengo‐Zibe; nazo zonke inkosana zabo njengo‐Zeba nanjengo‐Tsalemuna; 
Psalms83:12 abati: Masizibambe izindlu zikatixo zibe zezetu. 
Psalms83:13 Tixo! benze babe njengentenda: njengomququ pambi kwomoya. 
Psalms83:14 Njengokuba umlilo utshisa ihlati, nanjengokuba ilangatye livutisa intaba," 
Psalms83:15 kwa njalo bazingele ngoqwitela lwako, ubatuse ngesaqwiti sako." 
Psalms83:16 Zalisa ubuso babo ngedano; ize bafune igama lako, Yehova!" 
Psalms83:17 Mabadaniswe batuswe kude kube ngunapakade; ewe, mabaviswe ihlazo, batshabalale:" 
Psalms83:18 kuze kwaziwe ukuba wena, onegama eli nguyehova wedwa, ungopezu kwonke pezu kwomhlaba wonke." 
Psalms84:1 HAI ukutandeka kwetabanakele zako, Yehova wemikosi!" 
Psalms84:2 Umpefumlo wam uyalangazelela, ewe, uyapelela nokupelela amakusi kayehova; intliziyo yam nenyama yam zimana zililela kutixo ohleliyo." 
Psalms84:3 Kwa ihobohobo lifumene indlu, nenkonjane izi fuman ele indawo, apo ibeka kona amatole ayo, — izibingelo zako, Yehova wemikosi, Kumkani wam notixo wam!" 
Psalms84:4 Hai itamsanqa labo bahleli endlwini yako! bomana bekudumisa. Sela. 
Psalms84:5 Hai itamsanqa lomntu omandla akuwe; nelabo indlela zisezintliziyweni zabo! 
Psalms84:6 Bedlula emhlanjeni we‐Baka nje bayawenza umtombo; imvula iyazalisa namacibi. 
Psalms84:7 Bayahamba kwamandla ngamandla, bade babonakale abanye ngabanye pambi kwotixo e‐Ziyone." 
Psalms84:8 Yehova, Tixo wemikosi! pulapula umtandazo wam; nika indlebe, Tixo ka‐Yakobi! Sela." 
Psalms84:9 Bona, Tixo, kaka letu! ukangele ubuso bomtanjiswa wako." 
Psalms84:10 Ngokuba imini nye emakusini ako igqitisa iwaka ngokulunga: nditanda ukulinda emnyango endlwini katixo wam, pezu kwokokuba ndihlale pakati ezintenteni zenkohlakalo." 
Psalms84:11 Ngokuba uyehova utixo elilanga nekaka; uyehova uya kupa ufefe nobungcwalisa; akayi kubavimba nto ilungileyo abo bahamba ngokulungisayo. 
Psalms84:12 Yehova wemikosi! hai itamsanqa lomntu otembela kuwe. 
Psalms85:1 YEHOVA! ulibukile ilizwe lako; ubuyisile ukutinjwa kuka‐Yakobi. 
Psalms85:2 Uxolele inkohlakalo yabantu bako; uselele sonke isono sabo. Sela. 
Psalms85:3 Ususile wonke umsindo wako; uguqukile ebushushwini bengqumbo yako. 
Psalms85:4 Sibuyise, Tixo wosindiswa lwetu! upelise ingqumbo yako ngakuti." 
Psalms85:5 Uya kusiqumbela kude kube ngunapakade na? uya kwolulisa ingqumbo yako kude kube kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana na? 
Psalms85:6 Akuyi kubuya usipilise na, baze abantu bako bavuye ngawe?" 
Psalms85:7 Sibonise ububele bako, Yehova! usipe usindiso lwako." 
Psalms85:8 Ndova into aya kuyiteta utixo uyehova: ngokuba eya kuteta uxolo ebantwini bake, nasebangcweleni bake; kodwa mabangabuyeli ebudengeni." 
Psalms85:9 Ngenyaniso usindiso lwake lukufupi nabamoyikayo; buze ubungcwalisa buhlale ezweni letu. 
Psalms85:10 Kuhlangene ububele nenyaniso, kwangene ubulungisa noxolo." 
Psalms85:11 Inyaniso iya kuhluma emhlabeni; buti ubulungisa bukangele pantsi kwa sezulwini. 
Psalms85:12 Ewe, uyehova uya kupa oko kulungileyo; nomhlaba wetu uya kunikela ukucu̔ma kwawo." 
Psalms85:13 Ubulungisa buya kuhamba pambi kwake, bu si beke endleleni yomkondo wake." 
Psalms86:1 TOBA indlebe yako, Yehova! undive; ngokuba ndilihlwempu, ndingosweleyo mna." 
Psalms86:2 Gcina umpefumlo wam; ngokuba ndiyingcwele: Tixo wam! sindisa isicaka sako esitembela kuwe. 
Psalms86:3 Yiba nofefe kum, Nkosi! ngokuba ndibizela kuwe imini yonke." 
Psalms86:4 Vuyisa umpefumlo wesicaka sako; ngokuba ndifunqulela kuwe umpefumlo wam. 
Psalms86:5 Ngokuba wena, Nkosi! ulungile, unokuxolela; unobubele obuninzi kubo bonke ababizela kuwe." 
Psalms86:6 Yehova! nika indlebe emtandazweni wam; upulapule ilizwi lezikungo zam. 
Psalms86:7 Ngemini yobunzima bam ndobizela kuwe: ngokuba uya kundipendula. 
Psalms86:8 Pakati kwotixo akuko onjengawe, Nkosi! akuko nefana nemisebenzi yako." 
Psalms86:9 Zonke izizwe ozenzileyo zoza zibedeshe pambi kwako, Nkosi! zidumise igama lako." 
Psalms86:10 Ngokuba wena umkulu, uyenza imimangaliso; ungutixo wedwa." 
Psalms86:11 Ndifundise indlela yako, Yehova! ndiya kuhamba enyanisweni yako: yenza nye intliziyo yam ukwoyika igama lako." 
Psalms86:12 Ndobulela kuwe, Nkosi, Tixo wam! ngentliziyo yam yonke; ndiya kudumisa igama lako kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms86:13 Ngokuba ububele bako bukulu ngakum; uwuhlangule umpefumlo wam ehadesi engapantsi kanye. 
Psalms86:14 Tixo! abaner̔atshi basukele ngakum, nentlanganiso yababandezeli ifunile umpefumlo wam: abakubekanga pambi kwabo." 
Psalms86:15 Kodwa wena, Nkosi! ungutixo onenceba nofefe, uqumba kade, unobuninzi bobubele nenyaniso." 
Psalms86:16 Beka kum, undipate ngofefe: nika isicaka sako amandla ako, usindise unyana wesicakakazi sako." 
Psalms86:17 Maundenzele umqondiso wokulungileyo, baze abo banditiyayo babone, badane; ngokuba wena, Yehova! undincedile, wandonwabisa." 
Psalms87:1 UKUSEKA kwake kusezintabeni ezingcwele. 
Psalms87:2 Uyehova uyatanda amasango e‐Ziyone ngapezu kwazo zonke intente zakwa‐Yakobi. 
Psalms87:3 Kuyatetwa into zobungcwalisa ngawe, wena sixeko sikatixo. Sela." 
Psalms87:4 Ndiya kukankanya i‐Rahabi ne‐Babilone kwabandaziyo: kangela i‐Filistiya, ne‐Tire, ne‐Kushe; lo mntu wazalelwa kona." 
Psalms87:5 Nangayo i‐Ziyone kuya kutiwa: Lomntu nalowo babezalelwe kuyo: waye opezu kwonke eya kuyiqinisa ngokwake. 
Psalms87:6 Uyehova uya kubala, akuba̔la abantu, ngokuti: Lo mntu wazalelwa kona. Sela." 
Psalms87:7 Kwobako kwa nabavumi nabaculisi, besiti: Yonke imitombo yam ikuwe." 
Psalms88:1 YEHOVA, Tixo wosindiswa lwam! emini na sebusuku ndiyakala pambi kwako." 
Psalms88:2 Umtandazo wam mauze ebusweni bako: toba indlebe yako ngasekulileni kwam: 
Psalms88:3 ngokuba umpefumlo wam uzele zintsizi, nobomi bam busondele ehadesi." 
Psalms88:4 Ndiyabalwa ndawonye nabo behlela esihogweni; ndinjengendoda engenamandla: 
Psalms88:5 ndikululekile pakati kwabafileyo, njengababuleweyo abalele encw̔abeni, ongasabakumbuli wena; abanqanyulwe bona esandleni sako." 
Psalms88:6 Undibekile esihogweni esingapantsi kanye, ezindaweni ezimnyama, ezinzulwini." 
Psalms88:7 Umsindo wako unzima pezu kwam; u ndi bandezele ngawo onke amaza ako. Sela. 
Psalms88:8 Abo bazana nam ubakwelelisile kude kum; undenzile into etiyekileyo kubo: ndivalelwe, ndingenakupuma." 
Psalms88:9 Iliso lam liyapela ngenxa yembandezelo; ndibizele kuwe, Yehova! ngemihla yonke; ndolule izandla zam ngakuwe." 
Psalms88:10 Uya kwenza imimangaliso kwabafileyo na? abafileyo bovuka bakudumise na? Sela. 
Psalms88:11 Ububele bako buya kushunyayelwa encw̔abeni na? nenyaniseko yako ekutshabalaleni na? 
Psalms88:12 Imimangaliso yako iya kwaziwa ebumnyameni na? nobulungisa bako ezweni lokulibala na? 
Psalms88:13 Kodwa ndiyakala kuwe, Yehova! nakusasa umtandazo wam wokupangela." 
Psalms88:14 Yehova! yinina ukuba ulahle umpefumlo wam? yinina ukuba undifihlele ubuso bako? 
Psalms88:15 Ndingobandezelweyo nohlalel’ ukuqauka kwa sebutsheni bam: nditwele izituso zako ndide ndimatiswe. 
Psalms88:16 Imisindo yako idlule pezu kwam; izoyikiso zako zindinqamlile. 
Psalms88:17 Zandingqonga njengamanzi imihla yonke; zandiṙaula kunye. 
Psalms88:18 Umtandi nomhlobo ubakwelelisile kude kum; abazane bam basebumnyameni. 
Psalms89:1 NDOVUMA ngazo izibele zikayehova kude kube ngunapakade: ngomlomo wam ndiya kwazisa inyaniseko yako kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana. 
Psalms89:2 Ngokuba ndite: Ububele buya kwakiwa kude kube ngunapakade; inyaniseko yako uya kuyiqinisa kwa kuwo amazulu. 
Psalms89:3 Ndenzile ucebano nomqashwa wam, ndifungile ku‐Davide isicaka sam:" 
Psalms89:4 Inzalo yako ndoyimisa kude kube ngunapakade, ndake iterone yako kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana. Sela." 
Psalms89:5 Ewe, amazulu aya kudumisa imimangaliso yako, Yehova! inyaniseko yako nayo entlanganisweni yabazingcwele." 
Psalms89:6 Ngokuba ngubanina ezulwini ongalinganiswa noyehova? ngubanina pakati kwonyana babakulu ofana noyehova? 
Psalms89:7 Utixo ulungel’ ukwoyikwa kakulu esihlelweni sabazingcwele; woyikekile pezu kwabo bonke abamngqongayo. 
Psalms89:8 Yehova, Tixo wemikosi! ngubanina o nguyehova onamandla njengawe? kanjalo inyaniseko yako iyakungqonga." 
Psalms89:9 Upete ngobukosi ir̔atshi lolwandle; nxa apakamayo amaza alo uyawati tu. 
Psalms89:10 Utyumzile i‐Rahabi njengohlatyiweyo; uzicitile intshaba zako ngengalo yako enamandla. 
Psalms89:11 Amazulu ngawako, umhlaba nawo ngowako; ilizwe, nokuzala kwalo, uzisekele wena." 
Psalms89:12 Inode nesuyide uzidalile; i‐Tabore ne‐Heremone ziya kugcoba ngegama lako. 
Psalms89:13 Unengalo enokwomelela; sinamandla isandla sako, sipakamile esokunene sako." 
Psalms89:14 Ubulungisa nobugwebo bungumsekelo weterone yako; kwohamba ububele nenyaniso pambi kwobuso bako. 
Psalms89:15 Hai itamsanqa labantu abayaziyo intlokoma yovuyo; bohamba ekukanyeni kwobuso bako, Yehova!" 
Psalms89:16 Ngegama lako bovuyelela imini yonke; nangobulungisa bako baya kupakanyiswa. 
Psalms89:17 Ngokuba wena ububungcwalisa bamandla abo; nangembuko yako upondo lwetu luya kupakanyiswa. 
Psalms89:18 Ngokuba ikaka letu le likayehova; nokumkani wetu ngowoyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli. 
Psalms89:19 Oko wabuteta embonisweni ngoyingcwele yako, wati: Ndibekile uncedo pezu kwonamandla; ndipakamisile oqashiweyo ebantwini." 
Psalms89:20 Ndimfumene u‐Davide isicaka sam; ndimtambisile ngeoli yam engcwele: 
Psalms89:21 esiya kuti isandla sam sibe naye ngokuqinileyo: ewe, ingalo yam iya kumomeleza." 
Psalms89:22 Utshaba aluyi kumfundekela, nonyana wenkohlakalo akayi kumbandezela." 
Psalms89:23 Ndandiya kucita ebusweni bake abo bayimpi kuye; nabo bamtiyayo ndobabeta. 
Psalms89:24 Kodwa kwobako naye inyaniseko yam nobubele bam; nangegama lam upondo lwake luya kupakanyiswa. 
Psalms89:25 Ndandiya kubeka isandla sake elwandle, nesokunene sake emilanjeni." 
Psalms89:26 Yena uya kubiza kum ngokuti: Ungubawo wam wena, utixo wam, nelityekazi losindiswa lwam." 
Psalms89:27 Nam ndiya kumenza owamazibulo, opezulu kubo okumkani bomhlaba." 
Psalms89:28 Ububele bam ndiya kumgcinela bona kude kube ngunapakade; nocebano lwam lwohlala luqinile kuye. 
Psalms89:29 Kanjalo ndiya kumisa inzalo yake kude kube ngunapakade, neterone yake njengemihla yezulu." 
Psalms89:30 Xeshekweni abantwana bake bawushiyayo umteto wam, bangahambi ezigwetyweni zam;" 
Psalms89:31 xeshekweni batshitshisa izimiselo zam, bangagcini imiyalelo yam;" 
Psalms89:32 ndiya kwandula ndohlwaye izigqito zabo ngentonga, nenkohlakalo yabo ngemivimbo." 
Psalms89:33 Kodwa ububele bam andiyi kubuhluta kuye; nenyaniseko yam andiyi kuyenza ixoke. 
Psalms89:34 Andiyi kutshitshisa ucebano lwam; nento epumileyo emlonyeni wam andiyi kuyiguqula. 
Psalms89:35 Ndifungile kwa kanye ubungcwele bam, ukuba andiyi kuxokisa u‐Davide." 
Psalms89:36 Inzalo yake yobako kude kube ngunapakade, neterone yake njengelanga pambi kwam." 
Psalms89:37 Iya kuqiniswa kude kube ngunapakade njengenyanga, na njeng enqi̔na elinyanisekileyo ezulwini. Sela." 
Psalms89:38 Kodwa wena ulahlile, wadela; ubuqumbele umtanjiswa wako." 
Psalms89:39 Ulutiyile ucebano lwesicaka sako; unco̔lisile isitsaba saso kude kube semhlabeni. 
Psalms89:40 Uzicitile zonke intango zaso; inqaba zaso uzenzile intshabalalo. 
Psalms89:41 Bonke abadlula ngendlela bayasipanga; sisisigxekwa kubo abamelwane baso. 
Psalms89:42 Upakamisile isandla sokunene sabayimpi kuso; uzivuyisile zonke intshaba zaso. 
Psalms89:43 Ewe, utuntuzile uhlangoti lweṙele laso; akusimisanga ekulweni." 
Psalms89:44 Upelisile inkazimlo yaso; neterone yaso uyiwisele emhlabeni. 
Psalms89:45 Imihla yobutsha baso uyincipisile; usigubungele ngedano. Sela. 
Psalms89:46 Kude kube ninina, Yehova? uya kuzifihla kude kube ngunapakade na? umsindo wako uya kutsha njengomlilo na?" 
Psalms89:47 Kumbula ixesha lam ukuba lingakananina! Kunganina ukuba ufumane wenza bonke abantu? 
Psalms89:48 Nguwupina umntu ohleliyo ongayi kubona ukufa? uya kusindisa umpefumlo wake esandleni sencw̔aba na? Sela. 
Psalms89:49 Nkosi! zipina izibele zako zangapambili, owabuzifungela u‐Davide enyanisekweni yako?" 
Psalms89:50 Kumbula, Nkosi! ukutukwa kwezicaka zako; ukuba ndikutwele esifubeni sam konke ukutuka kwabantu abaninzi;" 
Psalms89:51 oko intshaba zako zitukile ngako, Yehova! oko zitukile ngako imikondo yomtanjiswa wako." 
Psalms89:52 Makabongwe uyehova kude kube ngunapakade. Amene, ewe Amene." 
Psalms90:1 NKOSI! ubulikaya letu ngesizukulwana ngesizukulwana. 
Psalms90:2 Okuya bezingekazalwa intaba, nxa ubungadalanga umhlaba nelizwe, kwa kunapakade kude kube ngunapakade, wena ungutixo." 
Psalms90:3 Uyamguqulela entshabalalweni umntu; uti: Buyelani, bonyana babantu!" 
Psalms90:4 Ngokuba ebusweni bako iwaka leminyaka injengemini yezolo nxa igqitileyo, na njeng evaṙasho ebusuku." 
Psalms90:5 Uyabakukulisa; ba njeng obutongo: ngokusa banjengenca ebuyayo. 
Psalms90:6 Ngokusa iyahluma, ibuye; ngokuhlwa iyasikwa, ibune." 
Psalms90:7 Ngokuba sigqitywa ngengqumbo yako, situswa nangomsindo wako." 
Psalms90:8 Izikohlakalo zetu uzibekile pambi kwako; izono zetu ezifihlakeleyo uzibekile ekukanyeni kwobuso bako. 
Psalms90:9 Ngokuba yonke imihla yetu idlula emsindweni wako; siyagqiba iminyaka yetu njengesicamango. 
Psalms90:10 Imihla yeminyaka yetu yiminyaka emashumi asixe̔nxe; nanxa iti ngenxa yokwomelela ibe yiminyaka emashumi asibozo, amandla ayo abubunzima nobubi noko; ngokuba inqanyulwa kamsinya, size sibaleke." 
Psalms90:11 Ngubanina owazi amandla engqumbo yako, nanjengokwoyikeka kwako umsindo wako?" 
Psalms90:12 Sazise sibale imihla yetu, ngendawo yokuba sizuze intliziyo yobulumko." 
Psalms90:13 Buya, Yehova! kwoba kade kangakananina? uze ube nosizi pezu kwezicaka zako." 
Psalms90:14 Sikolise kusasa ngobubele bako, ize sigcobe sivuye yonke imihla yetu." 
Psalms90:15 Sivuyise njengokwemihla wabusibandezela ngayo, njengokw eminyaka sabesibona ububi ngayo." 
Psalms90:16 Makubonakale izenzo zako ezicakeni zako, nobungcwalisa bako kubantwana bazo." 
Psalms90:17 Mabuti ubuhle bukayehova, utixo wetu, bube pezu kwetu: nomsebenzi wezandla zetu uwuqinise pezu kwetu; ewe, umsebenzi wezandla zetu uwuqinise." 
Psalms91:1 OMIYO emfihlelweni yopezu kwonke, uya kuhlala emtunzini wonamandla onke." 
Psalms91:2 Sendiya kuti ngoyehova: Yindawo yam yokupepela, nenqaba yam; ngutixo wam; ndiya kutembela kuye." 
Psalms91:3 Ngenyaniso wokuhlangula esigwini somtiyeli wentaka, na sesifeni esibubisayo kakulu." 
Psalms91:4 Wokugubungela ngentsiba zake, nangapantsi kwamapiko ake uya kutemba: inyaniso yake ilikaka, nekakana." 
Psalms91:5 Akuyi kwoyika isituso sasebusuku, n otolo olubalekayo emini," 
Psalms91:6 n esifo esibu̔bisayo esihambayo ebumnyameni, nesitshabalaliso esitshabalalisayo emini enkulu." 
Psalms91:7 Kwowa iwaka ecaleni lako, neshumi lamawaka ngesokunene sako; kuloko kungayi kusondela kuwe." 
Psalms91:8 Uya kukangela kodwa ngamehlo ako, ubone ukuvuzwa kwabakohlakeleyo." 
Psalms91:9 Ngenxa yokuba uyehova, indawo yam yokupepela, lo upezu kwonke, umenzile ikaya lako," 
Psalms91:10 akuyi kuhlelwa bububi, nesibulalo asiyi kusondela endlwini yako." 
Psalms91:11 Ngokuba eya kuyalela ingelosi zake ngawe, ukuba zikugcine ezindleleni zako zonke." 
Psalms91:12 Zokufunqula ngezandla, hleze uku̔bekise unyawo lwako ngasetyeni." 
Psalms91:13 Uya kunyatela pezu kwengonyama neṙamba; ingonyama entsha nenamba uya kuzinyatela ngenyawo. 
Psalms91:14 Ngokuba enditandile kakulu, kukona ndiya kumkulula; ndiya kumbeka enyangweni, ngokuba elazile igama lam." 
Psalms91:15 Uya kubiza kum, ndimpendule ke; ndoba naye ebunzimeni; ndomkulula, ndimnike udumo." 
Psalms91:16 Ndiya kumkolisa ngobude bemihla, ndimbonise usindiso lwam." 
Psalms92:1 KULUNGILE ukubulela kuyehova, nokucula egameni lako, wena ungopezu kwonke!" 
Psalms92:2 ukushumayela ububele bako kusasa, nenyaniseko yako ebusuku," 
Psalms92:3 ngento ezintambo zilishumi, nangenebele, ngekinore ecingisayo." 
Psalms92:4 Ngokuba wena, Yehova! undivuyisile ngesenzo sako; ndiya kugcoba ngemisebenzi yezandla zako." 
Psalms92:5 Yehova! hai ubukulu bemisebenzi yako! inkumbulo zako zendele kakulu. 
Psalms92:6 Umntu odolileyo akazi; nosidenge akakuqondi oku. 
Psalms92:7 Nxa batyatyambayo abakohlakeleyo njengenca, na nxa bahlumayo bonke abenzi bobubi, kukuba baya kubu̔jiswa kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms92:8 Kodwa wena, Yehova! ungopezulu kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms92:9 Ngokuba, bona ke, intshaba zako, Yehova! ngokuba, bona ke, intshaba zako ziya kutshabalala; bonke abenzi bobubi baya kucitwa." 
Psalms92:10 Kodwa upondo lwam uya kulupakamisa njengolwenyati; ndiya kutanjiswa ngeoli entsha. 
Psalms92:11 Laye iliso lam liya kukangela pezu kwabandihlolayo; indlebe zam zova ngabo abakohlakeleyo abasukela ngakum. 
Psalms92:12 Olungileyo uya kutyatyamba njengomti wepalime; uya kukula njengesedare e‐Lebanone. 
Psalms92:13 Abatyalwayo endlwini kayehova, baya kutyatyamba emakusini katixo wetu." 
Psalms92:14 Boba besaxakata nasebudaleni; bocu̔ma babe luhlaza; 
Psalms92:15 kuze kushunyayelwe ukuba uyehova ulungile: ulilityekazi lam, okungeko bumenemene kuye." 
Psalms93:1 UYEHOVA upete ngobukumkani, wambete ubukulu; uyehova wambete amandla, uzibinqile ngawo: kanjalo ilizwe liqinisekile, alinakushukunyiswa." 
Psalms93:2 Iterone yako iqinisekile kwa kudala: ungunapakade wena. 
Psalms93:3 Imilambo ipakamisile, Yehova! imilambo ipakamisile ilizwi layo; imilambo iyapakamisa amaza ayo." 
Psalms93:4 Uyehova opezulu unamandla ngapezu kwokugquma kwamanzi amaninzi, napezu kwamaza olwandle anamandla." 
Psalms93:5 Izinqi̔nelo zako zinyanisekile kakulu: ubungcwele bufanelekile kwindlu yako, Yehova! kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms94:1 TIXO wempindezelo! Yehova, Tixo wempindezelo! kazimla." 
Psalms94:2 Zipakamise, Mgwebi womhlaba! buyekeza kwabaner̔atshi ngoku ba faneleyo." 
Psalms94:3 Kwoba kade kangakananina abakohlakeleyo, Yehova! kwoba kade kangakananina abakohlakeleyo bevuyelela?" 
Psalms94:4 Kwoba kade kangakananina bepimisela beteta ngokulukuni, beziqa̔yisela bonke abenzi bobubi?" 
Psalms94:5 Abantu bako, Yehova! bayabatyumza; nelifa lako bayalibandezela." 
Psalms94:6 Umhlolokazi nowasemzini bayababu̔bisa, nabazinkedama bayababulala." 
Psalms94:7 Bati noko: Uyehova akayi kubona, utixo ka‐Yakobi akayi kugqala." 
Psalms94:8 Qondani, nina badolileyo ebantwini; nani mageza! noda nilumke ninina?" 
Psalms94:9 Obetyala indlebe, akayi kuva na? obedala iliso, akayi kubona na?" 
Psalms94:10 Ozilulekayo izizwe, akayi kwohlwaya na? lowo ufundisa abantu ukwazi!" 
Psalms94:11 Uyehova uyawazi amaqinga abantu, ukuba akandawo wona." 
Psalms94:12 Hai itamsanqa lalomntu umlulekayo, Yehova! nomfundisayo ngomteto wako;" 
Psalms94:13 ukuze umnike ukupumla emihleni yobubi, nxa kumbelwa okohlakeleyo umnxuma!" 
Psalms94:14 Ngokuba uyehova engayi kulahla abantu bake, nelifa lake akayi kulishiya." 
Psalms94:15 Koko ugwebo luya kubuyela ebulungiseni; boti bonke abalungileyo ngentliziyo balulandele. 
Psalms94:16 Ngubanina oya kundipakamela ngakubo abenzayo okungalungileyo? ngubanina oya kundimela ngakubo abenzi benkohlakalo? 
Psalms94:17 Ukuba uyehova ebengeluncedo kum, umpefumlo wam unge uhle wahlala ekutini cwaka." 
Psalms94:18 Ndindakuti: Unyawo lwam luyatyibilika; ububele bako, Yehova! bandixasa." 
Psalms94:19 Ebuninzini bezicingo zam ngapakati kwam, izonwabiso zako ziyayolisa umpefumlo wam." 
Psalms94:20 Iterone yobumenemene iya kubandakanywa nawe na, idala ububi ngomteto nje?" 
Psalms94:21 Bayahlanganisana ngakuwo umpefumlo wolungileyo, bagwebe igazi elingenatyala." 
Psalms94:22 Kodwa uyehova uyinyango yam; notixo wam ulilityekazi lokupepela kwam. 
Psalms94:23 Waeya kubuyisela pezu kwabo inkohlakalo yabo, abanqamle besebubini babo: uyehova, utixo wetu, uya kubanqamla." 
Psalms95:1 YIZANI, masigcobe kuye uyehova; masenze intsholo yovuyo kwilityekazi losindiswa lwetu." 
Psalms95:2 Masize ebusweni bake ngokubulela; masenze intsholo yovuyo kuye ngamaculo. 
Psalms95:3 Ngokuba uyehova e ngutixo omkulu, nokumkani omkulu pezu kwabo bonke otixo." 
Psalms95:4 Indawo ezinzulu zomhlaba zisesandleni sake; indyebo zentaba zizezake nazo. 
Psalms95:5 Ulwandle lolwake, walwenza; n omhlaba owomileyo izandla zake zawudala." 
Psalms95:6 Yizani, masibedeshe sitobe pantsi; masiguqe ngamadolo ebusweni bukayehova owasenzayo." 
Psalms95:7 Ngokuba yena e ngutixo wetu; nati singabantu besidlelo sake nezimvu zesandla sake. Namhla nje ukuba niya kuliva ilizwi lake," 
Psalms95:8 maningazenzi lukuni intliziyo zenu, njengase‐Meriba, njengasemhleni wase‐Masa entlango;" 
Psalms95:9 okuya oyihlo benu bandilinga, bandivavanya, ewe babona umsebenzi wam." 
Psalms95:10 Bendidela isizukulwana eso iminyaka yamashumi mane; ndati: Ngabantu abantliziyo ilahlekayo, abazazanga indlela zam:" 
Psalms95:11 endafunga ngabo ngomsindo wam, ukuti: Abasayi kungena ekupumleni kwam." 
Psalms96:1 VUMANI Kuyehova iculo elitsha; vumani Kuyehova, mhlaba wonke!" 
Psalms96:2 Vumani Kuyehova, bongani igama lake; shumayelani usindiso lwake ngemihla ngemihla." 
Psalms96:3 Balisani ubungcwalisa bake pakati kwabaheyideni, imimangaliso yake pakati kwezizwe zonke." 
Psalms96:4 Ngokuba uyehova emkulu, ulungel’ ukudunyiswa kakulu; ulungel’ ukwoyikwa pezu kwotixo bonke." 
Psalms96:5 Ngokuba bonke otixo bezizwe bengamadalo; kanti uyehova walenza izulu. 
Psalms96:6 Ebusweni bake kuko udumo nobukulu; endaweni yake eyingcwele kuko amandla nenkazimlo. 
Psalms96:7 Nikelani kuyehova, zizukulwana zabantu! nikelani kuyehova ubungcwalisa namandla." 
Psalms96:8 Nikelani kuyehova ubungcwalisa begama lake; zisani umnikelo, ningene emakusini ake." 
Psalms96:9 Bedeshani uyehova ebuhleni bobungcwele; tutumelani pambi kwake, mhlaba wonke!" 
Psalms96:10 Yitini pakati kwabaheyideni: Uyehova upete ngobukumkani. Ilizwe nalo liya kuqiniswa, lize lingabi nakushukunyiswa: uya kugweba izizwe ngokufanelekileyo." 
Psalms96:11 Malivuye izulu, ugcobe umhlaba; malugqume ulwandle, nokuzala kwalo;" 
Psalms96:12 mazivuyelele izindle, nako konke okukuzo: oko iya kugcoba yonke imiti yehlati" 
Psalms96:13 ebusweni bukayehova; ngokuba esiza, — ngokuba esiza kugweba umhlaba: uya kugweba ilizwe ngobulungisa, nezizwe ngenyaniso yake." 
Psalms97:1 UYEHOVA upete ngobukumkani; maugcobe umhlaba; masivuye isininzi seziqiti. 
Psalms97:2 Amafu nesitokotoko ziyamngqonga; ubulungisa nobugwebo bungumsekelo weterone yake. 
Psalms97:3 Umlilo uyahamba pambi kwake, otshisa intshaba zake ngamacala onke." 
Psalms97:4 Imibane yake yakanyisa ilizwe; umhlaba wabona, wangcangcazela." 
Psalms97:5 Intaba zanyibilika njengomtwebeba ebusweni bukayehova, ebusweni benkosi yomhlaba wonke." 
Psalms97:6 Izulu liyaxela ubulungisa bake, nezizwe zonke ziyabona ubungcwalisa bake." 
Psalms97:7 Bodaniswa bonke abo bakonza umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, abaziqa̔yiselayo ngawo amadalo: bedeshani yena, nonke nina botixo!" 
Psalms97:8 I‐Ziyone yeva, yavuya; intombi zakwa‐Juda zagcoba, ngenxa yemigwebo yako, Yehova!" 
Psalms97:9 Ngokuba wena, Yehova! upezulu pezu kwomhlaba wonke; upakamile kakulu pezu kwabo bonke otixo." 
Psalms97:10 Nina nimtandayo uyehova! tiyani okungalungileyo: uyagcina imipefumlo yabangcwele bake; uyabakulula esandleni sabakohlakeleyo. 
Psalms97:11 Ukukanya kuhlwayelelwe olungileyo, novuyo luhlwayel elwe abantliziyo zilungisekile." 
Psalms97:12 Vuyani kuyehova, nina balungileyo! nibulele ngenkumbuzo yobungcwele bake." 
Psalms98:1 VUMANI kuyehova iculoelitsha; ngokuba wenzile imimangaliso: isandla sake sokunene, nengalo yake eyingcwele, zimenzele usindiso." 
Psalms98:2 Uyehova wazisile usindiso lwake; ubulungisa bake ubutyilile emehlweni abaheyideni. 
Psalms98:3 Ukumbule ububele bake nenyaniseko yake ngakuyo indlu yo‐Sirayeli: zonke incam zomhlaba zibonile usindiso lwotixo wetu. 
Psalms98:4 Dandulukani ngovuyo kuyehova, mhlaba wonke! gqabukani, nigcobe, nicule nokucula." 
Psalms98:5 Culani kuyehova ngekinore; ngekinore, nangelizwi leculo." 
Psalms98:6 Ngamaxilongo, nangelizwi lopondo, yenzani intsholo ebusweni bukayehova ukumkani." 
Psalms98:7 Ulwandle malugqume, nokuzala kwalo; ilizwe, nabahleli kulo." 
Psalms98:8 Imilambo mayenze intlombe; intaba mazigcobe kunye 
Psalms98:9 ebusweni bukayehova: ngokuba esiza kugweba umhlaba: uya kugweba ilizwe ngobulungisa, nezizwe ngokufanelekileyo." 
Psalms99:1 UYEHOVA upete ngobukumkani; izizwe mazingcangcazele: uhleli pakati kwekerubime; umhlaba maushukunyiswe. 
Psalms99:2 Uyehova umkulu e‐Ziyone; upezulu yena pezu kwezizwe zonke. 
Psalms99:3 Mazidumise igama lako elikulu neloyikekayo: uyingcwele yena: 
Psalms99:4 kwa namandla okumkani: uyatanda ubugwebo. Wena ukuqinisile okufanelekileyo; ubugwebo nobulungisa ubenzile wena kwa‐Yakobi. 
Psalms99:5 Pakamisani uyehova, utixo wetu, nibedeshe esitulweni senyawo zake: uyingcwele yena." 
Psalms99:6 U‐Mosesi no‐Arone pakati kwabaperisite bake, no‐Samyali pakati kwabo balibizayo igama lake, bebebiza kuyehova, wati yena wabapendula." 
Psalms99:7 Wateta nabo entsikeni yelifu: bagcina izinqi̔nelo zake, nommiso wabebanika wona." 
Psalms99:8 Yehova, Tixo wetu! wabapendula wena: wau ngutixo owabaxolelayo, nakuba ubupindezela ngenxa yezenzo zabo." 
Psalms99:9 Pakamisani uyehova, utixo wetu, nibedeshe entabeni yake eyingcwele: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wetu, eyingcwele." 
Psalms100:1 DANDULUKANI kuyehova, mhlaba wonke!" 
Psalms100:2 Konzani uyehova ngokuvuya, nize ebusweni bake ngokugcoba." 
Psalms100:3 Yazini ukuba uyehova ungutixo; nguye owasenzayo, asi siti tina; singabantu bake, nezimvu zesidlelo sake." 
Psalms100:4 Ngenani emasangweni ake ngombulelo, nas emakusini ake ngomdumiso: bulelani kuye, nibonge igama lake." 
Psalms100:5 Ngokuba elungile uyehova; ububele bake bungunapakade; nenyaniso yake yeyesizukulwana ngesizukulwana. 
Psalms101:1 NDOVUMA ngobubele nangobugwebo; kwa kuwe, Yehova! ndiya kucula." 
Psalms101:2 Ndowenza ngobulumko endleleni elungileyo. Woza ninina kum? Ndohamba ngobunene bentliziyo yam pakati kwendlu yam. 
Psalms101:3 Into yobunginingini andiyi kuyibeka pambi kwamehlo am: ukwenza kwabapambukayo ndiyakutiya; akuyi kunamatela kum. 
Psalms101:4 Intliziyo egwenxa iya kumka kum; okohlakeleyo andiyi kumazi. 
Psalms101:5 Ohleba ummelwane wake ngasese, oyena ndiya kumtshabalalisa; omehlo ar̔atshileyo nontliziyo ikukumeleyo, lowo andiyi kumvuma." 
Psalms101:6 Amehlo am oba pezu kwabanyanisekileyo belizwe, ukuze bahlale nam; ohamba endleleni elungileyo, nguye oya kundikonza." 
Psalms101:7 Owenza ngenkohliso akayi kuhlala pakati kwendlu yam; oteta ubuxoki akayi kuma pambi kwamehlo am. 
Psalms101:8 Kwa kusasa ndotshabalalisa bonke abakohlakeleyo belizwe; ndize ndinqamle bonke abenzi bokungalungileyo esixekweni sikayehova. 
Psalms102:1 YIVA umtandazo wam, Yehova! isikalo sam masize kuwe." 
Psalms102:2 Ungandifihleli ubuso bako: mhlana ndisebunzimeni, tobela kum indlebe yako; mhlana ndibizayo, zuhle undipendule." 
Psalms102:3 Ngokuba imihla yam ipela njengomsi; amatambo am atshile njengeziko. 
Psalms102:4 Intliziyo yam ibetiwe, yoma njengenca, ndada ndalibala ukudla isonka sam." 
Psalms102:5 Ngenxa yelizwi lokugula kwam, amatambo am ate nama enyameni yam." 
Psalms102:6 Ndinjengencwangube yentlango, ndinjengesikova sobugxwayiba." 
Psalms102:7 Ndiyalinda, ndinjengehobohobo elilodwa pezu kwendlu." 
Psalms102:8 Intshaba zam ziyandigxeka imini yonke; abo bandigezelayo bafungile ngakum. 
Psalms102:9 Ngokuba ndityile ututu njengesonka, nokusela kwam ndikupitikezile nokulila," 
Psalms102:10 ngenxa yengqumbo yako nomsindo wako: ngokuba undifunqule, wandikahlela pantsi." 
Psalms102:11 Intsuku zam zinjengesitunzi esolukayo; ndomile njengenca. 
Psalms102:12 Kodwa wena, Yehova! uya kuhlala kude kube ngunapakade, nenkumbuzo yako kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Psalms102:13 Uya kuvuka, ube nenceba pezu kwe‐Ziyone; ngokuba ixesha lokuyipata ngofefe, ewe, ixesha elimiselweyo, lifikile." 
Psalms102:14 Ngokuba izicaka zako zikolela amatye ayo, zikedamela utuli lwayo." 
Psalms102:15 Kukona abaheyideni baya kwoyika igama likayehova, nabo bonke okumkani bomhlaba ubungcwalisa bako." 
Psalms102:16 Nxa uyehova aya kwaka i‐Ziyone, uya kubonakala ebungcwaliseni bake." 
Psalms102:17 Wobeka emtandazweni wabahamba zé; akayi kudela umtandazo wabo. 
Psalms102:18 Oku kwoba̔lelwa isizukulwana sasemva, baze abantu abaza kudalwa badumise uyehova." 
Psalms102:19 Ngokuba ebekangele pantsi kwa senyangweni yake eyingcwele; kwa sezulwini uyehova wakangela umhlaba; 
Psalms102:20 ukupulapula ukugula kwombanjwa; ukukulula abo bamiselwe ukufa; 
Psalms102:21 ukushumayela igama likayehova e‐Ziyone, nodumo lwake e‐Yerusaleme;" 
Psalms102:22 nxa izizwe zihlanganisene ndawonye, nezikumkani, ukukonza uyehova." 
Psalms102:23 Wabulala amandla am endleleni; wancipisa imihla yam. 
Psalms102:24 Ndati: Tixo wam! zungandisusi ndisepakati kwemihla yam: iminyaka yako imi ngezizukulwana ngezizukulwana. 
Psalms102:25 Kwa kudala wabeka ukuseka kwomhlaba; nezulu lingumsebenzi wezandla zako. 
Psalms102:26 Zotshabalala zona, kodwa wena womana ubako: ewe, zonke ezo ziya kuguga njengengubo; uya kuziguqula njengesivato, zaziya kuguqulwa ke." 
Psalms102:27 Kanti wena ukwa nguwe; iminyaka yako ayisayi kupela. 
Psalms102:28 Abantwana bezicaka zako bohlala, nenzalo yazo yoqiniswa pambi kwako." 
Psalms103:1 MBONGE uyehova, mpefumlo wam! nako konke okupakati kwam, libonge igama lake eliyingcwele!" 
Psalms103:2 Mbonge uyehova, mpefumlo wam! ungalibali zonke izincedo zake:" 
Psalms103:3 oxolela zonke inkohlakalo zako; opilisa zonke izifo zako; 
Psalms103:4 okulula ubomi bako ekutshabalaleni; okupahlayo ngezibele nangenceba; 
Psalms103:5 okolisa umlomo wako ngokulungileyo; bude ubutsha bako buhlaziywe njengobokozi. 
Psalms103:6 Uyehova uyenzela bonke ababandezelweyo ubulungisa nobugwebo. 
Psalms103:7 Wazisa indlela zake ku‐Mosesi, n ezenzo zake elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms103:8 Uyehova unenceba nofefe; uqumba kade, enobubele obuninzi." 
Psalms103:9 Akayi kupika ngamaxesha onke; akayi kubamba ingqumbo kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms103:10 Akenzanga kuti njengokwezono zetu; akasivuzanga njengokwenkohlakalo zetu. 
Psalms103:11 Ngokuba njengobude bezulu pezu kwomhlaba, bungako ubukulu bobubele bake pezu kwabamoyikayo." 
Psalms103:12 Njengokuba kude kwelokupuma kwelanga nelokutshona, uyazibeka kude nati izigqito zetu." 
Psalms103:13 Njengenceba yoyise pezu kwabantwana bake, injalo inceba kayehova pezu kwabamoyikayo." 
Psalms103:14 Ngokuba ekwazi ukudalwa kwetu, ekumbula ukuba silutuli." 
Psalms103:15 Umntu imihla yake injengenca; njengembali yasendle, uyatyatyamba njalo." 
Psalms103:16 Ngokuba umoya udlula pezu kwayo, ibe selingaseko ke; iti indawo yayo ingabuyi yazane nayo." 
Psalms103:17 Kodwa ububele bukayehova bukwa kunapakade kude kube ngunapakade pezu kwabamoyikayo, nobulungisa bake bukwabantwana babantwana:" 
Psalms103:18 kwabo bagcina ucebano lwake, nakwabo bakumbula ingxelo zake bazenze." 
Psalms103:19 Uyehova umisile iterone yake ezulwini; ubukumkani bake bupete pezu konke. 
Psalms103:20 Bongani uyehova, nina zingelosi zake! nina bakulu ngamandla, enilenza ilizwi lake, ekuveni intlokoma yelizwi lake." 
Psalms103:21 Bongani uyehova, nonke nina mikosi yake! nina bakonzi bake niyenzayo intando yake!" 
Psalms103:22 Bongani uyehova, nonke nina misebenzi yake! kuzo zonke indawo zokupata kwake. Mbonge uyehova, mpefumlo wam!" 
Psalms104:1 MBONGE uyehova, mpefumlo wam! Yehova, Tixo wam! umkulu kakulu; uvatisiwe ngodumo nangobukulu." 
Psalms104:2 Owambata ukukanya njengengubo; owolula izulu njengesikuselo; 
Psalms104:3 obeka intsika zenkambili zake emanzini; owenza amafu abe yinqwelo yake; ohambayo pezu kwamapiko omoya; 
Psalms104:4 owenza ingelosi zake zibe ngumoya; abakonzi bake babe ngumlilo odangazelayo. 
Psalms104:5 Wamisa umhlaba pezu kwemisekelo yawo, uze ungashukunyiswa kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms104:6 Ubuwugubungela ngenzulu njengesivato: amanzi ema pezu kwentaba. 
Psalms104:7 Ngokutetisa kwako abaleka; ngelizwi lokududuma kwako emka ngobunxamo. 
Psalms104:8 Ayenyuka ngentaba, ehla ngemihlambo, ngasendaweni uwamisele yona." 
Psalms104:9 Wabeka umda ukuba angagqiti; ukuba angabi sabuya agubungele umhlaba. 
Psalms104:10 Uyatuma imitombo ezintilini; iyahamba pakati kwentaba. 
Psalms104:11 Iyaseza zonke izilo zasendle; amaqwaṙa ayadambisa ukunxanwa kwawo. 
Psalms104:12 Intaka zezulu zihlala ngakuyo; ziku̔pa ilizwi pakati kwamasebe. 
Psalms104:13 Uyazinyela intaba kwa sezinkambilini zake: umhlaba uyahlutiswa ngesiqa̔mo semisebenzi yako. 
Psalms104:14 Uyahlumisela inkomo inca, nomfuno wokunceda abantu; aze avelise ukudla emhlabeni;" 
Psalms104:15 neveyine evuyisa intliziyo yomntu, ukukazimlisa ubuso bake ngapezu kweoli; nesonka esixasa intliziyo yomntu." 
Psalms104:16 Imiti kayehova ihluti; isedare zase‐Lebanone owazityalayo; 
Psalms104:17 apo intaka zakela kona izindlu: iṙaside indlu yayo yimiti yeberoshe. 
Psalms104:18 Intaba ezinde zezamagogo; amawa yindawo yokupepela yembila. 
Psalms104:19 Wenza inyanga ibe yeyamaxesha amiselweyo; ilanga liyakwazi ukutshona kwalo. 
Psalms104:20 Uyenza wena ubumnyama, buba busuku ke: ayapuma ngabo onke amaṙamncwa ehlati." 
Psalms104:21 Ingonyama ezintsha ziyakonyela into yokuqwenga, zifuna kutixo ukudla kwazo." 
Psalms104:22 Ilanga liyapuma, zihlanganisane, zilale pantsi eminxunyeni yazo." 
Psalms104:23 Uti umntu apumele emsebenzini wake, nasenkonzweni yake, kude kuhlwe." 
Psalms104:24 Hai ukuba mininzi ke kwemisebenzi yako, Yehova! yonke uyenzile ngobulumko: umhlaba uzele yimfuyo yako." 
Psalms104:25 Ulwandle olu lukulu lubanzi, apo zikona izinto ezishukumayo ezingenakubalwa, izilo ezincinane ndawonye nezikulu:" 
Psalms104:26 kulapo zihamba kona inqanawa; na leyoleviyatane uyidalileyo ukuba idlale kulo. 
Psalms104:27 Zonke ezi ziyakangela kuwe, ukuze uzamkelise ukudla kwazo ngexesha lako." 
Psalms104:28 Uyazipa, zibute ke; uyavula isandla sako, zihlutiswe kokulungileyo." 
Psalms104:29 Uyafihla ubuso bako, zituswe ke; uyasusa umpefumlo wazo, ziqauke, zibuyele elutulini lwazo." 
Psalms104:30 Uyatuma umoya wako, zidalwe ke; uti ubuso bomhlaba ubuhlaziye." 
Psalms104:31 Ubungcwalisa bukayehova bobako kude kube ngunapakade; uyehova wovuya ngemisebenzi yake. 
Psalms104:32 Uyakangela umhlaba, ungcangcazele ke; uyacukumisa intaba, ziqu̔me umsi ke." 
Psalms104:33 Ndovuma kuyehova ngexa ndisadla ubomi; ndocula kutixo wam ngexa ndiseko. 
Psalms104:34 Ukumcinga kwam kwoba mnandi: ndovuya ngaye uyehova. 
Psalms104:35 Aboni bogqityelwa emhlabeni, bati abakohlakeleyo bangabi sabiko. Mbonge uyehova, mpefumlo wam! — Dumisani uyehova!" 
Psalms105:1 BULELANI kuyehova, shumayelani igama lake, yazisani izenzo zake pakati kwezizwe." 
Psalms105:2 Vumani kuye, culani amaculo kuye, tetani ngayo yonke imimangaliso yake." 
Psalms105:3 Qa̔yisani ngegama lake eliyingcwele; maivuye intliziyo yabamfunayo uyehova. 
Psalms105:4 Buzelani uyehova, namandla ake; funani ubuso bake futi." 
Psalms105:5 Kumbulani imimangaliso yake ayenzileyo; imiqondiso yake, nezigwebo zomlomo wake;" 
Psalms105:6 nina nzalo ka‐Abrahame isicaka sake, bonyana baka‐Yakobi, abaqashwa bake!" 
Psalms105:7 Nguyehova, utixo wetu, yena: imigwebo yake ikuwo wonke umhlaba." 
Psalms105:8 Uyakumbula ucebano lwake kude kube ngunapakade; ilizwi wabelixela, kude kube liwaka lezizukulwana;" 
Psalms105:9 ucebano owalwenzayo no‐Abrahame, nesifungo sake ku‐Yisake;" 
Psalms105:10 walumisela ku‐Yakobi lube ngumteto, ku‐Sirayeli lube lucebano olungunapakade;" 
Psalms105:11 esiti: Ndokunika ilizwe le‐Kanane, isabiwo selifa lenu;" 
Psalms105:12 okuya bebengabantu abalula, kwa into encinanana nabasemzini kulo." 
Psalms105:13 Bati bakuhamba kwisizwe ngesizwe, bevela kw obunye ubukumkani besiya ebantwini bambi;" 
Psalms105:14 akavumelanga mntu ukuba ababandezele: wohlwaya nokumkani ngenxa yabo; 
Psalms105:15 esiti: Ningacukumisi abatanjiswa bam, nabaprofite bam ningabapati kakubi." 
Psalms105:16 Kanjalo wabiza indlala ize pezu kwelizwe; wonke umsimelelo wesonka wawapula. 
Psalms105:17 Watuma indoda pambi kwabo; u‐Josefe watengiswa abe likonza: 
Psalms105:18 babulala inyawo zake ngamakamandela; umpefumlo wake wangena esinceteni; 
Psalms105:19 kwada kwalixesha lokufika kwelizwi lake: ilizwi likayehova lamcokisa. 
Psalms105:20 Watuma ukumkani, wamkulula; watuma umpati wesizwe, wamvulela." 
Psalms105:21 Wamenza inkosi yendlu yake, nompati pezu kwayo yonke impahla yake;" 
Psalms105:22 aze anxibe inkosana zake ngentando yake, alumkise amapakati ake." 
Psalms105:23 U‐Sirayeli naye weza e‐Jipete; wati u‐Yakobi wahlala ezweni lakwa‐Hame. 
Psalms105:24 Waza wandisa abantu bake kakulu; wabenza abanamandla pezu kwababandezeli babo. 
Psalms105:25 Wajika intliziyo yabo ize bazonde abantu bake, benze ngenkohliso ezicakeni zake." 
Psalms105:26 Watuma u‐Mosesi isicaka sake, n o‐Arone owabemqashile." 
Psalms105:27 Babonakalisa imiqondiso yake pakati kwabo, nemimangaliso ezweni lakwa‐Hame." 
Psalms105:28 Watuma ubumnyama, kwaba mnyama ke: abavukelanga ilizwi lake." 
Psalms105:29 Waguqula amanzi abo abe ligazi, wabubisa intlanzi zabo." 
Psalms105:30 Umhlaba wabo wavelisa kakulu amasele, ezinkambilini zokumkani babo." 
Psalms105:31 Wateta, kwaza kwafika izibau, n entwala kuyo yonke imida yabo." 
Psalms105:32 Wabanika isico̔to endaweni yemvula, n amalangatye omlilo ezweni labo." 
Psalms105:33 Wabeta imiti yeveyine yabo, nemikiwane yabo; wapula nemiti yemida yabo." 
Psalms105:34 Wateta, kwaza kwafika inkumbi, noṙuxeshe, kwa ngento engenakubalwa;" 
Psalms105:35 zaza zadla yonke inca yelizwe labo; zadla nesiqa̔mo somhlaba wabo. 
Psalms105:36 Wati kanjalo wabeta onke amazibulo elizweni labo, isiqalo sawo onke amandla abo." 
Psalms105:37 Waza wabapumisa benesilivere negolide; kungabangako pakati kwezizwe zabo ohexayo. 
Psalms105:38 Ama‐Jipete avuya bakupuma; ngokuba isoyikiso sabo sawa pezu kwawo. 
Psalms105:39 Wandlala ilifu libe sisigubungelo; nomlilo wokukanyisa ebusuku. 
Psalms105:40 Kwacelwa, waza wazisa izagwityi, wabahlutisa ngesonka sezulu." 
Psalms105:41 Wavula ilityekazi, kwampompoza amanzi ke; abaleka ezindaweni ezomileyo njeng omlambo." 
Psalms105:42 Ngokuba ebekumbula ilizwi lake eliyingcwele, n o‐Abrahame isicaka sake." 
Psalms105:43 Waza wapumisa abantu bake ngovuyo, n abaqashwa bake ngomgcobo;" 
Psalms105:44 wabapa amazwe abaheyideni, baza badla ilifa lomsebenzi wentlanga:" 
Psalms105:45 ukuze bagcine imimiso yake, babambe nemiteto yake. — Dumisani uyehova!" 
Psalms106:1 DUMISANI uyehova! — Bulelani kuyehova, ngokuba elungile; ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade." 
Psalms106:2 Ngubanina ongaxela izenzo zamandla zikayehova? ngubanina ongavakalisa lwonke udumo lwake? 
Psalms106:3 Hai itamsanqa labagcina ubugwebo, ne lowenza okulungileyo ngamaxesha onke!" 
Psalms106:4 Yehova! zundikumbule ngokutandwa kwabantu bako; uze kum unosindiso lwako; 
Psalms106:5 ukuba ndibone ubutamsanqa babaqashwa bako, ndivuye ngovuyo lwesizwe sako, ndiziqa̔yisele ndawonye nelifa lako." 
Psalms106:6 Sonile kunye nobawo betu, senzile ngobugwenxa, senza okukohlakeleyo." 
Psalms106:7 Obawo betu abaqondanga imimangaliso yako e‐Jipete; abakumbulanga ubuninzi bezibele zako: bavukela ngakuye elwandle, elwandle olubomvu." 
Psalms106:8 Wabasindisa noko ngenxa yegama lake, ukuze abonakalise amandla ake." 
Psalms106:9 Walutetisa ulwandle olubomvu, lwada lwoma; waza wabahambisa ezinzulwini njengasentlango." 
Psalms106:10 Wabasindisa esandleni so ba tiyileyo, wabakulula esandleni sotshaba." 
Psalms106:11 Amanzi aselela ababandezeli babo; bekungeko namnye wakubo owasalayo. 
Psalms106:12 Bandula ukukolwa ngamazwi ake; bavuma indumiso yake. 
Psalms106:13 Bahla balibala imisebenzi yake; abalindanga icebo lake; 
Psalms106:14 bakanuka kakulu entlango, balinga utixo ebugxwayibeni." 
Psalms106:15 Waza wabapa isicelo sabo; kodwa watuma ubityo empefumlweni wabo. 
Psalms106:16 Baba nomona ngaku‐Mosesi emnqubeni, na ngaku‐Arone oyingcwele kayehova." 
Psalms106:17 Umhlaba wavuleka, waginya u‐Datane, waselela umhlambi ka‐Abirame." 
Psalms106:18 Kwapenjwa umlilo emhlambini wabo; ilangatye latshisa abakohlakeleyo. 
Psalms106:19 Benza itole e‐Horebe, bazitoba pambi kwomfanekiso otyityishiweyo." 
Psalms106:20 Kwa njalo baguqula ubungcwalisa babo bube kokufana nenkabi edla inca. 
Psalms106:21 Balibala utixo umsindisi wabo, obezenzile izinto ezinkulu e‐Jipete;" 
Psalms106:22 imimangaliso ezweni lakwa‐Hame, izinto ezoyikekileyo ngaselwandle olubomvu." 
Psalms106:23 Wati ngoko ebeya kubatshabalalisa, ukuba u‐Mosesi umqashwa wake ebengemanga esiṙotyeni pambi kwake, ukupambukisa umsindo wake, aze angabubisi." 
Psalms106:24 Kanjako badela ilizwe elinqwenelekayo; abakolwanga lilizwi lake; 
Psalms106:25 beya ezintenteni zabo; abapulapulanga ilizwi likayehova. 
Psalms106:26 Wati ngoko wapakamisa isandla sake ngakubo, ukuba abawise entlango;" 
Psalms106:27 nokuba awise inzalo yabo pakati kwabaheyideni, abati sa emazweni." 
Psalms106:28 Bazibandakanya no‐Bali‐pehori, badla amadini abafileyo." 
Psalms106:29 Baza bamqumbisa ngezenzo zabo: sada isibulalo satyobozela pakati kwabo. 
Psalms106:30 Wandula wesuka u‐Finehasi, wenza umgwebo: sati isibulalo sanqamka." 
Psalms106:31 Kwaza oko kwabalelwa kuye ukuba bubulungisa, kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms106:32 Bamqumbisa kanjalo emanzini e‐Meriba, kwaza kwaba nzima pezu kwo‐Mosesi ngenxa yabo:" 
Psalms106:33 ngokuba bacapukisa umoya wake, wada wateta ngomlomo wake ngokunxama." 
Psalms106:34 Abatshabalalisanga izizwe uyehova wabebaxelela ngazo; 
Psalms106:35 badibanisana nabaheyideni, bafunda imisebenzi yabo." 
Psalms106:36 Basuka bakonza izitixo zabo: zaza zaba ngumgibe kubo. 
Psalms106:37 Ewe, onyana babo nentombi zabo babenza amadini kuzo idemoni," 
Psalms106:38 bapalaza igazi elingenatyala, igazi lonyana babo nelentombi zabo, ababebenzile amadini kwizitixo zase‐Kanane: waza umhlaba wadyojwa ngegazi." 
Psalms106:39 Kwa njalo bazinco̔lela ngemisebenzi yabo, baṙexeza ngezenzo zabo." 
Psalms106:40 Yati ngoko ingqumbo kayehova yavuta ngakubo abantu bake, wada wazonda ilifa lake." 
Psalms106:41 Wabanikela esandleni sabaheyideni; baza bapatwa ngababatiyileyo. 
Psalms106:42 Intshaba zabo zabancinezela; batotyiswa pantsi kwesandla sazo. 
Psalms106:43 Wabahlangula amaxesha amaninzi; koko bamcapukisayo ngecebo labo, baza bagotywa ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabo." 
Psalms106:44 Kodwa wabona ubunzima babo, akuva ukukala kwabo." 
Psalms106:45 Waza wabakumbulela ucebano lwake, waba nosizi njengobuninzi bezibele zake." 
Psalms106:46 Wenza nokuba bazuze inceba ebusweni babo bonke ababebatimbile. 
Psalms106:47 Sisindise, Yehova, Tixo wetu! sibute sipume pakati kwabaheyideni, size sibulele egameni lako elingcwele, siqa̔yise eludunyweni lwako." 
Psalms106:48 Makabongwe uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, kwa kunapakade kude kube ngunapakade: mabati bonke abantu: Amene. — Dumisani uyehova!" 
Psalms107:1 BULELANI kuyehova, ngokuba elungile; ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade." 
Psalms107:2 Mabatsho abakululwa bakayehova, owabakulula esandleni sotshaba;" 
Psalms107:3 wababuta emazweni, empumalanga nasentshonalanga, enode nasesuyide." 
Psalms107:4 Badungudela entlango, endleleni ebugxwayiba; abafumananga sixeko sokuhlala." 
Psalms107:5 Bati, belambile benxaniwe, umpefumlo wabo wawa pakati kwabo." 
Psalms107:6 Bandula balilela kuyehova ebunzimeni babo; wabahlangula ekuxinezekeni kwabo. 
Psalms107:7 Waza wabakokela ngendlela elungileyo, ukuze baye esixekweni sokuhlala." 
Psalms107:8 Makubulelwe kuyehova ububele bake nemimangaliso yake konyana babantu! 
Psalms107:9 Ngokuba ekolisa umpefumlo okanukayo; nompefumlo olambileyo uyawuzalisa ngokulungileyo. 
Psalms107:10 Abo bahleli ebumnyameni nasesitunzini sokufa, benxityiwe ngembandezelo nangentsimbi;" 
Psalms107:11 ngokuba bebevukele amazwi katixo, badela icebo lopezu kwonke:" 
Psalms107:12 ngako watobisa intliziyo yabo ngendiniso; baku̔beka, kungeko mncedi." 
Psalms107:13 Bandula balilela kuyehova ebunzimeni babo; wabasindisa ekuxinezekeni kwabo. 
Psalms107:14 Wabaku̔pa ebumnyameni nasesitunzini sokufa, waqaula izinxibo zabo." 
Psalms107:15 Makubulelwe kuyehova ububele bake nemimangaliso yake konyana babantu! 
Psalms107:16 Ngokuba eqekezile ingcango zexina, wanqamla kubini imivalo yasincete." 
Psalms107:17 Abazidenge ngenxa yokugqita kwabo, nangenxa yenkohlakalo zabo, bayabandezelwa." 
Psalms107:18 Umpefumlo wabo utiyana nako konke ukudla, basondele emasangweni okufa." 
Psalms107:19 Bandule balilele kuyehova ebunzimeni babo; uyabasindisa ekuxinezekeni kwabo. 
Psalms107:20 Uyatuma ilizwi lake, abapilise, abakulule ekwonakaleni kwabo." 
Psalms107:21 Makubulelwe kuyehova ububele bake nemimangaliso yake konyana babantu! 
Psalms107:22 Makunikelwe iminikelo yombulelo, kushunyayelwe imisebenzi yake ngomgcobo!" 
Psalms107:23 Abo behlela elwandle ezinqanaweni, abenzayo umsebenzi emanzini amakulu;" 
Psalms107:24 bona bayabona imisebenzi kayehova, nemimangaliso yake enzulwini." 
Psalms107:25 Uti akuteta, avuse umoya woqwitela, opakamisayo amaza alo." 
Psalms107:26 Bayanyukela ezulwini, babuye behlele ezinzulwini: umpefumlo wabo uyanyibilika ngesitukutezi." 
Psalms107:27 Banesizunguzane, begexa njengonxilayo; bonke ubulumko babo bucitekile." 
Psalms107:28 Bandule balilele kuyehova ebunzimeni babo, aze abaku̔pe ekuxinezekeni kwabo." 
Psalms107:29 Uyenza uqwitela luzole, ukuze amaza alo ati cwaka." 
Psalms107:30 Bandule bavuye, ngokuba edambile; kwa njalo uyabakapela ecwebeni lokunqwenela kwabo." 
Psalms107:31 Makubulelwe kuyehova ububele bake nemimangaliso yake konyana babantu! 
Psalms107:32 Makapakanyiswe entlanganisweni yabantu, adunyiswe esihlelweni sabadala!" 
Psalms107:33 Uyaguqula imilambo ibe yintlango, namatende amanzi abe yindawo eyomileyo;" 
Psalms107:34 ilizwe elicu̔mayo libe lelityuwaṙa, ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabemiyo kulo." 
Psalms107:35 Uyaguqula intlango ibe licibi, nelizwe elomileyo libe ngamatende amanzi:" 
Psalms107:36 ahlalise kona abalambileyo, ize bamise isixeko sokuhlala;" 
Psalms107:37 bahlwayele amasimi, batyale izitiya zemiti yeveyine, ezivelisa iziqa̔mo zokwanda." 
Psalms107:38 Uyabatamsanqelisa ke, bade bandiswe kakulu; nenkomo zabo akazincipisi." 
Psalms107:39 Kanjalo, bayancitshiswa, batotywe, ngoncinezelo, n obubi, nosizi." 
Psalms107:40 Uyapalaza udelo pezu kwazo inkosi, azidungudelise ebugxwayibeni kungeko ndlela." 
Psalms107:41 Kodwa osweleyo uyampakamisa pezulu kuyo imbandezelo, enze izizalwane njengomhlambi." 
Psalms107:42 Abalungileyo bobona, bavuye; iti inkohlakalo yonke ivingce umlomo wayo." 
Psalms107:43 Osukuba elumkile, n osukuba eya kunakana ezi zinto, kwa bona baya kuqonda izibele zikayehova." 
Psalms108:1 INTLIZIYO yam iqinisiwe, Tixo! ndiya kuvuma, ndicule nokucula kwa ngengewalisa yam." 
Psalms108:2 Vuka, nebele nekinore! ndiya kuvuka kusasa mna." 
Psalms108:3 Ndokudumisa, Yehova! pakati kwezizwe; ndandiya kucula kuwe pakati kwentlanga." 
Psalms108:4 Ngokuba ububele bako bukulu ngapezu kwezulu, nenyaniso yako kude kube semafini." 
Psalms108:5 Yiba upakamile pezu kwezulu, Tixo! nobungcwalisa bako pezu kwomhlaba wonke." 
Psalms108:6 Ukuze abatandwa bako bakululwe, sindisa ngesokunene sako, undipendule." 
Psalms108:7 Utixo utetile ebungcweleni bake; ndiya kugcoba: ndiya kwaba i‐Shekeme, ndilinganise umhlambo we‐Sukote:" 
Psalms108:8 u‐Gileyadi ungowam; u‐Manase ungowam; u‐Frayime naye ungamandla entloko yam; u‐Juda ungumnikamteto wam: 
Psalms108:9 i‐Mowabi isisitya sam sokuhlambela; pezu kwe‐Edome ndoposa isihlangu sam; pezu kwe‐Filistiya ndiya kuvuyelela. 
Psalms108:10 Ngubanina oya kundikokela esixekweni esiyinqaba? ngubanina oya kundikapela e‐Edome? 
Psalms108:11 Asi nguwe na, Tixo! o wabusilahlile? akuyi kupuma na, Tixo! nemikosi yetu?" 
Psalms108:12 Sinike uncedo ekubandezelweni; ngokuba usizo lwabantu lungendawo. 
Psalms108:13 Ngaye utixo siya kwenza ngobuṙoti; ngokuba enguye oya kunyatela pantsi ababandezeli betu. 
Psalms109:1 MAUNGATI cwaka, Tixo wendumiso yam!" 
Psalms109:2 Ngokuba kuvuliwe ngakum umlomo wokohlakeleyo nomlomo womkohlisi; batetile ngakum ngolwimi lwobuxoki. 
Psalms109:3 Bandiṙaula nangamazwi okutiya; balwa nam kungeko tuba. 
Psalms109:4 Endaweni yokutanda kwam bayimpi kum; kodwa mna ndisemtandazweni. 
Psalms109:5 Kanjalo bandibekele ububi endaweni yokulunga, nokutiya endaweni yokutanda kwam." 
Psalms109:6 Misa okohlakeleyo pezu kwake; ati u‐Satane eme ngasekunene kuye. 
Psalms109:7 Nxa agwetywayo, makapume enetyala; ube sisono nomtandazo wake." 
Psalms109:8 Imihla yake maibe mincinane; butatyatwe ngomnye ubongama bake. 
Psalms109:9 Mabati abantwana bake babe zinkedama, nomfazi wake abe ngumhlolokazi." 
Psalms109:10 Abantwana bake mababe zimpalalana, banqibe; mabafune ukudla bevela ezindaweni zabo ezicitakeleyo." 
Psalms109:11 Umbangi makadle konke anako; bati abasemzini bapange inzuzo yake. 
Psalms109:12 Makungabiko oya kumolulela ububele; kanjako makungabiko oya kuba nofefe pezu kwenkedama zake. 
Psalms109:13 Inzalo yake mainqanyulwe; liti igama layo esizukulwaneni sasemva licinywe. 
Psalms109:14 Inkohlakalo yoyise bake maikunjulwe ebusweni bukayehova; siti isono sonina singacinywa: 
Psalms109:15 mazibe pambi kwoyehova futi, ukuze ayinqamle inkunjulwa yabo emhlabeni:" 
Psalms109:16 ngenxa yokuba engakumbulanga ukwenza ngobubele, koko emtshutshisile olihlwempu nosweleyo, enxamele ukubulala nontliziyo ilusizi." 
Psalms109:17 Njengokuba ebetanda ukuqalekisa, kwa njalo kwoza kuye: njengokuba engatandanga ukutamsanqelisa, kwa njalo kwoba kude naye." 
Psalms109:18 Njengokuba ebezivatisile ngoqalekiso njengengubo yake, kwa njalo lwoza njengamanzi embilini wake, nanjengamafuta ematanjeni ake." 
Psalms109:19 Malube kuye njengengubo ayambatayo, nombinqo azibinqa ngawo futi." 
Psalms109:20 Oku makube ngumvuzo wabayimpi kum ovela kuyehova, nowabatetayo okubi ngakumpefumlo wam." 
Psalms109:21 Kodwa wena, Yehova oyinkosi! yenzela mna ngenxa yegama lako: ngenxa yokuba ububele bako bulungile, zundikulule." 
Psalms109:22 Ngokuba ndilihlwempu, ndingosweleyo mna; intliziyo yam ihlatyiwe pakati kwam." 
Psalms109:23 Ndiyemka njengesitunzi nxa solukayo; ndiyavutululwa njengenkumbi. 
Psalms109:24 Amadolo am ayahexa ngokuzila ukudla; inyama yam iyanqina ngokuswela ubunqata. 
Psalms109:25 Kanjalo ndaba sigxekwa kubo: bati bakundibona bahlunguzela intloko zabo. 
Psalms109:26 Ndincede, Yehova, Tixo wam! ndisindise ngabo ububele bako:" 
Psalms109:27 ukuze bazi ukuba oku kusisandla sako; ukuba nguwe, Yehova! okwenzileyo." 
Psalms109:28 Mabaqalekise bona, kodwa zutamsanqelise wena; mabati bona bakuvuka, badaniswe; siti kodwa isicaka sako sivuye." 
Psalms109:29 Abayimpi kum mabavatiswe ngehlazo, mabambate idano labo njengengubo." 
Psalms109:30 Ndiya kubulela kuyehova kakulu ngomlomo wam; napakati kwabaninzi ndiya kumdumisa. 
Psalms109:31 Ngokuba eya kuma ngasekunene kwihlwempu, ukuze alisindise kwabo bagweba umpefumlo walo." 
Psalms110:1 WATI uyehova kwinkosi yam: Hlala ngasekunene kum, ndide ndenze intshaba zako zibe sisitulo senyawo zako." 
Psalms110:2 Intonga yamandla ako woyituma uyehova ivela e‐Ziyone, esiti: Pata wena pakati kwentshaba zako." 
Psalms110:3 Abantu bako boba nokuvuma ngomhla wobukosi bako, ebuhleni bobungcwele: kwa sesizalweni sokusa kwobako kuwe umbete wobutsha bako." 
Psalms110:4 Uyehova ufungile, akayi kuguquka: ungumperisite kude kube ngunapakade ngesiko lika‐Makizedeki." 
Psalms110:5 Inkosi ngasekunene kwako iya kulimaza okumkani ngomhla wengqumbo yayo. 
Psalms110:6 Iya kugweba pakati kwabaheyideni, iya kuzalisa umhlaba ngezidumbu; iya kulimaza abayintloko pezu kwelizwe elikulu." 
Psalms110:7 Kwa semtonjeni iya kusela endleleni; kukona iya kupakamisa intloko. 
Psalms111:1 DUMISANI uyehova! — Ndiya kubulela kuyehova ngentliziyo yonke, esihlelweni sabalungileyo, nasentlanganisweni." 
Psalms111:2 Imisebenzi kayehova mikulu, ifuniselwa ngabo bonke abayinyamekelayo." 
Psalms111:3 Isenzo sake sinokuduma nobungcwalisa: buti ubulungisa bake bume ngonapakade. 
Psalms111:4 Wenze imimangaliso yake ibe yinkumbuzo: uyehova unofefe, unenceba." 
Psalms111:5 Ubamkelisile ukudla abo bamoyikayo: ucebano lwake wolukumbula kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms111:6 Ubonakalisile amandla emisebenzi yake ebantwini bake, ngokubapa ilifa labaheyideni." 
Psalms111:7 Imisebenzi yezandla zake iyinyaniso nogwebo; zinyanisekile zonke ingxelo zake. 
Psalms111:8 Zihlala ziqinisekile kude kube ngunapakade: yenziwe ngenyaniso nangobulungisa. 
Psalms111:9 Watuma inkululwa ebantwini bake: umisele ucebano lwake lube ngunapakade: igama lake liyingcwele, linokwoyikeka." 
Psalms111:10 Ukwoyika uyehova kusisiqalo sobulumko: banengqondo elungileyo bonke abazenzayo ingxelo zake: udumo lwake lumi ngonapakade. 
Psalms112:1 DUMISANI uyehova. — Hai itamsanqa lomntu omoyikayo uyehova, lotanda kakulu imiyalelo yake!" 
Psalms112:2 Inzalo yake yoba namandla emhlabeni: isizukulwana sabalungileyo siya kutanyusanqelwa. 
Psalms112:3 Kwobako indyebo nobutyebi endlwini yake: buti ubulungisa bake bume ngonapakade. 
Psalms112:4 Kuyapumela abalungileyo ukukanya ebumnyameni: unofefe, unenceba, unobulungisa." 
Psalms112:5 Umntu olungileyo uyenza ngofefe, aboleke; uya kulungiselela imicimbi yake ngokufaneleyo." 
Psalms112:6 Ngenyaniso akayi kushukunyiswa kude kube ngunapakade: olungisayo woba sekukunjulweni okungunapakade. 
Psalms112:7 Akayi kwoyikela indaba ezimbi; intliziyo yake iqinisiwe, itembela kuyehova." 
Psalms112:8 Intliziyo yake iqinisekile, akayi kwoyika, ade akangele pezu kwentshaba zake." 
Psalms112:9 Ucitile, wapa abasweleyo; ubulungisa bake bumi ngonapakade; upondo lwake luya kupakanyiswa ngobungcwalisa." 
Psalms112:10 Okohlakeleyo uya kubona, acapuke; uya kutshixiza amenyo ake, anyibilike: inkanuko yabakohlakeleyo yotshabalala." 
Psalms113:1 DUMISANI uyehova! — Dumisani, nina zicaka zikayehova! dumisani igama likayehova." 
Psalms113:2 Malibongwe igama likayehova, kwa kaloku nje, nakude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms113:3 Kwa sekupumeni kwelanga kude kube sekutshoneni kwalo, igama likayehova lilungel’ ukudunyiswa." 
Psalms113:4 Uyehova upezulu pezu kwezizwe zonke; ubungcwalisa bake bupezu kwezulu. 
Psalms113:5 Ngubanina onjengoyehova, utixo wetu, ozihlalisela pezulu," 
Psalms113:6 ozitobayo ukubona okusezulwini nokusemhlabeni? 
Psalms113:7 Uyasukisa ihlwempu elutulini, uyapakamisa osweleyo enkunkumeni," 
Psalms113:8 ukuba abahlalise ndawonye nenkosi, ndawonye nenkosi zabantu bake." 
Psalms113:9 Uyahlalisa umdlolokazi endlwini, abe ngunina ovuyayo wabantwana. — Dumisani uyehova!" 
Psalms114:1 NXA u‐Sirayeli wapuma e‐Jipete, indlu ka‐Yakobi ebantwini abakuteta kokwasemzini;" 
Psalms114:2 u‐Juda waba yindawo yake eyingcwele, u‐Sirayeli waba yeyobukosi bake." 
Psalms114:3 Ulwandle lwabona, lwabaleka; i‐Yoredane yajika ngomva." 
Psalms114:4 Intaba zatsiba njengenkunzi zegusha, n enduli njengamaxwana." 
Psalms114:5 Ubunanina, lwandlendini! ukuba wabubaleka? wena, Yoredane! ukuba wabujika ngomva?" 
Psalms114:6 nina zintaba! ukuba nanitsiba njengenkunzi zegusha? na ni zinduli! ukuba nanitsiba njengamaxwana? 
Psalms114:7 Ngcangcazela, wena mhlaba! ebusweni benkosi, ebusweni botixo ka‐Yakobi;" 
Psalms114:8 owaguqula ilitye libe licibi lamanzi, nelitye elilukuni libe ngumtombo wamanzi." 
Psalms115:1 MAKUNGABI kuti, Yehova! makungabi kuti, makube kwigama lako ekunikelwa ubungcwalisa, ngenxa yobubele bako, na ngenxa yenyaniso yako." 
Psalms115:2 Yinina ukuba abaheyideni babe nokuti: Upina ke utixo wabo? 
Psalms115:3 Kodwa utixo wetu usezulwini: konke akutandayo uyakwenza. 
Psalms115:4 Izitixo zabo zezesilivere negolide, umsebenzi wezandla zabantu." 
Psalms115:5 Zinemilomo, kanti aziteti; zinamehlo, kanti aziboni;" 
Psalms115:6 zinendlebe, kanti aziva; zinempumlo, kanti azijoji;" 
Psalms115:7 zinezandla, kanti azipati; zinenyawo, kanti azihambi; azivakalisi ngomqala wazo." 
Psalms115:8 Abo bazenzayo bayafana nazo; nabo bonke abatembela kuzo. 
Psalms115:9 Sirayeli! tembela kuyehova; ungumncedi wabo yena, nekaka labo." 
Psalms115:10 Ndlu ka‐Arone! tembelani kuyehova; ungumncedi wabo yena, nekaka labo." 
Psalms115:11 Nina bamoyikayo uyehova! tembelani kuyehova; ungumncedi wabo yena, nekaka labo." 
Psalms115:12 Uyehova usikumbule; uya kutamsanqelisa: uya kutamsanqelisa indlu ka‐Sirayeli; uya kutamsanqelisa indlu ka‐Arone. 
Psalms115:13 Uya kutamsanqelisa abamoyikayo uyehova, kwa abancinane nabakulu." 
Psalms115:14 Uyehova uya kwongezelela pezu kwenu; pezu kwenu napezu kwabantwana benu. 
Psalms115:15 Ningabatanyusanqelweyo nguyehova, owenzayo izulu nomhlaba." 
Psalms115:16 Okwezulu, izulu le likayehova; kodwa umhlaba uwunikile konyana babantu." 
Psalms115:17 Abafileyo abadumisi uyehova, kwa nabo bonke abehlele ekutini cwaka." 
Psalms115:18 Kodwa tina siya kubonga uyehova, kwa kaloku nje, nakude kube ngunapakade. — Dumisani uyehova!" 
Psalms116:1 NDITANDILE ukuba uyehova alive ilizwi lam, n ezikungo zam." 
Psalms116:2 Ngokuba etobele kum indlebe yake, ngako emihleni ndiseko ngayo ndiya kubiza kuye." 
Psalms116:3 Intambo zokufa zandir̔aula, nentlungu zehadesi zandihlela; ndafumana ubunzima nosizi." 
Psalms116:4 Ndandul’ ukubiza egameni likayehova: Ke, Yehova! uze ukulule umpefumlo wam." 
Psalms116:5 Unofefe uyehova, unobulungisa; ewe, utixo wetu unenceba." 
Psalms116:6 Uyehova uyagcina abatambileyo: ndanditotyelwe pantsi, wandisindisa ke." 
Psalms116:7 Buyela ekupumleni kwako, mpefumlo wam! ngokuba uyehova ekwenzele okulungileyo." 
Psalms116:8 Ngokuba uhlangule umpefumlo wam ekufeni, n amehlo am ezinyembezini, n enyawo zam ekuweni." 
Psalms116:9 Ndiya kuhamba ebusweni bukayehova emazweni abahleliyo. 
Psalms116:10 Ndakolwa, kungoko ndatetayo: ndandibandezelwe kakulu." 
Psalms116:11 Ndati ekunxameni kwam: Bonke abantu bangamaxoki. 
Psalms116:12 Ndiya kunikela nto nina kuyehova ngenxa yazo zonke izincedo zake ngakum? 
Psalms116:13 Ndiya kutabata indebe yosindiso, ndibize egameni likayehova." 
Psalms116:14 Ndiya kufeza izibambiso zam kuyehova, ngapambi ke kwabo bonke abantu bake." 
Psalms116:15 Kunqabile emehlweni kayehova ukufa kwabangcwele bake. 
Psalms116:16 Ke, Yehova! ngenyaniso ndisisicaka sako; ndisisicaka sako, kwa unyana wesicakakazi sako: uzicumbulule izinxibo zam." 
Psalms116:17 Ndiya kunikela umnikelo wombulelo kuwe, ndibize egameni likayehova." 
Psalms116:18 Ndiya kufeza izibambiso zam kuyehova, ngapambi ke kwabo bonke abantu bake," 
Psalms116:19 emakusini endlu kayehova, pakati kwako, Yerusaleme! — Dumisani uyehova!" 
Psalms117:1 DUMISANI uyehova, nonke nina baheyideni! mbongeni nonke nina zizwe!" 
Psalms117:2 Ngokuba ububele bake bukulu ngakuti; nenyaniso kayehova ingunapakade. — Dumisani uyehova! 
Psalms118:1 BULELANI kuyehova, ngokuba elungile; ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade." 
Psalms118:2 Makatsho ke u‐Sirayeli ukuti: Ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms118:3 Mabatsho ke indlu ka‐Arone ukuti: Ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms118:4 Mabatsho ke abo bamoyikayo uyehova ukuti: Ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms118:5 Ndabizela kuyehova ndisesixingweni: uyehova wandipendula wandibeka endaweni ebanzi. 
Psalms118:6 Uyehova ungecala lam, andiyi kwoyika; umntu angenza nto nina kum?" 
Psalms118:7 Uyehova ungecala lam pakati kwabo bandincedayo; ngako ndiya kukangela pezu kwabanditiyayo. 
Psalms118:8 Kulungile ukupepela kuyehova, pezu kwokokuba kutenjelwe emntwini." 
Psalms118:9 Kulungile ukupepela kuyehova, pezu kwokokuba kutenjelwe ezinkosini." 
Psalms118:10 Zonke izizwe zandir̔aula; koko ngegama likayehova ndiya kuzitshabalalisa. 
Psalms118:11 Zandir̔aula; ewe, zandir̔aula; koko ngegama likayehova ndiya kuzitshabalalisa." 
Psalms118:12 Zandir̔aula njengenyosi; zicimekile njengomlilo wameva: ngokuba ngegama likayehova ndiya kuzitshabalalisa. 
Psalms118:13 Ubunditya̔la kakulu, ukuze ndiwe; kodwa uyehova wandinceda." 
Psalms118:14 Uyehova ungamandla am, neculo lam, wada waba lusindiso kum." 
Psalms118:15 Ilizwi lomgcobo nelosindiso lisezintenteni zabalungileyo: isandla sokunene sikayehova siyenza ngobur̔oti. 
Psalms118:16 Isandla sokunene sikayehova sipakamile; isandla sokunene sikayehova siyenza ngobur̔oti. 
Psalms118:17 Andiyi kufa, ndohlala; ndandiya kushumayela imisebenzi kayehova." 
Psalms118:18 Uyehova undohlwayile kakulu; kodwa akandinikelanga ekufeni. 
Psalms118:19 Ndivulele amasango obulungisa: ndiya kungena ngawo, ndidumise uyehova:" 
Psalms118:20 elisango likayehova, abaya kungena ngalo abalungileyo." 
Psalms118:21 Ndokudumisa; ngokuba undivile, waba lusindiso kum." 
Psalms118:22 Ilitye babelilahlile abaki, laba yintloko yegumbi." 
Psalms118:23 Kukwenza kukayehova oku; kungummangaliso emehlweni etu. 
Psalms118:24 Le yimini eyenziweyo nguyehova; siya kugcoba sivuye ngayo. 
Psalms118:25 Ke, Yehova! uze usindise kaloku: ke, Yehova! uze unike kaloku ubutamsanqa." 
Psalms118:26 Makatanyusanqeliswe ozayo egameni likayehova: sinitamsanqelisile ngokuvela endlwini kayehova. 
Psalms118:27 Utixo u nguyehova osikanyiseleyo: bopelelani umnikelo womtendeleko ngentambo, kude kube sezimpondweni zesibingelo." 
Psalms118:28 Ungutixo wam wena, ndandiya kukudumisa; ungutixo wam, ndokupakamisa." 
Psalms118:29 Bulelani kuyehova, ngokuba elungile; ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade." 
Psalms119:1 HAI itamsanqa labandlela ilungile, abahambayo emtetweni kayehova!" 
Psalms119:2 Hai itamsanqa lababamba izinqi̔nelo zake, a bamfuna ngentliziyo yonke;" 
Psalms119:3 a bati kanjalo bangenzi inkohlakalo, babambe ezindleleni zake!" 
Psalms119:4 Wena u si yalele ukuba kugcinwe ingxelo zako kakulu. 
Psalms119:5 Azaba indlela zam zaqiniselwa ukugcina imimiso yako! 
Psalms119:6 Oko andiyi kudaniswa, nxa ndiyigqalayo yonke imiyalelo yako." 
Psalms119:7 Ndokudumisa ngolungelelwano lwentliziyo, nxa ndizifundileyo izigwebo zako ezilungileyo." 
Psalms119:8 Imimiso yako ndoyigcina: zungandishiyi kanye. 
Psalms119:9 Indodana iya kucokisa nganto nina indlela yayo? Ngoku yi gcina njengokwelizwi lako. 
Psalms119:10 Ndikufunile ngentliziyo yam yonke; zungavumeli ukuba ndilahlekane nemiyalelo yako. 
Psalms119:11 Ilizwi lako ndilibekele entliziyweni yam, ukuze ndingoni ngakuwe." 
Psalms119:12 Udumisekile, Yehova! ndifundise imimiso yako." 
Psalms119:13 Ngowam umlomo ndishumayele zonke izigwebo zomlomo wako. 
Psalms119:14 Ndivuyile endleleni yezinqi̔nelo zako, njengapezu kwendyebo zonke." 
Psalms119:15 Ndiya kucinga ingxelo zako, ndigqale indlela zako." 
Psalms119:16 Ndiya kuziyolisa emimisweni yako: andiyi kulibala ilizwi lako. 
Psalms119:17 Yenzela isicaka sako okulungileyo, ukuba ndidle ubomi, ndigcine ilizwi lako." 
Psalms119:18 Tyila amehlo am, ndize ndikangele imimangaliso yasemtetweni wako." 
Psalms119:19 Ndingowasemzini emhlabeni: zungandifihleli imiyalelo yako. 
Psalms119:20 Umpefumlo wam uyapuka ngokunqwenela izigwebo zako ngamaxa onke. 
Psalms119:21 Ubatetisile abaner̔atshi abaqalekisiweyo, abalahlekanayo nemiyalelo yako." 
Psalms119:22 Songa kum ugxeko nodelo; ngokuba izinqi̔nelo zako ndizibambile. 
Psalms119:23 Kwa nenkosi zahlala zateta ngakum: kodwa isicaka sako sacinga imimiso yako. 
Psalms119:24 Izinqi̔nelo zako nazo ziluyolo lwam; zingabacebisi bam. 
Psalms119:25 Umpefumlo wam unamatele elutulini: ndipilise njengokwelizwi lako. 
Psalms119:26 Ndizishumayele indlela zam, wandiva: ndifundise imimiso yako." 
Psalms119:27 Ndiqondise indlela yengxelo zako; ndandiya kuteta ngayo imimangaliso yako. 
Psalms119:28 Umpefumlo wam uyanyibilika ngosizi: ndomeleze njengokwelizwi lako. 
Psalms119:29 Shenxisa kum indlela yobuxoki; undipe umteto wako ngofefe. 
Psalms119:30 Ndiqashile indlela yenyaniso: izigwebo zako ndizibekile pambi kwam. 
Psalms119:31 Ndinamatele ezinqi̔nelweni zako: Yehova! zungandidanisi. 
Psalms119:32 Ndiya kugitshima endleleni yemiyalelo yako, nxa uya kuyenza banzi intliziyo yam." 
Psalms119:33 Ndifundise indlela yemimiso yako, Yehova! ndandiya kuyibamba kude kube sekupeleni." 
Psalms119:34 Ndiqondise, ndandiya kubamba umteto wako, ndiwugcine ngentliziyo yonke." 
Psalms119:35 Ndikokele endleleni yemiyalelo yako; ngokuba ndikolisiwe yiyo. 
Psalms119:36 Tobela intliziyo yam ezinqi̔nelweni zako, kungabi kuyo inzuzo ekohlakeleyo." 
Psalms119:37 Dlulisa amehlo am angaboni okungendawo: ndipilise endleleni yako. 
Psalms119:38 Qinisa ilizwi lako esicakeni sako, esisekwoyikeni wena." 
Psalms119:39 Dlulisa ukugxekwa kwam endikwoyikayo: ngokuba izigwebo zako zilungile. 
Psalms119:40 Kangela, ndikanukile ingxelo zako: ndipilise ngobulungisa bako." 
Psalms119:41 Kanjalo ububele bako mabuze kum, Yehova! kwa usindiso lwako, njengokwelizwi lako." 
Psalms119:42 Kukona ndiya kuba nokupendula ondigxekayo: ngokuba nditemba ilizwi lako. 
Psalms119:43 Uze ungalihluti kanye emlonyeni wam ilizwi lenyaniso; ngokuba nditembele kuzo izigwebo zako. 
Psalms119:44 Kukona ndiya kugcina umteto wako futi, kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Psalms119:45 Ndandiya kuhamba ndikululekile: ngokuba ndizifuna ingxelo zako. 
Psalms119:46 Ndoteta ngezinqi̔nelo zako nasebusweni babo okumkani, ndandingayi kudana." 
Psalms119:47 Kanjalo ndoziyolisa emiyalelweni yako, endiyitandileyo." 
Psalms119:48 Nezandla zam ndozipakamisela kuyo imiyalelo yako, endiyitandileyo; ndandiya kucinga imimiso yako." 
Psalms119:49 Kumbula ilizwi esicakeni sako, onditembisileyo pezu kwalo." 
Psalms119:50 Oku kulututuzelo lwam ebunzimeni bam: ngokuba ilizwi lako lindipilisile. 
Psalms119:51 Abaner̔atshi bandigculele kakulu; andishenxanga noko emtetweni wako. 
Psalms119:52 Ndikumbule izigwebo zako kwa kudala, Yehova! ndaza ndazitutuzela." 
Psalms119:53 Ukunkwantya kundibambile, ngenxa yabakohlakeleyo abashiya umteto wako." 
Psalms119:54 Imimiso yako ibingamaculo kum, endlwini yokupambukela kwam." 
Psalms119:55 Ndikumbule igama lako. Yehova! ebusuku, ndagcina umteto wako." 
Psalms119:56 Ndandinako oku, ngokuba ndibe ndibamba ingxelo zako." 
Psalms119:57 Usisabelwa sam, Yehova! ndite ndiya kugcina amazwi ako." 
Psalms119:58 Ndakungela ubuso bako ngentliziyo yonke: yiba nofefe kum njengokwelizwi lako. 
Psalms119:59 Ndakumbulela indlela zam, ndaguqula inyawo zam ngasezinqi̔nelweni zako." 
Psalms119:60 Ndakanleza, ndingazilazilanga, ukugcina imiyalelo yako." 
Psalms119:61 Imigibe yabakohlakeleyo indingqongile: andilibalanga umteto wako noko. 
Psalms119:62 Pakati kwobusuku ndiya kupapama ndibulele kuwe, ngenxa yezigwebo zako ezilungileyo." 
Psalms119:63 Ndingumlingane wabo bonke abakwoyikayo, nabo bazigcinayo ingxelo zako." 
Psalms119:64 Umhlaba, Yehova! uzele bububele bako: ndifundise imimiso yako." 
Psalms119:65 Usenzele isicaka sako okulungileyo, Yehova! njengokwelizwi lako." 
Psalms119:66 Ndifundise ingqiqo elungileyo nokwazi: ngokuba ndibe ndikolwa yimiyalelo yako. 
Psalms119:67 Ndati ndingekabandezelwa, ndalahleka; kodwa kaloku ndiligcinile ilizwi lako." 
Psalms119:68 Ulungile wena, uyenza okulungileyo kanjalo: ndifundise imimiso yako." 
Psalms119:69 Abaner̔atshi baqingile ubuxoki ngakum; koko ndiya kubamba ingxelo zako ngentliziyo yonke. 
Psalms119:70 Intliziyo yabo ityebile njengenqata; koko mna ndiziyolisa emtetweni wako. 
Psalms119:71 Kundilungele ukuba ndibe ndibandezelwa; ukuze ndifunde imimiso yako. 
Psalms119:72 Umteto womlomo wako ulungile kum ngapezu kwamawaka egolide nesilivere. 
Psalms119:73 Izandla zako zindenzile zandidala: ndiqondise, ukuba ndifunde imiyalelo yako." 
Psalms119:74 Abo bakwoyikayo bondibona bavuye; ngokuba nditembele ezwini lako. 
Psalms119:75 Ndiyazi, Yehova! ukuba izigwebo zako zibulungisa; kanjalo kungenyaniseko ukundibandezela kwako." 
Psalms119:76 Mabuti ke ububele bako bube kukunditutuzela, njengalo ilizwi lako esicakeni sako." 
Psalms119:77 Inceba zako mazize kum, ukuba ndidle ubomi: ngokuba umteto wako uluyolo lwam." 
Psalms119:78 Abaner̔atshi mabadaniswe; ngokuba bendipenule kungeko ndawo: kodwa mna ndiya kucinga ingxelo zako. 
Psalms119:79 Mabati abakwoyikayo baguqukele kum, kwa nabo bazaziyo izinqi̔nelo zako." 
Psalms119:80 Intliziyo yam mayibe ifezekile emimisweni yako, ukuze ndingadani." 
Psalms119:81 Umpefumlo wam uyapelela usindiso lwako: nditembele ezwini lako. 
Psalms119:82 Amehlo am ayapelela ilizwi lako, ndisiti: Uya kunditutuzela ninina?" 
Psalms119:83 Ngokuba ndide ndaba njengemvaba esemsini; ndingalibalanga imimiso yako noko. 
Psalms119:84 Zingapina intsuku zesicaka sako? uya kuwenza umgwebo ninina pezu kwabandizingelayo? 
Psalms119:85 Abaner̔atshi bandimbele izihogo; ekungenjengawo umteto wako. 
Psalms119:86 Yonke imiyalelo yako iyinyaniseko; bayandizingela kungeko ndawo; ndincede. 
Psalms119:87 Bapantsi kundigqibela emhlabeni; koko ndingashiyanga ingxelo zako. 
Psalms119:88 Ndipilise njengokwobubele bako; kukona ndiya kugcina isinqi̔nelo somlomo wako. 
Psalms119:89 Yehova! ilizwi lako limi ezulwini kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms119:90 Inyaniseko yako ikwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana: uqinisile umhlaba, wema ke." 
Psalms119:91 Ngezigwebo zako zimi kwada kwanamhla; ngokuba zonke zizicaka zako. 
Psalms119:92 Ukuba umteto wako wabungelulo uyolo lwam, ngendibubile oko ndisebunzimeni bam." 
Psalms119:93 Andisayi kuza ndilibale ingxelo zako; ngokuba undipilisile ngazo. 
Psalms119:94 Ndingowako, ndisindise; ngokuba ndizifunile ingxelo zako." 
Psalms119:95 Abakohlakeleyo bandilalele ukundibubisa: kodwa ndokumbula izinqi̔nelo zako. 
Psalms119:96 Ndibonile isipelo kuyo yonke imfezeko: kodwa umyalelo wako ubanzi kakulu. 
Psalms119:97 Hai ukutanda kwam umteto wako! kukucinga kwam wona imini yonke. 
Psalms119:98 Wena undilumkisile ngemiyalelo yako ngapezu kwentshaba zam; ngokuba kungunapakade ikum. 
Psalms119:99 Ndinokuqonda ngapezu kwabafundisi bam bonke; ngokuba izinqi̔nelo zako zikukucinga kwam. 
Psalms119:100 Ndinokuqiqa ngapezu kwabadala; ngokuba ndibamba ingxelo zako. 
Psalms119:101 Ndinqandile inyawo zam kuzo zonke indlela ezingalungileyo, ukuze ndigcine ilizwi lako." 
Psalms119:102 Andimkanga kuzo izigwebo zako; ngokuba wena undifundisile. 
Psalms119:103 Hai ukuba mnandi kwamazwi ako kwikuhlangubo lam! ngapezu kwabo ubusi kumlomo wam! 
Psalms119:104 Ngazo ingxelo zako ndiyazuza ingqondo: ngako ndiyatiya zonke indlela zobuxoki. 
Psalms119:105 Ilizwi lako lisisibane ngasezinyaweni zam, nesikanyiso ngasendleleni yam." 
Psalms119:106 Ndifungile, ndandiya kuqinisa, ukuba ndogcina izigwebo zako ezilungileyo." 
Psalms119:107 Ndibulawa kakulu: ndipilise, Yehova! njengokwelizwi lako." 
Psalms119:108 Uz’ uti ke, Yehova! uyibuke iminikelo yesisa yomlomo wam, undifundise izigwebo zako." 
Psalms119:109 Ubomi bam busesandleni sam futi: umteto wako andiwulibali noko. 
Psalms119:110 Abakohlakeleyo bandibekele umgibe: andilahlekene nengxelo zako noko. 
Psalms119:111 Nditabatile izinqi̔nelo zako zibe lilifa lam kude kube ngunapakade; ngokuba ziluvuyiso lwentliziyo yam. 
Psalms119:112 Nditobele intliziyo yam ukwenza imimiso yako ngamaxesha onke, kude kube sekupeleni." 
Psalms119:113 Amatindala ndiyawatiya; kodwa umteto wako ndiyawutanda. 
Psalms119:114 Nguwe indawo yam yokufihlela nekaka lam: ndiyatembela ezwini lako. 
Psalms119:115 Mkani kum, nina benzi bokungalungileyo! ngokuba ndiya kubamba imiyalelo yotixo wam." 
Psalms119:116 Ndisekele njengokwelizwi lako, ndize ndidle ubomi: zungandidanisi ngokwetemba lam." 
Psalms119:117 Ndixase, wena! kukona ndiya kugcineka: ndandiya kugqala imimiso yako futi." 
Psalms119:118 Ubalahlile bonke abalahlekana nemimiso yako: ngokuba inkohliso yabo iyinto engendawo. 
Psalms119:119 Bonke abakohlakeleyo bomhlaba uyabapelisa njeng entlenga: ngako oko ndiyatanda izinqi̔nelo zako. 
Psalms119:120 Inyama yam iyangcangcazela ngokwoyika wena: ngokuba ndiyoyika imigwebo yako. 
Psalms119:121 Ndenzile ubugwebo nobulungisa: zungandilahleli ebabandezelini bam. 
Psalms119:122 Yiba ngumbambiseli wesicaka sako ngako okulungileyo: abaner̔atshi mabangandibandezeli. 
Psalms119:123 Amehlo am ayapelela usindiso lwako, nelizwi lobulungisa bako." 
Psalms119:124 Yenzela isicaka sako njengokwobubele bako, undifundise imimiso yako." 
Psalms119:125 Ndisisicaka sako; ndiqondise, ndandiya kuzazi izinqi̔nelo zako." 
Psalms119:126 Selilixesha lokuba kusebenze uyehova; ngokuba bewapule umteto wako. 
Psalms119:127 Ngako oko ndiyatanda imiyalelo yako pezu kwegolide; ewe, pezu kwegolide ecokisiweyo." 
Psalms119:128 Ngako oko zonke ingxelo zako ngento zonke ndivumele ukulunga kwazo: kodwa zonke indlela zobuxoki ndizitiyile. 
Psalms119:129 Izinqi̔nelo zako zingummangaliso; ngako oko umpefumlo wam uyazibamba. 
Psalms119:130 Ukutyila kwelizwi lako kuyakanyisa; kuyaqondisa izidenge. 
Psalms119:131 Ndavula umlomo wam, ndabefula; ngokuba ndibe ndilangazelela imiyalelo yako." 
Psalms119:132 Beka kum, undipate ngofefe, njengesiko kwabo batanda igama lako." 
Psalms119:133 Lungisa amanyatela am ngelizwi lako: makungabi nabukosi pezu kwam nanye inkohlakalo. 
Psalms119:134 Ndikulule ekubandezeleni kwabantu; ndandiya kugcina ingxelo zako. 
Psalms119:135 Ubuso bako bukanyise pezu kwesicaka sako, undifundise imimiso yako." 
Psalms119:136 Imijelo yamanzi iyehla emehlweni am, ngokuba bengagcini umteto wako." 
Psalms119:137 Ulungile wena, Yehova! yinto efanelekileyo nezigwebo zako." 
Psalms119:138 Izinqi̔nelo zako, o zixelileyo, zinobulungisa, zinenyaniso kakulu." 
Psalms119:139 Ubukwele bam bundigqibile, ngokuba intshaba zam zilibele amazwi ako." 
Psalms119:140 Ilizwi lako licocekile kanye; kukona isicaka sako silitandayo. 
Psalms119:141 Ndimncinane, ndideliwe; andilibali ingxelo zako noko." 
Psalms119:142 Ubulungisa bako bubulungisa obungunapakade, nomteto wako uyinyaniso." 
Psalms119:143 Ndihlelwe bubunzima noxinezeko: imiyalelo yako iluyolo lwam noko. 
Psalms119:144 Ubulungisa bezinqi̔nelo zako bungunapakade: ndiqondise, ndandiya kudla ubomi." 
Psalms119:145 Ndabiza ngentliziyo yonke; ndipendule, Yehova! ndiya kugcina imimiso yako." 
Psalms119:146 Ndabizela kuwe; ndisindise, ndandiya kugcina izinqi̔nelo zako." 
Psalms119:147 Ndapangela isifingo sokusa, ndadanduluka: ndatembela ezwini lako." 
Psalms119:148 Amehlo am ayapangela amavaṙasho asebusuku, ndize ndicinge ilizwi lako." 
Psalms119:149 Yiva ilizwi lam njengokwobubele bako: Yehova! ndipilise njengokwogwebo lwako. 
Psalms119:150 Basondele abo baputumayo ubumenemene: bakude nomteto wako. 
Psalms119:151 Ukufupi wena, Yehova! yonke imiyalelo yako iyinyaniso." 
Psalms119:152 Kwa kudala ndikwazile ngazo izinqi̔nelo zako ukuba uzimisile kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms119:153 Bona ubunzima bam, undihlangule: ngokuba ndingalibali umteto wako." 
Psalms119:154 Tetelela ityala lam, undikulule: ndipilise njengokwelizwi lako." 
Psalms119:155 Usindiso lukude nabakohlakeleyo; ngokuba bengafuni imimiso yako. 
Psalms119:156 Izibele zako zininzi, Yehova! ndipilise njengokwezigwebo zako." 
Psalms119:157 Baninzi abatshutshisi bam nentshaba zam: andishenxi ezinqi̔nelweni zako noko. 
Psalms119:158 Ndabona abo benza ngobuxoki, ndadela; ngokuba bengaligcinanga ilizwi lako." 
Psalms119:159 Bona ukuba ingxelo zako ndizitandile: ndipilise, Yehova! njengokwobubele bako." 
Psalms119:160 Ilizwi lako liyinyaniso lipela; zonke izigwebo zako ezilungileyo zingunapakade. 
Psalms119:161 Inkosi zanditshutshisa kungeko nto: kodwa intliziyo yam iloyikile ilizwi lako. 
Psalms119:162 Ndiyavuyela ilizwi lako, njengofumene amaxoba amakulu." 
Psalms119:163 Ubuxoki ndibutiyile, ndabuzonda; kodwa umteto wako ndiwutandile." 
Psalms119:164 Kasixe̔nxe ngamini nye ndiyakudumisa ngenxa yezigwebo zako ezilungileyo. 
Psalms119:165 Banoxolo olukulu abo batanda umteto wako: akuko siku̔bekiso kubo. 
Psalms119:166 Nditembele usindiso lwako, Yehova! nemiyalelo yako ndiyenzile." 
Psalms119:167 Umpefumlo wam uzigcinile izinqi̔nelo zako; ndiyazitanda kakulu kanjalo. 
Psalms119:168 Ndizigcinile ingxelo zako nezinqi̔nelo zako: ngokuba zonke indlela zam zipambi kwako. 
Psalms119:169 Isikalo sam masisondele pambi kwako, Yehova! ndiqondise njengokwelizwi lako." 
Psalms119:170 Isikungo sam masize pambi kwako: ndihlangule njengokwelizwi lako. 
Psalms119:171 Umlomo wam uya kupimisela indumiso, nxa undifundisile imimiso yako." 
Psalms119:172 Ulwimi lwam luya kuhlabela ngelizwi lako: ngokuba yonke imiyalelo yako ibulungisa. 
Psalms119:173 Isandla sako masindincede: ngokuba ndiziqashile ingxelo zako. 
Psalms119:174 Ndikanukile usindiso lwako, Yehova! kanjalo umteto wako uluyolo lwam." 
Psalms119:175 Umpefumlo wam maupile, uze ukudumise; ziti izigwebo zako zindincede." 
Psalms119:176 Ndadungudela njengegusha elahlekileyo; funa isicaka sako; ngokuba ndingalibali imiyalelo yako. 
Psalms120:1 EKUBANDEZELWENI kwam ndabiza kuyehova, wandipendula ke." 
Psalms120:2 Yehova! hlangula umpefumlo wam emlonyeni wobuxoki, nas elulwimini olukohlisayo." 
Psalms120:3 Yinto nina eya kunikwa kuwe? yinto nina eya kwongezwa kuwe, lulwimindini olukohlisayo?" 
Psalms120:4 Intolo ezibukali zegoṙa, kunye namalahle emiti yeroteme." 
Psalms120:5 Hai ubunzima bam, ndingowasemzini kwa‐Mesheki nje, ndihleli eziutenteni zakwa‐Kedare!" 
Psalms120:6 Kakulu umpefumlo wam uhleli nolutiyayo uxolo. 
Psalms120:7 Ndingowoxolo mna; kodwa nxa nditetayo, sebengabemfazwe bona." 
Psalms121:1 AMEHLO am ndowapakamisela ezintabeni, apo luya kuvela kona uncedo lwam." 
Psalms121:2 Uncedo lwam luvela kuyehova, owenza izulu nomhlaba." 
Psalms121:3 Akayi kuvumela ukuba kushukunyiswe unyawo lwako: okugcinayo akayi kwozela. 
Psalms121:4 Kangela, ogcina u‐Sirayeli akayi kwozela, angalali nobutongo." 
Psalms121:5 Nguyehova okugcinayo: uyehova ungumtunzi wako kwesokunene sako. 
Psalms121:6 Ilanga aliyi kukubeta emini, nenyanga ebusuku." 
Psalms121:7 Uyehova wokugcina ebubini bonke; wogcina umpefumlo wako. 
Psalms121:8 Uyehova wogcina ukupuma kwako nokungena kwako, kwa kaloku nje, nakude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms122:1 NDAVUYA bakuti kum: Masiye endlwini kayehova. 
Psalms122:2 Inyawo zetu zimi emasangweni ako, Yerusaleme!"
