Psalms122:3 I‐Yerusaleme yakiwe njengesixeko esibandakanyekile kunye: 
Psalms122:4 apo izizwe zinyukela kona, izizwe zikayehova, ngesinqi̔nelo ko‐Sirayeli, ukuya kubulela egameni likayehova." 
Psalms122:5 Ngokuba apo kuhleli iterone zokugweba, iterone zendlu ka‐Davide." 
Psalms122:6 Celelani i‐Yerusaleme uxolo: boba sekwonwabeni abo bakutandayo. 
Psalms122:7 Makubeko uxolo pakati kwendonga zako, n okwonwaba pakati kwenqaba zako." 
Psalms122:8 Ngenxa yabazalwana bam nabahlobo bam, ndiya kuteta ke, nditi: Uxolo malube pakati kwako." 
Psalms122:9 Ngenxa yendlu kayehova, katixo wetu, ndokufunela okulungileyo." 
Psalms123:1 NDIPAKAMISELE kuwe amehlo am, wena uhleliyo ezulwini!" 
Psalms123:2 Bona ke, njengamehlo ezicaka ngasesandleni senkosi zazo, na njengamehlo esicakakazi ngasesandleni senkosikazi yaso, anjalo amehlo etu ngakuye uyehova, utixo wetu, ade abe nofefe pezu kwetu." 
Psalms123:3 Yiba nofefe kuti, Yehova! yiba nofefe kuti: ngokuba sikolisile kakulu ukudelwa." 
Psalms123:4 Umpefumlo wetu ukolisile kakulu ukuhlekwa ngabo bangenakukatala, n okudelwa ngabo baner̔atshi." 
Psalms124:1 UKUBA ebenge nguyehova obeko kuti, (makatsho ke u‐Sirayeli,)" 
Psalms124:2 ukuba ebenge nguyehova obeko kuti, nxa basisukelayo abantu;" 
Psalms124:3 ngebete oko basiginya sihleli, nxa umsindo wabo wabuvuta ngakuti:" 
Psalms124:4 oko amanzi ngeesintywilisile; umsinga ngeudlule pezu kwompefumlo wetu: 
Psalms124:5 oko ngeedlule pezu kwompefumlo wetu amanzi akukumeleyo. 
Psalms124:6 Makabongwe uyehova, ongasinikelanga emazinyweni abo sibe yinto yokuqwengwa." 
Psalms124:7 Umpefumlo wetu usindile njengentaka esigwini sabatiyeli: isigu sapukile, sasinda ke tina." 
Psalms124:8 Uncedo lwetu lusegameni likayehova, owenza izulu nomhlaba." 
Psalms125:1 ABO batembela kuyehova banjengentaba ye‐Ziyone, engenakushukunyiswa, ihleli ngonapakade nje." 
Psalms125:2 Intaba ziyangqonga i‐Yerusaleme: kwa njalo uyehova uyangqonga abantu bake, kwa kaloku nje, nakude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms125:3 Ngokuba intonga yabakohlakeleyo ingayi kupumla eqashisweni labalungileyo; hleze abalungileyo bolule izandla zabo ngasenkohlakalweni. 
Psalms125:4 Yenza okulungileyo, Yehova! kwabalungileyo, nakwabo balungisekile ezintliziyweni zabo." 
Psalms125:5 Abo bapambukelayo ngasezindleleni zabo ezigoso, uyehova uya kubemkisa ndawonye nabenzi benkohlakalo: kodwa uxolo lwoba pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms126:1 NXA uyehova ebebuyisa ukutinjwa kwe‐Ziyone, besinjengabo bapupayo." 
Psalms126:2 Wandula umlomo wetu wazala kuhleka, nolwimi lwetu lwazala kugcoba: bandula bati pakati kwabaheyideni: Uyehova ubenzele into ezinkulu." 
Psalms126:3 Uyehova usenzele into ezinkulu; singabavuyayo ngoko. 
Psalms126:4 Buyisa ukutinjwa kwetu, Yehova! njengemilanjana esesuyide." 
Psalms126:5 Abo bahlwayelayo ngenyembezi, baya kuvuna ngomgcobo." 
Psalms126:6 Opumayo ehamba elila, etwele intlwayelelo yembewu, wobuya eze ngokugcoba, etwele izitungu zake." 
Psalms127:1 NXA uyehova angaki indlu, bofumana basebenze abo bayakayo; nxa uyehova angagcini isixeko, wofumana apapame umlindi." 
Psalms127:2 Nofumana nivuke kwa kusasa, nihlale kude kube sebusuku, nidle isonka sentlungu: kwa njalo uyanika umtandwa wake ubutongo." 
Psalms127:3 Kangela, abantwana balilifa livela kuyehova; isixakato sesizalo singumvuzo wake." 
Psalms127:4 Njengentolo esandleni segoṙa, banjalo abantwana bobutsha bomntu." 
Psalms127:5 Hai itamsanqa lendoda empongolo uzele ngabo! abayi kudaniswa, nxa baya kuteta nentshaba esangweni." 
Psalms128:1 HAI itamsanqa losukuba emoyika uyehova, ohambayo ezindleleni zake!" 
Psalms128:2 Ngokuba uya kudla inzuzo yezandla zako; woba netamsanqa, kwakuya kulunga kuwe." 
Psalms128:3 Umfazi wako woba njengomti weveyine oqa̔mileyo, emacaleni endlu yako; abantwana bako boba njengemitana yomnquma, bengqonga itafile yako." 
Psalms128:4 Kangela, kukwa njalo ke iya kutanyusanqeliswa indoda emoyikayo uyehova." 
Psalms128:5 Uyehova wokutamsanqelisa kwa se‐Ziyone; wauya kubona ukulunga kwe‐Yerusaleme yonke imihla yokudla kwako ubomi. 
Psalms128:6 Ewe, uya kubona abantwana babautwana bako, kwa n oxolo pezu kwo‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms129:1 KUKANINZI bendibandezele kwa sebutsheni bam; (makatsho ke u‐Sirayeli;) 
Psalms129:2 kukaninzi bendibandezele kwa sebutsheni bam; abandoyisanga noko. 
Psalms129:3 Abapulushi bapulusha emhlana wam; benza mide imiqela yabo. 
Psalms129:4 Uyehova ulungile: uzitshecile intambo zabakohlakeleyo. 
Psalms129:5 Mabadaniswe, banqandelwe ngomva, bonke abo batiya i‐Ziyone." 
Psalms129:6 Mababe njengenca pezu kwezindlu, ebunayo ingekancotulwa;" 
Psalms129:7 ati umsiki angazalisi isandla sake ngayo, nobopayo izitungu angazalisi isifuba sake;" 
Psalms129:8 bangatsho nabo badlulayo ukuti: Isitamsanqeliso sikayehova masibe pezu kwenu; siyanitamsanqelisa egameni likayehova. 
Psalms130:1 KWA sezinzulwini ndibizile kuwe, Yehova!" 
Psalms130:2 Nkosi! yiva ilizwi lam: mazibe indlebe zako zipulapuleka ezwini lezikungo zam. 
Psalms130:3 Nxa wena, Yehova! ubuya kunakana izikohlakalo, ngekuma banina, Nkosi?" 
Psalms130:4 Kodwa kukuwe ukuxolela, ukuze ube nokwoyikwa." 
Psalms130:5 Ndiyalinda uyehova, uyalinda umpefumlo wam, nasezwini lake ndiyatemba." 
Psalms130:6 Umpefumlo wam ulind ela inkosi, ngapezu kwabalindi bokusa, belindela ukusa." 
Psalms130:7 Temba, Sirayeli! kuyehova: ngokuba kuyehova kuko ububele, nakuye kuko inkululo eninzi." 
Psalms130:8 Waeya kukulula u‐Sirayeli kuzo zonke izikohlakalo zake. 
Psalms131:1 YEHOVA! intliziyo yam ayir̔atshile, namehlo am akapakamile: andihambi nokuhamba ezintweni ezinkulu, nasezintweni ezindikohlayo ngokuba ngummangaliso." 
Psalms131:2 Ngenyaniso ndilungiselele ndatutuzela umpefumlo wam, njengomntwana okunyulweyo kunina! umpefumlo wam pakati kwam unjengomntwana okunyulweyo." 
Psalms131:3 Temba, Sirayeli! kuyehova, kwa kaloku nje, nakude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms132:1 YEHOVA! kumbula u‐Davide, nako konke ukubandezelwa kwake;" 
Psalms132:2 okokuba wafunga uyehova, wenza isibambiso kusomandla ka‐Yakobi:" 
Psalms132:3 Ngenyaniso andiyi kungena ententeni yendlu yam, andiyi kunyukela ekoyeni yesilili sam," 
Psalms132:4 andiyi kunika amehlo am ubutongo, n enkope zam ukwozela," 
Psalms132:5 ndide ndifumanele uyehova indawo, nosomandla ka‐Yakobi itabanakele." 
Psalms132:6 Kangela, sayiva e‐Eferata; sayifumana ezindle zasehlatini." 
Psalms132:7 Masingene etabanakeleni yake, sibedeshe esitulweni senyawo zake." 
Psalms132:8 Pakama, Yehova! uze ekupumleni kwako, wena netyeya yamandla ako:" 
Psalms132:9 abaperisite bako mabambate ubulungisa, nabangcwele bako mabadanduluke ngovuyo." 
Psalms132:10 Ngenxa ka‐Davide, isicaka sako, zungasongi ubuso bomtanjiswa wako." 
Psalms132:11 Uyehova ufungile ngenyaniso ku‐Davide; akayi kuguquka kuyo: owenzalo yomzimba wako ndiya kumbeka eteroneni yako. 
Psalms132:12 Nxa onyana bako baya kugcina ucebano lwam, nesinqi̔nelo sam endiya kubafundisa sona, onyana babo nabo bohlala eteroneni yako kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms132:13 Ngokuba uyehova eqashile i‐Ziyone; uyinqwenele ibe yindawo yake yokuhlala, esiti:" 
Psalms132:14 Yeyokupumla kwam le kude kube ngunapakade: ndohlala apa, ngokuba ndiyinqwenele." 
Psalms132:15 Ukudla kwayo ndokutamsanqelisa kakulu; amahlwempu ayo ndowakolisa ngesonka. 
Psalms132:16 Kanjalo abaperisite bayo ndobavatisa ngosindiso; nabangcwele bayo bodanduluka kakulu ngovuyo. 
Psalms132:17 Apo ndiya kuhlumisa upondo luka‐Davide: ndilungisele umtanjiswa wam isibane. 
Psalms132:18 Intshaba zake ndozivatisa ngedano; kodwa pezu kwake siya kutyatyamba isitsaba sake. 
Psalms133:1 KANGELA, ukulunga ke nokuba mnandi ke kwokuhlala kwabazalwana kwa ndawonye!" 
Psalms133:2 Kunjengeoli enqabileyo pezu kwentloko, eyehlela eludevini, eludevini luka‐Arone; eyehlela ebenqweni lengubo zake:" 
Psalms133:3 kunjengombete wase‐Heremone, nanjeng obusihla pezu kwentaba ze‐Ziyone: ngokuba apo uyehova waxela kubeko itamsanqa, kwa ukudliwa kwobomi kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms134:1 KANGELA, bongani uyehova, nonke nina zicaka zikayehova, enimiyo endlwini kayehova ebusuku!" 
Psalms134:2 Pakamisani izandla zenu endaweni eyingcwele, nimbonge uyehova." 
Psalms134:3 Uyehova wokutamsanqelisa kwa se‐Ziyone, owenzayo izulu nomhlaba." 
Psalms135:1 DUMISANI uyehova! — Dumisani igama likayehova; dumisani, nina zicaka zikayehova!" 
Psalms135:2 nina nimiyo endlwini kayehova, nas emakusini endlu yotixo wetu!" 
Psalms135:3 Dumisani uyehova, ngokuba uyehova elungile; culani kwigama lake, ngokuba limnandi." 
Psalms135:4 Ngokuba uyehova eqashile u‐Yakobi abe yeyake, n o‐Sirayeli abe yinto enqabileyo kuye." 
Psalms135:5 Ngokuba ndisazi ukuba uyehova umkulu, n okuba inkosi yetu ipezu kwotixo bonke." 
Psalms135:6 Konke owakutandayo uyehova ukwenzile, ezulwini nasemhlabeni, elwandle nasezinzulwini zonke." 
Psalms135:7 Uyenyusa amafu esipelweni somhlaba; uyenza imibane kunye nemvula; uyavelisa umoya ezimbekelweni zake. 
Psalms135:8 Owabeta amazibulo ase‐Jipete, nawabantu nawenkomo:" 
Psalms135:9 watuma imiqondiso nemimangaliso pakati kwako, Jipete! pezu kwo‐Faro, napezu kwazo zonke izicaka zake." 
Psalms135:10 Owabeta izizwe ezikulu, wabulala okumkani abanamandla:" 
Psalms135:11 u‐Sihone ukumkani waba‐Amori, no‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane, nabo bonke ubukumkani base‐Kanane;" 
Psalms135:12 wanika umhlaba wabo ube lilifa, ube lilifa ko‐Sirayeli abantu bake." 
Psalms135:13 Igama lako, Yehova! lingunapakade; isikumbuzo sako, Yehova! sikwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Psalms135:14 Ngokuba uyehova eya kutetelela abantu bake, abe nosizi pezu kwezicaka zake." 
Psalms135:15 Izitixo zabaheyideni zezesilivere negolide, umsebenzi wezandla zabantu." 
Psalms135:16 Zinemilomo, kanti aziteti; zinamehlo, kanti aziboni;" 
Psalms135:17 zinendlebe, kanti aziva; kanjako akuko umpefumlo emilonyeni yazo." 
Psalms135:18 Abo bazenzayo bayafana nazo; nabo bonke abatembela kuzo. 
Psalms135:19 Bongani uyehova, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! bongani uyehova, ndlu ka‐Arone!" 
Psalms135:20 bongani uyehova, ndlu ka‐Levi! bongani uyehova, nina nimoyikayo uyehova!" 
Psalms135:21 Makabongwe uyehova kwa se‐Ziyone, omiyo e‐Yerusaleme. — Dumisani uyehova." 
Psalms136:1 BULELANI kuyehova, ngokuba elungile: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade." 
Psalms136:2 Bulelani kutixo katixo: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:3 Bulelani kwinkosi kankosi: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:4 Kwa kuye owenza yedwa imimangaliso emikulu: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:5 Kwa kuye owenza izulu ngengqondo: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:6 Kwa kuye owatwabulula umhlaba pezu kwamanzi: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:7 Kwa kuye owenza izikanyiso ezikulu: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:8 ilanga lokupata emini: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:9 inyanga nenkwenkwezi zokupata ebusuku: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:10 Kwa kuye owabeta ama‐Jipete emazibulweni awo: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:11 waza waku̔pa u‐Sirayeli pakati kwawo: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:12 ngesandla esomeleleyo, nangengalo eyolulweyo: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade." 
Psalms136:13 Kwa kuye owahlula ulwandle olubomvu lube zizahluko: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:14 waza waweza u‐Sirayeli pakati kwalo: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:15 kodwa wavutulula u‐Faro nempi yake elwandle olubomvu: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:16 Kwa kuye owakokela abantu bake entlango: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:17 Kwa kuye owabeta okumkani abakulu: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:18 nowabulala okumkani abadumileyo: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:19 u‐Sihone ukumkani waba‐Amori: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:20 no‐Hogi ukumkani we‐Bashane: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:21 wanika umhlaba wabo ube lilifa: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:22 ube lilifa ku‐Sirayeli isicaka sake: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:23 Osikumbuleyo ebupantsini betu: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade: 
Psalms136:24 wasikulula ezintshabeni zetu: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:25 Owamkelisa yonke inyama ukudla: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms136:26 Bulelani kuye utixo wezulu: ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade. 
Psalms137:1 NGASEMILANJENI yase‐Babilone, kwa lapo sahlala pantsi ke, salila nokulila, sakukumbula i‐Ziyone." 
Psalms137:2 Ikinore zetu sazixo̔ma pezu kweminculuba pakati kwayo. 
Psalms137:3 Ngokuba kwa lapo abo basitimbileyo babiza kuti amazwi eculo; nabo basipangileyo babiza kuti umgcobo, besiti: Sivumeleni kwamaculo ase‐Ziyone." 
Psalms137:4 Soti nina ukuvuma iculo likayehova ezweni lasemzini? 
Psalms137:5 Nxa ndikulibalayo, Yerusaleme! masilibale isandla sam soknnene." 
Psalms137:6 Nxa ndingakukumbuliyo, ulwimi lwam maluti nama ekuhlangubo lam; nxa i‐Yerusaleme ndingayibeki pezulu ekuvuyeni kwam." 
Psalms137:7 Kumbula, Yehova! onyana baka‐Edome emhleni we‐Yerusaleme; abati: Hlubani, hlubani, kude kube sekusekweni kwayo." 
Psalms137:8 Wena ntombi yase‐Babilone, oza kucitakaliswa! woba netamsanqa opindezela kuwe ukwenza kwako owabukwenza kuti." 
Psalms137:9 Woba netamsanqa ozibamba intsana zako azityumze ngasematyeni. 
Psalms138:1 NDOKUDUMISA ngayo yonke intliziyo yam: ebusweni babo otixo ndoculela wena. 
Psalms138:2 Ndobedesha ngasetempileni yako eyingcwele, ndidumise igama lako ngenxa yobubele bako nangenxa yenyaniso yako: ngokuba ilizwi lako ulenzile elikulu ngapezu kwalo lonke igama lako." 
Psalms138:3 Emhleni ndabizayo wandula wandipendula; wandomeleza ngamandla empefumlweni wam. 
Psalms138:4 Bonke okumkani bomhlaba bokudumisa, Yehova! bakuba bevile amazwi omlomo wako." 
Psalms138:5 Ewe, bovuma ngazo indlela zikayehova: ngokuba bukulu ubungcwalisa bukayehova." 
Psalms138:6 Nakuba epakamile uyehova, wobona abapantsi noko; kodwa abaner̔atshi uyabazi ekude." 
Psalms138:7 Nxa ndihamba pakati kwobunzima, wondipilisa; uya kwolula isandla sako ngakuwo umsindo wentshaba zam, sasiya kundisindisa isandla sako sokunene." 
Psalms138:8 Uyehova uya kufeza okungam: ububele bako, Yehova! bungunapakade; zungayeki imisebenzi yezako izandla." 
Psalms139:1 YEHOVA! undipengulule, wandazi." 
Psalms139:2 Uyazi ukuhlala pantsi kwam nokusuka kwam: inkumbulo yam uyayiqonda ukude. 
Psalms139:3 Uyabenca ukuhamba kwam nokulala kwam; uyazana nazo zonke indlela zam. 
Psalms139:4 Nxa kunge ka biko lizwi elulwimini lwam, bona ke, ugqibele ukulazi, Yehova!" 
Psalms139:5 Undivimbele nasemva napambili, wabeka isandla sako pezu kwam." 
Psalms139:6 Ukwazi okunjalo kundoyisile ngokuba ngummangaliso; kupezulu, ndikohliwe ku ku fikela." 
Psalms139:7 Ndoya pina ukumka kumoya wako? ndoya pina ukubaleka ebusweni bako? 
Psalms139:8 Nxa ndinyukela ezulwini, ukona; nxa ndizandlalela ehadesi, nanku u kona." 
Psalms139:9 Nxa nditabata amapiko okusa, ndihlale ekupeleni kwolwandle," 
Psalms139:10 kwa kona isandla sako sondikokela, nesokunene sako sondibamba." 
Psalms139:11 Ukuba nditi: Ngenyaniso ubumnyama buya kundiselela; kwa ubusuku boba kukukanya ngakum. 
Psalms139:12 Ewe, ubumnyama abumnyama pambi kwako; ubusuku buyakanya njengemini: njengokuba bunjalo ubumnyama kunjalo ukukanya kuwe." 
Psalms139:13 Ngokuba wena ufuyile izintso zam; wandigubungela esizalweni sikama̔. 
Psalms139:14 Ndokudumisa; ngokuba ngendawo eyoyikekileyo ndenziwe ngokungummangaliso: imisebenzi yako yeyokutelwa nqa; oko umpefumlo wam uyakwazi kakulu. 
Psalms139:15 Upahla lwam belungasitele kuwe, okuya ndandisenziwa emfihlekweni, ndacikizwa emazantsi omhlaba." 
Psalms139:16 Amehlo ako abona imbumbulo yam ingekalungiswa; nasencwadini yako bekuba̔lwa onke amalungu am, n emihla abedalwa ngayo, nxa bekungeko nalinye pakati kwawo." 
Psalms139:17 Kanjalo kum zinqabile kangakananina inkumbulo zako, Tixo! likulu kangakananina inani lazo!" 
Psalms139:18 Nxa ndibe ndiya kuzibala, ’zigqitisile nentlabati ngokuba zininzi: nxa ndivukayo, ndisenawe." 
Psalms139:19 Ngenyaniso uya kubulala abakohlakeleyo, Tixo! Mkani kum ngoko, nina bantu begazi!" 
Psalms139:20 Ngokuba beteta ngawe ngobumenemene; intshaba zako zifumana zibiza igama lako. 
Psalms139:21 Andibatiyi na, Yehova! abakutiyayo? nabo basukela ngakuwe andibadeli na?" 
Psalms139:22 Ndiyabatiya ngentiyo efezekileyo; bazintshaba kum. 
Psalms139:23 Ndipengulule, Tixo! uze uyazi intliziyo yam; ndilinge, uze uzazi izicingo zam;" 
Psalms139:24 ubone nokuba kuko kum indlela engendawo, undikokele endleleni engunapakade." 
Psalms140:1 NDIKULULE, Yehova! kumntu ongalungileyo; ndilondoloze kwindoda yobudlwengu;" 
Psalms140:2 abaqingayo ububi entliziyweni: imihla yonke bayabutelana befuna imfazwe. 
Psalms140:3 Babazile ilwimi zabo njengenyoka; ubuhlungu beṙamba busemilonyeni yabo. Sela. 
Psalms140:4 Ndigcine, Yehova! ezandleni zokohlakeleyo; ndilondoloze kwindoda yobudlwengu; abaqingileyo ukusunduzela pantsi amanyatela am." 
Psalms140:5 Abaner̔atshi bandifihlele isibata, nentambo; bandlale utambo ngasecaleni lendlela; bandibekele imigibe. Sela." 
Psalms140:6 Ndati kuyehova: Ungutixo wam wena. Pulapula. Yehova! ilizwi lezikungo zam. 
Psalms140:7 Yehova oyinkosi, mandla osindiswa lwam! wagubungela intloko yam ngemini yokulwa." 
Psalms140:8 Yehova! zungavumeli inkanuko zokohlakeleyo; zungahambisi iqinga lake; hleze bazipakamise. Sela. 
Psalms140:9 Abayintloko yabandingqongayo ububi beyabo imilomo bobagubungela. 
Psalms140:10 Amalahle esitsha aya kuhliswa pezu kwabo: baya kuposwa emlilweni; emibitini, bangabi sabuya bavuke." 
Psalms140:11 Intlebi ayiyi kuqiniselwa emhlabeni: isidlwengu sozingelwa yingozi ide iseyelisele. 
Psalms140:12 Ndiyazi ukuba uyehova uya kulungisa ityala lehlwempu, n ebango labasweleyo." 
Psalms140:13 Ngenyaniso abalungileyo baya kubulela egameni lako; abayinene bohlala ebusweni bako. 
Psalms141:1 Yehova! ndiyabiza kuwe; kauleza ukuza kum: pulapula ilizwi lam, ndakubiza kuwe." 
Psalms141:2 Umtandazo wam maulungiselelwe pambi kwako njeng esiqu̔miso; n okupakanyiswa kwezandla zam njeng omnikelo wokuhlwa. 
Psalms141:3 Misa umlindo, Yehova! ngasemlonyeni wam; gcina umnyango womlomo wam." 
Psalms141:4 Intliziyo yam ungayitobeli entweni engalungileyo, ukwenza izenzo ezikohlakeleyo kunye namadoda akwenzayo okungendawo: mandingadli nezimnandi zawo." 
Psalms141:5 Olungileyo makandibete, kwoba bubele oko; makandohlwaye kanjalo, kwoba yioli yentloko, e ngayi kwaliwa yintloko yam: ngokuba kuseko nomtandazo wam ngasebubini bawo." 
Psalms141:6 Abagwebi bawo bakahlelwa pantsi emacaleni eliwa; kwaza kwaviwa amazwi am, ukuba amnandi." 
Psalms141:7 Amatambo etu atiwe sa ngasemlonyeni wencw̔aba, njengokungati bekunqunyulwe kwacandwa inkuni emhlabeni." 
Psalms141:8 Koko amehlo am angakuwe, Yehova oyinkosi! nditembile wena; zungahlubi umpefumlo wam." 
Psalms141:9 Ndigcine ezibateni banditiyele ngazo, nasemigibeni yabenzi bokungendawo." 
Psalms141:10 Abakohlakeleyo mabawe kwezabo intambo, nxa ndidlula kanye mna." 
Psalms142:1 NDALILELA kuyehova ngelizwi lam; ndataṙuzisa kuyehova ngelizwi lam. 
Psalms142:2 Ndapalaza isikalazo sam ebusweni bake; ndashumayela ubunzima bam pambi kwake. 
Psalms142:3 Nxa umoya wam ubucubukile pakati kwam, wandula wayazi wena indlela yam. Endleleni endihamba ngayo, bandifihlele isibata." 
Psalms142:4 Kangela ngasekunene, ubone; kodwa akuko mntu ondaziyo: ndibujelwe yindawo yokupepela; akuko mntu okatalela umpefumlo wam." 
Psalms142:5 Ndalilela kuwe, Yehova! ndati: Nguwe indawo yam yokupepela, n esabelwa sam emhlabeni wabapilileyo." 
Psalms142:6 Pulapula isikalo sam; ngokuba nditotyelwe pantsi kakulu: ndihlangule kwabanditshutshisayo; ngokuba bendigqitisile ngamandla. 
Psalms142:7 Ku̔pa umpefumlo wam entolongweni, ndize ndidumise igama lako: abalungileyo baya kundipahla, nxa uya kundivuza." 
Psalms143:1 YIVA umtandazo wam, Yehova! beka indlebe ekutaṙuziseni kwam: ndipendule ngenyaniseko yako na ngobulungisa bako." 
Psalms143:2 Uze ungangeni ekugwebeni kwisicaka sako; ngokuba kungalungile ebusweni bako namnye ohleliyo. 
Psalms143:3 Ngokuba utshaba lutshutshisile umpefumlo wam; luncinezele ubomi bam ngasemhlabeni; lundihlalisile ezindaweni ezimnyama, njengabakade befile." 
Psalms143:4 Ngako umoya wam ucubukile pakati kwam; intliziyo yam imatile pakati kwam. 
Psalms143:5 Ndiyakumbula imihla yakudala; ndiyacinga yonke imisebenzi yako; ndiyacamanga umsebenzi wezandla zako. 
Psalms143:6 Izandla zam ndiyazolulela kuwe; umpefumlo wam unjengelizwe elomileyo ukunxan elwa wena. Sela. 
Psalms143:7 Ndipendule kamsinyane, Yehova! umoya wam uyapela: zungandifihleli ubuso bako, hleze ndifane nabahlele esihogweni." 
Psalms143:8 Ndivise ububele bako kwa kusasa; ngokuba nditembele kuwe: ndazise indlela endiya kuhamba ngayo; ngokuba ndipakamisele kuwe umpefumlo wam. 
Psalms143:9 Ndikulule ezintshabeni zam, Yehova! ndiyazimela kuwe." 
Psalms143:10 Ndifundise ukwenza ngentando yako; ngokuba ungutixo wam: umoya wako ulungile; ndikokele ezweni elilungeleleneyo. 
Psalms143:11 Ngenxa yegama lako, Yehova! ndipilise: ngenxa yobulungisa bako ku̔pa umpefumlo wam ekubandezelweni." 
Psalms143:12 Nangobubele bako banqamle intshaba zam, utshabalalise bonke abo babandezela umpefumlo wam: ngokuba ndisisicaka sako." 
Psalms144:1 MAKABONGWE uyehova, ilityekazi lam; ofundisa izandla zam imfazwe, n eminwe yam ukulwa;" 
Psalms144:2 ububele bam, nenqaba yam; inyango yam, nomkululi wam; ikaka lam, nonditemba yena; obeyisayo abantu bam pantsi kwam." 
Psalms144:3 Yehova! uyinto nina umntu, lento umaziyo? uyinto nina unyana womntu, lento umnyamekelayo?" 
Psalms144:4 Umntu uyafana nokungento; imihla yake injengesitunzi esimkayo. 
Psalms144:5 Yehova! toba izulu lako, uhle; cukumisa intaba, ziqu̔me umsi ke." 
Psalms144:6 Banekisa imibane, ubacite; tola ngentolo zako, ubapitizelise." 
Psalms144:7 Yolulisa isandla sako kwa pezulu; ndikulule, undihlangule emanzini amaninzi, esandleni sabasemzini;" 
Psalms144:8 abamlomo uteta okungendawo, nesokunene sabo sesokunene sobuxoki." 
Psalms144:9 Tixo! iculo elitsha ndolivuma kuwe; ngenebele entambo zilishumi ndoculela wena: 
Psalms144:10 obanikayo ulwoyiso okumkani; okululayo u‐Davide, isicaka sake, esiṙeleni esenzakalisayo." 
Psalms144:11 Ndikulule, undihlangule esandleni sabasemzini, abamlomo uteta okungendawo, nesokunene sabo, sesokunene sobuxoki:" 
Psalms144:12 ukuba onyana betu babe njengezityalo bekulisiwe ebutsheni babo; ziti intombi zetu zibe njengentsika zegumbi, ziqingqiwe ngokufana nezendlu yokumkani;" 
Psalms144:13 ziti izisele zetu zibe zizele, zivelisa ngentlobo ngentlobo; ziti igusha zetu zizale ngamawaka na ngamawakawaka ezindleni zetu;" 
Psalms144:14 ziti inkabi zetu zibe zomelele ukutwala; kungabiko ukutyobozela pakati, kungabiko nokupumela pandle; kungabiko nokukala ezitarateni zetu." 
Psalms144:15 Hai itamsanqa labantu okukwa njalo kubo! hai itamsanqa labantu aba tixo u nguyehova! 
Psalms145:1 NDOKUPAKAMISA, Tixo wam, Kumkani! ndandiya kubonga igama lako kude kube ngunapakade." 
Psalms145:2 Ngemihla yonke ndokubonga; ndandiya kudumisa igama lako kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms145:3 Umkulu uyehova; ulungel nkudunyiswa kakulu: ubukulu bake abunakupengululwa. 
Psalms145:4 Esinye isizukulwana siya kuncoma imisebenzi yako kwesinye, sishumayele izenzo zako zamandla." 
Psalms145:5 Ndiya kuteta ngodumo olubungcwalisa lwobungangamsha bako, nangendawo zemimangaliso yako." 
Psalms145:6 Baya kutyela amandla ezenzo zako ezoyikekayo: ndandiya kubalisa ubukulu bako. 
Psalms145:7 Baya kukolisa ukuxela inkunjulwa yobubele bako obuninzi, badumise ubulungisa bako ngovuyo." 
Psalms145:8 Uyehova unofefe nenceba; uqumba kade, enobubele obukulu." 
Psalms145:9 Uyehova nlungile kubo bonke: nenceba zake zipezu kwayo yonke imisebenzi yake. 
Psalms145:10 Yonke imisebenzi yako yokudumisa, Yehova! nabangcwele bako bokubonga." 
Psalms145:11 Baya kutyela ubungcwalisa bobukumkani bako, batete ngamandla ako:" 
Psalms145:12 ukwazisa konyana babantu izenzo zake zamandla, nobungcwalisa bodumo lwobubumkani bake." 
Psalms145:13 Ubukumkani bako bubukumkani obungunapakade; nobukosi bako bobesizukulwana ngesizukulwana. 
Psalms145:14 Uyehova uyasekela bonke abawayo; uyabapakamisa bonke abatotyiweyo. 
Psalms145:15 Amehlo abo bonke ayakangela kuwe; uyabamkelisa ukutya kwabo ngexesha lako. 
Psalms145:16 Uyavula isandla sako, ukolise intando yako konke okuhleliyo." 
Psalms145:17 Uyehova unobulungisa kuzo zonke indlela zake: unobubele kuyo yonke imisebenzi yake. 
Psalms145:18 Uyehova ukufupi kubo bonke abambizayo, kubo bonke abambizayo ngenyaniso." 
Psalms145:19 Intando yabamoyikayo woyifeza; nesikalo sabo uya kusiva, abasindise." 
Psalms145:20 Uyehova uyabagcina bonke abamtandayo: kodwa abakohlakeleyo bonke uya kubatshabalalisa. 
Psalms145:21 Umlomo wam uya kuteta udunyiswa lukayehova: maluti uluntu lwonke lubonge igama lake elingcwele kude kube ngunapakade. 
Psalms146:1 DUMISANI uyehova! — Dumisa uyehova, mpefumlo wam!" 
Psalms146:2 Ndiya kudumisa uyehova ngexa ndisadla ubomi; ndiya kucula kutixo wam ngexa ndiseko. 
Psalms146:3 Musani kutembela ezinkosini, na kunyana woluntu, ekungeko lusizo kuye." 
Psalms146:4 Umoya wake uyapuma, abuyele emhlabeni wake: kwa ngalomini ayatshabalala amaqinga ake." 
Psalms146:5 Hai itamsanqa loncedo lu ngutixo ka‐Yakobi, lotemba li kuyehova utixo wake!" 
Psalms146:6 owenza izulu nomhlaba, ulwandle nako konke okukulo; oyigcinayo inyaniso kude kube ngunapakade:" 
Psalms146:7 owenzela ababandezelweyo umgwebo; owamkelisa abalambileyo ukutya. Uyehova nyakulula amabanjwa; 
Psalms146:8 uyehova uyatyila amehlo emfama; uyehova uyapakamisa abatotyiweyo; uyehova uyatanda abalungileyo; 
Psalms146:9 uyehova uyagcina abasemzini; nyaxasa inkedama nomhlolokazi: kodwa indlela yabakohlakeleyo uyayipenula. 
Psalms146:10 Uyehova uya kupata ngobukumkani kude kube ngunapakade: kwa utixo wako, Ziyone! kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana. — Dumisani uyehova!" 
Psalms147:1 DUMISANI uyehova! ngokuba kulungile ukucula kutixo wetu; ngokuba kumnandi; indumiso yinto efanelekileyo. 
Psalms147:2 Uyehova uyaka i‐Yerusaleme; abalahliweyo bakwa‐Sirayeli uyababuta. 
Psalms147:3 Uyapilisa abantliziyo zigqobokileyo; uyazibopa intlungu zabo. 
Psalms147:4 Uyabala inani lenkwenkwezi; uyazibiza zonke ngamagama. 
Psalms147:5 Inkosi yetu inkulu, inamandla amakulu; ingqondo yayo ipezu kwembaliso." 
Psalms147:6 Uyehova uyapakamisa abalulamileyo; uyatobisa abakohlakeleyo kude kube semhlabeni. 
Psalms147:7 Hlabelanani kuyehova ngombulelo; culani kutixo wetu ngekinore; 
Psalms147:8 osibekelisa izulu ngamafu, olungisela umhlaba imvula, ohlumisa utyani ezintabeni." 
Psalms147:9 Uyamkelisa inkomo ukutya kwazo, n amatole onomyai alilayo." 
Psalms147:10 Akavuyi ngamandla ehashe; akakoliswa yimilenze yendoda. 
Psalms147:11 Uyehova uyakoliswa ngabamoyikayo, ngabatembayo ebubeleni bake." 
Psalms147:12 Bonga uyehova, Yerusaleme! dumisa utixo wako, Ziyone!" 
Psalms147:13 Ngokuba eyomelezile imivalo yamasango ako, watamsanqelisa usapo lwako pakati kwako." 
Psalms147:14 Uyenza uxolo emideni yako; uyakukolisa ngenqolowa etyebileyo. 
Psalms147:15 Uyatuma isiteto sake emhlabeni; ilizwi lake liyabaleka ngokunxama kakulu. 
Psalms147:16 Uyanika ingqweqwe njengoboya; uyahlwayela ingqele emhlope njengotutu. 
Psalms147:17 Uyaposa iliqwa lake njengamaqekeza: ngubanina onokuma pambi kwengqele yake? 
Psalms147:18 Uyatuma ilizwi lake, zinyibilike; uyavutelisa umoya wake, ele amanzi." 
Psalms147:19 Uyaxela amazwi ake ku‐Yakobi, imimiso yake nezigwebo zake ku‐Sirayeli." 
Psalms147:20 Akenjanga njalo kwesinye isizwe: nezigwebo zake abazazanga. — Dumisani uyehova! 
Psalms148:1 DUMISANI uyehova! — Dumisani uyehova kwa sezulwini; mdumiseni ezinyangweni. 
Psalms148:2 Mdumiseni, nonke nina zingelosi zake! mdumiseni, nonke nina mikosi yake!" 
Psalms148:3 Mdumiseni, langa nenyanga! mdumiseni, nonke nina zinkwenkwezi zokukanya!" 
Psalms148:4 Mdumiseni, mazulu amazulu! nani manzi angapezu kwamazulu!" 
Psalms148:5 Makadumise igama likayehova; ngokuba waxela, adalwa ke." 
Psalms148:6 Uwaqinisile kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade: uwenze ummiso, ongayi kububa ke." 
Psalms148:7 Dumisani uyehova kwa semhlabeni: nina minenga, nani nonke zinzulu;" 
Psalms148:8 mlilo nesico̔to, ngqweqwe nenkungu; moya woqwitela ulenza izwi lake;" 
Psalms148:9 zintaba, nani nonke zinduli; miti yokuqa̔ma, nani nonke zisedare;" 
Psalms148:10 maṙamnco, nani nonke zinkomo; zinambuzane, nani zintaka ezinamapiko!" 
Psalms148:11 Okumkani bomhlaba, nentlanga zonke; inkosi, nabo bonke abagwebi bomhlaba;" 
Psalms148:12 amadodana nentombi nazo; amaxego nabantwana; 
Psalms148:13 mabadumise igama likayehova: ngokuba ligama lake lodwa elipakamileyo; udumo lwake lungapezu kwomhlaba nezulu. 
Psalms148:14 Ulupakamisile upondo lwabantu bake, indumiso yabo bonke abangcwele bake; kwa o lwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, abantu abakufupi naye. — Dumisani uyehova!" 
Psalms149:1 DUMISANI uyehova! — Vumani kuyehova iculo elitsha; n odunyiswa lwake entlanganisweni yabangcwele. 
Psalms149:2 U‐Sirayeli makavuye ngomenzileyo; usapo lwase‐Ziyone malugcobe ngokumkani walo. 
Psalms149:3 Maludumise igama lake ngomdudo; malucule kuye ngentambula nekinore. 
Psalms149:4 Ngokuba uyehova ekoliswa ngabantu bake; uya kuhomba abalulamileyo ngosindiso. 
Psalms149:5 Abangcwele mabavuyelele ngobungcwalisa; mabagcobe ezinku̔kweni zabo. 
Psalms149:6 Imibongwa katixo ibe semlonyeni wabo, nesiṙele esintlangoti zimbini sibe sesandleni sabo;" 
Psalms149:7 ukwenza impindezelo ezizweni, n ezohlwayo ezintlangeni;" 
Psalms149:8 ukunxiba okumkani bazo ngemixokelelwane, nemiduna yazo ngamakamandela esincete;" 
Psalms149:9 ukwenza pezu kwazo umgwebo oba̔liweyo: oludumo lolwabangcwele bake bonke. — Dumisani uyehova! 
Psalms150:1 DUMISANI uyehova! — Dumisani utixo endaweni yake eyingcwele; mdumiseni esibakabakeni samandla ake. 
Psalms150:2 Mdumiseni ngenxa yezenzo zake zamandla; mdumiseni njengokwobuninzi bobukulu bake. 
Psalms150:3 Mdumiseni ngokulila kwexilongo; mdumiseni ngenebele nekinore. 
Psalms150:4 Mdumiseni ngentambula nomdudo; mdumiseni ngento ezinentambo nangogwali. 
Psalms150:5 Mdumiseni ngesimbali ezihlokomayo; mdumiseni ngesimbali ezikencezayo. 
Psalms150:6 Konke okunokupefumla makudumise uyehova. — Dumisani uyehova! 
Proverbs1:1 IMIZEKELISO ka‐Solomone, unyana ka‐Davide, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli;" 
Proverbs1:2 yokuba kwaziwe ubulumko nemfundiso; yokuba kuqondwe iziteto zengqondo; 
Proverbs1:3 yokuba kwamkelwe imfundiso yobutelekelelo; ubulungisa, nobugwebo, nolungelelwano;" 
Proverbs1:4 yokunika izidenge ubuciko, n omfana ukwazi nentelekeleliso." 
Proverbs1:5 Ilumko liya kuva, landise ufundo; noqondayo uya kuzuza amaqinga alumkileyo:" 
Proverbs1:6 kuze kuqondwe umzekeliso nenteto esiteleyo, amazwi amalumko nezintsonkotelo zawo." 
Proverbs1:7 UKWOYIKA uyehova kusisiqalo sokwazi: ubulumko nemfundiso amahilihili ayazidela. 
Proverbs1:8 Yiva, nyana wam! imfundiso kayihlo, ungalahli umteto kanyoko." 
Proverbs1:9 Ngokuba ziya kuba sisitsaba esihle zona kuyo intloko yako, nemixokelelwane entanyeni yako." 
Proverbs1:10 Nyana wam! ukuba aboni bayakuhenda, zungavumi ke." 
Proverbs1:11 Ukuba bati: Hamba nati, masilalele igazi, masizifihlele ofumana engenatyala;" 
Proverbs1:12 masibaginye behleli njengayo ihadesi; kwa besapilile, babe njengabahleleyo esihogweni:" 
Proverbs1:13 yonke impahla enobomi soyifumana; siya kuzalisa izindlu zetu ngamaxoba: 
Proverbs1:14 iqashiso lako uya kulenza pakati kwetu; inxowa inye yoba kuti sonke: 
Proverbs1:15 nyana wam! zungahambi nabo endleleni; nqanda unyawo lwako emizileni yabo: 
Proverbs1:16 ngokuba inyawo zabo zibalekela ububi, zinxamela ukupalaza igazi." 
Proverbs1:17 Ngenyaniso kufumana kusanekwa utambo emehlweni enye intaka: 
Proverbs1:18 kanti bona bayalalela elabo igazi, bayazifihlela obabo ubomi." 
Proverbs1:19 Zinjalo ke indlela zabo bonke ababawela impango; iyasusa ubomi bomniniyo. 
Proverbs1:20 UBULUMKO buyadanduluka ngapandle; buyapakamisa ilizwi labo ezitarateni: 
Proverbs1:21 kwezinkulu indawo zembutumbutu buyabiza, ezitubeni zamasango; esixekweni buyateta iziteto zabo, busiti:" 
Proverbs1:22 Kwoba kade kangakananina, zidenge! niya kutanda ubudenge, nabagxeki bazinqwenele ukugxeka, namageza atiye ukwazi?" 
Proverbs1:23 Ziguquleni ngokwohlwaya kwam; bona ke, ndiya kunigalelela umoya wam; ndiya kunazisa amazwi am." 
Proverbs1:24 Ngokokuba ndibizile, nala nina; ndolulile isandla sam, kungabangako owapulapulayo;" 
Proverbs1:25 koko nilahlile lonke icebo lam, nesohlwayo sam ningasivumanga;" 
Proverbs1:26 nam ndiya kuhleka ilishwa lenu; ndiya kugculela kwakufika isoyiko senu; 
Proverbs1:27 kwakufika isoyiko senu njengalo uquta, liti ilishwa lenu lize njengaso isaqwiti; kwakufika pezu kwenu ubunzima nesitukutezi." 
Proverbs1:28 Baya kwandul’ ukundibiza, kanti andiyi kusabela; baya kundifuna msinya, kanti abasayi kundifumana:" 
Proverbs1:29 ngenxa yokuba betiyile ukwazi, nokuba bengaqashanga ukwoyika uyehova." 
Proverbs1:30 Abavumanga icebo lam; badela konke ukwohlwaya kwam: 
Proverbs1:31 ngako baya kutya kwisiqa̔mo seyabo indlela, badikwe ngawabo amacebo." 
Proverbs1:32 Ngokuba ukupambuka kwezidenge kuya kuzibulala, nokungakatali kwamageza kuya kuwabubisa." 
Proverbs1:33 Kodwa ondivayo mna wohlala ngokunqaba; uya kwonwaba, kungeko kwoyika ububi." 
Proverbs2:1 NYANA wam! ukuba uya kwamkela iziteto zam, uyibekele kuwe nemiyalelo yam;" 
Proverbs2:2 ukuze unikele indlebe yako ebulumkweni, utobele intliziyo yako ekuqondeni;" 
Proverbs2:3 ewe, ukuba uya kubiza ingqondo, upakamisele ilizwi lako ingqiqo;" 
Proverbs2:4 ukuba uya kubufuna njengesilivere, ubupengulule njengendyebo eziselelweyo;" 
Proverbs2:5 uya kwandul’ ukuqonda ukwoyikwa kukayehova, ufumane ukwaziwa kukatixo." 
Proverbs2:6 Ngokuba uyehova esipa ubulumko; ukwazi nokuqonda kuvela emlonyeni wake. 
Proverbs2:7 Uyabekelela abalungileyo usizo; ulikaka kwabalungisa ukuhamba kwabo: 
Proverbs2:8 aze alinde indlela zobugwebo, agcine umendo wabangcwele bake." 
Proverbs2:9 Uya kwandul’ ukuqonda ubulungisa, nobugwebo, nolungelelwano, — yonke imikwa elungileyo." 
Proverbs2:10 Okuya ubulumko buya kungena entliziyweni yako, nokwazi kuya kuba mnandi empefumlweni wako;" 
Proverbs2:11 intelekeleliso yokugcina, ingqiqo yokulinda:" 
Proverbs2:12 ukuba usindiswe endleleni yokohlakeleyo, nas emntwini oteta izinto zobumenemene;" 
Proverbs2:13 abashiya indlela zokulunga, ukuze bahambe ezindleleni zobumnyama;" 
Proverbs2:14 abavuyela ukwenza inkohlakalo; a bagcoba ngobumenemene bokohlakeleyo; 
Proverbs2:15 abandlela zigwenxa, benokanda emikweni yabo:" 
Proverbs2:16 ukuba usindiswe kuye umfazi wasemzini, kulowo ungaziwayo, ozenza butelezi iziteto zake;" 
Proverbs2:17 oshiyayo umhlobo wobutsha bake, alibale ucebano lwotixo wake." 
Proverbs2:18 Ngokuba indlu yake itshonela ekufeni, nendlela zake kubafileyo." 
Proverbs2:19 Bonke abangenayo kuye abayi kubuya; abayi kufumana indlela zobomi kanjako. 
Proverbs2:20 Ukuze uhambe endleleni yabalungileyo, nendlela zabalungisayo uzigcine." 
Proverbs2:21 Ngokuba abayinene beya kuma umhlaba, nabafezekileyo beya kusala kuwo." 
Proverbs2:22 Kodwa abakohlakeleyo baya kunqanyulwa emhlabeni, nabenzayo ngobuxoki baya kudonyulwa kuwo." 
Proverbs3:1 NYANA wam! umteto wam ungawulibali; intliziyo yako mayibambe imiyalelo yam: 
Proverbs3:2 ngokuba iya kukwongezela ubude bemihla, neminyaka yobomi, noxolo." 
Proverbs3:3 Ububele nenyaniso mazingahlukani nawe; zinxibe entanyeni yako; ziba̔le ecwecweni lentliziyo yako; 
Proverbs3:4 wauya kufumana ufefe nenyweba elungileyo, emehlweni katixo nabantu." 
Proverbs3:5 Tembela kutixo ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, ungayami kokwako ukuqonda." 
Proverbs3:6 Umvume yena kuzo zonke indlela zako, waeya kulungisa izihambo zako." 
Proverbs3:7 Ungabi ulumkile kwawako amehlo; yoyika uyehova, upambuke enkohlakalweni." 
Proverbs3:8 Kwoba kukupila enkatyeni yako, nokunyakama ematanjeni ako." 
Proverbs3:9 Beka uyehova ngemfuyo yako, nangolibo lwenzuzo yako yonke;" 
Proverbs3:10 zize inyango zako zizaliswe buninzi, nezincinezelo zako zipupume yiveyine entsha." 
Proverbs3:11 Nyana wam! ukululeka kukayehova ungakudeli; nokwohlwaya kwake ungakutiyi: 
Proverbs3:12 ngokuba lowo amtandayo, uyehova emohlwaya; kwa njengokuba uyise emohlwaya unyana amkolelayo." 
Proverbs3:13 HAI itamsanqa lomntu ofumanayo ubulumko, nelomntu ozuzayo ingqondo!" 
Proverbs3:14 Ngokuba intengo yabo ilungile pezu kwentengo yesilivere, nenzuzo yabo pezu kwegolide." 
Proverbs3:15 Bunqabile bona pezu kwerubi; kanjako zonke izinto zako ezinqwenelekayo azingelingane nabo. 
Proverbs3:16 Ubude bemihla busesandleni sabo sokunene; kwesokohlo sabo kuko ubutyebi nodumo. 
Proverbs3:17 Indlela zabo zindlela zoyolo, nayo yonke imizila yabo iluxolo." 
Proverbs3:18 Bungumti wobomi kwababambelelayo kubo; unetamsanqa ke obubambayo. 
Proverbs3:19 Uyehova umisile umhlaba ngobulumko; uqinisile amazulu ngengqondo. 
Proverbs3:20 Ngokwazi kwake inzulu zacandeka, ati amafu atontsele umbete." 
Proverbs3:21 Nyana wam! mazingalahlekani namehlo ako ezizinto; bamba ubucebo nentelekeleliso. 
Proverbs3:22 Zoba bubomi ke empefumlweni wako, nobuhle entanyeni yako." 
Proverbs3:23 Uya kwandul’ ukuhamba ngokunqaba endleleni yako, luti unyawo lwako lungaku̔beki." 
Proverbs3:24 Nxa ulala pantsi, akuyi kwoyika: ewe, wakulala pantsi, boba bumnandi ke ubutongo bako." 
Proverbs3:25 Ungoyiki isituso esibaqayo, kwa nentshabalaliso yabakohlakeleyo yakufika." 
Proverbs3:26 Ngokuba uyehova eya kuba litemba lako, oya kugcina unyawo lwako lungabijelwa." 
Proverbs3:27 UNGABAMBI okulungileyo kwabo kulunge kubo, kwakuba kusemandleni esandla sako ukukwenza." 
Proverbs3:28 Musa ukuti kummelwane wako: Hamba, ubuye uze, ndiya kunika ngomso; nxa kukoyo kuwe." 
Proverbs3:29 Ungaqingeli ummelwane wako ububi, nxa ahleli ngokunqaba ngakuwe." 
Proverbs3:30 Musa ukupika nomntu kungeko tuba, nxa angakwenzanga nto." 
Proverbs3:31 Ungabi namona pezu kwomntu osisidlwengu; uze ungaqashi nanye yendlela zake. 
Proverbs3:32 Ngokuba onokanda eyintshontsho kuyehova; kodwa ubukolwane bake bunabalungisayo. 
Proverbs3:33 Isiqalekiso sikayehova sisendlwini yokohlakeleyo; kodwa ikaya labalungileyo uyalitamsanqela. 
Proverbs3:34 Okunene abagxeki uyabagxeka; kanti abalulamileyo uyabapa ufefe. 
Proverbs3:35 Amalumko aya kulidla ilifa lobungcwalisa; kodwa amageza aya kulamkela ihlazo. 
Proverbs4:1 YIVANI, bonyanandini! ukululeka kwoyise, nipulapule ukukwazi ukuqonda." 
Proverbs4:2 Ngokuba ndinipa imfundiso elungileyo; umteto wam ningawushiyi. 
Proverbs4:3 Ngokuba ndibe ndingunyana kabawo, ndingotambileyo nowokupela ebusweni bukama̔." 
Proverbs4:4 Waza wandifundisa, wati kum: Intliziyo yako mayibambe amazwi am; gcina imiyalelo yam, upile." 
Proverbs4:5 Qweba ubulumko, qweba ukuqonda; ungalibali, ungapambuki nokupambuka kuzo iziteto zomlomo wam." 
Proverbs4:6 Ungabushiyi, bokugcina ke; butande, bokulondoloza ke." 
Proverbs4:7 Eyona nto inkulu bubulumko; qweba ubulumko: ewe, ngako konke ukuqweba kwako kuqwebe ukuqonda." 
Proverbs4:8 Bumise pezulu ke, babuya kukupakamisa: bokwenzela udumo, xa ubusingatayo." 
Proverbs4:9 Buya kunika intloko yako isitsaba sobuhle; ikrone yobungcwalisa boyinikela kuwe. 
Proverbs4:10 Yiva, nyana wam! uzamkele iziteto zam; yaiya kuba mininzi kuwe iminyaka yobomi." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndikufundisile endleleni yobulumko; ndikukokele emikondweni yokulunga. 
Proverbs4:12 Ekuhambeni kwako, ukunyatela kwako akuyi kuxinwa; naxeshekweni ubalekayo, akuyi kuku̔beka." 
Proverbs4:13 Bambelela kuyo imfundiso, ungayeki; yibambe ke, ngokuba ibubomi bako yona." 
Proverbs4:14 Ungangeni emendweni wabakohlakeleyo, ungahambi nokuhamba endleleni yabangalungileyo." 
Proverbs4:15 Yipepe, ungadluli ngayo; tyeka kuyo, ugqite ke." 
Proverbs4:16 Ngokuba bengalali, nxa bangenzanga bubi; bayahlutwa ubutongo, nxa bangaku̔bekisanga mntu." 
Proverbs4:17 Ngokuba besidla isonka sobuncwangu, besela iveyine sobudlwengu." 
Proverbs4:18 Kodwa indlela yabalungileyo injengokukanya okukazimlayo, okumana kukanya kude kube semini efezekileyo." 
Proverbs4:19 Indlela yabakohlakeleyo injengesitokotoko; abazi into abaya kuku̔beka pezu kwayo. 
Proverbs4:20 Nyana wam! pulapula amazwi am; tobela indlebe yako kuzo iziteto zam. 
Proverbs4:21 Mazingalahlekani namehlo ako; zigcine pakati entliziyweni yako. 
Proverbs4:22 Ngokuba zibubomi kwabazifumanayo, nopiliso kuyo yonke inyama yabo." 
Proverbs4:23 Linda intliziyo yako pezu kwako konke okugcinwayo; ngokuba kuvela kuyo izipumelo zobomi. 
Proverbs4:24 Shenxisa kuwe ubugwenxa bomlomo, nenkani yomlomo yikwelelise kude kuwe." 
Proverbs4:25 Amehlo ako makati ngqo ukukangela, nenkope zako mazonde ukubeka pambi kwako." 
Proverbs4:26 Gqala ukuhamba kwonyawo lwako, ziti zonke indlela zako ziqiniswe." 
Proverbs4:27 Ungapambukeli nangasekunene nangasekohlo; shenxisa unyawo lwako ekukohlakaleni. 
Proverbs5:1 NYANA wam! pulapula ebulumkweni bam, utobele indlebe yako ekuqondeni kwam;" 
Proverbs5:2 ukuze ugcine intelekeleliso, nomlomo wako ubambe ukwazi." 
Proverbs5:3 Ngokuba umlomo womfazi wasemzini utontsela incindi, nekuhlangubo lake lidlula amafuta ngobutelezi:" 
Proverbs5:4 kanti ukupela kwake kuṙaṙa njengomhlonyane, kubukali njengesiṙele sisika ngamacala omabini." 
Proverbs5:5 Inyawo zake zihlela ekufeni; amanyatela ake abambela ehadesi. 
Proverbs5:6 Ukuze ungagqali indlela yobomi, iyajikajika imikondo yake, ukuba ungayazi." 
Proverbs5:7 Ngako kaloku, bonyanandini! pulapulani kum, ningahlukani nazo iziteto zomlomo wam." 
Proverbs5:8 Kwelelisa kude kuye indlela yako, ungasondeli ngaselucangweni lwendlu yake;" 
Proverbs5:9 hleze unike kwabanye ukwomelela kwako, nakoyinqola iminyaka yako;" 
Proverbs5:10 hleze bahlutiswe abasemzini ngobutyebi bako, nemisebenzi yako ebuhlungu ibe sendlwini yongaziwayo;" 
Proverbs5:11 ude ugule ekupeleni kwako, kwakugqitywa inyama yako nomzimba wako;" 
Proverbs5:12 uze uti: Hai ukutiya kwam ululeko, nokudela kwentliziyo yam isohlwayo;" 
Proverbs5:13 ndingapulapulanga nje ilizwi lababonisi bam, ndingatobelanga indlebe yam nakwabafundisi bam!" 
Proverbs5:14 Ndibe ndipants’ ukuba sebubini bonke, pakati kwomhlambi nentlanganiso." 
Proverbs5:15 Sela amanzi evela kwelako icibi, nezelo zipuma kwelako iqula." 
Proverbs5:16 Maiti imitombo yako ipangalale ngapandle, n emijelo yamanzi ezitarateni." 
Proverbs5:17 Maibe yeyako wedwa, ingabi yeyabasemzini kunye nawe." 
Proverbs5:18 Umtombo wako mautanyusanqeliswe; uze uvuyele umfazi wobutsha bako. 
Proverbs5:19 Makabe njeng examakazi elitandekayo newulakazi elihle; amabele ake makakuncamise ngamaxesha onke; lahlekela futi elutandweni lwake. 
Proverbs5:20 Yinina, nyana wam! ukuba ulahlekele kowasemzini umfazi, usingate isifuba songaziwayo?" 
Proverbs5:21 Ngokuba indlela zomntu zipambi kwamehlo kayehova, nako konke ukuhamba kwake nyakugqala." 
Proverbs5:22 Ezake izikohlakalo zobijela okohlakeleyo; uya kubanjwa zintambo zesono sake. 
Proverbs5:23 Wofa yena engenalufundo; nangabo ubukulu bobuhilihili bake wolahleka. 
Proverbs6:1 NYANA wam! ukuba ubambele ummelwane wako, wabambana nowasemzini isandla sako;" 
Proverbs6:2 ukuba utiyelwe ngeziteto zomlomo wako, wabijelwa ngeziteto zomlomo wako;" 
Proverbs6:3 yiti ke, nyana wam! uze uzikulule, wakuba uzile esandleni sommelwane wako: uye, uziqubude, umqu̔be ummelwane wako." 
Proverbs6:4 Unganiki ubutongo emehlweni ako, nokunqenqa ezinkopeni zako;" 
Proverbs6:5 zikulule njengebadi esandleni somzingeli, nanjengentaka esandleni somtiyeli." 
Proverbs6:6 Yiya embovaneni, livilandini! nakana imikwa yayo, ulumke;" 
Proverbs6:7 eti ke, ingenamkokeli nje, nampati, nankosi," 
Proverbs6:8 ilungiselele ukudla kwayo ehlotyeni, ibute ukutya kwayo ekwindla." 
Proverbs6:9 Uya kulala kude kube ninina, livilandini! uya kuvuka ninina ebutongweni bako?" 
Proverbs6:10 Ibe yintwana yobutongo, ibe yintwana yokunqenqa, ibe yintwana yokuxabanisa izandla kuze kulalwe;" 
Proverbs6:11 bandul’ ukuza ubuhlwempu bako njengomhambi, nokuswela kwako njengoxo̔bileyo." 
Proverbs6:12 Umntu wobunginingini, umntu wokungendawo, uyahamba ngobugwenxa bomlomo:" 
Proverbs6:13 uyapanyaza ngamehlo ake, uyaṙweca ngenyawo zake, uyabonisa ngeminwe yake;" 
Proverbs6:14 ubumenemene busentliziyweni yake, uyaceba ububi ngamaxesha onke, uyavusa amapike." 
Proverbs6:15 Ngako oko ilishwa lake liya kuza ngokuzuma; uya kucitwa ngebaqo, kungabiko lusizo." 
Proverbs6:16 Ezi zinto zontandatu uyehova uyazitiya; ewe, zixe̔nxe eziyintshontsho kumpefumlo wake:" 
Proverbs6:17 Amehlo okuqanqalaza; ulwimi lwobuxoki; nezandla ezipalazayo igazi elingenatyala; 
Proverbs6:18 intliziyo ecebayo amaqinga akohlakeleyo; inyawo ezinxamela ukubalekela ububi; 
Proverbs6:19 inqi̔na lobuxoki e lipimisela ilwimi; novusayo amapike pakati kwabazalwana. 
Proverbs6:20 NYANA wam! wubambe umyalelo kayihlo, ungalahli nomteto kanyoko." 
Proverbs6:21 Yibope entliziyweni yako futi; yinxibe entanyeni yako. 
Proverbs6:22 Ekuhambeni kwako wokukapa; ekulaleni kwako wokulinda; wakuvuka, uya kuncokola nawe." 
Proverbs6:23 Ngokuba umyalelo usisibane; nomteto usisikanyiso; ziyindlela yobomi izohlwayo zokufundisa; 
Proverbs6:24 ukuze ugcinwe kuyo inkazana ekohlakeleyo, kuko ukubonga kwolwimi lwasemzini." 
Proverbs6:25 Ungakanuki ubunzwakazi bayo entliziyweni yako; kanjako mayingakubambi ngenkope zayo. 
Proverbs6:26 Ngokuba ngenxa yenkazana eyenza umbulo kutotyelwa kude kube lisimba lesonka; nomfazi wenye indoda uyazingela ubomi obunqabileyo. 
Proverbs6:27 Umntu angatabatela umlilo esifubeni sake, zize zingatshiswa na izivato zake?" 
Proverbs6:28 Umntu angahamba pezu kwamalahle atshayo, zize zingaṙauki na inyawo zake?" 
Proverbs6:29 Unjalo ke ongenayo kuye umfazi wommelwane wake; akayi kuba ngongenatyala osukuba empata. 
Proverbs6:30 Akudelwa isela, nxa leba̔yo ukuze lizalise umxe̔lo walo, ngokuba lilambile:" 
Proverbs6:31 kodwa, nxa lifunyenweyo, lohlaula ngokusixe̔nxe; yonke impahla yendlu yalo liya kuyinika." 
Proverbs6:32 Or̔exeza umfazi uswele ingqondo; uyabubisa umpefumlo wake owenje njalo. 
Proverbs6:33 Uya kufumana izibeto nodelo; nehlazo lake alisayi kucinywa. 
Proverbs6:34 Ngokuba ubukwele buvusa umsindo wendoda; ngako ayiyi kuba nataṙu emhleni wempindezelo. 
Proverbs6:35 Ayiyi kubuka nasinye isizi; kanjako ayiyi kuvuma, nakuba ulandisa ibaso." 
Proverbs7:1 Nyana wam! geina iziteto zam, uyibekele kuwe nemiyalelo yam." 
Proverbs7:2 Gcina imiyalelo yam, upile: nomteto wam uwugcine njengokozo lweliso lako." 
Proverbs7:3 Yibope eminweni yako; yiba̔le ecwecweni lentliziyo yako. 
Proverbs7:4 Yiti kubulumko: Ungudade wam; nengqondo uyibize ngokuti ngumhlobo: 
Proverbs7:5 ukuze ugcinwe kuye umfazi wasemzini, kulowo ungaziwayo, ozenza butelezi iziteto zake." 
Proverbs7:6 Ngokuba ngesituba sendlu yam, ngefenstile yam, ndakangela:" 
Proverbs7:7 ndaza ndabona pakati kwezidenge, ndaqiqa pakati kwamadodana, umfana oswele ingqondo," 
Proverbs7:8 edlula esitarateni kufupi negumbi lake; wahamba ngendlela yendlu yake; 
Proverbs7:9 ngoncwalazi, ngokuhlwa kwemini, pakati kwobusuku nobumnyama:" 
Proverbs7:10 kekaloku nankuya esiza kumhlangabeza umfazi enesivato sengnawokazi, enobuqokolo bentliziyo:" 
Proverbs7:11 (yena unengxolo, unenkani; inyawo zake azihlali endlwini yake;" 
Proverbs7:12 uyawapandle, uyawasezitarateni, elalela ngasemagumbini onke:)" 
Proverbs7:13 wada wambamba, wamanga; wabomeleza ubuso bake, wati kuye:" 
Proverbs7:14 Imibingelelo yoxolo ikum; namhla nje ndifezile izibambiso zam. 
Proverbs7:15 Kungoko endipumileyo ukuza kukuhlangabeza, ukufuna kakulu ubuso bako, ukuba ndikufumane." 
Proverbs7:16 Sendigubungele ikoye yam ngezigubungelo, ngezinto zamabala ngamabala zeqiya ecikilizekileyo yase‐Jipete." 
Proverbs7:17 Ndifefile umandlalo wam ngemore, nangeyahali, nangekinamone." 
Proverbs7:18 Yiza ke, sidikwe lutando kude kuse; masiziyolise elutandweni olukulu." 
Proverbs7:19 Ngokuba indoda ingeko endlwini yayo, ihambele kude." 
Proverbs7:20 Inxowa yemali iyitabatile esandleni sayo; ngomhla wokuhlangana kwenyanga yobuya ize endlwini yayo. 
Proverbs7:21 Wada wampambukisa ngobuninzi bokucenga kwake; ngobutelezi bokuteta kwake wamkukulisa. 
Proverbs7:22 Uhla amlandele, njengayo inkabi isiya ekuxe̔lweni, nanjengalo ihilihili lisiya ekwohlwayeni kwamakamandela;" 
Proverbs7:23 (lude utolo lucande isibindi sake:) njengayo intaka inxamela esigwini, ingazi ukuba singenxa yobomi bayo." 
Proverbs7:24 Ngako kaloku ndiveni, bonyanandini! nipulapule ezitetweni zomlomo wam." 
Proverbs7:25 Intliziyo yako maingatyekeli ezindleleni zake; ungadungudeli emizileni yake. 
Proverbs7:26 Ngokuba zininzi inxweleṙa aziwisile; kanjalo bangabanamandla bonke ababulewe nguye. 
Proverbs7:27 Indlu yake yindlela yehadesi, ihlela ezinkambilini zokufa." 
Proverbs8:1 UBULUMKO abubizi na? nengqondo ayipakamisi na ilizwi layo? 
Proverbs8:2 Engcopo yendawo ezipakamileyo ngasemendweni, pakati kwazo indlela buyazimisa." 
Proverbs8:3 Ngecala lamasango, ekungenweni kwesixeko, ngasemnyango wengcango, buyadanduluka." 
Proverbs8:4 Kwa kuni, madoda! ndiyabiza; ilizwi lam likubo onyana babantu." 
Proverbs8:5 Nina zidenge! qondani ubuciko; nani mahilihili! qondani ingqiqo. 
Proverbs8:6 Yivani; ngokuba ndiya kuteta izinto ezinobomi; nokuvula kwomlomo wam kwoba ngolungelelwano. 
Proverbs8:7 Ngokuba ikuhlangubo lam liya kupimisela inyaniso; kanjalo ubumenemene buyintshontsho emlonyeni wam. 
Proverbs8:8 Zonke iziteto zomlomo wam zisebulungiseni; akuko kuzo okujikayo nokugwenxa. 
Proverbs8:9 Zisekuhleni zonke kuye oqondayo; zilungile kubo abafumanayo ukwazi. 
Proverbs8:10 Yamkelani imfundiso yam, ning amkeli isilivere; kwa nokwazi ngapezu kwegolide edlulisileyo." 
Proverbs8:11 Ngokuba ubulumko bulungile pezu kwerubi; nazo zonke izinto ezinqwenelekayo azingelingane nabo. 
Proverbs8:12 Mna bulumko ndihleli nentelekeleliso; nokwaziwa kwamaqinga alumkileyo ndiyakufumana. 
Proverbs8:13 Ukwoyika uyehova kukutiya inkohlakalo; ir̔atshi, nokuzidla, nendlela ekohlakeleyo, nomlomo wobumenemene, ndiyazitiya." 
Proverbs8:14 Ubucebo bobam, nobuqiqo; ndiyingqondo; amandla angawam." 
Proverbs8:15 Okumkani bapata ngam, nenkosi zimisa ubulungisa." 
Proverbs8:16 Inkosana zipata ngam, nemiduna, kwa bonke abagwebi bomhlaba." 
Proverbs8:17 Ndiyabatanda abo batanda mna; nabo bandifuna msinya, baya kundifumana." 
Proverbs8:18 Ubutyebi bunam, nodumo; imfuyo engagugiyo, nobulungisa." 
Proverbs8:19 Isixakato sam silungile pezu kwegolide, pezu kwegolide ecokisiweyo; nenzuzo yam pezu kwesilivere edlulisileyo." 
Proverbs8:20 Ndiyahamba emendweni wobulungisa, pakati kwendlela zobugwebo;" 
Proverbs8:21 ukuze ndizuzise abanditandayo indyebo; ewe, indawo zabo zokubekela ndiya kuzizalisa." 
Proverbs8:22 Uyehova wandifuya ndikukuqala kwendlela yake, ingekabiko imisebenzi yake, kwa kudala." 
Proverbs8:23 Kwa kunapakade ndatanjiswa, kwa sekuqaleni, ungekabiko umhlaba." 
Proverbs8:24 Zakuba zingeko inzulu, bendizelwe; yakuba ingeko imitombo emanzi maninzi." 
Proverbs8:25 Zingekaqinanga intaba, zingekabiko induli, ndandizelwe;" 
Proverbs8:26 nxa ebengekawenzanga umhlaba, nezindle, nolwokuqala utuli lwelizwe." 
Proverbs8:27 Oko abelungisa amazulu, bendikona mna; oko abeba̔la isazinge pezu kwobuso benzulu;" 
Proverbs8:28 oko abeqinisa amafu ngapezulu; oko womelezayo imitombo yenzulu; 
Proverbs8:29 oko wabekela ulwandle umda walo, ukuba amanzi angagqiti ilizwi lake; oko abemisa imisekelo yomhlaba;" 
Proverbs8:30 ndasendiko kufupi naye njengowondliweyo; ndandiluyolo lwake imihla ngemihla, ndigcoba pambi kwake ngamaxesha onke;" 
Proverbs8:31 ndigcoba kwezimiweyo indawo zomhlaba wake; lwaye uyolo lwam lwanonyana babantu. 
Proverbs8:32 Ngako kaloku ndiveni, bonyanandini! ngokuba benetamsanqa abazigcinayo indlela zam." 
Proverbs8:33 Yivani imfundiso, nilumke, ningayali." 
Proverbs8:34 Unetamsanqa umntu ondivayo, elinda emasangweni am imihla ngemihla, egcina imigubasi yengcango zam." 
Proverbs8:35 Ngokuba ondifumanayo efumana ubomi; uya kuzuza imbuko kuyehova. 
Proverbs8:36 Kodwa owonayo kum, uyabandezela owake umpefumlo: bonke abanditiyayo bayatanda ukufa." 
Proverbs9:1 Ubulumko buyakile indlu yabo, ubazile intsika zabo zosixe̔nxe:" 
Proverbs9:2 buxe̔lile isixe̔lo sabo; bupitikezile iveyine yabo; bulungisile itafile yabo kanjalo; 
Proverbs9:3 butumile izicakazana zabo; buyabiza pezu kwezipakamileyo indawo zesixeko, busiti:" 
Proverbs9:4 Osidenge, makapambukele apa; oswele ingqondo, buti kuye:" 
Proverbs9:5 Yizani, nitye kokwam ukudla, nisele kuyo iveyine endiyipitikezileyo." 
Proverbs9:6 Shiyani ubudenge, nipile; nize nihambe endleleni yokuqonda." 
Proverbs9:7 Oyalayo umgxeki, uyazizuzela udelo; nomohlwaya okohlakeleyo, kusisidyobo kuye." 
Proverbs9:8 Ungohlwayi umgxeki, hleze akutiye; yohlwaya olilumko, waeya kukutanda." 
Proverbs9:9 Nika kolumkileyo, wolumka ngakumbi; yazisa olungileyo, wokwandisa ukufunda." 
Proverbs9:10 Kukuqala kwobulumko ukwoyika uyehova; nokwaziwa kwoyingcwele kuyingqondo. 
Proverbs9:11 Ngokuba ngam imihla yako iya kwandiswa; ewe, iminyaka yobomi iya kwongezwa kuwe." 
Proverbs9:12 Ukuba ulumkile, uzilumkele kwa wena; nokuba uyagxeka, nguwe wedwa oya kukutwala." 
Proverbs9:13 Umfazi olihilihili unengxolo; usisidenge, engazi nanto." 
Proverbs9:14 Uhlala pantsi ngaselucangweni lwendlu yake, pezu kwesihlalo ezindaweni ezipakamileyo zesixeko;" 
Proverbs9:15 ukuba abize abadlulayo endleleni, abati ngqo ngendlela zabo, esiti:" 
Proverbs9:16 Osidenge, makapambukele apa; noswele ingqondo, uti kuye:" 
Proverbs9:17 Amanzi abi̔weyo ayolile, nesonka sendawo zangasese simnandi." 
Proverbs9:18 Kanti akazi ukuba abafileyo bakona, nokuba abamenywa bake basezindaweni ezinzulu zehadesi." 
Proverbs10:1 IMIZEKELISO ka‐Solomone. Unyana olumkileyo uyavuyisa uyise; kodwa unyana osidenge ulusizi kuye unina. 
Proverbs10:2 Indyebo zenkohlakalo azincedi luto; kodwa ubulungisa buyasindisa ekufeni. 
Proverbs10:3 Uyehova akayi kuvumela umpefumlo wolungileyo ulambe; kodwa unqwenelo lwabakohlakeleyo wolutya̔la. 
Proverbs10:4 Woda abe lihlwempu osebenzayo ngesandla esinqenayo; kodwa isandla sokuteleyo siyatyebisa. 
Proverbs10:5 Obutayo ehlotyeni, ungunyana olumkileyo; olala butongo ekwindla, ungunyana ohlazisayo." 
Proverbs10:6 Amatamsanqa apezu kwentloko yolungileyo; kodwa umlomo wabakohlakeleyo uyafihla ubudlwengu. 
Proverbs10:7 Inkunjulwa yolungileyo yoba netamsanqa; kodwa igama labakohlakeleyo lobola. 
Proverbs10:8 Ontliziyo ilumkile, uya kwamkela imiyalelo; kodwa ohilizayo ngomlomo, uya kuwiswa pantsi." 
Proverbs10:9 Ohambayo ngenene, uyahamba ngokugcineka; kodwa ozenza gwenxa indlela zake, uya kwaziwa." 
Proverbs10:10 Opanyazayo ngeliso, wonika ubuhlungu; nohilizayo ngomlomo, uya kuwiswa pantsi." 
Proverbs10:11 Umlomo wolungileyo ngumtombo wobomi; kodwa umlomo wabakohlakeleyo uyafihla ubudlwengu. 
Proverbs10:12 Utiyo luyavusa amapike; kodwa utando luyagubungela izigqito zonke. 
Proverbs10:13 Emlonyeni wonokuqonda bufunyanwa ubulumko; kodwa uswazi lulung ele umhlana woswele ingqondo. 
Proverbs10:14 Abalumkileyo bayabekela ukwazi; kodwa umlomo wehilihili uyintshabalaliso ekufupi. 
Proverbs10:15 Imfuyo yesityebi isisixeko esinamandla saso; intshabalaliso yamahlwempu bubuhlwempu bawo. 
Proverbs10:16 Umsebenzi wolungileyo ubang’ ubomi; inzuzo yokohlakeleyo ibang’ isono. 
Proverbs10:17 Usendleleni yobomi ogcina imfundiso; kodwa oshiyayo ukwohlwaywa uyaposisa. 
Proverbs10:18 Ofihlayo utiyo, unomlomo wobuxoki; nopumisayo intlebo, yena usisidenge." 
Proverbs10:19 Ebuninzini bamazwi akusweleki isigqito; kodwa obamba umlomo wake ulumkile. 
Proverbs10:20 Ulwimi lwolungileyo lu njeng esilivere edlulisileyo; intliziyo yabakohlakeleyo yinto encinanana. 
Proverbs10:21 Umlomo wolungileyo uyondla abaninzi; kodwa amahilihili ayabuba ngokuswela ingqondo. 
Proverbs10:22 Itamsanqa likayehova, lilo elityebisayo; akongezi ubuhlungu kulo." 
Proverbs10:23 Kunjengokufeketa kwisidenge ukwenza ubumenemene; kodwa umntu wokuqonda unobulumko. 
Proverbs10:24 Isoyiko sokohlakeleyo, sona siyakumfikela; kodwa inkanuko yabalungileyo iya kupiwa." 
Proverbs10:25 Njengokugqita kwesaqwiti, kunjalo ukungabiko kwokohlakeleyo; kodwa olungileyo usisisekelo esingunapakade." 
Proverbs10:26 Njengeyasine kuwo amazinyo, nanjengomsi kuwo amehlo, linjalo ivila kubo abalitumayo." 
Proverbs10:27 Ukwoyika uyehova kuyandisa imihla: kodwa iminyaka yabakohlakeleyo iya kuncitshiswa. 
Proverbs10:28 Itemba labalungileyo liluvuyo; kodwa isikangelo sabakohlakeleyo siya kububa. 
Proverbs10:29 Yinqaba koyinene indlela kayehova; kodwa yintshabalaliso kwabenzi benkohlakalo. 
Proverbs10:30 Olungileyo akasayi kuza ashukunyiswe; kodwa abakohlakeleyo abayi kuma umhlaba. 
Proverbs10:31 Umlomo wolungileyo uvelisa ubulumko; kodwa ulwimi lwobumenemene lwonqanyulwa. 
Proverbs10:32 Umlomo wolungileyo uyakwazi okukolekileyo: kodwa umlomo wabakohlakeleyo unobumenemene. 
Proverbs11:1 ISILINGANISELO senkohliso siyintshontsho kuyehova; kodwa ilitye lokulinganisa elizalisekileyo liyimvuyiso kuye. 
Proverbs11:2 Kuti kwakufika iratshi, kufike nehlazo; kodwa ubulumko bunabalulamileyo." 
Proverbs11:3 Inene yabalungisayo yobakapa; kodwa inkani yabenza ngobuxoki yobacita. 
Proverbs11:4 Ubutyebi abuncedi luto emhleni womsindo; kodwa ubulungisa buyasindisa ekufeni. 
Proverbs11:5 Ubulungisa bofezekileyo bolungelelanisa indlela yake; kodwa okohlakeleyo wowa ngokukohlakala kwake. 
Proverbs11:6 Ubulungisa babalungisayo bobasindisa; kodwa abenza ngobuxoki bobanjiswa ngo babo ubumenemene. 
Proverbs11:7 Uti akufa umntu okohlakeleyo, isikangelo sake siya kububa; kanjalo itemba labangendawo liyabuba." 
Proverbs11:8 Olungileyo uyahlangulwa ebunzimeni, aze angene okohlakeleyo esikundleni sake." 
Proverbs11:9 Ngawo umlomo umginwa uyatshabalalisa ummelwane wake; kodwa ngako ukwazi kwabalungileyo, baya kusindiswa." 
Proverbs11:10 Ebutamsanqeni babalungileyo, isixeko siyavuyelela; nasekububeni kwabakohlakeleyo, kuko umgcobo." 
Proverbs11:11 Ngesitamsanqeliso sabalungisayo isixeko siyapakanyiswa; kodwa ngomlomo wabakohlakeleyo siyacitwa. 
Proverbs11:12 Odela ummelwane wake, ngoswele ingqiqo; kodwa umntu wokuqonda woti cwaka." 
Proverbs11:13 Ohambahamba ehleba, uyatyila amahlebo; kodwa omoya unyanisekile, uyafihla umcimbi." 
Proverbs11:14 Nxa kungeko amaqinga alumkileyo, bayawa abantu; kodwa kuko ingciniso ebuninzini babacebisi." 
Proverbs11:15 Uya kuzuza ingozi ngenyaniso lowo obambisele owasemzini; kodwa otiyayo ukubambana kwezandla unqabile. 
Proverbs11:16 Umfazi onesoya uyabamba udumo; n amadoda anamandla ayabamba ubutyebi. 
Proverbs11:17 Umntu onobubele uyenzela owake umpefumlo okulungileyo; kodwa oyinqola uyakataza eyake inyama. 
Proverbs11:18 Okohlakeleyo uyenza umsebenzi wenkohliso; kodwa ohlwayelayo ubulungisa woba nomvuzo wenene. 
Proverbs11:19 Njengokuba ubulungisa bubang’ ubomi, kwa njalo oputuma inkohlakalo ubang’ ukufa kwake." 
Proverbs11:20 Bayintshontsho kuyehova abantliziyo ibugwenxa; kodwa bayimvuyiso kuye abandlela ilungile. 
Proverbs11:21 Nangona isandla sibambana nesandla, akayi kuswela ityala okohlakeleyo; kodwa inzalo yabalungileyo yosindiswa." 
Proverbs11:22 Njengawo umsesane wegolide empumlweni yehangu, injalo inzwakazi engenakuqiqa." 
Proverbs11:23 Inkanuko yabalungileyo kukulunga kupela; kodwa isikangelo sabakohlakeleyo singumsindo. 
Proverbs11:24 Kuko ocitayo, kanti kusandiswa; kuko ovimbayo okupezu kwokumfaneleyo, kodwa kubang’ ubuhlwempu." 
Proverbs11:25 Umpefumlo onesisa wotyetyiswa; nalowo onyelayo, uya kunyelwa yena naye." 
Proverbs11:26 Obambayo inqolowa, abantu baya kumnywebelela; kodwa amatamsanqa oba pezu kwentloko yalowo otengelayo." 
Proverbs11:27 Okutala ukufuna okulungileyo, uyafuna imbuko; kodwa ofunayo ububi, buya kumfikela." 
Proverbs11:28 Otembela ebutyebini bake, yena uya kuwa; kodwa abalungileyo bocu̔ma njengamagqabi." 
Proverbs11:29 Okatazayo eyake indlu, uya kulidla ilifa lomoya; kanjalo ihilihili loba sisicaka kolumkileyo ngentliziyo." 
Proverbs11:30 Isixakato solungileyo singumti wobomi; kanjalo obambayo imipefumlo ulumkile. 
Proverbs11:31 Bona ke, olungileyo uya kuvuzwa emhlabeni; kangakananina ngakumbi ke okohlakeleyo nomoni." 
Proverbs12:1 OTANDA imfundiso, uyatanda ukwazi; kodwa otiyayo ukwohlwayiwa, ungodolileyo." 
Proverbs12:2 Olungileyo wozuza imbuko kuyehova; kodwa umntu wamaqinga akohlakeleyo, uya kumgweba." 
Proverbs12:3 Umntu akayi kuqiniswa ngenkohlakalo; kodwa ingcambo yabalungileyo ayisayi kushukunyiswa. 
Proverbs12:4 Umfazi otembekileyo uyikrone yendoda yake; kodwa lowo uhlazisayo, unjengokubola ematanjeni ayo." 
Proverbs12:5 Izicingo zabalungileyo zifanele: amaqinga abakohlakeleyo ayinkohliso. 
Proverbs12:6 Amazwi abakohlakeleyo ngawokuba kulalelwe igazi; kodwa umlomo wabalungisayo wobahlangula. 
Proverbs12:7 Abakohlakeleyo bayapenulwa, bangabi seko; kodwa indlu yabalungileyo iya kuma." 
Proverbs12:8 Umntu wodunyiswa njengobutelekelelo bake; kodwa ontliziyo igwenxa woba nokudelwa. 
Proverbs12:9 Odelekileyo, enesicaka, ugqitisele ozincomayo, eswele ukutya." 
Proverbs12:10 Olungileyo uyanyamekela ubomi benkomo yake; kodwa inceba zabakohlakeleyo zibunqola. 
Proverbs12:11 Olimayo umhlaba wake, wokoliswa sisonka; kodwa olandela abantu abangendawo, uswele ingqondo." 
Proverbs12:12 Okohlakeleyo uyanqwenela utambo lwabangalungileyo; kodwa ingcambo yabalungileyo yohlanza. 
Proverbs12:13 Umgibe wongalungileyo usekugqiteni kwomlomo: kodwa olungileyo uya kupuma ebunzimeni. 
Proverbs12:14 Ngesixakato somlomo womntu, uya kukoliswa ngokulungileyo; kanjalo umvuzo wezandla zomntu wobuyiselwa kuye." 
Proverbs12:15 Indlela yehilihili ifanelekile kwawalo amehlo; kodwa opulapulayo icebo ulumkile. 
Proverbs12:16 Ihilihili ukuqumba kwalo kuhla kwaziwe; kodwa otelekelelayo uyagubungela ihlazo. 
Proverbs12:17 Oteta inyaniso uyaxela ubulungisa; kodwa inqi̔na lobuxoki liyaxela inkohliso. 
Proverbs12:18 Kuko obobayo njengokuhlaba kwesiṙele; kodwa ulwimi lwabalumkileyo luyimpiliso. 
Proverbs12:19 Umlomo wenyaniso uya kuqiniswa kude kube ngunapakade; kodwa ulwimi lwobuxoki, kude kupanyazwe kupela." 
Proverbs12:20 Inkohliso isentliziyweni yabaqingayo ububi; kodwa abacebi boxolo banovuyo. 
Proverbs12:21 Olungileyo akuyi kumhlela nanye ingozi; kodwa abakohlakeleyo bozaliswa bububi. 
Proverbs12:22 Umlomo wobuxoki uyintshontsho kuyehova; kodwa abenza ngenyaniso bayimvuyiso kuye. 
Proverbs12:23 Umntu otelekelelayo uyafihla ukwazi; kodwa intliziyo yamahilihili iyashumayela ubudenge. 
Proverbs12:24 Isandla sabakuteleyo sopata ngobukosi: kodwa inqeneṙa liya kukonza. 
Proverbs12:25 Isitukutezi entliziyweni yomntu siyayitobisa; kodwa ilizwi elimnandi liyayivuyisa. 
Proverbs12:26 Olungileyo uyamalatisa ummelwane wake; kodwa indlela yabakohlakeleyo iyabalahlekisa. 
Proverbs12:27 Inqeneṙa ayiyoji into ezingelweyo nguye; kodwa okuteleyo yimfuyo yomntu enqabileyo. 
Proverbs12:28 Kuko ubomi emendweni wobulungisa: nasendleleni yabo egqushekileyo akuko kufa. 
Proverbs13:1 UNYANA olumkileyo uyeva imfundiso kayise; kodwa umgxeki akeva intetiso. 
Proverbs13:2 Ngesixakato somlomo womntu wodla okulungileyo; kodwa umpefumlo wabenza ngobuxoki wodla ubudlwengu. 
Proverbs13:3 Olinda umlomo wake, uyagcina ubomi bake: owakamisa kakulu umlomo wake, woba nentshabalalo." 
Proverbs13:4 Umxe̔lo wevila uyakanuka, kanti akuko nto; kodwa umxe̔lo wabakuteleyo wotyetyiswa." 
Proverbs13:5 Ukuteta okubuxoki olungileyo uyakutiya; kodwa okohlakeleyo uyazinukisa, azenzele ihlazo." 
Proverbs13:6 Ubulungisa buyamlondoloza ondlela ilungile: kodwa inkohlakalo iyameyelisela onesono. 
Proverbs13:7 Kuko ozityebisayo, engenanto noko; kuko ozenza ihlwempu, enemfuyo enkulu noko." 
Proverbs13:8 Isizi sobomi bomntu sibubutyebi bake; kodwa ihlwempu aliva intetiso. 
Proverbs13:9 Isikanyiso sabalungileyo siyavuya: kodwa isibane sabakohlakeleyo siya kucinywa. 
Proverbs13:10 Nger̔atshi kuvuswa ingxolisano kupela; kodwa kuko ubulumko nabavumayo ukucetyiswa. 
Proverbs13:11 Imfuyo ezuziweyo ngokungendawo iya kuncitshiswa: kodwa obutayo ngesandla uya kwandisa. 
Proverbs13:12 Itemba elibanjezelweyo liyavisa intliziyo ubuhlungu; kodwa ingumti wobomi inkanuko efeziweyo. 
Proverbs13:13 Olidelayo ilizwi wobujiswa; kodwa owoyikayo umyalelo, yena wovuzwa." 
Proverbs13:14 Umteto welumko ungumtombo wobomi, kuze kumkiwe kuyo imigibe yokufa." 
Proverbs13:15 Ingqondo elungileyo iyanika ufefe: kodwa indlela yabenza ngobuxoki ilukuni. 
Proverbs13:16 Osukuba enokutelekelela uyenza ngokwazi; kodwa ihilihili liyatwabulula ubudenge. 
Proverbs13:17 Isitunywa esikohlakeleyo siyeyela ebubini: kodwa isigidimi esinyanisekileyo siyimpiliso. 
Proverbs13:18 Owalayo imfundiso woba nobuhlwempu nehlazo; kodwa ogqalayo ukwohlwaywa uya kubekwa. 
Proverbs13:19 Imnandi empefumlweni inkanuko efeziweyo; kodwa kuyintshontsho kwizidenge ukumka enkohlakalweni. 
Proverbs13:20 Ohambayo nabalumkileyo wolumka naye: kodwa okolana nezidenge uya kuzuza ingozi. 
Proverbs13:21 Ububi buya kuputuma aboni; kodwa abalungisayo bovuzwa ngokulunga. 
Proverbs13:22 Olungileyo uyashiyela abantwana babantwana ilifa; kodwa ubutyebi bomoni bubekelelwa olungisayo. 
Proverbs13:23 Ukulima kwamahlwempu kuyanika ubuninzi bokutya; kodwa kuko obujiswayo ngokuswela ubugwebo. 
Proverbs13:24 Oyeka uswazi lwake, uyamtiya unyana wake: kodwa omtandayo, uyafuna ukululekwa kwake kamsinyane." 
Proverbs13:25 Olungileyo uyadla kude kube kukuhlutiswa kwomxe̔lo wake; kodwa isisu sabakohlakeleyo soswela ukutya. 
Proverbs14:1 UMFAZI osukuba elumkile, uyaka indlu yake; kodwa lowo unyabileyo, uyayicita ngezandla zake." 
Proverbs14:2 Ohambayo ngokulungisa kwake, uyamoyika uyehova; kodwa onokanda emikweni yake uyamdela." 
Proverbs14:3 Emlonyeni wehilihili kuko uswazi lwer̔atshi; kodwa umlomo wabalumkileyo wobagcina. 
Proverbs14:4 Nxa kungeko zinkabi, isibaya sizé; kodwa kuko ubuninzi benzuzo ngamandla enkabi." 
Proverbs14:5 Inqi̔na elinyanisekileyo aliyi kuxoka; kodwa inqi̔na lobuxoki lopimisela ilwimi. 
Proverbs14:6 Umgxeki uyafuna ubulumko, kanti abuko; kodwa ukwazi kulula konokuqonda." 
Proverbs14:7 Suka ebusweni bomntu osidenge, ngokuba ungaboni kuye umlomo wokwazi." 
Proverbs14:8 Ubulumko botelekelelayo, kukuqonda indlela yake; kodwa ubudenge bawo amahilihili, buyinkohliso." 
Proverbs14:9 Idini letyala liyagculela amahilihili; kodwa pakati kwabalungileyo kuko ukubukwa. 
Proverbs14:10 Intliziyo iyabazi obayo ubuṙaṙa; kanjalo owasemzini akangedibane novuyo lwayo. 
Proverbs14:11 Indlu yabakohlakeleyo iya kucitwa; kodwa intente yabalungileyo yohluma. 
Proverbs14:12 Kuko indlela engati ilungile emntwini, kanti ukupela kwayo kuzindlela zokufa." 
Proverbs14:13 Kwa sekuhlekeni intliziyo inobuhlungu; nokupela kwalo uvuyo kulusizi. 
Proverbs14:14 Ohlehlileyo ngentliziyo, wodikwa yeyake imikwa; kodwa umntu olungileyo ukude kuye." 
Proverbs14:15 Isidenge siyakolwa ngamazwi onke; kodwa otelekelelayo wobonela ekuhambeni kwake. 
Proverbs14:16 Ilumko liyoyika, lize lipambuke ebubini; kodwa ihilihili likukumele, lingenakukatala." 
Proverbs14:17 Oqumba msinya uyenza ngobugeza; kanjalo umntu onamaqinga akohlakeleyo uyatiywa. 
Proverbs14:18 Izidenge zidla ilifa lobugeza; kodwa abatelekelelayo baya kupahlwa ngokwazi. 
Proverbs14:19 Abangalungileyo bayatoba pantsi ebusweni babalungileyo, nabakohlakeleyo ngasemasangweni abalungisayo." 
Proverbs14:20 Ihlwempu liyatiywa kwa ngowalo ummelwane; kodwa isityebi abatandi baso baninzi. 
Proverbs14:21 Omdelayo ummelwane wake, uyona; kodwa owenza ngofefe kumahlwempu, hai itamsanqa lake!" 
Proverbs14:22 Abaposisi na abaqingayo okubi? kodwa banobubele nenyaniso abo baqinga okulungileyo. 
Proverbs14:23 Kuko ukwanda ngako konke ukusebenza; kodwa ukuteta kwomlomo kubang’ ukuswela kupela. 
Proverbs14:24 Ikrone yabalumkileyo ibubutyebi babo; ubudenge bamahilihili bubudenge. 
Proverbs14:25 Inqi̔na lenyaniso liyasindisa imipefumlo; kodwa elenkohliso liyapimisela ilwimi. 
Proverbs14:26 Ngokwoyika uyehova kuko itemba elinamandla; nakulo usapo lwake kwobako indawo yokupepela. 
Proverbs14:27 Ukwoyikwa kwake uyehova kungumtombo wobomi, ukuba kumkiwe emigibeni yokufa." 
Proverbs14:28 Ubungcwalisa bokumkani bungobuninzi babantu; kodwa intshabalalo yenkosi ingokuswela abantu. 
Proverbs14:29 Oqumba kade unokuqonda okukulu; kodwa oqumba msinya uyapakamisa ubugeza. 
Proverbs14:30 Intliziyo elulamileyo ibubomi benyama; kodwa umona ukukubola kwamatambo. 
Proverbs14:31 Obandezelayo ihlwempu, uyamtuka umenzi walo; kodwa uyambeka, owenza ngofefe kosweleyo." 
Proverbs14:32 Okohlakeleyo uyagxotwa esekukohlakaleni kwake; kodwa olungileyo unetemba ekufeni kwake. 
Proverbs14:33 Ubulumko buyapumla entliziyweni yonokuqonda; kodwa okupakati kwazo izidenge kuya kwaziwa. 
Proverbs14:34 Ubulungisa buyapakamisa isizwe; kodwa isono silihlazo labantu bonke. 
Proverbs14:35 Imbuko yokumkani ingasesicakeni esilumkileyo; kodwa ubuṙalaṙume bake boba ngakuso esihlazisayo. 
Proverbs15:1 IMPENDULO etambileyo iyanqanda umsindo; kodwa ilizwi elidubulayo liyavusa uqumbo. 
Proverbs15:2 Ulwimi lwamalumko luyalungisa ukwazi; kodwa umlomo wamahilihili uyabodla ubudenge. 
Proverbs15:3 Amehlo kayehova akuzo zonke indawo, ekangela abakohlakeleyo nabalungileyo." 
Proverbs15:4 Ukululama kwolwimi kungumti wobomi; kodwa inkani ngalo iyenza ukwapuka emoyeni. 
Proverbs15:5 Ihilihili liyadela imfundiso kayise; kodwa ogqalayo ukwohlwaywa uyenza ngokutelekelela. 
Proverbs15:6 Endlwini yolungileyo kuko ubutyebi obuninzi; kodwa enzuzweni yokohlakeleyo kuko inkatazo. 
Proverbs15:7 Umlomo wamalumko uyapangalalisa ukwazi; kodwa intliziyo yezidenge ayinjalo. 
Proverbs15:8 Idini labakohlakeleyo liyintshontsho kuyehova; kodwa umtandazo wabalungileyo uyimvuyiso kuye. 
Proverbs15:9 Yintshontsho kuyehova indlela yokohlakeleyo; kodwa uyamtanda lowo uputumayo ubulungisa. 
Proverbs15:10 Ululeko olubi lwoba kuye oshiyayo indlela; lowo utiyayo ukwohlwayiwa uya kufa. 
Proverbs15:11 Ihadesi nentshabalalelo zipambi kwake uyehova; kangakananina ngakumbi ke intliziyo zosapo lwabantu? 
Proverbs15:12 Umgxeki akayi kumtanda lowo umohlwayayo; akayi kuya kwabalumkileyo. 
Proverbs15:13 Intliziyo evuyayo iyacwayitisa ubuso; kodwa ngobuhlungu bentliziyo umoya ukedamile. 
Proverbs15:14 Intliziyo eqondayo iyafuna ukwazi: kodwa umlomo wamahilihili uyakoliswa bubudenge. 
Proverbs15:15 Yonke imihla yobandezelweyo mibi; kodwa intliziyo ecwayitileyo ingumtendeleko ofuti. 
Proverbs15:16 Intwana encinane, kunye nokwoyika uyehova, ilungile pezu kwendyebo ezininzi, nempitimpiti kunye nazo." 
Proverbs15:17 Isidlo samahlamvu, apo utando lukoyo, silungile pezu kwenkabi etyetyisiweyo, nxa utiyo lukona." 
Proverbs15:18 Umntu onomsindo uyavusa ipike: kodwa lowo uqumba kade uyadambisa impikiswano. 
Proverbs15:19 Indlela yevila injengotango lweminga: kodwa umendo wabalungileyo yindlela epakanyisiweyo. 
Proverbs15:20 Unyana olumkileyo uyavuyisa uyise; kodwa umntu osidenge uyadela unina. 
Proverbs15:21 Ubugeza buluvuyo kulowo oswele ingqiqo; kodwa umntu onokuqonda uyalungisa ukuhamba. 
Proverbs15:22 Amaqinga ayatshabalala nxa ingeko ingcebisano; kodwa ngobuninzi babacebisi aya kuma. 
Proverbs15:23 Kuko uvuyo emntwini ngempendulo yomlomo wake: nelizwi elitetwa ngexesha lalo, linjanina ukuba mnandi!" 
Proverbs15:24 Indlela yobomi kuye olumkileyo isinga pezulu, ukuze apambuke kuso isihogo esipantsi." 
Proverbs15:25 Indlu yabar̔atshileyo uyehova woyicita; kodwa umlimandlela womhlolokazi wowuqinisa. 
Proverbs15:26 Ayintshontsho kuyehova amaqinga okohlakeleyo; kodwa amazwi abacocekileyo ngamazwi amnandi. 
Proverbs15:27 Obawela inzuzo ekohlakeleyo uyakataza indlu yake; kodwa otiyayo amabaso uya kupila. 
Proverbs15:28 Intliziyo yolungileyo iyacingela ukupendula; kodwa umlomo wabakohlakeleyo uyabodla izinto ezimbi. 
Proverbs15:29 Uyehova ukude kubo abakohlakeleyo; kodwa umtandazo wabalungileyo uyawuva. 
Proverbs15:30 Ukukanya kwamehlo kuyavuyisa intliziyo; indaba ezilungileyo ziyatyebisa amatambo. 
Proverbs15:31 Indlebe evayo ukwohlwayelwa ubomi, yohlala pakati kwabalumkileyo." 
Proverbs15:32 Owalayo imfundiso, uyadela owake umpefumlo; kodwa ovayo ukwohlwayiwa, uyazuza ingqondo." 
Proverbs15:33 Ukwoyika uyehova kuyimfundiso yobulumko; kanjalo ululamo luyandulela udumo. 
Proverbs16:1 ZEZOMNTU izilungiselelo zentliziyo; kodwa kuvela kuyehova impendulo yolwimi. 
Proverbs16:2 Yonke imikwa yomntu imhlope kwawake amehlo; kodwa uyehova uyalinganisa imimoya. 
Proverbs16:3 Lahlela kuye uyehova imisebenzi yako; oti ke amaqinga ako aqiniswe. 
Proverbs16:4 Zonke izinto uyehova uzenzele okwake; ewe nokohlakeleyo umenz ele imini yobubi. 
Proverbs16:5 Osukuba enokuqanqalaza ngentliziyo uyintshontsho kuyehova; nangona isandla sibambana nesandla, akayi kuswela ityala." 
Proverbs16:6 Ngabo ububele nenyaniso isono siyaxoliselwa; nangokwoyika uyehova kumkiwa ekukohlakaleni. 
Proverbs16:7 Nxa imikwa yomntu imkolisayo uyehova, uyenza ukuba nentshaba zake zixolane naye." 
Proverbs16:8 Intwana encinane kunye nobulungisa, ilungile pezu kwenzuzo ezininzi ngapandle kwokufaneleyo." 
Proverbs16:9 Intliziyo yomntu iyaqingela indlela yake; kodwa nguyehova obekisa amanyatela ake. 
Proverbs16:10 Izwi elikulu lipezu kwomlomo wokumkani; ekugwebeni umlomo wake awuyi kwenza ngobumenemene. 
Proverbs16:11 Isilungelelaniselo nesilinganiselo esifaneleyo ze zikayehova; ngumsebenzi wake onke amatye okulinganisa enxowa. 
Proverbs16:12 Kuyintshontsho kubo okumkani ukwenza okukohlakeleyo; ngokuba iterone iqiniswa ngobulungisa. 
Proverbs16:13 Umlomo wobulungisa uyimvuyiso kokumkani; nalowo uteta izinto ezifanelekileyo baya kumtanda. 
Proverbs16:14 Umsindo wokumkani u njeng ezitunywa zokufa; kodwa umntu olumkileyo wowudambisa. 
Proverbs16:15 Ekukanyeni kwobuso bokumkani kuko ubomi; nembuko yake injengelifu lemvula yasemva. 
Proverbs16:16 Ukuzuza ubulumko, kulungile kangakananina pezu kwegolide? nokuzuza ingqondo, kuqasheka kangakananina pezu kwesilivere?" 
Proverbs16:17 Umendo wabalungileyo ngowokupambuka enkohlakalweni; ogcina indlela yake, uyalondoloza umpefumlo wake." 
Proverbs16:18 Ir̔atshi liyandulela imbujiswa; nokuqanqalaza kwomoya kuyandulela ukuwa. 
Proverbs16:19 Kulungile ukuba nomoya otobekileyo kunye nabalulamileyo, ngapezu kwokuba kwahlulelwane amaxoba nabaner̔atshi." 
Proverbs16:20 Opata indawo ngokutelekelela, wofumana inyweba; nalowo utembela kuyehova, hai itamsanqa lake!" 
Proverbs16:21 Ontliziyo ilumkile wobizwa ngokuba ngoqondayo; kanjalo ubumnandi benteto buyandisa ufundo. 
Proverbs16:22 Ubutelekelelo bungumtombo wobomi kosukuba enabo; kodwa imfundiso yezidenge ibubudenge. 
Proverbs16:23 Intliziyo yolumkileyo yoqondisa umlomo wake; iya kwongeza ufundo nasekuteteni kwake. 
Proverbs16:24 Amazwi amnandi a njeng entlango yobusi, eyolile empefumlweni, eyimpiliso ematanjeni." 
Proverbs16:25 Kuko indlela engati ilungile emntwini, kanti ukupela kwayo kuzindlela zokufa." 
Proverbs16:26 Lowo usebenzayo uyazisebenzela yena; ngokuba umlomo wake umqu̔ba. 
Proverbs16:27 Umntu wobunginingini uyapanda ububi; napezu kwomlomo wake kunjengomlilo ovutayo. 
Proverbs16:28 Umntu wamamenemene uyavusa impikisano; nomncetezi uyahlukanisa izihlobo. 
Proverbs16:29 Umntu wobudlwengu uyamhenda ummelwane wake, aze amkokele endleleni engalungileyo." 
Proverbs16:30 Ocimayo amehlo ake ukuba aqinge amamenemene, oti vingci umlomo wake, ufezile ububi." 
Proverbs16:31 Izimvi ziyikrone yobungcwalisa, ukuba ziya kufunyanwa endleleni yobulungisa." 
Proverbs16:32 Oqumba kade, ugqitisele oligoṙa; nalowo unamandla pezu kwowake umoya, ugqitisele otimba isixeko." 
Proverbs16:33 Iqashiso liposelwa esifubeni; kodwa kuvela kuyehova konke ukwaba kwalo. 
Proverbs17:1 UMTAMO owomileyo, nokwonwaba kunye nawo, ulungile pezu kwendlu ezeleyo yimibingo enempikiswano." 
Proverbs17:2 Isicaka esilumkileyo soba ngumpati pezu kwonyana ohlazisayo, siti ilifa silahlulelane nabaninawe." 
Proverbs17:3 Imbiza yokucokisa yeyesilivere, nesidlangalala sesegolide; kodwa nguyehova ozilingayo intliziyo." 
Proverbs17:4 Owenza okukohlakeleyo uyapulapula umlomo wokungendawo; ixoki liyabazela ulwimi lwobumenemene indlebe. 
Proverbs17:5 Ogculelayo ihlwempu, uyatuka umenzi walo; ovuyela ilishwa, akayi kuswela ityala." 
Proverbs17:6 Abantwana babantwana bayikrone yamaxego; nobungcwalisa babantwana bungoyise. 
Proverbs17:7 Umlomo wendluliselo awufanelekile kwisityakala; kukancinane kangakananina ngakumbi umlomo wobuxoki ungafanelekile kwinkosi. 
Proverbs17:8 Ibaso lilitye elihle emehlweni omninilo; liya kutamsanqeleka apo lisukuba libeka kona. 
Proverbs17:9 Ogubungela isigqito, uyafuna utando; kodwa ovusa indawo, uyahlukanisa izihlobo." 
Proverbs17:10 Intetiso iya kutshonela kuye oqondayo, ngapezu kwokubetwa kwesidenge kalikulu." 
Proverbs17:11 Okohlakeleyo uyafuna inkani kupela; kodwa isitunywa esibukali siya kutunyelwa yena. 
Proverbs17:12 Iberekazi ehlutiweyo amatole ayo maifumanane nomntu, singabi sisidenge ebugezeni baso." 
Proverbs17:13 Opindezela ngobubi endaweni yokulunga, ububi abusayi kwahlukana nendlu yake." 
Proverbs17:14 Isiqalo sepike si njeng owenzela amanzi isivuzo; ngako yeka impikisano ingekabi shushu. 
Proverbs17:15 Ogwebela okohlakeleyo, nogweba olungileyo, bayintshontsho kuyehova kwa bobabini." 
Proverbs17:16 Yinina ukuba kubeko imali esandleni sesidenge yokutenga ubulumko, nxa ingqondo ingeko?" 
Proverbs17:17 Umhlobo uyatanda ngamaxesha onke, nomzalwana uzalelwe ubunzima." 
Proverbs17:18 Umntu oswele ingqondo uyabambana nesandla, esenza umbambiso ebusweni bomhlobo wake." 
Proverbs17:19 Umtandi wengxolisano ngumtandi wesono; opakamisayo isango lake, uyafuna imbujiswa." 
Proverbs17:20 Ontliziyo ibugwenxa, akayi kufumana okulungileyo; nojikajikayo ngolwimi lwake, uya kweyela ebubini." 
Proverbs17:21 Ozala ihilihili uzenzela usizi; kanjalo uyise wesityakala akayi kuvuya. 
Proverbs17:22 Intliziyo evuyayo iya kunceda ukupila; kodwa umoya okedamileyo uya kwomisa amatambo. 
Proverbs17:23 Okohlakeleyo uyatabata ibaso esifubeni, ukuba atyekise indlela zobugwebo." 
Proverbs17:24 Ubulumko bungasebusweni boqondayo; kodwa amehlo esidenge asencameni yomhlaba. 
Proverbs17:25 Unyana osidenge uyinkatazo kuyise, nobuṙaṙa kulowo owamzalayo." 
Proverbs17:26 Kanjako ukuhlaulisa olungileyo akufanelekile, n okubeta abazinkosi ngenxa yokulungisa." 
Proverbs17:27 Obamba amazwi ake ngowazana nokwazi; nomoya ubungcembe ungumntu wokuqonda. 
Proverbs17:28 Kwa ihilihili, lakuti cwaka, liyabalwa ngokuba lilumko, n ovingcayo umlomo wake, ngokuba ngonokuqonda." 
Proverbs18:1 OZAHLULAYO wofuna okukanukwayo; woba shushu ngakubo bonke ubulumko. 
Proverbs18:2 Isidenge asinyamekeli ukuqonda, sinyamek ela ukuzityila kwentliziyo yaso kodwa." 
Proverbs18:3 Kuti kwakufika okohlakeleyo, kufike nokudela; nakunye nehlazo kufika ukutuka." 
Proverbs18:4 Amazwi omlomo womntu ngamanzi anzulu; umtombo wobulumko ngumlanjana oncencezayo. 
Proverbs18:5 Akulungile ukubuka ubuso bokohlakeleyo, n okusonga olungileyo ekugwebeni." 
Proverbs18:6 Ukuteta kwesidenge kuyangena ekupikiswaneni, nomlomo wake uyabiza izibeto." 
Proverbs18:7 Umlomo wesidenge uyintshabalaliso kuso, nokuteta kwaso kungumgibe wompefumlo waso." 
Proverbs18:8 Amazwi omncetezi anjengamanxeba; ayehlela kwezipakati indawo zombilini wona. 
Proverbs18:9 Kanjalo onqenayo emsebenzini wake, ungumzalwana yena kumciti omkulu." 
Proverbs18:10 Igama likayehova liyinqaba yamandla; olungileyo uyabalekela kuyo, anqabe ke." 
Proverbs18:11 Imfuyo yesityebi isisixeko esinamandla saso; injengodonga olude ekuzindleni kwaso. 
Proverbs18:12 Ingekabiko imbujiswa, intliziyo yomntu inokuqanqalaza; kanjalo, lungekabiko udumo, luko ululamo." 
Proverbs18:13 Onika impendulo ngendawo engekayivanga, oko kububudenge kuye nehlazo." 
Proverbs18:14 Umoya womntu ungaxasa ubulwelwe bake; kodwa umoya okedamileyo ngubanina ongawunyamezelayo? 
Proverbs18:15 Intliziyo yoqondayo iyaqweba ukwazi; nendlebe yabalumkileyo iyafuna ukwazi. 
Proverbs18:16 Ibaso lomntu liyamenzela indawo; liyamkapela ebusweni babakulu. 
Proverbs18:17 Oteta kuqala kwelake ityala unga ulungile; kanti kufika ummelwane wake, amṙoṙonye." 
Proverbs18:18 Iqashiso liyapelisa amapike, lahlule pakati kwabanamandla." 
Proverbs18:19 Umzalwana owoniweyo ugqitisele isixeko esinamandla ngokungeyiswa; amapike anjalo anjengomvalo wenqaba. 
Proverbs18:20 Ngesixakato somlomo womntu, uya kuhlutiswa umbilini wake; ngenzuzo yomlomo wake uya kuhlutiswa." 
Proverbs18:21 Ukufa nokudliwa kwobomi kusemandleni alo ulwimi; nabo balutandayo, baya kudla isixakato salo." 
Proverbs18:22 Ofumene umfazi, ufumene into elungileyo; uzuzile imbuko kuyehova." 
Proverbs18:23 Ihlwempu liyateta imbongozo; kodwa isityebi siyapendula ngobulukuni. 
Proverbs18:24 Umntu onezihlobo ezininzi wozifaka engozini; kodwa kuko umhlobo ogqitisele umzalwana ngokunamatela.
