Proverbs19:3 Ubuhilihili bomntu buyenza gwenxa mdlela yake; ize iqumbele uyehova intliziyo yake. 
Proverbs19:4 Ubutyebi buyazuzisa izihlobo ezininzi; kodwa ihlwempu liyahlulwa kummelwane walo. 
Proverbs19:5 Inqi̔na lobuxoki aliyi kuswela ityala; nopimisela ilwimi, akayi kusinda." 
Proverbs19:6 Baninzi ababongoza ubuso benkosi; kanjalo bonke bazizihlobo kumntu obaselayo. 
Proverbs19:7 Bonke abazalwana behlwempu bayalitiya; kangakananina ngakumbi ke izihlobo zalo nkukwelela kude kulo! liputuma amazwi, akako wona."

Proverbs19:9 Inqi̔na lobuxoki aliyi kuswela ityala; nopimisela ilwimi wotshabalala.

Proverbs19:11 Ubutelekelelo bomntu buyalibazisa ingqumbo yake; bubungcwalisa bake ukuxolela isiposo. 
Proverbs19:12 Umsindo wokumkani unjengokuvungama kwengonyama entsha; kodwa imbuko yake injengombete pezu kwenca. 
Proverbs19:13 Unyana osidenge ulilishwa loyise; namapike omfazi a njengo kucapaza okufuti. 
Proverbs19:14 Indlu nemfuyo zililifa livela koyise; kodwa umfazi otelekelelayo uvela kuyehova. 
Proverbs19:15 Ubuvila buyawisela ebutongweni obukulu; nomntu onqenayo, uya kulamba." 
Proverbs19:16 Ogcinayo umyalelo, uyagcina owake umpefumlo; odelayo indlela zake, uya kufa." 
Proverbs19:17 Owenza ngofefe kolihlwempu, uyaboleka uyehova; nokwenza kwake wokubuyekezela kuye." 
Proverbs19:18 Yohlwaya unyana wako, nxa kuseko itemba; kodwa ungapakamiseli umpefumlo wako ukumbulala." 
Proverbs19:19 Onomsindo omkulu wotwala ukwohlwayiwa; ngokuba nangona umhlangulayo, uya kubuya upinde noko." 
Proverbs19:20 Yiva icebo, wamkele imfundiso, ukuze ulumke ekupeleni kwako." 
Proverbs19:21 Kuko amaqinga amaninzi entliziyweni yomntu; kodwa icebo likayehova, lilo eliya kuma." 
Proverbs19:22 Inkanuko yomntu ibububele bake; kanjalo olihlwempu ulungile kolixoki. 
Proverbs19:23 Ukwoyika uyehova kubang’ ubomi; onako wohlala ekoliwe; akayi kuhlelwa bububi. 
Proverbs19:24 Ivila liyafihla isandla salo esityeni; aliyi kusibuyisela kwa semlonyeni walo. 
Proverbs19:25 Beta umgxeki, soza silumke isidenge; yohlwaya onokuqonda, woqiqa ukwazi ke."

Proverbs19:27 Peza, nyana wam! ukupulapula imfundiso elahlekisayo kuzo iziteto zokwazi." 
Proverbs19:28 Inqi̔na lobunginingini liyagxeka ubugwebo; nomlomo wabakohlakeleyo uyaginya ububi. 
Proverbs19:29 Imigwebo ilungiselwe abagxeki, nezibeto zilungis elwe umhlana wezidenge."

Proverbs20:2 Isoyikeko sokumkani sinjengokuvungama kwengonyama entsha; omqumbisayo uyawona owake umpefumlo. 
Proverbs20:3 Ukuyeka ipike bubungewalisa emntwini; kodwa onke amahilihili oba shushu kulo. 
Proverbs20:4 Ngenxa yobusika ivila aliyi kulima; ngako lonqiba ekwindla, kanti akuko nto." 
Proverbs20:5 Icebo entliziyweni yomntu lingamanzi anzulu; kodwa umntu wokuqonda wolir̔ola. 
Proverbs20:6 Abantu abaninzi boshumayela abanye ngabanye obabo ububele; kodwa umntu onyanisekileyo, ngubanina ongamfumanayo?" 
Proverbs20:7 Olungileyo uyahamba ngenene yake; banetamsanqa ke abantwana bake emva kwake.

Proverbs20:17 Isonka senkohliso simnandi emntwini; kodwa kamva umlomo wake wozaliswa luhlalutye. 
Proverbs20:18 Amaqinga ayaqiniswa ngecebo; ngako yenza imfazwe ngamaqinga alumkileyo. 
Proverbs20:19 Ohambahamba ehleba, uyatyila amahlebo; ngako ungakolani nalowo uhendayo ngomlomo wake." 
Proverbs20:20 Otukayo uyise nonina, isibane sake socinyelwa ebumnyameni obukulu." 
Proverbs20:21 Imfuyo ingazuzwa msinya ekuqaleni; kanti ukupela kwayo akuyi kutanyusanqelwa. 
Proverbs20:22 Ungatsho ukuti: Ndiya kupindezela ububi; kangela kuyehova, wokusiza yena." 
Proverbs20:23 Amatye ngamatye ayintshontsho kuye uyehova; nesilinganiselo senkohliso asilungile sona. 
Proverbs20:24 Amanyatela omntu angaye uyehova; angati nina ke umntu ukuqonda indlela yake? 
Proverbs20:25 Ngumgibe emntwini ukuba atete okuyingcwele ngokunxama, andule ati, emva kwezibambiso, abuye abuze." 
Proverbs20:26 Ukumkani olumkileyo uyacita abakohlakeleyo, ayijikelise pezu kwabo ivili." 
Proverbs20:27 Umpefumlo womntu usisibane sikayehova, esipengulula zonke indawo zapakati zombilini." 
Proverbs20:28 Ukumkani uyalondolozwa bububele nenyaniso; neterone yake uyayisekela ngobubele. 
Proverbs20:29 Ubungcwalisa bamadodana ngamandla awo; nobuhle bamaxego zizimvi. 
Proverbs20:30 Imivimbo yenxeba iyintlambululo kokohlakeleyo, nezibeto ezifikela indawo zapakati zombilini." 
Proverbs21:1 INTLIZIYO yokumkani isesandleni sikayehova njengayo imijelo yamanzi; uyayitobela ngakuko konke akutandayo. 
Proverbs21:2 Yonke imikwa yomntu ifanele kwawake amehlo; kodwa uyehova uyazilinganisa intliziyo. 
Proverbs21:3 Ukwenza ubulungisa nobugwebo, kuqasheka kuyehova pezu kwedini." 
Proverbs21:4 Ukupakama kwamehlo, nokukukumala kwentliziyo, n okukanya kwabakohlakeleyo, kusisono." 
Proverbs21:5 Amaqinga okuteleyo ayayelela ekwandeni kodwa; kanti awabo bonke abanxamileyo, ekusweleni kodwa." 
Proverbs21:6 Ukuzuzwa kwendyebo ngolwimi lwobuxoki, ku njeng omoya opepukileyo wabo bafuna ukufa." 
Proverbs21:7 Ukubada kwabakohlakeleyo kwobakukulisa; ngokuba bemangala ukwenza ubugwebo. 
Proverbs21:8 Ondlela ijikajikayo, ungumntu onetyala; kodwa oyingcwele, umsebenzi wake ufanelekile." 
Proverbs21:9 Kulungile ukuhlala egumbini pezu kwendlu, ngasekubeni kuhlalwe nomfazi wamapike nasendlwini yobudlelana." 
Proverbs21:10 Umpefumlo wokohlakeleyo uyakanuka ububi; umhlobo wake akafumani ufefe emehlweni ake. 
Proverbs21:11 Ngokwohlwayiwa kwomgxeki, solumka isidenge; nangokufundiswa kwelumko, liya kwamkela ukwazi." 
Proverbs21:12 Olungileyo uyanakana indlu yokohlakeleyo; uyabeyelisela abakohlakeleyo ebubini. 
Proverbs21:13 Oti vingci indlebe yake ekukaleni kwehlwempu, kwa yena uya kubiza, angaviwa ke." 
Proverbs21:14 Isipo emfihlekweni siyadambisa uqumbo, nebaso esifubeni umsindo onamandla." 
Proverbs21:15 Kuluvuyo kolungileyo ukwenza ubugwebo; kodwa intshabalalo yoba kubo abenzi benkohlakalo. 
Proverbs21:16 Umntu olahleka kuyo indlela yobutelekelelo, uya kuhlala entlanganisweni yabafileyo." 
Proverbs21:17 Otandayo imihlali woba ngumntu osweleyo; otandayo iveyine neoli akayi kutyeba. 
Proverbs21:18 Okohlakeleyo woba sisizi ngenxa yolungileyo, nowenza ngobuxoki endaweni yabalungisayo." 
Proverbs21:19 Kulungile ukuhlala ezweni elilubala, pezu kwokokuba kuhlalwe nomfazi wamapike nomsindo." 
Proverbs21:20 Kuko indyebo enqwenelekileyo neoli ekayeni lolumkileyo; kodwa umntu osidenge uyayigqiba. 
Proverbs21:21 Oputumayo ubulungisa nobubele, uyafumana ubomi, n obulungisa, nodumo." 
Proverbs21:22 Ilumko liyanyukela esixekweni samaṙoti, liwise pantsi amandla etemba laso." 
Proverbs21:23 Ogcinayo umlomo wake nolwimi lwake, uyagcina umpefumlo wake ebunzimeni." 
Proverbs21:24 Ovutelene ngokuzidla, ungumgxeki igama lake; uyenza ngokukukumala kwer̔atshi." 
Proverbs21:25 Inkanuko yevila yolibulala; ngokuba izandla zalo zimangala ukusebenza. 
Proverbs21:26 Imini yonke liyakanuka kakulu; kodwa olungileyo uyapa, angavimbi ke." 
Proverbs21:27 Umbingelelo wabakohlakeleyo uyintshontsho; kangakananina ngakumbi ke bakuwuzisa ngeqinga elikohlakeleyo? 
Proverbs21:28 Inqi̔na lobuxoki loti tshabalala; kodwa umntu ovayo, uya kuteta kadeshe." 
Proverbs21:29 Umntu okohlakeleyo uyabomeleza ubuso bake; kodwa olungisayo, yena woqinisa indlela yake." 
Proverbs21:30 Akuko bulumko, akuko nangqondo, akuko nacebo, eliya kuma ngakuye uyehova." 
Proverbs21:31 Ihashe liyalungiselwa imini yokulwa; kodwa ulwoyiso lo lukayehova. 
Proverbs22:1 IGAMA elilungileyo liqasheka pezu kwobutyebi obukulu, n embuko ebubele pezu kwesilivere negolide." 
Proverbs22:2 Abazityebi nabangamahlwempu bayahlangana; uyehova ungumenzi wabo bonke. 
Proverbs22:3 Otelekelelayo uyayibona ingozi, azifihle; kodwa izidenge ziyagqita, zenzakale." 
Proverbs22:4 Umvuzo wolulamo olu nokwoyika uyehova, bubutyebi, nodumo, nobomi." 
Proverbs22:5 Kuko ameva n emigibe endleleni yogwenxa; ogcinayo umpefumlo wake wokwelela kude kuzo. 
Proverbs22:6 Luleka umntwana ngokufanelene nendlela yake; woti kwa nokuya amdala, angapambuki kuyo." 
Proverbs22:7 Isityebi sopata amahlwempu ngobukosi; nomboleki woba sisicaka kulowo aboleka kuye. 
Proverbs22:8 Ohlwayelayo ubumenemene wovuna ububi; iti intonga yomsindo wake ipele. 
Proverbs22:9 Oliso libubele, yena wotanyusanqelwa; ngokuba esipa olihlwempu kwisonka sake." 
Proverbs22:10 Gxota umgxeki, lopuma ipike nalo; ewe, kwonqamka impikiswano nehlazo." 
Proverbs22:11 Otanda ubungcwele bentliziyo, omlomo unofefe, ukumkani ungumhlobo wake." 
Proverbs22:12 Amehlo kayehova ayagcina ukwazi; kodwa amazwi owenza ngobuxoki wowatshitshisa. 
Proverbs22:13 Litsho ivila ukuti: Kuko ingonyama pandle; ndobulawa ezitarateni. 
Proverbs22:14 Umlomo wamankazana asemzini usisihogo esinzulu; oqunjelwe nguyehova, uya kweyela kona." 
Proverbs22:15 Ubuhilihili bubotshiwe entliziyweni yomntwana; uswazi lwokululeka lwobukwelelisa kude kuye. 
Proverbs22:16 Obandezelayo ihlwempu ukuba andise okwake, esipa isityebi, woza ngenyaniso ekusweleni." 
Proverbs22:17 TOBA indlebe yako, uve amazwi abalumkileyo, ubekele intliziyo yako ekwazini kwam." 
Proverbs22:18 Ngokuba kuyinto emnandi, nxa uwagcina embilini wako; nxa aya kulungiselelwa kunye emlonyeni wako." 
Proverbs22:19 Ukuze itemba lako libe kuye uyehova, ndikwazisile wona namhla nje, ewe, wena." 
Proverbs22:20 Andikuba̔lelanga na ngapambili, ngawo amacebo nokwazi," 
Proverbs22:21 ukuze ndikwazise inene yamazwi enyaniso; ukuba uyenze impendulo ngamazwi enyaniso kubo abakutumayo? 
Proverbs22:22 Ungadli ihlwempu, ngenxa yokuba lilihlwempu; kanjalo ungamncinezeli obandezelweyo esangweni;" 
Proverbs22:23 ngokuba uyehova eya kutetelela ityala labo, abapange abo bapange bona ubomi." 
Proverbs22:24 Ungadlelani nomntu onomsindo; kanjalo ungahambi nomntu ojalayo; 
Proverbs22:25 hleze uqele imikwa yake, uze uṙintyele umpefumlo wako." 
Proverbs22:26 Ungabi nababambana izandla, nababambela amatyala." 
Proverbs22:27 Ukuba akunanto yokuhlaula, kuyinina ukuba akuhlute uku̔ko lwako ngapantsi kwako?" 
Proverbs22:28 Musa ukushenxisa umlimandlela wakudala, lowo bawenzayo oyihlo bako." 
Proverbs22:29 Uyabona na umntu okuteleyo emsebenzini wake? uya kuma ebusweni bokumkani; akayi kuma ebusweni babamnyama. 
Proverbs23:1 Nxa uhlala pantsi ukuba utye noyinkosi, gqala kunene oko kupambi kwako;" 
Proverbs23:2 uze ubeke isitshetshe emqaleni wako, ukuba ungumntu obawayo." 
Proverbs23:3 Ungakanuki izimnandi zake; ngokuba zikukutya okuxokisayo. 
Proverbs23:4 Ungazameli ukuba nobutyebi: ncama okwako ukuqonda. 
Proverbs23:5 Wobekisa amehlo ako ngakubo na, bungeko nje? ngokuba ngenyamiso buzenzela amapiko; bubaleka njengokozi ngasezulwini." 
Proverbs23:6 Ungadli ukudla kwoliso likohlakeleyo, uze ungakanuki izimnandi zake." 
Proverbs23:7 Ngokuba, njengokuba ekumbula empefumlweni wake, ukwa njalo: Yidla, usele nokusela, utsho ke kuwe; kanti intliziyo yake ayinawe." 
Proverbs23:8 Umtamo wako uwudlileyo wobuya uwuhlanze, uze utshabalalise amazwi ako amnandi." 
Proverbs23:9 Musa ukuteta ezindlebeni zesidenge; ngokuba siya kudela ubuciko bamazwi ako. 
Proverbs23:10 Musa ukushenxisa umlimandlela wakudala; kanjalo ungangeni emasimini enkedama: 
Proverbs23:11 ngokuba umkululi wazo enamandla; yena uya kupikela ityala lazo ngakuwe. 
Proverbs23:12 Sondeza intliziyo yako emfundisweni, nendlebe zako emazwini okwazi." 
Proverbs23:13 Ungabambi ukwohlwaywa kumntwana; nxa umbeta ngoswazi, akayi kufa." 
Proverbs23:14 Uya kumbeta ngoswazi, uze usindise umpefumlo wake esihogweni." 
Proverbs23:15 Nyana wam! ukuba intliziyo yako ilumkile, yovuya eyam intliziyo, kwa eyam." 
Proverbs23:16 Ewe, izintso zam zovuyelela, nxa umlomo wako uteta izinto ezifaneleyo." 
Proverbs23:17 Intliziyo yako mayingabi namona ngabo aboni; kodwa ube sekumoyikeni uyehova imini yonke. 
Proverbs23:18 Ngokuba ngenyaniso kuko umvuzo; netemba lako aliyi kunqunyulwa. 
Proverbs23:19 Yiva wena, nyana wam! ulumke, uyihambise intliziyo yako endleleni." 
Proverbs23:20 Ungabi pakati kwabaseli beveyine, na pakati kwabo bazinxalayo ngenyama;" 
Proverbs23:21 ngokuba umnxili nozinxalayo beya kungena ebuhlwentshini; kanjalo ukwozela kwovatisa ngamajacu. 
Proverbs23:22 Pulapula uyihlo owakuzalayo; uze ungadeli unyoko, nxa amdala." 
Proverbs23:23 Tenga inyaniso, ungatengisi ngayo; kwa no bulumko, noluleko, nengqondo." 
Proverbs23:24 Uyise wolungileyo wogcoba kakulu; nozala olumkileyo wovuya ngaye. 
Proverbs23:25 Uyihlo nonyoko baya kuvuya; ewe, owakuzalayo uya kugcoba." 
Proverbs23:26 Nyana wam! ndipe intliziyo yako; namehlo ako makagqale indlela zam. 
Proverbs23:27 Ngokuba ingnawokazi isisihogo esinzulu, nenkazana yasemzini ingumnxuma oxineneyo." 
Proverbs23:28 Kanjalo yona iyalalela njengenyangaza; iyandisa abo benzayo ngobuxoki pakati kwabantu. 
Proverbs23:29 Ngubanina onobuhlungu? ngubanina onosizi? ngubanina onamapike? ngubanina onokukalaza? ngubanina onamanxeba kungeko tuba? ngubanina onobubomvu bamehlo? 
Proverbs23:30 Ngabalibala kade pezu kweveyine; ngabangenayo ukufuna iveyine epitikeziweyo. 
Proverbs23:31 Ungakangeli iveyine nxa ibomvu, nxa ibengezelayo ebekileni, nxa ihlayo kakuhle." 
Proverbs23:32 Ukupela kwayo, iyaluma njengenyoka, iyasuzela njengebasiliske." 
Proverbs23:33 Amehlo ako aya kukangela amankazana asemzini, nentliziyo yako yopimisela izinto zobumenemene." 
Proverbs23:34 Wauya kuba njengolala pantsi pakati kwolwandle, nanjengolala pantsi encameni yemaste." 
Proverbs23:35 Woti ke: Bandibatyule, andivanga ubuhlungu; bandibetile, ndibe ndingazi ke: ndiya kuvuka ninina? ndopinda ndiyifune kanjako." 
Proverbs24:1 Ungabi namona ngabantu abangalungileyo, kanjalo ungakanuki ukuba nabo." 
Proverbs24:2 Ngokuba intliziyo yabo icamanga ubandezelo, nomlomo wabo uyateta ububi." 
Proverbs24:3 Indlu iyakiwa ngobulumko; nangengqondo iyaqiniswa: 
Proverbs24:4 kanjalo ngokwazi inkambili ziya kuzaliswa ngobutyebi bonke obunqabileyo obuhle. 
Proverbs24:5 Umuntu olumkileyo unamandla; ewe, umntu onokwazi uyomeleza amandla." 
Proverbs24:6 Ngokuba ngawo amaqinga alumkileyo uya kuzenzela imfazwe; kanjalo kuko ingciniso ebuninzini babacebisi. 
Proverbs24:7 Ubulumko buyinto epezulu kwihilihili; alivuli umlomo walo esangweni. 
Proverbs24:8 Ocingayo ukwenza ububi, uya kubizwa ngokuba ngumntu wamaqinga akohlakeleyo." 
Proverbs24:9 Iqinga lobuhilihili lisisono; kanjalo umgxeki uyintshontsho ebantwini. 
Proverbs24:10 Ukuba uyacubuka emhleni wobunzima, amandla ako axinene." 
Proverbs24:11 Ukuba uyalandula ukusindisa abo bar̔olelwayo ekufeni, nabo bahexelayo ekubulaweni;" 
Proverbs24:12 nxa utshoyo ukuti: Bona ke, besingakwazi oku; olinganisa intliziyo, akaqondi na yena? ogcinayo umpefumlo wako, akazi na yena? kanjalo akayi kuvuza abantu njengokwemisebenzi yabo na?" 
Proverbs24:13 Nyana wam! yidla ubusi, ngokuba bumnandi; nencindi, e yolileyo ekuhlangubo lako." 
Proverbs24:14 Kwoba njalo ke ukwaziwa kwobulumko empefumlweni wako: nxa ubufumeneyo, kwandul’ ukubako umvuzo, netemba lako ahyi kunqunyulwa." 
Proverbs24:15 Musa, wena mntu okohlakeleyo! ukulalela ikaya lolungileyo; ungaciti indawo yake yokupumla:" 
Proverbs24:16 ngokuba olungileyo esiwa kasixe̔nxe, abuye avuke; kodwa abakohlakeleyo baya kukubekela engozini." 
Proverbs24:17 Nxa utshaba lwako luwayo, ungavuyi; naxeshekweni luku̔bekayo, mayingagcobi intliziyo yako;" 
Proverbs24:18 hleze abone uyehova, kube kubi emehlweni ake, aze anqande kulo umsindo wake." 
Proverbs24:19 Ungaziqumbisi pezu kwabenzi bokungalungileyo; ungabi namona pezu kwabakohlakeleyo; 
Proverbs24:20 ngokuba kungayi kubako umvuzo kuye ongalungileyo; isibane sabakohlakeleyo siya kucinywa. 
Proverbs24:21 Nyana wam yoyika uyehova nokumkani; ungadibani nabo baguquguqukayo; 
Proverbs24:22 ngokuba ilishwa labo liya kuvuka ngebaqo; nentshabalaliso yabo bobabini, ngubanina oyaziyo?" 
Proverbs24:23 LA MAZWI nawo ngawabalumkileyo. Ukugqalisela ubuso ekugwebeni, akulungile." 
Proverbs24:24 Otshoyo kokohlakeleyo ukuti: Ulungile; abantu baya kumnywebelela, izizwe ziya kumzonda:" 
Proverbs24:25 kodwa kubo abamohlwayayo, kwoba mnandi; napezu kwabo kwoza itamsanqa elilungileyo." 
Proverbs24:26 Kuya kwangwa umlomo walowo owenza impendulo ngamazwi asekuhleni. 
Proverbs24:27 Lungisa umsebenzi wako pandle, uwulungiselele entsimini yako; wandule ukwaka indlu yako." 
Proverbs24:28 Ungabi linqi̔na ngakuye ummelwane wako kungeko tuba; uya kuhanahanisa ngomlomo wako yinina? 
Proverbs24:29 Ungatsho ukuti: Njengokuba enze kum, ndiya kwenje njalo kuye; ndopindezela emntwini njengokwomsebenzi wake." 
Proverbs24:30 Ndadlula ngasentsimini yomutu olivila, nangasemyezweni womntu oswele ingqondo:" 
Proverbs24:31 kekaloku, bona ke, ubumilelwe upela ngamakakakaka; ubuso bawo bebugujungelwe ngamaṙau; notango lwamatye lwawo lube lucitekile." 
Proverbs24:32 Ndaza ndawukangela, ndawubekela intliziyo yam; ndawubonela, ndamkela ululeko:" 
Proverbs24:33 Ibe yintwana yobutongo, ibe yintwana yokunqenqa, ibe yintwana yokuxabanisa izandla kuze kulalwe," 
Proverbs24:34 bandul’ ukuza ubuhlwempu bako njeng omhambi, nokuswela kwako njengoxo̔bileyo." 
Proverbs25:1 KANJALO nalé yimizekeliso ka‐Solomone; leyo amadoda ka‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda ayiba̔layo. 
Proverbs25:2 Kubungewalisa bukatixo ukufihla into; kodwa kubungewalisa bokumkani ukupengulula into. 
Proverbs25:3 Ubude bezulu, nobunzulu bomhlaba, nentliziyo yokumkani, azipengululeki ezonto." 
Proverbs25:4 Susa amagwebu kuyo isilivere, kwandul’ ukupumela incibi impahla." 
Proverbs25:5 Susa okohlakeleyo ebusweni bokumkani, kwandul’ ukuqiniswa iterone yake ngobulungisa." 
Proverbs25:6 Musa ukuzidla ebusweni bokumkani; uze ungemi endaweni yabakulu. 
Proverbs25:7 Ngokuba kulungile ukuba kutshiwo kuwe ukuti: Nyukela apa; ngapezu kwokuba utotyelwe ezantsi ebusweni benkosi, ayibonileyo amehlo ako." 
Proverbs25:8 Unganxameli ukupuma ukuya kupika, hleze uyenze into ekupeleni kwako, nxa ummelwane wako akudanisileyo." 
Proverbs25:9 Pikela ityala lako nommelwane wako; kodwa ihlebo lomnye ungalityili: 
Proverbs25:10 hleze akuhlazise olivayo, luze udumo lwako olubi lungabi semka." 
Proverbs25:11 Ilizwi elityapileyo ukutetwa, li njeng eapele zegolide pakati kwesetyenzwa eliba̔liweyo lesilivere." 
Proverbs25:12 Njeng omsesane wegolide, nesambalo segolide entle, u njalo umohlwayi olumkileyo ngasendlebeni evayo." 
Proverbs25:13 Njengokubanda kwengqweqwe ngexesha lokuvuna, si njalo isigidimi esinyanisekileyo kwabasitumayo; ngokuba sibuyisa umpefumlo wenkosi zaso." 
Proverbs25:14 Umntu oqa̔yisayo ngebaso lobuxoki, u njeng amafu nomoya kwakungeko mvula." 
Proverbs25:15 Ngokuqumba kade inkosi iyoyiswa, nolwimi olutambileyo luyapula itambo." 
Proverbs25:16 Ufumene ubusi na? yidla obukwaneleyo; hleze udikwe bubo, ude ubuhlanze." 
Proverbs25:17 Unyawo lwako malungabiko futi endlwini yomhlobo wako; hleze adinwe nguwe, ade akutiye." 
Proverbs25:18 Umntu onqi̔nayo ubunqi̔na obubuxoki ngakuye ummelwane wake, u njeng esando, nesiṙele, notolo olubukali." 
Proverbs25:19 Ukutemba kowenza ngenkohliso, ngexesha lobunzima, ku njeng ezinyo elapukileyo, nonyawo oluṙunekileyo." 
Proverbs25:20 Umntu ogwabela intliziyo enosizi ngengoma, u njeng ohluta ingubo ngexesha lengqele, nanjeng eyasine pezu kwenetere." 
Proverbs25:21 Ukuba lowo ukutiyayo ulambile, umdlise isonka; nokuba unxaniwe, umseze amanzi;" 
Proverbs25:22 ngokuba uya kufumba amalahle omlilo pezu kwentloko yake, noyehova uya kukuvuza." 
Proverbs25:23 Umoya wasenode uyavelisa imvula; nolwimi lwokujinda, ubuso obujamileyo." 
Proverbs25:24 Kulungile ukuhlala egumbini pezu kwendlu, ngasekubeni kuhlalwe nomfazi wamapike nasendlwini yobudlelana." 
Proverbs25:25 Indaba ezimnandi zivela ezweni elikude, zi njeng amanzi abandayo empefumlweni onxaniweyo." 
Proverbs25:26 Olungileyo ehexa ebusweni bokohlakeleyo, u njeng omtombo oxovulweyo nequla elonakeleyo." 
Proverbs25:27 Ukudla ubusi obuninzi akulungile; kwa njalo ukuzifunela ubungewalisa, asi bubo ubungewalisa." 
Proverbs25:28 Umntu ongenamandla okubamba owake umoya, u njeng sixeko esicitiweyo, esingenaludonga." 
Proverbs26:1 NJENGAYO ingqweqwe ehlotyeni, nanjengayo imvula ngexesha lokuvuna, kwa njalo udumo alufanelekile kwisidenge." 
Proverbs26:2 Njengehobohobo ekupalapaleni, nanjengenkonjane ekubalekeni, kwa njalo isiqalekiso esingenatuba asiyi kuza kubako." 
Proverbs26:3 Izwiniya ilung ele ihashe, umkala ulung ele iqwaṙashe, noswazi lulung ele umhlana wesidenge." 
Proverbs26:4 Ungapenduli isidenge njengobuhilihili baso, hleze ufane naso kwa wena." 
Proverbs26:5 Pendula isidenge njengobuhilihili baso, hleze sibe nokulumka kwawaso amehlo." 
Proverbs26:6 Otumayo umyalezo ngesandla sesidenge, uyazinqumla inyawo, uyasela ubudlwengu." 
Proverbs26:7 Imilenze yesiqwala ibutataka; unjalo umzekeliso emlonyeni wezidenge. 
Proverbs26:8 Njengobopayo ilitye elinqabileyo esisaulweni, unjalo lowo onikela isidenge udumo." 
Proverbs26:9 Njeng ameva enyukela esandleni senxila, unjalo umzekeliso emlonyeni wezidenge." 
Proverbs26:10 Omkulu owadala konke, uyaqesha isidenge, uyaqesha nabagqiti." 
Proverbs26:11 Njengokuba inja ibuyela emhlanzweni wayo, kwa njalo isidenge siyapinda ubuhilihili baso." 
Proverbs26:12 Uyabona na umntu elumkile kwawake amehlo? kuko itemba ngaso isidenge pezu kwake. 
Proverbs26:13 Litsho ivila ukuti: Kuko ingonyama endleleni; ingonyama isezitarateni. 
Proverbs26:14 Ucango luyajinga pezu kwehinje yalo; nevila liyenje njalo pezu kwomandlalo walo. 
Proverbs26:15 Ivila liyatihla isandla salo esityeni; kuyindiniso kulo ukusibuyisela emlonyeni walo. 
Proverbs26:16 Kwawalo amehlo ivila ligqitisile ngobulumko abantu abasixe̔nxe abapendulayo ngengqiqo. 
Proverbs26:17 Umdluli oziqumbisayo epikeni elingelelake, u njeng obamba inja ngendlebe." 
Proverbs26:18 Njengegeza elijulayo izikuni zomlilo, n entolo, nokufa;" 
Proverbs26:19 unjalo umntu okohlisa ummelwane wake, aze ati: Andidlali na?" 
Proverbs26:20 Apo kungeko zinkuni, umlilo uyacimeka; nalapo kungeko mncetezi, ipike liyadamba." 
Proverbs26:21 Njeng amalahle amnyama kuwo amalahle atshayo, nenkuni kuwo umlilo; unjalo umntu wamapike ukupemba impikiswano." 
Proverbs26:22 Amazwi omncetezi anjengamanxeba; ayehlela kwezipakati indawo zombilini wona. 
Proverbs26:23 Umlomo ovutayo, nentliziyo ekohlakeleyo, zi njengalo ukamba oluqatyiweyo ngamagwebu esilivere." 
Proverbs26:24 Otiyayo uyazenzisa ngomlomo wake; nasembilini wake uyabeka inkohliso. 
Proverbs26:25 Nxa alenza limnandi ilizwi lake, ungakolwa nguye; ngokuba intshontsho ezisixe̔nxe zisentliziyweni yake." 
Proverbs26:26 O kutiya kugujungelwa yinkohliso, inkohlakalo yake iya kutyilwa entlanganisweni." 
Proverbs26:27 Ombayo isihogo, uya kweyela kuso; noqengqelela ilitye, lobuyela ngakuye." 
Proverbs26:28 Ulwimi lwobuxoki luyatiya abo bancinezelwayo lulo; nomlomo obutelezi uyeyelisela. 
Proverbs27:1 UNGAZIQA̔YISELI ngemini yangomso; ngokuba ungazi okuya kuveliswa yimini. 
Proverbs27:2 Makudumise wena owasemzini, kungabi ngowako umlomo; kube ngongaziwayo, kungabi lelako ilizwi." 
Proverbs27:3 Ilitye linzima, nentlabati iyasinda; kodwa ingcapukiso yehilihili igqitisile ngobunzima ezo nto zombini." 
Proverbs27:4 Umsindo ububukali, noqumbo lungumsinga; kodwa ngubanina ongemayo pambi kwomona?" 
Proverbs27:5 Ukwohlwaywa ekuhleni kulungile ngapezu kwokutandwa ngasese. 
Proverbs27:6 Anyanisekile amanxeba enziwayo ngotandayo; kodwa ukwanga kwotiyayo kuyandiswa. 
Proverbs27:7 Umxe̔lo ohlutiyo uyadela incindi; kodwa umxe̔lo olambileyo, konke okuṙaṙa kumnandi kuwo." 
Proverbs27:8 Njengentaka ebadulayo endlwini yayo, unjalo umntu obadulayo endaweni yake." 
Proverbs27:9 Ioli nesiqu̔miso ziyavuyisa intliziyo; buyenje njalo ubumnandi bomhlobo womntu, obuvela ekucebeni kwompefumlo." 
Proverbs27:10 Umhlobo wako, nomhlobo kayihlo, ungamshiyi; kanjalo ungayi endlwini yomkuluwe wako ngemini yelishwa lako: ummelwane okufupi ulungile pezu kwomkuluwe okude." 
Proverbs27:11 Yiba nobulumko, nyana wam! uvuyise intliziyo yam; ukuze ndibe nento yokupendula onditukayo." 
Proverbs27:12 Otelekelelayo uyayibona ingozi, azifihle; kodwa izidenge ziyagqita, zenzakale." 
Proverbs27:13 Bamba ingubo yake obambele owasemzini; utabate umbambiso kuye obamb ele umfazi ongaziwayo. 
Proverbs27:14 Otamsanqelisayo umhlobo wake ngelizwi elikulu, evuka kusasa, kuya kumbalelwa ngokuba sisiqalekiso." 
Proverbs27:15 Ukucapaza okufuti emini yemvula enkulu, nomfazi wamapike, ziyafana ezonto." 
Proverbs27:16 Omfihlayo uyafihla umoya; siti isandla sokunene sake sihlangane neoli. 
Proverbs27:17 Intsimbi iyenza bukali intsimbi; kwa njalo umntu uyenza bukali ubuso bomhlobo wake. 
Proverbs27:18 Ogcinayo umkiwane, wodla isiqa̔mo sawo; nalowo ulindayo inkosi yake, uya kubekwa." 
Proverbs27:19 Njengasemanzini ubuso bulungelelana nobuso, kwa njalo intliziyo yomntu ilungelelana nomntu." 
Proverbs27:20 Incw̔aba nentshabalalelo azinakuncanyiswa; kwa njalo amehlo omntu akanakuncanyiswa. 
Proverbs27:21 Imbiza yokucokisa yeyesilivere, nesidlangalala sesegolide; kwa njalo umntu ulingeka ngokudunyiswa kwake." 
Proverbs27:22 Nakuba ulinqusha ihilihili esinqushweni, pakati kwenqolowa enqushwayo, ngesibulo, alisayi kumkelwa bubuhilihili balo noko." 
Proverbs27:23 Qonda kakulu ukumila kwegusha zako; bekela intliziyo yako emihlambini. 
Proverbs27:24 Ngokuba ubutyebi bungesiso isimakade; kwa nekrone ayiyi kubako kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana. 
Proverbs27:25 Utyani buyemka, kubonakale uhlaza, kubutwe amahlamvu entaba." 
Proverbs27:26 Amatakane angawokwambatiswa kwako, nebokwe zilixabiso lentsimi." 
Proverbs27:27 Kanjalo kwobako amasi ebokwe aya kwanela ukudla kwako, n okudla kwendlu yako, nokupiliswa kwezicakakazi zako." 
Proverbs28:1 ABAKOHLAKELEYO bayesaba nxa kungasukelwa mntu; kodwa abalungileyo banqabile njengengonyama. 
Proverbs28:2 Ngenxa yokwona kwelizwe ziba zininzi inkosi zalo; kodwa ngenxa yomntu onokuqonda nokwazi, ubume balo buya kwolulwa." 
Proverbs28:3 Umntu olihlwempu obandezelayo amahlwempu, u njeng emvula ekukulisayo, kude kungabiko ukudla." 
Proverbs28:4 Abashiyayo umteto, bayadumisa abakohlakeleyo; kodwa abagcinayo umteto, bayamelana nabo." 
Proverbs28:5 Abantu abangalungileyo abaqondi ubugwebo; kodwa abo bamfunayo uyehova bayaqonda izinto zonke. 
Proverbs28:6 Ihlwempu elihambayo ngenene yalo, ligqitisele ondlela zigwenxa, noko asisityebi yena." 
Proverbs28:7 Obambayo umteto, ungunyana oqondayo; kodwa odlelana nababawayo, uyahlazisa uyise." 
Proverbs28:8 Oyandisa imfuyo yake ngokudla abanye nangenzuzo engalungileyo, woyihlanganisela umntu oya kukedamela amahlwempu." 
Proverbs28:9 Oyinqandayo indlebe yake ukuba angeva umteto, kwa nomtandazo wake woba yintshontsho." 
Proverbs28:10 Olahlekisa abalungisayo baye endleleni yobubi, uya kweyela yena kwa sesihogweni sake; kodwa abayinene bodla ilifa lokulungileyo." 
Proverbs28:11 Umntu osisityebi ulumkile kwawake amehlo; kodwa ihlwempu eliqondayo liya kumpanda. 
Proverbs28:12 Kuti kwakuvuyelela abalungileyo, kubeko ubungcwalisa obukulu; kodwa kwakupakama abakohlakeleyo, umntu uyafunwa." 
Proverbs28:13 Ofihlayo izono zake, akayi kutamsanqeleka; kodwa ozixelayo azishiye, wofumana ububele." 
Proverbs28:14 Unetamsanqa umntu omana esoyika; kodwa oyenza lukuni intliziyo yake, uya kweyela engozini." 
Proverbs28:15 Umpati okohlakeleyo pezu kwabantu abangamahlwempu, uyingonyama egqumayo nebere ehambahambayo." 
Proverbs28:16 Inkosi esweleyo ingqondo, ifuti ekubandezeleni kanjalo; kodwa otiyayo uqwebo olungalungileyo, uya kwolula imihla yake." 
Proverbs28:17 Umntu obandezelwa ligazi lobomi, uya kubalekela esihogweni; makungabiko omtintayo." 
Proverbs28:18 Ohambayo ngokulungisa, wosindiswa; kodwa ondlela zigwenxa, uya kweyela kanye." 
Proverbs28:19 Olimayo umhlaba wake, wohlutiswa sisonka; kodwa olandela abantu abangendawo, wohlutiswa bubuhlwempu." 
Proverbs28:20 Umntu wenyaniseko uya kwanelwa ngamatamsanqa; kodwa onxamela ukutyeba, akayi kuswela ityala." 
Proverbs28:21 Ukugqalisela ubuso akulungile; ngokuba umntu owenje njalo eya kwona ngenxa yeqekeza lesonka. 
Proverbs28:22 Onxamela ubutyebi ungumntu oliso likohlakeleyo; kanti akazi ukuba uya kuhlelwa kukuswela. 
Proverbs28:23 Omohlwaya umntu, woti kamva afumane ufefe ngapezu kwoteta ngobutelezi." 
Proverbs28:24 Odlayo uyise nonina, esiti: Asi siso isono; lowo ungumlingane womcitakalisi." 
Proverbs28:25 Ompefumlo ukukumeleyo, uyavusa ipike; kodwa otembela kuyehova, uya kutyetyiswa." 
Proverbs28:26 Otembayo eyake intliziyo, usisidenge yena; kodwa ohambayo ngobulumko, yena uya kusindiswa." 
Proverbs28:27 Opayo ihlwempu, akayi kuswela; kodwa ofihla amehlo ake, uya kwanelwa ziziqalekiso." 
Proverbs28:28 Kuti kwakupakama abakohlakeleyo, kuzimele abantu; kodwa bakutshabalala, kwandul’ ukwanda abalungileyo." 
Proverbs29:1 UMNTU onokwohlwaywa futi, oti noko enze lukuni intamo yake, wobujiswa ngebaqo, kungabiko lusizo." 
Proverbs29:2 Nxa abalungileyo basebukulwini, abantu bayavuya; kodwa kwakupatwa ngokohlakeleyo, abantu bayagula." 
Proverbs29:3 Umntu otanda ubulumko, uyavuyisa uyise; kodwa odlelana nengnawokazi, uyacitakalisa imfuyo yake." 
Proverbs29:4 Ukumkani uyamisa ilizwe ngobugwebo; kodwa umntu owamkela amabaso uyalicita. 
Proverbs29:5 Umntu obongayo ummelwane wake, uyaneka utambo emanyateleni ake." 
Proverbs29:6 Ekwoneni kwomntu okohlakeleyo kuko umgibe; kodwa olungileyo uya kugcoba avuye. 
Proverbs29:7 Olungileyo uyalazi ityala lamahlwempu; kodwa okohlakeleyo akayi kugqala ukulazi. 
Proverbs29:8 Abantu bokugxeka bayapitizelisa isixeko; kodwa abalumkileyo bayanqanda umsindo. 
Proverbs29:9 Umntu olumkileyo akupikisana nomntu olihilihili, nokuba uyajala, nokuba uyahleka, akuko ukwonwaba noko." 
Proverbs29:10 Abantu begazi bayatiya oyinene; kodwa abalungisayo bayafuna umpefumlo wake. 
Proverbs29:11 Isidenge siyapumisa wonke umoya wake; kodwa ilumko liyawubamba mva. 
Proverbs29:12 Oyinkosi akupulapula ilizwi lobuxoki, bonke abakonzi bake bangabakohlakeleyo." 
Proverbs29:13 Ihlwempu nomntu wokubandezela bayahlangana; uyehova uyakanyisa amehlo abo bobabini. 
Proverbs29:14 Ukumkani opata amahlwempu ngenyaniso, iterone yake yoqiniswa kude kube ngunapakade." 
Proverbs29:15 Uswazi nokwohlwaya kuyanika ubulumko; kodwa umntwana oyekelwayo uyamhlazisa unina. 
Proverbs29:16 Kuti kwakwanda abakohlakeleyo, kwande ukwona; kodwa abalungileyo bokangela ukuwa kwabo." 
Proverbs29:17 Luleka unyana wako, waeya kukwonwabisa; ewe, wonika umpefumlo wako iziyoliso." 
Proverbs29:18 Nxa kungeko umboniso, abantu baba ngabangevayo; kodwa ogcinayo umteto, hai itamsanqa lake!" 
Proverbs29:19 Osisicaka akayi kululekwa ngamazwi; nakuba aqondayo, akuko impendulo noko." 
Proverbs29:20 Uyabona na umntu onokunxama emazwini ake? kuko itemba ngaso isidenge pezu kwake. 
Proverbs29:21 Owondlayo isicaka sake ngobutataka kwa sebuntwaneni, soda sibe ngunyana ekupeleni." 
Proverbs29:22 Umntu onomsindo uyavusa ipike; nomntu osisibovubovu ufuti ekwoneni. 
Proverbs29:23 Ir̔atshi lomntu liya kumtobela pantsi; kodwa omoya utobekileyo wozuza udumo. 
Proverbs29:24 Owahlulelana nesela, uyatiya owake umpefumlo; uyeva isiqalekiso, angaxeli noko." 
Proverbs29:25 Ukwoyika abantu kwobeka umgibe; kodwa otembayo uyehova womiswa enyangweni. 
Proverbs29:26 Baninzi abafunayo ubuso benkosi; kodwa ukulungiswa kwabantu kuvela kuyehova. 
Proverbs29:27 Umntu wobumenemene uyintshontsho kwabalungisayo; kanjalo ondlela ilungile uyintshontsho kokohlakeleyo. 
Proverbs30:1 AMAZWI ka‐Agure unyana ka‐Yake; isiprofitesho. Yateta indoda leyo ku‐Yitiyeli, ku‐Yitiyeli no‐Yukali." 
Proverbs30:2 Ngenyaniso ndidolile mna pezu kwabantu bonke; andinako ukuqonda kwomntu. 
Proverbs30:3 Ndabendingafundi ubulumko; nokwaziwa kwoyingcwele andikwazi. 
Proverbs30:4 Ngubanina onyukeleyo ezulwini, nohlileyo kona? Ngubanina owubutileyo umoya ezandleni zake? Ngubanina obopileyo amanzi engutyeni? Ngubanina oqinisileyo onke amancam omhlaba? Ngubanina igama lake, ngubanina negama lonyana wake, ukuba uyalazi?" 
Proverbs30:5 Onke amazwi katixo acocekile; ulikaka yena kubo bonke abamtembayo. 
Proverbs30:6 Musa ukwongeza kuwo amazwi ake, hleze akwohlwaye, uze ube lixoki." 
Proverbs30:7 Zimbini izinto endizicelileyo kuwe; ungazibandezi kum ndingekafi: 
Proverbs30:8 Kwelelisa kude kum ubuxoki nolwimi; ungandipi nobuhlwempu nobutyebi; undifunzele ngokudla okundilungeleyo; 
Proverbs30:9 hleze ndibe ndihluti, ndize ndi ku kanyele, nditi: Ungubanina uyehova? okanye hleze ndibe lihlwempu, ndize ndibe̔, ndilipate kakubi igama lotixo wam." 
Proverbs30:10 Ungancetezi isicaka enkosini yaso, hleze sikuqalekise, uze ube netyala." 
Proverbs30:11 Kuko isizukulwana esiqalekisayo uyise, esingamtamsanqelisiyo unina." 
Proverbs30:12 Kuko isizukulwana esimhlope kwawaso amehlo, kanti asihlanzwanga ekunco̔leni kwaso." 
Proverbs30:13 Kuko isizukulwana, anjanina amehlo aso ukuzidla, nenkope zaso ukupakanyiswa!" 
Proverbs30:14 Kuko isizukulwana, amazinyo aso ziziṙele, namazinyo omhlati aso zizitshetshe, okudla amahlwempu asemhlabeni, nabasweleyo pakati kwabantu." 
Proverbs30:15 Isimungunyigazi sinentombi ezimbini, ezitsho ukuti: Sipe, sipe! Kuko izinto zintatu ezingenako ukukoliswa; ewe, zine ezingatshoyo ukuti: Kwanele." 
Proverbs30:16 Lincw̔aba, nesizalo esivalekileyo; ngumhlaba ongenakudikwa ngamanzi, nomlilo ongatshoyo ukuti: Kwanele." 
Proverbs30:17 Iliso eligculela uyise, elidela ukuva unina, onomyai basentilini bolincotula, namatole okozi olidla." 
Proverbs30:18 Kuko izinto zintatu ezindinqabeleyo; ewe, zine endingazaziyo:" 
Proverbs30:19 Yindlela yokozi esibakabakeni; yindlela yenyoka pezu kweliwa; yindlela yenqanawa pakati kwolwandle; nendlela yendoda entombini. 
Proverbs30:20 Injalo indlela yomṙexezikazi; uyadla, asule umlomo wake, ati: Andenzanga nkohlakalo." 
Proverbs30:21 Ngenxa yezinto ezintatu umhlaba uyazanyazanyiswa, nangenxa yezine ukohliwe kukuzinyamezela:" 
Proverbs30:22 Ngenxa yesicaka, sakuba nobukosi; nesityakala, sakuhluta kukudla;" 
Proverbs30:23 ngenxa y enkazana etiyekayo, yakwenda; nesicakakazi, sakuba yindlalifa yenkosikazi yaso." 
Proverbs30:24 Kuko izinto zine ezincinane pezu kwomhlaba, kanti zilumkile zona kakulu:" 
Proverbs30:25 Imbovane zingabantu abangenamandla, kanti ziyalungisa ukutya kwazo ehlotyeni." 
Proverbs30:26 Imbila zingabantu ababutataka, kanti ziyamisa izindlu zazo eweni." 
Proverbs30:27 Inkumbi azinakumkani, kanti ziyapuma zonke ngamabandlabandla." 
Proverbs30:28 Isigcawo siyabambelela ngezandla zaso, sibako nasezingxandeni zokumkani." 
Proverbs30:29 Kuko izinto zintatu ezilungisa ukunyatela; ewe, zine ezilungisa ukuhamba:" 
Proverbs30:30 Yingonyama, enobuṙoti pakati kwamaṙamncwa, ingabuyi nakwelinye;" 
Proverbs30:31 yinja yomoya; nenkunzi yebokwe; nokumkani okungeko ukumelana naye. 
Proverbs30:32 Ukuba wenzile ngobudenge ekuzipakamiseni, nokuba uqingile okukohlakeleyo, isandla sibe semlonyeni!" 
Proverbs30:33 Ngokuba ukuncinezelwa kwamasi kuvelisa inqaka, nokuncinezelwa kwempumlo kuvelisa igazi; kwa njalo ukuncinezelwa kwomsindo kuyavelisa impikiswano." 
Proverbs31:1 AMAZWI ka‐Lemuweli ukumkani; isiprofitesho owabesifundiswa ngunina. 
Proverbs31:2 Yinto nina, nyana wam? yinto nina, nyana wesizalo sam? ewe, yinto nina, nyana wezibambiso zam?" 
Proverbs31:3 Musa ukunika amandla ako kuwo amankazana, nendlela zako kuko okutshabalalisayo okumkani." 
Proverbs31:4 Akufanele okumkani, Lemuweli! akufanele okumkani ukusela iveyine, nenkosi ukukanuka uselo olunamandla:" 
Proverbs31:5 hleze asele, alibale umteto, aze ajike ityala lababandezelweyo bonke." 
Proverbs31:6 Nikani uselo olunamandla koza kububa, neveyine kwabampefumlo uṙaṙa." 
Proverbs31:7 Makasele, aze alibale ubuhlwempu bake, angabi sakumbula ubunzima bake." 
Proverbs31:8 Vulela oliyilo umlomo wako; wuvulele ityala labo bonke abazinkedama. 
Proverbs31:9 Vula umlomo wako, lungisa ukugweba, utetelele olihlwempu nosweleyo." 
Proverbs31:10 UMFAZI otembekileyo ngubanina ongamfumanayo? ngokuba ixabiso lake ligqitisele irubi kakulu. 
Proverbs31:11 Intliziyo yendoda yake iyatembela kuye, ukuze ingasweli inzuzo." 
Proverbs31:12 Uya kuyenza okulungileyo, angayenzi okubi, yonke imihla yobomi bake." 
Proverbs31:13 Uyafuna uboya nefelase, anyamekele ukusebenza ngezandla zake." 
Proverbs31:14 Unjengazo inqanawa zabatengi; uyazeka ukutya kwake kwa kude. 
Proverbs31:15 Kanjalo uyavuka kusesebusuku, aze anike abendlu yake ukudla, nezicakakazi zake okuzimiselweyo." 
Proverbs31:16 Uyacingela intsimi, ayizuze ke; ngesixakato sezandla zake uyatyala umyezo." 
Proverbs31:17 Uyabinqa isinqe sake ngamandla, azomeleze ingalo zake." 
Proverbs31:18 Uyaqiqa ukuba intengo yake ilungile; isibane sake asicimeki ebusuku. 
Proverbs31:19 Izandla zake uyazolulela kuso isipindele; neminwe yake iyabamba idistafe. 
Proverbs31:20 Isandla sake uyasitwabululela olihlwempu, nezandla zake uyazolulela osweleyo." 
Proverbs31:21 Akoyikeli abendlu yake ngenxa yengqweqwe; ngokuba bonke abendlu yake bambesiwe ngengubo ezibomvu. 
Proverbs31:22 Uyazenzela izigubungelo zokwandlala; yiqiya eshiceneyo neyebomvumnyama ukuvata kwake. 
Proverbs31:23 Indoda yake iyaziwa emasangweni, nxa ihleli nabadala belizwe." 
Proverbs31:24 Uyenza ihempe zeqiya, atengise ngazo; nemibinqo uyayinikela umtengi." 
Proverbs31:25 Amandla nodumo sisivato sake; kanjalo uyahlekela ixesha elizayo. 
Proverbs31:26 Uyavula umlomo wake ngobulumko; nomteto wobubele upezu kwolwimi lwake. 
Proverbs31:27 Uyabonela emikweni yabendlu yake; nesonka sobuvila akasidli. 
Proverbs31:28 Abantwana bake bayasuka, bambize ngonetamsanqa; iyasuka indoda yake, imdumise:" 
Proverbs31:29 Zininzi intombi ezenzileyo ngokukolisa, kodwa wena ugqitisile pezu kwazo zonke!" 
Proverbs31:30 Isoya sibuxoki, nobunzwakazi buyinto engendawo; kodwa umfazi omoyikayo uyehova, yena uya kudunyiswa." 
Proverbs31:31 Mnikeni ngokwesixakato sezandla zake; eyake imisebenzi mayimdumise emasangweni. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 AMAZWI omshumayeli, unyana ka‐Davide, ukumkani e‐Yerusaleme." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Okungendawo kwokungendawo, utsho umshumayeli, okungendawo kwokungendawo; konke kokungendawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Unenzuzo yanina umntu ngawo wonke umzamo wake azama ngawo ngapantsi kwelanga? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Esinye isizukulwana siyemka, n esinye isizukulwana siyeza; kodwa umhlaba umi kude kube ngunapakade." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Ilanga nalo liyapuma, ilanga kanjalo liyatshona, linxamela endaweni yalo apo lipuma kona." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Umoya uya ngasesuyide, uyajikela ngasenode; uyamana uzunguleza, uze umoya ubuyele kuzo injikelezelo zawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Yonke imilambo iya elwandle; ulwandle aluzele noko; londawo imilambo iya kuyo, ibuya iye kona kanjako." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Onke amazwi anokudinwa; uti umntu akohlwe kuwateta; iliso alincanyiswa kukubona, nendlebe ayizaliswa kukuva." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Lonto ebise iko, yileyo esaya kubako; naleyo ese yenziwe, yileyo esaya kwenziwa: akuko nanto entsha ngapantsi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Kuko into na ekungatiwa ngayo: Bona ke, yinto entsha le? Ibise iko kade, ngamaxesha akudala abepambili kuti." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Akuko inkunjulwa yezinto zamatanci; kanjalo nezinto zasemva eziza kubako, akuyi kubako inkunjulwa yazo pakati kwabo abaya kuza mva." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 MNA, mshumayeli, bendingukumkani pezu kwo‐Sirayeli e‐Yerusaleme." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ndaza ndanikela intliziyo yam ukufuna nokupanda ngobulumko konke okwenziwayo ngapantsi kwezulu: lomsebenzi onzima utixo uwunikile konyana babantu, ukuba bazisebenzise ngawo." 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Ndagqala yonke imisebenzi eyenziwayo ngapantsi kwelanga; kekaloku bona ke, yonke ikokungendawo nokukatazeka kwomoya." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Okugotyiweyo akungelungiswe; nokuswelekileyo akungebalwe. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Ndateta nentliziyo yam, ndisiti: Mna, bona ke, ndandisile kakulu ubulumko ngapezu kwabo bonke abebeko pambili kum pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme; ewe, intliziyo yam ikolisile ukugqala ubulumko nokwazi." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ndaza ndanikela intliziyo yam ukwazi ubulumko, nokwazi ubugeza nobudenge: ndaqonda ukuba oku nako kukukatazeka kwomoya." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Ngokuba ebuninzini bobulumko kuko ubuninzi benkatazo; nalowo owandisayo ukwazi, uyandisa ubuhlungu." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Ndati entliziyweni yam: Yiza ke, mandikulinge ngemihlali, uze udle ubuyolo: kekaloku bona ke, oku kokungendawo nako." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ndati ngohleko: Luyageza; nangemihlali: Iyenza nina le? 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Ndafuna entliziyweni yam ukur̔ola inyama yam ngeveyine, intliziyo yam isakapa ngobulumko; nokubamba ubudenge, ndide ndibone ukuba kuyinina oko kulungele onyana babantu, abaya kukwenza ngapantsi kwezulu, ngenani lemihla yobomi babo." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Ndazenzela imisebenzi emikulu; ndazakela izindlu; ndazityalela amasimi emiti yeveyine; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 ndazenzela izitiya nemiyezo, ndatyala kuzo imiti yeziqa̔mo zentlobo zonke;" 
Ecclesiastes2:6 ndazenzela amacibi amanzi, kuze kunyelwe ngawo ihlati lihluma imiti;" 
Ecclesiastes2:7 ndazuza izicaka nezicakakazi, ndabendinabo abazelweyo endlwini yam; kanjalo bendinemfuyo yenkomo nezimvu into eninzi, ingapezu kweyabo bonke abebepambili kum e‐Yerusaleme;" 
Ecclesiastes2:8 ndazibutela kwa nesilivere negolide, nezinto ezinqabileyo zokumkani nezamazwana; ndazizuzela abaculi nabaculikazi, neziyoliso zonyana babantu, umfazi nabafazi." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Ndaba mkulu ke, ndanda ngapezu kwabo bonke abebepambili kum e‐Yerusaleme; kanjalo ubulumko bam bebusahleli nam." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Nako konke akubizayo amehlo am andikubambanga kuwo; andiyinqandanga intliziyo yam nakwomnye umhlali: ngokuba intliziyo yam ibivuya ngawo wonke umzamo wam; oku ke bekusisabelwa sam sivela kuwo wonke umzamo wam. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Ndaza ndabeka ngakuyo yonke imisebenzi ezibe ziyenzile izandla zam, nangakuwo umzamo endibe ndizamile ngako ukuyenza: kekaloku bona ke, konke bekukokungendawo nokukatazeka kwomoya; ewe, akuko nzuzo ngapantsi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Ndasuka ndabeka ukugqala ubulumko, nobugeza, nobudenge: ngokuba eya kwenza nto nina lowamntu oya kumlandela ukumkani? kwa oko sekukade kwenziwe." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ndandula ndabona ukuba ubulumko buyagqitisela ubudenge, kwa njengokuba ukukanya kugqitisela ubumnyama." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Olumkileyo amehlo ake asentlokweni yake, kanti osidenge uyahamba ebumnyameni; sendiyazi noko, kwa mna, ukuba bohlelwa sisihlo sinye bonke." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ndaza ndati entliziyweni yam: Njengokuba kuhlela isidenge, kwa njalo kuya kundihlela kwa mna; kunganina ke ngoko ukuba ndigqitisile ngobulumko? Ndandul’ ukuteta entliziyweni yam ukuti: Oku kokungendawo nako." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Ngokuba kungeko inkunjulwa kwolumkileyo njengeyosidenge kude kube ngunapakade; ngokokuba, njengapambili, emihleni ezayo bolityalwa kwa bonke. Hai ke ukufa kwolumkileyo ukufana nokwesidenge!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Ngako ndanditiya ubomi, ngokuba ubububi kum lomsebenzi owenziwayo ngapantsi kwelanga: ngokuba konke kokungendawo nokukatazeka kwomoya." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ewe, ndayitiya yonke inzuzo yam endiyizameleyo ngapantsi kwelanga, ngokuba ndiya kuyishiyela lamntu oya kubako emva kwam." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Kanti ngubanina owaziyo ukuba woba lilumko, woba ligeza, kusinina? Woti ke noko abe namandla pezu kwayo yonke inzuzo yam endiyizameleyo, nendenzileyo ngobulumko ngayo, ngapantsi kwelanga. Oku kokungendawo nako." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Ndaza ndajika ukuyenza intliziyo yam incame pezu kwawo wonke umzamo endazama ngawo ngapantsi kwelanga. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Ngokuba kuko umntu omzamo wake ungobulumko, nangokwazi, nangokukutala; kanti wowushiyela umntu ongazamanga ngawo ube sisabelwa sake. Oku nako kokungendawo nobubi obukulu." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Ngokuba kuyinto nina umntu anako ngawo wonke umzamo wake, nangako konke ukukatazeka kwentliziyo yake, azamile ngawo ngapantsi kwelanga?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Ngokuba yonke imihla yake ibuhlungu, nomsebenzi wake uyinkatazo; kwa sebusuku ayipumli intliziyo yake. Oku kokungendawo nako." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Akuko nto elungele umntu ngapezu kwokuba atye, asele, awuvise umpefumlo wake ubuyolo kuwo umzamo wake. Ndayibona nalento ukuba yavela esandleni sikatixo." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Ngokuba ngubanina ongatyayo, ngubanina onganxamelayo, ngapezu kwam?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Ngokuba umntu olungileyo ebusweni bake emnika ubulumko, nokwazi, novuyo; kodwa umoni uyamnika umsebenzi wokuhlanganisa nokubuta, ukuba anike kolungileyo ebusweni bukatixo. Oku kokungendawo nokukatazeka kwomoya nako." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 KUKO umzuzu kuzo zonke izinto, nexesha kuyo yonke imicimbi ngapantsi kwezulu:" 
Ecclesiastes3:2 ixesha lokuzalwa, nexesha lokububa; ixesha lokutyala, nexesha lokudonyula oko kutyaliweyo;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 ixesha lokubulala, nexesha lokupilisa; ixesha lokucita, nexesha lokwaka;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 ixesha lokulila, nexesha lokuhleka; ixesha lokukala, nexesha lokududa;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 ixesha lokuposa amatye, nexesha lokubuta amatye; ixesha lokusingata, nexesha lokupepa ukusingata;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 ixesha lokufuna, nexesha lokulahlekisa; ixesha lokugcina, nexesha lokulahla;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 ixesha lokuṙazula, nexesha lokutungelanisa; ixesha lokuti cwaka, nexesha lokuteta;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 ixesha lokutanda, nexesha lokutiya; ixesha lemfazwe, nexesha loxolo." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Unenzuzo yanina lowo osebenzayo, ngoko azamileyo ngako?" 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Ndiwugqalile umsebenzi awunikileyo utixo konyana babantu, ukuba bazisebenzise ngawo." 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Zonke izinto uzenzile zintle ngexesha lazo: kanjalo ubunapakade ububekile entliziyweni yabo, ekungeko mntu ongati ngapandle kwabo afumane umsebenzi awenzileyo utixo, ekuqaleni kude kube sekupeleni." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Sendikwazi ukuba akuko nto ebalungeleyo, kupela ukuvuya nokuziyolisa ekudleni kwabo ubomi." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Nakanjalo, ukuba abantu bonke batye, basele, badle ubuyolo kuwo wonke umzamo wabo, kusisipo sikatixo oko." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Sendikwazi ukuba konke akwenzayo utixo, oko kwobako kude kube ngunapakade; akungongezwe nto kuko, akungesuswe nto kuko kanjako; uyenje njalo utixo, ukuba kwoyikwe ebusweni bake." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Lonto ekoyo, ibise iko kade, naleyo iza kubako, ibise iko kade; ngokuba utixo ebiza edlulileyo." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Nakanjako, ndabona ngapantsi kwelanga indawo yobugwebo, ukuba inkohlakalo ikona; nendawo yobulungisa, ukuba inkohlakalo ikona." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ndati entliziyweni yam: Olungileyo nokohlakeleyo wobagweba utixo: ngokuba kuko ixesha kuyo yonke imicimbi nakuyo yonke imisebenzi kona apo. 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndati entliziyweni yam, pezu kwendawo yonyana babantu, kukuba utixo abalinge, nokuba babone ngokwabo ukuba ba njengazo izilo bona." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ngokuba okuhlela onyana babantu, nokuhlela izilo, — bahlelwe yinto ekwa nye; njengokububa kwabo bona, kunjalo ukububa kwazo zona: ewe, banomoya umnye bonke; kanjalo ukudlula kwabantu pezu kwezilo akubonakali; ngokuba bonke bekokungendawo." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Bonke baya endaweni nye; bonke bavela elutulini, bonke bayabuyela elutulini kanjako." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ngubanina owaziyo umoya wonyana babantu ukuba uyanyukela pezulu na, nomoya wezilo ukuba uyehlela ngapantsi emhlabeni na?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Ngako ndabona ukuba akuko nto elungileyo, ngapezu kwokuba umntu avuye emisebenzini yake; ngokuba oku kusisabelwa sake; ngokuba eya kuziswa ngubanina, ukuba akangele oko okuya kubako emveni kwake?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Ndaza ndabuya ndagqala yonke imibandezelo eyenziwayo ngapantsi kwelanga: kekaloku nanziya inyembezi zababandezelweyo, kanti bebengenamku̔zi; nasesandleni sababandezeli babo bekuvela ubudlwengu, kanti bebengenamku̔zi." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ngako ndancoma abafileyo abakade befile, ngapezu kwabahleliyo abasahleli ngoku." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Ewe, ulungile pezu kwabo bobabini lowo ongekabiko, ongabonanga okokwenza okubi okwenziwayo ngapantsi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Kanjako, ndagqala wonke umzamo, nako konke ukukutala emsebenzini, ukuba ngoko omnye unomona ngomnye. Oku kokungendawo nokukatazeka kwomoya nako." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Isidenge siyaxabanisa izandla zake, kanti siyadla inyama yaso." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Isandla sinye sizele kukwonwaba, silungile pezu kwazo izandla zozibini zizele kukuzama nokukatazeka kwomoya." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ndandula ndabuya ndagqala into engendawo ngapantsi kwelanga. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kuko omnye, kungeko owesibini; ewe, akanamntwana, akanamninawe; uti wonke umzamo wake ungapeli noko; kwa iliso lake alincanyiswa bubutyebi; kanjalo akatsho ukuti: Ngubanina endimzamelayo, nendivimba umpefumlo wam ubuyolo? Oku kokungendawo nako, ewe, ngumsebenzi onzima." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Ababini bagqitisele oyedwa; ngokuba benomvuzo olungileyo ngenxa yomzamo wabo. 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Ngokuba, nxa bawayo, omnye eya kupakamisa umlingane wake: kodwa au yena oyedwa owayo, kungeko nje owesibini ukuba amsukise!" 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Kanjako, ukuba ababini bayalalana, bandule ukufudumala; kodwa oyedwa, angati nina ukufudumala?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Kanjalo ukuba umntu uyeyisa yena oyedwa, ababini baya kuma pambi kwake; uti umsonto osontiweyo katatu ungaqaulwa kamsinya." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Umfana olihlwempu olumkileyo, ulungile pezu kwokumkani omdala osisidenge, ongabi sakwazi ukuyalwa." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Ngokuba omnye epuma endlwini yababanjwa ukuba abe ngukumkani, nxa, kanjalo, ozelweyo ebukumkanini bake aba lihlwempu." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndabona bonke abahleliyo abahamba ngapantsi kwelanga, kunye nomfana lowo, owesibini, opakamayo esikundleni sake." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Akuko ukupela kubo bonke abantu, kubo bonke abepambi kwabo; noko, abo balandelayo abayi kuvuya ngaye. Ngenyaniso oku kokungendawo nokukatazeka kwomoya nako." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 GCINA unyawo lwako nxa uyayo endlwini katixo, ube kufupi ukuba uve, ngapezu kwokuba ulinike idini lezidenge: ngokuba zona zingazi ukuba ziyenza okubi." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Unganxami ngomlomo wako, nentliziyo yako maingakaulezi ukuku̔pa into ebusweni bukatixo: ngokuba utixo esezulwini, kanti wena usemhlabeni: ngako oko maabe mancinane amazwi ako:" 
Ecclesiastes5:3 ngokuba kusiza ipupa ngobininzi bomsebenzi, nokuteta kwesidenge ngobuninzi bamazwi." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Xeshekweni usenza isibambiso kutixo, ungalibali ukusifeza; ngokuba engenanyamekelo ezidengeni: oko ubambisile ngako, kufeze." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kulungile ukuba ungabambisi, ngapezu kwokuba ubambise uze ungafezi." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Ungavumeli umlomo wako ukuba uyenze inyama yako yone; kanjako ungatsho ebusweni bengelosi ukuti sisiposo: kunganina ukuba utixo aqumbele ukuteta kwako, abubise nomsebenzi wezandla zako?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Ngokuba ebuninzini bamapupa kuko nezinto ezingendawo; ziko na kuwo amazwi amaninzi: kodwa wena yoyika utixo. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Nxa ubonayo ukubandezelwa kwamahlwempu, nokuhlutwa kwobugwebo nobulungisa, elizwaneni, ungati nqa pezu kwomcimbi lowo: ngokuba kuko opezulu elinda opezulu, nabapezulu pezu kwabo bona." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Kanjalo inzuzo yomhlaba ingenxa yabo bonke; kwa ukumkani uyancedwa ngentsimi. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Otandayo imali akakoliswa yimali; nalowo utandayo ubutyebi akakoliswa yinzuzo. Oku kokungendawo nako. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Nxa impahla yandayo, bayanda abo bayidlayo; kanjalo umniniyo; unoncedo lwanina, kupela ukukangela ngamehlo ake?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Bumnandi ubutongo bosebenzayo, nokuba yinto encinane, nokuba yinto enkulu ayityayo; kodwa ubuninzi bosityebi abumvumeli ukuba alale ubutongo." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Kuko ububi obuhlungu endibubonileyo ngapantsi kwelanga, — ubutyebi bugcinelwe umninibo bube yeyake inzakalo." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Ngokuba ubutyebi obo butshabalala ngendawo yengozi; aze amzale unyana, nxa angenanto esandleni sake." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Njengokuba ebepuma esiswini sonina, wobuya emke ezé, njengokuba ebesiza njalo; waengayi kwamkela nanto ngomzamo wake, angayipatayo esandleni sake." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Kanjako oku bububi obuhlungu nako, ukuba njengendawo zonke zokuza kwake kwoba njalo ukumka kwake: aze abe nenzuzo yanina ozameleyo umoya?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Kanjalo imihla yake yonke uyadla ebumnyameni, ecapukile, enobuhlungu nengqumbo." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Nanku oko ndikubonileyo mna: kulungile, yinto entle, ukuba umntu atye, asele, adle ubuyolo kuwo wonke umzamo wake azamayo ngawo ngapantsi kwelanga, ngenani lemihla yobomi bake ayipiweyo ngutixo; ngokuba oko kusisabelwa sake." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Kanjalo bonke abantu abapiweyo ngutixo ubutyebi nendyebo, ukuba ubanikile amandla okudla kuzo, nokutabata isabelwa sabo, nokuvuya emzanyeni wabo, kusisipo sikatixo oku." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Ngokuba engayi kukumbula kakulu imihla yobomi bake, ngokuba utixo e m sebenzisa ngovuyo lwentliziyo yake." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 KUKO ububi endibubonileyo ngapantsi kwelanga, obunzima pezu kwabantu:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 nanku umntu opiweyo ngutixo ubutyebi, nendyebo, nodumo, ude umpefumlo wake ungasweli luto kuko konke akukanukayo, kanti utixo akamnikanga amandla okudla kuko, koko owasemzini ekudla. Oku kokungendawo nobuhlungu obubi." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Nakuba umntu ebeya kuzala ikulu labantwana, ahlale iminyaka ibe mininzi, ide ibe yinto enkulu imihla yeminyaka yake, ukuba umpefumlo wake awukoliswa bubuyolo, nokuba kanjalo akanancw̔aba, nditi: Isisu esipumayo silungile pezu kwake." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ngokuba sisiza ngokungendawo, simka ngobumnyama, ewe, igama laso ligujungelwa ngobumnyama:" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 kanjako ilanga asilibonanga, asilazanga: esi sinokupumla ngapezu kwalowo." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 He, ukuba uyahlala iwaka leminyaka kabini, nobuyolo akabuboni, — abayi endaweni nye bonke na?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Wonke umzamo womntu ungenxa yomlomo wake, kanti umxe̔lo awuzaliswa noko." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Ngokuba ilumko linenzuzo yanina ngapezu kwesidenge? lineyanina ihlwempu, elaziyo ukuhamba pambi kwabapilileyo?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Umbono wamehlo ulungile pezu kwokudungudela kwompefumlo. Oku kokungendawo nokukatazeka kwomoya nako. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Lonto ebise iko seibizwe ngegama layo kade; kanjalo, kuyaziwa ukuba nguye umntu, nokuba akangepike nalowo umdlulayo ngamandla." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Kuko indawo ezininzi nje ezikwandisayo okungendawo, unenzuzo yanina umntu?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ngokuba ngubanina okwaziyo oko kulungele umntu ekudliweni kwobomi, ngenani lemihla yobomi bake obungendawo, ayidlulisayo njengesitunzi? ngokuba ngubanina ongaxelelayo umntu oko okuya kubako emveni kwake ngapantsi kwelanga?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 IGAMA elilungileyo lilungile pezu kwamafuta amnandi, nomhla wokufa kwomntu pezu kwomhla wokuzalwa kwake." 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kulungile ukuya endlwini yesililo, ngapezu kwokuya endlwini yesidlo; ngokokuba oko kukukupela kwabantu bonke; woti ke opilileyo akubekele intliziyo yake." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Usizi lulungile pezu kwokuhleka; ngokuba ngokudana kwobuso ilungiswa intliziyo. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Intliziyo yabalumkileyo isendlwini yesililo, kodwa intliziyo yezidenge isendlwini yemihlali." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kulungile ukuba kuviwe ukutetisa kwelumko, ngapezu kwokuba umntu eve ingoma yezidenge." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ngokuba njengokuṙaṙazela kwameva ngapantsi kwembiza, kunjalo ukuhleka kwesidenge. Oku kokungendawo nako." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ngokuba imbandezelo imatisa olumkileyo, nebaso liyonakalisa intliziyo." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Ukupela kwendawo kulungile pezu kwokuqala kwayo; ukuqumba kade kugqitisele ukuqanqalaza. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Unganxami ngomoya wako ukuqumba; ngokuba uqumbo luhleli esifubeni sezidenge. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ungatsho ukuti: Bekuyinina ukuba imihla yamatanci ibilungile pezu kwalé? ngokuba kungengabulumko ukuba ubuze ngoku. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ubulumko bulungile kwa njengelifa; buyinzuzo ke kwabo balibonayo ilanga. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Ngokuba ubulumko sisikuselo, nemali sisikuselo nayo; kodwa indluliselo yokwazi, kukuba ubulumko bupilisa abanabo." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Gqala umsebenzi katixo: ngokuba ngubanina ongalungisayo oko akugobisileyo? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Uti emhleni wobutamsanqa ube nobuyolo, nasemhleni welishwa ugqale, — ukuba kwa lo njengawo nalowo uwenzile utixo, ngetuba lokuba umntu angafumani nto eya kuba ngasemva kwake." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Oku konke ndikubonile emihleni yam yokungendawo: kuko ilunga elibubayo ekulungeni kwalo; kanjalo kuko okohlakeleyo ohlala kade enkohlakalweni yake. 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ungabi ulungile ngokuninzi kakulu; kanjalo ungazenzi olumkileyo ngokugqitisa; yinina ukuba uzitshabalalise? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ungabi ukohlakele ngokuninzi kakulu; kanjalo ungabi lihilihili; yinina ukuba ufe lingekafiki ixesha lako? 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Kulungile ukuba ubambelele koku, nokuba ungayekisi isandla sako nakoko; ngokuba lowo umoyikayo utixo eya kupuma kwezonto zonke." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ubulumko buyamomeleza olumkileyo, ngapezu kweshumi labanamandla abakoyo esixekweni." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Ngokuba kungeko mntu olungileyo pezu kwomhlaba, okwenza okulungileyo, angoni." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kanjako, unganikeli intliziyo yako kuwo onke amazwi atetwayo; hleze usive isicaka sako sikutuka:" 
Ecclesiastes7:22 ngokuba isazi eyako intliziyo ukuba kwa futi nawe utukile abanye. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Konke oku ndikulingile ngobulumko; ndati: Mandibe nobulumko; kodwa bebukude kum. 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Oko okukude, nokunzulu kakulu, ngubanina ongakufumanayo?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Ndajika mna nentliziyo yam ukwazi, nokupanda, nokufuna ubulumko nobutelekelelo; nokwazi inkohlakalo, n obuhilihili, nobudenge obubugeza." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ndaza ndamfumana eṙaṙa ngapezu kwokufa, lowamfazi ontliziyo izintambo nemigibe, ozandla zizinxibo: olungileyo ebusweni bukatixo wosinda kuye; kodwa umoni wobanjiswa nguye." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Bona ke, oku ndikufumene, utsho umshumayeli, enye into ndiyibeka kwenye ukuba ndiyifumane ingqibo;" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 oko umpefumlo wam usakufuna, kanti andikufumani: indoda inye pakati kwabaliwaka ndiyifumene, kodwa umfazi pakati kwabo bonke aba andimfumananga." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Kupela, bona ke, oku ndikufumene, ukuba utixo wenza umntu elungile, kodwa bona bafunile amaqinga amaninzi." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 NGUBANINA onjengelumko? ngubanina owaziyo ukutyilwa kwendawo? Ubulumko bomntu buyakanyisa ubuso bake, nokwomelela kwobuso bake kuyaguqulwa." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Ndi ti: Gcina umteto wokumkani; ewe, ngenxa yesifungelo sikatixo." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ungemki ebusweni bake ngokunxama; ungapakami ngenxa yelizwi elibi; ngokuba ekwenza konke akutandayo: 
Ecclesiastes8:4 ngokokuba ilizwi lokumkani linamandla; kanjalo ngubanina oya kuti kuye: Kuyinto nina ukwenzayo? 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Ogcinayo umyalelo akalazi ilizwi elibi. Kanjako intliziyo yolumkileyo iyazi ixesha nokugweba: 
Ecclesiastes8:6 ngokuba kuyo yonke imicimbi kuko ixesha nokugweba; ngokuba ububi bomntu bunzima pezu kwake. 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Ngokuba engakwazi oko okuya kubako; ngokuba ngubanina ongamxelelayo ukuba kwobako ninina? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Akuko mntu onamandla pezu kwomoya, okuba awubambe umoya; kanjako akuko onamandla pezu kwomhla wokufa: ewe, akuko kundululwa kwokukulwa; kanjalo inkohlakalo ayiyi kubasindisa abenzi bayo." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Konke oku ndikubonile, ndanikela intliziyo yam kuko konke ukwenza okwenziwayo ngapantsi kwelanga. Kuko ixesha okuya omnye umntu apata omnye umntu kube kukwenzakala kwake." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Kwa njalo ke ndibonile abakohlakeleyo bencw̔atyiwe, babuya beza; bati abo bakwenza okufaneleyo bemka endaweni yoyingcwele, balityalwa esixekweni. Oku kokungendawo nako." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ngokuba umgwebo ngakuso isenzo esikohlakeleyo ungenziwa ngobunxamo, iti ngoko intliziyo yonyana babantu pakati kwabo inxamele ukwenza okukohlakeleyo." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nakuba umoni enza okukohlakeleyo kalikulu, ahlaliswe kade, sendiyazi noko, ukuba kwoba kulungile kwabo bamoyikayo utixo, aboyikayo ebusweni bake:" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 kodwa akuyi kuba kulungile kokohlakeleyo, kanjalo, njengesitunzi, akayi kwolula imihla; ngokuba engoyiki ebusweni bukatixo." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Kuko okungendawo okwenziwa pezu kwomhlaba: okokuba kuko abalungileyo ekuhla kubo njengokwesenzo sabakohlakeleyo; kanjako, kuko abakohlakeleyo ekuhla kubo njengokwesenzo sabalungileyo. Ndati ukuba oku kokungendawo nako." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Ndaza ndancoma imihlali, ngokuba kungeko nto elungele umntu ngapantsi kwelanga, kupela ukuba atye, asele, agcobe: ngokuba oku kuya kuhlala naye ngomzamo wake, ngemihla yobomi bake ayinikwa ngutixo ngapantsi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 XESHEKWENI bendinikela intliziyo yam ukwazi ubulumko, nokugqala umsebenzi owenziwayo emhlabeni, ukuba kuko ongaboniyo ubutongo ngamehlo ake nasemini nasebusuku;" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 ndandula ndabona wonke umsebenzi katixo, ukuba umntu ukohliwe kukufumana lowomsebenzi owenziwayo ngapantsi kwelanga; ngako oko umntu uyazamela ukuwufuna, angafumani noko; ewe, nokuba olumkileyo uti uyawazi, wokohlwa noko ukuwufumana." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ngokuba konke oku ndikubekele intliziyo yam, ndakulinga konke oku, ukuba abalungileyo nabalumkileyo, nemisebenzi yabo, basesandleni sikatixo: akuko mntu owaziyo utando notiyo; konke kupambi kwabo;" 
Ecclesiastes9:2 konke njengokuba kupambi kwabo bonke: kuko isihlo sinye kolungisayo, nakokohlakeleyo; kolungileyo nakongcwengileyo, nakonco̔lileyo; kowenza amadini, nakulowo ongenzi amadini: njengokuba enjalo olungileyo, unjalo owonayo; ofungayo unjengalowo owoyikayo isifungo." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Oku kubububi pakati kwako konke okwenziwayo ngapantsi kwelanga, ukuba kuko isihlo sinye kubo bonke: ewe, nakuba intliziyo yonyana babantu izele bububi, nobugeza busentliziyweni yabo nxa bahleliyo, boti noko emva kwoko baye ekufeni;" 
Ecclesiastes9:4 ngokuba ngubanina lowo uketiweyo? Kubo bonke abahleliyo kuko itemba; ngokuba inja ehleliyo ilungile pezu kwengonyama efileyo. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Ngokuba abahleliyo besazi ukuba baya kufa; kodwa abafileyo abazi nanto; akuseko kubo namnye umvuzo, ngokuba inkunjulwa yabo ilityelwe." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Kanjako utando lwabo, notiyo lwabo, nobukwele babo, sebububile kade; akuseko kubo nasinye isahlulelwa kude kube ngunapakade, kuko konke okwenziwayo ngapantsi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Hamba, yitya isonka sako ngovuyo, usele iveyine yako ngentliziyo ecwayitileyo; ngokuba kukade utixo ekolele izenzo zako." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ingubo zako mazibe mhlope ngamaxa onke; kanjalo ioli maingasweleki pezu kwentloko yako. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Yidla ubomi kunye nomfazi omtandayo, yonke imihla yobomi bako obungendawo, obupiwe nguye ngapantsi kwelanga, yonke imihla yako engendawo: ngokuba oko kusisabelwa sako ekudliweni kwobomi, nasemzanyeni wako ozama ngawo ngapantsi kwelanga." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Konke sikufumanayo ukukwenza isandla sako, ukwenze ngamandla ako; ngokuba kungeko msebenzi, naqinga, nakwazi, nabulumko, ehadesi, apo uya kona." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 NDABUYA ndabona ngapantsi kwelanga, okokuba ukubaleka asi kokwabanamendu, nokuba ukulwa asi kokwamaṙoti, nokuba kanjalo ukutya asi kokwabalumkileyo, nokuba kanjalo ubutyebi asi bobabaqondayo, nokuba kanjalo ufefe asi lolwezazi: okokuba ixesha nebaqo lihlela bona bonke:" 
Ecclesiastes9:12 okokuba kanjako akuko mntu olazi ixesha lake; njengentlanzi eziṙintyelwayo elutanjeni olubi, nanjengentaka eziṙinciswayo emgibeni, njengezi bayatiyelwa onyana babantu ngexesha lelishwa, nxa libazumayo." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Obubulumko nabo ndibubonile ngapantsi kwelanga, obanga bukulu kum:" 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Bekuko isixeko esincinane, namadoda akuso abelula; kwaye kusiza kuso ukumkani omkulu, wasiṙaula, wazaka inqaba ngakuso." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kwaza kwafunyanwa kuso ihlwempu elilumkileyo, elasindisa isixeko eso ngobulumko balo; kodwa akwabiko mntu owakumbula elohlwempu." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ndati ngoko: Ubulumko bulungile pezu kwamandla; noko ke ubulumko behlwempu buyadelwa, namazwi alo akaviwa." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Amazwi abalumkileyo ayaviwa ngokwonwaba, ngapezu kwomemezo lwompati pakati kwezidenge:" 
Ecclesiastes9:18 ubulumko bulungile kwizixo̔bo zemfazwe: kodwa umoni mnye uyabubisa into eninzi yokulungileyo. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Impukane ezifileyo ziyenza amafuta amnandi anuke abile; ubudenge obuncinane bugqitisile ubulumko n odumo ngokuba bunzima. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Intliziyo yolumkileyo ingasekunene kwake; kanti intliziyo yosidenge ingasekohlo kwake. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ewe, nasendleleni, nxa isidenge sihambayo, siswele intliziyo yaso, siti ke ngabo bonke, bazizidenge." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Xa umoya wompati uvuka ngakuwe, ungashiyi indawo yako; ngokuba ululamo lupezisa izono ezikulu." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Kuko ububi ndibubonile ngapantsi kwelanga, njengesiposo esipumayo kwa sebusweni benkosi:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Ubudenge bubekiwe ebukulwini obuninzi, nabazityebi bahleli ebupantsini." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndibonile izicaka zisemahasheni, nenkosana zihamba njengezicaka emhlabeni." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Owumbayo umnxuma uya kweyela kuwo; nocitayo udonga, inyoka iya kumluma." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Onqikela amatye wozibulala ngawo; ocandayo imiti woba semgcipekweni ngayo. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ukuba intsimbi ibutuntu, nohlangoti akaluloli, uya kwandula andise amandla; kodwa into encedayo ukulungisa bubulumko." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ukuba inyoka iya kuluma kungeko kunyanga, akuko luncedo kulowo unyangayo." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Amazwi omlomo welumko abang’ ufefe; kodwa umlomo wesidenge wosibubisa: 
Ecclesiastes10:13 ukuqala kwamazwi omlomo waso bubudenge, nokupela kwomlomo waso bubugeza obubi." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Kanjalo isidenge siyandisa amazwi, noko kungeko mntu owaziyo oko okuza kubako, nokuya kubako emveni kwake; ngubanina ongamxelelayo?" 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Umzamo wosidenge uyamdinisa, ngokuba engazi ukuti nina ukuya esixekweni." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Hai ilishwa lako, lizwe! akuba ukumkani wako engumntwana, nenkosana zako zisidla kusasa." 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Hai itamsanqa lako, lizwe! akuba ukumkani wako engunyana wamatshawe, nenkosana zako zisidla ngexesha elifanelekileyo, ngenxa yokwomelela, kungengenxa yokusela." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Ngobuvila imiqadi iyonakala, nangokunqena kwezandla indlu iyaneta." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Bayenza isidlo ngenxa yokuhleka, iti iveyine ivuyise ukudliwa kwobomi; kanjalo imali iyazuzisa oko konke." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Zungamtuki ukumkani nasekucamangeni kwako; nosityebi ungamtuki enkambilini yako yokulala; ngokuba intaka yezulu iya kuhambisa ilizwi, nento enamapiko iya kuxela indawo." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 POSA isonka sako pezu kwobuso bamanzi; ngokuba uya kusifumana emveni kwemihla emininzi: 
Ecclesiastes11:2 nika isabelwa kwabasixe̔nxe, ewe, nakwabasibozo; ngokuba ungazi lilipina ilishwa eliya kubako emhlabeni." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Nxa amafu azele yimvula, ayayitulula pezu kwomhlaba; naxeshekweni umti uwayo ngasesuyide, umhlaumbi ngasenode, endaweni apo uwileyo umti lowo, uya kubako kona." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Olindayo umoya, akayi kuhlwayela; nokangelayo amafu, akayi kuvuna." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Njengokuba ungazi ukuba iyinina indlela yomoya, njengokuba ungazi amatambo asesizalweni somitiyo, kwa njalo akuwazi umsebenzi katixo okwenzayo konke." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Ngako kusasa hlwayela imbewu yako, nangokuhlwa ungapumzi isandla sako; ngokuba ungazi ukuba yiyipina eya kuhluma, ukuba yilé, ukuba yileyo, kusinina; nokuba ziya kufana ukulunga zombini na." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Kwa njalo ukukanya kwoba mnandi; ewe, kwoba yinto elungileyo emehlweni ukubona ilanga." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Kodwa nokuba umntu uya kuhlala iminyaka ibe mininzi, avuye kuyo yona yonke, makakumbule noko imihla yobumnyama, ukuba iya kuba mininzi; konke okuzayo kokungendawo." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Vuya, ndodana! ebutsheni bako, iti ke intliziyo yako ikucwayitise emihleni yobudodana bako, uhambe ngendlela zentliziyo yako, nangombono wamehlo ako: yazi ke kodwa, ukuba, ngenxa yezizinto zonke, utixo wokuzisa ekugwebeni." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Ngako shenxisa nsizi entliziyweni yako, nobubi bukwelelise enyameni yako: ngokuba ubutsha nobudodana kokungendawo." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Uze ukumbule umdali wako emihleni yobutsha bako, ingekafiki imihla yobubi, ingekasondeli iminyaka oya kuti ngayo: Ayindiyoleli:" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 kungekenziwa mnyama ilanga, nokukanya, nenyanga, nenkwenkwezi; engekabuyi amafu emveni kwemvula;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 emhlenikweni abagcini bendlu baya kungcangcazela, ati amadoda amandla azigobe, nabasili banqumame ngokuba bebancinane, nabakangelayo ngefenstile benzwe mnyama," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 nengcango zivalwe esitarateni, sakuba isandi sokusila sitambile, aze avuke ngelizwi lentaka, ziti zonke intombi zokucula zitotywe;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 nxa kanjako baya kwoyika into ende, nezituso zisendleleni, siti isamonde sidelwe, nenkumbi ibe ngumtwalo, nenkanuko itshitshe; ngokuba umntu esiya ekayeni lake elingunapakade, nabalili bayahambahamba esitarateni:" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 ingekaqauki intambo yesilivere, ingekatyumki indebe yegolide, ungekaqekezwa umpanda emtonjeni, ingekatyunyuzwa ingqengqeleko ngasequleni," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 lwandule utuli lubuyele emhlabeni njengokuba belunjalo, nomoya ubuyele kutixo owawunikayo." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 OKUNGENDAWO kwokungendawo, utsho umshumayeli, konke kokungendawo." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Nangapandle kwokokuba umshumayeli ebengolumkileyo, wati kanjako wabafundisa abantu ukwazi; ewe, wabencabenca, wapengulula, walungisa imizekeliso emininzi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Wafuna umshumayeli ukufumana amazwi akolekileyo, waza waba̔la ngolungelelwano amazwi enyaniso." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Amazwi abalumkileyo anjengezihlaba, n a wabapati bentlanganiso anjengezikonkwane eziqinisiweyo, anikiwe yo ngumalusi emnye." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Nangapandle kwezi zinto, nyana wam! zuyaleke: akuko kupela kwokuzenza incwadi ezininzi: kanjalo ufundo oluninzi luyindiniso kwinyama." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Ukugqibela kwendawo, okwayo yonke, masikuve: Yoyika utixo, nemiyalelo yake uyigcine; ngokuba oku bonke abantu ngebekwenza." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Ngokuba izenzo zonke eya kuzizisa utixo ekugwebeni, kunye nezinto zonke ezifihlakeleyo, nokuba zilungile, nokuba zikohlakele." 
SongOfSongs1:1 INGOMA yengoma, eyeka‐Solomone." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Makandange ngokwanga kwomlomo wake: ngokuba utando lwako lumnandi pezu kweveyine. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Amafuta ako amnandi ngevumba; igama lako li njeng amafuta atululwayo; kukona intombi zikutandayo. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ndir̔ole, sobaleka emva kwako: ukumkani undingenisile ezinkambilini zake; siya kugcoba sivuye ngawe; utando lwako soluncoma ngapezu kweveyine; abalungileyo bayakutanda." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Ndimnyama, ndinobuhle noko, nina zintombi zase‐Yerusaleme! njengentente zakwa‐Kedare, njengezikuselo zika‐Solomone." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ungandikangeli kuba ndimnyamaṙa, ngokuba ilanga lindibalelele: bati onyana bakama̔ bandiqumbela, bandenza umlindi wemiyezo; owam umyezo andiwulindanga." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ndixelele, wena utandwayo ngumpefumlo wam! kupina apo walusayo? kupina apo ubutumisa kona emini enkulu? ngokuba kunganina ukuba ndibe njengogqubuteleyo, ngasemihlambini yamakolwane ako?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Ukuba akwazi, wena mhle pakati kwamankazana! puma uye emikondweni yomhlambi, uwaluse amatakane ako ngasezintenteni zabalusi." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ndikufanisile, sihlobokazi sam! nehashe lam pakati kw a wenqwelo zika‐Faro." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Zihle izidlele zako pakati kwezitsaba, nentamo yako pakati kwezidanga." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Sokwenzela izitsaba zegolide, kunye namaqulana esilivere." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Nxa ukumkani angasetafileni yake, inadusi yam iyanika ivumba layo." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Sisiqunyana semore isitandwa sam kum, e sihlala pakati kwamabele am." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Sisipa sentyatyambo zekofere isitandwa sam kum, emiyezweni yase‐Henegedi." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Bona ke, umhle, sihlobokazi sam! bona ke, umhle; amehlo ako ngamahobe." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Bona ke, umhle, sitandwa sam! ewe, umnandi: kanjalo umandlalo wetu uluhlaza;" 
SongOfSongs1:17 imiqadi yendlu yetu zisedare; isifulelo setu ziberoshe. 
SongOfSongs2:1 Ndiyimbali yasetafeni, ndiyinyibiba yasemihlanjeni." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Njengenyibiba pakati kwemitolo, sinjalo isihlobokazi sam pakati kwentombi." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Njengomti weapele pakati kwemiti yehlati, sinjalo isitandwa sam pakati kwamadodana. Ndiyanqwenela ukuhlala pantsi emtunzini wawo, kanjalo isiqa̔mo sawo siyolile ekuhlangubo lam." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Sandizisa endlwini yeveyine, nebanile yaso pezu kwam ibilutando." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Ndixaseni ngezonkana, ndomelezeni ngeapele; ngokuba ndisifa lutando." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Isandla saso sokohlo masibe ngapantsi kwentloko yam, nesokunene saso sindisingate." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Ndiyanifungisa, nina zintombi zase‐Yerusaleme! ngamabadikazi, nangamaxamakazi asendle, ukuba ningavusi, nokuba ningavuseleli utando lwam, lude luvume." 
SongOfSongs2:8 ILIZWI lesitandwa sam! Nasiya sisiza, sitsiba pezu kwentaba, sixu̔ma pezu kwenduli." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Isitandwa sam siyafana nebadi, umhlaumbi netole lamaxama: nasiya simi emva kwodonga lwetu, sikangela ngesituba, silunguza ngefenstile." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Sateta isitandwa sam, sati kum: Suka, sihlobokazi sam, nzwakazi yam, uhambe!" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Ngokuba, bona ke, ubusika bugqitile, imvula itulile, imkile." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Intyatyambo zibonakele emhlabeni; ixesha lokucula lifikile; nelizwi lezuba livakele elizweni letu. 
SongOfSongs2:13 Umkiwane uyabonxisa amakiwane awo aluhlaza; nemiti yeveyine inentyatyambo, iyanika ivumba. Suka, sihlobokazi sam, nzwakazi yam, uhambe!" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Hobekazi lam! emifanteni yeliwa, endaweni yokufihlela yomba̔, mandibone ubuso bako, mandilive ilizwi lako: ngokuba ilizwi lako limnandi, nobuso bako bunobuhle." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Sibambeleni impungutye, impungutye ezincinane, ezonakalisayo imiyezo: ngokuba imiyezo yetu inentyatyambo." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Isitandwa sam sisesam, ndingowaso mna, esalusa pakati kwazo inyibiba." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Xeshekweni kupola imini, abaleke amatunzi, buya, sitandwa sam! uxelise ibadi, umhlaumbi itole lamaxama, pezu kwentaba zokwahlula." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Pezu kwesilili sam ebusuku, ndafuna lowo umpefumlo wam umtandayo; ndamfuna, kanti andamfumana." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Ndati: Ndosuka ke, ndihambahambe esixekweni, ezitarateni nasezindaweni ezibanzi; ndiya kumfuna lowo umpefumlo wam umtandayo: ndamfuna, kanti andamfumana." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Abalindi abahambahambayo esixekweni bandifumana; endati kubo: Nimbonile na lowo umpefumlo wam umtandayo? 
SongOfSongs3:4 Bekungumganyana kodwa bendigqitile kubo, xeshekweni ndamfumana lowo umpefumlo wam umtandayo; ndambamba, bendingavumi ukumyeka, ndada ndamzisa endlwini kama̔, nasenkambilini yowandizalayo." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Ndiyanifungisa, nina zintombi zase‐Yerusaleme! ngamabadikazi, nangamaxamakazi asendle, ukuba ningavusi, nokuba ningavuseleli utando lwam, lude luvume." 
SongOfSongs3:6 YINTO nina le inyuka elubala, njengemiqulu yomsi, iqunyiselwe ngemore nangentlakamhlope, ngezicoleko zonke zomtengi?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Bona ke, yipalankine yake u‐Solomone: amaṙoti angamashumi matandatu ayayingqonga, kuwo amaṙoti akwa‐Sirayeli:" 
SongOfSongs3:8 onke epete iziṙele, eqelene nokulwa; amanye ngamanye eneziṙele zawo ngasematangeni awo, ngenxa yezoyikiso ebusuku." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Uzenzele ipalankine ukumkani, u‐Solomone, ngemiti yase‐Lebanone." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Intsika zayo wazenza ngesilivere, isixaso sayo ngegolide, isihlalo sayo ngesibomvu; umpakati wayo usetyenziwe ngotando zintombi zase‐Yerusaleme." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Pumani, nina zintombi zase‐Ziyone! niye kumkangela ukumkani, u‐Solomone, enekrone owamvatisa ngayo unina ngomhla wokutshata kwake, nangomhla wokuvuya kwentliziyo yake." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Bona ke, umhle, sihlobokazi sam! bona ke, umhle; amehlo ako ngamahobe ngasemva kwesigqubutelo sako; inwele zako zinjengomhlambi webokwe ezibonakalayo entabeni ye‐Gileyadi." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Amazinyo ako anjengomhlambi wegushakazi ezicetyiweyo, ezinyukayo endaweni yokuhlambela, eziti zonke ngezinye zizale amawele, nekungeko pakati kwazo efelweyo." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Udebe lwako lunjengomsonto wesibomvu, nomlomo wako unobuhle; isidlele sako sinjengeqezu legranate ngasemva kwesigqubutelo sako." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Intamo yako injengenqaba ka‐Davide, e yakelwa izixo̔bo; amakakana aliwaka axo̔mekile pezu kwayo, intlobo zonke zamakaka amaṙoti." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Amabele ako omabini anjengamatole mabini engamawele ebadikazi, adlayo pakati kwazo inyibiba." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Xeshekweni kupola imini, abaleke amatunzi, ndoya entabeni yemore, nasendulini yentlakamhlope." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Umhle kanye, sihlobokazi sam! akuko bala kuwe." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Wopuma nam e‐Lebanone, mtshakazi! wopuma nam e‐Lebanone; uya kusuka engcotsheni ye‐Amana, engcotsheni ye‐Shenire ne‐Heremone, ezindaweni zokuhlala zengonyama, ezintabeni zezingwe." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Undikalipisile, dade wam, mtshakazi! undikalipisile, ngelinye lamehlo ako, ngesambalo sinye sentamo yako." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Lumnandi kangakananina utando lwako, dade wam, mtshakazi! lulungile kangakananina utando lwako ngapezu kweveyine! nevumba lamafuta ako ngapezu kwezimnandi zonke!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Udebe lwako, mtshakazi! luyatontsela incindi; ubusi nobisi lungapantsi kwolwimi lwako; nevumba lezivato zako linjengevumba le‐Lebanone." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Usisitiya esivalelweyo, dade wam, mtshakazi! ulitende elivingcelweyo, umtombo oncanyatiselweyo." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Izityalo zako zingumyezo wegranate, kunye neziqa̔mo ezimnandi; ikofere, kunye nenadusi;" 
SongOfSongs4:14 inadusi nesafrone, ikalame nekinamone, kunye nemiti yonke yentlakamhlope; imore neyahali, kunye nezimnandi zonke ezidumileyo;" 
SongOfSongs4:15 umtombo wezitiya, iqula lamanzi apilileyo, nezelo zivela e‐Lebanone." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Vuka, moya wasenode! uze ke, moya wasesuyide! qutela isitiya sam, apume ke amavumba aso amnandi. Masingene esitiyeni saso isitandwa sam, sidle iziqa̔mo zaso ezimnandi." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ndingenile esitiyeni sam, dade wam, mtshakazi! ndikile imore yam kunye nesimnandi sam; ndityile incindi yam kunye nobusi bam; ndiselile iveyine yam kunye nobisi lwam. Yidlani, bahlobo! selani, nikolise ukusela, batandwa!" 
SongOfSongs5:2 BENDILALA butongo, kodwa yapapama intliziyo yam: Ilizwi lesitandwa sam! siqongqota! Ndivulele, dade wam, sihlobokazi sam, hobekazi lam, mcocwakazi wam! ngokuba intloko yam izele ngumbete, nezihlita zam ngamatontsi obusuku." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Ndisusile isivato sam; sendiya kuti nina ukusifaka? ndihlanzile inyawo zam; sendiya kuti nina ukuzidyoba? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Saye isitandwa sam sisusa isandla saso esitubeni socango, waza umbilini wam wanesitukutezi ngenxa yaso." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Ndesuka ke ukuya kuvulela isitandwa sam; zati izandla zam zatontsela imore, neminwe yam imore epupumayo, pezu kwezipato zomvalo." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ndavulela isitandwa sam; kodwa isitandwa sam sasishenxile, besidlulile: wawa umpefumlo wam sakuteta: ndasifuna, kanti bendingasifumani; ndasibiza, kanti besingandisabeli." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Bandifumana abalindi abahambahambayo esixekweni, bandibeta, bandenzela inxeba; abagcini bendonga bandihluta isilengalenga sam." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Ndiyanifungisa, nina zintombi zase‐Yerusaleme! nxa niya kusifumana isitandwa sam, nosixelela nto nina? Sixelele okokuba ndiyafa lutando." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Siyinto nina isitandwa sako ngapezu kwesitandwa somnye, wena mhle pakati kwamankazana? Siyinto nina isitandwa sako ngapezu kwesitandwa somnye, ukuba usifungisile ngokunjalo?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Isitandwa sam simhlope, sibomvuṙa; singowazekileyo ngapezu kwamawaka alishumi." 
SongOfSongs5:11 Intloko yaso inga iyigolide ecokisiweyo, izihlita zaso ezilengalengayo zimnyama njengonomyai." 
SongOfSongs5:12 Amehlo aso anjengamahobe ngasemilanjaneni yamanzi, ehlamba elubisini, ehleli ekuzaleni." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Izidlele zaso zinjengendima yebeseme, njeng endawo ezipakamileyo zezityalo ezimnandi; umlomo waso u njeng enyibiba, utontsela imore epupumayo." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Izandla zaso zi njeng emisesane yegolide, ifakelwe ng amatye etareshishe; isisu saso si njeng opondo lwendlovu olugudisiweyo, lugujungelwe ng amatye esafire." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Imilenze yaso i njeng entsika zelitye elimhlope, zimisiwe pezu kweziseko zegolide ecokisiweyo. Ukubonakala kwaso kunjenge‐Lebanone; sidlulisile njengesedare." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Ikuhlangubo laso liyolile kunene; he, isiqu sonke sitandekile kakulu. Sinjalo isitandwa sam, ewe, sinjalo isihlobo sam, nina zintombi zase‐Yerusaleme!" 
SongOfSongs6:1 Siye ngapina isitandwa sako, wena mhle pakati kwamankazana? sijikele ngapina isitandwa sako? ukuze sisifune kunye nawe." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Isitandwa sam sihlile ukuya esitiyeni saso, ezindimeni zebeseme, ukudla ezitiyeni, nokuka inyibiba." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Mna ndingowesitandwa sam, nesitandwa sam sisesam: siyalusa pakati kwazo inyibiba." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Umhle wena, sihlobokazi sam, njenge‐Tiretsa, unobuhle njenge‐Yerusaleme, unokwoyikeka njeng emikosi ezipete ibanile." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Nqanda amehlo ako kum, ngokuba ndiseyiswa ngawo; inwele zako zinjengomhlambi webokwe ezibonakalayo e‐Gileyadi." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Amazinyo ako anjengomhlambi wegushakazi, ezinyukayo endaweni yokuhlambela, eziti zonke ngezinye zizale amawele, nekungeko pakati kwazo efelweyo."
