SongOfSongs6:7 Isidlele sako sinjengeqezu legranate ngasemva kwesigqubutelo sako. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Kuko okumkanikazi abamashumi matandatu, namashweshwe angamashumi asibozo, nentombi ezingenakubalwa." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Umnye lowo olihobekazi lam, umcocwakazi wam; lowo ungokupela kwonina, lowo ungotandekileyo kowamzalayo. Zambona intombi, zambiza ngonetamsanqa; kwa okumkanikazi, namashweshwe, bamdumisa, besiti:" 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ngubanina lo oti gqi njengokusa, emhle njengenyanga, emhlope njengelanga, esoyikeka njeng emikosi ezipete ibanile?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Ndehlela esitiyeni senote, ukuya kukangela imifuno yasentilini, ukubona ukuba umti weveyine uyaqumba na, ukuba igranate ziyahluma na." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ndingekazi ke, wati umpefumlo wam wandibeka pakati kwenqwelo zabantu bam abadumileyo." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Buya, buya, Mshulemekazi! buya, buya, ukuba sikubonele. Yinina ukuba nimbonele um‐Shulemekazi, njengomdudo wezintlu mbini?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Hai ukuba ntle kwenyawo zako ezihlangwini, ntombi edumileyo! Izazinge zamatanga ako zinjengezambalo, umsebenzi wezandla zencibi." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Inkaba yako i njeng endebe eyinqukuva, engasweli iveyine epitikeziweyo; isisu sako si njeng omlu wenqolowa, obiyelweyo ngenyibiba." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Amabele ako omabini anjengamatole mabini engamawele ebadikazi. 
SongOfSongs7:4 Intamo yako injengenqaba yopondo lwendlovu; amehlo ako a njeng amacibi e‐Heshebone, ngasesangweni le‐Bate‐rabime; impumlo yako injengenqaba yase‐Lebanone, ebeka ngase‐Damakusi." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Intloko yako pezu kwako injenge‐Karamele, nenwele zentloko yako zinjengesibomvumnyama; ukumkani uyabanjwa ngezihlita." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Hai ukuba mhle nokuba mnandi kwako, sitandwakazi, ngeziyoliso!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Obu ubude bako buyafana nomti wepalime, namabele ako ayafana nezipa zawo." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Ndati: Ndiya kukwela ku lo mti wepalime, ndobamba amasebe awo: makati ke amabele ako abe njengezipa zomti weveyine, nevumba lempumlo yako libe njengeleapele," 
SongOfSongs7:9 nekuhlangubo lako libe njengeveyine eyolileyo, eti kumtandwa wam ihle ngokumnandi, isenza imilomo yabozeleyo itete." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Mna ndingowesitandwa sam, kanjalo ingakum inkanuko yaso." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Hamba, sitandwa sam! masipumele ezindle, silalise emizini." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Masiye kusasa emiyezweni, sibone ukuba umti weveyine uyaqumba na, ukuba intyatyambo ziyabenqeka na, ukuba igranate ziyahluma na: kona apo ndokunika utando lwam." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Idudai ziyanika ivumba, nangasezingcangweni zetu kuko zonke iziqa̔mo ezimnandi, ezitsha nezidala, endizibekelele wena, sitandwa sam!" 
SongOfSongs8:1 Akwaba ubunjengomninawe kum, obesanya amabele kama̔! ukuba ndakufumana ngapandle, ngendikwanga, ndingadelwa noko." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ngendikukokela, ndikungenise endlwini kama̔; ngeundifundisa wena: ngendikuseza kwiveyine inento eshushu, na kwamanzi am egranate." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Isandla sake sokohlo masibe ngapantsi kwentloko yam, nesokunene sake sindisingate." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Ndiyanifungisa, nina zintombi zase‐Yerusaleme! ukuba ningavusi, nokuba ningavuseleli utando lwam, lude luvume." 
SongOfSongs8:5 NGUBANINA lo evela elubala, esayama kwisitandwa sake? Ngapantsi kwomti weapele ndavusa utando lwako: kona apo waba nenimba ngawe unyoko, kona apo waba nenimba o wakuzala yo." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ndibeke njengesincamatiselo pezu kwentliziyo yako, njengesincamatiselo pezu kwengalo yako: ngokuba utando lunamandla njengokufa; ikwele lilukuni njengehadesi; amalahle alo ngamalahle omlilo, lilangatye elidangazelayo kakulu." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Amanzi amaninzi akanakucima utando, nemisinga ayingelukukulise: ukuba umntu ebeya kunika yonke impahla esendlwini yake ngenxa yotando, inge igqityelwa ukudelwa." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Udade wetu umncinane, akanamabele: sesiya kwenzela nto nina udade wetu, mhlana kuya kutetwa ngaye?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ukuba uludonga, siya kuyaka pezu kwake inqatyana yesilivere; nokuba ulucango, siya kumvingcela ngeplanke zesedare." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Ndiludonga mna, namabele am anjengenqaba: oko bendisemehlweni ake njengofumanayo uxolo." 
SongOfSongs8:11 U‐Solomone ebenomyezo e‐Bali‐hamoni; wawuqashisela kubalindi umyezo lowo; bati abanye ngabanye, ngenxa yeziqa̔mo zawo, bazisa iwaka leshekele zesilivere." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Umyezo wam, lowo ndinawo, upambi kwam: iwaka elo libe lelako, Solomone! namakulu mabini abe ngawabalindi beziqa̔mo zawo." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Wena uhlalayo ezitiyeni! amakolwane ayapulapula elizwini lako: ndivise mna. 
SongOfSongs8:14 Baleka, sitandwa sam! uxelise ibadikazi, umhlaumbi itole lamaxama, pezu kwentaba yezimnandi." 
Isaiah1:1 ISIBONAKALO sika‐Yisaya, unyana ka‐Amotse, owasibonayo, ngo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme, emihleni ka‐Huziya, u‐Yotame, u‐Ahazi, n o‐Hezekiya, okumkani bo‐Juda." 
Isaiah1:2 Yivani, mazulu! unike indlebe, mhlaba! ngokuba uyehova eteta: Abantwana ndibakulisile ndabondla, kanti ke bona, baqipukelene nam." 
Isaiah1:3 Inkabi iyazi umniniyo, neqwaṙashe isibaya senkosi yalo: kodwa u‐Sirayeli akazi; abantu bam abagqali." 
Isaiah1:4 Kwoba nzima kuso isizwe esonayo, abantu abasindwa lityala, inzalo yabenzi bokungalungileyo, usapo olwonakalisayo! Bamshiyile uyehova, bamdelile oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, bahlehlile ngomva." 
Isaiah1:5 Kunganina ukuba niya kubuya nibetwe? kunganina ukuba niya kwandisa impambuko? intloko yonke iyafa, nentliziyo yonke icubukile." 
Isaiah1:6 Kwa kuwo umzantsi wonyawo kude kube kuyo intloko, akuko kupila kuwo; ngamanxeba, nemivimbo, nezilonda ezitsha; azincinezelwanga, azibotshwanga, azitanjiswanga ngeoli." 
Isaiah1:7 Ilizwe lenu liyingcitakalo; izixeko zenu zitshiswe ngomlilo: umhlaba wenu abasemzini bayawudla ngasebusweni benu; uyingcitakalo, njengocitiweyo ngabasemzini." 
Isaiah1:8 Intombi yase‐Ziyone isele njengepempe esitiyeni, njengexobongo entsimini yekomkomere, njengesixeko esilalelwayo." 
Isaiah1:9 Ukuba uyehova wemikosi ubengasishiyelanga isisalela esincinanana, ngesibe sinjenge‐Sodome, ngesibe sifana ne‐Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Yivani ilizwi likayehova, bagwebi base‐Sodome! nikelani umteto wotixo wetu indlebe, bantu base‐Gomora!" 
Isaiah1:11 Kuyinto nina kum ukuba mininzi kwemibingo yenu? utsho uyehova. Ndidikiwe ngamadini enkunzi zegusha, nenqata lenkomo ezityetyisiweyo; kanjalo igazi lenkunzana, nelemvana, nelebokwe andilitandi." 
Isaiah1:12 Nxa nizayo ukuza kubonakala pambi kwam, kubiziwe ngubanina oku esandleni senu, ukunyatela amakusi am?" 
Isaiah1:13 Ningapindi ukuzisa umnikelo ongendawo; isiqu̔miso siyintshontsho kum; inyanga etwasileyo, nesabata, n okubizwa kwentlanganisano, andiyi kuzivuma ezonto; yinkohlakalo nentlanganiso enkulu." 
Isaiah1:14 Inyanga zenu ezitwasileyo nemitendeleko yenu emiselweyo umpefumlo wam uyazitiya; ziyindiniso kum; ndidiniwe kukuzinyamezela. 
Isaiah1:15 Kanjalo nakuzitwabulula izandla zenu, ndiya kufihla amehlo am kuni; naxeshekweni nikwandisa ukutandaza, andiyi kuva: izandla zenu zizele ligazi." 
Isaiah1:16 Hlambani; zenzeni mhlope; kwelelisani inkohlakalo yezenzo zenu pambi kwamehlo am; yekani ukwenza okukohlakeleyo; 
Isaiah1:17 fundani ukwenza okulungileyo; funani ubugwebo; lungisani obandezelweyo; tetelelani inkedama; pikelani umhlolokazi. 
Isaiah1:18 Yizani ke, masipikisane, utsho uyehova: nangona izono zenu zinjengesibomvu, zoba zimhlope njengengqweqwe; nangona zibomvu njengesibomvumnyama, zoba njengoboya begusha." 
Isaiah1:19 Ukuba niyavuma, nipulapule ke, ubumnandi belizwe niya kubudla;" 
Isaiah1:20 kanti ukuba niyala, ningeva nokuva, niya kudliwa sisiṙele: ngokuba umlomo kayehova utshilo." 
Isaiah1:21 Hai ukuba liṙexezakazi kwaso isixeko esinyanisekileyo! sibe sizele bubugwebo; ubulungisa bebuhleli kuso, kodwa kaloku ngababulali." 
Isaiah1:22 Isilivere yako yenziwe igwebu; iveyine yako ingxengelwe ngamanzi; 
Isaiah1:23 inkosana zako zinenkani, zingamakolwane amasela; zonke ngezinye ziyatanda amabaso, ziputume imivuzo; inkedama aziyiteteleli, netyala lomhlolokazi alizi kuzo." 
Isaiah1:24 Ngako oko iti inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, usomandla ka‐Sirayeli: Ho! ndiya kuzikululekisa kwabayimpi kum; ewe, ndiya kuzipindezelela ezintshabeni zam." 
Isaiah1:25 Kodwa ndiya kubuyisela isandla sam ngakuwe, ndicokise igwebu lako njengokuba kucokiswa ngesepe, ndisuse yonke inkutu yako." 
Isaiah1:26 Ndandiya kubuyisa abagwebi bako njengasekuqaleni, nabacebisi bako njengapambili: emva kwoko uya kubizwa ngokuba yinqili yobulungisa, isixeko esinyanisekileyo." 
Isaiah1:27 I‐Ziyone yokululwa ngobugwebo, nabaguquki bayo ngobulungisa." 
Isaiah1:28 Kodwa imbujiswa yabagqiti naboni yoba kunye; nabo bamshiyayo uyehova baya kugqityelwa. 
Isaiah1:29 Ngokuba niya kuba nentloni ngenxa yemikoba enibe niyinqwenele; naniya kudana ngenxa yemiyezo enaniyiqashile. 
Isaiah1:30 Ngokuba niya kuba njengomkoba omagqabi abunayo, nanjengomyezo ekungeko manzi kuwo." 
Isaiah1:31 Onamandla woba njengenxubuwa, nomsebenzi wake njengentlantsi; baya kutsha bobabini kunye, kungeko oya kucima." 
Isaiah2:1 ILIZWI owalibonayo u‐Yisaya, unyana ka‐Amotse, ngo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme." 
Isaiah2:2 Kwakuya kuti emihleni yokupela, intaba yendlu kayehova yoqiniselwa engcopo yentaba, ipakanyiselwe pezu kwenduli, ziti zonke intlanga zele kuyo." 
Isaiah2:3 Ewe, zohamba izizwe ezininzi, ziti: Yizani, masinyuke siye entabeni kayehova, endlwini yotixo ka‐Yakobi, ukuba asifundise indlela zake, nokuba sihambe emikweni yake; ngokuba umteto uya kupuma e‐Ziyone, nelizwi likayehova e‐Yerusaleme." 
Isaiah2:4 Waeya kugweba pakati kwentlanga, azohlwaye izizwe ezininzi; zide zikande iziṙele zazo zibe ngamakuba, nezikali zazo zibe ngamaṙenqa: olunye uhlanga aluyi kupakamisa isiṙele ngakw olunye uhlanga; kanjalo azisayi kuba safunda ukulwa." 
Isaiah2:5 Nina ndlu ka‐Yakobi! yizani, masihambe ekukanyeni kukayehova." 
Isaiah2:6 Kanti ubalahlile abantu bako, indlu ka‐Yakobi, ngokuba bezele kokwasempumalanga; bayenza ngobugqi njengama‐Filistiya, bayabambana izandla nonyana babasemzini." 
Isaiah2:7 Kanjalo ilizwe labo lizele yisilivere negolide, kungeko ukupela kwendyebo zabo; ewe, ilizwe labo lizele ngamahashe, kungeko ukupela kwenqwelo zabo." 
Isaiah2:8 Ilizwe labo lizele nangamadalo; bayatoba pantsi kuwo umsebenzi wezandla zabo, kuko oko ikwenzileyo eyabo iminwe." 
Isaiah2:9 Umntu omnyama uyatotyiswa, nendoda enkulu iyatotyelwa pantsi; kanti akusayi kubaxolela." 
Isaiah2:10 Ngena eweni, uzifihlele elutulini, ngenxa yesoyikeko sikayehova, nangenxa yobungcwalisa bobungangamsha bake." 
Isaiah2:11 Amehlo aqanqalazayo abantu aya kutotyelwa pantsi, nokuzidla kwamadoda kuya kutotywa; nguyehova yedwa oya kubekwa pezulu ngomhla lowo." 
Isaiah2:12 Ngokuba kuko umhla kayehova wemikosi, ngakuko konke okuner̔atshi nokuzidlayo, nangakuko konke okupakamileyo, okuya kutotyelwa pantsi:" 
Isaiah2:13 nangakuzo zonke isedare zase‐Lebanone, ezinde ezipakamileyo, nangakuzo zonke iyeke zase‐Bashane;" 
Isaiah2:14 nangakuzo zonke intaba ezinde, nangakuzo zonke induli ezipakamileyo;" 
Isaiah2:15 nangakuzo zonke inqaba ezinde, nangakuzo zonke indonga ezinqatyisiweyo;" 
Isaiah2:16 nangakuzo zonke inqanawa zase‐Tareshishe, nangakuzo zonke izinto ezikubonakala kunqwenelekile." 
Isaiah2:17 Kwakuya kutotywa ukuqanqalaza kwabantu, kutotyelwe pantsi nokuzidla kwamadoda; nguyehova yedwa oya kubekwa pezulu ngomhla lowo." 
Isaiah2:18 Kanjalo amadalo ogqibela ukuti tshabalala. 
Isaiah2:19 Babeya kungena emiqolombeni yamawa, naseminxunyeni yomhlaba, ngenxa yesoyikeko sikayehova, nangenxa yobungcwalisa bobungangamsha bake, ekuvukeni kwake ukungcangcazelisa umhlaba." 
Isaiah2:20 Ngomhla lowo abantu baya kuposa amadalo abo esilivere, namadalo abo egolide, abazenzele wona ukuba bawabedeshe, ezintukwini nasezilulwaneni;" 
Isaiah2:21 bakungena emifanteni yamatyekazi, nasemaṙotyeni amawa, ngenxa yesoyikeko sikayehova, nangenxa yobungcwalisa bobungamgamsha bake, ekuvukeni kwake ukungcangcazelisa umhlaba." 
Isaiah2:22 Ncamani umntu, omoya usempumlweni yake; ngokuba eya kubalwa ngokuba yinto nina yena?" 
Isaiah3:1 Ngokuba bona ke, inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, iya kususa e‐Yerusaleme nakwa‐Juda isixaso nomsimelelo; sonke isixaso sesonka, naso sonke isixaso samanzi:" 
Isaiah3:2 iṙoti nendoda yokulwa; umgwebi nomprofite; kwa umlauli nomdala; 
Isaiah3:3 inkosi yamashumi mahlanu nomntu obekekileyo; kwa umcebisi, nolumkileyo ngobuncibi, neciko lokunyanga." 
Isaiah3:4 Ndandiya kunika abafana babe zinkosi zabo, nabantwana baya kupata pezu kwabo." 
Isaiah3:5 Abantu baya kubandezelana, kwa abanye ngabanye ummelwane wabo; umfana uya kwenza nger̔atshi ngakomdala, nodelekileyo ngakulowo ubekwayo." 
Isaiah3:6 Nxa omnye umntu aya kubamba omnye osendlwini kayise, ati: Unengubo; pata wena pezu kwetu; nokukwonakala makube ngapantsi kwesandla sako:" 
Isaiah3:7 uya kupakamisa ilizwi, kwa ngalomini, esiti: Andiyi kuba ngumpilisi; ngokuba endlwini yam kungeko isonka, kungeko nangubo; musa ukundimisela umpati wabantu." 
Isaiah3:8 Ngokuba i‐Yerusaleme iku̔bekile, no‐Juda bawile; ngokokuba ulwimi lwabo nezenzo zabo zingakuye uyehova, ukucapukisa amehlo obungcwalisa bake." 
Isaiah3:9 Ukubonakala kwobuso babo buyanqi̔na ngakubo; nesono sabo bayasixela njenge‐Sodome; abasisitelisi. Kwoba nzima kubo! ngokuba bezenzele ingozi. 
Isaiah3:10 Yitshoni kolungileyo ukuti: Kwoba mnandi; ngokuba isixakato sezenzo zabo beya kusidla. 
Isaiah3:11 Kwoba nzima kokohlakeleyo! kwoba kubi; ngokuba umvuzo wezandla zake uya kwenziwa kuye. 
Isaiah3:12 Abantu bam, abantwana bangababandezeli babo, nabafazi bayabapata ngobukosi. Bantu bam! abakapi benu bayanilahlekisa, nendlela yabahambi benu bayayitshabalalisa." 
Isaiah3:13 Uyehova uzimisile ukupika, umi ukugweba abantu." 
Isaiah3:14 Uyehova uya kungena ekugwebeni ngakubo abadala babantu bake nenkosana zabo; ngokuba nina nidlile isitiya semiti yeveyine; ukupangwa kwehlwempu kusezindlwini zenu. 
Isaiah3:15 Niti nina ukuba nibatyumza abantu bam, nokuba nibusila ubuso bamahlwempu? itsho inkosi, uyehova wemikosi." 
Isaiah3:16 Uti kanjalo uyehova: Ngenxa yokuba intombi zase‐Ziyone ziqanqalaza, zihamba ngentamo ezolulweyo nangamehlo angxeleshayo, zimana zipatsa ekuhambeni, zikenceza ngenyawo zazo;" 
Isaiah3:17 kukona inkosi iya kubeta ukakai lwentombi zase‐Ziyone ngobunqai, nobuhloni bazo iya kubuhluba." 
Isaiah3:18 Ngomhla lowo inkosi iya kususa izihombo zezacolo zamaqata, nezihlita ezipotiweyo, nezambalo eziyinyangaṙa," 
Isaiah3:19 amajikazi, newatsha, nezigqubutelo," 
Isaiah3:20 iminqwazi, netyatanga zokunyatelisa, namagqesha, namahlala okujoja, nezinyango," 
Isaiah3:21 imisesane yeminwe, nemisesane yempumlo," 
Isaiah3:22 izambato ezicikiziweyo, nezivato zapezulu, nengubo zokutiwa tyu, nezidla," 
Isaiah3:23 izikangeliselo, nehempe zeqiya eshiceneyo, nenkontsho, nezilengalenga." 
Isaiah3:24 Kwakuya kuti, endaweni yevumba elimnandi kwobako intshontsho; nasendaweni yombinqo kwobako inyilingo; nasendaweni yempote kwobako ubunqai; nasendaweni yengubo yokunameka kwobako isibinqo sentlakantlaka; kwobako isitshiswa endaweni yobunzwakazi." 
Isaiah3:25 Amadoda ako aya kuwa ngesiṙele, namagoṙa ako ekulweni." 
Isaiah3:26 Amasango ayo aya kugula alile, iti yona ihlale zé emhlabeni." 
Isaiah4:1 Amankazana asixe̔nxe aya kubamba indoda inye ngalomhla, esiti: Esetu isonka siya kusidla, nezetu izivato siya kuzambata, kupela masibizwe ngegama lako, kususwe ihlazo letu." 
Isaiah4:2 Ngawo umhla lowo isebe likayehova loba lelobuhle nelobungcwalisa, nesiqa̔mo somhlaba soba sesendluliselo nesenkazimlo kwabasindileyo bakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah4:3 Kwakuya kuti, oshiyiweyo e‐Ziyone, noseleyo e‐Yerusaleme, kwotiwa uyingcwele; osukuba eba̔lelwe ubomi e‐Yerusaleme." 
Isaiah4:4 Nxa inkosi ikuhlanzile ukunco̔la kwentombi zase‐Ziyone, negazi lase‐Yerusaleme ilihlambulule pakati kwayo, ngomoya wokugweba nangomoya wokutshisa:" 
Isaiah4:5 uya kwandula uyehova ukudala pezu kwazo zonke intlalo zasentabeni ye‐Ziyone, napezu kwendawo zayo zokuhlanganisela, ilifu nomsi ngemini, nokukazimla kwomlilo odangazelayo ngobusuku: ngokuba pezu kwabo bonke ubungcwalisa kuya kubako isigubungelo." 
Isaiah4:6 Kwobako nentente ibe ngumtunzi ngemini ngenxa yokufudumala, nendawo yokupepela neyokufihlela ngenxa yesipango nangenxa yemvula." 
Isaiah5:1 SENDIYA kuvuma ke kumtandwa wam iculo lesitandwa sam ngesitiya sake: Umtandwa wam wabenesitiya enkalweni etyebileyo. 
Isaiah5:2 Wasingongxa wagabula amatye aso, wasityala ngemiti yeveyine edumileyo; waka inqaba pakati kwaso, wembela isincinezelo seveyine kuso kanjalo: waza wakangela ukuba sivelise idreyive, koko savelisa idreyive ezimbi." 
Isaiah5:3 Nakaloku, bemi base‐Yerusaleme namadoda akwa‐Juda! zenigwebe pakati kwam nesitiya sam." 
Isaiah5:4 Ngekuba kusenziwa nto nina ngakumbi esitiyeni sam, endingayenzanga kuso? Yinina ke lento, ndakukangela ukuba sivelise idreyive, savelisa idreyive ezimbi?" 
Isaiah5:5 Ngako kaloku, sendiya kunazisa oko ndiya kukwenza esitiyeni sam: ndiya kususa utango lwaso, soba lidlelo ke; ndiya kucita udonga lwaso, soba yindawo yokubuqwa ke." 
Isaiah5:6 Ndandiya kusenza intshabalalo; asiyi kunqunyulelwa, asiyi kuhlakulwa kanjako; kodwa imbobo nemitolo ziya kuhluma kuso; ndandiya kuyalela amafu ukuba anganisi imvula pezu kwaso." 
Isaiah5:7 Ngokuba isitiya sikayehova wemikosi siyindlu ka‐Sirayeli, namadoda akwa‐Juda esisityalwa soyolo lwake: wakangela ubugwebo, kanti nanku ukupalala kwegazi! wakangela ubulungisa, kanti nanku ukukala!" 
Isaiah5:8 Kwoba nzima kubo abahlanganisa indlu nendlu, a babandakanyisa intsimi nentsimi, kude kungabiko indawo, nize nihlaliswe nedwa nina pakati kwelizwe!" 
Isaiah5:9 Ezindlebeni zam uyehova wemikosi utyilile ukuti: Ngenyaniso izindlu ezininzi zoba zé, ezo zinkulu nezintle zoba zingenabemi." 
Isaiah5:10 Ngokuba ishumi lendima zesitiya ziya kuvelisa ibate inye, nehomere yembewu iya kuvelisa iyefa." 
Isaiah5:11 Kwoba nzima kubo abavuka kusasa, bakaulezele uselo olunamandla; abalibala nxa kuse kuhlwile, ide iveyine ibatshise!" 
Isaiah5:12 Kuko uhadi nenebele, intambula nomlozi, neveyine, ezidlweni zabo; kanti ukwenza kukayehova abakugqali, nomsebenzi wezandla zake abawuboni." 
Isaiah5:13 Ngako oko abantu bam bayatinjwa, bengenakwazi nje; imiduna yabo inokulamba, nesihlwele sabo sitshile linxanwa." 
Isaiah5:14 Ngako oko ihadesi iyandisa inkanuko yayo, nomlomo wayo iyawakamisa ngento engenakulinganiswa; kwandule ukuhla amanene abo, nesihlwele sabo, nembutumbutu yabo, nalowo ugcobayo pakati kwabo." 
Isaiah5:15 Umntu omnyama wototyiswa, nendoda enkulu yototyelwa pantsi; namehlo abaqanqalazayo ototyelwa pantsi ke." 
Isaiah5:16 Kodwa uyehova wemikosi uya kupakanyiswa ngobugwebo, notixo oyingcwele uya kungcwaliswa ngobulungisa." 
Isaiah5:17 Imvana ziya kudla apo ziqu̔tyelwa kona, nendawo ezicitakeleyo zabatyebileyo imihlambi yasemzini yozigqiba." 
Isaiah5:18 Kwoba nzima kubo abar̔olayo inkohlakalo ngentambo zokungendawo, nesono njengokungati kungomqokozo wenqwelo!" 
Isaiah5:19 Abati: Makanxame ke, makakaulezise umsebenzi wake, ukuze siwubone; malisondele icebo loyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, lize nokuza, ukuba silazi!" 
Isaiah5:20 Kwoba nzima kubo abati ngokukohlakeleyo kulungile, nangokulungileyo kukohlakele; ababeka ubumnyama endaweni yokukanya, nokukanya endaweni yobumnyama; ababeka ubuṙaṙa endaweni yobumnandi, nobumnandi endaweni yobuṙaṙa!" 
Isaiah5:21 Kwoba nzima kubo abalumkileyo kwawabo amehlo, nabanokuqonda kokwabo ukubona!" 
Isaiah5:22 Kwoba nzima kubo abanobuṙoti ukuba basele iveyine, nabangamadoda okwomelela ukuba bapitikeze uselo olunamandla:" 
Isaiah5:23 abagwebela onetyala ngenxa yebaso, nokulunga kwabalungileyo bakuhlute kubo!" 
Isaiah5:24 Ngako oko, njengokuba ilangatye lomlilo lisidla indiza, nesikota esitshayo sisiwa pantsi; kwa njalo ingcambo yabo yoba njengembozo, nentyatyambo yabo yonyuka njengotuli: ngokuba belahlile umteto kayehova wemikosi, nelizwi loyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli belidelile." 
Isaiah5:25 Ngenxa yoku iyavuta ingqumbo kayehova ngakubo abantu bake, nesandla sake usolulele pezu kwabo, wababeta; zada zangcangcazela intaba, nezidumbu zabo zaba njengenkunkuma pakati kwezitarate. Kodwa noko ingqumbo yake ayinqandwa, isandla sake sisolulwa." 
Isaiah5:26 Ngokuba eya kupakamisela izizwe ezikude ibanile, azilozele zivele ekupeleni kwomhlaba; bona ke, ziya kuza ngokunxama na ngokukauleza." 
Isaiah5:27 Akuyi kubako odiniweyo, akuyi kubako noku̔bekayo pakati kwabo; abayi kwozela, abayi kulala butongo; umbinqo wezinqe zabo awuyi kutukululwa, neṙwintsela lezihlangu zabo aliyi kuqaulwa:" 
Isaiah5:28 abantolo zibukali, nazo zonke izipeta zabo zityediwe; impupu zamahashe abo zobalwa ngokuba njengelitye elilukuni, nengqengqeleko zabo ngokuba njengesaqwiti." 
Isaiah5:29 Ukukonya kwabo kwoba njengokwengonyamakazi; baya kukonya njengengonyama ezintsha; ewe, bovungama, babambe into yokuqwengwa; bobaleka nayo inqabile, kungeko oyihlangulayo." 
Isaiah5:30 Babeya kugquma ngakubo ngomhla lowo njengokugquma kwolwandle; kude kuti kwakukangelwa ngasemhlabeni, nabo ubumnyama obunzima, nokukanya kwenziwe mnyama ngamafu awo." 
Isaiah6:1 NGOMNYAKA wokufa kwokumkani u‐Huziya, ndaza ndabona inkosi ihleli pezu kweterone ende epakamileyo, ati amasondo esivato sayo azalisa itempile." 
Isaiah6:2 Iserafime zema ngakuyo: zibe zinamapiko amatandatu ezinye ngezinye; ngamabini zagubungela ubuso bazo, nangamabini zagubungela inyawo zazo, nangamabini zapapazela." 
Isaiah6:3 Enye yabiza kwenye, yati: Uyingcwele, uyingcwele, uyingcwele, uyehova wemikosi; umhlaba wonke uzele bubungcwalisa bake!" 
Isaiah6:4 Kanjalo amaseko eminyango azamazama ngenxa yelizwi yaleyo ibizileyo, yati indlu yazaliswa ngumsi." 
Isaiah6:5 Ndaza ndati: Au mna! sendibuba; ngokuba ndingumntu omlomo unco̔lileyo, ndihleli nje pakati kwabantu abamilomo inco̔lileyo kanjalo; ngokuba amehlo am ebonile ukumkani, uyehova wemikosi." 
Isaiah6:6 Yandula yabalekela kum enye kuzo iserafime, inelahle elivutayo esandleni sayo ilitabatileyo ngesitabatelo esibingelweni;" 
Isaiah6:7 yacukumisa ngalo umlomo wam, yati: Bona ke, eli licukumisile umlomo wako; ngako inkohlakalo yako isusiwe, nesono sako sixolelwe." 
Isaiah6:8 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi lenkosi, isiti: Ngubanina lowo endiya kumtuma, ngubanina nalowo oya kusiyela? Ndaza ndati: Nanku ndi lapa; nditume mna." 
Isaiah6:9 Yayisiti: Hamba uye uti kwababantu: Hlalani nisiva, nize ningaqondi; hlalani nibona, nize ningaqiqi." 
Isaiah6:10 Yenza intliziyo yababantu idikwe; nendlebe zabo zenze nzima, namehlo abo wacime; hleze babone ngamehlo abo, beve ngendlebe zabo, baqonde ngentliziyo zabo, baguquke, bapiliswe." 
Isaiah6:11 Ndaza ndati: Kude kube ninina, Nkosi? Yayisiti: Kude kucitakaliswe izixeko zingabi nabemi, nezindlu zingabi nabantu, nelizwe ligqityelwe ukucitakaliswa," 
Isaiah6:12 ati uyehova abafudusele kude abantu, nokushiyiweyo kube kukulu pakati kwelizwe." 
Isaiah6:13 Nakuba kuseko kulo isahlulo seshumi, sobuya sitshiswe kwa sona; noko, njengomti weterebinte nanjengomti weyeke, eti yakuwiswa kuko isipunzi kuyo, kwa njalo inzalo engcwele yoba sisipunzi saso." 
Isaiah7:1 KWAYE kute emihleni ka‐Ahazi, unyana ka‐Yotame, unyana ka‐Huziya, ukumkani wo‐Juda, wenyuka u‐Retsine ukumkani we‐Siriya, no‐Pekahi unyana ka‐Remaliya ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, ukuya e‐Yerusaleme, kuze kuliwe ngakuyo; kodwa wakohlwa kukuyoyisa." 
Isaiah7:2 Kwaza kwaxelwa kwindlu ka‐Davide, kusitwa: ama‐Siriya atelelene no‐Frayime. Yaza intliziyo yake yazamazama, nentliziyo yabantu bake, njengokuba imiti yehlati izamazama pambi kwomoya." 
Isaiah7:3 Wandula wati uyehova ku‐Yisaya: Puma ke uye kukaulela u‐Ahazi, wena, no‐Share‐yashube unyana wako, ngasesipelweni somjelo wecibi lasentla, ngasemendweni wentsimi yomsuki;" 
Isaiah7:4 uze uti kuye: Lumka, wonwabe ke; ungoyiki, nentliziyo yako maingabi butataka, ngenxa yalemisila mibini yezikuni eziqu̔mayo, ngenxa yobushushu bengqumbo ka‐Retsine nama‐Siriya, nonyana ka‐Remaliya." 
Isaiah7:5 Ngokokuba ama‐Siriya, o‐Frayime, nonyana ka‐Remaliya, becebile ububi ngakuwe, besiti:" 
Isaiah7:6 Masinyukele ngakuyo i‐Juda, siyituse; masiyoyise kanye ibe yeyetu, simise ukumkani pakati kwayo, unyana ka‐Tabele:" 
Isaiah7:7 itsho inkosi uyehova ukuti: Akusayi kuma; akusayi kubako nokubako. 
Isaiah7:8 Ngokuba intloko ye‐Siriya iya kuba yi‐Damakusi, nentloko ye‐Damakusi yoba ngu‐Retsine; kanjako kungekabiko iminyaka engamashumi matandatu anamihlanu o‐Frayime baya kucitwa, bangabi sesiso isizwe." 
Isaiah7:9 Kanjalo intloko yakwa‐Frayime yoba yi‐Samariya, nentloko ye‐Samariya yoba ngunyana ka‐Remaliya. Ukuba aniyi kukolwa, ngenyaniso aniyi kuqiniswa." 
Isaiah7:10 Ubuye wateta uyehova ku‐Ahazi, esiti:" 
Isaiah7:11 Zicelele umqondiso kuyehova, utixo wako; wucele enzulwini, umhlaumbi enyangweni pezulu." 
Isaiah7:12 Kodwa u‐Ahazi wati: Andiyi kucela; andiyi kumlinga uyehova kanjalo. 
Isaiah7:13 Waza wati u‐Yisaya: Yivani ke, ndlu ka‐Davide! kuyinto encinane kuni na ukudinisa abantu, ukuba niya kudinisa utixo wam naye nje?" 
Isaiah7:14 Ngako oko inkosi yona iya kuninika umqondiso: bona ke, intombi iya kumita, izale unyana, imbize ngegama elingu‐Yimanuweli." 
Isaiah7:15 Amasi nobusi uya kubudla, akukwazi ukulahla okukohlakeleyo nokuqasha okulungileyo." 
Isaiah7:16 Koko kuya kuti, engekakwazi umntwana lowo ukulahla okukohlakeleyo nokuqasha okulungileyo, ilizwe unesitukutezi ngalo liya kushiywa ngokumkani balo bobabini." 
Isaiah7:17 Uyehova uya kuzisa pezu kwako, napezu kwabantu bako, napezu kwendlu kayihlo, imihla, engezanga ibeko enjalo, kwa kuseloko o‐Frayime bahlukana no‐Juda; — ukumkani we‐Asiriya." 
Isaiah7:18 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, uyehova wolozela impukane esekupeleni kwemilambo yase‐Jipete, nenyosi eselizweni le‐Asiriya." 
Isaiah7:19 Zaziya kuza ke, zipumle zonke ezintilini ezitshabaleleyo, nasemifanteni yamawa, napezu kwayo yonke imiminga, napezu kwawo onke amadlelo." 
Isaiah7:20 Ngomhla lowo inkosi iya kuguya ngesitshetshe esiqeshiweyo, ngabapesheya kwomlambo, ngokumkani we‐Asiriya, intloko, nenwele zenyawo; siya kupala nodevu nalo." 
Isaiah7:21 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, umntu uya kufuya itokazi linye negusha zimbini;" 
Isaiah7:22 kuze kuti ke, ngenxa yobuninzi bobisi eziya kubunika, wodla amasi; ewe, amasi nobusi baya kubudla bonke abaseleyo pakati kwelizwe." 
Isaiah7:23 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, zonke indawo, apo beliko kona iwaka lemiti yeveyine, ngenani lewaka lamaqosha esilivere, zoba zezembobo nezemitolo." 
Isaiah7:24 Ngentolo nangesipeta kuya kungenwa kona; ngokuba umhlaba wonke woba zimbobo nemitolo. 
Isaiah7:25 Kodwa zonke intaba, ezihlakulekayo ngekuba, akuyi kuya kona ngokwoyika imbobo nemitolo; zoba yindawo yokutunyelwa kwenkomo, neyokunyatela kwegusha." 
Isaiah8:1 KANJAKO wati uyehova kum: Tabata icwecwe elikulu, uba̔le pezu kwalo ngento yokuba̔la yomntu, ngaye u‐Mahere‐shalali‐hashe‐bazi." 
Isaiah8:2 Ndaza ndatabatela kum amanqi̔na anyanisekileyo, u‐Huriya umperisite, no‐Zekariya unyana ka‐Yeberekiya." 
Isaiah8:3 Ndaza ndasondela kumprofitekazi, owamitayo, wazala unyana. Wayesiti uyehova kum: Mbize ngegama elingu‐Mahere‐shalali‐hashe‐bazi." 
Isaiah8:4 Ngokuba, engekazi lomntwana ukubiza ngokuti, Bawo! nokuti, Ma! kuya kufuduswa ubutyebi base‐Damakusi, nempango yase‐Samariya, pambi kwokumkani we‐Asiriya." 
Isaiah8:5 Ubuye wateta uyehova kum kanjako, esiti:" 
Isaiah8:6 Ngokokuba ababantu bedela amanzi e‐Siloha, ahambayo kuhle, benokuvuya ku‐Retsine nakunyana ka‐Remaliya;" 
Isaiah8:7 kukona, bona ke, inkosi iya kunyusa pezu kwabo amanzi omlambo, amakulu nanamandla, — ukumkani we‐Asiriya nabo bonke ababungcwalisa bake; wauya kunyukela pezu kwayo yonke imijelo yawo, ugqitele zonke indonga zawo;" 
Isaiah8:8 uya kudlulela e‐Juda; wokukula, ucande nokucanda; wofikelela entanyeni: kanjalo ukwolulwa kwamapiko ake kwozalisa ububanzi belizwe lako, Yimanuweli!" 
Isaiah8:9 Ngxolani, nina zizwe! niya kutiwa shwaqe noko; nibeke indlebe, nonke nina mazwe akude! zibinqeni, niya kutiwa shwaqe noko; zibinqeni, niya kutiwa shwaqe noko." 
Isaiah8:10 Nikani icebo, lotshabalala noko; tetani ilizwi, aliyi kuma noko: ngokuba utixo enati." 
Isaiah8:11 Ngokuba wabesitsho uyehova kum, ngokuqu̔ba kwamandla, wandiyala ukuba ndingahambi endleleni yababantu, esiti:" 
Isaiah8:12 Aniyi kuti: Kuko utelelano, ngako konke abaya kuti ngako ababantu: Kuko utelelano; nize ningoyiki ngokwoyika kwabo, ningankwantyi kanjako." 
Isaiah8:13 Uyehova wemikosi yena niya kumngcwalisa: nguye oya kuba kukwoyika kwako, nguye oya kuba kukunkwantya kwako." 
Isaiah8:14 Ngokuba eya kuba yindawo eyingcwele; kodwa woba lilitye lokuku̔bekisa, nolwalwa lwokuwisa, kuzo izindlu zombini zo‐Sirayeli; woba ngumgibe nesisinga kubo abemi base‐Yerusaleme." 
Isaiah8:15 Baninzi abaya kuku̔beka ngazo, bawe, bapulwe nokwapulwa; nabaya kutiyelwa, babanjwe nokubanjwa." 
Isaiah8:16 Bopa isinqi̔nelo; wuncamatiselele abafundiswa bam umteto. 
Isaiah8:17 Ndiya kulinda uyehova, ofihlayo ubuso bake kwindlu ka‐Yakobi, ndokangela yena." 
Isaiah8:18 Bona ke, mna nabantwana endibapiweyo nguyehova wemikosi, simis elwe imiqondiso nemimangaliso kwa‐Sirayeli, nguyehova wemikosi, omiyo entabeni ye‐Ziyone." 
Isaiah8:19 Kanjako xeshekweni baya kuti kuni: Funani kwabenzelana nemishologu nakumatola, abasebezayo, abadumzelayo; yitini: Abantu ngebengafuni na kutixo wabo? ngebefun ela abahleliyo kubafileyo na?" 
Isaiah8:20 Makuyiwe emtetweni nasesinqi̔nweni! ukuba abateti njengelilizwi, akuyi kubako ukusa kubo." 
Isaiah8:21 Babeya kucanda kulo, bebandezekile, belambile nokulamba; kwakuya kuti, xeshekweni bevayo ukulamba, boziqumbisa, batuke ukumkani wabo notixo wabo, babeke ngapezulu." 
Isaiah8:22 Baya kukangela nasemhlabeni; kanti nabuya ubunzima nobumnyama; bosibekelelwa sisitukutezi, bagxotelwe esitokotokweni." 
Isaiah9:1 Kodwa akuyi kumana kusibekelelwa, apo isitukutezi besi fudula sikona: njengokuba ebete ngexesha lapambili wangenisa ilizwe lakwa‐Zebulone nelizwe lakwa‐Nefatali ekudelweni, woti ke kamva awenze abe nokubekwa — awendlela yaselwandle, pesheya kwe‐Yoredane, i‐Galili yabaheyideni." 
Isaiah9:2 Abantu ababehamba ebumnyameni, babonile ukukanya okukulu; abo babehleli ezweni letunzi lokufa, ukukanya kukazimlile pezu kwabo." 
Isaiah9:3 Usandisile isizwe, esi vuyo ubungalwenzanga lukulu: bayavuya ebusweni bako njengokuba kuvuywa ngexesha lokuvuna; njengokuba begcoba abantu ekwabeni kwabo amaxoba." 
Isaiah9:4 Ngokuba iyokwe yomtwalo wabo, nentonga yegxalaba labo, uswazi lwombandezeli wabo, uzapule, njengasemini yama‐Midiyane." 
Isaiah9:5 Ngokuba zonke izihlangu zabaxo̔bileyo ngazo ekulweni, nengubo eziqengqiweyo egazini, ziya kutshiswa; zoba kukutya kwawo umlilo." 
Isaiah9:6 Ngokuba sizalelwe umntwana, sinikiwe unyana; ubukosi boba pezu kwegxalaba lake, negama lake lobizwa ngokuba ngummangaliso, umcebisi, utixo ongusomandla, uyise wonapakade, inkosi yoxolo." 
Isaiah9:7 Ukwanda kwobukosi bake nokwoxolo lwabo akuyi kuba nakupela, pezu kweterone ka‐Davide, napezu kwobukumkani bake; ukuba buqiniswe, nokuba busekelwe, ngobugwebo nangobulungisa, kwa kaloku nje nakude kube ngunapakade. Ubukwele bukayehova wemikosi bokwenza oku." 
Isaiah9:8 INKOSI iku̔pile ilizwi ngako‐Yakobi, lehla ngako‐Sirayeli;" 
Isaiah9:9 babeya kulazi bonke abantu abo, kwa o‐Frayime nabemi base‐Samariya, abati nger̔atshi nangobukulu bentliziyo:" 
Isaiah9:10 Izitene ziwile, kanti siya kwaka ngamatye aqandulweyo; imikiwane igauliwe, kanti sohlaziya ngesedare." 
Isaiah9:11 Ngokuba uyehova eya kuvusa ababandezeli baka‐Retsine ngakubo, nentshaba zabo wozitelekisa;" 
Isaiah9:12 ama‐Siriya ngecala lapambili, nama‐Filistiya ngelasemva; babeya kubadla o‐Sirayeli ngomlomo owakamileyo. Kodwa noko ingqumbo yake ayinqandwa, isandla sake sisolulwa." 
Isaiah9:13 Ngokuba ababantu bengabuyelanga kulowo owababetayo, noyehova wemikosi abamfunanga." 
Isaiah9:14 Ngako uyehova wonqumla ko‐Sirayeli intloko nomsila, isebe nomkanzi, emhleni mnye." 
Isaiah9:15 Omdala nobekwayo, nguye oyintloko; nomprofite ofundisa ubuxoki, nguye ongumsila." 
Isaiah9:16 Ngokuba abakapi bababantu bebalahlekisa; nabo bakatshwayo ngabo bati tshabalala. 
Isaiah9:17 Ngako oko inkosi ayiyi kuvuya pezu kwamadodana abo, nenkedama zabo nabahlolokazi babo ayiyi kuba nanceba ngakubo; ngokuba bonke ngabanye bengabaginwa nabenzi bokungalungileyo, nayo yonke imilomo iteta ubugeza. Kodwa noko ingqumbo yake ayinqandwa, isandla sake sisolulwa." 
Isaiah9:18 Ngokuba inkohlakalo itshisa njengomlilo; imbobo nemitolo yozigqiba; iya kuvutisa indada zehlati, eziya kuqengqekela pezulu ekunyukeni kwomsi." 
Isaiah9:19 Ngokuṙala kukayehova wemikosi ilizwe liyatshiswa, nabantu boba njengokutya kwomlilo; omnye akayi kuba nazibele ngakwomnye." 
Isaiah9:20 Baya kusika ngasekunene, balambe noko; baya kutya ngasekohlo, bangahluti noko; abanye ngabanye baya kuyidla inyama yengalo zabo." 
Isaiah9:21 O‐Manase bodla o‐Frayime, no‐Frayime o‐Manase; bona kunye bomelana no‐Juda. Kodwa noko ingqumbo yake ayinqandwa, isandla sake sisolulwa." 
Isaiah10:1 Kwoba nzima kubo abamisa imimiso ebumenemene, nakubo ababa̔li a baba̔lela ububi:" 
Isaiah10:2 ukusonga amahlwempu ekugwebeni, nokuhluta abalusizi babantu bam ibango labo; ukuba abahlolokazi babe lixoba labo, nokuba bapange abazinkedama!" 
Isaiah10:3 Seniya kwenza nto nina emhleni wokubuza, nasekutshabalaliseni o kuvela kude? niya kusabela kubanina kuncedwe? kupina ke eniya kushiya ababungcwalisa benu?" 
Isaiah10:4 Ngapandle kwam baya kuguqa ngapantsi kwababanjwa, baya kuwa ngapantsi kwababuleweyo. Kodwa noko ingqumbo yake ayinqandwa, isandla sake sisolulwa." 
Isaiah10:5 KWOBA nzima kuye um‐Asiriya, uswazi lwengqumbo yam, ontonga esandleni sake iyeyomsindo wam!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ngakuso isizwe esibuginwa ndiya kumtuma, nangakubo abantu bokuṙala kwam ndomyalezela; ukutimba amaxoba, nokupanga impango, nokubenza into yokunyatelwa pantsi njengodaka lwezitarate." 
Isaiah10:7 Yena kodwa, akacamangi njalo, nentliziyo yake yona ayiqingi njalo; koko ukutshabalalisa kusentliziyweni yake, nokunqamla izizwe ezingezincinane." 
Isaiah10:8 Ngokuba esiti: Inkosana zam kunye azingabo na okumkani? 
Isaiah10:9 I‐Kaleno ayinjenge‐Karakemishe na? i‐Hamati ayinjenge‐Arapadi na? i‐Samariya ayinjenge‐Damakusi na? 
Isaiah10:10 Njengokuba isandla sam sifumene ubukumkani bezitixo, nemifanekiso eqingqiweyo yazo, ebigqitisele eyase‐Yerusaleme neyase‐Samariya;" 
Isaiah10:11 njengokuba ndenzele i‐Samariya nezitixo zayo, andiyi kwenje njalo na kwi‐Yerusaleme namadalo ayo?" 
Isaiah10:12 Kwoti ke ngoko, nxa inkosi igqibile wonke umsebenzi wayo entabeni ye‐Ziyone nase‐Yerusaleme, ndiya kwohlwaya isixakato sobukulu bayo intliziyo yokumkani we‐Asiriya, nobungangamsha ber̔atshi lamehlo ake." 
Isaiah10:13 Ngokuba esiti: Kungamandla esandla sam endikwenzileyo, nangobulumko bam; ngokuba ndinokuqonda. Sendishenxisile imida yabantu, nendyebo zabo ndizitimbile; nanjengonamandla ndibawisile abo bahleli eziteroneni." 
Isaiah10:14 Ewe, isandla sam sifumene ubutyebi babantu njengendlu yentaka; nanjengokuba kubutwa amaqanda ashiyiweyo, kwa njalo nam ndibutile umhlaba wonke; kungabangako nanye ewambuzela ipiko, neyakamisa umlomo, neliliselayo." 
Isaiah10:15 Kanene izembe loqa̔yisa na ngakuye ogaula ngalo? nesaṙa yozizukisa na ngakuye oyishukushukumisayo? njengokungati uswazi beluya kushukushukumisa abo balupakamisayo; njengokungati intonga ibiya kupakamisa ongengumti. 
Isaiah10:16 Ngako oko inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, iya kutuma pezu kwabatyebileyo bake ukunqina; nangapantsi kwababungcwalisa bake uya kuvutisa imvuto, njengemvuto yomlilo." 
Isaiah10:17 Ewe, isikanyiso so‐Sirayeli soba ngumlilo, noyingcwele yabo woba lilangatye; wauya kutshisa ugqibe imitolo yake nembobo zake emhleni mnye." 
Isaiah10:18 Nobungcwalisa behlati lake nobomyezo wake, umpefumlo nomzimba yomibini, uya kubugqibela; waeya kuwa njengofayo." 
Isaiah10:19 Kanjalo isisalela semiti yalo ihlati lake soba ngumbalwa, ide iba̔lelwe nangumntwana." 
Isaiah10:20 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, isisalela so‐Sirayeli, nabasindileyo bendlu ka‐Yakobi, abasayi kupinda ukwayama pezu kwalowo ubabetileyo, baya kwayama pezu kwoyehova, oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, ngenyaniso." 
Isaiah10:21 Isisalela, isisalela sika‐Yakobi, soguqukela kutixo ongusomandla." 
Isaiah10:22 Ngokuba nangona abantu bako o‐Sirayeli banjengentlabati yolwandle, isisalela siya kuguqukela kuye. Ukugqityelwa kumisiwe, kukukulisa ngobulungisa:" 
Isaiah10:23 ngokuba ukugqityelwa, kwa oko kumisiweyo, iya kukwenza inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, pakati kwelizwe lonke." 
Isaiah10:24 Ngako oko itsho inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, ukuti: Ningoyiki, bantu bam abahleli e‐Ziyone! ngenxa yom‐Asiriya: angaba enibeta ngoswazi, apakamise intonga yake ngakuni, ngesiko le‐Jipete;" 
Isaiah10:25 koko kuseko ixeshana elincinanana, wandul’ ukugqitywa umsindo, nengqumbo yam ekutshabalaleni kwabo." 
Isaiah10:26 Ngokuba uyehova wemikosi eya kumvusela izwiniya, njengokubulawa kwama‐Midiyane eweni lika‐Worebe: intonga yake yoba pezu kwolwandle; woyipakamisa ngesiko le‐Jipete." 
Isaiah10:27 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, kwosuswa umtwalo wake egxalabeni lako, neyokwe yake entanyeni yako; kanjalo iyokwe iya kwonakaliswa ngenxa yokutanjiswa." 
Isaiah10:28 Ufikile e‐Hayati, udlulile nge‐Migrone; e‐Mikimashe ubekele impahla yake." 
Isaiah10:29 Bacandile ingxingwa; i‐Geba yindawo yabo yokulalisa: i‐Rama iyangcangcazela; i‐Gibeha ka‐Saule iyasaba. 
Isaiah10:30 Yenza isikalo esikulu ngelizwi lako, ntombi yase‐Galime! pulapula, Layishe! Haniya! Hanatote!" 
Isaiah10:31 I‐Mademena ibalekile; abemi base‐Gebime benzile intsabo. 
Isaiah10:32 Iseko imini nye yokuhlala e‐Nobe, andule avivinye isandla sake ngakuyo intaba yentombi yase‐Ziyone, induli yase‐Yerusaleme." 
Isaiah10:33 Bona ke, inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, iya kunqumla amasebe ngesibeto esoyikekayo: ababude bukulu baya kugaulwa, nabapakamileyo baya kutotyelwa pantsi." 
Isaiah10:34 Iya kuhlahla indada zehlati ngentsimbi, ne‐Lebanone iya kuwa ngonamandla." 
Isaiah11:1 KOKO kuya kupuma ihlumelo esipunzini sika‐Jese, negatya liya kuhluma ezingcanjeni zake." 
Isaiah11:2 Umoya kayehova wopumla pezu kwake, umoya wobulumko nengqondo, umoya wobucebo namandla, umoya wokumazi nokumoyika uyehova." 
Isaiah11:3 Waeya kuqiqa msinya okwokwoyikwa kukayehova; akayi kugweba ngokubona kwamehlo, akayi kwaba ngokuva kwendlebe kanjako:" 
Isaiah11:4 koko eya kugwebela amahlwempu ngobulungisa, abele abalulamileyo bomhlaba ngolungelelaniso; uya kubeta umhlaba ngoswazi lwomlomo wake, nangomoya womlomo wake wobubisa okohlakeleyo." 
Isaiah11:5 Ubulungisa boba ngumbinqo wesinqe sake, nenyaniso yoba ngumbinqo wezintso zake." 
Isaiah11:6 Yandule incu̔ka ihlale nemvana, nengwe ilale pantsi nebokwana; itole nengonyamana nenkatyana etyetyisiweyo zoba ndawonye; nomntwana omncinane wozikokela." 
Isaiah11:7 Imazi entsha neberekazi zodlelana; inkonyana zazo zoti butu ndawonye; nengonyama iya kutya inca njengenkomo. 
Isaiah11:8 Usana luya kudlala emnxunyeni weṙamba, nomntwana olunyulweyo wobeka isandla sake pezu kwentunja yebasiliske." 
Isaiah11:9 Akuyi kupatwa kakubi, akuyi kubujiswa kanjako, kuyo yonke intaba yam eyingcwele; ngokuba umhlaba uya kuzala kukwaziwa kukayehova, njengokuba amanzi egubungela ulwandle." 
Isaiah11:10 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ingcambo ka‐Jese, eya kuma ibe yibanile yezizwe, kwa kuyo yona abaheyideni baya kufuna; nendawo yokupumla kwayo yoba ’bungcwalisa." 
Isaiah11:11 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, inkosi iya kupinda ngokwesibini ukwolula isandla sayo, ize ikulule isisalela sabantu bayo, abo abaya kusala, e‐Asiriya, nase‐Jipete, nase‐Patrose, nase‐Kushe, nase‐Helami, nase‐Shinare, nase‐Hamati, naseziqitini zolwandle." 
Isaiah11:12 Yaiya kupakamisela abaheyideni ibanile, ibahlanganise abagxotiweyo bakwa‐Sirayeli, nabacitakeleyo bakwa‐Juda ibabute, ezipelweni zozine zomhlaba." 
Isaiah11:13 Wandule umona wo‐Frayime ukumka, nababutshaba bakwa‐Juda ukunqanyulwa; o‐Frayime abayi kuba namona ko‐Juda, no‐Juda abayi kuba nabutshaba ko‐Frayime." 
Isaiah11:14 Koko beya kugaleleka emagxalabeni ama‐Filistiya ngasentshonalanga; kwa kunye baya kupanga amadoda asempumalanga; isandla sabo baya kusibeka pezu kwe‐Edome ne‐Mowabi; nosapo luka‐Hamoni lwobapulapula. 
Isaiah11:15 Waye uyehova eya kulahlela ekutshabalaleni icweba lolwandle lwase‐Jipete, avivinye isandla sake ngasemlanjeni, ngamandla omoya wake, awubete ube zimbaxa ezisixe̔nxe, abenze bawele ngezihlangu." 
Isaiah11:16 Wauya kubako umendo kwisisalela sabantu bake, abo abaya kusala, uvela e‐Asiriya, njengokuba wabuko ko‐Sirayeli, emhleni babenyuka ezweni le‐Jipete." 
Isaiah12:1 Ngawo umhla lowo uya kuti: Ndiya kudumisa wena, Yehova! nakuba ubundiqumbele, seibuyile ingqumbo yako, waza wandonwabisa." 
Isaiah12:2 Bona ke, utixo ulusindiso lwam; ndiya kutemba, andiyi kwoyika; ngokuba uyahi, uyehova, engamandla am, neculo lam; ude waba lusindiso kum." 
Isaiah12:3 Naniya kuka amanzi ngovuyo emitonjeni yosindiso. 
Isaiah12:4 Ngawo umhla lowo niya kuti: Bulelani kuyehova, shumayelani igama lake, yazisani izenzo zake pakati kwezizwe, kankanyani ukuba igama lake lipakamile." 
Isaiah12:5 Culani kuyehova, ngokuba eyenzile into ebungangamsha; kwaziwe oku kuwo wonke umhlaba." 
Isaiah12:6 Danduluka, umemeze, wena uhleliyo e‐Ziyone! ngokuba oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli emkulu pakati kwako." 
Isaiah13:1 UMGWEBO nge‐Babilone, owawubonayo u‐Yisaya, unyana ka‐Amotse." 
Isaiah13:2 Misani ibanile pezu kwentaba ende; pakamisani ilizwi kubo; shukushukumisani isandla; ukuba bangene emasangweni abadumileyo. 
Isaiah13:3 Sendiyalezele abahlulwa bam; ndiwabizile namaṙoti am ngenxa yengqumbo yam, abavuyeleli bam abaner̔atshi." 
Isaiah13:4 Isandi sesihlwele ezintabeni, njengesabantu abaninzi; isandi sembutumbutu yezikumkani, sezizwe ezihlanganisiweyo; uyehova wemikosi uyabala umkosi wokulwa." 
Isaiah13:5 Bavela ezweni elikude, esipelweni sezulu, uyehova nabenzi bomsindo wake, ukuza kucita ilizwe lonke." 
Isaiah13:6 Lilani ke, ngokuba umhla kayehova ukufupi: njengengcitakaliso evela konamandla onke uya kuza." 
Isaiah13:7 Ngenxa yoku izandla zonke ziya kupolelwa, nazo zonke intliziyo zabantu zonyibilika;" 
Isaiah13:8 baya kwetuswa; inimba nentlungu ziya kubabamba; njengomfazi ozalayo baya kututumba; baya kukangelana ngokuti nqa; ubuso babo boba bubuso bamalangatye. 
Isaiah13:9 Bona ke, umhla kayehova uyeza! unobukali, unokuṙala, unengqumbo eshushu, ukwenza ilizwe ingcitakalo, naboni balo ukubatshabalalisa kwa kulo." 
Isaiah13:10 Ngokuba inkwenkwezi zezulu, nezikwenkwezi ezikulu zalo, aziyi kukazimlisa ukukanya kwazo; ilanga loba mnyama ekupumeni kwalo, nenyanga ayiyi kukanyisa ukukanya kwayo." 
Isaiah13:11 Ndandiya kwohlwayela inkohlakalo pezu kwelizwe, nokwona kwabo pezu kwabangalungileyo; uqanqalazo lwabazidlayo ndolupelisa, ner̔atshi lwabazidlwengu ndolitobela pantsi." 
Isaiah13:12 Amadoda ndiya kuwenza enqabile pezu kwegolide ecokisiweyo, nabantu pezu kwegolide yase‐Ofire." 
Isaiah13:13 Ngenxa yoku ndiya kuzamazamisa izulu, nomhlaba uya kungcangcazeliswa endaweni yawo; ekuṙaleni kukayehova wemikosi, nasemhleni wengqumbo yake eshushu." 
Isaiah13:14 Boba njengebadi elisukelwayo, nanjengegusha ezingenamntu o zi butayo; abanye ngabanye bobeka ngasebantwini bakowabo, nabanye ngabanye bosabela kwelakowabo ilizwe." 
Isaiah13:15 Osukuba efunyanwa uya kuhlatywa, nosukuba ebaleka wowa ngesiṙele." 
Isaiah13:16 Intsatshana zabo ziya kutyunyuzwa pambi kwamehlo abo; izindlu zabo ziya kupangwa, nabafazi babo bodlwengulwa." 
Isaiah13:17 Bona ke, ndiya kuwavusa ngakubo ama‐Medi, ati isilivere angayikumbuleli, negolide angayinyamekeli." 
Isaiah13:18 Izipeta zawo ziya kutyumza amadodana; nesixakato sesizalo akayi kuba nanceba ngakuso; iliso lawo aliyi kuba nalusizi pezu kwabantwana. 
Isaiah13:19 Kanjalo i‐Babilone, ubuhle bezikumkani, inkazimlo yobungcwalisa bama‐Kaledine, yoba njengasekucitweni kwe‐Sodome ne‐Gomora ngutixo." 
Isaiah13:20 Ayisayi kumiwa napakade, akuyi kuhlalwa kuyo kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana; um‐Arabi akayi kumisa intente kona, nabalusi abayi kubutumisa kona." 
Isaiah13:21 Koko amaṙamncwa asentlango aya kubutuma kona, ziti izindlu zabo zizaliswe ngezihuluhulu; inciniba ziya kuhlala kona, nembuzi ezilixonti ziya kuqakata kona." 
Isaiah13:22 Impungutye ziya kulila ezindlwini zabo ezinkulu, nencu̔ka ezingxandeni zobuyolo: ixesha layo likufupi ukuza, nemihla yayo ayiyi kwolulwa." 
Isaiah14:1 Ngokuba uyehova eya kuba nenceba pezu kwo‐Yakobi, abuye aqashe o‐Sirayeli, abahlalise kowabo umhlaba; nabasemzini baya kuzibandakanyela kubo, baya kunamatela kwindlu ka‐Yakobi." 
Isaiah14:2 Baye abantu beya kubatabata, babazise endaweni yabo: yoti indlu ka‐Sirayeli ibafuye emhlabeni kayehova njengezicaka nanjengezicakakazi; baya kutimba abo babetinjiwe ngabo, bapate pezu kwababandezeli babo." 
Isaiah14:3 Kwakuya kuti emhleni uyehova aya kukunika ukupumla ebuhlungwini bako, nasesitukutezini sako, nasenkonzweni elukuni ubukonziswa ngayo;" 
Isaiah14:4 uya kwandula ukuteta lengoma ngaye ukumkani we‐Babilone, uti: Hai ukupela kwombandezeli! ukupela kwombangikazi wegolide!" 
Isaiah14:5 Uyehova wapule intonga yabakohlakeleyo, uswazi lwabapati." 
Isaiah14:6 Owabeta abantu ngomsindo ngokubeta okungenakupela, owapata izizwe ngengqumbo, usukelwe, kungeko otintelayo." 
Isaiah14:7 Wonke umhlaba uyapumla, wonwabile; bayagqabukela ekuculeni." 
Isaiah14:8 Ewe, imiti yeberoshe iyakuvuyela, n esedare zase‐Lebanone, zisiti: Kuseloko uleleyo, akuko mgauli onyukeleyo ngakuti." 
Isaiah14:9 Ihadesi yasezantsi iyazanyazanyiswa ngenxa yako, ukuya ku ku kaulela ekungeneni kwako; iyakuvusela abafileyo, bonke abakokeli bomhlaba; iyabenza basuke eziteroneni zabo bonke okumkani bezizwe." 
Isaiah14:10 Aba bonke baya kuteta, bati kuwe: Ude waba butataka njengati nawe na? ude wafana nati na?" 
Isaiah14:11 Ubungangamsha bako buhliselwe ehadesi, n entlokoma yeziculiso zako; ngapantsi kwako kwandlelwe izibungu, nesigubungelo sako zimpetu." 
Isaiah14:12 Hai ukuwa kwako ezulwini, kwezindini, nyana wokusa! hai ukugaulelwa kwako emhlabeni, wena owawisa pantsi izizwe!" 
Isaiah14:13 Owabusiti entliziyweni yako: Ndonyukela ezulwini; pezulu pezu kwenkwenkwezi zikatixo ndiya kupakamisa iterone yam; ndohlala entabeni yentlanganiso, emacaleni asenode;" 
Isaiah14:14 ndiya kunyuka pezu kwobude bamafu; ndozifanisa nopezu konke. 
Isaiah14:15 Kodwa uyahliselwa ehadesi, emacaleni esihogo." 
Isaiah14:16 Abo bakubonayo bokukangela, bakugqale, bati: Nguye ke na lowamntu owazamazamisa umhlaba, owangcangcazelisa izikumkani," 
Isaiah14:17 owawenza umhlaba omiwayo njengentlango, nezixeko zawo wazicita, nababanjwa bake akabavulelanga indlela yokugoduka?" 
Isaiah14:18 Bonke okumkani bezizwe, bona bonke balele ebungcwaliseni, abanye ngabanye emadlakeni abo;" 
Isaiah14:19 kanti wena ulahliwe ngapandle kwencw̔aba lako, njengesebe elitiyekileyo; ugujungelwe ngababuleweyo, abahlatyiweyo ngesiṙele, abahlela ematyeni esihogo; njengesidumbu esinyatelweyo." 
Isaiah14:20 Akuyi kubandakanywa nabo ekuncw̔atyweni; ngokuba ilizwe lako ulitshabalalisile, n abantu bako ubabulele: inzalo yabenzi bokungalungileyo abasayi kudunyiswa napakade." 
Isaiah14:21 Lungiselani abantwana bake ukubulawa, ngenxa yenkohlakalo yoyise babo, ukuze bangesuki, bangalifuyi ilizwe, bangasalisi ubuso bomhlaba omiwayo ngezixeko kanjako." 
Isaiah14:22 Ngokuba ndiya kusukela ngakubo, utsho uyehova wemikosi; ndandiya kunqamlela i‐Babilone igama nesisalela, kwa nonyana nesalamane, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah14:23 Ndandiya kuyenza ibe yimfuyo yencanda, namacibi amanzi; ewe, ndoyitshayela ngomtshayelo wokutshabalalisa, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Isaiah14:24 UFUNGILE uyehova wemikosi, ngokuti: Ngenyaniso njengoko ndicingileyo, kwoba njalo, nanjengoko ndicebileyo, kwoma njalo!" 
Isaiah14:25 ukuba ndiya kwapula um‐Asiriya elizweni lam, nokuba ndiya kumnyatela pezu kwentaba zam; yandule iyokwe yake imke kubo, nomtwalo wake ususwe egxalabeni labo." 
Isaiah14:26 Eli licebo elicetyiweyo ngawo wonke umhlaba; nesi sisandla esoluliweyo pezu kwazo zonke izizwe. 
Isaiah14:27 Ngokuba nguyehova wemikosi ocebileyo, ngubanina ongatshabalalisayo? sisandla sake esoluliweyo, ngubanina ongasinqandayo?" 
Isaiah14:28 NGOMNYAKA wokufa kwokumkani u‐Ahazi, kwabako lomgwebo wokuti:" 
Isaiah14:29 Ungavuyi, wena Filistiya yonke! ukuba intonga ekubetileyo yapukile: ngokuba engcanjeni yenyoka kuya kupuma ibasiliske, nesiqa̔mo sayo soba yinyoka ebumliloṙa epapazelayo." 
Isaiah14:30 Andule amazibulo amahlwempu adle, nabasweleyo balale pantsi ngokunqaba; kodwa ingcambo yako ndoyibubisa ngendlala, nesisalela sako siya kubulawa." 
Isaiah14:31 Lila, lisango! kala, sixeko! unyibilikile, wena Filistiya yonke! ngokuba kuvela enode umsi, kungeko oyedwa emihlambini yake." 
Isaiah14:32 Kuze kupendulwe nto nina kwizigidimi zesizwe? Kukuba uyehova umisile i‐Ziyone, nokuba ababandezelwa babantu bake bopepela kuyo." 
Isaiah15:1 UMGWEBO nge‐Mowabi. Ngenyaniso ngobusuku bokucitakaliswa, i‐Hari yase‐Mowabi ibujisiwe; ngenyaniso ngobusuku bokucitakaliswa, i‐Kire yase‐Mowabi ibujisiwe." 
Isaiah15:2 Benyukele etempileni, nase‐Dibone, ezindaweni ezipakamileyo, ukuya kulila; pezu kwe‐Nebo napezu kwe‐Medeba o‐Mowabi bayenza isijwili: kuzo zonke intloko zabo kuko ubunqai; zonke indevu zinqunyulwe." 
Isaiah15:3 Ezitarateni zabo babinqile ngentlakantlaka; pezu kwezindlu zabo, nasezindaweni ezibanzi zabo, bayenza isijwili bonke, besihla belila." 
Isaiah15:4 I‐Heshebone iyakala, kwa ne‐Elehale; kude kwase‐Yahetsa liviwe ilizwi labo; ngako oko abaxo̔bileyo bakwa‐Mowabi bayadanduluka: umpefumlo wake uyatutumela pakati kwake." 
Isaiah15:5 Intliziyo yam iyakala ngenxa ye‐Mowabi; abasabi bayo bayasabela e‐Tsohare, njeng etokazi eliminyaka mitatu; ngokuba benyuka ngeqina lase‐Luhiti, belila; ngokuba endleleni yase‐Horonayime bevusa isikalo sentshabalalo." 
Isaiah15:6 Ngokuba amanzi ase‐Nimra eyingcitakalo; ngokuba inca ibunile, utyani bupelile, uhlaza lungaseko." 
Isaiah15:7 Ngako oko ubuninzi babuqwebileyo, nembekelo yabo, bobututela pesheya kwomlanjana weminculuba." 
Isaiah15:8 Ngokuba isikalo sizungulezela imida yase‐Mowabi; kude kube se‐Egelayime ukulila kwayo, ewe, kude kube se‐Bere‐elime ukulila kwayo." 
Isaiah15:9 Nangona amanzi ase‐Dimone azele ligazi, ndiya kupinda noko ukubeka pezu kwe‐Dimone ingozi; ndiya kuzisa pezu kwabasindileyo base‐Mowabi ingonyama, kwa pezu kwabaseleyo elizweni." 
Isaiah16:1 Tumani imvana kumpati welizwe, kutabata e‐Sela kude kube sentlango, entabeni yentombi yase‐Ziyone." 
Isaiah16:2 Ngokuba kuya kuti, njengentaka ebadulayo, eku̔tshiweyo endlwini yayo, intombi zase‐Mowabi zoba njalo emazibukweni ase‐Arenone, zisiti:" 
Isaiah16:3 Nikani icebo; yenzani ukwahlula; beka isitunzi sako njengobusuku pakati kwemini enkulu; fihla abagxotiweyo; osabileyo ungamtyili. 
Isaiah16:4 Mabapambukele kuwe abagxotiweyo base‐Mowabi; ube yindawo yokufihlela kubo ebusweni bomfaci: ngokuba umbandezeli eya kupela, ukufaca kuya kugqitywa, abo ba si nyatelayo bobujiswa elizweni." 
Isaiah16:5 Kukona iterone iya kuqiniswa ngobubele; kwakuya kuhlala pezu kwayo ngenyaniso, ententeni ka‐Davide, umgwebi, ofuna ubugwebo, onxamela ubulungisa." 
Isaiah16:6 Sivile ir̔atshi lika‐Mowabi, (uner̔atshi kakulu,) ukuzidla kwake, nokuqanqalaza kwake, nokukukumala kwake: ziyinto engendawo ilwimi zake." 
Isaiah16:7 Ngako oko i‐Mowabi yolilela i‐Mowabi, yona yonke iya kulila; ngenxa yemisekelo ye‐Kire‐haresete niya kuncwina, nikedamile kanye." 
Isaiah16:8 Ngokuba amasimi ase‐Heshebone ebunile; umti weveyine wase‐Sibama inkosi zezizwe zapule amasebe awo adumileyo; afikelela e‐Yahezere; alahlekela entlango; amahlumelo awo azandlele, agqitela elwandle." 
Isaiah16:9 Ngako oko ndiya kulilela umti weveyine wase‐Sibama ngokulila kwabase‐Yahezere; ndokunyela ngenyembezi zam, Heshebone, ne‐Elehale! ngokuba pezu kweziqa̔mo zehlobo zako napezu kwokuvuna kwako umemezo lwokulwa luwile." 
Isaiah16:10 Kususiwe uvuyo nomgcobo entsimini ecu̔mileyo; nasemiyezweni akuko ukucula, akuko ukudanduluka; umxovuli akaxovuleli iveyine ezincinezelweni; umemezo lwokuvuya ndilupelisile." 
Isaiah16:11 Ngako oko amatumbu am ohlokoma njengohadi ngenxa ye‐Mowabi, nombilini wam ngenxa ye‐Kire‐harese." 
Isaiah16:12 Kwakuya kuti, okuya abonakele u‐Mowabi, okuya uzidinisile pezu kwendawo epakamileyo, waza wangena endaweni eyingcwele yake ukutandaza, akayi kweyisa noko." 
Isaiah16:13 Eli lilizwi elitetiweyo nguyehova ngo‐Mowabi kudala; 
Isaiah16:14 kodwa kaloku uyehova utetile ngokuti: Pakati kweminyaka mitatu, njengeminyaka yomqashwa, ababungcwalisa bakwa‐Mowabi baya kudelwa, kunye nabo bonke abasihlwele esikulu; nesisalela sona soba sincinane kunene, singenamandla." 
Isaiah17:1 UMGWEBO nge‐Damakusi. Bona ke, i‐Damakusi iya kususwa ingabi sesisixeko; yoba yimfumba yengcitakalo." 
Isaiah17:2 Izixeko zase‐Harohere ziya kushiywa; zoba zezemihlambi, eya kulala pantsi, kungeko oya kuyitusa." 
Isaiah17:3 Kanjalo inqaba iya kupela kwa‐Frayime, nobukumkani kwi‐Damakusi nesisalela sama‐Siriya; boba njengababungcwalisa bosapo luka‐Sirayeli, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Isaiah17:4 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ubungcwalisa buka‐Yakobi buya kutotyelwa pantsi, nokutyeba kwenyama yake kuya kunqina." 
Isaiah17:5 Kwoba njengokuya umvuni abuta inqolowa emiyo, azivune izikwebu ngengalo yake; kwoba njengokucolwa kwezikwebu emhlanjeni wama‐Rafa." 
Isaiah17:6 Ngokuba izibikico ziya kusala kona, njengasekuvutululweni kwomnquma; ibe mibini umhlaumbi mitatu imifuno encameni yomti omde; ibe mine umhlaumbi mihlanu emasebeni omti oqa̔mileyo; utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah17:7 Ngomhla lowo umntu wobeka kumenzi wake, namehlo ake okangela koyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah17:8 Akayi kubeka kuzo izibingelo, umsebenzi wezandla zake, noko ikwenzileyo iminwe yake akayi kukukangela, kwa imifanekiso ka‐Ashera, nezifanekiselo zelanga." 
Isaiah17:9 Ngomhla lowo izixeko zake ezinqatyisiweyo zoba njengokushiyiweyo kwamahlati nemiti emide, ebishiyiwe kwa pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli: zoba ngamanxuwa ke." 
Isaiah17:10 Ngokuba umlibele utixo wosindiswa lwako, nelityekazi lamandla ako ungalikumbulanga, kukona ungatyalayo izityalo ezimnandi, namahlumelo asemzini ungawabeka:" 
Isaiah17:11 emini yokutyala kwako, ungabiya; nakusasa, oko ukubekileyo ungakuhlumisa; kodwa isivuno siya kubaleka, emhleni wobuhlungu nosizi olunzima." 
Isaiah17:12 HOI! imbutumbutu yezizwe ezininzi, e ziyenza impitimpiti njengempitimpiti yelwandle; nokugquma kwentlanga, e zigqumayo njengokugquma kwamanzi amakulu." 
Isaiah17:13 Intlanga, njengokugquma kwamanzi amaninzi zingagquma; koko aya kuzitetisa, zide zisabele kude; zogxotwa njengomququ wentaba pambi kwomoya, nanjengentenda pambi kwesaqwiti." 
Isaiah17:14 Ngexesha lokuhlwa, nasi ke isoyikiso! kungekasi, aziseko! Esi sisabelwa sabo basipangayo, nesahlulelwa sabo batimba kuti." 
Isaiah18:1 Hoi! wena ’lizwe lokuṙatshaza kwamapiko, elipesheya kwemilambo yase‐Tiyopiya;" 
Isaiah18:2 elitumayo izigidimi ngolwandle, nangemikombe yengcongolo pezu kwobuso bamanzi! Hambani, zitunywa ezinamendu! niye kuso isizwe esicitekileyo esobukileyo, kubo abantu aboyikekileyo kwa sekuqaleni kwada kwakaloku; isizwe samandla amakulu nesokunyatela, esilizwe imilambo ilicandayo." 
Isaiah18:3 Nonke nina bemi belizwe, nabahleli emhlabeni! nxa kupakanyiswa ibanile ezintabeni, kangelani; nanxa kuvutelwa ngexilongo, pulapulani." 
Isaiah18:4 Ngokuba uyehova etshilo kum ukuti: Ndiya kuti tu, ndibonele ndisendaweni yam yokuhlala; kungaba njengokufudumala okusileyo ekukanyeni kwelanga, njengelifu lombete ekufudumaleni kwexesha lokuvuna;" 
Isaiah18:5 koko lingekabiko ixesha lokuvuna, nxa umqumbi selubonxile, na nxa idreyive emuncu ivutwa entyatyambeni, uya kunqumla intswazi ngezitshetshe zokusika, namagatya wowasusa, wowagaula." 
Isaiah18:6 Ziya kushiyelwa ndawonye kwintakakazi zentaba, nakwizilo zomhlaba; intakakazi ziya kulenza ihlobo pezu kwazo, nazo zonke izilo zomhlaba zobenza ubusika pezu kwazo." 
Isaiah18:7 Ngeloxesha kwoziswa umnikelo kuyehova wemikosi, uvela kubo abantu abacitekileyo abobukileyo, kwa kubo abantu aboyikekileyo ekuqaleni kwada kwakaloku; isizwe samandla amakulu nesokunyatela, esilizwe imilambo ilicandayo; woziswa endaweni yegama likayehova wemikosi, entabeni ye‐Ziyone." 
Isaiah19:1 UMGWEBO nge‐Jipete. Bona ke, uyehova uya kukwela pezu kwelifu elikaulezayo, eze e‐Jipete; oti amadalo ase‐Jipete azamazame ebusweni bake, nentliziyo ye‐Jipete inyibilike pakati kwayo." 
Isaiah19:2 Ndiya kutelekisa ama‐Jipete ngakuwo ama‐Jipete, aeya kulwa omnye ngakuye umzalwana wake, omnye ngakuye ummelwane wake; isixeko ngakuso isixeko, ubukumkani ngakubo ubukumkani." 
Isaiah19:3 Umoya we‐Jipete wopela pakati kwayo, necebo layo ndolitshabalalisa: angafuna ke kumadalo, nakwizanuse, nakubo abenzelana nemishologu, nakumatola;" 
Isaiah19:4 kodwa ndiya kuwanikela ama‐Jipete esandleni senkosi elukuni, waye ukumkani obukali eya kupata pezu kwawo, itsho inkosi, uyehova wemikosi." 
Isaiah19:5 Kanjalo amanzi aya kutshitsha elwandle, uti umlambo utshe wome." 
Isaiah19:6 Yaiya kunuka imilanjana; yopunguleka imijelo yase‐Jipete, itshe ke; ingcongolo nemikanzi ziya kubuna." 
Isaiah19:7 Amadlelo ngasemlanjeni, ngaselugudwini lwomlambo, nako konke okuhlwayelweyo ngasemlanjeni, kuya kwoma, kupetshulwe, kungabi seko." 
Isaiah19:8 Ababambi bentlanzi baya kugula, bati bonke abaposa iqeṙu emlanjeni balile, nabo bandlala utambo pezu kwobuso bamanzi bacubuke." 
Isaiah19:9 Kanjako abasebenzi befelase ecazwayo baya kudana, kwa nabaluki beqiya emhlope." 
Isaiah19:10 Izibonda zayo zapukile; bonke abasebenzela umvuzo banosizi lwompefumlo. 
Isaiah19:11 Ngenyaniso inkosana zase‐Tsohane zizidenge; abacebisi abalumkileyo baka‐Faro, icebo labo lidolile: ningati nina ukutsho ku‐Faro ukuti: Ndingunyana wamalumko, ndingunyana wokumkani bakudala?" 
Isaiah19:12 Apina ke amalumko ako? makakuxelele kaloku, ukuba ayazi, into iyiyo ayicebileyo uyehova wemikosi pezu kwe‐Jipete." 
Isaiah19:13 Inkosana zase‐Tsohane zinyabile; inkosana zase‐Nofe zikohlisiwe; abazinkosi zezizwe zayo bayilahlekisile i‐Jipete. 
Isaiah19:14 Uyehova uwupitikezile pakati kwayo umoya wobugwenxa, ide yalahlekiswa i‐Jipete ngayo yonke imisebenzi yayo, njengokugexa kwenxila ekuhlanzeni kwalo." 
Isaiah19:15 Kanjalo i‐Jipete ayiyi kuba namsebenzi, ongenzwayo yintloko nomsila, lisebe nomkanzi." 
Isaiah19:16 Ngomhla lowo ama‐Jipete oba njengabafazi; aya kungcangcazela oyike, ngenxa yokuvivinya kwesandla sikayehova wemikosi, aya kusivivinya ngakuwo." 
Isaiah19:17 Ilizwe lakwa‐Juda loba sisoyikiso kwi‐Jipete; osukuba elikankanya uya kwoyika pakati kwake, ngenxa yecebo likayehova wemikosi, ayicebileyo ngakuyo." 
Isaiah19:18 Ngomhla lowo kwobako izixeko zihlanu ezweni le‐Jipete, ziteta ngokuteta kwaba‐Kanane, zifunga nokufunga kuyehova wemikosi; esinye kuya kutiwa sisixeko selanga." 
Isaiah19:19 Ngomhla lowo kwobako isibingelo kuyehova pakati kwelizwe le‐Jipete, nentsika yamatye ngasemdeni wayo kuyehova." 
Isaiah19:20 Sasiya kuba ngumqondiso nenqi̔na likayehova wemikosi elizweni le‐Jipete; ngokuba beya kukala kuyehova ngenxa yabo ababandezeli, waeya kubatumela umsindisi, nomteteleli, abakulule." 
Isaiah19:21 Kanjalo uyehova uya kuzazisa kuma‐Jipete, ade ama‐Jipete amazi uyehova ngomhla lowo, amkonze ngedini nangomnikelo; ewe, aya kubambisa ngesibambiso kuyehova, asifeze." 
Isaiah19:22 Waye uyehova eya kumana ebeta ama‐Jipete, ade awapilise; ngokuba eya kuguqukela kuyehova, oya kukungeleka kuwo, awapilise." 
Isaiah19:23 Ngomhla lowo kwobako umendo uvela e‐Jipete usiya e‐Asiriya; oti ama‐Asiriya eze e‐Jipete, nama‐Jipete eze e‐Asiriya; kanjako ama‐Jipete aya kukonza kunye nama‐Asiriya." 
Isaiah19:24 Ngomhla lowo o‐Sirayeli boba ngabesitatu kuma‐Jipete nakuma‐Asiriya; boba litamsanqeliso pakati kwelizwe: 
Isaiah19:25 ngokuba uyehova wemikosi wobatamsanqela, esiti: Makutanyusanqelwe ama‐Jipete abantu bam, nama‐Asiriya umsebenzi wezandla zam, no‐Sirayeli ilifa lam." 
Isaiah20:1 EMNYAKENI u‐Taratane wafikayo e‐Ashedode, (okuya wabetunyiwe ngu‐Saragone ukumkani we‐Asiriya,) walwa ngakuyo i‐Ashedode, wayibamba;" 
Isaiah20:2 kwa ngeloxesha wateta uyehova ngo‐Yisaya unyana ka‐Amotse, esiti: Hamba, utukulule intlakantlaka esinqeni sako, nezihlangu zako zisuse ezinyaweni zako. Wenje njalo ke, ehamba zé, engenazihlangu." 
Isaiah20:3 Wayesiti uyehova: Njengokuba isicaka sam u‐Yisaya besihamba zé, singenazihlangu, iminyaka yamitatu, singumqondiso nommangaliso pezu kwe‐Jipete napezu kwe‐Tiyopiya;" 
Isaiah20:4 kwa njalo ukumkani we‐Asiriya uya kubafudusa ababanjwa base‐Jipete nabatinjwa base‐Tiyopiya, abafana namaxego, bezé, bengenazihlangu, behlubulukile isibunu, libe lihlazo le‐Jipete." 
Isaiah20:5 Baya kwoyika badanele i‐Tiyopiya itemba labo, ne‐Jipete uqa̔yiso lwabo." 
Isaiah20:6 Abemi balomhlaba baya kuti ngomhla lowo: Bona ke, linjalo itemba letu, apo sisabele kona kuncedwe, ukuze sikululwe kukumkani we‐Asiriya: sesiya kuti nina ukusinda ke?" 
Isaiah21:1 UMGWEBO ngentlango yaselwandle. Njengokuti tshe kwezaqwiti esuyide, ku njalo ukuvela kwabo entlango, ezweni eloyikekileyo." 
Isaiah21:2 Umboniso onzima waxelwa kum: umtimbi etimba, nomcitakalisi ecitakalisa. Nyuka, Helami! vingcela, Medi! konke ukugula ngayo ndikupelisile." 
Isaiah21:3 Ngako oko isinqe sam sizele yintlungu: inimba zindibambile, njengenimba zomfazi ozalayo: ndigotyiwe, ndide ndingeva: nditusiwe, ndide ndingaboni." 
Isaiah21:4 Intliziyo yam iyayoba, ingcangcazelo indoyikisile; ubusuku besilangazelelo sam bundenzelwe obesituso." 
Isaiah21:5 Kulungiswa isitebe, kulindwa ngabalindi, kutyiwa, kuselwa: sukani, zinkosana! tambisani ikaka." 
Isaiah21:6 Ngokuba inkosi itshilo kum ukuti: Hamba, misa umlindi; into ayibonayo makayixele." 
Isaiah21:7 Waza wabona abakweli, n amahashe ngamabini, abakweli bamaqwaṙashe, n abakweli benkamela; wapulapula kunene ngokupulapula okukulu." 
Isaiah21:8 Wayedanduluka njeng engonyama, esiti: Ndema pezu kwendlu yokulinda, nkosi yam! futi emini; napezu kwendawo yam yokuvaṙasha ndandimiswa bonke ubusuku." 
Isaiah21:9 Kekaloku bona ke, naba besiza abakwell bengamadoda, n amahashe ngamabini. Wahambisa wati: i‐Babilone iwile, iwile! nayo yonke imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yotixo bayo uyiqekezele emhlabeni." 
Isaiah21:10 Hai ukubula kwam, nenkozo zesibaya sam! oko ndikuvileyo kuyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ndikushumayele kuni." 
Isaiah21:11 UMGWEBO nge‐Duma. Kwabizwa kum ngelizwi livela e‐Sehire, lisiti: Mlindi! uti nina ngobusuku? Mlindi! uti nina ngobusuku?" 
Isaiah21:12 Wati umlindi: Ukusa kuyeza, kwa nobusuku kanjalo; ukuba niya kubuza, buzani; guqukani, yizani." 
Isaiah21:13 UMGWEBO pezu kwe‐Arabi. Ehlatini lase‐Arabi niya kulalisa, nina bahambi bama‐Dedane!" 
Isaiah21:14 yizani namanzi konxaniweyo: nina bemi belizwe lakwa‐Tema! mpangeleni ngesonka sake osabileyo. 
Isaiah21:15 Ngokuba besabile pambi kweziṙele, pambi kwesiṙele esir̔oliweyo, napambi kwesipeta esityediweyo, napambi kwobunzima bemfazwe." 
Isaiah21:16 Ngokuba inkosi itshilo kum ukuti: Kwa ungekapeli umnyaka, njengeminyaka yomqashwa, bonke ubungcwalisa bakwa‐Kedare bogqityelwa." 
Isaiah21:17 Nesisalela senani labapete isipeta, amagoṙa onyana baka‐Kedare aya kuncitshiswa; ngokuba uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, etshilo." 
Isaiah22:1 UMGWEBO ngesihlambo somboniso. Unanto nina kaloku, ukuba bonke abako benyukele pezu kwezindlu?" 
Isaiah22:2 Wena obuzele zizipitipiti, isixeko esixokozelayo, inqili egcobayo! ababuleweyo bako ababulawanga ngesiṙele, ababubanga ekulweni kanjako." 
Isaiah22:3 Bonke abapati bako besabile kunye; babanjiwe ngabapete isipeta; bonke abafunyanwa kuwe babanjiwe kunye, kwa abo babaleka kude." 
Isaiah22:4 Ngako oko ndite: Jikani kum; ndokwenza ṙaṙa ukilila kwam, ninganxameli ukunditutuzela, pezu kwokubandezelwa kwentombi yabantu bam." 
Isaiah22:5 Ngokuba ngumhla wempitizelo, nowokunyatela, nowokuxakeka, uvela enkosini, kuyehova wemikosi, esihlanjeni somboniso; owokuwisa udonga, nowokukalela entabeni." 
Isaiah22:6 Ama‐Helami atwele umpongolo, enenqwelo zinamadoda, n abakweli bamahashe; ati ama‐Kire ahlube ikaka." 
Isaiah22:7 Kwakuya kuti, imihlambo yako edlulisileyo iya kuzala zinqwelo, nabakweli bamahashe bozimisa ngasesangweni." 
Isaiah22:8 Kutyiliwe isigubungelo se‐Juda; ude wakangela ngalomhla kwizixo̔bo zendlu yehlati. 
Isaiah22:9 Nentanda zesixeko sika‐Davide nizibonile, ukuba zininzi; nanihlanganisa amanzi ecibi lasezantsi." 
Isaiah22:10 Nezindlu zase‐Yerusaleme nizibalile; nazicita izindlu ukunqabisa udonga. 
Isaiah22:11 Nenza nesigingqi pakati kwazo indonga zombini, nisenz ela amanzi ecibi elidala. Kodwa anikangelanga kulowo okwenzile oku, nokuqingileyo kwa kade animgqalanga." 
Isaiah22:12 Inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, ngomhla lowo, ibizele ukulila, nesijwili, nobunqai, nokubinqwa ngentlakantlaka:" 
Isaiah22:13 kanti nanku ukugcoba nokuvuya, ukubinga inkabi nokuxe̔la igusha, ukutya inyama nokusela iveyine, kusitwa: Masitye sisele, ngomso sibuba nje!" 
Isaiah22:14 Koko kutyilelwe ezindlebeni zam nguyehova wemikosi, ukuti: Ngenyaniso aniyi kuxolelwa lenkohlakalo nide nife! itsho inkosi, uyehova wemikosi." 
Isaiah22:15 Itsho inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, ukuti: Hamba, uye kwigosa eli, ku‐Shibena opezu kwendlu, uti:" 
Isaiah22:16 Unanto nina apa? unobanina apa kanjalo, ukuba uzimbele apa incw̔aba, njeng ozimbela pezulu incw̔aba lake, ozisikela eweni indawo yokuhlala?" 
Isaiah22:17 Bona ke! uyehova wokuwisa pantsi kanye, ṙotindini! wokusonga ngokuqinileyo." 
Isaiah22:18 Wokuqengqelela kakulu, akuqengqele ezweni elibanzi njengembumbulo: apo uya kububa, nalapo kwobako inqwelo zako ezintle, wena lihlazo kwindlu yenkosi yako!" 
Isaiah22:19 Ndandiya kukugxota ebumeni bako, nasentlalweni yako uya kukuwisa." 
Isaiah22:20 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ndiya kubiza isicaka sam, u‐Eliyakime unyana ka‐Hilikiya;" 
Isaiah22:21 endiya kumvatisa ingubo yako, ndimbinqise umbinqo wako; nobupati bako ndobunika esandleni sake, waeya kuba nguyise kwabemi base‐Yerusaleme, nakwindlu ka‐Juda." 
Isaiah22:22 Ndiya kubeka isitshixo sendlu ka‐Davide pezu kwegxalaba lake; uya kuvula, kungabiko mntu oya kuvala; uya kuvala, kungabiko mntu oya kuvula." 
Isaiah22:23 Ndiya kumbetela njengesikonkwane endaweni eqinileyo, waeya kuba yiterone yobungcwalisa kwindlu kayise." 
Isaiah22:24 Baya kuxo̔ma pezu kwake bonke ubungcwalisa bendlu kayise, abantwana nabazukulwana; nazo zonke impahla ezincinane, kwa kuzo impahla zezitya kude kube zimpahla zonke zemipanda." 
Isaiah22:25 Ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova wemikosi, sosuswa isikonkwane esibetelweyo endaweni eqinileyo; siya kugaulwa, siwe ke; nomtwalo opezu kwaso wona wonqanyulwa: ngokuba uyehova etshilo." 
Isaiah23:1 UMGWEBO nge‐Tire. Lilani, zinqanawa zase‐Tareshishe! ngokuba icitakalisiwe, kungabiko indlu, kungabiko ukungena kuyo: kuvela elizweni lama‐Kiti kutyiliwe kubo oku." 
Isaiah23:2 Yitini cwaka, nina bemi besiqiti! wena abatengi base‐Tsidone, abawela ulwandle, bakuzalisayo." 
Isaiah23:3 Napezu kwamanzi amakulu ukuvelisa kwe‐Shihore, ukuvunwa kwomlambo, bekuyinzuzo yaso: sasiyindawo yokutenga yezizwe." 
Isaiah23:4 Yiba udanile, Tsidone! ngokuba ulwandle lutetile, inqaba yaselwandle, isiti: Bendingenanimba; andizalanga kanjalo; amadodana andi wondlile; intombi andizikulisile." 
Isaiah23:5 Njengokuba bekunjalo ngendaba ze‐Jipete, baya kututumba nangendaba ze‐Tire." 
Isaiah23:6 Welani niye e‐Tareshishe; lilani, nina bemi besiqiti!" 
Isaiah23:7 Siso esi na isixeko senu semigcobo, esibudala bubobemihla yakudala? ezaso inyawo ziya kusitwala ukuya kupambukela kwa kude." 
Isaiah23:8 Ngubanina okucebileyo oku ngakuyo i‐Tire, ezabayo ikrone, ebatengi bazinkosana, ebatengisi bangabadumileyo bomhlaba?" 
Isaiah23:9 Nguyehova wemikosi okucebileyo, ukuba anco̔lise ir̔atshi lenkazimlo yonke, n okuba adelekise bonke abadumileyo bomhlaba." 
Isaiah23:10 Canda elizweni lako njengomlambo, ntombi yase‐Tareshishe! umbambo awuseko." 
Isaiah23:11 Isandla sake usolulile pezu kwolwandle, izikumkani uzingcangcazelisile; uyehova uyalele ngayo i‐Kanane, ukuba kutshatyalaliswe indawo zayo ezinqabileyo." 
Isaiah23:12 Ute: Akusayi kubuya ugcobe, ntombi ipela ebandezelweyo, ntombi yase‐Tsidone! Suka, wela uye kwa‐Kiti; kwa nakona akuyi kuba nakupumla." 
Isaiah23:13 Bona ke ilizwe lama‐Kaledine! ababantu bebengeko; um‐Asiriya ulimisele abemiyo entlango; bamisile inqaba zabo zokulinda; bacitile izindlukazi zayo; bayenzile ingcitakalo. 
Isaiah23:14 Lilani, zinqanawa zase‐Tareshishe! ngokuba icitakalisiwe indawo yenu enqabileyo." 
Isaiah23:15 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, i‐Tire yolityalwa iminyaka emashumi asixe̔nxe, njengemihla yomnye ukumkani: ekupeleni kweminyaka imashumi asixe̔nxe kwoba kuyo i‐Tire njengengoma kwingnawokazi:" 
Isaiah23:16 Tabata uhadi; jikajikela isixeko, wena ngnawokazi elityelweyo! lungisa ukubeta intambo, vuma ingoma ezininzi, ukuze ukunjulwe." 
Isaiah23:17 Ngokuba kuya kuti ekupeleni kweminyaka imashumi asixe̔nxe, uyehova woza kubona i‐Tire, eya kubuyela emvuzweni wayo, yenze nombulo nabo bonke ubukumkani belizwe obusebusweni bomhlaba." 
Isaiah23:18 Kodwa okwentengo yayo nomvuzo wayo kwoba ngcwele kuyehova; akuyi kubekelwa, akuyi kutshixelwa kanjalo; koko intengo yayo yoba yeyabo bahleliyo pambi kwoyehova, eyokutya ngokukolisa, neyezivato ezihle." 
Isaiah24:1 BONA ke, uyehova uyalenza zé ilizwe, uyalenza ubala; uyapetula ubuso balo, nabemi balo uyabati sa." 
Isaiah24:2 Kwoti ke, njengokuba benjalo abantu, woba njalo umperisite; njengokuba sinjalo isicaka, yoba njalo inkosi yaso; njengokuba sinjalo isicakakazi, yoba njalo inkosikazi yaso; njengokuba enjalo umtengi, woba njalo umtengisi; njengokuba enjalo umboleki, woba njalo obolekwayo; njengokuba enjalo umamkeli wemali, woba njalo oyinika kuye." 
Isaiah24:3 Ilizwe logqityelwa ukwenzwa zé, logqityelwa nokupangwa; ngokuba uyehova elitetile ilizwi eli." 
Isaiah24:4 Ilizwe liyalila, liyonakala; umhlaba omiwayo uyacubuka, uyonakala; abakulu ebantwini belizwe bayacubuka." 
Isaiah24:5 Kanjalo ilizwe linco̔lisiwe ngapantsi kwabemi balo; ngokuba begqitile imiteto; baguqule imimiso; bapulile ucebano olungunapakade. 
Isaiah24:6 Kungoko isiqalekiso sidlayo ilizwe, nabemiyo kulo bamiselwe ityala; kungoko abemi belizwe batshisiwe, nabantu abaseleyo balula." 
Isaiah24:7 Iveyine entsha iyalila, umti weveyine uyabuna; bonke abantliziyo icwayitile bayagula." 
Isaiah24:8 Uvuyo lwentambula luyapumla; intsholo yabagcobayo ipelile; uvuyo lwohadi luyapumla. 
Isaiah24:9 Abayi kusela iveyine ngengoma; utywala boba ṙaṙa kwababuselayo. 
Isaiah24:10 Isixeko esibunxuwa sicitiwe; zonke izindlu zivalelwe, kuze kungangenwa mntu." 
Isaiah24:11 Kuko ukukalelwa iveyine ezitarateni; kuhlwile umgcobo wonke; kumkile uvuyo lwelizwe. 
Isaiah24:12 Kusele esixekweni utshabalalo, nesango lona liqekeziwe lacitwa." 
Isaiah24:13 Koko kuya kuba njalo emhlabeni, pakati kwezizwe, njengasekuvutululweni kwomnquma, njengezibikico nxa kugqityiweyo ukuvunwa kwemiti yeveyine." 
Isaiah24:14 Bona baya kupakamisa ilizwi labo, baya kucula; ngenxa yobungangamsha bukayehova bodanduluka ngovuyo kwa selwandle." 
Isaiah24:15 Ngako oko dumisani uyehova emililweni, igama likayehova, lotixo wo‐Sirayeli, eziqitini zolwandle." 
Isaiah24:16 Kwa sesipelweni somhlaba sivile amaculo okuti: Makubeko ubungcwalisa kolungileyo! Koko ndite: Ilishwa lam! ilishwa lam! au mna! abatimbi bayatimba; ewe, itimbo abatimbi bayalitimba." 
Isaiah24:17 Isoyikiso, nesihogo, nomgibe, zipezu kwako, wena umiyo emhlabeni!" 
Isaiah24:18 Kwakuya kuti, lowo usabayo ilizwi lesoyikiso, uya kweyela esihogweni; nalowo unyukayo esihogweni, uya kubanjiswa emgibeni: ngokuba izituba zezulu zivulekile, nemisekelo yomhlaba iyangcangcazela." 
Isaiah24:19 Ilizwe liqekekile kanye, ilizwe liṙazukile kakulu, ilizwe liyahexa kakulu." 
Isaiah24:20 Ilizwe liyagexagexa njengenxila, liyazamazama njengepempe; kunzima pezu kwalo ukwona kwalo; liya kuwa, lingabuyi lisuke kanjalo." 
Isaiah24:21 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, uyehova uya kwohlwaya umkosi wezulu pezulu, nokumkani bomhlaba emhlabeni." 
Isaiah24:22 Baya kuhlanganiselwa ndawonye, njeng ababanjwa besiya esihogweni; babeya kutshixelwa entolongweni; kodwa emveni kwemihla emininzi baya kunonelelwa." 
Isaiah24:23 Inyanga yoba nentloni, nelanga liya kudana, xeshekweni uyehova wemikosi aya kupata ubukumkani entabeni ye‐Ziyone, nase‐Yerusaleme, napambi kwabadala bake, ngento ebungcwalisa." 
Isaiah25:1 YEHOVA! u ngutixo wam wena; ndokupakamisa; igama lako ndolidumisa; ngokuba ukwenzile okungummangaliso; amacebo ako akudala ayinyaniso ayinene. 
Isaiah25:2 Ngokuba usenzile isixeko sibe yimfumba, isixeko esinqatyisiweyo sibe yingcitakalo, ikomkulu labasemzini lingabi sesisixeko; asisayi kwakiwa napakade." 
Isaiah25:3 Ngako oko abantu abanamandla bokubeka; isixeko sezizwe eziburoti siya kukwoyika. 
Isaiah25:4 Ngokuba ubuyinqaba kolihlwempu, inqaba kosweleyo ebunzimeni bake, indawo yokupepela ngenxa yesipango, umtunzi ngenxa yokufudumala, nxa umoya wabazidlwengu ubunjengesipango ngaseludongeni." 
Isaiah25:5 Njengokufudumala endaweni eyomileyo, uya kudambisa ingxolo yabasemzini; njen gokufudumala ngesitunzi selifu, ingoma yabazidlwengu iya kutotywa." 
Isaiah25:6 Kwa kulentaba uyehova wemikosi uya kwenzela abantu bonke isidlo sezinto ezityebileyo, isidlo seveyine inentlenga zayo, sezinto ezityebileyo zizele ngumongo, seveyine entlenga zayo zihluziweyo." 
Isaiah25:7 Waeya kutshabalalisa kulentaba ubuso besigqubutelo esigqubutelayo abantu bonke, nesigubungelo esigubungelayo zonke izizwe." 
Isaiah25:8 Uya kugqibela ukutshabalalisa ukufa; inkosi e nguyehova iya kusula inyembezi kubo bonke ubuso, nogxekwa lwabantu bayo yolususa kuwo wonke umhlaba: ngokuba uyehova etshilo." 
Isaiah25:9 Kwakuya kutiwa ngalomhla: Bona ke, ngutixo wetu lo; sikangele kuye, waeya kusisindisa: lo nguyehova; sikangele kuye; siya kugcoba sivuye ngalo usindiso lwake." 
Isaiah25:10 Ngenyaniso isandla sikayehova siya kupumla pezu kwalentaba; kodwa u‐Mowabi uya kunyatelwa pantsi endaweni yake, njengokuba inca inyatelwa pantsi emanzini emfumba yomgquba." 
Isaiah25:11 Waeya kuzolula izandla zake pakati kwawo, njengoko umdadi azolulela ukudada: ner̔atshi lake wolitobela pantsi, kunye namaqinga ezandla zake." 
Isaiah25:12 Nenqaba ezinde zendonga zako uya kuzitobisa, azitobele pantsi, aziwisele emhlabeni, kude kube selutulini." 
Isaiah26:1 NGOMHLA lowo eliculo liya kuvunywa elizweni lakwa‐Juda, lokuti: Sinesixeko esinamandla; usindiso wolumisela indonga nendawo ezinqatyisiweyo." 
Isaiah26:2 Vulani amasango, ukuba singene isizwe esilungileyo, esigcinayo inyaniso." 
Isaiah26:3 O kucinga kuqinisekile, uya kumgcina eluxolweni olukolisekileyo, ngokuba etembela kuwe." 
Isaiah26:4 Tembelani kuyehova kude kube ngunapakade; ngokuba okunene uyehova nguyahi — ilityekazi elingunapakade. 
Isaiah26:5 Ngokuba ebatobisile abo babehleli pezulu; isixeko esipakamileyo usitobele pantsi; usitobele pantsi kude kube semhlabeni; usiwisele kwa selutulini. 
Isaiah26:6 Unyawo luyasinyatela, inyawo zonosizi, amanyatela amahlwempu." 
Isaiah26:7 Indlela yolungileyo ilungelelene kanye; wena ulungisayo! indlela yolungileyo uyayilungelelanisa. 
Isaiah26:8 Kwa sendleleni yemigwebo yako, Yehova! sikulindile; inkanuko yompefumlo wetu ingasegameni lako, nasekukunjulweni kwako." 
Isaiah26:9 Ngompefumlo wam ndikukanukile ebusuku; nangomoya wam pakati kwam ndikufunile kusasa; ngokuba, okuya imigwebo yako isemhlabeni, abemi bomhlaba befunda ubulungisa." 
Isaiah26:10 Ukuba okohlakeleyo uya kupatwa ngofefe, akayi kufunda ubulungisa noko; ezweni lokulunga uya kwenza ngobumenemene, angagqali ubukulu bukayehova." 
Isaiah26:11 Yehova! isandla sako sipakamile, abasiboni noko; baya kubona, badane ke; ubukwele ngasebantwini bako, ewe, umlilo ngasezintshabeni zako wozigqibela." 
Isaiah26:12 Yehova! uya kusimisela uxolo; ngokuba usenzele yonke imisebenzi yetu kanjalo. 
Isaiah26:13 Yehova, Tixo wetu! ezinye inkosi ngapandle kwako zisipete ngamandla; kodwa ngawe wedwa sokankanya igama lako." 
Isaiah26:14 Zifile, azisayi kupila; zibubile, azisayi kuvuka: ngokokuba uzohlwayile wazitshabalalisa, nayo yonke inkunjulwa yazo wayibubisa." 
Isaiah26:15 Usandisile isizwe, Yehova! usandisile isizwe; wenzelwe ubungcwalisa; zonke izipelo zelizwe uzifudusele kude." 
Isaiah26:16 Yehova! ebunzimeni bakufunile; batulula intsebezo yokutandaza ngapantsi kwokubeta kwako. 
Isaiah26:17 Njengokuba umfazi omitiyo, ohlalel’ ukuzala, enokututumba, akale ngentlungu zake, sibe sikwa njalo singeko ebusweni bako, Yehova!" 
Isaiah26:18 Besimitile, besinokututumba, sati sakuzala, ubungumoya; asenzelanga ilizwe usindiswa; kanjako abemi bomhlaba abawanga." 
Isaiah26:19 Abafileyo bako bobuya bapile; abasidumbu sam baya kuvuka; vukani nicule, nina bahleli elutulini! ngokuba u njeng ombete wemifuno umbete wako, waye umhlaba uya kuku̔pa ababubileyo." 
Isaiah26:20 Yizani, bantu bam! ngenani ezinkambilini zenu, nivale ingcango zenu emva kwenu; zifihleni, kube njengexanyana elincinanana, ude umsindo ugqite." 
Isaiah26:21 Ngokuba, bona ke! uyehova epuma endaweni yake, ukuya kuyohlwayela inkohlakalo yabemi bomhlaba pezu kwabo; kanjalo umhlaba uya kutyila igazi lawo, ungabi saselela ababuleweyo bawo." 
Isaiah27:1 NGOMHLA lowo uyehova uya kubeta ngeṙele lake, elo lilukuni, elikulu, elinamandla, ileviyatane, inyoka ebalekayo, kwa ileviyatane, inyoka ejikajikayo; nengwenya epakati kwolwandle woyibulala." 
Isaiah27:2 Ngomhla lowo vumani ngawo umyezo weveyine, ukuti:" 
Isaiah27:3 Mna Yehova ndiyawulinda; onke amaxanyana ndowunyela: ukuze ungonakaliswa, ndiyawulinda nasemini nasebusuku." 
Isaiah27:4 Akuko msindo kum: ngubanina noko oya kuzimisa ngakum imbobo n emitolo ekulweni? bendiya kupumela ngakuzo, bendiya kuzitshisa kwa kunye." 
Isaiah27:5 Ukuba kodwa kuko oya kubambelela emandleni am, uya kulwenza uxolo nam; uxolo uya kulwenza nam." 
Isaiah27:6 Nge mihla ezayo u‐Yakobi uya kwendelisa ingcambo, u‐Sirayeli uya kuhluma atyatyambe, ade azalise ubuso belizwe ngeziqa̔mo." 
Isaiah27:7 Umbetile na njengokumbeta kwowambetayo? ubulewe na njengokubulawa kwababuleweyo bake? 
Isaiah27:8 Ngomlinganiso nangomlinganiso, akundululwa, waupika naye: wa m susa ngomoya wake oqwitayo emhleni womoya wasempumalanga." 
Isaiah27:9 Noko ngako oku inkohlakalo ka‐Yakobi yoxoliselwa; kanjalo oku kusiso sonke isixakato — ukususwa kwesono sake: nxa awenza onke amatye esibingelo njengamatye ekalike aqekeziweyo; ingabi senakuma imifanekiso ka‐Ashera nezifanekiselo zelanga. 
Isaiah27:10 Ngokuba isixeko esinqatyisiweyo soba sodwa, soba yintlalo eyekiweyo, eshiyiweyo njengobala; apo itole liya kudla, nalapo liya kulala pantsi, ligqibe amasebe aso." 
Isaiah27:11 Nxa abunileyo amagatya aso, aya kushunqulwa; baya kuza abafazi, babase ngawo: ngokuba bengengabantu bona abanokuqonda; ngako oko lowo obenzileyo akayi kuba nanceba pezu kwabo, nobadalileyo akayi kubapata ngofefe." 
Isaiah27:12 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, uyehova wovutulula, kwa sembaxeni yomlambo kude kube semlanjeni wase‐Jipete, naniya kucolwa ngomnye ngomnye, nina bonyana baka‐Sirayeli!" 
Isaiah27:13 Kwoti ke kanjalo ngomhla lowo, kwovutelwa ngexilongo elikulu, babeya kuza ababebuba elizweni le‐Asiriya, nabagxotiweyo ababeselizweni le‐Jipete, babedeshe uyehova entabeni eyingcwele e‐Yerusaleme." 
Isaiah28:1 KWOBA nzima kuyo ikrone ebur̔atshi yabanxili bakwa‐Frayime, nakuyo intyatyambo eshwabanayo yobuhle babo obubungcwalisa, epezu kwentloko yesihlambo esityebileyo sabeyiswayo yiveyine." 
Isaiah28:2 Bona ke, owomeleleyo onamandla wenkosi, yena, njengesipango sezico̔to, njeng omvumbi otshabalalisayo, njengengxokolo yamanzi amakulu akukulayo, woyikahlela emhlabeni ngesandla." 
Isaiah28:3 Zonyatelwa ngenyawo ikrone ezibur̔atshi zabanxili bakwa‐Frayime. 
Isaiah28:4 Nentyatyambo eshwabanayo yobuhle babo obubungcwalisa, epezu kwentloko yesihlambo esityebileyo, yoba njengekiwane latanci lingekabiko ihlobo, eliti lakubonwa ngolikangelayo, nxa lisesesandleni sake, liginywe nguye." 
Isaiah28:5 Ngomhla lowo uyehova wemikosi woba yikrone yobungcwalisa, nesitsaba sobuhle, kwisisalela sabantu bake;" 
Isaiah28:6 kwa nomoya wobugwebo kohleliyo endaweni yokugweba, nobuṙoti kwababuyisayo ukulwa ngasesangweni." 
Isaiah28:7 Kodwa kwa naba bayaposisa ngeveyine, bayagexa ngotyalwa; umperisite nomprofite bayaposisa ngotyalwa; baginyelwe yiveyine; bayagexa ngotyalwa; bayaposisa ngomboniso; bayajingajinga ekugwebeni." 
Isaiah28:8 Ngokuba zonke itafile zizele ngumhlanzo nokunco̔la; akuko ndawo emhlope. 
Isaiah28:9 Uya kufundisa banina ukwazi? uya kuqondisa banina intshumayelo? Abalunyulweyo emasini; abasusiweyo emabeleni. 
Isaiah28:10 Ngokuba kuko isiyalo ngesiyalo, isiyalo ngesiyalo; ummiso ngommiso, ummiso ngommiso; intwanantwana apa, intwanantwana paya." 
Isaiah28:11 Koko ngomlomo wasemzini, nangolwimi lumbi, aya kuteta kwababantu;" 
Isaiah28:12 ngokokuba ebesiti kubo: Nanku ukupumla; pumzani odiniweyo; nanku nokwonwaba; kodwa bebengavumi ukupulapula.
