Isaiah28:13 Ngako ilizwi likayehova lobako kubo, isiyalo ngesiyalo, isiyalo ngesiyalo; ummiso ngommiso, ummiso ngommiso; intwanantwana apa, intwanantwana paya: ukuze bamane besiwa ngomva, bapulwe, batiyelwe, babanjwe." 
Isaiah28:14 Ngako oko, yivani ilizwi likayehova, nina bagxeki! abapata ababantu abase‐Yerusaleme." 
Isaiah28:15 Ngokuba nisiti: Ucebano silwenzile nokufa, nemvumelano siyenzile nehadesi; isibeto esikukulisayo, nxa sicandayo, asiyi kusifikela, ngokuba simisile ilwimi zibe yindawo yetu yokupepela, nangapantsi kwobuxoki sizifihlile." 
Isaiah28:16 Ngako oko, itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kubeka e‐Ziyone libe sisisekelo ilitye, ilitye elingiweyo, ilitye legumbi elinqabileyo, isisekelo esiqinileyo: lowo ukolwayo akayi kuba nokunxama." 
Isaiah28:17 Koko ndiya kumisa ubugwebo ngentambo, nobulungisa ngeplumete; isipepelo selwimi izico̔to ziya kusimkisa, nendawo yokufihlela amanzi aya kuyikukulisa." 
Isaiah28:18 Ucebano lwenu nokufa lwotshatyalaliswa, nemvumelano yenu nehadesi ayisayi kuma; isibeto esikukulisayo, nxa sicandayo, niya kwandula ninyatelwe pantsi siso." 
Isaiah28:19 Ngexesha sisukuba sicanda, sonisusa ke; ngokuba ngokusa ngokusa siya kucanda; ngemini nangobusuku: kwoba yimvuselelo nokuba kuviwa iṙeto laso kodwa." 
Isaiah28:20 Ngokuba umandlalo umfutshane ukuba kwolulwe, nesigubungelo sixinene ukuba kutwe tyu." 
Isaiah28:21 Ngokuba uyehova eya kusuka njengasentabeni ye‐Peratsime, uya kuqumba njengasemhlanjeni we‐Gibeyone; ukuba asenze isenzo sake, isenzo sake abengasazi; nokuba asebenze umsebenzi wake, umsebenzi wake abengawuqeli." 
Isaiah28:22 Ngako kaloku, ningazilahleli ekugxekeni, zingabi izinxibo zenu ziqiniswe; ngokuba ukugqityelwa, kwa oko kumisiweyo, ndikuvile, kuvela enkosini, kuyehova wemikosi, pezu kwelizwe lonke." 
Isaiah28:23 Nikani indlebe, nive ilizwi lam; pulapulani, nive ukuteta kwam." 
Isaiah28:24 Yimini yonke na apulushayo umpulushi ukuba ahlwayele? yimini yonke na aku̔belayo aqwakanise umhlaba wake? 
Isaiah28:25 Akati na, akuba elungelelanisile ubuso bawo, andule ayicite idile, ayiti sa ikumine, abeke inqolowa ngenṙozo, neṙalasi endaweni eyimiselweyo, nespelete emdeni wake?" 
Isaiah28:26 Ngokuba utixo wake emazisa okufanelekileyo; yena uyamfundisa. 
Isaiah28:27 Ngokuba idile ingabulwa ngentsimbi zento yokubula; kanjako ivili yenqwelo ayiqengqwa pezu kwekumine; koko idile ibulwayo ngentonga, nekumine ngoluti." 
Isaiah28:28 Inqolowa iyanqushwa; ngokuba engayi kuba ngamaxesha onke eyibula; kanjako akayi kuqu̔ba ingqengqeleko yenqwelo yake namahashe ake pezu kwayo; akayi kuyityumza. 
Isaiah28:29 Nalento iyavela kuyehova wemikosi, okuceba kungummangaliso, okwenza kukulu." 
Isaiah29:1 KWOBA nzima kwi‐Ariyeli, kwi‐Ariyeli, kwisixeko u‐Davide ubehleli kuso! Yongezani umnyaka pezu kwomnyaka; imitendeleko mayizunguleze." 
Isaiah29:2 Noko ndoyixinezela i‐Ariyeli, kwakuya kubako ukulila nosizi; yoba yi‐Ariyeli kum okunene." 
Isaiah29:3 Ndokuṙaula ngento engqongayo; ndokuvingcela ngelali, ndizimise inqaba ngakuwe." 
Isaiah29:4 Uya kutotyelwa pantsi, uya kuteta usemhlabeni, kwoba kutobekile ukuteta kwako kuselutulini; ewe, ilizwi lako loba njengelowenzelana nomshologu livela emhlabeni, nokuteta kwako kwosebeza kuvela elutulini." 
Isaiah29:5 Kodwa isihlwele sentshaba zako soba njengotuli olucolekileyo, nesihlwele sezidlwengu njengomququ opepukayo; kwoza kubako ngebaqo, kamsinyane." 
Isaiah29:6 Uya kubetwa nguyehova wemikosi, ngodudumo, nangesingcangcazelo somhlaba, nentlokoma enkulu; ngesaqwiti noqwitela, nelangatye lomlilo odlayo." 
Isaiah29:7 Njengepupa, njeng omboniso wasebusuku, soba njalo isihlwele sazo zonke izizwe ezilweyo ngakuyo i‐Ariyeli; kwa zonke ezilwayo ngakuyo nangakuzo indawo zayo ezinqatyisiweyo, nabo bayixinezelayo." 
Isaiah29:8 Kwoba njengokuya onokulamba apupayo, kekaloku nanku esidla; kodwa akuvuka, umxe̔lo wake uzé: umhlaumbi njengokuya onxaniweyo apupayo, kekaloku nanku esela; kodwa akuvuka, nanku ecubukile, nomxe̔lo wake usakanuka. Soba njalo isihlwele sazo zonke izizwe ezilwayo ngasentabeni ye‐Ziyone." 
Isaiah29:9 Zilazilani, niti nqa; ziyoliseni, nimfamekiswe: banxilile, koko kungengayo iveyine; bayagexa, koko kungengabo utyalwa." 
Isaiah29:10 Ngokuba uyehova etulule pezu kwenu umoya wokwozela, wati vingci amehlo enu, abaprofite; nabazintloko zenu, ababoni, ubagubungele." 
Isaiah29:11 Umboniso wonke uba njengamazwi encwadi encanyatiselweyo kuni, eka inikwe kowaziyo ukuba̔la, kusitwa: Uze uleseshe oku; kanti uti: Ndikohliwe; ngokuba incanyatiselwe." 
Isaiah29:12 Umhlaumbi incwadi iyanikwa kulowo ongakwaziyo ukuba̔la, kusitwa: Uze uleseshe oku; kanti uti: Andikwazi ukuba̔la." 
Isaiah29:13 Ngako iti inkosi: Ngenxa yokuba ababantu bayasondela ngomlomo wabo, bandidumise ngenteto yabo, kanti intliziyo yabo bayikwelelisile kude kum, nokundoyika kwabo kufundisiwe ngomyalelo wabantu:" 
Isaiah29:14 ngoko, bona ke, ndopinda ukwenza ngokungummangaliso pakati kwababantu, ngokumangalisa nangokuti nqa; ngokuba ubulumko bamalumko abo buya kububa, nengqondo yezazi zabo iya kufihleka." 
Isaiah29:15 Kwoba nzima kubo abangongxayo ukufihla iqinga labo kuyehova, abazenzo zisebumnyameni, abatshoyo ukuti: Ngubanina osibonayo? nokuti: Ngubanina osaziyo?" 
Isaiah29:16 Hai ubugwenxa benu! Kanene umbumbi uya kubalwa njengodongwe na? into eyenziweyo iya kutsho na ngomenzi wayo ukuti: Akandenzanga? nento edaliweyo iya kutsho na ngomdali wayo ukuti: Akanakuqonda? 
Isaiah29:17 Asi lilo ixeshana elisencinane na, ide i‐Lebanone iguqulwe ibe yintsimi ecu̔mileyo, iti intsimi ecu̔mileyo ibalwe ngokuba lihlati?" 
Isaiah29:18 Ngalomhla izitulu ziya kuva amazwi encwadi, ati amehlo emfama, ekululwe ekusiteni nasebumnyameni, abone." 
Isaiah29:19 Abalulamileyo baya kwandisa uvuyo kuyehova; namahlwempu pakati kwabantu aya kugcoba koyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli. 
Isaiah29:20 Ngokuba isidlwengu sipelile; umgxeki ugqityiwe; nabo bonke abalindi benkohlakalo banqanyulwe: 
Isaiah29:21 abanika umntu ityala ngelizwi, batiyela lowo owohlwayayo esangweni, bamshenxisa olungileyo kungeko nto." 
Isaiah29:22 Ngoko, utsho uyehova kwindlu ka‐Yakobi, lowo owamkululayo u‐Abrahame, ukuti: u‐Yakobi kaloku akayi kudana, nobuso bake kaloku abuyi kuba mhlope." 
Isaiah29:23 Koko akubona abantwana bake, umsebenzi wezandla zam, pakati kwabo, bolenza ngcwele igama lam; baya kumenza ngcwele oyingcwele ka‐Yakobi, notixo ka‐Sirayeli baya kumoyika." 
Isaiah29:24 Abo balahlekileyo ngomoya baya kukwazi ukuqonda, nabo beyayo baya kufunda imfundo." 
Isaiah30:1 KWOBA nzima elusatsheni olunenkani, utsho uyehova, olwenzayo icebo, kodwa akuveli kum, olutulula iminikelo yokusela, kodwa akuveli kumoya wam; ukuze lwongeze isono pezu kwesono:" 
Isaiah30:2 oluhambayo ukuya kuhlela e‐Jipete, lungabuzanga emlonyeni wam; ukuba lusabele emandleni ka‐Faro, nokuba lupepele esitunzini se‐Jipete." 
Isaiah30:3 Ngako amandla ka‐Faro oba kukudana kwenu, nokupepela esitunzini se‐Jipete kwoba kukumata kwenu." 
Isaiah30:4 Ngokuba inkosana zabo zibe zise‐Tsohane, nezitunywa zabo zifikele e‐Hanese." 
Isaiah30:5 Bonke badanile pezu kwabantu abangebancedeyo; abangengabokusiza nabokunceda, koko bengabokudanisa nabokuhlazisa." 
Isaiah30:6 Umtwalo wezilo zasesuyide: ezweni lobunzima noxinezeko, ekuvela kulo ingonyamakazi nengonyama enamandla, inyushu nenyoka ebumliloṙa epapazelayo, bayatwala ubutyebi babo pezu kwemihlana yamaqwaṙashana, nendyebo zabo pezu kwamalunda enkamela, ukuya ebantwini abangayi kubanceda." 
Isaiah30:7 Ngokuba i‐Jipete uncedo lwayo lwoba yinto ebunkungu nokungendawo; kukona ndibizile yona ngokuti: yi‐Rahabi ehlala ingenzi nto. 
Isaiah30:8 Yiza kaloku, uba̔le oku ecwecweni pambi kwabo, ukuqingqe nasencwadini, kuze kubeko ngemihla yasemva, ngonapakade kude kube ngunapakade:" 
Isaiah30:9 Okokuba bona bangabantu abanenkani, usapo oluxokayo, usapo olungavumi ukupulapula umteto kayehova;" 
Isaiah30:10 abati kubaboni: Ningaboni; nakubaprofite: Ningasibonisi izinto ezilungileyo; siteteleni izinto ezibutelezi; siboniseni izinto ezikohlisayo: 
Isaiah30:11 pambukani endleleni, tyekani emzileni; yenzani oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli ayeke ukabako ebusweni betu." 
Isaiah30:12 Ngako oko utsho oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba nilahlile elilizwi, natembela ekubandezeleni nakokugwenxa, naza nayama pezu kwako:" 
Isaiah30:13 ngoko lenkohlakalo yoba kuni njengotanda luza kuwa, lupuma ngapandle eludongeni olude, olukuqekezwa kuzayo kamsinyane, ngebaqo." 
Isaiah30:14 Waeya kuluqekeza njengokuqekezwa kwompanda wababumbi otyumkileyo; akayi kuba nalusizi; kuze kungafunyanwa, ekutyumkeni kwawo, necepe lokutabata umlilo eziko, nokwongula amanzi ecibini." 
Isaiah30:15 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova, oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ngokuguquka nangokupumla niya kusindiswa; ngokwonwaba nangetemba kwobako amandla enu; kodwa beningavumi." 
Isaiah30:16 Koko benisitsho ukuti: Hai! sesiya kubaleka pezu kwamahashe; ngako oko niya kubaleka; nokuti: Sokwela pezu kwanamendu; ngako oko abo banisukelayo boba namendu. 
Isaiah30:17 Iwaka linye ngokutetisa kwomnye, ngokutetisa kwabahlanu niya kubaleka; nide nisale njengesibonda pezu kwengcopo yentaba, nanjengebanile pezu kwenduli." 
Isaiah30:18 Kwa ngoko uyehova uya kulinda, ukuba anipate ngofefe, nangoko uya kupakama, ukuba abe nenceba ngakuni; ngokuba uyehova e ngutixo wobugwebo: banetamsanqa ke bonke abamlindayo yena." 
Isaiah30:19 Ngokuba abantu base‐Ziyone beya kuhlala e‐Yerusaleme; akusayi kumana ulila; woba nofefe kuwe ngokwenene ngelizwi lesikalo sako; woti akuliva, akupendule." 
Isaiah30:20 Nakuba inkosi ininika isonka sobunzima namanzi embandezelo, abafundisi bako abasayi kuzimela noko, kodwa amehlo ako obabona abafundisi bako;" 
Isaiah30:21 nendlebe zako ziya kuliva ilizwi emva kwako, lisiti: Nantsi indlela, hambani kuyo; nxa nijika ngasekunene, nanxa nijika ngasekohlo." 
Isaiah30:22 Naniya kubala ukuba sinco̔lile isalekwa semifanekiso yenu yesilivere eqingqiweyo, nesigubungelo semifanekiso yenu yegolide etyityishiweyo; uya kuzilahla njengeqiya enco̔lileyo; uya kuti kuso: Yiti be!" 
Isaiah30:23 Uya kwandula anike imvula yembewu yako, oya kuhlwayela umhlaba ngayo; nesonka semveliso yomhlaba, esiya kuba sesicu̔mileyo nesityebileyo: ngalomhla inkomo zako zodla emadlelweni abanzi." 
Isaiah30:24 Inkabi nazo, namaqwaṙashana, ezilimayo umhlaba, zotya ukutya okunetyuwa, okweliweyo ngomnyazi nangento yokwela." 
Isaiah30:25 Kwakuya kubako pezu kwazo zonke intaba ezinde, napezu kwazo zonke induli ezipakamileyo, imilanjana n emisinga yamanzi, ngomhla wokubulala okukulu, ekuweni kwazo inqaba." 
Isaiah30:26 Kwandule ukukanya kwenyanga kube njengokukanya kwelanga, nokukanya kwelanga kube ngokusixe̔nxe, njengokukanya kwemini ezisixe̔nxe, emhleni uyehova abopayo isapuko sabantu bake, nenkeba lokubetwa kwabo alipolise." 
Isaiah30:27 Bona ke, igama likayehova livela kwa kude, isitsha ingqumbo yake, kunzima ukuqu̔ma kwayo: umlomo wake uzele ngumsindo, nolwimi lwake lunjengomlilo odlayo." 
Isaiah30:28 Umoya wake unjengomsinga okukulayo, ofikela kwa sentanyeni; ukuze azihluze izizwe ngentluzo yokungendawo; nomkala wokulahlekisa woba semihlatini yabantu." 
Isaiah30:29 Noba neculo njengasebusuku bokwenziwa kwomtendeleko oyingcwele, novuyo lwentliziyo njengolwohambayo ngomlozi, ukuya entabeni kayehova, kwilityekazi lo‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah30:30 Kanjalo uyehova uya kuvakalisa ilizwi lake elibungcwalisa, nokuhla kwengalo yake wokubonakalisa, ngokuṙala kwengqumbo, na nge langatye lomlilo odlayo, ng omvumbi, nezipango, nezico̔to." 
Isaiah30:31 Ngokuba ngelizwi likayehova um‐Asiriya eya kwapulwa; uya kumbeta ngomnqai. 
Isaiah30:32 Zonke izidlulo zentonga emisiweyo, aya kuyibeka uyehova pezu kwake, zoba nentambula nehadi: nangokulwa okubupitipiti uya kulwa ngakubo." 
Isaiah30:33 Ngokuba i‐Tofete ilungiselelwe kwa kudala; ewe, yona ilungiselwe ukumkani; yenziwe enzulu ebanzi; igoqo layo lingumlilo nento eninzi yenkuni; ukupefumla kukayehova, njengomsinga wesufure, kwolipemba." 
Isaiah31:1 KWOBA nzima kubo abahlela e‐Jipete kuncedwe, abayama emahasheni; abatembela ezinqwelweni, ngokuba zininzi, nakubakweli bamahashe, ngokuba inani labo likulu; kanti abakangeli koyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, noyehova abamfuni." 
Isaiah31:2 Kodwa yena ulumkile naye, waeya kuzisa ilishwa; namazwi ake akayi kuwabuyisa; koko eya kuvuka ngakuyo indlu yabenzi bokungalungileyo, nangakulo uncedo lwabasebenzi benkohlakalo." 
Isaiah31:3 Ngokuba ama‐Jipete engabantu, engenguye utixo; namahashe awo ayinyama, akanguwo umoya: nxa uyehova aya kwolula isandla sake, kwa yena oncedayo woku̔beka, nalowo uncedwayo uya kuwa; bona bonke bogqitywa kwa kunye." 
Isaiah31:4 Ngokuba etshilo uyehova kum ukuti: Njengokuba ivungama ingonyama, nengonyamana, pezu kwento iyibambileyo, okuya wonke umhlambi wabalusi ubiziwe ngakuyo; ayituswa ngelizwi labo, ayitotywa nangembutumbutu yabo: kwa njalo uya kuhla uyehova wemikosi, ukuza kulwela intaba ye‐Ziyone, nenduli yayo." 
Isaiah31:5 Njengentaka zigubungela ngamapiko, kwa njalo uyehova wemikosi wokusela i‐Yerusaleme: ekusela woyihlangula, edlula woyisindisa." 
Isaiah31:6 Buyelani kulowo usapo luka‐Sirayeli lupambukile kude kakulu kuye. 
Isaiah31:7 Ngokuba ngomhla lowo beya kulahla abanye ngabanye amadalo abo esilivere, namadalo abo egolide, lawo izandla zenu zanenzela abe sisono." 
Isaiah31:8 Waye um‐Asiriya eya kuwa ngesiṙele e singesesendoda; isiṙele e singesesomntu siya kumdla: uya kusaba pambi kwesiṙele, namadodana ake oba ngabanikeli." 
Isaiah31:9 Uya kudlulela eliweni lake ngokwoyika, nenkosana zake ziya kutuswa ngebanile, utsho uyehova, omlilo use‐Ziyone, noziko lise‐Yerusaleme." 
Isaiah32:1 BONA ke, ukumkani wopata ubukumkani ngobulungisa, nenkosi ziya kupata ubukosi ngobugwebo." 
Isaiah32:2 Umntu woba njengendawo yokufihla emoyeni, neyokuzimela esipangweni; njengemilanjana yamanzi endaweni eyomileyo, njengomtunzi weliwa elikulu elizweni elidiniweyo." 
Isaiah32:3 Amehlo abo babonayo akayi kuba luzizi, nendlebe zabevayo zopulapula." 
Isaiah32:4 Intliziyo yabanokunxama iya kuqiqa ukwazi, nolwimi lwabo batintitayo lwonxamela ukuteta ekuhleni." 
Isaiah32:5 Ibedengu alisakuba sabizwa ngonesisa, nomvimbi akuyi kutiwa ngaye usisityebi." 
Isaiah32:6 Ngokuba ibedengu liya kuteta okububedengu, nentliziyo yalo iya kudala inkohlakalo; lisenza ngobuginwa, liteta okugwenxa ngakuye uyehova; lishiya zé umxe̔lo wolambileyo, noselo lonxaniweyo liluswelekisa." 
Isaiah32:7 Nomvimbi inzuziso zake zikohlakele; uyaceba amaqinga abumenemene; ukuze acite amahlwempu ngamazwi obuxoki, nosweleyo akuteta okufaneleyo." 
Isaiah32:8 Kodwa onesisa uyaqinga izinto zobusa, nakuzo izinto zobusa uya kuma yena." 
Isaiah32:9 Nina bafazi abangenakukutala! vukani, pulapulani ilizwi lam; nina zintombi ezingenakwoyika! nikelani ukuteta kwam indlebe." 
Isaiah32:10 Ngemihla etile ngapezu kwomnyaka niya kupitizeliswa, nina zintombi ezingenakwoyika! ngokuba ukuvunwa kwemiti yeveyine kuya kupela, nokubutwa kweziqa̔mo kungayi kuza." 
Isaiah32:11 Ngcangcazelani, nina bafazi abangenakukutala! tutumelani, nina zintombi ezingenakwoyika! hlubani, nizihlubulule, nibinqe ngentlakantlaka ezinqeni." 
Isaiah32:12 Bayabeta pezu kwamabele; ngenxa yamasimi anqwenelekileyo, ngenxa yomti weveyine oqa̔mileyo." 
Isaiah32:13 Emhlabeni wabantu bam kuya kupuma imitolo n embobo; ewe, na pezu kwazo zonke izindlu zovuyo esixekweni esigcobayo." 
Isaiah32:14 Ngokuba uxande luya kuyekwa: ubutyebi besixeko buya kushiywa; induli nenqaba yokulinda zoba yindawo yemiqolomba kude kube ngunapakade, uvuyo lwamaqwaṙa, idlelo lemihlambi:" 
Isaiah32:15 Kude kugalelwe pezu kwetu umoya evela pezulu; iti intlango ibe yintsimi ecu̔mileyo, nentsimi ecu̔mileyo ibalwe ngokuba lihlati." 
Isaiah32:16 Buya kwandula ubugwebo ukuma entlango, nobulungisa ukuhlala entsimini ecu̔mileyo." 
Isaiah32:17 Kwoti ukwenza kwobulungisa kube luxolo, nokusebenza kwobulungisa kube kukuzola nokunqaba kude kube ngunapakade." 
Isaiah32:18 Kanjalo abantu bam bohlala ekayeni elinoxolo, nasezintlalweni ezinqabileyo, nasezindaweni zokupumla ezonwabileyo:" 
Isaiah32:19 kodwa kuya kuna izico̔to ekuweni kwehlati; saye isixeko siya kutotyelwa pantsi ebupantsini. 
Isaiah32:20 Hai itamsanqa lenu enihlwayelayo ngakuwo onke amanzi; enikululayo inqina lenkabi neleqwaṙashe! 
Isaiah33:1 KWOBA nzima kuwe ucitakalisayo, kanti wena akucitakaliswanga; otimbayo, kanti akutinjwanga wena! nxa ugqibile ukucitakalisa, uya kucitakaliswa; nxa ufezile ukutimba, kwotinjwa wena." 
Isaiah33:2 Yehova! yiba nofefe kuti; sikangele kuwe; yiba yingalo yabo imiso yonke; ewe, yiba lusindiso lwetu ngexesha lobunzima." 
Isaiah33:3 Ngenxa yentlokoma yesipitipiti abantu besaba; ekupakameni kwako, izizwe zitiwe sa." 
Isaiah33:4 Amaxoba enu aya kubutwa njeng okubuta kwenkumbi; njengokubaleka kwemiqikela kwobalekelwa pezu kwawo. 
Isaiah33:5 Uyehova upakanyisiwe; ngokuba emi pezulu; uzalisile i‐Ziyone ngobugwebo nangobulungisa. 
Isaiah33:6 Woba yingqiniso yamaxesha ako, ubuninzi bosindiso, ubulumko, nokwazi: ukwoyikwa kukayehova kuyindyebo yake." 
Isaiah33:7 Bona ke, amaṙoti abo ayakala ngapandle; izitunywa zoxolo ziyalila ngobuṙaṙa." 
Isaiah33:8 Indlela zenekile; umhambi uyapela: ucebano ulwapule; izixeko uzidelile; akakatali ngumntu. 
Isaiah33:9 Ilizwe liyalila, liyacubuka; i‐Lebanone idanile, iyabuna; i‐Sharone injengobala; i‐Bashane ne‐Karamele ziyavutulula amagqabi." 
Isaiah33:10 Kaloku ndiya kusuka, utsho uyehova, kaloku ndiya kuzukiswa, kaloku ndozipakamisa." 
Isaiah33:11 Niya kukaula isikota; niya kuzala indiza; owenu umoya ungumlilo oya kunidla. 
Isaiah33:12 Kanjalo izizwe zoba njeng okutsha kwekalike; njeng eminga egauliweyo, ziya kutshiswa ngomlilo." 
Isaiah33:13 Yivani, nina bakude, oko ndikwenzileyo; nani bakufupi, yazini amandla am!" 
Isaiah33:14 Aboni bayankwantya e‐Ziyone; ukungcangcazela kuqubule abaginwa; ngubanina wakuti ongahlalayo emlilweni odlayo? ngubanina wakuti ongahlalayo ezitshisweni ezingunapakade? 
Isaiah33:15 Lowo ohambayo ngokulungisa, eteta izinto eziyinene; odelayo inzuzo yembandezelo, ovutulula izandla zake ukuba angapati isincwancwaniso, oti vingci indlebe zake ukuba angapulapuli okwegazi, ocimayo amehlo ake ukuba angaboneli ububi;" 
Isaiah33:16 nguye oya kuhlala pezulu: inqaba zamawa zoba yinyango yake; isonka sake wosipiwa; amanzi ake oba eqinisekile. 
Isaiah33:17 Amehlo ako okangela ukumkani ebuhleni bake: aya kubona amazwe akude. 
Isaiah33:18 Intliziyo yako yokumbulela isoyikiso: upina umba̔li? upina umbuti weminikelo? upina lowo owazibalayo inqaba? 
Isaiah33:19 Abantu abalukuni akusayi kubabona; abantu abakuteta kungumgushanxa, kungenakuqondwa, abanteto iyeyasemzini, ingenakuqiqwa." 
Isaiah33:20 Kangela i‐Ziyone, isixeko semitendeleko yetu: amehlo ako obona i‐Yerusaleme iyintlalo eyonwabileyo, intente engayi kufuduswa; izikonkwane zayo aziyi kunyotulwa napakade, nazo zonke intambo zayo azisayi kuqaulwa." 
Isaiah33:21 Koko kwa lapo uyehova obungcwalisa woba yindawo yemilambo ne yezibaxa ezibanzi kuti; akuyi kuhamba kuyo umkombe onemipini; kanjalo inqanawa entle ayiyi kudlula pezu kwayo. 
Isaiah33:22 Ngokuba uyehova ngumgwebi wetu; uyehova ngumnikamteto wetu; uyehova ngukumkani wetu; nguye oya kusisindisa. 
Isaiah33:23 Intambo zako ziyaxengaxenga; bebengeqinise isikondo semaste; bebengetwabulule iseli. Oko kwabiwa itinjwa lamaxoba amaninzi; iziqwala zapanga impango. 
Isaiah33:24 Akusayi kutiwa ngomiyo kona: Ndiyafa; abantu abahleli kuyo boxolelwa inkohlakalo. 
Isaiah34:1 SONDELANI, nina zizwe! nize nive; nina zintlanga! pulapulani: mauve umhlaba, nokuzala kwawo; ilizwe, nako konke ukuvelisa kwalo." 
Isaiah34:2 Ngokuba umsindo kayehova upezu kwazo zonke izizwe, nobuṙalaṙume bake pezu kwayo yonke imikosi yazo: uzilahlele ekutshatyalalisweni; uzinikele ekubulaweni." 
Isaiah34:3 Abahlatyiweyo bazo baya kulahlwa, nezidumbu zabo kuya kunyuka ukunuka kwazo; ziti intaba zinyibilike ngegazi labo." 
Isaiah34:4 Wonke umkosi wezulu wonyibilikiswa, namazulu aya kusongwa njengencwadi; ewe, wonke umkosi wawo wovutuluka, njengokuvutuluka kwegqabi emtini weveyine, nanjengokwelishwabeneyo emkiwaneni." 
Isaiah34:5 Ngokuba isiṙele sam siya kunxiliswa emazulwini; bona ke, pezu kwe‐Edome siya kuhla, napezu kwabantu bokulahlela kwam ekutshatyalalisweni, kuze kugwetywe." 
Isaiah34:6 Isiṙele sikayehova sizele ligazi; lityetyisiwe ngenqata; ngegazi lemvana nelebokwe, ngenqata lezintso zenkunzi zegusha: ngokuba uyehova enombingo e‐Botsera, noxe̔lo olukulu ezweni le‐Edome." 
Isaiah34:7 Kwakuya kuhla inyati kunye nazo, nenkabi kunye nenkunzi; ilizwe lazo lonyelwa ngegazi, notuli lwazo luya kutyetyiswa ngenqata." 
Isaiah34:8 Ngokuba ngumhla wempindezelo kayehova, umnyaka wokubuyekeza, ekupikeni kwe‐Ziyone." 
Isaiah34:9 Imilanjana yayo yoguqulwa ibe litywina, notuli lwayo lube yisufure; ewe, ilizwe layo loba litywina elivutayo." 
Isaiah34:10 Aliyi kucinywa nasebusuku nasemini; umsi walo uya kunyuka kude kube ngunapakade; kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana loba bugxwayiba; kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade akuko mntu oya kucanda kulo. 
Isaiah34:11 Incwangube nencanda zolifuya; isikova nonomyai baya kuma kulo; ngokuba eya kwolula pezu kwalo intambo yocitakalo, namatye obuzé." 
Isaiah34:12 Imiduna yalo, akuko namnye kona abangawubizayo ebukumkanini; inkosana zalo aziseko nanye." 
Isaiah34:13 Ameva aya kupuma ezingxandeni zalo, amaṙau namakakakaka ezinqatyeni zalo; loba likaya lencu̔ka, n endawo yokuhlala yenciniba." 
Isaiah34:14 Amaṙamncwa asentlango aya kuhlangana nempungutye; imbuzi elixonti yobiza kumlingane wayo; isihuluhulu naso siya kuhlala kona ngokwonwaba, sizifumanele indawo yokupumla." 
Isaiah34:15 Kona apo inyoka ejubayo iya kuyenza indlu yayo, izale amaqanda, iwaqandulele, ifukamele ngesitunzi sayo; nakona apo amaxalangakazi ohlanganisana, elinye ngelinye linomlingane walo." 
Isaiah34:16 Funani encwadini kayehova, nileseshe: ayiyi kuba ingeko nanye kwezi; ayiyi kuswela umlingane wayo nanye imazi: ngokuba umlomo wam wona uyalele, nomoya wake yena uzihlanganisile." 
Isaiah34:17 Kanjalo yena uzenzele iqashiso, nesandla sake sizabele lona ngentambo; zolifuya kude kube ngunapakade; kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana ziya kuhlala kulo." 
Isaiah35:1 INTLANGO nelizwe elomileyo zogcoba ngenxa yabo, nobala luya kuvuyelela, lutyatyambe njengembali." 
Isaiah35:2 Luya kutyatyamba ngokukulu, luvuye nokuvuya, kwa ngokuvuyelela nangokucula: luya kunikwa ubungcwalisa be‐Lebanone, inkazimlo ye‐Karamele ne‐Sharone: baya kubona ubungcwalisa bukayehova, inkazimlo katixo wetu." 
Isaiah35:3 Yomelezani izandla ezipolelweyo, namadolo ahexayo niwaqinise." 
Isaiah35:4 Yitini kwabantliziyo inkwantyayo: Yomelelani, ningoyiki; nanku utixo wenu! impindezelo iyeza, ukuvuza kukatixo; yena uya kuza anisindise." 
Isaiah35:5 Oko amehlo emfama aya kutyilwa, nendlebe zezitulu zovulwa." 
Isaiah35:6 Oko isiqwala siya kutsiba njengexama, nolwimi lwesidenge luya kucula: ngokuba amanzi eya kutyoboza entlango, nemilanjana elubala." 
Isaiah35:7 Isanga soba licibi, nomhlaba onxaniweyo woba ngamatende amanzi; esikundleni sencu̔ka, apo zibutuma kona, kwobako indawo yengcongolo nemikanzi." 
Isaiah35:8 Kwakuya kubako kona umendo opakamileyo, nendlela, eya kubizwa ngokuti yindlela ebungcwele; onco̔lileyo akayi kudlula ngayo, koko iya kuba yeyabo bona; abahambi, noko bazizidenge, abasakulahleka." 
Isaiah35:9 Akuyi kubako ingonyama kona; kanjalo iṙamncwa eliqwengayo aliyi kunyuka pezu kwayo; alisayi kufunyanwa kona: kodwa abakululweyo baya kuhamba ngayo. 
Isaiah35:10 Ngokuba abahlaulelweyo bakayehova beya kubuya, beze e‐Ziyone ngokucula; uvuyo olungunapakade lwoba pezu kwentloko zabo; baya kuzuza umgcobo novuyo, kubaleke usizi nokugula." 
Isaiah36:1 KWAYE kute ngoweshumi linesine umnyaka wokumkani u‐Hezekiya, wenyuka u‐Senakeribe ukumkani we‐Asiriya ngakuzo zonke izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zakwa‐Juda, wazibamba." 
Isaiah36:2 Waza ukumkani we‐Asiriya wasusa u‐Rabeshake e‐Lakishe ukuya e‐Yerusaleme, kukumkani u‐Hezekiya, enempi enkulu. Weza wema ngakuwo umjelo wecibi lasentla, ngasemendweni wentsimi yomsuki." 
Isaiah36:3 Kwandula kwapumela kuye u‐Eliyakime unyana ka‐Hilikiya, obepezu kwendlu, no‐Shibena umba̔li, no‐Jowahi unyana ka‐Safa umkumbuzi." 
Isaiah36:4 Waza u‐Rabeshake wati kubo: Ize niti ke ku‐Hezekiya: Utsho ukumkani omkulu, ukumkani we‐Asiriya, ukuti: Litemba elinina eli utemba ngalo, usiti:" 
Isaiah36:5 Nditi, (kanti lilizwi lomlomo wodwa,) kuko icebo namandla ukulwa? Kaloku utemba kubanina ukuba uvukele ngakum?" 
Isaiah36:6 Bona ke, uyatemba kulomsimelelo wengcongolo etyumzekileyo, kwi‐Jipete; eti ukuba umntu uyayama ngayo, yandule ingene esandleni sake, isihlabe: unjalo u‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete kubo bonke abatembayo kuye." 
Isaiah36:7 Kodwa ukuba uti kum: Siyatemba kuyehova, utixo wetu; asi nguye na, ondawo zake ezipakamileyo nezibingelo zake u‐Hezekiya uzisusile, wati ko‐Juda nakwi‐Yerusaleme: Pambi kwaso isibingelo esi niya kutoba pantsi?" 
Isaiah36:8 Ngako kaloku uke ungene ekulweni nenkosi yam ukumkani we‐Asiriya, ndandiya kukunika amahashe angamawaka mabini, ukuba ungati ngecala lako unike abakweli pezu kwawo." 
Isaiah36:9 Woti nina pofu ukunqanda ubuso benkosana inye ezicakeni zenkosi yam ezincinane? Noko uyatemba kwi‐Jipete ngenxa yenqwelo nangenxa yabakweli bamahashe. 
Isaiah36:10 Kodwa kaloku, kungapandle kwoyehova na endinyukile ngakulo elilizwe, ndize ndilitshabalalise? Uyehova ute kum: Nyuka ngakulo elilizwe, ulitshabalalise." 
Isaiah36:11 Wandula wati u‐Eliyakime, no‐Shibena, no‐Jowahi, kuye u‐Rabeshake: Kautete kwizicaka zako ngesi‐Siriya, ngokuba sisiva tina; zungateti nati ngesi‐Juda, ezindlebeni zabantu abapezu kwodonga." 
Isaiah36:12 Koko wati u‐Rabeshake: Kusenkosini yako na nakuwe, inditumileyo inkosi yam ukuza kuteta lamazwi? asi kulamadoda na ahleliyo pezu kwodonga, ukuba atye elawo ilindle, nokuba asele owawo umtundo, kunye nani?" 
Isaiah36:13 Waza wema u‐Rabeshake, wadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu ngesi‐Juda, wati: Yivani amazwi ake ukumkani omkulu, ukumkani we‐Asiriya!" 
Isaiah36:14 Utsho ukumkani ukuti: Maningakohliswa ngu‐Hezekiya; ngokuba eya kukohlwa kukunisindisa. 
Isaiah36:15 Kanjako makangati u‐Hezekiya anitembise kuyehova, ngokuti: Uyehova wosisindisa ngenyaniso; esisixeko asisayi kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani we‐Asiriya." 
Isaiah36:16 Ningapulapuli ku‐Hezekiya; ngokuba esitsho ukumkani we‐Asiriya ukuti: Yenzani uxolo nam, nipumele kum, nitye abanye ngabanye kumti weveyine wabo, nabanye ngabanye kumkiwane wabo, nisele abanye ngabanye amanzi equla labo;" 
Isaiah36:17 ndide ndize ndinise elizweni elinjengelizwe lenu, ilizwe lenqolowa neveyine, ilizwe lesonka nemiyezo yemiti yeveyine." 
Isaiah36:18 Makanganihendi u‐Hezekiya, esiti: Uyehova wosisindisa. Otixo bentlanga balisindisa na abanye ngabanye ilizwe labo esandleni sokumkani we‐Asiriya?" 
Isaiah36:19 bapina otixo base‐Hamati nabase‐Arapadi? bapina otixo base‐Sefarevayime? kanene bayisindisile i‐Samariya esandleni sam na? 
Isaiah36:20 Ngobanina pakati kwabo bonke otixo bamazwe lawo, abalisindisileyo ilizwe labo esandleni sam, ukuba uyehova ayisindise i‐Yerusaleme esandleni sam?" 
Isaiah36:21 Koko bebesiti cwaka, bengampendulanga nangazwi; ngokuba umyalelo wokumkani ubungowokuti: Aniyi kumpendula." 
Isaiah36:22 Kwandula kweza u‐Eliyakime unyana ka‐Hilikiya, obepezu kwendlu, no‐Shibena umba̔li, no‐Jowahi unyana ka‐Safa umkumbuzi, ku‐Hezekiya, benezivato eziṙazukileyo, bamshumayeza amazwi ka‐Rabeshake." 
Isaiah37:1 Kwaye kute, akuva u‐Hezekiya, wandula waṙazula ingubo zake, wazigubungela ngentlakantlaka, wangena endlwini kayehova." 
Isaiah37:2 Waza watuma u‐Eliyakime, obepezu kwendlu, no‐Shibena umba̔li, nabadala bakubaperisite, begujungelwe ngentlakantlaka, ukuya ku‐Yisaya, unyana ka‐Amotse, umprofite." 
Isaiah37:3 Baye besiti kuye: Utsho u‐Hezekiya ukuti: Namhla ngumhla wobunzima, nesohlwayo, nogxeko; ngokuba abantwana beze endaweni yokutyoboza, kanti akuko amandla ukuzala." 
Isaiah37:4 Kungaba uyehova, utixo wako, uya kuva amazwi ka‐Rabeshake, otunyiweyo ngukumkani we‐Asiriya, inkosi yake, ukuza kutuka utixo opilileyo, awohlwayele amazwi awavileyo uyehova, utixo wako; ngako pakamisa umtandazo ngenxa yesisalela esikoyo." 
Isaiah37:5 Kwa njalo izicaka zokumkani u‐Hezekiya zeza ku‐Yisaya. 
Isaiah37:6 Waza u‐Yisaya wati kuzo: Niya kutsho enkosini yenu ngokuti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ungoyiki ngenxa yamazwi uwavileyo, lawo abafana bokumkani we‐Asiriya bandigxekile ngawo." 
Isaiah37:7 Bona ke, ndiya kubeka umoya kuye, waeya kuva iṙeto, abuyele elizweni lake; ndandiya kumenza awe ngesiṙele elizweni lake." 
Isaiah37:8 Wada wabuya u‐Rabeshake, wamfumana ukumkani we‐Asiriya esilwa ngakuyo i‐Libena: ngokuba ebevile ukuba undulukile e‐Lakishe." 
Isaiah37:9 Wayesiva ngaye u‐Tiraka ukumkani we‐Tiyopiya, kusitwa: Upumile ukuza kulwa nawe. Wati akuva, watuma izigidimi ukuya ku‐Hezekiya, esiti:" 
Isaiah37:10 Niya kutsho ku‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, nisiti: Maungakohliswa ngutixo wako, lowo utemba kuye, esiti: i‐Yerusaleme ayiyi kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani we‐Asiriya." 
Isaiah37:11 Bona ke, ukuvile oko bakwenzileyo okumkani be‐Asiriya kuwo onke amazwe, ngokuwalahlela ekutshatyalalisweni; kekaloku wena uya kusindiswa ke na?" 
Isaiah37:12 Otixo bentlanga, ezo bazitshabalalisile obawo, kebazisindisa na; i‐Gozane, ne‐Karane, ne‐Retsefe, nosapo lwase‐Hedeni, oluse‐Telasare?" 
Isaiah37:13 Upina ke ukumkani we‐Hamati, nokumkani we‐Arapadi, nokumkani wesixeko se‐Sefarevayime, n e‐Hena, ne‐Hiva?" 
Isaiah37:14 Waye u‐Hezekiya eyamkela incwadi leyo esandleni sezigidimi, wayilesesha, wenyuka waya endlwini kayehova; waza u‐Hezekiya wayaneka ebusweni bukayehova." 
Isaiah37:15 Watandaza u‐Hezekiya kuyehova, esiti:" 
Isaiah37:16 Yehova wemikosi, Tixo wo‐Sirayeli, ohleli pakati kwazo ikerubime! unguwe wedwa o ngutixo wabo bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba; wenzile wena izulu nomhlaba." 
Isaiah37:17 Tobela, Yehova! indlebe yako, uve; vula, Yehova! amehlo ako, ubone; uze uweve onke amazwi ka‐Senakeribe, otumileyo ukutuka utixo opilileyo." 
Isaiah37:18 Ngenyaniso, Yehova! okumkani be‐Asiriya bacitakalisile zonke izizwe namazwe azo;" 
Isaiah37:19 notixo bazo babalahlele emlilweni: ngokuba bengengabo otixo bona, koko bengumsebenzi wezandla zabantu, imiti namatye; ngako babatshabalalisile." 
Isaiah37:20 Ngako kaloku, Yehova, Tixo wetu! sisindise esandleni sake, ukuze bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba bazi ukuba wena u nguyehova, wena wedwa." 
Isaiah37:21 Waza u‐Yisaya unyana ka‐Amotse watuma ku‐Hezekiya, esiti: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Okokuba utandazile kum ngaye u‐Senakeribe, ukumkani we‐Asiriya, —" 
Isaiah37:22 lilo eli ilizwi alitetileyo uyehova pezu kwake: Intombi ipela, intombi yase‐Ziyone, iyakudela, iyakuhleka; intombi yase‐Yerusaleme iyahlunguzela intloko ngakuwe." 
Isaiah37:23 Ngubanina omtukileyo, nomgxekileyo? kungakubanina ulipakamisile ilizwi, namehlo ako uwanyusile ngapezulu? ngakuye oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah37:24 Ngazo izicaka zako uyitukile inkosi, wati: Ngobuninzi benqwelo zam ndiqolile indawo ezipezulu zentaba, amatambeka e‐Lebanone; sendiya kugaula isedare zayo ezinde, nemiberoshe yayo edlulisileyo; ndofikela eyokupela indawo yayo yapezulu, ihlati layo elicu̔mileyo." 
Isaiah37:25 Ndimbele ndasela amanzi ke; nangomzantsi wenyawo zam ndiyomisile yonke imilambo yase‐Jipete. 
Isaiah37:26 Akuvanga na, ukuba kudala ndikwenzile oku, ukuba emihleni yamatanci ndakuqinga? kaloku ndikuzisile kubako, ukuba kucitakaliswe izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo zibe zimfumba ezitshabaleleyo." 
Isaiah37:27 Ngako abemi bazo bebenamandla amancinane; babete qege, badana nokudana; babe njeng enca yasendle, na njeng otyani obuluhlaza, njeng esikota pezu kwezindlu, na njeng embabala kungekadutyulwa." 
Isaiah37:28 Kodwa ukuhlala kwako, nokupuma kwako, nokungena kwako, ndiyakwazi, kwa nokujala kwako ngakum." 
Isaiah37:29 Ngenxa yokuba ukujala kwako ngakum, nokur̔atsha kwako, kunyukele ezindlebeni zam, ndiya kufaka igwegwe lam empumlweni yako, nomkala wam emlonyeni wako, ndize ndikubuyise ngalondlela ubusiza ngayo." 
Isaiah37:30 Kanjalo oku kwoba ngumqondiso kuwe: Kuya kutyiwa lomnyaka okuhlumayo ngokwako; nangomnyaka wesibini okupumayo ngokunjalo; nangomnyaka wesitatu hlwayelani, nivune nokuvuna, tyalani nemiyezo, nesiqa̔mo sayo nisidle." 
Isaiah37:31 Boti abasindileyo bendlu ka‐Juda, abo baseleyo, babuye bendelise ingcambo ngapantsi, bahlanze isiqa̔mo ngapezulu." 
Isaiah37:32 Ngokuba kuya kupuma e‐Yerusaleme isisalela, nasentabeni ye‐Ziyone abo basindileyo: ubukwele bukayehova wemikosi bokwenza oku." 
Isaiah37:33 Ngako oko, utsho uyehova ngaye ukumkani we‐Asiriya ukuti: Akayi kungena kwesisixeko, akayi kulutolela kona utolo kanjako; akayi kuza pambi kwaso nekaka, akayi kuyiposela indulana ngakuso kananjalo." 
Isaiah37:34 Londlela ubesiza ngayo, uya kubuya kwa ngayo, nakuso esisixeko akayi kungena, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah37:35 Ngokuba ndiya kukusela isixeko esi, ndisisindise, ngenxa yokwam, nangenxa ka‐Davide isicaka sam." 
Isaiah37:36 Yaza yapuma ingelosi kayehova, yabulala emnqubeni wama‐Asiriya ikulu linamashumi asibozo enesihlanu lamawaka: kwati kwakuvukwa kusasa ngomnye umhla, nanga onke eyimizimba efileyo." 
Isaiah37:37 Wandula u‐Senakeribe ukumkani we‐Asiriya wanduluka, wahamba, wabuya, waya wahlala e‐Nineve." 
Isaiah37:38 Kwada kwati, nxa abezitoba endlwini ka‐Niseroki utixo wake, basuka u‐Adrameleki no‐Sharetsere onyana bake bambulala ngesiṙele; bati bona basindela ezweni le‐Ararate: waza u‐Esare‐hadoni unyana wake waba ngukumkani esikundleni sake." 
Isaiah38:1 NGALOMIHLA wabesifa u‐Hezekiya wada waza kububa. Wandula weza kuye u‐Yisaya unyana ka‐Amotse, umprofite, wati kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Yolela indlu yako; ngokuba uya kububa wena, akuyi kupila." 
Isaiah38:2 Waza u‐Hezekiya wasonga ubuso bake ngaseludongeni, watandaza kuyehova," 
Isaiah38:3 wati: Ke, Yehova! uze ukumbulele okokuba ndihambile ebusweni bako ngenyaniso nangentliziyo ekolisekileyo, nokuba ndikwenzile okulungileyo emehlweni ako. Waza u‐Hezekiya walila ngokulila okukulu." 
Isaiah38:4 Landula leza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Yisaya, lisiti:" 
Isaiah38:5 Hamba, uti ku‐Hezekiya: Utsho uyehova, utixo ka‐Davide uyihlo wako, ukuti: Ndivile umtandazo wako, ndibonile inyembezi zako; bona ke, ndiya kwongeza emihleni yako iminyaka ilishumi linesihlanu;" 
Isaiah38:6 ndandiya kusindisa wena, nesixeko esi, esandleni sokumkani we‐Asiriya; ndosikusela esisixeko kanjalo." 
Isaiah38:7 Oku kwoba ngumqondiso kuwe uvela kuyehova, wokuba uyehova uya kwenza lento ayitetileyo:" 
Isaiah38:8 bona ke, ndiya kubuyisa ngomva isitunzi sezinyuko, esihlileyo pezu kwelitye lokuxela ixesha lika‐Ahazi, ngelanga, sibuye izinyuko ezilishumi. Laza labuya ilanga izinyuko ezilishumi, ngezinyuko elibe lihlile ngazo." 
Isaiah38:9 Ukuba̔la kuka‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, akuba ebesifa, waza wapila esifeni sake:" 
Isaiah38:10 Ndati: Ekuhlanganeni kwemihla yam ndiya kungena emasangweni ehadesi; ndihlutiwe isisalela seminyaka yam. 
Isaiah38:11 Ndati: Andisayi kubona uyehova, uyehova emhlabeni wabahleliyo; andisayi kukangela abantu kanjako, pakati kwabemi belizwe elikoyo." 
Isaiah38:12 Intlalo yam inyotulwe, ifudusiwe kum, njengentente yomalusi; ndibufinyelisile, njengomluki, ubomi bam; uyanditsheca ezintsingeni; kwa semini kude kube sebusuku uyandigqiba wena." 
Isaiah38:13 Nda zi tutuzela kwada kwasa; njengengo nyama, kwa njalo uyawapula onke amatambo am; kwa semini kude kube sebusuku uyandigqiba wena." 
Isaiah38:14 Njengenkonjane nanjeng endwe ndiyalila njalo: ndiyancwina njengehobe; amehlo am ayapela ngokubeka ngapezulu: Yehova! ndisekubandezelweni; yiba ngumbambiseli wam. 
Isaiah38:15 Ndiya kuti nina? njengokuba etshilo kum, wenje njalo yena: ndohamba kakuhle yonke iminyaka yam, ngenxa yobuṙaṙa bompefumlo wam." 
Isaiah38:16 Nkosi! ngezi zinto bapila abantu; nangezi zinto zonke kuko ubomi bomoya wam; ngokuba undicacisile, wandenzela ukupila." 
Isaiah38:17 Bona ke, buguqulwe ubuṙaṙa bam obukulu baba luxolo; wautandile umpefumlo wam, wandikulula emnxunyeni wokubola: ngokuba zonke izono zam uziposile emva kwomhlana wako." 
Isaiah38:18 Ngenyaniso ihadesi ayingekudumise; ukufa akungekubonge; abo bahleleyo esihogweni abangetembele inyaniso yako. 
Isaiah38:19 Opilileyo, opilileyo, nguye oya kukudumisa, njengokuba ndisenje njalo mna namhla nje: uyise uya kubazisa abantwana inyaniso yako." 
Isaiah38:20 Uyehova womana ukundisindisa; ngako siya kubeta iziculiso zam ezinentambo, yonke imihla yokudla kwetu ubomi, endlwini kayehova." 
Isaiah38:21 Kekaloku wabete u‐Yisaya: Mabatabate isimba lamakiwane, balibeke pezu kwetumba, waeya kupila." 
Isaiah38:22 Wabete no‐Hezekiya: Umqondiso uyinto nina wokuba ndiya kunyuka ndiye endlwini kayehova? 
Isaiah39:1 NGELOXESHA watuma u‐Merodaki‐baladane, unyana ka‐Baladane, ukumkani we‐Babilone, incwadi nebaso ku‐Hezekiya; ngokuba ebevile ukuba ubesifa, nokuba ubuye wacaca." 
Isaiah39:2 Waye u‐Hezekiya evuya ngabo, wababonisa indlu yake yokubekela, isilivere, negolide, nezimnandi, neoli enqabileyo, nayo yonke indlu yezixo̔bo zake, nako konke okube kufunyanwa pakati kwendyebo zake: akwabiko nto endlwini yake, nakubo bonke ubukosi bake, abebengaboniswa yona ngu‐Hezekiya." 
Isaiah39:3 Wandula weza u‐Yisaya umprofite kukumkani u‐Hezekiya, wati kuye: Ate nina lamadoda? avela pina ukuza kuwe? Wati u‐Hezekiya: Avela elizweni elikude ukuza kum, e‐Babilone." 
Isaiah39:4 Waza wati: Yinto nina ayibonileyo endlwini yako? Wayesiti u‐Hezekiya: Konke okusendlwini yam akubonile; akuko nto pakati kwendyebo zam endingawabonisanga yona. 
Isaiah39:5 Wandula wati u‐Yisaya ku‐Hezekiya: Yiva ilizwi likayehova wemikosi. 
Isaiah39:6 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, kwakuba konke okusendlwini yako, noko bakubekeleyo oyihlo bako kwada kwanamhla, kuya kusiwa e‐Babilone; akuyi kusala nento, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah39:7 Nakubo onyana bako abaya kupuma kuwe, abo uya kubazala, baya kususa inxenye; babeya kuba ngababusi eluxandeni lwokumkani we‐Babilone." 
Isaiah39:8 Waza wati u‐Hezekiya ku‐Yisaya: Lilungile ilizwi likayehova, elo ulitetileyo. Wati kanjako: Ngokuba kuya kubako uxolo nenyaniso emihleni yam." 
Isaiah40:1 TUTUZELANI, tutuzelani abantu bam, utsho utixo wenu." 
Isaiah40:2 Tetani kamnandi kwi‐Yerusaleme, nishumayele kuyo, ukuba ukulwa kwayo kuzalisekile, ukuba inkohlakalo yayo ihlaulelwe; ukuba yamkele esandleni sikayehova ngokupindiweyo ngenxa yazo zonke izono zayo." 
Isaiah40:3 Ilizwi lodandulukayo entlango: Lungisani indlela kayehova; yenzelani utixo wetu umendo olungeleleneyo elubala. 
Isaiah40:4 Zonke izihlambo ziya kupakanyiswa, nazo zonke intaba nenduli ziya kutotyelwa pantsi; okuligoso kwotiwa ntse, nendawo ezibugongxo zoba butafa:" 
Isaiah40:5 kwakuya kutyilwa ubungcwalisa bukayehova; luti uluntu lwonke lububone kwa kunye: ngokuba umlomo kayehova utshilo. 
Isaiah40:6 Ilizwi lati: Danduluka! Wayesiti: Ndiya kudanduluka nto nina? Lwonke uluntu luyinca, nabo bonke ubuhle balo bunjengembali yasendle;" 
Isaiah40:7 inca iyoma, imbali iyabuna, ngokuba umoya kayehova uvutela pezu kwayo; ngenyaniso abantu bayinca." 
Isaiah40:8 Inca iyoma, imbali iyabuna; kanti ilizwi lotixo wetu liya kuma kude kube ngunapakade." 
Isaiah40:9 Nyukela entabeni ende, wena ushumayeza i‐Ziyone indaba ezilungileyo! pakamisa ngamandla ilizwi lako, wena ushumayeza i‐Yerusaleme indaba ezilungileyo! lipakamise, ungoyiki; yiti kwizixeko zakwa‐Juda: Nanku utixo wenu!" 
Isaiah40:10 Bona ke, inkosi e nguyehova iya kuza inamandla, nengalo yayo yoyipatela ubukosi; bona ke, umvuzo wayo unayo, nenzuzo yayo isebusweni bayo." 
Isaiah40:11 Iya kwalusa umhlambi wayo njengomalusi; imvana iya kuzibuta ezingalweni zayo, izitwale esifubeni sayo; igushakazi ezanyisayo yozitundeza." 
Isaiah40:12 NGUBANINA olinganisileyo amanzi esigingqini sesandla sake; owenzele amazulu umlinganiso ngesoluko seminwe; obambileyo utuli lwomhlaba esilinganisweni; ozifakileyo intaba ezintweni zokulungelelanisa, nenduli ezintweni zokulinganisa?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ngubanina owalatisileyo umoya kayehova; ote umhlaumbi, engumcebisi wake, wamazisa?" 
Isaiah40:14 Ucebisene nobanina, ukuba amqondise, amfundise endleleni yobugwebo; umhlaumbi amfundise ukwazi, amazise indlela yokuqonda?" 
Isaiah40:15 Bona ke, izizwe zinjengetontsi lasempandeni; zibalwa ngokuba njengotulana lwento yokulinganisa: bona ke, iziqiti uyazifunqula njengentwana encinanana." 
Isaiah40:16 I‐Lebanone ayanele ukwenza umlilo, nezilo zayo azanele idini lokutshiswa." 
Isaiah40:17 Zonke izizwe zinjengokungento pambi kwake; ziyabalwa nguye ngokuba zincinane kokungento nokungendawo. 
Isaiah40:18 Niya kufanisa utixo nobanina ke? kanjako yiyipina imfano eniya kuyilinganisa naye? 
Isaiah40:19 Uti umsebenzi awutyityishe umfanekiso, nencibi iwaleke ngegolide: nemixokolelwane yesilivere incibi iyayenza." 
Isaiah40:20 Olihlwempu kangaka ukuba akanamnikelo, uyanyula umti ongenakubola: uyazifunela umsebenzi olumkileyo, ukuze kumiswe umfanekiso ongayi kushukunyiswa." 
Isaiah40:21 Anazanga na? anivanga na? anixelelwanga na kwa sekuqaleni? aniqondanga na kwa sekusekweni kwomhlaba? 
Isaiah40:22 Nguye ohleliyo pezu kwesazinge somhlaba, obemi bawo banjengemicikwane; nguye owolulayo amazulu njengeqiya eshiceneyo, awatwabulule njengentente yokuhlala;" 
Isaiah40:23 ozenza inkosana zibe yinto engeluto; abagwebi bomhlaba uyabenza njengokungendawo. 
Isaiah40:24 Cebetshu batyaliwe; cebetshu bahlwayelwe; cebetshu isipunzi sabo sendele emhlabeni; kwandule ukuti, ukuba uka avutele pezu kwabo, babune, luti uqwitela lumke nabo njengomququ." 
Isaiah40:25 Niya kundifanisa nobanina ke, endiya kufana naye? utsho oyingcwele." 
Isaiah40:26 Pakamisani ngapezulu amehlo enu, nibone, ngubanina ozidalileyo ezizinto; ovelisayo umkosi wazo ngenani; zonke ke uyazibiza ngegama; ngobuninzi bamandla ake, nobomelelo bake obukulu; akuko nanye engeko." 
Isaiah40:27 Kunganina ukuba utsho, Yakobi! nokuba utete, Sirayeli! ukuti: Indlela yam ifihlelwe uyehova; n okuti: Ugwetyelwa lwam lugqitile kutixo wam." 
Isaiah40:28 Akwazanga na? akuvanga na? utixo ongunapakade nguyehova, umdali wamancam omhlaba; akacubuki yena, akadinwa nokudinwa; ukuqonda kwake akunakupengululwa." 
Isaiah40:29 Ocubukileyo uyamnika amandla; nababutataka uyabandisela ubomelelo. 
Isaiah40:30 Abafana bocubuka badinwe, namadodana agqibele ukuwa;" 
Isaiah40:31 kanti abo bakangela kuyehova bohlaziya amandla; baya kunyuka ngamapiko njengenkozi; bobaleka, bangadinwa; bohamba, bangacubuki." 
Isaiah41:1 YITINI cwaka pambi kwam, ziqiti! nabantu mabahlaziye amandla; mabeze kufupi, bandule batete; masisondele kunye ekugwebeni." 
Isaiah41:2 Ngubanina owavusa empumalanga olungileyo, wambizela elunyaweni lwake? unikele izizwe pambi kwake, wampatisa okumkani; wenze isiṙele sabo njengotuli, n esipeta sabo njengomququ opetshulweyo." 
Isaiah41:3 Ubasukele, wadlula ngokunqaba, ngendlela abengayanga ngenyawo zake." 
Isaiah41:4 Ngubanina okusebenzileyo nokwenzileyo oku, ebiza izizukulwana kwa sekuqaleni? Ndim, uyehova, owokuqala kwa nowokupela, ndim onguye." 
Isaiah41:5 Iziqiti zabona, zoyika ke; amancam omhlaba angcangcazela; asondela, eza ke." 
Isaiah41:6 Bancedana umntu ummelwane wake; omnye wati kwomnye: Yomelela! 
Isaiah41:7 Waza umsebenzi wayomeleza incibi, n ogudisayo ngesando lowo ubetayo intsimbi yokukandela, esiti ngento yokutywina: Ilungile; wayewubetela ngezikonkwane, uze ungashukunyiswa." 
Isaiah41:8 Kodwa wena, Sirayeli! isicaka sam; Yakobi! ondikuqashileyo, inzalo ka‐Abrahame umhlobo wam;" 
Isaiah41:9 ondikubambileyo kwa semancameni omhlaba, ndakubiza kwa sezipelweni zawo, nondite kuwe: Wena usisicaka sam; ndikuqashile, andiyi kukulahla:" 
Isaiah41:10 ungoyiki, ngokuba ndinawe mna; ungabi navuso, ngokuba ndi ngutixo wako; ndiya kukwomeleza; ewe, ndiya kukunceda; ewe, ndokuxasa ngesokunene isandla sam esilungileyo." 
Isaiah41:11 Bona ke, baya kudana, bamatiswe, bonke abebequmbile ngakuwe; boba njengokungento, babube, abo bapika nawe." 
Isaiah41:12 Wobafuna, kanti akuyi kubafumana, abo abebengxolisana nawe; boba njengokungento nokungendawo abo abebesilwa ngakuwe." 
Isaiah41:13 Ngokuba mna Yehova ndi ngutixo wako, obambayo isandla sako sokunene; oti kuwe: Ungoyiki, ndokunceda ke." 
Isaiah41:14 Ungoyiki, wena msundu Yakobi, nina bafo bo‐Sirayeli! ndokunceda, utsho uyehova, umkululi wako, oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah41:15 Bona ke, ndiya kukwenza into yokubula, ebukali, entsha, emazinyo maninzi; uya kubula intaba, uziqwakanise, nenduli uya kuzenza njengomququ." 
Isaiah41:16 Uya kuzela, uti umoya uzimkise; uqwitela lwoziti sa kanjalo; kodwa wena uya kugcoba kuyehova; kuye oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli uya kuqa̔yisa." 
Isaiah41:17 Amahlwempu nabasweleyo bayafuna amanzi, kanti akako; ulwimi lwabo lutshile linxanwa; mna Yehova ndobapendula; mna Tixo wo‐Sirayeli andiyi kubashiya." 
Isaiah41:18 Ndiya kuvumbulula imilambo ezindulini, nemitombo pakati kwemihlambo; ndoyenza intlango ibe licibi lamanzi, nomhlaba owomileyo ube ngamatende amanzi." 
Isaiah41:19 Ndobeka entlango umti wesedare, n oweshitime, nowemutele, nomti weoli; ndomisa elubala umti weberoshe, n owetidara, nowetashure kwa kunye:" 
Isaiah41:20 ukuze babone, bazi, bagqale, baqonde kwa kunye, ukuba isandla sikayehova sikwenzile oku, nokuba oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli ukudalile." 
Isaiah41:21 Sondezani impikiso yenu, utsho uyehova; velisani izizatu zenu ezinamandla, utsho ukumkani wo‐Yakobi." 
Isaiah41:22 Mabazivelise, basityele oko okuya kuhla; mabatyele izinto zapambili, ziyinina, ukuba sizibekele intliziyo, sikwazi nokupela kwazo; umhlaumbi, mabasivise izinto ezizayo." 
Isaiah41:23 Tyelani izinto eziya kuza emva kwoku, size sikwazi ukuba ningotixo; ewe, yenzani okulungileyo, umhlaumbi yenzani okukohlakeleyo, size sibe nevuso, sibonele kwa kunye." 
Isaiah41:24 Bona ke, nikokuncinane kokungento, nomsebenzi wenu ukokuncinane kokungendawo: uyinto eyintshontsho oniqashayo." 
Isaiah41:25 Ndimvusile ovela enode, waeya kuza; ecaleni lokupuma kwelanga uya kubiza igama lam; woza pezu kwenkosi njengapezu kwodaka, nanjengokuba umbumbi exovula udongwe." 
Isaiah41:26 Ngubanina owakuxelayo kwa sekuqaleni, ukuba sikwazi? nasexesheni lapambili, ukuba siti: Kuyinene? Akuko namnye okawakuxela; akuko namnye okawakuvakalisa; akuko namnye okaweva amazwi enu." 
Isaiah41:27 Mna endingowokuqala nditi kwi‐Ziyone: Bona, zibone! nakwi‐Yerusaleme ndiya kunika umshumayeli wendaba ezilungileyo." 
Isaiah41:28 Ngokuba bendikangela, kanti akwabako namnye, kwa pakati kwabo aba, kanti akwabako umcebisi, ukuba ndibuze kubo, nokuba ba ndi nike impendulo." 
Isaiah41:29 Bona ke, bona bonke bakokungendawo; imisebenzi yabo iyinto engeluto; imifanekiso yabo etyityishiweyo ingumoya nokungento." 
Isaiah42:1 KANGELA isicaka sam, endisixasayo; umqashwa wam, o ti umpefumlo wam ukoliswe nguye; ndibekile umoya wam pezu kwake; isigwebo uya kusipumisela kubaheyideni." 
Isaiah42:2 Akayi kukala, akayi kudanduluka kanjako; nelizwi lake akayi kulivakalisa esitarateni." 
Isaiah42:3 Ingcongolo etyumzekileyo akayi kuyapula; nomsonto wesibane ovutayo ngozizi akayi kuwucima; wopumisa isigwebo ngenyaniso. 
Isaiah42:4 Akayi kuncama, akayi kwapuka kanjalo, ade amise isigwebo emhlabeni: nomteto wake iziqiti zowulinda." 
Isaiah42:5 Utsho utixo onguyehova, owadala amazulu, wawolula; owatwabulula umhlaba, nemveliso zawo; owanika umpefumlo ebantwini abapezu kwawo, nomoya kubo abahambayo kuwo, ukuti:" 
Isaiah42:6 Mna Yehova ndikubizile ngenxa yobulungisa; ndandiya kubamba isandla sako, ndikugcine, ndikunike ube lucebano ebantwini, ube sisikanyiso kubaheyideni;" 
Isaiah42:7 kuze kuvulwe amehlo abumfama, kukutshwe ababanjwa entolongweni, n abahleli ebumnyameni endlwini yokuvalela." 
Isaiah42:8 Mna ndi nguyehova; leli igama lam: ubungcwalisa bam andiyi kubunika kuwumbi, nodumo lwam kwimifanekiso eqingqiweyo." 
Isaiah42:9 Izinto zapambili, bona ke, zize kubako; nezinto ezintsha ndiyazixela: zingekahlumi ndiyanivisa zona." 
Isaiah42:10 Vumani kuyehova iculo elitsha, udunyiswa lwake kwa sekupeleni kwomhlaba, nina nihlele elwandle, nokuzala kwalo, nina ziqiti, nabemi bazo!" 
Isaiah42:11 Intlango nezixeko zayo mazipakamise ilizwi, imizi ahleli kuyo ama‐Kedare; mabacule abemi base‐Sela, bamemeze kwa sengcopo yentaba." 
Isaiah42:12 Mabanike ubungcwalisa kuyehova, nodumo lwake mabaluxele eziqitini." 
Isaiah42:13 Uyehova uya kupuma njengeṙoti; njengendoda yokulwa uya kuvusa ubukwele; uya kudanduluka, ewe, wohlaba umkosi; uya kwenza ngobuṙoti ngakuzo intshaba zake." 
Isaiah42:14 Kukade ndihleli nditi tu; ndite cwaka; ndizinyanzele: njengomfazi ozalayo ndiya kukala; ndopefumla ndibefule kwa kunye. 
Isaiah42:15 Ndiya kucitakalisa intaba nenduli, nayo yonke imifuno yazo ndiya kuyomisa; ndoyenza imilambo ibe ziziqiti, namacibi ndowomisa." 
Isaiah42:16 Ndandiya kuhambisa imfama ngomendo ezingawazanga; ngendlela ezingazazanga ndozikokela: ndiya kubenza ubumnyama bube kukukanya pambi kwazo, namalinda abe litafa: ezizinto ndiya kuzenzela zona, ndandingayi kuzishiya." 
Isaiah42:17 Bonqandwa ngomva, bodaniswa kakulu, abo batembela kuyo imifanekiso eqingqiweyo, abati kuyo imifanekiso etyityishiweyo: Nina ningotixo betu." 
Isaiah42:18 YIVANI, nina zitulu! nani zimfama! kangelani, ukuba nibone." 
Isaiah42:19 Ngubanina oyimfama, kupela sisicaka sam; umhlaumbi osisitulu, njengesitunywa sam e ndisituma yo? ngubanina oyimfama njengaye ofezekileyo? ngubanina oyimfama njengesicaka sikayehova?" 
Isaiah42:20 Uyabona izinto ezininzi ke, kanti akuzigqali; evula indlebe nje, akeva noko." 
Isaiah42:21 Uyehova unovuyo ngenxa yobulungisa baso; siya kuwenza mkulu umteto, siwuzukise." 
Isaiah42:22 Kodwa aba bangabantu abapangiweyo nabatinjiweyo; batiyelwe ezihogweni bona bonke, nasezindlwini zokuvalela bafihliwe; bayinto yokupangwa, kanti akuko ohlangulayo; ba yinto yokutinjwa, kanti akuko otshoyo: Buyisa." 
Isaiah42:23 Ngubanina pakati kwenu oya kubekela oku indlebe? ngubanina oya kupulapula, eve, ngexesha elizayo?" 
Isaiah42:24 Ngubanina owanikela u‐Yakobi ekuntinjweni, no‐Sirayeli kubapangi? Ebengenguye uyehova na; lowo esonileyo ngakuye, ondlela zake bebengavumi ukuhamba kuzo, nomteto wake bebengawuva?" 
Isaiah42:25 Ngako utulule pezu kwake ubushushu bengqumbo yake, namandla emfazwe; impembele umlilo ngento engqongayo, kanti ebengazi; yamtshisa, kanti ebengabekeli oko intliziyo." 
Isaiah43:1 Kodwa kaloku, utsho uyehova owakwenzayo, Yakobi! nalowo owakudalayo, Sirayeli! ukuti: Ungoyiki, ngokuba ndikukulule; ndikubizile ngegama; wena ungowam." 
Isaiah43:2 Nxa udlulayo pakati kwamanzi, ndoba nawe mna; napakati kwemilambo, ayiyi kukukukulisa: nxa uhambayo emlilweni, akuyi kuṙauka; kanjako ilangatye aliyi kukutshisa." 
Isaiah43:3 Ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wako, oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, umsindisi wako; ndinikile i‐Jipete ibe sisizi sako, i‐Tiyopiya ne‐Seba esikundleni sako." 
Isaiah43:4 Ngenxa yokuba ubunqabile emehlweni am, ubunokubekwa, nam ndikutandile; ngako ndinikile abantu esikundleni sako, nentlanga esikundleni sobomi bako." 
Isaiah43:5 Ungoyiki, ngokuba ndinawe mna; ndovelisa inzalo yako empumalanga, ndikubute nasentshonalanga." 
Isaiah43:6 Ndoti kuyo inode: Ku̔pa; nakuyo isuyide: Ungatinti; velisa onyana bam kwa kude, nentombi zam ekupeleni kwomhlaba;" 
Isaiah43:7 bonke ababizwayo ngegama lam, endibadalele ubungcwalisa bam, endibayilileyo, ewe, endibenzileyo." 
Isaiah43:8 Pumisa abantu abazimfama, abanamehlo; nabazitulu, abanendlebe." 
Isaiah43:9 Zonke izizwe mazibutelwe ndawonye; mazihlanganiswe intlanga. Ngubanina pakati kwazo ongaxelayo oku, umhlaumbi ongasivisayo izinto zapambili? mabaku̔pe amanqi̔na abo, ukuba bagwetyelwe; kuze kuviwe, kutiwe: Kuyinyaniso." 
Isaiah43:10 Nina ningamanqi̔na am, utsho uyehova, nesicaka sam, endisiqashileyo; ukuze nikwazi, nikolwe kum, niqonde ukuba ndinguye: ngapambi kwam bekungadalwa namnye utixo, nasemva kwam akuyi kubako namnye." 
Isaiah43:11 Mna, mna ndi nguyehova; akuko namnye umsindisi ngapandle kwam." 
Isaiah43:12 Ndixelile, ndisindisile, ndivakalisile, nxa bekungabiko pakati kwenu utixo wasemzini; ngako nina ningamanqi̔na am, utsho uyehova, ukuba ndi ngutixo." 
Isaiah43:13 Kwa ungekabiko umhla, ndinguye; akuko ongahlangulayo esandleni sam; ndiya kusebenza, ngubanina ke oya kukunqanda?" 
Isaiah43:14 Utsho uyehova, umkululi wenu, oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ngenxa yenu nditumile e‐Babilone, ndawisa zonke izibonda zayo, nama‐Kaledine ezinqanaweni zokugcoba kwawo." 
Isaiah43:15 Mna ndi nguyehova, oyingcwele wenu, umdali wo‐Sirayeli, ukumkani wenu." 
Isaiah43:16 Utsho ukuti uyehova, owenzayo indlela pakati kwolwandle, nomzila pakati kwamanzi anamandla;" 
Isaiah43:17 owaku̔pa inqwelo namahashe, umkosi nabanamandla; — balala pantsi ndawonye; ababuya besuke; babecinyiwe, bafa njengomsonto wesibane:" 
Isaiah43:18 Ningakumbuli izinto zapambili; nezinto zakudala ningazigqali. 
Isaiah43:19 Bona ke, ndiya kwenza into entsha; kakaloku iya kuhluma; aniyi kuyazi na? Ndoka ndenze indlela entlango, n emilambo ebugxwayibeni." 
Isaiah43:20 Izilo zasendle zondibeka, incu̔ka nenciniba; ngokuba ndiya kunika amanzi entlango, n emilambo ebugxwayibeni, kusezwe abantu bam, abaqashwa bam." 
Isaiah43:21 Ababantu ndibadalele mna; udunyiswa lwam bolubalisa. 
Isaiah43:22 Kodwa akubizanga kum, Yakobi! koko udiniwe ndim, Sirayeli!" 
Isaiah43:23 Akuzisanga kum inkomo ezincinane zamadini okutshiswa ako, nemibingo yako akundibekanga ngayo; andikucubukisanga ngeminikelo, andikudinisanga ngesiqu̔miso kanjako." 
Isaiah43:24 Akunditengelanga ikalame emnandi ngemali, nenqata lemibingo yako akundihlutisanga ngalo; koko undicubukisile ngezono zako; undidinisile ngenkohlakalo zako." 
Isaiah43:25 Mna, mna ndinguye, ocimayo izigqito zako ngenxa yokwam; nezono zako andiyi kuzikumbula." 
Isaiah43:26 Ndikumbuze; masipikisane kunye; teta wena, uze ugwetyelwe." 
Isaiah43:27 Uyihlo wako omkulu wonile, nabacazeli bako bagqitile ngakum." 
Isaiah43:28 Ngako ndibanco̔lisile abapati beyingcwele indawo; ndimnikile u‐Yakobi esiqalekisweni, no‐Sirayeli ezigxekweni." 
Isaiah44:1 Kodwa kaloku, yiva, Yakobi! isicaka sam; no‐Sirayeli! endimqashileyo." 
Isaiah44:2 Utsho uyehova, umenzi wako, owakudalayo kwa sesizalweni, okuncedayo, ukuti: Ungoyiki, sicaka sam, Yakobi! nawe, Yeshurune! endimqashileyo." 
Isaiah44:3 Ngokuba ndiya kugalela amanzi pezu kwonxaniweyo, nezelo pezu kwowomileyo umhlaba; ndogalela umoya wam pezu kwenzalo yako, netamsanqeliso lam pezu kwabantwana bako:" 
Isaiah44:4 abaya kuhluma njenga pakati kwenca, njengeminculuba ngasemilanjeni yamanzi." 
Isaiah44:5 Omnye woti: Ndingo kayehova; omnye wo zi biza ngegama lika‐Yakobi; omnye woba̔la esandleni sake ukuti: Ndi ngo kayehova; a zi tiye igama lika‐Sirayeli. 
Isaiah44:6 Utsho uyehova, ukumkani ka‐Sirayeli, nomkululi wake, uyehova wemikosi, ukuti: Ndingowokuqala, ndingowokupela kanjalo; nangapandle kwam akuko utixo." 
Isaiah44:7 Ngubanina, njengam, oya kushumayela, akuxele, akulungiselele pambi kwam, kuseloko ndibamisileyo abantu bakudala? nezinto ezizayo, nezinto eziya kubako, mabazixele kubo." 
Isaiah44:8 Ningoyiki, ningabi nakwetuka kanjalo; andikuvisanga kwa kudala na, ndaxela ke? Ngako nina ningamanqi̔na am. Kuko utixo ngapandle kwam na? okunene akuko ilityekazi limbi; andilazi nalinye." 
Isaiah44:9 Abadalayo umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, bona bonke bakokungendawo; nezinto zabo ezinqwenelekileyo azincedi luto: kwa bona bangamanqi̔na abo; ababoni, abazi kanjako; ukuze badane." 
Isaiah44:10 Ngubanina odalileyo into engutixo, umhlaumbi otyityishileyo umfanekiso, ongancedi luto?" 
Isaiah44:11 Bona ke, onke amakolwane ake aya kudana; nabasebenzi bona bavela ebantwini: mabazihlanganise bonke: mabeme: baya kwoyika badane kunye." 
Isaiah44:12 Incibi yesincete iyenza izembe, isebenze emalahleni; iyaliyila ngezando, ilikande ngengalo yayo enamandla: kanjalo iyalamba, ide ingabi namandla; ayiseli amanzi, ide icubuke." 
Isaiah44:13 Incibi yemiti iyolula intambo; iyapaula isimilo sawo ngesiqingqo; iyawulungisa ngentlabo; iyawupaulela isimilo ngesijikelo; iyawenza njengemfano yomntu, njengobuhle bendoda; uze uhlale endlwini." 
Isaiah44:14 Iyazigaulela imiti yesedare: iyatabata umti weyiletse noweyeke, nalowo iti womelele pakati kwemiti yehlati; iyatyala umti weworene, ize imvula iwukulise." 
Isaiah44:15 Yandule ibe yeyokutshisa kwomntu, otabata kuyo, azifudumeze; uti kanjalo apembe umlilo, ose isonka; ewe, uyenza utixo, atobe kuye; uyawenza umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, aqubude pambi kwawo." 
Isaiah44:16 Inxenye yawo uyayitshisa emlilweni; pezu kwenxenye yawo uyatya inyama; uyoja ukwoja, ahlute nokuhluta; uyazifudumeza kanjalo, ati: He, ndifudumele, ndiwubonile umlilo." 
Isaiah44:17 Nesisalela sawo uyasenza sibe ngutixo, umfanekiso oqingqiweyo wake; uyaqubuda pambi kwawo, atobe kuwo; uyatandaza kuwo kanjalo, ati: Ndikulule, ngokuba ungutixo wam wena." 
Isaiah44:18 Abazanga, abaqondanga kanjako; ngokuba kusindiwe amehlo abo, ukuba akangebone, n entliziyo zabo, ukuba azingeqiqe." 
Isaiah44:19 Akuko namnye okumbulayo entliziyweni yake, akuko ukwazi nokuqonda kanjako, ukuba kutiwe: Inxenye yawo ndiyitshisile emlilweni; ewe, ndandosile isonka pezu kwamalahle awo; ndojile inyama, ndayidla nokuyidla: kanene iliva lawo ndiya kulenza into eyintshontsho na? ndiya kuqubuda na pambi kwesipunzi somti?" 
Isaiah44:20 Uyadla ututu; intliziyo ekohlisiweyo impambukisile; ukuba akangehlangule umpefumlo wake, akangeti nokuti: Akuko na ubuxoki kwesokunene sam?" 
Isaiah44:21 KUMBULA ezi zinto. Yakobi! no‐Sirayeli! ngokuba usisicaka sam wena: ndikudalile; usisicaka sam: Sirayeli! akusayi kulityalwa ndim. 
Isaiah44:22 Ndizicimile njengelifu eliyingqingqwa izigqito zako, nanjengelifu izono zako: buyela kum, ngokuba ndikukulule." 
Isaiah44:23 Culani, nina mazulu! ngokuba uyehova ekwenzile; dandulukani ngovuyo, nina mazantsi omhlaba! gqabukelani ekuculeni, nina zintaba! wena hlati, nayo yonke imiti ekulo! ngokuba uyehova emkulule u‐Yakobi, wazenzela ubungcwalisa kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah44:24 Utsho uyehova, umkululi wako, lowo owakudalayo kwa sesizalweni, ukuti: Mna ndi nguyehova, umenzi wento zonke; ondolulayo amazulu ndedwa, ondatwabulula umhlaba ngokwam;" 
Isaiah44:25 otshitshisayo imiqondiso yamaxoki, nabalauli abahilizise; owabuyisa amalumko ngomva, nokwazi kwawo akumatise;" 
Isaiah44:26 oqinisayo ilizwi lesicaka sake, necebo lezitunywa zake alifeze; oti ngayo i‐Yerusaleme: Iya kumiwa; nangazo izixeko zase‐Juda: Ziya kwakiwa; indawo zayo ezicitakeleyo ndobuya ndizimise:" 
Isaiah44:27 oti enzulwini: Yiba utshile; imilambo yayo ndiya kuyomisa; 
Isaiah44:28 oti ngaye u‐Koreshe: Ngumalusi wam: uya kufeza yonke intando yam; kwa esiti ngayo i‐Yerusaleme: Iya kwakiwa; na ngayo itempile: Kwobekwa ukuseka kwayo. 
Isaiah45:1 Utsho ukuti uyehova kumtanjiswa wake, ku‐Koreshe, endimbambayo ngesandla sake sokunene, ukuba kwoyiswe izizwe pambi kwake; nezinqe zokumkani ndozitukululela; ukuba kuvulwe pambi kwake ingcango zokuhlangana; namasango akayi kuvalwa:" 
Isaiah45:2 ndiya kuhamba pambi kwako, ndizilungelelanise indawo ezibugongxo; ingcango zexina ndoziqekeza, nemivalo yesincete ndiya kuyinqamla kubini." 
Isaiah45:3 Ndandiya kunika kuwe indyebo ezisebumnyameni, nembekelo ezisezindaweni zokufihlela; ukuze ukwazi ukuba mna ndi nguyehova, okubizayo ngegama, utixo ka‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah45:4 Ngenxa yesicaka sam u‐Yakobi, no‐Sirayeli umqashwa wam, sendikubizile ngegama lako; ndikutiyile igama, nakuba ungandazanga." 
Isaiah45:5 Mna ndi nguyehova, akuko wumbi; ngapandle kwam akuko utixo: ndikubinqisile, nakuba ungandazanga;" 
Isaiah45:6 ukuze kwaziwe kwa sekupumeni kwelanga, nasekutshoneni kwalo, ukuba akuko ongapandle kwam: mna ndi nguyehova, akuko wumbi:" 
Isaiah45:7 imbange yokukanya, nomdali wobumnyama; umenzi woxolo, nomdali wobubi: mna ndi nguyehova, umenzi wezi zinto zonke." 
Isaiah45:8 Tontselani, mazulu! kwa pezulu; namafu makanise ubulungisa; mauvuleke umhlaba, kuze kuveliswe usindiso, nobulungisa buhlume kwa kunye: mna Yehova ndidalile oku." 
Isaiah45:9 Kwoba nzima kulowo opika nomdali wake! Icepe malipike namacepe omhlaba. Udongwe luya kuti na kolubumbayo: Wenza nto nina? umhlaumbi umsebenzi wako: Akanazandla? 
Isaiah45:10 Kwoba nzima kuye oti kuyise: Uzala nto nina? umhlaumbi kumfazi: Unenimba nganto nina? 
Isaiah45:11 Utsho uyehova, oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, nomdali wake, ukuti: Niyandibuza na izinto ezizayo ngalo usapo lwam? nondiyalela na ngawo umsebenzi wezandla zam?" 
Isaiah45:12 Ndim owenzayo umhlaba, nomntu ndimdalile pezu kwawo; zizandla zam ezolulayo amazulu, nayo yonke imikosi yawo ndiyimisile." 
Isaiah45:13 Ndimvusile ngenxa yobulungisa, nazo zonke indlela zake ndozilungiselela; uya kusaka isixeko sam, abandulule abatinjwa bam; kungengenxa yexabiso, kungengenxa yomvuzo kanjako, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Isaiah45:14 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ukuzuza kwe‐Jipete, nokuqweba kwe‐Tiyopiya, nama‐Seba, amadoda obude bukulu, odlulela kuwe, abe ngawako; okulandela; aya kudlula ngemixokolelwane; aya kuqubuda pambi kwako; otandaza kuwe, esiti: Okunene utixo ukuwe; akuko namnye utixo wumbi." 
Isaiah45:15 Ngenyaniso wena u ngutixo ozifihlayo, Tixo ka‐Sirayeli, ongumsindisi!" 
Isaiah45:16 Baya kudana; boviswa ihlazo bonke; kwa kunye baya kungena ehlazweni, abo bayenza imifanekiso." 
Isaiah45:17 Koko u‐Sirayeli aya kusindiswa nguyehova ngosindiswa olungunapakade; aniyi kudana, aniyi kuviswa ihlazo kanjalo, kude kube ngunapakade." 
Isaiah45:18 Ngokuba esitsho ukuti uyehova, umdali wamazulu; yena u ngutixo, imbange yomhlaba, nomenzi wawo; nguye owawumisayo; akafumana wawenza; wawudala ukuba umiwe: Mna ndi nguyehova, akuko wumbi." 
Isaiah45:19 Anditetanga emfihlekweni, endaweni yomhlaba ebumnyama; anditshongo kuyo inzalo ka‐Yakobi ukuti: Fumanani nindifuna; mna Yehova ndiyateta ubulungisa, ndiyaxela izinto ezilungileyo." 
Isaiah45:20 Zihlanganiseni, nize; sondelani ndawonye, nina basindileyo bezizwe! Abanakwazi abo batwele umti womfanekiso wabo oqingqiweyo, abatandaza kutixo ongenako ukusindisa." 
Isaiah45:21 Xelani, ni ba sondeze; ewe, mabacebisane: ngubanina okushumayeleyo oku kwa ngapambili? ngubanina okuxeleyo kwa kudala? Bendingendim na, uyehova? akuko utixo wumbi ngapandle kwam; utixo olungileyo, ongumsindisi; akuko ongapandle kwam." 
Isaiah45:22 Bekani kum, nize, nisindiswe, nonke nina zipelo zomhlaba! ngokuba ndinguye utixo, kungeko wumbi." 
Isaiah45:23 Ndizifungile mna; kupumile ilizwi emlonyeni wam ngobulungisa, alisayi kubuya: lokuba oguqa kum onke amadolo, zifunge kum zonke ilwimi." 
Isaiah45:24 Ngenyaniso kuyehova, kwotshiwo, ndinobulungisa namandla; kwa kuye kuya kuziwa; babeya kudaniswa bonke abaqumbela yena." 
Isaiah45:25 Ngaye uyehova yonke inzalo ka‐Sirayeli iya kugwetyelwa, iqa̔yise." 
Isaiah46:1 U‐BELE uyaguqa; u‐Nebo uyatoba pantsi; amadalo abo abekiwe pezu kwezilo napezu kwenkomo: imitwalo yenu yenziwe into yokutweswa, ingumsindwa kw isilo esidiniweyo." 
Isaiah46:2 Ziyatoba pantsi, ziyaguqa kunye; akohliwe ukukulula umsindwa; ewe, aya ekutinjweni kwa wona." 
Isaiah46:3 Pulapulani kum, ndlu ka‐Yakobi, naso sonke isisalela sendlu ka‐Sirayeli! abatwelweyo kwa sesiswini, abafunqulweyo kwa sesizalweni." 
Isaiah46:4 Kwa kude kube sebudaleni ndoba kwa nguye; nakude kube sezimvini ndo ni twala: ndenzile, ndandiya kufunqula; ewe, ndotwala, ndi ni kulule." 
Isaiah46:5 Niya kundifanisa nobanina, ukuba nindilinganise naye? niya kundenza njengo banina, ukuba sifane?" 
Isaiah46:6 Bayaku̔pa into eninzi yegolide enxoweni, nesilivere bayilinganisa entweni yokulungelelanisa; bayaqesha incibi yegolide, eyenzayo utixo: bayaqubuda, ewe, bayabedesha." 
Isaiah46:7 Bayamfunqula pezu kwegxalaba; bayamtwala; bayamhlisa pantsi endaweni yake, eme ke; akayi kushenxa kuyo indawo yake: ewe, umntu angakala kuye, kanti akayi kumpendula; akayi kumsindisa ebunzimeni bake." 
Isaiah46:8 Kumbulani oku, nenze njengamadoda; yikumbuzeni intliziyo, nina bagqiti!" 
Isaiah46:9 Kumbulani izinto zangapambili, ezakudala; ngokuba ndinguye utixo, akuko wumbi; ndi ngutixo, akuko onjengam:" 
Isaiah46:10 oxelayo kwa sekuqaleni okwokupela, nasemaxesheni apambili izinto ezingekenziwa, esiti: Icebo lam liya kuma, nayo yonke intando yam ndiya kuyenza:" 
Isaiah46:11 obizayo intakakazi ivele empumalanga, nendoda yokuceba kwam elizweni elikude: ewe, nditetile, ndokuzisa kubako kanjako; ndicingile, ndiya kukwenza kanjako." 
Isaiah46:12 Pulapulani kum, nina bantliziyo zinokanda, nina bakude ekulungeni!" 
Isaiah46:13 Ndiyasondeza ubulungisa bam; abuyi kuba kude; nosindiso lwam aluyi kulibala; ndandiya kubekela u‐Sirayeli, ubungcwalisa bam, usindiso e‐Ziyone." 
Isaiah47:1 Yihla, uhlale elutulini, wena ntombi ipela yase‐Babilone! hlala emhlabeni, ingeko iterone, wena ntombi yama‐Kaledine! ngokuba ungayi kubuya ubizwe ngokuba ngotambileyo nolibetyebetye." 
Isaiah47:2 Tabata amatye okusila, usile umgubo; hluba isigqubutelo sako, funqula amasondo engubo, tyila umlenze, wela imilambo." 
Isaiah47:3 Ubuzé bako buya kutyilwa, nobuhloni bako buya kubonwa; ndiya kutabata impindezelo, ndingabuki mntu namnye." 
Isaiah47:4 Umkululi wetu, nguyehova wemikosi igama lake, oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah47:5 Hlala uti tu, uye ebumnyameni, ntombi yama‐Kaledine! ngokuba ungayi kubuya ubizwe ngokuba yinkosikazi yezikumkani." 
Isaiah47:6 Bendiqumbile ngasebantwini bam, ndanco̔lisa ilifa lam, ndabanikela esandleni sako: akwabenzela izibele; pezu kwabadala wabeka iyokwe yako ngento enzima kakulu." 
Isaiah47:7 Wabusiti: Ndoba yinkosikazi kude kube ngunapakade; waza akwabekela ezi zinto intliziyo yako, akwakumbulela ukupela kwazo." 
Isaiah47:8 Ngako kaloku, yiva oku, wena ulahlelwe ebuyolweni, ohleli ngokunqaba! lowo oti entliziyweni yake: Ndim, akuko ongapandle kwam; andiyi kuhlala ndingumhlolokazi, andiyi kukwazi ukuhlutwa kwabantwana." 
Isaiah47:9 Kodwa ziya kuza pezu kwako ezi zinto zombini, ngepanyazo, emhleni mnye, ukuhlutwa kwabantwana nobuhlolokazi: zoza pezu kwako ekufezekeni kwazo, ngenxa yobuninzi bobugqi bako, ngenxa yenani elikulu lezinyango zako." 
Isaiah47:10 Ngokuba ubutemba ekukohlakaleni kwako; wati: Akuko ondibonayo. Ubulumko bako nokwazi kwako, oko kukutyekisile; wabusiti entliziyweni yako: Ndim, akuko ongapandle kwam." 
Isaiah47:11 Ngako ububi boza pezu kwako; akuyi kukwazi ukusa emva kwabo: ilishwa liya kuwa pezu kwako, oya kukohlwa kukulisonga ngesizi; ewe, utshabalalo lwoza pezu kwako ngokuzuma, o ngayi kulwazi." 
Isaiah47:12 Hlala ke usekunyangeni kwako, nasebuninzini bobugqi bako, osebenzileyo ngabo kwa sebutsheni bako; ngati ungaba nokuncedwa, ngati ungomelezwa." 
Isaiah47:13 Seludiniwe bubuninzi bamacebo ako: mabapakame kambe abahluli bamazulu, abakangeli benkwenkwezi, abalaulayo ekutwaseni kwenyanga, bakusindise kwezo zinto eziya kuza pezu kwako." 
Isaiah47:14 Bona ke, boba njengendiza; umlilo wobatshisa; abayi kuzikulula emandleni elangatye; akuyi kubako ilahle lokuba kufudunyezwe, n omlilo wokuba kuhlalwe pambi kwawo." 
Isaiah47:15 Boba njalo kuwe, abo usebenzile nabo, abatengelani bako, kwa sebutsheni bako; baya kubadula abanye ngabanye baye ecaleni labo: akuko namnye oya kukusindisa." 
Isaiah48:1 YIVANI oku, ndlu ka‐Yakobi, nina nibizwayo ngegama lika‐Sirayeli, nivela kuwo amanzi akwa‐Juda! enifunga igama likayehova, nimkankanye utixo ka‐Sirayeli; kungengayo inyaniso, kungengabo nobulungisa." 
Isaiah48:2 Ngokuba bezibiza ngokuti ngabesixeko esingcwele, besayama pezu kwake utixo ka‐Sirayeli; nguyehova wemikosi igama lake." 
Isaiah48:3 Izinto zangapambili ndazixela kwa kudala; zapuma emlonyeni wam, ndazivakalisa ke; ndazenza ngesiqupe, zeza kubako ke." 
Isaiah48:4 Bendinokwazi ukuba ulukuni wena, ukuba intamo yako ingumsipa wesincete, nebunzi lako yixina." 
Isaiah48:5 Kukona ndazixela kuwe kwa kudala; zingekezi kubako, ndazishumayela kuwe; hleze uti: Idalo lam lizenzile, umhlaumbi, umfanekiso wam oqingqiweyo, umhlaumbi, umfanekiso wam otyityishiweyo uzimisile." 
Isaiah48:6 Uvile ke; kukangele oku konke; nani aniyi kushumayela na? Ndiyakushumayeza izinto ezintsha kwa kaloku, nezifihlakeleyo, nongazazanga." 
Isaiah48:7 Kukaloku zidalwayo, kungekudala; ungekabiko umhla akuzivanga; hleze uti: Bona ke, bendizazi." 
Isaiah48:8 Ewe, akuvanga; ewe, akwazanga; ewe, kudala indlebe yako yaingavulwanga; ngokuba bendisazi ukuba uya kwenza ngenkohliso kakulu, nokuba wabubizwa ngokuba ngumgqiti kwa sesizalweni." 
Isaiah48:9 Ngenxa yegama lam ndiya kulibazisa ingqumbo yam, na ngenxa yodumo lwam ndoyibamba ingabi ngakuwe, ukuze ndingakunqamli." 
Isaiah48:10 Bona ke, ndikucokisile, kodwa kungenjengesilivere; ndikulingile esidlangalaleni sosizi." 
Isaiah48:11 Ngenxa yokwam, ngenxa yokwam, ndiya kukwenza: ngokuba beliya kunco̔liswa ngokunjanina igama lam? nobungcwalisa bam andiyi kubunika kuwumbi." 
Isaiah48:12 Pulapula kum, Yakobi! no‐Sirayeli, umbizwa wam! ndinguye; ndingowokuqala, ndingowokupela kanjalo." 
Isaiah48:13 Okunene sisandla sam esibekileyo ukuseka kwomhlaba, nesokunene sam esatwabulula amazulu; ndazibiza mna, zema kwa kunye." 
Isaiah48:14 Zihlanganiseni nina nonke, nive: ngubanina pakati kwabo oxelileyo ezi zinto? Uyehova umtandile; uya kuyenza intando yake pezu kwe‐Babilone, nengalo yake yoba pezu kwama‐Kaledine." 
Isaiah48:15 Ndim, ndim otetileyo; ewe, ndimbizile; ndimzisile, waeya kuba nokutamsanqeleka endleleni yake." 
Isaiah48:16 Sondelani kum, nive oku: anditetanga emfihlekweni kwa sekuqaleni; kwa sexesheni lokubako kwako bendikona; nakaloku nje inkosi enguyehova inditumile, nomoya wayo." 
Isaiah48:17 Utsho uyehova, umkululi wako, oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wako, okufundisayo kuze kuncedwe, okukokelayo ngendlela unga uhamba ngayo." 
Isaiah48:18 Akwaba wabupulapule imiyalelo yam! beluya kwandula uxolo lwako lube njengomlambo, nobulungisa bako bube njengamaza olwandle." 
Isaiah48:19 Kanjalo inzalo yako ibiya kuba njengentlabati, nemveliso yombilini wako njengeyombilini walo; Ibingayi kunqanyulwa; negama layo belingayi kutshatyalaliswa ebusweni bam." 
Isaiah48:20 Pumani e‐Babilone; sabani kuma‐Kaledine; ngelizwi lokugcoba xelani, kuvakaliseni oku; kupumiseni kude kube sesipelweni somhlaba; yitini: Uyehova usikulule isicaka sake u‐Yakobi." 
Isaiah48:21 Abanxanwanga ezindaweni ezomileyo wabahambisa ngazo; amanzi evela eweni wawelisela bona; ewe, walicanda iliwa, aza amanzi ampompoza." 
Isaiah48:22 Akuko uxolo, utsho uyehova, kwabakohlakeleyo." 
Isaiah49:1 PULAPULANI kum, nina ziqiti! bekani indlebe, nina bantu bakude! Uyehova undibizile ndisesizalweni; kwa sembilini kama̔ ukankanyile igama lam." 
Isaiah49:2 Uwenzile umlomo wam njengeṙele elibukali; esitunzini sesandla sake undifihlile; undenzile utolo olukazimlayo, wandizimeza empongolweni wake;" 
Isaiah49:3 wayesiti kum: Usisicaka sam wena; endiya kwenzelwa ubungcwaliswa kuwe, Sirayeli!" 
Isaiah49:4 Ndaza ndati: Ndifumane ndizama; amandla am ndiwapelisele okungendawo nokungento: noko, ibango lam linaye uyehova, nomvuzo wam u notixo wam." 
Isaiah49:5 Nakaloku uti uyehova, owandidala kwa sesizalweni ukuba ndibe sisicaka sake, ukuze ndimbuyisele kuye u‐Yakobi: Nangona u‐Sirayeli angayi kubutwa, ndiya kubekwa noko emehlweni kayehova, ati utixo wam abe ngamandla am." 
Isaiah49:6 Uti kanjalo: Yinto encinane ukuba ube sisicaka sam, ukumisa izizwe zika‐Yakobi, nokubuyisa abalondoloziweyo baka‐Sirayeli; ndikunikile nokuba ube sisikanyiso kubaheyideni, ukuze ube lusindiso lwam kude kube sekupeleni kwomhlaba." 
Isaiah49:7 Utsho uyehova, umkululi ka‐Sirayeli, oyingcwele wake, kuye odelwayo ngabantu, kuye ozondwayo sisizwe, kuso isicaka sabapati, ukuti: Okumkani baya kubona, basuke beme; n enkosana, zibedeshe; ngenxa yake uyehova, onyanisekileyo, oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, okuqashileyo." 
Isaiah49:8 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngexesha elikolekileyo ndikupendule, nangomhla wosindiso ndikuncedile; ndandiya kukulondoloza, ndikunike ube lucebano lwabantu, ukumisa umhlaba, ukwenza amafa acitakeleyo adliwe," 
Isaiah49:9 ukuti kubabanjwa: Pumani! kubo abasebumnyameni: Bonakalani! Baya kudla ezindleleni, napezu kwazo zonke induli kwobako amadlelo abo." 
Isaiah49:10 Abayi kulamba, abayi kunxanwa kanjalo; aluyi kubabeta ulwopu nelanga; ngokuba lowo onezibele ngakubo eya kubakokela, abakapele ngasemitonjeni yamanzi." 
Isaiah49:11 Ndandiya kuzenza zonke intaba zam zibe yindlela, nemendo yam iya kupakanyiswa." 
Isaiah49:12 Bona ke, aba bovela kwa kude; kanjako, bona ke, aba bovela enode, nasentshonalanga, naba elizweni le‐Sinime." 
Isaiah49:13 Culani, mazulu! ugcobe, mhlaba! gqabukelani ekuculeni, zintaba! ngokuba uyehova etutuzela abantu bake, enezibele pezu kwababandezelwa bake." 
Isaiah49:14 Kodwa i‐Ziyone iti: Uyehova undishiyile; inkosi yam indilibele. 
Isaiah49:15 Umfazi angamlibala na umntwana wake owanyayo, ukuba angabi nabubele ngakuye unyana wesizalo sake? Ewe, aba bangalibala, kanti mna andisayi kukulibala." 
Isaiah49:16 Bona ke, ndikuvambile pezu kwentende zezandla zam; indonga zako zipambi kwam futi." 
Isaiah49:17 Onyana bako baya kunxama; abo bakucitayo, nabo bakutshabalalisayo, baya kumka kuwe." 
Isaiah49:18 Pakamisa amehlo ako ngento engqongayo, ukangele: bona bonke bayazihlanganisa, beze kuwe. Ndihleli nje, utsho uyehova, bona bonke uya kubambata njengezihombo, ubanxibe kuwe njengokuba esenje njalo umtshakazi." 
Isaiah49:19 Ngokuba indawo zako ezicitakeleyo, nendawo zako ezitshabaleleyo, nelizwe lako elicitiweyo, okunene ngoku liya kuba lixinene kwabemi; nabo ababekuginya boba kude." 
Isaiah49:20 Onyana ububahlutiwe bobuya bati ezindlebeni zako: Indawo ixinene kum; ndikwelele ukuba ndihlale. 
Isaiah49:21 Wauya kuti entliziyweni yako: Ngubanina ondizalele aba? ngokuba bendingohlutiweyo abantwana noligantuntu; bendingumtinjwa nogxotiweyo: ngubanina ke obakulisileyo aba? bona ke, bendishiyiwe ndedwa; aba, bebepina bona?" 
Isaiah49:22 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kufunqulela kubaheyideni isandla sam, nebanile yam ndoyipakamisela ezizweni; babeya kuzisa onyana bako ezingalweni, nentombi zako ziya kutyatwa emagxalabeni." 
Isaiah49:23 Okumkani boba ngabondli bako, nenkosikazi zabo zoba ngabanyisikazi bako; benobuso ngasemhlabeni baya kutoba pantsi kuwe, notuli lwenyawo zako bolukota; wauya kwazi ukuba ndi nguyehova; ngokuba bengayi kudana abo bandilindayo." 
Isaiah49:24 Amaxoba aya kususwa na kwigoṙa? nabatinjwa bolungileyo baya kuhlangulwa na? 
Isaiah49:25 Ngenyaniso utsho uyehova ukuti: Ewe, abatinjwa begoṙa baya kususwa, namaxoba esidlwengu aya kuhlangulwa: ngokuba lowo opika nawe ndiya kupika naye mna, nabantwana bako ndiya kubasindisa." 
Isaiah49:26 Ndandiya kudlisa ababandezeli bako eyabo inyama; baya kunxila nangelabo igazi, njengeveyine entsha; lwaluya kukwazi uluntu lwonke, ukuba mna Yehova ndingumsindisi wako, nomkululi wako, usomandla ka‐Yakobi." 
Isaiah50:1 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ipina incwadi yokulahlwa kwonyoko wenu, endandimndulula ngayo? umhlaumbi, nguwupina kwabo ndinetyala kubo endinitengisile kuye? Bona ke, ngenxa yezikohlakalo zenu nitengisiwe, nangenxa yezigqito zenu unyoko wenu undululwe." 
Isaiah50:2 Kunganina ukuba ekuzeni kwam bekungeko umntu, na sekubizeni kwam bekungeko osabelayo? Isandla sam sike safinyezeka na, ukuba singabi nakukulula? umhlaumbi, akuko kum na amandla okuhlangula? Bona ke, ngokutetisa kwam ndiyomisa ulwandle, ndiyenza imilambo ibe yintlango; intlanzi zayo ziyanuka, ngokuba kungeko amanzi, ziyabuba ngenxanwa." 
Isaiah50:3 Ndiyambatisa amazulu ubumnyama, nentlakantlaka ndiyayenza ibe sisigubungelo sawo." 
Isaiah50:4 Inkosi e nguyehova indinikile ulwimi lwabafundisiweyo, ukuze ndikwazi ukusiza odiniweyo ngelizwi; uyavusa ngemiso ngemiso, uyavusa indlebe yam, ukuba ndive njengabafundisiweyo." 
Isaiah50:5 Inkosi e nguyehova ivulile indlebe yam, andala mna, andihlehlanga ngomva." 
Isaiah50:6 Ndanika umhlana wam kubabeti, nezidlele zam kubo abandincotula inwele; ubuso bam andibufihlanga kuwo amahlazo namate." 
Isaiah50:7 Kodwa inkosi e nguyehova iya kundinceda: ngako oko andiyi kumatiswa; ngako oko ndimisile ubuso bam njengelitye elilukuni; ndisazi nje ukuba andiyi kudaniswa. 
Isaiah50:8 Ukufupi ondigwebelayo: ngubanina oya kupika nam? masime ndawonye: ngubanina ongummangaleli wam? makasondele kum. 
Isaiah50:9 Bona ke, inkosi e nguyehova iya kundinceda; ngubanina lowo oya kundigweba? Bona ke, bona bonke baya kuguga njengengubo; inundu liya kubadla." 
Isaiah50:10 Ngubanina pakati kwenu omoyikayo uyehova, olivayo ilizwi lesicaka sake, ohambayo ebumnyameni, okungeko ukukanya kuye? makatembe egameni likayehova, ayame kuye utixo wake." 
Isaiah50:11 Bonani ke, nina nonke enipemba umlilo, eniziṙaulayo ngezibane! hambani ekukanyeni kwomlilo wenu, napakati kwezibane enizivutisileyo. Oku niya kuba nako kuvela esandleni sam; niya kulala pantsi elusizini." 
Isaiah51:1 PULAPULANI kum, nina baputumayo ubulungisa, nina bafunayo uyehova! kangelani elulwalweni apo nibazelwe kona, nasesigingqini somnxuma apo nimbelwe kona." 
Isaiah51:2 Kangelani ku‐Abrahame uyihlo wenu, naku‐Sara onizeleyo: ngokuba bendimbiza engoyedwa, ndaza ndamtamsanqela, ndamandisa." 
Isaiah51:3 Ngokuba uyehova eya kuba nenceba pezu kwe‐Ziyone; woba nenceba pezu kwazo zonke indawo zayo ezicitakeleyo; waeya kwenza intlango yayo njengayo i‐Hedeni, nobala lwayo njengomyezo kayehova; umgcobo novuyo luya kufunyanwa kuyo, umbulelo nelizwi lokucula." 
Isaiah51:4 Bekelani kum, bantu bam! ndinikeleni indlebe, sizwe sam! ngokuba umteto uya kupuma kum, nommiselo wam ndowumisa ube sisikanyiso ebantwini." 
Isaiah51:5 Ubulungisa bam bukufupi; usindiso lwam lupumile; ingalo zam ziya kugweba abantu; iziqiti zokangela kum, zitembe engalweni yam." 
Isaiah51:6 Pakamisani amehlo enu ngasezulwini, nibeke nasemhlabeni ngapantsi; ngokuba izulu liya kuti shwaka njengomsi, nomhlaba uya kuguga njengengubo, nabemi bawo baya kufa njengokunjalo: kodwa usindiso lwam lwobako kude kube ngunapakade, nobulungisa bam abusayi kutshatyalaliswa." 
Isaiah51:7 Pulapulani kum, nina nibaziyo ubulungisa, abantu umteto wam usezintliziyweni zabo! ningoyiki ukugxeka kwabantu, kanjalo ningetuswa zizituko zabo." 
Isaiah51:8 Ngokuba inundu liya kubadla njengengubo, nempetu iya kubadla njengoboya: kodwa ubulungisa bam bobako kude kube ngunapakade, nosindiso lwam kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Isaiah51:9 Vuka, vuka, yambata amandla, ngalo kayehova! vuka, njengasemihleni yamatanci, njenga sezizukulwaneni zakudala. Akukwa yiyo na eyisikileyo i‐Rahabi, eyenzela ingwenya inxeba?" 
Isaiah51:10 Akukwa yiyo na eyomisayo ulwandle, amanzi ayo inzulu enkulu; eyenzayo amazantsi olwandle abe yindlela yokuwela kwabakululweyo?" 
Isaiah51:11 Kwa njalo abahlaulelweyo bakayehova baya kubuya, beze e‐Ziyone ngokucula; uvuyo olungunapakade lwoba pezu kwentloko zabo; baya kuzuza umgcobo novuyo; kwobaleka usizi nokugula." 
Isaiah51:12 Mna, mna ndinguye onitutuzelayo: ungubanina wena, ukuba umoyike umntu, oya kufa, nonyana womntu, oya kwenzelwa ngejeng enca;" 
Isaiah51:13 ukuba ulibale uyehova umenzi wako, owawolulayo amazulu, wabeka ukuseka kwomhlaba; ukuba ube nokunkwantya futi imihla yonke, ngenxa yobuṙalaṙume bomncinezeli, njengokungati usel’ elungile ukutshabalalisa? Bupina pofu ubuṙalaṙume bomncinezeli?" 
Isaiah51:14 Kamsinyane umbanjwa otobayo uya kuvulelwa; akayi kufa esihogweni; akayi kuswela isonka sake kanjako. 
Isaiah51:15 Ngokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wako, ozolisayo ulwandle, nxa amaza alo agqumayo: nguyehova wemikosi igama lake." 
Isaiah51:16 Ndandibekile amazwi am emlonyeni wako, nangesitunzi sesandla sam ndikugubungele; ukumisa amazulu, nokubeka ukuseka kwomhlaba, nokuti kwi‐Ziyone: Ungabantu bam." 
Isaiah51:17 Zivuse, zivuse, pakama, Yerusaleme! wena uselileyo esandleni sikayehova kwindebe yobuṙalaṙume bake; intlenga zendebe yesizunguzane uziselile, uzifunxile." 
Isaiah51:18 Ayinamnye oyikapayo kubo bonke onyana ibazeleyo; akuko namnye oyibamba ngesandla kubo bonke onyana ibakulisileyo. 
Isaiah51:19 Ezi zinto zombini zikuhlele; ngubanina oya kukuku̔za? ucitakalo notshabalalo, indlala nesiṙele: ndiya kukututuzela ngo banina?" 
Isaiah51:20 Onyana bako bawile; balele encameni yezitarate zonke, njengembabala elutanjeni; bazele bubuṙalaṙume bukayehova, kukutetisa kwotixo wako." 
Isaiah51:21 Ngoko, yiva ke oku, wena ubandezelweyo! wena unxilileyo, koko kungengayo iveyine!" 
Isaiah51:22 Itsho inkosi yako, uyehova, utixo wako, umteteleli wabantu bake, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiyisusile esandleni sako indebe yesizunguzane, intlenga zendebe yobuṙalaṙume bam; akusayi kupinda ukusela kuyo." 
Isaiah51:23 Kodwa ndoyibeka esandleni sabancinezeli bako, abate kuwe: Toba pantsi, ukuba sidlule pezu kwako; waza wawubeka umhlana wako ube njengomhlaba, nanjengesitarate kwabadlulayo." 
Isaiah52:1 Vuka, vuka, yambata amandla ako, Ziyone! yambata izivato zako ezihle, Yerusaleme, sixeko esingcwele! ngokuba kungasayi kubuya kungene kuwe ongalukileyo nonco̔lileyo."
