Isaiah52:2 Zivutulule elutulini: suka, uhlale pantsi, Yerusaleme! zicumbulule ezinxityeni zentamo yako, wena ntombi etinjiweyo yase‐Ziyone!" 
Isaiah52:3 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Nazitengisa kungeko nto; kanjalo niya kukululwa kungeko mali. 
Isaiah52:4 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Abantu bam behlela e‐Jipete ekuqaleni, ukuya kupambukela kona; wati um‐Asiriya ekupeleni wababandezela." 
Isaiah52:5 Nakaloku, ndinanto nina apa, utsho uyehova, ukuba kususwe abantu bam kungeko nto? abapati babo bayakala, utsho uyehova; kufuti imihla yonke igama lam ligxekwa." 
Isaiah52:6 Ngako oko abantu bam baya kulazi igama lam; ngako oko baya kwazi ngomhla lowo, ukuba ndinguye otetayo: nanku mna!" 
Isaiah52:7 Hai ukuba ntle kwazo pezu kwentaba inyawo zalowo ushumayelayo indaba ezimnandi, ovakalisayo uxolo, oshumayelayo okulungileyo, ovakalisayo usindiso, esiti kwi‐Ziyone: Utixo wako upete ubukumkani!" 
Isaiah52:8 Abalindi bako bopakamisa ilizwi; ngelizwi labo baya kuvuma kunye; ngokuba beya kubona iliso kwiliso, nxa uyehova aya kubuyisa i‐Ziyone." 
Isaiah52:9 Gqabukani, nivume kunye, zindawo ezicitakeleyo ze‐Yerusaleme! ngokuba uyehova etutuzele abantu bake; ukulule i‐Yerusaleme." 
Isaiah52:10 Uyehova uhlubile ingalo yake engcwele emehlweni azo zonke izizwe; nazo zonke izipelo zomhlaba ziya kubona usindiso lwotixo wetu. 
Isaiah52:11 Mukani, mukani, pumani kwa kona; okunco̔lileyo ningakucukumisi; pumani pakati kwayo; yibani mhlope, nina enitweleyo impahla zikayehova!" 
Isaiah52:12 Ngokuba ningayi kupuma ngobunxamo, kanjalo aniyi kuya ngentsabo; ngokuba uyehova eya kuhamba pambi kwenu, utixo ka‐Sirayeli wonibuta ngasemva." 
Isaiah52:13 BONA ke, isicaka sam siya kulungiseka; siya kwenzwa sikulu, siya kupakanyiswa, sobekwa pezulu kakulu." 
Isaiah52:14 Njengokuba bekutele nqa abaninzi, (kwakunjalo ukwonakala kwokubonakala kwaso ngapezu kwokwomntu, nokwesimilo saso ngapezu kwesonyana babantu,)" 
Isaiah52:15 kwa njalo siya kufefa izizwe ezininzi: ngenxa yaso okumkani baya kuvingca imilomo yabo; ngokuba oko bebengakubaliselwanga bokubona; noko bebengakuvanga bokuqonda. 
Isaiah53:1 Ngubanina okoliweyo yintshumayelo yetu? nengalo kayehova iya kutyilwa kubanina? 
Isaiah53:2 Ngokuba sibe sikula ebusweni babo njengesihlumelo, nanjengengcambo ipuma emhlabeni owomileyo: sasingenasimilo nasoya, ukuba sisigqale; kwa nokubonakala, ukuba sisinqwenele." 
Isaiah53:3 Sibe sidelwa salahlwa ngabantu, indoda yentsizi, nowazana nobuhlungu, kwada kwafihlwa ubuso kuso; sibe sidelwa, sati tina asasibuka." 
Isaiah53:4 Noko ke, zintlungu zetu sazifunqulayo, nentsizi zetu sazitwala; kanti tina sasibala ukuba sibetiwe, sibulewe ngutixo, sibandezelwe nguye." 
Isaiah53:5 Kodwa sasihlatywa ngenxa yezigqito zetu, sasityunyuzwa ngenxa yezikohlakalo zetu: ukwohlwayelwa uxolo lwetu bekupezu kwaso; nangemivimbo yaso sinokupiliswa." 
Isaiah53:6 Tina sonke, njengegusha, silahlekile; abanye ngabanye sijikele kwezetu indlela; kodwa uyehova uhlisile pezu kwaso ukukohlakala kwetu sonke." 
Isaiah53:7 Saxinwa, sabandezelwa, koko singavulanga umlomo waso; sar̔olwa njengemvana isiya ekuxe̔lweni, nanjengokuba igusha ebusweni babaguguli bayo isidenge, kwa njalo asivulanga umlomo waso." 
Isaiah53:8 Kwa sentolongweni nasekugwebeni sasisuswa; nesizukulwana saso ngubanina oya kusixela? ngokuba sibe sinqunyulwa emhlabeni wabahleliyo; ngenxa yokugqita kwabantu bam sasibetwa. 
Isaiah53:9 Kwamiselwa incw̔aba laso nabakohlakeleyo, koko sabesinesityebi ekufeni kwaso; ngokokuba besingenzanga ubudlwengu, nokuba bekungeko inkohliso emlonyeni waso." 
Isaiah53:10 Kodwa uyehova ebetanda ukusityumza; wasivisa ubuhlungu. Nxa siya kuzenza idini letyala, siya kubona inzalo, siya kwolula imihla, nentando kayehova iya kulungiseka esandleni saso." 
Isaiah53:11 Emva kwosizi lwompefumlo waso, so yi bona, sokoliswa: ngokwaziwa kwaso, isicaka sam esilungileyo sogwebela abaninzi; ngokuba izikohlakalo zabo siya kuzitwala." 
Isaiah53:12 Ngoko, ndiya kusahlulela isahlulo pakati kwabakulu; sasiya kwahlulelana nabanamandla amaxoba; ngenxa yokuba satululela ekufeni umpefumlo waso, sabalwa nabagqiti, nesono sabaninzi sasitwala, nabagqiti sabatandazela." 
Isaiah54:1 CULA, ludlolokazi, wena ungazalanga! gqabukela ekuculeni, udanduluke ngovuyo, wena obungenanimba! ngokuba abantwana balowo obeyedwa bebaninzi ngapezu kwabo abantwana bomfazi otshatileyo, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah54:2 Yenza banzi indawo yentente yako, nezikuselo zentlalo zako mabazitwabulule; ungaxaki; yolula intambo zako, nezibonda zako uziqinise." 
Isaiah54:3 Ngokuba uya kutyoboza ngasekunene nangasekohlo; inzalo yako yolidla ilifa labaheyideni, izenze izixeko ezitshabaleleyo zimiwe." 
Isaiah54:4 Ungoyiki, ngokuba ungayi kudaniswa! ungamatiswa kanjako, ngokuba ungayi kuviswa ihlazo: ngokuba udano lwobutsha bako uya kululibala, nehlazo lobuhlolokazi bako akusayi kuba salikumbula." 
Isaiah54:5 Ngokuba umenzi wako eyindoda yako; nguyehova wemikosi igama lake: nomkululi wako ungoyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli; uya kubizwa ngokuti ngutixo wawo wonke umhlaba. 
Isaiah54:6 Ngokuba njengomfazi oshiyiweyo, omoya ubuhlungu, uyehova ekubizile, na njeng omfazi wobutsha, nxa ubulahliwe, utsho utixo wako." 
Isaiah54:7 Ngexanyana elincinane ndikushiyile; kodwa ngezibele ezikulu ndokubuta. 
Isaiah54:8 Ngenkukulo yomsindo ndabufihlela ixanyana ubuso bam kuwe; kodwa ngobubele obungunapakade ndoba netaṙu ngakuwe, utsho umkululi wako, uyehova." 
Isaiah54:9 Ngokuba oku ku njeng amanzi ka‐Nowa kum: nje ngokuba bendifunga ukuba amanzi ka‐Nowa akayi kubuya agqitele pezu kwomhlaba, kwa njalo ndifungile ukuba andiyi kuba namsindo ngakuwe, nokuba andiyi kukutetisa." 
Isaiah54:10 Ngokuba intaba ziya kumka, nenduli ziya kushukunyiswa; kanti ububele bam abuyi kumka kuwe, nocebano lwoxolo lwam aluyi kushukunyiswa, utsho uyehova okupatayo ngetaṙu." 
Isaiah54:11 Wena ubandezelwayo, oxaliswayo, ongatutuzelwayo! bona ke, ndiya kulalisa amatye ako ngeqabo, ndikusekele ngesafire." 
Isaiah54:12 Ndandiya kwenza ifenstile zako ngerubi, namasango ako ngamatye abengezelayo, nayo yonke imida yako ngamatye anqabileyo." 
Isaiah54:13 Kanjalo bonke abantwana bako bofundiswa nguyehova; lwoba lukulu ke uxolo lwabantwana bako. 
Isaiah54:14 Uya kumiswa ebulungiseni; woba kude embandezelweni, ngokuba ungayi kwoyika; nasesitusweni, ngokuba singayi kusondela kuwe." 
Isaiah54:15 Ukuba baka babutelane, akuveli kum; osukuba ebutela ngakuwe wotelela kuwe." 
Isaiah54:16 Bona ke, ndiyenzile incibi evutelayo amalahle emlilweni, eyiku̔payo impahla yomsebenzi wayo; ndenzile nomtshabalalisi ukucitakalisa." 
Isaiah54:17 Akuko nanye impahla edaliwe ngakuwe eya kutamsanqeleka; nazo zonke ilwimi ezivuka ngakuwe ekugwebeni uya kuzigweba. Oku kulilifa lezicaka zikayehova; nobulungisa bazo buvela kum, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah55:1 HOI! bonke abanxaniweyo, yizani emanzini, nalowo ongenamali; yizani, tengani nidle; ewe, yizani, tengani iveyine namasi, kungeko imali, kungeko naxabiso." 
Isaiah55:2 Kunganina ukuba ninike imali ngenxa yokungesisonka, nenzuzo yenu ngenxa yokungahlutisiyo? Kutalani ukupulapula kum, nize nidle okumnandi, nomxe̔lo wenu mauziyolise ngobunqata." 
Isaiah55:3 Tobani indlebe yenu, nize kum; yivani, ukuba kupile umpefumlo wenu; ndandiya kulwenza nani ucebano olungunapakade, izibele eziqinisekileyo zika‐Davide." 
Isaiah55:4 Bona ke, ndimnikile abe linqi̔na ebantwini, inkosi nompati wabantu." 
Isaiah55:5 Bona ke, isizwe ubungasazi uya kusibiza, nesizwe esibe singazi wena sobalekela kuwe, ngenxa yake uyehova, utixo wako, nangenxa yake oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, okuhombileyo." 
Isaiah55:6 Funani uyehova nxa angafunyanwayo; bizani kuye nxa akoyo kufupi: 
Isaiah55:7 okohlakeleyo makashiye indlela yake, nongalungileyo inkumbulo zake; makabuyele kuyehova, woba nezibele kuye; na kutixo wetu, ngokuba eya kuxolela kakulu." 
Isaiah55:8 Ngokuba inkumbulo zenu azizizo inkumbulo zam; kanjako indlela zenu azizizo indlela zam, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah55:9 Ngokuba, njengokuba amazulu epezulu pezu kwomhlaba, kwa njalo indlela zam zipezulu pezu kwendlela zenu, nenkumbulo zam pezu kwenkumbulo zenu." 
Isaiah55:10 Ngokuba, njengokuba isihla imvula nengqweqwe ezulwini, ize ingabuyeli kona, koko iwunyela umhlaba, iwenze ukuba uvelise nokuba uhlumise, ukuze unike imbewu kuye ohlwayelayo, nesonka kuye odlayo;" 
Isaiah55:11 loba njalo ilizwi lam, elipumayo emlonyeni wam; aliyi kubuyela kum lingenanto; kodwa liya kufeza oko endikutandayo, laliya kutamsanqeleka koko endituma ngako." 
Isaiah55:12 Ngokuba niya kupuma ngovuyo, niya kupelekelelwa ngoxolo; intaba nenduli ziya kugqabukela ekuculeni pambi kwenu, nayo yonke imiti yasendle iya kwenza intlombe." 
Isaiah55:13 Endaweni yomnga wopuma umti weberoshe, nasendaweni yomtolo wopuma umti wemutele: kwakuya kuba ligama kuyehova, n omqondiso ongunapakade ongasayi kunqanyulwa." 
Isaiah56:1 UTSHO uyehova ukuti: Gcinani ubugwebo, nikwenze okulungileyo; ngokuba usindiso lwam lukufupi ukufika, nobulungisa bam ukutyilwa." 
Isaiah56:2 Unetamsanqa umntu owenza oku, nonyana womntu obambelela kuko; ogcina isabata, ukuba angayinco̔lisi; ogcina isandla sake, ukuba angayenzi nanye into ekohlakeleyo." 
Isaiah56:3 Kanjako owasemzini, ozibandakanyele kuyehova, makangatsho esiti: Uyehova ugqibele ukundahlula ebantwini bake; nomtenwa makangati: Bona ke, ndingumti owomileyo." 
Isaiah56:4 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova kubatenwa abagcinayo isabata zam, abanyulayo oko ndikoliswa kuko, bebambelela kulo ucebano lwam, ukuti:" 
Isaiah56:5 Sendiya kubanika pakati kwendlu yam, napakati kwendonga zam, inkumbuzo negama elilungileyo pezu kwonyana nentombi; igama elingunapakade ndolinika kubo elingayi kunqanyulwa." 
Isaiah56:6 Nabasemzini, abazibandakanyela kuyehova, ukuba bamkonze, nokuba batande igama likayehova, babe zizicaka zake, bonke abayigcinayo isabata, bengayinco̔lisi, ababambelela kulo ucebano lwam;" 
Isaiah56:7 sendiya kubazisa entabeni yam eyingcwele, ndibavuyise endlwini yam yokutandaza; amadini okutshiswa abo nemibingo yabo yoba ikolekile pezu kwesibingelo sam; ngokuba indlu yam iya kubizwa ngokuti yindlu yokutandaza kubo bonke abantu." 
Isaiah56:8 Iti inkosi e nguyehova, lowo ubutayo abagxotiweyo bakwa‐Sirayeli: Abanye ndobabutela kuye, ngapandle kwabo ababutiweyo bake." 
Isaiah56:9 YIZANI nonke nina maṙamncwa asendle! yizani ukudla, nonke nina maṙamncwa asehlatini!" 
Isaiah56:10 Abalindi bake bazimfama; bonke ngabangenakwazi; bonke bazizinja ezizidenge; bakohlwa kukukonkota; bengabapupi, belala pantsi, betanda ukwozela." 
Isaiah56:11 Ewe, bazizinja ezibawayo, ezingakwazi ukuhlutiswa; nabo abangabalusi abakwazi ukuqonda: bonke bayajikela kweyabo indlela, abanye ngabanye ngenxa yokuzuza kwabo esipelweni sabo." 
Isaiah56:12 Bati: Yizani, ndiya kuzeka iveyine, size sizinxilise ngoselo olunamandla; ngokuba imini yangomso iya kuba njengalé, ewe, iya kugqitisela ngento enkulu." 
Isaiah57:1 Olungileyo uyabuba, kanti akuko mntu okubekelayo intliziyo; abantu abanobubele bayasuswa nabo, kungeko oqondayo ukuba olungileyo uyasuswa elishweni." 
Isaiah57:2 Uyangena eluxolweni; bayapumla ezililini zabo; bonke abalungisa ukuhamba kwabo. 
Isaiah57:3 Nina kodwa, sondelani apa, bonyana besanusekazi! nina nzalo yomṙexezi nengnawokazi!" 
Isaiah57:4 Kungakubanina nizifeketisa? kungakubanina niwakamisa umlomo, nilwolulise ulwimi? asi nini na abangabantwana besigqito, inzalo yobuxoki," 
Isaiah57:5 nitshiswa yinkanuko ngezitixo pantsi kwayo yonke imiti eluhlaza, nibulala abantwana ezintilini, ngapantsi kwamaṙoba amawa?" 
Isaiah57:6 Pakati kwawo amatye agudileyo asentilini kuko isahlulelwa sako; ngawo wona aliqashiswa lako; uwutululele kwa kuwo umnikelo wokusela, wawenza umnikelo wokudla. Sendiya kututuzeleka pezu kwezizinto na?" 
Isaiah57:7 Pezu kwentaba ende epakamileyo uwubekile umandlalo wako; ewe, unyukele kona ukuya kubinga umbingo." 
Isaiah57:8 Kanjalo ngasemva kwalo ucango, nomgubasi, uyibekile inkumbuzo yako; ngokuba uzityilele ongendim; unyukile; uwenze banzi umandlalo wako; uzenzele ucebano nabo; utandile umandlalo wabo; wafuna indawo." 
Isaiah57:9 Wahambela kukumkani neoli, wazandisa izinukamnandi zako; watuma izigidimi zako ziye kude, watobela pantsi kude kube sehadesi." 
Isaiah57:10 Ubudiniwe ngokuba kude kwendlela yako; noko, akutshongo ukuti: Akuko itemba; ubomi besandla sako ubufumene; ngako oko akuncamanga." 
Isaiah57:11 Ngubanina umxa̔leleyo wamoyika, ukuba uxokisile, ungakumbulanga mna, unga ndi bekelanga nentliziyo yako? bendingati cwaka kwa kade na, ungandoyikanga noko?" 
Isaiah57:12 Ndiya kuxela ubulungisa bako, nezenzo zako: ngokuba zingayi kukunceda nto." 
Isaiah57:13 Xeshekweni ukalayo, mazikukulule imbuto zako! kodwa zona zonke umoya wozimkisa; impepeto iya kuzisusa. Kodwa lowo utembela kum wolifuya ilizwe, adle ilifa lentaba yam eyingcwele." 
Isaiah57:14 Kwakuya kutiwa: Poselani, poselani; lungisani indlela; dedisani isiku̔bekiso endleleni yabantu bam." 
Isaiah57:15 Ngokuba esitsho yena opezulu opakamileyo, ohleli kunapakade, ogama liyingcwele, ukuti: Ndihleli kwepezulu neyingcwele indawo, kwa nalowo omoya ugqobokileyo notobekileyo; ukuba kupiliswe umoya wabatobekileyo, nokuba kupiliswe intliziyo yabagqobokileyo." 
Isaiah57:16 Ngokuba ndingayi kuba ngunapakade ndipika; kanjalo andiyi kuba ngamaxesha onke ndiqumbile: ngokuba umoya ubuya kucubuka pambi kwam, nemipefumlo endiyenzileyo." 
Isaiah57:17 Ngenxa yenkohlakalo yenzuzo yake engalungileyo bendiqumbile, ndambeta; ndazimela, ndaqumba ke; waza wamana ejikajika endleleni yentliziyo yake." 
Isaiah57:18 Ndizibonile indlela zake, ndandiya kumpilisa; ndiya kumkokela kanjalo, ndibuyekeze izonwabiso kuye, nakubalili bake;" 
Isaiah57:19 ndisenza isixakato somlomo: uxolo, uxolo kulowo ukude nakulowo ukufupi, utsho uyehova; ndandiya kumpilisa." 
Isaiah57:20 Kodwa abakohlakeleyo banjengolwandle olulwayo, nxa lukohliwe kukuzola, olumanzi aku̔pa inkunkuma nodaka." 
Isaiah57:21 Akuko uxolo, utsho utixo wam, kwabakohlakeleyo." 
Isaiah58:1 DANDULUKA kakulu, ungayeki; pakamisa ilizwi lako njengexilongo, uxele ebantwini bam isigqito sabo, nakwindlu ka‐Yakobi isono sabo." 
Isaiah58:2 Noko, imihla ngemihla bayandifuna, nendlela zam bayatanda ukuzazi; njengesizwe esenzayo ubulungisa, nommiselo wotixo waso asiwushiyi; bayabiza kum imimiselo elungileyo; bayatanda ukusondela kutixo." 
Isaiah58:3 Bati: Kunganina ukuba sizilile, kanti akuboni; nokuba sibandezele umpefumlo wetu, kanti akwazi? Bona ke, ngemini yokuzila kwenu niyafuna imihlali, nayo yonke imisebenzi yenu niyayibanga." 
Isaiah58:4 Bona ke, nizilela ukupika nokungxolisana, nokudubula ngesandla esifunjatiweyo sencwangu: ngeningazili njengokwanamhla, ukuvakalisa ngokupezulu ilizwi lenu." 
Isaiah58:5 Yinzilo enje na endiyinyulileyo? umhla wokuba umntu abandezele umpefumlo wake na? ukuba atokombise intloko yake njengomkanzi na, azandlalele intlakantlaka notutu na? Le woyibiza na ngokuti yinzilo, nemini ekolekileyo kuyehova?" 
Isaiah58:6 Asi yile na inzilo ndiyinyulileyo? ukucumbulula izibambo zencwangu, ukutukulula intambo zeyokwe, nokundulula abancinezelweyo bekululekile, nokuba nizapule iyokwe zonke." 
Isaiah58:7 Asi kuko na ukuqezulela olambileyo isonka sako, nokuba ungenise endlwini amahlwempu atshutshisiweyo; nxa ubona ohamba zé, ukuba umambese, nokuba ungazifihli kweyako inyama?" 
Isaiah58:8 Oko kuya kugqabuka ukukanya kwako njengokusa, nokupila kwako kuya kuhluma kamsinyane; kanjalo ubulungisa bako bohamba pambi kwako; ubungcwalisa bukayehova bokubuta ngasemva." 
Isaiah58:9 Oko uya kubiza, asabele uyehova; uya kukala, ati yena: Nanku mna! Ukuba uyasusa pakati kwako iyokwe, ukwalata ngomnwe, nokuteta okukohlakeleyo;" 
Isaiah58:10 ukuba uyamku̔pela olambileyo umxe̔lo wako, nomxe̔lo wobandezelweyo uyawuhlutisa; kuya kwandula kupume ukukanya kwako ebumnyameni, nesitokotoko sako sibe njengemini enkulu." 
Isaiah58:11 Waye uyehova eya kumana ekukokela futi, awuhlutise umxe̔lo wako ekwomeni okukulu; namatambo ako uya kuwomeleza; wauya kuba njengomyezo ocenceshiweyo, nanjengetende elimanzi angatshitshiyo." 
Isaiah58:12 Kanjalo abo bavela kuwe bobuya bake indawo ezicitakeleyo zakudala; imisekelo yezizukulwana ngezizukulwana uya kuyimisa; wauya kubizwa ngokuti: Umakeli wotanda, umhlaziyi wendlela ukuba kuhlalwe." 
Isaiah58:13 Ukuba uyanqanda unyawo lwako kuyo isabata, ungenzi eyako intando ngawo umhla wam oyingcwele; ukuba uyabiza isabata ngokuti sisiyolo, umhla oyingcwele kayehova ngokuti ubekekile: uze uwubeke, ungenzi ezako indlela, ungafuni eyako intando, ungateti awako amazwi:" 
Isaiah58:14 uya kwandula ukuziyolisa kuyehova; ndandiya kukukwelisa pezu kwendawo ezipakamileyo zomhlaba, ndikudlise ilifa lika‐Yakobi uyihlo wako: ngokuba umlomo kayehova utshilo." 
Isaiah59:1 BONA ke, isandla sikayehova asifinyezekile, ukuba asingesindise: nendlebe yake ayinzima, ukuba ayingeve." 
Isaiah59:2 Koko izikohlakalo zenu zenze isahlulo pakati kwenu notixo wenu; nezono zenu zisitelisile ubuso bake kuni, ukuba angeva." 
Isaiah59:3 Ngokuba izandla zenu zidyojiwe ngegazi, neminwe yenu ngenkohlakalo; umlomo wenu utetile ubuxoki, ulwimi lwenu ludumzele ubumenemene." 
Isaiah59:4 Akuko omemela ubulungisa, akuko opikela inyaniso; bayatembela kokungento, batete okungendawo; bayakaula ububi, bazale inkohlakalo." 
Isaiah59:5 Bayawaqandulela amaqanda ebasiliske, bayiluke imisonto yesigcawo; odlayo kuwo amaqanda abo uya kufa, nelo lincinezelweyo inyushu yopuma kulo." 
Isaiah59:6 Imisonto yabo ayiyi kuba yingubo, kanjalo abayi kuzigubungela ngemisebenzi yabo; imisebenzi yabo yimisebenzi yenkohlakalo, nesenzo sobudlwengu sisezandleni zabo." 
Isaiah59:7 Inyawo zabo ziyabalekela ububi, bayanxama ukupalaza igazi elingenatyala; amaqinga abo ngamaqinga enkohlakalo; ucitakalo notshabalalo lusemendweni yabo." 
Isaiah59:8 Indlela yoxolo abayazi; akuko ubugwebo nasemizileni yabo; bazenzele indlela ezigoso; bonke abahamba ngazo abalwazi uxolo. 
Isaiah59:9 Ngako oko ubugwebo bukude kuti, nobulungisa abusifumani; siyalinda ukukanya, kodwa nabu ubumnyama, siyalinda ukukazimla, koko sihamba esitokotokweni." 
Isaiah59:10 Njengabazimfama siyaputaputela udonga; njengabo abangenamehlo siyaputaputa: siyaku̔beka emini enkulu, njengaseluncwalazini; sisezindaweni ezimnyama njengabafileyo." 
Isaiah59:11 Siyavungama njengebere tina sonke, nanjengamahobe siyamana sincwina; siyalinda ubugwebo, kodwa abuko; siyalinda usindiso, koko lukude kuti." 
Isaiah59:12 Ngokuba izigqito zetu zininzi pambi kwako, nezono zetu zinqi̔na ngakuti; ngokuba izigqito zetu zinati, nezikohlakalo zetu siyazazi:" 
Isaiah59:13 ngokugqita nangokuxoka ngakuye uyehova, nangokuhlehla kutixo wetu; ngokuteta imbandezelo nempambuko: ngokucamngca nangokudumzela entliziyweni amazwi obuxoki." 
Isaiah59:14 Kanjalo ubugwebo buhlehlisiwe ngomva, nobulungisa buyagwegweda kude; ngokuba inyaniso iku̔bekile enkundleni, nokulunga kukohliwe kukungena." 
Isaiah59:15 Ewe, inyaniso ayibonakali, nalowo upambukayo kokubi, uyazenza into yokupangwa. Wati uyehova wabona, kwaza kwakubi emehlweni ake, ngokuba kungeko bugwebo." 
Isaiah59:16 Wayebona ukuba akuko mntu, wati nqa ukuba akuko mteteleli; ngako eyake ingalo wamenzela usindiso, nobulungisa bake bona bamsekela." 
Isaiah59:17 Wavata ubulungisa njengehempe yentsimbi, nomnqwazi wosindiso wawufaka entlokweni yake; wavata ingubo zempindezelo zibe sisivato, wambata ubukwele njengesigubungelo." 
Isaiah59:18 Njengokwezenzo zabo, kwoba njalo ukubuyekeza kwake: ubuṙalaṙume kubalane bake, impindezelo ezintshabeni zake: kuzo iziqiti wobuyekeza impindezelo." 
Isaiah59:19 Baya kwandula boyike igama likayehova entshonalanga, nobungcwalisa bake kwa sekupumeni kwelanga: nxa utshaba luya kuza njengomlambo, umoya kayehova wopakamisa ibanile ngakulo." 
Isaiah59:20 Waeya kuza umkululi kwi‐Ziyone, nakubo ababuya esigqitweni kwa‐Yakobi, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah59:21 Ngokuba mna, olu lucebano lwam nabo, utsho uyehova: umoya wam opezu kwako, namazwi am endiwabekileyo emlonyeni wako, akayi kumka emlonyeni wako, nasemlonyeni wenzalo yako, nasemlonyeni wenzalo yenzalo yako, utsho uyehova, kwa kaloku nje, nakude kube ngunapakade." 
Isaiah60:1 PAKAMA, kanya, ngokuba ukukanya kwako kufikile, nobungcwalisa bukayehova bupumile pezu kwako." 
Isaiah60:2 Ngokuba, bona ke, ubumnyama bogubungela umhlaba, nesitokotoko abantu; kodwa pezu kwako uyehova uya kupuma, nobungcwalisa bake bobonakala pezu kwako." 
Isaiah60:3 Babeya kuza abaheyideni ekukanyeni kwako, nokumkani ekukazimleni kwokupuma kwako." 
Isaiah60:4 Pakamisa amehlo ako ngento engqongayo, ukangele; bona bonke bayazihlanganisa, bayeza kuwe: onyana bako bovela kwa kude, nentombi zako ziya kubelekwa ecaleni." 
Isaiah60:5 Oko uya kukangela, ukanyiswe ke; intliziyo yako iya kuntontoza, yande; ngokuba ubuninzi bolwandle buya kuguqulelwa kuwe, ubutyebi babaheyideni bofika kuwe." 
Isaiah60:6 Ingxokolo yenkamela yokugubungela, inkamela ezintsha zase‐Midiyane ne‐Hefa; ezase‐Sheba ziya kuza zonke; igolide nentlakamhlope zozitwala, nendunyiswa zikayehova ziya kuzishumayela." 
Isaiah60:7 Zonke igusha zakwa‐Kedare zohlanganiselwa kuwe; inkunzi zegusha zakwa‐Nebayoti zokukonza; ziya kunyuka ngokubukwa pezu kwesibingelo sam, nendlu entle yam ndoyihomba." 
Isaiah60:8 Ngobanina aba, ababalekayo njengelifu, nanjengamahobe ukuya ezindlwini zawo?" 
Isaiah60:9 Ngenyaniso iziqiti ziya kukangela kum, nenqanawa zase‐Tareshishe ukuqala; kuveliswe onyana bako kwa kude, isilivere yabo negolide yabo inabo, ukuza egameni likayehova, utixo wako, nakoyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli, okuhombileyo." 
Isaiah60:10 Kanjalo abasemzini baya kwaka indonga zako, nokumkani babo bokukonza; ngokuba ngomsindo wam ndikubetile, kodwa ngembuko yam ndoba nezibele kuwe." 
Isaiah60:11 Ngako amasango ako oba evulekile futi; emini nasebusuku akayi kuvalwa; kuze kungeniswe kuwe ubutyebi babaheyideni, nokumkani babo baqoqoziselwe kuwe." 
Isaiah60:12 Ngokuba esosizwe nobobukumkani ezingayi kukonza kuwe ziya kutshabalala; ewe, ezozizwe zogqityelwa ukucitakaliswa." 
Isaiah60:13 Ubungcwalisa be‐Lebanone boza kuwe, umti weberoshe, nowetidara, nowetashure kwa kunye; kuze kuhonjwe indawo eyingcwele yam; nendawo yenyawo zam ndoyenza bungcwalisa." 
Isaiah60:14 Boti nonyana bababandezeli bako beze kuwe ngokuguqa; nabo bonke ababekudela boziqubuda ngasemizantsini zenyawo zako; babeya kukubiza ngokuti, sisixeko sikayehova, yi‐Ziyone, yoyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli." 
Isaiah60:15 Ekubeni ubushiyiwe watiywa, kwada akwabiko mntu obecanda kuwe, sendiya kukwenza indluliselo engunapakade, uvuyiso lwezizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Isaiah60:16 Wauya kwanya amasi abaheyideni; ewe, ibele labo okumkani uya kulanya; wauya kwazi ukuba mna Yehova ndingumsindisi wako, nomkululi wako, usomandla ka‐Yakobi." 
Isaiah60:17 Endaweni yobedu, ndoyizisa igolide; nasendaweni yesincete, ndoyizisa isilivere; nasendaweni yemiti, ubedu; nasendaweni yamatye, isincete: ndandiya kubenza abongama bako babe noxolo, nabapati bako babe nobulungisa." 
Isaiah60:18 Ubudlwengu abuyi kubuya buviwe elizweni lako, kwa n ocitakalo notshabalalo pakati kwemida yako; koko uya kubiza indonga zako ngokuti lusindiso, namasango ako ngokuti ludumiso." 
Isaiah60:19 Ilanga aliyi kubuya libe sisikanyiso kuwe ngemini; kanjalo inyanga ayiyi kukukanyisa ngenkazimlo; ngokuba uyehova eya kuba sisikanyiso esingunapakade kuwe, notixo wako woba bubuhle bako." 
Isaiah60:20 Ilanga lako aliyi kubuya litshone, nenyanga yako ayiyi kuselwa; ngokuba uyehova eya kuba sisikanyiso esingunapakade kuwe, iti imihla yokulila kwako ibe nokupela." 
Isaiah60:21 Nabantu bako, bona bonke boba ngabalungileyo; bolidla ilifa lelizwe ngonapakade; isebe lokutyala kwam, umsebenzi wezandla zam, ukuba ndenzelwe ubungcwalisa." 
Isaiah60:22 Omncinane woba liwaka, nomkudlwana woba sisizwe esinamandla. Mna Yehova ndokukaulezisa oku exesheni lako." 
Isaiah61:1 UMOYA wenkosi uyehova upezu kwam; ngokokuba uyehova enditambisele ukushumayela indaba ezimnandi kwabatotyiweyo; unditumele ukubopa abantliziyo zigqobokileyo, ukuxela kwabatinjiweyo inkululeko, nakwababanjiweyo ukuvulwa kwentolongo;" 
Isaiah61:2 ukuxela umnyaka okolekileyo kayehova, nomhla wempindezelo katixo wetu; ukututuzela bonke abalilayo;" 
Isaiah61:3 ukumisela abo balilayo e‐Ziyone umgcobo; ukubanika ubuhle endaweni yotutu, ioli yovuyo endaweni yolilo, isambato sodumo endaweni yomoya wokuncama; ukuba babizwe ngokuba yimiti yobulungisa, isityalo sikayehova; ukuze enzelwe ubungcwalisa." 
Isaiah61:4 Babeya kwaka indawo ezicitakeleyo zakudala, babuye bamise indawo ezitshabaleleyo zapambili; bohlaziya izixeko ezicitiweyo, indawo ezitshabaleleyo zezizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Isaiah61:5 Abasemzini baya kuma bayaluse imihlambi yenu, nabolunye uhlanga boba ngabalimi bomhlaba wenu nabalimi bemiti yeveyine yenu." 
Isaiah61:6 Kodwa nina, niya kubizwa ngokuba ngabaperisite bakayehova; kwotiwa ningabakonzi botixo wetu; ubutyebi babaheyideni niya kubudla, nasebungcwaliseni babo niya kuqa̔yisa." 
Isaiah61:7 Endaweni yokudana kwenu kwoba kukuduma okupindiweyo; na sendaweni yehlazo, baya kugcoba ngesabelwa sabo; ngokuba elizweni labo beya kuzuza ilifa elipindiweyo, uvuyo olungunapakade lwobako kubo." 
Isaiah61:8 Ngokuba mna Yehova ndibutanda ubugwebo, ndiyitiya impango yobumenemene; ndandiya kunika umvuzo wabo ngenyaniso, nocebano olungunapakade ndolwenza nabo." 
Isaiah61:9 Yaiya kwaziwa inzalo yabo pakati kwabaheyideni, nabantwana babo pakati kwezizwe: bonke abababonayo bobavuma ukuba bayinzalo etanyusanqelweyo nguyehova." 
Isaiah61:10 Ndiya kugcoba kakulu kuyehova; umpefumlo wam wovuyelela kutixo wam; ngokuba endambatisile ngezivato zosindiso; ingubo yobulungisa undinamekisile ngayo; njengokuba umyeni ezivatisa ngezivato ezihle, nanjengokuba umtshakazi ezihomba ngezihombo zake." 
Isaiah61:11 Ngokuba, njengokuba umhlaba uvelisa ukucu̔ma kwawo, nanjengokuba umyezo uhlumisa okuhlwayelweyo kuwo, kwa njalo inkosi e nguyehova iya kuhlumisa ubulungisa nendumiso pambi kwezizwe zonke." 
Isaiah62:1 Ngenxa ye‐Ziyone andiyi kuti cwaka, nangenxa ye‐Yerusaleme andiyi kuhlala nditi tu, kude kupume ubulungisa bayo njengenkazimlo, nosindiswa lwayo njengesibane esivutayo." 
Isaiah62:2 Abaheyideni baya kubona ubulungisa bako, nokumkani bonke ubungcwalisa bako; wauya kubizwa ngegama elitsha, eliya kuxelwa ngumlomo kayehova." 
Isaiah62:3 Woba yikrone entle esandleni sikayehova, nonkontsho lwobukumkani esandleni sotixo wako." 
Isaiah62:4 Akuyi kubuya kutiwe ngawe, ungoshiyiweyo; nelizwe lako akuyi kubuya kutiwe ngalo, liyingcitakalo: koko uya kubizwa ngokuti, intando yam ikuyo; nelizwe lako ngokuti, ngumfazi otshatileyo: ngokuba uyehova eya kukutanda, nelizwe lako loba litshatile." 
Isaiah62:5 Ngokuba, njengokuba indodana itshata nentombi ipela, kwa njalo onyana bako baya kutshata nawe; na njengokuba umyeni egcoba pezu kwomtshakazi, kwa njalo utixo wako wogcoba pezu kwako." 
Isaiah62:6 Pezu kwendonga zako, Yerusaleme! ndibamisile abalindi; imini yonke nobusuku bonke abayi kuti cwaka napakade: nina nikankanyayo uyehova, ningati tu!" 
Isaiah62:7 kanjalo ningavumi ati tu yena, kude ayiqinise, nakude ayenze i‐Yerusaleme ibe yindunyiswa emhlabeni." 
Isaiah62:8 Uyehova ufungile isandla sake sokunene, nengalo yake enamandla, esiti: Andisayi kupinda ndinike inqolowa yako ibe kukutya ezintshabeni zako, kanjalo abolunye uhlanga abasayi kusela iveyine yako, leyo uyisebenzeleyo." 
Isaiah62:9 Kodwa abo bayivunayo baya kuyidla, badumise uyehova; nabo bayibutayo boyisela emakusini angcwele am." 
Isaiah62:10 Dlulani, dlulani ngamasango; lungisani indlela yabantu; poselani, poselani indlela epakamileyo; yidediseni ematyeni; yipakamiseleni abantu ibanile." 
Isaiah62:11 Bona ke, uyehova uvakalisile esipelweni somhlaba ukuti: Yitini kwintombi yase‐Ziyone: Nanku umsindisi wako esiza; bona ke, umvuzo wake unaye, nenzuzo yake isebusweni bake." 
Isaiah62:12 Babeya kubizwa bona ngokuti, ngabantu abangcwele, ngabakululweyo bakayehova: wauya kubizwa wena ngokuti, ungofuniweyo, usisixeko esingashiywanga." 
Isaiah63:1 NGUBANINA lo ozayo evela e‐Edome, enengubo ezimbejembeje evela e‐Botsera; lo, oyingcwalisa ekuvateni kwake, ehamba kuhle ebukulwini bobomelelo bake? Ndim, otetayo ngobulungisa, onamandla ukusindisa." 
Isaiah63:2 Yinina ukuba ubomvu ekuvateni kwako, nengubo zako ukuba zinjengezalowo uxovulayo efatyeni yeveyine?" 
Isaiah63:3 Isincinezelo seveyine ndisixovulile ndedwa, nakubo abantu bekungeko namnye kunye nam; ndabaxovula ngengqumbo yam, ndabanyatela ngobuṙalaṙume bam; laza igazi labo lacapazelwa pezu kwengubo zam, nazo zonke izivato zam ndizidyobile." 
Isaiah63:4 Ngokuba umhla wempindezelo ubusentliziyweni yam, nomnyaka wabakululweyo bam ubufikile." 
Isaiah63:5 Ndakangela ke, koko bekungeko umncedi; ndati nqa ukuba bekungeko umsekeli: yaza eyam ingalo yandenzela usindiso, nobuṙalaṙume bam bona bandisekela." 
Isaiah63:6 Ndanyatela pantsi abantu ekuqumbeni kwam, ndabanxilisa ekuṙaleni kwam; ndati igazi labo ndalihlisela emhlabeni." 
Isaiah63:7 NDIYA kukankanya izibele zikayehova, indunyiswa zikayehova, njengokwako konke uyehova usenzele kona, nokulunga okukulu ngakuyo indlu ka‐Sirayeli, owabenzela kona njengokwenceba zake, nanjengokwobuninzi bezibele zake." 
Isaiah63:8 Ngokuba ebesiti: Ngenyaniso bangabantu bam, usapo o lungayi kuxoka; ngako waba ngumsindisi wabo." 
Isaiah63:9 Kubo bonke ubunzima babo wanobunzima yena, yaza ingelosi yobuso bake yabasindisa; ngotando lwake nangobubele bake wabakulula; wabafunqula, wabatwala yonke imihla yakudala." 
Isaiah63:10 Bala bona noko, bamqumbisa u‐Moya wake oyi‐Ngcwele; ngako waguqulwa waba lutshaba lwabo, walwa ngakubo." 
Isaiah63:11 Koko wakumbula imihla yakudala, u‐Mosesi, n abantu bake. Upina lowo owabanyusayo elwandle, kunye nabalusi bomhlambi wake? Upina lowo owabekayo u‐Moya wake oyi‐Ngcwele pakati kwabo;" 
Isaiah63:12 lowo owenzayo ingalo yake ebungcwalisa iye ngasesandleni sokunene sika‐Mosesi, ecanda amanzi pambi kwabo, ukuba azenzele igama elingunapakade;" 
Isaiah63:13 lowo owabakokela ezinzulwini? njengehashe entlango, abaku̔beka." 
Isaiah63:14 Njengokuba inkomo ihlela emhlanjeni, umoya kayehova wabanika ukupumla: kwa njalo wabukapa abantu bako, ukuba uzenzele igama elibungcwalisa." 
Isaiah63:15 Kangela pantsi kwa sezulwini, ubone usekayeni lobungcwele bako nelenkazimlo yako: bupina ubukwele bako namandla ako, ukuxuxuzela kwombilini wako nenceba zako ngakum? zinyanzelekile na?" 
Isaiah63:16 Ngenyaniso wena ungubawo wetu, nakuba u‐Abrahame angenokusazi, ati u‐Sirayeli angasivumi: wena, Yehova! ungubawo wetu, umkululi wetu; igama lako lelingunapakade." 
Isaiah63:17 Kunganina. Yehova! ukuba usilahlekisile ezindleleni zako, nokuba uyenze lukuni intliziyo yetu, size singakwoyiki? Buya ngenxa yezicaka zako, izizwe zelifa lako." 
Isaiah63:18 Lixesha elincinane ababelifuya abantu bako abangcwele; intshaba zetu zinyatele pantsi eyingcwele indawo yako. 
Isaiah63:19 Sibe si njengabo ubungapati ubukosi pezu kwabo napakade, abangabizwanga ngegama lako." 
Isaiah64:1 Akwaba ubuya kuṙazula amazulu, uhle ke; ziti intaba zizamazame ebusweni bako!" 
Isaiah64:2 Njengokuba umlilo upemba intsasa, njengokuba umlilo uwenza amanzi ayaluzele; uti kwa njalo ulazise igama lako ezintshabeni zako, ukuba izizwe zingcangcazele ebusweni bako." 
Isaiah64:3 Wati wakuzenza izinto ezoyikekileyo, esingazikangelanga, wehla wena; intaba zazamazama ebusweni bako." 
Isaiah64:4 Akuviwanga kwa napakade, akuqiqwanga yindlebe, akubonwanga liliso utixo ngapandle kwako, o wenzelela yena omlindayo." 
Isaiah64:5 Uyakaulelana nalowo ugcobayo nowenza okulungileyo, abo bakukumbulayo ezindleleni zako: bona ke, wena uqumbile, ngokuba sonile; kodwa ngenxa yokuba zingunapakade, ngako siya kusindiswa." 
Isaiah64:6 Koko sinjengento enco̔lileyo tina sonke, nako konke ukulunga kwetu kunjengeqiya eyintshontsho; siyabuna tina sonke njengegqabi, nezikohlakalo zetu, njengomoya, ziyasimkisa." 
Isaiah64:7 Kanjalo akuko namnye obizayo egameni lako, ozivusayo ukuba abambelele kuwe: ngokuba ubuso bako ubufihlile kuti, wasinyibilikisa ngezono zetu." 
Isaiah64:8 Kodwa kaloku, Yehova! ungubawo wetu; tina silulo udongwe, nawe unguye umbumbi wetu; singumsebenzi wesandla sako tina sonke." 
Isaiah64:9 Ungaqumbi, Yehova! kude kube kakulu; ungakumbuli kude kube ngunapakade inkohlakalo: bona, zukangele ke, tina sonke singabantu bako." 
Isaiah64:10 Izixeko zako ezingcwele ziyintlango; i‐Ziyone iyintlango; i‐Yerusaleme iyingcitakalo. 
Isaiah64:11 Indlu yetu eyingcwele entle, leyo obawo betu bakudumisa kuyo, itshisiwe ngomlilo; nazo zonke izinto zetu ezinqwenelekileyo zicitakalisiwe." 
Isaiah64:12 Uya kuzinyanzela pezu kwezi zinto na, Yehova? woba uti cwaka na, usibandezele kude kube kakulu na?" 
Isaiah65:1 NDIBUZELWE ngabo abanga ndi buzanga; ndifunyenwe ngabo abangandifunanga: ndite: Ndibone! ndibone! kwisizwe esingabizwayo ngegama lam. 
Isaiah65:2 Ndizitwabulule izandla zam imini yonke ngasebantwini abanenkani, abahambayo endleleni engalungileyo, ukulandela awabo amaqinga;" 
Isaiah65:3 abantu abandiqumbisayo ngasebusweni bam futi; ababingayo emiyezweni, bequ̔misa pezu kwezitene;" 
Isaiah65:4 abahlala emancw̔abeni, balalise ezindaweni ezifihlakeleyo; abadlayo inyama yehangu, nabazitya zinomhluzi wezinto ezidlubukileyo;" 
Isaiah65:5 abati: Kwelela wena, ungasondeli kum; ngokuba ndikugqitisile ngobungcwele. Aba bangumsi empumlweni yam, umlilo otshayo imini yonke." 
Isaiah65:6 Bona ke, kuba̔liwe ebusweni bam: andiyi kuti cwaka, koko ndiya kupindezela; ewe, ndiya kupindezelela esifubeni sabo," 
Isaiah65:7 izikohlakalo zenu nezikohlakalo zoyihlo benu kwa kunye, utsho uyehova, abaqu̔misayo pezu kwentaba, bandigxeka pezu kwenduli; ngako ndowulinganisela umsebenzi wabo wapambili esifubeni sabo." 
Isaiah65:8 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Njengokuya iveyine entsha ifunyanwa esipeni sedreyive, kutiwa: Ungasitshabalalisi, ngokuba kuko itamsanqa kuso; ndiya kwenje njalo ngenxa yezicaka zam, ukuba ndingabatshabalalisi bonke." 
Isaiah65:9 Ndovelisa kwa‐Yakobi inzalo, nakwa‐Juda indlalifa zentaba zam; abaqashwa bam bolidla ilifa lalo, nezicaka zam ziya kuhlala kona." 
Isaiah65:10 Yoti i‐Sharone ibe liṙiwa legusha, nomhlambo we‐Hakore ube yindawo yokubutuma kwenkomo; ngenxa yabantu bam abandifunileyo." 
Isaiah65:11 Kodwa nina, enishiyayo uyehova, enilibala intaba yam eyingcwele; euilungisela u‐Gadi isitebe, enizalisela u‐Meni umnikelo wokusela:" 
Isaiah65:12 ndonimisela iṙele, naniya kutoba pantsi nonke ekubulaweni; ngokokuba ndibizile, kanti anisabelanga; nditetile, kanti anipulapulanga; koko nibe nikwenza okubi emehlweni am, noko bendingakutandi nakuqasha." 
Isaiah65:13 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, izicaka zam ziya kutya, kodwa nina niya kulamba; bona ke, izicaka zam ziya kusela, kodwa nina niya kunxanwa; bona ke, izicaka zam ziya kuvuya, kodwa nina niya kudana;" 
Isaiah65:14 bona ke, izicaka zam ziya kucula ngokucwayita kwentliziyo, kodwa nina niya kukala ngobuhlungu bentliziyo; nangokwapuka kwomoya niya kulila." 
Isaiah65:15 Naniya kushiya igama lenu libe sisiqalekiso kubaqashwa bam; ngokuba inkosi e nguyehova yokufisa, nezicaka zayo yozibiza ngegama limbi." 
Isaiah65:16 Lowo ozitamsanqelisaya emhlabeni, wozitamsanqelisa ngaye utixo wenyaniso; nalowo ofungayo emhlabeni, wofunga utixo wenyaniso; ngokuba zilityelwe imbandezelo zapambili, nangokuba zifihliwe emehlweni am." 
Isaiah65:17 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndidala amazula amatsha, nomhlaba omtsha; izinto zapambili aziyi kukunjulwa, aziyi kungena nasentliziyweni." 
Isaiah65:18 Kodwa gcobani, nivuyelele kude kube ngunapakade ngoko ndikudalayo: ngokuba, bona ke, ndidala i‐Yerusaleme umvuyelelo, nabantu bayo umgcobo." 
Isaiah65:19 Ndandiya kuvuyelela kuyo i‐Yerusaleme, ndigcobe kubo abantu bam; akusayi kubuya kuviwe kuyo ilizwi lokulila, nelizwi lokukala." 
Isaiah65:20 Akusayi kubuya kubeko kona usana lwemihla emincinane, nexego elingazalisanga imihla yalo; ngokuba umfana eya kufa engominyaka ilikulu, nomoni ominyaka ilikulu woqalekiswa." 
Isaiah65:21 Baya kwaka izindlu, bahlale kuzo; baya kutyala imiyezo, badle iziqa̔mo zayo." 
Isaiah65:22 Abayi kwaka, kuhlalwe ngomnye; abayi kutyala, kutyiwe ngomnye: ngokuba njengemihla yomti yoba njalo imihla yabantu bam; nomsebenzi wezandla zabo bowudla kade abaqashwa bam." 
Isaiah65:23 Abayi kufumana bezama, kanjalo abayi kuzalela imbujiswa ebaqayo; ngokuba beyinzalo yabatanyusanqelweyo nguyehova, nabantwana babo kunye nabo." 
Isaiah65:24 Kwakuya kuti, bengekabizi, ndosabela mna; nanxa basateta, ndiya kuva." 
Isaiah65:25 Incu̔ka nemvana ziya kudlela ndawonye, nengonyama iya kutya inca njengenkabi; kodwa inyoka, utuli lwoba kukudla kwayo; aziyi kwenzakalisa, aziyi kutshabalalisa kanjalo, kuyo yonke intaba yam eyingcwele, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah66:1 UTSHO uyehova ukuti: Izulu liyiterone yam, nomhlaba usisitulo senyawo zam; ipina leyondlu niya kundakela yona; ipina ke indawo yokupumla kwam?" 
Isaiah66:2 Ngokuba zonke ezi zinto isandla sam sizenzile; zaye seziko zonke ezi zinto utsho uyehova: kodwa kulowo ndiya kukangela, kulowo ululamileyo nomoya ugqobokileyo, ongcangcazela ngelizwi lam." 
Isaiah66:3 Oxe̔layo inkabi, uyabulala umntu; obingayo ixwana, uyapula inja intamo; onikela ngomnikelo wokudla, uyanikela igazi lehangu; oqu̔misayo intlakamhlope ngokukumbuza, uyatamsanqelisa isitixo. Aba ke, banyulile ezabo indlela, nezinto zabo ezizondekileyo umpefumlo wabo uzitanda." 
Isaiah66:4 Nam, ndiya kunyula amashwa abo, nezoyikelo zabo ndozizisa pezu kwabo; ngokokuba bendibiza, kanti bekungeko osabelayo; benditeta, kanti bebengapulapuli; kodwa bakwenza okubi emehlweni am, noko bendingakutandi bakuqasha." 
Isaiah66:5 Yivani ilizwi likayehova, nina ningcangcazela ngelizwi lake! Bate abazalwana benu abanitiyayo, abanigxotayo ngenxa yegama lam: Makazukiswe uyehova! Koko eya kubonakalela uvuyo lwenu, bati bona badane." 
Isaiah66:6 Ilizwi lempitimpiti livela esixekweni! ilizwi livela etempileni! ilizwi likayehova, ebuyekeza impindezelo ezintshabeni zake!" 
Isaiah66:7 Ingekabi nakututumba, yazala; ingekafika inimba pezu kwayo, yavelisa umntwana wobudoda." 
Isaiah66:8 Ngubanina ovileyo into enjalo? ngubanina obonileyo izinto ezinjengezi? Linokututumba ilizwe ngamini nye na? sizalwa isizwe ngexesha linye na? Koko i‐Ziyone yabisekututumbeni, yazala onyana bayo kanjako." 
Isaiah66:9 Ndiya kutyobozisa na, ndingazalisi nokuzalisa? utsho uyehova: ndiya kuzalisa na, ndivingce noko? utsho utixo wako." 
Isaiah66:10 Vuyani ne‐Yerusaleme, nivuyelele ngayo, nonke nina niyitandayo! gcobani nayo ngomgcobo, nonke nina abayililelayo!" 
Isaiah66:11 ukuze nanye, nihlute, ngebele lentutuzelo zayo; ukuze nifoce, niziyolise ngobuninzi bobungcwalisa bayo." 
Isaiah66:12 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuyolulela uxolo njengomlambo nobutyebi babaheyideni njengomsinga okukulayo; niya kwandula nanye, niya kutwalwa ecaleni, nigxunyiswe emadolweni." 
Isaiah66:13 Njengomnye otutuzelwayo ngunina, kwa njalo ndonitutuzela mna; kwa se‐Yerusaleme niya kututuzelwa." 
Isaiah66:14 Noti nakubona, intliziyo yenu iya kugcoba, namatambo enu ohluma njengotyani: isandla sikayehova siya kwazeka ezicakeni zake, kodwa intshaba zake woziqumbela." 
Isaiah66:15 Ngokuba, bona ke, uyehova eya kuza ngomlilo, nenqwelo zake njengesaqwiti; ukubuyisa ingqumbo yake ngobuṙalaṙume, nentetiso yake ngamalangatye omlilo." 
Isaiah66:16 Ngokuba ngomlilo nangeṙele lake uyehova eya kupika noluntu lwonke; boba baninzi ke ababuleweyo bakayehova. 
Isaiah66:17 Abo bazenza ngcwele, abazihlambululayo emiyezweni emva kwomnye, pakati kwabo abadlayo inyama yehangu, nento eyintshontsho, nempuku; boti tshabalala kwa kunye, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah66:18 Ngokuba ndi sazi imisebenzi yabo nenkumbulo zabo. Kuza kubako, ukuba ndiya kuhlanganisa zonke izizwe nenteto; zaziya kuza, zibone ubungcwalisa bam." 
Isaiah66:19 Ndandiya kubeka umqondiso pakati kwazo; nabasindileyo kuzo ndiya kubatuma baye kwizizwe; kwi‐Tareshishe, kwi‐Pule, nama‐Ludi, atyeda isipeta, kwi‐Tubali, ne‐Javane, kwiziqiti ezikude, ezingavanga udumo lwam, ezingabonanga nobungcwalisa bam; babeya kushumayela ubungcwalisa bam pakati kwezizwe." 
Isaiah66:20 Babeya kuzisa bonke abazalwana benu, bevela kuzo zonke izizwe, babe ngumnikelo kayehova, pezu kwamahashe, nasezinqwelweni, nasezintweni zokutwalwa, napezu kwamaqwaṙaṙa, napezu kwezilo ezizimbaleki, entabeni yam engcwele e‐Yerusaleme, utsho uyehova, njengokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli luzisa umnikelo esityeni esimhlope endlwini kayehova." 
Isaiah66:21 Kanjalo nakubo ndiya kutabata ukuba babe ngabaperisite n aba‐Levi, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah66:22 Ngokuba, njengokuba amazulu amatsha nomhlaba omtsha, endiya kuzidala, ziya kuma ebusweni bam, utsho uyehova, kwa njalo kuya kuma inzalo yenu negama lenu." 
Isaiah66:23 Kwakuya kuti, kwinyanga ngenyanga, nakwisabata ngesabata, lwoza uluntu lwonke ukubedesha pambi kwam, utsho uyehova." 
Isaiah66:24 Babeya kupuma, bakangele izidumbu zabantu abagqitileyo ngakum: ngokuba impetu yabo ingayi kufa, nomlilo wabo ungayi kucinywa; boba yinzondwa kulo lwonke uluntu." 
Jeremiah1:1 AMAZWI ka‐Jeremiya, unyana ka‐Hilikiya, owabaperisite abebese‐Hanatote elizweni lakwa‐Benjamine;" 
Jeremiah1:2 okuye ilizwi likayehova lezayo emihleni ka‐Josiya unyana ka‐Amoni ukumkani we‐Juda, ngoweshumi linesitatu umnyaka wobukumkani bake:" 
Jeremiah1:3 leza nasemihleni ka‐Yoyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani we‐Juda, kwada kwasekupeleni kwomnyaka weshumi elinamnye ka‐Zedekiya unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani we‐Juda, kwada kwasekufudusweni kwe‐Yerusaleme ngenyanga yesihlanu." 
Jeremiah1:4 Kekaloku ilizwi likayehova leza kum lisiti: 
Jeremiah1:5 Ndingekakudali esiswini bendikwazi; kwa ungekapumi esizalweni ndakwahlula; ndakumisela ube ngumprofite ezizweni. 
Jeremiah1:6 Ndaza ndati: Au, Nkosi Yehova! bona ke, andikwazi ukuteta, ngokuba ndingumntwana." 
Jeremiah1:7 Kodwa uyehova wati kum: Ungatsho ukuti, ndingumntwana; ngokuba uya kuya kubo bonke endiya kukutuma kubo, nako konke endiya kukuyalela kona wokuteta." 
Jeremiah1:8 Ungoyiki ubuso babo; ngokuba ndinawe mna ukuba ndikukulule, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah1:9 Wandula uyehova wolula isandla sake, wacukumisa umlomo wam; wayesiti uyehova kum: Bona ke, ndiwabekile amazwi am emlonyeni wako." 
Jeremiah1:10 Kangela, ndikumisile namhla nje pezu kwezizwe, napezu kwezikumkani, ukuncotula, nokucita, nokutshabalalisa, nokuwisa, ukwaka nokutyala." 
Jeremiah1:11 Labuya leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti: Ubona nto nina, Jeremiya? Ndati: Ndibona uswazi lwomti wesamonde." 
Jeremiah1:12 Waza uyehova wati kum: Ulungisile ukubona: ngokuba ndiya kulinda pezu kwelizwi lam ukulenza. 
Jeremiah1:13 Labuya leza kum ilizwi likayehova ngokwesibini, lisiti: Ubona nto nina? Ndati: Ndibona imbiza ebilayo; nobuso bayo busenode." 
Jeremiah1:14 Wayesiti uyehova kum: Kwa senode ilishwa liya kuvunjululelwa ngakubo bonke abemi belizwe. 
Jeremiah1:15 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kubiza zonke izizalwane zobukumkani basenode, utsho uyehova; zaziya kuza, zibeke ezinye ngezinye iterone zazo emnyango wamasango e‐Yerusaleme, nangakuzo zonke indonga zayo ngento engqongayo, nangakuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ndandiya kuteta imigwebo yam ngakubo, ngenxa yayo yonke inkohlakalo yabo; ngokokuba bendishiyile, nokuba bequ̔misele otixo bambi, nokuba bezitobile kuyo imisebenzi yezabo izandla." 
Jeremiah1:17 Wena, ngoko, ubinqe isinqe sako, usuke, utete kubo konke endiya kukuyalela kona: ungetuswa ngobuso babo, hleze ndikumatise pambi kwabo." 
Jeremiah1:18 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndikwenzile namhla isixeko esinqatyisiweyo, nentsika yesincete, nendonga zexina ngakulo lonke ilizwe; ngakubo okumkani be‐Juda, ngakuzo inkosana zayo, ngakubo abaprofite bayo, nangakubo abantu belizwe." 
Jeremiah1:19 Bangalwa nawe, koko bengayi kukweyisa; ngokuba ndinawe mna, utsho uyehova, ukuba ndikukulule." 
Jeremiah2:1 LALEKELA ilizwi likayehova ukuza kum, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah2:2 Hamba, ushumayele ezindlebeni ze‐Yerusaleme, usiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ndiyakukumbulela ububele bobutsha bako, utando lwokwendiswa kwako, ukundilandela kwako entlango, emhlabeni obungahlwayelwa." 
Jeremiah2:3 U‐Sirayeli ebeyingcwele kuyehova, ulibo lwemveliso yake: bonke abamdlayo bazuza ityala; ilishwa leza pezu kwabo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah2:4 Yivani ilizwi likayehova, ndlu ka‐Yakobi! nani zizalwane zonke zendlu ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Jeremiah2:5 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bubumenemene bunina babufumanayo oyihlo benu kum, ukuba bemka kude kum, balandela okungendawo, baba ngabangendawo?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Abatanga: Upina uyehova, owasinyusayo elizweni le‐Jipete, owasikokelayo entlango, ezweni lobugxwayiba nelezihogo, ezweni lokwoma neletunzi lokufa, ezweni bekungacandwa mntu kulo, nalapo abantu bebengahlali kona?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Kanjalo ndaningenisa elizweni elicu̔mileyo, ukuba nitye isiqa̔mo salo nobumnandi balo; kanti nakungena, nalinco̔lisa ilizwe lam, nelifa lam nalenza libe yintshontsho." 
Jeremiah2:8 Abaperisite bebengati: Upina uyehova? nabo bapete umteto bebengandazi; abalusi nabo bagqita ngakum; nabaprofite baprofitesha ngo‐Bali, balandela izinto e zingenakunceda." 
Jeremiah2:9 Ngako oko ndoba ndisapika nani, utsho uyehova; ewe, ndopika nabo abantwana babantwana benu." 
Jeremiah2:10 Ngokuba, welelani eziqitini zama‐Kiti, nibone; nitume nase‐Kedare, nigqale kunene, nibone ukuba kuko into enje nje na." 
Jeremiah2:11 Kesanana isizwe otixo na, nangona bengenguye utixo? kanti abantu bam banene ubungcwalisa babo ngento engenakunceda." 
Jeremiah2:12 Yibani nokuti nqa, nina mazulu! pezu kwoku; ewe, yitini hlatyu, nimangaliswe kakulu, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah2:13 Ngokuba izikohlakalo zibini bezenzile abantu bam: mna bandishiyile, umtombo wamanzi apilileyo, ukuba bazimbele amacibi, amacibi aqekekileyo, angabambiyo amanzi." 
Jeremiah2:14 U‐Sirayeli usisicaka na? ungozelweyo endlwini na? yinina ke ukuba uba yinto yokupangwa? 
Jeremiah2:15 Ingonyamana ziyamkonyela, ziyaku̔pa ilizwi lazo; ziyalenza ilizwe lake intshabalalo; izixeko zake zitshisiwe, kungeko ohlala kuzo." 
Jeremiah2:16 Kanjako usapo lwase‐Nofe nolwase‐Tahapanesi luyakudlela ukakai. 
Jeremiah2:17 Akuzenzelanga oku na, ekubeni umshiyile uyehova, utixo wako, ngexesha wakukokelayo endleleni?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Nakaloku, iyinto nina kuwe indlela ye‐Jipete, ukuba uwasele amanzi ase‐Shihore? iyinto nina kuwe nendlela ye‐Asiriya, ukuba uwasele amanzi omlambo?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Inkohlakalo yako yokululeka, nezipambuko zako zokwohlwaya: yazi ke, ubone, ukuba kuyinto ekohlakeleyo neṙaṙa ukumshiya kwako uyehova, utixo wako, nokuba ukwoyikwa kwam akuko kuwe, itsho inkosi, uyehova wemikosi." 
Jeremiah2:20 Ngenyaniso kudala ndayapula iyokwe yako, ndaqaula izinxibo zako; waza wati: Andiyi kukonza; ngokuba pezu kwenduli zonke, nangapantsi kwemiti yonke eluhlaza, ubudungadunga, usenza umbulo." 
Jeremiah2:21 Kanti mna bendikutyalile umti weveyine odumileyo, imbewu elungileyo ipela; ute nina ngoko ukundiguqulelwa ube zizihlumelo ezonakeleyo zomti weveyine wasemzini?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Nakuba uzihlambayo ngenetere, uzitabatele isepe eninzi, inkohlakalo yako iba̔liwe noko pambi kwam, itsho inkosi, uyehova." 
Jeremiah2:23 Ungati nina ukuti: Andinco̔lisekile, andibalandelanga o‐Bali? kangela indlela yako esihlanjeni, yazi ke into uyenzileyo: u yinkamelakazi entsha enamendu ipalapala ezindleleni zayo;" 
Jeremiah2:24 u liqwaṙakazi eliqele intlango, e liti ngenkanuko yomxe̔lo walo lisezele umoya; ubushushu balo ngubanina ongabunqandayo? bonke abalifunayo abayi kudinwa; ngenyanga yalo bolifumana." 
Jeremiah2:25 Bamba unyawo lwako lungabi lungenazihlangu, nomqala wako ungabi nanxanwa: kodwa uti: Akuko itemba; hai, ngokuba ndibatandile abasemzini, nasemva kwabo ndiya kuya." 
Jeremiah2:26 Njengokuba isela lidanile nxa lifunyanwayo, kwa njalo badanile indlu ka‐Sirayeli; bona, okumkani babo, inkosana zabo, nabaperisite babo, nabaprofite babo;" 
Jeremiah2:27 abati kuwo umti: Ungubawo wena; nakulo ilitye: Wena undizele; ngokuba bendinikele umhlana, bungebubuso; noko ngexesha lelishwa labo baya kuti: Suka, usisindise!" 
Jeremiah2:28 Bapina kodwa otixo bako uzenzele bona? mabasuke, ukuba bangakusindisa ngexesha lelishwa lako; ngokuba njeng enani lezixeko zako benjalo otixo bako, Juda!" 
Jeremiah2:29 Kunganina ukuba niya kupika nam? nina nonke nigqitile ngakum, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah2:30 Ndifumane ndabeta usapo lwenu; alulwamkelanga ululeko: elenu iṙele libadlile abaprofite benu, njengengonyama etshabalalisayo." 
Jeremiah2:31 Sizukulwanandini! gqalani ilizwi likayehova. Bendiyintlango ko‐Sirayeli na? umhlaumbi ilizwe lesitokotoko na? Yinina ukuba bati abantu bam: Sizinkosi, asiyi kubuya size kuwe?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Intombi iya kulibala izihombo zayo na, n omtshakazi imibinqo yake na? noko abantu bam balibele mna imihla engenakubalwa." 
Jeremiah2:33 Kunganina ukuba uyalungisa indlela yako ukufuna utando? ngokunjalo kwa amankazana akohlakeleyo uwafundisile indlela zako. 
Jeremiah2:34 Kwa semasondweni engubo zako kufunyenwe igazi lemipefumlo yamahlwempu angenatyala; andilifumananga ngokungongxa, koko lipezu kwazo zonke ezi zinto." 
Jeremiah2:35 Uti noko: Ngokuba ndingenatyala, okunene ingqumbo yake yobuya kum. Bona ke, ndiya kupikisana nawe, ngenxa yokuba uti: Andonanga." 
Jeremiah2:36 Kunganina ukuba uyatyutya kakulu ukuya kuguqula indlela yako? uya kudanela i‐Jipete nayo, njengokuba ubudanela i‐Asiriya." 
Jeremiah2:37 Kwa nalapo uya kupuma, unezandla zako pezu kwentloko yako; ngokuba uyehova elahlile amatemba ako, ngako akuyi kutamsanqeleka ngawo." 
Jeremiah3:1 KUTIWA: Ukuba indoda iyandulula umfazi wayo, aze emke kuyo, abe ngowenye indoda, iya kubuyela kuye kanjako na? libe lingayi kudyojwa kakulu na elozwe? kodwa wena uwenzile umbulo nabatandwa abaninzi; buyela kum noke, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah3:2 Pakamisa amehlo ako ngakuzo indawo ezipezulu, ukangele apo kungalalwanga na nawe kona: ezindleleni ubahlalele, njengom‐Arabi entlango; waudyobile ilizwe ngemibulo yako nangenkohlakalo yako." 
Jeremiah3:3 Ngako izipango zibanjiwe, kungabangako namvula yasemva; wabunebunzi lengnawokazi, wala ukuba nentloni." 
Jeremiah3:4 Akuyi kubiza kwa ngoku na kum ukuti: Bawo wam! ubungumhlobo wobutsha bam wena? 
Jeremiah3:5 Uya kubamba ingqumbo yake kude kube ngunapakade na? wo yi gcina ngamaxesha onke na? Bona ke, utetile, wazenza izinto ezikohlakeleyo njengokuba ubunako ukwenje njalo." 
Jeremiah3:6 WAYESITI uyehova kum emihleni ka‐Josiya ukumkani: Ubonile na oko akwenzileyo u‐Sirayeli opambukileyo? Wahamba pezu kwazo zonke intaba ezinde, napantsi kwayo yonke imiti eluhlaza, wawenza umbulo kona." 
Jeremiah3:7 Ndati emveni kwokwenza kwake zonke ezi zinto: Buyela kum; kanti akabuyanga; wabona oku udade wake ohanahanisayo, u‐Juda." 
Jeremiah3:8 Ndaye ndibona, xeshekweni bendimndulule u‐Sirayeli opambukileyo ngenxa yako konke abeṙexezile ngako, ndamnika incwadi yokulahlwa kwake, ukuba ebengoyiki u‐Juda ohanahanisayo, udade wake, kodwa waya wawenza umbulo kwa yena." 
Jeremiah3:9 Kwaza kwati, ngokuhlazeka kwombulo wake, walidyoba ilizwe, waṙexeza namatye nemiti." 
Jeremiah3:10 Kanti nangenxa yoku konke, udade wake ohanahanisayo u‐Juda akabuyelanga kum ngayo yonke intliziyo yake, kodwa ngabo ubuxoki, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah3:11 Wayesiti uyehova kum: u‐Sirayeli opambukileyo uzenze olungileyo pezu kwo‐Juda ohanahanisayo. 
Jeremiah3:12 Hamba, ushumayele lamazwi ngasenode, uti: Buya, Sirayeli opambukileyo! utsho uyehova; andiyi kubuti shwa ubuso bam pezu kwenu; ngokuba ndinobubele mna, utsho uyehova, andiyi kubamba ingqumbo kude kube ngunapakade." 
Jeremiah3:13 Yivume kodwa inkohlakalo yako, okokuba ugqitile ngakuye uyehova, utixo wako, nokuba ucitile indlela zako pakati kwabasemzini, ngapantsi kwayo yonke imiti eluhlaza; nelizwi lam anilipulapulanga, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah3:14 Buyani, lusapo olupambukileyo! utsho uyehova, ngokuba nditshatile nani; ndandiya kunitabata, emnye kwisixeko, nababini kwisizalwane, ndinizise e‐Ziyone;" 
Jeremiah3:15 ndandiya kunipa abalusi njengentliziyo yam, abaya kuninqaka ngokwazi nangokuqonda." 
Jeremiah3:16 Kwakuya kuti, xeshekweni niya kwanda nicu̔me elizweni, ngemihla leyo, utsho uyehova, akusayi kubuya kutiwe: Ityeya yocebano lukayehova; ayisayi kungena nasentliziyweni; ayisayi kukunjulwa kanjalo; ayisayi kufunwa nokufunwa; ayisayi kubuya yenziwe kanjako." 
Jeremiah3:17 Ngexesha elo i‐Yerusaleme iya kubizwa ngokuti yiterone kayehova; izizwe zonke zohlanganiselwa kuyo, egameni likayehova, e‐Yerusaleme: zaye zingayi kubuya zihambe ngobulukuni bentliziyo yazo ekohlakeleyo." 
Jeremiah3:18 Ngemihla leyo indlu ka‐Juda iya kuhamba nendlu ka‐Sirayeli; baya kuvela kwa kunye kulo ilizwe lasenode, ukuza elizweni endandilinika koyihlo benu libe lilifa." 
Jeremiah3:19 Koko bendisiti: Ndingati nina ukukubeka pakati kwosapo, nokukunika ilizwe elinqwenelekileyo, ilifa elibubuhle bobuhle bezizwe? Ndaza ndati: Uya kundibiza ngokuti: Bawo! waungayi kubuya kum." 
Jeremiah3:20 Noko, njengokuba umfazi eshiya indoda yake ngenkohliso, kwa njalo nina nenze ngenkohliso ngakum, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah3:21 Ilizwi lavakala pezu kwendawo ezipezulu, ukulila n ezitaṙuziso zosapo luka‐Sirayeli, ngokokuba lutyekisile indlela yalo, nokuba lumlibele uyehova, utixo walo." 
Jeremiah3:22 Buyani, lusapo olupambukileyo! ndiya kupilisa impambuko zenu. Nanku sisiza kuwe, ngokuba wena, Yehova! ungutixo wetu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Ngenyaniso kufumana kufunwa ezindulini nas esininzini sentaba; ngenyaniso kukuye uyehova, utixo wetu, ukusindiswa kwo‐Sirayeli." 
Jeremiah3:24 Ngokuba okuyindaniso kudlile inzuzo yobawo betu kwa sebutsheni betu; igusha zabo nenkomo zabo, onyana babo nentombi zabo." 
Jeremiah3:25 Siyalala pantsi ekudaneni kwetu, nehlazo letu liyasigubungela; ngokuba sonile ngakuye uyehova, utixo wetu, tina nobawo betu, kwa sebutsheni betu kwada kwanamhla nje, singapulapulanga ilizwi likayehova, utixo wetu." 
Jeremiah4:1 Ukuba uya kubuya, Sirayeli! utsho uyehova, buyela kum; nokuba uya kukwelelisa izinto zako ezizondekileyo kwa pambi kwam, akuyi kuba libadubadu." 
Jeremiah4:2 Wauya kufunga ngokuti: Ehleli nje uyehova! ngenyaniso, ngobugwebo, nangobulungisa; zaye izizwe ziya kuti zinetamsanqa kuye, nakuye ziya kuqa̔yisa." 
Jeremiah4:3 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova kumadoda akwa‐Juda nakwi‐Yerusaleme nkuti: Ziku̔beleleni umhlaba olifusi, ningahlwayeli pakati kwenkanga." 
Jeremiah4:4 Zaluseni kuyehova, nisuse amajwabu entliziyo yenu, nina madoda akwa‐Juda nabemi base‐Yerusaleme! hleze bupume ubuṙalaṙume bam njengomlilo, butshe, kungabiko obucimayo, ngenxa yenkohlakalo yezenzo zenu." 
Jeremiah4:5 Xelani kwa‐Juda, nivakalise e‐Yerusaleme; niti: Vutelani ixilongo elizweni; dandulukani kakulu, niti: Zihlanganiseni, siye singene ezixekweni ezinqatyisiweyo." 
Jeremiah4:6 Pakamisani ibanile e‐Ziyone; yenzani intsabo, ningemi; ngokuba ndiza kuvelisa ilishwa enode, nembujiswa enkulu." 
Jeremiah4:7 Ingonyama iyanyuka eludadeni lwayo, nomtshabalalisi wezizwe selendulukile; upumile endaweni yake ukuza kulenza ilizwe lako ingcitakalo; izixeko zako ziya kucitwa, zingabi nabemi." 
Jeremiah4:8 Ngenxa yoku binqani ngentlakantlaka, yenzani isijwili, nilile; ngokuba ingqumbo eshushu kayehova ingabuyi kuti." 
Jeremiah4:9 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova, intliziyo yokumkani iya kububa, nentliziyo yenkosana; abaperisite bomangaliswa, nabaprofite boti nqa." 
Jeremiah4:10 Ndaza ndati: Au, Nkosi Yehova! ngenyaniso ukohlisile kakulu abantu aba, ne‐Yerusaleme, usiti: Niya kuba noxolo; kanti iṙele liyafikela ebomini." 
Jeremiah4:11 Ngeloxesha kuya kutiwa kwababantu nakwi‐Yerusaleme: Umoya ofudumeleyo wasezindaweni ezipezulu entlango, ngakuyo intombi yabantu bam, kungekukuba wele, kungekukuba ucokise kanjalo;" 
Jeremiah4:12 umoya ozeleyo pezu kwonjalo wondizela: kaloku kanjalo ndiya kuteta imigwebo yam ngakubo. 
Jeremiah4:13 Bona ke, njengamafu uya kunyuka, nanjengesaqwiti inqwelo zake; amahashe ake anamendu pezu kwenkozi. Hai usizi lwetu! ngokuba sicitakaliswa." 
Jeremiah4:14 Hlanza intliziyo yako enkohlakalweni, Yerusaleme! ukuze usindiswe: kude kube ninina aya kuhlala pakati kwako amaqinga ako angendawo?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Ngokuba ilizwi lixela livela e‐Dane, lishumayela ubunzima livela entabeni yakwa‐Frayime." 
Jeremiah4:16 Bikani ezizweni, bona ke, shumayelani pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme, ukuti: Abalaleli bavela elizweni elikude, abaku̔pa ilizwi labo ngakuzo izixeko zakwa‐Juda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Njengabalindi bentsimi, boba ngakuyo ngento engqongayo; ngokuba ivukele ngakum, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah4:18 Indlela yako, nezenzo zako zikwenzele ezi zinto: yiyo le inkohlakalo yako; ngenyaniso iṙaṙa, ngenyaniso iyafikela entliziyweni." 
Jeremiah4:19 Amatumbu am! amatumbu am! ndinokututumba ezindongeni zentliziyo yam; intliziyo yam iyancwina pakati kwam; andingeti cwaka; ngokuba intlokoma yexilongo uyivile, mpefumlo wam! umemezo lwokulwa." 
Jeremiah4:20 Isapuko pezu kwesapuko siyashunyayelwa; ngokuba ilizwe lonke licitakaliswa; ngesiqupe ziyacitakaliswa intente zam, na ngepanyazo izikuselo zam." 
Jeremiah4:21 Kude kube ninina ndiya kuyibona ibanile, ndiyive nentlokoma yexilongo?" 
Jeremiah4:22 Ngenyaniso abantu bam banyabile; mna abandazi; balusapo oludolileyo; abanakuqonda: balumkile ukwenza okukohlakeleyo, kodwa ukwenza okulungileyo abakwazi." 
Jeremiah4:23 Ndakangela ilizwe, kekaloku bona ke, belibugxwayiba belizé; kwa nezulu, kodwa bekungeko ukukanya kwalo." 
Jeremiah4:24 Ndakangela intaba, kekaloku bona ke, bezingcangcazela, nazo zonke induli zadidiza." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ndakangela, kekaloku bona ke, bekungeko namntu, nazo zonke intaka zezulu zibe zibalekile." 
Jeremiah4:26 Ndakangela, kekaloku bona ke, umhlaba ocu̔mileyo ubuyintlango; nazo zonke izixeko zawo bezicitiwe pambi kwoyehova, pambi kwobushushu bengqumbo yake." 
Jeremiah4:27 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Ilizwe lonke loba yingcitakalo; kodwa andiyi kukwenza ukugqitywa noko. 
Jeremiah4:28 Ngenxa yoku umhlaba uya kulila, namazulu pezulu oba mnyama; ngenxa yokuba ndikutetile, ndikucingile, ndingayi kuba nosizi, ndingayi kuguquka kuko kanjako." 
Jeremiah4:29 Ngesandi sabakweli bamahashe nabatoli ziya kubaleka zonke izixeko; baya kungena ezindadeni, bakwele emaweni: zonke izixeko ziya kushiywa, kude kungabiko mntu ohlala kuzo." 
Jeremiah4:30 Nawe ocitakalisiweyo! uya kwenza nto nina? nakuba uzivatisa ngento ebomvu, nakuba uzihomba ngezihombo zegolide, nakuba uṙazula amehlo ako ngeqabo, wofumana uzenza mhle; abatandwa bako bokudela, baya kufuna ubomi bako." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ngokuba ndivile ilizwi njengelomfazi oza kuzala, e lotutumbelo njengolwozibulayo, ilizwi lentombi yase‐Ziyone: iyabefuza, iyatwabulula izandla zayo, isiti: Hai ke usizi lwam! ngokuba umpefumlo wam udiniwe ngababulali." 
Jeremiah5:1 Sukasukani ezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme, nikangele ke, nazi, nifune ezinkundleni zayo, ukuba ningafumana umntu na, ukuba kuko na owenzayo okufanelekileyo, ofunayo inyaniso, ndandiya kuyixolela." 
Jeremiah5:2 Nokuba baya kuti: Ehleli nje uyehova! bayafunga ngobuxoki noko. 
Jeremiah5:3 Yehova! amehlo ako akapezu kwayo inyaniso na? ubabetile, kodwa abavanga ubuhlungu: ubagqibile, kodwa balile ukwamkela ululeko; benzile ubuso babo bube lukuni pezu kwolwalwa, balile ukubuya." 
Jeremiah5:4 Ndaza ndati: Okunene aba bangamahlwempu; banyabile, ngokuba bengazi indlela kayehova, isigwebo sotixo wabo." 
Jeremiah5:5 Ndohamba ndiye kwabakulu, nditete nabo, ngokuba bona besazi indlela kayehova, isigwebo sotixo wabo: koko aba begqibele ukwapula iyokwe, baqaulile izinxibo." 
Jeremiah5:6 Ngako oko ingonyama yasehlatini yobabulala; incu̔ka yokuhlwa yobacita; ingwe yolalela ngakuzo izixeko zabo; bonke abapuma kuzo baya kuqwengwa: ngokuba izigqito zabo zininzi, n empambuko zabo ziyinto enkulu." 
Jeremiah5:7 Ndingati nina ukukuxolela oku? usapo lwako lundishiyile, lwafunga okungenguye utixo; nangona bendibahlutisile, baṙexeza noko, bazixinanisa endlwini yengnawokazi." 
Jeremiah5:8 Njeng enkunzi zamahashe ezityetyisiweyo, bavuka kusasa, bati abanye ngabanye bakonyela abafazi babamelwane babo." 
Jeremiah5:9 Andiyi kwohlwaya na ngenxa yezi zinto? utsho uyehova; nompefumlo wam awuyi kuzipindezela na pezu kwesizwe esinjengesi? 
Jeremiah5:10 Nyukani pezu kwendonga zayo, nitshabalalise, kodwa ningenzi ukugqitywa noko: susani amagatya ayo, ngokuba engengawo a kayehova." 
Jeremiah5:11 Ngokuba benzile ngenkohliso kakulu ngakum, indlu ka‐Sirayeli nendlu ka‐Juda, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah5:12 Bamkanyele uyehova, bati: Asi nguye; ngako ilishwa aliyi kusihlela; asiyi kubona neṙele nendlala:" 
Jeremiah5:13 abaprofite boba ngumoya, ngokuba ilizwi lingeko kubo; kuya kwenziwa njalo kubo." 
Jeremiah5:14 Ngako oko utsho uyehova, utixo wemikosi, ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba niteta elilizwi, bona ke, ndiya kuwenza amazwi am emlonyeni wako umlilo, nabantu aba inkuni, wauya kubadla." 
Jeremiah5:15 Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa pezu kwenu isizwe sivela kude, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! utsho uyehova; isizwe esinamandla, isizwe esisesakudala, isizwe esinteto ungayi kuyazi, nento siyitetayo akuyi kuyiva." 
Jeremiah5:16 Umpongolo waso unjengencw̔aba elivulekileyo; bonke abaso bangamagoṙa. 
Jeremiah5:17 Sasiya kudla isivuno sako, nesonka sako, eso bebeya kusidla onyana bako nentombi zako; siya kudla igusha zako nenkomo zako; siya kudla imiti yako yeveyine nemikiwane yako; siya kuhlwempuzisa izixeko zako ezinqatyisiweyo, ezo ubutemba kuzo, ngeṙele." 
Jeremiah5:18 Noko, kwa semihleni leyo, utsho uyehova, andiyi kunenzela ukugqitywa." 
Jeremiah5:19 Kwakuya kuti, nakutsho ukuti: Kungenxa yanina asenzela zonke ezi zinto uyehova, utixo wetu? uya kwandula uti kubo: Njengokuba nishiyile mna, nakonza otixo basemzini elizweni lenu, kwa njalo niya kukonza abasemzini elizweni elingelelenu." 
Jeremiah5:20 Xelani oku kwindlu ka‐Yakobi, nikushumayele kwa‐Juda, nisiti:" 
Jeremiah5:21 Yivani ke oku, nina bantu badolileyo abangenangqondo! abanamehlo, kanti ababoni; abanendlebe, kanti abeva!" 
Jeremiah5:22 Aniyi kwoyika mna na? utsho uyehova; aniyi kungcangcazela ebusweni bam na, ondibekileyo intlabati ibe ngumda wolwandle, ngommiso ongunapakade, ukuba lungagqiti kuyo? ewe, nakuba amaza alo azamazama, akangeyise; nangona agqumayo, akangegqite kuyo noko." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kanti ababantu banentliziyo enenkani engevayo: bapambukile, bemka ke." 
Jeremiah5:24 Kanjako abati entliziyweni yabo: Masoyike kambe uyehova, utixo wetu, onikayo imvula, neyapambili neyasemva, ngexesha layo, o sigcinelayo iveki ezimiselweyo zokuvuna." 
Jeremiah5:25 Izikohlakalo zenu zishenxisile ezi zinto, nezono zenu zinqandile okulungileyo kuni." 
Jeremiah5:26 Ngokuba kufunyanwa pakati kwabantu bam abakohlakeleyo; bayalalela, njengokuncatama kwabatiyeli; bayabeka umgibe, bayabamba amadoda." 
Jeremiah5:27 Njengomgqungu uzele zintaka, kwa njalo izindlu zabo zizele yinkohliso; ngako oko benziwe abakulu nezityebi." 
Jeremiah5:28 Batyebile, bayakazimla; ewe, bagqitisile ngezinto zenkohlakalo; ityala abalilungisi, ityala lenkedama, bayatamsanqeleka noko; nebango labasweleyo abaliteteleli." 
Jeremiah5:29 Andiyi kwohlwaya na ngenxa yezi zinto? utsho uyehova; umpefumlo wam awuyi kuzipindezela na pezu kwesizwe esinjengesi? 
Jeremiah5:30 Into yokutelwa nqa neyoyikekileyo yenziwe elizweni: 
Jeremiah5:31 abaprofite bayaprofitesha ngobuxoki, nabaperisite banobukosi pantsi kwabo; bati abantu bam batande ukuba kube njalo; kodwa niya kwenza nto nina ekupeleni kwako oko?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Yenzani intsabo, lusapo luka‐Benjamine! kwa pakati kwe‐Yerusaleme; nivutele ngexilongo e‐Tekoha, nipakamise umqondiso womlilo e‐Bete?-?kereme: ngokuba ilishwa libonakala livela enode, nembujiswa enkulu." 
Jeremiah6:2 Ndiya kutshabalalisa intombi yase‐Ziyone, eyinzwakazi ebubetyebetye." 
Jeremiah6:3 Abalusi baya kuza kuyo, kwa nemihlambi yabo; baya kumisa intente zabo ngakuyo ngento engqongayo; baya kwalusa abanye ngabanye endaweni yabo." 
Jeremiah6:4 Lungisani ukulwa ngakuyo; sukani, sinyuke emini enkulu: hai usizi lwetu! ngokuba imini isangene, ngokuba amatunzi okuhlwa olukile." 
Jeremiah6:5 Sukani, sinyuke ebusuku, sicite ingxande zayo." 
Jeremiah6:6 Ngokuba etshilo uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Nqumlani imiti, niposele udonga ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme: siso isixeko esifanele ukwohlwaywa sipela; imbandezelo ipakati kwaso." 
Jeremiah6:7 Njengokuba umtombo umpompozisa amanzi awo, kwa njalo yona iyampompozisa inkohlakalo yayo; ubudlwengu nokubada kuyaviwa kuyo; intlungu namanxeba apambi kwam futi." 
Jeremiah6:8 Yiba ufundiswa, Yerusaleme! hleze umpefumlo wam uqipukelane nawe; hleze ndikwenze ingcitakalo, ilizwe elingemiwayo." 
Jeremiah6:9 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Baya kugqibela ukusibikica, njengomti weveyine, isisalela so‐Sirayeli; sibuyisele ezityeni isandla sako, njengomvuni wedreyive." 
Jeremiah6:10 Ndiya kuteta kobanina, ndibayale, ukuba beve? bona ke, indlebe yabo iyengalukileyo, baze bakohlwe kukupulapula; bona ke, ilizwi likayehova lisisigxekwa kubo; abanyamekeli lona." 
Jeremiah6:11 Ngako ndizele bubuṙalaṙume bukayehova, ndidiniwe kukunyamezela; ndobugalela pezu kwabantwana ngapandle, napezu kwesihlelo samadodana kunye: okunene kwa nendoda nomfazi baya kubanjwa, omdala nalowo uzeleyo yimihla." 
Jeremiah6:12 Izindlu zabo ziya kujikiselwa kwabanye, amasimi nabafazi kwa kunye: ngokuba ndiya kwolula isandla sam pezu kwabemi belizwe, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah6:13 Ngokuba, kwa kuye omncinane wabo kude kube kuye omkulu wabo, bonke bebawela inzuzo engalungileyo; kanjalo kwa kuye umprofite kude kube kuye umperisite, bonke bayenza ngobuxoki." 
Jeremiah6:14 Ngokuba bepilisa isapuko sentombi yabantu bam ngendawo elula, besiti: Uxolo, uxolo; nxa kungeko luxolo." 
Jeremiah6:15 Bebedanile na, ngokokuba benzile into eyintshontsho? Abake badana nakanye, abakwazi nokuva intloni: ngako oko baya kuwa pakati kwabo abawayo; ngexesha ndibohlwayayo boku̔beka, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah6:16 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Yimani ezindleleni, nikangele, nibuzele imizila yakudala, ipina ke indlela elungileyo, nihambe kuyo, naniya kufumanela imipefumlo yenu ukwonwaba. Kodwa bati: Asiyi kuhamba kuyo." 
Jeremiah6:17 Kanjako ndamisa pezu kwenu abalindi, besiti: Pulapulani kuyo intlokoma yexilongo. Kodwa bati: Asiyi kupulapula." 
Jeremiah6:18 Ngako oko, yivani, zizwe! wazi ke, ntlanganiso! into epakati kwabo." 
Jeremiah6:19 Yiva, mhlaba! bona ke, ndiya kuzisa ilishwa pezu kwababantu, isixakato sawabo amaqinga; ngokuba bengawapulapulanga amazwi am, nomteto wam bawulahlile." 
Jeremiah6:20 Yinto nina ke kum, ukuba intlakamhlope ivela e‐Sheba, nekalame emnandi ezweni elikude? Amadini okutshiswa enu akakolekile, nemibingo yenu ayiyolile kum." 
Jeremiah6:21 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kubekela ababantu iziku̔bekiso, babeya kuku̔beka pezu kwazo oyise nonyana kwa kunye, ummelwane nomhlobo wake, babube." 
Jeremiah6:22 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, abantu baya kuza bevela elizweni lasenode, isizwe esikulu siya kuvuswa emacaleni omhlaba." 
Jeremiah6:23 Bapete isipeta nomkonto, babukali, bengenanceba; ilizwi labo liyagquma njengolwandle, bayakwela pezu kwamahashe; sebecwangcisiwe, njengamadoda ecwangcis elwe ukulwa, ngakuwe, ntombi yase‐Ziyone!" 
Jeremiah6:24 Sivile udumo lwabo, izandla zetu zipolelwe; ututumbelo lusibambile, ubuhlungu njengobomfazi oza kuzala." 
Jeremiah6:25 Ningapumeli endle, ningahambi endleleni kanjalo; ngokuba utshaba lunesiṙele, isoyikiso singamacala onke." 
Jeremiah6:26 Ntombi yabantu bam! binqa ngentlakantlaka, uqikaqikeke elututwini; zenzele isililo njengesenzelwa umntwana oyedwa, isijwili esiṙaṙa kunene, ngokuba umfaci eya kuza pezu kwetu ngokuzuma." 
Jeremiah6:27 Ndikumisile ube ngumlingi pakati kwabantu bam, n enqaba, ukuze uyazi uyilinge indlela yabo." 
Jeremiah6:28 Bonke bangabapambuki abagqitisileyo ngokupambuka, bayahambahamba behleba; balubedu nesincete; bangabo abonakalisi bonke." 
Jeremiah6:29 Imfuto itshisiwe, ilode igqityiwe ngumlilo; umcokisi ufumana ecokisa, ngokuba abakohlakeleyo bengakunyulwa." 
Jeremiah6:30 Baya kubizwa ngokuti yisilivere elahliweyo; ngokuba uyehova ebalahlile. 
Jeremiah7:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah7:2 Yima esangweni lendlu kayehova, ushumayele kona elilizwi, uti: Yivani ilizwi likayehova, nonke nina bakwa‐Juda! abangenayo ngalamasango ukuza kubedesha uyehova." 
Jeremiah7:3 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Lungisani indlela zenu nezenzo zenu, ndandiya kunihlalisa kulendawo." 
Jeremiah7:4 Ningatembeli kuwo amazwi obuxoki, nisiti: Itempile kayehova, itempile kayehova, itempile kayehova, zizo ezi." 
Jeremiah7:5 Koko, ukuba niya kulungisa ngenyaniso indlela zenu nezenzo zenu; ukuba niya kwenza ngenyaniso okufanelekileyo pakati kwomntu nommelwane wake;" 
Jeremiah7:6 ukuba aniyi kubandezela owasemzini, n enkedama, nomhlolokazi, ningapalazi igazi elingenatyala kulendawo, ningalandeli otixo bambi kube kukwenzakala kwenu;" 
Jeremiah7:7 ndiya kwandula ndinihlalise kulendawo, elizweni endalinikayo koyihlo benu, kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Jeremiah7:8 Bona ke, niyatembela kuwo amazwi obuxoki, lawo angenakunceda." 
Jeremiah7:9 Niya kuba̔ na, nibulale, niṙexeze, nifunge ngobuxoki, niqu̔misele u‐Bali, nilandele otixo bambi eningabaziyo;" 
Jeremiah7:10 nize noko na, nime pambi kwam kulendlu, ebizwayo ngegama lam, niti: Sikululwe; ukuze nizenze zonke ezizinto ezibuntshontsho nje?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Kanene indlu le, ebizwayo ngegama lam, iba ngumqolomba wamanyangaza emehlweni enu na? Ewe, bona ke, ndibonile mna, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah7:12 Koko hambani ke niye endaweni yam ebise‐Shilo, apo ndamisa kona igama lam ekuqaleni, nibone oko ndakwenza kuyo ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabantu bam o‐Sirayeli." 
Jeremiah7:13 Nakaloku, ngokokuba niyenzile yonke lemisebenzi, utsho uyehova, ndaza ndateta kuni, ndivuka kusasa nditeta, kanti nibe ningeva; ndanibiza, kanti nibe ningasabeli;" 
Jeremiah7:14 kukona ndiya kwenza kulendlu ibizwayo ngegama lam, enitembela kuyo, nakuyo indawo endayinikayo kuni nakoyihlo benu, njengoko ndikwenzele i‐Shilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ndandiya kunilahla ebusweni bam, njengokuba ndibalahlile bonke abazalwana benu, yonke inzalo ka‐Frayime." 
Jeremiah7:16 Ngako wena ungatandazeli ababantu, ungabapakamiseli isikalo nesitandazo, ungandibongozi kanjako; ngokuba ndingayi kukuva." 
Jeremiah7:17 Akukuboni na oko bakwenzayo ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, nasezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme?" 
Jeremiah7:18 Abantwana bayateza inkuni, noyise bayapemba umlilo, nabafazi bayabuca intlama, ukwenza izonkana kukumkanikazi wezulu, nokutululela otixo bambi iminikelo yokusela, ukuze bandiqumbise." 
Jeremiah7:19 Ndim na bamqumbisayo? utsho uyehova; asi ngabo bona na, kube kukudana kwobabo ubuso?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ingqumbo yam nobuṙalaṙume bam buya kugalelwa pezu kwalendawo, pezu kwabantu napezu kwezilo, napezu kwemiti yasendle, napezu kwesiqa̔mo somhlaba; babuya kutsha, bungacinywa." 
Jeremiah7:21 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Yongezani amadini okutshiswa enu kuyo imibingo yenu, nitye inyama." 
Jeremiah7:22 Ngokuba bendingateti noyihlo benu, bendingabayaleli kanjako, emhleni ndabanyusayo elizweni le‐Jipete, ngendawo zamadini okutshiswa nemibingo;" 
Jeremiah7:23 koko lento ndabendibayalela ngayo, ndisiti: Pulapulani ilizwi lam, ndandiya kuba ngutixo wenu, noti nina nibe ngabantu bam: kanjalo hambani kuyo yonke indlela endiya kuniyalela ngayo, ukuze kulunge kuni." 
Jeremiah7:24 Abapulapula noko, abatoba indlebe yabo kanjako, kodwa bahamba ngamacebo na ngobulukuni bentliziyo yabo ekohlakeleyo, baya ngomva, benga yanga ngapambili." 
Jeremiah7:25 Kuselokwalomhla bapumayo oyihlo benu elizweni le‐Jipete, kwada kwanamhla nje, nditumile kuni zonke izicaka zam abaprofite, imihla ngemihla ndivuka kusasa nje ndizituma." 
Jeremiah7:26 Abapulapula kum noko, abatoba indlebe yabo kanjako, kodwa bayenza lukuni intamo yabo; benza ngokukohlakeleyo ngapezu kwoyise babo." 
Jeremiah7:27 Nakuba uwateta kubo onke lamazwi, abayi kupulapula kuwe noko; nakuba ubizayo kubo, abayi kusabela kuwe." 
Jeremiah7:28 Ngako woti kubo: Esi sisizwe esingapulapuliyo ilizwi likayehova, utixo waso; esingayamkeli imfundiso kanjako: ibubile inyaniso, inqamkile emlonyeni wabo." 
Jeremiah7:29 Gugula inwele zako, uzilahle, upakamise isililo pezu kwezipezulu indawo; ngokuba uyehova esikalele wasibukula isizukulwana somsindo wake." 
Jeremiah7:30 Ngokuba usapo luka‐Juda lwenzile okukohlakeleyo emehlweni am, utsho uyehova: lubekile izinto zalo ezibuntshontsho kulondlu ibizwayo ngegama lam, ukuyinco̔lisa." 
Jeremiah7:31 Kanjalo lwakile indawo ezipakamileyo zase‐Tofete, esesihlanjeni sonyana ka‐Hinome, ukuba lutshise onyana balo nentombi zalo emlilweni; into endingayiyalelanga, nengangenanga entliziyweni yam." 
Jeremiah7:32 Ngako oko, bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa ingasayi kubizwa ngokuti yi‐Tofete, nesihlambo sonyana ka‐Hinome, koko iya kubizwa ngokuti sisihlambo sobulalo; ngokuba beya kuncw̔aba e‐Tofete, kude kungabi sabiko indawo." 
Jeremiah7:33 Nezidumbu zababantu zoba kukutya ezintakeni zezulu nasezilweni zomhlaba, kungeko ozitusayo." 
Jeremiah7:34 Ndandiya kupezisa ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, nasezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme, ilizwi lomgcobo nelizwi lovuyo, ilizwi lomyeni nelizwi lomtshakazi; ngokuba ilizwe loba yintshabalalo." 
Jeremiah8:1 Ngexesha elo, utsho uyehova, baya kuku̔pa amatambo okumkani bakwa‐Juda namatambo enkosana zake, namatambo abaperisite, namatambo abaprofite, namatambo abemi base‐Yerusaleme, emancw̔abeni abo;" 
Jeremiah8:2 bawaneke pambi kwelanga, napambi kwenyanga, napambi kwawo wonke umkosi wezulu; ezo nto babezitanda, nababezikonza, nababezilandela, nababezifuna, nababezibedesha: akayi kubutwa, akayi kuncw̔atywa nokuncw̔atywa: oba njengomgquba ebusweni bomhlaba." 
Jeremiah8:3 Kwakuya kuqashwa ukufa pezu kwobomi siso sonke isisalela sabo baseleyo kwesisizalwane sikohlakeleyo, kuzo zonke indawo zabaseleyo apo ndibagxotele kona, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Jeremiah8:4 KANJAKO uya kuti kubo: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Baya kuwa, bangesuki na? baya kupambuka, bangabuyi na?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Kunganina ukuba ababantu base‐Yerusaleme bapambukile ngempambuko engenakupela? bayabambelela kuyo inkohliso, bayala ukubuya." 
Jeremiah8:6 Ndapulapula ndeva ke; abateta ngokulungileyo; akwabiko namnye onosizi pezu kwenkohlakalo yake, esiti: Ndenze nto nina? Bonke bajikele ezihambeni zabo, njengehashe ligaleleka ekulweni." 
Jeremiah8:7 Kwa iṙaside emazulwini iyazi amaxesha ayo amisiweyo; kanjalo izuba, nenkonjane, nendwe, ziyagcina ixesha lokufika kwazo; kodwa abantu bam abazi isigwebo sikayehova." 
Jeremiah8:8 Ningati nina ukuti: Silumkile tina, umteto kayehova unati? Bona ke, ngenyaniso ufumane wawenza, usiba lwababa̔li lufumane lwawuba̔la." 
Jeremiah8:9 Abalumkileyo badanile, bamatisiwe, babanjiwe; bona ke, ilizwi likayehova balilahlile; bubulumko banina abanabo?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Ngako oko ndiya kunika abafazi babo kwabanye, n amasimi abo kwabaya kuwafuya; ngokuba kwa kuye omncinane kude kube kuye omkulu, bonke bebawele inzuzo engalungileyo; kwa kuye umprofite kude kube kuye umperisite, bonke bayenza ngobuxoki." 
Jeremiah8:11 Ngokuba bepilisa isapuko sentombi yabantu bam ngendawo elula, besiti: Uxolo, uxolo; nxa kungeko luxolo." 
Jeremiah8:12 Bebedanile na, ngokokuba benzile into eyintshontsho? Abake badana nakanye, abakwazi nokuva intloni: ngako oko baya kuwa pakati kwabo abawayo: ngexesha lokwohlwaywa kwabo boku̔beka, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah8:13 Ndogqibela ukubabubisa, utsho uyehova; akuyi kubako idreyive pezu kwomti weveyine, namakiwane pezu kwomkiwane, kwa igqabi liya kubuna; n ento ndibanikile zona ziya kumka kubo." 
Jeremiah8:14 Yinina ukuba sisahlala? Zihlanganiseni, siye singene ezixekweni ezinqatyisiweyo, siti tu kona; ngokuba uyehova, utixo wetu, esenzile siti tu, wasiseza amanzi enyongo; ngokuba sonile ngakuye uyehova." 
Jeremiah8:15 Sakangela uxolo, kodwa bekungeko okulungileyo; sakangela ixesha lempiliso, kodwa nasi isituso." 
Jeremiah8:16 Kwa se‐Dane bekuvakala ukutimla kwamahashe ake; ngentlokoma yokukonya kwanamandla ake langcangcazela ilizwe lonke; ngokuba besiza bagqibe ilizwe nako konke okukulo, isixeko nabahlala kuso." 
Jeremiah8:17 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kuzituma pakati kwenu inyoka, ibasiliske, ezingenakunyangwa; zaziya kuniluma, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah8:18 Ukucwayita kwam kum kulusizi, intliziyo yam kum icubukile." 
Jeremiah8:19 Nali ilizwi lesikalo sentombi yabantu bam, livela elizweni labakude, lisiti: Uyehova akako na e‐Ziyone? ukumkani wayo akako na kuyo? Yinina ukuba bandiqumbisile ngemifanekiso yabo eqingqiweyo, ngezinto ezingendawo zasemzini?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Ixesha lokuvuna lidlulile, ihlobo lipelile, kanti tina asisindiswanga noko." 
Jeremiah8:21 Ngenxa yesapuko sentombi yabantu bam ndapukile mna; ndiyalila: ukuti nqa kundibambile. 
Jeremiah8:22 Itsori ayiko na e‐Gileyadi? umpilisi akako na apo? kunganina ngoko ukuba akubuyiswanga ukupila kwentombi yabantu bam? 
Jeremiah9:1 Ayaba intloko yam ibingamanzi, namehlo am ebengumtombo wenyembezi, ukuba ndilile emini nasebusuku ngenxa yababuleweyo bentombi yabantu bam!" 
Jeremiah9:2 AKWABA ndabendinayo entlango indawo yokulalisa yabahambi! ukuba ndibashiye abantu bam, ndimke kubo: ngokuba bengabo abaṙexezi bonke, intlanganiso yabenzayo ngenkohliso." 
Jeremiah9:3 Bayagoba ulwimi lwabo, njeng esipeta sabo, ngobuxoki, bengenabuṙoti ngenxa yenyaniso elizweni; ngokuba bepuma kw enye inkohlakalo baye kw enye inkohlakalo, bengazanga mna, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah9:4 Lumkelani omnye ngomnye umhlobo wake, ningatembeli nakomnye umzalwana; ngokuba bonke abazalwana beya kulumkisa kupela, nabo bonke abahlobo bohambahamba behleba." 
Jeremiah9:5 Abanye ngabanye baya kulukuhla umhlobo wabo, nenyaniso abayi kuyiteta; bafundisile ulwimi lwabo amazwi obuxoki, bayazidinisa ukwenza ngobugwenxa." 
Jeremiah9:6 Intlalo yako ipakati kwenkohliso; ngayo inkohliso bayala ukwazi mna, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah9:7 Ngako oko utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bona ke, ndobanyibilikisa ndibalinge; ngokuba ndingati nina ukwenza ngakumbi ngenxa yentombi yabantu bam?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Ulwimi lwabo lutolo olubulalayo, luyateta inkohliso; ngomlomo wabo bayateta uxolo abanye ngabanye kumhlobo wabo, kanti pakati kwabo bayabeka isilalelo sabo." 
Jeremiah9:9 Andiyi kubohlwaya na ngenxa yezizinto? utsho uyehova; umpefumlo wam awuyi kuzipindezela na pezu kwesizwe esinjengesi? 
Jeremiah9:10 Ndiya kuhlabela isililo nesikalo ngenxa yentaba, nesijwili ngenxa yamaṙiwa entlango; ngokuba zitshisiwe, kungeko namntu odlulayo; akuvakali ilizwi lenkomo; kwa nentaka zezulu nezilo zibalekile, zimkile." 
Jeremiah9:11 Ndandiya kuyenza i‐Yerusaleme ibe zimfumba, indawo yokuhlala yempungutye; nezixeko zakwa‐Juda ndiya kuzenza ingcitakalo, kungeko ohlala kuzo." 
Jeremiah9:12 Ingubanina indoda elumkileyo, ukuba iqonde oku? ungubanina nalowo umlomo kayehova utetile kuye, ukuba akuxele? kungenxa yanina ilizwe litshabalele, litshisiwe njengentlango, kungeko odlulayo?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Wayesiti uyehova: Ngokokuba beshiyile umteto wam endiwubekileyo pambi kwabo, bengapulapulanga ilizwi lam, bengahambanga ngawo kanjalo;" 
Jeremiah9:14 koko belandele ubulukuni bentliziyo yabo, nabo o‐Bali, oko bebekufundiswa ngoyise babo:" 
Jeremiah9:15 ngako oko utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kubadlisa abantu aba umhlonyane, ndibaseze amanzi enyongo." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ndobati sa pakati kwabaheyideni, abebengabazi, kwa bona noyise babo; ndandiya kutuma emva kwabo iṙele, ndide ndibagqibele." 
Jeremiah9:17 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Gqalani, nibabize abalilikazi, ukuba beze; namalumkokazi niwatumele ukuba eze." 
Jeremiah9:18 Ewe, mabanxa̔me basihlabelele isikalo, ukuze amehlo etu atyityizele ngenyembezi, nenkope zetu zitontsele amanzi." 
Jeremiah9:19 Ngokuba ilizwi lesikalo livakala livela e‐Ziyone: Hai ukucitakaliswa kwetu! sidanile kakulu; ngokokuba sishiyile ilizwe, ngokokuba bewisile intlalo zetu." 
Jeremiah9:20 Yivani kodwa, bafazi! ilizwi likayehova, iti indlebe yenu ilamkele ilizwi lomlomo wake; nize nifundise intombi zenu isikalo, nabanye ngabanye mabafundise umlinganekazi wabo isililo." 
Jeremiah9:21 Ngokuba ukufa kunyukele ezifenstileni zetu, kungenile ezingxandeni zetu; kusika intsapo ngapandle, n amadodana ezitarateni." 
Jeremiah9:22 Teta, utsho uyehova ukuti: Ewe, izidumbu zabantu ziya kuwa, njengobulongo, pezu kwobuso bomhlaba; nanjengesitungu emva kwomvuni, kungeko osibutayo." 
Jeremiah9:23 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Isilumko masingaqa̔yisi ngobulumko baso, neṙoti malingaqa̔yisi ngobuṙoti balo; isityebi masingaqa̔yisi ngobutyebi baso;" 
Jeremiah9:24 koko lowo uqa̔yisayo makaqa̔yise ngoku, ukuba andiqonde andazi mna, ukuba ndi nguyehova, owenza ububele, nobugwebo, nobulungisa, emhlabeni; ngokuba ezizinto ndizitanda, utsho uyehova."
