Jeremiah9:25 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa ndiya kubohlwaya bonke abalukileyo ndawonye nabangalukileyo:" 
Jeremiah9:26 o‐Jipete, no‐Juda, no‐Edome, nosapo luka‐Hamoni, no‐Mowabi, nabo bonke abanqunyulwe amancam odevu, abahlala entlango; ngokuba zonke ezi zizwe zingabangalukileyo, nayo yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli ingabangalukileyo ngentliziyo." 
Jeremiah10:1 YIVANI ilizwi alitetayo uyehova kuni, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Jeremiah10:2 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Indlela yabaheyideni ningayifundi, nangemiqondiso yasezulwini ningetuswa; nangona abaheyideni betuswa ngayo." 
Jeremiah10:3 Ngokuba amasiko ezizwe engendawo: ngokuba kugaulwa umti ehlatini, umsebenzi wezandla zencibi, ngezembe." 
Jeremiah10:4 Bayawuhomba ngesilivere nangegolide; bayawuqinisa ngezikonkwane nangezando, uze ungashukumi." 
Jeremiah10:5 Banjengomti wepalime osetyenziweyo, abangetete; bafanele ukutwalwa, ngokuba bengenakuhamba: ningaboyiki; ngokuba bangenze okukohlakeleyo, kanjalo nokwenza okulungileyo akuko nabo." 
Jeremiah10:6 Akuko nanto engangawe, Yehova! umkulu wena, negama lako likulu ngamandla." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ngubanina obengayi kukwoyika, Kumkani wezizwe! ngokuba kufanele wena; ngokuba pakati kwawo onke amalumko ezizwe, nakubo bonke ubukumkani bazo, kungeko nanto engangawe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Kodwa ngokunye badolile, banyabile; usisohlwayo sezinto ezingendawo umti ngokwawo." 
Jeremiah10:9 Isilivere ekandelweyo iyaveliswa e‐Tareshishe, negolide e‐Yufazi, umsebenzi wencibi, nowezandla zomtyityishi; ukuvata kwabo lizuluṙa nesibomvu, bangumsebenzi wamalumko bonke." 
Jeremiah10:10 Kanti uyehova u ngutixo oyinyaniso, yena u ngutixo opilileyo, nokumkani ongunapakade; ngokur̔ala kwake umhlaba uyazamazama, nezizwe azingenyamezele umsindo wake." 
Jeremiah10:11 (Niya kutsho kubo ukuti: Otixo abangenzanga amazulu nomhlaba, baya kutshabalala kwa semhlabeni, napantsi kwamazulu la.)" 
Jeremiah10:12 Wawenza umhlaba ngamandla ake, wamisa ilizwe ngobulumko bake; nangengqondo yake wawolula amazulu." 
Jeremiah10:13 Nxa aku̔pa ilizwi lake, kuko ingxokolo yamanzi ezulwini; uyenyusa amafu esipelweni somhlaba; uyenza imibane kunye nemvula; nomoya uyawuvelisa ezimbekelweni zake." 
Jeremiah10:14 Badolile abantu bonke bengenakwazi; badanele umfanekiso bonke abatyityishi: ngokuba umfanekiso otyityishiweyo wake ububuxoki; akuko umoya kuyo. 
Jeremiah10:15 Yinto engendawo yona, umsebenzi wezigculelo: ngexesha lokwohlwaywa kwayo iya kutshabalala." 
Jeremiah10:16 Osisabelwa sika‐Yakobi akanjengalé; ngokuba yena engumdali wento zonke; no‐Sirayeli uyintonga yelifa lake: nguyehova wemikosi igama lake. 
Jeremiah10:17 BUTA impahla yako elizweni, wena uhleli ekuvingcekeleni!" 
Jeremiah10:18 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kusaula abemi belizwe ngexesha eli, ndibangenise ebunzimeni, ukuze babufumane." 
Jeremiah10:19 Hai usizi lwam, ngenxa yesapuko sam! isibetwa sam sibuhlungu; kodwa ndati: Ngenyaniso lento iyingozi, endifanel’ ukuyinyamezela." 
Jeremiah10:20 Intente yam icitekile, nazo zonke intambo zam ziqaukile; usapo lwam lupumile kum, lungaseko; akuko oya kwolula kanjako intente yam, noya kumisa izikuselo zam." 
Jeremiah10:21 Ngokokuba abalusi bebedolile, nokuba bengamfunanga uyehova, ngako oko abalungisekanga, nawo wonke umhlambi wabo waba lusali." 
Jeremiah10:22 Ilizwi leṙeto, bona ke, liyeza, nempitimpiti enkulu ivela elizweni lasenode; kuze kwenziwe izixeko zakwa‐Juda ingcitakalo, indawo yokuhlala yempungutye." 
Jeremiah10:23 Ndiyazi, Yehova! ukuba asi yiyo eyomntu indlela yake, asi kuko okwendoda ehambayo ukubekisa ukunyatela kwayo." 
Jeremiah10:24 Ndohlwaye, Yehova! kodwa ngokufanelekileyo; kungabi ngengqumbo yako, hleze undenze into encinane." 
Jeremiah10:25 Galela umsindo wako pezu kwabaheyideni abangakwazanga, napezu kwezizalwane ezingabizanga egameni lako: ngokuba bemdlile u‐Yakobi; ewe, bamdlile, bamgqibele, nekaya lake balicitakalisile." 
Jeremiah11:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah11:2 Yivani amazwi olucebano, nitete kuwo amadoda akwa‐Juda, nakubo abemi base‐Yerusaleme;" 
Jeremiah11:3 uze uti kubo: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Makaqalekiswe lowamntu ongevayo amazwi olucebano," 
Jeremiah11:4 endayalelayo oyihlo benu ngalo, mhlana ndabaku̔payo elizweni le‐Jipete, esidlangalaleni sesincete, ndisiti: Yivani ilizwi lam, niwenze, njengako konke ndiniyalelayo; naniya kuba ngabantu bam, nam ndoba ngutixo wenu;" 
Jeremiah11:5 ukuze ndiqinise isifungo, endafunga ngaso koyihlo benu, sokuba ndibanike ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje. Ndaza ndapendula ndati: Amene, Yehova!" 
Jeremiah11:6 Wandula uyehova wati kum: Shumayela onke lamazwi ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, nasezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme, usiti: Yivani amazwi olucebano, niwenze." 
Jeremiah11:7 Ngokuba ndanqi̔nisa kunene koyihlo benu, mhlana ndabanyusayo elizweni le‐Jipete, kwada kwanamhla nje, ndivuka kusasa ndinqi̔nisa, ndisiti: Yivani ilizwi lam." 
Jeremiah11:8 Abevanga noko, abatobanga indlebe yabo kanjalo, kodwa bahambile abanye ngabanye ngobulukuni bentliziyo yabo ekohlakeleyo; ngako ndizisile pezu kwabo onke amazwi olucebano, endandibayalela ukuwenza, kanti abawenzanga." 
Jeremiah11:9 Waza uyehova wati kum: Kufunyanwa ingcebiswano pakati kwamadoda akwa‐Juda, napakati kwabemi base‐Yerusaleme." 
Jeremiah11:10 Babuyele kuzo izikohlakalo zomakulu babo, ababesala ukuva amazwi am; balandele otixo bambi, ukuba babakonze: indlu ka‐Sirayeli nendlu ka‐Juda balwapule ucebano lwam, endalwenzayo noyise babo." 
Jeremiah11:11 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa pezu kwabo ilishwa, abaya kukohlwa ukulipepa; nakuba bakalayo kum, andiyi kupulapula kubo noko." 
Jeremiah11:12 Bangandula baye abezixeko zakwa‐Juda nabemi base‐Yerusaleme, bakale kubo otixo ababaqu̔miselayo: kodwa abayi kuka babasindise exesheni lelishwa labo." 
Jeremiah11:13 Ngokuba njeng enani lezixeko zako, bebenjalo otixo bako, Juda! na njeng enani lezitarate ze‐Yerusaleme, nimisile izibingelo kokulihlazo, izibingelo zokuqu̔misela u‐Bali." 
Jeremiah11:14 Ngako kaloku ungatandazeli ababantu, ungapakamisi ngenxa yabo isikalo nesitandazo; ngokuba ndingayi kuva exesheni lokubiza kwabo kum ngenxa yelishwa labo." 
Jeremiah11:15 Umtandwa wam unanto nina endlwini yam, akuyenza lonto ebutshinitshini eyimikumdelikane? kanjalo inyama eyingcwele imkile kuwe: nxa ukwenza okukohlakeleyo, oko uyagcoba." 
Jeremiah11:16 Uyehova walibiza igama lako ngokuti, ngumnquma oluhlaza, osiqa̔mo sihle ukubonakala kwaso; ngentlokoma yesipitipiti esikulu, upembile umlilo pezu kwawo, namasebe awo wona wapukile." 
Jeremiah11:17 Ngokuba uyehova wemikosi, okutyalileyo, etetile ilishwa ngawe; ngenxa yenkohlakalo yendlu ka‐Sirayeli, neyendlu ka‐Juda, abayenzileyo ngakubo bona ukundiqumbisa, ngokuqu̔misela u‐Bali." 
Jeremiah11:18 Kekaloku uyehova undazisile, ndide ndazi ke: oko ubundibonisa izenzo zabo." 
Jeremiah11:19 Kodwa mna bendinjengemvana engumbuna, er̔olelwa ekuxe̔lweni; ngokuba bendingazi ukuba baqingile amaqinga ngakum, besiti: Masiwonakalise umti kunye nokutya kwawo, masimnqamle elizweni labapilileyo, ukuba igama lake lingabi sakunjulwa." 
Jeremiah11:20 Kodwa, Yehova wemikosi, ogwebayo ngokulungileyo, olingayo izintso nentliziyo! mandibone impindezelo yako pezu kwabo; ngokuba ndilityilile kuwe ityala lam." 
Jeremiah11:21 Ngako oko, utsho uyehova ngawo amadoda ase‐Hanatote, abufunayo ubomi bako, esiti: Ungaprofiteshi egameni likayehova, ukuze ungafi ngesandla setu;" 
Jeremiah11:22 ngako oko, utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuwohlwaya; amadodana aya kufa ngesiṙele; onyana bawo nentombi zawo baya kufa ngendlala;" 
Jeremiah11:23 kwaye kungayi kubako isisalela kuwo: ngokuba ndiya kuzisa ilishwa pezu kwamadoda ase‐Hanatote, umnyaka wokwohlwaywa kwawo." 
Jeremiah12:1 Ulungile wena, Yehova! noko mandipikisane nawe; manditete nawe indawo zobugwebo kupele. Kunganina ukuba indlela yabakohlakeleyo inokutamsanqeleka? kunganina ukuba basekwonwabeni bonke abenzayo ngenkohliso kakulu?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Ubatyalile, bendele kanjako; bayakula, bayavelisa isiqa̔mo kanjako; ukufupi wena emlonyeni wabo, koko ukude nezintso zabo." 
Jeremiah12:3 Kodwa wena, Yehova! uyandazi; uyandibona, nentliziyo yam uyayilinga ukuba inawe: bar̔olele ukuxe̔lwa njengegusha, ubahlulele umhla wokubulala." 
Jeremiah12:4 Kude kube ninina ilizwe liya kulila, nenca yezindle zonke ziya kubuna, ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabahleli kulo? kububile izilo nentaka; ngokuba bebesiti: Akuyi kubonwa ukupela kwetu." 
Jeremiah12:5 Nxa ubalekayo nabahamba ngenyawo, bandule bakudinise, woti nina ke ukuzamana namahashe? ukuba elizweni loxolo unqabile, woti nina ke ukwenza ekukukumaleni kwe‐Yoredane?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Ngokuba kwa abazalwana bako, nendlu kayihlo, kwa bona bayakupata ngenkohliso, kwa bona bayabiza emva kwako kakulu: zungakolwa ngabo, nangona bateta kuwe ngobuhlobo." 
Jeremiah12:7 Ndishiyile indlu yam, ndilahlile ilifa lam, ndinikele umtandwa wompefumlo wam esandleni sentshaba zake." 
Jeremiah12:8 Ilifa lam linjengengonyama ehlatini kum; liyaku̔pa ngakum ilizwi lalo; ngako oko ndilitiyile. 
Jeremiah12:9 Ilifa lam liyintakakazi enamabala kum; intakakazi zingakulo ngokungqonga: yizani, hlanganisani onke amaṙamncwa asendle, waziseni ekudleni." 
Jeremiah12:10 Abalusi abaninzi bawonakalisile umyezo wam, bawubuqile umhlaba wam; bawuguqule umhlaba wam omnandi ube yintlango ecitakeleyo." 
Jeremiah12:11 Wenziwe ube yingcitakalo; uyingcitakalo nje, uyalila kum; ilizwe lonke licitakalisiwe, kungeko olibekela intliziyo noko." 
Jeremiah12:12 Pezu kwazo zonke indawo ezipezulu entlango abafaci bafikile; ngokuba iṙele likayehova lisidla kwa kw enye incam yelizwe kude kube kw enye incam yelizwe; akuko luxolo kulo lonke uluntu. 
Jeremiah12:13 Bahlwayele inqolowa, koko beya kuvuna ameva; bazidinisile, koko bengayi kuncedwa; baya kudanela inzuzo yenu, ngenxa yobushushu bengqumbo kayehova." 
Jeremiah12:14 Utsho uyehova ngakubo bonke abamelwane bam abakohlakeleyo, abacukumisa ilifa endibenzileyo abantu bam o‐Sirayeli balidle, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kubadonyula elizweni labo, nendlu ka‐Juda ndoyidonyula kwa pakati kwabo." 
Jeremiah12:15 Kwakuya kuti, emveni kwokuba ndibadonyule, ndobuya ndibe netaṙu ngakubo, ndibabuyise, baye abanye ngabanye elifeni labo, nabanye ngabanye emhlabeni wabo." 
Jeremiah12:16 Kwakuya kuti, ukuba baya kukutala ukufunda indlela zabantu bam, bafunge igama lam ngokuti: Ehleli nje uyehova! njengokuba bebefundisa abantu bam ukufunga u‐Bali, baya kwandula bakiwe pakati kwabantu bam." 
Jeremiah12:17 Kodwa ukuba abayi kuva, ndiya kugqibela ukudonyula isizwe eso, ndisitshabalalise, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah13:1 WATSHO uyehova kum ukuti: Hamba uzizuzele umbinqo weqiya, uwufake esinqeni sako, kodwa ungawungenisi emanzini." 
Jeremiah13:2 Ndaza ndawuzuza umbinqo njengelizwi likayehova, ndawufaka esinqeni sam." 
Jeremiah13:3 Laye ilizwi likayehova lisiza kum ngokwesibini, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah13:4 Tabata lombinqo uwuzuzileyo, osesinqeni sako, usuke, uye em‐Ferate, uwufihle kona emfanteni weliwa." 
Jeremiah13:5 Ndasuka ndaya, ndawufihla ngasem‐Ferate, njengokuba uyehova ebendiyalela." 
Jeremiah13:6 Kwaye kute ekupeleni kwemihla emininzi, wandula uyehova wati kum: Suka, uye em‐Ferate, uwususe kwa lapo umbinqo, endibe ndikuyalela ukuba uwufihle kona." 
Jeremiah13:7 Ndaza ndaya em‐Ferate, ndemba ke, ndawususa umbinqo kulondawo apo bendiwufihlile kona; kekaloku bona ke, umbinqo ube wonakele, ubungafanelekele nto." 
Jeremiah13:8 Landula ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah13:9 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Kwa ngokunjalo ndiya kulonakalisa ir̔atshi lo‐Juda, ner̔atshi le‐Yerusaleme elikulu." 
Jeremiah13:10 Ababantu bakohlakeleyo, abalayo ukuva amazwi am, abahambayo ngobulukuni bentliziyo yabo, balandele otixo bambi, ukuba babakonze, nokuba bababedeshe, boba kwa njengombinqo lo, ongafanelekele nto." 
Jeremiah13:11 Ngokuba, njengokuba umbinqo unamatela esinqeni sendoda, kwa njalo ndiyinamatelisile kum yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli, nayo yonke indlu ka‐Juda, utsho uyehova, ukuba babe ngabantu, negama, nendumiso, nengewalisa kum; koko bengapulapulanga." 
Jeremiah13:12 Ngako uya kuliteta kubo elilizwi: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Zonke intsuba zozaliswa ngeveyine. Baya kuti kuwe: Asikolisi ukwazi na ukuba zonke intsuba zozaliswa ngeveyine?" 
Jeremiah13:13 Uya kwandula uti kubo: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzalisa bonke abemi belilizwe, kwa okumkani abahlalela u‐Davide pezu kweterone yake, nabaperisite, nabaprofite, nabo bonke abemi base‐Yerusaleme, ngokunxila." 
Jeremiah13:14 Ndandiya kubakahlelisa omnye ngakuye omnye, kwa oyise nonyana ndawonye, utsho uyehova; andiyi kuba nanceba, andiyi kuba nalusizi, andiyi kuba nataṙu, ukuba ndingabatshabalalisi." 
Jeremiah13:15 Yivani, nibeke indlebe; ningaqanqalazi; ngokuba uyehova etetile." 
Jeremiah13:16 Nikelani uyehova, utixo wenu, ubungewalisa, engekenzi ubumnyama, zingekaku̔beki inyawo zenu pezu kwentaba ezinonewalazi, nxa nilinda ukukanya, kanti uyakuguqula kube litunzi lokufa, akwenze isitokotoko." 
Jeremiah13:17 Kodwa ukuba aniyi kuva oko, umpefumlo wam wolila ezindaweni ezifihlakeleyo ngenxa yer̔atshi lenu; laye iliso lam liya kulila inyembezi kakulu, ewe, liya kutyityizela ngenyembezi; ngokuba umhlambi kayehova utinjiwe." 
Jeremiah13:18 Yiti kuye ukumkani nakuyo inkosikazi: Zigobeni, hlalani pantsi; ngokuba kuya kuhla ezintlokweni zenu ikrone yenkazimlo yenu." 
Jeremiah13:19 Izixeko zasesuyide zivaliwe, kungeko ozivulayo; iyafuduswa i‐Juda yonke, iyafuduswa ipela." 
Jeremiah13:20 Pakamisa amehlo enu, ubone abo bavela enode: upina umhlambi wabuwupiwa, umhlambi wako omhle?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Woti nina ke, nxa aya kukwohlwaya? ngokuba ubafundisile ukuba zinkosi ezinkulu pezu kwako: aziyi kukubamba inimba na, njengomfazi oza kuzala?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Naxeshekweni uya kuti entliziyweni yako: Kunganina ukuba ndihlelwe zezi zinto? kungobuninzi benkohlakalo yako amasondo engubo yako atyiliwe, n ezitende zako zipetwe ngobudlwengu." 
Jeremiah13:23 Um‐Tiyopiya uya kuyiguqula intlonze yake na? umhlaumbi ingwe amabala ayo na? oko nani niya kwenza okulungileyo, eniqeleyo ukwenza okukohlakeleyo." 
Jeremiah13:24 Ngako ndiya kubacita njengomququ, owemkayo nomoya wasentlango." 
Jeremiah13:25 Esi sisiqashiswa sako, isahlulelwa sako esilinganisiweyo sivela kum, utsho uyehova: ngokokuba undilibele mna, watembela ebuxokini;" 
Jeremiah13:26 kukona nam ndiya kuhluba amasondo engubo yako abe pezu kwobuso bako, ukuze bubonakale ubuhloni bako." 
Jeremiah13:27 Imiṙexezo yako, nezikonyo zako, ubutshinitshini bombulo wako, pezu kwenduli ezindleni, izinto zako ezizondekileyo ndizibonile: kwoba nzima kuwe, Yerusaleme! akuyi kuba ngewele na? kwoba semva kwexesha elisengakananina ke?" 
Jeremiah14:1 ILIZWI likayehova elezayo ku‐Jeremiya ngendawo yokwoma. 
Jeremiah14:2 I‐Juda iyalila, namasango ayo ayacubuka; ayalila etoba ngasemhlabeni; isikalo se‐Yerusaleme sinyukile." 
Jeremiah14:3 Amanene abo ayatuma abancinane bawo ukuka amanzi; bayeza emacibini, abafumani amanzi; bayabuya nemipanda yabo izé; badanile, bamatisiwe, bayagqubutela intloko zabo." 
Jeremiah14:4 Ngenxa yokuba umhlaba uṙazukile, ingeko imvula emhlabeni nje, abalimi badanile, bayagqubutela intloko zabo." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ewe, nexamakazi liyazala itole endle, lilishiye ke, ngokuba bungeko utyani." 
Jeremiah14:6 Kanjalo amaqwaṙa ayema kwezipezulu indawo, ayasezela umoya njengempungutye; amehlo awo ayapela, ngokuba ingeko inca." 
Jeremiah14:7 Nakuba izikohlakalo zetu zinqi̔nela ngakuti, Yehova! yenza ngenxa yelako igama; ngokuba izipambuko zetu zininzi; sonile ngakuwe." 
Jeremiah14:8 Wena litemba lika‐Sirayeli, ongumsindisi wake ngexesha lobunzima! kunganina ukuba unjengowasemzini elizweni, nanjengomhambi opambukela ukulalisa?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Kunganina ukuba unjengendoda ebetwa bubutulu, njengeṙoti elikohlwa kukusindisa? Noko wena upakati kwetu, Yehova! siyabizwa ngegama lako kanjako; zungasiyeki." 
Jeremiah14:10 Utsho uyehova kwababantu ukuti: Batandile ukudungudela kangaka, ababambanga inyawo zabo; ngako uyehova akababuki; kaloku uya kukumbula inkohlakalo yabo, asohlwayele isono sabo." 
Jeremiah14:11 Waza wati uyehova kum: Ungatandazeli ababantu ngenxa yokulunga kwabo. 
Jeremiah14:12 Nakuba bazilayo, andiyi kupulapula isikalo sabo; naxeshekweni banikela idini lokutshiswa nomnikelo wokudla, andiyi kubabuka; koko ndiya kubagqiba ngesiṙele, nangendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo." 
Jeremiah14:13 Ndaza ndati: Au, Nkosi Yehova! bona ke, abaprofite bati kubo: Aniyi kubona isiṙele, nendlala aniyi kuba nayo, ngokuba ndiya kuninika uxolo oluqinileyo kulendawo." 
Jeremiah14:14 Wandula uyehova wati kum: Abaprofite abo bayaprofitesha ubuxoki egameni lam; andibatumanga, andibayalezelanga, anditetanga kubo; ngumlita wobuxoki, nokulaula, nento engendawo, nenkohliso yeyabo intliziyo, abaziprofiteshayo kuni." 
Jeremiah14:15 Ngoko utsho ukuti uyehova ngabo abaprofite abaprofiteshayo ngegama lam, nangona ndingabatumanga, abati: Isiṙele nendlala aziyi kubako kwelilizwe: Ngaso isiṙele nangayo indlala baya kugqitywa abaprofite abo." 
Jeremiah14:16 Nabantu, abo baprofiteshayo kubo, bolahlelwa ezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme, ngenxa yendlala nesiṙele, kungeko mntu oya kubancw̔aba, bona, abafazi babo, nonyana babo, nentombi zabo; ngokuba ndiya kugalela pezu kwabo inkohlakalo yabo." 
Jeremiah14:17 Ngako uya kuteta kubo elilizwi lokuti: Makatyityizele amehlo am ngenyembezi, ngobusuku nangemini, angabi nakupeza; ngokuba intombi ipela yabantu bam yapukile ngesapuko esikulu, ngesibetwa esibuhlungu kunene." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ukuba ndiyapumela endle, naba ababuleweyo ngesiṙele! kanjalo, ukuba ndiyangena esixekweni, naba abanezifo ngendlala! okunene kwa nomprofite nomperisite baya kufudukela elizweni abangalaziyo." 
Jeremiah14:19 Ugqibele ukulahla i‐Juda na? umpefumlo wako uyatiya i‐Ziyone na? kunganina ukuba usibetile, kude kungabiko kuti impiliso? Sakangela uxolo, kodwa akuko okulungileyo; nexesha lempiliso, kodwa nasi isituso." 
Jeremiah14:20 Siyavuma, Yehova! ukukohlakala kwetu, n okungalungi kwobawo betu; ngokuba sonile ngakuwe." 
Jeremiah14:21 Ungadeli ngenxa yegama lako, ungahlazisi iterone yobungcwalisa bako; kumbula, ungalwapuli ucebano lwako nati." 
Jeremiah14:22 Kuko na pakati kwezinto ezingendawo zabaheyideni enganisayo imvula? nezulu linganika izipango lona na? wena akunguye na, Yehova ’Tixo wetu? ngako sokangela kuwe, ngokuba nguwe owenza zonke ezi zinto." 
Jeremiah15:1 Wandula uyehova wati kum: Nakuba u‐Mosesi umhlaumbi u‐Samyali ebemi pambi kwam, umpefumlo wam ubungayi kuba ngakubo ababantu: bandulule ebusweni bam, bapume ke." 
Jeremiah15:2 Kwakuya kuti, xeshekweni bati kuwe: Sopumela pina? wandule ukuti kubo: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Abo ba mis elwe ukufa, ekufeni; nabo ba mis elwe isiṙele, esiṙeleni; nabo ba mis elwe indlala, endlaleni; nabo ba mis elwe ukutinjwa, ekutinjweni." 
Jeremiah15:3 Ngokuba ndiya kubamisela intlobo zine, utsho uyehova; isiṙele, ukuba sibulale; nezinja, ukuba ziqwenge; nentaka zezulu, nezilo zomhlaba, ukuba zidle zitshabalalise nokutshabalalisa." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ndandiya kubanikela ekuzanyazanyisweni kubo bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba, ngendawo ka‐Manase, unyana ka‐Hezekiya, ukumkani wo‐Juda, ngenxa yoko wakwenzayo e‐Yerusaleme." 
Jeremiah15:5 Ngokuba ngubanina oya kuba nenceba pezu kwako, Yerusaleme? ngubanina noya kukuku̔za? umhlaumbi ngubanina oya kupambuka ukuya kubuza ukupila kwako?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Wena undilahlile, utsho uyehova, uyile ngomva; ngako ndiya kusolula isandla sam ngakuwe, ndikutshabalalise; ndidiniwe kukuba nosizi." 
Jeremiah15:7 Ndandiya kubela ngento yokwela emasangweni elizwe; ndibahlutile abantu bam abantwana, ndibabubisile, bengabuyanga nje ezindleleni zabo." 
Jeremiah15:8 Abahlolokazi babo bayinto eninzi kum pezu kwentlabati yolwandle; ndibazisele ngakuye unina indodana elibada emini; ndiwisile pezu kwabo ngokwalama ututumelo namavuso. 
Jeremiah15:9 Ozeleyo abasixe̔nxe uyacubuka; uku̔pile umpefumlo wake; ilanga lake litshonile nxa kuseyimini; udanisiwe, wamatiswa: nesisalela sabo, ndobanikela esiṙeleni ebusweni bentshaba zabo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah15:10 Hai usizi lwam, ma! ukuba undizele ndibe yindoda yepike, nendoda yempikiswano kulo lonke ilizwe: andibolekile, andibolekiwe kanjako; bonke bayandiqalekisa noko." 
Jeremiah15:11 Wati uyehova: Ngenyaniso ndokukululela okulungileyo; ngenyaniso ndiya kulwenza utshaba luxolane nawe, exesheni lelishwa, nasexesheni lobunzima." 
Jeremiah15:12 Kungaqotywa isincete na, isincete sasenode, nexina?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Ubutyebi bako nendyebo zako ndozinikela ukupangwa, kungengenxa yexabiso, koko kungenxa yazo zonke izono zako, kwa kuyo yonke imida yako." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ndandiya ku ku dlulisa kunye nentshaba zako ukuya elizweni ungalaziyo; ngokuba umlilo upenjiwe ngengqumbo yam, uya kutsha pezu kwenu." 
Jeremiah15:15 Wena uyazi, Yehova! ndikumbule, utyelele kum, undipindezelele kubo abatshutshisi bam; ekuqumbeni kade kwako zungandisusi; yazi ukusitwala kwam ngenxa yako isigxeko." 
Jeremiah15:16 Amazwi ako afunyanwa, ndaza ndawadla; ewe, ilizwi lako laba ngumgcobo novuyo lwentliziyo yam kum; ngokuba ndibizwa ngegama lako, Yehova, Tixo wemikosi!" 
Jeremiah15:17 Andihlalanga esihlalweni sabagculeli, andavuyelela kanjako; ngenxa yesandla sako ndahlala ndedwa, ngokuba, undizalisile ngokuṙala." 
Jeremiah15:18 Kunganina ukuba ubuhlungu bam buyinto efuti, nokuba inxeba lam lelingenakupola, e lingavumi ukupiliswa? Wogqibela ukuba njeng omlambo okohlisayo na kum? woba njeng amanzi atshitshayo na?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Ngako oko, utsho uyehova ukuti: Ukuba uya kubuya, ndiya kwandula ndikubuyise, wauya kuma ebusweni bam; nokuba uya kuku̔pa okudumileyo kuko okudelekileyo, woba njengomlomo wam: mababuyele kuwe bona, kodwa wena akuyi kubuyela kubo." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ndandiya kukwenza ube ludonga lwexina olunqabileyo kubo ababantu; nakuba balwa nawe, abayi kukweyisa noko; ngokuba ndinawe mna, ukukusindisa nokukuhlangula, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ewe, ndokuhlangula esandleni sabakohlakeleyo, ndandiya kukukulula esandleni sezidlwengu." 
Jeremiah16:1 ILIZWI likayehova lalekela leza kum, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah16:2 Akuyi kuzeka umfazi, kanjako akuyi kuba nonyana nentombi, kulendawo." 
Jeremiah16:3 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ngabo onyana nangazo intombi, abazalwayo kulendawo, nangabo onina ababazalayo, nangabo oyise ababazalayo kwelilizwe, ukuti:" 
Jeremiah16:4 Baya kufa ngezifo ezifisayo, abayi kulilelwa, abayi kuncw̔atywa kanjalo; boba njengomgquba ebusweni bomhlaba; babeya kugqitywa ngesiṙele nangendlala, nezidumbu zabo zoba kukutya kuzo intaka zezulu, nakuzo izilo zomhlaba." 
Jeremiah16:5 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Ungangeni endlwini yokukala, ungayi ukubalilela, unga yi nokubaku̔za; ngokuba ndisusile uxolo lwam kubo ababantu, utsho uyehova, kwa n obubele nenceba." 
Jeremiah16:6 Kwa nabakulu nabancinane baya kufa kwelilizwe; abayi kuncw̔atywa; kanjalo abantu abayi kubalilela, abayi kuziqapula, abayi kuzenza bunqai ngenxa yabo." 
Jeremiah16:7 Abayi kubaqezulela isonka ekulileni, ukuba batutuzelwe pezu kwofileyo; kanjako abayi kubaseza ngendebe yotutuzelo, ngenxa yoyise nangenxa yonina." 
Jeremiah16:8 Akuyi kungena nasendlwini yomtendeleko, ukuze uhlale nabo ukutya nokusela." 
Jeremiah16:9 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kupezisa kulendawo, pambi kwamehlo enu, nasemihleni yenu, ilizwi lomgcobo nelizwi lovuyo, ilizwi lomyeni nelizwi lomtshakazi." 
Jeremiah16:10 Kwakuya kuti, nxa uya kuxela kwababantu onke lamazwi, baze bati kuwe: Kungenxa yanina alitetileyo uyehova lonke elilishwa likulu ngakuti? liyinto nina ityala letu? siyinto nina isono setu esonileyo ngaso ngakuye uyehova, utixo wetu?" 
Jeremiah16:11 uya kwandula uti kubo: Kungenxa yokuba oyihlo benu bandishiyile, utsho uyehova, nokuba balandela otixo bambi, babakonza bababedesha; kanti mna bandishiya, nomteto wam abawugcinanga." 
Jeremiah16:12 Nani nigqitisile oyihlo benu ngokwenza okungalungileyo; ngokuba, bona ke, nilandele omnye ngomnye ubulukuni bentliziyo yake ekohlakeleyo, engapulapuli kum." 
Jeremiah16:13 Ngako ndiya kunigxota kwelilizwe, niye elizweni eningalazanga, kwa nina noyihlo benu; nalapo niya kukonza otixo bambi imini nobusuku, ngokuba ndingayi kuninika ufefe." 
Jeremiah16:14 Noko, bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, ekungayi kubuya kutiwe: Uhleli uyehova, owenyusayo usapo luka‐Sirayeli ezweni le‐Jipete;" 
Jeremiah16:15 koko kuya kutiwa: Uhleli uyehova, olunyusileyo usapo luka‐Sirayeli ezweni lasenode, nakuwo onke amazwe apo abelugxotele kona: ngokuba ndiya kulubuyisela kowalo umhlaba, endawunikayo koyise balo." 
Jeremiah16:16 Bona ke, ndiya kutumela abalobi abaninzi, utsho uyehova, abaya kubaloba: nasemva kwoko ndobatumela abazingeli abaninzi, abaya kubazingela, bapume kuzo zonke intaba, nakuzo zonke induli, nasemifanteni yamawa." 
Jeremiah16:17 Ngokuba amehlo am epezu kwendlela zabo zonke; azisitele ebusweni bam; kanjako inkohlakalo yabo ayifihliwe emehlweni am. 
Jeremiah16:18 Kodwa ukuqala ndiya kupindezela inkohlakalo yabo nesono sabo ngokupindiweyo; ngokuba benco̔lisile ilizwe lam ngezidumbu zezinto zabo ezitiyekileyo, nelifa lam balizalisile ngezinto zabo ezibuntshontsho." 
Jeremiah16:19 Yehova, mandla am, nenqaba yam, nendawo yam yokupepela ngomhla wobunzima! kwa kuwe abaheyideni baya kuza bevela ezipelweni zomhlaba, bati: Ngenyaniso obawo betu badlile ilifa lobuxoki, izinto ezingendawo, ekungeko nanye pakati kwazo enokunceda." 
Jeremiah16:20 Kanene umntu uya kuzenzela otixo na, abangenguye utixo noko?" 
Jeremiah16:21 Ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kubazisa ngelixesha, ndiya kubazisa isandla sam namandla am, babeya kukwazi okokuba igama lam li nguyehova." 
Jeremiah17:1 Isono so‐Juda siba̔liwe ngesiqingqiso sesincete, ngetsolo ledamante; siqingqiwe pezu kwecwecwe lentliziyo yabo, napezu kwempondo zezibingelo zenu;" 
Jeremiah17:2 nxa abantwana babo bakumbula izibingelo zabo, nemifanekiso ka‐Ashera yabo emitini eluhlaza, pezu kwenduli ezinde." 
Jeremiah17:3 Ntaba yam kunye nelizwe! ubutyebi bako nazo zonke indyebo zako ndozinikela ukupangwa, n endawo ezipakamileyo zako zokwona, kuyo yonke imida yako." 
Jeremiah17:4 Wauya kuyeka kwa ngokwako ilifa lako, endilinikileyo kuwe; ndandiya kukukonzisa intshaba zenu elizweni ungalazanga: ngokuba umlilo niwupembileyo ngengqumbo yam, uya kutsha kude kube ngunapakade." 
Jeremiah17:5 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Iqalekisiwe indoda etembela emntwini, eyenza inyama ingalo yayo, nentliziyo imkayo kuyehova!" 
Jeremiah17:6 Ngokuba iya kuba njengomti weharohere elubala, ingaboni naxeshekweni kuzayo okulungileyo; koko iya kuma ezindaweni ezomileyo entlango, ezweni elityuwa nelingenabemi." 
Jeremiah17:7 Inetamsanqa indoda etembela kuyehova, netemba layo li nguyehova!" 
Jeremiah17:8 Ngokuba iya kuba njengomti utyelwe ngasemanzini, onabisayo ingcambo zawo ngasemlanjeni, ongaboni nxa buzayo ubushushu, koko igqabi lawo liba luhlaza; ongenaxala emnyakeni wokwoma, ongapezi ukuvelisa isiqa̔mo." 
Jeremiah17:9 Intliziyo inenkohliso pezu kwezinto zonke; ewe, inesifo esinzima; ngubanina ongayaziyo?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Ndim Yehova opengululayo intliziyo, olingayo izintso; ukuze ndinike kubo bonke njengokwemikwa yabo, njengokwesixakato sezenzo zabo." 
Jeremiah17:11 Njeng entendele efukamela amaqanda ingawazalanga, unjalo oqwebayo ubutyebi, koko kungengokufanelekileyo; ekuqingatisweni kwemihla yake uya kubushiya, nasekupeleni kwake woba sisityakala." 
Jeremiah17:12 Iterone yobungcwalisa, ipakamile kwa sekuqaleni, yindawo yengcwele yetu." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ulitemba lo‐Sirayeli, Yehova! bonke abakushiyayo bodaniswa; abemkayo kum baya kuba̔lwa emhlabeni, ngokuba beshiyile uyehova, umtombo wamanzi apilileyo." 
Jeremiah17:14 Ndipilise, Yehova! ndandiya kupiliswa; ndisindise, ndandiya kusindiswa: ngokuba wena uyindumiso yam." 
Jeremiah17:15 Bona ke, bati kum: Lipina ilizwi likayehova? malize ke." 
Jeremiah17:16 Mna kodwa andinxamanga ukuba ndingabi ngumalusi emva kwako; nomhla olusizi andiwukanukanga; wena uyazi: okupumileyo emlonyeni wam kwabako pambi kwobuso bako. 
Jeremiah17:17 Ungabi sisituso kum; usisipepelo sam wena emhleni welishwa. 
Jeremiah17:18 Mabadaniswe abatshutshisi bam, kodwa mandingadaniswa mna; mabamatiswe bona, kodwa mandingamatiswa mna: zisa pezu kwabo umhla welishwa, ubabubise ngembujiswa epindiweyo." 
Jeremiah17:19 WATSHO uyehova kum ukuti: Hamba uye ume esangweni losapo lwabantu, abangena ngalo okumkani bo‐Juda, nabapuma ngalo, nakuwo onke amasango e‐Yerusaleme;" 
Jeremiah17:20 uti kubo: Yivani ilizwi likayehova, bokumkani bo‐Juda, no‐Juda bonke, nabo bonke abemi base‐Yerusaleme, abangenayo ngalamasango!" 
Jeremiah17:21 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Zilumkeleni, ningatwali namnye umtwalo ngomhla wesabata, ningawungenisi ngamasango e‐Yerusaleme." 
Jeremiah17:22 Kanjako ningapumi nomtwalo ezindlwini zenu ngomhla wesabata, ningenzi namnye umsebenzi; koko niya kuwenza ngcwele umhla wesabata, njengokuba bendiyalela oyihlo benu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Kodwa abavanga, abatobanga indlebe kanjalo; koko benze lukuni intamo yabo, ukuze bangeva, nokuze bangayamkeli imfundiso." 
Jeremiah17:24 Kwakuya kuti, nxa niya kukutala ukundipulapula, utsho uyehova, ningangenisi namuye umtwalo ngamasango esisixeko ngomhla wesabata, nize niwenze ngcwele umhla wesabata, ningenzi ngawo namnye umsebenzi;" 
Jeremiah17:25 baya kwandula bangene ngamasango esisixeko okumkani, nenkosana, behleli pezu kweterone ka‐Davide, bekwele ezinqwelweni nasemahasheni, bona nenkosana zabo, amadoda akwa‐Juda nabemi base‐Yerusaleme; sasiya kuti esisixeko sihlale kude kube ngunapakade." 
Jeremiah17:26 Babeya kuvela ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, nasezindaweni zangase‐Yerusaleme, naselizweni lakwa‐Benjamine, nasetafeni, nasezintabeni, nasesuyide, bezisa amadini okutshiswa, nemibingo, neminikelo yokudla, nentlakamhlope, kunye nabazisayo iminikelo yokubulela, endlwini kayehova." 
Jeremiah17:27 Kodwa nxa ningayi kundipulapula, ukuba niwenze ngcwele umhla wesabata, nokuba ningatwali namnye umtwalo, koko niya kungena ngamasango e‐Yerusaleme ngomhla wesabata; ndiya kwandula ndipembe umlilo emasangweni ayo, oya kuzidla ingxande zase‐Yerusaleme, ungacinywa." 
Jeremiah18:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah18:2 Saka, uhle uye endlwini yombumbi; kwa lapo ndiya kukuvisa amazwi am." 
Jeremiah18:3 Ndaza ndehla ndaya endlwini yombumbi; kekaloku bona ke, ebesenza umsebenzi pezu kwamatye ajikelelayo." 
Jeremiah18:4 Sati ke isitya abesenza ngodongwe sonakaliswa esandleni sombumbi; waza wabuya wenza ngaso isitya simbi, njengokuba bekufanele emehlweni ombumbi ukusenza." 
Jeremiah18:5 Landula leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah18:6 Andingenze ngakuni na njengombumbi lo, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli? utsho uyehova: bona ke, njengodongwe esandleni sombumbi, ninjalo nina esandleni sam, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Jeremiah18:7 Nxa ndisukuba nditeta ngaso isizwe, nangabo ubukumkani, ukudonyula, nokucita, nokutshabalalisa;" 
Jeremiah18:8 ukuba isizwe eso, endibe nditeta ngaso, siyaguquka enkohlakalweni yaso, ndiya kwandula ndibe nosizi pezu kwelishwa, endacinga ukusenza lona." 
Jeremiah18:9 Kanjalo, nxa ndisukuba nditeta ngaso isizwe, nangabo ubukumkani, ukwaka, nokutyala;" 
Jeremiah18:10 ukuba siyenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni am, singapulapuli ilizwi lam, ndiya kwandula ndibe nosizi pezu kwokulungileyo, endati ndiya kubanceda ngako." 
Jeremiah18:11 Ngako kaloku, utsho ke kumadoda akwa‐Juda, nakubo abemi base‐Yerusaleme, usiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiyadala ngakuni ilishwa, ndiyaqinga ngakuni iqinga; guqukani ke, omnye ngomnye endleleni yake ekohlakeleyo, nilungise imikwa yenu nezenzo zenu." 
Jeremiah18:12 Kodwa bati: Akuko itemba; ngokuba siya kulandela awetu amaqinga, senze omnye ngomnye ngobulukuni bentliziyo yake ekohlakeleyo." 
Jeremiah18:13 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Kenibuze pakati kwabaheyideni, ngubanina okuvileyo okunjalo? Intombi ipela ka‐Sirayeli yenzile into eyoyikekileyo kakulu." 
Jeremiah18:14 Ingqweqwe ye‐Lebanone iya kushiywa na ngenxa yolwalwa lwasendle? amanzi wambi, abandayo, elayo, aya kwomiswa na?" 
Jeremiah18:15 Noko abantu bam balibele mna, bayaqu̔misela okungendawo: ewe, babaku̔bekisile ezindleleni zabo, emendweni yakudala, ukuba bahambe emizileni, endleleni engapakanyiswanga;" 
Jeremiah18:16 kuze kwenziwe ilizwe labo into yokutelwa nqa, into yokwenzelwa amakwelo angunapakade; bonke abadlulayo ngakulo boti nqa, bahlunguzele intloko zabo." 
Jeremiah18:17 Njengangomoya wasempumalanga ndobacita pambi kwotshaba; ndobabonisa umhlana, ndinga babonisi ubuso, emhleni wengozi yabo." 
Jeremiah18:18 Baza bati: Yizani, siqingele u‐Jeremiya amaqinga; ngokuba kungayi kububa umteto kumperisite, necebo kwilumko, nelizwi kumprofite: yizani, simbete ngolwimi, masingapulapuli kuwo namanye amazwi ake." 
Jeremiah18:19 Pulapula kum, Yehova! ulive ilizwi labo bapikayo nam." 
Jeremiah18:20 Ngekuvuzwa ngokukohlakeleyo na esikundleni sokulungileyo? noko babumbele ubomi bam isihogo. Kumbula ukuma kwam ebusweni bako ukuba ndibatetele okulungileyo, ukuba ndibuyise umsindo wako kubo." 
Jeremiah18:21 Ngako oko nikela abantwana babo kwindlala, ubeyelisele ngamandla eṙele; nabafazi babo mababe ngabahlutiweyo abantwana, nabahlolokazi; namadoda abo makabulawe kukufa; amadodana abo makabetwe ngeṙele ekulweni." 
Jeremiah18:22 Makuviwe isikalo sivela ezindlwini zabo, nxa ulizisayo pezu kwabo ibandla ngokuzuma: ngokuba bendimbele isihogo ukundibamba, nezibata bazifihlele inyawo zam." 
Jeremiah18:23 Kodwa wena, Yehova! uyalazi lonke icebo labo ngakum lokundifisa: zungaxoleli ukukohlakala kwabo, nesono sabo ungasisuli ebusweni bako; kodwa mabapenulwe pambi kwako; ngexesha lengqumbo yako yenje njalo ngakubo." 
Jeremiah19:1 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Hamba uzuze igubu lombumbi lodongwe, utabate kwabadala babantu, nakwabadala babaperisite;" 
Jeremiah19:2 uze upume nabo uye esihlanjeni soyana ka‐Hinome, esingasemnyango wesango lobubumbo, ushumayele kona amazwi endiya kuwateta kuwe," 
Jeremiah19:3 uti: Yivani ilizwi likayehova, bokumkani bo‐Juda, nabemi base‐Yerusaleme! Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa ilishwa pezu kwalendawo, aya kuti osukuba eliva, indlebe zake zokenceza." 
Jeremiah19:4 Ngenxa yokuba bendishiyile, nalendawo beyenzile eyasemzini, notixo bambi bebaqu̔misele kuyo, abangabazanga bona, noyise babo, nokumkani bo‐Juda; nokuba bezalisile lendawo ngegazi labangenatyala;" 
Jeremiah19:5 nokuba bezakile indawo ezipakamileyo zika‐Bali, baze batshise onyana babo ngomlilo babe ngamadini okutshiswa ku‐Bali, into endingayiyalelanga, nendingayitetanga, nengangenanga entliziyweni yam:" 
Jeremiah19:6 ngako oko, bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa indawo le ingasayi kubizwa ngokuti yi‐Tofete, nangokuti sisihlambo sonyana ka‐Hinome, kodwa ngokuti sisihlambo sobulalo." 
Jeremiah19:7 Ngokuba ndiya kulitshitshisa icebo lo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme kulendawo, ndandiya kubawisa ngesiṙele pambi kwentshaba zabo, nangesandla sabo babufunayo ubomi babo; nezidumbu zabo ndozinika zibe kukutya kuzo intaka zezulu, nakuzo izilo zomhlaba." 
Jeremiah19:8 Ndandiya kusenza esisixeko into yokutelwa nqa, neyokwenzelwa amakwelo: bonke abadlulayo ngakuso boti nqa, benze amakwelo ngenxa yazo zonke izibulawa zaso." 
Jeremiah19:9 Ndandiya kubadlisa inyama yonyana babo, nenyama yentombi zabo; ewe, baya kudla omnye inyama yomnye, ekuvingcelweni nasekuxinezelweni, abaya kuti intshaba zabo, nabo babufunayo ubomi babo, babaxinezele ngako." 
Jeremiah19:10 Uya kwandula uqekeze igubu elo emehlweni amadoda ahambayo nawe," 
Jeremiah19:11 uti kuwo: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Ndiya kwenje njalo ukuqekeza abantu aba nesixeko esi, njengokuba kuqekezwa umpanda wombumbi, ongenako ukuhlaziywa kanjako; kwakuya kuncw̔atywa e‐Tofete, kude kungabiko indawo yokuncw̔aba." 
Jeremiah19:12 Ndiya kwenje njalo ke kulendawo, utsho uyehova, nakubo abemi bayo, ndide ndisenze isixeko esi njenge‐Tofete." 
Jeremiah19:13 Kanjalo izindlu zase‐Yerusaleme, nezindlu zokumkani bo‐Juda, zoba njengendawo ye‐Tofete zinco̔lile, kwa zonke izindlu abaqu̔misileyo pezu kwezifulelo zazo kuwo wonke umkosi wezulu, nabatululeleyo otixo bambi iminikelo yokusela." 
Jeremiah19:14 Wandula wavela u‐Jeremiya e‐Tofete, apo uyehova abemtumile kona ukuya kuprofitesha, weza wema ebaleni lendlu kayehova, wati kubo bonke abantu:" 
Jeremiah19:15 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa pezu kwesixeko esi, napezu kwayo yonke imizi yaso, lonke ilishwa endilitetileyo ngakuso; ngokuba beyenzile lukuni intamo yabo, ukuze bangeva amazwi am." 
Jeremiah20:1 Kekaloku u‐Pashure, unyana ka‐Yimeri umperisite, obengumongama omkulu kanjalo endlwini kayehova, ebesiva u‐Jeremiya eprofitesha lamazwi." 
Jeremiah20:2 Wandula u‐Pashure wabeta u‐Jeremiya umprofite, wamfaka entolongweni engasesangweni lasentla lika‐Benjamine, elingakuyo indlu kayehova." 
Jeremiah20:3 Kwaza kwati ngomhla olandelayo, u‐Pashure wamku̔pa u‐Jeremiya entolongweni. Wandula u‐Jeremiya wati kuye: Uyehova akabizi igama lako ngo‐Pashure, kodwa ngo‐Magore‐misa?-?bibe." 
Jeremiah20:4 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kukwenza ube sisoyikiso kwa kuwe, nakubo bonke abahlobo bako; babeya kuwa ngesiṙele sentshaba zabo, ati amehlo ako abonele; no‐Juda bonke ndobanikela esandleni sokumkani we‐Babilone, oya kubafudusela e‐Babilone, ababulale ngesiṙele." 
Jeremiah20:5 Kanjako, ndiya kunikela bonke ubutyebi besixeko esi, nayo yonke inzuzo yaso, nazo zonke izinto ezinqabileyo zaso, nazo zonke indyebo zokumkani bo‐Juda, ndiya kuzinikela esandleni sentshaba zabo, eziya kuzipanga, zizitabate, zizise e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah20:6 Nawe, Pashure! nabo bonke abahlala endlwini yako, niya kuya ekutinjweni; wauya kuza e‐Babilone, nakona uya kububa, nakona uya kuncw̔atywa, wena nabo bonke abahlobo bako, abo uprofiteshile kubo ngobuxoki." 
Jeremiah20:7 Wandicenga, Yehova! ndada ndacengwa; wandigqita ngamandla, weyisa ke: ndibe ndiyinto yokugculelwa imihla yonke, bonke bandihleka." 
Jeremiah20:8 Ngokuba nxa ndasukuba benditeta, ndakala; ndadanduluka ukuti: ubudlwengu nokubada; ngokuba ilizwi likayehova belindenzelwa isigxekwa nesidelwa imihla yonke." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ndaza ndati: Andiyi kumkankanya, andiyi kubuya nditete egameni lake kanjalo: koko bekuko entliziyweni yam njengokungati ngumlilo otshayo, uvingcelwe ematanjeni am; ndazidinisa ukunyamezela, koko bendikohliwe." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ngokuba bendisiva ukuhleba kwabaninzi, isoyikiso besingamacala onke: xelelani, batsho ke, sasiya kuxelela ngaye: onke amakolwane am ayalinda ukuqwalela kwam; ngati, atsho ke, uya kucengwa, size simeyise, sandule sitabate impindezelo yetu kuye." 
Jeremiah20:11 Kodwa uyehova unam njengeṙoti elinamandla; ngako oko abatshutshisi bam baya kuku̔beka, bangeyisi: badanile kakulu, ngokuba bengalungisekanga; loba lihlazo elingunapakade, alisayi kulityalwa." 
Jeremiah20:12 Kodwa, Yehova wemikosi, olingayo olungileyo, obonayo izintso nentliziyo! mandibone impindezelo yako pezu kwabo; ngokuba ndilityilile kuwe ityala lam." 
Jeremiah20:13 Vumani kuyehova! dumisani uyehova! ngokuba ebuhlangule ubomi bamahlwempu esandleni sabakohlakeleyo. 
Jeremiah20:14 Mawuqalekiswe umhla endibe ndizalwa ngawo! umhla owandizala ngawo uma̔, maungatanyusanqeliswa!" 
Jeremiah20:15 Mayiqalekiswe indoda ebimshumayeza ubawo ukuti: Uzalelwe umntwana wobudoda; imvuyisa kakulu. 
Jeremiah20:16 Ewe, londoda maibe njengezixeko ezibe zicitwa nguyehova, engabanga nosizi; mayive isikalo ngokusa, nesimemezo emini enkulu;" 
Jeremiah20:17 ngokuba ingandibulalanga kwa sesizalweni; andule uma̔ abe lincw̔aba lam, nesizalo sake sibe simiti kude kube ngunapakade." 
Jeremiah20:18 Yinina lento endapuma esizalweni ukuza kubona ubunzima nosizi, ukuba imihla yam igqibeke eludanweni?" 
Jeremiah21:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, nxa ukumkani u‐Zedekiya watuma u‐Pashure unyana ka‐Malekiya, no‐Tsefaniya unyana ka‐Mahaseya umperisite, baye kuye ukuti:" 
Jeremiah21:2 Sibuzele ke kuyehova; ngokuba u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone esenza imfazwe ngakuti: kungati uyehova wosenzela njengayo yonke imimangaliso yake, ukuze anyuke kuti." 
Jeremiah21:3 Waza u‐Jeremiya wati kubo: Niya kutsho ku‐Zedekiya ukuti: 
Jeremiah21:4 Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kujikisa izixo̔bo zemfazwe ezisezandleni zenu, enilwayo ngazo ngakuye ukumkani we‐Babilone, nangakuwo ama‐Kaledine, aniṙaulayo ngapandle kwendonga; ndandiya kuwahlanganisa pakati kwesisixeko." 
Jeremiah21:5 Ndiya kulwa ngakuni nam, ngesandla esolulweyo, nangengalo eyomeleleyo, nangengqumbo, nangobuṙalaṙume, nangomsindo omkulu." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ndandiya kubeta abemi besisixeko, kwa nabantu nezilo; baya kufa ngesifo esikulu esibubisayo." 
Jeremiah21:7 Nasemva kwoko, utsho uyehova, ndobanikela u‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, nezicaka zake, nabantu, nabo baseleyo kwesisixeko besindile kuso isifo esibubisayo, na kulo iṙele, nakuyo indlala, esandleni sika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, nasesandleni sentshaba zabo, nasesandleni sabo babufunayo ubomi babo: waeya kubabeta ngohlangoti lweṙele; akayi kuba nosizi pezu kwabo, akayi kuba nanceba, akayi kuba nataṙu." 
Jeremiah21:8 Nakubo ababantu uya kuti: Utsho uyehova: Bona ke, ndimisa pambi kwenu indlela yobomi, nendlela yokufa." 
Jeremiah21:9 Ohlalayo kwesisixeko, uya kufa ngeṙele, nangendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo; kanti lowo upumayo, apongomele kuma‐Kaledine aniṙaulayo, uya kupila, nobomi bake woba nabo bube lixoba." 
Jeremiah21:10 Ngokuba ndibekile ubuso bam ngakuso isixeko esi, kube kokubi, kungabi kokulungileyo, utsho uyehova; siya kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani we‐Babilone, oya kusitshisa ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah21:11 Nangayo indlu yokumkani wo‐Juda, uti: Yivani ilizwi likayehova:" 
Jeremiah21:12 Ndlu ka‐Davide! utsho uyehova ukuti: Yenzani ukugweba kusasa, nimhlangule opangiweyo esandleni sombandezeli, hleze bupume njengomlilo ubuṙalaṙume bam, butshise kude kangabiko owucimayo, ngenxa yenkohlakalo yezenzo zenu." 
Jeremiah21:13 Bona ke, ndingakuwe, wena uhlalayo emhlanjeni, wena lwalwa lwetafa! utsho uyehova; eniti: Ngubanina oya kuhlela ngakuti? ngubanina noya kungena emakayeni etu?" 
Jeremiah21:14 Ngokuba ndiya kunohlwaya njengokwesixakato sezenzo zenu, utsho uyehova; ndandiya kupemba umlilo ehlatini layo, oya kuzidla zonke inqele zayo." 
Jeremiah22:1 UTSHO uyehova ukuti: Yihla uye endlwini yokumkani wo‐Juda, utete kona elilizwi," 
Jeremiah22:2 uti: Yiva ilizwi likayehova, kumkani wo‐Juda, ohleli pezu kweterone ka‐Davide! wena, nezicaka zako, nabantu bako, abangenayo ngalamasango!" 
Jeremiah22:3 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Yenzani ubugwebo nobulungisa, nimhlangule opangiweyo esandleni sombandezeli: owasemzini, inkedama, nomhlolokazi ningabapati kakubi: ningabenzi ubudlwengu; negazi elingenatyala ningalipalazi kulendawo." 
Jeremiah22:4 Ngokuba nxa nimana ukwenza lento, kuya kwandula kungene ngamasango alendlu okumkani behlalele u‐Davide pezu kweterone yake, bekwele ezinqwelweni nasemahasheni, yena, izicaka zake, nabantu bake." 
Jeremiah22:5 Kodwa ukuba aniyi kuva lamazwi, ndiyazifunga mna, utsho uyehova, okokuba indlu le yoba yingcitakalo." 
Jeremiah22:6 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ngayo indlu yokumkani wo‐Juda, ukuti: Wena uyi‐Gileyadi kum, uyintloko ye‐Lebanone; ngenyaniso ndiya kukwenza intlango, izixeko ezingenabemi." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ngokuba ndiya kubahlula ngakuwe abatshabalalisi, abanye ngabanye benezixo̔bo zabo; abaya kugaula isedare zako ezidlulisileyo, bazipose emlilweni." 
Jeremiah22:8 Zaye izizwe ezininzi ziya kudlula ngakuso esisixeko, bati abantu omnye kwomnye: Kungenxa yanina enje nje uyehova kwesisixeko sikulu?" 
Jeremiah22:9 Babeya kuti: Kungenxa yokuba bebeshiya ucebano lukayehova, utixo wabo, babedesha otixo bambi, babakonza." 
Jeremiah22:10 Ningamlileli ofileyo, ningamncwineli kanjako: kolisani ukulilela lowo umkayo; ngokuba engasayi kubuya, nelizwe lokuzalwa kwake akayi kulibona." 
Jeremiah22:11 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ngaye u‐Shalume unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, obengukumkani esikundleni sika‐Josiya uyise, owapuma kulendawo, ukuti: Akasayi kubuyela kona;" 
Jeremiah22:12 koko aya kufela endaweni apo bamfudusele kona, nelilizwe akayi kubuya alibone." 
Jeremiah22:13 Kwoba nzima kuye owakayo indlu yake ngokungalungileyo, nenkambili zapezulu zake ngokungafanelekileyo; okonzisayo ummelwane wake ngokungento, nomvuzo wake akawuniki kuye;" 
Jeremiah22:14 oti: Ndiya kuzakela indlu enkulu, nenkambili zapezulu ezibanzi; ozicandelayo ifenstile; ifulelwe ngesedare, iqatyiwe ngeqabo elibomvu." 
Jeremiah22:15 Uya kupata ubukumkani na ngokuba uzondelela isedare? akati na uyihlo wako wadla wasela, wenza ubugwebo nobulungisa? oko kwakulungile kuye." 
Jeremiah22:16 Walungisa ityala lehlwempu nosweleyo; oko kwakulungile kuye: asi kuko oku na ukundazi mna? utsho uyehova. 
Jeremiah22:17 Kodwa amehlo ako nentliziyo yako zipezu kwempango yako kupela, napezu kwegazi elingenatyala, ukuba ulipalaze, napezu kwokubandezela nokuncinezela, ukuba wenze ngako." 
Jeremiah22:18 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ngaye u‐Yoyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, ukuti: Abayi kumlilela ngokuti: Au, mkuluwe wam! nokuti: Au, dade! abayi kumlilela ngokuti: Au, nkosi! nokuti: Au, ubungangamsha bake!" 
Jeremiah22:19 Uya kuncw̔atywa ngokuncw̔atywa kweqwaṙashe; uya kur̔olwa alahlwe ngasele kwamasango e‐Yerusaleme. 
Jeremiah22:20 Nyuka i‐Lebanone, udanduluke; nase‐Bashane ku̔pa ilizwi lako, udanduluke e‐Habarime: ngokuba bonke abatandwa bako batiwe shwaqe." 
Jeremiah22:21 Ndateta kuwe ekwonwabeni kwako; wabusiti: Andiyi kuva. Yiyo le indlela yako kwa sebutsheni bako, yokuba akulivanga ilizwi lam." 
Jeremiah22:22 Bonke abalusi bako umoya uya kubadla, nabatandwa bako boya ekutinjweni; ngenyaniso oko uya kudana, uviswe ihlazo ngenxa yayo yonke inkohlakalo yako." 
Jeremiah22:23 Wena uhlalayo e‐Lebanone, owenza indlu yako emitini yesedare! kwoba njanina ukukedameleka kwako kwakuza pezu kwako inimba, ubuhlungu njengobomfazi oza kuzala!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Ndihleli nje, utsho uyehova, nakuba u‐Koniya unyana ka‐Yoyakime ukumkani wo‐Juda ebengumsesane wokuncamatisela pezu kwesandla sam sokunene, bendiya kukuncotula kona," 
Jeremiah22:25 ndikunikele esandleni sabo babufunayo ubomi bako, nasesandleni sabo uboyikayo, kwa sesandleni sika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, nasesandleni sama‐Kaledine." 
Jeremiah22:26 Ndandiya kugxota wena, nonyoko wako okuzeleyo, niye kwelinye ilizwe, apo beningazalwa kona: nalapo niya kufa." 
Jeremiah22:27 Kodwa elizweni apo balangazelela ukubuyela kona, abayi kubuyela kona." 
Jeremiah22:28 Lendoda u‐Koniya ingumpanda odeliweyo oqekekileyo na? isisitya kungeko inyamekelo na kuso? kunganina ukuba bagxotiwe, yena nenzalo yake, nokuba balahlelwe elizweni abangalaziyo?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Wena mhlaba! mhlaba! mhlaba! yiva ilizwi likayehova. 
Jeremiah22:30 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ba̔lani lendoda eyengenabantwana, indoda engayi kutamsanqeleka emihleni yayo; ngokuba kungayi kutamsanqeleka namnye kwinzalo yayo, ehlala pezu kweterone ka‐Davide, esapata ubukumkani kwa‐Juda." 
Jeremiah23:1 Kwoba nzima kubo abalusi abazibubisayo abaziti sa igusha zedlelo lam! utsho uyehova. 
Jeremiah23:2 Ngako oko utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, pezu kwabalusi ababalusa abantu bam, ukuti: Nina nizite sa igusha zam, nazigxota, anizilindanga ke; bona ke, ndiya kunohlwaya ngenxa yenkohlakalo yezenzo zenu, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah23:3 Kodwa ndiya kubuta isisalela segusha zam kuwo onke amazwe apo endizigxotele kona; ndandiya kuzibuyisela emaṙiweni azo, zaziya kucu̔ma zande." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ndandiya kubamisa pezu kwazo abalusi abaya kuzalusa; aziyi kubuya zoyike, aziyi kwetuswa, aziyi kuba zingeko kanjako, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah23:5 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, ukuba ndiya kuvusela u‐Davide isebe elilungileyo, nokuba ukumkani uya kupata ubukumkani alungiseke, enze ubugwebo nobulungisa emhlabeni." 
Jeremiah23:6 Emihleni yake u‐Juda uya kusindiswa, no‐Sirayeli wohlala ekunqabeni: negama lake, aya kubizwa ngalo leli lokuti: Uyehova ubulungisa betu." 
Jeremiah23:7 Ngako oko, bona ke, imihla iyeza, nxa bangayi kubuya bati: Uyehova uhleli, owenyusayo usapo luka‐Sirayeli ezweni le‐Jipete;" 
Jeremiah23:8 koko beya kuti: Uyehova uhleli, oyinyusileyo, oyingenisileyo kanjalo, inzalo yendlu ka‐Sirayeli ivela ezweni lasenode, nasemazweni onke apo endibe ndibagxotele kona; baze bahlale kuwo owabo umhlaba." 
Jeremiah23:9 NGABO abaprofite: Yapukile intliziyo yam pakati kwam, ayazamazama onke amatambo am; ndinjengomntu onxilileyo, nanjengendoda eyeyisiweyo yiveyine; ngenxa kayehova, nangenxa yamazwi ake angcwele." 
Jeremiah23:10 Ngenyaniso ilizwe lizele ngabaṙexezi; ngenyaniso ngenxa yesiqalekiso ilizwe liyalila, amariwa asentlango omile; ngokuba uhambo lwabo lukohlakele, namandla abo engalungile." 
Jeremiah23:11 Ngenyaniso nomprofite nomperisite bangabaginwa; kwa kuyo indlu yam ndifumene inkohlakalo yabo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah23:12 Ngako oko indlela yabo yoba njengendawo ezibutelezi ebumnyameni kubo; baya kugxotwa, bawe kuzo: ngokuba ndiya kuzisa ilishwa pezu kwabo, umnyaka wokwohlwoywa kwabo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah23:13 Ndibonile ubudenge kubaprofite base‐Samariya: baprofitesha ngo‐Bali, nabantu bam babalahlekisa." 
Jeremiah23:14 Nakubaprofite base‐Yerusaleme ndiyibonile into eyoyikekileyo; bayaṙexeza, bayahamba ebuxokini; bayazomeleza izandla zabayenzayo inkohlakalo kanjalo, kuze kungabiko namnye oguqukayo enkohlakalweni yake; bona bonke banjenge‐Sodome kum, nabemi bayo njenge‐Gomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 Ngako oko utsho uyehova wemikosi pezu kwabaprofite abo ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kubadlisa umhlonyane, ndibaseze amanzi enyongo; ngokuba kupumile kubaprofite base‐Yerusaleme ubuginwa ukuya kulo lonke ilizwe." 
Jeremiah23:16 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Ningapulapuli kuwo amazwi abaprofite abaprofiteshayo kuni; bayanenza abangendawo; bayateta umboniso weyabo intliziyo, ungaveli emlonyeni kayehova." 
Jeremiah23:17 Bamana besiti kubo abandidelayo: Utetile uyehova, uxolo lwobako kuni; nabo bonke abahambayo ngobulukuni bentliziyo yabo, bati kubo: Akuyi kuza pezu kwenu nalinye ilishwa." 
Jeremiah23:18 Ngokuba ngubanina oke wema esihlelweni sikayehova, waza walinakana umhlaumbi waliva ilizwi lake? ngubanina ogqalileyo ilizwi lake, waliva nokuliva?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Bona ke, uqwitela lukayehova lupumile ngomsindo, uqwitela olujingajingayo; luya kujingajingiswa pezu kwentloko yabakohlakeleyo." 
Jeremiah23:20 Ingqumbo kayehova ayiyi kubuya, kude azenze, nakude azifeze izicingo zentliziyo yake: ngeyasemva imihla niya kukolisa ukuqonda oku." 
Jeremiah23:21 Anditumanga abaprofite abo, kanti bona babalekile; anditetanga kubo, kanti bona baprofiteshile." 
Jeremiah23:22 Koko ukuba bebemi esihlelweni sam, ngebese bebavisile abantu bam amazwi am, babaguqula endleleni yabo ekohlakeleyo, nasenkohlakalweni yezenzo zabo." 
Jeremiah23:23 Ndi ngutixo okufupi na, utsho uyehova, ndinge ngutixo okude na kanjalo?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Umntu angazifihla na ezindaweni ezifihlakeleyo, ukuba ndingamboni mna? utsho uyehova. Andizalisanga na izulu nomhlaba? utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah23:25 Ndikuvile oko kutshiwo ngabaprofite, abaprofiteshayo ubuxoki egameni lam, besiti: Ndipupile, ndipupile." 
Jeremiah23:26 Kude kube ninina kwobako oku entliziyweni yabaprofite abaprofitesha ubuxoki, kwa abaprofite benkohliso yeyabo intliziyo?" 
Jeremiah23:27 abacamangayo ukuba baya kwenza abantu bam balibale igama lam ngamapupa abo, abawaxoxayo omnye kwomnye, njengokuba oyise babo bebelibala igama lam ngo‐Bali." 
Jeremiah23:28 Umprofite okunaye ipupa, makabalise ipupa; nalowo ilizwi lam linaye, makalitete ilizwi lam ngenyaniso. Iyinto nina inca kwinqolowa? utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah23:29 Alinjalo na ilizwi lam, njengomlilo, utsho uyehova, nanjengesando esiluti viti ulwalwa?" 
Jeremiah23:30 Ngako oko, bona ke, ndingakubo abaprofite, utsho uyehova, abeba̔yo amazwi am omnye kwomnye." 
Jeremiah23:31 Bona ke, ndingakubo abaprofite, utsho uyehova, abatabatayo ulwimi lwabo, bati: Utsho." 
Jeremiah23:32 Bona ke, ndingakubo abaprofitesha amapupa abuxoki, utsho uyehova, abawaxoxayo, baze balahlekise abantu bam ngelwimi zabo, nangokuzidla kwabo; ngokuba ndingabatumanga, ndingabayalelanga kanjalo; ngako abayi kubanceda ababantu nakanye, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah23:33 Naxeshekweni baya kukubuza abantu aba, umhlaumbi umprofite, umhlaumbi umperisite, besiti: Uyinto nina umtwalo kayehova? wandule ukuti kubo: Ngumtwalo nina? owokuba ndonilahla, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah23:34 Nomprofite, nomperisite, nababantu abaya kuti: Umtwalo kayehova; sendiya kuyohlwaya indoda leyo nendlu yayo." 
Jeremiah23:35 Niya kutsho, omnye ngomnye kummelwane wake, nomnye ngomnye kumzalwana wake, ukuti: Yinto nina ayipenduleyo uyehova? nokuti: Yinto nina ayitetileyo uyehova?" 
Jeremiah23:36 Kodwa umtwalo kayehova aniyi kubuya niwukankanye; ngokuba ilizwi labanye ngabanye loba ngumtwalo wabo; ekubeni niwatyekisile amazwi ake utixo opilileyo, uyehova wemikosi, utixo wetu." 
Jeremiah23:37 Uya kutsho kumprofite ukuti: Yinto nina akupendulele yona uyehova? nokuti: Yinto nina ayitetileyo uyehova? 
Jeremiah23:38 Kodwa ukuba niti: Umtwalo kayehova; kukona atsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba niteta elilizwi lokuti: Umtwalo kayehova; nangona nditumile kuni, ndisiti: Aniyi kuti: Umtwalo kayehova;" 
Jeremiah23:39 ngako oko, bona ke, sendiya kugqibela ukunilibala; ndandiya kulahla nina, nesixeko endasinikayo kuni nakoyihlo benu, kwa sebusweni bam." 
Jeremiah23:40 Ndandiya kubeka pezu kwenu isigxekwa esingunapakade, nehlazo elingunapakade, elingasayi kulityalwa." 
Jeremiah24:1 UYEHOVA wandibonisa, kekaloku nazi izitya zibini zemikiwane, zimisiwe pambi kwetempile kayehova, emveni kwokuba u‐Nebukanetsare, ukumkani we‐Babilone, ebefudusile u‐Yekoniya, unyana ka‐Yoyakime, ukumkani wo‐Juda, nenkosana zakwa‐Juda, nencibi, nabakandi, e‐Yerusaleme, wabazisa e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah24:2 Esinye isitya sibe sinemikiwane elungileyo kakulu, njengemikiwane evutwa kuqala; nesinye isitya sibe sinemikiwane emibi kakulu, ebingenakudliwa ngenxa yobubi bayo." 
Jeremiah24:3 Wayesiti uyehova kum: Ubona nto nina, Jeremiya? Ndaza ndati: Imikiwane; imikiwane elungileyo ilungile kakulu, nemibi mibi kakulu, engenakudliwa ngenxa yobubi bayo." 
Jeremiah24:4 Landula leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah24:5 Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Njengayo lemikiwane elungileyo, kwa njalo ndiya kuvuma abafudusiweyo bakwa‐Juda, endibandulule kulendawo baye elizweni lama‐Kaledine, kube kukulunga kwabo." 
Jeremiah24:6 Ngokuba ndiya kubeka iliso lam pezu kwabo kube kukulunga, ndibabuyisele kwelilizwe; ndize ndibake, ndingabaciti, ndibatyale, ndingabadonyuli." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ndandiya kubanika intliziyo yokundazi, ukuba mna ndi nguyehova; boba ngabantu bam, ndoti mna ndibe ngutixo wabo: ngokuba beya kubuyela kum ngayo yonke intliziyo yabo." 
Jeremiah24:8 Nanjengemikiwane emibi, engenakudliwa ngenxa yobubi bayo, ngenyaniso utsho uyehova ukuti: Kwa njalo ndiya kunikela u‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, nenkosana zake, nesisalela sabase‐Yerusaleme, abo basele kwelilizwe, nabo bahleli ezweni le‐Jipete;" 
Jeremiah24:9 ndoka ndibanikele ekuzanyazanyisweni nas elishweni, kubo bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba; babe sisigxekwa nento yokuzekeliswa, ilizwi lokuhlekisa nesiqalekiswa, kuzo zonke indawo apo ndiya kubagxotela kona;" 
Jeremiah24:10 ndandiya kutuma pakati kwabo isiṙele, indlala, nesifo esibubisayo, bade bagqitywe kulomhlaba ndawunikayo kubo nakoyise babo." 
Jeremiah25:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya ngabo bonke abantu bakwa‐Juda, ngomnyaka wesine ka‐Yoyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, obunguwo umnyaka wokuqala ka‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone;" 
Jeremiah25:2 elona abeliteta u‐Jeremiya umprofite kubo bonke abantu bakwa‐Juda, nakubo bonke abemi base‐Yerusaleme, esiti:" 
Jeremiah25:3 Kwa kuwo oweshumi linesitatu umnyaka ka‐Josiya unyana ka‐Amoni ukumkani wo‐Juda, kwada kwanamhla nje, leminyaka imashumi mabini anesitatu, ilizwi likayehova libe lisiza kum; ndaye nditeta kuni, ndivuka kusasa nditeta, koko ningapulapulanga." 
Jeremiah25:4 Kanjalo uyehova utumile kuni zonke izicaka zake abaprofite, evuka kusasa ezituma, kodwa anipulapulanga, nendlebe yenu aniyitobelanga ukuva." 
Jeremiah25:5 Zaye zisiti: Buyani ke, omnye ngomnye endleleni yake ekohlakeleyo, nakuyo inkohlakalo yezenzo zenu, nize nihlale emhlabeni awunikileyo uyehova kuni nakoyihlo benu kude kube ngunapakade." 
Jeremiah25:6 Kanjalo ningalandeli otixo bambi, ukubakonza, nokubabedesha; nam ningandiqumbisi ngomsebenzi wezandla zenu, ndize ndinganenzi ububi." 
Jeremiah25:7 Anipulapulanga mna noko, utsho uyehova; ukuze nindiqumbise ngomsebenzi wezandla zenu, bube bobenu ububi." 
Jeremiah25:8 Ngako oko utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba ningapulapulanga amazwi am; 
Jeremiah25:9 bona ke, ndiya kutuma ndizitabate zonke izizalwane zasenode, utsho uyehova, no‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, isicaka sam, ndibazise ngakulo elilizwe, nangakubo abemi balo, nangakuzo zonke ezizizwe ezingqongayo, ndizilahlele ekutshabalaleni, ndizenze into yokutelwa nqa, neyokwenzelwa amakwelo, nengcitakalo engunapakade." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ndandiya kupelisa kuzo ilizwi lomgcobo, nelizwi lovuyo; ilizwi lomyeni, nelizwi lomtshakazi; intlokoma yamatye okusila, nokukanya kwesibane." 
Jeremiah25:11 Kanjalo elilizwe lonke loba yingcitakalo, n ento yokutelwa nqa; nezizwe ezi zona ziya kukonza ukumkani we‐Babilone iminyaka engamashumi asixe̔nxe." 
Jeremiah25:12 Kwakuya kuti, nxa iminyaka engamashumi asixe̔nxe izalisekile, ndiya kwohlwaya ukumkani we‐Babilone, nesizwe eso, utsho uyehova, ngenxa yokukohlakala kwabo, nelizwe lama‐Kaledine, ndimise lona libe yintshabalalo engunapakade." 
Jeremiah25:13 Ndandiya kuzisa pezu kwelizwe elo onke amazwi am endiwatetileyo ngakulo; konke okuba̔liweyo kulencwadi, oko u‐Jeremiya akuprofiteshile ngakuzo zonke ezozizwe." 
Jeremiah25:14 Ngokuba izizwe ezininzi nokumkani abakulu beya kuzikonzisa kwa zona; ndandiya kuzivuza njengokwokwenza kwazo, nanjengokwomsebenzi wezandla zazo." 
Jeremiah25:15 Ngokuba etshilo uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, kum ukuti: Tabata indebe yeveyine yobubuṙalaṙume esandleni sam, uziseze ngayo zonke izizwe endikutumayo kuzo;" 
Jeremiah25:16 ukuze zisele, zingcangcazele, zigeze nokugeza, ngenxa yesiṙele endiya kusituma pakati kwazo." 
Jeremiah25:17 Ndaza ndayitabata indebe esandleni sikayehova, ndaseza zonke izizwe abenditumile uyehova kuzo:" 
Jeremiah25:18 i‐Yerusaleme, nezixeko zase‐Juda, nokumkani bayo, nenkosana zayo, ukuzenza ingcitakalo, into yokutelwa nqa, into yokwenzelwa amakwelo, nesiqalekiswa, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje;" 
Jeremiah25:19 u‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, nezicaka zake, nenkosana zake, nabo bonke abantu bake;" 
Jeremiah25:20 nabo bonke abantu abadityanisiweyo, nabo bonke okumkani belizwe le‐Hutse, nabo bonke okumkani belizwe lama‐Filistiya, ne‐Ashekelone, ne‐Gaza, ne‐Hekrone, nesisalela sabase‐Ashedode;" 
Jeremiah25:21 i‐Edome, ne‐Mowabi, nosapo luka‐Hamoni;" 
Jeremiah25:22 nabo bonke okumkani base‐Tire, nabo bonke okumkani base‐Tsidone, nokumkani beziqiti ezipesheya kwolwandle;" 
Jeremiah25:23 i‐Dedane, ne‐Tema, ne‐Buze, nabo bonke abanqunyulwe amancam odevu;" 
Jeremiah25:24 nabo bonke okumkani base‐Arabi, nabo bonke okumkani babantu abadityanisiweyo, abahlala entlango;" 
Jeremiah25:25 nabo bonke okumkani base‐Zimri, nabo bonke okumkani base‐Helami, nabo bonke okumkani base‐Medi;" 
Jeremiah25:26 nabo bonke okumkani basenode, abakufupi nabakude, omnye kunye nomnye, nabo bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba, obupezu kwobuso behlabati: waye ukumkani we‐Sheshaki eya kusela emva kwabo." 
Jeremiah25:27 Wauya kuti kubo: Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Selani, ninxile, nihlanze, niwe pantsi, ningabuyi nisuke, ngenxa yesiṙele endiya kusituma pakati kwenu." 
Jeremiah25:28 Kwakuya kuti, ukuba bayala ukutabata indebe esandleni sako kuselwe, uya kwandula uti kubo: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Niya kusela ngenyaniso." 
Jeremiah25:29 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndiqala ukuzisa ububi pezu kwesosixeko esibizwa ngegama lam, nize nina nike nipatwe na njengokuba ningenatyala? Aniyi kupatwa njengokuba ningenatyala; ngokuba ndiya kubiza isiṙele ngakubo bonke abemi bomhlaba, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Jeremiah25:30 Ngako wena woprofitesha ngakubo onke lamazwi, uti kubo: Uyehova uya kugquma kwa pezulu, aku̔pe ilizwi lake entlalweni yake eyingcwele; uya kugquma kakulu pezu kwekaya lake; isimemezo, njengesabaxovulayo idreyive, wosihlabela ngakubo bonke abemi bomhlaba." 
Jeremiah25:31 Ingxokozelo ifikile esipelweni somhlaba; ngokuba uyehova enepike nezizwe, yena uya kupikisana noluntu lwonke; abo bakohlakeleyo uya kubanika esiṙeleni, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah25:32 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bona ke, ilishwa liya kupuma kw esinye isizwe liye kw esinye isizwe, noqwitela olukulu luya kuvuswa emacaleni omhlaba." 
Jeremiah25:33 Baye ababuleweyo bakayehova beya kubako ngomhla lowo kwa kw enye incam yomhlaba kude kube kw enye incam yomhlaba; abayi kulilelwa, abayi kubutwa, abayi kuncw̔atywa, boba ngumgquba pezu kwobuso bomhlaba." 
Jeremiah25:34 Lilani, nina balusi! nikale; niqikaqikeke elutulini, nina zinkosi zomhlambi! ngokuba imihla yenu yokubulawa izalisekile, nokutiwa sa kwenu, naniya kuwa njengesitya esinqwenelekileyo." 
Jeremiah25:35 Yoti intsabo itshabalale kubalusi, nentsindo kwinkosi zomhlambi." 
Jeremiah25:36 Kwobako ilizwi lesikalo sabalusi, nesililo senkosi zomhlambi, ngokuba uyehova ecitakalisa idlelo labo." 
Jeremiah25:37 Ewe, amaṙiwa oxolo abuqiwe, ngenxa yobushushu bengqumbo kayehova." 
Jeremiah25:38 Ulushiyile, njengengonyama entsha, udada lwake; ngokuba ilizwe labo liyintshabalalo, ngenxa yomsindo wombandezeli, nangenxa yobushushu bengqumbo yake." 
Jeremiah26:1 EKUQALENI kwobukumkani buka‐Yoyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, lavela elilizwi kuyehova, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah26:2 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Yima ebaleni lendlu kayehova, uwatete kuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda, ezizayo ukubedesha endlwini kayehova, onke amazwi endikuyaleleyo ukuba uwatete kuzo: ungapunguli nalizwi." 
Jeremiah26:3 Umhlaumbi baya kuva, baguquke abanye ngabanye endleleni yabo ekohlakeleyo, ukuze ndibe nosizi pezu kwobubi endicingileyo ukubenzela bona, ngenxa yenkohlakalo yezenzo zabo." 
Jeremiah26:4 Wauya kuti kubo: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ukuba aniyi kupulapula kum, ukuhamba ngomteto wam endiwumisileyo pambi kwenu;" 
Jeremiah26:5 ukupulapula kuwo amazwi ezicaka zam abaprofite, endizitumileyo kuni, ndivuka kusasa nje ndizituma, koko ningapulapulanga;" 
Jeremiah26:6 ndiya kwandula ndiyenze indlu le njenge‐Shilo, nesisixeko ndiya kusenza sibe sisiqalekiswa kuzo zonke izizwe zomhlaba." 
Jeremiah26:7 Kekaloku abaperisite, nabaprofite, nabo bonke abantu, bebesiva u‐Jeremiya eteta lamazwi endlwini kayehova." 
Jeremiah26:8 Kwaza kwati, nxa abegqibile u‐Jeremiya ukuteta konke uyehova abemyalele ukuba akutete kubo bonke abantu, bandula abaperisite, nabaprofite, nabo bonke abantu, bambamba, besiti: Uya kufa ngenyaniso." 
Jeremiah26:9 Yinina ukuba uprofiteshile ngegama likayehova, usiti: Lendlu yoba njenge‐Shilo, nesisixeko socitakaliswa, singabi nabemi? Baye bonke abantu behlanganisene ngakuye u‐Jeremiya endlwini kayehova." 
Jeremiah26:10 Zati inkosana zakwa‐Juda zakuva ezizinto, zenyuka kuyo indlu yokumkani zaya endlwini kayehova, zahlala pantsi emnyango wesango elitsha lendlu kayehoua." 
Jeremiah26:11 Baza abaperisite nabaprofite bateta kuzo inkosana, nakubo bonke abantu, besiti: Ifanelwe ngumgwebo wokufa indoda le; ngokuba iprofiteshile ngakuso esisixeko, njengokuba nivile ngendlebe zenu." 
Jeremiah26:12 Wandula wateta u‐Jeremiya kuzo zonke inkosana, nakubo bonke abantu, esiti: Uyehova wandituma ukuza kuprofitesha ngakuyo indlu le, nangakuso esisixeko, onke amazwi eniwavileyo." 
Jeremiah26:13 Ngako kaloku, lungisani indlela zenu nezenzo zenu, nipulapule ilizwi likayehova, utixo wenu, ukuba uyehova abe nosizi ngabo ububi abutetileyo ngakuni." 
Jeremiah26:14 Mna kambe, nanku ndisesandleni senu; yenzani kum njengokulungileyo nanjengokufaneleyo emehlweni enu." 
Jeremiah26:15 Kodwa qinisani ukwazi, okokuba, nxa nindifisayo, okunene igazi elingenatyala nolizisa pezu kwenu, napezu kwesisixeko, napezu kwabemi baso; ngokuba ngenyaniso uyehova enditumile kuni, ukuza kuteta onke lamazwi ezindlebeni zenu." 
Jeremiah26:16 Zaza zati inkosana, nabo bonke abantu, kubaperisite nakubaprofite: Lendoda ayifanelwe ngumgwebo wokufa, ngokuba itetile kuti ngegama likayehova, utixo wetu." 
Jeremiah26:17 Andula esuka amadoda akubo abadala belizwe, ateta kuyo yonke intlanganiso yabantu, esiti:" 
Jeremiah26:18 u‐Mika, um‐Moreshete, ebeprofitesha emihleni ka‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, wateta kubo bonke abantu bakwa‐Juda, esiti: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: i‐Ziyone iya kuku̔tyelwa njeng entsimi, ne‐Yerusaleme yoba zimfumba, nentaba yalendlu yoba yimimango ebuhlati." 
Jeremiah26:19 Kanene u‐Hezekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, nabo bonke o‐Juda, bake bamfisa na? akamoyikanga uyehova na, wabongoza ubuso bukayehova, wada uyehova waba nosizi ngabo ububi abebutetile ngakubo? Besiya kuyenza inkohlakalo enkulu ngakuyo eyetu imipefumlo." 
Jeremiah26:20 Kwaye kuko kanjalo indoda ebiprofitesha ngegama likayehova, u‐Huriya, unyana ka‐Shemaya wase‐Kiriyate‐yarime, owaprofitesha ngakuso esisixeko, nangakulo elilizwe, njengawo onke amazwi ka‐Jeremiya:" 
Jeremiah26:21 wati akuva ukumkani u‐Yoyakime, nawo onke amaṙoti ake, nazo zonke inkosana, amazwi ake, wafuna ukumkani ukumfisa: kodwa kwakuviwa ngu‐Huriya, waza woyika, wesaba, wafika e‐Jipete." 
Jeremiah26:22 Koko ukumkani u‐Yoyakime wasusa amadoda ukuya e‐Jipete, u‐Elinatane unyana ka‐Hakebore, namadoda atile kunye naye, ukuya e‐Jipete." 
Jeremiah26:23 Ada ampumisa u‐Huriya e‐Jipete, amzisa kuye ukumkani u‐Yoyakime, owambulala ngesiṙele, waposa isidumbu sake emancw̔abeni osapo lwabantu." 
Jeremiah26:24 Kodwa isandla sika‐Ahikame, unyana ka‐Shafane, sibe sinaye u‐Jeremiya, ukuze anganikelwa esandleni sabantu ukuba bamfise." 
Jeremiah27:1 EKUQALENI kwobukumkani buka‐Yoyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, leza elilizwi ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah27:2 Utsho uyehova kum ukuti: Zenzele izinxibo neyokwe, uzifake entanyeni yako." 
Jeremiah27:3 Uti kanjalo uzitume kukumkani we‐Edome, nakukumkani we‐Mowabi, nakukumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni, nakukumkani we‐Tire, nakukumkani we‐Tsidone, ngesandla sezigidimi ezizayo e‐Yerusaleme ku‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda;" 
Jeremiah27:4 uze uziyalele ukuti kwinkosi zazo: Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Niya kutsho kwinkosi zenu ukuti:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Mna ndenzile umhlaba, abantu nezilo ezipezu kwobuso bomhlaba, ngamandla am amakulu, nangengalo yam eyolulweyo, ndandiwunikile kulowo ebekufanele emehlweni am." 
Jeremiah27:6 Nakaloku, sendinikele onke lamazwe esandleni sika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, isicaka sam; namaṙamncwa asendle ndimnikile kwa wona, ukuba amkonze." 
Jeremiah27:7 Zonke izizwe ziya kukonza yena, nonyana wake, nonyana wonyana wake, kude kufike ixesha lelizwe lake nalo: oko ziya kumkonzisa izizwe ezininzi nokumkani abakulu." 
Jeremiah27:8 Kwaye kuya kuti, isizwe nobukumkani ezingayi kukonza yena u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, nesingayi kufaka intamo yaso eyokweni yokumkani we‐Babilone, ndiya kubeta isizwe eso, utsho uyehova, ngesiṙele, nangendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo, ndide ndibagqibe ngesandla sake." 
Jeremiah27:9 Nina ngoko ningapulapuli kubaprofite benu, nakubalauli benu, nakubapupi benu, nakumatola enu, nakwizanuse zenu, abatshoyo kuni, besiti: Aniyi kukonza ukumkani we‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah27:10 Ngokuba bona beprofitesha ubuxoki kuni, ukuze nifuduswe kude elizweni lenu, nokuba ndinigxote, nize nibube." 
Jeremiah27:11 Kanti isizwe esiya kungenisa intamo yaso eyokweni yokumkani we‐Babilone, simkonze, ndiya kusalisa sona emhlabeni waso, utsho uyehova, sasiya kuwulima, sihlale kuwo." 
Jeremiah27:12 Ndateta naku‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, njengawo onke lamazwi, ndisiti: Ngenisani intamo zenu eyokweni yokumkani we‐Babilone, nikonze yena nabantu bake, nidle ubomi." 
Jeremiah27:13 Kuyinina ukuba niya kufa, wena nabantu bako, ngesiṙele, ngendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo, njengokuba uyehova etetile ngakuso isizwe esingayi kumkonza ukumkani we‐Babilone?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Ngako ningapulapuli amazwi abaprofite abateta kuni, besiti: Aniyi kumkonza ukumkani we‐Babilone; ngokuba bona beprofitesha ubuxoki kuni." 
Jeremiah27:15 Ngokuba ndingabatumanga, utsho uyehova, koko beprofitesha egameni lam ngobuxoki, ukuze ndinigxote, nize nibube, nina nabaprofite abaprofiteshayo kuni." 
Jeremiah27:16 Ndateta nakubaperisite, nakubo bonke ababantu, ndisiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ningapulapuli amazwi abaprofite benu, abaprofiteshayo kuni, besiti: Bona ke, impahla zendlu kayehova ziya kubuyiswa e‐Babilone kaloku kamsinyane; ngokuba bona beprofitesha ubuxoki kuni." 
Jeremiah27:17 Ningapulapuli kubo; konzani ukumkani we‐Babilone, nidle ubomi: kuyinina ukuba esisixeko sibe linxuwa?" 
Jeremiah27:18 Pofu ukuba bangabaprofite, nokuba ilizwi likayehova liko nabo, mabake batandazele kuyehova wemikosi, ukuba impahla eziseleyo endlwini kayehova, nasendlwini yokumkani wo‐Juda, nase‐Yerusaleme, zingayi e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah27:19 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova wemikosi ngazo intsika, nangalo ulwandle, nangazo izikondo, nangesisalela sempahla eziseleyo kwesisixeko," 
Jeremiah27:20 ezo u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone angazitabatanga, nxa wafudusayo u‐Yekoniya unyana ka‐Yoyakime ukumkani wo‐Juda e‐Yerusaleme ukuya e‐Babilone, nayo yonke imiduna yakwa‐Juda neyase‐Yerusaleme:" 
Jeremiah27:21 ewe, utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngazo impahla eziseleyo endlwini kayehova, nasendlwini yokumkani wo‐Juda, nase‐Yerusaleme, ukuti:" 
Jeremiah27:22 Ziya kusiwa e‐Babilone, zibeko kwa kona kude kube ngumhla wokuzikangela kwam, utsho uyehova; oko ndiya kuzinyusa, ndizibuyisele kulendawo." 
Jeremiah28:1 Kwaye kute kwa ngalomnyaka, ekuqaleni kwobukumkani buka‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, ngowesine umnyaka, ngenyanga yesihlanu, wateta kum u‐Hananiya unyana ka‐Hazure umprofite, owase‐Gibeyone, endlwini kayehoya, pambi kwamehlo abaperisite nabo bonke abantu, esiti:" 
Jeremiah28:2 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, esiti: Ndiyapule iyokwe yokumkani we‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah28:3 Kungekapeli iminyaka mibini ndiya kubuyisela kulendawo zonke impahla zendlu kayehova, owati u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone wazisusa kulendawo, wazisa e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah28:4 Naye u‐Yekoniya unyana ka‐Yoyakime ukumkani wo‐Juda, nabo bonke abatinjwa bakwa‐Juda abaya e‐Babilone, ndobabuyisela kulendawo, utsho uyehova: ngokuba ndiya kuyapula iyokwe yokumkani we‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah28:5 Wandula u‐Jeremiya umprofite wati ku‐Hananiya umprofite, pambi kwamehlo abaperisite, napambi kwamehlo abantu bonke abebemi endlwini kayehova," 
Jeremiah28:6 ewe, wati u‐Jeremiya umprofite: Amene, makenje njalo uyehova! makafeze uyehova amazwi ako uwaprofiteshileyo, ngokubuyisa impahla zendlu kayehova, nabo bonke abatinjwa, e‐Babilone, beze kulendawo!" 
Jeremiah28:7 Kodwa yiva ke elilizwi endilitetayo ezindlebeni zako, nasezindlebeni zabantu bonke:" 
Jeremiah28:8 Abaprofite abebepambili kum napambili kuwe kudala, baprofitesha nabo ngakuwo amazwe amaninzi, nangakubo ubukumkani obukulu, ngemfazwe, nangelishwa, nangesifo esibubisayo." 
Jeremiah28:9 Umprofite oprofiteshayo ngoxolo, lakuza kubako ilizwi lomprofite, uyaziwa umprofite lowo, ngokuba uyehova emtumile ngenyaniso." 
Jeremiah28:10 Waza u‐Hananiya umprofite wayisusa iyokwe entanyeni ka‐Jeremiya umprofite, wayapula." 
Jeremiah28:11 Wayeteta u‐Hananiya pambi kwamehlo abantu bonke, esiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngokunjalo ndiya kuyapula iyokwe ka‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, kungekapeli iminyaka mibini, kwa sentanyeni yazo zonke izizwe. Wasuka u‐Jeremiya umprofite wahamba ngendlela yake." 
Jeremiah28:12 Koko ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya, emveni kwokuba u‐Hananiya umprofite ebeyapule iyokwe entanyeni ka‐Jeremiya umprofite, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah28:13 Hamba utete ku‐Hananiya, usiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Iyokwe zemiti uzapule, kodwa uya kuzenza esikundleni sazo iyokwe zesincete." 
Jeremiah28:14 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Iyokwe yesincete ndiyifakile entanyeni yezizizwe zonke, zize zimkonze u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone; zaziya kumkonza ke: kanjako namaṙamncwa asendle ndiwanikile kuye." 
Jeremiah28:15 Waza u‐Jeremiya umprofite wati ku‐Hananiya umprofite: Yiva ke, Hananiya! uyehova akakutumanga: kodwa wena uyatembisa ababantu ebuxokini." 
Jeremiah28:16 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kukundulula ebusweni bomhlaba, lomnyaka uya kufa, ngokuba utetile impambuko ngakuye uyehova." 
Jeremiah28:17 Waza u‐Hananiya umprofite wafa ngalomnyaka, ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe." 
Jeremiah29:1 KEKALOKU ngawo la amazwi encwadi, owayisusayo u‐Jeremiya umprofite e‐Yerusaleme ukuya kwisisalela sabadala bakubatinjwa, nakubaperisite, nakubaprofite, nakubo bonke abantu abebafudusile u‐Nebukanetsare e‐Yerusaleme ukuya e‐Babilone;" 
Jeremiah29:2 emveni kwokuba u‐Yekoniya ukumkani, nokumkanikazi, nababusi, inkosana zakwa‐Juda nezase‐Yerusaleme, nencibi, nabakandi, bebepumile e‐Yerusaleme;" 
Jeremiah29:3 ngesandla sika‐Elehasa unyana ka‐Shafane, no‐Gemariya unyana ka‐Hilikiya, abebetunywa ngu‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda ukuya e‐Babilone ku‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, esiti:" 
Jeremiah29:4 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, kubo bonke abatinjwa endibenzileyo ukuba bafuduswe e‐Yerusaleme ukuya e‐Babilone, ukuti:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Zakeni izindlu, nihlale kuzo; tyalani izitiya, nitye iziqa̔mo zazo:" 
Jeremiah29:6 zekani abafazi, nizale onyana nentombi, nitabatele onyana benu abafazi, nentombi zenu nizendise kumadoda, ukuba bazale onyana nentombi: nize nande kona, ningancitshiswa." 
Jeremiah29:7 Niti kanjalo nifune uxolo lwesixeko apo ndinenzile ukuba nifuduselwe kona, nisitandazele kuyehova; ngokuba eluxolweni lwaso niya kuba noxolo nina." 
Jeremiah29:8 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Mabanganikohlisi abaprofite benu, abapakati kwenu, nabalauli benu; ningapulapuli kuwo amapupa enu, eniwenza aputshwe." 
Jeremiah29:9 Ngokuba beprofitesha kuni egameni lam ngobuxoki; andibatumanga, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah29:10 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Xeshekweni iminyaka engamashumi asixe̔nxe iya kuzalisekiswa e‐Babilone, ndiya kwandul’ ukutyelela kuni, ndinifezele ilizwi lam elilungileyo, ngokunibuyisela kulendawo" 
Jeremiah29:11 Ngokuba ndisazi izicingo endizicingayo ngakuni, utsho uyehova, izicingo zoxolo, zingezizo ezobubi, ukuba ndininike ukupela okunetemba." 
Jeremiah29:12 Oko niya kubiza mna, niye nitandaze kum: ndandiya kuniva." 
Jeremiah29:13 Nondifuna ke, nindifumane, nxa nindibuzayo ngayo yonke intliziyo yenu." 
Jeremiah29:14 Ndandiya kufunyanwa nini, utsho uyehova, ndibuyise ukutinjwa kwenu, ndinibute kuzo zonke izizwe, nakuzo zonke indawo, apo ndinigxotele kona, utsho uyehova; ndandiya kunibuyisela endaweni, apo ndanenza ukuba nifuduswe kwa kona." 
Jeremiah29:15 Ekubeni niti: Uyehova usivusele abaprofite e‐Babilone; 
Jeremiah29:16 kukona uyehova atsho ukuti ngokumkani ohleli eteroneni ka‐Davide, nangabo bonke abantu abahleli kwesisixeko, abazalwana benu abangapumanga nani ukuya ekutinjweni;" 
Jeremiah29:17 utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kutuma pakati kwabo isiṙele, indlala, nesifo esibubisayo, ndibenze njengemikiwane etyeketyeke, engenakudliwa ngenxa yobubi bayo." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ndandiya kubaputuma ngesiṙele, ngendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo, ndibanikele ekuzanyazanyisweni kubo bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba, babe sisiqalekiswa, nento yokutelwa nqa, neyokwenzelwa amakwelo, nesigxekwa, pakati kwazo zonke izizwe apo ndibagxotele kona:" 
Jeremiah29:19 ngendawo yokuba bengapulapulanga amazwi am, utsho uyehova, okuya ndatuma kubo izicaka zam abaprofite, ndivuka kusasa ndizituma; kodwa anipulapulanga, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah29:20 Ngako yivani ilizwi likayehova, nonke nina batinjwa, endibandululeyo e‐Yerusaleme ukuya e‐Babilone!" 
Jeremiah29:21 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngaye u‐Ahabi unyana ka‐Kolaya, nangaye u‐Zedekiya unyana ka‐Mahaseya, abaprofitesha kuni ubuxoki ngegama lam: Bona ke, ndiya kubanikela esandleni sika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, oya kubabulala pambi kwamehlo enu." 
Jeremiah29:22 Kwakuya kutatyatwa kwa kubo isiqalekiso, ngabo bonke abatinjwa bakwa‐Juda abase‐Babilone, sokuti: Uyehova makakwenze njengo‐Zedekiya nanjengo‐Ahabi, abebesojwa ngukumkani we‐Babilone emlilweni;" 
Jeremiah29:23 ngenxa yokuba benzile okuhlazekileyo kwa‐Sirayeli, baṙexeza abafazi babamelwane babo, bateta amazwi ngegama lam ngobuxoki, endingabayalelanga wona: ndiyazi ke mna, ndilinqi̔na, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah29:24 Nakuye u‐Shemaya um‐Nehelami, uya kutsho usiti:" 
Jeremiah29:25 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba uzitumile incwadi ngegama lako kubo bonke abantu abase‐Yerusaleme, nakuye u‐Tsefaniya unyana ka‐Mahaseya umperisite, nakubo bonke abaperisite, usiti:" 
Jeremiah29:26 Uyehova ukwenzile umperisite esikundleni sika‐Yoyada umperisite, kuze kubeko abongama endlwini kayehova, ngenxa yosukuba egeza, nosukuba ezenzisa umprofite, ukuba umfake entolongweni nasemitini yokubamba." 
Jeremiah29:27 Ngako kaloku kunganina ukuba akukalimelanga u‐Jeremiya um‐Hanatote, ozenzisayo umprofite kuni?" 
Jeremiah29:28 Ngokuba ngenxa yoku etumile kuti e‐Babilone, esiti: Kwoba kade oku kutinjwa; zakeni izindlu, nihlale kuzo; tyalani izitiya, nitye iziqa̔mo zazo." 
Jeremiah29:29 Waye u‐Tsefaniya eleseshile lencwadi ezindlebeni zika‐Jeremiya umprofite. 
Jeremiah29:30 Landula ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah29:31 Tuma kubo bonke abasekutinjweni, usiti: Utsho uyehova ngaye u‐Shemaya um‐Nehelami, ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba u‐Shemaya eprofiteshile kuni, nxa bendingamtumanga mna, nokuba enitembisile ebuxokini:" 
Jeremiah29:32 ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kwohlwaya u‐Shemaya um‐Nehelami, nenzalo yake; akuyi kubako kuye namnye ehlala pakati kwababantu, nalonto elungileyo endiya kuyenzela abantu bam akayi kuyibona, utsho uyehova; ngokuba etetile impambuko ngakuye uyehova." 
Jeremiah30:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah30:2 Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ziba̔lele onke amazwi endiwatetileyo kuwe encwadini." 
Jeremiah30:3 Ngokuba, bona ke, imihla isiza, utsho uyehova, nxa ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli no‐Juda, utsho uyehova; ndandiya kubabuyisela elizweni endalinikayo koyise babo, baze balifuye." 
Jeremiah30:4 Kekaloku ngawo la amazwi awatetileyo uyehova ngo‐Sirayeli nango‐Juda. 
Jeremiah30:5 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Ilizwi lokunkwantyisa silivile; kuko ulwoyiko, kungeko uxolo." 
Jeremiah30:6 Buzani ke, nibone, ukuba umntu oyindoda uyazala na? Kunganina ukuba ndibona amadoda onke enezandla zawo esinqeni sawo, njengomfazi oza kuzala, nokuba ubuso bonke buguqulwe baba bumhlope?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Au! ngokuba lowamhla umkulu, kude kungabiko ofana nawo; lixesha lobunzima ku‐Yakobi, oya kusindiswa kulo noko." 
Jeremiah30:8 Ngokuba kuya kuti ngalowamhla, utsho uyehova wemikosi, ndiya kwapula iyokwe yake entanyeni yako, nezinxibo zako ndoziqaula; kanjalo abasemzini abayi kubuya bamkonzise." 
Jeremiah30:9 Koko baya kukonza uyehova, utixo wabo, no‐Davide ukumkani wabo, lowo ndiya kumvusela bona." 
Jeremiah30:10 Ngako wena, ungoyiki, sicaka sam Yakobi! utsho uyehova; ungetuswa, Sirayeli! ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kukusindisa kwa kude, nenzalo yako elizweni lokutinjelwa kwako; waeya kubuya u‐Yakobi, abe nokupumla, onwabe, kungeko oya kumnkwantyisa." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ngokuba ndinawe mna, utsho uyehova, ukuba ndikusindise; nangona ndikwenza ukugqitywa kuzo zonke izizwe apo ndikute sa kona, andiyi kwenzela wena ukugqitywa noko; kodwa ndiya kukwohlwaya ngokufanelekileyo, ndingagqibeli ukukuyeka ungabi natyala." 
Jeremiah30:12 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Isapuko sako sesingenakupola, isibetwa sako sibuhlungu." 
Jeremiah30:13 Akuko otetelela indawo yako, kuze kubotshwe; amayeza okupolisa akako kuwe." 
Jeremiah30:14 Bonke abatandwa bako bakulibele, ababuzi ngawe; ngokuba ndikubetile ngesibeto sotshaba, ngesohlwayo sonobukali, ngenxa yobuninzi benkohlakalo yako, ngenxa yokuba izono zako zandile." 
Jeremiah30:15 Ukalela nina pezu kwesapuko sako? ubuhlungu bako bobungenakupiliswa: ngenxa yobuninzi benkohlakalo yako, ngenxa yokuba izono zako zandile, ndizenze ezizinto kuwe."
