Jeremiah30:16 Noko ke, bonke abakudlayo baya kudliwa, nazo zonke intshaba zako, kwa zona zonke, ziya kuya ekutinjweni; baye abo bakupangayo beya kuba yinto yokupangwa, nabo bakufacayo ndobanikela ekufacweni." 
Jeremiah30:17 Ngokuba ndiya kubuyisela ukupila kuwe, ndikupolisele amanxeba ako, utsho uyehova; ngokokuba bakubiza ngokuti uligxotwakazi, besiti: Yi‐Ziyone le, ekungeko obuzayo ngayo." 
Jeremiah30:18 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwentente zika‐Yakobi, ndibe netaṙu pezu kwentlalo zake; isixeko siya kwakiwa pezu kweyaso imfumba, nendlukazi, iya kumiwa ngesiko layo." 
Jeremiah30:19 Kwakuya kupuma kuzo umbulelo, nelizwi labanemigcobo: ndiya kubandisa, abayi kuncitshiswa; ndandiya kubenza babekwe, abayi kudelwa." 
Jeremiah30:20 Abantwana babo nabo boba njengokwapambili, nentlanganiso yabo yomiswa pambi kwam; ndandiya kubohlwaya bonke abancinezeli babo." 
Jeremiah30:21 Kanjalo usongcwalisa wabo woba ngowakubo, nompati wabo uya kupuma kwa pakati kwabo; ndiya kumsondeza, waeya kuza kufupi kum: pofu ngubanina lo oyibambisileyo intliziyo yake ukuza kufupi kum? utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah30:22 Naniya kuba ngabantu bam, ndoti mna ndibe ngutixo wenu." 
Jeremiah30:23 Bona ke, uqwitela lukayehova lupumile ngomsindo, uqwitela olukukulisayo; luyakujingajingiswa pezu kwentloko yabakohlakeleyo." 
Jeremiah30:24 Ingqumbo eshushu kayehova ayiyi kubuya, kude azenze, nakude azifeze izicingo zentliziyo yake: ngeyasemva imihla niya kuqonda oku." 
Jeremiah31:1 Ngeloxesha, utsho uyehova, ndoba ngutixo kuzo zonke izizalwane zika‐Sirayeli, zoti zona zibe ngabantu bam." 
Jeremiah31:2 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bafumene ufefe entlango abantu abasindileyo kwisiṙele, kwa o‐Sirayeli, ndakuya ukubanika ukupumla." 
Jeremiah31:3 Kudala uyehova wabonakala kum, wati: Ewe, ndikutandile ngotando olungunapakade; ngako oko ndikwolulele ububele." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ndobuya ndikwake, wauya kwakiwa, ntombi ipela yakwa‐Sirayeli! uya kubuya uhonjwe ngentambula zako, upumele emdudweni wabanemigcobo." 
Jeremiah31:5 Uya kutyala kanjako imiyezo yemiti yeveyine ezintabeni zase‐Samariya: abatyali baya kutyala, nesiqa̔mo baya kusidla." 
Jeremiah31:6 Ngokuba kuya kubako umhla, nxa abalindi abasentabeni yakwa‐Frayime baya kubiza, besiti: Sukani, sinyuke siye e‐Ziyone, kuyehova utixo wetu." 
Jeremiah31:7 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Dandulukani ngovuyo ngenxa yo‐Yakobi, nimemeze pakati kwesiyintloko yezizwe; vakalisani, dumisani, niti: Sindisa, Yehova! abantu bako, isisalela so‐Sirayeli." 
Jeremiah31:8 Bona ke, ndiya kubavelisa elizweni lasenode, ndibabute kwa semacaleni omhlaba: pakati kwabo kwobako imfama neziqwala, omitiyo noza kuzala kwa kunye; intlanganiso enkulu yobuyela apa." 
Jeremiah31:9 Ngokulila baya kuza, nangezikungo ndobakapa; ndiya kubakokela ngasemilanjeni yamanzi, ngendlela elungeleleneyo, abangayi kuku̔beka kuyo; ngokuba ndinguyise ku‐Sirayeli, no‐Frayime ulizibulo lam yena." 
Jeremiah31:10 Yivani ilizwi likayehova, nina zizwe! nishumayele eziqitini ezikude, niti: Lowo owacitayo u‐Sirayeli uya kumbuta, amgcine njengokuba umalusi egcina umhlambi wake." 
Jeremiah31:11 Ngokuba uyehova emkulule u‐Yakobi; umhlangule esandleni salowo omandla abemakulu kwawake. 
Jeremiah31:12 Babeya kuza badanduluke pezu kwendawo epezulu ye‐Ziyone, bele ekulungeni kukayehova, ngenxa yenqolowa, nangenxa yeveyine, nangenxa yeoli, nangenxa yamatole egusha nawenkomo: woti umpefumlo wabo ube njengomyezo ocenceshiweyo; abayi kupinda ukucubuka kanjako." 
Jeremiah31:13 Oko intombi ipela iya kuvuya emdudweni, kwa namadodana namaxego kunye; ngokuba ndiya kuguqula ukulila kwabo kube ngumgcobo, ndibatutuzele, ndibavuyise emva kwosizi lwabo." 
Jeremiah31:14 Ndandiya kuhlutisa umpefumlo wabaperisite ngobunqata, nabantu bam baya kukoliswa kukulunga kwam, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah31:15 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ilizwi, lavakala e‐Rama, isikalo, isililo esiṙaṙa kunene; u‐Rakele elilela abantwana bake, esala ukututuzelwa pezu kwabantwana bake, ngokuba bengaseko." 
Jeremiah31:16 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bamba ilizwi lako ekulileni, namehlo ako ezinyembezini: ngokuba kuko umvuzo kumsebenzi wako, utsho uyehova; ngokuba beya kubuya elizweni lotshaba." 
Jeremiah31:17 Kuko kanjalo itemba kokwasemva kwako, utsho uyehova; ngokuba abantwana bako beya kubuyela emdeni wabo." 
Jeremiah31:18 Ndivile ngokwenene u‐Frayime ezincwinela, esiti: Undohlwayile, ndaza ndohlwaywa ke, njengenkatyana engaqeliswanga: ndiguqule, ndandiya kuguqulwa; ngokuba wena unguyehova, utixo wam." 
Jeremiah31:19 Ngenyaniso, emva kwokuguqulwa kwam, ndaba nosizi, nasemva kwokwaziswa kwam, ndatywakaza etangeni; bendidanile, ewe, ndamatiswa kanjalo, ngokokuba ndatwala ihlazo lobutsha bam." 
Jeremiah31:20 U‐Frayime asi nguye na unyana onqabileyo kum? asi nguye na umntwana weziyolo? ngokuba kwa kuseloko ndabenditeta ngakuye, ndisamkumbula ngenyaniso; ngako oko amatumbu am ayaxuxuzela pezu kwake; ndoba netaṙu ngakuye ngokwenene, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah31:21 Zipakamisele intsika, zimisele izibonda ezide, bekela intliziyo yako emendweni, endleleni wabuhamba ngayo: buya, ntombi ipela yakwa‐Sirayeli! buyela kuzo izixeko zako ezi." 
Jeremiah31:22 Kude kube ninina uya kupalapala, wena ntombi epambukayo? ngokuba uyehova edalile into entsha emhlabeni: inkazana iya kupahla indoda." 
Jeremiah31:23 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Kwoba kusatshiwo elilizwi elizweni lase‐Juda, nasezixekweni zayo, nxa ndibuyisayo ukutinjwa kwabo, lokuti: Wanga uyehova angakutamsanqela, wena ntlalo yobulungisa, ntaba yobungcwele!" 
Jeremiah31:24 Babeya kuhlala kulo o‐Juda nazo zonke izixeko zabo kunye, abalimi nabo bahambayo nomhlambi." 
Jeremiah31:25 Ngokuba ndihlutisile umpefumlo odiniweyo, nayo yonke imipefumlo ecubukileyo ndiyizalisile." 
Jeremiah31:26 Pezu kwoku ndavuka, ndakangela, nobutongo bam bona bebumnandi kum." 
Jeremiah31:27 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa ndiya kuhlwayela indlu ka‐Sirayeli, nendlu ka‐Juda, ngembewu yabantu nangembewu yezilo." 
Jeremiah31:28 Kwakuya kuti, njengokuba ndilindile pezu kwabo, ukudonyula, nokucita, nokuwisa, nokutshabalalisa, nokubandezela; kwa njalo ndiya kulinda pezu kwabo, ukwaka, nokutyala, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah31:29 Kuleyomihla abasayi kuti: Oyise bazityile idreyive ezimuncu, nabantwana amazinyo abo ayateleziswa." 
Jeremiah31:30 Koko bonke ngabanye baya kufa ngenxa yokwabo ukukohlakala; bonke abantu abatyayo idreyive ezimuncu amazinyo abo aya kuteleziswa. 
Jeremiah31:31 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa ndiya kwenzela indlu ka‐Sirayeli, nendlu ka‐Juda, ucebano olutsha:" 
Jeremiah31:32 kungenjengalo ucebano endalwenzayo noyise babo, emhleni ndabendibamba isandla sabo, ukuba ndibapumise elizweni le‐Jipete; abati ucebano lwam balwapula, nakuba benditshatile nabo, utsho uyehova;" 
Jeremiah31:33 koko lulo olu ucebano endiya kulwenza nendlu ka‐Sirayeli, emveni kwalomihla, utsho uyehova: ndiya kubeka umteto wam embilini wabo, napezu kwentliziyo yabo ndowuba̔la; ndandiya kuba ngutixo wabo, bati bona babe ngabantu bam." 
Jeremiah31:34 Baye bengayi kubuya bafundise omnye ummelwane wake, nomnye umzalwana wake, besiti: Yazini uyehova; ngokuba beya kundazi bonke, kwa kuye omncinane wabo kude kube kuye omkulu wabo, utsho uyehova; ngokuba ndiya kuxolela ukukohlakala kwabo, nesono sabo andiyi kubuya ndisikumbule." 
Jeremiah31:35 Utsho ukuti uyehova, owanika ilanga libe sisikanyiso ngemini, imimiso yenyanga neyenkwenkwezi zibe sisikanyiso ngobusuku, ozolisayo ulwandle, nxa amaza alo agqumayo; nguyehova wemikosi igama lake:" 
Jeremiah31:36 Ukuba lemimiso iya kumka ebusweni bam, utsho uyehova, iya kupela nenzalo ka‐Sirayeli ingabi sisizwe pambi kwam imihla yonke." 
Jeremiah31:37 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ukuba amazulu pezulu angalinganiswa, nokuba imisekelo yomhlaba ezantsi ingapengululwa, kanjalo nam ndiya kulahla yonke inzalo ka‐Sirayeli, ngenxa yako konke abakwenzileyo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah31:38 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa isixeko siya kwakelwa uyehova, kwa kuyo inqaba ye‐Hananele kude kube kulo isango legumbi." 
Jeremiah31:39 Yaiya kubuya ipume intambo yokulinganisa malungana naso pezu kwenduli ye‐Garebe, ijikelele ngase‐Gohate." 
Jeremiah31:40 Nawo wonke umhlambo wemizimba efileyo, nowotutu, nawo onke amasimi kude kube ngumlanjana we‐Kidrone, kude kube ligumbi lesango lamahashe ngasempumalanga, zonke ezondawo zoba ngcwele kuyehova: asiyi kudonyulwa, asiyi kubuya siwiswe kanjalo, kude kube ngunapakade." 
Jeremiah32:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova ngoweshumi umnyaka ka‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda: umnyaka lowo ubungoweshumi linesibozo umnyaka ka‐Nebukanetsare. 
Jeremiah32:2 Ngokuba oko impi yokumkani we‐Babilone ibiṙaula i‐Yerusaleme; no‐Jeremiya umprofite yena ebevalelwe enkundleni yentolongo, ebisendlwini yokumkani wo‐Juda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Ngokuba u‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda ebemvalele, esiti: Yinina ukuba uprofiteshe, usiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kunikela isixeko esi esandleni sokumkani we‐Babilone, waeya kusibamba;" 
Jeremiah32:4 no‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda yena akayi kusinda esandleni sama‐Kaledine, koko eya kunikelwa ngenyaniso esandleni sokumkani we‐Babilone, atete naye umlomo ngakuwo umlomo, ati amehlo ake abone amehlo ake;" 
Jeremiah32:5 waeya kumsa u‐Zedekiya e‐Babilone, oya kubako kona ndide ndimkangele, utsho uyehova: nakuba nilwayo nama‐Kaledine, aniyi kutamsanqeleka." 
Jeremiah32:6 Waza wati u‐Jeremiya: Ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah32:7 Bona ke, u‐Hanamele, unyana ka‐Shalume uyihlokazi wako, uya kuza kuwe, esiti: Zitengele intsimi yam ese‐Hanatote, ngokuba ibango lenkululo lelako, lokuba uyitenge." 
Jeremiah32:8 Kwa njalo u‐Hanamele, unyana wobawokazi wam, weza kum, njengelizwi likayehova, enkundleni yentolongo, wati kum: Kautenge intsimi yam ese‐Hanatote, esezweni lakwa‐Benjamine; ngokuba ibango lelifa lelako, nenkululo ikwa yeyako; zitengele yona. Ndaza ndazi ke ukuba lilizwi likayehova eli." 
Jeremiah32:9 Ngako ndayitenga intsimi leyo ku‐Hanamele unyana wobawokazi wam, ese‐Hanatote, ndayilinganisela kuye imali, ishekele zesilivere ezilishumi linesixe̔nxe." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ndaye ndiba̔la encwadini, ndayincamatisela, ndanqi̔nisa amanqi̔na, ndalinganisa imali esilinganiselweni." 
Jeremiah32:11 Ndaza ndayitabata incwadi yentengo, leyo ebincanyatiselwe njengawo umteto nommiso, naleyo ebivulekile." 
Jeremiah32:12 Ndandula ndayinika incwadi yentengo ku‐Baruke, unyana ka‐Neriya, unyana ka‐Mahaseya, pambi kwamehlo ka‐Hanamele unyana wobawokazi wam, napambi kwamehlo amanqi̔na abeba̔lile encwadini yentengo, pambi kwamehlo awo onke ama‐Juda abehleli enkundleni yentolongo." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ndaza ndamyalela u‐Baruke pambi kwamehlo abo, ngokuti:" 
Jeremiah32:14 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Tabata incwadi ezi, lencwadi yentengo, kwa leyo encanyatiselweyo, nalencwadi evulekileyo, uzibekele esityeni sodongwe, zize zimane zibako imihla emininzi." 
Jeremiah32:15 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Kwobuya kutengwe izindlu, namasimi, nemiyezo yemiti yeveyine, kwelilizwe." 
Jeremiah32:16 Ndaza ndatandaza kuyehova, emveni kwokuba ndibe ndinikile incwadi yentengo ku‐Baruke unyana ka‐Neriya, ndisiti:" 
Jeremiah32:17 Au, Nkosi Yehova! Bona ke, wena wenzile izulu nomhlaba, ngamandla ako amakulu, nangengalo yako eyolulweyo; akuko nto ekunqabelayo:" 
Jeremiah32:18 usenza ububele kumawaka, ubuyekeza ukukohlakala kwoyise esifubeni sabantwana babo emva kwabo; utixo omkulu, ongusomandla; nguyehova wemikosi igama lake:" 
Jeremiah32:19 umkulu ngobucebo, unamandla ngokwenza, omehlo ako avulekile pezu kwazo zonke indlela zonyana babantu, ukuba unike kwabanye ngabanye njengendlela yabo, nanjengesixakato sezenzo zabo:" 
Jeremiah32:20 obekileyo imiqondiso nemimangaliso elizweni le‐Jipete kwada kwanamhla nje, nakwa‐Sirayeli, napakati kw abanye abantu, waza wazenzela igama, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje:" 
Jeremiah32:21 ngokuba wabupumisa abantu bako o‐Sirayeli elizweni le‐Jipete, ngemiqondiso, nangemimangaliso, nangesandla esomeleleyo, nangengalo eyolulweyo, nangesoyikiso esikulu;" 
Jeremiah32:22 waza wabanika elilizwe, owabufunga koyise babo ukuba wobapa lona, ilizwe elela ubisi nobusi." 
Jeremiah32:23 Bada bangena balifuya; kodwa abavanga ilizwi lako, abahambanga ngomteto wako kanjako; konke ububayalela ngako ukuba bakwenze abakwenzanga; kukona ubahlisele lonke elilishwa." 
Jeremiah32:24 Bona ke, indulana zifikele isixeko, ukuba sibanjwe; nesixeko sona sinikelwe esandleni sama‐Kaledine, alwayo ngakuso, ngesiṙele, nangendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo; kanjalo oko wakutetayo kuze kubako, nanku wena ubona nje." 
Jeremiah32:25 Noko, Nkosi, Yehova! ute kum: Zitengele intsimi ngemali, unqi̔nise amanqi̔na, nakuba isixeko sinikelwe esandleni sama‐Kaledine." 
Jeremiah32:26 Landula ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah32:27 Bona ke, mna ndi nguyehova, utixo woluntu lwonke: kungabako na enye into endinqabelayo?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kunikela isixeko esi esandleni sama‐Kaledine, nasesandleni sika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, waeya kusibamba." 
Jeremiah32:29 Oti ama‐Kaledine, alwayo ngakuso isixeko esi, eze apembe umlilo kwesisixeko, asitshise; kwa nezindlu abaqu̔misele u‐Bali pezu kwezifulelo zazo, nabatululele otixo bambi iminikelo yokusela, ukuba bandiqumbise." 
Jeremiah32:30 Ngokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli nosapo luka‐Juda lukwenzile oko kukohlakeleyo kupela emehlweni am kwa sebutsheni balo; ngokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli lundiqumbisile kupela ngomsebenzi wezandla zalo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah32:31 Ngokuba sibe siyinto yengqumbo yam nento yobuṙalaṙume bam esisixeko kum, kwa semhleni sakiwa ngawo kwada kwanamhla nje; ukuze ndisisuse ebusweni bam," 
Jeremiah32:32 ngenxa yayo yonke inkohlakalo yosapo luka‐Sirayeli, neyosapo luka‐Juda, leyo luyenzileyo ukundiqumbisa; lona, okumkani balo, inkosana zalo, abaperisite balo, nabaprofite balo, namadoda akwa‐Juda, nabemi base‐Yerusaleme." 
Jeremiah32:33 Ngokuba bendijikele umhlana, babungebubo ubuso; nangona bendibafundisa, ndivuka kusasa ndifundisa, abapulapulanga noko ukuba balwamkele ululeko;" 
Jeremiah32:34 koko bebemisa izinto zabo ezizondekileyo endlwini ebizwayo ngegama lam, ukuze bayinco̔lise;" 
Jeremiah32:35 baye besaka indawo ezipakamileyo zika‐Bali, ezisesihlanjeni sonyana ka‐Hinome, ukuba badlulise onyana babo nentombi zabo emlilweni pambi kwo‐Moleke; into endingabayalelanga ngayo, nengangenanga entliziyweni yam; besenza lentshontsho, ukuze babenze o‐Juda bone." 
Jeremiah32:36 Kodwa kaloku ngoko, utsho ukuti uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, pezu kwesixeko esi, eniti nina ngaso: Sinikelwe esandleni sokumkani we‐Babilone, ngesiṙele, nangendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo:" 
Jeremiah32:37 Bona ke, ndiya kubabuta kuwo onke amazwe, apo ndibagxotele kona ngengqumbo yam, nangobuṙalaṙume bam, nangomsindo wam omkulu, ndibabuyisele kulendawo, ndibahlalise ngokunqaba." 
Jeremiah32:38 Ewe, boba ngabantu bam, nam ndoba ngutixo wabo." 
Jeremiah32:39 Ndandiya kubapa intliziyo inye, nendlela inye, ukuba bandoyike mna imihla yonke, kube kukulunga kwabo, nokwabantwana babo emva kwabo." 
Jeremiah32:40 Kanjalo ndiya kulwenza nabo ucebano olungunapakade, lwokuba andiyi kubuya kubo, ukubenzela okulungileyo; nokwoyikwa kwam ndokubeka ezintliziyweni zabo, ukuze bangemki kum." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ndandiya kugcoba pezu kwabo ukubenzela okulungileyo, ndibatyale kwelilizwe ngenyaniso, ngayo yonke intliziyo yam, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wam." 
Jeremiah32:42 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Njengokuba ndizisile pezu kwababantu lonke elilishwa likulu, kwa njalo ndiya kuzisa pezu kwabo konke ukulunga enditetileyo ngako kubo." 
Jeremiah32:43 Kwakuya kutengwa amasimi kwelilizwe, eniti nina ngalo: Liyingcitakalo, kungeko abantu nezilo; linikelwe esandleni sama‐Kaledine." 
Jeremiah32:44 Baya kutenga amasimi ngemali, baba̔le encwadini, bayincamatisele, banqi̔nise amanqi̔na elizweni lakwa‐Benjamine, nasemizini engqongayo i‐Yerusaleme, nasezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, nasezixekweni zasezintabeni, nasezixekweni zasezihlanjeni, nasezixekweni zasesuyide; ngokuba ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwabo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah33:1 KANJAKO ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya ngokwesibini, nxa abesavalelwa enkundleni yentolongo, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah33:2 Utsho ukuti uyehova olenzayo icebo lake, uyehova olidalayo, ukuba aliqinise; nguyehova igama lake:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Biza kum, ndandiya kukupendula, ndikuxelele izinto ezinkulu neziyimigushanxa, ezo ungazazanga." 
Jeremiah33:4 Ngokuba esitsho ukuti uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngazo izindlu zesisixeko, nangazo izindlu zokumkani bo‐Juda, ezicitiweyo ngenxa yendulana nangenxa yesiṙele," 
Jeremiah33:5 besiza ukulwa nama‐Kaledine, nokuzizalisa ngezidumbu zabantu, endibabuleleyo ngengqumbo yam nangobuṙalaṙume bam, nendibufihlileyo ubuso bam kwesisixeko ngenxa yayo yonke inkohlakalo yabo:" 
Jeremiah33:6 Bona ke, ndiya kubuyisela kuso ukupola nokupila; ndandiya kubapilisa, ndibatyilele ubuninzi boxolo nenyaniso." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ngokuba ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwo‐Juda, nokutinjwa kwo‐Sirayeli, ndibake njengasekuqaleni." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ndiya kubahlanza kuko konke ukukohlakala kwabo, abandonileyo ngako; ndandiya kuxolela zonke izikohlakalo zabo, abandonileyo ngazo, nabagqitileyo ngazo ngakum." 
Jeremiah33:9 Soba ligama lomgcobo kum, indumiso nengcwalisa pambi kwazo zonke izizwe zomhlaba, eziya kuva konke okulungileyo endikwenzayo kubo; zaziya kwoyika zingcangcazele pezu kwako konke ukulunga, napezu kwako konke ukwonwaba, endisizuzisa kona." 
Jeremiah33:10 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Kwobuya kuviwe kulendawo, eniti nina ngayo: Icitakele, bengeko abantu, zingeko nazilo; ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, nasezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme, ezicitakalisiweyo, zingenabantu, zingenabemi, zingenazilo," 
Jeremiah33:11 ilizwi lomgcobo nelizwi lovuyo, ilizwi lomyeni nelizwi lomtshakazi, ilizwi labo abati: Bulelani kuyehova wemikosi, ngokuba uyehova elungile, ngokuba ububele bake bungunapakade; n elabazisayo umnikelo wokubulela endlwini kayehova: ngokuba ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwelizwe, njengasekuqaleni, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah33:12 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Kwobuya kubeko kulendawo, ecitakeleyo, ekungeko abantu nezilo kuyo, nakuzo zonke izixeko zayo, intlalo zabalusi, bebutumisa imihlambi yabo." 
Jeremiah33:13 Ezixekweni zasezintabeni, ezixekweni zasezihlanjeni, nasezixekweni zasesuyide, naselizweni lakwa‐Benjamine, nasemizini engqongayo i‐Yerusaleme, nasezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, imihlambi yobuya idlule ngapantsi kwezandla zoyibalayo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah33:14 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa ndiya kuqinisa elolizwi lilungileyo endilitetileyo kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli, nakwindlu ka‐Juda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Ngaleyomihla, nangeloxesha, ndiya kuhlumisela u‐Davide isebe lobulungisa; waeya kwenza ubugwebo nobulungisa elizweni." 
Jeremiah33:16 Ngemihla leyo i‐Juda iya kusindiswa, ne‐Yerusaleme yohlala ekunqabeni: n egama iya kubizwa ngalo leli lokuti: Uyehova ubulungisa betu." 
Jeremiah33:17 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Akuyi kunqamkela u‐Davide indoda ihleli pezu kweterone yendlu ka‐Juda. 
Jeremiah33:18 Kanjalo akuyi kunqamkela abaperisite abangaba‐Levi indoda ebusweni bam, inikela amadini okutshiswa, ivutisa iminikelo yokudla, isenza imibingo imihla yonke." 
Jeremiah33:19 Labuya leza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Jeremiya, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah33:20 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ukuba ningatshitshisa ucebano lwam lwemini, nocebano lwam lwobusuku, kuze kungabiko imini nobusuku ngexesha lazo;" 
Jeremiah33:21 kuya kutshitshiswa nocebano lwam kunye no‐Davide isicaka sam, ukuba angabi nonyana epete ubukumkani pezu kweterone yake; nakunye naba‐Levi abangabaperisite, abakonzi bam." 
Jeremiah33:22 Njengokuba ungenakubalwa umkosi wezulu, na njengokuba ingenakulinganiswa intlabati yolwandle, kwa njalo ndiya kwandisa inzalo ka‐Davide isicaka sam, naba‐Levi abandikonzayo." 
Jeremiah33:23 Kanjako ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah33:24 Akubonanga na oko kutetiweyo ngababantu, besiti: Izizalwane zozibini azinyuleleyo uyehova, uzilahlile bo? Kunjalo badelayo abantu bam, ukuze bangabi sesisizwe pambi kwabo." 
Jeremiah33:25 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ukuba akuko ucebano lwam lwemini nolwobusuku; ukuba andimisanga imimiso yezulu neyomhlaba; 
Jeremiah33:26 ndiya kwandula ndilahle inzalo ka‐Yakobi, no‐Davide isicaka sam, ukuze ndingatabati kwinzalo yake abaya kupata pezu kwenzalo ka‐Abrahame, n o‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi: koko ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwabo, ndibe netaṙu ngakubo." 
Jeremiah34:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, nxa u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, nayo yonke impi yake, nabo bonke ubukumkani belizwe lokupata kwake, nabo bonke abantu, bebesilwa ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, nangakuzo zonke izixeko zayo, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah34:2 Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Hamba utete ku‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, uti kuye: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kunikela isixeko esi esandleni sokumkani we‐Babilone, oya kusitshisa ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah34:3 Nawe akuyi kusinda esandleni sake, koko uya kubanjwa ngenyaniso, unikelwe esandleni sake; oti amehlo ako awabone amehlo okumkani we‐Babilone, nomlomo wake utete nomlomo wako, uye wena e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah34:4 Noko, yiva ilizwi likayehova, Zedekiya, kumkani wo‐Juda! Utsho uyehova ngawe ukuti: Akuyi kufa ngesiṙele." 
Jeremiah34:5 Eluxolweni uya kufa, nangezitshiselwa zoyihlo bako, okumkani batanci abebepambili kuwe, ngezinjalo baya kutshisela wena; na ngokuti: Au, nkosi! bokulilela: ngokuba ilizwi ndilitetile mna, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah34:6 Waza u‐Jeremiya umprofite wateta onke lamazwi ku‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda e‐Yerusaleme," 
Jeremiah34:7 nxa impi yokumkani we‐Babilone ibisilwa ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, nangakuzo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda eziseleyo, ngakuyo i‐Lakishe nangakuyo i‐Hazeka: ngokuba ezi zibe zisala pakati kwezixeko zakwa‐Juda, zizizixeko ezinqatyisiweyo." 
Jeremiah34:8 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, emveni kwokuba ukumkani u‐Zedekiya ebelwenzile ucebano nabo bonke abantu ababese‐Jerusaleme, ukushumayela inkululeko kubo:" 
Jeremiah34:9 Ukuba mabandulule abanye ngabanye isicaka sabo, nabanye ngabanye isicakakazi sabo, um‐Hebere nom‐Heberekazi, bekululekile; kuze kungabiko mntu obakonzisayo, um‐Juda umzalwana wake." 
Jeremiah34:10 Zati zakuva zonke inkosana, nabo bonke abantu abebengenile elucebanweni, ukuba mabandulule abanye ngabanye isicaka sabo, nabanye ngabanye isicakakazi sabo, zikululekile, ukuze bangabi sazikonzisa, bandula beva, bazindulula ke." 
Jeremiah34:11 Kodwa emva kwokunjalo bajika, babuyisa izicaka nezicakakazi abebezindulule zikululekile, bazitobisa zibe zizicaka nezicakakazi." 
Jeremiah34:12 Ngako ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah34:13 Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ndalwenza ucebano noyihlo benu emhleni ndabapumisayo elizweni le‐Jipete, endlwini yobukoboka, ndisiti:" 
Jeremiah34:14 Ekupeleni kweminyaka isixe̔nxe niya kumndulula abanye ngabanye umzalwana wabo, um‐Hebere, otengiselwe kuwe, okukonzileyo iminyaka mitandatu; ewe, uya kumndulula ekululekile kuwe: kodwa oyihlo benu abandipulapulanga, abatobanga indlebe yabo kanjako." 
Jeremiah34:15 Naye nina nibe niguqukile namhla, nenza okufaneleyo emehlweni am, nishumayela abanye ngabanye inkululeko kummelwane wabo, nalwenza ucebano pambi kwam endlwini ebizwayo ngegama lam." 
Jeremiah34:16 Koko nibuye naguquka, nalidyoba igama lam, nanibuyisile abanye ngabanye isicaka sabo, nabanye ngabanye isicakakazi sabo, enibe nizindulule zikululekile ngentando yazo, nazitobisa zibe zizicaka nezicakakazi kuni." 
Jeremiah34:17 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Anipulapulanga kum, ngokushumayela inkululeko abanye ngabanye kumzalwana wabo, nabanye ngabanye kummelwane wabo: bona ke, ndiya kushumayelela nina inkululeko, utsho uyehova, kulo iṙele, na kuso isifo esibubisayo, nakuyo indlala, ndininikele ekuzanyazanyisweni kubo bonke ubukumkani bomhlaba." 
Jeremiah34:18 Ndandiya kunikela amadoda alugqitileyo ucebano lwam, lawo angawaqinisanga amazwi ocebano abelwenzile pambi kwam, akucanda itole kubini, aza adlula pakati kwezito zalo;" 
Jeremiah34:19 inkosana zakwa‐Juda, nenkosana zase‐Yerusaleme, ababusi, nabaperisite, nabo bonke abantu belizwe, abadlulileyo pakati kwezito zetole;" 
Jeremiah34:20 sendiya kunikela bona esandleni sentshaba zabo, nasesandleni sabafunayo ubomi babo; zaye izidumbu zabo ziya kuba kukutya ezintakeni zezulu, nasezilweni zomhlaba." 
Jeremiah34:21 No‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, nenkosana zake, ndobanikela esadleni sentshaba zabo, nasesandleni sabafunayo ubomi babo, nasesandleni sempi yokumkani we‐Babilone, abanyukileyo kuni." 
Jeremiah34:22 Bona ke, ndiya kuxela, utsho uyehova, ndibabuyisele kwesisixeko, babeya kulwa ngakuso, basibambe, basitshise ngomlilo; nezixeko zakwa‐Juda ndiya kuzenza ingcitakalo, zingenabemi." 
Jeremiah35:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, emihleni ka‐Yoyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah35:2 Hamba uye kwindlu yama‐Rekabe, utete nawo, uwazise endlwini kayehova, kwenye yazo inkambili, uwaseze iveyine." 
Jeremiah35:3 Ndaza ndatabata u‐Yazaniya, unyana ka‐Jeremiya, unyana ka‐Habatsiniya, nabazalwana bake, nabo bonke onyana bake, nayo yonke indlu yama‐Rekabe;" 
Jeremiah35:4 ndabazisa endlwini kayehova, enkambilini yonyana baka‐Hanane, unyana ka‐Gidaliya, indoda katixo, ebikufupi nenkambili yenkosana, ebipezu kwenkambili ka‐Mahaseya, unyana ka‐Shalume, umgcini womnyango." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ndaza ndabeka pambi kwonyana bendlu yama‐Rekabe ibekile zizele yiveyine, nendebe, ndati kubo: Selani iveyine." 
Jeremiah35:6 Koko bati: Asiyi kusela iveyine; ngokuba u‐Yehonadabi, unyana ka‐Rekabe, ubawo, wasiyalela ngokuti: Aniyi kusela iveyine, nina, nabantwana benu, kude kube ngunapakade." 
Jeremiah35:7 Nezindlu aniyi kuzaka, nembewu aniyi kuyihlwayela, nemiyezo yemiti yeveyine aniyi kuyityala; aniyi kuba nezonto kanjalo; koko niya kuhlala ezintenteni yonke imihla yenu, ukuze nipile imihla emininzi pezu kwobuso bomhlaba, apo ningabapambukeli kona." 
Jeremiah35:8 Saye sivile ilizwi lika‐Yehonadabi, unyana ka‐Rekabe, ubawo, ngako konke wasiyalelayo, ukuba singaseli iveyine yonke imihla yetu, tina, abafazi betu, onyana betu, nentombi zetu;" 
Jeremiah35:9 nokuba singaki izindlu zokuhlala kwetu; kanjako asinayo imiyezo yemiti yeveyine, namasimi, nembewu;" 
Jeremiah35:10 koko sihleli ezintenteni, sasivile, senze nokwenza ngako konke wasiyalelayo u‐Yehonadabi ubawo." 
Jeremiah35:11 Kodwa kwaye kute, akunyuka u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ukuza elizweni, sandula sati: Yizani siye e‐Yerusaleme, ngenxa yempi yama‐Kaledine, nangenxa yempi yama‐Siriya; kukona sihlala e‐Yerusaleme." 
Jeremiah35:12 Laza ilizwi likayehova, leza ku‐Jeremiya, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah35:13 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Hamba uti kuwo amadoda akwa‐Juda, nakubo abemi base‐Yerusaleme: Aniyi kuyamkela imfundiso na, ukuba nipulapule amazwi am? utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah35:14 Amazwi ka‐Yehonadabi unyana ka‐Rekabe, lawo wabayalela onyana bake ngawo okuba bangaseli iveyine, afeziwe; ngokuba bengayiselanga kwada kwanamhla nje, koko bevile umyalelo woyise wabo: kanti nditetile kuni, ndivuka kusasa nditeta, kodwa anipulapulanga kum." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ngokuba nditumile kuni izicaka zam abaprofite, ndivuka kusasa ndizituma, ndisiti: Guqukani ke abanye ngabanye endleleni yabo ekohlakeleyo, nilungise izenzo zenu, nize ningalandeli otixo bambi ngokubakonza, naniya kuhlala elizweni endilinikileyo kuni nakoyihlo benu; kodwa anitobanga indlebe yenu, anipulapulanga kum kanjako." 
Jeremiah35:16 Ngokokuba onyana baka‐Yehonadabi unyana ka‐Rekabe bewufezile umyalelo woyise wabo, lowo ubebayalela wona, kanti ababantu abapulapulanga kum;" 
Jeremiah35:17 ngako oko, utsho uyehova, utixo wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa pezu kwo‐Juda napezu kwabo bonke abemi base‐Yerusaleme, lonke ilishwa endilitetileyo ngakubo; ngenxa yokuba nditetile kubo, koko bengevanga, nokuba ndibizile kubo, koko bengapendwanga." 
Jeremiah35:18 Waza u‐Jeremiya wati kuyo indlu yama‐Rekabe: Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba niwuvile umyalelo ka‐Yehonadabi uyihlo wenu, nokuba niyigcinile yonke imiyalezelo yake, nokuba nenzile ngako konke abeniyalela kona;" 
Jeremiah35:19 ngako oko, utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Akuyi kunqamkela u‐Yehonadabi unyana ka‐Rekabe indoda imi pambi kwam imihla yonke." 
Jeremiah36:1 KWAYE kute ngomnyaka wesine ka‐Yoyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, leza elilizwi ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah36:2 Zitabatele umqulu wencwadi, uwaba̔le kuwo onke amazwi endiwatetileyo kuwe, ngo‐Sirayeli, nango‐Juda, nangazo zonke izizwe, kwa semhleni endateta kuwe, kwa semihleni ka‐Josiya, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Jeremiah36:3 Ingati indlu ka‐Juda iya kuva lonke ilishwa endicingayo ukubenzela lona, ukuze babuye abanye ngabanye endleleni yabo ekohlakeleyo, ndize ndibaxolele ityala labo nesono sabo." 
Jeremiah36:4 Waza u‐Jeremiya wabiza u‐Baruke unyana ka‐Neriya; waye u‐Baruke waba̔la ngomlomo ka‐Jeremiya onke amazwi kayehova, lawo ubewatetile kuye, pezu kwomqulu wencwadi." 
Jeremiah36:5 Wandula u‐Jeremiya wamyalela u‐Baruke, ngokuti: Mna ndivalelwe, ndikohliwe ukuya endlwini kayehova:" 
Jeremiah36:6 uz’ uye wena, uleseshe emqulwini, lowo uwuba̔lileyo ngomlomo wam, amazwi kayehova, ezindlebeni zabantu, endlwini kayehova, ngemini yokuzila; nakanjalo ezindlebeni zo‐Juda bonke, abavela ezixekweni zabo, uya kuwalesesha." 
Jeremiah36:7 Kungati baya kubeka isitaṙuziso sabo pambi kwoyehova, babuye abanye ngabanye endleleni yabo ekohlakeleyo; ngokuba inkulu ingqumbo nobuṙalaṙume abutetileyo uyehova ngakubo ababantu." 
Jeremiah36:8 Waye u‐Baruke unyana ka‐Neriya wenza ngako konke abemyalele kona u‐Jeremiya umprofite, ngokulesesha encwadini leyo amazwi kayehova, endlwini kayehova." 
Jeremiah36:9 Kwaza kwati, ngomnyaka wesihlanu ka‐Yoyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, ngenyanga yesitoba, bashumayela inzilo pambi kwoyehova bonke abantu abase‐Yerusaleme, nabo bonke abantu abebevele ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda ukuza e‐Yerusaleme." 
Jeremiah36:10 Wandula walesesha u‐Baruke encwadini leyo amazwi ka‐Jeremiya, endlwini kayehova, enkambilini ka‐Gemariya unyana ka‐Shafane umba̔li, ebaleni lasentla, emnyango wesango elitsha lendlu kayehova, ezindlebeni zabantu bonke." 
Jeremiah36:11 Kekaloku u‐Mikaya, unyana ka‐Gemariya, unyana ka‐Shafane, akuba evile onke amazwi kayehova kuloncwadi," 
Jeremiah36:12 wandula wehla waya endlwini yokumkani, enkambilini yomba̔li; kekaloku bona ke, zonke inkosana zibe zihleli kona: u‐Elishama umba̔li, no‐Delaya unyana ka‐Shemaya, no‐Elinatane unyana ka‐Hakebore, no‐Gemariya unyana ka‐Shafane, no‐Zedekiya unyana ka‐Hananiya, nenkosana zonke." 
Jeremiah36:13 Waza u‐Mikaya waxela kuzo onke amazwi abewavile, akulesesha u‐Baruke encwadini leyo ezindlebeni zabantu." 
Jeremiah36:14 Zandula zonke inkosana zamtuma ku‐Baruke u‐Yehudi, unyana ka‐Netaniya, unyana ka‐Shelemiya, unyana ka‐Kushi, zisiti: Umqulu, ubulesesha kuwo ezindlebenizabantu, wutabate esandleni sako, uze nawo. Wasuka u‐Baruke unyana ka‐Neriya wawutabata umqulu esandleni sake, weza kuzo." 
Jeremiah36:15 Zaye zisiti kuye: Hlala pantsi ke, uwuleseshe ezindlebeni zetu. Waza u‐Baruke walesesha ezindlebeni zazo." 
Jeremiah36:16 Kwaye kute, nxa zibe zivile onke amazwi awo, zajikelana ngokunkwantya; zada zati ku‐Baruke: Siya kuwaxela ngokwenyaniso onke lamazwi kukumkani." 
Jeremiah36:17 Zaza zambuza u‐Baruke, zisiti: Sixelele ke, ute nina ukuba̔la onke lamazwi ngomlomo wake?" 
Jeremiah36:18 Waye u‐Baruke esiti kuzo: Ngomlomo wake wanditetela onke lamazwi, ndaza ndawaba̔la encwadini ngeyinke." 
Jeremiah36:19 Zandula zati inkosana ku‐Baruke: Hamba, uye uzimele, wena no‐Jeremiya; makungaziwa mntu apo nikona." 
Jeremiah36:20 Zaza zangena kukumkani ebaleni, kodwa umqulu zawubekela enkambilini ka‐Elishama umba̔li; zaye zixela onke amazwi awo ezindlebeni zokumkani." 
Jeremiah36:21 Waza ukumkani wamtuma u‐Yehudi aye kutabata umqulu, owawususa enkambilini ka‐Elishama umba̔li; waye u‐Yehudi wawulesesha ezindlebeni zokumkani, nasezindlebeni zazo zonke inkosana ezibe zimi ngakuye ukumkani." 
Jeremiah36:22 Kekaloku ukumkani ebehleli endlwini yobusika, ngenyanga yesitoba, ungxawo epambi kwake enomlilo usitsha." 
Jeremiah36:23 Kwaza kwati, nxa u‐Yehudi abeleseshile inṙozo zantatu umhlaumbi zane, wandula wawusika ngesitshetshe somba̔li, wawuposa emlilweni obusengxaweni, wada wagqitywa wonke umqulu emlilweni obusengxaweni." 
Jeremiah36:24 Baye bengoyiki, abaṙazula ingubo zabo kanjalo, kwa n okumkani, nazo zonke izicaka zake ezibe zivile onke lamazwi." 
Jeremiah36:25 Kodwa noko u‐Elinatane, no‐Delaya, no‐Gemariya, bebetandazele kukumkani ukuba makangatshisi umqulu; koko ebengapulapuli kubo." 
Jeremiah36:26 Waza ukumkani wabayalela u‐Jeramele unyana ka‐Hameleke, no‐Seraya unyana ka‐Zariyeli, no‐Shelemiya unyana ka‐Habideli, ukuba babambe u‐Baruke umba̔li no‐Jeremiya umprofite: kodwa uyehova wabafihla." 
Jeremiah36:27 Landula ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya, emveni kwokuba ukumkani ebetshisile umqulu, namazwi abewaba̔lile u‐Baruke ngomlomo ka‐Jeremiya, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah36:28 Buya uzitabatele umqulu omnye, uwaba̔le kuwo onke amazwi apambili abesemqulwini wokuqala, lowo u‐Yoyakime ukumkani wo‐Juda wawutshisayo." 
Jeremiah36:29 Nakuye u‐Yoyakime ukumkani wo‐Juda uya kuti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Uwutshisile umqulu lo, usiti: Yinina ukuba uba̔lile kuwo, ngokuti: Ukumkani we‐Babilone uya kuza ngokwenyaniso, alitshabalalise elilizwe, enze nokuba abantu nezilo zipele kulo?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ngaye u‐Yoyakime ukumkani wo‐Juda, ukuti: Akayi kuba namnye ohleli eteroneni ka‐Davide; nesidumbu sake sona siya kulahlelwa ebushushwini emini, nasengqeleni ebusuku." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ndandiya kwohlwaya yena, nenzalo yake, nezicaka zake, ngenxa yokukohlakala kwabo; ndandiya kuzisa pezu kwabo, napezu kwabemi base‐Yerusaleme, napezu kwamadoda akwa‐Juda, lonke ilishwa endilitetileyo ngakubo, koko bengapulapulanga." 
Jeremiah36:32 Wandula u‐Jeremiya watabata umqulu omnye, wawunika ku‐Baruke, unyana ka‐Neriya, umba̔li; owaba̔la kuwo, ngomlomo ka‐Jeremiya, onke amazwi encwadi ebitshisiwe ngu‐Yoyakime ukumkani wo‐Juda emlilweni: kwaye kusongezwa kuwo amazwi amaninzi abenjengawo la." 
Jeremiah37:1 KEKALOKU u‐Zedekiya unyana ka‐Josiya wapata ubukumkani esikundleni sika‐Koniya unyana ka‐Yoyakime, lowo u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ubemenzile ukumkani elizweni lakwa‐Juda." 
Jeremiah37:2 Kodwa yena, nezicaka zake, nabantu belizwe, bebengapulapuli kuwo amazwi kayehova, lawo abewateta ngo‐Jeremiya umprofite." 
Jeremiah37:3 Waza ukumkani u‐Zedekiya watuma u‐Yukali unyana ka‐Shelemiya, no‐Tsefaniya unyana ka‐Mahaseya umperisite, ukuya ku‐Jeremiya umprofite, ukuti: Zusitandazele ke kuyehova, utixo wetu." 
Jeremiah37:4 Kekaloku u‐Jeremiya wangena wapuma nokupuma pakati kwabantu; ngokuba bebenge ka mfakile entolongweni. 
Jeremiah37:5 Kanjalo impi ka‐Faro ibipumile e‐Jipete; aza ati ama‐Kaledine, abeṙaula i‐Yerusaleme, akuva indaba ngabo, enyuka kuyo i‐Yerusaleme." 
Jeremiah37:6 Landula ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya umprofite, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah37:7 Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Niya kutsho kukumkani wo‐Juda onitumileyo kum ukuza knndibuza, ukuti: Bona ke, impi ka‐Faro, epumeleyo ukuncedwa kwenu, iya kubuyela elizweni layo e‐Jipete." 
Jeremiah37:8 Nama‐Kaledine aya kubuya, alwe ngakuso isixeko esi, asibambe, asitshise ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah37:9 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ningazikohlisi, nisiti: ama‐Kaledine ogqibela ukumka kuti; ngokuba engayi kumka." 
Jeremiah37:10 Ngokuba nangona nibe nibetile yonke impi yama‐Kaledine alwayo nani, ada asala kuwo amadoda azinxweleṙa kupela, ebeya kuvuka noko, amanye ngamanye ezintenteni zawo, atshise isixeko esi ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah37:11 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni impi yama‐Kaledine ibindulukile e‐Yerusaleme, ngenxa yempi ka‐Faro," 
Jeremiah37:12 wandula wapuma u‐Jeremiya e‐Yerusaleme ukuya elizweni lakwa‐Benjamine, ukuba amkele isahlulelwa sake sakona pakati kwabantu." 
Jeremiah37:13 Nxa abesesangweni lika‐Benjamine, kwabako kona inkosi yokulinda, egama lingu‐Yirija, unyana ka‐Shelemiya, unyana ka‐Hananiya; yena wambamba u‐Jeremiya umprofite, esiti: Uyapongomela kuwo ama‐Kaledine!" 
Jeremiah37:14 Wayesiti u‐Jeremiya: Uyaxoka, andipongomeli kuwo ama‐Kaledine; kodwa akapulapula kuye; kwa njalo u‐Yirija wambamba u‐Jeremiya, wamzisa kwinkosana." 
Jeremiah37:15 Zaye inkosana zibe zinomsindo ngakuye u‐Jeremiya, zambeta, zamfaka entolongweni, endlwini ka‐Jonatane umba̔li, ngokuba zibe ziyenzile yona ibe yintolongo." 
Jeremiah37:16 Nxa u‐Jeremiya abengenile pakati emnxunyeni nasezigingqini, na nxa u‐Jeremiya abehleli kona imihla yamininzi," 
Jeremiah37:17 wandula watuma ukumkani u‐Zedekiya wamtabata; waza ukumkani wambuza ngasese endlwini yake, wati: Liko na ilizwi livela kuyehova? Wati u‐Jeremiya: Liko; wayesiti: Uya kunikelwa esandleni sokumkani we‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah37:18 Waza u‐Jeremiya wati kuye ukumkani u‐Zedekiya: Ndonile nganto nina ngakuwe, nangakuzo izicaka zako, nangakubo ababantu, ukuba nindifakile entolongweni?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Bapina ke abaprofite benu abebeprofitesha kuni, besiti: Ukumkani we‐Babilone akayi kuza ngakuni, nangakulo elilizwe?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Ngako kaloku, zupulapule ke, Nkosi yam kumkani! makesiti isitaṙuziso sam sibekwe ebusweni bako, uze ungandibuyiseli endlwini ka‐Jonatane umba̔li, ukuba ndingafeli kona." 
Jeremiah37:21 Waza ukumkani u‐Zedekiya waxela ukuba mababeke u‐Jeremiya enkundleni yentolongo, nokuba anikwe isimba lesonka imihla ngemihla livela esitarateni saboji, side sigqitywe sonke isonka esixekweni. Kwa njalo u‐Jeremiya wahlala enkundleni yentolongo." 
Jeremiah38:1 Kekaloku u‐Shefatiya unyana ka‐Matane, no‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Pashure, no‐Yukali unyana ka‐Shelemiya, no‐Pashure unyana ka‐Malekiya, beva amazwi abetetiwe ngu‐Jeremiya kubo bonke abantu, esiti:" 
Jeremiah38:2 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Lowo usalayo kwesisixeko, wobuba ngesiṙele, ngendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo; kodwa lowo upumela kuwo ama‐Kaledine, uya kupila; ewe, ubomi bake boba lixoba kuye, waeya kupila." 
Jeremiah38:3 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Esisixeko siya kunikelwa ngokwenyaniso esandleni sempi yokumkani we‐Babilone, eya kusibamba." 
Jeremiah38:4 Ngako inkosana zati kukumkani: Mayifiswe ke indoda le, ngokuba ngokunjalo inqenisa izandla zamadoda okulwa aseleyo kwesisixeko, nezandla zabantu bonke, ngokuteta kubo njengalamazwi: ngokuba lendoda ingafuneli ababantu uxolo, kodwa ububi." 
Jeremiah38:5 Wayesiti ukumkani u‐Zedekiya: Nantsiya isesandleni senu; ngokuba engenguye ukumkani ongayenzayo into ngakuni. 
Jeremiah38:6 Zandula zamtabata u‐Jeremiya, zamposa emnxunyeni ka‐Malekiya unyana ka‐Hameleke, obusenkundleni yentolongo; zaye zimhlisa u‐Jeremiya ngentambo: nasemnxunyeni lowo bekungeko amanzi, kodwa udaka; waza watshona u‐Jeremiya eludakeni." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kekaloku akuva u‐Hebedi‐meleke um‐Tiyopiya, omnye wabatenwa obesendlwini yokumkani, ukuba bafakile u‐Jeremiya emnxunyeni, nokuba ukumkani uhleli esangweni lika‐Benjamine," 
Jeremiah38:8 wapuma ke u‐Hebedi‐meleke endlwini yokumkani, waya wateta kukumkani, esiti:" 
Jeremiah38:9 Nkosi yam kumkani! lamadoda enze ngokukohlakeleyo ngako konke akwenzileyo ku‐Jeremiya umprofite, lowo amposileyo emnxunyeni; waeya kufa ngokulamba endaweni yake, ngokuba kungaseko isonka esixekweni." 
Jeremiah38:10 Waza ukumkani wamyalela u‐Hebedi‐meleke um‐Tiyopiya, ngokuti: Tabata nawe kwa lapa amadoda abe ngamashumi matatu, uye umnyuse u‐Jeremiya umprofite emnxunyeni engekafi." 
Jeremiah38:11 Wasuka u‐Hebedi‐meleke watabata naye amadoda lawo, waya endlwini yokumkani ngapantsi kwenkambili yendyebo, wasusa kona amajacu engubo eziṙazukileyo, namajacu engubo ezigugileyo, wazihlisela ku‐Jeremiya emnxunyeni ngentambo." 
Jeremiah38:12 Wayesiti u‐Hebedi‐meleke um‐Tiyopiya ku‐Jeremiya: Kaubeke la majacu engubo eziṙazukileyo nezigugileyo pantsi kwamakwapa ako, ngapantsi kwentambo: wenje njalo ke u‐Jeremiya." 
Jeremiah38:13 Baza bamr̔ola u‐Jeremiya ngentambo, bamnyusa emnxunyeni; waye u‐Jeremiya wahlala enkundleni yentolongo." 
Jeremiah38:14 Waza watuma ukumkani u‐Zedekiya, wamtabatela kuye u‐Jeremiya umprofite emnyango wesitatu, obusendlwini kayehova; wayesiti ukumkani ku‐Jeremiya: Ndokubuza indawo, zungandifihleli nto." 
Jeremiah38:15 Waza u‐Jeremiya wati ku‐Zedekiya: Nxa ndikuxelelayo, akuyi kuqinisa ukundifisa na? nanxa ndikunika icebo, akuyi kupulapula kum." 
Jeremiah38:16 Wandula ukumkani u‐Zedekiya wafunga ku‐Jeremiya ngasese, esiti: Ehleli nje uyehova, lowo osenzele lompefumlo, andiyi kukufisa, kanjako andiyi kukunikela esandleni salamadoda abufunayo ubomi bako." 
Jeremiah38:17 Waza u‐Jeremiya wati ku‐Zedekiya: Utsho uyehova, utixo wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ukuba uya kupumela kuzo inkosana zokumkani we‐Babilone ngokuvuma, umpefumlo wako uya kupila, nesixeko esi asiyi kutshiswa ngomlilo; ewe, uya kupila, wena nendlu yako." 
Jeremiah38:18 Kodwa ukuba akuyi kupumela kuzo inkosana zokumkani we‐Babilone, sesiya kunikelwa isixeko esi esandleni sama‐Kaledine, aya kusitshisa ngomlilo; nawe akuyi kusinda esandleni sawo." 
Jeremiah38:19 Waza wati ukumkani u‐Zedekiya ku‐Jeremiya: Ndiyoyika ama‐Juda apongomeleyo kuwo ama‐Kaledine, hleze andinikele esandleni sawo, adlale ngam." 
Jeremiah38:20 Koko u‐Jeremiya wati: Akayi ku ku nikela; live ke ilizwi likayehova ngoko endikuteta kuwe, ukuba kulunge kuwe, nokuba umpefumlo wako upile." 
Jeremiah38:21 Kodwa ukuba uyala ukupuma, leli ilizwi uyehova undibonisile lona, lokuti:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Bona ke, bonke abafazi, abaseleyo endlwini yokumkani wo‐Juda, baya kupunyiselwa kuzo inkosana zokumkani we‐Babilone; abaya kuti: Abahlobo bako bakuhendile, bakweyisile; inyawo zako zitshonile eludakeni, bona bahlehlile ngomva." 
Jeremiah38:23 Nabo bonke abafazi bako, nabantwana bako, bobapumisela kuma‐Kaledine, nawe akuyi kusinda esandleni sawo; ngokuba uya kubanjwa ngesandla sokumkani we‐Babilone, nesixeko esi uya kusitshisa ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah38:24 Waza u‐Zedekiya wati ku‐Jeremiya: Makungaziwa mntu lamazwi, uze ungafi." 
Jeremiah38:25 Kodwa ukuba inkosana ziya kuva okokuba nditetile nawe, zize kuwe, ziti nokuti kuwe: Sixelele ke into uyitetileyo kukumkani, ungayifihli kuti, sasingayi kukufisa; kwa nento ukumkani ayitetileyo kuwe;" 
Jeremiah38:26 uya kwandula uti kuzo: Ndabeka isitaṙuziso sam ebusweni bokumkani, sokuba makangandibuyiseli endlwini ka‐Jonatane, ndifele kona." 
Jeremiah38:27 Zasuka zonke inkosana zeza ku‐Jeremiya, zambuza; wati yena wazixelela njengawo onke lamazwi abewayalelwe ngukumkani; zada zamyeka, ngokuba indawo ibingaviwanga." 
Jeremiah38:28 Kwa njalo u‐Jeremiya wahlala enkundleni yentolongo, kwada kwangumhla i‐Yerusaleme ibibanjwa ngawo: kanjako waye kona okuya i‐Yerusaleme yabanjwa." 
Jeremiah39:1 NGOMNYAKA wesitoba ka‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, ngenyanga yeshumi, weza u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, nayo yonke impi yake, ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, bayivingcela." 
Jeremiah39:2 Ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye ka‐Zedekiya, ngenyanga yesine, ngowesitoba umhla wenyanga, isixeko sagqojozelwa." 
Jeremiah39:3 Zaza zangena zonke inkosana zokumkani we‐Babilone, zahlala esangweni lapakati, u‐Neregale‐sharetsere, u‐Samgari‐nebo, u‐Sarese?-?kime inkosi yabatenwa, u‐Neregale‐sharetsere inkosi yezilumko, nazo zonke ezinye inkosana zokumkani we‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah39:4 Kwaza kwati, okuya wazibonayo u‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, nawo onke amadoda okulwa, bandula besaba, bapuma ngobusuku esixekweni, ngendlela yomyezo wokumkani, ngesango elipakati kwendonga zimbini; wayepuma ngendlela yetafa." 
Jeremiah39:5 Kodwa impi yama‐Kaledine yabaputuma, yamfumana u‐Zedekiya ematafeni ase‐Jeriko, yambamba, yamnyusela kuye u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, e‐Ribela, elizweni le‐Hamati, owateta imigwebo pezu kwake." 
Jeremiah39:6 Waza ukumkani we‐Babilone wababulala onyana baka‐Zedekiya e‐Ribela pambi kwamehlo ake; nayo yonke imiduna yakwa‐Juda wayibulala ukumkani we‐Babilone. 
Jeremiah39:7 Wandula wamfamekisa amehlo ka‐Zedekiya, wamnxiba ngamakamandela obedu, ukuba asiwe e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah39:8 Kanjalo indlu yokumkani, nezindlu zabantu, ama‐Kaledine azitshisa ngomlilo; nendonga ze‐Yerusaleme azicita." 
Jeremiah39:9 Nesisalela sabantu ababesele esixekweni, nabapongomi ababepongomele kuye, nesisalela sabantu ababesele, u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela wabafudusela e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah39:10 Kodwa abangamahlwempu ebantwini, abo abangenanto, wabasalisa u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela elizweni lakwa‐Juda, wabanika izitiya namasimi ngomhla lowo." 
Jeremiah39:11 Kekaloku u‐Nebukanetsare, ukumkani we‐Babilone, wanika umyalezo ngaye u‐Jeremiya ku‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela, esiti:" 
Jeremiah39:12 Mtabate, ubeke amehlo ako pezu kwake, ungenzi kuye nento ebububi; koko njengokuba eya kuteta kuwe, yenza kwa njalo kuye." 
Jeremiah39:13 Waza watuma u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela, no‐Nebushazabane inkosi yabatenwa, no‐Neregale‐sharetsere inkosi yezilumko, nazo zonke inkosana zokumkani we‐Babilone;" 
Jeremiah39:14 batuma ke bamsusa u‐Jeremiya enkundleni yentolongo, bamnikela ku‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame, unyana ka‐Shafane, ukuba ampumise aye endlwini: kwa njalo u‐Jeremiya wahlala pakati kwabantu." 
Jeremiah39:15 Kekaloku ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya, nxa abevalelwa enkundleni yentolongo, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah39:16 Hamba utsho kuye u‐Hebedi‐meleke um‐Tiyopiya, usiti: Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa amazwi am pezu kwesixeko esi kube kokubi, kungabi kokulungileyo; aeya kubako pambi kwako ngomhla lowo." 
Jeremiah39:17 Kodwa ndiya kuhlangula wena ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova; waungayi kunikelwa esandleni samadoda lawo uwoyikayo." 
Jeremiah39:18 Ngokuba ndiya kukusindisa ngenyaniso, waungayi kuwa ngesiṙele; kodwa ubomi bako boba lixoba kuwe, ngokokuba utembele kum, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah40:1 ILIZWI elezayo ku‐Jeremiya livela kuyehova, emveni kwokuba u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela ebemndulule e‐Rama; akuba emtabatile enxityiwe ngemixokolelwane pakati kwabo bonke abatinjwa base‐Yerusaleme nabakwa‐Juda, abebefuduselwa e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah40:2 Yaza inkosi yomlisela yamtabata u‐Jeremiya, yati kuye: Uyehova, utixo wako, utetile elilishwa ngakuyo lendawo." 
Jeremiah40:3 Ewe, uyehova ulizisile, wenzile njengokuba ebeteta: ngokokuba nonile ngakuye uyehova, ningevanga ilizwi lake nje, kukona nihlelwe yilento." 
Jeremiah40:4 Nakaloku, bona ke, ndikukulule namhla emixokolelwaneni ebipezu kwezandla zako: ukuba kulungile emehlweni ako ukuza nam e‐Babilone, yiza ke, ndandiya kubeka iliso lam pezu kwako; kodwa ukuba kubi emehlweni ako ukuza nam e‐Babilone, yeka ke: kangela, ilizwe lonke lipambi kwako; indawo elungileyo nefaneleyo emehlweni ako ukuba uye kuyo, yiya kwa kona." 
Jeremiah40:5 Nxa angekabuyi, yati: Uze ubuyele ku‐Gedaliya, unyana ka‐Ahikame, unyana ka‐Shafane, lowo ukumkani we‐Babilone umenzile umongama pezu kwezixeko zakwa‐Juda, uhlale naye pakati kwabantu: umhlaumbi uye apo kusukuba kufanele emehlweni ako ukuya kona. Yaza inkosi yomlisela yamnika umpako wendlela, nebaso, yamndulula." 
Jeremiah40:6 Kwa njalo u‐Jeremiya weza ku‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame e‐Mitsipa, wahlala naye pakati kwabantu ababesele elizweni." 
Jeremiah40:7 Zati zakuva zonke inkosi zezimpi ezibe zisezindle, zona namadoda azo, ukuba ukumkani we‐Babilone wenzile u‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame umongama pezu kwelizwe, nokuba umpatisile amadoda, nabafazi, nentsapo, namahlwempu elizwe, abo ababengafuduselwanga e‐Babilone," 
Jeremiah40:8 zandula zeza ku‐Gedaliya e‐Mitsipa: kwa u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya, no‐Johanane no‐Jonatane onyana baka‐Kareha, no‐Seraya unyana ka‐Tanehumete, nonyana baka‐Hefai um‐Netofati, no‐Yezaniya unyana wom‐Mahaka, bona namadoda abo." 
Jeremiah40:9 Waza u‐Gedaliya, unyana ka‐Ahikame, unyana ka‐Shafane, wafunga kubo nakumadoda abo, ngokuti: Ningoyiki ukukonza ama‐Kaledine; hlalani elizweni, nimkonze ukumkani we‐Babilone, kwakuya kulunga kuni." 
Jeremiah40:10 Kekaloku mna, bona ke, ndiya kuhlala e‐Mitsipa, ukuma ebusweni bama‐Kaledine aya kuza kuti; kodwa nina, butani, iveyine, neziqa̔mo zehlobo, neoli, nizibeke ezityeni zenu, nihlale ezixekweni enizibambileyo." 
Jeremiah40:11 Kanjalo onke ama‐Juda abese‐Mowabi, napakati kwosapo luka‐Hamoni, nase‐Edome, nalawo abesemazweni onke, akuva ukuba ukumkani we‐Babilone ushiyile isisalela so‐Juda, nokuba umisile pezu kwabo u‐Gedaliya, unyana ka‐Ahikame, unyana ka‐Shafane;" 
Jeremiah40:12 andula onke ama‐Juda abuya kuzo zonke indawo apo ebegxotelwe kona, eza elizweni lakwa‐Juda, ku‐Gedaliya e‐Mitsipa, abuta iveyine, neziqa̔mo zehlobo, into eninzi kakulu." 
Jeremiah40:13 Kuloko u‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, nazo zonke inkosi zezimpi ezibe zisezindle, beza ku‐Gedaliya e‐Mitsipa," 
Jeremiah40:14 bati kuye: Uka wazi na ukuba u‐Balisi, ukumkani wosapo luka‐Hamoni, utumile u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya ukuza kukubulala ubomi? Kodwa u‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame ebengakolwa ngabo." 
Jeremiah40:15 Waza u‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha wateta ku‐Gedaliya ngasese e‐Mitsipa, esiti: Mandihambe ke, ndiye ndimbulale u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya, kwakungayi kubako umntu owaziyo: kunganina ukuba akubulale ubomi, nokuba onke ama‐Juda abutelweyo kuwe atiwe sa, nesisalela so‐Juda sibube?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Kodwa u‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame wati ku‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha: Akuyi kuyenza lento, ngokuba uteta ubuxoki ngaye u‐Shimayeli." 
Jeremiah41:1 Kwaye kute ngenyanga yesixe̔nxe, kweza u‐Shimayeli, unyana ka‐Netaniya, unyana ka‐Elishama, owenzalo yobukumkani, nabakulu bokumkani, namadoda alishumi enaye, ku‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame e‐Mitsipa; baye besidla kona isonka ndawonye e‐Mitsipa." 
Jeremiah41:2 Waza wesuka u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya, namadoda alishumi abenaye, bambeta u‐Gedaliya, unyana ka‐Ahikame, unyana ka‐Shafane, ngesiṙele, bambulala, lowo ukumkani we‐Babilone ubemenzile umongama pezu kwelizwe." 
Jeremiah41:3 Nawo onke ama‐Juda abenaye u‐Gedaliya e‐Mitsipa, nama‐Kaledine abefunyanwa kona, amadoda okulwa, wawabulala u‐Shimayeli." 
Jeremiah41:4 Kwaza kwati, ngomhla wesibini emva kwokubulawa kuka‐Gedaliya, xa kungaziwa mntu," 
Jeremiah41:5 kweza amadoda evela e‐Shekeme, nas e‐Shilo, nase‐Samariya, amadoda angamashumi asibozo, andevu ziguyiweyo, nazivato ziṙazukileyo, eziqapule kanjalo, abeneminikelo nentlakamhlope ezandleni zawo, ukuyizisa endlwini kayehova." 
Jeremiah41:6 Wandula u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya wapuma e‐Mitsipa ukuya kuwakaulela, ehamba emana elila; kwaza kwati, nxa abehlangana nawo, wati kuwo: Yizani ku‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame." 
Jeremiah41:7 Kwabekute, nxa abefikile pakati kwesixeko, waza u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya wawabulala, wawaposa pakati kwomnxuma, yena namadoda abenaye." 
Jeremiah41:8 Kodwa amadoda alishumi ebefunyanwa pakati kwawo awati ku‐Shimayeli: Ungasifisi; ngokuba sinendyebo ezifihliweyo endle, inqolowa, neṙalasi, neoli, nobusi. Waza wayeka, engafisanga wona pakati kwabazalwana bawo." 
Jeremiah41:9 Kekaloku umnxuma apo u‐Shimayeli waposela kona zonke izidumbu zamadoda abewabulele, ngecala lika‐Gedaliya, ngulowo abewenzile ukumkani u‐Asa ngenxa ka‐Bahasha ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli: wona wawuzalisa u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya ngababuleweyo." 
Jeremiah41:10 Waza u‐Shimayeli watimba sonke isisalela sabantu abebese‐Mitsipa, intombi zokumkani, nabo bonke abantu abebesele e‐Mitsipa, abo u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela ubempatisile bona u‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame; wabatimba ke u‐Shimayeli, unyana ka‐Netaniya, wemka ukuya kuwelela elusatsheni luka‐Hamoni." 
Jeremiah41:11 Kodwa u‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, nazo zonke inkosi zezimpi ezibe zinaye, bakuva bonke ububi abebenzile u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya," 
Jeremiah41:12 basuka bawatabata onke amadoda, baya ukulwa no‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya, bamfumana ngasemanzini amakulu ase‐Gibeyone." 
Jeremiah41:13 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni bonke abantu abebenaye u‐Shimayeli babona u‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, nazo zonke inkosi zezimpi ezibe zinaye, bandula bavuya." 
Jeremiah41:14 Baza bajika bonke abantu abebatimbile u‐Shimayeli e‐Mitsipa, babuya, baya ku‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha." 
Jeremiah41:15 Kodwa u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya wasinda namadoda asibozo ebusweni buka‐Johanane, waya kulo usapo luka‐Hamoni." 
Jeremiah41:16 Waza wasitabata u‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, nazo zonke inkosi zezimpi ezibe zinaye, sonke isisalela sabantu abebabuyisile ku‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya, e‐Mitsipa, emveni kwokuba ebembulele u‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame, amaṙoti angamadoda okulwa, nabafazi, nentsapo, nabatenwa abebabuyisile e‐Gibeyone:" 
Jeremiah41:17 basuka bahamba, bahlala e‐Gerute‐kimuhame, ekufupi ne‐Beteleheme, ukuya kungena e‐Jipete," 
Jeremiah41:18 ngenxa yama‐Kaledine; ngokuba bebesoyika wona, ngokokuba u‐Shimayeli unyana ka‐Netaniya ebembulele u‐Gedaliya unyana ka‐Ahikame, lowo ukumkani we‐Babilone ubemenzile umongama pezu kwelizwe." 
Jeremiah42:1 Kwaza kwasondela zonke inkosi zezimpi, no‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, no‐Yezaniya unyana ka‐Hoshaya, nabo bonke abantu kwa kuye omncinane kwada kwakuye omkulu," 
Jeremiah42:2 bati ku‐Jeremiya umprofite: Masiti ke isitaṙuziso setu sibekwe pambi kwako, utandaze ngenxa yetu kuyehova, utixo wako, ngenxa yaso sonke isisalela esi; (ngokuba sisalisiwe singabancinane kubo abaninzi, njengokuba amehlo ako esibona;)" 
Jeremiah42:3 ukuba uyehova, utixo wako, asixelele indlela esinge sihamba ngayo, nento esinge siyenza." 
Jeremiah42:4 Waza u‐Jeremiya umprofite wati kubo: Ndivile; bona ke, ndiya kutandaza kuyehova, utixo wenu, njengamazwi enu; kwakuya kuti, into asukuba eya kunipendula yona uyehova, ndoyixela kuni; andiyi kubamba nanye into kuni." 
Jeremiah42:5 Baza bati ku‐Jeremiya: Uyehova makabe linqi̔na lenene nelenyaniso pakati kwetu, lokuba kwoba njengazo zonke izinto uyehova, utixo wako, aya kukutuma kuti ngazo, esiya kwenje njalo!" 
Jeremiah42:6 Nokuba kumnandi, nokuba kubi, siya kuliva ilizwi likayehova, utixo wetu, esikutumayo kuye; ukuze kulunge kuti, nxa sivayo ilizwi likayehova, utixo wetu." 
Jeremiah42:7 Kwaye kute ekupeleni kwemihla ilishumi, landula ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Waza wabiza u‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, nazo zonke inkosi zezimpi ezibe zinaye, nabo bonke abantu kwa kuye omncinane kwada kwakuye omkulu," 
Jeremiah42:9 wati kubo: Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, enandituma kuye ukuya kubeka isitaṙuziso senu ebusweni bake, ukuti:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Ukuba niya kumana ukuhlala kwelilizwe, ndiya kwandula ndinake, ndinganiciti; ndinityale, ndinganidonyuli; ngokuba ndinosizi pezu kwelishwa endinenzele lona." 
Jeremiah42:11 Ningamoyiki ukumkani we‐Babilone, enimoyikayo; ningamoyiki, utsho uyehova: ngokuba ndinani mna ukunisindisa, nokunihlangula esandleni sake." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ndandiya kunenzela izibele, aze abe nobubele ngakuni, anibuyisele kowenu umhlaba." 
Jeremiah42:13 Kodwa ukuba niti: Asiyi kuhlala kwelilizwe, ningapulapuli nje ilizwi likayehova, utixo wenu," 
Jeremiah42:14 nisiti: Hai, koko siya kuya elizweni le‐Jipete, apo singayi kubona imfazwe kona, nentlokoma yexilongo singayi kuyiva, nesonka singayi kusilambela; nakona siya kuhlala:" 
Jeremiah42:15 kaloku, ngoko ke, yivani ilizwi likayehova, nina sisalela so‐Juda! Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ukuba niyagqibela ukubekisa ubuso benu ukuya e‐Jipete, nize niye ukupambukela kona;" 
Jeremiah42:16 kwoza kuti, iṙele, eniloyikayo, lonifikela kona elizweni le‐Jipete; nendlala, eniyixaleleyo, yoti nama ukunilandela kona e‐Jipete, nakona niya kufa." 
Jeremiah42:17 Aeya kuti onke amadoda abekisayo ubuso bawo ukuya e‐Jipete ukupambukela kona, afe ngesiṙele, na ngendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo; akuyi kubako kuwo nanye eseleyo, nesindileyo elishweni endiya kulizisa pezu kwawo." 
Jeremiah42:18 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Njengokuba kugalelwe ingqumbo yam nobuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwabemi base‐Yerusaleme, kwa njalo ubuṙalaṙume bam buya kugalelwa pezu kwenu, nxa niya kungena e‐Jipete: naniya kuba yinto yokunywebelelwa, neyokutelwa nqa, nesiqalekiswa, nesigxekwa; nalendawo aniyi kubuya niyibone." 
Jeremiah42:19 Uyehova utetile kuni, nina sisalela so‐Juda! Ningayi e‐Jipete: qinisani ukwazi ukuba ndiniyalile namhla." 
Jeremiah42:20 Okunene niyaposisa ngakweyenu imipefumlo; ngokuba ninditumile kuyehova, utixo wenu, nisiti: Sitandezele kuyehova, utixo wetu, nanjengako konke aya kukutsho uyehova, utixo wetu, sixelele ngokunjalo, sasiya kukwenza." 
Jeremiah42:21 Ndinixelele kambe namhla; kodwa anipulapulanga kulo ilizwi likayehova, utixo wenu, nakuko konke anditumele kona kuni." 
Jeremiah42:22 Ngako kaloku, qinisani ukwazi ukuba niya kufa ngesiṙele, na ngendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo, endaweni apo ninxamele ukuya ukupambukela kona." 
Jeremiah43:1 Kwaza kwati, akuba u‐Jeremiya egqibile ukuteta kubo bonke abantu onke amazwi kayehova, utixo wabo, lawo uyehova, utixo wabo, ubemtumile nawo kubo, kwa onke lamazwi;" 
Jeremiah43:2 wandula wateta u‐Hazariya unyana ka‐Hoshaya, no‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, nawo onke amadoda ar̔atshileyo, esiti ku‐Jeremiya: Uyateta ngobuxoki; uyehova, utixo wetu, akakutumanga ukuti: Aniyi kuya e‐Jipete ukupambukela kona;" 
Jeremiah43:3 koko u‐Baruke unyana ka‐Neriya ekuvusile ngakuti, ukuze sinikelwe esandleni sama‐Kaledine, ukuba asifise, umhlaumbi asifudusele e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah43:4 Kwa njalo u‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, nazo zonke inkosi zezimpi, nabo bonke abantu, bebengapulapuli ilizwi likayehova, lokuba bahlale elizweni lakwa‐Juda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Kodwa u‐Johanane unyana ka‐Kareha, nazo zonke inkosi zezimpi, batabata sonke isisalela so‐Juda, abebebuyile kuzo zonke izizwe, apo bebegxotelwe kona, ukuza kuhlala elizweni lakwa‐Juda;" 
Jeremiah43:6 amadoda, nabafazi, nentsapo, nentombi zokumkani, nabo bonke abantu u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela abebashiyile naye u‐Gedaliya, unyana ka‐Ahikame, unyana ka‐Shafane, no‐Jeremiya umprofite, no‐Baruke unyana ka‐Neriya." 
Jeremiah43:7 Kwa njalo baya elizweni le‐Jipete; ngokuba bebengapulapuli ilizwi likayehova: bada bafika e‐Tahapanesi. 
Jeremiah43:8 LANDULA ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Jeremiya e‐Tahapanesi, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah43:9 Tabata esandleni sako amatye amakulu, uwaselele eludakeni endaweni yokugqwagqwa izitene, engasemnyango wendlu ka‐Faro e‐Tahapanesi, pambi kwamehlo ama‐Juda," 
Jeremiah43:10 uti kuwo: Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kutuma ndimtabate u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, isicaka sam, ndiyibeke iterone yake pezu kwalamatye endiwaseleleyo; waeya kulolula ilengalenga elihle lake pezu kwawo." 
Jeremiah43:11 Waeya kuza abete ilizwe le‐Jipete: abo ba mis elwe ukufa, wobanikela ekufeni; nabo ba mis elwe ukutinjwa, ekutinjweni; nabo ba mis elwe isiṙele, esiṙeleni." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ndandiya kupemba umlilo ezindlwini zotixo base‐Jipete; waeya kubatshisa, wobatimba kanjalo; uya kwambata ilizwe le‐Jipete, njengokuba umalusi esambata ingubo yake, apume kona ngoxolo." 
Jeremiah43:13 Nentsika zamatye zendlu yelanga, eselizweni le‐Jipete, uya kuziqekeza; nezindlu zotixo base‐Jipete uya kuzitshisa ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah44:1 Ilizwi elezayo ku‐Jeremiya ngawo onke ama‐Juda abehlala elizweni le‐Jipete, abehlala e‐Migidole, nase‐Tahapanesi, nase‐Nofe, nasezweni le‐Patrose, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah44:2 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Nibonile lonke ilishwa endilizisileyo pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme, napezu kwazo zonke izixeko zakwa‐Juda; kekaloku bona ke, ziyingcitakalo namhla nje, kungeko ohlala kuzo;" 
Jeremiah44:3 ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabo abayenzileyo ukundiqumbisa, ngokuya ukuqu̔misa, n okukonza otixo bambi, abo abangabazanga, bona, nani, noyihlo benu." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ndandituma kuni zonke izicaka zam abaprofite, ndivuka kusasa ndizituma, ndisiti: Zeningayenzi ke lento ebuntshontsho endiyitiyayo." 
Jeremiah44:5 Abapulapulanga noko, abatobelanga indlebe yabo kanjalo, ukuguquka kuyo inkohlakalo yabo, ukuba bangaqu̔miseli otixo bambi." 
Jeremiah44:6 Ngako batululwa ubuṙalaṙume bam nengqumbo yam, obatshayo ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda nasezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme, zada zaba yingcitakalo nentshabalalo, njengokwanamhla nje." 
Jeremiah44:7 Ngako kaloku, utsho uyehova, utixo wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Kunganina ukuba niyenza inkohlakalo enkulu kangaka ngakuyo imipefumlo yenu, ukuba ninqanyulwe, indoda nomfazi, umntwana nosana, pakati kwo‐Juda, nide ningashiyelwa isisalela;" 
Jeremiah44:8 ngokundiqumbisa ngemisebenzi yezandla zenu, ngokuqu̔misela otixo bambi elizweni le‐Jipete, apo nize ukupambukela kona, ukuze ninqanyulwe, nokuze nibe sisiqalekiswa nesigxekwa pakati kwezizwe zonke zomhlaba?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Senilibele na izikohlakalo zoyihlo benu, nezikohlakalo zokumkani bo‐Juda, nezikohlakalo zabafazi babo, nezenu izikohlakalo, nezikohlakalo zabafazi benu, ezona bazenzileyo elizweni lakwa‐Juda, nasezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Abagqobokanga kwada kwanamhla nje, aboyikanga nokwoyika, abahambanga emtetweni wam kanjako, nasemimisweni yam, endandiyibeka pambi kwenu, napambi kwoyihlo benu." 
Jeremiah44:11 Ngako oko, utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kubeka ubuso bam ngakuni kube kokubi, nokuba ndibanqamle o‐Juda bonke." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ewe, ndiya kutabata isisalela so‐Juda, abo babubekisile ubuso babo ukuza elizweni le‐Jipete ukupambukela kona, babeya kugqitywa bonke; elizweni le‐Jipete baya kuwa ngesiṙele, baya kugqitywa ngendlala, kwa kuye omncinane kude kube kuye omkulu; ngesiṙele nangendlala baya kufa; babeya kuba yinto yokunywebelelwa, n eyokutelwa nqa, nesiqalekiswa, nesigxekwa." 
Jeremiah44:13 Ngokuba ndiya kubabeta abo bahleli elizweni le‐Jipete, njengokuba ndiyibetile i‐Yerusaleme, ngesiṙele, na ngendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo:" 
Jeremiah44:14 kude kungabiko osindileyo noseleyo kwisisalela so‐Juda, abazileyo ukupambukela kona elizweni le‐Jipete, abaya kubuyela kulo ilizwe lakwa‐Juda, elo balangazelelayo ukubuyela kulo, ukuba bahlale kona; ngokuba bengayi kubuya, kupela ngabasindayo." 
Jeremiah44:15 Aza onke omadoda abesazi ukuba abafazi bawo baqu̔misele otixo bambi, nabo bonke abafazi abebemi ngakona, umhlambi omkulu, nabo bonke abantu abebehlala elizweni le‐Jipete, e‐Patrose, bampendula u‐Jeremiya, besiti:" 
Jeremiah44:16 Ilizwi ulitetileyo kuti egameni likayehova, asiyi kupulapula kuwe." 
Jeremiah44:17 Koko siya kukwenza ngenyaniso konke okusukuba kupuma emlonyeni wetu, ukuqu̔misela ukumkanikazi wezulu, nokumtululela iminikelo yokusela, njengokuba senje njalo, tina nobawo betu, okumkani betu nenkosana zetu, ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, nasezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme; okuya sibe sihluti sisonka, sibe sinyamnyekile, nelishwa besingaliboni." 
Jeremiah44:18 Kodwa kuseloko sayekayo ukuqu̔misela ukumkanikazi wezulu, nokumtululela iminikelo yokusela, siswele izinto zonke, sigqityiwe ngesiṙele nangendlala." 
Jeremiah44:19 Naxeshekweni sibe siqu̔misela ukumkanikazi wezulu, samtululela iminikelo yokusela, bekungapandle kwamadoda etu na, ukuba samenzela izonkanyana ukumbedesha, nokuba samtululela iminikelo yokusela?" 
Jeremiah44:20 Waza wateta u‐Jeremiya kubo bonke abantu, kuwo amadoda, nakubo abafazi, nakubo bonke abantu abebempendule ngelizwi elo, esiti:" 
Jeremiah44:21 Isiqu̔miso enanisiqu̔misa ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda, nasezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme, nina noyihlo benu, okumkani benu nenkosana zenu, nabantu belizwe, asi siso na esikunjulweyo nguyehova, nesangenayo entliziyweni yake?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Waye uyehova wayengasenako ukunyamezela inkohlakalo yezenzo zenu, izinto ezibuntshontsho enazenzayo; ngako ilizwe lenu laba yingcitakalo, nento yokutelwa nqa, nesiqalekiswa, lingenabemi, njengokwanamhla nje." 
Jeremiah44:23 Ngenxa yokuba niqu̔misile, nokuba nonile ngakuye uyehova, ningalivanga ilizwi likayehova, ningahambanga nokuhamba emtetweni wake, nasemimisweni yake, nasezinqi̔nelweni zake, kukona nihlelwe lilishwa eli, njengokwanamhla nje." 
Jeremiah44:24 Walekela u‐Jeremiya wati kubo bonke abantu, nakubo bonke abafazi: Yivani ilizwi likayehova, nonke nina bo‐Juda abaselizweni le‐Jipete!" 
Jeremiah44:25 Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, esiti: Nina, nabafazi benu, senitetile ngemilomo yenu, nazalisekisa ngezandla zenu, nisiti: Siya kufeza ngenyaniso izibambiso zetu esibambisile ngazo, zokuqu̔misela ukumkanikazi wezulu, nokumtululela iminikelo yokusela; izibambiso zenu baya kuziqinisa ngenyaniso, ewe, izibambiso zenu baya kuzifeza ngenyaniso." 
Jeremiah44:26 Ngako oko yivani ilizwi likayehova, nonke nina bo‐Juda abahleli ezweni le‐Jipete! Bona ke, ndifungile igama lam elikulu, utsho uyehova, ukuba igama lam aliyi kubuya libizwe ngumlomo wenye indoda yakwa‐Juda, kulo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete, isiti: Ihleli nje inkosi e nguyehova!" 
Jeremiah44:27 Bona ke, ndiya kulinda pezu kwabo kube kokubi, kungabi kokulungileyo; aye onke amadoda akwa‐Juda aselizweni le‐Jipete eya kugqitywa ngesiṙele nangendlala, ade apeliswe." 
Jeremiah44:28 Kodwa abasindileyo kwisiṙele baya kubuya elizweni le‐Jipete baye elizweni lakwa‐Juda, bebancinane inani labo; baze bonke abesisalela so‐Juda, abangenileyo e‐Jipete ukuza kupambukela kona, bazi lelikabanina ilizwi eliya kuma, elam, elabo kusinina." 
Jeremiah44:29 Nguwo lo oya kuba ngumqondiso kuni, utsho uyehova, wokuba ndiya kunibeta kulendawo, ukuze nikwazi okokuba amazwi am aya kunimela ngokwenyaniso kube kokubi:" 
Jeremiah44:30 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kunikela u‐Faro Hofera, ukumkani we‐Jipete, esandleni sentshaba zake, nesesandleni sabo ababufunayo ubomi bake, njengokuba ndanikela u‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, esandleni sika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, utshaba lwake, nowafuna ubomi bake." 
Jeremiah45:1 ILIZWI owalitetayo u‐Jeremiya umprofite ku‐Baruke unyana ka‐Neriya, akuba ebeba̔lile lamazwi encwadini ngomlomo ka‐Jeremiya, ngomnyaka wesine ka‐Yoyakime unyana ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah45:2 Utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ngawe, Baruke! ukuti:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Ubusiti: Hai ke ubunzima bam! ngokuba uyehova elwongezile usizi ebuhlungwini bam; ndidiniwe kukugula kwam, nokupumla andikufumani." 
Jeremiah45:4 Uya kutsho kuye ukuti: Uyehova utsho ukuti: Bona ke, oko ndikwakileyo ndokucita, noko ndikutyalileyo ndokudonyula, kwa lonke elilizwe." 
Jeremiah45:5 Uze wena uzifunele na izinto ezinkulu? Zungazifuni; ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kuzisa ilishwa pezu kwoluntu lwonke, utsho uyehova; kodwa ubomi bako ndobunika kuwe bube lixoba kuzo zonke indawo apo uya kona." 
Jeremiah46:1 ILIZWI likayehova elezayo ku‐Jeremiya ngabo abaheyideni: 
Jeremiah46:2 Ngayo i‐Jipete, ngayo impi ka‐Faro Neko ukumkani we‐Jipete, ebingasemlanjeni wom‐Ferate e‐Karakemishe, owati u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone wayibeta ngowesine umnyaka ka‐Yoyakime unyana Ka‐Josiya ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
Jeremiah46:3 Lungisani ikakana nekaka, nisondele ekulweni." 
Jeremiah46:4 Bopani amahashe, nijiwule, nina bakweli! zimiseni nineminqwazi; gudisani izikali, yambatani ihempe zentsimbi." 
Jeremiah46:5 Yinina lento ndibabona betusiwe, benqandiwe ngomva? Kwa amagoṙa abo acitiwe, ewe ayenza intsabo kupela, akabeki ngomva; isoyikiso singamacala onke, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah46:6 Onamendu akayi kwesaba, noligoṙa akayi kusinda; ngasenode, ecaleni lomlambo wom‐Ferate, baya kuku̔beka, baya kuwa." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ngubanina lo enyuka njengomlambo, omanzi azamazama njengemisinga?" 
Jeremiah46:8 I‐Jipete iyanyuka njengomlambo, namanzi ayazamazama njengemisinga; iti: Ndiya kunyuka, ndiya kugubungela umhlaba; ndiya kutshabalalisa izixeko, nabahlala kuzo." 
Jeremiah46:9 Jiwulani emahasheni, maziti dlongodlongo inqwelo, namagoṙa makapume ke: ama‐Tiyopiya nama‐Pute epete ikakana, nama‐Ludi epete isipeta e si tyeda." 
Jeremiah46:10 Ngokuba umhla lo ngo?-? wenkosi, kayehova wemikosi, umhla wempindezelo apindezelwe ezintshabeni zake, nxa iṙele liya kudla, lihlute, linxiliswe ngegazi lazo; ngokuba inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, inombingo elizweni lasenode ngasemlanjeni wom‐Ferate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Nyuka uye e‐Gileyadi, utabate itsori, ntombi ipela yase‐Jipete! Ufumana uwandisa amayeza; akuko impiliso kuwe." 
Jeremiah46:12 Izizwe zivile ihlazo lako, nesikalo sako sizalisile umhlaba; ngokuba igoṙa liku̔bekile ngakulo igoṙa, awile ndawonye omabini." 
Jeremiah46:13 Ilizwi owaliteta uyehova ku‐Jeremiya umprofite, ngokuza kuka‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ukubeta ilizwe le‐Jipete:" 
Jeremiah46:14 Shumayelani e‐Jipete, nivakalise e‐Migidole; ewe, vakalisani e‐Nofe nase‐Tahapanesi; niti: Zimise, uzilungiselele, ngokuba iṙele lisidla ngento ekungqongayo." 
Jeremiah46:15 Yinina lento amaṙoti ako akukulisiwe? Akema, ngokuba uyehova ewapenule." 
Jeremiah46:16 Uyandisa abaku̔bekayo, ewe, bayantliteka omnye ngakuye omnye; bati: Sukani, masibuyele ebantwini bakowetu, naselizweni lokuzalwa kwetu, ngenxa yesiṙele esibandezelayo." 
Jeremiah46:17 Badanduluka kona, besiti: u‐Faro, ukumkani we‐Jipete, uyintshabalalo; ixesha elimiselweyo ulidlulisile." 
Jeremiah46:18 Ndihleli nje, utsho ukumkani, ogama li nguyehova wemikosi, ngenyaniso, njengokuba i‐Tabore ipakati kwentaba, ne‐Karamele ingaselwandle, uyeza!" 
Jeremiah46:19 Zenzele impahla zokufuduka, wena ntombi umiyo e‐Jipete! ngokuba i‐Nofe yoba yinto yokucitakaliswa, neyokufacwa, ingenabemi." 
Jeremiah46:20 I‐Jipete ilitokazi elihle kakulu; intshabalaliso ivela enode ingenile kuyo. 
Jeremiah46:21 Kwa abaqeshwa abapakati kwayo banjengamatole atyetyisiweyo; koko kwa bona bajikile, besabile kunye, abemanga: ngokuba umhla wembujiswa yabo ize pezu kwabo, ixesha lokwohlwaywa kwabo." 
Jeremiah46:22 Ilizwi layo liya kupuma njengelenyoka; ngokuba beya kuhamba ngobuṙoti, beze ngakuyo namazembe, njengabagauli bemiti." 
Jeremiah46:23 Baya kuhlahla ihlati layo, utsho uyehova, nangona lingapandekiyo; ngokuba bebaninzi pezu kwenkumbi, ewe, abanakubalwa." 
Jeremiah46:24 Intombi yase‐Jipete idanisiwe, inikelwe esandleni sabantu basenode." 
Jeremiah46:25 Uti uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli: Bona ke, ndiya kwohlwaya u‐Amoni wase‐No, no‐Faro, ne‐Jipete, notixo bayo, nokumkani bayo, kwa u‐Faro, nabo batemba kuye." 
Jeremiah46:26 Ndandiya kubanikela esandleni sabo babufunayo ubomi babo, kwa sesandleni sika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, nasesandleni sezicaka zake: kodwa emva kwoko iya kumiwa njengasemihleni yakudala, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah46:27 Kodwa wena, ungoyiki, sicaka sam Yakobi! ungetuswa kanjalo, Sirayeli! ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kukusindisa kwa kude, nenzalo yako elizweni lokutinjelwa kwabo; waeya kubuya u‐Yakobi, abe nokupumla, onwabe, kungeko oya kumnkwantyisa." 
Jeremiah46:28 Ungoyiki, sicaka sam Yakobi! utsho uyehova, ngokuba ndinawe mna; nangona ndikwenza ukugqitywa kuzo zonke izizwe apo ndikugxotele kona, andiyi kwenzela wena ukugqitywa noko; kodwa ndiya kukwohlwaya ngokufanelekileyo, ndingagqibeli ukukuyeka ungabi natyala." 
Jeremiah47:1 ILIZWI likayehova elezayo ku‐Jeremiya umprofite ngawo ama‐Filistiya, engekabeti i‐Gaza u‐Faro." 
Jeremiah47:2 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, amanzi ayanyuka enode, aya kuba ngumsinga okukulayo, akukulele ilizwe nokuzala kwalo, isixeko nabahlala kuso; bade bakale abantu, balile bonke abemi belizwe," 
Jeremiah47:3 ngenxa yentlokoma yokungqisha kwempupu zamahashe ake anamandla, ngenxa yokuti qaka kwenqwelo zake, yokugunguza kwevili zake: oyise abajikeli kubo abantwana ngokupolelwa kwezandla;" 
Jeremiah47:4 ngenxa yomhla ozayo ukucitakalisa onke ama‐Filistiya, ukunqamlela i‐Tire ne‐Tsidone bonke abancedi abaseleyo; ngokuba uyehova eya kucitakalisa ama‐Filistiya, isisalela sabesiqiti se‐Kafetori." 
Jeremiah47:5 Ubunqai buze pezu kwe‐Gaza; i‐Ashekelone ibujisiwe, kunye nesisalela sabomhlambo wabo: kude kube ninina uya kuziqapula?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Au, siṙele sikayehova! kude kube ninina ungayi kulala? zifake esinxobeni sako; pumla, uti tu." 
Jeremiah47:7 Ungati nina ukulala? ngokuba uyehova esiyalezele ngakuyo i‐Ashekelone, nangakulo unxweme lwolwandle; usinqopisele kwa kona." 
Jeremiah48:1 NGAYO i‐Mowabi. Utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Kwoba nzima kuyo i‐Nebo, ngokuba icitakalisiwe; i‐Kiriyatayime idanisiwe, ibanjiwe; i‐Misigabe idanisiwe, imatisiwe." 
Jeremiah48:2 Ukuqa̔yisa kwe‐Mowabi ngayo i‐Heshebone akuseko; baqingile ilishwa ngakuyo, besiti: Yizani, siye siyinqamle ingabi sisizwe; nawe, Madimene! uya kubujiswa; isiṙele sokulandela." 
Jeremiah48:3 Ilizwi lesikalo livela e‐Horonayime, ucitakalo notshabalalo olukulu." 
Jeremiah48:4 I‐Mowabi itshabalele; abancinane bayo bavakalisile isikalo. 
Jeremiah48:5 Ngokuba eqineni lase‐Luhiti ukulila kunyuka pezu kwokulila; ngokuba etambekeni lase‐Horonayime intshaba zisiva isikalo sotshabalalo. 
Jeremiah48:6 Sabani, sindisani ubomi benu, nibe njengomti weharohere entlango." 
Jeremiah48:7 Ngokuba ngenxa yokutemba kwako emisebenzini yako nasezindyetyeni zako, uya kubanjwa nawe: no‐Kemoshe yena uya kumka aye ekutinjweni, abaperisite bake nenkosana zake kwa kunye." 
Jeremiah48:8 Kanjalo umfaci uya kuza ezixekweni zonke, side singasindi nasinye isixeko: umhlambo nawo woti tshabalala, netafa liya kucitakaliswa, njengokuba etshilo uyehova." 
Jeremiah48:9 Nikani amapiko kuyo i‐Mowabi, ize ibaleke imke ke, nezixeko zayo zibe yingcitakalo, kungabiko ohlala kuzo." 
Jeremiah48:10 Makaqalekiswe lowo owenza umsebenzi kayehova ngenkohliso: makaqalekiswe nalowo obambayo isiṙele sake egazini. 
Jeremiah48:11 U‐Mowabi ube wonwabile kwa sebutsheni bake, upumlile ezintlengeni zake; akatululwanga kwifatye ngefatye, akayanga ekutinjweni kanjako; ngako oko isongo sake simi kuye, nevumba lake aliguqukanga." 
Jeremiah48:12 Ngako oko, bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa ndiya kutuma kuye abapenuli, abaya kumpenula, nefatye zake baya kuzenza zé, namagubu abo bowaqoba." 
Jeremiah48:13 Waye u‐Mowabi eya kudanela u‐Kemoshe, njengokuba indlu ka‐Sirayeli ibidanela i‐Betele, itemba labo." 
Jeremiah48:14 Ungati nina ukuti: Singamagoṙa tina, namadoda amandla ekulweni?" 
Jeremiah48:15 U‐Mowabi ucitiwe, nezixeko zake zinyukile ngomsi: abanyulwa kwamadodana ake behlele ekubulaweni; utsho ukumkani, ogama li nguyehova wemikosi." 
Jeremiah48:16 Ingozi ka‐Mowabi ikufupi ukuza, nelishwa lake liyanxama kakulu." 
Jeremiah48:17 Mncwineleni, nina nonke abamgqongayo, nani nonke abalaziyo igama lake; yitini: Injanina ukwapuka intonga enamandla, uswazi oluhle!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Yihla ebungcwaliseni, uhlale pantsi enxanweni, wena mhlalikazi, ntombi yase‐Dibone! ngokuba umciti ka‐Mowabi eya kunyuka ngakuwe; uya kuzonakalisa inqaba zako." 
Jeremiah48:19 Yima endleleni, uqolosele, wena mhlalakazi wase‐Harohere! Buza indoda esabileyo, n omfazi osindileyo, uti: Yinto nina ehlileyo?" 
Jeremiah48:20 U‐Mowabi udanisiwe, ngokuba etiwe shwaqe; lila, ukale; xelani e‐Arenone, ukuba u‐Mowabi ucitiwe." 
Jeremiah48:21 Kufikile umgwebo napezu kwelizwe elibutafa; pezu kwe‐Holone, napezu kwe‐Yahetsa, napezu kwe‐Mefahate," 
Jeremiah48:22 napezu kwe‐Dibone, napezu kwe‐Nebo, napezu kwe‐Bete‐dibelatayime," 
Jeremiah48:23 napezu kwe‐Kiriyatayime, napezu kwe‐Bete‐gamule, napezu kwe‐Bete‐mehone," 
Jeremiah48:24 napezu kwe‐Keriyote, napezu kwe‐Botsera, napezu kwazo zonke izixeko zelizwe le‐Mowabi, ezikude nezikufupi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Upondo luka‐Mowabi lunqunyulwe, nengalo yake yapukile, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah48:26 Mnxiliseni; ngokuba ezenze mkulu ngakuye uyehova; aze u‐Mowabi aqikileke emhlanzweni wake, abe yinto yokugculelwa kwa yena." 
Jeremiah48:27 Ngokuba ebengeyinto yokugculelwa kuwe na u‐Sirayeli? ebefunyanwa pakati kwamasela na? ngokuba nxa ubusukuba uteta ngaye, wahlunguzela intloko." 
Jeremiah48:28 Shiyani izixeko, nihlale eweni, nina bemi bakwa‐Mowabi! nize nibe njengehobe, e liyenza indlu yalo emacaleni omlomo womqolomba." 
Jeremiah48:29 Sivile ir̔atshi lika‐Mowabi, (uner̔atshi kakulu,) uqanqalazo lwake, ner̔atshi lake, nokuzidla kwake, nobupakamo bentliziyo yake." 
Jeremiah48:30 Ndiyazi mna ukukukumala kwake, utsho uyehova, ukuba kokungendawo; ilwimi zake zikwenzile okungendawo." 
Jeremiah48:31 Ngako okondiya kulila pezu kwe‐Mowabi, ewe, ndoyikalela i‐Mowabi yonke; amadoda ase‐Kire‐harese intliziyoyam yowancwinela." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ngokulila kwabase‐Yahezere ndiya kulilela wena, mti weveyine wase‐Sibama! amahlumelo ako agqitela elwandle, afikelela elwandle lwase‐Yahezere: pezu kweziqa̔mo zehlobo zako napezu kwokuvunwa kwemiti yeveyine yako umfaci uwile." 
Jeremiah48:33 Kususiwe uvuyo nomgcobo entsimini ecu̔mileyo, kwa selizweni le‐Mowabi; ngokuba ndipelisile iveyine ezincinezelweni; akuyi kubako oxovulayo ngomemezo: umemezo lwabo aluyi kuba lulo umemezo." 
Jeremiah48:34 Ngenxa yesikalo se‐Heshebone kwada kwase‐Elehale, kwada kwase‐Yahetsa, baku̔pile ilizwi labo, kwa se‐Tsohare kwada kwase‐Horonayime, njeng etokazi eliminyaka mitatu: ngokuba amanzi ase‐Nimra eyingcitakalo nawo." 
Jeremiah48:35 Ndandiya kupelisa e‐Mowabi, utsho uyehova, lowo onikela pezu kwendawo epakamileyo, nalowo oqu̔misela otixo bake." 
Jeremiah48:36 Ngako oko intliziyo yam yohlokomela i‐Mowabi njengemilozi, ewe, intliziyo yam yohlokomela amadoda ase‐Kire‐harese njengemilozi, ngenxa yokuba ubuninzi abuqwebileyo bububile." 
Jeremiah48:37 Okunene intloko zonke zibunqai, nazo zonke indevu ziguyiwe; pezu kwezandla zonke kuko iziqapulo, napezu kwezinqe intlakantlaka." 
Jeremiah48:38 Pezu kwezindlu zonke zase‐Mowabi, nakuzo zonke izitarate zayo, kuko isijwili; ngokuba ndiqekezile i‐Mowabi njengesitya ekungeko inyamekelo kuso, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah48:39 Bayalila ngokuti: Injanina ukutiwa shwaqe! Unjanina u‐Mowabi ukunika umhlana ngokudana! Kwa njalo u‐Mowabi woba yinto yokugculelwa nesituso kubo bonke abamngqongayo. 
Jeremiah48:40 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, uya kubaleka njengokozi, atwabulule amapiko ake pezu kwe‐Mowabi." 
Jeremiah48:41 I‐Keriyote ibanjiwe, nenqaba zitinjiwe; yoti intliziyo yamagoṙa akwa‐Mowabi ngomhla lowo ibe njengentliziyo yomfazi osenimbeni." 
Jeremiah48:42 Ngokuba u‐Mowabi eya kutshatyalaliswa angabi ngabantu, ngokokuba ezenze mkulu ngakuye uyehova." 
Jeremiah48:43 Isoyikiso, nesihogo, nomgibe, zipezu kwako, wena umiyo kwa‐Mowabi! utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah48:44 Lowo usabayo isoyikiso, uya kweyela esihogweni; nalowo unyukayo esihogweni, uya kubanjiswa emgibeni: ngokuba ndiya kuzisa pezu kwayo i‐Mowabi umnyaka wokwohlwaywa kwabo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah48:45 Abasabileyo bema bengenamandla emtunzini we‐Heshebone; koko kupumile umlilo e‐Heshebone, nelangatye kwa pakati kwe‐Sihone, odlileyo amacala ase‐Mowabi, nokakai lwonyana bempitimpiti." 
Jeremiah48:46 Kwoba nzima kuwe, Mowabi! abantu baka‐Kemoshe batshabalele; ngokuba onyana bako besuselwe ekutinjweni, nentombi zako ekutinjweni." 
Jeremiah48:47 Kodwa ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwe‐Mowabi emihleni yokupela, utsho uyehova. Kude kube lapa ngumgwebo ngayo i‐Mowabi." 
Jeremiah49:1 NGALO usapo luka‐Hamoni. Utsho uyehova ukuti: u‐Sirayeli akanabo onyana na? akanayo indlalifa na? Kuyinina ukuba ukumkani walo uyalidla ilifa lika‐Gadi, nokuba abantu bake bahleli ezixekweni zake?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Ngako oko, bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa ndiya kuvakalisa e‐Raba yosapo luka‐Hamoni isimemezo sokulwa, yaiya kuba yimfumba eyonakeleyo, namagxamesi ayo aya kutshiswa ngomlilo; waye u‐Sirayeli eya kufuya abo abebemfuyile yena, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah49:3 Lila, Heshebone! ngokuba i‐Hahai icitakalisiwe; kalani, nina zintombi zase‐Raba! binqani ngentlakantlaka; yenzani isijwili, nisukasuke ngasezindongeni; ngokuba ukumkani walo esiya ekutinjweni, abaperisite bake nenkosana zake kwa kunye." 
Jeremiah49:4 Yinina ukuba uqa̔yise ngemihlambo? umhlambo wako uyela ngegazi, wena ntombi epambukileyo! ebitembela kuzo indyebo zayo, isiti; Ngubanina oya kuza kum?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa pezu kwako isoyikiso, itsho inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, sivela kubo bonke abakungqongayo; naniya kugxotwa, abanye ngabanye besiti ngqo, kungayi kubako namnye obuta abadungudelayo." 
Jeremiah49:6 Kodwa emva kwoko ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwosapo luka‐Hamoni, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah49:7 NGAYO i‐Edome. Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Abuseko ubulumko na e‐Temani! Bububile na ubucebo kubo abanokuqonda? Bugqibekile na ubulumko babo? 
Jeremiah49:8 Sabani, jikani, ngxokani ukuhlala, nina bemi base‐Dedane! ngokuba imbujiswa ka‐Esau ndiya kuyizisa pezu kwake, ixesha endiya kumohlwaya." 
Jeremiah49:9 Ukuba abavuni bedreyive bebeze kuwe, bebengayi kuzisalisa imbikicona? Ukuba amasela ebeze ebusuku, ebengayi kukwonakalisa na oko kubaneleyo?"
