Jeremiah49:10 Koko mna ndiya kuhluba u‐Esau, ndiya kutyila indawo zake ezifihlakeleyo, ade akohlwe kukuzimela; inzalo yake yocitakaliswa, nabazalwana bake, nabamelwane bake, ade yena angabiko." 
Jeremiah49:11 Zishiye inkedama zako, ndozilondoloza mna ebomini; nabahlolokazi bako mabatembele kum." 
Jeremiah49:12 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, abo, abakugwetywa bekungekuko okwokusela kwindebe, baselile okunene; nawe ke, unguye oya kuka apatwe njengongenatyala na? Akuyi kupatwa njengongenatyala, koko uya kusela ngokwenyaniso." 
Jeremiah49:13 Ngokuba ndizifungile mna, utsho uyehova, ukuba i‐Botsera yoba yinto yokutelwa nqa, n esigxekwa, n enxuwa, nesiqalekiswa; nazo zonke izixeko zayo zoba ngamanxuwa ngonapakade." 
Jeremiah49:14 Ndivile intshumayelo ivela kuyehova, kanjalo isigidimi situnyiwe pakati kwezizwe, ukuti: Zibuteni, nize ngakuyo, nivukele ukulwa." 
Jeremiah49:15 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndikwenzile into encinane pakati kwezizwe, edeliweyo pakati kwabantu." 
Jeremiah49:16 Ukwoyikeka kwako, ir̔atshi lentliziyo yako likukohlisile, umi emifanteni yeliwa, uyibamba indawo epezulu yenduli; nakuba ubuya kuyenza pezulu, njengokozi, indlu yako, ndoyihlisa kwa kona, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah49:17 Ewe, i‐Edome yoba yingcitakalo; bonke abadlulayo ngakuyo boti nqa, benze amakwelo pezu kwazo zonke izibetwa zayo." 
Jeremiah49:18 Njengasekucitweni kwe‐Sodome, ne‐Gomora, n ezixeko ezimelene nazo, utsho uyehova, akuyi kuhlala kona namnye umntu, akuyi kupambukela kuyo namnye unyana womntu kanjako." 
Jeremiah49:19 Bona ke, uya kunyuka njengengonyama ekukukumaleni kwe‐Yoredane ngakuyo intlalo enamandla; ngokuba ngepanyazo ndiya kumbalekisa kuyo: kodwa ngubanina umnyulwa endiya kummisela ngakuyo? ngokuba ngubanina ofana nam? ngubanina noya kundibekela ixesha? ngubanina nomalusi lowo oya kuma ebusweni bam?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ngako oko yivani icebo likayehova, alicebileyo ngakuyo i‐Edome; namaqinga ake, awaqingileyo ngakubo abemi base‐Temani: ngenyaniso abancinane bomhlambi bobar̔ola; ngenyaniso intlalo yabo yoti nqa pezu kwabo." 
Jeremiah49:21 Ngenxa yentlokoma yokuwa kwabo umhlaba uyangcangcazela; isikalo intlokoma yaso iyavakala elwandle olubomvu. 
Jeremiah49:22 Bona ke, njengokozi uya kunyuka abaleke, namapiko ake wowatwabulula pezu kwe‐Botsera; yoti intliziyo yamagoṙa ase‐Edome ngalomhla ibe njengentliziyo yomfazi osenimbeni." 
Jeremiah49:23 NGAYO i‐Damakusi. Idanile i‐Hamati, ne‐Arapadi; ngokokuba zivile indaba ezimbi, ziyanyibilika; kuko ixala pakati kwolwandle, lukohliwe kukuzola." 
Jeremiah49:24 I‐Damakusi ipolelwe, iyajika ukuba isabe, isinkwantyo siyiqubule; ututumbelo nenimba ziyibambile, njengezomfazi oza kuzala." 
Jeremiah49:25 Hai ukushiywa kwaso isixeko sendumiso, inqili yomgcobo wam!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ngako oko amadodana aso aya kuwa ezitarateni zaso, nawo onke amadoda okulwa aya kubujiswa ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ngokuba ndiya kupemba umlilo eludongeni lwe‐Damakusi, oya kuzidla izindlukazi zika‐Bene‐hadadi." 
Jeremiah49:28 NGAYO i‐Kedare, nangazo izikumkani zase‐Hatsore, ezo u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone wazibetayo. Utsho uyehova ukuti: Sukani, nyukelani ngakuyo i‐Kedare, niwacitakalise amadoda asempumalanga." 
Jeremiah49:29 Intente zawo nemihlambi yawo baya kuzitabata; izikuselo zawo, nayo yonke impahla yawo, nenkamela zawo baya kuzisusa zibe zezabo: aeya kudanduluka ngenxa yabo, esiti: Isoyikiso singamacala onke." 
Jeremiah49:30 Sabani, yenzani intsabo enkulu, ngxokani ukuhlala, nina bemi base‐Hatsore! utsho uyehova; ngokuba u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ecebile ngakuni icebo, waqinga ngakuni iqinga." 
Jeremiah49:31 Sukani, nyukelani kwisizwe esingenakukatala, esihleli ekunqabeni, utsho uyehova; aziko ingcango nemivalo kuso; simi sodwa." 
Jeremiah49:32 Inkamela zaso zoba yimpango, nesihlwele senkomo zaso soba lixoba; ndandiya kucitela kuyo yonke imimoya abo banqanyulwe amancam odevu; nembujiswa yabo ndoyivelisa kuwo onke amacala elizwe labo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah49:33 Ne‐Hatsore yona yoba yindawo yokuhlala yempungutye, n enxuwa kude kube ngunapakade: akuyi kuhlala kona namnye umntu, akuyi kupambukela kuyo namnye unyana womntu kanjako." 
Jeremiah49:34 ILIZWI likayehova elezayo ku‐Jeremiya umprofite, ngayo i‐Helami, ekuqaleni kwobukumkani buka‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda, lisiti:" 
Jeremiah49:35 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kusapula isipeta se‐Helami, ubukulu bamandla abo." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndandiya kuzisa imimoya emine ngakuyo i‐Helami ivela kuwo amancam amane ezulu, ndibacitele kuyo yonke lemimoya; akuyi kubako nasinye isizwe apo bangayi kuza kona abagxotiweyo base‐Helami." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ngokuba ndiya kumatisa o‐Helami ebusweni bentshaba zabo, nasebusweni babo bafunayo ubomi babo; ndandiya kuzisa pezu kwabo ilishwa, ubushushu bengqumbo yam, utsho uyehova; ewe, ndiya kutuma emva kwabo isiṙele, ndide ndibagqibe." 
Jeremiah49:38 Ndandiya kubeka iterone yam e‐Helami, nditshabalalise kwa kona ukumkani nenkosana, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah49:39 Kodwa kuya kuti emihleni yokupela, ndobuyisa ukutinjwa kwe‐Helami, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah50:1 ILIZWI owalitetayo uyehova ngayo i‐Babilone, na ngalo ilizwe lama‐Kaledine, ngo‐Jeremiya umprofite." 
Jeremiah50:2 Xelani pakati kwezizwe, nishumayele, nipakamise ibanile; shumayelani, ningasitelisi; yitini: i‐Babilone ibanjiwe, u‐Bele udanisiwe, u‐Merodaki umatisiwe; izitixo zayo zidanisiwe, amadalo ayo amatisiwe." 
Jeremiah50:3 Ngokuba sinyuka ngakuyo isizwe sivela enode, esiya kulenza ilizwe layo libe yingcitakalo, kude kungabiko ohlala kulo; kwa nabantu nezilo zisabile, zimkile." 
Jeremiah50:4 Ngaleyomihla, nangeloxesha, utsho uyehova, usapo luka‐Sirayeli luya kuza, lona nosapo luka‐Juda kwa kunye; luya kuhamba lumana lulila, noyehova, utixo walo, luya kumfuna." 
Jeremiah50:5 Luya kubuzela i‐Ziyone, ubuso balo lubeka ngasendleleni apa, lusiti: Yizani sizibandakanyele kuyehova, ngocebano olungunapakade, olungayi kulityalwa." 
Jeremiah50:6 Abantu bam babezigusha ezilahlekileyo, abalusi babo babadungudelisile, babasongele ezintabeni; bemkile entabeni ukuya endulini, balibele indawo yokubutuma kwabo." 
Jeremiah50:7 Bonke abebebafumana babadla, nentshaba zabo zati: Asinatyala; ngendawo yokuba bonile ngakuye uyehova, iṙiwa elilungileyo, kwa uyehova, itemba loyise babo." 
Jeremiah50:8 Sabani kwa pakati kwe‐Babilone, nipume elizweni lama‐Kaledine, nibe njengenkunzi zebokwe pambi kwemihlambi." 
Jeremiah50:9 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kuyivusa, ndiyinyusele ngakuyo i‐Babilone, intlanganiso yezizwe ezikulu zivela ezweni lasenode; zaziya kuzicwangcisa ngakuyo; kwa kona iya kubanjwa; intolo zazo zoba njengezegoṙa elilumkileyo, e lingabuyi lizé." 
Jeremiah50:10 Kanjalo i‐Kaledine yoba yimpango; bonke abayipangayo baya kukoliswa, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah50:11 Ngokuba nivuyile, ngokuba nigcobile, nina batimbi belifa lam! ngokuba nidlobile njengetokazi elibulayo, nakonya njeng amahashe anamandla;" 
Jeremiah50:12 udanile unyoko wenu kakulu; lowo owanizalayo unentloni; bona ke, esokupela kwezizwe siyintlango, ilizwe elomileyo, nobala." 
Jeremiah50:13 Ngenxa yomsindo kayehova ayiyi kumiwa, koko iya kuba yingcitakalo ipela; bonke abadlulayo ngakuyo i‐Babilone boti nqa, benze amakwelo pezu kwazo zonke izibetwa zayo." 
Jeremiah50:14 Zicwangciseni ngakuyo i‐Babilone ngokungqonga, nonke nina batyedayo isipeta! yitoleleni, ningavimbi intolo; ngokuba yonile ngakuye uyehova." 
Jeremiah50:15 Memezani ngakuyo ngento engqongayo; inikile isandla sayo; imisekelo yayo iwile, indonga zayo zicitiwe; ngokuba yimpindezelo kayehova le, pindezelani pezu kwayo; njengokuba yenzile yona, nenje njalo kuyo." 
Jeremiah50:16 Nqamlani umhlwayeli kuyo i‐Babilone, nalowo upete iṙenqa ngexesha lokuvuna: ngenxa yesiṙele sombandezeli, mabajikele abanye ngabanye ebantwini bakowabo, nabanye ngabanye mabasabele elizweni lakowabo." 
Jeremiah50:17 U‐Sirayeli uyigusha ecitekileyo; ingonyama zimgxotile; owokuqala o wamdlayo ebengukumkani we‐Asiriya, naló wokupela, u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, unqabile amatambo ake." 
Jeremiah50:18 Ngako oko utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kwohlwaya ukumkani we‐Babilone, nelizwe lake, njengokuba ndimohlwayile ukumkani we‐Asiriya." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ndandiya kubuyisela u‐Sirayeli entlalweni yake, waeya kudla pezu kwe‐Karamele ne‐Bashane, nompefumlo wake wohlutiswa entabeni yakwa‐Frayime ne‐Gileyadi." 
Jeremiah50:20 Ngaleyomihla, nangeloxesha, utsho uyehova, kungafunwa inkohlakalo ka‐Sirayeli, kodwa yoba ingeko, nezono zika‐Juda, kodwa aziyi kufunyanwa; ngokuba ndiya kuxolela abo ndibasalisayo." 
Jeremiah50:21 Ngakulo ilizwe le‐Meratayime, nyuka ngakulo, nangakubo abemi base‐Pekodi; citakalisa ulahlele ekutshatyalalisweni emva kwabo, utsho uyehova, wenze ngako konke endikuyaleleyo." 
Jeremiah50:22 Kuko intlokoma yokulwa elizweni, neyembujiswa enkulu." 
Jeremiah50:23 Sinjanina ukuhlahlwa nokwapulwa isando somhlaba wonke! Injanina i‐Babilone ukuba yinto yokutelwa nqa pakati kwezizwe! 
Jeremiah50:24 Ndakutiyela, waṙinciswa kanjako, Babilone! kodwa wena ubungakwazi oko; wabufunyanwa, wabubanjwa kanjalo, ngokuba ubusilwa noyehova." 
Jeremiah50:25 Uyehova uvumbulule imbekelo yake, waziku̔pa izixo̔bo zokuṙala kwake; ngokuba inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, inomsebenzi lo elizweni lama‐Kaledine." 
Jeremiah50:26 Yizani kuyo nivela esipelweni somhlaba, nqikani amaqonga ayo, yiposeleni njengemfumba, niyilahlele ekutshabalaleni; makungabiko kuyo into eseleyo." 
Jeremiah50:27 Sikani zonke inkabi zayo, mazihlele ekuxe̔lweni; kwoba nzima kuzo, ngokuba imini yazo ifikile, ixesha lokwohlwaywa kwazo!" 
Jeremiah50:28 Ilizwi labasabayo nelabasindayo elizweni le‐Babilone, ukuya kuxela e‐Ziyone impindezelo kayehova, utixo wetu, impindezelo yetempile yake." 
Jeremiah50:29 Bizani abatoli ngakuyo i‐Babilone, bonke abatyeda isipeta; yiṙaule ngokunqonga, kuze kungabiko kuyo ukusinda; yivuze njengokwomsebenzi wayo; njengako konke ikwenzileyo, yenzani njalo kuyo: ngokuba yenzile nger̔atshi ngakuye uyehova, ngakuye oyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ngako oko amadodana ayo aya kuwa ezitarateni zayo, nawo onke amadoda okulwa ayo obujiswa ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah50:31 Bona ke, ndingakuwe, wena uner̔atshi! itsho inkosi, uyehova wemikosi: ngokuba imini yako ifikile, ixesha endiya kukwohlwaya." 
Jeremiah50:32 Waeya kuku̔beka oner̔atshi, awe nokuwa, angabi noya kumsukisa; ndandiya kupemba umlilo ezixekweni zake, oya kuzidla zonke indawo ezimnqongayo." 
Jeremiah50:33 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Usapo luka‐Sirayeli nosapo luka‐Juda lubandezelwe kunye; kanjalo bonke abalutimbileyo, baqinisa ukulubamba, bala ukulundulula." 
Jeremiah50:34 Umkululi walo unamandla, nguyehova wemikosi igama lake; uya kupikisa impikiso yalo ngenyaniso, ukuze anike umhlaba ukupumla, nabemi base‐Babilone abaxalise." 
Jeremiah50:35 Iṙele lingakuwo ama‐Kaledine, utsho uyehova, nangakubo abemi base‐Babilone, nangakuzo inkosana zayo, nangakuwo amalumko ayo." 
Jeremiah50:36 Iṙele lingakuwo amaxoki, aeya kudola; iṙele lingakuwo amagoṙa ayo, aeya kumata." 
Jeremiah50:37 Iṙele lingakuwo amahashe ake, nangakuzo inqwelo zake, nangakubo bonke abantu abadityanisiweyo abapakati kwayo, babeya kuba ngabafazi; iṙele lingakuzo indyebo zayo, zaziya kupangwa." 
Jeremiah50:38 Ukwoma kupezu kwamanzi ayo, aeya kutsha; ngokuba lilizwe lemifanekiso eqingqiweyo elo, bayagezela amadalo." 
Jeremiah50:39 Ngako oko amaṙamncwa asentlango aya kuhlala nempungutye kona; inciniba ziya kuhlala kuyo nazo; yaingayi kubuya imiwe napakade; kanjako akuyi kuhlalwa kuyo kwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana. 
Jeremiah50:40 Njengasekucitweni kwe‐Sodome ne‐Gomora ngutixo, n ezixeko ezimelene nazo, utsho uyehova, akuyi kuhlala kona namnye umntu, akuyi kupambukela kuyo namnye unyana womntu kanjako." 
Jeremiah50:41 Bona ke, abantu baya kuza bevela enode, kwa isizwe esikulu, nokumkani abaninzi baya kuvuswa emacaleni omhlaba." 
Jeremiah50:42 Bapete isipeta nomkonto, babukali, bengenanceba; ilizwi labo liyagquma njengolwandle, bayakwela pezu kwamahashe; sebecwangcisiwe, njengamadoda ecwangcis elwe ukulwa, ngakuwe, ntombi yase‐Babilone!" 
Jeremiah50:43 Ukumkani we‐Babilone uvile udumo lwabo, izandla zake zipolelwe; ututumbelo lumbambile, ubuhlungu njengobomfazi oza kuzala." 
Jeremiah50:44 Bona ke, uya kunyuka njengengonyama ekukukumaleni kwe‐Yoredane ngakuyo intlalo enamandla; ngokuba ngepanyazo ndiya kubabalekisa kuyo: kodwa ngubanina umnyulwa endiya kummisela ngakuyo? ngokuba ngubanina ofana nam? ngubanina noya kundibekela ixesha? ngubanina nomalusi lowo oya kuma ebusweni bam?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Ngako oko yivani icebo likayehova, alicebileyo ngakuyo i‐Babilone; namaqinga ake, awaqingileyo ngakulo ilizwe lama‐Kaledine: ngenyaniso abancinane bomhlambi bobar̔ola; ngenyaniso intlalo yabo yoti nqa pezu kwabo." 
Jeremiah50:46 Ngenxa yentlokoma yokubanjwa kwe‐Babilone umhlaba uyangcangcazela, nesikalo siyavakala pakati kwezizwe." 
Jeremiah51:1 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuvusa ngakuyo i‐Babilone, nangakubo abahlala pakati kwabandisukelayo, umoya otshabalalisayo." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ndandiya kutuma e‐Babilone abeli, abaya kuyela, balenze zé ilizwe layo: ngokuba beya kuba ngakuyo ngokungqonga ngomhla welishwa." 
Jeremiah51:3 Umtoli makatyede isipeta sake, ngakulowo utyedayo, nangakulowo uzipakamisayo ngehempe yentsimbi yake: kanjalo ningabi nabubele ngakuwo amadodana ayo, lahlelani ekutshatyalalisweni wonke umkosi wayo." 
Jeremiah51:4 Ababuleweyo baya kuwa elizweni lama‐Kaledine, nabahlatyiweyo ezitarateni zayo." 
Jeremiah51:5 Ngokuba u‐Sirayeli engengoshiyiweyo, no‐Juda, ngutixo wake, nguyehova wemikosi; nangona ilizwe labo lizele lityala pambi kwoyingcwele ka‐Sirayeli." 
Jeremiah51:6 Sabani kwa pakati kwe‐Babilone, nisindise abanye ngabanye ubomi babo; ningabujiswa ekukohlakaleni kwayo; ngokuba lixesha lempindezelo kayehova eli, oya kuyivuza ngokuyifaneleyo." 
Jeremiah51:7 I‐Babilone ibiyindebe yegolide esandleni sikayehova, inxilisa umhlaba wonke; izizwe ziselile kwiveyine yayo; ngako oko izizwe ziyageza." 
Jeremiah51:8 Ngesiqupe iwile i‐Babilone yatiwa shwaqe; lilani pezu kwayo; tabatelani ubuhlungu bayo itsori, ingaba iya kupiliswa." 
Jeremiah51:9 Besiya kupilisa i‐Babilone, kodwa ayipiliseki: yishiyeni, masiye abanye ngabanye kwelakowabo ilizwe; ngokuba ukugwetywa kwayo kufikela ezulwini, kupakanyiselwe nasesibakabakeni." 
Jeremiah51:10 Uyehova uvelisile ubulungisa betu; yizani, masiwubalise e‐Ziyone umsebenzi kayehova, utixo wetu." 
Jeremiah51:11 Kazimlisani intolo, zalisani amakaka; uyehova uvusile umoya wokumkani bama‐Medi; ngokuba iqinga lake lingakuyo i‐Babilone, ukuba ayitshabalalise; ngokokuba yimpindezelo kayehova, impindezelo yetempile yake." 
Jeremiah51:12 Pakamisani ibanile ezindongeni ze‐Babilone, yomelezani umlisela, misani abalindi, lungisani abalaleli; ngokuba uyehova selekuqingile, selekwenzile kanjalo, oko wakutetayo ngabo abemi base‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah51:13 Wena umiyo ngasemanzini amakulu, ondyebo zininzi! kufikile isipelo sako, isilinganiswa sempango yako." 
Jeremiah51:14 Uyehova wemikosi uzifungile yena, ngokuti: Ngenyaniso ndokuzalisa ngamadoda njengeziboto, aeya kuhlabela umemezo lwokulwa ngakuwe." 
Jeremiah51:15 Wawenza umhlaba ngamandla ake, wamisa ilizwe ngobulumko bake; nangengqondo yake wawolula amazulu." 
Jeremiah51:16 Nxa aku̔pa ilizwi lake, kuko ingxokolo yamanzi ezulwini; uyenyusa amafu esipelweni somhlaba; uyenza imibane kunye nemvula; nomoya uyawuvelisa ezimbekelweni zake." 
Jeremiah51:17 Badolile abantu bonke bengenakwazi; badanele umfanekiso bonke abatyityishi: ngokuba umfanekiso otyityishiweyo wake ububuxoki; akuko umoya kuyo. 
Jeremiah51:18 Yinto engendawo yona, umsebenzi wezigculelo: ngexesha lokwohlwaywa kwayo iya kutshabalala." 
Jeremiah51:19 Osisabelwa sika‐Yakobi akanjengalé; ngokuba yena engumdali wento zonke; no‐Sirayeli uyintonga yelifa lake: nguyehova wemikosi igama lake. 
Jeremiah51:20 Wena ungumvinqikazi wam, izixo̔bo zokulwa zam: ngokuba ngawe ndiya kucita izizwe, nangawe ndotshabalalisa izikumkani." 
Jeremiah51:21 Kwa ngawe ndiya kucita ihashe nomkweli walo; nangawe ndiya kucita inqwelo nokwele kuyo. 
Jeremiah51:22 Kwa ngawe ndiya kucita indoda nomfazi; nangawe ndiya kucita ixego nomfana; nangawe ndiya kucita indodana nentombi. 
Jeremiah51:23 Kwa ngawe ndiya kucita umalusi nomhlambi wake; nangawe ndiya kucita umlimi nesipane sake; nangawe ndiya kucita inkosi nenkosana. 
Jeremiah51:24 Ndandiya kupindezela kwi‐Babilone, nakubo bonke abemi base‐Kaledine, yonke inkohlakalo yabo abayenzileyo e‐Ziyone pambi kwamehlo enu, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah51:25 Bona ke, mna ndingakuwe, wena ntaba etshabalalisayo! utsho uyehova, etshabalalisayo umhlaba wonke: ndandiya kwolula isandla sam pezu kwako, ndikuqengqe emaweni, ndikwenze intaba etshisiweyo." 
Jeremiah51:26 Kwaye kungayi kususwa kuwe ilitye legumbi, nelitye lemisekelo; koko uya kuba yingcitakalo engunapakade, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah51:27 Pakamisani ibanile emhlabeni, vutelani ngexilongo pakati kwezizwe, yahlulani izizwe ngakuyo, bizani ngakuyo izikumkani zase‐Ararate, n e‐Mini, ne‐Shekenaze; miselani ngakuyo inkosi yamasodati; nyusani amahashe njengeziboto ezilixonti." 
Jeremiah51:28 Yahlulani izizwe ngakuyo, okumkani base‐Medi, inkosi zayo, nawo onke amagosa ayo, nalo lonke ilizwe lobukosi bake." 
Jeremiah51:29 Wauya kuti umhlaba ungcangcazele, ututumbe; ngokuba amaqinga kayehova ngakuyo i‐Babilone eya kuma, okulenza ilizwe le‐Babilone ingcitakalo, lingenabemi." 
Jeremiah51:30 Amagoṙa ase‐Babilone ayekile ukulwa, ahleli emanqabeni; butshitshile ubugoṙa bawo, aba ngabafazi: intlalo zayo zitshisiwe, imivalo yayo yapukile." 
Jeremiah51:31 Isigidimi siyagidima ukuhlangana nesigidimi, nombiki ukuhlangana nombiki, ukuya kubika kukumkani we‐Babilone ukuba isixeko sake sibanjiwe sipela;" 
Jeremiah51:32 nokuba amazibuko atinjiwe, nengcongolo bazitshisile ngomlilo; nokuba amadoda okulwa abetwe livuso." 
Jeremiah51:33 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Intombi yase‐Babilone ifana nesibaya sokubula, ngexesha lokunyatelwa kwaso; kuseko umzuzwana, kwandule ukufika ixesha lokuvuna kuyo." 
Jeremiah51:34 U‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone undidlile, undipitizelisile, undenzile isitya esizé, undiginyile njengenamba, uzalisile isisu sake ngezimnandi zam, undigxotile." 
Jeremiah51:35 Ubudlwengu obenzelwe mna nabayinyama yam mabube pezu kwe‐Babilone! uya kutsho umhlalikazi wase‐Ziyone: kanjalo, Igazi lam malibe pezu kwabemi base‐Kaledine! iya kutsho i‐Yerusaleme." 
Jeremiah51:36 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kupikisa upikiso lwako, ndipindezele nempindezelo yako; ngokuba ndiya kutshisa ulwandle lwayo, ndiwomise nomtombo wayo." 
Jeremiah51:37 Ne‐Babilone yona yoba zimfumba, indawo yokuhlala yempungutye, into yokutelwa nqa, neyokwenzelwa amakwelo, ingenabemi." 
Jeremiah51:38 Baya kugquma ndawonye njengengonyama; baya kukonya njengamatole engonyamakazi. 
Jeremiah51:39 Ebushushwini babo ndiya kuyenza imitendeleko yabo, ndibanxilise, ukuze bagcobe, balale ubutongo obungunapakade, bangezi bavuke, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndobahlisela njengemvana ekuxe̔lweni, njengenkunzi zegusha nezebokwe." 
Jeremiah51:41 Injanina i‐Sheshaki ukubanjwa, nendumiso yomhlaba wonke ukutinjwa! Injanina i‐Babilone ukuba yinto yokutelwa nqa pakati kwezizwe!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Ulwandle lunyukele pezu kwe‐Babilone; ngobuninzi bamaza alo iselelwe. 
Jeremiah51:43 Izixeko zayo ziba yingcitakalo, ilizwe elomileyo, nobala, ilizwe ekungeko namnye umntu ohlala kulo, nekungeko unyana womntu odlulayo pakati kwalo." 
Jeremiah51:44 Ngokuba ndiya kumohlwaya u‐Bele e‐Babilone, ndiku̔pe oko akuginyileyo emlonyeni wake, ziti izizwe zingabuyi zele kuye; ewe, udonga lwe‐Babilone luya kuwa." 
Jeremiah51:45 Pumani kwa pakati kwayo, bantu bam! nisindise abanye ngabanye ubomi babo ebushushwini bengqumbo kayehova." 
Jeremiah51:46 Maingabi butataka intliziyo yenu, ningoyiki kanjalo, ngenxa yeṙeto eliya kuviwa elizweni; ngokuba kuya kuza ng omnye umnyaka iṙeto, nasemva kwawo ng omnye umnyaka iṙeto; kwobako ubudlwengu elizweni, inkosi ngakuyo inkosi." 
Jeremiah51:47 Ngako oko, bona ke, imihla iyeza, nxa ndiya kwohlwaya imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yase‐Babilone, laye lonke ilizwe layo liya kudana; kanjako bonke ababuleweyo bayo baya kuwa pakati kwayo." 
Jeremiah51:48 Ziya kwandula zigcobe pezu kwe‐Babilone izulu nomhlaba, nako konke okukuzo; ngokuba abacitakalisi beya kuza kuyo bevela enode, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah51:49 Ewe, i‐Babilone iza kuwa, nina babuleweyo bakwa‐Sirayeli! ewe, a base‐Babilone baya kuwa, nina babuleweyo bomhlaba wonke!" 
Jeremiah51:50 Nina basindileyo eṙeleni! hambani, ningemi: kumbulani uyehova nikude, iti i‐Yerusaleme ingene entliziyweni yenu." 
Jeremiah51:51 Sibe sidana, ngokokuba sivile isigxeko; ihlazo lagubungela ubuso betu; ngokokuba abasemzini bengenile ezindaweni ezingcwele zendlu kayehova." 
Jeremiah51:52 Ngako oko, bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa ndiya kwohlwaya imifanekiso eqingqiweyo yayo, na nxa kulo lonke ilizwe layo inxweleṙa ziya kugula." 
Jeremiah51:53 Nangona i‐Babilone ibiya kukwela kwa sezulwini, ewe nangona ibiya kunqabisa indawo epezulu yamandla ayo, baya kuza kuyo abacitakalisi bevela kum, utsho uyehova." 
Jeremiah51:54 Kuko intlokoma yesikalo ivela e‐Babilone, neyembujiswa enkulu ivela elizweni lama‐Kaledine." 
Jeremiah51:55 Ngokuba uyehova ecitakalisa i‐Babilone, seleyibubisile kuyo intlokoma enkulu; amaza ayo ayagquma njengamanzi amakulu, kunikiwe ingxokozelo yentlokoma yawo." 
Jeremiah51:56 Ngokuba kufikile ngakuyo, ngakuyo i‐Babilone, umcitakalisi; amagoṙa ayo aya kubanjwa, izipeta zawo ziya kwapulwa: ngokuba uyehova e ngutixo wempindezelo, uya kukolisa ukuvuza." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ndandiya kunxilisa inkosana zayo, namalumko ayo, inkosi zayo, namagosa ayo, namagoṙa ayo; abaya kulala ubutongo obungunapakade, bangezi bavuke, utsho ukumkani, ogama li nguyehova wemikosi." 
Jeremiah51:58 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Udonga lwe‐Babilone olubanzi luya kugqityelwa ukucitwa, namasango ayo amade aya kutshiswa ngomlilo; zaye izizwe ziya kuzamela okungento, zozam ela umlilo, zidinwe ke." 
Jeremiah51:59 Ilizwi u‐Jeremiya umprofite wamyalelayo u‐Seraya, unyana ka‐Neriya, unyana ka‐Mahaseya, akusuka ku‐Zedekiya ukumkani wo‐Juda ukuya e‐Babilone, ngowesine umnyaka wobukumkani bake. Kekaloku u‐Seraya ebeyinkosi yokupumla." 
Jeremiah51:60 Waza u‐Jeremiya waba̔la lonke ilishwa eliya kuza pezu kwe‐Babilone encwadini, onke lamazwi aba̔liweyo ngakuyo i‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah51:61 Wayesiti u‐Jeremiya ku‐Seraya: Nxa ufikayo e‐Babilone, uwabone, uwaleseshe onke lamazwi," 
Jeremiah51:62 uya kwandula uti: Yehova! utetile wena ngakuyo lendawo ukuyitshabalalisa, ukuba kungabiko ohlala kuyo, kwa nomntu nesilo, kodwa ibe yingcitakalo engunapakade." 
Jeremiah51:63 Kwakuya kuti, wakugqiba ukulesesha incwadi le, uya kunxiba ilitye pezu kwayo, uyipose pakati kwom‐Ferate;" 
Jeremiah51:64 wauya kuti: Iya kwenje njalo ukuntywila i‐Babilone, ingabuyi isuke elishweni endilizisa pezu kwayo; babeya kudinwa. Kude kube lapa ngamazwi ka‐Jeremiya." 
Jeremiah52:1 EBEYIMINYAKA imashumi mabini anamnye u‐Zedekiya ubudala bake, akuba ngukumkani, wapata ubukumkani iminyaka yalishumi elinamnye e‐Yerusaleme. Igama lonina belingu‐Hamutali, intombi ka‐Jeremiya, owase‐Libena." 
Jeremiah52:2 Wayesenza okukohlakeleyo emehlweni kayehova, njengako konke abekwenzile u‐Yoyakime." 
Jeremiah52:3 Ngokuba ngayo ingqumbo kayehova kweza oku pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme napezu kwo‐Juda, wada wabalahla ebusweni bake, ukuba u‐Zedekiya wavukela ngakuye ukumkani we‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah52:4 Kwaye kute ngomnyaka wesitoba wobukumkani bake, ngenyanga yeshumi, ngoweshumi umhla wenyanga, weza u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, yena nayo yonke impi yake, ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, bayiṙaula; baza baka inqaba zokulinda ngakuyo ngento engqongayo." 
Jeremiah52:5 Saye isixeko sisekuvingcelekeni kwada kwangumnyaka weshumi elinamnye wokumkani u‐Zedekiya. 
Jeremiah52:6 Ngenyanga yesine, ngowesitoba umhla wenyanga, isuke indlala yaba namandla esixekweni, kwada akwabiko isonka ebantwini belizwe." 
Jeremiah52:7 Sandula isixeko sagqojozelwa, ati onke amadoda okulwa esaba, apuma esixekweni ngobusuku, ngendlela yesango pakati kwendonga zimbini, elingasemyezweni wokumkani; ngokuba ama‐Kaledine ebengakuso isixeko ngokungqonga: aye ehamba ngendlela yetafa." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kodwa impi yama‐Kaledine yamputuma ukumkani, yamfumana u‐Zedekiya ematafeni ase‐Jeriko, nayo yonke impi yake icitiwe kuye." 
Jeremiah52:9 Baza bambamba ukumkani, bamnyusela kuye ukumkani we‐Babilone, e‐Ribela, elizweni le‐Hamati, owateta imigwebo pezu kwake." 
Jeremiah52:10 Waza ukumkani we‐Babilone wababulala onyana baka‐Zedekiya pambi kwamehlo ake; kanjalo nazo zonke inkosana zakwa‐Juda wazibulala e‐Ribela. 
Jeremiah52:11 Waudula wamfamekisa amehlo ka‐Zedekiya, wamnxiba ngamakamandela obedu; waza ukumkani we‐Babilone wamsa e‐Babilone, wamfaka entolongweni kwada kwangumhla wokufa kwake." 
Jeremiah52:12 Nangenyanga yesihlanu, ngoweshumi umhla wenyanga, ya lomnyaka obungoweshumi linesitoba umnyaka wokumkani u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, weza u‐Nebuzaradane, inkosi yomlisela, owemayo pambi kwokumkani we‐Babilone, e‐Yerusaleme," 
Jeremiah52:13 watshisa indlu kayehova, nendlu yokumkani; nazo zonke izindlu zase‐Yerusaleme, kwa zonke izindlu zabakulu, wazitshisa ngomlilo." 
Jeremiah52:14 Nazo zonke indonga ze‐Yerusaleme ezingqongayo, yonke impi yama‐Kaledine, ebinayo inkosi yomlisela, yazicita." 
Jeremiah52:15 Nenxenye yamahlwempu abantu, nesisalela sabantu ababesele esixekweni, nabapongomi ababepongomele kuye ukumkani we‐Babilone, nesisalela sesihlwele, wabafudusa u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela." 
Jeremiah52:16 Kodwa amahlwempu elizwe wawasalisa inxenye n‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela, abe ngabalimi bemiti yeveyine, nabaku̔beli." 
Jeremiah52:17 Kanjako intsika zexina ezibe zikuyo indlu kayehova, nezikondo, nolwandle lwexina olube lukuyo indlu kayehova, ama‐Kaledine aziqekeza, nayo yonke ixina yazo ayitutela e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah52:18 Nembiza, nezikotululo, nezicimo, nezitya zokufefela, negxebeka, nazo zonke impahla zexina, ekube kukonzwa ngazo, azisusa." 
Jeremiah52:19 Nezikotile, nezipatamlilo, nezitya zokufefela, nembiza, nekandelare, negxebeka, nendebe, igolide yezo zegolide, nesilivere yezo zesilivere, yazisusa inkosi yomlisela." 
Jeremiah52:20 Intsika zombini, ulwandle lunye, nenkabi ezilishumi linambini zexina ezibe zipantsi kwalo, n ezikondo, abete ukumkani u‐Solomone wazenzela indlu kayehova, ibingenakulinganiswa ixina yazo zonke ezimpahla." 
Jeremiah52:21 Nentsika ezo, ubupakamo benye intsika bebuzikubite ezilishumi linesibozo; kanjalo usinga lwekubite ezilishumi linambini beluyingqonga; nesibili sayo, ibiyiminwe mine; ibiliholoholo:" 
Jeremiah52:22 nentloko pezu kwayo, yona ibiyixina; nobupakamo benye intloko, ibizikubite ezintlanu, inesetyenzwa elipanjanisiweyo, negranate pezu kwentloko ngokungqonga, zonke ziyixina: kanjalo eyesibini intsika negranate zibe zinjengazo ezi." 
Jeremiah52:23 Kwaye kuko igranate ezingamashumi alitoba anesitandatu ngasemoyeni; zonke igranate zibe zilikulu pezu kwesetyenzwa elipanjanisiweyo ngokungqonga. 
Jeremiah52:24 Yandula inkosi yomlisela yatabata u‐Seraya umperisite omkulu, no‐Tsefaniya umperisite wesibini, nabagcini bomnyango bobatatu:" 
Jeremiah52:25 nakuso isixeko yatabata umbusi, lowo obeligosa pezu kwamadoda okulwa; namadoda asixe̔nxe kwabo babebona ubuso bokumkani, abefunyanwa esixekweni; nomba̔li wenkosi yomkosi, owahlanganisa abantu belizwe emfazweni; namadoda angamashumi matandatu kubo abantu belizwe, abefunyanwa pakati kwesixeko:" 
Jeremiah52:26 aba wabatabata u‐Nebuzaradane inkosi yomlisela, wabazisa kuye ukumkani we‐Babilone e‐Ribela:" 
Jeremiah52:27 waza ukumkani we‐Babilone wababeta, wababulala e‐Ribela elizweni le‐Hamati. Kwa njalo o‐Juda bafuduswa emhlabeni wabo." 
Jeremiah52:28 Ngaba abantu u‐Nebukanetsare wabafudusayo: ngomnyaka wesixe̔nxe ngama‐Juda angamawaka matatu anamashumi mabini anamatatu; 
Jeremiah52:29 ngomnyaka weshumi linesibozo ka‐Nebukanetsare wabafudusa e‐Yerusaleme abantu abangamakulu asibozo anamashumi matatu anababini; 
Jeremiah52:30 ngomnyaka wamashumi mabini anesitatu ka‐Nebukanetsare, u‐Nebuzaradane, inkosi yomlisela, wabafudusa kuma‐Juda abantu abangamakulu asixe̔nxe anamashumi mane anabahlanu: bonke abantu bebengamawaka mane anamakulu matandatu." 
Jeremiah52:31 KWAYE kute ngowamashumi matatu anesixe̔nxe umnyaka wokutinjwa kwake u‐Yoyakine ukumkani wo‐Juda, ngenyanga yeshumi elinesibini, ngowamashumi mabini anesihlanu umhla wenyanga, wati u‐Evili‐merodaki ukumkani we‐Babilone, ngomnyaka wokuqala wobukumkani bake, wapakamisa intloko ka‐Yoyakine ukumkani wo‐Juda, wamku̔pa entolongweni," 
Jeremiah52:32 wateta naye ngobuhlobo, wamisa isihlalo sake ngapezu kwesihlalo sokumkuni ababenaye e‐Babilone." 
Jeremiah52:33 Waza waguqula izivato zake zentolongo, wamana ukutya isonka ebusweni bake yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi." 
Jeremiah52:34 Nesabelwa sake sokutya, kwanikwa kuye isabelwa sokutya esifuti sivela kukumkani we‐Babilone, into yemini ngemini yayo, kwada kwangumhla wokufa kwake, yonke imihla yokudla kwake ubomi." 
Lamentations1:1 HAI ukuhlala sodwa kwaso isixeko esibe sizele ngabantu! siba njengomhlolokazi eso esibe sikulu pakati kwezizwe! eso esibe siyinkosikazi pakati kwamazwe siba sesinikelayo! 
Lamentations1:2 Siyalila ngento enzima ebusuku, nenyembezi zaso zipezu kwezidlele zaso: akuko namnye ositutuzelayo pakati kwabo bonke abatandi baso; zonke izihlobo zaso zisipete ngenkohliso, ziba zintshaba kuso." 
Lamentations1:3 I‐Juda yemkile ngokutinjwa ngenxa yembandezelo, nangenxa yobuninzi benkonzo: iyahlala pakati kwabaheyideni; ayizuzi ukupumla; bonke abasukeli bayo bayifumana pakati kwazo ingxingwa." 
Lamentations1:4 Indlela zase‐Ziyone ziyalila, ngenxa yokuba kungeziwa emitendelekweni; onke amasango ayo acitakele; abaperisite bayo bayagula; intombi zayo zilusizi, inobuṙaṙa nayo ke." 
Lamentations1:5 Abo bayimpi kuyo banobukulu, intshaba zayo zisekwonwabeni; ngokuba uyehova eyenze lusizi ngenxa yobuninzi bezigqito zayo: abantwana bayo bemkile ngokutinjwa pambi kwotshaba." 
Lamentations1:6 Imkile kwintombi yase‐Ziyone yonke inkazimlo yayo: inkosana zayo ziba njengamaxama a ngafumani yo idlelo, ahamba engenamandla pambi kwomzingeli." 
Lamentations1:7 Yakumbula i‐Yerusaleme, emihleni yokubandezelwa kwayo nokutshutshiswa kwayo, zonke izinto zayo ezinqwenelekileyo ezibe ziko kwa semihleni yakudala; nxa abantu bayo bawa esandleni sotshaba, kungeko oyincedayo; intshaba zayibona, zahleka utshabalalo lwayo." 
Lamentations1:8 I‐Yerusaleme yonile kakulu; kukona iyinto enco̔lileyo: bonke abebeyibeka bayayidela, ngokuba bebone ubuzé bayo: ewe, yona iyagula, iyabuya ngomva." 
Lamentations1:9 Ukunco̔la kwayo kusemasondweni engubo yayo; ayikumbulelanga ukupela kwayo; ngako yabisihla ngento engummangaliso; ibingenaye umtutuzeli. Kangela, Yehova! imbandezelwa yam; ngokuba utshaba luzenze lukulu." 
Lamentations1:10 Isandla salo lusitwabulule utshaba pezu kwazo zonke izinto zayo ezinqwenelekileyo: ngenyaniso ibonile abaheyideni ukuba bangenile endaweni yayo eyingcwele, obuyalela ngabo ukuba mabangangeni entlanganisweni yako." 
Lamentations1:11 Bayagula bonke abantu bayo, bayafuna isonka; izinto zabo ezinqwenelekileyo bazananile ngokudla, ukuba kubuyiswe umpefumlo: bona, Yehova! ukangele; ngokuba ndiba ngodelekileyo." 
Lamentations1:12 Asi nto na kuni, nonke nina badlulayo ngendlela? kangelani, nibone ukuba kuko ubuhlungu na njengobam ubuhlungu, obo bundenzelweyo mna, obo uyehova wa ndi bulala ngabo ngomhla wobushushu bengqumbo yake." 
Lamentations1:13 Utumile ematanjeni am umlilo uvela pezulu; uwoyisile kanjalo: utambo ulwanekele inyawo zam; undibuyisele emva; undenzile ocitakeleyo, ocubukayo imini yonke." 
Lamentations1:14 Iyokwe yezigqito zam ibotshelelwe ngesandla sake; zijijene; zinyukile entanyeni yam: uwisile amandla am; inkosi indinikele ezandleni za bo ndikohlwa ukusuka kubo. 
Lamentations1:15 Onke amaṙoti am iwalahlile inkosi pakati kwam; ibizile ngakum intlanganiso, ukwapula amadodana am; isincinezelo seveyine isixovulile inkosi, esentombi ipela ka‐Juda." 
Lamentations1:16 Ngenxa yezi zinto ndiyalila; iliso lam, iliso lam liyahlisa amanzi, ngokuba umtutuzeli ekude kum, umbuyisi wompefumlo wam: abantwana bam bacitakele, ngokuba utshaba lweyisile." 
Lamentations1:17 I‐Ziyone iyatwabulula izandla zayo; akuko umtutuzeli kuyo: uyehova ubayalele ngo‐Yakobi abo bamngqongayo, abo bayimpi kuye: i‐Yerusaleme iyinto enco̔lileyo pakati kwabo." 
Lamentations1:18 Uyehova ulungile yena; ngokuba ndivukele ngakuwo umteto wake: kenive, nonke nina bantu! nibone ubuhlungu bam: zimkile ngokutinjwa intombi zipela zam, namadodana am." 
Lamentations1:19 Ndabiza abatandi bam, kuloko bona bendikohlisile: abaperisite bam nabadala bam baqauka esixekweni, nxa babezifunela ukudla, ukuba babuyise imipefumlo yabo." 
Lamentations1:20 Kangela. Yehova! ngokuba ndixinezekile; amatumbu am axapazele; intliziyo yam ipetukile pakati kwam; ngokuba ndivukele kakulu: ngapandle ndihlutiwe abantwana liṙele; pakati endlwini kunjengokufa. 
Lamentations1:21 Bavile ukuba kugulwa ndim, kungeko umtutuzeli kum; bonke abazintshaba zam bavile ilishwa lam; bayagcoba ukuba wenje njalo: uya kuzisa umhla uwuxeleyo, bandule babe njengam." 
Lamentations1:22 Maize yonke inkohlakalo yabo ebusweni bako; uze wenzele bona, njengokuba ubusenzela nam ngenxa yazo zonke izigqito zam: ngokuba izigulo zam zininzi, nentliziyo yam icubukile." 
Lamentations2:1 HAI ukusibekelelwa kwentombi yase‐Ziyone yinkosi ngengqumbo yayo! ibute kahla kwa sezulwini kude kube semhlabeni ubuhle buka‐Sirayeli, ingakumbulanga ngesitulo senyawo zayo emhleni wengqumbo yayo." 
Lamentations2:2 Inkosi izigqibile zonke intlalo zika‐Yakobi, ingabanga nanceba kuzo; ngomsindo wayo iziwisile inqaba zentombi ka‐Juda; izihlisele emhlabeni: inco̔lisile ubukumkani nenkosana zabo." 
Lamentations2:3 Izinqumlile ngobushushu bengqumbo yayo zonke impondo zika‐Sirayeli; ibuyisile esokunene isandla sayo ebusweni botshaba: utshisile kwa‐Yakobi njengomlilo odangazelayo, o dlayo ngokungqonga." 
Lamentations2:4 Isipeta sayo isityedile njengotshaba; isixatisile isandla sayo sokunene njengoyimpi; yabulala bonke abanqwenelekayo kwiliso ententeni yentombi yase‐Ziyone: yatulula ubuṙalaṙume bayo njengomlilo. 
Lamentations2:5 Inkosi yaba njengotshaba; iyigqibile i‐Sirayeli: izigqibile zonke indlukazi zayo; izitshabalalisile inqaba zayo: kanjalo ikwandisile entombini ka‐Juda ukulila nosizi. 
Lamentations2:6 Ilucitile ubiyo lwayo, njengolwentsimi: itshabalalisile indawo yayo yokuhlangana: umtendeleko nesabata uyehova uzenzile zilityalwe e‐Ziyone, wabadela ngokuṙala kwengqumbo yake ukumkani nomperisite." 
Lamentations2:7 Inkosi ilahlile isibingelo sayo, itiyile indawo yayo eyingcwele; izinikele esandleni sotshaba indonga zendlukazi zayo; benzile intsholo endlwini kayehova, njengasemhleni womtendeleko." 
Lamentations2:8 Ucingile uyehova, ukutshabalalisa udonga lwentombi yase‐Ziyone; uyolule intambo, akasibuyisanga isandla sake ekugqibeni; wenza ngoko ukuba kulilwe yindawo enqatyisiweyo nodonga; zicubukile kunye." 
Lamentations2:9 Amasango ayo atshonile emhlabeni; wonakalisile imivalo yayo, wayapula: ukumkani wayo nenkosana zayo bapakati kwabaheyideni: akuseko umteto; kanjalo abaprofite bayo abazuzi umboniso kuyehova." 
Lamentations2:10 Abadala bentombi yase‐Ziyone bahleli pantsi emhlabeni, bati tu; baposile utuli pezu kwentloko zabo, bazibinqile ngentlakantlaka: intombi zipela zase‐Yerusaleme ziyatokombisa ngasemhlabeni intloko zazo." 
Lamentations2:11 Amehlo am ayapela zinyembezi, amatumbu am axapazele, isibindi sam sipalele ngasemhlabeni, ngenxa yokwapuka kwentombi yabantu bam; ngokuba intsatshana nentsana zisiwa ezitarateni zesixeko." 
Lamentations2:12 Ziti konina: Ipina inqolowa neveyine? nxa zisiwa njengenxweleṙa ezitarateni zesixeko; nxa umpefumlo wazo utululelwa esifubeni sonina. 
Lamentations2:13 Ndokunqi̔nela nto nina? ndokufanisa nanto nina, ntombi yase‐Yerusaleme? ndokulinganisa nanto nina, ukuba ndikututuzele, wena ntombi ipela yase‐Ziyone? ngokuba isapuko sako sikulu njengolwandle; ngubanina ongakupolisayo?" 
Lamentations2:14 Abaprofite bako bakubonele okungendawo nobudenge: abatyilanga inkohlakalo yako, ukuba kubuyiswe ukutinjwa kwako: kodwa bakubonele imitwalo ebuxoki nezigxotiso." 
Lamentations2:15 Bonke abadlula endleleni bayenza intlombe ngezandla pezu kwako; bayenza amakwelo, bayahlunguzela intloko, pezu kwentombi yase‐Yerusaleme, besiti: Sisixeko esi na ekutiwe sikupela kwobuhle, siluvuyo kuwo wonke umhlaba?" 
Lamentations2:16 Zonke intshaba zako ziyakwakamela ngomlomo wazo; ziyenza amakwelo, ziyatshixiza ngamazinyo; ziti: Si yi gqibile; okunene lo ungumhla siwukangeleyo; sesifumene, sesibonile." 
Lamentations2:17 Wenzile uyehova oko wakuqingayo; ufezile ilizwi lake, elo walixelayo kwa semihleni yakudala; uwisile, engabanga nanceba; notshaba uluvuyisile pezu kwako; ulupakamisile upondo lwabayimpi kuwe." 
Lamentations2:18 Intliziyo yabo yakala kwinkosi, isiti: Ludonga lwentombi yase‐Ziyone! yenza inyembezi zityityizele njengomsinga imini nobusuku; ungaziniki ukupumla; malungapezi ukozo lweliso lako." 
Lamentations2:19 Suka, danduluka ebusuku, ekuqaleni kwamavaṙasho; palaza intliziyo yako njengamanzi pambi kwobuso benkosi; pakamisela ngakuyo izandla zako ngenxa yobomi bentsatshana zako, eziwayo ngokulamba encameni yezitarate zonke." 
Lamentations2:20 Bona, Yehova! ukangele lowo ungubanina wenje njalo kuye: abafazi baya kudla isixakato sabo na, intsatshana zokutwalwa ezandleni? umperisite nomprofite baya kubulawa na endaweni engcwele yenkosi?" 
Lamentations2:21 Abafana namaxego balele pezu kwomhlaba ezitarateni; ziwile ngeṙele intombi zipela zam, namadodana am: usikile ngomhla wengqumbo yako; ubulele ke, ungabanga nanceba." 
Lamentations2:22 Ubizile njengasemhleni womtendeleko izoyiko zam eziṙaulayo; kwaza kwati ngomhla wengqumbo kayehova, akwabiko osindileyo noseleyo: abo ndibasingatileyo nendibakulisileyo lubagqibele utshaba lwam." 
Lamentations3:1 NDIYINDODA mna ebonileyo imbandezelo ngentonga yomsindo wake. 
Lamentations3:2 Mna undikokele, wa ndi hambisa ebumnyameni, enga ndihambisi emhlotsheni." 
Lamentations3:3 Ngenyaniso ubuye waguqulela ngakum isandla sake imini yonke. 
Lamentations3:4 Inyama yam nentlonze yam uzalupalisile; amatambo am uwapule. 
Lamentations3:5 Wakile ngakum, wandipahla ngenyongo nenkatazo." 
Lamentations3:6 Undihlalisile ezindaweni ezimnyama, njengabakade befile." 
Lamentations3:7 Undibiyile ngamacala onke, ukuba ndingebe nako ukupuma: uwenze nzima umxokelelwane wam." 
Lamentations3:8 Naxeshekweni ndikalayo, ndimemeze nokumemeza, uyabandeza umtandazo wam." 
Lamentations3:9 Indlela zam uzibiyile ngamatye aqandulweyo; imizila yam uyenze goso. 
Lamentations3:10 Ube njengayo ibere elalelayo kum, njenge ngonyama ezindaweni zasese." 
Lamentations3:11 Uzityekisile indlela zam, wandiqwenga ke: undenzile ocitakeleyo." 
Lamentations3:12 Utyedile isipeta sake, wandimisela utolo njengomlinganiso." 
Lamentations3:13 Intolo zompongolo wake uzingenisile emanqeni am. 
Lamentations3:14 Ndaba sisihlekwa kubo bonke abantu bam; n engoma yabo imini yonke. 
Lamentations3:15 Undihlutsile ngezinto eziṙaṙa; undinxilisile ngomhlonyane. 
Lamentations3:16 Kanjalo uwapule amazinyo am ngohlalutye; undiselele ngotutu. 
Lamentations3:17 Nompefumlo wam uwusunduzile eluxolweni; ndalibala inyweba. 
Lamentations3:18 Ndati: Kububile amandla am, netemba lam kuyehova." 
Lamentations3:19 Kumbula ukubandezelwa kwam nokutshutshiswa kwam, umhlonyane nenyongo." 
Lamentations3:20 Uke ukumbule, ngokuba umpefumlo wam utotyelwe pantsi pakati kwam." 
Lamentations3:21 Ndiyakumbuza umpefumlo wam oku:— kukona ndinetemba: 
Lamentations3:22 Kungezibele zikayehova esingagqityelwanga, ngokuba inceba zake zingapeli." 
Lamentations3:23 Zitsha imiso ngemiso; inkulu ke inyaniseko yako. 
Lamentations3:24 Uyehova usisabelwa sam, utsho umpefumlo wam; kukona ndiya kutemba kuye." 
Lamentations3:25 U‐Yehova ulungile kubo abamlindayo, kumpefumlo omfunayo." 
Lamentations3:26 Kulungile ukuba kutenjelwe nokuba kulindwe usindiso lukayehova ngokuti cwaka. 
Lamentations3:27 Kulungele umntu ukuba ayitwale iyokwe ebutsheni bake. 
Lamentations3:28 Uyahlala yedwa, uti cwaka, ngokuba yena emtwesile." 
Lamentations3:29 Uyafaka umlomo wake elutulini; kungati kuko itemba. 
Lamentations3:30 Isidlele uyasinikela lowo umbetayo; ukolisile ukugxekwa. 
Lamentations3:31 Ngokuba inkosi ingayi kulahla kude kube ngunapakade. 
Lamentations3:32 Koko ukuba iyenza lusizi, iya kuba nenceba noko njengobuninzi bezibele zayo." 
Lamentations3:33 Ngokuba ingababandezeli ngokwentliziyo, ingabenzi lusizi kanjalo, onyana babantu." 
Lamentations3:34 Ukuba umntu ancinezele ngapantsi kwenyawo zake bonke ababanjwa belizwe; 
Lamentations3:35 ukuba kutyekiswe ibango lomntu pambi kwobuso bopezu kwonke; 
Lamentations3:36 ukuba kwoniwe umntu etyaleni lake; inkosi ayikolwa kuko. 
Lamentations3:37 Ngubanina lowo uxelayo, kuze kwand’ ukubako, ingayalelanga inkosi?" 
Lamentations3:38 Akupumi na emlonyeni wopezu kwonke okubi nokulungileyo? 
Lamentations3:39 Uyagungqela nina umntu ohleliyo, umntu ke ngenxa yokwohlwayelwa izono zake?" 
Lamentations3:40 Masipande imikwa yetu siyibence, siguqukele kuyehova." 
Lamentations3:41 Masipakamisele intliziyo zetu kunye nesandla kutixo osezulwini; sisiti: 
Lamentations3:42 Sigqitile tina senza ngokungeva; akuxolelanga wena. 
Lamentations3:43 U si gubungele ngengqumbo, usiputumile; ubulele, ungabanga nanceba." 
Lamentations3:44 Uzigubungele ngelifu, ukuze ungacandi namnye umtandazo." 
Lamentations3:45 Usenzile sibe yinkunkuma nento yokulahlwa pakati kwezizwe. 
Lamentations3:46 Zonke intshaba zetu ziyasakamela ngemilomoyazo. 
Lamentations3:47 Sihlelwe sisoyikiso nesihogo, lucitakalo nembujiswa." 
Lamentations3:48 Iliso lam liyahlisa imijelo yamanzi ngenxa yembujiswa yentombi yabantu bam. 
Lamentations3:49 Iliso lam liyatyityi zela lingapezi, ngokuba kungeko izinqumamo," 
Lamentations3:50 ade akangele pantsi uyehova, abone esezulwini." 
Lamentations3:51 Iliso lam liyandivisa ubuhlungu ngenxa yazo zonke intombi zesixeko sam. 
Lamentations3:52 Bandizingele kakulu njengentaka, abazintshaba zam kungeko nto." 
Lamentations3:53 Bandinqamlile ubomi emnxunyeni, baposa ilitye pezu kwam." 
Lamentations3:54 Amanzi ela pezu kwentloko yam; ndati: Ndinqamkile. 
Lamentations3:55 Ndabiza igama lako, Yehova! kwa semnxunyeni wasezantsi kanye." 
Lamentations3:56 Ilizwi lam waliva: ungafihli indlebe yako ekupefumleni kwam, ekukaleni kwam." 
Lamentations3:57 Wasondela emhleni ndakubizayo; wati: Ungoyiki! 
Lamentations3:58 Nkosi! uzipikisile impikiso zompefumlo wam: ubomi bam ubukulule. 
Lamentations3:59 Yehova! ubonile ukwoniwa kwam; lungisa ityala lam. 
Lamentations3:60 Ubonile yonke impindezelo yabo, onke amaqinga abo ngakum." 
Lamentations3:61 Ukugxeka kwabo ukuvile, Yehova! onke amaqinga abo ngakum;" 
Lamentations3:62 iziteto zabo bandisukelayo, namacebo abo ngakum imini yonke." 
Lamentations3:63 Kangela ukuhlala kwabo nokusuka kwabo: ndiyingoma yabo mna. 
Lamentations3:64 Buyekeza kubo ngoku ba faneleyo. Yehova! njengokwomsebenzi wezandla zabo. 
Lamentations3:65 Banike ubulukuni bentliziyo; isiqalekiso sako sibe pezu kwabo! 
Lamentations3:66 Baputume ngengqumbo, ubatshabalalise pantsi kwamazulu kayehova." 
Lamentations4:1 HAI ukuba mncumevu kwegolide! ukuguqulwa kwegolide entle! ukucitwa kwamatye endawo eyingcwele encameni yezitarate zonke! 
Lamentations4:2 Onyana abanqabileyo base‐Ziyone, belinganiseka negolide ecokisiweyo, banjanina ukubalwa ngokuba yimipanda yodongwe, umsebenzi wezandla zombumbi!" 
Lamentations4:3 Kwa impungutye ziyanikela ibele, ziyanyisa amatole azo: intombi yabantu bam ibunqola, njengazo inciniba entlango." 
Lamentations4:4 Ulwimi lwosana luti nama ekuhlangubo lalo ngenxanwa: intsatshana ziyacela isonka; akuko ozabelayo. 
Lamentations4:5 Abo ababesidla izimnandi bayabuba ezitarateni: abo ababesondliwa pezu kwezinto ezibomvu bayasingata imfumba zenkunkuma. 
Lamentations4:6 Ngokuba ukwohlwayelwa kwenkohlakalo yentombi yabantu bam kukulu kokwesono se‐Sodome, eyabicitwa njengasepanyazweni, ingawelwa zizandla ke." 
Lamentations4:7 Abanaziri bayo bebegqitisile ingqweqwe ngokuba ngcwele, bebegqitisile ubisi ngokuba mhlope, bebebomvu pezu kwerubi umzimba wabo, isimilo sabo sasisesesafire." 
Lamentations4:8 Ukubonakala kwabo ngoku kubumnyama pezu kwoncwalazi, abaziwa ezitarateni; intlonze yabo iti nama ematanjeni abo; ishwabene, iba njengomti." 
Lamentations4:9 Banenyweba abo babuleweyo ngeṙele pezu kwababuleweyo ngendlala: ngokuba aba bebengcungcuteka, behlatyiwe, bengenayo imifuno yentsimi." 
Lamentations4:10 Izandla zabafazi abanezibele zipekile ababo abantwana; baba kukudla kwabo embujisweni yentombi yabantu bam. 
Lamentations4:11 Uyehova ufezile ubuṙalaṙume bake; utulule ubushushu bengqumbo yake, wapembela e‐Ziyone umlilo, owadla imisekelo yayo." 
Lamentations4:12 Ngebengakolwanga okumkani bomhlaba, nabo bonke abemi belizwe, ukuba bekuya kungena emasangweni e‐Yerusaleme impi notshaba." 
Lamentations4:13 Ngenxa yezono zabaprofite bayo, n ezikohlakalo zabaperisite bayo, abalipalazileyo pakati kwayo igazi labalungileyo," 
Lamentations4:14 babadula njeng emfama ezitarateni, badyojwa ngegazi, bada abantu bakohlwa ukucukumisa izivato zabo." 
Lamentations4:15 Bamemeza kubo, besiti: Sukani, nina banco̔lileyo! sukani, sukani, ningacukumisi! Ngenyaniso bayabaleka, bayabadula; kutwa pakati kwezizwe: Abasayi kuhlala kona." 
Lamentations4:16 Ubuso bukayehova bubahlulahlule; akasayi kubagqala; ubuso babaperisite ababubekanga; babengenalufefe kubo abadala. 
Lamentations4:17 Nxa sibe siseko, amehlo etu apelela uncedo olungendawo: ekulindeni kwetu salinda isizwe esasingenako ukusindisa." 
Lamentations4:18 Bazingela amanyatela etu, ukuba besingenakuhamba ezitarateni zetu: kwasondela ukupela kwetu, yabizalisekile imihla yetu; ngokwenene ukupela kwetu bekufikile." 
Lamentations4:19 Abasukeli betu badlula ngamendu inkozi zasezulwini; basiputuma kakulu ezintabeni, basilalela entlango." 
Lamentations4:20 Umoya wempumlo zetu, umtanjiswa kayehova, wabanjiswa ezihogweni zabo; esabesisiti ngaye: Ngapantsi kwomtunzi wake sohlala pakati kwabaheyideni." 
Lamentations4:21 Gcoba uvuye, ntombi yase‐Edome, wena umiyo ezweni le‐Hutse! indebe yodlulela nakuwe; wonxila ke, wozihluba kanjako." 
Lamentations4:22 Kugqityiwe ukwohlwayelwa kwenkohlakalo yako, ntombi yase‐Ziyone! akayi kupinda akufuduse: inkohlakalo yako, ntombi yase‐Edome! woyohlwayela; izono zako wozityila." 
Lamentations5:1 KUMBULA, Yehova! oko sihlelwe kuko: kangela, ubone ihlazo letu." 
Lamentations5:2 Ilifa letu libohlele kwabasemzini, n ezindlu zetu kwabohlanga lumbi." 
Lamentations5:3 Sizinkedama, singenabawo; oma̔ betu banjengabahlolokazi." 
Lamentations5:4 Amanzi etu siyawasela ngemali; inkuni zetu zimelwa lixabiso. 
Lamentations5:5 Siyatshutshiswa pezu kwentamo zetu; siyazama, singenakupumla." 
Lamentations5:6 Ama‐Jipete siwanikele isandla, n ama‐Asiriya, ukuba kuhlutiswe ngesonka." 
Lamentations5:7 Bonile obawo betu, abaseko; tina izikohlakalo zabo sizitwele." 
Lamentations5:8 Sipetwe zizicaka; akuko mntu okululayo ezandleni zazo. 
Lamentations5:9 Isonka setu siyasizuza ngobomi betu, ngenxa yeṙele lasentlango." 
Lamentations5:10 Intlonze yetu yaba mnyama njengeziko, ngenxa yolwopu lwendlala." 
Lamentations5:11 Kwadlwengulwa abafazi e‐Ziyone, n entombi zipela ezixekweni zakwa‐Juda." 
Lamentations5:12 Inkosana zixo̔nyiwe ngesandla sazo; abubekwanga ubuso babadala. 
Lamentations5:13 Kwatatyatwa amadodana ukuba asile, nabafana baku̔beka ngapantsi kwenkuni." 
Lamentations5:14 Abadala bapelile esangweni, n amadodana ekuculeni kwabo." 
Lamentations5:15 Lupelile uvuyo lwentliziyo yetu; kuguqulwe ukududa kwetu kwaba kulila. 
Lamentations5:16 Siwile isitsaba sentloko yetu; hai ke usizi lwetu, ukuba sonile!" 
Lamentations5:17 Ngenxa yoku intliziyo yetu icubukile; ngenxa yezi zinto amehlo etu aluzizi. 
Lamentations5:18 Ngenxa yentaba ye‐Ziyone, ecitakeleyo; impungutye zihamba pezu kwayo." 
Lamentations5:19 Wena, Yehova! uhleli ngonapakade; iterone yako ikwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Lamentations5:20 Kunganina ukuba umane usilibala futi, nokuba usishiye ixesha elide kangaka?" 
Lamentations5:21 Sibuyisele kwa kuwe, Yehova! sasiya kubuya: twasisa imihla yetu njengokwakudala." 
Lamentations5:22 Ngokuba okunene ugqibele ukusilahla; usiqumbele ngokukulu. 
Ezekiel1:1 KWAYE kute ngowamashumi matatu umnyaka, ngeyesine inyanga, ngowesihlanu umhla wenyanga, nxa bendipakati kwabatinjwa ngasemlanjeni we‐Kebare, avuleka amazulu, ndaza ndabona imiboniso katixo." 
Ezekiel1:2 Ngowesihlanu umhla wenyanga, (lowo ubungumnyaka wesihlanu wokutinjwa kwokumkani u‐Yoyakine,)" 
Ezekiel1:3 leza ngenyaniso ilizwi likayehova ku‐Hezekile, unyana ka‐Buzi, umperisite, elizweni lama‐Kaledine, ngasemlanjeni we‐Kebare; saye sipezu kwake kona isandla sikayehova." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ndaza ndakangela; kekaloku nalu uquta luvela enode, ilifu elikulu, nomlilo uzibambela, nenkazimlo ilingqonga, napakati kwawo njengobubengebenge bekashemali, pakati kwomlilo." 
Ezekiel1:5 Napakati kwawo kwavela ukufana kwezidalwa ezipilileyo ezine; kuko oku ukubonakala kwazo: zibe zinokufana kwomntu. 
Ezekiel1:6 Kwaye kuko ubuso bune kwezinye ngezinye, namapiko emane kuzo zonke ngezinye." 
Ezekiel1:7 Nenyawo zazo zazizinyawo ezite ntse; nomzantsi wenyawo zazo wona ubunjengawo umzantsi wonyawo lwetole; zaye zibengezela njengobubengebenge bexina egudisiweyo. 
Ezekiel1:8 Zanezandla zomntu ngapantsi kwamapiko azo, ngasemacaleni azo omane; zazibe zinobuso bazo namapiko azo zona zone." 
Ezekiel1:9 Amapiko azo abebandakanyiwe elinye nelinye; bezingajiki ekuhambeni kwazo; zahamba ezinye ngezinye ngokuti ngqo. 
Ezekiel1:10 Nokufana kwobuso bazo, bekuko ubuso bomntu nobuso bengonyama ngecala lokunene kuzo zone; nobuso benkabi ngecala lokohlo kuzo zone; nobuso bokozi kuzo zone." 
Ezekiel1:11 Bebunjalo ubuso bazo, namapiko azo wona abe ahlukene ngapezulu; amabini ezinye ngezinye abebandakanyana, namabini abegubungela imizimba yazo." 
Ezekiel1:12 Zaye zihamba ezinye ngezinye ngokuti ngqo; apo abeza kuya kona umoya, zaya zona; bezingajiki ekuhambeni kwazo." 
Ezekiel1:13 Nokufana kwezidalwa ezipilileyo, ukubonakala kwazo bekunjengamalahle omlilo esitsha, njengokubonakala kwezibane; wona ubuhambahamba pakati kwezidalwa ezipilileyo; waye umlilo ubunenkazimlo, nakuwo umlilo wapuma umbane." 
Ezekiel1:14 Zati izidalwa ezipilileyo zabaleka zabuya njengokubonakala kwemibane. 
Ezekiel1:15 Nxa bendikangela izidalwa ezipilileyo ezo, nantsi ivili inye pezu kwomhlaba ngasecaleni lezidalwa ezipilileyo, inobuso bayo bobune." 
Ezekiel1:16 Ukubonakala kwevili nesetyenzwa lazo, bekunjengobubengebenge belitye letareshishe; kwakuko ukufana kunye kuzo zone; nokubonakala kwazo, nesetyenzwa lazo, bekunjengokungati kuko ivili pakati kwevili." 
Ezekiel1:17 Zaye zihamba ngamacala azo omane ekuhambeni kwazo; bezingajiki zakuhamba. 
Ezekiel1:18 Nezazinge zazo, zibe zide, zibe zinokwoyikeka kanjalo; ezozazinge zazo zibe zizele ngamehlo ngokungqonga kuzo zone." 
Ezekiel1:19 Nasekuhambeni kwezidalwa ezipilileyo, zahamba ivili ezo ngasecaleni lazo; naxeshekweni izidalwa ezipilileyo bezifunqulwa emhlabeni, ivili zafunqulwa nazo." 
Ezekiel1:20 Apo abeza kuya kona umoya, zaya zona, kwa lapo abeza kuya kona umoya; zaye ivili zifunqulwa kunye nazo; ngokuba umoya wezidalwa ezipilileyo ubukuzo ivili." 
Ezekiel1:21 Zakuhamba ezo, zahamba zona; zakuma ezo, zema zona; naxeshekweni ezo bezifunqulwa emhlabeni, ivili zafunqulwa kunye nazo; ngokuba umoya wezidalwa ezipilileyo ubukuzo ivili." 
Ezekiel1:22 Napezu kwentloko zezidalwa ezipilileyo bekuko ukufana kwesibakabaka, njengobubengebenge bekrisitale eyoyikekileyo, solukile pezu kwentloko zazo pezulu." 
Ezekiel1:23 Nangapantsi kwesibakabaka eso amapiko azo ebepakamile, elinye ngakulo elinye: ezinye ngezinye bezinamabini egubungela imizimba yazo ngelicala, nezinye ngezinye bezinamabini eyigubungela ngeliya icala." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ndeva intlokoma yamapiko azo, njengentlokoma yamanzi amaninzi, njengelizwi lonamandla onke, ekuhambeni kwazo; intlokoma yesipitipiti, njengentlokoma yomkosi: ekumeni kwazo, zahlisa pantsi amapiko azo." 
Ezekiel1:25 Kwaye kuvela ilizwi kwa pezulu kwesibakabaka, esibe sipezu kwentloko zazo, nxa zemayo zahlisa pantsi amapiko azo." 
Ezekiel1:26 Napezulu kwesibakabaka, esibe sipezu kwentloko zazo, njengokubonakala kwelitye lesafire, bekuko ukufana kweterone; napezu kwokufana kweterone, bekuko ukufana njengokubonakala kwomntu pezu kwayo ngapezulu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ndaza ndabona njengobubengebenge bekashemali, njengokubonakala kwomlilo pakati kwako ngokungqonga; kwa kuko ukubonakala kwesinqe sake napezulu, nakuko ukubonakala kwesinqe sake nasezantsi, ndabona njengokungati kukubonakala kwomlilo, obunenkazimlo ngokungqonga." 
Ezekiel1:28 Njengokubonakala kwomnyama oselifini ngomhla wemvula, bekunjalo ukubonakala kwenkazimlo engqongayo. Kuko oku ukubonakala kwako ukufana kwobungcwalisa bukayehova. Ndati ndakubona, ndawa ngobuso bam; ndaza ndeva ilizwi lobeteta." 
Ezekiel2:1 Wayesiti kum: Nyana woluntu! yima ngenyawo zako, ndandiya kuteta nawe." 
Ezekiel2:2 Wandul’ ukungena kum umoya, nxa abeteta kum, wandimisa ngenyawo zam; ndaza ndeva lowo owateta kum." 
Ezekiel2:3 Wayesiti kum: Nyana woluntu! ndiyakutuma elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, kwizizwe ezingevayo, ezivukele ngakum: lona noyise balo bagqitile ngakum kwada kwanguwo umhla lo." 
Ezekiel2:4 Balusapo olubuso bunokanda, noluntliziyo ilukuni; ndiyakutuma kubo, wauya kuti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel2:5 Nabo bona, nokuba baya kuva, nokuba baya kuyeka, (ngokuba beyindlu enenkani,) baya kukwazi noko ukuba umprofite ebepakati kwabo." 
Ezekiel2:6 Nawe, nyana woluntu! ungaboyiki, namazwi abo ungawoyiki, nangona amaṙau nameva anawe, nokuba uyahlala pakati kwonomadudwane: ungawoyiki amazwi abo, ungetuswa nangobuso babo, ngokuba beyindlu enenkani bona." 
Ezekiel2:7 Wauya kuteta amazwi am kubo, nokuba baya kuva, nokuba baya kuyeka: ngokuba benenkani bona." 
Ezekiel2:8 Kodwa wena, nyana woluntu! yiva oko ndikutetayo kuwe; uze ungabi ngonenkani, njengayo londlu enenkani; yakamisa umlomo wako, utye oko endikunika kuwe." 
Ezekiel2:9 Ndaza ndakangela; kekaloku nasi isandla soluliwe ngakum, nangu nomqulu wencwadi ukuso." 
Ezekiel2:10 Wayewaneka ebusweni bam; wauba̔liwe wona pakati nangapandle; kwaye kuba̔liwe kuwo izililo, nesincwino, nesikalo." 
Ezekiel3:1 Wabuya wati kum: Nyana woluntu! oko ukufumanayo ukutye; yitya umqulu lo, uze uhambe, utete kuyo indlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel3:2 Ndasuka ndavula umlomo wam, waza wandidlisa umqulu lowo." 
Ezekiel3:3 Wayesiti kum: Nyana woluntu! yenza isisu sako sidle, uwazalise amatumbu ako ngalomqulu endiwunika kuwe. Ndaza ndawudla; waye usemlonyeni wam njengobusi ukuba mnandi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Waza wati kum: Nyana woluntu! hamba, uye kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli, utete ngamazwi am kubo." 
Ezekiel3:5 Ngokuba kungekubo abantu abakuteta kungumgushanxa nabanteto inzima utunyiweyo, kukuyo indlu ka‐Sirayeli;" 
Ezekiel3:6 kungekuzo izizwe ezininzi ezikuteta kungumgushanxa nezinteto inzima, ezimazwi ungawevayo: ngokwenene ukuba bendikutumile kuzo, beziya kupulapula kuwe zona." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kanti indlu ka‐Sirayeli ayiyi kuvuma ukupulapula kuwe; ngokuba ingavumi ukupulapula kum: ngokuba yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli ingababunzi lilukuni nabantliziyo inokanda. 
Ezekiel3:8 Bona ke, ndibenzile ubuso bako bomelele ngakubo ubuso babo, nebunzi lako lomelele ngakuwo amabunzi abo." 
Ezekiel3:9 Njengedamante enokanda pezu kwelitye elilukuni, ndilenzile ibunzi lako: ungaboyiki, ungetuswa nangobuso babo; ngokuba beyindlu enenkani bona." 
Ezekiel3:10 Walekela wati kum: Nyana woluntu! onke amazwi am endiya kuwateta kuwe, wamkele entliziyweni yako, uweve ngendlebe zako." 
Ezekiel3:11 Uze uhambe, uye kubo abatinjwa, kulo usapo lwabantu bako, utete nabo, uti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova; nokuba baya kuva, nokuba baya kuyeka." 
Ezekiel3:12 WANDULA umoya wandifunqula; ndaza ndeva ilizwi lempitimpiti enkulu, lisiti: Mabubongwe ubungcwalisa bukayehova kwa sendaweni yake!" 
Ezekiel3:13 Ndeva nentlokoma yamapiko ezidalwa ezipilileyo awafikelelana elinye nelinye, nentlokoma yevili malungana nazo, nentlokoma yempitimpiti enkulu." 
Ezekiel3:14 Wati umoya wandifunqula, wandisusa; ndaza ndahamba ngobuṙaṙa, ebushushwini bomoya wam; kodwa isandla sikayehova sibe sinamandla pezu kwam." 
Ezekiel3:15 Ndandula ndeza kubatinjwa e‐Telabibe, abebehleli ngasemlanjeni we‐Kebare, ndahlala apo babehleli kona; ndahlala kona imihla yasixe̔nxe, ndinokuti nqa pakati kwabo." 
Ezekiel3:16 Kwaza kwati ekupeleni kwemihla esixe̔nxe, landula leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel3:17 Nyana woluntu! ndikwenzile umlindi kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli; wauya kuva ilizwi ngomlomo wam, ubayale kwa kum." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ndakuti kokohlakeleyo: Uya kufa ngenyaniso; ukuba akumyali, nokuba akuteti ukumyala okohlakeleyo aguquke endleleni yake ekohlakeleyo, ukuze kulondolozwe ubomi bake; lowo okohlakeleyo uya kufa etyaleni lake, negazi lake ndolibiza esandleni sako." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kodwa nxa umyala okohlakeleyo, kanti akaguquki ekukohlakaleni kwake, nasendleleni yake ekohlakeleyo; uya kufa yena etyaleni lake, nawe uhlangule umpefumlo wako." 
Ezekiel3:20 Kanjalo, akuguquka olungileyo ekulungeni kwake, enze ubumenemene, ndandule ndibeke isiku̔bekiso pambi kwake, yena uya kufa: ngokuba ungamyalanga, uya kufa esonweni sake, nezenzo zake ezilungileyo azenzileyo, zona azisayi kukunjulwa; negazi lake ndolibiza esandleni sako." 
Ezekiel3:21 Kodwa nxa umyala olungileyo, ukuba makangoni olungileyo, ati yena angoni, uya kudla ubomi ngenyaniso, ngokuba wayaleka; nawe uhlangule umpefumlo wako." 
Ezekiel3:22 Saye isandla sikayehova sibe sipezu kwam kona apo; waza wati kum: Suka, puma uye etafeni, ndandiya kuteta nawe kona." 
Ezekiel3:23 Ndesuka ke, ndapuma ndaya etafeni: kekaloku nabuya ubungcwalisa bukayehova bumi kona, njengobungcwalisa obo ndabubonayo ngasemlanjeni we‐Kebare: ndaza ndawa ngobuso bam." 
Ezekiel3:24 Wandula umoya wangena kum, wandimisa pezu kwenyawo zam, wateta nam, wati kum: Yiya, uzivalele pakati kwendlu yako." 
Ezekiel3:25 Kodwa wena, nyana woluntu! bona ke, bokufaka intambo, bakunxibe ngazo, ukuba ungapumeli pakati kwabo." 
Ezekiel3:26 Nolwimi lwako ndolunamatelisa ekuhlangubeni lako, ukuba ube sidenge, nokuba ungabi nguye umohlwayi kubo; ngokuba beyindlu enenkani bona." 
Ezekiel3:27 Kodwa nxa nditeta nawe, ndiya kuvula umlomo wako, wauya kuti bubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova: Ovayo, makeve, noyekayo, makayeke; ngokuba beyindlu enenkani bona." 
Ezekiel4:1 NAWE, nyana woluntu! zitabatele isitene, usibeke pambi kwako, usiqingqe pezu kwaso isixeko, i‐Yerusaleme:" 
Ezekiel4:2 uze usenzele ukuvingceleka, uyake ngakuso inqaba yokulinda, uyiposele ngakuso indulana, uyimise ngakuso iminquba, uzibeke ngakuso izicitelo ngokungqonga." 
Ezekiel4:3 Zitabatele nokamba lwesincete, ulubeke lube ludonga lwesincete pakati kwako nesixeko eso; uze ubekise ubuso bako ngakuso, ukuba sibe sekuvingcelekeni, wauya kusivingcela. Ngumqondiso lo kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel4:4 Kanjalo wena lala pezu kwelokohlo icala lako, ubeke ityala lendlu ka‐Sirayeli pezu kwalo: inani lemihla uya kulala pezu kwalo, uya kutwala ityala labo." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ngokuba ndikumisele iminyaka yetyala labo, ngenani lemihla, imihla engamakulu matatu anamashumi alitoba; wauya kutwala ityala lendlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel4:6 Nxa ugqibile le, uze ubuye ulale pezu kwelokunene icala lako, wauya kutwala ityala lendlu ka‐Juda imihla engamashumi mane: ndikumisele umhla mnye endaweni yomnyaka mnye, umhla mnye endaweni yomnyaka mnye." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ngako uya kubekisa ubuso bako ngasekuvingcelekeni kwe‐Yerusaleme, nengalo yako yoba ihlubulukile; wauya kuprofitesha ngakuyo." 
Ezekiel4:8 Kanjalo bona ke, ndokufaka intambo, ukuze ungaguquki kw elinye icala uguquk ele kw elinye icala, ude ugqibe imihla yokuvingcela kwako." 
Ezekiel4:9 Zitabatele nenqolowa, neṙalasi, nentlumaya, nelentile, namazimba, nespelete, uzifake esityeni sinye, uzenzele isonka ngazo; inani lemihla ulalayo pezu kwecala lako, imihla engamakulu matatu anamashumi alitoba, uya kutya sona." 
Ezekiel4:10 Nokudla kwako, oko uya kukutya, kwoba ngokulinganiswa, ishekele ezingamashumi mabini ngamini nye: kwixesha ngexesha uya kukutya." 
Ezekiel4:11 Namanzi uya kuwasela ngokwabiwa, isiqingata sesitandatu sehine: kwixesha ngexesha uya kusela." 
Ezekiel4:12 Njengezonkana zeṙalasi uya kusitya; nangelindle elipuma emntwini uya kusoja emehlweni abo. 
Ezekiel4:13 Wayesiti uyehova: Luya kwenje njalo usapo luka‐Sirayeli ukusitya isonka salo esinco̔lileyo pakati kwabaheyideni, apo ndiya kulugxotela kona." 
Ezekiel4:14 Ndaza ndati: Au, Nkosi Yehova! bona ke, umpefumlo wam awuzanga unco̔liswe: ngokuba ndingatyanga into esisidumbu, nento eqwengiweyo, kwa sebutsheni bam kwada kwakaloku; kanjalo akungenanga emlonyeni wam inyama edlubukileyo." 
Ezekiel4:15 Wandula wati kum: Kangela, ndikunikile amalongwe enkomo endaweni yelindle lomntu; wauya kusenza isonka sako pezu kwawo." 
Ezekiel4:16 Wabuya wati kum: Nyana woluntu! bona ke, ndiyawapula umsimelelo wesonka e‐Yerusaleme; babeya kusidla isonka ngokulinganiswa, nangesitukutezi; namanzi bowasela ngokwabiwa, nangokuti nqa;" 
Ezekiel4:17 ukuze baswele isonka namanzi, bati nqa omnye pezu kwomnye, bangcungcuteke ngenkohlakalo yabo." 
Ezekiel5:1 NAWE, nyana woluntu! zitabatele iṙele elibukali; isitshetshe sabaguyi wositabatela kuwe, usidlulise pezu kwentloko yako napezu kwodevu lwako; wandule uzitabatele izilinganiselo zokulinganisa, uzahlule inwele." 
Ezekiel5:2 Isahlulo sesitatu uya kusitshisa ngomlilo pakati kwesixeko, nxa izalisekile imihla yokuvingceleka; wandule utabate isahlulo sesitatu ubete ngeṙele ngento esingqongayo; nesahlulo sesitatu uya kusicitela emoyeni; ndandiya kur̔olela emva kwazo iṙele." 
Ezekiel5:3 Uze ucapule kwezakona inani elincinane, uzibope emasondweni engubo yako." 
Ezekiel5:4 Uze ucapule kuzo kanjako, uzipose pakati kwomlilo, uzitshise emlilweni; kwa kuwo kuya kupuma umlilo ngakuyo yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel5:5 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Le iyiyo i‐Yerusaleme: pakati kwezizwe ndayimisa, na pakati kwamazwe ayingqongayo." 
Ezekiel5:6 Yaza yavukela ngakuzo izigwebo zam ngokukohlakeleyo ngapezu kwezizwe, nangakuyo imimiso yam ngapezu kwamazwe ayingqongayo; ngokuba izigwebo zam bezidelile, nemimiso yam bengahambanga ngayo." 
Ezekiel5:7 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba nenze impitimpiti pezu kwezizwe eziningqongayo, nokuba ningahambanga emimisweni yam, nezigwebo zam ningazenzanga, nezigwebo zezizwe eziningqongayo ningenzanga njengazo kanjalo;" 
Ezekiel5:8 ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuwe kwa mna, ndandiya kuyenza pakati kwako imigwebo emehlweni ezizwe ezo." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ndandiya kukwenza kuwe oko endingakwenzanga, nendingayi kubuya ndikwenze okunjalo, ngenxa yazo zonke izinto zako ezibuntshontsho." 
Ezekiel5:10 Ngako oko, oyise baya kutya onyana pakati kwako, nonyana baya kutya oyise babo; ndandiya kuyenza kuwe imigwebo, naso sonke isisalela sako ndosicitela kuyo yonke imimoya." 
Ezekiel5:11 Ngako oko, ndihleli nje, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ngenyaniso, ngokokuba indawo yam eyingcwele uyinco̔lisile ngazo zonke izinto zako ezitiyekileyo, nangazo zonke izinto zako ezibuntshontsho, kukona nam ndiya kususa; iliso lam aliyi kuba nosizi, andiyi kuba nenceba kanjako!" 
Ezekiel5:12 Isahlulo sesitatu sako, ngesifo esibubisayo baya kufa, nangendlala baya kugqitywa pakati kwako; nesahlulo sesitatu, ngeṙele baya kuwa ngokukungqonga; nesahlulo sesitatu, ndobacitela kuyo yonke imimoya, neṙele ndolir̔olela emva kwabo." 
Ezekiel5:13 Kwa njalo ingqumbo yam iya kugqitywa, nomsindo wam ndowupumza pezu kwabo, ndandule ndizitutuzele; babeya kwazi ukuba mna Yehova nditetile ngobukwele bam, ndakugqiba umsindo wam pezu kwabo." 
Ezekiel5:14 Kanjako ndiya kukunikela ekucitakaleni nasekugxekweni pakati kwezizwe ezikungqongayo, emehlweni abo bonke abadlulayo." 
Ezekiel5:15 Yaiya kuba sisigxekwa nesitukwa, isiluleko nesimangaliso, ezizweni ezikungqongayo, okuya ndiyenza pakati kwako imigwebo, ngengqumbo, nangomsindo, nangezohlwayo zomsindo: mna Yehova nditetile:" 
Ezekiel5:16 okuya ndituma pezu kwabo intolo ezimbi zendlala, eziya kuba zezokutshabalalisa, endiya kuzitumela ukutshatyalaliswa kwenu; nendlala ndiya kuyandisa pezu kwenu, ndinapulele umsimelelo wesonka." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ewe, ndiya kutuma pezu kwenu indlala, namaṙamncwa, aya kunihluta abantwana; kanjalo isifo esibubisayo negazi liya kucanda kuwe; ndandiya kuzisa iṙele pezu kwako: mna Yehova nditetile." 
Ezekiel6:1 LAZA ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel6:2 Nyana woluntu! beka ubuso bako ngasezintabeni zakwa‐Sirayeli, uprofiteshe ngakuzo," 
Ezekiel6:3 uti: Nina zintaba zakwa‐Sirayeli! yivani ilizwi lenkosi likayehova; itsho inkosi e nguyehova, kuzo intaba nakuzo induli, kuzo intili nakuzo izihlambo, ukuti: Bona ke, mna ndiza kuzisa iṙele pezu kwenu, ndandiya kutshabalalisa indawo zenu ezipakamileyo." 
Ezekiel6:4 Kanjalo izibingelo zenu zotiwa tshabalala, nezifanekiselo zelanga zenu ziya kuqekezwa; nababuleweyo benu ndobawisa pantsi pambi kwezitixwana zenu." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ndandiya kubeka izidumbu zosapo luka‐Sirayeli ebusweni bezitixwana zalo; namatambo enu ndowacita ngento engqongayo izibingelo zenu. 
Ezekiel6:6 Kuzo zonke indawo zokuhlala kwenu, izixeko ziya kucitakaliswa, nendawo ezipakamileyo zotiwa tshabalala; ukuze izibingelo zenu zicitakaliswe zitiwe tshabalala, nezitixwana zenu ziqekezwe, zipele, nezifanekiselo zelanga zenu zigaulwe, nemisebenzi yenu ibujiswe." 
Ezekiel6:7 Baye ababuleweyo beya kuwa pakati kwenu; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova. 
Ezekiel6:8 Ndiya kusalisa isisalela noko, ekubeni niya kuba nabasindileyo eṙeleni pakati kwezizwe, nxa nitiwe sa emazweni." 
Ezekiel6:9 Kanjalo abasindileyo benu baya kundikumbula pakati kwezizwe, apo baya kutinjelwa kona, nxa ndiyiqekeza intliziyo yabo eṙexezayo, epambukileyo kum, namehlo abo aṙexezelayo emva kwezitixwana zabo; babeya kuzidela ngokwabo ngenxa yezikohlakalo abazenzileyo ngazo zonke izinto zabo ezibuntshontsho." 
Ezekiel6:10 Babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova: andifumane ndateta ukuti ndiya kubenzela ilishwa eli. 
Ezekiel6:11 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Beta ngesandla sako, ungqishe ngonyawo lwako, uti: Au! ngenxa yazo zonke intshontsho ezikohlakeleyo zendlu ka‐Sirayeli; ngokuba beya kuwa ngesiṙele, ngendlala, nangesifo esibubisayo." 
Ezekiel6:12 Lowo ukude wofa ngesifo esibubisayo; nalowo ukufupi wowa ngesiṙele; nalowo useleyo, ovingcelweyo, uya kufa ngendlala; kwa njalo ndiya kugqiba umsindo wam pezu kwabo." 
Ezekiel6:13 Naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, nxa ababuleweyo babo baya kuba pakati kwezitixwana zabo, ngokungqonga izibingelo zazo, pezu kwazo zonke induli ezinde, kuzo zonke intloko zentaba, nangapantsi kwayo yonke imiti eluhlaza, nangapantsi kwayo yonke imikoba ebungqingqwa, indawo apo babenikela kona ivumba elimnandi kuzo zonke izitixwana zabo." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ndandiya kwolula isandla sam pezu kwabo, ndilenze ilizwe libe yingcitakalo nentshabalalo ngapezu kwentlango ngase‐Dibela, kuzo zonke indawo zokuhlala kwabo; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel7:1 LABUYA leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel7:2 Kanjalo wena, nyana woluntu! itsho inkosi e nguyehova kulo ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ukupela, kufikile ukupela, pezu kwamagumbi omane elizwe." 
Ezekiel7:3 Kaloku nje ukupela kupezu kwako; ndandiya kutuma ingqumbo yam pezu kwako, ndikugwebe njengokwemikwa yako, ndibeke pezu kwako zonke izinto zako ezibuntshontsho." 
Ezekiel7:4 Iliso lam aliyi kuba nosizi ngakuwe, andiyi kuba nenceba kanjalo; koko imikwa yako ndiya kuyibeka pezu kwako, nezinto zako ezibuntshontsho zoba pakati kwako; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel7:5 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ilishwa, ilishwa lodwa, nali lifikile." 
Ezekiel7:6 Ukupela kufikile, ukupela kufikile; kuvukele wena; nanku kufikile." 
Ezekiel7:7 Umso ufikile kuwe, wena mhlali welizwe! ixesha lifikile, imini yesipitipiti ikufupi, kungesiso isitonga sentaba." 
Ezekiel7:8 Kakaloku ndohla nditulule ubuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwako, ndigqibe ingqumbo yam pezu kwako, ndikugwebe njengokwemikwa yako, ndibeke pezu kwako zonke izinto zako ezibuntshontsho." 
Ezekiel7:9 Iliso lam aliyi kuba nosizi, andiyi kuba nenceba kanjalo; njengokwemikwa yako ndiya kubeka pezu kwako, nezinto zako ezibuntshontsho zoba pakati kwako; naniya kukwazi ukuba ndim Yehova obetayo." 
Ezekiel7:10 Nantsi imini! nantsi ifikile! umso upumile; intonga ihlumile; ir̔atshi lityatyambile. 
Ezekiel7:11 Ubudlwengu buvukile bube yintonga yobuncwangu; akuyi kusala nento yakubo, neyakuso isihlwele sabo, neyakubo ubutyebi babo; akuyi kubako isijwili pezu kwabo." 
Ezekiel7:12 Ixesha lifikile, imini isondele: umtengi makangavuyi, nomtengisi makangalili; ngokuba umsindo oshushu upezu kwaso sonke isihlwele salo." 
Ezekiel7:13 Ngokuba umtengisi engayi kubuyela kokutengisiweyo, nangona ubomi babo bebuseko pakati kwabahleliyo; ngokuba umboniso ungenxa yaso sonke isihlwele salo; akayi kubuya; kanjalo akuko namnye oya kubomeleza ubomi bake ngenkohlakalo yake." 
Ezekiel7:14 Bavutele ngexilongo, nako konke bakulungiselele; kodwa akuko namnye oya ekulweni; ngokuba umsindo wam oshushu upezu kwaso sonke isihlwele salo." 
Ezekiel7:15 Kuko iṙele ngapandle, nesifo esibubisayo nendlala pakati: lowo usendle uya kufa ngeṙele; nalowo usesixekweni, indlala nesifo esibubisayo ziya kumdla." 
Ezekiel7:16 Baya kusinda ke abasindileyo babo, kodwa boba sezintabeni njengamahobe asezihlanjeni, bonke bencwina, abanye ngabanye ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabo." 
Ezekiel7:17 Izandla zonke ziya kupolelwa, namadolo onke ohamba njeng amanzi." 
Ezekiel7:18 Kanjalo baya kubinqa ngentlakantlaka, nengcangcazelo yobagubungela; kwobako intloni pezu kwobuso bonke, nobunqai pezu kwazo zonke intloko zabo." 
Ezekiel7:19 Isilivere yabo baya kuyiposa ezitarateni, negolide yabo yoba yinto enco̔lileyo: isilivere yabo negolide yabo ziya kukohlwa kukubahlangula ngomhla womsindo kayehova; imipefumlo yabo aziyi kuyihlutisa, namatumbu abo aziyi kuwazalisa; ngokuba zisisiku̔bekiselo senkohlakalo yabo." 
Ezekiel7:20 Nesihombo sake esihle, wasimisela ubungcwalisa; kodwa imifanekiso yezinto zabo ezibuntshontsho, ne yezinto zabo ezitiyekileyo, bayenzile kuso: ngako oko ndisinikile kubo sibe yinto enco̔lileyo." 
Ezekiel7:21 Ndandiya kusinika ezandleni zabasemzini sibe yimpango, nakubo abazincwangu zomhlaba sibe lixoba, abaya kusinco̔lisa." 
Ezekiel7:22 Nobuso bam ndobusonga kubo, nendawo yam efihlakeleyo boyinco̔lisa; ngokuba amanyangaza eya kungena kuso, asinco̔lise." 
Ezekiel7:23 Yenza umxokelelwane; ngokuba ilizwe lizele ngamatyala egazi, nesixeko sizele bubudlwengu." 
Ezekiel7:24 Ngako ndiya kuzisa izizwe ezikohlakeleyo kakulu, eziya kufuya izindlu zabo; ndandiya kupelisa ubungangamsha babanamandla, nendawo zabo ezingcwele ziya kunco̔liswa." 
Ezekiel7:25 Intshabalaliso iyeza; babeya kufuna uxolo, kodwa aluyi kubako." 
Ezekiel7:26 Ilishwa liya kuza pezu kwelishwa, neṙeto liya kuba pezu kweṙeto, babeya kufuna umboniso kumprofite; kodwa umteto uya kububa kumperisite, necebo kubadala." 
Ezekiel7:27 Ukumkani uya kulila, nenkosana iya kwambata ukuti nqa, nezandla zabantu belizwe ziya kutuswa: njengendlela yabo ndiya kwenza kubo, nangemigwebo yabo ndiya kugweba bona; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel8:1 KWAYE kute ngomnyaka wesitandatu, ngeyesitatu inyanga, ngowesihlanu umhla wenyanga, bendihleli endlwini yam, nabadala bo‐Juda behehleli pambi kwam, sandula isandla senkosi sikayehova sawa pezu kwam kona apo." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ndaza ndakangela, kekaloku nankuya ukufana kwomntu, njengokubonakala kwomlilo: kwa sekubonakaleni kwesinqe sake nasezantsi, ubungumlilo; nasesinqeni sake napezulu, bekunjengokubonakala kwenkazimlo, njengobubengebenge bekashemali." 
Ezekiel8:3 Wayesolula imfano yesandla, wandibamba ngesihlwita sentloko yam; waye umoya wandifunqula pakati kwomhlaba nezulu, wandizisa e‐Yerusaleme, emibonisweni katixo, elucangweni lwesango lapakati elibeka ngasenode, apo ibikona indawo yokuhlala yomfanekiso wobukwele, ovusayo ubukwele." 
Ezekiel8:4 Kekaloku nabuya kona ubungcwalisa botixo wo‐Sirayeli, njengesibonakalo endasibonayo etafeni." 
Ezekiel8:5 Wayesiti kum: Nyana woluntu! pakamisa ke amehlo ako ngasendleleni yasenode: ndaza ndapakamisa amehlo am ngasendleleni yasenode; kekaloku nanguya ngasenode, esangweni lesibingelo, lomfanekiso wobukwele emnyango." 
Ezekiel8:6 Walekela wati kum: Nyana woluntu! uyabona na oko bakwenzayo, intshontsho ezinkulu indlu ka‐Sirayeli izenzayo apa, ukuba ndimke kude endaweni yam eyingcwele? kodwa buya ujike, wauya kubona intshontsho ezinkulu kwezi." 
Ezekiel8:7 Wandula wandizisa elucangweni lwebala; ndaza ndakangela; kekaloku nasi isituba eludongeni. 
Ezekiel8:8 Wayesiti kum: Nyana woluntu! yimba ke eludongeni: ndaza ndemba eludongeni; kekaloku nalu ucango. 
Ezekiel8:9 Wandula wati kum: Ngena, ukangele intshontsho ezikohlakeleyo abazenzayo apa." 
Ezekiel8:10 Ndaza ndangena, ndakangela; kekaloku nanzi imfano zonke zezinto ezinambuzelayo, nezezilo ezibi, nazo zonke izitixwana zendlu ka‐Sirayeli, ziba̔liwe pezu kwodonga ngento engqongayo ngamacala onke." 
Ezekiel8:11 Kwaye kumi pambi kwazo amadoda angamashumi asixe̔nxe akubo abadala bendlu ka‐Sirayeli, no‐Yazaniya unyana ka‐Shafane emi pakati kwawo, amanye ngamanye enesiqu̔melo sawo esandleni sawo; kanjalo into eninzi yelifu lesiqu̔miso ibinyuka." 
Ezekiel8:12 Waza wati kum: Ubonile na, nyana woluntu! oko abadala bendlu ka‐Sirayeli bakwenzayo ebumnyameni, abanye ngabanye ezinkambilini zobufanekiso babo? ngokuba besiti: Uyehova akasiboni; uyehova ulishiyile ilizwe." 
Ezekiel8:13 Wati kanjalo kum: Buya ujike, wauya kubona intshontsho ezinkulu nakwezi, abazenzayo bona." 
Ezekiel8:14 Wandula wandizisa elucangweni lwesango lendlu kayehova elingasenode; kekaloku nabaya kona abafazi behleli pantsi belilela u‐Tamuze. 
Ezekiel8:15 Waza wati kum: Ubonile na, nyana woluntu! Buya ujike, wauya kubona intshontsho ezinkulu kuzo ezi." 
Ezekiel8:16 Wandula wandizisa ebaleni lapakati lendlu kayehova; kekaloku nangaya elucangweni lwetempile kayehova, pakati kwentendelezo nesibingelo, amadoda angati angamashumi mabini anamahlanu, enemihlana yawo ngakuyo itempile kayehova, nobuso bawo ngasempumalanga, abebedesha ilanga ngasekupumeni kwalo." 
Ezekiel8:17 Waza wati kum: Ubonile na, nyana woluntu! Yinto elula na kwindlu ka‐Juda ukuba kwenziwe izinto ezibuntshontsho abazenzayo apa? ngokuba bezalisile ilizwe ngobudlwengu, bebuyile ukundiqumbisa kanjalo; ewe, bona ke, bayabeka isebe empumlweni yabo." 
Ezekiel8:18 Ngako nam ndiya kwenza ngobuṙalaṙume; iliso lam aliyi kuba nosizi, andiyi kuba nenceba kanjako; nakuba badanduluka ezindlebeni zam ngelizwi elikulu, andiyi kubapulapula noko." 
Ezekiel9:1 Waza wadanduluka ezindlebeni zam ngelizwi elikulu, esiti: Basondeze abapati besixeko, abanye ngabanye benezixo̔bo zabo zokutshabalalisa ezandleni zabo." 
Ezekiel9:2 Kekaloku bona ke, kweza amadoda amatandatu, ngendlela yesango lasentla elibeka ngasenode, amanye ngamanye enezixo̔bo zawo zokubulala ezandleni zawo, nendoda inye pakati kwawo ivete izivato zeqiya, inopondo lweyinke lwomba̔li ngasesinqeni sayo; aza angena, ema kufupi nesibingelo sexina." 
Ezekiel9:3 Baye ubungcwalisa botixo wo‐Sirayeli bebunyukile kuyo ikerubime, obube bupezu kwayo, baya emnyango wendlu. Waza wabiza kuyo indoda ebivete izivato zeqiya, ebinopondo lweyinke lwomba̔li ngasesinqeni sayo." 
Ezekiel9:4 Wati uyehova kuyo: Canda pakati kwesixeko, pakati kwe‐Yerusaleme, ubeke upau pezu kwamabunzi alomadoda agulayo nabefunyekayo pezu kwazo zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho ezenzwayo pakati kwaso." 
Ezekiel9:5 Nakwamanye wati ekuveni kwam: Candani esixekweni emva kwayo, nibete; iliso lenu malingabi nalusizi, ningabi nanceba kanjako:" 
Ezekiel9:6 amaxego, n amadodana, nentombi, nentsapo, nabafazi, babulaleni ngokugqibela; kodwa onke amadoda ekupeza kwawo upau, ningasondeli kuwo; nize niqale endaweni yam eyingcwele. Aza aqala ngabadala abebepambi kwendlu." 
Ezekiel9:7 Wayesiti kuwo: Nco̔lisani indlu, nizalise amabala ngabahlatyiweyo; pumani. Aza apuma, abulala esixekweni." 
Ezekiel9:8 Kwaye kute, nxa abebabulala, kusele nje mna, ndasuka ndawa ngobuso bam, ndakala, ndati: Au, Nkosi Yehova! uya kutshabalalisa na sonke isisalela so‐Sirayeli, ekutululeni kwako nbuṙalaṙume bako pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Wandula wati kum: Inkohlakalo yendlu ka‐Sirayeli no‐Juda inkulu kakulukazi; ilizwe lizalisiwe ngegazi, nesixeko sizele bubugwenxa; ngokuba besiti: Uyehova ushiyile ilizwe, uyehova akaboni." 
Ezekiel9:10 Kanjalo nam, iliso lam aliyi kuba nosizi, andiyi kuba nenceba kanjako; indlela yabo ndoyibuyekeza pezu kwentloko yabo." 
Ezekiel9:11 Kekaloku bona ke, indoda ebivete izivato zeqiya, ebinopondo lweyinke ngasesinqeni sayo, yabika indawo, isiti: Ndenzile njengokuba ubundiyalela." 
Ezekiel10:1 Ndaza ndakangela; kekaloku nankuya esibakabakeni, esibe sipezu kwentloko yazo ikerubime, okunjengelitye lesafire, njengokubonakala kwokufana kweterone, kubonakala pezu kwazo." 
Ezekiel10:2 Wayeteta kuyo indoda ebivete izivato zeqiya, wati: Ngena pakati kwengqengqeleko, ngapantsi kwekerubime, uzalise izandla zako ngamalahle omlilo opakati kwazo ikerubime, uwatshize pezu kwesixeko. Yaza yangena pambi kwamehlo am." 
Ezekiel10:3 Kekaloku ikerubime zema ngelokunene icala lendlu, yakungena indoda leyo; lati ilifu lazalisa ibala lapakati." 
Ezekiel10:4 Bandula benyuka pezulu ubungcwalisa bukayehova kuyo ikerubime, baya pezu kwomnyango wendlu; yaza indlu yazaliswa ngelifu, lati ibala lazala yinkazimlo yobungcwalisa bukayehova," 
Ezekiel10:5 Kanjalo intlokoma yamapiko azo ikerubime yavakala kwada kwasebaleni lapandle njengelizwi lotixo onamandla onke ekuteteni kwake. 
Ezekiel10:6 Kwaye kute, akuba eyalele indoda ebivete izivato zeqiya, esiti: Tabata umlilo pakati kwengqengqeleko, pakati kwekerubime; yandula yangena, yema ngasecaleni levili." 
Ezekiel10:7 Yaza ikerubime yasolula isandla sayo kwa pakati kwazo ikerubime, yasolul ela emlilweni obupakati kwazo ikerubime, yasusa yanika ezandleni zalowo ubevete izivato zeqiya, owawutabatayo wapuma ke." 
Ezekiel10:8 Kwaye kubonakala kuzo ikerubime imfano yesandla somntu ngapantsi kwamapiko azo. 
Ezekiel10:9 Ndaza ndakangela; kekaloku nanzi ivili ezine zisecaleni lazo ikerubime, ivili inye ecaleni lekerubime inye, nevili inye ecaleni lekerubime inye; nokubonakala kwevili kwabekunjengobubengebenge kwelitye letareshishe." 
Ezekiel10:10 Nokubonakala kwazo, bekuko ukufana kunye kuzo zone, njengokungati bekuko ivili pakati kwevili." 
Ezekiel10:11 Zati zakuhamba zaya ngamacala azo omane; bezingajiki ekuhambeni kwazo; koko indawo yabeka intloko ngakuyo, zayilandela; bezingajiki ekuhambeni kwazo." 
Ezekiel10:12 Kwa wonke umzimba wazo, nemihlana yazo, nezandla zazo, namapiko azo, nevili, zibe zizele ngamehlo ngento engqongayo; kuzo zona zone bekuko ivili zazo." 
Ezekiel10:13 Ngokwevili, kwabizwa kuzo ekuveni kwam, ukuti: Intenda." 
Ezekiel10:14 Kwaye kuko ubuso bune kwezinye ngezinye; ubuso bokuqala bebububuso bekerubime, nobuso besibini bebububuso bomntu, nobesitatu bebububuso bengonyama, nobesine bebububuso bokozi." 
Ezekiel10:15 Zasuka ikerubime zenyuka pezulu. Esi sisidalwa esipilileyo endasibonayo ngasemlanjeni we‐Kebare. 
Ezekiel10:16 Zati zakuhamba ikerubime, zahamba ivili ecaleni lazo; naxeshekweni ikerubime zapakamisa amapiko azo zinyuke pezulu kuwo umhlaba, azajika ivili nazo kwa secaleni lazo." 
Ezekiel10:17 Nxa zemayo zona, zema ezi; nanxa zenyuka pezulu zona, zenyuka pezulu ezi; ngokuba umoya wesidalwa esipilileyo ubukuzo." 
Ezekiel10:18 Baza ubungcwalisa bukayehova bapuma pezu kwomnyango wendlu, baya bema pezu kwazo ikerubime." 
Ezekiel10:19 Zasuka ikerubime zapakamisa amapiko azo, zenyuka pezulu kuwo umhlaba pambi kwamehlo am, ekupumeni kwazo, nevili kunye nazo; zaya zema elucangweni lwesango lasempumalanga lendlu kayehova; kanjalo ubungcwalisa botixo wo‐Sirayeli bebupezu kwazo ngapezulu." 
Ezekiel10:20 Esi sisidalwa esipilileyo endasibonayo ngapantsi kwotixo wo‐Sirayeli ngasemlanjeni we‐Kebare; ndaye ndisazi ukuba zikerubime zona.
