Ezekiel10:21 Kwaye kuko ubuso bune kuzo zonke ezinye ngezinye, namapiko emane kwezinye ngezinye, nokufana kwezandla zomntu, ngapantsi kwamapiko azo." 
Ezekiel10:22 Nokufana kwobuso bazo, bukwa bubo ubuso endandibubona ngasemlanjeni we‐Kebare, izibonakalo zabo nabo bona: zaya ezinye ngezinye ngokuti ngqo." 
Ezekiel11:1 Waza umoya wandifunqula, wandizisa esangweni lasempumalanga lendlu kayehova, elibeka ngasekupumeni kwelanga: kekaloku nanga eselucangweni lwesango amadoda angamashumi mabini anamahlanu; endabona pakati kwawo u‐Yazaniya unyana ka‐Hazure, no‐Pelatiya unyana ka‐Benaya, inkosi zabantu." 
Ezekiel11:2 Wayesiti kum: Nyana woluntu! ngawo la amadoda aqingayo ubumenemene, nacebayo icebo elikohlakeleyo kwesisixeko;" 
Ezekiel11:3 ati: Akukufupi, ukwakiwa kwezindlu; sona siyimbiza, nati siyinyama." 
Ezekiel11:4 Ngako oko profitesha ngakuwo, profitesha, nyana woluntu!" 
Ezekiel11:5 Waza umoya kayehova wawa pezu kwam, wati kum: Yiti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Kungokunjalo nitshilo, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! ngokuba izinto ezivukileyo emoyeni wenu ndizazi mna zonke." 
Ezekiel11:6 Nibandisile ababuleweyo benu kwesisixeko, nezitarate zaso nizizalisile ngababuleweyo." 
Ezekiel11:7 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ababuleweyo benu, enibabekileyo pakati kwaso, bona bayinyama, naso sona siyimbiza; kodwa nina ndonipumisa pakati kwaso." 
Ezekiel11:8 Iṙele niloyikile, neṙele ndiya kulizisa pezu kwenu, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ndandiya kunipumisa pakati kwaso, ndininikele esandleni sabasemzini, ndenze imigwebo pakati kwenu." 
Ezekiel11:10 Niya kuwa ngeṙele: pezu kwomda wakwa‐Sirayeli ndiya kunigweba; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova. 
Ezekiel11:11 Sona asiyi kuba yimbiza kuni, nani aniyi kuba yinyama pakati kwaso; kwa semdeni wakwa‐Sirayeli ndiya kunigweba." 
Ezekiel11:12 Naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, eningahambanga ngemimiso yam, nezigwebo zam ningazenzanga, koko nenzile ngezigwebo zabaheyideni abaningqongayo." 
Ezekiel11:13 Kwaza kwati, nxa ndibe ndiprofitesha, wabuba u‐Pelatiya unyana ka‐Benaya. Ndaza ndawa ngobuso bam, ndakala ngelizwi elikulu, ndati: Au, Nkosi Yehova! uya kukwenza na ukugqityelwa kwesisalela so‐Sirayeli?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Laza ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel11:15 Nyana woluntu! abazalwana bako, abazalwana bako, amadoda okwalamana kwako, nayo yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli ipela, ngabo abemi base‐Yerusaleme bate kubo: Yibani kude kuyehova; linikiwe kuti elilizwe libe lilifa." 
Ezekiel11:16 Yiti ke ngoko: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Nakuba ndibafudusele kude pakati kwabaheyideni, nakuba kanjalo ndibate sa pakati kwamazwe, ndoba yindawo eyingcwele kubo ngomzuzwana noko emazweni apo bafikile kona." 
Ezekiel11:17 Yiti ke ngoko: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ndonibuta kwa sezizweni, ndonihlanganisa kwa semazweni enitiwe sa kuwo, ndandiya kuninika ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel11:18 Babeya kuza kona, basuse zonke izinto zalo ezitiyekileyo, nazo zonke izinto zalo ezibuntshontsho, kwa kulo." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ndandiya kubanika intliziyo inye, nomoya omtsha ndowubeka pakati kwenu; ndandiya kususa intliziyo yelitye enyameni yabo, ndibanike intliziyo yenyama;" 
Ezekiel11:20 ukuze bahambe emimisweni yam, nezigwebo zam bazigcine, bazenze nokuzenza: bandule babe ngabantu kum, ndibe ngutixo kubo mna." 
Ezekiel11:21 Kodwa abantliziyo iya emva kwentliziyo yezinto zabo ezitiyekileyo nezinto zabo ezibuntshontsho, indlela yabo ndoyibuyekeza pezu kwentloko yabo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel11:22 Zandula ikerubime zapakamisa amapiko azo, nevili kunye nazo; nobungcwalisa botixo wo‐Sirayeli bebupezu kwazo ngapezulu." 
Ezekiel11:23 Baza ubungcwalisa bukayehova benyuka pakati kwesixeko, baya bema pezu kwentaba engecala lasempumalanga lesixeko." 
Ezekiel11:24 Wabuya umoya wandifunqula, wandizisa e‐Kaledine, kubatinjwa, ngesibonakaliso somoya katixo: sada senyuka kum isibonakalo endandisibonile." 
Ezekiel11:25 Ndaza ndateta kubatinjwa zonke izinto zikayehova, abendibonisile zona." 
Ezekiel12:1 KANJAKO ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel12:2 Nyana woluntu! uyahlala pakati kwayo indlu enenkani; abanamehlo okubona, kanti ababoni; abanendlebe zokuva, kanti abeva; ngokuba beyindlu enenkani bona." 
Ezekiel12:3 Ngako wena, nyana woluntu! zenzele impahla zokufuduka, uze ufuduke ngemini pambi kwamehlo abo; wauya kufuduka endaweni yako uye kwenye indawo pambi kwamehlo abo; kungati baya kugqala, nakuba beyindlu enenkani." 
Ezekiel12:4 Wauya kuku̔pa impahla zako njengempahla zokufuduka ngemini pambi kwamehlo abo; nawe uya kupuma ngokuhlwa pambi kwamehlo abo njengokupuma kwabafudukayo. 
Ezekiel12:5 Pambi kwamehlo abo zimbele eludongeni, upume nazo ngalo." 
Ezekiel12:6 Pambi kwamehlo abo zityate egxalabeni, upume nazo kwakuti ṙatya; ubuso bako wobugubungela, ukuba ungaboni umhlaba: ngokuba ndikwenzile umqondiso kuyo indlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel12:7 Ndenje njalo ke, njengokuba bendiyalelwe: impahla zam ndaziku̔pa njengempahla zokufuduka ngemini, nangokuhlwa ndazimbela eludongeni ngesandla sam; nxa kute ṙatya ndapuma nazo; pezu kwegxalaba ndazityata pambi kwamehlo abo." 
Ezekiel12:8 Laye lisiza ilizwi likayehova kum kwakusa, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel12:9 Nyana woluntu! indlu ka‐Sirayeli, indlu enenkani, abatshongo na kuwe besiti: Wenza nto nina wena?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Yiti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Lomgwebo ungayo inkosi e‐Yerusaleme, nayo yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli epakati kwabo." 
Ezekiel12:11 Yiti: Ndingumqondiso mna kuni; njengokuba ndenje njalo, kuya kwenziwa njalo kubo; ngokufuduswa na ngokutinjwa baya kumka." 
Ezekiel12:12 Nenkosi epakati kwabo yona iya kutyata egxalabeni nxa kute ṙatya, ipume ke; baya kumba eludongeni, ukuba kupunyiswe ngalo; ubuso bayo yobugubungela, ukuze ingawuboni umhlaba ngamehlo." 
Ezekiel12:13 Notambo lwam ndolwaneka pezu kwayo, ize ibanjiswe emgibeni wam; ndandiya kuyizisa e‐Babilone, elizweni lama‐Kaledine; kodwa yona ayiyi kuyibona, noko iya kufela kona." 
Ezekiel12:14 Nabo bonke abayingqongayo incedwe, nawo onke amabandla ayo, ndobacitela kuyo yonke imimoya; neṙele ndolir̔olela emva kwabo." 
Ezekiel12:15 Babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, nxa ndibati sa pakati kwezizwe, na nxa ndibacita pakati kwamazwe." 
Ezekiel12:16 Koko ndiya kusalisa kubo intwana encinane yabantu eṙeleni, nas endlaleni, nasesifeni esibubisayo; ukuze bashumayele zonke izinto zabo ezibuntshontsho pakati kwabaheyideni apo bafika kona; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel12:17 Kanjako ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel12:18 Nyana woluntu! sitye isonka sako ngokututumela, namanzi ako uwasele ngokungcangcazela nangesitukutezi." 
Ezekiel12:19 Uze uti kubo abantu belizwe: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ngabo abemi base‐Yerusaleme, na ngalo ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Isonka sabo baya kusitya ngesitukutezi, namanzi abo bowasela ngokuti nqa, ukuze ilizwe layo lihlutwe ukuzala kwalo, ngenxa yobudlwengu babo bonke abahleli kulo." 
Ezekiel12:20 Izixeko ezimiwayo ziya kwenzwa amanxuwa, nelizwe loba bugxwayiba; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel12:21 Labuya leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel12:22 Nyana woluntu! uyinto nina lomzekeliso e ninawo elizweni lakwa‐Sirayeli, usiti: Imihla iyolulwa, nayo yonke imiboniso iti tshabalala?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Ngako oko yiti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ndiya kupelisa lomzekeliso, bade bangabuyi bazekelise ngawo kwa‐Sirayeli. Kodwa teta kubo, uti: Imihla ikufupi, nendawo yayo yonke imiboniso." 
Ezekiel12:24 Ngokuba kungasayi kuba seko namnye umboniso ongendawo, nokulaula okubutelezi, pakati kwendlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel12:25 Ngokuba mna Yehova ndiya kuteta elozwi endiya kuteta lona, laliya kufezwa; alisayi kulityaziswa; ngokuba kwa semihleni yenu, ndlu enenkani! ndiya kuliteta ilizwi, ndilifeze, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel12:26 Lalekela ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel12:27 Nyana woluntu! bona ke, indlu ka‐Sirayeli iti: Umboniso awubonayo ngowemihla emininzi; uyaprofitesha ngawo amaxesha akude." 
Ezekiel12:28 Ngako oko uti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Akusayi kulityaziswa amazwi am nalinye; elozwi ndilitetayo, liya kufezwa ke, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel13:1 LAYE ilizwi likayehova lisiza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel13:2 Nyana woluntu! profitesha ngakubo abaprofite bakwa‐Sirayeli abaprofiteshayo, uti kubo abaprofiteshayo okuvela kwezabo intliziyo: Yivani ilizwi likayehova:" 
Ezekiel13:3 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Kwoba nzima kubo abaprofite abanyabileyo, abalandela owabo umoya, abangabonanga nto!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Abaprofite bako, Sirayeli! banjengempungutye ezisezindaweni ezicitakeleyo." 
Ezekiel13:5 Aninyukelanga eziṙotyeni, aniyibiyanga ngodonga indlu ka‐Sirayeli kanjalo, kuze kumiwe ekulweni ngomhla kayehova." 
Ezekiel13:6 Babonile okungendawo nokulaula okubuxoki, abati: Utsho uyehova; nakuba uyehova angabatumanga: batembisile abanye noko ukuba kuqiniswe ilizwi." 
Ezekiel13:7 Anibonanga na umboniso ongendawo, nokulaula okubuxoki anikutetanga na? Noko niti: Utsho uyehova; nakuba ndingatetanga." 
Ezekiel13:8 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba nitetile okungendawo, nokuba nibonile okubuxoki, ngako oko, bona ke, ndingakuni, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel13:9 Saye isandla sam siya kuba pezu kwabaprofite ababonayo okungendawo, nabalaulayo ubuxoki; esihlelweni sabantu bam abayi kubako, nasesiba̔lelweni sendlu ka‐Sirayeli abayi kuba̔lwa; naselizweni lakwa‐Sirayeli abayi kungena; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi yinkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel13:10 Ngokuba, ewe ngokokuba belahlekisile abantu bam, besiti: Luxolo; nxa kungeko uxolo; ati omnye ake udonga, bati, bona ke, abanye baluqabe ngekalike:" 
Ezekiel13:11 yiti kubo abaqabayo ngekalike, ukuba luya kuwa: kuya kubako isipango esikukulayo; nani, zico̔to ezikulu! niya kuwa; nomoya woqwitela wo lu candekisa." 
Ezekiel13:12 Bona ke, lwakuwa udonga olo, akuyi kutiwa kuni na: Lipina iqabo eniqabileyo ngalo?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ewe ndo lu candekisa ngomoya woqwitela ngobuṙalaṙume bam, kwakuya kubako isipango esikukulayo ngengqumbo yam, nezico̔to ezikulu ngobuṙalaṙume bam, zi lu gqibele." 
Ezekiel13:14 Ndandiya kucita udonga eniluqabileyo ngekalike, ndiluwisele emhlabeni, ude utyileke umsekelo walo; lona luya kuwa, nani niya kugqityelwa pakati kwalo; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel13:15 Kwa njalo ndiya kugqiba umsindo wam pezu kwodonga, napezu kwabo abaluqabileyo ngekalike; ndandiya kuti kuni: Udonga olo aluseko, nabo baluqabileyo abaseko;" 
Ezekiel13:16 kwa abaprofite bakwa‐Sirayeli, abaprofiteshayo ngayo i‐Yerusaleme, abayibonela umboniso woxolo, nxa kungeko uxolo; itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel13:17 Kanjalo wena, nyana woluntu! beka ubuso bako ngakuzo intombi zabantu bako, eziprofiteshayo okuvela kwezazo intliziyo, uprofiteshe ngakuzo," 
Ezekiel13:18 uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Makube nzima kubafazi abatungela imiqamelo ngakuwo amakwapa onke, bazenze izigqubutelo pezu kwentloko zobude bonke, kuze kuzingelwe imipefumlo! Niya kuzingela imipefumlo yabantu bam na, neyenu imipefumlo niyilondoloze ebomini nje?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Nam niya kundidyoba na pakati kwabantu bam, ngamaqobana eṙalasi nangamaqezu esonka, ukuba kufiswe imipefumlo enga ingafi, nokuba kulondolozwe ebomini imipefumlo enga ingadli ubomi, ngokuxoka kwenu ebantwini bam abevayo ubuxoki?" 
Ezekiel13:20 Ngako oko intsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuyo imiqamelo yenu, enizingela imipefumlo ngayo kona njengentaka; ndandiya kuyiṙazula ezingalweni zenu, ndiyindulule imipefumlo, leyo imipefumlo niyizingelayo njengentaka." 
Ezekiel13:21 Ndiya kuṙazula izigqubutelo zenu nazo, ndihlangule abantu bam esandleni senu, bade bangabi sabiko esandleni senu ukuzingelwa; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel13:22 Ngokokuba nikedamisile intliziyo yolungileyo ngobuxoki, endingayikedamisanga mna, nokuba nizomelezile izandla zokohlakeleyo, ukuze angabuyi endleleni yake ekohlakeleyo, ukuba kulondolozwe ubomi bake;" 
Ezekiel13:23 ngako oko anisayi kubona okungendawo, nokulaula aniyi kubuya nikwenze; ngokuba ndiya kuhlangula abantu bam esandleni senu; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel14:1 KWANDULA kweza kum amadoda akubo abadala bo‐Sirayeli, ahlala pantsi ebusweni bam." 
Ezekiel14:2 Laza ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel14:3 Nyana woluntu! lamadoda apakamisile izitixwana zawo ezintliziyweni zawo, nesiku̔bekiselo senkohlakalo yawo asibekile pambi kwobuso bawo: ngendiba ndika ndibuzelwe ngawo na?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Ngako oko teta nawo, uti kuwo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Onke amadoda akwindlu ka‐Sirayeli azipakamisayo izitixwana zawo ezintliziyweni zawo, asibeke isiku̔bekiselo senkohlakalo yawo pambi kwobuso bawo, eze kuye umprofite; mna Yehova ndiya kupendula lowo uzayo, ngokuba zininzi kwezitixwana zake;" 
Ezekiel14:5 ukuze ndibambe indlu ka‐Sirayeli ngeyabo intliziyo, ngokokuba bona bonke bahlukene nam ngezitixwana zabo." 
Ezekiel14:6 Ngako oko yiti kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Guqukani, niziguqule kuzo izitixwana zenu; nakuzo zonke izinto zenu ezibuntshontsho buguquleni ubuso benu." 
Ezekiel14:7 Ngokuba owakuyo indlu ka‐Sirayeli, nowakuye owasemzini opambukele kwa‐Sirayeli, osukuba azahlule kum, azipakamise izitixwana zake entliziyweni yake, asibeke isiku̔bekiselo senkohlakalo yake pambi kwobuso bake, eze kumprofite ukuzibuzela yena ngam; mna Yehova ndiya kumpendula ngokwam:" 
Ezekiel14:8 ndandiya kumisa ubuso bam ugakuyo indoda leyo, ndiyenze umqondiso nomzekeliso, ndiyinqamle kwa pakati kwabantu bam; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel14:9 Nomprofite, nxa acengwayo, andule atete into, mna Yehova ndimcengile umprofite lowo, ndandiya kusolula isandla sam pezu kwake, ndimtshabalalise pakati kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel14:10 Netyala labo baya kulitwala; njengetyala lobuzayo loba njalo ityala lomprofite; 
Ezekiel14:11 ukuze indlu ka‐Sirayeli ingabuyi ilahleke kum, nokuze ingabuyi inco̔liswe ngazo zonke izigqito zabo; baze babe ngabantu kum, nam ndibe ngutixo kubo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel14:12 Leza ilizwi likayehova kum kanjalo, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel14:13 Nyana woluntu! ilizwe nxa lonayo ngakum ngokwenza ngobumenemene kakulu, ndandule ndisolule isandla sam pezu kwalo, ndilapulele umsimelelo wesonka, nditume pakati kwalo indlala, ndinqamle kulo abantu nezilo;" 
Ezekiel14:14 nakuba abeko lamadoda matatu, u‐Nowa, n o‐Danyeli, no‐Jobi, pakati kwalo, bona ngobulungisa babo bebeya kuhlangula imipefumlo yabo yodwa, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel14:14 nakuba abeko lamadoda matatu, u‐Nowa, n o‐Danyeli, no‐Jobi, pakati kwalo, bona ngobulungisa babo bebeya kuhlangula imipefumlo yabo yodwa, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ukuba ndiyenza amaṙamncwa acande elizweni, alihlute abantwana, lize libe bugxwayiba, kude kungabiko mntu odlulayo ngenxa yamaṙamncwa;" 
Ezekiel14:16 nakuba lamadoda matatu abepakati kwalo, ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ebengayi kuhlangula nonyana nentombi; wona odwa aya kuhlangulwa, kanti ilizwe loba bugxwayiba." 
Ezekiel14:17 Umhlaumbi ukuba ndiyazisa iṙele pezu kwelizwe elo, nditi: Ṙele! canda elizweni; ndize ndinqamle kulo abantu nezilo;" 
Ezekiel14:18 nakuba lamadoda matatu abepakati kwalo, ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ebengayi kuhlangula onyana nentombi, koko ebeya kuhlangulwa wona odwa." 
Ezekiel14:19 Umhlaumbi ukuba ndiyatuma isifo esibubisayo pakati kwelizwe elo, nditulule ubuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwalo ngegazi, kuze kunqanyulwe kulo abantu nezilo;" 
Ezekiel14:20 nakuba u‐Nowa, n o‐Danyeli, no‐Jobi, bebepakati kwalo, ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, bebengayi kuhlangula nonyana nentombi; bona ngobulungisa babo bebeya kuhlangula eyabo imipefumlo yodwa." 
Ezekiel14:20 nakuba u‐Nowa, n o‐Danyeli, no‐Jobi, bebepakati kwalo, ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, bebengayi kuhlangula nonyana nentombi; bona ngobulungisa babo bebeya kuhlangula eyabo imipefumlo yodwa." 
Ezekiel14:21 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti; Kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi ke nxa nditumayo imigwebo yam emibi yomine, iṙele, nendlala, namaṙamncwa, nesifo esibubisayo, pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme, kuze kunqanyulwe kuyo abantu nezilo?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Noko, bona ke, kuya kusaliswa kuyo abasindileyo, abaya kupunyiswa, onyana nentombi: bona ke, baya kupumela kuni, naniya kubona indlela yabo nezenzo zabo; naniya kututuzelwa ngalo ilishwa endilizisileyo pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme, ngako konke endikuzisileyo pezu kwayo." 
Ezekiel14:23 Baya kunitutuzela, nxa nibona indlela yabo nezenzo zabo; naniya kukwazi ukuba andenzanga konke endikwenzile kuyo kungeko tuba, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel15:1 LAYE ilizwi likayehova lisiza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel15:2 Nyana woluntu! uyinto nina umti weveyine ngapezu kwemiti yonke, n esebe lawo ngapezu kwapakati kwemiti yehlati?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Kwotatyatwa kuwo na umti wokwenza isetyenzwa? umhlaumbi baya kutabata kuwo ibaxa na, ukuba kuxo̔nywe pezu kwalo enye impahla?" 
Ezekiel15:4 Bona ke, unikwa emlilweni ube zinkuni; incam zawo zombini umlilo uyazitshisa, nompakati wawo uṙaukile; ulungele isetyenzwa na?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Bona ke, wakuba upela, awenzelwa isetyenzwa; kancinane kangakananina ngakumbi ke, nxa umlilo uwutshisile, na nxa uṙaukile, ungayi kuba usenzelwa isetyenzwa?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Ngako oko, itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Njengomti weveyine pakati kwemiti yehlati, endiwunikileyo emlilweni ube zinkuni, kwa njalo ndibanikile abemi base‐Yerusaleme." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ndandiya kumisa ubuso bam ngakubo; baya kupuma k omnye umlilo, wandule omnye umlilo ubadle; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, ndakubeka ubuso bam ngakubo." 
Ezekiel15:8 Nelizwe ndiya kulenza bugxwayiba, ngenxa yokuba benzile ngobumenemene kakulu, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel16:1 LALEKELA ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel16:2 Nyana woluntu! yazisa i‐Yerusaleme izinto zayo ezibuntshontsho," 
Ezekiel16:3 uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova kuyo i‐Yerusaleme ukuti: Ukuvela kwako nokuzalwa kwako bekukulo ilizwe laba‐Kanane; uyihlo ebengum‐Amori, nonyoko ebengum‐Hetekazi." 
Ezekiel16:4 Nokuzalwa kwako, emhleni ubuzalwa ngawo, ubunganqanyulwa inkaba, ubungahlanjwa ngamanzi ukuba kucocwe; ubungake umvumvuzelwe ngetyuwa, ubungake usongelwe eziqoqweni kanjako." 
Ezekiel16:5 Bekungeko iliso elinosizi pezu kwako, ukuba likwenzele enye kwezi zinto, ukuba libe nenceba ngakuwe; koko ubulahlelwa endle ngokudelwa kwobomi bako, emhleni ubuzalwa ngawo." 
Ezekiel16:6 Ndaza ndadlula ngakuwe, ndakubona ugqusha egazini lako; ndaye ndisiti kuwe usegazini lako: Pila; ewe, ndati kuwe usegazini lako: Pila." 
Ezekiel16:7 Ndakwenza amawakawaka njengokuhluma kwezindle; wada wanda, waba mkulu, wangena ekuhonjweni kakulu; amabele ako abonxa, nenwele zako zakula; kanti ubuzé, ubuhlubulukile." 
Ezekiel16:8 Ndati ndakudlula ngakuwe, ndakukangela; kekaloku bona ke, ixesha lako belilixesha lotando; ndaza ndandlala isondo lengubo yam pezu kwako, ndabugubungela ubuzé bako, ndakufungela, ndangena elucebanweni nawe, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, waza waba ngowam." 
Ezekiel16:9 Ndaza ndakuhlamba ngamanzi, ndahlanza igazi lako kuwe, ndakutambisa ngeoli." 
Ezekiel16:10 Ndakuvatisa ngencawe etungiweyo ngamabala ngamabala, ndakunika izihlangu zezintsu zamacelesi, ndakubopela ngeqiya eshiceneyo, ndakugubungela ngesilike." 
Ezekiel16:11 Ndakuhomba ngezihombo, ndafaka izacolo pezu kwezandla zako, nesambalo entanyeni yako." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ndafaka umsesane empumlweni yako, namacici ezindlebeni zako, nesitsaba esihle entlokweni yako." 
Ezekiel16:13 Kwa njalo ubuhonjwa ngegolide nangesilivere; nokuvata kwako bekuyiqiya eshiceneyo, nesilike, nencawe etungiweyo ngamabala ngamabala; wabusidla umgubo ocolekileyo, nobusi, neoli; wabunobunzwakazi obukulu kunene, wahambiseka wada waba bubukumkani." 
Ezekiel16:14 Laye udumo lwako lupuma pakati kwezizwe ngenxa yobunzwakazi bako; ngokuba bube bufezekile ngenkazimlo yam, endandiyibekile pezu kwako, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel16:15 Kodwa ubutembela kubo ubunzwakazi bako, wenza umbulo ngenxa yodumo lwako; ewe watulula imibulo yako pezu kwosukuba edlula; bube bubobake." 
Ezekiel16:16 Waza watabata ezingutyeni zako, wazenzela indawo ezipakamileyo ezinamabala ngamabala, wenza umbulo pezu kwazo: bekungezanga okunjalo, akuyi kubako kanjako." 
Ezekiel16:17 Wabutabata impahla zako ezintle, ezegolide yam nezesilivere yam, ezo ndazinikayo kuwe, wazenzela imifanekiso yamadoda, wenza umbulo nayo." 
Ezekiel16:18 Watabata nengubo zako ezitungiweyo ngamabala ngamabala, wayigubungela; neoli yam nesiqu̔miso sam wazibeka pambi kwayo." 
Ezekiel16:19 Nokutya kwam endakunikayo kuwe, umgubo ecolekileyo, neoli, nobusi, endakudlisayo, kwa kona ukubekile pambi kwayo kube livumba elimnandi: kwaye kunjalo ke, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel16:20 Kanjako watabata onyana bako nentombi zako, obundizalele bona, wababingela kuyo ukudliwa. Yinto encinane na imibulo yako," 
Ezekiel16:21 ukuba ubabulele abantwana bam, nokuba ubanikele, ngokubadlulisa emlilweni pambi kwayo?" 
Ezekiel16:22 Nakunye nazo zonke izenzo zako ezibuntshontsho nemibulo yako, akukumbulanga imihla yobutsha bako, ngexesha lobuzé bako nokuhlubuluka kwako, wakugqusha egazini lako." 
Ezekiel16:23 Kwaza kwati, emva kwako konke ukukohlakala kwako, (ubunzima, ubunzima bube kuwe! itsho inkosi e nguyehova,)" 
Ezekiel16:24 wabuzakela indlwana yombulo, wazenzela indawo epakamileyo kuzo zonke izitarate." 
Ezekiel16:25 Kuwo onke amancam endlela uyakile indawo yako epakamileyo, wabenza ubunzwakazi bako buzondwe; nenyawo zako uzivulele bonke abadlulayo, nemibulo yako uyandisile." 
Ezekiel16:26 Kanjalo uwenzile umbulo nama‐Jipete abamelwane bako, angabakulu ngenyama: nemibulo yako uyandisile, ukuba undiqumbise." 
Ezekiel16:27 Ngako, bona ke, ndisolule isandla sam pezu kwako, ndipungule isabelwa sako, ndikunikele entandweni yabo bakutiyayo, intombi zama‐Filistiya, ezidanileyo ngenxa yendlela yako ebutshinitshini." 
Ezekiel16:28 Wenze umbulo nama‐Asiriya nawo, ngenxa yokuba ubungenakuncanyiswa; ewe, wenzile umbulo nawo, kanti ubungancanyiswa noko." 
Ezekiel16:29 Uwandisile umbulo wako nasezweni le‐Kanane kwada kwase‐Kaledine; kodwa ubungancanyiswa nakoku. 
Ezekiel16:30 Injanina ukuba butataka intliziyo yako, itsho inkosi e nguyehova; ekubeni uzenza zonke ezi zinto, ukwenza kwomṙexezikazi osileyo;" 
Ezekiel16:31 ekubeni uyaka indlwana yombulo yako encameni yendlela zonke, nendawo yako epakamileyo uyenza kuzo zonke izitarate; ungabanga njengompinyiswa, ngokugxeka umvuzo!" 
Ezekiel16:32 Ubungumfazi oṙexezayo, o wamkela abasemzini nxa apantsi kwendoda yake." 
Ezekiel16:33 Kubo bonke abapinyiswa kupiwa amabaso; kodwa wena uyawapa amabaso ako kubo bonke abatandi bako; uyabasela bona, ukuba beze kuwe bevela emacaleni onke ngenxa yemibulo yako." 
Ezekiel16:34 Kanjako kuko kuwe okupambene nabafazi, ekubeni uwenza umbulo, nxa kungalandelwa ukwenza umbulo, nasekubeni uwunika umvuzo, nxa umvuzo unganikwa kuwe; kwa njalo ke unokupambana." 
Ezekiel16:35 Ngako oko, mpinyiswa! yiva ilizwi likayehova." 
Ezekiel16:36 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngokokuba kutululwe intsila yako, nokuba kutyiliwe ubuzé bako, ngemibulo yako kunye nabatandi bako, nakunye nazo zonke izitixwana zezinto zako ezibuntshontsho, nangegazi labantwana bako, obubanika kuzo;" 
Ezekiel16:37 ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kuhlanganisa bonke abatandi bako, obumnandi kubo, kwa bonke abo ubatandileyo, kunye nabo bonke ubatiyileyo; ndobahlanganisa ke ngakuwe ngento engqongayo, ndibatyilele ubuzé bako, bade babone bonke ubuzé bako." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ndandiya kukugweba ngokugwetywa kwabaṙexezikazi nabapalaza igazi; ewe, ndokunika igazi lobuṙalaṙume nobukwele." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ndandiya kukunikela esandleni sabo, babeya kucita indlwana yombulo yako, bawise pantsi indawo zako ezipakamileyo; bokuhluba izivato zako, basuse impahla zako ezintle, bakushiye uzé uhlubulukile." 
Ezekiel16:40 Babeya kunyusa ngakuwe umhlambi, bakugibisele ngamatye, bakuhlahle ngamaṙele abo." 
Ezekiel16:41 Baya kutshisa izindlu zako ngomlilo, benze imigwebo pezu kwako pambi kwamehlo abafazi abaninzi: ndandiya kukwenza uyeke ukuba ngumpinyiswa; kanjalo nomvuzo akuyi kubuya uwunike." 
Ezekiel16:42 Kwa njalo ubuṙalaṙume bam ngakuwe ndiya kubupumza, buti ubukwele bam bumke kuwe; ndoba nditi tu, ndingabuyi ndiqumbe." 
Ezekiel16:43 Ngenxa yokuba ungakumbulanga imihla yobutsha bako, koko undicapukisile ngazo zonke ezi zinto, ngako nam, bona ke, ndiya kubuyekeza indlela yako pezu kwentloko yako, itsho inkosi e nguyehova; waungayi kukwenza okuhlazekileyo ngapezu kwazo zonke izinto zako ezibuntshontsho." 
Ezekiel16:44 Bona ke, bonke abazekelisayo baya kuzekelisa pezu kwako, ngokuti: Njengokuba enjalo unina, injalo intombi yake." 
Ezekiel16:45 Uyintombi yonyoko wena, obedela indoda yake nabantwana bake; kanjalo ungudade wodade bako wena, abadela amadoda abo nabantwana babo; unyoko ebengum‐Hetekazi, noyihlo ebengum‐Amori." 
Ezekiel16:46 Udade wako omkulu yi‐Samariya, yona nentombi zayo, ehlala ngasekohlo kwako: nodade wako omncinane kuwe, ohlala ngasekunene kwako, yi‐Sodome nentombi zayo." 
Ezekiel16:47 Kodwa ngendlela zazo akuhambanga, nanjengezinto zazo ezibuntshontsho akwenzanga; oko bekuyinto encinane kodwa; waza wonakaliswa ngapezu kwazo kuzo zonke indlela zako." 
Ezekiel16:48 Ndihleli nje, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, i‐Sodome udade wako ayenzanga, yona nentombi zayo, njengokuba wenzile wena nentombi zako." 
Ezekiel16:49 Bona ke, bubo obu ubono be‐Sodome udade wako: ir̔atshi, ukudikwa sisonka, nokwonwaba okunqabileyo bekuko kuyo nakuzo intombi zayo; isandla samahlwempu nabasweleyo ayasomeleza." 
Ezekiel16:50 Zaye ziqanqalaza, zenza into ebuntshontsho pambi kwam; ndaza ndazisusa njengoko ndabonayo." 
Ezekiel16:51 Nayo i‐Samariya isiqingata sezono zako ayisenzanga; koko uzandisile izinto zako ezibuntshontsho ngapezu kwabo, waugwebele odade bako ngazo zonke izinto zako ezibuntshontsho ozenzileyo." 
Ezekiel16:52 Nawe, litwale ihlazo lako, ogwebileyo odade bako ngazo izono zako, ozenzileyo ngendawo ebuntshontsho ngapezu kwabo; bakugqitisile ngokulunga: ewe yiba udanile nawe, ulitwale ihlazo lako, ekubeni ubagwebele odade bako." 
Ezekiel16:53 Ndandiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwazo, ukutinjwa kwe‐Sodome nentombi zayo, nokutinjwa kwe‐Samariya nentombi zayo, nokutinjwa kwabatinjwa bako pakati kwazo;" 
Ezekiel16:54 ukuze ulitwale ihlazo lako, udaniswe ngenxa yako konke ukwenzileyo, ekuzitutuzeleni kwako." 
Ezekiel16:55 Baye odade bako, i‐Sodome nentombi zayo, beya kubuyela kokwapambili ukumila kwabo, nayo i‐Samariya nentombi zayo ziya kubuyela kokwapambili ukumila kwazo, nawe nentombi zako niya kubuyela kokwapambili ukumila kwenu." 
Ezekiel16:56 Nangona i‐Sodome, udade wako, ibingavakali emlonyeni wako, ngomhla wer̔atshi lako;" 
Ezekiel16:57 ingekatyilwanga inkohlakalo yako, njengasexesheni lokugxeka kwentombi zase‐Siriya, nazo zonke eziyingqongayo, intombi zama‐Filistiya, ezikucekisayo ngokungqonga." 
Ezekiel16:58 Ubutshinitshini bako, nezinto zako ezibuntshontsho, uzitwele, utsho uyehova." 
Ezekiel16:59 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Sendiya kwenza ngakuwe, njengokuba wenje njalo wena, osidelileyo isifungo, ngokwapula ucebano." 
Ezekiel16:60 Noko, ndiya kukumbula ucebano lwam nawe emihleni yobutsha bako, ndikuqinisele ucebano olungunapakade." 
Ezekiel16:61 Wauya kukumbula indlela zako, udaniswe, nxa uya kwamkela odade bako, abakulu bako nabancinane bako; ndandiya kubanika kuwe babe zintombi zako, — kungengalo ucebano lwako kodwa." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ngokuba ndiya kumisa ucebano lwam nawe, wauya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova:" 
Ezekiel16:63 ukuze ukumbule, udane, ungabi sabuya uvule umlomo wako ngenxa yehlazo lako, ndakuxolela konke ukwenzileyo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel17:1 LAZA ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel17:2 Nyana woluntu! ku̔pa isintsonkotelo, utete umzekeliso kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli," 
Ezekiel17:3 uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ukozi olukulu, olumapiko makulu, oluntsiba zinde, oluboya buzele, olunamabala ngamabala, lweza e‐Lebanone, lwatabata isebe lapezulu lesedare." 
Ezekiel17:4 Incam yezihlumelo zayo lwayiqaula, lwaza lwayizisa elizweni lokuqweba; esixekweni sabatengi lwayibeka." 
Ezekiel17:5 Lwatabata kanjalo kwimbewu yelizwe, lwayityala entsimini efaneleyo; lwayitabata ngasemanzini amaninzi, lwayibeka njeng omnculuba." 
Ezekiel17:6 Yaza yahluma, yaba ngumti weveyine otwabulukayo, obude buncinane, omasebe abeka ngakulo, nongcambo zapantsi kwalo: yaba ngumti weveyine ke, yavelisa amagatya, yanabisa intswazi." 
Ezekiel17:7 Lwaye luko nolunye ukozi olukulu, lunamapiko amakulu, lunoboya obuninzi: kekaloku bona ke, lomti weveyine watobela ingcambo zawo ngakulo, namasebe awo wawanabisela kulo, ukuba luwunyele ezindimeni zesityalwa sawo." 
Ezekiel17:8 Emhlabeni olungileyo, ngasemanzini amaninzi, watyalwa wona, ukuba uvelise amasebe, nokuba uhlanze iziqa̔mo, ukuze ube ngumti weveyine omkulu." 
Ezekiel17:9 Yiti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Uya kulunga na? Ingcambo zawo aluyi kuzinyotula na, neziqa̔mo zawo aluyi kuzimqumla, ukuba ubune ke? Onke amagqabi okuhluma kwawo aya kubuna, nakubeni kungeko amandla amakulu, nabantu abaninzi, ukuba udonyulwe ngencambo zawo." 
Ezekiel17:10 Kanjalo, bona ke, utyelwe nje, uya kulunga na? awuyi kugqibela kubuna na, nxa umoya wasempumalanga uwubetayo? ezindimeni zokuhluma kwawo uya kubuna." 
Ezekiel17:11 Lalekela ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel17:12 Yiti ke kwindlu enenkani: Anizazi na ezi zinto ukuba zinina? Yiti: Bona ke, ukumkani we‐Babilone weza e‐Yerusaleme, watabata ukumkani wayo, nenkosana zayo, wabazisa naye e‐Babilone." 
Ezekiel17:13 Watabata kanjalo owenzalo yokumkani, walwenza ucebano naye, wamngenisa esifungweni; nabakulu belizwe ubasusile;" 
Ezekiel17:14 ukuba ubukumkani bube sekutotyweni, bungazipakamisi, ukuba bugcine ucebano lwake, bume kulo." 
Ezekiel17:15 Kodwa wavukela ngakuye, ngokutuma izigidimi zake ukuya e‐Jipete, ukuba bamnike amahashe nabantu abaninzi. Uya kutamsanqeleka na? uya kusinda na okwenzayo oku? kanene uya kwapula ucebano, asinde na?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Ndihleli nje, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ngenyaniso endaweni yokumkani lowo obemenza yena ukumkani, osifungo wasidelayo, nocebano walwapulayo, kwa kuye pakati kwe‐Babilone uya kububa!" 
Ezekiel17:17 Kanjako u‐Faro, ngamandla amakulu nangemihlambi emininzi, akayi kumenzelela emfazweni, nxa kuposelwa indulana, nanxa kwakiwa inqaba zokulinda, ukunqamla imipefumlo emininzi." 
Ezekiel17:18 Ngokuba ebesidela isifungo ngokwapula ucebano, nakuba, bona ke, wanika isandla sake, nazo zonke ezi zinto wazenza, akayi kusinda." 
Ezekiel17:19 Ngako oko, itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ndihleli nje mna, ngenyaniso isifungo sam asidelileyo, nocebano lwam alwapulileyo, ndiya kubuyekeza oko pezu kwentloko yake!" 
Ezekiel17:20 Notambo lwam ndolwaneka pezu kwake, aze abanjiswe emgibeni wam; ndandiya kumzisa e‐Babilone, ndimbuze kona ubumenemene bake abenzileyo ngakum." 
Ezekiel17:21 Nabo bonke abasabileyo bake, kunye nawo onke amabandla ake, baya kuwa ngeṙele; nabo baseleyo bopangalaliselwa kuyo yonke imimoya; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna Yehova nditetile." 
Ezekiel17:22 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Nam ndiya kutabata kwisebe lapezulu lesedare ende, ndibeke; kwa sencameni yezihlumelo zayo ndiya kuqaula eso sitambileyo, ndisityale pezu kwentaba ende epakamileyo." 
Ezekiel17:23 Pezu kwentaba ende yakwa‐Sirayeli ndosityala; esiya kuvelisa amasebe, sihlanze iziqa̔mo, sibe yisedare enkulu; zaziya kuhlala ngapantsi kwaso zonke intaka zamapiko onke; emtunzini wamagatya aso ziya kuhlala." 
Ezekiel17:24 Yandule ikwazi yonke imiti yezindle, okokuba mna Yehova ndiwutobisile umti omde, ndiwupakamisile umti ototyiweyo, ndiwomisile umti oluhlaza, nomti owomileyo ndiwucu̔misile: mna Yehova nditetile, ndandiya kwenza." 
Ezekiel18:1 LABUYA ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel18:2 Niti nina, ukuba nizekelisa pezu kwelizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli ngalomzekeliso wokuti: Oyise bazityile idreyive ezimuncu, nabantwana amazinyo abo atelezisiwe?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, anisayi kuba nisazekelisa ngalomzekeliso kwa‐Sirayeli!" 
Ezekiel18:4 Bona ke, yonke imipefumlo yeyam: njengompefumlo woyise, kwa njalo umpefumlo wonyana ungowam; umpefumlo owonayo wona uya kufa." 
Ezekiel18:5 Ngako umntu nxa alungile, esenza okufanelekileyo nokulungileyo;" 
Ezekiel18:6 o ngadlanga pezu kwentaba, namehlo ake akawapakamiselanga kwizitixwana zendlu ka‐Sirayeli, nomfazi wommelwane wake akamnco̔lisanga, nenkazana esesifeni sayo akasondelanga kuyo;" 
Ezekiel18:7 ongabandezelanga mntu, isibanjiselwa sake setyala usibuyisile, impango akayipanganga, isonka sake usinikile kolambileyo, nohamba zé umambesile ngengubo;" 
Ezekiel18:8 o ngabolekanga ngenxa yenzuzo enkulu, nokwanda okuninzi akakutabatanga, isandla sake usinqandile ebumenemeneni, ubugwebo obuyinyaniso ubenzile pakati kwomnye nomnye;" 
Ezekiel18:9 o hambile emimisweni yam, nezigwebo zam uzigcinile, ukwenza ngenene: ulungile yena, uya kubudla ubomi ngenyaniso, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel18:10 Ukuba uzele unyana, olinyangaza, opalaza igazi, owenza okufana nenye kwezi zinto," 
Ezekiel18:11 nazo zonke eziya akazenzi, koko adlile pezu kwentaba, nomfazi wommelwane wake umnco̔lisile," 
Ezekiel18:12 ihlwempu nosweleyo ubabandezele, impango uyipangile, isibanjiselwa akasibuyisanga, namehlo ake uwapakamisele kwizitixwana, into ebuntshontsho uyenzile," 
Ezekiel18:13 ubolekile ngenxa yenzuzo enkulu, nokwanda okuninzi uwutabatile; uya kudla ubomi ke na? akayi kudla ubomi: zonke ezizinto ezibuntshontsho uzenzile; uya kufa ngenyaniso; igazi lake loba pezu kwake." 
Ezekiel18:14 Ukuba, bona ke, uzele unyana, ozibonayo zonke izono zoyise, ezo azenzileyo; oti akubona, angenzi njengazo;" 
Ezekiel18:15 o ngadlanga pezu kwentaba, namehlo ake akawapakamiselanga kwizitixwana zendlu ka‐Sirayeli, nomfazi wommelwane wake akamnco̔lisanga;" 
Ezekiel18:16 ongabandezelanga mntu, isibambiso akasamkelanga, impango akayipanganga, isonka sake usinikile kolambileyo, nohamba zé umambesile ngengubo;" 
Ezekiel18:17 o buyisile isandla sake kolihlwempu, inzuzo enkulu nokwanda okuninzi akakutabatanga, izigwebo zam uzenzile, na semimisweni yam uhambile; lowo akayi kufa ngenxa yenkohlakalo yoyise; uya kudla ubomi ngenyaniso." 
Ezekiel18:18 Uyise, ngokokuba wabandezela ngobukali, wapanga umzalwana wake ngobudlwengu, nokungalungileyo wakwenza pakati kwabantu bake, yena, bona ke, uya kufa ngenkohlakalo yake." 
Ezekiel18:19 Noko niti: Yinina? unyana akatwali ityala loyise na? Nxa unyana enzile okufanelekileyo nokulungileyo, yonke imimiso yam uyigcinile, wayenza nokuyenza, uya kudla ubomi ngenyaniso." 
Ezekiel18:20 Umpefumlo owonayo wona uya kufa: unyana akayi kutwala ityala loyise, kanjalo uyise akayi kutwala ityala lonyana; ukulunga kwolungileyo kwoba pezu kwake, nokukohlakala kwokohlakeleyo kwoba pezu kwake." 
Ezekiel18:21 Kodwa okohlakeleyo nxa aguqukayo kuzo zonke izono zake azenzileyo, ayigcine yonke imimiso yam, akwenze okufanelekileyo nokulungileyo, uya kudla ubomi ngenyaniso, akayi kufa." 
Ezekiel18:22 Zonke izigqito zake azenzileyo, aziyi kumkunjulelwa: ngokulunga kwake akwenzileyo uya kudla ubomi." 
Ezekiel18:23 Ndika nditande na ukufa kwokohlakeleyo? itsho inkosi e nguyehova; andi tandi na ukuba aguquke endleleni yake, adle ubomi?" 
Ezekiel18:24 Kodwa olungileyo akuguquka ekulungeni kwake, enze ubumenemene, esenza ngazo zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho azenzayo okohlakeleyo, woka adle ubomi na? Konke ukulunga kwake akwenzileyo akuyi kukunjulwa; ngesigqito sake agqitileyo ngaso, nangesono sake onileyo ngaso, kwa ngazo uya kufa." 
Ezekiel18:25 Noko niti: Indlela yenkosi ayilungelelene. Yivani ke, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! indlela yam asi yiyo elungeleleneyo na? indlela zenu asi zizo ezingalungeleleneyo na?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Olungileyo akuguquka ekulungeni kwake, enze ubumenemene, ade afele kona; ngobumenemene bake abenzileyo uya kufa." 
Ezekiel18:27 Nokohlakeleyo akuguquka ekukohlakaleni kwake akwenzileyo, enze okufanelekileyo nokulungileyo, yena uya kulondoloza umpefumlo wake ebomini." 
Ezekiel18:28 Ukuba uya kugqala, aguquke kuzo zonke izigqito zake azenzileyo, uya kudla ubomi ngenyaniso, akayi kufa." 
Ezekiel18:29 Noko, iti indlu ka‐Sirayeli: Indlela yenkosi ayilungelelene. Indlela zam asi zizo ezilungeleleneyo na, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli? indlela zenu asi zizo ezingalungeleleneyo na?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Ngako oko ndiya kunigweba, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! abanye ngabanye njengendlela zabo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova. Guqukani, niziguqule kuzo zonke izigqito zenu, ize inkohlakalo ingabi sisiku̔bekiso kuni." 
Ezekiel18:31 Lahlani kuni zonke izigqito zenu, enigqitileyo ngazo; nize nizenzele intliziyo entsha nomoya omtsha: ngokuba kunganina ukuba niya kufa, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Ngokuba ndingakutandi ukufa kwalowo ufayo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova: ngako ziguquleni, nibudle ubomi." 
Ezekiel19:1 KANJAKO wena hlabelela inkosana zakwa‐Sirayeli isililo," 
Ezekiel19:2 uti: Ebeyinto nina unyoko? Ebeyingonyamakazi; pakati kwengonyama yalala pantsi, pakati kwengonyamana yawondla amatole ayo." 
Ezekiel19:3 Yada yakulisa elinye kwamatole ayo; laba yingonyamana, lafunda ukubamba into yokuqwengwa; abantu labadla." 
Ezekiel19:4 Zaza izizwe zeva ngalo; esihogweni sazo labanjiswa; zaza zalizisa ngemixokelelwane elizweni le‐Jipete. 
Ezekiel19:5 Yati yakubona ukuba ibilindile, nokuba itemba layo libubile, yandula yatabata elinye kwamatole ayo, yalenza ingonyamana." 
Ezekiel19:6 Laza lahambahamba pakati kwengonyama; laba yingonyamana; lafunda ukubamba into yokuqwengwa; abantu labadla. 
Ezekiel19:7 Labazi abahlolokazi babo, nezixeko zabo lazenza amanxuwa; laba bugxwayiba ilizwe, nokuzala kwalo, ngentlokoma yokukonya kwalo." 
Ezekiel19:8 Zandula izizwe zazibeka ngakulo ngokungqonga zivela emazwaneni, zalwaneka utambo lwazo pezu kwalo; esihogweni sazo labanjiswa." 
Ezekiel19:9 Zaza zalifaka esivalelweni ngemixokelelwane, zalizisa kukumkani we‐Babilone; zalizisa emanqabeni, ukuze ilizwi lalo lingabuyi liviwe pezu kwentaba zakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel19:10 Unyoko wako ebenjengomti weveyine ekupumleni kwako, utyelwe ngasemanzini; ube uqa̔mile, wabuzele ngamasebe, ngenxa yamanzi amaninzi." 
Ezekiel19:11 Wabunazo intswazi ezinamandla zibe zintonga zabapata ubukosi; babude ubupakamo bawo pezulu pakati kwamagatya abungqingqwa; wabonakala ebudeni bawo, ebuninzini bamasebe awo." 
Ezekiel19:12 Kodwa wadonyulwa ngobuṙalaṙume, watiwa kahla emhlabeni, nomoya wasempumalanga washwenyisa iziqa̔mo zawo; zaye zapukile intswazi zawo ezinamandla, zabuna; umlilo wazidla." 
Ezekiel19:13 Nakaloku utyelwe entlango, ezweni elomileyo elinxaniweyo." 
Ezekiel19:14 Sekupumile umlilo eluswazini lwamasebe awo; iziqa̔mo zawo uzidlile; akuseko kuwo uswazi olunamandla, intonga yokuba kupatwe ubukosi. Sisililo esi, soba yinto yesililo kanjalo." 
Ezekiel20:1 KWAYE kute ngomnyaka wesixe̔nxe, ngeyesihlanu inyanga, ngoweshumi umhla wenyanga, kweza amadoda akubo abadala bo‐Sirayeli ukubuza kuyehova, ahlala pantsi ebusweni bam." 
Ezekiel20:2 Laza ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel20:3 Nyana woluntu! teta nabo abadala bo‐Sirayeli, uti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Nize ukubuza kum na? Ndihleli nje mna, andiyi kubuzelwa nini! itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel20:4 Akuyi kubagweba na, akuyi kugweba na, nyana woluntu? Bazise izinto ezibuntshontsho zoyise babo;" 
Ezekiel20:5 uti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Emhleni ndamnyulayo u‐Sirayeli, nesandla sam ndasipakamisela kwinzalo yendlu ka‐Yakobi, nxa ndazazisa kubo elizweni le‐Jipete, nesandla sam ndasipakamisela kubo, ndisiti: Mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu;" 
Ezekiel20:6 kwa semhleni lowo ndabapakamisela isandla sam, ukuba ndiya kubapumisa ezweni le‐Jipete baye ezweni endibe ndibahlolele, elela ubisi nobusi, elibubuhle bamazwe onke;" 
Ezekiel20:7 ndaza ndati kubo: Abanye ngabanye izinto ezizondekileyo zamehlo abo zilahleni, nangezitixwana zase‐Jipete ningazinco̔lisi: mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wenu." 
Ezekiel20:8 Kodwa bavukela ngakum, bengavumanga ukundipulapula; abazilahla abanye ngabanye izinto ezizondekileyo zamehlo abo, nezitixwana zase‐Jipete abazishiya. Ndandula ndati: Ndiya kutulula ubuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwabo, nengqumbo yam ndoyigqiba kubo pakati kwelizwe le‐Jipete." 
Ezekiel20:9 Koko ndenzayo ngenxa yegama lam, ukuba lingadyojwa emehlweni abaheyideni, ababepakati kwabo, endazazisayo kubo pambi kwamehlo abo, ngokubapumisa elizweni le‐Jipete." 
Ezekiel20:10 Ndaza ndabapumisa elizweni le‐Jipete, ndabazisa entlango." 
Ezekiel20:11 Ndabanika izimiselo zam, nezigwebo zam ndazazisa kubo, eziti ukuba umntu uyazenza, uya kubudla ubomi ngazo." 
Ezekiel20:12 Kanjalo nesabata zam ndazinika kubo, ukuba zibe ngumqondiso pakati kwam nabo, ukuze bakwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova obangcwalisayo." 
Ezekiel20:13 Kodwa indlu ka‐Sirayeli yavukela ngakum entlango; abahamba ngezimiselo zam, nezigwebo zam bazidela, eziti ukuba umntu uyazenza, uya kubudla ubomi ngazo; nesabata zam bazinco̔lisa kakulu; ndandula ndati: Ndiya kutulula ubuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwabo entlango, ndize ndibagqibe." 
Ezekiel20:14 Koko ndenzayo ngenxa yegama lam, ukuba lingadyojwa emehlweni abaheyideni, endabapumisayo pambi kwamehlo abo." 
Ezekiel20:15 Nakanjako ndabapakamisela isandla sam entlango, ukuba andiyi kubazisa elizweni endandilinikile kubo, elela ubisi nobusi, elibubuhle bamazwe onke;" 
Ezekiel20:16 ngenxa yokuba bebedela izigwebo zam, nezimiselo zam abahamba ngazo, nesabata zam bazinco̔lisa: ngokuba intliziyo yabo yahamba emva kwezitixwana zabo." 
Ezekiel20:17 Noko, iliso lam belinosizi pezu kwabo, ukuba ndingabatshabalalisi; kanjako bendingabenzeli ukugqitywa entlango." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ndaye ndisiti kubantwana babo entlango: Ningahambi ngezimiselo zoyihlo benu, nezigwebo zabo ningazigcini, nangezitixwana zabo ningazinco̔lisi." 
Ezekiel20:19 Mna Yehova ndi ngutixo wenu; hambani ngezimiselo zam, nigcine izigwebo zam, nizenze:" 
Ezekiel20:20 nesabata zam nizenze ngcwele, zize zibe ngumqondiso pakati kwam nani, ukuba nikwazi okokuba mna Yehova ndi ngutixo wenu." 
Ezekiel20:21 Kodwa abantwana babo bavukela ngakum: abahamba ngezimiselo zam, nezigwebo zam abazigcina ukuba bazenze, eziti ukuba umntu uyazenza, uya kubudla ubomi ngazo; bazinco̔lisa isabata zam; ndandula ndati: Ndiya kutulula ubuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwabo, ukuze ndigqibe ingqumbo yam kubo entlango." 
Ezekiel20:22 Koko ndabuyisa isandla sam, ndenza ngenxa yegama lam, ukuba lingadyojwa emehlweni abaheyideni, endabapumisayo pambi kwamehlo abo." 
Ezekiel20:23 Kanjalo ndabapakamisela isandla sam entlango, ukuba ndobati sa pakati kwabaheyideni, nokuba ndobacita pakati kwamazwe;" 
Ezekiel20:24 ngenxa yokuba bebengenzanga izigwebo zam, koko bebedelile izimiselo zam, nesabata zam bebezinco̔lisile, namehlo abo wona ebelandele izitixwana zoyise babo." 
Ezekiel20:25 Ngako nam ndabanika izimiselo ezingalungileyo, nezigwebo abangayi kubudla ubomi ngazo;" 
Ezekiel20:26 ndabanco̔lisa ngezipo zabo, ekudluliseni emlilweni konke kuzityulwa ngako, ukuze ndibenze zé, bade bakwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel20:27 Ngako oko teta kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli, nyana woluntu! uti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Kanjako ngoku bandigxekile oyihlo benu, ngokwenza ngobumenemene ngakum kakulu." 
Ezekiel20:28 Ngokuba ndabazisa elizweni, endibe ndipakamisile isandla sam, ukuba ndiya kubapa lona; baza babona zonke induli ezinde, nayo yonke imiti ebungqingqwa, babingelela kona imibingo yabo, banikela nakona ingcapukiso yomnikelo wabo, babeka nakona ivumba elimnandi labo, batulula nakona iminikelo yokusela yabo." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ndandula ndati kubo: Iyinina indawo epakamileyo apo niya kona? Laye igama layo libizwa ngokuti yi‐Bama kwada kwanamhla nje. 
Ezekiel20:30 Ngako oko yiti kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Nizinco̔lisile na ngesiko loyihlo benu? Nenza umbulo na ngokulandela izinto zabo ezizondekileyo? 
Ezekiel20:31 Ngokuba ekunikeleni izipo zenu, ekudluliseni abantwana benu emlilweni, nizinco̔lisile ngazo zonke izitixwana zenu kwada kwanamhla: sendiya kubuzelwa nini na, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli? Ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, andiyi kubuzelwa nini!" 
Ezekiel20:32 Kanjalo oko okuvukileyo emoyeni wenu akuyi kuka kubeko, oko ukuba niti: Siya kuba njengabaheyideni, njengezizalwane zamazwe, ukukonza imiti namatye." 
Ezekiel20:33 Ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ngenyaniso, ngesandla esomeleleyo, nangengalo eyolulweyo, nangobuṙalaṙume obutululweyo, ndiya kupata ubukosi pezu kwenu!" 
Ezekiel20:34 Ndandiya kunipumisa ezizweni, ndinibute emazweni enitiwe sa kuwo, ngesandla esomeleleyo, nangengalo eyolulweyo, nangobuṙalaṙume obutululweyo." 
Ezekiel20:35 Ndandiya kunizisa entlango yezizwe, ndipike nani kona, ubuso ngakubo ubuso." 
Ezekiel20:36 Njengokuba bendipika noyihlo benu entlango yelizwe le‐Jipete, ndiya kupika njalo nani, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ndandiya kunidlulisa ngapantsi kwentonga, ndiningenise kuyo imbopelelo yocebano." 
Ezekiel20:38 Nabangevayo ndobahlula kuni, kwa nabo bagqita ngakum: ndobapumisa elizweni lokupambukela kwabo, baye bengayi kungena emhlabeni wakwa‐Sirayeli: naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel20:39 Nani, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Hambani, nikonze abanye ngabanye izitixwana zabo, nasemva kwoku kanjako, ukuba aniyi kupulapula kum; kodwa igama lam ningabuyi nilidyobe ngezipo zenu, nangezitixwana zenu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Ngokuba entabeni yam engcwele, entabeni ende yakwa‐Sirayeli, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, kwa kona yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli, bonke abayo elizweni, baya kundikonza; kwa kona ndiya kubabuka, nakona ndiya kubiza iminikelo yenu, nesandulelo sezitabataba zenu, kunye nazo zonke izinto zenu ezingcwele." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ngevumba elimnandi lenu ndonibuka, ndakunipumisa ezizweni, ndinibute emazweni enitiwe sa kuwo; ndandiya kungcwaliswa pakati kwenu pambi kwamehlo abaheyideni." 
Ezekiel20:42 Naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, ndakuningenisa emhlabeni wakwa‐Sirayeli, elizweni endapakamisa isandla sam, ukuba ndiya kunika lona koyihlo benu." 
Ezekiel20:43 Nakona niya kukumbula indlela zenu, nazo zonke izenzo zenu, eninco̔lisiwe ngazo; naniya kuzidela ngokwenu ngenxa yazo zonke izikohlakalo zenu enizenzileyo." 
Ezekiel20:44 Naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, ndakuba ndinenzele ngenxa yegama lam, kungenjengendlela zenu ezikohlakeleyo, nanjengezenzo zenu ezonakeleyo, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel20:45 KANJAKO ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel20:46 Nyana woluntu! beka ubuso bako ngasendleleni yasesuyide, uku̔pe ilizwi ngasesuyide, uprofiteshe ngasehlatini lezindle zasesuyide;" 
Ezekiel20:47 uti kulo ihlati lasesuyide: Yiva ilizwi likayehova: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kupemba umlilo kuwe, oya kudla kuwe yonke imiti eluhlaza, nayo yonke imiti eyomileyo; ilangatye elidangazelayo aliyi kucinywa, babuya kuṙaulwa ngalo bonke ubuso kwa sesuyide kude kube senode." 
Ezekiel20:48 Lwaye uluntu lwonke luya kubona ukuba mna Yehova ndilipembile: aliyi kucinywa. 
Ezekiel20:49 Ndaza ndati: Au, Nkosi Yehova! bati ngam: Akateti ngemizekeliso na yena?" 
Ezekiel21:1 Landula ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel21:2 Nyana woluntu! beka ubuso bako ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, uku̔pe ilizwi ngakuzo indawo ezingcwele, uprofiteshe ngakulo ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli;" 
Ezekiel21:3 uti kulo ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuwe, ndandiya kur̔ola iṙele lam esinxobeni salo, ndinqamle kuwe olungileyo nokohlakeleyo." 
Ezekiel21:4 Ngokokuba ndiya kunqamla kuwe olungileyo nokohlakeleyo, ngako oko iṙele lam liya kupuma esinxobeni salo ngakulo lwonke uluntu kwa sesuyide kude kube senode:" 
Ezekiel21:5 luze uluntu lwonke lwazi ukuba mna Yehova ndilir̔olile iṙele lam esinxobeni salo; elingayi kubuya kanjako. 
Ezekiel21:6 Nawe, nyana woluntu! gula; ngokwapuka kwesinqe nangobuṙaṙa uya kugula pambi kwamehlo abo." 
Ezekiel21:7 Kwakuya kuti, nxa bati kuwe: Uyagulela nina? wandule uti: Ngenxa yendaba; ngokuba isiza; zaziya kunyibilika zonke intliziyo, zipolelwe zonke izandla, icubuke yonke imipefumlo, ahambe njeng amanzi onke amadolo: bona ke, iyeza, yaiya kwenzwa, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel21:8 Lalekela ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel21:9 Nyana woluntu! profitesha, uti: Utsho uyehova ukuti: Yiti: Iṙele, iṙele liloliwe, ligudisiwe kanjalo." 
Ezekiel21:10 Liloliwe, ukuze lisenze isibulalo; ligudisiwe, ukuze libe nokubengezela: ngesigcoba na? liyintonga yonyana wam, elidela imiti yonke." 
Ezekiel21:11 Linikiwe ukugudiswa, ukuba lipatwe ngesandla; liṙele eliloliweyo, eligudisiweyo, ukuba linikwe esandleni sombulali." 
Ezekiel21:12 Kala ulile, nyana woluntu! ngokuba lona liya kuba pezu kwabantu bam, loba pezu kwazo zonke inkosana zakwa‐Sirayeli; zilahlelwe eṙeleni kunye nabantu bam; ngako oko tywakaza etangeni." 
Ezekiel21:13 Ngokuba kusenzwa ukulinga; kwoti nina ke ukuba liyadela intonga nayo? ayiyi kubako, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel21:14 Ngako wena, nyana woluntu! profitesha, ubete isandla ngakuso isandla; malipindwe iṙele ngokwesitatu, iṙele labahlatyiweyo; liṙele lokuhlatywa okukulu elibavingcelayo." 
Ezekiel21:15 Ukuze icubuke intliziyo, nokuba kwandiswe iziwiso, ndimisile ukuvivinywa kweṙele ngakuwo onke amasango abo: au! lenziwe ukuti benge, lir̔oliwe ukubulala." 
Ezekiel21:16 Zibute ngasekunene, zibeke ngasekohlo, apo busukuba bumiselwa kona ubuso bako." 
Ezekiel21:17 Kwa nam ndiya kubeta izandla zam esinye ngakuso esinye, nobuṙalaṙume bam ndobupumza: mna Yehova nditetile." 
Ezekiel21:18 Labuya leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel21:19 Kanjalo wena, nyana woluntu! zimisele indlela zibe mbini, ukuba kuze iṙele lokumkani we‐Babilone; ziya kupuma zombini elizweni linye; uze wenze isalato; entloko yendlela yesixeko usenze." 
Ezekiel21:20 Misela indlela, ukuba iṙele lize e‐Raba yosapo luka‐Hamoni, nako‐Juda e‐Yerusaleme enqatyisiweyo." 
Ezekiel21:21 Ngokuba ukumkani we‐Babilone eya kuma ekwahlukeni kwendlela, entloko yendlela zombini, ukwenza ukulaula; wohluguhla intolo, wobuza ngeterafi, wobenca isibindi." 
Ezekiel21:22 Kwesokunene isandla sake kwobako isilaulelo se‐Yerusaleme, ukubeka izicitelo, ukuvula umlomo ngokubulala, ukupakamisa ilizwi ngokumemeza, ukubeka izicitelo ngakuwo amasango, ukuposela indulana, ukwaka inqaba yokulinda." 
Ezekiel21:23 Sasiya kuba njengesilaulo esingendawo kubo emehlweni abo, abafungileyo ngezifungo kubo; kodwa uya kukumbula inkohlakalo, ukuba babanjwe." 
Ezekiel21:24 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba niyenze inkohlakalo yenu ikunjulwe, ngokutyilwa kwezigqito zenu, ukubonakalisa izono zenu kuzo zonke izenzo zenu; ngenxa yokukunjulwa kwenu, niya kubanjwa ngesandla." 
Ezekiel21:25 Nawe, ungengcwele, nkosi ekohlakeleyo yo‐Sirayeli! omini iya kuza ngexesha lenkohlakalo yesipelo;" 
Ezekiel21:26 itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Makususwe unkontsho, makutulwe nekrone; oku akuyi kuba koku; okutotyiweyo kuya kupakanyiswa, nokupakamileyo kuya kutotywa." 
Ezekiel21:27 Ukupenuka, ukupenuka, ukupenuka, ndiya kukwenza; nako oku akuyi kubako, ade afike lowo igunya lilelake, ndandiya kulinika kuye." 
Ezekiel21:28 Nawe, nyana woluntu! profitesha uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ngalo usapo luka‐Hamoni, nangaso isigxeko salo, utsho ke wena, ukuti: Iṙele, iṙele lir̔oliwe; ligudiselwe isibulalo, ligqibe, ukuze libengezele;" 
Ezekiel21:29 nxa bakubonela okungendawo, nxa bakulaulela ulwimi, ukuba bakubeke pezu kwentamo zabakohlakeleyo abahlatyiweyo, abamini ifikile, ngexesha lenkohlakalo yesipelo." 
Ezekiel21:30 Lobuyiselwa esinxobeni salo na? endaweni apo ubudalwa kona, elizweni lokuzalwa kwako, ndokugweba." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ndandiya kutulula pezu kwako ukuṙala kwam; ngomlilo womsindo wam ndiya kuvutela ngakuwe, ndikunikele esandleni samadoda abubovubovu, incibi zokutshabalalisa." 
Ezekiel21:32 Woba kukudla emlilweni; igazi lako loba pakati kwelizwe; akusayi kukunjulwa; ngokuba mna Yehova nditetile. 
Ezekiel22:1 LEZA kanjako ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel22:2 Nawe, nyana woluntu! uya kugweba na, uya kugweba isixeko samagazi na? ewe, uya kusazisa zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho zaso." 
Ezekiel22:3 Wauya kuti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Isixeko siyapalaza igazi pakati kwaso, ukuba lifike ixesha laso; sizenzele izitixwana, ukuba sinco̔lelwe." 
Ezekiel22:4 Ngegazi lako ulipalazileyo uzuzile ityala, nangezitixwana zako uzenzileyo unco̔lisiwe; kukona imihla yako uyisondezile, neminyaka yako uyitikele: ngako oko ndikwenzile isigxekwa kubaheyideni, nesigculelwa kuwo onke amazwe." 
Ezekiel22:5 Lawo akufupi, nalawo akude kuwe, okugculela, esiti: Wena unco̔lileyo ngegama, ozele yimpitimpiti!" 
Ezekiel22:6 Bona ke, inkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli, ezinye ngezinye njengamandla azo, zibe zikuwe, ukuze zipalaze igazi." 
Ezekiel22:7 Uyise nonina babatyeshele kuwe; owasemzini bambandezele pakati kwako; inkedama nomhlolokazi babapete kakubi kuwe. 
Ezekiel22:8 Izinto zam ezingcwele uzidelile, nesabata zam uzinco̔lisile." 
Ezekiel22:9 Abahlebi bebeko kuwe, ukuze bapalaze igazi; napezu kwentaba badlile kuwe; ubutshinitshini babenzile pakati kwako." 
Ezekiel22:10 Ubuzé boyise babutyilile kuwe; onco̔lileyo ngomzi bamtobisile kuwe. 
Ezekiel22:11 Omnye wenzile into ebuntshontsho nomfazi wommelwane wake; nomnye unco̔lisile umolokazana wake ngento ebutshinitshini; nomnye umtobisile udade wake, intombi yoyise, kuwe." 
Ezekiel22:12 Amabaso bawatabatile kuwe, ukuze bapalaze igazi; inzuzo enkulu nokwanda okukulu ukutabatile, nommelwane wako umpangile ngobandezelo; nam undilibele, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel22:13 Ngako, bona ke, ndibetile isandla sam, pezu kwokupanga kwako okwenzileyo, napezu kwegazi lako elipakati kwako." 
Ezekiel22:14 Intliziyo yako iya kunyamezela na, izandla zako ziya kwomelela na, emihleni endiya kwenza nawe ngayo? mna Yehova nditetile, ndiya kwenza kanjalo." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ndandiya kukuti sa pakati kwabaheyideni, ndikucite pakati kwamazwe, ndipelise ukunco̔la kwako kuwe." 
Ezekiel22:16 Woda unco̔lelwe ngokwako emehlweni abaheyideni; wauya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova. 
Ezekiel22:17 Laye ilizwi likayehova lisiza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel22:18 Nyana woluntu! indlu ka‐Sirayeli iba ligwebu kum; bonke abayo balubedu, netine, nesincete, nelode, pakati kwesidlangalala; bangamagwebu esilivere." 
Ezekiel22:19 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba niba ngamagwebu nina nonke, ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kunibutela pakati kwe‐Yerusaleme." 
Ezekiel22:20 Njengokuba isilivere, nobedu, nesincete, nelode, netine, zibutelwe pakati kwesidlangalala, ukuba kuvutelwe umlilo pezu kwazo, zinyibilike; kwa njalo ndiya kubuta ngengqumbo yam nangobuṙalaṙume bam, ndiyeke, ndinyibilikise nina:" 
Ezekiel22:21 ewe, ndonihlanganisa, ndivutele pezu kwenu emlilweni womsindo wam, naniya kunyibilikiswa pakati kwawo." 
Ezekiel22:22 Njengokuba isilivere inyibilikiswa pakati kwesidlangalala, kwa njalo niya kunyibilikiswa pakati kwawo; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna Yehova nditulule ubuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwenu." 
Ezekiel22:23 Labuya leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel22:24 Nyana woluntu! yiti kulo: Wena ulilizwe elingahlanjululwanga, nelinganiselwa mvula emhleni wokuṙala." 
Ezekiel22:25 Kuko ingcebiswano yabaprofite balo pakati kwalo, njengengonyama ekonyayo iqwenga okubanjiweyo; badlile imipefumlo; indyebo nezinto ezinqabileyo bazitabatile; abahlolokazi balo babandisile pakati kwalo." 
Ezekiel22:26 Abaperisite balo bapete umteto wam ngobudlwengu, nezinto zam ezingcwele bazinco̔lisile; abenzanga isahlulo pakati kwokungcwele nokungengcwele, abazisanga napakati kwokunco̔lileyo nokucocekileyo; namehlo abo bawafihlile kuzo isabata zam, ndaye ndinco̔lelwa pakati kwabo." 
Ezekiel22:27 Inkosana zalo pakati kwalo zinjengencu̔ka ziqwenga okubanjiweyo, ukupalaza igazi, ukububisa imipefumlo, ukuze bazuze inzuzo ekohlakeleyo." 
Ezekiel22:28 Abaprofite balo babaqabele ngekalike, bebona okungendawo, bebalaulela ulwimi, besiti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova: nxa uyehova angatetanga." 
Ezekiel22:29 Abantu belizwe benze ngokubandezela, balwenzile ulubo̔, bapete kakubi ihlwempu nosweleyo, nowasemzini bambandezele kungeko bugwebo." 
Ezekiel22:30 Ndaza ndafuna pakati kwabo indoda eya kulwaka udonga, ime esiṙotyeni pambi kwam ngenxa yelizwe, ukuba ndingalitshabalalisi; kodwa andifumananga nanye." 
Ezekiel22:31 Ngako nditulule ukuṙala kwam pezu kwabo; ngomlilo womsindo wam ndibagqibile; indlela yabo ndiyibuyekezile pezu kwentloko yabo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel23:1 LALEKELA ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel23:2 Nyana woluntu! bekuko abafazi ababini, intombi zonina emnye." 
Ezekiel23:3 Baye besenza umbulo e‐Jipete; ebutsheni babo bawenza umbulo: kwa lapo ancinezelwa amabele abo, nalapo kwacofwa imibele yobuntombi babo." 
Ezekiel23:4 Namagama abo, ngu‐Ahola omkulu, no‐Aholiba udade wake; baba ngabam, bazala onyana nentombi: namagama abo, i‐Samariya ngu‐Ahola, ne‐Yerusaleme ngu‐Aholiba." 
Ezekiel23:5 Waza u‐Ahola wenza umbulo, nxa apantsi kwam; wakanukela abatandi bake, ama‐Asiriya abamelwane bake;" 
Ezekiel23:6 bevatisiwe ngezuluṙa, inkosi nenkosana, bengamadodana anqwenelekayo bonke, abakweli bekwela emahasheni." 
Ezekiel23:7 Wayeku̔pa imibulo yake pezu kwabo, bonke bengonyana abadlulisileyo base‐Asiriya; nangabo bonke wabakanukelayo, ngazo zonke izitixwana zabo wazinco̔lisa." 
Ezekiel23:8 Nemibulo yake ivela kuma‐Jipete akayishiya; ngokuba ebutsheni bake ebelele naye, acofa imibele yobuntombi bake, agalela umbulo wawo pezu kwake." 
Ezekiel23:9 Ngako oko ndamnikela esandleni sabatandi bake, esandleni sonyana base‐Asiriya, abo wabakanukelayo." 
Ezekiel23:10 Aba batyila ubuzé bake; batabata onyana bake nentombi zake, naye yena bambulala ngeṙele; waza waba ligama pakati kwabafazi, nxa babeyenzile imigwebo pezu kwake." 
Ezekiel23:11 Wati udade wake u‐Aholiba, akubona oku, wonakalisa ukukanuka kwake ngapezu kwake, nemibulo yake ngapezu kwemibulo yodade wake." 
Ezekiel23:12 Wakanukela onyana base‐Asiriya, inkosi nenkosana, abamelwane bake, bevatisiwe ngento entle kunene, abakweli bekwela emahasheni, bengamadodana anqwenelekayo bonke." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ndaza ndabona ukuba unco̔lisiwe; bebenendlela inye bobabini. 
Ezekiel23:14 Ewe wayandisa imibulo yake; wati akubona amadoda eba̔liwe pezu kwodonga, imifanekiso yama‐Kaledine iba̔liwe ngeqabo elibomvu," 
Ezekiel23:15 ebinqiwe ngemibinqo ezinqeni zawo, enenkontsho ezilengalengayo pezu kwentloko zawo, eyimiduna ukubonakala kwawo onke, njengabo onyana base‐Babilone, abase‐Kaledine ilizwe lokuzalwa kwawo," 
Ezekiel23:16 wandula wawakanukela ngokubona kwamehlo ake, watuma izigidimi kuwo e‐Kaledine." 
Ezekiel23:17 Baye onyana base‐Babilone besiza kuye esililini sotando, bamnco̔lisa ngombulo wabo; wanco̔liswa ngabo, wada umpefumlo wake waqipukelana nabo." 
Ezekiel23:18 Wayityila imibulo yake, wabutyila nobuzé bake; wandula umpefumlo wam waqipukelana naye, njengokuba umpefumlo wam ubuqipukelene nodade wake." 
Ezekiel23:19 Koko wayandisa imibulo yake, ngokukumbula imihla yobutsha bake, okuya abesenza umbulo elizweni lama‐Jipete." 
Ezekiel23:20 Ngokuba ebekanukela izitandwa zawo, ezinyama i njenge nyama yamaqwaṙashe, nezigqita li njeng egqita lamahashe." 
Ezekiel23:21 Kwa njalo wabuya wakumbula ngobutshinitshini bobutsha bako, nxa abase‐Jipete bacofa imibele yako, ngenxa yamabele obutsha bako." 
Ezekiel23:22 Ngako oko, Aholiba! itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuvusa abatandi bako ngakuwe, abo umpefumlo wako uqipukelene nabo, ndandiya kubazisa pezu kwako ngokungqonga:" 
Ezekiel23:23 onyana base‐Babilone, nawo onke ama‐Kaledine, o‐Pekodi, no‐Shoha, no‐Koha, bonke onyana base‐Asiriya benabo; bengamadodana anqwenelekayo bonke, inkosi nenkosana, imiduna nabadumileyo, bekwele emahasheni bonke." 
Ezekiel23:24 Babeya kuza ngakuwe ngenqwelwana, na ngenqwelo, nangengqengqeleko, nangomhlambi wezizwe; ikaka, nekakana, nomnqwazi, bozimisa ngakuwe ngento engqongayo; ndiya kubeka ubugwebo ebusweni babo, babeya kukugweba ngemigwebo yabo." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ndiya kubeka ikwele lam ngakuwe, babeya kukupata ngobuṙalaṙume; impumlo zako nendlebe zako bozisusa; nabokupela bako baya kuwa ngeṙele; onyana bako nentombi zako bobatabata, nabokupela bako baya kudliwa ngomlilo." 
Ezekiel23:26 Kanjalo baya kukuhluba izivato zako, batabate izihombo zako ezintle." 
Ezekiel23:27 Ndandiya kupelisa ubutshinitshini bako kuwe, nombulo wako uvela elizweni lama‐Jipete; ude ungapakamisi amehlo ako ngakuwo, ne‐Jipete ungabuyi uyikumbule." 
Ezekiel23:28 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kukunikela esandleni sabo ubatiyayo, esandleni sabo umpefumlo wako nqipukelene nabo:" 
Ezekiel23:29 abaya kukupata ngotiyo, batabate yonke inzuzo yako, bakushiye uzé uhlubulukile; babuya kutyilwa ubuzé bemibulo yako, nobutshinitshini bako, nemibulo yako." 
Ezekiel23:30 Ndiya kuzenza ezi zinto kuwe, ngokuba uṙexezele emva kwabaheyideni, ngenxa yokuba unco̔lisiwe ngezitixwana zabo." 
Ezekiel23:31 Endleleni yodade wako uhambile; ngako ndiya kunikela indebe yake esandleni sako. 
Ezekiel23:32 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Uya kusela kwindebe yodade wako, eyenzulu nebanzi; woba yinto yokuhlekwa neyokugculelwa; iyabamba into eninzi." 
Ezekiel23:33 Uya kuzaliswa kukunxila nosizi; yindebe yentshabalalo nengcitakalo, indebe yodade wako i‐Samariya." 
Ezekiel23:34 Uya kusela kuyo uyifunxe, namacepe ayo uya kuwanqaba, namabele ako wowanyotula: ngokuba nditetile mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel23:35 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngokokuba ulibele mna, nokuba undilahlile emva kwomhlana wako, ngako nawe twala ubutshinitshini bako nemibulo yako." 
Ezekiel23:36 Wayesiti uyehova kum: Nyana woluntu! uya kugweba na u‐Ahola no‐Aholiba? Ewe, zixele kubo izinto zabo ezibuntshontsho." 
Ezekiel23:37 Ngokuba beṙexezile, kuko igazi ezandleni zabo, baṙexezile nezitixwana zabo, nabantwana babo, abo bandizalela bona, babadlulisele kuzo emlilweni babe kukudla." 
Ezekiel23:38 Kanjako oku bakwenzile kum: banco̔lisile indawo yam engcwele kwa ngalomini, nesabata zam bazidyobile." 
Ezekiel23:39 Ngokuba xeshekweni bebebabulalele izitixwana zabo abantwana babo bandula bangena endaweni yam engcwele kwa ngalomini ukuyidyoba; ewe, bona ke, benje njalo pakati kwendlu yam." 
Ezekiel23:40 Nakanjako, batumela amadoda avela kwa kude, ekwatunywa kuwo isigidimi; ewe, bona ke, eza; owabusiti ngenxa yawo, wazihlamba, waqaba amehlo ako, wazihomba ngezihombo," 
Ezekiel23:41 wahlala pezu kwomandlalo obungcwalisa, unetafile elungisiweyo pambi kwawo, owabubekile isiqu̔miso sam neoli yam pezu kwayo." 
Ezekiel23:42 Kwaye kuko naye intlokoma yesihlwele esingenakukatala; nakunye namadoda evela ebuninzini babantu kwaziswa ama‐Seba avela entlango; abefaka izacolo ezandleni zabo, nezitsaba ezihle pezu kwentloko zabo." 
Ezekiel23:43 Ndaza ndati ngalowo owalupeleyo yimiṙexezo: Oti ke na kaloku enze imibulo yake? naye na? 
Ezekiel23:44 Koko bekungenwa kuye, njengokuba kungenwa emfazini engumpinyiswa: enje njalo ukungena ku‐Ahola naku‐Aholiba, abafazi ababutshinitshini." 
Ezekiel23:45 Kodwa amadoda alungileyo wona aya kubagweba ngokugwetywa kwabaṙexezikazi, nangokugwetywa kwabo abapalaza igazi; ngokuba bengabaṙexezikazi bona, negazi lisezandleni zabo." 
Ezekiel23:46 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ndiya kunyusa ngakubo umhlambi, ndibanikele ukuzanyazanyiswa nokupangwa." 
Ezekiel23:47 Wauya kuti umhlambi ubagibisele ngamatye, ubasike ngamaṙele abo; onyana babo nentombi zabo bobabulala, nezindlu zabo baya kuzitshisa ngomlilo." 
Ezekiel23:48 Ndandiya kupelisa ubutshinitshini elizweni, ukuze bafundiswe bonke abafazi ukuba bangenzi njengobutshinitshini benu." 
Ezekiel23:49 Baya kububeka ubutshinitshini benu pezu kwenu, nezono zezitixwana zenu niya kuzitwala; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi yinkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel24:1 LEZA kanjako ilizwi likayehova kum, ngomnyaka wesitoba, ngenyanga yeshumi, ngoweshumi umhla wenyanga, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel24:2 Nyana woluntu! ziba̔lele igama lemini, lekwa yiyo imini le: ukumkani we‐Babilone waṙaula i‐Yerusaleme ngekwa yiyo imini le." 
Ezekiel24:3 Uze uyitetele indlu enenkani umzekeliso, uti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Beka imbiza, yibeke, ugalele amanzi kuyo kanjalo." 
Ezekiel24:4 Zibutele iziqendu zayo kuyo, zonke iziqendu ezilungileyo, itanga negxalaba; yizalise ngamatambo adlulisileyo." 
Ezekiel24:5 Tabata okudlulisileyo kwomhlambi; kanjalo makubeko imfumba yamatambo ngapantsi kwayo; kolisa ukuyibilisa; namatambo ayo pakati kwayo mabawapeke. 
Ezekiel24:6 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Kwoba nzima kuso isixeko esinegazi, kuyo imbiza umhlwa wayo ukuyo, nomhlwa wayo ungapumanga kuyo! ngeziqendu zayo ezinye ngezinye yiku̔pe; makungawi pezu kwayo isiqashiso." 
Ezekiel24:7 Ngokuba igazi laso lipakati kwaso; pezu kweliwa elitshileyo silibekile; asiligalelanga pezu kwomhlaba, ukuba siliselele ngotuli." 
Ezekiel24:8 Ukuze kuvuswe ubuṙalaṙume, ukuze kwenziwe impindezelo, ndilibekile igazi laso pezu kweliwa elitshileyo, ukuba lingaselelwa." 
Ezekiel24:9 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Kwoba nzima kuso isixeko segazi! Kanjako ndiya kulenza likulu igoqo. 
Ezekiel24:10 Fumbisa inkuni, pemba umlilo, vutisa inyama, yimanye ngezimnandi, namatambo makatshiswe." 
Ezekiel24:11 Yandula ukuyimisa pezu kwamalahle ayo izé, ukuba ifudumale ixina yayo, itshe nokutsha, nokuba kunyibilikiswe pakati kwayo ukunco̔la kwayo, kugqitywe umhlwa wayo." 
Ezekiel24:12 Izidinisile ngenkatazo, kodwa umhlwa wayo omninzi awupumanga kuyo; maube semlilweni umhlwa wayo!" 
Ezekiel24:13 Ekunco̔leni kwako kuko okuhlazekileyo: ngokokuba ndikuhlambulule, kanti akuhlambululekile, akuyi kubuya uhlanjululwe ekunco̔leni kwako, ndingekapumzanga ubuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwako." 
Ezekiel24:14 Mna Yehova nditetile oku, kwoza kubako, ndandiya kukwenza; andiyi kuyeka, andiyi kuba nanceba, andiyi kuba nalusizi; njengendlela zako, nanjengezenzo zako, baya kukugweba, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel24:15 Labuya leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel24:16 Nyana woluntu! bona ke, ndiya kususa kuwe inkanuko yamehlo ako ngesibeto; kodwa akuyi kusenza isijwili, akuyi kulila nokulila, kanjako inyembezi zako aziyi kupuma." 
Ezekiel24:17 Befunyeka ekutini cwaka, isililelo sabafileyo akuyi kusenza, unkontsho lwako lubope pezu kwako, nezihlangu zako zifake ezinyaweni zako; kanjalo ungagubungeli imbovu yako, nesonka sabantu ungasidli." 
Ezekiel24:18 Kekaloku ndateta ebantwini ngokusa; wafa umfazi wam ngokuhlwa; ndaza ndenza ngokusa njengokuba bendiyalelwe. 
Ezekiel24:19 Bandula abantu bati kum: Akuyi kusixelela na ziyinto nina kuti ezi zinto, ukuba wena wenje njalo?" 
Ezekiel24:20 Ndaza ndati kubo: Ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel24:21 Yiti kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kunco̔lisa indawo yam engcwele, ir̔atshi lamandla enu, inkanuko yamehlo enu, nenyamekelo yompefumlo wenu; boti onyana benu nentombi zenu enibashiyileyo bawe ngeṙele." 
Ezekiel24:22 Naniya kwenza njengokuba ndenzile mna; imbovu zenu aniyi kuzigubungela, nesonka sabantu aniyi kusidla." 
Ezekiel24:23 Inkontsho zenu zoba pezu kwentloko zenu, nezihlangu zenu ezinyaweni zenu; aniyi kusenza isijwili, aniyi kulila nokulila; koko niya kungcungcuteka ezikohlakalweni zenu, nigule omnye ngakuye omnye." 
Ezekiel24:24 Waeya kuti u‐Hezekile abe ngumqondiso kuni: njengako konke akwenzileyo, niya kwenza nina; nxa kuzayo oku, niya kwandula nazi okokuba mna ndi yinkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel24:25 Nawe, nyana woluntu! akuyi kuba njalo na, emhleni ndisusayo kubo inqaba yabo, uvuyo lwobungcwalisa babo, inkanuko yamehlo abo, nesilangazelelo semipefumlo yabo, onyana babo nentombi zabo?" 
Ezekiel24:26 Ngalomhla, lowo usindileyo woza kuwe, ukuba kuviswe indlebe." 
Ezekiel24:27 Ngalomhla, umlomo wako uya kuvulelwa lowo usindileyo, wauya kuteta, ungabi sesisidenge: wauya kuba ngumqondiso kubo; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel25:1 LEZA ilizwi likayehova kum kanjako, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel25:2 Nyana woluntu! beka ubuso bako ngakulo usapo luka‐Hamoni, uprofiteshe pezu kwalo." 
Ezekiel25:3 Uze uti kulo usapo luka‐Hamoni: Yivani ilizwi lenkosi likayehova: itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba ubusiti, Tshotsho! ngakuyo indawo yam engcwele, ngokuba inco̔lisekile; nangakulo ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli, ngokuba licitakele; nangakuyo indlu ka‐Juda, ngokuba beyile ekutinjweni;" 
Ezekiel25:4 ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kukunikela esandleni samadoda asempumalanga ube yimfuyo: ukuze ahlalise ilali zawo kuwe, enze kuwe nentlalo zawo: wona aya kudla isiqa̔mo sako, kanjalo wona aya kusela amasi ako." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ndandiya kuyenza i‐Raba ibe liṙiwa lenkamela, nosapo luka‐Hamoni lube yindawo yokubutuma kwegusha; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel25:6 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba uyenze intlombe ngezandla, nokuba ungqishile ngonyawo, nokuba uvuyile ngako konke ukucekisa kwako ngompefumlo, ngakulo ilizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli;" 
Ezekiel25:7 ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kwolula isandla sam pezu kwako, ndikunike ube lixoba ezintlangeni; ndandiya kukunqamla ezizweni, ndikububise kwa semazweni: ndokutshabalalisa; wauya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel25:8 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngokokuba u‐Mowabi no‐Sehire besiti: Bona ke, indlu ka‐Juda injengazo zonke intlanga;" 
Ezekiel25:9 ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kuvula icala lakwa‐Mowabi ezixekweni, ezixekweni zake ezis esipelweni sake, ezi bubuhle belizwe, i‐Bete‐yeshimote, i‐Balimehone, ne‐Kiriyatayime." 
Ezekiel25:10 Kuwo amadoda asempumalanga, ngapezu kwelizwe losapo luka‐Hamoni, sendiya kulinika libe yimfuyo; ukuze usapo luka‐Hamoni lungabi sa kunjulwa pakati kwentlanga." 
Ezekiel25:11 Nakwa‐Mowabi ndiya kuyenza imigwebo; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova. 
Ezekiel25:12 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokwenza kwo‐Edome ngokwenza impindezelo kwindlu ka‐Juda; nokuba bezuzile ityala elikulu, bezipindezele nje pezu kwabo;" 
Ezekiel25:13 ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ndiya kwolula isandla sam napezu kwe‐Edome, ndinqamle kuyo abantu nezilo; ndandiya kuyenza ibe bugxwayiba kwa se‐Temani kude kube nase‐Dedane; baya kuwa ngeṙele." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ndandiya kubeka impindezelo yam pezu kwe‐Edome, ngesandla sabantu bam o‐Sirayeli: abaya kwenza e‐Edome ngokwengqumbo yam, nangokwobuṙalaṙume bam: kwa njalo baya kuyazi impindezelo yam, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel25:15 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokwenza kwama‐Filistiya ngempindezelo; nokuba ezenzele impindezelo ngokucekisa kwompefumlo, ukutshabalalisa ngobutshaba bakudala;" 
Ezekiel25:16 ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kwolula isandla sam pezu kwama‐Filistiya, ndiwanqamle ama‐Keriti, nditshabalalise isisalela sabaselunxwemeni lwolwandle." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ndandiya kuzenza pezu kwabo impindezelo ezinkulu ngezohlwayo zobuṙalaṙume; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, ndakubeka impindezelo yam pezu kwabo." 
Ezekiel26:1 KWAYE kute ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel26:2 Nyana woluntu! ngokokuba i‐Tire ite pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme: He ke! yapukile ebi lisango lezizwe: ijikele kum; ndiya kuzaliswa, yona yenziwe bunxuwa;" 
Ezekiel26:3 ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuwe, Tire! ndandiya kunyusa ngakuwe intlanga ezininzi, njengokuba ulwandle lunyusa amaza alo." 
Ezekiel26:4 Zaziya kuzonakalisa indonga ze‐Tire, zicite nenqaba zayo; nam ndiya kutshayela utuli lwayo kwa kuyo, ndiyenze iliwa elitshileyo." 
Ezekiel26:5 Yoba yindawo yokwanekwa kweminata pakati kwolwandle; ngokuba mna nditetile, itsho inkosi e nguyehova; yoba lixoba ezintlangeni kanjalo." 
Ezekiel26:6 Nentombi zayo ezisemapandleni zona ziya kubulawa ngeṙele: babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova. 
Ezekiel26:7 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa pezu kwe‐Tire u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, evela enode, ukumkani wokumkani, kunye namahashe, nakunye nenqwelo, nakunye nabakweli bamahashe, nemihlambi, nabantu abaninzi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Intombi zako ezisemapandleni uya kuzibulala ngeṙele; waeya kumisa ngakuwe inqaba yokulinda, aposele ngakuwe indulana, apakamise ngakuwe ikaka." 
Ezekiel26:9 Impahla yake yokucita woyimisa ngasezindongeni zako, nenqaba zako uya kuziwisa pantsi ngamazembe ake." 
Ezekiel26:10 Ngenxa yengxokolo yamahashe ake utuli lwawo lwokugubungela; ngenxa yentlokoma yabakweli bamahashe, nengqengqeleko, nenqwelwana, ziya kungcangcazela indonga zako, akuba eya kungena emasangweni ako, njengokuba kungenwa esixekweni esigqojozelweyo." 
Ezekiel26:11 Ngempupu zamahashe ake uya kugqusha zonke izitarate zako; abantu bako uya kubabulala ngeṙele, nentsika zamandla ako ziya kuwa emhlabeni." 
Ezekiel26:12 Baya kupanga ubutyebi bako, nentengo yako boyitimba; baya kuwisa indonga zako, nezindlu zako ezinqwenelekileyo bozicita; babeya kubeka amatye ako, nemiti yako, notuli lwako, pakati kwamanzi." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ndandiya kupezisa intsholo yengoma zako; nentlokoma zehadi zako aziyi kubuya ziviwe. 
Ezekiel26:14 Ewe, ndiya kukwenza iliwa elitshileyo; woba yindawo yokwanekwa kweminata; akuyi kubuya wakiwe; ngokuba mna Yehova nditetile, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel26:15 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova kuyo i‐Tire ukuti: Iziqiti aziyi kungcangcazela na ngenxa yentlokoma yokuwa kwako, zakugula inxweleṙa, kwakwenziwa ukubulawa pakati kwako?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Ziya kwandula zonke inkosana zolwandle zihle eziteroneni zazo, zibeke nxamnye ingubo zazo zapezulu, nezivato zazo ezitungiweyo ngamabala ngamabala zizisuse; izitutumelo ziya kuzambata, pezu kwomhlaba ziya kuhlala pantsi, ziya kututumela amaxanyana onke, ziti nqa pezu kwako." 
Ezekiel26:17 Zaziya kukutabatela isililo, ziti kuwe: Hai ukubujiswa kwako, wena mhlalikazi welwandle, isixeko esidumisekileyo, esibe somelele pakati kwolwandle, sona nabemi baso, ababeka ukwoyikeka kwabo pezu kwabo bonke abemi baso!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Kaloku iziqiti ziya kututumela ngomhla wokuwa kwako; ewe, iziqiti ezipakati kwolwandle ziya kutuswa ngokupela kwako." 
Ezekiel26:19 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Nxa ndiya kukwenza isixeko esicitakeleyo, njengezixeko ezingamiwayo; nxa ndiya kunyusa pezu kwako inzulu, ati amanzi amaninzi akugubungele;" 
Ezekiel26:20 nxa ndiya kukuhlisa ndawonye nabo bahlela esihogweni, ukuya ebantwini bakudala, ndikuhlalise emazantsi omhlaba, ezindaweni ezicitakeleyo zakudala, ndawonye nabo bahlela esihogweni, ukuze ungamiwa; na nxa ndiya kumisa ubungcwalisa elizweni labahleliyo;" 
Ezekiel26:21 ndiya kukwenzela izituso, ude ungabiko: nakuba ufunwayo, akusayi kufunyanwa noko kude kube ngunapakade, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel27:1 LABUYA leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel27:2 Kanjalo wena, nyana woluntu! tabatela i‐Tire isililo;" 
Ezekiel27:3 uze uti kuyo i‐Tire: Wena uhlalayo ngasezingenweni zolwandle, mtengelikazi wezizwe kuzo iziqiti ezininzi! itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Tire! uti wena, ndifezekile ngobuhle." 
Ezekiel27:4 Imida yako isembilini welwandle; abaki bako bafezekisile ubuhle bako. 
Ezekiel27:5 Ngemiti yeberoshe yase‐Senire bazakile zonke iplanke zako; isedare zase‐Lebanone bazitabatile ukuba kukwenzelwe imaste. 
Ezekiel27:6 Ngeyeke zase‐Bashane bayenzile imipini yako: izitulo zako bazenzile ngopondo lwendlovu kunye nemiti yetashure ivela eziqitini zama‐Kiti. 
Ezekiel27:7 Iqiya eshiceneyo inesetyenzwa elitungiweyo ngamabala ngamabala, ivela e‐Jipete, ibisisitwabuluko sako, ukuba ibe yiseli yako; izuluṙa nesibomvu, zivela eziqitini zase‐Elishai, zibe zisisigubungelo sako." 
Ezekiel27:8 Abemi base‐Tsidone ne‐Aravadi bebengabaqu̔bi bako ngemipini; amalumko ako, Tire! abeko kuwe, wona ebengabapati benqanawa bako." 
Ezekiel27:9 Abadala base‐Gebali, namalumko ayo, bebeko kuwe, abalungisi bentanda zako; zonke inqanawa zolwandle, nomatrose bazo, beziko kuwe, ukutenga intengo yako." 
Ezekiel27:10 Ama‐Peresiya, nama‐Ludi, nama‐Pute, ebesempini yako, amadoda ako okulwa; axo̔ma ikaka nomnqwazi kuwe; wona enza inkazimlo yako." 
Ezekiel27:11 Amadoda ase‐Aravadi nempi yako ebepezu kwendonga zako ngento engqongayo; nama‐Gamadi ebesezinqatyeni zako; amakaka awo awaxo̔ma ezindongeni zako ngento engqongayo; afezekisa ubuhle bako. 
Ezekiel27:12 I‐Tareshishe ibingumtengisi wako ngenxa yobuninzi bendyebo zonke; ngesilivere, ngesincete, ngetine, nangelode, benza ukwanana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:13 I‐Javane, ne‐Tubali, ne‐Mesheki, zibe zingabatengi bako; ngemipefumlo yabantu nempahla zexina batengelana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:14 Abendlu ka‐Togama benza ukwanana nawe ngamahashe enqwelo, nangamahashe okukwelwa, nangamaqwaṙaṙa." 
Ezekiel27:15 Amadoda ase‐Dedane ebengabatengi bako; iziqiti ezininzi zibe ziyintengelo yesandla sako; impondo zopondo lwendlovu nezeheboni bazibuyisa zibe libaso lako. 
Ezekiel27:16 I‐Siriya ibiyindawo yokutengisa kwako ngenxa yobuninzi bamasetyenzwa ako; ngesamagide, ngesibomvu, nangencawe etungiweyo ngamabala ngamabala, nangeqiya eshiceneyo, ngekorali, nangerubi, benza ukwanana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:17 I‐Juda, nelizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli, zona zibe zingabatengi bako; ngenqolowa yase‐Minite ne‐Panage, nangobusi, nangeoli, nangetsori, batengelana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:18 I‐Damakusi ibiyindawo yokutengisa kwako, ngobuninzi bamasetyenzwa ako, ngenxa yobuninzi bendyebo zonke; ngeveyine yase‐Helibone, noboya obumhlope." 
Ezekiel27:19 I‐Vedane ne‐Javane yakwa‐Yuzale zenza ukwanana nawe: isincete esikazimlayo, n ekasiya, nekalame, zibe zisendaweni yako yokutenga." 
Ezekiel27:20 I‐Dedane ibingumtengi wako ngezivato zokwandlalwa ezinqwelweni. 
Ezekiel27:21 I‐Arabi, nazo zonke inkosana zakwa‐Kedare, zona zibe zingabatengisi besandla sako; ngemvana, nenkunzi zegusha, nebokwe, — ngezi zibe zingabatengisi bako." 
Ezekiel27:22 Abatengi base‐Sheba ne‐Rahama, bona bebengabatengi bako; ngezimnandi zonke ezidumileyo, nanga, matye onke anqabileyo, negolide, benza ukwanana nawe." 
Ezekiel27:23 I‐Karane, ne‐Kane, ne‐Hedeni, abatengi base‐Sheba, n e‐Asiriya, n e‐Kilimade, bebengabatengi bako." 
Ezekiel27:24 Aba bebengabatengi bako ngezinto ezintle, ngezinameko zezuluṙa nencawe etungiweyo ngamabala ngamabala, nangetyeya zezivato ezinqabileyo, zibotshiwe ngentambo, zenziwe ngemiti yesedare, pakati kwentengo yako." 
Ezekiel27:25 Inqanawa zase‐Tareshishe zibe zingabaṙatyazi bako ekutengeni kwako; waza wazaliswa, wabekeka kakulu embilini welwandle." 
Ezekiel27:26 Abaqu̔bi bako ngemipini bakuzisile emanzini amakulu; umoya wasempumalanga ukwapulile, embilini welwandle." 
Ezekiel27:27 Indyebo yako, nokwanana kwako, intengo yako, omatrose bako, nabapati benqanawa bako; abalungisi bentanda zako, nabatengi bentengo yako, nawo onke amadoda ako okulwa, lawo akuwe, nakuwo wonke umhlambi wako opakati kwako, baya kuwa embilini welwandle, ngomhla wokuwa kwako." 
Ezekiel27:28 Ngentlokoma yesikalo sabapati benqanawa bako, inqele ziya kungcangcazela." 
Ezekiel27:29 Baya kuhla ezinqanaweni zabo, bonke abapete imipini, omatrose, bonke abapati benqanawa baselwandle; baya kuma emhlabeni," 
Ezekiel27:30 bavakalise ilizwi labo pezu kwako, bakale ngento eṙaṙa, bapose utuli pezu kwentloko zabo, baqikaqikeke elututwini," 
Ezekiel27:31 bazenze bunqai ngenxa yako, babinqe ngentlakantlaka, bakulilele ngobuṙaṙa bompefumlo, ngokulila okuṙaṙa;" 
Ezekiel27:32 babeya kukutabatela ekukaleni kwabo isililo, balile pezu kwako, besiti: Sisipina isixeko esinjenge‐Tire, njengesicitakeleyo pakati kwolwandle?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ekupumeni kwezinto zako zokwanana ezilwandleni, wahlutisa izizwe ezininzi; ngobuninzi bendyebo zako nentengo yako watyebisa okumkani bomhlaba." 
Ezekiel27:34 Ngexesha lokwapulwa kwako zilwandle ezinzulwini zamanzi, intengo yako nawo wonke umhlambi wako pakati kwako uya kuwa." 
Ezekiel27:35 Bonke abemi beziqiti bokutela nqa, nokumkani babo baya kuhlatyuzela kakulu, boba nevuso ubuso babo." 
Ezekiel27:36 Abatengisi pakati kwezizwe baya kwenza amakwelo pezu kwako; woba sisituso, ude ungabiko kude kube ngunapakade." 
Ezekiel28:1 LABUYA leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel28:2 Nyana woluntu! yiti kwinkosi ye‐Tire: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba intliziyo yako ipakamile, nokuba uti, ndi ngutixo, ndihleli esihlalweni sikatixo, embilini welwandle; kanti ungumntu ke, ungenguye utixo, nangona uyibeka intliziyo yako njengentliziyo katixo;"
