Ezekiel28:3 bona ke, ulumkile pezu kwo‐Danyeli; akuko mfihleko engakufihlelwayo." 
Ezekiel28:4 Ngobulumko bako nangengqondo yako uzizuzele ubutyebi; ewe, uzuzile igolide nesilivere ezimbekelweni zako." 
Ezekiel28:5 Ngobukulu bobulumko bako ekutengeni kwako ubandisile ubutyebi bako; kanjalo intliziyo yako ipakamile ngenxa yobutyebi bako. 
Ezekiel28:6 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba ubekile intliziyo yako njengentliziyo katixo; 
Ezekiel28:7 ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kuzisa pezu kwako abasemzini, abazidlwengu zezizwe; abaya kur̔ola amaṙele abo ngakubo ubuhle bobulumko bako, banco̔lise inkazimlo yako." 
Ezekiel28:8 Baya kukuhlisela emnxunyeni, wauya kufa ngokufa kwabahlatyiweyo embilini welwandle." 
Ezekiel28:9 Womana ukuti na, ndi ngutixo, ebusweni bokubulalayo, ungumntu nje, ungenguye utixo, esandleni sokuhlabayo?" 
Ezekiel28:10 Ukufa kwabangalukileyo uya kukufa ngesandla sabasemzini; ngokuba nditetile mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel28:11 Lalekela ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel28:12 Nyana woluntu! tabata isililo pezu kwokumkani we‐Tire, uti kuye: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Wena uncamatiselayo umlinganiso, ozele bubulumko, ofezekile ngobuhle!" 
Ezekiel28:13 ubuko e‐Hedeni, emyezweni katixo; onke amatye anqabileyo ebesisigubungelo sako, irubi, itopaze, neyahalome, ikrusolite, isadonutse, nejasipidi, isafire, isamagide, nekabunekele, negolide: umsebenzi wentambula zako nowemilozi yako ubukuwe; emhleni wokudalwa kwako zalungiswa." 
Ezekiel28:14 Ubuyikerubime etanjisiweyo egubungelayo; ndakumisa njalo; ubuko entabeni eyingcwele katixo; pakati kwamatye omlilo ubuhambahamba. 
Ezekiel28:15 Ubufezekile wena ezindleleni zako, kwa semhleni wokudalwa kwako, kwada kwafunyanwa inkohlakalo kuwe." 
Ezekiel28:16 Ngobuninzi bentengo yako bazalisile umpakati wako ngobudlwengu, wawonile; ngako ndiya kukulahla njengento enco̔lileyo entabeni katixo; ndandiya kukububisa, wena kerubime egubungelayo! kwa pakati kwamatye omlilo." 
Ezekiel28:17 Intliziyo yako ubupakamile ngobuhle bako; wonakalisile ubulumko bako ngenxa yenkazimlo yako: ndokukahlela emhlabeni, ndokubeka ebusweni bokumkani, ukuba bakubonele." 
Ezekiel28:18 Ngobuninzi benkohlakalo zako, ngobumenemene bokutenga kwako, uzinco̔lisile indawo zako ezingcwele; ngako ndiya kupumisa umlilo kwa pakati kwako oya kukudla; ndandiya kukwenza ube lututu pezu kwomhlaba, emehlweni abo bonke abakubonayo." 
Ezekiel28:19 Bonke abakwaziyo pakati kwezizwe bokutela nqa; woba sisituso, ude ungabiko kude kube ngunapakade." 
Ezekiel28:20 LEZA kanjako ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel28:21 Nyana woluntu! beka ubuso bako ngakuyo i‐Tsidone, uprofiteshe ngakuyo," 
Ezekiel28:22 uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuwe, Tsidone! ndandiya kubekwa pakati kwako; baye beya kwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, nxa ndiyenza kuyo imigwebo, na nxa ndingcwaliswa kuyo." 
Ezekiel28:23 Ngokuba ndiya kutuma kuyo isifo esibubisayo, negazi ezitarateni zayo; kanjalo inxweleṙa ziya kuwa pakati kwayo, ngeṙele elingakuyo ngamacala onke; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel28:24 Kwaye kungayi kubuya kubeko kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli ameva aṙauzelisayo, namakakakaka anika ubuhlungu, kubo bonke ababangqongayo, abo ababacekisayo; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi yinkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel28:25 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Nxa ndibutileyo indlu ka‐Sirayeli ezizweni abatiwe sa pakati kwazo, na nxa ndiya kungcwaliswa kubo emehlweni abaheyideni, baya kwandula bahlale emhlabeni wabo, endawunikayo kwisicaka sam, ku‐Yakobi." 
Ezekiel28:26 Babeya kuhlala kuwo ngokunqaba, bake izindlu, batyale imiyezo; ewe, baya kuhlala ngokunqaba, nxa ndiyenzile imigwebo pezu kwabo bonke ababacekisayo, ababangqongayo; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wabo." 
Ezekiel29:1 NGOMNYAKA weshumi, ngeyeshumi inyanga, ngoweshumi linesibini umhla wenyanga, leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel29:2 Nyana woluntu! beka ubuso bako ngakuye u‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, uprofiteshe ngakuye, nangakuyo i‐Jipete yonke." 
Ezekiel29:3 Teta, uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuwe, Faro, kumkani we‐Jipete! longwenya inkulu elala pantsi pakati kwemilambo yayo; ete: Ngowam umlambo wam, ndiwenzele mna." 
Ezekiel29:4 Koko ndiya kufaka amaqeṙu emihlatini yako, ndenze zonke intlanzi zemilambo yako ziti nama ezinkwetwini zako; ndiya kukunyusa kwa pakati kwemilambo yako, ziti zonke intlanzi zemilambo yako zinamatele ezinkwetwini zako." 
Ezekiel29:5 Ndandiya kukulahlela entlango, wena nazo zonke intlanzi zemilambo yako; pezu kwobuso bezindle uya kuwa; akuyi kuhlanganiswa, akuyi kubutwa nokubutwa: ndikunikile ube kukutya emaṙamncweni omhlaba nasezintakeni zezulu." 
Ezekiel29:6 Baye bonke abemi base‐Jipete beya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, ngenxa yokuba bebengumsimelelo wengcongolo kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel29:7 Nxa bakubambayo ngesandla sako, watyunyuzwa, wabacandela igxalaba lonke; naxeshekweni bayama pezu kwako, wapuka, wenza zonke izinqe zabo zime." 
Ezekiel29:8 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuzisa pezu kwako iṙele, ndinqamle kuwe abantu nezilo." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ilizwe le‐Jipete loba yingcitakalo nobugxwayiba; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova; ngenxa yokuba ete: Umlambo ngowam, ndiwenzile mna." 
Ezekiel29:10 Ngako oko, bona ke, ndingakuwe, nangakuyo imilambo yako; nelizwe le‐Jipete ndiya kulenza libe bugxwayiba lipela, n engcitakalo, kwa kuyo i‐Migidole kude kube se‐Sevene, nakude kube semdeni wase‐Tiyopiya." 
Ezekiel29:11 Akuyi kucanda kulo unyawo lwomntu, akuyi kucanda kulo nonyawo lwesilo; lalingayi kumiwa iminyaka engamashumi mane." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ndandiya kulenza ilizwe le‐Jipete libe yingcitakalo pakati kwamazwe acitakeleyo, nezixeko zayo, pakati kwezixeko ezenzwe bunxuwa, zoba yingcitakalo iminyaka engamashumi mane: nama‐Jipete ndiya kuwati sa pakati kwentlanga, ndiwacite pakati kwamazwe." 
Ezekiel29:13 Noko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ekupeleni kweminyaka imashumi mane, ndiya kubuta ama‐Jipete ezizweni apo abetelwe sa kona." 
Ezekiel29:14 Ndandiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwama‐Jipete, ndiwabuyisele elizweni le‐Patrose, elizweni lokuzalwa kwawo; aeya kubako kona ebubukumkani obutobekileyo." 
Ezekiel29:15 Boba butobekile kubo bonke ubukumkani; kanjalo abusayi kubuya buzipakamise pezu kwentlanga: ngokuba ndiya kuwancipisa, ukuze angapati ubukosi pezu kwentlanga." 
Ezekiel29:16 Baye bungayi kubuya bube litemba lendlu ka‐Sirayeli, elikumbuza ityala, ngokubeka kwabo emva kwawo; aeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi yinkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel29:17 KWAYE kute ngomnyaka wamashumi mabini anesixe̔nze, ngeyokuqala inyanga, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel29:18 Nyana woluntu! u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone wayikonzisa impi yake inkonzo enkulu ngakuyo i‐Tire; zonke intloko zenziwa bunqai, nawo onke amagxalaba obulwa; kanti umvuzo ubungeko kuye, nakuyo impi yake, uvela kwi‐Tire, ngenxa yenkonzo abeyikonza ngakuyo." 
Ezekiel29:19 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kunika u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone ilizwe le‐Jipete; oya kususa isihlwele salo, atimbe amaxoba alo, apange impango yalo; lona loba ngumvuzo wempi yake." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ngenxa yomsebenzi wake abekonza ngawo ngakuyo, ndimnikile ilizwe le‐Jipete, ngokuba bewenzele mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel29:21 Ngomhla lowo ndiya kuhlumisa upondo lwendlu ka‐Sirayeli; nakuwe ndiya kunika ukuvulwa kwomlomo pakati kwabo; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova. 
Ezekiel30:1 LABUYA leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel30:2 Nyana woluntu! profitesha uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Lilani! Au, umhla lowo!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Ngokuba umhla ukufupi, ewe, umhla kayehova ukufupi, umhla wamafu; loba lixesha labaheyideni." 
Ezekiel30:4 Ngokuba iṙele liya kuza pezu kwe‐Jipete, notutumbelo luya kubako e‐Tiyopiya, nxa kuwayo abahlatyiweyo e‐Jipete; kwakuya kususwa isihlwele sayo, nemisekelo yayo iya kucitwa." 
Ezekiel30:5 I‐Tiyopiya, ne‐Pute, ne‐Ludi, nabo bonke abantu abadityanisiweyo, ne‐Kube, nosapo lwelizwe locebano, baya kuwa kunye nabo ngeṙele." 
Ezekiel30:6 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ewe, baya kuwa abasekelayo i‐Jipete, lihle ke ir̔atshi lamandla ayo; kwa se‐Migidole kude kube se‐Sevene baya kuwa ngeṙele kuyo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel30:7 Boba becitakele pakati kwamazwe acitakeleyo; nezixeko zayo zoba pakati kwezixeko ezenzwe bunxuwa. 
Ezekiel30:8 Babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, nxa ndibekileyo umlilo e‐Jipete, na nxa bonke abancedi bayo babujisiwe." 
Ezekiel30:9 Ngalomhla izigidimi ziya kupuma ebusweni bam ngenqanawa, ukuya kuwoyikisa ama‐Tiyopiya asekunqabeni; kwaye kuya kubako ututumbelo pakati kwawo, njengasemhleni we‐Jipete; ngokuba, bona ke, lusiza." 
Ezekiel30:10 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Kanjalo ndiya kupelisa isihlwele se‐Jipete ngesandla sika‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone. 
Ezekiel30:11 Yena nabantu bake kunye naye, izidlwengu zezizwe, baya kuziswa ukulonakalisa ilizwe; babeya kur̔ola amaṙele abo ngakuyo i‐Jipete, bazalise ilizwe ngabahlatyiweyo." 
Ezekiel30:12 Imilambo ndiya kuyenza ibe yomile, nelizwe ndolitengisela esandleni sabakohlakeleyo; ndandiya kucitakalisa ilizwe nokuzala kwalo ngesandla sabasemzini; mna Yehova nditetile." 
Ezekiel30:13 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Kanjalo izitixwana ndiya kuzitshabalalisa, namadalo ndowapelisa kuyo i‐Nofe; kwaye kungasayi kubako inkosi yasezweni le‐Jipete; ndandiya kubeka ulwoyiko elizweni le‐Jipete." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ndiya kucitakalisa i‐Patrose, ndibeke umlilo e‐Tsohane, ndenze imigwebo e‐No." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ndandiya kubutulula ubuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwe‐Sine, inqaba ye‐Jipete, ndisinqamle isihlwele sase‐No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ndowubeka umlilo e‐Jipete; i‐Sine yoba nobuhlungu obukulu, ne‐No iya kugqojozelwa, ne‐Nofe yoba sebunzimeni bemihla ngemihla." 
Ezekiel30:17 Amadodana ase‐Avene nawase‐Pi‐besete aya kuwa ngeṙele: n ezixeko ezi zoya ekutinjweni. 
Ezekiel30:18 Nase‐Tahapanesi imini iya kwenziwa mnyama, nxa ndizapula kona iyokwe ze‐Jipete; kanjalo ir̔atshi lamandla ayo liya kupela kuyo; yona ilifu liya kuyisibekelela, nentombi zayo zoya ekutinjweni." 
Ezekiel30:19 Kwa njalo ndiya kuyenza imigwebo e‐Jipete; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova. 
Ezekiel30:20 KWAYE kute ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye, ngeyokuqala inyanga, ngowesixe̔nxe umhla wenyanga, leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel30:21 Nyana woluntu! ingalo ka‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete ndiyapulile; kanjako, bona ke, ayiyi kubotshwa ukufaka amayeza, ukubeka isiqoqo sokuyibopa, ukuyomeleza, ukuba ibambe iṙele." 
Ezekiel30:22 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuye u‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, ndandiya kwapula ingalo zake, eyomeleleyo neyapukileyo, ndiliwise iṙele esandleni sake." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ndowati sa ama‐Jipete pakati kwentlanga, ndiwacite pakati kwamazwe." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ndandiya kuzomeleza ingalo zokumkani we‐Babilone, ndilinike iṙele lam esandleni sake; kodwa ingalo zika‐Faro ndozapula, waeya kugula ngokugula kwohlatyiweyo ebusweni bake." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ewe ndiya kuzomeleza ingalo zokumkani we‐Babilone, kodwa ingalo zika‐Faro ziya kuwa pantsi; aeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, nxa ndinika iṙele lam esandleni sokumkani we‐Babilone, na nxa alolulayo pezu kwelizwe le‐Jipete." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ndandiya kuwati sa ama‐Jipete pakati kwentlanga, ndiwacite pakati kwamazwe; andule akwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel31:1 KWAYE kute ngomnyaka weshumi elinamnye, ngeyesitatu inyanga, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel31:2 Nyana woluntu! yiti ku‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, nakuso isihlwele sake: Ufana nobanina ebukulwini bako?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Bona ke, um‐Asiriya ebengumti wesedare e‐Lebanone, omasebe mahle, nobugqabi bunika umtunzi, nobupakamo bude; lalibe isebe lake lapezulu lipakati kwamagatya abungqingqwa." 
Ezekiel31:4 Amanzi amenza mkulu, inzulu yamenza mde, ebihamba ngemilambo ayo ngokungqonga isityalwa sayo, nemijelo yayo yayiku̔pela kuyo yonke imiti yasendle." 
Ezekiel31:5 Ngokunjalo babude ubupakamo bake ngapezu kwayo yonke imiti yasendle; amasebe ake aba maninzi, namagatya ake abe olukile, ngenxa yamanzi amaninzi, ekunabiseni kwake." 
Ezekiel31:6 Emasebeni ake zonke intaka zezulu zenza izindlu zazo, nangapantsi kwamagatya ake zazala zonke izilo zasendle, nasemtunzini wake zahlala zonke izizwe ezikulu." 
Ezekiel31:7 Waye emhle ke ebukulwini bake, ebudeni bamasebe ake; ngokuba ingcambo yake ibingasemanzini amakulu." 
Ezekiel31:8 Isedare emyezweni katixo azamsitelisa; iberoshe azafana namasebe ake, neharemone bezingenjengamagatya ake; bekungeko namnye umti emyezweni katixo ofana naye ngobuhle bake." 
Ezekiel31:9 Ndamenza mhle ngobuninzi bamagatya ake, yada yanomona ngaye yonke imiti yase‐Hedeni ebisemyezweni katixo." 
Ezekiel31:10 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba ubupakamile ngobude; ewe, wamisa isebe lake lapezulu pakati kwamagatya abungqingqwa, yati intliziyo yake yapakama ngobupakamo bake;" 
Ezekiel31:11 ngako ndimnikele esandleni sosomandla wezizwe; uya kumenzela ukwenza kwake, ngenxa yokukohlakala kwake ndimgxotile." 
Ezekiel31:12 Abasemzini, abazidlwengu zezizwe, baya kumnqumla, bamlahle: pezu kwentaba nakuyo yonke imihlambo amasebe ake aya kuwa, namagatya ake aya kwapulwa ngakuyo yonke imilanjana yelizwe; babeya kuhla emtunzini wake bonke abantu bomhlaba, bamlahle." 
Ezekiel31:13 Pezu kwesiwiwo sake ziya kuhlala zonke intaka zezulu, nasemagatyeni ake zobako zonke izilo zasendle:" 
Ezekiel31:14 ukuze yonke imiti yangasemanzini ingazipakamisi ngobude bayo, nokuba ingamisi isebe layo lapezulu pakati kwamagatya abungqingqwa, nokuba yonke esela amanzi ingazimeli ngokwayo ngobupakamo bayo; ngokuba yonke inikelwe ekufeni, emazantsi omhlaba, pakati kwosapo lwabantu, ndawonye nabo behlela esihogweni." 
Ezekiel31:15 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Emhleni wehlela ehadesi ndenza kulilwe; ndamgubungelela inzulu, ndatinta imisinga yayo, aza abambeka amanzi amakulu; ndenza ne‐Lebanone imlilele, nayo yonke imiti yasendle yacubuka ngenxa yake." 
Ezekiel31:16 Ngentlokoma yokuwa kwake ndangcangcazelisa izizwe, ndakumhlisela ehadesi kunye nabo behlela esihogweni; yandula yatutuzeleka emazantsi omhlaba yonke imiti yase‐Hedeni, edlulisileyo nelungileyo yase‐Lebanone, yonke esela amanzi." 
Ezekiel31:17 Kwa nalé yehlela ehadesi kunye naye, kubo abahlatyiweyo ngeṙele; nabayingalo yake, a babehleli emtunzini wake pakati kwezizwe." 
Ezekiel31:18 Ufana nobanina ngento enjalo ngobungcwalisa nangobukulu pakati kwemiti yase‐Hedeni? nawe uya kuhliselwa emazantsi omhlaba kunye nemiti yase‐Hedeni; pakati kwabangalukileyo uya kulala ndawonye nabahlatyiweyo ngeṙele. Lo unguye u‐Faro, naso sonke isihlwele sake, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel32:1 KWAYE kute ngomnyaka weshumi linesibini, ngeyeshumi linesibini inyanga, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel32:2 Nyana woluntu! tabata isililo pezu kwo‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, uti kuye: Uyafana nengonyamana yezizwe, unjengengwenya ezilwandleni, wabutyoboza emilanjeni yako, wawenza budaka amanzi ngenyawo zako, waxovula imilambo yazo." 
Ezekiel32:3 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngako ndiya kwaneka pezu kwako utambo lwam entlanganisweni yabantu abaninzi, abaya kukunyusa ngomnata wam." 
Ezekiel32:4 Ndiya kwandula ndikulahlele emhlabeni, pezu kwobuso bezindle ndokuwisa pantsi; ndandiya kulalisa pezu kwako zonke intaka zezulu, ndizihlutise ngawe izilo zomhlaba wonke." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ndiya kubeka inyama yako pezu kwentaba, ndizalise imihlambo ngobuhandiba bako." 
Ezekiel32:6 Nelizwe lokukukula kwako ndolinyela ngegazi lako kude kube sezintabeni; yoti imijelo izaliswe ngawe. 
Ezekiel32:7 Kanjako ndiya kugubungela izulu ekucinyweni kwako, nenkwenkwezi zalo ndozenza mnyama; ilanga ndoligubungela ngelifu, nenyanga ayiyi kukanyisa ukukanya kwayo." 
Ezekiel32:8 Zonke izikanyiso ezikanyayo ezulwini ndiya kuzenza mnyama pezu kwako, ndinike ubumnyama pezu kwelizwe lako, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel32:9 Ndandiya kukataza intliziyo yabantu abaninzi ndakuzisa imbujiswa yako pakati kwezizwe, emazweni ongawazanga." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ewe, ndiya kubenza abantu abaninzi bakutele nqa, bati okumkani babo bahlatyuzele kakulu ngenxa yako, ndakuvivinya iṙele lam ebusweni babo; babeya kututumela amaxanyana onke, abanye ngabanye ngenxa yobomi babo, emhleni wokuwa kwako." 
Ezekiel32:11 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Iṙele lokumkani we‐Babilone liya kuza pezu kwako. 
Ezekiel32:12 Ngamaṙele amagoṙa ndosiwisa isihlwele sako, engabazidlwengu zezizwe onke; aya kucita ir̔atshi le‐Jipete, naso sonke isihlwele sayo siya kutshatyalaliswa." 
Ezekiel32:13 Ndandiya kububisa zonke izilo zayo ngasemanzini amakulu; unyawo lwomntu aluyi kubuya luwenze budaka, kanjalo impupu zezilo aziyi kuwenza budaka." 
Ezekiel32:14 Oko ndiya kudambisa amanzi abo, nemilambo yabo ndiya kuyelisa njengeoli, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel32:15 Nxa ndiya kulenza ilizwe le‐Jipete libe yingcitakalo, liti ilizwe licitakaliswe ukuzala kwalo, nxa ndiya kubeta bonke abemiyo kulo, baya kwandula bakwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel32:16 Sisililo esi abaya kulila ngaso; intombi zezizwe ziya kulila ngaso; pezu kwe‐Jipete, napezu kwaso sonke isihlwele sayo, ziya kulila ngaso, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel32:17 Kwaye kute kanjalo ngomnyaka weshumi linesibini, ngoweshumi linesihlanu umhla wenyanga, leza ilizwi likayehova kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel32:18 Nyana woluntu! yenza isikalo pezu kwesihlwele sase‐Jipete, usihlisele, (yona nentombi zezizwe ezidumileyo,) emazantsi omhlaba, kunye nabo behlela esihogweni." 
Ezekiel32:19 Udlula banina ngobuhle? Yihla, ulale ndawonye nabangalukileyo." 
Ezekiel32:20 Pakati kwabahlatyiweyo ngeṙele baya kuwa; inikelwe eṙeleni; yir̔oleni yona nazo zonke izihlwele zayo. 
Ezekiel32:21 Amaṙoti amandla makulu aya kuteta kuye, pakati kwayo ihadesi, kunye nabancedi bake; behlile, balele pantsi, abangalukileyo, abahlatyiweyo ngeṙele." 
Ezekiel32:22 Kuko kona i‐Asiriya nawo wonke umhlambi wayo; amancw̔aba ake ayamngqonga; bonke behlatyiwe, bewile ngeṙele:" 
Ezekiel32:23 abamancw̔aba abekwe emacaleni esihogo; waye umhlambi wayo ulingqonga incw̔aba layo; bonke behlatyiwe, bewile ngeṙele, abasenza isoyikeko sibe selizweni labahleliyo." 
Ezekiel32:24 Kuko kona i‐Helami naso sonke isihlwele sayo silingqonga incw̔aba layo, bonke behlatyiwe, bewile ngeṙele, abehlele bengalukanga emazantsi omhlaba, abasenza isoyikeko sabo sibe selizweni labahleliyo; kodwa balitwele ihlazo labo kunye nabo behlela esihogweni." 
Ezekiel32:25 Pakati kwabahlatyiweyo bayibekele umandlalo ndawonye naso sonke isihlwele sayo; amancw̔aba ayo ayamngqonga; bonke bengabangalukileyo, abahlatyiweyo ngeṙele; nakuba kube kusenzwa isoyikeko sabo sibe selizweni labahleliyo, balitwele noko ihlazo labo kunye nabo behlela esihogweni: pakati kwabahlatyiweyo ubekiwe." 
Ezekiel32:26 Kuko kona i‐Mesheki, i‐Tubali, naso sonke isihlwele sayo; amancw̔aba ayo ayamngqonga; bonke bengabangalukileyo, abahlatyiweyo ngeṙele, nakuba bebesenza isoyikeko sabo sibe selizweni labahleliyo." 
Ezekiel32:27 Baye bengayi kulala na ndawonye namaṙoti awileyo pakati kwabangalukileyo, lawo ahleleyo ehadesi enezixo̔bo zokulwa zawo, namaṙele awo bawabekile ngapantsi kwentloko zawo? abankohlakalo zipezu kwamatambo abo, nakuba bebesisoyikeko kumaṙoti elizweni labahleliyo." 
Ezekiel32:28 Nawe uya kwapulwa pakati kwabangalukileyo, ulale ndawonye nabahlatyiweyo ngeṙele." 
Ezekiel32:29 Kuko kona i‐Edome, okumkani bayo, nazo zonke inkosana zayo, abati ebuṙotini babo babekwe nabahlatyiweyo ngeṙele; bona baya kulala ndawonye nabangalukileyo, nandawonye nabo behlela esihogweni." 
Ezekiel32:30 Kuko kona inkosi zasenode, zona zonke, nawo onke ama‐Tsidone, abahlileyo nabahlatyiweyo, bedanele ubuṙoti babo pakati kwesoyikeko sabo; balele bengalukanga ndawonye nabahlatyiweyo ngeṙele, nehlazo labo balitwele kunye nabo behlela esihogweni." 
Ezekiel32:31 U‐Faro wobabona, atutuzelwe pezu kwaso sonke isihlwele sake, abahlatyiweyo ngeṙele, u‐Faro nayo yonke impi yake, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel32:32 Ngokuba ndisenzile isoyikeko sam sibe selizweni labahleliyo: waeya kulaliswa pakati kwabangalukileyo ndawonye nabahlatyiweyo ngeṙele, u‐Faro naso sonke isihlwele sake, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel33:1 LABUYA leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel33:2 Nyana woluntu! teta nalo usapo lwabantu bako, uti kulo: Nxa ndizisayo iṙele pezu kwelizwe, bati abantu belizwe batabate indoda yasemideni yabo, bayimise ibe ngumlindi wabo;" 
Ezekiel33:3 ide ibone iṙele lisiza pezu kwelizwe, ivutele ngexilongo, iyale abantu;" 
Ezekiel33:4 andule eve ovayo intlokoma yexilongo, kanti akayaleki; ukuba liyeza iṙele, limsuse, igazi lake loba pezu kweyake intloko." 
Ezekiel33:5 Intlokoma yexilongo wabeyiva, kanti wabengayaleki; igazi lake loba pezu kwake: kodwa lowo uyalekayo wowusindisa umpefumlo wake." 
Ezekiel33:6 Naxeshekweni umlindi abona iṙele lisiza, kanti akavuteli ngexilongo, bati abantu bangayalwa; ukuba liyeza iṙele, lisuse omnye wakubo, lowo uyasuswa usetyaleni lake, kodwa igazi lake ndolibiza esandleni somlindi." 
Ezekiel33:7 Nawe, nyana woluntu! ndikwenzile umlindi kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli; wauya kuva ilizwi ngomlomo wam, ubayale kwa kum." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ndakuti kokohlakeleyo: Wena ukohlakeleyo! uya kufa ngenyaniso; ukuba akuteti ukumyala okohlakeleyo aguquke endleleni yake, lowo okohlakeleyo uya kufa etyaleni lake, negazi lake ndolibiza esandleni sako." 
Ezekiel33:9 Kodwa nxa umyala okohlakeleyo ngendlela yake ukuba aguquke kuyo, kanti akaguquki endleleni yake; uya kufa yena etyaleni lake, nawe uhlangule umpefumlo wako." 
Ezekiel33:10 Ngako wena, nyana woluntu! yiti kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli: Kungokunje nitshoyo, nisiti: Nxa izigqito zetu nezono zetu zipezu kwetu, siti tina singcungcuteke kuzo, sesiya kuti nina ke ukubudla ubomi?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Yiti kubo: Ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, anditandi ukufa kwokohlakeleyo, koko nditanda ukuguquka kwokohlakeleyo endleleni yake, ukuba adle ubomi: guqukani, guqukani kuzo indlela zenu ezikohlakeleyo: ngokuba kunganina ukuba niya kufa, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Ezekiel33:12 Ngako wena, nyana woluntu! yiti kulo usapo lwabantu bako: Ukulunga kwolungileyo akuyi kumhlangula ngomhla wesigqito sake; nokukohlakala kwokohlakeleyo, akayi kuwa ngako ngomhla aguqukayo ekukohlakaleni kwake; kanjalo olungileyo akayi kuba nako ukudla ubomi ngako ukulunga kwake, ngomhla wokwona kwake." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ndakuti ngolungileyo: Uya kubudla ubomi ngenyaniso; ukuba uyatembela ekulungeni kwake, enze ubumenemene, konke ukulunga kwake akuyi kukunjulwa; kodwa ngobumenemene bake abenzileyo, kwa ngabo uya kufa." 
Ezekiel33:14 Kanjako ndakuti kokohlakeleyo: Uya kufa ngenyaniso: ukuba uyaguquka esonweni sake, enze okufanelekileyo nokulungileyo:" 
Ezekiel33:15 ukuba okohlakeleyo uyabuyisa isibanjiselwa, abuyekezele okupangiweyo, ahambe emimisweni yobomi engenzi ubumenemene; uya kubudla ubomi ngenyaniso, akayi kufa." 
Ezekiel33:16 Zonke izono zake azenzileyo, aziyi kumkunjulelwa; okufanelekileyo nokulungileyo ukwenzile, uya kubudla ubomi ngenyaniso." 
Ezekiel33:17 Noko, usapo lwabantu bako luti: Indlela yenkosi ayilungelelene. Kanti bona, indlela yabo ayilungelelene." 
Ezekiel33:18 Nxa olungileyo aguquka ekulungeni kwake, enze ubumenemene, uya kufa kwa ngabo." 
Ezekiel33:19 Naxeshekweni okohlakeleyo aguquka ekukohlakaleni kwake, enze okufanelekileyo nokulungileyo, ngako oku yena uya kubudla ubomi." 
Ezekiel33:20 Noko niti: Indlela yenkosi ayilungelelene. Abanye ngabanye njengendlela zabo ndiya kunigweba, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Ezekiel33:21 KWABEKUTE ngomnyaka weshumi elinesibini wokutinjwa kwetu, ngeyeshumi inyanga, ngowesihlanu umhla wenyanga, kweza kufika kum osindileyo e‐Yerusaleme, esiti: Isixeko sibetiwe." 
Ezekiel33:22 Saye isandla sikayehova sibe sipezu kwam ngokuhlwa, engekafiki lowo usindileyo; nomlomo wam wabewuvulile wada wafika kum ngokusa; kwa njalo umlomo wam wavulwa, ndabendingabi sesisidenge." 
Ezekiel33:23 Laza ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel33:24 Nyana woluntu! abemi bezondawo zicitakeleyo ezisemhlabeni wakwa‐Sirayeli batsho besiti: u‐Abrahame wabemnye, waza walifuya ilizwe; kanti tina sibaninzi, ilizwe linikiwe kuti libe yimfuyo." 
Ezekiel33:25 Ngako oko yiti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Inyama inegazi niyayidla, namehlo enu niyawapakamisela kwizitixwana zenu, negazi niyalipalaza; seniya kufuya ilizwe na?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Nimi pezu kweṙele lenu, niyenza into ebuntshontsho, nabanye ngabanye umfazi wommelwane wabo niyamnco̔lisa; seniya kufuya ilizwe na?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Yitsho kubo, ukuti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ndihleli nje mna, abo basezindaweni ezicitakeleyo bowa ngeṙele, nalowo osezindleni ndiya kumnika kumaṙamncwa adliwe, nabo basezinqatyeni nasemiqolombeni baya kufa ngesifo esibubisayo." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ndandiya kulenza ilizwe libe yingcitakalo nentshabalalo, liti ir̔atshi lamandla alo lipele; kanjako intaba zakwa‐Sirayeli zoba bugxwayiba, kuze kungabiko ocanda kuzo." 
Ezekiel33:29 Baya kwandula bakwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, ndakulenza ilizwe libe yingcitakalo nentshabalalo, ngenxa yazo zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho zabo, abazenzileyo." 
Ezekiel33:30 Nawe, nyana woluntu! usapo lwabantu bako luyancokola ngawe ngasezindongeni naseminyangweni yezindlu; omnye uyateta kwomnye, umntu kummelwane wake, esiti: Manize ke, nive liyinina ilizwi elivela kuyehova." 
Ezekiel33:31 Bandule beze kuwe njengokuza kwabantu, bahlale pantsi ebusweni bako njeng abantu bam, beve amazwi ako, kodwa abawenzi; ngokuba bona ngomlomo wabo besenza njengabatandayo kakulu, kanti intliziyo yabo iyahamba emva kwenzuzo yabo ekohlakeleyo." 
Ezekiel33:32 Nawe, bona ke, unjengengoma yabatandi kubo, olizwi limnandi, nolungisa ukubeta isiculiso; ngokuba besiva amazwi ako, kodwa abawenzi." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ekufikeni kwoku, (nanku kusiza,) baya kwandula bakwazi okokuba umprofite ebepakati kwabo." 
Ezekiel34:1 LALEKELA leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel34:2 Nyana woluntu! profitesha ngakubo abalusi bakwa‐Sirayeli; profitesha, uti kubo, kubalusi: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Makube nzima kubo abalusi bakwa‐Sirayeli abazidlisa bona! Abalusi ngebengazidlisi igusha na?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Inqata niyalidla, noboya niyavata ngabo; ezityetyisiweyo niyazixe̔la; kodwa igusha anizidlisi." 
Ezekiel34:4 Ezibutataka anizomelezanga, nefayo aniyipilisanga, neyapukileyo aniyibopanga, negxotiweyo aniyibuyisanga, nelahlekileyo aniyifunanga; koko nizipete ngamandla, nangobulukuni." 
Ezekiel34:5 Zaba lusali, ngokuba engeko umalusi; zaba kukutya kuwo onke amaṙamncwa asendle kanjalo, zakuba lusali." 
Ezekiel34:6 Igusha zam zadungudela kuzo zonke intaba, napezu kwazo zonke induli ezinde; ewe igusha zam zaba lusali pezu kwobuso bonke bomhlaba, kungeko obuzayo, kungeko nofunayo." 
Ezekiel34:7 Ngako oko, nina balusi! yivani ilizwi likayehova:" 
Ezekiel34:8 Ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ngenyaniso ngokokuba igusha zam zaba lixoba, nokuba igusha zam zaba kukutya kuwo onke amaṙamncwa asendle, ngokuba engeko umalusi, nokuba abalusi bam bengabuzeli igusha zam, kodwa abalusi bayazidlisa bona, negusha zam abazidlisi;" 
Ezekiel34:9 ngako oko, nina balusi! yivani ilizwi likayehova:" 
Ezekiel34:10 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakubo abalusi; negusha zam ndiya kuzibiza esandleni sabo, ndenze bayeke ukuzidlisa igusha; kanjako abalusi abayi kubuya bazidlise bona; ngokuba ndiya kuhlangula igusha zam emlonyeni wabo, zize zingabi kukutya kubo." 
Ezekiel34:11 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti; Bona ke, ndiya kuti mna, ndibazele igusha zam, ndizifunisele kanjalo." 
Ezekiel34:12 Njengokuba umalusi efunisela umhlambi wake, emhleni akoyo pakati kwegusha zake ezipangaleleyo, ndiya kwenje njalo ukufunisela igusha zam; ndandiya kuzihlangula kuzo zonke indawo, apo zitiwe sa kona emhleni wamafu nobumnyama." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndandiya kuzipumisa ezizweni, ndizibute emazweni, ndizizise emhlabeni wazo, ndizidlise ezintabeni zakwa‐Sirayeli, ezintilini, nakuzo zonke indawo ezimiweyo zelizwe." 
Ezekiel34:14 Kwelilungileyo idlelo ndozidlisa, napezu kwentaba ezinde zakwa‐Sirayeli siya kubako isikundla sazo; kona apo ziya kubutuma esikundleni esilungileyo, na kulo idlelo elityebileyo ziya kudla, ezintabeni zakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ndiya kudlisa igusha zam, ndandiya kuzibutumisa, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel34:16 Elahlekileyo ndoyifuna, negxotiweyo ndoyibuyisa, neyapukileyo ndoyibopa, nebutataka ndiya kuyomeleza; kodwa etyebileyo neyomeleleyo ndozitshabalalisa, ndiya kudlisa zona ngomgwebo." 
Ezekiel34:17 Nani, zigusha zam! itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndigweba pakati kwenkomo ezincinane nenkomo ezincinane, pakati kwenkunzi zegusha nenkunzi zebokwe." 
Ezekiel34:18 Kuyinto encinane na kuni, ukuba niyadla idlelo elilungileyo, nize ninyatele isisalela samadlelo enu ngenyawo zenu; nokuba niyasela kuwo amanzi anzulu, nize niwenze budaka aseleyo ngenyawo zenu?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Negusha zam, okunyatelweyo ngenyawo zenu ziyakudla, nokwenziwe budaka ngenyawo zenu ziyakusela." 
Ezekiel34:20 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova kuzo ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuti mna, ndigwebe pakati kwenkomo ezincinane ezityebileyo nenkomo ezincinane ezibityileyo." 
Ezekiel34:21 Ngenxa yokuba nisunduzile ngecala nangegxalaba, nokuba ninqubile zonke ezibutataka ngempondo zenu, nada naziti sa ngasendle;" 
Ezekiel34:22 ngako ndiya kusindisa igusha zam, zize zingabi selixoba; ndandiya kugweba pakati kwenkomo ezincinane nenkomo ezincinane." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ndandiya kumisa pezu kwazo umalusi emnye, oya kuzidlisa, isicaka sam u‐Davide; yena wozidlisa, kanjalo yena woba ngumalusi wazo." 
Ezekiel34:24 Nam, Yehova, ndoba ngutixo wazo; nesicaka sam, u‐Davide, soba yinkosi pakati kwazo: mna Yehova nditetile." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ndiya kulwenza nazo ucebano lwoxolo, ndiwapelise amaṙamncwa elizweni; zaziya kuhlala entlango ngokunqaba, zilale emahlatini." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ndandiya kuzenza zona nenqele zenduli yam zibe litamsanqa; ndonisa isipango ngexesha laso; izipango zetamsanqa ziya kubako. 
Ezekiel34:27 Wandule umti wasendle unike ukuqa̔ma kwawo, nomhlaba unike ukuxakata kwawo, ziti zona zibeko emhlabeni wazo ngokunqaba, zazi nokwazi ukuba mna ndi nguyehova, ndakwapula izibonda zeyokwe yazo, ndizihlangule esandleni sabo bazikonzisayo." 
Ezekiel34:28 Kanjalo azisayi kuba selixoba kubaheyideni, namaṙamncwa omhlaba akayi kuzidla; koko ziya kuhlala ngokunqaba, kungeko okuya kuzoyikisa." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ndandiya kuzivusela isityalwa sodumo; aziyi kubuya zisuswe ngendlala elizweni, nehlazo labaheyideni aziyi kubuya zilitwale." 
Ezekiel34:30 Kwa njalo ziya kukwazi okokuba mna Yehova, utixo wazo, ndinazo, nokuba zona zingabantu bam, indlu ka‐Sirayeli, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel34:31 Nani, zigusha zam, zigusha zedlelo lam! ningabantu nina; mna ndi ngutixo wenu, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel35:1 KANJAKO ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel35:2 Nyana woluntu! beka ubuso bako ngakuyo intaba yakwa‐Sehire, uze uprofiteshe ngakuyo," 
Ezekiel35:3 uti kuyo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuwe, ntaba yakwa‐Sehire! ndandiya kwolula isandla sam ngakuwe, ndikwenze ube yingcitakalo nentshabalalo." 
Ezekiel35:4 Izixeko zako ndozenza amanxuwa, nawe woba yingcitakalo; wauya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel35:5 Ngenxa yokuba ubunobutshaba bakudala, nokuba walweyelisela usapo luka‐Sirayeli ngamandla eṙele, ngexesha lelishwa lalo, ngexesha lenkohlakalo yesipelo:" 
Ezekiel35:6 ngako oko, ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ngenyaniso ndokwenza ube ligazi, liti igazi likuputume: ukuba ungatiyanga igazi, kukona igazi liya kukuputuma." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ndandiya kuyenza intaba yakwa‐Sehire ibe yingcitakalo nentshabalalo, ndinqamle kwa kuyo odlulayo nobuyayo." 
Ezekiel35:8 Nentaba zake ndozizalisa ngabahlatyiweyo bake; induli zako, nezihlambo zako, nazo zonke intili zako, abahlatyiweyo ngeṙele bowa kuzo." 
Ezekiel35:9 Ndiya kukwenza ingcitakalo engunapakade, nezixeko zako zona aziyi kumiwa; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel35:10 Ngokokuba ute: Ezizizwe zibini nalamazwe mabini oba ngawam, siya kulifuya ke; — nakuba uyehova ebeko kona;" 
Ezekiel35:11 ngako oko, ndihleli nje mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, sendiya kwenza njengomsindo wako nanjengomona wako, obusenza ngawo ngotiyo lwako ngakubo; ndandiya kwaziwa pakati kwabo, okuya ndikugwebileyo." 
Ezekiel35:12 Wauya kukwazi okokuba mna Yehova ndizivile zonke izigxeko zako, ozitetileyo ngakuzo intaba zakwa‐Sirayeli, usiti: Zicitakele, zipiwe tina zibe kukudla." 
Ezekiel35:13 Kwa njalo uzenzile mkulu ngakum ngomlomo wako, namazwi ako uwandisile ngakum; ndivile ke." 
Ezekiel35:14 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Nxa kuvuya ilizwe lonke, ndiya kukwenza ingcitakalo." 
Ezekiel35:15 Njengokuba ubuvuyela ilifa lendlu ka‐Sirayeli ngenxa yokuba licitakele, ndiya kwenje njalo kuwe: woba yingcitakalo, ntaba yakwa‐Sehire! nayo yonke i‐Edome, yona yonke; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel36:1 Kanjalo wena, nyana woluntu! profitesha kuzo intaba zakwa‐Sirayeli, uti: Zintaba zakwa‐Sirayeli! yivani ilizwi likayehova." 
Ezekiel36:2 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngokokuba utshaba lute pezu kwenu: Tshotsho! kwa imimango engunapakade iyeyetu ibe yimfuyo! 
Ezekiel36:3 ngako oko profitesha uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngokuba, ewe ngokokuba benicitakalisile, nokuba beniginyile ngamacala onke, ukuze nibe yimfuyo kwisisalela sabaheyideni, nokuze nitatyatelwe emlonyeni womshwabuli, niyintlebo yabantu nje;" 
Ezekiel36:4 ngako oko, zintaba zakwa‐Sirayeli! yivani ilizwi lenkosi likayehova: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova kuzo intaba nakuzo induli, kuzo intili nakuzo izihlambo, nakuwo amanxuwa acitakeleyo, nakuzo izixeko ezishiyiweyo, ezaba yinto yokupangwa neyokugculelwa kwisisalela sabaheyideni abangqongayo:" 
Ezekiel36:5 ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenyaniso ngomlilo wobukwele bam nditetile ngakuso isisalela sabaheyideni, nangakuyo i‐Edome yonke; abo balimisileyo ilizwe lam libe yimfuyo kubo, ngokuvuya kwentliziyo yonke, ngokucekisa kwompefumlo, ukuze balipange libe lixoba." 
Ezekiel36:6 Ngako oko profitesha pezu kwelizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli, uti kuzo intaba nakuzo induli, kuzo intili nakuzo izihlambo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, nditetile ngobukwele bam nangobuṙalaṙume bam, ngenxa yokuba nilitwele ihlazo labaheyideni." 
Ezekiel36:7 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ndipakamisile isandla sam, ukuti: Ngenyaniso abaheyideni abaningqongayo, bona baya kutwala ihlazo labo." 
Ezekiel36:8 Kodwa nina, zintaba zakwa‐Sirayeli! niya kunika amasebe enu, nesiqa̔mo senu niya kusihlanzela abantu bam o‐Sirayeli; ngokuba sebekufupi ukuza." 
Ezekiel36:9 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndingecala lenu, ndandiya kubeka kuni, naniya kulinywa nihlwayelwe nokuhlwayelwa." 
Ezekiel36:10 Kanjalo ndiya kwandisa pezu kwenu abantu, yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli, yona yonke; ziya kuti izixeko zimiwe, nendawo ezicitakeleyo zakiwe." 
Ezekiel36:11 Ewe ndiya kwandisa pezu kwenu abantu nezilo, abaya kwanda, bacu̔me nokucu̔ma; ndandiya kunihlalisa njengokwapambili ukumila kwenu, ndi n enzele okulungileyo ngapezu kwokwokuqala kwenu; naniya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ndaye ndiya kubenza abantu bahambe pezu kwenu, abantu bam o‐Sirayeli; abaya kukufuya, wauya kuba lilifa labo, uze ungapindi kanjako ukubahluta abantwana." 
Ezekiel36:13 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yokuba besiti kuni: U lilizwe elidlayo abantu, nelihlutayo izizwe zako abantwana;" 
Ezekiel36:14 ngako oko abantu akuyi kubuya ubadle, nezizwe zako akuyi kubuya uzihlute abantwana, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel36:15 Ndandiya kwenza ukuba kungabuyi kuviwe kuwe ihlazo labaheyideni, nesigxeko sentlanga akuyi kubuya usitwale; kanjako izizwe zako akuyi kubuya uziku̔bekise, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel36:16 LABUYA leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel36:17 Nyana woluntu! indlu ka‐Sirayeli, bakuhlala emhlabeni wabo, bandula banco̔lisa wona ngendlela yabo nangezenzo zabo; indlela yabo ibisebusweni bam njengokunco̔la kwomfazi owahlukeneyo." 
Ezekiel36:18 Ngako ndatulula ubuṙalaṙume bam pezu kwabo, ngenxa yegazi ababelipalazile elizweni, nangenxa yezitixwana zabo a babelinco̔lisile ngazo." 
Ezekiel36:19 Ndaza ndabati sa pakati kwabaheyideni, bacitwa pakati kwamazwe: ngokwendlela yabo nangokwezenzo zabo ndabagweba." 
Ezekiel36:20 Bati bakufika kubaheyideni, apo baya kona, bandula balidyoba igama lam elingcwele, ekubeni bekusitwa kubo: Ngabantu bakayehova aba, nakulo ilizwe lake bapumile." 
Ezekiel36:21 Kodwa ndabendinosizi ngenxa yegama lam elingcwele, eyabite indlu ka‐Sirayeli yalidyoba pakati kwabaheyideni, apo bafika kona." 
Ezekiel36:22 Ngako oko yiti kuyo indlu ka‐Sirayeli: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Akungenxa yenu endikwenza oku, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! koko kungenxa yegama lam elingcwele, enilidyobileyo pakati kwabaheyideni, apo nifikile kona." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ndandiya kungcwalisa igama lam elikulu, elidyojiweyo pakati kwabaheyideni, enilidyobileyo pakati kwabo; baye abaheyideni beya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ndakungcwaliswa kuni pambi kwamehlo abo." 
Ezekiel36:24 Ngokuba ndiya kunitabata kubaheyideni, ndinibute emazweni onke, ndinizise kowenu umhlaba." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ndandiya kutshiza pezu kwenu amanzi amhlope, naniya kuhlambuluka; kuko konke ukunco̔la kwenu, nakuzo zonke izitixwana zenu, ndonihlambulula." 
Ezekiel36:26 Kanjalo ndoninika intliziyo entsha, nomoya omtsha ndowubeka pakati kwenu; ndandiya kususa intliziyo yelitye enyameni yenu, ndininike intliziyo yenyama." 
Ezekiel36:27 Nomoya wam ndiya kumbeka pakati kwenu, ndenze ukuba nihambe emimisweni yam; nezigwebo zam niya kuzigcina, nizenze." 
Ezekiel36:28 Naniya kuhlala elizweni endalinikayo koyihlo benu; niya kuba ngabantu bam, nam ndoba ngutixo wenu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Kanjako ndonisindisa kuko konke ukunco̔la kwenu; ndobizela inqolowa, nditi yona ndiyandise, ndingayibeki pezu kwenu indlala." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ndandiya kwandisa ukuqa̔ma kwomti, nokuxakata kwentsimi; ukuze ningabuyi namkele ukugxekelwa indlala pakati kwabaheyideni." 
Ezekiel36:31 Naniya kukumbula indlela zenu ezikohlakeleyo, nezenzo zenu ezingalungileyo, nizidele ngokwenu pezu kwenkohlakalo zenu napezu kwezinto ezibuntshontsho zenu." 
Ezekiel36:32 Akungenxa yenu endikwenza oku, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, makwazeke kuni: yibani nidanile nibe nentloni ngazo indlela zenu, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Ezekiel36:33 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Emhleni endinihlambululayo kuzo zonke inkohlakalo zenu, sendiya ku ni hlalisa ezixekweni, nendawo ezicitakeleyo ziya kwakiwa." 
Ezekiel36:34 Nelizwe elibe libugxwayiba lona liya kulinywa, endaweni yokuba libugxwayiba emehlweni abo bonke abadlulayo." 
Ezekiel36:35 Baye beya kuti: Elilizwe, elibe libugxwayiba, liba njengomyezo we‐Hedeni; nezixeko ezibe zibunxuwa, zibugxwayiba, zicitiwe, zona zinqatyisiwe, zimiwe." 
Ezekiel36:36 Baya kwandula bakwazi abaheyideni abaseleyo beningqonga, okokuba mna Yehova ndiyaka indawo ezicitiweyo, ndityale leyo ebibugxwayiba: mna Yehova nditetile, ndandiya kwenza." 
Ezekiel36:37 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ndoba ndisabuzelwa oku yindlu ka‐Sirayeli, ukuba ndibenzele kona; ndobandisa njengomhlambi ngabantu." 
Ezekiel36:38 Njengomhlambi oyingcwele, njengomhlambi wase‐Yerusaleme emitendelekweni yayo engcwele, kwa njalo izixeko ezibunxuwa zoba zizele yimihlambi yabantu; baye beya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel37:1 SAYE sipezu kwam isandla sikayehova; wandipumisa ngo moya kayehova, wandibeka pantsi pakati kwetafa; lona ke lalizele ngamatambo." 
Ezekiel37:2 Waza wandidlulisa ngakuwo ngendawo yonke engqongayo: kekaloku bona ke, ebemaninzi kakulu pezu kwobuso betafa; kanjalo bona ke, ebomile kakulu." 
Ezekiel37:3 Wayesiti kum: Nyana woluntu! aya kupila na amatambo la? Ndaza ndati: Nkosi Yehova! wena uyazi. 
Ezekiel37:4 Wabuya wati kum: Profitesha pezu kwamatambo la, uti kuwo: Nina matambo omileyo! yivani ilizwi likayehova." 
Ezekiel37:5 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova kulamatambo ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kungenisa kuni umoya, naniya kupila." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ndandiya kubeka imisipa pezu kwenu, ndinyuse inyama pezu kwenu, ndinigubungele ngentlonze, ndibeke kuni umoya, naniya kupila ke; naye niya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel37:7 Ndaza ndaprofitesha njengokuba bendiyalelwa; kwasuka kwabako isandi ndakuprofitesha; kekaloku nanku ukungcangcazela, ati amatambo asondelana, itambo kwitambo lalo." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ndakangela ke, kekaloku nantsi imisipa nenyama inyukile pezu kwawo, yati intlonze yawagubungela ngapezulu; kodwa umoya ubungeko kuwo." 
Ezekiel37:9 Wandula wati kum: Profitesha kumoya, profitesha, nyana woluntu! uti kumoya: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Vela, wena moya! kuyo imimoya mine, upefumle pezu kwabo aba babuleweyo, baze bapile." 
Ezekiel37:10 Ndaza ndaprofitesha njengokuba ebendiyalele; wandula umoya wangena kubo, bada bapila, bema pezu kwenyawo zabo, impi enkulu kakulu kunene." 
Ezekiel37:11 Waza wati kum: Nyana woluntu! lamatambo ayiyo yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli: bona ke, bati bona: Amatambo etu omile, netemba letu libubile; sinqamkile tina." 
Ezekiel37:12 Ngako oko profitesha uti kubo: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kuvula amancw̔aba enu, ndininyuse kuwo amancw̔aba enu, bantu bam! ndinizise emhlabeni wakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel37:13 Naye niya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, ekuvuleni kwam amancw̔aba enu, nasekuninyuseni kwam kuwo amancw̔aba enu, bantu bam!" 
Ezekiel37:14 Ndandiya kubeka kuni umoya wam, naniya kupila ke, ndoti kanjalo ndinimise emhlabeni wenu; naye niya kukwazi okokuba mna Yehova nditetile, ndenza nokwenza, utsho uyehova." 
Ezekiel37:15 LABUYA leza kum ilizwi likayehova, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel37:16 Kanjalo wena, nyana woluntu! zitabatele intonga ibe nye, uba̔le pezu kwayo ukuti: Yeka‐Juda, neyosapo luka‐Sirayeli amakolwane ake; uze utabate enye intonga, uba̔le pezu kwayo ukuti: Yeka‐Josefe, — intonga ka‐Frayime, nayo yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli amakolwane ake." 
Ezekiel37:17 Uze uzihlanganise enye kwenye, zibe yintonga nye kuwe; zaziya kuba inye esandleni sako." 
Ezekiel37:18 Naxeshekweni lutshoyo kuwe usapo lwabantu bako, lusiti: Akuyi kusixelela na ziyinina ezi kuwe?" 
Ezekiel37:19 Teta kulo, uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kutabata intonga ka‐Josefe esesandleni sika‐Frayime, nezizwe zo‐Sirayeli amakolwane ake, ndandiya kuzibeka kunye nayo, kunye nentonga ka‐Juda, ndizenze zibe yintonga nye, zaziya kuba inye esandleni sam." 
Ezekiel37:20 Kanjalo intonga oba̔layo pezu kwazo ziya kuba sesandleni sako pambi kwamehlo alo. 
Ezekiel37:21 Uze utete kulo, uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kutabata usapo luka‐Sirayeli kwa pakati kwabaheyideni, apo luye kona, ndilubute emacaleni onke, ndiluzise kowalo umhlaba." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ndandiya kulwenza lube sisizwe sinye elizweni pezu kwentaba zakwa‐Sirayeli; ukumkani emnye woba ngukumkani kulo lona lwonke; alusayi kuba sezizizwe zibini, kanjako aluyi kubuya lwahlulwe lube bubukumkani bubini napakade." 
Ezekiel37:23 Lwaye lungayi kubuya luzinco̔lise ngezitixwana zalo, nangezinto zalo ezizondekileyo, nangazo zonke izigqito zalo; koko ndiya kulusindisa kuzo zonke indawo zokuhlala zalo, ezo lwonileyo kuzo, ndiluhlambulule: kwa njalo lona lwoba ngabantu kum, nam ndoba ngutixo kulo." 
Ezekiel37:24 Isicaka sam u‐Davide soba ngukumkani pezu kwalo; umalusi emnye wobako kulo lona lwonke; nasezigwebeni zam luya kuhamba, nemimiso yam lwoyigcina, luyenze nokuyenza." 
Ezekiel37:25 Lwaluya kuhlala elizweni endalinikayo kwisicaka sam ku‐Yakobi, elo babehleli kulo oyihlo benu; ewe luya kuhlala kulo, lona nabantwana balo, nabantwana babantwana balo kude kube ngunapakade; no‐Davide, isicaka sam, yena woba yinkosi yalo kude kube ngunapakade." 
Ezekiel37:26 Kanjako ndolwenza nalo ucebano lwoxolo; lucebano olungunapakade oluya kubako nalo; ndandiya kulumisa, ndilwandise, ndiyibeke indawo yam eyingcwele pakati kwalo kude kube ngunapakade." 
Ezekiel37:27 Netabanakele yam yona yoba pezu kwalo; ndandiya kuba ngutixo walo, luti lona lube ngabantu bam." 
Ezekiel37:28 Baye abaheyideni beya kukwazi okokuba mna Yehova ndiyabangcwalisa o‐Sirayeli, nxa indawo yam eyingcwele iya kubako pakati kwabo kude kube ngunapakade." 
Ezekiel38:1 LAYE ilizwi likayehova lisiza kum, lisiti:" 
Ezekiel38:2 Nyana woluntu! beka ubuso bako ngakuye u‐Goge welizwe lakwa‐Magoge, inkosi ye‐Roshi, i‐Mesheki, ne‐Tubali, uprofiteshe ngakuye," 
Ezekiel38:3 uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuwe, Goge, nkosi ye‐Roshi, i‐Mesheki, ne‐Tubali!" 
Ezekiel38:4 ndandiya kukubuyisa, ndifake amaqeṙu emihlatini yako; ndoti kanjalo ndikupumise wena nayo yonke impi yako, amahashe nabakweli bamahashe, bonke bevatisiwe ngento ebungcwalisa, umhlambi omkulu unamakaka namakakana, bepete amaṙele bonke:" 
Ezekiel38:5 ama‐Peresiya, nama‐Tiyopiya, nama‐Pute kunye nawo, enekakana nomnqwazi onke;" 
Ezekiel38:6 u‐Gomere nawo onke amabandla ake; indlu ka‐Togama yasemacaleni asenode, nawo onke amabandla ake; abantu abaninzi benawe." 
Ezekiel38:7 Yiba ulungile, uzilungisele, wena nawo wonke umhlambi wako ohlanganiseneyo kuwe, uze ube ngumlindi kubo." 
Ezekiel38:8 Emveni kwemihla emininzi uya kumiselwa; ekupeleni kweminyaka uya kuza kwilizwe elibuyisiweyo eṙeleni, elibutiweyo ezizweni ezininzi, pezu kwentaba zakwa‐Sirayeli, ezibe zibugxwayiba futi; elite lona lapunyiswa ezizweni, baza abantu bahlala ngokunqaba bonke." 
Ezekiel38:9 Uya kunyuka ke, uya kuza njengalo uquta, woba njengelifu ukugubungela ilizwe, wena nawo onke amabandla ako, nabantu abaninzi kunye nawe." 
Ezekiel38:10 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ziya kunyuka izinto entliziyweni yako, wauya kuqinga iqinga elikohlakeleyo," 
Ezekiel38:11 uti: Ndonyuka ndiye ezweni lemizi, ndoza kubo abasekwonwabeni, abahlala ngokunqaba; abati bonke bahlale bengenandonga, kungeko imivalo nengcango kubo;" 
Ezekiel38:12 ukutimba itimbo, nokupanga impango; ukusonga isandla sako pezu kwamanxuwa amiweyo kanjako, nangakubo abantu abahlanganisiweyo kubaheyideni, abaqwebileyo inkomo nempahla, abahlala enkalweni yelizwe." 
Ezekiel38:13 I‐Sheba, ne‐Dedane, nabatengisi base‐Tareshishe, nazo zonke ingonyamana zayo, baya kuti kuwe: Uze wena ukutimba itimbo na? uhlanganisile umhlambi wako ukupanga impango na? ukususa isilivere negolide na? ukutabata inkomo nempahla na? ukutimba itimbo elikulu na?" 
Ezekiel38:14 Ngako oko profitesha, nyana woluntu! uti kuye u‐Goge: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngalomhla okuya abantu bam o‐Sirayeli bahlala ngokunqaba, akuyi kwazi na?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Uya kuza ke uvela endaweni yako, emacaleni asenode, wena nabantu abaninzi kunye nawe, bekwele emahasheni bonke, umhlambi omkulu, impi eyinto eninzi:" 
Ezekiel38:16 wauya kunyuka ngakubo abantu bam o‐Sirayeli, njengelifu, ukugubungela ilizwe; ekupeleni kwemihla kuya kubako; ndandiya kukuzisa ngakulo ilizwe lam, ukuze abaheyideni bandazi mna, ndakungcwaliswa kuwe, Goge! pambi kwamehlo abo." 
Ezekiel38:17 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Wena unguye na enditetileyo ngaye emihleni yakudala, ngesandla sezicaka zam abaprofite bakwa‐Sirayeli, abaprofiteshayo kulomihla, iminyaka mininzi, ukuba ndiya kukuzisa ngakubo?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Kwaye kuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ngomhla aya kuza u‐Goge pezu kwomhlaba wakwa‐Sirayeli, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, buya kunyuka ubuṙalaṙume bam empumlweni zam." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ngokuba ngobukwele bam, ngomlilo womsindo wam, nditetile ukuti: Ngenyaniso ngomhla lowo kuya kubako ukungcangcazela okukulu emhlabeni wakwa‐Sirayeli!" 
Ezekiel38:20 zaziya kungcangcazela pambi kwam intlanzi zolwandle, nentaka zezulu, nezilo zasendle, nazo zonke izinambuzane ezinambuzelayo emhlabeni, nabo bonke abantu abapezu kwobuso bomhlaba; kanjalo intaba ziya kucitwa, namawa aya kuwa, nazo zonke indonga zowa ngasemhlabeni." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ndandiya bubizela iṙele ngakuye kuzo zonke intaba zam, itsho inkosi e nguyehova; iṙele lomnye loba ngakuye umlingane wake." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ndandiya kupika naye ngesifo esibubisayo nangegazi; nemvula ekukulayo, nezico̔to ezikulu, nomlilo, nesufure, ndozinisa pezu kwake, napezu kwamabandla ake, napezu kwabantu abaninzi abanaye." 
Ezekiel38:23 Kwa njalo ndiya kuzenza mkulu, ndizingcwalise; ndandiya kwazeka pambi kwamehlo ezizwe ezininzi, eziya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel39:1 Ngako wena, nyana woluntu! profitesha ngakuye u‐Goge, uti: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndingakuwe, Goge, nkosi ye‐Roshi, i‐Mesheki, ne‐Tubali!" 
Ezekiel39:2 ndandiya kukubuyisa, ndikukape, ndikunyuse emacaleni asenode, ndikuzise pezu kwentaba zakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel39:3 Ndandiya kusiti kahla isipeta sako esandleni sako sokohlo, nentolo zako ndoziwisa esandleni sako sokunene." 
Ezekiel39:4 Pezu kwentaba zakwa‐Sirayeli uya kuwa, wena, nawo onke amabandla ako, nabantu abanawe; ndokunika kwintakakazi zamapiko onke, nakumaṙamncwa asendle, ube kukudla." 
Ezekiel39:5 Pezu kwobuso belizwe uya kuwa; ngokuba nditetile mna, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ndandiya kutuma umlilo kwa‐Magoge, napakati kwabo abahlala eziqitini ngokunqaba; babeya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova." 
Ezekiel39:7 Negama lam elingcwele ndolazisa pakati kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli; ndandingayi kubuya ndilidyobe igama lam elingcwele: baye abaheyideni beya kukwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, oyingcwele kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel39:8 Bona ke, kuyeza, kuya kwenziwa kanjalo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova; nguwo umhla enditetileyo ngawo." 
Ezekiel39:9 Baya kwandula bapume abemi bezixeko zakwa‐Sirayeli, bapembe umlilo, babase ngazo izixo̔bo, kwa amakakana namakaka, ngezipeta nangentolo, ngengcola nangentshuntshe, bapembe umlilo ngazo iminyaka isixe̔nxe;" 
Ezekiel39:10 baze bangatezi inkuni ezindleni, bangazigauli emahlatini kanjalo, ngokuba beya kupemba umlilo ngezixo̔bo; babeya kutimba abo babetimba bona, bapange abo babepanga bona, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel39:11 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ndiya kunika u‐Goge indawo kona yamancw̔aba kwa‐Sirayeli, isihlambo sabadluli ngasempumalanga yolwandle, esiya kubambezela abadluli; babeya kuncw̔aba kona u‐Goge naso sonke isihlwele sake, basibize ngokuti sisihlambo se‐Hamone‐goge." 
Ezekiel39:12 Zoba zinyanga ezisixe̔nxe indlu ka‐Sirayeli iya kubancw̔aba, ukuze kucokiswe ilizwe." 
Ezekiel39:13 Ewe, bonke abantu belizwe baya kuncw̔aba, okuya kuba ludumo kubo, mhlana ndiya kwenzelwa ubungcwalisa, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel39:14 Babeya kubalula amadoda afuti emsebenzini, edlula elizweni, ebancw̔aba kunye nabadluli abo baseleyo pezu kwobuso belizwe, alicokise: ekupeleni kwenyanga ezisixe̔nxe aya kupengulula." 
Ezekiel39:15 Kwoti bakudlula abadluli elizweni, nxa kubonwa itambo lomntu, kwandule kumiswe ngakulo intsika, bade abancw̔abi balincw̔abe esihlanjeni se‐Hamone‐goge." 
Ezekiel39:16 Nakanjako igama lesixeko sakona soba yi‐Hamona. Kwa njalo baya kucokisa ilizwe. 
Ezekiel39:17 Nawe, nyana woluntu! itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Yiti kuzo intaka zamapiko onke, nakuwo onke amaṙamncwa asendle: Butani nize ke, zihlanganiseni ngamacala onke ukuza embingweni wam endiwubingela nina, umbingo omkulu pezu kwentaba zakwa‐Sirayeli; naniya kuyidla inyama, nisele igazi." 
Ezekiel39:18 Inyama yamaṙoti niya kuyidla, negazi lenkosana zomhlaba nolisela; elenkunzi zegusha, n emvana, nebokwe, n enkabi, zizezityebileyo zase‐Bashane zonke." 
Ezekiel39:19 Niya kulidla inqata nide nihlute, nisele igazi nide ninxile, kumbingo wam endiwubingela nina." 
Ezekiel39:20 Naniya kuhluta esitebeni sam ngamahashe nabakweli, ngamaṙoti nawo onke amadoda okulwa, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel39:21 Ndandiya kumisa ubungcwalisa bam pakati kwabaheyideni; baye bonke abaheyideni beya kubona umgwebo wam endiwenzileyo, nesandla sam endisibekileyo pezu kwabo:" 
Ezekiel39:22 ize indlu ka‐Sirayeli yazi ukuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wabo, kwa kuwo umhla lowo nangexesha elizayo:" 
Ezekiel39:23 bati nabaheyideni bazi ukuba indlu ka‐Sirayeli yabifuduswa ngenxa yenkohlakalo yabo, ngenxa yokuba bebegqitile ngakum, ndaza ndabafihlela ubuso bam, ndabanikela esandleni sentshaba zabo, bada bawa ngerele bona bonke." 
Ezekiel39:24 Njengokwokunco̔la kwabo nanjengokwezigqito zabo ndenzile kubo, ndabafihlela ubuso bam." 
Ezekiel39:25 Noko ke, itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Kaloku ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kuka‐Yakobi, ndiyipate ngetaṙu yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli, ndibe nobukwele pezu kwegama lam elingcwele;" 
Ezekiel39:26 bakuba betwele ihlazo labo, nabo bonke ubumenemene babo abenzileyo ngabo ngakum, okuya babehleli emhlabeni wabo ngokunqaba, kungeko namnye obeboyikisa." 
Ezekiel39:27 Nxa ndibabuyisile ebantwini, ndababuta emazweni entshaba zabo, na nxa ndingcwalisiwe kubo pambi kwamehlo ezizwe ezininzi;" 
Ezekiel39:28 baya kwandula bakwazi okokuba mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wabo, ekubeni bendibafudusela kubaheyideni, koko ndibuye ndabahlanganisela emhlabeni wabo, ndingasasalisanga mntu kubo kona." 
Ezekiel39:29 Ndaye ndingasayi kubafihlela ubuso bam, oko ndigaleleyo umoya wam pezu kwendlu ka‐Sirayeli, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel40:1 NGOMNYAKA wamashumi mabini anesihlanu wokufuduswa kwetu, ekuqaleni kwomnyaka, ngoweshumi umhla wenyanga, ngomnyaka weshumi linesine emveni kwokuba isixeko sabetwa, ngokwa nguwo umhla lowo isandla sikayehova sibe sipezu kwam, waza wandizisa kona." 
Ezekiel40:2 Emibonisweni katixo wandizisa elizweni lakwa‐Sirayeli, wandibeka pantsi entabeni ende kakulu, ebekupezu kwayo njengesakiwo sesixeko ngasesuyide." 
Ezekiel40:3 Waza wandizisa kona; kekaloku nantsiya indoda, ekubonakala bekunjengokubonakala kwexina, inentsontelo yefelase esandleni sayo, nengcongolo yokulinganisa, eyema esangweni." 
Ezekiel40:4 Yaza yateta kum indoda leyo, isiti: Nyana woluntu! kangela ngamehlo ako, uve ngendlebe zako, ubeke intliziyo yako kuko konke endiya kukubonisa; ngokuba kungenxa yokuboniswa kwako uzisiwe apa: kuxele konke okubonayo kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel40:5 Kekaloku nalu udonga ngapandle kwendlu ngokungqonga, nasesandleni salondoda ingcongolo yokulinganisa, izikubite zintandatu ngekubite nobubanzi besandla; yaza yalinganisa ububanzi besakiwo, ingcongolo inye, nobupakamo baso, ingcongolo inye." 
Ezekiel40:6 Yandula yeza esangweni elibonana nempumalanga, yenyuka ngezinyukelo zalo, yalinganisa umnyango wesango, ingcongolo inye ububanzi bawo, kwa umnyango umnye, ingcongolo inye ububanzi bawo;" 
Ezekiel40:7 nendlwana, ingcongolo inye ubude bayo, nengcongolo inye ububanzi bayo; napakati kwazo indlwana, ikubite zintlanu; nomnyango wesango ngecala lentendelezo yesango ngapakati, incongolo inye." 
Ezekiel40:8 Yalinganisa nentendelezo yesango ngapakati, ingcongolo inye." 
Ezekiel40:9 Yandula yalinganisa intendelezo yesango, ikubite zisibozo; nezibonda zayo, ikubite zimbini; nentendelezo yesango ngapakati." 
Ezekiel40:10 Nendlwana zesango ngasempumalanga, bezintatu ngelinye icala, bezintatu nangelinye icala; bezinomlinganiswa mnye zontatu; kanjalo izibonda bezinomlinganiswa mnye ngelicala nangeliya." 
Ezekiel40:11 Yaza yalinganisa ububanzi bocango lwesango, ikubite zilishumi; ubude besango bebuzikubite zilishumi linesitatu." 
Ezekiel40:12 Kwaye kuko pambi kwazo indlwana umda wekubite inye ngelinye icala, nomda wekubite inye ngelinye icala; ezondlwana ngazinye zibe zizikubite zintandatu ngelicala, nekubite zintandatu ngeliya." 
Ezekiel40:13 Yandula yalinganisa isango kwa kuyo intungo yenye indlwana kwada kwakuyo intungo yenye; ububanzi bebuzikubite ezingamashumi mabini anantlanu, ucango lulunge nocango." 
Ezekiel40:14 Yayizenza izibonda, ikubite ezingamashumi matandatu, kwada kwakuso isibonda sebala elingqonga isango." 
Ezekiel40:15 Nangapambi kwesango lokungena, ngapambi kwentendelezo yesango lapakati, ikubite ezingamashumi mahlanu." 
Ezekiel40:16 Kwaye kuko ifenstile ezivaliweyo kuzo indlwana, nakuzo izibonda zazo pakati kwesango ngokungqonga; nakuzo intendelezo kanjalo; kwako nefenstile ngento engqongayo ngapakati, napezu kwezibonda imiti yepalime." 
Ezekiel40:17 Yaza yandizisa ebaleni langapandle; kekaloku nanzi inkambili, nesandlalwa samatye senzelwe ibala ngento engqongayo; bekuko inkambili ezingamashumi matatu pezu kwesandlalwa eso." 
Ezekiel40:18 Kekaloku isandlalwa samatye besingecala lamasango, silunge nobude bamasango; sisesasezantsi isandlalwa samatye esi." 
Ezekiel40:19 Yandula yalinganisa ububanzi kwa kuwo umpambili wesango lasezantsi, pambi kwebala lapakati ngapandle, ikulu lekubite, ngasempumalanga nangasenode." 
Ezekiel40:20 Nesango lebala lapandle, elibonana nenode, yalinganisa ubude balo nobubanzi balo." 
Ezekiel40:21 Nendlwana zalo, bezintatu ngelinye icala, bezintatu nangelinye icala; izibonda zalo nentendelezo zalo zibe zinjengomlinganiswa wesango lokuqala; zikubite ezingamashumi mahlanu ubude balo, nobubanzi zikubite ezingamashumi mabini anantlanu." 
Ezekiel40:22 Ifenstile zalo, nentendelezo zalo, nemiti yepalime yalo, bezinjengomlinganiswa wesango elibonana nempumalanga; kwenyukelwa kulo ngezinyukelo zisixe̔nxe, intendelezo zalo zipambi kwazo." 
Ezekiel40:23 Isango lelapakati ibala libe lilunge nesango ngasenode, nangasempumalanga; yaza yalinganisa kwa kulo elinye isango kwada kwakulo elinye isango ikulu lekubite." 
Ezekiel40:24 Yandula yandihambisa ngasesuyide; kekaloku nali isango ngasesuyide; yaza yalinganisa izibonda zalo nentendelezo zalo, njengemilinganiswa leyo." 
Ezekiel40:25 Kwaye kuko ifenstile kulo nakuzo intendelezo zalo ngokungqonga, njengefenstile ezo: ubude bebuzikubite ezingamashumi mahlanu, nobubanzi bebuzikubite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu." 
Ezekiel40:26 Ukunyukelwa kwalo bekungezinyukelo zisixe̔nxe, nentendelezo zalo bezipambi kwazo; laye linemiti yepalime, omnye ngelicala nomnye ngeliya icala, pezu kwezibonda zalo." 
Ezekiel40:27 Bekuko nesango kwelapakati ibala ngasesuyide; yaza yalinganisa kwa kulo elinye isango kwada kwakulo elinye isango ikulu lekubite. 
Ezekiel40:28 Yandula yandizisa ebaleni lapakati ngesango lasesuyide; yaza yalinganisa isango lasesuyide, njengemilinganiswa leyo." 
Ezekiel40:29 Indlwana zalo, nezibonda zalo, nentendelezo zalo, zibe zinjengemilinganiswa leyo; kwaye kuko ifenstile kulo nakuzo intendelezo zalo ngokungqonga: ubude bebuzikubite ezingamashumi mahlanu, nobubanzi bebuzikubite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu." 
Ezekiel40:30 Kwaye kuko intendelezo ngento engqongayo; ubude bebuzikubite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu, nobubanzi bebuzikubite zintlanu." 
Ezekiel40:31 Intendelezo zalo bezingakulo ibala langapandle; kanjalo imiti yepalime ibipezu kwezibonda zalo; nokunyukelwa kwalo bekungezinyukelo zisibozo. 
Ezekiel40:32 Yandula yandizisa ebaleni lapakati ngasempumalanga; yaza yalinganisa isango njengemilinganiswa leyo. 
Ezekiel40:33 Indlwana zalo, nezibonda zalo, nentendelezo zalo, zibe zinjengemilinganiswa leyo; kwaye kuko ifenstile kulo nakuzo intendelezo zalo ngokungqonga: ubude bebuzikubite ezingamashumi mahlanu, nobubanzi bebuzikubite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu." 
Ezekiel40:34 Intendelezo zalo bezingakulo ibala langapandle; kanjalo imiti yepalime ibipezu kwezibonda zalo, ngelicala nangeliya; nokunyukelwa kwalo bekungezinyukelo zisibozo." 
Ezekiel40:35 Yandula yandizisa esangweni lasenode, yalinganisa njengemilinganiswa leyo." 
Ezekiel40:36 Indlwana zalo, izibonda zalo, nentendelezo zalo, nefenstile ezikulo ngokungqonga; ubude bebuzikubite ezingamashumi mahlanu, nobubanzi bebuzikubite ezimashumi mabini anantlanu." 
Ezekiel40:37 Izibonda zalo bezingakulo ibala langapandle: kanjalo imiti yepalime ibipezu kwezibonda zalo, ngelicala nangeliya; nokunyukelwa kwalo bekungezinyukelo zisibozo." 
Ezekiel40:38 Kwaye kuko inkambili nengcango zazo ngakuzo izibonda zamasango; kona apo bekuhlanzwa idini lokutshiswa. 
Ezekiel40:39 Nasentendelezweni yesango bekuko itafile zimbini ngelicala, netafile zimbini ngeliya icala, kuze kuxe̔lwe pezu kwazo idini lokutshiswa, nedini lesono, nedini letyala." 
Ezekiel40:40 Nasecaleni langapandle, ekunyukeni ukuya elucangweni lwesango lasenode, bekuko itafile zimbini; nakwelinye icala, ebelisentendelezweni yesango, bekuko itafile zimbini." 
Ezekiel40:41 Bekuko itafile zine ngelicala, netafile zine ngeliya, ngasecaleni lesango; itafile zisibozo ebekuxe̔lwa pezu kwazo." 
Ezekiel40:42 Netafile zone zedini lokutshiswa bezizezamatye aqandulweyo, ubude buyikubite inye nesiqingata sekubite, nobubanzi buyikubite inye nesiqingata sekubite, nobupakamo buyikubite inye: napezu kwazo kwaye kubekwa impahla ebekuxe̔lwa ngazo idini lokutshiswa nombingo." 
Ezekiel40:43 Kanjalo amabaxa, epuma ububanzi besandla, ebeqinisiwe ngapakati ngento engqongayo; napezu kwetafile bekuko inyama yomnikelo." 
Ezekiel40:44 Nangapandle kwesango lapakati bekuko inkambili zabaculi ebaleni lapakati, elibe lingasecaleni lesango lasenode; zabonana nesuyide; kwako enye ngasecaleni lesango lasempumalanga, ibonana nenode." 
Ezekiel40:45 Yaza yateta kum, isiti: Lenkambili, ebonana nesuyide, yeyabaperisite, abagcini besigcinelo sendlu." 
Ezekiel40:46 Nenkambili ebonana nenode yeyabaperisite, abagcini besigcinelo sesibingelo; aba bangonyana baka‐Tsadoki, abati kulo usapo luka‐Levi basondele kuyehova ukuza kumkonza." 
Ezekiel40:47 Yaza yalinganisa ibala; ubude bebuzikubite zilikulu, nobubanzi bebuzikubite zilikulu, linamacala mane; saye isibingelo sipambi kwendlu." 
Ezekiel40:48 Yandula yandizisa entendelezweni yendlu, yalinganisa izibonda zentendelezo, ikubite zintlanu ngelinye icala, nekubite zintlanu ngelinye icala; nobubanzi besango, bebuzikubite zintatu ngelicala, nekubite zintatu ngeliya." 
Ezekiel40:49 Ubude bentendelezo bebuzikubite ezimashumi mabini, nobubanzi bebuzikubite ezilishumi linanye; kwaye kungezinyukelo ekube kunyukelwa kuyo; bekuko nentsika ngasezibondeni, enye ngelicala, nenye ngeliya." 
Ezekiel41:1 Yandula yandizisa etempileni, yazilinganisa izibonda, ikubite ezintandatu zibububanzi ngelinye icala, nekubite ezintandatu zibububanzi ngelinye icala, ububanzi betabanakele." 
Ezekiel41:2 Ububanzi bocango bebuzikubite zilishumi; namacala ocango, ebezikubite zintlanu ngelicala, nekubite zintlanu ngeliya: yayilinganisa ubude bayo, ikubite ezingamashumi mane, nobubanzi, ikubite ezimashumi mabini." 
Ezekiel41:3 Yaza yangena ngapakati, yalinganisa isibonda socango, ikubite zimbini; nocango, ikubite zintandatu; nobubanzi bocango, ikubite zisixe̔nxe." 
Ezekiel41:4 Yalinganisa ubude bayo, ikubite ezimashumi mabini, nobubanzi, ikubite ezimashumi mabini, ngapambi kwetempile; yaza yati kum: Le yingcwele yezingcwele." 
Ezekiel41:5 Yandula yalinganisa udonga lwendlu, ikubite zintandatu; nobubanzi benkambili zasecaleni ngazinye, ikubite zine, ngento engqongayo indlu ngamacala onke." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ezonkambili zasecaleni zibe ziyinkambili pezu kwenkambili, zintatu; zazingamashumi matatu ngokulandelana; zaye zingena eludongeni olube lulolwendlu ngenxa yenkambili zasecaleni ngokungqonga, ukuba zibe nokubambeka; koko bezingabambeki eludongeni lwendlu." 
Ezekiel41:7 Kwaye kuko ukwenziwa banzi nokujikelela futi ngapezulu kuzo inkambili zasecaleni; ngokuba ukujikelela kwendlu bekufuti ngapezulu ngokungqonga indlu; ngako oko ububanzi bendlu ubungapezulu; nangokunjalo eyasezantsi yenyuka ngakweyapezulu ngeyapakati. 
Ezekiel41:8 Ndaza ndabona ubupakamo bendlu ngokungqonga: imisekelo yenkambili zasecaleni ibiyingcongolo ezeleyo, ikubite zintandatu ezinkulu." 
Ezekiel41:9 Ububanzi bodonga, olulolwenkambili yasecaleni ngapandle, bebuzikubite zintlanu; kwako indawo eyekiweyo ebiyindawo yenkambili zasecaleni ezizezendlu." 
Ezekiel41:10 Napakati kwazo inkambili bekuko ububanzi bekubite ezimashumi mabini, ngento engqongayo indlu ngamacala onke." 
Ezekiel41:11 Zaye ingcango zenkambili zasecaleni zingakuyo indawo eyekiweyo, olunye ucango lungasenode, nolunye ucango lungasesuyide; nobubanzi bayo indawo eyekiweyo bebuzikubite zintlanu ngokungqonga." 
Ezekiel41:12 Nesakiwo esibe sipambi kwayo indawo eyahlukileyo ngecala lasentshonalanga, ububanzi baso bebuzikubite ezingamashumi asixe̔nxe; nodonga lwesakiwo bebuzikubite zintlanu ububanzi balo ngento engqongayo, nobude balo bebuzikubite ezingamashumi alitoba." 
Ezekiel41:13 Yaza yalinganisa indlu, ubude bulikulu lekubite; nendawo eyahlukileyo, nesakiwo, nendonga zaso, ubude bulikulu lekubite;" 
Ezekiel41:14 nobubanzi bompambili wendlu, nobendawo eyahlukileyo ngasempumalanga, ikulu lekubite." 
Ezekiel41:15 Yaza yalinganisa ubude besakiwo ngapambi kwendawo eyahlukileyo ebingasemva kwaso, nendawo ezipumayo zaso ngelicala nangeliya, ikulu lekubite; yalinganisa netempile yapakati, nentendelezo zebala," 
Ezekiel41:16 iminyango, nefenstile ezivaliweyo, nendawo ezipumayo ngokungqonga inkambili ntatu zazo, malungana nomnyango, isalekwa semiti ngento engqongayo; na kuwo umhlaba kwada kwakuzo ifenstile; zaye ifenstile zigujungelwe;" 
Ezekiel41:17 pezulu pezu kwomnyango, kude kwasendlwini pakati, nangapandle, nakulo lwonke udonga ngento engqongayo, pakati nangapandle, kwatatyatwa imilinganiswa." 
Ezekiel41:18 Kwaye kwenziwe ikerubime nemiti yepalime; bekuko umti wepalime pakati kwekerubime nekerubime; kanjalo ikerubime zibe zinobuso bubini ngazinye: 
Ezekiel41:19 ubuso bomntu bebungakuwo umti wepalime ngelinye icala, nobuso bengonyama ngakuwo umti wepalime ngelinye icala; kwenziwa njalo kuyo yonke indlu ngokungqonga." 
Ezekiel41:20 Kwa kuwo umhlaba kwada kwapezulu kwocango kwenziwa ikerubime nemiti yepalime, na pezu kwalo udonga lwetempile." 
Ezekiel41:21 Imigubasi yetempile ibinamacala mane; nobuso beyingcwele indawo, okunye ukubonakala bekunjeng okunye ukubonakala." 
Ezekiel41:22 Isibingelo semiti ubupakamo baso bebuzikubite zintatu, nobude baso bebuzikubite zimbini; amagumbi aso, nobude baso, nendonga zaso, zenziwa ngemiti: yaza yateta kum, isiti: Le yitafile esebusweni bukayehova." 
Ezekiel41:23 Kwaye kuko ingcango zimbini kuyo itempile nakweyingcwele indawo. 
Ezekiel41:24 Bekuko kanjalo amapepa mabini kuzo ingcango, amapepa mabini ajingayo; amapepa mabini kolunye ucango, namapepa mabini kolunye." 
Ezekiel41:25 Kwenziwa pezu kwazo, pezu kwengcango zetempile, ikerubime nemiti yepalime, njengokuba bekwenziwe ezindongeni; kwaye kuko indawo yeplanke zemiti ngapambi kwentendelezo ngapandle." 
Ezekiel41:26 Bekuko kanjalo ifenstile ezivaliweyo nemiti yepalime ngelicala nangeliya, kuwo amacala entendelezo, nenkambili zasecaleni zendlu, nendawo yeplanke." 
Ezekiel42:1 Yandula yandipumisela ebaleni langapandle, ngendlela engasenode; yandizisa kuyo inkambili emalungana nendawo eyahlukileyo, nemalungana nesakiwo ngasenode." 
Ezekiel42:2 Ngapambi kwobude bekubite ezilikulu beluko ucango lwasenode, nobubanzi bebuzikubite ezimashumi mahlanu." 
Ezekiel42:3 Malungana nazo ikubite ezimashumi mabini ezizezebala lapakati, namalungana nesandlalwa samatye esisesebala langapandle, bekuko indawo epumayo ngakuyo indawo epumayo kwezesitatu inkambili." 
Ezekiel42:4 Napambi kwazo inkambili bekuko indawo yokuhamba yekubite ezilishumi ububanzi bayo ngapakati, n endlela yekubite inye; nengcango zazo bezingasenode." 
Ezekiel42:5 Inkambili zapezulu zibe zifutshane kwezinye; ngokuba indawo ezipumayo zacapula kwezi, kwezasezantsi nakwezapakati zesakiwo." 
Ezekiel42:6 Ngokuba zibe zinenkambili ezintatu, kodwa bezingenazo intsika njengentsika zamabala; ngako oko eyapezulu ibifinyele pezu kwezasezantsi napezu kwezapakati kwa semhlabeni." 
Ezekiel42:7 Nodonga obelungapandle malungana nazo inkambili, ngakulo ibala langapandle, ngapambi kwenkambili, ubude balo beluzikubite ezingamashumi mahlanu." 
Ezekiel42:8 Ngokuba ubude benkambili, ezibe zisebaleni langapandle, bebuzikubite ezingamashumi mahlanu; kanjalo, bona ke, pambi kwetempile bekuzikubite ezilikulu." 
Ezekiel42:9 Nangapantsi kwenkambili ezi ibiyindawo yokungena ngecala lasempumalanga, kwakuyiwa kuzo kuvela ebaleni langapandle." 
Ezekiel42:10 Inkambili zibe zisebubanzini bodonga lwebala ngasempumalanga, ngapambi kwendawo eyahlukileyo, nangapambi kwesakiwo." 
Ezekiel42:11 Nendlela pambi kwazo yabinjengokubonakala kwenkambili ezibe zingasenode, njengobude bazo, na njengobubanzi bazo; nazo zonke indawo zokupuma zazo bezinjengezimilo zazo nanjengengcango zazo." 
Ezekiel42:12 Nanjengazo ingcango zenkambili ezibe zingasesuyide, bekuko ucango entloko yendlela, indlela eti nqwa pambi kwodonga ngasempumalanga, kwakungenwa kuzo." 
Ezekiel42:13 Yaza yati kum: Inkambili zasenode, n enkambili zasesuyide, ezingapambi kwendawo eyahlukileyo, ezi zinkambili ezingcwele, apo abaperisite, abasondelayo kuyehova, baya kuzidla kona izinto eziyingcwele yezingcwele: kona apo baya kubeka izinto eziyingcwele yezingcwele, nomnikelo wokudla, nedini lesono, neletyala; ngokuba indawo leyo iyingcwele." 
Ezekiel42:14 Boti bakungena abaperisite, kebangapumi kweyingcwele indawo ukuya ebaleni langapandle, koko beya kubeka kona izivato zabo abakonza ngazo, ngokuba ziyingcwele zona; babeya kwambata izivato zimbi, basondele kweyeyabantu." 
Ezekiel42:15 Yati yakuba igqibile ukulinganiswa kwendlu pakati, yandipumisela ngakulo isango elibonana nempumalanga, yayilinganisa ngento engqongayo." 
Ezekiel42:16 Yalinganisa icala lasempumalanga ngengcongolo yokulinganisa, ingcongolo ezingamakulu mahlanu, ngengcongolo yokulinganisa ngento engqongayo." 
Ezekiel42:17 Yalinganisa icala lasenode, ingcongolo ezingamakulu mahlanu, ngengcongolo yokulinganisa ngento engqongayo." 
Ezekiel42:18 Yalinganisa icala lasesuyide, ingcongolo ezingamakulu mahlanu, ngengcongolo yokulinganisa." 
Ezekiel42:19 Yajika yaya ecaleni lasentshonalanga, yalinganisa ingcongolo ezingamakulu mahlanu ngengcongolo yokulinganisa." 
Ezekiel42:20 Yayilinganisa ngamacala omane; ibinodonga ngento engqongayo, lungamakulu mahlanu engcongolo ubude balo, namakulu mahlanu ububanzi balo, kuze kwahlulwe pakati kwokungcwele nokungengcwele." 
Ezekiel43:1 YANDULA yandizisa kulo isango, isango elibeka ngasempumalanga." 
Ezekiel43:2 Kekaloku nabuya ubungcwalisa botixo wo‐Sirayeli busiza ngendlela yasempumalanga; nentlokoma yabo ibinjengentlokoma yamanzi amaninzi; wati umhlaba wakanya ngobungcwalisa bake. 
Ezekiel43:3 Bebunjengokubonakala kwesibonakalo endasibonayo — njengesibonakalo endasibonayo ekuzeni kwam ukutshabalalisa isixeko; nezibonakalo bezinjengesibonakalo endasibonayo ngasemlanjeni we‐Kebare; ndaza ndawa ebusweni bam. 
Ezekiel43:4 Bati ubungcwalisa bukayehova bangena endlwini, ngendlela yesango elibonana nempumalanga." 
Ezekiel43:5 Wandula umoya wandifunqula, wandizisa ebaleni lapakati; kekaloku bona ke, ubungcwalisa bukayehova bayizalisa indlu." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ndaza ndamva eteta kum esendlwini; yaye indoda imi ngakum. 
Ezekiel43:7 Wayesiti kum: Nyana woluntu! le yindawo yeterone yam, nendawo yomzantsi wenyawo zam, apo ndiya kuhlala kona pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli kude kube ngunapakade; kanjalo igama lam elingcwele indlu ka‐Sirayeli ayiyi kubuya ilinco̔lise, kwa bona nokumkani babo, ngombulo wabo, nangezidumbu zokumkani babo, pezu kwendawo ezipakamileyo zabo:" 
Ezekiel43:8 ngokumisa umnyango wabo ndawonye nomnyango wam, nomgubasi wabo ngecala lomgubasi wam; ngokuba ludonga kodwa obelupakati kwam nabo: ewe, banco̔lisa igama lam elingcwele ngezinto zabo ezibuntshontsho abazenzileyo; ngako ndabagqibela ngengqumbo yam." 
Ezekiel43:9 Kaloku mabakwelelise umbulo wabo, nezidumbu zokumkani babo, kude kum, ndandiya kuhlala pakati kwabo kude kube ngunapakade." 
Ezekiel43:10 Wena, nyana woluntu! bonisa indlu ka‐Sirayeli indlu le, baze babe nentloni ngenxa yenkohlakalo zabo; kanjalo mabalinganise umfanekiselo." 
Ezekiel43:11 Ukuba ke banentloni ngenxa yako konke abakwenzileyo, bazise isimilo sendlu, nomfanekiselo wayo, nendawo zokupuma zayo, nezokungena zayo, nazo zonke izimilo zayo, nayo yonke imimiselo yayo, kwa zonke izimilo zayo, nayo yonke imiteto yayo; uze uba̔le pambi kwamehlo abo, ukuba babambe zonke izimilo zayo, nayo yonke imimiselo yayo, bayenze." 
Ezekiel43:12 Nguwo lo umteto wendlu: Pezu kwengcopo yentaba wonke umda wayo ongqongayo uyingcwele yezingcwele. Bona ke, nguwo lo umteto wendlu." 
Ezekiel43:13 Kanjalo yiyo le imilinganiswa yesibingelo ngekubite; ikubite yikubite nobubanzi besandla: Isifuba saso siyikubite inye, nekubite inye ububanzi baso; nodini lwaso ngasempetweni waso ongqongayo, sisoluko sesandla: ngumhlana wesibingelo lo." 
Ezekiel43:14 Nakuso isifuba emhlabeni kude kube sisipumelo sasezantsi, zikubite zimbini, nobubanzi yikubite inye; nakuso isipumelo esincinane kude kube kuso isipumelo esikulu, zikubite zine, nobubanzi yikubite inye." 
Ezekiel43:15 Ne‐Hareli, zikubite zine; nakuyo i‐Ariyeli kwa kude kube pezulu, zimpondo zine." 
Ezekiel43:16 Ne‐Ariyeli, ilishumi linesibini lekubite ubude bayo, ngeshumi elinesibini ububanzi bayo, inamacala mane emacaleni ayo omane." 
Ezekiel43:17 Nesipumelo, bulishumi linesine ubude baso, ngeshumi linesine ububanzi baso, emacaleni aso omane; nodini olusingqongayo, sisiqingata sekubite; nesifuba saso, yikubite ngento engqongayo; nezinyukelo zaso zibeka ngasempumalanga." 
Ezekiel43:18 Yaza yati kum: Nyana woluntu! itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Yiyo le imimiselo yesibingelo, emhleni wokwenziwa kwaso, ukunikela pezu kwaso amadini okutshiswa, nokutshiza pezu kwaso igazi." 
Ezekiel43:19 Wauya kunika abaperisite aba‐Levi, abangabakuyo inzalo ka‐Tsadoki, abasondelayo kum, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ukuza kundikonza, inkunzana elitole lenkomo ibe lidini lesono." 
Ezekiel43:20 Wauya kucapula egazini layo, ulibeke pezu kwempondo zaso zone, napezu kwamagumbi omane esipumelo, napezu kwodini ngento engqongayo; kwa njalo uya kuhlanza sona, usixolisele." 
Ezekiel43:21 Uya kwandula utabate inkunzana yedini lesono, eya kutshiswa kwemiselweyo indawo yendlu, ngapandle kweyingcwele." 
Ezekiel43:22 Nangomhla wesibini uya kunikela itakane lebokwe elimsulwa libe lidini lesono; babeya kuhlanza isibingelo, njengokuba bebesihlanza ngenkunzana." 
Ezekiel43:23 Wakuba ugqibile ukusihlanza uya kunikela inkunzana elitole lenkomo, emsulwa, nenkunzi yegusha emhlambini, emsulwa." 
Ezekiel43:24 Wauya kuzinikela ebusweni bukayehova; baye abaperisite beya kuposa ityuwa pezu kwazo, bazinikele kuyehova zibe lidini lokutshiswa." 
Ezekiel43:25 Yimihla esixe̔nxe uya kulungisa ibokwe yedini lesono imihla ngemihla; nenkunzana elitole lenkomo, nenkunzi yegusha emhlambini, ezimsulwa, baya kuzilungisa." 
Ezekiel43:26 Yimihla esixe̔nxe baya kuxolisela isibingelo, basihlambulule, bazalise izandla zabo." 
Ezekiel43:27 Yakuba ipelile lemihla, kuya kwandula kuti, ngomhla wesibozo, nangexesha eliya kuza, abaperisite baya kuwenza pezu kwesibingelo eso amadini okutshiswa enu, neminikelo yoxolo yenu; ndandiya kunibuka, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel44:1 YANDULA yandibuyisa ngendlela yesango langapandle leyingcwele indawo, elibeka ngasempumalanga; laye lona livaliwe." 
Ezekiel44:2 Waza uyehova wati kum: Isango eli loba livaliwe, aliyi kuvulwa, kanjalo akuyi kungena mntu ngalo; ngokuba uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, engenile ngalo; ngako loba livaliwe." 
Ezekiel44:3 Lelenkosi; inkosi inguye oya kuhlala kulo, ize isidle isonka ebusweni bukayehova; ngendlela yentendelezo yesango iya kungena, nangendlela yayo iya kupuma." 
Ezekiel44:4 Yaza yandizisa ngendlela yesango lasenode ngapambi kwendlu; ndaza ndakangela; kekaloku bona ke, ubungcwalisa bukayehova bebuzalisile indlu; ndaza ndawa ebusweni bam." 
Ezekiel44:5 Waye uyehova esiti kum: Nyana woluntu! bekela intliziyo yako, ubone ngamehlo ako, uve ngendlebe zako, konke endiya kukuteta kuwe ngayo yonke imimiselo yendlu kayehova, nangayo yonke imiteto yayo; uze ubeke intliziyo yako ngasendaweni yokungena yendlu, kunye nazo zonke indawo zokupuma zeyingcwele indawo." 
Ezekiel44:6 Wauya kuti kwabanenkani, kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli: Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Makunanele ngenxa yazo zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho zenu, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Ezekiel44:7 ekubeni nibangenisile abasemzini, abangalukileyo ngentliziyo, abangalukileyo nangenyama, babe kuyo eyingcwele indawo yam, ukuza kuyinco̔lisa indlu yam; nakunikela isonka sam, inqata negazi, baza bona balwapula ucebano lwam, ngapezu kwazo zonke izinto ezibuntshontsho zenu." 
Ezekiel44:8 Kanjalo anisigcinanga isigcinelo sezinto zam ezingcwele; koko nimisele abagcini besigcinelo sam ngokwenu. 
Ezekiel44:9 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Osukuba engowasemzini, ongalukileyo ngentliziyo, ongalukileyo nangenyama, akayi kungena kweyingcwele indawo yam, kubo bonke abasemzini abapakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel44:10 Naba‐Levi abakwelela kude kum, bakuti o‐Sirayeli balahleka, abalahlekayo kum emva kwezitixwana zabo, bona baya kutwala ityala labo." 
Ezekiel44:11 Boba ngabakonzi noko kweyingcwele indawo yam, bengabalindi emasangweni endlu, nabakonzi kuyo indlu: baya kuxe̔lela abantu idini lokutshiswa nombingo, beme ebusweni babo ukukonza kubo." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ngenxa yokuba bebekonza kubo pambi kwezitixwana zabo, baba sisiku̔bekiselo setyala kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli; ngako oko ndipakamisile isandla sam ngakubo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, babeya kutwala ityala labo." 
Ezekiel44:13 Baye bengayi kusondela kum, ukuza kundikonza ngobuperisite, nokusondela kuzo zonke izinto ezingcwele zam, kweyingcwele yezingcwele indawo; koko beya kutwala ihlazo labo, nezinto ezibuntshontsho zabo abazenzileyo." 
Ezekiel44:14 Kodwa ndiya kubenza abagcini besigcinelo sendlu, ngayo yonke inkonzo yayo, nangako konke okuya kwenziwa kuyo." 
Ezekiel44:15 Kanti abaperisite, aba‐Levi, onyana baka‐Tsadoki, abagcinayo isigcinelo seyingcwele indawo yam, lwakuti usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwalahleka kum, bona baya kusondela kum ukuza kundikonza; babeya kuma ebusweni bam, ukuba banikele inqata negazi kum, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel44:16 Aba baya kungena kweyingcwele indawo yam, kanjalo aba baya kusondela etafileni yam ukuza kukonza kum, babeya kugcina isigcinelo sam." 
Ezekiel44:17 Kwakuya kuti, bakungena emasangweni alo ibala lapakati, izivato zeqiya baya kuzambata; akuyi kuza pezu kwabo nento yoboya, nxa bakonzayo emasangweni elapakati ibala, nangapakati." 
Ezekiel44:18 Inkontsho zeqiya zoba pezu kwentloko zabo, nebrukwe zeqiya zoba pezu kwezinqe zabo; abayi kubinqa ngento ebilisayo." 
Ezekiel44:19 Naxeshekweni bapumela ebaleni langapandle, ebaleni langapandle ebantwini, baya kususa izivato zabo ababekonza ngazo, bazibeke ezinkambilini ezingcwele, bazambate izivato zimbi; abayi kubangcwalisa abantu zinezivato zabo." 
Ezekiel44:20 Nentloko zabo abayi kuziguya kanye, nezihlwita zayo abayi kuzilengalengisa; baya kugugula kodwa intloko zabo." 
Ezekiel44:21 Neveyine akuyi kuyisela namnye umperisite, bakungena ebaleni lapakati." 
Ezekiel44:22 Kanjalo umhlolokazi, nalowo olahliweyo, abayi kubazeka babe ngabafazi babo: kodwa intombi zipela kuyo inzalo yendlu ka‐Sirayeli, umhlaumbi umhlolokazi oya kuba ngumhlolokazi womperisite, bangabazeka." 
Ezekiel44:23 Nabantu bam baya kubabonisa pakati kwokungcwele nokungengcwele, babazise pakati kwokunco̔lileyo nokucocekileyo." 
Ezekiel44:24 Nasekupikweni bona baya kuma ukugweba; ngezigwebo zam baya kukugweba; nemiteto yam, nemimiso yam, kuzo zonke intlanganiso zam, baya kuyigcina; nesabata zam baya kuzenza ngcwele." 
Ezekiel44:25 Abayi kuza ngakuye namnye umntu ofileyo ukuzinco̔lisa; kodwa uyise, nonina, nonyana, nentombi, n omninawe, nodade ongenayo indoda, bangazinco̔lisela bona." 
Ezekiel44:26 Nasemva kwokuhlanjululwa kwake, uya kubalelwa imihla ibe sixe̔nxe." 
Ezekiel44:27 Nasemhleni aya kungena kweyingcwele indawo, ebaleni lapakati, ukuya kukonza kweyingcwele indawo, uya kunikela idini lesono lake, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel44:28 Oku kwoba lilifa kubo: mna ndililifa labo; naye ningayi kubanika nanye imfuyo kwa‐Sirayeli; mna ndiyimfuyo yabo. 
Ezekiel44:29 Baya kudla umnikelo wokudla, nedini lesono, nedini letyala; nako konke okwahlukanisiweyo kwa‐Sirayeli kwoba kokwabo." 
Ezekiel44:30 Kanjalo isiqalo sazo zonke ilibo zako konke, nayo yonke iminikelo yokufunqufunqulwa yako konke, kuyo yonke iminikelo yokufunqufunqulwa yenu, yoba yeyabaperisite; nesiqalo sentlama yenu niya kusinika kuye umperisite, kuze kuhliswe itamsanqa pezu kwendlu yako." 
Ezekiel44:31 Konke okusisidumbu, umhlaumbi okuqwengiweyo, nokuba kuyintaka, nokuba kusisilo, abaperisite abayi kukutya."
