Ezekiel45:1 KANJAKO xeshekweni niya kulaba ilizwe ngeqashiso libe lilifa, niya kunikela umnikelo kuyehova, isabiwo esingcwele selizwe; ubude boba bubude bamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu engcongolo, nobubanzi boba ngamawaka alishumi: soba ngcwele sona kuyo yonke imida yaso ngento engqongayo." 
Ezekiel45:2 Kuso esi amakulu mahlanu oba ngaweyingcwele indawo ubude bayo, namakulu mahlanu ububanzi bayo, inamacala mane ngokungqonga; kanjalo yoba nenqele yekubite ezingamashumi mahlanu ngento engqongayo." 
Ezekiel45:3 Nangawo lomlinganiso uya kulinganisa ubude bamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu, nobubanzi bamawaka alishumi; nakona kwobako eyingcwele indawo n eyingcwele yezingcwele." 
Ezekiel45:4 Isabiwo esingcwele selizwe soba sesabaperisite, abakonzi beyingcwele indawo, abaya kusondela ukuza kumkonza uyehova; soba yindawo yezindlu zabo, nendawo engcwele ibe yeyingcwele indawo." 
Ezekiel45:5 Kanjalo aba‐Levi, abakonzi bendlu, boba nobude bamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu, nobubanzi bamawaka alishumi, ibe yimfuyo yabo yokwaka inkambili ezimashumi mabini." 
Ezekiel45:6 Nemfuyo yesixeko niya kumisela yona ububanzi bamawaka mahlanu, nobude bamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu, malungana nomnikelo w esabiwo esingcwele; yoba yeyendlu yonke ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel45:7 Nenkosi isabiwo sayo soba ngelicala nangeliya icala lomnikelo w esabiwo esingcwele, nelemfuyo yesixeko, ngapambi kwomnikelo w esabiwo esingcwele, nangapambi kwemfuyo yesixeko, ngecala lentshonalanga ngasentshonalanga, nangecala lempumalanga ngasempumalanga; nobude boba malungana nesinye sezabiwo, kwa semdeni wasentshonalanga kude kube semdeni wasempumalanga." 
Ezekiel45:8 Elilizwe loba yimfuyo yayo kwa‐Sirayeli; zaye inkosi zam zingayi kubuya zibandezele abantu bam; nelizwe eliseleyo baya kulinika kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli ngezizwe zabo. 
Ezekiel45:9 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Makunanele, zinkosi zakwa‐Sirayeli! kwelelisani ubudlwengu nokupanga, nenze okufanelekileyo nokulungileyo; susani ukuhluta kwenu ebantwini bam, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel45:10 Noba nesilinganiselo esilungeleleneyo, neyefa elungeleleneyo, nebate elungeleleneyo." 
Ezekiel45:11 Iyefa nebate zoba ngumlinganiswa mnye, ize ibate ibambe isiqingata seshumi sehomere, neyefa isiqingata seshumi sehomere; umlinganiswa wayo woba ngehomere." 
Ezekiel45:12 Neshekele yona yoba zigera ezimashumi mabini; ishekele ezimashumi mabini, ishekele ezimashumi mabini anantlanu, ishekele ezilishumi linantlanu, yoba yimina yenu." 
Ezekiel45:13 Nguwo lo umnikelo niya kunikela ngawo: isiqingata sesitandatu seyefa kuyo ihomere yenqolowa; naniya kunika isiqingata sesitandatu seyefa kuyo ihomere yeṙalasi. 
Ezekiel45:14 Nommiselo wayo ioli, ibate yeoli, niya kunikela isiqingata seshumi sebate kuyo ikore, — ihomere yebate ezilishumi; ngokuba ibate ezilishumi ziyiyo ihomere." 
Ezekiel45:15 Nemvana inye yasemhlambini, kuwo amakulu mabini, ivela emaṙiweni acenceshiweyo akwa‐Sirayeli, ibe yeyomnikelo wokudla, neyedini lokutshiswa, neyeminikelo yoxolo, kuze kubaxoliselwe, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel45:16 Bonke abantu belizwe baya kunikela inkosi kwa‐Sirayeli umnikelo lo. 
Ezekiel45:17 Kwakuya kuba pezu kwenkosi ukunika amadini okutshiswa, nomnikelo wokudla, nowokusela, emitendelekweni, nasekutwaseni kwenyanga, nakuzo isabata, kuyo yonke imitendeleko engcwele yendlu ka‐Sirayeli: yona iya kulungisa idini lesono, nomnikelo wokudla, nedini lokutshiswa, neminikelo yoxolo, ukuxolisela indlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel45:18 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Ngeyokuqala inyanga, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, uya kutabata inkunzana elitole lenkomo, emsulwa, uyihlanze indawo eyingcwele." 
Ezekiel45:19 Waye umperisite eya kucapula egazini ledini lesono, alibeke pezu kwemigubasi yendlu, napezu kwamagumbi omane esipumelo saso isibingelo napezu kwemigubasi yesango lelapakati ibala." 
Ezekiel45:20 Uya kwenje njalo nangowesixe̔nxe umhla wenyanga, ngenxa yalowo uposisayo, nangenxa yosidenge; kwa njalo ke niya kuxolisela indlu." 
Ezekiel45:21 Ngeyokuqala inyanga, ngoweshumi elinesine umhla wenyanga, noba nepasika, umtendeleko wentsuku ezisixe̔nxe; izonka ezingenagwele ziya kudliwa." 
Ezekiel45:22 Nangawo umhla lowo inkosi iya kuzilungisela yona, nabo bonke abantu belizwe, inkunzana yedini lesono." 
Ezekiel45:23 Kanjalo intsuku zosixe̔nxe zomtendeleko iya kulungisa idini lokutshiswa kuyehova, inkunzana zisixe̔nxe nenkunzi zegusha zisixe̔nxe ezimsulwa imihla ngemihla, intsuku zosixe̔nxe; nedini lesono, itakane lebokwe imihla ngemihla." 
Ezekiel45:24 Nomnikelo wokudla, iya kulungisela inkunzana iyefa, neyefa yoyilungis ela inkunzi yegusha; neoli, yoba yihine kuyo iyefa." 
Ezekiel45:25 Ngeyesixe̔nxe inyanga, ngoweshumi elinesihlanu umhla wenyanga, iya kwenza njengokunjalo emtendelekweni wentsuku ezisixe̔nxe, njengedini lesono, njengedini lokutshiswa, nanjengomnikelo wokudla, nanjengeoli." 
Ezekiel46:1 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Isango lebala lapakati, elibeka ngasempumalanga, loba livaliwe imihla yomitandatu yokusebenza; kodwa ngomhla wesabata liya kuvulwa, nangomhla wokutwasa kwenyanga liya kuvulwa." 
Ezekiel46:2 Yoti ke inkosi ingene ngendlela yentendelezo yesango elo ngapandle, ime ngasemgubasini wesango; baye abaperisite beya kulungisa idini lokutshiswa layo, neminikelo yoxolo yayo; yaiya kubedesha emnyango wesango, yandule ipume; kodwa isango aliyi kuvalwa kude kuhlwe." 
Ezekiel46:3 Kanjalo abantu belizwe baya kubedesha ngaselucangweni lwelisango, ngesabata nangenyanga ezitwasileyo, ebusweni bukayehova." 
Ezekiel46:4 Nedini lokutshiswa eliya kunikelwa yinkosi kuyehova ngomhla wesabata, loba zimvana zintandatu ezimsulwa, nenkunzi yegusha emsulwa." 
Ezekiel46:5 Nomnikelo wokudla, yoba yiyefa kuyo inkunzi yegusha; nakuzo imvana umnikelo wokudla woba njengokupa kwesandla sayo; neoli, yoba yihine kuyo iyefa." 
Ezekiel46:6 Nangomhla wokutwasa kwenyanga, loba yinkunzana elitole lenkomo, emsulwa; nemvana zintandatu, nenkunzi yegusha, eziya kuba zezimsulwa." 
Ezekiel46:7 Yolungisa nomnikelo wokudla, ibe yiyefa kuyo inkunzana, neyefa kuyo inkunzi yegusha, nakuzo imvana njengokufikela kwesandla sayo; neoli, yoba yihine kuyo iyefa." 
Ezekiel46:8 Nasekungeneni kwenkosi, iya kungena ngendlela yentendelezo yesango elo, ibuye ipume ngendlela yayo." 
Ezekiel46:9 Kodwa ekuzeni kwabantu belizwe pambi kwoyehova, emitendelekweni engcwele, lowo ungenayo ngendlela yesango lasenode ukuza kubedesha, uya kupuma ngendlela yesango lasesuyide; nalowo ungenayo ngendlela yesango lasesuyide, uya kupuma ngendlela yesango lasenode; akayi kubuya ngendlela yesango abengena ngalo, koko eya kupuma malungana nalo." 
Ezekiel46:10 Yoti inkosi ekungeneni kwabo ingene pakati kwabo; nasekupumeni kwabo, baya kupuma kunye." 
Ezekiel46:11 Kanjalo emitendelekweni, nasezintlanganisweni ezingcwele, umnikelo wokudla woba yiyefa kuyo inkunzana, neyefa kuyo inkunzi yegusha, nakuzo imvana njengokupa kwesandla sayo; neoli, yoba yihine kuyo iyefa." 
Ezekiel46:12 Naxeshekweni inkosi iya kulenza ngesisa idini lokutshiswa, umhlaumbi iminikelo yoxolo ngesisa, kuyehova, iya kwandula ivulelwe isango elibeka ngasempumalanga, yaiya kwenza idini lokutshiswa layo, neminikelo yoxolo yayo, njengoko ibikwenza ngomhla wesabata; yandule ipume, kuvalwe isango emveni kwokupuma kwayo." 
Ezekiel46:13 Kanjako imvana yomnyaka mnye emsulwa uya kuyilungisa imihla ngemihla ibe lidini lokutshiswa kuyehova; ngemiso ngemiso uya kulungisa yona. 
Ezekiel46:14 Nomnikelo wokudla wowulungisela yona ngemiso ngemiso, isiqingata sesitandatu seyefa, nesiqingata sesitatu sehine yeoli, ukunyakamisa umgubo ocolekileyo, — umnikelo wokudla kuyehova ngommiselo ongunapakade futi." 
Ezekiel46:15 Kwa njalo baya kulungisa imvana, nomnikelo wokudla, neoli, ngemiso ngemiso, libe lidini lokutshiswa futi." 
Ezekiel46:16 Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Nxa inkosi ipayo isipo kowonyana bayo, ilifa laso loba lelonyana bake; soba yimfuyo yabo ngelifa." 
Ezekiel46:17 Kodwa nxa ipayo isipo elifeni layo kwesinye sezicaka zayo, soba sesaso kude kube ngumnyaka wenkululeko, sandule sibuyele kwinkosi; ilifa layo loba lelonyana bayo kupela." 
Ezekiel46:18 Kanjalo inkosi ayiyi kutabata elifeni labantu ngokubagxota emfuyweni yabo; kweyayo imfuyo iya kunika onyana bayo ilifa; ukuze kungacitwa abantu bam abanye ngabanye emfuyweni yabo. 
Ezekiel46:19 Yandula yandizisa ngendawo yokungena, engasecaleni lesango, ezinkambilini ezingcwele zabaperisite, ezibeka ngasenode; kekaloku bona ke, bekuko kona indawo ngecala lasemva ngasentshonalanga." 
Ezekiel46:20 Yaza yati kum: Le yindawo apo abaperisite baya kupeka kona idini letyala nedini lesono, apo baya kuwoja kona umnikelo wokudla, ukuze bangapumi nawo ukuya ebaleni langapandle ukungcwalisa abantu." 
Ezekiel46:21 Yandula yandipumisela ebaleni langapandle, yandidlulisa ngasemagumbini omane ebala; kekaloku bona ke, bekuko ibala kuwo onke amagumbi ebala ngamanye." 
Ezekiel46:22 Emagumbini omane ebala bekuko amabala abiyiweyo, engamashumi mane ekubite ubude bawo, namashumi matatu ububanzi bawo; ebenomlinganiswa mnye lamagumbi omane." 
Ezekiel46:23 Lwaye luko udonga ngento engqongayo kuwo, ngento engqongayo lawo mane; kwako nendawo zokupeka ezenziweyo ngapantsi kwendonga ngokungqonga." 
Ezekiel46:24 Yaza yati kum: Ezi zindawo zabapekayo, apo abakonzi bendlu baya kupeka kona umbingo wabantu." 
Ezekiel47:1 YANDULA yandibuyisela elucangweni lwendlu; kekaloku nanga amanzi epuma ngapantsi kwomnyango ngasempumalanga, ngokuba umpambili wendlu ububeka ngasempumalanga; ati amanzi lawo ehla ngapantsi, kulo elokunene icala lendlu, kwelasesuyide lesibingelo." 
Ezekiel47:2 Yaza yandipumisa ngendlela yesango lasenode, yandizekelelisa ngendlela ngapandle ngasesangweni langapandle, ngendlela ebeka ngasempumalanga; kekaloku nanga amanzi ebaleka ecaleni lokunene." 
Ezekiel47:3 Yati indoda ebinentambo esandleni sayo yakupumela ngasempumalanga, yalinganisa iwaka lekubite, yandidlulisa emanzini; ati amanzi afik ela amaqata." 
Ezekiel47:4 Yabuya yalinganisa iwaka, yandidlulisa emanzini; ati amanzi afik ela amadolo. Yabuya yalinganisa iwaka, yandidlulisa; ati amanzi afik ela isinqe." 
Ezekiel47:5 Yabuya yalinganisa iwaka; ubungumlambo endakohlwa kukuwela: ngokuba amanzi ebenyukile, amanzi okudadwa kuwo, umhlambo obungenakuwelwa." 
Ezekiel47:6 Yaza yati kum: Ubonile na, nyana woluntu? Yandula yandihambisa, yandibuyisela elunxwemeni lwomlambo." 
Ezekiel47:7 Nxa bendibuyile, kekaloku nantsiya elunxwemeni lwomlambo into eninzi yemiti, ngelicala nangeliya." 
Ezekiel47:8 Yaza yati kum: Lamanzi ayapumela ngasemdeni wasempumalanga, ehle ngasetafeni, angene elwandle; ati epunyiselwa elwandle, amanzi apiliswe." 
Ezekiel47:9 Kwaye kuya kuti, zonke izinto ezipilileyo, ezinambuzelayo, apo isukuba isiza kona imilambo leyo, ziya kupila; kwakuya kubako into eninzi yentlanzi, ngokokuba eya kuza kona amanzi la; aeya kupiliswa, kuti konke apo umlambo uya kuza kona kupile." 
Ezekiel47:10 Kwoti kanjalo, abalobi baya kuma ngakulo, kwa kuyo i‐Hene‐gedi kude kube kuyo i‐Hene‐egelayime; oba yindawo yokwaneka iminata; intlanzi zawo zoba ngemmilo zazo, njengentlanzi zolwandle olukulu, into eninzi." 
Ezekiel47:11 Kodwa amabikibiki alo namacibi alo akayi kupiliswa, aya kunikwa etyuweni." 
Ezekiel47:12 Nangasemlanjeni, elunxwemeni lwawo ngelicala nangeliya iya kumila yonke imiti yokudla, egqabi lingayi kubuna, nesiqa̔mo singayi kupela; ngenyanga zayo iya kutwasisa ukuhlanza, ngokuba amanzi ayo epumile kweyingcwele indawo; kanjalo isiqa̔mo sayo soba sesokutyiwa, negqabi layo loba lelokupolisa." 
Ezekiel47:13 ITSHO inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Nguwo lo umda eniya kulamkela ilifa lelizwe ngawo, ngezizwe ezilishumi linazibini zo‐Sirayeli: u‐Josefe woba nezabiwo zibini." 
Ezekiel47:14 Naniya kulidla ilifa lalo, omnye njengomnye, endapakamisa isandla sam ukuba ndolinika koyihlo benu; laye ilizwe eli liya kuwa kuni ngelifa." 
Ezekiel47:15 Nguwo ke lo umda welizwe ngecala lasenode, kwa kulo ulwandle olukulu, ngendlela yase‐Hetelone, njengokuba kuyiwa e‐Tsedade:" 
Ezekiel47:16 i‐Hamati, i‐Berota, i‐Siberayime, epakati kwomda we‐Damakusi nomda we‐Hamati; i‐Hatsere‐hatikone, engasemdeni we‐Haurane." 
Ezekiel47:17 Nomda ovela elwandle wona woba yi‐Hatsare‐henani, umda we‐Damakusi, nenode ngasenode, nomda we‐Hamati. Leli ke icala lasenode." 
Ezekiel47:18 Necala lasempumalanga lona lovela pakati kwe‐Haurane, ne‐Damakusi, ne‐Gileyadi, nelizwe lakwa‐Sirayeli ngase‐Yoredane; kutabata emdeni ngaselwandle lwasempumalanga niya kulinganisa. Leli ke icala lasempumalanga." 
Ezekiel47:19 Necala lasesuyide ngakuyo isuyide, lovela e‐Tamare kude kube semanzini e‐Meriba yase‐Kadeshe, ngakuwo umlambo kude kube selwandle olukulu. Leli ke icala lasesuyide ngakuyo isuyide." 
Ezekiel47:20 Necala lasentshonalanga loba lulwandle olukulu, kwa semdeni kude kuziwe malungana ne‐Hamati. Leli ke icala lasentshonalanga." 
Ezekiel47:21 Naniya kunabela elilizwe ngezizwe zo‐Sirayeli. 
Ezekiel47:22 Kwakuya kuti, niya kulenzela iqashiso libe lilifa kuni, nakubo abasemzimi abapambukeleyo pakati kwenu, abazeleyo abantwana pakati kwenu; babeya kuba njengabazelweyo elizweni kuni pakati kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli; baya kwamkela ilifa ndawonye nani pakati kwezizwe zo‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel47:23 Kwakuya kuti, isizwe apambukeleyo kuso owasemzini, kwa lapo niya kumnika ilifa lake, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel48:1 Kekaloku ngawo la amagama ezizwe. Kwa sesipelweni sasenode kude kube secaleni lendlela yase‐Hetelone, njengokuba kuyiwa e‐Hamati, i‐Hatsare‐henani, umda we‐Damakusi ngasenode, kude kube secaleni le‐Hamati, (ngokuba kuya kubako kuye icala lasempumalanga ne lasentshonalanga,) u‐Dane woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:2 Nangasemdeni ka‐Dane, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Ashere woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:3 Nangasemdeni ka‐Ashere, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Nefatali woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:4 Nangasemdeni ka‐Nefatali, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Manase woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:5 Nangasemdeni ka‐Manase, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Frayime woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:6 Nangasemdeni ka‐Frayime, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga nakude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Rubene woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:7 Nangasemdeni ka‐Rubene, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Juda woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:8 Nangasemdeni ka‐Juda, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, wobako umnikelo eniya kunikela ngawo, obubanzi bungamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu engcongolo, nobude bunjengesinye sezabiwo, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga: kanjalo eyingcwele indawo yoba pakati kwawo." 
Ezekiel48:9 Umnikelo eniya kunikela ngawo kuyehova, ubude ngamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu, nobubanzi ngamawaka alishumi." 
Ezekiel48:10 Nakubo aba, kubo abaperisite, umnikelo ongcwele woba ngulo: ngasenode ubude bungamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu, nangasentshonalanga ububanzi bungamawaka alishumi, nangasempumalanga ububanzi bungamawaka alishumi, nangasesuyide ubude bungamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu: kanjalo eyingcwele indawo kayehova yoba pakati kwawo." 
Ezekiel48:11 Woba ngowabaperisite abangcwalisiweyo, kubo onyana baka‐Tsadoki, abasigcinileyo isigcinelo sam, ababengalahleki ekulahlekeni kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, njengokuba bebelahleka aba‐Levi." 
Ezekiel48:12 Na lo mnikelo kuwo umnikelo welizwe wona woba yingcwele yezingcwele kubo, ngasemdeni waba‐Levi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Namalungana nomda wabaperisite, aba‐Levi boba nobude bamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu, nobubanzi bamawaka alishumi; ubude bonke ngamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu, nobubanzi ngamawaka alishumi." 
Ezekiel48:14 Abayi kutengisa nto yalo ndawo, nolibo lwelizwe abayi kwanana ngalo, abayi kuludlulisela kwabanye kanjako; ngokuba iyingcwele kuyehova." 
Ezekiel48:15 Namawaka mahlanu aseleyo ebubanzini, elunge namawaka engamashumi mabini anamahlanu, yoba yindawo engengcwele yesixeko, eyokuhlala neyenqele; saye isixeko siya kuba pakati kwayo." 
Ezekiel48:16 Yiyo le imilinganiswa yaso: icala lasenode, ngamawaka mane anamakulu mahlanu; necala lasesuyide, ngamawaka mane anamakulu mahlanu; nangecala lasempumalanga, ngamawaka mane anamakulu mahlanu; necala lasentshonalanga, ngamawaka mane anamakulu mahlanu." 
Ezekiel48:17 Kanjalo inqele yesixeko yoba yilé: ngasenode ngamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu, nangasesuyide ngamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu, nangasempumalanga ngamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu, nangasentshonalanga ngamakulu mabini anamashumi mahlanu." 
Ezekiel48:18 N endawo eseleyo ebudeni, elunge nomnikelo w esabiwo esingcwele, ngamawaka alishumi ngasempumalanga, namawaka alishumi ngasentshonalanga; yaiya kuba ilunge nomnikelo w esabiwo esingcwele; nemveliso yayo yoba kukutya kwabakonzayo isixeko." 
Ezekiel48:19 Nabo bakonzayo isixeko, baya kusikonza bevela kuzo zonke izizwe zo‐Sirayeli." 
Ezekiel48:20 Umnikelo wonke woba ngamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu ngamawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu: unamacala mane niya kunikela umnikelo ongcwele, kunye nemfuyo yesixeko." 
Ezekiel48:21 N endawo eseleyo yona yoba yeyenkosi, ngelicala nangeliya icala lomnikelo ongcwele, nelemfuyo yesixeko, malungana namawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu awo umnikelo ngasemdeni wasempumalanga, nangasentshonalanga malungana namawaka angamashumi mabini anamahlanu ngasemdeni wasentshonalanga, elunge nezabiwo zenkosi: wona woba ngumnikelo ongcwele; kanjalo eyingcwele indawo yendlu yoba pakati kwawo." 
Ezekiel48:22 Nakuyo imfuyo yaba‐Levi, kuyo imfuyo yesixeko, pakati kw endawo eyeyenkosi, pakati kwomda ka‐Juda nomda ka‐Benjamine, londawo yoba yeyenkosi." 
Ezekiel48:23 Nesisalela sezizwe: kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Benjamine woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:24 Nangasemdeni ka‐Benjamine, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Simone woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:25 Nangasemdeni ka‐Simone, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Yisakare woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:26 Nangasemdeni ka‐Yisakare, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Zebulone woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:27 Nangasemdeni ka‐Zebulone, kwa secaleni lasempumalanga kude kube secaleni lasentshonalanga, u‐Gadi woba nesabiwo sinye." 
Ezekiel48:28 Nangasemdeni ka‐Gadi, ngecala lesuyide ngasesuyide, umda wovela e‐Tamare, uye emanzini e‐Meriba yase‐Kadeshe, kude kube semlanjeni ngakulo ulwandle olukulu." 
Ezekiel48:29 Eli lilizwe eniya kulenzela iqashiso libe lilifa kuzo izizwe zo‐Sirayeli; nezi ke zizabiwo zazo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Ezekiel48:30 Kanjako ezi zindawo zokupuma zesixeko: ecaleni lasenode, imilinganiswa ingamawaka mane anamakulu mahlanu." 
Ezekiel48:31 Aye amasango esixeko eya kubizwa ngamagama ezizwe zo‐Sirayeli: amasango matatu ngasenode; isango lika‐Rubene linye, isango lika‐Juda linye, isango lika‐Levi linye." 
Ezekiel48:32 Nangecala lasempumalanga, imilinganiswa ingamawaka mane anamakulu mahlanu; namasango matatu; kwa isango lika‐Josefe linye, isango lika‐Benjamine linye, isango lika‐Dane linye." 
Ezekiel48:33 Nangecala lasesuyide, imilinganiswa ingamawaka mane anamakulu mahlanu; namasango matatu; isango lika‐Simone linye, isango lika‐Yisakare linye, isango lika‐Zebulone linye." 
Ezekiel48:34 Ngecala lasentshonalanga, imilinganiswa ingamawaka mane anamakulu mahlanu; amasango ayo matatu: isango lika‐Gadi linye, isango lika‐Ashere linye, isango lika‐Nefatali linye." 
Ezekiel48:35 Ngento engqongayo imilinganiswa ingamawaka alishumi linesibozo: negama lesixeko eso emva kwoko, loba lelokuti: Uyehova ukona." 
Daniel1:1 NGOWESITATU umnyaka wobukumkani buka‐Yoyakime ukumkani wo‐Juda, weza u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani we‐Babilone e‐Yerusaleme, wayivingcela." 
Daniel1:2 Yandula inkosi yanikela esandleni sake u‐Yoyakime ukumkani wo‐Juda, nenxenye yempahla zendlu katixo; waza wazizisa elizweni le‐Shinare, endlwini yotixo wake; nempahla wazingenisa endlwini yendyebo yotixo wake." 
Daniel1:3 Wati ukumkani wateta ku‐Shapenaze inkosi yabatenwa bake, ukuba azise abatile kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nakuyo inzalo yokumkani, nakuzo inkosana;" 
Daniel1:4 kwa amadodana okungekuwo nasinye isipako, amahle ukubonakala kwawo, anobuciko ebulumkweni bonke, azizazi, anokuqonda ukwazi, ekukuwo amandla okuba eme eluxandeni lwokumkani, nokuba afundiswe ukuba̔la nokuteta kwama‐Kaledine." 
Daniel1:5 Kanjalo ukumkani wawabela into yemihla ngemihla kuko ukutya okumnandi kwokumkani, nakuyo iveyine yokusela kwake, ukuba ondliwe iminyaka mitatu, ati ekupeleni kwayo eme ebusweni bokumkani." 
Daniel1:6 Kekaloku bekuko pakati kwawo, kulo usapo luka‐Juda, u‐Danyeli, u‐Hananiya, u‐Mishayeli, no‐Hazariya;" 
Daniel1:7 eyati inkosi yabatenwa yabatiya amagama: u‐Danyeli yambiza ngo‐Beleteshatsare, no‐Hananiya ngo‐Shadraki, no‐Mishayeli ngo‐Meshaki, no‐Hazariya ngo‐Habedi‐nego." 
Daniel1:8 Kodwa u‐Danyeli wabeka entliziyweni yake ukuba angazinco̔lisi ngokutya okumnandi kwokumkani, nangeveyine yokusela kwake; ngako wacela enkosini yabatenwa ukuba angazinco̔lisi." 
Daniel1:9 Waye utixo emnikile u‐Danyeli ufefe nobubele ebusweni benkosi yabatenwa. 
Daniel1:10 Yaza inkosi yabatenwa yati ku‐Danyeli: Ndiyoyika inkosi yam ukumkani, okwabileyo ukutya kwenu nokusela kwenu; ngokuba kuyinina ukuba abubone ubuso benu busiti kunubembe ngapezu kwamadodana angawentanga yenu? niya kwandula niyenze intloko yam imelwe lityala pambi kwokumkani." 
Daniel1:11 Waza wati u‐Danyeli kwigosa, elo inkosi yabatenwa ibilimisile pezu kwo‐Danyeli, n o‐Hananiya, n o‐Mishayeli, no‐Hazariya:" 
Daniel1:12 Zulinge izicaka zako imihla ibe lishumi; mabasinike imifuno ukuba sitye, namanzi ukuba sisele:" 
Daniel1:13 kwandule ukukangelwa pambi kwako ukubonakala kwetu, nokubonakala kwamadodana adlayo ukutya okumnandi kwokumkani: uze wenze kwizicaka zako njengokubona kwako." 
Daniel1:14 Laza labapulapula ngalendawo, labalinga imihla yalishumi." 
Daniel1:15 Kwati ke ekupeleni kwemihla ilishumi, kwabonwa ukuba ukubonakala kwabo bagqitisile onke amadodana awadlayo ukutya okumnandi kwokumkani ngobuhle nangokutyeba kwenyama." 
Daniel1:16 Landula igosa lasusa ukutya okumnandi kwabo, neveyine yokusela kwabo, labanika imifuno." 
Daniel1:17 Kekaloku lamadodana omane utixo wawanika ukwazi nokuqonda kulo lwonke ufundo nobulumko; no‐Danyeli wamqondisa yonke imiboniso namapupa. 
Daniel1:18 Kwati ke ekupeleni kwemihla owabetshilo ukumkani ukuba iwazise, yandula inkosi yabatenwa yawazisa pambi kwo‐Nebukanetsare." 
Daniel1:19 Waza ukumkani wateta nawo; kwaye kube kungafunyanwa pakati kwawo onke nanye ebinjengo‐Danyeli, n o‐Hananiya, n o‐Mishayeli, no‐Hazariya; ngako bema ebusweni bokumkani." 
Daniel1:20 Nendawo zonke zobulumko n engqondo, owababuza ngazo ukumkani, wabafumana belumkile ngamanani alishumi pezu kwazo zonke incibi n abanyangi abasebukumkanini bake bonke." 
Daniel1:21 Kekaloku u‐Danyeli wahlala kwada kwaba ngowokuqala umnyaka ka‐Koreshe ukumkani. 
Daniel2:1 NGOWESIBINI umnyaka wobukumkani buka‐Nebukanetsare, wapupa u‐Nebukanetsare amapupa, waza waxa̔liswa umoya wake, bemka kuye nobutongo bake." 
Daniel2:2 Wasuka watyela ukumkani ukuba makubizwe incibi, nabanyangi, nezanuse, naba‐Kaledine, ukuze bambonise ukumkani amapupa ake. Beza ke bema ebusweni bokumkani." 
Daniel2:3 Wayesiti kubo ukumkani: Ndilipupile ipupa; kanjalo umoya wam uxa̔lele ukulazi ipupa elo. 
Daniel2:4 Bandula bateta aba‐Kaledine kukumkani ngesi‐Siriya, besiti: Kumkani, hlala uhleli kude kube ngunapakade! Tyelela izicaka zako ipupa, nokutyilwa kwalo sokuxela." 
Daniel2:5 Wapendula ukumkani wati kuba‐Kaledine: Indawo imkile kum; ukuba anindazisi ipupa, nokutyilwa kwalo, niya kuhlahlwa, ziti izindlu zenu zenzwe imfumba yenkunkuma." 
Daniel2:6 Kodwa ukuba niyaxela ipupa, nokutyilwa kwalo, niya kwamkela kum amabaso, nemivuzo, nodumo olukulu; ngako oko ndixeleleni ipupa, nokutyilwa kwalo." 
Daniel2:7 Bapendula ngokwesibini bati: Makati ukumkani azityelele izicaka zake ipupa, nokutyilwa kwalo sokuxela." 
Daniel2:8 Wapendula ukumkani wati: Ndiyazi ngokuqinileyo ukuba ninga ningazuza ixesha, nibona nje ukuba indawo imkile kum." 
Daniel2:9 Kodwa ukuba anindazisi ipupa, ukwa mnye umteto ngani; ngokuba amazwi abuxoki nakohlakeleyo nivumelene ukuwateta pambi kwam, kude kuguqulwe ixesha: ngako oko ndityeleleni ipupa, ndandiya kwazi ukuba ukutyilwa kwalo ningakuxela." 
Daniel2:10 Bapendula aba‐Kaledine pambi kwokumkani, bati: Akuko mntu pezu kwomhlaba ongayixelayo indawo yokumkani: ngoko akuko ukumkani, n enkosi, nompati, oke wabuza into enjalo kwenye incibi, nomnyangi, nom‐Kaledine." 
Daniel2:11 Ngokuba indawo ebuzwayo ngukumkani inqabile; kananjalo akuko namnye ongayixelayo pambi kwokumkani, kupela ngotixo, abakuhlala kungenaluntu." 
Daniel2:12 Ngako oko waqumba ukumkani, wababama kunene, watyela ukuba makubujiswe onke amalumko ase‐Babilone." 
Daniel2:13 Waza wapuma umteto wokuba amalumko abulawe: kwafunwa no‐Danyeli, namakolwane ake, ukuba babulawe." 
Daniel2:14 Wandula wapendula u‐Danyeli ngobutelekelelo nangobuqiqo ku‐Ariyoki, inkosi yomlisela wokumkani, obepumile ukuya kubulala amalumko ase‐Babilone:" 
Daniel2:15 wapendula wati ku‐Ariyoki, igosa lokumkani: Yinina ukuba umteto unxamile kangaka ukuvela kukumkani? Wandula u‐Ariyoki wamazisa u‐Danyeli indawo." 
Daniel2:16 Waza wangena u‐Danyeli, wacela kukumkani ukuba ammisele ixesha, ukuze axele ukutyilwa kukumkani." 
Daniel2:17 Wandula u‐Danyeli waya endlwini yake, washumayela indawo ku‐Hananiya, na ku‐Mishayeli, naku‐Hazariya, amakolwane ake;" 
Daniel2:18 ukuba bacele izibele kutixo wezulu ngalemfihlakalo, ukuze kungabubi u‐Danyeli namakolwane ake kunye namanye amalumko ase‐Babilone." 
Daniel2:19 Yada imfihlakalo yatyilelwa u‐Danyeli ngomboniso wobusuku. Wandula u‐Danyeli wambonga utixo wezulu. 
Daniel2:20 Wapendula u‐Danyeli, wati: Igama likatixo malibongwe kwa kunapakade kude kube ngunapakade; ngokuba bubobake ubulumko namandla." 
Daniel2:21 Yena uyaguqula amaxesha nemizuzu; uyasusa okumkani, uyamisa okumkani kanjalo; uyanika ubulumko kwabalumkileyo, nokwazi kwabaziyo ukuqonda." 
Daniel2:22 Izinto ezinzulu nezifihlakeleyo uyazityila: oko kusebumnyameni uyakwazi, nokukanya kuhleli naye." 
Daniel2:23 Ndiyabulela kuwe, ndikudumise, Tixo wobawo bam! ondinikileyo ubulumko namandla, wandazisa kaloku nje oko sibe sikufuna kuwe; ngokuba nguwe osazisileyo indawo yokumkani." 
Daniel2:24 Wati ngoko u‐Danyeli wangena ku‐Ariyoki, lowo abemmisele ukumkani ukuba abubise amalumko ase‐Babilone: waya watsho kuye ngokuti: Ungabubisi amalumko ase‐Babilone; ndingenise pambi kwokumkani, ndandiya kuxela ukutyilwa kukumkani." 
Daniel2:25 Waza u‐Ariyoki wangenisa u‐Danyeli pambi kwokumkani ngobunxamo, watsho kuye ngokuti: Kendifumene indoda elusatsheni lwasekutinjweni kwo‐Juda, eya kumazisa ukumkani ukutyilwa." 
Daniel2:26 Wapendula ukumkani wati ku‐Danyeli, ogama lingu‐Beleteshatsare: Unamandla na okuba undazise ipupa endilibonileyo, nokutyilwa kwalo?" 
Daniel2:27 Wapendula u‐Danyeli ebusweni bokumkani, wati: Imfihlakalo ebuzwayo ngukumkani akangeyixele amalumko, n abanyangi, n encibi, n amatola, kukumkani;" 
Daniel2:28 kodwa kuko utixo ezulwini ozityilayo imfihlakalo, owazisile ukumkani u‐Nebukanetsare oko okuza kubako emihleni yokupela. Ipupa lako, nemiboniso yentloko yako upezu kwomandlalo wako, yiyo le:" 
Daniel2:29 Wena, kumkani! izicamango zako upezu kwomandlalo wako zenyuka, zicamanga oko okuya kubako emveni kwoku; nalowo ozityilayo imfihlakalo ukwazisile oko okuya kubako." 
Daniel2:30 Mna ke, imfihlakalo le andityilelwe yona ngobulumko endinabo ngapezu kwabo bonke abahleliyo; koko kungenxa yokuba ukutyilwa kwaziswe kukumkani, nokuba uzazi izicamango zentliziyo yako." 
Daniel2:31 Wena, kumkani! ubukangela; kekaloku nanguya umfanekiso omkulu. Lomfanekiso umkulu, onkazimlo ibiyegqitisileyo, ubumi pambi kwako; nokubonakala kwawo ubusoyikeka." 
Daniel2:32 Umfanekiso lowo, intloko yawo ibiyeyegolide entle; isifuba sawo nengalo zawo zibe zizezesilivere; isisu sawo namatanga awo abengawexina;" 
Daniel2:33 imilenze yawo ibiyeyesincete; inyawo zawo, inxenye ibiyeyesincete, nenxenye ibiyeyodongwe." 
Daniel2:34 Wabukangela kwada kwasikelwa ilitye kungeko izandla, elabeta umfanekiso lowo pezu kwenyawo zawo zesincete nodongwe, laziti viti." 
Daniel2:35 Kwandula kwatiwa viti kwa kunye isincete, udongwe, ixina, isilivere, negolide, zaba njengomququ wasezibayeni zehlobo; waza umoya wazemkisa, kwada akwazifunyanelwa nanye indawo; kanti ilitye elabeta umfanekiso laba yintaba enkulu, lazalisa umhlaba wonke." 
Daniel2:36 Leli ipupa; nokutyilwa kwalo siya kutyela kona pambi kwokumkani. 
Daniel2:37 Wena, kumkani! ungukumkani kakumkani: ngokuba utixo wezulu ekunikile ubukumkani, n obukulu, namandla, nodumo." 
Daniel2:38 Nalapo kusukuba kumiwa kona lusapo lwabantu, izilo zasendle nentaka zezulu uzinikile esandleni sako, wakwenza umpati pezu kwazo zonke. Wena ke uyintloko leyo yegolide." 
Daniel2:39 Nasemveni kwako kwovuka obunye ubukumkani, bubuncinane kobako; nobunye, ubukumkani besitatu, obexina, obuya kupata ubukosi pezu kwomhlaba wonke." 
Daniel2:40 Nobesine ubukumkani bona boba namandla njengesincete; ngokokuba isincete siziti viti sizikande zonke izinto: nanjengesincete, esiqekeza ezi zinto zonke, boti viti buqekeze nabo." 
Daniel2:41 Nokokuba wabubona inyawo namazwane, inxenye iludongwe lwombumbi, nenxenye isisincete, ubukumkani obo boba bahlukile; kodwa kuya kubako okwokwomelela kwesincete kubo, ngokokuba ububona isincete sixutyiwe nodongwe olubudaka." 
Daniel2:42 Kanjalo njengokuba amazwane enyawo ebesisincete inxenye, nodongwe inxenye, kwa njalo ubukumkani obo, ngenxenye boba namandla, nangenxenye boba buqoboqobo." 
Daniel2:43 Nokokuba wabubona isincete sixutyiwe nodongwe olubudaka, baya kuzixubanisa nenzalo yabantu; kanti abayi kunamatela omnye kwomnye, kwa njengokuba isincete singaxubeki nodongwe." 
Daniel2:44 Nasemihleni yokumkani aba, utixo wezulu uya kumisa ubukumkani, obungayi kuza butshatyalaliswe napakade: obubukumkani abuyi kushiyelwa kwabanye abantu; buya kubuti viti obobukumkani bonke bubugqibele, kanti buya kuma bona kude kube ngunapakade;" 
Daniel2:45 ngokokuba ububona ukuba ilitye belisikwa entabeni kungeko izandla, nokuba laziti viti isincete, ixina, udongwe, isilivere, negolide. Utixo omkulu umazisile ukumkani oko okuya kubako emveni kwoku: kanjalo ipupa liqinile, nokutyilwa kwalo kuyinyaniso." 
Daniel2:46 Wandula ukumkani u‐Nebukanetsare wawa ngobuso bake, waziqubuda pambi kwo‐Danyeli, waxela ukuba makunikelwe kuye umnikelo wokudla namavumba amnandi." 
Daniel2:47 Wapendula ukumkani ku‐Danyeli, wati: Kuyinene ukuba utixo wenu unguye utixo wotixo, nenkosi yokumkani, nomtyili wemfihlakalo, ukuba ubunamandla okuyityila imfihlakalo le." 
Daniel2:48 Wandula ukumkani wamenza mkulu u‐Danyeli, wampa amabaso amakulu amaninzi, wamenza umpati pezu kwalo lonke ilizwana le‐Babilone, nenkosi enkulu pezu kwamalumko onke ase‐Babilone." 
Daniel2:49 Waza u‐Danyeli wacela kukumkani, owamisa u‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, pezu kwemicimbi yalo ilizwana le‐Babilone; kodwa u‐Danyeli wahlala esangweni lokumkani." 
Daniel3:1 UNEBUKANETSARE ukumkani wenza umfanekiso wegolide, ubude bawo buzikubite zimashumi matandatu, ububanzi bawo buzikubite zintandatu; wawumisa etafeni le‐Dura, elizwaneni le‐Babilone." 
Daniel3:2 Waza u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani watumela ukuhlanganisa inkosi, amagosa, nenkosana, abagwebi, abagcinindyebo, amapakati, amatyala, nabo bonke abapati bamazwana, ukuze beze ekutwasisweni kwomfanekiso owabewumisile u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani." 
Daniel3:3 Zandula zahlanganisana inkosi, amagosa, nenkosana, abagwebi, abagcinindyebo, amapakati, amatyala, nabo bonke abapati bamazwana, ekutwasisweni kwomfanekiso owabewumisile u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani; bema pambi kwomfanekiso owabewumisile u‐Nebukanetsare." 
Daniel3:4 Yaza indanduluki yadanduluka ngamandla, isiti: Kutiwa kuni, bantu, zizwe, zinteto!" 
Daniel3:5 ngexesha eniya kuva intlokoma yekarena, n emashrokita, n ekitrose, n esabeka, n epesanterine, n esumponeya, nazo zonke intlobo zokucula, niya kuwa pantsi, nibedeshe umfanekiso wegolide awumisileyo u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani:" 
Daniel3:6 nosukuba engawi pantsi, abedeshe, uya kuti kwa ngeloxanyana ajulelwe eziko lomlilo ovutayo." 
Daniel3:7 Ngako oko ngeloxesha nxa bonke abantu bayivayo intlokoma yekarena, n emashrokita, n ekitrose, n esabeka, n epesanterine, nazo zonke intlobo zokucula, bonke abantu, izizwe, nenteto, bawa pantsi, babedesha umfanekiso wegolide abewumisile u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani." 
Daniel3:8 Ngako oko ngeloxesha, kwasondela ama‐Kaledine atile, anika ama‐Juda ityala." 
Daniel3:9 Ateta ati kukumkani u‐Nebukanetsare: Kumkani, hlala uhleli kude kube ngunapakade!" 
Daniel3:10 Wena, kumkani! wenzile umteto wokuba bonke abantu abayivayo intlokoma yekarena, n emashrokita, n ekitrose, n esabeka, n epesanterine, nesumponeya, nazo zonke intlobo zokucula, baya kuwa pantsi, babedeshe umfanekiso wegolide:" 
Daniel3:11 nosukuba engawi pantsi, abedeshe, uya kujulelwa eziko lomlilo ovutayo." 
Daniel3:12 Kuko ama‐Juda atile owamisileyo pezu kwemicimbi yalo ilizwana le‐Babilone, u‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego; lamadoda, kumkani! akakatali nguwe; otixo bako akabakonzi, nomfanekiso wegolide owumisileyo akawubedeshi." 
Daniel3:13 Wandula u‐Nebukanetsare ngomsindo nangobuṙalaṙume waxela ukuba makuziswe u‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego. Kwandula kwaziswa lamadoda ebusweni bokumkani." 
Daniel3:14 Wateta u‐Nebukanetsare wati kubo: Kwenziwa ngabomi na, Shadraki, Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, ukuba anikonzi otixo bam, nokuba anibedeshi umfanekiso wegolide endiwumisileyo?" 
Daniel3:15 Kekaloku ukuba senilungile ukuti, ngexesha eniyivayo intlokoma yekarena, n emashrokita, n ekitrose, n esabeka, n epesanterine, nesumponeya, nazo zonke intlobo zokucula, niwe pantsi, nibedeshe umfanekiso endiwenzileyo —; ukuba kodwa anibedeshi, noti kwa ngeloxanyana nijulelwe eziko lomlilo ovutayo; nguwupina ke lowo utixo oya kunikulula ezandleni zam?" 
Daniel3:16 Bapendula o‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, bati kukumkani: Nebukanetsare! asifun’ ukuba sikupendule ngalendawo." 
Daniel3:17 Ukuba kunjalo, utixo wetu, esimkonzayo, unamandla okusikulula eziko lomlilo ovutayo; ewe, wosikulula esandleni sako, kumkani!" 
Daniel3:18 Kodwa ukuba akunjalo, makwazeke kuwe, kumkani! ukuba otixo bako asiyi kubabedesha, nomfanekiso wegolide uwumisileyo asiyi kuwubedesha." 
Daniel3:19 Wandula u‐Nebukanetsare wazala buṙalaṙume, kwati ukubonakala kwobuso bake kwaguqulwa ngakubo o‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego: wateta, waxela ukuba iziko malenziwe shushu kube kasixe̔nxe ngapezulu koko fudula lenziwa shushu ngako." 
Daniel3:20 Waxela kanjalo ukuba amadoda angamaṙoti omeleleyo, abesempini yake, makanxibe u‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, abajulele eziko lomlilo ovutayo." 
Daniel3:21 Aza lamadoda anxitywa enebrukwe zawo, n ehempe zawo, nengubo zawo, n ezinye izivato zawo, ajulelwa eziko lomlilo ovutayo." 
Daniel3:22 Ngako oko, ngenxa yokuba ilizwi lokumkani belinxamile, neziko lalishushu kakulu, lati ilangatye lomlilo labulala lomadoda abefunqula u‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego." 
Daniel3:23 Aza lamadoda matatu, u‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, awa pantsi enxityiwe pakati kweziko lomlilo ovutayo." 
Daniel3:24 Wandula wati nqa u‐Nebukanetsare ukumkani, wesuka ngobunxamo, wateta, wati kumapakati ake: Besingajulanga amadoda amatatu na pakati kwomlilo, enxityiwe? Apendula ati: Yinyaniso, kumkani!" 
Daniel3:25 Wapendula wati: Nanga ndibona amadoda amane, ekululekile, ehamba pakati kwomlilo, kungeko senzakalo kuwo; kekaloku eyesine ukufana kwayo ifana nonyana wotixo." 
Daniel3:26 Wandula u‐Nebukanetsare wasondela elucangweni lweziko lomlilo ovutayo, wateta, wati: Shadraki, Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, nina zicaka zotixo opezu kwonke, velani, nize apa! Baza o‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, bavela kwa pakati kwomlilo." 
Daniel3:27 Zaza zahlanganisana inkosi, amagosa, nenkosana, namapakati okumkani, babona lamadoda, ukuba umlilo awubanga namandla pezu kwemizimba yawo, nenwele zentloko zawo aziṙaukanga, nebrukwe zawo azenziwanga ngakumbi, nevumba lomlilo alizanga pezu kwawo." 
Daniel3:28 Wateta u‐Nebukanetsare, wati: Makubongwe utixo ka‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, oyitumileyo ingelosi yake, wakulula izicaka zake, ezazitembela kuye, zaguqula ilizwi lokumkani, zanikela imizimba yazo, ukuba zingakonzi zingabedeshi nokubedesha namnye utixo, kupela utixo wazo yedwa." 
Daniel3:29 Ngako ndiyawenza umteto, ukuba bonke abantu, izizwe, nenteto, abaya kuteta into engalungileyo ngakuye utixo wabo o‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, baya kuhlahlwa, ziti izindlu zabo zenzwe imfumba yenkunkuma; ngokuba kungeko tixo wumbi ongahlangulayo ngokunje." 
Daniel3:30 Wandula ukumkani wabenza abakulu o‐Shadraki, n o‐Meshaki, no‐Habedi‐nego, elizwaneni le‐Babilone." 
Daniel4:1 UNEBUKANETSARE ukumkani, kubo bonke abantu, izizwe, nenteto, abemiyo kuwo wonke umhlaba: Uxolo lwenu malwandiswe!" 
Daniel4:2 Imiqondiso nemimangaliso endenzelwe yona ngutixo opezu kwonke, kwakoleka kum ukuba ndiyishumayele." 
Daniel4:3 Hai ukuba mikulu kwemiqondiso yake! hai ukuba namandla kwemimangaliso yake! ubukumkani bake bubukumkani obungunapakade, nobukosi bake bukwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Daniel4:4 Mna Nebukanetsare bendonwabile endlwini yam, bendicu̔mile kwa seluxandeni lwam:" 
Daniel4:5 ndabona ipupa elandoyikisayo; kanjalo inkumbulo zam pezu kwomandlalo wam, nemiboniso yentloko yam zanditusa." 
Daniel4:6 Ndaza ndawenza umteto wokuba kungeniswe onke amalumko ase‐Babilone pambi kwam, ukuze andazise ukutyilwa kwepupa elo." 
Daniel4:7 Kwandula kwangena incibi, abanyangi, aba‐Kaledine, namatola; ndaza ndalixela ipupa ebusweni babo, kodwa abandazisa ukutyilwa kwalo." 
Daniel4:8 Kwada ngokupela kwangena pambi kwam u‐Danyeli, ogama lingu‐Beleteshatsare, njengegama lotixo wam, okukuye umoya wotixo abangcwele; ndaza ndalixela ipupa pambi kwake, ndisiti:" 
Daniel4:9 Beleteshatsare, nkosi yencibi! ngokokuba ndisazi ukuba umoya wotixo abangcwele ukuwe, nokuba ayixaki wena nanye imfihlakalo, ndixelele imiboniso yepupa lam endilibonileyo, nokutyilwa kwalo." 
Daniel4:10 Imiboniso yentloko yam ndipezu kwomandlalo wam, yilé: Ndakangela, kekaloku bona ke, bekuko umti pakati kwomhlaba, nobude bawo bebubukulu." 
Daniel4:11 Wakula umti lowo, womelela ke; kanjalo ubude bawo bafikela ezulwini, nokubonwa kwawo ekupeleni kwomhlaba wonke." 
Daniel4:12 Amagqabi awo ebemahle, neziqa̔mo zawo bezizininzi; kwabekuko kuwo ukutya okwan ele bonke: ngapantsi kwawo bezinomtunzi izilo zezindle, nasemasebeni awo zahlala intaka zezulu, lwadliswa nakuwo uluntu lwonke." 
Daniel4:13 Ndakangela kanjako emibonisweni yentloko yam ndipezu kwomandlalo wam, kekaloku bona ke, umlindi, kwa oyingcwele, wehla ezulwini;" 
Daniel4:14 owadanduluka ngamandla, watsho ukuti: Gaulani umti lowo, niwanqumle amasebe awo; vutululani amagqabi awo, nizicite iziqa̔mo zawo; mazisuke izilo pantsi kwawo, nentaka emasebeni awo;" 
Daniel4:15 kodwa isipunzi sengcambo zawo sishiyeni emhlabeni, sinombambo wesincete nexina eluhlazini lwasendle: makanete ngombete wezulu, nesabiwo sake masibe ndawonye nezilo ebutyanini bomhlaba:" 
Daniel4:16 intliziyo yake mayiguqulwe ingabi yeyomntu, nentliziyo yesilo mayimkwe kuye; kanjalo makadlule pezu kwake amaxesha asixe̔nxe." 
Daniel4:17 Londawo ingomgwebo wabalindi, nesisibizo singelizwi labazingcwele; ukuze abahleliyo babe nokwazi ukuba opezu kwonke uyapata ubukosi pezu kwobukumkani babantu, ebunika kulowo atandayo, ewe, emisa pezu kwabo abantu abamnyama." 
Daniel4:18 Elipupa ndilibonile mna kumkani u‐Nebukanetsare. Ngako wena, Beleteshatsare! kuxele ukutyilwa kwalo; ngokokuba onke amalumko asebukumkanini bam akohliwe ukundazisa ukutyilwa: kodwa wena akukohliwe; ngokuba umoya wotixo abangcwele ukuwe." 
Daniel4:19 Wandula u‐Danyeli, ogama lingu‐Beleteshatsare, wati nqa ngomzuzwana, nezicamango zake zamtusa. Wapendula ukumkani, wati: Beleteshatsare! ungetuswa lipupa nakukutyilwa kwalo. Wapendula u‐Beleteshatsare, wati: Nkosi yam! ipupa elo malibe kwabo bakutiyayo, nokutyilwa kwalo kwintshaba zako!" 
Daniel4:20 Umti ke obuwubona, owakulayo, owomelelayo, obude bawo bafikelayo ezulwini, nokubonwa kwawo emhlabeni wonke;" 
Daniel4:21 omagqabi awo abemahle, neziqa̔mo zawo bezizininzi; okwabekuko kuwo ukutya okwan ele bonke; ezazite izilo zezindle zahlala ngapantsi kwawo, nentaka zezulu zalalisa emasebeni awo;" 
Daniel4:22 unguwe, kumkani! okulileyo, owomeleleyo: ngokuba ubukulu bako bukulile, buyafikela kwa sezulwini, nobukosi bako ekupeleni kwomhlaba." 
Daniel4:23 Kanjalo, ukuba ukumkani wabona umlindi, kwa oyingcwele, esihla ezulwini, owabesiti: Gaulani umti lowo, niwutshabalalise; kodwa isipunzi sengcambo zawo sishiyeni emhlabeni, sinombambo wesincete nexina eluhlazini lwasendle; makanete ngombete wezulu, nesabiwo sake masibe ndawonye nezilo ebutyanini bomhlaba, kude kudlule pezu kwake amaxesha asixe̔nxe;" 
Daniel4:24 kuko oku ukutyilwa, kumkani! nguwo ke umgwebo wopezu kwonke, oya kuza pezu kwenkosi yam ukumkani:" 
Daniel4:25 Uya kugxotwa ebantwini, kuti ukuhlala kwako kube ndawonye nezilo zezindle, wauya kudliswa utyani njengenkabi, wonetiswa ngumbete wezulu, kwakuya kudlula pezu kwako amaxesha asixe̔nxe, ude ukwazi ukuba opezu kwonke uyapata ubukosi pezu kwobukumkani babantu, ebunika kulowo atandayo." 
Daniel4:26 Nokokuba kwaxelwa ukuba kushiywe isipunzi sengcambo zalomti, ubukumkani bako boba buqinile kuwe, emvenikweni uya kukwazi ukuba izulu liyapata ubukosi." 
Daniel4:27 Ngako oko, kumkani! icebo lam malikoleke kuwe, uzikumle izono zako ngobulungisa, nenkohlakalo zako ngokupata amahlwempu ngofefe; kungati kuya kwolulwa ukwonwaba kwako." 
Daniel4:28 Konke oku kweza pezu kwokumkani u‐Nebukanetsare. 
Daniel4:29 Ekupeleni kwenyanga zilishumi elinambini wabehamba pezu kwoxande lwobukumkani be‐Babilone. 
Daniel4:30 Wateta ukumkani, wati: Le asi yiyo na i‐Babilone enkulu, endiyakileyo ibe yindlu yobukumkani ngobukulu bamandla am, nangenxa yodumo lwobungcwalisa bam?" 
Daniel4:31 Nxa ilizwi elo lisesemlonyeni wokumkani, lawa ilizwi ezulwini, lisiti: Kutwa kuwe, kumkani Nebukanetsare: Ubukumkani bumkile kuwe;" 
Daniel4:32 wauya kugxotwa ebantwini, kuti ukuhlala kwako kube ndawonye nezilo zezindle; uya kudliswa utyani njengenkabi, kwakuya kudlula pezu kwako amaxesha asixe̔nxe, ude ukwazi ukuba opezu kwonke uyapata ubukosi pezu kwobukumkani babantu, ebunika kulowo atandayo." 
Daniel4:33 Kwa ngeloxanyana yafezwa lento pezu kwo‐Nebukanetsare: wagxotwa ke ebantwini, wadla utyani njengenkabi, waneta umzimba wake ngombete wezulu, zada zakula inwele zake njeng entsiba z okozi, nenzipo zake njengezentaka." 
Daniel4:34 Nasekupeleni kwalomihla, mna Nebukanetsare ndawapakamisa amehlo am ngasezulwini, kwati ukuqonda kwam kwabuyela kum; ndaza ndambonga opezu kwonke, ndamdumisa ndambeka lowo okuhlala kungunapakade, obukosi bubukosi obukwa ngunapakade, nobukumkani bake bukwisizukulwana ngesizukulwana:" 
Daniel4:35 bonke abemi bomhlaba bayabalwa ngokuba yinto engento; uyenza ngentando yake kwa semkosini wezulu, na pakati kwabemi bomhlaba; akuko ongabambayo isandla sake, nongati kuye: Wenza nto nina?" 
Daniel4:36 Kwa ngeloxanyana kwabuyela kum ukuqonda kwam; nangenxa yodumo lwobukumkani bam, kwabuyela kum ubungcwalisa bam nenkazimlo yam; andifuna ke amapakati am nemiduna yam; kanjako ndaqiniswa ebukumkanini bam, nobukulu obugqitisileyo bongezelelwa kum." 
Daniel4:37 Kaloku mna Nebukanetsare ndiyamdumisa, ndiyampakamisa, ndiyambeka ukumkani wezulu, omisebenzi yake yonke iyinyaniso, nendlela zake zibubulungisa: nabo bahambayo nger̔atshi unamandla yena okubatobisa." 
Daniel5:1 UBELESHATSARE ukumkani walenzela iwaka lemiduna yake umtendeleko omkulu, wasela iveyine pambi kwelowaka." 
Daniel5:2 Wati u‐Beleshatsare akuba evile iveyine, watyela ukuba makuziswe impahla zegolide nezesilivere, ezo uyise u‐Nebukanetsare waziku̔pa etempileni ebise‐Yerusaleme; ukuba basele kuzo ukumkani nemiduna yake, abafazi bake namashweshwe ake." 
Daniel5:3 Kwandula kwaziswa impahla zegolide ezibe ziku̔tshiwe etempileni yendlu katixo ebise‐Yerusaleme; baza basela kuzo ukumkani nemiduna yake, abafazi bake namashweshwe ake." 
Daniel5:4 Basela iveyine, badumisa otixo begolide, nabesilivere, n abexina, n abesincete, n abemiti, nabamatye." 
Daniel5:5 Kwa ngeloxanyana yavela iminwe yesandla somntu, yaba̔la malungana nekandelare, pezu kwekalike yodonga lwoxande lwokumkani; wati ukumkani wabona lonxenye yesandla yaba̔layo." 
Daniel5:6 Kwandul’ ukuguqulwa ubuso bokumkani, nezicamango zake zamtusa; kanjalo amalungu esinqe sake axengaxenga, namadolo ake abetana elinye nelinye." 
Daniel5:7 Waza ukumkani wadanduluka ngamandla ukuba kungeniswe abanyangi, n aba‐Kaledine, namatola. Wateta ukumkani, wati kuwo amalumko ase‐Babilone: Osukuba elesesha esisiba̔lo, nokutyilwa kwaso akuxele kum, wovatiswa ngesibomvu, nangomxokelelwane wegolide entanyeni yake, waeya kuba ngowesitatu umpati ebukumkanini." 
Daniel5:8 Andula angena onke amalumko okumkani; koko ebekohlwa ukulesesha isiba̔lo, nokumazisa ukumkani ukutyilwa kwaso." 
Daniel5:9 Waza ukumkani u‐Beleshatsare wetuswa kakulu, nobuso bake babumguqulelwa, nemiduna yake yabixakekile." 
Daniel5:10 Ukumkanikazi, ngenxa yamazwi okumkani nemiduna yake, wangena endlwini yomtendeleko: wateta ukumkanikazi, wati: Kumkani, hlala uhleli kude kube ngunapakade! ungetuswa zizicamango zako, nobuso bako mabungaguqulwa." 
Daniel5:11 Kuko indoda ebukumkanini bako okukuyo umoya wotixo abangcwele; ngokuba emihleni yoyihlo bekufunyanwa kuyo ukukanya, nokuqonda, nobulumko, njengobulumko babo otixo; ngako ukumkani u‐Nebukanetsare, uyihlo wako, wayimisa ibe yinkosi yencibi, n abanyangi, n aba‐Kaledine, n amatola; wenje njalo ke uyihlo wako, kumkani!" 
Daniel5:12 ngokokuba umoya ogqitisileyo, nokwazi, nokuqonda, ukutyila amapupa, nokuxela izintsonkotelo, nokubangulula indawo ezinqabileyo, bekufunyanwa kuyo, ku‐Danyeli, owati ukumkani wamtiya igama elingu‐Beleteshatsare: ngoko makabizwe u‐Danyeli, waeya kuxela ukutyilwa." 
Daniel5:13 Kwaza kwangeniswa u‐Danyeli pambi kwokumkani. Wateta ukumkani wati ku‐Danyeli: Ungulo‐Danyeli na, ongowaselusatsheni lwokutinjwa kwo‐Juda, owabepunyiswa kwa‐Juda ngukumkani ubawo?" 
Daniel5:14 Sendivile ngawe, ukuba umoya wabo otixo ukuwe, nokuba ukukanya, nokuqonda, nobulumko obugqitisileyo bufunyenwe kuwe." 
Daniel5:15 Kekaloku sekungenisiwe pambi kwam amalumko n abanyangi, ukuba baleseshe esisiba̔lo, bandazise ukutyilwa kwaso; koko bebekohlwa kukuxela ukutyilwa kwendawo." 
Daniel5:16 Kodwa ndivile ngawe, ukuba unamandla ukutyila izityilo, nokubangulula indawo ezinqabileyo; kekaloku, ukuba unamandla ukulesesha isiba̔lo eso, nokundazisa ukutyilwa kwaso, wovatiswa ngesibomvu, nangomxokelelwane wegolide entanyeni yako, wauya kuba ngowesitatu umpati ebukumkanini." 
Daniel5:17 Waza wapendula u‐Danyeli, wati pambi kwokumkani: Amabaso ako makabe kuwe, nemivuzo yako yinike kwomnye: noko, isiba̔lo ndosileseshela ukumkani, ndimazise nokutyilwa kwaso." 
Daniel5:18 Wena, kumkani! utixo opezu kwonke wamnika u‐Nebukanetsare uyihlo wako ubukumkani, nobukulu, nodumo, nobungcwalisa:" 
Daniel5:19 nangenxa yobukulu abebunikile kuye, bonke abantu, n ezizwe, nenteto, bangcangcazela boyika pambi kwake: lowo watanda ukumbulala, wambulala; nalowo watanda ukumgcina ehleli, wamgcina ehleli; nalowo watanda ukumpakamisa, wampakamisa; nalowo watanda ukumtobisa, wamtobisa." 
Daniel5:20 Kodwa xeshekweni intliziyo yake yapakama, nompefumlo wake waba lukuni er̔atshini, wahliswa eteroneni yobukumkani bake, nodumo lwake lwasuswa kuye." 
Daniel5:21 Waza wagxotwa konyana babantu; intliziyo yake yenziwa njengeyezilo, nokuhlala kwake bekundawonye namaqwaṙa asendle; wadliswa utyani njengenkabi, nomzimba wake waneta ngombete wezulu; wada wakwazi ukuba utixo, opezu kwonke, uyapata ubukosi pezu kwobukumkani babantu, nokuba uyamisa pezu kwabo lowo atandayo." 
Daniel5:22 Nawe, unyana wake, Beleshatsare! akuyitobanga intliziyo yako, nakuba ubukwazi oku konke;" 
Daniel5:23 koko uzipakamisile ngakuyo inkosi yezulu; kanjalo kuzisiwe pambi kwako impahla zendlu yayo, nanisele iveyine ngazo, wena nemiduna yako, abafazi bako namashweshwe ako; notixo besilivere, nabegolide, n abexina, n abesincete, n abemiti, nabamatye, abangaboniyo, abangevayo, abangenakwazi, ubadumisile; kodwa utixo, lowo umoya wako usesandleni sake, nendlela zako zonke zingaye, akumbekanga." 
Daniel5:24 Oko lonxenye yesandla yasuswa kwa pambi kwake; saba̔lwa ke esisiba̔lo. 
Daniel5:25 Nasi isiba̔lo esibe siba̔liwe: Mene, mene, tekeli, uparesine." 
Daniel5:26 Koku ukutyilwa kwalendawo: Mene; utixo ubalile ubukumkani bako, ubupelisile." 
Daniel5:27 Tekeli; ulinganisiwe ezilinganiselweni, wafunyanwa ulula." 
Daniel5:28 Perese; ubukumkani bako bahlulwe, bunikiwe kuwo ama‐Medi nama‐Peresiya." 
Daniel5:29 Wandula waxela u‐Beleshatsare, baza bamvatisa u‐Danyeli ngesibomvu, nangomxokelelwane wegolide entanyeni yake, bashumayela ngaye ukuba makabe ngowesitatu umpati ebukumkanini." 
Daniel5:30 Kwa ngobo busuku kwabulawa u‐Beleshatsare ukumkani wama‐Kaledine. 
Daniel5:31 Kekaloku u‐Dariyusi, um‐Medi, wamkela ubukumkani, eminyaka engati ngamashumi matandatu anamibini ubudala bake." 
Daniel6:1 KWAKOLEKA ku‐Dariyusi ukuba amise pezu kwobukumkani inkosi ezilikulu linamashumi mabini, zize zibe pezu kwobukumkani bonke;" 
Daniel6:2 napezu kwazo ezi abongama abatatu, owaye u‐Danyeli wayengowokuqala kubo; ukuze inkosi ezo zenze ingxelo kubo, aze ukumkani angabi nokwonakala kwanto." 
Daniel6:3 Wandula u‐Danyeli lo wadlula abongama abo nenkosi ezo ngokulunga, ngokokuba umoya ogqitisileyo ubukuye; wada ukumkani wacingela ukummisa pezu kwobukumkani bonke." 
Daniel6:4 Bandula abongama nenkosi bafuna ukuba balifumane ituba ngakuye u‐Danyeli ngendawo yobukumkani; koko bebekohlwa kufumana nalinye ituba netyala; ngokokuba ebengowenyaniso, kungafunyanwanga nasinye isiposo netyala kuye." 
Daniel6:5 Andula ati lamadoda: Asiyi kufumana nalinye ituba ngakuye u‐Danyeli lo, ukuba asifumani into ngakuye ngawo umteto wotixo wake." 
Daniel6:6 Bandula ababongama nenkosi babutela ekumkanini ngempitimpiti, batsho kuye ukuti: Kumkani Dariyusi, hlala uhleli kude kube ngunapakade!" 
Daniel6:7 Bonke abongama bobukumkani, amagosa nenkosi, amapakati nenkosana, bacebene kunye ukumisa ummiso wobukumkani, nokwenza umteto oqinileyo, wokokuba osukuba eya kucela ingcelo nasetixweni nasemntwini ngezintsuku zimashumi matatu, kupela acele kuwe, kumkani! uya kujulelwa emnxunyeni wengonyama." 
Daniel6:8 Kaloku, kumkani! qinisa umteto, upaule isiba̔lo, uze ungaguqulwa, njengesiko lama‐Medi nama‐Peresiya elingenakubujiswa." 
Daniel6:9 Ngako oko ukumkani u‐Dariyusi wapaula esosiba̔lo nomteto. 
Daniel6:10 Kekaloku u‐Danyeli, akwazi ukuba isiba̔lo sipauliwe, wangena endlwini yake; wati, ifenstile zake zivulekile nje enkambilini yapezulu yake ngecala elingase‐Yerusaleme, waguqa ngamadolo ake katatu ngemini, watandaza, wabulela pambi kwotixo wake, njengoko fudula ekwenza." 
Daniel6:11 Andula lamadoda abuta ngempitimpiti, afumana u‐Danyeli etandaza ekunga nokukunga pambi kwotixo wake." 
Daniel6:12 Andula asondela, ateta pambi kwokumkani ngawo umteto wokumkani, esiti: Akupaulanga na umteto, wokokuba umntu osukuba ecela ingcelo nasetixweni nasemntwini ngezintsuku zimashumi matatu, kupela acele kuwe, kumkani! uya kujulelwa emnxunyeni wengonyama? Wapendula ukumkani wati: Yindawo eqinileyo, njengesiko lama‐Medi nama‐Peresiya elingenakubujiswa." 
Daniel6:13 Andula ukupendula ati pambi kwokumkani: u‐Danyeli, lowa ungowaselusatsheni lwokutinjwa kwo‐Juda, akakatali nguwe, kumkani! nangumteto owupaulileyo; uyacela ingcelo yake katatu ngemini." 
Daniel6:14 Wandula ukumkani, akuva lamazwi, wanokuziqumbela kakulu, wabeka intliziyo yake ngaku‐Danyeli ukuba amkulule; ewe kwada kwatshona ilanga wazamela ukumsindisa." 
Daniel6:15 Andula lamadoda abutela kukumkani ngempitimpiti, ati kukumkani: Yazi, kumkani! ukuba isiko lama‐Medi nama‐Peresiya lelokuba akungeguqulwe namnye umteto nommiso awumisileyo ukumkani." 
Daniel6:16 Wandula waxela ukumkani, baza bamzisa u‐Danyeli, bamjulela emnxunyeni wengonyama. Wateta ukumkani wati ku‐Danyeli: Utixo wako, lowo uhlala umkonza futi, yena wokukulula." 
Daniel6:17 Kwaye kuziswa ilitye, labekwa emlonyeni womnxuma; waza ukumkani walincamatisela ngesincamatiselo sake, nangesincamatiselo semiduna yake, ukuze imvume ngaye u‐Danyeli ingabi nakuguqulwa." 
Daniel6:18 Wandula ukumkani waya eluxandeni lwake, wadlulisa ubusuku ezila ukutya; kanjalo iziculiso bezingaziswanga pambi kwake; bemka kuye nobutongo bake." 
Daniel6:19 Wandula ukumkani wavuka kunye nesifingo sokusa, waya ngobunxamo emnxunyeni wengonyama." 
Daniel6:20 Wati akuba esondele emnxunyeni, wamemeza ku‐Danyeli ngelizwi elibusizi; wateta ukumkani wati ku‐Danyeli: Danyeli, sicaka sikatixo opilileyo! utixo wako, lowo uhlala umkonza futi, unamandla okukukulula ezingonyameni na?" 
Daniel6:21 Wandula u‐Danyeli wati ekumkanini: Kumkani, hlala uhleli kude kube ngunapakade!" 
Daniel6:22 Utixo wam utumile ingelosi yake, wavingca imilomo yengonyama, zaza azandenzakalisa ke; ngokokuba pambi kwake kube kufunyenwe kum okungenatyala; napambi kwako kanjalo, kumkani! andenzanga sono." 
Daniel6:23 Wandula ukumkani wavuya kakulu ngaye, waxela ukuba u‐Danyeli makenyuswe emnxunyeni. Waza u‐Danyeli wenyuswa emnxunyeni; akwafunyanwa ke kuye nasinye isenzakalo; ngokuba ebekolwa kuye utixo wake." 
Daniel6:24 Waxela ukumkani, kwaza kwaziswa lomadoda abemnikile u‐Danyeli ityala, ajulelwa emnxunyeni wengonyama, wona, nabantwana bawo, nabafazi bawo; zaza ingonyama zabeyisa bengekafiki pantsi emnxunyeni, nawo onke amatambo abo zawatyumza." 
Daniel6:25 Wandula ukumkani u‐Dariyusi waba̔la kubo bonke abantu, n ezizwe, nenteto, abahleli kuwo wonke umhlaba, esiti: Uxolo malwandiswe kuni!" 
Daniel6:26 Ndiyawenza umteto, ukuba makuti kubo bonke ubukosi bobukumkani bam kungcangcazelwe kwoyikwe pambi kwotixo ka‐Danyeli: ngokuba e ngutixo opilileyo, emi ngonapakade; ubukumkani bake bobungayi kutshatyalaliswa, nobukosi bake bobako kude kube sekupeleni." 
Daniel6:27 Uyakulula, uyasindisa nokusindisa, uyenza imiqondiso nemimangaliso ezulwini nasemhlabeni, okululeyo u‐Danyeli emandleni engonyama." 
Daniel6:28 Kwa njalo u‐Danyeli lowa waba mkulu ebukumkanini buka‐Dariyusi, nasebukumkanini buka‐Koreshe um‐Peresiya." 
Daniel7:1 NGOMNYAKA wokuqala ka‐Beleshatsare ukumkani we‐Babilone, u‐Danyeli wabona ipupa, nemiboniso yentloko yake, epezu kwomandlalo wake; wandula waliba̔la ipupa elo, wayityela imfinyezwa yendawo." 
Daniel7:2 Wateta u‐Danyeli wati: Ndabona embonisweni wam ngobusuku, nantsiya imimoya yomine yasezulwini igaleleka pezu kwolwandle olukulu." 
Daniel7:3 Zaza zenyuka izilo ezikulu ezine elwandle, zahlukile esinye kwesinye." 
Daniel7:4 Esokuqala besinjengengonyama, sinamapiko okozi; ndakangela ada axwitwa amapiko aso, saza safunqulwa emhlabeni, samiswa pezu kwenyawo njengomntu, nentliziyo yomntu yanikwa kuso." 
Daniel7:5 Kekaloku bona ke, esinye isilo, esesibini, besinjengebere, sazipakamisa ngecala elinye, sinazo imbambo ezintatu emlonyeni waso pakati kwamazinyo aso; kwaza kwatshiwo kuso ukuti: Suka, yidle inyama eninzi." 
Daniel7:6 Emveni kwoku ndakangela, nasiya esinye, sinjengengwe, sinamapiko amane entaka pezu kwomhlana waso; kanjalo isilo eso besinentloko ezine, nobukosi bebunikwa kuso." 
Daniel7:7 Emveni kwoku ndabona emibonisweni yobusuku, nasiya isilo sesine, esoyikekayo, esomeleleyo, esigqitisileyo ngamandla; besinawo amazinyo amakulu esincete; sadla, satyumza, nesisalela sasinyatela ngenyawo zaso; besahlukile kuzo zonke izilo ezibe zipambili kuso; saye sinazo impondo ezilishumi." 
Daniel7:8 Ndagqala impondo ezo, kekaloku bona ke, kwapuma pakati kwazo elunye upondo oluncinane, ebekudonyulwa pambi kwalo isitatu sempondo zokuqala; kanjalo bona ke, elupondweni olu bekuko amehlo njengamehlo omntu, nomlomo uteta izinto ezinkulu." 
Daniel7:9 Ndakangela zada zabekwa iterone, waza wahlala omdala ngemihla, osivato besimhlope njengengqweqwe, nenwele zentloko yake njengoboya obumsulwa: iterone yake ibi njeng elangatye lomlilo, nengqengqeleko zayo njeng omlilo ovutayo." 
Daniel7:10 Umlambo womlilo wela wapuma ebusweni bake; amawakawaka akonza kuye, namashumi amawakawaka ema pambi kwake; kwahlalwa ukugweba, nencwadi zavulwa." 
Daniel7:11 Ndandula ndakangela ngenxa yelizwi lalomazwi makulu lwawatetayo upondo olo; ndakangela sada sabulawa esosilo, wabujiswa umzimba waso, sanikelwa ekuvuteni kwomlilo." 
Daniel7:12 Kekaloku ezinye izilo, zazihlutwa zona ubukosi bazo; kodwa ukwolulwa kwobomi bekunikwa kuzo kude kube ngumzuzu nexesha." 
Daniel7:13 Ndabona emibonisweni yobusuku, kekaloku bona ke, wafika namafu ezulu onjengonyana wesintu, weza kuye omdala ngemihla, wasondezwa pambi kwake." 
Daniel7:14 Kwaza kwanikwa kuye ubukosi, nodumo, nobukumkani, ukuze bakonze kuye bonke abantu, izizwe, nenteto: ubukosi bake bubukosi obungunapakade, obungasayi kububa, nobukumkani bake bobungasayi kutshatyalaliswa." 
Daniel7:15 Mna Danyeli umoya wam wabuhlungu pakati kwomzimba wam, nemiboniso yentloko yam yanditusa." 
Daniel7:16 Ndasondela komnye wabo babemi kona, ndabuza kuye inyaniso yoku konke. Waza wandityela, wandazisa ukutyilwa kwezizinto." 
Daniel7:17 Ezizilo zikulu, ezizine, zingokumkani abane, a baya kuvuka emhlabeni." 
Daniel7:18 Kodwa abangcwele bopezu kwonke baya kwamkela ubukumkani, babambe ubukumkani kude kube ngunapakade, kwa kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Daniel7:19 Ndandula ndanqwenela inyaniso ngaso isilo sesine, esibe sahlukile kwezinye zonke, sigqitisile ngokwoyikeka, esimazinyo sisincete, nenzipo zaso zilixina; eso sadlayo, satyumza, nesisalela sasinyatela ngenyawo zaso;" 
Daniel7:20 nangazo impondo zilishumi ezisentloko yaso, na ngalo olunye olwapumayo, esati isitatu sawa pambi kwalo; kwa olopondo olunamehlo, olunomlomo olwateta izinto ezinkulu, olube lukulu ngapezu kwabalingane balo ukubonakala kwalo." 
Daniel7:21 Ndakangela, lwati upondo olu lwayenza imfazwe nabangcwele, lwaboyisa;" 
Daniel7:22 wada wafika omdala ngemihla, banikwa ubulungisa kwabangcwele bopezu kwonke, lafika ixesha abangcwele bazuza ubukumkani ngalo." 
Daniel7:23 Watsho ukuti: Isilo sesine soba bobesine ubukumkani pezu kwomhlaba, obuya kwahluka kubo bonke ubukumkani; babuya kuwudla umhlaba wonke, buwunyatele, buwutyumze." 
Daniel7:24 Nempondo ezilishumi, zona zingokumkani abalishumi, abaya kuvuka ebukumkanini obo; nasemva kwabo kwovuka omnye; waye yena eya kwahluka kubo abapambili, atobise okumkani abatatu." 
Daniel7:25 Waeya kuteta amazwi ngakuye opezu kwonke, abasinyise abangcwele bopezu kwonke, acingele ukuguqula amaxesha nemiteto: babeya kunikwa esandleni sake kude kube lixesha, namaxesha, nesahlulo sexesha." 
Daniel7:26 Koko kuya kuhlalwa ukugweba, babeya kususa ubukosi bake, ukubutshabalalisa nokubububisa kude kube sekupeleni." 
Daniel7:27 Kanjalo ubukumkani, nobukosi, nobukulu bobukumkani ngapantsi kwezulu lonke, buya kunikwa ebantwini babangcwele bopezu kwonke, obukumkani bubukumkani obungunapakade, babuya kumkonza bonke ubukosi, bumpulapule." 
Daniel7:28 Kwada kwakaloku kukupela kwalendawo. Kekaloku mna Danyeli izicamango zam zanditusa kakulu, nobuso bam bandiguqulelwa; noko ndayigcina into leyo entliziyweni yam." 
Daniel8:1 NGOWESITATU umnyaka wobukumkani buka‐Beleshatsare, umboniso wabonakala kum mna Danyeli, emveni kwalowo wabonakalayo kum ekuqaleni." 
Daniel8:2 Ndabona ke embonisweni; kwaye kute ndakubona, bendise‐Shushane komkulu, eselizwaneni le‐Helami; ndabona embonisweni ukuba ndingasemlanjeni we‐Wulai." 
Daniel8:3 Ndaza ndawapakamisa amehlo am, ndakangela, kekaloku bona ke, kwema pambi kwomlambo inkunzi yegusha inempondo mbini: ezo impondo mbini zazinde; kodwa olunye belulude kolunye, kanjalo olude lwagqibela ukupuma." 
Daniel8:4 Ndabona inkunzi yegusha inquba ngasentshonalanga, nangasenode, nangasesuyide, kwaza akwabiko nasinye isilo esinokuma ebusweni bayo, kanjako bekungeko ohlangulayo esandleni sayo; kodwa yenza ngentando yayo, yaba nkulu." 
Daniel8:5 Kekaloku ndisagqala nje, bona ke, inkunzi yebokwe yavela entshonalanga pezu kwobuso bomhlaba wonke, ingapati umhlaba kodwa: ibokwe leyo ibinopondo olubonakalayo pakati kwamehlo ayo." 
Daniel8:6 Yayisiza kuyo inkunzi yegusha enempondo mbini, leyo ndabendiyibonile imi pambi kwomlambo, yabalekela kuyo ngobuṙalaṙume bamandla ayo." 
Daniel8:7 Ndayibona isondela kufupi nenkunzi yegusha, yaza yacunukiswa ngakuyo, yayibeta inkunzi yegusha, yazapula impondo zayo zombini; kwada akwabi sabiko amandla kuyo inkunzi yegusha okuba ime pambi kwayo, koko yayiwisa pantsi emhlabeni, yayinyatela; kanjako bekungeko owahlangulayo inkunzi yegusha esandleni sayo." 
Daniel8:8 Yada yaba nkulu kunene inkunzi yebokwe: kodwa yakuba inamandla, lwapuka olopondo lukulu, zaza zenyuka ezine ezibonakalayo endaweni yalo, ngasemimoyeni yomine yezulu." 
Daniel8:9 Nakolunye lwazo lwapuma upondo oluncinane, olwaba lukulu ngento egqitisileyo, ngasesuyide, nangasempumalanga, nangas ezweni elihle." 
Daniel8:10 Lwaba lukulu ngasemkosini wezulu; lwaza lwawisa ngasemhlabeni inxenye kumkosi lowo nakwinkwenkwezi, lwazinyatela." 
Daniel8:11 Lwaluzenza lukulu nangakuyo inkosi yomkosi, kwaza kwasuswa kuyo idini elifuti, nentlalo yendawo eyingcwele yayo yawiswa pantsi." 
Daniel8:12 Wonikelwa nomkosi, ngapezu kw edini elifuti, ngenxa yesigqito; lwaluya kuwisa pantsi inyaniso emhlabeni, lwenze nokwenza, luhambiseke kanjako." 
Daniel8:13 Ndaza ndeva oyingcwele eteta; wati omnye oyingcwele kulowo okwa nguye owatetayo: Woba kade kangakananina umboniso ngalo idini elifuti nesigqito esicitakalisayo, ukuba kunikelwe n endawo eyingcwele nomkosi ukunyatelwa pantsi?" 
Daniel8:14 Wayesiti kum: Kwa kude kube yimihla engamawaka mabini anamakulu matatu; yandul’ ukulungiswa indawo eyingcwele. 
Daniel8:15 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni bendibonile umboniso, mna Danyeli, ndafuna uku wu qonda, kekaloku bona ke, kwema ngapambi kwam njengokubonakala kwendoda." 
Daniel8:16 Ndeva nelizwi lomntu pakati kwomlambo we‐Wulai, owabizayo, wati: Gabriyeli! mqondise lo umboniso." 
Daniel8:17 Wasuka weza kufupi apo ndema kona; ndati ke akuza, ndoyika, ndawa ebusweni bam: waza wati kum: Qonda, wena nyana woluntu! ngokuba umboniso lo ungowexesha lesipelo." 
Daniel8:18 Kekaloku nxa asateta nam, ndawelwa butongo obukulu ndisebusweni bam ngasemhlabeni; wandula wandicu̔kumisa, wandimisa pezu kwendawo yokuma yam." 
Daniel8:19 Wayesiti: Bona ke, ndiya kukwazisa oko okuya kubako ekugqityelweni kwengqumbo; ngokuba ixesha elimiselweyo sinesipelo." 
Daniel8:20 Inkunzi yegusha owayibonayo inempondo mbini, bangokumkani bama‐Medi nama‐Peresiya." 
Daniel8:21 Nebokwe elixonti, ngukumkani we‐Javane; nopondo olukulu, olo lupakati kwamehlo ayo, ngukumkani wokuqala." 
Daniel8:22 Kekaloku ukuba lwapuka lona, nokuba kwema ezine endaweni yalo, kuya kusuka ubukumkani obune esizweni eso, kodwa akuyi kuba semandleni alo." 
Daniel8:23 Nasekupeleni kwobukumkani bazo, bakuba abagqiti befezile ukugqita, kwosuka ukumkani, elukuni ngobuso, eqonda amaqinga." 
Daniel8:24 Amandla ake aya kwomelela, kodwa akuyi kuba ngawake amandla: uya kutshabalalisa ngokungummangaliso, ahambiseke, enze nokwenza; waeya kutshabalalisa abanamandla nabantu abangcwele." 
Daniel8:25 Kanjako ngobuqinga bake uya kuhambisa inkohliso esandleni sake: waeya kuzenza mkulu entliziyweni yake, atshabalalise abaninzi eluxolweni: kanjalo uya kumela inkosi kankosi; kodwa uya kwapulwa singeko isandla." 
Daniel8:26 Kekaloku umboniso wokuhlwa nokusa, oxeliweyo, uyinene; kodwa wena, wuvalele lomboniso, ngokuba ungowemihla emininzi." 
Daniel8:27 Ndaza mna Danyeli ndawa, ndandintsuku ndisifa; ndada ndesuka, ndawenza umsebenzi wokumkani; ndabenditelwa nqa lomboniso, kodwa akwabiko owuqondayo." 
Daniel9:1 NGOWOKUQALA umnyaka ka‐Dariyusi unyana ka‐Hasheveroshe, kwinzalo yama‐Medi, owenzwa ukumkani pezu kwobukumkani bama‐Kaledine;" 
Daniel9:2 ngowokuqala umnyaka wokubupata kwake, mna Danyeli ndaqonda ngencwadi inani leminyaka, elati ilizwi likayehova leza ngalo ku‐Jeremiya umprofite, ukuba kuzalisekiselwe ingcitakalo ze‐Yerusaleme iminyaka imashumi asixe̔nxe." 
Daniel9:3 Ndaza ndabeka ubuso bam ngakuyo inkosi, utixo, ukuba ndi m fune ngotandazo nezikungo, ngokuzila ukutya, nangentlakantlaka notutu:" 
Daniel9:4 ndatandaza kuyehova, utixo wam, ndenza imvumo yam, ndati: Au, Nkosi! lowo utixo umkulu owoyikekileyo, ogcinela abo bamtandayo nabo babamba imiyalelo yake ucebano nobubele!" 
Daniel9:5 Sonile tina, senzile ngobugwenxa, senza okukohlakeleyo, saye singabangevayo, ngokupambuka emiyalelweni yako nasezigwetyeni zako:" 
Daniel9:6 kanjako asipulapulanga kwizicaka zako abaprofite, abateta egameni lako kubo okumkani betu, inkosi zetu, nobawo betu, nakubo bonke abantu belizwe." 
Daniel9:7 Kuwe, Nkosi! kuko ukulunga, kodwa kuti kuko ukudana kwobuso, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje; kuwo amadoda akwa‐Juda, nakubo abemi base‐Yerusaleme, nakubo o‐Sirayeli bonke, abo bakufupi, nabo bakude, kuwo onke amazwe apo ubagxotele kona, ngenxa yobumenemene babo abenzileyo ngakuwe." 
Daniel9:8 Nkosi! kuti kuko ukudana kwobuso, kokumkani betu, kwinkosi zetu, nakobawo betu, ngokuba sonile ngakuwe." 
Daniel9:9 Kuyo inkosi, utixo wetu, kuko izibele nezixolelo, nakuba sivukele ngakuyo;" 
Daniel9:10 singapulapulanga nelizwi likayehova, lotixo wetu, lokuba sihambe ngemiteto yake ayibekileyo pambi kwetu ngezicaka zake abaprofite." 
Daniel9:11 Ewe, o‐Sirayeli bonke bagqitile umteto wako, kwa ngokupambuka, ukuze bangapulapuli ilizwi lako; ngako sigalelelwe sisiqalekiso nesifungo esiba̔liweyo emtetweni ka‐Mosesi isicaka sikatixo, ngokokuba sonile ngakuye." 
Daniel9:12 Namazwi ake owawateta ngakuti, nangakubo abagwebi betu abasigwebayo, uwaqinisile, ngokuzisa pezu kwetu ububi obukulu; ngokuba kungenziwanga ngapantsi kwezulu lonke njengokuba kwenziwe e‐Yerusaleme." 
Daniel9:13 Njengokuba kuba̔liwe emtetweni ka‐Mosesi, kufikile pezu kwetu bonke obububi; kanti asibongozanga uyehova, utixo wetu, ukuba siguquke ezinkohlakalweni zetu, sigqale inyaniso yako." 
Daniel9:14 Ngako uyehova ulindile pezu kwobububi, wabuzisa pezu kwetu: ngokuba uyehova, utixo wetu, elungile kuyo yonke imisebenzi yake ayenzayo: ngokuba ilizwi lake singalipulapulanga." 
Daniel9:15 Nakaloku, Nkosi, Tixo wetu! obaku̔pileyo abantu bako ezweni le‐Jipete ngesandla esomeleleyo, wazenzela igama, njengokuba kunjalo namhla nje; sonile, senzile ngokukohlakeleyo." 
Daniel9:16 Nkosi! njengabo bonke ubulungisa bako, makekunqandwe ingqumbo yako nobuṙalaṙume bako kuso isixeko sako i‐Yerusaleme, intaba eyingcwele yako: ngokuba ngenxa yezono zetu, nangenxa yenkohlakalo zobawo betu, i‐Yerusaleme nabantu bako basisigxekwa kubo bonke abasingqongayo." 
Daniel9:17 Ngako kaloku, Tixo wetu! yiva umtandazo wesicaka sako, nezikungo zaso, ukanyise ubuso bako ngapezu kweyingcwele indawo yako ecitakeleyo, ngenxa yenkosi." 
Daniel9:18 Tixo wam! tobela indlebe yako, uve ke; vula amehlo ako, ubone ingci̔takalo zetu, nesixeko esibizwayo ngegama lako: ngokuba kungengenxa yobulungisa betu esibeka izikungo zetu ebusweni bako, kungenxa yezibele zako ezikulu." 
Daniel9:19 Nkosi, yiva! Nkosi, xolela! Nkosi, pulapula, wenze ke! zungalibali, ngenxa yokwako, Tixo wam! ngokuba isixeko sako nabantu bako bebizwa ngegama lako." 
Daniel9:20 Kekaloku ndisateta mna, nditandaza, ndivuma isono sam nesono sabantu bam o‐Sirayeli, ndibeka nokubeka isikungo sam ebusweni bukayehova, utixo wam, ngenxa yentaba eyingcwele katixo wam:" 
Daniel9:21 ewe, ndisateta mna ekutandazeni, indoda engu‐Gabriyeli, leyo bendiyibonile embonisweni ekuqaleni, ikaulezisiwe nje ngokubaleka, yandicu̔kumisa ngexesha lingati lelomnikelo wokuhlwa." 
Daniel9:22 Waza wa ndi qondisa, wateta nam, wati: Danyeli! ndipumile kaloku nje ukuza kukufundisa ukuqonda." 
Daniel9:23 Ekuqaleni kwezikungo zako lapuma ilizwi; ndize nam ukuba ndi ku xelele; ngokuba ungotandiweyo wena: ngako qonda lendawo, ugqale lomboniso." 
Daniel9:24 Iveki ezimashumi asixe̔nxe zimiselwe pezu kwabantu bako, napezu kwesixeko sako esiyingcwele, kuze kugqitywe isigqito, kupeliswe izono, kuxoliselwe inkohlakalo, kungeniswe ubulungisa obungunapakade, kuncanyatiselwe umboniso nesiprofitesho, kutanjiswe oyingcwele wabangcwele." 
Daniel9:25 Yazi ke, uqonde: kwa sekupumeni kwelizwi lokuba ibuye yakiwe i‐Yerusaleme kude kufike u‐Mesiya, inkosi, ziziveki ezisixe̔nxe, neveki ezimashumi matandatu anambini: kwobuya kwakiwe isitarate, nodonga, kwa ngamaxesha obunzima." 
Daniel9:26 Nasemveni kwazo ezoveki zimashumi matandatu anambini u‐Mesiya wonqanyulwa, kodwa akuyi kuba ngenxa yokwake; nesixeko n endawo eyingcwele bozitshabalalisa abantu benkosi eya kuza; ukupela kwayo kwoba ngomsinga, nakude kube sekupeleni kwobako imfazwe, n engci̔takalo ezimisiweyo." 
Daniel9:27 Waeya kuqinisa ucebano nabaninzi iveki ibe nye; napakati kweveki leyo uya kupelisa umbingo nomnikelo; nangenxa yokutwabululeka kwezinto ezizondekileyo uya kucitakalisa, kwa kude kube kukugqitywa, nxa okumisiweyo kuya kutululwa pezu kwokucitakeleyo." 
Daniel10:1 NGOMNYAKA wesitatu ka‐Koreshe ukumkani we‐Peresiya, kwatyilwa into ku‐Danyeli, ogama lalibizwa ngo‐Beleteshatsare: lento ibiyinene, kodwa ukulwa bebukukulu: wayiqonda lento, wanokuqonda ngomboniso kanjalo." 
Daniel10:2 Ngezontsuku mna Danyeli bendilila isitatu seveki zemihla. 
Daniel10:3 Isonka esimnandi bendingasidli, akwangena emlonyeni wam nenyama neveyine, bendingake ndazitambisa kanjako, kwada kwazaliseka ezoveki zemihla zontatu." 
Daniel10:4 Nangowamashumi mabini anesine umhla wenyanga yokuqala, nxa bendingasecaleni lomlambo omkulu, le‐Hidekele," 
Daniel10:5 ndawapakamisa amehlo am, ndakangela; kekaloku nantsiya indoda yambete izivato zeqiya, nesinqe sayo sibinqiwe ngegolide yase‐Yufazi:" 
Daniel10:6 nomzimba wayo ubunjengelitye letareshishe, nobuso bayo njengokubonakala kwombane, namehlo ayo njengezibane zomlilo, nengalo zayo nenyawo zayo njengobubengebenge bexina egudisiweyo, nentlokoma yamazwi ayo njengentlokoma yesihlwele." 
Daniel10:7 Lomboniso ndawubona mna Danyeli ndedwa; ngokuba amadoda abeko nam engabonanga umboniso lowo; koko ebewelwe kukunkwantya okukulu, aza abaleka ukuba azimele." 
Daniel10:8 Ndaza ndashiywa ndedwa, ndawubona lomboniso umkulu, kodwa akwasala amandla kum; kwandiguqulelwa ukwomelela kwam kwaba kukwonakala, ndingasabambanga amandla." 
Daniel10:9 Ndayiva noko intlokoma yamazwi ayo; naxeshekweni bendisiva intlokoma yamazwi ayo, ndawelwa bubutongo obukulu ndipezu kwobuso bam, ubuso bam bungasemhlabeni." 
Daniel10:10 Kekaloku bona ke, kwandicu̔kumisa isandla, esandigexisa pezu kwamadolo am nentende zezandla zam." 
Daniel10:11 Wayesiti kum: Danyeli, ndoda etandiweyo! gqala amazwi endiwatetayo kuwe, ume pezu kwendawo yokuma yako; ngokuba nditunyiwe kaloku nje ukuza kuwe. Ndati akuba etetile elolizwi kum, ndema ndingcangcazela." 
Daniel10:12 Waza wati kum: Zungoyiki, Danyeli! ngokuba kowokuqala umhla ubuyibeka intliziyo yako ukuqonda, nokuzibandezela pambi kwotixo wako, ebeviwa amazwi ako; ndize nam ngenxa yamazwi ako." 
Daniel10:13 Kodwa inkosi yobukumkani be‐Peresiya yandimela intsuku zamashumi mabini ananye: koko, bona ke, u‐Mikaheli, enye yenkosi zokuqala, weza kundinceda; ndaza ndasala kona ndawonye nabo okumkani be‐Peresiya." 
Daniel10:14 Ndize ke ukuba ndikuqondise okuya kuhla ebantwini bako emihleni yokupela: ngokuba umboniso usengowemihla emininzi. 
Daniel10:15 Ndati akuba etetile lamazwi kum, ndabeka ubuso bam ngasemhlabeni, ndaba sidenge." 
Daniel10:16 Kekaloku bona ke, ofana nonyana boluntu wacu̔kumisa umlomo wam; ndandul’ ukuvula umlomo wam, ndateta, ndati kulowo owema ngapambi kwam: Nkosi! ngawo umboniso intsizi zam ziguqulwe pezu kwam, ndingasabambanga amandla." 
Daniel10:17 Singati nina ke isicaka salenkosi yam ukuteta nalenkosi yam? ngokuba mna, kwa kaloku kungahleli amandla kum, kungasele umpefumlo kum kanjalo." 
Daniel10:18 Waza wabuya wandicu̔kumisa onjengokubonakala kwomntu, wandomeleza," 
Daniel10:19 wati: Zungoyiki, ndoda etandiweyo! uxolo malube kuwe, yomelela, ewe, yomelela. Nakeshekweni abeteta nam, ndomelezwa, ndati: Maitete inkosi yam; ngokuba undomelezile." 
Daniel10:20 Waza wati: Uyazi na ndizele nina kuwe? Kodwa ngoku ndiya kubuya ukuba ndilwe nenkosi ye‐Peresiya; nxa ndipumileyo mna, bona ke; iya kuza inkosi ye‐Javane." 
Daniel10:21 Noko ndiya kushumayela kuwe oko kuba̔liweyo esiba̔lweni senyaniso. Akuko ke namnye ozomelezelana nam ngakuzo ezi, kupela ngu‐Mikaheli inkosi yenu." 
Daniel11:1 Kanjako mna, ngowokuqala umnyaka ka‐Dariyusi um‐Medi, ndema ukuba ndibe ngumomelezi nenqaba kuye." 
Daniel11:2 Nakaloku ndoyishumayela kuwe inyaniso. Bona ke, kusaza kusuka okumkani abatatu e‐Peresiya: kanjalo owesine wotyeba ngobutyebi obukulu pezu kwabo bonke; nasekwomeleleni kwake ngobutyebi bake uya kuvusa bonke ngakubo ubukumkani base‐Javane." 
Daniel11:3 Kwoda kusuke ukumkani onamandla, oya kupata ngobukosi obukulu, enze ngeyake intando." 
Daniel11:4 Nxa aya kuma, boti ubukumkani bake bapulwe, bahlulelwe emimoyeni yomine yezulu, kungabi kubo abenzalo yake, kungabi njengabo ubukosi bake wabepata ngabo kanjalo: ngokuba ubukumkani bake buya kudonyulwa, bube bobabanye ngapandle kwabo aba." 
Daniel11:5 Waeya kwomelela ukumkani wasesuyide, n enye kwinkosana zake, eya kwomelela ngapezu kwake, ipate ubukosi; ubukosi bayo boba bubukosi obukulu." 
Daniel11:6 Nasekupeleni kweminyaka etile botelelana; ngokuba intombi yokumkani wasesuyide iya kuza kukumkani wasenode ukwenza uxolo: kodwa ayiyi kuba esabamba amandla engalo; naye akayi kuma, neyake ingalo: koko iya kunikelwa, nabo bayizisayo, nowayizalayo, nowayomelezayo ngalomaxesha." 
Daniel11:7 Kodwa esebeni lengcambo zayo kwosuka omnye esikundleni sake, oya kuza nempi, angene enqatyeni yokumkani wasenode, enze ngakubo, eyise nokweyisa." 
Daniel11:8 Nakanjako otixo babo, kunye nenkosi zabo, nezinto zabo ezinqwenelekileyo ezesilivere nezegolide, wozitimba azise e‐Jipete; waeya kuma yena iminyaka engapezu kweyokumkani wasenode." 
Daniel11:9 Woda eze ebukumkanini bake ukumkani wasesuyide, abuyele elizweni lake." 
Daniel11:10 Kodwa onyana bake baya kwenza imfazwe, basihlanganise isihlwele sempi ezinkulu; waeya kunxama ukuza omnye, akukulise, adlule nokudlula; andul’ ukubuya, enze imfazwe kude kube senqatyeni yake." 
Daniel11:11 Waye ukumkani wasesuyide eya kucunukiswa, apume alwe naye, kwa nokumkani wasenode: uya kuku̔pa isihlwele esikulu naye; kodwa isihlwele eso sonikelwa esandleni sake." 
Daniel11:12 Nxa sisusiwe esosihlwele, iya kupakama intliziyo yake; waeya kuwisa amawakawaka; kodwa akayi kwomelezwa noko:" 
Daniel11:13 ngokuba eya kubuya ukumkani wasenode, oya kumisa isihlwele esikulu kwesapambili; nasekupeleni kweminyaka etile, uya kunxama ukuza enempi enkulu nempahla eninzi." 
Daniel11:14 Kanjako ngamaxesha lawo abaninzi bosukela ngakuye ukumkani wasesuyide: aeya kuzipakamisa amanyangaza abantu bako, ukuba kuqiniswe umboniso; kodwa aya kuwa." 
Daniel11:15 Waeya kuza ukumkani wasenode, aposele induli, abambe izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo: zaye ingalo zowasesuyide zingayi kuma, nabantu bake abanyuliweyo, kanjalo akuyi kubako amandla okuma." 
Daniel11:16 Kodwa lowo ozayo ngakuye uya kwenza ngeyake intando, kungeko namnye oya kuma ebusweni bake; waeya kuma elizweni elihle, elikugqitywa kwoba sesandleni sake." 
Daniel11:17 Kanjako uya kubeka ubuso bake ukuza namandla obukumkani bake bonke, nabalungileyo kunye naye, enze nokwenza; waeya kumnika intombi yabafazi, efuna ukuyonakalisa; kodwa ayi kuba nokuma, ayi kuba ngecala lake kanjalo." 
Daniel11:18 Woda aguqule ubuso bake ukuya eziqitini, abambe ezininzi: kodwa inkosi etile iya kwenza ukuyihlazisa kwake kupele, ngapandle kwokuba ukuhlazisa kwake iya kukubuyisa pezu kwake." 
Daniel11:19 Andule asonge ubuso bake ngasezinqatyeni zelake ilizwe: kodwa uya kuku̔beka, awe, angabi senokufunyanwa." 
Daniel11:20 Kuya kwandula kusuke esikundleni sake odlulisayo umbizi weminikelo ebungcwaliseni bobukumkani; kodwa pakati kwentsuku ezitile uya kwapuka, kungengemisindo, kungengemfazwe kanjako." 
Daniel11:21 Woda asuke esikundleni sake odelekileyo, ekungayi kunikwa kuye ubungangamsha bobukumkani; kodwa uya kuza eluxolweni, nobukumkani uya kububamba ngezibongo." 
Daniel11:22 Nangengalo zomsinga baya kukukuliswa pambi kwake, bapulwe nokwapulwa, nenkosi yocebano nayo." 
Daniel11:23 Nasemva kwokuba kwenziwe ukutelelana nayo, uya kwenza ngenkohliso; waeya kunyuka azuze amandla ngento enciname yabantu." 
Daniel11:24 Eluxolweni uya kuza nakwezityebileyo indawo zezwana; waeya kukwenza oko kungenziwanga ngoyise bake, nangoyise boyise bake; impango, namaxoba, nempahla, wozicita pakati kwabo; nangakuzo inqaba wowaqinga amaqinga ake, kwa kude kube lixesha elitile." 
Daniel11:25 Waeya kuvusa amandla ake nentliziyo yake ngakuye ukumkani wasesuyide, enempi enkulu; naye ukumkani wasesuyide wovuselwa ukulwa, enempi enkulu, kwa into eninzi kunene: kodwa akayi kuba nokuma; ngokuba beya kuqinga ngakuye amaqinga." 
Daniel11:26 Ewe, abo badlayo ukutya okumnandi kwake baya kumapula, nempi yake iya kukukulisa; babeya kuwa ababuleweyo abaninzi." 
Daniel11:27 Okumkani aba bobabini intliziyo zabo zofuna ukwenza ububi, nasesitebeni sinye baya kuteta ulwimi; kodwa akuyi kuba nokuhambiseka, ngokuba kusaza kubako ukupela ngexesha elimiselweyo." 
Daniel11:28 Uya kwandula abuyele elizweni lake enempahla into enkulu; yaiya kuti intliziyo yake ibe ngakulo ucebano olungcwele; uya kwenza nokwenza, abuyele kwelake ilizwe." 
Daniel11:29 Ngexesha elimiselweyo uya kubuya, eze ngasesuyide; koko kungayi kuba njengokwapambili, nanjengokwasemva." 
Daniel11:30 Ngokuba ziya kuza ngakuye inqanawa zama‐Kiti; woba nobuhlungu ngoko, abuye ke, aluqumbele ucebano olungcwele, enze nokwenza: ewe, uya kubuya, agqalele abalushiyayo ucebano olungcwele." 
Daniel11:31 Zaziya kusuka ingalo ngenxa yake, eziya kunco̔lisa eyingcwele indawo, inqaba, zilisuse idini elifuti, ziyibeke into ezondekileyo eci̔takalisayo." 
Daniel11:32 Nabo benzayo ngokukohlakeleyo ngakulo ucebano uya kubonakalisa ngezibongo; kodwa abantu abamaziyo utixo wabo baya kwomelela, benze nokwenza." 
Daniel11:33 Kanjalo abo banokuqonda pakati kwabantu bobafundisa abaninzi: noko baya kuwa ngesiṙele nangelangatye, ngokutinjwa nangokupangwa, kube ntsuku." 
Daniel11:34 Nasekuweni kwabo, baya kuncedwa ngoncedo oluncinane; baye abaninzi beya kunamatela kubo ngezibongo." 
Daniel11:35 Nakubo abanokuqonda baya kuwa inxenye, ukubalinga, nokubahlambulula, nokubenza mhlope, kude kube lixesha lesipelo: ngokuba kusekokwexesha elimiselweyo." 
Daniel11:36 Kanjalo uya kwenza ngentando yake ukumkani lowo; waeya kuzipakamisa, azenze mkulu ngapezu kwotixo bonke, atete izinto ezimangalisayo ngakuye utixo wotixo, ahambiseke kude kugqitywe ingqumbo: ngokuba kuya kwenziwa okumisiweyo." 
Daniel11:37 Akayi kugqalela otixo boyise bake, nonqwenelo lwabafazi; akayi kugqalela kwa namnye utixo, kodwa wozenza mkulu pezu kwonke." 
Daniel11:38 Notixo wenqaba uya kumenzela ubungcwalisa esikundleni sake; kwa utixo abangamazanga oyise bake uya kumenzela ubungcwalisa ngegolide, nangesilivere, nangamatye anqabileyo, nangezinto ezinqwenelekileyo." 
Daniel11:39 Ewe, uya kwenzela inqaba ezinqatyisiweyo kunye notixo wasemzini; lowo oya kumvuma womandisela ubungcwalisa; waeya kubapatisa ubukosi pezu kwabaninzi, nelizwe wolaba ngenxa yomvuzo." 
Daniel11:40 Nangexesha lesipelo ukumkani wasesuyide wosunduza ngakuye; waye ukumkani wasenode eya kugaleleka pezu kwake njengoqwitela, enenqwelo zokulwa, nabakweli bamahashe, nenqanawa ezininzi; waeya kungena emazweni, akukulise, adlule nokudlula," 
Daniel11:41 wongena nasezweni elihle, n amazwe amaninzi aya kuwiswa; kodwa aya kusinda la esandleni sake, i‐Edome, ne‐Mowabi, nabazintloko zosapo luka‐Hamoni." 
Daniel11:42 Uya kusolula isandla sake pezu kwamazwe; aliyi kusinda ilizwe le‐Jipete. 
Daniel11:43 Waeya kuba namandla pezu kwendyebo zegolide nesilivere, napezu kwazo zonke izinto ezinqwenelekileyo zase‐Jipete: kananjalo ama‐Libiya nama‐Tiyopiya oba semikondweni yake." 
Daniel11:44 Kodwa indaba zivela empumalanga nasenode ziya kumtusa; woti ngako apume ngomsindo omkulu ukubatshabalalisa nokubalahlela embujisweni abaninzi.
