Daniel11:45 Nentente zekomkulu lake wozimisa pakati kwelwandle ngasentabeni entle engcwele; woda eze ekupeleni kwake, kungeko oya kumnceda." 
Daniel12:1 Nangexesha elo kwosuka u‐Mikaheli, lonkosi inkulu esukayo ngenxa yosapo lwabantu bako: kwobako ixesha lobunzima, ebelingezanga libeko elinjalo kuseloko kube kuko isizwe kwada kwalixesha elo: nangeloxesha baya kusindiswa abantu bako, bonke abaya kufunyanwa beba̔liwe encwadini." 
Daniel12:2 Baye abaninzi abaleleyo elutulini lwomhlaba beya kuvuka, abanye babe sebomini obungunapakade, nabanye babe sekuhlazekeni na sekudelweni okungunapakade." 
Daniel12:3 Abo banokuqonda bokanya njengokukazimla kwesibakabaka, nabo bakokelayo abaninzi ebulungiseni njengenkwenkwezi, kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Daniel12:4 Kodwa wena, Danyeli! valela lamazwi, uncamatisele lencwadi, kude kube lixesha lesipelo: bosukasuka abaninzi, kuya kwandiswa ukwazi ngako." 
Daniel12:5 Ndaza ndakangela mna Danyeli, kekaloku bona ke, kwema abanye bebabini, omnye nganeno elugudwini lwomlambo, nomnye pesheya elugudwini lwomlambo." 
Daniel12:6 Wayesiti omnye kwindoda eyambete izivato zeqiya, ebipezu kwamanzi omlambo: Kwoba kade kangakananina kude kube kukupela kwalemimangaliso?" 
Daniel12:7 Ndaza ndeva londoda eyambete izivato zeqiya, ebipezu kwamanzi omlambo, ukuba yapakamisa esokunene isandla sake nesokohlo sake ngasezulwini, yamfunga lowo okuhlala kungunapakade ukuti: Kwoba kokwalo ixesha, amaxesha, nesiqingata sexesha; naxeshekweni agqibileyo ukucita amandla abantu abangcwele, ziya kwandula ukugqitywa ezi zinto zonke." 
Daniel12:8 Ndeva ke, koko ndingaqondanga: ndaza ndati: Nkosi yam! kwoba yinto nina ukupela kwezi zinto?" 
Daniel12:9 Wayesiti: Hamba, Danyeli! ngokuba evalelwe encanyatiselwe amazwi la kude kube lixesha lesipelo." 
Daniel12:10 Abaninzi baya kuhlanjululwa, benzwe mhlope, balingwe nokulingwa; kodwa abakohlakeleyo baya kwenza ngokukohlakeleyo: baye bengayi kuqonda bonke abakohlakeleyo; kodwa abalumkileyo baya kuqonda." 
Daniel12:11 Nasemva kwexesha lokususwa kw edini elifuti, nelokumiswa kwento ezondekileyo ecitakalisayo, kuya kubako imihla iliwaka linamakulu mabini anamashumi alitoba." 
Daniel12:12 Unetamsanqa lowo ulindayo, ofikela kuyo imihla iliwaka linamakulu matatu anamashumi matatu anesihlanu." 
Daniel12:13 Kodwa wena, hamba kude kubeko isipelo; ngokuba uya kupumla, ume elifeni lako, esipelweni semihla." 
Hosea1:1 ILIZWI likayehova elezayo ku‐Hosheha, unyana ka‐Beri, emihleni ka‐Huziya, u‐Yotame, u‐Ahazi, n o‐Hezekiya, okumkani bo‐Juda; nasemihleni ka‐Jerobome, unyana ka‐Yohashe, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli." 
Hosea1:2 Ukuqala kwelizwi likayehova ngaye u‐Hosheha. Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Hosheha: Yiya, uzizekele umfazi wemibulo, nabantwana bemibulo, ngokuba ilizwe liwenzile umbulo omkulu, lahlukene noyehova nje." 
Hosea1:3 Waza waya wamzeka u‐Gomere, intombi ka‐Dibelayime: wakaula ke, wamzalela unyana." 
Hosea1:4 Wayesiti uyehova kuye: Mbize ngegama elingu‐Yezerele; ngokuba kuya kuba mzuzwana kodwa, ndandiya kwandula ndilohlwayele igazi lase‐Yezerele pezu kwendlu ka‐Jehu, ndipelise nobukumkani bayo indlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Hosea1:5 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ukuba ndiya kwapula isipeta so‐Sirayeli emhlanjeni wase‐Yezerele." 
Hosea1:6 Wabuya wakaula, wazala intombi; wayesiti u‐Yehova kuye: Biza igama layo ngo‐Lo‐ruhama: ngokuba ndingasayi kwalekela ukuba nenceba ngakuyo indlu ka‐Sirayeli, koko ndiya kugqibela ukubasusa." 
Hosea1:7 Kodwa indlu ka‐Juda udoba nenceba ngakuyo, ndibasindise ngaye uyehova, utixo wabo, ndingabasindisi ngesipeta, nangeṙele, nangokulwa, ngamahashe nangabakweli bamahashe." 
Hosea1:8 Wada walumla u‐Lo‐ruhama, wakaula, wazala unyana." 
Hosea1:9 Wayesiti u‐Yehova: Biza igama lake ngo‐Lo‐ami; ngokuba ningengabo abantu bam, kanjalo mna andiyi kuba nguye u‐Tixo wenu." 
Hosea1:10 Noko, usapo luka‐Sirayeli lwoba njengentlabati yolwandle, engenako ukulinganiswa nokubalwa; kwakuya kuti, endaweni ebekutiwa kulo: Aningabo abantu bam, kwotiwa kulo: Nilusapo lwotixo ohleliyo." 
Hosea1:11 Luya kwandula usapo luka‐Juda nosapo luka‐Sirayeli luhlanganiselwe ndawonye, luzimisele intloko inye, lunyuke elizweni: ngokuba uya kuba mkulu umhla wo‐Yezerele." 
Hosea2:1 Yitini kubazalwana benu: Ami; nakubo odade benu: Ruhama. 
Hosea2:2 PIKANI nonyoko, pikani; ngokuba engenguye umfazi wam, kanjako andiyiyo indoda yake; ukuba akwelelise imibulo yake ebusweni bake, nemiṙexezo yake kwa pakati kwamabele ake:" 
Hosea2:3 hleze ndimhlube abe zé, ndimmise njengasemhleni wazalwayo, ndimenze njengalo ubala, ndimbeke njengelizwe elomileyo, ndimfise ngenxanwa." 
Hosea2:4 Nabantwana bake andiyi kuba nenceba ngakubo, ngokuba bengabantwana bemibulo bona." 
Hosea2:5 Ngokuba unina wabo enzile umbulo, owabazalayo wenzile ngento ehlazekileyo, ngokuba ebesiti: Ndolandela abatandi bam, abapayo isonka sam namanzi am, uboya bam nefelase yam, ioli yam nento zokusela zam." 
Hosea2:6 Ngako oko, bona ke, ndobiyela indlela yako ngameva, ndolwenza udonga, ukuba angafumani imizila yake." 
Hosea2:7 Waeya kuputuma abatandi bake, kanti akayi kufikelana nabo; wobafuna ke, kanti akayi kubafumana: uya kwandula ati: Ndoya ndibuyele kweyokuqala indoda yam, ngokuba bekulungile kum oko ngapezu kwakaloku," 
Hosea2:8 Ngokuba ebengazi ukuba ndim owampayo inqolowa, neveyine entsha, neoli; nokuba ndamandisela isilivere negolide, ekungazo benza o‐Bali." 
Hosea2:9 Ngako oko ndobuya nditabate inqolowa yam ngexesha layo, neveyine entsha yam ngomzuzu wayo; ndandiya kususa uboya bam nefelase yam, ezipiweyo ukugubungela ubuzé bake." 
Hosea2:10 Nakaloku ndiya kutyila ubuhlazo bake ebusweni babatandi bake: akuko namnye oya kumhlangula esandleni sam. 
Hosea2:11 Ndandiya kupelisa wonke umgcobo wake, imitendeleko yake, inyanga ezitwasileyo zake, nesabata zake, nazo zonke intlanganiso zake ezimiselweyo." 
Hosea2:12 Kanjalo ndiya kuci̔takalisa imiti yake yeveyine nemikiwane yake, owati ngayo: Le ingumvuzo wam, endipiwe wona ngabatandi bam; ndandiya kuyenza ibe lihlati, nezilo zasendle zoyidla." 
Hosea2:13 Ndomohlwayela imihla yo‐Bali, leyo wabaqu̔misela ngayo, wazihomba ngemisesane yempumlo nangezambalo, wabalandela abatandi bake, wandilibala mna, utsho uyehova." 
Hosea2:14 Ngako oko, bona ke, ndiya kumcenga, ndimkapele entlango, nditete kuyo intliziyo yake." 
Hosea2:15 Ndandiya kumnika imiyezo yake kwa lapo, nomhlambo we‐Hakore ube lituba letemba: waeya kuvuma kona, njengasemihleni yobutsha bake, nanjengasemhleni wenyuka ngawo elizweni le‐Jipete." 
Hosea2:16 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova, uya kundibiza ngokuti: Ishi; akusayi kundibiza ngokuti: Bali." 
Hosea2:17 Ngokuba ndiya kususa amagama o‐Bali emlonyeni wake, baye bona bengasayi kukunjulwa ngegama labo." 
Hosea2:18 Ndandiya kuti ngomhla lowo ndibenzele ucebano kunye nezilo zasendle, nakunye nentaka zezulu nezinambuzane zomhlaba: nesipeta, nesiṙele, n ezixo̔bo zokulwa, ndozapula ndiziku̔pe elizweni, ndandiya kubenza bati tyambalala ngokunqaba." 
Hosea2:19 Ndokuxamela kum kude kube ngunapakade; ndokuxamela kum kwa ngobulungisa, nangobugwebo, nangobubele, nangenceba." 
Hosea2:20 Ewe, ndokuxamela kum ngenyaniso; wauya kumazi uyehova." 
Hosea2:21 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ndiya kupendula, utsho uyehova, ndiya kupendula amazulu, nawo wona opendula umhlaba," 
Hosea2:22 nomhlaba wopendula inqolowa, neveyine entsha, neoli, nazo zona ziya kupendula i‐Yezerele." 
Hosea2:23 Ndandiya kuyihlwayelela mna emhlabeni, ndoba nenceba ngakuye u‐Lo‐ruhama; ndandiya kuti ku‐Lo‐ami: Wena ungabantu bam; boti bona: Tixo wam!" 
Hosea3:1 WAYESITI kum uyehova: Buya uye utande umfazi otandiweyo ngumhlobo, noko aliṙexezakazi, njengokuba uyehova etanda usapo luka‐Sirayeli, nangona lubeke kotixo bambi, lwatanda izonkana zedreyive." 
Hosea3:2 Ndaza ndamtengela mna ng amaqosha esilivere alishumi linesihlanu, nehomere yeṙalasi, nesiqingata sehomere yeṙalasi." 
Hosea3:3 Ndaye ndisiti kuye: Wondihlalela mna imihla ibe mininzi; akuyi kuwenza umbulo, kanjalo akuyi kuba ngowendoda yimbi: nam ndiya ku hlal ela wena." 
Hosea3:4 Ngokuba usapo luka‐Sirayeli luya kuhlala imihla emininzi lungenakumkani, lungenankosi, lungenambingo, lungenamfanekiso, lungenayefodi, lungenaterafi." 
Hosea3:5 Kamva lwobuya usapo luka‐Sirayeli, lufune uyehova, utixo walo, no‐Davide, ukumkani walo; lwaluya kuza ngokungcangcazela kuyehova nakuko ukulunga kwake, emihleni yokupela." 
Hosea4:1 YIVANI ilizwi likayehova, lusapo luka‐Sirayeli! ngokuba uyehova enepike nabemi belizwe; ngenxa yokuba kungeko inyaniso, nobubele, nokwaziwa kukatixo elizweni." 
Hosea4:2 Ngokuqalekisa, nangokuxoka, nangokubulala, nangokuba̔, nangokuṙexeza, batyobozile, negazi liyafikelana negazi." 
Hosea4:3 Ngako oko ilizwe liya kulila, nabo bonke abemiyo kulo bocubuka kunye nezilo zasendle, nakunye nentaka zezulu; zaziya kususwa nentlanzi zolwandle." 
Hosea4:4 Noko makangapiki namnye umntu, kanjako makangamohlwayi omnye; ngokuba abantu bako benjengabo bapikayo nomperisite." 
Hosea4:5 Ngako uya kuwa emini, nomprofite uya kuwa kunye nawe ebusuku; ndandiya kutshabalalisa unyoko wako." 
Hosea4:6 Abantu bam bayabujiswa ngokuswela ukwazi: ngokuba wena ulahlile ukwazi, nam ndiya kulahla wena, uze ungabi ngumperisite kum; ulibele umteto wotixo wako nje, nam ndolibala abantwana bako." 
Hosea4:7 Njengokwandiswa kwabo, kwaba njalo ukundona kwabo: ubungcwalisa babo ndobuguqula bube lihlazo." 
Hosea4:8 Isono sabantu bam bayasidla, nenkohlakalo yabo bayayilangazelela." 
Hosea4:9 Kwoti ke, njengokuba benjalo abantu, woba njalo umperisite; ndiya kuyohlwayela pezu kwabo imikwa yabo, nezenzo zabo ndozipindezela kubo." 
Hosea4:10 Ngokuba beya kutya, kanti abayi kuhlutiswa; bowenza umbulo, kanti abayi kwanda; ngenxa yokuba bayekile ukumbeka uyehova." 
Hosea4:11 Umbulo, neveyine, neveyine entsha, ziyayisusa intliziyo." 
Hosea4:12 Abantu bam bayabuza emtini wabo, nentonga yabo iyashumayela kubo; ngokuba umoya wemibulo ubalahlekisile; bemkile ngapantsi kwotixo wabo ngombulo." 
Hosea4:13 Bayabingelela pezu kwentloko zentaba, napezu kwenduli bayaqu̔misa; ngapantsi kweyeke, nelibene, neterebinte, ngokuba umtunzi wazo umnandi: ngako oko intombi zenu ziyawenza umbulo, nomolokazana benu bayaṙexeza." 
Hosea4:14 Andiyi kwohlwaya intombi zenu zakuwenza umbulo, nomolokazana benu bakuṙexeza; ngokuba kwa bona bepambukelana nabapinyiswa, bebingelelana nengnawokazi: kodwa abantu abangaqiqiyo baya kuwiswa pantsi." 
Hosea4:15 Nangona wena, Sirayeli! wenza umbulo, makangabi natyala u‐Juda; zeningezi e‐Gilegale, kanjako ningenyukeli e‐Betavene, zeningafungi ngokuti: Uhleli uyehova." 
Hosea4:16 Ngokuba u‐Sirayeli enenkani, njengalo itokazi elinenkani; kaloku uyehova wobadlisa, njengemvana endaweni ebanzi." 
Hosea4:17 U‐Frayime utelelwe kwizitixo: myeke. 
Hosea4:18 Bati, nxa kupelile ukusela kwabo, bahlale besenza umbulo; amakaka alo ayatanda ihlazo kakulu." 
Hosea4:19 Umoya ulibopile emapikweni awo, ukuba badanele imibingo yabo." 
Hosea5:1 YIVANI oku, baperisite! nipulapule, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! bekani indlebe nani, ndlu yokumkani! ngokuba umgwebo ungakuni, ngenxa yokuba beningumgibe e‐Mitsipa, notambo olwanekiweyo pezu kwe‐Tabore." 
Hosea5:2 Abapambuki bandisile ukubinga, kodwa ndoba ngumohlwayi kubo bona bonke." 
Hosea5:3 U‐Frayime ndiyamazi, no‐Sirayeli akandifihlelwanga; ngokuba kaloku, Frayime! uwenza umbulo, u‐Sirayeli unco̔lisekile." 
Hosea5:4 Ababekisi izenzo zabo ukuba babuyele kutixo wabo; ngokuba umoya wemibulo upakati kwabo, noyehova abamazanga." 
Hosea5:5 Ir̔atshi lika‐Sirayeli liyanqi̔na ngasebusweni bake; ngako u‐Sirayeli no‐Frayime bowa ngenkohlakalo yabo; no‐Juda uya kuwa kunye nabo. 
Hosea5:6 Kunye nezimvu zabo, nakunye nenkomo zabo, boya ukumfuna uyehova: kodwa abayi kumfumana: usukile kubo." 
Hosea5:7 Benzile ngobuxoki ngakuye uyehova; ngokuba bezele abantwana basemzini: kaloku inyanga nye yodla bona nezabiwo zabo. 
Hosea5:8 Vutelani ngopondo e‐Gibeha na ngexilongo e‐Rama; memezani e‐Betavene: emva kwako, Benjamine!" 
Hosea5:9 I‐Frayime yoba yingci̔takalo emhleni wokwohlwaywa; pakati kwezizwe zo‐Sirayeli ndikwazisile oko kuqinileyo. 
Hosea5:10 Inkosi zakwa‐Juda ziyafana nabo abashenxisa umda; ndogalela pezu kwazo umsindo wam njengamanzi. 
Hosea5:11 U‐Frayime ubandezelwe, uncinezelwe ekugwetyweni; ngokuba wavumayo, walandela ingxelo." 
Hosea5:12 Ngako mna ndoba njengenundu ku‐Frayime, nanjengokubola kwindlu ka‐Juda." 
Hosea5:13 Wada u‐Frayime wabona isifo sake, no‐Juda inxeba lake; wandula waya u‐Frayime e‐Asiriya; watuma kuye ukumkani opikayo; kodwa yena wakohlwa ukunipilisa, akanipolisela inxeba lenu." 
Hosea5:14 Ngokuba ndiya kuba njengengonyama ku‐Frayime, nanjengengonyama entsha kwindlu ka‐Juda; mna, mna ndiya kuqwenga, ndimke ke; ndosusa, kungeko oya kuhlangula." 
Hosea5:15 Ndiya kumka, ndiya kubuyela endaweni yam, bade balivume ityala labo, bafune ubuso bam: nxa basebunzimeni, bondifuna ngokuku̔teleyo." 
Hosea6:1 Yizani, masibuyele kuyehova, ngokuba eqwengile, kanti wosipolisa; ubetile, kanti wosibopa." 
Hosea6:2 Wosipilisa emveni kwemihla mibini; wosivusa ngowesitatu umhla, sasiya kupila ebusweni bake." 
Hosea6:3 Siya kwandula simazi, siya kuzingisa ukumazi uyehova: njengokusa kuqinisiwe ukupuma kwake; waeya kuza kuti njengemvula, njengemvula yasemva, enyelayo umhlaba." 
Hosea6:4 NDIYA kwenza nto nina kuwe, Frayime! ndiya kwenza nto nina kuwe, Juda! ngokuba ukulunga kwenu kunjengelifu lomso, nanjengombete omkayo kusasa." 
Hosea6:5 Ngenxa yoku ndibabazile ngabaprofite, ndibabulele ngamazwi omlomo wam: imigwebo yako iyapuma njeng okukanya." 
Hosea6:6 Ngokuba bendifuna ububele, bendinga funi umbingo; nokwaziwa kukatixo, ngapezu kwamadini okutshiswa." 
Hosea6:7 Kodwa bona njengabantu bagqitile ucebano; apo benzile ngobuxoki ngakum. 
Hosea6:8 I‐Gileyadi sisixeko sabasebenzi benkohlakalo, sipauliwe ngemikondo yegazi." 
Hosea6:9 Njengamaqela amabada elalela umntu, injalo intlanganiso yabaperisite; bayabulala endleleni eya e‐Shekeme; ewe, ubutshinitshini babenzile." 
Hosea6:10 Ndiyibonile endlwini ka‐Sirayeli into eyoyikekileyo: kuko apo umbulo ka‐Frayime; unco̔lisekile u‐Sirayeli. 
Hosea6:11 Nawe, Juda! umisele wena ixesha lokuvuna." 
Hosea7:1 EKUBUYISENI kwam ukutinjwa kwabantu bam, nxa bendipilisa u‐Sirayeli, kwandula kwatyilwa ukwona kuka‐Frayime, nezenzo ezikohlakeleyo ze‐Samariya; ngokuba benzile ngenkohliso; isela liyangena, iqela lamabada liyapanga ngapandle." 
Hosea7:2 Abatsho entliziyweni yabo ukuti, konke ukukohlakala kwabo ndikukumbule; kaloku izenzo zabo ziyabaṙaula; ziko pambi kwobuso bam." 
Hosea7:3 Bayavuyisa ukumkani ngenkohlakalo yabo, nenkosana ngelwimi zabo." 
Hosea7:4 Bangabaṙexezi bonke; banjengeziko lifudunyezwe ngumoji; oyekayo ukukwezela, emva kwokuyibuca intlama, ide ifukukiswe." 
Hosea7:5 Ngomhla wokumkani wetu, inkosana ziya m enzela isifo ngobushushu beveyine; uyazolula izandla zake kunye nabagxeki." 
Hosea7:6 Ngokuba zisondeza intliziyo yazo, njengeziko, ekulaleleni kwazo; umoji wazo uyalala butongo ubusuku bonke; kwakusa iyatsha njengomlilo odangazelayo." 
Hosea7:7 Bashushu bonke njengeziko, bayabadla abagwebi babo; okumkani babo bawile bonke: akuko namnye pakati kwabo obizayo kum." 
Hosea7:8 U‐Frayime uyazidibanisa nezizwe; u‐Frayime usisonkana esingapetulwanga. 
Hosea7:9 Abasemzini bayawadla amandla ake, kanti yena akazi; ewe, izimvi zite sa pezu kwake, kanti yena akazi." 
Hosea7:10 Ir̔atshi lika‐Sirayeli liyanqi̔na ngasebusweni bake; kodwa abaguqukeli kuyehova utixo wabo, abamfuni kanjalo ngako oku konke." 
Hosea7:11 U‐Frayime unjengehobe elinyabileyo, lingenangqondo; bayabizela e‐Jipete, bayaya e‐Asiriya." 
Hosea7:12 Nxa bayayo, ndolwaneka pezu kwabo utambo lwam; ndobahlisa njengentaka zezulu; ndobabeta, njengokuba kuviwe entlanganisweni yabo." 
Hosea7:13 Makube nzima kubo! ngokuba bendibalekile; imbujiswa maibe pezu kwabo! ngokuba beqipukelene nam; nangona ndim owabakululayo, bate bona noko baziteta ilwimi ngakum." 
Hosea7:14 Abakalanga kum ngentliziyo yabo, nxa balilayo ezililini zabo: bayabutelana ngenxa yenqolowa neveyine entsha; bayahlukana nam." 
Hosea7:15 Ndi ba lulekile; ndizomelezile ingalo zabo; bayandiqingela okubi noko. 
Hosea7:16 Bayaguquka, kodwa aba guquk eli kopezu kwonke; banjengesipeta esikohlisayo; inkosi zabo zowa ngesiṙele, ngenxa yokuṙala kwolwimi lwazo: oku kwoba sisihlekiswa sabo elizweni le‐Jipete." 
Hosea8:1 IXILONGO libeke emlonyeni wako: woza njengokozi ngakuyo indlu kayehova; ngokuba begqitile ucebano lwam, bevukele ngakuwo umteto wam." 
Hosea8:2 Baya kukala kum, besiti: Tixo wam! siyakwazi tina Sirayeli." 
Hosea8:3 U‐Sirayeli ulahlile okulungileyo; utshaba luya kumputuma. 
Hosea8:4 Benza okumkani, kodwa bekungengam; bamisa inkosi, kodwa mna bendingazazi: bazenzele izitixo ngayo isilivere yabo negolide yabo, ukuze banqanyulwe." 
Hosea8:5 Itole lako, Samariya! liyintshontsho; ingqumbo yam iyavuta ngakubo: baya kukohlwa kukuba ngcwele kude kube ninina?" 
Hosea8:6 Ngokuba bekuvela kwa‐Sirayeli kwa lona: incibi yalenza; alinguye utixo lona: ngenyaniso itole lase‐Samariya loba ngamaqekeza. 
Hosea8:7 Ngokuba behlwayele umoya, kukona baya kuvuna isaqwiti: akuko izela kubo; okuhlumayo akuyi kuwenza umgubo: ukuba umhlaumbi kuyawenza, abasemzini bowuginya." 
Hosea8:8 Baginyiwe o‐Sirayeli; bako kaloku pakati kwabaheyideni, njengesitya ekungeko inyamekelo kuso." 
Hosea8:9 Ngokuba benyukele e‐Asiriya njeng eqwaṙa elilodwa: u‐Frayime ubaqeshile abatandi ngamabaso. 
Hosea8:10 Kodwa nakuba baqeshileyo ngamabaso pakati kwabaheyideni, ndoti kaloku ndibabute; babeya kuva ubuhlungu umzuzwana, ngenxa yomtwalo wokumkani wenkosana." 
Hosea8:11 Ngokuba u‐Frayime ezandisile izibingelo zokwona, kwobako kuye izibingelo zokwona." 
Hosea8:12 Ndimba̔lele indawo ezinkulu zomteto wam, kodwa zibe zibalwa njengento yasemzini." 
Hosea8:13 Imibingo yeminikelo yam, bayabinga inyama, bayidle; kodwa uyehova akayibuki: kwa kaloku uya kukumbula ukukohlakala kwabo, ohlwayele izono zabo: bobuyela e‐Jipete." 
Hosea8:14 Ngokuba u‐Sirayeli emlibele umenzi wake, wazaka itempile; no‐Juda uzandisile izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo: kodwa ndiya kutuma umlilo pezu kwezixeko zake, oya kuzidla izindlukazi zazo." 
Hosea9:1 UNGAVUYI, Sirayeli! kude kuvuyelelwe, njengezizwe: ngokuba umkile kutixo wako ngombulo; uwutandile umvuzo ezibayeni zonke zenqolowa." 
Hosea9:2 Isibaya nesincinezelo seveyine aziyi kubamkelisa ukutya, neveyine entsha yona yobatshitshela." 
Hosea9:3 Abayi kuhlala elizweni likayehova; kodwa u‐Frayime wobuyela e‐Jipete, nase‐Asiriya baya kukudla okunco̔lileyo." 
Hosea9:4 Abayi kutululela uyehova iveyine, kanjalo ayiyi kuba mnandi kuye imibingo yabo; yoba njengesonka sabalusizi kubo; bonke abadlayo kuso baya kunco̔liswa: ngokuba isonka sabo soba sesompefumlo wabo; asiyi kungena endlwini kayehova." 
Hosea9:5 Seniya kwenza nto nina emhleni wentlanganisano, nasemhleni womtendeleko kayehova?" 
Hosea9:6 Ngokuba, bona ke, bemkile ngenxa yembubiso; i‐Jipete yobabuta, i‐Mofe yobancw̔aba; indawo ezinqwenelekileyo zesilivere yabo, amaṙau ozifuya; ameva oba sezintenteni zabo." 
Hosea9:7 Imihla yokwohlwaya seifikile, imihla yokupindezela seifikile; u‐Sirayeli uya kuyazi: umprofite usisidenge, umntu womoya uyageza, ngenxa yobuninzi benkohlakalo yako, na ngenxa yenzondo enkulu." 
Hosea9:8 Umlindi ka‐Frayime u notixo wam; kodwa umprofite usisigu somtiyeli wentaka ezindleleni zake zonke, uyinzondo endlwini yotixo wake." 
Hosea9:9 Bandisile ukuzonakalisa, njengasemihleni ye‐Gibeha: woyikumbula inkohlakalo yabo, uya kwohlwayela izono zabo." 
Hosea9:10 Ndamfumana u‐Sirayeli njengedreyive entlango; ndababona oyihlo benu njengolibo lwomkiwane ekuqaleni kwa lo; kodwa baya ku‐Bali‐pehori, bazahlulela kwelohlazo; baba buntshontsho, njengoko bakutandayo." 
Hosea9:11 U‐Frayime, ubungcwalisa babo bobaleka njengentaka, kwa sekuzalweni, nasesizalweni, nasekukaulweni." 
Hosea9:12 Nakuba bakulisa abantwana, sendiya kubahluta bona, bangabiko pakati kwabantu: koko kuya kuba nzima kubo, nxa ndimkayo kubo!" 
Hosea9:13 U‐Frayime, njengokuba ndabona i‐Tire, utyaliwe endaweni emnandi; kodwa u‐Frayime wopuma nabantwana bake ukuya kumbulali." 
Hosea9:14 Banike, Yehova! uya kunika nto nina? banike isisu esipumayo, namabele omileyo." 
Hosea9:15 Yonke inkohlakalo yabo ise‐Gilegale; ngokuba apo ndabatiya; ngenxa yenkohlakalo yezenzo zabo, ndobagxota endlwini yam; andisayi kubuya ndibatande; zonke inkosana zabo zingabanenkani." 
Hosea9:16 U‐Frayime ubetiwe, ingcambo yabo yomile; abayi kuhlanza iziqa̔mo: ewe, nangona bazalayo, ndoti noko ndikufise okutandekileyo kwesizalo sabo." 
Hosea9:17 Utixo wam wobalahla, ngokuba bengampulapulanga: boba ngamadungadunga pakati kwezizwe." 
Hosea10:1 USIRAYELI ungumti weveyine onabayo; uyazihlanzela wona iziqa̔mo: njengobuninzi beziqa̔mo zake, uzandisile izibingelo; njengokulunga kwomhlaba wake, bazenzile izifanekiso ezihle." 
Hosea10:2 Intliziyo yabo yahlukile, kwa kaloku bomelwa lityala: yena uya kucita izibingelo zabo, uya kutshabalalisa izifanekiso zabo." 
Hosea10:3 Ngenyaniso baya kuti ngoku: Asinakumkani; ngokuba singamoyiki uyehova: ukamkani ke, wosenzela nto nina?" 
Hosea10:4 Bawatetile amazwi, befunga ngobuxoki ekwenzeni ucebano: ngako oko umgwebo uyahluma njengomfuno onobuhlungu emiseleni yentsimi." 
Hosea10:5 Ngenxa yamatole ase‐Betavene, abemi base‐Samariya boba nokwoyika; ngokuba abantu balo beya kulila ngalo, nababingeli balo a babegcoba pezu kwalo, ngenxa yobungcwalisa balo, ngokuba bumkile kulo." 
Hosea10:6 Kwa lona liya kusiwa e‐Asiriya, libe libaso kukumkani opikayo: u‐Frayime wozuza idano, no‐Sirayeli wodanela elake icebo." 
Hosea10:7 I‐Samariya ukumkani wayo unqanyulwe; unjengeceba pezu kwobuso bamanzi. 
Hosea10:8 Ziya kutshatyalaliswa indawo ezipakamileyo zase‐Avene, isono so‐Sirayeli; ameva namakakakaka aya kumila pezu kwezibingelo zabo: babeya kuti ezintabeni: Sigubungeleni: nasezindulini: Siweleni." 
Hosea10:9 Wonile, Sirayeli! kuselokwemihla ye‐Gibeha: bemi kwa kona: akuyi kubafumana ukulwa e‐Gibeha ngakulo usapo lwobumenemene." 
Hosea10:10 Yinkanuko yam ukuba ndibabete; zaye izizwe ziya kuhlanganiselwa ngakubo, nxa banxitywayo ngenxa yezikohlakalo zabo zozibini." 
Hosea10:11 U‐Frayime ulitokazi eliqelisiweyo, litanda ukubula; kodwa ndidlule pezu kwentamo yalo enobuhle; ndomenza u‐Frayime ukwelwe; u‐Juda uya kupulusha, u‐Yakobi woqwakanisa." 
Hosea10:12 Zihlwayeleleni ngobulungisa, nivune ngobubele; ziku̔beleleni umhlaba olifusi: ngokuba lilixesha lokumfuna uyehova, ade afike, anifundise ubulungisa." 
Hosea10:13 Nilimile inkohlakalo, nivunile ubumenemene; nidlile isixakato sobuxoki: ngokuba nitembele endleleni yako, ebuninzini bamaṙoti ako." 
Hosea10:14 Ngako kwovuka isipitipiti pakati kwabantu bako, nenqaba zako zonke ziya kuci̔takaliswa, njengokuba u‐Shalemane waci̔takalisa i‐Bete‐rabele ngemini yokulwa: unina watyunyuzwa kunye nabantwana." 
Hosea10:15 Iya kwenje njalo kuni i‐Betele ngenxa yenkohlakalo yenu enkulu: kusasa wonqanyulwa kanye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli. 
Hosea11:1 NXA u‐Sirayeli abengumntwana, ndandula ndamtanda, ndambiza unyana wam apume e‐Jipete." 
Hosea11:2 Njengokuba bebabizile, kwa njalo bemka ebusweni babo; babingele o‐Bali, baqu̔misela imifanekiso eqingqiweyo." 
Hosea11:3 Ndamfundisa u‐Frayime ukuhamba, ndabatabata ngengalo zabo: abakwazi noko ukuba ndim owabapilisayo." 
Hosea11:4 Ndabar̔ola ngentambo zabantu, ngentsontelo zotando: ndandinjalo kubo njengabafunqulayo iyokwe emihlatini yabo; ndababekela ukutya, ndabadlisa." 
Hosea11:5 Akayi kubuyela elizweni le‐Jipete, kodwa um‐Asiriya woba ngukumkani wake; ngokuba balile ukuguquka." 
Hosea11:6 Saye isiṙele siya kuhlika ezixekweni zake, sasiya kugqiba imivalo yake, sidle nokudla, ngenxa yamaqinga abo." 
Hosea11:7 Ngokuba abantu bam bejingela ukupambuka kum: nangona bababizelayo kopezu kwonke, akuko namnye oya kumpakamisa." 
Hosea11:8 Ndingati nina ukukuncama, Frayime? ndingati nina ukukuyekelela, Sirayeli? ndingati nina ukukwenza njenge‐Adema? ndingati nina ukukumisa njenge‐Tseboyime? intliziyo yam ipetukile pakati kwam, inceba zam ziyavuta kunye." 
Hosea11:9 Andiyi kwenza ngobushushu bengqumbo yam, andiyi kubuya ukutshabalalisa u‐Frayime; ngokuba ndi ngutixo, ndingengumntu; ndingoyingcwele pakati kwako; andiyi kungena esixekweni." 
Hosea11:10 Bomlandela uyehova; wogquma njengengonyama: xeshekweni agqumayo, luya kwandula usapo luvele ngobunxamo elwandle." 
Hosea11:11 Lwovela ngobunxamo njengehobohobo e‐Jipete, nanjengehobe elizweni le‐Asiriya: ndandiya kuluhlalisa kwezalo izindlu, utsho uyehova." 
Hosea11:12 U‐FRAYIME undipahlile ngobuxoki, nendlu ka‐Sirayeli ngenkohliso: kodwa u‐Juda usesebukosini kunye notixo, unyanisekile kunye nabangcwele." 
Hosea12:1 U‐Frayime uyawudla umoya, uyaputuma umoya wasempumalanga; imihla yonke uyandisa ubuxoki nobandezelo: ewe, bayalwenza ucebano ne‐Asiriya, neoli iyasiwa e‐Jipete." 
Hosea12:2 Kanjalo uyehova unepike no‐Juda, waeya kumohlwaya u‐Yakobi njengemikwa yake; njengezenzo zake wobuyekeza kuye." 
Hosea12:3 Esizalweni wambamba umkuluwe wake ngesitende, nangamandla ake wenza njengenkosi notixo;" 
Hosea12:4 ewe, wenza njengenkosi ngakuyo ingelosi, weyisa ke; walila, wataṙuzisa kuyo: wamfumana e‐Betele, nakona apo wateta nati;" 
Hosea12:5 kwa uyehova, utixo wemikosi; nguyehova isikumbuzo sake." 
Hosea12:6 Ngako wena, guqukela kutixo wako; gcina ububele nobugwebo, ulinde utixo wako futi." 
Hosea12:7 Ungumtengi, izilinganiselo zenkohliso zisesandleni sake; uyatanda ukubandezela." 
Hosea12:8 Wati noko u‐Frayime: Ndityebile, ndizizuzele ubutyebi; kuyo yonke imisebenzi yam abayi kufumana kum inkohlakalo esisono." 
Hosea12:9 Kodwa mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wako, kuselokwa selizweni le‐Jipete; ndobuya ndikuhlalise ezintenteni, njengasemihleni yomtendeleko ongcwele." 
Hosea12:10 Kanjalo nditetile kubaprofite, nemiboniso ndiyandisile; nangabo abaprofite ndizekelisile." 
Hosea12:11 Ngokwenene i‐Gileyadi ikohlakele, ngenyaniso babubuxoki; bayazibinga inkabi e‐Gilegale; nezibingelo zabo zinjengemfumba ngasemiseleni yentsimi." 
Hosea12:12 U‐Yakobi wesabela elizweni le‐Siriya; u‐Sirayeli wakonza ngenxa yomfazi; ewe, walusa ngenxa yomfazi." 
Hosea12:13 Ngomprofite uyehova wamnyusa u‐Sirayeli e‐Jipete, nangomprofite wabegcinwa." 
Hosea12:14 U‐Frayime wa m qumbisa ngento ebuṙaṙa; ngako igazi lake inkosi yake yolishiya pezu kwake, nehlazo lake yolibuyisela kuye." 
Hosea13:1 XESHEKWENI watetayo u‐Frayime, bekuko ukunkwantya, wapakanyiswa kwa‐Sirayeli; kodwa wazeka ityala ngo‐Bali, wabuba." 
Hosea13:2 Nakaloku bamana besona ngakumbi, bezenzele imifanekiso etyityishiweyo ngesilivere yabo, njengokuqonda kwabo, izitixo, umsebenzi wencibi upela: bati bona ngazo: Abantu ababingayo mabawange amatole." 
Hosea13:3 Ngako oko boba njengelifu lomso, nanjengombete omkayo kusasa, njengomququ opetshulwayo sisaqwiti esibayeni, nanjengomsi opumayo esitubeni." 
Hosea13:4 Kanti mna ndi nguyehova, utixo wako, kuselokwa selizweni le‐Jipete; ngako akuyi kwazi namnye utixo kupela mna, ngokuba kungeko msindisi ngapandle kwam." 
Hosea13:5 Bendikwazi entlango, elizweni elinxaniweyo." 
Hosea13:6 Njengokudliswa kwabo, bekunjalo ukuhluta kwabo; bahluta ke, yati intliziyo yabo yapakama; ngako oko bandilibala." 
Hosea13:7 Ndaza ndaba njengengonyama kubo, ndabagqala njengengwe endleleni." 
Hosea13:8 Ndabakaulela njengebere ehlutiweyo amatole ayo, ndaṙazula isidla sentliziyo yabo; ndabadla kona njengengonyamakazi; iṙamncwa lasendle labaqwenga." 
Hosea13:9 Uzitshabalalisile, Sirayeli! koko uncedo lwako lukum." 
Hosea13:10 Upina ke ukumkani wako, ukuze akusindise kuzo zonke izixeko zako? nabagwebi bako bapina, benisiti ngabo: Ndipe ukumkani nenkosi?" 
Hosea13:11 Ndakunika ukumkani ngengqumbo yam, ndamsusa ngomsindo wam." 
Hosea13:12 Inkohlakalo ka‐Frayime ibotshiwe; isono sake sibekelwe. 
Hosea13:13 Inimba zomfazi ozalayo zoza pezu kwake; ungunyana ongenabulumko; okanye ebengayi kuhlala kade endaweni yokutyoboza kwabantwana. 
Hosea13:14 Ndobahlangula emandleni encw̔aba; ndobakulula ekufeni: zipina imbubiso zako, kufa? sipina isitshabalaliso sako, ncw̔aba? ukuguquka kuya kufihlwa emehlweni am." 
Hosea13:15 Nakuba acu̔mileyo pakati kwabazalwana bake, kwoza noko umoya wasempumalanga, umoya kayehova, unyuka elubala; wauya kwoma umtombo wake, netende lake liya kutsha: uya kupanga imbekelo yempahla zonke ezinqwenelekileyo." 
Hosea13:16 Iya kuci̔takaliswa i‐Samariya, ngokuba ivukele ngakuye utixo wayo; baya kuwa ngesiṙele; intsana zabo zotyunyuzwa, nabafazi babo abamitileyo baya kuqangqululwa." 
Hosea14:1 BUYELA, Sirayeli! kuyehova, utixo wako; ngokuba uwile ngenkohlakalo yako." 
Hosea14:2 Tabata nawe amazwi, uze ubuyele kuyehova; yitini kuye: Susa inkohlakalo yonke, u s amkelise okulungileyo; sasiya kuhlaula ngamatole emilomo yetu." 
Hosea14:3 I‐Asiriya ayiyi kusisindisa; asiyi kukwela emahasheni; kanjalo asiyi kubuya siti emsebenzini wezandla zetu: Ningotixo betu: ngokuba kuwe inkedama ifumana ububele. 
Hosea14:4 Ndopilisa upambuko lwabo; ndobatanda ngokuvuma; ngokuba ingqumbo yam ibuyile kuye. 
Hosea14:5 Ndoba njengombete ku‐Sirayeli: uya kutyatyamba njengenyibiba, azendelise ingcambo zake njenge‐Lebanone." 
Hosea14:6 Amahlumelo ake otwabululeka, ubuhle bake boba njengomnquma, woba nevumba njenge‐Lebanone." 
Hosea14:7 Baya kubuya abo bahleliyo emtunzini wake; bohluma njeng enqolowa, batyatyambe njengomti weveyine: isikumbuzo sake soba njengeveyine yase‐Lebanone." 
Hosea14:8 Woti u‐Frayime: Ziseyinto nina kum izitixo? ndivile mna, ndandiya kumgqala: ndinjengomti weberoshe oluhlaza: siyazuzwa kum isiqa̔mo sako." 
Hosea14:9 Ngubanina onobulumko, ukuba aziqonde ezi zinto? ngubanina onobutelekelelo, ukuba azazi? ngokuba indlela zikayehova zifanele; abalungileyo bohamba kuzo, kodwa abagqiti baya kuku̔beka kuzo." 
Joel1:1 ILIZWI likayehova elezayo ku‐Joweli, unyana ka‐Petuweli:" 
Joel1:2 Yivani oku, nina badala! bekani indlebe, nonke nina bemi belizwe! Kube kuhlile oku na emihleni yenu? umhlaumbi emihleni yoyihlo benu na?" 
Joel1:3 Xelelani abantwana benu ngako, nabantwana benu mabaxelele abantwana babo, nababo abantwana isizukulwana sasemva." 
Joel1:4 Okushiyiweyo ngumqikela, kudliwe yinkumbi; nokushiyiweyo yinkumbi, kudliwe sisiboto; nokushiyiweyo sisiboto, kudliwe nguṙuxeshe." 
Joel1:5 Vukani, nina banxili! nilile; kalani, nonke nina baseli beveyine! ngenxa yeveyine entsha, ngokuba inqamkile emlonyeni wenu." 
Joel1:6 Ngokuba isizwe sinyukele pezu kwelizwe lam, esinamandla, esingenakubalwa; amazinyo aso ngamazinyo engonyama; sinamenyo omhlati engonyamakazi." 
Joel1:7 Senzele umti weveyine wam ukucitakala, nomkiwane wam ukwapuka; sigqibele ukuxoza amaxolo awo, sawuwisa: amagatya awo enziwe mhlope." 
Joel1:8 Yiba nosizi, njengomtshakazi obinqiweyo ngentlakantlaka, ngenxa yendoda yobutsha bake." 
Joel1:9 Umnikelo wokudla, nomnikelo wokusela, unqanyulwe endlwini kayehova: bayalila abaperisite, abakonzi bakayehova." 
Joel1:10 Ilizwe licitakele, umhlaba uyalila; ngokuba inqolowa icitakele, iveyine entsha yomile, ioli iyacubuka." 
Joel1:11 Yibani nokudana, nina balimi bomhlaba! kalani, nina balimi bemiti yeveyine! ngenxa yenqolowa nangenxa yeṙalasi; ngokuba ukuvunwa kwelizwe kububile." 
Joel1:12 Umti weveyine womile, nomkiwane ubunile; igranate, nomti wepalime, noweapele, yonke imiti yelizwe yomile; ewe, uvuyo lutshile konyana babantu." 
Joel1:13 Binqani, nenze isijwili, nina baperisite! kalani, nina bakonzi besibingelo! ngenani, nihlale ngentlakantlaka ubusuku bonke, nina bakonzi botixo wam! ngokuba umnikelo wokudla, nomnikelo wokusela, ubanjiwe kuyo indlu katixo wenu." 
Joel1:14 Miselani inzilo engcwele, memani intlanganiso enkulu; hlanganisani abadala, nabo bonke abemi belizwe, beze endlwini kayehova, utixo wenu, nibizele kuyehova." 
Joel1:15 Au, umhla lowo! ngokuba umhla kayehova ukufupi, nanjengengcitakaliso evela konamandla onke uya kuza." 
Joel1:16 Ukudla akunqanyulwanga pambi kwamehlo etu na? kwa n ovuyo nomgcobo endlwini katixo wetu na? 
Joel1:17 Inkozo zibolile ngapantsi kwamagada azo; izisele zitshabalele, amaqonga acitiwe, ngokuba inqolowa yomile." 
Joel1:18 Hai ukugula kwenkomo! hai ukuxakeka kwemihlambi yenkabi! ngokuba zingenadlelo: ewe, imihlambi yezimvu ici̔takalisiwe." 
Joel1:19 Ndiyabiza kuwe, Yehova! ngokuba umlilo udlile amaṙiwa asentlanga, nayo yonke imiti yasendle ilangatye liyitshisile." 
Joel1:20 Kwa izilo zasendle ziyakangela ngakuwe: ngokuba imilanjana yamanzi itshile, namaṙiwa asentlango umlilo uwadlile." 
Joel2:1 VUTELANI ngexilongo e‐Ziyone, nihlokomise ivuso entabeni yam engcwele: mabangcangcazele bonke abemi belizwe; ngokuba umhla kayehova usiza, ngokuba ukufupi:" 
Joel2:2 umhla wobumnyama nowesitokotoko, umhla wamafu nowokusibekela kakulu; njengesifingo sokusa sitwabululekile pezu kwentaba: abantu abaninzi abanamandla: akuzanga kubeko abanjalo kwa kudala, nasemva kwabo akusayi kubuya kubeko abanjalo, ngayo iminyaka yezizukulwana ngezizukulwana." 
Joel2:3 Pambi kwabo umlilo uyadla, nasemva kwabo ilangatye liyatshisa; ilizwe elipambi kwabo linjengomyezo we‐Hedeni, nasemva kwabo lubala oluci̔takeleyo; nakanjako akuko nto eya kusinda kubo." 
Joel2:4 Ukubonakala kwabo kunjengokubonakala kwamahashe, nanjengabakweli bamahashe, bobaleka njalo." 
Joel2:5 Baya kuqakata njengesandi senqwelo pezu kwengcopo zentaba, njengesandi selangatye lomlilo usidla indiza, njengabantu abomeleleyo becwangciselwe ukulwa." 
Joel2:6 Ebusweni babo abantu baya kututumela: bonke ubuso bozuza ubumnyama. 
Joel2:7 Bobaleka njengamaṙoti; baya kukwela eludongeni njengamadoda okulwa; bohamba abanye ngabanye ezindleleni zabo, abayi kushenxisa izihambo zabo." 
Joel2:8 Omnye akayi kusunduza omnye; baya kuhamba abanye ngabanye kwezabo indawo: noko bawayo pakati kwezikali, abayi kulinyazwa." 
Joel2:9 Baya kusukasuka esixekweni; bobaleka pezu kwodonga; bonyukela ezindlwini; baya kungena ngefentsile njengesela. 
Joel2:10 Umhlaba wozamazama ebusweni babo, izulu liya kungcangcazela; ilanga nenyanga zoba mnyama, nenkwenkwezi ziya kufinyeza ukukanya kwazo." 
Joel2:11 Kanjalo uyehova woku̔pa ilizwi lake pambi kwempi yake; umkulu kakulu nje umkosi wake; ewe, unamandla, usenza umteto wake: ngenyaniso umhla kayehova umkulu, ngowoyikekileyo kunene; ngubanina ongawunyamezelayo?" 
Joel2:12 Nize niti ke kaloku, utsho uyehova, niguqukele kum ngayo yonke intliziyo yenu, nangokuzila, nangokulila, nangesijwili;" 
Joel2:13 nirazule intliziyo yenu, kungabi zingubo zenu, niguqukele kuyehova, utixo wenu: ngokuba enofefe nenceba yena, equmba kade, enobubele obukulu, enosizi ngobubi." 
Joel2:14 Ngubanina owaziyo? angaguquka abe nosizi, alishiye itamsanqa emva kwake, umnikelo wokudla, nomnikelo wokusela, kuyehova, utixo wenu." 
Joel2:15 Vutelani ngexilongo e‐Ziyone, miselani inzilo engcwele, memani intlanganiso enkulu." 
Joel2:16 Butani abantu; yenzani ngcwele umhlambi; hlanganisani abadala; butani abantwana, nabo abawanyayo amabele; makapume umyeni enkambilini yake, nomtshakazi esililini sake." 
Joel2:17 Mabati abaperisite, abakonzi bakayehova, balile pakati kwentendelezo nesibingelo; mabatsho ukuti: Yiba nosizi, Yehova! ebantwini bako, unganikeli esigxekweni ilifa lako, baze abaheyideni babe nobukosi pezu kwabo: baya kuti nganina pakati kwabantu: Upina utixo wabo?" 
Joel2:18 Uya kwandula uyehova abe nobukwele ngenxa yelizwe lake, akedamele abantu bake." 
Joel2:19 Ewe, uya kupendula uyehova, ati ebantwini bake: Bona ke, ndonitumela inqolowa, neveyine entsha, neoli, naniya kukoliswa zizo: ndandingasayi kunenza nibe sisigxekwa pakati kwabaheyideni." 
Joel2:20 Naye um‐Node ndiya kumkwelelisa kude kuni, ndimgxotele elizweni elomileyo elibugxwayiba, ubuso bake bubeka ngaselwandle lwasempumalanga, nomva wake ngaselwandle lwasentshonalanga; kwonyuka ukunuka kwake, ewe, liya kunyuka ivumba elibi lake, ngokuba ezenzile izinto ezinkulu." 
Joel2:21 Ungoyiki, wena lizwe! yiba nomgcobo, uvuye ke, ngokuba uyehova eya kuzenza izinto ezinkulu." 
Joel2:22 Ningoyiki, nina zilo zasendle! ngokuba amaṙiwa asentlango ecu̔ma utyani; ngokuba umti uhlanza ukutya kwawo; umkiwane nomti weveyine iyanika amandla ayo." 
Joel2:23 Gcobani, bonyana base‐Ziyone! nivuye kuyehova, utixo wenu: ngokuba enipa imvula yangapambili ngento efanelekileyo; waeya kuninisela umvumbi wemvula — imvula yangapambili nemvula yangasemva njenga sekuqaleni:" 
Joel2:24 zize izibaya zizale yinqolowa, nefatye zipupume yiveyine neoli." 
Joel2:25 Kwa njalo ndiya kunenzelelela iminyaka ebidliwa yinkumbi, n esiboto, noṙuxeshe, nomqikela, impi yam enkulu endayitumayo ngakuni." 
Joel2:26 Naniya kutya ngokukolisa, nihlute, nilidumise igama likayehova, utixo wenu, onenzeleyo ngokungummangaliso: kanjalo abasayi kuba nokudana abantu bam napakade." 
Joel2:27 Niya kwandula ukwazi ukuba mna ndipakati kwo‐Sirayeli, nokuba kwa mna, Yehova, ndi ngutixo wenu, engeko wumbi; kanjalo abasayi kuba nokudana abantu bam napakade." 
Joel2:28 KWAKUYA kuti emva kwoko, ndogalela umoya wam pezu kwoluntu lwonke; babeya kuprofitesha onyana benu nentombi zenu; amaxego enu aya kupupa amapupa, amadodana enu aya kubona imiboniso:" 
Joel2:29 ewe, napezu kwezicaka, napezu kwezicakakazi, ndiya kugalela umoya wam ngaleyomihla." 
Joel2:30 Ndandiya kubonakalisa imimangaliso emazulwini nasemhlabeni, igazi, nomlilo, nemiqulu yomsi." 
Joel2:31 Ilanga liya kuguqulwa libe bumnyama, nenyanga ibe ligazi, ungekafiki umhla omkulu owoyikekileyo kayehova." 
Joel2:32 Kwakuya kuti, bonke abaya kubiza egameni likayehova bosindiswa; ngokuba entabeni ye‐Ziyone, nase‐Yerusaleme, kuya kubako ukusinda, njengokuba etshilo uyehova, napakati kwabaseleyo abaya kubizwa nguyehova." 
Joel3:1 NGOKUBA, bona ke, ngemihla leyo, nangexesha elo, okuya ndiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme," 
Joel3:2 ndiya kwandula ndizihlanganise zonke izizwe, ndizihlisele emhlanjeni we‐Yehoshafate, ndipikisane nazo kona apo, ngenxa yabantu bam nelifa lam o‐Sirayeli, ezibacitileyo pakati kwezizwe, zalaba ilizwe lam;" 
Joel3:3 ezenzele abantu bam iziqashiso, zavuza umpinyiswa ngenkwenkwe, zatenga iveyine ngentombazana, ukuze zisele." 
Joel3:4 Kanene ke, niyinto nina kum, nina Tire ne‐Tsidone, nayo yonke imida yase‐Filistiya? noyenza impindezelo kum na? nakuba nipindezela kum, ndokauleza ndinxame ndibuyise impindezelo yenu pezu kweyenu intloko;" 
Joel3:5 ngokuba isilivere yam negolide yam nizisusile, nento zam ezintle, ezinqwenelekileyo, nizisile ezitempileni zenu;" 
Joel3:6 nonyana baka‐Juda, nonyana base‐Yerusaleme, nibatengisile konyana bama‐Javane, ukuze nibafuduse kude emdeni wabo." 
Joel3:7 Bona ke, ndiya kubavusa kulondawo apo nibatengisele kona, ndibuyise impindezelo yenu pezu kweyenu intloko;" 
Joel3:8 ndandiya kutengisa onyana benu nentombi zenu esandleni sonyana baka‐Juda, bati bona babatengise kuwo ama‐Sheba, kwisizwe esikude; ngokuba etshilo uyehova." 
Joel3:9 Shumayelani oku pakati kwezizwe; lungisani imfazwe; vusani amaṙoti; makasondele onke amadoda okulwa; makanyuke. 
Joel3:10 Kandani amakuba enu abe ziziṙele, namaṙenqa enu abe zizikali; makati lowo obutataka: Ndiliṙoti." 
Joel3:11 Kaulezani nize, nonke nina zizwe ezingqongayo, nizihlanganise! Zuwahlisele apo amaṙoti ako, Yehova!" 
Joel3:12 Mazivuswe izizwe, zinyukele emhlanjeni we‐Yehoshafate; ngokuba apo ndiya kuhlala ukugweba zonke izizwe ezingqongayo." 
Joel3:13 Fakani iṙenqa, ngokuba isivuno sesivutiwe; yizani, nihle ke, ngokuba isincinezelo seveyine sizele, ifatye zipupuma; ngokuba inkohlakalo yazo inkulu." 
Joel3:14 Izihlwele! izihlwele emhlanjeni womgwebo! ngokuba ukufupi umhla kayehova emhlanjeni womgwebo. 
Joel3:15 Ilanga nenyanga zoba mnyama, nenkwenkwezi ziya kufinyeza ukukanya kwazo." 
Joel3:16 Waeya kugquma uyehova e‐Ziyone, aku̔pe ilizwi lake e‐Yerusaleme; kwongcangcazela amazulu nomhlaba: kodwa uyehova yindawo yokupepela kubo abantu bake, nenqaba kulo usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Joel3:17 Naniya kukwazi ukuba mna Yehova ndi ngutixo wenu, ndihleli e‐Ziyone, entabeni yam engcwele: iya kwandula ibe ngcwele i‐Yerusaleme, nabasemzini abasayi kubuya bacande kuyo." 
Joel3:18 Kwakuya kuti ngalomhla, intaba ziya kutontsela iveyine entsha, nenduli ziya kwela ngamasi, nayo yonke imilambo yakwa‐Juda yoncenceza ngamanzi, wauya kupuma umtombo endlwini kayehova, uyinyele intili ye‐Shitime." 
Joel3:19 I‐Jipete yoba yingci̔takalo, ne‐Edome yoba lubala oluci̔takeleyo, ngenxa yobudlwengu obenzelwe onyana baka‐Juda, ngokuba bepalazile igazi elingenatyala elizweni labo." 
Joel3:20 Kodwa i‐Juda yomiwa ngonapakade, ne‐Yerusaleme ngesizukulwana ngesizukulwana." 
Joel3:21 Ndandiya kuhlambulula igazi labo e ndinga li hlambululanga; waye uyehova eya kuhlala e‐Ziyone. 
Amos1:1 AMAZWI ka‐Hamose, obepakati kwabalusi base‐Tekoha, lawo wawabonayo ngo‐Sirayeli, emihleni ka‐Huziya, ukumkani wo‐Juda, nasemihleni ka‐Jerobome, unyana ka‐Yohashe, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, iminyaka mibini singekabiko isingcangcazelo somhlaba." 
Amos1:2 Wayesiti: Uyehova uya kugquma e‐Ziyone, aku̔pe ilizwi lake e‐Yerusaleme; amaṙiwa abalusi aya kulila, nengcopo ye‐Karamele yobuna." 
Amos1:3 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yezigqito ezitatu ze‐Damakusi, nangenxa yezine, andiyi kubuyisa ukugwetywa kwayo; ngokuba bebulile i‐Gileyadi ngentsimbi zento yokubula." 
Amos1:4 Ngako ndiya kutuma umlilo endlwini ka‐Hazayeli, oya kuzidla izindlukazi zika‐Bene‐hadadi." 
Amos1:5 Ndandiya kwapula umvalo we‐Damakusi, ndinqamle umhlali emhlanjeni we‐Avene, nompati wentonga e‐Bete‐hedeni; baye abantu base‐Siriya beya kutinjelwa e‐Kire, utsho uyehova." 
Amos1:6 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yezigqito ezitatu ze‐Gaza, nangenxa yezine, andiyi kubuyisa ukugwetywa kwayo; ngokuba befudusile inani lonke labatinjiweyo, baze ba ba nikele ku‐Edome." 
Amos1:7 Ngako ndiya kutuma umlilo eludongeni lwe‐Gaza, oya kuzidla izindlukazi zayo." 
Amos1:8 Ndandiya kunqamla umhlali e‐Ashedode, nompati wentonga e‐Ashekelone; nesandla sam ndosibuyisela pezu kwe‐Hekrone, bati abasisalela sama‐Filistiya babube, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Amos1:9 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yezigqito ezitatu ze‐Tire, nangenxa yezine, andiyi kubuyisa ukugwetywa kwayo; ngokuba benikele inani lonke labatinjiweyo ku‐Edome, bengakumbulanga ucebano lwabazalwana." 
Amos1:10 Ngako ndiya kutuma umlilo eludongeni lwe‐Tire, oya kuzidla izindlukazi zayo." 
Amos1:11 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yezigqito ezitatu zika‐Edome, nangenxa yezine, andiyi kubuyisa ukugwetywa kwake; ngokuba eputumile umzalwana wake ngesiṙele, wazonakalisa ezake izibele; ingqumbo yake yaqwenga futi, nomsindo wake wawugcina ngonapakade." 
Amos1:12 Ngako ndiya kutuma umlilo e‐Temani, oya kuzidla izindlukazi zase‐Botsera." 
Amos1:13 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yezigqito ezitatu zosapo luka‐Hamoni, nangenxa yezine, andiyi kubuyisa ukugwetywa kwalo; ngokuba luqangqulule abamitiyo base‐Gileyadi, ukuze luwandise umda walo." 
Amos1:14 Ngako ndiya kupemba umlilo eludongeni lwe‐Raba, oya kuzidla izindlukazi zayo; ngesimemezo emhleni wokulwa, ngoqwitela emhleni wesaqwiti." 
Amos1:15 Waeya kuya ekutinjweni ukumkani walo, yena nenkosana zake kunye, utsho uyehova." 
Amos2:1 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yezigqito ezitatu zika‐Mowabi, nangenxa yezine, andiyi kubuyisa ukugwetywa kwake; ngokuba etshisile amatambo okumkani we‐Edome ada aba yikalike." 
Amos2:2 Ngako ndiya kutuma umlilo e‐Mowabi, oya kuzidla izindlukazi zase‐Keriyote; waeya kufa u‐Mowabi ngesipitipiti, ngesimemezo, ngentlokoma yexilongo." 
Amos2:3 Ndandiya kunqamla umgwebi pakati kwayo, nazo zonke inkosana zayo ndozibulala kunye naye, utsho uyehova." 
Amos2:4 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yezigqito ezitatu zo‐Juda, nangenxa yezine, andiyi kubuyisa ukugwetywa kwabo; ngokuba umteto kayehova bewudelile, nemimiso yake bengayigcinanga; nezinto ezilulwimi zabo zibalahlekisile, ezo bazilandelayo oyise babo." 
Amos2:5 Ngako ndiya kutuma umlilo kwa‐Juda, oya kuzidla izindlukazi zase‐Yerusaleme." 
Amos2:6 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Ngenxa yezigqito ezitatu zo‐Sirayeli, nangenxa yezine, andiyi kubuyisa ukugwetywa kwabo; ngokuba betengisile abalungileyo ngesilivere, nabasweleyo ngesibini sezihlangu;" 
Amos2:7 ababefulelayo utuli lwomhlaba pezu kwentloko yamahlwempu, nendlela yabalulamileyo bayayipambukisa; indoda noyise wayo bayangena kwenye intombi, ukuze balidyobe igama lam elingcwele;" 
Amos2:8 bayazolula pezu kwengubo ezibanjiselweyo, kufupi nezibingelo zonke; bayasela iveyine yabahlaulisiweyo, endlwini yotixo babo." 
Amos2:9 Noko, ebendim owatshabalalisayo um‐Amori pambi kwabo, obude bunjengobude besedare, obenamandla njengeyeke; ndatshabalalisa ke isiqa̔mo sake pezulu, nengcambo zake ngapantsi." 
Amos2:10 Kanjalo ebendim owabeninyusa elizweni le‐Jipete, ndanikokela entlango iminyaka yamashumi mane, niye kufuya ilizwe lom‐Amori." 
Amos2:11 Ndaza ndavusa konyana benu babe ngabaprofite, nakwamadodana enu abe ngabanaziri. Akunjalo na, nina lusapo luka‐Sirayeli? utsho uyehova." 
Amos2:12 Kodwa nabeniseza abanaziri iveyine, nabayalela abaprofite ngokuti: Ningaprofiteshi." 
Amos2:13 Bona ke, ndiya kunishicilela pantsi, njengokuba ishicilela inqwelo ezele zizitungu." 
Amos2:14 Ngako intsabo iya kububela onamendu, nowomeleleyo akayi kuwomeleza amandla ake, noliṙoti akayi kuzisindisa yena." 
Amos2:15 Kanjalo opeteyo isipeta akayi kuma, nonyawo zinamendu akayi kusinda; okweleyo ehasheni akayi kuzisindisa naye." 
Amos2:16 Ewe, ontliziyo ikalipileyo pakati kwamaṙoti uya kwesaba zé ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova." 
Amos3:1 YIVANI elilizwi alitetileyo uyehova ngakuni, lusapo luka‐Sirayeli! ngakuso sonke isizalwane endasinyusayo elizweni le‐Jipete, lokuti:" 
Amos3:2 Nina ndinazile kupela kuzo zonke izizalwane zomhlaba; ngako oko ndiya kuzohlwayela zonke inkohlakalo zenu pezu kwenu. 
Amos3:3 Bohamba ababini kunye na, ukuba abavumelani?" 
Amos3:4 Yokonya na ingonyama ehlatini, nxa ingenanto yokuqwenga? yoku̔pa ilizwi layo na ingonyama entsha emnxunyeni wayo, ukuba ayibambanga nto?" 
Amos3:5 Intaka iya kuwa na emgibeni pezu kwomhlaba, kungeko kuyo isigu? wojuba na umgibe emhlabeni, nxa kungabanjiswanga nanto?" 
Amos3:6 Kwovutelwa ngexilongo esixekweni na, baze bangangcangcazeli abantu ke? kwobako ilishwa esixekweni na, engalenzanga uyehova nje?" 
Amos3:7 Ngenyaniso ayiyi kwenza nto inkosi e nguyehova, ukuba ayityilanga iqinga layo kwizicaka zayo abaprofite." 
Amos3:8 Ikonyile ingonyama, ngubanina ongayi kwoyika? Itetile inkosi e nguyehova, ngubanina ongayi kuprofitesha?" 
Amos3:9 Vakalisani kuzo izindlukazi e‐Ashedode, nakuzo izindlukazi ezweni le‐Jipete, niti: Zihlanganiseni pezu kwentaba zase‐Samariya, nizibone izipitipiti ezikulu ezikuyo, nembandezelo ezipakati kwayo." 
Amos3:10 Ngokuba bengazi ukwenza okulungileyo, utsho uyehova, abakubekelayo okuhlutiweyo nokubadiweyo kuzo izindlukazi zabo." 
Amos3:11 Ngako oko itsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Kwobako utshaba, lungqonga ilizwe ke; lwaluya kuhlisa amandla ako kuwe, nendlukazi zako ziya kupangwa." 
Amos3:12 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Njengokuba umalusi ehlangula emlonyeni wengonyama imilenze mibini, umhlaumbi intwana yendlebe, kwa njalo lwohlangulwa usapo luka‐Sirayeli, oluhleli e‐Samariya encameni yomandlalo, nase‐Damakusi encameni yento yokupumla." 
Amos3:13 Yivani, ninqi̔ne ngakuyo indlu ka‐Yakobi, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, utixo wemikosi," 
Amos3:14 ukuba ndoti, emhleni endiya kuzohlwayela izigqito zika‐Sirayeli pezu kwake, ndizohlwayele nezibingelo zase‐Betele; impondo zesibingelo ziya kunqanyulwa, ziwe pantsi emhlabeni." 
Amos3:15 Ndandiya kubeta indlu yobusika kunye nendlu yehlobo; izindlu zopondo lwendlovu zoti tshabalala, nendlu ezinkulu zoba nokupela, utsho uyehova." 
Amos4:1 YIVANI elilizwi, nina zimazi zase‐Bashane! ezisentabeni ye‐Samariya; ezibandezelayo amahlwempu; ezincinezelayo abasweleyo; eziti kwinkosi zazo: Zisa bo, ukuba sisele." 
Amos4:2 Inkosi e nguyehova ifungile ubungcwele bayo, ukuti: Bona ke! imihla iza kufika pezu kwenu, nxa niya kususwa ngamagwegwe, nabayinzalo yenu ngamaqeṙu entlanzi." 
Amos4:3 Naniya kupuma ngeziṙoba, ezinye ngezinye zisiti ngqo pambili; niya kuziwisa kwa kuyo indlukazi; utsho uyehova." 
Amos4:4 Yizani e‐Betele, none ke; yandisani ukwona e‐Gilegale; zisani imibingo yenu imiso yonke, n amashumi enu ngeminyaka mitatu." 
Amos4:5 Qu̔misani ngedini lokubulela elinegwele; shumayelani iminikelo yesisa, niyivakalise; ngokuba nitanda okunjalo, nina lusapo luka‐Sirayeli! itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Amos4:6 Nangona ndininikile ubumhlope bamazinyo kuzo zonke izixeko zenu, nokusweleka kwesonka kuyo yonke imizi yenu, anibuyelanga kum noko, utsho uyehova." 
Amos4:7 Nangona ndiyibambile kuni imvula, nxa ziseko inyanga zintatu lingekafiki ixesha lokuvuna: ndanisa imvula pezu kwesinye isixeko, kodwa pezu kwesinye isixeko andiyinisanga; enye indawana kwaniswa pezu kwayo, yati indawana ekunganiswanga pezu kwayo yoma;" 
Amos4:8 zandula izixeko ezibini, umhlaumbi ezitatu, zabadulela kwisixeko sinye, kuselwe amanzi, kodwa bezingakoliswa: anibuyelanga kum noko, utsho uyehova." 
Amos4:9 Ndinibetile ngesihumba nangembabala ngento eninzi; izitiya zenu, nemiyezo yenu, imikiwane yenu, neminquma yenu, uyidlile umqikela; anibuyelanga kum noko, utsho uyehova." 
Amos4:10 Nditumile pakati kwenu isifo esibubisayo, ngesiko le‐Jipete; amadodana enu ndiwabulele ngesiṙele, kunye namahashe enu atinjiweyo; nokunuka kweminquba yenu ndikunyusele ezimpumlweni zenu; anibuyelanga kum noko, utsho uyehova." 
Amos4:11 Ndinici̔tile inxenye, njengokuba utixo waci̔ta i‐Sodome ne‐Gomora; nabeninjengesikuni esinyotulweyo ekutsheni; anibuyelanga kum noko, utsho uyehova." 
Amos4:12 Ngako oko ndiya kwenza ngokunjalo kuwe, Sirayeli! ngokokuba oku ndiya kukwenza kuwe, lungiselela ukumkaulela utixo wako, Sirayeli!" 
Amos4:13 Ngokuba, bona ke, owadala intaba, owenza umoya; oxelayo emntwini into kuyiyo ukucamanga kwake; okwenzayo ukusa kube bubumnyama, onyatelayo pezu kwendawo ezipezulu zomhlaba; nguyehova, utixo wemikosi, igama lake." 
Amos5:1 YIVANI elilizwi ndilitabatile pezu kwenu, isililo, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli!" 
Amos5:2 Intombi ipela yakwa‐Sirayeli iwile, ayiyi kubuya ipakame; ilahliwe pezu kwelayo ilizwe; akuko mntu oyipakamisayo." 
Amos5:3 Ngokuba isitsho inkosi e nguyehova ukuti: Isixeko esapumayo ngewaka, soshiyelwa ikulu, neso sapumayo ngekulu, soshiyelwa ishumi, kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli." 
Amos5:4 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova kwindlu ka‐Sirayeli ukuti: Ndifuneni mna, nipile ke." 
Amos5:5 Nize ningafuni i‐Betele, ningangeni e‐Gilegale, ningadluleli e‐Beresheba: ngokuba i‐Gilegale iya kutinjwa ngenyaniso, ne‐Betele yoba yinto engendawo." 
Amos5:6 Funani uyehova, nipile ke; hleze ayizume njengomlilo indlu ka‐Josefe, uze udle ke, kungeko owucimayo e‐Betele." 
Amos5:7 Nina baguqulayo ubugwebo bube ngumhlonyane, abakahlelayo emhlabeni ubulungisa!" 
Amos5:8 mfuneni owenza isilimela no‐Oriyone; oguqulayo itunzi lokufa libe kukusa; oyenzayo imini ibe mnyama njengobusuku; obizayo amanzi olwandle, awagalele pezu kwomhlaba; nguyehova igama lake:" 
Amos5:9 owalamisa intshabalalo pezu kwonamandla, iti intshabalalo ize pezu kwenqaba." 
Amos5:10 Bayamtiya lowo owohlwayayo esangweni, bayamzonda lowo otetayo ngokulungisa." 
Amos5:11 Ngako oko, ngokuba ninyatela olihlwempu, nisamkela kuye itabataba lenqolowa; nakuba nizakile izindlu zamatye aqandulweyo, aniyi kuhlala kuzo; nakuba nityalile imiyezo enqwenelekileyo, aniyi kusela iveyine yayo." 
Amos5:12 Ngokuba ndizazi izigqito zenu ukuba zininzi, nezono zenu ukuba zikulu; nibandezela olungileyo, nisamkela ibaso lesincwancwaniso, nishenxisa amahlwempu esangweni." 
Amos5:13 Ngako oko onokuqonda woti cwaka ngeloxesha; ngokuba lixesha lobubi elo. 
Amos5:14 Funani okulungileyo, ninga funi okukohlakeleyo, ukuze nipile; kwakuya kuba njalo, — uyehova, utixo wemikosi, woba nani, — njengokuba nitshilo." 
Amos5:15 Tiyani okukohlakeleyo, nitande okulungileyo, nimise ubugwebo esangweni; kungati uyehova, utixo wemikosi, woba nofefe kwisisalela sika‐Josefe." 
Amos5:16 Ngako oko utsho uyehova, utixo wemikosi, inkosi, ukuti: Kuzo zonke izitarate kwobako isijwili; nakuzo zonke indlela baya kuti: Yo! Yo! babize umlimi ekulileni, nabo bonke abakwazi ukukala, esijwilini." 
Amos5:17 Nakuyo yonke imiyezo kwobako isijwili; ngokuba ndiya kucanda pakati kwako, utsho uyehova." 
Amos5:18 MAKUBE nzima kuni niwunqwenayo umhla kayehova! uyinto nina ke kuni umhla kayehova? woba bubumnyama, awuyi kuba kukukanya." 
Amos5:19 Njengokungati umntu wayibaleka ingonyama, yaza yahlangana naye ibere; umhlaumbi wangena endlwini, wayamisa isandla sake pezu kwodonga, yaza yamluma inyoka." 
Amos5:20 Awuyi kuba bumnyama na umhla kayehova, kungeko ukukanya? awuyi kuba sisitokotoko na, kungeko inkazimlo kuwo?" 
Amos5:21 Ndiyayitiya, ndiyayidela imitendeleko yenu; azindiyoleli nentlanganiso ezinkulu zenu." 
Amos5:22 Noko nindenzelayo amadini okutshiswa neminikelo yokudla yenu, andiyi kuyikolela; neminikelo yoxolo yenu yenkomo ezityetyisiweyo andiyi kuyibuka." 
Amos5:23 Susa kum intsholo yengoma zako; nokucula kwehadi zako andiyi kukuva. 
Amos5:24 Mabuqengqeleke ubugwebo njengamanzi, nobulungisa njengomlanjana owelayo futi." 
Amos5:25 Imibingo neminikelo yokudla niyinikele na kum entlango, iminyaka yamashumi mane, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli?" 
Amos5:26 Kanti nayitwala intentana yo‐Moleke wenu, no‐Kiyune wemifanekiso yenu, inkwenkwezi yotixo wenu, lowo enazenzela yena." 
Amos5:27 Ngako oko ndonifudusela ele kwe‐Damakusi, utsho uyehova, ogama lake li ngutixo wemikosi." 
Amos6:1 Makube nzima kubo abasekwonwabeni e‐Ziyone, nakubo abasekunqabeni entabeni ye‐Samariya, abadumileyo besiqalo sezizwe, abati indlu ka‐Sirayeli beza kubo!" 
Amos6:2 Gqitelani e‐Kalene, nibone; nimke apo niye e‐Hamati enkulu; nandule nihlele e‐Gate yama‐Filistiya: bezilungile pezu kwezikumkani ezi na? imida yazo ibimikulu kwimida zenu na?" 
Amos6:3 Makube nzima kubo abakwelelisa kude imini yobubi, nabasondeza isihlalo sokuqobola;" 
Amos6:4 abalala emandlalweni yopondo lwendlovu, nabazolula ezintweni zokupumla zabo; abadlayo amatakane emhlambini, namatole kwa pakati kwesitale;" 
Amos6:5 abahlabelayo ngentlokoma yehadi, abati, njengo‐Davide, baziqingela izinto zokuculisa;" 
Amos6:6 abaselayo ezindebeni zeveyine, nabazitambisayo ngamafuta anqabileyo; kanti abanabuhlungu ngenxa yokwapuka kuka‐Josefe." 
Amos6:7 Ngako oko kaloku bofuduka nabatinjwa bokuqala, kwakuya kumka ukumemeza kwabazolulayo." 
Amos6:8 Inkosi e nguyehova izifungile: utsho uyehova, utixo wemikosi, ukuti: Ndiyabuzonda ubungcwalisa buka‐Yakobi, ndiyazitiya nendlukazi zake: ngako oko ndosinikela isixeko, nako konke okukuso." 
Amos6:9 Kwakuya kuti, ukuba kusele amadoda alishumi endlwini nye, aya kufa nawo." 
Amos6:10 Kanjalo umalamane womntu, kwa lowo omtshisayo, womtabata, kuze kususwe amatambo ake endlwini; waeya kuti kulowo osemacaleni endlu: Useko nawe umntu na? waeya kuti yena: Akuko namnye. Uya kwandula ati: Tutu! ngokuba singekankanye igama likayehova." 
Amos6:11 Ngokuba, bona ke, uyehova eyalele, waeya kubeta indlu enkulu ngentanda, nendlu encinane ngemifanta." 
Amos6:12 Amahashe aya kubaleka na pezu kweliwa? kwopulushwa na kona ngenkabi? ngokuba niguqule ubugwebo bube yinyongo, nesiqa̔mo sobulungisa sibe ngumhlonyane:" 
Amos6:13 nina nivuyayo ngento engendawo, eniti: Asizitabatelanga impondo ngawetu amandla na?" 
Amos6:14 Kodwa, bona ke, ndiya kuvusa isizwe ngakuni, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli! utsho uyehova, utixo wemikosi; babeya kunibandezela, kwa sekungenweni kwe‐Hamati kude kube semlanjaneni wasetafeni." 
Amos7:1 YENJE nje ukundibonisa inkosi e nguyehova: bona ke, yadala imiqikela ekuqaleni kwokuhluma kwenca yasemva; bona ke, ibiyinca yasemva emva kwokusikelwa ukumkani." 
Amos7:2 Kwaza kwati, yakuba igqibile ukuyidla inca yelizwe, ndati: Nkosi Yehova! zuxolele ke! ngubanina u‐Yakobi ukuba eme? ngokuba emncinane yena." 
Amos7:3 Wati uyehova wanosizi pezu kwoku: Akuyi kubako, utsho uyehova." 
Amos7:4 Yenje nje ukundibonisa inkosi e nguyehova: bona ke, inkosi e nguyehova yabiza ukuba kupikwe ngomlilo, waza wayidla inzulu enkulu, wasidla nesabiwo." 
Amos7:5 Ndaza ndati: Nkosi Yehova! zuyeke ke! ngubanina u‐Yakobi ukuba eme? ngokuba emncinane yena. 
Amos7:6 Wati uyehova wanosizi pezu kwoku: Nako oku akuyi kubako, itsho inkosi e nguyehova." 
Amos7:7 Yenje nje ukundibonisa: kekaloku, nantsi inkosi imi pezu kwodonga olwakiweyo ngeplumete, inayo iplumete esandleni sayo." 
Amos7:8 Wayesiti uyehova kum: Yinto nina uyibonayo, Hamose? Ndati: Yiplumete. Yaza yati inkosi: Bona ke, ndoyibeka iplumete pakati kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli; andisayi kupinda ndidlule kubo:" 
Amos7:9 indawo ezipakamileyo zo‐Yisake zotiwa tshabalala, nendawo ezingcwele zo‐Sirayeli ziya kuci̔takaliswa; ndandiya kusukela ngakwindlu ka‐Jerobome ngesiṙele." 
Amos7:10 Wandula u‐Amatsiya, umperisite we‐Betele, watuma ku‐Jerobome, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, esiti: Ucebile ngakuwe u‐Hamose pakati kwendlu ka‐Sirayeli; ilizwe alingetwale onke amazwi ake." 
Amos7:11 Ngokuba etshilo u‐Hamose ukuti: u‐Jerobome uya kufa ngesiṙele; no‐Sirayeli uya kutinjwa ngenyaniso emhlabeni wake. 
Amos7:12 Waza u‐Amatsiya wati ku‐Hamose: Wena mboni! hamba, sabela elizweni lakwa‐Juda, uti apo usidle isonka, nalapo uprofiteshe:" 
Amos7:13 kodwa ungabi sapinda ukuprofitesha e‐Betele: ngokuba yindawo engcwele yokumkani, ngumzi wobukumkani kanjalo." 
Amos7:14 Wandula wapendula u‐Hamose wati ku‐Amatsiya: Bendingenguye umprofite, bendingenguye nonyana womprofite: kodwa bendingumalusi wenkomo, nombuti wamakiwane:" 
Amos7:15 waza wanditabata uyehova ekulandeleni umhlambi, waye uyehova esiti kum: Hamba, profitesha ebantwini bam o‐Sirayeli." 
Amos7:16 Ngako kaloku yiva ilizwi likayehova. Uti wena: Ungaprofiteshi ngaku‐Sirayeli; kanjako, ungaku̔pi lizwi ngakuyo indlu ka‐Yisake." 
Amos7:17 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Umfazi wako woba ngumpinyiswa esixekweni; onyana bako nentombi zako baya kuwa ngesiṙele; nomhlaba wako uya kwabiwa ngentambo; nawe uya kufa emhlabeni onco̔lisekileyo; waye u‐Sirayeli eya kutinjwa ngenyaniso emhlabeni wake. 
Amos8:1 Yenje nje ukundibonisa inkosi e nguyehova: kekaloku nasi isitya seziqa̔mo zehlobo. 
Amos8:2 Yaisiti: Yinto nina uyibonayo, Hamose! Ndati: Sisitya seziqa̔mo zehlobo. Waza wati uyehova kum: Ukupela sekufikele abantu bam o‐Sirayeli; andisayi kupinda ndidlule kubo." 
Amos8:3 Ingoma zendlukazi zoba zizililo ngomhla lowo, itsho inkosi e nguyehova; izidumbu zoba zininzi; kuzo zonke indawo kuya kulahlwa ngokuti tu." 
Amos8:4 Yivani oku, nina ninxameleyo abasweleyo! ukuze nigqibele amahlwempu elizwe," 
Amos8:5 nisiti: Yopela ninina inyanga etwasileyo, ukuba sitengise ngenqolowa; nesabata, ukuba sivulele inkozo? nisenza iyefa ibe ncinane, neshekele ibe nkulu, nipata ngobuxoki izilinganiselo zenkohliso:" 
Amos8:6 ukuze sitenge amahlwempu ngemali, nabasweleyo ngesibini sezihlangu; siti namakoba enkozo sitengise ngawo." 
Amos8:7 Uyehova ufungile ubungcwalisa buka‐Yakobi, esiti: Ngenyaniso andisayi kulibala zonke izenzo zabo napakade!" 
Amos8:8 Ilizwe aliyi kungcangcazela na ngenxa yoku? nabo bonke abemiyo kulo abayi kulila na? liya kunyuka lipela njengomlambo; liya kukukuliswa, lintywiliswe nokuntywiliswa, njenga ngawo umlambo wase‐Jipete." 
Amos8:9 Kwakuya kuti ngalomhla, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, ndolitshonisa ilanga emini enkulu, ndilenze ilizwe libe mnyama pakati kwemini esileyo." 
Amos8:10 Ndoyiguqula imitendeleko yenu ibe kukulila, nazo zonke ingoma zenu zibe kukukala; ndiya kunyusela pezu kwazo zonke izinqe intlakantlaka, napezu kwentloko zonke ubunqai; ndandiya kulenza ilizwe njengokulilelwa umntwana oyedwa, nokupela kwalo njengomhla oṙaṙa." 
Amos8:11 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, itsho inkosi e nguyehova, nxa ndiya kutuma indlala elizweni: ingeyeyokulanjelwa isonka, ingeyeyokunxanelwa amanzi, iyeyokuva amazwi kayehova." 
Amos8:12 Boti abantu babadule k olunye ulwandle kude kube lolunye ulwandle, nakuyo inode kude kube sempumalanga; baya kusukasuka ngokulifuna ilizwi likayehova, kanti abayi kulifumana." 
Amos8:13 Ngomhla lowo ziya kucubuka intombi zipela ezintle, namadodana, linxanwa:" 
Amos8:14 abafungayo ityala le‐Samariya, batsho ukuti: Bomi botixo wako, Dane! nokuti: Bomi besiko le‐Beresheba! bowa kwa bona, bangabuyi bapakame." 
Amos9:1 NDABONA inkosi imi ngasesibingelweni; yaisiti: Beta umqolo, ize ingcangcazele imigubasi; uyici̔te pezu kwentloko zabo bonke; nabayinzalo yabo ndobabulala ngesiṙele; akayi kwesaba namnye wakubo obalekayo, akayi kusindiswa namnye wakubo osindayo." 
Amos9:2 Noko batyobozelayo ehadesi, sobatabata kwa kona isandla sam; noko bakwelayo ezulwini, ndobahlisa kwa kona:" 
Amos9:3 nangona bazimela engcopeni ye‐Karamele, ndiya kupengulula, ndibatabate kwa kona; nangona bazifihlayo emehlweni am emazantsi olwandle, ndoyiyalela inyoka kwa kona, yobaluma ke:" 
Amos9:4 nakuba baya ekutinjweni pambi kwentshaba zabo, ndiya kuyalela isiṙele kwa kona, sobabulala ke; ndandiya kubeka amehlo am pezu kwabo kube kokubi, kungabi kokulungileyo." 
Amos9:5 Ngokuba inkosi, uyehova wemikosi, inguye ocu̔kumisayo umhlaba, uze unyibilike; bati bonke abemiyo kuwo balile; unyuke wona upela njengomlambo, untywiliswe njenga ngawo umlambo wase‐Jipete." 
Amos9:6 Lowo ozakileyo inkambili zake ezulwini, nesazinge sake usisekele pezu kwomhlaba; lowo obizayo amanzi olwandle, awagalele pezu kwobuso bomhlaba; nguyehova igama lake." 
Amos9:7 Aninjengosapo lwama‐Tiyopiya na kum, lusapo luka‐Sirayeli? utsho uyehova. Andinyusanga na o‐Sirayeli ezweni le‐Jipete, nama‐Filistiya e‐Kafetori, nama‐Siriya e‐Kire?" 
Amos9:8 Bona ke, amehlo enkosi e nguyehova angapezu kwobukumkani obububono, ndandiya kutshabalalisa bona ebusweni bomhlaba; kodwa noko, andiyi kugqibela ukutshabalalisa indlu ka‐Yakobi, utsho uyehova." 
Amos9:9 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kuxela, ndandiya kuhluza indlu ka‐Sirayeli pakati kwezizwe zonke, njengokuba kuhluzwa inqolowa ngentluzo, kungawi nalunye ukozwana pezu kwomhlaba." 
Amos9:10 Baya kufa ngesiṙele bonke aboni pakati kwabantu bam, abati: Ububi abuyi kusifikela, abuyi kusipangela kanjalo." 
Amos9:11 NGOMHLA lowo ndolipakamisa ipempe lika‐Davide eliwayo, ndivingce iziṙoba zalo; ndandiya kupakamisa ingci̔takalo zalo, ndilake njengasemihleni yakudala:" 
Amos9:12 ukuze kufuywe isisalela se‐Edome, nabo bonke abaheyideni ekubizwa pezu kwabo igama lam, utsho uyehova okwenzayo oku." 
Amos9:13 Bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, ukuba umlimi womfumana umvuni, nomxovuli wedreyive lowo uhlwayelayo imbewu; kanjalo intaba ziya kutontsela iveyine entsha, nazo zonke induli zonyibilika." 
Amos9:14 Ndandiya kubuyisa ukutinjwa kwabantu bam o‐Sirayeli, abaya kuzaka izixeko ezici̔takeleyo, beme kuzo: baya kutyala imiyezo, basele iveyine yayo; bozenza nezitiya, badle isixakato sazo." 
Amos9:15 Ngokuba ndiya kubatyala emhlabeni wabo; baye bengasayi kubuya badonyulwe emhlabeni wabo endiwunikileyo kubo, utsho uyehova, utixo wako." 
Obadiah1:1 ISIBONAKALO sika‐Hobadiya. Itsho inkosi e nguyehova ngayo i‐Edome ukuti: Sivile intshumayelo ivela kuyehova, kanjalo isitunywa situnyiwe pakati kwezizwe, ukuti: Sukani, sisukele ngakuyo ekulweni!" 
Obadiah1:2 Bona ke, ndikwenzile into encinane pakati kwezizwe; uyadelwa kakulu." 
Obadiah1:3 Ir̔atshi lentliziyo yako likukohlisile, wena umiyo emifanteni yeliwa, okuhlala kupezulu; oti entliziyweni yake: Ngubanina oya kundihlisela emhlabeni?" 
Obadiah1:4 Nakuba ubuya kuzipakamisa njengokozi, nakuba ubuya kuyibeka indlu yako pakati kwenkwenkwezi, ndokuhlisa kwa kona, utsho uyehova." 
Obadiah1:5 Ukuba ebeze kuwe amasela, ukuba ebeze amanyangaza ebusuku, (hai ukubujiswa kwako!) ebengayi kukuba̔ na oko kuwaneleyo? ukuba bebeze kuwe abavuni bedreyive, bebengayi kuzisalisa imbikico na?" 
Obadiah1:6 Hai ukupengululwa kwezinto zika‐Esau! hai ukufunwa kwezifihliweyo zake! 
Obadiah1:7 Bonke abebetelelene nawe bakugxotele emdeni; abo abebexolene nawe bakukohlisile, bakweyisile: abadlayo isonka sako bakubekele umgibe: akuko ukuqonda kuye." 
Obadiah1:8 Ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova, andiyi kububisa na amalumko e‐Edome, nokuqonda entabeni ka‐Esau?" 
Obadiah1:9 Amagoṙa ako, Temani! aya kumatiswa, ukuze banqanyulwe bonke abasentabeni ka‐Esau ngokubulawa." 
Obadiah1:10 Ngenxa yobudlwengu obenzelwa umninawe wako u‐Yakobi, ihlazo lokugubungela, wauya kunqanyulwa kude kube ngunapakade." 
Obadiah1:11 Mhlana wamela ngaku ye, mhlana abohlanga lumbi batimbayo impi yake, baza abasemzini bangena ngamasango ake, benzela i‐Yerusaleme amaqashiso, ubunjengowakubo nawe." 
Obadiah1:12 Kodwa ngeungabonelanga emhleni womninawe wako, emhleni welishwa lake; waunge ungavuyelanga usapo luka‐Juda, emhleni wembujiswa yalo; kanjalo ngeungatetanga nger̔atshi, emhleni wobunzima." 
Obadiah1:13 Ngeungangenanga ngesango labantu bam, emhleni wengozi yabo; ngeungabonelanga kwa wena ububi babo, emhleni wengozi yabo; waunge ungolulanga isandla pezu kwobutyebi babo, emhleni wengozi yabo;" 
Obadiah1:14 kanjalo unga ungemanga engxingweni, ukuba unqamle abasindileyo bake; waunge unganikelanga abaseleyo bake, emhleni wobunzima." 
Obadiah1:15 Ngokuba umhla kayehova ukufupi ngakuzo zonke izizwe; njengoko ukwenzileyo, kuya kwenziwa kuwe; impindezelo yako yobuyela pezu kweyako intloko." 
Obadiah1:16 Ngokuba, njengokuba nisele pezu kwentaba yam engcwele, kwa njalo ziya kusela futi izizwe zonke; ewe, ziya kusela, ziminye ke, zaziya kuba njengokungati zibe zingeko." 
Obadiah1:17 Kodwa entabeni ye‐Ziyone kuya kubako ukusinda, yaiya kuba bungcwele; yoti indlu ka‐Yakobi ifuye imfuyo zabo." 
Obadiah1:18 Kanjalo indlu ka‐Yakobi yoba ngumlilo, nendlu ka‐Josefe yoba lilangatye; yoti indlu ka‐Esau ibe zindiza, babeya kupemba pakati kwabo, babagqibe; aze angabiko oseleyo kwindlu ka‐Esau; ngokuba etshilo uyehova." 
Obadiah1:19 Abasesuyide bofuya intaba ka‐Esau, nabasezihlanjeni ama‐Filistiya; bofuya nelizwe lakwa‐Frayime, nelizwe le‐Samariya; no‐Benjamine wofuya i‐Gileyadi." 
Obadiah1:20 Abatinjwa balomkosi wosapo luka‐Sirayeli, aba pakati kw aba‐Kanane, bofuya kude kube se‐Tsarefate; nabatinjwa base‐Yerusaleme, abase‐Sefarade, bofuya izixeko zasesuyide." 
Obadiah1:21 Baye abasindisi beya kunyukela entabeni ye‐Ziyone, ukuza kugweba intaba ka‐Esau; boti ubukumkani bube bo bukayehova." 
Jonah1:1 ILIZWI likayehova leza ku‐Jona, unyana ka‐Amitai, lisiti:" 
Jonah1:2 Suka, uye e‐Nineve, esosixeko sikulu, ushumayele ngakuso; ngokuba inkohlakalo yabo inyukele pambi kwam." 
Jonah1:3 Kodwa u‐Jona wesuka ukuba asabele e‐Tareshishe, esaba ebusweni bukayehova; wehla waya e‐Jopa, wayifumana inqanawa isiya e‐Tareshishe, wanika umvuzo wayo, wangena kuyo, ukuba ahambe nabo ukuya e‐Tareshishe, esaba ebusweni bukayehova." 
Jonah1:4 Kodwa uyehova wahlisa pezu kwolwandle umoya omkulu, kwaza kwabako uqwitela olukulu elwandle, yada inqanawa yanga iya kwapuka." 
Jonah1:5 Bandula boyika omatrose, bakala abanye ngabanye kotixo babo, baziposa impahla ezisenqanaweni elwandle, ukuba yenziwe lula ngazo; kodwa u‐Jona ebehlele emacaleni enqanawa, walala ubutongo obukulu." 
Jonah1:6 Yaza yasondela kuye inkosi yenqanawa, yati kuye: Yinina, ulele butongo nje? Suka, ubize kutixo wako, kungati uya kusikumbulela utixo lowo, ukuba singabubi." 
Jonah1:7 Baye besiti omnye kwomnye: Yizani, masenze amaqashiso, ukuze sikwazi kungenxa yobanina elilishwa lipezu kwetu. Bandula bawenza amaqashiso, lati iqashiso lawa pezu kwake u‐Jona." 
Jonah1:8 Baza bati kuye: Zusixelele ke kungenxa yobanina elilishwa lipezu kwetu? Yinto nina umsebenzi wako? Uvela pina? Ilizwe lako lelinina? Ungowasebantwini bapina? 
Jonah1:9 Wayesiti kubo: Ndingum‐Hebere mna; ndiyamoyika uyehova, utixo wezulu, owadala ulwandle n omhlaba owomileyo." 
Jonah1:10 Aza oyika amadoda lawo ngokwoyika okukulu, ati kuye: Yinina lento uyenzileyo? Ngokuba ebesazi amadoda lawo ukuba uyesaba ebusweni bukayehova, ngokuba ebewaxelele." 
Jonah1:11 Alekela ukuti kuye: Sesiya kwenza nto nina kuwe, luze ulwandle lusizolele? ngokuba ulwandle belumana lusilwa ngakumbi." 
Jonah1:12 Wayesiti kuwo: Ndifunquleni, nindiposele elwandle; luya kwandula ulwandle lunizolele; ngokuba ndisazi kungenxa yam oluqwitela lukulu lupezu kwenu." 
Jonah1:13 Aza amadoda lawo aqu̔ba kakulu ukuba abuyisele emhlabeni inqanawa; akohlwa noko, ngokuba ulwandle belumana lusilwa ngakumbi ngakuwo." 
Jonah1:14 Ngako abiza kuyehova, ati: Uz’ uti ke, Yehova! masingabubi ke ngenxa yobomi balendoda, zungabeki pezu kwetu igazi elingenatyala: ngokuba wena, Yehova! wenzile njengoko ukutandileyo." 
Jonah1:15 Asuka amfunqula u‐Jona, amposela elwandle, lwand’ ukunqumama ulwandle ekujaleni kwawo." 
Jonah1:16 Aza amadoda lawo amoyika uyehova ngokwoyika okukulu, ambingela uyehova umbingo, azenza izibambiso." 
Jonah1:17 Kekaloku uyehova ebemisele intlanzi enkulu ukuba imginye u‐Jona. Wabentsuku ntatu u‐Jona esiswini sentlanzi leyo. 
Jonah2:1 Wandula u‐Jona watandaza kuyehova, utixo wake, esesiswini sentlanzi, wati:" 
Jonah2:2 Ndabiza ngenxa yokubandezelwa kwam kuyehova, wandipendula ke; ndadanduluka ndisembilini wehadesi, waliva wena ilizwi lam." 
Jonah2:3 Wabundilahlela enzulwini, kwa pakati kwelwandle; wandingqonga umsinga; zadlula pezu kwam onke amaza ako nengqengqeleko zako." 
Jonah2:4 Ndaza ndati: Sendigxotiwe kwa pambi kwamehlo ako; noko, ndobuya ndikangele ngasetempileni yako engcwele." 
Jonah2:5 Amanzi andiṙaula ada angena empefumlweni; inzulu yandipahla; ukula lwabotshwa entloko yam. 
Jonah2:6 Ndehlela emazantsi entaba; umhlaba imivalo yawo ibindingqonga ngonapakade: kodwa unyusile ubomi bam ekuboleni, Yehova, Tixo wam!" 
Jonah2:7 Nxa umpefumlo wam ubucubukile pakati kwam, ndamkumbula uyehova; yati intandazo yam yeza kuwe, kuyo itempile yako engcwele." 
Jonah2:8 Abo babeka izinto ezingendawo zobuxoki, bayashiya ububele babo." 
Jonah2:9 Mna kodwa ndobingela kuwe ngelizwi lokubulela: oko endibambisile ngako ndiya kufeza kona: usindiso lo lukayehova. 
Jonah2:10 Wati uyehova wateta kwintlanzi, yaza yamhlanza u‐Jona pezu kw omhlaba owomileyo." 
Jonah3:1 ILIZWI likayehova leza ku‐Jona ngokwesibini, lisiti:" 
Jonah3:2 Suka, uye e‐Nineve, esosixeko sikulu, ushumayele kuso isishumayelo endisityelayo kuwe." 
Jonah3:3 Wesuka ke u‐Jona, waya e‐Nineve, njengelizwi likayehova. Kekaloku i‐Nineve ibisisixeko esikulu pambi kwotixo, esehambo yemihla mitatu." 
Jonah3:4 Waza u‐Jona waqala ukungena esixekweni, ihambo yamini nye; wayeshumayela, wati: Kuseko imihla imashumi mane, kuya kwand’ ukuci̔twa i‐Nineve." 
Jonah3:5 Baza abantu base‐Nineve bakolwa ngutixo, bashumayela inzilo, bambata intlakantlaka, kwa kubo abakulu kwada kwakubo abancinane." 
Jonah3:6 Ngokuba ilizwi elo lafikela kukumkani we‐Nineve, owesuka eteroneni yake, wasusa umnweba wake, wazigubungela ngentlakantlaka, wahlala pantsi elututwini." 
Jonah3:7 Kwaza kwadandulukwa kwaxelwa e‐Nineve, ngomteto wokumkani nabakulu bake, ukuti: Makungeva nto abantu nenkomo, inkabi negusha; mabangatyi ukutya, mabangaseli amanzi:" 
Jonah3:8 mabati abantu nenkomo bagujungelwe ngentlakantlaka, babize kutixo ngamandla; kanjalo mabaguquke bonke ngabanye kuyo indlela yabo ekohlakeleyo, nakubo ubudlwengu obusezandleni zabo." 
Jonah3:9 Ngubanina owaziyo? angaguquka utixo abe nosizi, aguquke ebushushwini bengqumbo yake, size singabubi." 
Jonah3:10 Kekaloku utixo wabona izenzo zabo, zokuba baguquka kuyo indlela yabo ekohlakeleyo; waza utixo waba nosizi pezu kwobubi owabete uya kubenza kubo, akabenza ke." 
Jonah4:1 Kodwa kwabuhlungu ku‐Jona ngobuhlungu obukulu, waqumba ke." 
Jonah4:2 Waza watandaza kuyehova, wati: Ke, Yehova! ilizwi lam belingelilo eli na, xeshekweni bendiseko elizweni lam? Ngako oko ndapangela ngokwesabela e‐Tareshishe; ngokuba bendisazi ukuba wena u ngutixo onofefe nenceba, oqumba kade, onobubele obukulu, onosizi ngobubi." 
Jonah4:3 Nakaloku, Yehova! uze ususe kum ubomi bam: ngokuba kulungile ukufa kwam ngapezu kwobomi bam." 
Jonah4:4 Wandula wati uyehova: Uyalungisa ukuqumba na? 
Jonah4:5 Wasuka wemka u‐Jona esixekweni, wahlala ngecala lasempumalanga lesixeko, wazenzela kona ipempe, wahlala ngapantsi kwalo emtunzini, wada wabona kwohla nto nina esixekweni." 
Jonah4:6 Waza uyehova utixo wamisela ikikayone, wayinabisela pezulu pezu kwo‐Jona, ukuba ibe ngumtunzi pezu kwentloko yake, ukumkulula ebuhlungwini bake. Wati u‐Jona wavuya ngovuyo olukulu ngenxa yayo ikikayone." 
Jonah4:7 Kodwa utixo wamisela intlava ekunyukeni kwesifingo, kwakusa, eyayona ikikayone, yada yabuna." 
Jonah4:8 Kwaza kwati, lakupuma ilanga, utixo wamisela umoya wasempumalanga olulwopu, lati ilanga labalela pezu kwentloko ka‐Jona, wada wacubuka, wazicelela ukuba makafe, wati: Kulungile ukufa kwam ngapezu kwobomi bam." 
Jonah4:9 Wandula utixo wati ku‐Jona: Uyalungisa ukuqumba na ngenxa yekikayone? Wayesiti: Ndiyalungisa ukuqumba, kude kube sekufeni." 
Jonah4:10 Wayesiti uyehova: Wena ubetwe lusizi pezu kwekikayone, ongazamanga ngayo, nongayikulisanga; eyapumayo ebusuku bunye, eyabubayo ebusuku bunye kanjako:" 
Jonah4:11 nam ke, ngendingabetwa lusizi na pezu kwe‐Nineve, esosixeko sikulu, ekukuso abantu abagqita amawaka alikulu linamashumi mabini abangeqiqe pakati kwesokunene isandla sabo nesokohlo sabo, nento eninzi yenkomo?" 
Micah1:1 ILIZWI likayehova elezayo ku‐Mika um‐Moreshete, emihleni ka‐Yotame, n o‐Ahazi, n o‐Hezekiya, okumkani bo‐Juda, elo walibonayo ngayo i‐Samariya nangayo i‐Yerusaleme." 
Micah1:2 Yivani, bantu, nina nonke! pulapula, mhlaba, nokuzala kwawo! maiti inkosi e nguyehova ibe linqi̔na ngakuni, inkosi isetempileni yayo engcwele." 
Micah1:3 Ngokuba, bona ke, uyehova epuma endaweni yake, waeya kuhla, anyatele pezu kwendawo ezipezulu zomhlaba." 
Micah1:4 Intaba zonyibilika pantsi kwake, nemihlambo iya kucandeka, njengomtwebeba pambi kwomlilo, njengamanzi akukuliswayo ngetambeka." 
Micah1:5 Oku konke kungenxa yesigqito sika‐Yakobi, nangenxa yezono zendlu ka‐Sirayeli. Siyinto nina isigqito sika‐Yakobi? asi yiyo i‐Samariya na? Ziyinto nina indawo ezipakamileyo zika‐Juda? asi yiyo i‐Yerusaleme na?" 
Micah1:6 Ngako ndiya kuyenza i‐Samariya njengemfumba entsimini, na njengezityalo zasesitiyeni semiti yeveyine: amatye ayo ndoweyelisa emhlanjeni, nemisekelo yayo ndoyityila." 
Micah1:7 Yonke imifanekiso yayo eqingqiweyo yoqekezwa, nayo yonke imivuzo yayo yotshiswa ngomlilo, nazo zonke izitixo zayo ndozenzela ingci̔takalo; ngokuba izihlanganisile ngomvuzo wompinyiswa, ziya kubuya zibe ngumvuzo wompinyiswa kanjako." 
Micah1:8 Ngako oku ndiya kukala, ndilile nokulila, ndiya kuhamba ndihlubulukile, ndizé; ndokwenza ukukala njengencu̔ka, nokuncwina njengenciniba." 
Micah1:9 Ngokuba amanxeba ayo engenakupoliswa; ngokuba eze nakwa‐Juda: ufikele esangweni labantu bam, kwa se‐Yerusaleme." 
Micah1:10 Ningashumayeli e‐Gate, ningake nilile: uti e‐Bete‐hofera uqikaqikeke elutulini." 
Micah1:11 Dlula, wena mhlalikazi wase‐Shafire! onobuzé, onehlazo; akapumi umhlalikazi wase‐Tsanane; isijwili se‐Bete‐atsele siyasusa isima saso kuni." 
Micah1:12 Ngenyaniso umhlalikazi wase‐Marote uyatutumbela okulungileyo; ngokuba ububi buhlile kuyehova, busiza esangweni le‐Yerusaleme." 
Micah1:13 Bopa ihashe eliyimbaleki enqwelweni, wena mhlalikazi wase‐Lakishe! (ibikukuqala kwokwona yona kwintombi yase‐Ziyone;) ngokuba izigqito zika‐Sirayeli bezifunyanwa kuwe." 
Micah1:14 Ngako oko uya kunika isindululo kwi‐Moreshete‐gate; izindlu zase‐Kazibe zoba yinto ekohlisayo kubo okumkani bo‐Sirayeli. 
Micah1:15 Kanjako, ndozisa umfuyi kuwe, wena mhlalikazi wase‐Maresha! woza e‐Hadulame, ubungcwalisa bakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Micah1:16 Zenze bunqai, uzigugule ngenxa yabantwana bako abamnandi; yenza banzi ubunqai bako, njengokozi; ngokuba befudusiwe kuwe." 
Micah2:1 KWOBA nzima kubo abaqingayo inkohlakalo, abadalayo ububi ezililini zabo! ekukanyeni kwokusa bayabenza, ngokuba busemandleni esandla sabo." 
Micah2:2 Bayanqwenela amasimi, bandule bawapange, nezindlu, bandule bazisuse; bayabandezela indoda nendlu yayo, kwa indoda nelifa layo." 
Micah2:3 Ngako oko utsho uyehova ukuti: Bona ke, ndiyaqingela esisizalwane ububi, eningayi kushenxisa intamo zenu kubo; kanjako aniyi kuhamba ngokuzidla; ngokuba loba lixesha elibi elo." 
Micah2:4 Ngalomhla kwotetwa ingoma ngani, kwakuya kulilwa ngesililo esilusizi, kwotiwa: Sigqityelwe ukuci̔takaliswa. Uguqule isabiwo sabantu bam: hai ukusishenxisa kwake kum! wabele umpambuki amasimi etu!" 
Micah2:5 Ngako oko akuyi kubako kuwe oposa intambo ngeqashiso, emhlambini kayehova." 
Micah2:6 Ningaprofiteshi; batsho kubo abaprofiteshayo: ukuba abayi kuprofitesha kubo aba, akuyi kumka amahlazo." 
Micah2:7 Wena obizwayo ngendlu ka‐Yakobi! umoya kayehova ufinyele na? zizenzo zake ezi na? amazwi am akamncedi na lowo ulungisayo ukuhamba kwake? 
Micah2:8 Kodwa kudala bavukile abantu bam njengotshaba; niyabahluba umnweba kunye nengubo abo badlulayo ngokunqaba, bebuya ekulweni." 
Micah2:9 Abafazi babantu bam niyabagxota ekayeni labo elimnandi; niyasusa kubantwana babo ubungcwalisa bam kude kube ngunapakade. 
Micah2:10 Sukani, nimke! ngokuba ingeyiyo le indawo yokupumla kwenu; ngenxa yokunco̔la iya ku ni ci̔ta, kwa ngengci̔to enzima." 
Micah2:11 Ukuba umntu, ohamba emoyeni nasebuxokini, uyaxoka, esiti: Ndiya kuprofitesha kuwe ngeveyine nangoselo olunamandla; nguye lo oya kuba ngumprofite wababantu." 
Micah2:12 Ndiya kukuhlanganisa upela ngenyaniso, Yakobi! ndiya kusibuta ngenyaniso isisalela so‐Sirayeli; ndobabeka ndawonye njengezimvu zase‐Botsera, njengomhlambi pakati kwedlelo lawo; baya kwenza impitimpiti ngenxa yobuninzi babantu." 
Micah2:13 Umtyobozeli unyukele pambi kwabo; bayatyobozela, badlulele esangweni; bayapuma ngalo; ukumkani wabo uyadlula pambi kwabo, noyehova entlokweni yabo." 
Micah3:1 NDANDISITI: Yivani ke, nina zintloko zika‐Yakobi, nani bagwebi bendlu ka‐Sirayeli! asi kuko okwenu na ukwazi ubugwebo?" 
Micah3:2 Abati okulungileyo bakutiye, nokukohlakeleyo bakutande; abaxwebula intlonze yabo kubo, nenyama yabo ematanjeni abo:" 
Micah3:3 abati kanjalo bayidle inyama yabantu bam, bayobule intlonze yabo kubo; namatambo abo bayawapula, bawaxaxele njengasembizeni, nanjengenyama pakati kwongxawo." 
Micah3:4 Oko baya kubiza kuyehova, kodwa akayi kubapendula; uya kufihla ubuso bake kubo ngexesha elo, njengokuba bezikohlakalisile izenzo zabo." 
Micah3:5 Utsho ukuti uyehova ngabo abaprofite abalahlekisa abantu bam, abaluma ngamazinyo abo, bashumayele uxolo; kodwa lowo ongafakeli emilonyeni yabo, bayalungisa imfazwe ngakuye:" 
Micah3:6 Ngako oko noba ninobusuku, singabiko isiboniso; noba ninobumnyama, kungabiko ukulaula; ewe, ilanga liya kubatshonela abaprofite, nemini yoba mnyama pezu kwabo." 
Micah3:7 Baya kwandula ababoni ukudana, nabalauli ukumata; bona bonke bogubungela imbovu yabo, ngokuba ingeko impendulo kutixo." 
Micah3:8 Kodwa ngenyaniso ndizele ngamandla ngomoya kayehova; ndizele nalugwebo nokalipo: ukuba ndixele ku‐Yakobi isigqito sake, naku‐Sirayeli isono sake." 
Micah3:9 Yivani ke oku, nina zintloko zendlu ka‐Yakobi, nani bagwebi bendlu ka‐Sirayeli! abazondayo ubugwebo, nako konke okufaneleyo bakwenze gwenxa;" 
Micah3:10 besaka i‐Ziyone ngegazi, ne‐Yerusaleme ngenkohlakalo." 
Micah3:11 Intloko zayo ziyagweba ngenxa yamabaso, nabaperisite bayo bayafundisa ngenxa yomvuzo, nabaprofite bayo bayalaula ngenxa yemali: noko bayayama kuyehova, besiti: Uyehova akapakati kwetu na? ububi abuyi kuza pezu kwetu." 
Micah3:12 Ngako oko, ngenxa yenu, i‐Ziyone iya kuku̔tyelwa njeng entsimi, ne‐Yerusaleme yoba zimfumba, nentaba yalendlu yoba yimimango ebuhlati." 
Micah4:1 Kwakuya kuti emihleni yokupela, intaba yendlu kayehova yoqiniselwa engcopo yentaba, ipakanyiselwe pezu kwenduli, ziti izizwe zele kuyo." 
Micah4:2 Ewe, zohamba intlanga ezininzi, ziti: Yizani, masinyuke siye entabeni kayehova, nasendlwini yotixo ka‐Yakobi, ukuba asifundise indlela zake, nokuba sihambe emikweni yake; ngokuba umteto uya kupuma e‐Ziyone, nelizwi likayehova e‐Yerusaleme." 
Micah4:3 Waeya kugweba pakati kwezizwe ezininzi, azohlwaye intlanga ezinamandla, ezikude; zide zikande iziṙele zazo zibe ngamakuba, nezikali zazo zibe ngamaṙenqa: olunye uhlanga aluyi kupakamisa isiṙele ngakw olunye uhlanga; kanjalo abantu abasayi kuba safunda ukulwa;" 
Micah4:4 kodwa baya kuhlala abanye ngabanye ngapantsi kwomti weveyine wabo, nangapantsi kwomkiwane wabo, kungeko oya kuboyikisa; ngokuba utshilo umlomo kayehova wemikosi." 
Micah4:5 Nakuba zihamba izizwe zonke, ezinye ngezinye, ngegama lotixo wazo, sohamba tina ngegama likayehova, lotixo wetu, kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Micah4:6 Ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova, ndiya kuhianganisa abaqwalelayo, ndibabute abagxotiweyo, nabo endibabandezeleyo;" 
Micah4:7 ndandiya kubenza abaqwalelayo babe sisisalela, nabo abebefuduselwe kude, babe sisizwe esinamandla: waye uyehova eya kuba ngukumkani pezu kwabo entabeni ye‐Ziyone, kwa kaloku nje, nakude kube ngunapakade." 
Micah4:8 Nawe, nqaba yomhlambi, nduli yentombi yase‐Ziyone! kwa kuwe buya kuza, ewe, buya kuza ubukosi bapambili, ubukumkani bentombi yase‐Yerusaleme."
