Micah4:9 KUNGANINA kaloku ukumemeza kwako kangaka? akuko kuwe ukumkani na? amapakati ako abubile na, ukuba ubuhlungu bukubambile njengomfazi oza kuzala?" 
Micah4:10 Yiba nobuhlungu, ukupe, ntombi yase‐Ziyone! njengomfazi oza kuzala: ngokuba kaloku uya kupuma esixekweni, uya kuma ezindleni, woya kwa se‐Babilone; kona apo uya kuhlangulwa, kona apo uyehova wokukulula esandleni sentshaba zako." 
Micah4:11 Nakaloku intlanga ezininzi zibutelene ngakuwe, eziti: Maidyojwe; makabonele i‐Ziyone amehlo etu." 
Micah4:12 Kodwa zona azazi amaqinga kayehova, aziliqondi necebo lake; ngokuba eya kuzibuta njengezitungu esibayeni." 
Micah4:13 Suka, ubule ke, ntombi yase‐Ziyone! ngokuba ndiya kulwenza upondo lwako lube sisincete, nempupu zako ndiya kuzenza zibe lubedu; wauya kutyumza izizwe ezininzi; inzuzo yazo ndoyahlukanisele kuyehova, nobutyebi bazo kwinkosi yomhlaba wonke." 
Micah5:1 Kaloku zihlanganise ngamabandla, ntombi yamabandla! sibekiwe ekuvingcelekeni: ngoswazi bambetile esidleleni umgwebi wo‐Sirayeli!" 
Micah5:2 Nawe, Beteleheme Eferata! umncinane ukuba pakati kwamawaka akwa‐Sirayeli; kodwa kuwe kwopumela kum ukuba ngumpati kwa‐Sirayeli, ozipumo zake zibe zikudala, emihleni yonapakade." 
Micah5:3 Noko wobayekelela kude kube lixesha azeleyo lowo oya kuzala; bandule abazalwana bake abaseleyo babuyele elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli. 
Micah5:4 Waeya kuma ke, aluse ngamandla kayehova, ngobukulu begama likayehova, utixo wake: babeya kuhlala; ngokuba kaloku eya kuba mkulu kude kube sezincameni zomhlaba." 
Micah5:5 Woba luxolo kwa lowo. Xeshekweni um‐Asiriya aya kungena ezweni letu, naxeshekweni aya kunyatela kuzo izindlukazi zetu, siya kwandula sivuse ngakuye abalusi abasixe̔nxe, namadoda atanjisiweyo asibozo." 
Micah5:6 Baya kugqiba ilizwe le‐Asiriya ngesiṙele, nelizwe lika‐Nimrode ezingenweni zalo: waeya ku si sindisa kum‐Asiriya, okuya aya kungena elizweni letu, nokuya aya kunyatela emideni yetu." 
Micah5:7 Isisalela sika‐Yakobi sobako pakati kwezizwe ezininzi, njengombete uvela kuyehova, njengemvula pezu kwemifuno, engalindeli umntu, engalibaleli onyana babantu kanjako." 
Micah5:8 Ewe, isisalela sika‐Yakobi sobako pakati kwabaheyideni, pakati kwezizwe ezininzi, njengengonyama pakati kwezilo zehlati, njengengonyama entsha pakati kwemihlambi yezimvu, eti, nxa icandayo, inyatele pantsi ke, iqwenge nokuqwenga, kungeko osindisayo." 
Micah5:9 Isandla sako sopakanyiswa pezu kwabayimpi kuwe, nazo zonke intshaba zako ziya kunqanyulwa." 
Micah5:10 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova, ukuba ndiya kunqamla amahashe ako kwa pakati kwako; nenqwelo zako ndiya kuzitshabalalisa." 
Micah5:11 Ndandiya kuzinqamla izixeko zelizwe lako, nazo zonke inqaba zako ndozici̔ta." 
Micah5:12 Ndiya kubunqamla nobugqi esandleni sako, uze ungabi nabo abalauli." 
Micah5:13 Ndandiya kuyinqamla imifanekiso yako eqingqiweyo nezifanekiso ezimiyo zako kwa pakati kwako; akusayi kupinda ubedeshe umsebenzi wezako izandla. 
Micah5:14 Nemifanekiso yako ka‐Ashera ndoyidonyula kwa pakati kwako, nezixeko zako ndozici̔takalisa." 
Micah5:15 Ndandiya kuyenza impindezelo ngengqumbo nangomsindo pezu kwabaheyideni, abo abangapulapulanga." 
Micah6:1 YIVANI ke oko akutshoyo uyehova: Suka, upike ebusweni bentaba, nenduli mazilive ilizwi lako." 
Micah6:2 Yivani, zintaba! ipike likayehova, nani misekelo yomhlaba emiyo futi! ngokuba uyehova enepike nabantu bake, uya kupikisana no‐Sirayeli." 
Micah6:3 Bantu bam! ndenze nto nina kuni? ndinidinisile nganto nina? ndinqi̔neleni. 
Micah6:4 Ngokuba ndaninyusa elizweni le‐Jipete, ndanikulula endlwini yobukoboka; kanjalo ndatuma pambi kwenu u‐Mosesi, n o‐Arone, no‐Miriyame." 
Micah6:5 Bantu bam! kumbulani ke oko wakucebayo u‐Balaki ukumkani wama‐Mowabi, noko wampendulayo ngako u‐Bilame unyana ka‐Behori, noko kwehlayo e‐Shitime kude kwase‐Gilegale, ukuze nizazi izenzo ezilungileyo zikayehova." 
Micah6:6 Ndiya kuza pambi kwoyehova nganto nina? ndiya kuzitoba kutixo opezulu nganto nina? ndiya kuza pambi kwake ngamadini okutshiswa na? ndiya kuza ngamatole omnyaka mnye na? 
Micah6:7 Wokoliswa uyehova ngamawaka enkunzi zegusha na? ngamawaka alishumi emilambo yeoli na? ndiya kunika owamazibulo wam na ngenxa yesigqito sam? isixakato sombilini wam na ngenxa yesono sompefumlo wam? 
Micah6:8 Ukuxelele, mntundini! into kuyiyo okulungileyo: kekaloku uyehova uyafuna nto nina kuwe, kupela ukwenza okufanelekileyo, nokutanda ububele, nokuhamba notixo wako ngokululamileyo?" 
Micah6:9 Ilizwi likayehova liyabiza esixekweni: (olumkileyo wobeka igama lako:) Yivani intonga, nalowo oyimiseleyo." 
Micah6:10 Kuseko na endlwini yokohlakeleyo indyebo zenkohlakalo, neyefa elula, ezondekileyo?" 
Micah6:11 Bendiya kuba msulwa na, ndinezilinganiselo ezikohlakeleyo, ndinenxowa yamatye okulinganisa enkohliso?" 
Micah6:12 Ngokuba izityebi zaso zizele bubudlwengu, nabemi baso batetile ubuxoki, nolwimi lwabo bubukohliso emlonyeni wabo." 
Micah6:13 Ngako kanjalo ndiya ku kw enza usifa ngokukubeta, ngoku ku ci̔takalisa ngenxa yezono zako." 
Micah6:14 Wena ungatya, kodwa akuyi kuhlutiswa, wauya kubohla pakati kwako; kanjako ungafudusa, kodwa akuyi kusindisa, noko ukusindisayo ndokunikela esiṙeleni." 
Micah6:15 Wena ungahlwayela, kodwa akuyi kuvuna; ungaxovula amanquma, kodwa akuyi kuzitambisa ngeoli; n edreyive z eveyine entsha, kodwa akuyi kusela iveyine." 
Micah6:16 Ngokuba kugciniwe imimiso ka‐Omri, nako konke ukwenza kwendlu ka‐Ahabi; ewe, niyahamba emaqingeni abo: ukuze ndikwenze into yokutelwa nqa, nabemi baso into yokwenzelwa amakwelo; ngako oko niya kutwala ugxekwa lwabantu bam." 
Micah7:1 Au mna! ngokuba ndinjengokuya kubutiwe iziqa̔mo zehlobo, njengokuya kubikiciwe ekuvunweni kwazo idreyive: akuko isipa sokutyiwa; umpefumlo wam uyakanuka amakiwane avutwa kuqala." 
Micah7:2 Onobubele ububile elizweni; onobunene pakati kwabantu akako; bonke bayalalela igazi; bayazingelana ngotambo. 
Micah7:3 Izandla zabo zikolisile ukwenza inkohlakalo; inkosi iyacela, nomgwebi uyacel ela umvuzo; nomntu omkulu yena uyateta inkanuko yompefumlo wake; bayayipata indawo ngobugwenxa." 
Micah7:4 Odlula ngokulunga pakati kwabo unjengameva; odlula ngobunene u bukali pezu kwotango lweminga; umhla wabalindi bako, owokwohlwaywa kwako, uyeza; kwobako kaloku ukuxakeka kwabo." 
Micah7:5 Ningakolwa kumlingane; ningatembeli kwisihlobo: kulowo ulalayo esifubeni sako gcina ingcango zomlomo wako. 
Micah7:6 Ngokuba unyana ecekisa uyise: intombi iyasukela unina; umolokazana uyasukela unondoda; intshaba zomntu zingabantu beyake indlu. 
Micah7:7 Mna kodwa ndiya kukangela kuyehova; ndiya kumlinda utixo wosindiswa lwam; woti utixo wam andive. 
Micah7:8 Ungandivuyeli, lutshaba lwam! nakuba ndiwile, ndobuya ndipakame; nakuba ndihlala ebumnyameni, uyehova ulukanyiso kum." 
Micah7:9 Ukuṙala kukayehova ndiya kukunyamezela, ngokuba ndonile ngakuye; ade apikise upikiso lwam, alungise ityala lam: wondipumisela ekukanyeni; ndiya kubona ubulungisa bake." 
Micah7:10 Utshabakazi lwam nalo luya kubona, lize idano lilugubungele; olwati kum: Upina uyehova, utixo wako? amehlo am olukangela; kaloku lwoba yinto yokunyatelwa njengenkunkuma yezitarate." 
Micah7:11 Umhla kuya kwakiwa indonga zako, kwa umhla lowo kwopumela kude umteto." 
Micah7:12 Kwa umhla lowo baya kuza kuwe bevela e‐Asiriya kude kube se Jipete, nakuyo i‐Jipete kude kube semlanjeni, nakulwandle kude kube lulwandle, nakwintaba kude kube yintaba." 
Micah7:13 Kodwa ilizwe loba yingci̔takalo ngenxa yabemi balo, ngenxa yesixakato sezenzo zabo." 
Micah7:14 Yalusa abantu bako ngentonga, umhlambi welifa lako, abahlala bodwa ehlatini, pakati kwe‐Karamele; mabadlele e‐Bashane nase‐Gileyadi, njengasemihleni yakudala." 
Micah7:15 Njengasemihleni yokupuma kwako e‐Jipete, ndiya kubabonisa imimangaliso." 
Micah7:16 Abaheyideni baya kubona, badanele onke amandla abo; isandla bosibeka pezu kwomlomo; indlebe zabo zoba butulu." 
Micah7:17 Baya kukota utuli njengenyoka; njengezinambuzane zomhlaba baya kungcangcazela bepuma ezinqatyeni zabo; bobeka ngokunkwantya kuyehova, utixo wetu, bakwoyike wena." 
Micah7:18 Ngubanina ongutixo njengawe, oxolela inkohlakalo, odlula ekwoneni kwesisalela selifa lake? akabambi ingqumbo yake kude kube ngunapakade, ngokuba etanda ububele yena." 
Micah7:19 Wobuya abe nenceba kuti; uya kuzeyisa inkohlakalo zetu; ewe, zonke izono zabo woziposela ezinzulwini zolwandle wena." 
Micah7:20 Uya kunika inyaniso ebixelwa ku‐Yakobi, n obubele obebuxelwa ku‐Abrahame, obufungeleyo kobawo betu kwa kuselokwemihla yakudala." 
Nahum1:1 UMGWEBO ngayo i‐Nineve. Incwadi yesibonakalo sika‐Nahume um‐Elekoshe. 
Nahum1:2 Uyehova u ngutixo onekwele, opindezelayo: uyehova ungumpindezeli, ungonomsindo: uyehova ungumpindezeli kubo abayimpi kuye; uyabambela intshaba zake ingqumbo." 
Nahum1:3 Uyehova uqumba kade, kodwa umkulu ngamandla, akakuka agwebele abanetyala: uyehova indlela yake isesaqwitini naseluqwiteleni, namafu alutuli lwenyawo zake." 
Nahum1:4 Uyakalimela ulwandle, uyalwomisa, uyatshisa yonke imilambo: i‐Bashane iyabuna, ne‐Karamele; siyabuna nesihlumo se‐Lebanone." 
Nahum1:5 Intaba ziyangcangcazela pambi kwake, nenduli ziyanyibilika; umhlaba uyazipakamisa ebusweni bake, nelizwe, nabo bonke abemiyo kulo." 
Nahum1:6 Ngubanina ongemayo pambi kwobuṙala bake? ngubanina nongahlalayo ebushushwini bengqumbo yake? umsindo wake uyatululwa njengomlilo, namawa ayawiswa pantsi nguye." 
Nahum1:7 Uyehova ulungile, uyinqaba emhleni wobunzima; uyabazi abo batembela kuye." 
Nahum1:8 Kodwa ngomsinga okukulayo uya kukwenza ukugqitywa kwendawo yayo, nentshaba zake ubumnyama boziputuma." 
Nahum1:9 Niyaqinga nto nina ngakuye uyehova? uya kukwenza ukugqitywa yena: ubunzima abuyi kuvuka kabini. 
Nahum1:10 Nakuba bepingelelene njengemitolo, benxilile nokunxila ngeveyine yabo, baya kudliwa njengendiza ezigqibele ukwoma." 
Nahum1:11 Wapuma kwa kuwe, umqingi wobubi ngakuye uyehova, umcebisi ongendawo." 
Nahum1:12 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Nakuba bonwabileyo, bebaninzi kangaka, baya kusikwa benjalo noko, waeya kudlula: nangona ndikubandezeleyo, andisayi kubuya ndikubandezele." 
Nahum1:13 Ngokuba kaloku ndiya kuyapula iyokwe yake kuwe, ndiziqaule izinxibo zako." 
Nahum1:14 Kodwa uyehova uyalele ngawe, ukuti: Akuyi kubuya kuhlwayelwe abegama lako; ndiya kunqamla endlwini yotixo bako umfanekiso oqingqiweyo nalowo utyityishiweyo; ndiya kulenza incw̔aba lako, ngokuba udelekile." 
Nahum1:15 NANZIYA ezintabeni inyawo zalowo ushumayelayo indaba ezilungileyo, ovakalisayo uxolo! yenza imitendeleko yako, Juda! feza izibambiso zako, ngokuba ongendawo engasayi kubuya acande kuwe; unqanyulwe kanye." 
Nahum2:1 Umci̔ti unyukele pambi kwako: gcina inqaba, linda indlela, qinisa izinqe, yomeleza amandla kakulu." 
Nahum2:2 Ngokuba uyehova ebubuyisile ubungcwalisa buka‐Yakobi, njengabo ubungcwalisa buka‐Sirayeli; ngokuba abavutululi bebavutulule, namasebe abo bewonakalisile." 
Nahum2:3 Ikaka lamagoṙa ake lenziwe bomvu, amadoda obuṙoti ambete isibomvumnyama; inqwelo zinentsimbi ezibengezelayo, ngomhla wokulungisa kwake; iyavivinywa nemibilati." 
Nahum2:4 Inqwelo ziti dlongodlongo ezitarateni, ziyasukasuka ezindaweni ezibanzi; ukubonakala kwazo zinjengezibane, ziyabaleka njengemibane." 
Nahum2:5 Uyakumbula amanene ake; ayaku̔beka ekuhambeni kwawo; ayakauleza ukuya eludongeni lwayo, liti ikuselo lilungiswe." 
Nahum2:6 Amasango emilambo ovulwa, nendlukazi iya kucumbuluka." 
Nahum2:7 Waye u‐Hutsave eya kuhlutywa, uya kunyuswa, nezicakakazi zake zoncwina njengelizwi lamahobe, zibeta pezu kwezifuba zazo." 
Nahum2:8 Nangona i‐Nineve injengecibi lamanzi, kwa kuselokw okuqala kw emihla yayo, baya kwesaba noko. Kutwa: Yimani! yimani! kodwa akuko mntu obeka ngomva." 
Nahum2:9 Pangani isilivere, pangani igolide; akuko ukupela kwokubekelweyo, kwobuninzi bempahla zonke ezinqwenelekileyo." 
Nahum2:10 Uci̔takalo, notshabalalo, nokwenzwa zé! intliziyo iyanyibilika, namadolo ayahexa; kuko intutumbo ezinqeni zonke, nobuso bonke buyazuza ubumnyama." 
Nahum2:11 Ipina indlu yengonyama? lipina nedlelo lengonyama ezintsha? apo yahamba kona ingonyama, n engonyamakazi, n etole lengonyama, kungeko mntu obezoyikisa." 
Nahum2:12 Ingonyama yaqwengela amatole ayo okwaneleyo, yaṙwishela ingonyamakazi zayo; yazalisa iminxuma yayo ngokuqwengiweyo, nendlu zayo ngokubanjiweyo." 
Nahum2:13 Bona ke, ndingakuwe, utsho uyehova wemikosi; ndandiya kutshisa inqwelo zayo zide zibe ngumsi; nengonyama ezintsha zako isiṙele siya kuzidla: ndandiya kunqamla into yokuqwenga yako emhlabeni: nelizwi lezigidimi zako alisayi kuviwa kanjako." 
Nahum3:1 MAKUBE nzima kuso isixeko segazi! sizele sipela bubuxoki n okupanga; akumki okuqwengiweyo. 
Nahum3:2 Isitonga sezwiniya, nentlokoma yokugunguza kwevili, amahashe edloba, nenqwelo zisiti qaka;" 
Nahum3:3 ukujiwula kwabakweli bamahashe, nokudangazela kweziṙele, nokubengezela kwentshuntshe; ubuninzi bababuleweyo, nemikumdelikane yezidumbu; imizimba efileyo ayinakupela; bayaku̔beka pezu kwemizimba efileyo yabo:" 
Nahum3:4 ngenxa yobuninzi bemibulo yompinyiswa, umnikazi wobugqi onesoya kakulu; owatengisa intlanga ngemibulo yake, nezizwe ngobugqi bake." 
Nahum3:5 Bona ke, ndingakuwe, utsho uyehova wemikosi; ndiya kutyila amasondo engubo yako pezu kwobuso bako, ndibonise intlanga ubuzé bako, nezikumkani ubuhloni bako." 
Nahum3:6 Ndiya kuposa izinto ezibuntshontsho pezu kwako, ndikuhlazise; ndandiya kukwenza into yokubonelwa." 
Nahum3:7 Kwakuya kuti, bonke abakubonayo bobaleka kuwe, bati: i‐Nineve ici̔takalisiwe! ngubanina oya kuyiku̔za? ndiya kukufunela pina abatutuzeli?" 
Nahum3:8 Ulungile na ngapezu kwe‐No‐amoni, ebihleli pakati kwemijelo, ebinamanzi eyingqonga; endawo enqatyisiweyo ibilulwandle, udonga lwayo luvela elwandle?" 
Nahum3:9 I‐Tiyopiya ibingamandla ayo, ne‐Jipete, kungeko ukupela kwawo; ama‐Pute nama‐Libiya ebengabancedi bako." 
Nahum3:10 Yabifuduswa noko, yaya ekutinjweni; kanjalo intsatshana zayo zibe zityunyuzwa entlokweni yazo zonke izitarate; amanene ayo enzelwa amaqashiso, nabo bonke abakulu bayo bebenxityiwe ngemixokolelwane." 
Nahum3:11 Nawe uya kunxila, uya kuzimela; nawe uya kufuna indawo enqabileyo ngenxa yotshaba." 
Nahum3:12 Zonke inqaba zako zinjengemikiwane inamakiwane avutwa kuqala; ati akuvutululelwa, awe emlonyeni wotyayo." 
Nahum3:13 Bona ke, abantu bako bangabafazi pakati kwako; amasango elizwe lako ovulelwa intshaba zako kakulu; umlilo wotshisa imivalo yako." 
Nahum3:14 Zikelele amanzi ngenxa yokuvingcelwa; yomeleza inqaba zako; ngena eludakeni, uxovule udongwe, nqabisa indawo yokugqwagqwa izitene." 
Nahum3:15 Kwa lapo umlilo wokudla; isiṙele sokunqumla, siya kukudla njengesiboto: zenze baninzi njengeziboto, zenze baninzi njengenkumbi." 
Nahum3:16 Ubandisile abatengi bako ngapezu kwenkwenkwezi zezulu; iziboto zitwabululekile, zabaleka ke." 
Nahum3:17 Inkosi zako zinjengenkumbi, nenjengele zako njengebubu lenkumbi, eziti waca ezintangweni ngomhla obandayo: nxa lipuma ilanga, zandul’ ukubaleka, nendawo yazo akwaziwa apo zikona." 
Nahum3:18 Abalusi bako bayozela, kumkani we‐Asiriya! imiduna yako ilele pantsi; abantu bako bapangalele ezintabeni, akuko mntu obabutayo." 
Nahum3:19 Akuko mciza kwisapuko sako; inxeba lako alipoliseki; bonke abevayo indaba zako baya kwombela ngezandla pezu kwako; ngokuba engubanina lowo inkohlakalo yako ingadlulanga pezu kwake futi? 
Habakkuk1:1 UMGWEBO owawubonayo u‐Habakuke umprofite. 
Habakkuk1:2 Kwoba kade kangakananina ndidanduluka, Yehova! ungeva wena; ndikala kuwe ngenxa yobudlwengu, ungasindisi wena?" 
Habakkuk1:3 Kunganina ukuba undibonise inkohlakalo, uti wena ukangele ububi? ngokuba ukubada nobudlwengu bupambi kwam; kuko ipike kanjalo, nempikiswano iyazipakamisa." 
Habakkuk1:4 Ngako oko umteto uyapola, nobugwebo abupumi ngenyaniso: ngokuba abakohlakeleyo beṙaula abalungileyo; kukona kupuma ubugwebo obutyekisiweyo." 
Habakkuk1:5 Bonani pakati kwabaheyideni, nikangele, niti nqa kakulu; ngokuba ndiya kuwenza umsebenzi emihleni yenu, e ningayi kukolwa nguwo, noko ushunyayelwayo." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kuvusa ama‐Kaledine, esosizwe siṙaṙa esinxamileyo; esihambayo ezindaweni ezibanzi zomhlaba, ukuba sifuye indawo zokublala ezingezezaso." 
Habakkuk1:7 Sinokunkwantyisa, sesoyikekileyo; ukugweba kwaso nobukulu baso buyapuma kwa kuso." 
Habakkuk1:8 Amahashe aso anamendu ngapezu kwezingwe, siyagqitisa ngobukali incu̔ka zokuhlwa; abakweli baso bayazitwabulula; ewe, abakweli baso bavela kude; bayabaleka njengokozi lunxamela ukudla." 
Habakkuk1:9 Siyeza sonke ngenxa yobudlwengu; ukubeka kwobuso babo kungapambili; siyabuta amatinjwa njengentlabati. 
Habakkuk1:10 Okumkani siyabagxeka, nenkosi zisisihlekwa kuso; siyahleka inqaba zonke; siyafumbelela ihlabati, sizibambe ke." 
Habakkuk1:11 Wandule umoya waso ubuye; siyagqita ke, siyazeka ityala, ngokubal ela utixo waso la amandla aso." 
Habakkuk1:12 Asi nguwe na ongunapakade, Yehova, Tixo wam, Ngcwele yam? asiyi kufa tina. Yehova! usimisele ukugweba; Liwa! usidalele ukwohlwaya." 
Habakkuk1:13 Ungomehlo angcwele kokokuba ubone inkohlakalo; akungekangele ububi; kunganina ukuba ubakangele abatimbi, nokuba uti cwaka nxa okohlakeleyo adla lowo olungileyo kuye?" 
Habakkuk1:14 nokuba ubenze abantu babe njengentlanzi zolwandle, njengezinambuzane ezingenankosi pezu kwazo?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Siyabanyusa bonke ngeqeṙu laso, siyabar̔olela emnateni waso, siyababutela elutanjeni lwaso; siyavuya ngoko, siyagcoba nokugcoba." 
Habakkuk1:16 Ngako oko siyabingela umnata waso, siqu̔misele notambo lwaso; ngokuba ngazo isabelwa saso sityebile, nokutya kwaso kokutyetyisiweyo." 
Habakkuk1:17 Sesiya kuwenza zé ngoko ke na umnata waso, singayeki ukubulala izizwe futi nje?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Ndiya kuma pezu kwendawo yam yokulinda, ndizimise pezu kwenqaba, ndandiya kuqolosela ndize ndibone ukuba uya kuteta nto nina kum, nento endiya kupendula yona ngokupikisa kwam." 
Habakkuk2:2 Waza uyehova wandipendula, wati: Ba̔la umboniso, uwuqingqe pezu kwamacwecwe, ukuze abaleke lowo uwuleseshayo." 
Habakkuk2:3 Ngokuba umboniso ungowexesha elimiselweyo; kodwa uya kuteta ekupeleni, awuyi kuxoka: nakuba uzilazilayo, wulinde; ngokuba uya kuza ngenyaniso, awuyi kulibala." 
Habakkuk2:4 Bona ke, ukukumele, awulungelelene umpefumlo wake pakati kwake; kodwa olungileyo uya kupila ngokolo." 
Habakkuk2:5 Nakanjako, uyakohlisa ngeveyine; uyindoda ezidlayo, akahlali ekaya; owandisa inkanuko yake njengayo ihadesi; ewe, unjengokufa, akangekoliswe; uyazihlanganisela izizwe zonke, uyazibutela abantu bonke." 
Habakkuk2:6 Aba bonke abayi kuteta ingoma na ngakuye, nesintsonkotelo sokuhlekisa ngaye, besiti: Makube nzima kulowo okwandisayo okungekokwake! kwoba kade kangakananina? nakulowo ozitwesayo ngezibambiselo ezininzi!" 
Habakkuk2:7 Abayi kusuka ngesiqupe na abo abaya kukuluma, bavuke abo abaya kukuzamazamisa? wauya kuba ngamaxoba abo." 
Habakkuk2:8 Ngokuba upangile izizwe ezininzi, sonke isisalela sabantu siya kupanga wena; ngenxa yegazi labantu, nobudlwengu obenziwe elizweni, esixekweni, nakubo bonke abemiyo kuso." 
Habakkuk2:9 Kwoba nzima kulowo oqwebela indlu yake inzuzo ekohlakeleyo, ukuba ayibeke pezulu indawo yake yokuhlala, aze akululeke emandleni elishwa!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Ucebile okulihlazo kwindlu yako, ngokunqamla abantu abaninzi, usona owako umpefumlo nje." 
Habakkuk2:11 Ngokuba ilitye laseludongeni libiza, nembopelelo yasemitini isabela kulo." 
Habakkuk2:12 Kwoba nzima kulowo owakayo isixeko ngegazi, omisayo inqili ngobumenemene!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Bona ke, akuveli na kuyehova wemikosi, ukuba izizwe ziya kuzamela umlilo, nokuba intlanga zozidinisela okungento?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Ngokuba umhlaba uya kuzaliswa kukwaziwa kwobungcwalisa bukayehova, njengokuba amanzi egubungela ulwandle." 
Habakkuk2:15 Kwoba nzima kulowo omsezayo ummelwane wake, utulula ubushushu bako, umnxilisa nje kanjako, ukuze ukangele ubuzé babo!" 
Habakkuk2:16 Ukolisile ukuba nehlazo esikundleni sobungcwalisa; sela nawe, uzibonakalise ungalukanga; indebe yesokunene isandla sikayehova yojikela kuwe, kwakuya kubako ihlazo elikulu pezu kwobungcwalisa bako." 
Habakkuk2:17 Ngokuba ubudlwengu obenzelwe i‐Lebanone buya kugubungela wena, njengokuba imbujiswa yezilo itusa zona; ngenxa yegazi labantu, nobudlwengu obenziwe elizweni, esixekweni, nakubo bonke abemiyo kuso." 
Habakkuk2:18 Kunceda nto nina umfanekiso oqingqiweyo, ukuba umdali wawo uwuqingqile? kunceda nto nina umfanekiso otyityishiweyo, ofundisayo ubuxoki, ukuba umdali wesidalo sake atembele kuso, esenza izitixo ezingenakuteta?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Kwoba nzima kulowo oti emtini: Vuka! nasetyeni elingenakuteta: Zivuse! Wofundisa wona nje! Nanguya walekiwe ngegolide nangesilivere, kanti akuko namnye umoya pakati kwawo." 
Habakkuk2:20 Kodwa uyehova usetempileni yake engcwele: yiti tu ebusweni bake, mhlaba wonke!" 
Habakkuk3:1 UMTANDAZO ka‐Habakuke umprofite: ngeshigayone. 
Habakkuk3:2 Yehova! ndivile intshumayelo yako, ndoyika ke: Yehova! umsebenzi wako wupilise pakati kweminyaka: pakati kweminyaka wazise; emsindweni kumbula itaṙu." 
Habakkuk3:3 Wavela utixo e‐Temani, noyingewele entabeni ye‐Parane. Sela. Ubungcwalisa bake bagubungela amazulu, wati umhlaba wazala ludumo lwake." 
Habakkuk3:4 Inkazimlo yake ibinjengokukanya; ebenemita ipuma esandleni sake: kodwa bekuko apo ukufihlwa kwamandla ake. 
Habakkuk3:5 Pambi kwake kwahamba isifo esibubisayo; saye sipuma isikuhlane esitshayo ezinyaweni zake. 
Habakkuk3:6 Wema ke, wazamazamisa umhlaba; wakangela, wangcangcazelisa izizwe; intaba ezisisimakade zaci̔twaci̔twa, nenduli ezingunapakade zatshona: izihambo ezingunapakade zezake." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ndabona intente zase‐Kushane pantsi kwobubi; amalengalenga elizwe le‐Midiyane angcangcazela. 
Habakkuk3:8 Uyehova ebequmbile ngasemilanjeni na? ingqumbo yako ibingasemilanjeni na? umsindo wako ubungaselwandle na, ukuba wakwela emahasheni ako, ezinqwelweni zako zosindiso?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Isipeta sako besihlubulukile, senzwa zé: izifungo zezizwe! latsho ilizwi. Sela. Wacandekisa umhlaba ube yimilambo." 
Habakkuk3:10 Intaba zakubona, zatutumela; umsinga wamanzi wagqita; inzulu yaku̔pa ilizwi layo, yapakamisela pezulu izandla zayo." 
Habakkuk3:11 Ilanga n enyanga zema entlalweni yazo, ngokukanya kwentolo zako e zabalekayo, ngokukazimla kwokubengezela kwomkonto wako." 
Habakkuk3:12 Wahamba pakati kwomhlaba ngokuṙala, wazibula izizwe ngengqumbo." 
Habakkuk3:13 Wapuma ngenxa yokusindiswa kwabantu bako, ngenxa yokusindiswa kwabatanjisiweyo bako: walimaza intloko kwindlu yokohlakeleyo, uhluba umsekelo kude kube sentanyeni. Sela." 
Habakkuk3:14 Wayihlaba ngezayo izikali intloko yabemizi yake, a benzayo isantya njengesaqwiti ukundici̔ta; ukugcoba kwabo bekukokwokudla amahlwempu ngasese." 
Habakkuk3:15 Wahamba pakati kwolwandle ng amahashe ako, pakati kwokukepuza kwamanzi amaninzi." 
Habakkuk3:16 Ekuveni kwam wangcangcazela umbilini wam, umlomo wam waqaqazela ngenxa yelizwi; ukubola kwangena ematanjeni am, ndangcangcazela endaweni yam; ukuba ndipumle emhleni yobunzima, akunyuka ngakubo abantu aya kubawela." 
Habakkuk3:17 Nakuba umkiwane ungatyatyambi, kungeko ukuxakata emitini yeveyine; nakuba ukuhlanza kweminquma kutshitsha, engavelisi ukutya amasimi; nakuba umhlambi unqanyulwa esibayeni, zingeko inkomo ezitaleni:" 
Habakkuk3:18 ndiya kuvuyelela noko kuyehova, ndiya kugcoba kutixo wosindiswa lwam." 
Habakkuk3:19 Uyehova oyinkosi ungamandla am; waeya kuzenza inyawo zam zibe njengezamaxamakazi, andihambise ezinyangweni zam. Kumhlabeli omkulu owenza ngeneginote zam." 
Zephaniah1:1 ILIZWI likayehova elezayo ku‐Tsefaniya, unyana ka‐Kushi, unyana ka‐Gedaliya, unyana ka‐Amariya, unyana ka‐Hezekiya, emihleni ka‐Josiya, unyana ka‐Amoni, ukumkani wo‐Juda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Ndiya kugqibela ukususa konke ebusweni belizwe, utsho uyehova." 
Zephaniah1:3 Ndiya kususa abantu nenkomo; ndiya kususa intaka zezulu, nentlanzi zolwandle; neziku̔bekiso kunye nabakohlakeleyo; ndandiya kunqamla abantu ebusweni belizwe, utsho uyehova." 
Zephaniah1:4 Kanjalo ndiya kusolula isandla sam pezu kwo‐Juda, napezu kwabo bonke abemi base‐Yerusaleme; ndandiya kunqamla kulendawo isisalela sika‐Bali, n egama lababingeli kunye nelabaperisite;" 
Zephaniah1:5 nabo babedeshayo umkosi wezulu pezu kwezindlu; nabo babedeshayo befunga uyehova, befunga u‐Moleke wabo naye;" 
Zephaniah1:6 nabo bahlehlileyo kuyehova, abangamfunanga uyehova, abangambuzanga kanjako." 
Zephaniah1:7 Yiti tu ebusweni benkosi e nguyehova, ngokuba umhla kayehova ukufupi; ngokuba uyehova elungisile umbingo, ubahlule abamenyiweyo bake." 
Zephaniah1:8 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla wombingo kayehova, ukuba ndiya kwohlwaya inkosana, nonyana bokumkani, nabo bonke abavete izivato zasemzini." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ndandiya kubohlwaya bonke abagqita emnyango, ngomhla lowo, abazalisa izindlu zenkosi zabo ngobudlwengu nenkohliso." 
Zephaniah1:10 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova, intlokoma yokukala yovela esangweni lentlanzi, neyokulila kwesesibini isahlulo sesixeko, neyembujiswa enkulu ezindulini." 
Zephaniah1:11 Lilani, nina bemi basemhlanjeni! ngokuba bonke abangabatengi betshatyalalisiwe; bonke abatweswa yimali banqanyulwe." 
Zephaniah1:12 Kwakuya kuti ngexesha elo, ndiya kupanda i‐Yerusaleme ngezibane, ndiwohlwaye amadoda afinyeleyo pezu kwentlenga zawo, ati ezintliziyweni zawo: Uyehova akayi kwenza okulungileyo, akayi kwenza okubi kanjalo." 
Zephaniah1:13 Ngako oko ubutyebi bawo boba ngamaxoba, nezindlu zawo zoba yingci̔takalo; angaka izindlu, kodwa akayi kuhlala kuzo; angatyala imiyezo, kodwa akayi kusela iveyine yayo." 
Zephaniah1:14 Umhla omkulu kayehova ukufupi; ukufupi, uyakauleza kakulu; intlokoma yomhla kayehova: iṙoti lokala apo ngento ebuṙaṙa." 
Zephaniah1:15 Umhla lowo ngumhla womsindo, ngumhla wobunzima noxinezeko, ngumhla wokuci̔takala nokutshabalala, ngumhla wobumnyama nesitokotoko, ngumhla wamafu nokusibekela kakulu," 
Zephaniah1:16 ngumhla wexilongo nokuhlaba umkosi, ngakuzo izixeko ezinqatyisiweyo, nangakuwo amagumbi odonga amade." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ndandiya kuzisa ubunzima pezu kwabantu, bade bahambe njengemfama; ngokokuba bonile ngakuye uyehova: laye igazi labo liya kutululwa njengotuli, nenyama yabo njengomgquba." 
Zephaniah1:18 Kanjako isilivere yabo, negolide yabo, iya kukohlwa ukubahlangula ngomhla womsindo kayehova; kodwa ilizwe lonke liya kudliwa ngumlilo wekwele lake; ngokuba ukugqitywa okwalamileyo kanye eya kukwenzela bonke abemi belizwe." 
Zephaniah2:1 Zibuteni, ewe butani, wena sizwe esingenakulangazelela!" 
Zephaniah2:2 ungekazali umteto; (njengomququ umhla uyadlula); bungekezi pezu kwenu ubushushu bengqumbo kayehova; ungekezi pezu kwenu umhla wengqumbo kayehova. 
Zephaniah2:3 Mfuneni uyehova, nonke nina balulamileyo belizwe, abasenzileyo isigwebo sake; funani ubulungisa, funani ululamo, kungati niya kufihlelwa emhleni wengqumbo kayehova." 
Zephaniah2:4 NGOKUBA i‐Gaza iya kushiywa, ne‐Ashekelone yoba yingci̔takalo; i‐Ashedode baya kuyigxota emini enkulu, ne‐Hekrone iya kudonyulwa." 
Zephaniah2:5 Kwoba nzima kubo abemi basecaleni lolwandle, kwisizwe sama‐Keriti! ilizwi likayehova lingakuni, Kanane, lizwe lama‐Filistiya! ndandiya kukutshabalalisa, kuze kungabiko omiyo kuwe." 
Zephaniah2:6 Kanjako icala lolwandle loba ngamadlelo, enamacibi abalusi, nezibaya zegusha." 
Zephaniah2:7 Ewe, icala lalo loba lelesisalela sendlu ka‐Juda; baya kudla pezu kwalo: ezindlwini zase‐Ashekelone baya kulala pantsi ngokuhlwa; ngokuba uyehova, utixo wabo, eya kubakangela, abuyise ukutinjwa kwabo." 
Zephaniah2:8 Ndivile isituko so‐Mowabi, nezigxeko zosapo luka‐Hamoni; abatukileyo abantu bam, bazenza bakulu ngakuwo umda wabo." 
Zephaniah2:9 Ngako oko, ndihleli nje, utsho uyehova wemikosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuti: Ngenyaniso i‐Mowabi yoba njenge‐Sodome, nosapo luka‐Hamoni njenge Gomora; indawo eyenileyo ngamaṙau, neyezihogo zetyuwa, nengci̔takalo engunapakade; isisalela sabantu bam sobapanga, neliva lesizwe sam lobafuya." 
Zephaniah2:10 Oku boba nako ngenxa yer̔atshi labo, ngokuba betukile bazenza bakulu ngakubo abantu bake uyehova wemikosi." 
Zephaniah2:11 Uyehova uya kwoyikeka kubo, ngokuba eya kubityisa bonke otixo bomhlaba: babeya kumbedesha, abanye ngabanye ezindaweni zabo, bonke abemi beziqiti zabaheyideni." 
Zephaniah2:12 Nani, ma‐Tiyopiya! niyakuhlatywa ngesiṙele sam." 
Zephaniah2:13 Kanjalo uya kwolula isandla sake pezu kwenode, atshabalalise i‐Asiriya; waeya kuyenza i‐Nineve ibe yingci̔takalo, indawo eyomileyo njengentlango." 
Zephaniah2:14 Imihlambi yobutuma pakati kwayo, onke amaṙamncwa ezizwe; ewe, incwangube nencanda ziya kulalisa pezu kwemiqolo yayo; ilizwi liya kucula ezifenstileni, ingci̔takalo yoba seminyangweni, ngokuba isetyenzwa lesedare lenzwe zé." 
Zephaniah2:15 Esi sisixeko esivuyelelayo esibe sihlala ngokunqaba, esibe sisiti entliziyweni yaso: Ndim, akuko ongapandle kwam. Sinjanina ukuba yingci̔takalo, indawo yokubutuma kwamaṙamncwa! bonke abadlulayo ngakuso baya kwenza amakwelo, bashukumise izandla zabo." 
Zephaniah3:1 MAKUBE nzima kwesigwenxa, kwesidyojiweyo, kwesibandezelayo isixeko!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Aseva ilizwi, asamkela ululeko; asatembela kuyehova, asasondela kutixo waso." 
Zephaniah3:3 Inkosana zaso pakati kwaso zizingonyama ezikonyayo; abagwebi baso bazincu̔ka zokuhlwa; abaṙwenyi amatambo kwakusa. 
Zephaniah3:4 Abaprofite baso bangabazidlayo, bangamadoda ahanahanisayo; abaperisite baso banco̔lisile okuyingcwele; bapete umteto ngobudlwengu." 
Zephaniah3:5 Uyehova, olungileyo, upakati kwaso; akenzi ubumenemene: ngemiso ngemiso uyabeka ubugwebo bake ekukanyeni, abusweleki; kodwa olimenemene akakwazi ukudana." 
Zephaniah3:6 Izizwe ndizinqamlile; amagumbi odonga azo aci̔takele; izitarate zazo ndizenzile bunxuwa, kungeko odlulayo: izixeko zazo zici̔tiwe, zingenamntu; akuko ohlala kuzo." 
Zephaniah3:7 Ndati: Okunene uya kwoyika mna, uya kwamkela ululeko; ukuze intlalo yaso inganqanyulwa, njengako konke endibe ndikumisele sona; kodwa bavuka kusasa, bazonakalisa zonke izenzo zabo." 
Zephaniah3:8 Ngako oko, ndilindeni, utsho uyehova, emhleni ndivukelayo amaxoba; ngokuba ngumgwebo wam ukubuta izizwe, ukuhlanganisa izikumkani, ukutulula pezu kwazo ukuṙala kwam, kwa bonke ubushushu bengqumbo yam; ngokuba umhlaba wonke uya kudliwa ngumlilo wekwele lam." 
Zephaniah3:9 Ngokuba oko ndiya kuguqulela ebantwini inteto engcwele, ukuba bonke babize egameni likayehova, bamkonze ngokuvumelana." 
Zephaniah3:10 Bevela pesheya kwemilambo yase‐Tiyopiya, abakungi bam, intombi yabapangaleleyo bam, baya kuzisa umnikelo wam." 
Zephaniah3:11 Ngomhla lowo akuyi kudana ngenxa yazo zonke izenzo zako, ogqitileyo ngazo ngakum; ngokuba oko ndiya kususa pakati kwako abavuyeleli bako abaner̔atshi; waungasayi kupinda ube nokuqanqalaza entabeni yam engcwele." 
Zephaniah3:12 Ndandiya kushiya pakati kwako abantu abalulamileyo ababuhlwempu, abaya kutemba egameni likayehova." 
Zephaniah3:13 Boti o‐Sirayeli abaseleyo abayi kubenza ubumenemene; abayi kuteta ubuxoki; kanjako ulwimi olukohlisayo aluyi kufunyanwa emlonyeni wabo; koko baya kudla balale pantsi, kungeko oya kuboyikisa." 
Zephaniah3:14 Cula, ntombi yase‐Ziyone! danduluka, Sirayeli! vuya ugcobe ngentliziyo yonke, ntombi yase‐Yerusaleme!" 
Zephaniah3:15 Uyehova ususile imigwebo yako; udedisile utshaba lwako: ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, uyehova, upakati kwako; akusayi kuba sabona ilishwa." 
Zephaniah3:16 Ngomhla lowo kwotiwa kwi‐Yerusaleme: Ungoyiki; nakwi‐ Ziyone: Mazingapolelwa izandla zako. 
Zephaniah3:17 Uyehova, utixo wako, upakati kwako, onamandla, osindisayo; uya kugcoba pezu kwako ngovuyo, woti cwaka elutandweni lwake; uya kuvuyelela pezu kwako ngokucula." 
Zephaniah3:18 Ndiya kubuta abalusizi ngawo umtendeleko, abavela kuwe; betweswe lugxekwa ngenxa yawo." 
Zephaniah3:19 Bona ke, ngexesha elo ndiya kugqibela bonke ababandezeli bako; kanti abaqwalelayo ndobasindisa, nabagxotiweyo ndobahlanganisa; ndandiya kubenzela udumo negama, kuwo onke amazwe badanisiwe kuwo." 
Zephaniah3:20 Ngeloxesha ndiya kuningenisa, kwa ngexesha lokunihlanganisa kwam; ewe, ndiya kunenzela igama nodumo pakati kwabo bonke abantu bomhlaba, xeshekweni ndibuyisayo ukutinjwa kwenu pambi kwamehlo enu, utsho uyehova." 
Haggai1:1 NGOWESIBINI umnyaka ka‐Dariyusi ukumkani, ngenyanga yesitandatu, ngowokuqala umhla wenyanga, leza ilizwi likayehova ngo‐Hagai umprofite ku‐Zerubabeli unyana ka‐Shalatiyeli, inkosi ye‐Juda, naku‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, umperisite omkulu, lisiti:" 
Haggai1:2 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Ababantu bati: Ixesha alikafiki, ixesha lokwakiwa kwendlu kayehova." 
Haggai1:3 Landula ilizwi likayehova leza ngo‐Hagai umprofite, lisiti:" 
Haggai1:4 Lixesha na kuni, ninandini! lokuba nihlale ezindlwini zenu ezifulelweyo, ize indlu le ibe ici̔takele?" 
Haggai1:5 Ngako kaloku, utsho uyehova wemikosi, bekelani imikwa yenu intliziyo." 
Haggai1:6 Nihlwayele okuninzi, kanti ningenisile okuncinane; nidlile, kanti anihlutanga; nisele, kanti anikolisile ukusela; nambete, kanti akuko ofudumeleyo; kanjalo ozuzayo umvuzo, uyawuzuzela inxowa esisibadlu." 
Haggai1:7 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bekelani imikwa yenu intliziyo. 
Haggai1:8 Nyukani intaba, nizise imiti, niyake indlu, ndandiya kuyikolela, ndenzelwe ubungcwalisa, utsho uyehova." 
Haggai1:9 Benikangela okuninzi, kodwa bona ke, bekukuncinane; kanjako nakukugodusa, ndapepeta pezu kwako. Nganina? utsho uyehova wemikosi: ngenxa yendlu yam eci̔takeleyo, nokuba nibaleka abanye ngabanye ukuya kwezabo izindlu." 
Haggai1:10 Ngako oko kungenxa yenu ukuba izulu libamba umbete, nokuba umhlaba ubamba ukuxakata kwawo." 
Haggai1:11 Ndandibizile ukwoma pezu kwelizwe, napezu kwentaba, napezu kwenqolowa, napezu kweveyine entsha, napezu kweoli, napezu kwoko umhlaba ukuvelisayo, napezu kwabantu, napezu kwenkomo, napezu kwomsebenzi wonke wezandla." 
Haggai1:12 Wandula u‐Zerubabeli unyana ka‐Shalatiyeli, no‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, umperisite omkulu, naso sonke isisalela sabantu, bapulapula ilizwi likayehova, utixo wabo, namazwi ka‐Hagai umprofite, njengokuba uyehova, utixo wabo, emtumile; bati abantu bamoyika uyehova." 
Haggai1:13 Waza wateta u‐Hagai, isitunywa sikayehova, ngomyalezo kayehova, ebantwini, esiti: Ndiko nani, utsho uyehova." 
Haggai1:14 Waye uyehova wawuvusa umoya ka‐Zerubabeli unyana ka‐Shalatiyeli, inkosi ye‐Juda, nomoya ka‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, umperisite omkulu, nomoya waso sonke isisalela sabantu; baye besiza basebenza endlwini kayehova wemikosi, utixo wabo," 
Haggai1:15 ngowamashumi mabini anesine umhla wenyanga yesitandatu, ngowesibini umnyaka ka‐Dariyusi ukumkani." 
Haggai2:1 NGEYESIXE̔NXE inyanga, ngowamashumi mabini anesinye umhla wenyanga, ilizwi likayehova leza ngo‐Hagai umprofite, lisiti:" 
Haggai2:2 Teta ke kuye u‐Zerubabeli unyana ka‐Shalatiyeli, inkosi ye‐Juda, nakuye u‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, umperisite omkulu, nakuso isisalela sabantu, usiti:" 
Haggai2:3 Ngubanina pakati kwenu oseleyo, owabona indlu le ebungcwaliseni bayo bokuqala? kunjanina ke ukuyibona kwenu kaloku nje? nxa ilinganiswa nayo, ayinjengento engeluto na emehlweni enu?" 
Haggai2:4 Noko kaloku yomelela, Zerubabeli! utsho uyehova; yomelela nawe, Yoshuwa, nyana ka‐Yotsadaki, mperisite omkulu! yomelelani nani, nonke nina bantu belizwe! utsho uyehova, nisebenze ke: ngokuba ndiko nani, utsho uyehova wemikosi" 
Haggai2:5 Ucebano endalwenza nani, ekupumeni kwenu e‐Jipete, nisenalo, nomoya wam umi pakati kwenu; zeningoyiki." 
Haggai2:6 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Kusekanye, kwoba ngumzuzwana kodwa, ndandiya kuzamazamisa izulu, nomhlaba, nolwandle, nokwomileyo;" 
Haggai2:7 ewe, ndiya kuzamazamisa izizwe zonke, kwandule kufike okukanukwayo zizizwe zonke; ndandiya kuzalisa indlu le ngobungcwalisa, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Haggai2:8 Yeyam isilivere, yeyam negolide, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Haggai2:9 Ubungcwalisa balendlu yasemva boba bukulu kobeyapambili, utsho uyehova wemikosi: nakulendawo ndiya kunika uxolo, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Haggai2:10 NGOWAMASHUMI mabini anesine umhla weyesitoba inyanga, ngowesibini umnyaka ka‐Dariyusi, leza ilizwi likayehova ngo‐Hagai umprofite, lisiti:" 
Haggai2:11 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Buza abaperisite ngawo umteto, usiti:" 
Haggai2:12 Ukuba umntu uyatwala inyama engcwele esondweni lengubo yake, ati ngesondo lengubo yake acu̔kumise isonka, umhlaumbi ngumhluzi, umhlaumbi yiveyine, umhlaumbi yioli, umhlaumbi yenye into edlekayo, yoba ngcwele na? Baza bapendula abaperisite bati: Hai." 
Haggai2:13 Wandula wati u‐Hagai: Ukuba onco̔lileyo ngenxa yomzimba ofileyo uyacu̔kumisa enye yezi zinto, yoba inco̔lile na? Baza bapendula abaperisite bati: Yoba inco̔lile." 
Haggai2:14 Wandula wapendula u‐Hagai, wati: Banjalo ababantu, sinjalo esisizwe, ebusweni bam, utsho uyehova; injalo yonke imisebenzi yezandla zabo; oko bakunikelayo apo kunco̔lile nako." 
Haggai2:15 Ngako kaloku, gqalani ke, kwa kulomhla napambili, kwa lingekalaliswanga elinye ilitye pezu kwelinye etempileni kayehova." 
Haggai2:16 Kuseloko ibiko imihla leyo, kweza omnye emlwini we zilinganiso zamashumi mabini, kwabako ishumi kwapela; kweza omnye efatyeni ukuka izilinganiso ezingamashumi mahlanu esincinezelweni, kwabako amashumi mabini kwapela." 
Haggai2:17 Ndanibeta ngembabala, nangesihumba, nangesico̔to, kuyo yonke imisebenzi yezandla zenu; beninga buyeli kum noko, utsho uyehova." 
Haggai2:18 Gqalani ke, kwa kulomhla napambili, kowamashumi mabini anesine umhla wenyanga yesitoba, kulowamhla wabekwa umsekelo wayo itempile kayehova, gqalani!" 
Haggai2:19 Imbewu iseko enyango na? kanjako umti weveyine, nomkiwane, negranate, nomnquma, awukahlanzanga: kwa kulomhla ndiya kutamsanqelisa." 
Haggai2:20 Leza ilizwi likayehova ngokwesibini ku‐Hagai ngowamashumi mabini anesine umhla wenyanga, lisiti:" 
Haggai2:21 Teta ku‐Zerubabeli, inkosi ye‐Juda, usiti: Ndiya kuzamazamisa izulu nomhlaba;" 
Haggai2:22 ewe, ndiya kupenula iterone yezikumkani, namandla ezikumkani zabaheyideni ndowatshabalalisa; ndandiya kupenula inqwelo, nabo bakwela kuzo; kwaye kuya kuwa amahashe nabakweli bawo, omnye esiwa ngesiṙele somnye." 
Haggai2:23 Ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova wemikosi, ndiya kutabata wena, Zerubabeli, nyana ka‐Shalatiyeli, sicaka sam! utsho uyehova, ndikwenze njengomsesane sokuncamatisela; ngokuba wena ndikuqashile, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Zechariah1:1 NGEYESIBOZO inyanga, ngomnyaka wesibini ka‐Dariyusi, leza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Zekariya, unyana ka‐Berekiya, unyana ka‐Hido, umprofite, lisiti:" 
Zechariah1:2 Wabequmbile uyehova koyihlo benu kakulu. 
Zechariah1:3 Ngako yiti kubo: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Buyelani kum, utsho uyehova wemikosi, ndandiya kubuyela kuni, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Zechariah1:4 Ningabi njengoyihlo benu, abati abaprofite bapambili badanduluka kubo, besiti: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Guqukani ke kuyo imikwa yenu ekohlakeleyo, na kuzo izenzo zenu ezikohlakeleyo; kanti abevanga, abapulapulanga kum kanjalo, utsho uyehova." 
Zechariah1:5 Oyihlo benu, bapina bona? nabaprofite, bahlala kude kube ngunapakade na?" 
Zechariah1:6 Kodwa amazwi am, nemimiso yam, endayalela izicaka zam abaprofite ngayo, ayafumana oyihlo benu na? baza baguquka, bati: Njengokuba uyehova wemikosi wacinga ukwenza kuti, njengemikwa yetu, nanjengezenzo zetu, wenje njalo kuti." 
Zechariah1:7 NGOWAMASHUMI mabini anesine umhla wenyanga yeshumi elinesinye, eyinyanga yo‐Shebate, ngowesibini umnyaka ka‐Dariyusi, leza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Zekariya, unyana ka‐Berekiya, unyana ka‐Hido, umprofite, lisiti:" 
Zechariah1:8 Ndabona ngobusuku, kekaloku nantsiya indoda ikwele ehasheni elibomvu, eyema pakati kwemiti yemutele etunzini, nasemva kwayo amahashe abomvu, n agwangqa, namhlope." 
Zechariah1:9 Ndaza ndati: Ayinto nina la, nkosi yam? Yayisiti kum ingelosi eyateta nam: Ndokubonisa into ayiyo la." 
Zechariah1:10 Yapendula indoda eyema pakati kwemiti yemutele, yati: La ngabo abatumileyo uyehova ukuhambahamba emhlabeni." 
Zechariah1:11 Bapendula kuyo ingelosi kayehova eyema pakati kwemiti yemutele, bati: Sihambahambile emhlabeni: bona ke, umhlaba wonke uhleli, unokupumla." 
Zechariah1:12 Yandula ingelosi kayehova yapendula yati: Yehova wemikosi! kwoba kade kangakananina ungabi nataṙu pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme, napezu kwezixeko zakwa‐Juda, oziqumbeleyo leminyaka imashumi asixe̔nxe?" 
Zechariah1:13 Waza uyehova wapendula ingelosi eyateta nam ngamazwi amnandi, ngamazwi atutuzelayo." 
Zechariah1:14 Yaza ingelosi eyateta nam yati kum: Danduluka, usiti: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Ndinobukwele pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme, napezu kwe‐Ziyone, ngobukwele obukulu." 
Zechariah1:15 Kanjalo ndiqumbile ngokuqumba okukulu ngakuzo izizwe ezisekwonwabeni: ngokuba bendiqumbile kancinane kodwa, kanti zona zincedele ububi." 
Zechariah1:16 Ngako oko, utsho uyehova ukuti: Ndibuyele e‐Yerusaleme ngezibele: indlu yam iya kwakiwa kuyo, utsho uyehova wemikosi, nentambo iya kwolulwa pezu kwe‐Yerusaleme." 
Zechariah1:17 Buya ndanduluke, usiti: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Izixeko zam zisaza kupupuma ngobutamsanqa; ngokuba uyehova esaza kututuzela i‐Ziyone, esaza kuqasha i‐Yerusaleme." 
Zechariah1:18 NDAZA ndapakamisa amehlo am, ndakangela, kekaloku nanziya impondo zine." 
Zechariah1:19 Ndandisiti kuyo ingelosi eyateta nam: Ziyinto nina ezi? Yati ukundipendula: Ezi zimpondo ezici̔tileyo o‐Juda, n o‐Sirayeli, ne‐Yerusaleme." 
Zechariah1:20 Waza uyehova wandibonisa incibi zane. 
Zechariah1:21 Ndandisiti: Ezi ziyeza ukwenza nto nina? Wayesitsho ukuti: Ezi zimpondo ezici̔tileyo o‐Juda, kwada akwabiko mntu owapakamisa intloko yake; kodwa ezi zize ukuzoyikisa, ukuwisa impondo zezizwe, ezapakamisa upondo ngakulo ilizwe lakwa‐Juda ukuba zilicite." 
Zechariah2:1 NDAZA ndapakamisa amehlo am, ndakangela, kekaloku nantsiya indoda inentambo yokulinganisa esandleni sayo." 
Zechariah2:2 Ndaza ndati: Uya ngapina? Yayisiti kum: Ndiya ukulinganisa i‐Yerusaleme, ndibone ububanzi bayo bungakananina, nobude bayo bungakananina." 
Zechariah2:3 Kekaloku bona ke, ingelosi eyateta nam yapuma, yaza yapuma enye ingelosi ukuyikaulela." 
Zechariah2:4 Yayisiti kuyo: Gitshima, utete kulendodana, usiti: I‐Yerusaleme iya kumiwa njeng amapandle, ngenxa yobuninzi babantu nenkomo ezikuyo." 
Zechariah2:5 Ndandiya kuba ludonga lwomlilo kuyo, utsho uyehova, ngento engqongayo; ndoba bubungewalisa pakati kwayo kanjalo." 
Zechariah2:6 Hoi, hoi! sukani, nisabe elizweni lasenode, utsho uyehova; ngokuba njengemimoya yomine yezulu ndinipangalalisile, utsho uyehova." 
Zechariah2:7 Hoi, Ziyone! zisindise, ohlalayo nentombi yase‐Babilone." 
Zechariah2:8 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Emveni kwobungcwalisa, unditumile ezizweni ezanipangayo; ngokuba onicu̔kumisayo nina, elucu̔kumisa ukozo lweliso lake." 
Zechariah2:9 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kuvivinya isandla sam ngakuzo, zaziya kuba ngamaxoba kwizicaka zazo; naniya kwazi nina ukuba uyehova wemikosi unditumile." 
Zechariah2:10 Cula uvuye, ntombi yase‐Ziyone! ngokuba, bona ke, ndisiza, ndandiya kuhlala pakati kwako, utsho uyehova." 
Zechariah2:11 Kanjako izizwe ezininzi zozibandakanyela kuyehova ngomhla lowo, zibe ngabantu bam; ndandiya kuhlala pakati kwako, wauya kwazi ukuba uyehova wemikosi unditumile kuwe." 
Zechariah2:12 Andule uyehova afuye u‐Juda isabiwo sake elizweni eliyingcwele, abuye aqashe i‐Yerusaleme." 
Zechariah2:13 Uluntu lwonke maluti tu pambi kwoyehova; ngokuba evukile ekayeni lake eliyingcwele. 
Zechariah3:1 YANDULA yandibonisa u‐Yoshuwa, umperisite omkulu, emi pambi kwayo ingelosi kayehova, no‐Satane emi ngesokunene isandla sake ukummela." 
Zechariah3:2 Wayesiti uyehova ku‐Satane: Uyehova makakukalimele, kwa uyehova oyiqashileyo i‐Yerusaleme makakukalimele: lo asi siso isikuni esinyotulweyo emlilweni na?" 
Zechariah3:3 Kekaloku u‐Yoshuwa ebevete ingubo ezinco̔lileyo, wema pambi kwengelosi." 
Zechariah3:4 Wandula wapendula wateta kubo abebemi pambi kwake, esiti: Tulani ingubo ezinco̔lileyo kuye. Wayesiti kuye: Kangela, ityala lako ndilisusile kuwe, ndandiya kukuvatisa izambato ezicikizekileyo." 
Zechariah3:5 Ndaza ndati: Mababeke unkontsho olumsulwa pezu kwentloko yake. Bandula babeka unkontsho olumsulwa pezu kwentloko yake, bamvatisa ingubo. Yabe ingelosi kayehova imi kona." 
Zechariah3:6 Yaza ingelosi kayehova yanqi̔nisa ku‐Yoshuwa, isiti:" 
Zechariah3:7 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Ukuba uya kuhamba ezindleleni zam, nokuba uya kugcina isigcinelo sam, uya kwandula ugwebe indlu yam, namabala am uwagcine; ndandiya kukunika abakokeli pakati kwaba abemiyo apa." 
Zechariah3:8 Yiva ke, Yoshuwa, mperisite omkulu! wena, nabalingane bako abahlala ebusweni bako: (ngokuba bengamadoda okuqondisa bona:) ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kuvelisa isicaka sam esi— lisebe." 
Zechariah3:9 Ngokuba, bona ke, ilitye endilibekileyo ebusweni buka‐Yoshuwa, pezu kwelitye linye kwoba ngamehlo asixe̔nxe: bona ke, ndiya kuqingqa isiqingqwa salo, utsho uyehova wemikosi; ndandiya kukwelelisa ityala lelizwe elo ngamini nye." 
Zechariah3:10 Ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova wemikosi, niya kumema abanye ngabanye abamelwane babo, ngapantsi kwomti weveyine, nangapantsi kwomkiwane." 
Zechariah4:1 YABUYA ingelosi eyateta nam yandivusa, njengomntu ovusiweyo ebutongweni bake," 
Zechariah4:2 yati kum: Ubona nto nina? Ndati: Ndibona nje, kekaloku nantsi ikandelare yegolide ipela, inendebe yayo pezu kwentloko yayo, nezibane zayo ezisixe̔nxe pezu kwayo, namabobo asixe̔nxe kuzo izibane ezipezu kwentloko yayo;" 
Zechariah4:3 neminquma emibini ngakuyo, omnye ngasekunene kwendebe, nomnye ngasekohlo kwayo." 
Zechariah4:4 Ndaza ndapendula ndateta kwingelosi eyateta nam, ndisiti: Ziyinto nina ezi, nkosi yam?" 
Zechariah4:5 Yapendula ingelosi eyateta nam, yati kum: Akwazi na into ziyiyo ezi? Ndaye ndisiti: Hai, nkosi yam!" 
Zechariah4:6 Yaza yapendula yateta kum, isiti: Eli lilizwi likayehova kuye u‐Zerubabeli, lisiti: Akungobuṙoti, akungamandla, kungo moya wam, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Zechariah4:7 Ungubanina wena, ntaba nkulu? Ebusweni buka‐Zerubabeli woba litafa: waeya kuvelisa ilitye eliyintloko ngendanduluko zokuti: Ufefe! ufefe lube kulo!" 
Zechariah4:8 Kanjako ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Zechariah4:9 Izandla zika‐Zerubabeli ziyisekele indlu le, nezandla zake zoyigqiba; naniya kwazi ukuba uyehova wemikosi unditumile kuni." 
Zechariah4:10 Ngokuba ngubanina owudelileyo umhla wezinto ezincinane? ngokuba lamehlo asixe̔nxe kayehova, lawo asingasingayo kuwo wonke umhlaba, ebevuya akubona iplumete esandleni sika‐Zerubabeli." 
Zechariah4:11 Ndaza ndapendula ndati kuyo: Iyinto nina leminquma mibini ngasekunene kwekandelare nangasekohlo kwayo? 
Zechariah4:12 Ndapendula ngokwesibini ndati kuyo: Ziyinto nina ezombaxa zombini zeminquma, eziti ngawo amabobo omabini egolide ziku̔pe ioli ey igolideṙa kwa kuzo?" 
Zechariah4:13 Yaza yateta kum, isiti: Akwazi na into ziyiyo ezi? Ndati: Hai, nkosi yam!" 
Zechariah4:14 Yandula yati: Ezi zingabatanjisiweyo ababini, abemiyo pambi kwenkosi yomhlaba wonke." 
Zechariah5:1 NDABUYA ndapakamisa amehlo am, ndakangela, kekaloku nanguya umqulu obalekayo." 
Zechariah5:2 Yayisiti kum: Ubona nto nina? Ndati: Ndibona umqulu obalekayo; ubude bawo zikubite ezimashumi mabini, nobubanzi bawo zikubite ezilishumi linye." 
Zechariah5:3 Yaza yati kum: Lo sisiqalekiso esipumelayo pezu kwobuso balo lonke ilizwe; ngokuba osukuba esiba̔ eya kukukuliswa ngelicala, njengokwaso; nosukuba efunga uya kukukuliswa ngelocala, njengokwaso." 
Zechariah5:4 Ndiyasipumisa, utsho uyehova wemikosi, sasiya kungena endlwini yoba̔yo, nasendlwini yolifungayo ngobuxoki igama lam; ewe, sohlala pakati kwendlu yake, sigqibe yona, nemiti yayo, namatye ayo." 
Zechariah5:5 Yandula yavela ingelosi eyateta nam, yati kum: Pakamisa ke amehlo ako, ubone lento evelayo ukuba iyinina." 
Zechariah5:6 Ndati: Yinto nina yona? Yayisiti: Le yiyefa evelayo. Yalekela ukuti: Le kukubonakala kwabo kulo lonke ilizwe. 
Zechariah5:7 Kekaloku bona ke, imbumbulo yelode ibifunqulwa; kwabekuko umfazi ehleli pakati kwayo iyefa." 
Zechariah5:8 Yayisiti: Lo yinkohlakalo. Yandula yamwisa pakati kwayo iyefa, nembumbulo yelode yayiwisa pezu kwomlomo wayo." 
Zechariah5:9 Ndaza ndapakamisa amehlo am, ndakangela, kekaloku bona ke, kwavela abafazi babini, umoya usemapikweni abo; ngokuba bebenamapiko njengamapiko eṙaside: bati bona bayifunqula iyefa pakati kwomhlaba nezulu." 
Zechariah5:10 Ndaza ndati kwingelosi eyateta nam: Bayisa iyefa ngapina aba? 
Zechariah5:11 Yayisiti kum: Bayakele indlu elizweni le‐Shinare; ngokuba iya kumiswa, iti yona ibekwe apo pezu kwesikondo sayo." 
Zechariah6:1 NDABUYA ndapakamisa amehlo am, ndakangela, kekaloku bona ke, kwapuma inqwelwana zane pakati kwentaba zimbini; kanjalo intaba ezo bezizintaba zobedu." 
Zechariah6:2 Kweyokuqala inqwelwana ebengamahashe abomvu; nakweyesibini inqwelwana ebengamahashe amnyama; 
Zechariah6:3 nakweyesitatu inqwelwana ebengamahashe amhlope; nakweyesine inqwelwana ebengamahashe angamaṙwexu nangwevu. 
Zechariah6:4 Ndaza ndapendula ndati kwingelosi eyateta kum: Ayinina la, nkosi yam?" 
Zechariah6:5 Yapendula ingelosi yati kum: La ngomoya abane basezulwini, bepuma ekuzimiseni kwabo pambi kwenkosi yomhlaba wonke." 
Zechariah6:6 Leyo amahashe amnyama akuyo, ayapuma wona ukuya elizweni lasenode; namhlope ayapuma ukuya ngasemva kwawo; namaṙwexu ayapumela elizweni lasesuyide." 
Zechariah6:7 Apuma nangwevu, afuna ukuya kuhambahamba elizweni. Yayisiti: Hambani, nihambahambe elizweni. Andula ahambahamba elizweni." 
Zechariah6:8 Yaza yandibiza, yateta kum, isiti: Kangela, lawo apumayo ukuya elizweni lasenode, apumzile umoya wam elizweni lasenode." 
Zechariah6:9 KEKALOKU ilizwi likayehova leza kum, lisiti:" 
Zechariah6:10 Tabata kubatinjwa, ku‐Heledai, ku‐Tobiya, naku‐Yedaya, abafikileyo bevela e‐Babilone, uze wena ngalomini, ungene endlwini ka‐Josiya unyana ka‐Tsefaniya;" 
Zechariah6:11 ewe, tabata isilivere negolide, uzenze ikrone, uzibeke pezu kwentloko ka‐Yoshuwa unyana ka‐Yotsadaki, umperisite omkulu;" 
Zechariah6:12 uze utsho kuye usiti: Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bona ke indoda, ngulisebe igama layo, eya kuhluma endaweni yayo, iyake itempile kayehova." 
Zechariah6:13 Kwa yona iya kuyaka itempile kayehova, ewe, yona iya kutwala ubungcwalisa, ihlale ipate ngobukosi pezu kweterone yayo; yoba ngumperisite pezu kweterone yayo kanjalo; necebo loxolo loba pakati kwezo nto zombini." 
Zechariah6:14 Nekrone ezo zoba zezika‐Heleme, nezika‐Tobiya, nezika‐Yedaya, nezika‐Hene unyana ka‐Tsefaniya, zibe yinkumbuzo etempileni kayehova." 
Zechariah6:15 Baya kuza nabakude, bayakise itempile kayehova; naniya kwazi ukuba uyehova wemikosi unditumile kuni. Kwoza kubako oku, nxa niya kuliva ngokukutala ilizwi likayehova, utixo wenu." 
Zechariah7:1 KWAYE kute ngowesine umnyaka ka‐Dariyusi ukumkani, ilizwi likayehova leza ku‐Zekariya ngowesine umhla wenyanga yesitoba, ngeyo Kisilevu;" 
Zechariah7:2 nxa i‐Betele yatumayo u‐Sharetsere, no‐Regeme‐meleke namadoda ake, ukumbongoza uyehova," 
Zechariah7:3 n okuteta kubaperisite abebesendlwini kayehova wemikosi, nakubaprofite, ngokuti: Ndiya kulila kweyesihlanu inyanga na, ndizahlula njengokuba ndenje njalo leminyaka mininzi kangaka?" 
Zechariah7:4 Landula ilizwi likayehova wemikosi leza kum, lisiti:" 
Zechariah7:5 Teta kubo bonke abantu belizwe, nakubo abaperisite, usiti: Xeshekweni benikwenza inzilo nokulila kweyesihlanu nakweyesixe̔nxe inyanga, kwa lominyaka ingamashumi asixe̔nxe, naka nandizilela mna na?" 
Zechariah7:6 Naxeshekweni benisidla, naxeshekweni benisela, beningenini abadlayo na, beningenini abaselayo na?" 
Zechariah7:7 Lamazwi asi ngawo na owawashumayelayo uyehova ngabaprofite bapambili, okuya i‐Yerusaleme ibimiwa, n okuya ibinokwonwaba, nezixeko zayo eziyingqongayo, kwakumiwa isuyide netafa?" 
Zechariah7:8 Leza ilizwi likayehova ku‐Zekariya kanjako, lisiti:" 
Zechariah7:9 Wabesitsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Gwebani ngokugweba okuyinyaniso, nenze ngobubele nangenceba omnye kwomnye;" 
Zechariah7:10 ningabandezeli umhlolokazi nenkedama, owasemzini nolihlwempu; ningaqingelani ububi entliziyweni yenu." 
Zechariah7:11 Bati kodwa bala ukupulapula, bapepisa igxalaba; nendlebe zabo bazenza nzima, ukuba bangeva." 
Zechariah7:12 Nentliziyo yabo bayenza njeng edamante, ukuba bangeva umteto, namazwi owawatumayo uyehova ngomoya wake, ngabo abaprofite bapambili; kwaza kwabako umsindo omkulu uvela kuyehova wemikosi." 
Zechariah7:13 Kwabekute ngoko, njengokuba ebebizile yena, bengevanga bona, kwa njalo babiza bona, ndingevanga mna, utsho uyehova wemikosi;" 
Zechariah7:14 kodwa ndabaci̔ta ngesaqwiti pakati kwazo zonke izizwe abebengazazi; laza ilizwe laba bugxwayiba emva kwabo, kungeko owadlulayo nowabuyayo: ngokuba bebelenze ilizwe elinqwenelekileyo libe bugxwayiba." 
Zechariah8:1 Leza kanjako ilizwi likayehova wemikosi kum, lisiti:" 
Zechariah8:2 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bendinobukwele pezu kwe‐Ziyone ngobukwele obukulu, ewe, bendinobukwele pezu kwayo ngobuṙalaṙume obukulu." 
Zechariah8:3 Utsho uyehova ukuti: Sendibuyele e‐Ziyone, ndandiya kuhlala pakati kwe‐Yerusaleme; kanjalo i‐Yerusaleme iya kubizwa ngokuti sisixeko senyaniso, nentaba kayehova wemikosi ngokuti yintaba eyingcwele." 
Zechariah8:4 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Amaxego namaxegokazi obuya ahlale ezitarateni ze‐Yerusaleme, amanye ngamanye enemisimelelo yawo ezandleni zawo ngenxa yobuninzi bemihla." 
Zechariah8:5 Zaye izitarate zesixeko eso ziya kuzala ngamakwenkwe nentombazana, bedlala ezitarateni zaso." 
Zechariah8:6 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Nakuba kuya kuba ngummangaliso emehlweni esisalela sababantu ngemihla leyo, ngekuba ngummangaliso emehlweni am na? utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Zechariah8:7 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bona ke, ndiya kusindisa abantu bam elizweni lokupuma kwelanga, nasezweni lokutshona kwelanga;" 
Zechariah8:8 ndobazisa ke, babeya kuhlala pakati kwe‐Yerusaleme; bona boba ngabantu bam, nam ndoba ngutixo wabo, ngenyaniso nangobulungisa." 
Zechariah8:9 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Izandla zenu mazomelele, nina nivayo kulemihla lamazwi ngomlomo wabaprofite, a betetwa emhleni wabekwa umsekelo wayo indlu kayehova wemikosi, itempile, ukuba yakiwe." 
Zechariah8:10 Ngokuba ingekabiko lomihla, ubungeko umvuzo womntu, ubungeko nomvuzo wenkomo; nakuye opumayo, nakuye ongenayo, bekungeko uxolo, ngenxa yotshaba; ewe, ndatuma bonke abantu omnye ngakuye omnye." 
Zechariah8:11 Kodwa kaloku andiyi kuba njengasemihleni yapambili kwisisalela sababantu, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Zechariah8:12 Ngokuba imbewu yoba netamsanqa; umti weveyine uya kunika ukuqa̔ma kwawo, nomhlaba wonika ukuxakata kwawo, namazulu onika umbete wawo, nesisalela sababantu ndiya kubenza ukuba bazifuye ezi zinto zonke." 
Zechariah8:13 Kwakuya kuti, njengokuba nibe nisisiqalekiso pakati kwezizwe, ndlu ka‐Juda, nendlu ka‐Sirayeli! kwa njalo ndonisindisa, naniya kuba litamsanqeliso: ningoyiki, mazomelele izandla zenu." 
Zechariah8:14 Ngokuba esitsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Njengokuba bendicinga ukunenzela ububi, nxa oyihlo benu bandiqumbisayo, utsho uyehova wemikosi, ndingabanga nalusizi ke;" 
Zechariah8:15 kwa njalo ndibuye ndacinga, kulemihla, ukwenzela i‐Yerusaleme nendlu ka‐Juda okulungileyo: ningoyiki." 
Zechariah8:16 Zezi izinto niya kuzenza: Tetani inyaniso omnye kwomnye: gwebani ngenyaniso nangokugweba kwoxolo emasangweni enu; 
Zechariah8:17 ningaqingelani ububi entliziyweni yenu; nesifungo sobuxoki ningasitandi; ngokuba zonke ezi zinto zezo ndizitiyayo, utsho uyehova." 
Zechariah8:18 Kanjalo ilizwi likayehova wemikosi leza kum, lisiti:" 
Zechariah8:19 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Inzilo yeyesine inyanga, nenzilo yeyesihlanu, nenzilo yeyesixe̔nxe, nenzilo yeyeshumi, zoba luvuyo nomgcobo kwindlu ka‐Juda, kwa imitendeleko ecwayitileyo: kodwa tandani inyaniso noxolo." 
Zechariah8:20 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Ku sa za kubako, ukuba baya kuza abantu, nabemi bezixeko ezininzi," 
Zechariah8:21 bati abemi besinye baye kwesinye, besiti: Masikauleze ukuya kumbongoza uyehova, nokumfuna uyehova wemikosi; ndiya kuhamba nam." 
Zechariah8:22 Ewe, baya kuza abantu abaninzi, nezizwe ezinamandla, ukumfuna uyehova wemikosi e‐Yerusaleme, nokumbongoza uyehova." 
Zechariah8:23 Utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Ngalomihla, amadoda alishumi, kuzo zonke inteto nezizwe, aya kubamba, ewe, aya kubamba isondo lengubo yom‐Juda, esiti: Siya kuhamba nani; ngokuba sivile ukuba utixo unani." 
Zechariah9:1 UMGWEBO welizwi likayehova ngakulo ilizwe le‐Haderaki, lowo i‐Damakusi yoba yindawo yokupumla kwawo, oko aya kubeka ngakuyehova amehlo abantu, nawezizwe zonke zo‐Sirayeli." 
Zechariah9:2 Kwa ne‐Hamati e hlangana nomda walo; i‐Tire, ne‐Tsidone, nakuba ilumkile kakulu." 
Zechariah9:3 Nangona i‐Tire izakele inqaba, yafumbelela isilivere njengotuli, negolide njengodaka lwezitarate;" 
Zechariah9:4 bona ke, inkosi iya kuyigxota, nobutyebi bayo yobuwisela elwandle, nayo yona iya kudliwa ngumlilo." 
Zechariah9:5 I‐Ashekelone yobona, yoyike: yobona ne‐Gaza, itutumele kakulu; ne‐Hekrone, ngokuba itemba layo lidanisiwe; kanjalo ukumkani wobuba e‐Gaza, ne‐Ashekelone ayiyi kumiwa." 
Zechariah9:6 Owolunye uhlanga uya kuhlala e‐Ashedode, ner̔atshi lama‐Filistiya ndolinqumla." 
Zechariah9:7 Igazi lake ndolisusa emlonyeni wake, nezinto zake ezizondekileyo kwa pakati kwamazinyo ake; waye kwa yena eya kusalela utixo wetu: ewe, woba njengenkosi kwa‐Juda, ne‐Hekrone njengom‐Yebusi." 
Zechariah9:8 Ndandiya kuyipahla indlu yam ngenxa yempi, ngenxa yedlulayo, nangenxa yebuyayo; kwaye kungayi kubuya kudlule pakati kwabo umbandezeli; ngokuba kaloku ndibonile ngamehlo am." 
Zechariah9:9 Gcoba kakulu, ntombi yase‐Ziyone! danduluka, ntombi yase‐Yerusaleme! bona ke, ukumkani wako uyeza kuwe; elungile, enosindiso, elulamile, ekwele eqwaṙasheni, kwa seqwaṙashaneni elilitole leqwaṙashekazi." 
Zechariah9:10 Inqwelo ndiya kuyinqamla kwa‐Frayime, nehashe e‐Yerusaleme; siya kunqanyulwa nesipeta sokulwa; waeya kuteta uxolo kubaheyideni; nobukosi bake boba kwa selwandle kude kube selwandle, nakuwo umlambo kude kube sezincanyeni zomhlaba." 
Zechariah9:11 Kanjako wena, ngegazi locebano lwako, ndibaku̔pile ababanjwa bako emnxunyeni ekungeko amanzi kuwo." 
Zechariah9:12 Buyelani enqatyeni, nina babanjwa abanetemba! ndiyaxela kwa namhla ukuba ndobuyisela kuwe ngokupindiweyo;" 
Zechariah9:13 ngokuba ndizigobele u‐Juda, isipeta ndisizalisile ngo‐Frayime, nonyana bako, Ziyone! ndibavusile ngakubo onyana bako, Javane! ndandikwenzile njengesiṙele soligoṙa." 
Zechariah9:14 Waye uyehova eya kubonakala ngenxa yabo, nentolo zake ziya kupuma njengemibane; ewe, inkosi e nguyehova yovutela ngexilongo, ihambe ezaqwitini zasesuyide." 
Zechariah9:15 Uyehova wemikosi wobakusela; baya kudla, banyatele pantsi amatye okusaula; baya kusela, baya kuxokozela, njeng abasela iveyine; boba bezele njengendebe, njengamagumbi esibingelo." 
Zechariah9:16 Waeya kuti uyehova, utixo wabo, abasindise ngomhla lowo, njengokuba bengumhlambi wabantu bake; ngokuba beya kuba njeng amatye esitsaba, ezipakamisa pezulu pezu kwelizwe lake." 
Zechariah9:17 Ngokuba kukulu kangakananina ukulunga kwake! bukulu kangakananina ubuhle bake! inqolowa yocu̔misa amadodana, neveyine entsha yocu̔misa intombi." 
Zechariah10:1 YICELENI kuyehova imvula ngexesha lemvula yasemva: uyehova uyayenza imibane, nomvumbi wemvula uyawunika kubo, enika kwabanye ngabanye inca ezindleni." 
Zechariah10:2 Ngokuba iterafi zibe ziteta okungento, nabalauli bebebona ubuxoki; batyela amapupa angendawo, bafumana betutuzela; ngako oko bemka njengegusha, babandezelwa, ngokuba bekungeko umalusi." 
Zechariah10:3 Ingqumbo yam yavuta ngakubo abalusi, ndababeta abakokeli: koko uyehova wemikosi ekangele umhlambi wake, indlu ka‐Juda, wabenza njengehashe lake elomeleleyo ekulweni." 
Zechariah10:4 Kwovela kuye ilitye legumbi, kwovela kuye isikonkwane, kwovela kuye isipeta sokulwa; kwopuma kuye bonke abapati kwa kunye." 
Zechariah10:5 Boba njengamagoṙa anyatelayo intshaba eludakeni lwezitarate ekulweni; babeya kulwa, ngokuba uyehova enabo, nabakweli bamahashe baya kudaniswa." 
Zechariah10:6 Kanjalo ndiya kuyomeleza indlu ka‐Juda, nendlu ka‐Josefe ndoyisindisa; ndobuya ndibahlalise, ngokuba ndinenceba kubo; babeya kuba njengokungati bendingabalahlanga; ngokuba mna Yehova ndi ngutixo wabo, ndandiya kubapulapula." 
Zechariah10:7 No‐Frayime bona boba njengoligoṙa; intliziyo yabo yovuya, njeng abasela iveyine; ewe, abantwana babo bobona, bavuye ke; intliziyo yabo yogcoba kuyehova." 
Zechariah10:8 Ndobalozela, ndibabute, ngokuba ndibakulule; babeya kwanda, njengokuba bebesanda pambili." 
Zechariah10:9 Nakuba ndibahlwayele pakati kwezizwe, baya kundikumbula noko emazweni akude; babeya kupila kunye nabantwana babo, babuye ke." 
Zechariah10:10 Ngokuba ndiya kubabuyisa elizweni le‐Jipete, ndibabute nase‐Asiriya; ndandiya kubazisa elizweni le‐Gileyadi ne‐Lebanone, kodwa aliyi kubanela." 
Zechariah10:11 Waeya kuwela ulwandle ngosizi, awabete amaza pakati kwolwandle, nazo zonke inzulu zomlambo ziya kwoma; ir̔atshi le‐Asiriya liya kuhliswa pantsi, nentonga ye‐Jipete iya kumka." 
Zechariah10:12 Ndandiya kubomeleza ngoyehova, nasegameni lake baya kuhambahamba, utsho uyehova." 
Zechariah11:1 ZIVULE, Lebanone! ingcango zako, uze umlilo utshise isedare zako." 
Zechariah11:2 Lila, wena beroshe! ngokuba isedare iwile, ngokokuba amangangamsha eci̔tiwe; lilani, nina ziyeke zase‐Bashane! ngokuba ihlati elinqatyisiweyo lihlile pantsi." 
Zechariah11:3 Kuko ilizwi lokulila kwabalusi, ngokuba ubungangamsha babo buci̔tiwe: kuko ilizwi lokukonya kwengonyama ezintsha, ngokuba ir̔atshi le‐Yoredane lici̔tiwe." 
Zechariah11:4 Utsho uyehova, utixo wam, ukuti: Yalusa igusha zokuxe̔lwa;" 
Zechariah11:5 abati abafuyi bazo bazixe̔le, kodwa abanikwa ityala; nabo abatengisa ngazo, bonke bati: Makadunyiswe uyehova, ndityetyisiwe nje! nabalusi bazo, akuko namnye onenceba ngakuzo." 
Zechariah11:6 Ngokuba ndingayi kubuya ndibe nenceba ngakubo abemi belizwe, utsho uyehova; kodwa bona ke, ndiya kunikela amadoda amanye ngamanye esandleni sommelwane wawo, nasesandleni sokumkani wawo: babeya kuci̔takalisa ilizwe, ndaye ndingayi kuwahlangula esandleni sabo." 
Zechariah11:7 Ndazalusa igusha zokuxe̔lwa, igusha ezilusizi kunene! Ndaza ndazitabatela intonga zambini; enye ndayibiza ngokuti lufefe; nenye ndayibiza ngokuti zimbopelelo; ndazalusa igusha ke." 
Zechariah11:8 Kanjalo abalusi abatatu ndabanqamla pakati kwenyanga nye; wati umpefumlo wam wabacapukela, wati nompefumlo wabo wanditiya." 
Zechariah11:9 Ndaza ndati: Andiyi kunalusa: leyo iza kufa, maife; naleyo iza kunqanyulwa, mainqanyulwe; neziseleyo, maiti enye idle inyama yenye." 
Zechariah11:10 Ndaza ndayitabata intonga yam elufefe, ndayinqumla kubini, ukuze ndilwapule ucebano lwam endibe ndilwenzile nabantu bonke." 
Zechariah11:11 Lwaye lusapulwa ngalomhla; zaza igusha ezilusizi kunene, ezandilumkelayo, zakwazi ukuba lilizwi likayehova." 
Zechariah11:12 Ndaye ndisiti kubo: Ukuba kulungile emehlweni enu, nikani umvuzo wam; ukuba aku lungile, niyeke. Bandula balinganisela umvuzo wam amaqosha esilivere angamashumi matatu." 
Zechariah11:13 Waza uyehova wati kum: Yiposele kumbumbi, — inani elikulu nje endenzelwayo inani ngabo! Ndaza ndatabata lomaqosha esilivere engamashumi matatu, ndayiposela endlwini kayehova, kumbumbi." 
Zechariah11:14 Ndandula ndayinqumla kubini intonga yam yesibini, ezimbopelelo, ukuze ndiqipule ubuzalwana pakati kwo‐Juda no‐Sirayeli." 
Zechariah11:15 Wayesiti uyehova kum: Yiti kanjako uzitabatele impahla zomalusi osidenge. 
Zechariah11:16 Ngokuba, bona ke, ndiya kuvusa umalusi elizweni; ezo ziza kunqanyulwa akayi kuya kuzikangela, elahlekileyo akayi kuyifuna, neyapukileyo akayi kuyipolisa, emiyo akayi kuyonga; kodwa uya kuyidla inyama yezityebileyo, nempupu zazo woziṙazula." 
Zechariah11:17 Kwoba nzima kumalusi ongendawo oshiyayo umhlambi! isiṙele soba pezu kwengalo yake, napezu kweliso lake lokunene; ingalo yake yogqibela ukushwabana, neliso lake lokunene logqibela ukuba luzizi." 
Zechariah12:1 UMGWEBO welizwi likayehova ngo‐Sirayeli: Uti uyehova, owatwabulula amazulu, owabeka ukuseka kwomhlaba, owadala umoya womntu pakati kwake:" 
Zechariah12:2 Bona ke, ndiya kuyenza i‐Yerusaleme indebe yesizunguzane kubo bonke abantu abangqongayo: kwoba njalo nako‐Juda, ekuvingcelweni kwe‐Yerusaleme." 
Zechariah12:3 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ndoyenza i‐Yerusaleme ilitye elisindayo kubo bonke abantu; bonke abaya kulifunqula bogetyulwa kakulu: noko, ziya kuhlanganisana ngakuyo zonke izizwe zomhlaba." 
Zechariah12:4 Ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova, ndiya kubeta onke amahashe ngokuti nqa, nabakweli bawo ngobugeza; kodwa pezu kwendlu ka‐Juda ndiya kuvula amehlo am, nawo onke amahashe ezizwe ndowabeta ngobumfama." 
Zechariah12:5 Kanjalo inkosi zakwa‐Juda zoti entliziyweni yazo: Amandla am ngabemi base‐Yerusaleme, ngaye uyehova wemikosi, utixo wabo." 
Zechariah12:6 Ngomhla lowo ndiya kuzenza inkosi zakwa‐Juda zibe njengeziko lomlilo pakati kwenkuni, nanjengesibane somlilo esitungwini; zaziya kubadla bonke abantu abangqongayo, ngasekunene nangasekohlo; ngokuba i‐Yerusaleme iya kubuya ihlale endaweni yayo e‐Yerusaleme." 
Zechariah12:7 Waye uyehova eya kusindisa intente zakwa‐Juda kuqala, ukuze ubungcwalisa bendlu ka‐Davide, nobungcwalisa babemi base‐Yerusaleme, bungenzwa bukulu ngapezu kwo‐Juda." 
Zechariah12:8 Ngomhla lowo uyehova wobakusela abemi base‐Yerusaleme; aze oku̔bekayo pakati kwabo ngomhla lowo abe njengo Davide, nendlu ka‐Davide ibe njengotixo, njengengelosi kayehova pambi kwabo." 
Zechariah12:9 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, ndiya kufuna ukutshabalalisa zonke izizwe ezizayo ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme." 
Zechariah12:10 Koko ndiya kugalela pezu kwendlu ka‐Davide, napezu kwabemi base‐Yerusaleme, umoya wofefe nowezitaṙnziso, babeya kukangela kum, lowo bamhlabileyo, benze isijwili pezu kwake, njengesijwili esenz elwa okupela kwomntwana, babe nobuṙaṙa ngenxa yake, njengokuba kunobuṙaṙa ngenxa yowamazibulo." 
Zechariah12:11 Ngomhla lowo kwobako isijwili esikulu e‐Yerusaleme, njengesijwili se‐Hadadrimone emhlanjeni wase‐Megido." 
Zechariah12:12 Ilizwe liya kusenza isijwili, izizalwane zizodwa ezinye ngezinye; isizalwane sendlu ka‐Davide sisodwa, nabafazi babo bebodwa; isizalwane sendlu ka‐Natane sisodwa, nabafazi babo bebodwa;" 
Zechariah12:13 isizalwane sendlu ka‐Levi sisodwa, nabafazi babo bebodwa; isizalwane sika Shimehi sisodwa, nabafazi babo bebodwa;" 
Zechariah12:14 zonke izizalwane eziseleyo, izizalwane zizodwa ezinye ngezinye, nabafazi babo bebodwa." 
Zechariah13:1 Ngomhla lowo umtombo wovulelwa indlu ka‐Davide, nabemi base‐Yerusaleme, ngenxa yesono nangenxa yokunco̔la." 
Zechariah13:2 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, utsho uyehova wemikosi, ndowanqamla amagama ezitixo elizweni; akasayi kuba sakunjulwa: kanjalo abaprofite nomoya onco̔lileyo ndiya kubemkisa elizweni." 
Zechariah13:3 Kwakuya kuti, nxa kusaprofitesha umntu, baya kwandula uyise wake nonina wake abamzalayo bati kuye: Akuyi kudla ubomi; ngokuba uteta ubuxoki egameni likayehova: kanjako uyise wake nonina wake abamzalayo baya kumhlaba nxa aprofiteshayo." 
Zechariah13:4 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, abaprofite baya kudana, abanye ngabanye ngenxa yomboniso wabo, nxa baprofiteshayo; baye bengayi kuyambata ingubo yoboya ukuze baxokise." 
Zechariah13:5 Kodwa uya kuti: Andinguye umprofite, ndingolimayo umhlaba mna; ngokuba ndikonzisiwe ngabantu kuselokwa sebutsheni bam." 
Zechariah13:6 Kwakuya kutiwa kuye: Ayinina amanxeba la ezandleni zako? Waeya kuti: Ngalawo bendilinyazwa ngawo endlwini yezihlobo zam. 
Zechariah13:7 VUKA, siṙele! ngakuye umalusi wam, nangakuyo indoda elikolwane lam, utsho uyehova wemikosi: beta umalusi, zaziya kuci̔twa igusha; kodwa ndiya kubuyisela isandla sam ngakuzo ezincinane." 
Zechariah13:8 Kwakuya kuti kulo lonke ilizwe, utsho uyehova, zonqanyulwa izahlulo zibini ezikulo, zibube ke; kodwa isahlulo sesitatu siya kusala kulo." 
Zechariah13:9 Ndandiya kungenisa esesitatu isahlulo emlilweni, ndibacokise njengokuba icokiswa isilivere, ndibalinge njengokuba ilingwa igolide; sona siya kubiza egameni lam, nam ndiya kusipulapula; ndoti mna: Singabantu bam; soti sona: Uyehova ngutixo wam." 
Zechariah14:1 Bona ke, umhla kayehova uyeza, nxa amaxoba ako aya kwabiwa pakati kwako." 
Zechariah14:2 Ngokuba ndiya kuhlanganisa izizwe zonke ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme kuze kuliwe; soti isixeko sibanjwe, nezindlu zipangwe, nabafazi badlwengulwe; isiqingata sesixeko siya kupuma ngokutinjwa, kodwa abantu abaseleyo abayi kunqanyulwa esixekweni." 
Zechariah14:3 Waeya kupuma uyehova, alwe nezizwe ezo, njengokuya abesilwa emhleni wokulwa." 
Zechariah14:4 Inyawo zake ziya kuma ngomhla lowo pezu kwentaba yeminquma, epambi kwe‐Yerusaleme ngecala lipuma ilanga; yoti intaba yeminquma icandeke pakati kwayo, ngasempumalanga, nangasentshonalanga, ibe ngumhlambo omkulu kakulu; esinye isiqingata sentaba sokwelela ngasenode, nesinye isiqingata ngasesuyide." 
Zechariah14:5 Naniya kwesabela emhlanjeni wentaba zam; ngokuba umhlambo wentaba ezo uya kufikelana ne‐Atsele: ewe, niya kwesaba njengokuya nibe nisaba pambi kwesingcangcazelo somhlaba, emihleni ka‐Huziya ukumkani wo‐Juda; ngokuba uyehova, utixo wam, eya kuza, bonke abangcwele benawe." 
Zechariah14:6 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, akuyi kubako ukukanya; izikazimlo zezulu zofinyela." 
Zechariah14:7 Kodwa kwobako umhla owodwa, (uyaziwa wona nguyehova,) ungeyiyo imini, ungebubo nobusuku; ngokuba kuya kuti, ngexesha lokuhlwa kuya kubako ukukanya." 
Zechariah14:8 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, amanzi apilileyo opuma e‐Yerusaleme; esinye isiqingata sawo oya elwandle lwapambili, nesinye isiqingata sawo oya elwandle lwasemva; kwoba njalo ehlotyeni nasebusika." 
Zechariah14:9 Waye uyehova eya kuba ngukumkani pezu kwomhlaba wonke: ngomhla lowo kwobako uyehova yedwa, negama lake lodwa." 
Zechariah14:10 Ilizwe lonke loguqulwa libe njengetafa kwa se‐Geba kude kube se‐Rimone, ngasesuyide ne‐Yerusaleme; yaiya kupakanyiswa, ihlale endaweni yayo, kwa kulo isango lika‐Benjamine kude kube sendaweni yesango lokuqala, esangweni lamagumbi; na kuyo inqaba ye‐Hananele kude kube sezifatyeni zeveyine zokumkani." 
Zechariah14:11 Kwakuya kuhlalwa kuyo; akusayi kubako siqalekiso kanjako; koko i‐Yerusaleme iya kuhlala ngokunqaba. 
Zechariah14:12 Esi siya kuba sisibulawa, aya kuti uyehova ngaso abulale bonke abantu abalwileyo ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme: inyama yabo yongcungcuteka besemi bona pezu kwenyawo zabo, namehlo abo ongcungcuteka ezintunjeni zawo, nolwimi lwabo lwongcungcuteka emlonyeni wabo." 
Zechariah14:13 Kwakuya kuti ngomhla lowo, kwobako impitizelo enkulu ivela kuyehova pakati kwabo, ade omnye abambe isandla somnye, siti isandla sake sinyuke ngakuso isandla somnye." 
Zechariah14:14 Kanjalo o‐Juda nabo baya kulwa e‐Yerusaleme; kwakuya kubutwa ubutyebi bazo zonke izizwe ezingqongayo, igolide, nesilivere, nezivato, ngento eninzi kakulu." 
Zechariah14:15 Soba kwa njalo isibulawa samahashe, n esamaqwaṙara, n esenkamela, nesamaqwaṙashe, nesazo zonke izilo eziya kubako eminqubeni leyo, njengaso esisibulawa." 
Zechariah14:16 Kwakuya kuti, bonke abaseleyo kuzo zonke izizwe eziya kuza ngakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, baya kunyuka kwiminyaka ngeminyaka ukuya kumbedesha ukumkani, uyehova wemikosi, nokuwenza umtendeleko wamapempe." 
Zechariah14:17 Kwakuya kuti, abo basukuba benganyuki, kuzo izizalwane zomhlaba, ukuya e‐Yerusaleme, ukumbedesha ukumkani, uyehova wemikosi, kwa pezu kwabo akuyi kubako imvula." 
Zechariah14:18 Nesizalwane sama‐Jipete, ukuba asinyuki, nokuba asizi, ekungeko pezu kwawo imvula, kwobako kona isibulawa, aya kuti uyehova ngaso abulale izizwe ezingayi kunyuka ukuya kuwenza umtendeleko wamapempe." 
Zechariah14:19 Oku kwoba kukubetwa kwama‐Jipete, nokubetwa kwazo zonke izizwe ezingayi kunyuka ukuya kuwenza umtendeleko wamapempe." 
Zechariah14:20 Ngomhla lowo kwobako pezu kwentsimbi ezikencezayo zamahashe isibalo sokuti: Ubungcwele kuyehova; nembiza ezisendlwini kayehova zona ziya kuba njengendebe ezipambi kwesibingelo. 
Zechariah14:21 Ewe, zonke imbiza ezise‐Yerusaleme nakwa‐Juda zoba bubungcwele kuyehova wemikosi; babeya kuza bonke ababingayo, batabate kuzo, bapeke kuzo; kanjalo akusayi kuba sabako um‐Kanane endlwini kayehova wemikosi ngomhla lowo." 
Malachi1:1 UMGWEBO welizwi likayehova ko‐Sirayeli ngaye u‐Malaki. 
Malachi1:2 Ndinitandile nina, utsho uyehova; kanti niti: Usitandile ngokuyinina? U‐Esau ubengengumkuluwe ku‐Yakobi na? utsho uyehova; noko ndamtanda u‐Yakobi," 
Malachi1:3 no‐Esau ndamtiya; ndazenza intaba zake zibe yingci̔takalo, nelifa lake libe lelempungutye zentlango." 
Malachi1:4 Ngokokuba isiti i‐Edome: Sihlentshuzisiwe, kodwa sobuya siwake amanxuwa; utsho uyehova wemikosi ukuti: Bangaka bona, kodwa ndiya kuci̔ta mna; babeya kubizwa ngokuti: Ngumda wenkohlakalo; nangokuti: Ngabantu uyehova abaqumbelayo kude kube ngunapakade." 
Malachi1:5 Aya kubona namehlo enu, naniya kuti: Uyehova makenzwe mkulu kwa semdeni wakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Malachi1:6 Ongunyana uyambeka uyise, nosisicaka inkosi yake: ukuba ke ndinguyise, kupina ukubekwa kwam? nokuba ndiyinkosi, kupina ukwoyikwa kwam? utsho uyehova wemikosi kuni, baperisite, abadelayo igama lam! Niti noko: Igama lako silidelile ngokuyinina?" 
Malachi1:7 Ngokunikela isonka esinco̔lisekileyo pezu kwezibingelo zam. Niti noko: Sikunco̔lisile ngokuyinina? Ngokutsho kwenu ukuti: Itafile kayehova idelekile. 
Malachi1:8 Kanjalo xeshekweni ninikelayo into eyimfama ibe lidini, asi kuko okubi na? naxeshekweni ninikelayo esisiqwala nengumlwelwe, asi kuko okubi na? yinikeleni ke kwinkosi yako; yokoliswa nguwe na? umhlaumbi yobubuka ubuso bako na? utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi1:9 Ngako kaloku, bongozani utixo, ukuba asipate ngofefe: kuhlile oku ngani; wobubuka ubuso benu na? utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi1:10 Ngubanina kwa pakati kwenu oya kuvala ingcango? ewe, aniyi kubasa pezu kwesibingelo sam ungeko umvuzo. Andinaluyolo kuni, utsho uyehova wemikosi, andiyi kuwamkela umnikelo wokudla esandleni senu kanjalo." 
Malachi1:11 Koko kwa sekupumeni kwelanga kude kube sekutshoneni kwalo, loba likulu igama lam pakati kwezizwe; nakuzo zonke indawo isiqu̔miso siya kunikelwa kwigama lam nomnikelo wokudla ococekileyo: ngokuba igama lam liya kuba likulu pakati kwezizwe, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi1:12 Kodwa nina nilidyobile ngokutsho kwenu ukuti: Itafile kayehova inco̔lisekile, nesixakato sayo, ukutya kwayo, sidelekile." 
Malachi1:13 Nite kanjako: Hai ukuba yinkatazo ke! ewe, nikucekisile, utsho uyehova wemikosi; nanizisile inxweleṙa, nesiqwala, nomlwelwe; nizisile nomnikelo wokudla; ngendiwamkela esandleni senu na? utsho uyehova." 
Malachi1:14 Kodwa makaqalekiswe umkohlisi, onenkunzi emhlambini wake, andule asenze isibambiso, anikele enkosini into eyonakeleyo; ngokuba ndingukumkani omkulu, utsho uyehova wemikosi, negama lam liya kwoyikeka pakati kwezizwe." 
Malachi2:1 Nakaloku kutunyiwe kuni lomyalelo, baperisite!" 
Malachi2:2 Nxa ningayi kupulapula, nanxa ningayi kubeka intliziyo, ukuba kudunyiswe igama lam, utsho uyehova wemikosi, ndiya kwandula nditume isiqalekiso pakati kwenu, ndiwaqalekise amatamsanqa enu: ewe, ndowaqalekisa onke ngamanye, ngokuba ningabeki intliziyo." 
Malachi2:3 Bona ke, ndiya kukalimela imbewu yenu; ndandiya kuci̔ta umswane pezu kwobuso benu, umswane wemibingo yemitendeleko yenu; nani nosuswa kunye nawo." 
Malachi2:4 Naniya kukwazi ukuba ndiwutumile kuni lomyalelo, luze lubeko ucebano lwam no‐Levi, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi2:5 Ucebano lwam beluko naye, ubomi noxolo; ndandizinika kuye, ngenxa yokwoyika wandoyika ngako, nokunkwantya abenako pambi kwegama lam." 
Malachi2:6 Umteto wenyaniso ubusemlonyeni wake; ubumenemene bebungafunyanwa pezu kwodebe lwake; wahamba nam ngoxolo nangolungelelano, nabaninzi wabanqanda enkohlakalweni." 
Malachi2:7 Ngokuba umlomo womperisite ngeugcina ukwazi, nomteto ngekufunwa wona emlonyeni wake; ngokuba yena esisitunywa sikayehova wemikosi." 
Malachi2:8 Nina kodwa, nipambukile endleleni, nibaku̔bekisile abaninzi emtetweni, nilwonakalisile ucebano luka‐Levi, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi2:9 Ngako nam ndinenzile abadelekileyo nabatobekileyo pambi kwabo bonke abantu; ngokokuba ningagcinanga indlela zam, kodwa nipete umteto ngokuketa abantu." 
Malachi2:10 TINA sonke asinaye ubawo emnye na? asi nguye utixo emnye osidalileyo na? kunganina ukuba sipatane ngobuxoki, siludyoba ucebano lwobawo betu nje?" 
Malachi2:11 U‐Juda wenzile ngobuxoki, nento eyintshontsho yenziwe kwa‐Sirayeli nase‐Yerusaleme; ngokuba u‐Juda ebudyobile ubungcwele bukayehova, obo wabutandayo, wayizeka intombi yotixo wasemzini." 
Malachi2:12 Uyehova uya kunqamla umntu okwenzayo oku, lowo olindayo, nalowo opendulayo, ezintenteni zakwa‐Yakobi, nalowo onikela umnikelo wokudla kuyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi2:13 Lento ke niyenzile ngokwesibini, nigubungela isibingelo sikayehova ngenyembezi, ngokulila nangokugula, ude ungabi sabekwa umnikelo, ungamkelwa ngembuko esandleni senu kanjalo." 
Malachi2:14 Noko niti: Ngenxa yanina? Ngenxa yokuba uyehova ebelinqi̔na pakati kwako nomfazi wobutsha bako, owenzileyo ngobuxoki ngakuye, nangona abengumlinganekazi wako, nomfazi wocebano lwako." 
Malachi2:15 Kanene akamnye na amdalileyo, nakuba abenesisalela somoya? Ebemnye nganina? Ngokuba efuna inzalo katixo. Ngako lumkelani umoya wenu, ukuba kungabiko owenza ngobuxoki emfazini wobutsha bake." 
Malachi2:16 Ngokuba etiya ukuba kulahlwe, utsho uyehova, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, nokuba indoda igubungele ingubo yayo ngobudlwengu, utsho uyehova wemikosi: ngako lumkelani umoya wenu, ukuba ningenzi ngobuxoki." 
Malachi2:17 NIMDINISILE uyehova ngamazwi enu. Noko niti: Simdinisile ngokuyinina? Ngokutsho kwenu ukuti: Bonke abakwenza okukohlakeleyo balungile emehlweni kayehova, uyabatanda; umhlaumbi ngokuti: Upina utixo wobugwebo?" 
Malachi3:1 Bona ke, ndiya kutuma isitunywa sam, esiya kulungisa indlela pambi kwam; yaiya kuza ngokwalama etempileni yayo inkosi eniyifunayo, kwa isitunywa socebano enisitandayo: bona ke, iya kuza, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi3:2 Kodwa umhla wokuza kwayo ngubanina ongawunyamezelayo? kanjalo ngubanina ongemayo yakubonakala? ngokuba injengomlilo wencibi yegolide, nanjengesepe yabasuki." 
Malachi3:3 Iya kuhlala ke, icokisa ihlambulula isilivere; yobahlambulula onyana baka‐Levi, ibacokise njengegolide nanjengesilivere, ukuze banikele umnikelo wokudla kuyehova ngobulungisa." 
Malachi3:4 Uya kwandula ube mnandi kuyehova umnikelo wokudla wo‐Juda ne‐Yerusaleme, njengasemihleni yakudala, nanjengaseminyakeni yangapambili." 
Malachi3:5 Kodwa ndiya kusondela kuni kuze kugwetywe; ndandiya kuba linqi̔na elikaulezayo ngakuzo izanuse, nangakubo abaṙexezi, nangakubo abafungayo ngobuxoki, nangakubo abamhluta umqashwa umvuzo wake, ababandezela umhlolokazi nenkedama, nabasongayo owasemzini ebangweni lake, bengandoyiki mna, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi3:6 Ngokuba ndi nguyehova, andiguquki: kukona ningagqityelwanga, nina bonyana baka‐Yakobi!" 
Malachi3:7 Kuselokwemihla yoyihlo benu nipambukile kuyo imimiso yam, ningayigcinanga: buyelani kum, ndandiya kubuyela kuni, utsho uyehova wemikosi. Kanti niti: Sobuya nganina?" 
Malachi3:8 Woti umntu ampange utixo na? Nipangile mna noko. Kanti niti: Sikupangile nganina? Ngamashumi nangeminikelo. 
Malachi3:9 Niqalekisiwe ngesiqalekiso; ngokuba nina, esisizwe sonke, nindipangile." 
Malachi3:10 Zisani onke amashumi endlwini yokubekela, ukuze kubeko ukudla endlwini yam, nize nindilinge ke ngoku, utsho uyehova wemikosi, ukuba andiyi kunivulela na izituba zezulu, ndinitululele itamsanqa, kude kugqitise ukwanela." 
Malachi3:11 Nento edlayo ndiya kuyikalimela ngenxa yenu; ayiyi kuzonakalisa izixakato zomhlaba wenu: kanjalo umti weveyine wenu entsimini awuyi kuputa, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi3:12 Ewe, izizwe zonke ziya kuti ninetamsanqa; ngokuba niya kuba lilizwe elitandekileyo, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi3:13 Amazwi enu ebelukuni ngakum, utsho uyehova; kodwa niti: Yinto nina siyitetileyo ngakuwe?" 
Malachi3:14 Nite: Kufumana kukonzwa utixo; kunceda nto nina ukuba sigcina isigcinelo sake, nokuba sihamba silila pambi kwoyehova wemikosi?" 
Malachi3:15 Ngokuba kaloku siti banetamsanqa abar̔atshileyo; ewe, bayakiwa abo bayenza inkohlakalo; he, bayamlinga utixo, basindiswe noko." 
Malachi3:16 Oko batetana abo bamoyikayo uyehova omnye nomnye; wapulapula uyehova, weva ke; kanjalo incwadi yokukumbuza yaba̔lwa ebusweni bake, iba̔l elwa abo bamoyikayo uyehova, nabacingayo igama lake." 
Malachi3:17 Boba yinto enqabileyo kum, utsho uyehova wemikosi, ngalomhla endiwenzayo; ndandiya kuba nezibele kubo, njengokuba uyise enezibele kunyana wake omkonzayo." 
Malachi3:18 Niya kwandula nibuye niqiqe pakati kwolungileyo nokohlakeleyo, pakati kwalowo umkonzayo utixo, nalowo ungamkonziyo." 
Malachi4:1 Ngokuba, bona ke, umhla uyeza, oya kuvuta njengeziko; bandule abar̔atshileyo, nabo bonke abayenza inkohlakalo, babe zindiza, uti umhla ozayo ubatshise, utsho uyehova wemikosi, ude ungabashiyeli nengcambo nesebe." 
Malachi4:2 Kodwa nina niloyikayo igama lam, ilanga lobulungisa lonipumela, linokupilisa emapikweni alo; naniya kupuma, nidlobe njengamatole asesitaleni." 
Malachi4:3 Kanjalo nobanyatela pantsi abakohlakeleyo; ngokuba beya kuba lututu ngapantsi kwemizantsi yenyawo zenu, kulomhla endiwenzayo, utsho uyehova wemikosi." 
Malachi4:4 Kumbulani umteto ka‐Mosesi isicaka sam, lowo ndamyalelayo e‐Horebe ngenxa yo‐Sirayeli bonke, imimiso nezigwebo," 
Malachi4:5 Bona ke, ndiya kutuma kuni u‐Elija umprofite, ungekafiki umhla kayehova omkulu owoyikekileyo:" 
Malachi4:6 waeya kuti intliziyo yoyise ayiguqulele kubantwana, nentliziyo yabantwana ayiguqulele koyise; hleze ndize ke ndilibete ilizwe ngesiqalekiso." 
Luke3:25 obengoka‐Matitiya, obengoka‐Amotse, obengoka‐Nahume, obengoka‐Esili, obengoka‐Nagai," 
James5:11 Bona ke, siti banetamsanqa abo banyamezelayo. Ukunyamezela kuka‐Jobi nikuvile, nesipelo senkosi nisibonile, ukuba yona inkosi inezibele kakulu, inenceba."
